Genesis1:1 Omu kutandika kw'ebintu byona obu Ruhanga yaahanga eiguru n'ensi," 
Genesis1:2 ensi ekaba etaine ku erikushusha, erimu busha, n'omwirima gushwekire amaizi agari okuzimu, Mutima wa Ruhanga naazeereera eruguru y'ago maizi." 
Genesis1:3 Ruhanga akagira ati: Habeho ekyererezi; ekyererezi kyabaho. 
Genesis1:4 Ruhanga yaareeba ekyo kyererezi kiri kirungi; yaakitaanisa n'omwirima. 
Genesis1:5 Ruhanga ekyererezi yaakyeta Nyomushana, n'omwirima yaagweta Nyekiro. Mpaho bwaira bwasheesha, kyaba ekiro ky'okubanza." 
Genesis1:6 Kandi Ruhanga yaagira ati: Habeho orukanga ahagati y'amaizi, rugataanise na magyenzi gaago." 
Genesis1:7 Ruhanga yaahanga Orukanga, yaataanisa amaizi g'ahansi yaarwo n'ag'ahaiguru yaarwo kandi kyaba kwo." 
Genesis1:8 Haza orwo rukanga Ruhanga yaarweta Eiguru. Bwaira bwasheesha, kyaba ekiro kya kabiri." 
Genesis1:9 Kandi Ruhanga yaagira ati: Amaizi g'ahansi y'eiguru gateeranire omu mwanya gumwe, eitaka rireebwe. Haza kyaba kwo." 
Genesis1:10 Ruhanga eryo itaka yaaryeta Ensi, n'eiteeraniro ry'amaizi yaaryeta Enyanja. Ekyo Ruhanga yaareeba kiri kirungi." 
Genesis1:11 Ruhanga yaagira ati: Ensi emeze ebirikumera ebirikwera enjuma n'ebiti ebirikwana ebijuma, ebiine embibo, buri kimwe omu muringo gwakyo. Haza kyaba kwo." 
Genesis1:12 Ensi yaameza ebirikumera ebirikurugwamu embibo, nk'emiringo yaabyo oku eri; n'ebiti ebirikwana ebijuma ebirimu embibo, buri kimwe nk'omuringo gwakyo oku guri. Nakyo Ruhanga yaareeba kiri kirungi." 
Genesis1:13 Bwaira bwasheesha, kyaba ekiro kya kashatu." 
Genesis1:14 Kandi Ruhanga yaagira ati: Habeho ebirikwaka omu rukanga rw'eiguru, okutaanisa nyomushana na nyekiro; bibe obumanyiso bw'obunaku n'emyaka," 
Genesis1:15 kandi byakire omu rukanga rw'eiguru kuhwezesa ensi. Haza kyaba kwo. 
Genesis1:16 Ruhanga yaahanga ebirikwaka ebikuru bibiri: ekirikwaka munonga kutegyeka nyomushana, n'ekirikwaka mpora kutegyeka nyekiro; yaahanga n'enyonyoozi." 
Genesis1:17 Ruhanga yaabita omu rukanga rw'eiguru kwakira ensi," 
Genesis1:18 kutegyeka nyomushana na nyekiro, n'okutaanisa ekyererezi n'omwirima. Ruhanga yaareeba kiri kirungi." 
Genesis1:19 Bwaira bwasheesha, kyaba ekiro kya kana." 
Genesis1:20 Kandi Ruhanga yaagira ati: Amaizi gaijurwemu ebintu bingi ebiine amagara, n'enyonyi zigurukire ahaiguru y'ensi, nizicwekanisa omwanya gw'ahaiguru." 
Genesis1:21 Mpaho Ruhanga yaahanga ebikooko bihango by'omu nyanja, n'ebihangirwe byona ebiine amagara, ebirikwegyendesa ebiijuriraine omu maizi, nk'emiringo yaabyo oku eri; n'ebirikuguruka byona ebiine amapapa, ebya ibara muringo. Ruhanga yaareeba ekyo kiri kirungi." 
Genesis1:22 Ruhanga yaabiha omugisha, naagira ati: Muzaare, mukanye, mwijure omu maizi g'omu mayanja, n'ebirikugurukisa amapapa bikanye omu nsi." 
Genesis1:23 Bwaira bwasheesha, kyaba ekiro kya kataano." 
Genesis1:24 Kandi Ruhanga yaagira ati: Ensi erugwemu ebiine amagara, nk'emiringo yaabyo oku eri: Amatungo n'enyamaishwa, nk'emiringo yaabyo oku eri. Haza kyaba kwo." 
Genesis1:25 Ruhanga yaahanga enyamaishwa n'amatungo na byona ebirikugyendesa enda; ebyo byona nk'emiringo yaabyo oku eri. Ekyo Ruhanga yaareeba kiri kirungi. 
Genesis1:26 Bwanyima Ruhanga yaagira ati: Tukore omuntu omu nshusha yaitu, ashushane naitwe, haza ategyekye ebyenyanja n'enyonyi z'omu kaabunga, n'amatungo n'enyamaishwa z'omu nsi yoona na byona ebirikugyendesa enda ebyekurura aha itaka." 
Genesis1:27 Atyo Ruhanga yaahanga omuntu omu nshusha ye, yaamuhanga naashushana nawe, yaabahanga bari omushaija n'omukazi." 
Genesis1:28 Ruhanga yaabaha omugisha, yaabagira ati: Muzaare, mukanye, mwijure ensi, mugikubuure; mutegyekye ebyenyanja n'enyonyi z'omu kaabunga, na byona ebirikugyendesa enda aha itaka." 
Genesis1:29 Kandi Ruhanga yaagira ati: Reeba naabaha ebimera byona ebiine embibo, ebiri hoona omu nsi, n'ebiti byona ebiine embibo omu bijuma byabyo, bibe ebyokurya byanyu." 
Genesis1:30 Enyamaishwa zoona ez'omu nsi, n'enyonyi zoona ez'omu kaabunga, na kyona ekirikugyendesa enda aha itaka, naabiha byona ebiine amagara ebirikumera, kuba ebyokurya byabyo. Haza kyaba kwo." 
Genesis1:31 Ruhanga yaareeba byona ebi yaahangire biri birungi munonga. Bwaira bwasheesha, kyaba ekiro kya mukaaga." 
Genesis2:1 Bityo eiguru n'ensi na byona ebibirimu byahwa eikora. 
Genesis2:2 Aha kiro kya mukaaga, Ruhanga yaaheza omurimo gwe gwona ogu yaabaire naakora, kandi aha kiro kya mushanju yaarekyera aho kukora ogwo murimo, yaahuumura." 
Genesis2:3 Atyo Ruhanga yaaha omugisha ekyo kiro kya mushanju, kandi yaakyeeza; ahabw'okuba ahari ekyo kiro Ruhanga akahuumura yaaherize emirimo ye yoona ey'okuhanga." 
Genesis2:4 Okwo nikwo eiguru n'ensi byakurataine nibihangwa. 
Genesis2:5 Obu Mukama Ruhanga yaahanga eiguru n'ensi, hakaba hatariho ebirikumera nobu byakuba ebishaka ebirikushakamba ahansi. Manya Mukama Ruhanga akaba atakagwisize njura omu nsi, kandi hatariho muntu weena ow'okugihinga." 
Genesis2:6 Omurombe gukaba gwimuka niguruga omu nsi, gubobeeza eitaka." 
Genesis2:7 Atyo Mukama Ruhanga yaabumba omuntu omu mucuucu gw'ahansi, yaamwikiza omu nyindo omwitsyo gw'amagara. Mpaho omuntu yaaba ekihangwa ekiine amagara." 
Genesis2:8 Bwanyima Mukama Ruhanga yaata omusiri omuri Edeni, aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba, yaagutamu ogwo muntu ou yaabumburikire." 
Genesis2:9 Reero Mukama Ruhanga yaameza omu itaka ryamwo emiti ya ibara muringo. Egyo miti ekaba neehuzya owaagireeba kandi eri mirungi kuriibwa. Haza yaameza omuti gw'amagara ahagati y'ogwo musiri, n'ogundi muti ogw'okumanya ekirungi n'ekibi." 
Genesis2:10 Omuri Edeni hakaba nihashenenekamu omugyera gw'okwitirira ogwo musiri. Gukiheza kwogamu gwebaganisa, gurugwamu emigyera ena." 
Genesis2:11 Ogw'okubanza gukaba nigwetwa Piishoni. Nigwo ogwo ogwehinguriize ensi ya Haavila erimu ezaabu. 
Genesis2:12 Haza ezaabu y'omuri egyo nsi n'empuuhe. Amacanda g'omugaju bedeliyamu n'amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi onikisi nabyo biriyo. 
Genesis2:13 Omugyera gwa kabiri nigwetwa Gihooni. Nigwo gwehinguririize ensi ya Kuushi. 
Genesis2:14 Kandi ogwa kashatu ni Tiguriisi, ogurikuhimintikira burugwa-izooba bwa Asiriya; n'ogwa kana ni Eufuraati." 
Genesis2:15 Reero Mukama Ruhanga yaatwara ogwo muntu, yaamuta omuri ogwo musiri gwa Edeni, kuguhinga n'okugurinda." 
Genesis2:16 Haza yaamugira ati: Emiti yoona ey'omuri ogu musiri, noikirizibwa kugiryaho nk'oku orikwenda." 
Genesis2:17 Kwonka omuti gw'okumanya ekirungi n'ekibi, gwo otariguryaho; ahabw'okuba eizooba ri origuryaho buzimazima oryafa." 
Genesis2:18 Bwanyima Mukama Ruhanga akagira ati: Ti kirungi omuntu kuguma wenka. Ka mmukorere omuhwezi omushemereire. 
Genesis2:19 Mpaho Mukama Ruhanga yaabumburika omu itaka enyamaishwa zoona, n'enyonyi z'omu kaabunga zoona, yaazireetera ogwo muntu, kureeba amaziina gu araazeete, haza ekihangirwe kyona ekiine amagara, eki omuntu yaayetsire eiziina, niryo ryabaire eiziina ryakyo." 
Genesis2:20 Mpaho Adamu yaayeta amatungo goona amaziina, n'enyonyi z'omu mwanya n'enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa zoona. Kwonka omuri ebyo tihaabonekamu muhwezi omushemereire." 
Genesis2:21 Mukama Ruhanga nikwo kugwejegyeza munonga ogwo muntu; haza ku yaabaire akigwejegyeire, yaiha orubaju omu mbaju ze, n'ahi rwaruga yaigazaho enyama." 
Genesis2:22 Orubaju ru Mukama Ruhanga yaihire omu mushaija, yaarukoramu omukazi, yaamureetera ogwo mushaija." 
Genesis2:23 Reero ogwo mushaija yaagira ati: Mbwenu eri n'eigufa eryaruga omu magufa gangye, kandi n'enyama eyaaruga omu nyama zangye. Ayetwe Omukazi, ahabw'okuba yaihwa omu mushaija." 
Genesis2:24 Nikyo omushaija atsigiraho ishe na nyina, akahamira aha mukazi we, bakaba omubiri gumwe." 
Genesis2:25 Haza ogwo mushaija n'ogwo mukazi bombi bakaba bajwaire busha, batarikwitwa nshoni." 
Genesis3:1 Enjoka akaba eri enyabwengye okukira enyamaishwa zoona ezi Mukama Ruhanga yaahangire. Egyo njoka ekabuuza ogwo mukazi, eti: N'ekya buzima Ruhanga akabagira ngu mutarirya ebijuma by'aha muti gwona ogw'omuri eki kibanja?" 
Genesis3:2 Omukazi yaagarukamu enjoka, ati: Nitwikirizibwa kurya ebijuma by'aha miti y'omuri ogu musiri;" 
Genesis3:3 kwonka Ruhanga akagira ati: Mutarirya ebijuma by'omuti oguri ahagati y'ogu musiri, nobu kwakuba okubikoraho, mutakaafa." 
Genesis3:4 Enjoka yaagira omukazi eti: Timurikwija kufa. 
Genesis3:5 Manya Ruhanga naamanya ngu ku muraabiryeho, amaisho gaanyu nigaija kuhumuuka mube nka Ruhanga, mumanye ekirungi n'ekibi." 
Genesis3:6 Mbwenu ogwo mukazi ku yaareebire ogwo muti guri murungi kuriibwa, niguhuzya owaagureeba kandi nigwetengwa kuhaisa omuntu obwengye, atyo yaacwa aha bijuma byagwo, yaabirya; kandi yaabihaho iba, nawe yaabirya." 
Genesis3:7 Ahonaaho amaisho gaabo bombi gaahweza, baamanya ku bajwaire busha. Batyo baabaziira amababi g'omutiini, baayekoreramu enkyeetero." 
Genesis3:8 Omu mabeho g'omwabazyo, omushaija n'omukazi we bakahurira Mukama Ruhanga naagyendagyenda omu musiri. Omushaija n'omukazi we baayeshereka Mukama Ruhanga omu miti y'omu musiri." 
Genesis3:9 Kwonka Mukama Ruhanga yaayeta ogwo mushaija, naamugira ati: Ori nkahi?" 
Genesis3:10 Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Ku naahurira noogyendagyenda omu musiri naatiina, ahabw'okuba naaba njwaire busha; ntyo naayeshereka." 
Genesis3:11 N'onu amubuuza ati: N'oha owaakugira ngu ojwaire busha? Waarya aha muti ogu naakuzibiire kuryaho? 
Genesis3:12 Ogwo mushaija ati: Omukazi ou wampaire kuguma naanye, niwe yampa ekijuma ky'ogwo muti, naanye nkakirya." 
Genesis3:13 Mukama Ruhanga agira omukazi ati: Mbwenu ekyo, iwe waakora ki? Omukazi agarukamu ati: Enjoka niyo yambeihabeiha, naanye nkarya." 
Genesis3:14 Mukama Ruhanga nikwo kugira enjoka, ati: Ahabw'okukora ekyo, waakyeenwa okukira amatungo goona n'enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa zoona. Oryaguma ogyendese enda, orye omucuucu ebiro by'amagara gaawe byona." 
Genesis3:15 Ndyakwanganisa n'omukazi, oruzaaro rwawe n'orwe bibeerane abazigu. Orwo ruzaaro rukuhondahonde omutwe, naiwe orurume ekitsintsiino." 
Genesis3:16 Atyo akubuukana omukazi amugira ati: Ndyakukanyisiza obusaasi noozaara, ozaare abaana nooshaasha. Ebyo nobu biriba bityo, oryaguma oyetengye baro, haza akutegyekye." 
Genesis3:17 Bwanyima yaagira Adamu ati: Ahabw'okuhurikiza ebi omukazi waawe yaakugambira okarya ahari ogu muti gu naakuzibiire, nti: Otariguryaho; eitaka ryakyeenwa. Oryaguma orye ebyamwo obihendekyeire ebiro by'amagara gaawe goona." 
Genesis3:18 Riryakumereza amahwa n'amatojo, kandi orye ebimezire omu ishwa." 
Genesis3:19 Oryarya ebyokurya ebi otuutukiire; okuhitsya obu origaruka omu itaka; ahabw'okuba niryo waihirwemu. Ori omucuucu, kandi omuri ogwo mucuucu nimwo origaruka." 
Genesis3:20 Ogwo mushaija atyo ayeta omukazi we eiziina Eva, ahabw'okuba akaba nyina w'abaine amagara boona." 
Genesis3:21 Mukama Ruhanga yaakorera Adamu n'omukazi we ebijwaro by'empu, yaabajweka." 
Genesis3:22 Bwanyima Mukama Ruhanga yaagira ati: Reeba omuntu ahindukire nk'omwe ahariitwe, yaamanya ekirungi n'ekibi. Mbwenu nu, atakaagorora omukono, akacwa ebijuma aha muti gw'amagara, akabirya, haza akagumaho ebiro byona." 
Genesis3:23 N'ahabw'ekyo Mukama Ruhanga yaamubinga omu musiri gwa Edeni, kuhinga eitaka eri yaihirwemu." 
Genesis3:24 Yaabinga ogwo mushaija; kandi aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba bw'omusiri gwa Edeni, yaataho baakerubi na rurara erikutyankana, kandi erikuhindukira oku n'oku, kurinda omuhanda gurikuza aha muti gw'amagara." 
Genesis4:1 Adamu akateerana n'omukazi we Eva, yaatwara enda, yaazaara Kaini. Yaagira ati: Ahabw'okuhwerwa Nyakubaho, naazaara omushaija." 
Genesis4:2 Kandi bwanyima yaazaara Abeeli. Abeeli murumuna wa Kaini, akaba omuriisa w'entaama; Kaini we yaaba omuhingi." 
Genesis4:3 Obunaku ku bwahikire, Kaini yaareeta ebi yaayerize omu itaka yaabitoijera Nyakubaho." 
Genesis4:4 Na Abeeli yaareeta emwe aha mujigaijo erikwonka ey'omu busyo bwe bw'entaama; haza ebicweka byayo eby'ebishaju, yaabitoijera Nyakubaho. Nyakubaho yaasiima Abeeli n'ebi yaatoija." 
Genesis4:5 Kwonka tiyaasiima Kaini n'emitoijo ye. Ekyo kyareetera Kaini kugira ekiniga kingi, n'okuhinduriza ahamaisho." 
Genesis4:6 Nyakubaho yaagira Kaini ati: Ahabw'enki oine ekiniga, kandi ohinduriize ahamaisho?" 
Genesis4:7 Ku oraakore gye torikusiimwa? Kwonka ku oraabe otakozire gye, ekibi kibandami aha rwigi kikugwereire; kwonka iwe oshemereire kukisingura." 
Genesis4:8 Reero Kaini yaagira Abeeli omurumuna, ati: Ka tushohore, tuze omu ishwa. Mbwenu ku baabaire bari okwo omu ishwa, Kaini yaagurukira omurumuna Abeeli yaamwita." 
Genesis4:9 Bwanyima Nyakubaho yaabuuza Kaini ati: Abeeli, murumuna waawe ari nkahi? Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Tindikuhamanya! Mbwenu shi, niinye murinzi wa murumuna wangye?" 
Genesis4:10 Nyakubaho nawe amugira ti: Waakora ki? Reeba eiraka ry'eshagama ya murumuna waawe nirimpururiza omu itaka. 
Genesis4:11 Mbwenu waakyeenwa aha butaka obwayashamya akanwa kaabwo bukamira eshagama ya murumuna waawe, ei waasheesha." 
Genesis4:12 Ku orihinga eitaka, tiririkwereza byokurya bundi; oryaguma ori empungi kandi ekizengyerezi omu nsi." 
Genesis4:13 Kaini yaagira Nyakubaho ati: Ekifubiro ki wampa ka ni kihango, eki ntarikubaasa kwemera!" 
Genesis4:14 Reeba, eri izooba wancwa aha butaka, kandi tinkireebwa mu maisho gaawe. Haza ndyaguma ndi empungi kandi ekizengyerezi omu nsi, na weena orindeeba aryanyita." 
Genesis4:15 Nyakubaho nikwo kumugira ati: Tikwo kiri! Ku harigira owaita Kaini, aryahoorwa emirundi mushanju. Atyo Nyakubaho yaata akamanyiso ahari Kaini, ngu weena orimubugana, atarimwita." 
Genesis4:16 Bwanyima Kaini yaaruga omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, yaatuura omu nsi y'oburugwa-izooba ari ekizengyerezi." 
Genesis4:17 Kaini akateerana n'omukazi we, yaatwara enda, yaazaara Enoka. Kandi yaayombeka orurembo, yaarweterera omutabani Enoka." 
Genesis4:18 Enoka akazaara Iradi, na Iradi yaaba ishe wa Mehuyaeli, Mehuyaeli nawe yaaba ishe wa Metushaeli, na Metushaeli yaaba ishe wa Lameki." 
Genesis4:19 Lameki akashwera abakazi babiri. Omwe akaba naayetwa Aada, n'ondi naayetwa Ziila." 
Genesis4:20 Aada akazaara Yabali, ishenkuru w'abaraara omu mahema baine amatungo." 
Genesis4:21 Eiziina ry'omurumuna rikaba riri Yubali; niwe ishenkuru w'abateezi b'enanga n'emikuri. 
Genesis4:22 Ziila nawe akazaara Tubali-Kaini, owaabaire ari omuheesi w'eby'okusharuza eby'emiringa n'eby'ebyoma. Kandi munyaanya wa Tubali-Kaini akaba ari Naama." 
Genesis4:23 Lameki ogwo akagira abakazi be, ati: Aada, na Ziila nimumpurire! Imwe baka Lameki nimuhurire eki ndikugamba: Nyitsire omuntu ahabw'okumputaaza, omutsigazi ahabw'okunteera." 
Genesis4:24 Kaini ku araabe naahoorerwa emirundi mushanju, buzimazima Lameki n'ow'okuhoorerwa emirundi makumi mushanju na mushanju." 
Genesis4:25 Adamu akagaruka yaateerana n'omukazi we; ogwo mukazi yaazaara omutabani, yaamweta Seeti, ahabw'okuba akagira ati: Ruhanga anshumbuusize ondiijo mwana, omu mwanya gwa Abeeli ou Kaini yaitsire." 
Genesis4:26 Seeti nawe akazaara omutabani, yaamweta Enosi. Obwo nibwo abantu baatandika kuramya Nyakubaho nibamweta eiziina Nyakubaho." 
Genesis5:1 Eki n'ekitabo ky'oruzaaro rwa Adamu. Obu Ruhanga yaahanga omuntu, akamuhanga naashushana nawe." 
Genesis5:2 Akabahanga bari omushaija n'omukazi; yaabaha omugisha, yaabeeta eiziina Muntu obu baahangwa." 
Genesis5:3 Adamu ku yaaherize kuhitsya emyaka igana na makumi ashatu, yaazaara omwana w'omwojo orikumushusha, yaamweta Seeti." 
Genesis5:4 Emyaka ei Adamu yaamazire aherize kuzaara Seeti ni magana munaana; kandi akazaara abandi batabani n'abahara. 
Genesis5:5 Bityo ebiro ebi Adamu yaamazire akihuriire byaba emyaka magana mwenda na makumi ashatu; atyo yaafa. 
Genesis5:6 Seeti ku yaahikize emyaka igana n'etaano, yaazaara Enosi." 
Genesis5:7 Seeti ogwo ku yaaherize kuzaara Enosi, yaamara emyaka magana munaana na mushanju; kandi akazaara abandi batabani n'abahara." 
Genesis5:8 Bityo ebiro ebi Seeti yaamazire akihuriire byaba emyaka magana mwenda na ikumi n'ebiri; atyo yaafa. 
Genesis5:9 Enosi akazaara Kenani, yaaherize kuhitsya emyaka makumi mwenda." 
Genesis5:10 Enosi ogwo, ku yaaherize kuzaara Kenani, yaamara emyaka magana munaana na ikumi n'etaano; kandi akazaana abandi batabani n'abahara." 
Genesis5:11 Bityo ebiro bya Enosi byona byaba emyaka magana mwenda n'etaano; atyo yaafa. 
Genesis5:12 Kenani, ku yaamazire emyaka makumi mushanju y'obukuru, yaazaara Mahaalaleli." 
Genesis5:13 Kenani ogwo akamara emyaka magana munaana na makumi ana, Mahaalaleli yaaherize kuzaarwa, kandi akazaara abandi batabani n'abahara." 
Genesis5:14 Bityo ebiro bya Kenani byona byaba emyaka magana mwenda na ikumi; atyo yaafa. 
Genesis5:15 Mahaalaleli, ku yaahikize emyaka makumi mukaaga n'etaano, yaazaara Yaredi." 
Genesis5:16 Mahaalaleli ogwo, Yaredi ku yaaherize kuzaarwa, yaamara emyaka magana munaana na makumi ashatu ei yaazaariiremu abandi batabani n'abahara." 
Genesis5:17 Bityo ebiro bya Mahaalaleli byona byaba emyaka magana munaana na makumi mwenda n'etaano; atyo yaafa. 
Genesis5:18 Yaredi, ku yaahikize emyaka igana na makumi mukaaga n'ebiri, yaazaara Enoka." 
Genesis5:19 Ku yaamazire kuzaara Enoka, yaamara emyaka magana munaana ei yaazaariiremu abandi batabani n'abahara." 
Genesis5:20 Bityo ebiro bya Yaredi byona byaba emyaka magana mwenda na makumi mukaaga n'ebiri; atyo yaafa. 
Genesis5:21 Enoka, ku yaahikize emyaka y'obukuru makumi mukaaga n'etaano, yaazaara Metuusela." 
Genesis5:22 Enoka, ku yaaherize kuzaara Metuusela, yaaguma akwataniise na Ruhanga, kandi yaamara emyaka magana ashatu, ei yaazaariiremu abandi batabani n'abahara." 
Genesis5:23 Bityo ebiro bya Enoka byona byaba emyaka magana ashatu na makumi mukaaga n'etaano. 
Genesis5:24 Enoka akatuura na Ruhanga, bwanyima yaabura, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga akamutwara." 
Genesis5:25 Metuusela, ku yaahikize emyaka igana na makumi munaana na mushanju, yaazaara Lameki." 
Genesis5:26 Metuusela ogwo, ku yaaherize kuzaara Lameki, yaamara emyaka magana mushanju na makumi munaana n'ebiri ei yaazaariiremu abandi batabani n'abahara." 
Genesis5:27 Bityo ebiro bya Metuusela byona byaba emyaka magana mwenda na makumi mukaaga na mwenda; atyo yaafa. 
Genesis5:28 Lameki nawe, ku yaahikize emyaka igana na makumi munaana n'ebiri, yaazaara omutabani," 
Genesis5:29 yaamweta eiziina Noa, naagira ati: ogu niwe arituruhuura omu mirimo yaitu, n'omu kwehenenga kwaitu omuri egi nsi ei Nyakubaho yaakyeenire." 
Genesis5:30 Lameki, ku yaaherize kuzaara Noa, yaamara emyaka magana ataano na makumi mwenda n'etaano, ei yaazaariiremu abandi batabani n'abahara." 
Genesis5:31 Emyaka yoona ei Lameki yaamazire, yaahika magana mushanju na makumi mushanju na mushanju, yaafa." 
Genesis5:32 Noa nawe, ku yaaherize kuhitsya emyaka magana ataano y'obukuru, yaazaara Seemu na Haamu na Yafeeti." 
Genesis6:1 Abantu ku baatandikire kukanya omu nsi, baazaara abaishiki." 
Genesis6:2 Abaana ba Ruhanga baareeba bahara b'abantu bari barungi, haza baabashweramu abu baarigiire." 
Genesis6:3 Nyakubaho nikwo kugira ati: Mutima wangye oha amagara, tariguma mu muntu ebiro byona, ahabw'okuba aine omubiri ogufa. Ebiro by'amagara ge biryaba emyaka igana na makumi abiri." 
Genesis6:4 Omu biro ebyo, nangwa na bwanyima, omu nsi hakaba harimu abantu ebikaaka. Obwo nibwo abaana ba Ruhanga baashwera bahara b'abantu, bakabazaaraho abaana, abaabaire amamanzi omuri ebyo biro, bari abantu rugambwa." 
Genesis6:5 Nyakubaho akareeba obubi bw'omuntu buri bwingi omu nsi, na buri kiteekateeko kyona eky'omu mitima yaabo kiri kibi obutoosha." 
Genesis6:6 Nyakubaho atyo yaayefuuza eki yaahangiire omuntu omu nsi, haza kyamusaasa munonga omu mutima." 
Genesis6:7 Nyakubaho nikwo kugira ati: Ndyamariraho kimwe ahansi omuntu ou naahangire, abantu n'enyamaishwa, n'ebirikugyendesa enda, n'ebirikugurukira omu kaabunga; ahabw'okuba nyefuurize eki naabihangiire." 
Genesis6:8 Kwonka Noa we, Ruhanga yaamugirira embabazi." 
Genesis6:9 Oku nikwo Noa yaabaire ari n'oku yaazaire. Noa ogwo akaba ari omuntu ohikiriire, otaine kamogo omu b'omu biro bye. Akaguma aine emitwarize erikukwatanisa na Ruhanga." 
Genesis6:10 Kandi Noa akaba aine abatabani bashatu; Sheemu na Haamu na Yafeeti. 
Genesis6:11 Kwonka obwo ensi omu mireebere ya Ruhanga ekaba esiisikaire; eijwire eiraro. 
Genesis6:12 Ruhanga yaareeba egyo nsi, kandi buzimazima ekaba esiisikaire, ahabw'okuba abantu boona emitwarize yaabo omu nsi ekaba esiisikaire." 
Genesis6:13 Mpaho Ruhanga yaagira Noa ati: Mmaririire kumaraho byona ebiine omubiri, ahabw'okuba abantu bareeteire ensi yoona kwijura eiraro. Reeba niinyija kubicwekyereza mbimare omu nsi." 
Genesis6:14 N'ahabw'ekyo, oyekorere emeeri y'omuti gwa goferi, egyo meeri ogicwemu ebishengye, haza ogisiigye koroto omunda n'enyima." 
Genesis6:15 Oku nikwo oraagikore: oburaingwa bwayo bube mikono magana ashatu, obukiizi bwayo mikono makumi ataano, n'obwemi bwayo mikono makumi ashatu." 
Genesis6:16 Egyo meeri ogiteho orukanga, reero ahagati yaarwo n'ebisiika otsigyeho omwanya gw'oburaingwa bwa mukono gumwe; kandi ogikorere omuryango omu rubaju rwayo. Ogitemu ekisiika ky'ahansi n'ekya kaanyina abiri n'ekya kaanyina ashatu." 
Genesis6:17 Manya reeba, niinyija kureeta omwegyemure gw'amaizi omu nsi, kucwekyereza byona ebiine omubiri n'omwitsyo gw'amagara, mbimare omu nsi; kyona ekiri omu nsi kife." 
Genesis6:18 Kwonka iwe niinyija kukukorera endagaano ehamire, otaahe omuri egyo meeri, iwe na batabani baawe n'omukazi waawe na baka batabani baawe." 
Genesis6:19 Kandi ahari buri kintu kyona ekiine omubiri ekihuriire, otaasye omuri egyo meeri bibiri bibiri ebya buri ruganda kubirinda bikaguma naiwe bihuriire; haza bibe biri ekishaija n'ekikazi." 
Genesis6:20 Aha birikuguruka omu nganda zaabyo, n'enyamaishwa omu nganda zaazo, na byona ebirikugyendesa enda aha itaka omu nganda zaabyo bibiri bibiri ebya buri ruganda biije ah'ori, kubirinda bikaguma bihuriire." 
Genesis6:21 Kandi hoona oyetwarire buri muringo gw'ebyokurya ebiriibwa, obihunikye, bibe ebyokurya byanyu n'ebyazo." 
Genesis6:22 Mpaho Noa yaatwaza atyo, yaakora byona ebi Ruhanga yaamuragiire." 
Genesis7:1 Bwanyima Ruhanga akagambira Noa ati: Taaha omu meeri, iwe n'ab'eka yaawe; ahabw'okuba ndeebire oku ori ohikiriire omu maisho gangye omu b'obusingye obu." 
Genesis7:2 Taahamu n'enyamaishwa mushanju mushanju ezitarikuzira, enshaija n'enkazi yaayo; n'enyamaishwa ibiri ibiri ezirikuzira, enshaija n'enkazi yaayo." 
Genesis7:3 Kandi hoona n'ebirikugurukira omu kaabunga, mushanju mushanju, ekishaija n'ekikazi, kurinda enganda zaabyo omu nsi yoona zihuriire." 
Genesis7:4 Manya omu biro mushanju niinyija kugwisa enjura omu nsi, emare ebiro makumi ana neegwa nyomushana na nyekiro; buri kintu kyona ekihuriire eki naahangire nkicwekyereze omu nsi." 
Genesis7:5 Mpaho Noa yaakora byona ebi Nyakubaho yaamuragiire. 
Genesis7:6 Obu omwegyemure gw'amaizi gwaija omu nsi, Noa akaba ahikize emyaka y'obukuru magana mukaaga." 
Genesis7:7 Reero Noa n'abatabani baataaha omu meeri kuhunga amaizi g'omwegyemure. 
Genesis7:8 Aha nyamaishwa ezitarikuzira n'ezirikuzira, n'aha birikuguruka n'ebirikugyendesa enda aha itaka," 
Genesis7:9 bibiri bibiri, ekishaija n'ekikazi, byataaha omu meeri na Noa, nk'oku Ruhanga yaamuragiire." 
Genesis7:10 Ebiro mushanju ku byahingwire, amaizi g'omwegyemure gaafukunkukira ensi." 
Genesis7:11 Omu mwaka gwa Noa gw'obukuru ogwa magana mukaaga omu kwezi kwa kabiri, aha kiro kya ikumi na mushanju eky'okwo kwezi, ahari eryo izooba, enshuro z'okuzimu zoona zikahimintuka n'emicungiro y'omu iguru yaiguka." 
Genesis7:12 Enjura yaamara ebiro makumi ana neegwa omu nsi nyomushana na nyekiro. 
Genesis7:13 Ahari eryo izooba, Noa n'omukazi we n'abatabani bonshatu Sheemu na Haamu na Yafeeti n'abakazi baabo baataaha omu meeri;" 
Genesis7:14 bo na buri nyamaishwa, nk'oruganda rwayo oku ruri, n'amatungo goona nk'enganda zaago oku ziri, na buri kyona ekigyendesa enda aha itaka nk'oruganda rwakyo oku ruri, na buri nyonyi nk'omuringo gwayo oku guri." 
Genesis7:15 Bityo byataaha omu meeri na Noa, bibiri bibiri, byona ebiine omubiri ogurimu omwitsyo gw'amagara." 
Genesis7:16 Kandi ebyataahiremu bikaba biri ekishaija n'ekikazi byona ebiine omubiri. Byataahamu nk'oku Ruhanga yaamuragiire, reero Nyakubaho yaamukingiraniramu." 
Genesis7:17 Omwegyemure gukamara ahansi ebiro makumi ana; amaizi gaakanya, gaimutsya emeeri, yaimuka yaaza eruguru y'eitaka." 
Genesis7:18 Amaizi ku gaakanyire munonga ahansi, gaashandaara, emeeri yaagazeereeraho." 
Genesis7:19 Ago maizi gakashandaara munonga aha nsi, gaamira enshozi zoona ez'ahansi y'eiguru." 
Genesis7:20 Okumanya ku gaashandaire eruguru y'enshozi, gakazimira, zaaguma okuzimu yaago, mikono ikumi n'etaano." 
Genesis7:21 Byona ebiine omubiri, ebyabaire nibigyendera ahansi, ebirikugurukisa amapapa, amatungo, enyamaishwa, n'ebihangirwe byona ebirikwekurura ahansi, na buri muntu weena." 
Genesis7:22 Ibara kintu, ekyabaire kiri ahansi ahataine maizi, ekyabaire kiine amagara ekirikwitsya, kyafa." 
Genesis7:23 Ruhanga yaacwekyereza atyo ekintu kyona ekiine amagara, ekyabaire kiri ahansi: abantu n'enyamaishwa n'ebirikugyendesa enda n'ebirikugurukisa amapapa omu kaabunga; byamarirwaho kimwe omu nsi. Noa wenka yaaba niwe yaatsigaraho, n'abaabaire bari hamwe nawe omu meeri." 
Genesis7:24 Reero amaizi gaashandaara omu nsi kumara ebiro igana na makumi ataano. 
Genesis8:1 Bwanyima Ruhanga akaijuka Noa n'enyamaishwa zoona n'ebitungwa byona ebyabaire biri hamwe nawe omu meeri. Ruhanga atyo yaahuuhisa omuyaga ensi, amaizi gaatandika kwijururuka." 
Genesis8:2 Enshuro z'okuzimu n'emicungiro y'eiguru byaigarwa, enjura eyaabaire neegwa neeruga omu iguru yaazibirwa;" 
Genesis8:3 amaizi gaaguma nigakyeiha aha nsi. Ku haahingwireho ebiro igana na makumi ataano, ago maizi gaatuuba." 
Genesis8:4 Mpaho omu kwezi kwa mushanju, aha kiro kya ikumi na mushanju eky'okwo kwezi, emeeri yaahitsya ekibunu aha nshozi za Araraati." 
Genesis8:5 Amaizi nago gaagumizamu nigakyeiha, okuhitsya omu kwezi kwa ikumi. Reero omu kwezi kwa ikumi, aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwo kwezi, emitwe y'enshozi yaareebwa." 
Genesis8:6 Ebiro makumi ana ku byahingwireho, Noa yaigura edirisa ry'emeeri ei yaakozire," 
Genesis8:7 yaatuma ekikoona, kyaguma nikikora oku n'oku, okuhitsya obu amaizi gaayomire ahansi." 
Genesis8:8 Bwanyima yaayohereza enkombe kureeba yaaba amaizi gaijururukire ahansi. 
Genesis8:9 Kwonka egyo nkombe tiyaabona h'okuteekama, yaagaruka ahu ari omu meeri, ahabw'okuba amaizi gakaba gakisyaraire omu nsi yoona. Atyo ashohoza omukono, agikwata, agitaasya omu meeri." 
Genesis8:10 Ku yaategyereizeho ebindi biro mushanju, yaagaruka yaagyohereza naagiiha omu meeri." 
Genesis8:11 Haza egyo nkombe yaagaruka ahu ari omu mwabazyo, eine omu kanwa akababi kabisi k'omuoliva aku yaacwire. Noa yaamanyiraho ku amaizi gaijururukire ahansi." 
Genesis8:12 Bwanyima yaategyerezaho ebindi biro mushanju, yaagaruka yaayohereza egyo nkombe, kwonka tiyaagira bu egarukire ahu ari." 
Genesis8:13 Omuri ogwo mwaka gwa magana mukaaga na gumwe, omu kwezi kw'okubanza, aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwo kwezi, amaizi gakooma ahansi, na Noa yaihaho ekyabaire kisangiire emeeri. Ku yaamagamagire, yaareeba ahansi hoomire." 
Genesis8:14 Omu kwezi kwa kabiri, aha kiro kya makumi abiri na mushanju eky'okwo kwezi, ensi yaayomooka." 
Genesis8:15 Bwanyima Ruhanga akagira Noa ati: 
Genesis8:16 Shohora orugye omu meeri, iwe n'omukazi waawe na batabani baawe n'abakazi baabo." 
Genesis8:17 Shohoza hamwe naiwe ebintu byona ebihuriire, byona ebiine omubiri ebi obaire oine ebirikugurukisa amapapa, n'enyamaishwa, na ibara kintu ekirikugyendesa enda ekirikwekururura aha itaka bibone kuzaara munonga, bikanye, biijurirane omu nsi." 
Genesis8:18 Atyo Noa yaashohora n'abatabani n'omukazi we na bak'abatabani," 
Genesis8:19 kandi buri nyamaishwa, na buri kirikugyendesa enda, na buri kirikugurukisa amapapa, na ibara kintu ekirikugyenda, byaruga omu meeri biri omu nganda zaabyo." 
Genesis8:20 Bwanyima Noa yaayombekyera Nyakubaho eitambiro, yaatoorana omu nyamaishwa zoona ezitarikuzira n'omu birikugurukisa amapapa byona ebitarikuzira, yaabihongyera aha itambiro biri ebihongwa bicwekize." 
Genesis8:21 Nyakubaho ku yaakagire ekisooroora kyabyo ekirikumugwisa gye, yaagira omu mutima gwe ati: Tindikyeena nsi bundi ningitura omuntu. Manya ebiteekateeko by'omu mutima gw'omuntu biba bibi okwiha omu buto. Kandi tindigaruka kucwekyereza ekihangwa kyona ekiine amagara nk'oku ngizire." 
Genesis8:22 Obunaku bwona ensi ekiriho, eibiba n'eigyesha, embeho n'obutagatsi, omushana n'enjura, ekyanda n'eitumba, nyomushana na nyekiro, tibirigira bu bihwaireho." 
Genesis9:1 Bwanyima Ruhanga akaha Noa n'abatabani omugisha, yaabagira ati: Muzaare, mukanye, mwijure ensi." 
Genesis9:2 Muryaguma mwitse obwoba enyamaishwa z'omu nsi, muzitiinise. Byona ebirikugurukisa amapapa omu kaabunga, na ibara kintu ekirikugyendesa enda ahansi n'ebyenyanja byona eby'omu mayanja naabibarekurira." 
Genesis9:3 Kyona ekiine amagara ekirikwegyendesa, kiryaba ebyokurya byanyu. Byona ebyo naabibaha nk'oku naabahaire ebirikumera." 
Genesis9:4 Kureka eki mutarirya n'enyama erimu orwamba; ahabw'okuba eshagama niyo egihaisa amagara. 
Genesis9:5 Kandi buzimazima eshagama y'amagara gaanyu ndyagijunaanira, ngihoorere enyamaishwa yoona n'omuntu. Omuntu weena oriita mugyenzi we, nawe ndyamumutura." 
Genesis9:6 Weena orisheesha eshagama y'omuntu, n'eye baryagisheesha, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga akahanga omuntu naamushusha." 
Genesis9:7 Mbwenu nimuzaare, mukanye, mwijure ensi, kandi mugitegyekye." 
Genesis9:8 Bwanyima Ruhanga yaagira Noa n'abatabani ati: 
Genesis9:9 Reeba, naabateeraho endagaano yangye, imwe na baijukuru baanyu," 
Genesis9:10 na buri kihangirwe kyona ekiine amagara ekiri hamwe naimwe, n'ebirikugurukisa amapapa, n'ebitungwa, n'enyamaishwa zoona ez'omu nsi ezi mwine, zoona ezaarugire omu meeri." 
Genesis9:11 Nimpamya endagaano yangye naimwe, ku byona ebiine omubiri bitarigaruka kucwekyerezibwa mwegyemure, kandi ku hataribaho bundi mwegyemure kugaruka kucwekyereza ensi." 
Genesis9:12 Reero Ruhanga yaagira ati: Aka niko kamanyiso k'endagaano ei naaragaana naimwe, na buri kihangirwe kyona ekihuriire ekiri hamwe naimwe, ahabw'enzaaro zoona eziribaho." 
Genesis9:13 Mbwenu naataho omuhanganzima omu bicu, gugume guri akamanyiso k'endagaano yangye n'ensi." 
Genesis9:14 Ku ndiguma naahiikisa enjura, omuhanganzima gwareebeka omu bicu," 
Genesis9:15 ndyaijuka endagaano yangye ei naabaragaaniire imwe n'ebihangirwe byona ebiine amagara; haza amaizi tigarigira bu gabaire omwegyemure obundi, kubicwekyereza." 
Genesis9:16 Omuhanganzima ku gurireebeka omu bicu, ndyagunagira eriisho, nyijukye endagaano etahwaho, ei nyowe Ruhanga naaragaaniire ebihangirwe byona ebiine amagara, ebiri omu nsi." 
Genesis9:17 Mpaho Ruhanga yaagira Noa, ati: Aka n'akamanyiso k'endagaano ei naaragaana n'ebiine amagara byona ebiri omu nsi." 
Genesis9:18 Batabani ba Noa abaarugire omu meeri ni Sheemu na Haamu na Yafeeti. Haamu ogwo niwe ishenkuru w'Abanyakanaani. 
Genesis9:19 Abo bonshatu, nibo baabaire bari batabani ba Noa, abaakomookirweho abantu b'ensi yoona." 
Genesis9:20 Noa niwe muhingi owaabandize kubyara emizaabibu. 
Genesis9:21 Haza ku yaanyweire viino, yaasinda, yaabyama omu ihema rye ateeshwekire." 
Genesis9:22 Reero Haamu, ishenkuru Abanyakanaani, ku yaareebire ishe ajwaire busha, yaagyenda, yaabigambira beene ishe aheeru." 
Genesis9:23 Sheemu na Yafeeti nikwo kwihaho omwenda, bakagweta aha mabega, bakagyendesa ekitsigaanyima, bakagushweka ishebo ojwaire busha, bakiikire omushaya batarikureeba ishebo ajwaire busha." 
Genesis9:24 Noa, ku yaasinduukire viino, yaamanya eki omutabani omuto yaamukora;" 
Genesis9:25 yaagira ati: Kanaani naakakyeenwe, akaba omuhuuku w'abahuuku ba beene ishe!" 
Genesis9:26 Yaayongyera yaagira ati: Sheemu, Mukama Ruhanga wangye naakamuhe omugisha, haza Kanaani akaba omuhuuku we!" 
Genesis9:27 Ruhanga naakakanyise Yafeeti, akamutuuza omu mahema ga Sheemu, haza Kanaani akaba omuhuuku we!" 
Genesis9:28 Omwegyemure ku gwahwaire, Noa yaamara emyaka magana ashatu na makumi ataano." 
Genesis9:29 Ebiro bya Noa byona bikahitsya emyaka magana mwenda na makumi ataano; atyo yaafa. 
Genesis10:1 Oku nikwo enzaaro za beene Noa: Sheemu, Haamu na Yafeeti, zaakurataine, obu baazaara batabani baabo, omwegyemure guherize kuhwaho." 
Genesis10:2 Aba nibo batabani ba Yafeeti: Gomeri, Magoogi, Madai, Yavani, Tubali, Mesheki, na Tirasi." 
Genesis10:3 Batabani ba Gomeri ni Ashekenaazi, Rifati, na Togarima." 
Genesis10:4 Batabani ba Yavani ni: Elisha, Tarushiishi, Kitimu, na Dodanimu." 
Genesis10:5 Abo nibo baakomookirweho abantu abaabugire ensi z'aha rubaju rw'enyanja. Kandi abo nibo beene Yafeeti omu nsi zaabo buri omwe nk'oku orurimi rwe ruri omu miryango yaabo n'omu mahanga gaabo. 
Genesis10:6 Aba nibo batabani ba Haamu: Kuushi, Misiraimu, Puuti, na Kanaani." 
Genesis10:7 Batabani ba Kuushi ni: Sheeba, Havila, Sabitahi, Raamahi na Sabiteka. Batabani ba Raamahi ni: Sheeba na Dedani." 
Genesis10:8 Reero Kuushi akazaara Nimuroodi. Nimuroodi ogwo niwe yaabandize kuba emanzi omu nsi. 
Genesis10:9 Akaba ari omuhiigi emanzi orikuhwerwa Nyakubaho. Nikyo kigambirwa kiti: Ninka Nimuroodi omuhiigi emanzi ohwerwa Nyakubaho. 
Genesis10:10 Endembo ezaabandize kubarirwa omu bugabe bwe ni Babeeli na Ereki na Akadi; zoona zikaba ziri ez'omu nsi ya Shinaari. 
Genesis10:11 Ku yaarugire omuri egyo nsi, yaaza Asiriya, yaayombekayo Nineeve, Rehoboti-Iri, Kalahi na" 
Genesis10:12 Reseni, ahagati ya Nineeve na Kalahi, orurembo oruhango." 
Genesis10:13 Misiraimu akazaara abantu b'omu nsi ezi: Luudi, Anamimu, Lehaabi, Nafutuhimu," 
Genesis10:14 Paturuusi, Kasulahimu, (eyaakomookirwemu Abafilisiti), na Kafutoori." 
Genesis10:15 Kanaani we akazaara Sidoni omujigaijo, na Heeti," 
Genesis10:16 n'Abayebusi, Abaamori, Abagirigaashi," 
Genesis10:17 Abahiivi, Abaaruki, Abasiini," 
Genesis10:18 Abarivaadi, Abazemari n'Abahaamati. Bwanyima emiryango y'Abanyakanaani yaabuga hoona." 
Genesis10:19 Kandi ensi y'Abanyakanaani ekaba eiha Sidoni egarura Gerari, ehika Gaaza; Kandi egyema ogurikutoora Sodoma, Gomora, Adama na Zeboimu, ehika Lasha." 
Genesis10:20 Abo nibo beene Haamu nk'emiryango yaabo n'endimi zaabo n'ensi zaabo n'amahanga gaabo oku byabaire biri. 
Genesis10:21 Sheemu mukuru wa Yafeeti, kandi ishenkuru wa beene Eberi, nawe akazaara abaana." 
Genesis10:22 Aba nibo batabani ba Sheemu: Elamu, Ashuri, Arifakisaadi, Luudi na Aramu." 
Genesis10:23 Batabani ba Aramu ni: Uuzi, Huulu, Geteri na Maashi." 
Genesis10:24 Arifakisaadi akazaara Sheela, na Sheela yaazaara Eberi." 
Genesis10:25 Eberi ogwo akazaara abatabani babiri: omwe akaba naayetwa Pelegi, ahabw'okuba omu biro bye nibwo ab'omu nsi baabaganisibwamu; kandi omurumuna akaba naayetwa Yokitaani." 
Genesis10:26 Yokitaani ogwo akazaara Alumodadi, Shelefu, Hazarimaave, Yeera," 
Genesis10:27 Hadoraamu, Uzali, Dikila," 
Genesis10:28 Obali, Abimaeli, Sheeba," 
Genesis10:29 Ofiri, Havila na Yobabu. Abo boona bakaba bari batabani ba Yokitaani." 
Genesis10:30 Ensi ei baabaire batwiremu ekaba neiha Meesha, egarura Sefari, ehika omu nsi y'ebibungo eya burugwa-izooba." 
Genesis10:31 Abo nibo beene Sheemu nk'oku emiryango yaabo n'endimi zaabo n'ensi zaabo n'amahanga gaabo byabaire biri. 
Genesis10:32 Egyo niyo yaabaire eri emiryango ya beene Noa nk'enzaaro zaabo oku zaakurataine omu mahanga gaabo. Kandi nibo baakomookirweho amahanga agaabugire hoona omu nsi, omwegyemure guherize kubaho." 
Genesis11:1 Omu bunaku obwo, ensi yoona ekaba eine orurimi rumwe n'engamba emwe." 
Genesis11:2 Mbwenu abantu ku baafurukiire burugwa-izooba, baashanga oruhita omu nsi ya Shinaari, baarutuuramu." 
Genesis11:3 Haza baagambirana bati: Nimwije tubumbe amatafaari, tugootsye. Batyo baakoresa amatafaari omu mwanya gw'amabaare, na koroto omu mwanya gw'obudongo." 
Genesis11:4 Bwanyima baagira bati: Nimwije tweyombekyere orurembo ruriho omunaara, eitungu ryagwo rihikye omu iguru; twetungire eiziina, turekye kutaataanira omu nsi yoona." 
Genesis11:5 Mbwenu Nyakubaho akashuuma, yaija kureeba orurembo n'omunaara ebi abaana b'abantu baayombekire." 
Genesis11:6 Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Reeba aba bantu n'eihanga rimwe, kandi nibagamba orurimi rumwe. Mbwenu egi n'entandikiro y'ebi baraakore; haza omu bi barikuconya kukora, tihariho kiribarema." 
Genesis11:7 Mbwenu nimwije tushuumeyo, turabanisemu orurimi rwabo, barekye kwetegyereza ebi barikugambirana." 
Genesis11:8 Nyakubaho atyo abataataanisiza omu mahanga; barugayo, babuga ensi yoona; barekyera aho okwombeka orwo rurembo." 
Genesis11:9 Nikyo rwayeteirwe eiziina Babeeli, ngu ahabw'okuba okwo niyo Nyakubaho yaarabanisiizemu orurimi rw'ab'omu nsi yoona, kandi niyo yaabaihire naabataataanisiza omu mahanga, bakabuga ensi yoona." 
Genesis11:10 Oru nirwo ruzaaro rwa Sheemu. Sheemu ku yaahikize emyaka igana y'obukuru yaazaara Arifakisaadi, omwegyemure gumazire emyaka ebiri guhwaireho." 
Genesis11:11 Reero Sheemu ku yaaherize kuzaara Arifakisaadi, yaamara emyaka magana ataano ei yaazaariiremu abandi batabani n'abahara." 
Genesis11:12 Arifakisaadi ku yaahikize emyaka makumi ashatu n'etaano yaazaara Sheela. 
Genesis11:13 Bwanyima Arifakisaadi ku yaaherize kuzaara Sheela, yaamara emyaka magana ana n'eshatu ei yaazaariiremu abandi batabani n'abahara." 
Genesis11:14 Sheela nawe ku yaahikize emyaka makumi ashatu yaazaara Eberi. 
Genesis11:15 Reero Sheela ku yaaherize kuzaara Eberi, yaamara emyaka magana ana n'eshatu ei yaazaariiremu abandi batabani n'abahara." 
Genesis11:16 Eberi ku yaahikize emyaka makumi ashatu n'ena yaazaara Pelegi. 
Genesis11:17 Eberi ku yaaherize kuzaara Pelegi yaamara emyaka magana ana na makumi ashatu ei yaazaariiremu abandi batabani n'abahara. 
Genesis11:18 Pelegi ku yaahikize emyaka makumi ashatu, yaazaara Reu." 
Genesis11:19 Pelegi ku yaaherize kuzaara Reu yaamara emyaka magana abiri na mwenda, ei yaazaariiremu abandi batabani n'abahara." 
Genesis11:20 Reu ku yaahikize emyaka ashatu n'ebiri yaazaara Serugi. 
Genesis11:21 Kandi Reu ku yaaherize kuzaara Serugi, yaamara emyaka magana abiri na mushanju, ei yaazaariiremu abandi batabani n'abahara." 
Genesis11:22 Serugi nawe ku yaahikize emyaka makumi ashatu yaazaara Nahori. 
Genesis11:23 Serugi ku yaaherize kuzaara Nahori yaamara emyaka magana abiri, ei yaazaariiremu abandi batabani n'abahara." 
Genesis11:24 Nahori ku yaahikize emyaka makumi abiri na mwenda, yaazaara Teera." 
Genesis11:25 Bwanyima Nahori ku yaaherize kuzaara Teera yaamara emyaka igana na makumi mwenda, ei yaazaariiremu abandi batabani n'abahara." 
Genesis11:26 Teera nawe ku yaahikize emyaka makumi mushanju, yaazaara Aburahamu, Nahori na Harani." 
Genesis11:27 Mbwenu oru nirwo ruzaaro rwa Teera. Teera akazaara Aburahamu na Nahori na Harani. Harani yaazaara Looti. 
Genesis11:28 Kwonka Harani akafa Teera ishe atakafiire, yaagwa Uuri ey'Abakaludaaya, ensi ei yaazaariirwemu." 
Genesis11:29 Reero Aburahamu na Nahori bakashwera abakazi. Muka Aburahamu akaba naayetwa Sarai, na muka Nahori naayetwa Milika, muhara wa Harani, ishe wa Milika na Isika." 
Genesis11:30 Mbwenu Sarai ogwo akaba engumba, tiyaazaara mwana." 
Genesis11:31 Teera akatwara omutabani Aburahamu, na Looti mutabani wa Harani, omwijukuru, na Sarai omukaamwana, muk'omutabani Aburahamu, baaruga kumwe Uuri ey'Abakaludaaya kuza omu nsi ya Kanaani. Kwonka ku baahikire Harani, baaba niyo baatuura." 
Genesis11:32 Ebiro by'amagara ga Teera bikahika emyaka magana abiri n'etaano; Teera ogwo yaafa, yaagwa Harani." 
Genesis12:1 Mbwenu Nyakubaho akagira Aburahamu ati: Ruga omu nsi yaanyu, n'omu b'oruganda rwanyu, n'omu ka ya sho, oze omu nsi ei ndaakworekye." 
Genesis12:2 Ndyakwihamu eihanga rihango, nkuhe omugisha, ndeetere eiziina ryawe kurangaanwa, haza obone kuhaisa abandi emigisha." 
Genesis12:3 Ndyaha omugisha abarikwendeza emigisha, nkyeene abarikukukyeena. Omuriiwe enganda zoona ez'omu nsi nimwo ziriheerwa emigisha." 
Genesis12:4 Atyo Aburahamu yaagyenda nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiire, na Looti yaagyenda nawe. Aburahamu akaba ahikize emyaka makumi mushanju n'etaano obu yaaruga Harani." 
Genesis12:5 Kandi Aburahamu akatwara Sarai omukazi we, na Looti mutabani w'omurumuna, n'ebintu byabo byona ebi baabaire batungire, n'abantu abu baatungiire omuri Harani. Mpaho baimutsya kuza omu nsi ya Kanaani." 
Genesis12:6 Aburahamu akaraba omuri egyo nsi, yaahika omu mwanya ogurikwera oguri Shekemu, aha muti gw'Omuvure ogwa Morehi. Haza omu bunaku obwo Abanyakanaani nibo baabaire bari omuri egyo nsi." 
Genesis12:7 Bwanyima Nyakubaho yaabonekyera Aburahamu, yaamugira ati: Egi nsi niyo ndiha baijukuru baawe. Atyo Aburahamu ayombeka aho eitambiro, eri yaayombekyeire Nyakubaho owaamubonekyeire." 
Genesis12:8 Ku yaarugire aho, yaaza omu nshozi aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba bwa Beteli, yaateerayo eihema. Obwo Beteli emuri burengyerwa-izooba na Aayi emuri burugwa-izooba. Okwo nayo yaayombekyerayo Nyakubaho eitambiro, yaamuramizayo." 
Genesis12:9 Aburahamu yaagumizamu, naatoora ogurikuza Negebu." 
Genesis12:10 Mbwenu egyo nsi ekateerwa enjara mpango, Aburahamu nikwo kushuuma akaza Misiri kushuuhuukirayo, ahabw'okuba enjara ekaba eri nyingi omuri egyo nsi." 
Genesis12:11 Ku yaabaire ari haihi kuhika Misiri, yaagira Sarai omukazi we ati: Nimmanya ku ori omukazi murungi munonga." 
Genesis12:12 Mbwenu Abanyamisiri ku baraakureebe, nibaija kugira ngu ogu n'omukazi we; haza baanyite, iwe bakurekye." 
Genesis12:13 Mbwenu ogume obagire oti ori munyaanyazi, mbone kugira omugisha ahabwawe, n'okukiza amagara." 
Genesis12:14 Aburahamu ku yaahikire Misiri, Abanyamisiri baareeba ogwo mukazi ari murungi munonga." 
Genesis12:15 Kandi abategyeki ku baamureebire bati, baamusiimira Faraaho. Ogwo mukazi nikwo kutwarwa omwa Faraaho." 
Genesis12:16 Haza ahabwe, Faraaho yaatwaza gye Aburahamu. Kandi okwo Aburahamu akatungirayo amasyo g'entaama n'embuzi n'ag'ente n'endogoya n'abahuuku n'abazaana n'engamira." 
Genesis12:17 Kwonka Nyakubaho yaabonabonesesa Faraaho n'eka ye enfu mbi, naamutura Sarai muka Aburahamu." 
Genesis12:18 Faraaho nikwo kweta Aburahamu, akamugira ati: Beitu shi okantura ki? Ahabw'enki otarangambiire ku ari omukazi waawe?" 
Genesis12:19 Ahabw'enki okagira oti: Ni munyaanyazi? Haza naanye nkamushwera! Mbwenu nu, omukazi waawe ngugu omutware, ogyende." 
Genesis12:20 Mpaho Faraaho yaamuha abashaija, baamushendekyereza n'omukazi we, n'amatungo ge goona; baamuhitsya aha mwatano." 
Genesis13:1 Aburahamu akainamuka, yaaruga Misiri, we n'omukazi we, na byona ebi yaabaire aine na Looti ari hamwe nawe, baataaha Negebu." 
Genesis13:2 Mbwenu Aburahamu akaba atungire munonga amatungo n'efeeza n'ezaabu. 
Genesis13:3 Atyo yaaruga omuri Negebu, yaagumizamu yaahika Beteli, omu mwanya ogu eihema rye ryabaire ririmu bwabiso, rwagati ya Beteli na Aayi," 
Genesis13:4 omu mwanya ogu yaayombekiremu eitambiro omu kubanza. Haza okwo Aburahamu yaaramizayo Nyakubaho. 
Genesis13:5 Reero Looti owaagyenzire na Aburahamu, nawe akaba aine amasyo g'entaama n'ag'ente n'amahema." 
Genesis13:6 N'ahabw'ekyo egyo nsi ekaba etarikubahika bombi batuuraine, ahabw'okuba amatungo gaabo gakaba gari maingi munonga, batarikubaasa kutuura kumwe." 
Genesis13:7 Kandi abariisa ba Aburahamu n'aba Looti bakagirirana empaka. Omu bunaku obwo, Abanyakanaani n'Abaperizi bakaba batwire omuri egyo nsi." 
Genesis13:8 Reero Aburahamu yaagira Looti ati: Reeba nyowe naiwe twine obuzaare. Mbwenu ka turekye kugirirana empaka, abashumba baawe n'abangye bakaguma nibatongana." 
Genesis13:9 Mbwenu egi nsi yoona tekwanami omu maisho? Taana naanye. Ku oraatoore orubaju rwa bumosho, naanye niinyija kugarura orwa buryo, nari shi ku oraatoore orubaju rwa buryo, naanye ndabugarure orwa bumosho." 
Genesis13:10 Looti atyo ainamura amaisho, areeba omwegyeego gwa Yorudaani ogurikugarura Zoari gubobeire hoona. Obwo Nyakubaho atakacwekyereize Sodoma na Gomora; guri nk'omusiri gwa Nyakubaho, nari nk'ensi ya Misiri." 
Genesis13:11 Looti atyo ayetooranira oruhanga rwa Yorudaani rwona, kandi atoora ogwa burugwa-izooba; bataanuukana batyo." 
Genesis13:12 Aburahamu atuura omu nsi ya Kanaani, na Looti atuura omu ndembo z'omuri orwo ruhanga. Arugaho afurura eihema rye ariteera haihi na Sodoma." 
Genesis13:13 Obwo abantu ba Sodoma bakaba bari enyabibi, nibacumura munoga ahari Mukama." 
Genesis13:14 Looti ku yaaherize kutaana na Aburahamu, Nyakubaho yaagira Aburahamu ati: Naga amaisho nooyema ah'ori, oreebe orubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho n'orw'obwa buryo, burugwa-izooba na burengyerwa-izooba." 
Genesis13:15 Manya egyo nsi yoona ei orikureeba, ndyagikuha iwe na baijukuru baawe ebiro byona." 
Genesis13:16 Ndyakanyisa baijukuru baawe, babe nk'omucuucu gw'ahansi. Omuntu ku yaakubara omucuucu gw'aha nsi, na baijukuru baawe bakaabarwa." 
Genesis13:17 Mbwenu imuka ogyende nooraba omuri egyo nsi yoona, ahabw'okuba ndyagikuha." 
Genesis13:18 Aburahamu atyo afurura eihema rye, agyenda atuura haihi n'emivure ya Mamure omuri Heburooni; ayombekyerayo Nyakubaho eitambiro." 
Genesis14:1 Omu biro bya Amurafeeli omugabe wa Shinaari, Arioko omugabe wa Elasari, Kedorilaomeri omugabe wa Elamu, na Tidali omugabe wa Goimi," 
Genesis14:2 abo bagabe bakateera Beera omugabe wa Sodoma, Birisha omugabe wa Gomora, Shinabi omugabe wa Aduma, Shemeberi omugabe wa Zeboimu, n'omugabe wa Beela niyo Zoari." 
Genesis14:3 Abo boona baateeranira amahe gaabo omu ruhanga rwa Sidimi, aha nyanja y'omwonyo." 
Genesis14:4 Omu myaka ikumi n'ebiri bakaba nibategyekwa Kedorilaomeri, kwonka omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'eshatu baagoma." 
Genesis14:5 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'ena Kedorilaomeri n'abagabe abaabaire bakwataniise nawe baahurura, baagomoora Abareera omuri Ashiterooti-Karianimu n'Abazuzimi omuri Haamu n'Abaemimi omuri Sahave-Kiriyatamu," 
Genesis14:6 n'Abahoori b'omu nsi y'enshozi eya Seiri, okuhika Eliparani aharikwatana n'eihamba." 
Genesis14:7 Bwanyima baakubuuka, baahika Enimishipate (niyo Kadeshi), baakubuura ensi zoona ez'Abaamaleki n'ez'Abaamori abaabaire batwire omuri Hazazonitamari." 
Genesis14:8 Bwanyima omugabe wa Sodoma n'omugabe wa Gomora n'owa Aduma n'owa Zeboimu n'owa Beela (niyo Zoari), bakahurura, baatengyera orugamba omu ruhanga rwa Sidimi," 
Genesis14:9 kuteera Kedorilaomeri omugabe wa Elamu, Tidali omugabe wa Goimi, Amurafeeli omugabe wa Shinaari, na Arioko omugabe wa Elasari; batyo abagabe bana baarwanisa bataano." 
Genesis14:10 Obwo oruhanga rwa Sidimi rukaba rwijwire ebiina bya koroto. Mbwenu abagabe, owa Sodoma n'owa Gomora ku baahungire baabigwamu; abaatsigaraho baahungira omu nshozi." 
Genesis14:11 Abazigu nikwo kunyaga ebintu byona eby'omuri Sodoma na Gomora, n'ebyokurya byamwo byona, batyo bakagyenda." 
Genesis14:12 Baakwata na Looti mutabani wa murumuna wa Aburahamu, owaabaire atwire omuri Sodoma, baamutwara n'ebintu bye; batyo baagyenda." 
Genesis14:13 Bwanyima omwe aha baahungire yaija yaabigambira Aburahamu Omuheburaayo, owaabaire atwire haihi n'emivure ya Mamure. Ogwo muntu akaba ari Omuamori, murumuna wa Esikooli na Aneri, abaabaire bakwataniise na Aburahamu omu by'orugamba." 
Genesis14:14 Aburahamu, ku yaahuriire ngu mwene waabo bamutwaire ari enkwatwa, yaahurura n'abashaija be enkwata-ngabo magana ashatu na ikumi na munaana, abaazaariirwe omu ka ye, yaagyenda abakuratiire, yaahika Daani." 
Genesis14:15 Ku yaahikireyo yaabaganisa amahe ge kubateera nyekiro. Mpaho we n'engabo ze baabasingura, baababinga, baabahitsya Hoba, aha bukiizi bwa bumosho obwa Damasiko." 
Genesis14:16 Bwanyima yaagarura ebintu byona ebi baabaire banyagire, kandi yaagarura na Looti mwene ishe, hamwe n'ebintu n'abakazi n'abandi bantu abaabaire bakwatsirwe." 
Genesis14:17 Aburahamu ku yaagarukire naaruga kusingura Kedorilaomeri n'abagabe abu yaabaire akwataniise nabo, omugabe wa Sodoma yaija kumubugana omu ruhanga rwa Shave (hati orurikwetwa Oruhanga rw'Omugabe)." 
Genesis14:18 Reero Melikizedeki omugabe wa Saleemu, kandi omuhongyerezi wa Ruhanga Rukiraboona, yaareeta omugaati na viino." 
Genesis14:19 Ku yaabaire naabisiimira, yaagira ati: Ruhanga Rukiraboona, omuhangi w'eiguru n'ensi, ahe Aburahamu omugisha;" 
Genesis14:20 kandi Ruhanga Rukiraboona, okusingwize abazigu baawe, ahimbisibwe. Na Aburahamu yaamuha kimwe kya ikumi ky'eminyago yoona." 
Genesis14:21 Mpaho omugabe wa Sodoma yaagira Aburahamu ati: Mbwenu ompe abantu, reero iwe eminyago ogyetwarire." 
Genesis14:22 Kwonka Aburahamu yaagira ogwo mugabe wa Sodoma ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho Ruhanga Rukiraboona, omuhangi w'eiguru n'ensi," 
Genesis14:23 ku ntarikwija kutwara kahuuzi, nobu kaakuba akakoba k'enkaito, nari ekintu kyona ekyawe, otakaagira oti: Niinye ntungiise Aburahamu." 
Genesis14:24 Nyowe tindikwija kutwara kantu habwangye, kureka ebi abatsigazi bariire, hamwe n'omugabo gw'abashaija bu naagyenzire nabo; nikwo kugira ngu Aneri na Eshikoli na Mamure batware omugabo gwabo." 
Genesis15:1 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Aburahamu omu kworekwa ati: Aburahamu! Otatiina. Niinye ngabo yaawe, kandi ndyakuha ebihembo bingi munonga." 
Genesis15:2 Na Aburahamu yaamugarukamu ati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga, mbwenu noija kumpa ki? Manya ntuura ndi encwekye, n'omuhunguzi w'eka yangye ni Eliyeezeeri owa Damasiko." 
Genesis15:3 Aburahamu ayongyera agira ati: Reeba, tokampaga mwana, mbwenu omuhuuku owaazairwe omu ka yangye niwe ariba omuhunguzi wangye." 
Genesis15:4 Ahonaaho Nyakubaho yaamugambira ati: Ogwo tariba muhunguzi waawe; mutabani waawe nyakabara niwe arikuhungurira. 
Genesis15:5 Atyo amushohoza aheeru, amugira ati: Imutsya amaisho, oreebe omu iguru, haza obare enyonyoozi, yaaba noobaasa kuzibara. Bwanyima amugira ati: Na baijukuru baawe nikwo bariba." 
Genesis15:6 Aburahamu yaikiriza Nyakubaho; haza okwo kwikiriza kwamubarirwa kuba okuhikiirira. 
Genesis15:7 Mpaho amugira ati: Niinye Nyakubaho owaakwihire Uuri ey'Abakaludaaya kukuha egi nsi kuba eyaawe. 
Genesis15:8 Aburahamu amugarukamu ati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga, mbwenu niinyija kumanya nta ngu ndyagitunga?" 
Genesis15:9 N'onu amugira ati: Ndeetera enyana y'emyaka eshatu, n'ebuguma y'embuzi y'emyaka eshatu, n'empaya y'entaama y'emyaka eshatu, n'enkombe emwe n'eriiba rimwe." 
Genesis15:10 Nawe byona abimureetera, abihirimburamu kabiri; buri kiningu akitungikirira kigyenzi kyakyo, kwonka enyonyi zo tazihirimbura." 
Genesis15:11 Kandi amahungu ku gaizire kuteera egyo mitumbi, Aburahamu yaagabinga." 
Genesis15:12 Eizooba ku ryabaire nirirengarenga, yaarembibwa oturo, ahonaaho omwirima mwingi gurikwitsa obwoba gwamushweka." 
Genesis15:13 Reero Nyakubaho yaagira Aburahamu ati: Manyira kimwe ku baijukuru baawe barishuuhuukira omu nsi etari yaabo, bakabeerayo abahuuku, bakahatirwayo kumara emyaka magana ana." 
Genesis15:14 Kwonka ndyafubira eihanga eri bariba abahuuku baaryo, na bwanyima barugyeyo baine eby'amatungo bingi." 
Genesis15:15 Haza iwe oryafa n'obusingye, oshangye baashwenkuru; oziikwe ohikize emyaka ya bukuru." 
Genesis15:16 Bwanyima baryagaruka aha omu bwijukuruza bwa kana, ahabw'okuba ebibi by'Abaamori tibikahikire ha muheru." 
Genesis15:17 Eizooba ku ryarengire, bwaira; ahonaaho haareebeka ekikoomi kirikucumbuuka omwika, n'orumuri rurikwaka rwaraba ahagati y'ebiningu byombi." 
Genesis15:18 Eryo izooba Nyakubaho yaakorera Aburahamu endagaano, naagira ati: Egi nsi ndyagiha baijukuru baawe, okwiha aha mugyera gwa Misiri, okuta aha mugyera omuhango Eufuraati:" 
Genesis15:19 Ensi y'Abakeeni, n'Abakeenizi, n'Abakademooni;" 
Genesis15:20 Abahiiti, Abapeerizi, Abareefa," 
Genesis15:21 Abaamori, Abakanaani, Abagirigaashi, n'Abayebusi." 
Genesis16:1 Mbwenu Sarai muka Aburahamu akaba atamuzaariire baana. Ogwo mukazi akaba aine omuzaana Omunyamisiri, orikwetwa Hagari." 
Genesis16:2 Mpaho Sarai yaagira Aburahamu ati: Reeba Nyakubaho akaanyima oruzaaro; mbwenu irooko obyame n'omuzaana wangye, obundi akanzaarira abaana. Atyo Aburahamu aikiriza eki Sarai yaamugambira." 
Genesis16:3 Mbwenu Aburahamu ku yaabaire amazire emyaka ikumi omu nsi ya Kanaani, Sarai muka Aburahamu ogwo yaatwara Hagari Omunyamisiri omuzaana we, yaamuha Aburahamu iba kuba omukazi we." 
Genesis16:4 Nawe yaabyama na Hagari: n'onu yaabaka enda, kwonka ku yaamanyire ngu aine enda, yaatandika kugaya mugore we." 
Genesis16:5 Sarai nikwo kugira Aburahamu ati: Nkaahenwa ki bakugaya nk'oku bangayire! Nkakuha omuzaana wangye kukufumbata, mbwenu reeba ku amanyire ngu abakire enda, yaatandika kungaya. Nyakubaho k'abe niwe yaacwa orubanja rwangye naiwe!" 
Genesis16:6 Aburahamu nikwo kumugira ati: Reeba omuzaana waawe niiwe omwineho obushoboorozi; omukore nk'oku orikwenda. Sarai atyo atandika kumwitsa omwaga, n'onu nikwo kumuhunga." 
Genesis16:7 Bwanyima maraika wa Nyakubaho akamushanga omu ihamba aha iziba eriri aha muhanda gurikutoora Shuuri," 
Genesis16:8 yaamugira ati: Hagari omuzaana wa Sarai, nooruga hi, kandi nooza hi? Onu ati: Nimpunga mugore wangye Sarai." 
Genesis16:9 Maraika wa Nyakubaho nawe amugira ati: Garuka ahari mugore waawe, haza omworobere." 
Genesis16:10 Maraika wa Nyakubaho agaruka amugira ati: Ndyakanyisa munonga baijukuru baawe, bareme eibara ahabw'obwingi." 
Genesis16:11 Kandi maraika wa Nyakubaho amugira ati: Reeba oine enda, kandi oryazaara omwana omwojo, omwete Ishimaeli; ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho ahuriire okuborooga kw'okwitwa kubi kwawe." 
Genesis16:12 Ogwo mwana aryaba nk'enturegye omu bantu, arwanise ibara muntu, na buri muntu amurwanise, kandi aryaguma atwire hangahari abaabo boona." 
Genesis16:13 Mpaho Hagari ayeta Nyakubaho owaagambire nawe eiziina “Niiwe Ruhanga oreeba”; ahabw'okuba Hagari akagira ati: Buzimazima naareeba Ruhanga, haza ku naamureeba naaguma mpuriire." 
Genesis16:14 Nikyo eryo iziba ry'ahagati ya Kadeshi na Beredi ryeterwa Beeri-lahai-roi. 
Genesis16:15 Bwanyima Hagari akazaarira Aburahamu omwana omwojo; Aburahamu ogwo mwana omwojo ou Hagari yaazaire yaamweta Ishimaeli. 
Genesis16:16 Obu Hagari yaazaarira Aburahamu Ishimaeli, Aburahamu akaba ahikize emyaka makumi munaana na mukaaga y'obukuru." 
Genesis17:1 Aburahamu ku yaabaire ahikize emyaka makumi mwenda na mwenda y'obukuru, Ruhanga yaamubonekyera, yaamugira ati: Niinye Ruhanga omushoboorozi wa byona. Guma otwaze gye omu maisho gangye, otaine ky'okuhaahuuzibwa." 
Genesis17:2 Naanye ndyakora endagaano yangye naiwe, nkukanyise munonga." 
Genesis17:3 Mpaho Aburahamu yaagwa ahansi ajuumaire, na Ruhanga yaamugira ati:" 
Genesis17:4 Reeba, naakora naiwe endagaano, oryaba ishenkuru w'amahanga maingi." 
Genesis17:5 Eiziina ryawe tiryakiba Aburahamu, kureka niriija kuba Aburahamu, ahabw'okuba naakuhindura ishenkuru w'amahanga maingi." 
Genesis17:6 Ndyakuzaarukanisa munonga, nkwihemu amahanga, n'abagabe bakukomookyemu." 
Genesis17:7 Ndyahamya endagaano yangye naiwe, kandi ngihamye na baijukuru baawe waarugireho omu nzaaro zaabo zoona. Ebe endagaano etarihwaho, Nyowe okuba Ruhanga waawe kandi owa baijukuru baawe iwe waarugireho." 
Genesis17:8 Ndyakuha, mpe na baijukuru baawe abarikukurata, ensi ei oshuuhuukiiremu, ensi yoona eya Kanaani, kuba eyaanyu ebiro byona; kandi ndyaguma ndi Ruhanga waabo." 
Genesis17:9 Bwanyima Ruhanga akagambira Aburahamu, ati: Mbwenu iwe oryaguma orinde endagaano yangye, iwe na baijukuru baawe abarikukurata omu nzaaro zaabo zoona." 
Genesis17:10 Egi niyo ndagaano yangye ei origuma noorinda ahagati yangye naiwe na baijukuru baawe abarikukurata. Buri mushaija weena omuriimwe aryasharwa. 
Genesis17:11 Muryasharwa ekikoba ky'omubiri gwanyu, kabe akamanyiso k'endagaano yangye naimwe." 
Genesis17:12 Omwojo weena omuriimwe omu nzaaro zaanyu zoona ku arihitsya ebiro munaana azairwe, asharwe; yaaba azairwe omu ka yaanyu, nari mumuguzire empiiha aha munyaihanga otari w'omu ruzaaro rwawe." 
Genesis17:13 Abarizaarwa omu ka yaawe, n'abaguzirwe empiiha zaawe boona basharwe, endagaano yangye etyo ebe aha mubiri gwanyu endagaano etarihwaho." 
Genesis17:14 Omushaija weena otashazirwe ou ekikoba kye ky'omubiri kiriba kitashazirwe, aryacuubwa omu ihanga rye, ahabw'okuba aryaba aitsire endagaano yangye." 
Genesis17:15 Kandi Ruhanga akagira Aburahamu ati: Omukazi waawe Sarai otarimweta Sarai obundi, kureka eiziina rye riryaba Saara." 
Genesis17:16 Ndyamuha omugisha akuzaarire omwana omwojo. Ndyamuha omugisha abe nyinenkuru w'amahanga, abagabe b'amahanga bamukomookyeho." 
Genesis17:17 Aburahamu atyo agwa ajuumaire, haza asheka naayebuuza ati: Ebyo omushaija w'emyaka igana naabaasa kuzaara omwana?" 
Genesis17:18 Mpaho Aburahamu agira Ruhanga, ati: Ku okureka Ishimaeli akaba niwe yaaguma aine amagara omu maisho gaawe!" 
Genesis17:19 Ruhanga amugarukamu ati: Ngaaha, kureka Saara niwe arikuzaarira omwana omwojo, omwete Isaaka. Ndyahamya endagaano yangye nawe, ebe endagaano etarihwaho aha baijukuru abarimukurata." 
Genesis17:20 Kandi ahabwa Ishimaeli, naakuhurira. Reeba nawe ndyamuha omugisha, mmuzaarukanise, mmukanyise munonga. Aryaba ishenkuru w'abategyeki ikumi na babiri, kandi ndyamwihamu eihanga rihango." 
Genesis17:21 Kwonka endagaano yangye ndyagihamiza ahari Isaaka, ou Saara arikuzaarira omu bunaku nk'obu omwaka ogurikwija." 
Genesis17:22 Ruhanga ku yaaherize kugaaniira na Aburahamu, Ruhanga ogwo yainamuka omu iguru, yaatsigaho Aburahamu." 
Genesis17:23 Bwanyima Aburahamu yaatwara Ishimaeli omutabani n'abahuuku boona abaazaariirwe omu ka ye, nari abu yaaguzire empiiha ze, oyetwa omushaija weena ow'omu bashaija b'omu ka ya Aburahamu, yaabasharaho ekikoba ky'omubiri gwabo eryo izooba nk'oku Ruhanga yaamuragiire." 
Genesis17:24 Aburahamu obu yaasharwa ekikoba ky'omubiri gwe akaba ahikize emyaka makumi mwenda na mwenda y'obukuru," 
Genesis17:25 kandi omutabani Ishimaeli akaba aine emyaka ikumi n'eshatu obu yaasharwa. 
Genesis17:26 Eryo izooba Aburahamu na Ishimaeli omutabani bakasharwa. 
Genesis17:27 Kandi abashaija boona ab'omu ka ye, abaazaariirwemu, n'abaaguzirwe empiiha aha banyamahanga, nabo baasharwa hamwe nawe." 
Genesis18:1 Ruhanga akabonekyera Aburahamu aha mivure ya Mamure, ashutami aha muryango gw'eihema rye, omu ihangwe." 
Genesis18:2 Ku yaimukize ati amaisho, yaareeba abashaija bashatu bamwemereire omu maisho. Ku yaabareebire, yairuka naaruga aha muryango gw'eihema kubabugana; yainama ahansi kubatangirira." 
Genesis18:3 Yaagira ati: Nyakubaho wangye, ku oraabe nooreeba kinshemereire, naakweshengyereza otampingura nyowe omuheereza waawe." 
Genesis18:4 Ka bareete otwizi munaabe ebigyere, mube muhuumwireho ahansi y'omuti," 
Genesis18:5 naanye mbareetere akagaati, mugarukwemu amaani, haza mubone kugyenda. Manya mwahunguka aha muheereza waanyu. Nabo bamugira bati: Gira nk'oku waagamba." 
Genesis18:6 Aburahamu atyo ayehuuta naataaha omu ihema, ashangamu Saara, amugira ati: Rahuka otebeekanise encuro ishatu z'esaano y'obunono, ozikande, oziteekyemu otugaati tunuzire." 
Genesis18:7 Atyo Aburahamu airuka, aza omu busyo bw'ente, aihamu enyana nto nungi, agiha omuheereza we, n'onu arahuka kugiboneza." 
Genesis18:8 Bwanyima Aburahamu abatwarira amajuta n'amate n'enyama y'enyana ei yaaboneza, abibata omu maisho, kandi aguma abeemereire aha rubaju, nibariira ahansi y'ogwo muti." 
Genesis18:9 Reero bamubuuza bati: Saara omukazi waawe ari nkahi? Abagarukamu ati: Ari omu ihema. 
Genesis18:10 Nyakubaho amugira ati: Omwaka ogurikwija, omu bunaku nk'obu, tindibura kugaruka ah'ori, kandi na Saara omukazi waawe aryazaara omwana omwojo. Mbwenu obwo, Saara akaba ari aha muryango gw'eihema enyima ya Aburahamu, abategire okutu." 
Genesis18:11 Obwo Aburahamu na Saara bakaba bakuzire, bahikize engingo za bukuru, na Saara atakiza mu kwezi nk'oku abakazi baba." 
Genesis18:12 Saara nikwo kweshekyera, akagira ati: Mbwenu obu naakaikwire, na ibanye yaabaire eboote, omubiri gwangye nigukibaasa kushemerererwa eby'obushwere?" 
Genesis18:13 Nyakubaho atyo abuuza Aburahamu ati: Ahabw'enki Saara yaasheka, kandi akagira ati: Kwokwo, ebyo ndi ow'okuzaara omwana obu naakaikwire?" 
Genesis18:14 Mbwenu shi, hariho ekirema Nyakubaho? Manya omwaka ogurikwija, omu bunaku nk'obu, ndyagaruka ah'ori, na Saara azaare omutabani." 
Genesis18:15 Kwonka Saara ahabw'okutiina ayehakana naagira ati: Nyowe tinaasheka; n'onu amugarukamu ati: Ngaaha! Okusheka kwo waasheka. 
Genesis18:16 Bwanyima abo bashaija bakarugayo, baahika aharikureebana na Sodoma; na Aburahamu abashendekyereize kubooreka omuhanda." 
Genesis18:17 Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Mbwenu nsherekye Aburahamu eki ndikuza kukora? 
Genesis18:18 Manya Aburahamu ogu aryakomookwamu eihanga rikuru kandi ery'amaani, n'amahanga goona ag'omu nsi aryagahaisa omugisha." 
Genesis18:19 Ngaaha! Nkamutoorana ngu agume aragiire abaana be n'ab'eka ye abarimukurata, bagume nibaanyorobera nibakora ebihikire kandi eby'oburyo; Nyowe Nyakubaho mbone kuhikiiririza Aburahamu ebi naamuraganiise." 
Genesis18:20 Bwanyima Mukama yaagira ati: Ahabw'okuba orwari rw'abarikuborooga nibeetomboitera Sodoma na Gomora ni rwingi, kandi ekibi ky'ab'ezo ndembo kirengyesereize," 
Genesis18:21 n'ahabw'ekyo niinyija kushuuma, ndeebe yaaba ebi barikukora biri nk'oku abarikubeetomboitera babaregire; nari ku kiraabe kitari kwo, nabwo nkimanye." 
Genesis18:22 Batyo abo bashaija baarugayo, baagyenda baatoora ogurikuza Sodoma; Aburahamu we yaaguma ayemereire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Genesis18:23 Bwanyima Aburahamu akairira haihi Nyakubaho, yaamubuuza ati: Ebyo buzimazima noija kucwekyereza abahikiriire hamwe n'enyabibi?" 
Genesis18:24 Mbwenu omu rurembo orwo ku haakubamu abahikiriire makumi ataano, ogwo mwanya okaagucwekyereza; oreka kugusaasira ahabw'abahikiriire makumi ataano abagurimu?" 
Genesis18:25 Nikikabure! Iwe kukora ekintu nk'ekyo, okwita abahikiriire hamwe n'enyabibi, abahikiriire bakatwazibwa orugyero rumwe n'ababi! Ekyo nikikabure ahariiwe! Nk'oku ori Omuramuzi w'ensi yoona torikwija kukora ebihikire?" 
Genesis18:26 Na Nyakubaho yaamugarukamu ati: Ku ndaashangye omu rurembo rwa Sodoma abahikiriire makumi ataano, niinyija kusaasira ogwo mwanya gwona ahabwabo." 
Genesis18:27 Aburahamu agarukamu ati: Nyowe omucuucu kandi eiju onsaasire okwehanga nkagira eki naakugambira, iwe Nyakubaho wangye." 
Genesis18:28 Mbwenu aha bahikiriire makumi ataano, ku haakuburaho bataano? Obwo nabwo okaacwekyereza orurembo rwona ahabw'okuburaho bataano? Nawe amugarukamu ati: Tindikwija kurucwekyereza, naaba nshangiremu makumi ana na bataano." 
Genesis18:29 Atyo agaruka amugambira naagira ati: Mbwenu shi, ku haakushangwamu makumi ana? Onu amugarukamu ati: ahabw'abo amakumi ana, tindikwija kukikora." 
Genesis18:30 Bwanyima agira ati: Nyakubaho wangye otaguubwa kubi, naakweshengyereza ondekye ngambe. Mbwenu ku haakushangwamu makumi ashatu? N'onu amugarukamu ati: Tindikwija kukikora, ku ndaashangyemu makumi ashatu." 
Genesis18:31 Ayongyera agira ati: Reeba, naayehanga kugira eki naakugambira iwe Nyakubaho. Mbwenu shi, ku haakushangwamu makumi abiri? Nawe amugarukamu ati: Ahabw'abo amakumi abiri, tindikwija kurucwekyereza." 
Genesis18:32 Bwanyima amugira ati: Nyakubaho wangye otaguubwa kubi, naagaruka kugamba, kwonka omurundi ogu gwonka. Mbwenu shi, ku haakushangwamu ikumi? Nawe amugarukamu ati: Ahabw'abo eikumi, tindikwija kurucwekyereza." 
Genesis18:33 Nyakubaho ku yaaherize kugambira atyo Aburahamu, yaayegyendera, na Aburahamu yaagarukayo owe omuka." 
Genesis19:1 Baamaraika abo bombi bakahika Sodoma omu mwabazyo, baashanga Looti ashutami aha irembo rya Sodoma. Looti ku yaabareebire, yaimuka kuza kubabugana; yainama, yaajuumara ahansi," 
Genesis19:2 yaagira ati: Bakama bangye, nimbeeshengyereza mukubuukye, mutaahe omu nju y'omwiru waanyu, muraare, munaabe ebigyere, haza nyencakare mwimukye kare, mugumizemu orugyendo rwanyu. Baamugarukamu bati: Ngaaha, itwe nitwija kweraarira omu nguuto." 
Genesis19:3 Kwonka we yaabagyemesereza; baarugaho baakubuuka, baataaha omu nju ye; yaabateekyera obugyenyi burimu emigaati etatumbisiibwe; batyo baarya." 
Genesis19:4 Kwonka ku baabaire batakabyamire, abashaija b'omuri orwo rurembo Sodoma, abato n'abakuru boona oku batuura, baayehinguririza egyo nju." 
Genesis19:5 Reero baayeta Looti bati: Abashaija baija omwawe ogu mwabazyo barahi? Batushohoreze tubyame nabo. 
Genesis19:6 Looti atyo ashohora, abashanga aha muryango, ayegarura orwigi enyima." 
Genesis19:7 Haza abagira ati: Beene waitu, naabeeshengyereza mutakora ekintu kibi kityo." 
Genesis19:8 Reeba nyine bahara bangye babiri abashugaine, ka mbe nibo naabashohereza, mubagire nk'oku murikwenda; kwonka mutagira eki mwakora aba bashaija, ahabw'okuba baija kuraara omwangye." 
Genesis19:9 Baamugira bati: Tuhigize! Bongyera bati: Eki kishaija kikaija kushuuhuuka, reeba nikyenda kwehindura omuramuzi! Mbwenu twaza kukukora kubi okukira oku twakubagizire. Batyo bamiganira ahari ogwo mushaija Looti, bairira haihi kucwa orwigi." 
Genesis19:10 Kwonka bari bashaija bashohoza emikono bakununkirira Looti, bamutaasya omu nju ahi bari; bakinga orwigi." 
Genesis19:11 Kandi bahumya amaisho g'abo bashaija bari aha rwigi rw'enju, abato n'abakuru bafa kubi nibakorakoza kusherura orwigi." 
Genesis19:12 Bwanyima abo bashaija bagira Looti, bati: Oine abandi abu oine aha? Bakwe baawe, batabani baawe, bahara baawe, nari ondi weena ou oine omuri oru rurembo? Baihe omuri ogu mwanya," 
Genesis19:13 ahabw'okuba turi haihi kugucwekyereza. Manya okuborooga kw'abarikwetomboitera abantu baamwo, Nyakubaho akuhuriire. Nikyo atutumiire kurucwekyereza!" 
Genesis19:14 Looti atyo ashohora, agira abakwe abaabaire nibagamba obugyenyi bahara be, ati: Nimwimukye murugye omu mwanya ogu, ahabw'okuba Mukama ari haihi kucwekyereza oru rurembo. Kwonka ahari bakwe be, yaashusha nk'orikuteera obuyaga." 
Genesis19:15 Ku bwabaire nibutaagurikana, baamaraika baarigitirira Looti, bati: Imuka otware omukazi waawe na bahara baawe bombi abari aha, mutakaafubirwa hamwe n'ab'omuri oru rurembo." 
Genesis19:16 Kwonka we yaayeziringa; abo bashaija nikwo kumukwata omukono n'omukazi we n'abahara be bombi bakamushohoza, bakamuhitsya aheeru y'orurembo, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akamugirira embabazi." 
Genesis19:17 Ku baaherize kubashohoza, omwe ahari baamaraika abo yaagira Looti, ati: Hunga okize amagara, haza otareeba enyima, nobu kwakuba okugira ahi waayemerera omu oru ruhita, kureka ohungire omu bibungo otakaahwerekyerera." 
Genesis19:18 Looti nawe abagira ati: Ngaaha! Nyaabura 'mwe, bakama bangye!" 
Genesis19:19 Reeba nyowe omwiru waanyu mwankunda kandi mwangirira embabazi nyingi, mwankiza okufa; kwonka shi tindikubaasa kuhungira omu bibungo ntakaahikwaho akabi nkafa." 
Genesis19:20 Reeba orurembo ruriya obuseeri, orukye kandi orundi haihi kuhungiramu. Ka mbe nirwo naahungiramu. Mbwenu shi ti rukye? Haza niyo ndaakirize amagara." 
Genesis19:21 N'onu amugira ati: Reeba ekyo nakyo naakikwikiriza; tindikwija kucwekyereza orwo rurembo ru waagamba. 
Genesis19:22 Rahuka obe niyo waahungira; manya tindikwija kukora kintu kyona okuhitsya obu oraahikyeyo. Nikyo orwo rurembo rwayeteirwe Zoari. 
Genesis19:23 Looti atyo ahika Zoari, akashana kaatagata." 
Genesis19:24 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akafukunkura ahari Sodoma na Gomora obuganga n'omuriro ebirikumurugaho omu iguru; 
Genesis19:25 yaacwekyereza ezo ndembo n'oruhita rwona n'abatuuzi baamwo boona n'ebyabaire bimezire omu itaka. 
Genesis19:26 Mbwenu obwo, muka Looti akaba akuratiire iba, haza ku yaareebire enyima yaahinduka enyomyo y'omwonyo." 
Genesis19:27 Bwanyima Aburahamu akaimuka kare omu kasheeshe, yaaza ahi yaayemereire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Genesis19:28 Yaanaga amaisho ahansi embari ya Sodoma na Gomora, n'ogurikugarura omu nsi yoona ey'oruhita, ahonaaho yaareeba omwika gw'egyo nsi nigucumbuuka nk'ogw'ekikoomi." 
Genesis19:29 Ruhanga obu yaacwekyereza endembo z'omuri orwo ruhita, ezi Looti yaabaire atwiremu, nikwo yaijukire atyo Aburahamu akatambira Looti okucwekyerera." 
Genesis19:30 Mbwenu Looti akaruga Zoari, yainamuka omu bibungo, yaatuurayo n'abahara be bombi, ahabw'okuba akatiina kutuura Zoari; yaaguma naaraara omu nyanga na bahara be bombi." 
Genesis19:31 Reero omwishiki omujigaijo yaagira ow'omushubiro, ati: Tataitwe akuzire, kandi omu nsi egi tiharimu mushaija w'okutushwera nk'oku batwaza omu nsi yoona." 
Genesis19:32 Mbwenu ija tunyweise tataitwe viino tumusinze, haza tubyame nawe; tubone kwetsigariza oruzaaro rwa tataitwe." 
Genesis19:33 Batyo ekyo kiro baanyweisa ishebo viino; omwishiki omukuru yaataahamu yaabyama na ishe, haza we tiyaamanya bunaku bu ogwo mwishiki yaabyamiireho n'obu yaimukiireho." 
Genesis19:34 Aha izooba ryakuratsireho, omukuru yaagira omuto ati: Reeba nyekiro mbyamire na tata, mbwenu eki kiro ka tugarukye tumunyweise viino asinde, haza naiwe otaahemu obyame nawe tubone kwetsigariza oruzaaro rwa tataitwe." 
Genesis19:35 Batyo ekyo kiro bagaruka banyweisa ishebo viino; omwishiki omuto aimuka abyama nawe; n'onu tamanya bunaku bu yaabyamiraho n'obu yaimukiraho. 
Genesis19:36 Bahara ba Looti bombi batwekwa ishebo batyo. 
Genesis19:37 Ow'omujigaijo azaara omutabani, amweta Moabu niwe ishenkuru w'Abamoabu n'okuhitsya eri izooba." 
Genesis19:38 Ow'omushubiro nawe azaara omutabani amweta Ben-ammi niwe ishenkuru w'Abaamoni okuhitsya n'eri izooba. 
Genesis20:1 Aburahamu akaruga Mamure, yaatoora ogurikuza omu nsi ya Negebu, yaatuura rwagati ya Kadeshi na Shuuri, bwanyima yaashuuhuukira Gerari." 
Genesis20:2 Haza Aburahamu ogwo yaagamba ahari Sara omukazi we, ati: Ni munyaanyazi. Na Abimeleki omugabe wa Gerari yaatuma, baamureetera Saara." 
Genesis20:3 Mbwenu Ruhanga nyekiro yaabonekyera Abimeleki omu kirooto, yaamugira ati: Reeba waafa waazira omukazi ou otwaire, ahabw'okuba ni muk'omushaija." 
Genesis20:4 Kwonka Abimeleki akaba atakahikire ogwo mukazi; nikwo kugira ati: Mukama wangye, hoona shi, oite eihanga ritaine rubanja?" 
Genesis20:5 Tiwe anyegambiriire ati: Ni munyaanyazi? N'onu nawe akagira ati: Ni munyaanyazi? Manya nyowe ekyo nkikoreise omutima gw'amazima, n'engaro zitaine rubanja." 
Genesis20:6 Mpaho Ruhanga omuri ekyo kirooto, amugira ati: Eego, nimmanya ku ekyo okikozire n'omutima gw'amazima, kandi niinye nkurinzire kutakora kibi ky'okuncumuraho, nikyo ntakurekyeire kumukoraho." 
Genesis20:7 Mbwenu nu garurira ogwo mushaija omukazi we, ahabw'okuba n'omurangi, haza naija kukushabira ogumeho. Kwonka ku oraabe otamumugaruriire, omanye buzimazima ku ori ow'okufa iwe n'abaawe boona." 
Genesis20:8 Mpaho Abimeleki aguruka kare omu kasheeshe, ayeta abairu be boona abibagambira byona, abo bantu batiina munonga." 
Genesis20:9 Bwanyima Abimeleki ayeta Aburahamu, amugira ati: Otutuzire ki? Nkucumwireho ki waaza kwenda kungwisiza akagwe, nyowe n'obugabe bwangye? Manya onkoreire ebitakorwa." 
Genesis20:10 Abimeleki agaruka ateekurana Aburahamu, ati: Beitu waaza kukora ekyo, obaire nooteekateeka ki?" 
Genesis20:11 Aburahamu amugira ati: Ekinkoreise ekyo n'ahabw'okuteekateeka ngu omu mwanya ogu tiharimu kutiina Ruhanga n'akakye, kandi ngu nibaija kuunyita banture omukazi wangye." 
Genesis20:12 Kwonka orundi rubaju, ni munyaanyazi orikuzaarwa tata, otarikuzaarwa maawe, nikyo yaabeeraire omukazi wangye." 
Genesis20:13 Mbwenu Ruhanga ku yaanyihire omu ka ya tata, yampindura ow'okuzengyerera, naagira ogu mukazi nti: Eki nikyo ky'embabazi eki oshemereire kunkorera. Ahi turaahikye hoona ogume ongambeho oti. Ni munyaanyazi." 
Genesis20:14 Bwanyima Abimeleki areeta entaama n'ente n'abahuuku n'abazaana, abiha Aburahamu kandi amugarurira omukazi we Saara." 
Genesis20:15 Reero Abimeleki agira ati: Reeba ensi yangye ekuri omu maisho; tuura ah'oraasiime hoona. 
Genesis20:16 Kandi agira Saara ati: Reeba munyaanyako naamuha ebicweka by'efeeza rukumi, kukwihaho ekihemu omu maisho g'abari hamwe naiwe boona, abantu boona bamanyireho ku otaine ki oshobize." 
Genesis20:17 Bwanyima Aburahamu ashaba Ruhanga, na Ruhanga akiza Abimeleki n'omukazi we n'abazaana baabo bazaara abaana." 
Genesis20:18 Manya Nyakubaho akaba aimire oruzaaro ab'eka ya Abimeleki, naabatura Saara muka Aburahamu." 
Genesis21:1 Nyakubaho akagirira Saara embabazi nk'oku yaagambire, yaamukorera nk'oku yaaraganiise." 
Genesis21:2 Saara yaabaka enda, yaazaarira Aburahamu omutabani omu myaka ye ey'obugurusi, omu bunaku obu Nyakubaho yaabaire amugambiire." 
Genesis21:3 Aburahamu, omwana we, ou Saara yaamuzaariire, yaamweta eiziina Isaaka." 
Genesis21:4 Kandi Aburahamu, ogwo mutabani Isaaka yaamushara ahikize ebiro munaana azairwe, nk'oku Ruhanga yaabaire amuragiire." 
Genesis21:5 Aburahamu obu azaara omutabani Isaaka, akaba ahikize emyaka igana y'obukuru." 
Genesis21:6 Na Saara nikwo kugira ati: Ruhanga anshekize, n'oraakihurire weena naija kusheka naanye." 
Genesis21:7 Agaruka agira ati: Mbwenu n'oha owaakugizire Aburahamu ngu Saara nawe aryayontsya abaana? Kwonka mbwenu omu bugurusi bwe mmuzaariire omwana omwojo. 
Genesis21:8 Omwana Isaaka akakura yaacuuka; Aburahamu yaateeka obugyenyi buhango aha izooba ri yaacuukiireho. 
Genesis21:9 Mbwenu obundi Saara akareeba mutabani wa Hagari Omunyamisirikazi, ou Aburahamu yaabaire amuzaireho, naazaana n'omutabani Isaaka." 
Genesis21:10 Yaagira Aburahamu ati: Binga ogu muzaana n'omutabani, ahabw'okuba mutabani w'ogu muzaana tarihungura hamwe na mutabani wangye Isaaka." 
Genesis21:11 Ekyo kikagwisa kubi Aburahamu ahabw'omutabani Ishimaeli. 
Genesis21:12 Kwonka Ruhanga yaagira Aburahamu ati: Otaguubwa kubi ahabw'ogwo mwojo n'ahabw'omuzaana waawe. Kyona eki Saara araakugambire obe nikyo waakora, ahabw'okuba omuri Isaaka nimwo baijukuru baawe baryetererwa." 
Genesis21:13 Kandi hoona mutabani w'omuzaana waawe ndyamwihamu eihanga, ahabw'okuba nawe n'oruzaaro rwawe." 
Genesis21:14 Mpaho Aburahamu aimuka kare omu kasheeshe, aihayo omugaati n'endyanga y'amaizi, abiha Hagari, amuheekyesa omwana we amwohereza. Hagari agyenda, aguma naazengyerera omu ihamba rya Beerisheba." 
Genesis21:15 Amaizi ku gaahwaire omu ndyanga, yaatsiga yaarambika ogwo mwana omunda y'orushaka." 
Genesis21:16 Yaagyenda yaamushutama hangahari nk'ah'omwambi gugarukira baagurasha; agira ati: Ka ndekye kureeba omwana wangye naakaba! Mbwenu ku yaabaire akishutami ashungaine nawe; omwana yaimutsya eiraka yaarira. 
Genesis21:17 Ruhanga nikwo kuhurira eiraka ry'ogwo mwana, na Maraika wa Ruhanga omu iguru akeeta Hagari akamugira ati: Waaba ota, Hagari? Huumura! Manya Ruhanga yaahurira eiraka ry'ogwo mwana ahu ari." 
Genesis21:18 Mbwenu imuka, oiheho ogwo mwana omubumbatire, ahabw'okuba ndyamwihamu eihanga rihango." 
Genesis21:19 Bwanyima Ruhanga yaamwigura amaisho, yaareeba eiziba, yaagyenda yaijuza endyanga ye amaizi, yaaha omwana ekyokunywa." 
Genesis21:20 Ruhanga yaaguma n'ogwo mwojo; yaakura, yaatuura omu ihamba, yaaba omushaija enkwata-buta." 
Genesis21:21 Akatuura omu ihamba rya Parani, na nyina yaamushwererera omukazi naamwiha omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Genesis21:22 Omuri ago magingo, Abimeleki, aine Fikoli omukuru w'eihe rye, akagira Aburahamu ati: Ruhanga ari hamwe naiwe omu bi orikukora byona." 
Genesis21:23 Mbwenu nu ndahirira Ruhanga aha ku otaringobeza, nobu baakuba abaana bangye nari baijukuru bangye; kureka ngu nk'oku naakutwarize n'omutima murungi, naiwe obe nikwo wantwaza, kandi otwaze otyo egi nsi ei oshuuhuukiiremu." 
Genesis21:24 Aburahamu nawe yaamugira ati: Eego naaza kurahira. 
Genesis21:25 Bwanyima Aburahamu yaahaahuuza Abimeleki ahabw'eiziba rye eri abairu b'Abimeleki baanyagire. 
Genesis21:26 Abimeleki yaamwehohoora ati: Ekyo ka ntarikumanya owaakikozire. Naiwe torakingambiire, kandi tinkakihuriraga okuhitsya eri izooba." 
Genesis21:27 Mpaho Aburahamu agira entaama n'ente abiha Abimeleki; haza bombi bakorerana endagaano. 
Genesis21:28 Reero Aburahamu ashoroora omu busyo bwe abaagazi b'entaama mushanju; 
Genesis21:29 na Abimeleki abuuza Aburahamu ati: Abo baagazi b'entaama mushanju abu waashoroora n'ab'enki? 
Genesis21:30 Onu amugarukamu ati: Aba baagazi b'entaama mushanju obatware, naabakuha obone kuhamya ku niinye naafukwire eri iziba." 
Genesis21:31 Ogwo mwanya nikyo gwayeteirwe Beerisheba, ahabw'okuba bombi bakarahirirayo." 
Genesis21:32 Batyo baakora endagaano bari Beerisheba. Bwanyima Abimeleki na Fikoli omukuru w'amahe ge baimutsya baagaruka omu nsi y'Abafilisiti. 
Genesis21:33 Aburahamu nawe yaabyara omuti omushebeya omuri Beerisheba, yaaramizayo Mukama Ruhanga otahwaho." 
Genesis21:34 Bwanyima Aburahamu yaamara omwanya muraingwa omu nsi y'Abafilisiti ashuuhuukiireyo. 
Genesis22:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Ruhanga yaagyeza Aburahamu, yaamweta ati: Aburahamu? Onu yaamwetaba ati, Ndi aha, Nyamuhanga!" 
Genesis22:2 Yaamugira ati: Twara mutabani waawe Isaaka, omwana waawe nyamunegyere ou okunda; haza oze omu nsi ya Moriya, omuntambirire aha rushozi oru ndaakworekye; abe ekitambo ekicwekize." 
Genesis22:3 Atyo Aburahamu yaimuka kare omu kasheeshe, yaatematema enku z'okuhemberera ekitambo, yaatandiika endogoya, yaatwara babiri aha batsigazi be, hamwe n'omutabani Isaaka; yaimutsya yaaza omu mwanya ogu Ruhanga yaabaire amugambiire." 
Genesis22:4 Aha izooba rya kashatu Aburahamu yaimutsya amaisho, yaarangiza hare ogwo mwanya." 
Genesis22:5 Mpaho Aburahamu agira abo batsigazi be ati: Mugume aha n'endogoya, nyowe n'ogu mwojo tuze kuriya turamye, reero tugarukye tubashangye aha." 
Genesis22:6 Aburahamu atyo akiriza enku z'okuhembereza ekitambo, azeekoreza Isaaka omutabani; kandi we akwata omu ngaro omuriro n'omusyo gw'endiga; bombi bagyenda kumwe." 
Genesis22:7 Mbwenu Isaaka ayakura Aburahamu ishe ati: Taata! Onu amwetaba ati: N'enki mwana wangye! Amubuuza ati: Beitu omuriro n'enku ka tubiine, mbwenu omwana gw'entaama ogw'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya gurahi?" 
Genesis22:8 Aburahamu amugarukamu ati: Mwana wangye, Ruhanga niwe araayebonere omwana gw'entaama ogw'ekitambo ekicwekize. Batyo bombi bagumizamu." 
Genesis22:9 Ku baahikire omu mwanya ogu Ruhanga yaabaire amugambiire, Aburahamu yaayombekayo eitambiro, yaaritungikaho enku, reero yaaboha omutabani Isaaka, yaamurambika ahari eryo eitambiro aha nku." 
Genesis22:10 Bwanyima Aburahamu yaagorora omukono yaakwata omusyo kurezya omutabani. 
Genesis22:11 Kwonka maraika wa Nyakubaho yaamweta naayema omu iguru, naagira ati: Aburahamu, Aburahamu! Onu amwetaba ati: Ndi aha, Nyamuhanga!" 
Genesis22:12 Onu amugira ati: Otabangira ogwo mwojo omukono, nari kugira eki waamukora. Manya mbwenu naamanya ku orikutiina Ruhanga, ahabw'okuba tiwaanyima mwana waawe omwe nyamunegyere." 
Genesis22:13 Mpaho Aburahamu ku yaimukize amaisho, ahonaaho yaareeba enyima ye hariyo empaya y'entaama ekwatsirwe ebikamba omu mahembe; atyo agyenda aihayo egyo mpaya y'entaama, agitamba kuba ekitambo ekicwekize omu mwanya gw'omutabani." 
Genesis22:14 Aburahamu nikwo kweta ogwo mwanya, Nyakubaho niwe araayebonere; nk'oku kigambwa n'eri izooba kiti: Aha rushozi rwa Nyakubaho niho kiraabonerwe." 
Genesis22:15 Kandi maraika wa Nyakubaho akeema omu iguru, yaayakura Aburahamu omurundi gwa kabiri," 
Genesis22:16 yaamugira ati: Mukama naagira ati: Naayerahira, ahabw'okukora ekyo, otaime mwana waawe omwe nyamunegyere," 
Genesis22:17 buzimazima ndyakuha omugisha, nkanyise baijukuru baawe, babe nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru nari nk'omusheenyi gw'aha mwegyeego gw'enyanja. Haza baijukuru baawe abo baryakubuura amarembo g'abazigu baabo." 
Genesis22:18 Kandi omuri baijukuru baawe, amahanga goona ag'omu nsi nimwo gariheerwa omugisha, ahabw'okuba waikiriza kukora eki naakuragiira." 
Genesis22:19 Bwanyima Aburahamu yaagaruka ah'abatsigazi be baabaire bari, batyo baimutsya, baaza kumwe Beerisheba. Beerisheba egyo Aburahamu yaaba niyo yaatuura." 
Genesis22:20 Ebyo ku byahwaire, baagambira Aburahamu bati: Manya Milika nawe azaariire Nahori murumuna waawe abaana aba:" 
Genesis22:21 Uuzi niwe mujigaijo, Buuzi n'omurumuna, na Kemueli ishe wa Aramu," 
Genesis22:22 na Dedesi, Haazo, Pilidaashi, Gidilaafi, na Beetueli." 
Genesis22:23 Beetueli ogwo niwe yaazaire Rebeka. Abo omunaana nibo Milika yaazaariire Nahori murumuna wa Aburahamu. 
Genesis22:24 Reero kandi omukazi we ekinyanshunju owaabaire naayetwa Reuma, akazaara Teeba, Gahamu, Tahashi, na Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Saara akamara emyaka igana na makumi abiri na mushanju y'amagara ge. 
Genesis23:2 Saara akagwa Kiriyataraba, niyo Heburooni, omu nsi ya Kanaani; Aburahamu yaija kumucurira n'okumuririra." 
Genesis23:3 Bwanyima Aburahamu yaaruga aha mufu we, yaagira Abahiiti ati:" 
Genesis23:4 Ndi omunyamahanga kandi omushuuhuuki omuriimwe, nimumpe omuriimwe omwanya gw'okuziikamu, mbone kuziika omufu wangye, andugye omu maisho." 
Genesis23:5 Abahiiti baagarukamu Aburahamu, bati:" 
Genesis23:6 Mukama waitu, tuhurire, manya ori omuntu mukuru rugambwa omuriitwe. Ziika omufu waawe ah'oraasiime omu bituuro byaitu, tihariho n'omwe omuriitwe oraakwime ekituuro kye, nari kukuzibira kuziikamu omufu waawe." 
Genesis23:7 Atyo Aburahamu aimuka, ainama omu maisho g'Abahiiti, bakama b'egyo nsi," 
Genesis23:8 abagira ati: Ku muraabe mwaikiriza ngu nziikye omufu wangye, andugye omu maisho; nimumpurire, muunyeshengyerereze Efurooni mwene Soohari,"
