Genesis23:9 abone kumpa enyanga ya Makipeela ei aine; eri aha muheru gw'ekibanja kye. Agingurize omu maisho gaanyu obuguzi bwayo bwona, gube omwanya gwangye gw'okuziikamu." 
Genesis23:10 Mbwenu obwo Efurooni akaba ashutami omuri abo Bahiiti. Efurooni Omuhiiti nikwo kugarukamu Aburahamu, Abahiiti boona abaabaire baizire aha irembo ry'orurembo rwe bahuriire, ati:" 
Genesis23:11 Ngaaha, mukama wangye, mpurira! Naakuha ekyo kibanja n'enyanga yaamwo. Ebyo naabikuheera omu maisho g'abantu b'eihanga ryangye, mbwenu nu ziika omufu waawe." 
Genesis23:12 Aburahamu ainama omu maisho g'abantu b'egyo nsi. 
Genesis23:13 Agambira Efurooni abantu b'omuri egyo nsi bamuhuriire ati: Kwonka shi ku oraabe nookisiima mpurira; niinyija kwihura nk'obuguzi bw'ekibanja oku buri; ekyo okiinyikirize, mbone kuziikamu omufu wangye." 
Genesis23:14 Efurooni agarukamu Aburahamu; ati: 
Genesis23:15 Mukama wangye, ntega okutu. Ekicweka ky'ekibanja ekirikugura empiiha magana ana z'efeeza ni kintu ki ahariiwe naanye? Yeziikire omufu waawe." 
Genesis23:16 Aburahamu atyo aikirizana na Efurooni. Aburahamu arengyera Efurooni efeeza ezi yaagambire, Abahiiti nibahurira, empiiha magana ana z'efeeza, nk'oku abashuubuzi baabaire nibazirenga omu biro ebyo." 
Genesis23:17 Kityo ekibanja kya Efurooni eky'omuri Makipeela, ekyabaire kiri aha burugwa-izooba bwa Mamure, kyona hamwe n'enyanga yaamwo n'emiti yoona, kyona nk'oku kirikwingana kyarekurirwa" 
Genesis23:18 Aburahamu omu maisho g'Abahiiti, n'omu maisho ga boona abaizire aha irembo ry'orurembo rwe, kuba ekye." 
Genesis23:19 Bwanyima Aburahamu yaaziika Saara omukazi we omu nyanga y'omu kibanja ky'omuri Makipeela, oburugwa-izooba bwa Mamure; niyo Heburooni ey'omu nsi ya Kanaani." 
Genesis23:20 Ekyo kibanja n'enyanga yaamwo Abahiiti nikwo baabirekuriire Aburahamu, bikaba ebye kuba omwanya gw'okuziikamu." 
Genesis24:1 Mbwenu obwo Aburahamu akaba akuzire, yaahikire omu ngingo za bukuru, na Nyakubaho amuhaire emigisha omu bintu byona." 
Genesis24:2 Mpaho Aburahamu yaagambira omugaragwa we omukuru omu b'omu nju ye, owaabaire naareeberera byona ebi yaabaire aine, yaamugira ati: Ta omukono gwawe ahansi y'ekibero kyangye," 
Genesis24:3 nkurahize Mukama Ruhanga w'eiguru n'ensi, ku otarishwererera mutabani wangye omukazi omu bahara b'Abanyakanaani, abu ntwiremu." 
Genesis24:4 Kureka oryaza omu b'eihanga ryangye n'omuri beene waitu oshwererereyo mutabani wangye Isaaka omukazi. 
Genesis24:5 Ogwo mugaragwa yaamugira ati: Obundi ogwo mukazi akaayanga kwija naanye omuri egi nsi. Mbwenu shi ngarure mutabani waawe omu nsi ei waarugiremu? 
Genesis24:6 Aburahamu amugira ati: Oyerinde otarigarurayo mutabani wangye. 
Genesis24:7 Mukama Ruhanga w'omu iguru, owaanyihire omu ka ya tata n'omu ihanga ri naazaariirwemu, kandi owaanyegambiriire akandahira ati: Ndyaha baijukuru baawe egi nsi, naija kutuma maraika we kukwebembera, oshwererereyo mutabani wangye omukazi." 
Genesis24:8 Kwonka omukazi ku araayangye kwija naiwe, obwo nooba otakiine rubanja rw'egi ndahiro ei naakurahiza; kureka eki ndikukwehanangiriza n'okutagarurayo mutabani wangye." 
Genesis24:9 Atyo ogwo mugaragwa ata omukono gwe ahansi y'ekibero kya Aburahamu mukama we, amurahira kukora eki yaamuragiira." 
Genesis24:10 Bwanyima ogwo mugaragwa yaiha engamira ikumi omu za mukama we, yaagyenda aine ebiconco birungi eby'emiringo yoona ebi yaahairwe mukama we; yaimuka yaaza Mesopotamiya, yaahika aha rurembo rwa Nahori." 
Genesis24:11 Atyo ahendesa engamira enkokora aheeru y'orurembo aha rubaju rw'eiziba nibuza kuba omwabazyo ah'abakazi bashohorera kutaha amaizi. 
Genesis24:12 Reero ashaba ati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Aburahamu mukama wangye, naakweshengyereza ompiire eri izooba, ogirire mukama wangye Aburahamu embabazi." 
Genesis24:13 Reeba naayemerera ahari eri iziba, bahara b'abashaija b'omuri oru rurembo nibashohora kutaha amaizi." 
Genesis24:14 Mbwenu ikiriza omwishiki ou ndaagire nti: Huumuza orunywero rwawe nnyweho, haza akagira ati: Nywaho; kandi naaza kweshera n'engamira zaawe; abe ou waateekateekyeire omuheereza waawe Isaaka. Aho niho ndaamanyire ku waagirira mukama wangye embabazi." 
Genesis24:15 Ku yaabaire atakaherize kugamba, ahonaaho haija Rebeka, muhara wa Betueli mwene Milika, muka Nahori murumuna wa Aburahamu, aine orunywero rwe rw'amaizi aha ibega." 
Genesis24:16 Ogwo mwishiki akaba ari murungi munonga, oshugaine. Atyo ashuuma aha iziba aijuza orunywero rwe atuuhuukayo." 
Genesis24:17 Mpaho ogwo mugaragwa airuka kumubugana, amugira ati: Naakweshengyereza, mpa otwizi tw'omu runywero rwawe nnyweho." 
Genesis24:18 N'onu amugira ati: Nywaho, mukama wangye. Atyo ahonaaho atuura orunywero rwe aruta aha kiganja amuha anywa." 
Genesis24:19 Ku aheza kumuha ekyokunywa, agira ati: Naaza kutahira engamira zaawe nazo, okuhitsya obu ziraanywe zikahwa eiriho." 
Genesis24:20 Atyo ayehuuta afukunkurira orunywero rwe omu bwato, airuka naagaruka omu iziba kutaha, atahira engamira ze zoona." 
Genesis24:21 Omushaija amugumyaho amaisho ahunami, kumanya yaaba Nyakubaho yaaha orugyendo rwe omugisha nari tikwo." 
Genesis24:22 Engamira ku zaaherize kunywa, ogwo mushaija yaihayo empeta y'ezaabu y'oburemeezi bwa kimwe kya kabiri kya rupiiha, n'engoro ibiri z'okujwara aha mikono, ezirikuhitsya oburemeezi bw'empiiha ikumi n'ezaabu." 
Genesis24:23 Haza yaamubuuza ati: Ngambira! Beitu ori muhara w'oha? Mbwenu ebyo omu ka ya sho tukaabonamu oburaaro? 
Genesis24:24 N'onu amugarukamu ati: Ndi muhara wa Betueli mutabani wa Milika ou yaazairweho Nahori. 
Genesis24:25 Agumizamu ati: Twine obunyaatsi n'ebyokurya byazo ebirikumara; n'ekishengye ky'okuraaramu. 
Genesis24:26 Ogwo mushaija ainika omutwe, aramya Nyakubaho" 
Genesis24:27 kandi agira ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa mukama wangye Aburahamu ahimbisibwe, ahabw'okuba tarekire kugirira mukama wangye embabazi n'obwesigwa. Kandi naanye Nyakubaho anyebembeire omu muhanda yampitsya aha nju y'abanyabuzaare ba mukama wangye." 
Genesis24:28 Bwanyima omwishiki airuka abiteekyerereza ab'omu nju ya nyina. 
Genesis24:29 Obwo Rebeka akaba aine munyaanya orikwetwa Labaani. Labaani atyo ashohora airuka kushanga ogwo mushaija aha iziba. 
Genesis24:30 Ku yaareebire empeta n'engoro aha mikono ya munyaanya, kandi ku yaahuriire ebigambo bya Rebeka munyaanya, naagira ati: Nikwo ogwo mushaija yangambira, atyo agyenda ahika ogwo mushaija amushanga ayemereire haihi n'engamira aha iziba." 
Genesis24:31 Amugira ati: Ija otaahe omuka, iwe ou Nyakubaho ahaire omugisha! Mbwenu shi ekikwemereize aheeru ni ki? Manya naaherize kuteguura enju n'omwanya gw'engamira." 
Genesis24:32 Ogwo mushaija atyo ataaha omu nju, na Labaani atandukurira engamira, amuha obunyaatsi n'ebyokurya byazo, amureetera n'amaizi g'okunaaba ebigyere bye n'eby'abashaija bu yaizire nabo." 
Genesis24:33 Bwanyima bamwihurira ebyokurya ngu arye, kwonka we agira ati: Tindikwija kurya ntakagambire bi bantumire. N'onu ati: Bigambe!" 
Genesis24:34 Mpaho agira ati: Ndi omugaragwa wa Aburahamu. 
Genesis24:35 Nyakubaho akaha mukama wangye emigisha mingi, yaaba omuntu rugambwa. Akamutungisa amasyo g'ente n'ag'entaama, efeeza n'ezaabu, abahuuku n'abazaana, engamira n'endogoya." 
Genesis24:36 Kandi Saara muka mukama wangye akazaarira mukama wangye omutabani, Saara obwo yaakuzire. Haza Aburahamu yaaha ogwo mutabani byona ebi atungire." 
Genesis24:37 Mbwenu mukama wangye andahiize naagira ati: Otarishwererera mutabani wangye omukazi omuri bahara b'Abanyakanaani abu ntwire omu nsi yaabo. 
Genesis24:38 Kureka oryaza omu b'omuryango gwa tata n'omuri beene waitu, obe nimwo waashwererera mutabani wangye omukazi." 
Genesis24:39 Nyowe nkagambira mukama wangye nti: Obundi ogwo mukazi takaikiriza kwija naanye. 
Genesis24:40 Kwonka we yangira ati: Nyakubaho ou ngyenda anyine, aryatuma maraika we akushagare, obaase gye orugyendo rwawe, oshwererere mutabani wangye omukazi, noomwiha omuri beene waitu, kandi ab'omu muryango gwa tata." 
Genesis24:41 Reero ku orihika omuri beene waitu, oryaba otakiine rubanja rw'egyo ndahiro yangye. Nangwa nobu barimukwima, nabwo oryaba otakiine rubanja rw'egyo ndahiro yangye." 
Genesis24:42 Mbwenu eri izooba ku naahika aha iziba, naashaba nti: Ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Aburahamu mukama wangye, ku oraabe noosiima kuha omugisha orugyendo rwangye oru ndimu," 
Genesis24:43 reeba naayemerera aha rubaju rw'eiziba; haza omwishiki empangare oraije kutaha amaizi ou ndaagire nti: Nyaabura 'we, mpa otwizi tw'omu runywero rwawe nnyweho," 
Genesis24:44 reero akangira ati: Nywaho, kandi n'engamira zaawe nazo niinyija kuzitahira, abe niwe yaaba omukazi ou Nyakubaho ateekateekyeire mutabani wa mukama wangye." 
Genesis24:45 Ku naaba ntakaherize kukigambira aha mutima, ahonaaho Rebeka aija ayekoreire orunywero rwe rw'amaizi aha ibega; atyo ashuuma aha iziba ataha. Naanye mmugira nti: Nyaabura 'we, ndeka nnyweho!" 
Genesis24:46 Nawe tahwama aiha orunywero rwe aha ibega agira ati: Nywa, kandi niinyija kweshera n'engamira zaawe. Ntyo nnywa; engamira nazo azeeshera." 
Genesis24:47 Bwanyima mmubuuza nti: Beitu ori muhara w'oha? Agarukamu ati: Ndi muhara wa Betueli mutabani wa Nahori ou Milika yaamuzaariire. Naanye nikwo kumuta empeta aha nyindo n'engoro aha mikono. 
Genesis24:48 Bwanyima ntsimba amaju, ndamya Nyakubaho. Mpimbisa Mukama Ruhanga wa Aburahamu mukama wangye, onyebembeire omu muhanda guhikire, nkashwererera mutabani wa mukama wangye muhara wa mwene waabo." 
Genesis24:49 Mbwenu nu, ku muraabe nimwija kubeera mukama wangye abeesigwa kandi ab'amazima nimungambire; kandi ku kiraabe kitari kityo nabwo mungambire, mbone kugira orubaju ru naatoora, yaaba rwa buryo nari orwa bumosho." 
Genesis24:50 Bwanyima Labaani na Betueli baagarukamu bati: Ekyo kintu n'ekya Nyakubaho; n'ahabw'ekyo titurikubaasa kukugambira yaaba twakuha nari twakwima. 
Genesis24:51 Reeba Rebeka ngugu omutware ogyende, abe muka mutabani wa mukama waawe, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaakicumire." 
Genesis24:52 Omugaragwa wa Aburahamu ku ahurira ebi baagamba, ajuumara ahansi omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Genesis24:53 Mpaho ogwo mugaragwa aihayo amabaare gahunzirwe efeeza n'agahunzirwe ezaabu n'ebijwaro, abiha Rebeka, kandi aha munyaanya na nyina amahunde g'obuguzi bwingi." 
Genesis24:54 Bwanyima ogwo mugaragwa n'abu yaabaire aine, baarya kandi baanywa, baaraarayo ekyo kiro. Omu kasheeshe ku baimukire, yaagira ati: Mundagye ngarukye owa mukama wangye." 
Genesis24:55 Munyaanya w'ogwo mwishiki na nyina baamugarukamu bati: Reka omwishiki amare naitwe akaanya nangwa ebiro ikumi, reero abone kugyenda." 
Genesis24:56 Kwonka we abagira ati: Nk'oku Nyakubaho ahaire omugisha orugyendo rwangye, mutantuuzaho. Ka ngyende mbone kugaruka owa mukama wangye." 
Genesis24:57 Nabo bagira bati: Ka twete omwishiki tumubuuze. 
Genesis24:58 Batyo beeta Rebeka bamubuuza bati: Noikiriza kugyenda n'ogu mushaija? Nawe ati, Eego niinyija kugyenda." 
Genesis24:59 Mpaho baaraga Rebeka munyaanyabo n'omurezi we n'omugaragwa wa Aburahamu n'abashaija b'ogwo mugaragwa. 
Genesis24:60 Haza baashabira Rebeka omugisha nibamugira bati: Munyaanyaitwe, kabe nyina w'enkumi n'obukumi; na baijukuru baawe nibakakubuure amarembo g'abarikubanga." 
Genesis24:61 Bwanyima Rebeka n'abaranga be baimuka, baatemba engamira, baagyenda n'ogwo mushaija. Nikwo ogwo mugaragwa yaatwaire atyo Rebeka, akeegyendera." 
Genesis24:62 Reero obwo, Isaaka akaba yaarugire Beeri-lahai-roi, atwire omuri Negebu." 
Genesis24:63 Mbwenu Isaaka akaba ashohoire aheeru naagyendagyenda omu ishwa omu mwabazyo, ari omu biteekateeko. Ku yaimukize ati amaisho, yaareeba engamira niziija." 
Genesis24:64 Rebeka nawe ku yaimukize amaisho yaareeba Isaaka, yaatemburuka aha ngamira," 
Genesis24:65 yaabuuza omugaragwa, ati: Oriya muntu owaareetana omu ishwa kutubugana n'oha? Omugaragwa ati: Manya ogwo niwe mukama wangye. Na Rebeka nikwo kukwata omwenda gwe akeetwekyerera." 
Genesis24:66 Reero ogwo mugaragwa akateekyerereza Isaaka byona ebi yaakozire. 
Genesis24:67 Bwanyima Isaaka yaataasya Rebeka omu ihema yaamushwera, n'onu yaaba omukazi we; haza iba yaamukunda. Isaaka yaahuumurizibwa atyo enaku z'okufa kwa nyina." 
Genesis25:1 Aburahamu akashwera ondiijo mukazi orikwetwa Ketura; 
Genesis25:2 yaamuzaaraho Zimuraani, Yokoshaani, Medani, Midiyani, Ishibaki na Shua." 
Genesis25:3 Yokoshaani niwe yaabaire ishe wa Sheeba na Dedani. Reero beene Dedani nibo Ashurimi, Letushimi na Leumimi." 
Genesis25:4 Kandi beene Midiyani ni Eefa, Eeferi, Hanoki, Abiida na Elidaasha. Abo boona bakaba bari oruzaaro rwa Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Bwanyima Aburahamu ebye byona akabiraga Isaaka. 
Genesis25:6 Kwonka abatabani abaazairwe ebinyanshunju bye yaabaha ebiconco. Kandi ku yaabaire akihuriire yaaboohereza; baataana n'omutabani Isaaka, baatoora obukiizi bw'oburugwa-izooba baahika omu nsi y'obwo bukiizi." 
Genesis25:7 Emyaka y'obukuru ei Aburahamu yaahikize ekaba igana na makumi mushanju n'etaano. 
Genesis25:8 Aburahamu ku yaahikize omu ngingo za bukuru, omwitsyo gwamuhwamu, yaafa gye ari omugurusi eboote, yaakurata abaabo." 
Genesis25:9 Abatabani Isaaka na Ishimaeli baamuziika omu nyanga ya Makipeela omu kibanja kya Efurooni mwene Zohari Omuhiiti, ahashungaine na Mamure." 
Genesis25:10 Nikyo kibanja eki Aburahamu yaabaire aguzire aha Bahiiti. Aho niho Aburahamu yaaziikirwe hamwe na Saara omukazi we. 
Genesis25:11 Aburahamu ku yaaherize kufa, Ruhanga yaaha omutabani Isaaka omugisha; Isaaka yaatuura Beeri-lahai-roi." 
Genesis25:12 Oru nirwo ruzaaro rwa Ishimaeli mwene Aburahamu, ou yaazaire ahari Hagari Omunyamisirikazi, omuzaana wa Saara." 
Genesis25:13 Mbwenu aga nigo maziina ga beene Ishimaeli nk'oku baakurataine omu kuzaarwa. Omujigaijo gwa Ishimaeli ni Nebayooti; haakurataho Kedari, Adibeeli, Mibusamu," 
Genesis25:14 Miishima, Duma, Masa," 
Genesis25:15 Hadadi, Tema, Yeturi, Nafishi na Kedema." 
Genesis25:16 Abo nibo beene Ishimaeli, kandi ago nigo maziina gaabo omu birorero byabo n'omu maka gaabo, abategyeki ikumi na babiri nk'enganda zaabo oku zaabaire ziri." 
Genesis25:17 Emyaka y'obukuru ei Ishimaeli yaahikize ekaba igana na makumi ashatu na mushanju; omwitsyo gwamuhwamu yaafa, yaakurata abaabo." 
Genesis25:18 Abatabani baatuura okwiha Havila okuta Shuuri aharikureebana na Misiri, ogurikuza Asiriya. Ishimaeli ogwo akaba atwire ahashungaine na beene ishe." 
Genesis25:19 Oru nirwo ruzaaro rwa Isaaka mwene Aburahamu. Aburahamu akazaara Isaaka. 
Genesis25:20 Isaaka obu yaashwera Rebeka muhara wa Betueli Omuaramu wa Padanarama, munyaanya Labaani Omuaramu, akaba ahikize emyaka makumi ana y'obukuru." 
Genesis25:21 Mbwenu Isaaka ogwo yaashabira omukazi we ahari Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba akaba ari engumba. Na Nyakubaho yaamuha eki yaashabire; omukazi we Rebeka yaabaka enda." 
Genesis25:22 Abaana baamurwanira omunda, nawe nikwo kugira ati: Ku kiraabe kiri kityo, mbwenu ningumibwaho ki? Atyo agyenda ayehanuuza ahari Nyakubaho." 
Genesis25:23 Reero Nyakubaho amugira ati: Enda yaawe erimu amahanga abiri, abaana bu oraazaare nibaija kurugwamu amahanga abiri garikuharikana, haza erimwe rikize rigyenzi ryaryo amaani; Kakuru aheereze Kato." 
Genesis25:24 Mbwenu ebiro bye by'okuzaara ku byahikire, yaashangwa aine enda y'amahasha." 
Genesis25:25 Owaabandize yaazaarwa naatukura, omubiri gwe gwona gushwekirwe obwoya nk'omwenda gw'ebyoya; nabo nikwo kumweta Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Handi hakye omurumuna nawe yaazaarwa, omukono gwe gukwaitse ekitsintsiino kya Esau. Nikwo kumweta Yakobo. Obwo Isaaka ahikize emyaka y'obukuru makumi mukaaga, obu omukazi we abazaara." 
Genesis25:27 Abo boojo ku baakuzire, Esau yaaba omuhiigi rugambwa, ruraara-mahamba; Yakobo we yaaba omucureezi orikuguma omuka." 
Genesis25:28 Isaaka akaba akunda Esau, ahabw'okuba akaba arya aha mihiigo ye; kwonka Rebeka akaba akunda Yakobo." 
Genesis25:29 Eizooba rimwe Yakobo ku yaabaire ateekire omujurugye, Esau yaija naaruga omu ishwa naakooza aine enjara." 
Genesis25:30 Esau yaagira Yakobo ati: Ka ndye ahari ogu mujurigye gurikutukura, ahabw'okuba enjara yaanyita! (Nikyo baamukubiize eiziina Edomu)" 
Genesis25:31 Yakobo amugira ati: Banza onguze obukuru bwawe. 
Genesis25:32 Ndi Esau ati: Ka ndi haihi kufa mbwenu eby'obukuru nibingasira ki? 
Genesis25:33 Yakobo ati: Banza ondahire. N'onu amurahira; obukuru bwe abuguza atyo Yakobo. 
Genesis25:34 Mpaho Yakobo aha Esau omugaati n'ezo mboga zicucumire. Onu arya, anywa, bwanyima aimuka agyenda. Nikwo Esau yaagayire atyo obukuru bwe bw'okuzaarwa." 
Genesis26:1 Omu biro ebyo ensi ekateerwa endiijo njara, etari eri eyaateire omu biro bya Aburahamu. Isaaka nikwo kuza Gerari owa Abimeleki omugabe w'Abafilisiti." 
Genesis26:2 Reero Nyakubaho yaamubonekyera, yaagira ati: Otashuuma Misiri; guma omu nsi ei ndaakugambire." 
Genesis26:3 Oshuuhuukire omuri egyo nsi, haza naanye ndyaguma naiwe, nkuhe emigisha, ahabw'okuba ezo nsi zoona ndyazikuha iwe na baijukuru baawe, mpikiirize endahiro ei naarahiire Aburahamu sho." 
Genesis26:4 Ndyakanyisa oruzaaro rwawe rube nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru, haza baijukuru baawe mbahe ezo nsi zoona; kandi omuri baijukuru baawe amahanga g'omu nsi goona nimwo gariheerwa emigisha." 
Genesis26:5 Ahabw'okuba Aburahamu akaanyorobera, yaakora ebi naamuragiire: Nibyo biragiro byangye n'ebi naataireho n'amateeka gangye." 
Genesis26:6 Atyo Isaaka yaatuura Gerari. 
Genesis26:7 Abashaija baayo ku baamubuurize aha bikwatiraine n'omukazi we, yaagira ati: Ni munyaanyazi. Ahabw'okuba akatiina kugira ati: N'omukazi wangye, naateekateeka ati: Abashaija b'omuri ekyo kyanga batakaanyita, bakantura Rebeka. Manya Rebeka ogwo akaba ari murungi munonga." 
Genesis26:8 Okwo ku yaabaire amazireyo omwanya muraingwa, Abimeleki omugabe w'Abafilisiti yaayozya amaisho omu dirisa, yaareeba Isaaka naacundana na Rebeka omukazi we." 
Genesis26:9 Abimeleki nikwo kweta Isaaka, akamugira ati: Ka n'omukazi waawe! Mbwenu shi okagirira ki oti: Ni munyaanyazi? Isaaka yaamugarukamu ati: Manya nkateekateeka ngu nkaafa mmuzira." 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleki amugira ati: Mbwenu shi ekyo otukoreire ki? Manya omwe aha bashaija bangye kikaamurahukiire kubyama n'omukazi waawe, haza obwo oba niiwe otureeteire orubanja." 
Genesis26:11 Abimeleki ayehanangiriza abantu be boona ati: Orikora ahari ogu mushaija nari aha mukazi we aryaitwa. 
Genesis26:12 Mpaho Isaaka yaabiba embibo omuri egyo nsi omuri ogwo mwaka, yaashaaruura ebirikukira ebi yaabibire emirundi igana. Nyakubaho yaamuha omugisha." 
Genesis26:13 Ogwo mushaija yaatunga, yaaganagana okuhitsya obu yaabaire omutungi rugambwa." 
Genesis26:14 Yaagira amatungo g'amasyo g'entaama n'ag'ente n'abaheereza b'omu ka ye baingi munonga; ekyo kyareetera Abafilisiti kumugirira eihari. 
Genesis26:15 Mbwenu obwo Abafilisiti bakaba baatabire amaziba agaafukwirwe abairu ba Aburahamu omu biro bya Aburahamu ogwo, bagaijwize eitaka." 
Genesis26:16 Mpaho Abimeleki yaagira Isaaka ati: Tuhigize ogyende, ahabw'okuba nootukiza amaani." 
Genesis26:17 Isaaka arugayo ateera amahema omu ruhita rwa Gerari, aba niyo yaatuura." 
Genesis26:18 Isaaka agaruka afukura amaziba agaabaire gaafukwirwe omu biro bya Aburahamu ishe, ahabw'okuba Abafilisiti bakaba bagatabire Aburahamu aherize kufa, kandi yaageeta amaziina agu ishe yaabaire ageetsire." 
Genesis26:19 Kwonka abairu ba Isaaka ku baafukwire omuri orwo ruhita, baagwa aha iziba ry'enshuro y'amaizi." 
Genesis26:20 Abariisa ba Gerari baatongana n'abariisa ba Isaaka nibagira bati: Amaizi n'agaitu. Nawe nikwo kweta eryo iziba eiziina Eseki, ngu ahabw'okuba bakamutonganisa." 
Genesis26:21 Bwanyima baafukura erindi iziba, naryo baaritonganira, yaaryeta eiziina Siitina." 
Genesis26:22 Okwo yaarugayo yaatimba erindi iziba, kwonka eryo tibaaritonganira, nikwo we kuryeta Rehoboti, amakuru ngu, hati Nyakubaho yaatuha ah'okweshandira, nitwija kukanyira omuri egi nsi." 
Genesis26:23 Ku yaarugire aho yainamuka yaaza Beerisheba. 
Genesis26:24 Haza Nyakubaho yaamubonekyera ekyo kiro, yaamugira ati: Niinye Ruhanga wa Aburahamu sho. Otatiina, ahabw'okuba nkwine kandi niinyija kukuha omugisha, nkanyise oruzaaro rwawe ahabwa Aburahamu omuheereza wangye." 
Genesis26:25 Isaaka yaayombekayo eitambiro, yaaramizayo Nyakubaho kandi yaayeteererayo eihema. Okwo nayo abairu ba Isaaka baafukurayo eiziba." 
Genesis26:26 Bwanyima Abimeleki akaruga Gerari aine Ahuzati omuhi we w'obwengye na Pikoli omukuru w'eihe rye, yaija ahari Isaaka." 
Genesis26:27 Reero Isaaka yaababuuza ati: Muunyiziireho ki, haza mwanyangire mukambinga owaanyu?" 
Genesis26:28 Baamugarukamu bati: Nitureebera kimwe ku Nyakubaho ari hamwe naiwe. Nikyo turikugirira tuti: Ka turahirane, tukore naiwe endagaano;" 
Genesis26:29 ku otaritukora kubi nk'oku naitwe tutaine ki twakukozire tukagira eki twakwitsa, kureka okukukorera ebirungi tukakuraga n'obusingye. Mbwenu reeba, ori ou Nyakubaho ahaire omugisha." 
Genesis26:30 Atyo abateekyera obugyenyi, barya, banywa." 
Genesis26:31 Omu kasheeshe baimuka kare barahirana. Bwanyima Isaaka abaraga, bamurugaho n'obusingye." 
Genesis26:32 Eryo izooba abairu ba Isaaka baija baamugambira eiziba ri bafukwire, bamugira bati: tuzoire amaizi." 
Genesis26:33 Nawe aryeta Shiba. Nikyo orwo rurembo rurikweterwa Beerisheba n'eri izooba. 
Genesis26:34 Bwanyima Esau ku yaahikize emyaka makumi ana y'obukuru, yaashwera Yudita muhara wa Beeri Omuhiiti, na Basemaati muhara wa Eloni nawe Omuhiiti." 
Genesis26:35 Haza abo bakazi baanyangaraza Isaaka na Rebeka. 
Genesis27:1 Isaaka ku yaakuzire, n'amaisho ge gaagiirweho oruho atakibaasa kuhweza gye, yaayeta Esau omutabani omukuru, yaamugira ati: Mwana wangye! Onu ati: Ndi aha, taata!" 
Genesis27:2 N'onu amugira ati: Reeba nkuzire kandi tindikumanya izooba ri ndifeeraho. 
Genesis27:3 Mbwenu nu gira eby'okuhiigisa byawe, omutana n'obuta, oze omu ishwa ompiigireyo enyamaishwa." 
Genesis27:4 Reero onteekyere ak'okurya kanuzire aku nkunda, okandeetere nkarye, haza nkushabire omugisha ntakakabire." 
Genesis27:5 Mbwenu obu Isaaka yaabaire naagambira omutabani Esau, Rebeka akaba ategire okutu. Esau ku yaagiire omu ishwa kuhiiga enyamaishwa n'okugireeta," 
Genesis27:6 Rebeka yaagira omutabani Yakobo ati: Naahurira sho naagambira mukuru waawe Esau ati: 
Genesis27:7 Ndeetera enyama y'enyamaishwa ei oraite ohiigire, onteekyere ak'okurya kanuzire nkarye, haza nkushabire Mukama omugisha ntakakabire." 
Genesis27:8 Mbwenu nu, mwana wangye, mpurira okore ebi ndaakuragiire." 
Genesis27:9 Irooko oze omu busyo bw'embuzi, onyihireyo ebyagazi bibiri birungi, mbiteekyeremu shoimwe ebyokurya binuzire nk'oku akunda." 
Genesis27:10 Haza obitwarire shoimwe abirye, akushabire omugisha atakafiire." 
Genesis27:11 Kwonka Yakobo agira Rebeka nyina, ati: Ka noomanya mukuru wangye Esau ku ari omuntu w'obwoya, kandi nyowe ku ndi ow'omubiri gurikuterera." 
Genesis27:12 Obundi tata akankorakora nshusha nk'orikumugaaniiza, haza nyereetera omukyeeno omu mwanya gw'omugisha." 
Genesis27:13 Reero nyina amugarukamu ati: Ogwo mukyeeno gwawe gube niinye gwagwera mwana wangye, kureka ekyawe n'okukora ebi naakugambira, okagyenda okabindeetera." 
Genesis27:14 N'onu atyo agyenda, abiihayo abireetera nyina. Na nyina ateeka ebyokurya binuzire nk'ebi ishe akunda." 
Genesis27:15 Bwanyima Rebeka aihayo eby'okujwara by'omutabani omukuru Esau ebirungi, ebi Rebeka yaabaire aine omu nju, abijweka Yakobo omutabani omuto." 
Genesis27:16 Kandi amujweka empu z'abo baagazi, aha mikono n'omu maraka ge aharikuterera." 
Genesis27:17 Atyo akwatsa omutabani Yakobo ebyo byokurya binuzire, n'omugaati ebi yaateeka;" 
Genesis27:18 n'onu agyenda, ahika ishe, amugira ati: Taata! Onu ati: Ndi aha! Beitu mwana wangye ori oha?" 
Genesis27:19 Yakobo agarukamu ishe ati: Ndi Esau omujigaijo gwawe. Naakora nk'oku wangambira. Mbwenu shutama orye ebi naakuhiigira, obone kunshabira omugisha." 
Genesis27:20 Isaaka nawe agira omutabani ati: Beitu shi mwana wangye, waarahuka ota kugibona? Onu amugarukamu ati: Manya Mukama Ruhanga waawe niwe yampiira." 
Genesis27:21 Mpaho Isaaka agira Yakobo, ati: Hika aha nkukorakore mwana wangye mbone kumanya ku oraabe ori buzimazima mutabani wangye Esau, nari otari we." 
Genesis27:22 Yakobo agyenda ahika Isaaka ishe haihi; n'onu amukorakora, kandi agira ati: Eiraka ka n'erya Yakobo, kwonka engaro ka n'eza Esau." 
Genesis27:23 Haza kwo tamwetegyereza ahabw'okuba engaro ze zikaba ziine obwoya nk'eza mukuru we Esau, atyo amushabira omugisha." 
Genesis27:24 Amubuuza ati: Kwokwo niiwe mwana wangye Esau? Onu ati: Eego niinye. 
Genesis27:25 Mpaho agira ati: Bindeetere, ndye eki iwe mutabani wangye wampiigira, haza nkushabire omugisha. Onu abimureetera, n'onu arya; amureetera na viino anywa." 
Genesis27:26 Bwanyima Isaaka ishe amugira ati: Hika aha mwana wangye onnywegyere. 
Genesis27:27 Onu amwirira haihi amunywegyera; na ishe akaga omugaju gw'ebijwaro bye; atyo amushabira omugisha naagira ati: Reeba okutaamirana kw'omugaju gwa mutabani wangye, kuri nk'okw'omugaju gw'omu ishwa, eri Nyakubaho ahaire omugisha!" 
Genesis27:28 Ruhanga naakakuhe orume rurikuruga omu iguru n'omweru gw'omu nsi, n'engano nyingi na viino nyingi!" 
Genesis27:29 Enganda z'abantu zikuheereze, n'amahanga gakwinikire omutwe. Weena orikukyeena akyeenwe; na weena orikwendeza emigisha, nawe aheebwe emigisha." 
Genesis27:30 Ahonaaho Isaaka, ku yaabaire yaaheza kushabira Yakobo omugisha, na Yakobo yaatsimbura ati ebigyere naaruga omu maisho ga Isaaka ishe, haija Esau naaruga kuhiiga." 
Genesis27:31 Nawe yaateeka ebyokurya binuzire yaabireetera ishe; haza yaamugira ati: Taata, imuka orye eki nyowe mutabani waawe naakuhiigira, obone kunshabira omugisha." 
Genesis27:32 Isaaka ishe yaamubuuza ati: Kandi shi iwe ori oha? Onu agarukamu ati: Niinye Esau mutabani waawe omujigaijo. 
Genesis27:33 Isaaka nikwo kutetema munonga akatengyeza, akamugira ati: Mbwenu shi n'oha owaahiiga akandeetera enyama y'eki yaita, nkagirya yoona otakaizire, haza nkamushabira omugisha? Eego! Kandi kwo naija kuheebwa emigisha." 
Genesis27:34 Esau ku yaahuriire ebyo bigambo bya ishe yaacura yaaborooga munonga, aine obusaasi butakareebwaga. Bwanyima yaagira ishe ati: Ai bambe, taata, naanye nshabira omugisha!" 
Genesis27:35 Onu amugira ati: Manya murumuna waawe yaija naayehumbarika yaatwara omugisha gwawe. 
Genesis27:36 Ndi Esau, ati: Weeza kwo tikyo yaayeteirwe Yakobo? Manya ogu n'omurundi gwa kabiri nangobeza. Akantwaraho obukuru bwangye, mbwenu reeba yantwaraho n'omugisha gwangye. Bwanyima atyo amubuuza ati: Toine mugisha gu wantsigariza?" 
Genesis27:37 Isaaka agarukamu Esau ati: Reeba naamuhindura mukama waawe, haza na beene ishe boona naabamuha kuba abairu be; kandi naamuha engano na viino by'okumutunga. Mbwenu mwana wangye ekindi nkukorere ki?" 
Genesis27:38 Esau nikwo kubuuza ishe, ati: Taata oine omugisha gumwe gwonka? Naanye gira ogu wampa naakweshengyereza, taata! Esau atyo aborooga acura." 
Genesis27:39 Mpaho Isaaka ishe amugarukamu ati: Mbwenu reeba oryaguma otwire ah'omweru gw'ensi n'orume rurikuruga ahaiguru omu iguru bitari. 
Genesis27:40 Rurara yaawe niyo erikubeisaho, kandi oryaguma oheereze murumuna waawe. Kwonka ku oryeyuzya ebikukomire, oryahenda omugamba gwe, ogwihe omu bitsya bwawe." 
Genesis27:41 Okwiha obwo Esau yaayanga Yakobo naamutura omugisha ogu ishe yaamushabiire. Esau yaagira omu mutima gwe ati: Ebiro by'ekyosi kya tata biri haihi, haza ku biraahwe nyite murumuna wangye Yakobo." 
Genesis27:42 Reero baagambira Rebeka ebyo bigambo bya Esau omutabani omukuru, nawe nikwo kutuma ow'okweta Yakobo omutabani omuto, akamugira ati: Reeba mukuru waawe Esau naahiga kukwita." 
Genesis27:43 Mbwenu nu mwana wangye hurira eki ndikukugambira. Imuka ohungire Harani owa Labaani munyaanyazi; 
Genesis27:44 ogumeyo nawe okumara akaanya, okuhitsya obu mukuru waawe arihwa ekiniga," 
Genesis27:45 n'enziika ekamuruga aha mutima akeebwa eki omukozire. Reero obwo nibwo ndikutumaho nkakwihayo. Mbwenu shi nikingasira ki ku ndaabafiise mwembi eizooba rimwe? 
Genesis27:46 Bwanyima Rebeka yaagira Isaaka, ati: Abakazi Abahiiti banduhize. Mbwenu Yakobo ku araashwere omukazi omuri bahara b'Abahiiti ori nk'aba, omwe aha bakazi b'omuri egi nsi, obwo nimba ngasiirwe ki?" 
Genesis28:1 Bwanyima Isaaka akeeta Yakobo yaamuha omugisha, kandi yaamwehanangiriza ati: Otarishwera omukazi omu Banyakanaani." 
Genesis28:2 Mbwenu nu imuka oze Padanarama owa Betueli shwenkuru kizaara nyoko, obe niyo waashwera omukazi omuri bahara ba Labaani nyokoromi." 
Genesis28:3 Ruhanga omushoboorozi wa byona akuhe omugisha, akuzaarukanise kandi akukanyise, obone kurugwamu ekimbuuro ky'abantu;" 
Genesis28:4 akuhe omugisha gwa Aburahamu iwe n'oruzaaro rwawe oru oine, obone kukubuura ensi ei mwashuuhuukiiremu, ei Ruhanga yaahaire Aburahamu." 
Genesis28:5 Isaaka nikwo yaayohereize atyo Yakobo, onu akaza Padanarama owa Labaani mwene Betueli Omuaramu munyaanya wa Rebeka nyina wa Yakobo na Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Mbwenu obwo Esau akamanya ku Isaaka ahaire Yakobo omugisha, kandi amwohereize Padanarama kuba niyo yaashwera omukazi. N'ekindi yaamanya ngu ku yaabaire naamuha omugisha, yaamwehanangiriza ati: Otarishwera omu Banyakanaani." 
Genesis28:7 Reero yaamanya ku Yakobo ayorobeire ishe na nyina akaza Padanarama. 
Genesis28:8 Mbwenu Esau ku yaareebire ngu Abanyakanaanikazi tibarikugwisa gye Isaaka ishe," 
Genesis28:9 Esau ogwo yaaza owa Ishimaeli, yaashwerayo Mahalati muhara wa Ishimaeli mwene Aburahamu, kandi munyaanya wa Nebayooti, yaamutungikirira abakazi abu yaabaire aine." 
Genesis28:10 Yakobo akaruga Beerisheba, yaatoora ogurikuza Harani." 
Genesis28:11 Ku yaahikire omu mwanya gumwe, yaaraara aho ekyo kiro, ahabw'okuba eizooba rikaba ryarengire. Atyo yaihaho eibaare yaaryeshegura, yaabyama omuri ogwo mwanya, yaagwejegyera." 
Genesis28:12 Reero yaaroota naareeba eitembero ritsimbire ahansi, kandi omutwe gwaryo guhikire omu iguru; na baamaraika ba Ruhanga nibaritemberaho nibaritemburikiraho." 
Genesis28:13 Atyo areeba Nyakubaho ayemereire ahaiguru yaaryo, naamugira ati: Niinye Mukama Ruhanga wa Aburahamu shoimwe, kandi Ruhanga wa Isaaka. Egi nsi ei obyamiho, ndyagikuha iwe na baijukuru baawe." 
Genesis28:14 N'oruzaaro rwawe ruryaba rwingi nk'omucuucu gw'ahansi; mukanye muhikye burengyerwa-izooba na burugwa-izooba, n'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho n'omu bwa buryo; kandi omuriiwe n'omuri baijukuru baawe enganda zoona nimwo ziriheerwa omugisha." 
Genesis28:15 Reeba ndi hamwe naiwe, ndyakurinda hoona ah'oriza nkugarure omuri egi nsi. Manya tindigira bu nkutsigireho okuhitsya obu ndikora eki naakugambira." 
Genesis28:16 Bwanyima Yakobo ku yaasisiimukire omu turo, yaagira ati: Buzimazima Ruhanga ari omuri ogu mwanya, kwonka nyowe naaba ntakimanyire." 
Genesis28:17 Atyo atiina agira ati: Ogu mwanya ka nigutiinisa! Ogu mwanya ti kindi, kureka n'enju ya Ruhanga, kandi n'eirembo ry'eiguru." 
Genesis28:18 Ku bwabaire nibutaagurikana, Yakobo yaimuka yaihaho eibaare eri yaabaire ayeshegwire, yaaribyara kuba enyomyo, reero yaarishukaho amajuta aha mutwe." 
Genesis28:19 Ogwo mwanya yaagweta Beteli; haza obunyakare orwo rurembo bakaba barweta Luuzi. 
Genesis28:20 Bwanyima Yakobo yaahiga naagira ati: Ruhanga ku araagume naanye, yandinda omuri oru rugyendo oru ndimu, yampa ebyokurya n'eby'okujwara," 
Genesis28:21 naagaruka buhooro omu ka ya tata, obwo Nyakubaho aryaguma ari Ruhanga wangye." 
Genesis28:22 Mbwenu eri ibaare eri naabyara kuba enyomyo, riryaba enju ya Ruhanga; kandi byona ebi orimpa tindibura kukuhaho kimwe kya ikumi." 
Genesis29:1 Bwanyima Yakobo akagumizamu orugyendo rwe, yaahika omu nsi y'abantu b'omu burugwa-izooba." 
Genesis29:2 Ku yaanagire ati amaisho, yaareeba eiziba omu ishwa n'amasyo ashatu g'entaama gahenzire enkokora aha rubaju rwaryo; ahabw'okuba eryo iziba niryo baabaire bageesheraho, kandi aha munwa gwaryo bakaba bakingisaho eibaare rihango." 
Genesis29:3 Amasyo g'entaama ku gaabaire geeteeranira aho, abariisa bakumbagaza eibaare bariiha aha munwa gw'eiziba, beeshera entaama; bwanyima barigarura omu mwanya gwaryo aha munwa gw'eiziba." 
Genesis29:4 Reero obwo Yakobo yaababuuza ati: Beene waitu nimuruga hi? Baamugarukamu bati: Nituruga Harani. 
Genesis29:5 Nawe abagira ati: Nimumanya Labaani mwene Nahori? Banu bati: Nitumumanya. 
Genesis29:6 Ayongyera ababuuza ati: Ariyo agumire? Bati: Agumire. Nangwa reeba na Rakeeli muhara we ngugwo naija afunyire entaama. 
Genesis29:7 Abagira ati: Reeba bukiri omu ihangwe, obunaku bw'okuzaagiza amasyo tibukahikire. Nimweshere entaama, haza bwanyima mugyende muziriise." 
Genesis29:8 Bamugira bati: titurikubaasa, amasyo goona gatakateeraine, bakakumbagaza eibaare rikaruga aha munwa gw'eiziba, tukabona kweshera entaama." 
Genesis29:9 Ku yaabaire naakigamba nabo, Rakeeli yaija n'entaama za ishe, ahabw'okuba niwe yaabaire aziriisa." 
Genesis29:10 Mbwenu Yakobo ku yaareebire Rakeeli muhara wa Labaani nyinarimi n'entaama za Labaani ogwo, yaagyenda yaakumbagaza eibaare, yaariiha aha munwa gw'eiziba, yaayeshera obusyo bw'entaama za Labaani nyinarumi." 
Genesis29:11 Bwanyima Yakobo yaanywegyera Rakeeli, yaarira naaborooga." 
Genesis29:12 Yakobo yaayetondera Rakeeli ku aine obuzaare na ishe, kandi ku ari mutabani wa Rebeka. N'onu atyo airuka abigambira ishe." 
Genesis29:13 Labaani ku yaahuriire enkuru ya Yakobo omwihwa, yairuka kumubugana. Yaamugwa omu kifuba, yaamunywegyera, yaamutaasya omwe. Yakobo yaateekyerereza Labaani ebyabaireho byona." 
Genesis29:14 Labaani yaamugira ati: Buzimazima ori owangye w'aha mara. Yaaguma nawe okwezi kwona. 
Genesis29:15 Bwanyima Labaani akabuuza Yakobo, ati: Mbwenu ngu ahabw'okuba twine obuzaare, nikyo oshemerereire kunkorerera busha? Ngambira ebihembo bi ndaakuhe?" 
Genesis29:16 Obwo Labaani akaba aine abaishiki babiri, omukuru naayetwa Leeya, n'omuto naayetwa Rakeeli." 
Genesis29:17 Leeya akaba ataine maisho marungi, kwonka Rakeeli we ari murungi munonga w'okurigirwa." 
Genesis29:18 Yakobo akaba naakunda Rakeeli; yaagarukamu ati: Niinyija kumara emyaka mushanju ninkukorera ahabwa muhara waawe omuto Rakeeli. 
Genesis29:19 Labaani amugira ati: Haakiri mba niwe naamuha okukira okumuha ondiijo muntu. Guma naanye. 
Genesis29:20 Yakobo atyo amara emyaka mushanju naakora ahabwa Rakeeli, haza emubeera nk'ebiro bikye, ahabw'okuba akaba naamukunda." 
Genesis29:21 Bwanyima Yakobo akagira Labaani ati: Mpingira omukazi wangye ndaare nawe, ahabw'okuba mpikize ebiro byangye." 
Genesis29:22 Labaani atyo ayeta abantu boona ab'omuri ekyo kyanga, ateeka obugyenyi." 
Genesis29:23 Kwonka omwabazyo ku gwakiikire, Labaani yaihayo muhara we Leeya yaamutwarira Yakobo, onu yaaraara nawe." 
Genesis29:24 Labaani yaaha muhara we Leeya omuzaana we Zilipa kuba omuzaana we. 
Genesis29:25 Mbwenu ku bwaseesire, Yakobo ku ashanga ari Leeya, agira Labaani, ati: Beitu shi ontuzire ki? Tiinye naakukoreire ahabwa Rakeeli? Mbwenu ongobereize ki?" 
Genesis29:26 Labaani amugarukamu ati: Owaitu tikwo tutwaza kuhingira omuto, omukuru akiri aha mahega." 
Genesis29:27 Banza omare ewiiki nooraarira ogu, haza twije tukuhingire omweija, reero onkorere endiijo myaka mushanju." 
Genesis29:28 Yakobo yaaba nikwo yaagira; yaahitsya egyo wiiki naamuraarira. Bwanyima Labaani yaamuhingira Rakeeli omuhara. 
Genesis29:29 Kandi Labaani yaashagarira omuhara Rakeeli omuzaana we Biliha kuba omuzaana we. 
Genesis29:30 Yakobo atyo araarira Rakeeli, haza akunda Rakeeli ogwo okukira Leeya agaruka akorera Labaani endiijo myaka mushanju." 
Genesis29:31 Nyakubaho ku yaareebire Leeya yaaba enyangwakazi, yaamuha okuzaara; haza Rakeeli yaaba engumba." 
Genesis29:32 Leeya yaabaka enda, yaazaara omutabani yaamweta Reubeeni, ahabw'okuba akagira ati: Mukama areebire okwitwa kubi kwangye. Mbwenu buzimazima ibanye naija kunkunda." 
Genesis29:33 Yaagaruka yaabaka enda, yaazaara ondiijo mutabani, haza yaagira ati: Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho ahuriire ku ndi enyangwakazi, nikyo yampeera n'ogu mwana omwojo; atyo amweta eiziina Simeoni." 
Genesis29:34 Agaruka kandi agira enda, azaara ondiijo mutabani; reero agira ati: Mbwenu ogu murundi ibanye naija kukwatanisa naanye, ahabw'okuba mmuzaariire abatabani bashatu. Nikyo yaayeteirwe eiziina Leevi." 
Genesis29:35 Ayongyera atwara; nabwo azaara omutabani; haza agira ati: Mbwenu nu niinyija kuhimbisa Nyakubaho; n'ahabw'ekyo yaamweta eiziina Yuda. Bwanyima oruzaaro rwagarukira aho. 
Genesis30:1 Rakeeli ku yaareebire atazaariire Yakobo baana, yaagirira mukuru we eihari. Yaagira Yakobo, ati: Mpa abaana; nari kitari kityo nfe!" 
Genesis30:2 Yakobo nikwo kugirira Rakeeli ekiniga ky'ahonaaho akamugira ati: Niinye waata omu mwanya gwa Ruhanga owaakwimire oruzaaro? 
Genesis30:3 Onu amugarukamu ati: Reeba hariho omuzaana wangye Biliha, omuraarire abone kunzaarira aha bibero, naanye mmuzaariremu abaana." 
Genesis30:4 Atyo amuha omuzaana we Biliha kumushwera, na Yakobo amuraarira." 
Genesis30:5 Biliha abaka, azaarira Yakobo omutabani." 
Genesis30:6 Rakeeli nikwo kugira ati: Mbwenu Ruhanga yammarira ekindi aha mutima; ahuriire okushaba kwangye, yampa omwana omwojo. Nikyo yaamweteire eiziina Daani." 
Genesis30:7 Biliha omuzaana wa Rakeeli, yaagaruka yaagira enda, yaazaarira Yakobo omutabani wa kabiri." 
Genesis30:8 Rakeeli yaagira ati: Nfukaine munonga na mukuru wangye naarugaho naamwikarira. Atyo yaamweta eiziina Nafutaali. 
Genesis30:9 Leeya ku yaareebire arekyeire aho kuzaara, yaatwara omuzaana we Zilipa, yaamuha Yakobo kumushwera." 
Genesis30:10 Reero Zilipa, omuzaana wa Leeya, yaazaarira Yakobo omutabani." 
Genesis30:11 Leeya nawe nikwo kugira ati: Ebishi naahiirwa! Atyo yaamweta Gaadi. 
Genesis30:12 Zilipa ogwo, omuzaana wa Leeya akazaarira Yakobo omutabani owa kabiri." 
Genesis30:13 Na Leeya yaagira ati: Ebishi nyine omugisha! N'ahabw'ekyo abakazi baryanyeta ow'omugisha. Atyo amweta Asheri. 
Genesis30:14 Mbwenu omu biro by'eigyesha ry'engano, Reubeeni akagyenda yaagwa aha ntobo omu ishwa, yaazireetera Leeya nyina. Reero Rakeeli yaagira Leeya, ati: Naakweshengyereza, mpa aha ntobo za mutabani waawe." 
Genesis30:15 Leeya amugira ati: Ebyo nookyeeta ekintu kikye, okureeba iwe oncwire ahari ibanye? Mbwenu nooyenda kukuratsaho entobo za mutabani wangye? Rakeeli amugarukamu ati: Mbwenu eki kiro arabukuraarire ahabw'entobo za mutabani waawe." 
Genesis30:16 Yakobo ku yaizire naaruga omu ishwa omu mwabazyo, Leeya yaashohora kumubugana, haza yaamugira ati: Eki kiro nondaarira ahabw'entobo za mutabani wangye ezi naaha ahabwawe. N'onu ekyo kiro araara nawe." 
Genesis30:17 Ruhanga ahurira okushaba kwa Leeya; agira enda, azaarira Yakobo omutabani wa kataano." 
Genesis30:18 Leeya nikwo kugira ati: Ruhanga yanzimuurira, ahabw'okuba nkaha ibanye omuzaana wangye. Nikyo yaamweteire eiziina Isakaari." 
Genesis30:19 Bwanyima Leeya yaagaruka yaatwara, yaazaarira Yakobo omutabani owa mukaaga." 
Genesis30:20 Leeya ogwo nikwo kugira ati: Ruhanga yampeera kimwe enshagarirano nungi. Mbwenu ibanye naija kuntetsa, ahabw'okuba mmuzaariire abatabani mukaaga. Atyo amweta eiziina Zebuluuni." 
Genesis30:21 Reero aha muheru azaara omuhara, amweta Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Bwanyima Ruhanga akaijuka Rakeeli, yaahurira okushaba kwe, yaigura enda ye." 
Genesis30:23 Rakeeli yaabaka enda, yaagizaaramu omutabani. Haza yaagira ati: Ruhanga yaanyihaho ekihemu!" 
Genesis30:24 Ogwo mwana yaamweta Yosefu, amakuru ngu: Nkaabaasibwa ki Nyakubaho anyongyera akandi koojo!" 
Genesis30:25 Rakeeli ku yaazaire Yosefu, Yakobo yaagira Labaani ati: Ndagiira ngarukye owaitu." 
Genesis30:26 Mpa abakazi bangye n'abaana bangye abu nkukorereire, reero ondekye ngyende. Manya noomanya omurimo gu nkukoreire." 
Genesis30:27 Kwonka Labaani yaamugira ati: Ku oraabe noonyikiriza, reka nkugambire: Guma aha, manya ntungire obumanyiso burikuunyoreka ku Nyakubaho ampaire emigisha ahabwawe." 
Genesis30:28 Mbwenu ngambira ebihembo byawe, mbikuhe." 
Genesis30:29 Yakobo yaamugira ati: Naiwe wenka noomanya oku nkuheereize, n'oku amatungo gaawe gabaire gye ningariisa." 
Genesis30:30 Manya obu naabaire ntakaizire, okaba oine makye, mbwenu gakanyire munonga; na Ruhanga akakuha emigisha, hoona ahi naabaire nza. Mbwenu shi nyowe ndyatunga ryari eby'okukwatsa eka yangye?" 
Genesis30:31 N'onu yaamugira ati: Mbwenu nkuhe ki? Yakobo ati: Toine ki orampe, kureka niinyija kuguma nindiisa amasyo gaawe n'okugarinda, waaba onkoreire eki:" 
Genesis30:32 Mbwenu eri izooba onyikirize, ndabe omu masyo gaawe, ngyende niinyihamu entaama zoona ez'ebitanga n'ez'obugondo, n'abaana b'entaama boona baakiiraguju; reero kandi omu mbuzi nyihemu ez'ebitanga n'ez'obugondo." 
Genesis30:33 Bwanyima ku oraije kureeba ebihembo byangye ebi oine, obwesigwa bwangye nibwo burampakanire. Embuzi yoona ei oraashangye nyine etaine bitanga nari obugondo, nainga omwana gw'entaama ogutari kiiraguju, biri n'enyibano." 
Genesis30:34 Ndi Labaani ati: Ni kirungi. Ka kibe nk'oku waagamba. 
Genesis30:35 Kwonka eryo izooba Labaani yaashorooramu embuzi empaya ez'ebigabo n'ez'ebitanga, n'ebuguma zoona ez'obugondo n'ez'ebitanga, yoona eyaabaire eine eibara ririkwera, na buri mwana gw'entaama ogwabaire nigwiragura; yaaziha abatabani kuzireeberera." 
Genesis30:36 Kandi yaafuruka, yaatsiga ahagati ye na Yakobo omwanya gw'orugyendo rw'ebiro bishatu. Yakobo yaaguma naariisa obusyo bwa Labaani obwatsigaireho." 
Genesis30:37 Reero Yakobo yaareeta enkoni mbisi z'emikoma n'emizo n'emirokora yaazishuubura, zaagira amabara garikwera maraingwa, gaareebeka ahari ezo nkoni." 
Genesis30:38 Enkoni zi yaashuubura yaazita omu maisho g'amasyo omu mikura erikutwara amaizi omu maato ahu amasyo gaabaire gatsyorera, haza gakiija kunywa geema nigareeba enkoni." 
Genesis30:39 Amasyo gaayemera omu amaisho g'ezo nkoni, reero gaazaara ez'ebigabo n'ez'obugondo n'ez'ebitanga." 
Genesis30:40 Yakobo yaashorooramu abaana b'entaama, kandi amaisho yaagareebesa ei ez'ebigabo ziri, n'ezirikwiragura zoona eziri omu busyo bwa Labaani." 
Genesis30:41 Ez'omu busyo ez'amaani, ku zaabaire ziba nizeema, Yakobo ata enkoni omu mikura omu maisho g'obusyo, ngu zeemere ahagati y'enkoni." 
Genesis30:42 Kwonka ez'omu busyo ezitaine maani akaba ataziteerayo nkoni. N'ahabw'ekyo ezitaine maani zaaba eza Labaani, n'ez'amaani zaaba eza Yakobo." 
Genesis30:43 Okwo nikwo Yakobo yaayeyongyeire kutunga, akagira amasyo maingi g'embuzi n'entaama, abazaana n'abahuuku, engamira n'endogoya." 
Genesis31:1 Mbwenu Yakobo akahurira ngu batabani ba Labaani nibagira bati: Yakobo atwaire byona ebyabaire biri ebya tataitwe, haza nibyo aihiremu eitungo eryo ryona." 
Genesis31:2 Kandi Yakobo yaareeba ku Labaani atakimukunda nk'okubanza. 
Genesis31:3 Mpaho Mukama yaagambira Yakobo, ati: Garuka omu nsi ya baashwenkuru, n'omuri beene waanyu, haza ndyaguma naiwe." 
Genesis31:4 Yakobo atyo atuma, ayeta Rakeeli na Leeya kumushanga omu ishwa, ei amasyo ge gaabaire gari." 
Genesis31:5 Reero abagira ati: Nindeeba shoimwe ku atakinkunda nk'oku yaabaire ankunda. Kwonka Ruhanga wa tata agumire naanye. 
Genesis31:6 Nimumanya ku nkoreire shoimwe n'amaani gangye goona," 
Genesis31:7 haza akangobeza, kandi akahindaguturana ebihembo byangye emirundi ikumi; kwonka Ruhanga taramwikiriize kunkora kubi." 
Genesis31:8 Manya ku yaabaire agira ati: Ez'obugondo nizo ziriba ebihembo byawe, reero obusyo bwona buzaara ez'obugondo, kandi akigira ati: Ez'ebigabo nizo ziraabe ebihembo byawe; obusyo bwona buzaara ez'ebigabo." 
Genesis31:9 Okwo nikwo Ruhanga yaayakire shoimwe amatungo, akagampa." 
Genesis31:10 Manya omu bunaku obu obusyo bwemeramu nkaimutsya amaisho nindoota, naareeba empaya z'embuzi ezaabaire nizeemya obusyo ziri ez'ebigabo n'ez'obugondo n'ez'ebitanga." 
Genesis31:11 Bwanyima maraika wa Ruhanga yangambirira omuri ekyo kirooto ati: Yakobo! Naanye nyetaba nti: Ndi aha! 
Genesis31:12 Nawe agira ati: Imutsya amaisho gaawe oreebe ku embuzi empaya zoona ezirikwemya obusyo ziri ez'ebigabo n'ez'obugondo n'ez'ebitanga; ahabw'okuba ndeebire ebi Labaani arikukwitsa. 
Genesis31:13 Niinye Ruhanga owaakubonekyeire Beteli, ei waasiigiire enyomyo amajuta, okahiga nondahira. Mbwenu imuka orugye omuri egi nsi, ogarukye omu nsi ei waazaariirwemu." 
Genesis31:14 Bwanyima Rakeeli na Leeya baamugarukamu bati: Mbwenu shi hariho omugabo nari eby'okuhungura ebi batutsigiire omu ka ya tataitwe? 
Genesis31:15 Tarikututwaza nk'abanyamahanga? Manya akatujugisa, kandi yaamariraho kimwe empiiha zi baatujugire." 
Genesis31:16 Hati eitungo ryona eri Ruhanga yaayakire tataitwe n'eryaitu n'abaana baitu. Mbwenu Ruhanga eki akugambiire, okikore." 
Genesis31:17 Atyo Yakobo yaimuka, yaata abatabani n'abakazi be aha ngamira." 
Genesis31:18 Yaafunya amatungo n'amasyo ge goona agu yaabaire atungire; nigo ago agu yaatungiire omuri Padanarama, kuza omu nsi ya Kanaani owa Isaaka ishe." 
Genesis31:19 Obwo omuri ebyo biro, Labaani ku yaabaire agiire kushara entaama ebyoya, Rakeeli yaiba emandwa z'omu ka ya ishe." 
Genesis31:20 Yakobo nawe yaagobeza atyo Labaani Omuaramu, ahabw'okutamugambira ku arikwenda kucwa." 
Genesis31:21 Yaahunga n'ebi yaabaire aine byona; yaimutsya yaayambuka Eufuraati, agyemire ogurikuza omu nsi y'ebibungo bya Gileadi." 
Genesis31:22 Aha kiro kya kashatu baagambira Labaani ku Yakobo acwire. 
Genesis31:23 Nawe yaatwara beene ishe yaamuza omu kirari okumara ebiro mushanju; yaarugaho yaamuhambiza omu nsi y'ebibungo bya Gileadi. 
Genesis31:24 Kwonka nyekiro omu kirooto Ruhanga yaija ahari Labaani Omuaramu, yaamugira ati: Oyerinde otagira eki waagambira Yakobo, yaaba kirungi nari kibi." 
Genesis31:25 Labaani akahambya Yakobo. Obwo Yakobo akaba ateire eihema rye omu nsi y'ebibungo; Labaani na beene ishe nabo baasiisira omu nsi y'ebibungo bya Gileadi. 
Genesis31:26 Reero Labaani yaagira Yakobo ati: Ahabw'enki ongobeize kandi okatwara bahara bangye nk'abu banyagire omu rugamba? 
Genesis31:27 Mbwenu ohungiire ki bwesherekye okangobeza, haza otangambire nkabona kukuraga tushemereirwe nitweshongora nituteera enshandaazo n'enanga?" 
Genesis31:28 Kandi ahabw'enki otarandekire nkanywegyera baijukuru bangye na bahara bangye kubaraga? Mbwenu eki okozire n'eky'obushema! 
Genesis31:29 Nkaabaasize kukukora kubi, kwonka Ruhanga wa sho angambiire eki kiro yaagira ati: Oyerinde otakaagira eki waagambira Yakobo, yaaba kirungi nari kibi." 
Genesis31:30 Mbwenu ocwire ahabw'okuba ogiriire eka ya sho orushusho, kwonka shi oibiire ki emandwa zangye?" 
Genesis31:31 Yakobo agarukamu Labaani ati: Manya nkatiina, naateekateeka ngu noija kuunyaka bahara baawe." 
Genesis31:32 Mbwenu weena ou oraashangye aine emandwa zaawe, atatsigaza amagara. Tukiri aha omu maisho ga beene waitu, caaka ekyawe kyona eki nyine, okitware. Haza obwo Yakobo akaba atamanyire ku Rakeeli yaaziibire." 
Genesis31:33 Labaani atyo ataaha omu ihema rya Yakobo, n'omu rya Leeya n'omu ry'abazaana bombi, kwonka tazishangamu. Atyo aruga omu ihema erya Leeya ataaha omu rya Rakeeli." 
Genesis31:34 Mbwenu obwo Rakeeli akaba yaatwaire ezo mandwa z'eka, yaazitaire omu itandiiko ry'engamira, yaazishutamiire. Labaani yaacaaka eby'omu ihema byona, kwonka tiyaazibona." 
Genesis31:35 Rakeeli yaagira ishe ati: Mukama wangye otangwerwa kubi ahabw'okutabaasa kukwimukira, ahabw'okuba ndi omu kwezi. Atyo Labaani acaaka, kwonka ezo mandwa tazibona." 
Genesis31:36 Yakobo nikwo kuguubwa kubi, akateekurana Labaani, naamugira ati: Mbwenu nshobize ki? Ncumwire ki waaza kunkurata oine ekiniga?" 
Genesis31:37 Ku waacaaka ebintu byangye byona, ni bintu ki eby'omu ka yaawe ebi waashangamu? Bireete aha omu maisho ga beene tata na beene sho baturamure." 
Genesis31:38 Egyo myaka makumi abiri ei mmazire naiwe, ebuguma zaawe entaama n'embuzi tizikatoroogaga; kandi tinkaryaga mpaya z'omu masyo gaawe g'entaama." 
Genesis31:39 Zoona ezaabaire zigaashuurwa enyamaishwa tindazikureeteire, niinye zaabaire zifeera, kandi ezaabaire ziibwa nyomushana nari nyekiro okaba ozindihisa." 
Genesis31:40 Mbwenu oku nikwo naabaire; nyomushana nkaba nyitwa ekibiga, nyekiro nyitwa embeho, reero mbura oturo." 
Genesis31:41 Omuri egyo myaka makumi abiri ei mmazire omu ka yaawe nkakukorera emyaka ikumi n'ena ahabwa bahara baawe bombi; n'endi mukaaga ahabw'obusyo bwawe, haza wahindaguturana ebihembo byangye emirundi ikumi." 
Genesis31:42 Kuri Ruhanga wa tata ou Aburahamu na Isaaka baabaire baramya atarankwatiireho, buzimazima hati okaanyohereize engaro nsha. Mbwenu Ruhanga ku areebire okubonabona kwangye, n'oku naakoreise munonga emikono yangye, nikwo kukuteisa omuri eki kiro kyasheesha." 
Genesis31:43 Bwanyima Labaani yaagarukamu Yakobo, ati: Aba baishiki ni bahara bangye, n'aba baana n'abaana bangye, n'aga masyo n'amasyo gangye, na byona ebi orikureeba n'ebyangye. Kwonka mbwenu eri izooba ngire nta aba baishiki bangye, nari abaana baabo abu bazaire?" 
Genesis31:44 Mbwenu nu ija tukore endagaano, iwe naanye, ebe omujurizi ahagati yangye naiwe." 
Genesis31:45 Yakobo atyo akwata eibaare aribyara kuba ekiijutsyo, kandi agira beene ishe, ati:" 
Genesis31:46 Murundaane amabaare. Nabo bakwata amabaare bagarunda ekirundo; haza bariira aha rubaju rwakyo. 
Genesis31:47 Labaani yaakyeeta Yegari-Sahaduta, kwonka Yakobo yaakyeeta Galeedi." 
Genesis31:48 Labaani yaagira ati: Eki kirundo nikyo mujurizi wangye naiwe eri izooba. N'onu nikwo kukyeeta Galeedi. 
Genesis31:49 Kandi enyomyo yaagyeeta Mizipa, ahabw'okuba akagira ati: Mukama abe niwe yaaba kareebi waawe naanye, ku turaabe twataagurukaine." 
Genesis31:50 Ku oriita kubi bahara bangye nari waabatungikirira abandi bakazi, nobu hariba hatariho ondi muntu orikutureeba, Ruhanga niwe ariba mushinja waawe naanye." 
Genesis31:51 Bwanyima Labaani yaagira Yakobo ati: Reeba eki kirundo n'egi nyomyo ebi naata ahagati yangye naiwe. 
Genesis31:52 Eki kirundo nibwo buhamya, n'egi nyomyo nayo n'obuhamya, ku ntarihingura eki kirundo n'egi nyomyo kukukora kubi," 
Genesis31:53 Ruhanga wa Aburahamu kandi Ruhanga wa Nahori, Ruhanga wa ishebo abe niwe yaaturamura. Yakobo nawe yaarahira Ruhanga ou Isaaka ishe yaabaire aramya." 
Genesis31:54 Kandi Yakobo yaatambira ekitambo ahari orwo rushozi; yaayeta beene ishe kurya egyo migaati, nabo baagirya, baaraara ekyo kiro ahari orwo rushozi." 
Genesis31:55 Ku bwabaire nibutaagurikana, Labaani yaimuka yaanywegyera abaijukuru na bahara be; yaabashabira omugisha. Bwanyima yaimutsya yaagarukayo owaabo." 
Genesis32:1 Yakobo akagumizamu orugyendo rwe, haza baamaraika ba Ruhanga baamubugana." 
Genesis32:2 Yakobo ku yaabareebire yaagira ati: Aba n'eihe rya Ruhanga. Nawe omwanya ogwo nikwo kugweta Mahanaimu. 
Genesis32:3 Yakobo reero yaatuma entumwa kumwebembera bakamubandiza ahari Esau mukuru we omu nsi ya Seiri omu kyanga kya Edomu. 
Genesis32:4 Yaabahabura ati: Oku nikwo muraagire mukama wangye Esau muti: Omwiru waawe Yakobo yaakututumaho naagira ati: Nkashuuhuukira owa Labaani naagumayo okuhitsya eri izooba. 
Genesis32:5 Hati nyine ente, endogoya, amasyo g'embuzi n'ag'entaama, abahuuku n'abazaana. Mbwenu mukama wangye, naakutumaho ngu ongirire embabazi." 
Genesis32:6 Entumwa ku zaagarukire ahari Yakobo, zaamugira ziti: Esau mukuru waawe tumuhikireho, mbwenu naija n'abashaija magana ana kukubugana." 
Genesis32:7 Yakobo atiina munonga ashoberwa; nikwo kubaganisamu abantu abu yaabaire aine hamwe n'amasyo g'entaama n'embuzi, n'ag'ente n'engamira, ebicweka bibiri," 
Genesis32:8 naagira ati: Esau ku araahikye aha kicweka kimwe yaakicwekyereza, ekindi kikire." 
Genesis32:9 Mpaho Yakobo ashaba ati: Ai Ruhanga wa tatenkuru Aburahamu, Ruhanga wa tata Isaaka, Iwe Nyakubaho owangizire oti: Garuka omu nsi y'owaanyu omuri beene waanyu, kandi oti ndyakugira gye," 
Genesis32:10 nyowe omuheereza waawe tinshemereire n'akakye rukundo yaawe yoona etahararuka n'obwesigwa bwawe bwona ebi waanyorekire. Manya nkambuka Yorudaani egi, nyine enkoni yangye yonka, mbwenu reeba ndugirwemu ebimbuuro bibiri." 
Genesis32:11 Naakweshengyereza onkize mukuru wangye Esau, ahabw'okuba nimmutiina, atakaija akatwita twena n'abaana na baanyinabo." 
Genesis32:12 Kandi okagira oti: Ndyakugira gye, baijukuru baawe mbakanyise, babe nk'omusheenyi gw'aha nyanja ogutabaasa kubarwa aha bw'obwingi." 
Genesis32:13 Ekyo kiro yaaraara aho; kandi omu bi yaabaire aine yaihamu ekiconco ky'okuha Esau mukuru we; 
Genesis32:14 nizo buguma z'embuzi magana abiri n'empaya makumi abiri; 
Genesis32:15 taho ejigija z'engamira makumi ashatu n'abaana baazo, ente ejigija makumi ana n'enimi ikumi; ejigija z'endogoya makumi abiri n'enimi endogoya ikumi." 
Genesis32:16 Ezo zoona yaazikwatsa abaheereza be, buri siba eri yonka, haza yaagira abo baheereza be ati: Nimuunyebembere, kandi mutsigye omwanya ahagati y'esiba na ngyenzi yaayo." 
Genesis32:17 Reero yaaragiira oyebembeire ati: Mukuru wangye Esau ku araakubugane yaakubuuza ati: Ori ow'oha, kandi nooza hi? N'aga matungo gu ofunyire n'ag'oha?" 
Genesis32:18 Omugarukyemu oti: n'ag'omuheereza waawe Yakobo, ekiconco ki akutwekyeire mukama wangye Esau, kandi ari enyima." 
Genesis32:19 Yaaragiira atyo owa kabiri n'owa kashatu, n'abandi boona abaabaire nibafunya ezo siba, ati: Naimwe mube nikwo mwagambira Esau ku muraamubugane." 
Genesis32:20 Haza mumugire muti: Nangwa na Yakobo omuheereza waawe atukuratiire. Ahabw'okuba akateekateeka ati: Nkaabaasa kumwikaikanisisa ebiconco bi naabanzayo, bwanyima tureebana, shana akaanyikiriza." 
Genesis32:21 Bityo ebyo biconco byagyenda bimwebembeire; we ekyo kiro yaakiraara ahi baabaire bagombekire. 
Genesis32:22 Ekyo kiro Yakobo akaimutsya, yaatwara abakazi be bombi n'abazaana be bombi, n'abaana be ikumi n'omwe, yaayambukira aha nyambukiro ya Yaboki;" 
Genesis32:23 yaabatwara yaabambutsya ako kagyera, yaayambutsya atyo n'ebi yaabaire aine byona." 
Genesis32:24 Kwonka Yakobo we yaatsigarayo wenka, haza omushaija yaafukaana nawe bwarugaho bwataagurukana." 
Genesis32:25 Ogwo mushaija ku yaareebire yaaremana na Yakobo, yaamuteera aha izinio; eigufa ry'enyugunyu ryateruka naakifukaana nawe." 
Genesis32:26 Bwanyima ogwo mushaija yaagira ati: Ndekura ngyende, ahabw'okuba bwataagurukana. Kwonka Yakobo amugira ati: Tindikwija kukureka okagyenda waaba otampaire omugisha." 
Genesis32:27 N'onu amubuuza ati: Eiziina ryawe ori oha? Onu ati: Ndi Yakobo. 
Genesis32:28 Nawe amugira ati: Eiziina ryawe tokyeetwa Yakobo, kureka Isiraeli, ahabw'okuba ofukaine na Ruhanga n'abantu, kandi waasinga." 
Genesis32:29 Yakobo nawe nikwo kumushaba ati: Naakweshengyereza, ngambira eiziina ryawe. Onu ati: N'ombuuriza ki eiziina ryangye? Atyo amuheera aho omugisha." 
Genesis32:30 Yakobo nikwo kweta omwanya ogwo eiziina Penieli, naagira ati: Ahabw'okuba nyereebaniire na Ruhanga, haza tinaafa." 
Genesis32:31 Eizooba ryamurasiraho naarenga Penieli, naateera omunyugu ahabw'eigufa ry'ekibero." 
Genesis32:32 Nikyo okuhitsya hati Abaisiraeli batariira nyama y'embura butuuro, ahabw'okuba ogwo mushaija akateera Yakobo aha izinio." 
Genesis33:1 Yakobo ku yaimukize ati amaisho, yaareeba Esau naija aine abashaija magana ana, yaabaganisa abaana, yaaha Leeya abe, na Rakeeli abe, na buri omwe omuzaana we." 
Genesis33:2 Atyo yaayebembeza abazaana n'abaana baabo, yaakuratsaho Leeya n'abaana be, reero haahereeruka Rakeeli na Yosefu." 
Genesis33:3 Haza we nyakabara abeebembera, agyenda naajuumara ahansi emirundi mushanju, okuhitsya obu yaahikire mukuru we." 
Genesis33:4 Reero Esau airuka kumubugana, amugwa omu kifuba, amubumbatira amunywegyera; bombi barira." 
Genesis33:5 Esau ku aimutsya amaisho, areeba abakazi n'abaana, abuuza ati: Aba abu oine ni baahi? Yakobo ati: N'abaana abu Ruhanga yampaire ahabw'embabazi nyowe omuheereza waawe." 
Genesis33:6 Mpaho abazaana bairira haihi n'abaana baabo bamutangirira. 
Genesis33:7 Leeya nawe n'abaana be bairira haihi bainama; hahereeruka Yosefu na Rakeeli, nabo bairira haihi bamutangirira." 
Genesis33:8 Esau abuuza ati: Ebimbuuro byona ebi mbugaine n'ebya ki? Yakobo amugarukamu ati: N'eby'okwenda ngu mukama wangye ongirire embabazi. 
Genesis33:9 Kwonka Esau amugira ati: Mwene tata, ebi nyine nibimmara; ebi oine yegumire nabyo." 
Genesis33:10 Yakobo amugira ati: Ngaaha naakweshengyereza, ku oraabe wangirira embabazi, yakiira ekiconco ki naakuha. Manya buzimazima okukureeba ahamaisho ni nk'okureebana na Ruhanga, ahabw'okuba waanyakiiza rukundo mpango etyo." 
Genesis33:11 Naakweshengyereza yakiira ekiconco ki naakureetera, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga ankoreire eby'embabazi, kandi ebi nyine nibimmara. Amugyemesereza atyo, n'onu akyakiira." 
Genesis33:12 Bwanyima Esau agira ati: Ka tugumizemu orugyendo rwaitu, nyowe mbeebembere." 
Genesis33:13 Kwonka Yakobo amugira ati: Mukama wangye, noomanya abaana ku bataine maani, kandi n'amasyo g'entaama n'ag'ente agarikwontsya ku niinye ndikugarinda; haza ku baraagabindirane eizooba ryona, nigaija kufa." 
Genesis33:14 Mbwenu mukama wangye naakweshengyereza, nyogaho nyowe omuheereza waawe, oyebembere: reero nyowe niinyija kugumizamu mpora nk'oku amasyo gu nfunyire garikugyenda, n'oku abaana barikugyenda, okuhitsya obu ndaakuhikireho Seiri, iwe mukama wangye." 
Genesis33:15 Esau atyo amugira ati: Ka nkutsigire bamwe aha bashaija bangye abu nyine. Kwonka we ati: Mbwenu n'ab'enki? Eki ndikwenda niiwe okungirira embabazi. 
Genesis33:16 Atyo Esau agarukayo eryo izooba kuza Seiri. 
Genesis33:17 Yakobo nawe agumizamu omuhanda, ahika Sukooti, ayeyombekyerayo enju; ayombekyerayo n'amasyo ge ebiju. Nikyo omwanya ogwo gwayeteirwe Sukooti." 
Genesis33:18 Yakobo ku yaarugire Padanarama, yaahika aha rurembo rwa Shekemu n'obusingye, oruri omu nsi ya Kanaani; yaasiisira omu maisho g'orwo rurembo." 
Genesis33:19 Kandi yaagura ahari beene Hamori ishe wa Shekemu ekibanja ky'empiiha igana, eki yaateiremu eihema rye." 
Genesis33:20 Okwo yaayombekayo eitambiro, yaaryeta Elelohe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
Genesis34:1 Mbwenu Dina muhara wa Leeya, ou yaazairweho Yakobo, akaruga omuka yaaza kutaayaayira abakazi b'omuri egyo nsi." 
Genesis34:2 Reero Shekemu mwene Hamori Omuhiivi, omutegyeki w'egyo nsi, ku yaamureebire yaamuhamba, yaabyama nawe, yaamushiisha." 
Genesis34:3 Omutima gw'ogwo mushaija gwahwera ahari Dina muhara wa Yakobo, yaakunda ogwo mwishiki kandi yaamugambira eby'okumugwisa gye." 
Genesis34:4 Ekyarugiremu Shekemu yaagambira Hamori ishe ati: Nshwererera ogwo mwishiki. 
Genesis34:5 Mbwenu obwo Yakobo akahurira ku ogwo mwojo asiisire muhara we Dina; kwonka abatabani baashangwa bari omu ishwa n'amasyo ge; Yakobo nikwo kuhunama okuhitsya obu baizire. 
Genesis34:6 Bwanyima Hamori ishe Shekemu akaruga owe, yaaza owa Yakobo kuhanuura nawe." 
Genesis34:7 Beene Yakobo ku baakihuriire, baija omuka nibaruga omu ishwa; haza abo bashaija kyabagwisa kubi, baagira ekiniga kingi; ahabw'okuba ogwo mwojo akareeta ekihemu omuri Isiraeli ahabw'okubyama na muhara wa Yakobo, ekintu ekitashemereire kukorwa." 
Genesis34:8 Kwonka Hamori akahanuura nabo, yaabagira ati: Mutabani wangye Shekemu naakundira kimwe muhara waanyu. Naabeeshengyereza mumumuhe amushwere." 
Genesis34:9 Nimushwererane naitwe, mutuhingire bahara baanyu, naimwe mushwere abaitu." 
Genesis34:10 Muryatuura naitwe, kandi ensi egi tiharigira kyabazibira kugituuramu, kugishuuburizamu n'okugitungiramu." 
Genesis34:11 Shekemu nawe yaagambira ishe w'ogwo mwishiki, na nyina, na banyaanya, ati: Nimungirire embabazi, haza eki murancwe kyona ninkibaha." 
Genesis34:12 Enjugano yoona n'ebiconco ebi murancwe niinyija kubiha. Nyowe eki ndikufa n'okumpingira ogu mwishiki. 
Genesis34:13 Batabani ba Yakobo nikwo kugarukamu Shekemu na Hamori ishe n'oburyarya, ahabw'okuba akaba asiisire munyaanyabo Dina." 
Genesis34:14 Baabagira bati: Ekyo titurikubaasa kukikora, okuhingira muhara waitu omuntu otashazirwe, ahabw'okuba nikituhemura." 
Genesis34:15 Kureka ahi turaihe kubaikiriza, niimwe okuba nkaitwe, buri mushaija weena omuriimwe okusharwa;" 
Genesis34:16 obwo nibwo turaabahe bahara baitu, naitwe tukashwera bahara baanyu, kandi tukatuura naimwe, tukaba eihanga rimwe." 
Genesis34:17 Kwonka ku muraayangye kutuhurira mukasharwa, nitwija kutwara muhara waitu twegyendere." 
Genesis34:18 Ebi baabagambiire bikagwisa gye Hamori n'omutabani Shekemu. 
Genesis34:19 Ogwo mutsigazi tiyaayeziringa kukora ekyo kintu, ahabw'okuba akaba naakunda munonga muhara wa Yakobo ogwo. Kandi akaba naasiimwa munonga okukira abandi boona omu ka ya ishe." 
Genesis34:20 Batyo Hamori na Shekemu omutabani baagarukayo. Ku baahikire aha irembo ry'orurembo rwabo, baagambira ab'omuri orwo rurembo, bati:" 
Genesis34:21 Mbwenu abo bantu ni banywani baitu. Nimubarekye batuure omuri egi nsi bagishuuburiremu manya egi nsi mpango nibagihikamu. Ka tushwere bahara baabo, naitwe tubahingire bahara baitu." 
Genesis34:22 Kureka eki kyonka nikyo kiraareetere abo bashaija kwikiriza kutuura naitwe, tukaba eihanga rimwe: buri mushaija omuriitwe kusharwa nkabo oku bashazirwe." 
Genesis34:23 Mbwenu shi nimugira ngu ente zaabo n'ebintu byabo n'amatungo gaabo tibirikwija kuba ebyaitu? Kureka murekye twikirizane nabo, nibwo baraatuure naitwe." 
Genesis34:24 Reero boona abashohoire nibaraba omu irembo ry'orurembo rwe, baikiriza ebi Hamori n'omutabani Shekemu baabagambiire, buri mushaija weena yaasharwa." 
Genesis34:25 Aha kiro kya kashatu, abo bashaija ku baabaire bakirwaire obuhuta, batabani ba Yakobo bombi, Simeoni na Leevi banyaanya Dina, baihayo rurara zaabo, baateera orwo rurembo batamanyirwe, baita abashaija baamwo boona." 
Genesis34:26 Baitsa Hamori na Shekemu omutabani rurara, baiha Dina omu nju ya Shekemu, batyo baagyenda." 
Genesis34:27 Reero beene Yakobo baija baahika aha baitsirwe, baanyaga oby'omuri orwo rurembo, ahabw'okuba abaamwo bakaba basiisire munyaanyabo." 
Genesis34:28 Baatwara amasyo g'entaama n'ag'ente, endogoya na byona ebyabaire biri omuri orwo rurembo n'omu ishwa." 
Genesis34:29 Byona ebi baabaire batungire n'abaana baabo boona n'abakazi baabo n'esika yoona ey'omuri ago maju baabinyaga, byaba omunyago gwabo." 
Genesis34:30 Bwanyima Yakobo yaagira Simeoni na Leevi ati: Mwangwisiza akagwe kuunyangisa abatwire omuri egi nsi: Abanyakanaani n'Abaperizi; haza nimureeba ku nyine abantu bakye. Manya ku baakuhurura banteera nyowe n'ab'omu ka yangye, bakaatucwekyereza." 
Genesis34:31 Kwonka bo baamugarukamu bati: Mbwenu shi akaahindwire munyaanyaitwe maraaya? 
Genesis35:1 Ruhanga akagambira Yakobo, ati: Imuka, oze Beteli, obe niyo waatuura, kandi oyombekyereyo Ruhanga eitambiro, owaakubonekyeire noohunga mukuru waawe Esau." 
Genesis35:2 Mpaho Yakobo yaagambira ab'omu ka ye n'abandi boona abaabaire bari hamwe nawe, ati: Mweiheho baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga abu mwine, mweyeze mujware ebindi bijwaro." 
Genesis35:3 Haza twimukye tuze Beteli, mbone kwombekyerayo Ruhanga eitambiro, Ruhanga owampwereire nyine enaku, akaguma naanye hoona ahi naagiire." 
Genesis35:4 Batyo baaha Yakobo baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga boona abu baabaire baine, n'empeta ezi baabaire bajwaire aha matu gaabo; Yakobo yaaziziika ahansi y'omuvure ogwabaire guri haihi na Shekemu." 
Genesis35:5 Reero ku baabaire nibagyenda, Ruhanga yaitsa obwoba ab'omu ndembo ezaabaire zibeehinguririize, tibaakurata beene Yakobo bababingire." 
Genesis35:6 Yakobo atyo yaahika Luuzi (niyo Beteli) ey'omu nsi ya Kanaani, we n'abandi abu yaabaire aine." 
Genesis35:7 Okwo yaayombekayo eitambiro, kandi ogwo mwanya yaagweta Eli-Beteli, ahabw'okuba aho niho Ruhanga yamweyorekyeire ahungire mukuru we." 
Genesis35:8 Kandi aho Debora omurezi wa Rebeka niho yaafeereire, akaziikwa ahansi y'omuvure, eifo ya Beteli; nikyo baagweteire omuvure gw'okucuriramu." 
Genesis35:9 Yakobo ku yaarugire Padanarama, Ruhanga yaagaruka yaamubonekyera, kandi yaamuha omugisha." 
Genesis35:10 Ruhanga yaamugira ati: Eiziina ryawe ori Yakobo, kwonka tokyetwa Yakobo, kureka noija kwetwa Isiraeli. Nawe nikwo kwetwa Isiraeli." 
Genesis35:11 Kandi Ruhanga yaamugira ati: Ndi Ruhanga omushoboorozi wa byona; ozaare, okanye; eihanga n'ekimbuuro ky'amahanga maingi garugye omuriiwe, n'abagabe bakomookye omuriiwe." 
Genesis35:12 Ensi ei naahaire Aburahamu na Isaaka ndyagikuha, kandi ngihe na baijukuru baawe." 
Genesis35:13 Bwanyima Ruhanga yaamutsiga omu mwanya ogu yaabaire naagaaniiriramu nawe. 
Genesis35:14 Yakobo yaabyara enyomyo y'eibaare omuri ogwo mwanya gu yaagaaniriiremu nawe; yaagishukaho viino n'amajuta g'omuoliva. 
Genesis35:15 Yakobo nikwo kweta ogwo mwanya gu Ruhanga yaagaaniriiremu nawe eiziina Beteli. 
Genesis35:16 Batyo baimutsya baaruga Beteli. Ku baabaire bakitsigaizeyo akaanya kuhika Efuraata, Rakeeli yaarumwa, haza yaahangaanirwa." 
Genesis35:17 Mbwenu ku yaashamatsirwe ebisha, omuzaarisa yaamugira ati: Otatiina, ahabw'okuba hati waaza kuzaara omwana omwojo ondi." 
Genesis35:18 Mbwenu ku yaabaire naakaba (ahabw'okuba akafa), yaamweta eiziina Benoni, kwonka ishe yaamweta Benyamiini." 
Genesis35:19 Atyo Rakeeli afa, bamuziika aha muhanda gurikuza Efuraata (niyo Beetelehemu)." 
Genesis35:20 Yakobo abyara enyomyo aha kituuro; niyo nyomyo y'ekituuro kya Rakeeli ekiriyo na hati. 
Genesis35:21 Isiraeli yaagumizamu orugyendo, bwanyima yaateera eihema rye seeri y'omunaara gwa Ederi." 
Genesis35:22 Isiraeli ku yaabaire akitwire omuri egyo nsi, Reubeeni yaagyenda yaabyama na Biliha ekinyanshunju kya ishe, haza Isiraeli kyamugwa omu kutu. Obwo beene Yakobo bakaba bari ikumi na babiri." 
Genesis35:23 Batabani ba Leeya ni Reubeeni (omujigaijo gwa Yakobo), Simeoni, Leevi, Yuda, Isakaari na Zebuluuni." 
Genesis35:24 Batabani ba Rakeeli ni Yosefu na Benyamiini. 
Genesis35:25 Reero batabani ba Biliha omuzaana wa Rakeeli, ni Daani na Nafutaali." 
Genesis35:26 Kandi batabani ba Zilipa omuzaana wa Leeya, ni Gaadi na Asheri. Abo nibo beene Yakobo abu yaazaariire Padanarama." 
Genesis35:27 Yakobo obu yaahika Mamure owa Isaaka ishe, nainga shi Kiriyatariba (niyo Heburooni), ei Aburahamu na Isaaka baabaire bashuuhuukiire," 
Genesis35:28 obwo Isaaka akaba aine emyaka ya bukuru igana na makumi munaana. 
Genesis35:29 Atyo Isaaka omwitsyo gwamuhwamu, yaafa naakurata abaabo, ari omugurusi eboote; abatabani Esau na Yakobo baamuziika." 
Genesis36:1 Oru nirwo ruzaaro rwa Esau (niwe Edomu). 
Genesis36:2 Esau akashwera abakazi aba omu Banyakanaani: Aada muhara wa Eloni Omuhiiti, Oholibama muhara wa Ana mwene Zibeoni Omuhiivi:" 
Genesis36:3 Basemaati muhara wa Ishimaeli munyaanya wa Nebayooti. 
Genesis36:4 Reero Aada yaazaarira Esau Elifaazi; Basemaati yaazaara Reueli; 
Genesis36:5 na Oholibama yaazaara Yeusi, Yalamu na Koora. Abo nibo beene Esau abu yaazaariire omuri Kanaani." 
Genesis36:6 Bwanyima Esau akatwara abakazi be, abatabani n'abahara n'ab'omu ka ye boona, ente ze n'amatungo ge goona, n'ebintu bye byona ebi yaatungiire omu nsi ya Kanaani, yaaza omu nsi ya hare etahikaine n'omurumuna Yakobo;" 
Genesis36:7 ahabw'okuba amatungo gaabo gakaba gari maingi munonga gatarikubaasa kutuura hamwe; ensi ei baabaire bashuuhuukiiremu etarikubahika ahabw'amatungo gaabo. 
Genesis36:8 Atyo Esau yaatuura omu nsi y'ebibungo bya Seiri; Esau ogwo niwe Edomu. 
Genesis36:9 Mbwenu oru nirwo ruzaaro rwa Esau, ishenkuru w'Abaedomu ab'omu nsi y'ebibungo bya Seiri." 
Genesis36:10 Aga n'amaziina ga beene Esau; Elifaazi mutabani wa Aada muka Esau; Reueli mutabani wa Basemaati, nawe muka Esau." 
Genesis36:11 Reero beene Elifaazi ni Temani, Omari, Zefo, Gatamu na Kenazi." 
Genesis36:12 Timuna we akaba ari ekinyanshunju kya Elifaazi mwene Esau; Elifaazi yaamuzaaraho Amaleki. 
Genesis36:13 Batabani ba Reueli nibo aba: Nahati, Serahi, Shamaha na Miiza." 
Genesis36:14 Kandi aba ni batabani ba Oholibama muhara wa Ana, mwene Zibeeni, muka Esau. Esau akamuzaaraho Yeusi, Yalamu na Koora." 
Genesis36:15 Aba nibo bakuru omuri beene Esau. Batabani ba Elifaazi omujigaijo gwa Esau: abakuru ni Temani, Omari, Zeefo, Kanezi," 
Genesis36:16 Koora, Gatamu na Amaleki. Abo nibo bakuru omu Baelifaazi, baijukuru ba Aada." 
Genesis36:17 Aba nibo batabani ba Reueli mwene Esau, abatware: Nahati, Zeera, Shamahi na Miiza. Abo nibo batware beene Reueli, ab'omu nsi ya Edomu, batabani ba Basemaati muka Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Kandi aba ni batabani ba Oholibama muka Esau: abatware Yeusi, Yalamu na Koora. Abo nibo batware baazairwe Oholibama, muhara wa Ana muka Esau." 
Genesis36:19 Abo nibo beene Esau (niwe Edomu), kandi abo nibo batware omuribo." 
Genesis36:20 Mbwenu beene Seiri Omuhoori, abatuuzi b'omuri egyo nsi, nibo aba: Lotani, Shobali, Zibeoni, Ana," 
Genesis36:21 Dishoni, Ezeri, na Dishani. Nibo batware b'Abahoori beene Seiri, ab'omu nsi ya Edomu." 
Genesis36:22 Beene Lotani ni Hoifi na Hemani; kandi munyaanya Lotani akaba ari Timuna. 
Genesis36:23 Aba ni beene Shobali: Alivaani, Manahati, Ebali, Sheefo, na Onamu." 
Genesis36:24 Beene Zibeoni nibo aba: Aya na Ana. Niwe Ana owaazoire ebitagata omu ihamba ariisize endogoya za Zibeoni, ishe." 
Genesis36:25 Aba nibo baana ba Ana: Dishoni na Oholibama muhara wa Ana ogwo. 
Genesis36:26 Reero beene Dishoni nibo aba: Hemudani, Eshubani, Iturani, na Kerani." 
Genesis36:27 Kandi aba ni beene Ezeri: Bilihaani, Zaavani na Akani." 
Genesis36:28 Beene Dishani nibo aba: Uuzi na Arani. 
Genesis36:29 Aba nibo batware b'Abahoori; Abatware Lotani, Shobali, Zibeoni na Ana;" 
Genesis36:30 taho Dishoni, Ezeri na Dishani. Abo nibo batware b'Abahoori, nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri omu nsi ya Seiri." 
Genesis36:31 Aba nibo bagabe abaategyekire ensi ya Edomu, hatakabaireho mugabe weena owaategyekire Abaisiraeli." 
Genesis36:32 Beela mwene Beori akategyeka Edomu, orurembo rwe ruri Dinahaha." 
Genesis36:33 Beela ku yaafiire, Yababu mwene Zeera owa Bozira yaaza aha ngoma omu mwanya gwe." 
Genesis36:34 Yobabu ku afa, Hushamu ow'omu nsi y'Abatemani atwara engoma omu mwanya gwe." 
Genesis36:35 Hushamu ku yaafiire, Hadadi mwene Bedadi owaabingire Abamidiyani omu nsi ya Moabu, yaayema omu mwanya gwe, eiziina ry'orurembo rwe ryaba Aviti." 
Genesis36:36 Hadadi ku yaafiire, reero Samulahi owa Masireeka yaayema omu mwanya gwe." 
Genesis36:37 Samulahi ku yaafiire, Shauli owa Rehoboti aha mugyera Eufuraati yaayema omu mwanya gwe," 
Genesis36:38 Shauli ku afa, Baalihanani mwene Akiboora ahungura engoma ye." 
Genesis36:39 Baalihanani mwene Akiboora ku yaafiire, Hadari yaahungura engoma ye; obwo orurembo rwe nirwetwa Pau; kandi omukazi we akaba naayetwa Mehetabeli, muhara wa Matireedi, mwijukuru wa Mezahabu." 
Genesis36:40 Aga nigo maziina g'abatware beene Esau, nk'oku emiryango yaabo n'emyanya y'obutuuro bwabo byabaire biri, n'oku baabaire nibeetwa; abatware Timuna, Alivahi, Yeteti," 
Genesis36:41 Oholibama, Elahi, Pinono," 
Genesis36:42 Keenazi, Temani, Mibuzaari," 
Genesis36:43 Magadieli na Iramu. Abo nibo batware beene Edomu (niwe Esau ishenkuru w'Abanyaedomu), nk'emyanya y'obutuuro bwabo oku yaabaire eri, omu nsi ei baakubwire." 
Genesis37:1 Yakobo akatuura omu nsi ya Kanaani ei ishe yaabaire ashuuhuukiiremu. 
Genesis37:2 Mbwenu ebi nibyo byabaire aha b'omuryango gwa Yakobo. Yosefu akaba aine emyaka ikumi na mushanju. Ku yaabaire naakinyeeta, yaaguma naariisa obusyo bw'entaama na bakuru be batabani ba Biliha na Zilipa baka ishe. Haza Yosefu ogwo akaba agambira ishebo ebibi ebi baabaire nibakora." 
Genesis37:3 Reero Isiraeli akaba akunda Yosefu okukira abandi baana be boona, ahabw'okuba akaba ari omutabani ou yaazaire yaabaire omugurusi; atyo yaamubaziiriza ekanzu y'emikono miraingwa." 
Genesis37:4 Kwonka bakuru be ku baareebire ishebo naamukunda okukira beene ishe boona, baamwanga, baaguma batarikugamba gye nawe." 
Genesis37:5 Mbwenu Yosefu akaroota ekirooto. Ku yaakigambiire bakuru be baayongyera kumwanga. 
Genesis37:6 Manya akabagira ati: Nimuhurire ekirooto ki ndootsire. 
Genesis37:7 Ku tubaire nituboha emiba y'engano omu musiri, omuba ogwangye gwaimuka gwayemerera burunga. Reero emiba eyaanyu yaayemerera egwehinguririize, yainikira omuba ogwangye emitwe." 
Genesis37:8 Bakuru be nikwo kumugira bati: Noogira ngu buzimazima noija kuba omugabe waitu? Nari kwo noija kututegyeka? Batyo baayongyera kumwanga ahabw'ebirooto bye n'ahabw'ebi yaagamba. 
Genesis37:9 Bwanyima akaroota ekindi kirooto, yaakigambira bakuru be, ati: Reeba ndootsire ekindi kirooto; naareeba eizooba n'okwezi n'enyonyoozi ikumi n'emwe nibintangirira." 
Genesis37:10 Kwonka ku yaakigambiire atyo ishe na bakuru be, ishe ogwo yaamukabukira naamugira ati: Mbwenu ekyo ni kirooto ki eki orootsire? Noogira ngu buzimazima nyowe na nyoko na bakuru baawe, turyaija kurambira ahansi omu maisho gaawe?" 
Genesis37:11 Bakuru be batyo baamugirira eihari; kwonka ishe yaaguma naijuka ekyo ekyagambwa. 
Genesis37:12 Bakuru ba Yosefu bakaza kuriisa obusyo bwa ishebo haihi na Shekemu. 
Genesis37:13 Mpaho Isiraeli yaagira Yosefu, ati: Hari bakuru baawe tibarikuriisiza obusyo Shekemu? Ija nu mbakutumeho. N'onu amugarukamu ati: Reeba ndi aha." 
Genesis37:14 Atyo amugira ati: Mbwenu irooko oreebe yaaba bakuru baawe bari gye, n'amasyo gari gye; haza oije ongambire. Atyo amutuma; onu aruga omu ruhanga rwa Heburooni aza Shekemu." 
Genesis37:15 Reero omushaija omweija amushanga naajaayanira omu bwerere. Ogwo mushaija amubuuza ati: Beitu nooronda ki? 
Genesis37:16 Onu ati: Manya ninsherura bakuru bangye. Naakweshengyereza ngambira ahi bariisiize obusyo. 
Genesis37:17 Ogwo mushaija amugira ati: Bafurukire, ahabw'okuba mpuriire nibagira bati: Ka tuze Dotani. Yosefu nawe nikwo kukurata bakuru be, akabashanga Dotani." 
Genesis37:18 Kwonka ku baamureebeire hare atakabahikire, baamugiira omu naama y'okumwita." 
Genesis37:19 Baagambirana bati: Ngugwo ruroota yaija. 
Genesis37:20 Mbwenu nimwije tumwite, tumunagye omu kiina kimwe ahari ebi, haza twije tugire tuti enyamaishwa engoora-nyama emuriire; reero tureebe ah'ebirooto bye biraaherere." 
Genesis37:21 Kwonka Reubeeni ku yaakihuriire, yaabamujuna naagira ati: Ka turekye kumwita." 
Genesis37:22 Reubeeni yaabagira ati: Nyaabura 'mwe mutasheesha eshagama. Mumunagye omuri eki kiina ekiri aha omu ihamba, kwonka mutamukozaho orukumu. Ekyo akakigamba ngu abone kumubakiza n'okumugarurira ishe." 
Genesis37:23 Yosefu ku yaahikire bakuru be, baamujuura ekanzu ye ey'emikono miraingwa, ei yaabaire ajwaire." 
Genesis37:24 Baamutwara, baamunaga omu kiina ekyabaire kirimu busha kitarimu maizi." 
Genesis37:25 Bwanyima baashutama kurya. Ku baimukize amaisho baareeba ekimbuuro ky'abagyenzi Abaishimaeli, nibaruga Gileadi, baine engamira zaabo zeekoreire amacanda, n'emibazi erimu emigaju n'entsinda, bari omu muhanda nibabitwara Misiri." 
Genesis37:26 Yuda nikwo kugira beene ishe ati: Mbwenu nikitugasira ki kwita murumuna waitu tukashereka ku tumwitsire? 
Genesis37:27 Nimwije tumuguze Abaishimaeli mbaba, arekye kutugwaho. Manya ni murumuna waitu, ow'orura rumwe naitwe. Beene ishe nabo baamwikiriza." 
Genesis37:28 Ago magingo abashuubuzi Abamidiyani ku baizire nibarabaho, banu baatuuhuurayo Yosefu baamwiha omu kiina, baamuguza Abaishimaeli empiiha z'efeeza makumi abiri; na bari baamutwara Misiri." 
Genesis37:29 Reubeeni ku yaagarukire ahari ekyo kiina, yaashanga Yosefu atakirimu, yaataagura ebi ajwaire." 
Genesis37:30 Atyo agaruka aha barumuna abagira ati: Omwana tariyo, mbwenu ntoore hi?" 
Genesis37:31 Nabo baihayo ekanzu ya Yosefu, baita embuzi, ekanzu ye baagijabika omu shagama." 
Genesis37:32 Baakwata egyo kanzu y'emikono miraingwa, baagitwarira ishebo; haza bamugira bati: Eki nikyo tugwireho. Reeba yaaba eri ekanzu y'omwana waawe nari etari yo." 
Genesis37:33 Yakobo agimanya, agira ati: N'ekanzu y'omwana wangye; enyamaishwa emuriire. Tihariho kubangaanisa, Yosefu egyo nyamaishwa emugaashwire." 
Genesis37:34 Mpaho Yakobo ataagura ebi ajwaire, ayezirika ekiguniya, amara ebiro bingi naacurira omutabani." 
Genesis37:35 Batabani be na bahara be boona baimuka kumugumyagumya, kwonka we ayanga abagira ati: Nimundekye! Ndyarugaho nshangye omwana wangye okuzimu owa Nyamuteza ninkimucurira. Nikwo ishe yaamucuriire atyo." 
Genesis37:36 Reero Abamidiyani ku baahikire Misiri, Yosefu ogwo baamuguza Potifaari omukungu wa Faraaho, owaabaire ari omukuru w'abarinzi b'ekikaari." 
Genesis38:1 Omu biro ebyo Yuda akashuuma yaaruga omuri beene ishe yaataaha ow'omuntu orikwetwa Hiira Omunyadulaamu. 
Genesis38:2 Okwo niyo Yuda yaareebeire muhara w'Omunyakanaani orikwetwa Shua. Ku yaamushweire yaabyama nawe. 
Genesis38:3 Onu yaatwara yaazaara omutabani, yaamweta Eeri." 
Genesis38:4 Agaruka atwara, azaara ondi mutabani, amweta Onani." 
Genesis38:5 Ayongyera atwara, azaara ondiijo mutabani, amweta Sheela. Obwo obu amuzaara akaba ari Kezibu." 
Genesis38:6 Bwanyima Yuda akashwererera Eeri omutabani omukuru omukazi orikwetwa Tamari. 
Genesis38:7 Kwonka Eeri ogwo mutabani wa Yuda omukuru akaba ari enyabibi naagwisa kubi Nyakubaho; na Nyakubaho nikwo kumwita. 
Genesis38:8 Bwanyima Yuda yaagira Onani ati: Irooko oraarire muka mukuru waawe, omugirire ebi omuntu akorera muramu we, obone kuzaarira mukuru waawe abaana." 
Genesis38:9 Kwonka Onani akamanya ku orwo ruzaaro rutariba orwe. N'ahabw'ekyo ku yaabyamire na muka mukuru we, yaasheesha ahansi ngu atakaazaarira mukuru we abaana." 
Genesis38:10 Haza eki yaakozire kyagwisa kubi Nyakubaho, nawe yaamwita." 
Genesis38:11 Yuda nikwo kugambira Tamari omukaamwana ati: Irooko ogume ori omufaakazi omu ka ya sho, okuhitsya obu Sheela mutabani wangye araakure ahabw'okuba akaba naatiina, ngu onu atakaafa nka bakuru be. Tamari atyo agyenda, aguma owa ishe." 
Genesis38:12 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, muka Yuda muhara wa Shua yaafa. Reero Yuda ku yaarugire omu rufu, yainamuka Timuna omu bashazi b'ebyoya by'entaama ze, aine munywani we Hiira Omunyadulaamu." 
Genesis38:13 Tamari ku baamugambiire bati: Shozaara naaza Timuna kushara entaama ze ebyoya," 
Genesis38:14 yaajuura ebijwaro by'obufaakazi, yaayetwekyerera yaayehumbika, yaashutama aha irembo rya Enaimu ery'aha muhanda gurikuza Timuna; ahabw'okuba akareeba ku Sheela akuzire, kandi ku batamumuhaire kumushwera." 
Genesis38:15 Yuda ku yaamureebire, yaateekateeka ngu ni maraaya, ahabw'okuba akaba ayesangiire ahamaisho." 
Genesis38:16 Atyo akiikama amushanga aha rubaju rw'omuhanda, amugira ati: Naakweshengyereza, rugayo mbyame naiwe. Haza obwo atamanyire ku ari omukaamwana. N'onu nikwo kumubuuza ati: Noija kumpa ki, obone kubyama naanye?" 
Genesis38:17 Nawe amugarukamu ati: Niinyija kukutwekyera akaana k'embuzi, nkaihe omu busyo bwangye. N'onu ati: Mbwenu noija kunkwatiriza ki okuhitsya obu oraakoohereze?" 
Genesis38:18 Onu ati: Mbwenu shi nkukwatirize ki? N'onu ati: Empeta yaawe eriho akamanyiso n'orukoba rwawe, n'egi nkoni yaawe ei okwaitse. Atyo abimuha abyama nawe, haza amutweka." 
Genesis38:19 Bwanyima ogwo mukazi aimuka agyenda ajuura ebi ayetwekyereire, ajwara ebye by'obufaakazi." 
Genesis38:20 Yuda ku yaatwekire munywani we Omunyadulaamu akabuzi, ngu ogwo mukazi amugarurire ebi yaamukwatiriize, onu tiyaamushangaho." 
Genesis38:21 Nikwo kubuuza ab'omuri ogwo mwanya ati: Maraaya obaire ari Enaimu aha rubaju rw'omuhanda ari nkahi? Baamugarukamu bati: Tihariho maraaya obaire ari aha. 
Genesis38:22 Nawe agaruka ahari Yuda amugira ati: Tinaamureeba, kandi ab'omuri ogwo mwanya baagira bati: Tihariho maraaya obaire ari aha." 
Genesis38:23 Yuda atyo amugarukamu ati: Ebyo bintu k'agume nabyo bibe ebye, batakaatushekyeerera. Naiwe nooreeba ku naakutweka aka kaana k'embuzi haza otamubone." 
Genesis38:24 Ku haahingwireho ameezi nk'ashatu, abantu baagambira Yuda bati: Tamari mukaamwana waawe ahindukire maraaya, kandi aine enda ei ahire omu bwamaraaya. Yuda ati: Nimumushohoze, bamwotsye afe." 
Genesis38:25 Ogwo mukazi ku baabaire nibamushohoza, yaatuma ahari ishezaara ati: Mukama w'ebintu ebi niwe yantwekire. Ayongyera agira ati: Naakweshengyereza yetegyereze mukama w'empeta egi eriho akamanyiso, n'orukoba, n'egi nkoni." 
Genesis38:26 Atyo Yuda abyemera, agira ati: Ogu mukazi yansinga, ahabw'okuba tindamuhaire mutabani wangye Sheela. Kwonka Yuda taragarukire kubyama nawe bundi." 
Genesis38:27 Obunaku bwe bw'okuzaara ku bwahikire, omu nda ye haashangwa harimu amahasha." 
Genesis38:28 Ku yaabaire naarumwa, omwe yaashohoza omukono, omuzaarisa yaagukomaho akahuuzi karikutukura, naagira ati: Ogu niwe yaabanza kushohora." 
Genesis38:29 Kwonka ogwo mwana ku yaagarwireyo ati omukono, mugyenzi we yaashohora. Omuzaarisa nikwo kugira ati: Kandi shi ka niiwe waabanza kushohora! Nikyo yaayeteirwe Pereezi." 
Genesis38:30 Bwanyima omurumuna yaashohora aine ako kahuuzi karikutukura aha mukono, baamweta Zeela." 
Genesis39:1 Mpaho baatwara Yosefu Misiri. Reero Potifaari omukungu wa Faraaho, kandi omukuru w'abarinzi Omunyamisiri, yaamugura aha Baishimaeli abaabaire bamushuumizeyo." 
Genesis39:2 Nyakubaho yaaguma na Yosefu, yaaba omushaija orikugyenderwa gye byona. Yaaguma naaraara omu nju ya mukama we Omunyamisiri." 
Genesis39:3 Mukama we yaareeba ku Nyakubaho ari hamwe nawe, kandi ku ahaire omugisha byona ebi Yosefu arikukora." 
Genesis39:4 Atyo Yosefu yaashongoka ahari mukama we yaamugaragira. Mukama we yaamuha okureeberera eka ye, yaamukwatsa byona ebi yaabaire atungire."
