Genesis39:5 Haza okwiha obu yaamuhindura omureeberezi w'eka ye, akamukwatsa byona ebi atungire, Nyakubaho akaha eka y'ogwo Munyamisiri omugisha ahabwa Yosefu ogwo. Omugisha gwa Nyakubaho gwaguma ahari byona ebi atungire, eby'omu ka n'eby'omu ishwa." 
Genesis39:6 Mpaho byona yaabita omu bushoboorozi bwa Yosefu, kandi akimwine, tiyaagira kintu kyona eki arikujunaanwa kukora, kureka ebyokurya ebi yaabaire arya. Yosefu akaba aine ahamaisho harungi kandi anyeetsire gye." 
Genesis39:7 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, muka mukama we yaamureeba, yaamurigira. Yaamugira ati: Ija obyame naanye." 
Genesis39:8 Kwonka Yosefu yaayanga; yaagira muka mukama we, ati: Ngaaha! Reeba, mukama wangye obu anyine, taine kintu kyona eky'omu ka eki arikumanya. Byona ebi atungire akabinkwatsa," 
Genesis39:9 n'egi ka tarikuginkiramu; kandi tihariho ki atarandekuriire, kureka iwe omukazi we. Mbwenu nimbaasa nta kukora ekibi kirikwingana kityo, nkacumura ahari Ruhanga?" 
Genesis39:10 Ogwo mukazi, nobu araabe yaabaire agambira atyo Yosefu buri izooba, onu akaba ataikiriza kubyama nawe nari kumwehitsya." 
Genesis39:11 Eizooba rimwe Yosefu ku yaataahire omu nju kukora omurimo gwe, hatariho ondi muntu omu b'egyo ka," 
Genesis39:12 ogwo mukazi yaamukwata omwenda, yaamugira ati: Byama naanye. Onu agumurekurira ahunga aruga omu nju." 
Genesis39:13 Ogwo mukazi ku areeba onu yaamutsigira omwenda gwe, yaahunga yaaruga omu nju," 
Genesis39:14 ayeta abashaija b'omuri egyo ka, abagira ati: Nimureebe ku ibanye yandeeteire ogu Muyudaaya kuunyeshungiraho. Reeba yantaahirira kubyama naanye; naanye nikwo kuborooga." 
Genesis39:15 Ku yaareeba naayamuza nimborooga, yantsigira omwenda gwe, yaahunga yaaruga omu nju." 
Genesis39:16 Atyo ogwo mukazi abiika ogwo mwenda, okuhitsya obu mukama wa Yosefu yaagarukire omuka." 
Genesis39:17 Mpaho abimuteekyerereza ati: Omugaragwa Omuheburaayo ou waatureetsiremu, yaija ahi ndi kuunyeshungiraho." 
Genesis39:18 Kwonka ahonaaho ku naayamuza nimborooga yantsigira omwenda gwe, yaahunga yaaruga omu nju." 
Genesis39:19 Mukama wa Yosefu ku yaahuriire omukazi we yaamugambira oku omugaragwa we yaamutwaza, ekiniga kyayenda kumubarura." 
Genesis39:20 Yaakwata Yosefu yaamwigatira omu kihome eki baabaire barindiramu embohe z'omugabe; n'onu yaakigumamu. 
Genesis39:21 Kwonka Nyakubaho yaaguma na Yosefu amwiniire rukundo etahararuka yaamuha okukundwa omurinzi w'ekihome. 
Genesis39:22 Ogwo murinzi w'ekihome yaakwatsa Yosefu embohe zaamwo zoona; na byona ebyabaire nibikorerwamu niwe yaabaire abireeberera. 
Genesis39:23 Omurinzi w'ekihome akaba ataine ki arikwemerereza omutima; ahabw'okuba byona akaba abikwatsize Yosefu kubireeberera, haza Nyakubaho yaaguma nawe, n'ebi yaabaire akora byona abibaisa gye." 
Genesis40:1 Ku haahingwireho omwanya, omugabuzi w'omugabe wa Misiri ow'ebyokunywa, n'omuteeki we baashobya ahari mukama waabo omugabe wa Misiri." 
Genesis40:2 Faraaho yaagwerwa kubi abo bakungu be bombi, omugabuzi omukuru w'ebyokunywa, n'omuteeki we omukuru;" 
Genesis40:3 yaabata omu kihome eky'omu nju y'omukuru w'abarinzi eki Yosefu yaabaire akomeirwemu. 
Genesis40:4 Omukuru w'abarinzi yaabakwatsa Yosefu kuguma naabaheereza, batyo baamara ebiro bari omu kihome." 
Genesis40:5 Ekiro kimwe omugabuzi w'ebyokunywa n'omuteeki ab'omugabe wa Misiri bombi bakaroota buri omwe ekirooto kye, kandi buri kirooto kiine amakuru gaakyo." 
Genesis40:6 Yosefu ku yaizire ahi bari omu kasheeshe, yaareeba baine obujune." 
Genesis40:7 Nawe nikwo kubuuza abo bakungu ba Faraaho, abaabaire bari hamwe nawe omu kihome ky'omu nju ya mukama we, ati: Ahabw'enki eri izooba mucuncubaire ahamaisho?" 
Genesis40:8 Baamugarukamu bati: Turootsire ebirooto, kwonka tihariho w'okubirootorora. Yosefu nawe abagira ati: okurootorora ebirooto shi t'okwa Ruhanga? Naabeeshengyereza nimubingambire." 
Genesis40:9 Omugabuzi mukuru ow'ebyokunywa, atyo agambira Yosefu ekirooto ekye, ati: Omu kuroota kwangye ndeebire omuzaabibu," 
Genesis40:10 kandi ogwo muzaabibu guriho amataagi ashatu. Ku guginire guti, gwarabya, ebijuma by'omugimba byahiisa." 
Genesis40:11 Obwo ekikopo kya Faraaho kindi omu ngaro, ntyo ncwa ebyo bijuma, mbikamuurira omu kikopo kya Faraaho, haza nkimukwatsa." 
Genesis40:12 Yosefu amugira ati: Aga nigo makuru gaakyo: amataagi ashatu nibyo biro bishatu. 
Genesis40:13 Omu biro bishatu, Faraaho naija kukwiha omu kihome akugarure aha bukuru bwawe, obonetsye Faraaho ekikopo kye nka ira obu waabaire okiri omugabuzi we w'ebyokunywa." 
Genesis40:14 Mbwenu ku biraabe byakugyendeire gye, onyijukye, onkorere eky'embabazi naakweshengyereza, ongambire Faraaho, onyihise omuri eki kiju." 
Genesis40:15 Manya omu mazima nkaibwa omu nsi y'Abaheburaayo, kandi kunu tinkakoraga ekyakubareeteire kunteisa omu kihome." 
Genesis40:16 Omuteeki omukuru ku yaareebire okwo kurootorora kwaba okw'akaso karungi, nawe yaagira Yosefu ati: Naanye ndootsire nyekoreire ebiibo bishatu by'emigaati." 
Genesis40:17 Haza aha kiibo ky'aha mutwe gw'ebindi habaire hariho ebyokurya by'emiringo yoona ebiteekyeirwe Faraaho, kwonka enyonyi zibaire nizibirya nizibiiha aha kiibo ki nyekoreire." 
Genesis40:18 Yosefu agarukamu ati: Aga nigo makuru gaakyo. Ebiibo ebyo ebishatu nibyo biro bishatu. 
Genesis40:19 Omuri ebyo biro bishatu, Faraaho naija kukwiha omu kikome, akutemeho omutwe, akuhanikye aha kiti, amahungu gakushokoore." 
Genesis40:20 Mbwenu ekiro kya kashatu kikaba kiri eky'okwijuka okuzaarwa kwa Faraaho. Faraaho yaateekyera abaheereza be boona obugyenyi, kandi yaiha omu kihome omugabuzi we omukuru ow'ebyokunywa n'omuteeki we omukuru ab'omu baheereza be." 
Genesis40:21 Reero omugabuzi we omukuru ow'ebyokunywa yaamugarura omu bugabuzi bwe, yaabonetsya Faraaho ekikopo." 
Genesis40:22 Kwonka omuteeki omukuru yaamuhanika nk'oku Yosefu yaabarootororeire. 
Genesis40:23 Beitu omugabuzi omukuru ow'ebyokunywa, tiyaijuka Yosefu, yaamwebwa." 
Genesis41:1 Ku haahingwireho emyaka ebiri, Faraaho yaaroota ayemereire aha rubaju rw'omugyera." 
Genesis41:2 Omuri ogwo mugyera, haarugamu ente mushanju zigomokire zirikubereshera, zaayahukira ekibingo zaakirya." 
Genesis41:3 Reero haakurataho ezindi mushanju mbi zihururukire, zaaruga omuri Nailo zaayemerera aha nkungu yaayo aha rubaju rwa ziri." 
Genesis41:4 Ente mbi ezihururukire zaarya ziri ezigomokire ezirikubereshera. Faraaho nawe nikwo kusisiimuka. 
Genesis41:5 Ku yaagarwireyo kugwejegyera, yaaroota obwa kabiri; yaareeba ebishiisha mushanju by'engano birikukondakonda kandi birungi, bikuriire aha mushengye gumwe." 
Genesis41:6 Reero haakurataho obundi bushiisha mushanju bunyurwize kandi bwomiibwe omuyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba. 
Genesis41:7 Haza obwo bushiisha bunyurwize bwamira ebishiisha omushanju ebirikukondakonda, ebiijwire enjuma zeezire. Faraaho ku asisiimuka, ashanga kiri ekirooto." 
Genesis41:8 Omu kasheeshe omutima gwe gugira obujune, atuma ku bamwetera abafumu b'omuri Misiri boona n'abanyabwengye baamwo. Faraaho abagambira eby'ekirooto kye, kwonka habura owaakimurootororera." 
Genesis41:9 Bwanyima omugabuzi mukuru w'obyokunywa agambira Faraaho ati: Eri izooba niinyijuka eki naashobize. 
Genesis41:10 Manya Faraaho obu yaagwerwa kubi abaheereza be, akanta omu kihome n'omuteeki we mukuru omu nju y'omukuru w'abarinzi;" 
Genesis41:11 ekiro kimwe nyowe nawe tukaroota, buri omwe ekirooto kye n'amakuru gaakyo." 
Genesis41:12 Obwo tukaba twineyo omutsigazi Omuheburaayo orikuheereza omukuru w'abarinzi. Ku twamugambiire, yaaturootororera ebirooto byaitu, buri omwe naamushoboororera amakuru g'eki arootsire." 
Genesis41:13 Haza oku yaaturootororoire nikwo byabaire, nyowe naagarurwa aha murimo gwangye, kwonka omukuru w'abateeki yaahanikwa." 
Genesis41:14 Mpaho Faraaho yaatuma ku beeta Yosefu. Nabo baamureeta ahonaaho nibamwiha omu kihome. Reero ku yaaherize kumwa n'okujwara ebindi bijwaro, yaaza kureebana na Faraaho." 
Genesis41:15 Faraaho nikwo kugira Yosefu, ati: Ndootsire ekirooto, haza habuzire ow'okukirootorora. Mbwenu mpuriire nibakugambaho ngu ku orikuhurira ekirooto, noobaasa kushoboorora amakuru gaakyo." 
Genesis41:16 Yosefu agarukamu Faraaho, ati: Tiinye, kureka Ruhanga niwe araakugarukyemu Nyakusinga Faraaho ekiraakugirire akaso karungi." 
Genesis41:17 Mpaho Faraaho agira Yosefu, ati: Ndootsire nindeeba nyemereire aha nkungu ya Nailo," 
Genesis41:18 reero ente mushanju zigomokire zirikubereshera, zaaruga omuri Nailo zaariira omu kibingo." 
Genesis41:19 Handi hakye ezindi nte mushanju zaija zizikuratiire, ezi ntakareebaga muri egi nsi ya Misiri yoona, zihururukire, mbi, zihwaire aha magufa." 
Genesis41:20 Ezo nte zihururukire ezihwaire aha magufa zaariira kimwe ziriya ente mushanju ezigomokire ezibandize. 
Genesis41:21 Kwonka ku ziziriire waashusha oti tizaazirya, ahabw'okuba zigumire zihwaire aha magufa nk'okwazo. Ntyo nsisiimuka." 
Genesis41:22 Hoona ndootsire nindeeba ebishiisha mushanju, ebikuriire aha mushengye gumwe, ebiijwire enjuma kandi birungi." 
Genesis41:23 Naagaruka naareeba ebishiisha mushanju bihotokire, binyurwize kandi byomiibwe omuyaga gwa burugwa-izooba." 
Genesis41:24 Reero ebishiisha biri ebinyurwize byamira omushanju ebirungi. Ku mbigambiire abanyabwengye, haabura ow'okubinshoboororera." 
Genesis41:25 Bwanyima Yosefu agira Faraaho ati: Ekirooto kyawe, Nyakusinga, ni kimwe; Ruhanga akworekire eki arikwenda kukora." 
Genesis41:26 Ente mushanju enungi niyo myaka mushanju; kandi n'ebishiisha mushanju ebirungi niyo myaka mushanju; haza ekirooto ni kimwe. 
Genesis41:27 Ente mushanju ezihururukire, ezihwaire aha magufa, eziizire zizikuratiire, niyo myaka mushanju, n'ebishiisha mushanju ebitarimu njuma, ebyomiibwe omuyaga gwa burugwa-izooba, nabyo niyo myaka mushanju y'enjara." 
Genesis41:28 Nyakusinga eki naakugambira nikwo kiri. Ruhanga akworekire eki arikwenda kukora. 
Genesis41:29 Nihaija kubaho emyaka mushanju y'omweru mwingi omu nsi ya Misiri yoona. 
Genesis41:30 Kwonka ku erihwaho, haryabaho emyaka mushanju y'enjara, haza egyo myaka yoona omushanju ey'omweru eyebe omu nsi ya Misiri, enjara emareho ensi," 
Genesis41:31 ogwo mweru gube gutakimanywa omu nsi ahabw'egyo njara erikurataho, ahabw'okuba eryaba eri nyingi munonga." 
Genesis41:32 Nyakusinga ekikureeteire kuroota ekyo kirooto kabiri n'ahabw'okuba Ruhanga amaririire ku kibaho, kandi naija kubibaisaho juba." 
Genesis41:33 N'ahabw'ekyo, Nyakusinga, oshemereire kusherura omuntu orikwetegyereza kandi ow'obwengye; omuhe obushoboorozi bw'okutegyeka ensi ya Misiri." 
Genesis41:34 Nyakusinga kandi oteho ab'okureeberera egi nsi, baihe kimwe kya kataano aha bi ensi ya Misiri eyerize omuri egyo myaka mushanju y'omweru." 
Genesis41:35 Barundaane ebyokurya byona eby'omuri egyo myaka mirungi erikwenda kwija, bahunikye ebyokurya by'omujuma omu ndembo; nk'oku iwe Faraaho oraabaragiire kandi babirinde." 
Genesis41:36 Ebyo byokurya bibe eby'okubiikirwa ensi ya Misiri eby'okwerindisa enjara erikwija kugiteera egyo myaka mushanju; ensi erekye kwitwa enjara. 
Genesis41:37 Eki Yosefu yaagambire kikasiimwa Faraaho n'abagaragwa be boona. 
Genesis41:38 Faraaho yaagira abagaragwa be ati: Ebyo tukaabaasa kubona omuntu nk'ogu oine Mutima wa Ruhanga? 
Genesis41:39 Faraaho nikwo kugira Yosefu ati: Nk'oku Ruhanga yaakworeka ebi byona, tihariho orikwetegyereza kandi ow'obwengye nkaiwe." 
Genesis41:40 Mbwenu niiwe waaza kureeberera eka yangye, n'abantu bangye boona batwaze nk'oku oraabaragiire, kureka eki ndaakukizeho obukuru n'ekitebe kyangye ky'obugabe." 
Genesis41:41 Kandi Faraaho agira Yosefu ati: Reeba naakuha ensi ya Misiri yoona ogitegyekye. 
Genesis41:42 Mpaho Faraaho ayejuura aha rukumu empeta ye eriho akamanyiso, agijweka Yosefu omu rukumu; amujweka ebijwaro bya kitaani enungi, amujweka omukuufu gw'ezaabu omu maraka." 
Genesis41:43 Atyo amutembesa ekigaari kye kya kabiri, reero bamuteerera akaari bati: Mumuhigize! Nikwo yaamutegyekyeise atyo ensi ya Misiri yoona." 
Genesis41:44 Faraaho ayongyera agira Yosefu ati: Niinye Faraaho, kwonka tihariho muntu orikora ekintu kyona omuri egi nsi ya Misiri, otamwikiriize." 
Genesis41:45 Mpaho Faraaho ayeta Yosefu eiziina Zaafenatapanea, amuhingira Asenata muhara wa Potifeera omuhongyerezi wa Oni. Yosefu atyo obushoboorozi bwe bubuga omu nsi ya Misiri yoona." 
Genesis41:46 Yosefu obu yaaza omu maisho ga Faraaho omugabe wa Misiri akaba aine emyaka y'obukuru makumi ashatu. Ku yaarugire omu maisho ga Faraaho yaagyenda naaraba omu nsi ya Misiri yoona. 
Genesis41:47 Omu myaka mushanju y'omweru, ensi ekeeza munonga." 
Genesis41:48 Mpaho Yosefu yaarundaana ebyokurya byona omuri egyo myaka mushanju ensi ya Misiri ekyeerize; yaabihunika omu bitara by'omu ndembo. Buri rurembo yaaruhunikamu ebyokurya ebyarugire omu misiri erwehinguririize. 
Genesis41:49 Haza yaahunika ebyokurya bingi munonga ebirikwingana n'omusheenyi gw'aha nyanja, okuhitsya obu yaarekyeire aho kubirenga, ahabw'okuba bikaba bitakibaasa kurengwa." 
Genesis41:50 Emyaka y'enjara obu yaabaire etakahikire, Yosefu akaba yaazaire abatabani babiri abu yaazaire ahari Asenata muhara wa Potifeera omuhongyerezi wa Oni." 
Genesis41:51 Yosefu omutabani owaabandize kuzaarwa yaamweta Manaase, ahabw'okuba akagira ati: Ruhanga yaanyebesa okufa kubi kwangye kwona, n'eka ya tata yoona." 
Genesis41:52 Owa kabiri yaamweta Efuraimu, ati: Ahabw'okuba Ruhanga ankanyisiize omuri egi nsi naabonaboneiremu." 
Genesis41:53 Emyaka mushanju y'omweru ogwabugire omu nsi ya Misiri ku yaahwaireho," 
Genesis41:54 endiijo myaka mushanju y'enjara yaatandika nk'oku Yosefu yaagambire. Ensi zoona zaateerwa enjara, kwonka Misiri yaaguma eine ebyokurya." 
Genesis41:55 Reero ensi ya Misiri ku yaateirwe enjara, abantu baatakira Faraaho kubaha ebyokurya. Nawe yaagira Abanyamisiri, ati: Muze owa Yosefu! Kyona eki araabagambire mukikore." 
Genesis41:56 Mpaho enjara ku yaabugire nsi, Yosefu yaigura ebitara, yaaguza Abanyamisiri ebyokurya, ahabw'okuba enjara ekaba eri nyingi munonga omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Genesis41:57 Haza ensi yoona yaija Misiri ahari Yosefu kugura engano, ahabw'okuba enjara ekaba eri nyingi omu nsi yoona." 
Genesis42:1 Yakobo ku yaahuriire ngu Misiri hariyo ebyokurya by'omujuma, yaagira abatabani ati: Ahabw'enki nimureebana nimutsimbana eriisho?" 
Genesis42:2 Ayongyera abagira ati: Reeba, mpuriire ngu Misiri hariyo ebyokurya by'omujuma, nimwirooko muze kubitugurirayo, tukaagira amagara tureka kufa." 
Genesis42:3 Batyo beene Yakobo ikumi bashuuma, baza Misiri kugura ebyokurya." 
Genesis42:4 Kwonka Yakobo tayohereza Benyamiini murumuna wa Yosefu kugyenda na bakuru be, ahabw'okuba akatiina ngu atakaaguubwaho akabi." 
Genesis42:5 Batyo batabani ba Isiraeli bagyenda n'abandi abagiireyo kushaka, ahabw'okuba ensi ya Kanaani ekaba eteirwe enjara." 
Genesis42:6 Mbwenu obwo Yosefu niwe yaabaire ari omutegyeki mukuru w'egyo nsi orikushakisa abantu baamwo boona. Bakuru ba Yosefu ku baizire, baamuramya bajuumaire ahansi." 
Genesis42:7 Yosefu yaareeba bakuru be abo yaabamanya, kwonka yaabatwaza nk'abu atarikumanyana nabo. Yaabagambisisa ekikabuko, ati: Nimuruga hi? Nabo bati: Nituruga omu nsi ya Kanaani, twizire kushaka." 
Genesis42:8 Yosefu nikwo yaamanyire atyo bakuru be, kwonka bo batamumanye." 
Genesis42:9 Kandi Yosefu ogwo yaijuka ebirooto bi yaabarootsireho. Nikwo kubagira ati: Muri entatsi mwizire kureeba ah'ensi egi etaine maani g'okwejuna. 
Genesis42:10 Baamugira bati: Ngaaha, mukama waitu, kureka itwe abaheereza baawe twizire kushaka." 
Genesis42:11 Twena turi batabani b'omushaija omwe, turi abantu b'amazima, itwe abaheereza baawe tituri ntatsi." 
Genesis42:12 Nawe abagira ati: Ngaaha! Ekibareetsire n'okureeba ah'ensi egi etaine maani. 
Genesis42:13 Bamugarukamu bati: Itwe abaheereza baawe turi eishe-emwe ikumi na babiri, batabani b'omushaija omwe ow'omu nsi ya Kanaani; kureka murumuna waitu omuto niwe atsigaire na tataitwe, kandi ondi takibaho." 
Genesis42:14 Reero Yosefu abagira ati: Manya ekyo nikyo naabagirira nti: Muri entatsi. 
Genesis42:15 Mbwenu ekyo nikyo muraamanyirweho: Buso bwa Faraaho, timurikwija kuruga aha, murumuna waanyu omuto yaaba ataizire." 
Genesis42:16 Nimutume omwe omuriimwe areete murumuna waanyu, obwo imwe muri omu kihome, ebi mwagamba bibone kuhamibwa yaaba muri ab'amazima. Kitari ekyo, buso bwa Faraaho, buzimazima muri entatsi." 
Genesis42:17 Atyo boona abata omu kihome bamaramu ebiro bishatu. 
Genesis42:18 Aha kiro kya kashatu, Yosefu akabagira ati: Mbwenu nimukore eki, nibwo muraakire, ahabw'okuba nyowe nintiina Ruhanga." 
Genesis42:19 Ku muraabe muri ab'amazima, murekye mwene shoimwe omwe atsigare omu kihome, abandi bagyende batware ebyokurya by'okutambira ab'eka yaanyu enjara." 
Genesis42:20 Haza mundeetere murumuna waanyu omuto, ebi mugambire bibone kuba eby'amazima, murekye kufa. Nabo baatwaza batyo." 
Genesis42:21 Bwanyima baagambirana bati: Buzimazima nitusingwa orubanja ahabwa murumuna waitu ou twareebire aine enaku nyingi, obu yaatweshengyereza tukanga kumuhurira. Nikyo ezi naku zaatwitira." 
Genesis42:22 Reubeeni abagira ati: Tindabagizire nti: Mutakora kubi ogwo mwana, haza mukanga kumpurira? Mbwenu reeba eshagama ye yaatutukurira." 
Genesis42:23 Tibaramanyire Yosefu ku abamanyire, ahabw'okuba hakaba hariho omugambiririzi." 
Genesis42:24 Yosefu atyo ahinduka abarugaho arira. Bwanyima agaruka ahi bari agamba nabo. Mpaho abaihamu Simeoni amuboha nibamureeba. 
Genesis42:25 Reero Yosefu aragiira ku baijuza enshaho zaabo ebyokurya by'omujuma n'okugarura empiiha za buri muntu omu nshaho ye kandi n'okubaha entanda y'okuriira omu muhanda. Haza ekyo bakibakorera. 
Genesis42:26 Na banu beekoreza endogoya zaabo ebyokurya, bagyenda." 
Genesis42:27 Mbwenu omwe aharibo, ku yaakomoroire enshaho ye kuha endogoya ye ebyokurya ahi baaraire, yaashanga empiiha ye omu minwa y'enshaho." 
Genesis42:28 Atyo agira beene ishe ati: Empiiha yangye baagingarurira. Reeba ngigi omu minwa y'enshaho! Haza ekyo kibagwisa enshazi. Bahindukirana nibatetema nibagira bati: Mbwenu eki n'enki eki Ruhanga atukozire? 
Genesis42:29 Ku baahikire Yakobo ishebo omu nsi ya Kanaani, baamuteekyerereza byona ebyabaireho nibagira bati:" 
Genesis42:30 Omushaija, mukama w'egyo nsi akatukabukira, yaatweta abaizire kutata ensi." 
Genesis42:31 Kwonka itwe twamugira tuti: Turi abantu b'amazima, tituri ntatsi," 
Genesis42:32 turi eishe-emwe ikumi na babiri, batabani ba tataitwe. Omwe takibaho, kandi murumuna waitu omuto atsigaire na tataitwe omu nsi ya Kanaani." 
Genesis42:33 Mpaho ogwo mushaija mukama w'egyo nsi atugira ati: Eki nikyo ndaamanyireho ku muri ab'amazima; ni muntsigire omwe ahari beene shoimwe; imwe mutware ebyokurya by'omujuma eby'okutambira ab'eka yaanyu enjara. Haza mugyende 
Genesis42:34 mundeetere murumuna waanyu omuto, nibwo ndaamanye ku mutari ntatsi, kureka abantu b'amazima. Naanye nibwo ndaabarekurire mwene shoimwe, mukabona kushuubura omuri egi ensi." 
Genesis42:35 Mbwenu ku baafunkukwire enshaho zaabo, buri omwe yaashanga ekiboho ky'empiiha kiri omu nshaho ye. Haza bo na ishebo ku baareebire ebyo biboho byabo by'empiiha, baatiina munonga." 
Genesis42:36 Yakobo ishebo nikwo kubagira ati: Mbwenuho mwanshara amabeere. Yosefu takibaho, na Simeoni takiriho, kandi hati nimwenda kutwara na Benyamiini; haza ebyo byona niinye bigweraire." 
Genesis42:37 Bwanyima Reubeeni yaagira ishe ati: Ku ndaabe ntamukugaruriire oite batabani bangye bombi. Munkwatse, haza nyowe niinyija kumukugarurira." 
Genesis42:38 Nawe abagarukamu ati: Omwana wangye tarikwija kugyenda naimwe, ahabw'okuba mukuru we akafa, kandi niwe wenka otsigaireho. Manya akabi ku kaakumugwera omu muhanda gu mwaza kuzamu, nk'oku nyine ezi nju mukandeetera obujune bumpuhura nza okuzimu." 
Genesis43:1 Mbwenu enjara ekagumizamu eri nyingi omuri egyo nsi. 
Genesis43:2 Ku baaherizeho ebyokurya bi baihire omuri Misiri, ishebo yaabagira ati: Nimugarukyeyo mutushakire ak'okurya." 
Genesis43:3 Kwonka Yuda yaamugarukamu ati: omushaija akatwehanangiririza kimwe, naagira ati: Timuringaruka mu maisho mwaba mutaine murumuna waanyu." 
Genesis43:4 Ku oraatwohereze na murumuna waitu nitwija kuzayo tukushakire ebyokurya; 
Genesis43:5 kwonka ku oraabe otamwohereize titurikwija kuzayo. Manya ogwo mushaija akatugira ati: Timuringaruka mu maisho mwaba mutaine murumuna waanyu. 
Genesis43:6 Isiraeli abagarukamu ati: Ahabw'enki mwankozire kubi mutyo, mukagambira ogwo mushaija ku mwine murumuna waanyu?" 
Genesis43:7 Baamugarukamu bati: Manya ogwo mushaija akatubuuza naatucondooza kumanya oku turi, n'abaitu oku barikuraara. Yaatugira ati: Shoimwe akibaho? Mwineho murumuna waanyu ondi? Naitwe twamugarukamu nk'oku yaatubuurize. Mbwenu shi tukaba nitumanya ku arikwenda kugira ati: Mureete murumuna waanyu?" 
Genesis43:8 Na Yuda agira Isiraeli ishe ati: Ba niinye waayohereza n'ogu mwana twimukye tugyende, tugumeho turekye kufa, itwe naiwe n'obwana bwaitu." 
Genesis43:9 Mbwenu niinye naayekwatiriza omu mwanya gwe, obe niinye orimubuuza. Ku ndaabe ntamukugaruriire nkamukuhitsya omu maisho, ekihemu niinye kiraagumeho ebiro byona." 
Genesis43:10 Manya kuri tutareeziringire, tukaabaire twagarukireyo kabiri." 
Genesis43:11 Isiraeli ishebo abagarukamu ati: Ku kiraabe kiri kityo, nimugire muti: Mutware omu nshaho zaanyu ebijuma by'ensi egi ebirungi munonga mubitoijere ogwo mushaija, mumutwarire n'omubazi gw'okwekandisa n'obwoki n'emigaju n'entsinda n'ebinyoobwa n'endezi." 
Genesis43:12 Mutware empiiha zirikwingana na ziri kabiri. Mugarureyo n'empiiha zi baataire omu minwa y'enshaho zaanyu; shana bakaaba baakikozire batakimanyire. 
Genesis43:13 Mutware na murumuna waanyu, haza mwimukye mugarukye ow'ogwo mushaija." 
Genesis43:14 Ruhanga omushoboorozi wa byona naakabahe akaso karungi omu maisho g'ogwo mushaija, haza akabagarurira mukuru waanyu ori hamwe na Benyamiini. Ku ndiba naafeereirwe abaana bangye, biri naafeereirwe!" 
Genesis43:15 Batyo abo bashaija baatwara ebiconco, baagyenda n'empiiha zirikwingana na ziri kabiri, hamwe na Benyamiini. Baimuka baashuuma baaza Misiri, baayegaranjura omu maisho ga Yosefu." 
Genesis43:16 Yosefu ku yaareebire Benyamiini ari hamwe nabo, yaagira omubiiki w'eby'omu ka ye, ati: Taasya aba bashaija omu nju, haza obabaagire oboneze, ahabw'okuba niinyija kurya nabo omu ihangwe." 
Genesis43:17 Ogwo mushaija yaakora nk'oku Yosefu yaamuragiira. Yaabataasya omwa Yosefu. 
Genesis43:18 Haza bo baatiina ahabw'okubataasya omwa Yosefu, baagira bati: Eki baatutaahiza omu n'ahabw'empiiha zi baagarwire omu nshaho zaitu bwabiso ngu abone kutunga obwiho bw'okutukwatsizaho, atukwate kitaraariire, atuhindure abahuuku, n'endogoya zaitu azinyagye." 
Genesis43:19 Batyo abo bashaija beegaranjurira omubiiki w'eby'eka ya Yosefu bagambira nawe aha muryango gw'egyo nju," 
Genesis43:20 bamugira bati: Mukama waitu, obu twaija kunu bwabiso kugura ebyokurya," 
Genesis43:21 ku twahikire omu icumbi, twakomoorora enshaho zaitu; twashanga empiiha za buri omwe ziri omu minwa y'enshaho ye zoona zihikire. Mbwenu nzizi, twazigarura." 
Genesis43:22 Kandi twareeta n'ezindi mpiiha kushaka ebyokurya, kwonka titurikumanya owaataire ezo mpiiha omu nshaho zaitu." 
Genesis43:23 Abagira ati: Nimuhuumure kandi mutatiina. Obundi Ruhanga waanyu, kandi Ruhanga wa shoimwe, akaaba niwe yaabateereire ekyo ky'obutungi omu nshaho zaanyu. Nyowe empiiha zaanyu nkazitunga. Atyo ashohoza Simeoni amubareetera." 
Genesis43:24 Mbwenu ogwo mushaija ku yaaherize kubataasya omwa Yosefu, yaabaha amaizi baanaaba ebigyere; yaaha n'endogoya zaabo ebyokurya." 
Genesis43:25 Bwanyima baatebeekanisa ebiconco by'okutoijera Yosefu yaija omu ihangwe, ahabw'okuba bakahurira ku niyo baraariire." 
Genesis43:26 Yosefu ku yaagarukire omuka, beene Yakobo baamureetera omu nju ebiconco bi baabaire baine, baajuumara ahansi baamuramya." 
Genesis43:27 Nawe yaababuuza oku barikuraara, yaabagira ati: Shoimwe omugurusi ou mwagambireho agumire? Beitu akibaho?" 
Genesis43:28 Nabo bati: Omuheereza waawe tataitwe agumire, kandi akibaho. Batyo baatsimba amaju baamuramya." 
Genesis43:29 Ku yaimukize ati amaisho, yaareeba omurumuna Benyamiini mwene nyina; yaababuuza ati: Ogu niwe murumuna waanyu omuto ou mwangambiire? Ruhanga naakakugirire embabazi, mwana wangye." 
Genesis43:30 Yosefu arahuka kubarugaho ahabw'okuba akaba ainiire omurumuna orushusho rwingi. Atyo asherura ah'okuririra; ataaha omu kishengye kye aririrayo. 
Genesis43:31 Ku yaaherize kunaaba ahamaisho, yaashohora. Atyo ayegumya, agira ati: Nimwihure ebyokurya." 
Genesis43:32 Baamugaburirira ahakwe, na bariya ahakwabo, n'Abanyamisiri abaariire nawe ahakwabo; ahabw'okuba kikaba kizira Abanyamisiri kurya n'Abaheburaayo, kiri ekihagaro aha Banyamisiri." 
Genesis43:33 Beene Yakobo baamushutama omu maisho nk'oku barikukuratana omu kuzaarwa, okwiha aha mukuru okuta aha muto; haza baarebana nibatangaara." 
Genesis43:34 Yosefu yaabaha ebibego naabiiha aha meeza ye, kwonka ekibego ekya Benyamiini kyakira ekya buri omwe omuribo emirundi etaano. Batyo baanywa baashemererwa hamwe nawe." 
Genesis44:1 Bwanyima Yosefu akaragiira omubiiki w'eby'eka ye, ati: Ijuza enshaho z'aba bashaija ebyokurya munonga nk'oku barikubaasa kwekorera, kandi ote empiiha ya buri muntu omu minwa y'enshaho ye." 
Genesis44:2 Haza ote ekikopo kyangye eky'efeeza omu minwa y'enshaho ya murumuna waabo omuto, hamwe n'empiiha ye ei areetsire kushakisa. N'onu yaatwaza nk'oku Yosefu yaamuragiira." 
Genesis44:3 Ku bwabaire nibutaagurikana, abo bashaija baabaragiira kugyenda n'endogoya zaabo." 
Genesis44:4 Ku baabaire baagyendaho akaanya kakye baaruga omu rurembo, Yosefu yaagira omubiiki w'eby'eka ye ati: Irooko okurate abo bashaija; haza ku oraabahikye, obagire oti: Ahabw'enki muzimwire ekibi ahabw'ekirungi? Mbwenu ekibaibiise ekikopo kyangye ky'efeeza n'enki?" 
Genesis44:5 Tikyo mukama wangye anyweramu kandi akaragurisa? Mukozire kubi okukora mutyo. 
Genesis44:6 Nawe ku yaabahikire, yaaba nikwo yaabagambira." 
Genesis44:7 Baamugira bati: Ahabw'enki, mukama waitu, nootugambira ebigambo biti? Nikikabure itwe abairu baawe kukora ekintu nk'ekyo!" 
Genesis44:8 Mbwenu empiiha zi twashangire omu minwa y'enshaho zaitu, ka tuzikugaruriire, obu turugire omu nsi ya Kanaani? Haza tuza kwiba efeeza nari ezaabu omu nju ya mukama waawe?" 
Genesis44:9 Omuriitwe abairu baawe, ou oraashangye akiine afe, kandi naitwe tube abahuuku baawe, mukama waitu." 
Genesis44:10 Abagarukamu ati: Mbwenu, ka kibe nk'oku mwagamba! Oraashangwe akiine, niwe araabe omuhuuku wangye, reero imwe abandi nimuba mutaine rubanja." 
Genesis44:11 Batyo buri muntu ahuumuza ahonaaho enshaho ye ahansi, kandi buri omwe akomoorora enshaho ye." 
Genesis44:12 Nawe acaaka naatandikira aha z'abakuru naahererukira aha z'abato; haza ekikopo akishanga omu nshaho eya Benyamiini. 
Genesis44:13 Nabo nikwo kutaagura ebi bajwaire, buri muntu akeekoreza endogoya ye, bakagarukayo omu rurembo." 
Genesis44:14 Yuda na beene ishe ku baahikire owa Yosefu, baashanga akiriyo, baayetuura ahansi omu maisho ge." 
Genesis44:15 Na Yosefu abagira ati: ekyo kikoro ki mukozire n'enki? Timurikumanya ngu omuntu nkaanye buzimazima nimbaasa kuragura? 
Genesis44:16 Yuda amugarukamu ati: Mukama wangye, mbwenu nitukyenda kukugambira ki? Hari ekindi tugambe ki? Nari twetonganire tuta? Ruhanga niwe yaasherembura ekibi ky'abairu baawe! Mbwenu reeba itwe n'ou baashanga aine ekikopo twaba abahuuku baawe." 
Genesis44:17 Yosefu amugarukamu ati: Nikikabure nyowe kukora ntyo! Kureka omuntu ou baashanga aine ekikopo, niwe araabe omuhuuku wangye. Reero imwe abandi mugyende n'obusingye, mugarukye owa shoimwe." 
Genesis44:18 Yuda nikwo kwirira Yosefu haihi, akamugira ati: Mukama wangye, naakweshengyereza ntega okutu nyowe omwiru waawe ngire eki naakugambira. Haza otangirira ekiniga nyowe omwiru waawe. Manya ori nka Faraaho nyakabara." 
Genesis44:19 Mukama wangye, itwe abairu baawe okatubuuza noogira oti: Mwine shoimwe nari murumuna waanyu?" 
Genesis44:20 Mukama wangye, twakugira tuti: Twine tutaitwe, n'omugurusi; kandi twine na murumuna waitu ou yaazaire yaakuzire. Tuti na mukuru we akafa. Tuti kandi omurumuna ogwo niwe atsigaireho wenka omu b'enda ya nyina; haza ishe naamukunda." 
Genesis44:21 Naitwe abairu baawe waatugira oti: Mumundeetere, naanye mmureebe." 
Genesis44:22 Mukama wangye twakugira tuti: Ogwo mwana tarikubaasa kutsigaho ishe, ahabw'okuba ku arikumutsigaho, ishe naafa." 
Genesis44:23 Naitwe abaheereza baawe waatugira oti: Murumuna waanyu omuto ku ariba ataizire naimwe, timuringaruka mu maisho." 
Genesis44:24 Ku twagarukireyo ahari tata omuheereza waawe, twamugambira ebi iwe mukama wangye waatugambiire." 
Genesis44:25 Mbwenu tutaitwe ku yaatugizire ati: Mugarukyeyo mutugurire akokurya; 
Genesis44:26 twamugira tuti: Itwe titurikubaasa kuzayo, murumuna waitu yaaba atagyenzire naitwe, ahabw'okuba ogwo mushaija titurikwija kumugaruka mu maisho, murumuna waitu twaba tutamwine." 
Genesis44:27 Tata omuheereza waawe nawe nikwo kutugira ati: Nimumanya omukazi wangye ku yanzaariire aboojo babiri. 
Genesis44:28 Omwe ku yantsigireho, naagira nti: Buzimazima agaashwirwe, haza okwiha obwo tinkamureebaga." 
Genesis44:29 Mbwenu ku mwakuunyaka n'ogu, akabi kaamugwera, nk'oku nyine ezi nju, mukandeetera obujune, bumpuhura nza okuzimu." 
Genesis44:30 Haza ku naakuhika tata omwiru waawe tutaine ogu mwana, nk'oku amagara ge gakwatiraine n'ag'ogu mwana," 
Genesis44:31 yaareeba tutamwine, naija kufa. Haza itwe abairu baawe niitwe turikuba tureeteire omwiru waawe tataitwe obujune bw'okumuhuhura, akaza okuzimu n'ezo nju ze." 
Genesis44:32 Manya nyowe omuheereza waawe, niinye naabaire omukwato gw'ogu mwana ahari tata. Nkamugira nti: Taata, ku ndaabe ntamukugaruriire, ekihemu kibe niinye kyagumaho amagara gangye goona." 
Genesis44:33 Mbwenu, mukama wangye, naakweshengyereza nyowe omuheereza waawe, ba niinye waatsigaza omu mwanya gw'ogu mwana, mbe omuhuuku waawe, naiwe obe mukama wangye; haza we omurekye agarukyeyo na bakuru be." 
Genesis44:34 Mbwenu shi nimbaasa nta kugaruka ahari tata, ntaine gu mwana? Manya tindikubaasa kwemera okureeba tata naaguubwaho akabi." 
Genesis45:1 Bwanyima Yosefu ku yaaremirwe kwegumya omu maisho g'abaabaire bamushagatiire, yaagamba n'eiraka rihango ati: Abantu boona abari aha bampigize! Tihaagira muntu weena owaatsigaraho Yosefu naayegambira beene ishe." 
Genesis45:2 Atyo arira naaborooga; Abanyamisiri n'ab'eka ya Faraaho bamuhurira. 
Genesis45:3 Yosefu agira beene ishe, ati: Niinye Yosefu! Ebyo tata akibaho? Kwonka beene ishe babura eki baamugarukamu, ahabw'okuba obwoba bukabaitira omu maisho ge." 
Genesis45:4 Yosefu nikwo kugira beene ishe ati: Nyaabura 'mwe, naabeeshengyereza nimumpikye. Nabo baamwirira haihi. Reero abagira ati: Niinye Yosefu mwene shoimwe, ou mwagurize kutwarwa Misiri." 
Genesis45:5 Mbwenu murekye kugira obujune nari kwefuuza, ngu ahabw'okuba mukanguza naija kunu. Manya Ruhanga niwe yaanyohereize kubabandizayo, ngu mukize amagara." 
Genesis45:6 Mbwenu enjara emazire omuri egi nsi emyaka ebiri, kandi hakiriyo endiijo myaka etaano ei abantu batarihingiramu, nobu kwakuba okugyesha." 
Genesis45:7 Nikyo Ruhanga yaanyoherereize kubabandiza kunu kubakwatira eihembe omu nsi, ngu omuriimwe hagire abaahonokaho." 
Genesis45:8 N'ahabw'ekyo owaanyohereize kunu tiimwe, kureka ni Ruhanga. Niwe yampindwire enganzi ya Faraaho, kuba mukama w'eka ye, kandi omutegyeki w'ensi ya Misiri yoona." 
Genesis45:9 Mbwenu murahukye, mugyende muhikye tata. Haza mumugire muti: Mutabani waawe Yosefu akutumireho ati: Ruhanga akampindura omutegyeki wa Misiri. Shuuma onshangye kunu, haza oteeziringa." 
Genesis45:10 Noija kutuura omu kyanga kya Gosheni, ombe haihi, iwe n'abaana baawe na baijukuru baawe n'amasyo gaawe g'entaama n'ag'ente n'ebi otungire byona." 
Genesis45:11 Reero okwo niyo ndaakuheere eby'okukutunga, ngu iwe n'ab'eka yaawe na boona abu oine mutakaitwa obworo, ahabw'okuba hakiriyo endiijo myaka etaano y'enjara." 
Genesis45:12 Kandi mbwenu reeba, imwe na murumuna wangye Benyamiini nimwereebera ku ebyo naabibagambisisa akanwa." 
Genesis45:13 Mugambire tata eby'ekitiinwa kyangye kyona eki nyine omuri Misiri, na byona ebi mureebire. Nimurahukye mureete tata kunu." 
Genesis45:14 Mpaho Yosefu yaagwa Benyamiini omu kifuba, yaarira; amarira nigaitururukira aha ibega rya Yosefu." 
Genesis45:15 Bwanyima yaanywegyera beene ishe boona naarira. Ebyo ku byahwaire beene ishe baagaaniira nawe. 
Genesis45:16 Enkuru ku yaahikire owa Faraaho, ngu beene ishe Yosefu baizire, kyagwisa gye munonga Faraaho n'abaheereza be." 
Genesis45:17 Faraaho yaagira Yosefu, ati: Gambira beene sho oti: Nimugire muti: mwekoreze enyamaishwa zaanyu, mugarukye omu nsi ya Kanaani." 
Genesis45:18 Haza mureete shoimwe n'ab'omu ka yaanyu, mwije kunu ahi ndi. Naanye niinyinja kubaha ekyanga ekirungi munonga omuri Misiri, murye aha bishaju by'egi nsi;" 
Genesis45:19 kandi obaragiire oti: Nimugire muti: mutware ebigaari by'omuri Misiri, kubireeteramu abaana baanyu abato, n'abakazi baanyu, haza mureete shoimwe, mwije." 
Genesis45:20 Kandi oti: Murekye kusaasibwa okutsigaho ebyanyu, ahabw'okuba ebirungi byona eby'omu nsi ya Misiri, n'ebyanyu." 
Genesis45:21 Beene Isiraeli nabo nikwo baatwarize. Yosefu yaabaha ebigaari, nk'oku Faraaho yaaragiire; yaabaha n'entanda z'okuriira omu muhanda." 
Genesis45:22 Boona oku baingana, buri omwe yaamuha ekijwaro ky'okujwara aha bugyenyi; kwonka Benyamiini we yaamuha ebijwaro bitaano n'ebicweka by'efeeza magana ashatu." 
Genesis45:23 Reero yaatwekyera ishe endogoya ikumi, zeekoreire ebintu birungi bya Misiri, n'ezindi ndogoya ebuguma zeekoreire ebyokurya by'omujuma n'emigaati, n'entanda ya ishe ey'okuriira omu muhanda." 
Genesis45:24 Bwanyima yaayohereza beene ishe abo, kandi ku baabaire nibaimutsya, yaabeehanangiriza ati: Mutatonganira omu muhanda." 
Genesis45:25 Batyo bainamuka baaruga Misiri, baahika omu nsi ya Kanaani, ahari Yakobo ishebo." 
Genesis45:26 Baamugira bati: Yosefu akibaho, kandi niwe mutegyeki w'ensi yoona eya Misiri. Atyo Yakobo omutima gumugwa omu kahuriko; ahabw'okuba taraikiriize ebi baamugambiire." 
Genesis45:27 Kwonka ku baamuteekyerereize byona ebi Yosefu yaabagambiire, kandi yaareeba ebigaari bi Yosefu amutwekyeire kumwakiira, ishebo Yakobo omutima gwamugaruka omunda." 
Genesis45:28 Isiraeli nikwo kugira ati: Ekyo nikimara; Yosefu omwana wangye obu akiriho, ka ngyende mmureebe ntakafiire." 
Genesis46:1 Mpaho Isiraeli yaimutsya orugyendo n'esika ye yoona, yaahika Beerisheba, yaatambirirayo Ruhanga wa Isaaka ishe ebitambo." 
Genesis46:2 Reero Ruhanga yaayeterayo Isiraeli omu kworekwa kwa nyekiro ati: Yakobo, Yakobo! Onu amwetaba ati: Ndi aha, Mukama wangye!" 
Genesis46:3 Onu amugira ati: Niinye Ruhanga, Ruhanga wa sho. Otatiina kushuuma Misiri, ahabw'okuba ndyakuhindurirayo eihanga rihango." 
Genesis46:4 Niinyija kuza naiwe Misiri, kandi ndyagaruka nkwiheyo; haza Yosefu niwe arikukwata ahamaisho nookaba." 
Genesis46:5 Yakobo atyo aimutsya aruga Beerisheba. Na beene Isiraeli batwara ishebo ogwo Yakobo n'abaana baabo abato n'abakazi baabo omu bigaari ebi Faraaho yaayohereize kumureetamu. 
Genesis46:6 Kandi batwara n'amasyo gaabo n'ebintu byabo ebi baatungiire omu nsi ya Kanaani; baza Misiri: Yakobo hamwe n'oruzaaro rwe rwona," 
Genesis46:7 abatabani na beene batabani be, bahara be na bahara ba batabani be; oruzaaro rwe rwona aija narwo Misiri." 
Genesis46:8 Mbwenu aga nigo maziina g'oruzaaro rw'abaana ba Isiraeli Yakobo n'abatabani abaizire Misiri. Reubeeni omujigaijo gwa Yakobo," 
Genesis46:9 na beene Reubeeni aba: Hanoki, Paalu, Hezironi na Karumi." 
Genesis46:10 Beene Simeoni ni Yemueli, Yamini, Ohadi, Yakini, Zohari na Shauli omutabani w'omunyakanaanikazi." 
Genesis46:11 Beene Leevi ni Gereshooni, Kohati na Meraari." 
Genesis46:12 Beene Yuda ni Eeri, Onani, Sheela, Pereezi na Zeera; kwonka Eeri na Onani bakagwa omu nsi ya Kanaani. Reero beene Pereezi ni Hezirooni na Hamuli." 
Genesis46:13 Beene Isakaari ni Toola, Puuva, Yobu na Shimirooni." 
Genesis46:14 Beene Zebuluuni ni Seredi, Eloni na Yahaleeli." 
Genesis46:15 Abo nibo batabani ba Leeya abu yaazairweho Yakobo omuri Padanarama hamwe na muhara we Dina. Boona hamwe abaana be aboojo n'abaishiki bakaba bari makumi ashatu na bashatu. 
Genesis46:16 Beene Gaadi ni Zifioni, Haagi, Shuuni, Ezibooni, Eeri, Aroodi na Areeli." 
Genesis46:17 Beene Asheri ni Imuna, Ishuva, Ishivi, Beriya hamwe na Seera munyaanyabo. Kandi beene Beriya ni Heberi na Malikieli." 
Genesis46:18 Abo ni batabani ba Zilipa ou Labaani yaashagariire Leeya muhara we, kandi nibo yaazairweho Yakobo; abantu ikumi na mukaaga." 
Genesis46:19 Reero batabani ba Rakeeli muka Yakobo, ni Yosefu na Benyamiini." 
Genesis46:20 Yosefu omu nsi ya Misiri akazaarirayo Manaase na Efuraimu, abu yaazaire ahari Asenata muhara wa Potifeera omuhongyerezi wa Oni." 
Genesis46:21 Kandi beene Benyamiini ni Beela, Beekeri, Ashibeeli, Geera, Naamani, Ehi, Roshi, Mupimu, Hupumu na Aridi." 
Genesis46:22 Abo nibo batabani ba Rakeeli abu yaazairweho Yakobo, boona hamwe abantu ikumi na bana." 
Genesis46:23 Mwene Daani ni Hushimu. 
Genesis46:24 Beene Nafutaali ni Yahazeeli, Guuni, Yezeri na Shileemu." 
Genesis46:25 Abo ni batabani ba Biliha ou Labaani yaashagariire Rakeeli muhara we, akabazaarwaho Yakobo boona abantu mushanju." 
Genesis46:26 Abantu boona ab'enda ya Yakobo abaizire omuri Misiri abu yaayezaariire, otabariiremu bakaamwana, boona hamwe bakaba bari abantu makumi mukaaga na mukaaga." 
Genesis46:27 Kandi batabani ba Yosefu abu yaazaariire Misiri, bakaba bari babiri. Batyo abantu boona ab'eka ya Yakobo abaizire Misiri bakaba bari makumi mushanju." 
Genesis46:28 Yakobo akatuma Yuda ahari Yosefu, ngu amushangye Gosheni. Reero ku baahikire omu kyanga kya Gosheni," 
Genesis46:29 Yosefu yaatebeekanisa ekigaari yaaza kubugana Isiraeli ishe omuri Gosheni. Atyo amwetondera, amugwa omu kifuba amara akaanya naamuririramu." 
Genesis46:30 Isiraeli agira Yosefu, ati: Nobu naakufa hati, niho naakureeba nkamanya ku obaho." 
Genesis46:31 Yosefu nawe agira beene ishe n'ab'eka ya ishe ati: Naaza kugyenda ngambire Faraaho, mmugire nti: Beene tata n'ab'eka ye ababaire batwire omu nsi ya Kanaani naatsiga baija;" 
Genesis46:32 kandi abo bantu n'abariisa, ahabw'okuba batuura nibariisa amasyo. Na mbwenu bareetsire amasyo gaabo g'entaama n'ag'ente n'ebindi byona ebi batungire." 
Genesis46:33 Faraaho ku araabeete yaababuuza ati: Mukora murimo ki? 
Genesis46:34 Naimwe mumugire muti: Itwe abairu baawe turi abariisa b'amasyo, okwiha omu buto n'okuhitsya hati itwe na baatatenkuriitwe mubone kutuura omu kyanga kya Gosheni, ahabw'okuba omuriisa weena aba ekihagaro aha Banyamisiri." 
Genesis47:1 Yosefu akaza owa Faraaho, yaamugira ati: Tata na beene tata n'amasyo gaabo g'entaama n'ag'ente n'ebi batungire byona, baizire nibaruga omu nsi ya Kanaani. Mbwenu bari omu kyanga kya Gosheni." 
Genesis47:2 Kandi omuri beene ishe, akaihamu abashaija bataano, yaabooreka Faraaho." 
Genesis47:3 Faraaho nawe abuuza bakuru ba Yosefu, ati: Mukora murimo ki? Nabo bamugarukamu bati: Itwe abairu baawe turi abariisa nka baatatenkuriitwe." 
Genesis47:4 Bongyera bamugira bati: Mbwenu twizire kushuuhuukira omuri egi nsi, ahabw'okuba itwe abairu baawe titwine h'okuriisiza amasyo gaitu, ahabw'enjara kuba nyingi omu nsi ya Kanaani. Mbwenu nitukweshengyereza otwikirize itwe abairu baawe tutuure omu kyanga kya Gosheni." 
Genesis47:5 Mpaho Faraaho agira Yosefu ati: Shoimwe na beene sho niiwe baizireho. 
Genesis47:6 Ensi ya Misiri ngigi ekuri omu maisho. Ha sho na beene sho ah'okutuura, aharungi munonga omuri egi nsi. Barekye batuure omu kyanga kya Gosheni. Kandi omuribo ku oraabe noomanyamu abashaija abarikubaasa, obahe omurimo gw'okureeberera amasyo gangye." 
Genesis47:7 Bwanyima Yosefu yaareeta Yakobo ishe, yaamworeka Faraaho; na Yakobo yaashabira Faraaho omugisha." 
Genesis47:8 Faraaho agira Yakobo ati: Oine emyaka engahi y'obukuru? 
Genesis47:9 Onu amugarukamu ati: Emyaka ei mmazire omu nsi omu bushuuhuuki ni igana na makumi ashatu; haza embeereire mikye kandi mibi. Terikwingana n'ei baatatenkuru baamazire nibashuuhuuka. 
Genesis47:10 Yakobo atyo ashabira Faraaho omugisha; handi hakye ashohora, aruga ahi Faraaho yaabaire ari." 
Genesis47:11 Ebyo ku byahwaire Yosefu yaashoboorora ishe na beene ishe yaabaha ah'okutuura omu nsi ya Misiri omu kyanga ekirungi munonga ekya Raamuseesi nk'oku Faraaho yaaragiire. 
Genesis47:12 Kandi Yosefu yaatungira ishe na beene ishe n'ab'eka ya ishe ebyokurya nk'oku emiryango yaabo yaabaire eri. 
Genesis47:13 Mbwenu ahabw'ensi yoona kutabamu byokurya, enjara ekaba nyingi munonga; ekyo kyareetera ab'omu nsi ya Misiri n'eya Kanaani kukuuhuzibwa enjara." 
Genesis47:14 Yosefu reero yaarundaana empiiha ezi yaashanguriize omu nsi ya Misiri n'eya Kanaani, ezaarugire omu byokurya by'omujuma ebi abantu baaguzire. Haza ezo mpiiha Yosefu yaazitwara omu nju ya Faraaho." 
Genesis47:15 Empiiha ku zaahwereire kimwe omu nsi ya Misiri n'eya Kanaani, Abanyamisiri boona baayetuurira Yosefu, baamugira bati: Tuhe ebyokurya. Mbwenu ebyo tufe nootureeba? Manya empiiha zituhwaireho!" 
Genesis47:16 Yosefu nawe abagarukamu ati: Empiiha ku ziraabe zibahwaireho, nimuheyo amatungo gaanyu, naanye mbahe ebyokurya omu mwanya gwago." 
Genesis47:17 Batyo baareetera Yosefu amatungo gaabo, nawe yaabaha ebyokurya, ebi bahingire nawe embaraasi, amasyo g'entaama n'ag'ente n'endogoya. Atyo abaha ebyokurya ebi baashakiise amatungo gaabo goona omuri ogwo mwaka." 
Genesis47:18 Omwaka ogwo ku gwahwaire, baagaruka baamwetuurira omu gundi ogwakuratsireho; baamugira bati: Mukama waitu, mbwenu nk'oku orikutureeba, mukama waitu, titwine ki tutsigaize, kureka emibiri yaitu n'ebibanja byaitu." 
Genesis47:19 Ebyo itwe hamwe n'ebibanja byaitu tufe nootureeba? Tugure n'ebibanja byaitu, haza otuhe ebyokurya; reero itwe n'ebibanja byaitu tube abahuuku ba Faraaho. Kandi otuhe embibo, tubone kugumaho tutafa, n'egi nsi erekye kuhinduka amatongo." 
Genesis47:20 Atyo Yosefu agurira Faraaho ensi ya Misiri yoona; ahabw'okuba Abanyamisiri boona ku baateirwe enjara nyingi, baatunda ebibanja byabo. Egyo nsi yaaba eya Faraaho," 
Genesis47:21 kandi n'abantu baamwo yaabahindura abahuuku, okwiha aha muheru gw'ensi ya Misiri okuta aha gundi." 
Genesis47:22 Kureka ekyanga ky'abahongyerezi nikyo ataraguzire, ahabw'okuba bo Faraaho akaba abateeraireho egabo yaabo ehamire, batungirwe egyo gabo ei abahaire; nikyo bataratundiire bibanja byabo." 
Genesis47:23 Bwanyima Yosefu yaagira abo bantu, ati: Reeba eri izooba, imwe n'ebibanja byanyu baabagurira Faraaho. Mbwenu naabaha embibo ngigi, mugyende mugibibe omu misiri." 
Genesis47:24 Reero omu igyesha muhe Faraaho kimwe kya kataano ky'ebi mushaarwire. Kandi ebicweka bina bya kataano bibe ebyanyu by'embibo, ebindi bibe ebyokurya byanyu n'ab'omu maka gaanyu n'abaana baanyu abato." 
Genesis47:25 Nabo bamugarukamu bati: Ebishi waatutambira titwafa! Mbwenu mukama waitu, turekye tugume turi abahuuku ba Faraaho." 
Genesis47:26 Yosefu atyo ataho ekiragiro ky'ebibanja bya Misiri, n'eri izooba kikiriho, ekirikugira kiti: Faraaho aryaguma atungye kimwe kya kataano; kureka ebibanja by'abahongyerezi nibyo bitarabaire bya Faraaho." 
Genesis47:27 Abaisiraeli bakatuura omu nsi ya Misiri, omu kyanga Gosheni; baatungirayo, baazaara kandi baakanya munonga." 
Genesis47:28 Yakobo yaatuura Misiri yaamarayo emyaka ikumi na mushanju. Yakobo atyo yaahitsya emyaka igana na makumi ana na mushanju y'obukuru. 
Genesis47:29 Obunaku bwa Isiraeli bw'okufa ku bwabaire buri haihi kuhika, yaayeta omutabani Yosefu, yaamugira ati: Ku oraabe nonkunda, ta omukono gwawe ahansi y'ekibero kyangye, haza ondaganise okutandeebya, kureka okunkorera eky'amazima. Otarinziika Misiri," 
Genesis47:30 kureka okundeka nkashanga baatatenkuru. Oryantwara, onyihe omuri Misiri, onziikye ahi baabaziikire. Yosefu amugarukamu ati: Ndyatwaza nk'oku waagamba." 
Genesis47:31 Onu amugira ati: Mbwenu nu ndahira. N'onu amurahira. Bwanyima Isiraeli ainama aha mutwe gw'ekitanda kye. 
Genesis48:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, baagambira Yosefu bati: Reeba, sho arwaire. Atyo nawe atwara abatabani bombi, Manaase na Efuraimu;" 
Genesis48:2 bagambira Yakobo bati: Mutabani waawe Yosefu yaija kukureeba. Isiraeli ayehangaana ashutama aha kitabo. 
Genesis48:3 Mpaho Yakobo agira Yosefu ati: Ruhanga omushoboorozi wa byona, akambonekyera ndi Luuzi omu nsi ya Kanaani, yampa omugisha." 
Genesis48:4 Kandi yangira ati: Reeba ndyakuzaarukanisa nkukanyise, nkuhindure ekimbuuro kihango ky'amahanga; n'ensi egi ngihe baijukuru baawe ebe eyaabo ebiro n'ebiro." 
Genesis48:5 Mbwenu batabani baawe bombi abu waazaariire omuri egi nsi ya Misiri ntakakushangiremu, n'abangye. Efuraimu na Manaase baryaguma bari abangye, nk'oku Reubeeni na Simeoni bari." 
Genesis48:6 Reero abandi baana bu orizaara nibakurata aba, nibo bariba abaawe, beetererwe bakuru baabo babagane aha byabo." 
Genesis48:7 Manya obu naabaire ninduga Paadanarama eky'obusaasi Rakeeli akagwa omu nsi ya Kanaani tukiri omu rugyendo; hakitsigaireyo akanya kuhika Efuraata, naaba niyo naamuziika aha muhanda gurikuza Efuraata, niyo Beetelehemu." 
Genesis48:8 Reero Isiraeli ku yaareebire batabani ba Yosefu, yaabuuza ati: Beitu aba ni baahi?" 
Genesis48:9 Yosefu agarukamu ishe ati: Ni batabani bangye abu Ruhanga yampeeraire kunu. N'onu ati: Nyabura 'we bampitsye mbashabire omugisha. 
Genesis48:10 Obwo Isiraeli ahabwa bukuru amaisho ge gakaba gaarindagiire atakihweza. Atyo Yosefu abamuhitsya haihi, n'onu abanywegyera, kandi ababumbatira." 
Genesis48:11 Isiraeli agira Yosefu ati: Nkaba ntarikuteekateeka ngu turyareebana, mbwenu reeba Ruhanga yandeebesa n'abaana baawe." 
Genesis48:12 Bwanyima Yosefu yaabamwiha aha maju, yaajumara aha nsi." 
Genesis48:13 Yosefu akwata abo baana bombi: Efuraimu n'omukono gwe gwa buryo, amugyemire omukono gwa Isiraeli ogwa bumosho; na Manaase n'omukono gwe gwa bumosho amugyemire omukono gwa Isiraeli ogwa buryo; bombi atyo abamuhitsya." 
Genesis48:14 Isiraeli ananuura omukono gwe gwa buryo, ata engaro ya buryo aha mutwe gwa Efuraimu omuto, n'engaro ye ya bumosho agita aha mutwe gwa Manaase; obwo arabaniisemu emikono ye, ahabw'okuba Manaase niwe yaabaire ari omujigaijo." 
Genesis48:15 Mpaho Yakobo ashabira Yosefu omugisha, naagira ati: Ruhanga ou tatenkuru Aburahamu na tata Isaaka baagyenzire gye nawe, Ruhanga onyebembeire amagara gangye goona n'okuhitsya eri izooba;" 
Genesis48:16 na maraika owaanyihire omu kabi koona, ahe abaana bangye omugisha. Bagume nibaanyetererwa nibeetererwa n'abazaire bangye. Aburahamu na Isaaka; kandi barugwemu enyanja y'abantu omu nsi." 
Genesis48:17 Yosefu ku yaareebire ishe yaata omukono gwe gwa buryo aha mutwe gwa Efuraimu, kyamugwisa kubi. Yaakwata omukono gwa ishe kugwiha aha mutwe gwa Efuraimu kuguta aha gwa Manaase;" 
Genesis48:18 haza yaagira ishe ati: Taata, tikwo kiri. Manya ogu niwe mujigaijo. Ba niwe waata omukono gwawe gwa buryo aha mutwe gwe." 
Genesis48:19 Kwonka ishe ayanga, agira ati: Ninkimanya, mwana wangye, ninkimanya. Nawe aryarugwamu eihanga kandi aryaba mukuru, kwonka omurumuna aryaba mukuru okumukira, na baijukuru be baryarugwamu ekimbuuro kihango ky'amahanga." 
Genesis48:20 Atyo eryo izooba abashabira omugisha, naagira ati: Abaisiraeli baryaguma babagambe nibashabirana emigisha, bati: Ruhanga akugire nka Efuraimu kandi nka Manaase. Atyo yaatunguura Efuraimu, yaamukiza Manaase." 
Genesis48:21 Bwanyima Isiraeli yaagira Yosefu nti: Reeba ndi haihi kufa, kwonka Ruhanga aryaguma naiwe; arugyeho akugarure omu nsi ya baashwenkuru." 
Genesis48:22 Ekindi naakuha omugabo gurikweshumba ogwa bakuru baawe: nirwo rukiizi rw'enshozi oru naanyagire Abaamori na rurara yangye n'obuta bwangye. 
Genesis49:1 Bwanyima Yakobo akeeta abatabani, yaabagira ati: Nimweteerane, mbagambire ebiribabaho omu biro ebiriija." 
Genesis49:2 Imwe beene Yakobo nimweteerane muhurire; kandi mutegye Isiraeli shoimwe okutu. 
Genesis49:3 Reubeeni niiwe mujigaijo gwangye, amaani gangye kandi ou naabandize kuzaara ndi omutsigazi; ow'amaryo rurangaanwa kandi ow'amaani rugambwa." 
Genesis49:4 Nk'oku ori nk'omutunga gurikuhimintikisa amaani, nikyo otaritungira bukuru; ahabw'okuba okatemba ekitabo kya sho, waakihagaza waaza ahi mbyama." 
Genesis49:5 Simeoni na Leevi n'enyina-emwe; zaarurara zaabo ziba eby'okurwanisa by'okukoresa eby'obwinazi. 
Genesis49:6 Nyowe tindiza mu naama zaabo, kandi tindikwatanisa na kiriibe kyabo. Ahabw'okuba ekiniga kikabaitisa abantu, kandi ahabw'okwenda kwemara ak'aha mutima, baatema ente ebiteega." 
Genesis49:7 Ekiniga kyabo nikikakyeenwe, ahabw'okuba ni kingi; na kashanga yaabo neekainare, ahabw'okuba tegira saasi! Ndyababaganisiza omuri Yakobo, mbataataanisize omuri Isiraeli." 
Genesis49:8 Iwe Yuda, beene sho baryakuhimbisa; omukono gwawe guryakwata abazigu baawe aha bitsya; beene sho bakuramye." 
Genesis49:9 Yuda ori ekitsigazi ky'entare; Mwana wangye ogarukire nooruga aha ki waita. Oinamire waabandama nk'entare enshaija nari enkazi; Mbwenu n'oha owaakwehanga kukusiimura? 
Genesis49:10 Enkoni y'obugabe teriruga hari Yuda, nobu yaakuba ey'obutegyeki kuruga aha baijukuru, okuhitsya obu mukama waayo ariija, amahanga goona gakamworobera." 
Genesis49:11 Aryatsibika endogoya ye aha muzaabibu, n'omwana gwayo agutsibikye aha muzaabibu omurungi, Ayogyese omunagiro gwe viino, n'ekanzu ye agyogyese eshande y'ebijuma by'emizaabibu." 
Genesis49:12 Amaisho ge garyatukura okukira viino, n'amaino ge geere okukira amate." 
Genesis49:13 Zebuluuni aryatuura aha rubaju rw'enyanja, abe enyambukiro ei emeeri zirikwegamamu, kandi omwatano gwe guryagarukira ahari Sidoni." 
Genesis49:14 Isakaari n'endogoya y'amaani ebyama ahagati y'amatsibikiro g'entaama. 
Genesis49:15 Ku yaareebire omwanya gw'okuhuumuriramu guri murungi, n'egyo nsi neeshemeza, yainika eibega rye kwekorera; atyo yaahinduka omuhuuku w'okugyemwa emirimo." 
Genesis49:16 Daani aryaramura ab'eihanga rye, ari ow'omu b'enganda za Isiraeli." 
Genesis49:17 Daani aryaba enjoka y'omu muhanda, encwera y'aha rubaju rw'akahanda, eruma obukangaasi bw'embaraasi ogitembire akagwa agarami." 
Genesis49:18 Ai Nyakubaho, niiwe ntegyereize ku onjuna." 
Genesis49:19 Gaadi ababisha baryamuteera, kwonka aryababinga abahambize." 
Genesis49:20 Asheri ebyokurya bye biryabamu ekirikuriisa, atungire omugabe ebyokurya binuzire." 
Genesis49:21 Nafutaali n'ebuguma y'ensa etsibwire; ejumeeza ebigambo birungi. 
Genesis49:22 Yosefu n'eitaagi ririkwana munonga eryanira aha rubaju rw'omugyera; amataagi gaaryo gakataaguza, gakarengyera aha kisiika." 
Genesis49:23 Abarasi bakamutaahirira bataine saasi, baamurasha kandi baamubonabonesa munonga." 
Genesis49:24 Kwonka obuta bwe bwaguma bureegire, emikono ye yaahangaanwa Ow'obushoboorozi bwona Ruhanga owa Yakobo, Omuriisa kandi omurinzi wa Isiraeli." 
Genesis49:25 Mbwenu iwe Yosefu, Ruhanga wa shoimwe orikuhwera, Ruhanga omushoboorozi wa byona, akuhe emigisha y'enjura y'omu iguru, n'emigisha y'amaizi g'okuzimu, n'emigisha eheebwa abarikwontsya n'abaine enda," 
Genesis49:26 emigisha ei shoimwe arikukutengyera n'ey'amaani okukira enshozi ezitahiguka, kandi neekira ebirungi by'omu bibungo ebitarugaho. Egyo migisha yoona neekaitururukire aha mutwe gwawe, Yosefu, ekashononokyera aha bitsigye byawe, iwe owaacwirwe beene sho." 
Genesis49:27 Benyamiini n'omushega gurikusikankura, ogushonshomera omu kasheeshe eki gwaita, omu mwabazyo gukeeshahurira omunyago." 
Genesis49:28 Abo boona nibo nganda ikumi na ibiri eza Isiraeli; kandi ebyo nibyo ishebo yaabagambiire naabashabira emigisha; buri omwe naamwendeza omugisha gumushemereire. 
Genesis49:29 Bwanyima Yakobo akabeehanangiriza naabagira ati: Ndi haihi kukurata abaitu. Haza muryanziika hamwe na baatatenkuru omu nyanga y'omu kibanja kya Efurooni Omuhiiti. 
Genesis49:30 Egyo nyanga eri omu kibanja ekiri Makipeela, aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba obwa Mamure omu nsi ya Kanaani. Enyanga egyo niyo Aburahamu yaaguzire hamwe n'ekibanja ahari Efurooni Omuhiiti kuba obutaka bw'okuziikamu." 
Genesis49:31 Okwo niyo baaziikire Aburahamu na Saara omukazi we. Niyo baaziikire Isaaka na Rebeka omukazi we; kandi naanye niyo naaziikire Leeya. 
Genesis49:32 Ekyo kibanja n'egyo nyanga ekirimu bikagurwa aha Bahiiti. 
Genesis49:33 Yakobo ku yaaherize kwehanangiriza atyo abatabani, yaagarura amaguru ge omu kitabo, gwahwamu, yaashanga abaabo." 
Genesis50:1 Yosefu atyo ainamira ishe, amuririra kandi amunywegyera." 
Genesis50:2 Bwanyima Yosefu aragiira abaheereza be abafumu kwomya omutumbi gwa ishe. Abo bafumu boomya omutumbi gwa Isiraeli. 
Genesis50:3 Bamara ebiro makumi ana nibagwomya, ahabw'okuba kikaba nikyetengyesa ebintu bingi kugwomya. Haza Abanyamisiri baamara ebiro makumi mushanju nibamucurira." 
Genesis50:4 Ebiro by'okumucurira ku byahwaire, Yosefu yaagambira ab'eka ya Faraaho ati: Ku muraabe muunyiniire esaasi, naabeeshengyereza, mungambirire Faraaho muti: Yaakutumaho ati:" 
Genesis50:5 Tata akandahiza naagira ati: Ndi haihi kufa; mbwenu oryanziika omu kituuro ki naayeshorogotororoire omu nsi ya Kanaani. N'ahabw'ekyo hati ninkweshengyereza onyikirize nzeyo nziikye tata, bwanyima ngarukye." 
Genesis50:6 Faraaho amugarukamu ati: Irooko, oziikye shoimwe nk'oku yaakurahiize." 
Genesis50:7 Yosefu atyo aza kuziika ishe. Agyenda n'abaheereza ba Faraaho boona b'abantu bakuru b'omu ka ye n'abakuru boona ab'omu nsi ya Misiri," 
Genesis50:8 otaireho n'abe'ka ya Yosefu boona na beene ishe n'ab'eka ya ishe; kureka abaana baabo n'amasyo gaabo g'entaama n'ag'ente nibyo byatsigaire omu nsi ya Misiri. 
Genesis50:9 Kandi okwo akazayo aine ab'ebigaari n'ab'aha mbaraasi, boona hamwe bari ekimbuuro kihango munonga." 
Genesis50:10 Ku baahikire aha ihuuriro rya Atadi, eriri seeri ya Yorudaani, baacurirayo nibaborooga, baine obujune bwingi munonga. Atyo Yosefu amara ebiro mushanju naacurira ishe." 
Genesis50:11 Abanyakanaani abazaarwa b'egyo nsi ku baabareebire nibacurira omuri eryo ihuuriro rya Atadi, baagira bati: Buzimazima oku n'okucura kw'Abanyamisiri okutarimu kwegiza! Ogwo mwanya nikyo baagweteire Abeli-Mizraimu; guri seeri ya Yorudaani." 
Genesis50:12 Batabani ba Yakobo batyo baamukorera nk'oku yaabaragiire; 
Genesis50:13 baamuheeka, baamutwara omu nsi ya Kanaani, baamuziika omu nyanga y'omu kibanja kya Makipeela. Egyo nyanga niyo Aburahamu yaabaire aguzire hamwe n'ekyo kibanja ahari Efurooni Omuhiiti, orubaju rwa burugwa-izooba bwa Mamure, kwetungira omwanya gw'okuziikamu abe." 
Genesis50:14 Yosefu ku yaaherize kuziika ishe, yaagarukayo Misiri na beene ishe n'abandi boona abaabaire bagyenzire nawe kuziika ishe." 
Genesis50:15 Mbwenu bakuru ba Yosefu ku baareebire ishebo yaafa, baagira bati: Shana Yosefu ngugu akaatwanga, atuhoora naatutura eki twamukozire." 
Genesis50:16 Batyo baatuma ahari Yosefu nibamugira bati: Sho atakakabire, akatsiga yaaturagiira ati:" 
Genesis50:17 Mugambire Yosefu muti: Naakweshengyereza osaasire bakuru baawe ebi baakushobeize n'ebi baakwitsize. Bati: Mbwenu nitukweshengyereza otusaasire ebyo bishobyo, itwe abaheereza ba Ruhanga wa sho. Yosefu ebyo ku baabimugambiire yaarira." 
Genesis50:18 Beene ishe boona baija baamutsimbira amaju nibamugira bati: Reeba itwe turi abairu baawe. 
Genesis50:19 Haza Yosefu abagira ati: Murekye kutiina! Mbwenu niinye Ruhanga owaakikozire? 
Genesis50:20 Manya imwe ekyanyu kikaba kiri okunkora kubi, kwonka ekya Ruhanga kiri eky'okukiihamu ebirungi. Akaikiriza ku kiba kityo, ngu abone kukiza amagara g'abantu baingi nk'oku hati kiri." 
Genesis50:21 N'ahabw'ekyo mutatiina. Niinyija kubaha eby'okubatunga imwe n'abaana baanyu. Atyo abahamiza, abagarura omutima omunda." 
Genesis50:22 Yosefu nikwo yaatwire atyo omuri Misiri, we n'ab'eka ya ishe, akahitsya emyaka igana na ikumi y'obukuru." 
Genesis50:23 Yosefu ogwo yaarugaho yaareeba abaana ba Efuraimu ab'oruzaaro rwa kashatu, n'abaana ba Makiri mwene Manaase yaabeesiigirira kuba abe nk'abu ayezaariire." 
Genesis50:24 Mpaho Yosefu agira beene ishe ati: Ndi haihi kufa. Kwonka Ruhanga taribura kwija kubashuura akabaiha omuri egi nsi, akabatwara omu nsi ei yaarahiire kuha Aburahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo." 
Genesis50:25 Bwanyima Yosefu yaarahiza beene Isiraeli naabagira ati: Ruhanga ku ariija kubashuura, naimwe mwihe kunu amagufa gangye mugagyendane." 
Genesis50:26 Yosefu atyo afa ahikize emyaka igana na ikumi y'obukuru; nabo boomya omutumbi gwe, baguta omu shanduukye eziikwamu omuri Misiri." 
Exodus1:1 Aga nigo maziina ga batabani ba Isiraeli abaizire Misiri na Yakobo, buri omwe n'eka ye." 
Exodus1:2 Reubeeni, Simeoni, Leevi na Yuda;" 
Exodus1:3 Isakaari, Zebuluuni, Benyamiini;" 
Exodus1:4 Daani, Nafutaali, Gaadi na Asheri." 
Exodus1:5 Boona ab'oruzaaro rwa Yakobo bakaba bari abantu makumi mushanju; obariiremu Yosefu owaabaire atwire Misiri. 
Exodus1:6 Bwanyima Yosefu akafa, na beene ishe boona, n'ab'omu busingye obwo boona." 
Exodus1:7 Kwonka baijukuru ba Isiraeli baazaara, baayeyongyera munonga baakanya, kandi baaba ab'amaani gatakareebwaga, ekyarugiremu baijura egyo nsi." 
Exodus1:8 Bwanyima omuri Misiri hakeemamu omugabe owaabaire atarikumanya Yosefu. 
Exodus1:9 Yaagambira abantu be ati: Reeba Abaisiraeli barengyesereize kuba baingi, nibatukiza amaani." 
Exodus1:10 Nimwije tibacwere obwengye batakaakanya, nyentsya hakibaho orugamba bakakwatanisa n'abazigu baitu bakaturwanisa, haza bakacwa bakaruga omuri egi nsi." 
Exodus1:11 N'ahabw'ekyo akabataho abanyampara b'okubabonabonesa nibabeekoreza emitwaro erikuremeera. Baayombekyera Faraaho endembo Pitomu na Ramuseesi z'okuhunikamu. 
Exodus1:12 Kwonka ei baagarukiire kubabonabonesa, niyo baagarukiire kukanya n'okubuga hoona. Ekyo kyareetera Abanyamisiri Abaisiraeli kubaitsa obwoba." 
Exodus1:13 Abanyamisiri baakoresa Abaisiraeli emirimo y'amaani; 
Exodus1:14 baabahitsya n'aha kwetamwa, nibabakoresa emirimo erikubasaasa: nibabakaatisa obudongo n'okubabumbisa amatafaari, n'okubakoresa emirimo y'emiringo yoona omu Misiri. Haza emirimo egyo yoona bakaba bagibakoresa n'amaani." 
Exodus1:15 Bwanyima omugabe wa Misiri akagira abazaarisa Abaheburaayokazi, omwe aharibo orikwetwa Shifira, n'ondi orikwetwa Pua ati:" 
Exodus1:16 Ku muraabe nimuzaaza Abaheburaayokazi, mwareeba omwana owaazaarirwa aha katebe ari omwojo mumwite, ku araabe ari omwishiki mumurekye agumeho." 
Exodus1:17 Kwonka abo bazaarisa ahabw'okutiina Ruhanga, tibarakozire nk'oku omugabe wa Misiri yaabaragiire, baareka aboojo baagumaho." 
Exodus1:18 Omugabe wa Misiri nikwo kweta abo bazaarisa akabagira ati: Mbwenu ekyo mukozire ki kureka abaana aboojo bakagumaho? 
Exodus1:19 Abazaarisa abo baagarukamu Faraaho bati: Manya Abaheburaayokazi ti nk'Abanyamisirikazi, ahabw'okuba bo beehangaana bazaara omuzaarisa atakabahikire." 
Exodus1:20 N'ahabw'ekyo Ruhanga yaakorera gye abo bazaarisa. Abantu baakanya, baaba ab'amaani munonga." 
Exodus1:21 Kandi ahabw'abazaarisa abo kutiina Ruhanga, nawe yaabaha oruzaaro baarugwamu enganda." 
Exodus1:22 Bwanyima Faraaho akaragiira abantu be boona ati: Omwana weena omwojo orizaarwa Abaheburaayo mumunagye omu Mugyera, kwonka ku ariba ari omwishiki mumurekye agumeho." 
Exodus2:1 Mbwenu omushaija w'omu ruganda rwa Leevi akagyenda yaashwera omukazi muhara w'Abaleevi. 
Exodus2:2 Omukazi ogwo yaatwara enda, yaazaara omutabani. Ku yaareebire omwana ari murungi, yaamusherekyera ameezi ashatu." 
Exodus2:3 Ku yaaremirwe kuguma amusherekire, yaareeta akagyega k'omubimbiri k'okumutamu. Yaakasiiga enzibuuro na koroto, yaakatamu ogwo mwana, yaakata ahagati y'ebibingo by'aha nkungu y'omugyera." 
Exodus2:4 Kandi munyaanya w'ogwo mwana yaayemerera hangahari, kureeba ekyakumubaho." 
Exodus2:5 Ago magingo muhara wa Faraaho ku yaashuumire aha mugyera kwoga, abazaana be baaguma nibagyendagyenda aha rubaju rwagwo. Reero yaareeba akagyega kari omu bibingo, yaatuma omuzaana we kukareeta." 
Exodus2:6 Ku yaakafundwire, yaashangamu omwana; haza ogwo mwereere akaba naarira. Yaamwitsa esaasi, yaagira ati: Ogu mwana n'ow'Abaheburaayo." 
Exodus2:7 Mbwenu munyaanya w'omwana ogwo agira muhara wa Faraaho ati: Nze kukwetera omurezi w'omu Baheburaayokazi, aije akurerere ogu mwana?" 
Exodus2:8 Muhara wa Faraaho amugarukamu ati: Eego! Irooko. Ogwo mwishiki atyo agyenda, ayeta nyina w'ogwo mwana." 
Exodus2:9 Muhara wa Faraaho amugira ati: Twara ogu mwana omunderere, haza nyije nkuhe ebihembo. Omukazi nawe atwara omwana amurera." 
Exodus2:10 Ogwo mwana ku yaakuzire, onu yaamureetera muhara wa Faraaho, yaaba omutabani, yaamweta eiziina Musa, ahabw'okuba akagira ati: Nkamwiha omu maizi." 
Exodus2:11 Musa ku yaakuzire, eizooba rimwe yaaza kushuura beene waabo, haza yaareeba oku barikukoresibwa n'amaani. Kandi yaashanga Omunyamisiri naateera Omuheburaayo w'omu baabo." 
Exodus2:12 Musa ku anaga amaisho oku n'oku ataareeba muntu weena, aita ogwo Munyamisiri, amuziika omu musheenyi." 
Exodus2:13 Eizooba ryakuratsireho, ku yaashohoire yaashanga Abaheburaayo babiri nibarwana. Yaagira owaashaagize ati: Ahabw'enki nooteera mugyenzi waawe?" 
Exodus2:14 Onu amugarukamu naamubuuza ati: N'oha owaakuhaire obushoboorozi bw'okututegyeka n'okutucwera emanja? Nooyenda kuunyita nk'oku oitsire Omunyamisiri? Musa atyo atiina, agira ati: Kwokwo ekyo kintu kimanyirwe." 
Exodus2:15 Na Faraaho ku yaakihuriire, yaasherura oburyo bw'okwita Musa ogwo. Kwonka Musa akahunga Faraaho, yaatuura omu nsi ya Midiyani." 
Exodus2:16 Mbwenu omuhongyerezi Omumidiyani akaba aine abahara mushanju. Eizooba rimwe, Musa ku yaabaire ashutami aha rubaju rw'eiziba, abo baishiki baija, baataha amaizi, baijuza amaato kweshera obusyo bwa ishebo bw'entaama." 
Exodus2:17 Abariisa ku baizire baababinga. Kwonka Musa yaimuka yaabarwanaho, yaayeshera obusyo bwabo." 
Exodus2:18 Ku baahikire ahari ishebo Yetero yaababuuza ati: Byaba bita eri izooba, ka mwarahukayo?" 
Exodus2:19 Baamugarukamu bati: Omunyamisiri niwe yaatujuna abariisa, akatutahira amaizi, akatwesherera n'obusyo." 
Exodus2:20 Nawe abuuza bahara be ati: Mbwenu ogwo muntu ari nkahi? Ahabw'enki mwamutsigayo? Nimwirooko mumwete, aije arye." 
Exodus2:21 Mpaho Musa asiima kuguma n'ogwo mushaija. Bwanyima onu ahingira Musa muhara we Zipora. 
Exodus2:22 Ogwo mukazi azaara omutabani, Musa amweta Gereshomu; ahabw'okuba akagira ati: Nshuuhuukiire omu nsi etari yaitu." 
Exodus2:23 Ku haahingwireho ebiro bingi, omugabe wa Misiri yaafa. Abaisiraeli baakabibwa emirimo y'obuhuuku, baataka ngu hakaagira owaabajuna. Haza okuhooga kwabo kw'okusaasibwa obuhuuku kwahika ahari Ruhanga," 
Exodus2:24 yaahurira okutsinda kwabo, yaijuka endagaano ye na Aburahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo." 
Exodus2:25 Ruhanga yaareeba Abaisiraeli, yaamanya n'oku bari." 
Exodus3:1 Omu biro ebyo Musa akaba naariisa obusyo bw'entaama za Yetero ishezaara, omuhongyerezi Omumidiyani. Yaaseetura obusyo bwe, yaabwahukiza aha bukiizi bwa burengyerwa-izooba obw'eihamba; yaahika aha rushozi rwa Ruhanga orurikwetwa Horebu." 
Exodus3:2 Mpaho maraika wa Nyakubaho yaamubonekyerera omu rurimi rw'omuriro gurikwakira ahagati y'orushaka. Ku yaanagireyo ati amaisho, yaareeba orushaka nirwaka, kwonka rutarikusiriira." 
Exodus3:3 Musa agira ati: Ka nyekiikuure, ndeebe eri ihano, ekirikuzibira oru rushaka kusya." 
Exodus3:4 Nyakubaho ku yaareebire Musa naakiikama kurwetegyereza Ruhanga ogwo yaamweta naayema omuri orwo rushaka ati: Musa! Musa! Onu ati: Ndi aha! 
Exodus3:5 Nawe amugira ati: Otairira haihi. Juura enkaito omu bigyere byawe, ahabw'okuba omwanya gu oyemereiremu n'ogurikwera." 
Exodus3:6 Ayongyera amugira ati: Niinye Ruhanga wa baashoimwe, Ruhanga wa Aburahamu, Ruhanga wa Isaaka, Ruhanga wa Yakobo. Musa atyo ayesangira aha maisho ahabw'okutiina kureeba Ruhanga." 
Exodus3:7 Bwanyima Nyakubaho yaagira Musa ati: Ndeebire okubonabonesibwa kw'abantu bangye abari omuri Misiri, naahurira okuborooga kwabo oku barikuboroogyesibwa abanyampara. Nimmanya obusaasi bwabo." 
Exodus3:8 Hati naija kubakiza okutegyekwa Abanyamisiri, mbaihe omuri egyo nsi, mbatware omu nsi enungi kandi egarami: Ensi erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki, mbahitsye omu nsi y'Abanyakanaani n'Abahiiti n'Abaamori n'Abaperizi n'Abahiivi n'Abayebusi." 
Exodus3:9 Reeba mpikirweho okuborooga kw'Abaisiraeli, naareeba oku Abanyamisiri barikubahata." 
Exodus3:10 Mbwenu nu ija nkutume ahari Faraaho oihe abantu bangye Abaisiraeli omuri Misiri. 
Exodus3:11 Kwonka Musa agira Ruhanga ati: Mbwenu nyowe niinye oha orikuza ahari Faraaho nkaiha Abaisiraeli Misiri? 
Exodus3:12 Nawe amugira ati: Niinyija kuba nkwine, kandi aka niko kamanyiso aku orimanyiraho ku niinye nkutumire: Ku oriba waihire abo bantu omuri Misiri; muryaramiza Ruhanga ahari oru rushozi." 
Exodus3:13 Bwanyima Musa abuuza Ruhanga ati: Ku ndaahikye Abaisiraeli, naabagira nti Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe abantumireho; haza bambuuza bati: Eiziina rye n'oha, mbagire nta?" 
Exodus3:14 Ruhanga agarukamu Musa ati: Niinye Nyakubaho. Kandi amugira ati: Ogambire Abaisiraeli oti: Nyakubaho niwe abantumireho. 
Exodus3:15 Ayongyera amugira ati: Abaisiraeli obagambire oti: Mukama Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe, Ruhanga wa Aburahamu, Ruhanga wa Isaaka, Ruhanga wa Yakobo yaabantumaho. Eryo niryo iziina ryangye eri nyetwa ebiro byona, kandi ndyaguma niinyetwa ntyo obusingye bwona." 
Exodus3:16 Mbwenu irooko orundaane abakuru b'omu Baisiraeli, haza obagire oti: Mukama Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe, Ruhanga wa Aburahamu, Ruhanga wa Isaaka, Ruhanga wa Yakobo ambonekyeire yangira ati: Mbeetegyereize, naareeba oku babagizire omuri Misiri." 
Exodus3:17 Hati mmaririire kubaiha omu kubonabonesizibwa omuri Misiri, mbatware omu nsi y'Abanyakanaani n'Abahiiti n'Abaamori n'Abaperizi n'Abahiivi n'Abayebusi, ensi erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki." 
Exodus3:18 Nabo nibaija kwikiriza ebi oraabagambire. Reero iwe n'abakuru b'omu Baisiraeli mugyende, muhikye omugabe wa Misiri, haza mumugire muti: Mukama Ruhanga w'Abaheburaayo atubonekyeire. Mbwenu nitukweshengyereza, otwikirize tugyende orugyendo rw'ebiro bishatu, tuze omu ihamba, tubone kutambirirayo Mukama Ruhanga waitu ebitambo." 
Exodus3:19 Nimmanya omugabe wa Misiri ku atarikwija kubaikiriza kugyenda, yaaba atagyemesereziibwe." 
Exodus3:20 Mbwenu niinyija kubanga omukono gwangye, nteeze Misiri eby'okutangaaza byona ebi ndigikoreramu; bwanyima abarekye mugyende." 
Exodus3:21 Kandi abo bantu ndyabareetera okugirirwa embabazi Abanyamisiri. N'ahabw'ekyo ku muriza kugyenda, timurigyenda ngaro nsha." 
Exodus3:22 Kureka buri mukazi aryashaba mutaahi we, nari ondi mukazi ocumbikire omu nju ye, ebintu by'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu n'ebijwaro; mubijwekye batabani baanyu na bahara baanyu, mwaye mutyo Abanyamisiri." 
Exodus4:1 Bwanyima Musa agarukamu Ruhanga ati: Kwonka manya tibarikwija kuunyikiriza, nobu kwakuba okuhurira ebi ndikugamba; ahabw'okuba nibaija kugira bati: Nyakubaho tarakubonekyeire." 
Exodus4:2 Nyakubaho amugira ati: Ekyo eki oine omu ngaro ni ki? Onu ati: N'enkoni. 
Exodus4:3 Ruhanga ati: Ginagye ahansi. N'onu aginaga aha nsi ehinduka enjoka, haza Musa agihunga." 
Exodus4:4 Kwonka Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: Tayo omukono ogikwate omukira. N'onu atayo omukono agikwata, egaruka ehindukira omu ngaro ze enkoni." 
Exodus4:5 Nyakubaho ati: Guma okore otyo babone kwikiriza ku Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga wa baishebo, Ruhanga wa Aburahamu, Ruhanga wa Isaaka, Ruhanga wa Yakobo nkubonekyeire." 
Exodus4:6 Nyakubaho agaruka amugira ati: Ta omukono gwawe omunda y'ekijwaro kyawe. N'onu agutamu. Reero ku yaagwihireyo yaashanga gubembire, nigwera nk'orubaare." 
Exodus4:7 Bwanyima amugira ati: Gugarure omunda. Nawe agugaruramu. Ku yaagwihiremu, gwagaruka gwaba nk'omubiri gwe ogundi." 
Exodus4:8 Ruhanga atyo amugira ati: Ku bariba batakwikiriize, nari okwikirizisibwa akamanyiso k'okubanza, baryaikirizisibwa akarikurataho." 
Exodus4:9 Kandi ku bariba bataikirizisiibwe obwo bumanyiso bwombi, nari bateetaire ha bi orikugamba, oryataha amaizi g'omugyera, ogashukye aha itaka ryomire. Haza ago maizi gu oriiha omuri ogwo mugyera garyahinduka eshagama aha itaka ryomire." 
Exodus4:10 Reero Musa agira Nyakubaho ati: Nyakusinga, nyowe ka ntari mugambi murungi. Na ira ryona nshangwa ntaba mugambi murungi; nangwa n'ahi waatandikira kugamba naanye omuheereza waawe, ahabw'okuba tindahukirwa kugamba, n'orurimi rwangye runaamuuka." 
Exodus4:11 Nyakubaho nikwo kumugira ati: Mbwenu shi owaahangire akanwa k'omuntu n'oha? N'oha omuhindura ekiteta, nari ekifa matu, nainga okumuhwezesa nari okumuhumya? Tiinye Nyakubaho?" 
Exodus4:12 Mbwenu irooko, naanye ndyaba nkwine noogamba, nkuhabure ebi origamba." 
Exodus4:13 Kwonka we agira ati: Nyakusinga, naakweshengyereza, tuma ondiijo muntu." 
Exodus4:14 Nyakubaho nikwo kugwerwa kubi Musa, akamugira ati: Mukuru waawe Arooni Omuleevi tariyo? Nimmanya ku arikubaasa kugamba gye. Na mbwenu, reeba naija kukubugana. Haza ku araakureebe, naija kushemererwa." 
Exodus4:15 Oryaguma omugambire ebi araagambe. Naanye ndyakuhwera noogamba, nawe mmuhwere naagamba; kandi ndyakuhabura ebi orikora." 
Exodus4:16 We aryaguma akugambirire abantu, abe akanwa kaawe; naiwe omubeere nka Ruhanga." 
Exodus4:17 Mbwenu twara egi nkoni, ogume ogikwate noogikoresa eby'okutangaaza." 
Exodus4:18 Musa akagaruka owa Yetero ishezaara, yaamugira ati: Ninkweshengyereza ndeka ngarukye omu baitu Misiri, ndeebe yaaba bakibaho. Yetero agira Musa ati: Gyenda n'obusingye." 
Exodus4:19 Mpaho Nyakubaho agambirira Musa omuri Midiyani ati: Garuka Misiri; ahabw'okuba boona abaabaire nibenda kukwita, bafiire." 
Exodus4:20 Musa atyo atwara omukazi we n'abatabani, abata aha ndogoya agarukayo omu nsi ya Misiri, akwaitse enkoni ya Ruhanga." 
Exodus4:21 Kandi Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: Ku oraagarukye Misiri, otaribura kukorera omu maisho ga Faraaho eby'okutangaaza byona ebi nkuhaireho obushoboorozi. Kwonka niinyija kumugangaaza omutima, ayangye kwikiriza abo bantu kugyenda." 
Exodus4:22 Haza oryagira Faraaho oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Isiraeli n'omwana wangye w'omujigaijo. 
Exodus4:23 Mbwenu ninkugambira nti: Rekura mutabani wangye ogwo agyende ampeereze. Ku oraayangye kumurekura akagyenda, niinyija kwita mutabani waawe w'omujigaijo." 
Exodus4:24 Ku baabaire nibakigyenda, baahika omu icumbi, Nyakubaho yaabuganamu Musa, yaayenda kumwita." 
Exodus4:25 Zipora nikwo kukwata ekishate ky'eibaare ky'obwogi, akakishaza ekikoba ky'aha mubiri gw'omutabani; kandi akakikoza aha bigyere bya Musa. Ahabw'okwo kusharwa Zipora akagira Musa ati: Wambeera ibanye orikujwisa eshagama!" 
Exodus4:26 Mukama atyo areka kwita Musa. 
Exodus4:27 Bwanyima Mukama agambira Arooni ati: Irooko oze omu ihamba kubugana Musa. Nawe atyo agyenda, amubugana aha rushozi rwa Ruhanga, amunywegyera." 
Exodus4:28 Musa agambira Arooni ebi Nyakubaho amutumire, n'obumanyiso obu amuragiire kukora." 
Exodus4:29 Bwanyima Musa na Arooni bagyenda bateerana hamwe abantu bakuru boona ab'omu Baisiraeli. 
Exodus4:30 Arooni abagambira ebigambo bi Nyakubaho yaagambiire Musa, kandi akorera obumanyiso omu maisho gaabo." 
Exodus4:31 Abo bantu baikiriza, haza ku bahurira Nyakubaho ataayaayiire Abaisiraeli, kandi areebire okubonabonesibwa kwabo, bajuumara baramya Ruhanga." 
Exodus5:1 Bwanyima Musa na Arooni bakaza omu maisho ga Faraaho, baamugira bati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naakugira ati: Reka abantu bangye bagyende, bankorere obugyenyi omu ihamba." 
Exodus5:2 Na Faraaho abagira ati: Mukama ogwo n'oha, ou nyowe nshemereire kuhurira ebye, nkarekura Abaisiraeli kugyenda? Nyowe Mukama ogwo tindikumumanya, kandi tindikwija kurekura Baisiraeli kugyenda." 
Exodus5:3 Nabo bamugarukamu bati: Manya Ruhanga w'Abaheburaayo atubonekyeire. Twakweshengyereza, turekye tugyende orugyendo rw'ebiro bishatu, tuze omu ihamba tutambirireyo Mukama Ruhanga waitu ebitambo, atakaatwitsa orufu nari rurara." 
Exodus5:4 Kwonka ogwo mugabe wa Misiri abagira ati: Iwe Musa na Arooni, nimwendera ki kwiha abantu aha mirimo yaabo? Nimugarukye aha mirimo yaanyu!" 
Exodus5:5 Agaruka abagira ati: Reeba abantu b'omuri egi nsi ni baingi; mbwenu imwe nimwenda kubahuumuza ngu barekye kukora emirimo egumire. 
Exodus5:6 Eryo izooba Faraaho akaragiira baanyampara b'abantu n'abeemererezi baabo, ati:" 
Exodus5:7 Mutagaruka kuha abo bantu obunyaatsi bw'okubumbisa amatafaari, nk'oku mubaire nimutwaza. Mubarekye bagyende babwesherurire." 
Exodus5:8 Kandi omubaro gw'amatafaari gu babaire nibabumba mugubagumyeho, mutagutuubya na kakye; ahabw'okuba tibaine ki barikukora. Nikyo barikuhoogyera bati: Ka tuze kutambira Ruhanga waitu ekitambo." 
Exodus5:9 Abo bantu mubahe emirimo erikukiraho kuguma, bagikore, barekye kuta omutima aha bigambo by'ebishuba." 
Exodus5:10 Batyo baanyampara b'abo bantu n'abeemererezi baabo bashohora, babagira bati: Faraaho yaagira ngu tarikwija kubaha bunyaatsi." 
Exodus5:11 Ngu mube niimwe mwabwesherurira ahi muraabushangye hoona, kandi ngu n'omurimo gwanyu tigurikwija kutuubibwaho na kakye." 
Exodus5:12 Mpaho abo bantu baataataana omu nsi ya Misiri yoona kwesherurira ebitsintsi by'embuba omu mwanya gw'obunyaatsi. 
Exodus5:13 Haza obwo baanyampara baabo nibabarigitirira, bagumize bati: Mukore omurimo gwanyu ogwa buri izooba, muguhitsye nk'oku mubaire nimugukora mwine embuba." 
Exodus5:14 Reero abeemererezi b'Abaisiraeli abu baanyampara ba Faraaho baabataireho, baateerwa kandi baabuuzibwa bati: Ahabw'enki omurimo gwanyu gwa nyomwabazyo n'ogw'eri izooba ogw'okubumba amatafaari mutaguhikize nk'oku mubaire nimukora?" 
Exodus5:15 Bwanyima abeemererezi b'Abaisiraeli baayetuurira Faraaho, baayetonganira bati: Ahabw'enki nootutwaza otyo, itwe abaheereza baawe?" 
Exodus5:16 Itwe abairu baawe tibarikutuha mbuba kandi batugira bati: Mubumbe amatafaari. Bataho n'okututeera, itwe abaheereza baawe, haza orubanja ruri orw'abantu baawe." 
Exodus5:17 Kwonka we abagarukamu ati: Timwine ki murikukora, timwine ki murikukora! Nikyo murikugirira muti: Oturekye tugyende tuze kutambira Mukama ekitambo." 
Exodus5:18 Nimwirooko muze kukora; kandi tihariho orikwija kubaha embuba, haza nimwija kuguma nimuhitsya omubaro gw'amatafaari gu mwacwereirwe." 
Exodus5:19 Abeemererezi b'Abaisiraeli ku baabagambiire bati: Timurikwija kucwerwaho na kakye aha mubaro gw'amatafaari gaanyu aga buri izooba, baamanya ku bari omu kabi." 
Exodus5:20 Ku baahikire Musa na Arooni abaabaire babategyereize nibaruga kureebana na Faraaho," 
Exodus5:21 baabagira bati: Nyakubaho naakabareebe, akabacwera orubanja, ahabw'okuba niimwe mureeteire Faraaho n'abashaija be kutugwerwa kubi, bakakwata rurara kwenda kutwita." 
Exodus5:22 Musa nikwo kugaruka ahari Nyakubaho akamweshengyereza ati: Ai Nyakubaho, aba bantu baawe obatuzire ki? Mbwenu okaba wantumira ki?" 
Exodus5:23 Manya naaba kwija ahari Faraaho kumugambira omu iziina ryawe, abakozire kubi, kandi naiwe tiwaagira bu obajunire n'akakye." 
Exodus6:1 Kwonka Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: Mbwenu noija kureeba eki ndaakore Faraaho. Manya niinyija kumugyema n'omukono gwangye gw'amaani, abarekure. Buzimazima niinyija kumugyema n'omukono gwangye gw'amaani, ababingye omu nsi ye." 
Exodus6:2 Ruhanga ayongyera agira Musa ati: Niinye Nyakubaho. 
Exodus6:3 Nkabonekyera Aburahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo ndi Ruhanga omushoboorozi w'ebintu byona, kwonka tindabeegambiire ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Exodus6:4 Kandi nkahamya endagaano yangye nabo, kubaha ensi ya Kanaani, ensi ei baatwiremu bari abashuuhuuki." 
Exodus6:5 Mbwenu mpuriire okutsinda kw'Abaisiraeli, abu Abanyamisiri bahindwire abahuuku, haza naijuka endagaano yangye." 
Exodus6:6 Reero nu gambira Abaisiraeli ku naabagira nti: Niinye Nyakubaho; niinyija kubakiza emirimo egumire ei Abanyamisiri barikubaitsa; mbaihe omu buhuuku bu baabatairemu, mbacungure mbangire omukono nimbaha ebifubiro by'amaani." 
Exodus6:7 Kandi ndyabahindura abantu bangye, mbe Ruhanga waanyu, haza mumanye ku ndi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, owaabakirize emirimo egumire ei Abanyamisiri baabaire nibabaitsa." 
Exodus6:8 Ekindi, ndyabahitsya omu nsi ei naarahiire kuha Aburahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo; ngibahe ebe eyaanyu buzima. Nyowe Nyakubaho nkikore." 
Exodus6:9 Ebyo Musa ku yaabigambiire atyo Abaisiraeli, baayanga kumuhurira ahabw'okugira obujune bwingi omu mutima, n'ahabw'okugangibwa obuhuuku." 
Exodus6:10 Mpaho Nyakubaho yaagira Musa ati: 
Exodus6:11 Irooko ogambire Faraaho omugabe wa Misiri arekure Abaisiraeli barugye omu nsi ye. 
Exodus6:12 Musa nawe agira Nyakubaho ati: Mbwenu Abaisiraeli ku baraabe baayanga kumpurira, Faraaho naija kumpurira ata, nyowe onaamuuka omu kugamba?" 
Exodus6:13 Kwonka Nyakubaho yaagambira Musa na Arooni, naabatuma aha Baisiraeli n'ahari Faraaho omugabe wa Misiri kubamanyisa ku barikuragiirwa kwiha Abaisiraeli omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Exodus6:14 Abakuru omu miryango ya baishenkurubo nibo aba: Beene Reubeeni, omujigaijo gwa Isiraeli ni Hanoki, Paalu, Hezirooni na Karumi. Abo nibo b'omuryango gwa Reubeeni." 
Exodus6:15 Beene Simeoni ni Yemueli, Yamini, Ohadi, Yakini, Zohari na Shauli mutabani w'Omunyakanaanikazi. Abo nibo b'omuryango gwa Simeoni." 
Exodus6:16 Mbwenu aga nigo maziina ga beene Leevi nk'oku enzaaro zaabo zaakurataine: Gereshooni, Kohati na Meraari. Emyaka ei Leevi yaahikize ekaba igana na makumi ashatu na mushanju." 
Exodus6:17 Beene Gereshooni ni Libuni na Shimei nk'oku emiryango yaabo yaabaire eri. 
Exodus6:18 Reero beene Kohati ni Amuraamu, Izihaari, Heburooni na Uzieli; kandi emyaka ei Kohati yaahikize ni igana na makumi ashatu n'eshatu." 
Exodus6:19 Beene Meraari ni Mahili na Muushi. Egyo niyo miryango y'Abaleevi nk'oku enzaaro zaabo zaakurataine. 
Exodus6:20 Amuraamu akashwera Yokobeedi ishenkazi, yaamuzaaraho Arooni na Musa. Amuraamu emyaka y'obukuru bwe ekahika igana na makumi ashatu na mushanju." 
Exodus6:21 Beene Izihaari ni Koora, Nefegi na Ziikiri." 
Exodus6:22 Kandi Beene Uzieli ni Mishaeli, Elizafani na Shitiri." 
Exodus6:23 Arooni akashwera Elisheba muhara wa Aminadabu, kandi munyaanya wa Nahashooni, yaamuzaaraho Nadabu, Abiihu, Eleazaari na Itamaari." 
Exodus6:24 Beene Koora ni Asiri, Elikaana, na Abiyasaafu. Egyo niyo miryango y'Abaakoora." 
Exodus6:25 Eleazaari mutabani wa Arooni akashwera omwe ahari bahara ba Putieli, yaamuzaaraho Finehaasi. Abo nibo bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkuru b'Abaleevi nk'oku enganda zaabo zaabaire ziri." 
Exodus6:26 Abo nibo Musa na Arooni, abu Nyakubaho yaagizire ati: Nimwihe Abaisiraeli omu nsi ya Misiri, nk'oku emitwe y'enganda zaabo eri." 
Exodus6:27 Musa ogwo na Arooni nibo baagambiire Faraaho omugabe wa Misiri eby'okwiha Abaisiraeli Misiri. 
Exodus6:28 Aha izooba eri Nyakubaho yaagambiriireho Musa omu nsi ya Misiri," 
Exodus6:29 akamugira ati: Niinye Nyakubaho! Gambira Faraaho omugabe wa Misiri byona ebi ndikukugambira. 
Exodus6:30 Kwonka Musa yaagira Nyakubaho ati: Mbwenu shi, obu ndi omuntu orikunaamuuka omu kugamba, Faraaho naija kubaasa ata kumpurira?" 
Exodus7:1 Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: Reeba naakuhindura ruhanga ahari Faraaho, na mukuru waawe Arooni abe omurangi." 
Exodus7:2 Oryaguma ogambe ebi ndikukuragiira, na Arooni mukuru waawe aryagambira Faraaho kureka Abaisiraeli bakaruga omu nsi ye." 
Exodus7:3 Kwonka ndyagangaaza Faraaho omutima. Nobu ndikanyisa obumanyiso bwangye n'eby'okutangaaza omu nsi ya Misiri," 
Exodus7:4 Faraaho ogwo taribahurira, mbone kuhingamiza Misiri omukono gwangye; ngiihemu ebimbuuro byangye nibo bantu bangye Abaisiraeli ninkoresa ebifubiro bihango." 
Exodus7:5 Reero Abanyamisiri, ku ndibangira Misiri omukono, naiha omuribo Abaisiraeli, nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Exodus7:6 Musa na Arooni nabo baaba nikwo baagira; baatwaza nk'oku Nyakubaho yaabaragiira. 
Exodus7:7 Obwo Musa akaba aine emyaka makumi munaana y'obukuru, na Arooni ahikize makumi munaana n'eshatu, obu baagambira Faraaho ebi batumirwe." 
Exodus7:8 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa na Arooni ati: 
Exodus7:9 Faraaho ku araabagire ati: Nimukore eky'okutangaaza ekirikubahamya, obwo ogire Arooni oti: Kwata enkoni yaawe, oginagye ahansi omu maisho ga Faraaho, ehindukye enjoka." 
Exodus7:10 Musa na Arooni batyo baza owa Faraaho, batwaza nk'oku Nyakubaho yaabaragiira. Arooni anaga enkoni ye aha nsi omu maisho ga Faraaho n'abagaragwa be; egyo nkoni ehinduka enjoka." 
Exodus7:11 Bwanyima Faraaho ayeta abanyabwengye n'abarogi n'abafumu ba Misiri, nabo batwaza batyo nibakoresa emiguruko yaabo." 
Exodus7:12 Ahabw'okuba buri muntu akanaga aha nsi enkoni ye, haza zaahinduka enjoka. Kwonka enkoni eya Arooni yaamira ezaabo." 
Exodus7:13 Hoona omutima gwa Faraaho gwaguma gugangaire, tiyaabahurira, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaakigambire." 
Exodus7:14 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: Omutima gwa Faraaho gugangaire, ayangire kurekura abo bantu bakagyenda." 
Exodus7:15 Mbwenu irooko oze owa Faraaho omu kasheeshe. Yaaba naaza aha maizi, haza omutegyeerereze aha nkungu y'omugyera, okwaitse enkoni eri eyaahindukire enjoka." 
Exodus7:16 Reero omugire oti: Mukama Ruhanga w'Abaheburaayo akuntumireho naagira ati: Reka abantu bangye bagyende bampeerereze omu ihamba, kandi ngu reeba tomworobeire."
