Exodus7:17 Mbwenu Mukama ogwo naagira ati: Eki nikyo oraamanyireho ku ndi Nyakubaho: Reeba naaza kuteeza amaizi g'omu mugyera enkoni ei nkwaitse, gahindukye eshagama," 
Exodus7:18 ebyenyanja byamwo bife, omugyera gunuukye, Abanyamisiri banugye amaizi gaagwo, barekye kuganywa." 
Exodus7:19 Kandi Nyakubaho yaagira Musa ati: Gambira Arooni oti: Kwata enkoni yaawe, obangye omukono gwawe ahaiguru y'amaizi ga Misiri, aha migyera yaago, aha mikura yaago, aha biyanja byago, n'aha bisyaraazi by'amaizi byona, bibone kuhinduka eshagama. Ensi ya Misiri yoona ebugye eshagama, entaatika zaabo n'enyungu zaabo z'amabaare biijure eshagama." 
Exodus7:20 Musa na Arooni baakora nk'oku Nyakubaho abaragiire. Arooni atyo aimukiza enkoni omu maisho ga Faraaho n'ag'abagaragwa be, agiteeza amaizi g'omu mugyera; goona gahinduka eshagama." 
Exodus7:21 N'ebyenyanja byamwo bifa, omugeyera gunuuka, Abanyamisiri baremwa kunywa amaizi gaamwo. Ensi ya Misiri yoona ebugwa eshagama." 
Exodus7:22 Kwonka abafumu ba Misiri nabo bakora batyo n'emiguruko yaabo, na Faraaho aguma agangaize omutima, ayanga kubahurira, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaagambire." 
Exodus7:23 Faraaho atyo agarukayo, ayetaahira omu nju ye, ekyo takyeetaho." 
Exodus7:24 Abanyamisiri boona batimba amaziba omu mbaju z'omugyera, ngu bakaayetungira amaizi g'okunywa, ahabw'okuba amaizi gaagwo gakabarema kunywa." 
Exodus7:25 Hatyo hahinguraho ebiro mushanju, Nyakubaho aherize kuteera amaizi g'ogwo mugyera." 
Exodus8:1 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: Za owa Faraaho, omugire oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reka abantu bangye bagyende, babone kumpeereza." 
Exodus8:2 Kwonka ku oraayangye kubareka bakagyenda, niinyija kuteeza ensi yaawe yoona ebikyere." 
Exodus8:3 Omugyera nigwija kwijurirana ebikyere, haza bituuhuukyeyo, bitaahe omu nju yaawe, omu kishengye kyawe ekiraarwamu, omu kitanda kyawe, omu maju g'abaheereza baawe, n'ag'abantu baawe, omu mateekyero gaawe, n'omu by'okugoyeramu byawe." 
Exodus8:4 Ebikyere nibiija kukutemba, bitembe abantu baawe n'abaheereza baawe boona." 
Exodus8:5 Kandi Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: Gambira Arooni oti: Bangira emigyera n'emikura n'ebiyanja omukono gwawe gukwaitse enkoni yaawe, ebikyere bibone kuteera ensi ya Misiri." 
Exodus8:6 Arooni atyo abangira amaizi ga Misiri omukono, ebikyere bitimbirayo, bishweka ensi ya Misiri." 
Exodus8:7 Kwonka abafumu nabo bakora batyo n'emiguruko yaabo, ebikyere biteera egyo nsi." 
Exodus8:8 Bwanyima Faraaho ayeta Musa na Arooni, abagira ati: Nimweshengyereze Nyakubaho, nyowe n'abantu bangye atwiheho ebi bikyere, haza ndekure aba bantu, baze kumutambira ebitambo." 
Exodus8:9 Musa agarukamu Faraaho ati: Nyakusinga, ngambira obunaku bu ndaakweshengyererezemu Ruhanga, iwe n'abaheereza baawe n'abantu baawe, ebikyere bibone kucwekyerera, bikakurugaho, bikaruga n'omu maju gaanyu, bikatsigara omu mugyera gwonka." 
Exodus8:10 Faraaho amugira ati: Nyencakare. Musa ati: Nikiija kuba nk'oku waagamba, obone kumanya ku hatariho n'omwe ori nka Mukama Ruhanga waitu." 
Exodus8:11 Ebikyere nibiija kukurugaho, birugye omu maju gaanyu n'aha baheereza baawe n'aha bantu baawe, bitsigare omu mugyera gwonka." 
Exodus8:12 Musa na Arooni batyo bashohora, baruga omu maisho ga Faraaho. Musa atakira Mukama kwihaho ebikyere bi yaateerize Faraaho." 
Exodus8:13 Na Nyakubaho aikiriza kukora nk'oku Musa yaashabire; ebikyere bifa, bihwa omu maju n'omu bibuga n'omu misiri." 
Exodus8:14 Reero ku baabirundaine baabirunda emituumo, ensi yaanuuka ekijunde." 
Exodus8:15 Kwonka Faraaho ku yaareebire haabaho okuyugirwa, yaagangaaza omutima, yaayanga kubahurira, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaabaire agambire." 
Exodus8:16 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: Gambira Arooni oti: Banga enkoni yaawe, oteere omucuucu gw'aha nsi, gurugwemu emibu omu nsi ya Misiri yoona." 
Exodus8:17 Nabo baakora batyo. Arooni yaabanga omukono gukwaitse enkoni ye, yaagiteera omucuucu gw'aha nsi, gwarugwamu emibu, yaateera abantu n'enyamaishwa. Omucuucu gwona ogw'aha nsi gwarugwamu emibu, yaabuga ensi ya Misiri yoona." 
Exodus8:18 Abafumu ku baateireho n'emiguruko yaabo kureeta emibu, baaremwa. Haza egyo mibu yaashugyeera abantu n'enyamaishwa." 
Exodus8:19 Abafumu baagira Faraaho bati: Mbwenu eki Ruhanga niwe yaakikoresa orukumu rwe. Kwonka omutima gwa Faraaho gwaguma gugangaire; yaayanga kubahurira, nk'oku Mukama yaagambire." 
Exodus8:20 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: Guruka kare omu kasheeshe, otegyereze Faraaho yaaba naashohora kuza aha maizi. Haza omugire oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reka abantu bangye bagyende bampeereze." 
Exodus8:21 Reero ku oraabe otabaikiriize kugyenda, niinyija kukwoherereza eshohera zikuteere, n'abaheereza baawe n'abantu baawe, zitaahe omu maju gaanyu, amaju g'Abanyamisiri gaijure emizinga y'eshohera, zishugyeere n'aha itaka ri barikwemereraho." 
Exodus8:22 Kwonka eryo izooba, ekyanga kya Gosheni, eki abantu bangye batwiremu, niinyija kukireka hangahari, kirekye kuteerwa emizinga y'eshohera, obone kumanya ku niinye Nyakubaho orikukora ebyo omu nsi." 
Exodus8:23 Nikwo ndaayorekye ntyo entaaniso y'abantu bangye n'abaawe. Kandi ako kamanyiso nikaija kubaho nyencakare. 
Exodus8:24 Haza Nyakubaho nikwo yaakozire. Haija emizinga y'eshohera, yaataaha omwa Faraaho, n'omu maju g'abaheereza be, n'omu nsi ya Misiri yoona. Ensi yaasiisikara ahabw'ezo shohera." 
Exodus8:25 Mpaho Faraaho ayeta Musa na Arooni, abagira ati: Nimwirooko muze kutambirira Ruhanga waanyu omuri egi nsi." 
Exodus8:26 Musa amugarukamu ati: Tikihikire kukora tutyo; ahabw'okuba nitwija kutambira Mukama Ruhanga waitu ebitambo bi Abanyamisiri barikuzira. Mbwenu shi ku turaatambire omu maisho g'Abanyamisiri ebitambo bi barikuzira, tibarikwija kututeera amabaare?" 
Exodus8:27 Tushemereire kugyenda orugyendo rw'ebiro bishatu, tukaza omu ihamba tukaba niyo twatambirira Mukama Ruhanga waitu ebitambo nk'oku araaturagiire." 
Exodus8:28 Faraaho amugira ati: Eego, niinyija kubareka mugyende, mutambirire Mukama Ruhanga waanyu ebitambo omu ihamba, kwonka mutaza hare munonga. Kandi munshabire." 
Exodus8:29 Musa amugira ati: Reeba naaza kushohora ndugye omu maisho gaawe, nyeshengyereze Mukama, nyencakare emizinga y'eshohera ekurugyeho Nyakusinga, n'abaheereza baawe, n'abantu baawe. Kwonka iwe Nyakusinga otagaruka kugobya, okanga kwikiriza abo bantu kuza kutambira Mukama ebitambo." 
Exodus8:30 Musa atyo ashohora aruga omu maisho ga Faraaho, ashaba Mukama." 
Exodus8:31 Na Mukama akora nk'oku Musa yaashabire, akiza Faraaho emizinga y'eshohera. Kandi agikiza abaheereza be n'abantu be, hatatsigare shohera n'emwe." 
Exodus8:32 Kwonka Faraaho obwo nabwo agangaaza omutima, taikiriza abo bantu kugyenda." 
Exodus9:1 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: Irooko oze owa Faraaho omugire oti: Mukama Ruhanga w'Abaheburaayo naakugira ati: Reka abantu bangye bagyende bampeereze. 
Exodus9:2 Ku oraayangye kubareka bakagyenda; waabagumya; 
Exodus9:3 niinyija kwitsa omubyamo gw'amaani amatungo gaanyu: embaraasi, endogoya, engamira, amasyo g'ente n'ag'entaama." 
Exodus9:4 Kwonka Mukama naija kutaanisa amatungo g'Abaisiraeli n'ag'Abanyamisiri, omu g'Abaisiraeli goona harekye kugira n'emwe eyaafa." 
Exodus9:5 Kandi ataireho obunaku naagira ati: Nyencakare nibwo araakore ekyo kintu omuri egi nsi. 
Exodus9:6 Akasheeshe kaakuratsireho Mukama yaakikora. Amatungo g'Abanyamisiri goona gaafa, kwonka ag'Abaisiraeli tihaafamu n'emwe." 
Exodus9:7 Faraaho yaatumayo kubuuza, baashanga omu matungo g'Abaisiraeli hatariho n'emwe efiire. Kwonka Faraaho yaaguma agangaarize omutima, tiyaareka abo bantu kugyenda." 
Exodus9:8 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa na Arooni ati: Mutware amagaro g'eiju rya kashenda, eri mwihire omu kikoomi, Musa aritambikye ahaiguru, Faraaho naamureeba;" 
Exodus9:9 rihindukye omucuucu gubugye ensi ya Misiri yoona, gurwaze abantu baamwo boona n'enyamaishwa zaamwo ebizimba ebiraatane bikaba ebironda." 
Exodus9:10 Batyo baiha eiju omu kikoomi, baayemerera omu maisho ga Faraaho. Musa yaaritambika ahaiguru, ryarugwamu ebizimba ebyakwatsire abantu n'enyamaishwa, bikatana bikacweka ebironda." 
Exodus9:11 N'abafumu baabura ageemerera omu maisho ga Musa ahabw'ebyo bizimba; ahabw'okuba nabo bakabirwara n'Abanyamisiri boona. 
Exodus9:12 Kwonka Nyakubaho yaagangaaza omutima gwa Faraaho, yaayanga kubahurira, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaagambiire Musa." 
Exodus9:13 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: Guruka kare omu kasheeshe, oze owa Faraaho, omugire oti: Mukama Ruhanga w'Abaheburaayo naakugira ati: Reka abantu bangye bagyende bampeereze." 
Exodus9:14 Ati: Aha murundi ogu niinyija kukwoherereza ebibonaboneso byangye bikuhikyeho, bihikye n'aha baheereza baawe n'aha bantu baawe, obone kumanya ku hatariho ondi weena omu nsi yoona orikwingana naanye." 
Exodus9:15 Manya ku naakubanga omukono, naakuteeza enfu, iwe n'abantu baawe mukaahwerekyererera kimwe." 
Exodus9:16 Kwonka mbwenu naabareka kugumaho, kubooreka obushoboorozi bwangye, eiziina ryangye ribone kurangaanwa omu nsi yoona." 
Exodus9:17 Reeba na hati nookyetunguurira aha bantu bangye, oyangire kubarekura." 
Exodus9:18 Mbwenu nyencakare nk'aga magingo niinyija kugwisa orubaare rwingi munonga orutakagwaga muri Misiri yaaba kuhangwa n'okuhitsya eri izooba. 
Exodus9:19 N'ahabw'ekyo, hati bareete amatungo gaawe, na byona ebi oine omu ishwa, babitaasye omu biju, ahabw'okuba orubaare nirwija kugwa ruteere omuntu weena, n'enyamaishwa yoona ebiri omu ishwa. Haza ebiraabe bitataahiibwe nibiija kufa." 
Exodus9:20 Mbwenu obwo, omu bairu ba Faraaho abaatiinire ekigambo kya Nyakubaho, bakahungiza abahuuku baabo n'amatungo gaabo omu maju;" 
Exodus9:21 kwonka abatarakyetaireho baatsiga abahuuku baabo n'amatungo gaabo omu ishwa. 
Exodus9:22 Mpaho Mukama agira Musa ati: Imutsya omukono gwawe ogworekyeze eiguru. Habeho orubaare omu nsi ya Misiri yoona ruteere abantu n'enyamaishwa n'ebimezire omu ishwa byona omuri egyo nsi ya Misiri. 
Exodus9:23 Musa atyo aimutsya enkoni ye, agyorekyeza eiguru. Reero Nyakubaho ahindisa eiguru, ayohereza enkuba n'orubaare n'emirabyo biteera ensi. Nyakubaho agwisa orubaare omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Exodus9:24 Habaho orubaare n'emirabyo eguma neerurabizamu; ruba rwingi munonga orutakabahoga mu nsi ya Misiri yoona, yaaba kuba eihanga." 
Exodus9:25 Ruteera buri kintu ekiri omu ishwa omu nsi ya Misiri yoona, abantu n'enyamaishwa. Haza ruteera ekimezire kyona eky'omu ishwa, rusheenyagura emiti yaamwo yoona." 
Exodus9:26 Kureka ekyanga kya Gosheni eki Abaisiraeli baabaire barimu nikyo rutarateire. 
Exodus9:27 Bwanyima Faraaho atuma, beeta Musa na Arooni, abagira ati: Aha murundi ogu ncumwire. Nyakubaho ahikire; kwonka nyowe n'abantu bangye niitwe tushobize." 
Exodus9:28 Mweshengyereze Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba enkuba n'orubaare byatukabya. Mbwenu naaza kubareka mugyende, timwakiguma aha bundi." 
Exodus9:29 Musa amugarukamu ati: Ku ndaarugye nti omuri oru rurembo, niinyija kwimukiza Nyakubaho emikono, okuhinda kurekyere aho n'orubaare tirurikubaho bundi, obone kumanya ku egi nsi eri eye." 
Exodus9:30 Kwonka nimmanya ku iwe n'abaheereza baawe murikwija kuba mutakatiinire Mukama Ruhanga. 
Exodus9:31 Fulakisi na baale bikacwekyerezibwa; ahabw'okuba baale ekaba eri obushiisha; na fulakisi neerabya. 
Exodus9:32 Kwonka engano nyaiteeka n'engano ey'omu bibungo tibiracwekyereire, ahabw'okuba bigyenda ira kumera." 
Exodus9:33 Mpaho Musa aruga omuri orwo rurembo omu maisho ga Faraaho, aimukiza Nyakubaho emikono, okuhinda n'orubaare birekyera aho, n'enjura erereera kugwa obundi omu nsi." 
Exodus9:34 Kwonka Faraaho ku areeba enjura n'orubaare n'enkuba byarekyera aho, agaruka acumura; agangaaza omutima, we n'abairu be." 
Exodus9:35 Faraaho agangaaza atyo omutima, ayanga kureka Abaisiraeli kugyenda, nk'oku Mukama yaamugambiire naamutumaho Musa." 
Exodus10:1 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: Irooko oze owa Faraaho. Manya ngangaarize omutima gwe n'ogw'abairu be, ngu mbone kuboorekyeraho obumanyiso bwangye;" 
Exodus10:2 kandi naiwe obone kuteekyerereza batabani baawe na baijukuru baawe oku naahindwire Abanyamisiri abashema, n'oku naabakoreiremu obumanyiso, mubone kumanya ku Niinye Nyakubaho." 
Exodus10:3 Musa na Arooni batyo bagyenda, beetuurira Faraaho, bamugira bati: Mukama Ruhanga w'Abaheburaayo naagira ati: oryaherera hi n'okungomera? Reka abantu bangye bagyende bampeereze." 
Exodus10:4 Manya ku oraayangye kubareka bakagyenda, reeba nyencakare naaza kuteeza ensi yaawe enzigye," 
Exodus10:5 zigishwekye, omuntu abure ah'okureeba; zirye ebi mwatsigaize ebitaraitsirwe rubaare, zirye n'emiti yaanyu yoona ey'omu ishwa." 
Exodus10:6 Haza ziijurirane omu maju gaawe n'ag'abaheereza baawe n'ag'Abanyamisiri boona; zibe ezitakareebwaga baasho na baashwenkuru baaba kubaho omu nsi n'okuhitsya hati. Bwanyima Musa atyo akuba, aruga omu maisho ga Faraaho." 
Exodus10:7 Abaheereza ba Faraaho bamubuuza bati: Ogu mushaija aryaherera hi kutubeera ekiina ky'aha muryango? Reka abo bantu bagyende, baheereze Mukama Ruhanga waabo. Torikureeba ku Misiri ecwekyereire?" 
Exodus10:8 Musa na Arooni batyo bagarurwa owa Faraaho, nawe abagira ati: Mugyende muheereze Mukama Ruhanga waanyu. Kwonka shi abaraagyende ni baahi?" 
Exodus10:9 Musa amugarukamu ati: Nitwija kugyenda n'abaana baitu abato n'abantu baitu abakuru. Tugyende na batabani baitu na bahara baitu n'amasyo gaitu g'entaama n'ag'ente, ahabw'okuba nituragiirwa kugirira Nyakubaho obugyenyi." 
Exodus10:10 Faraaho nawe agira ati: Nyakubaho agume naimwe, kwonka nyowe tindikwija kubaikiriza mukagyenda n'abaana baanyu abato. Manya mwine enaama mbi." 
Exodus10:11 Ngaaha! Abashaija mube niimwe mwagyenda, muheereze Nyakubaho ahabw'okuba ekyo nikyo murikwenda. Batyo bababinga omu maisho ga Faraaho." 
Exodus10:12 Nyakubaho agambira Musa ati: Gororera ensi ya Misiri omukono, ogireetere enzigye, ziije zigiteere, zirye ekintu kyona ekigimeziremu eki orubaare rwatsigireho." 
Exodus10:13 Mpaho Musa agororera ensi ya Misiri enkoni ye. Nyakubaho areeta omuyaga gwa burugwa-izooba, guhuuha egyo nsi eizooba ryona n'ekiro kyona. Bukiza kuba omu kasheeshe, ogwo muyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba gushangwa gwareetsire enzigye." 
Exodus10:14 Ziteera ensi ya Misiri yoona, zigigumamu, ziri emizinga mingi munonga etakabahoga kandi etaribaho bundi." 
Exodus10:15 Manya zikahumbata ensi yoona, yaashwekwa omwirima. Reero zaarya ebimezire byamwo byona, n'ebijuma by'emiti byona ebyahonokire aha rubaare, tihaatsigaraho kintu na kimwe ekibisi, nobu yaakuba emiti nari ebimezire omu ishwa omuri egyo nsi ya Misiri." 
Exodus10:16 Bwanyima Faraaho yaayeta Musa na Arooni kwija ahonaaho. Haza yaabagira ati: Ncumwire ahari Mukama Ruhanga waanyu n'ahariimwe. 
Exodus10:17 N'ahabw'ekyo, mbwenu nimbeeshengyereza munsaasire ekicumuro kyangye omurundi ogu gwonka; kandi mweshengyereze Mukama Ruhanga waanyu anyiheho oru rufu." 
Exodus10:18 Mpaho Musa ashohora aruga omu maisho ga Faraaho ayeshengyereza Nyakubaho. 
Exodus10:19 Nyakubaho ahindura omuyaga, guba akasooroora karikuruga burugwa-izooba, gutuntumura enzigye, guzinaga omu Nyanja Erikutukura. Tihatsigara nzigye n'emwe omu nsi ya Misiri yoona." 
Exodus10:20 Kwonka Nyakubaho agangaaza omutima gwa Faraaho, ayanga kureka Abaisiraeli kugyenda." 
Exodus10:21 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: Imutsya omukono gwawe, ogworekyeize eiguru, habeho omwirima ndindindi gushwekye ensi ya Misiri." 
Exodus10:22 Musa nawe agorora omukono gwe agworekyeize eiguru, ensi ya Misiri yoona etimba omwirima ndindindi okumara ebiro bishatu." 
Exodus10:23 Abantu bamara ebiro bishatu batarikureebana, nobu kwakuba omuntu okuruga ah'ari. Kwonka ah'Abaisiraeli baabaire batwire haaguma nihahweza." 
Exodus10:24 Bwanyima Faraaho yaayeta Musa, yaamugira ati: Mugyende muheereze Nyakubaho. N'abaana baanyu bagyende naimwe, kwonka amasyo gaanyu g'entaama n'ag'ente gatsigare." 
Exodus10:25 Musa amugarukamu ati: Oshemereire kutureka tukatunga ebitambo n'ebicwetsyo, tukabona kubitambira Mukama Ruhanga waitu." 
Exodus10:26 Tushemereire kugyenda n'amatungo gaitu, tutatsigire nyima kintu kyona ekiine ekyara, ahabw'okuba nigo turikwihamu eby'okutoijera Mukama Ruhanga waitu. Kandi titurikumanya ebi turaakorese omu kumuramya, okuhitsya obu turaahikyeyo." 
Exodus10:27 Kwonka Nyakubaho yaagangaaza Faraaho omutima, yaayanga kubareka kugyenda." 
Exodus10:28 Faraaho yaagira Musa ati: Nduga omu maisho, kandi oyerinde. Otaringaruka omu maisho obundi; eizooba ri oringaruka omu maisho oryafa." 
Exodus10:29 Musa nawe amugarukamu ati: Nk'oku waagamba, naanye tindikugaruka mu maisho bundi." 
Exodus11:1 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: Nkitsigaizeyo ekibonabonese kimwe eki ndaateeze Faraaho na Misiri, akabona kubareka mukarugayo. Haza omu kubareka mukagyenda, aryababingira kimwe." 
Exodus11:2 Mbwenu gambira abantu, buri mushaija na buri mukazi ashabe mutaahi we amahunde g'efeeza n'ag'ezaabu." 
Exodus11:3 Mpaho Nyakubaho yaareetera Abanyamisiri kukorera abo bantu eby'embabazi. Kandi ekindi, Musa akaba ari omuntu mukuru rugambwa omu nsi ya Misiri, naamanywa abaheereza ba Faraaho n'abandi bantu." 
Exodus11:4 Na Musa nikwo kurangirira ati: Mukama naagira ati: Omu itumbi niinyija kuraba omu Banyamisiri," 
Exodus11:5 emijigaijo yoona ey'omu nsi ya Misiri efe, okwiha aha mujigaijo gwa Faraaho ori aha ngoma okuta aha mujigaijo gw'omuzaana orikusa aha rubengo, nteho n'emijigaijo yoona ey'amatungo." 
Exodus11:6 Haza habeho okucura omuri egyo nsi yoona okutakabahoga kandi okutaribaho. 
Exodus11:7 Kwonka omu Baisiraeli tiharigira muntu nari enyamaishwa ebyakankamira embwa; haza mubone kumanya ku Nyakubaho arikutaanisa Abanyamisiri n'Abaisiraeli. 
Exodus11:8 Obwo nibwo abairu baawe boona baraanyagire, bakajuumara omu maisho gangye nibaanyeshengyereza bati: Irooko ogyende n'abantu baawe boona abarikukukuratira. Haza ebyo ku biraahwe, ngyende." 
Exodus11:9 Bwanyima Mukama yaagira Musa ati: Faraaho tarikwija kubahurira, eby'okutangaaza byangye bibone kukanya omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Exodus11:10 Musa na Arooni bakakora eby'okutangaaza ebyo byona omu maisho ga Faraaho, kwonka Nyakubaho yaagangaaza Faraaho omutima, tiyaareka Baisiraeli kuruga omu nsi ye." 
Exodus12:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa na Arooni omu nsi ya Misiri ati: 
Exodus12:2 Okwezi oku nikwija kubabeera okw'okubanza omu gandi meezi. Kuryaguma kubabeere okw'okubanza omu mwaka. 
Exodus12:3 Mbwenu gambira omutwe gwona ogw'Abaisiraeli oti: Aha kiro kya ikumi eky'omu kwezi, buri muntu ayereetere omwana gw'entaama nk'oku emiryango ya baishebo eri; buri ka omwana gw'entaama gumwe." 
Exodus12:4 Ab'omuri egyo ka ku baraabe bari bakye, batarikuhezaho omwana gw'entaama, buri muntu agukwatane na mutaahi we ohereraine nawe, nk'omubaro gw'abantu oku guri, nimubariirira omwana gw'entaama nk'okurya kwa buri muntu oku kuri." 
Exodus12:5 Ogwo mwana gwanyu gw'entaama gube ogutaine kamogo, guri empaya y'omwaka gumwe; nimugwiha omu ntaama nari omu mbuzi." 
Exodus12:6 Kandi mugurinde okuhitsya aha kiro kya ikumi na bina eky'oku kwezi, eki oruteerane rwona orw'omutwe gw'Abaisiraeli ruraitireho omu mwabazyo abaana baarwo b'entaama." 
Exodus12:7 Bwanyima baiheho eshagama bagisiigye aha nti z'emiryango zombi n'aha bisasi by'amaju agu baraariiremu. 
Exodus12:8 Ekyo kiro barye enyama yaagwo eyokize, nibagiriisa emigaati etatumbisiibwe n'emboga zirikushaarira." 
Exodus12:9 Mutagirya eri mbisi, nari eteekirwe n'amaizi, kureka eyokize embumburi n'omutwe gwayo n'ebivune byayo n'eby'omunda byayo." 
Exodus12:10 Kandi mutagira ei mwatsigaho okuhitsya omu kasheeshe. Eraatsigareho okuhitsya omu kasheeshe mugihehemberere. 
Exodus12:11 Oku nikwo muraagirye: Mube mwezirikire, enkaito ziri omu bigyere, enkoni zaanyu ziri omu ngaro, kandi mugirye n'obwira. Obwo nibwo bugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho Mukama." 
Exodus12:12 Manya ekyo kiro niinyija kuraba omu nsi ya Misiri, nyite emijigaijo yaamwo yoona ey'abantu n'ey'amatungo, kandi nfubire emandwa za Misiri zoona, Nyowe Nyakubaho." 
Exodus12:13 Egyo shagama niyo eraabe akamanyiso k'okworeka amaju gu murimu. Kandi ku ndaagireebe, niinyija kubahingura, habure orufu rwabahikaho ku ndaabe nincwekyereza ensi ya Misiri." 
Exodus12:14 Eryo izooba muryaguma muriijukye, murikorereho omugyenzo gw'obugyenyi bw'okuhimbisizaho Nyakubaho. Muryaguma muririnde riri ekiragiro ky'ebiro byona omu busingye bwanyu bwona." 
Exodus12:15 Muryamara ebiro mushanju nimurya emigaati etatumbisiibwe. Aha kiro ky'okubanza muryaiha ekitumbisa omu maju gaanyu. Manya okwiha aha kiro ky'okubanza okuhitsya aha kya mushanju, ku harigira owaarya omugaati gutumbisiibwe, ogwo muntu aryacuubwa omuri Isiraeli." 
Exodus12:16 Aha kiro ky'okubanza muryagira oruteerane rurikwera, n'aha kiro kya mushanju nabwo murugire. Omuri ebyo biro hatarigira omurimo gwakorwa, kureka ebi buri muntu ashemereire kurya nibyo murishemeza byonka." 
Exodus12:17 Kandi muryaguma murinde Obugyenyi bw'emigaati etatumbisiibwe, ahabw'okuba ahari eryo izooba nibwo naiha ebimbuuro byanyu omu nsi ya Misiri. N'ahabw'ekyo muryaguma mukore omugyenzo gw'ekyo kiro guri ekiragiro ky'ebiro byona omu busingye bwanyu bwona," 
Exodus12:18 Omu kwezi kw'okubanza aha kiro kya ikumi na bina eky'okwo kwezi omu mwabazyo, muryarya emigaati etatumbisiibwe, kandi mugumizemu mutyo okuhitsya aha kiro kya makumi abiri na kimwe eky'okwo kwezi omu mwabazyo." 
Exodus12:19 Hatarigira ekitumbisa kyashangwa omu maju gaanyu omuri ebyo biro mushanju; ahabw'okuba ku harigira owaarya ekitumbisiibwe aryacuubwa omu ihanga ry'Abaisiraeli, yaaba ari omunyaihanga obashuuhuukiiremu, nari omuzaarwa waamwo." 
Exodus12:20 Mutarirya ekitumbisiibwe kyona; kureka omu maka gaanyu goona murye emigaati etatumbisiibwe. 
Exodus12:21 Bwanyima Musa akeeta abakuru b'omu Baisiraeli boona, yaabagira ati: Mwetooranire abaana b'entaama nk'oku emiryango yaanyu eri; haza mwite omwana gw'entaama ogw'Okuhingurwaho." 
Exodus12:22 Mukwate omushamato gw'enyaweera, mugujabikye omu shagama eri omu rwabya, egyo shagama mugisiigye aha bisasi n'aha nti z'emiryango; kandi hatagira omuriimwe owaashohora kuruga omu nju ye butakaseesire." 
Exodus12:23 Manya Mukama naija kurabaho kwita Abanyamisiri. Ku araareebe eshagama aha kisasi n'aha nti z'emiryango naija kuhingura ogwo muryango, tarikwija kwikiriza omucwekyerezi kutaaha omu maju gaanyu kubaita." 
Exodus12:24 Muryaguma murinde ogwo mugyenzo, gube ekiragiro ekibateereirweho imwe n'abaana baanyu ebiro byona." 
Exodus12:25 Kandi ku murihika omu nsi ei Nyakubaho aribaha nk'oku yaaraganiise, muryaguma mukore ogwo mugyenzo." 
Exodus12:26 Haza abaana baanyu ku baribabuuza bati: Ogu mugyenzo gu murikukora nigumanyisa ki? 
Exodus12:27 Mubagire muti: N'ekitambo ky'okwijuka Okuhingura kwa Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba akahingura amaju g'Abaisiraeli omuri Misiri obu yaita Abanyamisiri akasaasira amaju gaitu; abantu bakainika emitwe yaabo bakaramya." 
Exodus12:28 Mpaho Abaisiraeli bagyenda bakora batyo, kandi batwaza nk'oku Mukama yaaragiire Musa na Arooni." 
Exodus12:29 Omu itumbi Nyakubaho akaita emijigaijo yoona ey'omu nsi ya Misiri okwiha aha mujigaijo gwa Faraaho, owaabaire ari aha ngoma, okuta aha mujigaijo gw'enkwatwa eyaabaire eri omu kihome, kandi n'emijigaijo yoona ey'amatungo." 
Exodus12:30 Reero Faraaho yaimuka omuri ekyo kiro, we n'abaaheereza be boona n'Abanyamisiri boona. Haabaho okucura kuhango omuri Misiri ahabw'okuba tiharabaireho nju n'emwe etarafiirwemu muntu." 
Exodus12:31 Atyo atuma, beeta Musa na Arooni nyekiro. Ku baija abagira ati: Nimwimukye, mundugire omu bantu, imwe n'Abaisiraeli mugyende muhereeze Nyakubaho nk'oku mwagambire." 
Exodus12:32 Mutware amasyo gaanyu g'ente n'ag'entaama, nk'oku mwagambire, haza mugyende kandi naanye munshabire emigisha." 
Exodus12:33 Abanyamisiri barigitirira abo bantu kubarugira omu nsi ahonaaho, ahabw'okuba bakagira bati: Twena nitwija kufa tuhweho." 
Exodus12:34 Abo bantu nikwo kutwara eisyanga ryabo eritakatumbisiibwe, bakatwara n'enyungu zaabo ezigoya bazishembire omu minagiro yaabo, bakazeekorera aha mabega." 
Exodus12:35 Kandi abo Baisiraeli bakaba baakozire nk'oku Musa yaabagambiire; ahabw'okuba bakaba baashabire Abanyamisiri amahunde g'efeeza n'ag'ezaabu n'ebijwaro. 
Exodus12:36 Na Nyakubaho yaareetera abo bantu kugirirwa Abanyamisiri embabazi, baikiriza kubaha ebi baabashabire. Baanyaga batyo Abanyamisiri." 
Exodus12:37 Mpaho Abaisiraeli abashaija obusiriira nka mukaaga, otabariiremu bakazi n'abaana, baimutsya orugyendo baaruga Rameseesi, baahika Sukooti." 
Exodus12:38 N'ebindi bimbuuro by'ebijwangi byagyenda nabo, n'amatungo maingi munonga ag'ente n'ag'entaama." 
Exodus12:39 Kandi baateeka emigaati etatumbisiibwe ey'eisyanga ri baihire Misiri. Manya rikaba ritatumbisiibwe ahabw'okuba bakabingwa omuri Misiri buguru butakora ha nsi, tibaabaasa kwetwara, nobu kwakuba okwekomera entanda." 
Exodus12:40 Obunaku bu Abaisiraeli baatwire omuri Misiri bukahika emyaka magana ana na makumi ashatu. 
Exodus12:41 Reero aha muheru gw'egyo myaka magana ana na makumi ashatu, buzimazima ekyo kiro, ebimbuuro bya Nyakubaho byona byaruga omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Exodus12:42 Ekyo kiro Nyakubaho akaraaza enyonyoozi aha riisho, arinzire abantu be kubaiha omu nsi ya Misiri. N'ahabw'ekyo ekyo kiro, Abaisiraeli boona, omu busingye bwabo bwona, nikyo baijukiraho oku Nyakubaho yaaraarize enyonyoozi aha riisho arinzire." 
Exodus12:43 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Musa na Arooni ati: Eki nikyo kiragiro ky'Okuhingurwaho. Hatarigira munyamahanga owaarya aha by'obugyenyi bwakyo. 
Exodus12:44 Kwonka omuhuuku weena owaaguzirwe empiiha, naikirizibwa kuburyaho mwaherize kumushara." 
Exodus12:45 Hatarigira omushuuhuuki nari omuntu orikukorera ebihembo owaikirizibwa kuburyaho. 
Exodus12:46 Buryaguma buriirwe omu nju emwe. Mutarishohoza enyama yaabwo aheeru y'egyo nju. Kandi mutarihenda eigufa ry'embaagwa yaabwo. 
Exodus12:47 Eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli ryona riryakora omugyenzo gwabwo. 
Exodus12:48 Reero omunyaihanga obashuuhuukiiremu ku aryenda kukora omugyenzo gw'Okuhingurwaho ngu abone kuha Nyakubaho ekitiinwa, abantu be boona abashaija basharwe, mpaho abone kubutaaha. Obwo nibwo aritwazibwa nk'enzaarwa y'omu Baisiraeli. Kwonka otashazirwe weena tariikirizibwa kuburyaho." 
Exodus12:49 Enzaarwa n'omunyamahanga obashuuhuukiiremu baryategyekwa eiteeka rimwe. 
Exodus12:50 Abaisiraeli boona nikwo baakozire, baatwaza nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa na Arooni." 
Exodus12:51 Kandi buzimazima ekyo kiro, Nyakubaho yaiha Abaisiraeli omu nsi ya Misiri bari amahe n'amahe." 
Exodus13:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus13:2 Mumpongyere emijigaijo yoona. Ekiigura-nda kyona eky'omu Baisiraeli, yaaba muntu nari enyamaishwa, n'ekyangye." 
Exodus13:3 Musa yaagambira abantu ati: Mugume mwijukye ekiro ki mwarugiiremu Misiri, ei mwatwire muri abahuuku. Manya Nyakubaho akabaihisayo omukono gwe ogw'amaani. N'ahabw'ekyo hatarigira owaarya omugaati gutumbisiibwe." 
Exodus13:4 Eki kiro ky'okwezi Abibu nikyo mwaza kurugiramu Misiri. 
Exodus13:5 Haza Nyakubaho ku aribahitsya omu nsi y'Abanyakanaani n'Abahiiti n'Abaamori n'Abahiivi n'Abayebusi, ei yaarahiire kugibaha, ensi erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki, mugume mukore ogu mugyenzo omuri oku kwezi." 
Exodus13:6 Muryaguma mumare ebiro mushanju nimurya emigaati etatumbisiibwe; kandi aha kiro kya mushanju habeho obugyenyi bw'okusingiza Nyakubaho. 
Exodus13:7 Emigaati etatumbisiibwe niyo eririibwa omuri ebyo biro mushanju. Omuriimwe hatarizookamu omugaati gutumbisiibwe, nobu kwakuba okushangwa mwine ekitumbisa omu nsi yaanyu yoona." 
Exodus13:8 Kandi eryo izooba oryagambira mutabani waawe oti: Eki nikimanyisa eki Nyakubaho yankoreire ninduga Misiri. 
Exodus13:9 Ogwo mugyenzo guryababeera nk'akamanyiso k'aha mukono, nari ekiijutsyo ky'aha buso, ngu eiteeka rya Mukama rirekye kukuruga aha rurimi; ahabw'okuba akakwiha Misiri n'omukono gwe ogw'amaani." 
Exodus13:10 N'ahabw'ekyo oryaguma ohitsye ekiragiro ky'ogu mugyenzo buri mwaka omu bunaku bwagwo obwatairweho. 
Exodus13:11 Mbwenu Nyakubaho ku aribahitsya omu nsi y'Abanyakanaani, nk'oku yaabarahiire imwe na baashwenkuriimwe, yaabaha egyo nsi," 
Exodus13:12 muryamuhongyera ebiigura-nda byona. Emijigaijo y'amatungo gaanyu emishaija yoona eryaba eye. 
Exodus13:13 Omujigaijo gwona ogw'endogoya muryagucunguza omwana gw'entaama; nari ku muriba mutagucungwire muguhende ebitsya. Omujigaijo gwona ogw'omuntu ogw'omuri batabani baanyu muryagucungura. 
Exodus13:14 Kandi omu biro ebiriija, mutabani waawe ku arikubuuza ati: Ogu mugyenzo nigumanyisa ki? Omugire oti: Nyakubaho akatwiha Misiri n'omukono gwe ogw'amaani, ei twatwire turi abahuuku." 
Exodus13:15 Manya Faraaho ku yaagangaire yaayanga kutureka tukagyenda, Nyakubaho yaita emijigaijo yoona ey'omu nsi ya Misiri, ey'abantu n'ey'amatungo. Nikyo ndikutambirira Nyakubaho ebiigura-nda byona ebishaija; reero batabani bangye boona emijigaijo nkabacungura." 
Exodus13:16 Ogwo mugyenzo guryababeera nk'akamanyiso k'aha mukono nari k'aha buso, gubaijutsye oku Nyakubaho yaatwihire Misiri n'omukono gwe ogw'amaani." 
Exodus13:17 Faraaho ku yaikiriize abo bantu kugyenda, Ruhanga tarabarabize muhanda gurikuza omu nsi y'Abafilisiti, nobu guraabe gwabaire nigucwekanisa, ahabw'okuba akagira ati: Abo bantu batakaabuganayo ab'okubarwanisa, bakeefuuza bakagarukayo Misiri." 
Exodus13:18 Kureka Ruhanga akeekiikuuza abo bantu, naabarabya ogw'omu ihamba ogurikuza aha Nyanja Erikutukura. Kandi Abaisiraeli abo bakaruga omu nsi ya Misiri bahagatiire eby'orugamba." 
Exodus13:19 Na Musa yaatwara amagufa ga Yosefu, ahabw'okuba Yosefu akaba arahiize Abaisiraeli naabagira ati: Buzimazima Ruhanga aryaija kubashuura. Haza obunaku ku burihika, mwaba nimuruga egi, mutware amagufa gangye." 
Exodus13:20 Batyo baimutsya orugyendo baaruga Sukooti, baasiisira Etamu aha munwa gw'eihamba." 
Exodus13:21 Reero Nyakubaho yaagyenda abeebembeire, nyomushana ari omu nyomyo y'ekicu kubahabura omuhanda, na nyekiro ari omu nyomyo y'omuriro kubahwezesa, ngu babaase kugyenda nyomushana na nyekiro," 
Exodus13:22 obwo enyomyo y'ekicu nyomushana kandi ey'omuriro nyekiro etabarugire omu maisho. 
Exodus14:1 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus14:2 Gambira Abaisiraeli bagarukye enyima, basiisire omu maisho ga Pihahirooti, ahagati ya Migidooli n'Enyanja, aharikureebana na Baalizefooni; kandi musiisire aha rubaju rw'enyanja ahashungaine naho." 
Exodus14:3 Manya Faraaho naija kugamba aha Baisiraeli ati: Bakubakubiirwe omu nsi, eihamba ribaturukire oku n'oku." 
Exodus14:4 Reero niinyija kugangaaza Faraaho omutima abakurate ababingire, naanye nyetungire ekitiinisa ahari uwe n'amahe ge goona, haza Abanyamisiri bamanye ku Niinye Nyakubaho. Abaisiraeli baakora batyo." 
Exodus14:5 Omugabe wa Misiri ku baamugambiire ku abo bantu bacwire, uwe n'abakungu be baateekateeka okundi ahari abo bantu. Baagira bati: Mbwenu tukozire ki okwikiriza Abaisiraeli kugyenda bakareka kutuheereza?" 
Exodus14:6 Atyo atebeekanisa ekigaari kye eky'okurwanisa, agyenda n'eihe rye," 
Exodus14:7 atwara ebigaari magana mukaaga by'okurwanisa n'ebindi bigaari bya Misiri byona, biine bakuru baabyo." 
Exodus14:8 Mukama agangaaza atyo omutima gwa Faraaho omugabe wa Misiri, akurata Abaisiraeli abaagyenzire nibeekiita." 
Exodus14:9 Abanyamisiri batyo bababinga baine embaraasi za Faraaho zoona n'ebigaari n'abantu be barikurwanira aha mbaraasi, n'eihe rye, babahambya basiisiire aha nyanja haihi na Pihahirooti ahashungaine na Baalizefooni." 
Exodus14:10 Faraaho ku yaahikire haihi, Abaisiraeli baanaga amaisho baareeba Abanyamisiri babakuratiire, baatiina munonga, baatakira Nyakubaho." 
Exodus14:11 Baagambira Musa bati: Beitu waatureeta ngu tugwe omuri eri ihamba ngu ahabw'okuba ebituuro bibuzire omuri Misiri? Mbwenu otugiriire biiha okutwihayo? 
Exodus14:12 Ekyo tikyo twakugambiriireyo, tuti: Turekye, tuheereze Abanyamisiri? Manya embu y'okugwa omu ihamba, haakiri tubakorera!" 
Exodus14:13 Musa agira abo bantu ati: Mutatiina, muhame, haza mureebe eki Mukama araakore kubajuna eri izooba. Manya Abanyamisiri bu murikureeba eri izooba, timuribareeba bundi." 
Exodus14:14 Nyakubaho naija kubarwanirira, kwonka imwe ekyanyu n'okuhama." 
Exodus14:15 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: Ahabw'enki nontakira? Gambira Abaisiraeli bagumizemu bagyende. 
Exodus14:16 Mbwenu imutsya enkoni yaawe, ogorore omukono gwawe aha nyanja ogibaganise, Abaisiraeli babone kugyambuka nibaraba ahoomire." 
Exodus14:17 Naanye niinyija kugangaaza emitima y'Abanyamisiri, baragaremu babakuratiire, haza nyetungire ekitiinisa ahari Faraaho n'eihe rye ryona, n'ebigaari bye, n'abantu be ab'aha mbaraasi." 
Exodus14:18 Mpaho Abanyamisiri bamanye ku Niinye Nyakubaho, naaheza kwetungira ekitiinisa ahari Faraaho, n'ebigaari bye, n'aha bantu be ab'aha mbaraasi." 
Exodus14:19 Bwanyima Maraika wa Ruhanga, owaabaire ayebembeire eihe ry'Abaisiraeli atyo akuba, aza enyima yaabo; n'enyomyo y'ekicu nayo ebaruga omu maisho ebagaruka enyima," 
Exodus14:20 eza ahagati y'eihe rya Misiri n'erya Isiraeli. Kityo ekicu kireeta omwirima aha rubaju orumwe, n'okumurikirwa aha rubaju orundi. Burugaho busheesha hatariho ihe rihikaine na rigyenzi ryaryo ekyo kiro." 
Exodus14:21 Reero Musa agorora omukono gwe aha nyanja, na Nyakubaho agicungiza omuyaga gw'amaani ogwa burugwa-izooba, agyomya, amaizi geebaganisamu, haba eitaka ryomire." 
Exodus14:22 Abaisiraeli baragara ahagati y'egyo nyanja nibaraba aha itaka ryomire, obwo amaizi gari ekisiika aha rubaju rwabo rwa buryo n'aha rwa bumosho." 
Exodus14:23 Haza Abanyamisiri baija bababingire, bahika ahagati y'egyo nyanja babakuratiire, baine embaraasi za Faraaho zoona, n'ebigaari bye, n'abashaija be ab'aha mbaraasi." 
Exodus14:24 Omushekye gutakajugutsire, ahu abarinzi barikuhereeruka batandikira, Nyakubaho ayema omu nyomyo y'omuriro n'ey'ekicu, areeba eihe ry'Abanyamisiri arirabanisamu." 
Exodus14:25 Ashaayisa enyamuziga z'ebigaari byabo, bigira eikurura. Abanyamisiri nikwo kugira bati: Ka tuhungye Abaisiraeli, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akwataniise nabo kutukombeera." 
Exodus14:26 Bwanyima Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: Gorora omukono gwawe aha nyanja, amaizi gaayo gabone kugaruka, gashwekye Abanyamisiri n'ebigaari byabo n'abashaija baabo ab'aha mbaraasi." 
Exodus14:27 Musa atyo agororera egyo nyanja omukono, egaruka aha buteeka bwayo obwire nibutaagurikana. Abanyamisiri omu kuhunga babugabugana nayo, Mukama agibahwerekyererezamu." 
Exodus14:28 Amaizi gagaruka, gamira ebyo bigaari, n'ab'aha mbaraasi, n'eihe rya Faraaho ryona eryabaire ribakuratiire omuri egyo nyanja; tihagira n'omwe omuribo owaatsigaraho." 
Exodus14:29 Abaisiraeli bo baraba omu nyanja nibaribata aha itaka ryomire, n'amaizi gababeera ekisiika aha rubaju rwabo orwa buryo n'orwa bumosho." 
Exodus14:30 Mukama eryo izooba nikwo yaajunire atyo Abaisiraeli, akabaiha omu mikono y'Abanyamisiri; Abaisiraeli nabo bakareeba emitumbi y'Abanyamisiri erambiriraine aha mwegyeego gw'enyanja." 
Exodus14:31 Abaisiraeli ku baareebire ekikoro ky'amaani eki Nyakubaho yaakozire Abanyamisiri, baamutiina kandi baamwikiriza hamwe n'omugaragwa we Musa." 
Exodus15:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire Musa n'Abaisiraeli baayeshongorera Nyakubaho ekyeshongoro eki, nibagira bati: Ka nyeshongorere Nyakubaho ahabw'okuba asingwire n'ekitiinisa; embaraasi n'ogitembire yaabinaga omu nyanja." 
Exodus15:2 Nyakubaho niwe maani gangye kandi obuhungiro bwangye, ahabw'okuba niwe anjunire. Ogwo niwe Ruhanga wangye, ou ndaagume ninkugisiriza." 
Exodus15:3 Nyakubaho n'emanzi omu rugamba; Nyakubaho niryo iziina rye. 
Exodus15:4 Ebigaari bya Faraaho n'eihe rye akabinaga omu nyanja. Abakuru b'amahe ge entoore yaabarohamya omu Nyanja Erikutukura. 
Exodus15:5 Engyezi ekabamira, baatobera okuzimu nk'eibaare." 
Exodus15:6 Ai Nyakubaho, enkubito y'omukono gwawe gwa buryo neetiinisa! ahabw'okuba gusheenyagura abazigu!" 
Exodus15:7 Omu businguzi bwawe obw'amaani oikarira ababisha baawe. Ku obooherereza ekiniga kyawe kibamaraho nk'oku omuriro gwokyeza kimwe obunyaatsi. 
Exodus15:8 Ku waikiize oti omu nyindo, amaizi gaatuumeera; emyegyemure yaayerunda omutuumo, okuzimu aha nsi y'enyanja haaguma." 
Exodus15:9 Ogwo muzigu ku yaagizire ati: Niinyija kubakurata mbabingire, mbahambye, mbagane eminyago, mbeemarireho ak'aha mutima, nsyoreyo rurara yangye, haza omukono gwangye gubacwekyereze." 
Exodus15:10 Kwonka iwe okahuuhisa omuyaga, enyanja yaabamira. Baamirwa nka risasi egwire omu maizi garikutiinisa." 
Exodus15:11 Ai Nyakubaho, mbwenu omuri baaruhanga, orikushushana naiwe n'oha? N'oha ori nkaiwe, ou oburikwera bwe burikurangaanwa, orikukora ebirikutangaaza n'eby'amaani ebirikutiinisa?" 
Exodus15:12 Manya ku waagoroire omukono gwawe gwa buryo, ensi yaabamira." 
Exodus15:13 Abantu bu waacungwire, okabeebembera obainiire rukundo etahararuka. Ahabw'amaani gaawe waabahabura omuhanda oguraabahitsye omu mwanya gwawe ogurikwera." 
Exodus15:14 Amahanga gaakihurira, gaatetema. Abatwire Filisitiya baagira obujune." 
Exodus15:15 Mbwenu abatware ba Edomu bahahaire, abakuru ba Moabu bakwatsirwe orutetema, n'abatwire Kanaani emitima ebahwaire omu nda." 
Exodus15:16 Baitsirwe obwoba n'okutiina ahabw'enkubito y'omukono gwawe, baaguma batarikwehiga bari nk'eibaare; okuhitsya obu abantu baawe, ai Nyakubaho, baraahingure, okuhitsya obu abo bantu baawe ahabwawe baraarabeho." 
Exodus15:17 Oryabahitsya omuri egyo nsi, obatuuze aha rushozi rwawe orurikwera, omwanya, ai Nyakubaho, ogu waayeteereireho kuba obutaaho bwawe, omwanya ogurikwera, ogu Iwe Nyakubaho waahamize n'emikono yaawe." 
Exodus15:18 Nyakubaho aryaguma ari Omugabe ebiro byona. 
Exodus15:19 Manya embaraasi za Faraaho ku zaagiire omu nyanja hamwe n'ebigaari bye, n'engabo ze ez'aha mbaraasi, Nyakubaho yaagaruraho amaizi gaabishweka. Kwonka Abaisiraeli bo baaraba omu nyanja, nibaribata aha itaka ryomire." 
Exodus15:20 Reero Miriyamu omurangikazi, munyaanya wa Arooni, yaakwata enshandaazo, n'abakazi boona baagyenda bamukuratiire nibagurukyeera." 
Exodus15:21 Mpaho Miriyamu yaabeeshongorera nibamwakiira ati: Mweshongorere Nyakubaho ahabw'okuba asingwire n'ekitiinisa, embaraasi n'ogitembire yaabinaga omu nyanja." 
Exodus15:22 Bwanyima Musa akeebembera Abaisiraeli, baaruga aha Nyanja Erikutukura, baagumizamu baahika omu ihamba rya Shuuri. Baamara ebiro bishatu omuri eryo ihamba nibagyenda baburiirwe amaizi." 
Exodus15:23 Ku baahikire Maara baaremwa kunywa amaizi gaayo, ahabw'okuba gakaba nigashaarira. Nikyo ogwo mwanya gwayeteirwe Maara." 
Exodus15:24 Abo bantu baayetomboitera Musa nibamugira bati: Mbwenu tunywe ki? 
Exodus15:25 Nawe yaatakira Nyakubaho, Nyakubaho yaamworeka ekiti. Onu yaakinaga omuri ago maizi, gaanura. Okwo niyo Mukama yaabaheereire ekiragiro, n'okubahabura oku baraatwaze. Kandi okwo niyo yaabagyereize," 
Exodus15:26 akabagira ati: Ku murita omutima aha bi Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga waanyu ndikubagambira, mwakora ebihikire omu maisho gangye, mwata omutima aha biragiro byangye, kandi mwarinda byona ebi naataireho, tindibateeza bibonaboneso nk'ebi naateerize Abanyamisiri, ahabw'okuba Niinye Nyakubaho obakiza." 
Exodus15:27 Bwanyima baahika Elimu, ahu enshuro z'amaizi ikumi na ibiri n'emikindo makumi mushanju byabaire biri, baasiisira aha rubaju rw'ago maizi." 
Exodus16:1 Eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli ryona rikaimutsya orugyendo niriruga Elimu, ryahika omu ihamba rya Siini, eriri ahagati ya Elimu na Sinaayi, aha kiro kya ikumi na bitaano eky'okwezi kwa kabiri barugire omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Exodus16:2 Omutwe gwona ogw'Abaisiraeli gwayetomboitera Musa na Arooni omu ihamba. 
Exodus16:3 Baabagira bati: Nangwa Nyakubaho kuri yaatwitsize omukono gwe tukiri omu nsi ya Misiri, obu twabaire tushutama aha rubaju rw'enyungu z'enyama, tukarya emigaati tukahaaga! Mbwenu reeba imwe mutwihireyo mwatureeta omuri eri ihamba kwitsizamu eihanga ryona enjara." 
Exodus16:4 Nyakubaho nikwo kugambira Musa ati: Reeba niinyija kubagwisiza ebyokurya nk'enjura, birugye omu iguru. Buri izooba abantu bashohore batorotoore egabo yaabo eya buri izooba, mbone kuhamya yaaba nibaija kworobera eiteeka ryangye, nari batarikuryorobera." 
Exodus16:5 Ahari buri kiro kya mukaaga, ku baraatebeekanise eby'okutwara omuka, bingane kabiri n'ebi batorotoora buri izooba." 
Exodus16:6 Musa na Arooni nabo baagambira Abaisiraeli boona bati: Omu mwabazyo nibwo muraamanye ku Nyakubaho niwe yaabaihire omu nsi ya Misiri. 
Exodus16:7 Kandi omu kasheeshe nimwija kureeba ekitiinwa kye, ahabw'okuba ahuriire oku murikumwetomboitera. Mbwenu shi, niitwe baahi abu murikwetomboitera?" 
Exodus16:8 Musa ayongyera abagira ati: Omu mwabazyo Nyakubaho ku araabahe enyama y'okurya n'omu kasheeshe yaabaha emigaati mwahaaga, biri ahuriire oku murikumwetomboitera. Mbwenu shi itwe niitwe baahi? Tiitwe murikwetomboitera, kureka nimwetomboitera Nyakubaho." 
Exodus16:9 Mpaho Musa agambira Arooni ati: Gambira omutwe gw'Abaisiraeli gwona oti: Mwirire haihi omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba ahuriire ebi murikwetomboita." 
Exodus16:10 Reero Arooni ku yaabaire naakigambira omutwe gw'Abaisiraeli gwona, baanaga amaisho omu ihamba, baareeba ekitiinwa kya Nyakubaho nikireebekyera omu kicu." 
Exodus16:11 Nyakubaho agambira Musa ati: 
Exodus16:12 Mpuriire ebi Abaisiraeli barikwetomboita. Mbwenu obagambire oti: Omu mwabazyo nimwija kurya enyama, kandi omu kasheeshe mutungye emigaati erikubahaazya; haza mumanye ku ndi Nyakubaho Ruhanga waanyu." 
Exodus16:13 Omwabazyo ku gwakiikire, haija entiitiri, zaashweka orusiisira. Kandi omu kasheeshe orume rukwaitse rwashandaara aha nsi, rwehinguririize orusiisira." 
Exodus16:14 Orume ku rwakyeire omuri eryo ihamba, haareebekamu otuntu turungi twekuringiriire, twemi nk'amatondo g'omurombe agaragaire aha itaka." 
Exodus16:15 Abaisiraeli ku baarureebire baabuuzana bati: Beitu ekyo ni ki? Ahabw'okuba bakaba batarikukimanya. Musa abagira ati: N'ebyokurya bi Nyakubaho yaabaha kurya. 
Exodus16:16 Mbwenu eki nikyo Nyakubaho yaaragiira: Mubitorotoore nk'oku buri omwe omuriimwe arikubaasa kurya akaiguta. Buri muntu atware encuro nk'oku abantu b'omu ihema rya buri omwe omuriimwe barikwingana. 
Exodus16:17 Abaisiraeli baakora batyo; abamwe baatorotoora bingi, abandi baatorotoora bikye." 
Exodus16:18 Kwonka ku baabirengire omu ncuro, owaashanguriize bingi taine ki yaashaagizeho, n'owaashanguriize bikye taine ki yaakyenire; buri omwe akashanguriza nk'oku arikubaasa kurya." 
Exodus16:19 Reero Musa abagira ati: Hatagira omuntu owaagira ebi yaaraaza obuhoro, okuhitsya omu kasheeshe." 
Exodus16:20 Kwonka bo tibaahurira ebi Musa yaabaragiire. Abamwe baagira ebi baatsigaho, okuhitsya omu kasheeshe, haza byagiibwamu enyogori, byanuuka, na Musa nikwo kubagwerwa kubi." 
Exodus16:21 Buri kasheeshe baaguma nibabishanguriza, buri omwe nk'oku arikubaasa kurya, kwonka omushana gukyotsya, biyaga." 
Exodus16:22 Aha kiro kya mukaaga bakatorotoora ebyokurya birikwingana na biri kabiri, buri muntu endengo ibiri. Abakuru b'eihanga ku baateeraine, baabigambira Musa." 
Exodus16:23 Nawe yaabagira ati: Eki nikyo Mukama yaaragiira: Nyencakare n'eizooba ry'okuhuumurira kimwe; ni Sabato erikwera ahari Nyakubaho. Mukore ebi murikwenda kukora, muteekye ebi murikwenda kuteeka; ebiraatsigareho mubiiheho, mubibiikye okuhitsya omu kasheeshe." 
Exodus16:24 Nabo batyo baabibiika okuhitsya omu kasheeshe, nk'oku Musa yaabaragiira, haza tibijunda kandi tibigiibwamu nyogori." 
Exodus16:25 Musa abagira ati: Hati mubirye, ahabw'okuba eri izooba ni Sabato ya Nyakubaho. Eri izooba emaanu timurikwija kugishanga mu ishwa." 
Exodus16:26 Muryaguma mugitorotoorere omu biro mukaaga, kwonka aha kya mushanju, niyo Sabato, emaanu teribaho." 
Exodus16:27 Aha kiro kya mushanju bamwe omuri abo bantu ku baashohoire kugitorotoora tibaagibona. 
Exodus16:28 Nyakubaho nikwo kugambira Musa ati: Muryahitsya hi okwanga kworobera ebiragiro byangye n'amateeka gangye? 
Exodus16:29 Reeba mbwenu Nyakubaho abahaire Sabato. Nikyo aha kiro kya mukaaga arikubaheera ebyokurya by'okumara ebiro bibiri. N'ahabw'ekyo buri muntu omuriimwe agume omu mwanya gwe, hatagira owaashohora kugurugamu aha kiro kya mushanju." 
Exodus16:30 Abantu nabo nikwo kuhuumura aha kiro kya mushanju. 
Exodus16:31 Mbwenu ebyo byokurya Abaisiraeli bakabyeta emaanu. Bikaba nibishusha nk'entobo, nibyera kandi nibinura nk'otugaati otuteekireinwemu obwoki." 
Exodus16:32 Musa atyo abagira ati: Eki nikyo Nyakubaho aragiire. Mwiheho encuro yaabyo emwe, mugume mugibiikire omu busingye bwanyu bwona, baijukuru baanyu babone kumanya ebyokurya bi naabariisiize omu ihamba, obu naabaiha omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Exodus16:33 Musa agira Arooni ati: Gira akanyungu, okatemu encuro y'emaanu, okate omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, kuguma kabiikiirwe baijukuru baanyu ab'obusingye oburiija." 
Exodus16:34 Arooni nawe akata omu maisho g'Eshanduukye y'Endagaano kurindirwayo, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa." 
Exodus16:35 Abaisiraeli bakamara emyaka makumi ana nibarya emaanu, baarugaho baahika omu nsi etwirwemu abantu; baagumizamu nibagirya, okuhitsya obu baahikire aha mwatano gw'ensi ya Kanaani." 
Exodus16:36 Kandi encuro emwe ekaba eri ekicweka kimwe kya ikumi ky'ekitenga. 
Exodus17:1 Omutwe gwona ogw'Abaisiraeli gukaimutsya, gwaruga omu ihamba rya Siini, baagyenda nibaraarira, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaabaire naabaragiira. Baarugaho baasiisira Refidimu, kwonka abantu baaburwayo amaizi g'okunywa." 
Exodus17:2 Ekyo kyabareetera kutonganisa Musa, nibagira bati: Tuhe amaizi g'okunywa. Musa nawe abagira ati: Beitu nimuntonganisiza ki? Ahabw'enki nimugyeza Nyakubaho?" 
Exodus17:3 Kwonka abantu ku baitiirweyo eiriho, baayetomboitera Musa nibagira bati: Mbwenu okatwihira ki Misiri, kutwitsa eiriho itwe n'abaana baitu n'amasyo gaitu?" 
Exodus17:4 Musa nikwo kutakira Nyakubaho ati: Mbwenu aba bantu mbagire nta? Ka barangariire kunteera amabaare! 
Exodus17:5 Nawe nikwo kugira Musa ati: Irooko, ogyende oyebembeire abo bantu oine abakuru b'omu Baisiraeli, kandi okwaitse enkoni ei waateerize Omugyera." 
Exodus17:6 Mbwenu Nyowe okwo niinyija kukwemerera omu maisho, aha rukiri oruri Horebu. Haza iwe oteere orwo rukiri, amaizi garurugyemu, abantu babone kutunga eky'okunywa. Musa nawe yaakora atyo, abakuru b'omu Baisiraeli nibamureeba." 
Exodus17:7 Ogwo mwanya yaagweta Maasa na Meriba, ngu ahabw'okuba Abaisiraeli bakamutonganisizaho, kandi baagyeza Mukama nibagira bati: Ebyo Nyakubaho atwine, nari tatwine?" 
Exodus17:8 Bwanyima hakaija Abaamaleki, baarwanisiza Abaisiraeli Refidimu." 
Exodus17:9 Musa yaagambira Yoshwa ati: Tutooranire abantu, mugyende murwanise Abaamaleki. Naanye nyencakare niinyija kwemerera aha mutwe gw'akabungo, nkwaitse enkoni ya Ruhanga." 
Exodus17:10 Mpaho Yoshwa akora nk'oku Musa yaamugambira, arwanisa Abaamaleki. Reero Musa na Arooni na Huuri bainamuka, bahika aha mutwe gw'ekibungo." 
Exodus17:11 Musa ku yaabaire aimutsya emikono ye, Abaisiraeli basinga; kandi ku yaabaire agigwisa, Abaamaleki basinga." 
Exodus17:12 Kwonka emikono ya Musa ekarugaho yaaruha, nabo nikwo kureeta eibaare bakarimutega akarishutamaho, haza Arooni na Huuri bakaguma baramiire emikono ye, omwe aha rubaju rumwe n'ondi aha rundi. Emikono ye yaaguma etyo ehamire, okuhitsya obu eizooba ryarengire." 
Exodus17:13 Yoshwa akasingurira kimwe Amaleki n'engabo ze akaziitsa rurara z'obwogi. 
Exodus17:14 Mukama yaagambira Musa ati: Handiika eki omu kitabo, kibe ekiijutsyo, kandi okigambire Yoshwa akyehuririire oti: Ndyamariraho kimwe Amaleki, abure kwijukwa aha nsi y'eiguru." 
Exodus17:15 Bwanyima Musa yaayombeka eitambiro, yaaryeta Yahweniisi;" 
Exodus17:16 amakuru ngu, Nyakubaho niwe bendera yangye!" 
Exodus18:1 Yetero omuhongyerezi wa Midiyani, ishezaara wa Musa, akahurira ebi Ruhanga yaakoreire Musa n'Abaisiraeli abantu be; n'oku Nyakubaho yaihire Abaisiraeli Misiri." 
Exodus18:2 Mbwenu obwo, Yetero ishezaara Musa akaba yaatwaire Zipora muka Musa, ou onu yaabaire ashenzire," 
Exodus18:3 kandi akaba atwaire ogwo mukazi n'abatabani bombi, omwe orikwetwa Gereshomu (ngu ahabw'okuba Musa akagira ati: Mbaire ndi omushuuhuuki omu nsi etari yaitu);" 
Exodus18:4 ondi naayetwa Eliezeeri (ngu ahabw'okuba Musa akagira ati: Ruhanga wa tata akampwera yankiza rurara ya Faraaho). 
Exodus18:5 Mpaho Yetero ishezaara wa Musa aija ahu ari amureeteire batabani be n'omukazi we; amushanga omu ihamba aha rushozi rwa Ruhanga, ahi yaabaire asiisiire." 
Exodus18:6 Reero omuntu ku yaagambiire Musa ati: Naakutona shozaara Yetero, yaija hamwe n'omukazi waawe na batabani baawe bombi kukureeba." 
Exodus18:7 Musa ashohora kubugana ishezaara, amutangirira kandi amunywegyera; babuuzana oku barikuraara, mpaho bataaha omu ihema." 
Exodus18:8 Bwanyima Musa ateekyerereza ishezaara byona ebi Nyakubaho yaakozire Faraaho n'Abanyamisiri naabatura Abaisiraeli. Amutebeza n'enaku zi baareebeire omu muhanda, n'oku Nyakubaho yaabakirize." 
Exodus18:9 Yetero atyo ashemererwa ahabw'ebirungi ebi Nyakubaho yaakoreire Abaisiraeli naabaiha omu mikono y'Abanyamisiri. 
Exodus18:10 Reero Yetero agira ati: Nyakubaho owaabaihire omu mikono y'Abanyamisiri n'omu mukono gwa Faraaho naakasingye! 
Exodus18:11 Mbwenu naamanya ku Nyakubaho ari mukuru okukira baaruhanga boona, ahabw'okuba akaiha abo bantu omu mikono y'Abanyamisiri, abaabaire nibabaita kubi, babaineho amaryo." 
Exodus18:12 Mpaho Yetero, ishezaara wa Musa, atoijera Nyakubaho ebitambo by'okucwetsya n'ebindi bitambo. Reero Arooni n'abakuru b'omu Baisiraeli boona baija kuriira emigaati omu maisho ga Ruhanga, bari hamwe na ishezaara wa Musa." 
Exodus18:13 Ku bwaseesire Musa yaashutama kucwera abantu emanja. Abantu baayemerera bamwehinguririize okwiha omu kasheeshe okuhitsya omu mwabazyo. 
Exodus18:14 Ishezaara wa Musa ku yaareebire ebi Musa arikukorera abo bantu, yaagira ati: Eki eki orikukorera aba bantu ni ki? Ahabw'enki nooshutama wenka, abantu boona bakeemerera bakwehinguririize okwiha omu kasheeshe okuhitsya omu mwabazyo?" 
Exodus18:15 Musa agarukamu ishezaara ati: N'ahabw'okuba abantu nibaanyijaho kuunyebuuzaho ebya Ruhanga. 
Exodus18:16 Ku barikuba baine ebi barikufa, baija ahi ndi; naanye nshoboorora omuntu na bagyenzi be, mbamanyisa ebi Ruhanga yaataireho, n'ebi yaaragiire." 
Exodus18:17 Ishezaara wa Musa nikwo kumugira ati: Eki orikukora ti kirungi. 
Exodus18:18 Iwe n'abantu bu oine, nimwija kugwa ahaiguru, ahabw'okuba ogu murimo nigukuhenda, torikubaasa kugukora wenka." 
Exodus18:19 Mbwenu hurira ebi naaza kukugambira. Naaza kukuha obwengye, haza Ruhanga abe hamwe naiwe. Guma ogiire abantu owa Ruhanga, obamuhikizeho ebirikubasaasa." 
Exodus18:20 Kandi guma obeegyese ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, obamanyise oburyo bu baraatwazemu, n'ebi bashemereire kukora." 
Exodus18:21 Ekindi, toorana omu bantu boona, abashaija b'oburyo abarikutiina Ruhanga, abarikwesigwa, kandi abarikwanga enguzi. Abantu nk'abo, obateho babe abakuru b'abantu: abamwe bategyekye enkumi, abandi amagana, abandi amakumi ataano, n'abandi eikumi." 
Exodus18:22 Haza obarekye bagume nibaramura abantu obunaku bwona. Ebintu ebikuru nibyo bariguma nibakureetera, kwonka ebikye babe nibo baabishoboorora; nibwo oraayanguhirwe, nabo bakakwatanisa naiwe oburemeezi." 
Exodus18:23 Ku oraakore ekyo, nk'oku Ruhanga araakuragiire, noija kubaasa kwemera ogu murimo, kandi n'aba bantu nibaija kuguma nibagaruka omu maka gaabo n'obusingye." 
Exodus18:24 Musa nawe asiima ebi ishezaara yaamuhabura, akora byona ebi yaamugambira." 
Exodus18:25 Musa atyo atoorana abashaija b'oburyo omu Baisiraeli boona, abahindura abakuru omu ihanga: abamwe kutegyeka enkumi z'abantu, abandi amagana, abandi amakumi ataano, n'abandi eikumi." 
Exodus18:26 Nabo baguma nibaramura abantu obunaku bwona; emanja empango nibazireetera Musa, kwonka ebintu ebikye nibabyeshoboororera." 
Exodus18:27 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Musa yaikiriza ishezaara kugyenda; n'onu yaimutsya orugyendo yaagarukayo owaabo." 
Exodus19:1 Aha kiro eki okwezi kwa kashatu kwabonekyeireho, Abaisiraeli barugire omu nsi ya Misiri, ahari ekyo kiro nibwo baahika omu ihamba rya Sinaayi." 
Exodus19:2 Ku baarugire Refidimu, baahika omu ihamba rya Sinaayi baarisiisiramu, baateera amahema omu mizi y'orushozi." 
Exodus19:3 Mpaho Musa atemba orushozi ru Ruhanga yaabaire ariho, na Nyakubaho amweta naayema ahari orwo rushozi, naamugira ati: Oku nikwo oraagambire ab'omuryango gwa Yakobo, kandi ogire Abaisiraeli oti:" 
Exodus19:4 Mureebire oku naagizire Abanyamisiri, n'oku imwe naabareeteire omu mapapa nk'empungu, nkabeehitsya." 
Exodus19:5 N'ahabw'ekyo nu, ku muryorobera ebi ndikubagambira, mwarinda endagaano yangye, muryaba abangye ahabwangye omu mahanga goona. Manya ensi yoona n'eyangye." 
Exodus19:6 Mbwenu imwe muryambeera obugabe bw'abahongyerezi, kandi eihanga eririkwera. Ebyo nibyo bigambo ebi oraagambire Abaisiraeli." 
Exodus19:7 Musa atyo aija, ayeta abakuru b'omuri abo bantu, abateekyerereza byona ebi Nyakubaho amuragiire." 
Exodus19:8 Abo bantu boona bagarukiramu hamwe nibagira bati: Byona ebi Nyakubaho yaagamba, nitwija kubikora. Musa nawe agambira Nyakubaho ebi abo bantu baagamba." 
Exodus19:9 Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: Reeba naaza kukwijaho ndi omu kicu kikwaitse, abantu bahurire ningamba naiwe, haza babone kukwesiga ebiro byona. Musa nawe amugambira ebi abo bantu baagamba." 
Exodus19:10 Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: Irooko oze omu bantu, obagambire eri izooba na nyencakare boozye emyenda yaabo." 
Exodus19:11 Aha kiro kya kashatu babe baayeteekateekire; ahabw'okuba ahari ekyo kiro nibwo Nyowe Nyakubaho ndaashuume aha Rushozi Sinaayi, abantu boona nibandeeba." 
Exodus19:12 Reero iwe abantu obateereho obugarukiro okwehinguririza oru rushozi, kandi obagire oti: Mwerinde mutakaatemba orwo rushozi, nobu kwakuba okukora aha bugarukiro bwarwo. Weena oraarukoreho naitwa." 
Exodus19:13 Hatagira owaarukoraho, kureka bamuteere amabaare, nari bamurashe. Nobu yaakuba enyamaishwa nari omuntu bitagumaho. Enzamba ku eraagambe akasirikiriro, babe nibwo bainamuka bakahika aha rushozi." 
Exodus19:14 Musa atyo ashuuma naaruga aha rushozi, ahika abo bantu abaraarika, nabo boozya emyenda yaabo." 
Exodus19:15 Kandi abagambira ati: Mweteekateekye, ekiro kya kashatu kuza kuhika, harekye kubaho owaahika omukazi." 
Exodus19:16 Ku bwaseesire, aha kiro kya kashatu, enkuba zaagamba, emirabyo yaatyankana, orushozi rwagiibwaho ekicu kikwaitse; reero enzamba yaaraakuuza; abaabaire bari omu nsiisira baatetema." 
Exodus19:17 Bwanyima Musa yaiha abo bantu omu rusiisira kuza kutangirira Ruhanga; nabo baayemerera omu mizi y'orushozi. 
Exodus19:18 Orushozi Sinaayi rwashwekwa omwika ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akarushuumaho ari omu muriro. Haza omwika gwarwo gwacumbuuka nk'ogw'eiziiko, kandi orushozi rwona rwatengyeeta munonga." 
Exodus19:19 Mbwenu eiraka ry'enzamba ku ryabaire ryongyera kuraakuuza, Musa agamba, na Ruhanga amugarukiramu omu nkuba." 
Exodus19:20 Mpaho Nyakubaho ashuuma, ahika aha Rushozi Sinaayi, aha mutwe gwarwo. Haza ayeta Musa kwija aha mutwe gw'orwo rushozi, na Musa anyegyera ahikayo." 
Exodus19:21 Reero Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: Shuuma oyehanangirize abantu batakaayogaho kumpika kunshamaarira, baingi omuribo bakacwekyerera." 
Exodus19:22 Kandi ragiira abahongyerezi, abaraahikye haihi Naanye, beeyeze, ntakaabajumbukana nkabaita." 
Exodus19:23 Mpaho Musa agira Nyakubaho ati: Abantu tibarikubaasa kwija aha Rushozi Sinaayi, ahabw'okuba Iwe wenka okaturagiira noogira oti: Muteho obugarukiro bwehinguririze orushozi, kandi murweze." 
Exodus19:24 Nyakubaho nawe amugira ati: Irooko oshuume, haza oijane Arooni. Kwonka otaikiriza abahongyerezi n'abantu kwataguza kwija kumpika, ntakaabajumbukana nkabaita." 
Exodus19:25 Musa nawe atyo ashuuma, ahika abo bantu abagambira." 
Exodus20:1 Ruhanga akagamba ebigambo ebi byona naagira ati: 
Exodus20:2 Niinye Mukama Ruhanga owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misiri, omu nju y'obuhuuku." 
Exodus20:3 Otarigira baaruhanga abandi abatari nyowe. 
Exodus20:4 Otaryekorera ekishushani kisharwire, nari ekishushani ky'ekindi kintu kyona ekiri ahaiguru omu iguru, nari ekiri ahansi omu nsi, nainga ekiri omu maizi ahansi okuzimu." 
Exodus20:5 Otaribiramya, nobu kwakuba okubiheereza, ahabw'okuba Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga waawe mba Ruhanga w'eihato, nfubira abaana ab'oruzaaro rwa kashatu n'ab'orwa kana nimbatura ebibi bya baishenkurubo abaanyanga." 
Exodus20:6 Kwonka abankunda bakoorobera ebiragiro byangye, baijukuru baabo ab'obusingye n'obusingye mbagirira rukundo etahararuka." 
Exodus20:7 Otarirahirira busha eiziina rya Mukama Ruhanga waawe, ahabw'okuba taribura kufubira omuntu owaarahirira busha eiziina rye." 
Exodus20:8 Guma oijukye ekiro kya Sabato, okirinde kiri ekirikwera." 
Exodus20:9 Oryaguma okore omu biro mukaaga emirimo yaawe yoona, haza ogiheze." 
Exodus20:10 Kwonka ekiro kya mushanju n'ekiro ky'okuhuumuriraho, ekya Mukama Ruhanga waawe. Otarikikoreraho omurimo gwona, iwe nari mutabani waawe, nari muhara waawe, nari amatungo gaawe, nobu yaakuba omunyamahanga otwire omu ka yaawe." 
Exodus20:11 Manya omu biro mukaaga nimwo Nyakubaho yaahangiire eiguru n'ensi, enyanja na byona ebibirimu, haza akahuumura aha kiro kya mushanju. N'ahabw'ekyo Nyakubaho akaha omugisha ekyo kiro kya Sabato yaakyeeza." 
Exodus20:12 Otiine sho na nyoko, ebiro byawe bibone kuba bingi omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaakuhaire." 
Exodus20:13 Otariita. 
Exodus20:14 Otarishambana. 
Exodus20:15 Otariiba. 
Exodus20:16 Otaribeiherera mutaahi waawe. 
Exodus20:17 Otaryetenga enju ya mutaahi waawe. Otaryetenga muka mutaahi waawe nari omuheereza we, nainga omuzaana we; nari ente ye, endogoya ye, nainga ekintu kyona ekya mutaahi waawe." 
Exodus20:18 Mbwenu abo bantu boona ku baahuriire okugamba kw'enkuba, baareeba okutyankana kw'emirabyo, n'eiraka ry'enzamba, n'okucumbuuka kw'orushozi, abo bantu baatiina munonga, baatetema kandi baayemerera hare munonga." 
Exodus20:19 Baagira Musa bati: Obe niiwe waagamba naitwe. Nitwija kuhurira, kwonka Ruhanga arekye kuba niwe yaagamba naitwe tutakaafa." 
Exodus20:20 Musa nawe agira abo bantu ati: Mutatiina, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga yaija kubagyeza ngu mugume nimumutiina, murekye kukora ebibi." 
Exodus20:21 Batyo abo bantu baayemerera hare munonga. Reero Musa we yairirira ekicu kitimbire omwirima, ahi Ruhanga yaabaire ari." 
Exodus20:22 Na Nyakubaho yaagira Musa ati: Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Mwayereebera oku naagamba naimwe niinyema omu iguru. 
Exodus20:23 Mbwenu mutaryekorera baaruhanga b'efeeza kubamparikisa, nobu kwakuba okwekorera baaruhanga b'ezaabu." 
Exodus20:24 Oryambumbira eitambiro ry'eitaka, orintambirireho ebitambo by'okucwetsya, n'ebyokurya kumwe, noobiiha omu masyo gaawe g'entaama n'ag'ente. Omwanya gwona ogu ndikutooranira kundamizamu, ndyagukushangamu nkuhe omugisha." 
Exodus20:25 Kandi ku orinkorera eitambiro ry'amabaare, otariryombekyesa amabaare gabaizire, ahabw'okuba ku origacweregyerezesa enshinjo oryaba orihagaize." 
Exodus20:26 Ekindi otaritemba eitambiro ryangye nooraba aha matembero, enjuuro yaawe etakaareeberwaho." 
Exodus21:1 Mbwenu ebi nibyo biragiro bi oraahe Abaisiraeli. 
Exodus21:2 Ku origura Omuheburaayo kuba omuhuuku waawe, akuheerereze emyaka mukaaga, omu gwa mushanju agyende n'obusingye, ataine ki ayecungwize." 
Exodus21:3 Ku ariba aizire ari wenka, agyende wenka. Ku ariija yaashweire, omukazi we aryagyenda nawe." 
Exodus21:4 Mukama we ku arimushwererera omukazi, onu yaamuzaarira abaana aboojo nari abaishiki, omukazi n'abaana be babe aba mukama w'ogwo mukazi, reero omuhuuku agyende wenka." 
Exodus21:5 Kwonka omuhuuku ku aryegambira butunu ati: Ninkunda mukama wangye n'omukazi wangye n'abaana bangye, tindikwenda kuruga mu buhuuku;" 
Exodus21:6 obwo mukama we aryamumurikira Ruhanga, amuhitsye aha rwigi nari aha nti z'omuryango; amufumure okutu n'empindu, ogwo muhuuku agume naamukorera ebiro byona." 
Exodus21:7 Omushaija ku aritunda muhara we kuba omuzaana, atariruga omu buzaana nk'oku abahuuku abashaija batwaza." 
Exodus21:8 Ogwo muzaana ku ariba atagwisize gye mukama we owaamwetooraniire, obwo mukama we amurekye acungurwe. Kwonka tariikirizibwa kumuguza abanyamahanga, ahabw'okuba obwo naaba amukoreire ekitahikire." 
Exodus21:9 Reero ku araabe naamwendeza omutabani, atwaze ogwo muzaana nka muhara we." 
Exodus21:10 Ku arishwera ondiijo mukazi, atarituubya egabo y'ogwo muzaana n'ebijwaro bye, nobu kwakuba okumwitira embu z'okumuraarira." 
Exodus21:11 Mbwenu ku ariba atamukoreire ebyo byonshatu, ogwo muzaana agyende ataine ki ayecungwize n'eki azimwire." 
Exodus21:12 Weena oriteera omuntu akamwita, nawe aitwe." 
Exodus21:13 Kwonka omuntu ku ariita ondi atamugwereire, beitu kyaruga ahari Ruhanga kumugwa omu mikono, ndyakuteeraho omwanya, ogu ashemereire kuhungiramu." 
Exodus21:14 Kwonka omuntu ku arigira enaama, yaita mugyenzi we nkana amureebize, omwihe nangwa n'aha itambiro ryangye, aitwe." 
Exodus21:15 Weena oriteera ishe nari nyina, aitwe." 
Exodus21:16 Weena oriiba omuntu akamutunda, nari bakashanga akimwine, aitwe." 
Exodus21:17 Weena orikyeena ishe nari nyina, aitwe." 
Exodus21:18 Abantu ku baritongana, omwe yaateera ondi eibaare nari entomi, kwonka ogwo muntu ataafa, kureka yaaguma aha kishego arwaire," 
Exodus21:19 kiteerwa ku ariimuka yaashotookyera aha kibango, kimuteera aihweho orubanja. Kureka arihe kiteerwa ebiro bi amwitiire, kandi amuragurize okuhitsya obu araakirire kimwe." 
Exodus21:20 Omuntu ku ariteera omuhuuku we nari omuzaana we, yaamuteeza enkoni, ogwo muhuuku yaamugwaho, onu afubirwe." 
Exodus21:21 Kwonka omuhuuku ku arimara ekiro kimwe nari bibiri atafiire, onu atafubirwa, ahabw'okuba ogwo muhuuku n'ekintu kye eki ayetungiire." 
Exodus21:22 Abantu ku baakurwana, baasaasa omukazi oine enda, enda yaarugamu, kwonka hataabaho kandi kabi, owamusaasa ahongyesibwe nk'oku iba w'ogwo mukazi araamurihise, kandi arihe nk'oku abaramuzi baraamucwere." 
Exodus21:23 Kwonka ku haakugira akabi kaarugamu, obwo amagara gazire agandi." 
Exodus21:24 Eriisho ririhwe eriisho, eriino ririhwe eriino, omukono gugwane n'omukono, ekigyere n'ekigyere;" 
Exodus21:25 okwotsya kuhoorerwe okwotsya, obuhuta buhoorerwe obundi." 
Exodus21:26 Omuntu ku ariteera eriisho ry'omuhuuku we nari ery'omuzaana we yaariihamu, aryarekura ogwo muhuuku; okumurekura kube endihano y'eriisho rye." 
Exodus21:27 Ku aricwa eriino ry'omuhuuku we, omushaija nari omukazi, aryarekura ogwo muhuuku agyende ataine ki ayecungwize ahabw'eryo riino." 
Exodus21:28 Ente ku ericumita omushaija nari omukazi yaamwita, egyo eteerwe amabaare, n'enyama y'egyo nte etaririibwa; kandi mukama waayo aryaba ataine rubanja." 
Exodus21:29 Kwonka egyo nte ku eraabe yaabaire neecumita, kandi mukama waayo baramweziniize haza ataagirinda, reero yaita omushaija nari omukazi, egyo nte eteerwe amabaare, na mukama waayo aitwe." 
Exodus21:30 Ku barimucwa eky'okwecungura, ahe kyona eki barimucwa kucungura amagara ge." 
Exodus21:31 Ente ku ericumita mutabani w'omuntu nari muhara we, mukama waayo nabwo atwazibwe nk'ekyo kiragiro oku kiri." 
Exodus21:32 Ente ku ericumita omuhuuku nari omuzaana, mukama waayo arihe mukama waabo ebicweka makumi ashatu by'efeeza, n'egyo nte eteerwe amabaare." 
Exodus21:33 Omuntu ku aritsiga ekiina kyashami, nari yaatimba ekiina ataakiigaza, reero ente nari endogoya yaakigwamu," 
Exodus21:34 mukama w'ekyo kiina aryagiriha; ahe mukama waayo empiiha, kandi omutumbi gw'egyo nyamaishwa gube ogwe." 
Exodus21:35 Ente y'omuntu ku ericumita ey'ondiijo yaagiita, baryatunda egyo ehuriire, babagane empiiha zaayo, kandi bagarukye babagane n'eyaitwa." 
Exodus21:36 Nainga shi egyo nte ku eraabe ebaire neemanywa ngu ecumita, kandi mukama waayo abaire atarikugirinda, obwo arihe ente omu mwanya gw'eyaitwa, reero eyaitwa ebe eye." 
Exodus22:1 Omuntu ku ariiba ente nari entaama, yaagiita nari yaagitunda, arihe ente itaano ahabw'ente emwe, kandi entaama ina ahabw'entaama emwe. Arihe! Ku araabe ataine ki aine, atundwe ahabw'okwo kwiba kwe. Enyamaishwa eibirwe ku baraashangye ehuriire, kigiiba akigiine, yaaba nte nari endogoya nainga entaama, agirihe ibiri." 
Exodus22:2 Omushuma ku barimushanga naafumura enju nyekiro, baamuteera yaafa, tihaine origiibwaho orubanja rw'okumwita. Kwonka ku arifumura enju bwaseesire, obwo orimwita aryagiibwaho orubanja rw'okwita." 
Exodus22:3  
Exodus22:4  
Exodus22:5 Omuntu ku aryonesa ekyeetwa omusiri nari ogw'emizaabibu, nainga yaatsibura amatungo ge gaayona omusiri gw'ondi, aryaguriha ebi ayerize omu musiri gwe ebirungi munonga, nari eby'omu musiri gwe gw'emizaabibu." 
Exodus22:6 Ku harigira omuriro gwashugyeera ekishugi, gwayotsya ebishaarwirwe aha mbuga, nari ebikiri omu musiri nainga ebigubyairwemu, kitweka ogwo muriro aryariha byona ebyasya." 
Exodus22:7 Omuntu ku aribiitsya mutaahi we empiiha nari ebintu kubimurindira, haza byaibirwa omu nju y'ogwo muntu, kibiiba ku arikwatwa arihe ebirikwingana nabyo emirundi ebiri." 
Exodus22:8 Kwonka kibiiba ku yaakuba atakwatsirwe, mukama w'egyo nju atwarwe omu maisho ga Ruhanga, arahire ku ebyo bintu bya mutaahi we atabikozireho na rukumu rwe." 
Exodus22:9 Manya okuryangatanisa kwona, yaaba kwa nte, kwa ndogoya, kwa ntaama, kwa kijwaro nari kwa ibara kintu ekibuzire, eki omuntu yaagira ati: Nikyo eki; orubanja rw'abo bantu bombi rureetwe omu maisho ga Ruhanga. Haza Ruhanga ou arisingisa orubanja, arihe mutaahi we emirundi ebiri." 
Exodus22:10 Omuntu ku arihereka mutaahi we endogoya nari ente nari entaama nainga enyamaishwa yoona kugimurindira, kwonka ekyo kitungirwe kyafa nari kyagira oku kyaba nainga kyatwarwa bwibwa hataine okireebire," 
Exodus22:11 bombi baryarahizibwa omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, kureeba yaaba onu ekyo kitungirwe kya mutaahi we atakikoreiseho rukumu. Reero mukama waakyo aikirize okurahira kwa kiherekwa, kandi obwo ori taririha." 
Exodus22:12 Kwonka ku bariba bagimwibireho, agirihe mukama waayo." 
Exodus22:13 Ku eririibwa enyamaishwa, areete ekiriira kyayo kumujurira, nabwo obwo taririha ekiriirwe." 
Exodus22:14 Omuntu ku aritiiza ekintu kya mutaahi we, kyagira oku kyaba, nari kyafa mukama waakyo atariho, kikitiizibwa aryakirihira kimwe." 
Exodus22:15 Mukama waakyo ku ariba ariho, obwo tarikiriha. Kandi ku kiriba kiguririirwe kiryagwana n'obuguzi bw'ebi baakiguririire." 
Exodus22:16 Omushaija ku aribeihabeiha omwishiki oshugaine otakagambirwe bugyenyi, yaabyama nawe, amujugye kandi amushwere." 
Exodus22:17 Ishe ku araayangire kimwe kumumuhingira, onu arihe empiiha nk'ezi bajuga abaishiki." 
Exodus22:18 Otariikiriza omurogikazi kugumaho. 
Exodus22:19 Weena oribyamisa enyamaishwa, aitwe." 
Exodus22:20 Weena oritambira ruhanga ondi ekitambo, atakitambiire Nyowe nyenka Nyakubaho, acwekyererezibwe kimwe." 
Exodus22:21 Otarikora kubi omunyamahanga, nobu kwakuba okumuhata. Manya naimwe mukaba muri abanyamahanga omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Exodus22:22 Otaribonabonesa omufaakazi nari efuuzi. 
Exodus22:23 Ku oribabonabonesa bantakira, buzimazima ndyahurira okutaka kwabo," 
Exodus22:24 kashanga encwe amaraka, mbaitse rurara, abakazi baanyu babe abafaakazi, n'abaana baanyu babe efuuzi." 
Exodus22:25 Ku origuza empiiha weena ow'omu bantu bangye, ori hamwe naiwe kandi ari omworo, otarimubeera nk'omugurize, kandi otarimwihaho ekiteebwamu." 
Exodus22:26 Mutaahi waawe ku arikukwatiriza omwenda gwe, ogumugarurire eizooba ritakarengire," 
Exodus22:27 ahabw'okuba nigwo ayeshweka kandi nigwo ayefubika. Mbwenu shi aryayeshweka ki? Haza ku arintakira, ndyamuhurira; ahabw'okuba Nyowe mba Omunyasaasi." 
Exodus22:28 Otarijuma Ruhanga, nobu kwakuba okukyeena omutegyeki w'eihanga ryawe." 
Exodus22:29 Otaryeganda kutoija emiganuro y'ebi oshaarwire, n'aha birugire omu manyuukiro gaawe. Oryaguma ompongyere batabani baawe b'emijigaijo." 
Exodus22:30 Kandi nikwo oritwaza ente zaawe n'entaama zaawe. Omujigaijo gwayo guryamara na nyinagwo ebiro mushanju; aha kiro kya munaana ogumpongyere. 
Exodus22:31 Naimwe muryaguma muri abantu bangye abaanyereziibwe. N'ahabw'ekyo mutarirya ebitaafura ebi enyamaishwa zitaanyaguriize omu ishwa. Muryaguma mubitambikire embwa. 
Exodus23:1 Otarigamba enkuru z'ebishuba. Otarikwatanisa n'omuntu mubi okajurira ebishuba. 
Exodus23:2 Otarikuratira abaingi kukora ekibi, nari okujurira noogwera orubaju rw'abaingi, ngu osingisirize orubanja," 
Exodus23:3 nobu kwakuba okugwera orubaju, ngu omworo asingwe orubanja ru arikutongana." 
Exodus23:4 Ku oribugana ente y'omuzigu waawe, nari endogoya ye neerara, ogitangye ogimureetere." 
Exodus23:5 Ku orishanga endogoya y'orikukwanga ebandikirwe omutwaro, otarikiika omushaya okamutsigaho nayo, kureka omuhwere kugibutuura." 
Exodus23:6 Otariita orubanja rw'omuntu w'abaanyu omworo naatongana. 
Exodus23:7 Guma oyetantare okutabaaza eby'ebishuba, haza oyerinde kwitisa omuntu ori mwere kandi ohikiriire, ahabw'okuba omuntu omubi tindimwihaho orubanja." 
Exodus23:8 Otarirya enguzi, ahabw'okuba eita abategyeki amaisho, kandi esingisiririza abataine rubanja." 
Exodus23:9 Otariita kubi omunyaihanga. Nimumanya omutima gw'omunyamahanga, ahabw'okuba naimwe mukaba muri abanyamahanga omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Exodus23:10 Oryamara emyaka mukaaga noohinga emisiri yaawe, kandi nooshaaruura ebyeziremu." 
Exodus23:11 Kwonka buri mwaka gwa mushanju, ogirekye eraare ebe ekikooreere, abooro b'omu ihanga ryawe babone kuhumbamu ekyokurya, reero ebi baraatsigyemu biriibwe enyamaishwa. Emisiri yaawe y'emizaabibu n'ey'emioliva nayo obe nikwo waagitwaza." 
Exodus23:12 Oryaguma okore emirimo yaawe omu biro mukaaga, kwonka aha kiro kya mushanju ohuumure, ente yaawe n'endogoya yaawe bibone kuhuumura, mutabani w'omuzaana waawe n'omunyaihanga nabo baruhuukye." 
Exodus23:13 Mugume mute omutima aha bi naabagambira, kandi mutariterekyerera baaruhanga abandi, nobu kwakuba okuhurirwa nimurabya amaziina gaabo omu kanwa." 
Exodus23:14 Oryaguma ongirire obugyenyi, buri mwaka emirundi eshatu." 
Exodus23:15 Oryaguma ogire obugyenyi bw'emigaati etatumbisiibwe, nk'oku naakuragiire kuguma noorya emigaati etatumbisiibwe, okumara ebiro mushanju, omu bunaku obwatairweho omu kwezi kwa Abibu; ahabw'okuba nikwo waarugiiremu Misiri. Hatarigira owaareebeka omu maisho gangye engaro nsha." 
Exodus23:16 Oryaguma ogire obugyenyi bw'eigyesha, obw'emiganuro y'ebi waahendekyeire, ebi waahingire omu musiri. Kandi ogire obugyenyi bw'eishaaruura, aha muheru gw'omwaka, waaheza kushaaruura omu misiri ebyezire ebi waayecurengyeire." 
Exodus23:17 Oyetwa omushaija weena aryaguma aije ayeyorekye omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga kashatu omu mwaka. 
Exodus23:18 Otarintoijera emigati etumbisiibwe hamwe n'eshagama y'ekitambo eki ontambiire, nobu kwakuba okuraazaho ebishaju by'ekitambo ky'Obugyenyi bwangye okuhitsya omu kasheeshe." 
Exodus23:19 Oryaguma oreete omu nju ya Mukama Ruhanga waawe emiganuro y'ebibandize kwera omu misiri yaawe. Otariteekyesa akaana k'empene amahenahene ga nyinako. 
Exodus23:20 Reeba naatuma maraika kukwebembera n'okukurinda omu muhanda, akuhitsye omu mwanya gu naakuteekateekyeire." 
Exodus23:21 Omuteho omutima kandi ohurire ebi arikukugambira. Otarimugomera, ahabw'okuba tarikusaasira bicumuro byawe. Manya niinye arikujwekyera." 
Exodus23:22 Kwonka ku orihurira ebi arikugamba otaireho omutima, waakora byona ebi ndikukugambira, obwo abazigu baawe ndyababeera omuzigu, n'ababisha baawe mbabeere omubisha." 
Exodus23:23 Maraika wangye ku arikwebembera yaakuhitsya omu Baamori n'Abahiiti n'Abaperizi n'Abanyakanaani n'Abahiivi n'Abayebusi, ndyamaraho abo bantu." 
Exodus23:24 Otaritsimbira baaruhanga baabo amaju, nari okubaramya, nobu kwakuba okukora eby'emigyenzo yaabo, kureka oryabacwekyerereza kimwe, oteho n'okusheenyagura enyomyo zaabo z'amabaare." 
Exodus23:25 Muryaguma mundamye Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, haza naanye mpe ebyokurya byanyu n'amaizi gaanyu omugisha, kandi mbabingyemu endwara yoona." 
Exodus23:26 Omu nsi yaawe tiharibaho orirugwamu enda nari okuba engumba, kandi ndyakuhangaaza." 
Exodus23:27 Abantu boona abarikukurwanisa, abu oribugabugana nabo, ndyabaitsa obwoba otakabahikire, mbarabanisemu; abazigu baawe boona bakuhungye." 
Exodus23:28 Reero ndyayohereza enwa, zikwebembere, zibingyemu Abahiivi, Abanyakanaani n'Abahiiti otakabahikire." 
Exodus23:29 Tindibabingamu mu mwaka gumwe kukuhigiza, ensi etakaaba amatongo, enyamaishwa enshaarizi zikakanya, zikakunyangaraza." 
Exodus23:30 Ndyababingamu mporampora bakuhigize, okuhitsya obu orikanya okakubuura egyo nsi." 
Exodus23:31 Haza ndyakuteeraho enyatano, okwiha aha Nyanja Erikutukura okuta aha Nyanja y'Abafilisiti, n'okuruga aha ihamba okuhika ahari Eufuraati. Manya abatuuzi baamwo ndyabakurekurira obabingye." 
Exodus23:32 Otarikora nabo endagaano nobu kwakuba okugikora na baaruhanga baabo. 
Exodus23:33 Tibarituura mu nsi yaawe batakaakureetera kuncumuraho. Manya ku oriheereza baaruhanga baabo, buzimazima kiryakubeera ekiina ky'aha muryango." 
Exodus24:1 Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: Inamuka ahi ndi, oine Arooni na Nadabu na Abiihu hamwe n'abakuru ba Isiraeli makumi mushanju; haza mundamize hangahari." 
Exodus24:2 Iwe Musa wenka obe niiwe waanyirira haihi, kwonka abandi batahika haihi, n'abantu batainamukayo." 
Exodus24:3 Musa atyo aija, agambira abo bantu ebi Nyakubaho yaagamba n'ebi yaaragiira. Abantu boona bagarukamu n'eiraka rimwe nibagira bati: Byona ebi Nyakubaho yaagamba nitwija kubikora." 
Exodus24:4 Musa nawe ahandiika ebi Nyakubaho yaagamba. Reero aimuka kare omu kasheeshe, ayombeka eitambiro omu mizi y'orushozi, n'enyomyo ikumu na ibiri, nk'enganda ikumu na ibiri za Isiraeli oku ziri." 
Exodus24:5 Mpaho atuma abatsigazi b'Abaisiraeli bahongyera Nyakubaho ebitambo by'okucwetsya, kandi bamutambira ebitambo by'ente ebyokurya kumwe." 
Exodus24:6 Musa atyo acwa kabiri eshagama, agishuka omu nyabya; ekicweka kyayo akimiisiira eitambiro." 
Exodus24:7 Bwanyima aihayo ekitabo ky'Endagaano akishoma abantu boona bategire amatu. Haza bagira bati: Byona ebi Nyakubaho yaagamba nitwija kubikora, kandi nitwija kuba abantu abarikuhurira." 
Exodus24:8 Musa atyo aihayo eshagama, agimiisiira abo bantu, naagira ati: Egi niyo shagama y'endagaano ei Nyakubaho yaaragaana naimwe nk'ebyagambwa ebyo byona oku biri." 
Exodus24:9 Bwanyima Musa na Arooni na Nadabu na Abiihu n'abakuru b'omu Baisiraeli makumi mushanju bainamuka," 
Exodus24:10 bareeba Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, ahansi y'ebigyere bye hariho nk'omwariro gw'amabaare ga bururu, garikumurinkana nk'eiguru." 
Exodus24:11 Haza abo bakuru b'omu Baisiraeli Ruhanga tagira oku yaabagira, kureka bamuhanga amaisho. Bwanyima barya kandi banywa." 
Exodus24:12 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: Inamuka onshangye aha rushozi, haza otegyererezeyo; niinyija kukuha ebishate by'amabaare, ebiriho amateeka n'ebiragiro ebi mpandiikire ngu mubibeegyese." 
Exodus24:13 Musa atyo aimuka n'omugaragwa we Yoshwa. Haza Musa ogwo ainamuka aza aha rushozi rwa Ruhanga. 
Exodus24:14 Reero agambira abo bakuru ati: Mututegyerereze aha okuhitsya obu turaagarukye tukabashangaho. Mbwenu reeba Arooni na Huuri babaine; oraabe aine ekimusaasize abeetuurire. 
Exodus24:15 Musa atyo atemba Orushozi, haza ekicu kirushweka." 
Exodus24:16 Reero ekitiinisa kya Nyakubaho kiza ahari orwo Rushozi Sinaayi, n'ekicu kirushweka okumara ebiro mukaaga. Aha kiro kya mushanju, Nyakubaho ayeta Musa naayema omuri ekyo kicu." 
Exodus24:17 Mbwenu obwo ekitiinisa kya Nyakubaho aha mutwe gw'orushozi Abaisiraeli bakakireeba nikishusha omuriro gurikurya busha. 
Exodus24:18 Mpaho Musa aburira omuri ekyo kicu, ainamuka omu kibungo. Haza Musa ogwo amara ahari orwo rushozi ebiro makumi ana nyomushana na nyekiro." 
Exodus25:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus25:2 Gambira Abaisiraeli bantoijere emitoijo; kandi naimwe mwakiire omutoijo ogu omuntu weena arantoijere ayekundiire. 
Exodus25:3 Mbwenu egi niyo mitoijo ei baraabareetere mukaakiira: ezaabu, efeeza n'emiringa;" 
Exodus25:4 emyenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari n'eya bafuta enungi erukirwe enyabubiri, obwoshe bw'embuzi;" 
Exodus25:5 empu z'embuzi, embaaho z'emisisa," 
Exodus25:6 amajuta g'etabaaza, eby'emigaju eby'okuta omu majuta g'okusiiga, n'obubaani burikutaamirana omugaju;" 
Exodus25:7 amabaare agarimu erangi zitarikushushana, n'agandi mabaare g'okuhundisa ekitaahiro ekirikwetwa Efodi n'eky'aha kifuba." 
Exodus25:8 Kandi bankorere Omwanya Ogurikwera, mbone kubatuuramu." 
Exodus25:9 Haza ogwo mwanya gurikwera n'ebi muraaguhundise, mugukore nk'oku ndaakworekyerere." 
Exodus25:10 Baije bankorere eshanduukye ebaizirwe omu mbaaho z'omusisa. Ebe ey'oburaingwa bwa mikono ebiri n'ekicweka, obukiika bwayo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka kandi obwemi bwayo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka." 
Exodus25:11 Haza mugihumbikye omunda n'aheeru ezaabu empuuhe, kandi yoona okugyehinguririza mugihundise omugoma gw'ezaabu." 
Exodus25:12 Oije ogiyagize ebifunga bina by'ezaabu, obite aha maguru gaayo ana: bibiri aha rubaju rwayo orumwe, n'ebindi bibiri aha rundi." 
Exodus25:13 Oije okore emigamba omu muti gw'omusisa, nayo ogihumbikye ezaabu." 
Exodus25:14 Reero egyo migamba ogishensheze omu bifunga by'omu mbaju z'egyo shanduukye, kuguma nibagigiheekyesa." 
Exodus25:15 Emigamba egume omu bifunga by'eshanduukye; bataribigiihamu. 
Exodus25:16 Kandi egyo shanduukye otemu Obuhamya bu ndaakuhe. 
Exodus25:17 Bwanyima ogikoreho ekitebe ky'okusaasira ky'ezaabu empuuhe, ky'oburaingwa bwa mikono ebiri n'ekicweka, n'obukiika bwa mukono gumwe n'ekicweka." 
Exodus25:18 Reero okore baakerubi abaheesirwe omu zaabu, haza obate aha mutwe n'aha bigyere by'ekyo kitebe ky'okusaasira." 
Exodus25:19 Kora kerubi omwe aha muheru ogumwe, na kerubi ondi aha gundi. Baakerubi abo, mubaheesherane n'ekyo kitebe ky'okusaasira aha miheru yaakyo yombi." 
Exodus25:20 Baakerubi abo babe bashashanwire amapapa eruguru, bagashangiize ekitebe ky'okusaasira, boorekyeraine nibareeba ekyo kitebe." 
Exodus25:21 Mpaho ekitebe ky'okusaasira okitungikye aha shanduukye, kandi omu shanduukye otemu eby'obuhamya ebi ndaakuhe." 
Exodus25:22 Naanye aho niho ndiguma nimbugaabuganira naiwe, niinyema ahaiguru y'ekitebe ky'okusaasira, ahagati ya baakerubi bombi abari aha shanduukye y'eby'obuhamya, nkagamba naiwe byona ebi ndiguma ninkuragiira kugambira Abaisiraeli." 
Exodus25:23 Kandi oryakora emeeza omu muti gw'omusisa, ebe eya mikono ebiri omu buraingwa, mukono gumwe obukiika, na mukono gumwe n'ekicweka obwemi." 
Exodus25:24 Ogihumbikye ezaabu empuuhe, kandi ogiteho omugoma gw'ezaabu okugyehinguririza." 
Exodus25:25 Haza oryakora orukomantiriro rw'ekita kimwe omu bukiizi rugyehinguririze, n'omugoma gw'ezaabu gwehinguririze orwo rukomantiriro." 
Exodus25:26 Reero oryagitaho ebifunga bina by'ezaabu, haza obikore bihamiire aha nkokora ina ez'aha maguru gaayo ana." 
Exodus25:27 Ebifunga ebyo bihikaane n'orukomantiriro, bibe eby'okushokamu emigamba y'okuheeka emeeza." 
Exodus25:28 Oryakora emigamba omu muti gw'omusisa, ogihumbikye ezaabu, ebe niyo baaguma nibaheekyesa emeeza." 
Exodus25:29 Kandi okore eshuhaani zaayo; n'eby'okwotereraho obubaani, n'engyemeko n'ebakuri eby'okushukisa empongano z'okunywa. Haza ebyo obikore omu zaabu empuuhe." 
Exodus25:30 Mpaho ogume ote ahari egyo meeza emigaati y'okumurikwa, egume eri omu maisho gangye obutoosha." 
Exodus25:31 Oryakora ekikondo ky'etabaaza omu zaabu empuuhe. Ekibunu na rwagati y'ekyo kikondo ky'etabaaza bibe ebiheesirwe; kandi ebikopo byayo n'amatangi gaayo n'ebirabyo byayo bibe biheesherainwe nakyo. 
Exodus25:32 Mpaho kigire amataagi mukaaga gataagwize oku n'oku; amataagi ashatu aha rubaju rumwe, n'agandi ashatu aha rundi." 
Exodus25:33 Ahari ekyo kikondo ky'etabaaza habeho ebikopo bishatu ebyemi nk'amatunguru, buri kimwe kiine omugina n'ekirabyo aha itaagi rimwe, kandi n'ebindi bikopo bishatu ebikozirwe nk'emigina y'amatunguru biine omugina n'ekirabyo aha rindi itaagi. Haza amataagi goona omukaaga agarikutaaguza aha kikondo ky'etabaaza gabe nikwo gaaba." 
Exodus25:34 Kandi ahari ekyo kikondo ky'etabaaza habeho ebikopo bina ebikozirwe nk'emigina y'amatunguru, biriho emigina yaabyo n'ebirabyo." 
Exodus25:35 Reero habeho omugina oguheesheraniirwe ahaifo ya buri mataagi abiri ag'ago omukaaga agataagwize ahari ekyo kikondo ky'etabaaza. 
Exodus25:36 Emigina yaabyo n'amataagi gaabyo biheesheranwe nakyo. Mpaho ekyo kikondo kyona kibe ekiheesirwe omu zaabu empuuhe. 
Exodus25:37 Kandi okikorere amatabaaza mushanju. Haza ago matabaaza gateebweho kumurikira omwanya oguri omu maisho gaakyo. 
Exodus25:38 Empana zaago n'obushohaani bwazo bibe eby'ezaabu empuuhe. 
Exodus25:39 Ekyo kikondo n'ebyo byona ebirikukoresibwa biheeshwe omu zaabu empuuhe ey'oburemeezi bwa kiloguramu 23. 
Exodus25:40 Haza oreebe ngu waabikora nookuratira eky'okureeberaho kyabyo eki oyorekyeirwe aha rushozi. 
Exodus26:1 Oryakora obutaaho bw'emikingo ikumi ya kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri, ey'omwenda gwa bururu n'ogwa bujwa n'ogwa karari. Haza egyo myenda ogitemu ebishushani bya baakerubi ebitariizwe abanyamyoga." 
Exodus26:2 Buri mukingo gugire oburaingwa bwa mikono makumi abiri na munaana n'obukiika bwa mikono ena buri gumwe; kandi emikingo yoona ebe ey'orugyero rumwe.
