Exodus26:3 Emikingo etaano eteeranwe hamwe, n'endiijo etaano eteeranwe okwayo." 
Exodus26:4 Aha mukugiro gw'omukingo ogurikubandizibwaho aheeru omu mikingo etaano erikubanza, oteho empuruuturizo za bururu; kandi obe nikwo waata empuruuturizo aha mukugiro gw'omukingo ogurikubandizibwaho aheeru, omu mikingo endiijo eya kabiri." 
Exodus26:5 Ote empuruuturizo makumi ataano aha mukingo gw'okubanza ogw'omuri erikubandizibwaho; n'ezindi makumi ataano aha mukugiro gw'omukingo ogw'emikingo etaano eya kabiri. Haza ezo mpuruuturizo zishungane. 
Exodus26:6 Okore ebikwatsi makumi ataano by'ezaabu, obikwatanisise egyo mikingo na migyenzi yaayo, obutaaho bubone kuba bumwe." 
Exodus26:7 Kandi oije okore emikingo omu byoya by'embuzi, ebe eihema ry'okusangira Obutaaho. Haza egyo mikingo ei oraakore, ebe ikumi na gumwe." 
Exodus26:8 Oburaingwa bwa buri mukingo bube mikono makumi ashatu, n'obukiika bwa buri gumwe mikono ena. Kandi egyo mikingo ikumi na gumwe eingane." 
Exodus26:9 Emikingo etaano ogikwatanise okwayo, n'omukaaga okwayo. Haza ogw'emikingo omukaaga ogukubiranire omu maisho g'eryo ihema." 
Exodus26:10 Kandi ote empuruuturizo makumi ataano aha mukugiro gw'omukingo ogurikubandizibwaho omu y'okubanza, n'ezindi mpuruuturizo makumi ataano aha mukugiro gw'ogundi mukingo ogurikubandizibwaho omu ya kabiri." 
Exodus26:11 Reero okore ebikwatsi makumi ataano by'omuringa, obite omu mpuruuturizo, okwatanise eryo ihema ribe rimwe." 
Exodus26:12 Mbwenu ekicweka ky'emikingo y'eihema ekiraatsigareho, ekicweka kya kabiri ky'omukingo ekiraatsigareho kirengyeerere enyima y'Obutaaho." 
Exodus26:13 Kandi mukore gumwe ogw'aha rubaju n'ogundi ogw'aha rundi rubaju, eraashaagye aha buraingwa bw'emikingo y'eihema, erengyeerere omu mbaju z'Obutaaho oku n'oku, kubushweka." 
Exodus26:14 Haza eryo ihema orikorere empu z'empaya z'entaama n'ez'embuzi zirishakaare. 
Exodus26:15 Oryayemereza orukanga rw'Obutaaho noorukoresa embaaho z'omusisa. 
Exodus26:16 Embaaho z'okurukora zibe mikono ikumi omu buraingwa, na buri rubaaho rugire obukiika bwa mukono gumwe n'ekicweka." 
Exodus26:17 Omu buri rubaaho obeijemu endimi ibiri z'okushokanamu, kandi obe nikwo waakora otyo embaaho z'Obutaaho zoona." 
Exodus26:18 Okore oti embaaho z'Obutaaho: embaaho makumi abiri aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo. 
Exodus26:19 Haza okore ebiina by'efeeza makumi ana by'okubyarwamu embaaho makumi abiri: ebiina bibiri bize ahansi y'orubaaho rumwe kushokwamu ezindi ndimi zaarwo ibiri. 
Exodus26:20 Kandi okore ezindi mbaaho makumi abiri z'orubaju rwa kabiri orw'obwo butaaho ez'okuta aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho. 
Exodus26:21 Hamwe n'ebiina makumi ana by'efeeza: bibiri omunda y'orubaaho rumwe, n'ebindi bibiri omunda y'orundi." 
Exodus26:22 Reero enyima y'Obutaaho, orubaju orwa burengyerwa-izooba, oteyo embaaho mukaaga." 
Exodus26:23 Kandi enyima yaabwo oteyo embaaho ibiri z'oburugu. 
Exodus26:24 Zitaane ahansi, kwonka ziteeranire ahaiguru aha mpeta y'okubanza; haza zombi zibe nikwo zaaba, zibone kurugwamu oburugu bubiri." 
Exodus26:25 Reero oteho embaaho munaana, eziine ebiina byazo by'efeeza ikumi na mukaaga; bibiri omunda y'orubaaho rumwe, n'ebindi bibiri omunda y'orundi." 
Exodus26:26 Kandi okore embazi omu muti gw'omusisa: itaano z'okuhamya embaaho z'orubaju rumwe orw'Obutaaho," 
Exodus26:27 ezindi mbazi itaano ahabw'embaaho z'orundi rubaju rwabwo, n'ezindi itaano zibe ez'embaaho z'orubaju rw'Obutaaho orw'enyima orurikuhera burengyerwa-izooba." 
Exodus26:28 Orubazi orw'ahagati orurikugarukira gati y'ezo mbaaho rwogyemu ruhikye aha miheru yombi. 
Exodus26:29 Haza ezo mbaaho ozihumbikye ezaabu, oziheeshere empeta z'ezaabu z'okukwata embazi, kandi ezo mbazi ozihumbikye ezaabu." 
Exodus26:30 Mpaho oyemereze Obutaaho, bushushane n'eky'okureeberaho eki oyorekirwe ahari orwo rushozi." 
Exodus26:31 Reero noija kukora omukingo gw'emyenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari kandi n'eya kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri. Haza ogitemu ebishushani bya baakerubi ebitariizwe abanyamyoga. 
Exodus26:32 Ogwo mukingo oguhanikye aha nyomyo ina z'omusisa ezihumbikirwe ezaabu, eziriho ebikwatsi bya zaabu, zihamiire omu biina bina eby'ezaabu." 
Exodus26:33 Reero omukingo oguhanikye nigwiha aha bikwatsi. Mpaho omuri ogwo mukingo obe nimwo waata eshanduukye y'eby'Obuhamya, gubone kutaanisa omwanya ogurikwera n'ogurikwerera kimwe." 
Exodus26:34 Kandi ote ekitebe ky'okusaasira aha shanduukye y'eby'obuhamya omu mwanya ogurikwerera kimwe. 
Exodus26:35 Aheeru y'omukingo oteho emeeza, kandi ekikondo ky'etabaaza okite aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo obw'Obutaaho nikishungana n'emeeza; obwo emeeza ogitaire aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Exodus26:36 Kandi okore omukingo gw'okuta aha muryango gw'Eihema, ogw'emyenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari na kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri etariizwe abanyamyoga." 
Exodus26:37 Haza ogwo mukingo ogukorere enyomyo itaano z'omusisa, ozihumbikye ezaabu. Ebikwatsi byayo bibe eby'ezaabu, kandi oziheeshere ebiina bitaano by'omuringa." 
Exodus27:1 Okore eitambiro omu musisa erya mikono etaano oburaingwa na mikono etaano obukiika. Eryo itambiro ringane embaju zoona, kandi obwemi bwaryo bube mikono eshatu." 
Exodus27:2 Oriteho amahembe aha nshonda zaaryo ina agabaijerainwe naryo, kandi orihumbikye omuringa." 
Exodus27:3 Orikorere eby'okuyooreramu eiju n'ebitiiho n'ebeeseni n'empana n'eby'okuguhisa omuriro. Ebyo by'okukoresa byaryo byona obiheeshe omu muringa. 
Exodus27:4 Orikorere ebyoma by'okuhemberaho amakara ebirabainemu nk'akatimba, ebiheesirwe omu muringa; kandi ahari ako katimba oteho ebifunga bina by'omuringa aha nshonda zaaryo ina." 
Exodus27:5 Ekyo kyoma kyemi nk'akatimba okite omunda y'omuguno gw'eitambiro, akatimba kahikye rwagati omunda yaaryo." 
Exodus27:6 Eryo itambiro orikorere emigamba y'omusisa ogihumbikye omuringa. 
Exodus27:7 Haza egyo migamba ogishokye omu bifunga, ebone kuba aha mbaju zombi ez'eitambiro baaba nibariheeka." 
Exodus27:8 Oribaije omu mbaaho, ribe omurangara, rikorwe nk'oku oyorekirwe ahari orwo rushozi." 
Exodus27:9 Oryakora ekibuga ky'Obutaaho. Aha rubaju rw'obukiizi bwa buryo, kigire emikingo ya kitaani erukirwe enyabubiri, eya mikono igana oburaingwa aha rubaju rumwe." 
Exodus27:10 Enyomyo zaayo zibe makumi abiri n'ebiina byazo makumi abiri. Bibe eby'omuringa, kwonka ebikwatsi by'aha nyomyo n'obufunga bwazo bibe eby'efeeza." 
Exodus27:11 Kandi aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, oburaingwa bw'orugo bugire emikingo ya mikono igana oburaingwa; enyomyo z'emikingo zibe makumi abiri, n'ebiina byazo makumi abiri by'emiringa; kwonka ebikwatsi byazo n'obufunga bwazo bibe eby'efeeza." 
Exodus27:12 Obukiizi bw'ekyo kibuga obw'aha rwa burengyerwa-izooba bugire emikingo ya mikono makumi ataano, n'enyomyo ikumi, n'ebiina ikumi." 
Exodus27:13 Obukiizi bwakyo ogurikureeba burugwa-izooba, bube obwa mikono ataano." 
Exodus27:14 Emikingo ey'aha rubaju rumwe orw'aha irembo ebe mikono ikumi n'etaano, eine enyomyo ishatu n'ebiina bishatu." 
Exodus27:15 N'aha rundi rubaju, egyo mikingo ebe mikono ikumi n'etaano, eine enyomyo ishatu n'ebiina bishatu." 
Exodus27:16 Aha irembo ry'ekibuga habeho omukingo gwa mikono makumi abiri oburaingwa, gw'emyenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari, kandi n'ogwa kitaani enungi, erukirwe enyabubiri ogutariizwemu ebicwererane. Omukingo ogwo gugire enyomyo ina n'ebiina byazo bina." 
Exodus27:17 Enyomyo zoona ezeehinguririize ekibuga ziteebweho ebifunga by'ezaabu kandi ebikwatsi byazo bibe eby'efeeza, n'ebiina byazo bibe eby'omuringa." 
Exodus27:18 Oburaingwa bw'ekyo kibuga bube mikono igana, obukiika makumi ataano, n'obwemi mikono etaano, biriho emikingo ya kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri, n'ebiina by'emiringa." 
Exodus27:19 Byona ebirikukoresibwa omu Butaaho aha murimo gwona, n'enkondo zaabwo zoona, kandi n'enkondo zoona ez'ekibuga bibe eby'omuringa." 
Exodus27:20 Haza oragiire Abaisiraeli bakureetere amajuta empuuhe ag'emioliva eshekwirwe g'okuhemba, etaara ebone kuteebwaho kuguma neeyaka." 
Exodus27:21 Reero omuri eryo ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu na Ruhanga, aheeru y'omukingo gw'omu maisho g'eby'obuhamya, Arooni n'abatabani nibo baraagume nibareeberera etabaaza, okwiha omu mwabazyo okuhitsya omu kasheeshe, ekaguma neeyakira omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. Ekyo kibe ekitairweho ebiro byona, kuguma nikikuratirwa Abaisiraeli omu busingye bwabo bwona." 
Exodus28:1 Ebyo ku biraahwe, oyehitsye haihi Arooni mukuru waawe, hamwe n'abatabani noobaiha omu Baisiraeli, kumpeereza bari abahongyerezi. Nibo Arooni na batabani be: Nadabu na Abiihu na Eleazaari na Itamaari." 
Exodus28:2 Arooni mukuru waawe omukorere ebijwaro ebirikwera, bimuhaise ekitiinwa n'okwizihirwa." 
Exodus28:3 Kandi ogambire abanyamyoga abaine oburyo burikukiraho, abu naahaire obwengye, babaziirire Arooni ebijwaro by'okumushoroora akaba omuhongyerezi wangye." 
Exodus28:4 Ebi nibyo bijwaro bi baraakore: eky'aha kifuba n'ekitaahiro, bushuuti n'ekanzu y'ebicwererane, ekikwemba ky'omu mutwe n'eky'okwezirikisa. Ebijwaro ebirikwera babikorere mukuru waawe Arooni n'abatabani, kubijwara nibampeereza bari abahongyerezi bangye." 
Exodus28:5 Abo banyamyoga baheebwe ezaabu n'emyenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari na kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri. 
Exodus28:6 Haza bakore ekitaahiro omu zaabu n'omu myenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari n'omuri kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri, bakikozire omu buringaringo." 
Exodus28:7 Ekyo kitaahiro kigire aha mabega ebiremu bibiri ebibaziriirwe aha mikugiro yaakyo yombi, kibone kuteeranwa." 
Exodus28:8 Kandi ekikwemba, eki bakibaziriireho omu buringaringo kukyezirikisa, kibe kikozirwe nkakyo omu bintu bimwe nk'ebyakyo: eby'ezaabu n'emyenda ya bururu na bujwa na karari na kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri." 
Exodus28:9 Reero ogire amabaare g'erangi zitarikushushana, ogasharureho amaziina ga batabani ba Isiraeli." 
Exodus28:10 Amaziina mukaaga aha ibaare rimwe, n'agandi mukaaga aha rindi nk'oku baakurataine omu kuzaarwa." 
Exodus28:11 Nk'oku omunyamyoga w'amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi agasharuraho obumanyiso, naiwe obe nikwo waasharura amaziina ga batabani ba Isiraeli ahari ago mabaare gombi; kandi ogahamise ezaabu ekwegire." 
Exodus28:12 Mpaho ote ago mabaare gombi aha bikwemba by'aha mabega g'ekyo kitaahiro, gabe ag'okwijukiraho batabani ba Isiraeli, Arooni agume ajware aha mabega ge gombi amaziina gaabo, omu maisho ga Nyakubaho kuba eky'okubaijukiraho." 
Exodus28:13 Haza okore omu zaabu ekwegire eby'okuhamya ago mabaare. 
Exodus28:14 Kandi okore emikuufu ebiri y'ezaabu empuuhe ehotoire nk'emigoye, reero egyo mikuufu ehotoire ogikomere aha by'okuhamya." 
Exodus28:15 Kandi okore eky'aha kifuba eky'okwehanuuzaho; okikore omu buringaringo nk'oku ekitaahiro kikozirwe: omu zaabu n'omu myenda ya bururu na bujwa na karari na kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri. 
Exodus28:16 Kibe nikingana embaju zoona ina kandi kikubiraine, kiri ekita kimwe omu buraingwa, n'ekita kimwe omu bukiika." 
Exodus28:17 Haza okiteho embu ina z'amabaare: orw'okubanza rube orw'aga sarudio, topazi na karibunkule;" 
Exodus28:18 orwa kabiri, eruuru, safiro na arimaasi;" 
Exodus28:19 orwa kashatu yakinto, agate na ametisiti." 
Exodus28:20 Reero orwa kana rube orwa berilo, onikisi na yasipi. Goona gahamibwe omu zaabu ekwegire." 
Exodus28:21 Gabe gari amabaare ikumi n'abiri agariho amaziina ga batabani ba Isiraeli; kandi gasharurwe nk'oku basharura obumanyiso, buri rimwe risharirweho eiziina rya rumwe aha nganda ikumi na ibiri." 
Exodus28:22 Ekyo kintu ky'aha kifuba okikorere emikuufu ehotoire nk'emigoye ey'ezaabu empuuhe. 
Exodus28:23 Kandi okiteho empeta ibiri z'ezaabu. Haza ezo mpeta zombi ozite aha mikugiro yaakyo yombi. 
Exodus28:24 Reero emigoye y'ezaabu yombi ogirabye omu mpeta zombi ez'aha mikugiro y'eky'aha kifuba. 
Exodus28:25 Emiheru y'emigoye yombi ogihamize aha by'okuhamya byombi eby'ezaabu ekwegire. Haza obihamize omu maisho g'ebiremu by'aha mabega g'ekitaahiro. 
Exodus28:26 Kandi okore empeta ibiri z'ezaabu ozite aha miheru yombi ey'eky'aha kifuba, aha mukugiro gwakyo ogw'omunda ahahereire ekitaahiro." 
Exodus28:27 Kandi okore empeta ibiri z'ezaabu, ozihamize omu maisho g'ekicweka ekirikuhera ahansi y'ebiremu by'aha mabega byombi eby'ekitaahiro, ahi birikuteeranira, eruguru y'ekikwemba ekirukirwe omu buringaringo eky'okwezirikisa ekitaahiro." 
Exodus28:28 Ekyo ky'aha kifuba, empeta zaakyo zikomeranwe n'ez'ekitaahiro akenda ka bururu, kibone kuhamira aha kikwemba ekirukirwe omu buringaringo, eky'ekyo kitaahiro eky'aha kifuba kirekye kuyuga kikataana n'ekitaahiro." 
Exodus28:29 Arooni atyo ajwarire amaziina ga batabani ba Isiraeli aha ky'aha kifuba eky'okwehanuuzaho, kiri aha kaina k'omutima gwe, yaaba naaza omu mwanya ogurikwera, kuguma naabaijukira omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Exodus28:30 Kandi omuri ekyo ky'aha kifuba eky'okwehanuuzaho, otemu Urimu na Tumimu, bize aha kaina k'omutima gwa Arooni, yaaba naataahamu kuza omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. Nikwo Arooni ariguma naajwara aha kifuba eky'okwehanuuzaho kumuha oburyo bw'okucwera Abaisiraeli emanja omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Exodus28:31 Reero ekanzu y'ekijwaro ky'aha kifuba ekirikwetwa efodi ogikore eri eya bururu. 
Exodus28:32 Egire amaraka g'okurabyamu omutwe, eine omukugiro gutariize okwehinguririza amaraka, nk'oku ekijwaro kyona kigunwa omu maraka ngu kitakaataaguka." 
Exodus28:33 Aha kicweka kyayo ekyaifo obaziirireho ebirikushusha amakoma mahanga omu mwenda gwa bururu, na bujwa na karari, okwehinguririza ekicweka kyayo ekya ifo. Kandi ahagati y'amakoma-mahanga ogyende nootaho amajugo g'ezaabu." 
Exodus28:34 Buri ijugo ry'ezaabu rikuratwe eikoma-mahanga, eijugo ry'ezaabu eikoma-mahanga, okwehinguririza ekicweka kyaifo kyona eky'egyo kanzu." 
Exodus28:35 Mpaho Arooni agume agijware naaza kuheereza, haza okurangira kw'ago majugo kugume nikuhurirwa yaaba naaza omu mwanya ogurikwera omu maisho ga Nyakubaho nari naagurugamu. Obwo nibwo araakire okufa." 
Exodus28:36 Kandi oryakora ekishate kiheesirwe omu zaabu, okisharureho ebigambo ebi: Orikwera wa Mukama, nk'oku basharura akamanyiso." 
Exodus28:37 Reero okikomere aha kikwemba ky'omu mutwe n'akenda ka bururu, kibe omu maisho g'ekikwemba;" 
Exodus28:38 kize aha buso bwa Arooni, na Arooni ayemere ebicumuro ebi Abaisiraeli barikora bareetsire emitoijo yaabo erikwera. Ekyo kishate kigume obutoosha aha buso bwe, emitoijo ebone kwikirizibwa omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Exodus28:39 Reero ekooti ogirukye omuri bafuta enungi etariize, kandi okore ekikwemba ky'omu mutwe ekya kitaani enungi, okore n'eky'okwezirikisa ekitariizemu ebicwererane." 
Exodus28:40 Kandi batabani ba Arooni obakorere ekooti n'eby'okwezirikisa n'enkofiira. Ebyo obibakorere kubahaisa ekitiinwa n'okubareebekyesa gye. 
Exodus28:41 Reero obijwekye Arooni mukuru waawe, n'abatabani abari hamwe nawe, obasiigye amajuta obashoroore obeeze babone kumpeereza bari abahongyerezi." 
Exodus28:42 Kandi obakorere empare za kitaani, bazijware, barekye kujwara busha. Ezo mpare ziihe omu bwezirikiro zihikye aha maju." 
Exodus28:43 Arooni n'abatabani bagume bazijware nibaza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu na Ruhanga; nari baaba baizire haihi n'eitambiro kuheereza omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, batakaayereetaho orubanja bakafa. Ekyo kigume kiri ekiragiro ekiteereirweho Arooni n'abaijukuru abarimukurata." 
Exodus29:1 Mbwenu oku nikwo oraagire Arooni n'abatabani waaza kubeeza, ngu babone kumpeereza bari abahongyerezi. Gira enimi nto n'empaya ibiri z'entaama ezitaine kamogo," 
Exodus29:2 n'emigaati etatumbisiibwe, na twakeeki otutatumbisiibwe, otuteekyesiibwe amajuta g'emioliva, na zaacapati ezitatumbisiibwe, ezimaamagiziibweho amajuta g'emioliva, obikore omu saano y'obunono ey'engano." 
Exodus29:3 Reero obite omu kiibo, kandi obikireeteremu, haza oreete egyo nimi n'ezo mpaya z'entaama zombi." 
Exodus29:4 Mpaho oreete Arooni n'abatabani, obahitsye aha rwigi rw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, oboozye." 
Exodus29:5 Reero oreete ebijwaro ojwekye Arooni ekooti n'ekanzu ejwarirwaho ekitaahiro, kandi omujwekye ekitaahiro ekirukirwe omu buringaringo." 
Exodus29:6 Reero omujwekye ekikwemba omu mutwe, kandi ote ekirunga ekirikwera aha kikwemba." 
Exodus29:7 Mpaho oiheyo amajuta gu basiiga ogamushukye omu mutwe, haza omusiigye." 
Exodus29:8 Bwanyima oreete abatabani nabo obajwekye ekooti. 
Exodus29:9 Obazirikye emyeko, kandi obakomere obukofiira aha mutwe, obuhongyerezi bube obwabo obuhamiibwe ekiragiro ekitarihindurwa ebiro byona. Nikwo oraashoroore otyo Arooni n'abatabani." 
Exodus29:10 Bwanyima oreete egyo nimi omu maisho g'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, Arooni n'abatabani bate engaro zaabo aha mutwe gwayo." 
Exodus29:11 Haza ogiitire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu. 
Exodus29:12 Reero oiheho ekitega ky'eshagama y'egyo nimi, ogisiigye aha mahembe g'eitambiro n'orukumu rwawe; eraatsigareho ogyate omu mizi y'eitambiro." 
Exodus29:13 Bwanyima ogire ebishaju byona ebishweka eby'omu nda, n'ekishaabo ky'aha kine n'entsigo zombi ziriho ebishaju byazo, obyokyeze aha itambiro." 
Exodus29:14 Kwonka enyama z'egyo nimi n'oruhu rwayo n'efa yaayo obyokyeze kimwe aheeru y'orusiisira, ahabw'okuba n'ekitambo ky'okuhongyerera ebibi." 
Exodus29:15 Bwanyima oiheyo emwe aha mpaya z'entaama, Arooni n'abatabani bate engaro zaabo aha mutwe gwayo." 
Exodus29:16 Haza ogiite, oiheho eshagama yaayo, ogimiisiire eitambiro ryona okuryehinguririza." 
Exodus29:17 Bwanyima egyo mpaya ogihirimburemu ebicweka, oyozye eby'omu nda byayo, obiteerane n'ezindi nyama n'omutwe gwayo." 
Exodus29:18 Yoona ogyokyeze aha itambiro. Ekyo n'ekitambo kicwekize ekihongyeirwe Nyakubaho eki bamwokyeize kikamutaamiranira ekisooroora kirungi. 
Exodus29:19 Otware endiijo mpaya y'entaama, Arooni n'abatabani bate engaro zaabo aha mutwe gwayo." 
Exodus29:20 Reero nayo ogiite, oiheho ekitega ky'eshagama yaayo, ogisiigye aha nshonga y'okutu kwa buryo okwa Arooni, n'aha nshonga z'amatu ga buryo ag'abatabani, n'aha bikumu bishaija by'engaro zaabo eza buryo, kandi n'aha bikumu bishaija by'ebigyere byabo ebya buryo; reero eshagama eraatsigareho ogimiisiire eitambiro okuryehinguririza." 
Exodus29:21 Bwanyima oihe ahari egyo shagama y'aha itambiro n'aha majuta gu basiiga, obimiisiire Arooni n'ebijwaro bye, kandi obimiisiire abatabani abari hamwe nawe n'ebijwaro byabo; mpaho we n'ebijwaro bye bibe ebirikwera, hamwe n'abatabani abari hamwe nawe n'ebijwaro byabo." 
Exodus29:22 Kandi otware ebishaju by'egyo mpaya, n'omukira gwayo ogw'ebishaju, n'ebishaju ebishweka eby'omunda, n'ekishaabo ky'aha kine n'entsigo zombi n'ebishaju ebiziriho, n'ekivune kyayo ky'okuguru kwa buryo, ahabw'okuba egyo n'empaya y'entaama ey'omugyenzo gw'okushoroorwa." 
Exodus29:23 Kandi otware omugaati gumwe, n'akabumburi kateekyesiibwe amajuta g'omuoliva, n'ekibanda kimwe, noobiiha omu kiibo ky'emigaati etatumbisiibwe etairwe omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Exodus29:24 Haza ebyo byona obikwatse Arooni n'abatabani, babizongazonzye bibe emitoijo ezongazongyeirwe Nyakubaho." 
Exodus29:25 Bwanyima obibaihe omu ngaro, obyokyeze aha itambiro hamwe n'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, kibe ekisooroora kirungi ekirikutaamiranira omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, kiri ekitambo eki bamwokyeize." 
Exodus29:26 Kandi okwate enkoro y'empaya y'entaama, ey'okushoroorwa kwa Arooni, ogizongazonzye ebe ekitambo ky'okuzongazongyeza omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, haza ebe omugabo gwawe." 
Exodus29:27 Reero oyeze enkoro ei baatoija nibazongazonzya, oyeze n'ekivune ky'omugabo gw'abahongyerezi, nakyo eki baazongazonzya, kandi eki baatamba bakiihire aha mpaya y'okushoroorwa; ahabw'okuba n'ekya Arooni n'abatabani." 
Exodus29:28 Ekyo kivune kibe ekya Arooni n'abatabani; bagume nibakitoijerwa Abaisiraeli ebiro byona, ahabw'okuba n'omugabo gw'abahongyerezi oguriguma nigutoijwa Abaisiraeli nibagwiha aha bitambo byabo eby'okurya kumwe ebi batoijera Nyakubaho." 
Exodus29:29 Ebijwaro ebirikwera ebya Arooni biryaba eby'abatabani abarimuza omu bigyere, biri eby'okusiigirwamu amajuta n'okushoroorerwamu." 
Exodus29:30 Omutabani orimuhungurira omu buhongyerezi amare ebiro mushanju abijwaire, yaaba aizire omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu kuheerereza omu mwanya ogurikwera." 
Exodus29:31 Oryatwara egyo mpaya y'entaama ey'okushoroorwa, oteekyere enyama yaayo omu mwanya ogurikwera." 
Exodus29:32 Arooni n'abatabani bariire enyama yaayo n'emigaati y'omu kiibo aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu. 
Exodus29:33 Baryarya ebyo bintu bi baakarabisa ku bashoroora n'okubeeza, kwonka otari muhongyerezi ataribiryaho, ahabw'okuba n'ebirikwera." 
Exodus29:34 Reero ku harigira enyama y'okushoroorwa nari emigaati ebyatsigaraho okuhitsya omu kasheeshe, ebiriba bitsigaireho ebyo obyotsye, bitariibwa, ahabw'okuba n'ebirikwera." 
Exodus29:35 Okwo nikwo oraatwaze Arooni n'abatabani, nookuratira byona ebi naakuragiira. Obashoroore omu biro mushanju." 
Exodus29:36 Buri izooba ogume ohongye enimi, ebe empongano y'okukarabira ekibi. Kandi ogume ohe empongano y'okuhongyerera eitambiro, noorikarabira, noorisiiga amajuta kandi nooryeza." 
Exodus29:37 Omare ebiro mushanju nookarabira eitambiro kandi oryeze, ribone kuba eririkwerera kimwe; na kyona ekiririkoraho kiryaba ekirikwera." 
Exodus29:38 Mbwenu ebi nibyo oraagume nootambira aha itambiro: abaana b'entaama babiri b'omwaka gumwe nibo oraagume nootamba buri izooba. 
Exodus29:39 Omwana gumwe gw'entaama ogume ogutambe omu kasheeshe, n'ogundi ogutambe omu mwabazyo." 
Exodus29:40 Hamwe n'ogwo mwana gw'entaama ogw'okubanza, otoije kimwe kya ikumi ky'encuro y'esaano y'obunono ejwangizemu kimwe kya kana ky'ecupa ya viino y'okuhongwa." 
Exodus29:41 Reero omwana gw'entaama ogundi ogutambe omu mwabazyo, kandi ogutoijereho ebyokurya by'omujuma n'ebyokunywa, nk'oku kyatwazibwa omu kasheeshe; gube ekisooroora kirungi ekirikutaamirana eky'ekitambo ki bookyeize Nyakubaho." 
Exodus29:42 Kigume kibe ekitambo ky'okucwetsya omu busingye bwanyu bwona oburikuratana, nikitambirwa aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, ahi ndiguma nimbugaabuganira naimwe, nkagira eki naabagambira." 
Exodus29:43 Okwo niyo ndibugabuganira n'Abaisiraeli, kandi eryo ihema riryayezibwa ekitiinisa kyangye." 
Exodus29:44 Niinyija kweza eryo ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, nyeze n'eitambiro; Arooni nawe n'abatabani mbeeze, bampeereze bari abahongyerezi." 
Exodus29:45 Kandi ndyatuura omu Baisiraeli, mbe Ruhanga waabo." 
Exodus29:46 Haza bamanye ku ndi Mukama Ruhanga waabo, owaabaihire omu nsi ya Misiri, ngu mbone kubatuuramu: Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga waabo." 
Exodus30:1 Okore eitambiro ry'okwotereraho obubaani, haza orikore omu muti gw'omusisa." 
Exodus30:2 Oburaingwa ribe mukono gumwe, n'obukiika mukono gumwe, kandi ringane embaju zaaryo ina; reero obwemi bwaryo bube mikono ebiri. Amahembe gaaryo gabaijeranwe naryo." 
Exodus30:3 Orihumbikye ezaabu empuuhe aha mutwe gwaryo n'omu mbaju zaaryo okuryehinguririza, n'aha mahembe gaaryo; kandi oriteho omugoma gw'ezaabu guryehinguririze." 
Exodus30:4 Orikorere ebifunga bibiri by'ezaabu, obite ahansi y'omugoma gwaryo aha mbaju zaaryo zombi ezishungaine, zibe ez'okutamu emigamba y'okuriheekyesa." 
Exodus30:5 Egyo migamba ogibaije omu muti omusisa, kandi ogihumbikye ezaabu." 
Exodus30:6 Reero eitambiro orite omu maisho g'omukingo ogukingiire eshanduukye y'eby'obuhamya, erikureebana n'ekitebe ky'okusaasira ekishwekire eby'obuhamya, ahi ndaabugabuganire naiwe." 
Exodus30:7 Ahari eryo itambiro niho Arooni ariguma naayoterera obubaani burikutaamirana omugaju. Buri kasheeshe, ku ariba naashemeza amatabaaza, abwotere." 
Exodus30:8 Kandi Arooni ku ariba naahemba amatabaaza omu mwabazyo, nabwo abwotere. Bube obubaani oburiguma nibwotererwa omu maisho ga Nyakubaho omu busingye bwanyu bwona." 
Exodus30:9 Mutariryotereraho obubaani burikuzira, nari okuryokyezaho ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, nobu kyakuba eky'esaano nainga okurishukaho ekitambo ky'ebyokunywa." 
Exodus30:10 Arooni aryaguma akarabire aha mahembe gaaryo, omurundi gumwe omu mwaka. Aryaguma arikarabirire n'eshagama y'ekitambo ky'okuhongyerera ebibi omurundi gumwe omu mwaka omu busingye bwanyu bwona. Eitambiro eryo n'eririkwera munonga, erishororeirwe Nyakubaho." 
Exodus30:11 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus30:12 Ku muriba nimubara Abaisiraeli, buri omwe aryaguma ahe Nyakubaho eky'okwecunguza mwaba nimubabara, ngu batakaaguubwamu orufu nimubabara." 
Exodus30:13 Weena oribarwa omuri orwo rubaro, ahe kimwe kya kabiri ky'eshilingi, nka shilingi ey'Omwanya Ogurikwera oku erikwingana omu buguzi (egyo shilingi erimu ebisente makumi abiri), ahe kimwe kya kabiri kyayo, kibe omutoijo gwa Nyakubaho." 
Exodus30:14 Weena oribarwa omuri orwo rubaro, oine emyaka makumi abiri y'obukuru nari okukiraho, ahe ogwo mutoijo gwa Mukama." 
Exodus30:15 Ekyo kimwe kya kabiri ky'eshilingi ku muriba nimukitoijera Nyakubaho kwekarabira, abatungi batarikirenzya n'abooro batarikituubya." 
Exodus30:16 Ezo mpiiha z'okwekarabira oryaguma oziihe aha Baisiraeli, kandi ozigire ez'okukoresa emirimo y'omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu zibone kwijutsya Nyakubaho Abaisiraeli, kandi zibe ekarabo y'amagara gaanyu." 
Exodus30:17 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus30:18 Kandi okore ekinaabiro ky'omuringa, ekibunu kyakyo nakyo kiri eky'omuringa, kibe eky'okunaabiramu. Haza okite ahagati y'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu n'eitambiro, okitemu amaizi" 
Exodus30:19 agu Arooni n'abatabani baraagume nibanaabisisa engaro zaabo n'ebigyere byabo. 
Exodus30:20 Ku bariba nibaataaha omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, nari nibaza kuhika eitambiro kuheereza, kwokyeza Nyakubaho ekitambo, banaabe ago maizi batakaafa." 
Exodus30:21 Baryaguma banaabe engaro zaabo n'ebigyere byabo batakaafa. Ekyo kibe ekiragiro eki bateereirweho ebiro byona, nangwa na Arooni n'abaijukuru, omu busingye bwabo bwona." 
Exodus30:22 Nyakubaho kandi akagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus30:23 Gira eby'emigaju ebirikuhita ebindi byona: Entsinda y'amaizi eya guraamu magana ataano, na kimwe kya kabiri ky'ezo guraamu ky'omugyeegye gw'omugaju gurikutaamirana: nizo guraamu magana abiri na makumi ataano;" 
Exodus30:24 n'omurama gwa guraamu magana ataano, nk'oku guraamu y'Omwanya Ogurikwera eri; kandi n'ecupa y'amajuta g'emioliva," 
Exodus30:25 ebyo byona obikoremu amajuta agarikwera ag'okusiiga agatobagiirwe, nk'oku omunyamyoga w'eby'emigaju agira, gabe amajuta garikwera ag'okusiiga." 
Exodus30:26 Reero ogasiigye eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, eshanduukye y'eby'obuhamya," 
Exodus30:27 n'emeeza, na byona ebyayo ebirikukoresibwa, n'ekikondo ky'etabaaza n'ebyakyo ebirikukoresibwa, otaireho n'eitambiro ry'okwotereraho obubaani," 
Exodus30:28 n'eitambiro ry'ebitambiro by'okucwetsya, na byona ebirikurikoresibwaho; n'ekinaabiro hamwe n'ekibunu kyakyo." 
Exodus30:29 Obyeze, bibeere kimwe ebirikwera, na kyona ekiraabikoreho kibe ekirikwera." 
Exodus30:30 Mpaho osiigye Arooni n'abatabani, obeeze, babone kumpeereza bari abahongyerezi." 
Exodus30:31 Kandi ogambire Abaisiraeli oti: Ago nigo majuta gangye agarikwera, agariguma nigasiigwa omu busingye bwanyu bwona;" 
Exodus30:32 gatarishukwa aha mibiri y'abantu ab'obutoosha, kandi otarikora agandi agajwangiibwe nkago; n'agarikwera, kandi naimwe garyababeera agarikwera." 
Exodus30:33 Weena orijwanzya agarikushushana nago, nari origeesiiga ataine kakwate nago, acuubwe omu ihanga rye." 
Exodus30:34 Kandi Mukama akagambira Musa ati: Gira eby'omugaju murungi: obunyaanunga, butabuta, n'enkuzi eby'emigaju mirungi, hamwe n'obubaani empuuhe, byona ebirikwingana," 
Exodus30:35 haza obikoremu obubaani bujwangiibwe omunyamyoga w'emigaju, burungirwemu omwonyo, oburi empuuhe kandi oburikwera." 
Exodus30:36 Reero obumwe aharibwo obuhonde obunozye, ekicweka kyabwo okite omu maisho g'eby'Okuhamya omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, ahi ndaabugabuganire naimwe, haza naimwe buryababeera oburikwerera kimwe." 
Exodus30:37 Kandi obwo bubaani bu oraakore nookuratira eby'okubujwanzya, mutaribukora ngu bube obwanyu bw'okukoresa; kureka bubabeere oburikwera, obwereziibwe Nyakubaho." 
Exodus30:38 Weena orikora oburikushushana nabwo kubukoresa nk'omugaju, acuubwe omu ihanga rye." 
Exodus31:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus31:2 Reeba naatoorana Bezaleeli mwene Uuri mutabani wa Huuri ow'omu ruganda rwa Yuda," 
Exodus31:3 naamwijuza Mutima wa Ruhanga hamwe n'okubaasikirwa, n'obwengye n'okwetegyereza n'obunyamyoga;" 
Exodus31:4 kucwa obwengye bw'okukora eby'obunyamyoga, kuheesha eby'ezaabu n'eby'efeeza n'eby'emiringa;" 
Exodus31:5 kucweregyerera amabaare g'okuhundisa, kusharura embaaho n'okukora emirimo y'obunyamyoga yoona." 
Exodus31:6 Mbwenu hamwe nawe naatoorana Oholiyaabu mwene Ahisamaki ow'omu ruganda rwa Daani, kandi abo bantu naabaha obwengye bw'okubaasikirwa, babone kukora byona ebi naakuragiira:" 
Exodus31:7 eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, eshanduukye y'eby'obuhamya, ekitebe ky'okusaasira ekigishutamiho, na byona eby'omuri eryo ihema;" 
Exodus31:8 emeeza n'ebirikugikoresibwaho, n'ekikondo kyetabaaza ey'ezaabu empuuhe n'ebyakyo byona ebirikukoresibwa; n'eitambiro ry'okwotereraho obubaani." 
Exodus31:9 Taho eitambiro ry'ebitambo by'okucwetsya, na byona ebyakyo ebirikukoresibwaho, n'ekinaabiro hamwe n'ekibunu kyakyo." 
Exodus31:10 Kandi n'ebijwaro ebibaziirwe gye: ebijwaro ebirikwera ebya Arooni omuhongyerezi n'eby'abatabani, eby'okujwara nibakora omurimo gw'obuhongyerezi;" 
Exodus31:11 taho amajuta g'okusiiga, n'obubaani bw'okutaamiranira Omwanya Ogurikwera. Ebyo byona babikore nk'oku naakuragiira." 
Exodus31:12 Kandi Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Exodus31:13 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Mugume murinde Sabato zangye, ahabw'okuba Sabato n'akamanyiso kangye naimwe omu busingye bwanyu bwona, mubone kumanya ku Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye mbeeza." 
Exodus31:14 Mugume murinde Sabato ahabw'okuba n'erikwera ahariimwe. Omuntu weena origishiisha aryaitwa; na weena origikoreraho omurimo gwona aryacuubwa omu ihanga. 
Exodus31:15 Mugume mukore emirimo omu biro mukaaga, kwonka ekiro kya mushanju ni Sabato ey'okuhuumuririraho kimwe." 
Exodus31:16 N'ahabw'ekyo Abaisiraeli bagume barinde Sabato, nibahitsya emigyenzo yaayo omu busingye bwabo bwona, eri endagaano etarihwaho." 
Exodus31:17 Ako kabe akamanyiso kangye n'Abaisiraeli ak'ebiro byona, ku omu biro mukaaga Nyakubaho yaahangiiremu eiguru n'ensi, haza aha kiro kya mushanju akahuumura akaruhuuka." 
Exodus31:18 Nyakubaho ogwo ku yaaherize kugamba na Musa aha Rushozi Sinaayi, yaamuha ebishate bibiri by'eby'obuhamya. Nibyo bishate by'amabaare ebi Ruhanga yaahandiikireho n'orukumu rwe." 
Exodus32:1 Abantu ku baareebire Musa yaatuuraho kushuuma kuruga aha rushozi, baayeteeranira ahari Arooni, baamugira bati: Imuka, otukorere ruhanga oraatwebembere; ahabw'okuba Musa owaatwihire omu nsi ya Misiri titurikumanya oku abaire." 
Exodus32:2 Arooni nawe abagira ati: Nimujuure empeta z'ezaabu eziri aha matu g'abakazi baanyu na batabani baanyu na bahara baanyu, muzindeetere." 
Exodus32:3 Mpaho abantu boona bajuura empeta ezaabaire ziri aha matu gaabo, bazireetera Arooni." 
Exodus32:4 Atyo azibaiha omu ngaro, azishemeza n'ekyoma kirikusharura, aziheeshamu ekimasha. Haza bagira bati: Iwe Isiraeli, ogu niwe ruhanga waawe owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Exodus32:5 Arooni ku yaakireebire, yaayombeka eitambiro omu maisho gaakyo, yaaranga naagira ati: Nyencakare nikiba ekiro ky'obugyenyi bwa Nyakubaho." 
Exodus32:6 Ku bwaseesire baimuka kare, baatamba ebitambo by'okucwetsya, baahonga empongano z'okusiima ahabw'obusingye, bwanyima abantu baashutama, baarya baanywa, reero baimuka kuzaana." 
Exodus32:7 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: Irooko oshuume; ahabw'okuba abantu abu waihire Misiri beesiisire. 
Exodus32:8 Barahukire kutaishuka omuhanda gu naabaragiire kutoora, baayeheeshera omu zaabu ekishushani ky'ekimasha, baakiramya kandi baakitambira ebitambo, haza baagira bati: Iwe Isiraeli 'we, ogu niwe ruhanga waawe owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misiri!" 
Exodus32:9 Reero Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: Nyetegyereize aba bantu, naamanya ku bari entahurira." 
Exodus32:10 Mbwenu reka ekiniga kyangye kibabugumeho; mbamareho. Haza mbe niiwe naihamu eihanga rihango. 
Exodus32:11 Kwonka Musa yaayeshengyereza Mukama Ruhanga we, naagira ati: Ai Nyakubaho, mbwenu ekiniga kyawe kikaabugumira ki ahari aba bantu baawe, abu waihiise Misiri obushoboorozi bwawe, n'omukono gwawe gw'amaani?" 
Exodus32:12 Ekyo shi, tikikaareetera Abanyamisiri kugira bati: Biri kwo akakikora nkana kubaihayo, ngu abaitire omu nshozi, abamare omu nsi? Mbwenu reka kugira ekiniga kingi, oikaikane, orekye kucwekyereza aba bantu baawe." 
Exodus32:13 Ijuka Aburahamu, Isaaka na Yakobo abaheereza baawe abu waayerahiriire wenka, okabagira oti: Ndyakanyisa baijukuru baanyu babe baingi nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru, kandi egi nsi yoona ei naaraganiise ndyagiha baijukuru baanyu, ebe eyaabo y'obuhunguzi ebiro byona." 
Exodus32:14 Nyakubaho atyo aikaikana, areka akabi aku yaabaire ateekateekire kukora aha bantu be." 
Exodus32:15 Mpaho Musa ahinduka, ashuuma naaruga aha rushozi aine omu ngaro ze ebishate bibiri by'amabaare g'eby'obuhamya ebyabaire bihandiikirwe embaju zombi aha rubaju rumwe n'aha rundi." 
Exodus32:16 Ebyo bishate bikaba bikozirwe Ruhanga kandi abyehandiikiireho n'omukono gwe; obuhandiikye busharwirwe ahari ebyo bishate. 
Exodus32:17 Yoshwa ku yaahuriire orwari rw'abo bantu nibayogoorikana, yaagambira Musa ati: Omu rusiisira hariyo orwari rw'ab'omu rugamba." 
Exodus32:18 Musa amugira ati: Ago ti maraka g'okuyogoorikana kw'abasingwire nari ag'okuborooga kw'abasingwirwe, kureka agu ndikuhurira n'ag'abarikweshongora." 
Exodus32:19 Mbwenu Musa ku yairiire ati haihi n'orusiisira, yaareeba ekyo kimasha n'abarikutaagurira, ekiniga kyamucwa amaraka; yaatambika ebishate bi yaabaire aine omu ngaro, yaabyatira omu mizi y'orwo rushozi." 
Exodus32:20 Yaihaho ekyo kimasha ki baabaire bakozire, yaakyotsya, yaakicwa obusasingo, yaabumemeerera aha maizi, yaaganywaisa Abaisiraeli." 
Exodus32:21 Reero Musa yaagira Arooni ati: Aba bantu bakugizire bata, waaza kubareetera kukora ekibi kihango kityo?" 
Exodus32:22 Arooni amugarukamu ati: Mukama wangye otangirira ekiniga, noomanya aba bantu ku bari endahukirwa y'okukora ekibi." 
Exodus32:23 Manya bangizire bati: Tukorere ruhanga oraatwebembere; ahabw'okuba Musa owaatwihire omu nsi ya Misiri titurikumanya oku abaire. 
Exodus32:24 Naanye naabagira nti: Weena ojwaire eky'ezaabu akijuure. Batyo nabo baabimpa, naanye naabinaga omu iziiko, byarugwamu eki kimasha." 
Exodus32:25 Musa ku yaareebire abo bantu bagomire (ahabw'Arooni kubareka bakahemukira omu bazigu baabo); 
Exodus32:26 Musa ogwo nikwo kwemerera aha irembo ry'Orusiisira, akagira ati: Weena ori aha rubaju rwa Nyakubaho, aije ahi ndi! Mpaho Abaleevi boona baayeteeranira ahu ari." 
Exodus32:27 Nawe yaabagira ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Buri muntu ahagatire rurara ye, akore oku n'oku naaruga aha irembo naaza aha rindi omu rusiisira rwona; haza buri muntu aite mwene ishe, buri muntu aite mugyenzi we, na buri muntu aite mutaahi we," 
Exodus32:28 Abaleevi nabo baatwaza nk'oku Musa yaabagambiire. Eryo izooba baita omuri abo bantu abashaija enkumi ishatu. 
Exodus32:29 Bwanyima Musa yaagira ati: Eri izooba mwayehayo kukorera Nyakubaho omurimo gw'obuhongyerezi: omwe kwita omutabani, ondi akaita mwene ishe, ngu Nyakubaho abone kubaha omugisha eri izooba." 
Exodus32:30 Omu kasheeshe kaakuratsireho Musa yaagambira abo bantu ati: Mukozire ekibi kihango. Mbwenu hati naaza kwinamuka owa Nyakubaho, obundi nkaabaasa kukarabira ekyo kibi kyanyu." 
Exodus32:31 Mpaho Musa agarukayo ahari Nyakubaho, agira ati: Ai bambe; aba bantu ka bakozire ekibi kihango kwekorera ruhanga w'ezaabu." 
Exodus32:32 Mbwenu naakweshengyereza obasaasire ekibi kyabo. Reero ku oraabe otakibasaasire, onyihe omu kitabo kyawe eki waahandiikire." 
Exodus32:33 Haza Nyakubaho agira ati: Weena oncumwireho, niwe ndaihe omu kitabo kyangye." 
Exodus32:34 Mbwenu irooko oyebembere abo bantu, obahitsye omu mwanya gu naakugambiire. Reero maraika wangye naija ahonaaho kukwebembera. Kwonka aha izooba ri ndaizireho, niinyija kubafubira nimbatura ekibi kyabo." 
Exodus32:35 Mpaho Nyakubaho aitsa abo bantu orufu, naabatura ekimasha eki Arooni yaabaheesheire." 
Exodus33:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: Ruga aha, iwe n'abantu bu waihire Misiri, muze omu nsi ei naarahiire kuha Aburahamu, Isaaka na Yakobo, ningira nti: Ndyagiha baijukuru baanyu." 
Exodus33:2 Kandi niinyija kubooherereza maraika w'okubeebembera; mbingyemu Abanyakanaani, Abaamori, Abahiivi, Abapeerizi, Abaahiiti n'Abayebusi." 
Exodus33:3 Nimwirooko muze omu nsi erikuhimintikwamu amate n'obwoki. Kwonka Nyowe tindikwija kugyenda naimwe ntakaabamariraho omu muhanda; ahabw'okuba muri abantu engangaazi. 
Exodus33:4 Abantu ku baahuriire egyo nkuru mbi eyaabagambwaho, baacura; tihaagira n'omwe owaajwara eby'okwehunda." 
Exodus33:5 Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akagira ati: Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Muri abantu entahurira; hati ku naakugyenda naimwe akaanya kakye kati nkaabamaraho. Mbwenu nu nimujuure amahunde gaanyu, mbone kumanya oku ndaabagire." 
Exodus33:6 Abaisiraeli nabo nikwo kujuurira amahunde gaabo aha rushozi Horebu, bakareka kugajwara obundi." 
Exodus33:7 Mbwenu obwo Musa akaba atwara eihema, ariteera aheeru y'orusiisira hare narwo; haza aryeta Eihema ry'Okubugabuganiramu. Mpaho weena owaabaire aba aine eky'okwehabuza ahari Nyakubaho, ashohora, aza aha ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, eryabaire riri aheeru y'orusiisira." 
Exodus33:8 Musa ku yaabaire ashohora kuza ahari eryo ihema, abantu boona baimuka, buri omwe ayemerera aha muryango gw'eihema rye; baguma bamutaireho amaisho okuhitsya obu yaabaire aritaahamu." 
Exodus33:9 Musa ku yaabaire ataaha omu ihema, enyomyo y'ekicu eshuuma, eyemerera aha muryango gwaryo, Nyakubaho agaaniira na Musa." 
Exodus33:10 Kandi abantu boona, ku baabaire bareeba enyomyo y'ekicu eyemereire aha muryango gw'eihema, boona baimuka, baramya, buri omwe ari aha muryango gw' eihema rye." 
Exodus33:11 Nyakubaho nikwo yaabaire agamba atyo na Musa boorekyeraine, nk'oku omuntu agaaniira na mugyenzi we. Reero Musa ku yaabaire agaruka omu rusiisira, omuheereza we Yoshwa mwene Nuuni, akaba ataruga omuri eryo ihema." 
Exodus33:12 Bwanyima Musa akagambira Nyakubaho ati: Reeba, wangira oti: Twara abo bantu, kwonka tiwaamanyisa ou orantume nawe. Haza wangira oti: Ninkumanya eiziina, kandi ori omutetsi ahariinye." 
Exodus33:13 Mbwenu nu, ninkweshengyereza, ku oraabe nooreeba ngu wangirira embabazi, mpabura emitwarize yaawe mbone kukumanya, haza ngume ndi omutetsi ahariiwe. Kandi hoona oijukye ku eri ihanga riri eryawe." 
Exodus33:14 Nyakubaho amugira ati: Niinyija kugyenda naimwe, mbahe obuhuumure." 
Exodus33:15 Musa nawe amugira ati: Ku oraabe otagyenzire naitwe, otatwiha aha." 
Exodus33:16 Mbwenu nyowe n'abantu baawe nitwija kumanyirwa hi ku turi abatetsi ahariiwe? Tiiwe okugyenda naitwe, nyowe n'abantu baawe kikatureetera okuba ab'omutaano aha bandi bantu boona abari omu egi nsi?" 
Exodus33:17 Mpaho Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: Ekyo kintu ki waagamba, buzima niinyija kukikora ahabw'okuba ori omutetsi ahariinye, kandi ninkumanya eiziina." 
Exodus33:18 Musa amugarukamu ati: Naakweshengyereza nyoreka ekitiinisa kyawe. 
Exodus33:19 Nyakubaho amugira ati: Niinyija kurabya oburungi bwangye bwona omu maisho gaawe, ndangire omu maisho gaawe eiziina ryangye “Nyakubaho”; kandi ngirire embabazi ou ndaayende kuzigirira, ngirire esaasi abu ndaayende kuzigirira." 
Exodus33:20 Kwonka agira ati: Torikubaasa kundeeba hamaisho, ahabw'okuba tihariho muntu orindeeba akakira." 
Exodus33:21 Bwanyima Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: Reeba aha rubaju rwangye hariho omwanya gu oraayemerereho aha rukiri. 
Exodus33:22 Reero ku ndaabe nindabaho ndi omu kitiinisa, niinyija kukuta omu bwatika bw'orwo rukiri, nkukingize omukono gwangye okuhitsya obu ndaarabeho." 
Exodus33:23 Bwanyima nyiheho omukono gwangye, obone kundeeba omugongo, kutari kundeeba ahamaisho." 
Exodus34:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: Beija ebishate bibiri by'amabaare ebiri nk'ebyabandize, naanye mbihandiikyeho ebigambo ebi naabaire ntaire aha bishate by'okubanza ebi waayatsire." 
Exodus34:2 Mbwenu nyencakare omu kasheeshe oyeteekateekye, kandi omuri ako kasheeshe oinamukye aha Rushozi Sinaayi, onyegaranjure omu maisho aha mutwe gw'orwo rushozi." 
Exodus34:3 Hatagira omuntu owainamukayo naiwe, nobu yaakuba omuntu weena owaareebwa ahari orwo rushozi rwona. Hatagira kandi amasyo g'entaama nari ag'ente agaariira omu maisho g'orwo rushozi." 
Exodus34:4 Musa atyo abeija ebishate bibiri by'amabaare ebirikushushana n'ebyabandize. Aguruka kare omu kasheeshe, atemba Orushozi Sinaayi, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiire, aine omu ngaro ebishate bibiri by'amabaare." 
Exodus34:5 Nyakubaho atyo ashuumira omu kicu ayemererayo nawe, haza ayeranga ku ari Nyakubaho." 
Exodus34:6 Mpaho Nyakubaho amuraba omu maisho; reero arangirira ati: Niinye Nyakubaho, Mukama Ruhanga ow'embabazi kandi ow'esaasi, otarahuka kugira kiniga kandi oijwire rukundo etahararuka n'obwesigwa," 
Exodus34:7 oguma ainiire embabazi enkumi n'enkumi z'abantu, osaasira ebitahikire n'ebicumuro n'ebibi, kwonka otarenzya maisho n'akakye omuntu oine orubanja; kandi ofubira abaana n'abaana baabo, okuhitsya aha ruzaaro rwa kashatu n'orwa kana, naabatura ebibi bya baishenkurubo." 
Exodus34:8 Mpaho Musa arahuka kwinika omutwe, ajuumara ahansi aramya;" 
Exodus34:9 kandi agira ati: Ai Nyakubaho, ku oraabe wangirira embabazi, mbwenu ninkweshengyereza, oikirize kugyenda naitwe oturi ahagati, eri ihanga nobu riraabe riri entahurira, haza otusaasire ebicumuro byaitu n'ebibi byaitu, kandi otutungye tube abaawe b'empungurano." 
Exodus34:10 Mukama nawe amugira ati: Reeba naaza kubakorera Endagaano. Niinyija kukorera omu maisho g'abantu baawe boona eby'okutangaaza ebitakakorwaga mu nsi yoona nari omu ihanga ryona, haza abantu abu mutwiremu bareebe ebikoro byangye Nyowe Nyakubaho; ahabw'okuba ebi ndaakorere omuriimwe nibiija kutiinisa." 
Exodus34:11 Mbwenu mute omutima aha bi ndikubaragiira eri izooba. Reeba naaza kubinga Abaamori n'Abanyakanaani n'Abahiiti n'Abaperizi n'Abahiivi n'Abayebusi babahungye. 
Exodus34:12 Kwonka imwe mwerinde mutakaakora endagaano n'abatwire omu nsi ei murikuzamu, egyo ndagaano etakaababeera ekiina ky'aha muryango." 
Exodus34:13 Kureka musheenye amatambiro gaabo, muhigure enyomyo zaabo, kandi mutemagure Baasheri baabo." 
Exodus34:14 Manya timuriramya ruhanga ondi, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho ou eiziina rye riba Munyaihato ni Ruhanga w'eihato." 
Exodus34:15 Mwerinde mutarikora endagaano n'abatwire omuri egyo nsi, ahabw'okuba ku barikuhampukira ahari baaruhanga baabo, baatambira baaruhanga abo ebitambo; haza haagira owaabeeta, nimwija kurya aha ki yaatamba;" 
Exodus34:16 mushwererere batabani baanyu bahara baabo, haza bahara baabo bahampukire ahari baaruhanga baabo; reero ekyo kireetere batabani baanyu kuhampukira ahari baaruhanga baabo." 
Exodus34:17 Otaryekorera baaruhanga abaheesirwe. 
Exodus34:18 Oryaguma ogire obugyenyi bw'emigaati etatumbisiibwe. Omare ebiro mushanju noorya emigaati etatumbisiibwe nk'oku naakuragiire omu bunaku obwatairweho obw'omu kwezi Abiihu, ahabw'okuba okwo kwezi Abiihu nikwo waarugiiremu Misiri." 
Exodus34:19 Ekiigura-nda kyona n'ekyangye, ekyetwa enimi n'empaya eby'omu matungo gaanyu ebirijigaijwa omu nte n'omu ntaama." 
Exodus34:20 Eki endogoya erijigaija okicunguze omwana gw'entaama, nainga shi ku oriba otakicungwire okihende ebitsya. Haza hatarigira owaija omu maisho gangye engaro nsha." 
Exodus34:21 Ogume okore omu biro mukaaga, kwonka aha kiro kya mushanju ohuumure, nobu bwakuba omu ibiba n'omu igyesha." 
Exodus34:22 Ekindi ogume ogire obugyenyi bw'ewiiki mushanju, obw'emiganuro y'eigyesha ry'engano, n'obw'eishaaruura ry'aha muheru gw'omwaka." 
Exodus34:23 Abantu baawe boona abeetwa abashaija bagume babonekye emirundi eshatu omu mwaka omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
Exodus34:24 Manya omuri egyo mirundi eshatu omu mwaka, ku oriba nooyeyoreka omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waawe, ndyabinga amahanga gakuhungye, nyirize omu maisho emyatano yaawe, kandi tiharigira muntu n'omwe owaayetenga kukubuura ensi yaawe." 
Exodus34:25 Otarintoijera eshagama y'ekitambo, hamwe n'omugaati gurimu ekitumbisa, kandi ekitambo ky'obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho kitarigumaho okuhitsya omu kasheeshe." 
Exodus34:26 Emiganuro y'ebi mwerize omu misiri yaanyu mugume mugireete omu nju ya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu. Mutariteekyesa omwana gw'embuzi amahenahene ga nyinagwo. 
Exodus34:27 Bwanyima Nyakubaho yaagira Musa ati: Handiika ebyo bigambo, ahabw'okuba nibyo birimu endagaano ei naakora naiwe n'Abaisiraeli." 
Exodus34:28 Musa atyo aguma hamwe na Nyakubaho ebiro makumi ana nyomushana na nyekiro atarikurya ky'okurya kyona, nobu kwakuba okunywa amaizi. Kandi ahandiika ahari ebyo bishate ebigambo by'egyo ndagaano, nibyo biragiro ikumi." 
Exodus34:29 Musa ku yaarugire aha Rushozi Sinaayi, yaashuuma aine ebishate by'obuhamya byombi omu ngaro. Mbwenu ku yaabaire naatsintsimuka orwo rushozi, tiyaamanya ku ahamaisho ge harikumurinkana, ahabw'okuba akaba agaaniire na Ruhanga." 
Exodus34:30 Reero Arooni n'Abaisiraeli boona ku baateereire Musa amaisho bati, baareeba ahamaisho ge nihamurinkana, baatiina kumuhika." 
Exodus34:31 Kwonka Musa yaabeeta. Arooni n'abeebembezi b'ogwo mutwe boona baija ahu ari yaagaaniira nabo. 
Exodus34:32 Bwanyima Abaisiraeli boona bairira haihi, Musa yaabamanyisa ebiragiro ebi Nyakubaho yaamugambiriire aha Rushozi Sinaayi." 
Exodus34:33 Musa ku yaaherize kugamba nabo, yaayeshangira ahamaisho." 
Exodus34:34 Reero Musa ku yaabaire aza omu maisho ga Nyakubaho kugamba nawe, ekyo ky'okwesangiza akiihaho, okuhitsya obu araashohore. Kandi ku yaabaire ashohora, yaagambira Abaisiraeli eki Nyakubaho yaamuragiira;" 
Exodus34:35 Abaisiraeli bakiteerera bati Musa amaisho, bareeba ahamaisho ge nihamurinkana, nawe agaruka ayesangira, okuhitsya yaagarukayo kugamba na Nyakubaho." 
Exodus35:1 Musa akateeranira hamwe Abaisiraeli boona, yaabagira ati: Ebi nibyo Nyakubaho abaragiire kukora." 
Exodus35:2 Mugume mukore emirimo omu biro mukaaga; kwonka ekiro kya mushanju kibabeere Sabato erikwera, ekiro kikuru ky'okuhuumuriraho ekihongyeirwe Nyakubaho. Omuntu weena orikikoreraho omurimo gwona aitwe." 
Exodus35:3 Hatarigira owaahemba omuriro omu maka gaanyu goona aha kiro kya Sabato. 
Exodus35:4 Musa agambira Abaisiraeli abari aho boona ati: Eki nikyo Nyakubaho yaaragiira: 
Exodus35:5 Mutoorane omuriimwe eby'okutoijera Nyakubaho, weena oine omutima gw'obufura amureetere omutoijo: ezaabu, efeeza n'omuringa;" 
Exodus35:6 emyenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari; na kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri; taho obwoshe bw'embuzi; 
Exodus35:7 empu zihazire ez'engondoore z'entaama, n'empu z'embuzi; embaaho z'omusisa;" 
Exodus35:8 amajuta g'okuhemba, eby'emigaju y'okwoteza, amajuta g'okusiiga n'eby'obubaani burikutaamirana omugaju;" 
Exodus35:9 amabaare g'erangi zitarikushushana n'agandi mabaare g'okuhundisa ekitaahiro n'eky'aha kifuba eky'okwehanuuzaho. 
Exodus35:10 Kandi weena omuriimwe orikwebaasa, aije akore byona ebi Nyakubaho aragiire; obutaaho," 
Exodus35:11 n'eihema ryabwo n'eby'okubushweka, ebikwatsi byabwo, embaaho zaabwo, embazi zaabwo, enyomyo zaabwo n'ebiina byabwo." 
Exodus35:12 Taho eshanduukye y'endagaano n'emigamba yaayo, ekitebe ky'okusaasira, n'omukingo gw'okugikingira;" 
Exodus35:13 emeeza n'emigamba yaayo n'ebirikugikoresibwaho byona, kandi n'emigaati y'Okumurika;" 
Exodus35:14 ekikondo ky'etaara y'okuhwezesa n'ebirikukikoresibwaho n'etaara zaakyo n'amajuta g'okuzihembesa. 
Exodus35:15 Eitambiro ry'okwotereraho obubaani n'emigamba yaaryo, amajuta g'okusiiga n'obubaani burikutaamirana omugaju, kandi n'omukingo gw'aha muryango, ogurikukinga aha muryango gw'obutaaho." 
Exodus35:16 Eitambiro ry'ebitambo by'okucwetsya, n'ekyoma kyaryo ky'omuringa ekirabainemu nk'akatimba, n'emigamba yaaryo, n'ebirikurikoresibwaho byona, n'ekinaabiro n'ekibunu kyakyo." 
Exodus35:17 Taho emikingo y'okwehinguririza orugo rw'ekibuga, enyomyo zaarwo n'ebiina byarwo, kandi n'omukingo gw'aha irembo ry'ekyo kibuga," 
Exodus35:18 enkondo z'obutaaho, n'ez'ekibuga n'emigoye yaazo." 
Exodus35:19 Ebijwaro bibaziirwe gye eby'okukoresa omu mwanya ogurikwera; ebijwaro ebirikwera ebya Arooni omuhongyerezi, n'eby'abatabani, eby'omurimo gwabo gw'obuhongyerezi." 
Exodus35:20 Ebyo ku byahwaire, omutwe gw'Abaisiraeli gwona gwayaabuuka gwaruga ahi Musa ari." 
Exodus35:21 Bwanyima abaagizire omuhimbo n'abaayekundiire baija bareetsire emitoijo ya Nyakubaho ey'okukoresibwa omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, ahabw'emirimo yaaryo yoona n'eby'okukoresa ebijwaro ebirikwera." 
Exodus35:22 Abashaija n'abakazi abaayekundiire baija baareeta ebikwatsi birungi n'empeta z'omu matu, n'eziriho obumanyiso, n'ebirikujwarwa aha mikono n'omu maraka; ebintu byona eby'ezaabu; buri muntu yaatoijera Mukama omutoijo gw'ezaabu." 
Exodus35:23 Kandi buri muntu, owaashangirwe aine omwenda gwa bururu, ogwa bujwa, ogwa karari, nari kitaani enungi, nainga obwoshe bw'embuzi, nari empu z'engondoore z'entaama ezihazirwe, yaabireeta." 
Exodus35:24 Weena owaabaasize kugira eki yaaha; eky'efeeza nari eky'omuringa, yaakireeta, yaakitoijera Nyakubaho; n'owaashangirwe aine embaaho z'omusisa ezirikwetengwa ahabw'ogwo murimo, yaazireeta." 
Exodus35:25 Abakazi abanyamyoga baakora ehuuzi n'engaro zaabo, baareeta ebi baakozire: eby'emyenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari, na kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri." 
Exodus35:26 Abakazi abanyamyoga, abaayekundiire, baakaraga obwoshe bw'embuzi." 
Exodus35:27 Abakuru omu ihanga baareeta amabaare g'erangi zitarikushushana, n'amabaare g'okuhundisa n'eky'aha kifuba ekyehanuuzibwaho" 
Exodus35:28 n'eby'emigaju, n'amajuta g'okuhemba, n'ag'okusiiga, n'eby'okutaamiranisa obubaani omugaju." 
Exodus35:29 Abashaija n'abakazi boona Abaisiraeli, abaagizire omuhimbo kugira ebi baareeta ahabw'omurimo gu Nyakubaho yaabaragiire kukora naatuma Musa, baabireeta baabitoijera Nyakubaho biri emitoijo yaabo ei beekundiire." 
Exodus35:30 Mpaho Musa yaagambira Abaisiraeli, ati: Reeba Nyakubaho yaatoorana Bezaleeli mutabani wa Uuri mwene Huuri, ow'omuruganda rwa Yuda;" 
Exodus35:31 kandi yaamwijuza Mutima wa Ruhanga n'obwengye n'okwetegyereza n'okumanya n'obunyamyoga bwona," 
Exodus35:32 kugunja eby'obwengye ebiraakorwe, kuheesha eby'ezaabu n'eby'efeeza n'eby'emiringa;" 
Exodus35:33 kubaija amabaare g'okuhundisa, n'okusharura embaaho, n'okukora emyoga yoona ey'oburingaringo." 
Exodus35:34 Kandi Nyakubaho yaahabura Bezaleeli ogwo, na Oholiyaabu mwene Ahisamaaki, ow'omu ruganda rwa Daani, oku baraayegyese abandi." 
Exodus35:35 Yaabaijuza obwengye bw'okukora emirimo ekorwa abanyamyoga, nari ekorwa abagunzi, nainga ababaziira ebicwererane omu myenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari n'eya kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri, nari abaruki, nainga ebikorwa ibara mukozi, nari omunyamyoga w'obwengye." 
Exodus36:1 Mbwenu Bezaleeli na Oholiyaabu na buri munyamyoga ou Nyakubaho yaahaire obwengye n'okwetegyereza, kumanya oku baraakore ibara murimo gw'okwombeka Obutaaho burikwera, bakore nibakuratira byona ebi Nyakubaho aragiire." 
Exodus36:2 Musa akeeta Bezaleeli na Oholiyaabu n'abantu boona abu Nyakubaho yaahaire ebiteekateeko by'obwengye, weena owaagizire omuhimbo, kwija kukora ogwo murimo." 
Exodus36:3 Mpaho Musa yaabaha ebihongwa byona ebi Abaisiraeli baabaire bareetsire beekundiire, kukoresa omurimo gw'okwombeka Obutaaho oburikwera. Kandi buri kasheeshe baaguma nibamureetera ebihongwa ebi beekundiire." 
Exodus36:4 Reero ekyo kyareetera abantu boona abanyabwengye, abaabaire nibakora buri murimo gw'okwombeka Obutaaho, kwija buri omwe kuruga aha murimo gu yaabaire naakora," 
Exodus36:5 bakagambira Musa bati: Abantu nibareeta ebintu bingi ebirikukira ebirikwetengwa kukoresa omurimo gu Mukama yaaturagiire kukora. 
Exodus36:6 Musa atyo aragiira, ekigambo kirangirirwa omu rusiisira rwona, kiti: Hatagira omushaija nari omukazi owaayongyera kugira eki yaatoija ahabw'okwombeka obutaaho oburikwera. Batyo abantu bazibirwa kwongyera kureeta ekintu kyona;" 
Exodus36:7 ahabw'okuba ebi baabaire baine bikaba nibimara kukora ogwo murimo gwona n'okushaaga. 
Exodus36:8 Mpaho abanyamyoga boona ab'omuri abo bakozi baakoresa Obutaaho emikingo ikumi, eyaakozirwe omuri kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri, n'omu myenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari, bagicwererainemu ebishushani bya baakerubi ababaiziirwe omu buringaringo." 
Exodus36:9 Oburaingwa bwa buri mukingo bukaba buri mikono ikumi; obukiizi bwayo buri mikono ena buri gumwe, kandi emikingo yoona neingana." 
Exodus36:10 Reero emikingo etaano yaagiteerana okwayo, n'endiijo etaano okwayo." 
Exodus36:11 Haza aha mukugiro gw'omukingo ogurikuhereerukayo, ogw'emikingo y'okubanza eteerainwe, yaagutaho empuruuturizo za bururu; yaaba nikwo yaazita n'aha mukugiro gw'omukingo ogurikuhereerukayo ogw'emikingo ya kabiri eteerainwe." 
Exodus36:12 Aha mukingo gumwe yaataho empuruuturizo makumi ataano, n'ezindi makumi ataano aha mukugiro gw'omukingo oguri aha mikingo ya kabiri eteerainwe; ezo mpuruuturizo nizireebana." 
Exodus36:13 Haza yaakora ebikwatsi by'ezaabu makumi ataano, yaabikwatanisisa emikingo; obutaaho bwona bwaba bumwe." 
Exodus36:14 Reero kandi yaakora omu bwoshe bw'embuzi emikingo y'eihema ry'okusangira Obutaaho. Yaakora emikingo ikumi na gumwe. 
Exodus36:15 Oburaingwa bwa buri mukingo bukaba buri mikono makumi ashatu, obukiizi bwa buri gumwe mikono ena, kandi egyo mikingo ikumi na gumwe neingana." 
Exodus36:16 Emikingo etaano yaagiteerana okwayo, n'omukaaga okwayo." 
Exodus36:17 Reero yaakora empuruuturizo makumi ataano aha mukugiro gw'omukingo ogurikuhereerukayo, ogw'emikingo emwe eteeraine; n'ezindi makumi ataano aha mukugiro gw'ogundi mukingo, ahi yombi erikukwatanira." 
Exodus36:18 Kandi yaakora ebikwatsi makumi ataano by'emiringa kukwatanisa Eihema, ryona ribone kuba rimwe." 
Exodus36:19 Yaakorera eryo ihema empu z'engondoore z'entaama n'ez'embuzi kurisangira. 
Exodus36:20 Bwanyima omu mbaaho z'emisisa yaakoramu emyango y'okwemereza Obutaaho. 
Exodus36:21 Buri mwango gwine oburaingwa bwa mikono ikumi, n'obukiizi bwa buri mwango buri mukono gumwe n'ekicweka." 
Exodus36:22 Buri mwango gukaba guriho endimi ibiri z'okugushoka omu gundi, haza emyango y'Obutaaho yoona nikwo yaagikozire." 
Exodus36:23 Egyo myango y'obutaaho akagikora ati: Emyango makumi abiri yaaba ey'aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo," 
Exodus36:24 kandi yaakora ebiina makumi ana by'efeeza ahansi y'egyo myango makumi abiri: ebiina bibiri ahansi y'omwango gumwe, ahabw'endimi zaagwo ibiri n'ebindi biina bibiri ahansi y'ogundi mwango, ahabw'endimi zaagwo zombi." 
Exodus36:25 Aha rundi rubaju rw'Obutaaho orw'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, yaakoraho emyango makumi abiri," 
Exodus36:26 n'ebiina byayo makumi ana by'efeeza, ebiina bibiri ahansi y'omwango gumwe, n'ebindi bibiri ahansi y'ogundi." 
Exodus36:27 Reero aha rubaju rw'enyima orw'Obutaaho, embari ya burengyerwa-izooba, yaakorayo emyango mukaaga." 
Exodus36:28 Kandi oburugu bw'Obutaaho obw'omu rubaju rw'enyima yaabukorera emyango ebiri. 
Exodus36:29 Egyo myango ahansi etaine, kwonka aha mutwe ekwataniire aha mpeta y'okubanza; haza yombi nikwo yaagikozire ahabw'oburugu bwombi." 
Exodus36:30 Ekaba eri emyango munaana, erimu ebiina byayo by'efeeza; ebiina ikumi na mukaaga, buri mwango ahansi yaagwo gwine ebiina bibiri." 
Exodus36:31 Yaakora embazi z'omusisa itaano z'aha mbaaho z'orubaju rumwe rw'Obutaaho; 
Exodus36:32 n'ezindi itaano z'orundi rubaju rwabwo; kandi ezindi itaano ez'aha mbaaho z'orubaju rw'enyima orurikureeba burengyerwa-izooba. 
Exodus36:33 Bwanyima yaakora orubaju rw'ahagati y'ezindi, rwayogamu okwiha aha muheru ogumwe okuta aha gundi, obwemi bwarwo bwahika rwagati y'embaaho." 
Exodus36:34 Reero ezo mbaaho yaazihumbika ezaabu, kandi yaazikorera empeta z'ezaabu z'okukwata embazi; haza ezo mbazi yaazihumbika ezaabu." 
Exodus36:35 Akakora omukingo gw'emyenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari n'eya kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri; yaagitamu ebishushani by'Abakerubi ebitariizwemu abanyamyoga. 
Exodus36:36 Kandi yaagukorera enyomyo ina z'omusisa z'okuguhanikaho; yaazihumbika ezaabu; ebikwatsi byazo nabyo biri eby'ezaabu. Atyo enyomyo yaazibyara omu biina biheesirwe omu zaabu. 
Exodus36:37 Yaakora omukingo gw'okuta aha muryango gw'Eihema gw'emyenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari n'eya kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri kandi etariizwemu ebicwererane; 
Exodus36:38 gwine enyomyo itaano eziriho ebikwatsi byazo. Yaahumbika emitwe yaazo ezaabu n'ebifunga byazo byaba eby'ezaabu; kwonka ebiina byazo bitaano byaba eby'omuringa. 
Exodus37:1 Bezaleeli akakora eshanduukye y'endagaano omu mbaaho z'omusisa, oburaingwa bwayo mikono ebiri n'ekicweka, obukiizi bwayo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka, n'obwemi bwayo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka." 
Exodus37:2 Kandi yaagihumbika ezaabu empuuhe omunda n'enyima; yaagitaho omugoma gw'ezaabu kugyehinguririza. 
Exodus37:3 Yaagiheeshera ebifunga bina by'ezaabu by'okuta aha nshonda zaayo ina; bibiri aha rubaju orumwe n'ebindi aha rundi. 
Exodus37:4 Yaakora n'emigamba omu rubaaho rw'omusisa, yaagihumbika ezaabu." 
Exodus37:5 Emigamba yaagishoka omu bifunga by'omu mbaju z'eshanduukye, kuguma nibagigiheekyesa." 
Exodus37:6 Reero yaakora ekitebe ky'okusaasira ky'ezaabu empuuhe, ky'oburaingwa bwa mikono ebiri n'ekicweka n'obukiika bwa mukono gumwe n'ekicweka." 
Exodus37:7 Kandi yaakora ebishushani bya baakerubi bibiri, biheesirwe omu zaabu; yaabita aha miheru yombi ey'ekitebe ky'okusaasira:" 
Exodus37:8 kerubi omwe aha muheru gumwe, na kerubi ondi aha gundi. Haza baakerubi abo yaabaheesherana n'ekitebe ky'okusaasira aha miheru yaakyo." 
Exodus37:9 Baakerubi abo bakaba bashashanwire amapapa gaabo ahaiguru, bagasangiize ekitebe ky'okusaasira nibareebana boorekyeire ekitebe ky'okusaasira." 
Exodus37:10 Bezaleeli akakora emeeza omu mbaaho z'omusisa y'oburaingwa bwa mikono ebiri, obukiika bwa mukono gumwe, n'obwemi bwa mukono gumwe n' ekicweka." 
Exodus37:11 Yaagihumbika ezaabu empuuhe, yaagitaho omugoma gw'ezaabu kugyehinguririza." 
Exodus37:12 Reero yaagikorera orubazi rw'obukiika bw'ekita kimwe rwagyehinguririza; kandi orwo rubazi yaarukoreraho omugoma gw'ezaabu gwarwehinguririza. 
Exodus37:13 Egyo meeza yaagiheeshera ebifunga bina by'ezaabu, yaabita aha nshonda ina ez'aha maguru gaayo ana." 
Exodus37:14 Ebifunga bikaba bihikaine n'orubazi, biri eby'okushokwamu emigamba y'okuheekyesa emeeza." 
Exodus37:15 Emigamba akagikora omu mbaaho z'omusisa, yaagihumbika ezaabu." 
Exodus37:16 Reero yaakora ebintu omu zaabu empuuhe eby'okuta aha meeza, eshuhaani zaayo n'eby'okwotereraho obubaani, n'ebakuri n'engyemeko z'okushukisa ebyokunywa ebihongirwe." 
Exodus37:17 Kandi akakora ekikondo ky'etabaaza omu zaabu empuuhe. Ekibunu n'omukono gwakyo bikaba biheesirwe, ebikopo byakyo n'entwe zaakyo n'ebirabyo byakyo biheesherainwe nakyo." 
Exodus37:18 Kiine amataagi mukaaga agataagwize aha mbaju zaakyo: ashatu aha rubaju rumwe, n'agandi ashatu aha rundi." 
Exodus37:19 Ebikopo byakyo ebyemi nk'amatunguru, buri kimwe kiriho entwe n'ekirabyo aha itaagi rimwe; n'ebindi bikopo bishatu nabyo ebyemi nk'amatunguru, buri kimwe kiine entwe n'ekirabyo aha rindi itaagi. Goona amataagi mukaaga, agataagwize ahari ekyo kikondo, gaaba nikwo gaaba." 
Exodus37:20 Kandi ahari ekyo kikondo hakaba hariho ebikopo bina ebikozirwe nk'amatunguru, biriho entwe n'ebirabyo;" 
Exodus37:21 haza entwe eheesheraniirwe ahansi ya buri mataagi abiri ag'ago omukaaga agarikukitaaguzaho. 
Exodus37:22 Entwe zaabyo n'amataagi gaabyo bikaba biheesherainwe nakyo; kyona kiheesheirwe kimwe omu zaabu empuuhe. 
Exodus37:23 Reero yaakiheeshera amatabaaza mushanju n'empana n'obubangari, biri eby'ezaabu empuuhe." 
Exodus37:24 Ekyo kikondo n'ebirikukikoresibwaho akabikoresa ezaabu empuuhe y'oburemeezi bwa kiloguraamu makumi abiri na ishatu. 
Exodus37:25 Akakora eitambiro ry'okwotereraho obubaani omu mbaaho z'omusisa ry'oburaingwa bwa mukono gumwe n'obukiika bwa mukono gumwe, niringana embaju zoona ina, n'obwemi bwaryo buri mikono ebiri; kandi amahembe gaaryo gabaijerainwe naryo." 
Exodus37:26 Yaarihumbika ezaabu empuuhe aha mutwe gwaryo n'omu mbaju zaaryo kuryehinguririza, n'aha mahembe gaaryo; kandi yaarikorera omugoma gw'ezaabu guryehinguririize." 
Exodus37:27 Reero yaariheeshera ebifunga bibiri by'ezaabu, ahansi y'omugoma gwaryo aha mbaju zaaryo zombi ezirikureebana, kuba eby'okurabyamu emigamba y'okuriheekyesa." 
Exodus37:28 Egyo migamba yaagibaija omu mbaaho z'omusisa, haza yaagihumbika ezaabu." 
Exodus37:29 Kandi yaakora amajuta g'okusiiga eby'okweza, n'obubaani burikutaamirana omugaju nk'oku bujwangibwa omunyamyoga w'emigaju." 
Exodus38:1 Reero akakora eitambiro ry'ebitambo by'okucwetsya, omu mbaaho z'omunyinya, ry'oburaingwa bwa mikono etaano, n'obukiika bwa mikono etaano, ririkwingana embaju zaaryo zoona, kandi obwemi bwaryo buri mikono eshatu." 
Exodus38:2 Yaarikorera amahembe aha nshonda zaaryo ina, gaheesherainwe naryo, yaarihumbika omuringa." 
Exodus38:3 Kandi yaakora eby'okukoresa ahari eryo itambiro ebi: ebinyungu, ebitiiho, ebibeeseni, empana n'eby'okuguhisa omuriro. Eby'okukoresa byaryo byona yaabiheesha omu muringa." 
Exodus38:4 Kandi eitambiro yaarikorera ekyoma ky'omuringa ky'okuhemberaho amakara, ekirabainemu nk'akatimba ahansi y'omugoma gwaryo, ekirikuhika rwagati yaaryo." 
Exodus38:5 Aha nshonda ina z'ekyo kyoma ky'omuringa yaaheesheraho ebifunga bina by'okurabyamu emigamba. 
Exodus38:6 Egyo migamba yaagibeija omu mbaaho z'emisisa, yaagihumbika omuringa," 
Exodus38:7 yaagirabya omu bifunga by'omu mbaju z'eitambiro, kugiriheekyesa. Eryo itambiro yaarikoresa embaaho, ryaba omurangara." 
Exodus38:8 Kandi akaheesha ekinaabiro ky'omuringa n'ekibunu kyakyo ky'omuringa, yaabiheesha omu ndeeberwamu zi yaihire aha bakazi abaabaire baheerereza aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Exodus38:9 Akakora ekibuga aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, emikingo yaakyo eri eya kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri, eya mikono igana." 
Exodus38:10 Enyomyo zaayo ziri makumi abiri, n'ebiina byazo by'omuringa biri makumi abiri; kwonka ebirikukwata ezo nyomyo n'obufunga bwabyo biri eby'efeeza." 
Exodus38:11 Kandi aha rubaju rwakyo rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho oburaingwa bwarwo buri mikono igana, n'enyomyo zaabyo makumi abiri, n'ebiina byazo makumi abiri, biri eby'omuringa; kwonka ebirikukwata ezo nyomyo, n'obufunga bwabyo biri eby'efeeza." 
Exodus38:12 Aha rubaju rwa burengyerwa-izooba, hakaba hariyo emikingo ya mikono makumi ataano, n'enyomyo zaayo ikumi, n'ebiina byazo ikumi; ebirikukwata ezo nyomyo n'obufunga bwabyo biri eby'efeeza." 
Exodus38:13 Kandi omu maisho aharikureeba burugwa-izooba obuhango bwaryo mikono makumi ataano. 
Exodus38:14 Emikingo y'orubaju rumwe orw'aha irembo eri mikono ikumi n'etaano, ehanikirwe aha nyomyo ishatu eziri omu biina bishatu." 
Exodus38:15 N'aha rundi rubaju bityo. Mpaho aha mbaju zombi ez'aha irembo ry'ekyo kibuga, hariyo emikingo ya mikono ikumi n'etaano, n'enyomyo ishatu, n'ebiina bishatu." 
Exodus38:16 Emikingo yoona eyehinguririize ekyo kibuga, eri eya kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri." 
Exodus38:17 Ebiina by'enyomyo biri eby'omuringa, kwonka ebirikukwata enyomyo n'obufunga bwabyo biri eby'efeeza, n'ekihumbikire entwe zaabyo nakyo kiri eky'efeeza; kandi enyomyo z'ekibuga zoona ziine obufunga bw'efeeza." 
Exodus38:18 Haza omukingo gw'aha irembo ry'ekibuga gukaba gubaziirwemu ebicwererane by'emyenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari n'eya kitaani enungi ey'ehuuzi zoogosirwe enyabubiri. Ogwo mukingo omu buraingwa guri mikono makumi abiri kandi omu mbaju z'obukiika bwagwo guri mikono etaano obwemi, gwemi nk'emikingo y'ekyo kibuga." 
Exodus38:19 Reero enyomyo z'emikingo zikaba ziri ina, n'ebiina byazo by'omuringa bina ebirikuzikwata biri eby'efeeza, n'ekihumbikire entwe zaazo n'obufunga bwazo kiri eky'efeeza." 
Exodus38:20 Kandi enkondo zoona ez'Obutaaho n'ez'ekyo kibuga okukyehinguririza ziri ez'omuringa. 
Exodus38:21 Ebyoma ebi baakoreise obutaaho bw'eby'Obuhamya nk'oku Musa yaaragiire Abaleevi kubibara nibareebererwa Itamaari mwene Arooni omuhongyerezi bikaingana biti: 
Exodus38:22 Bezaleeli mwene Uuri mutabani wa Huuri ow'omu ruganda rwa Yuda akakora byona ebi Mukama yaaragiire Musa. 
Exodus38:23 Kandi akaba aine Oholiyaabu mwene Ahisamaaki ow'omu ruganda rwa Daani, omunyamyoga omusharuzi kandi omubaziizi w'ebicwererane by'emyenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari n'eya kitaani enungi ey'ehuuzi zoogosirwe enyabubiri." 
Exodus38:24 Ezaabu yoona ei baakoreise omurimo gw'okwombeka obutaaho oburikwera, eyaatoizirwe, ekahitsya oburemeezi bwa kiloguraamu rukumi na makumi mwenda na munaana, obariire aha rurengo rw'empiiha y'obutaaho oburikwera." 
Exodus38:25 N'efeeza eyaarugire omuri abo bantu beeteeraine abaabazirwe, ekahitsya oburemeezi bwa kiloguraamu enkumi ishatu na magana mushanju na makumi mushanju na itaano; obariire aha rurengo rw'empiiha y'obutaaho oburikwera." 
Exodus38:26 Obwo buri muntu naaha kimwe kya kabiri ky'empiiha y'obutaaho oburikwera eyaacwereirwe buri omwe owaabazirwe omuri orwo rubaro, okwiha aha w'emyaka makumi abiri y'obukuru n'okweyongyerayo. Nizo zaahairwe abantu obusiriira mukaaga n'enkumi ishatu na magana ataano na makumi ataano." 
Exodus38:27 Kiloguraamu enkumi ishatu na magana mushanju na makumi ataano z'efeeza zikaba ez'okuheeshamu ebiina igana by'obutaaho oburikwera n'eby'omukingo; buri kiloguraamu makumi ashatu na munaana ekiina kimwe. 
Exodus38:28 Kandi kiloguraamu makumi abiri na itaano z'efeeza yaazikoramu eby'okuhanikaho eby'aha nyomyo, n'okushwekyesa entwe zaazo, yaazikorera n'ebifunga." 
Exodus38:29 Reero ebyoma by'omuringa ebyareetsirwe bikahitsya kiloguraamu enkumi ibiri na magana mukaaga na makumi ataano na itaano. 
Exodus38:30 Nibyo yaakoreise ebiina by'aha rwigi rw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu n'eitambiro ry'omuringa n'ekyoma kyaryo ky'omuringa, ekirabainemu nk'akatimba n'ebirikukoresibwa aha itambiro byona." 
Exodus38:31 Taho ebiina ebyehinguririize ekibuga n'enkondo z'obutaaho oburikwera n'ezeehinguririize ekibuga zoona. 
Exodus39:1 Reero omu myenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa n'eya karari, bakakoramu ebijwaro birungi by'abahongyerezi kujwara nibaheereza omu Mwanya Ogurikwera. Baakorera na Arooni ebijwaro ebirikwera nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa." 
Exodus39:2 Kandi baakora ekitaahiro ky'emikwegye y'ezaabu, n'omwenda gwa kitaani enungi ogw'ehuuzi za bururu n'eza bujwa n'eza karari, ezoogosirwe enyabubiri." 
Exodus39:3 Baaheesha ezaabu yaaba obubabi, baabwihamu emikwegye y'okucwererana amabara g'emyenda y'ehuuzi za bururu n'eza bujwa n'eza karari na kitaani enungi eyogosirwe enyabubiri nk'oku abanyamyoga b'obwengye bakora." 
Exodus39:4 Ekyo kitaahiro baakitaho ebiremu by'aha mabega, ebiteerainwe nakyo aha mikugiro yaakyo yombi." 
Exodus39:5 Reero omweko ogukiriho ogw'okukyezirikisa, ogurukirwe abanyamyoga omu buringaringo, baagukora omu bintu bimwe, n'omu muringo gumwe nkakyo, omu zaabu n'omu mwenda gw'ehuuzi za bururu n'eza bujwa n'eza karari n'eza kitaani enungi ezoogosirwe enyabubiri, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa." 
Exodus39:6 Bakashemeza amabaare g'erangi zitarikushushana, baagahamisa ezaabu ekwegire; kandi baagasharura nk'oku basharura obumanyiso, nibagataho amaziina ga batabani ba Isiraeli." 
Exodus39:7 Ago mabaare yaagata aha biremu by'aha mabega g'ekitaahiro kuba ag'okwijukiraho batabani ba Isiraeli; nk'oku Mukama yaaragiire Musa. 
Exodus39:8 Kandi akakora eky'okujwara aha kifuba omu buringaringo, nk'oku abanyamyoga baakozire ekitaahiro, omu zaabu n'omwenda gw'ehuuzi za bururu na bujwa na karari na kitaani enungi eyogosirwe enyabubiri. Eky'okujwara aha kifuba" 
Exodus39:9 kikaba nikingana omu mbaju zaakyo ina; kandi kikozirwe kikubiraine, kikikubwa kiba kimwe omu buraingwa n'ekita kimwe omu bukiika." 
Exodus39:10 Haza baakibambatikaho embu ina z'amabaare. Orw'okubanza rurimu aga sarudio na topazi na barekeesi. 
Exodus39:11 Orubu rwa kabiri baatamu aga emeralido, na safiro na alimaasi." 
Exodus39:12 Orwa kashatu, yakinto, agate na ametisiti." 
Exodus39:13 Reero orwa kana baarutaho aga berulo, onikisi na yasipi; goona baagahamiza omu mishorongo yaago n'ezaabu ekwegire." 
Exodus39:14 Gakaba gari amabaare ikumi n'abiri, gariho amaziina ga batabani ba Isiraeli. Gari nk'obumanyiso; buri ibaare risharwirweho eiziina ryaryo kumanyisa enganda ikumi na ibiri." 
Exodus39:15 Kandi aha ky'aha kifuba ekyo baakoreraho emikuufu ehotoire nk'emigoye, eri ey'ezaabu empuuhe." 
Exodus39:16 Reero baakora embu ibiri z'okuhamya ago mabaare omu zaabu ekwegire, n'empeta ibiri z'ezaabu. Ezo mpeta baazita aha mikugiro yombi ey'eky'aha kifuba." 
Exodus39:17 Mpaho baarabya emiyondo y'ezaabu omu mpeta zombi, aha mukugiro y'eky'aha kifuba." 
Exodus39:18 Emitwe y'emiyondo yombi baagihamiza aha mbu ibiri ez'ezaabu ekwegire, baagihamiza batyo omu maisho g'ebiremu by'aha mabega g'ekitaahiro." 
Exodus39:19 Bwanyima baakora empeta ibiri z'ezaabu, baazita aha mikugiro yombi ey'eky'aha kifuba, aha mukugiro gwakyo ogw'omunda, oguhereraine n'ekitaahiro." 
Exodus39:20 Reero baakora empeta ibiri z'ezaabu, baazihamiza omu maisho g'ekicweka kya ifo eky'ebiremu by'aha mabega g'ekitaahiro, ahi kirikuteeranira eruguru y'omweko gwakyo ogurukirwe omu buringaringo." 
Exodus39:21 Mpaho eky'aha kifuba baakikomesa empeta zaakyo, nibazikomera aha z'ekitaahiro n'akagoye ka bururu ngu kibone kuhamira aha mweko gw'ekitaahiro ogurukirwe omu buringaringo kandi ngu kitayuga kikataana n'ekyo kitaahiro; nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa." 
Exodus39:22 Kandi akakora ekanzu y'ekyo kitaahiro, yoona erukirwe omu mwenda gwa bururu." 
Exodus39:23 Haza amaraka gaayo yaagagira nk'oku bakora ag'ekindi kijwaro, yaatariza omukugiro gwago ngu gatakaataaguka." 
Exodus39:24 Aha mukugiro gwayo ogwa ifo baabaziiraho ebirikushusha amakoma mahanga omu huuzi za bururu n'eza bujwa, n'eza karari n'eza kitaani nungi ezoogosirwe enyabubiri." 
Exodus39:25 Kandi baaheesha amajugo omu zaabu empuuhe, baagata ahagati y'amakoma-mahanga, aha mukugiro gwa ifo ogw'ekanzu, gaagwehinguririza, nibaguhunda ahagati y'amakoma-mahanga;" 
Exodus39:26 buri ijugo nirikuratwa eikoma-mahanga, okwehinguririza omukugiro gwa ifo egw'ekanzu y'okuheererezamu; nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa." 
Exodus39:27 Kandi baakorera Arooni n'abatabani amakooti garukiisiibwe ehuuzi za kitaani enungi," 
Exodus39:28 n'ekikwemba ky'omu mutwe ekya kitaani enungi, n'enkofiira za kitaani enungi, n'empare ndaingwa eza kitaani enungi erukirwe enyabubiri;" 
Exodus39:29 hamwe n'omweko gw'omwenda gw'ehuuzi za kitaani enungi ezoogosirwe enyabubiri, n'eza bururu n'eza bujwa n'eza karari, ezibaziirwemu ebicwererane; nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa." 
Exodus39:30 Reero baakora ekipande ky'aha kirunga ekirikwera omu zaabu empuuhe, baakihandiikaho nk'oku basharura akamanyiso bati: Oyereziibwe Nyakubaho." 
Exodus39:31 Haza baakikomesa akagoye ka bururu kukihamiza eruguru y'ekikwemba ky'omu mutwe; nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa. 
Exodus39:32 Oku nikwo baaherize omurimo gw'okwombeka obutaaho oburikwera obw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu; kandi Abaisiraeli bakakora byona, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa, baaba nikwo baakora." 
Exodus39:33 Batyo baareetera Musa obutaaho oburikwera, eihema n'ebirikurikoresibwamu byona, ebikwatsi byaryo, embaaho zaaryo, embazi zaaryo, enyomyo zaaryo, n'ebiina byaryo," 
Exodus39:34 empu zihazire ez'engondoore z'entaama ez'okurisangira n'ez'engongi n'omukingo gw'okukingira Obutaaho," 
Exodus39:35 eshanduukye y'eby'obuhamya n'emigamba yaayo n'ekitebe ky'okusaasira," 
Exodus39:36 emeeza n'ebirikugikoresibwaho, n'emigaati y'okumurikwa;" 
Exodus39:37 taho ekikondo ky'eitabaaza eky'ezaabu empuuhe, n'amatabaaza gaakyo g'okukitaho, n'eby'okukikoresaho byona n'amajuta g'okuhemba;" 
Exodus39:38 eitambiro ry'ezaabu, amajuta g'okusiiga, n'obubaani burikutaamirana omugaju, n'omukingo gw'aha muryango gw'eihema," 
Exodus39:39 eitambiro ry'omuringa, n'ekyoma kyaryo ky'omuringa ekirabainemu nk'akatimba; emigamba yaaryo, n'ebirikurikoresibwaho byona; ekinaabiro n'ekibunu kyakyo," 
Exodus39:40 emikingo y'ekibuga n'enyomyo zaakyo n'ebiina byakyo n'omukingo gw'aha irembo ryakyo, emigoye yaakyo, ebikondo byakyo, na byona eby'okukoresibwa nibaheereza omu butaaho n'omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu," 
Exodus39:41 ebijwaro bibaziirwe gye eby'okuheererezamu omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, n'ebijwaro ebirikwera ebya Arooni omuhongyerezi n'eby'abatabani kukoresa emirimo y'obuhongyerezi." 
Exodus39:42 Abaisiraeli batyo baakora omurimo gwona nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa. 
Exodus39:43 Musa nawe yaareeba ogwo murimo yaashanga bagukozire nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire; haza nikwo baagukozire. Musa atyo yaabashabira omugisha. 
Exodus40:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Exodus40:2 Aha kiro ky'okubanza ky'okwezi kw'okubanza, oryayemereza eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Exodus40:3 Oritemu eshanduukye y'endagaano ogikingize omukingo. 
Exodus40:4 Oritemu emeeza, otebeekanise eby'okugikoresezaho; kandi oritemu ekikondo ky'amatabaaza, okiteho n'amatabaaza gaakyo." 
Exodus40:5 Reero omu maisho g'eshanduukye y'eby'obuhamya otemu eitambiro ry'ezaabu ery'okwotereraho obubaani; kandi ote omukingo aha muryango gw'eihema. 
Exodus40:6 Haza omu maisho g'omuryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, obe niho waata eitambiro ry'ebitambo by'okucwetsya." 
Exodus40:7 Kandi ote ekinaabiro ahagati y'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu n'eitambiro, haza okitemu amaizi." 
Exodus40:8 Mpaho oimutsye orugo rwehinguririze ekibuga; reero ote omukingo aha irembo ryakyo. 
Exodus40:9 Bwanyima oiheyo amajuta g'okusiiga ogasiigye Obutaaho n'ebirimu byona; obuhaasirire n'ebyamwo byona, bube oburikwera." 
Exodus40:10 Reero oije osiigye eitambiro ry'okutambiraho eby'okucwetsya, n'eby'okurikoresaho byona oryeze, ribe eririkwerera kimwe." 
Exodus40:11 Kandi osiigye ekinaabiro n'ekibunu kyakyo, okihaasirire." 
Exodus40:12 Bwanyima oreete Arooni n'abatabani aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, oboozye n'amaizi." 
Exodus40:13 Reero ojwekye Arooni ebijwaro ebirikwera, omusiigye kandi omuhaasirire abone kunkorera omurimo ari omuhongyerezi." 
Exodus40:14 Kandi oreete abatabani, obajwekye ekooti." 
Exodus40:15 Obasiigye nk'oku waasiiga ishebo, babone kumpeereza bari abahongyerezi. Okusiigwa kwabo kubahaise obuhongyerezi bw'ebiro byona omu nzaaro zaabo." 
Exodus40:16 Oku nikwo Musa yaakozire ebintu nk'oku Mukama yaamuragiire. 
Exodus40:17 Omu kwezi kw'okubanza okw'omu mwaka gwa kabiri, aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwo kwezi, bakaimutsya obutaaho." 
Exodus40:18 Musa yaabwimutsya, yaataho ebiina byabwo, yaabibyaramu embaaho zaabwo, yaataho embazi zaabwo, yaateera n'enyomyo zaabwo." 
Exodus40:19 Obwo butaaho yaabushakaaza eihema, ryabushweka, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiire." 
Exodus40:20 Reero yaareeta eby'obuhamya yaabita omu shanduukye, yaagitaasyamu emigamba; kandi ahaiguru yaayo yaataho ekitebe ky'okusaasira." 
Exodus40:21 Obwo butaaho yaabutamu eshanduukye y'eby'obuhamya; yaagitaho omukingo, gwagikingira, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiire." 
Exodus40:22 Kandi omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, yaatamu emeeza aha rubaju rwa bumosho rw'Obutaaho enyima y'omukingo." 
Exodus40:23 Egyo meeza yaagitebeekanisaho gye emigaati y'okumurikira Nyakubaho nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiire. 
Exodus40:24 Reero yaata ekikondo ky'amatabaaza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, kyareebana n'emeeza aha rubaju rwa buryo orw'Obutaaho." 
Exodus40:25 Yaakitaho amatabaaza g'okwakira omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiire." 
Exodus40:26 Atyo yaata eitambiro omu maisho g'omukingo, gw'omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Exodus40:27 Yaaryotereraho obubaani burikutaamirana omugaju nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiire. 
Exodus40:28 Kandi yaata omukingo aha muryango gw'Obutaaho. 
Exodus40:29 N'aha muryango gw'obutaaho bw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, yaataho eitambiro ry'ebitambo by'okucwetsya, yaaritambiraho ekitambo kicwekize n'eky'esaano nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiire." 
Exodus40:30 Reero ahagati y'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu n'eitambiro yaataho ekinaabiro yaakitamu amaizi g'okunaaba. 
Exodus40:31 Musa ogwo na Arooni n'abatabani kuguma nibaganaabisisa engaro n'ebigyere," 
Exodus40:32 baaba bataahire omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, bari haihi kuhika eitambiro; batyo banaaba nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiire." 
Exodus40:33 Bwanyima akataho orugo rwayehinguririza ekibuga ky'Obutaaho n'eitambiro, yaata n'omukingo aha irembo ry'ekibuga. Musa yaaheza atyo ogwo murimo." 
Exodus40:34 Ebyo ku byahwaire, ekicu kyashweka eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu; ekitiinisa kya Nyakubaho kyaijura Obutaaho." 
Exodus40:35 Musa tiyaabaasa kutaaha mu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, ahabw'okuba ekyo kicu kikaba kiririho n'ekitiinisa kya Nyakubaho kiijwire Obutaaho." 
Exodus40:36 Omu ngyendo zaabo zoona, ekyo kicu ku kyabaire kiimuka aha butaaho, Abaisiraeli baimutsya bagyenda." 
Exodus40:37 Kikiba kitaihirweho, bareka kugumizamu orugyendo, okuhitsya obu kyabaire kiihwaho." 
Exodus40:38 Manya omu ngyendo zaabo zoona ekyo kicu kya Nyakubaho nyomushana kikaba kiguma aha butaaho, kandi nyekiro kyakirwamu omuriro Abaisiraeli baguma nibakireeba." 
Leviticus1:1 Nyakubaho akeeta Musa naayema omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, yaamugira ati:" 
Leviticus1:2 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Omuntu weena omuriimwe ku arintoijera ekitambo, muryaguma mukiihe omu masyo gaanyu g'ente nari ag'entaama." 
Leviticus1:3 Omutoijo gwe ku guriba guri ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, ekirugire omu busyo bw'ente, atoije ekimasha ekitaine kamogo; kandi akitoijere aha muryango gw'Eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, Nyowe Nyakubaho mbone kukisiima." 
Leviticus1:4 Aryata omukono gwe aha mutwe gw'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, kibone kusiimwa ahabwe kuba eky'okumukarabira." 
Leviticus1:5 Bwanyima aitire enimi omu maisho gangye, abahongyerezi beene Arooni bammurikire eshagama yaayo, kandi bagimiisiire okwehinguririza eitambiro eriri aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Leviticus1:6 Mpaho abaagye enyamaishwa y'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, agihirimburemu ebicweka." 
Leviticus1:7 Abahongyerezi beene Arooni bate omuriro aha itambiro bagutungikyeho enku. 
Leviticus1:8 Ebyo bicweka n'omutwe n'ebishaju babiteekyerane aha nku zitungamiire omuriro gw'aha itambiro. 
Leviticus1:9 Reero omuntu ayozye eby'omunda n'amaguru. Omuhongyerezi byona abyokyeze aha itambiro bibe ekitambo kicwekize. Mpaho ekyo kitambo kyokiibwe, ekisooroora kyakyo kibone kungwisa gye Nyowe Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus1:10 Omutoijo gwe ku guraabe guri ogw'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, gwihirwe omu busyo bw'entaama nari obw'embuzi, atoije empaya etaine kamogo." 
Leviticus1:11 Kandi agiitire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho aha rubaju rw'eitambiro orw'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho. Abahongyerezi beene Arooni bamiisiire eshagama yaayo okwehinguririza eitambiro. 
Leviticus1:12 Mpaho ogwo muntu ekitambo akihirimburemu ebicweka, hamwe n'omutwe gwakyo n'ebishaju byakyo; omuhongyerezi abiteekyerane aha nku eziri aha muriro gw'aha itambiro." 
Leviticus1:13 Kwonka eby'omunda n'amaguru abyozye n'amaizi. Omuhongyerezi abitambe byona naabyokyeza aha itambiro; bibe ekitambo kicwekize. Haza ekyo kitambo kyokiibwe, ekisooroora kyakyo kigwise gye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus1:14 Eki aritoijera Nyakubaho ku kiriba kiri ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, ekiihirwe omu nyonyi, obwo aryatoija eriiba nari enkombe nto." 
Leviticus1:15 Omuhongyerezi atware egyo nyonyi aha itambiro, agihotore ebitsya, agicweho omutwe, agyokyeze aha itambiro, eshagama yaayo egiitururukyemu neejwera aha rubaju rwaryo." 
Leviticus1:16 Reero agiihemu ekitondoro, agihaanyeho ebyoya abinagye aha rubaju rw'eitambiro embari ya burugwa-izooba, ahi baata eiju rya kashenda." 
Leviticus1:17 Agicweho amapapa, kwonka agirekye eri embumburi. Omuhongyerezi agyokyeze aha itambiro aha nku ezitungikirwe aha muriro. Ebe ekitambo kicwekize ekyokiibwe eki ekisooroora kyakyo kiraagwise gye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus2:1 Omuntu weena ku arireeta omutoijo gw'esaano agutoijeire Nyakubaho, ogwo mutoijo gwe gube ogw'esaano y'obunono; aryagushukaho amajuta kandi agumemeerereho obubaani," 
Leviticus2:2 agureetere abahongyerezi beene Arooni. Haza agwiheho oruhi rw'esaano y'obunono n'amajuta n'obubaani bwagwo bwona. Ebyo byona omuhongyerezi abyokyeze aha itambiro, kuba ekiijutsyo. Gube omutoijo ogwokiibwe ogu ekisooroora kyagwo kiraagwise gye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus2:3 Reero ekiraatsigare ahari ogwo mutoijo gw'esaano kibe ekya Arooni n'abatabani. Nikiba kiri ekirikwera ekirikukirira kimwe endiijo mitoijo eyokiibwe, ahabw'okuba nikiba kitoijeirwe Nyakubaho."
