Leviticus2:4 Ku orireeta omutoijo gw'esaano oguteekyeirwe omu iteekyero ry'emigaati, gube ogw'otugaati otutatumbisiibwe otw'esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta; nari gube ogw'otubanda tutatumbisiibwe otumamagiziibweho amajuta." 
Leviticus2:5 Kandi omutoijo gwawe ku guriba guri ogw'esaano ekarangire, gube ogw'ey'obunono, etarimu kitumbisa, ejwangiibwemu amajuta." 
Leviticus2:6 Otyo ogucwanyagure, ogushukyeho amajuta gube omutoijo gw'esaano." 
Leviticus2:7 Omutoijo gwawe ku guraabe guri ogw'esaano ekarangiirwe aha rugusyo, gube ogw'ey'obunono ejwangirwemu amajuta." 
Leviticus2:8 Mpaho omutoijo gw'esaano ogujwangirwemu ebyo ogutoijere Nyakubaho, kandi ku gurimurikirwa omuhongyerezi, agutware aha itambiro." 
Leviticus2:9 Omuhongyerezi akore ahari egyo saano etoizirwe ekicweka ky'okwijukiraho, akyokyeze aha itambiro, kibe omutoijo ogwokiibwe, ogu ekisooroora kyagwo kiraagwise gye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus2:10 Reero ekiraatsigare ahari ogwo mutoijo gw'esaano kibe ekya Arooni n'abatabani, kandi nikiba kiri ekirikwera ekirikukirira kimwe endiijo mitoijo eyokiibwe, ahabw'okuba nikiba kitoijeirwe Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus2:11 Hatarigira omutoijo gw'esaano ogu muritoijera Nyakubaho gurimu ekitumbisa, ahabw'okuba timuryotsya kitumbisa, nobu bwakuba obwoki, ngu bibe omutoijo ogwokiibwe ogw'okutoijera Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus2:12 Ebijuma by'emiganuro nimwikirizibwa kubimutoijera, kwonka bitaritoijerwa aha itambiro, ngu bibe omugaju gurikugwisa gye." 
Leviticus2:13 Emitoijo yaawe yoona ey'esaano oryagitamu omwonyo. Otaribura kuta omwonyo omu mitoijo yaawe y'esaano kuhamya endagaano na Ruhanga waawe. Emitoijo yaawe yoona ogume ogitoije erimu omwonyo. 
Leviticus2:14 Ku oritoijera Nyakubaho omutoijo gw'esaano y'omuganuro, omutoijere ey'omujuma gw'omweza ogukarangire kandi oguseire." 
Leviticus2:15 Haza oryagumaamagizaho amajuta, ogumemeerereho obubaani, gubone kuba omutoijo gw'esaano." 
Leviticus2:16 Reero omuhongyerezi, ekicweka ky'omujuma oguseirwe n'eky'amajuta hamwe n'obubaani bwakyo bwona, abyotsye, bibe ekiijutsyo; kandi bibone kuba omutoijo ogwokiibwe kutoijerwa Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus3:1 Omutoijo gw'omuntu ku guriba guri ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe yaatoija enyamaishwa erikuruga omu busyo, enimi nari enyana, aryagitoijera Nyakubaho etaine kamogo." 
Leviticus3:2 Ate omukono gwe aha mutwe gw'eki yaatoija, akiitire aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu. Reero abahongyerezi beene Arooni bamiisiire eitambiro eshagama okuryehinguririza." 
Leviticus3:3 Kandi ahari ekyo kitambo ky'okurya kumwe aryaihaho eky'okutoijera Nyakubaho ekyokize. Aryatoija ebishaju ebishwekire enyama z'omunda. 
Leviticus3:4 Aiheho n'entsigo zombi n'ebishaju byazo ebiri aha mugongo, n'enyama ez'akashaabo eziri aha kine." 
Leviticus3:5 Mpaho beene Arooni babyokyeze aha itambiro eririho ekitambo ky'okucwetsya ekiri aha nku ezitungikirwe aha muriro, kibe ekitambo ekyokize eki ekisooroora kyakyo kiraagwise gye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus3:6 Omutoijo gwe ku guriba guri ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe eky'okutoijera Nyakubaho, guri enyamaishwa eihirwe omu busyo bw'entaama nari bw'embuzi, guri empaya nari omwagazi, agutoije gutaine kamogo." 
Leviticus3:7 Ku aritoija omwana gw'entaama kuba ekitambo kye, obwo agutoije omu maisho ga Nyakubaho;" 
Leviticus3:8 naata omukono gwe aha mutwe gw'eki yaatoija, kandi naakiitira omu maisho g'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu; na beene Arooni bamiisiire eitambiro eshagama, okuryehinguririza." 
Leviticus3:9 Reero ahari ekyo kitambo ky'okurya kumwe eky'okutoijera Nyakubaho kyokize, aiheho enyama z'ebishaju, n'omukira gwayo gwona gw'ebishaju, agukuuriraine n'engugye, n'ebishaju ebishwekire enyama z'omunda, n'ebiziriho byona." 
Leviticus3:10 Aiheho n'entsigo zombi n'ebishaju byazo ebiri aha mugongo, n'enyama z'akashaabo ez'aha kine." 
Leviticus3:11 Reero omuhongyerezi abyokyeze aha itambiro, bibe ebyokurya byokize ebitoijeirwe Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus3:12 Omutoijo gwe ku guriba guri embuzi, agutoijere Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus3:13 Ate omukono gwe aha mutwe gwayo, kandi agwitire omu maisho g'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu; na beene Arooni bamiisiire eitambiro eshagama okuryehinguririza." 
Leviticus3:14 Haza ahari ekyo kitambo kye ky'okutoijera Nyakubaho kyokize, aiheho ebishaju ebishwekire enyama z'omunda, n'ebiziriho byona." 
Leviticus3:15 Aiheho n'entsigo zombi n'ebishaju byazo, n'eby'aha mugongo, n'enyama z'akashaabo ez'aha kine." 
Leviticus3:16 Omuhongyerezi abyokyeze aha itambiro, bibe egabo etoizirwe eyokize eine ekisooroora kirikugwisa gye. Enyama ez'ebishaju zoona n'eza Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus3:17 Kiryaguma kiri ekiragiro ekitairweho eky'ebiro byona omu nzaaro zaanyu zoona n'omu maka gaanyu goona imwe okutarya bishaju nobu yaakuba eshagama. 
Leviticus4:1 Kandi Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus4:2 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Omuntu weena ku arikora ekibi atakikozire nkana, ekikwatiraine n'ebi Nyowe Nyakubaho ndagiire ngu bitarikorwa, haza yaakora kimwe aharibyo," 
Leviticus4:3 ku ariba ari omuhongyerezi omukuru yaakora ekibi, yaareetera eihanga orubanja, aryahongyera Nyakubaho enimi nto etaine kamogo ahabw'ekibi ki akozire; ebe ekitambo ky'okukihongyerera." 
Leviticus4:4 Aryareeta enimi omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu; ate omukono gwe aha mutwe gw'egyo nimi, agiitire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus4:5 Reero omuhongyerezi omukuru, aha shagama y'egyo nimi aiheho nkye agitware aha ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu;" 
Leviticus4:6 akoze orukumu rwe omuri egyo shagama, arumiisiize egyo shagama emirundi mushanju omu maisho ga Nyakubaho omu Mwanya Ogurikwera." 
Leviticus4:7 Kandi ogwo muhongyerezi akore ahari egyo shagama, agisiigye amahembe g'eitambiro ry'okwotereraho obubaani oburikutaamirana omugaju omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, eriri omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu. Reero eshagama y'egyo nimi eraatsigareho agishukye omu mizi y'eitambiro ry'ebitambo bicwekize, eriri aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Leviticus4:8 Ebishaju byona eby'egyo nimi y'okuhongyerera ekibi, nibyo ebishaju ebishweka enyama z'omunda, ebishaju byona ebizishwekire," 
Leviticus4:9 n'entsigo zombi hamwe n'ebishaju byazo, n'eby'aha mugongo, n'ez'akashaabo ez'aha kine, aziiheho hamwe n'ezo ntsigo." 
Leviticus4:10 Nk'oku ziihwa aha nimi y'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe, ogwo muhongyerezi azookyeze aha itambiro ry'ebitambo by'okucwetsya." 
Leviticus4:11 Haza oruhu rw'egyo nimi n'enyama zaayo zoona n'omutwe gwayo n'ebivune byayo n'eby'omunda byayo n'efa yaayo," 
Leviticus4:12 abitware aheeru y'orusiisira omu mwanya gushoroirwe ogu baatamu eiju rya kashenda abe niyo yaabyokyeza. 
Leviticus4:13 Eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli ku ririkora ekibi ritakikozire nkana, kitaamanywa abateeraniire aho, ryakora kimwe aha bi Ruhanga yaabazibiire, baagiibwaho orubanja;" 
Leviticus4:14 ekibi ki bakozire ku kirimanywa, abateeraniire aho baryahonga enimi nto, ebe ekitambo ky'okuhongyerera ekyo kibi; bagireete omu maisho g'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Leviticus4:15 Abakuru b'omuri eryo ihanga bate emikono aha mutwe gw'egyo nimi bagiitire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. 
Leviticus4:16 Reero omuhongyerezi omukuru akore aha shagama y'egyo nimi agireete aha ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu; 
Leviticus4:17 akoze orukumu omuri egyo shagama, arugimiisiize emirundi mushanju omu maisho ga Nyakubaho aharikureebana n'omukingo." 
Leviticus4:18 Kandi agisiigye aha mahembe g'eitambiro eriri omu maisho ga Nyakubaho omu ihema eribugabuganirwamu. Reero eshagama eraatsigareho agishukye omu mizi y'eitambiro ry'ebitambo by'okucwetsya eriri aha muryango gw'eryo ihema. 
Leviticus4:19 Kandi ebishaju byayo byona abiiheho, abyokyeze aha itambiro." 
Leviticus4:20 Haza egyo nimi agitwaze nk'oku yaagizire enimi y'okuhongyerera ekibi. Okwo abe nikwo yaatwaza n'egi. Reero omuhongyerezi abakarabire babone kusaasirwa. 
Leviticus4:21 Kandi egyo nimi agitware aheeru y'orusiisira agyokyezeyo, nk'oku yaayokize enimi eri ey'okubanza. Ekyo nikyo kitambo ky'okuhongyerera ekibi ky'eihanga." 
Leviticus4:22 Omutegyeki ku arikora ekibi ahari ebyo byona ebi Mukama Ruhanga yaazibiire, atakikozire nkana, kyamureetera orubanja;" 
Leviticus4:23 ekibi ki akozire ku barikimwemeza, aryareeta empaya y'embuzi etaine kamogo ebe empongano ye." 
Leviticus4:24 Reero ate omukono gwe aha mutwe gw'egyo mpaya, kandi agiitire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, ahi baitira enyamaishwa y'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya. Egyo n'empongano y'ekibi." 
Leviticus4:25 Bwanyima omuhongyerezi akoze orukumu omu shagama y'ekitambo ky'okuhongyerera ekibi, agisiigye aha mahembe g'eitambiro, eshagama eraatsigareho agishukye omu mizi yaaryo." 
Leviticus4:26 Ebishaju byayo byona abyokyeze aha itambiro, nk'oku batwaza ebishaju by'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe. Omuhongyerezi atyo amukarabire ahabw'ekibi kye, n'onu abone kusaasirwa." 
Leviticus4:27 Kandi omuntu weena ow'omu b'eihanga ku arikora ekibi, yaakora kimwe aha bi Mukama yaazibiire, atakikozire nkana, yaagiibwaho orubanja," 
Leviticus4:28 ekibi ki akozire ku barikimwemeza, aryareeta empongano y'omwagazi gw'embuzi gutaine kamogo ahabw'ekibi ki akozire." 
Leviticus4:29 Mpaho ate omukono aha mutwe gwagwo, agwitire ahi baitira enyamaishwa y'ebitambo by'okucwetsya." 
Leviticus4:30 Reero omuhongyerezi akoze orukumu omu shagama yaayo, agisiigye aha mahembe g'eitambiro, eshagama eraatsigareho agishukye omu mizi yaaryo." 
Leviticus4:31 Haza aiheho ebishaju byayo byona nk'oku babiiha aha bitambo by'okurya kumwe, abyokyeze aha itambiro, bibe ekisooroora ky'okugwisa gye. Atyo amukarabire, n'onu abone kusaasirwa." 
Leviticus4:32 Ku aritoija omwana gw'entaama guri empongano y'ekibi kye, areete omwagazi gutaine kamogo." 
Leviticus4:33 Mpaho ate omukono gwe aha mutwe gwagwo, kandi agwitire ahi baitira enyamaishwa z'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya." 
Leviticus4:34 Bwanyima omuhongyerezi akoze orukumu omu shagama y'ekitambo ky'okuhongyerera ekibi, agisiigye aha mahembe g'eitambiro, eshagama yaagwo eraatsigareho agishukye omu mizi yaaryo." 
Leviticus4:35 Haza aiheho ebishaju byagwo byona nk'oku babiiha aha mwana gw'entaama ogw'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe, abyokyeze aha itambiro, hamwe n'ebitambo ebi bookyeza Nyakubaho. Atyo omuhongyerezi amukarabire ahabw'ekibi ki akozire, n'onu abone kusaasirwa." 
Leviticus5:1 Omuntu weena ku barimurahiza butunu kujurira eki yaareebire nari eki yaamanyire, haza akanga kukigamba aryagiibwaho orubanja." 
Leviticus5:2 Omuntu weena ku arikora aha kintu kyona ekirikuzira, yaaba mutumbi gw'ekinyamaishwa, nari ogw'ekitungirwe ekirikuzira nainga gw'ebintu ebirikugyendesa enda atakimanyire, kwonka bwanyima yaakimanya, aryagiibwaho orubanja." 
Leviticus5:3 Nari yaakora aha kintu kirikuzira eky'obuhangwa bw'omuntu, eky'omuringo gwona, atakikozireho nkana, kwonka ku arikimanya, aryagiibwaho orubanja." 
Leviticus5:4 Nainga omuntu weena ku arirahukwa aha rurimi, yaarahira kukora ekibi nari ekirungi, okurahukwa aha rurimi kwona oku abantu barahira, atakimanyire, kwonka ku arikimanya, aryagiibwaho orubanja rw'eki yaarahira kyona." 
Leviticus5:5 Mbwenu omuntu ku arigiibwaho orubanja rwa ibara kintu ahari ebyo, ayature ekibi ki akozire." 
Leviticus5:6 Kandi ahabw'ekifubiro ky'orubanja rwakyo, areetere Nyakubaho omwagazi gu aihire omu busyo bwe, yaaba gw'entaama nari gw'embuzi ogw'okuhongyerera ekyo kibi. Mpaho omuhongyerezi amukarabire ahabw'ekibi kye." 
Leviticus5:7 Kwonka ku ariba atarikubaasa kutunga mwagazi gw'omu busyo bwe, areetere Nyakubaho empongano y'okuhongyerera ekibi ki akozire, ey'amaiba abiri nari y'enkombe ibiri nto: emwe y'okuhongyerera ekibi, endiijo y'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya." 
Leviticus5:8 Abireetere omuhongyerezi; n'onu abanze ahongye empongano y'ekibi. Agihotore ebitsya, kwonka atagicwaho omutwe." 
Leviticus5:9 Reero amiisiire aha rubaju rw'eitambiro eshagama y'empongano y'ekibi, eshagama eraatsigareho agifukunkurire omu mizi y'eitambiro. Egyo n'empongano y'ekibi." 
Leviticus5:10 Bwanyima aheyo eya kabiri kuba ekitambo ky'okucwetsya nk'oku ekiragiro kiri. Omuhongyerezi amukarabire ahabw'ekibi ki akozire, abone kusaasirwa." 
Leviticus5:11 Kwonka ku araabe atarikubaasa kutunga amaiba abiri nari enkombe ibiri nto, obwo areete eigaro ry'esaano y'obunono kuba empongano y'ekibi ki akozire." 
Leviticus5:12 Atyo arireetere omuhongyerezi, n'onu akoreho oruhi kuba ekiijutsyo, arwokyeze aha itambiro aha mpongano ezi bookyeza Nyakubaho. Egyo n'empongano y'ekibi." 
Leviticus5:13 Nikwo omuhongyerezi araamukarabire ahabw'ekibi ki akozire ekya ibara muringo ahari ebyo; reero asaasirwe. Kandi ekicweka ekiraatsigareho kibe eky'omuhongyerezi, nk'oku batwaza empongano y'esaano." 
Leviticus5:14 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Leviticus5:15 Omuntu ku arikora ekibi ky'okutaba mwesigwa, eki atakozire nkana, yaaremwa kuhayo emitoijo erikwera ei arikuragiirwa kutoijera Nyakubaho, areetere Nyakubaho empaya y'entaama etaine kamogo ei aihire omu busyo bwe, ebe empongano y'ekibi kye ei muraabariirire obuguzi bwayo omu mpiiha z'efeeza, nimureebera aha rurengo rw'empiiha y'Omwanya Ogurikwera. Mpaho ebe empongano y'orubanja rwe." 
Leviticus5:16 Haza arihe ebicwero ebirikwera ebi yaaremirwe kuha, kandi abyongyereho kimwe kya kataano. Abihe Omuhongyerezi, n'onu amukarabisize egyo mpaya y'entaama ey'empongano y'eki acumwire, haza abone kusaasirwa." 
Leviticus5:17 Omuntu weena ku arikora ekibi, yaakora eki Mukama yaazibiire, nobu yaakuba atarikukimanya, kwonka yaagibwaho orubanja, orwo rubanja ruryamutukurira." 
Leviticus5:18 Areetere omuhongyerezi empaya y'entaama etaine kamogo, agiihire omu busyo bwe; mugibaririire nk'obuguzi bwayo obuhikire kuba empongano y'ekibi. Mpaho omuhongyerezi amukarabire ahabw'ekishobyo ki atarakozire nkana, reero asaasirwe." 
Leviticus5:19 Egyo n'empongano y'ekibi ahabw'okugira orubanja omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. 
Leviticus6:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Leviticus6:2 Omuntu weena ku arikora ekibi, ataaba mwesigwa ahari Nyakubaho, ahabw'okugobeza mutaahi we eki amubiikize nari eki amwemerereire, nainga okumunyaga nari ku ariba akaakaatikire mutaahi we," 
Leviticus6:3 nainga yaatorotoora ekibuzire, kwonka yaakiryangatanisa naarahira ebishuba omu kintu kyona eki abantu bakora bakacumura," 
Leviticus6:4 mbwenu omuntu ku arikora ekibi nk'ekyo, yaagiibwaho orubanja; aryariha eki anyagire, nari eki atungiise eishaija, nainga eki baamubiikize, nari ekibuzire eki yaatorotoire," 
Leviticus6:5 nari ekintu kyona eki yaarahiriire naabeiha. Ekyo kintu aryakiriha kyona, kandi akitemu kimwe kya kataano, akihe mukama waakyo aha izooba eri ariheerayo empongano y'ekibi kye." 
Leviticus6:6 Reero atwarire omuhongyerezi empongano y'ekibi kye, ei yaahongyera Nyakubaho. Niyo mpaya y'entaama etaine kamogo, ei aihire omu busyo bwe, ei mubaririire obuguzi bwayo kuhika empongano y'okwihwaho orubanja." 
Leviticus6:7 Omuhongyerezi amukarabire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, n'onu asaasirwe ekintu kyona eki omuntu akora kikamureetera orubanja." 
Leviticus6:8 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: Ragiira Arooni n'abatabani noobagira oti: 
Leviticus6:9 Eki nikyo kiragiro ky'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya. Ekitambo ky'okucwetsya kiryateebwa aha mahega g'aha itambiro, kigumeho ekiro kyona okuhitsya omu kasheeshe. Kandi omuriro gw'aha itambiro gugume nigwaka." 
Leviticus6:10 Reero omuhongyerezi ajware ekijwaro kye ekya bafuta, n'empare ye ya kitaani, ayoore eiju ry'ekitambo ekisiriiziibwe kikacwekyeza aha itambiro, arite aha rubaju rwaryo." 
Leviticus6:11 Bwanyima ajuure ebyo bijwaro, ajware ebindi, atware eiju aheeru y'orusiisira, aryate omu mwanya gushemeire." 
Leviticus6:12 Omuriro gw'aha itambiro gugume nigwaka, gutariraara. Omuhongyerezi agume agwenegyezemu enku buri kasheeshe, agutungikyeho gye ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, kandi agwokyezeho enyama z'ebishaju ez'ebitambo by'okurya kumwe." 
Leviticus6:13 Omuriro gugume nigwakira ahari eryo itambiro obutoosha, gutariraara." 
Leviticus6:14 Kandi eki nikyo kiragiro ky'omutoijo gw'esaano. Beene Arooni baryaguma bagutoijere Nyakubaho omu maisho g'eitambiro. 
Leviticus6:15 Omwe omuribo akoreho oruhi rw'esaano y'obunono bw'ogwo mutoijo, hamwe n'amajuta gaagwo n'obubaani bwona obugumaamagiziibweho, agwokyeze aha itambiro kuba ekiijutsyo eki ekisooroora kyakyo kiraagwise gye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus6:16 Haza esaano eraatsigareho, Arooni n'abatabani bagiriire omu Mwanya Ogurikwera etarimu kitumbisa, omu kibuga ky'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Leviticus6:17 Etariteekwa erimu ekitumbisa. Naagibaha kuba omugabo gwabo ogw'ebitambo byangye ebyokize. Egyo saano n'ekintu ekirikwerera kimwe, nk'empongano y'ekibi n'ey'okwihaho orubanja." 
Leviticus6:18 Omushaija weena ow'omuri beene Arooni naikirizibwa kugiryaho nk'ekiragiro ky'ebiro byona omu busingye bwanyu bwona, guri omugabo gwabo ogwihirwe aha bihongyeirwe Nyakubaho ebyokize. Weena oribikoraho aryaba orikwera." 
Leviticus6:19 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Leviticus6:20 Ogu n'omutoijo ogu Arooni n'abatabani baritoijera Nyakubaho, aha izooba ri omuhongyerezi arisiigirwaho amajuta. Kimwe kya ikumi ky'encuro y'esaano y'obunono, kuguma kiri omutoijo gw'esaano, ekicweka kyayo kutoijwa omu kasheeshe, n'ekindi omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus6:21 Guryaguma guteekyeranwe n'amajuta aha kyoma ekikarangirwaho. Mugureete gutobagiibwe gye guri obubanda buteekirwe nk'obw'omutoijo gw'esaano. Mugutoije, gube ekisooroora ky'okugwisa gye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus6:22 Omuhongyerezi omukuru ow'omuri beene Arooni, agutoijere Nyakubaho nk'oku kirikuragiirwa obutwire bwona. Gwona oku gurikwingana gwokibwe." 
Leviticus6:23 Buri mutoijo gw'esaano ogutoizirwe omuhongyerezi guryayokibwa gwona, tiguririibwa." 
Leviticus6:24 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Leviticus6:25 Gambira Arooni n'abatabani oti: Eri niryo eiteeka ry'empongano y'ekibi. Omu mwanya ogu baitiramu enyamaishwa z'ebitambo by'okucwetsya babe nigwo baitiramu n'ey'empongano y'ekibi omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. Egyo mpongano neeyerera kimwe. 
Leviticus6:26 Omuhongyerezi orikugihongyerera ekibi agirye; kandi eriirwe omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, omu kibuga ky'Eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Leviticus6:27 Kyona ekirikora aha nyama yaayo kiryaba ekirikwera. Eshagama yaayo ku eritaraakira ekijwaro, muryakyogyeza omu Mwanya Ogurikwera." 
Leviticus6:28 Kandi orwabya rw'eibumba oru eriteekwamu rwatwe, kwonka ku eriteekwa omu rw'omuringa, barutsigye barumunyunguzise amaizi." 
Leviticus6:29 Weena oyetwa omushaija ow'omu bahongyerezi naikirizibwa kugiryaho, ahabw'okuba n'erikwera munonga." 
Leviticus6:30 Kwonka batarirya empongano y'ekibi ei baihaho eshagama, bakagireeta omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu kukarabira ekibi omu Mwanya Ogurikwera. Egyo mpongano eyokibwe." 
Leviticus7:1 Eki n'ekiragiro ky'empongano y'okwihisaho orubanja. N'ekiragiro ekirikwerera kimwe. 
Leviticus7:2 Omu mwanya gu baitiramu enyamaishwa y'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, nigwo bariitiramu n'ey'empongano y'okwihisaho orubanja; kandi eshagama yaayo emiisiirwe eitambiro okuryehinguririza." 
Leviticus7:3 Ebishaju byayo byona eby'aha mukira n'ebishweka eby'omunda bihongwe. 
Leviticus7:4 Entsigo zombi n'ebishaju ebiziriho, n'eby'aha mugongo, taho enyama z'akashaabo ez'aha kine ebi araiheho hamwe n'entsigo;" 
Leviticus7:5 omuhongyerezi abyokyeze aha itambiro, bibe empongano eyokize, ehongyeirwe Nyakubaho. Egyo niyo mpongano y'okwihaho orubanja." 
Leviticus7:6 Weena oyetwa omushaija omu bahongyerezi, naikirizibwa kugirayho, kandi eriirwe omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, ahabw'okuba n'erikwerera kimwe." 
Leviticus7:7 Empongano y'okwihaho orubanja ni nk'empongano y'okuhongyerera ekibi. Zombi eiteeka ryazo ni rimwe; omuhongyerezi orikugikarabisa abe niwe yaagitwara. 
Leviticus7:8 Kandi omuhongyerezi otamba ekitambo ky'okucwetsya ekireetsirwe omuntu, niwe aritwara oruhu rwakyo." 
Leviticus7:9 N'esaano yoona ehongirwe, ei bateekyeire omu kabiga, na byona ebi bateekyera aha kyoma ky'okukaranga, nari aha mahega, biryaba eby'omuhongyerezi owaabihonga." 
Leviticus7:10 Kandi empongano z'esaano zoona ezijwangiibwemu amajuta nari ez'omukoma zibe eza beene Arooni boona ahatari kubashoroora. 
Leviticus7:11 Reero eri niryo iteeka ry'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe eki omuntu arikwikirizibwa kutoijera Nyakubaho. 
Leviticus7:12 Ku araakitoije ahabw'okusiima, ekyo kitambo akitoijereho otugaati tutarimu kitumbisa, otujwangiibwemu amajuta, n'otubanda tutatumbisiibwe oturimu amajuta, hamwe n'otugaati tw'esaano y'obunono etobirwemu amajuta g'emioliva." 
Leviticus7:13 Hamwe n'ekitambo kye ky'okurya kumwe naasiima, ogwo mutoijo gwe agureetereho emigaati erimu ekitumbisa." 
Leviticus7:14 Haza ahari buri mutoijo aiheho omugaati gumwe, gw'okutoijera Nyakubaho, gube ogw'omuhongyerezi omiisiira eshagama y'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe." 
Leviticus7:15 Kandi enyama y'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe ekitoizirwe ahabw'okusiima, eriibwe ahari eryo izooba eri yaakiheeraho; atarigira ei yaatsigaho okuhitsya omu kasheeshe." 
Leviticus7:16 Kwonka ekitambo ki yaatoija ku kiriba kiri eky'okuhiga nari eki atoizire ayeyendeire, enyama yaakyo eriibwe aha izooba eri yaakitoijeraho, reero eraatsigareho eriibwe nyencakare." 
Leviticus7:17 Kwonka enyama y'ekyo kitambo eritsigaraho okuhisya aha kiro kya kashatu eyokibwe omu muriro. 
Leviticus7:18 Enyama yoona ey'ekitambo ekihairweyo ahabw'okurya kumwe ku eririibwa aha izooba rya kashatu, Ruhanga tariikiriza eki ogwo muntu yaatoija, kandi tarikimubarira, kiryaba ekihagaro, orikiryaho aryagiibwaho orubanja rw'ekicumuro." 
Leviticus7:19 Enyama erikora aha kirikuzira kyona etaririibwa, eyokibwe omu muriro. Boona abatasiisikaire nibaikirizibwa kurya enyama." 
Leviticus7:20 Kwonka omuntu orirya aha nyama y'ekitambo ekitoijeirwe Nyakubaho ahabw'okurya kumwe akisiisikaire, ogwo muntu aryacuubwa omu ihanga." 
Leviticus7:21 Omuntu weena ku arikora aha kintu ekihagaire, yaaba ky'omuntu, nari ky'enyamaishwa erikuzira, nainga ekindi kihagaro, haza yaarya aha nyama y'ekitambo ekitoijeirwe Nyakubaho ahabw'okurya kumwe, aryacuubwa omu ihanga." 
Leviticus7:22 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Leviticus7:23 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Mutarirya ebishaju by'ente nari by'entaama nainga by'embuzi. 
Leviticus7:24 Enyama z'ebishaju ez'enyamaishwa eyefeereire, n'ez'ebishaju by'eitsirwe ezindi nyamaishwa, nizibaasa kukoresibwa omu gundi muringo, kwonka mutarigira bu muziriire." 
Leviticus7:25 Manya omuntu weena orirya aha bishaju by'enyamaishwa ei batoijeire Nyakubaho eyokiibwe omu muriro, aryacuubwa omu ihanga." 
Leviticus7:26 Ekindi, mutarirya kyona ekyeetwa eshagama, yaaba ya birikugurukisa amapapa nari ey'enyamaishwa, hoona ahi muriba mutwire." 
Leviticus7:27 Omuntu weena orirya eshagama aryacuubwa omu ihanga. 
Leviticus7:28 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Leviticus7:29 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Orikutoijera Nyakubaho ekitambo ky'emitoijo y'okurya kumwe, aryaguma areetere Nyakubaho omutoijo gwe agwihire aha kitambo ky'emitoijo y'okurya kumwe." 
Leviticus7:30 Egyo mitoijo aryagyereetera omu ngaro, bagyokyeze Nyakubaho. Areete ebishaju hamwe n'enkoro. Haza enkoro bagizongazonzye, ebe ekitambo ekizongazongiibwe omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus7:31 Omuhongyerezi ayokyeze ebyo bishaju aha itambiro, kwonka enkoro ebe eya Arooni n'abatabani." 
Leviticus7:32 Kandi ekivune kya buryo mukihe omuhongyerezi, kibe omutoijo ogwihirwe aha mitoijo yaanyu ey'okurya kumwe." 
Leviticus7:33 Ow'omuri beene Arooni otoija eshagama y'emitoijo y'okurya kumwe, n'ebishaju, agume atungye ekivune kya buryo kibe omugabo gwe." 
Leviticus7:34 Manya enkoro ezongazongiibwe n'ekivune ekitoijwa nyowe naabiiha aha Baisiraeli, aha bitambo by'emitoijo yaabo eby'okurya kumwe naabiha Arooni omuhongyerezi n'abatabani, bigume bibe omugabo gwabo gw'obutoosha ogurugire omu Baisiraeli." 
Leviticus7:35 Ogwo nigwo mugabo gwa Arooni n'abatabani ogwihwa aha bitambo byokize ebitoijerwa Nyakubaho, ogu baheebwa aha izooba eri bateebwaho kuba abahongyerezi ba Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus7:36 Nyakubaho akaragiira ku baguma nibaguheebwa Abaisiraeli aha izooba eri baasiigirwaho amajuta. Ekyo n'ekiragiro ky'okukuratirwa baijukuru baabo ebiro byona. 
Leviticus7:37 Ogwo nigwo mugyenzo gw'ebitambo bicwekize, ogw'emitoijo y'esaano, ogw'empongano y'ekibi, ogw'okwihaho orubanja, ogw'okushoroorwa kw'abahongyerezi n'ogw'ebihongwa by'okurya kumwe," 
Leviticus7:38 ogu Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa aha Rushozi Sinaayi, aha izooba eri yaaragiriireho Abaisiraeli kureetera Nyakubaho emitoijo yaabo omu ihamba rya Sinaayi." 
Leviticus8:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Leviticus8:2 Twara Arooni n'abatabani n'ebijwaro by'obuhongyerezi, n'amajuta g'okusiiga, n'enimi y'okuhongyerera ekibi, n'empaya ibiri z'entaama, n'ekiibo ky'emigaati etatumbisiibwe." 
Leviticus8:3 Kandi oteeranire eihanga ryona aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu. 
Leviticus8:4 Musa atyo agira nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiira; eihanga ryona ariteeranira aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu. 
Leviticus8:5 Mpaho Musa agambira abateeraniire aho ati: Eki nikyo Nyakubaho yaaragiira kukorwa. 
Leviticus8:6 Musa atyo areeta Arooni n'abatabani aboozya n'amaizi. 
Leviticus8:7 Ajweka Arooni esaati n'ekanzu; amuzirika omweko. Reero amutaho ekitaahiro akizirikisisa ekikwemba kyakyo ekirukirwe gye abanyamyoga, akikimuhamisaho." 
Leviticus8:8 Reero amujweka ekijwaro ky'aha kifuba akitamu endagu ezirikwetwa Urimu na Tumimu. 
Leviticus8:9 Haza amuta ekikwemba omu mutwe, kandi ahari ekyo kikwemba omu maisho gaakyo ataho eihunde ry'ezaabu riba ekirunga ekirikwera, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa." 
Leviticus8:10 Bwanyima Musa yaihayo amajuta g'okusiiga, yaagasiiga eihema n'ebiririmu byona yaabyeza." 
Leviticus8:11 N'agamwe yaagamiisiira eitambiro emirundi mushanju. Kandi yaasiiga eitambiro n'ebirikurikoresibwaho byona n'ekinaabiro n'ekibunu kyakyo kubyeza. 
Leviticus8:12 Reero amajuta agamwe yaagashuka aha mutwe gwa Arooni, yaagamusiiga kumushoroora." 
Leviticus8:13 Kandi Musa yaareeta batabani ba Arooni yaabajweka esaati, yaabazirika emyeko, yaabashemba ebitambaara omu mutwe, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa ogwo." 
Leviticus8:14 Bwanyima yaareeta enimi y'okuhongyerera ekibi. Arooni n'abatabani baata emikono yaabo aha mutwe gwayo. 
Leviticus8:15 Musa yaagiita, yaihaho eshagama yaagisiigisa orukumu aha mahembe g'eitambiro, ag'aha nshonda zaaryo okuryehinguririza, atyo yaaryeza; kandi egyo shagama yaagishuka omu mizi y'eitambiro, yaaryeza, naarikarabira." 
Leviticus8:16 Reero Musa yaihayo ebishaju eby'aha nyama z'omunda, n'ez'akashaabo ez'aha kine, n'entsigo z'ombi, hamwe n'ebishaju byazo, ebyo byona yaabyokyeza aha itambiro." 
Leviticus8:17 Kwonka enimi n'oruhu rwayo n'enyama zaayo n'efa yaayo, yaabyokyeza aheeru y'orusiisira nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiire." 
Leviticus8:18 Bwanyima yaareeta empaya y'entaama ey'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya. Arooni n'abatabani baata emikono yaabo aha mutwe gwayo. 
Leviticus8:19 Mpaho Musa yaagiita, kandi yaamiisiira eitambiro eshagama okuryehinguririza." 
Leviticus8:20 Empaya y'entaama ku baaherize kugihirimburamu ebicweka, Musa yaayotsya omutwe gwayo n'ebihinju byayo n'ebishaju byayo." 
Leviticus8:21 Eby'omunda byayo n'ebivune byayo ku baaherize kubyozya n'amaizi, egyo mpaya yoona Musa yaagyokyeza aha itambiro kuba ekitambo ekicwekize eki bookyeize Nyakubaho kurugwamu ekisooroora kirikumugwisa gye, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiire." 
Leviticus8:22 Bwanyima Musa yaareeta endiijo mpaya y'entaama, empaya ey'okushoroorwa kw'abahongyerezi, Arooni n'abatabani nayo baagita emikono yaabo aha mutwe." 
Leviticus8:23 Musa yaagiita, yaagiihaho eshagama, yaagisiiga aha nshonda y'okutu kwa Arooni okwa buryo, n'aha kikumu kishaija eky'omukono gwe gwa buryo, n'aha kikumu kishaija eky'ekigyere kye kya buryo." 
Leviticus8:24 Reero baareeta batabani ba Arooni. Musa yaasiiga eshagama aha nshonga z'amatu gaabo ga buryo, n'aha bikumu bishaija eby'ebigyere byabo bya buryo. Mpaho Musa yaamiisiira eitambiro eshagama okuryehinguririza." 
Leviticus8:25 Bwanyima yaihayo ebishaju, n'omukira gw'ebishaju, n'ebishaju byona eby'aha by'omunda na zaakashaabo ez'aha kine, n'entsigo z'ombi hamwe n'ebishaju byazo n'ekivune kya buryo." 
Leviticus8:26 Kandi yaiha omugaati omu kiibo ky'emigaati etatumbisiibwe eyaabaire emurikiirwe Nyakubaho n'ogundi mugaati ogutobagiibwemu amajuta, n'akabanda kamwe, yaabita ahari ebyo bishaju n'aha kivune kya buryo." 
Leviticus8:27 Byona yaabikwatsa Arooni n'abatabani, baabizongazonzya; byaba ekihongwa ekizongazongiibwe omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus8:28 Bwanyima Musa yaabibaihaho, yaabyokyeza aha itambiro hamwe n'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya; byaba ekihongwa ky'okushoroorwa kwabo, eky'ekitambo kyokiibwe, eki ekisooroora kyakyo kirikugwisa gye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus8:29 Kandi Musa yaakwata enkoro, yaagizongazonzya kuba ekihongwa kizongazongiibwe omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, kyaba omugabo gwa Musa ogw'egyo mpaya y'entaama ey'okushoroorwa kw'abahongyerezi, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiira." 
Leviticus8:30 Bwanyima Musa yaihayo amajuta g'okusiiga, n'eshagama eyaabaire eri aha itambiro, yaabimiisiira Arooni n'ebijwaro bye, n'abatabani n'ebijwaro byabo." 
Leviticus8:31 Reero Musa yaagira Arooni n'abatabani ati: Muteekyere egyo nyama aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, kandi mube niho mwagiriira hamwe n'emigaati eri omu kiibo, etoizirwe ahabw'okubashoroora, nk'oku naaragiire ningira nti: Arooni n'abatabani babe nibo baagirya." 
Leviticus8:32 Haza enyama n'emigaati ebiraatsigareho, mubyotsye omu muriro." 
Leviticus8:33 Kandi mumare ebiro mushanju mutashohoire aheeru y'omuryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, okuhitsya obu ebiro by'okushoroorwa kwanyu biraahwe; ahabw'okuba okubashoroora nikwija kumara ebiro mushanju." 
Leviticus8:34 Nk'oku kyakorwa eri izooba, nikwo Nyakubaho akiragiire, ngu kikorwe kityo kubakarabira." 
Leviticus8:35 Nimwija kumara ebiro mushanju nyomushana na nyekiro mutarikuruga aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, nimukora ebi Nyakubaho aragiire. Mwaba mutakozire mutyo nimufa. Nikwo ndagiirwe ntyo." 
Leviticus8:36 Mpaho Arooni n'abatabani baakora byona ebi Nyakubaho yaaragiire naabatumaho Musa. 
Leviticus9:1 Aha kiro kya munaana Musa akeeta Arooni n'abatabani n'abakuru b'omu Baisiraeli. 
Leviticus9:2 Yaagira Arooni ati: Twara enimi y'ekimasha kuba empongano y'ekibi, n'empaya y'entaama kuba ekihongwa ky'okucwetsya; byombi bitaine kamogo; obihongyere omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus9:3 Kandi ogambire Abaisiraeli oti: Mutware empaya y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi, n'enyana n'omwana gw'entaama ebihikize omwaka gumwe bizairwe ebitaine kamogo, bibe ekihongwa ky'okucwetsya." 
Leviticus9:4 Kandi n'enimi n'empaya y'entaama, kuba ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe kubitambira omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. Taho ekihongwa ky'esaano ejwangiibwemu amajuta: ahabw'okuba eri izooba Nyakubaho naija kubeeyoreka." 
Leviticus9:5 Batyo baareeta omu maisho g'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu ebi Musa yaaragiire; kandi eihanga ryona ryairira haihi, ryayemerera omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus9:6 Reero Musa yaabagira ati: Eki nikyo Nyakubaho abaragiire kukora; haza naija kubeeyoreka aine ekitiinisa. 
Leviticus9:7 Bwanyima Musa yaagira Arooni ati: Hika aha itambiro, ohongye empongano yaawe ey'ekibi, n'ekitambo kyawe eky'okucwetsya, oyekarabire kandi okarabire n'eihanga. Reero oreete ekitambo ky'abantu, obakarabire nk'oku Nyakubaho aragiire." 
Leviticus9:8 Arooni atyo aza aha itambiro, aita enyana y'empongano y'ekibi ey'okwehongyerera." 
Leviticus9:9 Abatabani bamureetera eshangama, agikozamu orukumu, agisiiga aha mahembe g'eitambiro; kandi agishuka omu mizi yaaryo." 
Leviticus9:10 Kwonka ebishaju, n'entsigo na zaakashaabo z'aha kine ezaihwa aha mpongano y'ekibi, abyokyeza aha itambiro nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa." 
Leviticus9:11 Enyama n'oruhu abyokyeza aheeru y'orusiisira. 
Leviticus9:12 Kandi Arooni aita enyamaishwa y'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya. Abatabani bamureetera eshagama, agimiisiira eitambiro okuryehinguririza." 
Leviticus9:13 Mpaho bamureetera ekyo kitambo ky'okucwetsya kiri omu biningu, n'omutwe, abyokyeza aha itambiro." 
Leviticus9:14 Reero ayozya eby'omunda n'ebivune, abyokyeza aha itambiro hamwe n'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya." 
Leviticus9:15 Bwanyima areeta ekitambo ky'abantu, aihayo embuzi y'empongano y'ekibi ey'okuhongyerera abantu, agiita, agihongyerera ekibi, nk'oku yaagira empongano y'ekibi kye eyaabanza." 
Leviticus9:16 Reero areeta ekitambo eky'okucwetsya, akitamba nk'oku kirikuragiirwa." 
Leviticus9:17 Areeta omutoijo gw'esaano, agiihaho oruhi rwijwire, agyokyeza aha itambiro, aha rubaju rw'ekitambo ekicwekize eky'omu kasheeshe." 
Leviticus9:18 Aita enimi n'empaya y'entaama kuba ekitambo ky'abantu kurya kumwe, abatabani bamureetera eshagama, agimiisiira eitambiro okuryehinguririza." 
Leviticus9:19 Baamureetera ebishaju by'enimi n'eby'empaya y'entaama, n'omukira gw'ebishaju, n'ebishweka eby'omunda, n'entsigo na zaakashaabo z'aha kine." 
Leviticus9:20 Haza bata ebyo bishaju aha nkoro, abyokyeza aha itambiro." 
Leviticus9:21 Kwonka enkoro n'ekivune kya buryo Arooni abizongazonzya kuba ekitambo kizongazongiibwe omu maisho ga Nyakubaho nk'oku Musa yaaragiire. 
Leviticus9:22 Bwanyima Arooni aimutsya emikono ye agyorekyeize abantu, abashabira omugisha. Atyo aruga aha itambiro ahi yaaba naatambira ekitambo ky'okuhongyerera ekibi, n'ekicwekize, n'ebyokurya kumwe." 
Leviticus9:23 Reero Musa na Arooni baza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu. Ku bashohora bashabira abantu emigisha; haza Nyakubaho abonekyera abo bantu boona aine ekitiinisa. 
Leviticus9:24 Omuriro guruga omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, gwokyeza kimwe ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, n'ebishaju ebiri aha itambiro. Abantu boona ku bakireeba bateera akaari k'okushemererwa, bagwa aha nsi bajuumaire." 
Leviticus10:1 Mbwenu Nadabu na Abiihu batabani ba Arooni, buri omwe akatwara ekyoterero kye, yaakitaho amakara garikwotsya, yaagamemeereraho obubaani, baayoterera Nyakubaho n'omuriro gurikuzira ogu atarabaragiire." 
Leviticus10:2 Mpaho omuriro gwatimbira ahi Nyakubaho ari, gwabootsya, baafeera omu maisho ge." 
Leviticus10:3 Musa nikwo kugambira Arooni ati: Ekyo nikyo Nyakubaho yaagambire ati: ndyayeyoreka omu bandi haihi ku ndi Orikwera; haza mpeebwe ekitiinwa omu maisho g'abantu boona. Arooni atyo ahunama. 
Leviticus10:4 Musa ayeta Mishaeli na Elizafani, batabani ba Uzieli ishento Arooni; abagira ati: Ni mwirire haihi, mwihe emitumbi ya beene waanyu omu maisho gw'Omwanya Ogurikwera, mugitware aheeru y'orusiisira." 
Leviticus10:5 Nabo bairira haihi bagikiririza omu myenda yaayo, bagishohoza aheeru y'orusiisira, nk'oku Musa yaaragiira." 
Leviticus10:6 Reero Musa agira Arooni n'abatabani Eleazaari na Itamaari ati: Mutazingurura eishokye ry'aha mitwe yaanyu, kandi mutataagura ebijwaro byanyu mutakaafa, n'ekiniga kya Nyakubaho kikajuumikira eihanga ryona; kureka murekye beene waanyu ab'eihanga ryona erya Isiraeli bacurire abaitwa omuriro gwa Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus10:7 Kandi mutashohora kurenga aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu mukafa, ahabw'okuba amajuta ga Nyakubaho agu musiigirwe gakibariho. Nabo baatwaza nk'oku Musa yaagamba." 
Leviticus10:8 Nyakubaho akagambira Arooni naamugira ati: 
Leviticus10:9 Mutarinywa viino nari eky'okunywa ky'amakuuta, iwe na batabani baawe mwaba nimuza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, mutakaafa. Haza ekyo kibe ekiragiro ekibateereirweho ebiro byona omu nzaaro zaanyu zoona," 
Leviticus10:10 mubone kutaanisa ekirikwera n'ekitarikwera, ekirikuzira n'ekitarikuzira." 
Leviticus10:11 Kandi mwegyese Abaisiraeli ebyatairweho byona, ebi Nyakubaho yaabagambiire naabatumaho Musa." 
Leviticus10:12 Musa akagambira Arooni na Eleazaari na Itamaari abatabani abaatsigaireho ati: Mutware esaano etsigaire aha bitoijeirwe Nyakubaho byokiibwe omuriro, mugiriire aha rubaju rw'eitambiro etatumbisiibwe; ahabw'okuba n'erikwerera kimwe." 
Leviticus10:13 Mugiriire omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, ahabw'okuba n'omugabo gwanyu n'abaana baanyu, ogwihirwe aha bitoijeirwe Nyakubaho ebicwekyeize omu muriro. Naanye nikwo ndagiirwe ntyo." 
Leviticus10:14 Kwonka enkoro ezongazongiibwe, n'ekivune ekitoizirwe, imwe na batabani baanyu na bahara baanyu mubiriire omu mwanya oguboneire. Ahabw'okuba bibahairwe kuba omugabo gwanyu n'ogwa batabani baanyu nibiihwa aha bitambo by'okurya kumwe ebitoizirwe Abaisiraeli." 
Leviticus10:15 Ekivune ekitoizirwe n'enkoro ezongazongiibwe bagume babireete hamwe n'ebitambo by'ebishaju by'okucwetsya bibone kuzongazongibwa biri ekitambo ekizongazongiibwe omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. Haza bigume bibe ebyanyu na batabani baanyu, biri omugabo gw'ebiro byona, nk'oku Mukama aragiire." 
Leviticus10:16 Bwanyima Musa akateeraho munonga kubuuririza eby'embuzi y'empongano y'ekibi, yaashanga bagyokyeize kimwe! Yaagwerwa kubi Eleazaari na Itamaari beene Arooni abaatsigaireho, naabajuukirira ati:" 
Leviticus10:17 Ahabw'enki mutaariira mpongano y'ekibi omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, haza kiri ekintu kirikwerera kimwe; kandi kyabahairwe ngu mubone kwemera ekibi ky'abantu b'eihanga, n'okubakarabira omu maisho ga Nyakubaho?" 
Leviticus10:18 Reeba eshagama yaayo tiyaatwarwa ndugu y'Omwanya Ogurikwera. 
Leviticus10:19 Arooni nawe agarukamu Musa ati: Manya eri izooba baatamba ekitambo kyabo ky'okuhongyerera ekibi n'ekitambo kyabo eky'okucwekyeza omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. Mbwenu eki kyangwaho! Eri izooba kuri naarya empongano y'ekibi Nyakubaho yaaba naakisiima? 
Leviticus10:20 Ekyo Musa ku yaakihuriire, yaatuuza." 
Leviticus11:1 Kandi Nyakubaho akagambira Musa na Arooni ati: 
Leviticus11:2 Mugambire Abaisiraeli muti: Ebi nibyo bintu ebiine amagara, ebi murikwikirizibwa kurya omu nyamaishwa zoona eziri omu nsi." 
Leviticus11:3 Nimwikirizibwa kurya enyamaishwa zoona ezaatsizemu ebinono, eziine ebyara bibiri kandi ezirikwekuuma." 
Leviticus11:4 Kwonka omu zirikwekuuma nari ezaatsizemu ebinono, mutarirya ezi: engamira: ahabw'okuba eyekuuma, kwonka teyatsizemu byara. Egyo ahariimwe neezira." 
Leviticus11:5 Taho endirira, ahabw'okuba eyekuuma, kwonka teyatsizemu byara. Ahariimwe neezira." 
Leviticus11:6 Kandi n'akame, ahabw'okuba nako keekuuma kwonka tikaatsizemu byara. Ahariimwe nikazira." 
Leviticus11:7 Taho empunu; yo eyatsizemu ebyara, kandi eine ebigyere by'ebyara bibiri, kwonka teyekuuma. Nayo ahariimwe neezira." 
Leviticus11:8 Mutarirya enyama yaazo, kandi mutarikora aha mitumbi yaazo. Ahariimwe neezira." 
Leviticus11:9 Ahari byona ebituura omu maizi, ebi nibyo murikwikirizibwa kurya; kyona eky'omu maizi ekiine amapapa n'engamba; yaaba bya mu mayanja nari eby'omu migyera, nimwikirizibwa kubirya." 
Leviticus11:10 Kwonka ekintu kyona eky'omu mayanja nari eky'omu migyera, ekitaine mapapa na ngamba, eky'ebituura omu maizi ebikye n'ebihango kibe ekirikuzira ahariimwe." 
Leviticus11:11 Bigume biri ebirikuzira ahariimwe. Mutarirya enyama zaabyo, kandi emitumbi yaabyo mugume muginagye." 
Leviticus11:12 Kyona eky'omu maizi ekitaine mapapa na ngamba, kigume kibe ekirikuzira ahariimwe." 
Leviticus11:13 Reero omu nyonyi, ezi nizo muraagume nimuzira. Zitaririibwa, ahabw'okuba nizizira. Nizo ezi:" 
Leviticus11:14 Eishamba, empungu mareere, kanyamushungushungu, ekyanira, n'ezindi mpungu z'emiringo ya nyakabaka." 
Leviticus11:15 Ekyeetwa ekikoona kyona; 
Leviticus11:16 maaya, ekishoma-bwire, kaamunywa-maizi, akaca n'oruganda rwako;" 
Leviticus11:17 ekihihizi, ekiyoyo, enyawaawa," 
Leviticus11:18 enkoko y'omu maizi, ebishaayaaya, ebihuhura-bahuta," 
Leviticus11:19 enkongoro, oruyongoyongo n'ez'oruganda rwarwo, enkooherwa, n'orubaka." 
Leviticus11:20 Ebikooko by'amapapa byona ebirikugyendesa amaguru ana, ahariimwe nibizira." 
Leviticus11:21 Kwonka omu by'amapapa ebirikugyendesa amaguru ana, nimwikirizibwa kurya ebiine amaguru aha bigyere byabyo, agu bitenteberezesa aha itaka." 
Leviticus11:22 Omuribyo nimwikirizibwa kurya ebi: Enzigye n'eby'oruganda rwazo, ebiharara n'eby'oruganda rwabyo, ebijere n'oruganda rwabyo, n'eseenene n'oruganda rwazo." 
Leviticus11:23 Kwonka ebindi bikooko byona ebiine amapapa kandi eby'amaguru ana, bibe ebirikuzira ahariimwe." 
Leviticus11:24 Enyamaishwa ezo ziryabareetera kuba abahagaire, weena orikora aha mutumbi gwazo aryaba ohagaire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus11:25 Kandi weena oryekorera ekihinju ky'omutumbi gwazo, ayozye ebijwaro bye, agume ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus11:26 Enyamaishwa yoona eyatsizemu ebinono, kwonka etaine byara byebaganiisemu, kandi etarikwekuuma, egume eri erikuzira ahariimwe. Weena orizikoraho aryaba ohagaire." 
Leviticus11:27 N'enyamaishwa zoona ezigyendesa ebiganja, ez'amaguru ana, ahariimwe nizizira; weena orikora aha mutumbi gwazo, aryaba ohagaire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus11:28 Kandi weena oryekorera omutumbi gwazo, ayozye ebijwaro bye, agume ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo. Ebyo n'ebirikuzira ahariimwe." 
Leviticus11:29 Kandi eby'omu birikwegyendesa aha itaka nibyajuza enda, ahariimwe nabyo nibizira; emikorwa, embeba, entsigira-muteete n'oruganda rwayo," 
Leviticus11:30 ekihangare, engamba, ekinya, n'akanyarugondo n'enyaruju." 
Leviticus11:31 Omu bintu byona ebirikwajuza enda ebyo nimubizira. Weena oribikoraho bifiire abe ohagaire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo. 
Leviticus11:32 Ekintu eki birigwera bifiire, kiryahagara, nobu kyakuba kiri ekiti, ekijwaro, oruhu, ekiguniya nari ekintu kyona ekirikukoresibwa. Ekyo kintu kijabikwe omu maizi okuhitsya omu mwabazyo kibone kuba ekishemeire." 
Leviticus11:33 Kimwe omuribyo ku kirigwa omu rwabya rw'eibumba, kyona ekirurimu kiryaba ekihagaire, kandi orwo rwabya murwate." 
Leviticus11:34 Ekyokurya kyona ekiriibwa, ku kirishukwaho amaizi gaaruga omuri orwo rwabya, kiryahagara. Neky'okunywa kyona ekirinywerwa aha rwabya nk'orwe, kiryahagara." 
Leviticus11:35 Ekintu kyona ekirigwerwa ekihinju ky'omutumbi, kiryaba ekihagaire, yaaba nyungu eteeka yaaba mahega, kyatagurwe, ahabw'okuba kiryaba ekihagaire kandi ekirikuzira ahariimwe." 
Leviticus11:36 Enshuro n'ekiziba ekirimu amaizi, nobu byo biriguma bitasiisikaire, kwonka ekirikora aha mutumbi gw'ebyo bintu kiryaba ekisiisikaire." 
Leviticus11:37 Kandi ekihinju ky'omutumbi gwabyo ku kirigwa aha mbibo y'okubibwa, egyo mbibo eryaguma eshemeire." 
Leviticus11:38 Kwonka ku eriba etumbikirwe omu maizi, ekihinju kyona eky'omuntumbi ku kirigigwera, biri yaaba esiisikaire ahariimwe." 
Leviticus11:39 N'enyamaishwa ei murikwikirizibwa kurya ku erifa, orikora aha mutumbi gwayo aryaba ohagaire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus11:40 Kandi orirya enyama y'omutumbi gwayo, ayozye ebijwaro bye, haza agume ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo. N'oryekorera ogwo mutumbi, ayozye ebijwaro bye, abe otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus11:41 Ekintu kyona eky'amaguru ana ekirikwajuza enda n'ekirikuzira, kitaririibwa." 
Leviticus11:42 Kyona ekirikugyendesa amaguru ana, nari ekiine amaguru maingi, ebintu byona ebirikugyendesa enda n'amaguru ana aha itaka, mutaribirya, ahabw'okuba nibizira." 
Leviticus11:43 Mutaryehagazisa ekintu kirikugyendesa enda, kandi mutaribyesiisisa mukasiisikara." 
Leviticus11:44 Manya ndi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu. N'ahabw'ekyo mweyeze, mube abarikwera nk'oku ndi Orikwera. Mutaryehagazisa ekintu ekirikugyendesa amaguru ana nikyekurura aha itaka." 
Leviticus11:45 Manya ndi Mukama owaabareetsire nimbaiha omu nsi ya Misiri, ngu mbe Ruhanga waanyu. N'ahabw'ekyo mube abarikwera ahabw'okuba ndi Orikwera." 
Leviticus11:46 Eryo niryo iteeka erikwatiraine n'enyamaishwa n'enyonyi n'ekihangirwe kyona ekiine amagara, ekirikugyendera omu maizi, n'ekirikugyendesa enda aha itaka;" 
Leviticus11:47 ery'okutaanisa ebirikuzira n'ebitarikuzira, hamwe n'ebihangirwe ebiine amagara ebirikwikirizibwa kuriibwa n'ebirikuzira." 
Leviticus12:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Leviticus12:2 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Omukazi ku arigira enda, yaazaara omwojo, obwo aryamara ebiro mushanju ari otashemeire. Nk'oku aba ari omu kwezi, abe nikwo yaaguma ari otashemeire." 
Leviticus12:3 Reero aha kiro kya munaana, omwana asharweho ekikoba ky'omubiri gwe." 
Leviticus12:4 Bwanyima ogwo mukazi amare ebiro makumi ashatu na bishatu by'okwezibwa kw'eshagama ye y'ekizaire; atariikirizibwa kukora aha kintu kyona ekirikwera, nobu kwakuba okutaaha omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, okuhitsya obu ariba oshemeire." 
Leviticus12:5 Kwonka ku arizaara omwishiki, obwo aryamara wiiki ibiri ari otashemeire, nk'obu aba ari omu kwezi; bwanyima agumizemu okumara ebiro makumi mukaaga na mukaaga ari omu kwezibwa kw'eshagama ye ey'ekizaire." 
Leviticus12:6 Ebiro by'okwezibwa kwe ku birihwa, yaaba by'omwojo nari by'omwishiki, aryareetera omuhongyerezi omwana gw'entaama oguhikize omwaka guzairwe, kuba ekitambo ky'okucwetsya; kandi n'enkombe nto nari eriiba, kuba empongano y'ekibi; abimushangise aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Leviticus12:7 Mpaho omuhongyerezi abihongyere Nyakubaho, kandi akarabire ogwo mukazi, abone kwezibwa ahabw'eshagama ye eyaamurugiremu. Eryo niryo iteeka ry'omukazi orizaara omwana yaaba mwojo yaaba mwishiki." 
Leviticus12:8 Ku ariremwa kutunga omwana gw'entaama, areete amaiba abiri nari enkombe ibiri nto: emwe ebe ey'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, endi ebe empongano y'ekibi. Mpaho omuhongyerezi amukarabire, n'onu abone kwezibwa." 
Leviticus13:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa na Arooni ati: 
Leviticus13:2 Omuntu ku arigira aha mubiri gwe ekizimba nari ekironda nainga ekiseera, kyarugwamu endwara y'ebibembe aha mubiri gwe, obwo areetwe ahari Arooni omuhongyerezi, nari ahari omwe omu batabani be abahongyerezi." 
Leviticus13:3 Mpaho omuhongyerezi ashwijume omubiri gwe, ah'endwara eri. Reero obwoya bw'abarwaire ku buraabe buhindukire bukeera, kandi egyo ndwara eyogire omu kikoba ky'omubiri gwe, biri n'endwara y'ebibembe. Omuhongyerezi ku araaheze kumushwijuma, amurangye ku asiisikaire." 
Leviticus13:4 Kwonka eibara ry'aha mubiri gwe ku ririba niryera, kandi ritoogire omu kikoba ky'omubiri, n'obwoya bwaho butahindukire bukeera, omuhongyerezi arindire hangahari ogwo muntu orwaire okumara ebiro mushanju." 
Leviticus13:5 Kandi omuhongyerezi amushwijume aha kiro kya mushanju. Haza omu kureeba kwe, ku araashangye endwara eri nk'oku ebaire eri, kandi etatantamukire, ayongyere kumurindira hangahari wenka ebindi biro mushanju." 
Leviticus13:6 Reero aha kiro kya mushanju agarukye amushwijume. Ku araashangye egyo ndwara neegyenda neehwerera, kandi etatantamukire, amurangye ku ari oshemeire. Biri n'ekiseera kusha. Ogwo muntu ayozye ebijwaro bye, abe oshemeire." 
Leviticus13:7 Kwonka ekiseera ku kiraabugye omubiri yaaherize kweyoreka omuhongyerezi ahabw'okwezibwa, agarukye amweyorekye." 
Leviticus13:8 Ogwo muhongyerezi amushwijume. Haza ekyo kiseera ku kiraabe kitantamukire, amurangye ku ari otashemeire. Biri n'ebibembe." 
Leviticus13:9 Omuntu ku arirwara ebibembe, bamutwarire omuhongyerezi." 
Leviticus13:10 Omuhongyerezi amushwijume. Aha mubiri gwe ku hariba hariho ekizimba kirikwera, haza kihindwire obwoya bwaho bukeera, kandi kicwekire ekironda ahonaaho," 
Leviticus13:11 biri aine ebibembe by'enziizi aha mubiri gwe. Omuhongyerezi omurangye ku atashemeire. Atamuta omu ngoonyo, ahabw'okuba asiisikaire." 
Leviticus13:12 Kwonka ebibembe ku biraasheeshe aha mubiri gw'ogwo muntu orwaire byagushweka, okwiha aha mutwe okuta aha bigyere, nk'oku omuhongyerezi araareebe," 
Leviticus13:13 obwo omuhongyerezi amushwijume. Ebibembe ku biraabe bishwekire omubiri gwe gwona, amurangye ku akizire egyo ndwara, ahabw'okuba byona bihindukire ebirikwera. N'ahabw'ekyo abikiruukire." 
Leviticus13:14 Kwonka ku arireebwaho ekironda, biri asiisikaire." 
Leviticus13:15 Omuhongyerezi ashwijume ekyo kironda, amurangye ku asiisikaire. Ekironda kisiisikaire biri n'ebibembe." 
Leviticus13:16 Kandi ku kirihinduka kyayera, obwo aije aha muhongyerezi," 
Leviticus13:17 amushwijume. Egyo ndwara ku eraabe ehindukire ekeera, omuhongyerezi arangye ogwo muntu orwaire ku atasiisikaire. Biri tasiisikaire." 
Leviticus13:18 Reero aha ruhu rw'omubiri gw'omuntu ku harizaho ekihuute, bwanyima kyakira," 
Leviticus13:19 haza omu nkojo yaakyo haazamu ekizimba kirikwera, nari eibara ririkutukura, bakyorekye omuhongyerezi," 
Leviticus13:20 akishwijume. Ku araashangye kyogire omu ruhu, n'obwoya bwakyo buhindukire bukeera, amurangye ku asiisikaire; biri n'endwara y'ebibembe ebarukiire omu kihuute." 
Leviticus13:21 Kwonka omuhongyerezi ku araakishwijume, haza obwoya bwaho yaashanga butarikwera, kandi kitoogire mu ruhu, kureka nikyereruka, obwo amute omu ngoonyo okumara ebiro mushanju." 
Leviticus13:22 Kandi ku kiraabugye oruhu rw'omubiri gwe, omuhongyerezi amurangye ku asiisikaire, biri arwaire." 
Leviticus13:23 Kwonka eibara ku ririguma ahi riri, ritaatantamuka, biri n'enkojo y'ekihuute; omuhongyerezi amurangye ku atasiisikaire." 
Leviticus13:24 Nari omubiri ku gurigiibwaho ekitumbe, ekironda kyakyo kyahinduka eibara ririkutukuratukura nainga ririkwera," 
Leviticus13:25 omuhongyerezi arishwijume. Obwoya bw'ahari eryo ibara ku buriba buhindukire bukeera, kandi riri nk'eryogire omu ruhu; biri n'ebibembe ebibarukiire omu kitumbe. Omuhongyerezi amurangye ku asiisikaire; n'endwara y'ebibembe." 
Leviticus13:26 Kwonka ku araashwijume eryo ibara, yaashanga obwoya bwaho butarikwera, kandi ritoogire mu mubiri, kureka niryereruka, obwo amute omu ngoonyo okumara ebiro mushanju." 
Leviticus13:27 Aha kiro kya mushanju ogwo muhongyerezi agarukye amushwijume. Ku araashangye niribuga oruhu rw'omubiri, amurangye ku asiisikaire; biri n'endwara y'ebibembe." 
Leviticus13:28 Kwonka eibara ku riraagume ahi ribaire riri, ritaatantamuka ha mubiri, kureka ryayereruka, biri n'ekizimba ekifumukiire omu kitumbe. Omuhongyerezi amurangye ku atasiisikaire, ahabw'okuba neeba eri enkojo yaakyo." 
Leviticus13:29 Omushaija nari omukazi ku arigira endwara omu mutwe nari aha kareju; 
Leviticus13:30 omuhongyerezi ashwijume egyo ndwara. Ku arishanga eyogire omu ruhu, obwoya bwaho buri kinekye kandi bunyururukire, amurangye ku asiisikaire; biri n'ekiguuna ky'ebibembe by'omu mutwe nari by'aha kareju." 
Leviticus13:31 Omuhongyerezi ku arishwijuma egyo ndwara y'ebiguuna, yaashusha oti teyogire mu ruhu, kandi bitarimu bwoya burikwiragura, ate hangahari ogwo muntu oine endwara y'ebiguuna okumara ebiro mushanju." 
Leviticus13:32 Reero aha kiro kya mushanju ashwijume egyo ndwara. Ekiguuna ku kiraabe kitatantamukire, kitarimu bwoya bwa kinekye, kandi kitoogire mu ruhu," 
Leviticus13:33 obwo ogwo muntu orwaire ayemwe eishokye, kwonka atamwa ah'ebiguuna biri. Reero omuhongyerezi ate hangahari ogwo muntu orwaire endwara y'ebiguuna okumara ebiro mushanju." 
Leviticus13:34 Aha kiro kya mushanju ashwijume ekyo kiguuna. Haza ku araashangye kitabugire mu ruhu, kandi kirikushusha oti tikirwogiremu, amurangye ku atasiisikaire, n'onu ayozye ebijwaro bye abe oshemeire." 
Leviticus13:35 Kwonka ekiguuna ku kiribuga omu ruhu yaaherize kushemezibwa," 
Leviticus13:36 obwo omuhongyerezi amushwijume. Ku araashangye ekiguuna kibugire omubiri, nikiba kitarikumwetengyesa kusherura obwoya bwa kinekye, biri asiisikaire." 
Leviticus13:37 Kwonka ku araashwijume ekiguuna, haza yaareeba kimezirwemu obwoya burikwiragura, biri kikizire, nawe tasiisikaire. Omuhongyerezi amurangye ku ari oshemeire." 
Leviticus13:38 Omushaija nari omukazi ku arigira amabara aha ruhu rw'omubiri gwe, gari amabara garikwera," 
Leviticus13:39 omuhongyerezi amushwijume. Reero ago mabara g'aha ruhu rw'omubiri ku gariba nigeereruka, biri n'amazomba agafumukiire omu ruhu, naaba atasiisikaire." 
Leviticus13:40 Omuntu ku arihwa eishokye aha mutwe, aryaba aine oruhara, kwonka atasiisikaire." 
Leviticus13:41 Kandi omuntu eishokye ku ririmuhwa omu bwekorerero, aryaba aine oruhara omu bwekorerero, kwonka atasiisikaire." 
Leviticus13:42 Kwonka omu ruhara rw'omu ihahaara nari orw'omu bwekorerero ku haribamu eibara ry'endwara eririkutukuramu kandi niryera, biri n'ebibembe ebibarukiire omu ihahaara ry'omutwe gwe nari omu bwekorerero." 
Leviticus13:43 Obwo omuhongyerezi amushwijume, haza egyo ndwara y'ekizimba ky'omu ruhara rw'eihahaara ry'omutwe, nari ky'omu bwekorerero, ku kiriba nikitukuratukuramu kandi nikyera, nikishusha nk'ekibembe kiri omu ruhu rw'omubiri," 
Leviticus13:44 biri ogwo muntu n'omubembe; asiisikaire. Omuhongyerezi amurangye ku asiisikaire, manya egyo ndwara emuri omu mutwe." 
Leviticus13:45 Omubembe oine egyo ndwara ajware ebijwaro bitaagukire, azingurure eishokye rye, kandi ayeshembe omunwa gwa ruguru, haza ayamuze ati: Nsiisikaire! Nsiisikaire!" 
Leviticus13:46 Aryaguma ari osiisikaire ebiro bi arimara akiine egyo ndwara; n'osiisikaire ow'okuguma atwire wenka omu ngoonyo, aheeru y'orusiisira." 
Leviticus13:47 Ekijwaro ku kiriba kiine ndwara y'ebibembe, yaaba ky'ebyoya by'entaama nari kya kitaani," 
Leviticus13:48 yaaba mu huuzi za bukiizi nari za bwemi eza kitaani nari ez'ebyoya by'entaama, nainga omu ruhu nari ekintu kyona ekikozirwe omu ruhu," 
Leviticus13:49 ekyo kijwaro ku kirireebwamu erangi ya kijubwe nari erikutukuratukura, yaaba mu huuzi za bukiizi nari za bwemi, nainga omu ruhu nari omu kintu kyona ekikozirwe omu ruhu, biri n'endwara y'ebibembe, kandi kyorekwe omuhongyerezi." 
Leviticus13:50 Mpaho omuhongyerezi ashwijume egyo ndwara, kandi ate hangahari ekyo kintu kirimu endwara okumara ebiro mushanju." 
Leviticus13:51 Reero aha kiro kya mushanju agarukye ashwijume egyo ndwara. Endwara ku eraabe ebugire ekyo kijwaro, omu huuzi zaakyo eza bukiizi nari eza bwemi, nainga omu ruhu rwona orurikukoresibwa, biri egyo ndwara n'ebibembe by'akabi. Ekyo kijwaro kisiisikaire." 
Leviticus13:52 Ekijwaro akyotsye, yaaba kirimu endwara omu huuzi zaakyo eza bukiizi nari eza bwemi; yaaba kya byoya by'entaama nari kya kitaani, nainga ekintu kyona eky'oruhu; ahabw'okuba n'ebibembe birikuturira; bakyotsye omu muriro." 
Leviticus13:53 Mbwenu omuhongyerezi ku arishwijuma, yaashanga endwara etabugire ekijwaro omu huuzi zaakyo eza bukiizi nari eza bwemi, nainga omu kintu kyona eky'oruhu," 
Leviticus13:54 obwo aragiire boozye ekyo kijwaro kirimu endwara, haza ayongyere kukirindira hangahari okumara ebiro ebindi mushanju." 
Leviticus13:55 Bwanyima ashwijume ekyo kijwaro kirimu endwara, baaherize kukyozya. Ku araashangye eibara eririmu endwara ritahindwire rangi, nobu egyo ndwara eraabe etabugire, biri kisiisikaire. Mukyotsye omu muriro, nobu eibara ry'egyo ndwara ryakuba riri enyima nari omunda." 
Leviticus13:56 Kwonka omuhongyerezi ku arishwijuma, haza endwara etaareebwa gye baaherize kukyozya, obwo ataagure eibara ry'omuri ekyo kijwaro, nari omu ruhu; nainga omu huuzi zaakyo eza bukiizi nari eza bwemi." 
Leviticus13:57 Reero eibara ku riraagarukye ryareebwa omuri ekyo kijwaro, omu huuzi zaakyo eza bukiizi nari eza bwemi, nainga omu kintu kyona eky'oruhu, biri egyo ndwara neebuga. Ekyo kintu kirimu endwara, mukyotsye omu muriro." 
Leviticus13:58 Kwonka ekijwaro, ehuuzi zaakyo eza bukiizi nari eza bwemi, nainga ekintu kyona eky'oruhu, eki endwara erugiremu mwaherize kukyozya, bagarukye bakyozye obwa kabiri, kibone kuba ekitasiisikaire." 
Leviticus13:59 Eryo niryo iteeka ry'endwara y'ebibembe by'omu kijwaro ky'ebyoya by'entaama nari kitaani, yaaba mu huuzi za bukiizi nari za bwemi, nainga omu kintu kyona eky'oruhu, kuhamya yaaba kisiisikaire nari kitasiisikaire." 
Leviticus14:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Leviticus14:2 Eri niryo iteeka ry'omubembe aha kiro ky'okushemezibwa kwe. Aryareetwa aha muhongyerezi. 
Leviticus14:3 Omuhongyerezi ashohore aheeru y'orusiisira ashwijume ogwo mubembe. Reero omubembe ku araabe akizire egyo ndwara," 
Leviticus14:4 omuhongyerezi abaragiire bareetere orikwenda kwezibwa enyonyi ibiri zihuriire ezitarikuzira, n'ekiti kya kaarwenda, n'akenda ka karari n'enyaweera." 
Leviticus14:5 Mpaho omuhongyerezi abaragiire kwitira emwe ahari ezo nyonyi omu rwabya rw'eibumba oruri eruguru y'amaizi g'omugyera. 
Leviticus14:6 Reero akwate enyonyi ehuriire n'ekiti kya kaarwenda n'omwenda gwa karari n'enyaweera, abijabikye omu shagama y'enyonyi eyaitirwa eruguru y'amaizi g'omugyera," 
Leviticus14:7 haza agimiisiire emirundi mushanju orikwenda kushemezibwaho ebibembe. Bwanyima amurangye ku yaashemera, kandi arekure enyonyi ehuriire egyende." 
Leviticus14:8 Reero orikwenda kushemezibwa ayozye ebijwaro bye, amwe obwoya bwe bwona kandi ayogye ashemere. Na bwanyima ataahe omu rusiisira, kwonka shi amare ebiro mushanju atarikuraara mu ihema rye." 
Leviticus14:9 Aha kiro kya mushanju amwe eishokye rye ryona hamwe n'ebireju, na bahungu n'obwoya bwe bwona. Bwanyima ayozye ebijwaro bye kandi ayogye omubiri gwe, abone kuba oshemeire." 
Leviticus14:10 Aha kiro kya munaana areete empaya ibiri nto z'entaama ezitaine kamogo, n'omwagazi gw'entaama oguhikize omwaka gumwe guzairwe ogutaine kamogo, n'omutoijo gw'esaano y'obunono y'ebicweka bishatu bya ikumi by'eigaro, ejwangiibwemu amajuta g'omuoliva, kandi n'encuba emwe y'amajuta." 
Leviticus14:11 Omuhongyerezi orikushemeza ate ogwo muntu hamwe n'ebyo bintu omu maisho ga Nyakubaho aha irembo ry'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu. 
Leviticus14:12 Kandi atware emwe aha mpaya nto z'entaama, agihongye ebe empongano y'okwihwaho orubanja; agitware hamwe n'encuba y'amajuta, haza abizongazonzye, bibe empongano ezongazongiziibwe omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus14:13 Kandi omwana gw'entaama agwitire omu mwanya gu baitiramu enyamaishwa y'empongano y'ekibi n'ey'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya omu Mwanya Gurikwera; ahabw'okuba empongano y'okwihwaho orubanja eri nk'empongano y'ekibi; nayo eba ey'omuhongyerezi, eba erikwerera kimwe." 
Leviticus14:14 Omuhongyerezi akore aha shagama y'empongano y'okwihwaho orubanja, agisiigye aha nshonga y'okutu kwa buryo okw'ow'okushemezibwa, n'aha kikumu kishaija ky'engaro ye ya buryo, n'aha kikumu kishaija ky'ekigyere kye kya buryo." 
Leviticus14:15 Omuhongyerezi akore aha majuta g'omu ncuba, agashukye aha kiganja kye kya bumosho," 
Leviticus14:16 reero ajabikye orukumu rwe rwa buryo omu majuta agari omu ngaro ye ya bumosho. Haza agamiisise orukumu rwe emirundi mushanju omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. 
Leviticus14:17 Agandi majuta agaraamutsigare omu ngaro agasiigye aha nshonga y'okutu kwa buryo okw'ow'okushemezibwa, n'aha kikumu kishaija eky'engaro ye ya buryo, n'aha kikumu kishaija ky'ekigyere kye kya buryo, n'aha shagama y'empongano y'okwihwaho orubanja." 
Leviticus14:18 Amajuta agaraamutsigare omu ngaro agasiigye omu mutwe gw'ow'okushemezibwa. Bwanyima amukarabire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. 
Leviticus14:19 Omuhongyerezi ahongye empongano y'ekibi, kukarabira orikuza kushemezibwaho okusiisikara. Na bwanyima aite ekitambo ky'okucwetsya." 
Leviticus14:20 Mpaho atambire aha itambiro ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, hamwe n'empongano y'esaano; amukarabire atyo, n'onu ashemezibwe." 
Leviticus14:21 Kwonka kishemezibwa ku araabe ari omworo, atarikubaasa kutunga ebyo byona, areete empaya emwe nto y'entaama, ebe empongano y'okwihwaho orubanja ey'okuzongazongibwa kumukarabira, kandi na kimwe kya ikumi ky'eigaro ry'esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta g'omuoliva, eri omutoijo gw'esaano, hamwe n'encuba y'amajuta g'omuoliva," 
Leviticus14:22 kandi n'amaiba abiri n'enkombe nto ibiri, ebi araabaase kutunga; emwe ebe empongano y'ekibi n'endi ekitambo ky'okucwetsya." 
Leviticus14:23 Mpaho aha kiro kya munaana, ahabw'okushemezibwa kwe abireetere omuhongyerezi aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu omu maisho ga Nyakubaho;" 
Leviticus14:24 omuhongyerezi akwate omwana gw'entaama n'empongano y'okwihwaho orubanja, n'encuba y'amajuta, abizongazonzye, bibe empongano ezongazongiibwe omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus14:25 Kandi aite omwana gw'entaama ogw'empongano y'okwihwaho orubanja, akore aha shagama yaayo, agisiigye aha nshonga y'okutu kwa buryo okw'ow'okushemezibwa, n'aha kikumu kishaija ky'engaro ye ya buryo, n'aha kikumu kishaija ky'ekigyere kye kya buryo," 
Leviticus14:26 omuhongyerezi ashukye amajuta aha kiganja kye kya bumosho," 
Leviticus14:27 ago majuta gari ahari ekyo kiganja agamiisise orukumu rwe rwa buryo emirundi mushanju omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. 
Leviticus14:28 Bwanyima akore aha majuta agari omu ngaro ye, agasiigye aha nshonga y'okutu kwa buryo okw'ow'okushemezibwa, n'aha kikumu kishaija ky'engaro ye ya buryo, n'aha kikumu kishaija ky'ekigyere kye kya buryo, ahi yaata eshagama y'empongano y'okwihwaho orubanja." 
Leviticus14:29 Reero amajuta agaatsigara aha kiganja kye agasiigye omu mutwe gw'ow'okushemezibwa, kumukarabira omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus14:30 Kandi atoije enyonyi emwe aha maiba n'aha nkombe nto, ebi abaasize kutunga;" 
Leviticus14:31 emwe ebe empongano y'ekibi, n'endi ebe ekitambo ky'okucwetsya kandi atoijereho ey'esaano. Mpaho ogwo muhongyerezi akarabire atyo omuntu orikushemezibwa omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus14:32 Eryo n'eiteeka ry'omuntu oine endwara y'ebibembe, otarikubaasa kutunga mpongano z'okushemezibwa kwe." 
Leviticus14:33 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa na Arooni ati: 
Leviticus14:34 Ku murihika omu nsi ya Kanaani, ei ndikubaha, haza naata omu nju endwara y'ebibembe, omuri egyo nsi ei mutungire," 
Leviticus14:35 mukama w'enju egyo aije agambire omuhongyerezi ati: Nooshusha oti omu nju yangye harimu endwara. 
Leviticus14:36 Mpaho omuhongyerezi aragiire baihe ebintu omu nju, omuhongyerezi atakagiireyo kwetegyereza endwara; byona ebiri omu nju bitakaarangwa ngu bisiisikaire. Bwanyima omuhongyerezi ataahemu kugireeba," 
Leviticus14:37 ayetegyereze endwara. Haza endwara ku eraabe eri omu bisiika by'enju, biine amabara ga kijubwe n'agarikutukuratukura, kandi waashusha oti bitaahire omunda," 
Leviticus14:38 obwo omuhongyerezi arugye omuri egyo nju, aze aha muryango gwayo, kandi agikingye okumara ebiro mushanju." 
Leviticus14:39 Mbwenu endwara ku eraabe ebugire omu bisiika byayo," 
Leviticus14:40 obwo omuhongyerezi aragiire baihemu amabaare agakwatsirwe egyo ndwara, baganagye omuri kasasiro, aheeru y'orurembo." 
Leviticus14:41 Kandi aragiire baharagate egyo nju yoona omunda, reero ebi baraaharagatemu babyate omuri kasasiro aheeru y'orurembo." 
Leviticus14:42 Bwanyima bareete agandi mabaare bagate omu mwanya gwa gari; na nyineeka areete ekindi ky'okuhomesa asiigirize egyo nju. 
Leviticus14:43 Endwara ku erigaruka, yaasheesha omuri egyo nju baaherize kugiihamu amabaare, n'okugiharagata n'okugisiigiriza," 
Leviticus14:44 omuhongyerezi azeyo agireebe. Endwara ku eraabe ebugire egyo nju, biri n'ebibembe by'akabi ebigirimu. Obwo esiisikaire." 
Leviticus14:45 Asheenye egyo nju, amabaare gaayo n'ebiti byayo n'obuhome bwayo bwona; abiihe omu rurembo abitware abinagye omuri kasasiro." 
Leviticus14:46 Haza oritaaha omuri egyo nju ekikingire, aryaba otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus14:47 Kandi oribyama omuri egyo nju ayozye ebijwaro bye, n'origiriiramu nawe ayozye ebijwaro bye." 
Leviticus14:48 Kwonka omuhongyerezi ku ariija, yaayetegyereza, yaashanga endwara etabugire enju, baaherize kugisiigiriza, obwo arangye ku egyo nju etasiisikaire, ahabw'okuba endwara ekizire." 
Leviticus14:49 Okushemeza egyo nju, atware enyonyi ibiri n'ekiti kya kaarwenda n'akenda ka karari, n'enyaweera," 
Leviticus14:50 aitire emwe ahari ezo nyonyi eruguru y'orwabya rw'eibumba orurimu amaizi g'omugyera," 
Leviticus14:51 kandi atware ekiti kya kaarwenda n'enyaweera n'akenda ka karari hamwe n'enyonyi ehuriire, abijabikye omu shagama y'enyonyi eyaitwa, n'omu maizi g'omugyera, agimiisiire egyo nju emirundi mushanju." 
Leviticus14:52 Mpaho egyo nju agyezese eshagama y'enyonyi n'amaizi g'omugyera, n'enyonyi ehuriire, n'ekiti kya kaarwenda n'enyaweera n'akenda ka karari." 
Leviticus14:53 Reero arekure egyo nyonyi erugye omu rurembo egyende. Akarabire atyo egyo nju, ebe eshemeire." 
Leviticus14:54 Eryo niryo iteeka ry'endwara yoona eyetwa ey'ebibembe; ey'ebiguuna," 
Leviticus14:55 ey'ebibembe by'omu bijwaro nari eby'omu nju; 
Leviticus14:56 n'ey'ebizimba n'ey'ebiseera nari ey'eibara," 
Leviticus14:57 kworeka ekintu ekisiisikaire nari ekitasiisikaire. Eryo niryo iteeka ry'ebibembe. 
Leviticus15:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa na Arooni ati: 
Leviticus15:2 Mugambire Abaisiraeli muti: Omushaija weena ku arigira ekihagaro ekyamuruga omu bushaija, ekyamurugamu ekyo n'ekitashemeire." 
Leviticus15:3 Mbwenu eri n'eiteeka ry'okuhagara kwe ahabw'ekyamurugamu, yaaba omubiri gwe gw'obushaija gwine ekirikurugamu nari gwigaire, biri omuriwe harimu ekisiisikaire." 
Leviticus15:4 Ekitanda kyona ekiribyamwaho omuntu orugirwemu ekihagaro omu bushaija kiryaba ekihagaire; kandi n'ekintu kyona eki arishutamaho kiryaba kihagaire. 
Leviticus15:5 Na weena orikora aha kitanda kye ayozye ebijwaro bye, kandi nawe ayogye, haza agume ari ohagaire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus15:6 Weena orishutama aha kintu ekyashutamwaho omuntu orugirwemu ekihagaro omu bushaija, ayozye ebi yaaba ajwaire, kandi nawe ayogye, haza agume ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus15:7 Na weena orikora aha mubiri gw'orugirwemu ekihagaro omu bushaija, ayozye ebi yaaba ajwaire, kandi nawe ayogye, haza abe otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus15:8 Reero oine ekihagaro ekimurugiremu nikireetwa omu bushaija, ku aricwera omuntu oshemeire amacwante, ogwo muntu ayozye ebi yaaba ajwaire, kandi ayogye, agume ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus15:9 N'eitandiiko ryona eri omuntu oine ekihagaro ekimurugiremu arishutamaho, riryaba erihagaire." 
Leviticus15:10 Kandi orikora aha kintu eki yaashutamaho, aryaba otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo. Na weena oryekorera ekintu nk'ekyo ayozye ebi yaaba ajwaire, kandi ayogye, haza agume ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus15:11 Omuntu weena orikorwaho oine ekihagaro ekimurugire omu bushaija, atanaabire ngaro ze, ayozye ebijwaro bye, kandi ayogye; haza agume ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus15:12 N'orwabya rw'eibumba oru oine ekihagaro ekyamurugamu arikoraho, rwatwe; na kyona ekibaizirwe omu kiti kimunyunguzibwe." 
Leviticus15:13 Reero oine ekihagaro ekimurugire omu bushaija ku arishemezibwa, ayebarire ebiro mushanju aherize kushemezibwa, ayozye ebijwaro bye, kandi ayogye omubiri gwe gwona omu maizi g'omugyera, abone kushemera." 
Leviticus15:14 Aha kiro kya munaana atware amaiba abiri nari enkombe nto ibiri, aije omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, abihe omuhongyerezi." 
Leviticus15:15 Ogwo muhongyerezi abihongye, kimwe kibe empongano y'ekibi, n'ekindi kibe ekitambo ky'okucwetsya. Mpaho amukarabire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho ahabw'ekihagaro ekimurugiremu." 
Leviticus15:16 Omushaija ku arirugwamu amaizi agazaara, ayogye omubiri gwe gwona, kandi agume ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus15:17 Ekijwaro kyona, nari oruhu, ekirihikwaho ago maizi gazaara, kyogibwe omu maizi, kandi kigume kitashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus15:18 Omushaija ku aribyama n'omukazi, yaarugwamu ago maizi gazaara, bombi boogye kandi bagume bari abatashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus15:19 Omukazi ku arirugwamu eshagama eshangwa eruga omu mubiri gwe buri kwezi, aryaba otashemeire okumara ebiro mushanju. Kandi weena orimukoraho, aryaguma ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus15:20 Kyona eki aribyamaho nari kyona eki arishutamaho akiri omu kwezi kiryaba ekihagaire. 
Leviticus15:21 Weena orikora aha kitanda kye ayozye ebijwaro bye kandi ayogye, haza agume ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus15:22 Weena orikora aha kintu ki ogwo mukazi ashutamaho, ayozye ebijwaro bye kandi ayogye, haza agume ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus15:23 Yaaba kitanda nari ekintu kyona eki ogwo mukazi ashutamaho, omushaija orikikoraho aryaba otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus15:24 Kandi omushaija weena oribyama n'ogwo mukazi ebirikuruga omuri ogwo mukazi byamuzaho, aryamara ebiro mushanju ari otashemeire. N'ekitanda ki ogwo mushaija aribyamaho, kiryaba ekihagaire." 
Leviticus15:25 Omukazi ku arimara ebiro bingi naajwa eshagama, butari bunaku bwe bw'okuzira, nari ku arigumizamu naajwa yaarenzya obunaku bu aziriramu, ebiro byona ebi arimara naajwa, aryaguma ari otashemeire. Abe otashemeire nk'oku aba omu biro bye eby'okuzira." 
Leviticus15:26 Ekitanda kyona eki aribyamaho ebiro byona ebi arimara naajwa, kiryaba nk'ekitanda ki abyamaho naazira. N'ekintu kyona eki ashutamaho kiryaba ekihagaire, nk'oku kihagara ari omu kwezi." 
Leviticus15:27 Haza weena orikora ahari ebyo bintu aryaba otashemeire; ayozye ebijwaro bye, kandi ayogye; haza agume ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Leviticus15:28 Kwonka ku arikira, ayebarire ebiro mushanju, haza ku birihwaho, abe oshemeire." 
Leviticus15:29 Aha kiro kya munaana atware amaiba abiri nari enkombe nto ibiri, abireetere omuhongyerezi aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Leviticus15:30 Omuhongyerezi ahongyeho kimwe, kibe empongano y'ekibi, kandi ekya kabiri kibe ekitambo ky'okucwetsya. Haza amukarabire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, ahabw'okurugwamu ebitashemeire." 
Leviticus15:31 Okwo nikwo muraatambire Abaisiraeli okuhagara, ngu batakaafa batashemeire ahabw'okuhagaza obutaaho bwangye oburi ahagati yaabo." 
Leviticus15:32 Eryo niryo iteeka ry'oine ekihagaro ekirugire omu bushaija bwe, nari orugirwemu amaizi agazaara, bikamuhindura otashemeire," 
Leviticus15:33 kandi n'ery'omukazi ori omu kwezi. Nikwo kugira ngu weena, omushaija nari omukazi, orikurugwamu ebitashemeire; kandi n'ery'omushaija owaabyama n'omukazi akiri otashemeire." 
Leviticus16:1 Batabani ba Arooni bombi ku baaherize kufa ahabw'okwoterera Nyakubaho n'omuriro ogurikuzira," 
Leviticus16:2 Nyakubaho yaagira Musa ati: Gambira Arooni mukuru waawe arekye kuguma naataaha buri kaanya omu Mwanya Ogurikwera ogw'omunda y'omukingo, omu maisho g'ekitebe ky'okusaasira ekiri aha shanduukye y'endagaano, atakaafa ahabw'okuba niinyija kubonekyera omu kicu aha kitebe ky'okusaasira." 
Leviticus16:3 Haza Arooni yaaba naataaha omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, aije ati: Aijane enimi y'ekimasha, ebe empongano y'ekibi, n'empaya y'entaama kuba ekitambo ky'okucwetsya." 
Leviticus16:4 Ajware ekanzu ye erikwera eya kitaani, n'empare ndaingwa ya kitaani, bibanze aha mubiri, reero ayezirikise omweko gwa kitaani, kandi ayeshembe omu mutwe ekikwemba kya kitaani. Ebyo nibyo bijwaro ebirikwera. Abanze ayogye, abone kubijwara." 
Leviticus16:5 Reero aihe omu Baisiraeli empaya ibiri z'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi, n'empaya emwe y'entaama kuba ekitambo ky'okucwetsya." 
Leviticus16:6 Mpaho Arooni ahongye egyo nimi kuba empongano ye ey'ekibi, ayekarabire, akarabire n'eka ye." 
Leviticus16:7 Bwanyima atware embuzi zombi, azite omu maisho gangye Nyakubaho aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu;" 
Leviticus16:8 kandi Arooni ateerere ezo mbuzi zombi enteenyu; enteenyu emwe ahabwangye Nyakubaho n'endi nteenyu ahabwa Azazeeli. 
Leviticus16:9 Arooni areete egyo mbuzi yaakwatwa enteenyu ahabwangye Nyakubaho, agihongye, ebe empongano y'ekibi." 
Leviticus16:10 Reero embuzi eyaakwatwa enteenyu ahabwa Azazeeli, agireete omu maisho gangye ehuriire kugikarabiriraho, ngu ebone kwoherezibwa omu ihamba owa Azazeeli." 
Leviticus16:11 Arooni areete egyo nimi, ebe empongano ye y'ekibi; ayekarabire n'eka ye; agiite ebe empongano ye y'ekibi." 
Leviticus16:12 Kandi areete ekyoterero kiijwire amakara garikwaka, agaaruga aha itambiro omu maisho gangye Nyakubaho, n'empi ibiri z'obubaani buseire bw'omugaju, abite omu nda y'omukingo." 
Leviticus16:13 Reero ate obubaani aha muriro omu maisho gangye, omwika gwabwo gucumbuukire ekitebe ky'okusaasira ekiri aha shanduukye y'endagaano, ngu atakaafa." 
Leviticus16:14 Mpaho akore aha shagama y'egyo nimi, agimiisiise orukumu rwe aha rubaju rw'ekitebe ky'okusaasira orw'omu maisho, kandi n'omu maisho gaakyo; amiisiire egyo shagama n'orukumu rwe emirundi mushanju." 
Leviticus16:15 Bwanyima aite embuzi y'empongano y'ekibi kuhongyerera abantu; areete eshagama yaayo omunda y'omukingo, agitwaze nk'oku yaagira ey'enimi, naagimiisiira aha kitebe ky'okusaasira n'omu maisho gaakyo." 
Leviticus16:16 Akarabire atyo Omwanya Ogurikwera ahabw'okutashemera kw'Abaisiraeli, ahabw'ebicumuro byabo n'ahabw'ebibi byabo byona. Kandi abe nikwo yaatwaza eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu eri batuura naryo basiisikaire." 
Leviticus16:17 Hatarigira owaaguma omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu Arooni yaaba naataaha omu Mwanya Ogurikwera kukaraba, okuhitsya obu arishohora yaaherize kwekarabira n'okukarabira eka ye n'eihanga ryona erya Isiraeli." 
Leviticus16:18 Bwanyima ashohore, aze aha itambiro ry'omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, naryo arikarabire, kandi akore aha shagama y'enimi n'aha y'embuzi agisiigye aha mahembe g'eitambiro okuryehinguririza." 
Leviticus16:19 N'endi shagama agirimiisiire n'orukumu rwe emirundi mushanju. Atyo arishemeze, aryeze, rirugweho ebihagaro by'Abaisiraeli." 
Leviticus16:20 Haza ku araaheze kukarabira Omwanya Ogurikwera, n'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, n'eitambiro, areete embuzi ehuriire:" 
Leviticus16:21 Arooni ate emikono ye yombi aha mutwe gwayo, agyaturireho eby'okutahikiirira kw'Abaisiraeli n'ebicumuro byabo, n'ebibi byabo; abite aha mutwe gw'egyo mbuzi, haza agyohereze omu ihamba neetwarwayo omuntu oyeteekateekire." 
Leviticus16:22 Egyo mbuzi eyekorere ebibi byabo byona, ebitware omu nsi etatuurwamu bantu, haza agirekure eze omu ihamba." 
Leviticus16:23 Bwanyima Arooni ataahe omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, ajuure ebijwaro bya kitaani ebi yaaba ajwaire naataaha omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, kandi abitsigyemu." 
Leviticus16:24 Reero ayogyere omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, mpaho ajware ebijwaro bye, abone kurugayo kutamba ekitambo kye ky'okucwetsya n'eky'okucwetsya eky'abantu, ayekarabire, nabo abakarabire." 
Leviticus16:25 Ebishaju by'empongano y'ekibi abyokyeze aha itambiro. 
Leviticus16:26 Kandi arekure egyo mbuzi, eze owa Azazeeli. Ayozye ebijwaro bye, kandi ayogye; na bwanyima abone kutaaha omu rusiisira." 
Leviticus16:27 Enimi y'empongano y'ekibi, n'embuzi y'empongano y'ekibi, ezi eshagama yaazo ereetsirwe kukarabirwa omu Mwanya Ogurikwera bazitware aheeru y'orusiisira; empu zaazo n'enyama yaazo n'efa yaazo babyotsye omu muriro." 
Leviticus16:28 Kandi owaabyotsya ayozye ebijwaro bye, ayogye, bwanyima abone kutaaha omu rusiisira." 
Leviticus16:29 Mbwenu imwe eri ribabeere eiteeka eryabateerwaho obutwire bwona: Omu kwezi kwa mushanju, aha kiro kya ikumi, kuguma nimwesiibyakwo mutarikukora murimo, nobu baakuba abantu enzaarwa nari abanyamahanga abatwire omuriimwe." 
Leviticus16:30 Manya ahari ekyo kiro nibwo murikarabirirwa kwezibwa, mukaihwaho ebibi byanyu byona, mukaba abashemeire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus16:31 Ekyo kiro kibabeere Sabato y'okuhuumuriraho kimwe, kandi mwesiibyekwo; n'ekiragiro ky'ebiro byona." 
Leviticus16:32 Reero omuhongyerezi osiigirwe amajuta akeemekwa kuhungurira ishe, niwe ariguma naakaraba, ajwaire ebijwaro ebirikwera ebya kitaana." 
Leviticus16:33 Aryakarabirira Omwanya Ogurikwera, akarabirire eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, n'eitambiro, kandi akarabirire abahongyerezi, n'abantu b'eihanga boona." 
Leviticus16:34 Mbwenu eryo imwe ribe eiteeka eribateereirweho ebiro byona: Abaisiraeli kuguma nibakarabirirwa rimwe omu mwaka ahabw'ebibi byabo byona. Atyo Musa yaakora nk'oku Mukama yaamuragiira. 
Leviticus17:1 Kandi Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus17:2 Gambira Arooni n'abatabani n'Abaisiraeli boona oti: Eki nikyo Nyakubaho aragiire: 
Leviticus17:3 Omuntu weena ow'omu Baisiraeli ku ariitira omu rusiisira enimi, nari omwana gw'entaama nainga embuzi, nari ku aribiitira aheeru y'orusiisira," 
Leviticus17:4 ataagireeta aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu kugitoijera Nyakubaho omu maisho g'obutaaho bwe; ogwo muntu aryagiibwaho orubanja rw'okusheesha eshagama; acuubwe omu bantu b'eihanga rye. 
Leviticus17:5 Ekyo n'ekiragiro ekirikumanyisa ngu Abaisiraeli ebitambo byabo ebi baraagume baitira omu ishwa, babireetere Nyakubaho, babikwatsize omuhongyerezi aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, babiite, bibe ebitambo by'okurya kumwe ebihongyeirwe Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus17:6 Haza omuhongyerezi amiisiire eitambiro rya Nyakubaho eshagama ari aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, kandi ayotsye ebishaju, bibe ekisooroora kirungi ky'okugwisa gye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus17:7 N'ahabw'ekyo batarigarukira kwitira ebitambo byabo emandwa ezi baahampukire nazo. 
Leviticus17:8 Kandi obagire oti: Omuntu weena ow'omu Baisiraeli, nari ow'omu banyamahanga obashuuhuukiiremu, orireeta ekitambo ky'okucwetsya nari ekindi kitambo," 
Leviticus17:9 ataakireeta ha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu kukitambira Nyakubaho, ogwo muntu aryacuubwa omu ihanga." 
Leviticus17:10 Omuntu weena ow'omu Baisiraeli, nari ow'omu banyamahanga obashuuhuukiiremu, ku arirya eshagama, ndyamuta omu kaso, mmucwe omu ihanga rye." 
Leviticus17:11 Manya amagara g'ekintu ekihuriire gaba omu shagama. Nikyo naagibaheereire ngu ebakarabire aha itambiro ahabw'okuba ebamu amagara. 
Leviticus17:12 Nikyo ngiriire Abaisiraeli nti: Hatarigira omuriimwe owaarya eshagama, nobu yaakuba omunyamahanga oshuuhuukiire omuriimwe." 
Leviticus17:13 Kandi omuntu w'omu Baisiraeli weena, nari ow'omu banyamahanga ababashuuhuukiiremu, oriba ahiigire akaita enyamaishwa nari enyonyi etarikuzira kuriibwa, ashukye eshagama yaayo ahansi, agishwekyeho eitaka." 
Leviticus17:14 Manya amagara g'ekihangirwe kyona gaba eshagama yaakyo; nikyo naagirira Abaisiraeli nti: Mutarirya eshagama y'ekihangirwe kyona, ahabw'okuba amagara g'ekihangirwe gaba omu shagama yaakyo. Weena origirya, aryacuubwa." 
Leviticus17:15 Kandi omuntu weena orirya ekyefeereire nari ekiitsirwe enyamaishwa, yaaba ari enzaarwa nari omushuuhuuki, ayozye ebijwaro bye, kandi ayogye; haza agume ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo. Obwo nibwo ariba oshemeire." 
Leviticus17:16 Kwonka ku ariba atabyogize kandi nawe akooga, obwo aryarwemarira." 
Leviticus18:1 Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus18:2 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu. 
Leviticus18:3 Mutarikora ebi Abanyamisiri bakora omu nsi yaabo ei mwabaire mutwiremu; kandi mutarikora ebi Abanyakanaani bakora omu nsi yaabo ei ndikubatwaramu. Mutarikuratira ebiragiro byabo. 
Leviticus18:4 Mugume mukuratire ebi naataireho, mworobere ebiragiro byangye mubigumizemu. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Leviticus18:5 N'ahabw'ekyo mugume mukuratire ebi naataireho, mworobere ebiragiro byangye, ahabw'okuba omuntu oribihitsya, biryamuhaisa amagara. Niinye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus18:6 Omuriimwe hatarigira owaahika ou aine nawe obuzaare bwa haihi. Niinye Nyakubaho. 
Leviticus18:7 Otarihemura sho, okabyama na nyoko ahabw'okuba ni nyoko; n'ahabw'ekyo otarimujweka busha." 
Leviticus18:8 Kandi otaribyama na muka sho ahabw'okuba nooba ojwekire sho busha. 
Leviticus18:9 Otaribyama na munyaanyako muhara wa sho, nari muhara wa nyoko; yaaba yaazaariirwe omuka nari ahandi." 
Leviticus18:10 Otaribyama na muhara wa mutabani waawe, nari muhara wa muhara waawe, ahabw'okuba enjuuro yaabo niyo emwe n'eyaawe." 
Leviticus18:11 Otaribyama na muhara wa muka sho, ou sho ayezaariire, ahabw'okuba ni munyaanyoko." 
Leviticus18:12 Otaribyama na shwenkazi, ahabw'okuba n'omukazi oine obuzaare bwa haihi na sho." 
Leviticus18:13 Otaribyama na nyokwento, ahabw'okuba n'omukazi oine obuzaare bwa haihi na nyoko." 
Leviticus18:14 Otarijweka busha shwento kwirira haihi omukazi we, ahabw'okuba ni shwenkazi." 
Leviticus18:15 Otaribyama na mukaamwana waawe; ni muka mutabani waawe: otarimujweka busha. 
Leviticus18:16 Otaribyama na muka mwene sho, ahabw'okuba niwe mwene sho ajuurira." 
Leviticus18:17 Otaribyama n'omukazi, okataho omuhara, nobu kwakuba okutwara muhara wa mutabani we, nari muhara we muhara we, ku babyama naiwe ahabw'okuba abo n'abakazi abaine obuzaare bwa haihi naiwe. Ekyo n'ekirikuzira." 
Leviticus18:18 Kandi otarishwera omukazi kumuharikisa mukuru we, okabyama na mukuru we akiriho." 
Leviticus18:19 Otarihika omukazi kubyama nawe akiri omu kwezi atakashemeire. 
Leviticus18:20 Kandi otaribyama na muka mutaahi waawe, okeefaakaza hamwe nawe." 
Leviticus18:21 Otarihayo n'omwe omu baana baawe kumutambira Moleki noomurabya omu muriro, okajumisa eiziina rya Ruhanga waawe. Niinye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus18:22 Otaribyama n'omushaija nk'omukazi. Ekyo n'ekihagaro. 
Leviticus18:23 Kandi otaribyama n'enyamaishwa yoona, okeehagaza. N'omukazi weena ataribyama n'enyamaishwa. Ekyo n'okukora ekitari ky'obuhangwa." 
Leviticus18:24 Mutaryehagazisa ebyo bintu, ahabw'okuba ebyo byona amahanga agu ndikubinga kubahigiza nibyo gaayesiisiise," 
Leviticus18:25 n'egyo nsi ekasiisikara, naanye nikwo kugifubira ahabw'ebibi byayo, ekatanaka abagitwiremu." 
Leviticus18:26 Kwonka imwe mugume mukuratire ebi naataireho, mworobere ebiragiro byangye, kandi hatarigira omuriimwe, yaaba muzaarwa nari omunyaihanga obashuuhuukiiremu, owaakora ekihagaro na kimwe omuri ebyo."
