Leviticus18:27 Manya ebyo bihagaro byona nibyo abantu b'omuri egyo nsi abaababandiize baakozire, egyo nsi ekasiisikara." 
Leviticus18:28 Naimwe ku mwakugishiisha ekaabatanaka nk'oku yaatanakire ab'eihanga eryababandiize. 
Leviticus18:29 Manya omuntu weena orikora kimwe ahari ebyo bihagaro, n'abantu boona ababikora baryacuubwa omu ihanga ryabo." 
Leviticus18:30 N'ahabw'ekyo mukuratire ebi naabaragiira. Mutarigira omucwe na gumwe ogw'omuri egyo erikunugwa ei abaababandiize baagizire, kandi mutarigyesiisisa. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Leviticus19:1 Kandi Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus19:2 Gambira eihanga ryona ery'Abaisiraeli oti: Mube abarikwera, ahabw'okuba Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga waanyu mba Orikwera." 
Leviticus19:3 Weena omuriimwe agume atiine ishe na nyina, kandi mugume murinde Sabato zangye. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Leviticus19:4 Mutarintsigaho mukaramya ebishushani nari okweheeshera baaruhanga. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu. 
Leviticus19:5 Ku muritambira Nyakubaho ebitambo by'okurya kumwe, mubitambe omu buryo buhikire, bibone kwikirizibwa;" 
Leviticus19:6 haza ekyo kitambo kigume kiriibwe aha izooba eri mwakihongyeraho n'eriraakurateho. Ekiritsigaraho okuhitsya aha izooba rya kashatu kyokibwe omu muriro. 
Leviticus19:7 Ku harigira ekyariibwa aha izooba rya kashatu kiryaba nikizira kitarikwikirizibwa. 
Leviticus19:8 Omuntu weena orikiryaho aryagiibwaho orubanja, ahabw'okuba ahagaize ekintu kya Nyakubaho ekirikwera kandi acuubwe omu bantu b'eihanga rye." 
Leviticus19:9 Ku murigyesha emisiri yaanyu, mutarigigyesha mukahikira kimwe aha mbibi, nobu kwakuba okuhumba ebitsigairemu mwaherize kugyesha." 
Leviticus19:10 Mutarishoroma emizaabibu yaanyu mukagikunduura, nobu kwakuba okutorotoora eragarikire; mugitsigire abooro n'abashuuhuuki. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Leviticus19:11 Mutariiba, nobu kwakuba okuryaryana nari okubeihana;" 
Leviticus19:12 kandi mutarirahirira busha eiziina ryangye, mukahemura eiziina rya Ruhanga waanyu. Niinye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus19:13 Otaryagisiriza mutaahi waawe nari okumusikura ebye. Otariraara n'ebihembo by'omukozi waawe okuhitsya omu kasheeshe. 
Leviticus19:14 Otarikyeena ekifamatu, nari okutega empumi eky'okumuteeza entsibo, kureka ogume otiine Ruhanga waawe. Niinye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus19:15 Otarikora ebitari by'obwinganisa noocwa emanja, yaaba okugwera orubaju rw'omworo nari okutiina omutungi, kureka ogume ocwere mutaahi waawe orubanja rw'oburyo." 
Leviticus19:16 Otaribuzya orukuru omu bantu noogambuura, kandi otariba mushinja w'ebishuba kwitisa mutaahi waawe. Niinye Mukama." 
Leviticus19:17 Otarigirira mwene sho enziika, kureka oshoboororane nawe butunu eki murikufa, naiwe atakaakureetera orubanja." 
Leviticus19:18 Otarihoora enzigu ab'eihanga ryawe, nobu kwakuba okubagirira enobi, kureka ogume okunde mutaahi waawe nk'oku oyekunda. Niinye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus19:19 Mugume mukuratire ebiragiro bi naataireho. Mutarireka enyamaishwa zaanyu kwemibwa ezitari z'oruganda rwazo, kandi mutaribiba omu musiri gwanyu embibo z'emiringo ebiri, nobu kwakuba okujwara ekijwaro kibaziirwe omu myenda y'emiringo ebiri." 
Leviticus19:20 Omushaija ku aribyama n'omuzaana orikugambwa ondi mushaija obugyenyi, kwonka atakacungwirwe nari okurekurwa, ebyabo bibuuririzibwe. Kwonka atariitwa, ahabw'okuba omuzaana abaire atakarekwirwe;" 
Leviticus19:21 kureka ahongyere Nyakubaho empongano y'okwihwaho orubanja. 
Leviticus19:22 Omuhongyerezi amukarabire n'empaya y'entaama omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, ebe empongano y'okwihwaho orubanja ahabw'ekibi ki akozire, ekyo kibi kye akisaasirwe." 
Leviticus19:23 Ku murihika omuri egyo nsi, mwabyara emiti y'ebyokurya ey'emiringo yoona, ebi eryana mubitwaze nk'ebirikuzira, bimare emyaka eshatu mutarikubiikirizibwa kandi bitaririibwa." 
Leviticus19:24 Reero omu mwaka gwa kana ebijuma byayo byona biryaba ebirikwera, bibe omutoijo gw'okusiima Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus19:25 Haza omu mwaka gwa kataano nimwikirizibwa kurya aha bijuma byayo, egyo miti ebone kwongyera kubaanira ebijuma. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Leviticus19:26 Mutarirya enyama n'eshagama yaayo. Mutariragura nari okuroga. 
Leviticus19:27 Mutaritega enkimba nainga okumwererera ebireju byanyu. 
Leviticus19:28 Mutaryesharashara omubiri nimucurira abafu, nobu kwakuba okucwa engondo. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Leviticus19:29 Otarihemura muhara waawe, okamuhindura maraaya, ensi etakaayohokyera omu bwamaraaya ekaijurirana ebibi." 
Leviticus19:30 Mugume murinde Sabato zangye, muhe Omwanya gwangye Ogurikwera ekitiinwa. Niinye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus19:31 Mutariza aha bafumu b'abazimu n'aha barogo kubaraguzaho, batakaabashiisha. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Leviticus19:32 Mugume mwimukire ab'enju, muhe ekitiinwa abakuru, kandi mutiine Ruhanga waanyu. Niinye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus19:33 Mutarikora kubi omunyaihanga oshuuhuukiire omu nsi yaanyu. 
Leviticus19:34 Ogwo munyaihanga obashuuhuukiiremu mumutwaze nk'enzaarwa, kandi mumukunde nk'oku mwekunda. Manya naimwe mukaba muri abanyamahanga omu nsi ya Misiri. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Leviticus19:35 Mutarishobya nimucwa emanja z'okugyera oburaingwa, oburemeezi nari obwingi." 
Leviticus19:36 Mugume mugire minzaani ezihikire, n'ebigyero by'oburemeezi ebihikire, n'endengo ezihikire, n'encuro ezihikire. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu owaabaihire omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Leviticus19:37 Haza mugume mukuratire ebi naataireho n'ebi naaragiire kandi mubihitsye. Niinye Nyakubaho. 
Leviticus20:1 Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus20:2 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Omuntu weena ow'omu Baisiraeli nari ow'omu banyamahanga abaashuuhuukiire omu Baisiraeli, orihongyera Moleki omwe omu baana be, aitwe; abantu b'omuri egyo nsi bamuteere amabaare." 
Leviticus20:3 Nyowe ogwo muntu ndyamuta omu kaso mmucwe omu bantu b'eihanga rye: ahabw'okwiha omwana omu baana be, akamuhongyera Moleki, akahagaza Omwanya gwangye Ogurikwera, kandi akajumisa eiziina ryangye eririkwera." 
Leviticus20:4 Haza abantu b'omuri egyo nsi ku baryehuzya ogwo muntu owaahongyera Moleki omwana we, bataamwita," 
Leviticus20:5 nyowe ndyamuta omu kaso n'ab'eka ye, mbacwe omu b'eihanga ryabo, we na boona abarikumukuratira kuhampuka na Moleki." 
Leviticus20:6 Omuntu ku ariza omu bafumu n'abarogi kuhampuka nabo, ndyamuta omu kaso mmucwe omu bantu b'eihanga rye." 
Leviticus20:7 Mbwenu nu mweyeze, mube abarikwera, ahabw'okuba ndi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Leviticus20:8 Murinde ebi naatairebo, haza mubikore. Niinye Nyakubaho obeeza." 
Leviticus20:9 Manya weena orikyeena ishe nari nyina aitwe, ahabw'okuba owaakyeena ishe nari nyinya niwe aba ari ow'okwitwa." 
Leviticus20:10 Omuntu ku arishambana na muka mutaahi we, bombi kishambanisa na kishambanisibwa baitwe." 
Leviticus20:11 Oribyama na muka ishe, biri ajwekire ishe busha, bombi baitwe; eshagama yaabo ebatukurire." 
Leviticus20:12 Omushaija oribyama n'omukaamwana, bombi baitwe, ahabw'okuba nibaba bakozire ekirikuzira, eshagama yaabo ebatukurire." 
Leviticus20:13 Omushaija ku aribyama n'omushaija nk'omukazi, bombi baryaba bakozire ekitakorwa, baitwe; eshagama yaabo ebatukurire." 
Leviticus20:14 Omushaija ku arishwera omukazi na nyina kiryaba kiri ekibi kirikuhemura. We nabo bookibwe omu muriro, harekye kubaho okukora ebihagaro omuriimwe." 
Leviticus20:15 Omushaija ku aribyama n'enyamaishwa, aitwe kandi n'egyo nyamaishwa mugiite." 
Leviticus20:16 Omukazi ku arihikaana n'enyamaishwa, yaabyama nayo, ogwo mukazi n'egyo nyamaishwa mubiite bife, eshagama yaabyo ebitukurire." 
Leviticus20:17 Omuntu ku arishwera munyaanya wa ishe nari wa nyina, baareebana enjuuro, n'ekihemu, bacuubwe omu baabo. Ahabw'okujweka munyaanya busha, kiryamutukurira." 
Leviticus20:18 Omushaija ku aribyama n'omukazi ori omu kwezi, yaamujweka busha, biri ayerwire ah'eshagama ye erikuruga; n'omukazi nawe naaba ayeyerwire, bombi bacuubwe omu baabo." 
Leviticus20:19 Otaribyama na nyokwento nari shwenkazi. Okukora ekintu nk'ekyo nikwo kujweka busha ow'obuzaare bw'ahaihi. Ekibi kyabo kiryabatukurira. 
Leviticus20:20 Omushaija ku aribyama na muka ishento, biri ajwekire ishento busha; ekibi kyabo kiryabatukurira, bafe bucwekye." 
Leviticus20:21 Omushaija ku arishwera muka mwene ishe, kiryaba ekihagaro, ahabw'okuba aryaba ajwekire mwene ishe busha. Baryafa bucwekye." 
Leviticus20:22 N'ahabw'ekyo mugume mukuratire byona ebi naataireho, na byona ebi naaragiire kandi mubikore, ensi ei ndikubatwara kutuuramu etakaabatanaka." 
Leviticus20:23 Kandi mutaritooreza emicwe y'eihanga eri naaza kubinga, ahabw'okuba ebyo byona nibyo naakozire, bikandeetera okubatamwa." 
Leviticus20:24 Kwonka imwe nkabagira nti: Muryahungura ensi yaabo, ngibahe ebe eyaanyu; ensi erikuhimintuka amate n'obwoki. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, owaabataaniise n'agandi mahanga." 
Leviticus20:25 N'ahabw'ekyo mumanye omutaano gw'enyamaishwa ezirikuzira n'ezitarikuzira; n'ogw'enyonyi ezirikuzira n'ezitarikuzira; haza murekye kwesiisisa enyamaishwa nari enyonyi, nainga ekintu ekirikugyendesa enda aha itaka, ebi naabashoroororoire kuguma nimubizira." 
Leviticus20:26 Mugume mube abarikwera, ahabw'okuba Nyowe Nyakubaho mba Orikwera, kandi nkabataanisa n'agandi mahanga, ngu mubone kuba abangye." 
Leviticus20:27 Omushaija nari omukazi oriba omufumu orikuragura abazimu, nari orikuroga, ateerwe amabaare afe, eshagama ye ebe niwe yaatukurira." 
Leviticus21:1 Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: Gambira abahongyerezi batabani ba Arooni oti: Hatarigira omuriimwe owaayehagaza ahabw'okuhika omuntu w'oruganda rwabo ofiire; 
Leviticus21:2 kureka yaaba ari ow'obuzaare bwe bwa haihi, nka ishe nari nyina, nari omutabani, nari omuhara, nari mwene ishe," 
Leviticus21:3 nari munyaanya okishugaine, ow'obuzaare bwa haihi. Ahabw'ogwo naikirizibwa kukora ekirikuzira." 
Leviticus21:4 Ku ariba ari nyineeka, ataryeshiisha ahabw'abantu b'eka ye akeegayisa." 
Leviticus21:5 Bataryemwa eishokye omu kazingiro, nari okumwererera ebireju, nobu kwakuba okwecwa engondo." 
Leviticus21:6 Babe abarikwera ahari Ruhanga waabo, batari b'okujumisa eiziina rye. Manya nibo bahongyera Nyakubaho ebitambo bicwekize, ebyokurya bya Ruhanga waabo. Nikyo bashemerereire kubeera abarikwera." 
Leviticus21:7 Batarishwera maraaya nari omwishiki otashugaine, nainga okushwera omukazi oshenzirwe, ahabw'okuba omuhongyerezi aba orikwera ahari Ruhanga." 
Leviticus21:8 Omweze ahabw'okuba niwe atoijera Ruhanga waawe ebyokurya. Agume ari orikwera ahariimwe, ahabw'okuba Nyowe Nyakubaho obeeza imwe, mba Orikwera." 
Leviticus21:9 Kandi muhara w'omuhongyerezi weena oryeshiisha naaraaya akajumisa ishe, ayokibwe omu muriro." 
Leviticus21:10 Omuhongyerezi ori mukuru omuri beene ishe, owaashukirwe amajuta aha mutwe, akeezibwa kujwara ebyo bijwaro, atarizingurura eishokye rye rikarengyeera, nobu kwakuba okutaagura ebi ajwaire." 
Leviticus21:11 Ataritaaha ah'omutumbi guri akeehagaza, nobu gwakuba guri ogwa ishe nari ogwa nyina;" 
Leviticus21:12 kandi atarishohora akaruga omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, nari okuhagaza obutaaho bwa Ruhanga, ahabw'okuba okwezibwa oku yaayeziibwe naashukwaho amajuta ga Ruhanga we, kumuriho. Niinye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus21:13 Aryashwera omwishiki oshugaine. 
Leviticus21:14 Omufaakazi nari oshenzirwe, nainga omukazi owaagiirweho omushaija, nari maraaya, abo ataribashwera; kureka ashwere omwishiki oshugaine ow'omu baabo;" 
Leviticus21:15 atakaajumisa abaana be omu bantu b'eihanga rye, ahabw'okuba niinye Nyakubaho omweza." 
Leviticus21:16 Kandi Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus21:17 Gambira Arooni oti: Omuri baijukuru baawe ab'enzaaro zoona hatarigira oine akamogo owairira haihi kutoijera Ruhanga ebyokurya. 
Leviticus21:18 Hatarigira oine akamogo owairira haihi, yaaba ari omushaija empumi nari omurema nainga okookoire aha maisho nari ekimuga;" 
Leviticus21:19 oine ekigyere nari omukono guhendekire; 
Leviticus21:20 ow'eibango nari ori akanengyere; ow'eshongo nari orwaire obuhere nari ebiguuna, nainga oyatikire amagosi." 
Leviticus21:21 Hatarigira omushaija w'omu baijukuru ba Arooni omuhongyerezi oine akamogo oriikirizibwa kwirira haihi kutoija empongano za Nyakubaho ezookiibwe. Ahabw'okugira akamogo tariikirizibwa kwirira haihi kutoija ebyokurya bya Ruhanga we. 
Leviticus21:22 Naikirizibwa kurya ebyokurya ebihongyeirwe Ruhanga we, eby'ekitambo ekirikwera n'eby'ekirikwerera kimwe." 
Leviticus21:23 Kwonka atarihika haihi omukingo, nari okwiririra eitambiro, ahabw'okugira akamogo atakaahagaza emyanya yangye erikwera. Manya Niinye Nyakubaho obeeza." 
Leviticus21:24 Musa atyo abigambira Arooni n'abatabani n'Abaisiraeli boona. 
Leviticus22:1 Kandi Nyakubaho akagira Musa, ati:" 
Leviticus22:2 Gambira Arooni n'abatabani bagume beetantare ebintu ebyeziibwe eby'abantu ba Isiraeli bampongyeire, batakaajumisa eiziina ryangye eririkwera. Niinye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus22:3 Bagambire oti: Ku harigira omuntu ow'omu baijukuru baanyu, omu nzaaro zaanyu zoona oriba ohagaire akairirira ebintu byeziibwe ebi Abaisiraeli bahongyera Nyakubaho, ogwo muntu tindimucwa maisho bundi." 
Leviticus22:4 Hatarigira ow'omu ruganda rwa Arooni oriba abembire nari arwaire emiteezi, owaikirizibwa kurya aha bintu byeziibwe atakabaire oshemeire. Weena orikora aha kintu kyona ekirikuzira, ahabw'okuhikaana n'omutumbi nari omushaija orugirwemu amanyaari;" 
Leviticus22:5 na weena orikora aha kintu kirikugyendesa enda, ekyakumureetera kuba otashemeire, nari omuntu ou yaihaho okutashemera kw'omuringo gwona," 
Leviticus22:6 omuntu owaakora aha kintu nk'ekyo, aryaba otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo, kandi atarirya aha bintu ebyeziibwe atabandize kwoga." 
Leviticus22:7 Eizooba ku ririrenga aryaba oshemeire, reero abone kwikirizibwa kurya aha byeziibwe, ahabw'okuba ebyo nibyo byokurya bye." 
Leviticus22:8 Atarirya ekyefeereire nari ekitaanyaguziibwe enyamaishwa akakyehagazisa. Niinye Nyakubaho. 
Leviticus22:9 N'ahabw'ekyo bagume bakuratire ebi naabaragiire, bitakaabarugiramu ekibi kikabaita ahabw'okushiisha ebyo biragiro. Niinye Nyakubaho obeeza." 
Leviticus22:10 Hatarigira otari w'omu bahongyerezi owaarya aha kintu kyeziibwe. Omuntu oshuuhuukiire aha muhongyerezi, nari omupakasi we, atarirya aha kintu kyeziibwe." 
Leviticus22:11 Kwonka omuhongyerezi ku arigura omuhuuku empiiha ze, yaaba owe, ogwo muhuuku naikirizibwa kubiryaho kandi n'abazaariirwe omu ka ye nibaikirizibwa kurya aha byokurya bye." 
Leviticus22:12 Muhara w'omuhongyerezi ku arishwerwa otari w'omu buhongyerezi, atarirya aha bintu ebirikwera ebihongirwe." 
Leviticus22:13 Kwonka muhara w'omuhongyerezi ku ariba ari omufaakazi nari oshenzirwe kandi ataine mwana, yaagaruka aha mahega ga ishe, nk'oku yaabaire akiri empangare, naikirizibwa kurya aha byokurya bya ishe; kwonka otari w'omu bahongyerezi ataribiryaho." 
Leviticus22:14 Omuntu ku arirya aha kintu kyeziibwe atakimanyire, ekyo kintu akirihe omuhongyerezi, kandi akyongyereho kimwe kya kataano ky'obuguzi bwakyo." 
Leviticus22:15 Abahongyerezi batarihagaza ebintu ebirikwera ebi Abaisiraeli bahongyeire Nyakubaho; 
Leviticus22:16 haza bakareetera abaabiryaho orubanja n'ekifubiro, ahabw'okuba niinye Mukama obyeza." 
Leviticus22:17 Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus22:18 Gambira Arooni n'abatabani n'Abaisiraeli boona oti: Ku harigira omuntu w'omu Baisiraeli nari ow'omu baabashuuhuukiiremu yaareeta omutoijo gwe, yaaba gw'okuhikiiriza eki yaasigire nari ogu ayekundiire, oguhongyerwa Nyakubaho kuba ekitambo ky'okucwetsya," 
Leviticus22:19 ogwo mutoijo kubona kwikirizibwa, mutoije enimi nari empaya y'entaama nainga ey'embuzi etaine kamogo." 
Leviticus22:20 Kwonka ekiine akamogo mutarikitoija, ahabw'okuba tindikiikiriza." 
Leviticus22:21 Kandi omuntu weena oritambira Nyakubaho ekitambo ky'emitoijo y'okurya kumwe, okuhikiiriza eki yaahigire nari eki atoizire ayekundiire, naakiiha omu masyo g'ente nari ag'entaama nainga ag'embuzi, kyaza kwikirizibwa kishemereire kuba ekishugaine ekitaine kamogo." 
Leviticus22:22 Enyamaishwa ehumire nari emugire, ebuzireho orugingo, ey'ebironda, ey'orukamba nari akanyamutinda, mutarigihongyera Nyakubaho; nobu kwakuba okuzimuhongyera nimuzookyeza aha itambiro." 
Leviticus22:23 Enimi, nari omwana gw'entaama, ebiine ebicweka birikukirakirana, nimwikirizibwa kubihonga kuba empongano y'okwekundira. Kwonka ku byakuba biri eby'okuhikiiriza eki mwahigire, obwo tibirikwikirizibwa." 
Leviticus22:24 Enyamaishwa yoona eine amagosi gahonokire, gaatikire, gataagukire nari gasharikire, mutarigitoijera Nyakubaho nari okugimutambira omu nsi yaanyu." 
Leviticus22:25 Mutaritoija enyamaishwa nk'ezo ezirugire omu banyamahanga kuba egabo ya Ruhanga waanyu. Ahabw'ezo nyamaishwa kugira akamogo n'okutashugaana, tiziriikirizibwa." 
Leviticus22:26 Kandi Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus22:27 Enimi nari entaama nainga embuzi ku erizaarwa, emare ebiro mushanju na nyinayo; reero okwiha aha kiro kya munaana eryaikirizibwa kuhongyerwa Nyakubaho eyokiibwe." 
Leviticus22:28 Nyinayo ku eriba eri ejigija nari ebuguma mutarigiita n'omwana gwayo aha izooba rimwe. 
Leviticus22:29 Kandi ku muritambira Nyakubaho ekitambo ky'okusiima, mukitambe omu buryo buhikire kibone kwikirizibwa." 
Leviticus22:30 Kiryaguma kiriibwe ahari eryo izooba; mutarigira eki mwatsigaho okuhitsya omu kasheeshe. Niinye Nyakubaho. 
Leviticus22:31 N'ahabw'ekyo mugume mukuratire ebiragiro byangye, kandi mubihitsye. Niinye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus22:32 Mutarijumisa eiziina ryangye eririkwera, kureka ngume mmanywe omu Baisiraeli boona ku ndi Orikwera." 
Leviticus22:33 Niinye Nyakubaho obeeza, owaabaihire omu nsi ya Misiri kuba Ruhanga waanyu. Niinye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus23:1 Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus23:2 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Aga nigo magyenyi agu Nyowe Nyakubaho ntaireho agu murirangirira kuba ebiteerane ebirikwera. 
Leviticus23:3 Emirimo egume ekorerwe omu biro mukaaga, kwonka ekiro kya mushanju kibe Sabato ey'okuhuumuriraho kimwe, ey'okuteerana okurikwera. Mutarikoreraho omurimo gwona; ni Sabato ya Nyakubaho, hoona ahi muriba mutwire." 
Leviticus23:4 Aga nigo magyenyi g'ebiteerane ebirikwera agu Nyowe Nyakubaho ntaireho, agu muraarangirire omu bunaku bwago obwatairweho." 
Leviticus23:5 Omu kwezi kw'okubanza, aha kiro kya ikumi na bina eky'okwo kwezi omu mwabazyo, nikwo kuhinguraho kwa Mukama." 
Leviticus23:6 Kandi aha kiro kya ikumi na bitaano eky'okwo kwezi, n'Obugyenyi bwa Nyakubaho obw'Emigaati Etatumbisiibwe. Mumare ebiro mushanju nimurya emigaati etatumbisiibwe." 
Leviticus23:7 Aha kiro ky'okubanza mugire ekiteerane ekirikwera, kandi mutarikoreraho omurimo gwona ogurikurusya." 
Leviticus23:8 Kureka muryaguma mureetere Nyakubaho ebitambo ebyokiibwe okumara ebiro mushanju. Reero ekiro kya mushanju kibe eky'okuteerana okurikwera; mutarikikoreraho omurimo gurikurusya. 
Leviticus23:9 Nyakubaho akagira Musa, ati:" 
Leviticus23:10 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Ku murihika omu nsi ei ndikubaha, mwashaaruura ebi mugyesire, mureetere omuhongyerezi emiba y'emiganuro y'ebi mwerize; agizongazongyeze omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, mubone kwikirizibwa." 
Leviticus23:11 Ogwo muhongyerezi agizongazonzye omu kasheeshe karikurata Sabato. 
Leviticus23:12 Aha izooba ri murizongazongyezaho egyo miba, mureete empaya nto y'entaama y'omwaka gumwe etaine kamogo, ebe ekitambo ky'okucwetsya ekitambiirwe Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus23:13 Omutoijo gw'esaano ogw'okutoijwa hamwe n'egyo ntaama gugume gube bibiri bya ikumi by'encuro y'esaano y'obunono, ejwangiibwemu amajuta g'omuoliva; etoijerwe Nyakubaho eyokiibwe kuba ekisooroora kirikugwisa gye. Omutoijo gw'ebyokunywa ogw'okutoijwa nayo gugume gube viino ya kimwe kya kana ky'akacupa." 
Leviticus23:14 Haza mutarirya omugaati gwona ogw'enjuma zikarangire nari z'omweza mutakaganuriire Ruhanga waanyu. Ekyo n'ekiragiro ky'ebiro byona omu busingye bwanyu bwona, hoona ahi muriba mutwire." 
Leviticus23:15 Kandi mubare ebiro, okwiha aha izooba eririkurata Sabato, eri muriba mureeteireho omuba gw'omutoijo gw'okuzongazonzya, bibe wiiki mushanju eziijwire." 
Leviticus23:16 Obwo nimubara ebiro makumi ataano, okuhitsya aha izooba eririkurata Sabato eya mushanju mubone kutoijera Nyakubaho esaano y'omuganuro." 
Leviticus23:17 Mwihe omu maka gaanyu emigaati ebiri y'okuzongazonzya, y'ebicweka bibiri bya ikumi by'encuro, kandi ebe ey'esaano y'obunono, eteekwe erimu ekitumbisa, kuba ey'okuganurira Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus23:18 Egyo migaati mugireetereho abaana b'entaama mushanju abahikize omwaka gumwe, kandi abataine kamogo hamwe n'enimi nto n'empaya ibiri z'entaama; bibe ekitambo kya Nyakubaho ekicwekize. Hamwe n'omutoijo gw'esaano, n'omutoijo gwabyo gw'ebyokunywa; bibe ekitambo ky'okwotsya kurugwamu ekisooroora ky'okugwisa gye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus23:19 Kandi muheyo empaya emwe y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi; n'empaya nto ibiri z'entaama zihikize omwaka gumwe zibe ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe. 
Leviticus23:20 Mpaho omuhongyerezi abizongazonzye hamwe n'emigaati y'omuganuro bibe ebizongazongyeirwe Nyakubaho; hamwe n'abaana babiri b'entaama, bibe ebi beereize Nyakubaho kuba eby'omuhongyerezi." 
Leviticus23:21 Ahari eryo izooba murangirire ku mwine ekiteerane ekirikwera, kandi mutakora omurimo gwona ogurikurusya. Ekyo n'ekiragiro ky'obutwire bwona omu maka gaanyu goona n'omu busingye bwanyu bwona." 
Leviticus23:22 Haza ku muriba nimugyesha ebi mwerize omu nsi yaanyu, mutarigyesha emisiri yaanyu mukahikira kimwe aha rubibi, nobu kwakuba okuhumba ebitsigairemu. Ebyo mubitsigire abooro n'abanyamahanga. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Leviticus23:23 Mukama akagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus23:24 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Omu kwezi kwa mushanju, ekiro ky'okubanza eky'okwo kwezi mugume mukirinde kiri ekiro ky'okuhuumuriraho kimwe, kibe eky'okwijukiraho, ekirirangirirwa nibateera enzamba z'akasirikiriro, kandi eky'ekiteerane ekirikwera." 
Leviticus23:25 Mutarikikoreraho omurimo gurikurusya, kandi muryakireeteraho Nyakubaho ekitambo ky'okwokibwa." 
Leviticus23:26 Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus23:27 Ekiro kya ikumi eky'okwezi kwa mushanju kigume kibe eky'okukarabiraho. Kibabeere eizooba ry'okugiriraho ekiteerane ekirikwera; haza ahari eryo izooba muryaguma mwesiibyekwo, kandi mureetere Nyakubaho ekitambo ky'okwokibwa." 
Leviticus23:28 Ekyo kiro mutarikikoreraho omurimo gwona, ahabw'okuba n'ekiro ky'okukarabiraho, kubakarabirira omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Leviticus23:29 Weena oriba ateesiibizekwo ahari eryo izooba, aryacuubwa omu ihanga." 
Leviticus23:30 Kandi omuntu orikora omurimo gwona ahari ekyo kiro, ndyamuhwerekyereza mmwihe omu baabo." 
Leviticus23:31 Mutarikoreraho omurimo. Ekyo n'ekiragiro ky'obutwire bwona ekyabateerwaho kuba eky'obusingye bwona omu maka gaanyu goona; 
Leviticus23:32 kibabeere Sabato y'okuhuumuriraho kimwe kandi mwesiibyekwo. Aha kiro kya mwenda eky'okwo kwezi, ekirikutandika omu mwabazyo, muryaguma murinde Sabato yaanyu okwiha omu mwabazyo okuhitsya omu gundi oguraakurateho." 
Leviticus23:33 Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus23:34 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Aha kiro kya ikumi na bitaano eky'okwezi kwa mushanju, haryaguma habeho obugyenyi bwa Nyakubaho obw'Ensiisira, kandi bumare ebiro mushanju." 
Leviticus23:35 Aha kiro ky'okubanza habeho ekiteerane ekirikwera, kandi mutarikora omurimo gurikurusya." 
Leviticus23:36 Omuri ebyo biro mushanju muryaguma mureetere Nyakubaho ebitambo by'okwokibwa. Reero aha kiro kya munaana mugire ekiteerane ekirikwera, kandi mutoijere Nyakubaho ekitambo ky'okucwetsya. Ekyo n'ekiteerane kikuru, kandi mutarikora omurimo gurikurusya." 
Leviticus23:37 Ago nigo magyenyi ga Nyakubaho agatairweho agu muriguma nimurangirira kuba ag'okugiriraho ebiteerane ebirikwera, kumutoijereraho ebitambo by'okwokibwa n'eby'okucwetsya, n'eby'esaano n'ebindi bitambo hamwe n'ebyokunywa; buri kimwe aha izooba ryakyo;" 
Leviticus23:38 otabariiremu Sabato za Nyakubaho, n'emitoijo yaanyu, n'endiijo yoona ei mutoija muhigire, n'ei mutoija mwekundiire mukagiha Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus23:39 Aha kiro kya ikumi na bitaano eky'okwezi kwa mushanju, ku muriheza kushaaruura ebi mwerize omuri egyo nsi, mugire Obugyenyi bwa Nyakubaho obw'ebiro mushanju. Aha kiro ky'okubanza habeho okuhuumurira kimwe, n'aha kya munaana kubeho." 
Leviticus23:40 Haza aha kiro ky'okubanza mutware ebijuma by'emiti ebirungi, n'amataagi g'emikindo, n'ag'emiti eyumbize, n'obuti bw'aha nkungu z'omugyera. Mutyo mumare ebiro mushanju nimushemerererwa Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Leviticus23:41 Mugume murinde ekyo kiro kibe Obugyenyi bwa Nyakubaho obw'ebiro mushanju omu mwaka. Ekyo n'ekiragiro ky'obutwire bwona ekitairweho omu busingye bwanyu bwona. Mugume mukigire omu kwezi kwa mushanju. 
Leviticus23:42 Muraare omu nsiisira okumara ebiro mushanju. Enzaarwa z'omuri Isiraeli zoona ziraare omu nsiisira," 
Leviticus23:43 enzaaro zaanyu zibone kumanya ku Niinye naareeteire Abaisiraeli kuraara omu nsiisira obu naabaiha omu nsi ya Misiri. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu. 
Leviticus23:44 Okwo nikwo Musa yaarangiriire Abaisiraeli amagyenyi ga Nyakubaho agaatairweho. 
Leviticus24:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Leviticus24:2 Ragiira Abaisiraeli bakureetere amajuta marungi g'emioliva eshekwirwe g'okuta omu matabaaza, kuguma nigaaka obutoosha." 
Leviticus24:3 Arooni agume agareebererere enyima y'omukingo gw'eby'obuhamya omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, kuguma nigaakira omu maisho ga Nyakubaho obutoosha okwiha omu mwabazyo okuhitsya omu kasheeshe. Ekyo kibe ekiragiro ky'obutwire, ekibateereirweho omu nzaaro zaanyu zoona." 
Leviticus24:4 Obutoosha agume arinde gye ago matabaaza gatairwe aha kikondo kyago eky'ezaabu empuuhe omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. 
Leviticus24:5 Kandi mugire esaano y'obunono, mugiteekyemu emigaati ikumi n'ebiri, buri gumwe gw'ebicweka bibiri bya ikumi by'encuro y'esaano." 
Leviticus24:6 Mugite aha itambiro ry'ezaabu empuuhe omu mbu ibiri, buri rubu rurimu emigaati mukaaga;" 
Leviticus24:7 ahari buri rubu oteho obubaani burungi, bubone kutoijerwa hamwe n'emigaati, kuba egabo y'okwijutsya, eraagume neetoijerwa Nyakubaho eyokiibwe." 
Leviticus24:8 Buri kiro kya Sabato, Arooni agume agitebeekanise omu maisho ga Nyakubaho ahabw'Abaisiraeli kuhikiiriza endagaano yaabo ey'ebiro byona." 
Leviticus24:9 Kandi eryaguma ebe eya Arooni n'abatabani; bagiriire omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, ahabw'okuba n'egabo ye erikwerera kimwe, eihirwe aha mitoijo ya Nyakubaho eyokiibwe; n'omugabo gwe ogw'ebiro byona." 
Leviticus24:10 Mbwenu mutabani w'Omuisiraelikazi, ou yaabaire azairweho Omunyamisiri, akashohora yaaza omu Baisiraeli; ogwo mutsigazi yaatonganira omu rusiisira n'omushaija Omuisiraeli." 
Leviticus24:11 Haza mutabani w'Omuisiraelikazi ogwo yaarogota ahari Mukama, naagamba kubi aha iziina rye. Batyo baamureetera Musa. Nyina akaba naayetwa Shelomiti, muhara wa Diburi, ow'omu ruganda rwa Daani." 
Leviticus24:12 Baamuta ah'okumurindira okuhitsya obu Nyakubaho araabagambire eki arikwenda. 
Leviticus24:13 Nyakubaho nikwo kugambira Musa ati: 
Leviticus24:14 Ogwo orogotsire mumushohoze aheeru y'orusiisira, haza abamuhuriire bate emikono yaabo aha mutwe gwe; eihanga ryona rimuteere amabaare." 
Leviticus24:15 Kandi ogambire Abaisiraeli oti: Weena orikyeena Ruhanga we, ekibi kye kimutukurire." 
Leviticus24:16 Orirogota naagamba kubi aha iziina rya Nyakubaho, aitwe, eihanga ryona rimuteere amabaare. Nobu yaakuba ari omushuuhuuki nari enzaarwa ku arirogota atyo, bamwite." 
Leviticus24:17 Oriita omuntu, aitwe." 
Leviticus24:18 Oriita enyamaishwa y'ondi, agirihe; amagara gagwane n'amagara." 
Leviticus24:19 Omuntu oriremaza mutaahi we, kyona eki ariba akozire nawe akorwe atyo." 
Leviticus24:20 Okuhendeka kugwane n'okuhendeka; eriisho rigwane n'eriisho; n'eriino rigwane n'eriino; nk'oku yaamugize omuntu, nawe bamumuzye." 
Leviticus24:21 Oriita enyamaishwa y'ondi, agirihe, n'oriita omuntu nawe bamwite." 
Leviticus24:22 Omushuuhuuki n'enzaarwa mubagirire eiteeka rimwe; ahabw'okuba niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu. 
Leviticus24:23 Musa atyo agambira Abaisiraeli, nabo bashohoza aheeru y'orusiisira owaakyeenire, bamuteera amabaare, bamugwisaho. Abaisiraeli bakora nk'oku Mukama yaaragiire Musa." 
Leviticus25:1 Nyakubaho akagambirira Musa aha Rushozi Sinaayi ati: 
Leviticus25:2 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Ku murihika omu nsi ei ndikubaha, egyo nsi eryaguma egirire Nyakubaho Sabato." 
Leviticus25:3 Muryaguma mumare emyaka mukaaga nimuhinga emisiri yaanyu, nimusharira emizaabibu yaanyu, kandi nimushaaruura ebyeziremu." 
Leviticus25:4 Kwonka omwaka gwa mushanju gube Sabato ey'okuraariza kimwe emisiri, Sabato ya Nyakubaho. Mutarihinga emisiri yaanyu, nobu kwakuba okusharira emizaabibu." 
Leviticus25:5 Ebiryemeza mwashaarwire mutaribigyesha; kandi ebijuma by'emizaabibu yaanyu etashariire mutaribihumba. Ogwo gube omwaka gw'okuraariza kimwe egyo nsi. 
Leviticus25:6 Eki ensi eryeza omu mwaka gwa Sabato nikyo kiriba ebyokurya byanyu; imwe n'abahuuku baanyu n'abazaana baanyu, n'abapakasi baanyu, n'abashuuhuuki abatwire naimwe," 
Leviticus25:7 n'amatungo gaanyu, n'enyamaishwa z'omu nsi yaanyu. Byona ebi egyo nsi eryeza, nibyo biriba ebyokurya." 
Leviticus25:8 Kandi muryabara ewiiki mushanju z'emyaka; emyaka mushanju emirundi mushanju; ezo wiiki mushanju z'emyaka zibabeere emyaka makumi ana na mwenda. 
Leviticus25:9 Reero aha kiro kya ikumi ky'okwezi kwa mushanju muteere enzamba erikugamba munonga. Aha izooba ry'okukarabiraho mugiteere, ebugye omu nsi yaanyu yoona." 
Leviticus25:10 Mutyo mweze omwaka gwa makumi ataano, kandi murangirire abatwire omuri egyo nsi ku hariho okurekurwa omuri egyo nsi yoona. Ogwo mwaka gubabeere ogw'okushemererwa, ogu buri muntu omuriimwe arigarukiramu aha butaka bwe, akagaruka omu ka ye." 
Leviticus25:11 Ogwo mwaka gwa makumi ataano gubabeere ogw'okushemererwa. Mutariguhingiramu, nobu kwakuba okugugyesheramu ebyemerize, nari okuhumba ebijuma by'emizaabibu etashariire." 
Leviticus25:12 Manya ogwo n'omwaka gw'okushemererwa gubabeere ogurikwera, murye ebi gwerize omu misiri." 
Leviticus25:13 Omuri ogwo mwaka gw'okushemererwa, buri omwe omuriimwe agarukye aha butaka bwe." 
Leviticus25:14 Ku murigira eki mugurize mutaahi waanyu nari eki mumuguzireho, mutarigobezana." 
Leviticus25:15 Ku origira eki waagura ahari mutaahi waawe, mubariirire emyaka nimwiha aha gw'okushemererwa, kandi nawe akuguze naareebera aha myaka y'ebishaaruurwa buri mwaka." 
Leviticus25:16 Emyaka ku eriba mingi, otunguure obuguzi, ku eriba mikye obutuubye; ahabw'okuba naaba naakuguza naareebera ahu ebi ashaarwire oku birikwingana." 
Leviticus25:17 Mutarigobezana; kureka mugume mutiine Ruhanga waanyu, ahabw'okuba niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Leviticus25:18 N'ahabw'ekyo mugume mukore ebi naataireho, mukuratire ebiragiro byangye, mubihitsye mubone kutuura buhooro omuri egyo nsi." 
Leviticus25:19 Egyo nsi eryayeza emyaka yaayo, naimwe murye mwigute kandi mugituuremu buhooro." 
Leviticus25:20 Ku murigira muti: Mbwenu turyatungwa ki omu mwaka gwa mushanju, twaba tutahingire nari tutashaarwire myaka yaitu?" 
Leviticus25:21 Nyowe niinyija kubooherereza omugisha gwangye gubagumeho omu mwaka gwa mukaaga, gubone kumara emyaka eshatu nigubeereza." 
Leviticus25:22 Ku muribiba omu mwaka gwa munaana, muryaba nimurya ebi mwayerize kare okuhitsya omu mwaka gwa mwenda, obu ebyagwo biryera mukarya ebi mwabaire muhunikire." 
Leviticus25:23 Mutaritundira kimwe eryo itaka, ahabw'okuba n'eryangye. Manya imwe muri abanyamahanga abanshuuhuukiireho." 
Leviticus25:24 N'ahabw'ekyo omuri egi nsi yoona ei mutungire, muryaguma mwikirize eitaka ryamwo ricungurwe." 
Leviticus25:25 Mwene sho ku ariba omworo, yaatunda ekicweka ky'eitaka rye, ow'obuzaare bwe obwa haihi aryaija acungure eryo itaka ri mwene ishe yaatunzire." 
Leviticus25:26 Ogwo muntu ku ariba ataine w'okuricungura, kandi we nyakabara yaatunga yaagira eby'okuricungura," 
Leviticus25:27 abariirire emyaka okwiha obu yaariguza, kandi aihure ou yaarigurize eby'emyaka ekitsigaireyo; abone kugaruka aha butaka bwe." 
Leviticus25:28 Kwonka we ku araabe ataine bintu by'okuryecungurira, eki yaatunzire kigume n'owaakiguzire okuhitsya omu mwaka gw'okushemererwa, reero omuri ogwo mwaka ori akirekure, n'onu abone kugaruka aha butaka bwe." 
Leviticus25:29 Omuntu ku ariguza enju y'okuraaramu ey'omu rurembo orwehinguririziibwe orugo, naikirizibwa kugicungura omwaka gutakahwaireho okwiha obu yaagiguza; ahabw'okuba omwaka gwona naaba aine obugabe bw'okugicungura." 
Leviticus25:30 Enju y'omu rurembo orwehinguririziibwe orugo ku eriba etacungwirwe omuri ogwo mwaka, biri yaabeera kimwe ey'owaagiguzire hamwe n'abaijukuru; terigarikanwa mu mwaka gw'okushemererwa." 
Leviticus25:31 Amaju g'omu byaro, agataine ngo zigeehinguririize, nigabarirwa omu bibanja by'omuri egyo nsi, nigaikirizibwa kucungurwa kandi nigabaasa kugarukanwa omu mwaka gw'okushemererwa." 
Leviticus25:32 Kwonka Abaleevi nibaikiririzibwa kimwe kucungura amaju g'aha butaka bwabo agari omu ndembo zaabo. 
Leviticus25:33 Kandi Omuleevi ku ariba atakoreise bushoboorozi bwe bw'okucungura, enju eyaatundiirwe omu rurembo rw'obutaka bwabo eryaba neikirizibwa kugarukanwa omu mwaka gw'okushemererwa. Manya amaju g'omu ndembo z'Abaleevi n'agaabo g'obutaka, agu baabagaine omu Baisiraeli." 
Leviticus25:34 Kwonka ebibanja by'aha itaka ery'abantu boona, ebikwatiraine n'endembo zaabo, bitariguzibwa, ahabw'okuba n'ebyabo by'obutaka bw'ebiro byona." 
Leviticus25:35 Mwene waanyu ku ariba omworo otarikwebaasa, atwire naimwe, mumutungye, atuure naimwe nk'omunyaihanga nari omushuuhuuki." 
Leviticus25:36 Mutarimushaba ekiteebwamu nari enteera, kureka mugume mutiine Ruhanga waanyu, mwene waanyu ogwo abone kutuura naimwe." 
Leviticus25:37 Otarimuguza empiiha ngu akwongyeremu ekiteebwamu, nainga okumuha ebyokurya ngu bwanyima akweshumbizeho." 
Leviticus25:38 Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, owaabaihire omu nsi ya Misiri kubaha ensi ya Kanaani kuguma ndi Ruhanga waanyu." 
Leviticus25:39 Kandi mwene waanyu otwire naiwe ku ariba omworo, yaakwetuurira ngu omutungye, otarimukoresa nk'omuhuuku." 
Leviticus25:40 Agume naiwe nk'omupakasi kandi nk'omushuuhuuki, akukorere okuhitsya omu mwaka gw'okushemererwa." 
Leviticus25:41 Bwanyima akurugyeho we n'abaana be, agarukye omu baabo aha butaka bwa baishenkuru." 
Leviticus25:42 Manya abo bantu n'abaheereza bangye abu naihire omu nsi ya Misiri: bataritundwa nk'abahuuku. 
Leviticus25:43 Otarimutegyekyesa eikama, kureka ogume otiine Ruhanga waawe." 
Leviticus25:44 Eby'abahuuku n'abazaana baanyu abu mwakutunga, nimwikirizibwa kubagura omu mahanga agabeehinguririize." 
Leviticus25:45 Kandi nimwikirizibwa kubagura omu banyamahanga ababashuuhuukiiremu, n'omu b'amaka g'abatwire naimwe abaazaariirwe omu nsi yaanyu; babe abaanyu ahabwanyu." 
Leviticus25:46 Haza nimubaasa kubaraga abaana baanyu abaribaza omu bigyere; babahungure, babe abaabo ebiro byona. Nimwikirizibwa kubagira abahuuku; kwonka beene waanyu Abaisiraeli mutaribaitsa omwaga." 
Leviticus25:47 Omunyaihanga nari omushuuhuuki otwire naimwe ku aritunga, haza mwene waanyu ohereraine nawe yaaba omworo, yaayehongyera ogwo munyaihanga nari omushuuhuuki otwire naimwe, nainga yaayetuurira ow'omu b'eka y'abanyamahanga," 
Leviticus25:48 ku ariba yaaherize kugurwa, naabaasa kucungurwa omwe omuri beene ishe," 
Leviticus25:49 nari ishento nainga omwana wa ishento, nari mwene waabo weena ow'obuzaare bwa haihi, nainga we ku yaakutunga naabaasa kwecungura." 
Leviticus25:50 Abariirire n'owaamuguzire okwiha omu mwaka gu yaamwehongyereiremu, okuhitsya omu gw'okushemererwa. Haza obuguzi bw'okurekurwa kwe bubariirirwe nibureeberwa aha mubaro gw'egyo myaka; n'obunaku bu yaamazire naakorera mukama we, ebihembo byabwo bingane n'eby'omupakasi." 
Leviticus25:51 Emyaka ku eriba ekitsigaireyo mingi, oku eriba eri nikwo arigaruraho empiiha z'okumucungura naazinganisa n'ezaamuguzire." 
Leviticus25:52 Kwonka ku hariba hakitsigaireyo emyaka mikye okuhika aha mwaka gw'okushemererwa, abariirire nawe emyaka ei amazire naamukorera, reero amugarurire empiiha z'okwecungura." 
Leviticus25:53 Agume nawe nk'omupakasi orikukorera ebihembo buri mwaka, kandi mutarimureka akamwitsa omwaga nimureeba." 
Leviticus25:54 Mbwenu ku ariba atacungwirwe omu buryo obwo, arekurwe omu mwaka gw'okushemererwa n'abaana be." 
Leviticus25:55 Manya ahariinye Abaisiraeli n'abairu bangye abu naihire omu nsi ya Misiri. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu. 
Leviticus26:1 Mutaryekorera ebishushani by'okuramibwa, nobu kwakuba okutaho ekishushani kisharwire nari enyomyo, kandi mutaryemereza omu nsi yaanyu eibaare ribaizirwemu ekishushani kukiramya, ahabw'okuba Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Leviticus26:2 Mugume murinde Sabato zangye, kandi muhe ekitiinwa omwanya gwangye Ogurikwera. Niinye Mukama." 
Leviticus26:3 Ku muriguma nimukuratira ebi naataireho, mwayorobera ebiragiro byangye, mwabihitsya," 
Leviticus26:4 naanye ndyaguma mbagwisize enjura omu bunaku bwayo, ensi egire omweru, n'emiti y'omu misiri eyane ebijuma;" 
Leviticus26:5 eihuura ryanyu rihitsye omu ishaaruura ry'emizaabibu, n'eishaaruura ry'emizaabibu rihitsye omu ibiba. Muryarya ebyokurya byanyu mwigute, haza mutuure buhooro omu nsi yaanyu." 
Leviticus26:6 Ndyabaha obusingye omuri egyo nsi, mugaramisirize habure owaabatiinisa; mugimaremu enyamaishwa mbi, na rurara erekye kuraba omu nsi yaanyu yoona," 
Leviticus26:7 mubingye abazigu baanyu, babagwe omu maisho mubaitsize rurara." 
Leviticus26:8 Bataano omuriimwe babingye igana, n'eigana ry'omuriimwe ribingye akakumi: abazigu baanyu babagwe omu maisho mubaitsize rurara." 
Leviticus26:9 Ndyabataho omutima, mbazaarukanise, mbakanyise, mpamye endagaano yangye naimwe." 
Leviticus26:10 Muryarya ebyokurya ebituura bihunikire; muhununure ebikuru bihigize ebisya. 
Leviticus26:11 Ndyata obutaaho bwangye omuriimwe, haza ndekye kubatamwa." 
Leviticus26:12 Ndyatuura naimwe mbe Ruhanga waanyu, naimwe mube abantu bangye." 
Leviticus26:13 Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu owaabaihire omu nsi ya Misiri ngu murekye kuba abahuuku; kandi niinye naabakirize emigamba eyaabaire ebainikire emigongo, nkabagyendesa murarikire emitwe." 
Leviticus26:14 Kwonka ku muryanga kumpurira mutaayorobera ebyo biragiro byona," 
Leviticus26:15 ku murigaya ebi naataireho, mwayeshaanya ebi naaragiire, mwayanga kukuratira ebiragiro byangye byona, kureka mwaita endagaano yangye," 
Leviticus26:16 naanye ndyabagira nti: Ndyabateeza ekitaraariire ebirikwitsa obwoba; omunywengyerero n'omushwija gurikugwisa eriisho omunda, muhururukye muhwe aha magufa. Ebi muribiba biryabafeera busha; ahabw'okuba abazigu baanyu baryabirya." 
Leviticus26:17 Ndyabata omu kaso, abazigu baanyu babasingure; abarikubanga babategyekye; muhungye hataine obabingire." 
Leviticus26:18 Hoona nabwo ku muryanga kumpurira, ndyagaruka mbafubire emirundi mushanju, mbature ebibi byanyu;" 
Leviticus26:19 haza mbacwe amaryo, mbamare eishaija; eiguru ryanyu ndihindure erikarangataine nk'ekyoma, n'ensi yaanyu ekarangatane nk'omuringa." 
Leviticus26:20 Muryahendekyera busha ahabw'ensi yaanyu kutabeereza, n'emiti y'omuri egyo nsi ebure kwana." 
Leviticus26:21 Reero ku murigumizamu mungomeire, mwayanga kumpurira, ndyabareetera ebindi bibonaboneso birikukiraho, ebirikweshumba ebibi byanyu emirundi mushanju." 
Leviticus26:22 Ndyabashunikira enyamaishwa enshaarizi zibashahure abaana, zicwekyereze amatungo gaanyu, naimwe zibatuubye mube bakye; emihanda yaanyu etsibe." 
Leviticus26:23 Ebyo bifubiro ku biriba bitabareeteire kungarukira, mwagumizamu mungomeire," 
Leviticus26:24 naanye ndyabahindukana, mbeeteerere emirundi mushanju nimbatura ebibi byanyu." 
Leviticus26:25 Ndyabareetera rurara ebahoore ahabw'okwita endagaano. Haza ku murihungira omu ndembo zaanyu, ndyabooherereza orufu, mbarekurire abazigu." 
Leviticus26:26 Ku ndihenda ekyehimbagirizo kyanyu, nibyo byokurya, abakazi ikumi baryabibateekyera omu nyungu emwe babireete babibarengyeire, murye, kwonka mubure kuhaaga." 
Leviticus26:27 Ebyo ku biriba bitabareeteire kumpurira, mwagumizamu mungomeire;" 
Leviticus26:28 naanye ndyabahindukana mbagirire ekiniga kingi, nyowe nyenka mbafubire emirundi mushanju nimbatura ebibi byanyu." 
Leviticus26:29 Muryarya batabani baanyu na bahara baanyu. 
Leviticus26:30 Amaramizo gaanyu agatunguukire ndyagacwekyereza, nsheenyagure amatambiro gaanyu agu mwotereraho obubaani, emitumbi yaanyu nginagye aha bishushani byanyu ebijunzire ebi muramya, haza mbatamirwe kimwe." 
Leviticus26:31 Endembo zaanyu ndyazihindura amatongo, n'emyanya yaanyu erikwera ngicwe emishaka, ndekye kukaga emigaju yaanyu mirungi." 
Leviticus26:32 Kandi ndyahindura ensi yaanyu eihamba, abazigu baanyu abariija kugituuramu bagitangaarire." 
Leviticus26:33 Ndyabataataanisiza omu mahanga, nsyoreyo rurara ngibakuratse, ensi yaanyu ebe amatongo, n'endembo zaanyu zibe emishaka." 
Leviticus26:34 Obwo egyo nsi, obunaku bu erimara eri amatongo, eryashemerererwa Sabato zaayo. Ku muriba mukiri omu nsi y'abazigu baanyu, egyo nsi eryahuumura, eshemerererwe Sabato zaayo." 
Leviticus26:35 Obunaku bu erimara eri amatongo eryahuumura, egire ekihuumuro ki etaratungiire mu Sabato zaanyu obu mwabaire mugitwiremu." 
Leviticus26:36 Reero abariba bahonokireho omuriimwe ndyabahahaariza omutima omu nsi z'abazigu baabo. Ku barihurira akababi karikuhuuhwa omuyaga, bahungye nk'oku omuntu ahunga rurara; bagwe bataine obabingire." 
Leviticus26:37 Baryatembekyerana, barengyeraneho nk'abarikuhunga rurara, haza hataine obabingire. Kandi muryabura agagungira abazigu baanyu." 
Leviticus26:38 Muryahwerekyerera omu mahanga, ensi y'abazigu baanyu ebamire." 
Leviticus26:39 Abariba bahonokireho omuriimwe baryahwerekyererera omu nsi z'abazigu baanyu ahabw'ebibi byabo; kandi ahabw'ebibi bya baishebo nabwo bahwerekyerere nkabo. 
Leviticus26:40 Kwonka ku baryatura ebibi byabo n'ebya baishebo ebi bancumwireho nibandeebya bakagumizamu bangomeire," 
Leviticus26:41 naanye kikandeetera kubahindukana n'okubazaahiza omu nsi y'abazigu baabo, mbwenu omutima gwabo ogugangaire ku gurihendeka, baayegarukamu," 
Leviticus26:42 nibwo ndiijuka endagaano yangye na Yakobo, nkaijuka n'ei naaragaine na Isaaka, n'ei naaragaine na Aburahamu, kandi nkaijuka egyo nsi." 
Leviticus26:43 Kwonka egyo nsi baryagitsigaho, eshemerererwe Sabato zaayo, obwo eri amatongo batagitwiremu. Kandi baryaba ab'okweteisa ebibi byabo, ahabw'okuba bakagaya ebiragiro byangye baatamwa ebi naataireho." 
Leviticus26:44 Ebyo byona nobu babikozire, ku bariba bari omu nsi y'abazigu baabo, nyowe tindigira bu mboogire, nobu kwakuba okubatamwa nkabacwekyerereza kimwe, nkaita endagaano yangye nabo; ahabw'okuba niinye Mukama Ruhanga waabo." 
Leviticus26:45 Kureka ahabw'abo ndyaguma nyijukye endagaano ei naakozire na baishenkurubo abu naihire omunsi ya Misiri ago mahanga nigakireeba, ngu mbone kuba Ruhanga waabo. Niinye Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus26:46 Ebyo nibyo byatairweho n'ebiragiro n'amateeka, ebi Nyakubaho yaataireho kuhamya akakwate ke n'Abaisiraeli aha Rushozi rwa Sinaayi naabatumaho Musa." 
Leviticus27:1 Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Leviticus27:2 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Omuntu ku arisiga ekisigo ky'omutaano kuhongyera Nyakubaho abantu, nk'okubariirira kwawe oku kuri," 
Leviticus27:3 obwo omushaija w'emyaka makumi abiri okuhitsya ahari makumi mukaaga y'obukuru omu kubariirira kwawe omucwere empiiha makumi ataano z'efeeza nooreebera aha rurengo rw'empiiha y'Omwanya Ogurikwera. 
Leviticus27:4 Ogwo muntu ku ariba ari omukazi omucwere empiiha makumi ashatu. 
Leviticus27:5 Omuntu ku ariba ari ow'emyaka etaano okuhitsya ahari makumi abiri y'obukuru, omushaija omucwere empiiha makumi abiri, omukazi ikumi." 
Leviticus27:6 Omuntu ku araabe ari ow'okwezi kumwe okuhitsya aha myaka etaano y'obukuru, ekicwero kyawe aha mushaija kibe empiiha itaano z'efeeza kandi omukazi kibe ishatu." 
Leviticus27:7 Reero omuntu ku ariba ahikize emyaka makumi mukaaga y'obukuru n'okukiraho, obwo ekicwero kyawe ky'omushaija kibe empiiha ikumi na itaano, kandi eky'omukazi kibe ikumi." 
Leviticus27:8 Mbwenu omuntu ku ariba ari omworo, otarikubaasa kwihura eki waamucwera, obwo areete ogwo muntu omu maisho g'omuhongyerezi, n'onu amutuubize ekicwero naareebera aha bwekoro bwe." 
Leviticus27:9 Ku eriba eri enyamaishwa nk'ezi abantu bahayo bazitoijeire Nyakubaho, kyona eky'omuringo ogwo, eki omuntu atoijera Nyakubaho, kiba ekirikwera." 
Leviticus27:10 Atarigira ekindi kyona eki yaataho omu mwanya gwayo, nari okugihingisa endi, enungi okugihinga embi, nari embi okugihinga enungi. Mbwenu enyamaishwa ku arigihinga endi, obwo zombi enu n'eri oku zaahingwa zibe ezirikwera." 
Leviticus27:11 Kandi ku eriba eri enyamaishwa erikuzira etatoijerwa Nyakubaho, obwo omuntu areete egyo nyamaishwa omu maisho g'omuhongyerezi;" 
Leviticus27:12 n'onu areebe, yaaba eri nungi nari mbi." 
Leviticus27:13 Reero kihiga ku araabe naayenda kugicungura, agyongyeremu kimwe kya kataano ky'obuguzi bwayo." 
Leviticus27:14 Omuntu ku arihonga enju ye kuba enjeru ya Nyakubaho, omuhongyerezi agibariirire nk'oburungi bwayo nari obubi bwayo oku buri. Kandi nk'oku omuhongyerezi araagibariirire nikwo obuguzi bwayo buraabe." 
Leviticus27:15 Reero kigihonga ku araabe naayenda kugicungura, agyongyeremu kimwe kya kataano ky'empiiha z'obuguzi bwayo, ebone kuba eye." 
Leviticus27:16 Omuntu ku arihongyera Nyakubaho ekicweka ky'eitaka rye eri yaahungwire, obuguzi bwakyo obubariirire nooreebera aha mbibo ezaakukibibwamu. Encuro y'embibo ya baale ebariirirwe kwingana n'empiiha makumi ataano z'efeeza." 
Leviticus27:17 Ku arihonga ekibanja kye omwaka gw'Okushemererwa gurugiremu juba, kicwerwe nk'oku waakibariirira." 
Leviticus27:18 Kwonka ku arihonga ekibanja kye omwaka gw'okushemererwa gwarugiremu, obwo omuhongyerezi abariirire empiiha z'obuguzi bwakyo naareebera aha myaka ekitsigaireyo kuhika aha gundi mwaka gw'okushemererwa; kandi bacwe aha buguzi bwakyo nk'oku oribariirira." 
Leviticus27:19 Owaahonga ekibanja ku ariba naayenda kukicungura, akyongyeremu kimwe kya kataano ky'empiiha zi kibaririirwe, kibone kuguma kiri ekye." 
Leviticus27:20 Kwonka ku ariba atarikwenda kukicungura, nari ku araabe yaakigurize ondiijo muntu, nikiba kitakicungurwa bundi." 
Leviticus27:21 Kureka ekyo kibanja, ku kirirekurwa omu mwaka gw'okushemererwa, kibe enjeru ya Nyakubaho emuhongyeirwe, haza kibe obutaka bw'omuhongyerezi." 
Leviticus27:22 Omuntu ku arihongyera Nyakubaho ekibanja ki yaaguzire ekitari kicweka ky'obutaka bwe obu yaahungwire," 
Leviticus27:23 omuhongyerezi abariirire obuguzi bwakyo okuhitsya aha mwaka gw'okushemererwa. Reero ogwo muntu ahe empiiha zi baakicwera eryo izooba, kibe enjeru ya Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus27:24 Omu mwaka gw'okushemererwa, ekyo kibanja kigarukanwe ou baakiguzireho, ou kyashangirwe kiri obutaka bwe bw'empungurano." 
Leviticus27:25 Buri buguzi bugyererwe aha mpiiha z'Omwanya Ogurikwera, obwo empiiha emwe erimu ebigabari makumi abiri." 
Leviticus27:26 Kwonka emijigaijo y'enyamaishwa eshangwa eba eya Nyakubaho. N'ahabw'ekyo hatarigira owaagihonga, yaaba y'ente nari y'entaama, ahabw'okuba n'eya Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus27:27 Mbwenu ku eriba eri ey'enyamaishwa erikuzira, obwo kigireeta aryagicungura nk'oku oribariirira; kandi agyongyeremu kimwe kya kataano ky'empiiha z'obuguzi bwayo. Nari ku ariba atagicungwire, etundwe nk'oku origicwera." 
Leviticus27:28 Kwonka tiharigira ekintu eki omuntu ahongyeire Nyakubaho akiihire omu bi atungire, yaaba muntu nari enyamaishwa, nainga ekibanja kye ky'empungurano, ekiritundwa nari okucungurwa, kyona ekihongirwe n'enjeru ya Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus27:29 Tiharigira omuntu ahongyeirwe kimwe kwitwa oricungurwa, kureka aitwe." 
Leviticus27:30 Kimwe kya ikumi kyona ky'eby'eitaka eky'ebyezire omu nsi, yaaba by'omujuma nari by'ebijuma, kiryaba enjeru ya Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus27:31 Omuntu ku aryenda kucungura kimwe kya ikumi kye, akyongyereho kimwe kya kataano;" 
Leviticus27:32 kimwe kya ikumi kyona eky'obusyo bw'ente nari bw'entaama, buri nyamaishwa ya ikumi eya zoona ezi omuriisa arikubarisa enkoni ye, eryaba enjeru ya Nyakubaho." 
Leviticus27:33 Omuntu ataryenda kwetegyereza yaaba eri nungi nari mbi, nobu kwakuba okugihingisa. Kwonka ku arigihingisa, egyo eyaahingwa n'eyaahingisibwa, zombi ziryaba ezeeziibwe; zitaricungurwa." 
Leviticus27:34 Ebyo nibyo biragiro bi Mukama yaaragiriire Musa aha Rushozi Sinaayi kubigambira Abaisiraeli. 
Numbers1:1 Nyakubaho akagambirira Musa omu ihamba rya Sinaayi, omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwezi kwa kabiri omu mwaka gwa kabiri baherize kuruga omu nsi ya Misiri, yaamugira ati:" 
Numbers1:2 Mubare eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli ryona, nk'enganda zaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo oku biri, nimubara abashaija boona, omwe-omwe nk'amaziina gaabo oku gari." 
Numbers1:3 Abahikize emyaka y'obukuru makumi abiri n'okukiraho boona ab'omuri Isiraeli, abarikubaasa kuhurura, iwe na Arooni mubabare, nk'emitwe y'engabo zaabo oku eri." 
Numbers1:4 Kandi omu buri ruganda harugyemu omushaija w'okukukwatsa; haza abe ari omukuru w'omuryango gwa baishenkuru. 
Numbers1:5 Mbwenu aga nigo maziina g'abashaija abaraakwatanise naiwe. Omu ruganda rwa Reubeeni; Elizuuri mwene Shedeuri; 
Numbers1:6 omu rwa Simeoni: Shelumieli mwene Zurishadai; 
Numbers1:7 omu rwa Yuda Nahashooni mwene Aminadabu; 
Numbers1:8 omu rwa Isakaari: Netaneeli mwene Zuari. 
Numbers1:9 Omu rwa Zebuluuni: Eliyaabu mwene Heloni; 
Numbers1:10 omuri beene Yosefu, omu rwa Efuraimu, Elishaama mwene Amihuudi, kandi omu rwa Manaase: Gamalieli mwene Pedahuzuuri;" 
Numbers1:11 omu rwa Benyamiini: Abidaani mwene Gideoni; 
Numbers1:12 omu rwa Daani: Ahiyezeeri mwene Amishadai; 
Numbers1:13 omu rwa Asheri: Pagieli mwene Okiraani; 
Numbers1:14 omu rwa Gaadi: Eliyasaafu mwene Deueli; 
Numbers1:15 omu rwa Nafutaali: Ahiira mwene Enani. 
Numbers1:16 Abo nibo baatoorainwe omu ihanga ryona; abaabaire bari abeebembezi b'enganda za baishenkurubo, kandi bari abakuru b'emiryango ya Isiraeli." 
Numbers1:17 Reero Musa na Arooni baatwara abo bantu abu amaziina gaabo gaagambwaho. 
Numbers1:18 Aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwezi kwa kabiri, baateeranira hamwe ab'eihanga ryona, abaayehandiikiise, nk'oku enganda zaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo biri. Batyo baababara nk'oku amaziina gaabo gari, okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi abiri y'obukuru n'okukiraho; omwe-omwe." 
Numbers1:19 Nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa, nawe nikwo kubabarira omu ihamba rya Sinaayi." 
Numbers1:20 Bakahandiika aba Reubeeni omujigaijo gwa Isiraeli, nk'oku obuzaare bwabo n'amaka gaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo biri, kandi n'oku omubaro gw'amaziina gaabo, buri omwe buri omushaija weena ohikize emyaka makumi abiri y'obukuru n'okukiraho, boona abaabaire nibabaasa kuhurura." 
Numbers1:21 Mpaho ab'oruganda rwa Reubeeni abaabazirwe baahika obukumi buna n'enkumi mukaaga na magana ataano. 
Numbers1:22 Aba Simeoni boona, obuzaare bwabo, amaka gaabo n'emiryango ya ishenkurubo, abaabazirwe nibakuratira omubaro gw'amaziina gaabo omwe-omwe omushaija weena ohikize emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho, boona abarikubaasa kuhurura." 
Numbers1:23 Ab'oruganda rwa Simeoni, abaabazirwe baahika obukumi butaano n'enkumi mwenda na magana ashatu." 
Numbers1:24 Reero aba Gaadi n'obuzaare bwabo, n'amaka gaabo, n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, abaabazirwe nibakuratira omubaro gw'amaziina g'abahikize emyaka y'obukuru makumi abiri n'okukiraho, boona abarikubaasa kuhurura;" 
Numbers1:25 omubaro gw'ab'oruganda rwa Gaadi gwahika obukumi buna n'enkumi itaano na magana mukaaga na makumi ataano. 
Numbers1:26 Baahandiika n'Abaayuda, ab'obuzaare bwabo n'amaka gaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, nibakuratira omubaro gw'amaziina gaabo, okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho, buri mushaija orikubaasa kuhurura." 
Numbers1:27 Omubaro gw'ab'oruganda rwa Yuda gwahika obukumi mushanju n'enkumi ina na magana mukaaga. 
Numbers1:28 Omu ba Isakaari baahandiika ab'obuzaare bwabo ab'amaka gaabo n'ab'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, nk'oku omubaro gw'amaziina gaabo guri, okwiha aha w'emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho, omushaija weena orikubaasa kuhurura." 
Numbers1:29 Batyo ab'oruganda rwa Isakaari abaabazirwe baahika obukumi butaano n'enkumi ina na magana ana. 
Numbers1:30 Omu ba Zebuluuni baahandiika ab'obuzaare bwabo n'ab'amaka gaabo n'ab'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, nk'oku omubaro gw'amaziina gaabo guri, okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho, omushaija weena orikubaasa kuhurura." 
Numbers1:31 Batyo ab'oruganda rwa Isakaari abaabazirwe baahika obukumi butaano n'enkumi ina na magana ana. 
Numbers1:32 Omu ba Yosefu nikwo kugira ngu omu b'enda ya Efuraimu: ab'obuzaare bwabo n'amaka gaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, nk'oku omubaro gw'amaziina gaabo guri, okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho omushaija weena orikubaasa kuhurura;" 
Numbers1:33 ab'oruganda rwa Efuraimu abaabazirwe baahika obukumi buna na magana ataano. 
Numbers1:34 Omu b'enda ya Manaase baahandiika ab'obuzaare bwabo n'amaka gaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, nibakuratira omubaro gw'amaziina gaabo, okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi abiri y'obukuru n'okukiraho, buri mushaija orikubaasa kuhurura." 
Numbers1:35 Ab'oruganda rwa Manaase abaabazirwe baahika obukumi bushatu n'enkumi ibiri na magana abiri. 
Numbers1:36 Baahandiika ab'oruzaaro rwa Benyamiini, nk'oku amaka gaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo biri, nibabara amaziina g'abashaija boona omwe-omwe, abahikize emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho, boona abarikubaasa kuhurura." 
Numbers1:37 Ab'oruganda rwa Benyamiini abaabazirwe baahika obukumi bushatu n'enkumi itaano na magana ana. 
Numbers1:38 Baahandiika ab'oruzaaro rwa Daani, nk'amaka gaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo oku biri nibabara amaziina g'abashaija boona omwe-omwe, abahikize emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho boona abarikubaasa kuhurura." 
Numbers1:39 Ab'oruganda rwa Daani abaabazirwe baahika obukumi mukaaga n'enkumi ibiri na magana mushanju. 
Numbers1:40 Baahandiika ab'oruzaaro rwa Asheri, nk'amaka gaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo oku biri, nibabara amaziina g'abashaija boona abahikize emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho, boona abarikubaasa kuhurura." 
Numbers1:41 Ab'oruganda rwa Asheri abaabazirwe baahika obukumi buna na rukumi na magana ataano. 
Numbers1:42 Omu b'oruzaaro rwa Nafutaali baahandiika ab'amaka gaabo n'ab'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, nk'oku omubaro gw'amaziina gaabo gwabaire guri, okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi abiri y'obukuru n'okukiraho, abashaija boona abarikubaasa kuhurura." 
Numbers1:43 Omubaro gw'ab'oruganda rwa Nafutaali gwahika obukumi butaano n'enkumi ishatu na magana ana. 
Numbers1:44 Abo nibo baabazirwe Musa na Arooni, nibahwerwa abeebembezi b'Abaisiraeli, abashaija ikumi na babiri, buri omwe naajwekyera ab'enju ya ishenkuru." 
Numbers1:45 Batyo Abaisiraeli boona abaabazirwe nibakuratira emiryango ya baishenkurubo, okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho, abashaija boona ab'omuri Isiraeli enkwata ngabo," 
Numbers1:46 omubaro gwabo boona baahika obusiriira mukaaga n'enkumi ishatu na magana ataano na makumi ataano. 
Numbers1:47 Kwonka Abaleevi n'ab'oruganda rwa baishenkurubo tibarabariirwe muri ezo nganda. 
Numbers1:48 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers1:49 Ab'oruganda rwa Leevi bo otaribabara, nobu kwakuba okubabarira omu Baisiraeli;" 
Numbers1:50 kureka obahe omurimo gw'okureeberera Obutaaho bw'eby'Obuhamya n'ebintu byamwo, n'ebindi byona ebikwatiraine nabwo. Babe ab'okwekorera Obutaaho n'ebyabwo n'okubureeberera, kandi bagume bateere amahema gaabo okubwehinguririza." 
Numbers1:51 Obutaaho ku buriba nibwimuka kugyenda, Abaleevi babe nibo baabukuura, kandi ku buriba nibuza kubyarwa, babe nibo baabwemereza. Ku harigira ondi muntu otari Muleevi yaabuhika haihi, aitwe." 
Numbers1:52 Abaisiraeli baryaguma bateere amahema gaabo omu bimbuuro, buri muntu omu kirorero ky'abaabo n'aha rurango rwakyo." 
Numbers1:53 Kwonka Abaleevi bo bateere amahema gaabo okwehinguririza Obutaaho bw'eby'Obuhamya, eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli ritakaagirirwa ekiniga. Kandi Abaleevi abo bagume bareeberere Obutaaho bw'eby'Obuhamya." 
Numbers1:54 Batyo Abaisiraeli baakora byona, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa." 
Numbers2:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa na Arooni ati: 
Numbers2:2 Abaisiraeli bagume bateere amahema gaabo, buri muntu aha rurango rw'ekigombe kye, n'ahu akamanyiso k'omuryango gwa baishenkurubo kari. Haza bateere amahema gaabo aha mbaju zoona nigareebana n'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Numbers2:3 Abaraateere amahema aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba, aharikugarura ei eizooba rituruka, babe abaine orurango rw'enkambi ya Yuda bakurataine, nk'oku emitwe yaabo eri. Haza omwebembezi w'aba Yuda abe Nahashooni mwene Aminadabu;" 
Numbers2:4 eihe rye riri abashaija obukumi mushanju n'enkumi ina na magana mukaaga, nk'oku babazirwe." 
Numbers2:5 Abaraakurateho omu kuteera amahema, babe ab'oruganda rwa Isakaari; omwebembezi waabo ari Netaneeli mwene Zuari," 
Numbers2:6 ab'eihe rye bari obukumi butaano n'enkumi ina na magana ana, nk'oku babazirwe." 
Numbers2:7 Reero hakurateho ab'oruganda rwa Zebuluuni, abu omwebembezi waabo ari Eliyaabu mwene Heloni," 
Numbers2:8 n'eihe rye riri obukumi butaano n'enkumi mushanju na magana ana, nk'oku babazirwe." 
Numbers2:9 Boona ab'omu nkambi ya Yuda ababazirwe, nibahika akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi munaana n'enkumi mukaaga na magana ana. Haza abo nibo bariguma nibabanza kwimutsya orugyendo." 
Numbers2:10 Aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, hazeho orurango rw'enkambi y'aba Reubeeni nk'oku emitwe yaabo eri. Omwebembezi waabo ari Elizuuri mwene Shedeuri," 
Numbers2:11 kandi eihe rye riri abashaija obukumi buna n'enkumi mukaaga na magana ataano, nk'oku babazirwe." 
Numbers2:12 Reero abaraamukurate omu kuteera enkambi, babe ab'oruganda rwa Simeoni, omwebembezi w'aba Simeoni ari Shelumieli mwene Zurishadai," 
Numbers2:13 kandi eihe rye riri abashaija obukumi butaano n'enkumi mwenda na magana ashatu, nk'oku babazirwe." 
Numbers2:14 Bwanyima hakurateho ab'oruganda rwa Gaadi, omwebembezi waabo ari Eliyasaafu mwene Reueli," 
Numbers2:15 eihe rye ririmu abashaija obukumi buna n'enkumi itaano na magana mukaaga na makumi ataano, nk'oku babazirwe." 
Numbers2:16 Omubaro gwona ogw'ab'omu nkambi ya Reubeeni, nk'oku emitwe yaabo erikukuratana, n'akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi butaano na rukumi na magana ana na makumi ataano. Kandi bagume babe aba kabiri omu kwimutsya orugyendo." 
Numbers2:17 Bwanyima Abaleevi abaheekire eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu baimutsye hamwe n'ab'enkambi yaabo eri ahagati y'ezo nkambi. Haza nk'oku baraasiisire, nikwo baraagume nibaimutsya orugyendo, buri ruganda omu mwanya gwarwo, nk'oku endango zaabo ziri." 
Numbers2:18 Aha rubaju rwa burengyerwa-izooba habeho orurango rw'enkambi ya Efuraimu, nk'oku emitwe yaabo eri; omwebembezi waabo ari Elishaama mwene Ahiihudi," 
Numbers2:19 eihe rye ririmu abashaija obukumi buna na magana ataano, nk'oku babazirwe." 
Numbers2:20 Abaraamukurate babe ab'oruganda rwa Manaase, omwebembezi waabo ari Gamalieli mwene Pedahuzuuri;" 
Numbers2:21 eihe rye ririmu abashaija obukumi bushatu n'enkumi ibiri na magana abiri, nk'oku babazirwe." 
Numbers2:22 Bwanyima hakurateho ab'oruganda rwa Benyamiini, omwebembezi waabo ari Abidaani mwene Gideoni," 
Numbers2:23 eihe rye ririmu abashaija obukumi bushatu n'enkumi itaano na magana ana, nk'oku babazirwe." 
Numbers2:24 Omubaro gwona ogw'ab'omu nkambi y'Abaefuraimu, nk'oku emitwe yaabo erikukuratana, n'akasiriira kamwe n'enkumi munaana na igana rimwe. Kandi bagume babe aba kashatu omu kwimutsya orugyendo." 
Numbers2:25 Aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, habeho orurango rw'enkambi y'aba Daani, nk'oku emitwe yaabo eri; omwebembezi waabo ari Ahiyezeeri mwene Amishadai," 
Numbers2:26 kandi eihe rye ririmu abashaija obukumi mukaaga n'enkumi ibiri na magana mushanju, nk'oku babazirwe." 
Numbers2:27 Reero abaraakurateho kuteera amahema n'ab'oruganda rwa Asheri, abu omwebembezi waabo ari Pagieli mwene Okuraani," 
Numbers2:28 eihe rye ririmu abashaija obukumi buna na rukumi na magana ataano, nk'oku babazirwe." 
Numbers2:29 Bwanyima hakurateho ab'oruganda rwa Nafutaali, omwebembezi waabo ari Ahiira mwene Enaani," 
Numbers2:30 eihe rye ririmu abashaija obukumi butaano n'enkumi ishatu na magana ana, nk'oku babazirwe." 
Numbers2:31 Omubaro gwona ogw'ab'omu nkambi y'aba Daani, n'akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi butaano n'enkumi mushanju na magana mukaaga. Abo nibo baraagume nibahereeruka, nk'endango zaabo oku zirikukuratana." 
Numbers2:32 Abaisiraeli abaabazirwe nibakuratira emiryango ya baishenkurubo, boona abaabariirwe omu nsiisira, nk'oku emitwe yaabo yaabaire eri, bakahika abashaija obusiriira mukaaga n'enkumi ishatu na magana ataano na makumi ataano." 
Numbers2:33 Kwonka Abaleevi bo tibarabariirwe mu Baisiraeli, nk'oku Mukama yaaragiire Musa." 
Numbers2:34 Okwo nikwo Abaisiraeli baakozire, nibakuratira byona ebi Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa; bakateera ensiisira nk'endango zaabo oku ziri; kandi baaguma nibaimutsya orugyendo, buri muntu omu ruganda rwe, na buri mushaija n'ab'eka ye." 
Numbers3:1 Aba nibo baabaire bari ab'oruzaaro rwa Arooni na Musa, obu Nyakubaho yaagamba na Musa aha Rushozi Sinaayi." 
Numbers3:2 Aga nigo maziina ga batabani ba Arooni: Nadabu omujigaijo, na Abiihu, Eleazaari na Itamaari." 
Numbers3:3 Ago nigo maziina ga beene Arooni, abahongyerezi abaasiigirwe amajuta, abu yaayerize kukora omurimo gw'obuhongyerezi." 
Numbers3:4 Nadabu na Abiihu bo bakafeera omu maisho ga Nyakubaho obu baayotereza omu maisho ge omuriro gurikuzira omu ihamba rya Sinaayi, kandi baafa batazaire baana. Kwonka Eleazaari na Itamaari baaguma nibakora omurimo gw'obuhongyerezi, nibareebererwa Arooni ishebo." 
Numbers3:5 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers3:6 Reeta ab'oruganda rwa Leevi, obahitsye omu maisho ga Arooni omuhongyerezi, babone kuguma nibamuheereza." 
Numbers3:7 Bagume nibamukorera emirimo, kandi nibagikorera eihanga ryona omu maisho g'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, baaba nibakora omurimo gw'Obutaaho." 
Numbers3:8 Babe nibo baareeberera byona ebiri omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, n'okukorera Abaisiraeli emirimo baaba nibaheereza omu butaaho." 
Numbers3:9 Mbwenu iwe, Abaleevi obahe Arooni n'abatabani, obamuheere kimwe obaihe omu Baisiraeli." 
Numbers3:10 Haza oteho Arooni n'abatabani, bakore omurimo gwabo gw'obuhongyerezi. Kwonka ku harigira otari w'omuribo yaabyetaasyamu, aitwe." 
Numbers3:11 Kandi Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers3:12 Reeba, nyetooraniire Leevi omu Baisiraeli omu mwanya gw'emijigaijo yoona emiiguranda ey'Abaisiraeli. Abaleevi bagume bari abangye." 
Numbers3:13 Manya emijigaijo yoona n'eyangye: ahabw'okuba obu naita emijigaijo y'omu nsi ya Misiri, nibwo naayeshoroorera emijigaijo ya Isiraeli, ey'abantu n'ey'amatungo. Egyo mijigaijo n'eyangye. Niinye Nyakubaho." 
Numbers3:14 Kandi Nyakubaho akagambirira Musa omu ihamba rya Sinaayi ati: 
Numbers3:15 Bara beene Leevi nk'oku emiryango n'amaka ga baishenkurubo biri. Obare ekyeetwa omushaija, okwiha aha w'okwezi kumwe n'okukiraho." 
Numbers3:16 Musa atyo ababara naakuratira ekigambo kya Mukama, nk'oku yaamuragiire." 
Numbers3:17 Mbwenu aba nibo baabaire bari beene Leevi, n'aga nigo maziina gaabo: Gereshooni na Kohati na Meraari." 
Numbers3:18 Kandi aga nigo maziina ga beene Gereshooni nk'oku amaka gaabo gaabaire gari: Libuni na Shimei. 
Numbers3:19 Kandi aba nibo beene Kohati nk'oku amaka gaabo gaabaire gari: Amuraamu, Izuhari, Heburooni na Uzieli." 
Numbers3:20 Na beene Meraari, nk'oku amaka gaabo gaabaire gari: Mahili na Muushi. Abo nibo b'amaka g'Abaleevi, nk'oku emiryango ya baishenkurubo yaabaire eri." 
Numbers3:21 Gereshooni niwe yaakomookirwemu ab'omuryango gw'Abalibuni n'ogw'Abashimei. Egyo niyo yaabaire eri emiryango y'Abagereshooni. 
Numbers3:22 Omubaro gwabo, nk'oku abeetwa abashaija boona baabazirwe, okwiha aha w'okwezi kumwe n'okukiraho, gukaba enkumi mushanju na magana ataano." 
Numbers3:23 Ab'emiryango y'Abagereshooni bakaba ab'okuteera amahema gaabo enyima y'Obutaaho, embari ya burengyerwa-izooba." 
Numbers3:24 Na Eliyasaafu mutabani wa Laeli akaba ari mukuru w'ab'omuryango gwa baishenkurubo. 
Numbers3:25 Kandi beene Gereshooni, omurimo gu baahairwe kukora omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu gukaba guri okureeberera Obutaaho, eihema n'ebirikurisangira, n'omukingo gw'aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Numbers3:26 Taho emikingo eyehinguririze ekibuga, n'omukingo gw'aha muryango gw'ekyo kibuga ekyehinguririize obutaaho, n'eitambiro n'emirunga yaakyo, n'ebindi byona ebikwatiraine n'ogwo murimo." 
Numbers3:27 Kohati niwe yaakomookirwemu ab'omuryango gw'Abaamuraamu, n'ogw'Abaizuhaari, n'ogw'Abaaheburooni, n'ogw'Abauzieli; egyo niyo miryango y'Abakohati." 
Numbers3:28 Abashaija boona abaabazirwe, okwiha aha w'okwezi kumwe n'okukiraho, bakahika enkumi munaana na magana mukaaga, abaabaire nibakora emirimo y'Omwanya Ogurikwera." 
Numbers3:29 Ab'emiryango ya beene Kohati bakaba ab'okuteera ensiisira aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo obw'Obutaaho. 
Numbers3:30 Na Eluzafani mwene Uzieli akaba ari mukuru w'ab'eka ya baishenkuru b'emiryango y'Abakohati. 
Numbers3:31 Kandi omurimo gwabo gukaba guri okureeberera eshanduukye y'endagaano, n'emeeza, n'ekikondo ky'amatabaaza, n'amatambiro, n'ebirikukoresibwa omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, ebi abahongyerezi baheerezesa, n'omukingo, n'ebindi byona ebikwatiraine nabyo." 
Numbers3:32 Reero Eleazaari mwene Arooni omuhongyerezi niwe yaabaire naakurira abeebembezi b'Abaleevi, n'abarikureeberera Omwanya Ogurikwera boona." 
Numbers3:33 Meraari niwe yaakomookirwemu ab'omuryango gw'Abamahili n'ab'ogw'Abamuushi. Egyo niyo miryango y'Abameraari. 
Numbers3:34 Omubaro gwabo boona abeetwa abashaija, okwiha aha b'okwezi kumwe n'okukiraho, gukahika enkumi mukaaga na magana abiri." 
Numbers3:35 Kandi mukuru w'ab'eka ya baishenkuru b'emiryango ya Meraari akaba ari Zurieli mwene Abihaili. Bo bakaba ab'okuteera enkambi aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho orw'Obutaaho. 
Numbers3:36 Beene Meraari abo bakakwatsibwa okureeberera embaaho z'obutaaho, n'embazi, n'enyomyo, n'ebiina, na byona ebirikubigyenderaho, n'ebindi byona ebirikukoresibwa, ebikwatiraine nabyo." 
Numbers3:37 Kandi baakwatsibwa n'enyomyo z'orugo orwehinguririize ekibuga, n'ebiina byazo n'enkondo n'emirunga." 
Numbers3:38 Reero ab'okuteera enkambi omu maisho g'obutaaho, orubaju rwa burugwa-izooba omu maisho g'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, ogurikureeba ei eizooba riturukira, bakaba bari Musa na Arooni n'abatabani, nibareeberera ebirikukorwa omunda y'Omwanya Ogurikwera, n'ebindi byona ebirikukorwa ahabw'Abaisiraeli. Ondiijo weena owaabaire airirira obwo Butaaho, akaba aba ow'okwitwa." 
Numbers3:39 Abaleevi boona abaabazirwe, abu Musa na Arooni baabazire baragiirwe Nyakubaho, nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri, abashaija boona, okwiha aha w'okwezi kumwe n'okukiraho, bakaba obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri." 
Numbers3:40 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: Bara abashaija boona, emijigaijo ab'Abaisiraeli, okwiha aha b'okwezi kumwe n'okukiraho; haza ohandiikye orubaro rwabo, nk'oku amaziina gaabo gari." 
Numbers3:41 Reero ontooranire Abaleevi Nyowe Nyakubaho omu mwanya gw'emijigaijo yoona ey'Abaisiraeli, kandi obe nikwo wampa n'amatungo g'Abaleevi omu mwanya gw'emijigaijo y'amatungo g'Abaisiraeli." 
Numbers3:42 Musa atyo abara emijigaijo yoona ey'Abaisiraeli, nk'oku Nyakubaho amuragiire." 
Numbers3:43 Mpaho abashaija boona emijigaijo, okwiha aha w'okwezi kumwe n'okukiraho, omubaro gw'amaziina gaabo guba obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri na magana abiri na makumi mushanju na bashatu, nk'oku baabazirwe." 
Numbers3:44 Kandi Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers3:45 Twara Abaleevi omu mwanya gw'emijigaijo yoona ey'Abaisiraeli, otware n'amatungo g'Abaleevi omu mwanya gw'amatungo gaabo. Reero Abaleevi bagume bari abangye ahabwangye Nyowe Nyakubaho." 
Numbers3:46 Kandi ahabw'okucungura emijigaijo magana abiri na makumi mushanju na bashatu ey'Abaisiraeli, eyaayeshumbire omubaro gw'abashaija Abaleevi," 
Numbers3:47 otware empiiha itaano za buri omwe, eziine obuguzi nk'obw'empiiha y'Omwanya Ogurikwera, empiiha erimu ebigabari makumi abiri, ozitware." 
Numbers3:48 Haza empiiha z'okucunguza egyo mijigaijo eyeshumbireho ozihe Arooni n'abatabani. 
Numbers3:49 Musa atyo aiha aha baayeshumbire abaacungwire Abaleevi empiiha z'okubacungura. 
Numbers3:50 Empiiha zi yaihire aha mijigaijo y'Abaisiraeli zihika rukumi na magana ashatu na makumi mukaaga na itaano, ezi obuguzi bwazo burikwingana nk'obw'empiiha y'Omwanya Ogurikwera." 
Numbers3:51 Mpaho Musa aha Arooni n'abatabani ezo mpiiha z'okucungura, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiire." 
Numbers4:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa na Arooni ati: 
Numbers4:2 Mubare beene Kohati nimubaiha omu Baleevi, nk'oku amaka n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo biri," 
Numbers4:3 okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi ashatu y'obukuru, okuhitsya aha b'emyaka makumi ataano, boona abahikire kukora omurimo gw'obuheereza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Numbers4:4 Ogu nigwo murimo ogu beene Kohati baraakorere omuri eryo ihema. Ogwo murimo n'ogw'okureeberera ebintu ebirikwera munonga. 
Numbers4:5 Ab'omu rusiisira ku barihika kwimutsya orugyendo, Arooni n'abatabani bataahemu, banu bahanure omukingo ogukingiire Omwanya Ogurikwera munonga, bagushwekye eshanduukye y'eby'obuhamya." 
Numbers4:6 Bwanyima bagishwekyeho oruhu rw'engongi, narwo barutungikyeho omwenda gwa bururu nsha, reero bagishokyemu emigamba yaayo." 
Numbers4:7 Aha meeza y'emigaati y'Okumurika, bateho omwenda gwa bururu, baguteho eshuhaani, n'enyabya z'okwotereraho obubaani, n'ebakuri, n'emidumo y'okushukisa emitoijo y'ebyokunywa. N'emigaati eteebwaho nayo ezeho." 
Numbers4:8 Bwanyima babishwekye omwenda gwa karari, bagutungikyeho empu z'engongi, bagishokyemu emigamba." 
Numbers4:9 Reero bareete omwenda gwa bururu, bagushwekye ekikondo ky'etabaaza n'amatabaaza gaakyo, n'empana zaakyo, n'otushohaani twakyo, na byona ebirimu amajuta gu bakishukamu." 
Numbers4:10 Haza kyo n'ebyakyo byona babishembe omu mpu z'engongi, babikomere aha migamba y'okubiheekyesa." 
Numbers4:11 Kandi eitambiro ry'ezaabu baryareho omwenda gwa bururu, barishwekye oruhu rw'engongi, barishokyemu emigamba yaaryo." 
Numbers4:12 Reero bareete ebintu byona ebirikukoresibwa omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, babite omu mwenda gwa bururu, babishwekyese oruhu rw'engongi, babite aha migamba y'okubiheekyesa." 
Numbers4:13 Kandi baihe eiju aha itambiro, eryo itambiro barishwekyeho omwenda gwa bujwa," 
Numbers4:14 bariteho ebirikurikoresibwaho byona ebi bakoresa nibaheereza: eby'okuguhisa omuriro, n'entoozo z'okwihuza enyama, n'ebitiiho by'okuyooresa eiju, n'ekaraaya z'okurishukaho; byona ebikoresibwa aha itambiro. Batyo barishwekyeho oruhu rw'engongi, barishokyemu emigamba yaaryo." 
Numbers4:15 Arooni n'abatabani ku bariguma baaheza kushweka eby'Omwanya Ogurikwera, n'esika yaamwo yoona, ab'omu nsiisira ku bariba nibaimutsya orugyendo, beene Kohati baije babyekorere. Kwonka batarikora ahari ebyo bintu birikwera, bakafa. Ebyo nibyo bintu by'omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, ebi beene Kohati baraagume nibaheeka." 
Numbers4:16 Eleazaari, mwene Arooni, omuhongyerezi aryaguma areeberere amajuta g'okuhemba, obubaani oburikutaamirana omugaju, emitoijo y'esaano etarugaho, amajuta g'okusiiga, n'obutaaho bwona n'ebi burimu, kandi n'Omwanya Ogurikwera n'ebintu byagwo ebirikukoresibwa." 
Numbers4:17 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa na Arooni ati: 
Numbers4:18 Mutareka oruganda rw'ab'emiryango y'Abakohati kucwekyerezibwa, rukahwa omu Baleevi." 
Numbers4:19 Kureka mubatwaze mutyo, babone kugumaho batafiire, baahika haihi ebintu ebirikwerera kimwe. Arooni n'abatabani bagume bataahemu, bahe buri muntu omurimo gwe n'eki ashemereire kuheeka;" 
Numbers4:20 kwonka bataritaahamu kushamaarira ebintu ebirikwera, nangwa nobu kaakuba akaanya kakye kati, batakaafa." 
Numbers4:21 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers4:22 Bara beene Gereshooni nabo, nk'oku amaka gaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo biri," 
Numbers4:23 okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi ashatu y'obukuru okuhitsya aha b'emyaka makumi ataano; obare boona abarikubaasa kukora omurimo gw'obuheereza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu. 
Numbers4:24 Ogu nigwo murimo gw'ab'emiryango y'Abagereshooni, omu kuheereza n'okwekorera esika." 
Numbers4:25 Baryaguma beekorere emikingo y'obutaaho, n'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu," 
Numbers4:26 n'emikingo y'orugo rw'ekibuga, n'omukingo gw'aha irembo ry'ekibuga ekyehinguririize obutaaho n'eitambiro, n'emirunga yaabyo, na byona ebi bakoresa nibaheereza. Bakore emirimo yoona erikwetengwa ekwatiraine nabyo." 
Numbers4:27 Arooni n'abatabani nibo bariguma nibaragiira beene Gereshooni emirimo yoona ei bariba bari ab'okukora. Byona ebi bariba bari ab'okuheeka, n'ebi bariba bari ab'okukora, niimwe muraagume nimubibaragiira." 
Numbers4:28 Egyo niyo mirimo y'ab'emiryango ya beene Gereshooni omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu; kandi omurimo gwabo gugume nigureebererwa Itamaari mwene Arooni omuhongyerezi. 
Numbers4:29 Beene Meraari nabo obabare nk'amaka gaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo oku biri," 
Numbers4:30 okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi ashatu y'obukuru, okuta aha b'emyaka makumi ataano. Obare boona abarikubaasa kukora omurimo gw'obuheereza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Numbers4:31 Ebi nibyo barikuragiirwa kuheeka, biri omurimo gwabo gw'obuheereza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu: embaaho z'Obutaaho n'embazi zaabwo, enyomyo n'ebiina," 
Numbers4:32 n'enyomyo z'orugo rw'ekibuga orwehinguririizeho, hamwe n'ebiina byazo, n'enkondo n'emirunga n'ebyabyo byona ebirikugyenda nabyo, kandi mubagambire ebintu ebi bashemereire kuheeka." 
Numbers4:33 Egyo niyo mirimo y'ab'emiryango ya beene Meraari, ei baraagume nibakorera omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, ekaguma neereebererwa Itamaari mwene Arooni omuhongyerezi." 
Numbers4:34 Musa na Arooni n'abeebembezi b'eihanga bakabara beene Kohati, nk'oku amaka gaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo biri." 
Numbers4:35 Okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi ashatu y'obukuru, okuhitsya aha b'emyaka makumi ataano, boona abarikubaasa kukora omurimo gw'obuheereza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Numbers4:36 Omubaro gwabo, nk'amaka gaabo oku gaabaire gari, gwaba enkumi ibiri na magana mushanju na makumi ataano." 
Numbers4:37 Ogwo nigwo mubaro gw'ab'emiryango y'Abakohati, boona abaakozire omurimo gw'obuheereza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, abu Musa na Arooni baabazire, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa." 
Numbers4:38 Omubaro gwa beene Gereshooni, nk'oku amaka gaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo byabaire biri," 
Numbers4:39 okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi ashatu y'obukuru, okuhitsya aha b'emyaka makumi ataano, boona abarikubaasa kukora omurimo gw'obuheereza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu" 
Numbers4:40 omubaro gwabo, nk'oku amaka gaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo byabaire biri, gukahika enkumi ibiri na magana mukaaga na makumi ashatu." 
Numbers4:41 Ogwo nigwo gwabaire omubaro gw'ab'emiryango ya beene Gereshooni boona, abaaheereize omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, abu Musa na Arooni baabazire, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire." 
Numbers4:42 Omubaro gw'ab'emiryango ya beene Meraari, nk'oku amaka gaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo byabaire biri," 
Numbers4:43 okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi ashatu y'obukuru, okuhitsya aha b'emyaka makumi ataano, boona abaabaire nibabaasa kukora omurimo gw'obuheereza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu" 
Numbers4:44 omubaro gwabo nk'oku amaka gaago gaabaire gari, gukaba enkumi ishatu na magana abiri." 
Numbers4:45 Abo nibo b'emiryango ya beene Meraari, abu Musa na Arooni baabazire, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa." 
Numbers4:46 Abo boona nibo b'omu Baleevi, abu Musa na Arooni n'abeebembezi b'eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli baabazire nibakuratira amaka gaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo," 
Numbers4:47 okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi ashatu y'obukuru, okuhitsya aha b'emyaka makumi ataano, boona abaabaire nibabaasa kukora omurimo gw'obuheereza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, n'ogw'okwekorera ebintu." 
Numbers4:48 Boona omuribo abaabazirwe bakahika enkumi munaana na magana ataano na makumi munaana. 
Numbers4:49 Nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire naabatumaho Musa, buri omwe akakwatsibwa omurimo gwe, yaaba gw'okuheereza, nari gw'okwekorera. Musa nikwo yaababazire atyo, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiire." 
Numbers5:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers5:2 Ragiira Abaisiraeli, baihe omu rusiisira ekyetwa omubembe, na weena oine ekirikumushononokamu, kandi n'omuntu weena otashemeire ahabw'okuhika omutumbi." 
Numbers5:3 Mwihemu abashaija n'abakazi, mubashohoze aheeru y'orusiisira, barekye kuhagaza orusiisira rwabo oru ntuuramu hamwe nabo." 
Numbers5:4 Abaisiraeli baakora batyo, baabashohoza aheeru y'orusiisira, baatwaza nk'oku Nyakubaho yaagambiire Musa." 
Numbers5:5 Kandi Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers5:6 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Omushaija nari omukazi ku arikora ekibi kyona eki abantu bakora bakacumura ahari Nyakubaho, haza ogwo muntu akagiibwaho orubanja;" 
Numbers5:7 ayature ekibi ki akozire, arihe byona ahabw'eki acumwire, kandi akyongyereho kimwe kya kataano, akihe ou yaashaagiize." 
Numbers5:8 Kwonka ogwo muntu ou bashaagiize, ku yaakuba ataine munyabuzaare w'okuheebwa endihano, egyo ndihano y'ekicumuro etoijerwe Nyakubaho, ebe ey'omuhongyerezi, kandi eyongyerweho empaya y'entaama ey'okukaraba ei baraamukarabiririre." 
Numbers5:9 Emitoijo erikwera ey'ebintu by'Abaisiraeli, ei bareetera omuhongyerezi, ebe eye." 
Numbers5:10 N'ebintu byona ebirikwera ebya buri muntu, bigume bibe ebye. Kyona eki omuntu arireetera omuhongyerezi, kibe ekye." 
Numbers5:11 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers5:12 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Muk'omushaija ku aryekiika aha rubaju, yaakora ekitari ky'obwesigwa ahari iba," 
Numbers5:13 omushaija ondi yaabyama nawe, haza kyasherekwa, iba ataakimanya, hataine omureebire, nobu araabe ayefaakaize, kandi hataine orikumushinja ahabw'okushangwa atakwatsirwe naakikora," 
Numbers5:14 reero iba ku yaakugira omutima gw'obufuuhi yaafuuhira omukazi we oyefaakaize, nari yaagira omutima gw'obufuuhi, yaafuuhira omukazi we, haza kunu ateefaakaize," 
Numbers5:15 obwo omushaija areetere omuhongyerezi ogwo mukazi we, hamwe n'empongano y'okumuhongyerera, niyo kimwe kya ikumi ky'encuro y'esaano ya baale. Haza atarigishukaho amajuta, nobu kwakuba okugimemeereraho obubaani, ahabw'okuba n'empongano y'esaano y'okuhongyerera obufuuhi; ey'okwerura ekyo kibi." 
Numbers5:16 Mpaho omuhongyerezi airize haihi ogwo mukazi, amute omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Numbers5:17 Haza atware amaizi geeziibwe omu rwabya rw'eibumba, aihe omucuucu aha nsi omu butaaho, agugatemu." 
Numbers5:18 Atyo ate ogwo mukazi omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, amuzingurure eishokye aha mutwe, amute omu ngaro esaano y'empongano y'okwerura ekyo kibi, ey'okuhongyerera obufuuhi. Kandi omuhongyerezi akwate omu ngaro orwabya rw'ago maizi g'obushaarirwa agareeta omukyeeno." 
Numbers5:19 Bwanyima omuhongyerezi araame omukazi, naagira ati: Ku haraabe hatariho mushaija obyamire naiwe, kandi ku oraabe oteekiikire okeefaakaza, nookitegyekwa baro, aga maizi g'obushaarirwa agarikureeta omukyeeno, gatagira eki gaakwitsa." 
Numbers5:20 Kwonka ku oraabe oine ahi oyekiikire nookitegyekwa baro, okeefaakaza, omushaija ondi otari baro akabyama naiwe," 
Numbers5:21 (obwo omuhongyerezi amutongyererere eby'okumwitsa omukyeeno, naamugira ati:) Nyakubaho akuhindure okyeenirwe, kandi ow'okurahirirwa omu ihanga ryawe! Akunyuunyuure ekibero, akuhazye!" 
Numbers5:22 Aga maizi garikureeta omukyeeno gakuze omu mara, gakuhazye enda, onyuunyuukye ekibero! Haza ogwo mukazi agire ati: Eego, kibe kwo!" 
Numbers5:23 Bwanyima omuhongyerezi ahandiikye ebigambo by'ogwo mukyeeno, abyozye, amaizi gaabyo gaitururukire omu rwabya rw'amaizi g'obushaarirwa." 
Numbers5:24 Haza aragiire ogwo mukazi, anywe ago maizi g'obushaarirwa, agareeta omukyeeno. Amaizi garikureeta omukyeeno gamuze omunda, gamureetere obuhuruzi bwingi." 
Numbers5:25 Bwanyima aihe omu ngaro z'ogwo mukazi esaano y'empongano y'obufuuhi, agizongazongyeze omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, agitware aha itambiro." 
Numbers5:26 Kandi omuhongyerezi atware eigaro ry'empongano y'esaano y'okwerura ekibi, aryokyeze aha itambiro, na bwanyima anyweise omukazi ago maizi." 
Numbers5:27 Ku araaheze kugamunywaisa, onu ku araabe ayefaakaize akakora ekitari ky'obwesigwa ahari iba, ago maizi garikureeta omukyeeno nigaija kumuza omu nda, gamuhurure, ahagye enda, ahururukye ekibero, abe okyeenirwe omu ihanga rye." 
Numbers5:28 Kwonka ku araabe ateefaakaize, ari oshemeire, obwo naaba ari mwere, tihariho kabi karaamubeho, kandi naija kuzaara abaana." 
Numbers5:29 Ekyo nikyo kiragiro ekikwatiraine n'eby'obufuuhi; omukazi oine iba yaaba aine ahu ayekiikire akeefaakaza," 
Numbers5:30 nari omushaija yaaba aine omutima gw'obufuuhi, akafuuhira omukazi we; obwo areete ogwo mukazi omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, omuhongyerezi amukoreho emigyenzo y'omuri ekyo kiragiro."
