Numbers5:31 Omushaija ayetabaarukire, kwonka omukazi aheebwe ekifubiro ky'ekibi kye." 
Numbers6:1 Kandi Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Numbers6:2 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Omushaija nari omukazi ku arihiga okuhiga kutari kw'obutoosha, yaayehongyera Nyakubaho amweheereire kimwe," 
Numbers6:3 aryacwa viino n'ekirikusinza kyona. Tarinywa ky'okunywa kirikushaarira, ekiihirwe omu viino, nari omu maarwa g'amakuuta, kandi tarinywa shande y'ebijuma by'emizaabibu, nobu kwakuba okubirya, yaaba bibisi nari byomire." 
Numbers6:4 Ebiro bye byona ebi arimara ahigire, ayeshoroire, atarirya ekintu kyona ekirugire omu bijuma by'omuzaabibu, nangwa nobu zaakuba embibo nari ebishushu." 
Numbers6:5 Ebiro byona ebi arimara ahigire, ayeshoroire omu bandi, orumweiso rutarimuraba omu mutwe, okuhitsya obu obunaku bwe obw'okweheera kimwe Nyakubaho burihwaho. Aryaguma ari orikwera; arekye obutsibo bw'eishokye rye buraihe." 
Numbers6:6 Ebiro byona ebi arimara naahikiiriza eki yaahigiire Nyakubaho, atarihika haihi n'omutumbi." 
Numbers6:7 Nobu ariba ishe nari nyina, nainga mwene ishe, nari munyaanya, afiire, ataryehagaza, ahabw'okuba naaba naajunaanwa okuhiga oku yaahigire omu maisho ga Ruhanga." 
Numbers6:8 Ebiro byona ebi arimara ayeshoroire, aryaba ari orikwera omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Numbers6:9 Kandi omuntu weena ku yaakumukinukira aha rubaju, yaahagaza omutwe gwe ogweziibwe, aha kiro kya mushanju eky'okweyeza amwe omutwe gwe." 
Numbers6:10 Aha kya munaana areete amaiba abiri nari enkombe ibiri nto, abikwatsize omuhongyerezi aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Numbers6:11 Omuhongyerezi aheyo enyonyi emwe kuba empongano y'ekibi n'endi kuba ekitambo ky'okucwetsya. Atyo amukarabire, ahabw'okukora ekibi ky'okuhikaana n'omufu. Mpaho eryo izooba ayeze omutwe gwe;" 
Numbers6:12 haza ayeheere kimwe Mukama ebiro bi araamare ahigire. Kandi areete empaya nto y'entaama y'omwaka gumwe, y'empongano y'okwihaho orubanja; kwonka obunaku bwe obwabandize bumufeere busha, ahabw'okuba okuhiga kwe kukasiisikara." 
Numbers6:13 Kandi eki nikyo kiragiro ky'ohigire: Ebiro bye by'okuhiga ku birihwaho, bamureete aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu," 
Numbers6:14 areetere Mukama omutoijo gwe; omwana gumwe gw'entaama gw'omwaka gumwe ogutaine kamogo kuba ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, n'omwagazi gw'entaama oguhikize omwaka gumwe ogutaine kamogo kuba empongano y'ekibi, kandi n'empaya y'entaama etaine kamogo kuba ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe." 
Numbers6:15 Ateho ekiibo ky'emigaati etatumbisiibwe, n'otugaati tw'esaano y'obunono otutobagirwemu amajuta, kandi n'otucapati tutatumbisiibwe otumaamagiziibweho amajuta, n'emitoijo yaabyo y'esaano n'ey'ebyokunywa." 
Numbers6:16 Mpaho omuhongyerezi abireete omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, ahongye empongano y'ekibi kye, n'ekitambo kye ky'okucwetsya." 
Numbers6:17 Atoije n'empaya y'entaama ebe ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe, eky'okutambira Nyakubaho. Kandi ekyo kiibo ky'emigaati etatumbisiibwe, omuhongyerezi akitoijereho emitoijo y'esaano n'ey'ebyokunywa." 
Numbers6:18 Reero kihiga amwere aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu omutwe gwe ogwayeziibwe, atware eishokye eryaruga aha mutwe gwe arite omu muriro oguri ahansi y'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe." 
Numbers6:19 Haza omuhongyerezi aiheho ekivune ky'omukono gw'empaya y'entaama ekyaheza kuteekwa, aihe n'omu kiibo akagaati katatumbisiibwe, n'akabanda katatumbisiibwe, abite omu ngaro za kihiga, yaaheza kumwa eishokye ry'okwezibwa kwe." 
Numbers6:20 Omuhongyerezi abizongazonzye, bibe omutoijo guzongazongiibwe omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. Ebyo n'egabo erikwera ey'omuhongyerezi, hamwe n'enkoro ezongazongiibwe, n'ekivune ky'okuguru ekihongirwe. Ebyo ku birihwa nibwo kihiga ariikirizibwa kunywa viino." 
Numbers6:21 Ekyo nikyo kiragiro ky'orikuhiga. Omutoijo gu arikutoijera Nyakubaho gube nk'okwehonga kwe oku kuri, otabariiremu ebi arikutoija ayekundiire. Ahikiirize okuhiga kwe, nk'eiteeka ry'okwehonga kwe oku riri." 
Numbers6:22 Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Numbers6:23 Gambira Arooni n'abatabani oti: Oku nikwo muraagume nimushabira Abaisiraeli omugisha: mubagire muti: 
Numbers6:24 Nyakubaho abahe omugisha, abarinde." 
Numbers6:25 Nyakubaho abashemuukize amaisho ge, abagirire embabazi." 
Numbers6:26 Nyakubaho abaimukize amaisho ge, abahe obusingye." 
Numbers6:27 Nikwo bariguma nibatongyerera eiziina ryangye aha Baisiraeli, naanye nkabaha omugisha." 
Numbers7:1 Aha izooba ri Musa yaimukiizeho obutaaho, akabusiiga amajuta, yaabuhonga n'ebyamwo byona, kandi yaasiiga eitambiro amajuta, yaarihonga n'ebirikurikoresibwaho byona." 
Numbers7:2 Ahari eryo izooba abeebembezi b'Abaisiraeli abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, nibo beebembezi b'enganda, abaabaire nibareeberera abaabazirwe," 
Numbers7:3 baatoijera Nyakubaho emitoijo yaabo, ebigaari mukaaga ebisangiire, n'enimi ikumi na ibiri; buri beebembezi babiri ekigaari, na buri omwe enimi; baabitoijera omu maisho g'obutaaho." 
Numbers7:4 Bwanyima Nyakubaho yaagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers7:5 Ikiriza ebi baatoija bikoresibwe emirimo y'okuheereza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, kandi obihe Abaleevi, buri omwe, nk'oku obuheereza bwe buri." 
Numbers7:6 Musa atyo atwara ebigaari n'enimi, abiha Abaleevi." 
Numbers7:7 Ebigaari bibiri n'enimi ina abiha beene Gereshooni, nk'obuheereza bwabo oku buri;" 
Numbers7:8 kandi ebigaari bina n'enimi munaana abiha beene Meraari, nk'oku obuheereza bwabo buri; obwo nibareebererwa Itamaari, mwene Arooni omuhongyerezi." 
Numbers7:9 Kwonka beene Kohati tabaha kantu, ahabw'okuba bo bakakwatsibwa okureeberera ebintu ebirikwera ebi baabaire baheeka aha mabega." 
Numbers7:10 Abeebembezi bakatoija emitoijo y'okuhonga eitambiro, aha izooba ri ryasiigiirweho amajuta; abo beebembezi baareeta emitoijo yaabo omu maisho gaaryo." 
Numbers7:11 Kandi Nyakubaho yaagambira Musa ati: Bareete emitoijo yaabo, buri mwebembezi aha izooba rye, ahabw'okuhonga eitambiro." 
Numbers7:12 Owaareetsire omutoijo gwe aha izooba ry'okubanza, ni Nahashooni mwene Aminadabu, ow'omu ruganda rwa Yuda." 
Numbers7:13 Eki yaatoizire kikaba kiri eshuhaani y'efeeza, erikuhitsya oburemeezi bwa guraamu igana na makumi ashatu, ebeeseni emwe y'efeeza, ya guraamu makumi mushanju, nka guraamu y'Omwanya Ogurikwera oku eri; byombi biijwire esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta kuba empongano y'esaano;" 
Numbers7:14 orwabya rumwe rw'ezaabu rwa guraamu ikumi, orwijwire obubaani;" 
Numbers7:15 enimi y'ekimasha emwe engondoore emwe y'entaama, empaya nto y'entaama y'omwaka gumwe, kuba ekitambo ky'okucwetsya;" 
Numbers7:16 empaya emwe y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi; 
Numbers7:17 kandi ahabw'ekitambo ky'ebitambo byokurya kumwe, enimi ibiri, engondoore itaano z'entaama, empaya itaano z'entaama, empaya itaano z'embuzi, n'empaya itaano nto z'entaama, ezihikize omwaka gumwe. Ebyo nibyo Nahashooni mwene Aminadabu yaatoizire." 
Numbers7:18 Aha kiro kya kabiri, haatoija Netaneeli mwene Zuari, omwebembezi w'Abaisakaari." 
Numbers7:19 Yaatoija omutoijo gwe guri eshuhaani emwe y'efeeza, erikuhitsya oburemeezi bwa guraamu igana na makumi ashatu; n'ebeeseni emwe y'efeeza ya guraamu makumi mushanju, nk'oku guraamu y'Omwanya Ogurikwera eri; byombi biijwire esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta kuba empongano y'esaano," 
Numbers7:20 orwabya rumwe rw'ezaabu rwa guraamu ikumi orwijwire obubaani; 
Numbers7:21 enimi emwe y'ekimasha, engondoore emwe y'entaama, empaya emwe nto y'entaama y'omwaka gumwe kuba ekitambo ky'okucwetsya;" 
Numbers7:22 empaya emwe y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi. 
Numbers7:23 Kandi ahabw'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe, enimi ibiri, engondoore itaano z'entaama, n'empaya itaano z'embuzi, n'empaya nto itaano z'entaama, ezihikize omwaka gumwe. Ebyo nibyo Netaneeli mwene Zuari yaatoizire." 
Numbers7:24 Aha kiro kya kashatu, haatoija Eliyaabu mwene Heloni, omwebembezi w'aba Zebuluuni." 
Numbers7:25 Ebi yaatoizire bikaba biri eshuhaani emwe y'efeeza ey'oburemeezi bwa guraamu igana na makumi ashatu; n'ebeeseni emwe y'efeeza ya guraamu makumi mushanju, nka guraamu y'Omwanya Ogurikwera oku eri; byombi biijwire esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta, kuba empongano y'esaano;" 
Numbers7:26 n'orwabya rw'ezaabu rw'oburemeezi bwa guraamu ikumi orwijwire obubaani. 
Numbers7:27 Yaataho enimi nto emwe, engondoore emwe y'entaama ey'omwaka gumwe kuba ekitambo ky'okucwetsya;" 
Numbers7:28 empaya emwe y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi. 
Numbers7:29 Kandi ahabw'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe: enimi ibiri, engondoore itaano z'entaama, empaya itaano z'embuzi, n'empaya nto itaano z'entaama ezihikize omwaka gumwe. Ebyo nibyo Eliyaabu mwene Heloni yaatoizire." 
Numbers7:30 Aha kiro kya kana, hakatoija Elizuuri mwene Shedeuri, omwebembezi w'Abareubeeni." 
Numbers7:31 Ebi yaatoizire nibyo ebi: Eshuhaani emwe y'efeeza y'oburemeezi bwa guraamu igana na makumi mushanju nk'oku guraamu y'Omwanya Ogurikwera eri; byombi biijwire esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta kuba empongano y'esaano. 
Numbers7:32 Yaatoija orwabya rumwe rw'ezaabu rwa guraamu ikumi, rwijwire obubaani," 
Numbers7:33 n'enimi nto emwe, n'engondoore y'entaama emwe, n'empaya nto y'entaama, ey'omwaka gumwe kuba ekitambo kicwekize;" 
Numbers7:34 n'empaya emwe y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi; 
Numbers7:35 kandi ahabw'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe, yaatoija enimi ibiri, engondoore itaano z'entaama empaya itaano z'embuzi, n'empaya nto itaano z'entaama, ezihikize omwaka gumwe. Ebyo nibyo Elizuri mwene Shedeuri yaatoizire." 
Numbers7:36 Aha kiro kya kataano, ni Shelumieli mwene Zurishadai, omwebembezi w'Abasimeoni." 
Numbers7:37 Omutoijo gwe gukaba eshuhaani emwe y'efeeza y'oburemeezi bwa guraamu igana na makumi ashatu, n'ebeeseni emwe y'efeeza ya guraamu makumi mushanju, nka guraamu y'Omwanya Ogurikwera oku eri; byombi biijwire esaano y'obunono ejwangizemu amajuta kuba empongano y'esaano;" 
Numbers7:38 orwabya rumwe rw'ezaabu rwa guraamu ikumi rwijwire obubaani; 
Numbers7:39 enimi emwe y'ekimasha, engondoore emwe y'entaama, empaya emwe nto ey'entaama y'omwaka gumwe kuba ekitambo kicwekize;" 
Numbers7:40 n'empaya emwe y'embuzi, kuba empongano y'ekibi." 
Numbers7:41 Kandi ahabw'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe: enimi ibiri, engondoore itaano z'entaama, empaya itaano z'embuzi, n'empaya nto itaano z'entaama, ezihikize omwaka gumwe. Ebyo nibyo Shelumieli mwene Zurishadai yaatoizire." 
Numbers7:42 Aha kiro kya mukaaga, haatoija Eliyasaafu mwene Deueli, omwebembezi w'aba Gaadi." 
Numbers7:43 Yaatoija eshuhaani emwe y'efeeza y'oburemeezi bwa guraamu igana na makumi ashatu: n'ebeeseni emwe y'efeeza ya guraamu makumi mushanju, nk'oku guraamu y'Omwanya Ogurikwera eri; byombi biijwire esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta, kuba empongano y'esaano;" 
Numbers7:44 orwabya rumwe rw'ezaabu orwa guraamu ikumi, rwijwire obubaani;" 
Numbers7:45 enimi emwe nto, engondoore emwe y'entaama y'omwaka gumwe kuba ekitambo kicwekize," 
Numbers7:46 n'empaya emwe y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi. 
Numbers7:47 Kandi ahabw'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe: enimi ibiri, engondoore itaano z'entaama, empaya itaano z'embuzi, n'empaya nto itaano z'entaama, ezihikize omwaka gumwe. Ogwo nigwo mutoijo gu Eliyasaafu mwene Deueli yaatoizire." 
Numbers7:48 Aha kiro kya mushanju, ni Elishaama mwene Amihuudi, omwebembezi w'Abaefuraimu." 
Numbers7:49 Akatoija eshuhaani emwe y'efeeza y'oburemeezi bwa guraamu igana na makumi ashatu; n'ebeeseni emwe y'efeeza ya guraamu makumi mushanju, nka guraamu y'Omwanya Ogurikwera oku yaabaire eri; byombi biijwire esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta kuba empongano y'esaano;" 
Numbers7:50 orwabya rumwe rw'ezaabu, rwa guraamu ikumi, rwijwire obubaani;" 
Numbers7:51 enimi emwe y'ekimasha, engondoore emwe y'entaama, n'empaya emwe nto y'entaama y'omwaka gumwe kuba eby'ekitambo kicwekize;" 
Numbers7:52 taho empaya emwe y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi. 
Numbers7:53 Reero ahabw'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe, yaatoija enimi ibiri n'engondoore itaano z'entaama, n'empaya itaano z'embuzi, n'empaya nto itaano z'entaama, ezihikize omwaka gumwe. Ebyo nibyo Elishaama mwene Amihuudi yaatoizire." 
Numbers7:54 Aha kiro kya munaana, hakatoija Gamalieli mwene Pedahuzuuri, omwebembezi w'aba Manaase." 
Numbers7:55 Ebi yaatoizire nibyo ebi: eshuhaani y'efeeza ey'oburemeezi bwa guraamu igana na makumi ashatu, n'ebeeseni emwe ya guraamu makumi mushanju z'oburemeezi bwa guraamu y'Omwanya Ogurikwera; byombi biijwire esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta kuba empongano y'esaano;" 
Numbers7:56 n'orwabya rumwe rw'ezaabu rwa guraamu ikumi orwijwire obubaani," 
Numbers7:57 n'enimi y'ekimasha, n'engondoore emwe y'entaama, n'empaya nto emwe y'entaama y'omwaka gumwe kuba ekitambo kicwekize;" 
Numbers7:58 n'empaya emwe y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi. 
Numbers7:59 Kandi ahabw'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe, yaatoija enimi ibiri, n'engondoore itaano z'entaama n'empaya itaano z'embuzi, n'empaya nto itaano z'entaama, ezihikize omwaka gumwe. Ebyo nibyo Gamalieli mwene Pedahuzuuri yaatoizire." 
Numbers7:60 Aha kiro kya mwenda, hakatoija Abidaani mwene Gideoni, omwebembezi w'Ababenyamiini." 
Numbers7:61 Yaatoija eshuhaani emwe y'efeeza y'oburemeezi bwa guraamu igana na makumi ashatu, n'ebeeseni emwe y'efeeza ya guraamu makumi mushanju, nka guraamu y'Omwanya Ogurikwera oku eri; byombi biijwire esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta kuba empongano y'esaano;" 
Numbers7:62 orwabya rumwe rw'ezaabu rwa guraamu ikumi, rwijwire obubaani;" 
Numbers7:63 enimi emwe nto, engondoore omwe y'entaama, n'empaya emwe nto y'entaama y'omwaka gumwe kuba eby'ekitambo kicwekize;" 
Numbers7:64 empaya emwe y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi. 
Numbers7:65 Kandi ahabw'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe, enimi ibiri, engondoore itaano z'entaama, empaya itaano z'embuzi; n'empaya itaano nto z'entaama ezihikize omwaka gumwe. Ebyo nibyo Abidaani mwene Gideoni yaatoizire." 
Numbers7:66 Aha kiro kya ikumi, hakatoija Ahiyezeeri mwene Amishadai, omwebembezi w'Abaadaani." 
Numbers7:67 Akatoija eshuhaani emwe y'efeeza y'oburemeezi bwa guraamu igana na makumi ashatu, n'ebeeseni emwe y'efeeza ya guraamu makumi mushanju z'oburemeezi bwa guraamu y'Omwanya Ogurikwera; byombi biijwire esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta kuba empongano y'esaano." 
Numbers7:68 Taho orwabya rw'ezaabu rwa guraamu ikumi orwijwire obubaani; 
Numbers7:69 enimi nto emwe, engondoore emwe y'entaama, empaya nto emwe y'entaama y'omwaka gumwe, kuba ekitambo kicwekize;" 
Numbers7:70 n'empaya emwe y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi. 
Numbers7:71 Kandi ahabw'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe, enimi ibiri, engondoore itaano z'entaama, empaya itaano z'embuzi n'empaya itaano nto z'entaama ezihikize omwaka gumwe. Ebyo nibyo Ahiyezeeri mwene Amishadai yaatoizire." 
Numbers7:72 Aha kiro kya ikumi na kimwe, hakatoija Pagieli mwene Okuraani, omwebembezi w'Abaasheri." 
Numbers7:73 Ebi yaatoizire byaba eshuhaani emwe y'efeeza, y'oburemeezi bwa guraamu igana na makumi ashatu, n'ebeeseni emwe ya guraamu makumi mushanju, nk'oku guraamu y'Omwanya Ogurikwera eri; byombi biijwire esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta kuba empongano y'esaano;" 
Numbers7:74 orwabya rumwe rw'ezaabu rwa guraamu ikumi, orwijwire obubaani;" 
Numbers7:75 n'enimi emwe y'ekimasha, n'engondoore emwe y'entaama n'empaya emwe nto y'entaama ey'omwaka gumwe kuba ekitambo kicwekize;" 
Numbers7:76 n'empaya emwe y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi. 
Numbers7:77 Reero ahabw'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe, yaatoija enimi ibiri n'engondoore itaano z'entaama, n'empaya itaano z'embuzi, n'empaya itaano nto z'entaama zihikize omwaka gumwe. Ebyo nibyo Pagieli mwene Okuraani yaatoizire." 
Numbers7:78 Aha kiro kya ikumi na bibiri, Ahiira mwene Enani, omwebembezi w'Abanafutaali niwe yaatoizire." 
Numbers7:79 Omutoijo gwe gwaba: eshuhaani emwe y'efeeza ey'oburemeezi bwa guraamu igana na makumi ashatu, n'ebeeseni emwe y'efeeza eya guraamu makumi mushanju, nka guraamu y'Omwanya Ogurikwera oku eri; byombi biijwire esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta kuba empongano y'esaano;" 
Numbers7:80 orwabya rumwe rw'ezaabu rwa guraamu ikumi, orwijwire obubaani," 
Numbers7:81 enimi emwe y'ekimasha, engondoore emwe y'entaama ey'omwaka gumwe kuba ekitambo kicwekize;" 
Numbers7:82 empaya emwe y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi. 
Numbers7:83 Kandi ahabw'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe, yaatoija enimi ibiri, engondoore itaano z'entaama, empaya itaano z'embuzi, n'empaya nto itaano z'entaama, ezihikize omwaka gumwe. Ebyo nibyo Ahiira mwene Enani yaatoizire." 
Numbers7:84 Egi niyo mitoijo yoona ei abeebembezi ba Isiraeli baatoizire, ahabw'okuhonga eitambiro aha izooba ri ryasiigiirweho amajuta: eshuhaani ikumi na ibiri z'efeeza, ebeeseni ikumi na ibiri z'efeeza, enyabya ikumi na ibiri z'ezaabu;" 
Numbers7:85 buri shuhaani y'efeeza eine oburemeezi bwa guraamu igana na makumi ashatu, na buri beeseni eine obwa guraamu makumi mushanju. Ebintu byona eby'efeeza byahitsya oburemeezi bwa guraamu enkumi ibiri na magana ana, nk'oku guraamu y'Omwanya Ogurikwera eri." 
Numbers7:86 Kandi enyabya ikumi na ibiri ez'ezaabu eziijwire obubaani, ez'oburemeezi bwa guraamu ikumi, buri rumwe, nka guraamu y'Omwanya Ogurikwera oku eri. Zoona enyabya z'ezaabu zikahitsya oburemeezi bwa guraamu igana na makumi abiri." 
Numbers7:87 Amatungo goona ag'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya gakaba enimi ikumi na ibiri engondoore z'entaama z'omwaka gumwe ikumi na ibiri, hamwe n'emitoijo yaazo y'esaano; kandi n'empaya z'embuzi ikumi na ibiri, ez'empongano y'ekibi." 
Numbers7:88 Reero amatungo goona ag'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe gaahika enimi makumi abiri na ina, engondoore z'entaama makumi mukaaga, empaya z'embuzi makumi mukaaga, n'empaya nto z'entaama, ez'omwaka gumwe, makumi mukaaga. Egyo niyo mitoijo ei baatoizire ahabw'okuhonga eitambiro aha izooba eri ryasiigiirweho amajuta." 
Numbers7:89 Reero Musa ku yaataahire omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu kugamba na Nyakubaho, yaahurira eiraka nirimugambira, niryema ahaiguru y'ekitebe ky'okusaasira ekyabaire kiri aha shanduukye y'endagaano, ahagati ya Bakeerubi bombi; haza ryagamba nawe." 
Numbers8:1 Mbwenu Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Numbers8:2 Gambira Arooni oti: Ku oraaze kutaho amatabaaza mushanju, oreebe ngu gaayakira ei ekikondo kyago kirikureeba." 
Numbers8:3 Arooni nawe yaatwaza atyo, yaataho amatabaaza kwakira omu maisho g'ekyo kikondo, nk'oku Mukama yaaragiire Musa." 
Numbers8:4 Kandi ekikondo ky'amatabaaza kikaba kiheesirwe kiti: kyona kikozirwe omu zaabu okwiha aha kibunu okuta aha mataagi; kyona kiheesirwe nk'oku Mukama yaayorekire Musa eky'okureeberaho; nawe yaaba nikwo yaakiheesesa. 
Numbers8:5 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers8:6 Iha Abaleevi omu Baisiraeli, obeeze." 
Numbers8:7 Mbwenu oku nikwo oraatwaze noobeeza: Obamiisiire amaizi g'okubeeza, kandi oboohereze bamwe omubiri gwabo gwona n'orumweiso; boozye ebijwaro byabo, beere." 
Numbers8:8 Bwanyima batware enimi y'ekimasha bagitoijereho esaano y'obunono ejwangiremu amajuta; naiwe otware endiijo nimi y'ekimasha, bibe empongano y'ekibi." 
Numbers8:9 Reero obamurikye omu maisho g'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, kandi oteeranire hamwe eihanga ryona ery'Abaisiraeli." 
Numbers8:10 Haza Abaleevi, ku oraabe noobamurikira Nyakubaho, Abaisiraeli babateho emikono." 
Numbers8:11 Mpaho Arooni abahongyere Nyakubaho, babe empongano ezongazongiibwe, erugire omu Baisiraeli; bagume nibakorera Nyakubaho omurimo gw'obuheereza." 
Numbers8:12 Bwanyima Abaleevi bate emikono yaabo aha mitwe y'enimi; emwe ogihongyere Nyakubaho, ebe empongano y'ekibi; n'endi ebe ekitambo kicwekize, kukarabirira Abaleevi." 
Numbers8:13 Kandi ku oraaheze kureeta Abaleevi omu maisho ga Arooni n'abatabani, obahongyere Nyakubaho, babe empongano ezongazongiibwe." 
Numbers8:14 Nikwo oraashoroore otyo Abaleevi omu Baisiraeli, bakaba abangye." 
Numbers8:15 Ebyo ku biraahwe, Abaleevi bataahe omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, bakoreremu omurimo gw'obuheereza, waaheza kubeeza n'okubahonga, bari empongano ezongazongiibwe." 
Numbers8:16 Mbaheereirwe kimwe kuruga omu Baisiraeli. Mbeetooraniire kuza omu mwanya gw'ebiigura-nda byona, emijigaijo y'Abaisiraeli boona." 
Numbers8:17 Manya emijigaijo ey'Abaisiraeli yoona n'eyangye, ey'abantu n'ey'enyamaishwa. Aha izooba ri naitiireho emijigaijo y'omuri Misiri nibwo naabeeyereza kuba abangye." 
Numbers8:18 Mbwenu Abaleevi nibo naayetungira omu mwanya gw'emijigaijo yoona ey'Abaisiraeli. 
Numbers8:19 Kandi naabaiha omu Baisiraeli, naabagabira Arooni n'abatabani, kuguma nibakorera Abaisiraeli omurimo gw'obuheereza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, n'okubakarabirira, harekye kubaho orufu omu Baisiraeli, baaba bairiire haihi Omwanya Ogurikwera." 
Numbers8:20 Okwo nikwo Musa na Arooni n'eihanga ryona ery'Abaisiraeli baatwarize Abaleevi. Nk'oku Mukama yaaragiire Musa ebikwatiraine n'Abaleevi byona, Abaisiraeli baaba nikwo baabatwaza." 
Numbers8:21 Abo Baleevi baayeyezaho ekibi, baayozya emyenda yaabo, reero Arooni yaabahonga: baaba empongano ezongazongyeirwe Nyakubaho, kandi yaabakarabirira kubeeza." 
Numbers8:22 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Abaleevi baataaha omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu kukora omurimo gwabo gw'obuheereza, nibareebererwa Arooni n'abatabani. Nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa ebikwatiraine n'Abaleevi, nabo nikwo baabatwarize." 
Numbers8:23 Kandi Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers8:24 Ebi n'ebikwatiraine n'Abaleevi: baryatandika kutaaha omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu kukora omurimo gw'obuheereza baahitsya emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano y'obukuru, n'okukiraho." 
Numbers8:25 Kandi ku barihitsya emyaka makumi ataano y'obukuru, barekye ogwo murimo gw'obuheereza, batagukora obundi;" 
Numbers8:26 kureka bagume bahwere beene waabo Abaleevi omu by'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, okurinda ebi bakwatsiibwe, kwonka batarikora omurimo gw'obuheereza. Okwo obe nikwo oraatebeekanise emirimo y'Abaleevi." 
Numbers9:1 Nyakubaho akagambirira Musa omu ihamba rya Sinaayi omu kwezi kw'okubanza okw'omwaka gwa kabiri barugire omu nsi ya Misiri, yaamugira ati:" 
Numbers9:2 Abaisiraeli bagume bakore omugyenzo gw'Okuhingurwaho omu bunaku bwakwo obwatairweho. 
Numbers9:3 Aha kiro kya ikumi na bina eky'oku kwezi, omu mwabazyo, mukore omugyenzo gwakwo omu bunaku obwatairweho, nk'oku ebyatairweho n'ebiragiro byakwo biri." 
Numbers9:4 Musa atyo agambira Abaisiraeli ku bashemereire kukora omugyenzo gw'Okuhingurwaho. 
Numbers9:5 Nabo omu kwezi kw'okubanza baakora omugyenzo gwakwo aha kiro kya ikumi na bina eky'okwo kwezi omu mwabazyo, omu ihamba rya Sinaayi, Abaisiraeli baakora byona, nk'oku Mukama yaaragiire Musa." 
Numbers9:6 Mbwenu hakaba hariho abantu batashemeire, ahabw'okukora aha mutumbi gw'omuntu, tibaabaasa kukora omugyenzo gw'Okuhingurwaho ahari eryo izooba. Batyo eryo izooba baija omu maisho ga Musa na Arooni," 
Numbers9:7 baamugira bati: Turi abatashemeire, ahabw'okukora aha mutumbi gw'omuntu. Kwonka shi, ahabw'enki nibatuzibira kuhongyera Nyakubaho ekitambo hamwe n'abandi Baisiraeli omu bunaku bwakyo obwatairweho?" 
Numbers9:8 Musa abagarukamu ati: Mube murekire, mbanze mpurire eki Mukama araabaragiire." 
Numbers9:9 Mpaho Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: 
Numbers9:10 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Omuntu weena omuriimwe nari ow'omu ruzaaro rwanyu, ku araabe atashemeire ahabw'okukora aha mutumbi, nainga ari hare omu rugyendo, nabwo obwo aitire Nyakubaho ekitambo ky'omugyenzo gw'Okuhingurwaho." 
Numbers9:11 Bagukore omu kwezi kwa kabiri, aha kiro kya ikumi na bina, omu mwabazyo. Bakirye n'omugaati ogutatumbisiibwe n'emboga zirikushaarira." 
Numbers9:12 Batarigira eki baatsigaho okuhitsya omu kasheeshe, nobu kwakuba okuhenda eigufa ryakyo. Bakore ogwo mugyenzo nibakuratira ebiragiro ebyatairweho ahabw'Okuhingurwaho." 
Numbers9:13 Reero omuntu oriba ashemeire kandi atari hare omu rugyendo ku arireka kukora omugyenzo gw'Okuhingurwaho, acuubwe omu ihanga rye ahabw'okutatambira Nyakubaho ekitambo omu bunaku byakyo obwatairweho. Ogwo muntu ekibi kye kiryamutukurira." 
Numbers9:14 Kandi ku hariba hariho omunyaihanga obashuuhuukiiremu, yaakorera Nyakubaho omugyenzo gw'Okuhingurwaho, agukore naakuratira eby'Okuhingurwaho ebyatairweho, hamwe n'ebiragiro byakwo. Mugire ekiragiro kimwe ahabw'omunyaihanga n'enzaarwa." 
Numbers9:15 Aha izooba ri baimukiizeho obutaaho, ekicu kikaija kyasangira Obutaaho eihema ry'eby'obuhamya; kandi omu mwabazyo kyaguma ahaiguru yaabwo, nikishusha omuriro, okuhitsya omu kasheeshe." 
Numbers9:16 Byagumizamu bityo: ekyo kicu nyomushana kisangira Obutaaho, kandi nyekiro kishusha omuriro." 
Numbers9:17 Ekicu ku kyabaire kiimuka aha ihema, Abaisiraeli baimutsya orugyendo, kandi kikigira ahi kyayemerera, Abaisiraeli baba niho baateera ensiisira." 
Numbers9:18 Abaisiraeli bakaba baimutsya orugyendo ahabw'okuragiirwa Mukama, kandi bateera ensiisira ahabw'okuragiira kwe. Omwanya gwona ogu ekicu kyabaire kiguma kiri aha butaaho, baguma omu rusiisira." 
Numbers9:19 Nangwa nobu ekyo kicu kyabaire kiguma ahaiguru y'obutaaho ebiro bingi, Abaisiraeli bakaba boorobera ekiragiro kya Nyakubaho, bareka kwimutsya orugyendo." 
Numbers9:20 Obundi kikaba kimara ebiro bikye ahaiguru y'Obutaho, nabo baguma omu rusiisira, nibakuratira eki Nyakubaho aragiire; na bwanyima baimutsya orugyendo, nibakuratira eki yaaragiira." 
Numbers9:21 Obundi ekyo kicu kikaba kigumaho, okwiha omu mwabazyo okuhitsya omu kasheeshe; reero kikiihwaho omu kasheeshe, baimutsya orugyendo; nari kigumaho nyomushana na nyekiro, reero kikiihwaho, nabo baimutsya orugyendo." 
Numbers9:22 Nobu ekicu kyabaire kimara ebiro bibiri, nari okwezi, nainga okukiraho, kiri ahaiguru y'obutaaho kitarugireho, Abaisiraeli bakaba baguma omu rusiisira, bareka kugyenda; kwonka kikiihwaho, baimutsya orugyendo." 
Numbers9:23 Nyakubaho ku yaabaire aragiira, bateera enkambi; kandi akiragiira, baimutsya orugyendo. Bakaguma niboorobera ekiragiro kya Nyakubaho, nk'oku yaabaire aragiira naabatumaho Musa." 
Numbers10:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers10:2 Kora enzamba ibiri z'efeeza; oziheeshe, ogume ozeetese ab'eri ihanga kuteerana, n'okuziragiiza ab'omu rusiisira kugyenda." 
Numbers10:3 Zombi ku ziraagume zaagamba, eihanga ryona rikuteeranireho aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Numbers10:4 Kwonka ku bariteera emwe yonka, obwo abeebembezi n'abakuru b'enganda za Isiraeli babe nibo baakuteeraniraho." 
Numbers10:5 Ku muriteera ey'akasirikiriro, ab'ensiisira z'ahari burugwa-izooba baimutsye orugyendo." 
Numbers10:6 Ku muriteera ey'akasirikiriro obwa kabiri, ab'ensiisira z'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo baimutsye. Enzamba y'akasirikiriro egume eteerwe baaza kwimutsya orugyendo." 
Numbers10:7 Eihanga ku ririba riri ery'okuteeranira hamwe, muziteere; kwonka mutariteera ez'akasirikiriro." 
Numbers10:8 Kandi batabani ba Arooni abahongyerezi babe nibo baaguma nibateera ezo nzamba. Ekyo kigume kiri ekiragiro ky'obutwire omuri baijukuru baanyu boona. 
Numbers10:9 Omu nsi yaanyu, ku murikuhurura kurwanisa abazigu barikubaita kubi, muteere enzamba z'akasirikiriro, Mukama Ruhanga waanyu abone kubaijuka, mukire ababisha baanyu." 
Numbers10:10 Aha biro byanyu by'okushemererwa, n'aha magyenyi gaanyu agaatairweho, n'aha kutandika kw'ameezi gaanyu, mugume muteere enzamba, nimutamba ebitambo byanyu ebicwekize, n'ebyokurya kumwe, nyowe Ruhanga waanyu mbone kubaijuka. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Numbers10:11 Omu mwaka gwa kabiri, omu kwezi kwa kabiri, aha kiro kya makumi abiri ky'okwo kwezi, ekicu kikaruga eruguru y'Obutaaho bw'eby'Obuhamya." 
Numbers10:12 Abaisiraeli baimutsya nibaruga omu ihamba rya Sinaayi, nk'oku okukuratana kw'orugyendo rwabo kuri. Reero ekicu kyayemerera omu ihamba rya Parani." 
Numbers10:13 Okwo nikwo kwimutsya orugyendo rwabo omurundi gw'okubanza, nk'oku Mukama yaaragiire, naabatumaho Musa." 
Numbers10:14 Ab'orurango rw'orusiisira rw'Abaayuda nibo baabandize kwimutsya omu bimbuuro byabo, eihe ryabo nirikurirwa Nahashooni mwene Aminadabu;" 
Numbers10:15 Netaneeli mwene Zuari naakurira eihe ry'ab'oruganda rw'Abaisakaari; 
Numbers10:16 n'eihe ry'ab'oruganda rw'Abaazebuluuni nirikurirwa Eliyaabu mwene Heloni. 
Numbers10:17 Mbwenu ku baaherize kukuura Obutaaho, beene Gereshooni na beene Meraari abarikubwekorera baimutsya orugyendo." 
Numbers10:18 Reero ab'orurango rw'orusiisira rw'Abaareubeeni baimutsya nk'ebimbuuro byabo oku birikukuratana, omukuru w'eihe ryabo ari Elizuuri mwene Shedeuri." 
Numbers10:19 Owaabaire naakurira eihe ry'ab'oruganda rw'Abaasimeoni akaba ari Shelumieli mwene Zurishadai; 
Numbers10:20 kandi eihe ry'oruganda rw'Abaagaadi nirikurirwa Eliyasaafu mwene Deueli. 
Numbers10:21 Bwanyima Abakohati baimutsya orugyendo beekoreire ebintu ebirikwera; Obutaaho bwabyarwa banu batakahikireyo. 
Numbers10:22 Mpaho ab'orurango rw'orusiisira rw'Abaefuraimu baimutsya nk'ebimbuuro byabo oku biri, owaabaire naakurira eihe ryabo ari Elishaama mwne Amihuudi." 
Numbers10:23 Eihe ry'ab'oruganda rw'Abaamanaase omukuru waaryo akaba ari Gamalieli mwene Pedahuzuuri; 
Numbers10:24 kandi eihe ry'ab'oruganda rw'Abaabenyamiini nirukurirwa Abidaani mwene Gideoni. 
Numbers10:25 Bwanyima haakurataho ab'orurango rw'ab'orusiisira rw'Abaadaani, abaabaire bari aha kibunu ky'ab'ezindi nsiisira nibabarinda, baimutsya orugyendo, nk'ebimbuuro byabo oku biri; eihe ryabo nirikurirwa Ahiyezeeri mwene Amishadai." 
Numbers10:26 Ab'eihe ry'ab'oruganda rw'Abaasheri, bakaba nibakurirwa Pagieli mwene Okuraani;" 
Numbers10:27 kandi omukuru w'ab'eihe ry'ab'oruganda rw'Abaanafutaali ari Ahiira mwene Enani. 
Numbers10:28 Okwo nikwo Abaisiraeli baakurataine nibagyenda, nk'oku amahe gaabo gaabaire gari, obu baimutsya orugyendo." 
Numbers10:29 Musa akagambira Hobabu mwene Reueli Omumidiyani, ishezaara, ati: Reeba, nitwimutsya orugyendo kuza omu nsi ei Nyakubaho yaagizire ati: Ndyagibaha. Mbwenu ija tugyendane, nitwija kukutwaza gye, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akaraganisa kukorera Abaisiraeli ebirungi." 
Numbers10:30 Hobabu amugira ati: Nyowe tindikugiza; niinyija kugaruka owaitu omu baitu. 
Numbers10:31 Musa amugarukamu ati: Naakweshengyereza, otatutsigaho, ahabw'okuba niiwe orikumanya ahi tushemereire kusiisira omu ihamba, kandi niiwe oraabe omwebembezi waitu." 
Numbers10:32 Reero ku oraagyende naitwe, ebirungi byona ebi Nyakubaho araatukorere, naitwe nitubikukorera." 
Numbers10:33 Batyo baimutsya, baruga aha rushozi rwa Nyakubaho, bagyenda orugyendo rw'ebiro bishatu eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho ebeebembeire, okumara ebiro bishatu, neebasherurira omwanya gw'okuhuumuriramu." 
Numbers10:34 Haza ku baabaire baruga omu rusiisira, ekicu kya Nyakubaho kibasangira nyomushana." 
Numbers10:35 Reero eshanduukye ku yaabaire eimutsya orugyendo, Musa agira ati: Ai Mukama, imuka, abazigu baawe bataataane, n'abarikukwanga bakuhungye." 
Numbers10:36 Eshanduukye ekihuumura, Musa agira ati: Ai Nyakubaho, garuka omu bukumi n'obukumi bw'Abaisiraeli." 
Numbers11:1 Bwanyima abantu bakeetomboita, ahabw'ebihikiirizi ebyabagweraire. Nyakubaho yaakihurira; haza ku yaakihuriire, yaagira ekiniga kingi, omuriro gwe gwabaakamu, gwacwekyereza ebicweka ebirikuhereerukayo omu rusiisira." 
Numbers11:2 Abantu nikwo kutakira Musa, nawe akashaba Nyakubaho, omuriro gukaraara." 
Numbers11:3 Omwanya ogwo nikyo gwayeteirwe Tabera, ahabw'okuba omuriro gwa Mukama gukabaakamu." 
Numbers11:4 Mbwenu omutwe gw'abanyamahanga abaabaire babatwiremu gukagomba enyama. Abaisiraeli nabo baagaruka kwetomboita, nibaborooga bati: Nangwa ku twakutunga enyama tukagirya!" 
Numbers11:5 Nitwijuka ebyenyanja bi twabaire turiira busha turi Misiri; taho ebihaaza n'emyongo n'amababi g'obutunguru, n'obutunguru na katunguricumu." 
Numbers11:6 Mbwenu reeba, amaani gatuhwairemu, kandi titwine kindi kyona, kureka egi maanu ei turikureeba." 
Numbers11:7 Emaanu ekaba eri nk'otujuma tw'omugusha, oturikushusha amakanca." 
Numbers11:8 Abantu bakaba bagyenda bagitorotoora, bagisa aha mengo, nari bagishekura omu shekuro, bagiteeka omu nyungu, bagikoramu otubanda, haza enura nk'otubumburi tu bateekyeise amajuta." 
Numbers11:9 Nyekiro orume ku rwabaire ruragarika omu rusiisira, emaanu egwa narwo." 
Numbers11:10 Musa ku yaahuriire abantu nibatonzya, buri muntu n'ab'eka ye nibarira aha miryango y'amahema gaabo, Mukama yaabagirira ekiniga kingi, na Musa yaaguubwa kubi munonga." 
Numbers11:11 Musa nikwo kubuuza Nyakubaho ati: Mbwenu nyowe omwiru waawe ontuzire ki, okabura kungirira embabazi, haza okaanyekoreza omutwaro gw'eri ihanga ryona?" 
Numbers11:12 Niinye naabakire enda y'aba bantu boona? Niinye naabazaire, waaza kungira oti: Bakiikirire aha kifuba, nk'oku omurezi akiikira omwana orikwonka, okuhitsya obu ndibahitsya omu nsi, ei waarahiire kuha baishebo?" 
Numbers11:13 Mbwenu nyowe enyama y'okugaburira aba bantu boona ngiihe hi? Reeba nibandirira, nibagira bati: Tuhe enyama, tugirye." 
Numbers11:14 Nyowe tindikubaasa aba bantu boona nyenka, n'omutwaro gu ntarikubaasa kwekorera." 
Numbers11:15 Ku oraabe nooyenda kuntwaza otyo, embu y'obwo ongirira embabazi, onyita, ndugaho, ndeka kureeba enaku." 
Numbers11:16 Nyakubaho yaagira Musa ati: Nteeranira abantu makumi mushanju omu bakuru b'Abaisiraeli, abu orikumanya ngu n'abakuru b'abantu, kandi abarikubategyeka; obareete aha ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, beemerereho naiwe." 
Numbers11:17 Naanye niinyija kushuuma, ngambireho naiwe; haza nyihe ekicweka ahari Mutima ou naakuhaire, nkibahe, bakukwatse oburemeezi bw'abo bantu, orekye kubwekorera wenka." 
Numbers11:18 Kandi obagambire oti: Mweyeze ahabw'eizooba rya nyencakare, haza nimwija kurya enyama. Manya mwarira Nyakubaho abahuriire, nimugira muti: N'oha oraatuhe enyama, tukagirya? Kandi muti: Omuri Misiri tukaba turi gye. Mbwenu Nyakubaho naija kubaha enyama, mugirye." 
Numbers11:19 Timurikwija kugiriira izooba rimwe, nari abiri, nari ataano, nari ikumi, nainga makumi abiri;" 
Numbers11:20 kureka okwezi kwona, okuhitsya obu eraabareetwe omu nyindo, ekabatama; ahabw'okuba mwagiire Nyakubaho obatuuramu, mwaririra omu maisho ge nimugira muti: Mbwenu tukaba twarugira ki Misiri?" 
Numbers11:21 Kwonka Musa abuuza ati: Abantu bu ntuuramu, nibahika obusiriira mukaaga abarikugyendesa ebigyere; haza waagira oti: Niinyija kubaha enyama bagiriire okwezi kwona." 
Numbers11:22 Mbwenu shi, nibaija kubaagirwa amasyo g'entaama n'ag'ente, gabahaazye? Nari ebyenyanja by'omu nyanja ku baakubibarundaanira bikaabahaazya?" 
Numbers11:23 Nyakubaho agarukamu Musa ati: Noogira ngu Nyowe Nyakubaho mbuzire obwekoro? Mbwenu noija kureeba eki naabaraganisa ku kiraabe nikiija kuhikiirira nari kitarikubakwo. 
Numbers11:24 Mpaho Musa ashohora agambira abantu ebi Nyakubaho yaagamba. Kandi ateeranira hamwe abashaija makumi mushanju ab'omu bakuru b'eihanga, abata omu myanya beehinguririza eihema." 
Numbers11:25 Bwanyima Nyakubaho ashuumira omu kicu, agamba nawe. Aiha ekicweka ahari Mutima ou yaabaire amuhaire, akiha abo bakuru makumi mushanju. Mutima ogwo ku yaabagiireho, baaragura, kwonka tibaakora batyo bundi." 
Numbers11:26 Mbwenu omu rusiisira hakaba hatsigairemu abashaija babiri, omwe naayetwa Elidaadi, kandi ondi naayetwa Medadi; nabo Mutima yaabazaho. Bakaba nibabarirwa omu baatoorainwe, kwonka batashohoire kuza aha ihema, batyo baaragurira omu rusiisira." 
Numbers11:27 Mpaho omutsigazi yairuka, yaabigambira Musa ati: Elidaadi na Medadi nibaragurira omu rusiisira." 
Numbers11:28 Reero Yoshwa mwene Nuuni, omuheereza wa Musa, ow'omu bashaija be entoore, agira ati: Mukama wangye Musa, bazibire!" 
Numbers11:29 Kwonka Musa amugira ati: Waagira eihari ahabwangye? Nkaabaasibwa ki abantu ba Nyakubaho boona baba abarangi, Nyakubaho abaha Mutima we!" 
Numbers11:30 Bwanyima Musa n'abo bakuru b'Abaisiraeli bagaruka omu rusiisira. 
Numbers11:31 Mbwenu hakaija omuyaga ogwohereziibwe Nyakubaho, gwareeta entiitiri zirikuruga aha nyanja, gwazigwisa haihi n'orusiisira okurwehinguririza buri rubaju, omu mwanya gu omuntu arikubaasa kugyenda eizooba ryona, kandi zaijurirana, okuruga aha nsi obwemi bwa mikono ebiri." 
Numbers11:32 Reero abantu baarenzya eizooba kandi baaseesa ekiro, n'eizooba ryona eryakuratsireho, nibashanguruza ezo ntiitiri. Owaarundaine nkye yaarundaana ebigyega ikumi; baazaanika zaayehinguririza orusiisira rwona." 
Numbers11:33 Egyo nyama ku yaabaire ekibari omu maino batakagifutaine, Nyakubaho yaabagirira ekiniga kingi, yaitsa abo bantu orufu rwingi munonga." 
Numbers11:34 Nikyo ogwo mwanya gwayeteirwe Kiiburotihataava, ahabw'okuba niyo baaziikire abantu abaitsirwe omururu." 
Numbers11:35 Bwanyima abo bantu baaruga Kiiburotihataava, baaza Hezerooti, baaba niyo baateera ensiisira." 
Numbers12:1 Miriyamu na Arooni bakagamba kubi ahari Musa, ahabw'omukazi Omukuushi ou yaabaire ashweire. Manya akaba ashweire Omukuushikazi." 
Numbers12:2 Baagira, bati: Beitu Ruhanga agambira omuri Musa wenka? Itwe shi tatugambiramu? Haza ekyo Nyakubaho yaakihurira." 
Numbers12:3 Mbwenu omushaija ogwo Musa akaba ari omucureezi okukira abantu boona abari omu nsi. 
Numbers12:4 Ahonaaho Nyakubaho yaagira Musa na Arooni na Miriyamu ati: Imwe mwenshatu nimwije aha ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu; nabo bonshatu bazayo. 
Numbers12:5 Nyakubaho ashuumira omu nyomyo y'ekicu, ayemerera aha muryango gw'eryo ihema, haza ayeta Arooni na Miriyamu; nabo bombi baija." 
Numbers12:6 Mpaho abagira ati: Nimuhurire ebi naaza kugamba. Omuriimwe ku haba harimu omurangi, Nyowe Nyakubaho mwemmanyisiza omu kworekwa, kandi ngambira nawe omu kirooto." 
Numbers12:7 Kwonka tikwo ntwaza ntyo Musa omuheereza wangye. We n'omwesigwa omu ka yangye yoona. 
Numbers12:8 We ngamba nawe butunu nitureebana, kutari mu nfumu, kandi areeba oku Nyowe Nyakubaho ndikushusha. Mbwenu ahabw'enki mutatiinire kugamba kubi aha muheereza wangye ogwo?" 
Numbers12:9 Nyakubaho atyo abagirira ekiniga kingi munonga, haza agyenda." 
Numbers12:10 Reero ekicu ku kyarugire aharuguru y'eihema, ahonaaho Miriyamu yaakwatwa ebibembe, yaayera nk'orubaare. Na Arooni ku anaga ati amaisho ahari Miriyamu, ashanga yaabembire." 
Numbers12:11 Arooni nikwo kugira Musa ati: Ai bambe mukama wangye, otatufubira ahabw'eki twakoresa obushema, tukacumura." 
Numbers12:12 K'arekye kuba nk'ekifu ekiruga omunda ya nyinakyo kijunzire orubaju rumwe. 
Numbers12:13 Mpaho Musa atakira Nyakubaho ati: Ai Ruhanga, naakweshengyereza, mukize." 
Numbers12:14 Kwonka Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: Ishe kuri yaamucwera amacwante aha maisho, takwitsirwe enshoni okumara ebiro mushanju? Mbwenu omurekye, bamute omu ngoonyo aheeru y'orusiisira okumara ebiro mushanju, reero bwanyima barumugaruremu." 
Numbers12:15 Miriyamu atyo bamuta omu ngoonyo aheeru y'orusiisira okumara ebiro mushanju, kandi abantu barereera kwimutsya orugyendo, okuhitsya obu baagarwire Miriyamu omu rusiisira." 
Numbers12:16 Ebyo ku byahwaire, abantu baimutsya orugyendo baaruga Hazerooti, baateera enkambi omu ihamba rya Parani." 
Numbers13:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers13:2 Tuma abantu baze kutata ensi ya Kanaani, ei ndikuha Abaisiraeli. Oihe omu buri ruganda rwa baishebo omushaija omwe omutume; kandi abe ari omwebembezi w'omuri orwo ruganda." 
Numbers13:3 Musa atyo abatuma bari omu ihamba rya Parani, nk'oku Mukama yaaragiire. Boona abaatumirwe bakaba bari abantu bakuru omu Baisiraeli." 
Numbers13:4 Kandi aga nigo maziina gaabo: Omu b'oruganda rwa Reubeeni, Shaamua mwene Zaakuri;" 
Numbers13:5 omu b'oruganda rwa Simeoni, Shafati mwene Hoori;" 
Numbers13:6 omu b'oruganda rwa Yuda, Kalebu mwene Yefuune;" 
Numbers13:7 omu b'oruganda rwa Isakaari, Igali mwene Yosefu;" 
Numbers13:8 omu b'oruganda rwa Efuraimu, Hoshea mwene Nuuni;" 
Numbers13:9 omu b'oruganda rwa Benyamiini, Paluti mwene Raafu;" 
Numbers13:10 omu b'oruganda rwa Zebuluuni, Gaadieli mwene Soodi;" 
Numbers13:11 omu b'oruganda rwa Yosefu (nikwo kugira ngu omu b'oruganda rwa Manaase), Gaadi mwene Suusi;" 
Numbers13:12 omu b'oruganda rwa Daani, Amieli mwene Geemaali;" 
Numbers13:13 omu b'oruganda rwa Asheri, Seturi mwene Mikaeli;" 
Numbers13:14 omu b'oruganda rwa Nafutaali, Nahibi mwene Vofisi;" 
Numbers13:15 omu b'oruganda rwa Gaadi, Geueli mwene Maaci." 
Numbers13:16 Ago nigo maziina g'abashaija bu Musa yaatumire kutata egyo nsi. Haza Musa yaayeta Hoshea mwene Nuuni eiziina Yoshwa. 
Numbers13:17 Musa yaabatuma kutata ensi ya Kanaani, kandi yaabagira ati: Mwinamukye, mutoore ogwa Negebu, reero mutembe ensi y'ebibungo." 
Numbers13:18 Mureebe oku egyo nsi eri, yaaba abantu abagitwiremu bari ab'amaani, nari abatagaine, nainga bari bakye nari baingi." 
Numbers13:19 Kandi n'ensi ei batwiremu ku eraabe eri nungi nari mbi; n'endembo zi batwiremu ku ziraabe ziri ensiisira, nari ebigo bigumire;" 
Numbers13:20 egyo nsi ku eraabe neeyeza, nari etarikweza; nainga ku eraabe eine ebibira, nari etabiine. Mube emanzi, mureete aha bijuma by'omuri egyo nsi. Haza obwo bunaku bukaba buri obw'eitogyera ry'emizaabibu." 
Numbers13:21 Batyo baagyenda, baatata egyo nsi, okwiha omu ihamba rya Ziini okuta Rehobu, haihi n'aharikutaahirwa omuri Hamati." 
Numbers13:22 Bainamuka, baaza Negebu, baahika Heburooni, ei Ahimaani na Sheshai na Talumai, baijukuru b'Abaanaki baabaire batwire. (Heburooni rukaba rumazire emyaka mushanju rwombekirwe, Zoani orw'omuri Misiri rutakombekirwe)." 
Numbers13:23 Mpaho baahika omu ruhanga rwa Eshekooli, baatemayo eitaagi ririho omugimba gw'ebijuma by'omuzaabibu, abashaija babiri baaguheeka aha mugamba; kandi baareeta amakomamahanga n'emitiini." 
Numbers13:24 Omwanya ogwo baagweta oruhanga rwa Eshekooli ahabw'omugimba ogu Abaisiraeli baatemireyo. 
Numbers13:25 Ku haahingwireho ebiro makumi ana, abo bashaija baagaruka, nibaruga kutata ensi." 
Numbers13:26 Baayetuurira Musa na Arooni n'eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli ryona, ahari Kadeshi omu ishamba rya Parani, baabareetera amakuru, hamwe n'eihanga ryona. Kandi baabooreka ebijuma bi baihire omuri egyo nsi." 
Numbers13:27 Baamugambira bati: Tukahika omu nsi ei waatutumiremu; neehimintika amate n'obwoki, kandi ebi nibyo bijuma byayo." 
Numbers13:28 Kwonka abantu abatwire omuri egyo nsi n'ab'amaani; n'endembo zaayo zeehinguririzibwe engo z'amabaare, kandi ni mpango munonga. Ekindi tukareebayo baijukuru b'Abaanaki." 
Numbers13:29 Abaamaleki batwire omu nsi ya Negebu; reero Abahiiti, Abayebusi n'Abaamori batwire omu nsi ey'ebibungo; kandi Abanyakanaani batwire aha rubaju rw'enyanja n'omu myegyeego ya Yorudaani." 
Numbers13:30 Kwonka Kalebu yaacureeza abantu abari omu maisho ga Musa, yaagira ati: Ka tuzeyo ahonaaho, tugikubuure, ahabw'okuba nitubaasiza kimwe kugisingura." 
Numbers13:31 Abu yaabaire agiireyo nabo baagira bati: Titurikubaasa kuzayo tukarwanisa abo bantu, ahabw'okuba nibatukiza amaani." 
Numbers13:32 Batyo baareetera Abaisiraeli enkuru mbi y'egyo nsi ei baatatsire, baabagira bati: Ensi ei twagiiremu kutata n'ensi erya abagitwiremu; n'abantu boona abu twareebireyo n'ebikaaka;" 
Numbers13:33 tukareebayo abantu ebikaaka, beene Anaki, abaakomookire aha Banefili. Tukeereeba turi nk'eseenene; haza kwo omu maisho gaabo nikwo twabaire turi." 
Numbers14:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, eihanga ryona ryaimutsya amaraka ryaborooga; abantu baamara ekiro kyona nibacura." 
Numbers14:2 Abaisiraeli boona baayetomboitera Musa na Arooni. Eihanga ryona ryabagira riti: Nangwa kuri twagwire omu nsi ya Misiri! Nari shi tukagwa omuri eri ihamba! 
Numbers14:3 Ahabw'enki Nyakubaho naatutwara omuri egyo nsi kumarirwayo rurara; abakazi baitu n'abaana baitu bakanyagirwayo; embu y'obwo titugarukayo Misiri? 
Numbers14:4 Batyo baagambirana bonka bati: Ka tweteereho omwebembezi tugarukye Misiri. 
Numbers14:5 Musa na Arooni nikwo kujuumara omu maisho g'ab'eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli abateeraniire aho boona. 
Numbers14:6 Reero Yoshwa mwene Nuuni na Kalebu mwene Yefuune, abaagyenzire n'abaagiire kutata egyo nsi, baataagura ebi bajwaire," 
Numbers14:7 baagambira eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli ryona bati: Ensi ei twarabiremu kugitata, n'ensi nungi okutakareebwaga." 
Numbers14:8 Nyakubaho ku araabe naakitusiimira, naija kugituhitsyamu, atuhe egyo nsi erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki." 
Numbers14:9 Mbwenu imwe murekye kugomera Nyakubaho, kandi mutatiina abantu b'omuri egyo nsi; ahabw'okuba n'egabo yaitu. Ekibaire nikibarinda kirugireho, kandi Nyakubaho ari hamwe naitwe. N'ahabw'ekyo mutabatiina!" 
Numbers14:10 Ab'eihanga ryona baagambirana kubateera amabaare. Kwonka omuri ako kaanya, Nyakubaho yaabonekyera Abaisiraeli boona aha ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu aine ekitiinisa." 
Numbers14:11 Yaagira Musa ati: Aba bantu baryaherera hi kungaya? Kandi baryahitsya hi kutaanyikiriza, nobu ndaabe mbakoreiremu obwo bumanyiso bwona?" 
Numbers14:12 Mbwenu naaza kubaitsa orufu, mbaakye obuhunguzi, haza iwe nkwihemu eihanga ririkubakiza obwingi n'amaani." 
Numbers14:13 Kwonka Musa yaagira Nyakubaho ati: Ku oraakore otyo, Abanyamisiri nibaija kukihurira. Manya aba bantu niiwe waababaihiremu n'amaani gaawe." 
Numbers14:14 Haza nibaija kukigambira abatwire omuri egyo nsi. Ai Nyakubaho, bakahurira ku otuura omuri aba bantu ahabw'okuba iwe Nyakubaho obeeyoreka butunu; ekicu kyawe kyemerera ahaiguru yaabo, naiwe obeebembera nyomushana ori omu nyomyo y'ekicu, kandi nyekiro ori omu y'omuriro." 
Numbers14:15 Mbwenu ku oraite aba bantu nk'orikwita omuntu omwe, obwo amahanga agaahuriire okurangaanwa kwawe nigaija kugira gati:" 
Numbers14:16 Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuremwa kuhitsya abo bantu omu nsi ei yaabaraganiise kubaha, nikyo abacwekyerereize omu ihamba." 
Numbers14:17 Mbwenu naakweshengyereza, amaani gaawe, Nyakubaho, ka gabe maingi, nk'oku waaraganiise noogira oti:" 
Numbers14:18 Nyakubaho tarahuka kugira kiniga, kandi agira rukundo etahararuka. Asaasira ebibi n'ebicumuro, kwonka taitira riisho omuntu weena oine orubanja, ahabw'okuba afubira abaana naabatura ebibi bya baishenkurubo, okuhitsya aha b'oruzaaro rwa kashatu n'orwa kana." 
Numbers14:19 Mbwenu naakweshengyereza, saasira aba bantu ebibi byabo, nka rukundo yaawe enyingi etahararuka oku eri; kandi nk'oku waasaasiire aba bantu okwiha obu baaruga Misiri n'okuhitsya hati." 
Numbers14:20 Bwanyima Nyakubaho yaagira Musa ati: Naabasaasira nk'oku wanshaba," 
Numbers14:21 kwonka buzimazima nk'oku mbaho, kandi nk'oku egi nsi yoona eriijura ekitiinisa kyangye, nyowe Nyakubaho," 
Numbers14:22 omuri abo bantu abaareebire ekitiinisa kyangye n'obumanyiso obu naakoreire omuri Misiri n'omu ihamba, haza bakangyeza emirundi egi ikumi, kandi bakanga kukuratira ebi ndikugamba," 
Numbers14:23 tihariho n'omwe orireeba ensi ei naarahiire kuha baishebo, kandi tihariho n'omwe omu bangayire origireeba," 
Numbers14:24 kureka omwiru wangye Kalebu, ahabw'okuba we aine ogundi mutima, kandi ankuratiriire kimwe. Ndyamuhitsya omu nsi ei yaagiiremu, n'abaijukuru bagitungye." 
Numbers14:25 Mbwenu nk'oku Abaamaleki n'Abanyakanaani batwire omu mpanga, nyencakare muhindukye, mutoore ogw'eihamba, nimugarura ogurikuza aha Nyanja Erikutukura." 
Numbers14:26 Reero Nyakubaho yaagambira Musa na Arooni ati: 
Numbers14:27 Eri ihanga risiisikaire riryaherera hi kuunyetomboitera? Mperize kuhurira okwetomboita kw'Abaisiraeli oku barikuunyetomboitera. 
Numbers14:28 Mubagambire muti: Nyakubaho agizire ati: Nk'oku mbaho, ebi mugambire mbahuriire, naanye nikwo ndaabagire." 
Numbers14:29 Emitumbi yaanyu n'ey'okugwa omuri eri ihamba; kandi omu baabazirwe boona, okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi abiri y'obukuru n'okukiraho abaanyetomboiteire," 
Numbers14:30 tihariho n'omwe orihika omuri egyo nsi ei naarahiire ngu ndyagibaha mugituuremu, kureka Kalebu mwene Yefuune na Yoshwa mwene Nuuni." 
Numbers14:31 Kwonka abaana baanyu abato abu mwagizire ngu baryaba omunyago, ndyagibahitsyamu, bamanye egyo nsi ei mugayire." 
Numbers14:32 Haza imwe emitumbi yaanyu egwe omuri eri ihamba," 
Numbers14:33 n'abaana baanyu barimaremu emyaka makumi ana nibariisa entaama, kandi babonabone ahabw'okuteesiga kwanyu, okuhitsya obu omutumbi ogurihereeruka aha mitumbi yaanyu guririgangaramiramu." 
Numbers14:34 Nk'oku ebiro makumi ana ebi mwamazire nimutata egyo nsi birikwingana, mbwenu ekiro kimwe nikiija kurugwamu omwaka; mumare emyaka makumi ana mukiine orubanja rw'ekyo kibi, haza mumanye ku ngwirwe kubi." 
Numbers14:35 Nyowe Nyakubaho, niinye naayegambira! Buzimazima niinyija kukikora aha b'eihanga eri erisiisikaire ryona, abeeteeraine kumpakanisa; n'ab'okuhwera omuri eri ihamba, bafeeremu." 
Numbers14:36 Abo bantu bu Musa yaatumire kutata ensi ku baagarukire baagamba enkuru mbi ahari egyo nsi, baareetera eihanga ryona kwetomboitera Nyakubaho." 
Numbers14:37 Nyakubaho nikwo kubateeza orufu, bakafa." 
Numbers14:38 Kwonka omu baagiire kutata egyo nsi, Yoshwa mwene Nuuni na Kalebu mwene Yefuune nibo baagumireho bahuriire." 
Numbers14:39 Musa ku yaagambiire Abaisiraeli ebi Nyakubaho agambire, baacura munonga." 
Numbers14:40 Reero baimuka kare omu kasheeshe, baimutsya orugyendo kuza omu nsi y'ebibungo, nibagira bati: Mbwenu reeba turi aha, ka tuze omu kyanga ki Nyakubaho yaaturaganiise. Mbwenu nitwemera ku tucumwire." 
Numbers14:41 Kwonka Musa yaabagira ati: Ahabw'enki nimwanga kworobera eki Nyakubaho aragiire? Manya timwine karungi ku muraihemu! 
Numbers14:42 Mutainamukayo, abazigu batakaabaitirayo, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho tari muriimwe." 
Numbers14:43 Manya nimwija kubugabuganirayo Abaamaleki n'Abanyakanaani, babaitse rurara, ahabw'okuba muteishukire mwareka kukuratira Nyakubaho. Nawe tarikwija kuba hamwe naimwe." 
Numbers14:44 Kwonka bo baagira ebihagi, bainamuka omu nsi y'ebibungo, haza eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho, nobu yaakuba Musa, tibyaruga mu rusiisira." 
Numbers14:45 Reero Abaamaleki n'Abanyakanaani abatwire omuri egyo nsi y'ebibungo baashuuma, baabasingura, baagyenda bababingire baabahitsya Horuma." 
Numbers15:1 Mukama akagira Musa ati: 
Numbers15:2 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Ku murihika omu nsi ei ndaabahe kutuuramu," 
Numbers15:3 mwatoijera Nyakubaho ekitambo ky'okwokibwa, nari eky'okucwetsya, nainga eki mwihire omu busyo bw'ente nari bw'entaama, kusiguura eki mwasigire, nainga shi kiri omutoijo gw'okwekundira, nari eky'amagyenyi gaanyu agaatairweho, kurugiramu Nyakubaho ekisooroora ky'okumugwisa gye," 
Numbers15:4 obwo orireeta omutoijo gwe aryatoijera Nyakubaho esaano ya kimwe kya ikumi ky'encuro y'obunono," 
Numbers15:5 na viino y'omutoijo gw'ebyokunywa ya kimwe kya kana ky'egaloni. Ebyo mugume mubiteekateekye hamwe n'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya nari ekindi kitambo, ahari buri mwana gw'entaama," 
Numbers15:6 nari aha mpaya y'entaama. Muteekateekyereho omutoijo gw'esaano ya bibiri bya ikumi by'encuro y'obunono, ejwangiremu kimwe kya kashatu ky'egaloni y'amajuta." 
Numbers15:7 Kandi ahabw'omutoijo gw'ebyokunywa, mutoije kimwe kya kashatu ky'egaloni ya viino kuba omugaju gurikugwisa gye Nyakubaho." 
Numbers15:8 Reero ku muriteekateeka enimi kuba ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, nari ekindi kitambo kusiguura ebi musigire, nari okubonereza Nyakubaho ebitambo by'okurya kumwe," 
Numbers15:9 obwo egyo nimi omuntu agitoijereho esaano ya bishatu bya ikumi by'encuro y'obunono, ejwangiibwemu kimwe kya kabiri ky'egaloni y'amajuta." 
Numbers15:10 Kandi ahabw'omutoijo gw'ebyokunywa, mutoije kimwe kya kabiri ky'egaloni ya viino kuba ekitambo ky'okwokibwa kurugwamu ekisooroora kirikugwisa gye Nyakubaho." 
Numbers15:11 Okwo nikwo biraagume nibikorwa ahari buri nimi, empaya, nari aha buri mpaya nto z'entaama nainga z'embuzi." 
Numbers15:12 Nk'obwingi bw'ebitambo bi mwateekateeka oku buri, omubaro gw'ebi murikutoijera ahari buri kimwe gube nikwo gwaingana." 
Numbers15:13 Boona enzaarwa bagume bakore batyo baaba nibatoija ebitambo by'okwotsya, eby'ekisooroora kirikugwisa gye Mukama." 
Numbers15:14 Kandi omunyaihanga ku ariba abashuuhuukiiremu, nainga ondiijo weena obatwiremu omu busingye bwanyu bwona, yaayenda kutoijera Nyakubaho ekitambo ky'okwokibwa kuba ekisooroora ky'okumugwisa gye, nawe atwaze nk'oku murikukora." 
Numbers15:15 Ahabw'eihanga ryona habeho ekiragiro kimwe ekibateereirweho, imwe n'omunyaihanga obashuuhuukiiremu; kibe ekiragiro ky'obutwire omu busingye bwanyu bwona. Nk'oku muri, n'omushuuhuuki nikwo araabe omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Numbers15:16 Imwe n'omunyaihanga obashuuhuukiiremu muri ab'okutegyekwa ekiragiro kimwe. 
Numbers15:17 Nyakubaho kandi yaagira Musa ati: 
Numbers15:18 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Ku murihika omu nsi ei ndikubatwaramu," 
Numbers15:19 mwarya ebyokurya bwamwo, mureetere Nyakubaho omutoijo." 
Numbers15:20 Aha isyanga ri muribanza kusyangirira mutoijereho Nyakubaho akabanda k'omugaati, kabe omutoijo. Mukareete nk'omutoijo ogurugire omu ihuuriro." 
Numbers15:21 Aha isyanga ryanyu ry'okubanza, mugume mwihireho Nyakubaho eky'okumutoijera omu busingye bwanyu bwona." 
Numbers15:22 Kwonka ku murishobya, mutaakuratira biragiro byona ebi Nyakubaho yaahaire Musa," 
Numbers15:23 byona ebi yaabaragiire amubatumireho okwiha aha izooba ri Nyakubaho yaaheereireho ebiragiro bikagumizamu omu nzaaro zaanyu zoona," 
Numbers15:24 mbwenu ekicumuro ku kiriba kitakozirwe nkana, eihanga ryona ritaakimanya, eryo ihanga rihongye enimi y'ekimasha kuba ekitambo kicwekize ky'ekisooroora kirikugwisa gye Nyakubaho. Bakiteho omutoijo gw'esaano n'ogw'ebyokunywa, nk'oku ekiragiro kiri, kandi n'empaya emwe y'embuzi, kuba empongano y'ekibi." 
Numbers15:25 Reero omuhongyerezi akarabirire ab'eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli boona, basaasirwe; ahabw'okuba ekyo kibaire kiri ekicumuro, nikyo bareeteire Nyakubaho empongano eyokiibwe omu muriro, bakamureetera n'empongano y'ekibi kyabo ahabw'ekyo kishobyo." 
Numbers15:26 Mbwenu obwo eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli ryona riryasaasirwa, hamwe n'omunyaihanga obashuuhuukiiremu; ahabw'okuba ab'eihanga ryona nibaba babariirwe ekyo kicumuro." 
Numbers15:27 Reero omuntu omwe ku arikora ekibi atakimanyire, ahongye omwagazi gw'embuzi gw'omwaka gumwe, gube empongano y'ekibi." 
Numbers15:28 Mpaho omuhongyerezi akarabire Mukama ahabw'ogwo muntu ocumwire. Ekyo kibi yaaba atakikozire nkana, kandi baamukarabirira naasaasirwa." 
Numbers15:29 Mugume mugire eiteeka rimwe ahabw'otakozire ekibi nkana, ori enzaarwa omu Baisiraeli, n'ori omunyaihanga obashuuhuukiiremu." 
Numbers15:30 Kwonka omuntu okora ekibi nkana, yaaba ari enzaarwa nari omushuuhuuki, aba agwisize kubi Nyakubaho; ogwo muntu acuubwe omu ihanga." 
Numbers15:31 Ahabw'okugaya ekigambo kya Nyakubaho n'okuhenda ekiragiro kye, ogwo muntu acwerwe kimwe, ekibi kye kimugumeho." 
Numbers15:32 Abaisiraeli ku baabaire bari omu ihamba, baashanga omuntu naasheenya enku aha kiro kya Sabato." 
Numbers15:33 Reero abaamureebire naasheenya, baamutwarira Musa na Arooni n'eihanga ryona." 
Numbers15:34 Baamuta ah'okumurindira, ahabw'okuba bakaba batakamanyire oku baraamugire." 
Numbers15:35 Mpaho Nyakubaho yaagira Musa ati: Ogwo muntu aitwe, ab'eihanga ryona bamuteerere amabaare aheeru y'orusiisira." 
Numbers15:36 Ab'eihanga ryona baamutwara aheeru y'orusiisira, baamuteera amabaare, yaafa, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa." 
Numbers15:37 Nyakubaho yaagira Musa ati: 
Numbers15:38 Gambira Abaisiraeli, obaragiire bagume babaziire ebijwengye aha mikugiro y'ebijwaro byabo omu busingye bwabo bwona; kandi aha kijwengye ky'aha buri mukugiro bateho akahuuzi ka bururu." 
Numbers15:39 Ekyo kibabeere ekijwengye ki muraagume nimureebaho, mukaijuka ebiragiro bya Mukama mukabyorobera. Mutarikuratira ebi emitima yaanyu n'amaisho gaanyu birikubeetengyesa, bikabareetera kururuuha." 
Numbers15:40 Mutyo mugume nimwijuka kandi nimukuratira ebiragiro byangye byona, n'okuba abarikwera ahari Ruhanga waanyu." 
Numbers15:41 Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu owaabaihire omu nsi ya Misiri, ngu mbe Ruhanga waanyu. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Numbers16:1 Mbwenu Koora mwene Izihaari mwijukuru wa Kohati mwene Leevi, na Datani na Abiraamu beene Eliyaabu, na Oni mwene Peleti, beene Reubeeni," 
Numbers16:2 bakatwara abantu, baayemerera omu maisho ga Musa, bakwataniise n'abantu bamwe b'omu Baisiraeli, abeebembezi b'eihanga magana abiri na makumi ataano, abaatoorainwe omu bateeraniire aho, abashaija rugambwa." 
Numbers16:3 Baayeteerana kugomera Musa na Arooni, baabagira bati: Mwetungwire, mwarengyesereza! Manya abantu b'eihanga eri boona n'abarikwera, na Nyakubaho ari ahagati yaabo. Mbwenu nimwetunguurira ki aha bantu b'eihanga rya Nyakubaho?" 
Numbers16:4 Ekyo Musa ku yaakihuriire, yaayetuura aha nsi ajuumaire;" 
Numbers16:5 yaagira Koora na bagyenzi be boona ati: Nyencakare omu kasheeshe, Nyakubaho naija kworeka ori owe, kandi ori orikwera, haza amwirize haihi nawe. Ogwo ou araatoorane, niwe araikirize kumuhika haihi." 
Numbers16:6 Mbwenu mugire muti: Iwe Koora na bagyenzi baawe boona, mutware ebyoterero" 
Numbers16:7 mubiteho omuriro, haza omu kasheeshe mubyoterereho omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. Reero omuntu ou Nyakubaho araatoorane, niwe araabe orikwera. Imwe beene Leevi 'mwe, ebishi mwetungwire mwarengyesereza!" 
Numbers16:8 Reero Musa agira Koora ati: Imwe beene Leevi 'mwe, mbwenu nimuhurire:" 
Numbers16:9 nimugira ngu n'ekintu kikye ahariimwe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli kubashoroora omu b'eihanga rya Isiraeli, akabeehitsya kukora omurimo gw'obuheereza omu butaaho bwe, n'okwemerera omu maisho g'abantu b'eihanga ryona kubaheereza," 
Numbers16:10 kandi akabeehitsya haihi, hamwe na beene waanyu boona Abaleevi? Mbwenu kandi nimwenda obuhongyerezi nabwo?" 
Numbers16:11 N'ahabw'ekyo iwe na bagyenzi baawe boona, ou mweteeraine kugomera ni Nyakubaho. Mbwenu Arooni ou murikwetomboitera niwe oha?" 
Numbers16:12 Reero Musa yaatuma ku beeta Datani na Abiraamu beene Eliyaabu. Nabo baamutumaho bati: Titurikwija! 
Numbers16:13 Mbwenu iwe nookyeeta ekintu kikye kutwiha omu nsi erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki, kwija kutwitira omu ihamba, haza okatwehinduraho omukama?" 
Numbers16:14 Ekindi, totuhikize mu nsi erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki, nobu kwakuba okutuha ebibanja n'emisiri y'emizaabibu, ngu bibe ebyaitu by'empungurano. Mbwenu abo bantu nooyenda kubakwata aha maisho? Titurikwijayo." 
Numbers16:15 Musa atyo agira ekiniga kingi, agira Nyakubaho ati: Otaikiriza empongano zaabo. Tinkatwaraga kintu kyabo kyona, nobu yaakuba endogoya, kandi tihariho muntu n'omwe omuribo ou ndakozire kubi." 
Numbers16:16 Mpaho Musa agira Koora ati: Nyencakare, iwe na bagyenzi baawe boona mwije omu maisho ga Nyakubaho; iwe nabo hamwe na Arooni." 
Numbers16:17 Buri omwe omuriimwe atware ekyoterero kye akiteho obubaani. Kandi buri omwe omuriimwe areete ekyo kyoterero kye omu maisho ga Nyakubaho; ebyoterero magana abiri na makumi ataano; kandi naiwe na Arooni buri muntu n'ekyoterero kye. 
Numbers16:18 Mpaho buri muntu atwara ekyoterero kye, babitaho omuriro, babishukaho obubaani, beemerera aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, hamwe na Musa na Arooni." 
Numbers16:19 Koora agaruka ateeranira hamwe ab'eihanga ryona aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, nibareebana nabo. Haza boona abaabaire bateeraniire aho ekitiinisa kya Nyakubaho kyababonekyera." 
Numbers16:20 Reero Nyakubaho yaagambira Musa na Arooni ati: 
Numbers16:21 Nimurugye omuri aba bantu, mbone kubacwekyereza ahonaaho." 
Numbers16:22 Nabo baagwa bajuumaire, baagira bati: Ai Ruhanga, obukomooko bw'amagara, mbwenu omuntu omwe ku araakore ekibi, ogirire eihanga ryona ekiniga?" 
Numbers16:23 Na Nyakubaho yaagira Musa ati: 
Numbers16:24 Gambira ab'eihanga ryona oti: Murugye aha maju g'aba Koora na Datani na Abiraamu. 
Numbers16:25 Ahonaaho Musa aimuka, agyenda ahika Datani na Abiraamu; n'abakuru omu Baisiraeli bamukurata." 
Numbers16:26 Mpaho agambira eihanga ryona ati: Naabeeshengyereza, murugye aha mahema g'aba bantu babi, kandi mutagira ekyabo kyona eki mwakoraho, mutakaacwekyerezibwa nimuturwa ebibi byabo." 
Numbers16:27 Nabo baruga aha mihegyeyo y'amaju g'aba Koora na Datani na Abiraamu. Datani na Abiraamu nabo bashohora, beemerera aha miryango y'amahema gaabo hamwe n'abakazi baabo na batabani baabo n'obwana bwabo." 
Numbers16:28 Musa agira ati: Aha niho muraamanyire ku Nyakubaho yantumire kukora ebi byona, kandi ku ntabikora habwangye." 
Numbers16:29 Aba bantu ku baakufa, baitwa orufu orwita abantu, nari ku baakugwerwa akagwe akagwera abantu boona, biri Mukama tarantumire." 
Numbers16:30 Kwonka Nyakubaho ku araakore ekitakareebwaga, ensi yaayashamya akanwa yaabamira hamwe n'ebyabo byona, baashuuma okuzimu owa Nyamuteza bahuriire, obwo nibwo muraamanye ku abo bantu bagayire Nyakubaho." 
Numbers16:31 Musa ku yaabaire naakiheza ati ebi yaagamba, eitaka ri baabaire beemereireho ryashatuka;" 
Numbers16:32 ensi yaayashama, yaabamira n'amaka gaabo goona n'abantu ba Koora boona hamwe n'ebintu byabo byona." 
Numbers16:33 Batyo n'ebyabo byona baashuuma okuzimu owa Nyamuteza bahuriire, eitaka ryabashweka, baacwekyerera, baabura omu ihanga." 
Numbers16:34 Abaisiraeli abaabaire babeehinguririze, banu ku baaboroogire, baahunga nibagira bati: Naitwe ensi etakaatumira!" 
Numbers16:35 kandi ahonaaho omuriro gwaruga ahari Nyakubaho, gwacwekyereza abantu magana abiri na makumi ataano, abaabaire nibootera obubaani." 
Numbers16:36 Bwanyima Nyakubaho yaagira Musa ati: 
Numbers16:37 Gambira Eleazaari mwene Arooni omuhongyerezi, ashahure ebyoterero omu kibabo ky'omuriro, na bwanyima agutaataanise oku n'oku, ahabw'okuba n'ebirikwera." 
Numbers16:38 Ebyoterero by'abo bantu abakozire ekibi kikabarugiramu okufa, mubiheeshemu emitanda y'okushweka eitambiro, ahabw'okuba baabihongyera Nyakubaho, n'ahabw'ekyo n'ebirikwera. Bigume biri akamanyiso aha Baisiraeli." 
Numbers16:39 Eleazaari omuhongyerezi atwara ebyoterero by'omuringa, ebi abaayokiibwe baahongire, abanaguuzi babiheeshamu eky'okushweka eitambiro," 
Numbers16:40 kuguma nikiijutsya Abaisiraeli ku omuntu weena otari muhongyerezi w'omu baijukuru ba Arooni atashemereire kwirira haihi, akootera obubaani omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, ngu atakaaba nka Koora na bagyenzi be, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaagambiire Eleazaari, naamutumaho Musa." 
Numbers16:41 Kwonka omu kasheeshe kaakuratsireho, ab'eihanga ryona ery'Abaisiraeli baayetomboitera Musa na Arooni, bati: Mwitiise abantu ba Nyakubaho." 
Numbers16:42 Ab'eryo ihanga ku baateeraine kutonganisa Musa na Arooni, baahinduka nibareeba ei eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu riri. Haza ahonaaho ekicu kyarishweka, ekitiinisa kya Mukama kyaboneka." 
Numbers16:43 Musa na Arooni baija omumaisho g'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu. 
Numbers16:44 Nyakubaho yaagira Musa ati: 
Numbers16:45 Murugye omuri aba bantu, haza mbacwekyereze omu kaanya kakye. Nabo batyo bajuumara aha nsi." 
Numbers16:46 Reero Musa agambira Arooni ati: Kwata ekyoterero kyawe okiteho omuriro gw'aha itambiro, okiteho obubaani, haza okitware ahonaaho omuri abo bantu obakarabirire. Manya kashanga yaaruga ahari Nyakubaho, orufu rwatandika." 
Numbers16:47 Arooni atyo akitwara, nk'oku Musa yaamuragiira, airuka, ahika ahagati y'ahi bateeraniire. Haza obwo orufu rushangwa rwatandikire omu bantu. Mpaho ata obubaani aha kyoterero, abakarabirira." 
Numbers16:48 Ayamerera ahagati y'abaafa n'abahuriire, orufu rurekyera aho." 
Numbers16:49 Mbwenu obwo abaitsirwe orufu bakahika akakumi kamwe n'enkumi ina na magana mushanju, otabariiremu abaafiire ahabwa Koora." 
Numbers16:50 Orufu ku rwayemereziibwe, Arooni yaagaruka ahi Musa yaabaire ari, aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Numbers17:1 Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Numbers17:2 Gambira Abaisiraeli, kandi obaiheho enkoni, emwe omu buri muryango gwa baishenkurubo. Oziihe aha beebembezi baabo, nookuratira emiryango ya baishenkurubo; enkoni ikumi na ibiri. Ohandiikye eiziina rya buri muntu aha nkoni ye," 
Numbers17:3 kandi ohandiikye eiziina rya Arooni aha nkoni eya Leevi, ahabw'okuba omukuru wa buri muryango gwa baishenkurubo naija kugira enkoni emwe." 
Numbers17:4 Bwanyima ozite omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu omu maisho g'eby'obuhamya, ahi mbugabuganira naiwe." 
Numbers17:5 Enkoni y'omuntu ou ndaatoorane neija kugina, mbone kweihaho okwetomboita kw'Abaisiraeli oku barikubeetomboitera." 
Numbers17:6 Musa atyo abigambira Abaisiraeli. Abeebembezi baabo boona bamuha enkoni, buri mwebembezi enkoni emwe, nk'oku emiryango ya baishenkurubo eri, enkoni ikumi na ibiri; n'enkoni ya Arooni ezirimu." 
Numbers17:7 Musa azita omu maisho ga Nyakubaho omu ihema ry'eby'obuhamya. 
Numbers17:8 Mbwenu omu kasheeshe kaakuratsireho, Musa ataaha omu ihema ry'eby'obuhamya, haza ashanga enkoni ya Arooni ey'ab'omuryango gwa Leevi, eginire, etookire, erabize kandi eyanire amatunguru gahiisize." 
Numbers17:9 Mpaho Musa ashohoza ezo nkoni, aziiha omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, azitwarira Abaisiraeli boona, bazireeba; buri muntu atwara eye." 
Numbers17:10 Reero Nyakubaho agambira Musa ati: Garura enkoni ya Arooni omu maisho g'eby'obuhamya, egume eri akamanyiso k'okwomesereza abagomi, obone kumaraho okwetomboita kwabo oku baanyetomboitera, nyentsya batakaafa." 
Numbers17:11 Okwo nikwo Musa yaakozire. Nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiire, yaaba nikwo yaakora." 
Numbers17:12 Reero Abaisiraeli baagira Musa bati: Reeba, twafa, twahwerekyerera, twena twahwaho!" 
Numbers17:13 Weena oraahikye haihi Obutaaho bwa Nyakubaho naafa! Ebyo twena twahwaho? 
Numbers18:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Arooni ati: Iwe na batabani baawe n'ab'omuryango gwa baashwenkuriimwe muryajunaanwa ebiriba bishobire omu Mwanya Ogurikwera. Kandi iwe na batabani baawe abu oine muryajunaanwa eby'obuhongyerezi bwanyu. 
Numbers18:2 Ogume oijane beene waanyu ab'omuryango gwa Leevi, ab'oruganda rwa shoimwe, bakwatanise naiwe kukukwatsa eby'obuheereza, iwe na batabani baawe abu oine, mwaba muri omu maisho g'eihema ry'eby'obuhamya." 
Numbers18:3 Bagume bakuheereze, kandi bakore emirimo yoona ey'omu ihema; kwonka batarihika haihi ebintu by'omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, nari eitambiro, imwe nabo mutakaafa." 
Numbers18:4 Bagume bakwatanise naiwe, bareeberere eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, nibakora eby'obuheereza byamwo byona, kwonka hatarigira owaahika haihi naimwe." 
Numbers18:5 Mbwenu imwe mugume mureeberere emirimo y'Omwanya Ogurikwera n'ey'eitambiro, kashanga erekye kugaruka kugwera Abaisiraeli." 
Numbers18:6 Kandi reeba, nyihire beene waanyu Abaleevi omu Baisiraeli, bari omutoijo gu muhairwe, ogumpongyeirwe, kuguma nibakora emirimo y'obuheereza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Numbers18:7 Mbwenu iwe na batabani baawe abu oine mugume mukore omurimo gwanyu gw'obuhongyerezi, ogw'ebikwatiraine n'eitambiro kandi n'ebiri omunda y'omukingo. Ebyo mube nibyo mwaguma nimukora, biri emirimo yaanyu y'obuhongyerezi. Kwonka ondiijo weena otari muhongyerezi oribyetaasyamu, aitwe." 
Numbers18:8 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Arooni ati: Reeba, naakuha ebintu byona ebiihirwe aha bi bampongyeire, niyo mitoijo y'Abaisiraeli yoona ehongirwe. Naabikuha kuba omugabo gwawe na batabani baawe, ogu muraagume nimutunga." 
Numbers18:9 Ebintu byona ebirikwera buzima, ebihongirwe ebitarikwokibwa, bigume bibe ebyanyu; buri mutoijo gwabo gwona, buri mutoijo gwabo ogw'esaano, buri mpongano yaabo ey'ekibi, na buri mpongano yaabo y'okubaihisaho orubanja; ebi bantoijera bibe ebirikwera munonga ahariiwe na batabani baawe." 
Numbers18:10 Mugume mubiriire omu mwanya ogurikwerera kimwe, oyetwa omushaija weena naikirizibwa kubiryaho. N'ebirikwera ahariimwe." 
Numbers18:11 Ebi nabyo n'ebyanyu: emitoijo ei bareetsire n'endiijo yoona ey'Abaisiraeli ezongazongiibwe. Naabikuha na batabani baawe na bahara baawe abu oine; mugume mubitungye ebiro byona. Omuntu weena ow'omu ka yaawe oshemeire, naikirizibwa kubiryaho." 
Numbers18:12 Amajuta amarungi munonga, na viino enungi munonga, n'engano enungi munonga, emiganuro ei bantoijera, Nyowe Nyakubaho naagikuha." 
Numbers18:13 Ebijuma byona ebiriguma nibibanza kuhiisa omu nsi yaabo, ebi batoijera Nyakubaho, bigume bibe ebyawe, kandi weena ow'omu ka yaawe oshemeire, naikirizibwa kubiryaho." 
Numbers18:14 Ekintu ky'omuri Isiraeli kyona ekihongyeirwe kimwe Ruhanga, kigume kibe ekyawe." 
Numbers18:15 Ekiigura-nda kyona ekiine omubiri, yaaba ky'omuntu, nari ky'enyamaishwa, eki bahongyera Nyakubaho kigume kibe ekyawe. Kwonka shi omujigaijo gw'omuntu ogume ogucungure, kandi ocungure n'ogw'enyamaishwa ezirikuzira." 
Numbers18:16 Haza obuguzi bwabyo, obw'okubicungura bihikize okwezi kumwe bizairwe, obubarire aha mpiiha itaano z'efeeza, nk'orurengo rw'empiiha y'Omwanya Ogurikwera oku ruri, orurikuhitsya ebigabari makumi abiri." 
Numbers18:17 Kwonka omujigaijo gw'ente nari ogw'entaama nainga ogw'embuzi otarigicungura; ahabw'okuba n'erikwera. Eshagama yaayo oryaguma ogimiisiire eitambiro, ebishaju byayo obyotsye, bibe empongano eyokiibwe, kuba ekisooroora kirikugwisa gye Nyakubaho." 
Numbers18:18 Kwonka enyama zaayo zibe ezaawe, nk'enkoro ezongazongiibwe, n'ekivune kya buryo oku biba ebyawe." 
Numbers18:19 Emitoijo yoona erikwera, ei Abaisiraeli batoijera Nyakubaho, naagikuha na batabani baawe na bahara baawe abu oine, kuguma nimugitunga ebiro byona. Egyo n'endagaano etarikuhinduka ey'ebiro byona, eragainwe naiwe na baijukuru baawe omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Numbers18:20 Kandi Nyakubaho akagambira Arooni ati: Toritunga itaka ry'okuhungura omu nsi yaabo, nobu kwakuba okubagana nabo omugabo. Nyowe niinye mugabo gwawe, kandi obuhunguzi bwawe omu Baisiraeli." 
Numbers18:21 Abaleevi naabaha kimwe kya ikumi kyona ekitoijwa omuri Isiraeli kuba ekyabo ky'obuhunguzi ahabw'emirimo ei bakora nibaheereza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu. 
Numbers18:22 N'ahabw'ekyo okwiha hati Abaisiraeli batarihika haihi eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, bakacumura, bakafa." 
Numbers18:23 Kureka Abaleevi bagume bakore emirimo y'obuheereza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu; ekirishoba nibo barikijunaanwa. Ekyo kibe ekiragiro ky'obutwire omu busingye bwanyu bwona. Kandi bataritunga eitaka ry'okuhungura omu Baisiraeli. 
Numbers18:24 Manya kimwe kya ikumi, eki Abaisiraeli batoija kukihongyera Nyakubaho, naakiha Abaleevi kuba ekyabo ky'obuhunguzi. N'ahabw'ekyo nikyo naabagirira nti bataritunga eitaka ry'obuhunguzi omu Baisiraeli." 
Numbers18:25 Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Numbers18:26 Kandi gambira Abaleevi oti: Ku muriiha aha Baisiraeli kimwe kya ikumi eki naabaha kuguma nimubanogoraho kuba obuhunguzi bwanyu, naimwe mugume mukiiheho kimwe kya ikumi kyakyo kuba omutoijo gw'okutoijera Nyakubaho ogwa kimwe kya ikumi ekya kimwe kya ikumi." 
Numbers18:27 Haza ogwo mutoijo gwanyu guryababarirwa nk'ogw'engano erugire omu ihuuriro, kandi nk'ogwa viino nsya eyaaruga omu inyuukiro." 
Numbers18:28 Nikwo muraagume nimutoijera Nyakubaho omutoijo ogurugire aha bimwe bya ikumi byanyu byona ebi munogora aha Baisiraeli, mukaihiraho Nyakubaho omugabo gw'okuha Arooni omuhongyerezi." 
Numbers18:29 Aha biconco byona ebi murireeterwa, mugume mukoreho ekirikuragiirwa kutoijera Nyakubaho, nimukiiha aha birungi munonga, nimuhayo ebicweka byabyo ebyeziibwe." 
Numbers18:30 N'ahabw'ekyo obagambire oti: Ku muriguma mwaheza kuhayo ebicweka byabo ebirungi munonga, ebiritsigaraho bibarwe ku byaba eby'Abaleevi, nk'ebirugire omu ihuuriro, nari omu inyuukiro." 
Numbers18:31 Kandi nimwikirizibwa kubiriira ahantu hoona, imwe n'ab'omu maka gaanyu; ahabw'okuba n'ebihembo ebi muheebwa ahabw'emirimo ei mukora nimuheereza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Numbers18:32 Mbwenu ku muribiihaho ebirungi munonga mwabitoija, timurigiibwaho rubanja rw'ekibi ahabwabyo. Kwonka mutarihagaza ebyo bintu by'Abaisiraeli ebirikwera, mukafa." 
Numbers19:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa na Arooni ati: 
Numbers19:2 Eki n'ekiragiro ky'omu mateeka eki yaaragiira: Gambira Abaisiraeli bakureetere enyana kahogo etaine kamogo, nari eki erikugaywa, kandi etakateebwaga mu migamba." 
Numbers19:3 Mugihe Eleazaari omuhongyerezi; bagishohoze aheeru y'orusiisira, bagiitire omu maisho ge." 
Numbers19:4 Eleazaari akoze orukumu omu shagama yaayo, agimiisiire emirundi mushanju naagitooza ei omuryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu guri." 
Numbers19:5 Haza egyo nyana bagimwokyeze omu maisho, kandi oruhu rwayo, n'enyama yaayo, n'eshagama, n'efa yaayo, babyotsye." 
Numbers19:6 Mpaho omuhongyerezi akwate ekiti ky'omuvure n'enyaweera, n'akenda karikutukura, abinagye ahagati y'omuriro gw'egyo nyana erikusya." 
Numbers19:7 Bwanyima ayozye ebijwaro bye, kandi ayeyozye n'amaizi, mpaho agarukye omu rusiisira, haza agume ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Numbers19:8 Orikwotsya egyo nyana ayozye ebijwaro bye kandi ayeyozye n'amaizi, haza agume ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Numbers19:9 Reero omuntu oshemeire ayoore eiju ry'egyo nyana, arirunde aheeru y'orusiisira omu mwanya gushemeire, rigume ribiikiirwe eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli kurishuka omu maizi g'omugyenzo gw'okwozya ebitashemeire, kwihaho ekibi." 
Numbers19:10 Orikuyoora eiju ry'egyo nyana eruutsi ayozye ebijwaro bye, haza agume ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo. Mbwenu ekyo kigume kibe ekiragiro ky'obutwire ekiteereirweho Abaisiraeli n'omunyaihanga obashuuhuukiiremu." 
Numbers19:11 Orikora aha mutumbi gw'omuntu weena, aryamara ebiro mushanju atashemeire." 
Numbers19:12 Aryayeyeza n'ago maizi aha kiro kya kashatu n'aha kya mushanju, abone kuba oshemeire. Kwonka ku ariba ateeyerize aha kiro kya kashatu n'aha kya mushanju, tariba oshemeire." 
Numbers19:13 Weena orikora aha muntu ofiire, aha muntumbi gw'omuntu weena ofiire, haza ataayeyeza, aryaba ahagaize obutaaho bwa Nyakubaho; kandi ogwo muntu acuubwe omuri Isiraeli. Ahabw'okutamiisiirwaho maizi garikweza, aryaguma ari osiisikaire; okutashemera kwe nikuba kukimuriho." 
Numbers19:14 Eri niryo iteeka ry'omuntu owaafeera omu ihema: Weena oritaaha omuri eryo ihema, n'oriba aririmu aryaba otashemeire okumara ebiro mushanju." 
Numbers19:15 Kandi ekintu kyona ekyashami, ekitaine kifundikizo kikihamiireho, biri n'ekitashemeire." 
Numbers19:16 Weena oriba ari omu ishwa akakora aha muntu ou baitsize rurara, nari aha mutumbi, nari aha igufa ry'omuntu, nainga aha kituuro, aryamara ebiro mushanju asiisikaire." 
Numbers19:17 Ahabw'omuntu osiisikaire, bakore aha iju ry'ekitambo kicwekize eky'empongano y'ekibi, barite omu rwabya, bashukyemu amaizi g'omugyera;" 
Numbers19:18 mpaho omuntu oshemeire akwate enyaweera, agiibikye omuri ago maizi, agamiisiire eihema n'aha bintu byamwo byona, n'aha bantu abaririmu, n'aha muntu okozire aha igufa, nari aha muntu oitsirwe, nari aha mutumbi, nainga aha kituuro." 
Numbers19:19 Haza ogwo muntu oshemeire agamiisiire omuntu otashemeire aha kiro kya kashatu n'aha kya mushanju; mpaho aha kiro kya mushanju abone kumushemeza. N'onu ayozye ebijwaro bye, nawe wenka ayogye amaizi, reero omu mwabazyo ashemere." 
Numbers19:20 Kwonka omuntu otashemeire ku araabe ateeshemeize, ogwo muntu acuubwe omu ihanga, ahabw'okuba ahagaize Omwanya gwa Nyakubaho Ogurikwera. Kandi ahabw'okutamiisiirwa maizi agarikweza, naaba ari osiisikaire." 
Numbers19:21 Ekyo kibe ekiragiro ky'ebiro byona ekibateereirweho. Orikumiisiira amaizi agarikweza ahaate ayozye ebijwaro bye; n'orikukora ahari ago maizi g'okweza naaguma ari otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo. 
Numbers19:22 Kandi ekintu kyona eki ogwo muntu osiisikaire arikoraho, kiryaba ekitashemeire; na weena orikikoraho aryaba otashemeire okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Numbers20:1 Eihanga ryona ery'Abaisiraeli rikahika omu ihamba rya Ziini, omu kwezi kw'okubanza, abantu baaguma Kadeshi; Miriyamu yaagwa okwo, baamuziikayo." 
Numbers20:2 Mbwenu obwo ab'eihanga ryona ku baabuzire amaizi, baateeranira hamwe kwetomboitera Musa na Arooni." 
Numbers20:3 Abo bantu baatonganisa Musa nibamugira bati: Nangwa kuri twafiire obu beene waitu baafeera omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. 
Numbers20:4 Mbwenu mukareetera ki eihanga rya Nyakubaho omuri eri eihamba, ngu tufeere aha n'amatungo gaitu?" 
Numbers20:5 Kandi mukatwihira ki Misiri kutureeta omuri ogu mwanya mubi? Ti mwanya gw'okuhingamu engano, nobu yaakuba emitiini, nari emizaabibu, nainga amakomamahanga; kandi tigurimu maizi g'okunywa." 
Numbers20:6 Musa na Arooni batyo baruga ah'abo bantu bateeraniire, baza aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu; bajuumara aha nsi, haza ekitiinisa kya Nyakubaho kibabonekyera." 
Numbers20:7 Reero Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: 
Numbers20:8 Kwata egi nkoni, oteeranire hamwe ab'eihanga ryona, iwe na mukuru waawe Arooni; haza ogambirire orukiri omu maisho gaabo, rurugwemu amaizi. Otyo obaihire amaizi omuri orwo rukiri, obone kutungira ab'eihanga ryona n'amatungo gaabo eky'okunywa." 
Numbers20:9 Musa atyo aiha enkoni omu maisho ga Nyakubaho nk'oku yaamuragiira. 
Numbers20:10 Musa na Arooni nikwo kuteeranira hamwe ab'eihanga ryona omu maisho g'orukiri, akabagira ati: Imwe bagomi 'mwe, nimuhurire! Mbwenu tubaihire amaizi omuri oru rukiri?" 
Numbers20:11 Musa atyo aimutsya omukono, ateera kabiri orukiri n'enkoni ye, ruhimintikwamu amaizi maingi; ab'eihanga ryona hamwe n'amatungo gaabo binywa." 
Numbers20:12 Bwanyima Nyakubaho agambira Musa na Arooni ati: Ahabw'okuba timwanyesiga, mukampaisa ekitiinwa omu maisho g'Abaisiraeli, n'ahabw'ekyo timurihitsya eri ihanga omu nsi ei mbahaire." 
Numbers20:13 Ago nigo maizi ga Meeriba, ahu Abaisiraeli baayetomboiteire Nyakubaho; nawe akabeeyoreka ku ari Orikwera." 
Numbers20:14 Musa ku yaabaire ari Kadeshi, yaatuma entumwa aha mugabe wa Edomu, naagira ati: Abaisiraeli beene sho baakutumaho bati: Noomanya enaku ezi twareebire;" 
Numbers20:15 oku baatatenkuriitwe baagiire Misiri, bakatuurayo okumara omwanya muraingwa; haza Abanyamisiri bakatwita kubi na baatatenkuriitwe." 
Numbers20:16 Kwonka ku twatakiire Nyakubaho, yaahurira okutaka kwaitu, yaayohereza maraika, yaatwiha omuri Misiri. Mbwenu turi aha Kadeshi, orurembo oruri aha mwatano gw'ensi yaawe." 
Numbers20:17 Twakweshengyereza, oturekye turabe omu nsi yaawe. Titurikwija kuraba omu misiri, nari omu mizaabibu, n'obu kwakuba okunywa amaizi g'omu iziba. Nitwija kutoora omuhanda rugyendwa, tutakiikamire ha rubaju rwa buryo, nari orwa bumosho, okuhitsya obu turaaheze kuraba omu nsi yaawe." 
Numbers20:18 Kwonka Edomu amutumaho naamugarukamu ati: Torikwija kuraba mu nsi yangye. Ku oraakikore, niinyija kuhurura na rurara, nkurwanise." 
Numbers20:19 Abaisiraeli baamugarukamu bati: Nitwija kutoora omuhanda rugyendwa. Itwe n'amatungo gaitu ku turaanywe amaizi gaawe nitugaihurira. N'okutwikiriza turabisemu amaguru, tihariho kindi." 
Numbers20:20 Kwonka Edomu agarukamu ati: Timurikwija kurabamu. Edomu atyo ahurura n'engabo nyingi kubarwanisa aine eihe rihango. 
Numbers20:21 Azibira Abaisiraeli kuraba omu nsi ye, nabo bakuba, bamurugaho." 
Numbers20:22 Eihanga ryona ery'Abaisiraeli rikaimutsya orugyendo, ryaruga Kadeshi, ryahika aha Rushozi Hoori." 
Numbers20:23 Nyakubaho yaagambirira Musa na Arooni aha Rushozi Hoori, aha mwatano gw'ensi ya Edomu, ati:" 
Numbers20:24 Arooni yaaza kukurata abaabo; manya tarikwija kuhika omu nsi ei mpaire Abaisiraeli, ahabw'okuba mukagomera eki naaragiriire aha maizi ga Meeriba." 
Numbers20:25 Mbwenu twara Arooni na Eleazaari omutabani, obainamure aha Rushozi Hoori." 
Numbers20:26 Reero ojuure Arooni ebijwaro bye, obijwekye Eleazaari omutabani. Haza Arooni afeereyo, akurate abaabo." 
Numbers20:27 Musa yaakora nk'oku Nyakubaho aragiire, baatemba Orushozi Hoori, eihanga ryona ribataireho abiri." 
Numbers20:28 Musa yaajuura Arooni ebijwaro, yaabijweka Eleazaari omutabani; na Arooni yaafeera aha mutwe gw'orwo rushozi. Bwanyima Musa na Eleazaari baashuuma, baaruga aha rushozi." 
Numbers20:29 Eihanga ku ryareebire Arooni yaafa, Abaisiraeli boona baamucurira okumara ebiro makumi ashatu." 
Numbers21:1 Omugabe wa Aradi Omunyakanaani, owaabaire atwire omuri Negebu, ku yaahuriire ngu Abaisiraeli nibaija bareetsirwe ogwa Atarimu, yaabarwanisa, kandi abamwe omuribo yaabatwara bari enkwatwa." 
Numbers21:2 Abaisiraeli nikwo kuraganisa Nyakubaho nibahiga bati: Buzimazima ku oraaturekurire aba bantu, nitwija kucwekyerereza kimwe endembo zaabo." 
Numbers21:3 Nyakubaho nawe yaahurira okutaka kw'Abaisiraeli, yaabarekurira Abanyakanaani; baabacwekyerereza kimwe hamwe n'endembo zaabo. Ogwo mwanya nikwo kwetwa Horuma." 
Numbers21:4 Ku baarugire aha Rushozi Hoori, baimutsya orugyendo, baatoora ogurikuza aha Nyanja Erikutukura, kwekiikuura ensi ya Edomu. Haza abantu orwo rugyendo rwabatama." 
Numbers21:5 Baayetomboitera Ruhanga na Musa bati: Mukatwihira ki Misiri ngu tufeere omuri eri ihamba? Manya tiharimu byokurya na maizi, kandi twakaba n'ebi byokurya bitaine oku biri." 
Numbers21:6 Nyakubaho nikwo kwoherereza abo bantu enjoka z'obushegu burikubabiirira, zikabaruma, baingi omu Baisiraeli bakafa." 
Numbers21:7 Abantu batyo baija ahari Musa, baamugira bati: Tucumwire, ahabw'okuba twetomboiteire Nyakubaho naiwe. Mbwenu omushabe, atukize ezi njoka. Musa mpaho ashabira abo bantu." 
Numbers21:8 Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: Heesha enjoka y'omuringa, ogihanikye aha muti, haza oraarumwe enjoka weena ku araagireebe, naakira." 
Numbers21:9 Musa aheesha enjoka y'omuringa, agihanika aha muti. Reero enjoka ku yaabaire eruma omuntu, yaanaga eriisho aha y'omuringa, akira." 
Numbers21:10 Abaisiraeli bakaimutsya orugyendo, baateera orusiisira Oboti." 
Numbers21:11 Ku baarugire Oboti, baaruteera Iyeabarimu, omu ihamba erishungaine na Moabu ogurikureeba burugwa-izooba."
