Numbers21:12 Ku baarugire aho, baimutsya orugyendo, baateera orusiisira omu ruhanga rwa Zeredi." 
Numbers21:13 Okuruga aho baimutsya orugyendo, baateera orusiisira seeri y'omugyera Arunooni, nigwo nyatano y'Abamoabu, gwatanisa Abamoabu n'Abaamori." 
Numbers21:14 Nikyo kyagambiirwe omu Kitabo ky'Engamba za Nyakubaho, kiti: Waheebu omuri Suufa n'empanga za Arunooni," 
Numbers21:15 aharikushuuma omu mpanga, hakahika omu mwanya gu Aari atuuramu, hakeegamira omwatano gwa Moabu." 
Numbers21:16 Reero Abaisiraeli ku baarugire okwo baagumizamu baahika Beeri. Niryo iziba ahi Nyakubaho yaagambiriire Musa ati: Teerana hamwe abantu mbahe amaizi. 
Numbers21:17 Obwo nibwo Abaisiraeli baayeshongora ekyeshongoro eki: Iwe iziba 'we, imuka oijure! Nimuryeshongorere" 
Numbers21:18 eryo iziba ryatimbirwe abategyeki, rikafukurwa abeebembezi b'eihanga, n'enkoni y'obugabe, n'ebigango byabo. Ku baarugire omuri eryo ihamba, baagumizamu baaza Matana;" 
Numbers21:19 baaruga Matana, baahika Nahalieli; baaruga Nahalieli bahika Bamoti." 
Numbers21:20 Ku baarugire Bamoti, baaragara omu ruhanga oruri omu nsi ya Moabu, aha mutwe gwa Pisiga aharikurengyera omu ihamba." 
Numbers21:21 Bwanyima Abaisiraeli bakatuma entumwa ahari Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori, nibagira bati:" 
Numbers21:22 Otwikirize turabe omu nsi yaawe. Titurikwija kutaishuka ngu twaza omu misiri nari omu y'emizaabibu; kandi titurikwija kunywa maizi g'eiziba. Nitwija kutoora omuhanda rugyendwa, okuhitsya obu turaarabe omu nsi yaawe." 
Numbers21:23 Kwonka Sihooni tiyaikiriza Baisiraeli kuraba omu nsi ye. Yaahuruza engabo ze zoona, yaahurura, yaaza omu ihamba kubarwanisa, yaahika Yahazi, yaarwana nabo." 
Numbers21:24 Abaisiraeli baamwitsa rurara; baakubuura ensi ye, okwiha ahari Arunooni okuta Yaboki, omu nyatano n'Abaamoni." 
Numbers21:25 Baakwata endembo zoona, baatuura omu ndembo z'Abaamori zoona, omuri Heshibooni n'omu byaro byarwo byona." 
Numbers21:26 Manya Heshibooni rukaba ruri orurembo rwa Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori, owaabaire arwaniise omugabe wa Moabu owa ira, akanyaga ensi ye yoona okuhitsya Arunooni." 
Numbers21:27 Nikyo abeeshongozi b'ebihimbano baagiriire bati: Nimwije Heshibooni, orurembo rwa Sihooni ruhame." 
Numbers21:28 Manya omuriro gutimbiire Heshibooni, endimi zaagwo zaaruga omu rurembo rwa Sihooni, zaayokyeza kimwe Aari ey'omuri Moabu, n'omu mitwe y'enshozi za Arunooni." 
Numbers21:29 Ebishi Moabu gaakuteera! Mwahwa, imwe bantu ba Kemoshi 'mwe! Manya abatabani abahindwire empungi, n'abahara baaba enkwatwa ahari Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori." 
Numbers21:30 Tucwekyereize ab'oruzaaro rwabo okwiha Heshibooni okuhitsya Dibooni. Twacwekyereza abakazi baabo okuhika Noofe. Twahwerekyereza abashaija baabo, okuhitsya obu omuriro guhikire Medeeba." 
Numbers21:31 Batyo Abaisiraeli baatuura omu nsi y'Abaamori. 
Numbers21:32 Musa kandi yaatuma ab'okutata Yazeeri, baakwata ebyaro byayo, baabingamu Abaamori ababitwiremu." 
Numbers21:33 Bwanyima Abaisiraeli baakuba baatora ogurikuza Bashani. Oogi omugabe wa Bashani atyo ahurura kubateera, we n'engabo ze zoona, babarwanisiza Edirei." 
Numbers21:34 Haza Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: Otamutiina, ahabw'okuba naamukurekurira, we n'abantu be boona, n'ensi ye; omugire nk'oku waagizire Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori, owaabaire atwire Heshibooni." 
Numbers21:35 Nabo baamwita n'abatabani n'abantu be boona, haabura owaatsigaraho; n'ensi ye baagikubuura." 
Numbers22:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Abaisiraeli baimutsya orugyendo, baasiisira omu mpita za Moabu obuseeri bwa Yorudaani ahashungaine na Yeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Reero Balaki mwene Zipori akareeba ebi Abaisiraeli baakozire Abaamori. 
Numbers22:3 N'Abamoabu bakatiina munonga abo bantu, ahabw'okuba bakaba bari baingi, emitima ebahwaire omunda ahabw'abo Baisiraeli." 
Numbers22:4 Abamoabu nikwo kugambira abakuru b'omuri Midiya bati: Egi nyanja y'abantu neija kumaraho ebitwehinguririize, nk'oku ente zikunduura obunyaatsi bw'omu ishwa. Balaki mwene Zipori, owaabaire ari omugabe wa Moabu ago magingo," 
Numbers22:5 atuma entumwa ahari Balaamu mwene Beori, owaabaire atwire Petori, eri haihi n'omugyera Efuraati omu nsi y'Abamawi, kumweta, naamugira ati: Reeba, abantu barugire Misiri, baashweka ensi yoona, kandi batwire ahashungaine naanye." 
Numbers22:6 Mbwenu rugayo obankyeenere, ahabw'okuba nibankiza emikono; obundi nkaabaasa kubasingura, mbabinga omuri egi nsi. Nimmanya ngu n'ou oshabira omugisha agutunga, n'ou okyeena ainara." 
Numbers22:7 Mpaho abakuru b'Abamoabu n'ab'Amidiya baagyenda bahagatiire emikimbo y'okuraguza, baahika Balaamu, baamugambira ebi Balaki yaabatuma." 
Numbers22:8 Nawe yaabagira ati: Nimuraare aha eki kiro, nyije ngire eki naabagarukamu, nk'oku Mukama arangambire. Abo bategyeki b'Abamoabu baraara owa Balaamu." 
Numbers22:9 Reero Ruhanga aizira Balaamu amugira ati: Aba bantu bu oine ni baahi? 
Numbers22:10 Balaamu agarukamu Ruhanga ati: Balaki mwene Zipori omugabe w'Abamoabu niwe antumireho ati: 
Numbers22:11 Reeba, abantu barugire Misiri, baashweka ensi. Mbwenu ija obankyeenere; obundi nkaabaasa kubarwanisa, mbabinga." 
Numbers22:12 Ruhanga agira Balaamu ati: Otagyenda nabo, kandi otakyeena abo bantu, ahabw'okuba baine omugisha." 
Numbers22:13 Balaamu aimuka omu kasheeshe, agambira abo bategyeki ba Balaki ati: Nimwirooko, mugarukye owaanyu, ahabw'okuba nyowe Nyakubaho anzibiire kugyenda naimwe." 
Numbers22:14 Abo bategyeki b'Abamoabu baimuka, bagaruka owa Balaki, bamugira bati: Balaamu yaayanga kwija naitwe!" 
Numbers22:15 Ahonaaho Balaki agaruka atuma abandi bategyeki, abarikukiza bariya obwingi n'ekitiinwa." 
Numbers22:16 Nabo bahika Balaamu bamugira bati: Balaki mwene Zipori akutumireho ati: Hatagira ekyakuzibira kwija; 
Numbers22:17 ahabw'okuba buzimazima niinyija kukuha ekitiinwa kingi. Kyona eki orangambire niinyija kukikora. Ija onkyeenere aba bantu! 
Numbers22:18 Kwonka Balaamu agarukamu abagaragwa ba Balaki, ati: Balaki nobu yaakumpa enju ye eijwire efeeza n'ezaabu, tinkaarenga ki Mukama Ruhanga wangye aragiire, kukicwaho nari kukyongyeraho." 
Numbers22:19 Mbwenu naabeeshengyereza, naimwe muraare aha eki kiro, ndeebe eki Mukama araagarukye kungambira." 
Numbers22:20 Reero Ruhanga aizira Balaamu nyekiro, amugira ati: Aba bantu ku baraabe baija kukweta, imuka ogyende nabo, kwonka kyona eki ndaakuragiire, obe nikyo waakora." 
Numbers22:21 Omu kasheeshe Balaamu akaimuka, yaatandiika endogoya ye, yaagyenda n'abategyeki ba Moabu." 
Numbers22:22 Kwonka Ruhanga yaamugirira ekiniga ahabw'okwo kugyenda. Maraika wa Ruhanga yaayemerera omu muhanda kumukumiirira. Mbwenu obwo akaba atembire endogoya, aine abagaragwa be babiri." 
Numbers22:23 Endogoya ku yaareebire maraika wa Nyakubaho ayemereire omu muhanda asyoireyo rurara, agikwaitse omu ngaro, egyo ndogoya yaaruga omu muhanda, yaaza omu kishaka, na Balaamu yaagiteera kugigarura omu muhanda." 
Numbers22:24 Maraika wa Nyakubaho yaayemerera omu kahanda kafunzire, akarikuraba ahagati y'emisiri y'emizaabibu, kaine ekisiika ahari buri rubaju." 
Numbers22:25 Endogoya ku yaareebire maraika wa Mukama, yaayemigisiriza aha kisiika, haza yaakimigiraho ekigyere kya Balaamu, Balaamu nikwo kugaruka kugiteera." 
Numbers22:26 Ago magingo maraika wa Nyakubaho airirayo omu maisho, ayemerera omu mwanya gw'akamizyo, ahataine bwehinduriro ahari buryo nari ahari bumosho." 
Numbers22:27 Endogoya ku ereeba maraika wa Nyakubaho, ebandama aha nsi Balaamu agiri aha mugongo. Balaamu nikwo kugira ekiniga kingi akagiteeza enkoni ye." 
Numbers22:28 Reero Nyakubaho ayashamya akanwa k'egyo ndogoya, egira Balaamu eti: Naakwitsa ki waaza kunteera egi mirundi yonshatu?" 
Numbers22:29 Balaamu nawe agigarukamu ati: N'ahabw'okuba wangaya. Kuri naaba nyine rurara omu ngaro, naaba ninkwita." 
Numbers22:30 Endogoya nayo egira Balaamu eti: Tindi endogoya yaawe ei otuura nootemba obutoosha n'okuhitsya eri izooba? Nyine obu ndakugizire nti? N'onu agigarukamu ati: Ngaaha. 
Numbers22:31 Bwanyima Nyakubaho ahumuura amaisho ga Balaamu, areeba maraika wa Nyakubaho ayemereire omu muhanda, asyoireyo rurara emuri omu ngaro; ainama, ajuumara aha nsi." 
Numbers22:32 Na maraika ogwo amugira ati: Endogoya yaawe waagiteerera ki egi mirundi yonshatu? Reeba, naija kukukumiirira, ahabw'okuba orugyendo rwawe n'orw'obugomi omu maisho gangye." 
Numbers22:33 Endogoya yo ku yandeeba yampigiza kashatu: kuri etampigiza, buzimazima hati nkaabaire naakwitsire, haza yo ngireka eguma ehuriire." 
Numbers22:34 Balaamu agira maraika wa Nyakubaho ati: Naacumura! Manya naaba ntamanyire ku oyemereire omu muhanda kunkumiirira. Mbwenu ku oraabe nooreeba ngu ni kibi, ka ngarukyeyo!" 
Numbers22:35 Maraika wa Nyakubaho agira Balaamu ati: Irooko, ogyende n'abo bashaija, kwonka eki ndaakuragiire obe nikyo waagamba. Balaamu atyo agumizamu orwo rugyendo n'abategyeki ba Balaki." 
Numbers22:36 Balaki ku yaahuriire ngu Balaamu yaija, yaagyenda, yaaza kumubugana omu rurembo Aari orwa Moabu, aha nyatano ya Arunooni, aha rubaju rw'omwatano orw'aha muheru." 
Numbers22:37 Balaki yaagira Balaamu ati: Tinkutumireho kukweta? Ekikuzibiire kwija ni ki? Noogira ngu tindikubaasa kukuhindura omuntu w'ekitiinwa? 
Numbers22:38 Balaamu agarukamu Balaki ati: Reeba, mbwenu naija, kwonka noogira ngu nyine obushoboorozi bw'okugira eki naagamba ahabwangye? Eki Ruhanga araate omu kanwa kangye nikyo ndaagambe." 
Numbers22:39 Balaamu atyo agyenda na Balaki, bahika Kiriyasihuzooti." 
Numbers22:40 Balaki atamba ebitambo by'ente n'entaama, abitwekyeraho Balaamu n'abategyeki bu yaabaire aine." 
Numbers22:41 Omu kasheeshe kaakuratsireho, Balaki atwara Balaamu, amuhitsya omu bibungo bya Bamotibaali. Okwo niyo yaarangiize ekicweka ky'eihe ry'Abaisiraeli abari haihi." 
Numbers23:1 Balaamu akagira Balaki ati: Nyombekyera amatambiro mushanju, kandi ontungire enimi mushanju n'empaya z'entaama mushanju." 
Numbers23:2 Balaki yaakora nk'oku Balaamu yaagambire. Balaki na Balaamu baatambira ahari buri itambiro enimi n'empaya y'entaama. 
Numbers23:3 Bwanyima Balaamu yaagira Balaki ati: Yemerera aha rubaju rw'ekitambo kyawe ekicwekize, nyowe ngyende, shana Nyakubaho akaija kumbugana. Haza eki araanyorekye kyona, nikyo ndaakugambire. Atyo agyenda aza aha mutwe gw'ebibungo omu bwerere." 
Numbers23:4 Ruhanga abuganayo Balaamu. Balaamu amugira ati: Naatebeekanisa amatambiro mushanju, kandi ahari buri itambiro naatambiraho enimi n'empaya y'entaama." 
Numbers23:5 Na Ruhanga ata omu kanwa ka Balaamu ebi araagambe, kandi amugira ati: Garuka ahari Balaki, haza ebyo obe nibyo waagamba." 
Numbers23:6 Mpaho Balaamu agaruka ahari Balaki, kandi ashanga we n'abategyeki ba Moabu boona beemereire aha rubaju rw'ekitambo kye ekicwekize." 
Numbers23:7 Balaamu atandika kuhanuura naagira ati: Balaki akaanyiha Aramu, nyowe omugabe w'Abamoabu yaanyiha omu nshozi za burugwa-izooba. Ati: Rugayo onkyeenere Yakobo! Ija onyangire Isiraeli!" 
Numbers23:8 Mbwenu nyowe nimbaasa nta kukyeena abu Ruhanga atakyeenire: Nari kwanga abu Ruhanga atangire? 
Numbers23:9 Manya nimbaranzya ndi aha mutwe gw'enkiri z'aha nshozi; nimbareeba ndi omu bibungo. Reeba, n'eihanga erituura ryonka, eriteebarira mu gandi." 
Numbers23:10 N'oha orikubaasa kubara Aba Yakobo abari nk'omucuucu? Nari kubara kimwe kya kana eky'Abaisiraeli? Nyowe ka nyefeere orufu rw'ohikiriire, omuheru gwangye gube nk'ogwe." 
Numbers23:11 Mpaho Balaki agira Balaamu ati: Wangirira biiha? Wankorera ki? Nkureetsire kunkyeenera abazigu bangye, mbwenu reeba, toine ki waakora, kureka okubendeza emigisha." 
Numbers23:12 N'onu amugarukamu ati: Tinshemereire kwerinda ebi Nyakubaho arikuta omu kanwa kangye, nkaba nibyo naagamba?" 
Numbers23:13 Balaki amugira ati: Mbwenu ija tugyende kumwe omu gundi mwanya, ahu oraabaasize kuranzya ekicweka kyabo ekiri haihi, kwonka otabareebire boona. Haza okwo obe niyo waayema kubankyeenera." 
Numbers23:14 Atyo amutwara omu ishwa rya Zofimu, aha mutwe gwa Pisiga, ayombekayo amatambiro mushanju, kandi ahari buri rimwe atambiraho enimi n'empaya y'entaama." 
Numbers23:15 Na Balaamu agira Balaki ati: Yemerera aha, aha rubaju rw'ekitambo kyawe ekicwekize, nze kuriya kubugana Nyakubaho." 
Numbers23:16 Reero Nyakubaho abugabugana na Balaamu; amuta omu kanwa ebi araagambe, kandi amugira ati: Irooko, ogarukye ahari Balaki, haza ebyo obe nibyo waagamba." 
Numbers23:17 Balaamu atyo aija ahari Balaki, amushanga ayemereire aha rubaju rw'ekitambo kye ekicwekize, aine abategyeki ba Moabu. Balaki amubuuza ati: Nyakubaho yaagamba ki?" 
Numbers23:18 Balaamu nawe atandika kuhanuura, naagira ati: Iwe Balaki, imuka ohurire! Iwe mwene Zipori, ntega okutu." 
Numbers23:19 Ruhanga ti muntu, ngu abeihe, kandi ti mwana w'omuntu, ngu ayefuuze! Mbwenu shi ebi agambire, taribikora? Nari ebi araganiise, taribihikiiriza?" 
Numbers23:20 Reeba, nyowe ndagiirwe kubendeza emigisha; we yaagibaha, kandi tindikubaasa kugibaaka." 
Numbers23:21 We tareebire kibi omuri Yakobo, nobu bwakuba obugomi omuri Isiraeli. Mukama Ruhanga waabo ari hamwe nabo; kandi nibamuteerera akaari k'okushemererwa, ku ari omugabe waabo." 
Numbers23:22 Nk'oku embogo eyesiga amahembe gaayo, nabo nikwo barikwesiga Ruhanga waabo owaabaihire Misiri." 
Numbers23:23 N'ahabw'ekyo tihariho ky'okuroga Yakobo, nobu kwakuba okuragurira kubi Isiraeli, kureka ekiraagambwe ahari Yakobo na Isiraeli n'eky'okugira kiti: Ebishi eki Ruhanga abakoreire n'eky'okutangaaza!" 
Numbers23:24 Reeba, eri ihanga: niribandaatuka nk'entare enkazi, ryimutsya nk'entare enshaija. Tebyama etakashonshomeire ki yaakwata, n'okunywa eshagama y'eki yaita." 
Numbers23:25 Balaki nikwo kugira Balaamu ati: Otabakyeena n'akakye, nobu kwakuba okubashabira emigisha n'akakye." 
Numbers23:26 Balaamu agarukamu Balaki ati: Tinaakugambira nti: Byona ebi Ruhanga araagambe nibyo ndaakore? 
Numbers23:27 Balaki agira Balaamu ati: Mbwenu rugayo, nkutware omu gundi mwanya, obundi Ruhanga akaakisiima, oba niyo waabakyeenera." 
Numbers23:28 Balaki atyo atwara Balaamu aha mutwe gwa Peori, aharikuranzya eihamba." 
Numbers23:29 Balaamu agira Balaki ati: Nyombekyera aha amatambiro mushanju, haza ondeetere aha enimi mushanju n'empaya z'entaama mushanju." 
Numbers23:30 Balaki akora nk'oku Balaamu yaagamba; atamba enimi n'empaya y'entaama ahari buri itambiro. 
Numbers24:1 Balaamu ku yaareebire Nyakubaho naasiima kuha emigisha Abaisiraeli, tiyaaza kusherura endagu, nk'oku yaabaire atwarize bwabiso, kureka yaahanga amaisho eihamba." 
Numbers24:2 Balaamu ogwo ku yaimukize ati amaisho, yaareeba Abaisiraeli bateire enkambi, nk'oku enganda zaabo zirikukuratana, Mutima wa Ruhanga yaamwijaho." 
Numbers24:3 Mpaho yaahanuura naagira ati: Oku nikwo kuragura kwa Balaamu mwene Beori, okuragura kw'omushaija orikuranzya hare;" 
Numbers24:4 okuragura kw'ohurira ebigambo bya Ruhanga, oreeba ebi Ow'obushoboorozi bwona amworeka, agwire aha nsi, kwonka amaisho ge gatahumagiize." 
Numbers24:5 Iwe Yakobo, ebishi amahema gaawe ni marungi! Iwe Isiraeli, ebishi enkambi zaawe ni nungi!" 
Numbers24:6 Zaaririkire nk'empita zirikuhika hare nk'emisiri y'aha rubaju rw'omugyera, nk'enkaka zi Nyakubaho abyaire, nk'emivure y'aha rubaju rw'amaizi." 
Numbers24:7 Amaizi garyahimintika nigaruga omu ndobo ze, n'oruzaaro rwe rutuure ahu amaizi maingi gari. Omugabe we aryaba mukuru okukira Agagi, n'obugabe bwe buhimbisibwe." 
Numbers24:8 Ruhanga amwihire Misiri, kandi naamwesiga, nk'oku embogo eyesiga amahembe gaayo. Aryamaraho amahanga agarikumurwanisa, agasheenyagure amagufa, abarashe, emyambi ye eboogyemu." 
Numbers24:9 Abandami, abyami nk'entare enshaija, kandi nk'entare enkazi. Mbwenu n'oha owaakwehanga kumwimutsya? Orikukushabira omugisha, naakagire emigisha; N'orikukukyeena, naakainare." 
Numbers24:10 Balaki nikwo kugirira Balaamu ekiniga kingi, akeeshaaringa naateera omu ngaro, akagira Balaamu ati: Nkwetsire kukyeena abazigu bangye, mbwenu reeba, waabashabira emigisha kashatu." 
Numbers24:11 N'ahabw'ekyo tuntumuka, ogarukye owaanyu! Ngizire nti: Buzimazima niinyija kukuhindura omuntu w'ekitiinwa, kwonka Nyakubaho yaakikwima." 
Numbers24:12 Balaamu agarukamu Balaki ati: Tingambiire entumwa zaawe ezi ontumireho, nti:" 
Numbers24:13 Balaki nobu yaakumpa enju ye eijwire efeeza n'ezaabu, tinkaarenga ha ki Nyakubaho yaagamba, nkakora gye, nari nkakora kubi ahabwangye nyenka? Tingizire nti: Eki Nyakubaho araagambe, nikyo ndaagambe?" 
Numbers24:14 Mbwenu reeba naaza kugarukayo owaitu, kwonka ija nkuragurire eki eri ihanga ririkora abantu b'eihanga ryawe omu biro biraije." 
Numbers24:15 Atyo atandika kuhanuura, naagira ati: Oku nikwo kuragura kwa Balaamu mwene Beori, okuragura kw'omushaija orikuranzya hare," 
Numbers24:16 okuragura kw'ohurira ekigambo kya Ruhanga, akamanya obwengye bwa Rukiraboona, akareeba ebi Ow'obushoboorozi bwona arikumworeka, ogwire aha nsi, kwonka amaisho ge gatahumagiize." 
Numbers24:17 Nimmureeba, kwonka ti hati; mmuhangire amaisho, kwonka tari haihi. Enyonyoozi eryaruga omuri Yakobo, enkoni y'obugabe eimukye omuri Isiraeli, esheenyagure obuso bwa Moabu, ecwekyereze beene Seeti boona." 
Numbers24:18 Edomu eryakubuurwa, na Seiri omuzigu we, eryakubuurwa, obwo Isiraeli neekora eby'obumanzi." 
Numbers24:19 Yakobo ategyekye, kandi acwekyereze ab'omu ndembo abariba bahonokireho." 
Numbers24:20 Bwanyima Balaamu ahanga amaisho Abaamaleki, haza ahanuura, naagira ati: Abaamaleki bakaba beebembeire agandi mahanga, kwonka muheru yaabo eryaba okucwekyerezibwa." 
Numbers24:21 Reero kandi ahanga amaisho Abakeeni, haza ahanuura, naagira ati: Ahu otwire hagumire, n'ekyashuri kyawe kyarikirwe omu rukiri," 
Numbers24:22 kwonka bambe, Kaini ori ow'okucwekyerezibwa! Abaashuuri bakamara omwanya muraingwa bakutwaire, ori enkwatwa!" 
Numbers24:23 Kandi yaatandika kuhanuura, naagira ati: Ai bambe! Mbwenu ekyo Ruhanga ku arikikora, n'oha origumaho?" 
Numbers24:24 Kwonka shi, emeeri ziryaruga Kitimu, ababisha bahurure babonabonese Abaashuri n'Abaeberi, nabo bahwerekyererere kimwe." 
Numbers24:25 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Balaamu yaimuka yaagarukayo owe, na Balaki yaatoora omuhanda gwe." 
Numbers25:1 Abaisiraeli ku baabaire batwire Shitimu, abantu baatandika kuraaya na bahara b'Abamoabu." 
Numbers25:2 Abakazi baaguma nibabeeta aha magyenyi g'ebitambo bya baaruhanga baabo. Abo bantu baabirya, kandi baaramya baaruhanga baabo." 
Numbers25:3 Abaisiraeli baakwatanisa n'abarikuramya Baali eya Peori. Nyakubaho yaabagirira ekiniga kingi. 
Numbers25:4 Yaagambira Musa ati: Twara abakuru b'eihanga boona, obaitire butunu omu maisho gangye nyomushana; kashanga yangye ebone kuruga aha Baisiraeli." 
Numbers25:5 Musa atyo agambira abaramuzi b'Abaisiraeli, ati: Buri omwe omuriimwe aite abantu be abakwataniise n'abarikuramya Baali eya Peori." 
Numbers25:6 Ago magingo, omwe omu Baisiraeli yaija aine omukazi Omumidiya, naamureeta omu b'eka ye. Musa n'eihanga ryona nibamureeba, obwo nibacurira aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
Numbers25:7 Mbwenu Finehaasi mutabani wa Eleazaari mwene Arooni omuhongyerezi ku yaakireebire, yaimuka, yaaruga ahu eihanga riteeraniire, yaakwata eicumu," 
Numbers25:8 yaagyenda akuratiire ogwo mushaija Omuisiraeli, yaahika omu kishengye ky'omunda, yaabacumita bombi yaariboozyamu, Omuisiraeli n'ogwo mukazi. Orufu rwazibirwa rutyo kwita Abaisiraeli." 
Numbers25:9 Kwonka abu rwabaire rwaitsire bakahika abantu obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina. 
Numbers25:10 Reero Nyakubaho yaagira Musa ati: 
Numbers25:11 Finehaasi mutabani wa Eleazaari mwene Arooni omuhongyerezi yaiha ekiniga kyangye aha Baisiraeli, ahabw'okuba yaakwatanisa naanye kubagirira eihato, nikyo ntaamarisizaho Baisiraeli eihato ryangye." 
Numbers25:12 N'ahabw'ekyo orangirire oti: Reeba, naamukorera endagaano y'obusingye;" 
Numbers25:13 ebe ahariwe n'aha baijukuru abarikurataho, endagaano y'obuhongyerezi bw'ebiro byona; ahabw'okuba agiriire Ruhanga we eihato, kandi yaakarabirira Abaisiraeli." 
Numbers25:14 Eiziina ry'omushaija Omuisiraeli owaitsirwe hamwe n'Omumidiyanikazi, akaba naayetwa Zimuri mwene Saalu, mukuru wa baishenkuru b'ab'omuryango gw'Abasimeoni." 
Numbers25:15 Kandi eiziina ry'omukazi Omumidiyani owaitsirwe akaba ari Kozibi, muhara wa Zuuri, owaabaire ari omukuru w'omutwe gw'ab'omuryango gwa baishenkuru ab'omuri Midiyani." 
Numbers25:16 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Numbers25:17 Tuntuza Abamidiyani, obaite." 
Numbers25:18 Ahabw'okuba bakugangize n'oburyarya bwabo obu baababeihabeihiise omu bya Peori n'omu bya Kozibi, muhara w'omwinginya wa Midiyani, munyaanyabo owaitsirwe aha izooba ry'orufu orwaizire ahabw'ebya Peori." 
Numbers26:1 Eby'orufu ku byahwaire, Nyakubaho yaagambira Musa na Eleazaari mwene Arooni omuhongyerezi ati:" 
Numbers26:2 Mubare eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli ryona, okwiha aha w'emyaka makumi abiri y'obukuru n'okukiraho, nk'oku emiryango ya baishenkurubo eri; boona ab'omuri Isiraeli abarikubaasa kuza aha rugamba." 
Numbers26:3 Mpaho Musa na Eleazaari omuhongyerezi baakigambira Abaisiraeli bari omu mpita za Moabu haihi na Yorudaani, ahashungaine na Yeriko. Baabagira bati:" 
Numbers26:4 Mubare abantu abahikize emyaka makumi abiri y'obukuru n'okukiraho, nk'oku Nyakubaho aragiire Musa. Mbwenu aba nibo Baisiraeli abaabaire barugire Misiri:" 
Numbers26:5 Reubeeni omujigaijo gwa Isiraeli; beene Reubeeni; abaazairwe Hanoki, omuryango gw'Abahanoki; aba Paalu, omuryango gw'Abapaalu;" 
Numbers26:6 aba Hezirooni, omuryango gw'Abahezirooni; aba Karimi, omuryango gw'Abakarimi." 
Numbers26:7 Egyo niyo miryango y'Abareubeeni; omubaro gwabo gukahika obukumi buna n'enkumi ishatu na magana mushanju na makumi ashatu. 
Numbers26:8 Omuri beene Paalu: ni Eliyaabu. 
Numbers26:9 Aba nibo beene Eliyaabu: Namueli, Datani na Abiraamu. Datani na Abiraamu nibo baatoorainwe eihanga, bakatonganisa Musa na Arooni, bakwataniise na Koora kuhakanisa Nyakubaho;" 
Numbers26:10 reero ensi ekaashama, ekabamira hamwe n'Abakoora, obu ab'ekyo kigombe baafa, omuriro gukacwekyereza abashaija magana abiri na makumi ataano, bakaba eky'okuhabura abandi." 
Numbers26:11 Kwonka beene Koora tibarafiire. 
Numbers26:12 Beene Simeoni, nk'oku emiryango yaabo eri: abaazairwe Namueli nibo b'omuryango gw'Abanamueli, Abayamiini, nibo b'omuryango gw'Abayamiini; Abayakiini ab'omuryango gw'Abayakiini:" 
Numbers26:13 Abazeera, nibo b'omuryango gw'Abazeera; Abashauli, ab'omuryango gw'Abashauli." 
Numbers26:14 Egyo niyo miryango ya beene Simeoni; abantu obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri na magana abiri. 
Numbers26:15 Beene Gaadi, nk'oku emiryango yaabo yaabaire eri: aba Zeefoni, nibo b'omuryango gw'Abazeefoni; aba Haagi ab'omuryango gw'Abahaagi; aba Shuni, ab'omuryango gw'Abashuni;" 
Numbers26:16 aba Ozini, ab'omuryango gw'Abaozini; beene Eeri, ab'omuryango gw'Abaeeri;" 
Numbers26:17 beene Aarodi ab'omuryango gw'Abaarodi; na beene Areeli ab'omuryango gw'Abaareeli. 
Numbers26:18 Egyo niyo miryango ya beene Gaadi, abaabazirwe bakahika obukumi buna na magana ataano." 
Numbers26:19 Beene Yuda bakaba bari Eri na Onani. Eri ogwo na Onani bakafeera omu nsi ya Kanaani. 
Numbers26:20 Reero beene Yuda, nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri nibo aba: abaazairwe Sheela, ab'omuryango gw'Abasheela; aba Pereezi ab'omuryango gw'Abapereezi; aba Zeera, ab'omuryango gw'Abazeera." 
Numbers26:21 Kandi omuri beene Pereezi: abaazairwe Hezirooni, ab'omuryango gw'Abahezirooni; aba Hamuli ab'omuryango gw'Abahamuli." 
Numbers26:22 Egyo niyo miryango y'Abaayuda; abaabazirwe bakahika obukumi mushanju n'enkumi mukaaga na magana ataano. 
Numbers26:23 Beene Isakaari, nk'oku emiryango yaabo eri: abaazairwe Tola, ab'omuryango gw'Abatola, aba Puuna, ab'omuryango gw'Abapuuna;" 
Numbers26:24 aba Yashubu, ab'omuryango gw'Abayashubu; n'aba Shimurooni, ab'omuryango gw'Abashimurooni." 
Numbers26:25 Egyo niyo miryango y'Abaisakaari; abaabazirwe bakahika obukumi mukaaga n'enkumi ina na magana ashatu. 
Numbers26:26 Beene Zebuluuni nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri: abaazairwe Seredi, nibo b'omuryango gw'Abaseredi; aba Eloni, ab'omuryango gw'Abaeloni; aba Yaheleeli, ab'omuryango gw'Abayaheleeli." 
Numbers26:27 Egyo niyo miryango y'Abazebuluuni; abaabazirwe bakahika obukumi mukaaga na magana ataano. 
Numbers26:28 Beene Yosefu nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri: abaazairwe Manaase na Efuraimu. 
Numbers26:29 Beene Manaase, abaazairwe Makiri, nibo b'omuryango gw'Abamakiri; kandi Makiri akaba ari ishe Gileadi; reero Gileadi yaazaara ab'omuryango gw'Abagileadi." 
Numbers26:30 Mbwenu aba nibo beene Gileadi: abaazairwe Yezeri, nibo b'omuryango gw'Abayezeri; aba Heeleki, nibo b'omuryango gw'Abaheeleki;" 
Numbers26:31 taho aba Asirieli, ab'omuryango gw'Abasirieli; n'aba Shekemu, ab'omuryango gw'Abashekemu;" 
Numbers26:32 n'aba Shemiida, ab'omuryango gw'Abashemiida; n'aba Heeferi, ab'omuryango gw'Abaheeferi." 
Numbers26:33 Mbwenu Zelofehaadi mwene Heeferi tarazaire boojo, kureka abaishiki; kandi amaziina ga bahara ba Zelofehaadi ni Maahala, Noa, Hoogala, Milika na Tiriza." 
Numbers26:34 Egyo niyo miryango ya beene Manaase; abaabazirwe bakahika obukumi butaano n'enkumi ibiri na magana mushanju. 
Numbers26:35 Aba ni beene Efuraimu, nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri: abaazairwe Shuutela, ab'omuryango gw'Abashuutela, aba Beekeri, ab'omuryango gw'Ababeekeri; aba Taahani, ab'omuryango gw'Abataahani." 
Numbers26:36 Kandi aba ni beene Shuutela: abaazairwe Erani, ab'omuryango gw'Abaerani." 
Numbers26:37 Egyo niyo miryango ya beene Efuraimu: abaabazirwe bakahika obukumi bushatu n'enkumi ibiri na magana ataano. Abo nibo beene Yosefu, nk'oku emiryango yaabo yaabaire eri." 
Numbers26:38 Reero aba ni beene Benyamiini, nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri: abaazairwe Beela, nibo b'omuryango gw'Ababeela; aba Ashibeeli, ab'omuryango gw'Abaashebeeli; ana Ahiira, ab'omuryango gw'Abaahiira;" 
Numbers26:39 aba Shefuufa, nibo b'omuryango gw'Abashufaami: taho aba Huufa, ab'omuryango gw'Abahufaami." 
Numbers26:40 Reero beene Beela bakaba bari Ariba na Naamani, abaazairwe Arida, nibo b'omuryango gw'Abaarida; kandi aba Naamani, nibo b'omuryango gw'Abanaami." 
Numbers26:41 Abo nibo beene Benyamiini, nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri: kandi nk'oku baabazirwe, bakahika obukumi buna n'enkumi itaano na magana mukaaga." 
Numbers26:42 Mbwenu aba ni beene Daani, nk'emiryango yaabo oku eyemi; aba Shuuhamu, ab'omuryango gw'Abashuuhamu. Abo nibo b'emiryango ya Daani, nk'oku emiryango yaabo yaabaire eri:" 
Numbers26:43 Emiryango y'Abaashuuhamu yoona oku yaabazirwe, ekahitsya abantu obukumi mukaaga n'enkumi ina na magana ana." 
Numbers26:44 Beene Asheri, nk'oku emiryango yaabo eri: abaazairwe Imuna, nibo b'omuryango gw'Abaimuni: aba Ishivi, ab'omuryango gw'Abaishivi; aba Beriya, ab'omuryango gw'Ababeeri." 
Numbers26:45 Omuri beene Beriya harimu aba: abaazairwe Heberi, ab'omuryango gw'Abaheeberi; n'aba Malikieli, ab'omuryango gw'Abamalikieli;" 
Numbers26:46 reero muhara wa Asheri akaba naayetwa Seera. 
Numbers26:47 Egyo niyo miryango ya beene Asheri, nk'oku baabazirwe, bakahika obukumi butaano n'enkumi ishatu na magana ana." 
Numbers26:48 Beene Nafutaali, nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri, aba Yahehezeeli, ab'omuryango gw'Abayaheezeli; aba Guni, ab'omuryango gw'Abaguni;" 
Numbers26:49 aba Yezereeli, ab'omuryango gw'Abayezereeli; aba Shiilemu, ab'omuryango gw'Abashiilemu." 
Numbers26:50 Egyo niyo miryango y'aba Nafutaali, nk'oku emiryango yaabo yaabaire eri, kandi nk'oku baabazirwe, bakahika obukumi buna n'enkumi itaano na magana ana." 
Numbers26:51 Ogwo nigwo mubaro gw'Abaisiraeli boona; abaabazirwe bakahika abantu obusiriira mukaaga na rukumi na magana mushanju na makumi ashatu. 
Numbers26:52 Reero Nyakubaho yaagira Musa ati: 
Numbers26:53 Abo nibo baraabaganisizibwe ensi kuba eyaabo y'akaragwa, nk'omubaro gw'amaziina gaabo oku guri." 
Numbers26:54 Oruganda oruhango oruhe eitaka ringi ry'obuhunguzi, n'oruganda orukye oruhe rikye. Buri ruganda ruheebwe eitaka ryarwo ery'obuhunguzi, nk'oku abantu baarwo ababazirwe barikwingana." 
Numbers26:55 Kwonka egyo nsi mugibabaganisize nimuteera enteenyu. Haza bagihungure nibakuratira amaziina g'enganda za baishebo. 
Numbers26:56 Nk'oku enteenyu erikwata, n'eitaka ry'obuhunguzi bwabo nikwo riribaganisibwa; nibareebera aha bwingi, nari aha bukye bwa buri ruganda." 
Numbers26:57 Aba n'Abaleevi abaabazirwe, nibakuratira emiryango yaabo: beene Gereshooni, nibo b'omuryango gw'Abaagereshooni; beene Koohati, ab'omuryango gw'Abakoohati, beene Meraari, ab'omuryango gw'Abameraari." 
Numbers26:58 Egi niyo miryango y'Abaleevi: omuryango gw'Abalibini, omuryango gw'Abaheeburooni, omuryango gw'Abamahili, omuryango gw'Abamuushi, n'omuryango gw'Abakoora. Kandi Koohati akaba ari ishe wa Amuraamu." 
Numbers26:59 Muka Amuraamu akaba naayetwa Yokebeedi ari muhana wa Leevi, ou muka Leevi yaazaariire Misiri. Reero Yokebeedi akazaarira Amuraamu Musa na Arooni na Miriyamu munyaanyabo." 
Numbers26:60 Arooni nawe akazaara Nadabu na Abiihu na Eleazaari na Itamaari. 
Numbers26:61 Kwonka Nadabu na Abiihu bakafa obu baayoteza omuriro ogutarikwikirizibwa omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. 
Numbers26:62 Mbwenu Abaleevi abaabazirwe, boona hamwe bakahika obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ishatu; omushaija weena okwiha aha w'okwezi kumwe n'okukiraho. Manya bo tibarabariirwe omu Baisiraeli, ahabw'okuba tibarahairwe itaka ry'obuhunguzi hamwe n'Abaisiraeli." 
Numbers26:63 Abo nibo Baisiraeli abaabazirwe Musa na Eleazaari omuhongyerezi, bakababarira omu mpita za Moabu, haihi na Yorudaani ahashungaine na Yeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Haza omuri abo hakaba hatarimu muntu n'omwe ow'omu baabazirwe Musa na Arooni omuhongyerezi, abaabariire Abaisiraeli omu ihamba rya Sinaayi." 
Numbers26:65 Manya Nyakubaho akaba yaabagambireho, naagira ati: Buzimazima baryafeera omu ihamba. N'ahabw'ekyo tihariho muntu n'omwe omuribo owaatsigaireho, kureka Kalebu mwene Yefuune, na Yoshwa mwene Nuuni." 
Numbers27:1 Mbwenu hakaija abaishiki, bahara ba Zelofehaadi mwene Heeferi ya Gileadi, Gileadi ya Makiri, Makiri ya Manaase, ab'emiryango ya Manaase mwene Yosefu. Amaziina g'abo baishiki ni: Mahalaha, Noa, Hogula, Milika na Tiriza." 
Numbers27:2 Baayemerera omu maisho ga Musa n'omu ga Eleazaari omuhongyerezi, n'omu g'abeebembezi b'eihanga, n'omu g'abateeraniire aho boona, aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, baagira bati:" 
Numbers27:3 Tataitwe akagwa omu ihamba; akaba atari mu kariibe k'ab'ekigombe kya Koora, abaayeteeraine kugomera Nyakubaho; kureka akafa ahabw'ekibi kye ahabwe, kandi akaba ataine batabani." 
Numbers27:4 Mbwenu eiziina rya tataitwe ribure omu b'omuryango gwe ngu ahabw'okuba tarazaire mwojo? Naitwe otuhe obuhunguzi omu b'oruganda rwa tataitwe! 
Numbers27:5 Musa ahitsya ahari Nyakubaho okwetonganira kwabo. 
Numbers27:6 Na Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: 
Numbers27:7 Bahara ba Zelofehaadi bahikire; obahe ebyabo by'obuhunguzi omu b'oruganda rwa ishebo; obarekye bahungure obutaka bwe. 
Numbers27:8 Kandi ogambire Abaisiraeli oti: Omushaija ku yaakufa ataine mutabani, murekye omuhara amuhungurire." 
Numbers27:9 Reero ku araabe ataine muhara, obuhunguzi mubuhe beene ishe." 
Numbers27:10 Kandi ku ariba ataine beene ishe, eby'obuhunguzi bwe mubihe bakuru ba ishe nari barumuna ba ishe." 
Numbers27:11 Mbwenu ishe ku ariba ataine bakuru be nari barumuna, obwo eby'obuhunguzi bwe mubihe omunyaruganda wa haihi omu b'omuryango gwe, abihungure. Haza ekyo kibe ekiragiro ekiteereirweho Abaisiraeli, nk'oku Mukama yaaragiire Musa." 
Numbers27:12 Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: Temba oru rushozi rwa Abariimu, oreebe ensi ei naahaire Abaisiraeli." 
Numbers27:13 Reero ku oraaheze kugireeba, naiwe okurate abaanyu, nk'oku Arooni mukuru waawe yaabakuratsire," 
Numbers27:14 ahabw'okuba iwe na Arooni, obu eihanga ryona ryangomera omu ihamba rya Ziini, timurakozire nk'oku naaragiire, kumpaisa ekitiinwa omu maisho gaabo aha maizi. (Nigo maizi ga Meeriba eya Kadeshi omu ihamba rya Ziini)." 
Numbers27:15 Musa nawe agira Mukama ati: 
Numbers27:16 Nyakubaho Ruhanga ow'emitima ehaisa abantu boona amagara k'abe niwe yaatoorana oraategyekye abantu b'eri ihanga," 
Numbers27:17 oraagume naabeebembera nibashohora kandi nibataaha; eihanga rya Nyakubaho rirekye kuba nk'entaama zitaine muriisa," 
Numbers27:18 Nyakubaho nawe agira Musa ati: Twara Yoshwa mwene Nuuni, ou Mutima arimu, omuteho emikono;" 
Numbers27:19 kandi omwemereze omu maisho ga Eleazaari omuhongyerezi n'ag'eihanga ryona, omukwatsize omurimo omu maisho gaabo." 
Numbers27:20 Omuhe aha bukuru bwawe, eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli ryona ribone kumuhurira." 
Numbers27:21 Agume ayemerere omu maisho ga Eleazaari omuhongyerezi, n'onu amubuurize ahariinye Nyakubaho eki endagu ziraacwemu. Eleazaari ku araagume yaaragiira, Yoshwa hamwe n'eihanga ryona ery'Abaisiraeli bashohore, kandi ku araaragiire, bataahe." 
Numbers27:22 Musa akora nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiira; atwara Yoshwa, amwemereza omu maisho ga Eleazaari omuhongyerezi n'ag'eihanga ryona," 
Numbers27:23 amutaho emikono, amukwatsa omurimo nk'oku Nyakubaho amuragiire." 
Numbers28:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers28:2 Ragiira Abaisiraeli kandi obagire oti: Ebi muntambira n'ebyokurya bi muntoijera mubyokize, n'eby'ebisooroora by'okungwisa gye, mugume mubintoijere omu bunaku bwabyo obwatairweho." 
Numbers28:3 Kandi obagire oti: Eki nikyo kitambo kicwekize eki muraagume nimutambira Nyakubaho buri izooba: Empaya nto ibiri z'entaama, ezihikize omwaka gumwe, ezitaine kamogo, kuba ekitambo ky'ebiro byona." 
Numbers28:4 Omwana gumwe gw'entaama mugume mugutambe omu kasheeshe, n'ogundi omu mwabazyo." 
Numbers28:5 Kandi mutoije kimwe kya ikumi ky'encuro y'esaano y'obunono kuba omutoijo gw'esaano ejwangiibwemu kimwe kya kana ky'egaloni y'amajuta g'emioliva eshekwire. 
Numbers28:6 Kibe ekitambo kicwekize eky'ebiro byona, ekyaragiriirwe aha Rushozi Sinaayi kuba ekisooroora kirikugwisa gye, ekitambiirwe Nyakubaho kicwekize." 
Numbers28:7 Buri kitambo ky'omwana gw'entaama ekiraatambwe, kigume kigyenderweho eky'okunywa kya kimwe kya kana ky'egaloni. Ogwo mutoijo gw'eky'okunywa ogwa viino y'amakuuta, ogutoijeirwe Nyakubaho, gugume gushukwe omu Mwanya Ogurikwera." 
Numbers28:8 Ogundi mwana gw'entaama mugutambe omu mwabazyo. Nk'oku mutwarize omutoijo gw'esaano ey'omu kasheeshe, n'ogw'eby'okuginyweraho, mube nikwo mwagutamba, kuba ekitambo kicwekize, eky'ekisooroora kirikugwisa gye Nyakubaho." 
Numbers28:9 Aha kiro kya Sabato: empaya nto ibiri z'entaama z'omwaka gumwe, ezitaine kamogo, na bibiri bya ikumi by'encuro y'esaano y'obunono kuba omutoijo gw'esaano ejwangiibwemu amajuta g'emioliva, kandi n'omutoijo gw'ebyokunywa." 
Numbers28:10 Ekyo nikyo kitambo kicwekize eky'okutambwa buri Sabato, otabariiremu kitambo kicwekize eky'obutoosha, hamwe n'omutoijo gw'okukinyweraho." 
Numbers28:11 Aha kiro ky'okuboneka kw'ameezi gaanyu, mugume mutambire Nyakubaho ebitambo bicwekize ebi: enimi nto ibiri, empaya emwe y'entaama, n'empaya nto mushanju z'entaama ezihikize omwaka gumwe, ezitaine kamogo." 
Numbers28:12 Aha buri nimi mutoijereho bishatu bya ikumi by'encuro y'esaano y'obunono kuba omutoijo gw'esaano ejwangiibwemu amajuta; kandi aha mpaya y'entaama mureetereho bibiri bya ikumi by'esaano y'obunono bibe omutoijo gw'esaano ejwangiibwemu amajuta," 
Numbers28:13 n'aha buri mwana gw'entaama mutoijereho kimwe kya ikumi ky'esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta kuba omutoijo gw'esaano. Bibe ekitambo ky'ekisooroora kirungi, ekitambiirwe Nyakubaho kicwekize." 
Numbers28:14 Emitoijo y'ebyokunywa ebe kimwe kya kabiri ky'egaloni ya viino ahabw'enimi; kimwe kya kashatu ky'egaloni ahabw'empaya y'entaama, na kimwe kya kana ky'egaloni ahabw'omwana gw'entaama. Ebyo nibyo bitambo bicwekize ebya buri kwezi, okumara ameezi g'omu mwaka goona." 
Numbers28:15 Kandi bongyereho empaya emwe y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi ehongyeirwe Nyakubaho, egume etambwe etarikubarirwa omu bitambo bicwekize eby'obutoosha, n'omu mitoijo y'ebyokunywa." 
Numbers28:16 Ekiro kya ikumi na bina eky'okwezi kw'okubanza, n'ekiro ky'Okuhingurwaho kwa Mukama;" 
Numbers28:17 kandi ekiro kya ikumi na bitaano ky'okwo kwezi n'eky'obugyenyi; bagume bamare ebiro mushanju nibarya emigaati etatumbisiibwe. 
Numbers28:18 Aha kiro ky'okubanza mugume mugire ekiteerane ekirikwera, kandi mutarikoreraho omurimo gwona ogurikurusya," 
Numbers28:19 kureka mutoijereho ekitambo kicwekize eki muraagume nimutambira Nyakubaho buri izooba, enimi ibiri z'ebimasha, empaya emwe y'entaama, n'empaya nto mushanju z'entaama, ezihikize omwaka gumwe" 
Numbers28:20 Eby'emitoijo y'esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta bitwazibwe biti: Bishatu bya ikumi by'encuro mugume mubitoijere aha nimi; bibiri bya ikumi aha ngondoore y'entaama; 
Numbers28:21 na kimwe kya ikumi kuguma nimukitoijera ahari buri emwe, ahari ezo mpaya nto mushanju z'entaama;" 
Numbers28:22 kandi empaya emwe y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi, kubakarabira imwe." 
Numbers28:23 Ebyo mugume mubitambe bitabariirwe ha kitambo kicwekize, eky'omu kasheeshe, eky'okuguma kiri ekitambo kicwekize eky'ebiro byona." 
Numbers28:24 Nikwo muraagume nimutoija buri izooba, okumara ebiro mushanju ebyokurya by'ekitambo kicwekize eky'ekisooroora ky'okugwisa gye Nyakubaho. Bigume nibitoijwa, nibyongyerwa aha kitambo kicwekize eky'obutwire bwona, n'aha mutoijo gw'ebyokunywa." 
Numbers28:25 Reero aha kiro kya mushanju, mugire ekiteerane ekirikwera, kandi mutarikora omurimo gwona ogurikurusya." 
Numbers28:26 Aha kiro ky'emiganuro, ku muriba nimutoijera Nyakubaho omutoijo gw'esaano y'omweza, aha bugyenyi bwanyu bwa Wiiki, mugire ekiteerane ekirikwera, kandi mutarikoreraho omurimo gwona ogurikurusya;" 
Numbers28:27 kureka mutambe ekitambo kicwekize eky'ekisooroora kirikugwisa gye Nyakubaho: enimi ibiri z'ebimasha, engondoore emwe y'entaama, n'empaya nto mushanju z'entaama ezihikize omwaka." 
Numbers28:28 Emitoijo yaabyo ey'esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta ebe bishatu bya ikumi by'encuro ahabwa buri nimi; bibiri bya ikumi ahabwa buri ngondoore," 
Numbers28:29 na kimwe kya ikumi ahabwa buri emwe ahari ezo mpaya nto mushanju z'entaama; 
Numbers28:30 mutaireho n'empaya emwe y'embuzi, kubakarabira imwe." 
Numbers28:31 Mutabazire kitambo ky'obutoosha ekicwekize, hamwe n'omutoijo gwakyo ogw'esaano, mugume mubitambe hamwe n'omutoijo gwabyo ogw'ebyokunywa, kandi mureebe ngu tibiine kamogo." 
Numbers29:1 Aha kiro ky'okubanza, eky'okwezi kwa mushanju, mugume mugire ekiteerane ekirikwera. Mutarikoreraho omurimo gwona ogurikurusya. Ekyo n'ekiro kyanyu ky'okuteereraho amakondere." 
Numbers29:2 Muryatamba ekitambo kicwekize kuba ekisooroora kirikugwisa gye Nyakubaho: enimi emwe y'ekimasha, engondoore emwe y'entaama, n'empaya nto mushanju z'entaama, ezihikize omwaka gumwe, ezitaine kamogo." 
Numbers29:3 N'omutoijo gwabyo gw'esaano y'obunono ejwangiibwemu amajuta, eya bishatu bya ikumi by'encuro ahabw'egyo nimi, bibiri bya ikumi ahabw'egyo ngondoore," 
Numbers29:4 na kimwe kya ikumi ahabwa buri baana b'entaama mushanju; 
Numbers29:5 mutaireho n'empaya emwe y'embuzi, kuba empongano y'ekibi kubakarabira." 
Numbers29:6 Obwo mutabariiremu ekitambo kicwekize eky'aha kuboneka kw'okwezi, n'omutoijo gwakyo ogw'esaano, kandi n'ekitambo kicwekize eky'obutoosha, n'omutoijo gwakyo ogw'esaano n'ogw'ebyokunywa, nk'oku byaragiirwe, kuba ekitambo kicwekize, eky'ekisooroora kirikugwisa gye Nyakubaho." 
Numbers29:7 Aha kiro kya ikumi, eky'okwezi kwa mushanju, mugume mugire ekiteerane ekirikwera, mwesiibyekwo, kandi mutarikoreraho omurimo gwona;" 
Numbers29:8 kureka mutambire Nyakubaho ekitambo kicwekize eky'ekisooroora kirungi: enimi emwe y'ekimasha, engondoore emwe y'entaama, n'empaya nto mushanju z'entaama, ezihikize omwaka, ezi mutooraine zitaine kamogo;" 
Numbers29:9 mutaireho n'emitoijo yaazo y'esaano y'obunono ejwangirwemu amajuta, eya bishatu bya ikumi by'encuro ahabw'egyo nimi, bibiri bya ikumi ahabw'engondoore emwe y'entaama," 
Numbers29:10 na kimwe kya ikumi, ahabwa buri gumwe ahari abo baana b'entaama mushanju." 
Numbers29:11 Kandi n'empaya emwe y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi: mutabariiremu kitambo ky'okukarabira abantu, n'ekitambo ky'obutoosha ekicwekize, n'omutoijo gwakyo gw'esaano, n'ey'ebyokunywa." 
Numbers29:12 Aha kiro kya ikumi na bitaano eky'okwezi kwa mushanju, muryagira ekiteerane ekirikwera; mutarikoreraho omurimo gurikurusya, kureka mugirire Nyakubaho obugyenyi bw'ebiro mushanju." 
Numbers29:13 Muryatamba ekitambo kicwekize eky'ekisooroora kirikugwisa gye Nyakubaho: enimi ikumi na ishatu z'ebimasha, engondoore ibiri n'empaya z'entaama ikumi na ina z'omwaka gumwe, ezitaine kamogo." 
Numbers29:14 Haza muzitoijereho muti esaano y'obunono ejwangiremu amajuta, eya bishatu bya ikumi by'encuro, ahabwa buri emwe ey'omuri ezo nimi ikumi na ishatu; bibiri bya ikumi ahabwa buri emwe ey'engondoore zombi," 
Numbers29:15 kandi na kimwe kya ikumi ahabwa buri gumwe omuri abo baana b'entaama ikumi na bana; 
Numbers29:16 mutaireho n'empaya y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi; mutabariiremu ekitambo ky'obutoosha ekicwekize, n'emitoijo yaakyo y'esaano, n'ey'ebyokunywa." 
Numbers29:17 Aha kiro kya kabiri: enimi ikumi na ibiri z'ebimasha, engondoore ibiri, empaya nto ikumi na ina z'entaama, ezihikize omwaka, kandi ezitaine kamogo," 
Numbers29:18 hamwe n'omutoijo gw'esaano, n'ey'ebyokunywa ahabw'ezo nimi, n'ahabw'ezo ngondoore z'entaama, n'ahabw'abo baana b'entaama, nimukuratira omubaro gwabyo, nk'oku ekiragiro kiri." 
Numbers29:19 Kandi n'empaya emwe y'embuzi, ahabw'empongano y'ekibi, mutabariiremu kitambo ky'obutoosha ekicwekize, n'omutoijo gwakyo gw'esaano, n'ey'ebyokunywa." 
Numbers29:20 Aha kiro kya kashatu: enimi ikumi n'emwe, engondoore ibiri z'entaama, n'empaya nto ikumi na ina ez'entaama ezihikize omwaka gumwe, kandi ezitaine kamogo," 
Numbers29:21 hamwe n'omutoijo gw'esaano, n'ey'ebyokunywa, ahabw'ezo nimi, n'ahabw'ezo ngondoore, n'ahabw'abo baana b'entaama, nimukuratira omubaro gwabyo nk'ekiragiro oku kiri." 
Numbers29:22 Kandi n'empaya emwe y'embuzi ey'empongano y'ekibi, mutabariiremu kitambo ky'obutoosha ekicwekize, n'omutoijo gw'esaano, n'ogw'ebyokunywa." 
Numbers29:23 Aha kiro kya kana: enimi ikumi, engondoore ibiri z'entaama empaya nto ikumi na ina z'entaama, ez'omwaka gumwe, ezitaine kamogo," 
Numbers29:24 hamwe n'omutoijo gw'esaano, n'ey'ebyokunywa, ahabw'ezo nimi, n'ahabw'ezo ngondoore, n'ahabw'abaana b'entaama, nimukuratira omubaro gwazo, nk'oku ekiragiro kiri." 
Numbers29:25 Kandi n'empaya emwe y'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi: mutabariiremu kitambo ky'obutoosha ekicwekize, n'omutoijo gwakyo gw'esaano, n'ey'ebyokunywa." 
Numbers29:26 Aha kiro kya kataano: enimi ikumi, engondoore ibiri, n'empaya nto ikumi na ina z'entaama ezihikize omwaka gumwe, ezitaine kamogo," 
Numbers29:27 hamwe n'omutoijo gw'esaano, n'ey'ebyokunywa, ahabw'ezo nimi, n'ahabw'ezo ngondoore, n'ahabw'ezo mpaya nto z'entaama, nimukuratira omubaro gwazo, nk'oku ekiragiro kiri." 
Numbers29:28 Kandi n'empaya emwe y'embuzi ey'empongano y'ekibi, mutabariiremu kitambo ky'obutoosha ekicwekize, n'omutoijo gwakyo gw'esaano, n'ey'ebyokunywa." 
Numbers29:29 Aha kiro kya mukaaga: enimi munaana, engondoore ibiri z'entaama, n'empaya nto ikumi na ina z'entaama ez'omwaka gumwe ezitaine kamogo," 
Numbers29:30 hamwe n'omutoijo gw'esaano, n'ey'ebyokunywa, ahabw'ezo nimi, n'ahabw'ezo ngondoore, n'ahabw'ezo mpaya nto z'entaama, nimukuratira omubaro gwazo, nk'ekiragiro oku kiri." 
Numbers29:31 Kandi n'empaya emwe y'embuzi, kuba empongano y'ekibi; mutabariiremu kitambo ky'obutoosha ekicwekize, n'omutoijo gw'esaano, n'eyebyokunywa." 
Numbers29:32 Aha kiro kya mushanju: enimi mushanju, engondoore ibiri z'entaama, empaya nto ikumi na ina z'entaama, ez'omwaka gumwe ezitaine kamogo," 
Numbers29:33 hamwe n'omutoijo gw'esaano, n'ey'ebyokunywa, ahabw'ezo nimi, n'ahabw'ezo ngondoore, n'ahabw'ezo mpaya nto z'entaama, nimukuratira omubaro gwazo, nk'oku ekiragiro kiri." 
Numbers29:34 Kandi n'empaya emwe y'embuzi y'empongano yekibi, mutabariiremu kitambo ky'obutoosha ekicwekize, n'omutoijo gwakyo ogw'esaano, n'ey'ebyokunywa." 
Numbers29:35 Aha kiro kya munaana, mugire ekiteerane kikuru, haza mutarikikoreraho omurimo gwona ogurikurusya;" 
Numbers29:36 kureka muryatamba ekitambo kicwekize eky'ekisooroora kirikugwisa gye Nyakubaho: enimi emwe, engondoore emwe, empaya nto mushanju z'entaama, ezihikize omwaka, kandi zitaine kamogo," 
Numbers29:37 n'omutoijo gw'esaano, n'ey'ebyokunywa, ahabw'ezo nimi, n'ahabw'egyo ngondoore, n'ahabw'ezo mpaya nto z'entaama, nimukuratira omubaro gwazo, nk'oku ekiragiro kiri." 
Numbers29:38 Kandi n'empaya emwe n'embuzi kuba empongano y'ekibi, mutabariiremu kitambo ky'obutoosha ekicwekize, n'omutoijo gwakyo gw'esaano, n'ey'ebyokunywa." 
Numbers29:39 Ebyo nibyo muriguma nimutambira Nyakubaho aha magyenyi gaanyu agaatairweho, mutaireho n'ebitambo byanyu by'okusiguura, n'eby'okwekundira, kuba ebitambo ebicwekize, n'emitoijo y'esaano, n'ey'ebyokunywa, n'ebitambo byanyu by'okurya kumwe." 
Numbers29:40 Musa atyo agambira Abaisiraeli ebyo byona, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiire." 
Numbers30:1 Musa akagambira abakuru b'enganda z'Abaisiraeli ati: Eki nikyo Nyakubaho yaaragiira. 
Numbers30:2 Omushaija ku arihiga ahari Nyakubaho, nari yaarahira endahiro naayegyemesereza kukora eki yaaraganisa, ataribura kuhitsya eki yaagamba, kureka ahikiirize kyona ekimurugire omu kanwa." 
Numbers30:3 Nari omukazi ku arihiga ahari Nyakubaho, yaarahira kukora eki yaaraganisa, haza obwo akiri empangare aha mahega ga ishe," 
Numbers30:4 reero ishe yaahurira onu eki yaahiga n'eki yaaraganisa naayegyemesereza kukikora, haza ishe ataagira ki yaamugambira, obwo okuhiga kwe kwona n'ebi araganiise naayegyemesereza kubikora, biryahama." 
Numbers30:5 Kwonka ishe, aha izooba ri yaabihuririraho, ku aryoreka ngu tiyaasiima onu ebi yaahiga, ebi yaahiga ebyo n'ebi yaaraganisa kuguma naabikora tibirihama; kandi na Nyakubaho aryamusaasira, ahabw'okuba ishe amwangiire." 
Numbers30:6 Mbwenu ku arishwerwa omushaija naakigyemeserezibwa ebi yaahigire, nari ebi yaagambiire eryo atabandize kubiteekateeka, haza bikamukoma," 
Numbers30:7 iba ku aribihurira, ataagira ki yaamugambira aha izooba ri yaabihuririraho, obwo onu ebi yaahigire n'ebi yaaraganiise naabyekomaho kubikora, biryahama." 
Numbers30:8 Kwonka eizooba ri iba karimutanda yaabihurira, kandi yaayoreka ku ataabisiima, obwo okuhiga ku ogwo mukazi yaahigire, hamwe n'ebi yaagambiire eryo atabiteekateekire, haza bikamukoma, iba aryabicwa busha, kandi Nyakubaho aryamusaasira." 
Numbers30:9 Kwonka ekintu kyona eki omufaakazi, nari omukazi oshenzirwe, aryekomaho ahigire, kiryaguma kimuteekamiire." 
Numbers30:10 Kandi ogwo mukazi ku arihiga ari omwa iba, nari yaayekoma aha ki yaaraganiise naarahira," 
Numbers30:11 haza iba yaakihurira, kwonka ataagira ki yaamugambira, n'obu kwakuba okumwangira, obwo byona ebi onu yaahiga biryahama, na kyona eki ariba araganiise kuguma naakora kiryagumaho." 
Numbers30:12 Kwonka iba ku aribicwa busha, kandi yaabiihaho aha izooba ri yaabihuririraho, obwo kyona ekiriba kimurugire omu kanwa, ekikwatiraine n'ebi ahigire, nari n'eki araganiise kuguma naakora, tikirigumaho. Biri iba abicwire busha; kandi Nyakubaho naija kusaasira ogwo mukazi." 
Numbers30:13 Okuhiga kwona nari endahiro yoona erikumugyema kwefubira, iba naabaasa kugihamya nari kugicwa busha." 
Numbers30:14 Kwonka iba ku araabe atagizire ki yaamugambira, okwiha aha izooba okuta aha rindi, biri naaba ahamize byona ebi ogwo mukazi ahigire n'ebi araganiise ebimuhingamiire. Naaba abihamize, ahabw'okuba aha izooba ri yaabihuririireho taine ki yaamugambiire." 
Numbers30:15 Kwonka ogwo mushaija ku aribicwa busha, yaabiihaho amazire ebiro abihuriire, aryagiibwaho orubanja rw'ekibi ky'omukazi we." 
Numbers30:16 Ebyo nibyo biragiro ebyatairweho, ebi Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa, eby'omushaija n'omukazi we, n'eby'omwishiki na ishe, akiri empangare aha mahega ga ishe." 
Numbers31:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers31:2 Hoorera Abaisiraeli enzigu, ofubire Abamidiyani, haza bwanyima okurate baashwenkuru." 
Numbers31:3 Musa atyo agambira eihanga ati: Mutoorane abashaija omuriimwe, mubahe ebikwato, baze aha rugamba kurwanisa Abamidiyani, kuhoorera Mukama enzigu." 
Numbers31:4 Mwohereze engabo rukumi, nimuziiha omu buri ruganda rwa Isiraeli, zihurure." 
Numbers31:5 Nabo babatoorana, nibabaiha omu nkumi n'enkumi z'Abaisiraeli, abashaija rukumi aba buri ruganda, bahika abashaija kakumi n'enkumi ibiri abahagatiire eby'okurwanisa." 
Numbers31:6 Musa aboohereza aha rugamba, abantu rukumi omuri buri ruganda, hamwe na Finehaasi mwene Eleazaari omuhongyerezi, n'ebintu by'omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, n'enzamba z'okuhuruza." 
Numbers31:7 Barwanisa Abamidiyani, nk'oku Mukama yaaragiire Musa; baita abashaija boona." 
Numbers31:8 Kandi omuri abo abaitsirwe, baitiramu n'abagabe bataano ba Midiyani: Evi, Rekemu, Zuuri, Huuri na Reeba, na Balaamu mwene Beori baamwitsa rurara." 
Numbers31:9 Reero Abaisiraeli baatwara abakazi Abamidiyani n'abaana baabo, baanyaga amasyo gaabo goona ag'ente n'ag'embuzi, n'entaama, n'ebintu byabo byona." 
Numbers31:10 Baayotsya endembo zaabo zoona ezi baabaire batwiremu, n'ensiisira zaabo zoona," 
Numbers31:11 kandi baatabaaruka n'ebi baanyagire byona, abantu n'enyamaishwa." 
Numbers31:12 Bwanyima enkwatwa, n'eminyago, n'ebintu, baabireetera Musa na Eleazaari omuhongyerezi n'eihanga ryona ery'Abaisiraeli, baabibashangisa omu nsiisira z'omu mpita za Moabu haihi na Yorudaani, ahashungaine na Yeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Musa na Eleazaari omuhongyerezi, n'abeebembezi b'eihanga boona, baashohora kubabugana aheeru y'orusiisira." 
Numbers31:14 Haza Musa yaagwerwa kubi abakuru b'eihe, abeebembezi b'engabo rukumi-rukumi, n'ab'engabo-igana, abaabaire batabaarukire omu rugamba." 
Numbers31:15 Musa yaabagira ati: Murekire abakazi boona baagumaho? 
Numbers31:16 Manya nibo baareeteire Abaisiraeli kureebya Nyakubaho omu bya Peori, ahabw'okuhaburwa Balaamu, haza kikareeta orufu omu ihanga rya Nyakubaho." 
Numbers31:17 N'ahabw'ekyo hati omuri abo baana, mwite oyetwa omwojo weena, kandi mwite omukazi weena oraabyamire n'omushaija." 
Numbers31:18 Kwonka abaishiki abatakabyamaga na bashaija mubeetsigireho. 
Numbers31:19 Muteere amahema aheeru y'orusiisira, mumareyo ebiro mushanju, weena omuriimwe oitsire omuntu, nari okozire aha muntu oitsirwe; mweyeze aha kiro kya kashatu, n'aha kya mushanju, imwe n'enkwatwa zaanyu." 
Numbers31:20 Mweze ebijwaro byanyu byona, n'ekintu kyona ekikozirwe omu ruhu, nari omu bwoya bw'embuzi, n'ekibaizirwe kyona." 
Numbers31:21 Reero Eleazaari omuhongyerezi agambira engabo ezaatabaarukire aha rugamba ati: Eki n'ekyatairweho omu iteeka eri Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa: 
Numbers31:22 ezaabu, efeeza, omuringa, ekyoma, etiini na risasi," 
Numbers31:23 ekintu kyona ekirikubaasa kwemera omuriro, mukirabye omu muriro, kibone kwezibwa, kandi mukyeeze n'amaizi ageeza." 
Numbers31:24 Aha kiro kya mushanju, mwozye ebijwaro byanyu, mushemere, mubone kwija omu rusiisira." 
Numbers31:25 Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Numbers31:26 Iwe na Eleazaari omuhongyerezi n'abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkuru b'abantu b'omuri eri ihanga, mubare eminyago enyagirwe, ey'abantu n'ey'enyamaishwa." 
Numbers31:27 Mugibaganise omu bicweka bibiri, ekimwe mukihe abarwani abagiire aha rugamba, n'ekindi mukihe eihanga ryona." 
Numbers31:28 Mwihe aha bagiire aha rugamba eby'okutoijera Nyakubaho, ekintu kimwe ahari magana ataano, eky'abantu, eky'ente, eky'endogoya, n'eky'amasyo g'entaama." 
Numbers31:29 Mubiihe aha mugabo gwabo, mubihe Eleazaari omuhongyerezi kuba omutoijo gw'okutoijera Nyakubaho." 
Numbers31:30 Kandi aha mugabo gw'Abaisiraeli munogoreho kimwe kya buri makumi ataano, eky'abantu, eky'ente, eky'endogoya, n'eky'amasyo g'entaama n'embuzi, n'eky'amatungo goona, mubihe Abaleevi abareeberera obutaaho bwa Nyakubaho." 
Numbers31:31 Musa na Eleazaari omuhongyerezi baakora nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa. 
Numbers31:32 Mbwenu eminyago eyaatsigaire aha bi abarwani baanyagire, ekahika entaama obusiriira mukaaga n'obukumi mushanju n'enkumi itaano;" 
Numbers31:33 ente obukumi mushanju n'enkumi ibiri; 
Numbers31:34 endogoya obukumi mukaaga na rukumi," 
Numbers31:35 kandi omuri abo bantu, abaishiki abaabaire batakabyamaga na bashaija baahika obukumi bushatu n'enkumi ibiri." 
Numbers31:36 Ekicweka kyabyo, nigwo mugabo gw'abaagiire aha rugamba, kikahika entaama obusiriira bushatu n'obukumi bushatu n'enkumi mushanju na magana ataano." 
Numbers31:37 Reero omutoijo gwa Nyakubaho gwaba entaama magana mukaaga na makumi mushanju na itaano. 
Numbers31:38 Ente zikaba obukumi bushatu n'enkumi mukaaga; ahari ezo Nyakubaho baamutoijeraho makumi mushanju na ibiri. 
Numbers31:39 Endogoya zikaba obukumi bushatu na magana ataano, ahari ezo omutoijo gwa Nyakubaho gwaba makumi mukaaga n'emwe." 
Numbers31:40 Abantu bakaba akakumi kamwe n'enkumi mukaaga, Nyakubaho baamuhongyeraho abantu makumi ashatu na babiri." 
Numbers31:41 Musa, ebintu bi baihiireho Nyakubaho kuba omutoijo, yaabiha Eleazaari omuhongyerezi, nk'oku Mukama yaaragiire Musa ogwo." 
Numbers31:42 Ekicweka kyabyo eky'Abaisiraeli eki Musa yaihire aha ky'abantu abaagiire aha rugamba 
Numbers31:43 kiri omugabo gw'eihanga, kikahitsya entaama obusiriira bushatu n'obukumi bushatu n'enkumi mushanju na magana ataano;" 
Numbers31:44 ente obukumi bushatu n'enkumi mukaaga," 
Numbers31:45 n'endogoya obukumi bushatu na magana ataano," 
Numbers31:46 n'abantu akakumi kamwe n'enkumi mukaaga. 
Numbers31:47 Kandi Musa, ekicweka eky'Abaisiraeli yaakiihaho ekintu kimwe, ahari buri makumi ataano ag'abantu n'ag'enyamaishwa, yaabiha Abaleevi abaabaire bareeberera Obutaaho bwa Nyakubaho, nk'oku Mukama yaamuragiire." 
Numbers31:48 Bwanyima abakuru abarikutegyeka enkumi n'enkumi ez'ab'omu ihe, abeebembezi b'enkumi n'ab'abantu igana bakahika Musa," 
Numbers31:49 baamugira bati: itwe abaheereza baawe twabara abantu abarwani abu turikutegyeka, haza twashanga hatariho muntu n'omwe obuzire." 
Numbers31:50 Mbwenu twareetera Nyakubaho omutoijo aha bi buri muntu anyagire: eby'ezaabu, engoro z'aha mikono, n'ebyanganga by'aha maguru, empeta eziriho obumanyiso, n'ez'omu matu, n'enkwanzi kubihongyera Nyakubaho, bikaba ekarabo yaitu omu maisho ge." 
Numbers31:51 Musa na Eleazaari omuhongyerezi baabaihaho ezo zaabu, n'ebindi bintu byona ebiheesirwe." 
Numbers31:52 Haza ezaabu y'omutoijo gu batoijeire Nyakubaho gumuhongyeirwe abeebembezi b'engabo rukumi rukumi, n'aba igana-igana, gwahitsya obuguzi bw'empiiha akakumi kamwe n'enkumi mukaaga na magana mushanju na makumi ataano." 
Numbers31:53 Obwo buri murwani yaaherize kutwara omunyago ogwe, buri muntu ogwe ahabwe." 
Numbers31:54 Reero Musa na Eleazaari omuhongyerezi nikwo kwakiira ezaabu eyaatoizirwe abategyeki b'engabo rukumi-rukumi, n'aba igana-igana, bakagita omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, kuguma eri ekiijutsyo ky'Abaisiraeli omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Numbers32:1 Mbwenu beene Reubeeni na beene Gaadi bakaba baine amatungo maingi munonga, baareeba ekyanga kya Gazeri n'ekya Gileadi biri emyanya mirungi y'amatungo." 
Numbers32:2 Batyo beene Gaadi na beene Reubeeni baija baagambira Musa na Eleazaari omuhongyerezi, n'abeebembezi b'eihanga bati:" 
Numbers32:3 Atarooti, Diboni, Yazeri, Nimura, Heshibooni, Eleale, Sebamu, Neebo na Beoni," 
Numbers32:4 egyo nsi ei Nyakubaho yaasingwire Abaisiraeli boona nibeereebera, n'ensi y'amatungo; haza itwe abairu baawe tugaine." 
Numbers32:5 Bagaruka bagira bati: Ku oraabe nookitusiimira, egyo nsi ogituhe, itwe abairu baawe, ebe eyaitu; otatwambutsya Yorudaani." 
Numbers32:6 Kwonka Musa agira beene Gaadi na beene Reubeeni ati: Mbwenu beene waanyu bahurure, haza imwe mugume aha?" 
Numbers32:7 Nimucwera ki Abaisiraeli omuhimbo, mukabazibira kwambuka kuza omu nsi ei Nyakubaho yaabahaire?" 
Numbers32:8 Manya na baashoimwe nikwo baagizire, obu naabatuma kutata egyo nsi tukiri Kadeshibarinea." 
Numbers32:9 Ahabw'okuba ku bainamukire, baahika omu ruhanga rwa Eshekooli, haza baareeba egyo nsi, baahahaaza Abaisiraeli omutima, ngu bataza omu nsi ei Nyakubaho yaabahaire." 
Numbers32:10 Ekyo kyareetera Mukama kugira ekiniga kingi eryo izooba; yaarahira naagira ati: 
Numbers32:11 Buzimazima tihariho n'omwe omuri abo bantu abaarugire Misiri, ab'emyaka makumi abiri y'obukuru n'okukiraho, orireeba ensi ei naarahiire kuha Aburahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo; ahabw'okuba tibankuratiriire kimwe," 
Numbers32:12 kureka Kalebu mwene Yefuune Omukenizi, na Yoshwa mwene Nuuni; ahabw'okuba bo bakankuratirira kimwe." 
Numbers32:13 Reero Mukama yaagirira Abaisiraeli ekiniga kingi, yaabazengyereza omu ihamba emyaka makumi ana, okuhitsya obu ab'oruzaaro orwo boona abaacumwire ahari Nyakubaho, baahwaireho." 
Numbers32:14 Mbwenu reeba, mugarukire omu mwanya gwa baashoimwe, oruzaaro rw'enkozi z'ebibi, kwongyera kureetera Nyakubaho kugirira Abaisiraeli ekiniga kingi." 
Numbers32:15 Manya ku muraamurugyeho, mwayanga kumukuratira, nawe naija kugaruka abatsigyeho omuri eri ihamba, mureetere eihanga ryona kucwekyerera." 
Numbers32:16 Nabo nikwo kumwirira haihi, bakamugira bati: Nitwija kuzitirira amasyo gaitu aha, twombekyere abaana baitu endembo." 
Numbers32:17 Haza tukwate eby'okurwanisa, twebembere Abaisiraeli, okuhitsya obu baraahikye omu kyanga kyabo. Kwonka abaana baitu bagume omu ndembo zigumire, ahabw'okwerinda abatwire omuri egi nsi." 
Numbers32:18 Titurikwija kugaruka mu maka gaitu, okuhitsya obu Abaisiraeli boona buri omwe araatungye obutaka bwe bw'obuhunguzi." 
Numbers32:19 Manya itwe titurikwija kuheebwa hamwe nabo itaka ry'obuhunguzi erya seeri ya Yorudaani n'okweyongyerayo; ahabw'okuba itwe twatunga eryaitu ry'obuhunguzi seenu ya Yorudaani, orubaju rwa burugwa-izooba." 
Numbers32:20 Musa nawe nikwo kubagira ati: Ku muraakore ekyo, mwakwata eby'okurwanisa, mwagyenda mwebembeire Nyakubaho nimuza aha rugamba," 
Numbers32:21 kandi buri omwe omuriimwe ohagatiire eby'okurwanisa yaayambuka Yorudaani ayebembeire Nyakubaho okuhitsya obu araabingye abazigu be, bakamuhigiza," 
Numbers32:22 egyo nsi ekamugomookyera; obwo nibwo muraagarukye n'obusingye, mutaine ki murikutongwa ahari Nyakubaho n'ahari Isiraeli: haza egi nsi ekaba eyaanyu y'obuhunguzi eikiriziibwe Nyakubaho." 
Numbers32:23 Kwonka ku muraabe mutatwarize mutyo, nimuba mucumwire ahari Nyakubaho, kandi mukimanye ku ekyo kibi kyanyu kiribahindukana." 
Numbers32:24 Mbwenu nimwombekyere abaana baanyu endembo, muzitirire entaama zaanyu; haza mukore eki mwaraganisa." 
Numbers32:25 Beene Gaadi na beene Reubeeni nikwo kugira Musa bati: Eego, itwe abairu baawe nitwija kukora nk'oku waaragiira." 
Numbers32:26 Abaana baitu, n'abakazi baitu, n'amasyo gaitu g'entaama, n'ente zaitu zoona, nibiija kuguma omu ndembo za Gileadi." 
Numbers32:27 Haza itwe abairu baawe twambukye, buri muntu ahagatiire eby'okurwanisa, tuhurure twebembeire Nyakubaho, nk'oku iwe mukama waitu waaturagiira." 
Numbers32:28 Musa ebikwatiraine nabo abiragiira Eleazaari omuhongyerezi, na Yoshwa mwene Nuuni, n'abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo ab'enganda z'Abaisiraeli." 
Numbers32:29 Haza abagira ati: Beene Gaadi na beene Reubeeni, buri mushaija ohagatiire eby'okurwanisa kurwana orugamba beebembeire Nyakubaho, ku baryambuka Yorudaani hamwe naimwe, egyo nsi mwagigomoora, obwo mubahe ensi ya Gileadi ebe eyaabo y'obuhunguzi." 
Numbers32:30 Kwonka ku bariba batambukire naimwe, bahagatiire eby'okurwanisa, obwo baryaheebwa hamwe naimwe eitaka ry'obuhunguzi omu nsi ya Kanaani." 
Numbers32:31 Mpaho beene Gaadi na beene Reubeeni bamugarukamu bati: Nk'oku Nyakubaho yaatugambira itwe abairu baawe, nikwo turaakore." 
Numbers32:32 Nitwija kwambuka tukwaitse eby'okurwanisa, twebembeire Nyakubaho, tuze omu nsi ya Kanaani: haza obutaka bwaitu bw'obuhunguzi tugume nabwo seenu ya Yorudaani." 
Numbers32:33 Musa atyo aha beene Gaadi na beene Reubeeni n'ekicweka ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase mwene Yosefu ensi y'obugabe bwa Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori, n'ey'obugabe bwa Oogi omugabe w'Ababashani, egyo nsi hamwe n'endembo zaayo zoona n'ebyanga byayo." 
Numbers32:34 Beene Gaadi baayombeka Diboni, Atarooti, Aroeri," 
Numbers32:35 Atroti-Soofani, Yazeri, Yogibeha," 
Numbers32:36 Beetinimura na Beetiharaani, endembo zigumire, baazitira n'engo z'entaama zaabo." 
Numbers32:37 Reero beene Reubeeni baayombeka Heshibooni, Elale, Kiriyataimu," 
Numbers32:38 Neebo na Balimeoni (baahindura n'amaziina gaazo), na Sibama; kandi n'ezindi ndembo zi baayombekire, baazeeta amaziina." 
Numbers32:39 Beene Makiri mutabani wa Manaase baaza Gileadi, bagikubuura, baabingamu Abaamori abaagitwiremu." 
Numbers32:40 Musa yaaha Makiri mwene Manaase Gileadi, n'onu yaagituuramu." 
Numbers32:41 Na Yairo mwene Manaase yaagyenda yaakubuura ebyaro byabo, yaabyeta Haavoti-Yairo." 
Numbers32:42 Kandi Noobaha yaakubuura Kenati n'ebyaro byayo, yaagyeta Noobaha, kuguma neeyetererwa eiziina rye." 
Numbers33:1 Ezi nizo ndaariro z'Abaisiraeli obu baaruga omu nsi ya Misiri, bari omu bimbuuro by'enganda zaabo, beebembeirwe Musa na Arooni." 
Numbers33:2 Musa akahandiika endaariro zaabo, nk'oku zaakurataine, naihirira ahi zaatandikiire, nk'oku Mukama yaaragiire. Mbwenu ezi nizo ndaariro zaabo, nk'oku zaagyenzire nizikuratana." 
Numbers33:3 Abaisiraeli bakaimutsya orugyendo baaruga Rameseesi, omu kwezi kw'okubanza, aha kiro kya ikumi na bitaano eky'okwo kwezi; ekiro ekyakuratsire Okuhingurwaho. Baagyenda nibeemurika, Abanyamisiri boona babahangire amaisho;" 
Numbers33:4 obwo nibakiziika emijigaijo yaabo yoona, ei Mukama yaabaitsiremu, naafubira emandwa zaabo." 
Numbers33:5 Abaisiraeli batyo baimutsya orugyendo, baaruga Rameseesi, baasiisira Sukooti." 
Numbers33:6 Ku baarugire Sukooti, baateera ensiisira Etamu, eri ahu eihamba ririkutandikira." 
Numbers33:7 Ku baarugire Etamu, baagaruka enyima, baaza Pihahirooti, eri aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba bwa Baalizifooni, baasiisira omu maisho ga Migidooli." 
Numbers33:8 Ku baimukize omu maisho ga Hahirooti, baaraba ahagati y'enyanja, baahika omu ihamba. Batyo baagyenda orugyendo rw'ebiro bishatu omu ihamba rya Etamu, baasiisira Maara." 
Numbers33:9 Baimutsya, baaruga Maara, baahika Elimu. Okwo Elimu hakaba hariyo enshuro ikumi na ibiri z'amaizi, n'emiti y'emikindo makumi mushanju; baaba niho baasiisira." 
Numbers33:10 Baaruga Elimu, baasiisira aha rubaju rw'Enyanja Erikutukura." 
Numbers33:11 Ku baarugire aha Nyanja Erikutukura, baasiisira omu ihamba rya Siini." 
Numbers33:12 Ku baimukize orugyendo, baaruga omu ihamba rya Siini, baasiisira Dofika." 
Numbers33:13 Baaruga Dofika, baasiisira Alushi." 
Numbers33:14 Batyo ku baaruga Alushi, baasiisira Refidimu, ahi baashangire hatariyo maizi g'okunywa." 
Numbers33:15 Ku baruga aho Refidimu, basiisira omu ihamba rya Sinaayi." 
Numbers33:16 Ku baaruga omu ihamba rya Sinaayi, baasiisira Kiiburotihataava." 
Numbers33:17 Baruga Kiiburotihataava, basiisira Hezerooti." 
Numbers33:18 Reero baruga Hazerooti, basiisira Ritima." 
Numbers33:19 Ku baruga Ritima, basiisira Riimonipeerezi." 
Numbers33:20 Ku baarugire Riimonipeerezi, baasiisira Libuna." 
Numbers33:21 Baaruga Libuna, baasiisira Riisa." 
Numbers33:22 Ku baarugire Riisa, baasiisira Kehelaata." 
Numbers33:23 Bakiruga Kehelaata, basiisira omu Rushozi rwa Sheeferi." 
Numbers33:24 Reero ku baruga omu Rushozi rwa Sheeferi, basiisira Haraada," 
Numbers33:25 ku baruga Haraada, basiisira Makaheelooti." 
Numbers33:26 Baruga Makaheelooti, basiisira Taahati." 
Numbers33:27 Ku baimukize Tahaati, baasiisira Teera." 
Numbers33:28 Baaruga Teera, baasiisira Miitika;" 
Numbers33:29 baaruga Miitika, baasiisira Hashimoona." 
Numbers33:30 Ku baruga Hashimoona, basiisira Moserooti." 
Numbers33:31 Bakiruga Moserooti, basiisira Beeneyakaani." 
Numbers33:32 Baruga Beeneyakaani, basiisira Horihagigaadi." 
Numbers33:33 Baruga Horihagigaadi, basiisira Yotibaata." 
Numbers33:34 Ku baimukize Yotibaata, baasiisira Aburoona." 
Numbers33:35 Ku baarugire Aburoona, baasiisira Ezionigeberi." 
Numbers33:36 Baaruga Esionigeberi, baasiisira omu ihamba rya Ziini (niyo Kadeshi)." 
Numbers33:37 Reero ku baarugire Kadeshi, baasiisira aha Rushozi rwa Hoori, aha mwatano gw'ensi ya Edomu." 
Numbers33:38 Ku baahikire aho, Arooni omuhongyerezi yaatemba Orushozi Hoori, ahabw'okuragiirwa Nyakubaho, haza yaagwayo, omu mwaka gwa makumi ana, Abaisiraeli baherize kuruga omu nsi ya Misiri, aha kiro ky'okubanza, eky'okwezi kwa kataano." 
Numbers33:39 Kandi Arooni obu yaafeera aha Rushozi Hoori, akaba ahikize emyaka igana na makumi abiri n'eshatu y'obukuru." 
Numbers33:40 Reero Omunyakanaani omugabe wa Aradi, owaabaire atwire Negebu, omu nsi ya Kanaani, yaahurira ku Abaisiraeli barikwija." 
Numbers33:41 Mbwenu ku baimukize orugyendo, baaruga aha Rushozi Hoori, baasiisira Zaalumoona." 
Numbers33:42 Ku baarugire Zaalumoona, baasiisira Punoni." 
Numbers33:43 Baaruga Punoni, baasiisira Oboti." 
Numbers33:44 Baaruga Oboti, baasiisira Iyeabarimu, omu nsi ya Moabu." 
Numbers33:45 Ku baarugire Iyimu, baasiisira Diboni-Gaadi." 
Numbers33:46 Ku baruga Diboni-Gaadi, basiisira Alimooni-Dibulataimu." 
Numbers33:47 Okuruga aho Alimooni-Dibulataimu, basiisira omu nshozi za Abariimu ahashungaine na Neebo." 
Numbers33:48 Mbwenu ku baimukize orugyendo, baaruga omu nshozi za Abariimu, baasiisira omu mpita za Moabu haihi na Yorudaani, aharikureebana na Yeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Bakasiisira haihi na Yorudaani, okwiha Betiyeshimooti okuta Abalishitimu omu mpita za Moabu." 
Numbers33:50 Mukama akagambirira Musa omu mpita za Moabu, haihi na Yorudaani ahashungaine na Yeriko, ati:" 
Numbers33:51 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Ku muraayambukye Yorudaani, mwahika omu nsi ya Kanaani," 
Numbers33:52 mubingye abatuuzi baamwo boona abu muraashangyeyo. Mucwekyereze ebishushani byabo byona ebishariirwe omu mabaare, n'ebishushani byabo byona ebiheesirwe; kandi musheenye endaaro zaabo zoona;" 
Numbers33:53 haza mukubuure egyo nsi, mugituuremu; ahabw'okuba niimwe ngihaire kuba eyaanyu." 
Numbers33:54 Ensi egyo mugihungure nimugiteerera enteenyu, nk'emiryango yaanyu oku eri. Ab'oruganda ruhango mubahe eitaka rihango ry'obuhunguzi, n'ab'orukye mubahe rikye. Omwanya gwona ogu enteenyu eraakwatire omuntu gube nigwo gwaba ogwe, haza mugihungure nk'enganda za baashwenkuriimwe oku ziri." 
Numbers33:55 Kwonka ku muraabe mutabingire batuuzi b'omuri egyo nsi abu muraashangyeyo, abo abu muraarekye bakagumamu baryababeera akagimbi k'omu riisho, n'eihwa ry'omu rubaju, babatunturize omuri egyo nsi ei mutwiremu;" 
Numbers33:56 haza naimwe mbagire nk'oku naakugizire bariya. 
Numbers34:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Numbers34:2 Ragiira Abaisiraeli obagire oti: Ku muraahikye omu nsi ya Kanaani (niyo nsi eraabe eyaanyu y'obuhunguzi, ensi ya Kanaani hoona ahu erikugarukira)," 
Numbers34:3 ey'aha bukiizi-bwanyu-bwa-buryo, eihe aha ihamba rya Ziini, neeraba aha rubaju rwa Edomu, kandi omwatano gwanyu gw'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo gwihe ahu Enyanja y'Omwonyo erikugarukira, aha burugwa-izooba," 
Numbers34:4 reero omwataano gwanyu gukiikame, gugarure aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo aharikwinamukira Akarabimu, gucwekanise, guhikye Ziini, kandi gugarukire aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo obwa Kadeshibarinea, gugumizemu guhikye Haazaraada, gwogyemu guhikye Azimooni." 
Numbers34:5 Bwanyima ogwo mwatano gurugye Azimooni, gukiikame guze aha Kagyera ka Misiri, gugarukire aha Nyanja." 
Numbers34:6 Aha rubaju rwa burengyerwa-izooba, omwatano gwanyu gube Enyanja Empango n'omwegyeego gwayo. Ogwo gube nigwo gwaba omwatano gwanyu burengyerwa-izooba." 
Numbers34:7 Kandi ogu gube nigwo gwaba omwatano gwanyu gw'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho; okwiha aha nyanja empango, muteho obumanyiso bw'omwatano, okuhika aha Rushozi Hoori." 
Numbers34:8 Okwiha aha Rushozi Hoori, nabwo muteho obumanyiso okuhitsya aharikurabwa nootaaha omuri Hamati; kandi ogwo mwatano gugarukire Zedadi." 
Numbers34:9 Reero gugumizemu guhikye Zifurooni, omuheru gwago gube Haazareena. Ogwo nigwo guraabe omwatano gwanyu gw'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Numbers34:10 Muteho obumanyiso bw'omwatano ogwa burugwa-izooba, okwiha Haazareenamu okuta Sheefamu." 
Numbers34:11 Omwatano gushuume nigwiha Sheefamu, okuhika Ribula, aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba bwa Aini. Haza gushuume guhikye aha rubaju rw'enyanja ya Kiinereeti, ahari burugwa-izooba." 
Numbers34:12 Kandi gurundukye guhikye Yorudaani, gugarukire aha Nyanja y'Omwonyo. Egyo niyo eraabe ensi yaanyu, hamwe n'emyatano yaayo egyehinguririize." 
Numbers34:13 Musa atyo aragiira Abaisiraeli naabagira ati: Egyo niyo nsi ei muraahungure, nimugiteerera enteenyu. Niyo Nyakubaho aragiire kuha ab'enganda mwenda n'ekicweka;" 
Numbers34:14 ahabw'okuba ab'oruganda rwa beene Reubeeni, nk'emiryango ya baishenkurubo oku eri, n'ab'oruganda rwa beene Gaadi, nk'emiryango ya baishenkurubo oku eri, kandi n'ekicweka ky'oruganda rw'aba Manaase, baherize kutunga ebyanga byabo by'obuhunguzi." 
Numbers34:15 Ezo nganda zombi n'ekicweka ky'oruganda ziherize kuheebwa ebyanga byazo by'obuhunguzi seenu ya Yorudaani ahashungaine na Yeriko ogurikugarura burugwa-izooba, ei eizooba rituruka." 
Numbers34:16 Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Numbers34:17 Aga nigo maziina g'abantu abaraababaganisize ensi y'okuhungura: Eleazaari omuhongyerezi, na Yoshwa mwene Nuuni." 
Numbers34:18 Kandi omu buri ruganda otooranemu omwebembezi omwe kubaganisa egyo nsi y'okuhungura. 
Numbers34:19 Mbwenu aga nigo maziina g'abo bashaija: Omu b'oruganda rwa Yuda, Kalebu mwene Yefuune;" 
Numbers34:20 omu b'oruganda rwa beene Simeoni, Sheumeli mwene Amihuudi;" 
Numbers34:21 omu b'oruganda rwa Benyamiini, Elidaadi mwene Kisilooni;" 
Numbers34:22 omu b'oruganda rwa beene Daani, omwebembezi ni Buuki mwene Yooguli;" 
Numbers34:23 omuri beene Yosefu: omu b'oruganda rwa beene Manaase, omwebembezi ni Hanieli mwene Efodi;" 
Numbers34:24 kandi omu b'oruganda rwa beene Efuraimu, omwebembezi ni Kemueli mwene Shifataani;" 
Numbers34:25 omu b'oruganda rwa beene Zebuluuni, omwebembezi ni Elizafani mwene Paranaaki;" 
Numbers34:26 omu b'oruganda rwa beene Isakaari, omwebembezi ni Palateile mwene Azani;" 
Numbers34:27 kandi omu b'oruganda rwa beene Asheri, omwebembezi ni Ahihuudi mwene Shelooni;" 
Numbers34:28 omu b'oruganda rwa beene Nafutaali, omwebembezi ni Pedaaheli mwene Amihuudi." 
Numbers34:29 Abo nibo bashaija bu Nyakubaho yaaragiire kubaganisiza Abaisiraeli ebyanga by'okuhungura omu nsi ya Kanaani. 
Numbers35:1 Nyakubaho akagambirira Musa omu mpita za Moabu haihi na Yorudaani aharikushungana na Yeriko, ati:" 
Numbers35:2 Ragiira Abaisiraeli bahe Abaleevi endembo z'omu butaka bwabo obu bahungwire zibe ezaabo z'okutuuramu. Kandi Abaleevi abo mubahe eitaka ry'okuriisizamu, eryehinguririize ezo ndembo." 
Numbers35:3 Endembo zibe ezaabo z'okutuuramu, kandi n'eitaka ribe ry'okuriisizamu ente zaabo n'amatungo gaabo n'enyamaishwa zaabo zoona." 
Numbers35:4 Eitaka ry'amariisizo g'aha ndembo, eri muraahe Abaleevi, riihe aha kisiika ky'orurembo, rigumizemu rihitsye entambwe rukumi okurwehinguririza." 
Numbers35:5 Kandi mugyere aheeru y'orurembo aha rubaju orwa burugwa-izooba, entambwe enkumi ibiri, n'aha rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, entambwe enkumi ibiri, n'aha rw'obwa burengyerwa-izooba, entambwe enkumi ibiri, kandi n'aha rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, entambwe enkumi ibiri; orurembo ruze ahagati. Ago gabe nigo gaaba amariisizo g'aha ndembo zaabo." 
Numbers35:6 Endembo zi muraahe Abaleevi zibe endembo mukaaga z'okuhungiramu, ezi oitsire omuntu murimwikiriza kuhungiramu. Kandi ahari ezo ndembo mwongyereho ezindi makumi ana na ibiri." 
Numbers35:7 Endembo zoona ezi muraahe Abaleevi zibe makumi ana na munaana, hamwe n'amariisizo gaazo." 
Numbers35:8 Endembo zi muraahe nimuziiha aha itaka ry'Abaisiraeli ery'obuhunguzi, enganda empango muziiheho nyingi, n'enganda enkye muziiheho nkye. Mureebere aha buhango, nari aha bukye bw'eitaka ry'obuhunguzi eri buri ruganda ruhungwire, haza mube nikwo mwarwihaho endembo z'okuha Abaleevi." 
Numbers35:9 Kandi Nyakubaho akagira Musa ati: 
Numbers35:10 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Ku muryambuka Yorudaani, mwahika omu nsi ya Kaanani," 
Numbers35:11 mutoorane endembo zibe ezaanyu z'okuhungiramu, omuntu weena owaita ondi atamwitsire nkana, abone kuhungiramu." 
Numbers35:12 Ezo ndembo zibabeere obuhungiro bw'okukiriramu omuhoozi w'enzigu, reero owaita omuntu atamwitsire nkana, arekye kufa atakeemereziibwe mu maisho g'abakuru b'eihanga kucwerwa orubanja." 
Numbers35:13 Kandi ezo ndembo mukaaga ezi muriha, nizo ziriba ezaanyu z'okuhungiramu." 
Numbers35:14 Muryaha endembo ishatu aba seenu, kandi ezindi ishatu ab'omu nsi ya Kanaani, kuba endembo z'okuhungiramu." 
Numbers35:15 Ezo ndembo mukaaga ziryaba obuhungiro bw'Abaisiraeli, n'omunyaihanga n'omushuuhuuki obatwiremu; omuntu weena oitsire ondi atamwitsire nkana, abone kuhungiramu." 
Numbers35:16 Kwonka ku arimuteeza ekikwato ky'ekyoma, yaamugwisaho, biri amwitsire nkana kandi ogwo mwitsi aitwe." 
Numbers35:17 Ku arimuteeza eibaare ri aine omu ngaro eririkubaasa kwita omuntu; haza onu yaafa; biri amwitsire nkana, kandi ogwo mwitsi aitwe." 
Numbers35:18 Nari ku arimuteeza eky'okurwanisa ky'ekiti eki aine omu ngaro, ekirikubaasa kwita omuntu, haza onu yaafa, biri amwitsire nkana, kandi ogwo mwitsi aitwe." 
Numbers35:19 Orikuhoorera kiitwa abe niwe yaita ogwo mwitsi wa nkana; ku arimubugana, amwite." 
Numbers35:20 Kandi ku arimucumita amwiniire rwango, nari yaamugwera, yaamurekyera, n'onu yaafa," 
Numbers35:21 nainga ahabw'obuzigu yaamuteera entomi nari oruhi, yaamwikarira, n'onu yaafa, ogwo owaamuteera aitwe, biri n'omwitsi wa nkana. Orikuhoorera kiitwa ku aribugana ogwo mwitsi wa nkana, amwite." 
Numbers35:22 Kwonka ku arihikiirirwa, yaamucumita ataine nziika, nari yaamurekyera ekintu atamugwereire," 
Numbers35:23 nainga ku arikwata eibaare ririkubaasa kwita omuntu, yaarirekyera atamureebire, ryamuteera, n'onu yaafa, haza atari muzigu we, kandi atarikwenda kumukora kubi," 
Numbers35:24 obwo abakuru b'eihanga baryacwa orubanja rwa kiita n'orikwenda kuhoorera kiitwa enzigu, nk'oku ebiragiro ebi biri." 
Numbers35:25 Kandi eihanga rijune kiita ogwo muhoozi w'enzigu ya kiitwa, eihanga rigarure kiita omu rurembo rwe orw'obuhungiro oru yaahungiiremu, arugumemu, okuhitsya obu omuhongyerezi omukuru owaasiigirwe amajuta agarikwera arifa." 
Numbers35:26 Kwonka kiita ku arigira obu arengire emyatano y'orurembo rwe rw'obuhungiro oru ahungiiremu," 
Numbers35:27 haza orikuhoorera kiitwa yaamushanga aheeru y'enyatano z'orurembo rwe rw'obuhungiro, kihoorera kiitwa yaita kiita, tarigiibwaho rubanja rw'okwita omuntu;" 
Numbers35:28 ahabw'okuba ogwo muntu naaragiirwa kuguma omu rurembo rwe rw'obuhungiro, okuhitsya obu omuhongyerezi omukuru arifa. Kwonka omuhongyerezi omukuru ku arifa, kiita naikirizibwa kugaruka aha butaka bwe." 
Numbers35:29 Mbwenu ebyo bigume biri ebiragiro ebibateereirweho omu busingye bwanyu bwona ahi mutwire hoona. 
Numbers35:30 Omuntu weena oriita ondi, ogwo mwitsi wa nkana aitwe, haaba hariho abarikumushinja, kandi hatarigira owaitwa ahabw'okushinjwa omuntu omwe." 
Numbers35:31 N'ekindi, mutaryakiira encungurano y'okukiza amagara g'oitsire omuntu nkana, oine orubanja rw'okwitwa, kureka aitwe." 
Numbers35:32 Kandi mutaryakiira eky'okucungura ohungiire omu rurembo rwe orw'obuhungiro, ngu abone kugaruka kutuura omu butaka bwe, omuhongyerezi omukuru atakafiire." 
Numbers35:33 Obwo nibwo mutarishiisha nsi ei mutwiremu. Manya eshagama eshiisha ensi. Haza tihariho kirikubaasa kukarabira ensi ahabw'eshagama egisheeshekireho, kureka eshagama y'ogwo owaagiseesire." 
Numbers35:34 Otarishiisha ensi ei otwiremu, ei ntwire ahagati. Manya nyowe Nyakubaho ntuura ahagati y'Abaisiraeli." 
Numbers36:1 Abakuru b'amaju ga baishenkurubo ab'emiryango ya beene Gileadi, mwene Makiri, mwene Manaase, ab'emiryango ya baishenkuru beene Yosefu, bakaija baayetonganira omu maisho ga Musa, n'ag'abeebembezi, n'ag'abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkuru Abaisiraeli," 
Numbers36:2 nibagira bati: Nyakubaho akakuragiira, iwe mukama waitu, kuha Abaisiraeli obutaka bw'obuhunguzi, nibabuteerera enteenyu, kandi iwe mukama waitu, Nyakubaho akakuragiira kuha bahara ba Zelofehaadi mwene waitu obutaka bw'obuhunguzi." 
Numbers36:3 Kwonka abaishiki ku bashwerwa aboojo b'ezindi nganda z'Abaisiraeli, obuhunguzi bwabo bwihwa aha bwa baatataitwe, bwongyerwa aha buhunguzi bw'ab'oruganda ru bashweirwemu. Mbwenu obuhunguzi obwo nibwija kwihwa aha mugabo gw'obuhunguzi bwaitu." 
Numbers36:4 Kandi omwaka gw'okushemererwa kw'Abaisiraeli ku gurihika, obuhunguzi bwabo buryayongyerwa aha buhunguzi bw'oruganda ru bashweirwemu, haza obuhunguzi bwabo bwihwe aha buhunguzi bwa baatataitwe." 
Numbers36:5 Musa atyo aragiira Abaisiraeli, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamugambira, naagira ati: Ab'oruganda rwa beene Yosefu bahikire." 
Numbers36:6 Mbwenu eki nikyo Nyakubaho yaaragiira, ekikwatiraine na bahara ba Zelofehaadi. Mubarekye bashwerwe abu barikusiima, kwonka bagume bashwerwe omu b'omuryango gw'ab'oruganda rwa baishenkurubo." 
Numbers36:7 Obuhunguzi bw'Abaisiraeli butariihwa omu ruganda, bukatwarwa omu rundi; ahabw'okuba omuntu weena ow'omu Baisiraeli aryaguma omu buhunguzi bw'oruganda rwa baishenkuru." 
Numbers36:8 Kandi muhara w'omuntu weena oine obuhunguzi omu ruganda rw'Abaisiraeli, naaragiirwa kushwerwa ow'omuryango gw'oruganda rwa ishenkuru, omuntu weena ow'omu Baisiraeli abone kutunga obuhunguzi bwa ishenkuru." 
Numbers36:9 N'ahabw'ekyo hatarigira obuhunguzi obwaihwa omu ruganda, bukatwarwa omu rundi; ahabw'okuba buri ruganda rw'Abaisiraeli rushemereire kuhamira aha buhunguzi bwarwo." 
Numbers36:10 Batyo bahara ba Zelofehaadi baatwaza nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa; 
Numbers36:11 ahabw'okuba Mahalaha, Tiriza, Hogula, Milika na Noa, bahara ba Zelofehaadi, bakashwerwa batabani ba baishentobo." 
Numbers36:12 Baashwerwa omu b'emiryango ya beene Manaase mwene Yosefu; obuhunguzi bwabo bwaguma omu ruganda rw'ab'omuryango gwa ishebo. 
Numbers36:13 Ebyo nibyo biragiro n'amateeka ebi Nyakubaho yaaragiire Abaisiraeli omu mpita za Moabu haihi na Yorudaani, ahashungaine na Yeriko, naabituma Musa." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Ebi nibyo Musa yaagambiire Abaisiraeli boona seenu ya Yorudaani, omu ihamba ry'omuri Araba, ahashungaine na Suufu, ahagati ya Parani na Tafeli, Labaani, Hazerooti na Dinahabu." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Okuruga Horebu otoire ogw'aha Rushozi Seiri okuhika Kadeshibarinea n'orugyendo rw'ebiro ikumi na kimwe. 
Deuteronomy1:3 Reero omu mwaka gwa makumi ana, aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwezi kwa ikumi na kumwe, Musa akagambira Abaisiraeli ebi Nyakubaho yaabaire amuragiire kubagambira," 
Deuteronomy1:4 obwo yaaherize kusingura Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori, owaabaire atwire Heshibooni, na Oogi omugabe wa Bashani, owaabaire atwire Ashitarooti ey'omuri Edurei." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Musa yaatandika kushoboorora eby'eiteeka, ari seenu ya Yorudaani omu nsi ya Moabu; naagira ati:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 Mukama Ruhanga waitu akatugambirira Horebu ati: Mutwire munonga ahari oru rushozi. 
Deuteronomy1:7 Mbwenu nimwimutsye, mugumizemu orugyendo rwanyu, muze omu nsi y'ebibungo ey'Abaamori, n'ahandi hoona ahahereraine nabo omuri Araba, omu nsi y'ebibungo, n'omu mpita, n'omuri Negebu, n'aha mwegyeego gw'enyanja empango, omu nsi y'Abanyakanaani na Lebanooni okuhikira kimwe aha mugyera omuhango Eufuraati." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Reero ensi ngigyo mugizemu, mugikubuure. Niyo nsi ei Nyakubaho yaaraganiise baashwenkuriimwe, Aburahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo, kugibaha na baijukuru baabo abaribaza omu bigyere." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Naanye obwo nkabagira nti: Tindikubaasa kubeebembera nyenka," 
Deuteronomy1:10 ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho abakanyiise. Mbwenu reeba hati muri baingi nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru. 
Deuteronomy1:11 Mukama Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe naakabakanyise emirundi rukumi, akabaha emigisha, nk'oku yaabaraganiise." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Mbwenu nyowe nyenka nimbaasa nta kwekorera oburemeezi bwanyu, n'okwemera entongane zaanyu?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Nimutoorane abashaija b'obwengye, abarikwetegyereza kandi abamanyiriire omurimo, nk'enganda zaanyu oku ziri; haza naanye mbahindure abategyeki baanyu." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Naimwe mukangarukamu muti: Eki waagamba ni kirungi itwe kukikora. 
Deuteronomy1:15 Naanye nikwo kutoorana abakuru b'enganda zaanyu, abashaija abanyabwengye kandi abamanyiriire omurimo, nkabahindura abeebembezi baanyu, abamwe kutegyeka abantu rukumi, abandi igana, abandi makumi ataano, abandi ikumi, n'abandi kuba abatware b'enganda zaanyu zoona." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Kandi obwo bunaku nkeehanangiriza abaramuzi baanyu nti: Mugume muhurire emanja za beene waanyu, mucwere omuntu na mwene ishe emanja z'oburyo, nari omunyaihanga otwire nawe." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Omu kucwa emanja mutarigwera orubaju; muhurire abakuru n'abato nimubainganisa; mutaritiina amaisho g'omuntu. Manya okucwa orubanja kuba okwa Ruhanga. Reero orubanja oruribarema murundeetere, nduhurire." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Kandi omu bunaku obwo nkabaragiira byona ebi mushemereire kukora.
