Deuteronomy1:19 Bwanyima tukaruga Horebu twaraba omuri eryo ihamba rihango kandi eririkutiinisa, eri mwareebire nituza omu nsi y'ebibungo ey'Abaamori, nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga waitu yaaturagiire; tutyo twahika Kadeshibarinea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Naanye naabagira nti: Hati mwahika omu nsi y'ebibungo ey'Abaamori ei Mukama Ruhanga waitu arikutuha. 
Deuteronomy1:21 Mbwenu, ngigyo Mukama Ruhanga waanyu yaagibata omu maisho. Nimwirooko mugikubuure, nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe yaabaraganiise. Mutatiina, kandi mutahahaara." 
Deuteronomy1:22 Bwanyima mwena mukaija ahi ndi mwagira muti: Ka tutume abantu batubandizeyo, batutatire egyo nsi. Haza ku baraagarukye, batugambire omuhanda gu turaatoore, n'endembo zi turaazemu." 
Deuteronomy1:23 Ekyo kikambeera kirungi, naanye naabaihamu abashaija ikumi na babiri, buri ruganda omushaija omwe." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Baimutsya orugyendo, bainamuka omu nsi y'ebibungo, baahika omu ruhanga rwa Esikooli, baarutata." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Baahumba ebijuma byamwo baija nabyo omu ngaro baabitureetera; kandi baatureetera enkuru nibagira bati: Egyo nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waitu arikutuha ni nungi. 
Deuteronomy1:26 Kwonka imwe mukanga kuzayo mwagomera ekiragiro kya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu; 
Deuteronomy1:27 mwayetomboitera omu mahema gaanyu nimugira muti: Nyakubaho ahabw'okutwanga atwihire omu nsi ya Misiri yaatureeta kuturekurira Abaamori kutucwekyereza. 
Deuteronomy1:28 Mbwenu okwo nituza hi? Beene waitu batumazire omutima omunda nibagira bati: Abo bantu ni bahango, kandi ni baraingwa nibatukira. N'endembo zaabo ni mpango kandi zeehinguririzibwe ebigo birikuhika okwo ahaiguru. Kandi ekindi tureebireyo beene Anaki." 
Deuteronomy1:29 Naanye nkabagira nti: Mutaitwa obwoba kandi mutabatiina. 
Deuteronomy1:30 Mukama Ruhanga waanyu orikubeebembera niwe araabarwanirire nk'oku yaabarwaniriire muri Misiri nimwereebera. 
Deuteronomy1:31 Kandi n'omu ihamba ei mwareebeire oku Mukama Ruhanga waanyu yaabaheekire, nk'oku omuntu aheeka omwana we, omu muhanda gwona ogu mwarabiremu okuhitsya obu mwahikire omuri ogu mwanya." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Kwonka nobu ndaabe naagambire ntyo, timureesigire Mukama Ruhanga waanyu" 
Deuteronomy1:33 owaabeebembeire omuri ogwo muhanda kubasherurira omwanya gw'okuteeramu amahema gaanyu, nyekiro ari omu nyomyo y'omuriro, na nyomushana ari omu y'ekicu." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Reero Nyakubaho akahurira ebi mwagambire, yaagira ekiniga yaarahira ati:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 Tihariho n'omwe omuri aba bantu b'oruzaaro oru orubi orireeba egyo nsi nungi, ei naarahiire kuha baashwenkuriimwe," 
Deuteronomy1:36 kureka Kalebu mwene Yefuune niwe arigireeba. Kandi egyo nsi ei yaaribatsiremu ndyagimuha we n'abaana be, ahabw'okuba ankuratiriire kimwe Nyowe Nyakubaho." 
Deuteronomy1:37 Kandi naanye Nyakubaho akangirira ekiniga ahabwanyu, yaagira ati: Naiwe torigizamu." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Yoshwa mwene Nuuni omugaragwa waawe, niwe arigihikamu. Omuteere omuhimbo, ahabw'okuba niwe arigihunguza Abaisiraeli." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Kandi abaana baanyu abato, abu mwagizire ngu baryaba omunyago, n'abaana baanyu abatakamanyire kirungi nari ekibi okuhitsya eri izooba, nibo barigizamu nkagibaha bakagikubuura." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Kwonka imwe mukube, mutoore ogw'eihamba ogurikugarura aha Nyanja Erikutukura." 
Deuteronomy1:41 Bwanyima mukangarukamu muti: Tucumwire ahari Nyakubaho. Mbwenu ka tugyende turwane, nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga waitu yaaturagiire. Buri omwe omuriimwe yaahagatira eby'okurwanisa bye kuza aha rugamba nimuteekateeka ngu nikirahuka kwinamuka omu nsi y'ebibungo." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Kwonka Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Obagambire oti: Mutazayo, nobu kwakuba okurwana, ahabw'okuba tindi muriimwe, mutakaasingurwa abazigu baanyu." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Ntyo mbagambira, kwonka timumpurira, kureka mugomera eki Nyakubaho yaaragiira, mugira eigundu, muza omu nsi y'ebibungo." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Reero Abaamori abaabaire batwire omuri egyo nsi y'ebibungo baija nk'omuzinga gw'enjoki, babarwanisa, bababinga, babaitira omuri Seiri, bababinga, babahitsya Horuma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Mutyo mukubuuka muririra omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, haza we tayeta ha kuborooga kwanyu, nobu kwakuba okubatega okutu." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Mpaho mumara Kadeshi ebiro bingi ebi mwatwireyo. 
Deuteronomy2:1 Bwanyima tukahinduka twaza omu ihamba, tugyemire ogurikuza aha Nyanja Erikutukura, nk'oku Nyakubaho yangambiire, twamara ebiro bingi nitwehinguririza Orushozi Seiri." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Reero Nyakubaho yangira ati: 
Deuteronomy2:3 Mumazire omwanya muraingwa nimwehinguririza egi nsi y'enshozi. Hati mukiikame, mutoore aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Deuteronomy2:4 Kandi ogambire abo bantu oti: Muri haihi kuraba omu nsi ya beene waanyu Abaesau, abatwire Seiri, haza nibaija kubatiina. N'ahabw'ekyo mwerinde;" 
Deuteronomy2:5 mutabarwanisa, ahabw'okuba tindikwija kugira ekyanga ky'ensi yaabo eki imwe ndaabahe; nangwa nobu haakuba ah'okuta ekigyere. Manya orwo Rushozi Seiri nkaruha Esau kuba orwe." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Mubashakyemu ebyokurya by'okurya kandi mubagureho amaizi g'okunywa. 
Deuteronomy2:7 Ijuka oku Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaahaire omugisha byona ebi waakozire, kandi ku arikumanya orugyendo rwawe orw'omuri eri ihamba rihango. Egyo myaka makumi ana, Mukama Ruhanga waawe agumire naiwe, otaine ki obuzire." 
Deuteronomy2:8 Tutyo tugumizamu, turaba hangahari beene waitu Abaesau abatwire omuri Seiri; tutoora omuhanda gwa Araba, ogurikuruga Elati na Ezionigeberi. Tukuba, tuha ogurikuza omu ihamba rya Moabu." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Mpaho Nyakubaho angira ati: Otarahura Abamoabu, nobu kwakuba okubarwanisa orugamba; ahabw'okuba tindikwija kugira ekyanga ky'ensi yaabo eki naakuha kukikubuura. Manya Aari nkagiha beene Looti kuba eyaabo." 
Deuteronomy2:10 Omu myaka ya kare, Abaemimu bakaba batwireyo, bari eihanga rikuru ry'abantu baingi, baraingwa nk'Abaanaki" 
Deuteronomy2:11 Kandi nk'Abaanaki, nabo bakaba beetwa Abareefa, kwonka Abamoabu baabeeta Abaemimu." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Abahoori nabo ira bakaba batwire omuri Seiri, kwonka beene Esau baabanyaga, baabacwekyereza, baatuura omu myanya yaabo, nk'oku Abaisiraeli baagizire ensi ei baakubwire, ei Nyakubaho yaabahaire." 
Deuteronomy2:13 Mbwenu mwimukye, mwambukye akagyera Zeredi. Tutyo twambuka ako kagyera Zeredi." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Haza emyaka, ei twamazire obu twaruga Kadeshibarinea okuhitsya obu twayambukire ako Kagyera Zeredi, ekahika makumi ashatu na munaana, okuhitsya obu ab'oruzaaro orwo boona abarwani baahwereireho kimwe omu rusiisira, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaabarahiriire." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Buzimazima omukono gwa Mukama gukabateera kitaraariire kubahwerekyerereza kimwe omu rusiisira okuhitsya obu baahwaireho. 
Deuteronomy2:16 Abantu boona abarwani ku baafiire baahweraho kimwe," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Nyakubaho yangira ati: 
Deuteronomy2:18 Eri izooba noija kucwekanisiza omwatano gwa Moabu ahari Aari. 
Deuteronomy2:19 Haza ku oraahikye haihi n'omwatano gw'Abaamoni otabarahura nari okubarwanisa, ahabw'okuba tindikwija kugira ekyanga ky'ensi yaabo eki ndaakuhe kukubuura. Manya egyo nsi nkagiha beene Looti kuba eyaabo;" 
Deuteronomy2:20 kandi neemanywa ku eri ey'Abareefa. Abareefa ira niyo baabaire batwire, kwonka Abaamoni baabeeta Abazamuzumi." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Bakaba bari eihanga rikuru ry'abantu baingi kandi baraingwa nk'Abaanaki. Kwonka Nyakubaho akabacwekyerereza omu maisho g'Abaamoni; banu baatuura omu kyanga byabo; 
Deuteronomy2:22 nk'oku yaagiriire Abaesau, abatwire omuri Seiri, obu yaacwekyerereza Abahoori omu maisho gaabo, bakabanyaga bakatuura omu byanga byabo n'okuhitsya eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Nikyo kimwe n'Abaavi, abaabaire batwire omu birorero okuhika Gaaza, oku Abakafutoori abaarugire Kafutoori baabacwekyereize, bakatuura omu byanga byabo." 
Deuteronomy2:24 Nimwimukye mugyende, mwambukye oruhanga rwa Arunooni. Reeba, naabarekurira Sihooni Omuamori, omugabe wa Heshibooni, n'ensi ye. Nimutandikye kugikubuura, mumurwanisize aha rugamba." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Eri izooba naaza kwitsa amahanga agari ahansi y'eiguru obwoba; gatiine, gahurire enkuru yaawe; haza gateteme, gaganye ahabwawe." 
Deuteronomy2:26 Ntyo ntuma entumwa ahari Sihooni omugabe wa Heshibooni ebigambo by'obusingye ndi omu ihamba rya Keedemooti, nimmugira nti:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 Onyikirize ndabe omu nsi yaawe. Niinyija kugumizamu omuhanda gwonka, ntakiikamire ahari buryo nari ahari bumosho." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Onguze ebyokurya by'okurya n'amaizi g'okunywa; kwonka onyikirize ndabisemu amaguru. 
Deuteronomy2:29 Ongirire nk'oku beene Esau abatwire Seiri, n'Abamoabu abatwire Aari bangiriire, okuhitsya obu ndaayambukye Yorudaani, nkahika omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waitu arikutuha." 
Deuteronomy2:30 Kwonka Sihooni omugabe wa Heshibooni taratwikiriize kuraba omu nsi ye; ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waanyu akagangaaza omutima gwe, yaamutizya, ngu abone kumubarekurira, nk'oku kiri na hati." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Mpaho Nyakubaho angira ati: Reeba, naatandika kukurekurira Sihooni n'ensi ye, tandika kugikubuura, ogituuremu." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Reero Sihooni ahurura n'engabo ze zoona kututeera, kuturwanisiza Yahaazi." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Haza Mukama Ruhanga waitu amuturekurira, tumusingura n'abatabani n'abantu be boona." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Tukwata endembo ze zoona ago magingo, buri rurembo turucwekyerereza kimwe; twita abashaija n'abakazi n'abaana, tutaine ou twatsigaho." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Kureka amatungo gonka nigo twayetwariire gari eminyago, hamwe n'ebi twanyagire omu ndembo zi twakwatsire." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Okwiha Aroeri, eri aharikurengyera omu ruhanga rwa Arunooni, n'okwiha aha rurembo oruri omuri orwo ruhanga, okuza kuta Gileadi, tiharabaireho rurembo rwaturemire ahabw'oburaingwa bwarwo. Mukama Ruhanga waitu byona yaabiturekurira." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Kureka ensi y'Abaamoni yonka niyo mutarahikire haihi, niyo nsi ey'aha myegyeego y'aha mugyera Yaboki hamwe n'endembo z'omu nsi y'ebibungo, kandi n'ahandi hoona ahi Mukama Ruhanga waitu yaatuzibiire." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, twakuba twatoora omuhanda gurikuza Bashani. Reero Oogi omugabe wa Bashani yaahurura kututeera, we n'engabo ze zoona kuturwanisiza Edurei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Haza Nyakubaho yangira ati: Otamutiina, ahabw'okuba naamukurekurira we n'abantu be boona n'ensi ye. Omugire nk'oku waagizire Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori, owaabaire atwire Heshibooni." 
Deuteronomy3:3 Atyo Mukama Ruhanga waitu yaaturekurira na Oogi omugabe wa Bashani n'abantu be boona, twabaita tihaahonokaho n'omwe." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Omuri obwo bunaku twakwata endembo ze zoona tihaatsigaraho rurembo na rumwe oru tutarabanyagire, endembo makumi mukaaga z'ekyanga kyona ekya Arugoobi, orurembo rukuru rw'obugabe bwa Oogi owa Bashani." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Ezo ndembo zoona zikaba zeehinguririziibwe ebisiika biraingwa, biine amarembo g'enyigi zirikukingwa empimbi, otabariiremu birorero bingi munonga ebitaine ngo." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Haza twabacwekyerereza kimwe, nk'oku twagizire Sihooni omugabe wa Heshibooni, twacwekyereza endembo zoona, abashaija n'abakazi n'abaana." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Amatungo goona n'ebi twanyagire omu ndembo twabyetwarira biri eminyago. 
Deuteronomy3:8 Tutyo omuri obwo bunaku twakubuura ensi z'abo bagabe bombi ab'Abaamori, abaabaire batwire seenu ya Yorudaani, okwiha aha ruhanga rwa Arunooni okuta aha Rushozi Herumooni." 
Deuteronomy3:9 Abanyasidooni Herumooni barweta Sirioni; Abaamori bo barweta Seniri. 
Deuteronomy3:10 Twakwata endembo zoona ez'omu ruhita, na Gileadi yoona, na Bashani yoona, okuhikira kimwe Saaleka na Edurei, endembo z'omu bugabe bwa Oogi owa Bashani." 
Deuteronomy3:11 Manya Oogi omugabe wa Bashani omu Bareefa niwe wenka owaabaire akitsigaireho; haza ekitanda kye kikaba kiri eky'ebyoma. Nikyo ekyo ekirikushangwa Raba omu Baamoni. Oburaingwa bwakyo bukaba buri mikono mwenda, obukiika bwakyo buri mikono ena, nk'orugyero rw'omukono oru abantu bagyeresa." 
Deuteronomy3:12 Ku twakubwire egyo nsi omuri obwo bunaku, naaha Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi ekyanga ekirikutandikira Aroeri, oruri aha mwatano gw'oruhanga rwa Arunooni hamwe n'ekicweka ky'ensi y'ebibungo eya Gileadi n'endembo zaayo." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Ekicweka kya Gileadi ekyatsigaireho, na Bashani yoona obugabe obwa Oogi, nikwo kugira ngu ekyanga kyona ekya Arugoobi, naabiha ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase. Bashani yoona ekaba eyetwa ensi y'Abareefa." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Yairo mwene Manaase yaatwara ekyanga kya Arugoobi kyona, niyo Bashani, okuhikira kimwe aha mwatano gw'Abaagyeshuri n'Abamaakati. Ebyo birorero yaabyeyeterera, byayetwa Haavoti-Yairo, nk'oku kiri n'eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy3:15 Makiri naamuha Gileadi," 
Deuteronomy3:16 Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi naabaha ekyanga ekirikwiha Gileadi, kikahika aha ruhanga rwa Arunooni. Omwatano gwakyo gwaraba ahagati y'orwo ruhanga, gwahika aba mugyera Yaboki, ogurikubaatanisa n'Abaamoni." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Kandi naabaha Araba, omwatano gwayo guri Yorudaani, okwiha Kiinereeti okuhikira kimwe aha nyanja ya Araba ey'omwonyo, omu mizi y'orushozi Pisiga, orubaju rwa burugwa-izooba." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Omu bunaku obwo, imwe nkabaragiira ningira nti: Mukama Ruhanga waanyu abahaire egi nsi kugikubuura; abashaija baanyu amamanzi bambukye bakwaitse eby'okurwanisa, beebembeire beene waanyu Abaisiraeli." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Kwonka abakazi baanyu n'abaana baanyu abato, n'amatungo gaanyu nimmanya ku mwine amatungo maingi bitsigare omu ndembo zi mbahaire," 
Deuteronomy3:20 okuhitsya obu Nyakubaho araahe beene waanyu obutuuro, nk'oku naimwe abubahaire, nabo bakakubuura ensi ei Mukama Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha seeri ya Yorudaani. Obwo nibwo murigaruka, buri muntu aha butaka bwe obu mbahaire." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Kandi obwo bunaku nkaragiira Yoshwa nti: Amaisho gaawe geereebeire byona ebi Mukama Ruhanga waitu akozire abo bagabe bombi. Haza nikwo araagire ensi z'obugabe zoona ezi murikwambuka kuzamu. 
Deuteronomy3:22 Mutabatiina, ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waanyu niwe arikubarwanirira." 
Deuteronomy3:23 Omu bunaku obwo, nkeeshengyereza Nyakubaho ningira nti:" 
Deuteronomy3:24 Ai Mukama Ruhanga, hati nibwo waatandika kworeka omwiru waawe obukuru bwawe n'omukono gwawe ogw'amaani. Mbwenu, ni ruhanga ki omu iguru nari omu nsi, owaakukora ebikoro n'eby'amaani nk'ebi?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Naakweshengyereza, onyikirize nyambukye, ndeebe ensi nungi eri seeri ya Yorudaani; egyo nsi y'ebibungo na Lebanooni." 
Deuteronomy3:26 Kwonka Nyakubaho akangwerwa kubi ahabwanyu, yaayanga kuntega okutu. Yangira ati: Ekyo okirekyere aho, otagaruka kukingambira." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Inamuka, oze aha mutwe gwa Pisiga, haza onagye amaisho burengyerwa-izooba, n'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, n'aha bwa buryo, na burugwa-izooba, ogyereebere n'amaisho gaawe, ahabw'okuba torikwija kwambuka Yorudaani egi." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Kureka oyehanangirize Yoshwa, omuteere omuhimbo, kandi omugumye, ahabw'okuba niwe araayambukye ayebembeire aba bantu, akabakubuuza egyo nsi ei waaza kureeba." 
Deuteronomy3:29 Tutyo twaguma omu ruhanga orushungaine na Beetipeori. 
Deuteronomy4:1 Mbwenu Baisiraeli 'mwe, mute omutima aha biragiro ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, ebi ndikubeegyesa. Mubikuratire, mubone kugumaho, muhikye omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe arikubaha, mugikubuure." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Mutaryongyera aha kigambo ki ndikubaragiira, nobu kwakuba okukicwaho, mubone kukuratira ebiragiro bya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu ebi ndikubaragiira." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Mukeereebera n'agaanyu eki Mukama yaakoreire Peori ahabw'ebya Baali; oku Mukama Ruhanga waanyu yaabacwekyereizemu abashaija boona abaakuratiire Baali eya Peori. 
Deuteronomy4:4 Haza imwe abaahamiire ahari Mukama Ruhanga waanyu mwena, eri izooba mukihuriire." 
Deuteronomy4:5 Mbwenu reeba, naabeegyesa ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga wangye yandagiire, ngu mubikuratire muri omu nsi ei mwaza kutaahamu kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Mubyorobere, kandi mubihitsye, ahabw'okuba nibyo biraayorekye abantu ku mwine obwengye n'okwetegyereza. Manya ku barihurira ebyatairweho byona, baryagira bati: Buzimazima, eri ihanga rikuru n'ery'abantu abaine obwengye n'okwetegyereza." 
Deuteronomy4:7 Mbwenu, ni ihanga ki erikuru eriine ruhanga oriri haihi atyo, nka Mukama Ruhanga waitu oku atuba haihi twamutakira?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Kandi ni ihanga ki erikuru eriine ebiragiro ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe ebihikire, nk'aga mateeka gu naabata omu maisho eri izooba?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 Kureka ogume ote omutima aha bi orikukora; oyerinde otakaayebwa. Ebi waareebire n'amaisho gaawe bitakaakuruga aha mutima ebiro by'amagara gaawe byona; kandi obimanyise abaana na baijukuru baawe 
Deuteronomy4:10 aha izooba eri waayemerereireho Horebu, omu maisho ga Nyakubaho waawe, obu yaagira ati: Nteeranira aba bantu bahurire ebi ndaabagambire, babone kwega okuntiina ebiro byona ebi barimara omu nsi, kandi babyegyese abaana baabo." 
Deuteronomy4:11 Obwo mukairira haihi, mwayemerera omu mizi y'orushozi nirwaka omuriro ogurikunaga enkobe erikuhika omu iguru, rushwekirwe omwirima n'ekicu n'obwiririmba." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Nyakubaho yaagira eki yaabagambira naayema omu muriro; mwahurira eiraka ry'orikugamba, kwonka timwareeba oku arikushusha, kureka eiraka kusha." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Yaabagambira eby'endagaano ye ebi yaabaragiire kuhitsya, nibyo biragiro ikumi; kandi yaabihandiika aha bishate bibiri by'amabaare." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Naanye obwo bunaku Nyakubaho yandagiira kubeegyesa ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, ngu mubone kubyorobera muri omu nsi ei murikuzamu kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy4:15 N'ahabw'ekyo mwerinde munonga. Nk'oku mutarareebire nshusha ya Nyakubaho aha izooba ri yaabagambiriireho ahari Horebu naayema omu muriro," 
Deuteronomy4:16 mwerinde mutakaacumura, mukeekorera ekishushani kisharwire, ekiine enshusha y'omuringo gwona, ekirikushusha ekishaija nari ekikazi;" 
Deuteronomy4:17 ekirikushusha enyamaishwa yoona eri omu nsi; ekirikushusha enyonyi yoona eine amapapa erikugurukira omu mwanya; 
Deuteronomy4:18 ekirikushusha ekintu kyona ekirikugyendesa enda aha itaka; nari ekirikushusha ekyenyanja kyona ekiri omu maizi okuzimu y'ensi. 
Deuteronomy4:19 Kandi oyerinde, otariimutsya amaisho gaawe ahaiguru; okireeba izooba n'okwezi n'enyonyoozi, amahe goona ag'omu iguru, okoohibwa okagaramya, okabiheereza, haza biri ebintu ebi Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaateeraireho abantu boona abari ahansi y'eiguru." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Kwonka imwe, Nyakubaho akabakwata, yaabashahura omu iziiko ririkubuguma, niyo Misiri, ngu mube abantu be buzima, nk'oku kiri hati." 
Deuteronomy4:21 N'ekindi, Nyakubaho akangwerwa kubi ahabwanyu, yaataho n'okurahira ku nyowe ntaryambuka Yorudaani, nkahika omu nsi nungi ei Mukama Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha kuhungura." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Manya ndi ow'okufeera omuri egi nsi; tindi w'okwambuka Yorudaani; kureka niimwe muraagyambukye mukakubuura egyo nsi. 
Deuteronomy4:23 N'ahabw'ekyo mwerinde mutakaayebwa endagaano ya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu ei yaaragaine naimwe, mukeekorera ekishushani kisharwire, ekiine enshusha y'ekintu kyona, eki Mukama Ruhanga waanyu yaabazibiire." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Manya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu n'omuriro gurikurya busha, aba Ruhanga ow'eihato." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Ku murizaara abaana, nabo baazaara abandi, mwatuura munonga omuri egyo nsi, ku muricumura mwakora ekishushani kisharwire eky'enshusha y'ekintu kyona, mwakora ekyeetwa ekibi omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, mwamugwisa kubi," 
Deuteronomy4:26 eryo izooba ndyayeta eiguru n'ensi bibashinje, muhwerekyererere juba omuri egyo nsi ei murikuza kwambuka Yorudaani kukubuura. Egyo nsi timurigituuramu munonga, kureka muryacwekyererera kimwe." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Haza Nyakubaho abataataanisize omu mahanga agu aribatuntumuriramu, mugatsigaremu muri bakye." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Reero okwo muramizeyo baaruhanga b'ebiti n'amabaare, abakozirwe emikono y'abantu, abatarikubaasa kureeba nari kuhurira, nainga kurya, nobu kwakuba okukaga." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Kwonka okwo ku orisherurirayo Mukama Ruhanga waawe, waamusherura n'omutima gwawe gwona n'amagara gaawe goona oryamubona." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Ku oriitwa enaku, ebyo byona byakugwera omu biro bya bwanyima, oryagarukira Mukama Ruhanga waawe, oyete aha bi arikugamba." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waawe ni Ruhanga ow'embabazi tarikunagiirira, kandi tarikucwekyereza, nobu kwakuba okwebwa endagaano ei yaaragaine na baashwenkuru naarahira." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Mbwenu oyetegyereze eby'ebiro ebyahingwire ebyakubandiize, okwiha Ruhanga yaaba kuhanga omuntu omu nsi, ocondooze okwiha aha muheru gw'eiguru okuta aha gundi, yaaba ekintu nk'eki kirabaireho nari kirahuriirwe." 
Deuteronomy4:33 Hariho eihanga ry'abantu abarahuriire eiraka rya Ruhanga ohuriire, orikugamba naayema omu muriro, nk'oku iwe waarihuriire, haza bakagumaho bari abahuriire?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Nari hariho ruhanga orateireho kuza kwenyagira eihanga naakoresa obugwe, obumanyiso, eby'okutangaaza, orugamba, omukono gw'amaani, omukono gubangire, n'ebirikutiinisa munonga, nk'ebi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu yaabakoreire omuri Misiri nimubyereebera kuriiha omu rindi?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Ebyo okabyorekwa, ngu omanye ku Nyakubaho ari Ruhanga, kandi ku hatariho ondi weena, kureka we." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Akeema omu iguru yaakuhuriza eiraka rye, ngu abone kukuhana, kandi yaayema omu nsi yaakureebesa omuriro gwe mwingi waahurira ebi yaagambiire ahagati yaagwo." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Ahabw'okukunda baashwenkuru, akatoorana baijukuru baabo abaakuratsireho. Nikyo yaakwihiire Misiri ari hamwe naiwe, naakoresa amaani ge maingi," 
Deuteronomy4:38 akakubingira amahanga garikukukiza obuhango n'amaani, ngu abone kukutaasyamu, kukuha ensi yaago kugihungura, nk'oku kiri eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Mbwenu nu, hati okimanye, okite aha mutima, ku Nyakubaho ari Ruhanga w'ahaiguru omu iguru, ow'ahansi okuzimu, kandi ku hatariho ondi weena." 
Deuteronomy4:40 N'ahabw'ekyo ogume orinde ebi yaataireho n'ebi yaaragiire, ebi naakugambira eri izooba, obone kuba gye n'abaana baawe abarikukurata, omereerere omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha kuba eyaawe ebiro byona." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Bwanyima Musa akatoorana endembo ishatu aha burugwa-izooba, seeri ya Yorudaani," 
Deuteronomy4:42 ngu owaita omuntu abone kuhungirayo; oriba aitsire mutaahi we atamwitsire nkana, kandi ataine nzigu nawe omu biro bihingwire, ngu ku araahungire omuri rumwe ahari ezo ndembo, akize amagara. Nizo ezi:" 
Deuteronomy4:43 Bezeri oruri omu ihamba ry'omu ruhita, ahabw'Abaareubeeni; Ramoti orw'omuri Gileadi, ahabw'Abaagaadi, na Golani orw'omuri Bashani, ahabw'Abaamanaase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Eri niryo iteeka eri Musa yaateeraireho Abaisiraeli. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Ebi nibyo by'obuhamya n'ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, ebi Musa yaagambiire Abaisiraeli, obu baaruga Misiri," 
Deuteronomy4:46 bari seeri ya Yorudaani, omu ruhanga orushungaine na Beetipeori, omu nsi ya Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori owaabaire atwire Heshibooni, ou Musa n'Abaisiraeli baasingwire nibaruga Misiri." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Bakakubuura ensi ye n'eya Oogi omugabe wa Bashani; abagabe babiri b'Abaamori abaabaire batwire burugwa-izooba, seeri ya Yorudaani;" 
Deuteronomy4:48 okwiha Aroeri, oruri aha mwatano gw'oruhanga rwa Arunooni, okuhikira kimwe aha Rushozi Sirioni, niyo Herumooni;" 
Deuteronomy4:49 hamwe na Araba yoona, ey'aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba bwa Yorudaani, okuhikira kimwe aha nyanja ya Araba, omu mizi y'orushozi Pisiga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Mbwenu, Musa akeeta Abaisiraeli boona, yaabagira ati: Iwe Isiraeli, hurira ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe ebi naaza kugamba eri izooba. Mubihurire, haza mubyegye, kandi muteho omutima kubihitsya." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Mukama Ruhanga waitu akaragaanira naitwe endagaano Horebu. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Egyo ndagaano taragiragaine na baatatenkuriitwe, kureka akagiragaana naitwe twena abari aha, abakiriho eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Nyakubaho akagamba naimwe nimureebanira ahari orwo rushozi, naayema ahagati y'omuriro." 
Deuteronomy5:5 Nyowe obwo nkeemerera ahagati ya Nyakubaho naimwe kubamanyisa eki yaagamba; ahabw'okuba imwe mukatiina ogwo muriro, timwainamuka hari orwo rushozi. Reero yaagamba ati:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waawe owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misiri, ei waabaire ori omuhuuku." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Otarigira baaruhanga abandi kubamparikisa. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Otaryekorera ekishushani kisharwire nari ekirikushusha ekintu kyona ekiri ahaiguru omu iguru, nari ekiri aha nsi okuzimu, nainga ekiri omu maizi okuzimu y'ensi." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Otaribiramya, nobu kwakuba okubiheereza; ahabw'okuba Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga waawe mba Ruhanga w'eihato; nfubira abaana b'oruzaaro rwa kashatu n'orwa kana, nimbatura ebibi bya baishenkurubo abaanyangire." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Kwonka enkumi n'enkumi ez'abankunda, bakakuratira ebiragiro byangye, mbagirira rukundo etahararuka." 
Deuteronomy5:11 Otarirahirira busha eiziina rya Mukama Ruhanga waawe, ahabw'okuba Mukama taribura kufubira orahirira busha eiziina rye." 
Deuteronomy5:12 Guma orinde ekiro kya Sabato kigume kiri ekirikwera, nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaakuragiire." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Guma oyecurengye omu biro mukaaga, okore emirimo yaawe yoona," 
Deuteronomy5:14 kwonka ekiro kya mushanju ni Sabato ya Mukama Ruhanga waawe, otarigikoreraho omurimo gwona, iwe na mutabani waawe, na muhara waawe, nari omuhuuku waawe, nari omuzaana waawe, nobu yaakuba ente yaawe, endogoya yaawe, nari eky'omu matungo gaawe kyona, nainga omunyaihanga otwire naiwe; omuhuuku waawe, n'omuzaana waawe, babone kuhuumura nkaiwe." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Ijuka ku waabaire ori omuhuuku omu nsi ya Misiri, haza Mukama Ruhanga waawe akakwihisayo omukono gwe ogw'amaani kandi ogubangire. N'ahabw'ekyo Nyakubaho ogwo Ruhanga waawe akakuragiira kuguma noorinda ekiro kya Sabato." 
Deuteronomy5:16 Otiine sho na nyoko, nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaakuragiire, obone kumereera n'okuba gye omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikuha." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Otariita. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Otarishambana. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Otariiba. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Otaribeiherera mutaahi waawe. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Otaryetenga muka mutaahi waawe. Otaryetenga enju ya mutaahi waawe, ekibanja kye, omuhuuku we nari omuzaana we, ente ye, endogoya ye, nobu kyakuba ekintu kyona ekya mutaahi waawe." 
Deuteronomy5:22 Ebyo nibyo bigambo bi Nyakubaho yaagambiire mwena muteeraniire aha rushozi. Akabibagambira n'eiraka rihango naayema ahagati y'omuriro n'omu kicu, omu mwirima ndindindi, ataine kindi ki ayongyeireho, kandi akabihandiika aha bishate bibiri by'amabaare, yaabimpa." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Reero ku mwahuriire eiraka niriruga omu mwirima, obwo orushozi nirwaka omuriro, mwaija mwampika haihi, mwena n'abakuru b'enganda zaanyu n'abeebembezi baanyu." 
Deuteronomy5:24 Mwangira muti: Reeba Mukama Ruhanga waitu yaatworeka ekitiinisa kye n'obukuru bwe. Twayehuririra eiraka rye niryema ahagati y'omuriro. Eri izooba twareeba Ruhanga naagamba n'omuntu, haza ogwo muntu akaguma ahuriire." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Mbwenu itwe nitufeera ki? Manya ogu muriro mwingi nigwija kutuhezaho; ku turaagarukye twahurira eiraka rya Mukama Ruhanga waitu, nitufa." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Omu bantu boona n'oha orahuriire eiraka rya Ruhanga ohuriire naagambira ahagati y'omuriro, nk'oku twarihurira, haza akaguma ahuriire?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Irooko, obe niiwe waahika haihi; ohurire ebi Mukama Ruhanga waitu araagambe; haza otugambire byona ebi araakugambire, naitwe nitwija kubihurira, tubikore." 
Deuteronomy5:28 Reero Nyakubaho akahurira ebyo bigambo, obu mwabingambira, yangira ati: Naahurira ebi aba bantu barikugamba, ebi baakugambira, haza byona ebi baagamba bihikire." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Nangwa ku baakugira omutima nk'ogwo obutoosha bakantiina, bakakuratira ebiragiro byangye byona, bakaaba gye, n'abaana baabo baba gye ebiro byona." 
Deuteronomy5:30 Mbwenu irooko obagambire oti: Mugarukyeyo omu mahema gaanyu. 
Deuteronomy5:31 Kwonka iwe guma haihi naanye, nkugambire ebiragiro n'ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe byona ebi oraabeegyese bakabikuratira bari omuri egyo nsi ei ndikubaha kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy5:32 N'ahabw'ekyo muteho omutima kukora nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga waanyu abaragiire. Mutateishuka mukatoora aha mukono gwa buryo nari aha gwa bumosho. 
Deuteronomy5:33 Mugume mutoore omuhanda gwonka ogu Mukama Ruhanga waanyu abaragiire, mubone kugumaho mukaba gye, mukamereerera omuri egyo nsi ei muraakubuure." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Mbwenu ebi nibyo biragiro ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, ebi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu yandagiire kubeegyesa, ngu mubone kubikuratira muri omu nsi ei murikwambukamu kukubuura;" 
Deuteronomy6:2 ngu obone kutiina Mukama Ruhanga waawe, iwe na mutabani waawe, na mwijukuru waawe, nimukuratira ebye byona ebyatairweho, n'ebiragiro bye ebi ndikubaragiira kukuratira, omu biro byona eby'amagara gaanyu, mubone kumereera." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Mbwenu iwe Isiraeli, hurira, kandi oteho omutima kubikora, obone kuba gye, n'okukanya munonga omuri egyo nsi erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki, nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga wa baashwenkuru yaakuraganiise." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Iwe Isiraeli, hurira: Mukama Ruhanga waitu aba omwe." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Mbwenu guma okunde Mukama Ruhanga waawe n'omutima gwawe gwona, n'amagara gaawe goona, n'amaani gaawe goona." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba bikugume aha mutima. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Oyezirikye kubyegyesa abaana baawe, obigaaniire oshutami omu nju yaawe, nari noogyenda omu muhanda nari obyami nari waimuka." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Ogume obikome aha mukono gwawe bibe akamanyiso; obijware aha buso bibe ekisingo. 
Deuteronomy6:9 Obihandiikye aha nti z'emiryango y'enju yaawe n'aha marembo gaawe. 
Deuteronomy6:10 Haza Mukama Ruhanga waawe ku arikuhitsya omu nsi ei yaarahiire baashwenkuru, Aburahamu, Isaaka na Yakobo, kugikuha, n'endembo zaayo empango kandi enungi, ezi otarombekire," 
Deuteronomy6:11 n'amaju gaijwire ebintu byona ebirungi ebi otaratairemu, n'amaziba gafukwirwe agu otarafukwire, n'emisiri y'emizaabibu n'emiti y'emioliva ei otarabyaire, reero ku orirya waiguta," 
Deuteronomy6:12 oyerinde otakaayebwa Mukama owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misiri ei waabaire ori omuhuuku. 
Deuteronomy6:13 Guma otiine Mukama Ruhanga waawe, omuheereze, n'eiziina rye obe niryo waaguma noorahira." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Mutariramya baaruhanga abandi ab'amahanga agabeehinguririize; 
Deuteronomy6:15 ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waawe otuura ahagati yaawe, aba Ruhanga w'eihato; ekiniga kya Mukama Ruhanga waawe kitakaakubugumaho, akakucwekyereza, akakumara omu nsi." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Mutarigyeza Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, nk'oku mwamugyereize Maasa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Mugume mwezirikye kworobera ebiragiro bya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, n'ebi yaahamize, n'ebi yaataireho, ebi yaabaragiire." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Ogume okore eby'oburyo kandi ebirungi omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, obone kuba gye, oze omu nsi nungi ei yaarahiire kuha baashwenkuru, haza ogikubuure," 
Deuteronomy6:19 noobingamu abazigu baawe boona abakuri omu maisho, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaraganiise." 
Deuteronomy6:20 Mutabani waawe ku arikubuuza omu biro ebiriija, ati: Eby'obuhamya n'ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, ebi Mukama Ruhanga waitu yaabaragiire, nibimanyisa ki?" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Obwo omugarukyemu oti: Tukaba turi abahuuku ba Faraaho omuri Misiri; Nyakubaho yaatwihisayo omukono gwe gw'amaani. 
Deuteronomy6:22 Nyakubaho ogwo akooreka obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza bikuru kandi ebirikutiinisa, naabikora ahari Misiri na Faraaho n'ab'eka ye boona nitubireeba." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Reero itwe yaatwihayo, ngu abone kutureeta n'okutuha ensi ei yaarahiire kuha baatatenkuriitwe." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Nyakubaho nikwo kuturagiira kuguma nitukuratira ebyatairweho ebyo byona, kutiina Mukama Ruhanga waitu, ngu tubone kuba gye ebiro byona, ngu nawe abone kuturinda, tukaguma tuhuriire, nk'oku kiri eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Kandi ku turitaho omutima twahitsya ebiragiro ebyo byona omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waitu, nk'oku yaaturagiire, kiryatuhaisa okuhikiirira." 
Deuteronomy7:1 Mukama Ruhanga waawe ku arikuhitsya omu nsi ei orikuza kukubuura, yaabingamu amahanga maingi gaakuhigiza, ag'Abahiiti, Abagirigaashi, Abaamori, Abakanaani, Abapeerizi, Abahiivi n'Abayebusi, nigo mahanga mushanju agarikukukiza obuhango n'amaani;" 
Deuteronomy7:2 Mukama Ruhanga waawe ku arigakurekurira waagasingura, ogacwekyerereze kimwe. Otariragaana nago endagaano, nobu kwakuba okugagirira embabazi." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Otarishwererana nago kugahingira bahara baawe batabani baago, nari okushwererera batabani baawe bahara baago," 
Deuteronomy7:4 ahabw'okuba garyateishura batabani baawe, barekye kunkuratira Nyowe Nyakubaho, baheereze baaruhanga abandi; haza ekiniga kyangye kikubugumeho, nkucwekyereze ahonaaho." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Mbwenu oku nikwo muribagira: Muhigure amatambiro gaabo, musheenyagure enyomyo zaabo, kandi mutemagure emandwa zaabo ezirikwetwa Ashera, mwotsye ebishushani byazo ebibaizirwe." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Manya ori eihanga eryereziibwe Mukama Ruhanga waawe. Mukama Ruhanga waawe akakutoorana kuba eihanga rye ahabwe, eri yaatooraine omu mahanga goona agari omu nsi." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Nyakubaho tarabakunzire, kandi tarabatooraine, ngu ahabw'okuba mukaba nimukiza agandi mahanga obwingi. Manya niimwe mwabaire muri bakye okukira ab'agandi mahanga goona." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Kureka n'ahabw'okuba abakunda, kandi arinda endahiro ye ei yaarahiire baashwenkuriimwe. Nikyo yaabareeteire n'omukono gwe ogw'amaani, akabaiha omu buhuuku omu mikono ya Faraaho omugabe wa Misiri." 
Deuteronomy7:9 N'ahabw'ekyo omanye ku Mukama Ruhanga waawe aba Ruhanga ow'amazima kandi omwesigwa. Arinda endagaano ye, kandi enkumi n'enkumi z'enzaaro z'abamukunda bakoorobera ebiragiro bye azigirira rukundo etahararuka." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Kwonka abamwanga abafubira naabacwekyereza. Taryeganda kufubira abarikumwanga. 
Deuteronomy7:11 Mbwenu nu oteho omutima kuhitsya ebiragiro n'ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Ahabw'okutega okutu ebyaragiirwe okabirinda, kandi okabikora, Mukama Ruhanga waawe aryarinda endagaano ye naiwe, agume akwiniire rukundo ye etahararuka, nk'oku yaarahiire baashwenkuru kubihitsya." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Aryakukunda, akuhe emigisha, akukanyise, kandi ahe omugisha oruzaaro rw'enda yaawe n'ebyezire omu itaka ryawe, engano zaawe na viino yaawe n'amajuta gaawe g'emioliva; akanyise ente zaawe n'abaana b'obusyo bwawe bw'entaama omuri egyo nsi ei yaarahiire baashwenkuru kukuha." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Oryaheebwa omugisha okukira agandi mahanga goona. Omuriiwe tiharibaho mushaija nari mukazi ori engumba, nangwa n'omu masyo gaawe." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Nyakubaho aryazibira endwara zoona kukukwata, kandi tarikurwaza ndwara mbi zoona eza Misiri ezi orikumanya; kureka aryazirwaza abarikumwanga." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Haza ocwekyereze amahanga goona agu Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikurekurira, n'eriisho ryawe ritaribagirira esaasi, kandi otariheereza baaruhanga baabo, ahabw'okuba ekyo kiryakubeera ekiina ky'aha muryango." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Ku oryebuuza omu mutima gwawe oti: Aga mahanga ka ni gankiza obwingi, nyowe nimbaasa nta kuganyaga?" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Otarigatiina, kureka ogume oijukye eki Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaakozire Faraaho na Misiri yoona;" 
Deuteronomy7:19 eminyangararo mingi ei amaisho gaawe gaayereebeire, taho obumanyiso, eby'okutangaaza, omukono gwe gw'amaani kandi ogubangire ebi Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaakwihiiseyo. Mukama ogwo Ruhanga waawe nikwo araagire atyo amahanga goona agu orikutiina." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Ekindi, Mukama Ruhanga waawe aryabooherereza enwa, okuhitsya obu abariba batsigaireho bakwesherekire baricwekyerera." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Batarikwitsa obwoba, ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waawe ari ahagati yaawe: Ruhanga omukuru kandi orikutiinisa." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Mukama Ruhanga waawe aryabinga mporampora ago mahanga, gakuhigize; orekye kugamaraho ahonaaho, enyamaishwa zikakubeera nyingi, zikarengyesereza." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Kwonka Mukama Ruhanga waawe aryagakurekurira, agarabanisemu okuhitsya obu garicwekyerezibwa." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Kandi aryakurekurira abagabe baabo, obacwekyereze, eiziina ryabo ryebere kimwe ahansi y'eiguru. Haza tiharigira muntu weena oribaasa kukuza omu kaso, okuhitsya obu oribacwekyereza." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Ebishushani bya baaruhanga baabo ebisharwire mubyotsye. Otaryetenga efeeza nari ezaabu ezibiriho, nainga okuzeetwarira zikakubeera obusya; ahabw'okuba ekyo nikizira ahari Mukama Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Otarireeta omu nju yaawe ekintu kirikuzira, okakyeenwa nkakyo. Ogume okyangire kimwe, okinugye, ahabw'okuba n'ekikyeenirwe." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Ebiragiro byona ebi naabaha eri izooba, muteho omutima kubihitsya, mubone kugumaho, mukanye, mutaahe omu nsi ei Nyakubaho yaarahiire kuha baashwenkuriimwe, mugikubuure." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Kandi ogume oijukye orugyendo rwona oru Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaakwebembeiremu emyaka makumi ana omu ihamba, ngu abone kukucwa eishaija, naakugyeza kumanya ebiri omu mutima gwawe, yaaba orikuratira ebiragiro bye, nari otaribikuratira." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Akakucwa eishaija, yaakureka waagira enjara, reero yaakugaburira emaanu ei waabaire otakamanyaga, nobu baakuba baashwenkuru, ngu obone kumanya ku omuntu atatungwa byokurya byonka, kureka ku atungwa ekigambo kyona ekiruga ahari Ruhanga." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Omuri egyo myaka makumi ana ebijwaro byawe tibirakukuzireho, n'ebigyere byawe tibiratumbire;" 
Deuteronomy8:5 Kandi okimanyire aha mutima ku Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuhana, nk'oku omuntu ahana omwana we." 
Deuteronomy8:6 N'ahabw'ekyo, ogume oyorobere ebiragiro bya Mukama Ruhanga waawe, nookuratira emitwarize ei yaataireho, kandi noomutiina." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Manya, Mukama Ruhanga waawe naakutwara omu nsi nungi, ensi y'otugyera tw'amaizi g'enshuro n'ebiyanja agarikuhimintika nigaruga omu mpanga n'omu bibungo." 
Deuteronomy8:8 Ensi y'engano na baale, ey'emizaabibu n'emitiini n'amakoma-mahanga, ensi y'emioliva n'obwoki." 
Deuteronomy8:9 Ensi ei oririiramu ebyokurya bitabe by'eicweka, ei otarigiriramu ki okyenire. Ensi ei amabaare gaayo gaba obutare, kandi ei ebibungo byayo oritimbamu emiringa," 
Deuteronomy8:10 oryarya oigute, kandi osiime Mukama Ruhanga waawe ahabw'egyo nsi nungi ei akuhaire." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Kwonka oyerinde otakaayebwa Mukama Ruhanga waawe, okareka kukuratira ebiragiro bye, n'ebi yaaragiire n'ebi yaataireho, ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Ku oriba waariire waigutsire, waayombekire amaju kandi waagatwiremu," 
Deuteronomy8:13 amasyo gaawe g'ente n'ag'entaama gaakanya, n'efeeza zaawe n'ezaabu zaakanya, n'ebi oine byona byakanya," 
Deuteronomy8:14 omutima gwawe gutaryehimbisa okeebwa Mukama Ruhanga waawe owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misiri, omu buhuuku." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Nyakubaho owaakurabize omu ihamba rihango kandi eririkutiinisa, eririmu enjoka z'obushegu burikubabiirira, n'ebinyabushegu, n'ensi ekarangataine etarimu maizi; owaakwihiire amaizi omu rukiri rugumire," 
Deuteronomy8:16 owaakugabuririire omu ihamba emaanu ei baashwenkuru baabaire batarikumanya, ngu akucwe eishaija, akugyeze, haza aha muheru abone kukukorera ebirungi." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Oyerinde otakaagira omu mutima gwawe oti: Obushoboorozi bwangye n'amaani g'emikono yangye nibyo byampaisize eri itungo. 
Deuteronomy8:18 Guma oijukye Mukama Ruhanga waawe, ahabw'okuba niwe akubaasisa kutunga, ngu abone kuhamya endagaano ye ei yaarahiriire baashwenkuru n'okuhitsya eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Kwonka ku oryebwa Mukama Ruhanga waawe, waakuratira baaruhanga abandi, waabaheereza, waabaramya, ninkugambirira kimwe eri izooba ku otaribura kuhwerekyerera." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Nk'ago mahanga gu Nyakubaho arikuhwerekyereza kubahigiza, naimwe nikwo murihwerekyerera ahabw'okutoorobera ebi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu arikubaragiira." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Mbwenu iwe Isiraeli, hurira! Eri izooba waaza kwambuka Yorudaani, kuza kunyaga amahanga garikukukiza obuhango n'amaani, endembo mpango ezeehinguririziibwe ebigo biraingwa birikuhika omu iguru," 
Deuteronomy9:2 eihanga ry'abantu bahango kandi baraingwa, beene Anaki abu orikumanya, kandi abu orahuriire nibabagambaho bati: N'oha orikubaasa kuza beene Anaki omu kaso?" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Mbwenu nu okimanye eri izooba ku ogwo oraayambukye akwebembeire nk'omuriro gurikurya busha ari Mukama Ruhanga waawe; naija kubacwekyereza, abakugomoororere omu maisho, abone kubabinga, kandi obahwerekyereze ahonaaho, nk'oku Nyakubaho akuragiire." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Mukama Ruhanga waawe ku ariheza kubabinga, baakuhigiza, otarigira omu mutima gwawe oti: Eki Nyakubaho andeteire omuri egi nsi kugikubuura n'ahabw'okuhikiirira kwangye. Haza kunu Nyakubaho eki abingiire ago mahanga kukuhigiza, n'ahabw'okuba go n'enyabibi." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Torikuza mu nsi yaago kugikubuura ahabw'okuhikiirira kwawe, nari ahabw'okwema gye kw'omutima gwawe; kureka ahabw'okutahikiirira kw'ago mahanga, nikyo Mukama Ruhanga waawe agabingiire kukuhigiza, ngu abone kuhamya eki yaarahiire baashwenkuru, Aburahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 N'ahabw'ekyo omanye ku Mukama Ruhanga waawe atarikukuha egyo nsi nungi kugikubuura ahabw'okuhikiirira kwawe; ahabw'okuba oba eihanga eritigi. 
Deuteronomy9:7 Ijuka kandi oteebwa ku waagwisiize kubi Mukama Ruhanga waawe omu ihamba. Okwiha aha izooba eri waarugiiremu omu nsi ya Misiri, okuhitsya obu muhikire omuri ogu mwanya, mutuura nimugomera Nyakubaho." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Nangwa na Horebu mukagwisizayo Nyakubaho kubi; yaabagirira ekiniga kingi; yaayenda kubacwekyereza. 
Deuteronomy9:9 Ku nainamukire aha rushozi kwakiira ebishate bibiri by'amabaare eby'endagaano ei Nyakubaho yaaragaine naimwe, nkaguma ahari orwo rushozi okumara ebiro makumi ana nyomushana na nyekiro, ntarikurya kintu kyona, nobu kwakuba okunywa amaizi." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Nyakubaho yampa ebishate bibiri by'amabaare ebi we Ruhanga yaahandiikiiseho orukumu rwe. Kandi ahari ebyo bishate hakaba hariho ebigambo bi Nyakubaho yaabagambiriire ahari orwo rushozi naayema ahagati y'omuriro aha izooba ry'ekiteerane. 
Deuteronomy9:11 Aha muheru gw'ebiro makumi ana bya nyomushana na nyekiro, Nyakubaho akampa ebishate bibiri by'amabaare, nibyo by'endagaano." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Haza yangira ati: Imuka orahukye oshuume, orugye aha; ahabw'okuba abantu baawe abu oihire Misiri basiisire, baakora ekibi. Barahukire kuteishuka omuhanda gu naabaragiire, baayeheeshera ekishushani." 
Deuteronomy9:13 Ekindi, Nyakubaho akangira ati: Ndeebire abantu b'eri ihanga bari entigi." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Mbwenu ka mbacwekyereze, eiziina ryabo ryebere kimwe ahansi y'eiguru, haza iwe nkwihemu eihanga ririkukiza aba amaani n'obuhango." 
Deuteronomy9:15 Naanye ntyo nshuuma, nduga ahari orwo rushozi rurikwaka omuriro nkwaitse omu ngaro zombi ebishate bibiri by'endagaano." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Haza ku ntayo nti amaisho, ndeeba mucumwire ahari Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, mweheesheire enyana, murahukire kuteishuka omuhanda gu yaabaragiire." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Ntyo nkwata ebishate byombi ebyabaire bindi omu ngaro, mbiteera ahansi, mbyatira omu maisho gaanyu." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Bwanyima ngwa ahansi omu maisho ga Nyakubaho ndambiire, nka bwabiso. Mmara ebiro makumi ana nyomushana na nyekiro ntarikurya kintu kyona, nobu kwakuba okunywa amaizi ahabw'ekibi eki mwakozire, mukacumura ahari Nyakubaho, mukamugwisa kubi." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Manya nkatiina ekiniga n'okuguubwa kubi ebi Mukama yaabagiriire, akenda kubacwekyereza: kwonka ago magingo nabwo yampurira." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Kandi Nyakubaho yaagirira Arooni ekiniga kingi, yaayenda kumucwekyereza. Nabwo naayeshengyerereza Arooni." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Bwanyima nkakwata ekintu ky'ekibi ki mukozire, niyo nyana ei mwaheesire, naagyotsya naagihondahonda, naagisa, naagicwa obusaasingo, yaaba omucuucu, omucuucu gwayo naagunaga omu kagyera karikuruga omu rushozi." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Hoona ahari Tabera n'ahari Maasa n'ahari Kiiburotihataava mukagwisa kubi Nyakubaho. 
Deuteronomy9:23 Ku yaabaragiire ngu murugye Kadeshibarinea, naabagira ati: Nimwinamukye, mukubuure ensi ei mbahaire, mwagomera ekiragiro kya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu; timwamwesiga, kandi timwayorobera ki yaabaragiire." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Mutuura nimumugomera okwiha aha izooba ri naabamanyiireho. 
Deuteronomy9:25 Nikyo naarambiriire omu maisho ge okumara ebiro makumi ana nyomushana na nyekiro; ahabw'okuba akaba agizire ngu naija kubacwekyereza. 
Deuteronomy9:26 Ntyo mweshengereza nti: Ai Mukama Ruhanga, otacwekyereza abantu baawe b'obuhunguzi abu waacunguziise obushoboorozi bwawe okabaiha Misiri n'omukono gwawe gw'amaani." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Ijuka abairu baawe, Aburahamu, Isaaka na Yakobo, orekye kweta aha butigi bw'aba bantu n'okutahikiirira kwabo, n'ebibi byabo." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Haza ab'omu nsi ei waatwihiremu batakaagira bati: Nyakubaho akaremwa kubahitsya omu nsi ei yaabaraganiise; kandi ahabw'okubanga, akabaihayo kubaitira omu ihamba." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Manya aba n'abantu baawe abu waayetooraniire kuba abaawe ahabwawe, okabaihisayo obushoboorozi bwawe bwingi, n'omukono gwawe ogubangire." 
Deuteronomy10:1 Omu bunaku obwo Nyakubaho akangira ati: Baija ebishate bibiri by'amabaare ebiri nk'eby'okubanza, kandi okore eshanduukye y'embaaho, haza oinamukye, onshangye aha rushozi." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Naanye niinyija kuhandiika ahari ebyo bishate ebigambo ebyabaire biri aha byabandize, ebi waayatsire; haza obite omuri egyo shanduukye." 
Deuteronomy10:3 Ntyo nkora eshanduukye y'omusisa, mbaija n'ebishate bibiri by'amabaare ebiri nk'ebyabandize; ntemba orushozi mbiine byombi omu ngaro." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Nyakubaho nawe abihandiikaho, nk'oku bwabiso yaahandiikire ebiragiro ikumi ebi yaabagambiriire aha rushozi naayema ahagati y'omuriro aha izooba ry'ekiteerane; atyo abimpa." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Bwanyima mpinduka, nshuuma, nduga ahari orwo rushozi, nta ebyo bishate omu shanduukye ei naabaizire. Na mbwenu nimwo biri, nk'oku Mukama yandagiire." 
Deuteronomy10:6 Abaisiraeli bakaimutsya orugyendo, baaruga Beerooti Beneya-kaani, baaza Moseera. Okwo niyo Arooni yaagwire, kandi niyo yaaziikirwe. Omutabani Eleazaari yaakora omurimo gw'obuhongyerezi omu mwanya gwe." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Ku baarugire okwo baaza Gudigoda; baaruga Guudigoda, baaza Yootibata, ensi y'otugyera turikuhimintika amaizi." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Omuri obwo bunaku Nyakubaho yaashoroora ab'oruganda rwa Leevi kuguma nibaheeka eshanduukye y'endagaano ye, n'okwemerera omu maisho ge kumuheereza, n'okushabira abantu emigisha omu iziina rye okuhitsya n'eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Nikyo Abaleevi batarabaganiire itaka ry'obuhunguzi hamwe na beene waabo, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho niwe buhunguzi bwabo, nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaabagambiire." 
Deuteronomy10:10 Nkaguma ahari orwo rushozi, nka bwabiso, okumara ebiro makumi ana nyomushana na nyekiro; kandi obwo nabwo Nyakubaho yampurira, tiyaayenda kubacwekyereza." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Reero yangira ati: Imuka ogumizemu orugyendo oyebembeire abo bantu, baze omu nsi ei naarahiire kuha baisebo, bagikubuure." 
Deuteronomy10:12 Mbwenu iwe Isiraeli, Mukama Ruhanga waawe naakwenza ki? T'okumutiina, okakora byona ebi aragiira, okamukunda, okamuheereza n'omutima gwawe gwona, n'amagara gaawe goona?" 
Deuteronomy10:13 Kandi t'okukuratira ebiragiro n'ebyatairweho Nyakubaho, ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba kukugasira?" 
Deuteronomy10:14 Reeba, eiguru ry'okwo omu iguru owa herebe, n'ensi n'ebigirimu byona, n'ebya Mukama Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Kwonka Nyakubaho ogwo akata omutima ahari baashwenkuru yaabakunda okukira agandi mahanga; kandi yaatoorana baijukuru baabo abaakuratsireho, nibo imwe, okuhitsya n'eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy10:16 N'ahabw'ekyo, muheereyo kimwe emitima yaanyu, murekyere aho kuba entigi." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Manya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu aba Ruhanga wa baaruhanga, Mukama w'abakama, Ruhanga omukuru, ow'amaani kandi orikutiinisa, otagwera rubaju, kandi otarya nguzi." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Akorera efuuzi n'abafaakazi eby'obwinganisa, kandi akunda omushuuhuuki, amuha ebyokurya n'eby'okujwara." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Mbwenu nu, mugume mukunde omushuuhuuki, ahabw'okuba naimwe mukaba muri abashuuhuuki omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Guma otiine Mukama Ruhanga waawe, omuheereze, omuhamireho, n'eiziina rye obe niryo waaguma noorahira." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Niwe kwesiima kwawe, niwe Ruhanga waawe, owaakukoreire ebintu bikuru ebirikutiinisa ebi waayereebeire." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Baashwenkuru bakashuuma Misiri bari abantu makumi mushanju; mbwenu reeba, Mukama Ruhanga waawe akukanyiise, waaba nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru." 
Deuteronomy11:1 N'ahabw'ekyo guma okunde Mukama Ruhanga waawe. Orinde obutoosha ebi yaakwehanangiriize, ebi yaataireho, amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Kandi eri izooba mwijukye manya tindikugambira baana baanyu abatarabimanyire nari abatarabireebire muteekateekye aha kuhana kwa Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, obukuru bwe, omukono gwe ogw'amaani kandi ogubangire," 
Deuteronomy11:3 obumanyiso bwe n'ebikoro bye ebi yaakoreire omuri Misiri ahari Faraaho omugabe waayo, n'aha nsi ye yoona;" 
Deuteronomy11:4 kandi n'eki yaakozire eihe rya Misiri, n'embaraasi zaabo n'ebigaari byabo; oku yaaragiire amaizi g'Enyanja Erikutukura gakabamira bababingire; oku yaabacwekyereize okuhitsya n'eri izooba;" 
Deuteronomy11:5 n'ebi yaabakoreire omu ihamba okuhitsya obu mwahikire aha; 
Deuteronomy11:6 eki yaakozire Datani na Abiraamu beene Eliyaabu, mutabani wa Reubeeni; oku ensi yaayashamire ekabamira, n'ab'omu maka gaabo, n'amahema gaabo, n'ebintu byona ebihuriire, ebi baabaire nibagyenda nabyo, bikacwekyererera ahagati y'Abaisiraeli boona." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Manya amaisho gaanyu gakeereebera ebikuru ebi Nyakubaho yaakozire. 
Deuteronomy11:8 N'ahabw'ekyo, mugume mukuratire ebiragiro byona ebi ndikubaragiira eri izooba, mubone kuba ab'amaani, muze omu nsi ei murikwambukamu kukubuura kuba eyaanyu." 
Deuteronomy11:9 Kandi muramaarire omuri egyo nsi ei Nyakubaho yaarahiire baashwenkuriimwe kugibaha na baijukuru baabo; ensi erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki. 
Deuteronomy11:10 Manya ensi ei murikuzamu kukubuura ti nk'eya Misiri ei mwarugiremu, ei mwabaire mubiba embibo mukaziitiriza ebigyere byanyu, nk'oku baitirira omusiri gw'emboga." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Kwonka ensi ei murikuza kukubuura n'ey'ebibungo n'empanga, eitirirwa enjura." 
Deuteronomy11:12 N'ensi ei Mukama Ruhanga waanyu ataho omutima. Obutoosha amaisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waanyu tigagirugaho, okwiha aha kutandika kw'omwaka okuhitsya aha muheru gwagwo." 
Deuteronomy11:13 Reero ku murikuratira ebi naabaragiira eri izooba, kukunda Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, n'okumuheereza n'omutima gwanyu gwona, n'amagara gaanyu goona," 
Deuteronomy11:14 nawe aryagwisiza ensi yaanyu enjura omu bunaku bwayo, ey'eibiba n'eya katumba, mubone kushaaruura engano zaanyu na viino yaanyu n'amajuta gaanyu g'emioliva;" 
Deuteronomy11:15 kandi eryameza obunyaatsi omu mariisizo gaanyu ahabw'amatungo gaanyu, murye, mwigute." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Kwonka mwerinde, emitima yaanyu etakaabeihwabeihwa, mukateishuka, mukaheereza baaruhanga abandi, mukabaramya," 
Deuteronomy11:17 ekiniga kya Nyakubaho kikabaakaho, akakinga eiguru, enjura ekabura, n'ensi ekareka kweza emyaka yaayo, mukahwerekyerera ahonaaho, mukahwa omuri egyo nsi nungi ei Nyakubaho arikubaha." 
Deuteronomy11:18 N'ahabw'ekyo, mugumye ebi bigambo byangye aha mutima n'omu magara gaanyu. Mubikome aha mikono yaanyu, bibe akamanyiso; kandi mubijware aha buso, bireereetere ahagati y'amaisho gaanyu." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Mubyegyese abaana baanyu nimubigaaniiraho mushutami omu maka gaanyu, nari nimugyenda omu muhanda nainga mubyami nari mwaimuka." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Kandi mubihandiikye aha nti z'emiryango y'amaju gaanyu, n'aha marembo gaanyu;" 
Deuteronomy11:21 ebiro byanyu n'eby'abaana baanyu bibone kukanya muri omuri egyo nsi ei Nyakubaho yaarahiire baashwenkuriimwe kugibaha, omwanya gwona ogu eiguru ririmara riri ahaiguru y'ensi." 
Deuteronomy11:22 Manya ku muritaho omutima kukuratira ebiragiro ebyo byona ebi naabaragiira kworobera, mwakunda Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, mwakora ebi arikubaragiiira mwamuhamiraho," 
Deuteronomy11:23 nawe aryabinga ago mahanga goona gabahigize; haza munyagye amahanga garikubakiza obuhango n'amaani. 
Deuteronomy11:24 Omwanya gwona ogu ekigyere kyanyu kiriribatamu guryaba ogwanyu. Ensi yaanyu eihirire aha ihamba n'ahari Lebanooni, kandi eihe aha mugyera Eufuraati, ehikye aha nyanja y'oburengyerewa-izooba." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Habure omuntu owaabaasa kubaza omu kaso; ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waanyu aryababatiinisa, ensi yoona ei muriribatamu mugiitse obwoba, nk'oku yaabaraganiise." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Reeba, eri izooba naabata omu maisho omugisha n'omukyeeno;" 
Deuteronomy11:27 omugisha, mwaba mworobeire ebiragiro bya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu ebi naabaragiira eri izooba;" 
Deuteronomy11:28 kandi omukyeeno, mwaba mutoorobeire biragiro bya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu; mwateishuka omuhanda gu naabahabura eri izooba, mwaramya baaruhanga abandi abu mutakamanyaga." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Mbwenu Mukama Ruhanga waawe ku arikuhitsya omuri egyo nsi ei waaza kuzamu kukubuura, orangirire omugisha nooyema aha Rushozi Gerizimu, kandi omukyeeno nooyema aha Rushozi Ebali." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Hari ezo nshozi tiziri seeri ya Yorudaani, oburengyerwa-izooba bw'omuhanda, ogurikugarura ei eizooba rirengyera, omu nsi y'Abanyakanaani abatwire omuri Araba, ahashungaine na Giligaali, aha rubaju rw'emivure ya Moore?" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Manya muri haihi kwambuka Yorudaani kuhika omuri egyo nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha kugikubuura; haza ku eraaheze kuba eyaanyu mwagituuramu," 
Deuteronomy11:32 muteho omutima kukuratira ebyatairweho byona n'ebyaragiirwe, ebi naabagambira butunu eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy12:1 Ebi nibyo byatairweho n'ebiragiro, ebi mushemereire kutaho omutima kukuratira muri omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe abahaire kuba eyaanyu ebiro byona ebi murimara mukiri omuri egyo nsi." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Buzimazima mucwekyereze emyanya yoona ei amahanga gu mwaza kunyaga garikuramizamu baaruhanga baago; aha mitwe y'enshozi ndaingwa, n'aha bibungo, n'ahansi ya buri kiti ky'omurinzi." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Muryasheenya amatambiro gaabo, musheenyagure enyomyo zaabo ez'amabaare, mwotsye Ashera zaabo; mutemagure ebishushani bya baaruhanga baabo ebisharwire, mumarireho kimwe eiziina ryabyo omuri egyo myanya." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Kwonka imwe mutaritwaza mutyo Mukama Ruhanga waanyu; 
Deuteronomy12:5 kureka emitima yaanyu egume egirire omwete omwanya ogu Mukama Ruhanga waanyu aritoorana omu nganda zaanyu zoona kuba obutaaho bwe obw'okumuramizamu. Okwo niyo muriguma nimuza. 
Deuteronomy12:6 Kandi niyo muriguma nimureeta ebitambo byanyu ebicwekize n'ebindi bitambo; na bimwe bya ikumi byanyu n'empongano z'okuhonga, n'emitoijo ei mutoija ahabw'okuhiga, n'ei mutoija mweyendeire, n'emijigaijo y'amasyo gaanyu ag'ente n'ag'entaama." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Kandi okwo niyo muraagume nimuriira omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waanyu. Haza niyo murishemerererwa, imwe n'ab'amaka gaanyu, omuri byona ebi murikukora ebi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu abaheereiremu emigisha." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Mutaritwaza nk'ebi byona ebi turikukora ahari eri izooba, buri muntu okukora eki arikuteekateeka ngu kihikire." 
Deuteronomy12:9 Manya timukahikire mu buhuumuriro, n'omu buhunguzi bu Mukama Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Kwonka ku muraayambukye Yorudaani, mwatuura omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha kuhungura, kandi ku aribaha obuhuumure aha bazigu baanyu boona ababeehinguririize, mwatuura buhooro," 
Deuteronomy12:11 obwo omwanya ogu aritoorana kumuramizamu nigwo murireetamu ebi ndikubaragiira byona, ebitambo byanyu eby'okucwetsya, n'ebindi bitambo, bimwe bya ikumi byanyu, n'empongano z'okuhonga, n'emitoijo yaanyu yoona ey'okuhiga ei mumuraganisa." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Kandi muryayesiima muri omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, imwe na batabani baanyu, na bahara baanyu, n'abahuuku baanyu, n'abazaana baanyu, n'Abaleevi bu mwine omu birorero byanyu; ahabw'okuba bo tibagira mugabo, nobu ryakuba eitaka ry'obuhunguzi omuriimwe." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Mwerinde, mutaritambira ebitambo byanyu ebicwekize omu mwanya gwona ogu mwareeba." 
Deuteronomy12:14 Kureka mubitambire omu mwanya gu Nyakubaho aritoorana omu ruganda rumwe orw'omu nganda zaanyu. Okwo niyo muritambira ebitambo byanyu ebicwekize, kandi niyo murikorera ebi ndikubaragiira." 
Deuteronomy12:15 Kwonka shi, nimwikirizibwa kwita n'okurya enyama omuri ibara kirorero kyanyu kyona nk'oku murikwenda, nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga waanyu ariba abahaire emigisha. Abashemeire n'abatashemeire nibaikirizibwa kubiryaho, nk'oku barya esirabo nari empara." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Kureka mutarirya eshagama; mugyate aha nsi nk'amaizi. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Timurikwikirizibwa kuriira omu birorero byanyu kimwe kya ikumi ky'engano zaanyu, nari kya viino yaanyu, nainga ky'amajuta gaanyu g'emioliva, nari emijigaijo y'amasyo gaanyu g'ente nari g'entaama; nari emitoijo yaanyu y'okuhiga, ei mutoija nimuraganisa; nainga ey'okweyendera, nari empongano zi muhonga." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Kureka mugume mubiriire omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, omu mwanya gu aritoorana, imwe na batabani baanyu, na bahara baanyu, n'abahuuku baanyu, n'abazaana baanyu, n'Abaleevi abari omu birorero byanyu. Mutyo mwesiimire omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waanyu omuri byona ebi murikukora." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Mwerinde, mutaryebwa Omuleevi, omwanya gwona ogu murimara mukitwire omu nsi yaanyu." 
Deuteronomy12:20 Mukama Ruhanga waawe ku arihangusya ensi yaawe nk'oku yaakuraganiise, waagira oti: Niinyenda kurya enyama, ahabw'okuba niyo oiniire amairu, n'oikirizibwa kurya enyama nyingi, nk'oku orikwenda." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Omwanya ogu Mukama Ruhanga waawe aritoorana kumuramizamu ku guriba gukuri hare munonga, mbwenu obwo noikirizibwa kwita ekitungwa ky'omu busyo bwawe bw'ente, nari obw'entaama, ezi Mukama yaakuhaire, nk'oku naakuragiira, kandi noikirizibwa kuriira omu birorero byawe nk'oku orikwenda." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Noobaasa kukirya nk'oku orya esirabo n'empara. Abashemeire n'abatashemeire nibaikirizibwa kukiryaho. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Kwonka oyerinde, otarirya eshagama; ahabw'okuba eshagama n'amagara. N'ahabw'ekyo otarya enyama n'amagara gaayo." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Otarigirya kureka ogyate aha nsi, nk'oku baata amaizi." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Otarigirya, byona bibone kukugyendera gye, n'abaana baawe abarikuza omu bigyere, waaba okozire ebihikire, ebirikusiimwa Mukama." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Kwonka ebintu ebirikwera ebi oine, n'ebi ohigire kutoija, obitware omu mwanya ogu Nyakubaho aritoorana," 
Deuteronomy12:27 obe niyo waatambira ebitambo byawe ebicwekize, eby'enyama n'eshagama, aha itambiro rya Mukama Ruhanga waawe. Eshagama y'ebyo bitambo byawe eshukwe aha itambiro rya Mukama Ruhanga waawe; reero enyama ogirye." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Oyerinde, kandi ote omutima ahari ebi bigambo byona ebi naakuragiira, obone kuba gye ebiro byona hamwe n'abaana baawe abarikuza omu bigyere, waaba nookora ebirungi kandi ebihikire, ebirikusiimwa Mukama Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy12:29 Mukama Ruhanga waawe ku arimaraho amahanga gu orikuzamu kunyaga, haza waagakubuura, waatuura omu nsi yaago," 
Deuteronomy12:30 oyerinde, otaritegwa okatooreza emitwarize yaago, gaaherize kucwekyerezibwa omu maisho gaawe. Kandi otaribuuza ebya baaruhanga baabo noogira oti: Beitu aga mahanga gakaba garamya gata baaruhanga baago? ngu naanye ntwaze nkago!" 
Deuteronomy12:31 Ekyo otarikikora ahari Mukama Ruhanga waawe, ahabw'okuba bo bakakorera baaruhanga baabo ekintu ekirikuzira, eki Mukama ayanga. Manya nangwa bookyeza baaruhanga baabo batabani baabo na bahara baabo omu muriro." 
Deuteronomy12:32 Ekintu kyona eki naabaragiira, muteho munonga omutima kukikora. Mutarikyongyeraho, nari okukicwaho." 
Deuteronomy13:1 Omuriiwe Isiraeli, ku hariimukamu omurangi nari omurootsi w'ebirooto, yaakukorera akamanyiso nari eky'okutangaaza," 
Deuteronomy13:2 haza ako kamanyiso nari eky'okutangaaza eki yaakugambira kyabakwo, kwonka bwanyima yaakugira ati: Ka turamye baaruhanga abandi abu otakamanyaga, kandi tubaheereze," 
Deuteronomy13:3 otarihurira ebigambo by'ogwo murangi nari eby'ogwo murootsi w'ebirooto; ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waanyu obwo naaba naabagyeza, kumanya yaaba nimumukunda n'omutima gwanyu gwona, n'amagara gaanyu goona." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Mugume mukuratire Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, mumutiine, murinde ebiragiro bye, mworobere ebi arikuragiira, mumuramye, kandi mumuhamireho." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Kwonka ogwo murangi nari omurootsi w'ebirooto, aitwe; ahabw'okuba arangiriire eby'okugomera Mukama Ruhanga waawe, owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misiri, akakucungura omu buhuuku; n'ahabw'okwenda kukuteishura omuhanda ogu Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaakuragiire kutoora. N'ahabw'ekyo oihe ekyo kibi omuriiwe." 
Deuteronomy13:6 Mwene sho, mwene nyoko, nari mutabani waawe, nari muhara waawe, nari omukazi waawe ou ofumbata, nainga munywani waawe ow'aha mara, ku arikubeihabeiha omu mubonano, yaakugira ati: Ka tugyende turamye baaruhanga abandi, abu iwe na baashwenkuru mutakamanyaga," 
Deuteronomy13:7 baaruhanga b'amahanga agabeehinguririize, agari haihi naiwe, nainga agabari hare, okwiha aha muheru gw'ensi okuta aha gundi," 
Deuteronomy13:8 otarimwikiriza, nobu kwakuba okumuhurira, nari okumureebesa eriisho ry'esaasi, nari okumusaasira, nobu kwakuba okumushereka;" 
Deuteronomy13:9 kureka omwite; omukono gwawe gube nigwo gwabanza kumurwanisa kumwita reero ey'abandi emushongyere. 
Deuteronomy13:10 Omuteere amabaare, afe, ahabw'okuba yaaba naayenda kukwiha ahari Mukama Ruhanga waawe, owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misiri omu buhuuku." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Haza Isiraeli yoona ekihurire, etiine, erekye kugaruka kukora ekibi kirikwingana kityo omuriiwe." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Ku orihurira ngu rumwe aha ndembo ezi Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaakuhaire kutuuramu 
Deuteronomy13:13 harimu abantu babi abarugire omuriiwe, bakahabisa abatwire omuri orwo rurembo nibabagira bati: Ka tugyende turamye baaruhanga abandi, abu mutakamanyaga;" 
Deuteronomy13:14 obwo ekyo, okishwijume, okicondooze, okibuuririze otaireho omutima; haza ku oraashangye kiri eky'amazima, kitarikubangaanisibwa ku ekyo kihagaro kikoreirwe omuriiwe," 
Deuteronomy13:15 buzimazima abatwire omuri orwo rurembo obaitse rurara, orucwekyerereze kimwe, n'abarurimu boona n'amatungo gaamwo." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Reero eminyango yaamwo yoona ogirundaanire ahagati y'orurembo ahu abantu bateeranira. Haza orwo rurembo orwotsye n'egyo minyago yaarwo yoona, bibe ekitambo kicwekize ekitambiirwe Mukama Ruhanga waawe. Rugume ruri eitongo ebiro byona, rutaryombekwa obundi." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Hatarigira ekintu ekikyeenirwe eki origumya omu ngaro zaawe, Nyakubaho abone kurekyera aho kugira ekiniga kingi; akugirire embabazi n'esaasi, akukanyise, nk'oku yaarahiire baashwenkuru," 
Deuteronomy13:18 waaba okozire ebi Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukugambira, okarinda ebiragiro bye byona ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba, kandi okakora ebihikire, ebirikusiimwa Mukama Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy14:1 Muri abaana ba Mukama Ruhanga waanyu. N'ahabw'ekyo mutaryesharashara, nobu kwakuba okutega ebyeyera ahabw'omuntu ofiire." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Manya iwe ori eihanga ririkwera erya Mukama Ruhanga waawe, kandi Nyakubaho ogwo akakutoorana omu mahanga goona ag'omu nsi kuba eihanga rye ahabwe." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Otarirya ekintu kyona ekirikuzira. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Mbwenu ezi nizo nyamaishwa ezi murikwikirizibwa kurya; ente, entaama, embuzi," 
Deuteronomy14:5 empara, esirabo, esa, enzaza, enkorongo, enyemera, ekishwaga, n'ekihondamabaare." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Kandi nimwikirizibwa kurya enyamaishwa zoona ezaatsizemu ebyara, eziine ebigyere by'ebyara bibiri, kandi ezirikwekuuma." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Kwonka omu zeekuuma zikaatsamu ebyara, ezi mutarizirya: engamira, akame, n'endirira; ahabw'okuba zo zeekuuma, kwonka tizaatsizemu byara; n'ahabw'ekyo ahariimwe nizizira." 
Deuteronomy14:8 N'empunu ahariimwe neezira, ahabw'okuba eyatsizemu ebyara, kwonka teyekuuma. Mutarirya enyama yaazo, nobu kwakuba okukora aha mitumbi yaazo." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Reero ahari byona ebiri omu maizi, ebi nibyo murikwikirizibwa kurya: Nimubaasa kurya ebiine amagaara n'engamba," 
Deuteronomy14:10 kandi kyona ekitaine magaara na ngamba mutarikirya; n'ekirikuzira ahariimwe. 
Deuteronomy14:11 Nimwikirizibwa kurya enyonyi zoona ezitarikuzira; 
Deuteronomy14:12 kwonka ezi timurikwikirizibwa kuzirya; eishamba, empungu-mareere, kanyamushungushungu," 
Deuteronomy14:13 ekyanira, nyakabaka n'eziri nk'ezo;" 
Deuteronomy14:14 taho ekikoona n'ebiri nka kyo; 
Deuteronomy14:15 maaya, ekishomabwire, enyangi, akaca, n'eziri nkazo;" 
Deuteronomy14:16 ekihihizi, ekikye n'ekihango, n'enkoko z'omu maizi;" 
Deuteronomy14:17 ekishaayaaya, ekihuhura-bahuta, n'ekiyoyo;" 
Deuteronomy14:18 enkongoro n'oruyongoyongo, n'eziri nk'ezo; taho enkooherwa n'orubaka." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Kandi ahariimwe ebikooko byona ebiine amapapa nibizira. Bitaririibwa. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Nimwikirizibwa kurya byona ebiine amapapa, ebitarikuzira." 
Deuteronomy14:21 Mutarirya ekintu kyona ekyefeereire. Noikirizibwa kukiha omunyaihanga otwire naiwe akirye, nari kukiguza ondiijo munyaihanga. Manya iwe ori eihanga eririkwera erya Mukama Ruhanga waawe. Otariteeka akaana k'embuzi omu mahenehene ga nyinako." 
Deuteronomy14:22 Otaribura kuha kimwe kya ikumi aha bihingirwe byawe ebyezire omu musiri buri mwaka. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Kandi oryaguma oriire omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waawe, omu mwanya ogu aritoorana kumuramizamu, kimwe kya ikumi ky'engano zaawe, kya viino yaawe, ky'amajuta gaawe g'emioliva, n'eky'emijigaijo y'obusyo bwawe bw'ente n'obw'entaama; obone kumanya obutoosha kutiina Mukama Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Kwonka orugyendo ku rurikubeera ruraingwa munonga, otaabaasa kutwara kimwe kya ikumi, haza Mukama Ruhanga okuhaire emigisha ahabw'ogwo mwanya gu yaatooraine kumuramizamu kukuba hare munonga;" 
Deuteronomy14:25 obwo ebyo bintu obihingisemu empiiha. Haza ozizingirire, ozitware omu mwanya gu Nyakubaho ariba atooraine," 
Deuteronomy14:26 oziguremu ekintu kyona eki orikwenda, nk'ente, entaama, viino, nari eky'okunywa ky'amakuuta, nainga ekindi kyona eki ogombire. Reero okiriire okwo omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waawe, oshemererwe n'ab'eka yaawe." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Kwonka otaryebwa Omuleevi otwire naiwe omu birorero byawe, ahabw'okuba we tagira naiwe mugabo, nobu ryakuba eitaka ry'obuhunguzi." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Aha muheru gwa buri myaka eshatu, nabwo ogume oreete kimwe kya ikumi kyona eky'ebi oyerize omuri ogwo mwaka; okibiikye omu birorero byawe." 
Deuteronomy14:29 Reero Abaleevi, ahabw'okutagira naiwe mugabo nari eitaka ry'obuhunguzi, n'omushuuhuuki n'efuuzi n'omufaakazi abari omuri ebyo birorero byawe, baije barye, baigute; Mukama Ruhanga waawe abone kukuha omugisha omu bintu byona ebi okoresa emikono yaawe." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Aha muheru gwa buri myaka mushanju, ogume osaasire abantu amabanja." 
Deuteronomy15:2 Kandi oku nikwo kiraatwazibwe: Owaagurize weena, aryarekyera mutaahi we eki yaamugurize. Atarikiihuza mutaahi we, nari mwene ishe; ahabw'okuba omwaka gwa Mukama ogw'okusaasirana amabanja gurangiriirwe." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Omunyaihanga we noikirizibwa kumwihuza, kwonka ekyawe kyona eki mwene sho aine, okimurekyere." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Haza omuriiwe tiharibamu mworo; ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waawe aryakuheera emigisha omu nsi, ei arikukuha kuba obutaka bwawe," 
Deuteronomy15:5 waaba buzimazima okozire ebi arikukugambira, otaireho omutima kukuratira ebiragiro ebi byona ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Manya, Mukama Ruhanga waawe aryakuha omugisha, nk'oku yaakuraganiise, oguze amahanga maingi; kwonka iwe otarikweguza, otegyekye amahanga maingi, kwonka go gatarikukutegyeka." 
Deuteronomy15:7 Omuriiwe ku haribamu omworo omuri beene waanyu, ow'omu birorero by'omu nsi yaawe ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha, otarigangaaza omutima, okaba engumya ahari mwene sho omworo;" 
Deuteronomy15:8 kureka omushashaanurire engaro, omuguze ebirikumumarira obukyene bwe obwa ibara muringo." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Oyerinde, otakaagira ekiteekateeko kibi omu mutima gwawe, okagira oti: Omwaka gwa mushanju ogw'okusaasirana guri haihi; haza okareebesa mwene sho omworo eriisho ribi, otagire eki waamuha; nawe akaboroogyera Mukama naakutabaariza, kikakurugiramu ekibi." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Omuhaise omutima murungi otarikunyomwa waaba noomuha. Na Mukama Ruhanga waawe aryakuha emigisha omu mirimo yaawe yoona, n'omu bi orikukora byona." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Manya abooro tibarihwa mu nsi. N'ahabw'ekyo ninkuragiira nti: Otaribura kushashaanurira mwene sho engaro, n'ondi weena ori omukyene kandi omworo omu nsi yaawe." 
Deuteronomy15:12 Mwene sho Omuheburaayo nari Omuheburaayokazi ku barimukuguza, akuheereze okumara emyaka mukaaga, reero omu gwa mushanju omurekure, agyende n'obusingye." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Kandi ku orimurekura kugyenda n'obusingye, otarimureka akagyenda ngaro nsha." 
Deuteronomy15:14 Kureka omurongoore n'obufura aha bi oihire omu busyo bwawe bw'entaama, n'omu bi oihire omu ihuuriro ryawe, n'omu inyuukiro ryawe rya viino; nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga waawe ariba akuhaire emigisha, obe nikwo waamuha." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Guma oijukye ku waabaire ori omuhuuku omu nsi ya Misiri, haza Mukama Ruhanga waawe akakucungurayo. N'ahabw'ekyo, ekyo ninkikuragiira eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Kwonka ku arikugira ati: Tindikwenda kukurugaho, ahabw'okukukunda n'ab'eka yaawe, ahabw'okushangwa ari gye naiwe," 
Deuteronomy15:17 obwo okwate empindu ogimufumuze okutu, eyogyemu ekwate orwigi; haza agume ari omuhuuku waawe ebiro byona; n'omuzaana waawe obe nikwo waamutwaza." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Kitarikugumira kumurekura kugyenda n'obusingye, ahabw'okuba aryaba akuheerereize emyaka mukaaga, haza iwe omwihwire kimwe kya kabiri ky'ebihembo by'omupakasi oguririirwe." 
Deuteronomy15:19 Emijigaijo yoona ey'enimi n'empaya, ey'omu masyo gaawe g'ente n'ag'entaama, ogume ogihongyere Mukama Ruhanga waawe. Otarigira omurimo gwona ogu waakoresa emijigaijo y'omu busyo bwawe bw'ente, nobu kwakuba okushara ebyoya by'emijigaijo y'entaama z'omu busyo bwawe." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Kureka iwe n'ab'eka yaawe mugiriire omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waawe buri mwaka, omu mwanya gu aritoorana." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Kwonka ku guriba gwine akamogo, yaaba guremaire nari guhumire, nainga gwine akandi kamogo k'omuringo gwona, otarigutambira Mukama Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Oguriire omu birorero byawe, kandi abashemeire n'abatashemeire nibaikirizibwa kuguryaho, nk'oku orya esirabo n'empara." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Kwonka otarirya eshagama yaagwo; ogyate aha nsi nk'amaizi. 
Deuteronomy16:1 Guma okore omukoro gw'okwezi kwa Abibu, ogirire Mukama Ruhanga waawe obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho, ahabw'okuba okwo kwezi nikwo yaakwihiiremu Misiri nyekiro." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Kandi otambire Mukama Ruhanga waawe ekitambo ky'Okuhingurwaho, nookiiha omu busyo bw'ente nari bw'entaama, omu mwanya gu aritoorana kuguma naaramizibwamu." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Otarikiriisa omugaati gutumbisiibwe, kureka omare ebiro mushanju nookiriisa emigaati etatumbisiibwe, eriibwa omu biro by'okugwerererwa; ahabw'okuba okaruga omu nsi ya Misiri noohungisa obwira, haza obone kuguma noijuka omu biro by'amagara gaawe byona eizooba ri waarugiireho omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Otarireebwa oine ekitumbisa omu nsi yaawe yoona okumara ebiro mushanju. Kandi hatarigira enyama yoona ey'ekitambo ki oritamba aha izooba ry'okubanza omu mwabazyo eyaaraaraho okuhitsya omu kasheeshe. 
Deuteronomy16:5 Otaritambira ekitambo ky'Okuhingurwaho omuri rumwe aha ndembo ezi Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha; 
Deuteronomy16:6 kureka okitambire omu mwanya ogu aritoorana kuguma naaramizibwamu. Okwo niyo origuma nootambira ekitambo ky'Okuhingurwaho, omu mwabazyo, eizooba nirirenga, omu bunaku nk'obu waarugiiremu Misiri." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Okiteekye, haza ekiriire omu mwanya ogu Mukama Ruhanga waawe aritoorana; mpaho omu kasheeshe ohindukye, ogarukye omu mahema gaawe." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Oryaguma omare ebiro mukaaga noorya emigaati etatumbisiibwe; reero aha kiro kya mushanju habeho ekiteerane kikuru kya Mukama Ruhanga waawe; kandi otarigira omurimo gu waakikoreraho. 
Deuteronomy16:9 Oryabara ewiiki mushanju. Otandikye kuzibara noihirira aha bunaku bu waatandikiireho kuta oruyuuya aha ngano z'omuri musiri. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Reero ogirire Mukama Ruhanga waawe obugyenyi bw'ewiiki mushanju, noomureetera omutoijo gu oyekundiire, ogurugire omu mikono yaawe, ogu oraatoije nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga waawe akuhaire emigisha." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Haza oshemerererwe omu maisho ge, omu mwanya gu aritoorana kumuramizamu iwe na mutabani waawe, na muhara waawe, n'omuhuuku waawe, n'omuzaana waawe, n'Omuleevi otwire omu birorero byawe, n'omushuuhuuki n'efuuzi n'omufaakazi abatwire naiwe." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Ogume oijukye ku waabaire ori muhuuku omuri Misiri; haza oteho omutima kukuratira ebiragiro ebi ebyatairweho. 
Deuteronomy16:13 Kandi ku oriheza kuhunika eby'omu ihuuriro ryawe, n'eby'omu inyuukiro ryawe rya viino, ogire Obugyenyi bw'Ensiisira okumara ebiro mushanju." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Oshemerererwe omuri obwo bugyenyi bwawe, iwe na mutabani waawe, na muhara waawe n'omuhuuku waawe, n'omuzaana waawe, n'Omuleevi, n'omushuuhuuki, n'efuuzi n'omufaakazi abatwire omu birorero byawe." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Omare ebiro mushanju noogirira Mukama Ruhanga waawe obugyenyi omu mwanya ogu aritoorana; ahabw'okuba aryakuheera omugisha omu bi oyerize byona, n'omu mirimo yoona ei okoreise emikono yaawe; obone kushemerererwa kimwe." 
Deuteronomy16:16 Buri mwaka, emirundi eshatu, abantu baawe boona abeetwa abashaija bagume baije omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waawe omu mwanya ogu aritoorana aha Bugyenyi bw'Emigaati Etatumbisiibwe, n'aha bw'Ewiiki, n'aha bw'Ensiisira; haza batariija omu maisho ge engaro nsha." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Buri muntu agume ahe nk'oku arikubaasa, nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga waawe ariba akuhaire omugisha." 
Deuteronomy16:18 Oteho abaramuzi n'abategyeki omu birorero byawe byona ebi Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha, nk'oku enganda zaawe ziri, bacwere abantu baawe emanja zihikire." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Otariita orubanja, otarigwera orubaju, kandi otarirya enguzi; ahabw'okuba enguzi ehumya amaisho g'omunyabwengye, kandi eita emanja z'abahikire." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Guma okuratire obwinganisa, kandi obwinganisa bwonka, obone kugumaho n'okuhungura ensi ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha." 
Deuteronomy16:21 Otaribyara omuti gwona ogwetwa omurinzi aha rubaju rw'eitambiro rya Mukama Ruhanga waawe eri orikora; 
Deuteronomy16:22 kandi otaribyara enyomyo y'eibaare, ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe atenda." 
Deuteronomy17:1 Otaritambira Mukama Ruhanga waawe ente nari entaama eine akamogo nari akacokoore koona; ahabw'okuba ekyo ahariwe nikizira. 
Deuteronomy17:2 Omuriiwe ku haakubaho omuntu weena, omushaija nari omukazi, ow'omuri rumwe aha ndembo zaawe ezi Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha, yaashangwa naakora ekirikugwisa kubi Mukama Ruhanga waawe, ekirikuhenda endagaano ye," 
Deuteronomy17:3 yaagyenda yaaheereza baaruhanga abandi kandi yaabaramya, yaaba izooba nari okwezi, nainga ekintu kyona eky'omu ihe ry'eby'omu iguru eki naazibiire," 
Deuteronomy17:4 haza baakikugambira, nari waakihurira, oteho omutima kubuuririza. Reero ku kiriba eky'amazima kandi ekihamire ku ekyo kintu kirikuzira kikozirwe omuri Isiraeli," 
Deuteronomy17:5 obwo oryashohoza ogwo mushaija nari ogwo mukazi okozire ekyo kintu kibi, omuhitsye aheeru y'amarembo g'orurembo rwawe, omuteere amabaare afe." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Ow'okufa aryaitwa haaba hariho obujurizi bwa baamushinja babiri nari bashatu; hatarigira omuntu owaitwa ahabw'obujurizi bwa mushinja omwe. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Baamushinja babe nibo baabanza kumutaho engaro kumwita, reero abandi bamushongyere. Obwo nibwo oriiha ekibi omuriiwe." 
Deuteronomy17:8 Ku haribaho orubanja rw'okwitana kw'omuringo gwona, nari orw'entongane z'omuringo gwona, nainga orw'endwano z'omuringo gwona orurikwetengyesa kucuubwa, n'orubanja rwona oruribaho omu birorero byawe orukuremire, mbwenu obwo oimukye, oze omu mwanya ogu Mukama Ruhanga waawe ariba atooraine," 
Deuteronomy17:9 haza ohikye abahongyerezi Abaleevi, n'omuramuzi oriba ariho ebiro ebyo, obeebuuzeho, nabo bakugambire eki baacwamu." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Bwanyima okore eki baakugambirira omu mwanya ogu Nyakubaho aritoorana; kandi oteho omutima kukora ebi baakuragiira," 
Deuteronomy17:11 nookuratira ebi baakuhabura, kandi nookora ebi baakwihiramu. Otarigira obu oteishukire eki baacwamu eki barikugambira, okatoora orundi rubaju orwa buryo nari orwa bumosho." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Omuntu origira amaryo, akanga kuhurira omuhongyerezi oriba ayemereire naaheereza Mukama Ruhanga waawe, nari akanga kuhurira omuramuzi, aitwe. Otyo oihe ekibi omuriiwe;" 
Deuteronomy17:13 abantu boona babone kuhurira n'okutiina, barekye kugaruka kukora eby'amaryo." 
Deuteronomy17:14 Ku orihika omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha, waagikubuura, waagituuramu, obwo ogire oti: Ka nyeteereho omugabe antegyekye, nk'amahanga goona agaanyehinguririize oku gari." 
Deuteronomy17:15 Noikirizibwa kweteeraho omugabe w'okukutegyeka, ou Mukama Ruhanga waawe aritoorana. Omugabe ou oritaho kukutegyeka abe ari ow'omuri beene sho. Torikwikirizibwa kutaho omunyaihanga otari mwene waanyu kukutegyeka." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Kwonka ogwo mugabe ataryekanyisiza embaraasi, nari okureetera abantu kugaruka Misiri, ngu babone kukanyisa embaraasi. Manya Nyakubaho akabagira ati: Mutarigaruka kutoora ogwo muhanda." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Kandi atarishwera abakazi baingi, omutima gwe gukahaba, n'obu kwakuba okwerundira efeeza nyingi n'ezaabu." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Reero ku arishutama aha kitebe ky'obugabe bwe, ayehandiikire omu kitabo ekihanduukururo ky'eryo iteeka naakishomerwa abahongyerezi Abaleevi." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Ekyo kitabo agume naakishoma ebiro by'amagara ge byona, abone kutiina Mukama Ruhanga we, naakuratira ebiri omuri eryo iteeka n'ebyatairweho, kandi naabihitsya," 
Deuteronomy17:20 omutima gwe gubone kuteetunguurira ahari beene ishe, kandi arekye kuteishuka ebiragiro, akatoora orubaju rwa buryo nari orwa bumosho, atyo akabona kuhangaarira aha bugabe bwe omuri Isiraeli, we n'abaana be." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Abahongyerezi Abaleevi, nibo ab'oruganda rwa Leevi, tibariheebwa n'Abaisiraeli omugabo, nobu ryakuba eitaka ry'obuhunguzi. Baryaguma batungwe ebitambo ebihongyeirwe Nyakubaho ebicwekize, n'ebindi ebi ashemereire kutoijerwa." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Batariheebwa eitaka ry'obuhunguzi hamwe na beene waabo. Nyakubaho niwe buhunguzi bwabo, nk'oku yaabaraganiise." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Mbwenu egi niyo migabo y'abahongyerezi ey'okwihwa aha bantu abarikuhonga ebitambo, yaaba nte nari entaama. Bahe omuhongyerezi ekivune ky'omukono, n'emishaya yombi, n'ekishansha." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Omuhe emiganuro y'engano zaawe na viino yaawe n'amajuta gaawe g'emioliva, n'emiganuro y'ebyoya by'entaama zaawe." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Manya Mukama Ruhanga waawe akamutoorana omu nganda zaawe zoona kuguma naayemerera omu maisho ge, n'okumukorera omurimo gw'obuheereza, we n'abatabani ebiro byona." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Mbwenu, Omuleevi ahu aryendera, ku ariruga omu kirorero ki atwiremu, eky'omu birorero byanyu eby'omuri Isiraeli, yaija omu mwanya gu Nyakubaho aritoorana," 
Deuteronomy18:7 nabwo naikirizibwa kuheereza ari omuhongyerezi wa Mukama Ruhanga we, nk'Abaleevi bagyenzi be abeemerera bakaheererezayo bari omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Deuteronomy18:8 Aheebwe emigabo y'ebyokurya erikwingana n'eyaabo, otabariiremu ebi yaihire omu kutunda ebintu bya ishe ebi yaahungwire." 
Deuteronomy18:9 Ku orihika omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha, otaritooreza emicwe y'ago mahanga erikuzira." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Omuriiwe hatarishangwamu omuntu weena owaarabya omutabani nari omuhara omu muriro kuba ekitambo; nari orikuragura, nari omufumu, nari omuhanuuzi w'ebirikubaho, nainga omucecezi," 
Deuteronomy18:11 nainga omuhatiki w'engisha, nari orikugambirwamu emizimu, nari omurogi, nainga orikuhinza abazimu." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Manya weena okora ebyo aba ekihagaro ahari Nyakubaho. Kandi ahabw'ago mahanga kukora ebirikuzira, nikyo Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaagabingiire gakakuhigiza." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Kwonka iwe obe otaine kamogo omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waawe. 
Deuteronomy18:14 Manya ago mahanga agu ori haihi kunyaga gata omutima aha bagomboozi n'aha bafumu; kwonka iwe Mukama Ruhanga waawe takakwikirizaga kukora otyo. 
Deuteronomy18:15 Mukama Ruhanga waawe aryakwimukiza omurangi ori nkaanye, arugye omuriiwe omuri beene waanyu. Ogwo mumuhurire." 
Deuteronomy18:16 Nk'oku waayeshengyereize Mukama Ruhanga waawe ori Horebu aha izooba ry'ekiteerane, obu waagira oti: Ndeka ntagaruka kuhurira eiraka rya Mukama Ruhanga wangye, nari kwongyera kureeba ogu muriro mwingi guti, ntakaafa;" 
Deuteronomy18:17 haza Nyakubaho akangira ati: Byona ebi baagamba bihikire. 
Deuteronomy18:18 Ati: Ndyabaimukiza omurangi nkaiwe omuri beene waabo, nte ebigambo byangye omu kanwa ke, abagambire byona ebi ndikumuragiira."
