Deuteronomy18:19 Kandi weena otaryeta aha bigambo byangye ebi arigamba omu iziina ryangye, Nyowe nyakabara ndyakimutura." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Kwonka omurangi oryehangamura kugamba ekigambo omu iziina ryangye eki ntamuragiire kugamba, nari origamba omu iziina rya baaruhanga abandi, ogwo murangi aryafa." 
Deuteronomy18:21 Kandi ku waakwebuuza oti: Beitu tukaamanya tuta ekigambo ki Nyakubaho atagambire? 
Deuteronomy18:22 Omurangi ku yaakugamba omu iziina rya Nyakubaho, haza eki yaagamba kitaabaho, nari kitaabakwo, biri ekyo kigambo Mukama tiwe akigambire. Ogwo murangi niwe ayehangamwire kukigamba, otamutiina." 
Deuteronomy19:1 Mukama Ruhanga waawe ku ariheza kucwekyereza amahanga agu arikukuha ensi yaago, waaganyaga, waatuura omu ndembo zaago n'omu maka gaago," 
Deuteronomy19:2 oyeihiremu endembo ishatu z'omuri egyo nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaakuha kukubuura. 
Deuteronomy19:3 Oyeteereho emihanda, kandi egyo nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha kukubuura ogicwemu ebyanga bishatu, owaita omuntu abone kubihungiramu." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Ezo ndembo ziteebweho ngu owaita omuntu ku araazihungiremu akize amagara ge. Omuntu ku yaakwita mutaahi we atamwitsire nkana, kandi omu biro bihwaire atarikwangana nawe," 
Deuteronomy19:5 nk'oku omuntu aza omu kibira na mutaahi we kutema ebiti, akitaaruura omukono akwaitse empango kutema omuti, empango ekasyoka omu muhini, ekateera mugyenzi we akafa, naikirizibwa kuhungira omuri rumwe ahari ezo ndembo, akakiza amagara ge;" 
Deuteronomy19:6 orikuhoora enzigu ya kiitwa, atakaija aine ekiniga kingi akabinga kiita, akamuhambya ahabw'orugyendo kuba ruraingwa, akamuhutaaza akamwita. Haza kunu ogwo muntu atakubaire w'okufa, ahabw'okushanga ataine nzigu na mutaahi we omu bunaku obuhingwire." 
Deuteronomy19:7 N'ahabw'ekyo ninkuragiira, otoorane endembo ishatu," 
Deuteronomy19:8 kandi Mukama Ruhanga waawe ku ariirizayo emyatano yaawe, nk'oku yaarahiire baashwenkuru, yaakuha ensi yoona ei yaaraganiise kugibaha," 
Deuteronomy19:9 waaba otaireho omutima kworobera ebiragiro bye byona ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba, kukunda Mukama Ruhanga waawe, n'okutataishuka mihanda ye, obwo nibwo oryongyera ezindi ndembo ishatu ahari ezi ishatu," 
Deuteronomy19:10 abataine rubanja batakaitirwa busha omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha kuhungura; orubanja rw'okusheeshera busha eshagama rukakuzaho. 
Deuteronomy19:11 Kwonka omuntu weena ku aryanga mutaahi we, yaamugwera, yaamugurukira, yaamuhutaaza obw'okumwita, n'onu yaafa, haza ogwo muntu yaahungira omuri rumwe ahari ezo ndembo," 
Deuteronomy19:12 obwo abakuru b'orurembo rwe batumeyo, bamwiheyo; haza bamurekurire orikuhoorera kiitwa, amwite." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Eriisho ryawe ritarimugirira esaasi; kureka oihe omuri Isiraeli ekibi ky'okusheeshera busha eshagama y'abataine rubanja, obone kuba gye." 
Deuteronomy19:14 Otarikuura emigorora y'omwatano gwa mutaahi waawe eyaabyairwe aba ira omu itaka ry'obuhunguzi bw'omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha kukubuura. 
Deuteronomy19:15 Mushinja omwe atarisingisa omuntu orubanja rw'ekicumuro kyona, nari orw'ekishobyo kyona ekikwatiraine n'ekicumuro eki omuntu akozire. Kureka ogwo muntu aryayomeserezibwa orubanja ahabw'obujurizi bwa baamushinja babiri nari bashatu." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Omuntu w'eitima ku aryemeza mugyenzi we ekibi naamubeiherera," 
Deuteronomy19:17 abantu bombi abarikutongana baije omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, aha bahongyerezi n'abaramuzi abari aha murimo omu biro ebyo." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Abaramuzi babuuririze munonga. Ku barishanga mushinja ogwo ari ow'ebishuba, abeehereire mwene waabo," 
Deuteronomy19:19 ogwo muntu mumugire nk'oku abaire naayenda kugira mwene waabo. Otyo oihe ekibi omuriiwe. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Abandi bakihurire, batiine, barekye kugaruka kukora ekibi nk'ekyo omuriiwe." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Eriisho ryawe ritarigira esaasi. Amagara gagwane n'amagara, eriisho n'eriisho, eriino n'eriino, omukono n'omukono, n'ekigyere kigwane n'ekigyere." 
Deuteronomy20:1 Ku orihurura kurwanisa abazigu baawe, waareeba embaraasi n'ebigaari n'eihe rihango eririkukira eryawe, otaribitiina, ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waawe owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misiri ari hamwe naiwe." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Kandi ku muriba muri hakye kurwana orugamba, omuhongyerezi aije omu maisho g'abantu, agire eki yaabagambira," 
Deuteronomy20:3 naagira ati: Imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe nimuhurire! Eri izooba mwahika haihi kurwanisa abazigu baanyu. Emitima yaanyu etafoobeera, mutatiina, mutatetema, nobu kwakuba okwitwa obwoba." 
Deuteronomy20:4 Manya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu naagyenda naimwe kubarwanisiza abazigu baanyu n'okubabajuna. 
Deuteronomy20:5 Reero abakuru b'engabo babuuze abantu bati: Hariho omuntu oyombekire enju nsya haza atakagihongire? Mbwenu ogwo muntu agarukye omuka atakaagwa omu rugamba, ondiijo akaba niwe yaagihonga." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Hariho obyaire omusiri gw'emizaabibu otakariire bijuma byagwo? Agarukye omuka, atakaagwa omu rugamba, ondiijo muntu akananurwa ebijuma byagwo." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Hariho omuntu ogambire omukazi obugyenyi, otakamutaahize? Agarukye owe omuka, atakaagwa omu rugamba, ondiijo muntu akamushwera." 
Deuteronomy20:8 Kandi abakuru b'engabo bongyere kubuuza abantu bati: Hariho omuntu ekinyabwoba kandi ohahaarize omutima? Agarukyeyo omu ka ye, emitima ya bagyenzi be etakaahahaara nk'ogwe." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Abakuru b'engabo ku baraagume baaheza kugambira abantu, bateho abakuru b'amahe kubeebembera." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Ku orihika haihi n'orurembo kuruteera, obanze ogambire abaamwo eby'okubareetera obusingye." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Ku rurikugarukamu eby'obusingye, rwakwigurira, boona abu orishangamu bakukorere emirimo y'obuhuuku, babe abairu baawe." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Mbwenu orurembo ku ruriba rutaikirizaine naiwe eby'obusingye, kureka rwayenda kukurwanisa, obwo orugote." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Kandi Mukama Ruhanga waawe ku arirukurekurira, abashaija baamwo boona obaitse rurara," 
Deuteronomy20:14 kureka abakazi n'abaana n'amatungo na buri kintu kyona ekyamwo, n'ebi orinyagamu byona obyetwarire, bibe eminyago yaawe. Kandi orye eminyago y'abazigu baawe ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaakuha." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Okwo nikwo origira endembo zoona ezikuri hare munonga, ezitari ndembo z'amahanga ga kunu." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Kwonka omuri ezo ndembo z'amahanga aga, agu Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha kuhungura, otarigira ekintu kyona ekirikwitsya eki waatsiga kihuriire;" 
Deuteronomy20:17 kureka ogacwekyerereze kimwe. Nigo aga: Abahiiti, Abaamori, Abanyakanaani, Abapeerizi, Abahiizi, n'Abayebusi, nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga waawe aragiire;" 
Deuteronomy20:18 batakaabeegyesa kutooreza emicwe yaabo mibi, ei babaire baine nibaramya baaruhanga baabo, haza mukacumura ahari Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Deuteronomy20:19 Ku orimara omwanya muraingwa ogotsire orurembo noorurwanisa kurukwata, otarikonda emiti yaarwo okagirazisa empango, ahabw'okuba okaabaasa kugira eki waagiryaho. N'ahabw'ekyo otarigitema. Mbwenu emiti y'omu ishwa, ogyeetsire abantu ngu ogigote?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Kureka emiti ei orikumanya ngu ti y'ebyokurya, noobaasa kugicwekyereza, okagitema, okagikoramu eby'okugotesa orurembo rurikukurwanisa, okuhistya obu ruraakumbagare." 
Deuteronomy21:1 Omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha kukubuura ku harigira owaashangwamu aitsirwe, agangarami omu ishwa, omwitsire atarikumanywa," 
Deuteronomy21:2 obwo abakuru baanyu n'abaramuzi baanyu baije, bagyere omwanya oguri ahagati y'oitsirwe n'endembo ezeehinguririizeho." 
Deuteronomy21:3 Abakuru b'orurembo orurikukira ezindi kuba haihi n'ogwo muntu oitsirwe bareete enyana eruutsi, etakakoresibwaga murimo, nobu kwakuba okukurura ekintu kyona eteirwe omu migamba." 
Deuteronomy21:4 Abakuru baarwo bashuumye egyo nyana omu ruhanga orurimu amaizi garikuhimintika, orutakahingwamuga, nobu kwakuba okubibwamu; haza bagihotorereyo ebitsya." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Abahongyerezi beene Leevi bairire haihi, ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waawe akabatoorana kumuheereza n'okushabira abantu emigisha omu iziina rye, kandi baba ab'okucwa emanja z'abatongaine n'abarwaine." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Abakuru boona ab'orurembo oruri haihi na kiitwa banaabire engaro ahari egyo nyana yaahotorerwa ebitsya omu ruhanga; 
Deuteronomy21:7 haza bagire bati: Engaro zaitu tizo ziseesire egi shagama, nobu gaakuba amaisho gaitu kugireeba neesheesheka!" 
Deuteronomy21:8 Ai Nyakubaho, saasira eihanga ry'abantu baawe Abaisiraeli abu waacungwire, orekye kubarira abantu baawe Abaisiraeli ekibi ky'okusheesha eshagama y'otaine rubanja." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Oyeihemu otyo ekibi ky'okusheesha eshagama y'otaine rubanja; waaba okozire ekihikire omu maisho ga Mukama. 
Deuteronomy21:10 Ku orihurura kuza aha rugamba kurwanisa abazigu baawe, haza Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaabakurekurira, waabareeta bari enkwatwa," 
Deuteronomy21:11 kandi omuri ezo nkwatwa waariimamu omukazi murungi, waamurigira, waayenda kumutwara kuba omukazi waawe," 
Deuteronomy21:12 obwo omureete omuka omu nju yaawe, amwe eishokye acwe n'ebyara." 
Deuteronomy21:13 Reero ajuure ebijwaro bye ebi yaakwatiirwemu, agume omu nju yaawe naacurira ishe na nyina okumara okwezi, bwanyima obone kumuraarira. Obe iba, nawe abe omukazi waawe." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Mbwenu ku waakureeba otarikumusiima, omurekye aze ahu arikwenda, kwonka otarimuguzamu empiiha, kandi otarimutwaza nk'omuzaana, ahabw'okuba nooba oine oku waamugizire." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Omushaija ku yaakugira abakazi babiri, omwe ari enkundwakazi n'ondi ari enyangwakazi, haza bombi enkundwakazi n'enyangwakazi bamuzaariire abaana, kwonka omwana omujigaijo ari ow'enyangwakazi," 
Deuteronomy21:16 mbwenu aha izooba eri arikuragiraho abaana be ebi atungire, tarikwikirizibwa kuhindura mutabani w'ekundwakazi kuba omwana we omukuru, akamukiza mutabani w'enyangwakazi ow'omujigaijo," 
Deuteronomy21:17 kureka aikirize ogwo mwana omujigaijo mutabani w'enyangwakazi, amuragye obuhunguzi bw'emirundi ebiri obw'ebi atungire byona; ahabw'okuba n'omwana w'amaani ge ou yaabandize kuzaara. Niwe ahikire kuheebwa eby'omwana omujigaijo." 
Deuteronomy21:18 Omuntu ku ariba aine omutabani empiga kandi omugomi, otarikuhurira ebi ishe na nyina barikumugambira, nobu baakumuhana bata, kwonka atarikubeetaho," 
Deuteronomy21:19 ishe na nyina bamukwate bamutware, bamuhitsye aha irembo omu maisho g'abakuru b'orurembo oru atwiremu;" 
Deuteronomy21:20 haza bagambire abakuru baarwo bati: Ogu mwana waitu n'empiga kandi n'omugomi; tarikuhurira ebi turikumugambira; n'omunyamururu kandi n'omusinzi. 
Deuteronomy21:21 Reero abantu b'orurembo orwo boona bamuteere amabaare, afe. Oyeihemu otyo ekibi, na Isiraeli yoona ekihurire etiine." 
Deuteronomy21:22 Kandi omuntu ku arikora ekicumuro ky'okumwitisa, yaitwa omuhanikire aha muti," 
Deuteronomy21:23 omutumbi gwe gutariraara ahari ogwo muti, kureka oguziikye eryo izooba. Manya ohanikirwe, aba akyeenirwe Ruhanga. Otarishiisha ensi yaawe ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha kuhungura." 
Deuteronomy22:1 Otarireeba ente nari entaama ya mwene waanyu neeshohoka, okanga kugitanga. Ogifunye ogigarureyo owa mwene waanyu." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Ku araabe atari haihi naiwe, nari otarikumumanya, ogitware owaawe omuka, egume naiwe okuhitsya obu mwene waanyu naagisherura, okagimugarurira." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Kandi obe nikwo waatwaza endogoya ye, n'ekijwaro kye obe nikwo waakitwaza; n'ekintu kyona ekya mwene waanyu ekibuzire, okakibona, okitwaze otyo. Otarikyehuzya!" 
Deuteronomy22:4 Otarireeba endogoya ya mwene waanyu, nari ente ye ebandamire aha muhanda okagyehuzya; omuhwere kugibutuura." 
Deuteronomy22:5 Omukazi atarijwara ekijwaro ky'abashaija, n'omushaija atarijwara eky'abakazi. Weena orikukora ekintu nk'ekyo naaba ekihagaro ahari Mukama Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Ku waakugwa aha kyashuri ky'enyonyi omu muti, nari aha nsi, kirimu ebyana nari amahuri na nyinabyo ebumbatiire ebyo byana, nari ago mahuri, otaritwara nyinabyo hamwe nabyo." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Orekye nyinabyo egyende, kwonka ebyana byo obyetwarire, obone kuba gye kandi ohangaare." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Ku oryombeka enju nsya, ote aha mutwe gwayo orukomantiriro; orekye kureetera enju yaawe kugira orubanja rw'okwita omuntu, yaaba ahanantukireyo akeetuura aha nsi." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Otaribyara omu musiri gwawe gw'emizaabibu endiijo mbibo, ebyayeramu ebi obibiremu kandi n'emizaabibu eyeziremu bikanyagirwa omwanya ogurikwera." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Otarihingisa ente n'endogoya bikomerainwe kumwe. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Otarijwara omwenda gukozirwe omu huuzi z'ebyoya by'entaama n'eza kitaani. 
Deuteronomy22:12 Ogume oyebaziirire ebijwengye aha nshonda ina z'omunagiro gwawe ogu oyefubika. 
Deuteronomy22:13 Omushaija ku arishwera omwishiki, yaabyama nawe, yaamutamwa," 
Deuteronomy22:14 yaamugambaho ebirikumuhemura, yaashiisha eiziina rye naagira ati: Nshweire ogu mwishiki, kwonka ku mmuhikire, naashanga ataine bumanyiso bw'okushugaana." 
Deuteronomy22:15 Mbwenu ishe na nyina b'ogwo mukazi ogabukire, batware obumanyiso bw'okushugaana kwe, babuhitsye aha irembo omu maisho g'abakuru b'orurembo." 
Deuteronomy22:16 Ishe w'ogwo mukazi engabukye agambire abo bakuru ati: Mpingiire ogu mushaija muhara wangye, mbwenu amutamirwe;" 
Deuteronomy22:17 kandi yaataho n'okubeiherera ebirikumuhemura, naagira ati: tinshangire muhara waawe aine obumanyiso bw'okushugaana. Kwonka mbwenu, obu nibwo bumanyiso bw'okushugaana kwa muhara wangye. Batyo bashashaanure omwenda omu maisho g'abakuru b'orurembo." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Abakuru b'orwo rurembo bakwate ogwo mushaija bamuteere ebyasha. 
Deuteronomy22:19 Bateho n'okumuhongyesa empiiha igana z'efeeza bazihe ishe w'ogwo mukazi ogabukire, ahabw'okushiisha eiziina ry'oshugaine owa Isiraeli. Haza agume ari omukazi we, atarimushenda ebiro by'amagara ge byona." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Kwonka ekyo ku kyakuba eky'amazima, ogwo mukazi engabukye baashanga ataine bumanyiso bw'okushugaana, obwo ogwo mukazi ogabukire bamushohoze, bamute aha muryango gw'enju ya ishe," 
Deuteronomy22:21 haza abantu b'omu rurembo rw'owaabo bamuteere amabaare, afe, ahabw'okuba akozire eky'obufamutima omuri Isiraeli, kuraayira aha mahega ga ishe; mpaho oiheho otyo ekibi omuriiwe." 
Deuteronomy22:22 Omushaija ku arishangwa abyami na muk'ondi mushaija, bombi baitwe; ogwo mushaija waabyama n'ogwo mukazi, kandi n'ogwo mukazi. Oihe otyo ekibi omuri Isiraeli." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Ku hariba hariho omwishiki orikugambwa obugyenyi, omushaija yaamubugana omu rurembo yaabyama nawe," 
Deuteronomy22:24 bombi mubareete aha irembo ry'orurembo, mubateere amabaare, mubaite; egyo mpangare, ahabw'okuba tateire nduuru, haza ari omu rurembo; n'ogwo mushaija, ahabw'okuba asiisire muka mutaahi we. Oiheho otyo ekibi omuriiwe." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Kwonka omushaija ku arishanga omu ishwa omwishiki orikugambwa obugyenyi, yaamuhamba, yaabyama nawe, obwo ogwo mushaija waabyamisa ogwo mwishiki, abe niwe yaitwa wenka." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Kwonka ogwo mwishiki empangare, otagira eki waamukora; ahabw'okuba naaba atakozire kicumuro ky'okumwitisa. Manya ekyo ni nk'eky'omuntu ogurukira mutaahi we akamwita;" 
Deuteronomy22:27 ahabw'okuba amushangire omu ishwa, kandi ogwo mwishiki orikugambwa obugyenyi, nobu araabe ateire enduuru, habuzire ow'okumujuna." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Omushaija ku akubugana omwishiki otarikugambwa bugyenyi, yaamuhamba, yaabyama nawe haza baakwatwa bombi," 
Deuteronomy22:29 ogwo mushaija waabyama nawe, arihe ishe w'ogwo mwishiki empiiha makumi ataano z'efeeza, abe omukazi we, ahabw'okuba niwe yaamusiisire. Kandi atarimushenda ebiro by'amagara ge byona." 
Deuteronomy22:30 Omushaija atarishwera muka ishe, akahemura ishe." 
Deuteronomy23:1 Omuntu oyatikire amagosi, nari ocwirweho obushaija, atariza omu kiteerane kya Nyakubaho." 
Deuteronomy23:2 Ekizaarwa kitariza omu kiteerane kya Nyakubaho; nangwa n'okuhitsya aha b'oruzaaro rwa ikumi, hatarigira mwijukuru waakyo owaaza omu kiteerane kya Nyakubaho." 
Deuteronomy23:3 Hatarigira ebiro byona Omuamoni nari Omumoabu owaaza omu kiteerane kya Nyakubaho. 
Deuteronomy23:4 Manya obu mwabaire muri omu rugyendo nimuruga Misiri, tibarababuganiise migaati na maizi. Kandi bakaguriirira Balaamu mwene Beori owa Petori ey'omuri Mesopotamiya kukukyena." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Kwonka shi Mukama Ruhanga waawe tarategire kutu Balaamu, kureka ogwo mukyeeno akagukuhindurra omugisha, ahabw'okuba akukunda." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Otaryenda kugira nabo obusingye nari obugogyeere ebiro byawe byona. 
Deuteronomy23:7 Otarinuga Omunyaedomu, ahabw'okuba ni mwenesho; kandi otarinuga Omunyamisiri, ahabw'okuba okaba oshuuhuukiire omu nsi ye." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Abaana baabo abu barizaara omu ruzaaro rwa kashatu baryaikirizibwa kuza omu kiteerane kya Nyakubaho. 
Deuteronomy23:9 Ku orihurura kurwanisa abazigu baawe, waaba ori omu rusiisira, oyetantare ekintu kyona ekibi." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Omuriimwe ku haakuba harimu omuntu otashemeire ahabw'ekimubaireho nyekiro, ashohore arugye omu rusiisira kandi atarugarukamu." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Kwonka ku buraabe omu mwabazyo, ayogye. Reero eizooba ku riraarengye, abe nibwo yaataaha omu rusiisira." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Kandi ogire omwanya aheeru y'orusiisira ahu origuma nooshohorera. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Eby'okurwanisa byawe otwarireho ekihosho; reero ku oraaze aha ishaazi, okitimbise ekiina. Haza ku oraaze kurugaho oshwekye ahi waayeeshemereza;" 
Deuteronomy23:14 ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waawe agyenda naaraba omu rusiisira rwawe kukurinda, n'okukurekurira abazigu baawe okababinga. N'ahabw'ekyo enkambi yaawe eshemereire kuba erikwera, atakaakureebamu ekitashemeire kyona, akakurugaho." 
Deuteronomy23:15 Omuhuuku oriba atorokire ahari mukama we akakuhungiraho otarimurekurira mukama we ogwo. 
Deuteronomy23:16 Agume naiwe owaawe, omu mwanya gu aritoorana omuri kimwe aha birorero byanyu eki arikukira kusiima. Kandi otarimwita kubi." 
Deuteronomy23:17 Hatarigira owaaba maraaya w'emirwa y'ediini omuri bahara ba Isiraeli nari omuri beene Isiraeli. 
Deuteronomy23:18 Otarireeta omu nju ya Mukama Ruhanga waawe ekintu ekiguririire maraaya omukazi nari ekihembo ki bahaire maraaya omushaija, ngu abone kuhikiiriza ebi waahigire, ahabw'okuba ebyo byombi ahari Mukama Ruhanga waawe nibizira." 
Deuteronomy23:19 Otariguza mwene waanyu ngu akutemu ekiteebwamu, yaaba ha mpiiha, nari aha byokurya, nainga aha kintu kyona eki baguza kwihamu ekiteebwamu." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Omunyaihanga we noikirizibwa kumuguza, okamwihaho ekiteebwamu. Kwonka mwene waanyu otarimuguza kumwihaho ekiteebwamu, Mukama Ruhanga waawe abone kukuha emigisha omuri byona ebi orikorera omu nsi ei orikuza kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Ku origira eki waasiga nooraganisa Mukama Ruhanga waawe, otaryeganda kukisiguura, ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waawe taribura kukikubuuza, haza kikakurugiramu ekibi." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Kwonka ku oriba otaraganiise kintu, tikirikurugiramu kibi." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Oyerinde kuhikiiriza ekyakuruga omu kanwa. Manya eki oba oraganiise n'akanwa kaawe, oba okiraganiise Mukama Ruhanga waawe oyekundiire." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Ku oriza omu musiri gwa mutaahi waawe gw'emizaabibu, noikirizibwa kurya ebijuma byamwo okaiguta, nk'oku orikwenda. Kwonka otarigira ebi waashoromera omu kiibo kyawe." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Ku oriza omu musiri gwa mutaahi waawe gw'engano, noikirizibwa kucwisa obushiisha engaro, kwonka engano za mutaahi waawe otarizisharisa oruyuuya." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Omushaija ku aritwara omukazi yaamushwera, kwonka bwanyima ogwo mukazi yaareeba amaisho ga iba gatarikumukunda, naamutura okugira emicwe mibi, iba yaahandiika ebaruha y'okumushenda yaagimukwatsa, yaamubinga omu ka ye, n'onu yaagirugamu," 
Deuteronomy24:2 mbwenu ogwo mukazi ku araagyende yaaba muk'ondi mushaija," 
Deuteronomy24:3 haza iba owa kabiri nawe yaamwanga, yaamuhandiikira ebaruha y'okumushenda, yaagimukwatsa yaamubinga omu ka ye, nari iba ogu owa kabiri omushweire yaafa;" 
Deuteronomy24:4 obwo iba ow'okubanza owaamushenzire tarikwikirizibwa kugaruka kumushwera kuba omukazi we; ogwo mukazi yaaherize kusiisikara. Manya ekyo n'ekihagaro omu maisho ga Mukama. Haza ensi ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha kuhungura, otarigireetera orubanja." 
Deuteronomy24:5 Omushaija ku ariba ashweire juba omukazi, atarihurura n'ezindi ngabo kuza aha rugamba, nari okukoresibwa ogundi murimo, kureka amare omwaka gumwe omuka ataine ki arikugyemwa kukora, abone kushemererwa n'omukazi we ou ashweire." 
Deuteronomy24:6 Hatarigira owaakwatirizibwa orubengo nari eseiso, ahabw'okuba naaba akwatiriziibwe ebirikubaisaho amagara ga mutaahi we." 
Deuteronomy24:7 Omuntu ku arishangwa naiba mwene waabo ow'omu Baisiraeli, yaamuhindura omuhuuku nari yaamutunda, ogwo mushuma aitwe. Oihe otyo ekibi omuriiwe." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Waaba okwatsirwe ebibembe, taho omutima kwerinda munonga kukora byona ebi abahongyerezi Abaleevi barikukuhabura, nk'oku naabaragiire. Naimwe mube nikwo mwayerinda kubikora." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Ijuka eki Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaakozire Miriyamu, obu mwabaire muri omu rugyendo nimuruga Misiri." 
Deuteronomy24:10 Ku origuza mutaahi waawe ekintu, otaritaaha omu nju ye kwihamu eki araakukwatirize," 
Deuteronomy24:11 kureka ogume aheeru. Reero ogwo muntu waaguza ekintu, akushangiseyo eki yaakukwatiriza." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Ku ariba ari omworo, otariraara n'ekintu ki yaakukwatiriza." 
Deuteronomy24:13 Eizooba ku ririba nirirenga, omugarurire eki yaakukwatiriza, abone kuraara ayeshwekire omunagiro gwe, haza akushabire omugisha, kikuhaise okuhikiirira omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy24:14 Otariryangatanisa omuheereza waawe oguririirwe, ori omworo kandi omukyene yaaba ari ow'omu beene waanyu, nari ow'omu bashuuhuuki abari omu nsi yaawe omu birorero byawe." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Omuhe ebihembo bye aha kiro ki yaakoreraho, eizooba ritakarengire. Manya n'omworo, kandi ebihembo bye nibyo ataireho omutima; atakaatakira Mukama naakutabaariza, kikakurugiramu ekibi." 
Deuteronomy24:16 Baishe b'abaana batariitwa ahabw'abaana baabo. N'abaana batariitwa ahabwa baishebo. Buri muntu aitwe ahabw'ekibi kye ahabwe. 
Deuteronomy24:17 Otariita orubanja rw'omunyaihanga, nari rw'efuuzi, nainga okukwatirira ekijwaro ky'omufaakazi;" 
Deuteronomy24:18 kureka ogume oijukye ku waabaire ori omuhuuku omuri Misiri, haza Mukama Ruhanga waawe akakwihayo. Naanye nikyo ndikukuragiirira kutwaza otyo." 
Deuteronomy24:19 Ku orishaaruura ebi ogyesire omu musiri gwawe, haagira omuba gwakwebayo, otarigarukayo kugwakiira, ogurekye gube ogw'omushuuhuuki, efuuzi n'omufaakazi; Mukama Ruhanga waawe abone kukuha omugisha omu mirimo yoona ei orikukora." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Ku orishoroma ebijuma aha miti yaawe y'emioliva, otarigaruka omu mataagi gaayo. Ebiritsigaramu bibe eby'omushuuhuuki, efuuzi n'omufaakazi." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Kandi ku orishoroma ebijuma by'emizaabibu omu musiri gwawe, otarigarukamu kuhumba. Ebiritsigaramu bibe eby'omushuuhuuki, efuuzi n'omufaakazi." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Guma oijukye ku waabaire ori omuhuuku omu nsi ya Misiri. N'ahabw'ekyo nikyo ndikukwehanangiririza kuguma nootwaza otyo. 
Deuteronomy25:1 Abantu ku bariba baine eki barikutongana, baija omu iramuriro, abaramuzi baabaramura, otaine rubanja baarumwihaho, orwine baarumusingisa," 
Deuteronomy25:2 mbwenu obwo owaasingwa orubanja ku araabe ari ow'okwashwa, omuramuzi aragiire bamurambikye aha nsi; haza bamuteerere omu maisho ge ebyasha ebishemereire ekicumuro kye." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Nibabaasa kumuteera ebyasha makumi ana; kwonka batarenzyaho; ahabw'okuba omuntu ku yaakumuteera ebyasha birikweshumba ebyo; mwene waanyu ogwo bakaaba bamumariiremu kimwe ak'obuntu omu maisho gaawe. 
Deuteronomy25:4 Otarita ente ekishankara aha munwa neejunga oburo. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Eishe-emwe ku bariba batwire kumwe, omwe aharibo yaafa atazaire mutabani, muka kifa atarishwerwa omushaija w'orundi ruganda, kureka mwene ishe abe niwe yaamuhungura, amushwere, amukorere ebi muramu w'omuntu akorera muka mwene ishe." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Kandi omutabani, ou ogwo mukazi aribanza kuzaara, aryahungurira mwene ishe owaafiire, ayetwe eiziina rye. Eiziina rye ritakaabuza obutsibyo omuri Isiraeli." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Kwonka ogwo mushaija ku yaakwanga kuhungura muka mwene ishe, muka mwene ishe ogwo aze aha irembo aha bakuru omu ihanga, abagire ati: Muramu wangye ayangire kugumyaho eiziina rya mwene ishe, yaayanga kunkorera ebi muramu w'omuntu amukorera." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Mpaho abakuru b'orurembo rwe bamwete bamugambire; kwonka ku araagumizemu ayangire, yaagira ati: Tindikwenda kumuhungura," 
Deuteronomy25:9 obwo muka mwene ishe ogwo aije ahu ari, omu maisho g'abakuru b'eihanga, amujuure enkaito, amucwere amacwante aha maisho, haza amugire ati: Okwo nikwo omuntu owaayanga kugaruraho eka ya mwene ishe akorwa." 
Deuteronomy25:10 Reero eka ye omuri Isiraeli eyetwe eka y'owaajwirwe enkaito. 
Deuteronomy25:11 Abashaija ku barirwana, omukazi w'omwe aharibo yaija kujuna iba orikumuteera, yaatayo omukono yaakwata eby'enshoni bya kiteera," 
Deuteronomy25:12 ogwo mukazi omutemeho omukono. Otarimugirira esaasi. 
Deuteronomy25:13 Omu nshaho yaawe otarigiramu ebirikugyera oburemeezi eby'emiringo ebiri, ekihango n'ekikye." 
Deuteronomy25:14 N'omu nju yaawe otarigiramu ebirikugyera oburaingwa eby'emiringo ebiri, ekihango n'ekikye." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Ogume ogire ekirikugyera oburemeezi eky'amazima kandi ekihikire. Ogire n'ekirikugyera oburaingwa eky'amazima kandi ekihikire, ebiro by'amagara gaawe bibone kwongyerwaho omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Manya abakora ebintu nk'ebyo, boona abaryangatanisa, baba ekihagaro ahari Mukama Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy25:17 Ijuka oku Abaamaleki baabagizire muri omu rugyendo nimuruga Misiri," 
Deuteronomy25:18 oku baahurwire kubateera muri omu rugyendo muruhire kandi mugwire enshazi, bakabaitamu abaabaire batsigaire enyima nibakooza; kandi tibaratiinire Ruhanga." 
Deuteronomy25:19 N'ahabw'ekyo Mukama Ruhanga waawe ku ariheza kukuhuumuza engamba z'abazigu baawe abakwehinguririize omu nsi ei arikukuha kuhungura ekaba eyaawe, oryamariraho kimwe Abaamaleki, barekye kwijukwa ahansi y'eiguru. Ekyo kitarikweba." 
Deuteronomy26:1 Ku orihika omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukuha kuba obutaka bwawe, waagikubuura, waagituuramu," 
Deuteronomy26:2 okore emiganuro aha bi oyerize omu misiri yaawe ey'omu nsi yaawe ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe aritoorana kuramizibwamu. 
Deuteronomy26:3 Oze aha muhongyerezi oriba ari aha murimo omu bunaku obwo, omugire oti: Eri izooba nimpamiza Mukama Ruhanga waawe ku mpikire omu nsi ei yaarahiire baatatenkuriitwe kugituha." 
Deuteronomy26:4 Mpaho omuhongyerezi akwihe ekiibo omu ngaro, akihuumuze aha nsi omu maisho g'eitambiro rya Mukama Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Haza ogarukiremu omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waawe, oti: Tatenkuru akaba ari Omuaramu, otaine hu atwire. Yaaza Misiri yaashuuhuukirayo n'abantu bakye, yaahindukirayo eihanga rikuru ery'amaani kandi ery'abantu baingi." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Abanyamisiri baatwitsa omwaga, baatubonabonesa, baatukoresa emirimo y'obuhuuku." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Bwanyima twatakira Mukama Ruhanga wa baatatenkuriitwe; yaahurira okutaka kwaitu, kandi yaareeba okubonabona kwaitu n'okufa kubi kwaitu n'okuhatwa." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Nyakubaho ogwo yaatwiha Misiri n'omukono gwe ogw'amaani kandi ogubangire, naakora ebirikutiinisa munonga n'obumanyiso n'ebirikutangaaza," 
Deuteronomy26:9 yaatuhitsya omuri ogu mwanya, yaatuha egi nsi erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Mbwenu, ai Nyakubaho, reeba, naakutoijera emiganuro y'ebi nyerize omu itaka ri wampaire. Reero obite aha nsi omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waawe, omuramizeho." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Kandi oshemerererwe ebirungi byona ebi akuhaire n'ab'eka yaawe, iwe n'Omuleevi, n'omushuuhuuki otwire naiwe." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Ku oriheza kuha kimwe kya ikumi ky'ebi oyerize omu mwaka gwa kashatu, oguba omwaka gw'okuha kimwe kya ikumi, kukiha Omuleevi, omushuuhuuki, efuuzi, omufaakazi, ngu bariire omu birorero byawe baigute," 
Deuteronomy26:13 ogambire omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waawe, oti: Nyihire omu ka yangye ebintu ebihongirwe, naabiha Omuleevi, omushuuhuuki, efuuzi, n'omufaakazi, nk'ebiragiro byawe byona ebi wandagiire oku biri. Tihariho kiragiro kyawe na kimwe eki mpenzire, nobu kwakuba okukyeebwa." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Tihariho kimwe kya ikumi eki ndiiriire omu rufu, nari okugira eki naihaho ndi otashemeire, nainga okugira eki naagaburiire abazimu. Nkozire ebi iwe Mukama Ruhanga wangye wangambiire, naatwaza nk'oku byona ebi wandagiire biri." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Mbwenu naga amaisho aha nsi nooyema omu iguru omu butaaho bwawe oburikwera, ohe omugisha eihanga ryawe Isiraeli, n'obutaka bu waatuhaire, nk'oku waarahiire baatatenkuriitwe, ensi erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki." 
Deuteronomy26:16 Eri izooba Mukama Ruhanga waawe naakuragiira kukuratira ebyatairweho ebyo n'ebyaragiirwe. N'ahabw'ekyo oyezirikye munonga kubihitsya n'omutima gwawe, n'amagara gaawe goona." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Eri izooba waahamiza Nyakubaho ku ari Ruhanga waawe, ku orikwija kukora ebi arikukuragiira kurinda, ebi yaataireho n'amateeka ge n'ebiragiro bye, kandi n'okubyorobera." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Na Nyakubaho eri izooba yaakuhamiza ku ori eihanga rye ahabwe, nk'oku yaakuraganiise, kandi ku ori ow'okuguma nookuratira ebiragiro bye," 
Deuteronomy26:19 ngu abone kukutunguura, okire amahanga goona agu yaahangire, ogakize okusiimwa n'okurangaanwa, n'ekitiinwa, kandi ngu obe eihanga eririkwera ahari Mukama Ruhanga waawe nk'oku yaagambire." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Musa hamwe n'abakuru b'eihanga akaragiira abantu ati: Mukuratire ebiragiro byona ebi ndikubaragiira eri izooba. 
Deuteronomy27:2 Kandi aha izooba eri muryambukiraho Yorudaani kuza omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha, muryabyara amabaare mahango gasiigire einoni;" 
Deuteronomy27:3 haza mugahandiikyeho ebigambo by'eiteeka eri byona; mwayambuka muti kuza omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha, ensi erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki, nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe yaabaraganiise." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Reero ku muriheza kwambuka Yorudaani, ago mabaare gu naabaragiira eri izooba, mugabyare aha Rushozi Ebali; mugasiigirize einooni." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Kandi okwo mwombekyereyo Mukama Ruhanga waanyu eitambiro ry'amabaare; kwonka mutarigabaizesa ekyoma. 
Deuteronomy27:6 Muryayombekyera Mukama Ruhanga waanyu eitambiro ry'amabaare gatacweregyereire; murimutambirireho ebitambo bicwekize. 
Deuteronomy27:7 Mutambe n'ebitambo by'okurya kumwe. Muriireyo, kandi mushemerererwe omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Ahari ago mabaare muhandiikyeho ebigambo byona eby'eri iteeka, bihwezibwe gye." 
Deuteronomy27:9 Reero Musa n'abahongyerezi Abaleevi baagambira Isiraeli yoona bati: Iwe Isiraeli we, hunama, ohurire! Eri izooba waaba eihanga rya Mukama Ruhanga waawe." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Nikyo oshemerereire kuguma nooyorobera ebi arikugambira, nookuratira ebiragiro bye n'ebi yaataireho, ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy27:11 Bwanyima Musa eryo izooba akeehanangiriza abantu ati: 
Deuteronomy27:12 Ku muraaheze kwambuka Yorudaani, ab'enganda ezi beemerere aha Rushozi Gerizimu kushabira abantu omugisha: Nibo b'oruganda rwa Simeoni, n'orwa Leevi, n'orwa Yuda, n'orwa Isakaari, n'ab'orwa Yosefu n'ab'orwa Benyamiini." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Reero kandi aba beemerere aha Rushozi Ebali kukyeena. Nibo b'oruganda rwa Reubeeni, n'ab'orwa Gaadi, n'orwa Asheri, n'orwa Zebuluuni, n'ab'orwa Daani, n'ab'orwa Nafutaali" 
Deuteronomy27:14 Mpaho Abaleevi barangirire Abaisiraeli boona n'eiraka rihango bati: 
Deuteronomy27:15 Omuntu orikora ekishushani kishariirwe nari kiheesirwe, ekirikuzira ahari Nyakubaho, ekikozirwe omuntu omunyamyoga, akakyemereza bwesherekye, naakakyeenwe! Haza abantu boona baikirize nibagira bati: Eego, kibekwo!" 
Deuteronomy27:16 Orikugaya ishe nari nyina naakakyeenwe! Abantu boona bagire bati: Eego, kibekwo!" 
Deuteronomy27:17 Orikukuura omugorora gw'omwatano gwa mutaahi we naakakyenwe! Boona bagire bati: Eego, kibekwo!" 
Deuteronomy27:18 Naakakyeenwe, ogwo orikuhabisa empumi, akagiiha omu muhanda! Abantu boona bagire bati: Eego, kibekwo!" 
Deuteronomy27:19 Naakakyeenwe, ogwo oita orubanja rw'omushuuhuuki, rw'efuuzi nari rw'omufaakazi! Boona bati Eego kibekwo!" 
Deuteronomy27:20 Naakakyeenwe, ogwo obyama na mukaishe! Ahabw'okuba ku ashuuruura ogwo mukazi, aba ajwekire ishe busha. Mpaho boona baikirize bati: Eego, kibekwo!" 
Deuteronomy27:21 Orikubyama n'enyamaishwa naakakyeenwe! Haza abantu boona bagarukyemu bati: Eego, kibekwo!" 
Deuteronomy27:22 Orikubyama na munyaanya wa ishe nari wa nyina, naakakyeenwe! Abantu boona bagarukyemu bati: Eego, kibekwo!" 
Deuteronomy27:23 Oribyama na nyinazaara naakakyeenwe! Boona bati: Eego, kibekwo!" 
Deuteronomy27:24 Naakakyeenwe orikwita mutaahi we bwesherekye! Boona bagarukyemu bati: Eego, kibekwo!" 
Deuteronomy27:25 Naakakyeenwe orikuguriirirwa kwita omuntu ori mwere! Haza abantu boona baikirize bati: Eego kibekwo! 
Deuteronomy27:26 Otarikukuratira ebiri omu iteeka eri akabikora, naakakyeenwe! Mpaho abantu boona bagarukyemu bati: Eego, kibekwo!" 
Deuteronomy28:1 Ku orikora ebi Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikugambira waataho omutima kuhitsya ebiragiro bye byona, ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba, Mukama Ruhanga waawe aryakutunguura, okire amahanga goona g'omu nsi." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Haza emigisha egi yoona ekwijeho ogitungye, waaba nookora ebi Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikugambira," 
Deuteronomy28:3 ogire omugisha omu rurembo, ogire omugisha n'omu ishwa," 
Deuteronomy28:4 oruzaaro rwawe rugire omugisha, n'ebi oyerize omu musiri gwawe bigire omugisha, ebizairwe amatungo gaawe bigire omugisha, ente zaawe n'abaana b'obusyo bwawe bw'embuzi n'entaama bikanye," 
Deuteronomy28:5 ekitenga kyawe n'enyungu yaawe egoya bigire omugisha," 
Deuteronomy28:6 ogire omugisha nootaaha, ogire omugisha nooshohora." 
Deuteronomy28:7 Abazigu baawe abahurwire kukurwanisa Mukama aryabareetera okusingurwa bakuhungye; bareetwe omuhanda gumwe baizire kukurwanisa, omu kukuhunga bagabe ebirari mushanju;" 
Deuteronomy28:8 Nyakubaho aryakwoherereza omugisha, guhikye omu bitara byawe n'omu bi orikukora byona, kandi akuheere omugisha omu nsi ei arikukuha." 
Deuteronomy28:9 Ku orikuratira ebiragiro bya Mukama Ruhanga waawe, waashorongyera omu mihanda ye, aryakuhamya, obe eihanga rye eririkwera, nk'oku yaakurahiire;" 
Deuteronomy28:10 amahanga g'omu nsi goona gareebe ku orikwetererwa Nyakubaho, haza gakutiine." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Reero Nyakubaho aryakutungisa, ogogyeerere omu ruzaaro rwawe n'omu ruzaaro rw'amatungo gaawe n'omu bi emisiri yaawe eyerize omu nsi ei yaarahiire baashwenkuru kukuha." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Nyakubaho aryakwigurira eiguru eribiikirwemu bingi, agwisize ensi yaawe enjura omu bunaku bwayo, ahe omugisha byona ebi orikukoresa emikono yaawe, oguze amahanga maingi, kwonka otarikugeeguzaho." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Kandi Nyakubaho aryakuhindura omutwe, ti mukira, ogume otunguukye otarikubundikwa, waaba oyorobeire ebiragiro bya Mukama Ruhanga waawe ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba, otaireho omutima kubihitsya;" 
Deuteronomy28:14 kandi otataishukire bigambo ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba, okatoora ogwa buryo nari ogwa bumosho, kukuratira baaruhanga abandi n'okubaheereza." 
Deuteronomy28:15 Kwonka ku oriba otakozire ebi Mukama Ruhanga waawe akuragiire, nari waayanga kutaho omutima kuhitsya ebiragiro bye byona n'ebi yaataireho ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba, emikyeeno egi yoona eryakwijaho ekwinaze." 
Deuteronomy28:16 Obe okyeenirwe omu rurembo, obe okyeenirwe omu ishwa." 
Deuteronomy28:17 Ekitenga kyawe n'enyungu yaawe egoya bibe ebikyeenirwe. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Oruzaaro rwawe n'ebi oyerize omu musiri gwawe bikyeenwe. Okukanya kw'amatungo gaawe n'abaana b'obusyo bwawe bw'embuzi n'entaama bikyeenwe. 
Deuteronomy28:19 Obe okyeenirwe nootaaha, obe okyeenirwe nooshohora." 
Deuteronomy28:20 Nyakubaho akwoherereze emikyeeno, oburaburirwe, kandi oyeshobere omuri byona ebi orikuteeraho kukora, okuhitsya obu oricwekyerera okahwerekyerera ahonaaho, nooturwa ebibi ebi okozire ahabw'okuunyimuura." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Nyakubaho aryakwoherereza orufu rukuramatireho, okuhitsya obu rurikumariraho kimwe omu nsi ei orikuzamu kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Nyakubaho aryakunyangarazisa omunywengyerero n'omushwija n'obuzimba n'okubabiirirwa n'ekyanda-herebe n'okubabuka n'okusya-nyamwenga, bikwezingirire okuhitsya obu orihwerekyerera;" 
Deuteronomy28:23 eiguru ry'aha mutwe gwawe ritukure nk'omuringa, n'ensi ei oribatsiho ekarangatane nk'ekyoma;" 
Deuteronomy28:24 Nyakubaho omu mwanya gw'okugwisa enjura omu nsi yaawe, akuteeze omuyaga gw'akasooroora k'omucuucu n'omusheenyi, birugye omu iguru bikugweho, okuhitsya obu orihwerekyerera." 
Deuteronomy28:25 Nyakubaho aryakureetera okusingurwa abazigu baawe obahungye. Oryareetwa omuhanda gumwe oizire kubarwanisa; reero omu kubahunga ogabe ebirari mushanju, obe ekirikureetera agandi mahanga g'obugabe bw'omu nsi kwesikura." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Omutumbi gwawe guriibwe enyonyi zoona ez'omu mwanya n'enyamaishwa z'omu nsi, habure ow'okuzibinga;" 
Deuteronomy28:27 Nyakubaho akurwaze ebihuute n'ebishebe bya Misiri, orukuuruuru n'orweyaguro ebi otarikira;" 
Deuteronomy28:28 Nyakubaho akugwise eiraro, akuhumye, akuhuzye omutima;" 
Deuteronomy28:29 obandagire omu ihangwe nk'oku empumi ebandagira omu mwirima, obure obutooro; kureka ogume noohatwa kandi noonyagwa; habure owaakujuna;" 
Deuteronomy28:30 ogambe omwishiki obugyenyi, haza ondiijo amutande, oyombekye enju obure kugitaahamu; obyare omusiri gw'emizaabibu kwonka obure kunanurwa ebijuma byayo." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Ente yaawe eryakubaagirwa omu maisho noogireeba, kwonka torigiryaho. Endogoya yaawe eryanyagwa, bangye kugikugarurira. Entaama zaawe baryaziha abazigu baawe, habure owaakuha emikono." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Batabani baawe na bahara baawe baryaheebwa ab'erindi ihanga, obakuratse amaisho. Buri izooba amaisho ogume ogahangire enkiro ahabw'orushusho, oremwe kwezibira." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Eihanga eri otakamanyaga riryarya ebi oyerize omu misiri yaawe, n'ebi ohendekyeire byona; ogume noohatwa kandi noohondagurwa;" 
Deuteronomy28:34 haza ebi amaisho gaawe gaareeba bikugwise eiraro; 
Deuteronomy28:35 Nyakubaho akurwaze aha maju n'aha maguru ebihuute birikuhurura, ebitarikukira, okwiha aha mara g'ebigyere okuhitsya aha kazingiriro k'eishokye." 
Deuteronomy28:36 Iwe n'omugabe ou oriba oyemekire kukutegyeka, Nyakubaho aryabatwara omu ihanga ri iwe na baashwenkuru mutakamanyaga; haza okwo aheererezeyo baaruhanga abandi abakozirwe omu biti nari omu mabaare," 
Deuteronomy28:37 reero obe ekirikwitsa obwoba, ekirikucuubwa enfumu, n'ekirikugaaniizibwa omu b'amahanga goona agu Nyakubaho arikutwaramu." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Oryabiba embibo nyingi omu musiri, oshaaruure bikye, ahabw'okuba enzigye ziryabirya." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Oryabyara emisiri y'emizaabibu, ogireeberere; kwonka torinywa viino yaayo, nobu kwakuba okuhumba ebijuma byayo, ahabw'okuba obukooko buryagirya." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Oryagira emiti y'emioliva omu nsi yaawe yoona; kwonka toryesiiga majuta gaayo, ahabw'okuba ebijuma byayo biryakunkumuka bitakeezire." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Oryazaara batabani baawe na bahara baawe; kwonka tibariba baawe, ahabw'okuba baryatwarwa bari enkwatwa." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Emiti yaawe yoona n'ebi oyerize omu musiri gwawe biryaba eby'enzigye. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Omushuuhuuki okutwiremu aryaguma naatunguuka akukire; haza iwe ogume nootentebuka noogaruka ahansi. 
Deuteronomy28:44 Aryakuguza, kwonka iwe torimuguza. Aryaba omutwe, haza iwe obe omukira." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Egyo mikyeeno yoona eryakwijaho ekwezingirire, ekuhambye, okuhitsya obu oricwekyerera, ahabw'okwanga kukora ebi Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikukugambira, kukuratira ebiragiro bye n'ebi yaataireho, ebi naakuragiire." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Egyo mikyeeno eryaba ahariiwe n'ahari baijukuru baawe akamanyiso n'eky'okutangaaza ebiro byona. 
Deuteronomy28:47 Nk'oku otaraheereize Mukama Ruhanga waawe oshemereirwe kandi onanukire ahabw'ebintu bingi munonga ebi yaakuhaire," 
Deuteronomy28:48 n'ahabw'ekyo oryaheereza abazigu baawe abu Nyakubaho aryohereza kukurwanisa oine enjara n'eiriho, ojwaire busha, kandi okyenire ebintu byona; reero akute omugamba gw'ekyoma omu maraka, okuhitsya obu arikucwekyereza." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Nyakubaho aryayohereza eihanga ririkuruga hare aha muheru gw'ensi, eri otarikumanya rurimi rwaryo, rikurwanise riine obwira nk'obw'empungu erikuteera." 
Deuteronomy28:50 Eihanga ry'aha maisho hairirimbire, eritaryeta ha bagurusi, nobu kwakuba okugirira abato esaasi;" 
Deuteronomy28:51 rirye ebi amatungo gaawe gazaire, n'ebi emisiri yaawe eyerize, okuhitsya obu oricwekyerera. Kandi tiririkutsigira ngano, viino nari amajuta g'emioliva, nainga okureka amasyo gaawe g'ente, nari abaana b'obusyo bwawe bw'embuzi n'entaama kukanya, okuhitsya obu ririkuhwerekyereza." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Riryakugotera omu birorero byawe byona, okuhitsya obu ebigo byawe ebiraingwa kandi ebigumire ebiri omu nsi yaawe yoona ebi oyesiga birikumbagara; kandi rikugotere omu birorero byona eby'omu nsi yaawe ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaakuhaire." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Omuri okwo kugotwa, n'omu kubura obwehigiro, oku abazigu baawe bariba bakufundiriiriizemu, oryarya abaana baawe enyama ya batabani baawe na bahara baawe, abu Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaakuhaire;" 
Deuteronomy28:54 omushaija murungi munonga oyoroirwe gye omuriiwe aryahubirira mwene ishe n'omukazi we omufumbata n'omwana we ou atsigaize," 
Deuteronomy28:55 arekye kuha n'omwe aharibo enyama y'abaana be abu arikurya. Manya aryaba atakiine ki atsigaize omuri okwo kugotwa n'omu kubura obwehigiro oku omuzigu waawe ariba akufundiririize omu birorero byawe byona. 
Deuteronomy28:56 Omukazi omurungi munonga kandi oyoroirwe gye omuriiwe, otakaribatisaga mara g'ekigyere kye aha nsi ahabw'okuzaarwa gye n'okwororwa gye, aryahubirira iba ou afumbata, na mutabani we na muhara we," 
Deuteronomy28:57 abaime ekiinyina kye ekyareetwa omu maguru, n'abaana bu yaazaara. Manya aryabirya bwesherekye, ahabw'okutagira kintu kyona omuri okwo kugotwa n'okubura obwehigiro oku omuzigu waawe ariba akufundiririize omu birorero byawe." 
Deuteronomy28:58 Ku oraabe otarikutaho mutima kukuratira ebigambo byona eby'eri iteeka ebihandiikirwe omuri eki kitabo, okatiina eiziina rya Mukama Ruhanga waawe ery'ekitiinwa kandi eririkutiinisa," 
Deuteronomy28:59 Mukama aryakureetera, iwe na baijukuru baawe, okubonabonesibwa okutakareebwaga, okutaine saasi kandi okurimara omwanya muraingwa, n'endwara mbi ezitarikukira;" 
Deuteronomy28:60 akurwaze endwara za Misiri zoona ezi waabaire nootiina; zikuramateho. 
Deuteronomy28:61 Endwara yoona n'ekibonaboneso kyona ebitahandiikirwe omuri eki kitabo ky'Ebiragiro, nabyo Mukama aryabikwitsa, okuhitsya obu orihwerekyerera." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Imwe abaabaire bari baingi nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru, muryatsigara bakye mbarwa, ahabw'okuba mukanga kukora ebi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu yaabaragiire." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Nk'oku Nyakubaho yaabaire ashemerererwa okubakora gye n'okubakanyisa, nikwo arishemerererwa okubacwekyereza n'okubahwerekyereza, mumarwe omu nsi ei murikuzamu kukubuura," 
Deuteronomy28:64 haza abataataanisize omu mahanga goona, okwiha aha muheru gw'ensi okuta aha gundi; muheererezeyo baaruhanga abandi ab'ebiti n'ab'amabaare, abu imwe na baashwenkuriimwe mutakamanyaga." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Kandi ago mahanga timurigagiriramu bweshandizo, n'amara g'ekigyere kyanyu tigarigira bu gahuumwire; kureka Mukama aryabaheerayo omutima gutatebeekaine, n'ahamaisho hahononokire, n'amagara geehwaire amatsiko." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Oryagwa omu kangakaizi, ogume oitsirwe obwoba nyomushana na nyekiro." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Omu kasheeshe ogire oti: Nkaabaasibwa ki busheesha! Haza ekyo okireeterwe obwoba oburikuhahaaza omutima n'ebi amaisho gaawe garireeba. 
Deuteronomy28:68 Reero Nyakubaho aryakugarura Misiri ori omu meeri, orugyendo oru naakuraganiise ku otarigaruka kurugyenda. Haza okwo muryayeheerayo abazigu baanyu kubagura ngu mube abahuuku n'abazaana; kwonka tiharibaho oribagura." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Ebi nibyo bigambo by'endagaano ei Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa kuragaana n'Abaisiraeli omu nsi ya Moabu, ebyayongyeirwe aha ndagaano ei yaaragaine nabo ahari Horebu." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Musa akeeta Abaisiraeli boona, yaabagira ati: Mukeereebera ebi Nyakubaho yaakozire Faraaho n'abaheereza be n'ensi ye yoona ey'omuri Misiri:" 
Deuteronomy29:3 obugwe obwabagwereire, obu mwayereebeire, n'obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza ebikuru;" 
Deuteronomy29:4 kwonka okuhitsya eri izooba, imwe Nyakubaho takabahaga mutima gurikwetegyereza, nari amaisho garikureeba, nainga amatu garikuhurira." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Kandi Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mmazire emyaka makumi ana nimbeebembera omu ihamba; haza emyenda yaanyu etakabakurirahoga, n'enkaito zaanyu zitakabakurirahoga zikajuuka omu bigyere." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Timukaryaga mugaati, kandi timukanywaga viino, nainga okunywa amakuuta, ngu mubone kumanya ku ndi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Mbwenu ku mwahikire omu mwanya ogu, Sihooni omugabe wa Heshibooni na Oogi omugabe wa Bashani baahurura kuturwanisa; kwonka twabasingura," 
Deuteronomy29:8 twanyaga ensi yaabo, twagiha Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi, n'ekicweka ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase kuba eyaabo y'obuhunguzi." 
Deuteronomy29:9 N'ahabw'ekyo muteho omutima kukuratira ebigambo by'omuri egi ndagaano, mubone kuba gye omuri byona ebi murikukora." 
Deuteronomy29:10 Eri izooba mwena mwemereire omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, abakuru b'enganda zaanyu, abakuru baanyu n'abategyeki baanyu, n'abantu ba Isiraeli boona," 
Deuteronomy29:11 abaana baanyu abato, abakazi baanyu n'abashuuhuuki abari omu nkambi zaanyu, okwiha aha barikusheenya enku okuta aha barikutaha amaizi." 
Deuteronomy29:12 Mbwenu mwaija aha kuragaana endagaano eyaarahiirwe Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, ei arikuragaana naimwe eri izooba," 
Deuteronomy29:13 ngu abone kubahamya eri izooba kuba eihanga rye, kandi nawe kuba Ruhanga waanyu, nk'oku yaabaraganiise, n'oku yaarahiire baashwenkuriimwe Aburahamu, Isaaka na Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Haza tiimwe mwenka abu ndikuragaana nabo egi ndagaano n'egi ndahiro," 
Deuteronomy29:15 kureka n'ogwo otari aha hamwe naitwe eri izooba, kandi n'oyemereire aha hamwe naitwe omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waitu." 
Deuteronomy29:16 Nimumanya oku twatwire omu nsi ya Misiri, n'oku twayogire omu mahanga gu mwarabiremu." 
Deuteronomy29:17 Haza mukareeba ebintu byago ebirikunugwa, ebishushani byago ebirikuramibwa, eby'amabaare, eby'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu, ebyabaire bigarimu." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Mwerinde omuriimwe hatakaabamu omushaija nari omukazi nainga eka nari oruganda, ou omutima gwe eri izooba gwakutaishuka gukaruga ahari Mukama Ruhanga waitu kuza kuheereza baaruhanga b'ago mahanga. Ekyo kikaaba nk'omuzi ogukura, gukarugamu omuti gurikwana ebijuma by'obushegu kandi ebirikushaarira;" 
Deuteronomy29:19 akihurira ebigambo by'egi ndagaano n'egyo ndahiro, akeesingiriza aha mutima naagira ati: Tiinyine oku ndiba, nobu ndigumizamu nyine omutima gugangaire; haza ekyo kikacwekyereza abarungi n'ababi." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Nyakubaho tarimusaasira, kureka ekiniga kye n'eihato rye biryamubugumaho, n'emikyeeno ehandiikirwe omuri eki kitabo emwerundeho, Nyakubaho amareho eiziina rye ahansi y'eiguru," 
Deuteronomy29:21 amushoroore omu nganda za Isiraeli zoona, abe engwerwa kagwe nk'emikyeeno ey'endagaano ehandiikirwe omuri eki kitabo ky'Ebiragiro oku eri." 
Deuteronomy29:22 Reero ab'obusingye oburiija, nibo baana baanyu abaribaza omu bigyere, n'omunyaihanga oriruga omu nsi ya hare; baryaborooga ku barireeba ebibonaboneso by'egyo nsi n'endwara zi Nyakubaho agiteerize;" 
Deuteronomy29:23 baareeba egyo nsi yoona ehindukire obuganga n'omwonyo n'eitaka rihiire nyamwenga, eritakibibwamu, eritakimeza kantu, eritakitookwamu kanyaatsi; ecwekyereziibwe nka Sodoma na Gomora, Abuda na Zeboimu, ezi Nyakubaho yaagiriire ekiniga na kashanga akazicwekyereza." 
Deuteronomy29:24 N'amahanga goona garyacura gati: Ai bambe! Beitu Nyakubaho egi nsi agituzire ki? Eki kiniga kirikubuguma nikimanyisa ki? 
Deuteronomy29:25 Reero abantu babagarukyemu bati: Manya bakatsigaho endagaano ya Mukama Ruhanga wa baishebo ei yaakozire nabo obu yaabaiha omu nsi ya Misiri; 
Deuteronomy29:26 baagyenda, baaheereza baaruhanga abandi baabaramya; baaruhanga abu baabaire batakamanyaga, kandi abu yaabaire abazibiire." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Nikyo ekiniga kya Nyakubaho kyabugumiire ahari egyo nsi, kikagireetera emikyeeno ehandiikirwe omuri eki kitabo," 
Deuteronomy29:28 Nyakubaho akabarandura omu nsi yaabo aine ekiniga n'ekishinjo na kashanga, akabanaga omu nsi endiijo, nk'oku kiri n'eri izooba." 
Deuteronomy29:29 Eby'omubonano n'ebya Mukama Ruhanga waitu. Reero ebishuurwirwe n'ebyaitu n'abaana baitu ebiro byona, ngu tubone kukuratira ebiri omuri eri iteeka." 
Deuteronomy30:1 Ebyo byona ku biriheza kukuhikaho, niyo migisha n'emikyeeno ei naaheza kukworeka, waaguma noobiijukira omu mahanga agu Mukama Ruhanga waawe arikutwaramu," 
Deuteronomy30:2 waamugarukira iwe, n'abaana baawe, kandi waakora byona ebi arikukuragiira, ebi ndikukugambira eri izooba, n'omutima gwawe gwona, n'amagara gaawe goona," 
Deuteronomy30:3 Mukama Ruhanga waawe nibwo arikugarurira emigisha, akakugirira esaasi, akakutaaruura omu mahanga goona agu yaakutaataanisiizemu." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Encuubwa zaawe nobu ziriba ziri okwo ahu eiguru riherera, Mukama Ruhanga waawe aryakutaaruurayo akwiheyo;" 
Deuteronomy30:5 reero akureete omu nsi ei baashwenkuru baakubwire, obone kugitunga, akugogyeeze, kandi akukanyise okukira baashwenkuru." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Mukama ogwo aryahindura omutima gwanyu n'ogw'ab'oruzaaro rwanyu; mube abe, mubone kumukunda n'omutima gwanyu gwona, n'amagara gaanyu goona; haza mube abahuriire." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Mukama Ruhanga waawe egyo mikyeeno yoona aryagirunda aha babisha baawe n'abazigu baawe abaabaire nibakuhiiganisa. 
Deuteronomy30:8 Ogarukye okore ebi arikukugambira; okuratire ebiragiro bye byona ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba. 
Deuteronomy30:9 Mukama Ruhanga waawe aryakuha emigisha eshaagaane, ogogyeerere omu bi orikukoresa emikono yaawe, n'omu ruzaaro rwawe, n'omu bizairwe amatungo gaawe, n'omu bi ensi yaawe eyerize. Manya aryashemerererwa okukuha okuganagana, nk'oku yaashemerereirwe okwa baashwenkuru." 
Deuteronomy30:10 Waaba okuratiire ebi arikukuragiira, orinzire ebiragiro bye n'ebi yaataireho, ebihandiikirwe omuri eki kitabo ky'Ebiragiro, kandi waaba ogarukiire Mukama Ruhanga waawe n'omutima gwawe gwona, n'amagara gaawe goona." 
Deuteronomy30:11 Manya eki kiragiro ki ndikukuragiira eri izooba tikikugumiire, nobu kwakuba okukuba hare." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Tikiri mu iguru, ngu ogire oti: N'oha oraatugiireyo, akakitwihirayo, tukakihurira tukakikuratira?" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Kandi tikiri seeri y'enyanja, ngu ogire oti: N'oha oraatwambukire enyanja, akakitureetera, tukakihurira, tukakikuratira?" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Kureka Ekigambo kikuri haihi; kiri omu kanwa kaawe n'omu mutima gwawe, ngu obone kukyorobera." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Mbwenu reeba, eri izooba naakuta omu maisho amagara n'ebirungi, na rufu n'ebibi." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Ku oryorobera ebiragiro bya Mukama Ruhanga waawe ebi ndikukuragiira eri izooba, waamukunda, waakora ebi arikuragiira, waakuratira ebiragiro bye ebi yaataireho n'ebi yaaragiire, obwo oryagira amagara kandi okanye; nawe akuheere emigisha omu nsi ei waaza kuzamu kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Kwonka omutima gwawe ku guriteishuka, otaahurira, waatwaririzibwa okuramya baaruhanga abandi n'okubaheereza," 
Deuteronomy30:18 nimbagambirira kimwe eri izooba, ku buzimazima murihwerekyerera! Timurihangaarira mu nsi ei murikwambuka Yorudaani kuzamu kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Niinyeta eiguru n'ensi kubashinja eri izooba: Ku naakuta omu maisho amagara na rufu, omugisha n'omukyeeno. N'ahabw'ekyo, toorana amagara, obone kuba ohuriire iwe na baijukuru baawe," 
Deuteronomy30:20 nookunda Mukama Ruhanga waawe, nookora ebi arikukugambira, kandi noomuhamiraho. Manya ekyo nigo magara gaawe n'okuhangaarira omu nsi ei Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaarahiire baashwenkuru, Aburahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo, kubaha." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Musa akagumizamu yaagambira eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli ryona ebigambo ebi. 
Deuteronomy31:2 Yaabagira ati: Eri izooba naahitsya emyaka igana na makumi abiri. Tinkiine geeshohoza na geetaasya. Nyakubaho angizire ati: Torikwija kwambuka Yorudaani egi. 
Deuteronomy31:3 Mukama Ruhanga waanyu niwe araayambukye abeebembeire, akahwerekyereza ago mahanga, gakabahigiza, mukaganyaga. Kandi Yoshwa niwe araayambukye abeebembeire, nk'oku Mukama yaagambire." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Nyakubaho naija kugagira nk'oku yagizire Sihooni na Oogi, abagabe b'Abaamori, n'ensi yaabo, obu yaabicwekyereza." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Mbwenu naija kugabarekurira, mugagire nk'oku naabaragiire;" 
Deuteronomy31:6 mube ab'amaani, mugume. Mutagira obwoba, kandi mutabatiina; ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waanyu orikugyenda naimwe tarikwija kubahemukaho, nobu kwakuba okubatsigaho." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Bwanyima Musa yaayeta Yoshwa, yaamugambirira omu maisho g'Abaisiraeli boona ati: Ba ow'amaani kandi ogume, ahabw'okuba niiwe oraagyende n'aba bantu, okabahitsya omu nsi ei Nyakubaho yaarahiire kuha baishebo. Niiwe oraagibakubuuze ekaba eyaabo." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Nyakubaho orikugyenda akwebembeire, naija kuguma naiwe, tarikwija kukuhemukaho, nobu kwakuba okukutsigaho. Otatiina, kandi otagira obwoba." 
Deuteronomy31:9 Reero Musa yaahandiika iteeka yaariha abahongyerezi beene Leevi, abaheeka eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Mukama, n'abakuru b'Abaisiraeli boona." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Kandi yaabaragiira ati: Aha muheru gwa buri myaka mushanju, omu bunaku obwateereirweho omwaka gw'okusaasirana, aha bugyenyi bw'ensiisira," 
Deuteronomy31:11 Isiraeli yoona ku eriba eizire kureebeka omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waawe, omu mwanya gu aritoorana, oryaguma oshomere eiteeka eri omu maisho g'Abaisiraeli boona, bategire okutu." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Ogume oteerane abantu, abashaija n'abakazi, abaana bato, n'abashuuhuuki abatwire omu birorero byawe, babone kurihurira, beegye okutiina Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, kandi bateho omutima kukuratira ebigambo byona eby'omuri eri iteeka." 
Deuteronomy31:13 N'abaana baabo abatakarimanyaga, beegye okutiina Mukama Ruhanga waanyu ebiro byona ebi murimara omu nsi ei mwaza kwambuka Yorudaani kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: Reeba, obunaku bwawe bw'okufa buri haihi. Yeta Yoshwa, mwije omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, mbone kumukwatsa omurimo. Mpaho Musa na Yoshwa bagyenda, baza omu ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu," 
Deuteronomy31:15 na Nyakubaho abonekyera omuri eryo ihema, omu nyomyo y'ekicu. Egyo nyomyo eyemerera ahaiguru y'omuryango gw'eihema." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Bwanyima Nyakubaho agira Musa ati: Ori haihi kufa, oshangye baashwenkuru. Reero eri ihanga riryaimuka, rihampukye nirikuratira baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga ab'omu nsi ei barikuza kutuuramu; bantsigyeho, baite endagaano yangye ei naaragaine nabo:" 
Deuteronomy31:17 haza eryo izooba ekiniga kyangye kibaakyeho, mbatsigyeho mbaime amaisho, bamarweho; ebihikiirizi bingi n'eminyangararo bibahikyeho, omuri obwo bunaku beefuuze bati: Ebi bihikiirizi tibituhikireho ahabwa Ruhanga waitu okutaba naitwe?" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Kandi buzimazima ago magingo ndyabaima amaisho ahabw'ebibi bi bakozire, bakeehongyera baaruhanga abandi." 
Deuteronomy31:19 N'ahabw'ekyo muhandiikye ekyeshongoro eki, haza okyeegyese Abaisiraeli, kandi okibeeshongoze, kimbeere omujurizi w'okubashinja." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Manya ku ndiba naabahikize omuri egyo nsi erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki, ei naarahiire kuha baishebo, ku bariheza kurya baiguta, baagomoka, baryayehongyera baaruhanga abandi, babaheereze, bangaye, baite endagaano yangye." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Haza ebihikiirizi bingi n'eminyangararo ku biriheza kubahikaho, eki kyeshongoro kiryabeemeza, kibashinje. Manya tikiryeba, ahabw'okuba kiryaguma nikyeshongorwa baijukuru baabo. Na hati, nobu ntakabahikize mu nsi ei naarahiire kubaha, nimmanya ei ebiteekateeko byabo birikugwera." 
Deuteronomy31:22 Musa atyo eryo izooba ahandiika ekyo kyeshongoro, kandi akyeegyesa Abaisiraeli." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Reero Nyakubaho akwatsa Yoshwa mwene Nuuni omurimo, kandi amugira ati: Ba ow'amaani, ogume, ahabw'okuba niiwe oraahitsye Abaisiraeli omu nsi ei naarahiire kubaha; haza ndyaguma naiwe." 
Deuteronomy31:24 Musa ku yaaherize kuhandiika omu kitabo ebigambo by'eiteeka, yaabihezayo," 
Deuteronomy31:25 yaaragiira Abaleevi abaheeka eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho ati: 
Deuteronomy31:26 Nimutware eki kitabo ky'eiteeka, mukite aha rubaju rw'eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, kigume kiri omujurizi w'okubashinja." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Ahabw'okuba nimmanya ku muri abagomi kandi empiga. Eri izooba ku muraabe mwagomera Mukama nkibaine, mbwenu ku ndiba naafiire, muryashura ki?" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Nimunteeranire abakuru b'enganda zaanyu zoona n'abategyeki baanyu, mbone kugira ebi naabagambira babihuriire, haza nyete eiguru n'ensi kubashinja." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Ahabw'okuba nimmanya ku ndiba naafiire, buzimazima muryakora ebitahikire, mutaishukye omuhanda gu naabaragiire, haza omu biro birikurataho akabi kabagwere ahabw'okukora ebibi omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, mukamugwisa kubi ahabw'ebi murikukoresa engaro zaanyu." 
Deuteronomy31:30 Bwanyima Musa atyo agamba ebigambo by'ekyeshongoro eki okuhitsya obu byahwaireyo, Abaisiraeli boona bateeraniire aho babihuriire." 
Deuteronomy32:1 Iwe iguru 'we tega okutu ngambe! Ensi ehurire ebi ndikugamba! 
Deuteronomy32:2 Nkaabaasibwa ki ebi ndikwegyesa bigwa nk'enjura, n'ebi ndikugamba bitoonya nk'orume; biba nk'orujura rurikugwa aha bunyaatsi bw'omuroba, n'orutoonyerera rurikuragarika aha bishaka!" 
Deuteronomy32:3 Manya naaza kurangirira eiziina rya Nyakubaho. Muhamye Ruhanga waitu ku ari mukuru. 
Deuteronomy32:4 Aba Rukiri ou omurimo gwe guhikiire kimwe; ahabw'okuba emitwarize ye n'ey'oburyo. Ni Ruhanga orikwesigwa, otashobya, okora ebihikire kandi eby'amazima." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Abu yaazaire bataine kamogo, bamukoreire ebitahikire, tibaakiri baana be; babaire ab'oruzaaro orurikwehabagiza, kandi orurikukora ebibi." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Iwe ihanga 'we erishema, eritarikwetegyereza, ekyo nikyo orikuzimuurira Nyakubaho? Tiwe Shoimwe owaakuhangire akakutaho, akakuhamya?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Ijuka ebiro bya ira, oteekateekye munonga aha myaka mingi ey'enzaaro zirikukuratana. Buuza shoimwe, akushoboororere; obuuze abakuru, bakugambire." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Obu Rukiraboona yaaha amahanga obuhunguzi bwago, obu yaataanisa abaana b'abantu n'enganda zaabo, nibwo yaataho emyatano y'amahanga nk'omubaro gw'abantu boona oku gwabaire guri." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Manya abantu baba omugabo gwe; na Yakobo aba obuhunguzi bwe. 
Deuteronomy32:10 Akamushanga omu ihamba omu nsi ekarangataine, ei enyamaishwa zigambira. Yaamwehinguririza, yaamworora, yaamurinda nk'emboni y'eriisho rye." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Nk'oku empungu ehindaguturana ekyashuri kyayo, ekapapariza aha baana baayo, ekajanjamura amapapa gaayo, ekabakwata, ekababeebera omu mapapa gaayo," 
Deuteronomy32:12 nikwo Nyakubaho wenka yaamwebembeire atyo, hatariho ruhanga ondiijo ow'abanyamahanga omwine." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Akamutunguura yaamutegyekyesa ensi z'ebibungo, yaarya ebyezire omu misiri, yaamunyuunyuutisa obwoki bw'omu rukiri, n'amajuta g'emioliva y'omu itaka ry'amabaare." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Akamunywaisa amakamo g'ente, n'amahenahene g'embuzi, yaamuriisa ebishaju by'abaana b'entaama, n'eby'empaya zaazo; n'ente za Bashani, n'embuzi zaayo, n'engano nungi munonga, yaamunywaisa viino n'eshande erikutukura y'ebijuma by'emizaabibu." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Haza Yakobo yaarya, yaiguta, Yeeshuruuni yaagomoka, yaaba kitwe kiguma. Ebishi ogomokire, waahanguha, waabereshera! Bwanyima yaimuura Ruhanga owaamuhangire, yaagaya rukiri owaamujunire." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Baamureetera kugirira baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga eihato: baamugwisa kubi munonga, ahabw'ebihagaro ebi barikukora." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Baatambira ebitambo ebyago ebitari baaruhanga, baabitambira na baaruhanga abu batakamanyaga; baaruhanga abasya, abahangire juba, abu baishenkurubo baabaire batakatiinaga." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Torataire mutima ahari Rukiri owaakubakire enda, waayebwa Ruhanga owaakuzaire." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Nyakubaho yaakireeba, yaabatamirwa kimwe ahabw'okugwisibwa kubi batabani be na bahara be." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Haza yaagira ati: Ndyabaima amaisho, ndeebe ahi baraaherere; ahabw'okuba n'oruzaaro rurikwehabagiza, abaana batarikwesigwa." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Bandeeteire kugirira eihato baaruhanga abatari b'amazima, bangwisa kubi ahabw'ebishushani bi barikuramya. Naanye niinyija kureetera abatari ihanga kubaitsa eihari; ndeetere eihanga erishema kubaitsa ekiniga." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Ahabw'okuba ekiniga kyangye kyatsya omuriro ogwaka gukahika okuzimu owa Nyamuteza, gukamaraho ensi n'ebigyeeziremu, gukootsya n'obuhamizo bw'enshozi." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Ndyabarundaho obugwe burikukuratana, mbamarireho emyambi yangye," 
Deuteronomy32:24 bakuuhuzibwe enjara, bamarweho ekibabo ky'omuriro; Mbashunikire enyamaishwa z'amaino gashongoire, n'ebirikugyendesa enda eby'obushegu." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Aheeru rurara eryabamaraho abaabo, baitirwe obwoba omu bishengye, abatsigazi n'empangare bacwekyerere hamwe n'abaana barikwonka n'abagurusi b'enju." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Nkaabacwekyerereize kimwe, habura owaabaijuka;" 
Deuteronomy32:27 Kuri ntaratiinire bazigu baabo kuunyesiimirana, ababisha baabo bakeebeiha nibagira bati: Emikono yaitu niyo etuhaire obusinguzi, Nyakubaho ebyo byona tiwe abikozire." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Manya n'eihanga ry'abatenda kuhaburwa, kandi ery'abatarikwetegyereza." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Kuri baabaire baine obwengye, bakaamanyire ebi, beetegyereza n'ebiribabaho aha muheru." 
Deuteronomy32:30 Mbwenu omwe akaabaasize ata kubinga rukumi, n'ababiri kubinga akakumi, kuri Rukiri waabo atarababarekuriire, kuri Nyakubaho atarabatsigireho?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Manya rukiri waabo ti nka Rukiri waitu, nangwa n'abazigu baitu ekyo nibakihamya." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Ahabw'okuba omuzaabibu gwabo nigukomooka aha gwa Sodoma, n'ebijuma by'emizaabibu yaabo ebyarugire omu misiri ya Gomora, n'eby'obushegu; ebikumba byabyo nibishaarira." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Viino yaabyo n'ey'obushegu bw'enjoka, obushegu obutarikurumuurwa, nk'obw'empoma." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Mbwenu shi ebyo tibibiikirwe owangye, bikakomwa n'akamanyiso omu mabiikiro gangye?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Okuhoora enzigu n'okwangye, n'okuzimuura n'okwangye, omu bunaku bu bariterereramu. Eizooba ryabo ry'okuhikiirirwa riri haihi, n'ekifubiro kyabo nikiija n'obwira." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Manya Nyakubaho ku arireeba abairu be bahwairwemu amaani, hatakiine otsigaireho, yaaba muhuuku, nari ow'obusingye, aryaiha aha bantu be orubanja, agirire esaasi abairu be." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Haza obwo agire ati: Mbwenu baaruhanga baabo barahi? Orukiri ru baahungiiremu," 
Deuteronomy32:38 abaariire ebishaju by'ebitambo byabo, bakanywa viino y'emitoijo y'eby'okunywa, barahi? Hati nibaimukye, babahe emikono, babe nibo baabarinda!" 
Deuteronomy32:39 Mbwenu mureebe Nyowe, Nyowe nyenka, ku ndi we, kandi ku hatariho ruhanga ondiijo, kureka Nyowe. Niinye nyita, nkaha amagara; niinye mputaaza, nkoomoora, hatagire orikubaasa kuunyiha omuntu omu ngaro." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Mbwenu niinyimukiza eiguru omukono, nindahira nti: Buzimazima, nk'oku mbaho ebiro byona," 
Deuteronomy32:41 ku ndityaza rurara yangye erikutyankana, omukono gwangye gwagikwata kucwa emanja, ndyahoora ababisha bangye, nzimuururire abarikuunyanga;" 
Deuteronomy32:42 emyambi yangye ngisinze eshagama, na rurara yangye erye enyama, hamwe n'eshagama y'abaitsirwe n'ey'enkwatwa, n'emitwe y'abeebembezi b'abazigu." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Imwe mahanga 'mwe, nimusingize abantu be; ahabw'okuba ahoorera eshagama y'abairu be, ahoora ababisha be, kandi akarabira ensi y'abantu be." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Musa atyo aija hamwe na Yoshwa mwene Nuuni, bashoma ebigambo by'omuri ekyo kyeshongoro, abantu babihuriire." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Musa ku yaaherize kugambira Abaisiraeli ebyo bigambo," 
Deuteronomy32:46 yaabagira ati: Mugumye aha mitima byona ebi naabeehanangiriza eri izooba. Mubyezinize abaana baanyu, bateho omutima kukuratira byona eby'omuri eri iteeka." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Manya ahariimwe ti kintu kityo-kityo, kureka n'eky'amagara gaanyu, kandi nikyo kiraabahaise kuhangaarira omu nsi ei mwaza kwambuka Yorudaani kukubuura." 
Deuteronomy32:48 Eryo izooba Nyakubaho akagambira Musa ati: 
Deuteronomy32:49 Temba orushozi rwa Abariimu, ohikye omu Rushozi rwa Neebo orw'omu nsi y'Abamoabu, ahashungaine na Yeriko, oranzye ensi ya Kanaani ei ndikuha Abaisiraeli kuba eyaabo," 
Deuteronomy32:50 haza ofeere aha rushozi oru oraatembe; okurate abaanyu, nk'oku Arooni mukuru waawe yaafeereire aha Rushozi Hoori, akakurata abaabo;" 
Deuteronomy32:51 ahabw'okuba mukancumuraho omu Baisiraeli aha maizi ga Meriba omuri Kadeeshi, omu ihamba rya Ziini; timwabampaisamu kitiinwa, oku ndi Orikwera." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Mbwenu egyo nsi ei ndikuha Abaisiraeli noija kugiranzya, kwonka torikwija kugihikamu." 
Deuteronomy33:1 Oku nikwo Musa omuntu wa Ruhanga yaashabiire Abaisiraeli emigisha, atakafiire." 
Deuteronomy33:2 Akagira ati: Nyakubaho akaruga Sinaayi, yaizira abe nk'omushekye naaruga Seiri, yaayaka naayema aha Rushozi Parani, yaija ashagatiirwe obukumi n'obukumi bw'abarikwera, omuriro gurikubuguma gumuri aha rubaju rwa buryo." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Eego, akakunda abantu be, abu yaahongyeirwe, boona yaabarindisa omukono gwe. Baajuumara aha bigyere bye, baahurira ebi arikubaragiira." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Musa akatuha eiteeka kuba obuhunguzi bw'eihanga rya Yakobo. 
Deuteronomy33:5 Nyakubaho akaba omugabe w'Abayeshuruuni, obu abakuru b'eihanga baateerana hamwe n'enganda za Isiraeli zoona." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Aba Reubeeni nibakaramaare, bakareka kufa, nobu baakuba abashaija be kuba bakye." 
Deuteronomy33:7 Rero Abaayuda akabagambaho ati: Ai Nyakubaho, hurira okuhooga kwa Yuda, omuhitsye omu bantu be. Omurwanirire n'emikono yaawe, kandi omukombeerere abazigu be." 
Deuteronomy33:8 Kandi aha Baalevi akagira ati: Abaleevi obahe Tumimu yaawe, na Urimu yaawe ogihe abarikukutiina, abu waagyereize Maasa, okabarwanisiza aha maizi ga Meeriba; haza bo bakeeyoreka ku bari abeesigwa ahariiwe," 
Deuteronomy33:9 obu baagira baishebo na baanyinabo bati: Titurikubeetaho; bakooga beene waabo, bakeehuzya n'abaana baabo. Manya bakoorobera ekigambo kyawe, baakuratira endagaano yaawe." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Nibo bariguma nibeegyesa Yakobo ebi waaragiire; na Isiraeli eiteeka ryawe; booterere obubaani omu maisho gaawe, batambire aha itambiro ryawe ebitambo bicwekiize kimwe." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Ai Nyakubaho, obahe omugisha, oruganda rwabo rugire amaani, kandi osiime ebi barikukora. Jogajogora abazigu baabo amanyaanya, ababisha babanga batarigira obu baimukire obundi." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Aha Baabenyamiini akagira ati: Oru nirwo ruganda orukundwa Nyakubaho, orutuura buhooro ruri hamwe nawe. Eizooba ryona asiiba arwehinguririize, amabega ge gari obutaaho bwarwo." 
Deuteronomy33:13 Kandi aha Baayosefu yaagira ati: Ensi yaabo Nyakubaho agihe omugisha, etungye ebirungi ebiruga ahaiguru omu iguru, n'ebituura byetindikire okuzimu." 
Deuteronomy33:14 Etungye ebirungi munonga ebireetwa izooba, emyeru mingi eya buri kwezi:" 
Deuteronomy33:15 ebirungi munonga ebiruga omu nshozi za ira n'ebingi munonga, eby'omu bibungo ebitahwaho." 
Deuteronomy33:16 Etungye ebirungi eby'omu nsi n'ebigirimu byona, kandi etetsibwe owaagambiire omu Rushaka orurikwaka. Egyo migisha eyeshukyeere aha mutwe gw'ab'oruganda rwa Yosefu, omu ihahaara ry'owaatoorainwe kuba omutegyeki wa beene ishe." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Agire ekitiinwa nk'eky'enimi y'omujigaijo, n'amaani nk'ag'amahembe g'embogo; haza agabingise amahanga goona, agahitsye aha muheru gw'ensi. Ago mahembe nibwo bukumi n'obukumi obw'Abaefuraimu, n'enkumi n'enkumi ez'Abaamanaase." 
Deuteronomy33:18 Kandi ahari beene Zebuluuni akagira ati: Imwe Abaazebuluuni, nimukagira obuhiire muri omu ngyendo z'aha nyanja! Naimwe Abaisakaari nimukaganagane muri omuka!" 
Deuteronomy33:19 Baryaguma beete amahanga gaije aha rushozi rwabo, batambireyo ebitambo bihikire. Ahabw'okuba banyuunyuta eby'obutungi bw'omu mayanja, n'eby'obuguzi bwingi ebyetindikire omu musheenyi gw'omu myegyeego yaago." 
Deuteronomy33:20 Reero aha Baagaadi akagira ati: Orikuhangusya ensi ya Gaadi naakaheebwe omugisha! Gaadi abundama nk'entare egwereire kutaagura omukono n'eihahaara ry'omutwe. 
Deuteronomy33:21 Akeetooranira ekyanga kirikuhita ebindi, ahabw'okuba okwo niyo omugabo gw'omukuru w'engabo gwarindiirwe. Akaija ayebembeire endiijo mitwe y'eihanga, yaikiriza kuhitsya ebiragiro bya Nyakubaho n'amateeka ge aha Baisiraeli." 
Deuteronomy33:22 Kandi aha Baadaani akagira ati: Daani n'ekishore ky'entare, ekisyoka nikiruga Bashani." 
Deuteronomy33:23 N'aha Baanafutaali akagira ati: Iwe Nafutaali 'we ohaagire obutetsi, kandi oijuriraine emigisha ya Nyakubaho, kubuura ensi erikuhika aha Nyanja, n'ey'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo." 
Deuteronomy33:24 Reero aha Baasheri yaagira ati: Asheri naakaheebwe emigisha okukira ab'ezindi nganda! naakagume naakundwa beene ishe, kandi naakajabikye ekigyere kye omu majuta g'emioliva!" 
Deuteronomy33:25 Empimbi zaawe zibe ez'ebyoma n'emiringa. Nk'oku ebiro by'amagara gaawe biringana, n'amaani gaawe gabe nikwo gaaba." 
Deuteronomy33:26 Iwe Yeshuruuni, tihariho ondi ori nka Ruhanga waawe, oruga omu iguru akareetwa omu bicu kukuha emikono, oija aine ekitiinwa kingi naaraba omu kaabunga." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Ruhanga ow'obutwire bwona niwe butaaho bwawe, kandi emikono ye etahwaho niyo ekubangira. Akabinga abazigu baawe baakuhigiza, yaakugira ti: Bacwekyereze!" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Isiraeli yaatuura atyo buhooro. Eiziba rya Yakobo ryaguma ryonka omu nsi y'engano na viino. Eego, eiguru rye niritoonyereza orume." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Iwe Isiraeli, ebishi okahiirwa! Mbwenu n'oha ori nkaiwe, eihanga eryajunirwe Nyakubaho, engabo y'okukukingira, na rurara y'okukusinguza! Abazigu baawe baryaija nibakwehumbaarikira, kwonka iwe obaribatiirire." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Ebyo ku bwahwaire, Musa yaaruga omu mpita za Moabu, yaatemba Orushozi Neebo, yaahika aha mutwe gwa Pisiga ahashungaine na Yeriko. Haza Nyakubaho yaamworeka ensi yoona eya Gileadi okuhika aha ya Daani," 
Deuteronomy34:2 n'eya Nafutaali yoona n'ensi eya Efuraimu na Manaase, n'ensi yoona eya Yuda, okuhika aha nyanja y'oburengyerwa-izooba." 
Deuteronomy34:3 Yaamworeka na Negebu n'Oruhita, nirwo ruhanga wa Yeriko, orurembo rw'emikindo, okuhikira kimwe Zoari." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Mpaho Nyakubaho yaamugira ati: Egi niyo nsi ei naarahiire Aburahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo, nti: Ndyagiha baijukuru baanyu. Mbwenu naakwikiriza kugyereebera n'amaisho gaawe, kwonka torikwija kwambuka kugizamu." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Atyo Musa omuheereza wa Nyakubaho afeera okwo omu nsi ya Moabu, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamugambiire." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Yaamuziika omu ruhanga rw'omu nsi ya Moabu ahashungaine na Betipeori. Kwonka okuhitsya n'eri izooba tihariho muntu orikumanya omwanya gu yaaziikirwemu. 
Deuteronomy34:7 Musa ogwo, obu yaafa, akaba ahikize emyaka igana na makumi abiri y'obukuru; amaisho ge gatakagiirweho ruho n'engoga ze z'obuhangwa zitakatentebukire." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Abaisiraeli baamara ebiro makumi ashatu omu mpita za Moabu nibamucurira. Bwanyima ebiro bi baamazire omu kyosi nibamucurira byarugaho byahwa. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Yoshwa mwene Nuuni yaijura mutima w'obwengye, ahabw'okuba Musa akaba amutaireho emikono. Abaisiraeli baamuhurira kandi baakora nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Okwiha obwo tiharabaireho ondiijo murangi omuri Isiraeli ori nka Musa, ou Nyakubaho yaabaire amanya, bakareebana." 
Deuteronomy34:11 Tihariho n'omwe ori nkawe ou Nyakubaho yaakoreise obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza ebi yaamutumire kukora omu nsi ya Misiri ahari Faraaho n'aha bairu be, n'ahansi ye yoona," 
Deuteronomy34:12 nainga okumukoresa eby'amaani, n'ebikuru, n'ebirikutiinisa ebi Musa yaakoreire omu maisho g'Abaisiraeli." 
Joshua1:1 Musa omuheereza wa Mukama ku yaaherize kufa, Nyakubaho yaagambira Yoshwa omugaragwa wa Musa ati:" 
Joshua1:2 Musa omuheereza wangye afiire. Mbwenu nu, imuka oyambukye Yorudaani egi, iwe n'abantu aba boona muze omu nsi ei ndikuha Abaisiraeli." 
Joshua1:3 Omwanya gwona ogu muriribatsamu ekigyere, naagubaha nk'oku naaraganiise Musa." 
Joshua1:4 Okwiha aha ihamba n'ahari Lebanooni, okuta aha mugyera omuhango, nigwo Eufuraati ensi yoona ey'Abahiiti, okuhika aha Nyanja Empango, ogurikugarura ei eizooba rirengyera, niyo eraabe ensi yaanyu." 
Joshua1:5 Tihaine muntu oribaasa kukuza omu kaso omu biro by'amagara gaawe. Nk'oku naabaire ndi hamwe na Musa, nikwo ndiguma naiwe. Tindikuhemukaho, nobu kwakuba okukutsigaho." 
Joshua1:6 Ba ow'amaani ogume; ahabw'okuba niiwe oraakubuuze aba bantu ensi ei naarahiire kuha baishebo. 
Joshua1:7 Kureka ba ow'amaani ohamire kimwe; oteho omutima kuhitsya byona eby'omu iteeka ebi Musa omuheereza wangye yaakuragiire. Otaribiteishuka kutoora aha rubaju rwa buryo nari aha rwa bumosho, obone kugyenderwa gye ei oraaze yoona." 
Joshua1:8 Ebiri omu kitabo ky'eiteeka eri bitarikuruga aha rurimi, kureka ogume obiteekateekyeho munonga nyomushana na nyekiro, obone kutaho omutima kukuratira ebihandiikirwemu byona. Obwo nibwo oraaheebwe omugisha omu bi orikukora, bikakugyedera gye." 
Joshua1:9 Mbwenu shi, tiinye naakuragiira? Ba ow'amaani nu, ogume, kandi otatiina, nobu kwakuba okuhahaara. Manya Mukama Ruhanga waawe ari hamwe naiwe ahu oraaze hoona." 
Joshua1:10 Bwanyima Yoshwa akaragiira abatware b'abantu ati: 
Joshua1:11 Murabe omu nkambi, muragiire abantu muti: Muteekateekye entanda zaanyu, ahabw'okuba omu biro bishatu nimwija kwambuka Yorudaani egi, kuza kukubuura ensi ei Mukama Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha kuba eyaanyu." 
Joshua1:12 Reero Yoshwa yaagira Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi n'ekicweka ky'oruganda rw'Abaamanaase ati: 
Joshua1:13 Mwijukye eki Musa omuheereza wa Nyakubaho yaabaragiire naagira ati: Mukama Ruhanga waanyu yaabaha omwanya gw'oburuhuukiro, kandi naija kubaha egi nsi." 
Joshua1:14 Abakazi baanyu n'abaana baanyu abato n'amatungo gaanyu nibiija kuguma omu nsi ei Musa yaabahaire seenu ya Yorudaani. Kwonka abashaija boona enkwata ngabo omuriimwe nimwija kwambuka muhagatiire eby'okurwanisa, mwebembeire beene waanyu kubaha emikono," 
Joshua1:15 okuhitsya obu Nyakubaho araahe beene waanyu oburuhuukiro nkaimwe; nabo bakakubuura ensi ei Mukama Ruhanga waanyu arikubaha; haza mukabona kugaruka omu nsi yaanyu y'obutaka, mukagikubuura; egyo nsi ei Musa omugaragwa wa Nyakubaho yaabahaire seenu ya Yorudaani, embari ya burugwa-izooba." 
Joshua1:16 Nabo baagarukamu Yoshwa bati: Byona ebi waaturagiira nitwija kubikora, n'ei oraatwohereze yoona nitwija kuzayo." 
Joshua1:17 Nk'oku twahuriire Musa omuri byona, naiwe nikwo turaakuhurire. Kimwe kyonka, Mukama Ruhanga waawe agume naiwe, nk'oku yaabaire ari na Musa." 
Joshua1:18 Weena origomera eki oragiire, akanga kuhurira eki waagamba n'ebi waamuragiira, aitwe. Kureka ba ow'amaani, ogume." 
Joshua2:1 Mbwenu Yoshwa mwene Nuuni akatuma abashaija babiri omu mubonano, nibaruga Shitimu, yaabagira ati: Nimwirooko, mwetegyereze egyo nsi, munomuno Yeriko. Batyo baagyenda, baahikira omu nju y'omukazi maraaya orikwetwa Rahabu, baaraaramu." 
Joshua2:2 Abantu baagambira omugabe wa Yeriko bati: Reeba, hariho abashaija babiri b'Abaisiraeli abaija kunu eki kiro kutata ensi." 
Joshua2:3 Omugabe wa Yeriko nawe nikwo kutuma ahari Rahabu, ati: Shohoza abashaija baija okwo bakataaha omwawe. Manya baija kutata ensi." 
Joshua2:4 Kwonka ogwo mukazi akaba yaatwaire abo bashaija bombi abasherekire. Mpaho yaagira ati: N'ekya buzima, hariho abshaija baija aha, kwonka tinaamanya ei baaruga." 
Joshua2:5 Mbwenu ku bwaira, eirembo riri haihi kukingwa, baashohora, kandi tinaamanya ei baaza. Nimubakurate juba, nimwija kubahambya." 
Joshua2:6 Kwonka obwo we, akaba yaabatembize aha mutwe gw'enju, abasherekire omu bunyaatsi bwa fulakisi obu yaabaire atungikiraine aha mutwe gw'enju." 
Joshua2:7 Abo bashaija batyo bagyenda nibabasherura omu muhanda gurikuza Yorudaani, okuhitsya obu baahikire aha nyambukiro. Kandi abaabaire nibabasherura ku baashohoire bati, eirembo ryakingwa." 
Joshua2:8 Ezo ntatsi ku zaabaire zitakabyamire, Rahabu yaija, yaazishanga aha mutwe gw'enju." 
Joshua2:9 Reero yaagira abo bashaija ati: Nimmanya ku Nyakubaho abahaire egi nsi, nikyo mutwitsiize obwoba. Abatwire omuri egi nsi boona bahahaire omutima ahabw'okwija kwanyu." 
Joshua2:10 Manya tuhuriire oku Nyakubaho yaayomize amaizi g'Enyanja y'Emigano eyaabaire ebari omu maisho, obu mwaruga Misiri, n'eki mwakozire abagabe babiri b'Abaamori aba seeri ya Yorudaani, Sihooni na Oogi, abu mwacwekyerereize kimwe." 
Joshua2:11 Mbwenu ku twakihuriire tuti, emitima yaitu yaahahaara, tihaagira muntu owaatsigara omutima gutamuhwaire munda ahabwanyu. Manya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu niwe Ruhanga ow'ahaiguru omu iguru, kandi ow'aha nsi omu nsi." 
Joshua2:12 Mbwenu naabeeshengyereza nimundahire Nyakubaho. Nk'oku naabakorera eky'embabazi, naimwe mube nikwo mwakikorera ab'eka ya tata. Haza mumpe akamanyiso k'obuhamya." 
Joshua2:13 Murokore tata na maawe, na banyaanyazi na barumuna bangye, n'abaabo boona. Mutukize, tutafa!" 
Joshua2:14 Abo bashaija bamugira bati: Nk'oku mwakiza amagara gaitu, naitwe nitwija kukiza agaanyu mwaba mutatureebize, mukaata enaama yaitu. Haza obwo nitwija kubakorera eby'embabazi n'eby'obwesigwa, Nyakubaho ku araatuhe egi nsi." 
Joshua2:15 Atyo abashuumiza aha murunga naabarabya omu dirisa; ahabw'okuba enju ye ekaba eyombekyerainwe n'ekigo ky'orurembo; naaraara omu nda yaakyo. 
Joshua2:16 Mpaho abagira ati: Nimuhungire omu bibungo, abarikusherura batakaababugana. Haza mwesherekyeyo okumara ebiro bishatu, okuhitsya obu abarikusherura baraagarukye; reero mubone kwegyendera." 
Joshua2:17 Abo bashaija nabo bamugira bati: Egi ndahiro ei waaturahiza, titurigiturwa." 
Joshua2:18 Mbwenu reeba, ku turaabe twahikire omuri egi nsi, okome aka kagoye karikutukura aha dirisa ei waatushuumizamu. Haza oteeranire omu nju yaawe shoimwe, na nyoko banyaanyoko n'ab'eka ya shoimwe boona." 
Joshua2:19 Ku haraagire omuntu owaashohora, akaruga omu nju yaawe akaza omu nguuto, eshagama ye ebe niwe yaatukurira, naitwe tube beere. Kandi ku harigira owaata engaro aha muntu weena ori omu nju hamwe naiwe, eshagama ye ebe niitwe yaatukurira." 
Joshua2:20 Kwonka ku oryata enaama yaitu, obwo nituba tutaine rubanja rw'endahiro ei waaturahiza." 
Joshua2:21 Nawe abagarukamu ati: Kibe nk'oku mwagamba. Atyo aboohereza bagyenda; nawe akoma ako kagoye karikutukura aha dirisa. 
Joshua2:22 Batyo bagyenda, baza omu bibungo, bamarayo ebiro bishatu; okuhitsya obu abaabaire nibabasherura baagarukire. Manya abaabaire nibabasherura bakacaaka hoonahoona omu mihanda, banu baababurira." 
Joshua2:23 Bwanyima abo bashaija bombi baashuuma, baaruga omu bibungo; baayambuka, baahika Yoshwa mwene Nuuni, baamuteekyerereza byona ebyababaireho." 
Joshua2:24 Kandi baagira Yoshwa bati: Buzimazima, Nyakubaho atuhaire egyo nsi, yaagiturekurira. Ekindi, abagitwiremu boona omutima gubahwaire omunda ahabwaitu." 
Joshua3:1 Yoshwa akaimuka kare omu kasheeshe, yaaruga Shitimu hamwe n'Abaisiraeli boona; baahika Yorudaani, baaraara aho batakambukire." 
Joshua3:2 Ku haahingwireho ebiro bishatu, abatware baabo baagyenda nibaraba omu nkambi." 
Joshua3:3 Baaragiira abantu bati: Ku muraareebe eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu eheekirwe abahongyerezi Abaleevi, naimwe murugye ahi muri, mugikuratire," 
Joshua3:4 mubone kumanya omuhanda gu muraatoore, ahabw'okuba timukagurabamuga. Kwonka mutsigyeho omwanya ahagati yaanyu nayo omwanya gurikuhitsya entambwe nk'enkumi ibiri. Mutagihika haihi." 
Joshua3:5 Kandi Yoshwa agira abantu ati: Mweyeze, ahabw'okuba omu kasheeshe Nyakubaho naija kukora eby'okutangaaza omuriimwe." 
Joshua3:6 Yoshwa mwene Nuuni atyo ayeta abahongyerezi abagira ati: Muheekye eshanduukye y'endagaano, mugyende mwebembeire abantu. Nabo baheeka eshanduukye y'endagaano, bagyenda babeebembeire." 
Joshua3:7 Reero Nyakubaho agira Yoshwa ati: Eri izooba naaza kutandika kukuhaisa ekitiinwa omu maisho g'Abaisiraeli boona, babone kumanya ngu nk'oku naabaire ndi na Musa, nikwo ndaabe naiwe." 
Joshua3:8 Mbwenu ragiira abahongyerezi abaheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano oti: Ku muraahikye aha nkungu y'amaizi ga Yorudaani, muragaremu, mwemerere." 
Joshua3:9 Kandi Yoshwa yaagira Abaisiraeli ati: Nimwije aha, muhurire ebigambo bya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu."
