Joshua3:10 Atyo abagira ati: Aha niho muraamanyire ku Ruhanga ohuriire ari omuriimwe, kandi ku atarikwija kubura kubinga Abakanaani, Abahiiti, Abahiivi Abapeerizi, Abagirigaashi, Abaamori n'Abayebusi, bakabahigiza." 
Joshua3:11 Reeba, eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho w'ensi yoona neija kubabandiza kuragara omuri Yorudaani kwambuka." 
Joshua3:12 Mbwenu nu, mutoorane abantu ikumi na babiri omu nganda za Isiraeli, omu buri ruganda omuntu omwe." 
Joshua3:13 Reero abahongyerezi abaheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho w'ensi yoona ku baraaribate bati omu maizi ga Yorudaani, baageemereramu, nigaija kureka kuhimintika. Agarikushuuma nigaruga eruguru geemerere, geerunzire hamwe." 
Joshua3:14 Mbwenu abantu bakaimutsya orugyendo, baaruga omu mahema gaabo kwambuka Yorudaani hamwe n'abahongyerezi abaabeebembeire baheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano." 
Joshua3:15 Abaheekire eshanduukye ku baahikire bati ahari Yorudaani, ebigyere by'abahongyerezi abagiheekire byajabama biti omu maizi g'aha nkungu (manya omu igyesha amaizi ga Yorudaani gashandaara, garengyera aha nkungu zaayo zoona)" 
Joshua3:16 amaizi agarikushuuma nigaruga eruguru gaayemerera, gaatuuma geerunzire hamwe hare munonga ahari Adamu, orurembo oruhereraine na Zaretaani, kandi agarikushuuma nigagarura aha Nyanja ya Araba, niyo Nyanja y'Omwonyo, gaayecweraho kimwe; abantu baayambukira ahashungaine na Yeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Abahongyerezi abaheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho baayemerera ahoomire, ahagati ya Yorudaani, obwo Abaisiraeli boona nibambukira ahoomire okuhitsya obu eihanga ryona ryaherize kwambuka." 
Joshua4:1 Eihanga ryona ku ryaherize kwambuka Yorudaani, Nyakubaho yaagambira Yoshwa ati:" 
Joshua4:2 Toorana omuri aba bantu abashaija ikumi na babiri, omu buri ruganda omushaija omwe," 
Joshua4:3 haza obaragiire oti: Nimwihe ahagati ya Yorudaani amabaare ikumi n'abiri, omu mwanya gu abahongyerezi beemereiremu. Mugeekorere, mwambukye nago, mugate ahi murikuza kuraara eki kiro." 
Joshua4:4 Yoshwa atyo ayeta abshaija ikumi na babiri ab'omu Baisiraeli, abu yaabaire atooraine, omushaija omwe omu buri ruganda," 
Joshua4:5 abagira ati: Murabe omu maisho g'eshanduukye ya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, muhikye ahagati ya Yorudaani, buri omwe omuriimwe ayekorere eibaare aha ibega, nk'omubaro gw'enganda z'Abaisiraeli oku guri," 
Joshua4:6 ekyo kibone kuba akamanyiso omuriimwe. Omu biro ebiriija, abaana baanyu ku baribabuuza bati: Amabaare ago nigamanyisa ki?" 
Joshua4:7 Mubagire muti: Amaizi ga Yorudaani gakeebaganisiza omu maisho g'eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho. Obu egyo shanduukye yaayambuka Yorudaani, nibwo amaizi gaayo gaayebaganisamu. N'ahabw'ekyo aga mabaare n'ag'okuguma nigaijutsya Abaisiraeli ebiro byona." 
Joshua4:8 Abo bashaija ba Isiraeli baakora nk'oku Yoshwa yaabaragiira. Baiha amabaare ikumi n'abiri ahagati ya Yorudaani, nk'omubaro gw'enganda zaabo oku guri, n'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Yoshwa. Baayambuka nago bageekoreire, baagahitsya omu mwanya gu baarairemu, baagahuumuza aho." 
Joshua4:9 Na Yoshwa yaabyara amabaare ikumi n'abiri ahagati ya Yorudaani, ahu abahongyerezi abaabaire baheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano baayemereire; na mbwenu gakiriho n'eri izooba." 
Joshua4:10 Abahongyerezi abaabaire baheekire eshanduukye bakeemerera ahagati ya Yorudaani, okuhitsya obu ebi Mukama yaaragiire Yoshwa kugambira abantu byahwaire, nk'oku ebi Musa yaaragiire Yoshwa byabaire biri. Batyo abantu baayambuka n'obwira." 
Joshua4:11 Boona ku baaherize kwambuka, eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho n'abahongyerezi nabyo byayambuka, byabeebembera." 
Joshua4:12 Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi n'ekicweka ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase baayambuka bahagatiire eby'okurwanisa, beebembeire Abaisiraeli, nk'oku Musa yaabaire abaragiire," 
Joshua4:13 bari abantu nk'obukumi buna abakwaitse eby'okurwanisa. Baayambuka bari omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, beeteekateekire kurwana orugamba, baahika omu mpita za Yeriko." 
Joshua4:14 Eryo izooba Nyakubaho yaahaisa Yoshwa ekitiinisa omu maisho g'Abaisiraeli boona; baaguma nibamutiina ebiro by'amagara ge byona, nk'oku baabaire batiina Musa." 
Joshua4:15 Reero Nyakubaho yaagira Yoshwa ati: 
Joshua4:16 Ragiira abahongyerezi, abaheeka eshanduukye y'eby'obuhamya, batuuhuukye omuri Yorudaani." 
Joshua4:17 Yoshwa atyo aragiira abo bahongyerezi ati: Nimurugye omuri Yorudaani. 
Joshua4:18 Mbwenu abahongyerezi abaabaire beekoreire eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Mukama ku baatuuhuukire bati, baaruga ahagati ya Yorudaani, ebigyere byabo byaribata ahoomire, amaizi ga Yorudaani gaagaruka omu mwanya gwago, gaashandaara, gaarengyera aha nkungu nka bwabiso." 
Joshua4:19 Abo bantu bakatuuhuuka omuri Yorudaani aha kiro kya ikumi eky'okwezi kw'okubanza, baasiisira Giligaali aha mwatano gwa Yeriko ogwa burugwa-izooba." 
Joshua4:20 Amabaare ikumi n'abiri agu baihire omuri Yorudaani, Yoshwa yaagabyara Giligaali." 
Joshua4:21 Kandi yaagambira Abaisiraeli ati: Abaana baanyu ku baribuuza baishebo omu biro ebiriija, bati: Aga mabaare nigamanyisa ki?" 
Joshua4:22 Naimwe mubagire muti: Isiraeli ekambuka Yorudaani egi eyomire. 
Joshua4:23 Ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, ahabwanyu akoomya amaizi ga Yorudaani, okuhitsya obu mwayambukire; nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga waanyu yaagizire Enyanja Erikutukura ei yaatwomeize, okuhitsya obu twayambukire;" 
Joshua4:24 ngu abantu boona ab'omu nsi babone kumanya ku omukono gwa Mukama gwine amaani, kandi naimwe mubone kutiina Mukama Ruhanga waanyu ebiro byona." 
Joshua5:1 Abagabe b'Abaamori abaabaire batwire seeri ya Yorudaani ogurikugarura burengyerwa-izooba, n'ab'Abanyakanaani abatwire omu myegyeego y'enyanja, ku baahuriire Mukama ayomeize Abaisiraeli amaizi ga Yorudaani, okuhitsya obu baayambukire, baahahaara, emitima yaabahwa omunda ahabw'okutiina Abaisiraeli." 
Joshua5:2 Ago magingo Nyakubaho yaagambira Yoshwa ati: Shatura amabaare, ogaihemu emisyo, oshare Abaisiraeli omurundi gwa kabiri." 
Joshua5:3 Yoshwa atyo ashatura amabaare, agaihamu emisyo asharira Abaisiraeli omuri Giibeati-Haaraloti." 
Joshua5:4 Kandi eki nikyo Yoshwa yaabashariire: Ahabw'okuba oyetwa omushaija weena ow'abaarugire Misiri, abashaija boona abarwani bakaba baafeereire omu muhanda omu ihamba baherize kuruga Misiri." 
Joshua5:5 Abantu boona abaarugireyo, nobu baraabe baabaire baashazirwe, kwonka boona abaazairwe nibakigyenda bari omu ihamba, baarugire Misiri, bakaba batakashazirwe." 
Joshua5:6 Manya Abaisiraeli bakamara emyaka makumi ana omu ihamba nibagyenda, okuhitsya obu abashaija abarwani ab'eihanga ryona abaarugire Misiri baahwaireho, ahabw'okutakora ebi Nyakubaho yaabaragiire. Nawe akabarahirira ku ataribareka kureeba ensi ei yaarahiire baatatenkuriitwe kugituha ensi erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki." 
Joshua5:7 N'ahabw'ekyo abaana baabo abu Nyakubaho yaagarwire omu bigyere bya baishebo, nibo Yoshwa yaashazire. Manya abo bakaba batashazirwe ahabw'okuba omuri orwo rugyendo bakaba batakashazirwe." 
Joshua5:8 Ab'eihanga boona ku baaherize kusharwa, baaguma omu myanya yaabo omu rusiisira okuhitsya obu baakizire." 
Joshua5:9 Mpaho Nyakubaho yaagira Yoshwa ati: Eri izooba naabaihaho ekihemu kya Misiri. Ogwo mwanya nikyo gweterwa Giligaali, n'eri izooba." 
Joshua5:10 Abaisiraeli ku baabaire bakisiisiire Giligaali, baagira omukoro gw'okwijuka okuhingurwaho aha kiro kya ikumi na bina eky'okwo kwezi omu mwabazyo, omu mpita za Yeriko." 
Joshua5:11 Reero omu kasheeshe k'ekiro ekyakuratiire Okuhingurwaho, eryo izooba baarya ebyezire omuri egyo nsi: Emigaati etatumbisiibwe n'ebicoori bikarangire." 
Joshua5:12 Ku baariire ebyezire omuri egyo nsi, omu kasheeshe akaakuratsireho emaanu yaarekyera aho kugwa. Abaisiraeli tibaatunga maanu bundi, kureka baaguma nibarya ebyezire omu nsi ya Kanaani omuri ogwo mwaka." 
Joshua5:13 Yoshwa ku yaabaire ari haihi na Yeriko, ku yaimukize amaisho, yaareeba ahonaaho omuntu amwemereire omu maisho, akwaitse rurara esyoirweyo. Yoshwa atyo amuhika, amubuuza ati: Ori ow'abaitu nari ori ow'abazigu baitu?" 
Joshua5:14 Onu amugarukamu ati: Ngaaha, kureka hati naija ndi omukuru w'eihe rya Nyakubaho. Yoshwa ajuumara aha nsi, aramya, kandi agira ogwo muntu ati: Mbwenu mukama wangye, nyowe omwiru waawe nondagiira ki?" 
Joshua5:15 Ogwo mukuru w'eihe rya Nyakubaho agira Yoshwa ati: Juura enkaito omu bigyere byawe, ahabw'okuba omwanya gu oyemereiremu n'ogurikwera. Yoshwa nawe akora atyo." 
Joshua6:1 Mbwenu ahabw'okutiina Abaisiraeli, Yeriko ekaba ekingiirwe omunda n'aheeru, hataine orikushohora nari orikutaahamu." 
Joshua6:2 Reero Nyakubaho yaagira Yoshwa ati: Reeba, naakurekurira Yeriko n'omugabe waayo n'amamanzi gaayo." 
Joshua6:3 Mugyende nimurwehinguririza. Abashaija abarwani boona beehinguririze orwo rurembo omurundi gumwe. Mumare ebiro mukaaga nimukora mutyo. 
Joshua6:4 Kandi abahongyerezi mushanju bagyende bakwaitse enzamba mushanju z'amahembe g'engondoore z'entaama beebembeire eshanduukye. Reero aha kiro kya mushanju, mwehinguririze orwo rurembo emirundi mushanju, abahongyerezi nibateera enzamba." 
Joshua6:5 Mbwenu ku baraateere enzamba y'akasirikiriro ey'eihembe ry'engondoore y'entaama, mwahurira muti eiraka ry'egyo nzamba, abantu boona baamuze nibateera munonga orwari. Haza orugo rw'orwo rurembo nirwija kukumbagara, abantu barweshukyemu buri omwe naataahira ahu ari." 
Joshua6:6 Mpaho Yoshwa mwene Nuuni ayeta abahongyerezi, abagira ati: Muheekye eshanduukye y'endagaano, kandi abahongyerezi mushanju bagyende bakwaitse enzamba mushanju z'amahembe g'engondoore z'entaama beebembeire eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho." 
Joshua6:7 Mpaho aragiira abantu ati: Nimugumizemu, mwehinguririze orurembo, abashaija abarwani bagyende beebembeire eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho." 
Joshua6:8 Yoshwa ku yaaherize kuragiira atyo abo bantu, abahongyerezi mushanju abakwaitse enzamba mushanju z'amahembe g'engondoore z'entaama bari omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, baagyenda nibateera enzamba, eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Mukama ebakuratiire." 
Joshua6:9 Kandi abakwaitse eby'okurwanisa baayebembera abahongyerezi abarikuteera enzamba. Reero abarinzi ab'enyima baija bakuratiire eshanduukye; enzamba nazo zaagumizamu nizaaniira. 
Joshua6:10 Kwonka Yoshwa yaaragiira abantu ati: Mutateera orwari, n'amaraka gaanyu gatahurirwa; kandi hatagira ekigambo kyabaruga omu kanwa, okuhitsya aha izooba ri ndaabaragiirireho kuteera orwari, mukaba nibwo mwaruteera." 
Joshua6:11 Atyo ayeziguurutsya eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho orurembo omurundi gumwe. Mpaho bagarukayo omu rusiisira, baraaramu." 
Joshua6:12 Omu kasheeshe, Yoshwa aimuka kare, n'abahongyerezi baheeka eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho." 
Joshua6:13 N'abahongyerezi mushanju, abakwaitse enzamba mushanju z'amahembe g'engondoore z'entaama bari omu maisho g'eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho, baarabaho, bagumiizemu nibateera enzamba; n'abakwaitse eby'okurwanisa babari omu maisho, kandi abarinzi b'enyima bakuratiire eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho; obwo enzamba nizaaniira, zitarikuremuura." 
Joshua6:14 N'aha izooba rya kabiri baayehinguririza orwo rurembo omurundi gumwe, baagarukayo omu rusiisira. Baatwaza batyo okumara ebiro mukaaga." 
Joshua6:15 Aha kiro kya mushanju, baimuka kare omushekye nigujuguta, baayehinguririza orurembo emirundi mushanju nka buri. Eryo izooba ryonka nibwo baarwehinguririza emirundi mushanju." 
Joshua6:16 Aha murundi gwa mushanju, abahongyerezi ku baateire enzamba, Yoshwa yaagambira abantu ati: Muteere orwari, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho yaabaha orurembo." 
Joshua6:17 Orwo rurembo n'ebirurimu byona n'eby'okuhwera kimwe, bikacwekyerezibwa. Kureka Rahabu maraaya, n'abari hamwe nawe omu nju nibo baraagumeho; ahabw'okuba akashereka entatsi zi twatumire." 
Joshua6:18 Kwonka imwe mwerinde mutakora aha kintu kyona eky'okucwekyerezibwa. Ahabw'okuba ebyo byonzira ku muraaheze kubiheera kimwe Nyakubaho, mwagira eki mwatwara, nimuba mureeteire orusiisira rw'Abaisiraeli kucwekyerera, murugwisiize akagwe." 
Joshua6:19 Kwonka efeeza zoona n'ezaabu n'ebintu by'omuringa n'eby'ekyoma, ebyo n'ebirikwera bya Nyakubaho, eby'okutwarwa omu ibiikiro rye." 
Joshua6:20 Abo bantu batyo baamuza, n'enzamba ziteerwa. Ku baahuriire bati eiraka ry'enzamba, baateera munonga orwari, orugo rwakumbagara rwagwa aha nsi, baaruragaramu; buri muntu yaatembera ahi yaabaire ari, baarukwata." 
Joshua6:21 Baacwekyerereza kimwe ebyamwo byona; abashaija n'abakazi, abato n'abakuru, ente, entaama n'endogoya; byona baabiitsa rurara y'obwogi." 
Joshua6:22 Bwayima Yoshwa yaagira abashaija bari, bombi abaatatsire egyo nsi ati: Nimuze omu nju y'egyo nshambani, mwihemu ogwo mukazi n'abe boona, nk'oku mwamurahiire." 
Joshua6:23 Batyo abo batsigazi baatatsire, bataahamu baihamu Rahabu, na ishe, na nyina, na banyaanya n'abe boona. Bareeta abanyabuzaare be boona, babata aheeru y'orusiisira rw'Abaisiraeli." 
Joshua6:24 Reero bootsya orurembo n'ebirurimu byona, okwihaho efeeza n'ezaabu n'ebintu eby'omuringa n'eby'ekyoma. Ebyo babita omu ibiikiro ry'enju ya Nyakubaho." 
Joshua6:25 Kwonka Rahabu maraaya, n'ab'eka ya ishe, n'abe boona, Yoshwa abarokora. Ogwo mukazi atuura omu Baisiraeli okuhitsya n'eri izooba, ahabw'okuba akashereka entatsi zi Yoshwa yaatumire kutata Yeriko." 
Joshua6:26 Yoshwa omuri ago magingo yaabarahiza naabeehanangiriza omu maisho ga Nyakubaho ati: Omuntu oriimuka akagaruka kwombeka oru rurembo Yeriko, akyeenwe! Ku aritaho omusingi gwarwo, omwana we w'omujigaijo afe! Kandi ku aribyara amarembo gaarwo, omwana we bucuranda afe!" 
Joshua6:27 Nyakubaho nikwo yaagumire atyo na Yoshwa, okurangaanwa kwe kukabuga ensi yoona." 
Joshua7:1 Kwonka Abaisiraeli tibarabaire beesigwa aha bikwatiraine n'ebi baazibiirwe; ahabw'okuba Akani mutabani wa Karumi, mwijukuru wa Zabudi, mwene Zeera, ow'oruganda rwa Yuda, akatwara aha bintu ebiheereirwe kimwe Nyakubaho. Haza ekyo kyareetera Mukama kugirira Abaisiraeli ekiniga kingi." 
Joshua7:2 Mbwenu Yoshawa akatuma abantu kuruga Yeriko kuza Aayi, eri haihi na Beteli; yaabagira ati: Nimwirooko, mutate egyo nsi. Mpaho abo bashaija bagyenda batata Aayi." 
Joshua7:3 Bagaruka, bagambira Yoshwa bati: Abantu boona batazayo, kureka abantu nk'enkumi ibiri nari ishatu, babe nibo baazayo, bateere Aayi. Otaruhiza busha eihanga ryona, ahabw'okuba abaayo ni bakye." 
Joshua7:4 Batyo omuri abo bantu harugamu abashaija nk'enkumi ishatu bazayo. Kwonka aba Aayi bababinga. 
Joshua7:5 Aba Aayi babaitamu abashaija makumi ashatu na mukaaga, babaiha aha irembo bababingire, babahitsya Shebarimu, babacwekyerereza aha kashuumo. Abantu baitwa obwoba, emitima ebahwaire omu nda." 
Joshua7:6 Bwanyima Yoshwa akataagura ebi ajwaire, yaagwa aha nsi ajuumaire omu maisho g'eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho okuhitsya omu mwabazyo. We n'abakuru b'Abaisiraeli, baayeshuka eiju omu mitwe." 
Joshua7:7 Na Yoshwa yaagira ati: Ai bambe, Mukama Ruhanga! Mbwenu aba bantu obambukiize ki Yorudaani, kuturekurira Abaamori kutucwekyereza? Nangwa obwo kuri twayegumiire seeri ya Yorudaani!" 
Joshua7:8 Ai Nyakubaho, mbwenu ekindi ngambe ki, naareeba Abaisiraeli bateire abazigu baabo amabega nibahunga?" 
Joshua7:9 Manya Abanyakanaani n'abatwire omuri egyo nsi boona ku baraakihurire, nibaija kutugota, bamareho eiziina ryaitu omu nsi. Mbwenu shi obwo eiziina ryawe erikuru noija kurikorera ki?" 
Joshua7:10 Nyakubaho nawe agarukamu Yoshwa ati: Imuka, ekikujuumaize aha nsi ni ki?" 
Joshua7:11 Isiraeli ekozire ekibi; abantu baita endagaano yangye ei naabaragiire. Bakozire aha bintu birikuzira, baabiiba kandi baabeiha, baabita omu byabo." 
Joshua7:12 N'ahabw'ekyo Abaisiraeli tibarikubaasa kusyamirana n'abazigu babo, ahabw'okuba nabo babaire abakyeenirwe ab'okucwekyerera. Tinkiguma naimwe bundi, mwaba mutacwekyereize ebyo bintu birikuzira, mukabiiha omuriimwe." 
Joshua7:13 Imuka oyeze abantu, kandi obagambire oti: Mweyeze ahabwa nyencakare, ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli yaagira ati: Iwe Isiraeli, omuriiwe harimu ebintu birikuzira, n'ahabw'ekyo torikubaasa kusyamirana n'abazigu baawe, mwaba mutabiihire omuriimwe." 
Joshua7:14 Mbwenu nu omu kasheeshe nibaija kubareeta muri omu nganda zaanyu. Oruganda oru Nyakubaho araihemu, rwije n'ab'emiryango yaarwo. N'omuryango ogu Nyakubaho araatoorane, gwije n'ab'amaka gaagwo. Kandi eka ei Nyakubaho araatooranemu, haije omuntu omwe-omwe waayo." 
Joshua7:15 Reero oraakwatwe n'ebyo bintu birikuzira, bamwotsye, we n'ebi aine byona, ahabw'okuba aitsire endagaano ya Nyakubaho, kandi akozire ekihemu omuri Isiraeli." 
Joshua7:16 Yoshwa aimuka kare omu kasheeshe, ateeranira hamwe Abaisiraeli bari omu nganda. Oruganda rwa Yuda rutooranwamu." 
Joshua7:17 Reero ateerana ab'emiryango y'Abaayuda, ab'omuryango gw'Abazeerahi baba nibo baatooranwamu. Kandi areeta ab'omuryango gw'Abazeerahi, omuntu omwe-omwe, Zaabudi aba niwe yaihwamu." 
Joshua7:18 Reero omu b'eka ya Zaabudi areeta omuntu omwe-omwe, haihwamu Akani mutabani wa Karumi mwijukuru wa Zaabudi, mwene Zeera ow'oruganda rwa Yuda." 
Joshua7:19 Mpaho Yoshwa agira Akani ati: Mwana wangye, ha Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ekitiinwa, kandi omuhimbise. Haza mbwenu ongambire eki okozire, otakinshereka." 
Joshua7:20 Na Akani agarukamu Yoshwa ati: N'ekya buzima, ncumwire ahari Mukama wa Isiraeli, kandi eki nikyo nkozire:" 
Joshua7:21 Ku ndeebire omu minyago omunagiro murungi gwa Shinaari n'empiiha z'efeeza magana abiri n'omuzimba gw'ezaabu gurikuhitsya empiiha makumi ataano, naabyetenga, naabitwara. Na mbwenu bisherekirwe omu itaka omu nda y'eihema ryangye, hamwe n'efeeza ahansi yaabyo." 
Joshua7:22 Yoshwa nawe atuma entumwa; bairuka, bahika eryo ihema, bashanga bisherekirwe omu ihema rye, hamwe n'efeeza ahansi yaabyo." 
Joshua7:23 Babiiha omu ihema babireetera Yoshwa n'Abaisiraeli boona; kandi babita omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. 
Joshua7:24 Reero Yoshwa n'Abaisiraeli boona bakwata Akani, mwene Zeera, n'ezo feeza n'omunagiro n'omuzimba gw'ezaabu n'abatabani n'abahara n'ente ze n'endogoya n'entaama n'eihema rye na byona ebi yaabaire atungire; babitwara omu ruhanga rwa Akori." 
Joshua7:25 Haza Yoshwa amugira ati: Ahabw'enki otugwisiize akagwe? Naiwe Nyakubaho eri izooba yaaza kukakugwisiza. Mpaho Abaisiraeli boona bamuteera amabaare, n'abe, n'ebye. Bwanyima bootsya abo bantu n'ebyo bintu;" 
Joshua7:26 bamurundaho ekirundo kihango ky'amabaare, ekikiriho n'eri izooba. Nyakubaho arekyera aho kugira ekiniga kingi. Nikyo ogwo mwanya gweterwa Oruhanga rw'Okugwerwa akagwe." 
Joshua8:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Yoshwa ati: Otatiina, kandi otahahaara. Twara abarwani boona, ohurure, oze kuteera Aayi. Reeba naakurekurira omugabe wa Aayi, n'abantu be n'orurembo rwe." 
Joshua8:2 Haza ogire Aayi n'omugabe waayo nk'oku waagizire Yeriko n'omugabe waayo. Aha bikwatiraine n'eminyago yaayo, mwetwarire ebintu n'amatungo, bibe eminyago yaanyu. Orwo rurembo muruteho abarikugwera enyima yaarwo." 
Joshua8:3 Yoshwa atyo aimuka n'abarwani boona, baza kuteera Aayi; Yoshwa atoorana abashaija amamanzi obukumi bushatu, aboohereza nyekiro," 
Joshua8:4 abaragiira ati: Nimwirooko, mugwere aha rurembo enyima yaarwo. Mutaruza hare munonga, kureka mugume mweteekateekire." 
Joshua8:5 Reero nyowe n'abu nyine nitwija kuhika ahari orwo rurembo; haza ku baraashohore kututeera nka bwabiso, tubahungye." 
Joshua8:6 Nabo nibaija kutubinga, okuhitsya obu turaabareetere kuhwa omu rurembo boona. Manya nibaija kugira bati: Nibatuhunga nka bwabiso; haza naitwe nitwija kubahunga." 
Joshua8:7 Reero imwe mwimukye ahi mugwereire, mukwate orwo rurembo, ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waanyu naija kurubarekurira." 
Joshua8:8 Haza ku muraaheze kurukwata, murwotsye, murugire nk'oku Nyakubaho aragiire. Reeba, naanye naabaragiira!" 
Joshua8:9 Yoshwa atyo aboohereza, baza ahi baraagwere, baguma aho bategyerereize ahagati ya Beteli na Aayi, aha burengyerwa-izooba bwayo. Yoshwa we ekyo kiro araara n'abaatsigarayo." 
Joshua8:10 Yoshwa akaimuka kare omu kasheeshe, yaateerana abantu, yaagyenda n'abakuru b'Abaisiraeli, beebembeire abantu nibaza kuteera Aayi." 
Joshua8:11 Abarwani boona abu yaabaire aine baagyenda, baahika haihi omu maisho g'orwo rurembo, baasiisira aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho obwa Aayi, ahagati yaayo nabo bacwekanisiibwe oruhanga;" 
Joshua8:12 kandi yaatwara abashaija nk'enkumi itaano, yaabaragiira kugwera ahagati ya Beteli na Aayi, aha burengyerwa-izooba bwarwo." 
Joshua8:13 Batyo baatenga orugamba. Eihe erihango ryaza aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho bw'orwo rurembo; kandi abagwereire enyima baaza aha burengyerwa-izooba bwarwo. Yoshwa we ekyo kiro yaaraara omu ruhanga. 
Joshua8:14 Omugabe wa Aayi ku yaakireebire, we n'abashaija be boona ab'omuri orwo rurembo, baarahuka, baashohora kare, baaza aharikushuuma, ogurikutoora Araba kubugabugana n'Abaisiraeli aha rugamba, obwo atarikumanya ku hariho abamugwereire enyima y'orurembo." 
Joshua8:15 Reero Yoshwa n'Abaisiraeli boona baayeshushanisa omu maisho gaabo nk'abaasingurwa, baahunga nibagarura ogurikuza omu ihamba." 
Joshua8:16 Abantu boona ab'omu rurembo baahuruzibwa kuteeranira hamwe kubabinga. Kandi ei baagarukiire kubinga Yoshwa, niyo baagarukiire kuza hare n'orurembo." 
Joshua8:17 Tihaagira mushaija n'omwe owaatsigara omuri Aayi nari omuri Beteli, atabingire Baisiraeli. Batyo baagyenda babingire Abaisiraeli, baatsiga orurembo rurangaire." 
Joshua8:18 Bwanyima Nyakubaho yaagira Yoshwa ati: Imutsya eicumu eri okwaitse, oryorekye ei Aayi eri; ahabw'okuba naaza kugikurekurira. Yoshwa atyo ayorekyeza orwo rurembo eicumu eri yaabaire akwaitse." 
Joshua8:19 Abagwereire baimuka ahonaaho omu kyetindo kyabo. Na Yoshwa ku agorora ati omukono, bairuka, bataaha omuri orwo rurembo, barukwata, kandi barahuka kurutweka." 
Joshua8:20 Abashaija ba Aayi ku baagarwire bati amaisho enyima, baareeba ahonaaho omwika gwarwo gwacumbuukire, gwahikire omu iguru. Baabura agahunga kutoora oku nari kuriya ahabw'okuba abaabaire nibahungira omu ihamba, bakakubuukira abababingire." 
Joshua8:21 Reero Yoshwa n'Abaisiraeli boona, ku baareebire abaabaire bagwereire baakwata orwo rurembo, omwika gwarwo gwacumbuuka, baakuba, baita abantu ba Aayi." 
Joshua8:22 N'abandi abaarugire omu rurembo baija, baabarwanisa. Aba Aayi baakubirwa batyo ahagati y'Abaisiraeli babareetsirwe oku n'oku. Haza Abaisiraeli baabaita boona, tihaagira owaahonokaho nari owaahunga;" 
Joshua8:23 kureka omugabe wa Aayi niwe baakwatsire ahuriire, bakamureetera Yoshwa." 
Joshua8:24 Abaisiraeli ku baaherize kwitira omu bwerere bw'eihamba abatuuzi ba Aayi boona abaabaire bababingire, kandi boona oku batura baherize kwitwa rurara z'obwogi, Abaisiraeli boona baagaruka omuri Aayi, baagicwekyerezesa rurara y'obwogi." 
Joshua8:25 Abantu ba Aayi boona abaafiire eryo izooba, obariiremu abashaija n'abakazi, bakahika akakumi kamwe n'enkumi ibiri." 
Joshua8:26 Manya Yoshwa taragizire bu ahinya omukono gwe ogu yaagoroize eicumu, okuhitsya obu yaacwekyerereize kimwe abatuuzi b'omuri Aayi boona." 
Joshua8:27 Kureka amatungo n'eby'omuri orwo rurembo nibyo Abaisiraeli baatwaire biri eminyago yaabo, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Yoshwa." 
Joshua8:28 Yoshwa yaayotsya atyo Aayi, yaagihindura ekirundo ky'amatongo g'ebiro byona, agakiriho n'eri izooba;" 
Joshua8:29 kandi yaahanika omugabe wa Aayi aha muti okuhitsya omu mwabazyo. Eizooba ku ryabaire nirirenga, Yoshwa yaaragiira, baahanura omutumbi gwe aha muti, baagunaga aha irembo ry'orurembo, baagurundaho omutuumo gw'amabaare, ogukiriyo n'eri izooba." 
Joshua8:30 Bwanyima Yoshwa akombekyera Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli eitambiro aha Rushozi Ebali," 
Joshua8:31 nk'oku Musa omugaragwa wa Nyakubaho yaabaire aragiire Abaisiraeli, kandi nk'oku kihandiikirwe omu iteeka rya Musa eitambiro ry'amabaare gatacweregyereire, agu omuntu atakakozahoga kikwato ky'ekyoma. Baaritambiriraho Nyakubaho ebitambo bicwekize, n'eby'okurya kumwe." 
Joshua8:32 Kandi aho ahu Abaisiraeli baabaire bateeraniire, niho Yoshwa yaahandiikiire aha mabaare ekihanduukururo ky'eiteeka ri Musa yaahandiikire." 
Joshua8:33 Abaisiraeli boona, enzaarwa n'abashuuhuuki, n'abakuru baabo n'abategyeki n'abaramuzi, baayemerera embaju zombi z'eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho omu maisho g'abahongyerezi Abaleevi, abaheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho. Ekicweka kyabo kimwe kyayemerera omu maisho g'Orushozi Gerizimu, n'ekindi kyayemerera omu maisho g'Orushozi Ebali, nk'oku Musa omugaragwa wa Nyakubaho yaaragiire bwabiso, ngu bagume bashabire Abaisiraeli omugisha." 
Joshua8:34 Bwanyima yaashoma ebiri omu mateeka byona: emigisha n'emikyeeno, nk'oku ebihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eiteeka biri." 
Joshua8:35 Tihaagira kigambo na kimwe omu bi Musa yaaragiire eki Yoshwa atarashomeire mu maisho g'ekiteerane ky'Abaisiraeli, n'abakazi n'abaana bato n'abashuuhuuki ababatwiremu." 
Joshua9:1 Abagabe ba seeri ya Yorudaani, abatwire omu nsi y'ebibungo n'omu mpita n'omu myegyeego y'Enyanja Empango ogurikureeba Lebanooni; Abahiiti, Abaamori, Abakanaani, Abapeerizi, Abahiizi n'Abayebusi, ku baahuriire ebyo," 
Joshua9:2 baayeteerana n'omutima gumwe kurwanisa Yoshwa n'Abaisiraeli. 
Joshua9:3 Kwonka Abaagibeoni, ku baahuriire oku Yoshwa agizire Yeriko na Aayi," 
Joshua9:4 baayecwera obwengye, baagyenda baayekomera entanda. Baata aha ndogoya zaabo amaguniya n'endyanga za viino ebikuzire biteirwe ebiremu." 
Joshua9:5 Baata omu bigyere byabo enkaito zikuzire zitairwe ebiremu, baajwara n'emyenda ekuzire; entanda zaabo zikaba zoomire kandi zihumbire." 
Joshua9:6 Batyo baija baashanga Yoshwa omu rusiisira Giligaali. Baamugira we n'Abaisiraeli bati: Nituruga omu nsi ya hare. Mbwenu nitubeeshengyereza, mukore naitwe endagaano." 
Joshua9:7 Kwonka Abaisiraeli baagira abo Bahiivi bati: Obundi mukaaba mutwire naitwe. Mbwenu obwo tukaakora tuta endagaano naimwe? 
Joshua9:8 Baagarukamu Yoshwa bati: Turi abairu baawe. Na Yoshwa yaabagira ati: Muri baahi? Kandi nimuruga hi? 
Joshua9:9 Baamugira bati: Itwe abairu baawe nituruga omu nsi ya hare ahabw'okuhurira okurangaanwa kwa Mukama Ruhanga waawe. Manya tuhuriire ebi barikumugambaho, n'ebi yaakozire omuri Misiri," 
Joshua9:10 kandi n'ebi yaakozire abagabe bombi ab'Abaamori, abaabaire bari seeri ya Yorudaani: Sihooni omugabe w'Abaheshibooni, na Ogi omugabe wa Bashani, batwire Ashitarooti." 
Joshua9:11 Abakuru baitu n'abatuuzi b'omu nsi yaitu boona batugizire bati: Mwetwarire entanda ahabw'orugyendo, mugyende mubabugane. Haza mubagire muti: Turi abairu baanyu! Mbwenu nu, nimukore naitwe endagaano." 
Joshua9:12 Egi n'emigaati yaitu: Obu twagiiha omuka kwija nitugiriira omu muhanda, ekaba neetagata aha izooba ri twaimukiizeho orugyendo kwija kubareeba. Hati reeba, eyomire kandi ehumbire." 
Joshua9:13 Ezi ndyanga za viino zikaba ziri nsya obu twaziijuza. Mbwenu reeba, zitaagataagukire. Kandi ebi bijwaro hamwe n'enkaito zaitu bikuzire ahabw'orugyendo ruraingwa munonga." 
Joshua9:14 Batyo abakuru b'Abaisiraeli baarya ahari ezo ntanda, haza tibaayebuuza hari Mukama kubahabura." 
Joshua9:15 Yoshwa atyo akora nabo endagaano y'obusingye kutabaita. N'abeebembezi b'eihanga babahamiza. 
Joshua9:16 Ku haahingwireho ebiro bishatu bakozire nabo endagaano, Abaisiraeli baamanya ku bari bataahi baabo abahereraine nabo." 
Joshua9:17 Abaisiraeli batyo baimutsya, bagyenda, bahika omu ndembo zaabo aha kiro kya kashatu. Endembo zaabo zikaba ziri Gibeoni, Kefiira, Berooti na Kiiriyatiyearimu." 
Joshua9:18 Kwonka Abaisiraeli tibabaita; ahabw'okuba abeebembezi b'eihanga bakaba baabarahiire Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli. Ab'eihanga boona nikwo kwetomboitera abo beebembezi. 
Joshua9:19 Kwonka abeebembezi baagira ab'eihanga ryona bati: Tubarahiire Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli. N'ahabw'ekyo titurikubaasa kubaita. 
Joshua9:20 Mbwenu ka tubagire tuti: tubarekye bagume bahuriire, kashanga ya Ruhanga etakaatugwera ahabw'endahiro ei tubarahiire." 
Joshua9:21 Abeebembezi bongyera babagira bati: Mubarekye bagumeho bari abashatuzi b'enku kandi ab'okutahira eihanga ryona amaizi. Abateeraniire aho baikiriza eki abo beebembezi baagamba. 
Joshua9:22 Yoshwa abeeta ababuuza ati: Mutubeihiire ki, mukatugira muti: Turi hare munonga naimwe haza kunu mutwire naitwe?" 
Joshua9:23 Mbwenu nu, mwakyeenwa. Bamwe omuriimwe nibaija kuguma bari abahuuku b'okushatura enku n'okutahira amaizi enju ya Ruhanga wangye." 
Joshua9:24 Bagarukamu Yoshwa bati: Manya itwe abairu baawe abantu bakatugambira nibatuhamiza ku Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaaragiire omugaragwa we Musa kubaha egi nsi yoona, n'okucwekyereza abagitwiremu, bakabahigiza. N'ahabw'ekyo tukabatiina munonga, ngu mutakaatwita, twakora ekyo kintu." 
Joshua9:25 Mbwenu reeba, turi omu mikono yaanyu, mutukore eki muraareebe ngu ni kirungi kandi kihikire." 
Joshua9:26 Nawe aba nikwo yaabatwaza. Abaiha omu mikono y'Abaisiraeli, bareka kubaita." 
Joshua9:27 Haza eryo izooba Yoshwa abahindura abashatuzi b'enku n'ab'okuguma nibatahira amaizi eihanga ryona n'eitambiro rya Nyakubaho omu mwanya gu aritoorana, okuhitsya n'eri izooba." 
Joshua10:1 Adonizedeki omugabe wa Yerusalemu akahurira oku Yoshwa akwatsire Aayi, akagicwekyerereza kimwe, oku agizire Aayi egyo n'omugabe waayo, nk'oku yaagizire Yeriko n'omugabe waayo, n'oku abatuuzi ba Gibeoni bakozire n'Abaisiraeli endagaano y'obusingye, bakatuura nabo," 
Joshua10:2 yaatiina munonga, ahabw'okuba Gibeoni rukaba ruri orurembo ruhango nk'ezindi ndembo z'abagabe, kandi nirukiza Aayi obuhango, n'abashaija baamwo bari emanzi." 
Joshua10:3 Adonizedeki omugabe wa Yerusalemu nikwo kutuma ahari Hohamu omugabe wa Heburooni, Piramu omugabe wa Yarimuuti, Yafiya omugabe wa Lakishi na Debiri omugabe wa Egulooni, akabagira ati:" 
Joshua10:4 Nimwije mumpe emikono, tuteere Gibeoni, ahabw'okuba ekozire na Yoshwa n'Abaisiraeli endagaano y'obusingye." 
Joshua10:5 Batyo abo bagabe bataano b'Abaamori, omugabe wa Yerusalemu, owa Heburooni, owa Yarimuuti, owa Lakishi, n'owa Egulooni, bahuruza engabo, bagyenda n'amahe gaabo goona, basiisira ahashungaine na Gibeoni, bagiteera." 
Joshua10:6 Abaagibeoni nabo batuma ahari Yoshwa omu rusiisira rwa Giligaali, bati: Otahinya omukono, okanagiirira abairu baawe! Rahuka oije ahi turi, otujune, otuhe emikono! Manya abagabe b'Abaamori abatwire omu nsi y'ebibungo beeteeraine kuturwanisa." 
Joshua10:7 Yoshwa aruga Giligaali aine abantu be boona abarwani kandi amamanzi. 
Joshua10:8 Na Nyakubaho agira Yoshwa ati: Otabatiina, ahabw'okuba naabakurekurira. Tihariho muntu n'omwe omuribo oraakuze omu kaso." 
Joshua10:9 Yoshwa atyo abagwaho kitaraariire, agyenzire ekiro kyona okuruga Giligaali." 
Joshua10:10 Ku bareeba bati amahe g'Abaisiraeli nigabaizira, Nyakubaho abahuruutura omutima omunda; haza Abaisiraeli babaitamu abantu baingi munonga omuri Gibeoni. Bababinga nibabatooza omuhanda gurikutemba Betihorooni; bagyenda nibabaita okuhitsya Azeeka na Makeda." 
Joshua10:11 Haza ku baabaire nibahunga Abaisiraeli, nibakishuuma akatsintsimuko ka Betihorooni, Mukama yaabateeza orubaare ruhango orurikuruga omu iguru, rwagyenda nirubateera rwabahitsya Azeeka, baafa. Abaitsirwe orubaare omu bwingi baakira abu Abaisiraeli baitsize rurara." 
Joshua10:12 Bwanyima Yoshwa yaagamba na Nyakubaho aha izooba ri Nyakubaho yaarekuririireho Abaisiraeli Abaamori. Kandi yaagambira omu maisho g'Abaisiraeli ati: Iwe izooba 'we, yemerera ahaiguru ya Gibeoni, naiwe kwezi 'we, yemerera ahaiguru y'oruhanga rwa Aiyalooni." 
Joshua10:13 Eizooba ryayemerera obutarugaho, n'okwezi kwaguma aho, okuhitsya obu ab'eryo ihanga baahoire abazigu baabo. Mbwenu ekyo tikihandiikirwe omu kitabo kya Yashari? Eizooba rikaguma ahagati y'eiguru, tiryarahuka kurenga, haihi nyomushana yoona." 
Joshua10:14 Hakaba hatakabahoga, kandi tihakabahoga eizooba nk'eryo, obu Nyakubaho yaahurira eiraka ry'omuntu. Manya obwo Nyakubaho akaba naarwanirira Isiraeli." 
Joshua10:15 Bwanyima Yoshwa yaagaruka n'Abaisiraeli boona omu rusiisira rwa Giligaali. 
Joshua10:16 Aba bagabe bataano bakahunga baayeshereka omu nyanga ya Makeda. 
Joshua10:17 Reero abantu baagambira Yoshwa bati: Twashanga abagabe bataano beesherekire omu nyanga ya Makeda. 
Joshua10:18 Yoshwa abagira ati: Mukumbagaze amabaare mahango aha munwa gwayo kandi muteho abantu b'okuharinda. 
Joshua10:19 Kwonka imwe mutagumaho. Mubingye abazigu baanyu, mubarwanise nimubareetwa enyima, mutabaikiriza kutaaha omu ndembo zaabo; ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waanyu yaababarekurira." 
Joshua10:20 Yoshwa n'Abaisiraeli ku baaherize kubaitamu abantu baingi munonga, okuhitsya obu baabamazireho, n'abaatsigaireho ku baaherize kutaaha omu ndembo z'ebigo bigumire," 
Joshua10:21 abantu boona baagaruka buhooro, baashanga Yoshwa omu rusiisira rwa Makeda, tihaagira muntu n'omwe owaayehangamura kujuma Abaisiraeli." 
Joshua10:22 Bwanyima Yoshwa yaaragiira ati: Nimwigure enyanga, mwihemu abo bagabe bataano, mubandeetere." 
Joshua10:23 Nabo baakora batyo, baabaihamu baabamureetera: Omugabe owa Yerusalemu, n'owa Heburooni, n'owa Yarimuuti, n'owa Lakishi, n'owa Egulooni." 
Joshua10:24 Abo bagabe, abantu ku baabaihireyo, baabareetera Yoshwa; nawe yaateeranira hamwe Abaisiraeli boona; yaagambira abakuru b'engabo abaabaire bahurwire nawe ati: Muhikye aha, muribate aba bagabe aha bitsya. Nabo bairira haihi, baabaribata aha bitsya." 
Joshua10:25 Yoshwa abagira ati: Mutatiina kandi mutahahaara. Mube ab'amaani, mugume, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho nikwo araagire atyo abazigu baanyu boona abu murikurwana nabo." 
Joshua10:26 Bwanyima Yoshwa abateera abaita, abahanika aha miti etaano; bagirengyereraho okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Joshua10:27 Reero eizooba ku ryabaire nirirengarenga, Yoshwa yaaragiira, baabahanura aha miti, baabanaga omu nyanga ei baabaire beesherekiremu. Amabaare mahango g'aha munwa gw'egyo nyanga n'eri izooba gakiriho." 
Joshua10:28 Eryo izooba Yoshwa akakwata Makeda, yaarucwekyerezesa rurara y'obwogi, hamwe n'omugabe waarwo. Yaitira kimwe buri muntu orurimu, tiyaagira ou yaatsigaho. Omugabe wa Makeda Yoshwa yaamugira nk'oku yaagizire owa Yeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Yoshwa yaaruga Makeda n'Abaisiraeli boona, yaaza Libuna yaagiteera." 
Joshua10:30 Nyakubaho nayo hamwe n'omugabe waayo yaabirekurira Abaisiraeli. Yoshwa yaarwitsa rurara y'obwogi, tiyaagira muntu weena orurimu ou yaarutsigamu. Omugabe waarwo yaamugira nk'oku yaagizire owa Yeriko." 
Joshua10:31 Yoshwa kandi yaaruga Libuna n'Abaisiraeli, yaaza Lakishi yaagigota, yaagirwanisa." 
Joshua10:32 Nyakubaho nayo yaagirekurira Abaisiraeli. Yoshwa yaagikwata aha izooba rya kabiri, yaagiitsa rurara y'obwogi, atarikutsigamu muntu weena ogirimu, nk'oku yaagizire Libuna." 
Joshua10:33 Reero Horamu omugabe wa Gezeri yaahurura kuha Lakishi emikono, Yoshwa yaamwita n'abantu be; okuhitsya obu ataratsigireho muntu n'omwe." 
Joshua10:34 Yoshwa n'Abaisiraeli baagumizamu nibaruga Lakishi, baaza Egulooni; baagigota, baagirwanisa," 
Joshua10:35 baagikwata eryo izooba, baagiitsa rurara y'obwogi. Kandi eryo izooba, Yoshwa yaitira kimwe omuntu weena owaabaire arurimu, nk'oku yaagizire Lakishi." 
Joshua10:36 Yoshwa hamwe n'Abaisiraeli baaruga Egulooni, bainamuka baaza Heburooni, baarurwanisa;" 
Joshua10:37 baarukwata, baarwitsa rurara y'obwogi, n'omugabe waarwo n'ebirorero byarwo na buri muntu orurimu. Tiyaagira n'omwe ou yaatsigaho ahuriire, nk'oku yaagizire Egulooni, yaarucwekyerereza kimwe n'omuntu weena orurimu." 
Joshua10:38 Bwanyima Yoshwa n'Abaisiraeli baakuba, baaza Debiri, baagirwanisa." 
Joshua10:39 Yaagikwata n'omugabe waayo n'ebirorero byayo byona. Baabaitsa rurara y'obwogi, baacwekyerereza kimwe buri muntu weena orurimu; tihaagira n'omwe ou yaatsigamu. Nk'oku yaagizire Heburooni na Libuna n'omugabe waayo, yaaba nikwo agira Debiri n'omugabe waayo." 
Joshua10:40 Yoshwa yaasingura atyo egyo nsi yoona ey'ebibungo, na Negebu n'ey'empita n'ey'enkiizi, n'abagabe baayo boona, tiyaagira n'omwe ou yaatsigaho ahuriire, kureka yaacwekyerereza kimwe kyona ekiine omwitsyo, nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli yaaragiire." 
Joshua10:41 Yoshwa yaabasingura okwiha Kadeshibarinea okuhitsya Gaaza; n'ensi yoona eya Gesheni okuhikira kimwe Gibeoni. 
Joshua10:42 Abagabe abo boona n'ensi zaabo Yoshwa akabisingura omu hururu emwe; ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli akarwanirira Isiraeli egyo. 
Joshua10:43 Bwanyima Yoshwa hamwe n'Abaisiraeli boona baagaruka omu rusiisira rwa Giligaali. 
Joshua11:1 Yabini omugabe wa Hazori ku yaahuriire ebyo, yaatuma ahari Yobabu omugabe wa Madoni, n'aha wa Shimurooni, n'aha wa Akishaafu," 
Joshua11:2 n'aha bagabe b'omu nsi y'ebibungo by'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho n'omuri Araba aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo obwa Kinerooti, n'omu mpita n'omu nkiizi za Doori aha burengyerwa-izooba." 
Joshua11:3 Yaatuma n'aha Banyakanaani ba burugwa-izooba na burengyerwa-izooba, Abaamori, Abahiiti, Abapeerizi n'Abayebusi ab'omu nsi y'ebibungo, n'aha Bahiivi eifo ya Herumooni omu nsi ya Mizipa." 
Joshua11:4 Baahurura n'engabo zaabo zoona bari eihe rihango, baingi nk'omusheenyi gw'aha nyanja, baine embaraasi n'ebigaari bingi munonga." 
Joshua11:5 Abo bagabe boona baateerana amahe gaabo, baija baasiisira hamwe aha maizi ga Meromu kurwanisa Isiraeli." 
Joshua11:6 Reero Nyakubaho yaagira Yoshwa ati: Otabatiina! Ahabw'okuba nyencakare nk'obu bunaku, boona oku barikwingana niinyija kubarekurira Isiraeli, ebaite. Embaraasi zaabo noija kuzitema ebiteega, n'ebigaari byabo obyotsye." 
Joshua11:7 Yoshwa atyo aija kitaraariire n'abarwani be boona; babashanga aha maizi ga Meromu, babateera." 
Joshua11:8 Na Nyakubaho abarekurira Abaisiraeli; babaita, bababinga, babahitsya Sidoni empango na Miserofotimaimu, kandi burugwa-izooba babahitsya omu ruhanga rwa Mizipe babaita okuhitsya obu hataratsigaireho muntu n'omwe." 
Joshua11:9 Na Yoshwa abagira nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiire; embaraasi zaabo azitema ebiteega, n'ebigaari byabo abyotsya." 
Joshua11:10 Kandi Yoshwa ago magingo akubuuka akwata Hazori, aitsa rurara omugabe waayo. Manya ira, Hazori ekaba eri orurembo rukuru rw'ensi zoona ez'abo bagabe." 
Joshua11:11 Abagirimu boona babaitsa rurara, babacwekyerereza kimwe, tihatsigaraho n'omwe orikwitsya. Kandi Yoshwa ayotsya Hazori egyo;" 
Joshua11:12 Yoshwa akwata n'endembo z'abo bagabe zoona, n'abagabe baazo boona abaitsa rurara y'obwogi, abacwekyerereza kimwe, nk'oku Musa omugaragwa wa Nyakubaho yaaragiire." 
Joshua11:13 Tihariho rurembo na rumwe orw'omu ndembo ezaayombekirwe aha tubungo, oru Abaisiraeli baayokize, kureka Hazori yonka niyo Yoshwa yaayokize." 
Joshua11:14 Kandi byona ebyanyagirwe omuri ezo ndembo n'amatungo, Abaisiraeli bakabyetwarira kuba eminyago yaabo. Buri muntu baamwitsa rurara y'obwogi, okuhitsya obu baabacwekyerereize kimwe, batatsigyeho n'omwe orikwitsya." 
Joshua11:15 Nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa omugaragwa we, nikwo Musa yaaragiire Yoshwa, na Yoshwa akakora atyo. Ahari byona ebi Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa, tihariho kintu na kimwe eki Yoshwa yaatsigire kitakozirwe." 
Joshua11:16 Yoshwa atyo akwata ensi y'omu bibungo na Negebu, n'ensi yoona eya Gosheni, n'empita na Araba, n'ensi y'ebibungo eya Isiraeli n'empita zaayo," 
Joshua11:17 okwiha aha Rushozi Halaki, orurikwinamura nirugarura Seiri, okuhika Baaligada omu ruhanga rwa Lebanooni ahaifo y'Orushozi Herumooni. Kandi yaakwata abagabe baazo boona, yaabateera, yaabaita." 
Joshua11:18 Yoshwa ogwo akamara omwanya muraingwa naarwana n'abo bagabe. 
Joshua11:19 Tihaabaho rurembo na rumwe orwakozire endagaano y'obusingye n'Abaisiraeli, kureka Abahiivi abatuuzi ba Gibeoni. Ezindi ndembo zoona bakazirwanisa, baazikwata." 
Joshua11:20 Manya Nyakubaho niwe yaagangaarize emitima yaabo, ngu barwanise Isiraeli, haza bacwekyererezibwe kimwe batarikugirirwa saasi, kureka okuhwerekyerezibwa, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa." 
Joshua11:21 Kandi Yoshwa omuri ebyo biro akaija yaamaraho Abaanaki abaabaire batwire omu nsi y'ebibungo, omuri Heburooni, omuri Debiri, omuri Anabu, n'omu nsi ya Yuda yoona ey'ebibungo, n'omu ya Isiraeli yoona ey'ebibungo. Yoshwa yaabacwekyerereza kimwe n'endembo zaabo." 
Joshua11:22 Kureka omuri Gaaza n'omuri Gaati, n'omuri Ashidoodi, nimwo yaagizire abu yaatsigiremu." 
Joshua11:23 Yoshwa yaakubuura atyo ensi yoona, nk'oku byona ebi Nyakubaho yaagambiire Musa byabaire biri. Kandi ezo nsi Yoshwa yaaziha Abaisiraeli kuzihungura, nk'oku enganda zaabo zaazibagaine. Batyo abantu baahuumura engamba." 
Joshua12:1 Aba nibo bagabe b'omuri egyo nsi abu Abaisiraeli baasingwire, bakakubuura ensi yaabo seenu ya Yorudaani, ogurikugarura burugwa-izooba, okwiha omu ruhanga rwa Arunooni, okuhika aha Rushozi Herumooni na Araba yoona ey'oburugwa-izooba." 
Joshua12:2 Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori, owaabaire atwire Heshibooni, naategyeka okwiha Aroeri, eri aha karebarebo k'oruhanga rwa Arunooni, kandi n'okwiha ahagati y'orwo ruhanga, okuta aha mugyera Yaboki. Nikyo kicweka kya Gileadi," 
Joshua12:3 na Araba, okuhika aha Nyanja ya Kinerooti, orubaju rwa burugwa-izooba, kandi n'ogurikugarura Betiyeshimooti, okuta aha nyanja ya Araba ey'Omwonyo, okugarura aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, okuhika omu mizi y'enkiizi za Pigisa." 
Joshua12:4 Na Ogi omugabe wa Bashani, omwe aha baatsigaireho omu Bareefa, owaabaire atwire Ashitarooti na Edurei," 
Joshua12:5 naategyeka Orushozi rwa Herumooni na Saaleka na Bashani yoona, okuhika aha mwatano gw'Abageshuri n'Abamaakati, kandi n'ekicweka kya Gileadi, okuhika ahu arikwatanira na Sihooni omugabe wa Heshibooni." 
Joshua12:6 Abo nibo Musa, omugaragwa wa Nyakubaho, n'Abaisiraeli baasingwire. Reero Musa, omugaragwa wa Nyakubaho, ensi yaabo egyo akagiha Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi n'ekicweka ky'oruganda rw'Abaamanaase, kuba eyaabo." 
Joshua12:7 Kandi aba nibo bagabe b'omuri egyo nsi abu Yoshwa n'Abaisiraeli baasinguriire orubaju rwa burengyerwa-izooba bwa Yorudaani, okwiha Baaligada omu ruhanga rwa Lebanooni okuta aha Rushozi Halaki orurikwinamura nirugaruka Seiri. Haza Yoshwa akaha ab'enganda za Isiraeli egyo nsi yaabo kugikubuura, nk'oku baagibagaine," 
Joshua12:8 omu nsi y'ebibungo n'omu mpita, omuri Araba, omu nkiizi, omu ihamba n'omuri Negebu, ensi y'Abahiiti, y'Abaamori, y'Abakanaani, y'Abapeerizi, y'Abahiizi n'ey'Abayeebusi:" 
Joshua12:9 omugabe wa Yeriko omwe; omugabe wa Aayi ey'aha rubaju rwa Beteli omwe; 
Joshua12:10 omugabe wa Yerusalemu omwe; omugabe wa Heburooni omwe; 
Joshua12:11 omugabe wa Yarimuuti omwe; omugabe wa Lakishi omwe; 
Joshua12:12 omugabe wa Egulooni omwe; n'omugabe wa Gezeri omwe; 
Joshua12:13 omugabe wa Debiri omwe; n'omugabe wa Gedori omwe; 
Joshua12:14 omugabe wa Horuma omwe; n'omugabe wa Aradi omwe; 
Joshua12:15 omugabe wa Libuna omwe; omugabe wa Adulaamu omwe; 
Joshua12:16 omugabe wa Makeda omwe; omugabe wa Beteli omwe; 
Joshua12:17 omugabe wa Taapua omwe; n'omugabe wa Heferi omwe; 
Joshua12:18 omugabe wa Afeki omwe, n'omugabe wa Lasharooni omwe;" 
Joshua12:19 omugabe wa Madoni omwe; n'omugabe wa Hazori omwe; 
Joshua12:20 omugabe wa Shiimurooni omwe; n'omugabe wa Akishaafa omwe; 
Joshua12:21 omugabe wa Taanaka omwe; omugabe wa Megido omwe; 
Joshua12:22 omugabe wa Kedeshi omwe; n'omugabe wa Yokineamu ey'omuri Karumeeli, omwe;" 
Joshua12:23 omugabe wa Doori omuri Naafatadoori, omwe; omugabe wa Goiimu omuri Galilaaya, omwe;" 
Joshua12:24 n'omugabe wa Tiriza omwe. Boona hamwe abagabe makumi ashatu n'omwe. 
Joshua13:1 Mbwenu obwo Yoshwa akaba yaakuzire, emyaka ye yairiireyo. Nyakubaho yaamugira ati: Reeba okuzire, ohikize engingo za bukuru, kandi hakiriho ensi mpango munonga y'okukubuura." 
Joshua13:2 Egi niyo nsi ekitsigaireho; ebyanga by'Abafilisiti byona, n'eby'Abagyeshuri byona" 
Joshua13:3 okwiha Shihori ey'aha burugwa-izooba bwa Misiri, okugarura obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, okuhika aha mwatano gwa Ekurooni erikumanywa ku eri ey'Abakanaani. Okwo hariyo abategyeki bataano b'Abafilisiti: owa Gaaza, owa Ashidoodi, owa Ashikelooni, owa Gaati n'owa Ekurooni kandi n'eby'Abaavi." 
Joshua13:4 Omu bukiizi-bwa-buryo, ensi yoona ey'Abakanaani, na Meara ey'Abasidoni, okuhika Afeki ahu erikwatanira n'ey'Abaamori," 
Joshua13:5 taho ensi y'Abagyebali, na Lebanooni yoona, ogurikugarura burugwa-izooba, okwiha Baaligadi eifo y'Orushozi Herumooni, okuta aharikutaahirwa omuri Hamati;" 
Joshua13:6 abatuuzi b'egyo nsi y'ebibungo boona, okwiha Lebanooni, okuta Misirefotimaimu; nangwa n'Abanyasidoni boona. Nyowe nyenka niinye ndaababingye, bakahigiza Abaisiraeli; kureka iwe egyo nsi ogibaganisize Abaisiraeli, bagihungure, nk'oku naakuragiire." 
Joshua13:7 Mbwenu nu, egi nsi ogibaganisize enganda mwenda, na kimwe kya kabiri eky'oruganda rwa Manaase, ebe eyaabo y'obutaka." 
Joshua13:8 Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi n'ekicweka ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase bakaheebwa ensi yaabo y'obutaka ei Musa yaabahaire seenu ya Yorudaani, orubaju rwa burugwa-izooba nk'oku Musa omugaragwa wa Nyakubaho yaagibahaire." 
Joshua13:9 Okwiha Aroeri aharikurengyera omu ruhanga rwa Arunooni, n'orurembo rw'ahagati y'orwo ruhanga n'omurambi gwona ogwa Medeeba, okuhika Dibooni;" 
Joshua13:10 kandi n'endembo zoona eza Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori, owaategyekyeire Heshibooni, okuhika aha mwatano gw'Abaamori," 
Joshua13:11 na Gileadi n'ekyanga ky'Abagyeshuri, n'Abamaaka, n'Orushozi Herumooni rwona na Bashani yoona, okuhika Saleka," 
Joshua13:12 taho obugabe bwa Oogi bwona obw'omuri Bashani, owaategyekyeire Ashitarooti na Edurei niwe wenka owaabaire atsigaireho omu Bareefa abo nibo Musa yaabaire asingwire, akabingamu;" 
Joshua13:13 kwonka Abaisiraeli tibarabingiremu Bagyeshuri nari Abamaaka, kureka Abagyeshuri nari bakaguma batwire omu Baisiraeli n'okuhitsya eri izooba." 
Joshua13:14 Ab'oruganda rwa Leevi bonka nibo Musa atarahaire nsi y'obutaka. Ebitambo ebi baabaire bookyeza Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli nibyo byabaire biba ebyabo by'oburagwa, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaagambiire Musa." 
Joshua13:15 Reero Musa akaha ab'oruganda rwa Reubeni ensi y'obuhunguzi, nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri." 
Joshua13:16 Mpaho ensi yaabo yaihirira Aroeri, erikurengyera omu ruhanga rwa Arunooni, n'orurembo rw'ahagati y'orwo ruhanga n'omurambi gwona, okuhika Medeeba," 
Joshua13:17 na Heshibooni n'endembo zaayo zoona ez'aha murambi; Dibooni na Bamotibaali na Betibaalimeoni," 
Joshua13:18 na Yaahaza na Kedemooti na Mefaati," 
Joshua13:19 na Kiriyataimu na Sibuma na Zeretishahaari, aha kabungo k'omuri orwo ruhanga," 
Joshua13:20 na Betipeori n'enkiizi za Pisiga, na Beeitiyeshimooti." 
Joshua13:21 Nikwo kugira ngu endembo zoona ez'ahari ogwo murambi, n'obugabe bwona obwa Sihooni omugabe w'Abaamori, owaategyekyeire Heshibooni, ou Musa yaasingwire, akasingura n'abategyeki ba Midiyani, Evi, Rekemu, Zuuri, Huuri, na Reba, abatware ba Sihooni abaabaire batwire omuri egyo nsi," 
Joshua13:22 na Balaamu omufumu mwene Beori, ou Abaisiraeli baitsize rurara, hamwe n'abu baahereerukire kwita." 
Joshua13:23 Reero omwatano gw'Abaareubeeni gukaba Yorudaani. Egyo niyo yaabaire ensi y'obuhunguzi bw'Abaareubeeni, nk'emiryango yaabo n'endembo zaabo n'ebyaro byabo oku byabaire biri." 
Joshua13:24 Kandi Musa akaha ab'oruganda rw'Abaagaadi ensi y'okuhungura, nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri." 
Joshua13:25 Ensi yaabo ekaba Yazeri n'endembo za Gileadi zoona n'ekicweka ky'ensi y'Abaamoni, okuhika Aroeri ey'aha burugwa-izooba bwa Raba;" 
Joshua13:26 kandi n'okwiha Heshibooni okuhitsya Raamatamizipe na Beetonimu; n'okwiha Mahanaimu okuta aha mwatano gw'ensi ya Lidebiri," 
Joshua13:27 n'omu ruhanga rwa Betihaaramu, Betiniimura, Sukooti na Zafoni, n'ekicweka ekirikutsigaraho ekya Sihooni, omugabe wa Heshibooni obwo Yorudaani eri omwatano, okuhika embari ya ifo, ahi Enyanja ya Kiinereeti erikugarukira, burugwa-izooba seenu ya Yorudaani." 
Joshua13:28 Egyo niyo nsi ei Abaagaadi baahungwire, nk'emiryango yaabo n'endembo zaabo n'ebyaro byabo oku byabaire biri." 
Joshua13:29 Kandi Musa, ekicweka ky'oruganda rw'Abaamanaase akakiha eitaka ry'obuhunguzi. Ryabaganisizibwa ekicweka ky'oruganda rw'Abaamanaase, nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri." 
Joshua13:30 Ekyanga kyabo kikaiha Mahanaimu, kyataaguza kyayoga omuri Bashani yoona; obugabe bwona obwa Oogi omugabe wa Bashani; nebirorero byona bya Yairi eby'omuri Bashani, endembo makumi mukaaga," 
Joshua13:31 n'ekicweka kya Gileadi na Ashitarooti na Edurei; endembo z'obugabe bwa Oogi omuri Bashani. Ebyo bakabibaganisiza beene Makiri, mutabani wa Manaase, ekicweka ky'Abaamakiri, nk'oku emiryango yaabo eri." 
Joshua13:32 Ezo nizo nsi z'obuhunguzi ezi Musa yaagabiire omu mpita za Moabu seenu ya Yorudaani, burugwa-izooba bwa Yeriko." 
Joshua13:33 Kwonka ab'oruganda rwa Leevi bo Musa tarabahaire nsi y'obutaka; Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli niwe buhunguzi bwabo nk'oku yaabagambiire. 
Joshua14:1 Ezi nizo nsi z'obutaka ezi Abaisiraeli baahairwe omu nsi ya Kanaani, ezi Eleazaari omuhongyerezi na Yoshwa mwene Nuuni n'abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo baababaganisiize." 
Joshua14:2 Ezo nsi zaabo z'obutaka bakaziteerera enteenyu, enganda mwenda n'ekicweka, nka Nyakubaho oku yaaragiire Musa." 
Joshua14:3 Manya Musa akaba yaaheereire obutaka enganda ibiri n'ekicweka seenu ya Yorudaani; kwonka Abaleevi atabubaheereiremu. 
Joshua14:4 Beene Yosefu bakaba bari enganda ibiri: orwa Manaase n'orwa Efuraimu kandi Abaleevi omuri egyo nsi tibarahairwemu mugabo, kureka endembo z'okutuuramu zonka n'emyanya y'okuriisizamu amatungo gaabo n'ey'ebintu byabo." 
Joshua14:5 Abaisiraeli batyo baakora nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa; baabagana egyo nsi. 
Joshua14:6 Bwanyima Abaayuda bakaija ahari Yoshwa Giligaali. Kalebu mwene Yefuune Omukenizi yaamugira ati: Noomanya ebyangye naiwe, ebi Nyakubaho yaagambiire Musa omuheereza wa Ruhanga omuri Kadeshibarinea." 
Joshua14:7 Obwo nkaba nyine emyaka makumi ana y'obukuru, obu Musa omugaragwa wa Nyakubaho antuma kuruga Kadeshibarinea kutata ensi, naanye nkamureetera amakuru g'ebi naabaire nimmanya ku biri eby'amazima." 
Joshua14:8 Kwonka beene waitu abu naagyenzire nabo bakahahaaza abantu omutima, haza nyowe naakuratirira kimwe Mukama Ruhanga wangye." 
Joshua14:9 Kandi eryo izooba Musa akarahira naagira ati: Buzimazima ensi ei oribatsizemu ekigyere kyawe eryaba eyaawe ey'obutaka, hamwe na baijukuru baawe ebiro byona, ahabw'okuba okuratiriire kimwe Mukama Ruhanga wangye." 
Joshua14:10 Mbwenu hati reeba Nyakubaho andinzire, naaguma mpuriire, nk'oku yaagambire, egi myaka makumi ana n'etaano, okwiha obu yaagambira Musa ekyo kigambo Abaisiraeli bakiri omu rugyendo omu ihamba. Hati reeba, eri izooba naahitsya emyaka makumi munaana n'etaano y'obukuru." 
Joshua14:11 N'eri izooba nkiine amaani nk'agu naabaire nyine buri obu Musa yantuma; na hati amaani gangye gakiri nk'oku gaabaire gari buri nindwana orugamba, nimpurura kandi nintabaaruka." 
Joshua14:12 N'ahabw'ekyo mpa egi nsi y'ebibungo ei Nyakubaho yaagambireho buri. Manya naiwe eryo izooba okahurira oku Abaanaki baabaire bariyo, baine endembo mpango z'engo zigumire. Obundi Nyakubaho akaaguma naanye mbabinga, nk'oku yaagambire." 
Joshua14:13 Yoshwa atyo amushabire omugisha, aha Kalebu ogwo mwene Yefuune Heburooni kuba eye y'obutaka." 
Joshua14:14 Heburooni eba etyo obutaka bwa Kalebu mwene Yefuune Omukenizi n'okuhitsya eri izooba, ahabw'okuba akakuratirira kimwe Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
Joshua14:15 Mbwenu Heburooni egyo ira ekaba eyetwa Kiriyataraba, kandi Araba ogwo ari omuntu mukuru rugambwa omu Baanaki. Bwanyima egyo nsi yaahuumura engamba." 
Joshua15:1 Ekyanga ki Abaayuda baabagaine nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri kikaba nikigarura aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, kihika aha mwatano gwa Edomu, aha ihamba rya Ziini, aha muheru gw'orwo rubaju;" 
Joshua15:2 kandi omwatano gwabo gw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo gwiha aha muheru gw'Enyanja y'Omwonyo, aha mukono gwayo ogurikureeba aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo," 
Joshua15:3 gwogamu guhika aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo aharikwinamuka Akarabimu, gugumizamu guhika Ziini, gunyegyerera aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo obwa Kadeshibarinea, guraba haihi na Hezirooni, gwinamuka guhika Adaari, gukiikama guhika Karaka." 
Joshua15:4 Okuruga aho gugumizamu guhika Azimooni, gwogamu gushuuma n'akagyera ka Misiri, gutyo gugarukira aha Nyanja. Ogwo nigwo guraabe omwatano gwanyu gw'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo." 
Joshua15:5 Omwatano ogw'aha burugwa-izooba n'Enyanja y'Omwonyo okuhika ahi Yorudaani egishukiramu. Omwatano gw'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho nigwiha aha mukono gw'Egyo Nyanja, ahi Yorudaani erikugishukiramu;" 
Joshua15:6 mbwenu ogwo mwatano gutemba guhika Beetihogola, guraba aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho bwa Beetaraba, gugumizamu guhika aha ibaare rya Bohaani mwene Reubeeni;" 
Joshua15:7 kandi gwinamuka niguruga omu ruhanga rwa Akori guhika Debiri; gutyo gutoora aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, gukiikama nigugarura Giligaali, ahashungaine n'akatembo ka Adumimu, aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo bw'orwo ruhanga. Kandi ogwo mwatano gukaba gugumizamu guhika aha maizi ga Ensheemeshi, gugarukira Eniroogyeli;" 
Joshua15:8 bwanyima gunyegyera niguraba aha ruhanga rwa mwene Hiinomu, aha rubaju rwa buryo rw'obukiizi bwa Yebusi, niyo Yerusalemu; reero gugumizamu guhika aha mutwe gw'orushozi orushungaine n'oruhanga rwa Hiinomu embari ya burengyerwa-izooba aha muheru gw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho bw'oruhanga rw'Abareefa;" 
Joshua15:9 mpaho gwiha aha mutwe gw'orwo rushozi, gugumizamu guhika aha nshuro y'Amaizi ga Neefutoa; kandi gwiha aho guhika aha ndembo z'Orushozi rwa Efurooni; gukiikama guhika Baala, niyo Kiriyatiyearimu;" 
Joshua15:10 reero gwehinguririza burengyerwa-izooba bwa Baala guhika aha Rushozi Seiri; gugumizamu guhika aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buimosho obw'orushozi rwa Yearimu niyo Kesalooni; gushuuma guhika Betisheemeshi; gugumizamu guraba ahari Tiimuna; 
Joshua15:11 mpaho gwogamu guhika aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho bw'akabungo ka Ekurooni, gukiikama nigugarura Shikerooni, gugumizamu guhika aha rukiizi rwa Baala; gwogaho guhika Yabuneeli; gutyo gugarukira aha Nyanja." 
Joshua15:12 Kandi omwatano ogw'ahari burengyerewa-izooba gukaba guri Enyanja Empango n'omwegyeego gwayo. Ogwo nigwo mwatano gw'Abaayuda, nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri." 
Joshua15:13 Mbwenu, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire Yoshwa, Yoshwa ogwo akaha Kalebu mwene Yefuune ekyanga omu by'Abaayuda, ekirikwetwa Kiriyataraba, niyo Heburooni; Araba ogwo niwe ishe wa Anaki." 
Joshua15:14 Reero Kalebu yaabingamu beene Anaki bashatu, Shehai na Ahamaani na Talumai, baijukuru ba Anaki." 
Joshua15:15 Ku aruga okwo, anyegyera, arwanisa abatuuzi ba Debiri. Obunyakare Debiri egyo ekaba neeyetwa Kiriyatiseeferi." 
Joshua15:16 Reero Kalebu agira ati: Oraateere Kiriyatiseeferi akagikubuura, niinyija kumuhingira muhara wangye Akisa." 
Joshua15:17 Mpaho Otinieli mwene Keanazi, murumuna wa Kalebu, agikwata; n'onu amuha omuhara Akisa, amushwera." 
Joshua15:18 Ogwo mukazi ku ahika omwa iba, iba amwehanangiriza kushaba ishe ekibanja. Mbwenu ogwo mukazi ku atemburuka ati aha ndogoya, Kalebu amubuuza ati: Nooyenda ki?" 
Joshua15:19 Onu amugarukamu ati: Ninkweshengyereza, ongirire embabazi. Nk'oku ontaire omu nsi ya Negebu eyomire, ompe ahaine enshuro z'amaizi. Kalebu atyo amuha enshuro z'eruguru n'eza ifo." 
Joshua15:20 Obu nibwo butaka bw'ab'oruganda rw'Abaayuda, nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri." 
Joshua15:21 Endembo z'ab'oruganda rw'Abaayuda eziri aha muheru gw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo ogurikureeba aha mwatano gwa Edomu, zikaba: Kabuzeeli, Ederi," 
Joshua15:22 Yaguri, Kiina, Dimoona, Adaada," 
Joshua15:23 Kedeshi, Hazori, Itanaani" 
Joshua15:24 Ziifu, Telemu, Bealooti," 
Joshua15:25 Haazazoihadaati, Keriotihezirooni niyo Hazori;" 
Joshua15:26 Amamu, Shema, Molaada," 
Joshua15:27 Hazaragaada, Heshimooni, Beetipeleti," 
Joshua15:28 Haazarishuali, Beerisheba, Biziotiya," 
Joshua15:29 Baala, Iimu, Ezemu," 
Joshua15:30 Elitookadi, Cesili, Horuma," 
Joshua15:31 Zikulaagi, Madamaana, Sansaana," 
Joshua15:32 Lebaoti, Shilihimu, Aini, na Rimooni; zoona hamwe endembo makumi abiri na mwenda n'ebyaro byazo." 
Joshua15:33 Kandi ez'omu mpita ni Eshitaoli, Zoora, Ashina," 
Joshua15:34 Zonoa, Enganimu, Tapua, Enamu," 
Joshua15:35 Yarimuuti, Adulaamu, Soko, Azeeka," 
Joshua15:36 Shaaraimu, Aditaimu, Gedeera, Gederotaimu; nizo ndembo ikumi na ina n'ebyaro byazo." 
Joshua15:37 Zeenani, Hadaasha, Migidaligaadi," 
Joshua15:38 Dileyani, Mizipe, Yokoteeli," 
Joshua15:39 Lakishi, Bozikati, Egulooni," 
Joshua15:40 Kaboni, Lahimaamu, Kitiliishi," 
Joshua15:41 Gederooti, Betidaagoni, Naama na Makeda; nizo ndembo ikumi na mukaaga n'ebyaro byazo." 
Joshua15:42 Libuna, Eteri, Ashani," 
Joshua15:43 Ifuta, Ashina, Nezibu," 
Joshua15:44 Keila, Akazibu na Meeresha. Nizo ndembo mwenda n'ebyaro byazo;" 
Joshua15:45 Ekurooni n'ebirorero byarwo n'ebyaro byarwo; 
Joshua15:46 okwiha Ekurooni okuta aha Nyanja; endembo zoona ezaabaire zihereeraine na Ashidoodi hamwe n'ebyaro byazo; 
Joshua15:47 Ashidoodi n'ebirorero byarwo n'ebyaro byarwo; Gaaza n'ebirorero byarwo n'ebyaro byarwo, okuhika aha Kagyera ka Misiri n'Enyanja Empango hamwe n'omwegyeego gwayo." 
Joshua15:48 Kandi omu nsi ey'ebibungo ni Shamiri, Yatiri, Soko," 
Joshua15:49 Daana, Kiriyatisaana niyo Debiri," 
Joshua15:50 Anabu, Eshitemo, Animu," 
Joshua15:51 Gosheni, Holoni na Giilo; nizo ndembo ikumi na rumwe n'ebyaro byazo;" 
Joshua15:52 Arabu, Duma, Eshani," 
Joshua15:53 Yanimu, Betitaapua, Afeeka," 
Joshua15:54 Kumuta, Kiiriyataraba, niyo Heburooni na Ziori; endembo mwenda n'ebyaro byazo." 
Joshua15:55 Maoni, Karumeeli, Ziifu, Yuuta," 
Joshua15:56 Yezereeli, Yokodeamu, Zanoa," 
Joshua15:57 Kaini, Gibea na Timuna; endembo ikumi n'ebyaro byazo;" 
Joshua15:58 Halihuuli, Betizuuri, Gedero," 
Joshua15:59 Maarati, Betanooti, na Elitakoni; endembo mukaaga n'ebyaro byazo;" 
Joshua15:60 Kiriyatibaali niyo Kiriyaati-Yearimu na raba; endembo ibiri n'ebyaro byazo. 
Joshua15:61 Ez'omu ihamba n'ezi: Betaraba, Midini, Sekaaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibushani, Orurembo rw'Omwonyo, na Engedi; endembo mukaaga n'ebyaro byazo." 
Joshua15:63 Kwonka Abayebusi, nibo batuuzi ba Yerusalemu, Abaayuda tibarababingiremu. N'ahabw'ekyo Abayebusi batuura hamwe n'Abaayuda Yerusalemu, okuhitsya n'eri izooba." 
Joshua16:1 Ekyanga ki baijukuru ba Yosefu baabagaine kikaba nikitandikira Yorudaani haihi na Yeriko, aha rubaju rw'amaizi ga Yeriko aga burugwa-izooba, okuhika omu ihamba; kiinamura nikiiha Yeriko, kiza omu nsi y'ebibungo kihika Beteli." 
Joshua16:2 Reero kiruga Beteli kihika Luuzi; kigumizamu kihika Atarooti, ensi y'Abaaruki." 
Joshua16:3 Bwanyima kirunduka nikigarura burugwa-izooba kihika aha mwatano gw'ensi y'Abayafuleeti, okuhikira kimwe aha mwatano gwa Betihorooni ey'eifo; kigumizamu kihika Geza kugarukira aha Nyanja." 
Joshua16:4 Abaayosefu: Manaase na Efuraimu, bakatunga obutaka bwabo." 
Joshua16:5 Ekyanga ky'Abaefuraimu, nk'oku emiryango yaabo yaabaire eri, kyaba kiti: Omwatano gw'obutaka bwabo ahari burugwa-izooba gukaiha Atarooti-adara, gwahika Betihorooni eya ruguru;" 
Joshua16:6 kandi gwaiha aho gwata aha Nyanja. Aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho ni Mikimeeta. Reero ahari burugwa-izooba omwatano gwakuba nigugarura Tanatishioli, gwagumizamu gwaraba burugwa-izooba gwahika Yanoa." 
Joshua16:7 Reero gwarunduka nigwiha Yanoa gwata Atarooti na Naara, gwahika Yeriko gwagarukira Yorudaani." 
Joshua16:8 Okwiha Tapua ogwo mwatano gutoora buregyerwa-izooba, guhika aha Kagyera Kana, gugarukira aha Nyanja. Obwo nibwo butaka bw'oruganda rw'Abaefuraimu, nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri," 
Joshua16:9 hamwe n'ebirorero ebyatairwe hangahari ahabw'Abaefuraimu omu nsi y'obutaka bw'Abaamanaase; ebyo birorero byona n'ebyaro byabyo. 
Joshua16:10 Kwonka shi tibarabingiremu Banyakanaani abaabaire batwire Gezeri. N'ahabw'ekyo Abanyakanaani batuura hamwe n'Abaefuraimu, okuhitsya n'eri izooba; kwonka bari ab'okukora emirimo y'obuhuuku." 
Joshua17:1 Manaase, ahabw'okuba omujigaijo gwa Yosefu, ab'oruganda rwe bakabaganisizibwa ekyanga kyabo bati: Abaamakiri omujigaijo gwa Manaase, ishe wa Gileadi, bakaheebwa Gileadi na Bashani, ahabw'okuba Makiri akaba ari omurwani rugambwa." 
Joshua17:2 Reero ebindi byanga byabaganisizibwa abandi ab'oruganda rwa Manaase nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri, Abiezeri, Haleki, Asirieli, Shekemu, Heferi na Shemiida; abashaija baijukuru ba Manaase mwene Yosefu, nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri." 
Joshua17:3 Mbwenu Zelofehaadi mutabani wa Heferi, mwene Gileadi, Gileadi ya Makiri, Makiri ya Manaase, akaba atazaire boojo, kureka abaishiki bonka: Mahala, Noa, Hogula, Mulika na Tiriza." 
Joshua17:4 Abo baishiki bakaija omu maisho ga Eleazaari omuhongyerezi na Yoshwa mwene Nuuni n'abakuru b'eihanga, baagira bati Mukama akaragiira Musa kubaha obutaka hamwe na banyaanyabo ba ishebo nk'oku Mukama yaaragiire." 
Joshua17:5 Batyo Abaamanaase baahebwa ebyanga ikumi, otabariiremu Gileadi na Bashani ebiri seenu ya Yorudaani;" 
Joshua17:6 ahabw'okuba bahara ba Manaase bakaheebwa obutaka, hamwe na batabani be. Reero ensi eya Gileadi yaabaganisizibwa Abaamanaase abaatsigaraho." 
Joshua17:7 Ekyanga ky'Abaamanaase kikaba nikiiha Asheri, kita Mikemeeta ey'aha burugwa-izooba bwa Shekemu. Mpaho omwatano gugumizamu nigugarura obukiizi-bwa-buryo, guhika omu batuuzi ba Entapua." 
Joshua17:8 Ensi ya Tapua ekaba ey'Abaamanaase, kwonka orurembo Tapua orw'aha mwatano gw'Abaamanaase rwaba orwa beene Efuraimu." 
Joshua17:9 Ogwo mwatano gurunduka guhika aha Kagyera Kana. Endembo zaayo ezirikugarura aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo bw'ako kagyera, ez'omu ndembo z'Abaamanaase zaaba eza beene Efuraimu; mpaho omwatano gw'Abaamanaase gugumizamu embari y'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho bw'ako kagyera gugarukira aha Nyanja;" 
Joshua17:10 obwo ensi y'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho eri ey'Abaefuraimu, kandi ey'ahabwa buryo eri ey'Abaamanaase hamwe n'Enyanja erikubaatanisa. Aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho baayatana na Asheri, kandi aha burugwa-izooba baayatana na Isakaari." 
Joshua17:11 Hoona omu Baisakaari n'omu Baasheri, Manaase akatungamu Betisheani n'ebyaro byayo, na Ibuleamu n'ebyaro byayo, hamwe n'abatuuzi ba Endori n'ebyaro byayo, n'aba Taanaka n'ebyaro byayo, n'aba Megido n'ebyaro byayo n'ekyanga kya kashatu eky'ebibungo." 
Joshua17:12 Kwonka Abaamanaase ku baaremirwe kubinga abatwire omuri ezo ndembo, Abanyakanaani baaguma bazitwiremu." 
Joshua17:13 Haza Abaisiraeli ku baaherize kuhama, baakoresa Abanyakanaani emirimo y'obuhuuku, tibaababingiramu kimwe." 
Joshua17:14 Mbwenu ab'oruganda rwa Yosefu bakeetonganira ahari Yoshwa bati: Ahabw'enki otuhaire omugabo gw'ekyanga kimwe kuba obutaka bwaitu, haza turi baingi munonga, kandi Nyakubaho atuhaire emigisha n'okuhitsya hati?" 
Joshua17:15 Yoshwa abagarukamu ati: Ku muraabe muri baingi munonga, nimwirooko muze omu kibira ky'omu nsi y'Abapeerizi n'Abareefa mukyetemuururire, ahabw'okuba ensi y'ebibungo ey'Abaefuraimu terikubahika." 
Joshua17:16 Ab'oruganda rwa Yosefu bamugarukamu bati: Ensi y'ebibungo titurikugihikamu; kandi Abanyakanaani boona abatwire omu mpita ab'omuri Betisheani n'ebyaro byayo, n'ab'omu ruhanga rwa Yezereeli, baine ebigaari by'ebyoma." 
Joshua17:17 Yoshwa nawe agira ab'omuryango gwa Yosefu, Abaefuraimu n'Abaamanaase, ati: Muri baingi munonga kandi ab'amaani, nikyo mutashemerereire kuheebwa omugabo gumwe gwonka;" 
Joshua17:18 mbwenu ensi y'ebibungo ebe eyaanyu. Nobu eraabe eri ey'ebibira, mugitemuurure, ebe eyaanyu okuhikira kimwe aha myatano yaayo ey'aha muheru. Ahabw'okuba nimwija kubingamu Abanyakanaani, nobu baraabe baine ebigaari by'ebyoma, kandi bari ab'amaani." 
Joshua18:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli ryona ryateeranira Shiilo, ryateerayo eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu; obwo ensi ebagomookyeire." 
Joshua18:2 Kwonka omu Baisiraeli hakaba hakitsigairemu enganda mushanju ezitakabaganisiziibwe itaka ryazo ry'obuhunguzi," 
Joshua18:3 Yoshwa nikwo kugira Abaisiraeli ati: Nimuherera hi kweganda kuza kukubuura ensi ei Mukama Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe yaabahaire? 
Joshua18:4 Nimutoorane abashaija bashatu omu buri ruganda, mbatume, bagyende hoonahoona omuri egyo nsi, bahandiikye oku ebyanga byayo bishemereire kukubuurwa, na bwanyima bagarukye ahi ndi." 
Joshua18:5 Bagibaganisemu ebyanga mushanju. Abaayuda bagume omu kicweka kyabo eky'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo; n'ab'omuryango gwa Yosefu omu kyabo eky'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho. 
Joshua18:6 Kandi muhandiikye nimushoboorora eby'egyo nsi omu bicweka muahanju. Haza ebi mwahandiika mubindeetere; naanye mbateerere enteenyu omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waitu. 
Joshua18:7 Abaleevi bo ti b'okubagana naimwe, ahabw'okuba obuhunguzi bwabo n'okuba abahongyerezi ba Nyakubaho. Kandi Abaagaadi n'Abaareubeeni n'ekicweka ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase baaherize kuheebwa eitaka ryabo ry'obuhunguzi seeri ya Yorudaani embari ya burugwa-izooba, eri Musa omugaragwa wa Mukama yaabahaire." 
Joshua18:8 Batyo abo bashaija baimutsya orugyendo, na Yoshwa abeehanangiriza kuhandiika eby'egyo nsi, naabagira ati: Mugyende hoonahoona muhandiikye nimushoboorora eby'egyo nsi. Reero mugarukye ahi ndi; naanye mbateerere enteenyu Shiilo, omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Joshua18:9 Mpaho abo bashaija bagyenda, bahika hoonahoona omuri egyo nsi, haza bahandiika omu kitabo nibashoboorora ebyayo omu bicweka mushanju nibareebera aha ndembo. Bwanyima bagaruka ahi Yoshwa ari omu rusiisira rwa Shiilo;" 
Joshua18:10 nawe abateerera enteenyu Shiilo omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. Kandi aho Yoshwa aba niho yaabaganisiza Abaisiraeli egyo nsi, buri ruganda ekyanga kyarwo." 
Joshua18:11 Enteenyu ekakwata ab'oruganda rwa Benyamiini, nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri; ekyanga ki baahairwe kyaba ahagati y'eky'Abaayuda n'eky'Abaayosefu." 
Joshua18:12 Aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho omwatano gwabo gwatandikira Yorudaani, gwagumizamu gwahika aha rubaju rwa Yeriko; gwainamuka gwaraba omu nsi y'ebibungo orubaju rwa burengyerwa-izooba, gwagarukira aha ihamba rya Betaaveni." 
Joshua18:13 Okwiha aho, ogwo mwatano guraba aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo nigutoora Luuzi, guhika aha rubaju rwa Luuzi egyo niyo Beteli bwanyima gurunduka, guhika Atarooti adara aha rushozi oruri aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo bwa Betihorooni eya ifo;" 
Joshua18:14 gutyo gutoora orundi rubaju, gukiikamira aha rubaju rwa burengyerwa-izooba aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, nigwiha aha rushozi oruri aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo aharikureebana na Betihorooni, gugarukira Kiriyatabali niyo Kiriyatiyearimu orurembo ry'Abaayuda. Orwo nirwo rubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba." 
Joshua18:15 Reero orubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo nigutandikira ahi Kiriyatiyearimu erikugarukira; gwiha aho gugumizamu guhika Efurooni, aha nshuro z'amaizi ga Nefutoa;" 
Joshua18:16 gutyo gushuuma guhika aha mwatano gw'orushozi orurikureebana n'oruhanga rwa mwene Hiinomu, oruri aha muheru gw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho bw'orwo ruhanga rw'Abareefa; gushuumira omu ruhanga rwa Hiinomu aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo obw'aha rubaju rw'Abayebusi, gurunduka guhika Eniroogyeli;" 
Joshua18:17 reero gukiikama nigugarura obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, gugumizamu guhika Ensheemeshi; guruga aho guhika Gelilooti, ahashungaine n'akatembo ka Adumimu; mpaho gushuuma guhika aha ibaare rya Bohaani mwene Reubeeni;" 
Joshua18:18 gugumizamu guhika aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho bw'aha rubaju rwa Betaraba, gushuuma guhika Araba;" 
Joshua18:19 bwanyima gugumizamu guhika aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, aha rubaju rwa Betihogala; gutyo gugarukira aha mukono gw'Enyanja y'Omwonyo, aha muheru gw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo obwa Yorudaani. Ogwo nigwo mwatano gw'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo." 
Joshua18:20 Yorudaani niyo mwatano gwayo gw'aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba. Obwo nibwo butaka bw'ab'oruganda rwa Benyamiini, nk'oku miryango yaabo eri, n'oku omwatano gwayo guri aha mbaju zoona." 
Joshua18:21 Mbwenu ezi nizo ndembo z'ab'oruganda rw'Abaabenyamiini, nk'emiryango yaabo oku yaabaire eri: Yeriko, Betihogala, Emekeezi," 
Joshua18:22 Betaraba, Zemaraimu, Beteli," 
Joshua18:23 Aviimu, Para, Ofura," 
Joshua18:24 Keefazimooni, Ofuni, Geba-endembo ikumi na ibiri n'ebyaro byazo:" 
Joshua18:25 Gibeoni, Raama, Beerooti," 
Joshua18:26 Mizipe, Kefiira, Moza," 
Joshua18:27 Rekemu, Iripeeli, Taarala," 
Joshua18:28 Zela, Haelifu, Yeebu, niyo Yerusalemu, Gibea na Kiriyayearimu endembo ikumi na ina n'ebyaro byazo. Obwo nibwo butaka bw'ab'oruganda rwa Benyamiini, nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri." 
Joshua19:1 Enteenyu ya kabiri ekakwata Simeoni, nibo b'oruganda rwa Simeoni, nk'oku emiryango yaabo eri. Eitaka ry'obuhunguzi bwabo ryaba ahagati y'ery'Abaayuda." 
Joshua19:2 Kandi orwo ruganda eitaka ryarwo ry'obuhunguzi ryaba, Beerisheba, Sheeba, Molaada," 
Joshua19:3 Hazarishuali, Bala, Ezemu," 
Joshua19:4 Elitolaadi, Betuli, Horuma," 
Joshua19:5 Zikulaagi, Betimaarikaboti, Haazarisuusa," 
Joshua19:6 Betileboati na Sharuuheni endembo ikumi na ishatu n'ebyaro byazo; 
Joshua19:7 taho Aini, Rimoni, Eteri na Ashani endembo ina n'ebyaro byazo;" 
Joshua19:8 hamwe n'ebyaro byona ebizeehinguririize okuhikira kimwe Baalatibeero, niyo Raama eya Negebu. Obwo nibwo butaka bw'Abaasimeoni nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri." 
Joshua19:9 Obutaka bw'ab'oruganda rwa Simeoni bukacuubwa aha kyanga ky'Abaayuda, ahabw'okuba omugabo gw'ab'oruganda rw'Abaayuda gukaba guri muhango munonga, nigubakira. Ab'oruganda rwa Simeoni nikwo kutunga eitaka ry'obuhunguzi ahagati y'eryabo." 
Joshua19:10 Enteenyu ya kashatu ekakwata ab'oruganda rwa Zebuluuni nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri; ekyanga ky'obuhunguzi bwabo kyahikira kimwe Saridi. 
Joshua19:11 Omwatano gwakyo gwainamuka nigugarura burengyerwa-izooba, gwagumizamu gwahika Maareali, gwakora ahari Dabesheeti n'akagyera k'ahari burugwa-izooba bwa Yokoneamu;" 
Joshua19:12 okwiha Saradi, gwagumizamu nigutoora burugwa-izooba, ei eizooba rituruka, gwahika aha mwatano gwa Kisilootitabori; gutyo gwaza Daabera gwainamuka gwaza Yafiiya;" 
Joshua19:13 okwiha aho gwaraba burugwa-izooba ei eizooba rituruka, gwahika Gatiheferi na Etikazini, gwagumizamu gwahika Rimoni, gwakiikama nigugarura Nea;" 
Joshua19:14 reero aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho ogwo mwatano gwakiikama nigugarura Haanatoni, gwagarukira aha ruhanga rwa Ifutaheeli," 
Joshua19:15 na Kaata, Naahalali, Shimurooni, Idala na Beetelehemu endembo ikumi na ibiri n'ebyaro byazo." 
Joshua19:16 Obwo nibwo butaka bw'ab'oruganda rw'Abaazebuluuni, nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri endembo n'ebyaro byazo." 
Joshua19:17 Enteenyu ya kana ekakwata Isakaari, ahabw'ab'oruganda rwa Isakaari, nk'oku emiryango yaabo eri." 
Joshua19:18 Ekyanga kyabo kyabamu Yezereeli, Kesulooti, Shuneemu," 
Joshua19:19 Haafaraimu, Shioni, Anaaharata," 
Joshua19:20 Raabiti, Kiishioni, Ebezi," 
Joshua19:21 Remeti, Enganimu, Enihaada, Betipaazeri." 
Joshua19:22 Omwatano gwakora n'ahari Tabora, Shahazuuma na Betishemeshi; mpaho omwatano gwakyo gwagarukira ahari Yorudaani endembo ikumi na mukaaga n'ebyaro byazo." 
Joshua19:23 Obwo nibwo butaka bw'ab'oruganda rwa Isakaari nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri endembo n'ebyaro byazo. 
Joshua19:24 Enteenyu ya kataano ekakwata ab'oruganda rwa Asheri nk'oku emiryango yaabo eri. 
Joshua19:25 Ekyanga kyabo kyabamu Helikata, Hali, Peteni, Akishaafu," 
Joshua19:26 Alameleki, Amadi na Miishali. Ahari buregyerwa-izooba, kyakora ahari Karumeeli na Shihoriliibuna;" 
Joshua19:27 kityo kyakiikama kyagarura burugwa-izooba, kyaza Betidagoni, kandi kyakora ahari Zebuluuni n'aha ruhanga rwa Iifutaheli, ogurikugarura obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, okuta Betemeki na Neieli, kityo kigumizamu obukiizi-bwa-bumosho kihika Kabuli," 
Joshua19:28 Eburooni, Rehobu, Hamooni, Kana, okuhikira kimwe Sidoni Empango." 
Joshua19:29 Reero omwatano gukuba guza Raama, guhika aha kigo ky'orurembo rwa Tuuro; gukiikama guza Hoosa, gugarukira aha nyanja n'ahari Mahalabu, Akazibu," 
Joshua19:30 Uuma, Afekina Rehobu nizo ndembo makumi abiri na ibiri n'ebyaro byazo." 
Joshua19:31 Obwo nibwo butaka bw'ab'oruganda rwa Asheri nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri endembo n'ebyaro byazo. 
Joshua19:32 Enteenyu ya mukaaga ekakwata oruganda rwa Nafutaali, ahabw'ab'oruganda rwe, nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri." 
Joshua19:33 Omwatano gwabo gwaiha Helefu, aha muvure gwa Zaananimu na Adaminekebu na Yabuneeli, okuhikira kimwe Laakumu; gwagarukira ahari Yorudaani;" 
Joshua19:34 guhinduka gugarura burengyerwa-izooba guhika Azonotaabori; guruga aho guza Huukoki, guteera enkokora ahari Zebuluuni aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, n'ahari Asheri aha burengyerwa-izooba, na Yuda ahari burugwa-izooba, ahari Yorudaani." 
Joshua19:35 Endembo eziine ebigo ni Zidimu, Zeeri, Haamati, Raakati, Kinereeti," 
Joshua19:36 Adama, Raama, Hazori," 
Joshua19:37 Kedeshi, Edurei, Enihaazori," 
Joshua19:38 Yirooni, Migadaleeli, Horemu, Betanaati na Betishemeshi endembo ikumi na mwenda n'ebyaro byazo." 
Joshua19:39 Obwo nibwo butaka bw'ab'oruganda rwa Nafutaali nk'oku emiryango yaabo eri-endembo n'ebyaro byazo. 
Joshua19:40 Enteenyu ya mushanju ekakwata ab'oruganda rwa Daani nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri. 
Joshua19:41 Ekyanga ky'obuhunguzi bwabo kyabamu Zoora, Eshitaoli, Irisheemeshi," 
Joshua19:42 Shaalabiini, Aiyalooni, Ithala," 
Joshua19:43 Eleni, Timuna, Ekurooni," 
Joshua19:44 Eliteke, Giibetoni, Baala," 
Joshua19:45 Yehudi, Benebeeraki, Gatirimooni," 
Joshua19:46 Meyarikooni na Rakooni hamwe n'ekyanga ekirikureebana na Yopa. 
Joshua19:47 Kwonka Abaadaani ku baaremesiibwe ab'ekyanga kyabo, bainamuka baarwana n'aba Leshemu. Ku baaherize kugikwata n'okugiitsa rurara, baagikubuura, baagituuramu. Leshemu egyo baagyeta Daani, nibagyeterera Daani ishenkurubo." 
Joshua19:48 Obwo nibwo butaka bw'ab'oruganda rwa Daani nk'oku emiryango yaabo eri-endembo hamwe n'ebyaro byazo. 
Joshua19:49 Abaisiraeli ku baaherize kubagana ebyanga by'egyo nsi kuba obutaka bwabo, nk'emyatano yaabyo oku eri, baaha Yoshwa mwene Nuuni eitaka ry'obuhunguzi omuribo kuba erye ahabwe." 
Joshua19:50 Ahabw'okuragiirwa Nyakubaho, baamuha orurembo oru yaashabire, nirwo Tiimuratiseera omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu; yaayombeka busya orwo rurembo, yaarutuuramu." 
Joshua19:51 Ebyo nibyo byanga by'obuhunguzi ebi Eleazaari omuhongyerezi na Yoshwa mwene Nuuni n'abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo ab'enganda z'Abaisiraeli baabaganisiize Shiilo, nibateerera enteenyu omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu. Baaheza batyo kubaganisa egyo nsi." 
Joshua20:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Nyakubaho yaagira Yoshwa ati:" 
Joshua20:2 Gambira Abaisiraeli oti: Mutoorane endembo z'okuhungiramu ezi naaragiire Musa kubagambira," 
Joshua20:3 ngu omuntu oriita mugyenzi we atamwitsire nkana, nari atakimanyire, ahungiremu. Zibe omwanya gwanyu gw'okuhungiramu orikwenda kuhoora enzigu." 
Joshua20:4 Kiita ahungire omuri rumwe ahari ezo ndembo, haza ayemerere aha irembo ryarwo, ashoboororere abakuru baarwo eki akozire, nabo barumutaasyemu, bamuhe omwanya, agume nabo." 
Joshua20:5 Reero kihoora nzigu ku arimukurata, batarimumurekurira kumwita; ahabw'okuba kiita ogwo akaita mutaahi we atamumanyire, ataine nawe nzigu omu biro bihwaire." 
Joshua20:6 Kandi kiita agume omuri orwo rurembo okuhitsya obu aryemerera omu maisho g'oruteerane rw'abantu kucwerwa orubanja, n'okuhitsya obu oriba ari omuhongyerezi omukuru omuri obwo bunaku arifa. Obwo nibwo aribaasa kugaruka omu kirorero ky'owaabo n'omu ka ye, omu rurembo ru yaahungiremu." 
Joshua20:7 Batyo baatoorana Kedeshi ey'omuri Galilaaya, omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Nafutaali; na Shekemu ey'omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu; na Kiriyataraba, niyo Heburooni, omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Yuda." 
Joshua20:8 Kandi seeri ya Yorudaani, oburugwa-izooba bwa Yeriko, baatoorana Bezeri ey'aha murambi gw'omu ihamba, omu b'oruganda rwa Reubeeni; na Ramoti ey'omu Gileadi omu b'oruganda rwa Gaadi; na Golani omuri Bashani omu b'oruganda rwa Manaase." 
Joshua20:9 Ezo nizo ndembo zaateereirweho Abaisiraeli boona n'omunyaihanga obashuuhuukiiremu, ngu weena oriita omuntu atamwitsire nkana abone kuhungiramu, arekye kwitwa omuhoozi w'enzigu, okuhitsya obu araayemerere omu maisho g'oruteerane rw'abantu." 
Joshua21:1 Bwanyima abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkuru b'Abaleevi bakaija ahari Eleazaari omuhongyerezi na Yoshwa mwene Nuuni n'aha bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkuru b'enganda z'Abaisiraeli," 
Joshua21:2 baabagambirira Shiilo omu nsi ya Kanaani bati: Nyakubaho akaragiira Musa ngu tuheebwe endembo z'okutuuramu hamwe n'ebyanga by'okuriisizamu amatungo gaitu. 
Joshua21:3 Ahabw'okuragiirwa Nyakubaho, Abaisiraeli baaha Abaleevi endembo n'amariisizo, nibabiiha aha byanga byabo by'obutaka." 
Joshua21:4 Enteenyu yaakwata ab'emiryango y'Abaakoohati; Abaleevi baijukuru b'Arooni omuhongyerezi. Batyo baatunga endembo ikumi na ishatu okuruga aha z'ab'oruganda rwa Yuda n'orwa Simeoni n'orwa Benyamiini. 
Joshua21:5 Abaakohati abaatsigaireho ahabw'enteenyu baatunga endembo ikumi niziihwa aha z'ab'emiryango y'oruganda rwa Efuraimu, n'aha z'ab'oruganda rwa Daani, n'aha za kimwe kya kabiri ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase." 
Joshua21:6 Abaagereshooni, ahabw'enteenyu, baaheebwa endembo ikumi na ishatu z'ab'emiryango y'oruganda rwa Asheri, n'aha z'ab'orwa Nafutaali, kandi n'aha za kimwe kya kabiri ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase omuri Bashani." 
Joshua21:7 Abaameraari, nk'emiryango yaabo oku eri, baaheebwa endembo ikumi na ibiri, ziihirwe aha z'ab'oruganda rwa Reubeeni, n'aha z'ab'orwa Gaadi, n'orwa Zebuluuni." 
Joshua21:8 Ezo ndembo n'amariisizo gaazo Abaisiraeli bakaziha Abaleevi nibabateerera enteenyu, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaabaragiire, naabatumaho Musa." 
Joshua21:9 Bakabaha endembo ezi ezaaza kugambwaho, nibaziiha aha z'ab'oruganda rwa Yuda n'aha z'ab'orwa Simeoni," 
Joshua21:10 zaatwarwa baijukuru b'Arooni ab'emiryango y'Abaakoohati ab'omu Baleevi; ahabw'okuba nibo enteenyu yaabandize kukwata. 
Joshua21:11 Baabaha Kiriyataraba eya Araba ishe w'Abaanaki niyo Heburooni, omu nsi ya Yuda ey'ebibungo hamwe n'amariisizo gagyehinguririize." 
Joshua21:12 Kwonka emisiri y'orwo rurembo n'ebyaro byarwo bikaba byahairwe Kalebu mwene Yefuune kuba ebye. 
Joshua21:13 Kandi baijukuru b'Arooni omuhongyerezi baabaha Heburooni orurembo rw'oitsire omuntu kuhungiramu, hamwe n'amariisizo gaarwo, na Libuna, hamwe n'amariisizo gaarwo;" 
Joshua21:14 Yatiri n'amariisizo gaayo; 
Joshua21:15 Holoni n'amariisizo gaayo; Debiri n'amariisizo gaayo; 
Joshua21:16 Aini n'amariisizo gaayo; Yuuta n'amariisizo gaayo, na Betishemeshi hamwe n'amariisizo gaayo endembo mwenda ezaarugire omu z'enganda ibiri." 
Joshua21:17 Reero omu z'ab'oruganda rwa Benyamiini: Gibeoni n'amariisizo gaayo, Geba n'amariisizo gaayo," 
Joshua21:18 Anatooti n'amariisizo gaayo, na Alumooni hamwe n'amarisizo gaayo endembo ina." 
Joshua21:19 Endembo za baijukuru ba Arooni abahongyerezi, zoona zikaba endembo ikumi na ishatu, hamwe n'amariisizo gaazo." 
Joshua21:20 Abandi Bakoohati ab'emiryango ya Koohati ey'Abaleevi, endembo ezaabahairwe zikaruga omu z'ab'oruganda rwa Efuraimu." 
Joshua21:21 Baaheebwa Shekemu, orurembo rw'okuhungiramu owaita omuntu, hamwe n'amariisizo gaarwo omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu; na Gezari hamwe n'amariisizo gaayo," 
Joshua21:22 Kibuzaimu n'amariisizo gaayo, Betihorooni n'amariisizo gaayo endembo ina;" 
Joshua21:23 kandi omu z'ab'oruganda rwa Daani: Eliteke hamwe n'amariisizo gaayo, Gibetoni n'amariisizo gaayo," 
Joshua21:24 Aiyalooni n'amariisizo gaayo, Gatirimooni n'amariisizo gaayo endembo ina;" 
Joshua21:25 kandi omu z'aba kimwe kya kabiri ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase, baihayo Taanaka n'amariisizo gaayo, na Gatirimooni n'amariisizo gaayo endembo ibiri." 
Joshua21:26 Endembo z'ab'emiryango y'Abakoohati abaatsigaireho zoona hamwe zaaba ikumi, hamwe n'amariisizo gaazo." 
Joshua21:27 Abaagereshooni ab'emiryango y'Abaleevi bakaheebwa aha ndembo za kimwe kya kabiri ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase. Nizo ezi: Golani ey'omuri Bashani, orurembo oruhungirwamu owaita omuntu, hamwe n'amariisizo gaarwo; na Beeshiteera hamwe n'amariisizo gaayo endembo ibiri." 
Joshua21:28 Kandi aha z'ab'oruganda rwa Isakaari; Kiishioni hamwe n'amariisizo gaarwo, Daabera n'amarrisizo gaayo;" 
Joshua21:29 Yaarimuti n'amariisizo gaayo, Engaanimu n'amariisizo gaayo endembo ina." 
Joshua21:30 Omu z'ab'oruganda rwa Asheri: Mishali hamwe n'amariisizo gaayo, Abudooni n'amariisizo gaayo," 
Joshua21:31 Helikaati n'amariisizo gaayo na Rehobu hamwe n'amariisizo gaayo endembo ina. 
Joshua21:32 Kandi omu z'ab'oruganda rwa Nafutaali: Kedeshi omuri Galilaaya, orurembo orurikuhungirwamu owaita omuntu, hamwe n'amariisizo gaarwo; na Haamotidoori n'amariisizo gaarwo endembo ishatu." 
Joshua21:33 Endembo z'emiryango etari emwe ey'Abaagereshooni zoona hamwe zikahika ikumi na ishatu, hamwe n'amariisizo gaazo." 
Joshua21:34 Mbwenu Abaleevi abaatsigaireho ab'emiryango ya Meraari bakaheebwa endembo nibaziiha omu z'ab'oruganda rwa Zebuluuni. Nizo ezi: Yokineamu hamwe n'amariisizo gaarwo, Karita n'amariisizo gaayo," 
Joshua21:35 Dimuna n'amariisizo gaayo, Nahalaali n'amariisizo gaayo endembo ina." 
Joshua21:36 Kandi omu z'ab'oruganda rwa Reubeeni baihayo Beezeeri hamwe n'amariisizo gaayo, Yahazi n'amariisizo gaayo," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemooti n'amariisizo gaayo, na Mefaata hamwe n'amariisizo gaayo endembo ina." 
Joshua21:38 Reero omu z'ab'oruganda rwa Gaadi baabaha Ramoti ey'omuri Gileadi hamwe n'amariisizo gaayo, orurembo rw'okuhungirwamu oitsire omuntu; na Mahanaimu hamwe n'amariisizo gaayo," 
Joshua21:39 Heshibooni n'amariisizo gaayo, Yaazeri n'amariisizo gaayo zoona hamwe endembo ina." 
Joshua21:40 Haza endembo z'ab'emiryango y'Abaameraari etari emwe, niyo miryango y'Abaleevi eyaabaire etsigaireho, ezi baabahaire zaahika zoona endembo ikumi na ibiri."
