Joshua21:41 Endembo z'Abaleevi ezaabaire ziri ahagati y'ensi y'Abaisiraeli zoona zikahika makumi ana na munaana, hamwe n'amariisizo gaazo." 
Joshua21:42 Buri rumwe rukaba rwine amariisizo gaarwo agarwehinguririize; kiri kityo aha ndembo zoona. 
Joshua21:43 Okwo nikwo Nyakubaho yaahaire Abaisiraeli ensi ei yaarahiire kuha baishebo. Nabo ku baaherize kugikubuura, baagituuramu." 
Joshua21:44 Nyakubaho yaabaha obuhuumure aha mbaju zoona, nk'oku yaarahiire kubuha baishebo. Omu bazigu baabo boona tihaagira n'omwe owaabaasize kubaza omu kaso; ahabw'okuba Mukama akaba abahaire okusingura abazigu baabo boona." 
Joshua21:45 Ebirungi byona ebi Nyakubaho yaaraganiise ab'enju ya Isiraeli tihariho na kimwe eki atarahikiriize; byona bikaba kwo. 
Joshua22:1 Bwanyima Yoshwa akeeta Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi na kimwe kya kabiri ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase; 
Joshua22:2 yaabagira ati: Muhikize gye byona ebi Musa omugaragwa wa Nyakubaho yaabaragiire, kandi muunyorobeire omuri byona ebi mbaragiire." 
Joshua22:3 Timunagiriire beene waanyu ebiro ebi byona okuhitsya eri izooba; kureka mugumire mutaireho omutima kukora ebi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu abaragiire. 
Joshua22:4 Mbwenu Mukama Ruhanga waanyu ahaire beene waanyu obuhuumure, nk'oku yaabaraganiise. N'ahabw'ekyo mugarukyeyo muze omu maka gaanyu, omu nsi y'obutaka bwanyu obu Musa omugaragwa wa Nyakubaho yaabahaire seeri ya Yorudaani." 
Joshua22:5 Muteho munonga omutima kukuratira ebiragiro hamwe n'eiteeka ebi Musa omugaragwa wa Mukama Ruhanga waanyu yaabaragiire, okukunda Mukama Ruhanga waanyu n'okutwaza nk'oku arikwenda nimukuratira ebiragiro bye, n'okumuhamiraho, n'okumuheereza n'omutima gwanyu gwona n'amagara gaanyu goona." 
Joshua22:6 Yoshwa atyo abashabira omugisha aboohereza, baza omu maka gaabo." 
Joshua22:7 Mbwenu kimwe kya kabiri ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase, Musa akaba yaabahaire obutaka bw'obuhunguzi omuri Bashani. Reero kimwe kya kabiri ekindi, Yoshwa nikyo yaahaire eitaka ry'obuhunguzi hamwe na beene waabo omu nsi y'aha burengyerwa-izooba bwa Yorudaani. Yoshwa ku yaaboohereize kugaruka omu maka gaabo, yaabashabira omugisha;" 
Joshua22:8 yaabagira ati: Mugarukyeyo omu maka gaanyu, n'eby'obutungi bwingi n'amatungo maingi munonga, n'efeeza n'ezaabu n'emiringa n'ebyoma n'eby'okujwara bingi; kandi ebi munyagire abazigu baanyu, mubibagane na beene waanyu." 
Joshua22:9 Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi na kimwe kya kabiri ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase bakagaruka owaabo; baatsiga Abaisiraeli Shiilo ey'omuri Kanaani kuza omu nsi ya Gileadi, ensi yaabo ahabwabo ei baatungire, Mukama aragiire Musa kugibaha." 
Joshua22:10 Mbwenu ku baahikire omu kyanga ekiri haihi na Yorudaani omu nsi ya Kanaani, Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi na kimwe kya kabiri ky'Abaamanaase baayombeka eitambiro aha rubaju rwa Yorudaani; eitambiro rihango munonga." 
Joshua22:11 Abaisiraeli baahurira abarikugira bati: Reeba, Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi n'ekicweka ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase bombekire eitambiro aha mwatano gw'ensi ya Kanaani, omu kyanga ekihereraine na Yorudaani, aha rubaju orurikuhera omu Baisiraeli." 
Joshua22:12 Abaisiraeli ku baakihuriire eihanga ryabo ryona ryateeranira Shiilo kuza kubarwanisa. 
Joshua22:13 Bwanyima Abaisiraeli baatuma aha Baareubeeni n'Abaagaadi n'ab'ekicweka ky'oruganda rw'Abaamanaase, omu nsi ya Gileadi, Finehaasi mwene Eleazaari omuhongyerezi," 
Joshua22:14 hamwe n'abakuru ikumi; omwe omwe omu buri muryango gw'enganda za Isiraeli, kandi buri omwe omuribo ari mukuru w'omuryango gw'omu nganda zaabo." 
Joshua22:15 Batyo baija aha Baareubeeni n'Abaagaadi n'ekicweka ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase omu nsi ya Gileadi. Haza baabagira bati: 
Joshua22:16 Eihanga rya Nyakubaho ryona nirigira riti: Mubeereire ki endeebya mukacumura ahari Ruhanga wa Isiraeli eri izooba, mukareka kukuratira Nyakubaho, mukeeyombekyera eitambiro mumugomeire?" 
Joshua22:17 Nimugira ngu ekicumuro eki twakoreire omuri Peori kikatubeera kikye? Timurikumanya ku na hati tutakakyetuuraga, kandi ku kyareeteire ab'eihanga rya Nyakubaho kujuumikirwa orufu?" 
Joshua22:18 Haza muteishuka eri izooba, mureka kukuratira Nyakubaho? Mbwenu eri izooba ku muraagomere Nyakubaho, nyencakare naija kugirira eihanga rya Isiraeli ryona ekiniga kingi." 
Joshua22:19 Hati ku muraabe nimugira ngu ensi yaanyu teri erikwera, nimwambukye mwije kunu omu nsi ya Nyakubaho ei obutaaho bwe buri, mubagane naitwe eitaka ry'obuhunguzi. Kwonka murekye kumugomera nari itwe okutuhindura abagomi, mukeeyombekyera eitambiro eritari rya Mukama Ruhanga waitu." 
Joshua22:20 Mbwenu shi, Akani mwene Zeera ku atarabaire mwesigwa aha bintu ebirikuzira, kashanga teragwereire eihanga rya Isiraeli ryona? Kandi tarahwerekyereire wenka ahabw'ekyo kicumuro kye?" 
Joshua22:21 Reero Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi na kimwe kya kabiri ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase baagarukamu abakuru b'emiryango y'Abaisiraeli bati: 
Joshua22:22 Mukama Ruhanga Omushoboorozi! Mukama Ruhanga Omushoboorozi niwe arikukimanya! Kandi na Isiraeli keekimanye! Ku kiraabe kyabaire obugomi nari okutaba beesigwa ahari Nyakubaho, tutakira!" 
Joshua22:23 Ku turaabe twayombekire eitambiro ngu tuteishukye, turekye kukuratira Nyakubaho nari ku turaabe twakikozire ngu tutambirireho ebitambo bicwekize, nari emitoijo y'esaano, nainga okutambiraho ebitambo by'okurya kumwe, Nyakubaho akituture!" 
Joshua22:24 Nikikabure! Manya ekikitukoreise n'okutiina ngu nyentsya abaana baanyu batarigira abaitu bati: Mbwenu imwe mwine kakwate ki na Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli? 
Joshua22:25 Manya Nyakubaho akataho Yorudaani kuba omwatano gwaitu naimwe. Imwe Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi, Nyakubaho timumwineho mugabo. Haza ekyo kiije kireetere abaana baanyu kuzibira abaitu kuramya Nyakubaho." 
Joshua22:26 Nikyo twagiriire tuti: Hati ka twombekye eitambiro eritari ry'okutambiraho bitambo bicwekize nari ebindi bitambo," 
Joshua22:27 kureka okuba omujurizi waitu naimwe na baijukuru baitu abaritukurata, ku buzimazima turikuramya Nyakubaho, turi omu maisho g'Obutaaho bwe nitutamba ebitambo bicwekize n'ebindi bitambo kandi n'eby'okurya kumwe, ngu nyentsya abaana baanyu batakaagira abaitu bati: Nyakubaho timumwineho mugabo." 
Joshua22:28 Kandi nikyo tuteekateekyeire tuti: Ku baritugira batyo, nari baagira kwo baijukuru baitu omu biro ebiriija, turyabagambira tuti: Nimureebe eitambiro ririkushushana n'erya Nyakubaho eri baatatenkuriitwe baakozire, eritari ry'okutambiriraho ebitambo bicwekize, nainga ebindi bitambo, kureka eririkutuhamiza twembi, itwe naimwe." 
Joshua22:29 Rubuuza, itwe okugomera Nyakubaho n'okuteishuka eri izooba, tukareka kumukuratira, tukombeka eitambiro ry'okutambiraho ebitambo bicwekize n'emitoijo y'esaano, nainga ebindi bitambo, eritari itambiro rya Mukama Ruhanga waitu eriri omu maisho g'Obutaaho bwe!" 
Joshua22:30 Finehaasi omuhongyerezi n'abakuru b'eihanga abakuru b'emiryango y'Abaisiraeli abaabaire bari hamwe nawe ku baahuriire ebi Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi n'Abaamanaase baagamba, kyabagwisa gye munonga." 
Joshua22:31 Finehaasi mwene Eleazaari omuhongyerezi yaagira Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi n'Abaamanaase ati: Eri izooba twamanya ku Nyakubaho ari omuriitwe, ahabw'okuba timumubaireho ndeebya. Mbwenu mwajuna Abaisiraeli okufubirwa Nyakubaho." 
Joshua22:32 Bwanyima Finehaasi mwene Eleazaari omuhongyerezi n'abo bakuru baruga ahi baashangire Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi omu nsi ya Gileadi, bagaruka omu nsi ya Kanaani omu Baisiraeli, babateekyerereza oku byagyenzire." 
Joshua22:33 Egyo nkuru egwisa gye Abaisiraeli, basiima Ruhanga, kandi barekyera aho kubahayira kubarwanisa n'okucwekyereza ensi ei Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi baabaire batwiremu." 
Joshua22:34 Eryo itambiro Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi baaryeta “Mujurizi”. Ahabw'okuba bakagira bati: Niryo mujurizi w'ahagati yaitu naimwe kuhamya ku Mukama ari Ruhanga. 
Joshua23:1 Ku haahingwireho omwanya muraingwa, Nyakubaho yaaherize kuhuumuza Abaisiraeli engamba z'abazigu baabo boona abaabaire babeehinguririize, na Yoshwa yaakuzire kandi yaahikize engingo za bukuru," 
Joshua23:2 Yoshwa yaayeta Abaisiraeli boona n'abeebembezi baabo n'abakuru baabo, abaramuzi baabo n'abatware, yaabagira ati: Mbwenu nkuzire mpikize engingo za bukuru." 
Joshua23:3 Kandi mukareeba ebi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu yaakozire ago mahanga goona ahabwanyu. Manya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu niwe yaabarwaniriire 
Joshua23:4 Reeba, mperize kubabaganisiza amahanga agabaire gatsigaireho, gaahungurwa enganda zaanyu, hamwe n'amahanga goona agu naacwekyereize, okwiha Yorudaani okuta aha Nyanja Empango aha burengyerwa-izooba." 
Joshua23:5 Mukama Ruhanga waanyu naija kubabinga, babahigize, abatuntumure babarugye omu maisho, mukubuure ensi yaabo nk'oku yaabaraganiise." 
Joshua23:6 N'ahabw'ekyo muhamire kimwe kukuratira n'okukora byona ebihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eiteeka rya Musa, mutarikuriteishuka kutoora aha rubaju rwa buryo nari aha rwa bumosho;" 
Joshua23:7 mubone kuteejwanzya n'abanyamahanga abaatsigaire omuriimwe, nobu kwakuba okutakira baaruhanga baabo, nari okubarahira, nari okubaheereza, nainga okujuumara mukabaramya;" 
Joshua23:8 kureka muhamire ahari Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, nk'oku mwakozire okuhitsya eri izooba." 
Joshua23:9 Manya Mukama niwe yaababingiire amahanga mahango ag'amaani. Tihakagiraga muntu weena orabagungiire okuhitsya n'eri izooba. 
Joshua23:10 Omuntu omwe omuriimwe naabasa kubinga rukumi, ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waanyu niwe arikubarwanirira, nk'oku yaabaraganiise." 
Joshua23:11 N'ahabw'ekyo muteho munonga omutima kukunda Mukama Ruhanga waanyu. 
Joshua23:12 Mbwenu ku murigaruka enyima, mwateerana n'amahanga agaatsigaire omuriimwe, mwashwerererana nago, mwagashweramu abakazi, nago gaabashweramu," 
Joshua23:13 mumanyire kimwe ku Mukama Ruhanga waanyu atarigumizamu kubinga ago mahanga kubahigiza; kureka garyababeera obusya n'omutego, gabe eky'okubaasha embaju, n'amahwa omu maisho gaanyu, okuhitsya obu murihwerekyerera, mukahwa omuri egi nsi nungi ei Mukama Ruhanga waanyu yaabahaire." 
Joshua23:14 Reeba, ndi haihi kuza ei boona ab'omu nsi baza, kandi nimumanyira kimwe omu mitima yaanyu n'omu magara gaanyu ku hatariho kintu na kimwe ekirabuzire omu birungi byona ebi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu yaabaraganiise. Byona bikabaho ahabwanyu, tihaagira na kimwe ekyabura." 
Joshua23:15 Kwonka, nk'oku ebintu byona ebirungi ebi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu yaabaraganiise byahikiiriziibwe ahabwanyu, nikwo Mukama aribateeza ebintu bibi, okuhitsya obu aribahwerekyereza, mukahwa omu nsi nungi ei yaabahaire." 
Joshua23:16 Ku muriita endagaano ya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu ei yaabaragiire, mwagyenda, mwaheereza baaruhanga abandi mwabaramya, obwo ekiniga kye kiryababugumiraho, muhwerekyerere ahonaaho, muhwe omu nsi nungi ei abahaire." 
Joshua24:1 Bwanyima Yoshwa akateeranira Shekemu enganda za Isiraeli zoona; yaayeta abakuru omu ihanga, abeebembezi, abaramuzi n'abatware ba Isiraeli; baija omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Joshua24:2 Yoshwa yaagambira abantu boona ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Ira, baashwenkuriimwe, Teera ishe w'Aburahamu na Nahori, bakaba batwire seeri ya Eufuraati, nibaramya baaruhanga abandi." 
Joshua24:3 Bwanyima naiha Aburahamu shoimwe seeri y'ogwo mugyera, naamurabya omu nsi ya Kanaani yoona, naakanyisa oruzaaro rwe, naamuha Isaaka." 
Joshua24:4 Kandi Isaaka naamuha Yakobo na Esau. Esau naamuha ensi y'ebibungo eya Seiri kuba ekyanga kye; kwonka Yakobo n'abaana be baashuuma Misiri. 
Joshua24:5 Reero naatuma Musa na Arooni; naateeza Abanyamisiri ebibonaboneso by'okutangaaza ebi naakoreiremu. Na bwanyima imwe naabaihayo. 
Joshua24:6 Ntyo naiha baashwenkuriimwe Misiri, mwarugaho mwahika aha Nyanja. Abanyamisiri baakurata baashwenkuriimwe bababingire, n'ebigaari n'ab'ahambaraasi, baabahitsya aha Nyanja Erikutukura." 
Joshua24:7 Mbwenu, banu ku baahoogyeire Nyakubaho, yaareeta omwirima ahagata yaanyu n'Abanyamisiri, yaaragiira enyanja yaabatungamira, yaabashweka; mwayereebera eki naakozire Misiri; mwatuura omu ihamba omwanya muhango." 
Joshua24:8 Bwanyima naabareeta omu nsi y'Abaamori abatwire Seeri ya Yorudaani. Baabarwanisa, kwonka naababarekurira, mwakubuura ensi yaabo; naabacwekyereza, baabahigiza." 
Joshua24:9 Balaki mwene Zipori omugabe wa Moabu yaimuka yaabarwanisa imwe Abaisiraeli; kandi yaatuma kweta Balaamu mwene Beori kubakyeena. 
Joshua24:10 Kwonka Balaamu tinaamutega kutu, kureka yaabashabira emigisha; ntyo naabaiha omu mikono ye." 
Joshua24:11 Mwayambuka Yorudaani, mwahika Yeriko. Abaayeriko baabarwanisa, otaireho n'Abaamori, Abapeerizi, Abakanaani, Abahiiti, Abagirigaashi, Abahiivi, n'Abayebusi; kwonka boona naababarekurira." 
Joshua24:12 Naabooherereza enwa zaababinga, baabahunga; kandi abagabe ababiri ab'Abaamori tibarasingwirwe rurara zaanyu, nari amata gaanyu." 
Joshua24:13 Nkabaha ensi ei mutarahendekyeire, n'endembo ezi mutarombekire. Mbwenu nizo mutwiremu, nimurya ebijuma by'emizaabibu n'eby'emioliva ei mutarabyaire." 
Joshua24:14 Mbwenu nu, mugume muramye Nyakubaho, mumuheereze omu mazima n'omutima gutaine buryarya. Mweihireho kimwe baaruhanga abu baashwenkuriimwe baaramiize seeri y'Omugyera na Misiri, haza mumuheereze." 
Joshua24:15 Ku muraabe mutarikwenda kuheereza Nyakubaho, eri izooba nimutoorane ou muraaheereze, yaaba baaruhanga abu baashwenkuriimwe baabaire baheerereza omu nsi ya seeri y'Omugyera, nainga baaruhanga b'Abaamori abu mutwire omu nsi yaabo; kwonka nyowe n'eka yangye turyaguma nituheereza Nyakubaho." 
Joshua24:16 Abo bantu bamugarukamu bati: Nikikabure itwe kutsigaho Nyakubaho tukaheereza baaruhanga abandi! 
Joshua24:17 Manya Mukama Ruhanga waitu niwe yaatwihire na baatatenkuriitwe omu nsi ya Misiri omu buhuuku, akakora obumanyiso bukuru nitubwereebera; akaturinda omu muhanda gwona ogu twareetsirwe, n'omu mahanga goona agu twarabiremu." 
Joshua24:18 Kandi Nyakubaho akabinga amahanga goona gaatuhigiza, Abaamori abaabaire batwire omuri egyo nsi. N'ahabw'ekyo naitwe turyaguma tuheereze Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba niwe Ruhanga waitu." 
Joshua24:19 Kwonka Yoshwa agambira abo bantu ati: Timurikubaasa kuheereza Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba ni Ruhanga Orikwera; ni Ruhanga w'eihato; tarisaasira bicumuro byanyu nari ebibi byanyu." 
Joshua24:20 Ku murimutsigaho, mwaheereza baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga, nawe aryabahindukana, abakore kubi, abamareho, yaaherize kubakorera ebirungi." 
Joshua24:21 Mpaho abo bantu baagira Yoshwa bati: Rubuuza! Kureka turyaguma tuheereze Nyakubaho. 
Joshua24:22 Yoshwa nawe abagira ati: Niimwe mwayehamiza ku mwatoorana Nyakubaho kumuheereza. Nabo bamugarukamu bati: Eego! Nitukyehamiza. 
Joshua24:23 Nawe abagira ati: Mbwenu nu, mweiheho baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga abu mwine, omutima gwanyu mugumarire ahari Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
Joshua24:24 Abaisiraeli nabo bagira Yoshwa bati: Mukama Ruhanga waitu niwe turiguma nituheereza, n'ebi arigamba nibyo turikora." 
Joshua24:25 Mpaho Yoshwa eryo izooba akora nabo endagaano, abaheera Shekemu ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe." 
Joshua24:26 Kandi ahandiika ebyo bigambo omu kitabo ky'eiteeka rya Ruhanga; atwara eibaare rihango aribyara ahansi y'omuvure ogwabaire guri haihi n'Omwanya gwa Nyakubaho Ogurikwera. 
Joshua24:27 Haza agira abo bantu boona ati: Mureebe, eri ibaare riryaguma ritubeere mushinja, ahabw'okuba ryahurira ebigambo byona ebi Nyakubaho yaagamba naitwe. N'ahabw'ekyo riryaguma ribashinje, ngu mutakaayehakana Ruhanga waanyu." 
Joshua24:28 Atyo Yoshwa ayohereza abo bantu. Buri muntu agaruka omu butaka bwe bw'obuhunguzi. 
Joshua24:29 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Yoshwa mwene Nuuni, omuheereza wa Nyakubaho, yaafa ahikize emyaka igana na ikumi y'obukuru." 
Joshua24:30 Baamuziika Timunatiseera omu butaka bwe bw'obuhunguzi, oburi omu nsi ya Efuraimu ey'ebibungo aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho bw'orushozi rwa Gaashi." 
Joshua24:31 Abaisiraeli bakaheereza Nyakubaho ebiro byona ebi baamazire na Yoshwa, n'ebi baamazire n'abakuru abaatsigaireho omu ihanga Yoshwa yaafiire, kandi abaamanyire byona ebi Nyakubaho yaakoreire Isiraeli." 
Joshua24:32 Amagufa ga Yosefu, agu Abaisiraeli baijaine nibaruga Misiri, bakagaziika Shekemu omu kibanja ki Yakobo yaabaire aguzire ahari beene Hamori, ishe wa Shekemu, ebicweka igana by'efeeza. Kityo kyaba eky'obutaka bwa baijukuru ba Yosefu." 
Joshua24:33 Kandi Eleazaari mwene Arooni nawe yaafa, baamuziika Gibea, orurembo rwa Finehaasi omutabani, oru baabaire bamuhaire omu nsi ya Efuraimu ey'ebibungo." 
Judges1:1 Yoshwa ku yaaherize kufa, Abaisiraeli baabuuza Nyakubaho bati: N'oha oraatubandize kuhurura kuteera Abanyakanaani, akabarwanisa?" 
Judges1:2 Nyakubaho agarukamu ati: Abaayuda babe nibo baahurura; egyo nsi naagibarekurira. 
Judges1:3 Abaayuda baagira Abaasimeoni beene waabo, bati: Nimwije tuhurure kumwe, tuze omu nsi ei twabagaine, turwanise Abanyakanaani. Haza naitwe turyahurura naimwe, nimuza omu nsi ei mwabagaine. Abaasimeoni nikwo kuhurura nabo." 
Judges1:4 Batyo Abaayuda bahurura, Nyakubaho abarekurira Abanyakanaani n'Abaperizi; babaitamu abantu kakumi omuri Beezeki." 
Judges1:5 Bashanga Adonibeezeki omuri Beezeki, bamurwanisa, basingura Abanyakanaani n'Abaperizi." 
Judges1:6 Adonibeezeki ahunga, kwonka bamubinga, bamukwata, bamucwaho ebikumu bishaija eby'engaro n'eby'ebigyere." 
Judges1:7 Adonibeezeki atonzya naagira ati: Abagabe makumi mushanju abacwirweho ebikumu bishaija by'engaro n'eby'ebigyere, bakaba batorotoora obucwagurika bw'ebyokurya ahansi y'emeeza yangye. Mbwenu oku naabagizire, naanye Ruhanga nikwo yangira. Batyo bamutwara Yerusalemu agwayo." 
Judges1:8 Abaayuda bakateera Yerusalemu, baagikwata, baitsa abantu baamwo rurara y'obwogi; orurembo baarutweka." 
Judges1:9 Bwanyima Abaayuda baahurura, baaza kurwanisa Abanyakanaani abatwire omu nsi y'ebibungo, n'omuri Negebu, n'omu mpita." 
Judges1:10 Kandi baateera Abanyakanaani abatwire Heburooni. Ira Heburooni egyo ekaba eyetwa Kiriyatariba. Baasingura Sheshayi na Ahimaani na Talamai. 
Judges1:11 Ku baarugire okwo, baahurura, baateera abatuuzi ba Debiri. Debiri ira ekaba eyetwa Kiriyatiseferi." 
Judges1:12 Reero Kalebu yaagira ati: Oraateere Kiriyatiseferi, yaagikwata, niinyija kumuha muhara wangye Akisa amushwere." 
Judges1:13 Mpaho Otinieli mwene Kenazi, murumuna wa Kalebu, agikwata. N'onu amuha omuhara Akisa, amushwera." 
Judges1:14 Akisa ku ahika owa iba, amwehanangiriza kushaba ishe w'ogwo mwishiki ekibanja. Atyo atemburuka, aruga aha ndogoya ye. Kalebu amubuuza ati: Nooyenda ki?" 
Judges1:15 N'onu amugarukamu ati: Naakweshengyereza, gira ekiconco eki wampa. Nk'oku otaire omu nsi ya Negebu; mpa n'enshuro z'amaizi. Kalebu nikwo kumuha enshuro za ruguru n'eza ifo." 
Judges1:16 Mbwenu baijukuru ba Hobabu Omukeeni, ishezaara wa Musa, bakagyenda n'Abaayuda, baaruga omu rurembo rw'emikindo, baaza omu ihamba ry'Abaayuda eriri omuri Negebu haihi na Aradi. Baagyenda, baatuura n'abantu baayo." 
Judges1:17 Reero Abaayuda baahurura n'Abaasimeoni beene waabo, baasingura Abanyakanaani abatwire Zefata, baagicwekyerereza kimwe. Orwo rurembo nikwo kwetwa Horuma." 
Judges1:18 Abaayuda kandi baakubuura Gaaza n'ekyanga kyayo, na Ashikelooni n'ekyanga kyayo, Ekurooni n'ekyanga kyayo." 
Judges1:19 Nyakubaho yaaba hamwe n'Abaayuda, baakubuura ensi y'ebibungo, kwonka tibaabaasa kubinga mu mpita abatuuzi baamwo, ahabw'okuba bakaba baine ebigaari by'ebyoma." 
Judges1:20 Heburooni baagiha Kalebu, nk'oku Musa yaaragiire. Nawe yaabingamu batabani ba Anaki bonshatu." 
Judges1:21 Kwonka Abaabenyamiini tibaabinga muri Yerusalemu Abayebusi, abagitwiremu. Abayebusi nikwo kuguma batwire n'Abaabenyamiini omuri Yerusalemu okuhitsya n'eri izooba." 
Judges1:22 Abaayosefu nabo bakahurura, baateera Beteli; Nyakubaho yaaba hamwe nabo." 
Judges1:23 Abaayosefu abo baatuma abantu kutata Beteli. Mbwenu ira, orwo rurembo rukaba rwetwa Luuzi." 
Judges1:24 Entatsi zaabo zaabugana omuntu orikuruga omuri orwo rurembo, zaamugira ziti: Twakweshengyereza, tworekye omuhanda gurikuza omu rurembo, naitwe twije tukukorere eky'embabazi." 
Judges1:25 Nawe abooreka omuhanda gurikuza omuri orwo rurembo. Barucwekyereza na rurara y'obwogi. Kwonka ogwo mushaija n'ab'eka ye boona, babareka beegyendera." 
Judges1:26 Mpaho ogwo mushaija aza omu nsi y'Abahiiti, ayombekayo orurembo, arweta Luuzi. Na hati nikwo rukirikwetwa." 
Judges1:27 Abaamanaase tibarabingire muri Betisheani n'omu byaro byayo abatuuzi baamwo; nobu baakuba ab'omuri Taanaka n'ebyaro byayo, nari abatuuzi ba Doori n'ebyaro byayo, nainga aba Ibuleamu n'ebyaro byayo, n'aba Megido n'ebyaro byayo; kureka Abanyakanaani bakaguma batwire omuri egyo nsi." 
Judges1:28 Abaisiraeli ku baagizire amaani, baakoresa Abanyakanaani emirimo y'okubagyema, kwonka tibaababingiramu kimwe." 
Judges1:29 N'Abaefuraimu tibarabingire Banyakanaani abaabaire batwire Gezeri, kureka bakaguma batwiremu nabo." 
Judges1:30 Abaazebuluuni nabo tibarabingire muri Kiturooni abatuuzi baamwo, Abanyakanaani, nobu baakuba ab'omuri Nahalooli; kureka bakaguma batwire nabo, baaba ab'okukoresibwa emirimo y'okugyemwa." 
Judges1:31 Abaasheri tibarabingiremu abatwire Aako, nari abatwire Sidoni, nainga abatwire Ahalabu, n'Abaakizibu, n'Abaheliba, n'Abaafiki, nobu baakuba Abarehobu;" 
Judges1:32 kureka Abaasheri bakaguma batwire n'abo Banyakanaani, abatuuzi b'egyo nsi, ahabw'okuba tibarababingiremu." 
Judges1:33 Abaanafutaali tibarabingire abatwire omuri Betishemeshi, nari ab'omu Betanata, kureka bakaguma batwire n'Abanyakanaani, abatuuzi ba Betishemeshi, n'aba Betanata, baaba ab'okubakorera emirimo y'okugyemwa." 
Judges1:34 Abaamori bakagyema Abaadaani kugaruka omu nsi y'ebibungo, tibaabaikiriza kushuuma mu mpita." 
Judges1:35 Abaamori baaguma batwire na Hariheresi, na Aiyalooni na Shaalubimu; kwonka Abaayosefu baaguma babakirize emikono, banu baaba ab'okubakorera emirimo y'okugyemwa." 
Judges1:36 Omwatano gw'Abaamori gukaba nigutandikira aha katembo ka Akarabimu, okwiha Seela n'okwinamura." 
Judges2:1 Maraika wa Nyakubaho akaruga Giligaali yaaza Bokimu, yaagambira Abaisiraeli ati: Nkabaiha Misiri, naabareeta omu nsi ei naarahiire kuha baashwenkuriimwe. Nkabagira nti: Tindiita ndagaano ei naaragaine naimwe." 
Judges2:2 Kandi nti: Naimwe mutariragaana endagaano n'abatuuzi b'omu nsi egi, kureka musheenye amatambiro gaabo; kwonka timurakuratiire kiragiro kyangye. Mbwenu ekyo mukakora ki?" 
Judges2:3 Naanye hati nikyo ndikugirira nti: Tindikwija kubabinga kubahigiza, kureka baryababeera ababisha b'okubanyangaraza; baaruhanga baabo bababeere ekiina ky'aha muryango." 
Judges2:4 Maraika wa Nyakubaho ku yaaherize kugambira Abaisiraeli boona ebyo bigambo; abantu baaborooga, baarira." 
Judges2:5 Ogwo mwanya baagweta Bokimu, kandi baatambirirayo Nyakubaho ebitambo." 
Judges2:6 Bwanyima Yoshwa akaragiira abantu kugyenda. Buri Muisiraeli yaaza omu butaka bw'obuhunguzi bwe kubukubuura. 
Judges2:7 Abantu baaguma nibaheereza Nyakubaho omu busingye bwa Yoshwa bwona, n'omu biro by'abakuru abaatsigaireho yaafiire, abaareebire ebikuru ebi Nyakubaho yaakoreire Abaisiraeli." 
Judges2:8 Yoshwa ogwo mwene Nuuni, omugaragwa wa Nyakubaho, akafa ahikize emyaka igana na ikumi y'obukuru." 
Judges2:9 Baamuziika Timunatiheera, omu kyanga ky'obuhunguzi bwe, omu nsi ya Efuraimu ey'enshozi, aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho obw'orushozi Gaashi." 
Judges2:10 N'ab'obusingye obwo boona baafa, baakurata baishebo, omu bigyere byabo haazamu ab'orundi ruzaaro, abaabaire batarikumanya Nyakubaho n'ebi yaakoreire Abaisiraeli." 
Judges2:11 Bwanyima Abaisiraeli bakakora ebirikugwisa kubi Nyakubaho, baaramya Baabaali." 
Judges2:12 Baatsigaho Mukama Ruhanga wa baishebo owaabaihire omu nsi ya Misiri, baakuratira baaruhanga abandi ab'abanyamahanga ababeehinguririize, baabaramya baagwisa kubi Nyakubaho." 
Judges2:13 Baimuura Nyakubaho, baayehongyera Baabaali na Baashitarooti." 
Judges2:14 Nawe nikwo kugirira Abaisiraeli ekiniga kingi, akabashunikira emigogo y'abanyagi, ekabanyaga; akabarekurira abazigu ababeehinguririize, bakabategyeka; bakaburwa agabarwanisa." 
Judges2:15 Ku baabaire baza aha rugamba, omukono gwe gubarwanisa, nk'oku yaabaire akibamanyiise bukiri kare, naarahira. Batyo baaguma bari omu kabi kahango." 
Judges2:16 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akateeraho Abaisiraeli abaramuzi, abaabaire babaiha omu bukwatwa bw'ababanyagire." 
Judges2:17 Kwonka abo Baisiraeli bakaba batabahurira, ahabw'okuba bakahampukira ahari baaruhanga abandi, baabaramya; baarahuka kuteishuka omuhanda ogu baishebo baabaire bakuratira, niboorobera ebiragiro bya Nyakubaho, batarikutwaza batyo." 
Judges2:18 Nyakubaho ku yaabaire abateeraho abaramuzi, aba hamwe n'omuramuzi orikubajuna abazigu barikubahata omwanya gwona ogu ogwo muramuzi yaabaire aba akiriho; ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho ku yaabaire ahurira entsinda yaabo ahabw'abarikubonabonesa nibabahata, abagirira esaasi." 
Judges2:19 Kwonka ogwo muramuzi ku yaabaire afa, bagaruka enyima, bagira emicwe mibi erikukira eya baishebo, nibahampukira ahari baaruhanga abandi, nibabaheereza, kandi nibabaramya. Batyo baaguma batarekire ebi barikukora, nobu yaakuba emitwarize yaabo y'obugangaazi." 
Judges2:20 Nyakubaho nikwo kugirira abo Baisiraeli ekiniga kingi, akagira ati: Ahabw'okuba aba bantu baitsire endagaano yangye, ei naaragiire baishebo kugirinda, baayanga kukuratira ebi naabagambiire;" 
Judges2:21 naanye tindigaruka kubinga rimwe aha mahanga agu Yoshwa yaatsigireho obu yaafa," 
Judges2:22 ahabw'ago mahanga mbone kugyeza Abaisiraeli, yaaba nibaija kwerinda bakakuratira omuhanda gwangye, nk'oku baishebo baabaire batwaza, nari batarikwija kugukuratira." 
Judges2:23 Nikyo Nyakubaho yaatisgiireho ago mahanga, atagabingyemu ahonaaho, kandi nikyo ataragarekuriire Yoshwa kugasingura." 
Judges3:1 Aga nigo mahanga gu Nyakubaho yaatsigiremu kugagyezesa Abaisiraeli boona, abaabaire batamanyiriire ngamba z'omuri Kanaani," 
Judges3:2 ngu ab'enzaaro z'eihanga rya Isiraeli ezirikuratana babone kumanya kurwana engamba, ngu akaayegyesa nangwa n'abatakamanyaga kurwana." 
Judges3:3 Mbwenu ago mahanga nigo aga: Abakama bataano b'Abafilisiti, n'Abanyakanaani boona, n'Abasidoni, n'Abahiivi, abaabaire batwire aha Rushozi rwa Lebanooni, okuruga aha Rushozi Baaliherumooni okuhika aharikurabwa nooza Hamati." 
Judges3:4 Amahanga ago gakaba gari ag'okugyerezaho Isiraeli, kureeba yaaba neija kworobera ebiragiro bya Nyakubaho ebi yaaragiire baishebo, naabatumaho Musa." 
Judges3:5 Nikyo Abaisiraeli baatuuriire n'Abanyakanaani n'Abahiiti, n'Abaamori, n'Abaperizi, n'Abahiivi, n'Abayebusi;" 
Judges3:6 bakashwera bahara b'abo banyamahanga, bakabahingira na bahara baabo; bakataho n'okuramya baaruhanga baabo." 
Judges3:7 Abaisiraeli bakacumura ahari Nyakubaho, baayebwa Mukama Ruhanga waabo, baaramya Baabaali na Baasherooti." 
Judges3:8 Ekyo kyareetera Mukama kugirira Abaisiraeli ekiniga kingi, akabarekurira Kushanirishataimu omugabe wa Mesopotamiya; Abaisiraeli bakamara emyaka munaana bari abairu be." 
Judges3:9 Kwonka Abaisiraeli abo ku baahoogyeire Nyakubaho, yaabaimukiza ow'okubajuna, niwe Otinieli mwene Kenazi murumuna wa Kalebu." 
Judges3:10 Mutima wa Nyakubaho akaija ahari Otinieli ogwo, yaaba omuramuzi w'Abaisiraeli, yaahurura kurwana orugamba. Nyakubaho yaamurekurira Kushanirishataimu omugabe wa Mesopotamiya, yaamusingura." 
Judges3:11 Ensi yaamara emyaka makumi ana ehuumwire; bwanyima Otinieli mwene Kenazi yaafa. 
Judges3:12 Abaisiraeli bakagaruka baacumura ahari Nyakubaho. Ahabw'okumucumuraho okwo, yaaha Egulooni omugabe w'Abamoabu amaani g'okubarwanisa." 
Judges3:13 Egulooni akahuruza Abaamoni n'Abaamaleki, yaagyenda nabo, yaateera Abaisiraeli, yaabasingura, yaakubuura orurembo rwabo rw'emikindo." 
Judges3:14 Abaisiraeli baamara emyaka ikumi na munaana bari abairu ba Egulooni omugabe wa Moabu. 
Judges3:15 Kwonka Abaisiraeli ku baahoogyeire Nyakubaho, yaabaimukiza ow'okubajuna; niwe Ehudi mwene Geera, ow'Abaabenyamiini, omushaija orikutwaza emosho." 
Judges3:16 Reero Abaisiraeli baaha Ehudi emitoijo yaabo kugitwarira Egulooni omugabe wa Moabu. Ehudi yaaheesesa rurara y'amoogi abiri, ey'oburingwa bwa mukono gumwe, yaagyezirikira omunda y'ebijwaro bye, neereereetera aha kibero kye kya buryo." 
Judges3:17 Atyo areetera Egulooni omugabe wa Moabu egyo mitoijo. Egulooni ogwo akaba ari omushaija muhango munonga. 
Judges3:18 Mbwenu Ehudi ku aheza kumutoijera emitoijo, agyenda n'abaizire bagyekoreire." 
Judges3:19 Kwonka ku ahika aha bishushani ebirikuramibwa, ebisharwirwe omu mabaare gasharwire, ebiri haihi na Giligaali, agarukayo, agira omugabe ati: Nyakusinga, nyine ekintu ky'omubonano eki bakuntumireho. Omugabe agira ati: Muhuname! Kandi aragiira abari aho boona kugyenda." 
Judges3:20 Ehudi nikwo kwija ah'ari, akashanga ashutami wenka omu kishengye kye eky'ahaiguru eki atungiramu amabeho. Ehudi akamugira ati: Nyine eki Ruhanga akuntumireho. N'onu akaimuka ah'ashutami." 
Judges3:21 Ehudi nikwo kukununkiriza rurara eri aha kibero kye kya buryo n'omukono gwe gwa bumosho, akagimutimbura aha nda;" 
Judges3:22 n'ekirindi kikahwerayo, ekyogi kikaburira omu bishaju. Reero ahabw'okutamukuuramu rurara egyo, efa ekareetwaho." 
Judges3:23 Ehudi akiheza kukora atyo akashohora, akihika omu kisasi, akamukingiranira omu kishengye kye eky'aha iguru, enyigi zaakyo akaikomesa ekikomoorozo." 
Judges3:24 Ku aheza kugyenda, abagaragwa baija. Ku bashanga enyigi z'ekishengye ky'ahaiguru zikomire, bateekateeka ngu shana yaaza aha ishaazi omu kishengye ky'amabeho." 
Judges3:25 Batyo bategyereza okuhitsya obu baaburangiriirwe, ahabw'okureeba ataigwire nyigi z'ekishengye ky'aha iguru; bakaihayo ekikomoorozo bakaziigura; bakashanga mukama waabo afiire, agangarami aha nsi." 
Judges3:26 Ehudi we akacwa bakiri okwo bategyereize, yairuka, yaaraba aha bishushani birikuramibwa, ebisharwirwe omu mabaare, yaahungira Seira." 
Judges3:27 Ku yaahikireyo, yaateerera enzamba omu bibungo by'omu kyanga kya Efuraimu, kuhuruza Abaisiraeli. Yaashuuma nabo abeebembeire." 
Judges3:28 Yaabagira ati: Nimunkurate, ahabw'okuba Mukama yaabarekurira abazigu baanyu Abamoabu. Batyo baashuuma bamukuratiire, baakwata enyambukiro za Yorudaani kukumiiririraho Abamoabu, batarikwikiriza muntu n'omwe kwambuka." 
Judges3:29 Ago magingo baita Abamoabu nka kakumi, abashaija boona ab'amaani enkwata-ngabo, tihaahonokaho n'omwe." 
Judges3:30 Eryo izooba nikwo baacwire batyo Abamoabu eishaija, ensi ekamara emyaka munaana ehuumwire engamba." 
Judges3:31 Ehudi akakuratwa Shamugaari. Shamugaari ogwo akaitsa Abafilisiti magana mukaaga omuhunda ogufunya ente; nawe yaarokora Abaisiraeli. 
Judges4:1 Ehudi ku yaafiire, Abaisiraeli baagaruka baacumura ahari Nyakubaho." 
Judges4:2 Nawe yaabarekurira Yabini omugabe wa Kanaani, owaabaire naategyekyera omu rurembo Hazori, omukuru w'eihe rye naayetwa Sisera, owaabaire atwire Haroshetihagoimu." 
Judges4:3 Bwanyima Abaisiraeli baahoogyera Nyakubaho kubaha emikono, ahabw'okuba Yabini akaba aine ebigaari by'ebyoma magana mwenda, kandi amazire emyaka makumi abiri naabaita kubi." 
Judges4:4 Mbwenu omu bunaku obwo, Debora omurangikazi muka Lapidooti, niwe yaabaire ari omuramuzi omuri Isiraeli." 
Judges4:5 Akaba ashutama ahansi y'omukindo ogurikwetwa ogwa Debora, oguri ahagati ya Raama na Beteli omu nsi ya Efuraimu ey'ebibungo. Mpaho Abaisiraeli baija ah'ari kubacwera emanja." 
Judges4:6 Ogwo murangikazi akatuma ab'okweta Baraki mwene Abinoamu, kwija naaruga Kedeshi ey'Abaanafutaali. Yaamugira ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli akuragiire ngu ogyende oteeranire abantu baawe omu Rushozi Tabora, noiha abashaija kakumi omu ruganda rwa Nafutaali n'orwa Zebuluuni." 
Judges4:7 Reero naanye niinyija kukureetera Sisera, omukuru w'eihe rya Yabini, akubugane aha mugyera Kiishoni n'ebigaari bye n'engabo ze; haza mmukurekurire, omusingure." 
Judges4:8 Baraki amugira ati: Ku oraagyende, naanye ningyenda; ku oraabe otagyenzire, naanye tindikwija kuzayo." 
Judges4:9 Onu amugarukamu ati: Buzimazima niinyija kugyenda naiwe; kwonka orugyendo oru oraagyende tirurikwija kukuhaisa kitiinwa, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho naija kuhayo Sisera, agwe omu mikono y'omukazi. Mpaho Debora aimuka, agyenda na Baraki, baza Kedeshi." 
Judges4:10 Baraki ahuruza Abaazebuluuni n'Abaanafutaali kuza Kedeshi; haija abashaija kakumi, bamugyenda omu ntegye; na Debora agyenda nawe." 
Judges4:11 Mbwenu obwo Heberi Omukeeni akaba ataine n'Abakeeni, baijukuru ba Hobabu ishezaara wa Musa, ateire eihema rye aha muvule gwa Zaananimu, haihi na Kedeshi." 
Judges4:12 Sisera ku yaahuriire ngu Baraki mwene Abinoamu agiire omu Rushozi Tabora," 
Judges4:13 Sisera ogwo yaahuruza ab'ebigaari bye boona, ebigaari magana mwenda by'ebyoma, n'abashaija boona abu yaabaire aine, baaruga Haroshetihagoimu, baateeranira aha mugyera Kiishoni." 
Judges4:14 Debora agira Baraki ati: Mbwenu imuka! Eri izooba niryo Nyakubaho yaakurekurira Sisera kumusingura. Haza niwe akwebembeire. Baraki atyo aruga aha Rushozi Tabora, ashuuma n'abashaija kakumi bamukuratiire." 
Judges4:15 Nyakubaho aburanzya Sisera n'ab'ebigaari bye boona, n'eihe rye ryona, bahunga Baraki, naabaitsa rurara y'obwogi. Na Sisera aguruka omu kigaari kye, ayetuura aha nsi, airuka naahunga." 
Judges4:16 Baraki abinga eihe ry'ab'ebigaari n'ery'engabo, abahitsya Haroshetihagoimu; ab'eihe rya Sisera boona abaitsa zaarurara z'obwogi; tihagira n'omwe owaahonokaho." 
Judges4:17 Reero Sisera yairuka, yaahungira aha ihema rya Yaeli, muka Heberi Omukeeni; ahabw'okuba Yabini omugabe wa Hazori n'ab'eka ya Heberi Omukeeni, bakaba nibataahirana." 
Judges4:18 Yaeli atyo ashohora kubugana Sisera, amugira ati: Mpungukaho, mukama wangye, mpungukaho, otatiina. Nawe atyo amuhungukaho; ataaha omu ihema rye; n'onu amushereka omunda y'omukingo." 
Judges4:19 Sisera agira Yaeli ati: Naakweshengyereza, mpa otwizi tw'okunywa, ahabw'okuba nyine eiriho. N'onu afunduura endyanga y'amate, amuha, anywa, reero amushweka." 
Judges4:20 Sisera amugambira ati: Yeemerera aha muryango gw'eihema; haza ku haraagire owaija akakubuuza ati: Beitu omu haine orimu? Ogire oti: Ngaaha. 
Judges4:21 Bwanyima Yaeli, muka Heberi, ku areeba Sisera yaagwejegyerera kimwe ahabw'oburuhe, aihayo enkondo y'eihema, akwata enyondo, aija mpora naashooba, amuhika, amuteera enkondo omu kanenero, eyogamu ekwata eitaka. Sisera afa atyo." 
Judges4:22 Baraki ku aija abingire Sisera, Yaeli ashohora amubugana; amugira ati: Ija nkworekye omuntu ou orikuronda. N'onu ataaha omu ihema rye, ashangamu Sisera agwire bugango afiire, enkondo y'eihema emwogire omu kanenero." 
Judges4:23 Eryo izooba nikwo Ruhanga yaacwire eishaija Yabini omugabe wa Kanaani, Abaisiraeli nibakyereebera n'agaabo." 
Judges4:24 Abaisiraeli baaguma nibeeyongyera munonga amaani, nibafundiriza Yabini omugabe wa Kanaani, okuhitsya obu baamuhwerekyereize." 
Judges5:1 Eryo izooba, Debora na Baraki mwene Abinoamu, bakeeshongora bati:" 
Judges5:2 Muhimbise Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba abeebembezi beebembeire gye Isiraeli, abantu baayehayo beekundiire." 
Judges5:3 Imwe bagabe 'mwe, nimuhurire! Naimwe bategyeki 'mwe, nimutegye amatu, nyeshongorere Nyakubaho. Reeba, naaza kwevuga ekyevugo ky'okuhimbisa Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
Judges5:4 Ai Nyakubaho, obu waaruga Seiri, obu waahurura nooruga omu kyanga kya Edomu, ensi ekatengyeeta, eiguru ryatetema, ebicu byatoonyerera." 
Judges5:5 Enshozi zikatetemera omu maisho ga Nyakubaho wa Sinaayi, zaatetemera omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
Judges5:6 Omu biro bya Shamugaari mwene Anati, n'omu bya Yaeli, emihanda rugyendwa ekaba etarabwa, abagyenzi nibatoora otuhanda tw'omu mbaju." 
Judges5:7 Obwo abategyeki bahwaire omuri Isiraeli; okuhitsya obu iwe Debora waimukire, okaimuka ori omuzaire omuri Isiraeli." 
Judges5:8 Obu baasiima baaruhanga abasya, nibwo engamba zaatengyerwa omu marembo. Obwo hatariho ngabo, nobu ryakuba eicumu omu Baisiraeli obukumi buna." 
Judges5:9 Omutima gwangye nigwesingiza ahabw'abeebembezi b'omuri Isiraeli, hamwe n'abantu abaayehaireyo kurwana. Nimuhimbise Nyakubaho!" 
Judges5:10 Imwe abagyendera aha ndogoya zaarujeru, naimwe abashutama aha birago birungi munonga, kandi naimwe abagyendesa amaguru omu mihanda, nimukirangaane." 
Judges5:11 Ahi bataha amaizi, ahu amaraka g'abeeshongozi gahuririrwa, niho baayeshongoreire eby'obusinguzi bwa Nyakubaho, obusinguzi bw'abairu be omuri Isiraeli. Bwanyima abantu ba Nyakubaho baashuuma nibaza aha marembo." 
Judges5:12 Sisiimuka, sisiimuka, iwe Debora. Sisiimuka, sisiimuka, oreegye ekyeshongoro! Naiwe Baraki, imuka, okwate abaabaire bakukwatsire, obatware bari enkwatwa, iwe mwene Abinoamu." 
Judges5:13 Batyo ab'ebitiinwa, abaabaire batsigaireho, baashuuma, abantu ba Nyakubaho baashuuma kumurwanisiza ab'amaani." 
Judges5:14 Baaruga Efuraimu, baaza omu ruhanga bakukuratiire, iwe Benyamiini, hamwe na beene waanyu. Abakuru b'amahe baashuuma nibaruga Makiri, N'omuri Zebuluuni haarugamu abaabaire bakwata enkoni y'omukuru w'amahe." 
Judges5:15 Abategyeki b'omu Bisakaari baija na Debora n'abandi Abaisakaari abeesigwa ahari Baraki, baija omu ruhanga bamuri omu ntegye. Abaareubeeni, ahabw'okutaanuukana, baamara omwanya muhango nibahanuurira aha mugyera." 
Judges5:16 N'enki ekikutuurize omu matsibikiro g'entaama, kuhurira emikuri ei barikuziteerera? Omu b'enganda za Reubeeni hakabamu okwebuuza kuhango." 
Judges5:17 Abaagileadi ku baraabe beegumiire seeri ya Yorudaani, kandi Abaadaani bagumiibwe ki omu meeri? Abaasheri bagumire beeshitamiire aha mwegyeego gw'enyanja, bagaramisiriize aha nyambukiro zaabo." 
Judges5:18 Abaazebuluuni n'abantu aboogire amagara, batatiinire kufa, n'Abaanafutaali orugamba barugiire omu kaso." 
Judges5:19 Abagabe baizire baarwana. Abagabe ba Kanaani baarwanira Taanaka, haihi n'amaizi ga Megido, kwonka tibaine feeza zi baanyagire." 
Judges5:20 Enyonyoozi zihurwire niziruga omu iguru, zaarwanisa Sisera ziri omu mihanda yaazo." 
Judges5:21 Omugyera Kiishoni gwabahimintura. Ogwo mugyera gwa ira, omugyera Kiishoni gwababuza oburabo. Mbwenu magara gangye gumizamu n'amaani." 
Judges5:22 Embaraasi zikarigita niziteera emitsindo, zairuka nizikinisa engoga." 
Judges5:23 Mukyeene Merozi; nikwo Maraika wa Nyakubaho arikugira. Mukyeene munonga abatwireyo; ahabw'okuba tibaizire kuha Nyakubaho emikono, kumuha emikono y'okurwanisa ab'amaani." 
Judges5:24 Yaeli aheebwe omugisha okukira abakazi boona. Muka Heberi Omukeeni, aheebwe omugisha okukira abakazi boona abatuura omu mahema." 
Judges5:25 Akamushaba amaizi, onu yaamuha amate; yaamureetera amakamo omu kyanzi ky'ekitiinwa." 
Judges5:26 Akatayo omukono, yaihayo enkondo y'eihema. Omukono gwe gwa buryo gwakwata enyondo ei bakoresa, yaagiteera Sisera, yaamwata omutwe, yaamusheenyagura akanenero." 
Judges5:27 Onu yaayehinya, yaagwa, yaagangarama aha bigyere by'ogwo mukazi. Aha bigyere by'ogwo mukazi, yaayehinya, yaagwa. Ahi yaayehinyiire, niho yaagwire, akafa!" 
Judges5:28 Reero nyina Sisera yaaringuririza omu dirisa. Yaayozya amaisho omu kihengyere naayebuuza ati: Ahabw'enki ekigaari kye kyatuuraho kwija? N'enki ekyasiibyayo endigito y'ebigaari bye? 
Judges5:29 Abaranga be b'obwengye baamugarukamu, nk'oku we yaakwegarukiremu bati:" 
Judges5:30 Ebyo tibaabona eminyago, tiyo barikubagana? Buri mushaija, omuzaana omwe, nari babiri? Na Sisera tarikubagana eminyago y'emyenda y'ebicwererane etariize; emitanda ebiri y'ebicwererane etariize embaju zombi ey'eminyago y'okuhunda amaraka g'omusinguzi?" 
Judges5:31 Mbwenu, ai Nyakubaho, abazigu baawe boona nibakacwekyerere batyo! Kwonka abakukunda nibakamurinkane nk'eizooba ririkuturuka n'amaani. Bwanyima ensi yaamara emyaka makumi ana ehuumwire." 
Judges6:1 Abaisiraeli bakacumura ahari Nyakubaho, nawe yaabarekurira Abamidiyani, baabategyekyera emyaka mushanju." 
Judges6:2 Abamidiyani ku baasingwire Abaisiraeli; Abaisiraeli, ahabw'okwenda kubeerinda, baayetimbira amaaya n'enyanga omu nshozi, kandi baayeyombekyera ebigo bigumire." 
Judges6:3 Ahabw'okuba Abaisiraeli ku baabaire bahinga ebyokurya byabo, Abamidiyani n'Abaamaleki n'abandi bantu b'oburugwa-izooba baija, babateera" 
Judges6:4 basiisirayo kubarwanisa, bacwekyereza ebi beerize omu nsi, okuhikira kimwe omu byanga ebihereraine na Gaaza; babura aku baatsiga omuri Isiraeli, nobu zaakuba entaama, ente, nari endogoya." 
Judges6:5 Manya bakaba baija n'amatungo gaabo n'amahema, baija baingi nk'enzigye; bo n'engamira zaabo batarikubaasa kubarwa; batyo baita ensi, baagihikamu." 
Judges6:6 Abamidiyani baareebesa Abaisiraeli enaku; nabo nikwo kuhoogyera Nyakubaho. 
Judges6:7 Mbwenu Abaisiraeli ku baahoogyeire Mukama ahabw'okwitwa kubi Abamidiyani," 
Judges6:8 nawe yaabatumaho omurangi, yaabagambira ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naabagira ati: Nkabaiha Misiri, naabaiha omu buhuuku," 
Judges6:9 naabaiha omu mikono y'Abanyamisiri, n'omu y'abaabaire nibababonabonesa, naababinga, baabahigiza, naabaha ensi yaabo." 
Judges6:10 Kandi nkabagira nti: Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, mutariramya baaruhanga b'Abaamori abu mutwire omu nsi yaabo. Kwonka ebi naabagambiire, mwayanga kubyetaho." 
Judges6:11 Mbwenu maraika wa Nyakubaho akaija Ofura eya Yoashi, ow'ab'oruganda rwa Abiezeri, yaashutama ahansi y'omuvule; yaashanga omutabani Gideoni naahuura engano omu inyuukiro rya viino, kugishereka Abamidiyani." 
Judges6:12 Maraika wa Nyakubaho yaamubonekyera, yaamugira ati: Iwe mushaija w'amaani 'we emanzi, Nyakubaho ari hamwe naiwe!" 
Judges6:13 Gideoni nawe amugira ati: Mukama wangye, naakweshengyereza, Nyakubaho ku araabe ari hamwe naitwe, ahabw'enki ebi byona bitugwereire? Kandi eby'okutangaaza bye byona ebi baatatenkuriitwe baabaire batugambira, ngu Nyakubaho niwe yaatwihire Misiri, birahi? Mbwenu reeba, Nyakubaho atwecwireho, yaaturekurira Abamidiyani." 
Judges6:14 Nyakubaho atyo amuhindukira, amugira ati: Gyenda n'amaani gaawe aga goona, ojune Abaisiraeli Abamidiyani. Mbwenu shi, tiinye naakutuma?" 
Judges6:15 N'onu amugarukamu ati: Nyakubaho wangye, naakweshengyereza, nimbaasa nta kujuna Isiraeli, ab'omuryango gwaitu bari ab'amaani makye omu b'oruganda rwa Manaase, naanye omu b'eka yaitu ndi omuntu otaine ku ari." 
Judges6:16 Nyakubaho amugarukamu ati: Manya niinyija kuba nkwine, oite Abamidiyani nk'orikwita omuntu omwe." 
Judges6:17 Gideoni amugira ati: Mbwenu ku oraabe wansiima, nyoreka akamanyiso karikuhamya ku niiwe orikugamba naanye." 
Judges6:18 Mbwenu ninkweshengyereza, otaruga aha okuhitsya obu ndagarukye aha ahu ori, nkakureetera omutoijo, nkagukumurikira. N'onu ati: Niinyija kuguma aha okuhitsya obu oraagarukye." 
Judges6:19 Atyo Gideoni aza omuka, aboneza akabuzi n'otugaati otutatumbisiibwe tw'eigaro ry'esaano; enyama agita omu kiibo, amaizi gaayo agata omu rwabya, abimureetera ahansi y'omuvule abimumurikira." 
Judges6:20 Maraika wa Ruhanga amugira ati: Twara enyama n'otugaati otutatumbisiibwe, obite ahari oru rukiri, kandi obishukyeho amaizi g'enyama. Nawe aba nikwo yaagira." 
Judges6:21 Mpaho maraika wa Nyakubaho agorora omukono ogu akwatiise enkoni, eifundo ryayo arikoza aha nyama n'aha tugaati otutatumbisiibwe; ahonaaho omuriro gwimuka niguruga omu rukiri, gwokyeza kimwe enyama n'obugaati obutatumbisiibwe; na maraika wa Nyakubaho abura: Gideoni tamureeba bundi." 
Judges6:22 Reero Gideoni ku amanya ku owaamubonekyera yaaba ari maraika wa Nyakubaho, agira ati: Ai bambe, Mukama Ruhanga! Manya naareebana butunu na maraika waawe!" 
Judges6:23 Kwonka Nyakubaho amugira ati: Huumura, otatiina, torikwija kufa." 
Judges6:24 Bwanyima, aho Gideoni ayombekyeraho Nyakubaho eitambiro, aryeta Yehovashaloomu: Na hati rikiri Ofura ey'aba Abiezeri." 
Judges6:25 Ekyo kiro Nyakubaho akagambira Gideoni ati: Twara enimi ya shoimwe eya kabiri, ey'emyaka mushanju, osheenye eitambiro rya Baali, oteme Ashera eri aha rubaju rwaryo." 
Judges6:26 Haza Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga waawe onyombekyere aha eitambiro, aha mutwe gw'akabungo akeehinguririziibwe ekigo ky'amabaare. Reero ogire egyo nimi ya kabiri ogihongye ebe ekitambo kicwekize, eki oraayokyese ebishate bya Ashera ei oraatemagure." 
Judges6:27 Gideoni atyo atwara abashaija ikumi b'omu baheereza be, akora nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiira. Kwonka ahabw'okutiina munonga ab'eka ye n'ab'omu rurembo, ekyo takikora nyomushana, kureka akikora nyekiro." 
Judges6:28 Reero ab'omu rurembo ku baimukire kare omu kasheeshe, baashanga eitambiro rya Baali risheenyirwe, na Ashera y'aha rubaju rwaryo etemirwe, n'enimi ya kabiri etambiirwe aha itambiro eri yaayombekire." 
Judges6:29 Baabuuzana bati: N'oha okozire eki? Mbwenu ku baaherize kucondooza n'okubuuririza, baagira bati; Gideoni mwene Yoashi niwe akikozire." 
Judges6:30 Mpaho ab'omu rurembo bagambira Yoashi bati: Shohoza mutabani waawe, tumwite, ahabw'okuba asheenyire eitambiro rya Baali; yaatema na Ashera y'aha rubaju rwaryo." 
Judges6:31 Kwonka Yoashi abuuza boona abaabaire bamubambiire, ati: Nimwenda kurwanira Baali, nari kumutonganira? Weena oraamurwanirire n'ow'okwitwa omuri aka kasheeshe. Baali ku araabe ari ruhanga, naayerwaneho, ahabw'okuba niwe basheenyire eitambiro rye." 
Judges6:32 Eryo izooba nikyo bamweteire Yerubaali, amakuru ngu: Leka Baali ebe niyo yaamurwanisa, ahabw'okuba asheenyire eitambiro ryayo." 
Judges6:33 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Abamidiyani boona, n'Abaamaleki, n'ab'oburugwa-izooba, baateeranira hamwe, baayambuka Yorudaani, baasiisira omu ruhita rwa Yezereeli." 
Judges6:34 Kwonka Mutima wa Nyakubaho yaijura Gideoni, yaateera enzamba; Abaabiezeri baahurura, baamukurata." 
Judges6:35 Yaatuma entumwa omu Bamanaase boona, nabo baahurura baamukurata. Yaagaruka yaatuma entumwa omu Baasheri, na Zebuluuni, na Nafutaali, bainamuka baaza kubabugana." 
Judges6:36 Mpaho Gideoni yaagambira Ruhanga ati: Ku oraabe noija kujunisa Abaisiraeli omukono gwangye, nk'oku ongambiire," 
Judges6:37 mbwenu reeba, naata ebyoya by'entaama aha ihuuriro. Ku biraatondweho orume byonka, ahandi omu mbuga haaguma hoomire, obwo nibwo ndamanye ku orikwija kujunisa Isiraeli omukono gwangye, nk'oku ogambire." 
Judges6:38 Haza nikwo kyabaire. Ku yaimukire kare omu kasheeshe kaakuratsireho, yaamiga ebyoya by'entaama, yaakamuuramu orume, rwaijura orucuba." 
Judges6:39 Bwanyima Gideoni yaayeshengyereza Ruhanga ati: Otangirira ekiniga kingi, ka ngambe omurundi gumwe ogu gwonka. Naakweshengyereza, ka nteereho ogundi murundi gumwe gwonka, kugyeza ebi byoya. Naakweshengyereza, mbwenu ebyoya byonka ka bibe nibyo byaguma byomire, haza orume rutonde aha itaka ryonka." 
Judges6:40 Ekyo kiro, Ruhanga yaaba nikwo yaakora; ebyoya byonka byaba nibyo byaguma byomire, kwonka ahandi hoona aha itaka haatondwa orume." 
Judges7:1 Bwanyima, Yerubaali, niwe Gideoni, hamwe n'abantu boona abu yaabaire aine, bakaimuka kare, baasiisira haihi na Eniharodi, orusiisira rw'Abamidiyani rubari aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho omu ruhanga, haihi n'ekibungo Moore." 
Judges7:2 Reero Nyakubaho yaagambira Gideoni ati: Abantu abu oine barengyesereize obwingi, nyowe okubasinguza Abamidiyani; Abaisiraeli batakaanyehimbisaho bakagira bati: Emikono yaitu niyo etujunire." 
Judges7:3 Mbwenu irooko orangirire, abantu boona bakihurire, oti; Omuntu weena orikutiina kandi orikutetema, agarukye omuka. Gideoni atyo abagyeza; abantu obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri bagarukayo; hatsigara kakumi." 
Judges7:4 Nyakubaho agaruka agambira Gideoni ati: Abantu bakiri baingi ekihinguraine; bashuumye aha mugyera, mbakugyerezeho. Ou ndaagire nti: Ogu agyende naiwe, niwe araagyende naiwe, n'ou ndaakugire nti: Ogu atagyenda naiwe, atagyenda." 
Judges7:5 Gideoni ashuumya abantu aha mugyera, Nyakubaho amugira ati: Omuntu weena oraajabe amaizi n'orurimi nk'embwa, omwegyekye hangahari, n'oraatsimbe amaju kunywa, omute ahakwe." 
Judges7:6 Abaatahiise amaizi engaro bakagajabisa orurimi baaba magana ashatu, abandi boona baaganywa batsimbire amaju." 
Judges7:7 Mpaho Mukama agambira Gideoni ati: Abantu magana ashatu abaajaba amaizi nibo ndaabajunise, nkakurekurira Abamidiyani, okabasingura. Mbwenu reka abandi boona bagarukyeyo, biri muntu omu ka ye." 
Judges7:8 Gideoni abo Baisiraeli abaihaho entanda zaabo n'enzamba zaabo, aboohereza, buri muntu kugarukayo omu ihema rye; aguma n'abashaija magana ashatu bonka, orusiisira rw'Abamidiyani rumuri ahaifo omu ruhanga." 
Judges7:9 Ekyo kiro Nyakubaho akagambira Gideoni ati: Imuka, oshuume, oteere orusiisira, ahabw'okuba naarukurekurira." 
Judges7:10 Kwonka ku oraabe nootiina kuzayo wenka, shuuma omuri orwo rusiisira hamwe na Puura omugaragwa waawe." 
Judges7:11 Haza noija kuhurira ebi barikugamba, otetuurukye, ogire amaani g'okuruteera. Atyo ashuuma n'omugaragwa we Puura, bahikira aha myanya erikubandizibwaho ey'engabo eziine eby'okurwanisa omuri orwo rusiisira." 
Judges7:12 Obwo Abamidiyani n'Abaamaleki abantu boona ab'omu burugwa-izooba bateekire enteeko omu ruhanga, bari baingi nk'enzigye, n'engamira zaabo zitarikubarwa, ziri nyingi nk'omusheenyi gw'aha nyanja." 
Judges7:13 Gideoni ku yaahikireyo, yaahurira omuntu naagambira mugyenzi we eki arootsire, naagira ati: Ndootsire ekirooto, naareeba akagaati ka sayiri kaija nikeekumbagaza omu rusiisira rw'Abamidiyani, kaahika aha ihema kaariteera, ryagwa ryakumbagara, ryabandama." 
Judges7:14 Mugyenzi we amurootororera ati: Manya ekyo ti kindi, ni rurara ya Gideoni mwene Yoashi, omushaija w'omu Baisiraeli, ou Ruhanga arekuriire Abamidiyaani n'eihe ryona kubisingura." 
Judges7:15 Gideoni ku yaahuriire eby'ekyo kirooto n'oku baakirootorora, yaatsimba amaju, yaaramya Ruhanga. Bwanyima yaagaruka omu rusiisira rw'Abaisiraeli, yaabagira ati: Nimwimukye. Manya Nyakubaho yaabarekurira eihe ry'Abamidiyani kurisingura." 
Judges7:16 Abo bashaija be magana ashatu yaababaganisa omu mitwe eshatu; boona yaabakwatsa enzamba n'enyungu zirimu busha; baazitamu emuri. 
Judges7:17 Yaabagira ati: Mumpangye amaisho; haza oku ndaagire, mube nikwo mwagira. Ku ndaahikye ah'orusiisira rurikutandikira, mukore eki ndaakore." 
Judges7:18 Ku ndaateere enzamba hamwe n'abu nyine boona, naimwe muziteerere aha mbaju zoona ez'orusiisira, nimwamuza muti: Ahabwa Nyakubaho n'ahabwa Gideoni." 
Judges7:19 Gideoni atyo n'abashaija igana abu yaabaire aine bahika ahu orusiisira rurikutandikira abantu baahirwayo, ah'abarinzi baihaihanira; batyo bateera enzamba, baata enyungu ezi baabaire bakwaitse." 
Judges7:20 Egyo mitwe eshatu eteera enzamba, eyata enyungu; obwo bakwatiise emuri emikono yaabo ya bumosho, kandi eya buryo ekwaitse enzamba z'okuteera. Reero bayogoora bati: Rurara, ahabwa Nyakubaho n'ahabwa Gideoni." 
Judges7:21 Buri muntu yaayemerera omu mwanya gwe, beehinguririize orusiisira; engabo z'Abamidiyani zoona zairuka niziyogoorekana, zaahunga." 
Judges7:22 Abaisiraeli ku baateire enzamba magana ashatu, Nyakubaho yaareetera ab'omu ihe ryona kutukurana na rurara, omuntu naita mugyenzi we. Eihe ryabo ryahunga, ryahika Beetishiita ogurikugarura Zeerera, ryahika Abelimehoola, haihi na Tabati." 
Judges7:23 Kandi Abaisiraeli ab'oruganda rwa Nafutaali, n'ab'orwa Asheri, n'ab'orwa Manaase boona, baahurura, baabinga Abamidiyani." 
Judges7:24 Gideoni yaatuma entumwa omu nsi yoona ey'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, naagira ati: Mushuume, murwanise Abamidiyani, mubatangire aha maizi, okuhika Betibaara n'ahari Yorudaani. Batyo bahuruza abashaija ba Efuraimu boona, bakwata emyanya erimu amaizi, okuhika Betibaara na Yorudaani." 
Judges7:25 Bakwata abategyeki babiri b'Abamidiyani, Orebu na Zeebu. Orebu bamwitira aha rukiri rwa Orebu, na Zeebu bamwitira aha inyuukiro rya viino erya Zeebu, obwo babingire Abamidiyani. Bareetera Gideoni emitwe, ogwa Orebu n'ogwa Zeebu, seeri ya Yorudaani." 
Judges8:1 Mbwenu abashaija ba Efuraimu bakabuuza Gideoni bati: Otutuzire ki okutatuhuruza, nooza kurwanisa Abamidiyani? Batyo baamuhaahuuza munonga." 
Judges8:2 Nawe abagarukamu ati: Mbwenu nyowe ka ntaine ki nkozire, mwakigyeragyeranisa n'ebi mukozire? Emizaabibu y'empumbano ey'Abaefuraimu terikukira emizaabibu y'Abaabiezeeri eshoromeirwe hamwe?" 
Judges8:3 Ruhanga abarekuriire Orebu ne Zeebu, abategyeki b'Abamidiyani, mwabasingura. Mbwenu nyowe ka ntaine ki nkozire, mwakigyeragyeranisa n'ebi mukozire! Ku yaabagambiire ebyo, ekiniga kyabo kyaikaikana." 
Judges8:4 Gideoni atyo ahika ahari Yorudaani, agyambuka n'abashaija be magana ashatu abu yaabaire aine, bagwire enshazi, kwonka bagumiizemu nibabinga abazigu." 
Judges8:5 Gideoni agira Abasukooti ati: Naabeeshengyereza, nimumpeere aba bantu bankuratiire ak'okurya, ahabw'okuba barembire; kandi nyowe nkibingire Zeeba na Zaalumuuna abagabe b'Abamidiyani." 
Judges8:6 Abakuru b'Abasukooti bamugarukamu bati: Mbwenu shi, Zeeba na Zaalumuuna waabakwatsire, tukabona kuha engabo zaawe ebyokurya?" 
Judges8:7 Na Gideoni abagira ati: Nimwirooko! Kwonka Nyakubaho ku arandekurire Zeeba na Zaalumuuna, naabakwata, emibiri yaanyu niinyija kugitaaguza amahwa g'emityaza n'ag'emikwatangwe." 
Judges8:8 Ku aruga aho, ainamuka, aza Penueli, n'abaayo abagambira ebigambo nk'ebyo. Kwonka Abapenueli bamugarukamu nk'ebi Abasukooti bamugambiire." 
Judges8:9 Nawe agira abo bantu ba Penueli ati: Ku ndaagarukye buhooro, niinyija kusheenya ogu munaara." 
Judges8:10 Obwo Zeeba na Zaalumuuna bakaba bari Kerikoori, n'engabo zaabo akakumi kamwe n'enkumi itaano, abaahonokire aha ngabo z'ab'omu ihe ry'oburugwa-izooba, abaabaire bafiiremu abashaija akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi bubiri, enkwata-ngabo." 
Judges8:11 Gideoni anyegyera, naatoora omuhanda gw'abagyenzi; baraara omu mahema aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba bwa Nooba na Yogibeha, ateera eihe ryabaire ryehugiireho," 
Judges8:12 Zeeba na Zaalumuuna bahunga, ababinga, akwata abo bagabe b'Abamidiyani bombi, Zeeba na Zaalumuuna; engabo zaabo zoona azihahaaza, zitaataana." 
Judges8:13 Bwanyima Gideoni mwene Yoashi akatabaaruka naaruga aha rugamba, yaareetwa ogurikwinamukira Heresi." 
Judges8:14 Yaakwata omutsigazi w'Abasukooti, yaamubuuza. N'onu yaamuhandiikira amaziina g'abategyeki n'abakuru b'Abasukooti, abashaija makumi mushanju na mushanju." 
Judges8:15 Atyo ahika Abasukooti, abagira ati: Reeba Zeeba na Zaalumuuna, abu munkiniikiise, nimungirira muti: Mbwenu Zeeba na Zaalumuuna waabakwatsire, tukabona kuha engabo zaawe ezigwire enshazi ebyokurya?" 
Judges8:16 Mpaho akwata abakuru b'omuri orwo rurembo, aihayo amahwa g'emityaza n'ag'emikwata ngwe, agahenesesa abo bashaija ba Sukooti." 
Judges8:17 Asheenya omunaara gwa Penueli, aita abashaija b'omuri orwo rurembo." 
Judges8:18 Bwanyima abuuza Zeeba na Zaalumuuna, ati: Abashaija abu mwaitiire Tabora, bakaba nibashusha ki? Bamugarukamu bati: Bakaba nibashusha nk'oku orikushusha! Buri omwe akaba naashusha omwana w'omugabe." 
Judges8:19 Nawe abagira ati: Manya bakaba bari beene tata, aba maawe kinzaara. Mbwenu nindahira Nyakubaho ohuriire, nti: Kuri mutarabaitsire, naimwe tinkaabaitsire." 
Judges8:20 Atyo aragiira Yeteri omujigaijo gwe ati: Imuka, obaite. Kwonka ogwo mutsigazi tanyontorayo rurara ye, ahabw'okushangwa ari muto, atiina." 
Judges8:21 Zeeba na Zaalumuuna nikwo kugira Gideoni bati: Ba niiwe waimuka, otwite. Manya enkubito eruga omu ibega. Gideoni atyo aimuka, aita Zeeba na Zaalumuuna, engamira zaabo azicwijura ebirezi ebi zaabaire zijwaire omu bitsya." 
Judges8:22 Bwanyima Abaisiraeli bakagira Gideoni bati: Ba niiwe waaba omutegyeki waitu, iwe na mutabani waawe, na mwijukuru waawe; ahabw'okuba otukirize Abamidiyani." 
Judges8:23 Gideoni abagarukamu ati: Tindikwija kubategyeka; na mutabani wangye taribategyeka, kureka Nyakubaho niwe araabategyekye." 
Judges8:24 Kwonka Gideoni abagira ati: Naanye ka ngire eki naabashaba. Buri muntu omuriimwe ampe empeta z'omu matu ezi anyagire. Manya, Abamidiyani bakaba bajwara empeta z'ezaabu omu matu ahabw'okuba bakaba bari Abaishimaeli." 
Judges8:25 Nabo bamugarukamu bati: Twaza kuzikuha n'omutima murungi. Batyo baara omwenda aha nsi, buri muntu agunagaho empeta ze z'omu matu, ezi yaanyagire." 
Judges8:26 Empeta z'omu matu ez'ezaabu, ezi yaabashabire, zihitsya oburemeezi bwa kiloguraamu z'ezaabu rukumi na magana mushanju, otabariiremu ebirezi, n'amahunde, n'emyenda ya bujwa ejwarwa abagabe b'Abamidiyani; kandi otataireho emikuufu y'omu bitsya by'engamira zaabo." 
Judges8:27 Gideoni atyo abikoramu efodi, agita omu rurembo rwe rwa Ofura; Abaisiraeli boona baguma nibahampukirayo kugiramya; haza ebeera Gideoni n'ab'eka ye ekiina ky'aha muryango." 
Judges8:28 Abamidiyani baasingurwa batyo Abaisiraeli, tibaagira bu baimukize omutwe obundi. Ensi yaaguma eine obusingye okumara emyaka makumi ana omu biro bya Gideoni." 
Judges8:29 Yerubaali mwene Yoashi akagyenda, yaaguma atwire omu ka ye." 
Judges8:30 Gideoni ogwo akaba aine abatabani makumi mushanju abu ayezaariire, ahabw'okuba akaba aine abakazi baingi." 
Judges8:31 Kandi omukazi we ekinyanshunju, ow'omuri Shekemu, nawe akamuzaaraho omutabani, yaamweta Abimeleki." 
Judges8:32 Bwanyima Gideoni mwene Yoashi yaafa yaahikire omu ngingo za bukuru, baamuziika omu kituuro kya Yoashi ishe, omuri Ofura ey'Abaabiezeeri." 
Judges8:33 Gideoni ku yaaherize ati kufa, Abaisiraeli baagaruka baaramya Baabaali; Baalibeeriti baamuhindura ruhanga waabo," 
Judges8:34 tibaijuka Mukama Ruhanga waabo, owaabaire abaiha omu mikono y'abazigu baabo boona ababeehinguririize;" 
Judges8:35 kandi tibaagirira mbabazi ab'omuryango gwa Yerubaali, niwe Gideoni, kumuzimuurira ebirungi byona ebi yaakoreire Isiraeli." 
Judges9:1 Mbwenu Abimeleki mwene Yerubaali akaza Shekemu omuri baanyinarimi, yaabagambirira hamwe n'abaine obuzaare na nyina, ati:" 
Judges9:2 Nimubuuze Abanyashekemu boona muti: Ekirungi ahariimwe n'okutegyekwa beene Yerubaali makumi mushanju, nari okutegyekwa omuntu omwe? Kandi mwijukye ku ndi owaanyu w'aha mara." 
Judges9:3 Mpaho ab'oruganda rwa nyina baamugambirira Abashekemu boona ebi yaabagambira byona, nabo baasiima kukuratira Abimeleki, nibagira bati: Ogu ni mwene waitu." 
Judges9:4 Baiha omu ndaaro ya Baaliberiti ebicweka by'efeeza makumi mushanju, baabiha Abimeleki, nawe yaabiha abantu entakimazire, kandi ebizahambuki, yaabaguriirira, baamukurata." 
Judges9:5 Yaaza Ofura owa ishe, yaashangayo beene ishe, batabani ba Yerubaali makumi mushanju, yaabaitira aha rukiri; kwonka Yotamu mwene Yerubaali omuto, yaaba niwe yaahonokaho, ahabw'okuba akeeshereka." 
Judges9:6 Abanyashekemu boona hamwe n'Ababeetimiilo boona, baayeteerana, baagyenda baayemekyera Abimeleki aha muvule gwa Shekemu." 
Judges9:7 Ekyo ku baakigambiire Yotamu, yaagyenda yaayemerera ahamutwe gw'Orushozi Gerizimu, yaayamuza naabagambira ati: Yaimwe bantu ba Shekemu 'mwe, nimuntegye okutu, naimwe Ruhanga akubategye." 
Judges9:8 Eizooba rimwe emiti ekaimuka kweyemekyera omugabe w'okugitegyeka, yaagambira omuoliva eti: Tutegyekye!" 
Judges9:9 Omuoliva gwagigira guti: Mbwenu nimwenda ntsigyeho amajuta gangye agahaisisa baaruhanga n'abantu ekitiinwa, nze kwecundira ahaiguru y'emiti?" 
Judges9:10 Egyo miti egira omutiini eti: Ija, otutegyekye!" 
Judges9:11 Omutiini gugigarukamu guti: Nimwenda ntsigisibwe obunuzi bwangye n'ebijuma byangye birungi, nze kwecunda ahaiguru y'emiti?" 
Judges9:12 Egyo miti egambira omuzaabibu eti: Ija, otutegyekye!" 
Judges9:13 Omuzaabibu gugigarukamu guti: Nimwenda ngu ntsigyeho viino yangye eshemuura baaruhanga n'abantu, nze kwecunda ahaiguru y'emiti?" 
Judges9:14 Bwanyima emiti yoona egira omukwatangwe eti: Ija otutegyekye! 
Judges9:15 Omukwatangwe gugigarukamu guti: Buzimazima, ku muraabe nimwenda kuunyemeka kuba omugabe waanyu, nimwije mwegame omu kicuucu kyangye; kwonka ku kiraabe kitabaire kwo, omuriro nigwija kuruga omuri aga mahwa g'omukwatangwe, gwokyeze kimwe kaarwenda za Lebanooni." 
Judges9:16 Hati ku muraabe mwayemeka Abimeleki omu bwesigwa n'omu mazima, kandi ku muraabe mwatwaza gye Yerubaali n'ab'omuryango gwe, mukamuzimuurira ebirungi ebi yaakozire;" 
Judges9:17 haza tata yaabarwaniriire, akooga amagara, akabaiha omu mikono y'Abamidiyani;" 
Judges9:18 mbwenu eri izooba mwaimuka, mwateera eka ye, mwaitira aha rukiri abatabani makumi mushanju, mwayemeka Abimeleki omwana w'omuzaana we, ngu ategyekye Abanyashekemu, ngu niho arikuzaaranwa naimwe;" 
Judges9:19 mbwenu eri izooba eki mwakorera Yerubaali n'ab'oruganda rwe ku muraabe mwakibakora kiri eky'obwesigwa, kandi eky'amazima, nimwesiime; Abimeleki, nawe ayesiime ahabwanyu." 
Judges9:20 Kwonka ku kiraabe kitari kityo, k'omuriro gurugye ahari Abimeleki, gwokyeze kimwe Abanyashekemu n'Ababeetimiilo, kandi gurugye aha Banyashekemu n'aha Babeetimiilo, gwokyeze kimwe Abimeleki." 
Judges9:21 Yotamu ku aheza kugamba ebyo, airuka ahunga, aza Beeri, aba niyo yaatuura, ahabw'okutiina Abimeleki mukuru we." 
Judges9:22 Abimeleki akamara emyaka eshatu naategyeka Abaisiraeli. 
Judges9:23 Ruhanga yaayohereza ekyago kwanganisa Abimeleki n'Abanyashekemu; Abanyashekemu baaguma nibamugobeza, nibamugomera." 
Judges9:24 Ekyo kikabaho ngu eby'obwinazi ebi baakoreire beene Yerubaali makumi mushanju biraarire Abimeleki mwene waabo, owaabaitsire, n'eshagama yaabo emutukurire hamwe n'Abanyashekemu abaamuhaire emikono kwita beene ishe." 
Judges9:25 Mbwenu Abashekemu bakata abantu aha mitwe y'enshozi kugwera Abimeleki, kandi baaguma nibambura ebintu by'abarikuraba omuri ogwo muhanda. Ekyo abantu baakigambira Abimeleki." 
Judges9:26 Reero Gaali mwene Ebedi ku yaizire Shekemu na beene ishe, Abanyashekemu baamugiraho obwesigye." 
Judges9:27 Batyo baashohora, baaza omu misiri, baacwa ebijuma by'emizaabibu omu misiri yaabo, baabinyuuka, baagira obugyenyi, baaza n'omu ndaaro ya ruhanga waabo, baarya, banywa, kandi baarogota ahari Abimeleki." 
Judges9:28 Na Gaali mwene Ebedi yaabagira ati: Abimeleki niwe oha, itwe Abanyashekemu kutuhindura abairu be? Hari mwene Yerubaali na Zebuli omukungu we, bakaba batarikutegyekwa Abahamori ishe wa Shekemu? Mbwenu ahabw'enki naatutegyeka?" 
Judges9:29 Kuri niinye ndikutegyeka aba bantu, naaba niinyekiza Abimeleki ngugu, mmuhiga nimmugira nti: Huruza engabo zaawe zoona, oije, turwane." 
Judges9:30 Zebuli omutegyeki w'orurembo ku yahuriire ebi Gaali mwene Ebedi yaagambire, ekiniga kyamucwa amaraka." 
Judges9:31 Yaatuma entumwa ahari Abimeleki, zaamushanga Aruuma, zaamugira ziti: Reeba, Gaali mwene Ebedi na beene ishe baizire Shekemu. Mbwenu nibaimukiriza ab'omu rurembo kukugomera." 
Judges9:32 N'ahabw'ekyo imuka, oije nyekiro n'abashaija bu oine, mugwere omu ishwa." 
Judges9:33 Reero omu kasheeshe, eizooba ku riraaturukye riti, mwimukye kare, musyokyere orurembo, muruteere. Haza Gaali n'abashaija bu aine ku baraashohore kukurwanisa, obakoreho nk'oku orikubaasa." 
Judges9:34 Abimeleki n'abu yaabaire aine boona baimuka nyekiro, bagwera ab'omuri Shekemu, beebaganiisemu emitwe ena." 
Judges9:35 Gaali mwene Ebedi ku ashohora, yaayemerera omu irembo ry'orurembo, Abimeleki n'abu yaabaire aine bahuruutuka ahi beesherekire." 
Judges9:36 Gaali ku abareeba, agira Zebuli ati: Reeba, abantu nibashuuma, nibaruga omu nshozi! Zebuli amugarukamu ati; Nooreba ebinyimanyimi by'omu nshozi, oshusha oti n'abantu." 
Judges9:37 Gaali amugambira obwa kabiri ati: Reeba, abantu nibashuuma, nibaruga rwagati y'ebibungo, kandi ogundi mutwe gwaija nigureetwa aha Murinzi gw'omuvure." 
Judges9:38 Zebuli nikwo kumugira ati: Mbwenu nyamyehimbiso yaawe eri erahi? Iwe ogizire oti Abimeleki niwe oha itwe okuba abairu be! Mbwenu shi abo tibo bantu bu obaire noogaya? Irooko nu, orwane nabo." 
Judges9:39 Gaali nawe tahwama, ahurura ayebembeire Abanyashekemu, arwanisa Abimeleki." 
Judges9:40 Abimeleki amubinga, n'onu amuhunga. Abimeleki amwitamu abantu baingi; emitumbi egyenda neerambirirana, okwiha aho okuhika aha irembo ry'orurembo." 
Judges9:41 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Abimeleki yaaguma Aruuma, na Zebuli yaabinga Gaali na beene waabo, tibaatuura Shekemu." 
Judges9:42 Aha izooba ryakuratsireho, abantu bakashohora, baaza omu misiri. Haagira owaakigambira Abimeleki." 
Judges9:43 Nawe yaatwara engabo ze, yaazibaganisamu ebicweka bishatu, baabagwera omu misiri. Ku yaanagireyo ati eriisho, yaareba abantu nibaruga omu rurembo, yaabateera kitaraariire, yaabaita." 
Judges9:44 Abimeleki n'omutwe gw'engabo zi yaabaire aine baahuruutukayo baayemerera aha irembo ry'orurembo. Reero endiijo mitwe y'engabo yaasyokyera abaabaire bari omu misiri, yaabaita." 
Judges9:45 Abimeleki eryo izooba yaarirenzya naarwanisa ab'omu rurembo, yaarukwata, yaita abaabaire barurimu; yaarushenyagura, yaarucwa obusaasingo." 
Judges9:46 Ab'omu munaara gwa Shekemu ku baakihuriire, baahungira omu kishengye ky'ahansi y'endaaro ya Eliberiti." 
Judges9:47 Haza haagira owaagambira Abimeleki ku abantu b'omu Munaara gwa Shekemu boona niyo bateeraniire. 
Judges9:48 Abimeleki n'engabo zi yaabaire aine nikwo kwinamuka bakaza aha Rushozi Zalooni, Abimeleki akakwata empango, akatema eitaagi ry'amashanju, akarita aha ibega. Reero akagira abu yaabaire aine ati: Eki mwareeba ninkora, naimwe mukikore ahonaaho nk'oku naakikora." 
Judges9:49 Mpaho buri omwe omuribo yaatema eitaagi rye ery'amashanju, yaatwaza nk'oku Abimeleki yaagira, yaaryegyekyerera ekyo kishengye, baakikoomeera omuriro, gwayotsya abakirimu. Abantu b'omu Munaara gwa Shekemu, abashaija n'abakazi abarikuhika nka rukumi baafa batyo." 
Judges9:50 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Abimeleki yaaza Tebezi, yaaruteeraho ensiisira, yaarukwata." 
Judges9:51 Kwonka omu rurembo orwo haashangwa harimu omunaara gugumire; abashaija n'abakazi b'omu rurembo boona baaguhungiramu, baayekingirana, baatemba aha mutwe gwagwo," 
Judges9:52 Abimeleki nawe aija, ahika ahari ogwo munaara aguteera. Ku aba yaahika aha rwigi rwagwo kurwotsya," 
Judges9:53 omukazi arekyera eseiso agimuteera omutwe agwata. 
Judges9:54 Abimeleki ahonaaho ayeta omutsigazi owaabaire amukwatiire eby'okurwanisa, amugira ati: Ihayo rurara yaawe, onyite; abantu barekye kugira bati: Omukazi niwe amwitsire. Ogwo mutsigazi amushogoita, n'onu afa." 
Judges9:55 Abaisiraeli ku baarebire Abimeleki yaafa, baayambuka; buri muntu yaataaha owaabo." 
Judges9:56 Ruhanga yaahoora atyo Abimeleki, naamutura ekicumuro ki yaacumwire ahari ishe, obu yaita beene ishe makumi mushanju." 
Judges9:57 Kandi ebibi byona ebi Abashekemu baakozire, Ruhanga yaabibakumbagariza; omukyeeno gwa Yotamu mwene Yerubaali gwabahitsya." 
Judges10:1 Abimeleki ku yaafiire, haimuka Toola mwene Pua, mwijukuru wa Dodo, ow'omu ruganda rwa Isakaari, kujuna Isiraeli. Akaba atwire Shamiri omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu." 
Judges10:2 Akaramurira Isiraeli emyaka makumi abiri n'eshatu, bwanyima yaafa, baamuziika Shamiri." 
Judges10:3 Ogwo ku yaarugireho, haimuka Yairo Omugileadi, yaamara emyaka makumi abiri n'ebiri ari omuramuzi w'Abaisiraeli." 
Judges10:4 Akaba aine abatabani makumi ashatu, abaabaire batemba endogoya nto makumi ashatu, baine endembo makumi ashatu, ezirikwetwa Haavoti-Yairo n'eri izooba, eziri omu nsi ya Gileadi." 
Judges10:5 Bwanyima Yairo akafa, baamuziika Kamoni." 
Judges10:6 Mbwenu Abaisiraeli bakagaruka baakorera Nyakubaho ekirikumugwisa kubi, baaramya Baabaali na Baashitarooti; baaruhanga ba Siriya, n'aba Sidoni, n'aba Moabu, n'ab'Abaamoni, n'ab'Abafilisiti; baimuura Nyakubaho, tibaamuramya." 
Judges10:7 Nyakubaho yaagirira Abaisiraeli ekiniga kingi, yaabarekurira Abafilisiti n'Abaamoni." 
Judges10:8 Baita kubi Abaisiraeli omuri ogwo mwaka. Baamara emyaka ikumi na munaana nibareebesa enaku Abaisiraeli abaabaire batwire seeri ya Yorudaani, omu nsi y'Abaamoni ey'omu Gileadi," 
Judges10:9 kandi Abaamoni baayambuka Yorudaani kurwanisa Abaayuda, n'Abaabenyamiini, n'ab'oruganda rwa Efuraimu; baaguma nibaganzya munonga Abaisiraeli." 
Judges10:10 Abaisiraeli nikwo kutakira Nyakubaho bati: Tukucumwireho, twakwimuura, Iwe Ruhanga waitu, twagaragira Baabaali." 
Judges10:11 Nyakubaho nawe agira Abaisiraeli ati: Tindabajunire Abanyamisiri, n'Abaamori, n'Abaamoni n'Abafilisiti?" 
Judges10:12 Abaasidoni nabo n'Abaamaleki, n'Abaamaoni obu baabaita kubi mukampoogyera, ka naababajunire." 
Judges10:13 Mbwenu, nk'oku muunyimwire, mukagaragira baaruhanga abandi, naanye tinkibajuna bundi." 
Judges10:14 Nimwirooko, muhoogyere baaruhanga abu mwesiimiire, babe nibo baabajuna mugwirweho akabi." 
Judges10:15 Abaisiraeli baagarukamu Nyakubaho bati: Tucumwire! Mbwenu otukore eki oraareebe ngu kihikire; kwonka nitukweshengyereza eri izooba otukize. 
Judges10:16 Batyo baiha omuribo baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga, baaramya Nyakubaho; nawe yaagira obujune bwingi ahabw'enaku z'Abaisiraeli. Nawe tiyaabaasa kugumisiriza kureeba Abaisiraeli nibongyera kureebesibwa enaku." 
Judges10:17 Bwanyima Abaamoni baahurura, baateera ensiisira omuri Gileadi; Abaisiraeli nabo baayeteerana, baasiisira Mizipa." 
Judges10:18 Reero abantu bakuru aba Gileadi baabuuzana bati: N'oha oraabanze kurwanisa Abaamoni? Ogwo niwe araabe omukuru w'abatwire omuri Gileadi boona. 
Judges11:1 Mbwenu Yefuta Omugileadi akaba ari omushaija emanzi rugambwa; kwonka ari mutabani wa maraaya ou Gileadi yaamuzaireho. 
Judges11:2 Kandi muka Gileadi nawe akamuzaarira aboojo. Mbwenu, batabani b'omukazi we ku baakuzire, baabinga Yefuta. Bamugira bati: Toribagana naitwe by'obuhunguzi bw'eka ya tataitwe, ahabw'okuba ori omwana w'ondiijo mukazi." 
Judges11:3 Yefuta nikwo kuhunga beene ishe, akatuura omu nsi ya Toobu. Haza abantu abaabaire bataine mugasho baaguma nibamuteeraniraho, nibahurura nawe." 
Judges11:4 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, Abaamoni baateera Abaisiraeli." 
Judges11:5 Abaamoni ku baateire Abaisiraeli, abakuru ba Gileadi baaza kuhuruza Yefuta omu nsi ya Toobu." 
Judges11:6 Baamugira bati: Ija, obe mukuru waitu, turwanise Abaamoni." 
Judges11:7 Yefuta yaagarukamu abakuru b'Abagileadi ati: Tiimwe mwanyangire, mukambinga omu ka ya tata? Mbwenu mwanyijaho, ngu ahabw'okuba muri omu kabi?" 
Judges11:8 Abakuru b'Abagileadi baamugira bati: Eki twakugarukiraho n'okwenda ngu ogyende naitwe, turwanise Abaamoni, kandi obe omukuru w'abatwire Gileadi boona." 
Judges11:9 Nawe abagarukamu ati: Ku murangarure omuka kurwanisa Abaamoni, haza Nyakubaho yaabandekurira, niinyija kuba mukuru waanyu?" 
Judges11:10 Abakuru ba Gileadi baagira Yefuta bati: Nyakubaho niwe araabe mushinja waitu naiwe. Buzimazima nitwija kukora nk'oku waagamba. 
Judges11:11 Yefuta atyo agyenda n'abakuru ba Gileadi, abantu bamuhindura mukuru waabo, kandi omwebembezi waabo. Na Yefuta ahigira Mizipa omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Judges11:12 Mbwenu Yefuta akatuma aha mugabe w'Abaamoni, naamugira ati: Nontura ki, okwija kuteera ensi yangye?" 
Judges11:13 Omugabe w'Abaamoni yaagarukamu entumwa za Yefuta ati: N'ahabw'okuba Abaisiraeli ku baarugire Misiri baanyaga ensi yangye, okwiha Arunooni okuhika Yaboki na Yorudaani. Mbwenu gitugarurire n'obusingye." 
Judges11:14 Yefuta yaagaruka yaatuma entumwa aha mugabe w'Abaamoni ati: 
Judges11:15 Mumugambire muti: Yefuta naakugira ngu Abaisiraeli tibaranyagire nsi y'Abaamoabu, nobu yaakuba ey'Abaamoni." 
Judges11:16 Kureka Abaisiraeli ku baarugire Misiri, baaraba omu Ihamba, baahika aha Nyanja Erikutukura, bwanyima baahika Kadeshi." 
Judges11:17 Reero Abaisiraeli baatuma entumwa aha mugabe w'Abaedomu, bati: Nitukweshengyereza, otwikirize turabe omu nsi yaawe. Kwonka omugabe wa Edomu ebiti yaabihendera omu matu. Baagaruka baatuma aha mugabe w'Abamoabu, nawe tiyaikiriza. Abaisiraeli nikwo kuguma Kadeshi." 
Judges11:18 Bwanyima, baimutsya orugyendo, baaraba omu Ihamba, baayekiikuura ensi ya Edomu n'eya Moabu, baahika aha bukiizi bwa burugwa-izooba obw'ensi ya Moabu, baasiisira seeri ya Arunooni; kwonka tibaataaha mu nsi y'Abamoabu, ahabw'okuba Arunooni niyo yaabaire eri omwatano gwa Moabu." 
Judges11:19 Abaisiraeli baatuma entumwa aha mugabe w'Abaamoni owa Heshibooni nibamugira bati: Nitukweshengyereza, oturekye turabe omu nsi yaawe, tuhikye omu yaitu." 
Judges11:20 Kwonka Sihooni tarenzire Baisiraeli kuraba omu nsi ye; yaahuruza abantu be boona, yaasiisira Yahazi, yaarwanisa abo Baisiraeli." 
Judges11:21 Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli yaarekurira Abaisiraeli Sihooni n'abantu be boona, baabasingura. Abaisiraeli nikwo kukubuura ensi y'Abaamoni yoona ei baabaire batwiremu." 
Judges11:22 Kandi baakubuura ensi y'Abaamori yoona, okwiha Arunooni okuhika Yaboki, n'okwiha aha Ihamba okuta Yorudaani." 
Judges11:23 Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ku araabe yaabingire Abaamori bakahigiza abantu be Abaisiraeli, mbwenu iwe nooyenda kubakubuura?" 
Judges11:24 Iwe torikwija kutunga ebi Kemoshi ruhanga waawe arikukuha kukubuura? Naitwe byona ebi Mukama Ruhanga waitu arikutukubuurira, nibyo turaatungye." 
Judges11:25 Mbwenu iwe oine eki orikukiza Balaki mwene Zipori omugabe wa Moabu? Akaba arahayire Abaisiraeli, nari akaba aratengire orugamba kubarwanisa?" 
Judges11:26 Obu Abaisiraeli baabaire batwire Heshibooni n'omu birorero byabo, na Aroeri n'ebirorero byayo, n'omu ndembo z'aha myegyeego ya Arunooni zoona, okumara emyaka magana ashatu, ahabw'enki mutarabikubwire omuri obwo bunaku?" 
Judges11:27 N'ahabw'ekyo nyowe tiinyine ki nkushobeize; kureka niiwe orikunshaagiza, okandwanisa. Nyakubaho Omucwi w'emanja eri izooba abe niwe yaashoboorora Abaisiraeli n'Abaamoni." 
Judges11:28 Kwonka omugabe w'Abaamoni tareetaire ha bi Yefuta yaamutumireho. 
Judges11:29 Mbwenu Mutima wa Mukama akaija ahari Yefuta, n'onu yaaraba omu nsi ya Gileadi n'eya Manaase, yaagumizamu yaahika Mizipa eya Gileadi. Ku yaarugire Mizipa eya Gileadi, yaayogaho, yaahika omu Baamoni." 
Judges11:30 Reero Yefuta yaahiga omu maisho ga Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ku orandekurire Abaamoni, naabasingura," 
Judges11:31 ku nditabaaruka mbasingwire, weena oribanza kushohora omu muryango gw'enju yangye kuntangirira, aryaba owaawe, mmuhongye, abe ekitambo kicwekize." 
Judges11:32 Yefuta atyo ayambuka, ahika Abaamoni, abarwanisa; haza Nyakubaho abamurekurira, abasingura." 
Judges11:33 Abacoocoora, okwiha Aroeri okuhika haihi na Miiniti, kandi akwata endembo makumi abiri, okuhika Abeli-Keramimu, abaitamu abantu baingi munonga. Abaamoni bagomookyera batyo Abaisiraeli." 
Judges11:34 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Yefuta yaija naagaruka owe Mizipa. Ahonaaho muhara we yaashohora kumubugana, naateera enshandaazo, naazina. Haza niwe yaabaire ari omwana we heza, ataine mutabani, nobu yaakuba ondiijo mwishiki." 
Judges11:35 Yefuta ku yaamureebire yaataagura ebi ajwaire, yaamugira ati: Ai bambe, mwana wangye! ebishi wangwisiza akagwe, wandeetera kugira amaganya maingi! Manya nkeehangamura, naaraganisa Nyakubaho, kandi eki naahigire tinkikireka." 
Judges11:36 Muhara we amugira ati: Taata, ku oraabe oine eki waayaturiire Nyakubaho, ongire nk'ekyarugire omu kanwa kaawe oku kiri, ahabw'okuba Mukama akuhooreire abazigu baawe Abaamoni." 
Judges11:37 Agaruka agira ishe ati: Ninkushaba onkorere eki, onyikirize ameezi abiri gonka, ngyende nzengyerere omu nshozi, ncurire okugwa aha mahega kwangye, hamwe na bagyenzi bangye." 
Judges11:38 N'onu amugira ati: Irooko! Amwohereza okumarayo ameezi abiri. Ogwo mwishiki agyenda hamwe na bagyenzi be, bacurira omu nshozi okugwa aha mahega kwe." 
Judges11:39 Ameezi abiri ku gaahikire, yaagaruka owa ishe, onu yaamugira nk'oku yaahigire. Yaafa atakamanyaga mushaija. Okwiha obwo gwaba omugyenzo omuri Isiraeli," 
Judges11:40 buri mwaka Abaisiraeli kuguma nibaruga omuka kuza kucurira muhara wa Yefuta Omugileadi okumara ebiro bina. 
Judges12:1 Beene Efuraimu bakeeteerana, baahurura, baayambuka, baahika Zafoni, baagira Yefuta bati: Ahabw'enki oyambukire kurwanisa Abaamoni, otatwetsire kugyenda naiwe? Mbwenu nitwija kukwokyeza omu nju." 
Judges12:2 Yefuta yaabeehohoora ati: Nyowe n'abantu bangye tubaire twine empaka nyingi n'Abaamoni, kandi ku mbeetsire, mwayanga kubanjuna." 
Judges12:3 Naanye ku ndeebire mutampa mikono, naayoga amagara, naayambuka, naarwanisa Abaamoni, na Nyakubaho yaabandekurira, naabasingura. Mbwenu mwaizira ki eri izooba kundwanisa?" 
Judges12:4 Yefuta atyo ahuruza abashaija ba Gileadi boona, barwanisa Abaefuraimu. Abagileadi bacoocoora Abaefuraimu, ngu ahabw'okuba bakabajuma bati: Imwe Abagileadi, abatwire omu Baefuraimu n'omu Baamanaase, muri empungi ezaacwire omu Baefuraimu." 
Judges12:5 Abagileadi baakwata enyambukiro za Yorudaani kuzibira Abaefuraimu kucwa. Mbwenu omu Baefuraimu abarikuhunga, ku haabaire habaho owaagira ati: Ka nyambukye, Abagileadi bamubuuza bati: Ori Omuefuraimu? Akibagira ati: Ngaaha," 
Judges12:6 bamugambira bati: Mbwenu gira oti: Shiboleti. Haza we agira ati: Siboleti; ahabw'okuba akaba atarikubaasa kukigamba gye. Mpaho bamukwata bamwitira aha nyambukiro za Yorudaani. Ago magingo haafa Abaefuraimu obukumi buna n'enkumi ibiri. 
Judges12:7 Yefuta akamara emyaka mukaaga ari omuramuzi w'Abaisiraeli. Bwanyima Yefuta ogwo Omugileadi yaafa, baamuziika omu rurembo rwe omuri Gileadi." 
Judges12:8 Yefuta ku yaafiire, omu bigyere bye haazamu Ibuzani owa Beetelehemu; yaaba omuramuzi w'Abaisiraeli." 
Judges12:9 Akaba aine abatabani makumi ashatu n'abahara makumi ashatu, abu yaahingiire omu zindi nganda; kandi yaiha omu zindi nganda abaishiki makumi ashatu, yaabashwererera abatabani, yaamara emyaka mushanju naategyeka Abaisiraeli." 
Judges12:10 Bwanyima Ibuzani yaafa, baamuziika Beetelehemu." 
Judges12:11 Ogwo ku yaarugireho, Eloni Omuzebuluuni yaaba omuramuzi w'Abaisiraeli, yaabategyekyera emyaka ikumi." 
Judges12:12 Bwanyima Eloni Omuzebuluuni yaafa, baamuziika Aiyalooni omu kyanga kya Zebuluuni." 
Judges12:13 Ogwo ku yaarugireho, Abudooni mwene Hileli Omupiratooni, yaaba omuramuzi w'Abaisiraeli." 
Judges12:14 Akaba aine abatabani makumi ana n'abaijukuru makumi ashatu, abaabaire batemba endogoya makumi mushanju; yaamara emyaka munaana naategyeka Abaisiraeli." 
Judges12:15 Bwanyima Abudooni mwene Hileli Omupiratooni yaafa, baamuziika Piratooni omu kyanga kya Efuraimu, omu nsi y'ebibungo ey'Abaamaleki." 
Judges13:1 Abaisiraeli bakagaruka baakora ebirikugwisa kubi Nyakubaho. Nawe yaabarekurira Abafilisiti okumara emyaka makumi ana. 
Judges13:2 Obwo hakaba hariho omushaija wa Zoora, ow'omu ruganda rw'Abaadaani, orikwetwa Manoa, kandi omukazi we akaba ari engumba, ataine baana." 
Judges13:3 Mbwenu maraika wa Nyakubaho akabonekyera ogwo mukazi, yaamugira ati: Reeba, ori engumba, toine baana; kwonka noija kutwara enda, ozaare omwana omwojo." 
Judges13:4 N'ahabw'ekyo, oyerinde; otarinywa viino nari ekirikusinza, nainga okurya ekintu kyona ekirikuzira." 
Judges13:5 Manya noija kutwara enda, ozaare omwana omwojo; orumweiso rutarimuraba omu mutwe, ahabw'okuba ogwo mwana aryaba ohongyeirwe Ruhanga yaaheza ati kuzaarwa. Kandi niwe aritandika kwiha Abaisiraeli omu mikono y'Abafilisiti." 
Judges13:6 Mpaho ogwo mukazi aija abiteekyerereza iba ati: Omushaija wa Ruhanga yaija ahi ndi; haza omu mireebekyere ye yaaba naashusha maraika wa Ruhanga; kandi naatiinisa munonga. Tinaamubuuza ei arikuruga, nawe tiyangambira iziina rye." 
Judges13:7 Kwonka yaagira ati: Reeba noija kubaka enda, ozaare omwana omwojo. Ati: N'ahabw'ekyo otanywa viino nari ekirikusinza, nobu kwakuba okurya ekirikuzira, ahabw'okuba ogwo mwojo aryaba ohongyeirwe Ruhanga yaaheza ati kuruga omu nda ya nyina, okuhitsya obu arifa." 
Judges13:8 Bwanyima Manoa yaayeshengyereza Nyakubaho, naagira ati: Ai Nyakubaho, naakweshengyereza, ikiriza omushaija waawe, Iwe Ruhanga, ou waatuma, agarukye atushoboororere oku turaatwaze ogwo mwana oraazaarwe." 
Judges13:9 Ruhanga yaahurira eki Manoa yaamushaba; maraika wa Ruhanga yaagaruka yaija ahari ogwo mukazi, yaamushanga ashutami omu musiri, kwonka Manoa iba atamwine." 
Judges13:10 Ogwo mukazi atyo airukisa obwira, agambira iba ati: Reeba, omushaija waizire ahi ndi buri yambonekyera." 
Judges13:11 Manoa nawe aimuka, agyenda akuratiire omukazi we; ahika ogwo mushaija, amubuuza ati: Niiwe mushaija ogambire n'ogu mukazi? Onu amugarukamu ati: Niinye." 
Judges13:12 Na Manoa amugira ati: Mbwenu ebi ogambire ku biriba kwo, ogwo mwana aryagira emitwarize erikushusha ki, kandi aryakora murimo ki?" 
Judges13:13 Maraika wa Nyakubaho agarukamu Manoa ati: Byona ebi ngambiire ogwo mukazi, abyerinde." 
Judges13:14 Atarigira obu ariire ekintu kyona ekirikuruga aha muzaabibu, nobu kwakuba okunywa viino, nari ekirikusinza, nainga okurya ekintu kyona ekirikuzira. Byona ebi mmuragiire abyerinde." 
Judges13:15 Mpaho Manoa agira maraika wa Nyakubaho ati: Naakweshengyereza, ka tube tukwine, nkubaagire akaana k'embuzi." 
Judges13:16 Na maraika wa Nyakubaho agambira Manoa ati: Nobu murangumye aha, tindikwija kurya byokurya byanyu. Kwonka ku muraaboneze ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, mukitambire Nyakubaho. Manya Manoa akaba atamanyire ku ari maraika wa Nyakubaho." 
Judges13:17 Reero Manoa abuuza maraika wa Nyakubaho ati: Eiziina ryawe ori oha; haza ebi waatugambira ku biraabe kwo, tukuhe ekitiinwa?" 
Judges13:18 Maraika wa Nyakubaho amugarukamu ati: Nombuuriza ki eiziina ryangye? Ka n'ery'okutangaaza! 
Judges13:19 Manoa atyo aihayo akaana k'embuzi n'empongano y'esaano, abitambira Nyakubaho aha rukiri. Haza Nyakubaho akora eky'okutangaaza." 
Judges13:20 Manya omuriro gw'aha itambiro ku gwanagire enkobe gworekyeize omu iguru, maraika wa Nyakubaho yaimukira omu ndimi z'omuriro gwaryo, Manoa n'omukazi we bahangireyo amaisho. Batyo baagwa aha nsi bajuumaire."
