Judges13:21 Maraika wa Nyakubaho tiyaagira bu areebirwe Manoa n'omukazi we obundi. Manoa amanyira aho ku yaaba ari maraika wa Nyakubaho. 
Judges13:22 Manoa agira omukazi we ati: Buzimazima, nitwija kufa, ahabw'okuba twareeba Ruhanga." 
Judges13:23 Kwonka omukazi we amuhamiza ati: Nyakubaho kuri yaaba ari ow'okutwita, takwikiriize ekyo kitambo kicwekize n'empongano y'esaano ebi twamutoijera, nari okutworeka ebyo byona, nainga okutumanyisa ebintu bikuru nk'ebyo." 
Judges13:24 Bwanyima ogwo mukazi akazaara omwana w'omwojo, yaamweta Samusooni. Ogwo mwana yaakura, na Nyakubaho yaamuha emigisha." 
Judges13:25 Mutima wa Nyakubaho yaatandika kumukoresa eby'amaani omuri Mahane-Daani, ahagati ya Zoora na Eshitaoli." 
Judges14:1 Samusooni akashuuma, yaaza Timuna, yaareeba omwishiki omuri bahara b'Abafilisiti." 
Judges14:2 Yaija, yaagambira ishe na nyina ati: Okwo Timuna, ndeebireyo omwishiki omuri bahara b'Abafilisiti. Mbwenu mumunshwererere." 
Judges14:3 Ishe na nyina baamugira bati: Beitu shi, omuri bahara ba beene waanyu, nari omu b'eihanga ryaitu boona, tiharimu mwishiki, iwe waaza kwenda kushwera omu Bafilisiti abatashazirwe? Samusooni agarukamu ishe ati: Ogwo ba niwe wanshwererera, ahabw'okuba niwe naarigira." 
Judges14:4 Obwo ishe na nyina batarikumanya ku ekyo kyaruga ahari Nyakubaho. Manya akaba naasherura obwiho bw'okurwanisa Abafilisiti. Omu bunaku obwo Abafilisiti bakaba nibategyeka Abaisiraeli. 
Judges14:5 Bwanyima Samusooni ku yaabaire naashuuma na ishe na nyina nibaza Timuna, yaahika omu misiri y'emizaabibu yaayo, yaabugabuganayo entare nto, yaamukankamira." 
Judges14:6 Reero Mutima wa Nyakubaho yaamwijaho n'amaani, yaataagataagura egyo ntare, nk'orikutaagataagura akaana k'embuzi, haza obwo ataine ki akwaitse. Kwonka eki yaakozire tarakigambiire ishe, nobu yaakuba nyina." 
Judges14:7 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Samusooni yaashuuma, yaagaaniira n'ogwo mukazi, yaamukunda." 
Judges14:8 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, yaagarukayo kumutwara kumushwera. Mbwenu ku yaakiikamire kureeba omutumbi gw'entare eri, kyakahiire yaashanga omuzinga gw'enjoki omu kikanga kyayo, gurimu obwoki." 
Judges14:9 Yaabubomboora, yaabukwata, yaagyenda naaburya yaahika ishe na nyina, nabo yaabahaho, baarya. Kwonka tiyaabagambira ku obwo bwoki yaabuhakuura omu kikanga ky'entare." 
Judges14:10 Ishe yaagyenda, yaahika ow'ogwo mwishiki; Samusooni yaateekyerayo obugyenyi, nk'oku abatsigazi baabaire batwaza." 
Judges14:11 Abantu baayo ku baamureebire, baamureetera abatsigazi makumi ashatu b'okumwikaza." 
Judges14:12 Samusooni yaabagira ati: Ka mbahe ekishaakuzo; ku murangambire amakuru gaakyo, mwakiita omuri ebi biro mushanju by'obugyenyi, niinyija kubaha emitanda makumi ashatu, n'ekanzu z'ekitiinwa makumi ashatu." 
Judges14:13 Kwonka ku muraaremwe kungambira amakuru gaakyo, nimwija kumpa emitanda makumi ashatu ya kitaani, n'amakanzu g'ekitiinwa makumi ashatu. Bamugira bati: Kishaakuze, tukihurire." 
Judges14:14 Nawe abagira ati: Omuri rurya, hakarugamu ekyokurya; omu w'amaani haarugamu ekirikunura. Baamara ebiro bishatu baremirwe kwita ekyo kishaakuzo." 
Judges14:15 Aha kiro kya kana, bakagira muka Samusooni bati: Beihabeiha baro, atugambire amakuru g'ekishaakuzo kye. Kitari ekyo, nitwija kukwokyeza omu nju ya sho! Biri mutwetsire kutusikura ebyaitu?" 
Judges14:16 Muka Samusooni agyenda, amuririra omumaisho. Amugira ati: Buzimazima noonyanga, torikunkunda. Reeba, oshaakuriize abaitu ekishaakuzo, haza tiwangambira makuru gaakyo. N'onu amugira ati: Mbura kukigambira tata na maawe, mba niiwe naakigambira?" 
Judges14:17 Atyo amuririra ebiro mushanju ebi baamazire omu bugyenyi. Ahabw'okumutonga amagara, aha kiro kya mushanju arugaho akimugambira, n'onu akigambira abaabo." 
Judges14:18 Aha kiro kya mushanju, eizooba ku ryabaire ritakarengire ab'omuri orwo rurembo baagira Samusooni bati: Mbwenu hariho ekirikukiza obwoki kunura? Mbwenu hariho ekirikukiza entare amaani? Nawe abagarukamu ati: Kuri mutahingiise nte yangye, timwakwitsire kishaakuzo kyangye." 
Judges14:19 Mpaho Mutima wa Nyakubaho amwijaho n'amaani, ashuuma aza Ashikelooni, aitayo abashaija makumi ashatu b'omuri ekyo kirorero, abacwijura ebijwaro by'ekitiinwa, abiha abaitsire ekishaakuzo. Aruga aho n'ekiniga agaruka owa ishe." 
Judges14:20 Muka Samusooni bamuhingira mugyenzi we owaamwemerereire aha bugyenyi. 
Judges15:1 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, omu igyesha ry'engano, Samusooni yaaza kureeba omukazi we, amutwariire omwana gw'embuzi. Yaagira ati: Ka nze kushanga omukazi wangye omu kishengye. Kwonka ishezaara tiyaamwikiriza kuzayo." 
Judges15:2 Yaamugira ati: Nyowe, buzimazima, nkateekateeka ngu omwangiire kimwe, naamuhingira mugyenzi waawe. Mbwenu omurumuna tarikumuhita? Ba niwe waashwera." 
Judges15:3 Samusooni agira ati: Aha murundi ogu ku ndaabe naakozire kubi Abafilisiti, nimba ntaine rubanja." 
Judges15:4 Samusooni atyo agyenda, akwata zaamuha magana ashatu, azikomerana emikira, areeta enkanza, ata enkanza emwe emwe ahagati y'emikira ebiri-ebiri." 
Judges15:5 Ku aheza kutweka enkanza, arekura zaamuha, ziza omu misiri y'engano ezaagyesirwe n'ezitakagyesirwe, zootsya n'emisiri y'emioliva." 
Judges15:6 Abafilisiti babuuza bati: Beitu n'oha owaakora eki? Abantu baabagarukamu bati. Ni Samusooni, mukwe w'Omutimuna, ahabw'okuba amwakire omukazi we, yaamuhingira mugyenzi we. Mpaho Abafilisiti baija, bootsya ogwo mukazi hamwe na ishe." 
Judges15:7 Reero Samusooni abagira ati: Nk'oku mwakora eki, naanye, buzimazima tindikwija kutuuza ntakabahoire." 
Judges15:8 Atyo abateera, abacoocoora, abaitamu abantu baingi munonga. Bwanyima, ashuuma aguma omu nyanga y'omu rukiri rwa Etamu." 
Judges15:9 Abafilisiti bakaija, baasiisira omuri Yuda; baateera ekirorero Lehi." 
Judges15:10 Abaayuda baababuuza bati: Ahabw'enki mwizire kuturwanisa? Banu bati: Twizire kuboha Samusooni, tukamugira nk'oku atugizire." 
Judges15:11 Mpaho abashaija magana ashatu Abaayuda, bashuuma aha nyanga y'omu rukiri rwa Etamu, bagira Samusooni bati: Torikumanya Abafilisiti ku barikututegyeka? Mbwenu ekyo otukozire ki? Nawe abagarukamu ati: Nk'oku bangizire, naanye nikwo mbagizire." 
Judges15:12 Bamugira bati: Mbwenu, twaija kukukoma; tubone kukushunikira Abafilisiti. Samusooni nawe abagira ati: Nimundahire ku mutarikwija kuunyita!" 
Judges15:13 Nabo bamuhamiza bati: Ngaaha! Nitwija kukuboha kwonka, tubakushunikire; itwe titurikwija kukwita. Batyo baamubohesa emirunga ebiri misya, baamwiha omu nyanga y'omu rukiri, baamutwara." 
Judges15:14 Ku yaahikire Lehi, Abafilisiti baija kumubugana nibayogoorekana. Haza Mutima wa Nyakubaho yaamwijaho n'amaani. Emirunga eyaabaire emukomire emikono, yaaba nka fulakisi eyaakwatwa omuriro, yaamuruga aha mikono, yaaragara." 
Judges15:15 Ku aza kugira ati, areeba oruba rusya rw'endogoya, arukununkirizisa omukono, arukwata, arwitsa abantu rukumi." 
Judges15:16 Reero Samusooni ayevuga ati: N'oruba rw'endogoya, nkabarunda emirundo. N'oruba rw'endogoya, nkaita abantu rukumi." 
Judges15:17 Ku yaaherize kwevuga, yaanaga oruba rw'endogoya oru yaabaire akwaitse. Omwanya ogwo nikwo kwetwa Ramatilehi." 
Judges15:18 Bwanyima yaagira ekyaka, yaahoogyera Nyakubaho ati: Reeba, waatuha obusinguzi, waatujunisa omukono gw'omwiru waawe. Mbwenu nyitwe eiruho, ngwe omu mikono y'abatashazirwe?" 
Judges15:19 Ruhanga atyo ayashamura enonko y'omuri Lehi, erugwamu amaizi. Samusooni ku aheza kuganywa, omutima gumugaruka omunda, agarukwamu amaani. Nikyo ogwo mwanya gwayeteirwe Enihakore; kandi gukiri Lehi okuhitsya n'eri izooba." 
Judges15:20 Samusooni amara emyaka makumi abiri ari omuramuzi w'Abaisiraeli omu biro by'Abafilisiti. 
Judges16:1 Samusooni akaza Gaaza, yaashangayo maraaya, yaataaha omu nju ye." 
Judges16:2 Baagambira Abanyagaaza bati: Samusooni yaija kunu. Nabo baayehinguririza ogwo mwanya, baaraara bamugwereire aha irembo ry'orurembo. Ekyo kiro baakimara bahunami, nibagira bati: Murekye, tutegyereze, okuhitsya obu buraataagurukane tukamwita." 
Judges16:3 Kwonka Samusooni yaabyama okuhitsya omu itumbi. Ku bwabaire buri omu itumbi, yaimuka, yaakwata enyigi z'eirembo ry'orurembo n'ebiti byaryo byombi, byona yaabikuura n'empimbi zaabyo, yaabita aha mabega, yaabitwara aha mutwe gw'ekibungo ekishungaine na Heburooni." 
Judges16:4 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Samusooni yaakunda omukazi orikwetwa Delila ow'omu ruhanga rwa Soreki." 
Judges16:5 Abategyeki b'Abafilisiti baija ahari ogwo mukazi, baamugira bati: Omubeihabeihe, omanye ahu aiha amaani, n'oku twakubaasa kumukiza emikono, tukamuboha, tukamucwa eishaija. Haza buri omwe omuriitwe, naija kukuha empiiha z'efeeza rukumi na igana rimwe." 
Judges16:6 Mpaho Delila agira Samusooni ati: Naakweshengyereza, ngambira ahu oiha ago maani maingi, n'oku omuntu yaakukukoma, akakucwa eishaija." 
Judges16:7 Samusooni amugarukamu ati: Ku baakumbohesa enshuri mbisi mushanju, ezitakoomire, obwo nkaahwamu amaani, mba nk'omuntu ondi weena." 
Judges16:8 Batyo abategyeki b'Abafilisiti bareetera ogwo mukazi enshuri mbisi mushanju ezitakoomire, azimubohesa." 
Judges16:9 Kandi akaba aine abashaija abamugwereire omu kishengye ky'endugu. Reero Delila agira Samusooni ati: Samusooni, Abafilisiti baakwita! N'onu acwa enshuri, nk'oku akagoye k'obugoigo kacweka kaahikwaho omuriro. Baremwa kumanya ah'amaani ge garuga." 
Judges16:10 Reero Delila agira Samusooni ati: Reeba, wambeiha, wanshungisa. Mbwenu naakweshengyereza, ngambira eki baakukubohesa." 
Judges16:11 Onu amugira ati: Ku baakumbohesa emirunga misya etakabohesibwaga, obwo nkaahwa amaani, mba nk'omuntu ondi weena," 
Judges16:12 Delila nikwo kureeta emirunga misya, bakagimubohesa, akamugira ati: Samusooni, Abafilisiti baakwita! obwo abashaija bagwereire omu kishengye ky'endugu. Samusooni acwa egyo mirunga, nk'orikucwa ehuuzi." 
Judges16:13 Delila agira Samusooni ati: Okuhitsya aga magingo nookimbeiha, onshungisa. Mbwenu ngambira oku baakukuboha. Nawe amugira ati; Ku waakutsiba obutsibo mushanju bw'eishokye ryangye, waabwogosheranira aha kiti ekirukirwaho emyenda, bwarabanamu, waabuteerera enkondo, amaani gakampwamu, mba omuntu nk'abandi." 
Judges16:14 Mpaho ku yaagwejegyeire, Delila yaakwata obutsibo bw'eishokye rye, yaaburuka, bwarabanamu, yaabuteerera enkondo. Haza yaamugira ati: Samusooni, Abafilisiti baakwita! Nawe ku akanguka omu turo, akuurirana obutsibo n'enkondo." 
Judges16:15 Reero ogwo mukazi agira Samusooni ati; Noobaasa ota kugira oti, ninkukunda, haza omutima gwawe gutandiho? Reeba, onshungiise egi mirundi yonshatu, otarikungambira ahu oiha amaani maingi gatyo." 
Judges16:16 Ku yaamugangize munonga, naamurigitiririra buri izooba n'ebyo bigambo, Samusooni yaarugaho yaaremba." 
Judges16:17 Yaamwatira eibanga, naamugira ati: Orumweiso tirukandabaga mu mutwe, ahabw'okuba nkahongyerwa Ruhanga, naaba kuruga nti omu nda ya maawe. Ku baakuntega eishokye, amaani gakampwamu mba otaine maani, nk'abandi bantu." 
Judges16:18 Delila ku yaareebire ngu yaamugambira ekimuri aha mutima, yaatuma aha bategyeki b'Abafilisiti, naabagira ati: Mwije omurundi ogu gwonka, ahabw'okuba yangambira ekimuri aha mutima. Mpaho abategyeki b'Abafilisiti baija ah'ari, baine empiiha omu ngaro." 
Judges16:19 Ogwo mukazi agwejegyereza Samusooni aha bibero, ayeta omushaija, amumwa obutsibo mushanju bw'eishokye rye. Bwanyima atandika kumushungisa, kwonka bambe, amaani gashangwa gaamuhwairemu." 
Judges16:20 Agambira Samusooni ati: Samusooni, Abafilisiti baakwita! N'onu akanguka omu turo, agira ati: Niinyija kweyuzyaho ebinkomire, nyenanuure nk'okwangye. Kwonka bambe, atarikumanya ku Nyakubaho yaamurugiremu." 
Judges16:21 Abafilisiti bamukwata, bamwihamu amaisho, bamutwara Gaaza, bamukomesa enjegyere z'emiringa, bamuha omurimo gw'okuguma naahindura ekyoma ky'omu nju y'embohe, ekirikusa." 
Judges16:22 Kwonka eishokye rye eri baamweire, ritandika kugaruka kumera." 
Judges16:23 Mbwenu abategyeki b'Abafilisiti bakeeteerana kutambira Dagoni ruhanga waabo ekitambo kihango, n'okushemererwa; ahabw'okuba bakagira bati: Ruhanga waitu aturekuriire Samusooni omuzigu waitu, twamusingura." 
Judges16:24 Mpaho abantu ku baamureebire, baahimbisa ruhanga waabo, nibagira bati: Ruhanga waitu aturekuriire omuzigu waitu, owaashishagwire ensi yaitu, akatwitamu abantu baingi." 
Judges16:25 Ku baashemereirwe munonga nibeesiima, baagira bati: Nimureete Samusooni atuzaanire. Batyo baamwiha omu kihome, yaabazaanira. Baamwemereza ahagati y'enyomyo." 
Judges16:26 Reero Samusooni yaagira omutsigazi owaabaire amukwatiire oruhimbo ati: Ka nkorakore enyomyo ziteire enju, nkaazeegamira." 
Judges16:27 Obwo enju ekaba eijwire abashaija n'abakazi, n'abategyeki boona ab'Abafilisiti barimu; kandi aha mutwe gwayo hariyo abashaija n'abakazi nk'enkumi ishatu, abaabaire nibaroreera Samusooni naazaana." 
Judges16:28 Bwanyima, Samusooni ahoogyera Nyakubaho ati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga, nyijuka, naakweshengyereza, mpa amaani. Ai Ruhanga, ninkweshengyereza, omurundi ogu gwonka, mpoore aba Bafilisiti ahabw'amaisho gangye gombi." 
Judges16:29 Atyo akwata enyomyo zombi ez'ahagati eziteire enju; azeegamira, omukono gwe gwa buryo gukwaitse emwe, n'ogwa bumosho gukwaitse endi." 
Judges16:30 Reero agira ati: Ka nfe n'Abafilisiti. Atyo ainama n'amaani ge goona, enju egwera abategyeki n'abantu boona abagirimu. Abu yaitsire naafa, baakira abu yaitsire akihuriire." 
Judges16:31 Beeneishe n'eka ye boona baija, baihaho omutumbi gwe, baagutwara, baaguziika ahagati ya Zoora na Eshitooli omu kituuro kya Manoa, ishe. Samusooni ogwo akaba omuramuzi w'Abaisiraeli emyaka makumi abiri." 
Judges17:1 Hakaba hariho omushaija w'omu nsi y'ebibungo, eya Efuraimu, orikwetwa Miika." 
Judges17:2 Ogwo mushaija akagira nyina ati: Empiiha zaawe z'efeeza rukumi na igana, ezi baakwibire okakyeena, haza nkakihurira, mbwenu niinye nziine. Niinye naazitwaire. Nyina amugarukamu ati: Mwana wangye, Nyakubaho naakakuhe omugisha." 
Judges17:3 Onu atyo agarurira nyina ezo mpiiha z'efeeza rukumi na igana. Nyina agira ati: Ezi feeza naazeihaho, naazihongyera Nyakubaho, omwana wangye atakaitwa omukyeeno. Mbwenu ka zibe ez'okukoresa ekishushani ky'ekiti, ekirikuramibwa, ekishwekirwe efeeza ziyagiibwe. N'ahabw'ekyo niinyija kuzikugarurira." 
Judges17:4 Mbwenu ogwo mushaija ku yaagaruriire nyina ezo mpiiha, nyina yaakoraho empiiha magana abiri z'efeeza yaaziha omuheesi. N'onu yaakora ekishushani kisharwire, yaakishwekyesa efeeza ziyagiibwe, baakita omu nju ya Miika." 
Judges17:5 Miika ogwo akaba aine endaaro ye, yaakora ekijwaro ky'aha kifuba ekyeetwa efodi, n'ebishushani birikuramibwa, ebi beeta terafimu, kandi yaataho omwe omu batabani kuba omuhongyerezi we." 
Judges17:6 Omu biro ebyo, Abaisiraeli bakaba bataine mugabe, buri muntu naayekorera eki arikwenda." 
Judges17:7 Mbwenu obwo hakaba hariho omutsigazi wa Beetelehemu ey'omuri Yuda, ow'omu ruganda rwa Yuda, ari Omuleevi, yaashuuhuukirayo." 
Judges17:8 Ogwo mushaija yaafuruka omu kirorero kya Beetelehemu ey'omuri Yuda, yaaza kusherura ah'okutuura. Ku yaabaire naakigyenda, yaahika aha nju ya Miika omu nsi ya Efuraimu ey'ebibungo." 
Judges17:9 Miika yaamubuuza ati: Nooruga hi? Yaamugarukamu ati: Ndi Omuleevi w'omuri Beetelehemu eya Yuda. Mbwenu ninsherura ahi naakushuuhuukira. 
Judges17:10 Miika amugira ati: Guma naanye, ombeere tata kandi omuhongyerezi. Buri mwaka ninguma ninkuha ebicweka ikumi by'efeeza, n'ebijwaro, ntaireho n'okukuriisa." 
Judges17:11 Omuleevi yaikiriza kutuura nawe. Ogwo mutsigazi yaamubeera nk'omwe aha batabani. 
Judges17:12 Miika yaayemeka ogwo mutsigazi Omuleevi, yaaba omuhongyerezi we, kandi yaaguma omu nju ye." 
Judges17:13 Miika nikwo kugira ati: Mbwenu naamanya ku Nyakubaho arikwija kumpa emigisha, ahabw'okuba naayetungira Omuleevi kuba omuhongyerezi wangye." 
Judges18:1 Omu biro ebyo Abaisiraeli bakaba bataine mugabe. Kandi obwo, ab'oruganda rwa Daani bakaba nibeerondera ensi ei baraatuuremu; ahabw'okuba okuhitsya ago magingo, bo bakaba batakatungire kyanga kyabo ky'obutaka omu b'enganda z'Abaisiraeli." 
Judges18:2 Abaadaani nikwo kutuma abashaija bataano emanzi rugambwa, nibabaiha omu ruganda rwabo rwona, omuri Zoora na Eshitaoli, kuza kutata ensi n'okugyetegyereza. Haza baabagira bati: Nimwirooko, mwetegyereze egyo nsi! Nabo baagyenda, baahika omu nsi y'ebibungo, ey'Abaefuraimu aha nju ya Miika, baaraarayo." 
Judges18:3 Ku baabaire baahika haihi n'enju ya Miika, baamanya eiraka ry'omutsigazi Omuleevi ori. Baakiikama, baamubuuza bati: N'oha owaakureetsire kunu? Nookora ki aha?" 
Judges18:4 Nawe abagarukamu ati: Oku nikwo Miika yantwarize, akanguriirira, nkaba omuhongyerezi we." 
Judges18:5 Nabo baamugira bati: Twakweshengyereza, tubuurize Ruhanga, tumanye yaaba oru rugyendo ru turimu nirwija kutubeera gye." 
Judges18:6 Omuhongyerezi abagambira ati: Mwegyendere n'obusingye; Nyakubaho naija kubarinda omuri oru rugyendo rwanyu. 
Judges18:7 Bwanyima abo bashaija bataano baimutsya orugyendo, bahika Laishi, bareeba abantu abaabaire bariyo batwire buhooro, nibatwaza nk'Abanyasidooni, babukaire, bataine keekyengo nari eki bakyenire omu nsi, kandi batungire, haza bari hare n'Abanyasidooni, bataine kakwate n'omuntu ondi weena." 
Judges18:8 Ku baagarukire Zoora na Eshitaoli, ahari beene waabo, beene waabo baababuuza bati: Mwatureetera gaahi?" 
Judges18:9 Banu baabagarukamu bati: Nimwimukye, tuze kubateera, ahabw'okuba tureebire ensi, kandi neeyeza munonga. Mbwenu mushutikirwe ki? Nimurekye kweziringa, muze omuri egyo nsi, mugikubuure!" 
Judges18:10 Ku muraazeyo nimwija kushanga bari abantu abataine keekyengo. Egyo nsi ni mpango. Buzimazima, Ruhanga agibahaire, kandi n'ensi etabuziremu kintu kyona ekitungwa omu nsi." 
Judges18:11 Reero abashaija magana mukaaga ab'oruganda rwa Daani, bakwaitse eby'okurwanisa, bakaimutsya orugyendo, baaruga Zoora na Eshitaoli." 
Judges18:12 Bainamuka, baasiisira Kiriyatiyearimu omuri Buyuda. Omwanya ogwo nikyo gweterwa Mahane-Daani n'eri izooba; kandi guri aha burengyerwa-izooba bwa Kiriyatiyearimu." 
Judges18:13 Baarugayo, baaza omu nsi y'ebibungo ey'Abaefuraimu, baahika aha nju ya Miika." 
Judges18:14 Abashaija bataano abaabaire bagiire kutata ensi ya Laishi, baagira beene waabo bati: Ebyo nimumanya ku omuri aga maju harimu ekijwaro ky'aha kifuba, n'ebishushani ebiramibwa, n'ekishushani ekisharwire, kandi kisiigirwe efeeza? Mbwenu nimuteekateekye eki muraakore." 
Judges18:15 Batyo bakiikama, bahika aha nju y'omutsigazi Omuleevi omu ka ya Miika, bamubuuza oku arikuraara." 
Judges18:16 Abashaija magana mukaaga Abaadaani, abahagatiire eby'okurwanisa, baguma beemereire aha irembo." 
Judges18:17 Reero abashaija abataano, abaagiire kutata ensi, bagyenda, bataahamu, baihamu ekishushani ekisharwire ekisiigirwe efeeza, n'ekijwaro ky'aha kifuba n'ebishushani ebiramibwa; obwo omuhongyerezi ayemereire aha irembo hamwe n'abashaija magana mukaaga abakwaitse eby'okurwanisa." 
Judges18:18 Ku baataahire omwa Miika, baihamu ekishushani ekisharwire ekisiigirwe efeeza, hamwe n'ekijwaro ky'aha kifuba n'ebishushani ebiramibwa, omuhongyerezi yaababuuza ati; Mbwenu ekyo nimukora ki?" 
Judges18:19 Nabo baamugarukamu bati: Hunama! Igara akanwa, kureka, ija ogyende naitwe, otubeere omuzaire, kandi omuhongyerezi! Mbwenu ekirungi niiwe okuba omuhongyerezi w'eka y'omuntu omwe, nari okuba omuhongyerezi w'Abaisiraeli ab'oruganda rumwe n'omuryango gumwe?" 
Judges18:20 Mpaho omuhongyerezi ashemererwa munonga, atwara eky'aha kifuba, n'ebishushani, hamwe n'ekishushani ekisharwire; agyenda n'abo bantu bamushagatiire." 
Judges18:21 Batyo bakuba, bagyenda beebembeize abaana baabo, n'amatungo, n'esika." 
Judges18:22 Ku baabaire baagyendaho akaanya, baaruga aha nju ya Miika, Miika yaahuruza bataahi be, baahambya Abaadaani." 
Judges18:23 Baateerera Abaadaani enduuru; na banu baakubuuka; baabuuza Miika bati: Noofa ki, okutuhururira n'ekimbuuro kirikwingana kiti?" 
Judges18:24 Nawe agarukamu ati: Manya mwanyaga baaruhanga bangye abu naakozire, hamwe n'omuhongyerezi wangye, mwayegyendera! Mbwenu nyowe naatsigarana ki? Kandi nimumbuuriza ki muti: Noofa ki?" 
Judges18:25 Abaadaani baamugira bati: Rekyera aho ebi orikutugambira, ab'ekiniga batakaakugurukira, bakakwita n'ab'eka yaawe." 
Judges18:26 Mpaho Abaadaani beegyendera. Na Miika ku areeba nibamukiza emikono, akuba agaruka omu ka ye." 
Judges18:27 Abaadaani bakatwara ebi Miika yaakozire, baatwara omuhongyerezi we; baagyenda, baahika Laishi omu bantu baayo abatuurize kandi abataine keekyengo. Baabaitsa rurara n'orurembo rwabo baarwotsya." 
Judges18:28 Rwabura kijuna, ahabw'okuba rukaba, ruri hare Sidoni, kandi abaamwo bataine kakwate n'abandi bantu. Rukaba ruri omu ruhanga rwa Betirehobu. Orwo rurembo baagaruka baarwombeka, baarutuuramu." 
Judges18:29 Baarweta eiziina rya Daani ishenkurubo, mutabani wa Yakobo. Kwonka omu kubanza, rukaba nirwetwa Laishi." 
Judges18:30 Abaadaani baayeteeraho ekyo kishushani kisharwire. Yonataani mwene Gereshomu mutabani wa Musa, we n'abatabani, baaguma bari abahongyerezi b'oruganda rw'Abaadaani, okuhitsya obu ab'omuri egyo nsi baatwairwe bari enkwatwa." 
Judges18:31 Batyo baataho ekishushani kisharwire, eki Miika yaakozire, kyagumayo okumara ebiro byona ebi enju ya Ruhanga yaabaire eri omuri Shiilo." 
Judges19:1 Omu biro ebyo, obu Abaisiraeli baabaire bataine mugabe, hakabaho Omuleevi, owaabaire ashuuhuukiire omu byaro by'enyima y'ensi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, yaashwera omukazi ekinyanshunju omuri Beetelehemu ey'omuri Buyuda." 
Judges19:2 Mbwenu ogwo mukazi ekinyanshunju kye, akangana, yaamutsigaho, yaagaruka owa ishe Beetelehemu ey'omuri Buyuda, yaagimara ameezi ana." 
Judges19:3 Bwanyima iba yaimuka, yaamukurata kumweshengyereza ngu amugarure. Yagyenda n'omugaragwa we, n'endogoya ibiri, atyo ahika owa ishezaara. Ishezaara ku amureeba, aija ashemereirwe kumubugana." 
Judges19:4 Ishezaara ogwo, amwosesa, amara nawe ebiro bishatu, barya, banywa, bateerayo ebiro." 
Judges19:5 Aha kiro kya kana, baimuka kare omu kasheeshe, Omuleevi ayeteekateeka kugyenda. Kwonka ishe w'ogwo mwishiki agira omukwe ati: Banza orye akagaati, ogarukwemu amaani, reero obone kugyenda." 
Judges19:6 Abo bashaija bombi bashutama, barya, banywa. Ishe w'ogwo mwishiki agira ogwo mushaija ati: Naakweshengyereza, ikiriza oraare, oshemererwe." 
Judges19:7 Omushaija ku aba naimuka kugyenda, ishezaara amwehanangiriza, n'onu agaruka araarayo." 
Judges19:8 Aha kiro kya kataano, aimuka kare omu kasheeshe kugyenda, nabwo ishe w'omwishiki amugira ati: Garukwa omutima omunda, osiibe aha, okuhitsya omu mwabazyo haagwa. Batyo bombi barya." 
Judges19:9 Mbwenu ogwo mushaija n'ekinyanshunju kye, n'omugaragwa we, ku baimukize kugyenda, ishezaara, ishe w'ogwo mwishiki, yaamugambira ati: Hati eizooba ryahendekire, naakweshengyereza, mugarukye muraare. Reeba, bwaza kwira; nimuraare, mushemererwe. Reero omu kasheeshe mugurukye kare, mutaahe." 
Judges19:10 Kwonka ogwo mushaija yaayanga kuraara, yaimuka yaagyenda, yaahika ahashungaine na Yebusi (niyo Yerusalemu), obwo aine endogoya ze ibiri zitandiikire, hamwe n'ekinyanshunju kye." 
Judges19:11 Ku baahikire haihi na Yebusi, eizooba ryashangwa ryarengire; omugaragwa yaagira mukama we ati: Mbwenu, ija tukiikame, turaare omuri oru rurembo rw'Abayebusi." 
Judges19:12 Mukama we amugira ati: Titurikwija kukiikama kuza omu rurembo rw'abanyamahanga abatari Baisiraeli, kureka tugumizemu tuze Gibea." 
Judges19:13 Ayongyera agira omugaragwa we ati: Rugayo, tukaahika haihi na Gibea nari Raama, tuba niyo twaraara." 
Judges19:14 Batyo boogaho, bagyenda, eizooba rirenga bari haihi kuhika Gibea eya Benyamiini." 
Judges19:15 Bakiikamira aho, baza Gibea kuraarayo. Ku ahikayo ashutama ah'emihanda y'orurembo erikuteeranira, ahabw'okuburwa owaabataasya omu nju kubaraaza." 
Judges19:16 Mbwenu ago magingo hakaija omugurusi naaruga kukora omu musiri gwe, omu mwabazyo. Ogwo mugurusi akaba ari ow'omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, ashuuhuukiire Gibea; ab'omuri ekyo kyanga bari Abaabenyamiini." 
Judges19:17 Ku yaimukize ati amaisho, yaareeba omugyenzi omu nteeraniro z'emihanda y'orurembo. Yaamubuuza ati: Nooza hi, kandi nooruga hi?" 
Judges19:18 Onu amugarukamu ati: Nituruga Beetelehemu ey'omuri Buyuda, nituza omu byaro by'enyima y'ensi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, ei ndugire. Mbaire ngiire Beetelehemu ey'omuri Buyuda, mbwenu ningarukayo owangye; kwonka naabura ow'okundaaza." 
Judges19:19 Twine obunyaatsi bw'endogoya zaitu n'eby'okurya byazo kandi twine emigaati na viino eby'okutunga n'omuzaana waawe ogu, n'omutsigazi ou twine. Titwine ki tubuzirwe." 
Judges19:20 Omugurusi abagira ati: Nimuhuumure! Niinyija kubatungira byona ebi murikwenda; kwonka mutaraara omu kihandagazi. 
Judges19:21 Atyo amutaasya omu nju ye, aha endogoya zaabo ebyokurya, banaaba ebigyere, barya, banywa." 
Judges19:22 Ku baabaire bari aho bashemereirwe, haija abashaija ebifamutima b'omuri orwo rurembo, baayehinguririza egyo nju nibakongoota orwigi. Baagambira ogwo mugurusi mukama w'enju bati: Shohoza omushaija waataaha omwawe, tumutande." 
Judges19:23 Omugurusi nyineeka ashohora, ku abahika abateisa ati; Ngaaha, beene waitu, naabeeshengyereza, mutagwisa akagwe! Ogu mushaija yaataahire omwangye, mutakora ekihagaro kirikwingana kityo!" 
Judges19:24 Reeba aha nyineho muhara wangye oshugaine, hamwe n'ekinyanshunju ky'ogu mushaija. Mbwenu, ka mbe nibo naashohoza, mubatande, mubakore nk'oku murikwenda, kwonka ogu mushaija, mutagira ekihagaro ki mwamukoraho." 
Judges19:25 Abo bashaija banga kumuhurira. Ogwo Muleevi nikwo kukwata omukazi we ekinyanshunju akamubashohoreza, bakamutanda, bakaraara nibamushiisha, bukarugaho bukasheesha. Omushekye ku gwabaire nigujuguta, baamurekura yaagyenda." 
Judges19:26 Ku bwabaire nibutaagurikana, ogwo mukazi yaija naasangana, yaagwa aha muryango gw'enju y'omushaija oraarize iba, okuhitsya obu bwaseesire." 
Judges19:27 Iba ku yaimukire omu kasheeshe, yaigura enyigi naashohora kugyenda, yaashanga omukazi we ekinyanshunju agwire aha nsi, emikono erambiriraine omu kisasi." 
Judges19:28 Mpaho amugira ati: Imuka, tugyende! Kwonka habura akateezo. Atyo amuta aha ndogoya, akwata omuhanda ataaha owe." 
Judges19:29 Ku yaataahire omu nju, yaihayo omusyo, yaakwata ogwo mukazi we ekinyanshunju, yaamutemagura, yaamuhirimburamu ebiningu ikumi na bibiri, yaabyohereza omu byanga bya Isiraeli byona." 
Judges19:30 Boona abaakireebire baagira bati: Eki tikikabahoga, kandi tikikareebwaga n'okuhitsya hati, Abaisiraeli baaba kuruga omu nsi ya Misiri. Mbwenu mukiteekateekyeho, mukihanuureho, haza mugire eki mwacwamu." 
Judges20:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Abaisiraeli boona baashanguruka nibaruga omu byanga byabo, okwiha aha ky'Abaadaani okuta Beerisheba, obariiremu n'ab'omu kya Gileadi. Ekimbuuro kyona n'omutima gumwe kyateeranira Mizipa omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Judges20:2 Abategyeki b'eihanga ryona, n'ab'enganda za Isiraeli zoona, nabo baizira omuri abo bantu ba Ruhanga, abaabaire nibahika abashaija obusiriira buna enkwata-rurara, abarikugyendesa ebigyere." 
Judges20:3 (Kandi Abaabenyamiini baahurira ku Abaisiraeli bagiire Mizipa). Reero Abaisiraeli baabuuza bati: Mutugambire oku ekyo kicumuro kikozirwe? 
Judges20:4 Omuleevi, iba w'omukazi ou baitsire, yaabagarukamu ati: Nkaija Gibea ey'Abaabenyamiini, hamwe n'omukazi wangye ekinyanshunju kuraarayo." 
Judges20:5 Abanyagibea bantaahirira, bankubira omu nju nyekiro, baayenda kuunyita, baatanda omukazi wangye ekinyanshunju, yaafa." 
Judges20:6 Naanye nikwo kwihaho omutumbi gw'ogwo mukazi wangye ekinyanshunju, nkagucwamu ebiningu, nkabyohereza omu byanga byona ebi Abaisiraeli baahungwire, ahabw'okuba, aba bantu bakozire ekibi ky'ekihagaro omuri Isiraeli." 
Judges20:7 Mbwenu Baisiraeli, mwe, abateeraniire aha, mukihanuureho, mutugambire eky'okukora." 
Judges20:8 Abantu boona baimuka n'omutima gumwe, baahiga bati: Tihariho n'omwe omuriitwe oraaze omu ihema rye, nari oraagarukye omu ka ye." 
Judges20:9 Kureka eki turaakore n'eki: Twaza kuteera enteenyu y'okurwanisa Abanyagibea. 
Judges20:10 Kandi tutoorane abashaija ikumi omu bantu igana, n'eigana omu bantu rukumi, na rukumi omuri kakumi, omu nganda za Isiraeli zoona ab'okutwarira abarwani entanda, ngu ku baraahikye Gibea ey'Abaabenyamiini bahoore abaayo, nk'ekihagaro ki bakozire omuri Isiraeli oku kiri." 
Judges20:11 Batyo Abaisiraeli boona bateerana n'omutima gumwe kurwanisa orwo rurembo. 
Judges20:12 Ab'enganda z'Abaisiraeli bakatuma abantu aha b'oruganda rwa Benyamiini boona, nibabagira bati: Ekyo ekikozirwe omuriimwe ka n'eihano!" 
Judges20:13 Mbwenu nu, nimututwekyere abo bashaija ba Gibea bataine mugasho tubaite, twihe omuri Isiraeli ekihagaro. Kwonka Abaabenyamiini tibaayeta ha ki Abaisiraeli beene waabo baabagambira." 
Judges20:14 Kureka baaruga omu ndembo zaabo, baateeranira Gibea kuhurura kuteera Abaisiraeli." 
Judges20:15 Eryo izooba Abaabenyamiini baahuruza omu ndembo zaabo abashaija obukumi bubiri n'enkumi mukaaga, enkwata rurara, otabariiremu Abanyagibea abaahurwize abashaija entoore magana mushanju." 
Judges20:16 Omuri ezo ngabo hakaba harimu abashaija entoore magana mushanju, abarikutwara emosho, buri omwe omuribo naarekyera enjungu y'eibaare atarikuhembya." 
Judges20:17 Reero Abaisiraeli, otabariiremu Abaabenyamiini, baahuruza abashaija obusiriira buna enkwata-rurara; kandi boona bari abarwani." 
Judges20:18 Mbwenu Abaisiraeli bakaimutsya baaza Beteli, baabuuza Ruhanga bati: Ni baahi omuriitwe abaraabanze kurwanisa Abaabenyamiini? Nyakubaho yaabagarukamu ati: Abaayuda babe nibo baabanza." 
Judges20:19 Mpaho Abaisiraeli baimuka omu kasheeshe, basiisira aharikureebana na Gibea." 
Judges20:20 Bahuruura kurwanisa Abaabenyamiini, babatengyera orugamba Gibea." 
Judges20:21 Abaabenyamiini nabo basyoka omuri Gibea, eryo izooba baita omu Baisiraeli abashaija obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri, babatsiga barambiiriraine." 
Judges20:22 Kwonka Abaisiraeli beehangaana, bagaruka batengyera orugamba ahi baarutengyeire aha kiro ky'okubanza." 
Judges20:23 Bagyenda baririra omu maisho ga Nyakubaho okuhitsya omu mwabazyo. Bamwebuuzaho bati: Mbwenu, tugarukye turwanise beene waitu Abaabenyamiini? Nawe abagarukamu ati: Nimwirooko, mubarwanise." 
Judges20:24 Batyo Abaisiraeli aha izooba ryakuratsireho, baija kurwanisa Abaabenyamiini." 
Judges20:25 N'Abaabenyamiini aha izooba eryo baaruga Gibea, baabateera baagwisaho ab'omu Baisiraeli abashaija kakumi n'enkumi munaana, kandi boona bakaba bari enkwata-rurara." 
Judges20:26 Bwanyima Abaisiraeli boona eihe ryona baagyenda baahika Beteli, baashutama omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, baayesiibyakwo eryo izooba, okuhitsya omu mwabazyo. Baamutambira ebitambo bicwekize, baamureetera n'emitoijo y'okwekundira." 
Judges20:27 Reero baamwebuuzaho. (Manya obwo eshanduukye ya Ruhanga niyo yaabaire eri. 
Judges20:28 Kandi Finehaasi mwene Eleazaari mutabani wa Arooni, niwe yaabaire ayemerera omu maisho gaayo naaheereza omu biro ebyo). Baayebuuza ahari Nyakubaho bati: tugarukye turwane na beene waitu Abaabenyamiini, nari turereere? Nawe yaabagarukamu ati: Nimwirooko, mubarwanise, ahabw'okuba nyencakare niinyija kubabarekurira, mubasingure." 
Judges20:29 Abaisiraeli bakataho ab'okugwera aha mbaju za Gibea zoona. 
Judges20:30 Aha kiro kya kashatu, Abaisiraeli baija kurwanisa Abaabenyamiini, baatengyera orugamba ahashungaine na Gibea, nk'oku baagizire buri." 
Judges20:31 Abaabenyamiini nabo baahurura kubarwanisa. Haza baabeihwabeihwa, baaruga omu rurembo. Kandi nk'oku baagizire obundi, baatandika kuteera Abaisiraeli, n'okubaitira omu mihanda rugyendwa, ogurikuza Beteli n'ogurikuza Gibea n'omu bwerere; baabaitamu abashaija makumi ashatu." 
Judges20:32 Abaabenyamiini baagira bati: Mbwenu ga twabaraza, baatuhunga nka bwabiso. Abaisiraeli baagira bati: Ka tuhungye tubabeihabeihe, barugye omu rurembo, bahikye omu mihanda rugyendwa." 
Judges20:33 Abaisiraeli boona baaruga ahi baabaire bari, baatengyera orugamba Baalitamari. N'Abaisiraeli abaabaire bagwereire, baasyoka ahi baabaire beesherekire omu ruhita rwa Geeba." 
Judges20:34 Obwo abashaija kakumi entoore ab'omu Baisiraeli baija baateera Gibea, orugamba rwahama. Haza Abaabenyamiini tibaamanya ku baagwa omu kabi." 
Judges20:35 Nyakubaho yaasingura Abaabenyamiini, baahunga Abaisiraeli. Eryo izooba, Abaisiraeli baita Abaabenyamiini obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano na igana rimwe; kandi boona nikwo baabaire bari abashaija enkwata rurara." 
Judges20:36 Batyo Abaabenyamiini baamanya ku baasingurwa. Manya Abaisiraeli bakeehungisa Abaabenyamiini, ahabw'okwesiga abagwereire abu baataire haihi na Gibea." 
Judges20:37 Batyo abagwereire bajumbuka ei baabaire beesherekire, beeshuka omuri Gibea, bajanjaara orurembo, baitsa abaamwo boona rurara." 
Judges20:38 Kandi ab'eihe ry'Abaisiraeli n'abagwereire, bakaba baragaine, ngu ku baraareebe omwika nigucumbuukira omu rurembo," 
Judges20:39 bakubuukye barwane. Obwo Abaabenyamiini baatandika kucoocoora Abaisiraeli, baabaitamu abantu nka makumi ashatu. Haza baayekiita bati: Buzimazima, twabacoocoora, nk'oku twabagizire omu rugamba orwabandize." 
Judges20:40 Mbwenu omwika gw'okumanyisa bariya ku gwacumbuukiire omu rurembo, Abaabenyamiini ku baanagire amaisho enyima, baashanga orurembo rwona nirucumbuuka omwika, gwahikire ahaiguru." 
Judges20:41 Reero eihe ry'Abaisiraeli ku ryakubuukire, Abaabenyamiini emitima yaabahwa omunda, ahabw'okuba bakareeba ku baagwa omu kabi." 
Judges20:42 Baahunga Abaisiraeli, nibatoora ogw'eihamba. Kwonka engabo z'Abaisiraeli zaabahambya, kandi ezaahurwire niziruga omu ndembo zaabaturuka oku n'oku, zaabacwekyereza." 
Judges20:43 Baatangatanga Abaabenyamiini, baagyenda bababingire buguru butakora ha nsi baabacoocoora, okwiha Nooha okuhitsya ahashungaine na Gibea, orubaju rwa burugwa-izooba." 
Judges20:44 Baabaitamu abashaija akakumi kamwe n'enkumi munaana, kandi boona bari enkwata-ngabo." 
Judges20:45 Abaatsigaireho baakuba, baahunga nibatoora ogw'eihamba, ogurikugarura aha rukiri rwa Rimoni. Ku baabaire bakiri omu muhanda, Abaisiraeli baabaitamu abashaija enkumi itaano. Baagumizamu bababingire, baabahitsya Gidomu, baitirayo abandi enkumi ibiri." 
Judges20:46 Eryo izooba Abaabenyamiini boona abaafiire baahika obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano, abashaija enkwata rurara kandi boona bari emanzi." 
Judges20:47 Kwonka omuribo haahonokaho abashaija magana mukaaga, baakuba, baahunga nibatoora ogw'eihamba, ogurikugarura aha Rukiri rwa Rimona; baagumayo okumara ameezi ana." 
Judges20:48 Abaisiraeli reero baahinduka, baarwanisa Abaabenyamiini, baitsa rurara y'obwogi abashaija n'amatungo gaabo, na buri kintu eki baabugaine; n'endembo zoona ezi baahikiremu, baazikoomeera omuriro." 
Judges21:1 Abaisiraeli ku baabaire bari Mizipa, baarahira ngu omuribo hatarigira owaahingira muhara we omuri beene Benyamiini." 
Judges21:2 Abantu batyo baija Beteli, baasiiba bashutami omu maisho ga Ruhanga okuhitsya omu mwabazyo. Haza baimutsya amaraka, baarira munonga." 
Judges21:3 Baahooga bati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, eki kibeeraireho ki omuri Isiraeli, kureeba ngu hati hariho oruganda rurikuburamu?" 
Judges21:4 Akasheeshe kaakuratsireho, abantu baimuka, kare, baayombekayo eitambiro, baatamba ebitambo by'okucwetsya, baareeta n'emitoijo y'okwekundira." 
Judges21:5 Reero Abaisiraeli baabazana bati: Omu nganda za Isiraeli zoona, ni ruganda ki orutaija muri eki kiteerane kya Nyakubaho? Manya bakaba barahiriire kimwe ngu: Omuntu oriba atagiire Mizipa omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, aitwe." 
Judges21:6 Batyo Abaisiraeli baasaasibwa beene waabo Abaabenyamiini baagira bati: Reeba, hati Isiraeli ecwirweho oruganda rumwe." 
Judges21:7 Mbwenu tukore ki kusherurira abatsigarireho abakazi, ku turaabe twarahiire Nyakubaho kutabahingira bahara baitu?" 
Judges21:8 Bwanyima baabuuzana bati: Omu nganda za Isiraeli ni ruganda ki orutaija Mizipa omu maisho ga Nyakubaho? Ku baayetegyereize baashanga hataine owa Yabeshi-Gileadi oizire omu rusiisira kuza omu kiteerane. 
Judges21:9 Ahabw'okuba ku baabazire abantu abariho, tibaashangamu muntu n'omwe ow'Abaayabeshi-Gileadi." 
Judges21:10 Ab'omu kiteerane nikwo kwoherezayo abashaija akakumi kamwe n'enkumi ibiri amamanzi, bakabaragiira bati: Mugyende, mwitse rurara y'obwogi abatwire Yabeshi-Gileadi, n'abakazi baabo, n'abaana baabo." 
Judges21:11 Mbwenu eki muraakore, mwitire kimwe omushaija weena n'omukazi weena orabyamire n'omushaija; kwonka abaishiki abashugaine mubarekye." 
Judges21:12 Baashanga omu Baayabeshi-Gileadi abaishiki magana ana abatakabyamaga na mushaija, baabareeta omu rusiisira rwa Shiilo omu nsi ya Kanaani." 
Judges21:13 Ab'eihanga ryona baatuma aha Baabenyamiini abaabaire bari aha rukiri rwa Rimoni eby'obusingye, nibabagarura omutima omunda." 
Judges21:14 Abaabenyamiini baagaruka omuri ago magingo, na banu baabaha abaishiki abu baasaasiire okwitwa omu bakazi ba Yabeshi-Gileadi. Kwonka baaba bakye, tibaingana na bashaija Abaabenyamiini." 
Judges21:15 Abo bantu baaguma nibasaasibwa Abaabenyamiini, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akaba ataire ekyasha omu b'enganda za Isiraeli." 
Judges21:16 Bwanyima abakuru b'eihanga bakagira bati: Tucwe bwengye ki kutungira abaatsigaireho abaishiki b'okushwera, abakazi ku baraabe baahwaireho omu Baabenyamiini?" 
Judges21:17 Kandi baagira bati: Abaabenyamiini abaatsigaireho, bashemereire kutunga ab'okubahungurira, oruganda rwabo rurekye kucweka omuri Isiraeli." 
Judges21:18 Kwonka titurikubaasa kubahingira bahara baitu; ahabw'okuba, Abaisiraeli bakarahira bati: Orihingira mwene Benyamiini omukazi akyeenwe!" 
Judges21:19 Nikwo kugira bati: Reeba, obugyenyi bwa Nyakubaho obwa buri mwaka nibwija kuba buri Shiilo ey'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho bwa Beteli, aha burugwa-izooba bw'omuhanda rugyendwa ogurikuruga Beteli gukaza Shekemu aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo bwa Lebona." 
Judges21:20 Baaragiira Abaabenyamiini bati: Mbwenu, mugyende mugwere omu misiri y'emizaabibu." 
Judges21:21 Haza mutaita eriisho. Reero bahara b'Abaashiilo ku baraashohore nibaza aha bugyenyi kuzina, musyokye omu misiri y'emizaabibu. Buri mushaija ayekwatire omuri bahara b'Abaashiilo ow'okushwera. Bwanyima, mugarukye omu nsi ya Benyamiini." 
Judges21:22 Baishebo nari banyaanyabo ku baraije kututonganaho, nitwija kubagira tuti: Mubatuhe, ahabw'embabazi, ahabw'okuba itwe buri muntu titumunyagiire mukazi mu rugamba, kandi naimwe timubabahingiire. Kuri mubatuhingiire naimwe mukaabaire mwine orubanja." 
Judges21:23 Abaabenyamiini baatwaza batyo; baayenyagira abakazi barikwingana nabo obwingi omu baabaire nibaza kuzina. Bwanyima baagyenda, baagarukayo aha butaka bwabo; baayombeka busya endembo, baazituuramu." 
Judges21:24 Omuri ebyo biro Abaisiraeli nabo baarugayo, buri muntu yaagaruka omu b'oruganda rwe, n'omu b'eka ye. Baaruga aho, buri omwe yaagaruka aha butaka bwe." 
Judges21:25 Omu biro ebyo Abaisiraeli bakaba bataine mugabe, buri muntu naayekorera eki arikwenda." 
Ruth1:1 Omu busingye bw'abaramuzi, enjara ekateera ensi, omushaija wa Beetelehemu eya Yuda, n'omukazi we, n'abatabani bombi, baashuuhuukira omu nsi ya Moabu." 
Ruth1:2 Omushaija ogwo akaba naayetwa Elimeleki, omukazi we naayetwa Naomi; n'abatabani babiri, omwe naayetwa Mahalooni, n'ondi naayetwa Kilioni. Bakaba bari Abaefuraati, barugire Beetelehemu eya Yuda, baaza omu nsi ya Moabu, baatuurayo;" 
Ruth1:3 kwonka Elimeleki iba Naomi yaafa; Naomi yaatsigara n'abatabani bombi. 
Ruth1:4 Abatabani baashwera Abamoabukazi, omwe naayetwa Orupa, n'ondi naayetwa Ruuti; baamarayo emyaka nka ikumi." 
Ruth1:5 Bwanyima Mahalooni na Kilioni baafa; ogwo mukazi yaafeerwa abatabani bombi na iba. 
Ruth1:6 Naomi akaimuka n'abakaamwana kuruga omu nsi ya Moabu, ahabw'okuba ku yaabaire akiriyo, yaahurira ku Nyakubaho ataayaayiire abantu be, akabaha ebyokurya." 
Ruth1:7 Mpaho yaaruga ahi yaabaire ari n'abakaamwana, baakwata omuhanda kugaruka omu nsi ya Yuda." 
Ruth1:8 Bwanyima Naomi yaagira abakaamwana ati: Nimwirooko, buri omwe agarukye owa nyina. Nyakubaho abagirire embabazi nk'oku mwazigiriire baanyakufa, naanye." 
Ruth1:9 Abahe obuhuumure, buri omwe omu ka ya iba orimushwera! Atyo abanywegyera; kwonka bo baborooga, barira." 
Ruth1:10 Bamugira bati: Ngaaha! Nitwija kugyenda naiwe, waaba noogaruka omu baanyu." 
Ruth1:11 Naomi abagarukamu ati: Baana bangye, nimugarukyeyo! Mbwenu nimwendera ki kugyenda naanye? Nimugira ngu nkiine abaana omunda ngu nyentsya babashwere?" 
Ruth1:12 Baana bangye, nimugarukyeyo, mwegyendere. Manya nyowe nkuzire, tinkiri w'okushwerwa. Nangwa nobu naakugira amatsiko, naashwerwa omushaija eki kiro, naazaara abaana," 
Ruth1:13 ebyo mukaabategyereza okuhitsya obu barikura, mureka kushwerwa? Ngaaha, baana bangye, ekyo nikinsaasa ahabwanyu, ahabw'okuba Mukama niinye arikufa naanye." 
Ruth1:14 Batyo bagaruka beeha eboroogo, barira; Orupa anywegyera nyinazaara, naamuraga, kwonka Ruuti amubaho akaramata." 
Ruth1:15 Naomi amugira ati: Reeba, muka mukuru wa baro yaagaruka omuri beene waabo, n'omu mandwa z'owaabo, naiwe garukayo, okurate muka mukuru wa baro." 
Ruth1:16 Ruuti amugarukamu ati: Reka kuunyeshengyereza, ngu nkutsigyeho, ndekye kugyenda naiwe. Manya ah'oriza, naanye niho ndiza; n'ahu orituura, naanye niho ndituura; abaanyu baryaba abaitu, na Ruhanga waawe aryaba Ruhanga wangye." 
Ruth1:17 Ei origwa, naanye niyo ndigwa, kandi niyo ndiziikwa. Nindahirira kimwe omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga waawe, ku hatarigira kiritutaanisa, kureka rufu." 
Ruth1:18 Naomi ku areeba onu amaririire kugyenda nawe, arekyera aho kugira ekindi eki yaamugambira." 
Ruth1:19 Batyo bombi bagumizamu, okuhitsya obu baahikire Beetelehemu. Ku baahikireyo, ab'omu kirorero boona baabatangaarira, abakazi baabuuzana bati: Beitu ogu ni Naomi?" 
Ruth1:20 Nawe abagira ati: Mutaanyeta Naomi, kureka muunyete Maara, ahabw'okuba Ow'obushoboorozi bwona akandeetera obusaasi bwingi munonga." 
Ruth1:21 Nkagyenda mpundiriire, mbwenu Nyakubaho yangarura ntaine kantu. Nimuunyetera ki Naomi, Nyakubaho yaambonaboneise, Ow'obushoboorozi bwona akandeetera okuhikiirirwa?" 
Ruth1:22 Okwo nikwo Naomi yaagarukire hamwe n'omukaamwana Ruuti, Omumoabukazi, naaruga omu nsi ya Moabu, bakahika Beetelehemu omu itogyera rya sayiri." 
Ruth2:1 Mbwenu Naomi akaba aine omunyabuzaare w'omu b'oruganda rwa iba, omushaija omutungi rugambwa, ow'omuryango gwa Elimeleki, orikwetwa Boazi." 
Ruth2:2 Reero Ruuti Omumoabukazi yaagira Naomi ati: Ka nze omu misiri, mpumbe ebishiisha by'engano ebiraatsigare omu kibuba, nkuratiire orangirire embabazi. Naomi amugarukamu ati: Irooko, mwana wangye!" 
Ruth2:3 Onu atyo aimuka, agyenda, ahumba omu misiri naakuratira abagyesi. Kyakahiire, arugaho ahika aha kicweka ky'emisiri ekyabaire kiri ekya Boazi, ow'omu b'omu muryango gwa Elimeleki." 
Ruth2:4 Ago magingo Boazi aruga Beetelehemu, aramutsya abagyesi ati: Mukama agume naimwe! Nabo bamugarukamu bati: Nyakubaho akuhe emigisha!" 
Ruth2:5 Reero Boazi abuuza omunyampara orikureeberera abagyesi ati: Ogu mwishiki n'ow'oha? 
Ruth2:6 Nyampara amugarukamu ati: Omwishiki ogu, n'Omumoabukazi owaizire na Naomi, naaruga omu nsi y'Abamoabu." 
Ruth2:7 Yangira ati: Naakweshengyereza, nyikiriza mpumbe, kandi nshanguruze, mpitsye emishamato y'engano, ninkuratira abagyesi. Atyo aija, agumizamu naahumba okwiha omu kasheeshe okuhitsya aga magingo atahuumwireho mu nju, nangwa nobu kaakuba akaanya kakye." 
Ruth2:8 Mpaho Boazi agira Ruuti ati: Mbwenu, mwana wangye, hurira. Otaza kuhumba omu gundi musiri gwona, okatsigaho ogu, kureka ogume haihi n'abazaana bangye." 
Ruth2:9 Gumya amaisho aha barikugyesha, ogyende obakuratiire. Reeba, naaragiira abatsigazi ngu hatagira owaakuganzya. Kandi ku oraagire eiriho, oze ah'enyungu ziri, onywe aha maizi gu baataha." 
Ruth2:10 Ogwo mwishiki ajuumara aha nsi, amugira ati: Naahiirwa nta, kureeba nongirira embabazi, okantaho omutima, haza ndi omunyamahanga?" 
Ruth2:11 Boazi amugarukamu ati: Banshoboororera gye byona ebi okoreire nyokozaara okwiha obu baro yaafa, n'oku waatsigireho sho na nyoko n'eihanga ryanyu, okaija omu bantu bu otarikumanya." 
Ruth2:12 Nyakubaho akuzimuurire ebi waakozire! Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ou ohungiireho, akuhe ebihembo biijwire!" 
Ruth2:13 Ruuti amugarukamu ati: Mukama wangye, wangirira embabazi nyingi, kureeba n'ompuumuriza, noogamba gye naanye omuzaana waawe, nobu ndaabe ntari w'omu bazaana baawe." 
Ruth2:14 Obunaku bw'okurya ku bwahikire Boazi yaamugira ati: Ija aha, orye ebyokurya, okoze ekitongye kyawe omu viino. Nawe atyo ashutama aha rubaju rw'abagyesi, n'onu amuha embumburi ya sayiri ekarangire, arya, ahaaga, bimuremeraho." 
Ruth2:15 Ku yaimukire kuhumba, Boazi yaaragiira abatsigazi be ati: Mumurekye ahumbe n'omu biba, mutamugambira kubi;" 
Ruth2:16 kandi mumushohoororere ezindi ngano omu biba, muzimurekyere azihumbe mutamukabukira." 
Ruth2:17 Atyo ahumba omuri ogwo musiri okuhitsya omu mwabazyo. Bwanyima ahuura ebi yaahumba, bihitsya ekitenga kya sayiri." 
Ruth2:18 Agyekorera, aza omu kirorero, ayoreka nyinazaara ebi yaahumba, kandi amwihirayo ebyokurya ebyatsigaraho yaaheza kuhaaga, abimuha." 
Ruth2:19 Nyinazaara nikwo kumubuuza ati: Beitu eri izooba waahumba hi? Kandi waakora hi? Ogwo mushaija waakwetaho, naakagire emigisha! Ruuti agambira nyinazaara ou yaakora nawe. Amugira ati: Ogwo mushaija ou naakora nawe eri izooba, naayetwa Boazi." 
Ruth2:20 Naomi nawe agira omukaamwana ati: Nyakubaho, otakaburaga kugirira embabazi abahuriire n'abafiire, naakahe emigisha ogwo mushaija! Naomi ayongyera amugira ati: Manya ogwo mushaija twine nawe obuzaare bwa haihi." 
Ruth2:21 Ruuti Omumoabukazi amugira ati: Kandi ekindi yaagira ati: Ogume haihi n'abakozi bangye, okuhitsya obu baraashaaruure emisiri yangye yoona ei barikugyesha." 
Ruth2:22 Naomi agarukamu Ruuti omukaamwana ati: Mwana wangye, ni kirungi okugyenda n'abazaana be, okukira okuza omu gundi musiri ei baakukuganzya." 
Ruth2:23 Ruuti okwiha obwo yaaguma haihi n'abazaana ba Boazi, naahumba, okuhitsya obu baahereize kimwe kushaaruura sayiri n'engano; kandi yaaguma na nyinazaara." 
Ruth3:1 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, Naomi, nyinazaara Ruuti yaamugira ati: Mwana wangye, mbwenu tinshemereire kukutungira omushaija, haza okaba gye?" 
Ruth3:2 Boazi ou abazaana be babaire bari hamwe naiwe, tiwe aine naitwe obuzaare? Reeba, eki kiro naija kuba naaheheeza sayiri aha mbuga y'eihuuriro." 
Ruth3:3 Mbwenu yoga, oyesiigye, ojware gye, haza oshuume aha mbuga y'okuhuuriraho, kwonka orekye kumwegambira atakaherize kurya n'okunywa." 
Ruth3:4 Reero ku araabyame, oyetegyereze ah'arambiire, ogyende omushuuruure ebigyere, obyame, haza naija kukugambira eki oraakore." 
Ruth3:5 Ruuti amugarukamu ati: Ebi waagamba byona naaza kubikora. 
Ruth3:6 Atyo ashuuma, ahika aha mbuga ei bahuuriraho engano, atwaza nk'oku nyinazaara yaamuhabura." 
Ruth3:7 Boazi ku yaaherize kurya n'okunywa, n'okuhaaga, yaagyenda, yaabyama aha rubaju rw'ekitunda ky'engano. Ruuti nawe yaija naashooba, yaashuuruura ahi yaabaire ataire ebigyere, yaabyamaho." 
Ruth3:8 Omu itumbi ogwo mushaija ku yaayekangire; omu kuza kuhinduka, yaashanga omukazi abyami ahu arambikiririize." 
Ruth3:9 Amubuuza ati: Ori oha? Onu ati: Ndi Ruuti, omuzaana waawe. Mbwenu, nyowe omuzaana waawe nnagaho omunagiro gwawe, ahabw'okuba oine naanye obuzaare bwa haihi." 
Ruth3:10 Nawe amugarukamu ati: Mwana wangye, Nyakubaho akuhe omugisha! Manya eki kintu ky'esaasi eki waanyoreka, nikikira ebindi ebi waanyorekire ira, ahabw'okuba toyenzire kushwerwa batsigazi, yaaba booro nari abatungi." 
Ruth3:11 Mbwenu, mwana wangye, otatiina, niinyija kukukorera byona ebi waashaba; ahabw'okuba bagyenzi bangye boona omuri eki kirorero nibamanya ku ori omukazi w'omutima." 
Ruth3:12 Buzimazima, nobu ndaabe nimbaasa kukucungura, kwonka hariho orikunkiza kugira obuzaare bwa haihi naiwe." 
Ruth3:13 Mbwenu, raara aha eki kiro. Omu kasheeshe ku araikirize kukukorera ebi omuntu akorera ou aine nawe obuzaare, eego, akucungure. Kwonka ku araayangye, nyowe nindahira Mukama otahwaho, niinyija kukukorera ebi omucunguzi w'obuzaare bwa haihi akora. Byama aha, okuhitsya obu buraasheeshe." 
Ruth3:14 Ruuti atyo abyama ahi Boazi arambikiririize, okuhitsya omu kasheeshe. Ku bwabaire nibutaagurikana, Boazi yaimuka hatakahwerize, omuntu atakeetegyereize mugyenzi we, yaagira ati: Hatagira owaakimanya ku ogu mukazi aizire aha mbuga y'eihuuriro." 
Ruth3:15 Amugira ati: Reeta omunagiro gu ojwaire, oguntegye. Nawe agumutega. Onu arenga encuro mukaaga za sayiri, azimukorera; mpaho ogwo mukazi agyenda, aza omu kirorero." 
Ruth3:16 Ku yaahikire nyinazaara, onu yaamubuuza ati: Mwana wangye, bikugyendeire bita? N'onu amuteekyerereza ebi ogwo mushaija amukoreire," 
Ruth3:17 naagira ati: Ezi ncuro mukaaga za sayiri niwe yaazimpa, akangira ati: Toshemereire kugarukayo engaro nsha owa nyokozaara." 
Ruth3:18 Naomi amugarukamu ati: Mbwenu, mwana wangye, tegyereza okuhitsya obu oraamanye ahi biraaherere. Manya, ogwo mushaija tarikwija kuhuumura atakabishoboroire eri izooba." 
Ruth4:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Boazi yaagyenda, yaaza aha irembo, yaashutamaho. Ago magingo, ow'obuzaare bwa haihi ou yaagambire ku yaizire naahingura, Boazi yaamugira ati: Iwe mushaija 'we, ija, obe oshutami aha! N'onu akubuuka, ashutama." 
Ruth4:2 Kandi Boazi omu bantu bakuru b'omuri ekyo kirorero, atooranamu abashaija ikumi, abagira ati: Naimwe nimushutame aha, nabo bashutama." 
Ruth4:3 Mpaho agambira ogwo munyabuzaare wa haihi ati: Naomi, ogarukire naaruga omu nsi ya Moabu, naatunda ekibanja ekyabaire kiri ekya mwene waitu Elimeleki." 
Ruth4:4 Nikyo nteekateekyeire kukikugambira, ngu okigure aba bantu bashutami aha, n'abakuru b'oruganda rwaitu bariho. Mbwenu ku oraabe noija kukicungura, kicungure; kwonka ku oraabe otarikwenda, ongambire, nkimanye. Manya tihariho ondiijo weena ow'okukicungura, kureka iwe naanye orikukukurata. Nawe amugira ati: Eego, niinyija kukicungura." 
Ruth4:5 Reero Boazi amugira ati: Eizooba ri oraagurireho ekyo kibanja na Naomi, niryo oraagurireho na Ruuti Omumoabukazi muka nyakufa, eiziina rya nyakufa ribone kuguma niriijukirwa aha butaka bwe." 
Ruth4:6 Omunyabuzaare wa haihi agarukamu ati: Nyowe tindikwija kukyecungurira, ntakaafeerwa ekyangye eky'obuhunguzi. Mbwenu, ba niiwe waakicungura omu mwanya gwangye. Nyowe tindikwija kukicungura." 
Ruth4:7 Mbwenu obunyakare omu Isiraeli, ogu nigwo gwabaire guri omucwe gw'okucungura n'okuhingisa ebintu. Ku baabaire benda kuhamya eki baraakore, omuntu akaba ajuura enkaito agiha mugyenzi we ou arikuragaana nawe. Ogwo guri omuringo gw'okuhamya endagaano omu Baisiraeli." 
Ruth4:8 N'omunyabuzaare wa haihi ku yaagambiire Boazi ati: Ba niiwe waakyegurira, yaajuura enkaito." 
Ruth4:9 Mpaho Boazi agambira abakuru bari n'abantu boona ati: Eri izooba niimwe bajurizi b'okuhamya ku naagura na Naomi ebintu byona ebyabaire biri ebya Elimeleki, n'ebya Kilioni byona, kandi n'ebya Mahalooni." 
Ruth4:10 Na Ruuti Omumoabukazi owaabaire ari muka Mahalooni nawe naamuguriramu kuba omukazi wangye, eiziina rya nyakufa ribone kuguma niriijukwa. Eryo iziina ritaribuza obutsibyo omuri beene ishe, n'ahaka ye. Mbwenu eri izooba, niimwe baakareebi." 
Ruth4:11 Boona abaabaire bateeraniire aha kirorero n'abakuru omu ruganda baagira bati: Turi baakareebi. Ogwo mukazi ou waaza kutaasya, Nyakubaho amugire nka Rakeeli na Leeya abaayombekire kumwe eka ya Isiraeli. Naiwe nookagogyeere omuri Efuraati, okarangaanwa omuri Beetelehemu!" 
Ruth4:12 N'eka yaawe neekabe nk'eya Pereezi, ou Yuda yaazaire ahari Tamari, ahabw'abaana bu Nyakubaho arikuheera omuri ogu mukazi muto." 
Ruth4:13 Boazi atyo atwara Ruuti, aba omukazi we. Ateerana nawe, Nyakubaho amuha omugisha, abaka enda, azaara omutabani." 
Ruth4:14 Reero abakazi bagira Naomi bati: Nyakubaho otaakureka eri izooba kuguma otaine w'obuzaare bwa haihi, ahimbisibwe, n'eiziina rye rirangaanwe omuri Isiraeli!" 
Ruth4:15 Ogu mwana n'ow'okukugaruramu amagara, n'okukuriisa, waahika omu ngingo za bukuru. Manya, mukaamwana waawe okukunda, kandi orikukukirira abaana baboojo mushanju, niwe yaamuzaara." 
Ruth4:16 Mpaho Naomi aihaho omwana, amukiikira, aba omurezi we." 
Ruth4:17 Abakazi bataahi be bamweta eiziina, nibagira bati: Omwana omwojo azaariirwe Naomi. Batyo bamweta Obedi; niwe ishe wa Yese, ishe wa Daudi." 
Ruth4:18 Mbwenu, aba nibo baijukuru ba Pereezi: Pereezi akazaara Hezirooni," 
Ruth4:19 Hezirooni yaazaara Raamu, Raamu yaazaara Aminadabu," 
Ruth4:20 Aminadabu yaazaara Nahashoni, Nahashoni yaazaara Salumooni," 
Ruth4:21 Salumooni yaazaara Boazi, Boazi yaazaara Obedi," 
Ruth4:22 Obedi yaazaara Yese, na Yese yaazaara Daudi." 
1Samuel1:1 Hakaba haribo omushaija omu nsi ya Ramataimuzofimu ey'omu nsi ya Efuraimu ey'ebibungo, orikwetwa Elukaana, mwene Yerohaamu, mwijukuru wa Eluhu, mutabani wa Tohu ya Zuufi Omuefuraimu." 
1Samuel1:2 Akaba aine abakazi babiri, omwe naayetwa Haana n'ondiijo Penina; Penina azaire abaana, kwonka Haana atazaire." 
1Samuel1:3 Mbwenu ogwo mushaija buri mwaka akaba aruga omu rurembo rw'owaabo aza Shiilo kuramizayo Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe n'okumutambira ebitambo. Kandi okwo niyo Hofuni na Finehaasi beene Eeli baabaire bari abahongyerezi ba Nyakubaho. 
1Samuel1:4 Aha izooba ri Elukaana yaabaire atambiraho ekitambo, akaba aha omukazi we Penina emigabo n'abatabani boona n'abahara." 
1Samuel1:5 Kwonka nobu araabe yaabaire akunda Haana, akaba amuha omugabo gumwe gwonka, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akaba amwimire oruzaaro." 
1Samuel1:6 Reero muka iba amurahura kumugwisa kubi, ngu ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akamwima oruzaaro." 
1Samuel1:7 Byagumizamu bityo buri mwaka. Haana ku yaabaire aza omu nju ya Nyakubaho, muka iba amurahura. Haana arira, aremwa n'okurya." 
1Samuel1:8 Elukaana iba amubuuza ati: Haana noorizibwa ki? Ekirikukuzibira kurya ni ki? N'enki ekikucuncubaize? Mbwenu nyowe tindikukukirira abaana b'aboojo ikumi? 
1Samuel1:9 Mbwenu eizooba rimwe ku baabaire bari Shiilo baaheza bati kurya n'okunywa; Haana yaimuka. Obwo Eeli omuhongyerezi akaba ashutami aha kitebe aha ruti rw'omuryango gwa Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. 
1Samuel1:10 Haza yaashaba Nyakubaho aine obujune bwingi kandi naarira munonga. 
1Samuel1:11 Yaahiga naaraganisa ati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga w'amahe, buzimazima ku oraareebe okubonabona kw'omuzaana waawe, waanyijuka, nyowe omuzaana waawe wampa omwana w'omwojo, naanye ndyamukuhongyera, abe owaawe ebiro byona ebi arimara omu nsi, n'orumweiso tirurimuraba mu mutwe." 
1Samuel1:12 Ku yaagumiizemu naashaba Nyakubaho, Eeli yaaguma naamureeba aha minwa." 
1Samuel1:13 Haana ogwo akaba naashabira aha mutima, eminwa neeyetengyetsa, kwonka eiraka rye ritarikuhurirwa. Nikyo Eeli yaatekateekyeire ngu asinzire;" 
1Samuel1:14 akamugira ati: Noija kuherera hi n'esindo? Ku ocwa viino! 
1Samuel1:15 Haana amugarukamu ati: Ngaaha, mukama wangye. Nyowe ndi omukazi oine obujune bwingi, tiinywaire viino, nobu kyakuba ekirikusinza kyona; kureka naaba nintuurira Nyakubaho enaku ezindi aha mutima." 
1Samuel1:16 Otagira ngu nyowe omuzaana waawe ndi omukazi ofiire omutima, kureka ebi naaba ningamba, mbireeteirwe okugira amaganya maingi n'okutuntuzibwa." 
1Samuel1:17 Eeli nawe amugira ati: Gyenda n'obusingye! Ruhanga wa Isiraeli akuhe eki waamushaba. 
1Samuel1:18 N'onu amugarukamu ati: Nyowe omuzaana waawe, kagume nongirira embabazi. Mpaho ogwo mukazi agyenda, arya, tagaruka kureebwa aine enaku aha maisho." 
1Samuel1:19 Bakaimuka kare omu kasheeshe, baaza omu maisho ga Nyakubaho baamuramya, bwanyima baagaruka owaabo Raama. Elukaana yaateerana n'omukazi we Haana; haza Nyakubaho yaamwijuka." 
1Samuel1:20 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, Haana yaabaka enda yaagizaaramu omwana w'omwojo, yaamweta Samueli; ahabw'okuba akagira ati: Nkamushaba Nyakubaho." 
1Samuel1:21 Mbwenu ogwo mushaija Elukaana n'ab'eka ye boona ku yaagiire kutambira Nyakubaho ekitambo ekya buri mwaka," 
1Samuel1:22 Haana tiyaazayo, yaagira iba ati: Omwana ku aricuuka nibwo ndimutwara, nkamumurikira Nyakubaho; akagumayo ebiro byona." 
1Samuel1:23 Elukaana iba amugarukamu ati: Kora eki orikusiima, otegyereze okuhitsya obu orimucuutsya. Nyakubaho naakahikiirize eki waaraganiise. Ogwo mukazi aguma aho, ayorora omwana we okuhitsya obu yaamucuukize." 
1Samuel1:24 Ku yaamucuukize, yaamutwara n'enimi ehikize emyaka eshatu, n'encuro y'esaano y'obunono, n'endyanga ya viino, yaamuhitsya Shiilo, yaamuta omu nju ya Nyakubaho akiri muto." 
1Samuel1:25 Batyo baita enimi, omwana baamureetera Eeli." 
1Samuel1:26 Nyina yaamugira ati: Mukama wangye, nk'oku okiri ohuriire, niinye mukazi ori owaabaire ayemereire aha omu maisho gaawe naashaba Nyakubaho." 
1Samuel1:27 Manya ogu niwe mwana ou naashabire Nyakubaho, akahurira okushaba kwangye, akamumpa." 
1Samuel1:28 Mbwenu naamumuhongyera. Ebiro byona ebi arimara omu nsi, agume ari omuhongyeirwe. Batyo baaramizayo Nyakubaho." 
1Samuel2:1 Bwanyima Haana akasingiza Nyakubaho naagira ati: Omutima gwangye nigwesingiriza omuri Nyakubaho, Omutwe gwangye ningurarikira omuri Nyakubaho, Abazigu bangye nimbashekyeerera, ahabw'okuba ninshemerererwa okujuna kwawe." 
1Samuel2:2 Tihariho orikwera nka Nyakubaho, tihariho ndiijo kureka iwe wenka, tihariho ori orukiri nka Ruhanga waitu." 
1Samuel2:3 Mutagaruka kugamba eby'okwetunguura, kandi mutaikiriza eby'amaryo kubaruga omu kanwa; Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho aba Ruhanga Kamanyi, orenga ebi abantu bakora." 
1Samuel2:4 Amamanzi gahendeirwe obuta, abarikutsibaaza baagarukwamu amaani." 
1Samuel2:5 Abaabaire baigutsi hati nibahendekyera enda; Reero abaabaire baitsirwe enjara tekibaita. Engumba ezaire mushanju, ow'abaana baingi yaahononoka." 
1Samuel2:6 Nyakubaho aita kandi akiza. Ashuumya okuzimu owa Nyamuteza kandi atuuhuurayo. 
1Samuel2:7 Mukama ainaza kandi atungisa, abundika kandi atunguura." 
1Samuel2:8 Ashutura abooro omu mucuucu. Atabuura abakyene omu rubungo, kubashutamya n'abategyeki, akabaha ebitebe by'ekitiinwa. Manya enyomyo z'ensi ziba eza Mukama. Nizo yaahangiriize ensi yoona." 
1Samuel2:9 Arinda oburabo bw'abamwesiga; kwonka enyabibi ziryahwererera omu mwirima; ahabw'okuba tihariho muntu orisingura ahabw'amaani ge. 
1Samuel2:10 Ababisha ba Nyakubaho baryacwagurwa, Rukiraboona ku aribahindiraho ari omu iguru. Nyakubaho aryacwera ensi yoona orubanja, ahe amaani omugabe ou yaataireho, atunguure obushoboorozi bw'ou yaasiigire amajuta." 
1Samuel2:11 Bwanyima Elukaana akagaruka owe Raama; ogwo mwojo yaaguma naaheereza Nyakubaho naareebererwa Eeli. 
1Samuel2:12 Mbwenu batabani ba Eeli bakaba bari ebifiire, batarikweta hari Nyakubaho." 
1Samuel2:13 Oku nikwo abo bahongyerezi baabaire batwaza abantu. Omuntu ku yaabaire atamba ekitambo, omuheereza w'omuhongyerezi aija bakiteekire enyama, akwaitse ekyoma ky'amaino ashatu," 
1Samuel2:14 akicumita omu sefuriya nari omu binika nari omu nyungu nainga omu rwabya; kyona eki ekyo kyoma kyajaburamu, omuhongyerezi aba nikyo yaatwara. Baaguma nibatwaza batyo Abaisiraeli boona abarikwija Shiilo." 
1Samuel2:15 Ekindi, ku baabaire baba batakookize bishaju, omuheereza w'omuhongyerezi aija, agira orikutamba ekitambo ati: Mpa enyama y'okwokyeza omuhongyerezi, ahabw'okuba tarikwenda ku omuha eteekire, kureka embisi." 
1Samuel2:16 Omuntu ku yaabaire amugira ati: Ka babanze bootsye ebishaju, obone kutwara yoona ei orikwenda, onu amugarukamu ati: Ngaaha, gimpe hati. Ku oraabe otagimpaire ningitwaza amaani." 
1Samuel2:17 Ekibi ky'abo batsigazi nikwo kyabaire kihango kityo omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba bakagayisa ekitambo kye." 
1Samuel2:18 Samueli akatandika kuheereza Nyakubaho akiri omwana muto, ayezirikire aha kifuba ekijwaro kya kitaani." 
1Samuel2:19 Kandi nyina akaba amubaziirira akakanzu, akamutwarira agiire kutamba ekitambo kya buri mwaka, hamwe na iba." 
1Samuel2:20 Reero Eeli ashabira Elukaana n'omukazi we omugisha ati: Nyakubaho naakakuhe abaana omuri ogu mukazi, kuza omu bigyere by'ogu ou mwahongyeire Mukama. Batyo bagarukayo owaabo." 
1Samuel2:21 Nyakubaho yaaha Haana omugisha, yaatwara, yaazaara abandi baana: aboojo bashatu n'abaishiki babiri. Ogwo mwojo Samueli yaakurira omu maisho ga Nyakubaho naamuheereza." 
1Samuel2:22 Mbwenu Eeli akaba akuzire munonga, yaaguma naahurira ebi abatabani baabaire nibakorera Abaisiraeli boona, n'oku barikushambana n'abakazi abaabaire nibaheerereza aha muryango gw'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu." 
1Samuel2:23 Yaabahana ati: Ahabw'enki nimukora ebintu birikushusha bityo? Manya abantu boona nibangambira ebibi bi murikukora. 
1Samuel2:24 Ngaaha, baana bangye! Ebi ndikuhurira abantu ba Ruhanga nibabagambaho ahantu hoona, ku murikukoresa abantu ba Nyakubaho ebibi, ti birungi." 
1Samuel2:25 Omuntu ku arikushaagiza mugyenzi we, Ruhanga niwe arikubaramura; kwonka omuntu ku arikucumura ahari Nyakubaho, n'oha orikumutonganira? Kwonka bo tibaayeta ha bi ishebo arikubagambira, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akaba amaririire kubaita." 
1Samuel2:26 Ogwo mwojo Samueli yaaguma naakura, naasiimwa Nyakubaho n'abantu." 
1Samuel2:27 Mbwenu omuntu wa Ruhanga akaija ahari Eeli yaamugira ati: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nkeeyoreka ab'enju ya sho omuri Misiri, obu baabaire bari abahuuku omu nju ya Faraaho;" 
1Samuel2:28 naamutoorana omu b'enganda za Isiraeli zoona kuba omuhongyerezi wangye, kutemba aha itambiro ryangye kwotera obubaani, n'okujwara eky'aha kifuba ari omu maisho gangye. Kandi ab'omuryango gwa sho nkabaha ebitambo byangye byona eby'okwotsya ebi Abaisiraeli batoija." 
1Samuel2:29 Mbwenu ahabw'enki nimugirira omururu ebitambo byangye n'emitoijo yangye ebi naaragiire, naiwe okaha batabani baawe byona ebi abantu bangye Abaisiraeli bantambira?" 
1Samuel2:30 N'ahabw'ekyo Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Nkaraganisa nti: Ab'enju yaawe n'ab'eya sho nibo bariguma nibampeereza bari abahongyerezi. Kwonka mbwenu Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ekyo nikikabure! ahabw'okuba abampa ekitiinwa naanye ndyakibaha, kandi abangaya nabo nikwo baritwazibwa." 
1Samuel2:31 Reeba, obunaku bwaza kuhika, obu ndaakucwe eishaija, nkaricwa n'ab'enju ya shwenkuru; eka yaanyu ekaburamu omushaija mukuru." 
1Samuel2:32 Reero okiba noitwa enaku, okagirira eihari Abaisiraeli ahabw'ebirungi bi bariheebwa, haza omwawe ebiro byona hakaburamu ekyeetwa omugurusi." 
1Samuel2:33 Omu baawe ku harigira owaahonokaho, akaguma nampeerereza aha itambiro, aryaba ow'okukuhononora amaisho n'okukureetera amaganya; kwonka ab'oruzaaro rwawe boona baryahenderwa omunyeeto." 
1Samuel2:34 Akagwe akaraagwere batabani baawe bombi Hofuni na Finehaasi, nikaija kugira eki kaakumanyisa: bombi nibaija kufa eizooba rimwe." 
1Samuel2:35 Haza Nyowe nyeteereho omuhongyerezi orikwesigwa, orikukora ebi ndikwenda n'ebindi aha mutima, mwombekyere enju ehamire, agume naaheerereza omu maisho g'omusiigwa wangye ebiro byona." 
1Samuel2:36 Omuntu weena oritsigaraho omuri baijukuru baawe aryaija amukwate amaguru naamweshengyereza kumuha akasente nari akagaati, amugire ati: Ntungira akaanya omu bahongyerezi, nkaagira eki naarya." 
1Samuel3:1 Omwojo Samueli akaba naahereza Nyakubaho, naarebererwa Eeli. Kandi ebiro ebyo Nyakubaho akaba atahimbisa kugamba na bantu nari kubabonekyera." 
1Samuel3:2 Omu bunaku obwo amaisho ga Eeli gakaba gaagiirweho oruho, atarikubaasa kuhweza. Mbwenu ku yaabaire abyami omu mwanya gwe nyekiro," 
1Samuel3:3 etabaaza ya Ruhanga etakaraire, na Samueli abyami omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ahu eshanduukye ya Ruhanga eri;" 
1Samuel3:4 Nyakubaho yaayeta ati: Samueli, Samueli! N'onu yaayetaba ati: Ndi aha!" 
1Samuel3:5 Yairuka, yaahika Eeli, yaamugira ati: Ndi aha, ahabw'okuba waanyeta. N'onu amugira ati: Tinaakweta, garukayo obyame. Atyo agyenda, abyama." 
1Samuel3:6 Nyakubaho agaruka amweta ati: Samueli, Samueli! Samueli, aimuka agyenda, ahika Eeli, amugira ati: Ndi aha, ahabw'okuba waanyeta. Onu amugarukamu ati: Mwana wangye tinaakweta, garukayo obyame." 
1Samuel3:7 Obwo Samueli akaba atakamanyire ku ari Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba akaba atakagambaga nawe." 
1Samuel3:8 Kandi Nyakubaho yaayeta Samueli omurundi gwa kashatu. N'onu yaimuka, yaagyenda, yaahika Eeli, yaamugira ati: Ndi aha, ahabw'okuba waanyeta. Obwo Eeli amanya ku Nyakubaho, niwe arikweta ogwo mwojo." 
1Samuel3:9 Eeli nikwo kugira Samueli ati: Irooko obyame. Ku araakwete, ogire oti: Gamba Mukama wangye, nyowe omwiru waawe nkuhuriire." 
1Samuel3:10 Na Nyakubaho aija, ayemerera aho ayeta nk'okwe ati: Samueli, Samueli! Samueli amwetaba ati: Gamba; ahabw'okuba nyowe omwiru waawe nkuhuriire." 
1Samuel3:11 Mpaho Nyakubaho amugira ati: Reeba, niinyija kukora ekikoro omuri Isiraeli, oraakihurire weena amatu ge gateere enduuru." 
1Samuel3:12 Aha izooba eryo niinyija kuhikiiriza byona ebi naagambire ahari Eeli, ebikwatiraine n'ab'eka ye, okwiha aha kutandika okuhitsya aha muheru." 
1Samuel3:13 Kandi omugambire ku ndi haihi kuha eka ye ekifubiro ky'ebiro byona ahabw'ekibi ki yaamanyire, eky'abatabani kuncumuraho Nyowe Ruhanga, atabahane." 
1Samuel3:14 N'ahabw'ekyo ndahiriire ab'eka ya Eeli, ku ekibi kyabo kitarikarabirirwa kitambo, nobu kwakuba okuhongyererwa." 
1Samuel3:15 Mpaho Samueli abyama. Ku bwaseesire yaigura enyigi z'enju ya Mukama, kandi yaatiina kugambira Eeli ebi ayorekirwe." 
1Samuel3:16 Eeli nikwo kumweta akamugira ati: Mwana wangye Samueli. N'onu akamwetaba ati: Ndi aha. 
1Samuel3:17 Eeli amubuuza ati: Mukama akugambiire ki? Nyaabura 'we, otakinshereka. Ku oraagire eki wanshereka omu bi akugambiire byona, Ruhanga akikuheere ekifubiro kihango n'okukiraho." 
1Samuel3:18 Samueli atyo amugambira byona ataine ki amusherekire. Eeli agira ati: Ni Nyakubaho, k'akore eki arikusiima!" 
1Samuel3:19 Samueli akura, Nyakubaho aguma nawe kandi tareka kigambo kye na kimwe kufa busha." 
1Samuel3:20 Abaisiraeli boona okwiha Daani okuhitsya Beerisheba baamanya ku Samueli ahamiibwe kuba omurangi wa Nyakubaho. 
1Samuel3:21 Nyakubaho aguma naabonekyera omuri Shiilo, ei yaayeyorekyeire Samueli, akagamba nawe, kandi ebi Samueli yaabaire agamba, Abaisiraeli babitega okutu." 
1Samuel4:1 Abaisiraeli bakahurura kurwanisa Abafilisiti, baasiisira Ebenezeri; Abafilisiti nabo baasiisira Afeki." 
1Samuel4:2 Abafilisiti baatengyera Abaisiraeli orugamba. Orugamba ku rwahamire, baasingura Abaisiraeli baabaitamu abantu nk'enkumi ina omu irwaniro." 
1Samuel4:3 Engabo ku zaagarukire omu rusiisira, abakuru b'Abaisiraeli baabuuzana bati: Ahanki Nyakubaho yaikiriza ku tusingurwa Abafilisiti eri izooba? Mbwenu ka twihe Shiilo eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho, tugireete aha, agume naitwe, atujune abazigu." 
1Samuel4:4 Batyo batuma abantu Shiilo, baihayo eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Mukama Ruhanga w'amahe osingami ahari baakerubi. Kandi beene Eeli bombi, Hofuni na Finehaasi, baija hamwe n'egyo shanduukye y'endagaano ya Ruhanga." 
1Samuel4:5 Eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho ku yaahikire omu rusiisira, Abaisiraeli boona baateera munonga akaari, ensi yaijura obwaku." 
1Samuel4:6 Abafilisiti ku baahuriire okwamuza kw'abarikuteera akaari, baagira bati: Orwo rwari rwingi oruri omu rusiisira rw'Abaheburaayo n'orw'enki? Reero Abafilisiti ku baamanyire ngu eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho eizire omu rusiisira," 
1Samuel4:7 baatiina, baagira bati: Hariho Ruhanga oizire omu rusiisira! Baatonzya bati: Ebi shi twakareeba! Eki tikikabahoga!" 
1Samuel4:8 Ebishi twareeba enaku! Mbwenu n'oha oraatujune baaruhanga aba ab'amaani? Aba nibo baaruhanga abaitsize Abanyamisiri enfu z'emiringo mingi omu ihamba. 
1Samuel4:9 Imwe Bafilisiti 'mwe, mugume muhamire nk'abashaija mutakaaba abahuuku b'Abaheburaayo, nk'oku babaire bari abahuuku baanyu. Muhame nk'abashaija, murwane!" 
1Samuel4:10 Batyo Abafilisiti baarwana kimanzi, baasingura Abaisiraeli, buri muntu yaahungira omu ka ye. Baabaitamu abantu baingi. Abaisiraeli baafamu abarwani obukumi bushatu abarikugyendesa ebigyere." 
1Samuel4:11 Eshanduukye ya Ruhanga yaanyagwa, na batabani ba Eeli bombi Hofuni na Finehaasi baitwa." 
1Samuel4:12 Omushaija w'omu Baabenyamiini akacwa omu ngabo, yaija Shiilo eryo izooba, ebijwaro bye bitaagukire, n'eitaka rimuri omu mutwe." 
1Samuel4:13 Obu yaahikayo, Eeli akaba ashutami aha kitebe aha rubaju rw'omuhanda, amaisho agahangire enkiro; ahabw'okuba akaba ayemereize omutima ahabw'eshanduukye ya Ruhanga. Ogwo mushaija ku yaahikire omu rurembo yaagambira abaamwo enkuru, baaborooga." 
1Samuel4:14 Na Eeli ku ahurira abarikuborooga abuuza ati: Beitu orwo rwari n'orw'enki? Ago magingo ogwo mushaija aija naayehuuta, abiteera Eeli." 
1Samuel4:15 Obwo Eeli akaba ahikize emyaka makumi mwenda na munaana ya bukuru, n'amaisho ge gaahumire atakihweza." 
1Samuel4:16 Mpaho ogwo mushaija agira Eeli ati: Niinye naaruga aha rugamba eri izooba mpungire. N'onu amubuuza ati: Bibaire bita, mwana wangye?" 
1Samuel4:17 Owaareeta enkuru amugarukamu ati: Abafilisiti baabinga Abaisiraeli, kandi baabaitamu abantu baingi munonga. Batabani baawe bombi Hofuni na Finehaasi baafa, n'eshanduukye ya Ruhanga yaanyagwa." 
1Samuel4:18 Ku yaagambire ati eky'eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, Eeli yaahuruutuka aha kitebe, yaagwa agarami aha rubaju rw'eirembo, yaahendeka ebitsya, yaafa, ahabw'okuba akaba ari omugurusi kandi naayeremeera. Akaba amazire emyaka makumi ana naategyeka Abaisiraeli." 
1Samuel4:19 Omu bunaku obwo, mukaamwana wa Eeli, muka Finehaasi, akaba aine enda arangariire kuzaara. Ku yaahuriire ngu baanyaga eshanduukye ya Ruhanga kandi ngu ishezaara na iba baafa, yaafukama yaazaara, ahabw'okuba ebisha bikamukwatira aho." 
1Samuel4:20 Ku yaabaire ari haihi kufa, abakazi abaabaire nibamuzaaza, baamugira bati: Otatiina, ahabw'okuba waazaara omwojo. Kwonka we tiyaagira ki yaabagarukamu, nobu kwakuba okukyeetaho." 
1Samuel4:21 Ogwo mwana yaamweta Ikabodi amakuru ngu Isiraeli yaafeerwa ekitiinwa; ahabw'eshanduukye ya Ruhanga kunyagwa n'ahabwa ishezaara na iba kufa. 
1Samuel4:22 Yaagira ati: Isiraeli yaafeerwa ekitiinwa, ahabw'okuba eshanduukye ya Ruhanga yaanyagwa." 
1Samuel5:1 Abafilisiti ku baanyagire eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, baagiiha Ebenezeri baagitwara Ashidoodi." 
1Samuel5:2 Bwanyima baagiihaho, baagitaasya omu ndaaro ya Dagoni, baagita aha rubaju rwe." 
1Samuel5:3 Abanyashidoodi aha izooba ryakuratsireho, ku baimukire kare, baashanga Dagoni agwire aha nsi, ajuumaire omu maisho g'eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho. Baamwihaho, baamugarura omu mwanya gwe." 
1Samuel5:4 Kandi ku baimukire kare omu kasheeshe kaakuratsireho, baamushanga nabwo agwire aha nsi ajuumaire omu maisho g'eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho, omutwe n'emikono bicwekireho, biri omu muryango, atsigaize ekihinju kyonka." 
1Samuel5:5 Nikyo abagirwa ba Dagoni n'abataaha omu ndaaro ye omuri Ashidoodi bataribatira omu muryango gwe n'okuhitsya eri izooba. 
1Samuel5:6 Omukono gwa Nyakubaho gukahingamira Abanyashidoodi n'ab'omu byanga byayo. Yaabatiinisa, kandi yaabarwaza ebizimba." 
1Samuel5:7 Ab'omuri Ashidoodi ku baareebire byaba bityo, baagira bati: Eshanduukye ya Ruhanga wa Isiraeli etaguma naitwe, ahabw'okuba omukono gwe gutuhingamiire, gwahingamira na Dagoni ruhanga waitu." 
1Samuel5:8 Batyo batuma aha bakama b'Abafilisiti, bateerana, babuuzana bati: Tugire tuta eshanduukye ya Ruhanga w'Abaisiraeli? Bagarukamu bati: Ka tugyohererezane tugihitsye Gaati. Batyo batwarayo eshanduukye ya Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
1Samuel5:9 Ku baagihikizeyo, omukono gwa Mukama gwahingamira ab'omuri orwo rurembo, gwabahahaaza omutima munonga. Yaabonabonesa abaamwo abakuru n'abato, yaabarwaza ebizimba." 
1Samuel5:10 Ekyarugiremu, eshanduukye ya Ruhanga baagyohereza Ekurooni. Ku yaahikireyo, Abaekurooni baaborooga bati: Batwoherereize eshanduukye ya Ruhanga wa Isiraeli kutwita n'abantu baitu!" 
1Samuel5:11 Batyo baatuma aha bakama b'Abafilisiti boona. Ku baateraine, baabagira bati: Mwohereze eshanduukye ya Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, egarukye omu mwanya gwayo, etakaatwita n'abantu baitu. Manya ab'omu rurembo orwo boona emitima ekaba ebahahaire ahabw'okutiina okufa. Omukono gwa Ruhanga gukaba gubahingamiriireyo." 
1Samuel5:12 Abatarafiire baarwara ebizimba; ekiboroogo ky'ab'omuri orwo rurembo kyahika n'omu iguru. 
1Samuel6:1 Eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho ekamara omu nsi y'Abafilisiti ameezi mushanju. 
1Samuel6:2 Bwanyima Abafilisiti baayeta abagirwa n'abafumu, baababuuza bati: Tugire tuta eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho? Mutugambire eki turaagyohereze nayo neegaruka owaayo." 
1Samuel6:3 Banu baabagarukamu bati: Ku muraayohereze eshanduukye ya Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, mutagyohereza yonka; kureka mucwe obwengye mugyohereze n'empongano y'okwihaho orubanja. Obwo nibwo muraakire; mukamanya ekizibiire omukono gwe kubarugaho." 
1Samuel6:4 Nabo bababuuza bati: Ni mpongano ki ey'okutwihisaho orubanja, ei turaamwoherereze? Babagarukamu bati: Ebizimba bitaano bya zaabu, n'embeba itaano z'ezaabu, nk'oku omubaro gwa bakama b'Abafilisiti gurikwingana. Manya imwe mwena na bakama baanyu orufu rwabajuumikiire ni rumwe." 
1Samuel6:5 Mbwenu mushemereire kuheesha ebintu birikushushana n'ebizimba byanyu n'ebirikushushana n'embeba ezirikushiisha ensi; mutyo muhe Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ekitiinwa, obundi akaabatuubiza okuhingamirwa omukono gwe; imwe na baaruhanga baanyu n'ensi yaanyu." 
1Samuel6:6 Mbwenu mukaagangaariza ki emitima yaanyu nk'Abanyamisiri na Faraaho abaagangaarize eyaabo? Ku yaabafaafatikaniise, tibararekire abo bantu bakarugayo, bakagyenda?" 
1Samuel6:7 Hati nu, nimugire ekigaari kisya mukiteekateekye hamwe n'ente ibiri zirikwontsya ezitakateebwahoga mugamba, muzikomeho ekigaari; kwonka enyana zaazo muzizaakye, zigarukye omuka." 
1Samuel6:8 Mpaho mutware eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho, mugite ahari ekyo kigaari, kandi aha rubaju rwayo muteho akashanduukye akarimu ebintu by'ezaabu ebi murikumwoherereza kuhongyerera ekibi. Bwanyima mugyohereze, egyende." 
1Samuel6:9 Haza mwetegyereze ahu eraatoore. Ku eraahe omuhanda gurikuza owaayo, yaagyema ogwa Betishemeshi, biri Nyakubaho niwe atureeteire aka kabi kahango. Kwonka ku eraabe etagutoire, niho turaamanyire ku ataratuteerize mukono gwe, kureka ku ako kagwe kaabaire ekihikiirizi." 
1Samuel6:10 Abantu baaba nikwo baagira; baareeta ente ibiri zirikwontsya baazikomera aha kigaari, enyana zaazo baazikingiranira omuka." 
1Samuel6:11 Reero baata ahari ekyo kigaari eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho n'akashanduukye akarimu ebintu birikushushana n'embeba n'ebizimba, ebiheesirwe omu zaabu." 
1Samuel6:12 Ezo nte zaashoronga omuhanda rugyendwa nizitoora Betishemeshi, nizigyenda nizijuga zitarikukiikama ha rubaju rwa buryo nari orwa bumosho. Na bakama b'Abafilisiti baagyenda bazikuratiire okuhitsya obu baahikire aha mwatano gwa Betishemeshi." 
1Samuel6:13 Aba Betishemeshi ku baabaire nibagyesha engano zaabo omu ruhanga, baareeba egyo shanduukye, baashemererwa munonga kugireeba." 
1Samuel6:14 Ekigaari ku kyahikire omu musiri gwa Yoshwa owa Betishemeshi, kyayemerera. Aho hakaba hariho eibaare rihango, baashatura ebiti by'ekigaari, baatambiriraho Nyakubaho ezo nte, zaaba ekitambo kye ekicwekize." 
1Samuel6:15 Abaleevi baihaho eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho n'akashanduukye akagiri aha rubaju akaabaire karimu ebintu by'ezaabu, baabita ahari eryo ibaare rihango. Aba Betishemeshi baatambiriraho Nyakubaho ebitambo bicwekize n'ebindi bitambo." 
1Samuel6:16 Abakama bataano b'Abafilisiti ku baakireebire, baagaruka Ekurooni eryo izooba." 
1Samuel6:17 Ebi nibyo bizimba by'ezaabu ebi Abafilisiti baahongyeire Nyakubaho biri empongano y'ekibi. Ekimwe ahabwa Ashidoodi, ekindi ahabwa Gaaza, ekindi ahabwa Ashikelooni, ekindi ahabwa Saati, n'ekindi ahabwa Ekurooni." 
1Samuel6:18 Kandi n'embeba z'ezaabu, nk'oku omubaro gw'endembo z'Abafilisiti zoona ezirikutegyekwa abakama bataano zirikwingana, endembo ezeehinguririziibwe ebigo by'amabaare n'ebirorero ebitazitiriirwe engo. Eibaare rihango eri baahuumwizeho egyo shanduukye ya Nyakubaho, omu musiri gwa Yoshwa owa Betishemeshi, nirikihamya n'okuhitsya eri izooba." 
1Samuel6:19 Nyakubaho akaita abantu makumi mushanju omu Baabetishemeshi, ahabw'okuba bakaringuriza omu shanduukye ye. Abantu baacura munonga ahabwa Nyakubaho kubaitamu abantu baingi." 
1Samuel6:20 Abaabetishemeshi baagira bati: N'oha orikubaasa kwemerera omu maisho ga Nyakubaho Ruhanga ogu orikwera? Kandi ku araaturugyeho, naaza ow'oha?" 
1Samuel6:21 Batyo baatuma entumwa aha batuuzi ba Kiriyatiyearimu nibabagira bati: Abafilisiti bagarwire eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho; nimwije mugitware owaanyu. 
1Samuel7:1 Abaakiriyatiyearimu baija baihayo eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho, baagita omu nju ya Abinadabu eyaabaire eri aha kabungo, kandi baahaasirira Eleazaari mutabani we kuguma naareeberera eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho." 
1Samuel7:2 Eshanduukye y'endagaano ku yaaherize kutwarwa Kiriyatiyearimu, haahinguraho omwanya muraingwa gw'emyaka makumi abiri, kandi ab'enju ya Isiraeli boona baahoogyera Nyakubaho." 
1Samuel7:3 Samueli yaagambira ab'enju ya Isiraeli boona ati: Ku muraabe mumaririire kugarukira Nyakubaho n'omutima gwanyu gwona, mweiheho baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga na Ashitarooti, omutima gwanyu mugumarire ahari Nyakubaho, mube niwe mwaramya wenka: nibwo araabajune Abafilisiti." 
1Samuel7:4 Abaisiraeli batyo baayeihamu Baabaali na Ashitarooti, baaguma nibaramya Nyakubaho wenka." 
1Samuel7:5 Bwanyima Samueli yaabagira ati: Muteeranire Abaisiraeli boona Mizipa, haza mbashabire." 
1Samuel7:6 Nabo baateeranira Mizipa, baataha amaizi, baagashuka omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, kandi eryo izooba baayesiibyakwo; baayeteisizayo bati: Tucumwire ahari Nyakubaho. Mpaho Samueli atandikira Mizipa kuba omwebembezi w'Abaisiraeli." 
1Samuel7:7 Abafilisiti ku baahuriire ngu Abaisiraeli bateeraniire Mizipa, bakama baabo baahurura kubarwanisa. Abaisiraeli ku baakihuriire, baabatiina." 
1Samuel7:8 Baagira Samueli bati: Otarereera kutweshengyerereza Mukama Ruhanga waitu kutujuna Abafilisiti. 
1Samuel7:9 Samueli nikwo kutwara akataama karikwonka, akakatambira Nyakubaho kuba ekitambo kicwekize; akamuhoogyera ahabw'Ababaisiraeli, na Nyakubaho akahurira okushaba kwe." 
1Samuel7:10 Mbwenu Samueli ku yaabaire naatamba ekitambo kicwekize, Abafilisiti bairira haihi kuteera Abaisiraeli. Kwonka Nyakubaho eryo izooba yaahindiza Abafilisiti n'eiraka ry'amaani, yaabarabanisamu, baahunga Abaisiraeli." 
1Samuel7:11 Abaisiraeli baahuruutuka Mizipa, baabinga Abafilisiti, baagyenda nibabaita, baabahitsya Betikaari." 
1Samuel7:12 Bwanyima Samueli yaakwata eibaare, yaaribyara ahagati ya Mizipa na Yeshana, yaaryeta Ebenezeri; amakuru ngu, Nyakubaho naakituhwera n'okuhitsya hati." 
1Samuel7:13 Abafilisiti baacuubwa batyo eishaija, tibaagaruka kutaahirira Abaisiraeli omu nsi yaabo. Nyakubaho yaaguma ahingamiize Abaifilisiti omukono gwe ebiro byona ebi Samueli yaamazire ari omwebembezi." 
1Samuel7:14 Endembo ezi Abafilisiti baabaire banyagira Abaisiraeli, Abaisiraeli baazigarukana, okwiha Ekurooni okuhitsya Gaati. Abaisiraeli baiha ensi yaabo omu mikono y'Abafilisiti. Kandi Abaisiraeli n'Abaamori baatuurana baine obusingye." 
1Samuel7:15 Samueli akaguma ari omuramuzi w'Abaisiraeli ebiro by'amagara ge byona. 
1Samuel7:16 Buri mwaka akaba aza Beteli na Giligaali na Mizipa, acwera Abaisiraeli emanja omuri egyo myanya yoona." 
1Samuel7:17 Bwanyima agaruka Raama, ahabw'okuba eka ye niyo yaabaire eri; kandi niyo yaabaire acwera Abaisiraeli emanja. Okwo hoona akombekyerayo Nyakubaho eitambiro." 
1Samuel8:1 Samueli ku yaakuzire, yaataho abatabani kuba abaramuzi b'Abaisiraeli." 
1Samuel8:2 Omutabani ow'omujigaijo akaba naayetwa Yoeli, n'ow'omushubiro naayetwa Abiiya, bari abaramuzi omuri Beerisheba." 
1Samuel8:3 Kwonka abo batabani tibaratwarize nka ishebo, ahabw'okuba bakataishuka, baareka emitwarize ye, baitwa omururu gw'okutunga, baaguma nibarya enguzi, nibaita emanja z'abantu." 
1Samuel8:4 Ekyo kyareetera abakuru b'Abaisiraeli kweteerana, bakaija Raama ahari Samueli;" 
1Samuel8:5 bakamugira bati: Reeba, okuzire, kandi batabani baawe tibarikutwaza nkaiwe. Mbwenu otuhe omugabe w'okututegyeka, tube nk'agandi mahanga." 
1Samuel8:6 Haza eky'okugira Samueli ngu otuhe omugabe w'okututegyeka kikamugwisa kubi; yaakyebuuza ahari Nyakubaho. 
1Samuel8:7 Nyakubaho yaamugira ati: Yorobera eki abo bantu barikukugambira. Manya tiiwe bangire, kureka niinye bangire kuba omugabe waabo." 
1Samuel8:8 Ebi barikukukorera ni nk'ebi batuura nibankorera okwiha obu naabareeta nimbaiha Misiri n'okuhitsya eri izooba, nibaanyimuura, nibeehongyera baaruhanga abandi." 
1Samuel8:9 Mbwenu nu, hurira eki barikugamba; kwonka obeehanangiririze kimwe, noobashoboororera oku oriba omugabe waabo aribatwaza." 
1Samuel8:10 Samueli atyo agambira abo bantu barikumushaba omugabe byona ebi Nyakubaho yaagamba. 
1Samuel8:11 Abagira ati: Egi niyo eriba emitwarize y'omugabe oribategyeka: Aryatwara batabani baanyu, abahindure abaserukare b'okurwanira aha bigaari bye n'abandi ab'okurwanira aha mbaraasi ze n'abandi babe ab'okugyendesa ebigyere beebembeire ebigari bye." 
1Samuel8:12 Reero abandi abateho kuba bakuru b'engabo ze rukumi, rukumi n'ataano ataano; abandi babe ab'okuhinga emisiri n'okugimugyeshera kandi abandi babe ab'okumuheeshera eby'okurwanisa n'eby'okukoresibwa ab'ebigaari bye." 
1Samuel8:13 Haza atware bahara baanyu babe ab'okukora eby'emigaju, abateeki b'eby'okurya n'ab'emigaati."
