1Samuel8:14 Aryabanyaga emisiri yaanyu emirungi ey'emizaabibu n'ey'emioliva, agigabire abagaragwa be." 
1Samuel8:15 Aryatwara kimwe kya ikumi ky'ebyokurya byanyu by'enjuma n'eby'emizaabibu, abigabire abakungu be n'abaheereza be." 
1Samuel8:16 Aryabaaka abahuuku baanyu n'abazaana baanyu n'ente zaanyu enungi n'endogoya zaanyu, abikorese emirimo ye." 
1Samuel8:17 Aryabanyaga kimwe kya ikumi ky'amatungo gaanyu g'embuzi n'ag'entaama, kandi naimwe mube abahuuku be." 
1Samuel8:18 Omuri obwo bunaku muryarira, mwefuuze eki mwatooraniire ogwo mugabe; haza obwo Nyakubaho aryabeetsiza." 
1Samuel8:19 Kwonka abantu baayanga kuhurira ebi Samueli yaabagambira, baagira bati: Ngaaha! Nitwenda omugabe w'okututegyeka;" 
1Samuel8:20 naitwe tube nk'agandi mahanga, omugabe waitu atutegyekye, abe omwebembezi waitu, kandi aturwanire engamba." 
1Samuel8:21 Samueli ku yaaherize kuhurira byona ebi abantu baagamba, yaagyenda yaabituurira Nyakubaho." 
1Samuel8:22 Na Nyakubaho yaamugarukamu ati: Ikiriza ebi baagamba, obahe omugabe. Samueli nikwo kuragiira Abaisiraeli ati: Nimwirooko! Buri muntu agarukyeyo owaabo." 
1Samuel9:1 Hakaba hariho omushaija Omubenyamiini orikwetwa Kiishi, mwene Abieli, mwijukuru wa Zeeroori, Zeroori ya Bekorati, Bekorati ya Afiiya Omubenyamiini, omushaija w'amaani kandi omutungi rugambwa." 
1Samuel9:2 Akaba aine omutabani orikwetwa Saulo, omutsigazi murungi omu kyemerero. Omu Baisiraeli boona hakaba hatarimu orikumuhita; kandi akaba naakira abantu boona aha mutwe, nibamugarukira aha ibega." 
1Samuel9:3 Mbwenu obundi endogoya za Kiishi, ishe Saulo, zikabura. Kiishi yaagira Saulo omutabani ati: Gyenda n'omwe aha bairu baitu, muze kusherura endogoya." 
1Samuel9:4 Atyo agyenda, araba omu nsi ya Efuraimu ey'ebibungo, n'omu nsi ya Shalisha, kwonka tibaazibona. Baraba omu nsi ya Shaiimu, nayo ziburayo. Bwanyima baraba omu nsi ya Benyamiini, nayo tibazishangayo." 
1Samuel9:5 Ku baahikire omu nsi ya Zuufi, Saulo yaagira omwiru we ou yaabaire aine ati: Ija tugarukyeyo, tata atakaiha omutima aha ndogoya, akagwemereza ahabwaitu." 
1Samuel9:6 Kwonka onu amugira ati: Reeba, omuri oru rurembo harimu omuntu wa Ruhanga kandi n'ow'ekitiinwa. Byona ebi agamba bibakwo. Ka tuzeyo, shana akaatumanyisa eby'orugyendo ru turimu." 
1Samuel9:7 Saulo abuuza omwiru we ati: Mbwenu ku turaazeyo, ogwo muntu nitumutwarira ki? Manya omu ndyanga zaitu ebyokurya bihwairemu, kandi titwine ky'okukimbira ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga. Mbwenu twine ki?" 
1Samuel9:8 Ogwo mwiru agarukamu Saulo ati: Reeba, aha nyineho kimwe kya kana ky'empiiha y'efeeza, nikyo ndaahe omuntu wa Ruhanga, akatuhabura omuhanda." 
1Samuel9:9 Ira, omuntu ku yaabaire aza kwehanuuza ahari Ruhanga, akaba agira ati: Ija tuze ow'omuhanuuzi. Manya hati orikwetwa omurangi, obunyakare akaba ayetwa omuhanuuzi." 
1Samuel9:10 Na Saulo agira omwiru we ati: Waagamba gye. Irooko tuzeyo. Batyo baza omu rurembo, ei omuntu wa Ruhanga yaabaire ari." 
1Samuel9:11 Ku baabaire nibainamuka ekibungo, nibaza omu rurembo, baabugana abaishiki barikuza kutaha amaizi; baababuuza bati: Omuhanuuzi ariyo?" 
1Samuel9:12 Nabo babagarukamu bati: Ariyo; reeba, ngugwo abari omu maisho. Nimwehuute; hati nibwo arikwija omu rurembo, ahabw'okuba eri izooba nibwo barikutambira ekitambo aha itambiro ry'aha kabungo." 
1Samuel9:13 Ku muraataahe muti omu rurembo, nimwija kumushanga atakagiire ha itambiro ry'aha kabungo kurya; manya abantu tibarikubaasa kurya atakaizire, ahabw'okuba niwe ashabira ekitambo omugisha; reero abeetsirwe bakabona kurya. Mbwenu nimugumizemu, nimwija kumushangayo ahonaaho." 
1Samuel9:14 Nabo bainamuka nibaza omu rurembo. Ku baabaire nibarutaahamu, baareeba Samueli naabaizira, naaza aha itambiro ry'aha kabungo." 
1Samuel9:15 Mbwenu aha izooba ryabandize, Saulo atakaizire, Nyakubaho akaba yaamanyiise Samueli ati:" 
1Samuel9:16 Nyencakare nk'aga magingo, niinyija kukwoherereza omushaija orikuruga omu nsi ya Benyamiini, omusiigye amajuta, abe omutegyeki w'abantu bangye Abaisiraeli. Niwe araihe abantu bangye omu mikono y'Abafilisiti. Manya ndeebire oku abantu bangye barikubonabonesibwa, okutaka kwabo kwampikaho." 
1Samuel9:17 Reero Samueli ku yaareebire Saulo, Nyakubaho yaamugira ati: Ogu niwe muntu ou nkugambiire, oraategyekye abantu bangye." 
1Samuel9:18 Mpaho Saulo ashanga Samueli aha irembo, amugira ati: Ngambira ahu enju y'omuhanuuzi eri." 
1Samuel9:19 Samueli amugarukamu ati: Manya niinye muhanuuzi. Mbwenu nyebembera, tuze aha itambiro ry'aha kabungo, ahabw'okuba eri izooba nimwija kurya naanye, reero omu kasheeshe nkwohereze naaheza kukugambira kyona ekikusaasize." 
1Samuel9:20 Hati endogoya zaawe ezibaire zimazire ebiro bishatu zibuzire, otazeemerereza omutima, ahabw'okuba zibonekire. Mbwenu ebirungi by'omuri Isiraeli byona nibabyendeza oha? Tiiwe n'ab'eka ya sho?" 
1Samuel9:21 Saulo amugarukamu ati: Mbwenu shi nyowe tindi Omubenyamiini, ow'oruganda rukye munonga omu za Isiraeli? Kandi omu miryango y'ab'oruganda rwa Benyamiini, ogwaitu tigwo gutari mukuru? Mbwenu wangambirira ki otyo?" 
1Samuel9:22 Bwanyima Samueli atwara Saulo n'omwiru we, abataasya omu kishengye, abashutamya omu mwanya gw'ekitiinwa omu abaabaire beetsirwe abarikuhika nka makumi ashatu bashutami." 
1Samuel9:23 Mpaho Samueli agambira omuteeki ati: Reeta enyama ei nkugambiire kubiika. 
1Samuel9:24 Omuteeki atyo areeta ekivune ky'okuguru n'enyama zaakyo zaaruguru, abita omu maisho ga Saulo. Samueli agira Saulo ati: Reeba, eki tubaire tukubisiire nkiki. Kirye, ahabw'okuba niiwe tubaire tukibiikiire ngu okirye hati n'abagyenyi. Saulo eryo izooba arya hamwe na Samueli." 
1Samuel9:25 Ku baashuumire nibaruga aha itambiro ry'aha kabungo, baataaha omu rurembo, baayarira Saulo ekitanda aha mutwe gw'enju, yaabyama, yaagwejegyera." 
1Samuel9:26 Omushekye ku gwajugutsire, Samueli yaayeta Saulo aha mutwe gw'enju ati: Imuka nkuragye, ogyende; Saulo atyo aimuka. We na Samueli baguragaramu omuhanda." 
1Samuel9:27 Ku baabaire nibashuuma baahika ahu orurembo rurikugarukira, Samueli yaagira Saulo ati: Ragiira omwiru waawe arabeho, atwebembere. Haza ku araarabeho, iwe oyemerereho kakye, nkugambire ekigambo kya Ruhanga." 
1Samuel10:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Samueli yaakwata eihembe, ry'amajuta g'omuoliva, yaagashuka Saulo omu mutwe, yaamunywegyera, yaamugira ati: Mbwenu Nyakubaho tiyaakusiiga amajuta kuba omutegyeki w'abantu be Abaisiraeli? Hati noija kutegyeka abantu be obajune abazigu baabo ababeehinguririize. Kandi aka niko kamanyiso akaraakuhamize ku Nyakubaho yaakutoorana kuba omutegyeki w'abantu be ahabwe." 
1Samuel10:2 Eri izooba ku orandugyeho, noija kubugana abashaija babiri ahari Zeliza, haihi n'ekituuro kya Rakeeli omu nsi ya Benyamiini. Haza bakugire bati: Endogoya zi obaire noosherura zibonekire. Hati sho takizeemerereza mutima, kureka niiwe agwemerereize naagira ati: Ngire nta ahabw'omwana wangye?" 
1Samuel10:3 Kandi ku oraarugye aho waagumizamu waahika Tabora aha muvule, noija kubugana abashaija bashatu abarikuza Beteli kuramya Ruhanga; omwe aheekire abaana bashatu b'embuzi, ondi atangatsi emigaati eshatu n'ondiijo ahagatiire endyanga ya viino." 
1Samuel10:4 Nibaija kukutangirira, bakuhe emigaati ebiri, naiwe ogyakiire." 
1Samuel10:5 Ku oraarugye aho, ogyende, ohikye Gibea aha kibungo kya Ruhanga ahu ekigo ky'Abafilisiti kiri. Reero ku oraabe ori haihi kuhika omu rurembo, noija kubuganwa omutwe gw'abarangi abarikushuuma nibaruga aha itambiro ry'aha kabungo, beebembeirwe abarikuteera ebidongo, n'engoma empuuro n'emikuri n'amagobore, nibaranga." 
1Samuel10:6 Haza Mutima wa Ruhanga akwijeho n'amaani, naiwe orangye hamwe nabo, ohindukye, obe ondiijo muntu." 
1Samuel10:7 Ku oraareebe obwo bumanyiso bwabakwo, okore kyona eki orikubaasa; ahabw'okuba Ruhanga naaba ari hamwe naiwe." 
1Samuel10:8 Mpaho ogyende onyebembeire, oze Giligaali. Naanye nkushangyeyo kutamba ebitambo by'okucwetsya, n'ebindi ebi abantu baraatambe beekundiire. Omare ebiro mushanju otegyereize, okuhitsya obu ndaakuhikye, nkakuhabura eki oraakore." 
1Samuel10:9 Saulo ku yaateire ati Samueli amabega naamurugaho, Ruhanga yaamuhindura omutima, obumanyiso obwo bwona bwabakwo eryo izooba." 
1Samuel10:10 Ku baahikire Gibea, ahonaaho omutwe gw'abarangi gwamubugana, na Mutima wa Ruhanga yaamwijaho n'amaani, yaaragura nabo." 
1Samuel10:11 Boona abaabaire nibamumanya, ku baamureebire naaragura n'abarangi, baabuuzana bati. Beitu mwene Kiishi abaire ata? Saulo nawe abaire omurangi?" 
1Samuel10:12 Omushaija owaabaire atwire aho yaabagarukamu naabuuza ati: Mbwenu abo ni beene oha? Okwiha obwo baakicwa enfumu bati: Saulo nawe abaire omurangi? 
1Samuel10:13 Saulo ku yaaherize kuragura, yaaza aha itambiro ry'aha kabungo." 
1Samuel10:14 Reero ishento yaamubuuza hamwe n'omwiru we ati. Mubaire mugiire hi? Saulo yaamugarukamu ati: Tubaire tugiire kusherura endogoya, ku tureebire zitaaboneka twaza owa Samueli." 
1Samuel10:15 Ishento amugira ati: Nyaabura iwe, ngambira ebi Samueli akugambiire." 
1Samuel10:16 Saulo nawe agira ishento ati: Atugambiriire kimwe ku endogoya zibonekire. Kwonka tagira ki yaamugambira aha bikwatiraine n'obugabe, ebi Samueli agambire." 
1Samuel10:17 Ago magingo Samueli ayeta abantu kuteeranira Mizipa omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. 
1Samuel10:18 Agambira Abaisiraeli ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, nkabaiha Misiri, naabatambira okutegyekwa Abanyamisiri n'amahanga goona agaabaire nigabaita kubi." 
1Samuel10:19 Kwonka eri izooba mwayanga Ruhanga waanyu obajuna akagwe koona akabatambira enaku. Mwagira muti: Ngaaha, kureka otehe omugabe w'okututegyeka! Mbwenu nu, nimuze omu maisho ga Nyakubaho muri omu nganda zaanyu n'omu miryango yaanyu." 
1Samuel10:20 Samueli atyo airiza haihi enganda zoona, enteenyu ekwata orwa Benyamiini." 
1Samuel10:21 Kandi airiza haihi ab'oruganda rwa Benyamiini, nk'oku emiryango yaabo eri, enteenyu ekwata ogwa beene Matiri. Bwanyima airiza haihi ab'omuryango gwa beene Matiri, omuntu omwe-omwe, enteenyu ekwata Saulo mutabani wa Kiishi, kwonka ku bamusherura, abura." 
1Samuel10:22 Batyo bagaruka babuuza Mukama bati: Ebyo ogwo muntu yaija aha? Nyakubaho abagira ati: Reeba, ayesherekire omu bintu." 
1Samuel10:23 Nabo bairuka, bamwihayo. Ku abeemereramu, boona abakira aha mutwe, bamugarukira aha ibega." 
1Samuel10:24 Na Samueli agambira abantu boona ati: Nimureebe ou Nyakubaho atooraine. Tihariho ori nkawe omu bantu boona. Mpaho abantu bateera akaari bati: Karamaare Nyakusinga! 
1Samuel10:25 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Samueli yaashoboororera abantu eby'emitwarize y'omugabe n'emirimo ye, yaabihandiika omu kitabo, yaakita omu mwanya ogurikwera. Bwanyima Samueli yaaragiira abantu boona kugyenda, buri omwe kutaaha owe." 
1Samuel10:26 Na Saulo yaaza owe Gibea aine abashaija amamanzi abu Ruhanga yaateire omuhimbo. 
1Samuel10:27 Kwonka haabaho abashaija ebifiire, baagira bati: Oru rushaija nirubaasa ruta kutujuna? Baamugaya, baayanga kumutoijera. Haza we yaayehunamira." 
1Samuel11:1 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, Nahashi Omuamoni yaahurura, yaagota Yabeshi-Gileadi. Abaayabeshi boona baagira Nahashi bati: Kora naitwe endagaano y'obusingye, tugume tukuheereze." 
1Samuel11:2 Kwonka Nahashi Omuamoni yaabagarukamu ati: Niinyija kukora naimwe endagaano, mwaba mwikiriize kumbanonkoramu amaisho ga buryo, mbone kureetera Isiraeli yoona ekihemu." 
1Samuel11:3 Abakuru b'omu Baayabeshi baamugira bati: Tuhe ebiro mushanju, tubanze tutume entumwa omuri Isiraeli yoona, reero ku turaabure kijuna, tukwehongyere." 
1Samuel11:4 Entumwa ku zaahikire Gibea, owa Saulo, zaabitekyerereza abantu boona, baacura." 
1Samuel11:5 Omuri ako kaanya, Saulo yaija naaruga omu musiri afunyire ente, yaabuuza ati: Abo bantu barikurira baazira ki? Abantu baamuteekyerereza eby'Abayabeshi." 
1Samuel11:6 Saulo ku ahurira ebyo bigambo, Mutima wa Ruhanga amwijaho n'amaani, ekiniga kyenda kumubarura." 
1Samuel11:7 Aihayo ezo nte ibiri azininguramu ebicweka, abiha entumwa kubitwara omuri Isiraeli yoona, naabatumaho ati: Oraabe atahurwire na Saulo na Samueli, ente ze nikwo ziraatemagurwe zityo. Nyakubaho aitsa abo bantu obwoba, bahurura n'omutima gumwe." 
1Samuel11:8 Saulo ku yaabateeraniire Bezeki abashaija aba Isiraeli baahika obusiriira bushatu, n'aba Yuda baahika obukumi bushatu." 
1Samuel11:9 Haza baagambira entumwa ezaabatumirweho bati: Mugambire aba Yabeshi-Gileadi, muti: Nyencakare omu bunaku bw'akaita batabaazi, nitubaha emikono. Entumwa ku zaizire zaabigambira Abaayabeshi, baashemererwa." 
1Samuel11:10 Baagira Nahashi bati: Nyencakare nitwija kukwehongyera, otugire nk'oku orikwenda." 
1Samuel11:11 Omu kasheeshe kaakuratsireho, Saulo yaabaganisa abantu omu mitwe eshatu, baayeshuka omu rusiisira rw'Abaamoni omushekye nigujuguta; baita Abaamoni okuhitsya omu ihangwe, abaahonokireho baataataana, tihaagira na babiri abaaguma hamwe." 
1Samuel11:12 Bwanyima abantu baagira Samueli bati: Nibaahi abagizire bati: Saulo nawe atutegyekye? Nimubareete, tubaite!" 
1Samuel11:13 Kwonka Saulo abagira ati: Eri izooba hatagira owaitwa; ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho yaarokora Abaisiraeli. 
1Samuel11:14 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Samueli yaagambira abantu ati: Nimwije tuze Giligaali, tuhamizeyo obugabe." 
1Samuel11:15 Mpaho abantu boona baaza Giligaali, baayongyera kurangirirayo omu maisho ga Nyakubaho ku Saulo ari omugabe. Baatambirirayo Nyakubaho ebitambo by'okwekundira; Saulo n'Abaisiraeli boona baashemerererwayo munonga." 
1Samuel12:1 Samueli akagambira Abaisiraeli ati: Reeba, byona ebi mungambiire, mbiikiriize, naabateeraho omugabe w'okubategyeka." 
1Samuel12:2 Hati omugabe niwe arikubeebembera, nyowe nkuzire, naamezire enju; n'ekindi, reeba, batabani bangye bari hamwe naimwe. Mbeebembeire okwiha omu butsigazi bwangye, okuhitsya eri izooba." 
1Samuel12:3 Mbwenu reeba, ndi aha: Nimunyomesereze omu maisho ga Nyakubaho n'ag'ogu ou yaasiigire amajuta. Ndanyagire ente y'oha, nari endogoya y'oha? Nainga ndaryangataniise oha? N'oha ou ndahatsire nari ou ndariireho enguzi kuunyita amaisho? Nimuunyomesereze, haza mbibarihe." 
1Samuel12:4 Baamugarukamu bati: Tokaturyangatanisaga, nobu kwakuba okutuhata nari okunyaga ekintu ky'omuntu." 
1Samuel12:5 Nawe abagira ati: Nyakubaho niwe mujurizi w'okubashinja, n'omusiigwa we nawe n'omujurizi eri izooba, kuhamya ku mutaine ki mwashanga nyagire. Nabo baamugira bati: Eego, niwe kareebi." 
1Samuel12:6 Mpaho Samueli agambira abo bantu ati: Nyakubaho owaataireho Musa na Arooni, akaiha baashwenkuriimwe omuri Misiri, niwe kareebi." 
1Samuel12:7 Mbwenu nu, nimwemerere, nteekurane naimwe omu maisho ga Nyakubaho eby'amaani ebi Mukama yaakozire kubajuna na baashwenkuriimwe." 
1Samuel12:8 Yakobo n'ab'eka ye ku baagiire Misiri, Abanyamisiri baabahata, baashwenkuriimwe baatakira Nyakubaho. Nawe yaatuma Musa na Arooni baabaiha omuri Misiri, baabata omuri egi nsi kugituuramu." 
1Samuel12:9 Kwonka bakeebwa Nyakubaho Ruhanga waabo; nawe yaabarekurira Sisera omukuru w'eihe rya Yabini omugabe wa Hazori, n'Abafilisiti, n'omugabe wa Moabu, baabarwanisa." 
1Samuel12:10 Reero baatakira Nyakubaho nibagira bati: Ai Nyakubaho, tucumwire, twakwimuura, twaramya Baabaali na Ashitarooti. Mbwenu nitukweshengyereza, otujune abazigu baitu, tubone kukuramya." 
1Samuel12:11 Mpaho Nyakubaho yaayohereza Yerubaali na Baraki na Yefuta na Samueli, baabajuna abazigu baanyu ababehinguririize, mwatuura buhooro." 
1Samuel12:12 Mbwenu ku mwareebire Nahashi omugabe w'Abaamoni yaija kubarwanisa, mwangira muti: Ngaaha! Nitwenda omugabe abe niwe yaatutegyeka; haza kunu Mukama Ruhanga waanyu ari omugabe waanyu." 
1Samuel12:13 Mbwenu reeba, omugabe ou mwashabire mukamutoorana, Nyakubaho amubahaire kubategyeka." 
1Samuel12:14 Ku muraagume nimutiina Nyakubaho, mwamuheereza, mwatega okutu ebi arikubagambira, mutaagomera biragiro bye, kandi imwe n'omugabe orikubategyeka mwakuratira Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, biryaba gye." 
1Samuel12:15 Kwonka ku muryanga kutega okutu ebi Mukama arikubagambira, mwagomera ebiragiro bye, omukono gwe guryabarwanisa, nk'oku gwarwaniise baashwenkuriimwe." 
1Samuel12:16 Mbwenu nimwemerere, mwereebere eki Nyakubaho yaaza kukora." 
1Samuel12:17 Hati t'obunaku bw'eigyesha ry'engano? Mbwenu nyowe naaza kushaba Nyakubaho, ahindise enkuba, agwise enjura; mubone kumanya kandi mureebe ku ekicumuro ki mwamucumwirebo nimweshabira omugabe kiri kihango." 
1Samuel12:18 Samueli atyo ashaba Nyakubaho, n'onu ayohereza enkuba n'enjura eryo izooba, abantu boona batiina munonga Nyakubaho na Samueli." 
1Samuel12:19 Reero boona bagira Samueli bati: Itwe abairu baawe nitukweshengyereza, otushabire ahari Mukama Ruhanga waawe, turekye kufa; ahabw'okuba ebibi byaitu tubyongyeireho n'eki eky'okweshabira omugabe." 
1Samuel12:20 Na Samueli agambira abo bantu ati: Mutatiina. Nobu muraabe mwakozire ebibi ebyo byona, kwonka mutarereera kukuratira Nyakubaho, kureka mugume nimumuheereza n'omutima gwanyu gwona." 
1Samuel12:21 Kandi mutateishuka, mukakuratira ebitaine muhoho, ebitarikubaasa kubagasira, nobu kwakuba okubajuna, ahabw'okuba tibiine mujamo." 
1Samuel12:22 Manya Nyakubaho, ahabw'eiziina rye erikuru, tarikwija kutsigaho eihanga rye, ahabw'okuba akasiima kubahindura eihanga rye ahabwe." 
1Samuel12:23 Kandi naanye nikikabure! nyowe okucumura ahari Nyakubaho nkareka kubashabira, kureka niinyija kuguma nimbahabura omuhanda murungi kandi oguhikire." 
1Samuel12:24 Kimwe kyonka, mutiine Nyakubaho, mumuheereze n'obwesigwa, n'omutima gwanyu gwona, nimwijuka ebintu bikuru ebi yaabakoreire." 
1Samuel12:25 Kwonka ku muraagumizemu nimukora ebibi, imwe n'omugabe waanyu muryacwekyerera." 
1Samuel13:1 Saulo atyo aza aha ngoma, ategyeka Isiraeli. Abahandiiki tibarikushushana aha myaka y'obukuru ei Saulo yaagiiriireho aha ngoma, n'ei yaamazire naategyeka Isiraeli." 
1Samuel13:2 Ku yaabaire amazire omwaka gumwe aha ngoma, yaatoorana omu Baisiraeli abashaija enkumi ishatu. Enkumi ibiri zaaguma nawe Mikimaashi n'omu bibungo bya Beteli, kandi orukumi rwaguma na Yonataani omuri Gibea eya Benyamiini. Abandi boona yaaboohereza, buri omwe kutaaha owe." 
1Samuel13:3 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, Yonataani yaita omukuru w'eihe ry'Abafilisiti omuri Gibea; enkuru yaabahika, ku Abaheburaayo bagomire. Saulo nikwo kuragiira abantu, bakateera enzamba kuhuruza Abaheburaayo omu ihanga ryona." 
1Samuel13:4 Abaisiraeli boona baahurira ku Saulo aitsire ab'omu kigo ky'Abafilisiti, kandi ekyo ku kyanganiise Abaisiraeli n'Abafilisiti. Batyo baahuruza abantu kushanga Saulo Giligaali." 
1Samuel13:5 Abafilisiti nabo baahurura kurwanisa Abaisiraeli, baine ebigaari obukumi bushatu, ab'ahambaraasi enkumi mukaaga, n'ezindi ngabo nyingi ezirikwingana n'omusheenyi gw'aha nyanja. Baija baasiisira Mikimaashi ahari burugwa-izooba bwa Betaveni." 
1Samuel13:6 Abaisiraeli ku baareebire baagwa omu kabi, abazigu babafundiriize, baayeshereka omu nyanga n'omu biina n'omu nkiri n'omu bituuro n'omu biziba." 
1Samuel13:7 Abandi baayambuka Yorudaani, baaza omu nsi ya Gaadi n'eya Gileadi. Saulo we yaaguma Giligaali, engabo zi yaabaire aine zaaguma ziitsirwe obwoba." 
1Samuel13:8 Saulo akamara ebiro mushanju ategyereize Samueli, nk'oku yaamuragiire, kwonka Samueli tiyaija Giligaali, kandi abantu baatandika kutaataana nibamurugaho." 
1Samuel13:9 Saulo nikwo kugira ati: Nimundeetere aha ekitambo ky'okucwetsya n'ebitambo by'okwekundira. Atyo atamba ekitambo kicwekize. 
1Samuel13:10 Ku aba yaaheza ati kukitamba, Samueli aija, na Saulo ashohora kumubugana, kumuramutsya." 
1Samuel13:11 Samueli amubuuza ati: Ekyo waakora ki? Saulo amugira ati: Ku naareeba abantu nibataataana nibaza kumpwaho, naiwe otaizira omu biro bi ongambiire, kandi Abafilisiti bateeraniire Mikimaashi;" 
1Samuel13:12 naanye nikwo kugira nti: Hati Abafilisiti baaza kwija, banteerere Giligaali ntakeeshengyereize Nyakubaho kungirira embabazi. Nikwo kwehangaana, nkatamba ekitambo kicwekize." 
1Samuel13:13 Samueli agira Saulo ati: Eki waakora n'eky'obushema. Tiwaakuratira kiragiro kya Mukama Ruhanga waawe eki akuragiire. Manya Nyakubaho akaagumizeho obugabe bwawe butegyeka Isiraeli ebiro byona. 
1Samuel13:14 Kwonka mbwenu tiburikwija kugumizamu, ahabw'okuba yaayesheruriire ou omutima gwe gusiimire, kandi niwe atooraine kutegyeka abantu be, ahabw'okuba tokuratiire eki akuragiire." 
1Samuel13:15 Samueli atyo aimuka, aruga Giligaali, aza Gibea eya Benyamiini. Na Saulo abara engabo zi yaabaire atsigaize, zihika abashaija magana mukaaga." 
1Samuel13:16 Saulo n'omutabani Yonataani n'engabo zi baabaire baine, bakaguma Geeba eya Benyamiini, Abafilisiti bo basiisira Mikimaashi." 
1Samuel13:17 Reero abaahurwire baaruga omu rusiisira rw'Abafilisiti bari omu mitwe eshatu. Omutwe gumwe gwatoora ogurikugarura Ofura omu nsi ya Shali. 
1Samuel13:18 Ogundi gwaha ogurikuza Betihorooni; kandi ogundi gwatoora ogw'aha mwatano gurikurengyera omu ruhanga rwa Zeboimu, ogurikugarura omu ihamba." 
1Samuel13:19 Omu biro ebyo omuri Isiraeli yoona hakaba hatarimu muheesi, ahabw'okuba Abafilisiti bakaba bazibiire Abaheburaayo kweheeshera zaarurara n'amacumu." 
1Samuel13:20 Kureka buri Muisiraeli akaba ashuuma omu Bafilisiti, atyarizayo efuka ye, eshuuruuru ye, empango ye, n'omuhoro gwe." 
1Samuel13:21 Obwo nibabacwera sente nkaaga na itaano kutyaza efuka, n'eshuuruuru; na sente ashatu na itaano kutyaza empango n'okugorora ebihosho." 
1Samuel13:22 N'ahabw'ekyo aha izooba ry'orugamba, omu bantu abu Saulo na Yonataani baabaire baine, hakaba hatarimu mushaija n'omwe oine rurara nari eicumu, kureka bikaba biinwe Saulo na Yonataani omutabani." 
1Samuel13:23 Reero ab'omu kigo ky'Abafilisiti baayohereza engabo z'okurinda akamizyo ka Mikimaashi. 
1Samuel14:1 Eizooba rimwe, Yonataani mwene Saulo akagambira omutsigazi owaabaire akwata eby'okurwanisa bye ati: Ija twambukye seeri omu kigo ky'Abafilisiti. Kwonka tiyaakigambira ishe." 
1Samuel14:2 Obwo Saulo akaba asiisiire omu bicweka bya Gibea ebirikuhereerukayo, ahansi y'omukoma-mahanga gwa Migurooni, aine abashaija barikuhika nka magana mukaaga." 
1Samuel14:3 Kandi akaba aine Ahiya mwene Ahitubu mukuru wa Ikabodi mwene Finehaasi mwijukuru wa Eeli omuhongyerezi wa Nyakubaho omuri Shiilo, ajwaire eky'aha kifuba ekyeetwa efodi. Kandi abantu tibaramanyire ku Yonataani yaagyenda." 
1Samuel14:4 Omu kamizyo aku Yonataani yaabaire naayenda kucwekanisizamu kuhika omu kigo ky'Abafilisiti, hakaba hariyo ebibaare bibiri, kimwe aha rubaju rumwe n'ekindi aha rundi; ekimwe nikyeetwa Bozezi, ekindi nikyeetwa Senehi." 
1Samuel14:5 Ekibaare ekimwe kikaba kirumbeire aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo ahashungaine na Geeba. 
1Samuel14:6 Reero Yonataani yaagambira omutsigazi okwata eby'okurwanisa bye ati: Ija twambukye, tuhikye aha kigo ky'abo batashazirwe, Nyakubaho akaagira eki yaatukorera. Manya tihariho kirikuzibira Mukama kujuna, yaaba aine abantu baingi nari bakye." 
1Samuel14:7 Omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye amugira ati: Kora ekikuri aha mutima, reeba nkwine. Ekikuri aha mutima, naanye nikyo kindi aha mutima." 
1Samuel14:8 Yonataani amugira ati: Ka twambukye ei abo bashaija bari, tubeeyorekye." 
1Samuel14:9 Ku baraatugire bati: Mube muri aho, twije kubashangyeho; Obwo nitwija kuguma twemereire ahi turi, titurikuzayo kubahika." 
1Samuel14:10 Kwonka ku baraatugire bati: Nimwije mutuhikye, obwo tuzeyo, biri Nyakubaho yaabaturekurira. Kandi ekyo nikyo turaamanyirebo." 
1Samuel14:11 Bombi batyo beeyoreka ab'omu kigo ky'Abafilisiti. Abo Bafilisiti bagira bati: Reeba, Abaheburaayo baashohora, baaruga omu biina bi babaire beesherekiremu!" 
1Samuel14:12 Abashaija b'omu kigo beeta Yonataani n'omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye, bati: Nimwije aha mureebe. Yonataani agambira omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye ati: Nkurata. Manya Nyakubaho yaabarekurira Isiraeli." 
1Samuel14:13 Yonataani atyo atemba naayajura, omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye amuri enyima. Abafilisiti bagwa omu maisho ga Yonataani, omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye agyenda naabaita amukuraatiire." 
1Samuel14:14 Omuri okwo kwita kw'okubanza Yonataani n'omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye baitira abashaija nka makumi abiri omu mwanya gurikwingana na kimwe kya kabiri ky'ehiika. 
1Samuel14:15 Reero Abafilisiti b'omu rusiisira n'ab'omu ishwa n'abantu boona baitwa obwoba; ab'omu kigo, nangwa n'abaahurwire, baatetema; ensi etengyeeta; habaho okuhahaara munonga omutima." 
1Samuel14:16 Abarinzi ba Saulo ab'omuri Gibea eya Benyamiini ku baanagireyo amaisho, baareeba emitwe y'abantu neeyegaba ebirari." 
1Samuel14:17 Saulo nikwo kugambira engabo ezi yabaire aine ati: Nimwebare, mureebe abarikuburamu. Ku baaherize kwebara, baashanga Yonataani n'omukwatira eby'okurwanisa batabarimu." 
1Samuel14:18 Saulo agira Ahiya ati: Reeta eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, ahabw'okuba ebiro ebyo eshanduukye ya Ruhanga Abaisiraeli bakaba bagyenzire nayo." 
1Samuel14:19 Saulo ku yaabaire naakigambira omuhongyerezi, Abafilisiti omu rusiisira baayeyongyera kurabanamu. Saulo nikwo kugira omuhongyerezi ati: Ihayo omukono." 
1Samuel14:20 Bwanyima Saulo n'abu yaabaire aine boona baahurura, baaza ahi barikurwanira orugamba, baashanga buri muntu naita mugyenzi we. Haabaho omurabanamu muhango munonga." 
1Samuel14:21 Reero Abaheburaayo abaabaire bakwataniise n'Abafilisiti bwabiso, bakaza nabo omu rusiisira, baabeehindukiririza baaba bamwe n'Abaisiraeli abu Saulo na Yonataani baabaire baine." 
1Samuel14:22 N'Abaisiraeli boona abaabaire beesherekire omu bibungo bya Efuraimu ku baahuriire ngu Abafilisiti nibahunga, baababinga baabahambya, baabarwanisa." 
1Samuel14:23 Eryo izooba Nyakubaho yaajuna atyo Isiraeli; orugamba rwagumizamu, rwahika seeri ya Betaveni." 
1Samuel14:24 Mbwenu Abaisiraeli bakareeba enaku eryo izooba, ahabw'okuba Saulo akarahira naaragiira engabo ze ati: Omuntu oraarye ebyokurya omwabazyo gutakahikire, ntakahoire bazigu bangye, akyeenwe. N'ahabw'ekyo tihaabaho n'omwe owaagira eki yaatamira." 
1Samuel14:25 Mbwenu abantu ku bahikire mu kibira, baashangamu obwoki. Ku baahikire aha ngabo zaabwo, baashanga nibushononoka." 
1Samuel14:26 Kwonka tihaagira waayekoza orukumu omu kanwa, ahabw'okutiina egyo ndahiro." 
1Samuel14:27 Yonataani we, obu ishe yaarahiza abantu, taramuhuriire. N'ahabw'ekyo yaihayo enkoni ei yaabaire akwaitse, yaacumita eifundo ryayo omu ngabo y'obwoki, yaabwihisaho orukumu, yaaruta omu kanwa, akaho kaamuruga aha maisho." 
1Samuel14:28 Omwe omuribo yaamugira ati: Sho yaarahiriza kimwe abantu naabagira ati: Eri izooba oraarye ebyokurya, akyeenwe. Haza obwo abantu bakaba bagwire enshazi." 
1Samuel14:29 Yonataani nikwo kumugarukamu ati: Tata ka yaakabya abantu. Mbwenu nyowe akaho kampwa aha maisho, ahabw'okuroza obu bwoki." 
1Samuel14:30 Kuri noogira ngu abantu eri izooba baikirizibwa kurya aha minyago ei baanyaga abazigu, tibaakubaire gye, Abafilisiti tukabaita munonga okukiraho?" 
1Samuel14:31 Eryo izooba Abaisiraeli bakaita Abafilisiti okwiha Mikimaashi okuhitsya Aiyalooni. Kwonka abantu baagwa enshazi. 
1Samuel14:32 Mbwenu ku baagwire aha minyago, baakwata entaama n'ente n'enyana, baaziitira aho, haza baazirya n'eshagama yaazo." 
1Samuel14:33 Bwanyima haarugaho abaagambira Saulo bati: Reeba, abantu baacumura ahari Nyakubaho, barya enyama hamwe n'eshagama. Nawe aborooga ati: Ebi shi mwaba endeebya! Mbwenu nimunkumbagarize aha eibaare." 
1Samuel14:34 Saulo ayongyera abagira ati: Nimwegabe ebirari, muze omu bantu, mubagire muti: Buri muntu ayereetere ente nari entaama, muziitire aha, muzirye murekye kucumura ahari Nyakubaho mukarya eshagama. Buri omwe omuribo yaayereetera ente ekyo kiro, baaziitirayo." 
1Samuel14:35 Saulo yaayombekyera Nyakubaho eitambiro, ryaba eitambiro rye ery'okubanza eri yaayombekyeire Nyakubaho." 
1Samuel14:36 Bwanyima Saulo akagira abashaija be ati: Nimwije tukurate Abafilisiti eki kiro, tubanyagye okuhitsya obu buraasheeshe, kandi tutagira ou twatsigaho. Baamugarukamu bati: Kora eki oraasiime. Kwonka omuhongyerezi agira ati: Ka twiririre Ruhanga, tumwebuuzeho." 
1Samuel14:37 Saulo abuuza Ruhanga ati: Nshuume nkurate Abafilisiti? Ebyo noija kubarekurira Isiraeli? Kwonka eryo izooba Ruhanga tamugarukamu. 
1Samuel14:38 Saulo nikwo kugira ati: Imwe mwena abeebembezi b'abantu, nimwije aha mureebe ahu eki kibi kyaturuka eri izooba." 
1Samuel14:39 Nindahira Nyakubaho Omujuni wa Isiraeli nti: Nobu kyakuba kikozirwe Yonataani mutabani wangye, afe. Kwonka tihaabaho muntu n'omwe omuribo owaamugarukamu." 
1Samuel14:40 Bwanyima yaagambira Abaisiraeli boona ati: Imwe mugarukye orubaju rumwe, reero nyowe na mutabani wangye Yonataani tuze aha rundi. Abantu baagarukamu Saulo bati: Kora eki orikusiima." 
1Samuel14:41 Saulo atakira Nyakubaho ati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, nyowe omwiru waawe ekyakuzibira kungarukamu eri izooba ni ki? Eki kibi ku ndaabe niinye nkikozire nari kikozirwe mutabani wangye Yonataani, ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli kyorekyese endagu, Urimu. Kandi ku kiraabe kikozirwe abantu baawe Abaisiraeli, otugarukyemu na Tumimu. Mpaho enteenyu ekwata Yonataani na Saulo, abantu bakira." 
1Samuel14:42 Saulo agira ati: Mbwenu nyowe na mutabani wangye Yonataani, ba niitwe wagiteererera. Yonataani eba niwe yaakwata." 
1Samuel14:43 Reero Saulo agira Yonataani ati: Ngambira eki okozire. Yonataani amugambira ati: Ndiire akooki k'aha ifundo ry'enkoni ei mbaire nkwaitse. Mbwenu reeba, ndi aha ka nfe!" 
1Samuel14:44 Saulo amugira ati: Yonataani, buzimazima ori ow'okufa! Ku oraabe otafiire, Ruhanga akinture n'okukiraho." 
1Samuel14:45 Abantu baagira Saulo bati: Hoona Yonataani oreeteire Isiraeli obusinguzi buhango buti, afe? Nikikabure! Niturahira Nyakubaho ohuriire, tihariho kashokye karaamurugye aha mutwe kakaragara aha nsi; ahabw'okuba eki yaakora eri izooba, Ruhanga niwe yaakimukoresa. Abantu baacungura batyo Yonataani, tiyaafa." 
1Samuel14:46 Bwanyima Saulo yainamuka, yaarekyera aho kukurata Abafilisiti, nabo baagaruka owaabo." 
1Samuel14:47 Saulo ku yaaherize kuba omugabe w'Abaisiraeli, yaarwanisa abazigu be aha mbaju zoona. Yaarwanisa Abamoabu n'Abaamoni n'Abaedomu n'abagabe ba Zooba n'Abafilisiti. Ahi yaabaire aza hoona, abagira kubi." 
1Samuel14:48 Kandi akarwana mashaija, yaasingura Abaamaleki, yaiha Abaisiraeli omu buhuuku bw'abaabaire babanyagire." 
1Samuel14:49 Batabani ba Saulo bakaba bari: Yonataani na Ishivi na Malikishua. Kandi aga nigo maziina ga bahara be: ow'omujigaijo akaba naayetwa Merabu, ow'omushubiro naayetwa Mikaali." 
1Samuel14:50 Na muka Saulo akaba naayetwa Ahinoamu, muhara wa Ahimazi. Reero omukuru w'eihe rye, eiziina rye akaba ari Abuneeri, mwene Neeri ishento Saulo." 
1Samuel14:51 Kiishi niwe yaabaire ari ishe wa Saulo; na Neeri ishe wa Abuneeri ari mutabani wa Abieli. 
1Samuel14:52 Saulo omu busingye bwe bwona akarwanisa munonga Abafilisiti. Ku yaabaire areeba omushaija w'amaani nari emanzi, amuta omu ihe rye." 
1Samuel15:1 Samueli akagambira Saulo ati: Nyakubaho akantuma kukusiiga amajuta kuba omugabe w'abantu be Abaisiraeli. Mbwenu hurira eki Nyakubaho arikugamba. 
1Samuel15:2 Mukama w'Amahe naagira ati: Niinyija kufubira Abaamaleki ahabw'eki baakozire Abaisiraeli, obu baabazibira kuraba omu muhanda nibaruga Misiri." 
1Samuel15:3 Mbwenu irooko oite Abaamaleki, ocwekyerereze kimwe byona ebi baine. Otagira eki waasaasira, kureka oite abashaija n'abakazi, abaana bato n'abeereere, ente n'entaama, engamira n'endogoya." 
1Samuel15:4 Saulo atyo ahuruza abantu ababarira Telaimu, bahika abashaija obukumi bubiri abarikugyendesa ebigyere n'Abaayuda baba akakumi kamwe." 
1Samuel15:5 Saulo agyenda n'engabo ze, ahika aha rurembo rw'Abaamaleki, abagwera omu ruhanga." 
1Samuel15:6 Saulo agambira Abakeeni ati: Nimwirooko mugyende, murugye omu Baamaleki, ntakaabacwekyereza hamwe nabo; ahabw'okuba imwe mukagirira Abaisiraeli embabazi nibaruga Misiri. Abakeeni batyo baruga omu Baamaleki." 
1Samuel15:7 Na Saulo abinga Abaamaleki okuruga Havila okuhika Shuuri eri ahari burugwa-izooba bwa Misiri. 
1Samuel15:8 Akwata Agagi omugabe w'Abamaleki ahuriire, acwekyerereza kimwe abantu boona." 
1Samuel15:9 Kwonka Saulo n'abantu basaasira Agagi n'entaama n'ente n'abaana b'entaama ebigomokire kandi ebirungi munonga, tibabicwekyerereza kimwe; kureka byona ebirikugaywa n'ebitaine mugasho baba nibyo baacwekyerereza kimwe." 
1Samuel15:10 Nyakubaho akagambira Samueli ati: 
1Samuel15:11 Niinyefuuza eki naahinduriire Saulo omugabe, ahabw'okuba agarukire enyima, yaareka kunkuratira, tiyaakora bi mmuragiire. Samueli ekyo kikamugwisa kubi, yaaraara naatakira Nyakubaho." 
1Samuel15:12 Omu kasheeshe kaakuratsireho, Samueli aimuka kare kubugana Saulo. Bamugambira bati: Saulo aizire Karumeeli, yaayebyarirayo eibaare ry'ekiijutsyo, yaakuba yaagumizamu, yaashuuma Giligaali." 
1Samuel15:13 Samueli atyo aija, ahika Saulo, n'onu amuramutsya ati: Nyakubaho naakakuhe omugisha! Manya nkozire eki Nyakubaho andagiire." 
1Samuel15:14 Samueli amugarukamu ati: Kandi shi ka nimpurira entaama n'ente ebirikujuga? 
1Samuel15:15 Saulo amugira ati: Manya n'ezi baihire omu Baamaleki, ahabw'okuba abantu barekire kwita entaama n'ente enungi munonga, kuzitambira Mukama Ruhanga waawe. Kwonka ebindi tubicwekyerereize kimwe." 
1Samuel15:16 Samueli agira Saulo ati: Rekyera aho, nkugambire eki Nyakubaho araire angabiire. N'onu amugira ati: Kingambire." 
1Samuel15:17 Samueli amugira ati: Nobu waabaire nooyegaya ngu ori muto, hati tiiwe mukuru w'enganda z'Abaisiraeli? Nyakubaho akakusiiga amajuta kuba omugabe w'Abaisiraeli." 
1Samuel15:18 Hati akutumire naakuragiira ati: Irooko ocwekyerereze kimwe Abaamaleki enyabibi, obarwanise okuhitsya obu oraabamareho." 
1Samuel15:19 Mbwenu ekikuzibiire kukora eki Nyakubaho akuragiire ni ki? Ahabw'enki oshahwire eminyago, okakora ekirikugwisa kubi Nyakubaho?" 
1Samuel15:20 Saulo agarukamu Samueli ati: Nkozire eki Nyakubaho andagiire, naaza ei antumire, naareeta Agagi omugabe w'Abaamaleki, kandi abo Baamaleki naabacwekyerereza kimwe." 
1Samuel15:21 Kwonka aha minyago, abantu baihireho entaama n'ente ebirungi munonga omu bibaire biri eby'okucwekyerezibwa, kubitambira Mukama Ruhanga waawe kunu Giligaali." 
1Samuel15:22 Samueli amugarukamu ati: Noogira ngu Nyakubaho naashemerererwa ebitambo bicwekize n'ebindi bitambo okukira eki aragiire? Manya okuhurira nikukira ekitambo, n'okworoba nikukira ebishaju by'empaya z'entaama." 
1Samuel15:23 Kandi obugomi ni nk'ekibi ky'oburogo. N'obugangaazi ni nk'ekicumuro ky'okuramya ebishushani. Ahabw'okwanga kukora eki Nyakubaho akuragiire, nawe nikyo yaakucwera aha bugabe." 
1Samuel15:24 Saulo agambira Samueli ati: Ncumwire, tinaakora eki Nyakubaho andagiire, eki ongambiire, ahabw'okuba ntiinire abantu, naayorobera ebi bagambire." 
1Samuel15:25 Mbwenu ninkweshegyereza, onsaasire ekibi kyangye, ogarukyeyo naanye mbone kuramya Mukama." 
1Samuel15:26 Samueli agira Saulo ati: Tindikwija kugarukayo naiwe, ahabw'okuba oyangire kukora eki Nyakubaho akugambiire, nawe nikyo ayangiire ku oba omugabe wa Isiraeli." 
1Samuel15:27 Samueli ku yaahindukire kugyenda, Saulo yaakwata omukugiro gw'ekijwaro kye, kyataaguka." 
1Samuel15:28 Samueli yaamugira ati: Eri izooba Nyakubaho yaakwaka obugabe bwa Isiraeli, yaabuha mutaahi waawe orikukuhita." 
1Samuel15:29 Ruhanga Kitiinwa kya Isiraeli tabeiha, kandi tahindura ki yaagamba, ahabw'okuba ti muntu kuhindura eki yaagamba." 
1Samuel15:30 Ebyo ku bihwa, Saulo agira ati: Ncumwire, kwonka hati ngirira enshoni omu maisho g'abakuru b'abantu bangye na Isiraeli, ogarukyeyo naanye, mbone kuramya Mukama Ruhanga waawe." 
1Samuel15:31 Samueli nikwo kugarukayo nawe, Saulo akaramya Nyakubaho." 
1Samuel15:32 Bwanyima Samueli aragiira ati: Nimundeetere aha Agagi omugabe w'Abaamaleki. Agagi aija ahu ari naanyimbuka naagira ati: Okufa kubi tikwakiriho! 
1Samuel15:33 Samueli amugira ati: Nk'oku rurara yaawe yaahindwire abakazi encwekye, nikwo na nyoko araabe encwekye nkabo. Samueli atyo ahirimburira Agagi omu maisho ga Nyakubaho omuri Giligaali." 
1Samuel15:34 Ebyo ku bihwa, Samueli aza Raama, na Saulo ainamuka, aza owe Gibea." 
1Samuel15:35 Kandi Samueli obu yaabaire akihuriire, taragizire bu areebana na Saulo obundi. Samueli aguma naasaasibwa Saulo, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akeefuuza eki yaamuhinduriire omugabe wa Isiraeli." 
1Samuel16:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Samueli ati: Oryahitsya hi okusaasibwa Saulo; haza Nyowe mmwangire kuba omugabe wa Isiraeli? Mbwenu ijuza eihembe ryawe amajuta g'omuoliva, oije nkutume ahari Yese owa Beetelehemu; ahabw'okuba omu batabani nimwo nyetooraniire omugabe." 
1Samuel16:2 Samueli amubuuza ati: Nimbaasa nta kuzayo? Saulo ka naakihurira akaanyita. Nyakubaho amugarukamu ati: Twara enyana ogire oti: Naija kutambira Nyakubaho ekitambo. 
1Samuel16:3 Haza oyete Yese aije ahari ekyo kitambo. Naanye niinyija kukumanyisa eki oraakore, onsiigire amajuta ou ndaakugambire." 
1Samuel16:4 Samueli akora nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiira, aija Beetelehemu. Bakuru b'orurembo baija kumubugana nibatetema, bamubuuza bati: Beitu waahuutwa ki? Ni buhooro?" 
1Samuel16:5 Nawe abagira ati: Ni buhooro! Naija kutambira Nyakubaho ekitambo. Mbwenu nimweyeze, mwije tugyendane aha kitambo. Reero ahaasirira Yese n'abatabani, abeeta kwija aha kitambo." 
1Samuel16:6 Ku bahikayo, areeba Eliyaabu ateekateeka ati: Buzimazima ou Nyakubaho arikwenda ngu asiigwe amajuta, niwe ogu ori omu maisho ge." 
1Samuel16:7 Kwonka Nyakubaho amugira ati: Otareebera aha nshusha ye, nari aha kyemerero kye; ahabw'okuba tiwe ndikwenda. Manya Nyakubaho tareeba nk'oku abantu bareeba. Bo bareeba oku omuntu arikushusha aharuguru, kwonka Nyakubaho areeba omutima." 
1Samuel16:8 Mpaho Yese ayeta Abinadabu, amurabya omu maisho ga Samueli. Onu agira ati: N'ogu tiwe Nyakubaho atooraine." 
1Samuel16:9 Reero Yese arabyaho Shaama. Nabwo agira ati: N'ogu tiwe Nyakubaho atooraine. 
1Samuel16:10 Yese atyo arabya omu maisho ga Samueli abatabani mushanju. Omuri aba tihabamu ou Nyakubaho atooraine. 
1Samuel16:11 Samueli abuuza Yese ati: Batabani baawe boona bari aha? Onu amugarukamu ati: Haatsigarayo omuto, kwonka ariisize entaama. Samueli agira Yese ati: Tuma abantu bamureete, ahabw'okuba titurikwija kushutama atakaizire." 
1Samuel16:12 N'onu atuma, bamureeta. Ogwo mwojo akaba naayera, aine amaisho marungi, kandi anyetsire gye. Nyakubaho agira Samueli ati: Imuka omusiigye amajuta. Niwe ogwo." 
1Samuel16:13 Samueli akwata eihembe ry'amajuta g'omuoliva, agamusiigira omu maisho ga beene ishe. Okwiha obwo Mutima wa Nyakubaho aija ahari Daudi n'amaani, amugumamu. Ebyo ku byahwaire, Samueli yaimuka, yaagaruka Raama." 
1Samuel16:14 Mutima wa Nyakubaho ku yaarugire ahari Saulo, omutima mubi ogwayohereziibwe Nyakubaho gwaguma nigumwita kubi." 
1Samuel16:15 Abaheereza ba Saulo baamugira bati: Reeba, omutima mubi ogwohereziibwe Ruhanga nigukwita kubi." 
1Samuel16:16 Mbwenu Nyakusinga, itwe abairu baawe abarikukuheereza, oturagiire tukusherurire omuntu orikumanya kuteera gye enanga. Omutima mubi ogwohereziibwe Ruhanga ku guraagume gwakuzamu, agikuteerere, obe gye." 
1Samuel16:17 Saulo atyo agambira abaheereza be ati: Nimunsherurire omuntu orikuteera gye enanga, mumundeetere." 
1Samuel16:18 Omutsigazi omwe omuribo agira ati: Nyowe ndeebire mutabani wa Yese owa Beetelehemu naamanya kuteera gye enanga. N'omushaija emanzi, enkwata-ngabo, otarikugambira eryo, omuntu murungi omu kureebwa, kandi Nyakubaho ari hamwe nawe." 
1Samuel16:19 Saulo nikwo kutuma entumwa ahari Yese naamugira ati: Ntwekyera mutabani waawe Daudi, orikuriisa entaama." 
1Samuel16:20 Yese atyo areeta endogoya, agyekoreza emigaati n'endyanga ya viino n'omwana gw'embuzi, abiha omutabani Daudi kubitwarira Saulo." 
1Samuel16:21 Daudi ku yaahikire Saulo, yaatandika kumugaragira, Saulo yaamukunda okutakareebwaga, yaamuhindura omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye." 
1Samuel16:22 Saulo yaatuma ahari Yese ati: Ikiriza Daudi agume aha n'ampeereza, ahabw'okuba ambeereire omushongore." 
1Samuel16:23 Mbwenu omutima mubi ogwohereziibwe Ruhanga ku gwabaire guza omuri Saulo, Daudi aihayo enanga agiteera, Saulo aikaikana, aba gye, omutima mubi gumurugaho." 
1Samuel17:1 Mbwenu Abafilisiti bakahuruza amahe gaabo kurwana orugamba, baateeranira Sooko ey'Abaayuda, baasiisira ahagati ya Sooko na Azeeka, omuri Efesidamimu." 
1Samuel17:2 Saulo n'Abaisiraeli nabo baahurura, baasiisira omu ruhanga rwa Ela, baatengyerayo Abafilisiti orugamba." 
1Samuel17:3 Abafilisiti baayemerera aha rwa rushozi seeri, n'Abaisiraeli baayemerera aha rwa seenu, oruhanga rubari ahagati." 
1Samuel17:4 Reero omu rusiisira rw'Abafilisiti haahuruutukamu emanzi rugambwa, orikwetwa Goliyaati, owa Gaati, ou oburaingwa bwe bwabaire buri mikono mukaaga n'ekita kimwe." 
1Samuel17:5 Akaba ajwaire omu mutwe enkofiira y'omuringa, ayehumbikire omu kifuba ekijwaro ky'ekyoma ky'oburemeezi nk'obwa kilo makumi mukaaga na ibiri," 
1Samuel17:6 ajwaire aha mirundi ebyoma by'omuringa kandi ataire aha ibega eicumu ry'omuringa," 
1Samuel17:7 orubango rwaryo rwemi nk'empimbi ei barukiraho emyenda, ekyogi kyaryo kiine oburemeezi bwa kilo munaana, kandi ayebembeirwe omukwatsi w'engabo ye." 
1Samuel17:8 Ku yaayemereire aho, yaayamuza naahiga ab'eihe ry'Abaisiraeli ati: Mbwenu naimwe mwahurura kutenga orugamba? Tindi Omufilisiti, naimwe timuri abairu ba Saulo? Nimwetooranemu omushaija, ashuume tubugabugane." 
1Samuel17:9 Ku arandwanise, yaanyita, nitwija kuba abahuuku baanyu. Kwonka ku ndamukize emikono, naamwita, naimwe nimuba abahuuku baitu b'okutushumbira." 
1Samuel17:10 Ogwo Mufilisiti ayongyera abagira ati: Imwe ngabo z'Abaisiraeli 'mwe, eri izooba naabahaya, nimunshunikire omushaija turwane." 
1Samuel17:11 Saulo n'Abaisiraeli boona ku baahuriire ebi ogwo Mufilisiti yaagamba, baahahaara omutima, baatiina munonga." 
1Samuel17:12 Mbwenu Daudi akaba ari mutabani w'Omuefuraati owa Beetelehemu ey'omu kyanga kya Yuda, orikwetwa Yese, owaabaire aine abatabani munaana. Omu busingye bwa Saulo, ogwo mushaija akaba ari omugurusi, yaahikize engingo za bukuru." 
1Samuel17:13 Batabani ba Yese bashatu abakuru bakaba bakuratiire Saulo aha rugamba, kandi amaziina g'abo bonshatu abaahurwire n'aga: Ow'omujigaijo akaba naayetwa Eliyaabu, ow'omushubiro naayetwa Abinadabu n'owa kashatu naayetwa Shaama." 
1Samuel17:14 Daudi we akaba ari muto waabo boona, kandi bakuru be abo bonshatu nibo baabaire bahurwire na Saulo." 
1Samuel17:15 Daudi akaba aza owa Saulo, kandi agaruka Beetelehemu kuriisa entaama za ishe." 
1Samuel17:16 Omufilisiti ogwo akaba amazire ebiro makumi ana, naarugayo naabeeshaaringira omu maisho omu kasheeshe n'omu mwabazyo." 
1Samuel17:17 Eizooba rimwe Yese akagambira omutabani ati: Irooko ogyemurire bakuru baawe encuro y'ezi ngano zikarangire n'egi migaati ikumi, obibatwarire juba omu rusiisira." 
1Samuel17:18 Kandi ezi ncumate ikumi z'amajuta ozitwarire mukuru waabo ow'engabo rukumi. Oreebe bakuru baawe oku barikuraara, haza ondeetere akantu ku ndaamanyireho ku obareebire, kandi ku bari gye." 
1Samuel17:19 Mbwenu obwo Saulo n'abo bashaija, n'Abaisiraeli boona bakaba bari omu ruhanga rwa Ela nibarwana n'Abafilisiti." 
1Samuel17:20 Daudi yaimuka kare omu kasheeshe, entaama yaazitsigira ow'okuzirinda, yaatwara engyemu, yaagyenda nk'oku ishe amuragiire. Yaahika omu rusiisira amahe nigashohora kuza ahi barikutengyera orugamba, nibateera akaari k'ehururu." 
1Samuel17:21 Abaisiraeli n'Abafilisiti baatenga orugamba, engabo zaatsyamirana." 
1Samuel17:22 Daudi ebintu bye yaabitsigira omurinzi w'eby'orugamba, yairuka yaahika ahu engabo ziri, yaaramutsya bakuru be." 
1Samuel17:23 Ku yaabaire naakigaaniira nabo, egyo manzi rugambwa, Omufilisiti wa Gaati orikwetwa Goliyaati, yaasyoka omu ngabo z'Abafilisiti, yaahiga nk'okwe, na Daudi yaamuhurira." 
1Samuel17:24 Abaisiraeli ku baareebire ogwo mushaija, baamuhunga, baatiina munonga." 
1Samuel17:25 Baagira bati: Mwareeba ogwo mushaija waasyokayo? Buzimazima yaija kuhaya Isiraeli. Haza omuntu oraamwite, omugabe naija kumutungisa munonga, amuhingire muhara we, kandi ab'omuryango gwa ishe abahe obusingye omuri Isiraeli." 
1Samuel17:26 Daudi abuuza abamuri aha rubaju ati: Omuntu owaakwita ogu Mufilisiti, yaiha ahari Isiraeli ekihemu, bakaamukorera ki? Mbwenu ogu Mufilisiti otashazirwe niwe oha, kuhaya amahe ga Ruhanga ohuriire?" 
1Samuel17:27 Abantu baamugarukamu nka kuri bati: Oraamwite nikwo araakorerwe. 
1Samuel17:28 Reero mukuru we Eliyaabu amuhurira naagamba n'abo bantu. Amugwerwa kubi munonga, amukabukira ati: Waareetwa ki kunu? Kandi entaama waazitsigira oha omu ihamba? Nimmanya amaryo gaawe, iwe ntigi we! Tiwaareetwa kindi, kureka okureeba orugamba." 
1Samuel17:29 Daudi amugira ati: Mbwenu nyowe naashobya ki? Ngu niho naabuuza? 
1Samuel17:30 Atyo amurugaho, ahindukira ondiijo, agamba nawe ebigambo nka biri. N'abantu bamugarukamu nka bwabiso." 
1Samuel17:31 Abantu ku baahuriire ebi Daudi yaagamba, baabiteekyerereza Saulo, nawe nikwo kumutumaho kwija." 
1Samuel17:32 Daudi ku yaizire, yaagira Saulo ati: Hatagira owaahahaaza omutima ahabw'ogwo Mufilisiti. Nyowe omwiru waawe naaza kurwana nawe." 
1Samuel17:33 Saulo agira Daudi ati: Torikubaasa kuturukirira ogwo Mufilisiti kurwana nawe, ahabw'okuba okiri muto; haza we n'omushaija omanyiire engamba okwiha omu butsigazi." 
1Samuel17:34 Daudi agarukamu Saulo ati: Nyowe omwiru waawe nkaba ndiisa entaama za tata. Ku haabaire haija entare nari edubu, yaakwata entaama omu busyo;" 
1Samuel17:35 ngibinga, ngiteera, ngigyaka. Ku yaabaire eija kundwanisa, ngikwata omureju, ngiteera, ngiita." 
1Samuel17:36 Nyowe omwiru waawe, entare n'edubu ezi nyitsire ti nkye. N'ogu Mufilisiti otashazirwe naija kuba nk'emwe aharizo; ahabw'okuba ahayire amahe ga Ruhanga ohuriire." 
1Samuel17:37 Daudi ayongyera agira ati: Nyakubaho owandinzire ebyara by'entare n'eby'edubu, naija kunjuna, anyihe omu mikono y'ogu Mufilisiti. Saulo agira Daudi ati: Irooko, Nyakubaho agume naiwe." 
1Samuel17:38 Bwanyima Saulo ajweka Daudi ebijwaro bye eby'okurwanisa, amuta enkofiira y'omuringa aha mutwe, amujweka ekooti y'ekyoma." 
1Samuel17:39 Daudi ajwarira rurara aha kijwaro kye ky'okurwanisa. Kwonka ku ateeraho kugyenda byanga, ahabw'okuba akaba atabimanyiriire. Agira Saulo ati: Ebi tindikubaasa kugyenda nabyo, ahabw'okuba timbimanyiriire. Daudi atyo abijuura." 
1Samuel17:40 Ku aheza, akwata enkoni ye, atorotoora amabaare ataano g'enshoro omu kagyera, agata omu kashaho k'omu kishaho kye eki arisaanisa, enjungu ye emuri omu ngaro, airirira ogwo Mufilisiti." 
1Samuel17:41 Omufilisiti nawe arugayo, airirira Daudi, ayebembeirwe omukwatsi w'engabo ye." 
1Samuel17:42 Omufilisiti ku anaga ati amaisho, yaareeba Daudi, amugaya, ahabw'okuba akatsigazi karikwera karungi." 
1Samuel17:43 Ogwo Mufilisiti agira Daudi ati: Onyetsire embwa, waaza kwija n'enkoni? Atyo amukyeenesa baaruhanga be." 
1Samuel17:44 Kandi Omufilisiti agira Daudi ati: Ija ompikye, nkubaagire amahungu n'enyamaishwa." 
1Samuel17:45 Daudi nawe agira Omufilisiti ati: Waanyizira oine rurara n'eicumu n'ekihosho, kwonka nyowe naakwizira omu ziina rya Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga w'amahe g'Abaisiraeli abu ohayire." 
1Samuel17:46 Eri izooba Nyakubaho yaaza kukundekurira nkwite, nkutemeho omutwe; emitumbi y'ab'eihe ry'Abafilisiti ngigaburire amahungu n'enyamaishwa; haza ab'omu nsi yoona bamanye ku Ruhanga ari omuri Isiraeli." 
1Samuel17:47 N'aba bantu bateeraniire aha boona bamanye ku Nyakubaho atajunisa rurara n'eicumu, ahabw'okuba orugamba oru n'orwe, kandi naija kubaturekurira." 
1Samuel17:48 Omufilisiti ku yaimukire naija kubugabugana na Daudi, Daudi nawe yairuka buguru butakora hansi naija kurwanira nawe ahu Abafilisiti batengyeire orugamba." 
1Samuel17:49 Daudi yaata omukono omu nshaho, yaihamu eibaare, yaarirekyeza enjungu, yaariteera Omufilisiti omu buso, ryamuhweramu, yaagwa ajuumaire." 
1Samuel17:50 Daudi yaasingura atyo Omufilisiti n'eibaare ry'enjungu, yaarimuteera, yaamwita ataine rurara mu ngaro." 
1Samuel17:51 Bwanyima Daudi yairuka, yaamuribatira, yaasyora rurara omu kyobate kyayo, yaamwita, yaamutemaho omutwe. Abafilisiti ku baareebire emanzi yaabo rugambwa yaafa, baahunga." 
1Samuel17:52 Abaisiraeli n'Abaayuda baimuka nibateera akaari, baabinga Abafilisiti, baabahitsya Gaati n'aha marembo ga Ekurooni. Abafilisiti abaahutaaziibwe baagwa omu muhanda, okwiha Sharaimu okuhika Gaati na Ekurooni." 
1Samuel17:53 Abaisiraeli ku baagarukire nibaruga kubinga Abafilisiti, baanyaga orusiisira rwabo." 
1Samuel17:54 Daudi nawe yaihaho omutwe gwa Goliyaati, yaagutwara Yerusalemu. Kwonka eby'okurwanisa by'ogwo Mufilisiti, Daudi yaaguma nabyo omuri Nyaruju." 
1Samuel17:55 Saulo ku yaareebire Daudi naaza kurwanisa Omufilisiti, yaabuuza Abuneeri omukuru w'eihe ati: Abuneeri, ogwo mutsigazi ni mwene oha? Abuneeri yaamugarukamu ati: Nyakusinga, buso bwawe, tindikumumanya!" 
1Samuel17:56 Omugabe ati: Irooko, obuuririze ishe w'ogwo mutsigazi." 
1Samuel17:57 Mbwenu Daudi ku yaatabaarukire naaruga kwita Omufilisiti, Abuneeri yaamutwara, yaamumurikira Saulo aine omutwe gw'Omufilisiti omu ngaro." 
1Samuel17:58 Saulo yaamubuuza ati: Mutsigazi 'we, ori mutabani w'oha? Daudi yaamugarukamu ati: Ndi mutabani w'omwiru waawe Yese owa Beetelehemu." 
1Samuel18:1 Daudi ku yaaherize kugaaniira na Saulo, omutima gwa Yonataani mwene Saulo gwaramatana n'ogwa Daudi, Yonataani yaamukunda nk'oku ayekunda." 
1Samuel18:2 Eryo izooba Saulo yaagumya Daudi owe, tiyaamwikiriza kugaruka wa ishe." 
1Samuel18:3 Bwanyima Yonataani yaaragaanira kimwe na Daudi kuguma naamukunda nk'oku ayekunda. 
1Samuel18:4 Yonataani yaayejuura bushuuti ei yaabaire ajwaire, yaagiha Daudi hamwe n'eby'okurwanisa bye, nangwa na rurara ye, n'obuta bwe, n'orukoba rwe rw'okwezirikisa." 
1Samuel18:5 Daudi yaaguma naasingura ahi Saulo yaabaire amutuma hoona. Saulo nikwo kumuhindura omukuru w'engabo ze. Ekyo abantu boona baakisiima, kandi kyasiimwa n'abagaragwa ba Saulo." 
1Samuel18:6 Mbwenu engabo ku zaabaire nizitabaaruka, Daudi naagarukayo aherize kwita Goliyaati, abakazi baaruga omu ndembo za Isiraeli zoona, baija kubugana omugabe Saulo nibeeshongora, nibazina, nibateera enshandaazo n'enanga z'emirya eshatu n'akaari bashemereirwe." 
1Samuel18:7 Abo bakazi ku baabaire nibeemurika, baayeshongora nibaihaihana bati: Saulo aitsire enkumi, Daudi yaita obukumi." 
1Samuel18:8 Ekyo kyaitsa Saulo ekiniga kingi; yaaguubwa kubi, yaagira ati: Daudi baamubarira obukumi, nyowe bambarira enkumi. Mbwenu shi ekindi atsigariire ki? T'okuza aha ngoma?" 
1Samuel18:9 Okwiha obwo Saulo yaaguma naareebesa Daudi eriisho ribi. 
1Samuel18:10 Ku bwaseesire, omutima mubi ogwayohereziibwe Ruhanga gwaza omuri Saulo, yaasharira omu nju ye, obwo Daudi naateera enanga nk'okwe kw'obutoosha. Saulo akaba akwaitse eicumu, yaarirekyera naateekateeka ati:" 
1Samuel18:11 Niinyija kumucumita rimwogyemu rikwate ekisiika. Kwonka Daudi yaaryeshumba kabiri. 
1Samuel18:12 Saulo yaaguma naatiina Daudi, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akaba ari hamwe na Daudi ogwo, kwonka ataine na Saulo." 
1Samuel18:13 Nikyo Saulo yaamweihiireho, akamuhindura omukuru w'engabo rukumi; akaguma naahurura, kandi naatabaaruka nazo, azeebembeire." 
1Samuel18:14 Daudi ebi yaabaire naakora byona byaguma nibimugyendera gye, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akaba ari hamwe nawe." 
1Samuel18:15 Saulo ku yaareebire Daudi naagyenderwa gye ebi arikukora, yaayeyongyera kumutiina." 
1Samuel18:16 Kwonka Abaisiraeli boona n'Abaayuda baakunda Daudi ahabw'okuhurura nabo akatabaaruka nabo. 
1Samuel18:17 Mbwenu Saulo akagambaira Daudi ati: Reeba aha hariho muhara wangye omukuru Merabu, niinyija kumukuha omushwere. Kwonka ogume ombeere emanzi, orwanire Nyakubaho engamba. Obwo Saulo akaba aine ekiteekateeko ekirikugira kiti: Ka ndekye kuba niinye naamwita, kureka Abafilisiti." 
1Samuel18:18 Daudi agira Saulo ati: Mbwenu nyowe niinye oha, n'abaitu nibo baahi, n'omuryango gwa tata omuri Isiraeli nigwo guuha, nyowe okuba mukwe w'omugabe?" 
1Samuel18:19 Kwonka obunaku ku bwahikire, Merabu muhara wa Saulo owaabaire ari ow'okuhingirwa Daudi, baamuhingira Adirieli Omunyamehola." 
1Samuel18:20 Reero Mikaali muhara wa Saulo yaakunda Daudi. Ku baakigambiire Saulo, kyamushemeza." 
1Samuel18:21 Saulo yaateekateeka ati: Ka mmumuhe, amubeere ekiina ky'aha muryango, Abafilisiti bamurwanise. Saulo atyo agambira Daudi obwa kabiri ati: Noija kuba mukwe wangye." 
1Samuel18:22 Kandi Saulo aragiira abagaragwa be ati: Mungambirire Daudi omu mubonano muti: Reeba, omugabe naakusiima munonga, n'abagaragwa be nibakukunda, mbwenu obunaku bwahika, obe mukwe w'omugabe." 
1Samuel18:23 Abagaragwa ba Saulo baba nikwo baabigambira Daudi. Nawe abagira ati: Mbwenu nyowe nk'oku ndi omworo kandi otari munyaiziina, imwe nimukyeeta ekintu kikye, nyowe okuba mukwe w'omugabe?" 
1Samuel18:24 Abagaragwa ba Saulo bamugambira nk'oku Daudi yaabagambira. 
1Samuel18:25 Saulo abagira ati: Mugambire Daudi muti: Omugabe tarikwenda njugano, kureka naakushaba ebikoba igana ebishazirwe aha Bafilisiti baitsirwe, abone kuhoora abo bazigu be. Obwo Saulo naayenda ngu amwitse Abafilisiti." 
1Samuel18:26 Abagaragwa be ku baabigambiire Daudi, kyamushemeza munonga kuba mukwe w'omugabe. Ebiro ku byabaire bitakahingwire," 
1Samuel18:27 Daudi yaimuka, yaahurura n'abashaija be, yaita Abafilisiti magana abiri, yaareeta ebikoba byabo, yaabibarira omugabe ngu akaaba omukwe. Na Saulo yaamuhingira muhara we Mikaali." 
1Samuel18:28 Kwonka Saulo ku yaabireebire, yaamanya ku Nyakubaho ari hamwe na Daudi, kandi ku Abaisiraeli boona barikumukunda;" 
1Samuel18:29 yaayeyongyera kumutiina, yaaguma ari omuzigu we." 
1Samuel18:30 Abategyeki b'Abafilisiti ku baabaire bahurura kurwana, buri murundi Daudi bimugyendera gye okukira abakungu ba Saulo boona; arangaanwa atyo munonga." 
1Samuel19:1 Saulo agambira omutabani Yonataani n'abagaragwa be boona ku arikwenda kwita Daudi. Kwonka Yonataani mwene Saulo akaba naakunda Daudi munonga. 
1Samuel19:2 Yonataani nikwo kumanyisa Daudi ati: Tata Saulo naayenda kukwita! N'ahabw'ekyo nyencakare omu kasheeshe oyerinde, oyesherekye omu mwanya gwekiikire, ogumeyo." 
1Samuel19:3 Naanye niinyija kushohora nshendekyereize, nshangye tata omu ishwa, ahu oraabe ori, mmugambire ebyawe. Ku ndaagire eki naamanya, niinyija kukikugambira." 
1Samuel19:4 Yonataani atyo agamba gye Daudi, naamugambira Saulo ishe. Amugira ati: Nyakusinga omugabe, otagira ekibi ki waakora aha mwiru waawe Daudi, ahabw'okuba takakucumurahoga, kandi ebi akora naakuheereza ni birungi." 
1Samuel19:5 Reeba, akooga amagara, yaita Omufilisiti, Nyakubaho yaaha Isiraeli yoona obusinguzi buhango. Ekyo naiwe okakyereebera, waashemererwa. Mbwenu nooyenda kukorera ki kubi, kusheesha eshagama y'otaine rubanja, kwitira busha Daudi?" 
1Samuel19:6 Saulo aikiriza ebi Yonataani yaamugambira, arahira ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho, Daudi tarikwija kwitwa." 
1Samuel19:7 Bwanyima Yonataani ayeta Daudi, amugambira ebyo byona. Ebyo ku bihwa, amutwarira Saulo, Daudi aguma naamuheereza nk'obunyakare." 
1Samuel19:8 Hakagaruka haabaho orundi rugamba, Daudi yaahurura, yaarwanisa Abafilisiti, yaabaitamu abantu baingi, baamuhunga." 
1Samuel19:9 Reero omutima mubi ogwohereziibwa Nyakubaho gwaija ahari Saulo ashutami omu nju ye, akwaitse eicumu, Daudi naamuteerera enanga." 
1Samuel19:10 Saulo yaateeraho kurekyera Daudi eicumu, ngu rimwogyemu, rikwate ekisiika. Kwonka onu yaaryeshumba, Saulo yaariteera ekisiika. Daudi yaahunga, yaakira." 
1Samuel19:11 Ekyo kiro Saulo yaayohereza entumwa kuraara zirinzire enju ya Daudi, ngu abone kumwita bwasheesha. Kwonka Mikaali muka Daudi yaamugira ati: Ku oraabe otahungize magara gaawe eki kiro, nyencakare nibakwita." 
1Samuel19:12 Mikaali atyo arabya Daudi omu dirisa, n'onu ahunga, akira." 
1Samuel19:13 Reero Mikaali yaihayo ekishushani ky'omu ndaaro, yaakita aha kitanda, yaakishegura omushego gw'obwoshe bw'embuzi, yaakishweka emyenda." 
1Samuel19:14 Saulo ku yaayohereize entumwa z'okukwata Daudi, Mikaali yaazigira ati: Arwaire." 
1Samuel19:15 Saulo atyo ayohereza ezindi ntumwa kureeba Daudi, naaziragiira ati: Mumuheekye aha kitanda, mumundeetere mwite." 
1Samuel19:16 Entumwa ku zaataahire omu nju, zaashanga ekishushani nikyo kibyami aha kitanda kyeshegwire omushego gw'obwoshe bw'embuzi." 
1Samuel19:17 Bwanyima Saulo yaahaahuuza Mikaali ati: Ekikumbeiheise otyo ni ki, okareka omuzigu wangye akagyenda, akakiza amagara? Mikaali amugarukamu ati: Angizire ati: Ka ngyende; mbwenu nkwitire ki?" 
1Samuel19:18 Daudi ku yaacwire, yaahunga, yaaza Raama owa Samueli, yaamuteekyerereza oku Saulo amugizire kwona. Mpaho we na Samueli baaza Nayoti, baagumayo." 
1Samuel19:19 Reero abantu baagambira Saulo bati: Reeba, Daudi ari Nayoti omuri Raama." 
1Samuel19:20 Saulo nikwo kutuma ab'okukwata Daudi. Kwonka ku baareebire omutwe gw'abarangi niguragura, na Samueli abeemereiremu ari mukuru waabo, Mutima wa Ruhanga yaijura entumwa za Saulo, nazo zaaragura." 
1Samuel19:21 Ku baakigambiire Saulo, yaayoherezayo ezindi ntumwa, haza nazo zaaragura. Saulo nikwo kutuma ezindi ntumwa omurundi gwa kashatu, nazo zikaragura." 
1Samuel19:22 Bwanyima Saulo nikwo kuyeimukira kuza Raama. Ku yaahikire aha iziba rihango ery'omu Seku, yaabuuza ati: Samueli na Daudi barahi? Baamugarukamu bati: Manya bari Nayoti omuri Raama." 
1Samuel19:23 Atyo arugayo kuza Nayoti ey'omuri Raama. Ku yaabaire naakigyenda, Mutima wa Ruhanga nawe yaamwijura, yaaragura, okuhitsya obu yaahikire Nayoti omuri Raama." 
1Samuel19:24 Mpaho yaajuura ebi ajwaire, yaaragurira omu maisho ga Samueli, yaamara eizooba ryona n'ekiro kyona arambiire, ajwaire busha. Nikyo bagirira bati: Saulo nawe ari omu barangi." 
1Samuel20:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Daudi yaahunga naaruga Nayoti ey'omuri Raama, yaija ahari Yonataani, yaamugira ati: Beitu nkozire ki? Nshobize ki, kandi ncumwire ki ahari sho, eki arikumpiigira kuunyita?" 
1Samuel20:2 Yonataani yaamugarukamu ati: Nikikabure! Torikwija kufa. Reeba, tata takora kintu kyona, yaaba kihango nari kikye, atakingambiire. Mbwenu ekyo tata akaakinsherekyeire ki? Tikwo kiri!" 
1Samuel20:3 Daudi amugarukamu ati: Sho naamanya gye ku onkunda. Nikyo arikugirira ati: Yonataani atakimanya, akashaasha munonga. Kwonka nindahira Nyakubaho ohuriire, kandi ninkakwite, ntsigaizeyo akaanya kakye, nfe." 
1Samuel20:4 Yonataani nikwo kubuuza Daudi ati: Mbwenu nooyenda nkugire nta? 
1Samuel20:5 Daudi amugarukamu ati: Reeba, nyencakare okwezi nikuboneka, kandi tinkubaire w'okubura aha byokurya by'omugabe. Kwonka ondekye, ngyende nyesherekye omu ishwa, okuhitsya aha kiro kya kashatu omu mwabazyo." 
1Samuel20:6 Sho ku araabe atandeebire, omugire oti: Daudi anyeshengyereize munonga ngu mwikirize ahikyeho omu rurembo rw'owaabo Beetelehemu, ngu ahabw'okuba ab'omurayango gwa ishe boona nibaza kutambirayo ekitambo eki batamba buri mwaka." 
1Samuel20:7 Reero ku araagire ati: Eego, ni kirungi; biri nyowe omwiru waawe byambeera gye. Kwonka ku araaguubwe kubi, obwo omanye ku amaririire kunkora kubi." 
1Samuel20:8 Mbwenu nyowe omwiru waawe, onkorere eky'embabazi, ahabw'okuba okaragaana naanye omu maisho ga Ruhanga endagaano ehamire. Kwonka ku ndaabe nyine eki nshobize, obe niiwe waanyita. Mbwenu nooyendera ki kuntwarira sho?" 
1Samuel20:9 Yonataani amugira ati: Nikikabure! Kuri naaba nimmanya ngu tata naayenda kukukora kubi, tinkaakugambiire?" 
1Samuel20:10 Daudi nikwo kubuuza Yonataani ati: Sho ku araakugarukyemu kubi, n'oha orangambire?" 
1Samuel20:11 Yonataani agira Daudi ati: Ija tugyendane omu ishwa. Batyo bombi bashohora, baza omu ishwa." 
1Samuel20:12 Yonataani agira Daudi ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli abe niwe yaaba kareebi. Nyencakare nk'aga magingo, nari okwosha nyencakare, ku ndaakyenguuze tata, naashanga atakwiniire mutima mubi, niinyija kukutumaho nkikumanyise." 
1Samuel20:13 Kandi tata ku araabe naayenda kukukora kubi, nyowe, Yonataani, naaba ntakikumanyiise, nkakwohereza, okagyenda buhooro, Mukama akinture n'okukiraho. Nyakubaho naakaguma naiwe, nk'oku abaire ari hamwe na tata." 
1Samuel20:14 Ku ndaabe nkihuriire, ogume ori munywani wangye omu mazima, nk'oku waakiraganiise omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, ntakaafa." 
1Samuel20:15 Kandi otarigira bu ohararukire ab'eka ya tata. Nyakubaho ku aricwekyereza abazigu baawe, iwe Daudi," 
1Samuel20:16 eiziina rya Yonataani ritarigira obu ryebire omu ka yaawe. Nyakubaho naakahoore abazigu baawe. 
1Samuel20:17 Bwanyima Yonataani yaagaruka yaarahiza Daudi kuguma naamukunda; ahabw'okuba Yonataani ogwo akaba naakunda Daudi, nk'oku ayekunda." 
1Samuel20:18 Yonataani agira Daudi ati: Nyencakare nihaija kubaho obugyenyi bw'okuboneka kw'okwezi. Haza nibaija kumanya ku otariho, ahabw'okuba omwanya gwawe niguba gurimu busha." 
1Samuel20:19 Reero aha kiro kya kashatu nibaija kumanyira kimwe oku otariho. Obwo ogyende oze omu mwanya gu waayesherekiremu buri; ogume okwo aha rubaju rw'eibaare rya Ezeli. 
1Samuel20:20 Nyowe niinyija kurasha emyambi eshatu aha rubaju rwaryo, nk'orikurasha ekimaasho." 
1Samuel20:21 Haza niinyija kutuma omwojo, mmugire nti: Irooko, oreebe ahu emyambi yaagwa. Ku ndamugire nti: Reeba, emyambi eri aha rubaju rwawe, giiheho; obwo oije. Nindahira Ruhanga ohuriire, noija kuba buhooro, nihaba hatariho kabi." 
1Samuel20:22 Kwonka ku ndaagire omutsigazi nti: Reeba, emyambi eri ahabiso yaawe, obwo ogyende, biri Nyakubaho niwe akwohereize." 
1Samuel20:23 Kandi aha bi twagamba twembi, Nyakubaho abe kareebi waawe naanye ebiro byona." 
1Samuel20:24 Daudi atyo ayeshereka omu ishwa. Okwezi ku kwabonekire," 
1Samuel20:25 omugabe yaashutama aha kitebe kye haihi n'ekisiika nk'obutoosha; Yonataani ashungaine nawe, na Abuneeri yaashutama aha rubaju rwa Saulo, kwonka omwanya ogwa Daudi gwagumwamu busha." 
1Samuel20:26 Saulo eryo izooba tiyaagira ki yaagamba, ahabw'okuba akateekateeka ati: Shana aine oku abaire, yaaba otashemeire, buzimazima yaaba otashemeire." 
1Samuel20:27 Kwonka aha izooba rya kabiri okwezi kurugire kutaaha, hoona omwanya gwa Daudi gwaguma gurimu busha. Saulo nikwo kubuuza omutabani Yonataani ati: Ekizibiire mwene Yese kwija aha byokurya nyomwabazyo na hati ni ki?" 
1Samuel20:28 Yonataani amugarukamu ati: Daudi anyeshengyereize kumwikiriza kuza Beetelehemu. 
1Samuel20:29 Yangira ati: Nyikiriza ngyende, ahabw'okuba ab'eka yaitu nibaija kutambira ekitambo omu rurembo, mukuru wangye andagiire kutaburaho. Mbwenu ku oraabe nookisiima, ondekye ngyende ndeebe bakuru bangye. Ekyo nikyo kimuzibiire kuba aha bugyenyi bwawe, Nyakusinga." 
1Samuel20:30 Saulo ekyo kyamureetera kugirira Yonataani ekiniga kingi, yaamukabukira ati: Iwe mwana w'omukazi ekitsire kandi omugomi, tiinye ndikumanya ku orikukwatanisa na mwene Yese; haza okeehemura, okaitsa nyoko enshoni?" 
1Samuel20:31 Okimanyire kimwe ngu mwene Yese ku ariba akiriho omuri egi nsi, iwe n'obugabe bwawe timurihamibwa. Mbwenu tuma bamundeetere. Buzimazima n'ow'okufa." 
1Samuel20:32 Yonataani agira Saulo ishe ati: Beitu naitirwa ki? Akozire ki? 
1Samuel20:33 Ahonaaho Saulo arekyera Yonataani eicumu kumwita. Yonataani amanyiraho ku ishe amaririire kwita Daudi. 
1Samuel20:34 Yonataani aimuka aha byokurya, ekiniga nikyenda kumubarura, tarya byokurya aha kiro kya kabiri ky'okwezi; ahabw'okuba akaba aine enaku nyingi ahabwa Daudi, ahabw'okuba ishe akamuhemura." 
1Samuel20:35 Omu kasheeshe kaakuratsireho, Yonataani akashohora, yaaza omu ishwa, nk'oku yaabaire araganiise Daudi. Yaagyenda ashendekyereziibwe omwojo." 
1Samuel20:36 Yaagira ogwo mwojo we ati: Iruka, oronde emyambi i naarasha. Omwojo ku yaabaire nairuka, Yonataani yaarasha omwambi yaagumurenzya." 
1Samuel20:37 Omwojo ku yaahikire ahu omwambi gu Yonataani yaarasire guri; Yonataani yaamweta naamugira ati: Beitu omwambi tiguri ahabiso yaawe? 
1Samuel20:38 Ayongyera amugira ati: Rahuka, gira obwira, oteeziringa! Omwojo wa Yonataani atyo aihaho emyambi, agaruka ahi mukama we ari." 
1Samuel20:39 Kwonka ogwo mwojo tagira ki amanya; kureka Yonataani na Daudi nibo baabaire nibakimanya. 
1Samuel20:40 Yonataani aha ogwo mwojo eby'okurwanisa bye, amugira ati: Irooko, obitware omu rurembo." 
1Samuel20:41 Omwojo ku yaabaire yaarugaho ati, Daudi yaimuka, yaaruga aha kirundo ky'amabaare, yaagwa aha nsi ajuumaire. Bwanyima yaamuramya nainika omutwe kashatu. Batyo banywegyerana nibatongyezana, okuhitsya obu Daudi omutima gwamugarukire omunda." 
1Samuel20:42 Yonataani amuraga ati: Yegyendere n'obusingye! Tugume turi nk'oku twarahiraine omu iziina rya Nyakubaho, ku Nyakubaho niwe ariba kareebi waitu twembi; kandi kareebi wa baijukuru bangye na baijukuru baawe ebiro byona." 
1Samuel21:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Daudi yaaza Noobu owa Ahimeleki omuhongyerezi. Ahimeleki yaija naatetema kumubugana. Yaamubuuza ati. Ahabw'enki ori wenka otaine muntu?" 
1Samuel21:2 Daudi yaagarukamu Ahimeleki omuhongyerezi ati: Omugabe aine eki andagiire kukora, kandi angizire ati: Hatagira owaamanya eki naakutuma kukora nari eki naakuragiira. Kandi ndagaine n'engabo zangye kuzishanga omu mwanya nanka." 
1Samuel21:3 Mbwenu tokaagira k'okurya? Mpa emigaati etaano, nari ekindi kyona eki oine." 
1Samuel21:4 Omuhongyerezi agira Daudi ati: Hati tiinyine migaati y'obutoosha, kureka hariho emigaati eyeziibwe; abatsigazi baawe baaba batahikaine na bakazi." 
1Samuel21:5 Daudi agarukamu omuhongyerezi ati: Buzimazima obutoosha tituhikaana na bakazi, naaba nyine ahi mpurwire. Ebintu by'abantu bangye n'ebirikwera, nangwa nobu ruba ruri oruzinduko rw'obutoosha. Mbwenu shi obwa hati tibirikukiraho kuba ebirikwera?" 
1Samuel21:6 Omuhongyerezi atyo amuha emigaati eyeziibwe, ahabw'okuba hakaba hatariho endiijo migaati, kureka emigaati emurikiirwe Ruhanga ei baabaire baiha omu maisho ga Nyakubaho eryo izooba omu mwanya gwayo, bakataho eyaaruga kuteekwa." 
1Samuel21:7 Haza obwo hakaba hariho omushaija w'omu bagaragwa ba Saulo, owaabaire aine ekimutsigaize omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. Ogwo mushaija akaba naayetwa Doegi, ari Omunyaedomu kandi mukuru w'abashumba ba Saulo." 
1Samuel21:8 Bwanyima Daudi yaabuuza Ahimeleki ati: Aha tokaagiraho eicumu nari rurara? Manya tiinyijaine rurara, nobu byakuba eby'okurwanisa, ahabw'okuba eki omugabe antumire kukora kinteerize obwira." 
1Samuel21:9 Omuhongyerezi amugarukamu ati: Reeba, aha hariho rurara ya Goliyaati, Omufilisiti ou waitiire omu ruhanga rwa Eela. Eri aha enyima ya efodi, eshembire omu mwenda. Ku oraabe nooyenda kugitwara, gitware; ahabw'okuba niyo eri aha yonka. Daudi amugira ati: Gimpe, tihariho erikugihita." 
1Samuel21:10 Eryo izooba, Daudi aimuka ahunga Saulo, aza owa Akishi omugabe wa Gaati." 
1Samuel21:11 Abagaragwa ba Akishi baamugira bati: Ogu ti Daudi omugabe w'ensi? Tiwe abakazi baayeshongoire nibaihaihana bati: Saulo aitsire enkumi, Daudi yaita obukumi?" 
1Samuel21:12 Daudi ebi baagambire byamutaaha, yaatiina munonga Akishi omugabe wa Gaati." 
1Samuel21:13 Nikwo kwehindurira omu maisho gaabo, akeegwisa eiraro bamukwaitse, akaharamba enyigi z'aha irembo ry'orurembo, orufuzi rukamwitururukira omu kireju." 
1Samuel21:14 Bwanyima Akishi akagira abagaragwa be ati: Yaimwe, ka nimureeba ogu mushaija ku agwire eiraro, mbwenu mwamundeeterera ki?" 
1Samuel21:15 Nimugira ngu mbuzirwe abagwairaro, mwaza kundeetera eki kishaija kunsharira omu maisho? Mbwenu kiije kintaahire omu nju?" 
1Samuel22:1 Daudi ku yaarugire Gaati, yaahungira omu Nyanga ya Adulaamu. Bakuru be hamwe n'ab'eka ya ishe boona ku baakihuriire, baazayo, baamushangayo." 
1Samuel22:2 Omuntu weena owaabaire aitsirwe enaku, n'owaabaire aine amabanja, n'oine eki arikwetomboita, baamuteeraniraho, yaaba omukuru waabo. Boona abaamuteeraniireho baahika abashaija nka magana ana." 
1Samuel22:3 Daudi ku yaarugira aho, yaaza Mizipa omuri Moabu, yaagambira omugabe wa Moabu ati: Naakweshengyereza oikirize tata na maawe baije bagume naiwe, okuhitsya obu ndaamanye eki Ruhanga arankorere." 
1Samuel22:4 Atyo abatsigira omugabe wa Moabu, baguma nawe ebiro byona ebi Daudi yaamazire ari omu nyanga." 
1Samuel22:5 Bwanyima Gaadi omurangi yaagambira Daudi ati: Otaguma omu nyanga; rugamu oze omu nsi ya Yuda. Daudi nawe nikwo kurugayo, akaza omu kibira kya Hereti." 
1Samuel22:6 Mbwenu Saulo ku yaabaire ari Gibea, ashutami ahatunguukire omu mizi y'omunyinya, akwaitse eicumu, n'abagaragwa be bamushagatiire, yaahurira ku Daudi n'abashaija bu yaabaire aine babonekire." 
1Samuel22:7 Saulo nikwo kubuuza abagaragwa be abamushagatiire, ati: Imwe Baabenyamiini 'mwe, nimuhurire! Mbwenu nimugira ngu mwene Yese naija kuha buri omwe omuriimwe emisiri hamwe n'ey'emizaabibu, akabahindura abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi n'aba igana-igana," 
1Samuel22:8 ngu mwena ekyo nikyo kibareeteire kungiira omu kyetindo? Reeba, tihariho onyatiire enaama ku mutabani wangye akwataniise na mwene Yese. Tihariho n'omwe omuriimwe orikunsaasibwa, nobu kwakuba okummanyisa ku mutabani wangye aimukiriize omugaragwa wangye kusherura oburyo bw'okuunyita, nk'oku eri izooba angwereire." 
1Samuel22:9 Mpaho Doegi Omuedomu owaabaire ayemereire hamwe n'abagaragwa ba Saulo, amugarukamu ati: Ndeebire mutabani wa Yese naija Noobu owa Ahimeleki mwene Ahitubu." 
1Samuel22:10 N'onu yaamwehanuuriza ahari Nyakubaho, yaamuha ebyokurya, na rurara ya Goliyaati Omufilisiti." 
1Samuel22:11 Omugabe nikwo kutuma ab'okweta Ahimeleki omuhongyerezi; mutabani wa Ahitubu, n'ab'omu ka ya ishe boona, abahongyerezi abaabaire batwire Noobu. Boona baija ahu omugabe ari." 
1Samuel22:12 Saulo agira Ahimeleki ati: Iwe mwene Ahitubu 'we, hurira. N'onu amugarukamu ati: Eego, nkutegire okutu, Nyakusinga!" 
1Samuel22:13 Saulo amugira ati: Ahabw'enki ongiiriire omu kyetindo na mwene Yese, okamuha emigaati na rurara, okamwehanuuriza ahari Ruhanga; ekyo kikamureetera kwenda kuunyita, akangwera nk'oku kiri eri izooba?" 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimeleki agarukamu omugabe ati: Omu bagaragwa baawe boona, n'oha ori omwesigwa nka Daudi, mukwe w'omugabe, omukuru w'engabo zaawe ezikurinda, kandi ow'ekitiinwa omuka yaawe?" 
1Samuel22:15 Mbwenu shi ogu nigwo murundi gwangye gw'okubanza kumwehanuuriza ahari Ruhanga? Ngaaha, Nyakusinga, nyowe omwiru waawe otancwera ekibi, nobu kwakuba okukicwera ab'eka ya tata boona. Manya nyowe omwiru waawe, omuri ebyo byona tiinyine ki ndikumanya, yaaba kihango nari kikye." 
1Samuel22:16 Omugabe amugarukamu ati: Iwe Ahimeleki, buzimazima noija kufa, iwe n'ab'eka ya sho boona." 
1Samuel22:17 Mpaho omugabe aragiira abarinzi abamwemereire haihi, ati: Nimuhindukye, mwite abahongyerezi ba Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba nabo bakwataniise na Daudi, baamanya ku ahungire, haza baakinshereka. Kwonka abagaragwa b'omugabe baayanga kubangira abahongyerezi ba Nyakubaho omukono kubaita." 
1Samuel22:18 Omugabe nikwo kuragiira Doegi ati: Ba niiwe waahinduka, oite aba bahongyerezi. Doegi Omuedomu ahinduka, agurukira abahongyerezi eryo izooba, abaitamu abantu makumi munaana na bataano abaabaire bajwara ekijwaro ky'aha kifuba ekya kitaani." 
1Samuel22:19 Kandi acwekyereza Noobu, orurembo rw'abahongyerezi, aita abashaija n'abakazi, abaana n'abeereere abarikwonka, ente n'endogoya n'entaama; byona abicwekyereza." 
1Samuel22:20 Kwonka omwe ahari batabani ba Ahimeleki mwene Ahitubu, orikwetwa Abiyataari, aba niwe yaahonokaho, ahunga, akurata Daudi," 
1Samuel22:21 amugambira oku Saulo aitsire abahongyerezi ba Nyakubaho. 
1Samuel22:22 Daudi nawe agira Abiyataari ati: Eego, nkamanya aha izooba riri, obu Doegi Omuedomu yaabaire ariyo, buzimazima ku arikwija kubigambira Saulo. Mbwenu niinye ndeeteire ab'eka ya sho boona kufa." 
1Samuel22:23 Hati guma naanye, otatiina; ahabw'okuba orikumpiiga kuunyita, naiwe niwe arikukuhiiga kukwita. Obu wampikire, tokifa." 
1Samuel23:1 Mbwenu bagambira Daudi bati: Reeba, Abafilisiti bateire Abaakeila kandi nibanyaga engano z'aha mbuga zaabo." 
1Samuel23:2 Daudi nikwo kwehanuuza ahari Nyakubaho ati: Mpurure nteere aba Bafilisiti? Nyakubaho amugarukamu ati: Irooko obateere, ojune Abaakeila." 
1Samuel23:3 Kwonka engabo za Daudi zimugira ziti: Mbwenu ku turaabe nitutiina turi omuri Yuda, kaashwa ku turaaze Keila kurwanisa amahe g'Abafilisiti?" 
1Samuel23:4 Daudi agaruka ayehanuuza ahari Nyakubaho. Nawe amugarukamu ati: Imuka, oze Keila, ahabw'okuba niinyija kukurekurira Abafilisiti, obasingure." 
1Samuel23:5 Mpaho Daudi n'engabo ze bahurura baza Keila, barwana n'Abafilisiti; banyaga ente zaabo, babaitamu abantu baingi munonga. Daudi ajuna atyo abatuuzi ba Keila." 
1Samuel23:6 Obu Abiyataari mwene Ahimeleki yaahungira ahari Daudi ari Keila, akaija aine efodi omu ngaro." 
1Samuel23:7 Mbwenu ku baagambiire Saulo ngu Daudi aizire Keila, Saulo yaagira ati: Ruhanga yaamundekurira, ahabw'okuba ataahire omu rurembo orwine amarembo garikukingisibwa empimbi, yaayekingiranamu." 
1Samuel23:8 Saulo atyo ahuruza abantu boona kuza Keila bakagota Daudi n'engabo ze. 
1Samuel23:9 Daudi ku yaamanyire ngu Saulo amucumiire enaama y'okumurwanisa, yaagambira Abiyataari omuhongyerezi ati: Reeta efodi." 
1Samuel23:10 Reero Daudi yaayehanuuza ahari Nyakubaho ati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, nyowe omwiru waawe, buzimazima mpuriire ku Saulo arikwenda kwija Keila, kucwekyereza orurembo naaruntura." 
1Samuel23:11 Mbwenu Abanyakeila nibaija kumundekurira? Kandi Saulo naija kwija, nk'oku nyowe omwiru waawe nkihuriire? Ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, nyowe omuheereza waawe ninkweshengyereza, okingambire. Mukama amugarukamu ati: Eego! Naija kwija." 
1Samuel23:12 Daudi ayongyera amubuuza ati: Abanyakeila, nyowe n'engabo zangye nibaija kuturekurira Saulo? Nyakubaho amugira ati: Eego! Nibaija kumubarekurira." 
1Samuel23:13 Daudi n'abashaija be nka magana mukaaga nikwo kwimuka, bakaruga Keila, bakaza ahi baabaasize kuhungira. Na Saulo ku yaahuriire ngu Daudi acwire yaaruga Keila, yaareka kuhurura." 
1Samuel23:14 Daudi yaaguma ayesherekire omu bigo by'omu ihamba, omu nsi y'ebibungo ebihereraine na Ziifu. Saulo yaaguma naamuhiiga buri izooba, kwonka Ruhanga tiyaamumurekurira." 
1Samuel23:15 Daudi ku yaamanyire ngu Saulo naamuhiiga kumwita, yaaguma Horeshi omu ihamba rya Ziifu." 
1Samuel23:16 Yonataani mutabani wa Saulo yaimuka, yaashanga Daudi Horeshi, yaamuhamiza ku Ruhanga arikumurinda." 
1Samuel23:17 Yaamugira ati: Otatiina, Saulo tata tarikwija kugira eki yaakukoraho. Niiwe oraabe omugabe wa Isiraeli, okata aha mutwe, naanye nkata aha ibega. Ekyo Saulo tata nawe naakimanya." 
1Samuel23:18 Batyo bombi baaragaanira omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. Daudi yaaguma Horeshi, na Yonataani yaagaruka omuka." 
1Samuel23:19 Bwanyima Abaaziifu baagyenda, baashanga Saulo Gibea, baamugira bati: Reeba, Daudi atwesherekiremu omu bigo bya Horeshi, omu kibungo kya Hakiila eky'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo bwa Yeshimooni." 
1Samuel23:20 Mbwenu Nyakusinga, shuuma, oyemare ekikuri aha mutima. Itwe ekyaitu n'okumukuta omu ngaro, iwe omugabe." 
1Samuel23:21 Saulo abagarukamu ati: Nk'oku mwangirira esaasi, Nyakubaho abahe omugisha." 
1Samuel23:22 Mbwenu nimwirooko, mwongyere kwetegyereza mumanye, kandi mureebe ahu ayesherekire, n'omureebire; ahabw'okuba bangambiire ku ari omunyabwengye munonga." 
1Samuel23:23 N'ahabw'ekyo mureebe, kandi mwetegyereze emyanya yoona ei ayesherekamu. Haza mugarukye mungambire ekihamire. Obwo nibwo ndaagyende naimwe. Reero ku araabe ari omuri ekyo kyanga, niinyija kumusherura omu nkumi n'enkumi z'Abaayuda." 
1Samuel23:24 Nabo baimuka, baaza Ziifu kutangayo Saulo. Obwo Daudi n'engabo ze bakaba bari omu ihamba rya Maoni omuri Araba aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo bwa Yeshimooni." 
1Samuel23:25 Saulo n'abashaija be baaza kumusherura. Abantu ku baakigambiire Daudi, yaagyenda yaahika aha rukiri rw'omu ihamba rya Maoni." 
1Samuel23:26 Saulo yaareeterwa aha rubaju rumwe rw'orushozi, Daudi n'abantu be baareeterwa aha rundi; obwo Daudi nairuka kuhunga Saulo, ahabw'okuba Saulo n'engabo ze bakaba nibafundiriza Daudi n'abashaija be kubakwata." 
1Samuel23:27 Ago magingo entumwa yaija ahari Saulo yaamugira eti: Rahuka oije, ahabw'okuba Abafilisiti baateera ensi." 
1Samuel23:28 Saulo nikwo kugarukayo akarereera kugumizamu abingire Daudi, akaza kurwana n'Abafilisiti. Nikyo ogwo mwanya baagweteire Selahamalekooti." 
1Samuel23:29 Daudi ku yaarugire aho, yaagyenda, yaaguma ayesherekire omu bigo bya Engedi." 
1Samuel24:1 Saulo ku yaatabaarukire naaruga kubinga Abafilisiti, abantu baamugira bati: Reeba, Daudi ari omu ihamba rya Engedi." 
1Samuel24:2 Saulo nikwo kutoorana omuri Isiraeli yoona abashaija enkumi ishatu enkwata-ngabo, akaza kusherura Daudi n'abashaija be, aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba rw'enkiri z'eizaagiriro ry'enzaza." 
1Samuel24:3 Ku yaahikire aha ngombe z'entaama, aha rubaju rw'omuhanda, aha nyanga, yaataahamu kuza aha ishaazi. Haza obwo Daudi n'abashaija be bashutami endugu omuri egyo nyanga." 
1Samuel24:4 Abashaija ba Daudi nikwo kumugira bati: Eri niryo izooba ri Nyakubaho yaakugambiire ati: Reeba, ndyakurekurira omuzigu waawe, omugire nk'oku orikwenda. Daudi aimuka naashooba, ashara akaremu aha mukugiro gw'omunagiro gwa Saulo, onu atakimanyire." 
1Samuel24:5 Kwonka bwanyima Daudi ayefuuza eki yaasharira aha mukugiro gw'omunagiro gwa Saulo. 
1Samuel24:6 Agira abashaija be ati: Ai bambe! Ebishi naagwisa akagwe, kukora ekintu nk'ekyo ahari mukama wangye, omuntu wa Nyakubaho, owaashukirweho amajuta, nkamubangira omukono; haza ari ou Nyakubaho yaasiigire amajuta." 
1Samuel24:7 Daudi aikaikanisa atyo abashaija be, abazibira kwita Saulo. Saulo aimuka, aruga omu nyanga, agumizamu omuhanda." 
1Samuel24:8 Bwanyima Daudi nawe aimuka, aruga omu nyanga, ayeta Saulo ati: Nyakusinga mukama wangye! Saulo agarura amaisho enyima, Daudi ainama, amutangirira." 
1Samuel24:9 Daudi agira Saulo ati: Ahabw'enki noikiriza ebi abantu barikukugambira bati: Daudi naayenda kukukora kubi! 
1Samuel24:10 Reeba, eri izooba waayereebera oku Nyakubaho yaaba yaakundekuriire ori omu nyanga; kandi abantu bangira ngu nkwite; kwonka nyowe naakureka. Naagira nti: tindikubangira mukama wangye omukono, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akamusiiga amajuta." 
1Samuel24:11 Mbwenu mukama wangye, reeba ekiremu ky'omunagiro gwawe eki nkwaitse, omanyireho ku nyine eki naashara aha mukugiro gw'omunagiro gwawe; haza ntakwite. Niho oraamanyire ku ntakwineho kabi, nari okwenda kukureebya; nobu oraabe iwe nompiiga kuunyita." 
1Samuel24:12 Nyakubaho k'abe niwe yaaba omuramuzi waitu twembi, abe niwe yaakumpoorera; kwonka nyowe tindikubangira mukono." 
1Samuel24:13 Manya abaira bakakicwa enfumu bati: “Omubi niwe akora ekibi”; kwonka nyowe tindigira bu nkukozire kubi. 
1Samuel24:14 Mbwenu ou iwe omugabe wa Isiraeli ohurwire kuteera, niwe oha? Ou ohiigire niwe oha? T'embwa efiire! T'omukukuni!" 
1Samuel24:15 Nyakubaho abe niwe yaaba omuramuzi w'okutucwera orubanja, nyowe naiwe. Haza akireebe, antonganire, akunjune." 
1Samuel24:16 Daudi ku yaaherize kugambira Saulo atyo, Saulo yaagira ati: Mwana wangye Daudi, buzimazima niiwe orikugamba? Saulo yaayeha eboroogo yaarira." 
1Samuel24:17 Yaagambira Daudi ati: Wankiza okuhikiirira, ahabw'okuba wanzimuurira ebirungi; haza nyowe nkuzimuriire ebibi." 
1Samuel24:18 Kandi eri izooba waayoreka butunu ku wantwaza gye, ahabw'okutaanyita, Nyakubaho akundekuriire." 
1Samuel24:19 Ebyo omuntu akaabugana omuzigu we, amureka, agyenda buhooro? N'ahabw'ekyo Nyakubaho akuzimuurire ebirungi ahabw'eki wankorera eri izooba." 
1Samuel24:20 Hati naamanyira kimwe buzimazima ku oriba omugabe, obugabe bwa Isiraeli bukahama ori aha ngoma." 
1Samuel24:21 Mbwenu nu, ndahira Nyakubaho, ku otaricwekyereza baijukuru bangye ntakiriho, okeebesa eiziina ryangye omu b'eka ya tata." 
1Samuel24:22 Daudi ekyo akirahira naakihamiza Saulo. Ebyo ku bihwa, Saulo ataaha; Daudi n'abashaija be bainamuka, baza omu kigo." 
1Samuel25:1 Ebiro ku byahingwireho, Samueli yaafa. Abaisiraeli boona baateeranira hamwe, baamucurira, baamuziika owe Raama. Ebyo ku byahwaire, Daudi yaimuka, yaaza omu ihamba rya Parani." 
1Samuel25:2 Omuri Maoni hakaba harimu omushaija ou emirimo ye y'okumutunga yaabaire eri Karumeeli. Ogwo mushaija akaba ari omutungi rugambwa, aine entaama enkumi ishatu n'embuzi rukumi. Akaba naashara ebyoya by'entaama ze Karumeeli." 
1Samuel25:3 Ogwo mushaija akaba naayetwa Nabali, n'omukazi we naayetwa Abigaili. Ogwo mukazi akaba ari omuntu orikwetegyereza, kandi murungi kureebwa, kwonka, iba ari omunyamwaga, kandi ow'emicwe mibi. Akaba ari ow'omuryango gwa Kalebu." 
1Samuel25:4 Daudi ku yaabaire ari omu ihamba, yaahurira ngu Nabali naashara entaama ze ebyoya." 
1Samuel25:5 Daudi nikwo kutuma abatsigazi ikumi, akabagira ati: Mwinamukye Karumeeli, muze owa Nabali, mumundamukize." 
1Samuel25:6 Haza omu kumuramutsya, mumugire muti: Kagire obusingye, ab'eka yaawe nibakagire obusingye, n'ebi otungire nibikagire obusingye." 
1Samuel25:7 Mpuriire ku oine abarikushara entaama ebyoya. Mbwenu abashumba baawe tubaire tubaine, titwine ki tubaitsize, kandi omwanya gwona ogu bamazire Karumeeli tibaine ki babuzire." 
1Samuel25:8 Na mbwenu buuza abatsigazi baawe, nibaija kukugambira. Naiwe nu, girira abatsigazi bangye embabazi, ahabw'okuba twaija kunu aha izooba ry'obugyenyi. Naakweshengyereza eki oraabe oine kyona okimpeere abairu baawe abo, naanye omwana waawe Daudi."
