1Samuel25:9 Abatsigazi ba Daudi ku baahikireyo byona baabigambira Nabali, nk'oku Daudi yaabibatumire, reero baategyereza." 
1Samuel25:10 Bwanyima Nabali yaagarukamu abagaragwa ba Daudi ati: Daudi niwe oha? Na mwene Yese niwe oha? Reeba, ebiro ebi hariho abahuuku baingi abarikucwa ahari bakama baabo." 
1Samuel25:11 Mbwenu nkirize ebyokurya byangye n'amaizi gangye n'enyama y'amatungo gu mbaagiire abashazi bangye b'ebyoya by'entaama, mbihe abantu bu ntarikumanya ei barikuruga?" 
1Samuel25:12 Abatsigazi ba Daudi nikwo kukuba bakagarukayo, byona bakabimuteekyerereza." 
1Samuel25:13 Daudi agira engabo ze ati: Buri mushaija ahagatire rurara ye. Nabo buri muntu yaahagatira rurara; na Daudi yaahagatira eye. Abashaija nka magana ana baagyenda bamukuratiire. Abandi magana abiri baatsigara aha bintu. 
1Samuel25:14 Omwe omu batsigazi agambira Abigaili muka Nabali ati: Reeba Daudi atumire entumwa, zaaruga omu ihamba kuramutsya mukama waitu, kwonka we yaazijuma." 
1Samuel25:15 Haza abo bashaija bakatubeera efura, tibaine ki baatwitsize, kandi titwine ki twakyenire omwanya gwona ogu twamazire nabo omu ishwa." 
1Samuel25:16 Ebiro bi twamazire nabo nituriisa entaama bakatubeera orugo rw'okuturinda nyomushana na nyekiro. 
1Samuel25:17 N'ahabw'ekyo okimanye oreebe eki oraakore, ahabw'okuba bo bamaririire kukora kubi mukama waitu n'ab'eka ye boona, kandi omuntu w'emicwe mibi nk'ogu, tihaine orikwemera kugamba nawe." 
1Samuel25:18 Abigaili atyo akoresa obwira, aihayo emigaati magana abiri n'endyanga ibiri za viino, n'enyama z'entaama itaano zookize, n'encuro itaano z'engano zikarangire, n'emigimba igana y'emizaabibu eyomire, n'embumburi magana abiri z'ebijuma by'emitiini, abita aha ndogoya." 
1Samuel25:19 Agambira abatsigazi be ati: Mugyende muunyebembeire, reeba naanye mbakuratiire. Kwonka takigambira Nabali iba." 
1Samuel25:20 Mbwenu ku yaabaire ari aha ndogoya naashuuma omu rukiizi rw'enshozi, yaareeba Daudi n'engabo ze nibamwizira; yaababugana." 
1Samuel25:21 Obwo Daudi akaba ayefuurize naagira ati: Buzimazima mpendekyeire busha kurinda ebintu by'ekyo kishaija byona, ebi kibaire kiine omu ihamba, hatagire na kimwe omu bi kitungire ekyabura. Mbwenu yanzimuurira ebibi ahabw'ebirungi bi mmukoreire." 
1Samuel25:22 Nyowe Daudi ku ndaahitsye omu kasheeshe ntakaitsire omuntu weena oyetwa omushaija, Ruhanga anyite." 
1Samuel25:23 Abigaili ku yaareebire Daudi, yaabakuka kuruga aha mbaraasi yaayenaga omu maisho ga Daudi, yaajuumara." 
1Samuel25:24 Yaamugwa omu maguru yaamweshengyereza ati: Mukama wangye, ekyo kicumuro obe niinye waakitura. Ninkweshengyereza, ikiriza nyowe omuzaana waawe ngire eki naakugambira, ohurire ebi ndaagambe." 
1Samuel25:25 Mukama wangye, reka kuta omutima ahari Nabali, ekishaija ky'emicwe mibi. Manya nk'oku eiziina rye riri, nawe nikwo ari. Nk'oku arikwetwa Nabali, nikwo obushema bumwijwire. Kwonka mukama wangye, nyowe omuzaana waawe abatsigazi bu waatumire tindabareebire." 
1Samuel25:26 Mbwenu, mukama wangye, nindahira Nyakubaho, kandi buso bwawe, nk'oku Nyakubaho akukirize okugwerwa orubanja rw'okusheesha eshagama, akakuzibira kwehoorera enzigu, reka abazigu baawe n'abandi boona abarikwenda kukukora kubi, mukama wangye, bagwerwe akagwe akarigwera Nabali." 
1Samuel25:27 Hati mukama wangye, nyowe omuzaana waawe ninkweshengyereza, oikirize ebi biconco bi naakutoijera, obigabire abatsigazi baawe abakugaragira." 
1Samuel25:28 Kandi ninkweshengyereza nyowe omuzaana waawe, onsaasire eki ncumwire. Manya, iwe mukama wangye, Nyakubaho tarikwija kubura kukwombekyera eka ehamire, ahabw'okuba noomurwanira engamba. Nikyo omu magara gaawe hatarigirira kibi ki baakureebamu." 
1Samuel25:29 Abantu ku bariimukiirira baakuhiiga nibenda kukwita, Mukama Ruhanga waawe aryarinda amagara gaawe gakomeirwe omu mutwaro gw'abahuriire, haza ag'abazigu baawe agajugute, nk'oku barekyera enjungu." 
1Samuel25:30 Reero Nyakubaho, iwe mukama wangye, ku arihikiiriza ebirungi bi yaakugambireho, yaakuhindura omutegyeki wa Isiraeli," 
1Samuel25:31 obwo mukama wangye torigira kyakureetera obujune, nari ekyakwefuuzisa, ngu osheesheire busha eshagama y'omuntu, nari ngu oyehooreire enzigu." 
1Samuel25:32 Daudi akagarukamu Abigaili ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli owaakwohereza kumbugana eri izooba naakasingye! 
1Samuel25:33 Osingizibwe ahabw'obwengye bwawe, kandi osiimwe ahabw'okunzibira eri izooba kugiibwaho orubanja rw'okusheesha eshagama, nkeehoorera enzigu." 
1Samuel25:34 Ninkurahira Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli owanzibira kukukora kubi. Kuri noogira ngu tiwaarahuka kumbugana, buzimazima bwaba nibwija kusheesha hatakiriho ekyeetwa omushaija omu bantu ba Nabali." 
1Samuel25:35 Mpaho Daudi ayakiira ebi ogwo mukazi yaamureetera, amugira ati: Yetaahire owaanyu n'obusingye. Reeba naahurira ebi wangambira kandi naikiriza eki wanshaba." 
1Samuel25:36 Abigaili atyo agarukayo owa Nabali, amushanga aine obugyenyi omuka nk'obw'omugabe, naayesiima. Ahabw'okushangwa asinzire munonga, Abigaili tagira ki amugambira, okuhitsya obu bwaseesire." 
1Samuel25:37 Reero omu kasheeshe, Nabali ku yaasinduukire, omukazi we yaamuteekyerereza ebyo byona. Onu yaagwa enshazi, yaakookoota, yaaba nk'ekiti." 
1Samuel25:38 Ku haahingwireho ebiro nka ikumi, Mukama yaamurangura, yaafa." 
1Samuel25:39 Daudi ku yaahuriire ngu Nabali afiire, yaagira ati: Nyakubaho owampoorera enzigu y'ekijumo ki Nabali anjumire, akanzibira nyowe omwiru we kukora kubi, naakasingye! Mbwenu Nyakubaho niwe yaazimuurira Nabali ekibi ki akozire. Bwanyima Daudi atuma ahari Abigaili, naamushaba kumushwera." 
1Samuel25:40 Abagaragwa ba Daudi ku baahikire Abigaili Karumeeli, baamugira bati: Daudi akututumireho kumukutwarira, ngu obe omukazi we." 
1Samuel25:41 N'onu abandaatuka, ainika omutwe aha nsi, abagira ati: Reeba, ndi omuzaana wa mukama wangye, ow'okunaabisa ebigyere by'abagaragwa be." 
1Samuel25:42 Abigaili tahwama, aimuka atemba endogoya, abazaana be bataano bamushendekyereza, agyenda akuratiire entumwa za Daudi, aba omukazi we." 
1Samuel25:43 Daudi kandi ashwera Ahinoamu owa Yezereeli. Bombi baba abakazi be. 
1Samuel25:44 Obwo Saulo, muhara we Mikaali muka Daudi, akaba yaamuhingiire Paluti mwene Laishi owa Galimu." 
1Samuel26:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Abaaziifu baija baashanga Saulo Gibea, baamugira bati: Reeba, Daudi ayesherekire omu kibungo kya Hakiila aha burugwa-izooba bwa Yeshimooni." 
1Samuel26:2 Saulo atyo aimuka, ashuuma omu ihamba rya Ziifu aine Abaisiraeli enkumi ishatu enkwata-ngabo, kuza kusherura Daudi omu ihamba rya Ziifu." 
1Samuel26:3 Saulo asiisira omu kibungo kya Hakiila, ekiri aha rubaju rw'omuhanda, aha burugwa-izooba bwa Yeshimooni. Daudi we aguma omu ihamba. Daudi ku yaareebire Saulo amukuratiire omu ihamba," 
1Samuel26:4 yaatuma entatsi, kandi yaahamiza kimwe ku Saulo aizire." 
1Samuel26:5 Bwanyima Daudi yaimuka, yaija, yaahika ahi Saulo ateire orusiisira, yaayetegyereza ahi Saulo abyami na Abuneeri mwene Neeri, omukuru w'eihe rye. Saulo akaba abyami ahagati y'orusiisira, ensiisira z'abamahe zimwehinguriize." 
1Samuel26:6 Bwanyima Daudi yaagira Ahimeleki Omuhiiti, na Abishaayi murumuna wa Yoabu mwene Zeruuya, ati: N'oha oraagyende naanye omu rusiisira ahi Saulo ari? Abishaayi amugarukamu ati: Niinye ndaagyende naiwe." 
1Samuel26:7 Nyekiro Daudi na Abishaayi baahika ahu engabo ziri, baashanga Saulo abyami ahagati y'orusiisira, eicumu rye ritsimbire aha mushego, Abuneeri n'ab'eihe babyami bamwehinguririize." 
1Samuel26:8 Abishaayi agira Daudi ati: Eri izooba Ruhanga omuzigu waawe yaamukuta omu ngaro. Hati ka mmuteere eicumu, rimwogyemu rikwate eitaka, ntamuteire rya kabiri." 
1Samuel26:9 Kwonka Daudi aretsya Abishaayi ati: Otamwita! Mbwenu n'oha owaakubangira omukono ou Nyakubaho yaasiigire amajuta, atagire rubanja?" 
1Samuel26:10 Daudi ayongyera agira ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho, Nyakubaho niwe arimweitira, nari eizooba rye rihikye afe, nainga aryaza aha rugamba, agweyo." 
1Samuel26:11 Rubuuza, nyowe okubangira omukono ou Nyakubaho yaasiigire amajuta! Kureka hati ihaho eicumu rimuri aha mushego n'enyungu y'amaizi; haza tugyende." 
1Samuel26:12 Daudi aiha eicumu n'enyungu y'amaizi aha mushego gwa Saulo, batyo bagyenda. Haza tihagira waabareeba, nari owaakimanya, nobu yaakuba owaimutsya omutwe. Manya boona bakaba bagwejegyereire kimwe, Nyakubaho abagwejegyeize obutasisiimuka." 
1Samuel26:13 Bwanyima Daudi akambuka, yaaza seeri, yaayemerera hare aha mutwe gw'orushozi aheetangarikire munonga nabo." 
1Samuel26:14 Reero yaayeta ab'omu ihe na Abuneeri mwene Neeri ati: Ya iwe Abuneeri! Hoona shi toyetaba? Abuneeri amugarukamu ati: Ori oha iwe orikweta omugabe? 
1Samuel26:15 Na Daudi agira Abuneeri ati: Tori omushaija emanzi? Mbwenu n'oha ori nkaiwe omuri Isiraeli? Ahabw'enki shi otaarinda mukama waawe omugabe? Reeba, haaba hariho owaaba aizire kumwita." 
1Samuel26:16 Eki waakora ti kirungi. Nindahira Nyakubaho, ku mwena mushemereire kufa ahabw'okuba timwarinda mukama waanyu, ou Nyakubaho yaasiigire amajuta. Mbwenu reeba eicumu ry'omugabe n'enyungu y'amaizi, ebyaba bimuri aha mushego, ahi biri." 
1Samuel26:17 Saulo amanya eiraka ku riri erya Daudi; amubuuza ati: Mwana wangye Daudi, niiwe orikugamba? Daudi amugarukamu ati: Nyakusinga mukama wangye, niinye ndikugamba." 
1Samuel26:18 Agumizamu ati: Mukama wangye, nompiigira ki, nyowe omwiru waawe? Nkozire ki? Ncumwire ki?" 
1Samuel26:19 Mbwenu Nyakusinga mukama wangye, ninkweshengyereza, ohurire eki nyowe omwiru waawe ndikukugambira. Ku araabe ari Nyakubaho onteeraine naiwe, naikirize mmuhongyere. Kwonka ku baraabe bari abantu, Nyakubaho naakabaitse omujumo. Ahabw'okuba eri izooba bancwa aha butaka bw'empungurano obu Nyakubaho yaahaire abantu be, nibangira bati: Irooko, oramye baaruhanga abandi!" 
1Samuel26:20 Mbwenu nu, otaikiriza eshagama yangye kusheeshekyera aha butaka bw'abanyamahanga, ahi Nyakubaho atari, ahabw'okuba iwe omugabe wa Isiraeli oizire kumpiiga nyowe omukukuni, nk'orikuhiiga endahi omu nshozi." 
1Samuel26:21 Saulo amugarukamu ati: Mwana wangye Daudi, nkozire kubi. Mbwenu garuka, tinkikukora kubi bundi; ahabw'okuba eri izooba waareeba ku amagara gangye gari ekintu kikuru. Manya nyowe mbaire ekifamutima, naahaba munonga." 
1Samuel26:22 Daudi amugarukamu ati: Nyakusinga, eicumu ryawe ndiri. Ragiira omwe aha batsigazi baawe aije aha, aryakiire." 
1Samuel26:23 Manya Nyakubaho azimuurira buri muntu nk'okuhikiirira kwe n'obwesigwa bwe oku biri. Eri izooba yaaba akundekuriire; kwonka nyowe tinaakwita, iwe ou yaasiigire amajuta." 
1Samuel26:24 Reeba, nk'oku eri izooba naareeba ku amagara gaawe gari ekintu kikuru, n'agangye gabe nikwo gaaba omu maisho ga Mukama; ankize enaku zoona." 
1Samuel26:25 Bwanyima Saulo agira Daudi ati: Mwana wangye Daudi, Ruhanga akuhe omusha! Okore ebintu bikuru, haza bikugyendere gye. Daudi atyo agyenda, na Saulo agarukayo owe." 
1Samuel27:1 Bwanyima Daudi akateekateeka ati: Obundi Saulo aryarugaho anyite. Haakiri mpungire omu nsi y'Abafilisiti; Saulo abe atakimpiiga bundi omuri Isiraeli yoona, ntyo mmukire." 
1Samuel27:2 Daudi nikwo kwimuka, akaimuura n'abashaija be magana mukaaga, akagyenda akeehongyera Akishi mwene Maoki omugabe wa Gaati." 
1Samuel27:3 Daudi akatuura na Akishi omuri Gaati, we n'abashaija be, buri muntu n'ab'eka ye, na Daudi n'abakazi be bombi Ahinoamu owa Yezereeli, na Abigaili owa Karumeeli, owabaire ari muka Nabali." 
1Samuel27:4 Ku baakigambiire Saulo ngu Daudi ahungire, yaaza Gaati, Saulo tiyaagaruka kumuhiiga bundi." 
1Samuel27:5 Bwanyima na Daudi yaagira Akishi ati: Ku oraabe nonsiima, mpa omwanya omuri rumwe aha ndembo z'omuri egi nsi, mbe nimwo naatura. Manya nyowe omwiru waawe tindikureeba eki nshemereire kutuura naiwe omugabe omu rurembo rukuru." 
1Samuel27:6 Eryo izooba Akishi yaamuha Zikulaagi. Nikyo Zikulaagi yaagumiire eri ey'abagabe ba Yuda okuhitsya eri izooba. 
1Samuel27:7 Ebiro bi Daudi yaamazire atwire omu nsi y'Abafilisiti bikahika omwaka gumwe n'ameezi ana. 
1Samuel27:8 Mbwenu Daudi n'engabo ze bakahurura, baateera Abageshuri n'Abagiruzi n'Abaamaleki, ira abaabaire batwire omu nsi erikwiha Telamu ekahika Shuuri n'aha mwatano gwa Misiri." 
1Samuel27:9 Daudi egyo nsi yaagicwekyereza, tiyaagitsigamu mushaija nari omukazi ohuriire. Kureka yaanyaga entaama n'ente n'endogoya n'engamira n'ebijwaro, bwanyima yaagaruka owa Akishi." 
1Samuel27:10 Akishi ku yaabaire amubuuza ati: Eri izooba waateera hi? Daudi agarukamu ati: Naateera Negebu eya Yuda, nari ati: Negebu ey'Abayerameeli, nainga ati: Naateera Negebu ey'Abakeeni." 
1Samuel27:11 Kandi Daudi tararokoire mushaija n'omwe nari omukazi, ahabw'okuteekateeka ati: Batakaatwara enkuru Gaati, bakatugambaho bati: Daudi akozire ati n'ati. Haza yaaguma naatwaza atyo omwanya gwona ogu yaamazire atwire omu nsi y'Abafilisiti." 
1Samuel27:12 Akishi yaayesiga Daudi naagira ati: Naija kuguma ari omugaragwa wangye, ahabw'okuba ayeyangisiize kimwe beene waabo Abaisiraeli." 
1Samuel28:1 Omu biro ebyo, Abafilisiti bakahuruza amahe gaabo kurwanisa Abaisiraeli. Akishi yaagira Daudi ati: Okimanyire kimwe ku iwe n'abashaija baawe murikwija kuhurura naanye muri omu mahe gaitu." 
1Samuel28:2 Daudi agarukamu Akishi ati: Eego! Aho niho oraamanyire eki nyowe omwiru waawe ndikubaasa kukora. 
1Samuel28:3 Mbwenu obwo Samueli akaba yaafiire, Abaisiraeli boona baamucuriire, kandi baamuziikire Raama omu rurembo rw'owaabo. Na Saulo akaba yaaherize kubinga omu nsi abarikugambisa emizimu n'abarogi." 
1Samuel28:4 Abafilisiti bakeeteerana, baija baasiisira Shuneemu; Na Saulo yaateerana Abaisiraeli boona, baasiisira Giliboa." 
1Samuel28:5 Saulo ku yaareebire eihe ry'Abafilisiti, yaatiina munonga, yaatetema." 
1Samuel28:6 Kandi ku yaayehanuurize ahari Nyakubaho, Nyakubaho tiyaamugarukamu, yaaba mu birooto, nari omu ndagu nainga omu barangi." 
1Samuel28:7 Saulo nikwo kugira abagaragwa be ati: Munsherurire omukazi orikuhinza abazimu, mbone kuza kumwehanuuzaho. Abagaragwa be baamugarukamu bati: Reeba, omuri Endori hariyo orikuragura." 
1Samuel28:8 Saulo ayehindura okundi, ajwara ebindi bijwaro, agyenda ashendekyereziibwe abashaija babiri. Ow'ogwo mukazi bahikayo nyekiro. Saulo amugira ati: Ndaguriza nompindiza omuzimu, haza onyetere ou ndaakugambire." 
1Samuel28:9 Omukazi amugarukamu ati: Buzimazima noomanya eki Saulo yaakozire, ku yaacwire omu nsi abaraguzi n'abarogi. Mbwenu nu, nontegyera ki ngu baanyite?" 
1Samuel28:10 Saulo amurahira Nyakubaho ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho, eki kintu ku oraakikore torikwija kufubirwa." 
1Samuel28:11 Mpaho omukazi amubuuza ati: Mbwenu nkwetere oha? Onu amugarukamu ati: Onyetere Samueli. 
1Samuel28:12 Ogwo mukazi ku areeba Samueli, aborooga munonga, agira Saulo ati: Wambeihera ki? Haza kunu ori Saulo." 
1Samuel28:13 Omugabe amugarukamu ati: Otatiina! Mbwenu nooreeba ki? Onu amugira ati: Nindeeba ruhanga naaruga omu itaka. 
1Samuel28:14 Saulo ayongyera abuuza ogwo mukazi ati: Naashusha ki? Onu ati: N'omushaija mukuru. Niwe arikutuuhuukayo ayehumbikire omunagiro. Saulo atyo amanya ku ari Samueli; ainama amutangirira. 
1Samuel28:15 Reero Samueli agira Saulo ati: Wandabanisizamu ki, okaanyiha okuzimu? Saulo amugarukamu ati: Nshobeirwe munonga, ahabw'okuba Abafilisiti bantengyeire orugamba, kandi Ruhanga andugireho, takingarukamu, yaaba mu barangi nari omu birooto. Nikyo naakwetera, ngu ongambire eki ndaakore." 
1Samuel28:16 Samueli amugarukamu ati: Mbwenu shi nombuuriza ki Nyakubaho yaakutsigireho, yaabaire omuzigu waawe?" 
1Samuel28:17 Nyakubaho akugizire nk'oku yangambiise. Manya Nyakubaho akucwire aha bugabe, yaabuha mutaahi waawe Daudi." 
1Samuel28:18 Ahabw'okuba okanga kukora eki Nyakubaho yaakuragiire, waayanga kumumara ekiniga ki yaabaire ainiire Abaamaleki, nikyo eri izooba Mukama yaakugirira atyo." 
1Samuel28:19 Ekindi, Nyakubaho iwe n'Abaisiraeli naija kubahayo omu mikono y'Abafilisiti, kandi nyencakare iwe na batabani baawe nimwija kunshanga ei ndi; haza Nyakubaho arekurire Abafilisiti eihe ry'Abaisiraeli, barisingure." 
1Samuel28:20 Mpaho Saulo ahonaaho agwa aha nsi arambiire, aitsirwe obwoba ahabw'ebi Samueli yaagamba. Amaani gaamuhweramu kimwe, ahabw'okuba akaba arengize eizooba kandi amazire ekiro kyona ataine k'okurya ku atamiire." 
1Samuel28:21 Bwanyima ogwo mukazi yaija ahi Saulo ari, yaamugira ati: Reeba, nyowe omuzaana waawe naakuhurira, naayoga amagara, naakora eki wandagiira." 
1Samuel28:22 Mbwenu naiwe onyikirize, nyowe omuzaana waawe nkureetere ak'okurya, orye, obone kugira agagyenda." 
1Samuel28:23 Saulo ayanga agira ati: Tindikurya! Kwonka abagaragwa be n'ogwo mukazi bamwehanangiriza, arugaho aikiriza ebi baamugambira. Atyo aimuka aha nsi, ashutama aha kitanda." 
1Samuel28:24 Ogwo mukazi ashangwa owe aineyo enyana kaberera, agiita ahonaaho. Reero aihayo esaano y'engano, agikanda, agibumburika agiteekamu emigaati etatumbisiibwe," 
1Samuel28:25 abireetera Saulo n'abagaragwa be, barya. Ku baheza, baimuka ekyo kiro, bagyenda." 
1Samuel29:1 Mbwenu Abafilisiti bakateeranira Afeki amahe gaabo goona, Abaisiraeli nabo baasiirira Yezereeli haihi n'eiziba ryaho." 
1Samuel29:2 Bakama b'Abafilisiti ku baabaire nibahurura n'engabo zaabo z'ebimbuuro bya igana-igana na rukumi-rukumi, Daudi n'abashaija be hamwe na Akishi nabo nibahurura nibabaija enyima," 
1Samuel29:3 abakuru b'amahe g'Abafilisiti baabuuza bati: Beitu aba Baheburaayo nibakora ki aha? Akishi yaagarukamu abakuru b'amahe g'Abafilisiti ati: Ogu ti Daudi omugaragwa wa Saulo omugabe wa Isiraeli, omazire naanye omwaka n'okukiraho? Okwiha obu yaanyehongyera n'okuhitsya eri izooba, tinkareebaga aine eki anshobeize." 
1Samuel29:4 Kwonka abakuru b'amahe g'Abafilisiti baagwerwa kubi Akishi, baamugira bati: Garurayo ogu mushaija, agarukye omu kirorero ki wamuhaire. Titurikwenda ku ahurura naitwe, atakaahika aha rugamba akatwehindukiriza. Noogira ngu ogu mushaija akaagarukana ata na mukama we, yaaba atamutwariire mitwe y'abantu ba kunu?" 
1Samuel29:5 Ogu tiwe Daudi, ou baayeshongoire nibaihaihana nibazina bati: Saulo aitsire enkumi, Daudi yaita obukumi?" 
1Samuel29:6 Akishi nikwo kweta Daudi akamugira ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho, otuura ori omwesigwa. Ahabwangye nindeeeba ngu kihikire, iwe okuhurura naanye aha rugamba, tukatabaaruka kumwe; ahabw'okuba okwiha obu onyijaho n'okuhitsya eri izooba tinkareebaga eki onshobeize. Kwonka shi abategyeki abandi tibarikukwenda." 
1Samuel29:7 Mbwenu nu, irooko ogarukyeyo. Ogyende n'obusingye, orekye kugwisa kubi bakama b'Abafilisiti." 
1Samuel29:8 Daudi agira Akishi ati: Beitu shi, ncumwire ki? Mbwenu naaba kukugaragira n'okuhitsya eri izooba nyowe omwiru waawe, oine eki orandeebireho ekyakunzibira kurwanisa abazigu baawe, nyakusinga omugabe?" 
1Samuel29:9 Akishi agarukamu Daudi ati: Nimmanya ku ori mwere omu maisho gangye nka maraika wa Ruhanga. Kwonka shi, abakuru b'amahe g'Abafilisiti baagira bati: tarikuhurura naitwe." 
1Samuel29:10 Mbwenu ogurukye kare omu kasheeshe n'abairu ba mukama waawe abu waizire nabo. Haza ku buraasheeshe buti, mugyende ahonaaho." 
1Samuel29:11 Daudi atyo n'abashaija be baimutsya orugyendo kare omu kasheeshe, bagaruka omu nsi y'Abafilisiti. Abafilisiti nabo bainamuka nibaza Yezereeli." 
1Samuel30:1 Daudi n'abashaija be baahika Zikulaagi aha kiro kya kashatu, baashanga Abaamaleki baateire Negebu na Zikulaagi; baasingwire Zikulaagi kandi baagyokize." 
1Samuel30:2 Bakaba banyagire abakazi n'abantu boona abagitwiremu abato n'abakuru. Bataitsire muntu n'omwe, kureka okubatwara, bakeegyendera." 
1Samuel30:3 Daudi n'abashaija be ku baahikire omuri orwo rurembo, baashanga barwokize, kandi abakazi baabo na batabani baabo na bahara baabo banyagirwe." 
1Samuel30:4 Daudi n'abu yaabaire aine baaborooga, baacura, okuhitsya obu baabuzire agarira." 
1Samuel30:5 Baka Daudi bombi, Ahinoamu owa Yezereeli na Abigaili owaabaire ari muka Nabali owa Karumeeli, nabo bakaba banyagirwe." 
1Samuel30:6 Reero Daudi yaagira obujune bwingi munonga, ahabw'okuba abantu bakagira ngu nibaija kumuteera amabaare. Manya abantu boona bakaba basambisiirwe munonga, buri omwe naasaasibwa batabani be na bahara be." 
1Samuel30:7 Bwanyima Daudi agira Abiyataari, omuhongyerezi mwene Ahimeleki ati: Ndeetera efodi. N'onu yaagimureetera." 
1Samuel30:8 Mpaho Daudi yaayehanuuza ahari Nyakubaho ati: Ngyende mbingire abo babisha? Ebyo niinyija kubahambya? Nyakubaho yaamugarukamu ati: Eego, bakurate! Buzimazima noija kubahambya, ojune enkwatwa." 
1Samuel30:9 Daudi atyo ahurura n'abashaija magana mukaaga abu yaabaire aine. Ku bahika aha kagyera Besori, hagira abaatsigara aho." 
1Samuel30:10 Daudi we agumizamu ababingire, aine abashaija magana ana. Amagana abiri agaaruhire gakabura agambuka akagyera Besori, gaatsigara enyima." 
1Samuel30:11 Reero abashaija bu Daudi yaabaire aine baashanga Omunyamisiri omu ishwa, baamureetera Daudi. Baamuha emigaati, yaarya, baamuha n'amaizi, yaanywa." 
1Samuel30:12 Kandi baamwatsiza omwate aha mbumburi y'ebijuma by'emitiini, baamuha n'emigimba ebiri y'emizaabibu eyomire. Ku yaaherize kubirya, yaagarukwamu amaani, ahabw'okuba akaba amazire amazooba ashatu n'ebiro bishatu ataine kantu koona aku ariire nari aku anywaire." 
1Samuel30:13 Bwanyima Daudi yaamubuuza ati: Ori ow'oha, kandi nooruga hi? Onu amugarukamu ati: Ndi omutsigazi Omunyamisiri, omuhuuku w'Omuamaleki. Mbwenu mmazire ebiro bishatu mukama wangye antsigireho, ahabw'okuba ndwaire." 
1Samuel30:14 Tubaire tuteire Negebu ey'Abakereti n'ey'Abaayuda na Negebu eya Kalebu, twayotsya Zikulaagi." 
1Samuel30:15 Daudi amugira ati: Mbwenu okaanyebembera ompitsya ezo ngabo? Onu amugarukamu ati: Ondahire Ruhanga, ku otarikwija kuunyita nari kundeebya, okandekurira mukama wangye; haza obwo niinyija kukutwara nkuhitsye ezo ngabo." 
1Samuel30:16 Mbwenu ku yaamuhikizeyo, baashanga abo babisha bajanjaire hoona, nibarya, nibanywa, nibataagurira ahabw'eminyago mingi munonga ei baanyagire omu nsi y'Abafilisiti n'omu y'Abaayuda." 
1Samuel30:17 Daudi yaabaita okwiha omu rwitawaabo, okuhitsya omu mwabazyo gw'eizooba ryakuratsireho. Tihaagira n'omwe owaahonokaho; kureka abatsigazi maagana ana, abaatembire engamira bakahunga." 
1Samuel30:18 Daudi yaagarura abantu boona n'ebintu byona ebi Abaamaleki baabaire banyagire, yaajuna n'abakazi be bombi." 
1Samuel30:19 Tihaagira kintu kyona ekyaburaho, yaaba kikye nari kihango, yaaba batabani baabo nari bahara baabo, yaaba minyago nari ekintu kyona eki baabaire batwaire; byona Daudi yaabigarura." 
1Samuel30:20 Daudi yaataho n'okunyaga amasyo gaabo goona ag'embuzi n'ag'entaama n'ag'ente. Engabo ze zaagafunya zimwebembeire niziyogoora ziti: Egi n'eminyago ya Daudi. 
1Samuel30:21 Bwanyima Daudi ahika abashaija bari magana abiri, abaaruhire bakabura agamukurata, bakatsigara aha Kagyera Besori. Nabo barugayo, baija kumubugana n'abu yaabaire aine. Daudi ku yaabahikire, yaabaramutsya." 
1Samuel30:22 Reero abantu ebihaze abataine buntu ab'omu ngabo ezaagyenzire nawe, baagira bati: Titurikwija kubagana nabo eminyago ei tutungire; ahabw'okuba tibarahurwire naitwe; kureka buri omwe atware omukazi we n'abaana be, agyende." 
1Samuel30:23 Kwonka Daudi yaabagira ati: Beene waitu, timurikwija kutwaza mutyo ebintu bi Nyakubaho atuhaire. Reeba, aturinzire, yaaturekurira ababisha baatuteire, twabasingura." 
1Samuel30:24 Mbwenu nimugira ngu hariho orikwija kwikiriza eki murikugamba? Manya nk'oku ogiire aha rugamba araabagane, n'otsigaire aha bintu nikwo araabagane; boona nibaija kwinganisa." 
1Samuel30:25 Okwiha obwo n'okuhitsya eri izooba, Daudi yaakihindura ekyatairweho kandi ekiragiro ky'okuguma nikikuratirwa omuri Isiraeli." 
1Samuel30:26 Daudi ku yaahikire Zikulaagi, yaakora ahari egyo minyago, yaagitwekyera bagyenzi be abakuru b'Abaayuda, naabatumaho ati: Eki n'ekiconco ki naabatwekyera, ekirugire aha bintu bi tunyagire abazigu ba Nyakubaho." 
1Samuel30:27 Atyo egyo minyago yaagitwekyera ab'omu Beteli, ab'omuri Ramoti eya Negebu, ab'omuri Yatiri," 
1Samuel30:28 ab'omuri Aroeri, ab'omuri Siifumooti, ab'omuri Eshitemoa," 
1Samuel30:29 ab'omuri Rakali, ab'omu ndembo z'Abayerameeli, n'ez'Abaakeeni," 
1Samuel30:30 ab'omuri Horuma, ab'omuri Borashani, ab'omuri Ataki," 
1Samuel30:31 n'ab'omuri Heburooni n'ab'omu myanya yoona ei Daudi n'engabo ze baazengyereiremu. 
1Samuel31:1 Abafilisiti bakarwanisa Abaisiraeli, Abaisiraeli baabahunga, Abafilisiti baabaitira omu rushozi rwa Giliboa." 
1Samuel31:2 Kandi Abafilisiti baahambya Saulo n'abatabani, baita Yonataani na Abinadabu na Malikishua, batabani ba Saulo." 
1Samuel31:3 Orugamba Saulo rwamuremesa. Abarasi baamugwaho, baamuhutaaza munonga." 
1Samuel31:4 Saulo nikwo kugira omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye ati: Syorayo rurara yaawe ogincumitise; abo batashazirwe batakaija, bakancumita, bakanshungisa. Kwonka omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye kimugumira, ahabw'okuba akatiina munonga. Saulo nikwo kukwata rurara ye ahabwe, akagyetungaho." 
1Samuel31:5 Omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye ku yaareebire Saulo yaafa, nawe yaayetunga ahari rurara ye, bombi baafa." 
1Samuel31:6 Saulo yaafa atyo n'abatabani bonshatu n'omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye n'abashaija be. Boona baafa eizooba rimwe. 
1Samuel31:7 Abaisiraeli abaabaire bari seeri y'oruhanga, n'abaabaire bari seeri ya Yorudaani, ku baareebire Abaisiraeli baahunga, na Saulo n'abatabani baafa, baaruga omu ndembo zaabo, baahunga; Abafilisiti baija, baazituuramu." 
1Samuel31:8 Omu kasheeshe kaakuratsireho, Abafilisiti ku baizire kucwijura abu baitsire, baashanga Saulo n'abatabani bonshatu bagwire omu rushozi rwa Giliboa." 
1Samuel31:9 Baamutemaho omutwe, baamucwijura eby'okurwanisa; kandi baayohereza entumwa omu nsi y'Abafilisiti yoona kubuzya enkuru nungi omu ndaaro z'ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa, n'omu bantu." 
1Samuel31:10 Eby'okurwanisa bye baabita omu ndaaro ya Ashitarooti, n'omutumbi gwe baaguhanika aha rugo rwa Betishani." 
1Samuel31:11 Abatuuzi b'omuri Yabeshi-Gileadi ku baahuriire oku Abafilisiti bagizire Saulo," 
1Samuel31:12 abashaija baayo boona amamanzi baimuka, baagyenda ekiro kyona, baahanura aha rugo rwa Betishani omutumbi gwe n'ey'abatabani, baagaruka Yabeshi. Ku baagihikizeyo, baagyotsya." 
1Samuel31:13 Bwanyima baatwara amagufa gaabo, baagaziika Yabeshi ahansi y'omunyinya; kandi baamara ebiro mushanju nibeesiibyakwo." 
2Samuel1:1 Saulo ku yaabaire arugire kufa, Daudi yaatabaaruka naaruga kwita Abaamaleki, yaamara Zikulaagi ebiro bibiri." 
2Samuel1:2 Aha kiro kya kashatu, yaayecura omushaija orikuruga omu rusiisira rwa Saulo, ajwaire emyenda etaagukire, aine eitaka omu mutwe. Ku yaahikire Daudi, yaajuumara ahansi, yaamutangirira." 
2Samuel1:3 Daudi yaamubuuza ati: Nooruga hi? Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Naacwa omu rusiisira rw'Abaisiraeli. 
2Samuel1:4 Daudi ayongyera amubuuza ati: Bibaire bita? Ngambira. N'onu amugira ati: Abantu bahungire aha rugamba, kandi abafiire ni baingi. Saulo n'omutabani Yonataani nabo bafiire." 
2Samuel1:5 Reero Daudi abuuza ogwo mutsigazi waamubikira ati: Omanysiibwe ki ku Saulo n'omutabani Yonataani bafiire? 
2Samuel1:6 Ogwo mutsigazi waamubikira amugira ati: Ku mbaire ningyenda, naahika omu Rushozi rwa Giliboa, naashanga Saulo ayegamiire eicumu rye, kandi ago magingo ab'ebigaari n'ab'aha mbaraasi baamufundiirize." 
2Samuel1:7 Saulo ku agarwire ati amaisho enyima, yandeeba, yaanyeta. Naanye naamugarukamu nti: Ndi aha, mukama wangye." 
2Samuel1:8 Reero ambuuza ati: Ori oha? Mmugarukamu nti: Ndi Omuamaleki. 
2Samuel1:9 Nawe angira ati: Ija ompikye, onyite; ahabw'okuba naaraba, kwonka tinkakabire." 
2Samuel1:10 Naanye nyija mmwemerera aha rubaju mmucumita, mmwita, ahabw'okuba mmanyiire kimwe ku atakiri w'okukira, yaaherize kugwa. Bwanyima mmwiha ekirunga aha mutwe n'engoro ei abaire ajwaire aha mukono. Mbwenu mbibi naabikureetera, mukama wangye." 
2Samuel1:11 Mpaho Daudi akwata ebi ajwaire, abitaagura, n'abu yaabaire aine boona bakora batyo." 
2Samuel1:12 Bacura, baborooga, beesiibyakwo okuhitsya omu mwabazyo, ahabwa Saulo na Yonataani omutabani, n'ahabw'Abaisiraeli abantu ba Nyakubaho kumarwaho rurara." 
2Samuel1:13 Bwanyima Daudi abuuza omutsigazi waamubikira ati: Ori owa nkahi? N'onu amugarukamu ati: Ndi mutabani w'omunyaihanga Omuamaleki, owaashuuhuukiire kunu." 
2Samuel1:14 Daudi amugira ati: Mbwenu shi kikurugiire hi, iwe okutatiina, okaita ou Nyakubaho yaasiigire amajuta?" 
2Samuel1:15 Daudi atyo ayeta omwe aha batsigazi, amugira ati: Irooko omugurukire omwite. N'onu amuteera, amwita." 
2Samuel1:16 Daudi amugira ati: Eshagama yaawe ebe niiwe yaatukurira; ahabw'okuba akanwa kaawe niko kaakushinja, obu waagira oti: Niinye nyitsire ou Nyakubaho yaasiigire amajuta." 
2Samuel1:17 Bwanyima Daudi akacurira Saulo na Yonataani omutabani. 
2Samuel1:18 Kandi yaaragiira ku okucura kwe kwegyesibwa Abaayuda. Na mbwenu kuhandiikirwe omu kitabo kya Yashari. 
2Samuel1:19 Daudi akacura ati: Ai bambe, Isiraeli, abakuhaisa ekitiinwa baitiirwe omu bibungo byawe! Ebishi amamanzi gagwire!" 
2Samuel1:20 Mutakigambira omuri Gaati, kandi mutakibuzya omu mihanda ya Ashikelooni; abaishiki b'Abafilisiti bakeesiima, bahara b'Abatashazirwe bakeehimbisa." 
2Samuel1:21 Imwe bibungo bya Giliboa 'mwe, mutarirondwaho orume, nobu kwakuba okuguubwaho enjura; emisiri yaanyu egume eteerize, Ahabw'okuba okwo engabo z'amamanzi niyo zihagariziibwe, n'eya Saulo ekabura kusiigwa amajuta." 
2Samuel1:22 Ku baabaire baba nibagwisaho ebikaaka, kandi nibaita abazigu, obuta bwa Yonataani bukaba butagaruka nyima; na rurara ya Saulo ekaba etahembya." 
2Samuel1:23 Ai bambe, Saulo na Yonataani abakundwa kandi abarungi! Tibarataine bakihuriire, nobu kwakuba okutaana nibafa. Bakaba bakiza empungu obwira, bakiza entare amaani." 
2Samuel1:24 Imwe bahara ba Isiraeli 'mwe, nimucurire Saulo, owaabaire abajweka emyenda ya karari erikunekaneka, akahunda ebijwaro byanyu ezaabu." 
2Samuel1:25 Ebishi amamanzi gagwire omu rugamba, Yonataani yaitirwa omu bibungo byawe!" 
2Samuel1:26 Ebyo ga wansaasa, Yonataani mwene tata! Buzimazima okaba onshemeza munonga; Rukundo yaawe ahariinye ekaba neetangaaza, neekira rukundo y'abakazi." 
2Samuel1:27 Ebishi amamanzi gagwire; N'eby'okurwanisa byabo bicwekyereire! 
2Samuel2:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Daudi yaayehanuuza ahari Nyakubaho ati: Ngire orurembo rw'omu za Yuda oru naazamu? Nyakubaho amugira ati: Irooko ozeyo. Daudi amubuuza ati: Nze omuri ruuha? Onu ati: Oze Heburooni." 
2Samuel2:2 Daudi atyo azayo n'abakazi be bombi, Ahinoamu owa Yezereeli na Abigaili owaabaire ari muka Nabali owa Karumeeli." 
2Samuel2:3 Kandi Daudi agyenda n'abashaija be abu yaabaire aine, buri omwe n'ab'eka ye. Batyo batuura omu birorero bya Heburooni." 
2Samuel2:4 Ago magingo Abaayuda baija basiiga Daudi amajuta kuba omugabe w'ab'omuryango gwabo. Mbwenu ku baagambiire Daudi ngu Abaayabeshi Gileadi baziikire Saulo," 
2Samuel2:5 Daudi yaabatumaho entumwa naabagira ati: Nyakubaho abahe omugisha, ahabw'okuba mweyorekire ku muri abeesigwa ahari Saulo mukama waanyu, mwamuziika!" 
2Samuel2:6 Mbwenu Nyakubaho naakabakunde, atarikubahararuka, kandi agume naabakorera eby'obwesigwa! Naanye ndyabazimuurira ebirungi ahabw'ekyo kintu ki mukozire." 
2Samuel2:7 N'ahabw'ekyo muhame, mube emanzi. Manya nobu Saulo mukama waanyu afiire, kwonka ab'omuryango gwa Yuda bansiigire amajuta kuba omugabe waabo." 
2Samuel2:8 Omu biro ebyo Abuneeri mwene Neeri, omukuru w'eihe rya Saulo, akatwara Ishibosheti mwene Saulo, yaamwambutsya Yorudaani, yaamuta Mahanaimu." 
2Samuel2:9 Yaamuhindura omugabe wa Gileadi, na Ashuri na Yezereeli na Efuraimu na Benyamiini na Isiraeli yoona." 
2Samuel2:10 Ishibosheti mwene Saulo obu atandika kutegyeka Isiraeli, akaba aine emyaka makumi ana y'obukuru; yaamara emyaka ebiri ari aha ngoma. Kwonka ab'omuryango gwa Yuda baaguma bari ahari Daudi." 
2Samuel2:11 Ebiro bi Daudi yaamazire ari omugabe omuri Heburooni naateegyeka ab'omuryango gwa Yuda, bikaba emyaka mushanju n'ameezi mukaaga." 
2Samuel2:12 Abuneeri mwene Neeri, hamwe n'Abagaragwa ba Ishibosheti mwene Saulo bakaruga Mahanaimu, baaza Gibeoni." 
2Samuel2:13 Na Yoabu mwene Zeruuya n'abagaragwa ba Daudi baahurura, baabugabuganira nabo aha kiyanja kya Gibeoni, baateeka enteeko, abamwe seeri yaakyo, n'abandi seenu." 
2Samuel2:14 Abuneeri yaagira Yoabu ati: Reka abatsigazi baije baturwanire omu maisho. Yoabu amugarukamu ati: Nibaije. 
2Samuel2:15 Batyo baimuka nk'oku omubaro gwabo guri: Ikumi na babiri b'aha rubaju rwa Benyamiini na Ishibosheti mwene Saulo; na ikumi na babiri b'omu bagaragwa ba Daudi. 
2Samuel2:16 Buri omwe yaagwa mugyenzi we omu maraka, baatimburana rurara omu mbaju, boona baagwera kimwe gangari. Ogwo mwanya guri haihi na Gibeoni; nikyo gwayeteirwe Helukatihazurimu." 
2Samuel2:17 Eryo izooba orugamba rwaba orw'amaani munonga. Abuneeri n'abashaija ba Isiraeli baasingurwa abagaragwa ba Daudi. 
2Samuel2:18 Batabani ba Zeeruuya bonshatu, Yoabu, Abishaayi na Asaheeli bakaba bari omuri orwo rugamba, kandi Asaheeli akaba nairuka nk'esirabo." 
2Samuel2:19 Asaheeli atyo abinga Abuneeri. Mbwenu ku yaamubingire, tiyaagira bu amutaishuka." 
2Samuel2:20 Bwanyima Abuneeri yaagarura amaisho enyima, yaamugira ati: Niiwe Asaheeli? Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Niinye." 
2Samuel2:21 Abuneeri amugira ati: Kiikama, otoore aha rubaju rwa buryo, nari orwa bumosho, okwate omwe ahari abo batsigazi, obe niwe waanyaga ebi aine. Kwonka Asaheeli tiyaagira bu arekire kugumizamu amubingire." 
2Samuel2:22 Abuneeri agaruka agambira Asaheeli ati: Kiikama, orekyere aho kumbinga. Mbwenu nontaariza ki kukwita? Haza obwo mukuru waawe Yoabu mmureebese maisho ki?" 
2Samuel2:23 Kwonka nabwo Asaheeli ayanga kumuteishuka, Abuneeri nikwo kumuteera omuhunda gw'eicumu rye aha nda, gukamwogamu, akeetuura aha nsi, akafeeraho. Boona abaabaizire enyima, ku baahikire ahu Asaheeli yaafeera, baayemerera." 
2Samuel2:24 Kwonka Yoabu na Abishaayi baagumizamu babingire Abuneeri. Eizooba ku ryabaire nirirenga, baahika omu kibungo kya Ama, ekishungaine na Giya, aha muhanda gurikuza omu ihamba rya Gibeoni." 
2Samuel2:25 Abaabenyamiini baateeranira ahari Abuneeri, baaba omutwe gumwe, baayemerera aha mutwe gw'ekibungo." 
2Samuel2:26 Mpaho Abuneeri yaayeta Yoabu ati: Rurara neija kuherera hi neita abantu? Torikumanya omuheru gwayo ku guraabe ogw'akabi okukiraho? Mbwenu noija kuhitsya hi otakaragiire bantu baawe kurekyera aho kubinga beene waabo? 
2Samuel2:27 Yoabu amugarukamu ati: Nindahira Ruhanga ohuriire, ku otaagamba otyo, buzimazima abantu baaba nibagumizamu babingire beene waabo okuhitsya omu kasheeshe." 
2Samuel2:28 Yoabu nikwo kuteera enzamba, abantu boona bakarekyera aho kubinga Abaisiraeli n'okubarwanisa." 
2Samuel2:29 Abuneeri n'engabo ze baaraara nibagyenda, baaraba Araba, baayambuka Yorudaani, baagyenda akasheeshe koona, baahika Mahanaimu." 
2Samuel2:30 Yoabu nawe yaarekyera aho kubinga Abuneeri. Ku yaateeraine hamwe abantu be boona, yaashanga omu bagaragwa ba Daudi nihaburamu abashaija ikumi na mwenda, otabariiremu Asaheeli." 
2Samuel2:31 Kwonka abagaragwa ba Daudi bakaba baitsire omu Baabenyamiini abashaija ba Abuneeri magana ashatu na makumi mukaaga. 
2Samuel2:32 Bwanyima baatwara omutumbi gwa Asaheeli, baaguziika Beetelehemu omu kituura kya ishe. Mpaho Yoabu n'engabo ze baaraara nibagyenda. Ku bwabaire nibusheesha baahika Heburooni." 
2Samuel3:1 Hakaguma hariho obweme bw'ab'omuryango gwa Saulo n'ab'omuryango gwa Daudi. Daudi yaayeyongyera amaani, kwonka ab'omuryango gwa Saulo agaabo gaatentebuka." 
2Samuel3:2 Mbwenu Daudi ku yaabaire ari Heburooni, yaazaarirayo abatabani aba: ow'omujigaijo ni Amunooni, ou yaazaire ahari Ahinoamu owa Yezereeli." 
2Samuel3:3 Ow'omushubiro ni Kileabu, ou yaazaire ahari Abigaili, owaabaire ari muka Nabali owa Karumeeli. Owa kashatu ni Abusolomu, mutabani wa Maaka, muhara wa Talumai, omugabe wa Geshuri." 
2Samuel3:4 Owa kana ni Adoniya mutabani wa Hagiti. Owa kataano ni Shefatiya mutabani wa Abitaali. 
2Samuel3:5 N'owa mukaaga ni Itereamu owa Egula muka Daudi. Abo nibo batabani ba Daudi abu yaazaariire Heburooni. 
2Samuel3:6 Ab'omuryango gwa Saulo n'ab'ogwa Daudi ku baabaire nibakirwana obweme, Abuneeri yaayeyongyera kweha obushoboorozi omu ka ya Saulo." 
2Samuel3:7 Mbwenu Saulo akaba aine omukazi w'ekinyanshunju, orikwetwa Rizipa, muhara wa Ayiiya. Reero Ishibosheti yaagira Abuneeri ati: Ahabw'enki otembire ekitabo kya muka tata?" 
2Samuel3:8 Ebi Ishibosheti yaagambire byagwisa kubi Abuneeri, yaamukabukira ati: Onyetsire omutwe gw'embwa y'Abaayuda? Okuhitsya eri izooba ntuura ndi omwesigwa ahabw'omuryango gwa Saulo shoimwe, n'abarumuna, na bagyenzi be; kandi tinkakurekuriraga Daudi, mbwenu eri izooba wantaho orubanja rukwatiraine n'omukazi." 
2Samuel3:9 Nyowe Abuneeri, Ruhanga akinture n'okukiraho, ku ndaabe ntahikiize Daudi eki Nyakubaho yaamurahiire," 
2Samuel3:10 nkaiha obugabe aha b'omuryango gwa Saulo, nkata Daudi aha kitebe ky'obugabe, akategyeka Abaisiraeli n'Abaayuda, okwiha Daani okuhitsya Beerisheba." 
2Samuel3:11 Ishibosheti yaabura eki yaagarukamu Abuneeri, ahabw'okuba akaba naamutiina." 
2Samuel3:12 Bwanyima Abuneeri atuma entumwa ahari Daudi Heburooni, naamugira ati: Mbwenu ensi egi n'ey'oha? Ragaana naanye, haza nkuhe emikono, nkukubuurire Isiraeli yoona." 
2Samuel3:13 Daudi amugarukamu ati: Eego! Niinyija kukora naiwe endagaano. Kwonka ninkwenza ekintu kimwe kyonka. Ku otarikwija kuncwa ryera, waaba otabandize kundeetera Mikaali muhara wa Saulo oizire kundeeba." 
2Samuel3:14 Kandi Daudi yaatuma entumwa ahari Ishibosheti mutabani wa Saulo naamugira ati: Mpa omukazi wangye Mikaali ou naajugire ebikoba igana by'Abafilisiti. 
2Samuel3:15 Ishibosheti nikwo kutuma bakamwaka iba, Palutieli mwene Laishi;" 
2Samuel3:16 haza akagyenda naarira amukuratiire, okuhitsya obu baahikire Bahurimu. Abuneeri akamugira ati: Irooko ogarukyeyo. N'onu akagarukayo." 
2Samuel3:17 Mbwenu Abuneeri akagambira abakuru b'omu Baisiraeli ati: Omu biro byahingwire, mukaba nimwenda Daudi ku aba omugabe waanyu." 
2Samuel3:18 Mbwenu nu, nimukikore, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akaraganisa Daudi naagira ati: Daudi omwiru wangye niwe ndijunisa abantu bangye Abaisiraeli, nkabaiha omu mikono y'Abafilisiti n'omu y'abazigu baabo." 
2Samuel3:19 Abuneeri kandi yaabigambira n'Abaabenyamiini. Bwanyima yaaza Heburooni, yaabiteekyerereza Daudi ku Abaisiraeli boona n'ab'omuryango gwa Benyamiini basiimire kukikora." 
2Samuel3:20 Abuneeri n'abashaija be makumi abiri ku baagiire Heburooni owa Daudi, Daudi yaabateekyera obugyenyi." 
2Samuel3:21 Mpaho Abuneeri yaagira Daudi ati: Naaza kwimuka, nteeranire Abaisiraeli boona ahariiwe, Nyakusinga omugabe, baragaane naiwe endagaano, obone kutegyeka boona, nk'oku omutima gwawe gurikwenda, Daudi atyo ayohereza Abuneeri, agyenda n'obusingye." 
2Samuel3:22 Ago magingo Yoabu n'abagaragwa ba Daudi abaabaire bahurwire baatabaaruka n'eminyago mingi. Baashanga Abuneeri atakiri na Daudi Heburooni, ahabw'okuba akaba yaamwohereize, yaagyenzire n'obusingye." 
2Samuel3:23 Yoabu n'eihe ryona eri yaahurwire naryo ku baizire, abantu baagambira Yoabu bati: Abuneeri mwene Neeri aizire ow'omugabe, yaamwohereza, yaagyenda n'obusingye." 
2Samuel3:24 Yoabu atyo aza ow'omugabe amugira ati: Mbwenu eki okozire ki? Abuneeri okukwijaho, haza okamureka akagyenda!" 
2Samuel3:25 Omanye ku Abuneeri mwene Neeri aizire kukubeihabeiha, kumanya oku ohurura n'oku otabaaruka, n'okwetegyereza byona ebi orikukora." 
2Samuel3:26 Yoabu ku yaarugire ahari Daudi kutabaara, yaayohereza entumwa kukurata Abuneeri, zaamugarura yaahika aha kiziba kya Siira; kwonka ekyo Daudi atarikukimanya." 
2Samuel3:27 Abuneeri ku yaagarukire Heburooni, Yoabu yaamuta hangahari omu irembo kubonana nawe. Ku baabaire bari aho yaamucumita aha nda, yaafa, naamutura okwita Asaheeli omurumuna." 
2Samuel3:28 Bwanyima Daudi ku yaakihuriire, yaagira ati: Nyowe n'obugabe bwangye omu maisho ga Nyakubaho turyaguma tutaine rubanja rw'okwita Abuneeri mwene Neeri." 
2Samuel3:29 Eshagama ye, Yoabu ebe niwe yaatukurira n'ab'eka ya ishe boona. Omu b'eka ye hatariburamu orwaire emiteezi, nari ebibembe nari ohimbagiire nainga ow'okwitwa rurara nari okuuhwire." 
2Samuel3:30 Okwo nikwo Yoabu n'omurumuna Abishaayi baitsire Abuneeri nibahoorera mwene waabo Asaheeli, ou yaitiire aha rugamba rwa Gibeoni." 
2Samuel3:31 Bwanyima Daudi akagambira Yoabu n'abantu boona abu yaabaire aine, ati: Mutaagure ebi mujwaire, mwezirikye ebiguniya, mucurire Abuneeri. Omugabe Daudi nawe yaagyenda akuratiire akatanda kariho omufu." 
2Samuel3:32 Abuneeri baamuziika Heburooni. Omugabe yaamucurira, naaboroogyera aha kituuro kye, n'abantu boona baacura." 
2Samuel3:33 Omugabe yaacurira Abuneeri naagira ati: ebyo Abuneeri waafa nk'omushema? 
2Samuel3:34 Emikono yaawe tiyaabohwa, amaguru gaawe tigaakomwa na mihama, waafa nk'ogwire omu ngaro z'enyabibi. Mpaho abantu boona baagaruka, baamucurira." 
2Samuel3:35 Bwanyima baija ahari Daudi, baamweshengyereza kugira eki yaarya nyomushana. Kwonka Daudi yaarahira naagira ati: Ruhanga akinture n'okukiraho, ku ndaagire eki naarya eizooba ritakarengire." 
2Samuel3:36 Abantu boona ekyo baakyetegyereza, baakisiima; kandi kyona eki ogwo mugabe yaakozire kyabagwisa gye." 
2Samuel3:37 Abantu abandi boona n'Abaisiraeli boona baamanyira aho ku eky'okwita Abuneeri mwene Neeri kitarugire ha mugabe. 
2Samuel3:38 Omugabe yaagira abagaragwa be ati: Timurikumanya eri izooba omuri Isiraeli ku haafamu omuntu mukuru kandi omushaija rugambwa? 
2Samuel3:39 Ayongyera abagira ati: Eri izooba tiinyine oku ndi, nobu ndaabe ndi omugabe osiigirwe amajuta; ahabw'okuba beene Zeruuya tindikubabaasa. Nyakubaho abe niwe yaazimuurira enkozi y'ekibi, nk'ekibi kyayo oku kiri." 
2Samuel4:1 Ishibosheti mwene Saulo ku yaahuriire ngu Abuneeri agwire Heburooni, yaacweka entegye, na Isiraeli yoona yaashoberwa." 
2Samuel4:2 Mbwenu Ishibosheti mutabani wa Saulo akaba aine abakuru b'engabo ze babiri; omwe naayetwa Baana, n'ondi naayetwa Rekabu, beene Rimoni owa Beerooti, ow'omu Baabenyamiini; ahabw'okuba Beerooti ekaba eri ey'omu byanga bya Benyamiini." 
2Samuel4:3 Ababeerooti bakaba bahungiire Gitaimu, baaguma bashuuhuukiireyo okuhitsya n'eri izooba." 
2Samuel4:4 Yonataani mwene Saulo akaba aine omutabani oremaire ebigyere. Obu omuntu aruga Yezereeli akabika ku Saulo na Yonataani bafiire, ogwo mwana akaba ahikize emyaka etaano y'obukuru. Mpaho omukazi omurezi we yaamuheeka, yaahunga. Ku yaabaire nairuka nawe naahunga, ogwo mwana yaayetuura aha nsi, yaaremara. Eiziina rye akaba ari Mefibosheti." 
2Samuel4:5 Mbwenu Rekabu na Baana beene Rimoni bakaija baahika omu nju ya Ishibosheti omu ihangwe, baashanga ayecurikireho ahuumwire." 
2Samuel4:6 N'omukazi omukumiirizi w'omu nju ye, owaabaire yaaheza kushungura engano, yaagwejegyera. Rekabu na Baana omurumuna nikwo kutaahamu nibashooba." 
2Samuel4:7 Ku baahikire omu nju, baashanga Ishibosheti abyami aha kitanda omu kishengye ki araaramu, baamucumita, baamwita, baamutemaho omutwe. Baagutwara, baagyenda ekiro kyona, baatoora omuhanda gurikuza Araba." 
2Samuel4:8 Omutwe gwa Ishibosheti baagureetera Daudi Omugabe Heburooni. Baamugira bati: Ogu n'omutwe gwa Ishibosheti mwene Saulo omuzigu waawe, owaabaire naakuhiiga kukwita. Mbwenu reeba, eri izooba, mukama waitu Nyakusinga, Nyakubaho yaakuhoorera Saulo n'oruzaaro rwe." 
2Samuel4:9 Daudi yaagarukamu Rekabu na Baana omurumuna, batabani ba Rimoni Omubeerooti ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho owaakirize amagara gangye akabi koona," 
2Samuel4:10 omuntu ku yangambiire ati: Manya Saulo afiire, akateekateeka ngu yandeetera enkuru nungi. Kwonka nyowe nkamukwata naamwitira Zikulaagi, kyaba ekihembo ki naamuhaire ahabw'enkuru ei yandeeteire." 
2Samuel4:11 Mbwenu kaashwa imwe abantu enyabibi, abaitiire omuntu ohikiriire omu nju ye, ari aha kitanda kye? Hati naimwe naaza kubahoora, mbature okumwita, mbacwekyereze omu nsi?" 
2Samuel4:12 Daudi atyo aragiira abatsigazi be, babaita, babatemaho engaro n'ebigyere, babahanika Heburooni aha rubaju rw'ekiyanja. Kwonka omutwe gwa Ishibosheti bagutwara, baguziika Heburooni omu kituuro kya Abuneeri." 
2Samuel5:1 Bwanyima enganda za Isiraeli zoona zikashanga Daudi Heburooni zaamugira ziti: Reeba, turi abaanyu b'aha mara." 
2Samuel5:2 Omu biro byahwaire, Saulo ku yaabaire ari omugabe naatutegyeka, niiwe waabaire oyebembera Abaisiraeli nibahurura kandi nibatabaaruka. Na Nyakubaho akakugira ati: Niiwe oriba omuriisa w'abantu bangye Abaisiraeli, kandi ati: Niiwe oritegyeka Isiraeli." 
2Samuel5:3 Batyo abakuru b'omuri Isiraeli boona baashanga omugabe Daudi Heburooni, yaakorerayo nabo endagaano omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, baamusiigirayo amajuta kuba omugabe wa Isiraeli." 
2Samuel5:4 Daudi obu aza aha ngoma, akaba aine emyaka makumi ashatu y'obukuru, yaategyekyera emyaka makumi ana." 
2Samuel5:5 Heburooni akategyekyerayo Abaayuda emyaka mushanju n'emyezi mukaaga, kandi Yerusalemu yaategyekyerayo Isiraeli yoona na Yuda okumara emyaka makumi ashatu n'eshatu." 
2Samuel5:6 Bwanyima Daudi n'abashaija be bakaza Yerusalemu kurwanisa Abayebusi abatuuzi b'omuri egyo nsi, abaamugizire bati: Torihika muri eki kigo, empumi n'ebirema baryakukumiirira! Obwo bakaba nibateekateeka ngu Daudi tarikubaasa kuhikayo." 
2Samuel5:7 Kwonka hoona Daudi akakubuura ekigo kya Siyooni, kyaba orurembo rwe." 
2Samuel5:8 Mpaho eryo izooba Daudi yaagira ati: Weena orikwenda kwita Abayebusi, atembere ahu omukura gw'amaizi gurikufumukira, abone kurwanisa ebirema n'empumi abu ndikwanga. Nikyo bagirira bati: Empumi n'ebirema tibaritaaha mu nju ya Mukama." 
2Samuel5:9 Daudi yaatuura omuri ekyo kigo, yaakyeeta orurembo rwe. Kandi yaakyombekaho ebigo kukyehinguririza, okwiha aha mwanya ogurikwetwa Miilo okugarura omunda." 
2Samuel5:10 Daudi yaaguma naayeyongyera kugira ekitiinwa; ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga w'amahe akaba ari hamwe nawe. 
2Samuel5:11 Hiramu omugabe wa Tuuro akatuma entumwa ahari Daudi, yaamutwekyera n'emiti ya kaarwenda n'ababaizi n'abarikwombekyesa amabaare, baayombekyera Daudi enju." 
2Samuel5:12 Daudi yaamanyira aho ku Nyakubaho amuhamize kuba omugabe wa Isiraeli, kandi ku atungwire obugabe bwe ahabw'abantu be Abaisiraeli." 
2Samuel5:13 Daudi ku yaarugire Heburooni yaahika Yerusalemu, yaashwererayo ebinyanshunju n'abandi bakazi, kandi yaazaarirayo abandi baana, aboojo n'abaishiki." 
2Samuel5:14 Aga nigo maziina g'abaana abu yaazaariire Yerusalemu: Shamua, Shobabu, Natani, Solomooni," 
2Samuel5:15 Ebuhari, Elishua, Nefegi, Yafiiya," 
2Samuel5:16 Elishaama, Eliyaadu na Elifeleti." 
2Samuel5:17 Abafilisiti ku baahuriire ngu Daudi bamusiigire amajuta, yaaba omugabe wa Isiraeli, boona bainamuka kumuhiiga. Daudi ku yaakihuriire, yaashuuma, yaahungira omu kigo." 
2Samuel5:18 Mbwenu obwo Abafilisiti bakaba baizire, bajanjaire oruhita rw'Abareefa." 
2Samuel5:19 Daudi yaayehanuuza ahari Nyakubaho ati: Mpurure ndwanise Abafilisiti? Ebyo noija kubandekurira, mbasingure? Nyakubaho yaamugarukamu ati: Hurura, buzimazima niinyija kubakurekurira, obasingure." 
2Samuel5:20 Daudi atyo aza Baali-perazimu abasingurirayo. Agira ati: Nyakubaho ahimintwire abazigu bangye, nk'oku omwegyemure guhigura omucungiro. Nikyo ogwo mwanya bagwetera Baali-perazimu." 
2Samuel5:21 Abafilisiti baatsigayo ebishushani byabo ebiramibwa, Daudi n'abashaija be baabitwara." 
2Samuel5:22 Kandi Abafilisiti bakagaruka, baajanjaara oruhita rw'Abareefa." 
2Samuel5:23 Daudi ku yaayebuurize ahari Nyakubaho, onu yaamugira ati: Otabateera noobareetwa omu maisho, kureka obakiikuukye noobareetwa enyima, ahashungaine n'emiti y'emitugunda." 
2Samuel5:24 Reero ku oraahurire enshagara aha mitwe y'emitugunda, oimukye obateere, ahabw'okuba Nyowe Nyakubaho nimba nkwebembeire kusingura eihe ryabo." 
2Samuel5:25 Daudi yaatwaza nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiira, yaagyenda naita Abafilisiti, okwiha Geeba okuhika Gezeri." 
2Samuel6:1 Daudi kandi akateeranira hamwe abashaija ba Isiraeli entoore obukumi bushatu. 
2Samuel6:2 Yaagyenda n'abantu boona abu yaabaire aine, baaza Baala eya Yuda kwihayo eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, erikwetererwa Nyakubaho w'amahe, osingami ahari baakerubi." 
2Samuel6:3 Baatwarira eshanduukye ya Ruhanga aha kigaari kisya, baagiiha omu nju ya Abinadabu, eyaabaire eri aha kabungo, Uuza na Ahio batabani ba Abinadabu baagyendesa ekyo kigaari kisya," 
2Samuel6:4 kiriho eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, Ahio agyebembeire." 
2Samuel6:5 Daudi n'Abaisiraeli boona baagyenda nibeemurikira omu maisho ga Nyakubaho n'amaani gaabo goona, nibeeshongora, nibateera amagobore, n'enanga, n'engoma empuuro, n'oburengo n'enshandaazo." 
2Samuel6:6 Mbwenu ku baahikire aha mbuga y'eihuuriro rya Nakoni, Uuza yaagorora omukono, yaaguhitsya aha shanduukye ya Ruhanga, yaagiramira, ahabw'okuba enimi zikateera entsibo." 
2Samuel6:7 Ruhanga nikwo kugirira Uuza ekiniga kingi, akamwitiraho; ahabw'okugorora omukono, akakora aha shanduukye. Yaafeera aho aha rubaju rw'eshanduukye ya Ruhanga." 
2Samuel6:8 Daudi ekyo kikamugwisa kubi, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akoohokyera Uuza. Nikyo omwanya ogwo baagweteire Perezi-Uuza n'eri izooba." 
2Samuel6:9 Eryo izooba Daudi akatiina Nyakubaho, yaagira ati: Mbwenu eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho neebaasa eta kwija omwangye?" 
2Samuel6:10 Daudi atyo tiyaasiima kutwara omu rurembo rwe eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho, kureka yaagikiikamya, yaagita omu nju ya Obededomu Omugiiti." 
2Samuel6:11 Eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho yaaguma omwa Obededomu Omugiiti okumara ameezi ashatu. Haza Nyakubaho yaaha Obededomu n'ab'eka ye boona omugisha. 
2Samuel6:12 Bakagambira omugabe Daudi ku Nyakubaho ahaire omugisha ab'enju ya Obededomu n'ebye byona ahabw'eshanduukye ya Ruhanga. Daudi nikwo kugyenda akaiha omwa Obededomu eshanduukye ya Ruhanga akagireeta omu rurembo rwe ashemereirwe munonga. 
2Samuel6:13 Abaheekire eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho ku baabaire baagyendaho akaanya k'entambwe mukaaga, Daudi yaatamba enimi y'ekimasha n'enyana kaberera." 
2Samuel6:14 Yaayemurikira omu maisho ga Nyakubaho n'amaani ge goona, ayezirikire omunda omutanda gwa kitaani." 
2Samuel6:15 Daudi n'ab'enju ya Isiraeli boona baareeta eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho, nibateera akaari n'amakondere." 
2Samuel6:16 Eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho ku yaabaire neetaaha omu rurembo rwa Daudi, Mikaali muhara wa Saulo yaaringuririza omu dirisa, yaareeba omugabe Daudi naayemurika, naataaguririra omu maisho ga Nyakubaho; yaamugayira aha mutima." 
2Samuel6:17 Batyo baataasya eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho; baagita omu mwanya gwayo, omunda y'eihema eri Daudi yaagiteereire. Daudi yaatambira Nyakubaho ebitambo bicwekize n'ebindi by'okwekundira." 
2Samuel6:18 Daudi ku yaaherize kutamba ebitambo bicwekize n'eby'okwekundira, yaashabira abantu omugisha omu iziina rya Mukama ow'amahe." 
2Samuel6:19 Yaagaburira abantu boona ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli abashaija n'abakazi emigaati n'entongo z'enyama n'embumburi z'emizaabibu eyomire. Bwanyima abantu boona baayaabuuka, buri omwe naagaruka owe." 
2Samuel6:20 Daudi ku yaagarukire owe kushabira ab'eka ye omugisha, Mikaali muhara wa Saulo yaashohora kumutangirira. Yaamugira ati: Ebishi eri izooba omugabe wa Isiraeli yaayetungisa ekitiinwa obu yaayejwekyera busha omu maisho g'abazaana b'abairu be, nk'omuntu otaine oku ari oku ayejweka busha kitamuhemure!" 
2Samuel6:21 Daudi agarukamu Mikaali ati: Ekyo naakikorera omu maisho ga Nyakubho owantooraine, akaanyeshumbya shoimwe n'ab'eka ye boona, akampindura omugabe w'abantu be Abaisiraeli. N'ahabw'ekyo ndyaguma nyemurikire Nyakubaho." 
2Samuel6:22 Niinyija kwongyera kwegayisa okukiraho, ndeebekye omu maisho gaawe ndi ow'ahansi, kwonka abazaana bu waagamba, bo nibaija kumpa ekitiinwa." 
2Samuel6:23 Mikaali muhara wa Saulo yaagumira aho ataine mwana, okuhitsya obu yaafiire." 
2Samuel7:1 Omugabe Daudi akaguma omu ka ye; Nyakubaho yaamuha obuhuumure aha bazigu be boona abamwehinguririize. 
2Samuel7:2 Bwanyima omugabe yaagira Natani omurangi ati: Reeba, nyowe nindaara omu nju ya kaarwenda; haza eshanduukye ya Ruhanga etuura omu ihema." 
2Samuel7:3 Natani yaagira omugabe ati: Irooko okore ekikuri aha mutima, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho ari hamwe naiwe." 
2Samuel7:4 Kwonka ekyo kiro Nyakubaho yaagambira Natani ati: 
2Samuel7:5 Irooko ogambire omwiru wangye Daudi oti: Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Ebyo niiwe muntu oraanyombekyere enju y'okutaahamu? 
2Samuel7:6 Nyowe naaba kwiha Abaisiraeli Misiri, n'okuhitsya eri izooba, tinkagiraga nju ei ntaahamu, kureka ntuura ninza oku n'oku, ndi omu ihema, riri obutaaho bwangye." 
2Samuel7:7 Omu myanya yoona, ei ndagiiremu n'Abaisiraeli, ndagizire eki ndagambiire omwe omu baramuzi ba Isiraeli, abu naaragiire kureeberera eihanga ry'abantu bangye Abaisiraeli, nkamugira nti: Ahabw'enki timukaanyombekyeire nju ya kaarwenda?" 
2Samuel7:8 Mbwenu irooko ogambire omwiru wangye Daudi oti: Nyakubaho w'amahe naagira ati: Nkakwiha omu iriisizo, naakutsigisaho omurimo gw'okuriisa entaama, ngu obone kuba omutegyeki w'abantu bangye Abaisiraeli." 
2Samuel7:9 Kandi nkaguma naiwe ahi waabaire oza hoona; ncwekyereza abazigu baawe, obasingura. Mbwenu niinyija kukuhindura omuntu mukuru, orangaanwe nk'abandi bantu rugambwa ab'omu nsi." 
2Samuel7:10 Haza ntungire abantu bangye Abaisiraeli omwanya, mbatemu, bagire obutaka bw'okutuuramu, obu batariihwamu bundi; kandi abantu ebihambaazi tibaribaita kubi bundi nk'obunyakare," 
2Samuel7:11 obu naataho abaramuzi b'okutegyeka abantu bangye Abaisiraeli. Kandi nkuhe obuhuumure aha bazigu baawe boona. N'ekindi, Nyakubaho naakugira ati: Nyakubaho aryakuzaarukanisamu oruganda," 
2Samuel7:12 obunaku bwawe ku burihika, waafa, waashanga baashwenkuru, ndyayemeka omwana waawe ou oyezaariire, mpamye obugabe bwe." 
2Samuel7:13 Niwe ariinyombekyera enju, naanye mpamye ekitebe ky'obugabe bwe ebiro byona." 
2Samuel7:14 Mbe ishe, nawe abe mutabani wangye. Ku aricumura ndyamuhanisa abantu, babe nibo baamuteera bamwashe." 
2Samuel7:15 Kwonka tindireka kumukunda na rukundo yangye etahararuka, nk'oku naagiihire ahari Saulo, nkamubinga ngu akuhigize." 
2Samuel7:16 Ndyagumyaho ab'omuryango gwawe n'obugabe bwawe, mpamye ekitebe kyawe ebiro byona." 
2Samuel7:17 Natani atyo ateekyerereza Daudi ebyo bigambo, n'ebi yaayorekirwe byona." 
2Samuel7:18 Bwanyima omugabe Daudi akataaha omu ihema Eririkwera, yaashutama omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, yaagira ati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga, mbwenu niinye oha? N'ab'eka yangye nibo baahi, kureeba ngu ompikize aha?" 
2Samuel7:19 Kwonka ekyo, ai Mukama Ruhanga, omu maisho gaawe n'ekintu kikye. Mbwenu, ai Mukama Ruhanga, waayongyeraho eky'okugamba aha b'eka yangye, nyowe omwiru waawe, oku bariba omu biro bingi eby'omu maisho. Haza ekyo nikyo kyateereirweho abantu." 
2Samuel7:20 Ai Mukama Ruhanga, mbwenu nyowe Daudi, ekindi nkugambire ki, ahabw'okuba nyowe omwiru waawe noomanya!" 
2Samuel7:21 Manya eki oraganiise oihire aha mutima, okozire ekintu kikuru kukiimmanyisa, nyowe omwiru waawe." 
2Samuel7:22 N'ahabw'ekyo, ai Mukama Ruhanga, ori mukuru. Manya titukahuriraga ngu hariho ori nkaiwe, nainga ngu hariho Ruhanga ondi kureka iwe." 
2Samuel7:23 N'ihanga ki omu nsi eriri nk'ery'abantu baawe Abaisiraeli, abu Iwe Ruhanga waayecunguriire kuba abaawe, okeetungira eiziina, okabakorera ebintu bikuru ebirikutiinisa, okabinga eihanga na baaruhanga baaryo, rikahigiza abantu baawe." 
2Samuel7:24 Kandi okeehamiza abantu baawe Abaisiraeli kuba abaawe ebiro byona, naiwe, ai Mukama, okaba Ruhanga waabo." 
2Samuel7:25 Mbwenu, ai Mukama Ruhanga, eki ongambireho nyowe omwiru waawe n'aha b'eka yangye, okihamye ebiro byona, kandi okikore nk'oku ogambire," 
2Samuel7:26 eiziina ryawe ribone kuhimbisibwa ebiro byona, abantu bagire bati: Mukama ow'amahe niwe Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, n'eka yangye, nyowe Daudi omwiru waawe, ebe ehamire omu maisho gaawe." 
2Samuel7:27 Manya Ai Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, nyowe omwiru waawe, niiwe okiimmmanyiise noogira oti: Ndyakwombekyera eka. Nikyo nyowe omwiru waawe ntarikutiinira kukushaba." 
2Samuel7:28 Ai Mukama Ruhanga, oba Ruhanga; n'ebi ogamba biba eby'amazima kandi nyowe omwiru waawe, niiwe ondaganiise eki kintu kirungi." 
2Samuel7:29 Ninkweshengyereza, ohe omugisha eka yangye, nyowe omwiru waawe, egumeho ebiro byona omu maisho gaawe. Ai Mukama Ruhanga, ahabw'okuba niiwe okiraganiise; omugisha gwawe gugume aha ka y'omwiru waawe ebiro byona." 
2Samuel8:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Daudi yaasingura Abafilisiti, yaabacwa eishaija, yaabanyaga Metegama." 
2Samuel8:2 Kandi yaasingura Abamoabu, yaabarambika aha nsi, yaabagyeresa omuguha; emishorongo ebiri yaaba ey'ab'okwitwa, n'ogumwe gwona gwaba ogw'ab'okusaasirwa. Abamoabu baaba abairu ba Daudi, baamushorera emishoro." 
2Samuel8:3 Daudi kandi akasingura Hadadezeri, mwene Rehobu, omugabe wa Zooba, obu Hadadezeri yaabaire naaza kukubuura ekyanga ky'aha mugyera Eufuraati." 
2Samuel8:4 Daudi yaamunyaga abarikurwanira aha mbaraasi rukumi na magana mushanju, n'abaserukare obukumi bubiri abarikugyendesa ebigyere. Kandi Daudi yaatema embaraasi zirikukurura ebigaari ebiteega; kureka yaatsigaho ezirikubaasa kukurura ebigaari igana." 
2Samuel8:5 Abasiriya ba Damasiko ku baizire kuha Hadadezeri omugabe wa Zooba emikono, Daudi yaabaitamu abantu obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri." 
2Samuel8:6 Bwanyima yaata ebigo by'abarinzi omuri Aramu eya Damasiko. Abasiriya baaba abairu be, baamushorera omushoro. Nyakubaho yaasinguza Daudi ahi yaabaire naahurura hoona." 
2Samuel8:7 Reero Daudi yaanyaga engabo z'ezaabu, ezi abagaragwa ba Hadadezeri baabaire baine, yaazireeta Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel8:8 Kandi omugabe Daudi yaanyaga emiringa mingi Beeta na Berotai, endembo za Hadadezeri." 
2Samuel8:9 Toi omugabe wa Hamati, ku yaahuriire Daudi asingwire eihe rya Hadadezeri ryona," 
2Samuel8:10 yaamutumaho omutabani Yoramu, kumuramutsya n'okumutabaarutsya okurwanisa Hadadezeri, akamusingura; ahabw'okuba Hadadezeri kaingi akaba arwanisa Toi orugamba. Yoramu ogwo yaareeta ebintu by'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu n'eby'emiringa." 
2Samuel8:11 Ebyo nabyo omugabe Daudi yaabihongyera Nyakubaho, hamwe n'efeeza n'ezaabu, ebi yaamuhongyeire, abinyagire omu mahanga goona agu yaasingwire:" 
2Samuel8:12 erya Edomu, erya Moabu, ery'Abaamoni, ery'Abafilisiti, ery'Abaamaleki; n'ebyanyagirwe Hadadezeri, mwene Rehobu, omugabe wa Zooba." 
2Samuel8:13 Kandi Daudi akeetungira eiziina. Ku yaabaire naatabaaruka, yaitira Abanyaedomu akakumi kamwe n'enkumi munaana omu ruhanga rw'omwonyo." 
2Samuel8:14 Kandi yaata ebigo by'abarinzi omuri Edomu yoona; Abanyaedomu boona baaba abairu be, Nyakubaho yaasinguza Daudi ahi yaahurwire hoona." 
2Samuel8:15 Oku nikwo Daudi yaategyekire Isiraeli yoona, akacwera abantu be boona emanja z'oburyo omu bwinganisa." 
2Samuel8:16 Obwo Yoabu mwene Zeruuya akaba ari omukuru w'eihe; Yehoshafati mwene Ahiludi ari omuhandiiki w'ebirikubaho; 
2Samuel8:17 Zadoki mwene Ahitubu na Ahimeleki mwene Abiyataari bari abahongyerezi; kandi Seraaya ari omuhandiiki; 
2Samuel8:18 na Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada naategyeka Abakereti n'Abapeleti, kandi beene Daudi bari abahongyerezi." 
2Samuel9:1 Daudi akabuuza abari aho ati: Omu b'omuryango gwa Saulo, haine owaatsigaireho, nkamukorera eby'embabazi ahabwa Yonataani?" 
2Samuel9:2 Mbwenu habaka hariho omuheereza w'omu nju ya Saulo, orikwetwa Ziiba, baamwetera Daudi. Omugabe yaamubuuza ati: Niiwe Ziiba? Onu amugarukamu ati: Eego, niinye omwiru waawe." 
2Samuel9:3 Omugabe amubuuza ati: Ebyo hakibaho ow'omu b'omuryango gwa Saulo, nkamukorera eby'embabazi za Ruhanga? Ziiba agarukamu omugabe ati: Hakiriho mutabani wa Yonataani, oremaire ebigyere." 
2Samuel9:4 Omugabe amugira ati: Ari nkahi? Ziiba agarukamu omugabe ati: Ari Lodebaari omwa Makiri mwene Amieli. 
2Samuel9:5 Omugabe nikwo kutuma bakamwiha Lodebaari omwa Makiri mwene Amieli. 
2Samuel9:6 Mefibosheti mwene Yonataani mwijukuru wa Saulo, ku yaahikire Daudi, yaajuumara, yaamutangirira; Daudi yaamweta ati: Mefibosheti! Onu yaamwetaba ati: Ndi aha, omuheereza waawe!" 
2Samuel9:7 Daudi amugira ati: Otatiina! Niinyija kukukorera eby'embabazi ahabwa sho Yonataani, nkugarurire obutaka bwa Saulo shoimwe bwona, kandi ogume oriire aha meeza yangye." 
2Samuel9:8 Mefibosheti amuramya kandi amugira ati: Mbwenu nyowe omwiru waawe niinye oha, iwe okuunyetaho, nyowe embwa efiire?" 
2Samuel9:9 Bwanyima omugabe ayeta Ziiba omugaragwa wa Saulo, amugira ati: ebyabaire biri ebya Saulo byona n'eby'ab'eka ye, naabiha mwijukuru wa mukama waawe." 
2Samuel9:10 Mbwenu iwe na batabani baawe n'abahuuku baanyu mugume mumuhingire emisiri, mumureetere ebi mwerize; mwijukuru wa mukama waawe abone kutunga eky'okurya. Kwonka Mefibosheti mwijukuru wa mukama waawe agume naariira aha meeza yangye. Mbwenu Ziiba akaba aine abatabani ikumi na bataano n'abahuuku makumi abiri." 
2Samuel9:11 Ziiba agira omugabe ati: Ebi Nyakusinga omugabe wandagiira, nyowe omwiru waawe niinyija kubikora. Atyo Mefibosheti yaaguma naariira aha meeza ya Daudi nk'omwana w'omugabe." 
2Samuel9:12 Kandi Mefibosheti akaba aine omutabani muto orikwetwa Miika; ab'omuka ya Ziiba boona baaba abairu ba Mefibosheti. 
2Samuel9:13 Mefibosheti we yaatuura Yerusalemu, yaaguma naariira aha meeza y'omugabe, nobu araabe yaabaire aremaire ebigyere byombi." 
2Samuel10:1 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, omugabe w'Abaamoni yaafa, yaahungurirwa omutabani Hanuni." 
2Samuel10:2 Daudi yaagira ati: Niinyija kutwaza gye Hanuni mwene Nahashi, nk'oku ishe yantwarize gye. Daudi atyo yaamutumaho abagaragwa be kumuyaagira ahabw'okufeerwa ishe. Abo bagaragwa be baahika omu nsi y'Abaamoni." 
2Samuel10:3 Kwonka abategyeki b'Abaamoni baagira Hanuni mukama waabo bati: Noogira ngu Daudi okukutumaho ab'okukuyaagira n'okuha shoimwe ekitiinwa? Daudi takutumireho bagaragwa be kwetegyereza orurembo n'okurutata, reero bakarucwekyereza?" 
2Samuel10:4 Hanuni atyo akwata abagaragwa ba Daudi, amwa buri omwe ekicweka ky'ebireju bye, kandi ebijwaro byabo abihirimburira rwagati omu manyaanya, aboohereza." 
2Samuel10:5 Ku baakigambiire Daudi, yaatuma ab'okubabugana, ahabw'okuba abo bashaija bakaba bakiitsirwe enshoni. Omugabe yaabatumaho ati: Mugume Yeriko okuhitsya obu ebireju byanyu biraakure, mukabona kugaruka." 
2Samuel10:6 Abaamoni, ku baareebire ngu beeyangiise Daudi, baatuma aha Basiriya ba Betirehobu n'aba Zooba kubaguriirira, ngu babahe abarwani obukumi bubiri abarikugyendesa ebigyere, n'omugabe wa Maaka kureeta abashaija rukumi, n'aba Toobu kureeta kakumi n'enkumi ibiri." 
2Samuel10:7 Daudi ku yaakihuriire, yaayohereza Yoabu n'eihe ryona ery'amamanzi." 
2Samuel10:8 Abaamoni baashohora, baatengyera orugamba omu irembo. Abasiriya aba Zooba n'aba Rehobu n'abashaija ba Toobu n'aba Maaka bo, baarutengyera aha kwabo omu bwerere." 
2Samuel10:9 Yoabu ku yaareebire engabo zaamutengyera orugamba omu maisho n'enyima, yaatoorana omu Baisiraeli abashaija enkwata ngabo, yaabatengyesa orugamba kurwanisa Abasiriya." 
2Samuel10:10 Ezindi ngabo ze yaazikwatsa Abishaayi omurumuna, yaazitengyesa orugamba kurwanisa Abaamoni." 
2Samuel10:11 Haza yaamugira ati: Abasiriya ku barankize amaani, ompe emikono. Naiwe Abaamoni ku baraagakukize, niinyija kwija ngikuhe." 
2Samuel10:12 Hama turwane mashaija ahabw'eihanga ryaitu n'ahabw'endembo; kandi Nyakubaho akore eki araasiime. 
2Samuel10:13 Yoabu n'abu yaabaire aine bairira haihi kurwanisa Abasiriya, baamuhunga." 
2Samuel10:14 Abaamoni ku bareebire Abasiriya baahunga, nabo baahunga Abishaayi, baataaha omu rurembo. Bwanyima Yoabu yaatabaaruka naaruga kurwanisa Abaamoni, yaija Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel10:15 Kwonka Abasiriya ku baareebire baasingurwa Abaisiraeli, baayeteerana." 
2Samuel10:16 Hadadezeri yaatuma kuhuruza Abasiriya, abatwire seeri ya Eufuraati, baija Helamu beebembeirwe Shobaki omukuru w'eihe rya Hadadezeri." 
2Samuel10:17 Ku baakigambiire Daudi, yaahuruza Abaisiraeli boona, baayambuka Yorudaani, baaza Helamu. Abasiriya baatengyera Daudi orugamba, baamurwanisa." 
2Samuel10:18 Bwanyima baahunga Abaisiraeli. Daudi yaabaitamu abashaija magana mushanju ab'aha bigaari, n'ab'aha mbaraasi obukumi buna: yaahutaaza Shobaki omukuru w'eihe ryabo, yaafeeraho." 
2Samuel10:19 Reero abagabe abaabaire nibategyekwa Hadadezeri, ku baareebire baasingurwa Abaisiraeli, baakora nabo endagaano y'obusingye; baaba abairu baabo. Abasiriya baatiina kugaruka kuha Abaamoni emikono." 
2Samuel11:1 Omuri katumba, obunaku obu abagabe bahururiramu, Daudi akoohereza Yoabu kuhurura n'abagaragwa be n'Abaisiraeli boona, baita munonga Abaamoni; kandi baagota Raba. Kwonka Daudi yaaguma Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel11:2 Eizooba rimwe, omu mwabazyo, Daudi akaimuka omu kitanda. Ku yaabaire naagyendagyenda aha mutwe gwa nyaruju y'obugabe, yaareeba omukazi naayoga; kandi ogwo mukazi akaba ari murungi munonga." 
2Samuel11:3 Daudi yaatuma ab'okumubuuririza. Omwe yaamugira ati: Manya ni Betisheba, muhara wa Eliyamu, muka Uriya Omuhiiti." 
2Samuel11:4 Daudi nikwo kutuma entumwa, zikamureeta. Akihika owe, Daudi akabyama nawe. Kandi obwo, ogwo mukazi akaba azirukire. Bwanyima yaagaruka owaabo." 
2Samuel11:5 Ku yaamanyire ngu abakire, yaatuma ahari Daudi naamugira ati: Nyine enda." 
2Samuel11:6 Daudi nikwo kutuma ahari Yoabu, ati: Nyoherereza Uriya Omuhiiti. Yoabu nawe yaamumutwekyera." 
2Samuel11:7 Uriya ku yaahikire Daudi, onu yaamubuuza oku Yoabu arikuraara n'engabo ze, n'oku orugamba ruri." 
2Samuel11:8 Bwanyima Daudi yaagira Uriya ati: Irooko oze owaawe, oruhuukyeho! Uriya ku yaarugire omw'omugabe, omugabe yaamukuratsa eby'okumufungurira." 
2Samuel11:9 Kwonka Uriya yaaraara aha irembo ry'ekikaari ky'omugabe hamwe n'abarinzi ba mukama we; yaayanga kuza omu ka ye. 
2Samuel11:10 Ku baagambiire Daudi ku Uriya atataahire owe, Daudi yaamubuuza ati: Tiiwe orugire omu rugyendo? Mbwenu ekikuzibiire kutaaha owaawe ni ki?" 
2Samuel11:11 Uriya yaagarukamu Daudi ati: Eshanduukye n'Abaisiraeli n'Abayuda nibiraara omu nsiisira, na mukama wangye Yoabu n'abagaragwa baawe, Nyakusinga, basiisiire omu ishwa. Mbwenu mbe niinye naaza owangye, ndye, nnywe, ndaare n'omukazi wangye? Buso bwawe, ninkakwite, ekyo tindikwija kukikora." 
2Samuel11:12 Daudi nikwo kugira Uriya ati: Yosha aha eri izooba, nyencakare nkuragiire ogyende. Uriya yaaguma Yerusalemu eryo izooba, n'eryakuratsireho." 
2Samuel11:13 Daudi yaamweta yaarya nawe, yaamutereka, yaamusinza; kwonka omu mwabazyo Uriya tiyaaza owe omuka, yaagyenda, yaabyama aha kitanda kye, omu kaju k'abarinzi ba mukama we." 
2Samuel11:14 Ku bwaseesire, Daudi yaahandiikira Yoabu ebaruha, yaagitweka Uriya." 
2Samuel11:15 Omuri egyo baruha yaahandiikamu ati: Mute Uriya omu kaso k'orugamba, ahi barikurwanira munonga. Haza imwe mugarure ebigyere enyima, bamucumite, afe." 
2Samuel11:16 Na Yoabu ku yaabaire naagota orurembo, yaata Uriya omu mwanya ogu yaabaire naamanya ngu gurimu abashaija emanzi." 
2Samuel11:17 Ab'omu rurembo baashohora, baarwana na Yoabu, baita bamwe omu bagaragwa ba Daudi, na Uriya Omuhiiti baamwita." 
2Samuel11:18 Bwanyima Yoabu yaatuma ahari Daudi naamugambira oku orugamba rubaire. 
2Samuel11:19 Kandi yaahabura ou yaatumire ati: Ku oraaheze kuteekyerereza omugabe eby'orugamba byona," 
2Samuel11:20 waareeba yaagira ekiniga, yaakugira ati: Ahabw'enki ku mugiire kurwana mwahika haihi orurembo? Mubaire mutarikumanya ku barikubaasa kubarasha, beemereire aha rugo?" 
2Samuel11:21 Mbwenu owaitsire Abimeleki mwene Yerubesheti n'oha? T'omukazi owaayemereire aha rugo akamurekyera eseiso, n'onu akagwa Tebezi? Ahabw'enki muhikire haihi orugo? Obwo omugire oti: Manya omugaragwa waawe Uriya Omuhiiti, nawe afiire!" 
2Samuel11:22 Entumwa etyo egyenda. Eija eteekyerereza Daudi byona ebi Yoabu yaagitumire. 
2Samuel11:23 Egyo ntumwa egambira Daudi eti: Abantu batukirize emikono, baija baaturwanisiza omu ishwa. Kwonka naitwe twabagarura enyima, twagyenda tubabingire twabahitsya aha irembo." 
2Samuel11:24 Mpaho ab'amata baarasha abagaragwa baawe nibeema aha rugo. Bamwe aha bairu baawe, Nyakusinga, bafiire; n'omugaragwa waawe Uriya Omuhiiti nawe afiire." 
2Samuel11:25 Daudi agarukamu entumwa ati: Ogire Yoabu oti: Ekyo kitakusaasa; ahabw'okuba rurara eita omuntu, kandi n'obundi eita ondi. Mbwenu hama, orwanise orurembo, orusingure. Naiwe omugumye otyo." 
2Samuel11:26 Muka Uriya ku yaahuriire ngu iba afiire, yaamucurira." 
2Samuel11:27 Ekyosi ku kyarugiremu, Daudi yaatuma, baamureeta omwe, yaaba omukazi we, yaamuzaaraho omutabani. Kwonka eki Daudi yaakozire kyagwisa kubi Nyakubaho." 
2Samuel12:1 Nyakubaho akatuma Natani ahari Daudi. Yaija yaamugira ati: Omu rurembo hakaba harimu abantu babiri; omwe ari omutungi n'ondi ari omworo. 
2Samuel12:2 Omutungi akaba aine amasyo g'entaama n'ag'ente. 
2Samuel12:3 Kandi omworo akaba ataine kantu, kureka akaagazi k'entaama aku yaabaire aguzire, akakoorora, kakura hamwe n'abaana be. Akaguma naakariisa aha byokurya bye, naakanyweisiza aha kikopo kye, kandi naakakiikira, kakaba nka muhara we." 
2Samuel12:4 Mbwenu ogwo mutungi akaraarirwa omugyenyi, kwonka tiyaayenda kukora omu masyo ge g'entaama nari ag'ente, eky'okukunisiza omugyenyi waamuzindukira, kureka yaatwara akataama k'ogwo mworo, yaaba niko yaabaagira omugyenyi omuzindukiire." 
2Samuel12:5 Daudi agirira ogwo muntu ekiniga kingi, agira Natanai ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho, ogwo muntu ashemereire kufa." 
2Samuel12:6 Kandi ako kataama akarihemu entaama ina, ahabw'okuba eki yaakozire, akakikora ataine saasi." 
2Samuel12:7 Natani agambira Daudi butunu ati: Manya ogwo muntu niiwe. Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Nkakusiiga amajuta, waaba omugabe wa Isiraeli, kandi naakujuna Saulo," 
2Samuel12:8 naakuha enju ya mukama waawe, n'abakazi be kukufumbata, naakuha ab'omurayango gw'Abaisiraeli n'ogw'Abaayuda. Kandi ebyo kuri byabaire biri bikye, nkaakwongyeire ebirikukiraho." 
2Samuel12:9 Mbwenu ahabw'enki ogayire ekiragiro kya Nyakubaho, okucumura omu maisho ge? Reeba, oitsize Uriya Omuhiiti rurara, waatwara omukazi we, waamuhindura owaawe; kandi iba waamwitsa rurara y'Abaamoni." 
2Samuel12:10 Ahabw'okungaya, okatwara muka Uriya Omuhiiti kuba omukazi waawe, rurara teriruga mu ka yaawe." 
2Samuel12:11 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ndyareeta ebihikiirizi birikuruga omu ka yaawe, nkwakye abakazi baawe booreeba, mbahe mutaahi waawe, abyame nabo nyomushana." 
2Samuel12:12 Iwe ekyo okikozire bwesherekye; kwonka Nyowe ndyakikora Isiraeli yoona neekireeba. 
2Samuel12:13 Daudi agira Natani ati: Ncumwire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. Na Natani amugira ati: Mukama nawe yaakusaasira ekibi kyawe, tokifa." 
2Samuel12:14 Kwonka shi ahabw'eki okozire, okareetera abazigu ba Nyakubaho kumurogotaho, ogu mwana ou ozaire naija kufa." 
2Samuel12:15 Ebyo ku byahwaire Natani yaayegarukira owe. 
2Samuel12:16 Nyakubaho akarwaza omwana ou muka Uriya yaazaariire Daudi, yaaremba munonga. Daudi yaashabira ogwo mwana ahari Ruhanga, kandi yaayesiibyakwo. Yaataaha omu nju, yaarambira aha nsi, bwarugaho bwasheesha." 
2Samuel12:17 Abakuru b'omu nju ye baamwemerera aha rubaju kumwimutsya aha nsi, kwonka yaayanga, kandi tiyaikiriza kurya nabo." 
2Samuel12:18 Aha kiro kya mushanju omwana yaafa. Abagaragwa ba Daudi baatiina kumugambira ku omwana yaafa. Ahabw'okuba bakagira bati: Omwana ku abaire akihuriire, tumugambiire yaatwangira. Mbwenu nitubaasa tuta kumugambira ku omwana yaafa. Ka naija kwekora kubi." 
2Samuel12:19 Kwonka Daudi ku yaareebire abagaragwa be nibahwihwitsana, yaabuuza abagaragwa be ati: Omwana yaafa? Nabo baamugarukamu bati: Yaafa!" 
2Samuel12:20 Mpaho Daudi yaimuka aha nsi; yaanaaba, yaayesiiga amajuta, yaajwara ebindi bijwaro, yaaza omu nju ya Nyakubaho, yaaramya. Bwanyima yaaza owe, yaashaba ebyokurya, baabimwihurira, yaarya." 
2Samuel12:21 Abagaragwa be baamubuuza bati: Mbwenu eki, eki waakora, ni kintu ki? Obu omwana abaire akihuriire, oyesiibizekwo, waarira; kwonka ku yaafa, waimuka waarya!" 
2Samuel12:22 Yaabagarukamu ati: Obu omwana abaire akihuriire, nyesiibizekwo naarira, ahabw'okuba ngizire nti: Shana Nyakubaho akangirira embabazi, ogu mwana agumaho." 
2Samuel12:23 Mbwenu obu yaafiire, nyesiibizekwo ki? Nimbaasa kumuhimbuura? Kureka niinye ndimukurata, kwonka we takingarukira." 
2Samuel12:24 Bwanyima Daudi yaahuumuriza omukazi we Betisheba, yaaza omwe, yaabyama nawe, yaamuzaaraho omutabani; yaamweta Solomooni. Haza Nyakubaho yaamukunda." 
2Samuel12:25 Yaamutumaho Natani omurangi, yaamweta eiziina Yedidiya, amakuru ngu, n'enkundwa ya Mukama." 
2Samuel12:26 Omu biro ebyo, Yoabu akarwanisa Raba, orurembo rw'obugabe orw'Abaamoni; yaarukwata." 
2Samuel12:27 Yoabu yaatuma entumwa ahari Daudi, naamugira ati: Ndwaniise Raba, naakwata ekirorero ekirimu amaizi." 
2Samuel12:28 Mbwenu huruza engabo ezitsigaire okwo, muteere ensiisira ahari orwo rurembo, orukwate, ntakaaba niinye naarukwata, rukaanyetererwa." 
2Samuel12:29 Daudi nikwo kuhuruza engabo, akaza Raba akagirwanisa akagikwata;" 
2Samuel12:30 akaiha ekirunga aha mutwe gw'ekishushani kyabo Milikomu, ekirikuhitsya oburemeezi bwa kilo z'ezaabu nka makumi ashatu, kandi kirimu eibaare ry'obuguzi bwingi, bakakijweka Daudi omu mutwe. Kandi omuri orwo rurembo akanyagamu eminyago mingi munonga." 
2Samuel12:31 Yaihamu abantu abaabaire barimu, yaabakoresa emirimo y'emishumeeno n'eshuruuru, n'empango, n'okwecurenga omu tanuuru z'amatafaari. Kandi okwo nikwo yaagizire endembo z'Abaamoni zoona. Bwanyima Daudi n'engabo ze zoona baagaruka Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel13:1 Mbwenu Abusolomu mwene Daudi akaba aine munyaanya murungi munonga, orikwetwa Tamari. Ku haahingwireho ebiro, Amunooni mwene Daudi yaamurigira." 
2Samuel13:2 Amunooni ahabw'okukunda munonga Tamari munyaanya atyo, kyamurugiramu okurwara, ahabw'okuba akaba ari omwishiki oshugaine, Amunooni yaareeba ku kitarikubaasika kugira eki yaamukoraho." 
2Samuel13:3 Kwonka Amunooni akaba aine munywani we, orikwetwa Yonadabu, mwene Shimeeya, mukuru wa Daudi, kandi Yonadabu ogwo ari omunyabwengye." 
2Samuel13:4 Yaamubuuza ati: Iwe mutabani w'omugabe 'we, ahabw'enki buri izooba noogyenda noohwa aha magufa? Tongambira? Amunooni amugira ati: Ninkunda Tamari, munyaanya wa murumuna wangye Abusolomu." 
2Samuel13:5 Yonadabu amugira ati: Irooko, obyame aha kitanda kyawe, oyerwaze. Reero shoimwe ku araije kukureeba, omugire oti: Ikiriza Tamari munyaanyazi, aije ampe ak'okurya nkarye. Haza ebyo byokurya abiteekyere omu maisho gangye, mbireebe kandi abiinyegaburirire." 
2Samuel13:6 Amunooni atyo abyama, ayerwaza. Omugabe ku yaizire kumureeba, Amunooni yaamugira ati: Naakweshengyereza, ikiriza munyaanyazi Tamari aije, anteekyere otugaati aha omu maisho gangye, abe niwe yaatungaburira." 
2Samuel13:7 Daudi nikwo kutuma omuka ahari Tamari, akamugira ati: Irooko oze owa munyaanyoko Amunooni, omuteekyere ak'okurya." 
2Samuel13:8 Tamari atyo aza owa Amunooni munyaanya, amushanga ahi yaabaire abyami. Akwata eisyanga, arikanda, aribumburikamu otugaati, onu naamureeba, atuteeka." 
2Samuel13:9 Bwanyima akwata eki yaatukarangiraho, atumwihurira twona; kwonka onu ayanga kurya, Amunooni amugira ati: Binga abari aha, bampigize. Boona baashohora baamuhigiza." 
2Samuel13:10 Mpaho Amunooni yaagira Tamari ati: Reeta ebyokurya omu kishengye eki ndimu, obingaburire. Tamari aihayo obugaati bu yaateeka, abutwarira Amunooni munyaanya omu kishengye." 
2Samuel13:11 Ku yaabumuhikize haihi kurya, onu yaamukwata, yaamugira ati: Munyaanyazi, ija obyame naanye." 
2Samuel13:12 Omwishiki amugarukamu ati: Ngaaha, munyaanyazi, otampamba, ahabw'okuba eki tikikorwa omuri Isiraeli. Otakora eki kintu ky'obufamutima." 
2Samuel13:13 Mbwenu nkaanye ekyo kihemu nkaatoora hi nakyo? Kandi naiwe okaaba ori omwe omu bifamutima by'omuri Isiraeli. Mbwenu naakweshengyereza, ekyo okigambire omugabe, tarikwija kukuunyima." 
2Samuel13:14 Kwonka onu yaamwangira, kandi ahabw'okumukiza amaani yaamuhamba, yaabyama nawe." 
2Samuel13:15 Bwanyima Amunooni ayangira kimwe Tamari. Haza okwanga ku yaamwangire, kwakira okukunda ku yaamukunzire. Yaamugira ati: Imuka, ogyende." 
2Samuel13:16 Onu amugarukamu ati: Ngaaha, munyaanyazi, eky'okumbinga ni kibi okukira eki wankora. Kwonka tamwikiriza." 
2Samuel13:17 Ayeta omutsigazi orikumuheereza, amugira ati: Nyiha ogu mukazi omu maisho. Haza ku araashohore, omukuratse orwigi." 
2Samuel13:18 Obwo Tamari akaba ajwaire ekiteeteeyi ky'emikono miraingwa, ahabw'okuba omu biro ebyo nikwo bahara b'omugabe abatakashweirwe baabaire bajwara. Omuheereza we atyo amushohoza, amukuratsa orwigi." 
2Samuel13:19 Tamari nikwo kweshuka eiju omu mutwe, akataagura ekiteeteeyi kye kiraingwa eki yaabaire ajwaire, akeekorera emikono, akagyenda naaborooga." 
2Samuel13:20 Abusolomu munyaanya amubuuza ati: Amunooni munyaanyako yaaba akwine? Mbwenu munyaanyazi huumura. Nawe ni munyaanyako, ekyo otakitaho omutima. Tamari yaaguma atyo omwa Abusolomu munyaanya, ari enshoberwa." 
2Samuel13:21 Omugabe Daudi ku yaahuriire ebyo byona, yaagira ekiniga kingi." 
2Samuel13:22 Kwonka Abusolomu tiyaagira ki yaagambira Amunooni, yaaba kibi nari kirungi, ahabw'okuba Abusolomu akangira kimwe Amunooni ahabw'okuhamba Tamari munyaanya." 
2Samuel13:23 Ku haahingwireho emyaka ebiri, Abusolomu yaatwara abakyegyetsi b'ebyoya by'entaama ze Baali-Hazori, ekiri haihi n'ekirorero kya Efuraimu; kandi yaayeta batabani b'omugabe boona kuzayo." 
2Samuel13:24 Abusolomu yaija aha mugabe, yaamugira ati: Reeba, nyowe omwiru waawe nyine abakyegyetsi b'ebyoya by'entaama. Mbwenu Nyakusinga, ninkushaba oikirize iwe n'abagaragwa baawe kuzayo hamwe naanye omwiru waawe." 
2Samuel13:25 Omugabe yaagira Abusolomu ati: Ngaaha, mwana wangye, ka turekye kugyenda twena, tutakaakuremeerera. Abusolomu yaamugyemesereza, kwonka onu yaayanga, yaamwikiriza kugyenda naamutengyera emigisha." 
2Samuel13:26 Bwanyima Abusolomu yaamugira ati: Ku kiraabe kitari kityo, ninkushaba oikirize mukuru wangye Amunooni agyende naitwe, omugabe yaamugarukamu ati: Ahabw'enki agyende naiwe?" 
2Samuel13:27 Kwonka Abusolomu yaamurigitirira, okuhitsya obu onu yaikiriize Amunooni na batabani b'omugabe boona kugyenda nawe." 
2Samuel13:28 Bwanyima Abusolomu yaaragiira abairu be ati: Mugume mutaire eriisho ahari Amunooni. Ku muraareebe yaasinda viino; naanye naabagira nti: Nimuteere Amunooni, mumwite. Mutatiina! Tiinye ndikuba mbaragiire? Mugume, kandi mube emanzi." 
2Samuel13:29 Abairu ba Abusolomu baita Amunooni, nk'oku abaragiire. Batabani b'omugabe boona baimuka, buri omwe yaatemba enyumbu ye, baahunga." 
2Samuel13:30 Ku baabaire bakiri omu muhanda, enkuru yaahika Daudi ku Abusolomu aitsire batabani b'omugabe boona, hatagire owaatsigaraho." 
2Samuel13:31 Omugabe atyo aimuka, ataagura ebi ajwaire, abyama aha nsi, n'abagaragwa be abaabaire bari aho baataagura ebi bajwaire." 
2Samuel13:32 Kwonka Yonadabu, mwene Shimeeya mukuru wa Daudi, yaagira ati: Mukama wangye, otagira ngu baitsire abatsigazi boona batabani baawe omugabe kureka ofiire ni Amunooni wenka, ahabwa Abusolomu kukiragiira. Manya ekyo Abusolomu akamariirira kukikora obu Amunooni yaahamba Tamari munyaanya." 
2Samuel13:33 Mbwenu Nyakusinga, eky'okugira ngu batabani baawe boona bafiire, otakitaho omutima; kureka ofiire ni Amunooni wenka." 
2Samuel13:34 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Abusolomu yaahunga. Reero omuserukare owaabaire naarinda ku yaanagireyo amaisho, yaareeba abantu baingi nibaija nibareetwa omuhanda ogurikuruga Horonaimu aha rubaju rw'enshozi." 
2Samuel13:35 Mpaho Yonadabu yaagira omugabe ati: Nyakusinga, reeba, batabani baawe baija; nk'oku nyowe omwiru waawe naagamba, nikwo kyaba." 
2Samuel13:36 Ku yaabaire yaaheza ati kugamba, batabani b'omugabe baija, baayeha eboroogo, baarira. Omugabe n'abagaragwa be boona nabo baarira munonga." 
2Samuel13:37 Kwonka Abusolomu yaahungira owa Talumai, mwene Amihuudi, omugabe wa Geshuri. Daudi yaaguma naacurira omutabani buri izooba." 
2Samuel13:38 Abusolomu atyo yaahunga, yaaza Geshuri, yaamarayo emyaka eshatu." 
2Samuel13:39 Bwanyima omugabe yaagira ekihika ky'okureeba Abusolomu, ahabw'okuba obusaasi bw'okufa kwa Amunooni bukaba bwamurugireho." 
2Samuel14:1 Mbwenu Yoabu mwene Zeruuya akamanya ku omugabe atakiiniire Abusolomu nziika. 
2Samuel14:2 Nikwo kutuma abantu Tekoa, kwihayo omukazi omunyabwengye. Ogwo mukazi ku yaizire, Yoabu yaamugira ati: Oyegire nk'orikucura, kandi ojwaire ebijwaro by'ori omu rufu. Oteesiiga amajuta, kureka oyegire nk'omukazi omazire ebiro bingi naacurira ofiire." 
2Samuel14:3 Reero oze ow'omugabe omugambire ebi naaza kukugambira. Yoabu atyo amugambira ebi araagambe. 
2Samuel14:4 Ogwo mukazi wa Tekoa, ku yaahikire omugabe, yaajuumara aha nsi yaamutangirira. Bwanyima yaamugira ati: Nyakusinga, njuna!" 
2Samuel14:5 Omugabe yaamugarukamu ati: Obaire ota? Omukazi amugira ati: Ai bambe! ndi omufaakazi, ibanye akafa." 
2Samuel14:6 Kandi nyowe omuzaana waawe nkaba nyine batabani bangye babiri, baatonganira omu ishwa, haabura owaabaramura; omwe nikwo kuteera mugyenzi we akamwita." 
2Samuel14:7 Mbwenu abanyaruganda boona baanyimukiriire, nyowe omuzaana waawe, bangira bati: Tuhe ogwo muntu oitsire mukuru we, naitwe tumwite, nitumutura mukuru we ou aitsire. Hati nibenda kwita n'omuhunguzi, bazimye eikara ri ntsigaize, babuze omushaija wangye eiziina; habure owaatsigara omu nsi."
