2Samuel14:8 Omugabe agira ogwo mukazi ati: Irooko otaahe, niinyija kugira eki naakora aha byawe." 
2Samuel14:9 Ogwo mukazi wa Tekoa agambira omugabe ati: Nyakusinga omugabe, ka mbe niinye naagira orubanja n'ab'eka ya tata, kwonka iwe omugabe n'ekitebe kyawe ky'obugabe mube beere." 
2Samuel14:10 Omugabe amugira ati: Ku haraagire owaakugambaho, omundeetere, naaba atakikugarukaho bundi." 
2Samuel14:11 Omukazi agira omugabe ati: Nyakusinga, ninkweshengyereza, rahira Mukama Ruhanga waawe, ku hatakiija kubaho muhoozi w'enzigu obundi, bakaita mutabani wangye. Omugabe ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho, tiharikwija kubaho akashokye ka mutabani waawe akaraagwe aha nsi." 
2Samuel14:12 Omukazi amugira ati: Nyakusinga omugabe, naakweshengyereza, nyikiriza, nyowe omuzaana waawe, ngire ekindi eki naakugambira. Onu amugira ati: Gamba." 
2Samuel14:13 Omukazi agira ati: Ahabw'enki ocumiire abantu ba Ruhanga enaama erikushusha etyo? Manya iwe omugabe ku orikugamba otyo, nooba nooyesingisa orubanja, ahabw'okuba tokagarwire mutabani waawe owaacwirwe." 
2Samuel14:14 Twena turi ab'okufa, turi nk'amaizi gaatikire aha nsi, agatakibaasa kuyoorwa. Kwonka Ruhanga taihiraho kimwe magara g'omuntu orikucwa obwengye kugarura owaacwirwe, ngu atakaaguma ari encuubwa." 
2Samuel14:15 Mbwenu mukama wangye, ekyo nikyo kyandeeta kukugambira, iwe omugabe. Manya abantu bantiiniise; kwonka nyowe omuzaana waawe naateekateeka nti: Niinyija kugamba naiwe omugabe, obundi, nyowe omuzaana waawe, okankorera eki naakushaba." 
2Samuel14:16 Manya iwe omugabe noija kuhurira eki naagamba, nyowe omuzaana waawe onyihe omu mikono y'orikwenda kuunyita na mutabani wangye, akatwiha aha butaka bu Ruhanga yaatuhungwize." 
2Samuel14:17 Kandi nyowe omuzaana waawe nteekateekire nti: Ekigambo kyawe, Nyakusinga omugabe, nikiija kumpuumuriza ahabw'okuba iwe mukama wangye omugabe ori nka maraika wa Ruhanga, okyenga ebirungi n'ebibi. Mbwenu Mukama Ruhanga waawe naakagume naiwe!" 
2Samuel14:18 Bwanyima omugabe agira ogwo mukazi ati: Otanshereka eki naaza kukubuuza. Omukazi ati: Gamba Nyakusinga omugabe. 
2Samuel14:19 Omugabe amubuuza ati: Beitu ebyo byona, Yoabu abikwataniisemu naiwe? Omukazi amugarukamu ati: Kukwambura, mukama wangye omugabe, tihariho orikubaasa kutoora aha gwa buryo nari aha gwa bumosho, akeehuzya eki iwe Nyakusinga waagamba. Buzimazima omwiru waawe Yoabu niwe andagiire nyowe omuzaana waawe, kandi niwe ampabwire ebi byona ebi naagamba." 
2Samuel14:20 Ahabw'okwenda ngu ebintu ebiriho bihindukye okundi, omwiru waawe Yoabu nikyo agiriire atyo. Kwonka iwe mukama wangye oine obwengye nk'obwa maraika wa Ruhanga kumanya ebintu byona ebiri omu nsi." 
2Samuel14:21 Bwanyima omugabe agira Yoabu ati: Mbwenu naikiriza. Irooko oreete ogwo mutsigazi Abusolomu. 
2Samuel14:22 Yoabu ajuumara aha nsi, aramya omugabe, amusiima naagira ati: Eri izooba, mukama wangye omugabe, nyowe omwiru waawe naamanya ku orikunkunda, ahabw'okuba iwe Nyakusinga waikiriza kumpa eki nyowe omwiru waawe naakushaba." 
2Samuel14:23 Yoabu atyo aimuka aza Geshuri, areeta Abusolomu Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel14:24 Kwonka omugabe agira ati: K'atuure owe hangahari, arekye kuhika ahi ndi. Abusolomu atyo aguma omu ka ye: tagira bu aizire ow'omugabe." 
2Samuel14:25 Mbwenu omuri Isiraeli yoona hakaba hatarimu muntu orikusiimwa munonga ahabw'oburungi bwe bw'aha maisho nka Abusolomu. Okwiha aha mara g'ekigyere kye okuta aha kazingiro k'eishokye, akaba ataine kamogo." 
2Samuel14:26 Aha muheru gwa buri mwaka akaba amweisa eishokye ahabw'okumuremeera. Ku yaabaire arimweisa, oburemeezi bwaryo buhitsya nka kilo emwe n'ekicweka, ey'endengo y'omugabe." 
2Samuel14:27 Abusolomu ogwo akaba aine abatabani bashatu na muhara we omwe orikwetwa Tamari, owaabaire ari omukazi murungi munonga kureebwa." 
2Samuel14:28 Abusolomu yaamara atyo emyaka ebiri omuri Yerusalemu, atareebaine na mugabe." 
2Samuel14:29 Bwanyima Abusolomu yaatuma ku bamwetera Yoabu kumutuma aha mugabe, Yoabu yaayanga kwija. Yaamutumaho omurundi gwa kabiri, nabwo tiyaija." 
2Samuel14:30 Bwanyima yaagambira abairu be ati: Reeba, omusiri gwa Yoabu ogwa baare, guhereraine n'ogwangye, mbwenu nimwirooko mugwotsye; abairu ba Abusolomu baagwotsya," 
2Samuel14:31 Yoabu nikwo kwimuka akaza owa Abusolomu akamugira ati: Ahabw'enki abairu baawe baanyokyeza omusiri? 
2Samuel14:32 Abusolomu amugarukamu ati: Manya nkutumireho ku oija, nkakutuma aha mugabe kumumbuuriza eki naarugiire Geshuri. Haakiri kuri naagumireyo okuhitsya aga magingo. Mbwenu ka ngyende, ndeebane n'omugabe. Ku araashangye nyine eki nshobize anyite." 
2Samuel14:33 Yoabu nikwo kuza ow'omugabe akabimugambira. N'onu akeeta Abusolomu. Abusolomu ku yaahikire omu maisho g'omugabe, yaajuumara aha nsi. Reero omugabe yaamuramutsya naamunywegyera." 
2Samuel15:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire Abusolomu yaayetungira ekigaari n'embaraasi n'abashaija makumi ataano b'okwiruka bamwebembeire. 
2Samuel15:2 Abusolomu ogwo yaaguma naimuka kare, naayemerera aha rubaju rw'omuhanda gurikuza aha irembo ry'orurembo. Mbwenu omuntu ku yaabaire aija aine orubanja ru arikwenda kutongana omu maisho g'omugabe ngu amushoboorore, Abusolomu amweta, amubuuza ati: Nooruga mu rurembo ki? Onu akimugira ati: Nyowe omwiru waawe ndi ow'oruganda nanka, orw'omuri Isiraeli," 
2Samuel15:3 Abusolomu amugira ati: Eego, eki orikufa ni kirungi kandi kihikire; kwonka omugabe taine ou atsigiire kuhurira ebyawe." 
2Samuel15:4 Abusolomu kandi agira ati: Kuri noogira ngu niinye muramuzi omuri egi nsi, omuntu weena oine eki arikufa nari orubanja, akaanyizireho mucwera orubanja omu buryo." 
2Samuel15:5 Kandi omuntu ku yaabaire aija kumutangirira ainama, onu agorora omukono, amukwata, amunywegyera." 
2Samuel15:6 Okwo nikwo Abusolomu yaatwarize Abaisiraeli boona abaabaire baija ow'omugabe kubashoboorora. Abusolomu yaabeihabeiha atyo Abaisiraeli. 
2Samuel15:7 Ku haahingwireho emyaka ena, Abusolomu yaagira omugabe ati: Ninkweshengyereza onyikirize nze Heburooni nsiguurireyo ekisigo ki naasigiire Nyakubaho." 
2Samuel15:8 Manya nyowe omwiru waawe obu naabaire ntwire Geshuri omuri Aramu, nkahiga ningira nti: Buzimazima Nyakubaho ku aringarura Yerusalemu, ndyamuramiza Heburooni." 
2Samuel15:9 Omugabe amugira ati: Gyenda n'obusingye. Nawe aimuka aza Heburooni. 
2Samuel15:10 Kwonka Abusolomu atuma entumwa bwesherekye aha b'enganda za Isiraeli boona naabagira ati: Ahonaaho ku muraahurire enzamba yaagamba, mugire muti: Abusolomu niwe Mugabe omuri Heburooni." 
2Samuel15:11 Kandi Abusolomu omu kuruga Yerusalemu, akagyenda n'abashaija magana abiri abu yaayetsire ngu babe abagyenyi be, bakagyendera eryo hataine ki bamanyire." 
2Samuel15:12 Mbwenu Abusolomu ku yaabaire naakitamba ebitambo, yaatuma kweta Ahitofeli Omunyagiilo, omuhi w'obwengye wa Daudi kwija naaruga Giilo omu rurembo rwe. Okwebumba kwaba okw'amaani, abantu abaayebumbire na Abusolomu baaguma nibakanya." 
2Samuel15:13 Reero entumwa yaija ahari Daudi yaamugira eti: Abaisiraeli babumbire Abusolomu. 
2Samuel15:14 Daudi nikwo kugira abagaragwa be boona abu yaabaire aine Yerusalemu ati: Nimwimukye tuhungye. Kitari ekyo tihaine oraahonokye Abusolomu. Nimwehuute, atakaatuhambya juba akatukora kubi, akacwekyereza ab'omu rurembo boona." 
2Samuel15:15 Abagaragwa baagira omugabe bati: Reeba itwe abairu baawe twetekateekire kukora eki iwe mukama waitu omugabe oraacwemu. 
2Samuel15:16 Omugabe atyo ashohora, n'ab'eka ye boona bamukurata. Kureka atsigayo abakazi be ikumi ebinyanshunju kurinda eka." 
2Samuel15:17 Omugabe agyenda, n'abantu boona bamukuratiire. Ku bahika aha nju erikuhereerukayo, beemereraho." 
2Samuel15:18 Abagaragwa be boona bamurabaho n'Abakereti boona, n'Abapeleti boona n'Abagiiti magana mukaaga abaamukuratiire, buri omwe naaruga Gaati, nabo bamurabaho." 
2Samuel15:19 Bwanyima omugabe agira Itaayi Omugiiti ati: Mbwenu iwe noogyendera ki naitwe? Garukayo, ogume n'omugabe; ahabw'okuba ori omunyaihanga owaazaahire." 
2Samuel15:20 Nibwo oizire juba, mbwenu nimbaasa nta kukuzengyereza naitwe, ntarikumanya ei ndikuza. Garukayo ogyende na beene waanyu; haza Nyakubaho agume naabakunda, kandi ababeere omwesigwa." 
2Samuel15:21 Kwonka Itaayi agarukamu omugabe ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho, buso bwawe, Nyakusinga omugabe, ahi iwe mukama wangye oraaze, yaaba kufa nari kukira, naanye omwiru waawe niho ndaaze." 
2Samuel15:22 Daudi nikwo kugira Itaayi ati: Mbwenu irooko orabeho. Itaayi Omugiiti atyo arabaho n'abashaija be boona n'abaana boona abu yaabaire aine. 
2Samuel15:23 Abo bantu ku baabaire nibahingura, ab'omuri ekyo kyanga boona baaborooga. Omugabe atyo ayambuka akagyera ka Kidirooni n'abantu boona bagumizamu nibatoora ogw'eihamba." 
2Samuel15:24 Reero Abiyataari aija, na Zadoki nawe aija n'Abaleevi boona baheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Ruhanga. Baagihuumuza aha nsi, okuhitsya obu abantu boona baarugire omu rurembo." 
2Samuel15:25 Bwanyima omugabe yaagira Zadoki ati: Nimwekorere eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, mugigarure omu rurembo Nyakubaho ku arangirire embabazi, naija kungarura, ngireebe hamwe n'obutaaho bwe." 
2Samuel15:26 Kwonka ku araagire ati: Tindikukusiima; reeba, ndi aha, angire nk'oku arikwenda." 
2Samuel15:27 Omugabe kandi agambira Zadoki omuhongyerezi ati: Mbwenu irooko ogarukyeyo omu rurembo n'obusingye: iwe na Abiyataari na batabani baanyu bombi: Ahimaazi mutabani waawe, na Yonataani mwene Abiyataari." 
2Samuel15:28 Reeba, naaza kutegyerereza aharikwambukirwa nooza omu ihamba, okuhitsya obu murantumeho mukammanyisa." 
2Samuel15:29 Zadoki na Abiyataari nabo baaheeka eshankuukye ya Ruhanga, baagigarura Yerusalemu, baagumayo." 
2Samuel15:30 Bwanyima Daudi atemba Orushozi rw'Emioliva naarira, atajwaire nkaito, kandi ayetwekyereire. N'abu yaabaire aine boona baagyenda nibarira, beetwekyereire." 
2Samuel15:31 Reero haagira owaagambira Daudi ku Ahitofeli ari omwe omu beebumbire na Abusolomu. Daudi agira ati: Ai Nyakubaho, ninkweshengyereza, faafaatikanisa enaama ya Ahitofeli." 
2Samuel15:32 Daudi ku yaahikire aha mutwe gw'ekibungo ahi baramiza Ruhanga, yaayecura Hushaayi Omuaruuki, aizire kumutangirira, aine ebijwaro bitaagukire, n'eitaka rimuri omu mutwe." 
2Samuel15:33 Daudi yaamugira ati: Ku oraagyende naanye, noija kundemeerera." 
2Samuel15:34 Kwonka ku oraagarukye omu rurembo waagira Abusolomu oti: Nyakusinga, niinyija kuba omwiru waawe; nk'oku mbaire ndi omwiru wa sho omu biro ebihwaire, na hati nikwo ndaabe omwiru waawe, nibwo oraanyitire enaama ya Ahitofeli." 
2Samuel15:35 Beitu shi nooba otaineyo Zadoki na Abiyataari abahongyerezi? Mbwenu kyona eki oraahurire omu nju y'omugabe, okigambire Zadoki na Abiyataari abahongyerezi." 
2Samuel15:36 Reeba, baineyo batabani baabo bombi, Ahimaazi mwene Zadoki, na Yonataani mwene Abiyataari, mube nibo mwantumaho kyona eki muraahurire." 
2Samuel15:37 Hushaayi munywani wa Daudi nikwo kugaruka omu rurembo, akashanga Abusolomu naataaha omuri Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel16:1 Daudi ku yaabaire yaarengyera ati aha mutwe gw'ekibungo, Ziiba omugaragwa wa Mefibosheti yaamubugana aine endogoya ibiri eziriho amatandiiko, zeekoreire emigaati magana abiri, n'emigimba igana y'emizaabibu eyomire, n'endiijo igana y'ebijuma ebyera omu kyanda, n'endyanga ya viino." 
2Samuel16:2 Omugabe yaabuuza Ziiba ati: Ebi n'eby'enki? Ziiba yaamugarukamu ati: Endogoya n'ez'ab'eka yaawe Nyakusinga, kuzigyenderaho. Emigaati n'ebijuma by'omu kyanda n'eby'abatsigazi baawe kubirya, kandi viino n'ey'okunywebwa abaraagwere enshazi omu ihamba." 
2Samuel16:3 Omugabe yaamugira ati: Mbwenu shi mutabani wa mukama waawe ari nkahi? Ziiba amugarukamu ati: Reeba, atsigaire Yerusalemu, ahabw'okuba agizire ati: Eri izooba ab'enju ya Isiraeli nibaija kungarura aha ngoma ya tata." 
2Samuel16:4 Omugabe agira Ziiba ati: Mbwenu ebibaire biri ebya Mefibosheti, hati byaba ebyawe. Ziiba agira ati: Kasingye Nyakusinga omugabe! Kagume nongirira otyo embabazi." 
2Samuel16:5 Omugabe Daudi ku yaahikire Bahurimu, haarugayo omushaija w'ab'omuryango gw'enju ya Saulo, orikwetwa Shimei mwene Geera, yaija naakyeena." 
2Samuel16:6 Yaarekyera Daudi amabaare n'abagaragwa be boona, n'abantu boona n'amamanzi, abaabaire bamushagatiire." 
2Samuel16:7 Shimei omuri okwo kukyeena, yaagira ati: Rugaho, rugaho, iwe mwitani we, ekishaija kitaine mugasho!" 
2Samuel16:8 Nyakubaho akuhoire naakutura okwita ab'enju ya Saulo, ou waagiire aha ngoma ye. Nyakubaho obugabe bwawe nikyo abuheereire mutabani waawe Abusolomu. Mbwenu obwinazi bwawe niiwe bwagwera, iwe mwitani 'we!" 
2Samuel16:9 Bwanyima Abishaayi mwene Zeruuya agira omugabe ati: Egi mbwa efiire neekukyeenera ki, mukama wangye omugabe? Ka nyambukye mmutemeho omutwe." 
2Samuel16:10 Kwonka omugabe amugira ati: Mbwenu imwe beene Zeruuya, nyowe naimwe twine kakwate ki? Nyakubaho ku araabe niwe amugizire ati: Kyeena Daudi; n'oha owaakugira ati: Ekyo waakikorera ki?" 
2Samuel16:11 Daudi agira Abishaayi n'abagaragwa be boona ati: Mbwenu mutabani wangye ou nyezaariire ku araabe naayenda kuunyita, kaashwa ogu Munyabenyamiini! Nimumurugyeho akyeene, ahabw'okuba Mukama niwe akimuragiire!" 
2Samuel16:12 Shana Nyakubaho akaareeba okubonabona kwangye, anzimuurira ebirungi ahabw'oku kukyeenwa kwangye kw'eri izooba." 
2Samuel16:13 Daudi n'abashaija be batyo bagumizamu omuhanda. Shimei nawe aha ogw'orukiizi ahashungaine nawe, agyenda naamukyeena, ataireho n'okumurekyera amabaare n'ebikoote." 
2Samuel16:14 Omugabe n'abu yaabaire aine baahika Yorudaani baruhire munonga, omugabe yaaruhuukirayo." 
2Samuel16:15 Mbwenu Abusolomu n'abantu boona Abaisiraeli, bakahika Yerusalemu hamwe na Ahitofeli." 
2Samuel16:16 Reero Hushaayi Omuaruuki, munywani wa Daudi," 
2Samuel16:17 ku yaahikire ahari Abusolomu, yaamugira ati: Obwo nibwo bwesigwa bwawe ahari munywani waawe?" 
2Samuel16:18 Hushaayi yaamugarukamu ati: Ngaaha! we, ou Nyakubaho n'aba bantu n'Abaisiraeli boona baatooraine, niwe ndaabe owe, kandi niwe ndaagume nawe." 
2Samuel16:19 Kandi ondiijo ou ndaagaragire n'oha, tiiwe omutabani? Mbwenu nk'oku naagaragiire shoimwe, naiwe nikwo ndaakugaragire." 
2Samuel16:20 Abusolomu reero agira Ahitofeli ati: Tuhe obwengye, oku turaatwaze!" 
2Samuel16:21 Ahitofeli agira Abusolomu ati: Irooko obyame n'ebinyanshunju bya shoimwe, ebi atsigiire eka ye kugirinda, Abaisiraeli boona bamanyireho ku otarikwendana na shoimwe. Haza abeebumbire naiwe kibateere omuhimbo." 
2Samuel16:22 Batyo baateerera Abusolomu eihema aha mutwe gw'enju. Abusolomu yaabyama n'ebinyanshunju bya ishe, Abaisiraeli boona bagamutaireho." 
2Samuel16:23 Omu biro ebyo, obwengye bu Ahitofeli yaabaire aha, bukaba buba nk'oku omuntu ayehanuurize ahari Ruhanga, kandi nikwo bwabaire busiimwa munonga Daudi na Abusolomu." 
2Samuel17:1 Ahitofeli kandi agira Abusolomu ati: Ka ntoorane engabo kakumi n'enkumi ibiri, mpurure nkurate Daudi eki kiro;" 
2Samuel17:2 mmugweho aruhire, ataine maani, mmwitse obwoba, abu aine boona bahungye; nyite omugabe wenka;" 
2Samuel17:3 haza nkugarurire abantu boona, nk'oku omukazi agaruka owa iba. Manya eki orikwenda n'okwita omuntu omwe, reero abantu boona bakagira obusingye." 
2Samuel17:4 Obwengye bu yaacwire bukasiimwa Abusolomu n'abakuru b'omuri Isiraeli boona. 
2Samuel17:5 Bwanyima Abusolomu yaagira ati: Nimwete Hushaayi Omuaruuki nawe tuhurire eki arikugamba. 
2Samuel17:6 Hushaayi ku yaahikireho, Abusolomu yaamugira ati: Ahitofeli yaatugambira ati n'ati; mbwenu tukore nk'oku yaatuhabura? Ku kiraabe kitari kityo, naiwe gira eki watugambira." 
2Samuel17:7 Hushaayi agira Abusolomu ati: Hati obwengye bu Ahitofeli yaabaha ti burungi. 
2Samuel17:8 Hushaayi ayongyera abagira ati: Noomanya shoimwe n'abashaija be ku bari amamanzi, kandi ku bashaariire nk'edubu i baayaka ebyana byayo omu kishaka. Ekindi, shoimwe n'omurwani rugambwa, tarikwija kuraara na bantu." 
2Samuel17:9 Na mbwenu ayesherekire omu nyanga nari omu gundi mwanya. Kandi ku haakugira abaafa omu hururu y'okubanza, abaraakihurire nibaija kugira bati: Aba Abusolomu nibo baitsirwe." 
2Samuel17:10 Nangwa n'omuntu emanzi oine omutima nk'ogw'entare naija kuhahaara; ahabw'okuba Isiraeli yoona neemanya ku shoimwe aba emanzi rugambwa n'abashaija bu aine ku bari amamanzi. 
2Samuel17:11 Nyowe obwengye bu ndikukuha n'obu: Huruza Abaisiraeli boona, okwiha Daani okuta Beerisheba, babe baingi nk'omusheenyi gw'aha nyanja. Haza naiwe ohurure nabo." 
2Samuel17:12 Reero tumuteere kitaraariire ahi turaamushangye hoona, tumugweho nk'oku orume rugwa aha itaka, 'we n'abashaija be tubanyuunyeho." 
2Samuel17:13 Ku araahungire omu rurembo, Abaisiraeli boona bareete emirunga turukumbagaze omu ruhanga, harekye kugira akabaare kaatsigaraho." 
2Samuel17:14 Abusolomu n'Abaisiraeli boona baagira bati: Obwengye bwa Hushaayi Omuaruuki bwahita obwa Ahitofeli. Manya Nyakubaho akaba yaacumire enaama y'okufaafaatikanisa obwengye bwa Ahitofeli, ngu abone kugwisiza Abusolomu akagwe." 
2Samuel17:15 Bwanyima Hushaayi akagambira Zadoki na Abiyataari abahongyerezi ati: Ahitofeli ahaire Abusolomu n'abakuru b'omuri Isiraeli obwengye ati n'ati, naanye naabubaha nti na nti." 
2Samuel17:16 Mbwenu murahukye kutuma ahari Daudi mumugambire muti: Eki kiro otaraara aha nyambukiro erikuza omu ihamba, kureka okore kyona eki orikubaasa kwambuka Yorudaani. Kitari ekyo, iwe omugabe n'abantu boona abu oine nimwija kumarwaho." 
2Samuel17:17 Mbwenu obwo Yonataani na Shimaazi bakaba bategyerereize Enirogeli; omuzaana aguma naazayo kubagambira, nabo bagyenda babiteekyerereza Daudi omugabe. Manya bakaba batarikwikirizibwa kutaaha omu rurembo nibareebwa." 
2Samuel17:18 Kwonka aha murundi ogu, omwojo akabareeba, yaagambira Abusolomu. Bombi nikwo kurugayo nibeehuuta, bakahika aha nju y'omushaija wa Bahurimu, owaabaire aine eiziba omu kibuga kye, bakariragaramu;" 
2Samuel17:19 omukazi w'ogwo mushaija akaihayo ekitaro akakita aha munwa gwaryo, akarimaamagizaho omushekure gw'engano ngu ritamanywa." 
2Samuel17:20 Abambari ba Abusolomu ku baahikire aha nju, baabuuza ogwo mukazi bati: Ahimaazi na Yonataani bari nkahi? Omukazi yaabagarukamu ati: Baayambuka akagyera. Ku baabasherwire bataababona, baagarukayo Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel17:21 Abo bambari ku baaherize kugyenda, banu baatuuhuuka omu iziba, baagyenda, baagambira omugabe Daudi bati: Nimwimukye, murahukye kwambuka omugyera ahabw'okuba Ahitofeli ahaire obwengye buti na buti, kukurwanisa." 
2Samuel17:22 Daudi atyo n'abantu boona abu yaabaire aine bambuka Yorudaani. Ku bwagiire kusheesha, haashangwa hatakiriho n'omwe otakambukire." 
2Samuel17:23 Ahitofeli ku yaareebire obwengye bwe butaakuratirwa, yaatandiika endogoya ye, yaataaha owe omu rurembo rw'owaabo. Ku yaaherize kutebeekanisa eby'omu ka ye, yaayehanika, yaafa, baamuziika omu kituuro kya ishe." 
2Samuel17:24 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Daudi yaahika Mahanaimu. Abusolomu nawe yaayaambuka Yorudaani aine Abaisiraeli boona." 
2Samuel17:25 Obwo Abusolomu akaba ahindwire Amaasa omukuru w'eihe, omu mwanya ga Yoabu. Amaasa ogwo akaba ari mutabani w'omushaija orikwetwa Itura Omuishimaeli, owaabaire ashweire Abigaili, muhara wa Nahashi, munyaanya Zeruuya, nyina Yoabu." 
2Samuel17:26 Reero Abaisiraeli na Abusolomu baasiisira omu nsi ya Gileadi. 
2Samuel17:27 Daudi ku yaahikire Mahanaimu, Shobi mwene Nahashi owa Raba ey'Abaamoni, na Makiri mwene Amieli owa Lodebaari, na Barizilaayi Omunyagileadi owa Roogelimu," 
2Samuel17:28 baareeta eby'okubyamira, enyabya, enyungu, engano, baare, esaano, engano zikarangire, ebihimba, enkuuku," 
2Samuel17:29 obwoki, amajuta g'enjwano, entaama, n'amajuta makuru g'ente, baabigyemuriire Daudi n'abu yaabaire aine kubirya; ahabw'okuba bakagira bati: Abantu omuri eryo ihamba baine enjara baruhire, kandi baitsirwe eiriho." 
2Samuel18:1 Bwanyima Daudi akabara abashaija bu yaabaire aine, yaabataho abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi, n'aba igana-igana." 
2Samuel18:2 Atyo yaagaba eihe. Ekicweka kimwe kya kashatu yaakiha Yoabu, ekindi kya kashatu yaakiha Abishaayi mwene Zeruuya murumuna wa Eriyaabu, n'ekindi yaakiha Itaayi Omugiiti. Kandi omugabe yaagira ezo ngabo ati: Naanye niinyija kuhurura naimwe." 
2Samuel18:3 Kwonka abashaija be baamugira bati: Torikuhurura, ahabw'okuba ku turaahungye, itwe abazigu tibarikwija kutwetaho. Nangwa nobu kimwe kya kabiri ky'abantu baitu kyakufa, nabwo tibarikutwetaho. Kwonka iwe noingana n'abantu kakumi ab'omuriitwe. N'ahabw'ekyo haakiri ogume omu rurembo, otwoherereze ab'okutuha emikono." 
2Samuel18:4 Omugabe yaabagarukamu ati: Eki murikusiima nikyo ndaakore. Omugabe yaayemerera aha irembo, engabo zoona nizishohora omu mitwe ya igana-igana, n'eya rukumi-rukumi." 
2Samuel18:5 Reero omugabe yaaragiira Yoabu na Abishaayi na Itaayi ati: Mutwaze gye ogwo mwojo Abusolomu ahabwangye. Kandi abantu boona baahurira omugabe naayehanangiriza abakuru b'engabo boona aha bikwatiraine na Abusolomu. 
2Samuel18:6 Zityo engabo zihurura kurwanira n'Abaisiraeli omu ishwa, orugamba rurwanirwa omu kibira kya Efuraimu." 
2Samuel18:7 Abaisiraeli basingurirwayo engabo za Daudi. Eryo izooba babaitamu abantu baingi, obukumi bubiri." 
2Samuel18:8 Orugamba rubuga omuri ekyo kyanga, kandi eryo izooba abaagwire omu kibira baakira abaitsirwe rurara." 
2Samuel18:9 Abusolomu akabugabugana n'engabo za Daudi atakimanyire, obwo atembire enyumbu ye. Egyo nyumbu yaaraba omu mataagi g'omuvure muhango agakwataine; omutwe gwe gwakwatirwamu, yaatsigara naarengyeerera omu mwanya, enyumbu i yaabaire atembire yaagumizamu." 
2Samuel18:10 Omuntu owaakireebire yaagambira Yoabu, ati: Naareeba Abusolomu naareereetera omu muvure!" 
2Samuel18:11 Yoabu agira ogwo muntu waamugambiire ati: Ot'enki? Waamureeba! Ahabw'enki otaamucumita okamutuura aha nsi? Naaba ninkuha empiiha ikumi z'efeeza n'orukoba. 
2Samuel18:12 Kwonka ogwo muntu yaagira Yoabu ati: Nobu waakumpa empiiha rukumi z'efeeza, tinkaabanga mukono kwita omwana w'omugabe, ahabw'okuba twayehuririra omugabe naakuragiira, iwe na Abishaayi na Itaayi, ati: Ahabwangye murinde ogwo mutsigazi Abusolomu." 
2Samuel18:13 Ekindi, kuri naaba endeebya, nkamwita; baaba batarikwija kukishereka mugabe; haza iwe okyejuura." 
2Samuel18:14 Yoabu amugira ati: Tinaaza kusiisira mwanya gwangye busha ningamba naiwe. Atyo akwata amacumu ashatu, agatimbura Abusolomu omu mutima, naakireereetera omu muvure ahuriire." 
2Samuel18:15 Reero abatsigazi ikumi abakwatsi b'eby'okurwanisa bya Yoabu baturuka Abusolomu oku n'oku, bamuteera, bamwita." 
2Samuel18:16 Bwanyima Yoabu ateera enzamba y'okuzibira engabo kurwana, zirekyera aho kubinga Abaisiraeli, zigaruka." 
2Samuel18:17 Baihaho Abusolomu bamunaga omu kiina kihango ky'omu kibira, bamurundaho omutuumo muhango gw'amabaare. Abaisiraeli boona bahunga, buri omwe agaruka owe." 
2Samuel18:18 Mbwenu Abusolomu obu yaabaire akihuriire, akatwara enyomyo, yaagibyara omu ruhanga rw'omugabe. Ahabw'okuba akagira ati: Tiinyine mutabani wangye ow'okuguma nibaijukiraho eiziina ryangye. Egyo nyomyo yaagyeyeterera; n'okuhitsya hati neekyeetwa enyomyo y'ekiijutsyo kya Abusolomu." 
2Samuel18:19 Bwanyima Ahimaazi mwene Zadoki agira ati: Ka nyirukye, ngambire omugabe amakuru, ku Nyakubaho yaamuhoorera, akamujuna abazigu be." 
2Samuel18:20 Yoabu amugira ati: Otaza kugamba amakuru eri izooba, orabugagambe obundi. Kwonka eri izooba, otazayo kugagamba, ahabw'okuba mutabani w'omugabe yaafa." 
2Samuel18:21 Bwanyima Yoabu yaagira Omukuushi ati: Irooko, ogambire omugabe ebi waareeba. Ogwo Mukuushi yainama omu maisho ga Yoabu, atyo yairuka." 
2Samuel18:22 Bwanyima Ahimaazi mwene Zadoki yaagaruka yaagambira Yoabu ati: Ekiraabe kyabaire kibe! Ka nyirukye, nkurate Omukuushi. Yoabu yaamugarukamu ati: Mbwenu mwana wangye, noirukibwa ki, ku oraabe otarikwija kuheebwa kihembo ahabw'ago makuru?" 
2Samuel18:23 Onu amugira ati: Ekiraabe kibe, kwonka nyowe niinyiruka. Yoabu amugira ati: Iruka. Ahimaazi airuka naaha ogw'oruhita, atangayo Omukuushi." 
2Samuel18:24 Mbwenu Daudi ku yaabaire ashitami rwagati y'amarembo gombi, omurinzi yaatembera aha kisiika, yaaza aha mutwe gw'ekigo ky'eirembo. Ku yaanagireyo ati amaisho, ahonaaho yaareeba omushaija nairuka wenka." 
2Samuel18:25 Ogwo murinzi yaakigambira omugabe, naayamuza. Omugabe yaagira ati: Ku araabe ari wenka, biri aine amakuru gu yaija kutugambira. Atyo aija naayehuuta, ahika haihi." 
2Samuel18:26 Kandi omurinzi areeba ondiijo muntu nairuka, ayeta ab'aha irembo ati: Reeba, n'ondiijo muntu naija nairuka wenka. Omugabe agira ati: Nawe aine amakuru gu atureeteire." 
2Samuel18:27 Omurinzi ayongyera agira ati: Nindeeba oyebembeire nairuka nka Ahimaazi mwene Zadoki. Omugabe ati: N'omuntu murungi, yaatureetera amakuru marungi." 
2Samuel18:28 Bwanyima Ahimaazi agambira omugabe n'eiraka rihango, ati: Byona ni buhooro! Atyo ainama omu maisho g'omugabe, agira ati: Mukama Ruhanga waawe, owaahayo abaabaire bakubangiire omukono, iwe mukama wangye omugabe, naakasingye." 
2Samuel18:29 Omugabe amubuuza ati: Mbwenu shi ogwo mutsigazi Abusolomu ari buhooro? Ahimaazi amugarukamu ati: Obu Yoabu yantuma, nyowe omwiru waawe naareeba abantu nibarabanamu; kwonka tinaamanya kyabaho." 
2Samuel18:30 Omugabe ati: Garuka aha rubaju, oyemerere. Nawe agaruka aha rubaju, ayemerera." 
2Samuel18:31 Ago magingo Zireeta Omukuushi. Agira ati: Mukama wangye omugabe, naakureetera amakuru marungi; ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho eri izooba yaakujuna boona abaabaire bakwimukiriire." 
2Samuel18:32 Omugabe abuuza Omukuushi ati: Ebyo omutsigazi ori Abusolomu ari buhooro? Omukuushi amugarukamu ati: Nyakusinga omugabe, abazigu baawe n'abandi boona abakwimukirira kukukorera kubi, nibakabe nk'ogwo mutsigazi!" 
2Samuel18:33 Omugabe atyo agira obujune bwingi, atemba omu kishengye kya ruguru eky'aha mutwe gw'eirembo, arira kandi agyenda naacura ati: Ai bambe: Mwana wangye Abusolomu, mwana wangye, mwana wangye Abusolomu! Nangwa kuri niinye naafa omu mwanya gwawe! Ai bambe Abusolomu mwana wangye, mwana wangye!" 
2Samuel19:1 Bakagambira Yoabu bati: Reeba, omugabe ariyo naarira, naacurira Abusolomu." 
2Samuel19:2 Eryo izooba abantu boona okushemerererwa obusinguzi kwabahindukira okucura, ahabw'okuba bakahurira ku omugabe arikuganya ahabw'omwana we." 
2Samuel19:3 Eryo izooba abantu baagaruka omu rurembo nibashoobooka nk'abahungire aha rugamba bakaitwa enshoni. 
2Samuel19:4 Omugabe yaayetwekyerera, kandi yaaborooga ati: Ai bambe, mwana wangye Abusolomu! Ai bambe, Abusolomu, mwana wangye, mwana wangye!" 
2Samuel19:5 Bwanyima Yoabu yaataaha omu nju y'omugabe, yaamugira ati: Eri izooba waahemura abairu baawe abaakiza amagara gaawe n'aga batabani baawe, na bahara baawe, n'abakazi baawe, n'ebinyanshunju byawe." 
2Samuel19:6 Ahabw'okuba nookunda abarikukwanga, oyanga abarikukukunda. Manya eri izooba waakyoreka butunu ku abakuru b'engabo zaawe n'abagaragwa baawe ahariiwe bari busha. Hati naayetegyereza ngu kuri Abusolomu agumireho, haza itwe twena tukafa, waaba nooyesiima." 
2Samuel19:7 Mbwenu nu, imuka, oshohore, ogambire abairu baawe eby'okubagarura omutima omu nda; ahabw'okuba nindahira Nyakubaho, ku oraabe otagiireyo, tihaine oraagume naiwe eki kiro. Haza ekyo kikurugiremu akabi karikukira aku orareebire okwiha omu butsigazi bwawe n'okuhitsya hati." 
2Samuel19:8 Omugabe atyo aimuka, ashutama omu irembo. Bagambira abantu boona bati: Reeba, omugabe ashutami omu irembo. Batyo boona baija, bamushagatira." 
2Samuel19:9 Mbwenu obwo, Abaisiraeli boona bakaba bahungire, buri muntu agarukire omu ka ye." 
2Samuel19:10 Bwanyima abantu b'enganda z'Abaisiraeli zoona baagarukanamu bati: Omugabe niwe yaatukirize abazigu, akatujuna Abaifilisiti. Mbwenu ahungire Abusolomu, yaaruga omuri egi nsi." 
2Samuel19:11 Kwonka Abusolomu ou baasiigire amajuta kututegyeka agwire aha rugamba. Mbwenu ahabw'enki tutarikucwa obwengye bw'okugarura omugabe? 
2Samuel19:12 Reero Omugabe Daudi yaatuma ahari Zadoki na Abiyataari abahongyerezi ati: Mubuuze abakuru b'Abaayuda muti: Ahabw'enki niimwe muraabe abaraahereerukye kugarura omugabe omu ka ye, haza baaherize kumuhitsyaho ebi Abaisiraeli boona bagambire?" 
2Samuel19:13 Niimwe baitu, niimwe bangye b'aha mara. Mbwenu ahabw'enki niimwe mwaza kuhereeruka kugarura omugabe?" 
2Samuel19:14 Kandi mugire Amaasa muti: Tori waitu w'aha mara? Mbwenu ku oraabe otabaire mukuru w'eihe ryangye omu mwanya gwa Yoabu okwiha hati, Ruhanga akinture n'okukiraho." 
2Samuel19:15 Daudi ebi yaatumire aha Bayuda boona oku baingana, byabahika aha njoka; nikwo nabo kumutumaho bati: Garuka hamwe n'abagaragwa baawe boona." 
2Samuel19:16 Mpaho omugabe agaruka, ahika Yorudaani. Abaayuda baija Giligaali kumubugana, ngu babone kumwambutsya." 
2Samuel19:17 Mbwenu Shimei mwene Geera, Omubenyamiini wa Bahurimu, akarahuka kwija hamwe n'Abaayuda kubugana omugabe Daudi." 
2Samuel19:18 Kandi yaija n'abashaija rukumi b'Abaabenyamiini. Na Ziiba omugaragwa w'omu nju ya Saulo, hamwe n'abatabani ikumi na bataano n'abairu be makumi abiri, baayehuuta, baaragara omuri Yorudaani, omugabe naabareeba." 
2Samuel19:19 Baacwekanisa enyambukiro kureeta ab'eka y'omugabe, n'okumukorera ebi arikwenda. Omugabe ku yaabaire ari haihi kuza omuri Yorudaani kwambuka, Shimei mwene Geera yaamugwa omu maguru." 
2Samuel19:20 Yaamugira ati: Nyakusinga omugabe, otaguma ontaireho orubanja nari okwijuka oku nyowe omwiru waawe naakucumwireho, buri obu iwe mukama wangye omugabe oruga Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel19:21 Manya nyowe omwiru waawe nimmanya oku naacumwire. Nikyo naizira eri izooba, ndi ow'okubanza omu b'omuryango gwa Yosefu kushuuma aha, kukubugana, iwe Nyakusinga omugabe." 
2Samuel19:22 Abishaayi mwene Zeruuya agarukamu ati: Mbwenu shi ekyo tikishemereire kwitisa Shimei, ahabw'okukyeena ou Nyakubaho yaasiigire amajuta?" 
2Samuel19:23 Kwonka Daudi agira ati: Imwe beene Zeruuya, nkwatiraine ki naimwe, mwaza kundeetaho obuzigu eri izooba? Mbwenu eri izooba omuri Isiraeli hariho oraitwe? Nainga shi nyowe eri izooba tindikumanya ku ndi omugabe wa Isiraeli?" 
2Samuel19:24 Omugabe agira Shimei ati: Tori w'okufa; kandi ekyo akimurahira. 
2Samuel19:25 Reero Mefibosheti mwijukuru wa Saulo akaija kubugana omugabe. Okwiha obu omugabe yaagyenda, okuhitsya aha izooba ri yaagarukiireho, Mefibosheti ogwo akaba atakanaabaga bigyere, nobu kwakuba okutuubya aha bireju bye, nari okwozya ebijwaro bye." 
2Samuel19:26 Ku yaarugire Yerusalemu kubugana omugabe, omugabe yaamubuuza ati: Mefibosheti, ahabw'enki otaragyenzire naanye?" 
2Samuel19:27 Mefibosheti yaamugarukamu ati: Nyakusinga, omugaragwa wangye akambeiha. Manya, nyowe omwiru waawe nkamugira nti: Ntandiikira endogoya, ngitembe, ngyende n'omugabe; ahabw'okuba nyowe omwiru waawe ntuura ndi omurema." 
2Samuel19:28 Kandi ekindi, mukama wangye, akakumbeihereraho nyowe omwiru waawe. Kwonka iwe Nyakusinga omugabe, ori nka maraika wa Ruhanga. Mbwenu ongire nk'oku orikwenda." 
2Samuel19:29 Manya ab'eka ya tata boona bakaba bari ab'okwitirwa omu maisho gaawe, Nyakusinga omugabe; kwonka nyowe omwiru waawe wanta omu barikuriira aha meeza yaawe. Mbwenu nyowe niinye oha orikukushaba, iwe omugabe, ngu ongirire embabazi zirikukiraho?" 
2Samuel19:30 Omugabe amugira ati: Rekyera aho kungambira ebyawe! Ncwiremu ku iwe na Ziiba mubagana ebintu. 
2Samuel19:31 Mefibosheti, agarukamu omugabe ati: K'abitware byona, niho iwe mukama wangye omugabe waagaruka buhooro omuka." 
2Samuel19:32 Mbwenu Barizilaayi Omugileadi akaija naaruga Rogelimu, yaija n'omugabe yaamuhitsya ahari Yorudaani, yaamushendekyereza, yaamwambutsya seeri." 
2Samuel19:33 Barizilaayi ogwo akaba ari omushaija mukuru, w'emyaka makumi munaana; kandi akaba agyemurira omugabe ebyokurya obu yaabaire ari Mahanaimu; ahabw'okuba akaba ari omutungi munonga." 
2Samuel19:34 Reero omugabe yaagambira Barizilaayi ati: Ija tugyendane Yerusalemu, ogume naanye, nkuhe eby'okukutunga." 
2Samuel19:35 Barizilaayi agarukamu omugabe ati: Mbwenu nkitsigaize emyaka engahi, eyaakundeetera kugyenda naiwe omugabe Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel19:36 Eri izooba naahitsya emyaka makumi munaana y'obukuru. Mbwenu ninkibaasa kumanya ekirungi n'ekibi? Nyowe omwiru waawe nimbaasa kunurirwa eki ndikurya n'eki ndikunywa? Nkiine agahurira amaraka g'abashaija n'abakazi abarikweshongora? Mbwenu nyowe omwiru waawe nkwongyererere ki oburemeezi, Nyakusinga?" 
2Samuel19:37 Nyowe omuheereza waawe, Nyakusinga, ka nfe kukwambutsya nkuhitsye seeri ya Yorudaani. Mbwenu iwe Nyakusinga okampeereire ki ebihembo birikwingana bityo?" 
2Samuel19:38 Ninkweshengyereza nyowe omwiru waawe ondekye ngarukyeyo, nfeere omu rurembo rw'owaitu ahu ekituuro kya tata na maawe biri. Kwonka aha hariho omwiru waawe Kimuhaamu, k'abe niwe yaagyenda naiwe, Nyakusinga; omukorere kyona eki orikusiima." 
2Samuel19:39 Omugabe amugarukamu ati: Kimuhaamu naije, twambukye kumwe. Niinyija kumukorera kyona eki orikusiima. Kandi naiwe eki orikwenda nkukorere, niinyija kukikukorera." 
2Samuel19:40 Batyo abantu boona bambuka Yorudaani, n'omugabe ayambuka. Omugabe anywegyera Barizilaayi, amutengyera emigisha; n'onu agaruka owe." 
2Samuel19:41 Omugabe agumizamu ahika Giligaali. Kimuhaamu nawe agumizamu nawe, Abaayuda boona n'ekicweka ky'Abaisiraeli bamushendekyereize." 
2Samuel19:42 Bwanyima Abaisiraeli boona bakaija aha mugabe, baamugira bati: Ahabw'enki beene waitu Abaayuda bakutwaire bwesherekye, bakakwambutsya Yorudaani, iwe Nyakusinga n'ab'eka yaawe boona n'abashaija baawe boona?" 
2Samuel19:43 Abaayuda boona baagarukamu Abaisiraeli bati: Ahabw'okuba omugabe aine naitwe obuzaare bwa haihi. Mbwenu ekyo kibagwisiize ki kubi? Twine eky'omugabe eki turiire? Nari aine ekiconco ki atuhaire? 
2Samuel19:44 Abaisiraeli nabo baagarukamu Abaayuda bati: Itwe twine emigabo ikumi aha mugabe, kandi n'ahari Daudi nitubakira. Mbwenu ahabw'enki nimutugaya? Tiitwe twabandize kugamba eby'okugarura omugabe? Kwonka ebi Abaayuda baagarukiremu byakiza amaani ebi Abaisiraeli baagambire." 
2Samuel20:1 Mbwenu hakaba hariho omushaija otaine ku ari; orikwetwa Sheeba mwene Bikuri Omubenyamiini; yaateera enzamba, yaagira ati: Titwine mugabo omuri Daudi, nobu bwakuba obuhunguzi omuri mwene Yese. Mbwenu imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, buri muntu agarukye omu ka ye!" 
2Samuel20:2 Abaisiraeli boona baatsigaho Daudi, baakuratira Sheeba mwene Bikuri. Kwonka Abaayuda baahamira ahari Daudi, baaguma nawe okuruga Yorudaani okuhika Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel20:3 Daudi ku yaahikire owe Yerusalemu, yaatwara abakazi be ikumi ebinyanshunju, abu yaabaire atsigiire eka ye kugirinda, yaabata omu nju kubarindiramu. Yaaguma naabaha eby'okubatunga, kwonka tiyaagaruka kubaraarira. Baaguma barindiirwe hangahari bari nk'abafaakazi, okuhitsya obu baafiire." 
2Samuel20:4 Bwanyima Daudi akaragiira Amaasa ati: Nyetera Abaayuda boona, bateeranire aha omu biro bishatu, haza naiwe obeho." 
2Samuel20:5 Amaasa atyo aza kweta Abaayuda, kwonka arenzya aha bunaku obu baabaire bamuragiire." 
2Samuel20:6 Daudi nikwo kugambira Abishaayi ati: Reeba, Sheeba mwene Bikuri naija kutukorera kubi okukira Abusolomu. Twara abagaragwa ba mukama waawe, omukurate, atakaayetungira ebigo bigumire, akatuganzya." 
2Samuel20:7 Abishaayi atyo ahurura aine abashaija ba Yoabu, n'Abakereti, n'Abapeleti, n'amamanzi goona; baruga Yerusalemu kukurata Sheeba mwene Bikuri." 
2Samuel20:8 Ku baahikire aha ibaare rihango ery'omuri Gibeoni, Amaasa yaija kubabugana. Obwo Yoabu akaba ajwaire ekijwaro ky'ekiserukare, akijwariireho orukoba, ruriho rurara, eri omu kyobate kyayo, neerengyerera aha nyugunyu. Ku yairiireyo omu maisho, rurara yaaragara." 
2Samuel20:9 Yoabu aboogaho ayehumbaarikire, abuuza Amaasa ati: Ni buhooro, mwene waitu? Yoabu akwata Amaasa ekireju n'omukono gwe gwa buryo kumunywegyera." 
2Samuel20:10 Kwonka Amaasa tayeta hari rurara, ei Yoabu yaabaire akwaitse. Yoabu nikwo kugimutimbura aha nda, amara gakoohoka aha nsi, atagarukye kugimuteera bundi. Atyo Amaasa afa. Bwanyima Yoabu na Abishaayi omurumuna baakurata Sheeba mwene Bikuri." 
2Samuel20:11 Omwe aha bashaija ba Yoabu yaayemerera aha rubaju rwa Amaasa, yaagira ati: Omuntu weena okwataniise na Daudi, akurate Yoabu." 
2Samuel20:12 Obwo Amaasa akaba naayekuringa omu shagama omu muhanda gugyendwa. Weena owaabaire naarabaho, akimureeba, ayemerera. Ogwo mushaija ku yaareebire abantu boona baayemerera, yaiha Amaasa omu muhanda rugyendwa, yaamuta omu kishaka; yaamutungikaho omwenda." 
2Samuel20:13 Ku yaamwihire omu muhanda, abantu boona baagumizamu bakuratiire Yoabu, kukurata Sheeba mwene Bikuri." 
2Samuel20:14 Kandi Sheeba akaraba omu nganda za Isiraeli zoona, yaahika Abeeli eya Betimaaka Abaabikuri boona baayeteerana, baamushangamu." 
2Samuel20:15 Reero engabo zoona ezi Yoabu yaabaire aine, zaija zaamugotera omuri Abeeli eya Betimaaka. Zaarimiirira orwo rurembo, baatandika kuruteera, kurukumbagaza." 
2Samuel20:16 Omukazi omunyabwengye nikwo kwetera aha rugo ati: Nimuhurire! Nimungambirire Yoabu aije aha, ngire eki naamugambira." 
2Samuel20:17 Yoabu atyo aija amuhika. Omukazi amubuuza ati: Niiwe Yoabu? Onu ati: Niinye. Omukazi amugira ati: Mbwenu hurira ebi nyowe omuzaana waawe ndikukugambira. Yoabu amugarukamu ati: Nkutegire okutu. 
2Samuel20:18 Ogwo mukazi agira ati: Aba ira bakaba bagira bati: Ka tuze kwehanuuza omuri Abeeli. Haza bashoboororerayo ekibashobeire. 
2Samuel20:19 Mbwenu nyowe ndi omwe aha barikwendeza abantu obusingye, kandi ndi omwesigwa omuri Isiraeli. Mbwenu iwe nooyendera ki kumaraho abantu ba Nyakubaho?" 
2Samuel20:20 Yoabu amugarukamu ati: Nikikabure! Nikikabure! nyowe okwenda kubamaraho nari okubacwekyereza. 
2Samuel20:21 Ekyo tikwo kiri. Kwonka hariho omushaija w'omu nsi y'ebibungo bya Efuraimu, orikwetwa Sheeba mwene Bikuri, niwe abangiire Omugabe Daudi omukono kumurwanisa. Mube niwe mwatuha wenka, naanye niinyija kwiha engabo zangye aha rurembo. Ogwo mukazi agira Yoabu ati: Mbwenu twaza kukutambikira omutwe gwe, tugurengyeze aha rugo." 
2Samuel20:22 Bwanyima ogwo mukazi yaagaruka omu bantu boona, yaabaha obwengye. Sheeba mwene Bikuri baamutemaho omutwe, baagutambikira Yoabu. Nawe yaateera enzamba, engabo ze zaayaabuuka aha rurembo; buri omwe yaataaha omu ka ye. Na Yoabu yaagaruka Yerusalemu aha mugabe." 
2Samuel20:23 Mbwenu Yoabu akaba ari omukuru w'amahe ga Isiraeli goona; Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada naategyeka Abakereti n' Abapeleti; 
2Samuel20:24 Adoraamu naareeberera abarikukoresibwa emirimo y'amaani; reero Yehoshafaati mwene Ahiludi ari omuhandiiki w'ebirikubaho; 
2Samuel20:25 Sheeva ari omuhandiiki omukuru, kandi Zadoki na Abiyataari bari abahongyerezi;" 
2Samuel20:26 na Iira Omuyairi nawe ari omuhongyerezi wa Daudi. 
2Samuel21:1 Omu busingye bwa Daudi, hakabaho enjara mpango, yaamara emyaka eshatu. Daudi nikwo kwehanuuza ahari Nyakubaho; nawe akamugira ati: N'ahabw'orubanja rwa Saulo n'ab'eka ye ahabw'okuba akaita Abaagibeoni." 
2Samuel21:2 Omugabe nikwo kweta Abaagibeoni. Mbwenu Abaagibeoni bakaba batari Baisiraeli, kureka bakaba bari ab'Abaamoni abaatsigaireho. Abaisiraeli nobu baraabe baabarahiire kutabaita, kwonka Saulo ahabw'eihato ri yaabaire ainiire Abaisiraeli n'Abaayuda, akateeraho kubaita." 
2Samuel21:3 Daudi yaabuuza Abagibeoni ati: Mbwenu mbakorere ki? Kandi nkaabakarabira ki, mukabona kushabira abantu ba Nyakubaho emigisha?" 
2Samuel21:4 Abagibeoni baamugarukamu bati: Titurikwenda kukarabirwa efeeza nari ezaabu ahabwa Saulo n'ab'eka ye, kandi ti kyaitu okwita omuntu weena omuri Isiraeli. Nawe ayongyera kubabuuza ati: Nimugira ngu mbakorere ki?" 
2Samuel21:5 Bagarukamu omugabe bati: Mbwenu ogwo muntu waatucwekyereize, akacuma enaama y'okutumaraho, ngu tutagira ah'okutuura omu ihanga rya Isiraeli ryona," 
2Samuel21:6 mutuhe abantu mushanju omu baijukuru be, tubahanikire Gibea eya Saulo, owaatoorainwe Nyakubaho. Omugabe abagarukamu ati: Niinyija kubabaha." 
2Samuel21:7 Kwonka omugabe arokora Mefibosheti mutabani wa Yonataani mwene Saulo, ahabw'endahiro ei Daudi na Yonataani mwene Saulo baaragaine nibarahira Nyakubaho." 
2Samuel21:8 Mpaho omugabe aihayo Arumooni na Mefibosheti batabani ba Rizipa, muhara wa Aaya, abu Saulo yaamuzaireho; ataho abatabani bataano ba Merabu, muhara wa Saulo, abu Adirieli mwene Barizilaayi owa Mehola yaamuzaireho;" 
2Samuel21:9 abakwatsa Abaagibeoni babahanika omu rushozi, omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. Boona mushanju bafeera hamwe. Bakabaita omu itogyera, ahu abantu batandikira kugyesha baare." 
2Samuel21:10 Reero Rizipa muhara wa Aaya yaihayo ekiguniya, yaakyeyarira aha rukiri, okwiha omu itogyera okuhitsya obu enjura ya katumba yaagwire, ekateera egyo mitumbi. Yaaguma nyomushana naagirinda amahungu kugiteera, na nyekiro naagirinda enyamaishwa kugirya." 
2Samuel21:11 Ku baagambiire Daudi eki Rizipa muhara wa Aaya ekinyanshunju kya Saulo, akozire," 
2Samuel21:12 Daudi yaagyenda yaiha amagufa ga Saulo n'ag'omutabani Yonataani aha Baayabeeshi-Gileadi, abaabaire bagaibire omu mbuga ei Abaabetishani bateeraniramu, ahu Abafilisiti baabahanikire, aha izooba ribaitiireho Saulo Giliboa." 
2Samuel21:13 Atyo yaihayo amagufa ga Saulo n'ag'omutabani Yonataani, kandi baarundaana amagufa g'abo abaahanikirwe." 
2Samuel21:14 Amagufa ga Saulo n'ag'omutabani Yonataani baagaziika Zeela omu kyanga kya Benyamiini, omu kituuro kya Kiishi ishe, kandi baakora byona ebi omugabe yaabaragiire. Ebyo ku byahwaire, Ruhanga yaikiriza ebi baashabiire ensi yaabo." 
2Samuel21:15 Abafilisiti bakagaruka baarwana n'Abaisiraeli. Daudi yaahurura n'abashaija be; baarwanisa Abafilisiti. Haza Daudi yaaruha. 
2Samuel21:16 Mpaho Ishebibenobi, omwe ahari baijukuru b'ebikaaka, ou eicumu rye ryabaire riine oburemeezi bwa kiro nka itaano z'omuringa, kandi ahagatiire rurara nsya, yaayenda kwita Daudi." 
2Samuel21:17 Kwonka Abishaayi mwene Zeruuya yaija, yaamuha emikono, yaarwanisa ogwo Mufilisiti, yaamwita. Reero engabo za Daudi zaamurahiza ziti: Otarihurura naitwe, obundi nyentsya otakaaraaza etabaaza ya Isiraeli." 
2Samuel21:18 Ebyo ku byahwaire, kandi baarwanisa Boobu, n'Abafilisiti. Sibekai Omuhuusha yaita Saafu ow'omu baijukuru b'ebikaaka." 
2Samuel21:19 Haagaruka haabaho orundi rugamba rw'Abafilisiti Goobu, oru Elihanani mwene Yaare-oregimu Omunyabeetelehemu yaitiiremu Goliyaati Omugiiti, ou orubango rw'eicumu rye rwabaire nirwingana empimbi ei barukiraho emyenda." 
2Samuel21:20 Kandi Gaati haabayo orugamba orwabaire rurimu omushaija ekikaaka, aine enkumu mukaaga ahari buri ngaro, n'obukumu mukaaga ahari buri kigyere; byona hamwe makumi abiri na bina, nawe ari mwijukuru w'ebikaaka." 
2Samuel21:21 Ku yaahayiire Abaisiraeli, Yonataani mwene Shimeeyi, mukuru wa Daudi, yaamwita." 
2Samuel21:22 Aba bana bakaba bari baijukuru b'ebikaaka bya Gaati, Daudi n'abagaragwa be baabaita." 
2Samuel22:1 Eki n'ekyeshongoro ki Daudi yaayeshongoire naasingiza Nyakubaho, obu yaamujuna Saulo n'abandi bazigu be." 
2Samuel22:2 Akagira ati: Nyakubaho n'orukiri rwangye, ekigo kyangye ekigumire, kandi Omujuni wangye." 
2Samuel22:3 Ruhanga wangye niwe rukiri rwangye oru mpungiramu; engabo yangye, eihembe ryangye erinjuna, omunaara gwangye kandi obuhungiro bwangye. Ai Mujuni wangye, niiwe onkiza akabi." 
2Samuel22:4 Ndyaguma mpoogyere Nyakubaho oshemereire kuhimbisibwa; nibwo ndikira abazigu bangye. 
2Samuel22:5 Manya ebingonzi bya rufu ku byankubakubire, emyegyemure erikuhwerekyereza yantaahirira;" 
2Samuel22:6 emigoye y'okuzimu yanzingazinga, emitego ya rufu yantanga omu maisho." 
2Samuel22:7 Omu naku zangye nkatakira Mukama Ruhanga wangye; yaahurira eiraka ryangye naayema omuri Nyaruju ye; okuborooga kwangye kwamuhika omu kutu. 
2Samuel22:8 Mpaho ensi yaatengyeeta, yaatetema, obuhamizo bw'eiguru bwanyiganyiga, Byatengyeeta ahabw'okuba akagira ekiniga." 
2Samuel22:9 Omwika gwamucumbuuka omu nyindo, Omuriro gurikurya busha gwamuruga omu kanwa gwayotsya amakara, gaayaka, gaareeta ekibiga kirikubabura." 
2Samuel22:10 Akainika eiguru, yaashuuma, omwirima ndindindi gutimbire ahansi y'ebigyere bye." 
2Samuel22:11 Yaatemba aha mugongo gwa baakerubi; yaaguruka, yaareebwa ari aha mapapa g'omuyaga." 
2Samuel22:12 Omwirima gumwehinguririize yaaguhindura eky'okumusangira. Ebicu buriituuza yaabihindura ebisyaraazi by'amaizi. 
2Samuel22:13 Okumurinkana kw'omu maisho ge kwareetera amakara kwaka. 
2Samuel22:14 Nyakubaho yaahindira omu iguru; eiraka rya Rukiraboona ryahurirwa. 
2Samuel22:15 Yaarasha emyambi, yaabataataanisa; niyo mirabyo ye eyaabararize." 
2Samuel22:16 Nyakubaho ku yaakabukire, n'omwitsyo gw'omu nyindo ze gwahuuha n'amaani; empanga z'amaizi g'omu mayanja zaareebwa, obuhamizo bw'ensi bwayanama." 
2Samuel22:17 Yankununkirira ari ahaiguru, yankwata, yantuuhuura omu maizi maingi." 
2Samuel22:18 Yanjuna omuzigu wangye w'amaani, yansikura omu mikono y'ababisha barikuunyanga, abaabaire nibankiriza kimwe amaani." 
2Samuel22:19 Bakanteera obu naabaire ngwereirwe akagwe, kwonka Nyakubaho yandinda." 
2Samuel22:20 Yaanyiha omu kabi, yanta omu mwanya gweshanzire; yanjuna, ahabw'okuba akaba nankunda." 
2Samuel22:21 Nyakubaho akampa ebihembo nk'oku okuhikiirira kwangye kuri; yanzimuurira ahabw'engaro zangye kuba mwere. 
2Samuel22:22 Ahabw'okuba nkuratira emitwarize ye, kandi tinkatsigahoga Ruhanga wangye." 
2Samuel22:23 Manya ntuura ninkuratira ebiragiro bye byona, ntarikugomera ebi yaataireho." 
2Samuel22:24 Omu maisho ge ntuura ntaine ky'okuhaahuuzibwa, kandi nyerinda okushiisha." 
2Samuel22:25 Nikyo Nyakubaho anzimuuririire nk'okuhikiirira kwangye oku kuri, n'okuba mwere omu maisho ge." 
2Samuel22:26 Ai Nyakubaho, aha beesigwa oba omwesigwa; n'omuntu ohikire tomuhaahuuza." 
2Samuel22:27 Abeeyeza obeeyoreka ori orikwera; kwonka enyabibi ozigumira. 
2Samuel22:28 Abeekyehesa obajuna, kwonka abanyamaryo oguma obataireho eriisho kubacwa eishaija." 
2Samuel22:29 Ai Nyakubaho, niiwe oba etaara yangye. Ruhanga wangye niiwe ommurikira ndi omu mwirima." 
2Samuel22:30 Eego, niiwe ombaasisa kusiitagura omutwe gw'engabo, kandi Ruhanga wangye niiwe ompa amaani g'okuhigura engo zaabo." 
2Samuel22:31 Ruhanga ogu, emitwarize ye eba ehikire. Eki Nyakubaho araganisa kiba kwo; kandi aba engabo ekingira boona abamuhungiraho." 
2Samuel22:32 Mbwenu oba Ruhanga n'oha, kureka Nyakubaho? N'oba rukiri n'oha, kureka Ruhanga waitu?" 
2Samuel22:33 Ruhanga ogwo niwe aba obuhungiro bwangye obugumire. Niwe andabya buhooro ahi nza. 
2Samuel22:34 Ahamya ebigyere byangye nk'eby'empara; anyemereza aha bibungo ntagwire. 
2Samuel22:35 Amanyiiza engaro zangye kurwana, ngu emikono yangye ekaabaasa kwinika obuta bw'omuringa." 
2Samuel22:36 Okampa engabo y'okunjuna; okundinda kwawe kwampindura mukuru. 
2Samuel22:37 Wampanguhiza ah'okuraba, ebigyere byangye tibyaterera." 
2Samuel22:38 Nkabinga abazigu bangye, naabacwekyereza; tinaagaruka ntakabamazireho." 
2Samuel22:39 Nkabamaraho, naabacumita naaboozyamu; tibaabaasa kwimuka, baagwa aha nsi naabaribatiirira." 
2Samuel22:40 Manya okanzirika amaani g'okurwana orugamba; wangomoororera abaizire kundwanisa. 
2Samuel22:41 Okareetera abazigu bangye kumpunga; naacwekyereza abarikuunyanga. 
2Samuel22:42 Baamagamaga, baabura kijuna; baatakira Nyakubaho, yaabeetsiza." 
2Samuel22:43 Nkabateera, naabacwa obusaasingo; naabakaatagirira nk'ebyondo by'omu nguuto." 
2Samuel22:44 Okantambira engamba z'abanyamahanga, wandinda, naaba omutegyeki waabo; abu naabaire ntakamanyanaga nabo bangaragira." 
2Samuel22:45 Abanyamahanga bakaanyijaho nibaajuza enda; Ku bampuriireho bati, baanyorobera." 
2Samuel22:46 Abanyamahanga bakeehwa amatsiko, baaruga omu bigo byabo nibatetema." 
2Samuel22:47 Ruhanga abaho! Rukiri rwangye naakasingye! 
2Samuel22:48 Ruhanga owampooreire, akangomoororera amahanga." 
2Samuel22:49 Owaanyihire omu mikono y'abazigu bangye, niiwe wantungwire nkakira abarikundwanisa; okanjuna ababisha." 
2Samuel22:50 Ai Nyakubaho, nikyo ndigumira ninkusingiriza omu mahanga, nkeeshongora eby'okuhimbisa eiziina ryawe." 
2Samuel22:51 Manya Nyakubaho aha obusinguzi bwingi omugabe ou yaataireho, kandi agirira ou yaasiigire amajuta rukundo etahararuka; niwe Daudi n'abaijukuru ebiro byona." 
2Samuel23:1 Ebi nibyo Daudi yaahereerukire kugamba. Ebigambo buzima ebyaragwirwe Daudi mwene Yese. Ebyaragwirwe omushaija owaatungwirwe akaba mukuru; owaasiigirwe amajuta Ruhanga wa Yakobo kandi omuhimbi murungi w'ebyevugo birikwera ebya Isiraeli. 
2Samuel23:2 Akagira ati: Mutima wa Nyakubaho nangambisa, ekigambo kye tikinduga ha rurimi." 
2Samuel23:3 Ruhanga wa Isiraeli agambire; Rukiri rwa Isiraeli yangira ati: Omuntu ku ategyeka abantu omu bwinganisa naatiina Ruhanga," 
2Samuel23:4 Abaakira nk'omushekye gurikujuguta omu kasheeshe, nk'eizooba ryayaka omu kasheeshe nk'entsya nungi, nk'enjura emeza obunyaatsi bukatooka omu itaka." 
2Samuel23:5 Eego, buzimazima ab'omuryango gwangye nikwo bari batyo na Ruhanga. Ahabw'okuba akakora naanye endagaano etaricweka, etebeekanisiibwe gye omuri byona kandi ehamire. Mbwenu shi ebi ndikwenda n'eby'obusinguzi bwangye Ruhanga tiwe araabireetere kuba kwo?" 
2Samuel23:6 Kwonka boona abatatiina Ruhanga baba nk'amahwa gu banagire, agatabaasa kukwatwa na ngaro." 
2Samuel23:7 Owaayenda kugakoraho, aba aine ekyoma nari orubango rw'eicumu. Nabo nikwo baribookyeza kimwe n'omuriro." 
2Samuel23:8 Aga nigo maziina g'amamanzi gu Daudi yaabaire aine. Yoshebashebeti Omuhakimooni, owaabaire ari mukuru w'abakuru b'amahe abashatu. Akakwata eicumu rye yaariitsa abantu magana munaana omurundi gumwe." 
2Samuel23:9 Orikumukurata omuri ago mamanzi ashatu, akaba ari Eliazaari mwene Dodo, mwijukuru wa Ahoohi. Akaba ari hamwe na Daudi obu baahaya Abafilisiti abaabaire bahurwire kurwana, Abaisiraeli bakabahunga;" 
2Samuel23:10 we akaimuka, akaita abo Bafilisiti, okuhitsya obu omukono gwe gwaruhire, engaro ye ekaramatana na rurara. Eryo izooba Nyakubaho yaabasinguza munonga. Reero abantu baija bamukuratiire bareetsirwe kucwijura abu yaita." 
2Samuel23:11 Orikumukurata akaba ari Shama, mwene Agee Omuharari. Abafilisiti bakeeteeranira Lehi, ahu omusiri gw'enkoore nyingi munonga gwabaire guri; abantu baabahunga." 
2Samuel23:12 Kwonka we akeemerera ahagati y'ogwo musiri, yaagurinda, yaita abo Bafilisiti; Nyakubaho yaabasinguza munonga." 
2Samuel23:13 Kandi abo bonshatu, ab'omu mamanzi makumi ashatu, bakashuuma baija ahari Daudi nk'omu igyesha, baamushanga aha nyanga ya Adulaamu obwo omutwe gw'Abafilisiti guteire ensiisira omu ruhanga rw'Abareefa," 
2Samuel23:14 Daudi obwo akaba ari omu kigo kigumire kandi Abafilisiti abarinzi b'ekigo bari Beetelehemu. 
2Samuel23:15 Reero Daudi yaatenga ati: Nkaabaasibwa ki, hagira owampa amaizi g'omu iziba rya Beetelehemu eriri haihi n'eirembo, nganywa!" 
2Samuel23:16 Mpaho ago mamanzi gonshatu gaayataguza omu rusiisira rw'Abafilisiti, gaataha amaizi omuri eryo iziba rya Beetelehemu eriri haihi n'eirembo; baagareetera Daudi. Kwonka we tiyaaganywa, yaagaata kuba ekitambo kya Nyakubaho." 
2Samuel23:17 Yaagira ati: Ai Nyakubaho, rubuuza nyowe okukora ekyo. Mbwenu nnywe eshagama y'abantu abagiireyo boogire amagara? Nikyo yaayangiire kuganywa. Ebyo nibyo ago mamanzi gonshatu gaakozire." 
2Samuel23:18 Mbwenu kandi Abishaayi mukuru wa Yoabu, mwene Zeruuya, akaba ari mukuru w'abakuru b'eihe makumi ashatu. Obundi akakwata eicumu rye, yaarwanisa abashaija magana ashatu, yaabaita, yaayetungira eiziina omuri abo bashatu." 
2Samuel23:19 Kandi yaarangaanwa omuri abo makumi ashatu, yaaba omukuru waabo. Kwonka tiyaingana na bari abashatu." 
2Samuel23:20 Reero Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada akaba ari omushaija emanzi ya Kabuzeeli, eyaakozire ebintu bikuru. Akaita amamanzi abiri g'Abamoabu. Obundi akagyenda yaitira entare omu kiina, obu ebirika byagwa." 
2Samuel23:21 Kandi yaita Omunyamisiri murungi ahamaisho. Ogwo Munyamisiri akaba akwaitse eicumu, Benaaya yaamwizira aine enkoni; yaamusikura eicumu omu ngaro, yaarimwitsa." 
2Samuel23:22 Ebyo nibyo Benaaya mwene Yahoyaada yaakozire, akeetungira eiziina omu mamanzi makumi ashatu." 
2Samuel23:23 Akarangaanwa omuri abo makumi ashatu, kwonka tiyaingana n'abashatu. Daudi yaamuha obukuru bw'okureeberera abarinzi be." 
2Samuel23:24 Aba nabo nibabarirwa omuri ago mamanzi makumi ashatu: Asaheeli murumuna wa Yoabu, Elihanaani mwene Dodo owa Beetelehemu," 
2Samuel23:25 Shama na Elika aba Harodi," 
2Samuel23:26 Helezi owa Peleti, Lira mwene Ikeshi owa Tekoa," 
2Samuel23:27 Abiezeri owa Anatooti, Mebumai owa Muusha," 
2Samuel23:28 Zalumooni owa Ahohi," 
2Samuel23:29 Maharai na Helebu mwene Baana, aba Netofa, Itaayi mwene Ribai owa Gibea eya Benyamiini," 
2Samuel23:30 Benaaya owa Piratooni, Hidai ow'omu mpanga za Gaati," 
2Samuel23:31 Abiyalibooni owa Araba, Azimaveeti owa Bahurimu," 
2Samuel23:32 Eliyahuba owa Shaalubooni, Yasheni owa Gimuzo," 
2Samuel23:33 Yonataani mwene Shama owa Harari, Ahiyaamu mwene Sharari nawe owa Harari," 
2Samuel23:34 Elifeleti mwene Ahasubai owa Maaka, Eliyaamu mwene Ahitofeli owa Giilo," 
2Samuel23:35 Hezero owa Karumeeli, Paara owa Araba," 
2Samuel23:36 Igali mwene Natani owa Zooba, Bani owa Gaadi," 
2Samuel23:37 Zeleki Omuamoni, Naharai omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bya Yoabu, mwene Zeruuya, owa Beerooti," 
2Samuel23:38 Iira na Garebu aba Yatiri," 
2Samuel23:39 na Uriya Omuhiiti; boona hamwe amamanzi makumi ashatu na mushanju. 
2Samuel24:1 Nyakubaho kandi akagirira Abaisiraeli ekiniga kingi, yaimukiiriza Daudi kubareetera akabi, obu Daudi yaagira ati: Mugyende mubare Abaisiraeli n'Abaayuda." 
2Samuel24:2 Manya ogwo mugabe akaragiira Yoabu n'abakuru b'eihe abu yaabaire aine, ati: Mugyende nimuraba omu nganda za Isiraeli zoona, okuruga Daani okuhika Beerisheba, mubare abantu, mbone kumanya oku barikwingana." 
2Samuel24:3 Yoabu yaagira omugabe ati: Nkaabaasibwa ki Mukama Ruhanga waawe akanyisa abantu baawe emirundi igana okukira oku bari hati, naiwe Nyakusinga okyereebera! Beitu shi, Nyakusinga omugabe, ekyo nookikundira ki?" 
2Samuel24:4 Kwonka eki omugabe yaagamba kyakiza Yoabu n'abakuru b'eihe amaani. Yoabu n'abakuru b'eihe nikwo kushohora bakaruga ahu omugabe ari bakaza kubara Abaisiraeli. 
2Samuel24:5 Bakambuka Yorudaani, bakatandikira Aroeri, n'omu rurembo rw'ahagati y'oruhanga; bakaza Gaadi, bakagumizamu bakaza Yazeri." 
2Samuel24:6 Bwanyima bakahika Gileadi na Kadeeshi ey'omu nsi y'Abahiiti. Bakaza Daani; bagiruga, Daani, bakagyenda nibeekiikuura, bakahika Sidoni." 
2Samuel24:7 Reero bakaza omu kigo kya Tuuro, n'omu ndembo zoona ez'Abahiivi n'Abanyakanaani. Ku baarugireyo, baaza Negebu eya Yuda, baahika Beerisheba." 
2Samuel24:8 Mpaho ku baaherize kuraba omu nsi yoona, baagaruka Yerusalemu, bamazire ameezi mwenda n'ebiro makumi abiri." 
2Samuel24:9 Yoabu yaaha omugabe omubaro gw'abantu boona abu baabazire ab'omuri Isiraeli; baahika abashaija emanzi abarikukwata rurara obusiriira munaana, kandi Abaayuda baaba obusiriira butaano." 
2Samuel24:10 Daudi ku yaaherize kubara abantu, ekitima kyamuteera oruhi, omutima gwamushinja. Yaayeteisiza Nyakubaho ati: Eki nkozire ncumwire munonga. Mbwenu, ai Nyakubaho, ninkweshengyereza nyowe omwiru waawe, onsaasire ekyo kibi; ahabw'okuba nkozire eky'obufa mutima." 
2Samuel24:11 Daudi ku yaimukire omu kasheeshe, Nyakubaho yaagambira omurangi Gaadi omuhabuzi wa Daudi ati:" 
2Samuel24:12 Irooko ogire Daudi oti: Nyakubaho yaakugira ati: Naakuha ebintu bishatu, oiheho kimwe, nkikukorere." 
2Samuel24:13 Gaadi atyo aija ahari Daudi, amugambira naamubuuza ati: Mbwenu ahari ebi byonshatu noihaho kiiha? Ensi yaawe okuteerwa enjara y'emyaka mushanju; nari okumara ameezi ashatu noohunga abazigu baawe bakubingire; nainga orufu okumara ebiro bishatu omu nsi yaawe? Mbwenu teekateeka, ocwemu eky'okugarukamu eki ndagambire owantuma." 
2Samuel24:14 Daudi agarukamu Gaadi ati: Naashobererwa kimwe. Kwonka ka tugwe omu mikono ya Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba aine embabazi nyingi, okukira nyowe okugwa omu mikono y'abantu." 
2Samuel24:15 Mukama atyo ajuumikiza Isiraeli orufu, okwiha omuri ako kasheeshe okuhitsya omu bunaku bu yaataireho. Haafa abantu obukumi mushanju, okwiha Daani okuhitsya Beerisheba." 
2Samuel24:16 Mbwenu maraika ku yaabangiire Yerusalemu omukono kugicwekyereza, Nyakubaho yaayegarukamu ahabw'ako kabi. Yaagira maraika owaabaire naacwekyereza abantu, ati: Ekyo nikimara, banguura omukono gwawe. Obwo maraika wa Nyakubaho akaba ayemereire haihi n'embuga y'eihuuriro rya Arauna Omuyebusi." 
2Samuel24:17 Reero Daudi ku yaareebire maraika owaabaire naita abantu, yaagambira Nyakubaho ati: Ka niinye ncumwire, ka niinye nsiisire munonga; mbwenu ezi ntaama zikozire ki? Naakweshengyereza, omukono gwawe ka gube niinye gwateera n'ab'eka ya tata." 
2Samuel24:18 Eryo izooba Gaadi akaija ahari Daudi, yaamugira ati: Irooko oyombekyere Nyakubaho eitambiro aha mbuga y'eihuuriro rya Arauna Omuyebusi." 
2Samuel24:19 Daudi yaagyenda nk'oku Gaadi yaamugambira, nk'oku Mukama yaaragiira." 
2Samuel24:20 Arauna ku yaanagireyo ati eriisho, yaareeba omugabe n'abargaragwa be nibamwizira, yaashohora, yainama, yaamutangirira." 
2Samuel24:21 Reero yaamubuuza ati: Mukama wangye omugabe, ekyakureeta ahariinye omwiru waawe ni ki? Daudi amugarukamu ati: Naareetwa okugura embuga yaawe y'eihuuriro, mbone kwombekyeraho Nyakubaho eitambiro, orufu rurugye aha bantu." 
2Samuel24:22 Arauna agira Daudi ati: Mukama wangye omugabe, twara ekintu kyona eki orikusiima ngu ni kirungi, okihongye. Reeba, aha hariho ente z'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, kandi ebihuuzo n'emigamba bibe enku." 
2Samuel24:23 Ebyo byona, Nyakusinga, nyowe Arauna naabikuha. Arauna ayongyera agira omugabe ati: Mukama Ruhanga waawe ekyo kitambo kyawe naakakiikirize." 
2Samuel24:24 Kwonka omugabe agira Arauna ati: Ngaaha! Kureka niinyija kukikuguraho nkwihure. Tindikwija kuhongyera Nyakubaho ebitambo bicwekize ebi ntaine ki mbiguzire. Daudi atyo agura egyo mbuga y'eihuuriro n'ente, rupiiha makumi ataano z'efeeza." 
2Samuel24:25 Ayombekyeraho Nyakubaho eitambiro, aritambiraho ebitambo bicwekize, n'ebindi eby'okwekundira. Nyakubaho aikiriza ebi Daudi yaashabiire egyo nsi, orufu ruhwa omuri Isiraeli." 
1Kings1:1 Omugabe Daudi akaba akuzire munonga, ahikire omu ngingo za bukuru. Nobu baabaire bamutungikaho ebindi byeshweko, akaba atatagatirwa." 
1Kings1:2 Nikyo abagaragwa be baamugiriire bati: Nyakusinga omugabe, ka tukusherurire omwishiki empangare, agume akuheereze akureeberere, kandi akufumbate, mukama waitu, obone kutagatirwa." 
1Kings1:3 Batyo baasherura omwishiki murungi munonga omuri Isiraeli yoona; baabona Abishaagi Omunyashunaamu, baamureetera omugabe." 
1Kings1:4 Omwishiki ogwo akaba ari murungi munonga, yaaba omuranga w'omugabe, yaaguma naamuheereza; kwonka omugabe tarabyamire nawe." 
1Kings1:5 Mbwenu Adoniya mutabani wa Hagiti akeekuza, yaagira ati: Niinye ndaabe omugabe. Yaayetebeekanisiza ebigaari, n'ab'aha mbaraasi, n'abashaija makumi ataano b'okumwebebembera nibairuka." 
1Kings1:6 Haza ishe taragizire bu amugwisa kubi kumubuuza ati: Ahabw'enki okozire oti n'oti? Adoniya ogwo nawe akaba ari omushaija murungi munonga w'okureebwa, kandi omu kuzaarwa niwe yaabaire naakurata Abusolomu." 
1Kings1:7 Adoniya akahanuura na Yoabu mwene Zeruuya na Abiyataari omuhongyerezi, baakwatanisa nawe, baamuhwera." 
1Kings1:8 Kwonka Zadoki omuhongyerezi, na Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada, na Natani omurangi, na Shimeeyi na Reeyi, n'amamanzi ga Daudi tibarakwataniise na Adoniya." 
1Kings1:9 Eizooba rimwe Adoniya akatambira aha rukiri rwa Zoheleeti oruri haihi na Enirogeli ebitambo by'entaama n'enimi na zaakaberera. Yaayeta beene ishe boona, batabani b'omugabe, n'abakungu boona b'omuri Buyuda kwija aha bugyenyi bw'ekyo kitambo." 
1Kings1:10 Kwonka tiyaayeta Natani omurangi, nobu yaakuba Benaaya nari amamanzi, nainga Solomooni omurumuna." 
1Kings1:11 Bwanyima Natani akagira Betisheba, nyina wa Solomooni, ati: Tohuriire Adoniya mwene Hagiti ku abaire omugabe, haza mukama waitu Daudi atarikukimanya?" 
1Kings1:12 Mbwenu nu, ija nkuhe obwengye, obone kukiza amagara gaawe n'aga mutabani waawe Solomooni." 
1Kings1:13 Irooko oze ahonaaho ow'Omugabe Daudi, omugire oti: Nyakusinga omugabe, nyowe omuzaana waawe torandahiire noogira oti: Mutabani waawe Solomooni niwe ariba omugabe, naarugaho, akasingama aha kitebe kyangye? Hati kirugire hi, Adoniya kuba omugabe?" 
1Kings1:14 Reero ku oraabe nookigaaniira n'omugabe, niinyija kwija nkukuratiire, ntaahemu, mpamye ebi waagamba." 
1Kings1:15 Betisheba atyo ataaha omu kishengye ky'omugabe; (obwo omugabe akuzire munonga kandi Abishaagi Omunyashunaamukazi niwe arikumuheereza). 
1Kings1:16 Betisheba ainama, atangirira omugabe. Omugabe amubuuza ati: Nooyenda ki?" 
1Kings1:17 Onu amugira ati: Nyakusinga, nyowe omuzaana waawe okandaganisa noorahira Mukama Ruhanga waawe, noogira oti: Solomooni mutabani waawe niwe ariba omugabe, naarugaho, asingame aha kitebe kyangye." 
1Kings1:18 Mbwenu reeba Adoniya niwe mugabe, iwe Nyakusinga omugabe nobu oraabe otarikukimanya." 
1Kings1:19 Atambire enimi na zaakaberera n'entaama nyingi, yaayeta batabani baawe boona, na Abiyataari omuhongyerezi, na Yoabu omukuru w'eihe; kwonka ou ateetsire ni Solomooni omwiru waawe." 
1Kings1:20 Mbwenu mukama wangye omugabe, Abaisiraeli boona niiwe bahangire amaisho, kubagambira oraasingame aha kitebe kyawe, Nyakusinga, waarugaho." 
1Kings1:21 Kitari ekyo, obunaku ku burihika, iwe Nyakusinga omugabe waafa, waashanga baashwenkuru, nyowe na mutabani wangye Solomooni abantu baryagira ngu tucumwire." 
1Kings1:22 Betisheba ku yaabaire naakigaaniira n'omugabe, Natani omurangi yaija." 
1Kings1:23 Bagambira omugabe bati: Natani omurangi ari aha. Natani ku yaahikire omu maisho g'omugabe yaajuumara aha nsi, yaamutangirira." 
1Kings1:24 Natani ogwo yaagira omugabe ati: Nyakusinga omugabe, niiwe waagizire oti: Adoniya niwe ariba omugabe naarugaho, akasingama aha kitebe kyangye?" 
1Kings1:25 Reeba, eri izooba yaashuuma, yaatamba enimi na zaakaberera n'entaama nyingi; kandi yaayeta batabani baawe boona, na Yoabu omukuru w'eihe, na Abiyataari omuhongyerezi. Hati obu bari omu maisho ge, nibarya, nibanywa, kandi nibagira bati: Karamaare, Omugabe Adoniya!" 
1Kings1:26 Kwonka nyowe omwiru waawe, na Zadoki omuhogyerezi, na Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada, n'omwiru waawe Solomooni tatwetsire." 
1Kings1:27 Mbwenu ekyo mukama waitu omugabe, niiwe kirugireho; haza otagambiire bairu baawe orisingama aha kitebe ky'obugabe, iwe Nyakusinga omugabe waarugaho?" 
1Kings1:28 Bwanyima omugabe Daudi akagira ati: Nimuunyetere Betisheba. N'onu atyo aija ahu omugabe ari, amwemerera omu maisho." 
1Kings1:29 Omugabe arahira naagira ati: Nindahira Mukama owaanyihire omu kabi k'omuringo gwona! 
1Kings1:30 Nk'oku naakuraganiise ningira nti: Solomooni niwe ariba omugabe ndugireho, asingame aha kitebe ky'obugabe omu mwanya gwangye; mbwenu ekyo eri izooba nikwo naaza kukikora." 
1Kings1:31 Ku yaagwisize ebyo, Betisheba yaajuumara aha nsi, yaaramya omugabe naagira ati: Karamaare, mukama wangye Daudi Omugabe." 
1Kings1:32 Omugabe Daudi agira ati: Nimuunyetere Zadoki omuhongyerezi na Natani omurangi na Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada. Nabo baija omu maisho g'omugabe. 
1Kings1:33 Omugabe abagira ati: Nimugyende hamwe n'abagaragwa bangye, mutembese mutabani wangye Solomooni enyumbu yangye, mumushendekyereze, mumuhitsye Gihooni." 
1Kings1:34 Ku muraahikyeyo, Zadoki omuhongyerezi na Natani omurangi, bamusiigye amajuta kuba omugabe wa Isiraeli. Bwanyima muteere eikondere, mwamuze muti: Omugabe Solomooni naakaramaare!" 
1Kings1:35 Bwanyima mugarukye nawe kunu, ashutame aha kitebe kyangye ky'obugabe; ahabw'okuba niwe ariba omugabe, akampungurira. Mbwenu naamuhindura omutegyeki wa Isiraeli na Yuda." 
1Kings1:36 Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada agarukamu omugabe ati: Kibe nikwo kyaba! Na Mukama Ruhanga waawe, mukama wangye omugabe, abe nikwo yaagamba." 
1Kings1:37 Nk'oku Nyakubaho abaire ari hamwe naiwe Nyakusinga omugabe, abe nikwo yaaba na Solomooni; atunguure ekitebe kye ky'obugabe okukira ekyawe, Nyakusinga omugabe Daudi." 
1Kings1:38 Zadoki omuhongyerezi na Natani omurangi na Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada n'Abakereti n'Abapeleti nikwo kushuuma bakatembesa Solomooni enyumbu y'omugabe Daudi, bakamutwara Gihooni." 
1Kings1:39 Bakihikayo Zadoki omuhongyerezi akaiha omu ihema eihembe ry'amajuta g'omuoliva, akagasiiga Solomooni. Bakateera eikondere, abantu boona bakateera akaari bati: Karamaare, omugabe Solomooni!" 
1Kings1:40 Reero abantu boona bakagaruka nawe omuka bamushagatiire, nibateera emikuri, bashemereirwe munonga, nibateera n'akaari akaashatwire ensi." 
1Kings1:41 Adoniya n'abagyenyi be abu yaabaire aine ku baabaire nibaheza bati kurya obugyenyi, baahurira akaari. Na Yoabu ku yaahuriire eikondere nirigamba, yaagira ati: Orwo rwari ruri omu rurembo r'orw'enki?" 
1Kings1:42 Ku yaabaire naakigamba, baayecura Yonataani, mwene Abiyataari omuhongyerezi. Adoniya amugira ati: Taahamu, ahabw'okuba ori omwesigwa kandi ningira ngu waatureetera enkuru nungi." 
1Kings1:43 Yonataani agarukamu Adoniya ati: Ngaaha! Manya Nyakusinga Omugabe Daudi yaayemeka Solomooni kuba omugabe. 
1Kings1:44 Kandi omugabe yaamwohereza na Zadoki omuhongyerezi, na Natani omurangi, na Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada, n'Abekeleti n'Abapeleti, baamutembya aha nyumbu y'omugabe." 
1Kings1:45 Reero Zadoki omuhongyerezi, na Natani omurangi, baamusiigira Gihooni amajuta, kuba omugabe. Ku baarugayo, bainamuka nibashemererwa munonga. Nikyo orurembo rurikuyogoorera. Mbwenu ako niko kaari ku mwahurira." 
1Kings1:46 Hati Solomooni asingami aha kitebe by'obugabe. 
1Kings1:47 Ekindi abagaragwa b'omugabe baija kutabaarutsya mukama waitu Omugabe Daudi, nibamugira bati: Ruhanga waawe atunguure Solomooni, arangaanwe okukukira; n'obugabe bwe abuhindure obw'ekitiinwa, bweshumbe obwawe. Reero Omugabe Daudi yainama aha kitanda, yaaramya Ruhanga." 
1Kings1:48 Bwanyima yaagira ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ahimbisibwe, ahabw'okuba eri izooba yaikiriza ow'omu b'enda yangye kushutama aha kitebe kyangye ky'obugabe niinyereebera." 
1Kings1:49 Mpaho abagyenyi ba Adoniya boona batiina, baimuka, buri omwe atoora ogwe." 
1Kings1:50 Adoniya nawe atiina munonga Solomooni; aimuka, agyenda, akwata amahembe g'eitambiro." 
1Kings1:51 Abantu bagambira Solomooni bati: Reeba, Adoniya naakutiina, iwe omugabe Solomooni. Mbwenu akwaitse amahembe g'eitambiro, naagira ati: Omugabe Solomooni abanze andahire, nyowe omwiru we, ku atarikwija kuunyita." 
1Kings1:52 Solomooni abagira ati: Ku araabe omwesigwa, tihariho kashokye na kamwe ak'aha mutwe gwe akaraagwe ahansi. Kwonka ku araabonekweho ekibi, naafa." 
1Kings1:53 Omugabe Solomooni atyo atuma, bamwiha aha itambiro. Aija, aramya Omugabe Solomooni. Na Solomooni amugira ati: Irooko otaahe owaawe." 
1Kings2:1 Daudi ku yaabaire ari haihi kufa, yaayehanangiriza omutabani Solomooni naamugira ati:" 
1Kings2:2 Ndi haihi kuza ei ab'omu nsi boona baza. Hama, oyeyorekye ku ori omushaija." 
1Kings2:3 Kandi ogume orinde ebi Mukama Ruhanga waawe yaaragiire, nookuratira emitwarize ye, noohitsya ebi yaataireho, n'ebiragiro bye, n'ebi yaaragiire n'ebi yaahamize, nk'oku bihandiikirwe omu iteeka rya Musa; ebi orikukora byona bibone kukugyendera gye ei oraaze yoona." 
1Kings2:4 Nyakubaho nawe abone kuhamya eki yangambireho ati: Abaana baawe ku baryerinda omu mitwarize yaabo, baatwaza gye omu maisho gangye bari abeesigwa n'omutima gwabo gwona n'amagara gaabo goona, toribura oriza aha ngoma ya Isiraeli." 
1Kings2:5 Ekindi, noomanya oku Yoabu mwene Zeruuya yangizire; oku yaatwarize abakuru b'amahe ga Isiraeli; Abuneeri mwene Neeri na Amasa mwene Yeteri, abu yaitsire omu biro by'obusingye, naahoorera abaitiirwe aha rugamba, atyo akasiiga eshagama y'abari mwere aha rukoba ru nyezirikisa n'aha nkaito zi njwara." 
1Kings2:6 Mbwenu otwaze nk'oku obwengye bwawe buri; kwonka otarireka omutwe gwe gw'enju kuza okuzimu owa Nyamuteza n'obusingye. 
1Kings2:7 Kureka abu oritwaza gye ni beene Barizilaayi Omugileadi. Abo obarekye bagume barye n'abarikuriira aha meeza yaawe, ahabw'okuba bakambeera abeesigwa, bambugana obu naabaire nimpunga mukuru waawe Abusolomu." 
1Kings2:8 Kandi reeba, oine Shimeyi mwene Geera Omubenyamiini owa Bahurimu, owankyeenire kubi munonga obu naaza Mahanaimu. Kwonka ku yaizire kumbugana ahari Yorudaani, naamuhamiza nindahira Nyakubaho nti: Tindikwita." 
1Kings2:9 Mbwenu otamubara nk'otaine rubanja. Nk'oku ori omunyabwengye, niiwe oraamanye nk'oku oraamugire, okashuumya okuzimu owa Nyamuteza omutwe gwe gw'enju gujubire eshagama." 
1Kings2:10 Bwanyima Daudi yaafa, yaashanga baishenkuru, baamuziika omu rurembo rwe." 
1Kings2:11 Daudi akategyekyera Isiraeli emyaka makumi ana; omushanju omuri Heburooni, na makumi ashatu n'eshatu omuri Yerusalemu." 
1Kings2:12 Solomooni yaaza aha ngoma ya ishe, obugabe bwe bwahamira kimwe." 
1Kings2:13 Bwanyima Adoniya mwene Hagiti akaija ahari Betisheba nyina wa Solomooni. Betisheba yaamubuuza ati: Ni buhooro? Onu ati: Ni buhooro! 
1Kings2:14 Adoniya ati: Nyine eki ndikwenda kukugambira. Betisheba ati: Kigambe. 
1Kings2:15 Onu ati: Noomanya obugabe ku bwabaire buri obwangye, na Isiraeli yoona ku yaabaire eine amatsiko ngu niinye ndaagitegyekye. Kwonka obwo bugabe bukaba okundi; bwaba obwa mwene tata, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho niwe yaabumuhaire." 
1Kings2:16 Mbwenu nyine eki ndikukushaba, haza otakiinyima. Betisheba amugira ati: Kigambe." 
1Kings2:17 Onu ati: Naakweshengyereza, nshabira omugabe Solomooni, ahabw'okuba tarikwija kukwangira, ampe Abishaagi Omushunaamukazi, mmushwere." 
1Kings2:18 Betisheba amugira ati: Eego, niinyija kumukugambirira." 
1Kings2:19 Betisheba nikwo kuza ow'omugabe Solomooni kumumugambirira. Omugabe yaimuka, yaamutangirira yaamuha ekitiinwa nainama. Bwanyima yaashutama aha kitebe kye ky'obugabe, yaaragiira ku bareetera nyina ekitebe; onu yaashutama aha rubaju rwe rwa buryo." 
1Kings2:20 Bwanyima yaamugira ati: Nyine akantu kakye aku ndikwenda kukushaba. Haza otakaanyima. Omugabe amugarukamu ati: Mukaikuru wangye, kanshabe; tindikwija kukakwima." 
1Kings2:21 Betisheba ati: Ha Adoniya mukuru waawe Abishaagi Omushunaamukazi, amushwere." 
1Kings2:22 Omugabe Solomooni agarukamu nyina ati: Ahabw'enki Adoniya noomushabira Abishaagi Omushunaamukazi? Mushabire nu n'obugabe; ahabw'okuba ni mukuru wangye; kandi obushabire Abiyataari Omuhongyerezi na Yoabu mwene Zeruuya. 
1Kings2:23 Mpaho Omugabe Solomooni arahira Nyakubaho ati: Adoniya ku araabe atazizire eki kigambo kikamwitisa, Ruhanga akinture n'okukiraho!" 
1Kings2:24 Mbwenu nindahira Nyakubaho owantaireho, akanshutamya aha kitebe ky'obugabe ekya Daudi tata; akampa obugabe n'ab'oruzaaro rwangye nk'oku yaaraganiise; eri izooba Adoniya naitwa." 
1Kings2:25 Omugabe Solomooni atyo ayohereza Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada, n'onu amuteera, amugwisaho." 
1Kings2:26 Kandi omugabe akagira Abiyataari omuhongyerezi ati: Irooko oze Anatooti omu kibanja kyawe, ahabw'okuba oshemereire kwitwa. Kwonka aha murundi ogu tindikwija kukwita, ahabw'okuba okaheeka eshanduukye ya Mukama Ruhanga oyebembeire Daudi tata, kandi waakwatanisa nawe omu kubonabona kwe kwona." 
1Kings2:27 Solomooni atyo abinga Abiyataari aha buhongyerezi bw'okuheereza Nyakubaho, ahikiiriza eki Nyakubaho yaagambiire omuri Shiilo ahari Eeli n'ab'enda ye." 
1Kings2:28 Enkuru ku yaahikire Yoabu, ahabw'okuba akaba akwataniise na Adoniya, nobu araabe atareebumbire na Abusolomu. Yoabu ogwo yaahungira omu ihema rya Nyakubaho, yaakwata amahembe g'eitambiro." 
1Kings2:29 Ku baakigambiire Omugabe Solomooni bati: Yoabu yaahungira omu ihema rya Nyakubaho, kandi ngu ari aha rubaju rw'eitambiro; Solomooni yaayohereza Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada; yaamugira ati: Irooko, omwite." 
1Kings2:30 Benaaya atyo aija aha Ihema rya Nyakubaho, agira Yoabu ati: Omugabe yaagira ngu orugyeho. Onu ati: Ngaaha! Nyowe ningwa aha. Benaaya nikwo kugaruka aha mugabe akamugambira ati: Yoabu yangambira ati n'ati, kandi yangarukamu ati." 
1Kings2:31 Omugabe yaamugira ati: Kora nk'oku yaagamba. Omwite omuziikye, nyowe n'ab'eka ya tata otwiheho orubanja rw'eshagama ei Yoabu yaasheesheire busha." 
1Kings2:32 Nyakubaho amuhoore naamutura eby'obwinazi ebi yaakozire; ahabw'okuba akataahirira abantu babiri abu yaitsire, omugurusi wangye Daudi atakimanyire; haza baabaire bari abahikiriire kandi barungi okumukira; nibo Abuneeri mwene Neeri omukuru w'eihe rya Isiraeli, na Amasa mwene Yeteri omukuru w'eihe rya Yuda." 
1Kings2:33 Eshagama yaabo eryatukurira Yoabu n'abaijukuru ebiro n'ebiro; kwonka Daudi n'abaijukuru, n'ab'omuryango gwe, n'obugabe bwe, baryagira obusingye burikuruga ahari Nyakubaho ebiro byona." 
1Kings2:34 Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada atyo agyenda, amuteera, amwita, bamuziika omu ka ye omu ihamba." 
1Kings2:35 Omugabe aha Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada obukuru bw'okureeberera eihe omu mwanya gwa Yoabu; kandi ahindura Zadoki omuhongyerezi, omu mwanya gwa Abiyataari." 
1Kings2:36 Bwanyima omugabe akatuma, baamwetera Shimeeyi, yaamugira ati: oyeyombekyere enju omuri Yerusalemu, ogumeyo, otarugayo kugira ahandi ahi waaza." 
1Kings2:37 Eizooba ri orirugayo, okambuka akagyera ka Kidirooni, omanyire kimwe ku orifa. Haza eshagama yaawe niiwe eritukurira." 
1Kings2:38 Shimeeyi yaagira omugabe ati: Eki waagamba ni kirungi. Iwe Nyakusinga omugabe, nk'oku waagamba nikwo nyowe omwiru waawe ndaakore. Shimeeyi atyo atuura omuri Yerusalemu ebiro bingi." 
1Kings2:39 Kwonka ku haabaire hahingwireho emyaka eshatu, abahuuku ba Shimeeyi babiri baacwa, baaza owa Akishi mwene Maaka, omugabe wa Gaati. Abantu ku baagambiire Shimeeyi bati: Reeba, abahuuku baawe bari Gaati." 
1Kings2:40 Shimeeyi yaimuka, yaatandiika endogoya, yaaza Gaati owa Akishi, kusherura abahuuku be. Ku yaagiireyo, yaabaihayo." 
1Kings2:41 Ku baagambiire Solomooni ngu Shimeeyi arugire Yerusalemu, yaaza Gaati, kandi ngu agarukire;" 
1Kings2:42 omugabe yaatuma abantu baamumureetera, yaamubuuza ati: Tindakurahiize Nyakubaho, nkakwehanangiriza ningira nti: Okimanyire kimwe ngu eizooba ri orishohora, okagira ahandi hoona ahi waaza, oryafa? Haza naiwe okangira oti: Eki waagamba ni kirungi; niinyija kukikuratira?" 
1Kings2:43 Mbwenu ahabw'enki oriire endahiro i waarahiire Nyakubaho, okanga kurinda ekiragiro ki naakuragiire?" 
1Kings2:44 Omugabe ayongyera agira Shimeeyi ati: Noomanyira kimwe ebibi byona ebi waakozire Daudi tata; Nyakubaho abe nikwo yaabikuzimuurira. 
1Kings2:45 Kwonka nyowe, Omugabe Solomooni, mpeebwe emigisha, obugabe bwa Daudi bugume omu maisho ga Nyakubaho buhamire ebiro byona." 
1Kings2:46 Reero omugabe aragiira Benaaya mwene Yahoyaada. N'onu ashohora, amuteera, amugwisaho. Solomooni ahamya atyo obugabe bwe." 
1Kings3:1 Solomooni akakwatanisa na Faraaho omugabe wa Misiri, yaashwera muhara wa Faraaho, yaamutaasya omu rurembo rwa Daudi; okuhitsya obu yaaherize kwombeka enju ye ahabwe, akombeka n'eya Nyakubaho, n'orugo rw'okwehinguririza Yerusalemu." 
1Kings3:2 Obwo abantu bakaba nibatambira Nyakubaho ebitambo omu myanya etunguukire, ahabw'okuba bakaba batakamwombekyeire Nyaruju." 
1Kings3:3 Solomooni akaba akunda Nyakubaho, naakuratira ebiragiro ebi Daudi ishe yaataireho. Kwonka shi yaaguma naatambira ebitambo omu myanya etunguukire, kandi naagyotereramu obubaani." 
1Kings3:4 Mbwenu ogwo mugabe akaza Gibeoni kutambirayo ebitambo, ahabw'okuba nigwo gwabaire guri omwanya mukuru rugambwa. Kandi Solomooni akaba atambira ahari eryo itambiro ebitambo rukumi ebicwekize." 
1Kings3:5 Ku yaabaire ari Gibeoni, Mukama Ruhanga yaamweyorekyerayo nyekiro omu kirooto; yaamugira ati: Nshaba eki orikwenda nkikuhe." 
1Kings3:6 Solomooni yaamugira ati: Okooreka Daudi tata omwiru waawe rukundo yaawe mpango etahararuka, yaaguma aine emitwarize y'obwesigwa, ehikire, kandi aine omutima gugororokire ahariiwe, naiwe waaguma noomukunda munonga otamuhararukire, kandi waamuha omutabani kushutama aha kitebe kye ky'obugabe n'eri izooba." 
1Kings3:7 Mbwenu, ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, nyowe omuheereza waawe ompindwire omugabe kuhungurira tata Daudi, nobu ndaabe nkiri muto munonga, ntakagizire bwengye bw'okutegyeka." 
1Kings3:8 Kandi ndi omu bantu bu waayetooraniire, baingi munonga abatarikubaasa na kubarwa." 
1Kings3:9 N'ahabw'ekyo nyowe omwiru waawe, ompe omutima gurikwetegyereza ogurambaasise kutegyeka eihanga ryawe; mbone kutaanisa ekirungi n'ekibi. Mbwenu n'oha owaakubaasa kutegyeka eihanga ryawe eririkwingana riti?" 
1Kings3:10 Eki Solomooni yaashabire kyagwisa gye Nyakubaho. 
1Kings3:11 Ruhanga yaamugira ati: Ahabw'okuba waashaba ekyo, oteeshabiire kuhangaara; nari obutungi, nainga abazigu baawe kufa; kureka okweshabira obwengye bw'okushoboorokyerwa ekihikire;" 
1Kings3:12 mbwenu naakukorera eki waashaba. Hati naakuha omutima gw'obwengye kandi ogurikwetegyereza, ogutakagirwaga muntu n'omwe omu baakubandiize, nari omu barikukurata." 
1Kings3:13 Kandi naakuha obutungi n'ekitiinwa ebi otaashaba; harekye kugira omugabe owaakwerenga omu busingye bwawe bwona. 
1Kings3:14 Reero ku orikuratira emitwarize yangye, waarinda ebi naataireho n'ebi naaragiire, nk'oku sho Daudi yaatwarize, naanye ndyakuhangaaza." 
1Kings3:15 Solomooni ku yaasisiimukire, yaamanya ku kyaba kiri ekirooto. Bwanyima yaija Yerusalemu, yaayemerera omu maisho g'eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho, yaatamba ebitambo bicwekize n'eby'okwekundira; yaateekyera abakungu be obugyenyi." 
1Kings3:16 Mbwenu abakazi babiri baamaraaya bakaija baayemerera omu maisho g'omugabe. 
1Kings3:17 Omwe yaamugira ati: Mukama wangye, nyowe n'omukazi ogu tutaaha omu nju emwe. Ku tubaire turi hamwe omu nju, naazaara omwana." 
1Kings3:18 Ku hahingwireho ebiro bishatu nzaire, ogu mukazi nawe yaazaara. Kandi tubaire turi twenka, hatariho ondi weena ou twine omu nju, kureka itwe twembi abagirimu." 
1Kings3:19 Mbwenu mutabani w'ogu mukazi afa nyekiro, ahabw'okuba amubyamiire." 
1Kings3:20 Atyo aimuka, anyiha mutabani wangye aha rubaju, nyowe omuzaana waawe ngwejegyeire; amweta omu kifuba; reero owe ofiire amumbyamya omu kifuba." 
1Kings3:21 Omu kasheeshe ku nyimukire kwontsya omwana wangye, naashanga afiire. Kwonka ku mwetegyereize omuri ako kasheeshe, naashanga atari wangye." 
1Kings3:22 Ondiijo mukazi agira ati: Ngaaha! Omwana ohuriire n'owangye, kandi ofiire niwe waawe. Omukazi ow'okubanza ati: Ngaaha, omwana ofiire n'owaawe, reero ohuriire n'owangye. Nikwo baatongaine batyo omu maisho g'omugabe." 
1Kings3:23 Bwanyima omugabe yaagira ati: Omwe yaagira ati: Omwana ogu ohuriire n'owangye, kandi ofiire niwe waawe. N'ondi yaagira ati: Ngaaha! Owaawe niwe afiire, owangye niwe ahuriire." 
1Kings3:24 Omugabe nikwo kuragiira ati: Nimundeetere rurara. Bagimureetera. 
1Kings3:25 Omugabe agira ati: Omwana ogu ohuriire nimumuhirimburemu ebicweka bibiri, ekimwe mukihe omukazi omwe n'ekindi mukihe ondi." 
1Kings3:26 Omukazi ou omutabani yaabaire ahuriire, ahabw'okusaasibwa munonga omwana we, agira omugabe ati: Mukama wangye, omwana ohuriire omumuhe, otamwita. Kwonka omukazi ondi agira ati: Ataba owangye nari owe, kureka mumuhirimbure." 
1Kings3:27 Omugabe nikwo kugarukamu ati: Omwana ohuriire mutamwita, mumuhe omukazi owaabanza, ahabw'okuba niwe nyina." 
1Kings3:28 Abaisiraeli boona ku baahuriire oku omugabe acwire orubanja, baamutiina munonga, ahabw'okuba bakareeba ku Ruhanga niwe amuhaire obwengye bw'okucwa gye emanja." 
1Kings4:1 Omugabe Solomooni akategyeka Isiraeli yoona; kandi 
1Kings4:2 aba nibo baabaire bari abakungu be abakuru: Azariya mwene Zadoki akaba ari omuhongyerezi. 
1Kings4:3 Elihorefu na Ahiya beene Shiisha bari abahandiiki bakuru. Yehoshafaati mwene Ahiludi ari omuhandiiki w'ebirikubaho. 
1Kings4:4 Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada ari omukuru w'eihe, Zadoki na Abiyataari bari abahongyerezi," 
1Kings4:5 Azariya mwene Natani ari omukuru w'abatware, Zabudi mwene Natani ari omuhongyerezi kandi munywani w'omugabe." 
1Kings4:6 Ahishaari akaba naareeberera ekikaari ky'omugabe kandi Adoniramu mwene Abuda ari omukuru w'abarikugyemeserezibwa emirimo. 
1Kings4:7 Solomooni akaba aine abatware ikumi na babiri abaabaire batoijera omugabe n'ab'eka ye ebyokurya. Buri omwe buri mwaka akaba amara okwezi kumwe naatoija. 
1Kings4:8 Aga nigo maziina gaabo: Benihuuri ow'omu nsi ya Efuraimu ey'ebibungo; 
1Kings4:9 Benedekeri owa Makazi, Shaalubimu, Betishemeshi na Elonibetihaanani;" 
1Kings4:10 Benehesedi ow'omuri Arubooti (owaabaire naatwara Sooko n'ensi ya Heferi yoona); 
1Kings4:11 Benebinadabu ow'omuri Nafatidoori yoona (owashweire Tafati muhara wa Solomooni); 
1Kings4:12 Baana mwene Ahiludi owa Taanaka, na Betisheani yoona, eherereine na Zaretaani ahaifo ya Yezereeli, kandi okwiha Betisheani okuhitsya Abelimehoola okuhikira kimwe waahingura Yokimeamu;" 
1Kings4:13 Benegeberi owa Ramoti Gileadi; (ogu akaba naatwara ebirorero bya Yairo mwene Manaase eby'omuri Gileadi, kandi naategyeka ekyanga kya Arugoobi eky'omuri Bashani, ekyabaire kirimu endembo nkuru makumi mukaaga, ezeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare, eziine empimbi z'emiringa aha marembo gaazo);" 
1Kings4:14 Ahinadabu mwene Iido ow'omuri Mahanaimu; 
1Kings4:15 na Ahimaazi ow'omuri Nafutaali (owashweire Basemaati muhara wa Solomooni); 
1Kings4:16 Baana mwene Hushaayi owa Asheri na Bealooti; 
1Kings4:17 Yehoshafaati mwene Parua ow'omuri Isakaari; 
1Kings4:18 Shimei mwene Eela ow'omuri Benyamiini;
