1Kings4:19 Geberi mwene Uuri ow'omu kyanga kya Gileadi, ensi ya Sihooni, omugabe w'Abaamori na Oogi omugabe wa Bashani. Kandi omu kyanga kya Yuda hakaba harimu omutware omwe." 
1Kings4:20 Abaayuda n'Abaisiraeli bakaba bari baingi nk'omusheenyi gw'aha rubaju rw'enyanja, nibarya, nibanywa, kandi nibashemererwa." 
1Kings4:21 Solomooni akategyeka ensi z'abagabe zoona, okwiha ahari Eufuraati okuta aha nsi y'Abafilisiti; n'aha mwatano gwa Misiri. Ab'omuri ezo nsi bakaba bamureetera emishoro, bamutabaarira ebiro by'amagara ge byona." 
1Kings4:22 Buri izooba ebyokurya ebi baabaire batoijera Solomooni, bikaba biba encuro makumi ashatu z'esaano y'obunono n'ezindi makumi mukaaga z'endiijo saano." 
1Kings4:23 Taho endaaho ikumi zigomokire, n'ente makumi abiri ez'omu mariisizo, entaama igana, otabariiremu empara, esirabo engabi n'enkoko z'ebishaju." 
1Kings4:24 Manya Solomooni akaba naategyeka ebyanga byona eby'aha burengyerwa-izooba bwa Eufuraati, okwiha Tifusa okuhitsya Gaaza; abagabe boona ab'aha burengyerwa-izooba bwa Eufuraati, kandi aine obusingye n'ab'omu nsi zoona ezaabaire zimwehinguriize." 
1Kings4:25 Abaayuda n'Abaisiraeli baatuura buhooro omu biro bya Solomooni byona, okwiha Daani okuhitsya Beerisheba, buri muntu ari aha muzaabibu gwe n'aha mutiini gwe." 
1Kings4:26 Kandi Solomooni akaba aine omu biju bye embaraasi obukumi buna ezirikukurura ebigaari, n'embaraasi kakumi n'enkumi ibiri ez'okurwaniraho." 
1Kings4:27 Abo batware bakaba batoijera Solomooni ebyokurya ahabwe n'ahabw'abaabaire baija kuriira aha meeza ye, nibataana embu, buri omwe okwezi kwe, hatarikugira kintu kyona ekyaburaho." 
1Kings4:28 Bakaba bareeta amabaare n'obunyaatsi bw'embaraasi n'obw'ezirikwiruka munonga; babita omu myanya ei birikwetengwamu, buri omwe nk'oku aragiirwe." 
1Kings4:29 Reero Ruhanga yaaha Solomooni obwengye n'okwetegyereza ebitakareebwaga; kandi yaamuha omutima gwine okushoboorokyerwa kwingi munonga, nk'omusheenyi gw'aha rubaju rw'enyanja." 
1Kings4:30 Obwengye bwa Solomooni bwakirira kimwe obw'abantu boona ab'omu burugwa-izooba n'obw'Abanyamisiri boona. 
1Kings4:31 Manya akaba naakiza abantu boona obwengye, naabukiza Etani Omunyaeizerahi, na Hemani, Kalukooli na Darida beene Maholi; yaarangaanwa omu mahanga goona agamwehinguririize." 
1Kings4:32 Akacwa enfumu enkumi ishatu, yaahimba ebyeshongoro rukumi na bitaano." 
1Kings4:33 Akaba naamanya enganda z'emiti n'ebindi ebirikumera, okwiha ahari kaarwenda ey'omuri Lebanooni, okuta aha nyaweera emerera aha rugo; naamanya enyamaishwa n'enyonyi n'ebirikugyendesa enda, n'ebyenyanja." 
1Kings4:34 Abantu bakaba baruga omu mahanga goona, baija kuhurira eby'obwengye bwe, boohereziibwe abagabe b'omu nsi yoona, abaahuriire eby'obwengye bwe." 
1Kings5:1 Mbwenu Hiramu omugabe wa Tuuro ku yaahuriire ngu basiigire Solomooni amajuta kuhungurira ishe aha bugabe, yaamutumaho abagaragwa be; ahabw'okuba Hiramu okwiha ira akaba akundana na Daudi." 
1Kings5:2 Solomooni nawe yaatuma ahari Hiramu ati: 
1Kings5:3 Noomanya ku Daudi tata atarabaasize kwombekyera Mukama Ruhanga we enju y'okumuramizamu; ahabw'okuba abazigu be abamwehinguririize bakaba bamurwanisa, nibamuturuka oku n'oku; okuhitsya obu Mukama yaamubasingwize." 
1Kings5:4 Kwonka hati Mukama Ruhanga wangye ampaire obuhuumure embaju zoona; tihaakiriho bazigu nari akabi. 
1Kings5:5 Nikyo ndikwendera kwombekyera Mukama Ruhanga wangye enju y'okumuramizamu, nk'oku yaagambiire Daudi tata ati: Mutabani waawe, ou ndyemeka aha kitebe kyawe ky'obugabe kukuhungurira, niwe aryombeka enju y'okundamizamu." 
1Kings5:6 Mbwenu nu, ragiira bantemere zaakaarwenda z'omuri Lebanooni, haza abairu bangye bakore n'abaawe. Kandi abaawe niinyija kubaha ebihembo, nk'oku oraabiinyenze. Noomanya kunu omuriitwe ku hatariyo orikumanya kutema gye emiti nk'Abanyasidooni." 
1Kings5:7 Hiramu ku yaahuriire ebi Solomooni amutumireho, yaashemererwa munonga, yaagira ati: Nyakubaho owaahaire Daudi omwana w'obwengye kutegyeka eihanga rihango riti, eri izooba ahimbisibwe." 
1Kings5:8 Hiramu nawe yaatuma ahari Solomooni ati: Mpuriire ebi ontumireho. Aha bikwatiraine n'emiti ya kaarwenda n'emisisa, niinyija kukukorera kyona eki orikwenda." 
1Kings5:9 Abairu bangye nibaija kugiiha Lebanooni, bagishuumye, bagihitsye aha nyanja, ngikomerane nk'ebibaya, erabe omu nyanja, ehikye omu mwanya gu oraaragiire. Okwo niyo ndaagikomoororere, okabona kugyakiira. Kureka eki ndikwenda, niiwe okutungira ab'eka yangye ebyokurya." 
1Kings5:10 Hiramu atyo atwekyera Solomooni emiti yoona ey'emisisa n'eya kaarwenda nk'oku yaagyenzire. 
1Kings5:11 Solomooni nawe yaaguma naaha Hiramu ebitenga obukumi bubiri by'engano y'okuriisa ab'eka ye; n'ebigirikani obukumi mushanju na magana ataano by'amajuta g'omuoliva. Solomooni ebyo akaba abitwekyera Hiramu buri mwaka. 
1Kings5:12 Na Nyakubaho yaaha Solomooni obwengye nk'oku yaamuraganiise. Solomooni na Hiramu baatuurana baine obusingye; bombi baaragaana endagaano y'okuguma bakwataniise. 
1Kings5:13 Omugabe Solomooni yaatoorana omuri Isiraeli yoona abantu b'okukora emirimo y'amaani, baahika abashaija obukumi bushatu." 
1Kings5:14 Yaaboohereza Lebanooni, buri kwezi abantu kakumi nibaihaihana; nibamara okwezi kumwe Lebanooni, n'ameezi abiri omuka; Adoniramu ari mukuru waabo." 
1Kings5:15 Solomooni kandi akaba aine abeekorezi obukumi mushanju, n'abandi obukumi munaana, abaabaire nibacweregyerera amabaare omu nsi y'ebibungo;" 
1Kings5:16 otabariiremu abatware bakuru enkumi ishatu na magana ashatu abarikureeberera emirimo. 
1Kings5:17 Omugabe yaabaragiira, baahigura amabaare mahango ag'obuguzi bwingi, baagabaija, ngu babone kugombekyesa omusingi gwa Nyaruju." 
1Kings5:18 Batyo abombeki ba Solomooni n'aba Hiramu n'abantu ba Gebali baagabaija, baatebeekanisa emiti n'ago mabaare kubyombekyesa Nyaruju." 
1Kings6:1 Ku haabaire hahingwireho emyaka magana ana na makumi munaana Abaisiraeli barugire Misiri, omu mwaka gwa kana, Solomooni agiire aha ngoma ya Isiraeli, omu kwezi kwa Ziivu, nikwo kwa kabiri, Solomooni ogwo yaatandika kwombeka Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
1Kings6:2 Nyaruju ei Omugabe Solomooni yaayombekyeire Nyakubaho ekaba eri mikono makumi mukaaga oburaingwa, mikono makumi abiri obukiika, na mikono makumi ashatu obwemi." 
1Kings6:3 Ekisasi ky'omu maisho ga Nyaruju kikaba kiri mikono makumi abiri oburaingwa, oburikwingana n'obukiika bwayo, kandi obucuzi bwayo omu maisho ga Nyaruju buri mikono ikumi." 
1Kings6:4 Reero yaakorera egyo nju amadirisa g'embaaho zirabainemu, agatarikubaasa kukuurwamu." 
1Kings6:5 Kandi aha kisiika ky'egyo nju yaayombekaho ekyombeko ekirikwehinguririza ebisiika byayo, kyakwatana n'ebisiika bya Nyaruju n'eby'omwanya ogurikwera. Yaagyombekaho ebishengye by'omu mbaju kugyehinguririza." 
1Kings6:6 Ebishengye eby'aha nsi bikaba biri mikono etaano obuhango, ebya kaanyinaabiri mikono mukaaga, n'ebya kaanyina ashatu mikono mushanju. Haza okwehinguririza aheeru yaayo akaba atsigaho emyanya y'emiraba kuhikiraho, ngu etakaayoga omu bisiika by'egyo nju." 
1Kings6:7 Omu kwombeka Nyaruju, amabaare gaayo gakaba gagyererwa omu iteerero ryago. Nikyo omu kugyombeka haabaire hatahurirwa nyondo, nobu yaakuba empango, nainga ekyoma ky'omuringo gwona ekirikugamba." 
1Kings6:8 Omuryango ogw'ebishengye by'ahansi gukaba guri aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo obw'egyo nju, batemba nibaraba aha matembero garikwekiikuura, bahika omuri kaanyina abiri; bakiruga aho bahika omuri kaanyina ashatu." 
1Kings6:9 Mpaho yaayombeka egyo nju yaagiheza. Edaari yaayo yaagikoresa emiraba ya kaarwenda n'embaaho zaayo. 
1Kings6:10 Yaayombeka ekindi kyombeko akyegamiize Nyaruju yoona; buri kisiika kya kaanyinaabiri kiri mikono etaano obwemi, kandi kyombekyeraniirwe ahari Nyaruju n'emiti ya kaarwenda." 
1Kings6:11 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Solomooni ati: 
1Kings6:12 Aha bikwatiraine n'egi nju ei orikwombeka, ku orikuratira ebi naataireho, waayorobera ebi naaragiire, kandi waarinda ebiragiro byangye byona otaabiteishuka, nibwo ndihamya eki naakugambiire eki naagambiire Daudi sho;" 
1Kings6:13 ntuure omu Baisiraeli, ndekye kubatsigaho." 
1Kings6:14 Solomooni atyo ayombeka egyo nju, agiheza." 
1Kings6:15 Ebisiika bya Nyaruju eby'omunda Solomooni akabishweka embaaho zaakarwenda okwiha aha nsi okuta aha miraba y'edaari, omunda yaabishwekyesa embaaho, kandi aha nsi y'egyo nju yaahaarira embaaho z'emisisa." 
1Kings6:16 Aha muheru gw'enju yaayombekaho ekisiika ky'embaaho za kaarwenda kya mikono makumi abiri okwiha aha nsi okuta aha miraba, yaakyombeka kyaba omwanya gw'endugu Ogurikwera, nigwo mwanya Ogurikwerera kimwe." 
1Kings6:17 Egyo nju, nikwo kugira ngu omwanya ogwa rwagati gw'omu maisho g'Omwanya Ogurikwera, gukaba niguhitsya mikono makumi ana oburaingwa." 
1Kings6:18 Embaaho za kaarwenda ezi baashwekyeise ebisiika zikaba zisharwirweho ebishushani by'ebisisi n'eby'ebirabyo bijanjamwire. 
1Kings6:19 Omwanya ogurikwera akaguteera kimwe omu mwanya gw'endugu buzima kuba ogw'okutamu eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho. 
1Kings6:20 Omwanya gw'endugu Ogurikwera gukaba guri mikono makumi abiri oburaingwa, makumi abiri obukiika, na mikono makumi abiri obwemi; kandi yaagushweka zaabu empuuhe. Reero yaakora eitambiro omu mbaaho za kaarwenda." 
1Kings6:21 Kandi Solomooni omunda y'egyo nju akagishwekyesa ezaabu empuuhe, yaagitamu enjegyere z'ezaabu ezirikugucwekanisa, nazo yaazihunda ezaabu." 
1Kings6:22 Kandi Nyaruju yoona yaagishwekyesa ezaabu okuhitsya obu yaahwaire; n'eitambiro ryona ery'omu mwanya gw'endugu, Ogurikwera, naryo yaarishweka ezaabu." 
1Kings6:23 Omu mwanya gw'endugu Ogurikwera akatamu baakerubi babiri babaizirwe omu miti y'omuoliva, buri omwe aine obwemi bwa mikono ikumi," 
1Kings6:24 eipapa rimwe rya kerubi rikaba nirihitsya oburaingwa bwa mikono etaano; n'erindi ipapa rye naryo nirihitsya oburaingwa bwa mikono etaano; n'erindi ipapa rye naryo nirihitsya oburaingwa bwa mikono etaano; okwiha aha nshonga y'eipapa rimwe, okuta aha nshonga y'eipapa rimwe, okuta aha nshonga y'erindi, nihahitsya mikono ikumi." 
1Kings6:25 Na kerubi ondi akaba naahitsya mikono ikumi; baakerubi bombi nibaingana, kandi nibashushana." 
1Kings6:26 Kerubi omwe akaba aine obwemi bwa mikono ikumi n'ondi nawe aine nk'obwo. 
1Kings6:27 Baakerubi akabata omu mwanya gw'endugu buzima ogw'egyo nju. Baakerubi abo bakaba bashashanwire amapapa; eipapa rya kerubi omwe nirikora aha kisiika ky'orubaju rumwe, n'erindi nirikora aha ky'orundi rubaju; agandi mapapa gaabo nigabugabuganira ahagati y'enju." 
1Kings6:28 Baakerubi abo yaabahunda ezaabu. 
1Kings6:29 Kandi aha bisiika by'Omwanya Ogurikwera ebigwehinguririize, akasharuraho ebishushani bya baakerubi n'emiti y'emikindo n'ebirabyo bijanjamwire, omu bishengye by'omunda n'eby'aheeru." 
1Kings6:30 Aha nsi y'egyo nju omu bishengye by'omunda n'eby'aheeru yaahashwekyesa ezaabu. 
1Kings6:31 Solomooni akakoresa enyigi z'omuoliva, yaazita aharikutaahirwa omu mwanya gw'endugu ogurikwera: ekisasi n'enti z'emiryango biine enshonda z'embaju itaano." 
1Kings6:32 Ezo nyigi z'omuoliva zombi yaazisharuraho ebishushani bya baakerubi n'eby'emikindo n'eby'ebirabyo bijanjamwire, yaabishwekyesa ezaabu; kandi baakerubi n'emikindo nabyo yaabishweka ezaabu." 
1Kings6:33 Reero yaakora enyigi z'emioliva z'embaju ina zirikwingana, yaazita aharikutaahirwa omu mwanya gwa Nyaruju ogw'ahagati." 
1Kings6:34 Kandi enyigi ibiri z'emisisa yaazikora ziine embari ibiri; buri kibari ky'orwigi rumwe kiine ebishate bibiri ebirikukubwa; n'orundi rwine narwo bibiri ebirikukubwa. 
1Kings6:35 Aha nyigi ezo yaasharuraho baakerubi, n'emikindo n'ebirabyo bijanjamwire; yaazisiiga gye ezaabu erikwingana, ahari ebyo bicweka bisharwire." 
1Kings6:36 Reero orugo rw'ekibuga eky'omunda yaarwombekyesa emishorongo eshatu y'amabaare gacweregyereire, buri gumwe guriho omutambiko gw'emiti ya kaarwenda." 
1Kings6:37 Omu kwezi kwa Ziivu okw'omu mwaka gwa kana ogw'omu busingye bwa Solomooni, nibwo baayombeka omusingi gwa Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
1Kings6:38 Kandi omu kwezi kwa Buula, nikwo kwa munaana, okw'omu mwaka gwe gwa ikumi na gumwe, nibwo baaheza kwombeka egyo nju n'ebicweka byayo byona, nk'oku baabaire bateekateekire kugyombeka. Solomooni yaamara emyaka mushanju naagyombeka." 
1Kings7:1 Solomooni akamara emyaka ikumi n'eshatu naayeyombekyera enju; yaarugaho yoona yaagiheza. 
1Kings7:2 Enju ye, erikwetwa Ekibira kya Lebanooni, akagyombeka eine oburaingwa bwa mikono igana, n'obukiika bwa mikono makumi ataano, n'obwemi bwa mikono makumi ashatu; yaagyombeka aha nyomyo za kaarwenda z'emishorongo eshatu, eziriho emitambiko ya kaarwenda." 
1Kings7:3 Kandi ahaiguru y'ebishengye ebyabaire byombekyeirwe aha nyomyo makumi ana na itaano, ikumi na itaano omu buri mushorongo, yaashakaazaho embaaho za kaarwenda." 
1Kings7:4 Yaakora emishorongo eshatu y'amadirisa gakurataine, buri dirisa nirireebana n'erindi." 
1Kings7:5 Emiryango yoona n'amadirisa bikaba biine emyango y'embaju ina zirikwingana, kandi ago madirisa gari omu mishorongo eshatu; buri rimwe nirireebana n'erindi." 
1Kings7:6 Reero yaayombeka enju erikwetwa ey'enyomyo, y'oburaingwa bwa mikono makumi ataano, obukiika bwa mikono makumi ashatu; eine ekisasi ky'enyomyo n'ekisanga." 
1Kings7:7 Kandi akombeka enju y'ekitebe ky'obugabe, ahu araagume naacwera emanja; niyo nju y'Eiramuriro. Egyo nju bakagyombekyesa kaarwenda okwiha aha nsi okuta aha miraba." 
1Kings7:8 Reero enju ye ey'okuraaramu, eyaabaire eri omu kindi kibuga enyima y'enju y'Eiramuriro nayo ekaba eyombekirwe etyo. Solomooni kandi akombekyera muhara wa Faraaho ou yaabaire ashweire enju nk'egyo." 
1Kings7:9 Amaju ago goona gakombekyesibwa amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi, agacweregyereirwe nk'orugyero rwago oku ruri, nibagashaza emishumeeno omu maisho n'enyima. Okwiha aha musingi okuhitsya aha mutwe gw'ekisiika; kandi n'okwiha aha kibuga kya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho okuta aha kibuga ekihango," 
1Kings7:10 omusingi gukombekyesibwa amabaare mahango g'obuguzi bwingi, agarikuhitsya mikono munaana nari ikumi." 
1Kings7:11 Kandi aha iguru akataho amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi agacweregyereirwe, nk'oku orugyero rwago ruri, yaataho n'embaaho za kaarwenda." 
1Kings7:12 Ekibuga ekihango kikaba kyehinguririziibwe orugo rwombekyesiibwe embu ishatu z'amabaare gacwerengyereire, n'orubu rw'emitambiko ya kaarwenda, ahagati ya buri mishorongo eshatu y'amabaare. N'ekibuga ky'omunda ekya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho n'ekisasi kyayo nabyo bikaba byombekirwe bityo." 
1Kings7:13 Omugabe Solomooni akatuma abantu, baamureetera Hiramu nibamwiha Tuuro." 
1Kings7:14 Hiramu ogwo akaba ari mutabani w'omufaakazi w'omu ruganda rwa Nafutaali, kandi ishe ari Omunyatuuro, omuheesi w'emiringa, owaabaire aine obwengye bwingi n'okwetegyereza, kandi omunyamwoga, orikubaasa kuheesha ekintu kyona omu muringa. Atyo yaija ow'omugabe Solomooni, yaamukorera emirimo ye y'emiringa yoona." 
1Kings7:15 Akaheesha enyomyo ibiri z'emiringa. Enyomyo emwe ekaba eri mikono ikumi na munaana oburaingwa, omuzimba gwayo okugyehinguririza guri mikono ikumi n'ebiri. Omunda ekaba eri omurangara, omukoba gwayo niguhitsya enkumu ina. N'eya kabiri nikwo yaabaire eri." 
1Kings7:16 Kandi yaaheesha amatungu abiri g'omuringa guyagiibwe, kugatungika aha mitwe y'ezo nyomyo; eitungu ry'enyomyo emwe riri mikono etaano oburaingwa. N'erindi naryo rityo." 
1Kings7:17 Aha matungu g'aha mutwe gw'ezo nyomyo, yaaheesheraniraho otugoye tw'emiringa oturabainemu nk'akatimba, kandi yaahundaho ebishaba by'emikuufu etaakire. Aha itungu rimwe yaataho mushanju, n'aha rindi mushanju." 
1Kings7:18 Kandi yaakora ebiri nk'ebijuma by'amakomamahanga, yaabyehinguririza obwo butimba omu mbu ibiri kubishwekyesa eitungu ry'aha nyomyo emwe; n'erindi itungu yaaba nikwo yaaritwaza." 
1Kings7:19 Reero amatungu g'aha mitwe y'enyomyo z'ekisasi akagaheesha nigashusha emyangangye erikuhitsya mikono ena. 
1Kings7:20 Aha matungu g'enyomyo zombi, n'ahaiguru y'omugoma ogwezigoire buri nyomyo, haihi n'obutimba, niho baahanikire omu mbu ibiri ebiri nk'ebijuma by'amakomamahanga ebirikuhika magana abiri." 
1Kings7:21 Atyo yaabyara enyomyo omu maisho g'ekisasi kya Nyaruju; ey'aha rubaju rwa buryo yaagyeeta Yakini; n'ey'aha rwa bumosho yaagyeeta Boazi. 
1Kings7:22 Kandi aha mutwe gw'ezo nyomyo yaaheesheraniraho ebishushani by'emyangangye. Gutyo omurimo gw'ezo nyomyo gwahwa. 
1Kings7:23 Bwanyima akakora ekiyanja omu miringa eyagiibwe, yaakikora kyekuringiriire; kiri mikono ikumi okuruga aha mugoma okuhika aha gundi; oburaingwa buri mikono etaano kandi kiine omugoma gwa mikono makumi ashatu okukyehinguririza." 
1Kings7:24 Omu bugyenyero bwakyo hakaba hakiikiizemu ebisisi biheesirwe omu muringa omu mbu ibiri, omwezigooro gwabyo niguhitsya mikono makumi ashatu, biheesherainwe nakyo." 
1Kings7:25 Ekyo kiyanja kikaba kitairwe aha migongo y'enimi ikumi na ibiri z'omuringa; ishatu nizireeba aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, ishatu nizireeba oburengyerwa-izooba, ishatu nizireeba aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, n'eishatu nizireeba oburugwa-izooba. Ekyo kiyanja nizo kyabaire kishitamiire; zoona ziteeraine ebibunu birikureeba omu nda." 
1Kings7:26 Omukoba gwakyo gukaba niguhitsya ekita kimwe, kandi emigoma yaakyo ekaba ekozirwe nk'ey'ekikopo; kikaba ni kigiibwamu enjoga enkumi ibiri na magana ataano z'amaizi." 
1Kings7:27 Kandi akakora ebigaari ikumi by'omuringa; buri kigaari kiine oburaingwa bwa mikono ena, obukiika bwa mikono ena, n'obwemi bwa mikono eshatu. Oku nikwo byabaire bikozirwe:" 
1Kings7:28 Bikaba biine ebiremu ebishensheziibwe omu rukanga rwabyo. 
1Kings7:29 Ahari ebyo biremu ebishensheziibwemu, hakaba hasharwirweho ebishushani by'entare n'eby'enimi n'ebya baakerubi. Ahari orwo rukanga, ahaiguru n'ahansi y'entare n'enimi, hakaba hasharwireho ebishaba by'ebicwererane byegondekire." 
1Kings7:30 Kandi buri kigaari kikaba kiine enziga ina z'omuringa n'ebyoma by'omuringa ebi zirikuhindukiraho. Aha nshonda zaakyo ina hakaba hariho ebirikuteebwaho ekinaabiro; ebyo ebirikuteebwaho ekinaabiro, buri kimwe kiheesherainweho ebicwererane byegondekire." 
1Kings7:31 Omunwa gwakyo gukaba guri omunda y'omugoma, gutunami eruguru mukono gumwe, kandi gwekuringiriire nk'ahi bata ekinaabiro; niguhitsya mukono gumwe n'ekicweka omu bucuzi. Aha munwa gwakyo hakaba hariho ebishariirweho; n'ebiremu byagwo embaju zaabyo zoona nizingana, ziteekuringiriire." 
1Kings7:32 Ezo nziga ina zikaba ziri ahansi y'ebiremu; ebyoma bi zirikuhindukiraho biheesherainwe n'ebyo bigaari; kandi obwemi bw'enziga buri mukono gumwe n'ekicweka. 
1Kings7:33 Ezo nziga zikaba zikozirwe nk'ez'ekigaari; emihindo yaazo, n'ebidangari byazo, n'enyomyo zaazo, n'ebirikushokwamu enyomyo, biheesirwe omu muringa." 
1Kings7:34 Aha nshonda ina eza buri kigaari, hakaba hariho ebintu bina ebirikukihigika, ebi kirikuhamiraho, biheesheraniirwe ahari ebyo bigaari." 
1Kings7:35 Aha mutwe gw'ekigaari hakaba hariho ekintu kyebumburikire, ky'obwemi bwa kimwe kya kabiri kya mukono gumwe, kandi enyomyo zaakyo n'ebiremu byakyo biheesherainwe nakyo." 
1Kings7:36 Reero ahari ezo nyomyo n'ebiremu byakyo yaasharuraho baakerubi n'entare n'emikindo omu myanya i byabaasize kuteebwamu; byehinguririziibwe ebishaba. 
1Kings7:37 Hoona, okwo nikwo yaakozire ebigaari ikumi, byona abiheesire nibishushana, biri eby'orugyero rumwe n'omuringo gumwe." 
1Kings7:38 Kandi akakora ebinaabiro ikumi by'omuringa, buri kimwe nikigiibwamu amaizi g'ebinyungu makumi ana. Buri kinaabiro kikaba kiine oburaingwa bwa mikono ena; kandi ebyo bigaari ikumi, buri kimwe kiine ekinaabiro kyakyo." 
1Kings7:39 Mpaho yaata ebigaari bitaano aha rubaju rwa buryo orwa Nyaruju, n'ebindi bitaano aha rubaju rwayo orwa bumosho; kandi ekiyanja yaakita omu karugu ka Nyaruju ak'aha rubaju rwa buryo orw'oburugwa-izooba." 
1Kings7:40 Reero Hiramu akakora enyungu, n'ebitiiho n'enyabya; yaaheza atyo omurimo ogu yaakoreire Omugabe Solomooni ahari Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
1Kings7:41 Enyomyo ibiri, enyabya ibiri z'aha matungu g'aha mutwe gw'enyomyo, n'obutimba bubiri bw'okushweka aha nyabya ibiri ez'aha matungu g'aha mitwe y'enyomyo." 
1Kings7:42 N'ebirikushusha ebijuma by'amakoma mahanga magana ana, by'okuhunda obutimba bwombi; embu ibiri z'ebirikushusha ebijuma by'amakoma-mahanga, ahabwa buri katimba, kushweka aha nyabya ibiri z'aha matungu g'enyomyo." 
1Kings7:43 Ebigaari ikumi, n'ebinaabiro byaho ikumi." 
1Kings7:44 Ekiyanja kimwe, n'enimi ikumi na ibiri, eziri ahansi yaakyo." 
1Kings7:45 Haza ezo nyungu n'ebitiiho n'enyabya, ebintu byona eby'omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ebi Hiramu yaakoreire Omugabe Solomooni, bikaheeshwa omu muringa guzigwire." 
1Kings7:46 Omugabe akagiyagiza omu ruhita rwa Yorudaani ahaine eibumba, ahagati ya Sukooti na Zerataani." 
1Kings7:47 Kwonka Solomooni tararengire buremeezi bw'ebyo bintu byona, ahabw'okuba bikaba biri bingi munonga, nikyo oburemeezi bw'egyo miringa butaramanyirwe." 
1Kings7:48 Solomooni nikwo yaakozire ebintu byona eby'omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho: Eitambiro ry'ezaabu, emeeza y'ezaabu ey'emigaati y'Okumurikwa;" 
1Kings7:49 ebikondo by'amatabaaza eby'ezaabu empuuhe; bitaano aha rubaju rwa buryo, na bitaano aha rwa bumosho, omu maisho g'Omwanya Ogurikwera ogw'endugu; taho ebirabyo, n'amatabaaza, n'empana, eby'ezaabu;" 
1Kings7:50 ebikopo, makansi y'okukongyeeza n'okuraaza amatabaaza, benseni n'enyabya z'obubaani n'eby'okuguhisa omuriro, eby'ezaabu empuuhe, n'epata z'ezaabu ez'aha nyigi z'ekishengye kya Nyaruju eky'endugu, Omwanya Ogurikwera munonga, n'ez'aha nyigi z'omwanya gwa Nyaruju ogw'ahagati." 
1Kings7:51 Nikwo Omugabe Solomooni yaaherize atyo omurimo gwa Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, akatamu ebintu ebi Daudi ishe yaabaire ahongyeire Ruhanga. Nibyo ebi: Efeeza n'ezaabu n'ebindi ebirikukoresibwamu; akabibiika omu mabiikiro ga Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
1Kings8:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Omugabe Solomooni yaayeta abakuru b'omuri Isiraeli, n'abakuru b'enganda boona, n'abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, yaabaateeranira Yerusalemu, kwiha eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho omu rurembo rwa Daudi orurikwetwa Siyooni." 
1Kings8:2 Mpaho abantu boona baateeranira aha Mugabe Solomooni, omu kwezi kwa Etanimu, nikwo kwa mushanju, baizire aha bugyenyi." 
1Kings8:3 Abakuru b'omuri Isiraeli boona baija, abahongyerezi baakiriza eshanduukye." 
1Kings8:4 Abahongyerezi hamwe n'Abaleevi baaheeka eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho, n'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, n'ebintu byona ebirikwera ebyabaire biri omu ihema." 
1Kings8:5 Omugabe Solomooni n'Abaisiraeli boona abaabaire bateeraniire omu maisho ge baaguma bari hamwe nawe omu maisho g'eshanduukye, nibatamba ente nyingi n'entaama ezitarikubaasa na kubarwa." 
1Kings8:6 Bwanyima abahongyerezi baareeta eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho, baagita omuri Nyaruju, omu Mwanya gwayo Ogurikwera ogw'endugu ogurikwetwa Ogurikwera munonga, ahansi y'amapapa ga baakerubi." 
1Kings8:7 Manya ebishushani bya baakerubi bikaba bishashaanwire amapapa gaabyo ahaiguru y'omwanya gw'eshanduukye, ngu baakerubi babone kushweka egyo shanduukye n'emigamba yaayo." 
1Kings8:8 Emigamba ekaba eri miraingwa, emitwe yaayo neereeberwa omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, omu maisho g'Omwanya Ogurikwera, ogw'endugu; kwonka etarikureeberwa heeru. Na hati ekiriyo." 
1Kings8:9 Emuri egyo shanduukye hakaba hatarimu kindi, kureka ebishate by'amabaare bibiri ebi Musa yaateereiremu aha rushozi rwa Horebu; ahi Mukama yaaraganiire n'Abaisiraeli endagaano obu baaruga omu nsi ya Misiri." 
1Kings8:10 Mbwenu abahongyerezi ku baarugire omu Mwanya ogurikwera, ekicu kyaijura Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
1Kings8:11 Ahabw'ekyo kicu, abahongyerezi tibaabaasa kugarukamu kuheereza, ahabw'okuba ekitiinwa kya Mukama kikaijura Nyaruju ye." 
1Kings8:12 Solomooni nikwo kugira ati: Ai Mukama, okata eizooba aha iguru, kwonka waasiima kuguma omu kicu kitarikwogwamu maisho." 
1Kings8:13 Mbwenu nkwombekyeire Nyaruju y'ekitiinwa kuba omwanya gwawe gw'okutuuramu ebiro byona. 
1Kings8:14 Bwanyima Omugabe Solomooni akahinduka yaareeba ahu Abaisiraeli boona bateeraniire, yaabashabira omugisha." 
1Kings8:15 Kandi yaagira ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ahimbisibwe, owaahikiriize eki yaaraganiise Daudi tata, naagira ati:" 
1Kings8:16 Okwiha obu naiha abantu bangye Abaisiraeli omuri Misiri tinkatooranaga mu nganda za Isiraeli zoona orurembo rw'okwombekwamu Nyaruju y'okundamizamu; kureka nkatoorana Daudi kutegyeka abantu bangye Abaisiraeli. 
1Kings8:17 Mbwenu Daudi tata kikaba kimuri aha mutima kwombeka Nyaruju y'okuramizamu Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli. 
1Kings8:18 Kwonka Nyakubaho akagira Daudi tata ati: Ekiteekateeko ki ogizire eky'okuunyombekyera Nyaruju y'okundamizamu, okozire gye kukigira." 
1Kings8:19 Kwonka tiiwe oraagyombekye; kureka mutabani waawe ou orizaara niwe aryombeka Nyaruju y'okundamizamu. 
1Kings8:20 Mbwenu Nyakubaho yaahikiiriza eki yaaraganiise, ahabw'okuba mpunguriire Daudi tata, naashutama aha kitebe ky'omugabe bwa Isiraeli, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaraganiise; naayombeka Nyaruju y'okuramizamu Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
1Kings8:21 Kandi naagitamu omwanya gw'eshanduukye erimu endagaano ei Nyakubaho yaaragaine na baatatenkuriitwe obu yaabaiha omu nsi ya Misiri. 
1Kings8:22 Bwanyima Solomooni akeemerera omu maisho g'eitambiro rya Nyakubaho, Abaisiraeli boona bateeraniire aho, yaagorora emikono ye agyorekyeize omu iguru," 
1Kings8:23 yaashaba ati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, omu iguru ahaiguru n'omu nsi ahansi tihariho Ruhanga ori nkaiwe, orinda endagaano, akagirira abairu baawe rukundo etahararuka, abatuura bari abeesigwa ahariiwe baihire aha mutima." 
1Kings8:24 Iwe owaarinzire eki waaraganiise Daudi tata omwiru waawe, okimugambiire butunu. Eego! Eki waagambire, hati eri izooba waakihikiiriza." 
1Kings8:25 Ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, rinda eki waaraganiise Daudi tata omwiru waawe noogira oti: Batabani baawe ku barita omutima aha mitwarize yaabo, baaba abeesigwa ahariinye, nk'oku obaire nootwaza omu maisho gangye, tindibura kukutungira w'okushutama aha kitebe ky'obugabe bwa Isiraeli." 
1Kings8:26 Ai Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, hamya eki waagambiire Daudi tata omuheereza waawe." 
1Kings8:27 Ebyo iwe Ruhanga, okaatuura omu nsi? Mbwenu eiguru n'ahaiguru owa herebe ku oraabe noobishaagamu, kaashwa egi nju ei nkwombekyeire?" 
1Kings8:28 Kwonka, ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, ta omutima aha kushaba kwangye, nyowe omwiru waawe, n'aha kweshengyereza kwangye, ohurire okutaka n'okushaba ebi ndikukushaba, nyowe omwiru waawe eri izooba." 
1Kings8:29 Obone kuguma otaire amaisho ahari egi nju yaawe nyomushana na nyekiro; omwanya ogu waagizire ngu guryaba ogw'okukuramizamu; haza ohurire okushaba kwangye nyowe omwiru waawe oku ndaagume ninkushaba mpangire amaisho ei ogu mwanya guri. 
1Kings8:30 Kandi ohurire okwshengyereza kwangye nyowe omwiru waawe, n'okw'abantu baawe Abaisiraeli, baaba nibashaba bataire amaisho ei ogu mwanya guri. Otuhurire nooyema omu iguru ei otuura, haza ku oraatuhurire, otusaasire." 
1Kings8:31 Omuntu ku arishaagiza mutaahi we, baamugira ngu arahire, yaija yaarahirira omu maisho g'eitambiro ryawe omuri egi nju," 
1Kings8:32 ohurire nooyema omu iguru, ogire eki waakora, ocwere abairu baawe orubanja, rusingye okozire kubi, aturwe eki akozire; haza ohikiriire orumwiheho, omuzimuurire nk'oku okuhikiirira kwe kuri." 
1Kings8:33 Abantu baawe Abaisiraeli ku barisingurwa abazigu ahabw'okukucumuraho, kwonka baakugarukira, baikiriza, kandi baakuhimbisiza omuri egi nju," 
1Kings8:34 ohurire nooyema omu iguru, abantu baawe Abaisiraeli obasaasire ekibi kyabo, obagarure omu nsi ei waahaire baishebo." 
1Kings8:35 Ku orizibira enjura kugwa, abantu baawe bakucumwireho, kwonka baakushaba nibareeba ei ogu mwanya guri, baakuhimbisa, kandi baayeteisa ebibi byabo nibamanya ku obafubiire," 
1Kings8:36 ohurire nooyema omu iguru, osaasire abairu baawe Abaisiraeli ekibi kyabo noobeegyesa emitwarize mirungi ei baraakuratire; kandi ogwisize enjura ensi yaawe ei waahaire abantu baawe kugihungura." 
1Kings8:37 Ensi ku eriteerwa enjara nari orufu, nari okubabuka, nari okusya nyamwenga, nari enzigye, kanyaananga, nainga abazigu ku baribagotera omuri ibara rurembo rwabo, nari ku haribaho kahumpuri nainga endiijo ndwara," 
1Kings8:38 omuntu weena nari abantu baawe boona Abaisiraeli baakushaba nibakweshengyereza, buri omwe naamanya obusaasi bw'omu mutima gwe, kandi yaimutsya emikono ye agyorekyeize egi nju," 
1Kings8:39 ohurire okushaba kwabo nooyema omu iguru ei otuura, obasaasire, ogire eki waakora, ozimuurire buri muntu, nk'oku orikumumanya omutima. Manya niiwe wenka omanya emitima y'abantu boona." 
1Kings8:40 Haza babone kukutiina ebiro byona ebi barimara omuri egi nsi i waahaire baatatenkuriitwe. 
1Kings8:41 Ekindi, omunyamahanga, otari w'omu bantu baawe Abaisiraeli, ku ariija naaruga omu nsi ya hare, areetsirwe okurangaanwa kwawe," 
1Kings8:42 ahabw'okuba tibaribura kuhurira eiziina ryawe rikuru n'omukono gwawe gw'amaani ogubangire, omuntu ogwo ku ariija yaashaba naareeba egi nju," 
1Kings8:43 ohurire okushaba kwe nooyema omu iguru ei otuura, omumarire byona ebi ariba naakushaba; abantu b'omu nsi boona babone kukumanya, bakutiine, nk'oku abantu baawe Abaisiraeli bagira; kandi bamanye ku egi nju i nyombekire erikukwetererwa." 
1Kings8:44 Abantu baawe ku barihurura nibaza aha rugamba kurwanisa abazigu baabo, omu muhanda gwona ogu oribatoozamu, ku barikushaba, Iwe Nyakubaho, boorekyeire oru rurembo ru waatooraine, n'egi nju i nkwombekyeire;" 
1Kings8:45 ohurire okushaba kwabo n'okweshengyereza kwabo nooyema omu iguru, kandi obarwanirire." 
1Kings8:46 Reero ku barikucumuraho, (manya tihariho otacumura), waabagirira ekiniga, waabarekurira abazigu, baabatwara bari enkwatwa omu nsi y'abazigu eya hare nari eya haihi," 
1Kings8:47 kwonka ku bariba bari omuri egyo nsi ei baatwairwemu bari enkwatwa, baakigumya aha mutima, baayeteisa, kandi baakweshengyereza bari omu nsi y'abaabakwatsire, baagira bati: Tukacumura, twashiisha, twakora eby'obugomi;" 
1Kings8:48 ku baryegarukamu omu mazima baihire aha mutima, omuri egyo nsi y'abazigu baabo abaabatwaire bari enkwatwa, baakushaba boorekyeire ensi yaabo ei waahaire baishebo, n'orurembo ru waatooraine, n'egi nju i nkwombekyeire," 
1Kings8:49 ohurire okushaba kwabo n'okweshengyereza kwabo nooyema omu iguru, obarwanirire." 
1Kings8:50 Kandi abo bantu baawe abakucumwireho obasaasire ebibi byabo ebi bakucumwireho, obagirire esaasi; abaabatwaire bari enkwatwa bakireebe; haza nabo babone kubagirira esaasi." 
1Kings8:51 Manya baba abantu baawe ahabwawe, abu waihire Misiri, omu iziiko ririkubuguma." 
1Kings8:52 Ta amaisho aha kweshengyereza kw'omuheereza waawe, n'aha kw'abantu baawe Abaisiraeli, obategye okutu baakutakira." 
1Kings8:53 Manya niiwe waabashoroire, okabataanisa n'amahanga goona ag'omu nsi, ngu babe abaawe ahabwawe, nk'oku waakigambiise omugaragwa waawe Musa, obu waiha baatatenkuriitwe Misiri, ai Mukama Ruhanga." 
1Kings8:54 Solomooni ku yaaherize kushaba n'okweshengyereza Mukama, yaimuka yaaruga omu maisho g'eitambiro rya Nyakubaho ahi yaabaire atsimbire amaju, agoroire emikono, agyorekyeize omu iguru." 
1Kings8:55 Atyo yaimuka yaashabira omugisha Abaisiraeli boona abateeraniire aho, n'eiraka rihango naagira ati:" 
1Kings8:56 Nyakubaho, ojuumwize abantu be Abaisiraeli, nk'ebi yaaraganiise byona oku biri, ahimbisibwe! Ahabw'okuba ebirungi bye byona, ebi yaaraganiise naabigambisa Musa omugaragwa we, tihariho kigambo na kimwe ekirabuzire." 
1Kings8:57 Mukama Ruhanga waitu naakagume naitwe, nk'oku yaagumire na baatatenkuriitwe. Ataritutsigaho, nobu kwakuba okutunagiirira." 
1Kings8:58 Naakatuhuguure, tukakuratira emitwarize ye, tukoorobera ebiragiro bye, n'ebi yaataireho, n'ebi yaaragiire, ebi yaaragiire baatatenkuriitwe." 
1Kings8:59 Ebi bigambo bi naagamba niinyeshengyereza ndi omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, Mukama Ruhanga waitu agume abiijukye nyomushana na nyekiro, andwanirire nyowe omwiru we n'abantu be Abaisiraeli, nk'oku barikukyetenga buri izooba," 
1Kings8:60 abantu boona ab'omu nsi babone kumanya ku Mukama niwe Ruhanga, ku hatariho ondiijo." 
1Kings8:61 N'ahabw'ekyo mubeere kimwe ab'amazima ahari Mukama Ruhanga waitu, mukuratire ebi yaataireho, kandi mworobere ebiragiro bye, nk'oku kiri eri izooba." 
1Kings8:62 Ebyo ku byahwaire, omugabe n'Abaisiraeli boona abu yaabaire aine baatambira Nyakubaho ebitambo." 
1Kings8:63 Solomooni yaatambira Nyakubaho ebitambo by'okwekundira; ente obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri, n'entaama akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi bubiri. Omugabe n'Abaisiraeli boona baahongyera batyo Nyakubaho Nyaruju." 
1Kings8:64 Hoona eryo izooba omugabe yaahaasirira ekibuga kya rwagati eky'omu maisho ga Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, yaatambiriraho ebitambo bicwekize, n'eby'esaano, n'eby'ebishaju eby'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe; ahabw'okuba eitambiro ry'omuringa, ery'omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, rikaba riri rikye ritarikuhikwaho ebitambo bicwekize, n'eby'esaano, n'eby'ebishaju eby'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe." 
1Kings8:65 Solomooni n'Abaisiraeli boona abu yaabaire aine, bari ekimbuuro kihango, okwiha aha muhanda gurikuza Hamati okuhika aha Kagyera ka Misiri, obwo bugyenyi baabumaramu ebiro mushanju bari omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
1Kings8:66 Aha kiro kya munaana, omugabe yaayohereza abantu kutaaha, nabo baamushabira omugisha, baataaha owaabo bashemereirwe, kandi bananukire, ahabw'ebirungi byona ebi Nyakubaho yaakoreire Daudi omwiru we n'abantu be Abaisiraeli." 
1Kings9:1 Solomooni ku yaaherize kwombekyera Mukama Nyaruju, n'enju y'obugabe, n'ebindi byona ebi yaayenzire kwombeka," 
1Kings9:2 Mukama yaamubonekyera omurundi gwa kabiri, nk'oku yaamubonekyeire Gibeoni." 
1Kings9:3 Reero yaamugira ati: Mpuriire okushaba kwawe n'okweshengyereza kwawe ebi onyetongyeizeho. Mbwenu nyerize egi nju ei oyombekire, naikiriza ku baguma nibagindamizamu obutwire bwona. Niinyija kuguma ngitaireho amaisho n'omutima ebiro byona." 
1Kings9:4 Kwonka iwe ku oringirira emitwarize mirungi nk'ei Daudi sho yangiriire, waaguma ori omwesigwa kandi ow'amazima, nookora nk'ebi naakuragiire byona oku biri, nooyorobera ebi naataireho n'ebi naaragiire," 
1Kings9:5 naanye ndyahamya ekitebe kyawe ky'obugabe otegyekye Isiraeli ebiro byona, nk'oku naaraganiise Daudi sho nimmugira nti: Toribura muntu w'okuza aha kitebe ky'obugabe bwa Isiraeli." 
1Kings9:6 Kwonka ku oriteishuka, waareka kunkuratira, yaaba iwe nari abaana baawe, mwayanga kworobera ebiragiro byangye, n'ebi naataireho, ebi naabahaire; haza mwagyenda mwaheereza baaruhanga abandi, mwabaramya," 
1Kings9:7 obwo ndyacwa Abaisiraeli omu nsi i naabahaire; n'egi nju i nshoroire kundamizamu ngiihireho kimwe, ndekye kugireeba; Isiraeli ebe eky'okucweraho enfumu n'ekigaaniizo omu mahanga goona." 
1Kings9:8 Kandi egi nju eryaba eitongo, weena oriba naarabaho atangaare, engaro azite aha munwa, babuuze bati: Beitu Nyakubaho egi nsi n'egi nju akabitura ki?" 
1Kings9:9 Babagarukyemu bati: N'ahabw'okuba bakaimuura Mukama Ruhanga waabo, owaihire baishebo omu nsi ya Misiri, baahongyera baaruhanga abandi, baabaramya, baabaheereza; nikyo abagwisiize ako kagwe." 
1Kings9:10 Aha muheru gw'emyaka makumi abiri, ei Solomooni yaayombekyeiremu amaju gombi: Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'enju y'obugabe," 
1Kings9:11 Hiramu omugabe owa Tuuro akaba atwekyeire Solomooni embaaho za kaarwenda n'ez'emisisa n'ezaabu, ebi yaabaire naayetenga byona. Omugabe Solomooni yaaha Hiramu endembo makumi abiri omu nsi ya Galilaaya." 
1Kings9:12 Kwonka Hiramu ku yaarugire Tuuro kureeba endembo zi Solomooni amuhaire, tiyaazisiima." 
1Kings9:13 Nikwo kumubuuza ati: Mwene tata, endembo zi ompaire ni za muringo ki? Nikyo n'eri izooba zeeterwa ezitaine mugasho." 
1Kings9:14 Hiramu akaba atwekyeire ogwo mugabe Shilingi z'ezaabu obusiriira mushanju, n'obukumi bubiri." 
1Kings9:15 Mbwenu egi niyo mirimo y'okugyemwa, ei Omugabe Solomooni yaataireho; okwombeka Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'enju ye ahabwe, n'okwombeka orugo rwa Yerusalemu, na Hazori, na Megido, na Gezeri." 
1Kings9:16 (Omugabe Faraaho wa Misiri akaba ahurwire, akwatsire Gezeri, agikoomeire omuriro, aitsire Abanyakanaani abatwire omuri orwo rurembo, kandi agishagariire omuhara, muka Solomooni." 
1Kings9:17 Solomooni nikwo kugaruka kwombeka Gezeri,) na Betihorooni eyaifo," 
1Kings9:18 na Baalati, na Tamari eby'omu ihamba, omu nsi ya Yuda;" 
1Kings9:19 taho endembo z'okubiikwamu ebintu ebi Solomooni yaabaire aine, n'ez'ebigaari bye, n'engabo ze ezirwanira aha mbaraasi, n'ebindi byoma ezi Solomooni yaayenzire kwombeka omuri Yerusalemu, n'omuri Lebanooni, n'omu nsi yoona ey'omu bugabe bwe." 
1Kings9:20 Abantu boona abaatsigaireho ab'Abaamori, Abahiiti, Abapeerizi, Abahiivi, n'ab'Abayebusi, abaabaire batari Baisiraeli," 
1Kings9:21 baijukuru baabo abaagiire omu bigyere byabo omuri egyo nsi, abu Abaisiraeli batarabaasize kucwekyerereza kimwe, abo nibo Solomooni yaahindwire abahuuku b'okukora emirimo y'okugyemeserezibwa; kandi n'eri izooba nikwo bari." 
1Kings9:22 Kwonka Abaisiraeli Solomooni tarabahindwire bahuuku, kureka bakaba abaserukare, abandi baaba abakungu be, abakuru b'amahe ge, abakuru b'engabo ze, abakuru b'ebigaari, n'abarikurwanira aha mbaraasi." 
1Kings9:23 Abatware bakuru abaabaire nibareeberera emirimo ya Solomooni bakaba bari magana ataano na makumi ataano, nibategyeka abarikukora egyo mirimo." 
1Kings9:24 Kwonka muhara wa Faraaho akaruga omu rurembo rwa Daudi, yaaza omu rwe oru Solomooni yaamwombekyeire; n'onu nikwo kwijuza eitaka aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba bwa Yerusalemu, aharikwetwa Miilo." 
1Kings9:25 Kashatu buri mwaka, Solomooni akaba atambira Nyakubaho ebitambo bicwekize n'empongano z'okwekundira, aha itambiro ri yaamwombekyeire, ayoterera obubaani omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. Atyo yaaheza egyo nju." 
1Kings9:26 Omugabe Solomooni akombeka emeeri nyingi Ezionigeberi, oruhereraine na Eloti, aha rubaju rw'Enyanja Erikutukura, omu nsi ya Edomu." 
1Kings9:27 Reero Hiramu yaayohereza omuri ezo meri abairu be, abarimbi abamanyiire enyanja, baagyenda hamwe n'abairu ba Solomooni;" 
1Kings9:28 baaza Ofiri, baihayo ezaabu erikuhitsya kiloguraamu nk'akakumi kamwe na magana munaana na makumi munaana na itaano, baagireetera omugabe Solomooni." 
1Kings10:1 Mbwenu omugabekazi wa Sheeba, ku yaahuriire okurangaanwa kwa Solomooni okurikuhimbisisa Mukama, yaija kumubuuza ebibuuzo bigumire, naamugyeza." 
1Kings10:2 Yaahika Yerusalemu ashendekyereziibwe abagaragwa baingi munonga, n'engamira zeekoreire eby'emigaju, n'ezaabu nyingi munonga, n'amabaare g'obuguzi, bwingi. Mpaho ku yaahikire Solomooni, yaamugambira byona ebimuri aha mutima." 
1Kings10:3 Solomooni yaagarukamu ebi yaamubuurize byona, tihaagira kyashobera ogwo mugabe, eki ataramushoboororaire." 
1Kings10:4 Omugabekazi ku yaareebire eby'obwengye bwa Solomooni bwona, enju ei yaayombekire," 
1Kings10:5 ebyokurya by'aha meeza ye, emishutamire y'abakungu be, oku abagaragwa be barikuheereza, n'oku bajwaire, n'abagabuzi by'ebyokunywa n'ebitambo bicwekize ebi yaabaire atambira omuri Nyaruju ya Mukama, omutima gwamuhwa omunda." 
1Kings10:6 Atyo yaagira omugabe ati: Ebi naahuriire nkiri omu nsi yangye, eby'emitwarize yaawe n'obwengye bwawe, bikaba biri eby'amazima." 
1Kings10:7 Kwonka nyowe tindabiikiriize, okuhitsya obu nyizire nkabyereebera n'agangye. Nangwa n'ebi bangambiire tibirahikire kicweka kyabyo kya kabiri. Obwengye bwawe n'eitungo ryawe nibikirira kimwe ebi bangambiire." 
1Kings10:8 Ebishi abantu baawe bahiiriirwe! N'aba bagaragwa baawe, abakwemerera omu maisho, bakahurira eby'obwengye bwawe, bahiiriirwe!" 
1Kings10:9 Mukama Ruhanga waawe owaakusiimire akakuta aha kitebe ky'obugabe bwa Isiraeli, ahimbisibwe! Manya Nyakubaho, ahabw'okukunda Isiraeli ebiro byona, nikyo akuteereireho kuba omugabe, ngu ocwe emanja z'oburyo kandi ezihikire." 
1Kings10:10 Ebyo ku bihwa, Omugabekazi aha ogwo mugabe ezaabu ya kiloguraamu nk'enkumi itaano na magana mukaaga, n'eby'emigaju bingi munonga, n'amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi. Okwiha obwo, tiharagizire by'emigaju bingi munonga, ebi baareetsire, ebiri nk'ebi ogwo mugabekazi wa Sheeba yaahaire Omugabe Solomooni." 
1Kings10:11 Ekindi, emeeri za Hiramu, ezaareetsire ezaabu nizigiiha Ofiri, zikaihayo n'embaaho nyingi munonga z'emisikizi n'amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi." 
1Kings10:12 Egyo misikizi omugabe yaagibaijamu enyomyo za Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho n'ez'enju y'obugabe, n'endingiri, n'enanga z'abeeshongozi. Tihariho miti y'emisikizi nk'egyo eyaagarukire kureetwa nari kureebwa, okuhitsya n'eri izooba." 
1Kings10:13 Reero Omugabe Solomooni yaaha omugabekazi wa Sheeba byona ebi yaayenzire n'ebi yaamushabire, otabariiremu ebi Omugabe Solomooni yaamukunisiize. Bwanyima ogwo mugabekazi yaakuba, yaagarukayo omu nsi ye, hamwe n'abagaragwa be." 
1Kings10:14 Mbwenu buri mwaka, ezaabu ei baabaire batoijera Solomooni ekaba ehitsya oburemeezi bwa kiloguramu obukumi bubiri n'enkumi munaana," 
1Kings10:15 otabariiremu eyaabaire ereetwa abashuubuzi, n'abatembeya, n'abagabe ba Buharabu boona, n'abategyeki bakuru b'egyo nsi." 
1Kings10:16 Omugabe Solomooni akaheeshesa engabo mpango magana abiri z'ezaabu eshemeziibwe, kiloguraamu mushanju." 
1Kings10:17 Kandi yaaheeshesa engabo magana ashatu z'ezaabu eshemeziibwe, buri emwe ehunzirwe ezaabu ya kiloguraamu ibiri, yaazita omu nju y'ekibira kya Lebanooni." 
1Kings10:18 Kandi omugabe yaabeijesa ekitebe kihango ky'obugabe omu miino y'enjojo, yaakihunda ezaabu nungi munonga." 
1Kings10:19 Ekyo kitebe kikaba kiine amatembero mukaaga, enyima yaakyo kikoreirweho ekishushani ky'omutwe gw'ekimasha, ahari buri rubaju kiriho ah'okwegyeka omukono." 
1Kings10:20 Kandi kikaba kiriho ebishushani by'entare ikumi na ibiri zeemereire, buri emwe aha muheru gwa buri itembero ry'ago matembero mukaaga. Omu bugabe obundi bwona, hakaba hatariho ekitebe ekikozirwe nkakyo." 
1Kings10:21 Ebikopo by'okunyweramu byona eby'omugabe Solomooni bikaba biri eby'ezaabu; na byona ebirikukoresibwa omu nju y'ekibira kya Lebanooni biri eby'ezaabu empuuhe. Hakaba hatarimu by'efeeza; ahabw'okuba omu busingye bwa Solomooni efeeza ekaba etarikubarwa kuba ekintu. 
1Kings10:22 Manya omugabe akaba aine ekimbuuro ky'emeeri za Tarushiishi aha nyanja, hamwe n'eky'eza Hiramu. Buri myaka eshatu ekimbuuro ky'emeeri za Tarushiishi kikaba kireeta ezaabu, n'efeeza, n'emiino y'enjojo, n'enkobe, na zaanyamunyonyi." 
1Kings10:23 Nikwo omugabe Solomooni yaakirize atyo abagabe b'omu nsi yoona obutungi n'obwengye. 
1Kings10:24 Ab'omu nsi yoona bakaba benda kwehikira Solomooni, kuhurira eby'obwengye bwe obu Ruhanga yaabaire amuhaire." 
1Kings10:25 Buri omwe akaba areeta eky'okumutoijera: efeeza, ezaabu, ebijwaro, entsinda, eby'emigaju, embaraasi, enyumbu, n'ebindi bingi, buri mwaka." 
1Kings10:26 Solomooni nawe yaarundaana ebigaari n'ab'ahambaraasi. Akaba aine ebigaari rukumi na magana ana, n'ab'ahambaraasi kakumi n'enkumi ibiri abu yaataire omu ndembo ezirimu ebigaari, n'abandi akabata omuri Yerusalemu kuguma nawe." 
1Kings10:27 Ogwo mugabe, omu busingye bwe omuri Yerusalemu, efeeza ekaba eshaagire nk'amabaare; n'emiti ya kaarwenda eri mingi nk'emikunyu y'omu mpanga." 
1Kings10:28 Kandi Solomooni embaraasi ze bakaba baziiha Misiri na Kilikiya, abashuubuzi be nibazigura Kilikiya aha muhendo gutarikuhinduka." 
1Kings10:29 Obwo ekigaari kikaba nikiihura Misiri ahabwa rupiiha z'efeeza magana mukaaga, n'embaraasi ahabwa rupiiha igana na makumi ataano, reero abashuubuzi ba Solomooni bazitwara, baziguza abandi bagabe b'Abahiiti n'ab'Abasiriya." 
1Kings11:1 Mbwenu Omugabe Solomooni akakunda abakazi b'endugamahanga: Muhara wa Faraaho, Abamoabukazi, Abaamonikazi, Abanyaadomukazi, Abasidonikazi n'Abahiitikazi" 
1Kings11:2 ab'omu mahanga gu Nyakubaho yaazibiire Abaisiraeli ati: Mutarishwererana nabo; ahabw'okuba buzimazima baryabahindura omutima, mukuratire baaruhanga baabo. Kwonka Solomooni yaababaho akaramata." 
1Kings11:3 Akaba aine abakazi abanyiginyakazi magana mushanju, n'ebinyanshunju magana ashatu. Abo bakazi be baamuhindura omutima." 
1Kings11:4 Reero Solomooni ku yaakuzire, abo bakazi baamuhindura omutima, yaakuratira baaruhanga abandi; omutima gwe tigwabeera kimwe ogw'amazima ahari Mukama Ruhanga we, nk'ogwa Daudi ishe." 
1Kings11:5 Ahabw'okuba Solomooni akaramya Ashitoreeti, emandwakazi y'Abasidoni, na Moleki ekihagaro ky'Abaamoni." 
1Kings11:6 Solomooni yaakora atyo ebirikugwisa kubi Nyakubaho, tiyaamukuratirira kimwe, nk'oku Daudi ishe yaatwarize." 
1Kings11:7 Bwanyima Solomooni yaayombeka aha rushozi rw'aha burugwa-izooba bwa Yerusalemu omwanya gw'okuramizamu Kemoshi, ekihagaro ky'Abaamoabu, n'ogw'okuramizamu Moleki, ekihagaro ky'Abaamoni." 
1Kings11:8 Kandi nikwo yaakoreire atyo abakazi be boona abanyamahanga, abaabaire bootera obubaani, bakatambira baaruhanga baabo ebitambo." 
1Kings11:9 Nyakubaho akagirira Solomooni ekiniga, ahabw'okuba akamurugaho. Nyakubaho ogwo, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, akaba abonekyeire Solomooni kabiri:" 
1Kings11:10 kandi amwehanangiriize ngu atariramya baaruhanga abandi. Kwonka yaayanga kukuratira eki Nyakubaho yaamuragiire. 
1Kings11:11 Nyakubaho nikwo kugira Solomooni ati: Nk'oku okiihire aha mutima, okanga kurinda endagaano yangye n'ebi naataireho ebi naakuragiire; mbwenu buzimazima niinyija kukwaka obugabe mbuhe omwiru waawe." 
1Kings11:12 Kwonka ahabwa Daudi sho, ekyo tindikwija kukikora omu busingye bwawe, kureka ndyabwaka mutabani waawe." 
1Kings11:13 Kwonka shi mutabani waawe tindimwaka bugabe bwona, kureka ahabw'omwiru wangye Daudi n'ahabwa Yerusalemu ei naayetooraniire, ndyamutsigira oruganda rumwe." 
1Kings11:14 Nyakubaho akaimukiza Solomooni omuzigu, orikwetwa Hadadi Omunyaedomu, ow'omu b'oruganda rw'omugabe wa Edomu." 
1Kings11:15 Ahabw'okuba Daudi ku yaabaire ari omuri Edomu, Yoabu omukuru w'eihe yaaza kuziika abaitsirwe; haza yaita oyetwa omushaija weena ow'omuri Edomu." 
1Kings11:16 Yoabu ogwo n'Abaisiraeli bakamarayo ameezi mukaaga, okuhitsya obu yaitsire oyetwa omushaija weena omuri Edomu." 
1Kings11:17 Kwonka Hadadi yaahungira Misiri, n'Abanyaedomu bamwe ab'omu bagaragwa ba ishe, obwo we akiri muto." 
1Kings11:18 Batyo baaruga Midiyani, baahika Parani. Baaruga Parani hamwe n'abandi bashaija, baaza Misiri owa Faraaho omugabe waayo. Faraaho yaaha Hadadi enju, n'eby'okumutunga, n'eitaka." 
1Kings11:19 Haza Hadadi yaakundwa munonga Faraaho, yaarugaho yaamuhingira omuramu, murumuna w'omukazi we, omwigarire Tahapeneheesi." 
1Kings11:20 Murumuna wa Tahapeneheesi ogwo Hadadi yaamuzaaraho omutabani Genubaati, owaayororoirwe omu kikaari kya Faraaho, hamwe n'abaana ba Faraaho." 
1Kings11:21 Mbwenu Hadadi ku yaabaire ari Misiri, yaahurira ku Daudi afiire, akashanga baishenkuru; na Yoabu omukuru w'eihe ku afiire. Hadadi ogwo yaagira Faraaho ati: Ndeka ngyende, ngarukye omu ihanga ryangye." 
1Kings11:22 Kwonka Faraaho amugira ati: Mbwenu waaza kwenda kugaruka omu nsi yaawe nkwine, okyenire ki? Onu amugarukamu ati: Fa okundeka ngyende." 
1Kings11:23 Ruhanga kandi akaimukiza Solomooni ondiijo mubisha, Rezoni mwene Eliyaada, owaabaire ahungire mukama we Hadadezeri omugabe wa Zooba." 
1Kings11:24 Daudi ku yaitsire aba Zooba, Rezoni yaateeranira hamwe abashaija, yaaba omukuru w'omutwe gw'ababisha, baaza Damasiko baagituura, baamuhindurirayo omugabe." 
1Kings11:25 Yaaguma ari omuzigu w'Abaisiraeli omu busingye bwa Solomooni bwona, naakora eby'obwinazi nka Hadadi, naayangira kimwe Isiraeli, obwo ari omutegyeki wa Siriya." 
1Kings11:26 Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, Omuefuraimu wa Zeereda, omugaragwa wa Solomooni, ou nyina omufaakazi yaabaire naayetwa Zeruuya, nawe akagomera omugabe." 
1Kings11:27 Kandi eki nikyo kyamureeteire kugoma. Omugabe Solomooni akaba naijuza eitaka aha rubaju rwa Yerusalemu orw'aha burengyerwa-izooba, naatunguura ahu ekigo ky'ekikaari kya Daudi ishe haabaire hari oruhanga." 
1Kings11:28 Haza ogwo mushaija Yeroboamu akaba naayebaasa. Solomooni ku yaareebire ogwo mutsigazi ari omukozi munonga, yaamuha okureeberera ab'omuryango gwa Yosefu boona abaabaire nibakora emirimo y'okugyemeserezibwa." 
1Kings11:29 Ago magingo Yeroboamu ku yaarugire Yerusalemu, omurangi Ahiya Omushiilo yaamushanga omu muhanda. Ahiya akaba ajwaire omwenda musya, kandi bombi bashangwa bari bonka omu bwerere." 
1Kings11:30 Ahiya yaakwata ogwo mwenda musya ogu yaabaire ajwaire, yaagutaaguramu emitanda ikumi n'ebiri." 
1Kings11:31 Mpaho yaagira Yeroboamu ati: Yetwarire emitanda ikumi, ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Reeba, ndi haihi kwaka Solomooni obugabe; haza iwe nkuhe enganda ikumi." 
1Kings11:32 Kwonka we naija kutsigaza oruganda rumwe, ahabw'omwiru wangye Daudi, n'ahabwa Yerusalemu orurembo ru naayetooraniire omu nganda za Isiraeli zoona." 
1Kings11:33 Ahabw'okuba anyimwire, yaaramya Ashitoreeti emandwakazi y'Abasidoni, na Kemoshi ruhanga w'Abamoabu, na Moleki ruhanga w'Abaamoni, tiyaakuratira mitwarize yangye, kukora eki ndikureeba ngu kihikire, n'okworobera ebi naataireho, n'ebi naaragiire; nk'oku Daudi ishe yaagizire." 
1Kings11:34 Kwonka shi tindikwija kumwaka obugabe bwe bwona, kureka niinyija kumureka agume ari omutegyeki ebiro byona ebi araamare akihuriire, ahabw'omwiru wangye Daudi ou naatooraine, akakuratira ebiragiro byangye n'ebi naataireho." 
1Kings11:35 Kureka obugabe ndyabwaka omutabani, mbukuhe, nizo nganda ikumi." 
1Kings11:36 Kwonka shi omutabani ndyamutsigira oruganda rumwe, Daudi omwiru wangye abone kutsigaza embibo omuri Yerusalemu, orurembo ru naatooraine kuguma nibandamizamu." 
1Kings11:37 Kandi iwe niinyija kukutwara, otegyekye ensi zoona ezi orikwenda, obe omugabe wa Isiraeli." 
1Kings11:38 Reero ku orita omutima aha bi ndikukuragiira, waakuratira emitwarize yangye, waakora ebi ndikusiima, nooyorobera ebi naataireho n'ebi naaragiire, nk'oku Daudi omwiru wangye yaabyorobeire; ndyaguma naiwe, nkuhindure omugabe wa Isiraeli, ngumyeho ab'omuryango gwawe, nk'oku naagiriire Daudi." 
1Kings11:39 Nikyo ndibonaboneseza baijukuru ba Daudi, kwonka kitari ky'ebiro byona." 
1Kings11:40 Solomooni nikyo yaayendeire kwita Yeroboamu; atyo Yeroboamu akaimuka akahungira Misiri, owa Shishaki omugabe waayo; akagumayo okuhitsya obu Solomooni yaafiire." 
1Kings11:41 Mbwenu ebindi eby'amagara ga Solomooni, na byona ebi yaakozire, n'obwengye bwe, byona bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bwe." 
1Kings11:42 Solomooni, obunaku bu yaamazire naategyeka Abaisiraeli boona, ari omuri Yerusalemu, bukahika emyaka makumi ana." 
1Kings11:43 Bwanyima Solomooni ogwo yaafa, yaashanga baishenkuru, baamuziika omu rurembo rwa Daudi ishe, omutabani Rehoboamu yaamuhungurira, yaaba omugabe." 
1Kings12:1 Rehoboamu akaza Shekemu, ahabw'okuba Abaisiraeli boona niyo baagiire kumwemekyera." 
1Kings12:2 Reero Yeroboamu mwene Nebati ku yaakihuriire, yaaruga Misiri, ei yaabaire ahungiire omugabe Solomooni." 
1Kings12:3 Abantu baamutumaho kumweta. Mpaho Yeroboamu, n'Abaisiraeli boona abateeraniire aho, baagira Rehoboamu bati:" 
1Kings12:4 Sho akatwitsa omwaga, yaatwekoreza emitwaro eremereire. Mbwenu otutuubize emirimo egumire ei sho yaatukoreise; n'emitwaro eremereire ei yaatwekoreize; haza naitwe tukuheereze." 
1Kings12:5 Nawe yaabagarukamu ati: Nimwirooko, mumareyo ebiro bishatu, bwanyima mugarukye aha ahi ndi. Batyo abo bantu bagyenda." 
1Kings12:6 Bwanyima Omugabe Rehoboamu yaayehanuuza aha bashaija bakuru abaabaire batabaarira Solomooni ishe atakafiire. Yaababuuza ati: Nimumpa bwengye ki, oku ndaagarukyemu abo bantu?" 
1Kings12:7 Baamugira bati: Ku oraikirize kuba omuheereza w'abo bantu eri izooba, waabaheereza, waabagambira gye noobagarukamu, obwo nibaija kuba abairu baawe ebiro byona." 
1Kings12:8 Kwonka we tiyaayeta ha bwengye bu abagurusi baamuhaire. Yaayehanuuza aha batsigazi abaanyeetsire nawe nibamutabaarira. 
1Kings12:9 Yaababuuza ati: Nimumpa bwengye ki, oku ndaagarukyemu abo bantu abangira bati: Otutuubize emitwaro i sho yaatwekoreize?" 
1Kings12:10 Abo batsigazi baanyeetsire nawe baamugarukamu bati: Oku nikwo oraagambire abo bantu baakugira bati: Sho akatwekoreza emitwaro eremereire, kwonka iwe ogitutuubize. Obagire oti: Akakumu kangye akahera nikakira enyugunyu za tata." 
1Kings12:11 Mbwenu nk'oku tata yaabeekoreize emitwaro eremereire, nyowe niinyija kukizaho. Tata akabatsibuza eminyaafu, kwonka nyowe niinyija kubateeza enkoba." 
1Kings12:12 Ekiro kya kashatu ku kyahikire, Yeroboamu n'abantu boona baija ahari Rehoboamu, nk'oku ogwo mugabe yaabagambiire ati: Mugarukye aha ahi ndi, aha kiro kya kashatu." 
1Kings12:13 Omugabe atyo agarukamu abo bantu n'ekikabuko, ayanga kukuratira obwengye bu abagurusi baamuhaire." 
1Kings12:14 Abagambira nk'oku abatsigazi baamuhabwire, ati: Tata akabeekoreza emitwaro eremereire, kwonka nyowe niinyija kukizaho. Tata akabatsibuza eminyaafu, nyowe niinyija kubateeza enkoba." 
1Kings12:15 Omugabe atyo ayanga kwikiriza ebi abo bantu baamushaba, ahabw'okuba kikaba kirugire ahari Nyakubaho, ngu abone kuhikiiriza eki yaaraganiise Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, naakigambisa Ahiya Omushiilo." 
1Kings12:16 Abaisiraeli boona ku baareebire ogwo mugabe ataikirizana nabo, baamugira bati: Twine kakwate ki na Daudi? Tituri b'okuhungurwa mwene Yese. Mbwenu imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, nimwetaahire omu maka gaanyu! Naimwe aba Daudi, mwemarire eby'omuryango gwanyu. Abaisiraeli batyo bagaruka omu maka gaabo." 
1Kings12:17 Rehoboamu aguma naategyeka Abaisiraeli abatwire omu ndembo za Yuda. 
1Kings12:18 Bwanyima omugabe Rehoboamu akatuma Adoraamu, owaabaire ari omukuru w'emirimo y'okuhatwa; Abaisiraeli boona baamuteera amabaare yaafa. Omugabe Rehoboamu nikwo kwiruka akatemba ekigaari kye, akahungira Yerusalemu." 
1Kings12:19 Abaisiraeli nikwo baagomeire batyo ab'omuryango gwa Daudi, n'okuhitsya eri izooba." 
1Kings12:20 Reero Abaisiraeli boona ku baahuriire ngu Yeroboamu agarukire, baamutumaho ab'okumweta, ngu aije ahi bateeraniire, bamwemekye, abe omugabe wa Isiraeli yoona. Kandi tihaagira n'omwe owaakuratira ab'omuryango gwa Daudi, kureka ab'oruganda rwa Yuda bonka." 
1Kings12:21 Rehoboamu mwene Solomooni ku yaahikire Yerusalemu, yaahuruza ab'omuryango gwa Yuda boona, n'ab'oruganda rwa Benyamiini, abashaija akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi munaana enkwata-ngabo, kurwanisa ab'omuryango gwa Isiraeli, ngu bamugarurire obugabe." 
1Kings12:22 Kwonka Ruhanga yaagambira Sheemaaya omuntu we ati: 
1Kings12:23 Gambira Rehoboamu mwene Solomooni omugabe wa Yuda, n'abantu boona ab'enju ya Yuda n'eya Benyamiini boona oti:" 
1Kings12:24 Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Mutahurura kurwanisa Abaisiraeli beene waanyu. Buri muntu agarukye omu ka ye; ahabw'okuba ekyo niinye kirugireho. Batyo nabo baikiriza kukora eki Nyakubaho yaabaragiira; bagaruka omu ka nk'oku yaabagambira. 
1Kings12:25 Bwanyima Yeroboamu akombeka ekigo kigumire omuri Shekemu, omu nsi ya Efuraimu ey'ebibungo, yaatuurayo. Ku yaarugireyo, yaayombeka Penueli ekigo kigumire." 
1Kings12:26 Reero Yeroboamu yaateekateeka ati: Mbwenu obugabe nibwija kugarukira ab'omuryango gwa Daudi. 
1Kings12:27 Aba bantu ku baraagume nibaza Yerusalemu kutambira ebitambo omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, nibaija kukubuukira mukama waabo Rehoboamu omugabe wa Yuda, baanyite, bamugarukire." 
1Kings12:28 Ogwo mugabe ku aheza kukiteekateekaho munonga, kandi yaaheza kuheeshesa enyana ibiri z'ezaabu, agambira abantu be ati: Engyendo z'okuza Yerusalemu zaabakabya. Mbwenu imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, aba nibo baaruhanga baanyu abaabaihire omu nsi ya Misiri." 
1Kings12:29 Atyo enyana emwe agita Beteli, n'endiijo agita Daani." 
1Kings12:30 Haza ekyo kiba ekibi; ahabw'okuba abantu bakaba baza kuramya enyana ey'omuri Beteli n'abandi baza kuramya ey'omuri Daani. 
1Kings12:31 Ekindi, akombekyesa amaju g'okuramizamu aha mitwe y'ebibungo, kandi yaayeteeraho abahongyerezi, abu yaihire omu bandi bantu abatari Baleevi." 
1Kings12:32 Yeroboamu kandi yaataho obugyenyi, kubaho aha kiro kya ikumi na bitaano ky'okwezi kwa munaana, nk'obu baabaire bagira omuri Yuda. Yaatambira ebitambo aha itambiro, yaakora atyo n'omuri Beteli, naatambira ebitambo enyana zi yaaheesire; kandi omuri Beteli yaatamu abahongyerezi b'okureeberera endaaro zi yaayombekire." 
1Kings12:33 Aha kiro kya ikumi na bitaano eky'omu kwezi kwa munaana, yaaza aha itambiro ri yaakozire omuri Beteli, omuri okwo kwezi ku yaayeteeraireho. Yaakoreraho omugyenzo gw'Obugyenyi obu yaateeraireho Abaisiraeli, kandi yaatemba aha itambiro kwotera obubaani." 
1Kings13:1 Mbwenu omushaija wa Ruhanga, ahabw'okuragiirwa Nyakubaho, akaruga omuri Buyuda, yaija Beteli. Yaashanga Yeroboamu ayemereire aha itambiro naayotera obubaani." 
1Kings13:2 Ogwo mushaija, ahabw'okuragiirwa Nyakubaho, yaakyeena eryo itambiro, naagira ati: Iwe itambiro, iwe itambiro 'we, Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, omuryango gwa Daudi nigwija kuzaarwamu Omwana omwojo, orikwetwa Yosiya. Haza aryakutambiraho abahongyerezi b'omu myanya y'aha mitwe y'ebibungo, abakwoterereraho obubaani, akwokyezeho n'amagufa g'abantu." 
1Kings13:3 Kandi ahari eryo izooba yaabaha akamanyiso, naagira ati: Aka niko kamanyiso ku Nyakubaho agambire naagira ati: Reeba, eri itambiro niriija kusheenyagurika, eiju ryaho ryatikye." 
1Kings13:4 Omugabe Yeroboamu ku yaahuriire eki ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga yaagamba naakyeena eitambiro rya Beteli, yaamworekyeza omukono naayema aha itambiro, yaaragiira ati: Mumukwate. Haza omukono gu yaamworekyeize gwayomeraho, yaabura agaguhinya." 
1Kings13:5 Eitambiro naryo ryasheenyagurika, eiju ryaho ryayatika, nk'oku ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga, ahabw'okuragiirwa Nyakubaho, yaabagambiire." 
1Kings13:6 Omugabe nikwo kugira ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga ati: Hati nyeshengyerereza Mukama Ruhanga waawe, onshabire akize omukono gwangye. Mpaho omuntu wa Ruhanga ayeshengyereza Nyakubaho, omukono gw'omugabe gukira, guba nk'oku gwaba guri." 
1Kings13:7 Omugabe agira ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga ati: Ija tutaahe kumwe omuka, ofungure, haza nkuhe ekihembo." 
1Kings13:8 Onu amugarukamu ati: Nobu waakumpa ekicweka ky'enju yaawe, tinkaataahamu naiwe. Kandi tindikwija kurya ebyokurya nari kunywa amaizi omuri ogu mwanya;" 
1Kings13:9 ahabw'okuba nikwo Nyakubaho andagiire naagira ati: Otaryayo ebyokurya kandi otanywayo amaizi, nobu kwakuba okugaruka omuhanda gu oreetsirwe." 
1Kings13:10 Atyo atoora ogundi muhanda, tagaruka muhanda gu mureetsire naija Beteli." 
1Kings13:11 Mbwenu omuri Beteli hakaba hatwiremu omurangi omugurusi. Abatabani baija, baamugambira ebi omuntu wa Ruhanga yaakorera Beteli eryo izooba, n'ebi yaagambira omugabe, byona baabigambira ishebo." 
1Kings13:12 Ishebo ababuuza ati: Yaatoora muhanda ki? Abatabani baamworeka omuhanda ogu ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga orugire Buyuda yaatoora. 
1Kings13:13 Nawe agira abatabani ati: Ni muntandiikire endogoya. Bagimutandiikira, agitemba." 
1Kings13:14 Akurata ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga, amushanga ashutami ahansi y'omuvure, amubuuza ati: Niiwe muntu wa Ruhanga orugire Buyuda? Onu ati: Niinye." 
1Kings13:15 Mpaho amugira ati: Ija tuze kumwe omuka, ogire eki waarya." 
1Kings13:16 Onu amugarukamu ati: Tindikubaasa kugarukayo naiwe, nari okutaaha omuka naiwe, nobu kwakuba okurya ebyokurya, nainga okunywa amaizi naiwe omuri ogu mwanya." 
1Kings13:17 Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho andagiire naagira ati: Otaryayo ebyokurya, kandi otanywayo amaizi, nobu kwakuba okugaruka omuhanda gu oreetsirwe." 
1Kings13:18 Onu reero amugira ati: Manya, naanye ndi omurangi nkaiwe. Nyakubaho andagiire nantumaho maraika ati: Irooko omugarure, aije omu ka yaawe, agire eki yaarya n'eki yaanywa. Kwonka obwo akaba naamubeiha." 
1Kings13:19 Atyo agarukayo hamwe nawe, arya ebyokurya omu nju ye, kandi anywa n'amaizi." 
1Kings13:20 Ku baabaire bakiri aha meeza, Nyakubaho yaaragiira omurangi owaamugarwire;" 
1Kings13:21 yaagambira omuntu wa Ruhanga owaizire arugire Buyuda n'eiraka rihango ati: Ahabw'okuba tiwaayorobera kigambo kyangye, nyowe Mukama Ruhanga waawe, kandi tiwaakuratira kiragiro kyangye eki nkuragiire," 
1Kings13:22 kureka waagaruka waariira ebyokurya kandi waanywera amaizi omu mwanya gu naakuzibiire ningira nti: Otariryayo eby'okurya; kandi otarinywayo amaizi, n'ahabw'ekyo omutumbi gwawe tiguriziikwa mu kituuro kya baashwenkuru." 
1Kings13:23 Mbwenu ku yaaherize kurya n'okunywa, omurangi omugurusi yaatandiikira endogoya omurangi ou yaagarwire." 
1Kings13:24 N'onu ku yaabaire naakigyenda, entare yaamubugana omu muhanda, yaamwita. Omutumbi gwe gwagangarama omu muhanda, endogoya n'entare byagwemerera aha rubaju." 
1Kings13:25 Reero abantu abaarabireho baareeba ogwo mutumbi gugangarami omu muhanda, entare egwemereire aha rubaju. Batyo baija baakigambira ab'omu rurembo oru omurangi w'omugurusi atwiremu." 
1Kings13:26 Omurangi owaagarwire omushaija wa Ruhanga akamuzibira kugumizamu orugyendo, ku yaakihuriire, yaagira ati: N'omushaija wa Ruhanga otoorobeire eki Nyakubaho amuragiire. Nikyo Mukama amurekuriire entare ekamutaagataagura ekamwita; kikaba nk'oku Nyakubaho yamugambiire." 
1Kings13:27 Agira abatabani ati: Nimuntandiikire endogoya. Nabo bagitandiika. 
1Kings13:28 Agyenda, ashanga omutumbi gwe gugangarami omu muhanda, endogoya n'entare bigwemereire aha rubaju. Entare etaguriire, nobu kwakuba okutaagataagura endogoya." 
1Kings13:29 Ogwo murangi aihaho omutumbi gw'omushaija wa Ruhanga, aguta aha ndogoya, agugarura omu rurembo, kumucurira, n'okumuziika." 
1Kings13:30 Ogwo mutumbi aguziika omu kituuro kye, bamucurira buri omwe naagira ati: Ai bambe, mwene tata!" 
1Kings13:31 Reero ku yaaherize kumuziika, yaagira abatabani ati: Ku ndifa, naanye munziikye omuri eki kituuro ki ogu muntu wa Ruhanga yaaziikwamu. Amagufa gangye mugahereeze age." 
1Kings13:32 Manya eki agambisiibwe Nyakubaho naakyeena eitambiro ry'omuri Beteli n'endaaro ez'okuramizamu ez'omu ndembo za Samariya, buzimazima kiryaba kwo." 
1Kings13:33 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Yeroboamu tiyaareka mitwarize ye mibi. Kureka yaaguma naataho abahongyerezi ab'okuheereza omu ndaaro z'aha mitwe y'ebibungo, naabaiha omu bandi bantu. Atyo yaahaasirira omuntu weena owaayenda kuba omuhongyerezi w'omu ndaaro z'aha mitwe y'ebibungo." 
1Kings13:34 Ekyo kyaba ekicumuro ky'okuhwerekyereza n'okumara omu nsi ab'omuryango gwa Yeroboamu. 
1Kings14:1 Omu biro ebyo, Abiiya mwene Yeroboamu akarwara." 
1Kings14:2 Yeroboamu yaagira omukazi we ati: Imuka, oyehindure okundi, kitamanywa ku ori omukazi wangye, haza oze Shiilo. Ahabw'okuba Ahiya omurangi owandaguriire ngu ndyaba omugabe, ntegyekye eri ihanga, niyo ari." 
1Kings14:3 Omutwarire emigaati ikumi, n'otubumburi tw'emizaabibu eyomire n'akagyemeko k'obwoki, oze owe; naija kukugambira oku omwana araabe." 
1Kings14:4 Muka Yeroboamu yaaba nikwo yaatwaza. Yaimuka, yaaza Shiilo, yaahika aha nju ya Ahiya. Obwo Ahiya akaba atakihweza, amaisho ge gaagiirweho oruho ahabwa bukuru." 
1Kings14:5 Reero Nyakubaho yaagira Ahiya ati: Reeba, muka Yeroboamu naija kukwebuuzaho eby'omwana we orwaire. Haza omugambire oti n'oti; ahabw'okuba ku araataahemu, naija kwehindura ondiijo mukazi." 
1Kings14:6 Mbwenu Ahiya ku yaahuriire enshwagara z'ebigyere bye, yaahika aha rwigi naataahamu, yaamugira ti: Taahamu, iwe muka Yeroboamu. Ahabw'enki nooyenda kwehindura ondiijo? Manya nkwiniire amakuru mabi." 
1Kings14:7 Irooko, ogambire Yeroboamu oti: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Nkakutunguura, naakwiha omu bandi bantu, naakuhindura omwebembezi w'abantu bangye Abaisiraeli." 
1Kings14:8 Obugabe naabwaka ab'omuryango gwa Daudi, naabukuha. Kwonka torambeereire nk'omwiru wangye Daudi, owaayorobeire ebiragiro byangye, akankuratira n'omutima gwe gwona, naakora ebihikire byonka, ebi ndikusiima." 
1Kings14:9 Kureka okozire ebibi ebirikukira eby'abaakubandiize, waagyenda waayekorera baaruhanga abandi b'ebishushani biheesirwe, wangwisa kubi, wanteera omugongo." 
1Kings14:10 N'ahabw'ekyo niinyija kugwisiza akagwe ab'omuryango gwa Yeroboamu, mmumareho oyetwa omushaija weena omuhuuku n'ow'obusingye, omuri Isiraeli; kandi mmarireho kimwe ab'omuryango gwe nk'oku omuntu ayeya amasha gakahwaho." 
1Kings14:11 Weena ow'omu ba Yeroboamu oraafeere omu rurembo, embwa zimurye, n'oraagwe omu ishwa, ariibwe amahungu. Ekyo Nyakubaho niwe yaakigamba." 
1Kings14:12 N'ahabw'ekyo imuka otaahe owaanyu omuka. Reero ku oraaribate oti omu rurembo, omwana naafa." 
1Kings14:13 Abaisiraeli boona nibaija kumucurira, bamuziikye. Haza niwe wenka omu b'omuryango gwa Yeroboamu oraaziikwe omu kituuro, ahabw'okuba niwe ashangirwemu ekirungi ekirikusiimwa Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
1Kings14:14 Ekindi, Nyakubaho naija kweteeraho omugabe oraategyekye Isiraeli, akamaraho ab'oruzaaro rwa Yeroboamu eryo izooba." 
1Kings14:15 N'ahabw'ekyo Nyakubaho aryateera Abaisiraeli, batengyeete nk'ekibingo kirikutengyeetera omu maizi; abarandure omuri egi nsi nungi, ei yaahaire baishebo, abataataanisize seeri ya Eufuraati, naabatura okwekorera ebishushani by'emandwakazi, Ashera; ahabw'okuba bakagwisa kubi Nyakubaho." 
1Kings14:16 Kandi aryatsigaho Isiraeli, agiture ebibi bya Yeroboamu, ebi yaakozire, n'ebi yaacumwize Abaisiraeli." 
1Kings14:17 Muka Yeroboamu atyo aimuka, agyenda, agaruka Tiriza. Ku yaabaire yaahika ati aha muryango gw'enju, omwana yaafa." 
1Kings14:18 Abaisiraeli boona baamuziika, kandi baamucurira, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaakigambiise omuheereza we Ahiya omurangi." 
1Kings14:19 Ebindi ebi Yeroboamu yaakozire, oku yaarwaine engamba, n'oku yaategyekire, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
1Kings14:20 Yeroboamu akamara aha ngoma emyaka makumi abiri n'ebiri, yaafa, yaashanga baishenkuru; Nadabu omutabani yaamuhungurira." 
1Kings14:21 Rehoboamu mwene Solomooni akaba omugabe w'Abaayuda aine emyaka makumi ana na gumwe, yaategyekyera emyaka ikumi na mushanju ari Yerusalemu, orurembo ru Nyakubaho yaatooraine omu ndembo za Isiraeli zoona kumuramizamu. Nyina akaba ari Omuamonikazi naayetwa Naama." 
1Kings14:22 Reero Abaayuda baacumura ahari Nyakubaho, baamugwisa kubi. Ebibi bi baakozire okukira ebya baishebo, byamureetera kugira eihato." 
1Kings14:23 Ahabw'okuba bakeeyombekyera aha mitwe y'ebibungo n'ahansi ya buri muti gw'omurinzi emyanya y'okuramizamu n'enyomyo na Zaasheramu. 
1Kings14:24 Kandi omuri egyo nsi hakaba harimu abashaija barikukorera ebibi by'obwamaraaya omu maramizo. Batyo abantu baakora ebihagaro by'abanyamahanga abu Nyakubaho yaabingire kuhigiza Abaisiraeli. 
1Kings14:25 Omu mwaka gwa kataano ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Rehoboamu, Shishaki omugabe wa Misiri akahurura, yaateera Yerusalemu," 
1Kings14:26 yaanyaga eby'omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'eby'omu nju y'omugabe, byona yaabitwara. Yaatwara n'engabo zoona ez'ezaabu ezi Solomooni yaabaire aheesheise." 
1Kings14:27 Bwanyima omu mwanya gwazo Omugabe Rehoboamu yaaheeshesa ez'emiringa; yaazikwatsa abakuru b'abarinzi abaabaire nibakumiirira aha irembo ry'ekikaari ky'omugabe. 
1Kings14:28 Omugabe ku yaabaire ataaha omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, abamushendekyereize bazihagatira, bwanyima bazigarura omu kishengye ky'abarinzi." 
1Kings14:29 Endiijo mirimo ya Rehoboamu, na byona ebi yaakozire, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda." 
1Kings14:30 Kandi Rehoboamu na Yeroboamu bakaguma nibarwana engamba. 
1Kings14:31 Bwanyima Rehoboamu yaafa, yaashanga baishenkuru; yaaziikwa ahi baaziikirwe, omu rurembo rwa Daudi; yaahungurirwa omutabani Abiyamu." 
1Kings15:1 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi na munaana ogw'omu busingye bwa Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, nibwo Abiyamu yaaba omugabe wa Yuda." 
1Kings15:2 Akategyekyera emyaka eshatu omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Maaka, ari muhara wa Abishalomu." 
1Kings15:3 Abiyamu ogwo akaguma naakora ebibi bi ishe yaakozire; tiyaabeera kimwe w'amazima ahari Mukama Ruhanga we, nka Daudi ishenkuru." 
1Kings15:4 Kwonka ahabwa Daudi, Mukama Ruhanga yaamuha etabaaza y'okwakira omuri Yerusalemu, yaamuha omutabani w'okumuhungurira, akategyeka Yerusalemu, ekaguma eri buhooro." 
1Kings15:5 Ahabw'okuba Daudi akakora ebirikusiimwa Mukama, tiyaateishuka bi yaamuragiire omu biro by'amagara ge byona; kureka eki yaashobize n'ekya Uriya Omuhiiti." 
1Kings15:6 Reero Rehoboamu akaguma naarwana engamba na Yeroboamu omu biro by'amagara ge goona. 
1Kings15:7 Endiijo mirimo ya Abiyamu, na byona ebi yaakozire, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'Obusingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda. Kandi Abiyamu akaba arwana engamba na Yeroboamu." 
1Kings15:8 Bwanyima Abiyamu yaafa, yaashanga baishenkuru, baamuziika omu rurembo rwa Daudi ishenkuru. Omutabani Asa yaamuhungurira, yaaba omugabe." 
1Kings15:9 Omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Yeroboamu omugabe wa Isiraeli, nibwo Asa yaaba omugabe wa Yuda." 
1Kings15:10 Akamara emyaka makumi ana na gumwe ari omugabe omuri Yerusalemu. Nyinenkuru akaba naayetwa Maaka, muhara wa Abishalomu." 
1Kings15:11 Asa akakora ebirikusiimwa Nyakubaho, nk'oku Daudi Ishenkuru yaakozire." 
1Kings15:12 Yaacwa omu nsi omuze gw'abashaija kukorera eby'obwamaraaya omu maramizo. Yaihaho ebishushani byona ebirikuramibwa, ebi baishenkuru baabaire bakozire." 
1Kings15:13 Kandi yaabinga Maaka nyinenkuru ahabwa nyin'omugabe, naamutura okukora ekishushani ekirikuzira, eky'okuramizaho Asherai; Asa ekyo kishushani yaakitemagura, yaakyokyeza aha kagyera Kidirooni." 
1Kings15:14 Asa, nobu araabe ataraihiireho kimwe endaaro z'okuramizamu, kwonka omu busingye bwe bwona akaguma ari omwesigwa ahari Nyakubaho." 
1Kings15:15 Yaata omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ebintu by'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu, n'ebindi ebi ishe yaatoizire, n'ebi we wenka yaatoizire." 
1Kings15:16 Kandi Asa na Baasha omugabe wa Isiraeli bakaguma nibarwana engamba omu busingye bwabo bwona. 
1Kings15:17 Baasha omugabe wa Isiraeli akahurura, yaateera Buyuda, yaayombeka Raama ekigo kigumire, ngu abone kuzibira omuntu weena kuruga ow'Omugabe Asa owa Buyuda, nari kuzayo." 
1Kings15:18 Bwanyima omugabe Asa yaatwara efeeza n'ezaabu zoona ezaabaire zitsigaire omu mabiikiro ga Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'ag'omu nju y'omugabe, yaazikwatsa abagaragwa be, naazitwekyera Benihadadi mwene Taburiimoni mwijukuru wa Heeziyoni omugabe wa Siriya, owaabaire atwire Damasiko, naamutumaho ati:" 
1Kings15:19 Ka tukwatanise, nk'oku tata na sho baabaire bakwataniise. Reeba, naakutwekyera ekiconco ky'efeeza n'ezaabu, naiwe irooko otaane na Baasha omugabe wa Isiraeli, andugyeho." 
1Kings15:20 Benihadadi aikiriza ebi omugabe Asa yaamutumaho, ayohereza abakuru b'amahe ge kuteera endembo za Isiraeli. Basingura Iyoni, Daani, Abelibeti-maaka na Kinerooti yoona n'ensi ya Nafutaali yoona." 
1Kings15:21 Baasha ku yaakihuriire, yaarekyera aho kwombeka Raama ebigo, yaagaruka Tiriza." 
1Kings15:22 Reero omugabe Asa yarangirira Abaayuda boona, ataine u atsigireyo, baiha Raama amabaare n'embaaho ebi Baasha yaabaire naayombekyesa, omugabe Asa yaabyombekyesa Geeba eya Benyamiini na Mizipa." 
1Kings15:23 Endiijo mirimo yoona eya Asa n'amaani ge, na byona ebi yaakozire, n'endembo zi yaayombekire, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'Obusingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda. Kwonka omu myaka ye ya bukuru, akarwara ebigyere, yaaba ekibimba." 
1Kings15:24 Bwanyima Asa yaafa, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa hamwe nabo omu rurembo rwa Daudi ishenkuru. Omutabani Yehoshafati yaamuhungurira, yaaba omugabe." 
1Kings15:25 Nadabu mwene Yeroboamu akatandika kuba omugabe wa Isiraeli omu mwaka gwa kabiri ogwa Asa omugabe wa Yuda, yaategyekyera Isiraeli emyaka ebiri." 
1Kings15:26 Yaakora ebitahikire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, naakuratira emitwarize ya ishe, n'ebibi bye ebyareeteire Isiraeli kucumura." 
1Kings15:27 Reero Baasha mwene Ahiya ow'ab'omu muryango gwa Isakaari, yaamugiira omu kyetindo, yaamwitira Gibetoni ey'Abafilisiti, ei Nadabu n'Abaisiraeli boona baabaire bagotsire." 
1Kings15:28 Baasha atyo amwita omu mwaka gwa kashatu ogwa Asa omugabe wa Yuda, aba omugabe omu mwanya gwe." 
1Kings15:29 Ku yaayemire ati, yaita ab'omurayango gwa Yeroboamu boona, atatsigireho omu b'ogwo muryango omuntu weena orikwitsya, okuhitsya obu yaabacwekyereize boona, nk'oku ekigambo kya Nyakubaho, eki yaagambiise omuheereza we Ahiya Omunyashiilo, kyabaire kiri." 
1Kings15:30 Ekyo kikarugiirira aha bibi bya Yeroboamu ebi yaakozire, ebyareeteire Isiraeli kucumura; bikwagisa kubi Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
1Kings15:31 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Nadabu, n'ebi yaakozire, byona bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'Obusingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
1Kings15:32 Kandi Asa na Baasha omugabe wa Isiraeli bakaguma nibarwana engamba omu busingye bwabo bwona. 
1Kings15:33 Omu mwaka gwa kashatu ogwa Asa omugabe wa Yuda, Baasha mwene Ahiya nibwo yaaba omugabe wa Isiraeli yoona, ari Tiriza, akategyekyera emyaka makumi abiri n'ena;" 
1Kings15:34 akakora ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho, akakuratira emitwarize ya Yeroboamu, n'ebibi bye ebyareeteire Isiraeli kucumura." 
1Kings16:1 Nyakubaho akatuma Yehu mwene Hanaani, kweziniza Baasha naamugira ati:" 
1Kings16:2 Nkakwiha okuzimu, naakutunguura, naakuhindura omwebembezi w'abantu bangye Abaisiraeli. Kwonka okuratiire emitwarize ya Yeroboamu, waareetera abantu bangye Abaisiraeli kucumura; bangwisa kubi ahabw'ebibi byabo." 
1Kings16:3 Mbwenu iwe Baasha, niinyija kukucwekyerereza kimwe n'ab'eka yaawe; ab'omurayango gwawe mbagire nk'oku naagizire ab'ogwa Yeroboamu mwene Nebati." 
1Kings16:4 Weena ow'aba Baasha, oraafeere omu rurembo, ariibwe embwa, n'oraagwe omu ishwa, ariibwe amahungu." 
1Kings16:5 Endiijo mirimo ya Baasha, n'ebi yaakozire, n'amaani ge, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'Obusingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
1Kings16:6 Bwanyima Baasha yaafa, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa Tiriza. Omutabani Eela yaamuhungurira, yaaba omugabe." 
1Kings16:7 Nyakubaho yaatuma omurangi Yehu mwene Hanaani kweziniza Baasha n'ab'omuryango gwe, n'ahabwa byona ebi yaacumwire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, akamugwisa kubi n'ebi yaakoreise emikono ye akaba nk'ab'omuryango gwa Yeroboamu, kandi akataho n'okubacwekyereza." 
1Kings16:8 Omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri na mukaaga, ogwa Asa omugabe wa Yuda, nibwo Eela mwene Baasha yaaba omugabe wa Isiraeli omuri Tiriza, akategyekyera emyaka ebiri." 
1Kings16:9 Kwonka omugaragwa we Zimuri omukuru wa kimwe kya kabiri ky'ab'ebigaari bye, akamugiira omu kyetindo. Eela ku yaabaire ari Tiriza, omwa Aruza omureeberezi w'eby'eka ya omuri Tiriza, naanywa okuhitsya obu araasinde," 
1Kings16:10 Zimuri yaataahamu, yaamuteera, yaamwita, omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri na mushanju ogw'omu busingye bwa Asa omugabe wa Yuda; atyo yaaba omugabe omu mwanya gwe." 
1Kings16:11 Ku yaatandikire ati kuba omugabe aherize kusingama aha kitebe ky'obugabe, yaita ab'omuryango gwa Baasha boona, tiyaamutsigira oyetwa omushaija weena omuri beene waabo nari ow'omuri banywani be." 
1Kings16:12 Zimuri yaacwekyereza atyo ab'omuryango gwa Baasha, nk'oku ekigambo kya Nyakubaho eki yaagambiise Yehu omurangi kyabaire kiri." 
1Kings16:13 Ahabw'okuba ebibi bya Baasha byona n'eby'omutabani Eela ebi baakozire, bikareetera Isiraeli kucumura, byagwisa kubi Mukama wa Isiraeli ahabw'ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa." 
1Kings16:14 Endiijo mirimo ya Eela, na byona ebi yaakozire, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'Obusingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
1Kings16:15 Omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri na mushanju, ogw'omu busingye bwa Asa omugabe wa Yuda, nibwo Zimuri yaaba omugabe omuri Tiriza, akategyekyera ebiro mushanju. Ekyo kikabaho engabo zisiisiire kuteera Gibetoni ey'Abafilisiti." 
1Kings16:16 Ezo ngabo zaabaire zisiisiire ku zaahuriire ngu Zimuri agiire omu kyetindo yaita omugabe, ekyo kyareetera Abaisiraeli boona kwemeka Omuri omukuru w'eihe kuba omugabe wa Isiraeli eryo izooba omuri orwo rusiisira." 
1Kings16:17 Omuri nikwo kuruga Gibetoni, akahurura n'Abaisiraeli boona, bakagota Tiriza." 
1Kings16:18 Zimuri ku yaareebire baakwata orwo rurembo, yaahungira omu kigo ky'omu kikaari ky'omugabe, yaayeyokyeza omu nju y'obugabe, yaafa." 
1Kings16:19 Yaazira ebibi bi yaakozire akacumura omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, akakuratira emitwarize ya Yeroboamu, kandi n'ahabw'ekibi ki yaakozire, akareetera Isiraeli kucumura." 
1Kings16:20 Endiijo mirimo ya Zimuri n'ekyetindo ki yaagiiremu, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'Obusingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
1Kings16:21 Bwanyima Abaisiraeli bakeecwamu ebicweka bibiri, ekimwe kyayebumba na Tibuni mwene Ginati, kumuhindura omugabe, ekindi kyayebumba na Omuri." 
1Kings16:22 Kwonka abaayebumbire na Omuri baakiza emikono abaayebumbire na Tibuni mwene Ginati; Tibuni yaafa, Omuri yaaba omugabe." 
1Kings16:23 Omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu na gumwe ogw'omu busingye bwa Asa omugabe wa Yuda, nibwo Omuri yaaba omugabe wa Isiraeli, akategyekyera emyaka ikumi n'ebiri, omukaaga agutegyekyeire Tiriza." 
1Kings16:24 Akagura ahari Shemeri ekibungo ky'omuri Samariya, empiiha z'efeeza akakumi kamwe n'enkumi ibiri, yaakyombekaho ekigo, orurembo rwakyo yaarweta Samariya naarweterera Shemeri owaabaire ari mukama w'ekyo kibungo." 
1Kings16:25 Omuri akakora ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho, yaakora ebibi ebirikukira eby'abaamubandiize." 
1Kings16:26 Ahabw'okuba akakuratirira kimwe emitwarize ya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, n'ebibi bi yaakozire byareetera Abaisiraeli kucumura, bakagwisa kubi Mukama Ruhanga waabo, ahabw'ebishushani bi barikuramya." 
1Kings16:27 Endiijo mirimo ei Omuri yaakozire n'amaani gu yaayorekire, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'Obusingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
1Kings16:28 Bwanyima Omuri yaafa, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa omuri Samariya; omutabani Ahabu yaamuhungurira, yaaba omugabe." 
1Kings16:29 Omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu na munaana ogw'omu busingye bwa Asa omugabe wa Yuda, Ahabu mwene Omuri akatandika kuba omugabe wa Isiraeli. Ahabu ogwo mwene Omuri yaategyekyera Isiraeli emyaka makumi abiri n'ebiri ari Samariya." 
1Kings16:30 Ahabu mwene Omuri akakora ebitahikire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, ebirikukirira kimwe eby'abaamubandiize." 
1Kings16:31 Nk'oku ahabwe kyamubeereire ekintu kikye okukora ebibi nk'ebya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, akataho n'okushwera Yezebeeli, muhara wa Etibaali, omugabe w'Abasidoni, kyamureetera okuheereza Baali n'okumuramya." 
1Kings16:32 Yaayombekyera Baali eitambiro omu ndaaro i yaamwombekyeire omuri Samariya. 
1Kings16:33 Kandi Ahabu ogwo yaabyara enyomyo y'okuramizaho Ashera; yaayongyera kugwisa kubi Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli okukira abagabe ba Isiraeli boona abaamubandiize. 
1Kings16:34 Omu busingye bwe, Hieli owa Beteli akombeka Yeriko. Ku yaabaire yaayombeka ati omusingi gwarwo, kyamureetera kufeerwa Abiraamu omutabani omujigaijo; kandi ku yaataireho ati amarembo gaarwo nabwo kyamurugiramu okufeerwa omutabani Segubu bucuranda; nk'oku ekigambo ki Nyakubaho yaagambiise Yoshwa mwene Nuuni, kyabaire kiri." 
1Kings17:1 Omu biro ebyo, Eliya owa Tishube omuri Gileadi akagambira Ahabu ati: Nindahira Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ou mpeereza, ku hatarikwija kubaho rume nari enjura omuri egi myaka, okuhitsya obu ndigira ngu bibeho." 
1Kings17:2 Reero Nyakubaho yaagira Eliya ati: 
1Kings17:3 Ruga aha, ogarure ogw'oburugwa-izooba, oyesherekye aha kagyera Keriti ak'aha burugwa-izooba bwa Yorudaani." 
1Kings17:4 Ogume noonywa amaizi g'ako kagyera; kandi naaragiira ebikoona kuguma nibikugyemurira. 
1Kings17:5 Atyo agyenda, akora nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamuragiira; aza ahari ako kagyera Keriti, ak'aha burugwa-izooba bwa Yorudaani, agumayo;" 
1Kings17:6 ebikoona biguma nibimureetera emigaati n'enyama omu kasheeshe n'omu mwabazyo, nawe aguma naanywa amaizi g'ako kagyera." 
1Kings17:7 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, ako kagyera kaayoma, ahabw'enjura kutagwa omuri nsi egyo." 
1Kings17:8 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Eliya ati: 
1Kings17:9 Imuka oze Zarefaati ey'omuri Sidoni, ogumeyo. Reeba naaragiira omufaakazi waayo kukuriisa." 
1Kings17:10 Atyo aimuka, aza Zarefaati. Ku aba yaahika ati aha irembo ry'orwo rurembo, ashangaho omufaakazi naatorotoora otuku, amweta amugira ati: Ndeetera otwizi ntunywe." 
1Kings17:11 Ogwo mukazi ku yaabaire naaza kutureeta, onu yaamweta, yaamugira ati: Ondeetere n'akagaati omu ngaro." 
1Kings17:12 Ogwo mukazi amugira ati: Nindahira Mukama Ruhanga waawe: tiinyine mugaati gu nteekire; kureka nyine oruhi rw'esaano omu kaibo, n'otujuta omu ntsimbo. Mbwenu nintorotoora otuku, ngu ntaahe nyeteekyere ak'okurya na mutabani wangye, tukarye, bwanyima tufe." 
1Kings17:13 Eliya amugira ati: Otatiina; irooko okore nk'oku waagamba. Kwonka obanze onteekyereho akagaati kakye, okandeetere; reero bwanyima oyeteekyere na mutabani waawe." 
1Kings17:14 Manya Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Esaano y'omuri ako kaibo terikwija kuhwaho; n'amajuta g'omu ntsimbo tigarikwija kutuuba, okuhitsya obu Nyakubaho araagwise enjura omu nsi." 
1Kings17:15 Ogwo mufaakazi atyo agyenda, atwaza nk'oku Eliya yaamugambira. We na Eliya n'ab'omuka ye bamara ebiro bingi baine ebyokurya." 
1Kings17:16 Akaibo k'esaano tikaahwaho, n'entsimbo y'amajuta tiyaatuuba. Biba nk'eki Nyakubaho yaagambiise Eliya." 
1Kings17:17 Ebyo ku byahwaire, mutabani w'ogwo mukazi nyineeka yaarwara. Endwara yaamurembya; omwitsyo gwamuhweramu kimwe." 
1Kings17:18 Ogwo mukazi yaagira Eliya ati: Iwe muntu wa Ruhanga 'we, noofa ki naanye? Okaija omwangye kwijutsya Ruhanga ebibi byangye, kikarugiramu omwana wangye kufa!"
