1Kings17:19 Eliya amugira ati: Mpa ogwo mwana waawe. Atyo amumwiha omu kifuba, amwinamura omuri kaanyinaabiri, ei yaabaire naaraara; amurambika aha kitanda kye." 
1Kings17:20 Atakira Nyakubaho ati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, niiwe waagwisiza akagwe ogu mufaakazi orikundaaza, okaita omutabani?" 
1Kings17:21 Atyo ayenanuurira ahari ogwo mwana emirundi eshatu. Ayeshengyereza Nyakubaho ati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, ikiriza ogu mwana agarukwemu amagara." 
1Kings17:22 Nyakubaho aikiriza eki Eliya yaamushaba, omwana agarukwamu amagara, ahimbuuka." 
1Kings17:23 Eliya akwata ogwo mwana, amushuumya naamwiha omuri kaanyinaabiri, amutaasya omuri egyo nju, amukwatsa nyina, amugira ati: Reeba, omwana waawe ahuriire." 
1Kings17:24 Ogwo mukazi agira Eliya ati: Mbwenu naamanya ku ori omuntu wa Ruhanga; kandi n'ebi Nyakubaho arikukugambisa ku biri eby'amazima. 
1Kings18:1 Ku haahingwireho ebiro bingi ekyanda kimazire emyaka eshatu, Nyakubaho yaagambira Eliya ati: Irooko oyeyorekye Ahabu; naanye niinyija kugwisiza ensi enjura." 
1Kings18:2 Eliya atyo aza kweyoreka Ahabu. Obwo enjara eri nyingi omuri Samariya. 
1Kings18:3 Reero Ahabu ayeta Obadiya owaabaire ari omureeberezi mukuru w'eby'eka ye. (Obadiya ogwo akaba atiina munonga Nyakubaho. 
1Kings18:4 Mbwenu obu Yezebeeli yaita abarangi ba Nyakubaho, Obadiya akatwara abarangi igana, yaabashereka, makumi ataano ataano, omu nyanga, yaaguma naabaha ebyokurya n'amaizi)." 
1Kings18:5 Mpaho Ahabu agira Obadiya ati: Irooko ogyendagyende omuri egi nsi, ohikye aha nshuro z'amaizi zoona, n'omu mpanga zoona; obundi tukaashangayo obunyaatsi, tutambira embaraasi n'enyumbu, bireka kufa." 
1Kings18:6 Batyo beeha ebirari, oku baraarabe omuri egyo nsi. Ahabu atoora ogwe wenka na Obadiya atoora ogundi wenka." 
1Kings18:7 Obadiya ku yaabaire naakigyenda, Eliya yaamubugana. Obadiya yaamumanya, yaajuumara, yaamugira ati: Niiwe, Eliya mukama wangye?" 
1Kings18:8 Onu amugarukamu ati: Eego, niinye. Mbwenu irooko ogambire mukama waawe oti: Eliya ari aha." 
1Kings18:9 N'onu yaamugira ati: Ncumwire ki nyowe omwiru waawe, ekyakureetera kunshunikira Ahabu ngu anyite?" 
1Kings18:10 Ninkurahira Mukama Ruhanga waawe, ku hatariho ihanga nari obugabe ebi mukama wangye atatumiremu b'okukusherura. Haza ku baakugira bati: Tariyo, akaarahiza ab'eryo ihanga nari ab'obwo bugabe ku batakureebire." 
1Kings18:11 Mbwenu hati nongira oti: Irooko ogambire mukama waawe oti: Reeba, Eliya ari aha." 
1Kings18:12 Haza ku ndaabe naakurugaho nti, Mutima wa Ruhanga akutware ei ntarikumanya. Reero ku ndaagambire Ahabu, ataakubona, naija kuunyita; nobu nyowe omwiru waawe okwiha omu buto bwangye ntuura nintiina Nyakubaho." 
1Kings18:13 Mbwenu shi mukama wangye, tibakakugambiraga eki naakozire, obu Yezebeeli aita abarangi ba Nyakubaho, oku naasherekire abantu igana b'omu barangi ba Mukama, makumi ataano ataano, omu nyanga, nkaguma nimbaha ebyokurya n'amaizi?" 
1Kings18:14 Mbwenu hati nongira oti: Irooko ogambire mukama waawe oti: Reeba, Eliya ari aha. Ekiraarugyemu naija kuunyita." 
1Kings18:15 Eliya amugira ati: Nindahira Mukama ow'amahe ou mpeereza, ku buzimazima nyowe eri izooba ndikwija kweyoreka ogwo mugabe." 
1Kings18:16 Atyo Obadiya agyenda, ashanga Ahabu abimuteekyerereza, na Ahabu aza kubugana Eliya." 
1Kings18:17 Ahabu ku yaareebire Eliya, yaamugira ati: Niiwe, owaanyangaraize Isiraeli?" 
1Kings18:18 Onu amugarukamu ati: Nyowe tinkanyangarazaga Isiraeli, kureka niiwe n'ab'omuryango gwa sho; ahabw'okuba mukanga kukuratira ebiragiro bya Nyakubaho, mwaramya Baabaali." 
1Kings18:19 Mbwenu nu, ntumira aha Baisiraeli boona, bateeranire ahari Karumeeli, n'abarangi ba Baali magana ana na makumi ataano, n'aba Ashera magana ana, abarya na Yezebeeli aha meeza." 
1Kings18:20 Ahabu atuma aha Baisiraeli boona, kandi ateeranira abarangi boona aha Rushozi Karumeeli." 
1Kings18:21 Eliya ahika abo bantu abagira ti: Muryahitsya hi kugira emitima ebiri? Nyakubaho ku araabe niwe ari Ruhanga, mumuramye. Na Baali ku araabe niwe ari Ruhanga mumuramye. Abantu tibaagira ki baamugarukamu." 
1Kings18:22 Bwanyima Eliya yaagira abo bantu ati: Nyowe, nyowe nyenka, niinye murangi wa Nyakubaho otsigaireho. Kwonka abarangi ba Baali bo ni magana ana na makumi ataano." 
1Kings18:23 Mbwenu ka batuhe enimi ibiri, bo beetooranireho emwe, bagitememu ebihinju, babitungikye aha nku, haza batabihembamu omuriro. Naanye niinyija kubaaga endiijo, ngite aha nku, ntatairemu muriro." 
1Kings18:24 Muhoogyere ruhanga waanyu, naanye mpoogyere Nyakubaho. Reero Ruhanga oraagarukisemu omuriro, biri niwe Ruhanga. Abantu boona baamugarukamu bati: Eki waagamba nikyo." 
1Kings18:25 Bwanyima Eliya akagambira abarangi ba Baali ati: Mwetooranireho enimi emwe, mube niimwe mwabanza kubaaga ahabw'okuba muri baingi. Haza mutakire ruhanga waanyu, kwonka mutagihembamu omuriro." 
1Kings18:26 Batyo baihaho enimi ei baabaha, bagibaaga, batakira Baali okwiha omu kasheeshe okuhitsya omu mwabazyo, nibamweshengyereza bati: Ai Baali, otuhurire! Kwonka tibahurira iraka, nari owaabagarukamu. Baaguma nibagurukyeera, nibeehinguririza eitambiro ri baakozire." 
1Kings18:27 Omu ihangwe Eliya yaabagaaniiza naagira ati: Nimumwete munonga, ahabw'okuba ni ruhanga; shana akaaba aine ebimuhugize nari aine ahu agiire, nainga shi, azindukire; nari shana agwejegyeire naayenda kusisiimurwa." 
1Kings18:28 Nabo baamuza, beeshaza zaarurara n'emisyo, okuhitsya obu eshagama yaabahimintikiremu." 
1Kings18:29 Eihangwe ku ryagwisize, baagumizamu nibaamuza, okuhitsya omu bunaku bu batambiramu ekitambo ky'omu mwabazyo. Kwonka tihaabaho iraka, nobu yaakuba ow'okubagarukamu, nari ow'okubeetaho." 
1Kings18:30 Bwanyima Eliya akagambira abantu ati: Nimumpikye haihi. Abantu boona baamuhika haihi. Yaayombeka busya eitambiro rya Nyakubaho eryabaire risheenyirwe. 
1Kings18:31 Yaihaho amabaare ikumi n'abiri, agarikwingana n'omubaro gw'enganda za beene Yakobo, ou Ruhanga yaagambiire ati: Oryayetwa Isiraeli." 
1Kings18:32 Yaagombekyesa eitambiro ry'okuramizaho Nyakubaho. Yaateera oruhazo rurikuhikwamu lita makumi abiri z'amaizi. 
1Kings18:33 Yaatungikirana enku aha itambiro, yaatematema enimi, yaagita aha nku. Reero yaagira ati: Mwijuze enyungu ina amaizi, mugashukye aha kitambo ky'okucwetsya n'aha nku." 
1Kings18:34 Kandi yaagira ati: Mukikore mutyo omurundi gwa kabiri. Nabo baakikora batyo omurundi gwa kabiri. Yaagaruka yaagira ati: Mukikore mutyo omurundi gwa kashatu. Baakikora omurundi gwa kashatu. 
1Kings18:35 Amaizi gaahimintika, gaayehinguririza eitambiro, gaijuza n'oruhazo." 
1Kings18:36 Obunaku bw'okutamba ekitambo ky'omu mwabazyo ku bwahikire, Eliya omurangi yairira haihi eitambiro, yaashaba ati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Aburahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo, eri izooba ka kimanywe ku niiwe Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naanye ku ndi omuheereza waawe, kandi ku naakora ebi byona ahabw'okuba niiwe wandagiira." 
1Kings18:37 Mbwenu, ai Mukama, ngarukamu, ngarukamu; aba bantu babone kumanya ku niiwe, ai Mukama, oba Ruhanga, kandi ku niiwe ohindwire emitima yaabo ekakugarukira." 
1Kings18:38 Ahonaaho omuriro gwa Mukama gwahuruutukayo, gwayokyeza kimwe ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, n'enku n'amabaare, n'eitaka; gwakomba n'amaizi g'omuri orwo ruhazo." 
1Kings18:39 Abantu boona ku baakireebire, baajumara, baagira bati: Nyakubaho niiwe Ruhanga! Nyakubaho niiwe Ruhanga!" 
1Kings18:40 Mpaho Eliya aragiira abantu ati: Mukwate abarangi ba Baali, hatagira owaabatsiga. Nabo babakwata. Eliya abashuumya aha Kagyera Kishoni, abaitiraho." 
1Kings18:41 Reero Eliya agira Ahabu ati: Irooko orye, onywe; ahabw'okuba nimpurira enjura neehoorera." 
1Kings18:42 Ahabu atyo aza kurya n'okunywa, na Eliya anyegyera, aza aha mutwe gwa Karumeeli, ajuumara aha nsi, omutwe aguta omu maguru." 
1Kings18:43 Agambira omugaragwa we ati: Temba ekibungo, oreebe ogurikugarura aha nyanja. N'onu anyegyera, anagayo eriisho, agira ati: Tihariyo kantu. Eliya ayongyera amugira ati: Garukayo emirundi mushanju." 
1Kings18:44 Aha murundi gwa mushanju amugira ati: Reeba, ekicu kirikushusha omukono gw'omuntu nikiimuka omu nyanja. Eliya amugira ati: Irooko ogambire Ahabu oti: Tebeekanisa ekigaari kyawe, oshuume, enjura etakaakutangira aho." 
1Kings18:45 Omu kaanya kakye eiguru ryairirimbibwa ebicu n'omuyaga, haagwa enjura nyingi. Ahabu yaatemba omu kigaari, yaaza Yezereeli." 
1Kings18:46 Ruhanga yaateera Eliya omuhimbo, yaayezirika emyenda ye omunda, yaagyenda nairuka ayebembeire Ahabu, okuhitsya obu yaahikire aha irembo rya Yezereeli." 
1Kings19:1 Ahabu ateekyerereza Yezebeeli byona ebi Eliya yaakora, n'oku yaita abarangi boona." 
1Kings19:2 Bwanyima Yezebeeli atuma entumwa ahari Eliya, naamugira ati: Nyencakare nk'aga magingo, ku ndaabe ntagizire magara gaawe nk'oku ogizire ag'abo bantu; baaruhanga bakinture n'okukiraho." 
1Kings19:3 Eliya nikwo kutiina, akaimuka, akahunzya amagara, akaza Beerisheba ey'omuri Buyuda, akatsigayo omugaragwa we." 
1Kings19:4 Kwonka we akagyenda orugyendo rurikurenzya eizooba, akaza omu ihamba. Akihikayo akashutama ahansi y'omukinga, akeeshabira okufa, naagira ati: Mbwenu, ai Nyakubaho, mperere hi! Haakiri onyite, ahabw'okuba tiinyine ki ndikuhitsa baatatenkuru." 
1Kings19:5 Atyo abyama, agwejegyerera ahansi y'omukinga. Reero maraika amukoraho, amugira ati: Imuka orye." 
1Kings19:6 Onu ku amagamaga ati, areeba ahamutwe gwe omugaati guteekirwe aha mabaare garikwotsya n'akanyungu k'amaizi. Nawe arya, anywa, agaruka abyama." 
1Kings19:7 Maraika wa Mukama agaruka aija omurundi gwa kabiri, amukoraho naamugira ati: Imuka orye, ahabw'okuba orugyendo rukiri ruraingwa, rutakaakurema." 
1Kings19:8 Nawe aimuka, arya, anywa, agyendera aha mwiguto gw'ebyo byokurya, okumara amazooba makumi ana n'ebiro makumi ana, ahika Horebu aha rushozi rwa Ruhanga." 
1Kings19:9 Eliya ku yaahikire Horebu, yaataaha omu nyanga, yaaraaramu. Ahonaaho Nyakubaho yaamugira ati: Eliya, nookora ki aha?" 
1Kings19:10 Onu amugarukamu ati: Ngizire eihari ringi ahabwawe, Mukama Ruhanga w'amahe; ahabw'okuba Abaisiraeli baitsire endagaano yaawe, baasheenya amatambiro gaawe, baita abarangi baawe. Hati niinye nyenka otsigaireho, mbwenu nibenda kuunyita." 
1Kings19:11 Onu amugira ati: Shohora, oyemerere ahari oru rushozi, omu maisho gangye. Ago magingo Nyakubaho arabaho. Omuyaga mwingi gw'amaani gushatura enshozi, gwatagura enkiri, gumwebembeire; kwonka Nyakubaho atagurimu. Handi hakye, harabaho omutsitsa, kwonka nagwo Nyakubaho tagwijamu." 
1Kings19:12 Omutsitsa ku guhingura, haija omuriro, kwonka nagwo Nyakubaho tagubamu. Bwanyima y'omuriro, hakurataho akaraka kakye kabobeire." 
1Kings19:13 Eliya ku yaakahuriire, yaayehumbika omunagiro gwe aha maisho, yaashohora, yaayemerera aha muryango gw'enyanga. Ahonaaho yaahurira eiraka nirimugira riti: Eliya, nookora ki aha?" 
1Kings19:14 Nawe agarukamu ati: Ngizire eihari ringi ahabwawe Mukama Ruhanga w'amahe; ahabw'okuba Abaisiraeli baitsire endagaano yaawe, baasheenya amatambiro gaawe, kandi baita abarangi baawe. Hati niinye nyenka otsigaireho, mbwenu nu nibenda kuunyita." 
1Kings19:15 Nyakubaho amugira ati: Irooko ogarukyeyo, otoore ogurikuza omu ihamba rya Damasiko. Haza ku oraahikyeyo, osiigye Hazaeli amajuta, abe omugabe wa Siriya." 
1Kings19:16 Ogasiigye na Yehu mwene Nimushi, abe omugabe wa Isiraeli, kandi ogasiigye Elisha mwene Shafati owa Abelimehoola, abe omurangi w'okuza omu mwanya gwawe." 
1Kings19:17 Reero orikira Hazaeli, aitwe Yehu, n'orikira Yehu, aitwe Elisha." 
1Kings19:18 Kwonka shi niinyija kwetsigiraho omuri Isiraeli abantu enkumi mushanju, abatakatsimbiraga Baali maju; na boona abatakamunywegyeraga." 
1Kings19:19 Eliya atyo arugayo, ashanga Elisha mwene Shafati naahingisa ente makumi abiri na ina, zikomeraine ibiri-ibiri zimuri omu maisho; kandi we aine ikumi na ibiri ezirikuhereerukayo. Eliya ku aba naamurabaho, akwata omunagiro gwe agumujweka." 
1Kings19:20 Elisha atyo atsigaho ente, airuka akuratiire Eliya, amugira ati: Ndeka, mbanze nnywegyere tata na maawe, ndagane nabo, haza nkukuratire. Eliya amugira ati: Irooko ogarukyeyo. Mbwenu shi waareeba naakugira nta?" 
1Kings19:21 Elisha atyo areka kumukurata, atwara ezo nte zikomeraine ibiri-ibiri, aziita, aziteekyesa emigamba yaazo, azigaburira abantu, barya. Bwanyima aimuka, akurate Eliya; aba omugaragwa we." 
1Kings20:1 Benihadadi omugabe wa Siriya akahuruza eihe rye ryona, yaakwatanisa n'abandi bagabe makumi ashatu na babiri abaine embaraasi n'ebigaari. Yaagyenda, yaagota Samariya, yaagirwanisa." 
1Kings20:2 Reero yaatuma entumwa omu rurembo ahari Ahabu, omugabe wa Isiraeli, kumugira ziti: Benihadadi yaakutumaho ati:" 
1Kings20:3 Efeeza zaawe n'ezaabu zaawe n'ebyangye; n'abakazi baawe barungi hamwe n'abaana baawe nabo n'abangye. 
1Kings20:4 Omugabe wa Isiraeli nawe amugarukamu ati: Eego, mukama wangye Nyakusinga, nk'oku waagamba, nyowe ndi owaawe, n'ebi nyine byona n'ebyawe!" 
1Kings20:5 Bwanyima entumwa zikagaruka ahari Ahabu zaamugambira ziti: Benihadadi yaagira ati: Nkakutumaho ninkuragiira nti: Mpeereza efeeza zaawe n'ezaabu n'abakazi baawe n'abaana baawe. 
1Kings20:6 Mbwenu nyencakare nk'aga magingo, niinyija kukwoherereza abairu bangye, bacaakye enju yaawe, n'amaju g'abagaragwa baawe; kyona eki baraahitsyeho engaro, baakisiima, bakitware." 
1Kings20:7 Omugabe wa Isiraeli ayeta abakuru b'omuri egyo nsi boona, abagira ati: Mbwenu mwetegyereze, mureebe oku ogu mushaija arikutaara akabi. Reeba akantumaho kumuha abakazi bangye n'abaana bangye, n'okumuha efeeza zangye n'ezaabu zangye, haza tinaamwangira." 
1Kings20:8 Abakuru boona n'abantu boona baamugira bati: Ebyo otabyetaho kandi otabiikiriza. 
1Kings20:9 Nawe agira entumwa za Benihadadi ati: Mugambire mukama wangye omugabe muti: Ebi waabandize kunshaba, nyowe omwiru waawe, niinyija kubikora, kwonka eki tindikukikwikiriza. Entumwa zityo zibimuteekyerereza." 
1Kings20:10 Benihadadi nawe amutumaho naamugira ati: Baaruhanga bakinture n'okukiraho, omuri Samariya ku haakubamu omucuucu gurikwijuza ebihi by'engabo zangye zoona." 
1Kings20:11 Omugabe wa Isiraeli amugarukamu ati: Mumugambire muti: Orikujwara eby'okurwanisa tayekiita, kureka heesiima orikubijuura." 
1Kings20:12 Benihadadi ku yaahuriire obwo butumwa, naanywa n'abandi bagabe omu rusiisira, yaaragiira engabo ze ati: Mutengye orugamba. Nabo baarutenga kuteera orurembo." 
1Kings20:13 Mbwenu omurangi akaija, yaahika Ahabu omugabe wa Isiraeli, yaamugira ati: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Tiwaareeba egyo migogo yoona? Kwonka eri izooba niinyija kugikurekurira ogisingure, obone kumanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
1Kings20:14 Ahabu amubuuza ati: Ni baahi abaraagirwanise? Onu ati: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Abatsigazi abarwani abarikureebererwa abategyeki bakuru b'ebyanga. Ayongyera, amubuuza ati: N'oha oraatandikirize orugamba? Amugarukamu ati: Niiwe." 
1Kings20:15 Mpaho Ahabu ahuruza abatsigazi abarwani b'abategyeki bakuru b'ebyanga, bahika magana abiri na makumi ashatu na babiri; bwanyima ahuruza Abaisiraeli enkumi mushanju." 
1Kings20:16 Bahurura omu ihangwe, Benihadadi ari omu nsiisira naayenywera asinzire, hamwe n'abagabe makumi ashatu na babiri, abaizire kumuha emikono." 
1Kings20:17 Abatsigazi abarwani ab'abategyeki bakuru b'ebyanga ku baabandize kuteera, Benihadadi yaayoherezayo entatsi, zaamugira ziti: Engabo zaahurura niziruga Samariya." 
1Kings20:18 Agira ati: Ku baraabe baareetwa okushaba obusingye, mubakwate bahuriire, nainga ku baraabe baareetwa okurwana, nabwo mubakwate bahuriire." 
1Kings20:19 Batyo abatsigazi abarwani ab'abategyeki bakuru b'ebyanga bashohora nibaruga omu rurembo, bakuratiirwe eihe ry'Abaisiraeli." 
1Kings20:20 Buri omwe yaayeitira omuntu. Abasiriya baahunga, Abaisiraeli baabakurata bababingire; omugabe Benihadadi owa Siriya yaahunga atembire embaraasi, ari hamwe n'ab'eihe ry'ab'aha mbaraasi." 
1Kings20:21 Omugabe wa Isiraeli yaahurura, yaanyaga embaraasi n'ebigaari, yaita Abasiriya baingi munonga." 
1Kings20:22 Ebyo ku byahwaire, omurangi ori yaija, yaahika omugabe wa Isiraeli, yaamugira ati: Irooko oyeteekateekye, oreebe eki oraakore; ahabw'okuba omwaka ku guraabe nigutandika, omugabe wa Siriya naija kugaruka kukurwanisa." 
1Kings20:23 Bwanyima abagaragwa b'omugabe wa Siriya bakamugira bati: Manya baaruhanga baabo n'ab'omu bibungo; nikyo batukiriize amaani. Mbwenu ka tubarwanisize omu ruhita; buzimazima nitwija kubakiza emikono. 
1Kings20:24 Eki oraakore n'eki: Iha abo bagabe, buri omwe ahu obaire omutaire, omu myanya yaabo otemu abakuru b'amahe." 
1Kings20:25 Kandi ohuruze eihe ririkwingana n'eri waafeereirwe; ogarureho embaraasi omu mwanya gw'embaraasi, n'ekigaari omu mwanya gw'ekigaari. Haza tubarwanisize omu ruhita. Buzimazima nitwija kubakiza emikono. Nawe yaikiriza ebi baamugambiire, yaaba nikwo yaatwaza." 
1Kings20:26 Omwaka ku gwabaire nigutandika, Benihadadi yaahuruza Abasiriya, yaaza Afeki kurwanisa Abaisiraeli." 
1Kings20:27 Abaisiraeli nabo baahurura baine eby'okukoresa aha rugamba, baaza kubarwanisa. Abaisiraeli baasiisira ahashungaine nabo, bari nk'amasyo makye abiri g'embuzi; kwonka Abasiriya baashweka ensi." 
1Kings20:28 Reero omuntu wa Ruhanga yaija, yaahika omugabe wa Isiraeli, yaamugira ati: Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Ahabw'okuba Abasiriya bagizire ngu Nyowe ndi ruhanga w'ebibungo, tindi ruhanga w'empita; mbwenu naaza kukurekurira egyo migogo yoona ogisingure, obone kumanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
1Kings20:29 Batyo baamara ebiro mushanju basiisiire ahashungaine. Aha izooba rya mushanju orugamba rutandika. Abaisiraeli omu izooba rimwe baita omu Basiriya abantu akasirira kamwe ak'abarikugyendesa ebigyere. 
1Kings20:30 Abaatsigaireho baahungira omu rurembo Afeki, ebigo byarwo byagwera abantu obukumi bubiri n'enkumi mushanju. Benihadadi nawe yaahungira omu kishengye ky'endugu eky'omuri orwo rurembo." 
1Kings20:31 Abagaragwa be baamugira bati: tuhuriire ngu abagabe b'omurayango gwa Isiraeli n'ab'embabazi. Mbwenu ka twezirikye ebiguniya, twekome emigoye omu mutwe, tuze ahari ogwo mugabe wa Isiraeli; shana akaakusaasira, areka kukwita." 
1Kings20:32 Batyo beezirika ebiguniya, beekoma emigoye omu mutwe, bahika omugabe wa Isiraeli, bamugira bati: omwiru waawe Benihadadi yaagira ati: Naakweshengyereza, otaanyita. Onu ababuuza ati: Biri akiriho? Ka ni mwene tata shi." 
1Kings20:33 Mbwenu abo bantu bakaba bategyereize kureeba eki arikuteekateeka. Ahabu ku yaagambire ekyo, baakiiziraho baagira bati: Eego, Benihadadi ni mwene sho. Nawe nikwo kubagira ati: Nimwirooko mumureete. Benihadadi ku yaizire, yaamuhika; onu yaamutembesa omu kigaari kye." 
1Kings20:34 Benihadadi yaamugira ati: Niinyija kukugarurira endembo zi tata yaanyagire sho, oyeteere amaduuka omuri Damasiko, nk'oku tata yaagataire omuri Samariya. Ahabu amugira ati: Ku oraatwaze otyo, naanye ninkurekura. Batyo baakora endagaano; n'onu yaamurekura." 
1Kings20:35 Omwe omuri batabani b'abarangi, ahabw'okuragiirwa Mukama, akagambira mugyenzi we ati: Naakweshengyereza, nteera. Kwonka ogwo muntu yaayanga kumuteera." 
1Kings20:36 Onu nikwo kumugira ati: Nk'oku otaayorobera eki Nyakubaho yaagamba, hati ku orandugyeho oti, entare neekwita. Haza ku yaamurugireho ati, entare yaamwita." 
1Kings20:37 Bwanyima ogwo murangi yaabugana ondiijo muntu, yaamugira ati: Nteera, n'onu amuteera munonga, amuhutaaza." 
1Kings20:38 Ogwo murangi ku aruga aho, ategyerereza omugabe aha muhanda, ayehindwire okundi n'ekitambaara ki ayeshwekire aha amaisho." 
1Kings20:39 Omugabe ku yaabaire naahingura, ogwo murangi yaamutakira naamugira ati: Nyowe omwiru waawe, ku mbaire ninza aha rugamba, omuserukare yaakubuuka, yandeetera omuntu, yangira ati: Rinda ogu muntu. Ku araabure noomuzira nari noija kuriha empiiha z'efeeza enkumi mukaaga." 
1Kings20:40 Mbwenu nyowe omuheereza waawe ku mbaire nindabanamu ninkora oku n'oku, ogwo muntu yaagyenda. Omugabe wa Isiraeli amugira ati: Orubanja rwawe rube nk'oku waarwecwera." 
1Kings20:41 Ogwo murangi atyo arahuka kweiha ekitambaara ahamaisho, omugabe wa Isiraeli amumanya ku ari ow'omu barangi." 
1Kings20:42 N'onu amugira ati: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ahabw'okuba orekwire omuntu ou mbaire ndagiire ngu aitwe, mbwenu waaza kumuzira, oitwe omu mwanya gwe, n'abantu baawe baitwe omu mwanya gw'abe." 
1Kings20:43 Omugabe wa Isiraeli atyo agaruka owe Samariya agwirwe kubi kandi aine enaku. 
1Kings21:1 Mbwenu, Naboti Omunyayezireeli, akaba aine omusiri gw'emizaabibu omuri Yezereeli, guhereraine n'ekikaari kya Ahabu omugabe wa Samariya." 
1Kings21:2 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, Ahabu yaagira Naboti ati: Mpa omusiri gwawe gw'emizaabibu, nguhindure ogw'okwehingiramu emboga, ahabw'okuba guri haihi n'enju yangye; naanye nkuhe omusiri gw'emizaabibu ogurikuguhita. Nainga ku oraabe nookisiima, ngukuhemu empiiha zigushemereire." 
1Kings21:3 Kwonka Naboti yaagira Ahabu ati: Nikikabure! nyowe okukuha obutaka bwa baatatenkuru. 
1Kings21:4 Ahabu atyo ataaha omwe acuncubaire, kandi agwirwe kubi, ahabw'eki Naboti Omunyayezireeli yaamugambira naamugira ati: Tindikwija kukuha obutaka bwa baatatenkuru. Abyama aha kitanda ahugikire omushaya, ayanga n'okurya." 
1Kings21:5 Yezebeeli ku yaizire ahu ari yaamubuuza ati: N'enki ekikusaasize kikakuzibira kurya? 
1Kings21:6 Ahabu yaamugarukamu ati: Manya ku naagambira Naboti Omunyayezireeli nti: Nguza omusiri gwawe gw'emizaabibu, nkuhe empiiha; nari ku oraabe nookisiima nkuhemu ogundi musiri gw'emizaabibu, yangarukamu ati: Tindikwija kugukuha." 
1Kings21:7 Omukazi we Yezebeeli amugira ati: Reeba mihi! Tiiwe orikutegyeka Isiraeli? Imuka orye, oshemererwe. Nyowe niinyija kukuha omusiri gwa Naboti Omunyayezireeli." 
1Kings21:8 Ogwo mukazi atyo ahandiika amabaruha omu iziina rya Ahabu, agataho akamanyiso ka Ahabu, agatwekyera abantu bakuru n'abakungu batwire na Naboti omu rurembo." 
1Kings21:9 Omuri ezo baruha ahandiikamu ati: Murangirire okwsiibyakwo, kandi mute Naboti ahatunguukire, ahagati y'abantu." 
1Kings21:10 Reero omu maisho ge mutemu abantu babiri ebifamutima, bamutabaarize nibagira bati: Orogotsire ahari Ruhanga n'aha mugabe. Bwanyima mumushohoze, mumuteere amabaare, afe." 
1Kings21:11 Abantu b'omu rurembo, abakuru baamwo n'abakungu abarutwiremu, bakora nk'oku Yezebeeli abatumireho; nk'oku kihandiikirwe omu baruha zi abatwekyeire." 
1Kings21:12 Barangirira okwesiibyakwo, bata Naboti ahatunguukire ahagati y'abantu." 
1Kings21:13 Mpaho abantu babiri ebifamutima baija, bashutama nibareebana nawe, batabaariza Naboti omu maisho g'abantu, nibagira bati: Naboti arogotsire ahari Ruhanga n'aha mugabe. Batyo bamwiha omu rurembo, bamushohoza, bamuteera amabaare, afa." 
1Kings21:14 Bwanyima baatuma ahari Yezebeeli bati: Naboti baamuuteera amabaare, yaafa." 
1Kings21:15 Ahonaaho, Yezebeeli ku yaahuriire ngu Naboti baamuteera amabaare yaafa, yaagira Ahabu ati: Imuka, otware omusiri gw'emizaabibu ogwa Naboti Omunyayezireeli ogu abaire ayangire kukuguza; ahabw'okuba mbwenu takiriho, yaafa." 
1Kings21:16 Ahabu nawe ku ahurira ngu Naboti yaafa, aimuka, ashuuma omu musiri gw'emizaabibu ogwa Naboti Omunyayezireeli kugutwara." 
1Kings21:17 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Eliya Omutishibi ati: 
1Kings21:18 Imuka ogyende, obugane Ahabu omugabe wa Isiraeli omuri Samariya. Reeba, ari omu musiri gwa Naboti gw'emizaabibu; yaazayo kugutwara." 
1Kings21:19 Haza omugire oti: Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Waita omuntu, waataho n'okutwara ebye? Oyongyere omugire oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Omwanya gu embwa zikombeiremu eshagama ya Naboti, nigwo ziraakomberemu eyaawe." 
1Kings21:20 Ahabu agira Eliya ati: Iwe muzigu wangye 'we, waarugaho wambona? Onu amugarukamu ati: Naakubona; ahabw'okuba oyehaireyo kukora ebi Nyakubaho atarikusiima." 
1Kings21:21 Mbwenu niinyija kukugwisiza akagwe, nkwihireho kimwe, iwe Ahabu, nkumareho omushaija weena omuri Isiraeli, yaaba muhuuku nari ow'obusingye;" 
1Kings21:22 ab'omuryango gwawe mbagire nk'ab'ogwa Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, n'ab'ogwa Baasha mwene Ahiya; ahabw'okuba ongwisize kubi, waanyitsa ekiniga, waataho n'okucumuza Isiraeli." 
1Kings21:23 Kandi Yezebeeli Nyakubaho amugambaho ati: Embwa ziryariira Yezebeeli omuri Yezereeli. 
1Kings21:24 Weena ow'aba Ahabu orifeera omu rurembo embwa zimurye, na weena origwa omu ishwa amahungu gamushokoore." 
1Kings21:25 Tihariho muntu n'omwe, owaayehaireyo kukora ebi Nyakubaho atarikusiima, ori nka Ahabu, ou Yezebeeli omukazi we yaayohize." 
1Kings21:26 Akakora ekihagaro kihango munonga kuramya ebishushani, nk'oku Abaamori abu Nyakubaho yaabingire kuhigiza Abaisiraeli baakozire." 
1Kings21:27 Ahabu ku yaahuriire ebyo bigambo, yaataagura ebi ajwaire, yaajwara ekiguniya, yaayesiibyakwo, yaabyama ayeshwekire ebiguniya, yaaguma naagyendagyenda ayeinamiriire." 
1Kings21:28 Reero Nyakubaho yaagambira Eliya Omutishibi ati: 
1Kings21:29 Waareeba oku Ahabu ayekyeheisize omu maisho gangye? Mbwenu ahabw'okuba yaayekyehesa omu maisho gangye, naanye tindikwija kureeta akabi omu busingye bwe, kureka omu busingye bw'omutabani nibwo ndigwisiza akagwe ab'omuryango gwe." 
1Kings22:1 Abasiriya n'Abaisiraeli bakamara emyaka eshatu batarikurwana rugamba. 
1Kings22:2 Kwonka omu gwa kashatu, Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda yaija aha mugabe wa Isiraeli." 
1Kings22:3 Omugabe wa Isiraeli yaabuuza abagaragwa be ati: Timurikumanya ku Ramoti-Gileadi eba eyaitu? Mbwenu reeba, twetsirize, titwagyaka mugabe wa Siriya." 
1Kings22:4 Mpaho abuuza Yehoshafaati ati: Noija kuhurura naanye kuteera Ramoti-Gileadi? Yehoshafaati agarukamu omugabe wa Isiraeli ati: Nyowe naiwe turi bamwe. Abantu bangye nibo baawe, n'embaraasi zangye nizo zaawe." 
1Kings22:5 Kwonka Yehoshafaati agira omugabe wa Isiraeli ati: Banza obuuze Mukama, oreebe eki arikugamba." 
1Kings22:6 Mpaho omugabe wa Isiraeli ayeta abarangi nka magana ana bateeranira hamwe, ababuuza ati: Mpurure nteere Ramoti-Gileadi, nari ndereere? Bamugarukamu bati: Hurura! Nyakubaho naija kugikurekurira, Nyakusinga, ogisingure." 
1Kings22:7 Yehoshafaati abuuza ati: Beitu tihariho murangi ondi owa Nyakubaho ou twakwehanuuzaho? 
1Kings22:8 Omugabe wa Isiraeli agarukamu Yehoshafaati ati: Hakiriyo omuntu omwe ou twakwehanuuzaho ebya Nyakubaho, niwe Mikaaya mwene Imula. Kwonka mmwanga, ahabw'okuba tandagurira birungi, kureka ebibi. Yehoshafaati amugira ati: Nyakusinga, reka kugamba otyo." 
1Kings22:9 Omugabe wa Isiraeli nikwo kweta omukuru w'abasherukare akamugira ati: Irooko oreete ahonaaho Mikaaya mwene Imula. 
1Kings22:10 Obwo omugabe wa Isiraeli na Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda bakaba bashutami aha bitebe byabo by'obugabe, bajwaire bushuuti zaabo, bari omu kibuga aha irembo rya Samariya, abarangi boona nibaragurira omu maisho gaabo." 
1Kings22:11 Reero Zedekiya mwene Kenaana akaba ayeheesheire amahembe g'ekyoma, yaagambira Ahabu omugabe ati: Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Aga mahembe nigo oraabingise Abasiriya okuhitsya obu oraabacwekyereze." 
1Kings22:12 Abarangi boona nabo baaba nikwo baaragura. Baamugira bati: Hurura oteere Ramoti-Gileadi, osingure; Nyakubaho naija kugikurekurira, Nyakusinga, ogisingure." 
1Kings22:13 Entumwa i baayohereize kweta Mikaaya, ekamugira eti: Reeba, omugabe abarangi boona hamwe batarikutaana bamuraguriire akaso karungi. Mbwenu n'ebyawe bibe nk'eby'omwe aharibo, omuragurire akaso karungi." 
1Kings22:14 Kwonka Mikaaya agira ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho, Mukama eki arangambire nikyo ndaagambe." 
1Kings22:15 Ku yaahikire omugabe, omugabe yaamubuuza ati: Mikaaya, tuhurure, tuze kuteera Ramoti-Gileadi, nari turereere? Onu amugarukamu ati: Irooko ohurure, ogisingure, Nyakubaho naija kugikurekurira, Nyakusinga." 
1Kings22:16 Omugabe amubuuza ati: Niinyija kukurahiza kangahi, otarikungambira kindi omu iziina rya Nyakubaho, kureka amazima?" 
1Kings22:17 Onu amugira ati: Ndeebire Abaisiraeli boona bataataaniire omu nshozi, nk'entaama zitaine muriisa. Nyakubaho agira ati: Manya abo bantu tibaine mukama waabo, buri omwe k'agarukyeyo omu ka ye n'obusingye." 
1Kings22:18 Omugabe wa Isiraeli agira Yehoshafaati ati: Tinaakugambira ku atarikwija kundagurira by'akaso karungi, kureka ebibi?" 
1Kings22:19 Mikaaya amugira ati: Mbwenu nu, hurira ekigambo kya Nyakubaho. Ndeebire Nyakubaho ashutami aha kitebe kye ky'obugabe, amahe g'omu iguru goona gamwemereire aha rubaju rwa buryo, n'aha rwa bumosho." 
1Kings22:20 Nyakubaho yaagira ati: N'oha oraabeihabeihe Ahabu, akahurura Ramoti-Gileadi, haza akagwayo? Omwe yaagamba okundi, n'ondi okundi." 
1Kings22:21 Bwanyima omutima gwaija, gwayemerera omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, gwagira guti: Niinye ndaamubeihabeihe." 
1Kings22:22 Mukama yaagubuuza ati: Noomubeihabeihesa ki? Gwamugarukamu guti: Niinyija kugyenda, mpindukye omutima gw'ebishuba, ngambire omu barangi be boona. Nawe agugira ati: Niiwe oraamubeihabeihe, kandi noija kukibaasa. Irooko obe nikwo waatwaza." 
1Kings22:23 Mbwenu, reeba, nikwo kibaire. Nyakubaho areeteire abarangi baawe aba boona kukubeiha, yaaragiira ku ogwerwa akagwe." 
1Kings22:24 Bwanyima Zedekiya, mwene Kenaana airira haihi, ateera Mikaaya oruhi rw'omushaya. Amugira ati: Mutima wa Nyakubaho andugireho ata, kuba niiwe yaagambira?" 
1Kings22:25 Mikaaya amugira ati: Ekyo orabukimanye aha izooba ri oraagiireho kweshereka omu kishengye ky'endugu. 
1Kings22:26 Omugabe wa Isiraeli aragiira omwe aha bakungu be ati: Kwata Mikaaya ogu, omugarureyo ahari Amoni omutegyeki mukuru w'orurembo, n'ahari mutabani wangye Yoashi." 
1Kings22:27 Haza obagambire oti: Omugabe yaagira ati: Mute eki kishaija omu kihome, mukiriise ebyokurya bitaine ku biri, kandi mukinyweise amaizi, okuhitsya obu ndaatabaarukye buhooro." 
1Kings22:28 Mikaaya amugira ati: Ku oraagarukye buhooro, biri Mukama tiwe yangambisa. Ayongyera agira ati: Imwe bantu 'mwe mwena, ekyo mukihurire!" 
1Kings22:29 Ahabu omugabe wa Isiraeli na Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda bahurura kuteera Ramoti-Gileadi. 
1Kings22:30 Omugabe wa Isiraeli agambira Yehoshafaati ati: Nyowe niinyija kwehindura okundi, nze omu rugamba; kwonka iwe ojware ebyawe eby'obugabe. Mpaho omugabe wa Isiraeli ayehindura okundi, aza aha rugamba." 
1Kings22:31 Mbwenu obwo omugabe wa Siriya akaba aragiire abakuru b'ebigaari bye makumi ashatu na babiri ati: Mutarwana n'abato nobu baakuba abakuru; kureka murwanise omugabe wa Isiraeli wenka. 
1Kings22:32 Abakuru b'ebigaari by'okurwanisa ku baareebire Yehoshafaati, bagira bati: Buzimazima ogwo n'omugabe wa Isiraeli. Batyo bakubuuka kumurwanisa. Yehoshafaati aborooga!" 
1Kings22:33 Abakuru b'ebigaari ku baareebire atari mugabe wa Isiraeli, baarekyera aho kumubinga." 
1Kings22:34 Kwonka omushaija omwe ananuura obuta, afa okurasha omwambi, aguteera omugabe wa Isiraeli ahu ebijwaro bye by'okurwanisa birikuteeranira n'eky'okwekingiza aha kifuba. Omugabe nikwo kugira orikugyendesa ekigaari kye ati: Hinduka, onyihe aha rugamba; ahabw'okuba naahutaara munonga." 
1Kings22:35 Eryo izooba orugamba rwashaarira, omugabe baamuhigika omu kigaari kye naareeba ei Abasiriya bari, okuhitsya obu yaafiire omu mwabazyo; n'eshagama y'omu buhuta bwe ekahimintika, ekaterama omu kigaari." 
1Kings22:36 Eizooba ku ryabaire nirirengarenga, baayamuza nibarangirira ab'omu ihe, bati: Buri muntu agarukye omu rurembo rw'owaabo, n'omu nsi y'owaabo." 
1Kings22:37 Omugabe Ahabu yaaba nikwo yaafa, omutumbi gwe baagutwara Samariya, baaguziikayo." 
1Kings22:38 Ekigaari baakyogyeza aha kiyanja kya Samariya, embwa zaakomberaho eshagama ye, na baamaraaya baakyogyeramu, nk'oku Mukama yaagambire." 
1Kings22:39 Endiijo mirimo ya Ahabu, n'ebi yaakozire byona, n'ekikaari ki yaakoreise emiino, n'endembo zi yaayombekire, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
1Kings22:40 Ahabu nikwo yaafiire atyo, akashanga baishenkuru; omutabani Ahaziya akamuhungurira, akaba omugabe." 
1Kings22:41 Yehoshafaati mwene Asa akatandika kuba omugabe wa Yuda omu mwaka gwa kana ogwa Ahabu omugabe wa Isiraeli. 
1Kings22:42 Yehoshafaati obu yaaza aha ngoma, akaba aine emyaka makumi ashatu n'etano y'obukuru; yaategyekyera emyaka abiri n'etaano omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Azuuba, ari muhara wa Shiluhi." 
1Kings22:43 Akakuratira emitwarize ya Asa ishe, tiyaagiteishukaho. Yaaguma naakora ebi Mukama arikusiima. Kwonka shi tiyaihaho ndaaro z'okuramizamu, abantu baaguma nibazitambiramu ebitambo, nibazootereramu obubaani." 
1Kings22:44 Yehoshafaati kandi akakora endagaano y'obusingye n'omugabe wa Isiraeli. 
1Kings22:45 Endiijo mirimo ya Yehoshafaati, n'amaani gu yaagizire, n'engamba zi yaarwaine, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda." 
1Kings22:46 Kandi akamarira kimwe omu nsi abashaija barikuraayira omu maramizo, abaabaire batsigaireho omu busingye bwa Asa, ishe." 
1Kings22:47 Omu biro ebyo Edomu ekaba etaine mugabe, kureka ekaba neetegyekwa omutsigire owaatairweho omugabe wa Yuda." 
1Kings22:48 Yehoshafaati akakora emeeri za Tarushiishi okuza Ofiri kwihayo ezaabu, kwonka tizirahikireyo, ahabw'okuba zikacwekyererera Ezionigeberi." 
1Kings22:49 Ebyo ku byahwaire Ahaziya mwene Ahabu yaagira Yehoshafaati ati: K'abashaija bangye bagyende hamwe n'abaawe omu meeri. Kwonka ekyo Yehoshafaati tarakisiimire. 
1Kings22:50 Bwanyima Yehoshafaati akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru; baamuziika nabo omu rurembo rwa Daudi ishenkuru. Yehoraamu omutabani yaamuhungurira, yaaba omugabe." 
1Kings22:51 Ahaziya mwene Ahabu akatandika kuba omugabe wa Isiraeli omuri Samariya omu mwaka gwa ikumi na mushanju ogwa Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda; yaategyekyera Isiraeli emyaka ebiri. 
1Kings22:52 Akakora ebi Nyakubaho atarikusiima. Yaakuratira emitwarize ya ishe n'eya nyina n'eya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, owaacumwize Isiraeli." 
1Kings22:53 Akaba omuheereza wa Baali, yaataho n'okumuramya. Yaagwisa kubi Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli. Yaamwitsa ekiniga omu muringo gwona, nk'oku ishe yaakimwitsize." 
2Kings1:1 Ahabu ku yaafiire, Abamoabu baagomera Abaisiraeli." 
2Kings1:2 Omu biro ebyo Ahaziya akarengyera aha rukomantiriro rwa kaanyinaabiri y'enju ye omuri Samariya, yaayetuura aha nsi, yaarwara. Ekyarugiremu yaatuma entumwa, yaazigira ati: Nimwirooko mundagurize ahari Baalizebubu, ruhanga wa Ekurooni, yaaba niinyija kukira egi ndwara." 
2Kings1:3 Kwonka maraika wa Nyakubaho akagambira Eliya Omutishibi ati: Imuka oze kubugana entumwa zirikuruga aha mugabe wa Samariya, ozigire oti: Ekirikuza kukuraguzisa ahari Baalizebubu, ruhanga wa Ekurooni, n'ahabw'okuba tihariho Ruhanga omuri Isiraeli." 
2Kings1:4 Mbwenu Nyakubaho naagira ati: Torikwija kuruga aha kishego ki oriho; kureka buzimazima noija kufa. Eliya atyo agyenda. 
2Kings1:5 Entumwa ku zaagarukire aha mugabe, yaazibuuza ati: Mwagarurwa ki?" 
2Kings1:6 Zaamugarukamu ziti: Hariho omushaija waatubugana, akatugira ati: Mugarukye aha mugabe owaabatuma, mumugire muti: Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Ekirikuza kukuraguzisa ahari Baalizebubu, ruhanga wa Ekurooni, n'ahabw'okuba tihariho Ruhanga omuri Isiraeli? Mbwenu nu torikwija kuruga aha kishego ki oriho; kureka buzimazima noija kufa." 
2Kings1:7 Nawe ababuuza ati: Ni muntu ki ogwo owaababugana, akabagambira atyo?" 
2Kings1:8 Bamugarukamu bati: Yaaba ajwaire ekijwaro ky'ebyoya, ayezirikire orukoba. Abagira ati: Ni Eliya Omutishibi." 
2Kings1:9 Mpaho omugabe amutumaho omukuru w'engabo makumi ataano hamwe n'engabo ze. Nawe agyenda, ashanga Eliya ashutami omu mutwe gw'ekibungo. Amugira ti: Muntu wa Ruhanga 'we, omugabe yaakutumaho ati: Rugayo." 
2Kings1:10 Eliya agarukamu ogwo mukuru w'engabo makumi ataano ati: Ku ndaabe ndi omuntu wa Ruhanga; omuriro nigukarugye omu iguru, gukakucwekyereza n'engabo zaawe makumi ataano! Omuriro gutyo gutimbira omu iguru, gumucwekyereza n'engabo ze makumi ataano." 
2Kings1:11 Omugabe agaruka amutumaho ondiijo mukuru w'engabo ze makumi ataano, hamwe n'engabo ze makumi ataano. Azayo amugira ati: Iwe muntu wa Ruhanga 'we, omugabe yaakuragiira ati: Rugayo ahonaaho." 
2Kings1:12 Eliya abagarukamu ati: ku ndaabe ndi omuntu wa Ruhanga, omuriro nigukarugye omu iguru, gukakucwekyereza n'ezi ngabo zaawe makumi ataano. Omuriro gwa Ruhanga gutyo gutimbira omu iguru, gumucwekyereza n'engabo ze makumi ataano." 
2Kings1:13 Omugabe ayongyera atuma omukuru wa kashatu w'engabo makumi ataano, hamwe n'engabo ze makumi ataano. Ogwo mukuru wa kashatu ow'engabo makumi ataano agyenda; ahika Eliya, amutsimbira amaju, amweshengyereza ati: Iwe muntu wa Ruhanga 'we ninkweshengyereza, ngirira esaasi nyowe n'aba bairu baawe makumi ataano, orekye kutwita." 
2Kings1:14 Reeba omuriro gutimbiire omu iguru, gwacwekyereza abakuru babiri ab'engabo makumi ataano abaabandize, hamwe n'engabo zaabo makumi ataano-ataano. Mbwenu k'amagara gangye gabe ag'obuguzi bwingi omu maisho gaawe." 
2Kings1:15 Mpaho maraika wa Nyakubaho agambira Eliya ati: Shuuma nawe, otamutiina. Atyo Eliya aimuka, ashuuma n'ogwo mukuru w'engabo, bahika omugabe." 
2Kings1:16 Eliya amugambira ati: Mukama yaagira ati: Waaza kutuma entumwa kuraguza ahari Baalizebubu, ruhanga wa Ekurooni, haaba hatariho Ruhanga omuri Isiraeli, kugira eki waamwehanuuzaho? Mbwenu nu, torikwija kuruga aha kishego ki oriho; kureka buzimazima noija kufa." 
2Kings1:17 Ahaziya atyo afa, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaakigambiise Eliya. Omurumuna Yehoraamu ayema omu mwanya gwe omu mwaka gwa kabiri, ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda. Ahabw'okuba Ahaziya akafa ataine mutabani." 
2Kings1:18 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ei Ahaziya yaakozire ehandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli. 
2Kings2:1 Mbwenu Nyakubaho ku yaabaire ari haihi kutwara Eliya omu iguru, naamutwaza omuyaga gw'akasooroora, Eliya na Elisha bakaba bari omu muhanda, nibaruga Giligaali." 
2Kings2:2 Eliya yaagira Elisha ati: Naakweshengyereza ba ori aha, ahabw'okuba Mukama yantuma Beteli. Kwonka Elisha yaamugira ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho, kandi buso bwawe, tindikwija kukurugaho. Batyo bashuuma, baza Beteli." 
2Kings2:3 Ab'ekigombe ky'abarangi ab'omuri Beteli baija, baahika Elisha baamugira bati: Noomanya ku eri izooba Nyakubaho arikwija kukwihaho mukama waawe, akamutwara? Nawe agira ati: Eego, ninkimanya; kwonka nimucecekye." 
2Kings2:4 Eliya agira Elisha ati: Elisha, ninkweshengyereza, ba ori aha, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho yantuma Yeriko. Kwonka onu amugira ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho, kandi buso bwawe, tindikwija kukurugaho. Batyo bahika Yeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Ab'ekigombe ky'abarangi b'omuri Yeriko bahika Elisha bati: Noomanya ku eri izooba Nyakubaho arikwija kukwihaho mukama waawe, akamutwara? Nawe agira ati: Eego, ninkimanya, kwonka nimucecekye." 
2Kings2:6 Bwanyima Eliya amugira ati: Naakweshengyereza, ba ori aha, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho yantuma Yorudaani. Nawe amugira ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho, kandi buso bwawe, tindikwija kukurugaho. Batyo bombi bagumizamu." 
2Kings2:7 Abashaija makumi ataano ab'ekigombe ky'abarangi nabo bagyenda, babeemerera hangahari; obwo Eliya na Elisha beemereire aha rubaju rwa Yorudaani." 
2Kings2:8 Bwanyima Eliya ayejuura omunagiro agukubakuba aguteeza amaizi; geebaganisamu orubaju n'orubaju, okuhitsya bombi obu baayambukiire ahoomire." 
2Kings2:9 Ku baaherize kwambuka, Eliya yaagira Elisha ati: Nshaba eki ndaakukorere ntakakwihirweho. Elisha amugira ati: Ninkweshengyereza, ndaga ntungye emigabo ebiri y'amaani g'omutima gwawe." 
2Kings2:10 Onu amugarukamu ati: Eki waashaba kugumire. Kwonka ekyo noija kukitunga wandeeba ninkwihwaho. Reero ku oraabe otandeebire, tikirikwija kuba kwo." 
2Kings2:11 Mbwenu ku baabaire nibakigyenda nibagaaniira, ahonaaho ekigaari ky'omuriro n'embaraasi z'omuriro byabataanisa, Eliya yaatwarwa omu iguru omuyaga gw'akasooroora." 
2Kings2:12 Elisha yaakireeba yaaborooga ati: Taata, taata! Ebigaari bya Isiraeli n'abatembi baayo b'embaraasi! Atyo tagira bu amureebire obundi." 
2Kings2:13 Bwanyima akwata ebi ajwaire, abitaaguramu ebicweka bibiri. Aihaho omunagiro gwa Eliya ogwamuragara, agarukayo, ayemerera aha nkungu ya Yorudaani." 
2Kings2:14 Reero akwata ogwo munagiro gwa Eliya ogwamuragara, aguteeza amaizi naagira ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Eliya arahi? Ku aguteeza amaizi, ago maizi geebaganisamu, na Elisha ayambuka." 
2Kings2:15 Mbwenu ab'ekigombe ky'abarangi ab'omuri Yeriko ku baamureebire yaayambuka ashungaine nabo, baagira bati: Amaani ga Mutima wa Eliya gaaza ahari Elisha. Batyo baija kumubugana, baamutangirira bajuumaire." 
2Kings2:16 Baamugira bati: Reeba, itwe abaheereza baawe twine aha abashaija makumi ataano b'amaani. Mbwenu twakweshengyereza, obaikirize baze kusherura mukama waawe. Obundi Mutima wa Nyakubaho akaaba yaamukiriza, akamunaga omu rushozi nari omu ruhanga. Abagarukamu ati: Mutaboohereza." 
2Kings2:17 Kwonka ku baamwotereize, yaarugaho yaitwa enshoni, yaabagira ati: Nimuboohereze. Nabo baayohereza abashaija makumi ataano, baamurondera ebiro bishatu; kwonka tibaamubona." 
2Kings2:18 Baagaruka, baashanga akiri Yeriko. Nawe yaabagira ati: Mbwenu timbagizire nti: Mutagyenda?" 
2Kings2:19 Mbwenu abantu b'omu rurembo bakagira Elisha bati: Mukama waitu, nk'oku orikureeba ahu orurembo rwombekirwe ni harungi, kwonka amaizi gaaho ni mabi, n'eitaka tiririkweza." 
2Kings2:20 Abagira ati: Nimundeetere orwabya rusya, murutemu omwonyo; nabo barumureetera." 
2Kings2:21 Atyo aza aha nshuro y'amaizi, aginagamu omwonyo. Agira ati: Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Aga maizi naagahindura amanure. Okwiha hati tigariita kandi tigaritoroozya." 
2Kings2:22 Haza ago maizi gaaguma gari amanure, okuhitsya n'eri izooba, nk'oku Elisha yaakigambire." 
2Kings2:23 Ku yaarugire okwo, yainamuka yaaza Beteli. Reero ku yaabaire akiri omu muhanda naazayo, abaana baaruga omu rurembo baamugaaniiza nibagira bati: Iwe mushaija w'oruhara 'we, irooko ogyende! iwe mushaija w'oruhara' we, irooko ogyende!" 
2Kings2:24 Atyo ahinduka. Ku abareeba, abakyeena omu iziina rya Nyakubaho. Ago magingo ebuguma z'edubu ziruga omu kibira, zibataagataaguramu aboojo makumi ana na babiri." 
2Kings2:25 Ku aruga okwo, agumizamu aza omu Rushozi rwa Karumeeli. Bwanyima arugayo, agaruka Samariya." 
2Kings3:1 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi na munaana ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda, Yehoraamu mwene Ahabu akaba omugabe wa Isiraeli omuri Samariya; yaamara aha ngoma emyaka ikumi n'ebiri." 
2Kings3:2 Yaakora ebirikugwisa kubi Nyakubaho; nobu araabe atarashushaine na ishe na nyina, ahabw'okuba we akahigura enyomyo ya Baali ei ishe yaabaire abyaire." 
2Kings3:3 Kwonka akaguma naakora ekibi kya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati eki yaacumuziise Isiraeli, tiyaakireka." 
2Kings3:4 Mbwenu Meesha omugabe wa Moabu akaba ari omworozi w'entaama. Buri mwaka naatoijera omugabe wa Isiraeli abaana b'entaama akasiriira kamwe n'ebyoya by'empaya z'entaama akasiriira kamwe. 
2Kings3:5 Kwonka Ahabu ku yaafiire, omugabe wa Moabu yaagomera omugabe wa Isiraeli." 
2Kings3:6 Omugabe Yehoraamu nikwo kuruga Samariya omu bunaku obwo, akahuruza Isiraeli yoona." 
2Kings3:7 Akatuma ahari Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda ati: Mbwenu omugabe wa Moabu angomeire. Mbwenu noija kuhurura naanye tukateera Moabu? Onu amugarukamu ati: Eego, niinyija kuhurura. Manya nyowe naiwe turi bamwe, abantu bangye nibo bantu baawe, n'embaraasi zangye nizo zaawe." 
2Kings3:8 Bwanyima amubuuza ati: Tuhurure nitutoora muhanda ki? Yehoraamu amugarukamu ati: Tutoore ogw'eihamba rya Edomu. 
2Kings3:9 Atyo omugabe wa Isiraeli ahurura, n'omugabe wa Yuda n'owa Edomu. Ku baagyenzire orugyendo rw'ebiro mushanju nibeekiikuura, baabura amaizi g'okuha eihe ryabo, n'enyamaishwa zi baagyenzire nazo." 
2Kings3:10 Omugabe wa Isiraeli nikwo kuborooga ati: Ai bambe! Nyakubaho atureetsire aha abagabe twenshatu kuturekurira omugabe wa Moabu. 
2Kings3:11 Yehoshafaati amubuuza ati: Beitu kunu tihariyo murangi wa Nyakubaho, ou twakwehanuuzaho ahari Nyakubaho? Omwe aha bagaragwa b'omugabe wa Isiraeli agarukamu ati: Kunu hariyo Elisha mwene Shafati, owaabaire anaabisa Eliya engaro." 
2Kings3:12 Yehoshafaati agira ati: Ogwo niwe aine ekigambo kya Nyakubaho. Omugabe wa Isiraeli na Yehoshafaati n'omugabe wa Edomu nikwo kugyenda, bakaza ei ari." 
2Kings3:13 Elisha agira omugabe wa Isiraeli ati: Nyine kakwate ki naiwe? Irooko oyehanuuze aha barangi abaragurira sho na nyoko. Omugabe wa Isiraeli amugira ati: Ngaaha! Nyakubaho niwe atuhurwize, itwe abagabe twenshatu, ngu aturekurire omugabe wa Moabu." 
2Kings3:14 Elisha amugira ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho ow'amahe, ou mpeereza; kuri ntaagirira nshoni Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda, tinkukucwire ryera, nobu kwakuba okukureeba." 
2Kings3:15 Kwonka hati nimundeetere omuteezi w'enanga. Omuteezi w'enanga ku yaagiteire, amaani ga Nyakubaho gaamuzamu." 
2Kings3:16 Yaabagira ati: Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Ogu mukura gwomire, naaza kugwijuza ebiyanja." 
2Kings3:17 Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho naagira ati: Timurikwija kureeba muyaga nari njura; kwonka ogu mukura nigwija kwijura amaizi, muganywe, imwe n'amatungo gaanyu, n'enyamaishwa zaanyu." 
2Kings3:18 Ekyo n'ekintu kyanguhi ahari Nyakubaho; kandi naija kubarekurira Abamoabu, mubasingure." 
2Kings3:19 Musingure na ibara rurembo rw'ebigo bigumire, n'orurembo rwona orurungi, muteme emiti yoona emirungi, mwigare enshuro z'amaizi zoona, mwijuze emisiri yaabo emirungi amabaare, mugishiishe." 
2Kings3:20 Akasheeshe kaakuratsireho, omu bunaku bu batambiramu ekitambo, ahonaaho amaizi gaahimintika nigaruga orubaju rwa Edomu, okuhitsya obu gaijwire ekyo kyanga." 
2Kings3:21 Abamoabu boona ku baahuriire ngu abo bagabe baizire kubarwanisa, baahuruza abantu boona barikubaasa kujwara eby'okurwanisa, okwiha aha muto okuta aha mukuru; baatengyera orugamba aha mwatano." 
2Kings3:22 Ku baagurukire kare omu kasheeshe eizooba ryayaka aha maizi, Abamoabu baareeba amaizi agabari omu maisho nigatukura nk'eshagama." 
2Kings3:23 Baagira bati: Egi n'eshagama, buzimazima abagabe barwaine baitana. Mbwenu itwe Abamoabu ka tuze kwenyagira eminyago." 
2Kings3:24 Kwonka ku baahikire aha rusiisira rw'Abaisiraeli, Abaisiraeli baimuka baabarwanisa, baababinga, baagyenda nibabaita, okuhitsya obu baabahikize omu nsi yaabo;" 
2Kings3:25 bakacwekyereza endembo zaabo, buri murwani akatambika eibaare omu misiri yaabo emirungi, bakaigara enshuro z'amaizi zoona, bakatema emiti yoona emirungi okuhitsya obu Kirihareseti orurembo rukuru rwatsigaireho rwonka, ab'enjungu bakarugota, bakarusingura." 
2Kings3:26 Omugabe wa Moabu ku yaareebire orugamba rwamugyendera kubi, yaayataguza n'abashaija be magana mushanju enkwata-rurara, kuraba ahu omugabe wa Edomu atengyeire orugamba, ngu abone kumuhika; kwonka tiyaabaasa." 
2Kings3:27 Nikwo kutwara omutabani omukuru owaabaire ari ow'okumuhungurira, akamutambira aha mutwe gw'orugo rw'orurembo kuba ekitambo kicwekize. Haza ekyo kikabiihiza munonga Abaisiraeli, baakambura orusiisira rwabo, baagaruka owaabo." 
2Kings4:1 Mbwenu omufaakazi w'omwe omu b'ekigombe ky'abarangi akatakira Elisha ati: Omuheereza waawe ibanye akafa, kandi noomanya ku omuheereza waawe ogwo yaabaire naatiina Mukama. Mbwenu orikuunyihuza yaija kutwara abaana bangye bombi kuba abahuuku be." 
2Kings4:2 Elisha amubuuza ati: Nooyenda nkukorere ki? Ngambira eki otungire omwawe? Onu amugarukamu ati: Nyowe omuzaana waawe tiinyine kindi eki nyine omu ka, kureka engyemeko y'amajuta." 
2Kings4:3 N'onu amugira ati: Irooko, ogyende otiize omuri bataahi baawe boona engyemeko zirimu busha nyingi, nk'oku orikubaasa." 
2Kings4:4 Bwanyima otaahe omwawe, oyekingirane na batabani baawe, oshukye ago majuta omuri ezo ngyemeko zoona, eraijure, ogite hangahari." 
2Kings4:5 Ogwo mukazi ku amurugaho, ayekingirana n'abatabani; baamureetera engyemeko, aguma naazishukamu amajuta," 
2Kings4:6 engyemeko ku zaijwire, yaagambira omutabani ati: Ndeetera endiijo ngyemeko. Omutabani yaamugarukamu ati: Tihaakiriyo ndiijo. Amajuta gaarekyera aho kwija." 
2Kings4:7 Atyo aija abigambira omushaija wa Ruhanga. N'onu amugira ati: Mbwenu irooko, otunde ago amajuta, oihure amabanja gaawe; bwanyima iwe na batabani baawe mutungwe agaraatsigareho." 
2Kings4:8 Eizooba rimwe Elisha akaza Shuneemu, omukazi waayo omutungi yaamweshengyereza kurya omwe ebyokurya. Okwiha obwo, ku yaabaire atoora ogwo muhanda, ahungukayo kurya ak'okurya." 
2Kings4:9 Ogwo mukazi agira iba ati: Hati naayetegyereza ku ogu mushaija otuura naaturabaho ari omuntu orikwera wa Ruhanga. 
2Kings4:10 Mbwenu ka tumwombekyere akashengye kakye aha mutwe gw'enju, tumuteeremu ekitanda n'emeeza, n'ekitebe n'etabaaza. Ku araagume naaturabaho abe nimwo yaaza." 
2Kings4:11 Eizooba rimwe ku yaizireyo, yaaza omuri ako kashangye, yaahuumura." 
2Kings4:12 Reero yaagira Gehaazi omuheereza we ati: Nyetera ogwo Mushunaamukazi. Ku yaamwetsire, onu yaayemerera omu maisho ge." 
2Kings4:13 Elisha yaagambira omuheereza we ati: Omugire oti: Mbwenu obu otuhendekyeire oti, tukaakukorera ki? Okaayenzire tugire eki twakugambirira omugabe nari omukuru w'amahe? Nawe amugarukamu ati: Ngaaha. Tiinyine ki nkyenire, abu ntwiremu n'abaitu." 
2Kings4:14 Elisha agira ati: Mbwenu shi tumukorere ki? Gehaazi amugarukamu ati: Manya tagira mwana, kandi iba yaabaire omugurusi." 
2Kings4:15 Elisha agira ati: Mwete. N'onu ku yaamwetsire, ogwo mukazi yaayemerera omu muryango." 
2Kings4:16 Elisha yaamugira ati: Omu bunaku nk'obu, omwaka ogurikwija, oryakiikira omwana w'omwojo. Nawe amugarukamu ati: Ngaaha, mukama wangye, iwe muntu wa Ruhanga 'we, reka kumbeiha, nyowe omuzaana waawe." 
2Kings4:17 Bwanyima ogwo mukazi yaabaka enda, yaazaara omutabani omu bunaku nk'obwo omu itogyera, nk'oku Elisha yaamugambiire." 
2Kings4:18 Ogwo mwana ku yaakuzire, eizooba rimwe yaaza kushanga ishe omu bagyesi." 
2Kings4:19 Yaagira ishe ati: Ai bambe! Omutwe gwanyita! Omutwe gwanyita! Ishe nikwo kuragiira omuhuuku we ati: Mutwarire nyina. 
2Kings4:20 Onu amuheeka, amutwarira nyina. Ku amumuhitsya, omwana ashutama aha bibero bya nyina okuhitsya omu ihangwe, atyo akaba." 
2Kings4:21 Mpaho nyina anyegyera amurambika aha kitanda ky'ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga, amukingiraniramu, ashohora." 
2Kings4:22 Bwanyima ayeta iba, amugira ati: Nyoherereza omwe aha bambari baawe n'endogoya emwe, nze ahonaaho ow'omushaija wa Ruhanga, haza ngarukye juba." 
2Kings4:23 Iba amubuuza ati: Ekirikukuhuuta owe eri izooba ni ki? Okwezi kutakabonekire, kandi k'etari Sabato! Onu amugarukamu ati: Fa okundeka!" 
2Kings4:24 Atyo atandiika endogoya, reero agambira omwambari we ati: Irukanzya egi ndogoya, haza oteetwara, ntakugambiire." 
2Kings4:25 Atyo agyenda ashanga omuntu wa Ruhanga omu Rushozi rwa Karumeeli. Omushaija wa Ruhanga ku amureeba naija, agira Gehaazi omuheereza we ati: Reeba, oriya n'Omushuneemukazi ori." 
2Kings4:26 Iruka ahonaaho omubugane, haza omubuuze oti: Ni buhooro? Baro agumire? N'omwana waawe agumire? Omukazi amugarukamu ati: Ni buhooro." 
2Kings4:27 Ku yaahikire omu rushozi, ahu omuntu wa Ruhanga ari, amukwata amaguru. Gehaazi aija kumutsindika. Kwonka omuntu wa Ruhanga amugira ati: Murekye, ahabw'okuba aine enaku nyingi, kandi Nyakubaho akinsherekire tiyaakingambira." 
2Kings4:28 Bwanyima omukazi amugira ati: Mukama wangye, niinye naakushabire omwana w'omwojo? Tindakugizire nti: Otambeiha?" 
2Kings4:29 Elisha agira Gehaazi ati: Yezirikye, otware enkoni yangye, ogyende. Haza ku oraagire ou waabugana, otamuramutsya, kandi ku haraagire owaakuramutsya omwetsize. Reero egi nkoni yangye ogirambikye aha mwana." 
2Kings4:30 Nyina w'ogwo mwana agira ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho, kandi kukwambura, tindikwija kukutsiga aha! Elisha aimuka, agyenda nawe amukuratiire." 
2Kings4:31 Gehaazi we agyenda abeebembeire, arambika enkoni ahari ogwo mwana; kwonka habura akateezo nari akamanyiso k'ohuriire. Atyo agarukayo kubugana Elisha, amugira ati: Omwana tiyaahimbuuka." 
2Kings4:32 Elisha ku yaahikireyo, yaashanga arambiire aha kitanda kye akabire." 
2Kings4:33 Atyo ataaha omu nju, ayekingiranamu nawe, ashaba Nyakubaho." 
2Kings4:34 Bwanyima aza aha kitanda, ayegororera aha mwana eminwa ye agitaire aha minwa y'ogwo mwana, amaisho ge agataire aha ge, n'engaro ze azitaire aha ze. Reero ku yaamwegororoireho, omubiri gw'omwana gwatagata." 
2Kings4:35 Mpaho Elisha aimuka, agyendagyenda omu nju, naakora oku n'oku. Bwanyima agaruka aha kitanda, amwegororeraho. Ogwo mwana ayetsyamura emirundi mushanju, abuuruura amaisho." 
2Kings4:36 Elisha ayeta Gehaazi, amugira ati: Yeta ogwo Mushunaamukazi. N'onu amweta. Omukazi ku yaamuhikire, Elisha yaamugira ati: Ihaho omwana waawe." 
2Kings4:37 Ogwo mukazi aija, amugwa omu maguru ajuumaire aha nsi. Atyo aihaho omwana we, ashohora." 
2Kings4:38 Bwanyima Elisha akagaruka Giligaali omu biro bi enjara yaabaire eteereiremu ensi. Mbwenu ab'ekigombe ky'abarangi ku baabaire bashutami hamwe nawe, yaagira omuheereza we ati: Ta enyungu mpango aha mahega, obateekyere omujurugye." 
2Kings4:39 Omwe aharibo nikwo kushohora, akaza omu musiri kushoroma emboga. Akahikira aha kihambo, akakishoromaho emyongo y'emirura, akagiijuza ekikondooro, akaija, akagikyeka, akagita omu nyungu y'okugijurugiramu, atagimanyire." 
2Kings4:40 Batyo bagiihurira abantu kugirya. Kwonka ku baabaire nibarya ogwo mujurugye, baaborooga bati: Ai bambe! muntu wa Ruhanga, omu nyungu harimu orufu. Baremwa kugurya." 
2Kings4:41 Nawe abagira ati: Nimundeetere ebyo byokurya. Abishuka omu nyungu, agira ati: Mbwenu nimubiihurire abantu babirye. Reero bashanga omu nyungu hatakirimu kirikwita." 
2Kings4:42 Kandi obundi, omuntu akaruga Baalishalisha, areeteire ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga emigaati y'omuganuro makumi abiri ya baare n'obushiisha bw'engano omu nshaho ye. Elisha yaagira omuheereza we ati: Bigaburire abantu barye." 
2Kings4:43 Kwonka we yaamubuuza ati: Nimbaasa nta kubigaburira abantu igana? Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Bihe abantu, babirye; ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Nibaija kurya bibaremereho." 
2Kings4:44 Nawe abibaihurira. Barya bibaremeraho, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaakigambire." 
2Kings5:1 Naamani omukuru w'eihe ry'omugabe wa Siriya, akaba ari omuntu w'ekitiinwa, orikusiimwa munonga mukama we, ahabw'okuba ahabwe Nyakubaho akaba ahaire Siriya obusinguzi. Akaba ari omushaija rugambwa enkwata-ngabo, kwonka ari omubembe." 
2Kings5:2 Mbwenu obundi omu hururu, Abasiriya bakanyaga omu nsi ya Isiraeli akaishiki, kaaguma nikaheereza muka Naamani." 
2Kings5:3 Eizooba rimwe kaagira mugore waako kati: Nkaabaasibwa ki mukama wangye ogu ahika omurangi w'omuri Samariya! Ebishi akaamutambira ebibembe! 
2Kings5:4 Naamani nikwo kuza owa mukama we, akamugira ati: Omuzaana u twanyagire omuri Isiraeli yaagira ati n'ati." 
2Kings5:5 Omugabe wa Siriya amugira ati: Mbwenu irooko, ozeyo; naanye niinyija kutwekyera omugabe wa Isiraeli ebaruha. Naamani atyo agyenda n'empiiha z'efeeza obukumi mukaaga n'ez'ezaabu enkumi mukaaga n'ebijwaro ikumi by'okwihaihanisa aha magyenyi." 
2Kings5:6 Atyo areetera omugabe wa Isiraeli ebaruha erikugira ati: Naakutwekyera ebaruha yangye egi, hamwe n'omukungu wangye Naamani, ngu omutambire ebibembe." 
2Kings5:7 Omugabe wa Isiraeli ku yaashomire egyo baruha, yaataagura ebi ajwaire, yaagira ati: Mbwenu shi nyowe ndi Ruhanga, oita akakiza, ogu muntu yaaza kuntumaho ngu ntambire omushaija we ebibembe? Nimwetegyereze, mureebe oku arikuntaaza entongane." 
2Kings5:8 Kwonka omuntu wa Ruhanga ku yaahuriire ngu omugabe wa Isiraeli ataagwire ebi ajwaire, yaamutumaho naagira ati: Ahabw'enki otaagwire ebi ojwaire? Omurekye aija ahi ndi, abone kumanya ku omuri Isiraeli harimu omurangi." 
2Kings5:9 Naamani nikwo kwija n'embaraasi ye n'ebigaari, akeemerera aha muryango gw'enju ya Elisha." 
2Kings5:10 Elisha akamutumaho omuntu naamugira ati: Irooko, oyogye omuri Yorudaani emirundi mushanju; omubiri gwawe gukire, oshemere." 
2Kings5:11 Kwonka Naamani agira ekiniga, agyenda naayetomboita ati: Nimureebe mihi! Nyowe naaba ningira ngu buzimazima naija kushohora, ampikye, ayemerere atakire Mukama Ruhanga we, ahungyeseze omukono gwe aharwaire, ankize ebibembe." 
2Kings5:12 Mbwenu Abana na Farapa emigyera ya Damasiko terikuhita amaizi g'omuri Isiraeli goona? Tinkaagyogyeiremu, nkashemera? Atyo akuba agyenda, ekiniga kiri ekyokumubarura." 
2Kings5:13 Kwonka abagaragwa be bamugira bati: Taata, ogwo murangi kuri yaakuragiira kukora ekintu kihango, tokukikozire? Kaashwa ngu yaakugira ati: Yoga, oshemere?" 
2Kings5:14 Atyo ashuuma ayejabika omuri Yorudaani emirundi mushanju, nk'oku omuntu wa Ruhanga yaamugambiire. Gutyo omubiri gwe gukira, guba nk'ogw'omwana muto, ashemera." 
2Kings5:15 Bwanyima we n'abu yaabaire aine boona baagaruka ahari ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga. Ku yaamuhikire, yaayemerera omu maisho ge, yaamugira ati: Hati naamanya omu nsi yoona ku hatarimu Ruhanga, kureka omuri Isiraeli. Mbwenu ninkweshengyereza, ikiriza omukimbo gu nyowe omwiru waawe naakureetera." 
2Kings5:16 Kwonka Elisha amugira ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho, ou mpeereza, tindikwija kugira ekintu kyona eki naayakiira. Amugyemesereza kugwakiira, kwonka onu ayanga." 
2Kings5:17 Bwanyima Naamani agira ati: Mbwenu nu, waayangire omukimbo gwangye, naakweshengyereza, ompe eitaka ririkwekorerwa enyumbu ibiri, ahabw'okuba okwiha hati tinditambira ruhanga ondi weena ebitambo bicwekize nari ebindi bitambo, kureka Nyakubaho." 
2Kings5:18 Kwonka omuri ekyo, Nyakubaho ansaasire, mukama wangye ku ariza omu ndaaro ya Rimoni kuramizamu anyegamiire omukono, naaramiza omu ndaaro ya Rimoni, ku ndigiramizamu nyinami, ekyo Nyakubaho akinsaasire." 
2Kings5:19 Elisha amugarukamu ati: Gyenda n'obusingye. Kwonka Naamani ku yaabaire yaaruga ati ahari Elisha; 
2Kings5:20 Gehaazi omugaragwa wa Elisha omuntu wa Ruhanga yaagira ati: Mbwenu mukama wangye yaayangire kutwara eki Naamani Omusiriya yaamukimbira, nyowe nindahira Nyakubaho, naaza kwiruka mmukurate, ngire eki naamwihaho." 
2Kings5:21 Gehaazi atyo akurata Naamani. Naamani ku areeba hariho omukuratiire nairuka, atemburuka aha kigaari kumubugana. Amugira ati: Ni buhooro?" 
2Kings5:22 Gehaazi ati: Eego, ni buhooro; mukama wangye yaakuntumaho ati: Omuri ago magingo haija abatsigazi babiri b'omu kigombe ky'abarangi, nibaruga omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, ninkushaba obampeere empiiha enkumi mukaaga z'efeeza n'ebijwaro bibiri by'okwihaihanisa aha magyenyi." 
2Kings5:23 Naamani amugarukamu ati: Naakweshengyereza, twara akakumi kamwe n'enkumi ibiri. Atyo amwehanangiriza, amukomera empiiha kakumi n'enkumi ibiri, hamwe n'ebijwaro bibiri by'okwihaihanisa aha magyenyi. Abyekoreza abairu be babiri bagyenda babyekoreire, beebembeire Gehaazi." 
2Kings5:24 Ku baahikire omu kibungo, Gehaazi yaabibaihaho, yaabitaasya omu nju, yaaboohereza, baagarukayo." 
2Kings5:25 Yaataaha omu nju, yaayemerera omu maisho ga mukama we. Elisha nikwo kumubuuza ati: Gehaazi, waaba ogiire hi? Onu amugarukamu ati: Nywe omwiru waawe naaba ntaine hi ngiire." 
2Kings5:26 Kwonka onu amwemeza ati: Omutima gwangye gwaba gutari hamwe naiwe, obu ogwo muntu yaaruga aha kigaari kye kukubugana? Obwo nibwo bwaba buri obunaku bw'okwakiira empiiha n'ebijwaro, emisiri y'emioliva n'ey'emizaabibu, nainga ente n'entaama, nari abahuuku n'abazaana?" 
2Kings5:27 Mbwenu nu, ebibembe bya Naamani byaza kukubaho akaramata, iwe n'abaijukuru baawe ebiro byona. Gehaazi atyo amurugaho abembire, omubiri gwe nigwera nk'orubaare." 
2Kings6:1 Ab'ekigombe ky'abarangi bakagira Elisha bati: Reeba, omwanya gu orikureeberera, ogu tutwiremu, tugufunziremu." 
2Kings6:2 Mbwenu ka tuze Yorudaani, twetemere emiti, tweyombekyereyo amaka g'okutuuramu. Nawe abagarukamu ati: Nimwirooko." 
2Kings6:3 Reero omwe omuribo amugira ati: Twakweshengyereza, ikiriza ogyende naitwe abairu baawe. Agarukamu ati: Eego, niinyija kugyenda." 
2Kings6:4 Atyo agyenda nabo. Ku baahikire ahari Yorudaani, baatema emiti." 
2Kings6:5 Kwonka omwe aharibo ku yaabaire naatema ekiti, empango yaakuuka, yaagwa omu maizi; yaaborooga ati: Ai bambe! mukama wangye, yaaba eri entiizano." 
2Kings6:6 Mpaho omushaija wa Ruhanga amubuuza ati: Yaagwa hi? Onu ku yaamworekire ahi yaagwa, Elisha yaatema akati, yaakanagamu, egyo mpango yaatuuhuukayo." 
2Kings6:7 Yaamugira ati: Giihemu. Nawe agikununkirira, agiihamu." 
2Kings6:8 Eizooba rimwe, omugabe wa Siriya ku yaabaire naarwana orugamba n'Abaisiraeli, yaahanuura n'abakungu be ati: Orusiisira rwangye niinyija kuruteera omu mwanya nanka na nanka." 
2Kings6:9 Haza Elisha omuntu wa Ruhanga yaatuma aha mugabe wa Isiraeli ati: Oyerinde, otaraba omuri ogwo mwanya, ahabw'okuba Abasiriya niyo bari, bakugwereire." 
2Kings6:10 Omugabe wa Isiraeli nikwo kutuma abantu omuri ogwo mwanya ogu omuntu wa Ruhanga yaamugambiire. Okwo nikwo Elisha yaabaire abaguriza omugabe, n'onu akeejuna emirundi mingi gutari gumwe nari ebiri." 
2Kings6:11 Reero ekyo kikeemerezesa omugabe wa Siriya omutima, yaayeta abakungu be, yaababuuza ati: Timukangambira omuntu w'omuriitwe, oine ekimwe n'omugabe wa Isiraeli?" 
2Kings6:12 Omwe aha bakungu be yaamugarukamu ati: Ngaaha, Nyakusinga omugabe, omurangi w'omuri Isiraeli niwe agambira omugabe waayo ebi ogambira omu kishengye kyawe eki oraaramu." 
2Kings6:13 Nawe agira ati: Nimwirooko, mureebe ahu ari, ntume ab'okumukwata. Bamugira bati: Manya, ari Dotani." 
2Kings6:14 Mpaho atumayo ab'ahambaraasi n'ab'ebigaari, n'eihe rihango. Bahikayo nyekiro, bagota orurembo." 
2Kings6:15 Omugaragwa w'omuntu wa Ruhanga ku yaimukire kare omu kasheeshe, yaashohora, yaareeba eihe ry'ab'embaraasi n'ab'ebigaari rigotsire orurembo. Yaaborooga ati: Ai bambe, mukama wangye! Tukore ki?" 
2Kings6:16 Onu amugira ati: Otatiina! Abari hamwe naitwe ni baingi okukira abari hamwe nabo. 
2Kings6:17 Bwanyima Elisha ashaba ati: Ai Mukama, ninkweshengyereza, omuhwezese. Nyakubaho ahwezesa ogwo mutsigazi areeba ahonaaho orushozi rwijwire ab'embaraasi n'ab'ebigaari by'omuriro beehinguririize Elisha." 
2Kings6:18 Abasiriya ku baizire kumurwanisa Elisha yaashaba Nyakubaho ati: Ninkweshengyereza humya aba bantu. Nawe abahumya nk'oku Elisha yaamushaba. 
2Kings6:19 Na Elisha abagira ati: Muhabire omuhanda, oru tirwo rurembo. Mbwenu nimunkurate, mbahitsye omuntu murikusherura. Abeebembera, abahitsya Samariya." 
2Kings6:20 Ku bahika bati omuri Samariya, Elisha ashaba ati: Ai Nyakubaho, humuura amaisho g'aba bantu, bareebe. Na Nyakubaho abahumuura amaisho, bareeba. Ku baza kugira bati, bashanga bari omuri Samariya." 
2Kings6:21 Omugabe wa Isiraeli ku abareeba, abuuza Elisha ati: Taata, mbaite? Mbaite?" 
2Kings6:22 Onu amugarukamu ati: Otabaita. Mbwenu okaita abu okwatsire obasingwize rurara yaawe n'obuta bwawe? Bahe emigaati n'amaizi barye banywe, bagarukye owa mukama waabo." 
2Kings6:23 Atyo abateekyera obugyenyi buhango. Ku baheza kurya n'okunywa, aboohereza bagyenda, baza owa mukama waabo. Abasiriya tibagaruka kuteera nsi ya Isiraeli bundi." 
2Kings6:24 Ku haahingwireho ebiro Benihadadi omugabe wa Siriya yaahuruza eihe rye ryona, yaagyenda yaagota Samariya." 
2Kings6:25 Ahabw'okwo kugotwa, Samariya yaateerwa enjara nyingi, okuhitsya obu omutwe gw'endogoya gwaguzire shilingi makumi munaana z'efeeza na kimwe kya kana ky'akaabya k'amatotoro g'enkombe kikagura shilingi itaano z'efeeza." 
2Kings6:26 Mbwenu omugabe wa Isiraeli ku yaabaire naaraba aha mutwe gw'ekigo, omukazi yaamutakira naagira ati: Mukama wangye, Nyakusinga, njuna!" 
2Kings6:27 Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Mukama ku araabe atakujunire, nyowe niinyiha hi eky'okukujunisa? Nkiihe omu ihuuriro, nari omu inyuukiro?" 
2Kings6:28 Omugabe ayongyera amubuuza ati: Noosaasibwa ki? Onu amuragukamu ati: Ogu mukazi angizire ati: Mpa mutabani waawe tumurye eri izooba: reero nyencakare turye owangye. 
2Kings6:29 Tutyo twateeka mutabani wangye, twamurya. Aha izooba rikuratsireho naamugira nti: Naiwe reeta mutabani waawe, tumurye, kwonka we yaamushereka." 
2Kings6:30 Omugabe ku yaahuriire ebi ogwo mukazi yaagamba, yaataagura ebi ajwaire, obwo akaba naaraba aha mutwe gw'ekigo. Abantu baanagayo eriisho, baareeba ajwariire ekiguniya omunda y'ebi ajwaire." 
2Kings6:31 Haza yaagira ati: Ruhanga akinture n'okukiraho, Elisha mwene Shafati ku yaakutsigaza omutwe aha mabega ge eri izooba." 
2Kings6:32 Obwo Elisha akaba ashutami omu nju ye, hamwe n'abakuru omu ihanga. Omugabe yaayoherezayo omuntu omu bu yaabaire aine. Entumwa ku yaabaire etakahikireyo, Elisha yaagambira abo bakuru omu ihanga ati: Mwareeba oku ogwo mwitsi yaatuma ku bantemaho omutwe? Mbwenu egyo ntumwa ku eraija, mukingye orwigi muruhamye, erekye kutaahamu. Kandi shi emitsindo ya mukama we temuri enyima?" 
2Kings6:33 Ku yaabaire naakigamba nabo, entumwa yaamuhika, yaamugira eti: Manya ezi naku zoohereziibwe Nyakubaho. Mbwenu nkimwiniireho ki amatsiko?" 
2Kings7:1 Kwonka Elisha yaagira ati: Nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikugamba naagira ati: Nyencakare nk'aga magingo, encuro emwe y'esaano y'obunono neija kugura empiiha emwe y'efeeza, n'encuro ibiri za baare, zigure empiiha emwe y'efeeza aha irembo rya Samariya." 
2Kings7:2 Reero omukuru w'engabo, ou omugabe yaabaire ayegamira, yaagarukamu omuntu wa Ruhanga ati: Nobu Nyakubaho yaakugwisa enjura, hoona ekyo kintu kikaabakwo? Onu amugira ati: N'oija kukyereebera; kwonka ebyo torikwija kubiryaho." 
2Kings7:3 Obwo aha irembo hakaba hariho abashaija bana ababembe; baagambirana bati: Ekirikutushutamya aha, okuhitsya obu turaafe, niki?" 
2Kings7:4 Ku turaagire tuti, ka tutaahe omu rurembo, orwo rurembo rurimu enjara, neija kutwitiramu. Kandi nobu turaagume tushutami aha, nabwo nitufa. Mbwenu nimwije tuze seeri aha rusiisira rw'Abasiriya. Ku baraabe batatwitsire, nituguma tuhuriire, reero ku baraatwite, tufe." 
2Kings7:5 Batyo baimuka omu rwita waabo kuza aha rusiisira rw'Abasiriya. Kwonka ku baahikire ahu orusiisira rw'Abasiriya rurikutandikira, baashanga hataine muntu weena oriyo;" 
2Kings7:6 ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akareetera eihe ry'Abasiriya kuhurira endigito y'ebigaari n'ey'embaraasi n'ey'eihe rihango, baagambirana bati: Reeba omugabe wa Isiraeli aguririire abagabe b'Abahiiti n'aba Misiri kututeera." 
2Kings7:7 Batyo baahunga omu rwitawaabo, baatsigaho amahema gaabo n'embaraasi zaabo n'endogoya zaabo. Baatsigaho n'orusiisira rwabo, nk'oku ruri: baahunga kukiza amagara." 
2Kings7:8 Abo babembe ku baahikire ahu orusiisira rurikutandikira, baataaha omu ihema baarya, baanywa; kandi baatwara efeeza n'ezaabu n'eby'okujwara, baagyenda baabishereka. Bwanyima baagaruka, baataaha omu rindi ihema, baihamu ebyabaire birimu, baabitwara, baabishereka." 
2Kings7:9 Ebyo ku byahwaire, abo babembe baagambirana bati: Eki turikukora tikihikire. Eri izooba n'ery'amakuru marungi. Ku turaayetsize, twategyereza okuhitsya obu buraataagurukane, nitwija kufubirwa. Mbwenu nimwije tugyende, tubigambire omukuru w'enju y'omugabe." 
2Kings7:10 Batyo bagyenda, beeta abakumiirizi b'aha irembo ry'orurembo, babagira bati: Twahika aha rusiisira rw'Abasiriya, kwonka titwashangayo muntu n'omwe ou twareeba nari ou twahurira; kureka eki twashangayo n'embaraasi n'endogoya zitsibikire n'amahema gaabo gari nk'oku gabaire gari." 
2Kings7:11 Abakumiirizi nabo beeta, babigambira omukuru w'omu nju y'omugabe." 
2Kings7:12 Omugabe aimuka ekyo kiro, agambira abakungu be ati: Ka mbagambire obwengye bu Abasiriya batucwereire kuturwanisa. Nibamanya ku twine enjara. Mbwenu baaruga omu rusiisira kweshereka omu ishwa, nibagira ngu ku turaarugye omu rurembo, batukwate tuhuriire, barutaahemu." 
2Kings7:13 Omwe aha bakungu be yaamugira ati: K'abantu batware embaraasi itaano aha zitsigaireho. Manya itwe abakitsigaireho ebituriho ni nk'ebyabaire aha migogo yoona ey'Abaisiraeli abaafiire. Mbwenu ka tubatumeyo, tureebe." 
2Kings7:14 Mpaho batoorana ab'ebigaari bibiri, omugabe aboohereza kukurata eihe ry'Abasiriya. Abagira ati: Nimwirooko mureebe." 
2Kings7:15 Nabo babakurata okuhitsya obu baahikire ahari Yorudaani. Haza ogwo muhanda baashanga gwijwire ebijwaro n'ebindi bintu ebi Abasiriya baanagire nibahunga. Entumwa zaagarukayo zaabigambira omugabe. 
2Kings7:16 Bwanyima abantu baashohora nibairuka, baayaya eby'omu rusiisira rw'Abasiriya. Mpaho encuro emwe y'esaano y'obunono yaagura empiiha emwe y'efeeza, n'encuro ibiri za baare zaagura empiiha emwe, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaakigambire." 
2Kings7:17 Mbwenu obwo omugabe akaba ahaire omukuru w'engabo ou yaabaire ayegamira omurimo gw'okurinda eirembo. Haza abantu baamutemberaniraho omu irembo, yaafa, nk'oku omuntu wa Ruhanga yaakigambire, obu omugabe yaamwijaho." 
2Kings7:18 Manya obu omuntu wa Ruhanga yaagira omugabe ati: Encuro ibiri za baare niziija kugura empiiha emwe y'efeeza n'encuro emwe y'esaano y'obunono egure empiiha emwe y'efeeza; nyencakare nk'aga magingo, aha irembo rya Samariya," 
2Kings7:19 ogwo mukuru w'engabo akahakanisa omuntu wa Ruhanga ati: Nobu Nyakubaho wenka yaakugwisa enjura, ebyo ekyo kintu kikaabakwo? Onu nikwo kumugarukamu ati: Noija kukyereebera, kwonka ebyo torikwija kubiryaho." 
2Kings7:20 Haza nikwo kyamubaireho, ahabw'okuba abantu bakamutemberaniraho omu irembo, yaafa." 
2Kings8:1 Elisha akaba agambiire omukazi ou yaahimbwire omutabani ati: Imuka ogyende n'ab'eka yaawe, mushuuhuukire aharakubaasikire, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho aragiire enjara kuteera egi nsi okumara emyaka mushanju." 
2Kings8:2 Ogwo mukazi nikwo kwimuka akatwaza nk'oku omuntu wa Ruhanga yaamugambiire. We n'ab'eka ye baashuuhuukira omu nsi y'Abafilisiti, baamarayo emyaka mushanju." 
2Kings8:3 Emyaka mushanju ku yaahwaireho, ogwo mukazi yaaruga omu nsi y'Abafilisiti, yaaza ow'omugabe kumwetongyezaho ahaby'enju ye n'ekibanja kye." 
2Kings8:4 Ago magingo omugabe akaba naagaaniira na Gehaazi omugaragwa wa Elisha omuntu wa Ruhanga, naamugira ati: Ntebeza ebintu byona ebikuru ebi Elisha yaakozire." 
2Kings8:5 Onu ku yaabaire naakigaaniirira omugabe oku Elisha yaahimbwire omuntu ofiire, ogwo mukazi ou yaahimbwire omutabani yaayetuuraho kwetongyeza omugabe eby'enju ye n'ekibanja kye. Gehaazi nikwo kugira ati: Nyakusinga omugabe, ogu niwe mukazi ori, kandi ogu niwe mutabani ou Elisha yaahimbwire." 
2Kings8:6 Omugabe ku yaabuurize ogwo mukazi, nawe yaaba nikwo yaabimugambira. Omugabe nikwo kumukwatsa omukungu, akamuragiira ati: Omugarurire ebyabaire biri ebye byona, n'ebyayezire omu misiri ye, okwiha obu yaaruga omuri ekyo kyanga okuhitsya eri izooba." 
2Kings8:7 Obundi Elisha akaija Damasiko, Benihadadi omugabe wa Siriya arwaire. Ku baamugambiire ngu omuntu wa Ruhanga yaija," 
2Kings8:8 omugabe yaagira Hazaeli ati: Twara omukimbo, oze kutangirira ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga. Haza omuunyebuurizeho ahari Nyakubaho oti: Ebyo niinyija kukira egi ndwara?" 
2Kings8:9 Hazaeli atyo aza kumutangirira, aine omukimbo n'ebintu bya Damasiko ebya ibara muringo, ebyekoreirwe engamira makumi ana. Ku yaamuhikire, yaayemerera omu maisho ge, yaamugira ati: Mutabani waawe Benihadadi omugabe wa Siriya akuntumireho ati: Ebyo niinyija kukira egi ndwara?" 
2Kings8:10 Elisha amugarukamu ati: Irooko omugire oti: Kwokwo noija kukira. Kwonka Nyakubaho anyorekire ku buzimazima arikwija kufa. 
2Kings8:11 Reero amutsimba eriisho arimugumyaho, okuhitsya obu onu yaabwerabweire, n'ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga akarira." 
2Kings8:12 Bwanyima Hazaeli amubuuza ati: Mukama wangye noorizibwa ki? Onu amugarukamu ati: N'ahabw'okuba nimmanya eby'akabi ebi orikora Abaisiraeli, okootsya ebigo byabo, okaitsa rurara abatsigazi baabo, okateera aha nsi abaana baabo bakacwagurika, okashatura abakazi baabo abaine enda." 
2Kings8:13 Hazaeli amugira ati: Mbwenu nyowe omwiru waawe embwa, nimbaasa nta kukora ekintu kirikwingana kityo? Elisha amugarukamu ati: Nyakubaho anyorekire ku niiwe oraabe omugabe wa Siriya." 
2Kings8:14 Ebyo ku bihwa, Hazaeli aruga ahari Elisha, agyenda ahika mukama we. N'onu amubuuza ati: Elisha akugambiire ki? Onu ati: Angizire ngu kwokwo noija kukira." 
2Kings8:15 Kwonka akasheeshe kaakuratsireho, Hazaeli yaihayo burangiti, yaagijabika omu maizi, yaagimuhumbika aha maisho okuhitsya obu onu yaafiire, Hazaeli ogwo akahungura obugabe bwe." 
2Kings8:16 Omu mwaka gwa kataano ogw'omu busingye bwa Yoramu mwene Ahabu omugabe wa Isiraeli, nibwo Yehoraamu mwene Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda yaaza aha ngoma." 
2Kings8:17 Akaba omugabe aine emyaka makumi ashatu n'ebiri y'obukuru, yaategyekyera emyaka munaana omuri Yerusalemu." 
2Kings8:18 Yaagira emitwarize nk'ey'abagabe ba Isiraeli, yaakora nk'ab'omuryango gwa Ahabu oku baakozire. Manya akashwera muhara wa Ahabu, haza yaakora ebirukugwisa kubi Nyakubaho." 
2Kings8:19 Kwonka Nyakubaho, ahabwa Daudi omwiru we, tarenzire kucwekyereza ab'enda ya Yuda, ahabw'okuba akaba amuraganiise ku abaijukuru bariguma nibategyeka." 
2Kings8:20 Omu busingye bwe, Abanyaedomu bakagoma, baayecwa aha bugabe bwa Yuda, baayeteeraho omugabe waabo." 
2Kings8:21 Yehoramu nikwo kwambuka, akaza Zairi n'ab'ebigaari bye boona. Mpaho aimuka nyekiro n'abakuru b'ebigaari bye ateera Abanyaedomu abaabaire bamuturukire oku n'oku. Kwonka ab'eihe rye baahunga, bataaha." 
2Kings8:22 Nikwo Abanyaedomu baagomire, bakeecwa aha bugabe bwa Yuda okuhitsya n'eri izooba. Ago magingo Libuna nayo egoma." 
2Kings8:23 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Yehoramu n'ebi yaakozire byona bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda. 
2Kings8:24 Bwanyima Yehoramu akafa yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa hamwe nabo omu rurembo rwa Daudi; omutabani Ahaziya yaamuhungurira." 
2Kings8:25 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi ogw'omu busingye bwa Yoramu, mwene Ahabu omugabe wa Isiraeli, Ahaziya mwene Yehoramu omugabe wa Yuda nibwo yaaza aha ngoma." 
2Kings8:26 Ahaziya ogwo akaba omugabe aine emyaka makumi abiri n'ebiri y'obukuru, yaategyekyera omwaka gumwe omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Ataliya, ari mwijukuru wa Omuri omugabe wa Isiraeli." 
2Kings8:27 Ahaziya nawe akagira emitwarize nk'ey'ab'omuryango gwa Ahabu; yaakora ebirukugwisa kubi Nyakubaho, nk'ab'omuryango gwa Ahabu oku baakozire. Manya akaba aine obuzaare n'ab'omuryango gwa Ahabu, abashweiremu." 
2Kings8:28 Akahurura na Yoramu, mwene Ahabu, kurwanisiza Hazaeli omugabe wa Siriya Ramoti-Gileadi, Abasiriya baahutaarizayo Yoramu." 
2Kings8:29 Omugabe Yoramu yaagaruka Yezereeli kukirirayo obuhuta obu Abasiriya baamuhutaariize Raama naarwana orugamba na Hazaeli omugabe wa Siriya. Ahaziya omugabe, mwene Yehoramu omugabe wa Yuda, nikwo kuza Yezereeli, kureeba Yoramu mwene Ahabu arwaire." 
2Kings9:1 Omu biro ebyo, Elisha omurangi akeeta omutsigazi omwe omu b'ekigombe ky'abarangi, yaamugira ati: Yezirikye otware eri ihembe ry'amajuta, oze Ramoti-Gileadi." 
2Kings9:2 Haza ku oraahikyeyo, osherure Yehu mwene Yehoshafaati mwijukuru wa Nimushi, otaahemu, omwimutsye omuri bagyenzi be, omutware omu kishengye ky'endugu." 
2Kings9:3 Reero oiheyo eihembe ry'amajuta g'omuoliva ogamushukye aha mutwe, omugire oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Naakusiiga amajuta kuba omugabe wa Isiraeli. Bwanyima oigure orwigi, ohungye, oteeziringa." 
2Kings9:4 Mpaho ogwo mutsigazi omurangi aza Ramoti-Gileadi. 
2Kings9:5 Ku yaahikireyo yaashanga abakuru b'eihe nibahanuura, yaabagira ati: Nyine eki bakuntumireho, iwe omukuru w'engabo. Yehu amubuuza ati: Omuriitwe n'oha ou baakutumaho? Onu amugarukamu ati: Niiwe, mukama wangye, omukuru w'engabo." 
2Kings9:6 N'onu atyo aimuka, ataaha omu nju. Omutsigazi ori amushuka amajuta aha mutwe, amugira ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Naakusiiga amajuta kuba omugabe w'abantu bangye Abaisiraeli." 
2Kings9:7 Mbwenu oryaita ab'omuryango gwa Ahabu mukama waawe; mbone kuhoora Yezebeeli nimmutura okwita abaheereza bangye abarangi, n'abairu bangye boona." 
2Kings9:8 Manya ab'omuryango gwa Ahabu boona n'ab'okuhwerekyerera, reero mmumareho omuntu weena oyetwa omushaija, yaaba muhuuku nari ow'obusingye omuri Isiraeli." 
2Kings9:9 Ab'eka ya Ahabu mbagire nk'ab'eya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati n'ab'eya Baasha mwene Ahiiya. 
2Kings9:10 Embwa ziriire Yezebeeli omu kibanja kya Yezereeli, abure owaamuziika. Ebyo ku bihwa, ogwo mutsigazi omurangi aigura orwigi, ahunga." 
2Kings9:11 Yehu ku yaashohoire yaahika bagyenzi be abakungu ba mukama we, baamubuuza bati: Ni buhooro? Ogu mushaija yaaba naakwenza ki? Nawe abagira ati: Naimwe ogwo mushaija nimumumanya n'emigambire ye." 
2Kings9:12 Bamugarukamu bati: Ngaaha, tikwo kiri. Tugambire amazima. Nawe abagira ati: Yangambira ati: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Naakusiiga amajuta kuba omugabe wa Isiraeli." 
2Kings9:13 Nabo ahonaaho buri omwe ayejuura eki ajwaire, babyarira aha matembero, ngu Yehu abe nibyo yaaribataho. Reero bateera amakondere, barangirira bati: Yehu yaaba omugabe." 
2Kings9:14 Oku nikwo Yehu mwene Yehoshafaati mwijukuru wa Nimushi yaacumire enaama y'okurwanisa Yoramu. Ebiro ebyo Yoramu n'Abaisiraeli boona bakaba nibarinda Ramoti-Gileadi kutateerwa Hazaeli, omugabe wa Siriya." 
2Kings9:15 Kwonka obwo omugabe Yoramu akaba agarukire Yezereeli kutambirirwayo obuhuta, obu Abasiriya baamuhutaize naarwana na Hazaeli omugabe wa Siriya. Yehu nikwo kugira abakungu bagyenzi be ati: Ku muraabe nimukwatanisa naanye, mutaikiriza omuntu n'omwe kuruga omu rurembo, kuza kutwara enkuru Yezereeli." 
2Kings9:16 Atyo Yehu we atemba ekigaari kye, aza Yezereeli; ahabw'okuba Yoramu niyo yaabaire arwariire, na Ahaziya omugabe wa Yuda agiireyo kumureeba." 
2Kings9:17 Mbwenu omurinzi ku yaabaire ayemereire aha munaara gw'omuri Yezereeli, yaaranzya Yehu n'omutwe gw'engabo ze nibaija, yaagira ati: Nindeeba omutwe gw'engabo. Yoramu yaamugira ati: Tuma omuntu w'aha mbaraasi, ababugane, ababuuze ati: Ni buhooro?" 
2Kings9:18 Mpaho entumwa etemba embaraasi, eza kubugana Yehu. Emugira eti: Omugabe yaakuntumaho naakubuuza ati: Ni buhooro? Yehu yaamugarukamu ati: Ebya buhooro noofa ki nabyo? Hinduka onkurate. Omurinzi agira eti: Entumwa yaabahika, kwonka tiyaagaruka." 
2Kings9:19 N'onu ayohereza entumwa ya kabiri aha mbaraasi, ebahika, egira Yehu eti: Omugabe naakubuuza ati: Ni buhooro? Yehu agigarukamu ati: Ebya buhooro noofa ki nabyo? Hinduka onkurate." 
2Kings9:20 Omurinzi ayongyera agira ati: Yaabahika, kwonka nayo tiyaagaruka. Kandi emigyendeseze y'ekigaari, ni nk'eya Yehu mwene Nimushi, ahabw'okuba naakivuga nk'omugwairaro." 
2Kings9:21 Yoramu omugabe wa Isiraeli nikwo kuragiira ati: Nimuntebeekanisize ekigaari. Nabo baakitebeekanisa. Yoramu omugabe wa Isiraeli na Ahaziya omugabe wa Yuda baimutsya orugyendo, buri omwe ari omu kigaari kye; baza kubugana Yehu; bamushanga aha kibanja kya Naboti Omuyezireeli." 
2Kings9:22 Yoramu ku areeba Yehu amubuuza ati: Yehu, ni buhooro? Onu ati: Ni buhooro ki, obushambani n'oburogo bwa nyoko bukiri bwingi butyo?" 
2Kings9:23 Mpaho Yoramu ahindura ekigaari, ahunga naayeta Ahaziya n'eiraka rihango ati: Yaiwe Ahaziya, obureebya!" 
2Kings9:24 Yehu ananuura obuta bwe n'amaani ge goona, ateera Yoramu omwambi omu buteeraniro bw'enkongoto, gucumita omutima gwogamu, agwa omu kigaari kye." 
2Kings9:25 Yehu agira Bidikaari orikugyendesa ekigaari kye ati: Mukirize omunagye omu kibanja kya Naboti Omuyezireeli. Ati noijuka buri obu nyowe naiwe twembi twabaire tutembire embaraasi tukuratiire Ahabu ishe, ku Mukama yaaragwire kubi ahari Ahabu ati:" 
2Kings9:26 Buzimazima nk'oku nyomwabazyo ndeebire eshagama ya Naboti n'ey'abatabani, naanye ndyakuhoorera omuri eki kibanja? Mbwenu nu, mwiheho, omunagye omuri eki kibanja, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaakigambire." 
2Kings9:27 Ahaziya omugabe wa Yuda ku akireeba, ahunga naagarura ogwa Berihagani, Yehu amubinga, agira ati: Nawe mumurashe! Bamurasha ari omu kigaari kye aharikwinamuka Guuri, haihi na Ibuleamu; ahungira Megido, agwayo." 
2Kings9:28 Abagaragwa be bamutwarira omu kigaari kye, bamuhitsya Yerusalemu, bamuziika omu kituuro kye, bamushangisa baishenkuru omu rurembo rwa Daudi." 
2Kings9:29 Ahaziya ogwo akaba agiire aha ngoma ya Yuda omu mwaka gwa ikumi na gumwe ogw'omu busingye bwa Yoramu mwene Ahabu. 
2Kings9:30 Yehu ku yaahikire Yezereeli, Yezebeeli yaahurira oku bibaire. Yaayeziga amaisho, yaaboneza eishokye yaaringuririza omu dirisa." 
2Kings9:31 Yehu ku yaahikire ati omu irembo, Yezebeeli yaamweta naamugira ati: Iwe Zimuri, owaitsire mukama we, ni buhooro?" 
2Kings9:32 Yehu ku ajuumuura ati amaisho, yaareeba edirisa, agira ati: Orikukwatanisa naanye n'oha? N'oha? Abashaahu babiri nari bashatu bamuhanga amaisho nibagoozya omu dirisa." 
2Kings9:33 Nawe abagira ati: Nimumutambikye ahansi. Batyo bamutambika, eshagama ye etaraakira ekisiika n'embaraasi, Yehu azimuribatiiriza." 
2Kings9:34 Bwanyima ataaha omu kikaari ky'omugabe arya, anywa. Agira ati: Mbwenu mureebe ngu mwaziika ogwo mukazi okyeenirwe, ahabw'okuba ni muhara w'omugabe." 
2Kings9:35 Kwonka ku baagiire kumuziika, tibaagira kindi ki baashangaho, kureka empanga y'omutwe n'ebigyere bye n'engaro ze." 
2Kings9:36 Ku baagarukire baabiteekyerereza Yehu, yaabagira ati: Ekyo nikyo Nyakubaho yaagambiise omuheereza we Eliya Omutishibi ati: Omu kyanga kya Yezereeli nimwo embwa ziriirira omutumbi gwa Yezebeeli." 
2Kings9:37 Kandi ebitaafura bye biryanagwanagwa oku n'oku nk'amasha, omu kibanja kya Yezereeli, habure owaagira ati: Ebi n'ebya Yezebeeli." 
2Kings10:1 Ahabu akaba aine abatabani makumi mushanju omuri Samariya, Yehu yaahandiika amabaruha, yaagooherezayo aha bategyeki b'orurembo Yezereeli, n'aha bakuru omu ihanga, n'aha barezi ba beene Ahabu, naabatumaho ati:"
