2Kings10:2 Mbwenu ebaruha egi ku eraabahikye eti, nk'oku mwine batabani ba mukama waanyu, n'ebigaari n'embaraasi, n'endembo z'ebigo bigumire," 
2Kings10:3 mutoorane omuri batabani ba mukama waanyu omuntu murungi munonga kandi ohikire, mumwemekye aha kitebe kya ishe. Haza murwanirire ab'omuryango gwa mukama waanyu." 
2Kings10:4 Kwonka baatiina munonga, baagira bati: Abagabe babiri ku baraabe batabaasize kumuza omu kaso, itwe nitubaasa tuta kumugungira?" 
2Kings10:5 Mpaho omukuru w'ekikaari ky'omugabe, n'omukuru w'orurembo, n'abakuru omu ihanga, n'abarezi baatuma ahari Yehu nibamugira bati: Itwe turi abairu baawe kandi nitwija kukora byona ebi oraaturagiire. Titurikwija kwemeka mugabe weena, kureka ba niiwe waakora eki orikusiima." 
2Kings10:6 Nawe abahandiikira ebaruha ya kabiri naabagira ati: Ku muraabe muri ab'aha rubaju rwangye, kandi mweteekateekire kumpurira, mbwenu batabani ba mukama waanyu mubatemeho emitwe. Haza nyencakare nk'aga magingo muginshangise Yezereeli. Obwo batabani b'omugabe, abantu makumi mushanju, bakaba bari hamwe n'abakuru b'orurembo abaabaire nibaboorora." 
2Kings10:7 Ebaruha ku yaabahikire, baakwata batabani b'omugabe makumi mushanju, baabaita boona. Emitwe yaabo baagita omu bigyega, baagimutwekyera Yezereeli." 
2Kings10:8 Entumwa ku yaizire, yaamugira eti: Baareeta emitwe ya batabani b'omugabe. Yaagira ati: Mugirunde emituumo ebiri aha irembo ry'orurembo, egumeho okuhitsya omu kasheeshe." 
2Kings10:9 Ku bwaseesire yaashohora, yaayemerera, yaagambira abantu boona ati: Imwe muri mwere, niinye ncumire enaama y'okurwanisa mukama wangye, nkamwita. Kwonka shi aba boona n'oha obaitsire?" 
2Kings10:10 Mukimanye ku omuri egi nsi ekigambo kya Nyakubaho eki yaagambire aha b'omuryango gwa Ahabu kitaribura kuhikiirira. Manya Nyakubaho akozire eki yaagambiise omuheereza we Eliya. 
2Kings10:11 Yehu nawe atyo aita ab'omuryango gwa Ahabu abaabaire bakitsigaireho omuri Yezereeli, abashaija be abakuru boona, na banywani be ab'aha mara, n'abahongyerezi be, okuhitsya obu ataramutsigiire n'owa kizira." 
2Kings10:12 Bwanyima Yehu aimutsya orugyendo, aza Samariya. Ku yaabaire akiri omu muhanda naagyenda, yaahika aha rusiisira rw'abariisa b'entaama," 
2Kings10:13 yaabugabuganiraho n'abaine obuzaare na Ahaziya omugabe wa Yuda, yaababuuza ati: Muri baahi? Baamugarukamu bati: Twine obuzaare na Ahaziya. Mbwenu nituza Yezereeli kutaayaayira abategyeki na batabani ba Nyina-Omugabe." 
2Kings10:14 Yehu atyo aragiira abagaragwa be ati: Mubakwate bakihuriire. Batyo babakwata, babaitira aha kiina ky'eikyegyetero ry'ebyoya by'entaama, boona abantu makumi ana na babiri, atasaasiireho n'omwe." 
2Kings10:15 Yehu ku yaarugire aho, yaabugana Yehonadabu mwene Rekabu aizire kumutangirira. Amuramutsya, amubuuza ati: Buzimazima noonyerera nkaanye oku ndikukwerera? Yehonadabu amugarukamu ati Eego, ninkwerera. Yehu ati: Ku kiraabe nikwo kiri, mpa engaro. N'onu azimuha. Yehu amutembya omu kigaari kye," 
2Kings10:16 amugira ati: Ija tugyendane oreebe oku nyiniire Nyakubaho eihato. Atyo agyenda nawe omu kigaari kye, baza Samariya." 
2Kings10:17 Ku baahikireyo, yaita aba Ahabu boona abaabaire batsigaireyo okuhitsya obu yaabamazireho, nk'oku Mukama yaakigambiise Eliya." 
2Kings10:18 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Yehu yaateeranira hamwe abantu boona, yaabagira ati: Ahabu akaheereza Baali kukye, kwonka nyowe niinyija kumuheereza munonga." 
2Kings10:19 N'ahabw'ekyo muunyetere abarangi ba Baali boona, na boona abamuramya, n'abahongyerezi be boona. Hatagira owaaburaho, ahabw'okuba niinyenda kutambira Baali ekitambo kikuru. Oraabureho weena tarikutsigaza magara." 
2Kings10:20 Yehu kandi aragiira ati: Nimurangirire ekiro ky'okuramizaho Baali. Nabo baakirangirira. 
2Kings10:21 Yehu nawe atuma omuri Isiraeli yoona, boona abarikuramya Baali baija, tihagira muntu n'omwe owaatsigarayo ataizire. Bataaha omu ndaaro ya Baali, eijura n'aha bunwa." 
2Kings10:22 Reero agambira orikureeberera ahi babiika ebijwaro ati: Reetera abaramya Baali boona ebijwaro. Nawe abibaihirayo. 
2Kings10:23 Bwanyima Yehu ataaha omu ndaaro ya Baali hamwe na Yehonadabu mwene Rekabu, agambira abaramya Baali ati: Mweshwijume mureebe omuriimwe ku haraabe hatarimu orikuramya Nyakubaho, kureka abarikuramya Baali bonka." 
2Kings10:24 Bwanyima atyo ataahamu kutamba ebitambo hamwe n'ebicwekize. Obwo Yehu akaba ataire abashaija makumi munaana aheeru kandi abagizire ati: Oraarekye omwe ahari aba bantu bu naabakwatsa, yaatoroka, naamuzira." 
2Kings10:25 Ku aheza ati kutamba ekitambo kicwekize, aragiira abarinzi n'abakuru b'engabo ati: Nimutaahemu mubaite; hatagira owaahonokaho. Nabo ku baaherize kubaita, emitumbi yaabo baaginaga aheeru. Baataaha omu kishengye ky'endugu eky'endaaro ya Baali," 
2Kings10:26 baihamu enyomyo y'omurinzi eyaabaire erimu, baagyotsya." 
2Kings10:27 Batyo baashenyagura eitambiro rya Baali n'endaaro ye, baagihindura ekihoroonyo n'okuhitsya eri izooba." 
2Kings10:28 Yehu nikwo yaamazireho atyo Baali omuri Isiraeli. 
2Kings10:29 Kwonka Yehu tararekire kukora bibi bya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, ebyareeteire Isiraeli kucumura. Eby'okuramya enyana z'ezaabu ez'omuri Beteli na Daani." 
2Kings10:30 Reero Nyakubaho yaagira Yehu ati: Ahabw'okukora gye, okahitsya ebi ndikusiima, okakora ab'omuryango gwa Ahabu ekyabaire kindi aha mutima; n'ahabw'ekyo batabani baawe, okuhitsya aha b'oruzaaro rwa kana, baryashutama aha kitebe ky'obugabe bwa Isiraeli." 
2Kings10:31 Kwonka shi Yehu tareetaire ha kukuratira mateeka ga Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli n'omutima gwe gwona; tiyaareka kukora ebibi bya Yeroboamu, ebyareeteire Isiraeli kucumura." 
2Kings10:32 Omu biro ebyo Nyakubaho akatandika kutuubya Isiraeli naagicwaho ebyanga. Hazaeli yaabasingurira aha myatano y'ensi yaabo yoona. 
2Kings10:33 Okwiha Yorudaani noogarura oburugwa-izooba, ebyanga byona ebya Gileadi, n'eby'Abaagaadi n'eby'Abaamanaase, okuruga Aroeri ehereraine n'oruhanga rwa Arunooni niyo Gileadi na Bashani." 
2Kings10:34 Endiijo mirimo ya Yehu, n'ebi yaakozire byona, n'eby'amaani ge byona, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba isiraeli." 
2Kings10:35 Bwanyima Yehu akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa omuri Samariya. Yehoahazi omutabani yaayema omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings10:36 Emyaka i Yehu yaategyekyeiremu Isiraeli omuri Samariya ekahika makumi abiri na munaana. 
2Kings11:1 Ataliya nyina Ahaziya, ku yaareebire omutabani yaafa, yaimuka, yaita ab'enda y'omugabe boona." 
2Kings11:2 Kwonka Yehosheba muhara w'omugabe Yehoramu, munyaanya wa Ahaziya, yaacwisa Yoashi mutabani wa Ahaziya, yaamwiha bwesherekye omuri batabani b'omugabe abaabaire barangariire kwitwa, yaamuta omu kishengye ekiraarwamu n'omurezi we. Yaamushereka Ataliya, tiyaitwa." 
2Kings11:3 Yaamara nawe emyaka mukaaga amusherekire omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, obwo Ataliya ari omugabekazi w'egyo nsi." 
2Kings11:4 Kwonka omu mwaka gwa mushanju, Yehoyaada akatuma kweta abakuru b'eigana-igana ry'abarinzi b'omugabe abarikwetwa Abakariti n'ab'ery'abarinzi b'ekikaari; yaabaragiira ku bamushanga omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Yaakora nabo endagaano, naabarahiriza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho; kandi yaabooreka mutabani w'omugabe Ahaziya." 
2Kings11:5 Yaabaragiira ati: Oku nikwo muraatwaze. Kimwe kya kashatu kyanyu abatari ha murimo ahari Sabato, murinde Nyaruju y'omugabe." 
2Kings11:6 Kimwe kya kashatu ekindi kize aha Irembo rya Suuri; kandi ekindi kimwe kya kashatu kigume aha Irembo, enyima y'abarinzi, kirinde ekikaari ky'omugabe." 
2Kings11:7 Reero emitwe ebiri y'engabo zaanyu eije aha murimo ahari Sabato, eyemerere ahari Nyaruju ya Mukama kurinda omugabe." 
2Kings11:8 Mutyo mugume mukiikize omugabe embaju zoona, buri omwe akwaitse eby'okurwanisa. Haza oraabataahirire omu mishorongo yaanyu, mumwite. Mugume n'omugabe, yaaba naashohora nari naataaha." 
2Kings11:9 Abakuru b'engabo baatwaza nk'oku Yehoyaada omuhongyerezi yaabaragiira, buri omwe yaareeta abashaija be abatakubaire ha murimo ahari Sabato, hamwe n'abaabaire bari ab'okwijaho; baija ahari Yehoyaada omuhongyerezi." 
2Kings11:10 Ogwo muhongyerezi yaaheereza abo bakuru b'engabo amacumu n'engabo ebyabaire biri ebya Daudi omugabe, bibiikirwe omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho;" 
2Kings11:11 abarinzi baayemerera, buri omwe akwaitse eby'okurwanisa, okwiha aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo obwa Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, okuta aha rwa bumosho; okwehinguririza eitambiro n'enju y'omugabe." 
2Kings11:12 Bwanyima yaashohoza mutabani w'omugabe, yaamujweka ekirunga, yaamukwatsa eby'obuhamya, yaamusiiga amajuta. Abantu baateera omu ngaro, baarangirira ku yaaba omugabe, nibateera akaari bati: Karamaare, Nyakusinga omugabe!" 
2Kings11:13 Ataliya ku yaahuriire orwari rw'abarinzi n'orw'abantu, yaataaha omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ahu abantu bateeraniire." 
2Kings11:14 Yaashanga omugabe ayemereire haihi n'enyomyo y'ekisasi kya Nyaruju, nk'oku omucwe guri, abakuru b'engabo n'abakondere bamushagatiire, kandi abantu boona ab'omuri egyo nsi nibashemererwa nibateera amakondere. Ataliya ati: Obureebya!" 
2Kings11:15 Mpaho Yehoyaada omuhongyerezi yaaragiira abakuru b'engabo abarikutegyeka eihe naagira ati: Mumushohoze nimumurabya omu mishorongo y'abarinzi. Haza weena oraamukurate mumwite. Manya omuhongyerezi akagira ngu tibashemereire kumwitira omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. 
2Kings11:16 Nabo bamukwata, bamurabya aha irembo ry'embaraasi, bamuhitsya ahari Nyaruju y'omugabe, baba niho baamwitira." 
2Kings11:17 Bwanyima Yehoyaada akakoresa omugabe n'abantu endagaano na Nyakubaho, ngu babe aba Nyakubaho; kandi yaagikoresa omugabe n'abantu." 
2Kings11:18 Haza abantu boona ab'omuri egyo nsi baaza aha ndaaro ya Baali, baagisheenyagura, baayatagura amatambiro ge n'ebishushani bye. Na Mataani omuhongyerezi wa Baali baamwitira omu maisho g'amatambiro. Reero Yehoyaada omuhongyerezi yaataho abarinzi b'okurinda Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Kings11:19 Bwanyima yaatwara abakuru b'engabo, n'Abakariti, n'abarinzi, n'abantu boona ab'omuri egyo nsi, baiha omugabe omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Bamushuumya nibamurabya aha irembo ry'abarinzi, bamuhitsya ahari nyaruju y'omugabe, yaasingama aha kitebe ky'obugabe." 
2Kings11:20 Abantu boona ab'omuri egyo nsi baashemererwa munonga. N'orurembo rwatuuza, Ataliya baaherize kumwitsa rurara omu kikaari ky'omugabe." 
2Kings11:21 Yoashi akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka mushanju y'obukuru. 
2Kings12:1 Omu mwaka gwa mushanju ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehu, nibwo Yoashi yaaza aha ngoma; akategyekyera emyaka makumi ana omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Zibiya owa Beerisheba." 
2Kings12:2 Yoashi ebiro by'amagara ge byona akakora ebirikusiimwa Nyakubaho; ahabw'okuba akaba atendekirwe Yehoyaada omuhongyerezi. 
2Kings12:3 Kwonka taraihireho butungutungu bw'okuramizaho, abantu baaguma nibabutambiraho ebitambo, nibabwotereraho obubaani." 
2Kings12:4 Reero Yoashi yaagira abahongyerezi ati: Empiiha zoona eziruga omu bintu ebitoijeirwe Ruhanga, zikareetwa omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'empiiha ezi buri muntu acwera empiiha eziruga omu bicwero by'abantu n'ezi omuntu atoija ayekundiire kureeta omu nju ya Nyakubaho," 
2Kings12:5 abahongyerezi bazitware, buri omwe naaziiha aha muntu ou amanyiraine nawe. Haza bazihunduuzise Nyaruju; ahu erikuba neeyetenga kuhunduuzibwa." 
2Kings12:6 Kwonka okuhitsya omu mwaka gw'Omugabe Yoashi ogwa makumi abiri n'eshatu, abahongyerezi bakaba batakahundwize egyo Nju." 
2Kings12:7 Ekyarugiremu, Omugabe Yoashi yaayeta Yehoyaada omuhongyerezi n'abandi bahongyerezi, yaababuuza ati: Ahanki mutarikuhunduuza Nyaruju? Mbwenu nu, murekyere aho okwiha empiiha aha bantu mukazibiika, kureka muziheyo, zihunduuze Nyaruju." 
2Kings12:8 Mpaho Abahongyerezi baihamu eky'okutongyera kwakiira empiiha z'abantu, n'eky'okutajunaanwa kuhunduuza Nyaruju." 
2Kings12:9 Yehoyaada omuhongyerezi nikwo kureeta eshanduukye, akafumura ekihengyere aha kigifundikiire, akagita aha rubaju rw'eitambiro, aha rubaju rwa buryo omuntu yaaba naataaha omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Batyo abahongyerezi abarikurinda eirembo baaguma nibanagamu empiiha zoona ezi abantu barikureeta omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Kings12:10 Reero ku baabaire bareeba zaijura omu shanduukye, omuhandiiki w'omugabe n'omuhongyerezi omukuru baija, babara empiiha zi baashanga omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, bazikoma omu nshaho." 
2Kings12:11 Bakiheza kwirenga (kwihandiika) kumanya oku zirikwingana, bazikwatsa abakozi abarikureeberera Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Nabo baziihura ababaizi n'abombeki abarikugikoraho," 
2Kings12:12 n'abarikwombekyesa amabaare, n'abarikugacweregyerera; ezindi bazihayo kugura embaaho n'amabaare gacweregyereire, eby'okuhunduuza Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'ebindi byona ebikwatiraine n'ogwo murimo." 
2Kings12:13 Kwonka ezo mpiiha zi baabaire bareeta omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho bakaba batazikoresa ebinaabiro by'efeeza, nari empana z'okuguhisa omuriro, nobu zaakuba enyabya z'efeeza, amakondere, nainga ekintu kyona eky'ezaabu nari eky'efeeza eby'okukoresa omuri egyo Nju," 
2Kings12:14 kureka bakaba baziha abarikuhunduuza Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. 
2Kings12:15 Kandi abu baabaire bakwatsa empiiha z'okwihura abakozi bakaba batababuuza oku bazitwarize, ahabw'okuba bakaba bazikoresa n'obwesigwa." 
2Kings12:16 Empiiha z'okuhongyerera ebicumuro n'ez'okukarabira ebibi, bakaba batazireeta muri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho; zikaba ziba ez'abahongyerezi." 
2Kings12:17 Omu biro ebyo Hazaeli, omugabe wa Siriya, akahurura, yaateera orurembo Gaati, yaarukubuura. Hazaeli ogwo ku yaabaire ahangire Yerusalemu amaisho kwinamuka kugiteera," 
2Kings12:18 Yoashi omugabe wa Yuda yaihayo ebiconco byona ebi Yehoshafaati na Yehoramu na Ahaziya abagabe ba Yuda baishenkuru baatoijeire Ruhanga beekundiire, n'ebye ebi we wenka yaatoizire ayekundiire, n'ezaabu zoona ezaashangirwe omu mabiikiro ga Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'ez'omu kikaari ky'omugabe, yaabitwekyera Hazaeli omugabe wa Siriya. Hazaeli atyo yaaruga ahari Yerusalemu." 
2Kings12:19 Endiijo mirimo ya Yoashi n'ebindi byona ebi yaakozire, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda." 
2Kings12:20 Kwonka abagaragwa be bakamugiira omu naama, baamwitira omu nju y'aha kirundo ky'eitaka ekirikwetwa Miilo, aha muhanda gurikushuuma Siila." 
2Kings12:21 Abaamwitsire ni Yozakaari mwene Shimeati na Yehozabadi mwene Shomeri; nawe nikwo kufa, akaziikwa omu rurembo rwa Daudi, ahi baaziikire baishenkuru; omutabani Amaziya akeema omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings13:1 Omu mwaka gw'amakumi abiri n'eshatu ogw'omu busingye bwa Yoashi mwene Ahaziya omugabe wa Yuda, nibwo Yehoahazi mwene Yehu aza aha ngoma ya Isiraeli, omuri Samariya, akategyeka emyaka ikumi na mushanju." 
2Kings13:2 Akakora ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho, yaatooreza ebibi bya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati ebi yaacumuziise Isiraeli, tiyaabireka." 
2Kings13:3 Nyakubaho nikwo kugirira Abaisiraeli ekiniga kingi, akaguma naabarekurira Hazaeli omugabe wa Siriya, na Benihadadi omutabani kubasingura." 
2Kings13:4 Bwanyima Yehoahazi akeeshengyereza Nyakubaho, nawe akamuhurira; ahabw'okuba akareeba oku Abaisiraeli barikuhatwa, oku omugabe wa Siriya arikubaita kubi." 
2Kings13:5 Nikyo Nyakubaho yaaheereire Abaisiraeli omujuni, bakaruga omu buhuuku bw'okutegyekwa Abasiriya, bakatuura omu maka gaabo nk'obunyakare." 
2Kings13:6 Kwonka shi tibararekire bibi by'ab'omuryango gwa Yeroboamu ebi yaacumuziise Isiraeli; baaguma nibabikora, n'ebishushani bya Ashera byaguma omuri Samariya." 
2Kings13:7 Manya Yehoahazi taratsigaize ihe ririkweshumba abarwani makumi ataano b'aha mbaaraasi, n'ebigaari ikumi, n'engabo kakumi ez'abarikugyendesa ebigyere; ahabw'okuba omugabe wa Siriya akaba abacwekyereize, abacwire obusaasingo." 
2Kings13:8 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Yehoahazi, n'ebindi byona ebi yaakozire, n'amaani ge, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings13:9 Reero Yehoahazi yaafa, yaashanga baishenkuru; yaaziikwa omuri Samariya; Yoashi omutabani yaayema omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings13:10 Omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu na mushanju, ogw'omu busingye bwa Yoashi omugabe wa Yuda, nibwo Yehoashi mwene Yehoahazi yaaza aha ngoma ya Isiraeli omuri Samariya, akategyekyera emyaka ikumi na mukaaga." 
2Kings13:11 Nawe akakora ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho, yaayanga kureka ebibi bya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, ebyareeteire Isiraeli kucumura, yaaguma naabikora." 
2Kings13:12 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Yehoashi n'ebindi byona ebi yaakozire, n'amaani ge agu yaarwaniise Amaziya omugabe wa Yuda, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings13:13 Bwanyima Yehoashi akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru, Yeroboamu yaasingama aha kitebe kye ky'obugabe. Yehoashi yaaziikwa ahi baziika abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings13:14 Mbwenu Elisha ku yaakwatsirwe endwara eyaamwitsire, Yehoashi omugabe wa Isiraeli yaaza kumureeba; yaamucurira ati: Ai bambe, taata! Ai bambe, taata! Iwe bigaari bya Isiraeli n'abarwani baayo b'aha mbaraasi!" 
2Kings13:15 Elisha yaamugira ati: Kwata obuta n'emyambi. N'onu abikwata. 
2Kings13:16 Reero agira ogwo mugabe wa Isiraeli ati: Nanuura obuta; n'onu abunanuura. Elisha ata engaro ze aha ngaro z'omugabe. 
2Kings13:17 Amugira ati: Igura edirisa erikureeba oburugwa-izooba. Onu agiigura. Reero Elisha amugira ati: Rasha. Nawe arasha. Onu agira ati: Ogwo n'omwambi gwa Nyakubaho gw'obusinguzi, omwambi gw'okusingura Siriya. Ahabw'okuba noija kurwanisiza Abasiriya Afeki, okuhitsya obu oraabamareho." 
2Kings13:18 Bwanyima amugira ati: Kwata emyambi. N'onu agikwata. Reero agira omugabe wa Isiraeli ati: Giteere aha nsi, nawe ku agiteera aha nsi emirundi eshatu, arereera." 
2Kings13:19 Ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga nikwo kumugwerwa kubi, akamugira ati: Okaagiteire aha nsi emirundi etaano nari mukaaga, haza obona kusingura Abasiriya, obamariraho kimwe. Kwonka hati noija kubasingura emirundi eshatu yonka." 
2Kings13:20 Atyo Elisha afa, bamuziika. Obwo emigogo y'Abamoabu ekaba eteera egyo nsi omu itogyera." 
2Kings13:21 Eizooba rimwe ku baabaire nibaziika omuntu, baareeba omutwe gw'abanyagi. Ogwo mutumbi baagunaga omu kituuro kya Elisha baahunga. Haza ogwo mutumbi ku gwahikire guti aha magufa ga Elisha, omuntu yaahimbuuka, yaayemerera." 
2Kings13:22 Hazaeli omugabe wa Siriya akaguma naaganzya Abaisiraeli omu busingye bwa Yehoahazi bwona. 
2Kings13:23 Kwonka Mukama yaabagirira embabazi n'esaasi, yaabaijuka, ahabw'endagaano ye na Aburahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo, tiyaabacwekyereza, nobu kwakuba okubacwera kimwe omumaisho ge, n'okuhitsya hati." 
2Kings13:24 Hazaeli omugabe wa Siriya ku yaafiire, Benihadadi omutabani yaayema omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings13:25 Reero Yehoashi mwene Yehoahazi yaiha ahari Benihadadi mwene Hazaeli endembo zi Hazaeli yaabaire anyagire ishe omu rugamba. Yehoashi yaamusingura emirundi eshatu, yaagarukana endembo za Isiraeli." 
2Kings14:1 Omu mwaka gwa kabiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehoashi mwene Yehoahazi omugabe wa Isiraeli, Amaziya mwene Yoashi omugabe wa Yuda akaza aha ngoma." 
2Kings14:2 Akagizaho aine myaka abiri n'etaano y'obukuru, yaategyekyera emyaka makumi abiri na mwenda ari Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Yehoadaana, owa Yerusalemu." 
2Kings14:3 Amaziya akakora ebirikusiimwa Nyakubaho, kwonka tiyaaba nka Daudi ishenkuru; kureka yaakora nk'ebi Yoashi ishe yaakozire." 
2Kings14:4 Emyanya y'aha butungutungu taragiihireho; abantu baaguma nibagitambiraho ebitambo, nibootereraho obubaani." 
2Kings14:5 Ku yaaherize kuhamira kimwe aha ngoma, yaita abagaragwa be abaitsire ishe." 
2Kings14:6 Kwonka tiyaita batabani baabo; nk'oku kihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'ebiragiro bya Musa, ahi Nyakubaho yaateereireho ekiragiro kirikugira kiti: Baishe b'abaana batariitwa nibaturwa abaana baabo; n'abaana batariitwa nibaturwa baishebo, kureka buri muntu aryaitwa naaturwa ekibi kye." 
2Kings14:7 Reero yaitira Abanyaedomu kakumi omu ruhanga rw'Omwonyo; kandi yaateera Seela yaagikubuura, yaagyeeta Yokiteeli, yaaguma neeyetwa etyo n'eri izooba." 
2Kings14:8 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Amaziya yaatuma entumwa ahari Yehoashi mwene Yehoahazi, mwijukuru wa Yehu, omugabe wa Isiraeli, naamuhaya ati: Rugayo tureebane akaso omu kandi." 
2Kings14:9 Yehoashi omugabe wa Isiraeli nawe yaatuma ahari Amaziya omugabe wa Yuda ati: Ekitojo kya Lebanooni kikatuma ahari kaarwenda yaayo kiti: Ha mutabani wangye muhara waawe, amushwere. Kwonka enyamaishwa za Lebanooni ku zaabaire nizirabaho, zaakiribata kyabandama." 
2Kings14:10 Buzimazima ku osingwire Abanyaedomu, waagira eigundu. Yeraatire obusinguzi bwawe; kwonka ogume omuka. Mbwenu nooyendera ki kutaara akabi, iwe n'Abaayuda mukafa?" 
2Kings14:11 Kwonka ebyo Amaziya tarabyeteireho, Yehoashi omugabe wa Isiraeli nikwo kuhurura, akabugabugana na Amaziya omugabe wa Yuda, bakarwanira orugamba Betishemeshi ey'omuri Buyuda." 
2Kings14:12 Abaayuda bakasingurwa Abaisiraeli; buri muntu akahunga naataaha owe. 
2Kings14:13 Yehoashi omugabe wa Isiraeli akakwatira Betishemeshi Amaziya omugabe wa Yuda, mwene Yoashi, mwijukuru wa Ahaziya. Reero akaija Yerusalemu, akasheenyagura ekigo kyayo ekirikuhitsya emikono magana ana, okwiha aha irembo rya Efuraimu okuta aha irembo ry'Akeekubo." 
2Kings14:14 Akanyaga ezaabu n'efeeza, n'ebintu byona ebi yaashangire omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'omu mabiikiro g'omu kikaari ky'omugabe. Akabahambamu abantu, baaba omukwato; bwanyima akagaruka Samariya." 
2Kings14:15 Endiijo mirimo ya Yehoashi, n'ebindi ebi yaakozire, n'amaani ge, n'oku yaarwaine na Amaziya omugabe wa Yuda, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings14:16 Bwanyima Yehoashi akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru. Baamuziika omuri Samariya, ahi baziika abagabe ba Isiraeli. Yeroboamu omutabani yaamuhungurira." 
2Kings14:17 Amaziya mwene Yoashi omugabe wa Yuda akamara emyaka ikumi n'etaano, Yehoashi mwene Yehoahazi omugabe wa Isiraeli aherize kufa." 
2Kings14:18 Ebindi ebi Amaziya yaakozire bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda. 
2Kings14:19 Abazigu be ku baamugiiriire enaama y'okumwitira omuri Yerusalemu, yaahungira Lakishi. Kwonka baayohereza ab'okumukurata Lakishi, baamwitirayo." 
2Kings14:20 Omutumbi gwe baagureetera aha mbaraasi, baaguziika Yerusalemu omu rurembo rwa Daudi, ahi baziikire baishenkuru." 
2Kings14:21 Abantu ba Yuda boona baareeta Uziya, ow'emyaka ikumi na mukaaga y'obukuru, baamwemeka, yaaba omugabe omu mwanya gwa Amaziya ishe." 
2Kings14:22 Uziya ogwo niwe yaayombekire busya Elati, akagigarurira Abaayuda, ishe yaaherize kufa." 
2Kings14:23 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'etaano ogomu busingye bwa Amaziya mwene Yoashi omugabe wa Yuda, Yeroboamu mwene Yehoashi omugabe wa Isiraeli akaza aha ngoma omuri Samariya, yaategyekyera emyaka makumi ana na gumwe." 
2Kings14:24 Akakora ebirikugwisa kubi Nyakubaho, tiyaareka bibi bya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati ebi yaacumuziise Isiraeli." 
2Kings14:25 Akagaruraho ebyanga bya Isiraeli okwiha ahi baraba nibaza Hamati okuta aha Nyanja ya Araba, nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli yaakigambiise omuheereza we Yona omurangi mwene Amitaayi, owaarugire Gatiheferi." 
2Kings14:26 Manya Nyakubaho akareeba Abaisiraeli nibabonabonesibwa munonga, hataine n'omwe otsigaireho; yaaba muhuuku nari ow'obusingye, nobu yaakuba ow'okubaha emikono." 
2Kings14:27 Kwonka Nyakubaho akaba atarikwenda kumaraho Abaisiraeli, ngu beebere kimwe omu nsi. Nikyo yaabajuniire naakoresa Yeroboamu mwene Yehoashi." 
2Kings14:28 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Yeroboamu n'ebindi byona ebi yaakozire, amaani ge, oku yaarwaine, n'oku yaakubururiire Isiraeli Damasiko na Hamati ebyabaire biri ebya Yuda, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings14:29 Bwanyima Yeroboamu akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru abagabe ba Isiraeli; omutabani Zekariya yaayema omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings15:1 Omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri na mushanju ogw'omu busingye bwa Yeroboamu omugabe wa Isiraeli, Uziya mwene Amaziya omugabe wa Yuda nibwo yaaza aha ngoma." 
2Kings15:2 Akaba aine emyaka ikumi na mukaaga y'obukuru obu yaaza aha ngoma; yaategyekyera emyaka makumi ataano n'ebiri omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Yekoliya, owa Yerusalemu." 
2Kings15:3 Uziya akakora ebirikusiimwa Nyakubaho, nk'ebi Amaziya ishe yaakozire." 
2Kings15:4 Kwonka emyanya y'obutungutungu teraihirweho, abantu baaguma nibagitambiraho ebitambo, nibagyotereraho obubaani." 
2Kings15:5 Nyakubaho nikwo kurwaza ogwo mugabe ebibembe, akaguma ari omubembe, naaraara omu ngoonyo, okuhitsya obu yaafiire; omutabani Yotamu akareeberera eby'omu kikaari, naategyeka abantu b'omuri egyo nsi." 
2Kings15:6 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Uziya n'ebi yaakozire byona bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda. 
2Kings15:7 Bwanyima Uziya ogwo akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru; baamuziika ahi baziikwa, omu rurembo rwa Daudi. Yotamu omutabani yaayema omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings15:8 Omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu na munaana ogw'omu busingye bwa Uziya omugabe wa Yuda, nibwo Zekariya mwene Yeroboamu yaaza aha ngoma, akategyekyera Isiraeli ameezi mukaaga omuri Samariya." 
2Kings15:9 Akakora ebi Nyakubaho atarikusiima, nk'oku baishenkuru baabikozire. Tiyaareka bibi bya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, ebi yaacumuziise Isiraeli." 
2Kings15:10 Shaalumu mutabani wa Yabeshi akamugirira enaama mbi, yaamuteerera omu maisho g'abantu, yaamwita, yaahungura engoma ye." 
2Kings15:11 Ebindi ebi Zekariya yaakozire, reeba bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings15:12 Ekyo nikyo Nyakubaho yaaraganiise Yehu ati: Batabani baawe, okuhitsya aha b'oruzaaro rwa kana, baryashitama aha kitebe ky'obugabe bwa Isiraeli. Haza nikwo kyabaire." 
2Kings15:13 Shaalumu mutabani wa Yebeshi akaza aha ngoma omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu na mwenda ogw'omu busingye bwa Uziya omugabe wa Yuda, yaategyekyera okwezi kumwe omuri Samariya." 
2Kings15:14 Reero Menahemu mutabani wa Gadi, yaahuruutuka Tiriza, yaija Samariya yaateererayo Shaalumu mwene Yabeshi, yaamwita, yaahungura engoma ye." 
2Kings15:15 Ebindi ebi Shaalumu yaakozire n'enaama mbi ei yaagizire, reeba, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'omu by'Obusingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings15:16 Omu biro ebyo Menahemu akateera Tifusa, yaagicwekyereza n'abagirimu boona n'ebyanga byayo, okwiha Tiriza n'okugumizamu; ngu ahabw'okuba tibaramwiguriire. Nikyo yaarucwekyerereize, akashatura n'abakazi baamwo boona abaine enda." 
2Kings15:17 Omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu na mwenda ogw'omu busingye bwa Uziya omugabe wa Yuda, Menahemu mutabani wa Gadi nibwo yaaza aha ngoma ya Isiraeli, akategyekyera emyaka ikumi omuri Samariya." 
2Kings15:18 Akakora ebi Nyakubaho atarikusiima; omu biro by'amagara ge byona akanga kureka ebibi bya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati ebi yaacumuziise Isiraeli. 
2Kings15:19 Mbwenu Puulu omugabe wa Asiriya ku yaahurwire kuteera egyo nsi, Menahemu yaamuha empiiha z'efeeza obukaikuru mukaaga, ngu amuhwere kuhamya obugabe bwe." 
2Kings15:20 Haza ezo mpiiha Menahemu akaba azishoroorize aha Baisiraeli abatungi boona, buri omwe empiiha makumi ataano z'efeeza, kuziha omugabe wa Asiriya. Omugabe wa Asiriya nawe nikwo kukuba, akarereera kuguma omuri egyo nsi." 
2Kings15:21 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Menahemu, na byona ebi yaakozire bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings15:22 Bwanyima Menahemu akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru; omutabani Pekahiya yaayema omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings15:23 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'etaano ogw'omu busingye bwa Uziya omugabe wa Yuda, nibwo Pekahiya mwene Menahemu yaaza aha ngoma ya Isiraeli omuri Samariya, akategyekyera emyaka ebiri." 
2Kings15:24 Akakora ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho, tiyaareka bibi bya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, ebi yaacumuziise Isiraeli." 
2Kings15:25 Peeka mwene Remaliya omukuru w'engabo ze yaamugiira omu naama n'abashaija makumi ataano b'Abagileadi, yaamwitira Samariya, omu kigo ky'omu kikaari ky'omugabe, yaahungura engoma ye." 
2Kings15:26 Endiijo mirimo ya Pekahiya, n'ebi yaakozire byona, reeba bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings15:27 Omu mwaka gw'ataano n'ebiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Uziya omugabe wa Yuda, Peeka mwene Remaliya nibwo yaaza aha ngoma ya Isiraeli omuri Samariya, akategyekyera emyaka makumi abiri." 
2Kings15:28 Nawe akakora ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho, tiyaareka bibi bya Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, ebi yaagwisizemu Isiraeli." 
2Kings15:29 Omu busingye bwa Peeka omugabe wa Isiraeli, nibwo Tigulati-pileseeri omugabe wa Asiriya yaija, akakwata endembo Iyoni, Abeelibeti-maaka, Yanoa, Kedeshi, Hazori n'ebyanga bya Gileadi na Galilaaya n'ekyanga kya Nafutaali kyona." 
2Kings15:30 Bwanyima Hoshea mwene Eela akagirira Peeka mwene Remaliya enaama mbi, yaamuteera yaamugwisaho, yaahungura engoma ye omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Yotamu mwene Uziya." 
2Kings15:31 Endiijo mirimo ya Peeka, na byona ebi yaakozire, reeba bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
2Kings15:32 Omu mwaka gwa kabiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Peeka mwene Remaliya omugabe wa Isiraeli, nibwo Yotamu mwene Uziya omugabe wa Yuda yaaza aha ngoma." 
2Kings15:33 Akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka abiri n'etaano y'obukuru; yaategyekyera emyaka ikumi na mukaaga omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Yerusha, ari muhara wa Zadoki." 
2Kings15:34 Akakora ebirikusiimwa Nyakubaho, nka byona ebi Uziya ishe yaakozire," 
2Kings15:35 kwonka shi emyanya y'obutungutungu taragiihireho, abantu baaguma nibagitambiraho ebitambo, kandi nibagyotereraho obubaani. Akombeka Eirembo rya ruguru erya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Kings15:36 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Yotamu, n'ebi yaakozire byona, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda." 
2Kings15:37 Omu biro ebyo nibwo Nyakubaho yaatandika kwohereza Rezini omugabe wa Siriya kuteera Buyuda. 
2Kings15:38 Yotamu akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru; baamuziika hamwe nabo omu rurembo rwa Daudi ishenkuru." 
2Kings16:1 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi na mushanju ogw'omu busingye bwa Peeka mwene Remaliya, nibwo Ahazi mwene Yotamu omugabe wa Yuda yaaza aha ngoma." 
2Kings16:2 Ahazi ogwo akatandika kuza aha ngoma aine emyaka makumi abiri y'obukuru; yaategyekyera emyaka ikumi na mukaaga omuri Yerusalemu. Kwonka tiyaakora birikusiimwa Mukama Ruhanga we, nka Daudi ishenkuru oku yaatwarize," 
2Kings16:3 kureka akakuratira emitwarize y'abagabe ba Isiraeli; nangwa yaataho n'okutambira emandwa omutabani kuba ekitambo kicwekize, obwo naatooreza emicwe erikunugwa ey'abanyamahanga abu Mukama yaabingire kuhigiza Abaisiraeli." 
2Kings16:4 Kandi akatambirira ebitambo aha butungutungu, yaayoterera n'obubaani aha bibungo, n'ahansi y'emirinzi." 
2Kings16:5 Mbwenu Rezini omugabe wa Siriya, na Peeka mwene Remaliya omugabe wa Isiraeli bakahurura kuteera Yerusalemu, baagota Ahazi; kwonka tibaabaasa kumusingura." 
2Kings16:6 Ago magingo nibwo omugabe wa Edomu yaagarurira Abanyaedomu orurembo Elati, akarucwamu Abaayuda; Abanyaedomu bakarwijamu, bakarutuuramu n'okuhitsya eri izooba." 
2Kings16:7 Ahazi nikwo kutuma entumwa ahari Tigulati-pileseeri omugabe wa Asiriya, naamugira ati: Nyowe ndi omwiru waawe, kandi omwana waawe. Mbwenu ija ompe emikono onjune omugabe wa Siriya n'owa Isiraeli abarikuntaahirira." 
2Kings16:8 Kandi Ahazi ogwo aihayo efeeza n'ezaabu ebi yaashangire omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'omu mabiikiro g'omu kikaari ky'omugabe, abitwekyera omugabe wa Asiriya nk'ekiconco." 
2Kings16:9 Omugabe wa Asiriya nikwo kumwikiriza, akahurura, akateera Damasiko, akagikwata; abaamwo akabatwara Kiiri, akaita Rezini." 
2Kings16:10 Omugabe Ahazi ku yaagiire Damasiko kubugana Tigulati-pileseeri omugabe wa Asiriya, yaareebayo eitambiro. Mpaho yaatwekyera Uriya omuhongyerezi eky'okurireeberaho ekikozirwe nkaryo; buzimazima ekirikushushanira kimwe naryo." 
2Kings16:11 Ogwo muhongyerezi yaayombeka eitambiro, naakuratira ebi omugabe Ahazi amutwekyeire ari Damasiko. Haza yaaba nikwo yaarikora, onu atakarugireyo." 
2Kings16:12 Omugabe Ahazi ku yaarugire Damasiko, yaareeba eryo itambiro, yaarihika, yaaritemba." 
2Kings16:13 Yaaryokyezaho ekitambo kye ky'okucwetsya n'eky'esaano; yaarishukaho n'eky'ebyokunywa; kandi yaarishukaho eshagama y'ekitambo kye ky'okwekundira. 
2Kings16:14 Reero eitambiro ery'omuringa, ery'omu maisho ga Mukama, yaariiha omu maisho ga Nyaruju, omu mwanya oguri ahagati y'eitambiro rye na Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, yaarita embari ya bumosho ey'eitambiro rye." 
2Kings16:15 Omugabe Ahazi yaaragiira Uriya omuhongyerezi ati: Aha itambiro erihango obe niho waaguma nootambira ebitambo by'okucwetsya eby'omu kasheeshe, n'eby'esaano eby'omu mwabazyo, n'ekitambo ky'omugabe ekicwekize n'eky'esaano, hamwe n'ebitambo by'okucwetsya eby'abantu boona ab'eihanga, n'ebyabo eby'ebyokunywa. Kandi obe niryo waaguma nooshukaho eshagama y'ebitambo byona ebicwekize. Kwonka eitambiro ery'omuringa ribe eryangye ry'okwehanuurizaho." 
2Kings16:16 Uriya omuhongyerezi nawe yaakora ebyo byona, nk'oku omugabe Ahazi yaamuragiire." 
2Kings16:17 Ekindi, Omugabe Ahazi akakomoorora amaguru g'ebitebe by'ahari nyamuziga, yaabibambuuraho ebiremu, yaabiihaho ebinaabiro byabyo. Kandi yaiha ekitanka aha nimi z'omuringa, ezaabaire zikihigikiire, yaakita aha mwariro gw'amabaare." 
2Kings16:18 Reero omuhanda oguriho ekisanga ogw'okurabamu ahari Sabato, ogu baabaire bataire omunda y'ekikaari, n'omuryango ogu omugabe yaabaire ataahiramu omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, yaabiigaza, ngu abone kugwisa gye omugabe wa Asiriya." 
2Kings16:19 Mbwenu ebindi bikoro ebi Ahazi yaakozire, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda." 
2Kings16:20 Bwanyima Ahazi akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa nabo omu rurembo rwa Daudi; omutabani Hezekiya yaayema omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings17:1 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'ebiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Ahazi omugabe wa Yuda, nibwo Hoshea mwene Eela yaaza aha ngoma ya Isiraeli omuri Samariya; akategyekyera emyaka mwenda." 
2Kings17:2 Akakora ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho; kwonka bitari nk'eby'abagabe ba Isiraeli abaamubandiize. 
2Kings17:3 Omugabe Shalumaneseeri owa Asiriya akahurura, yaamurwanisa, Hoshea yaaba omushaija we, yaaguma naamutoijera." 
2Kings17:4 Kwonka omugabe wa Asiriya yaakyenga Hoshea ku ari endeebya, ahabw'okuba akatuma entumwa ahari So omugabe wa Misiri kumuha emikono, kandi yaarereerera aho kutoijera omugabe wa Asiriya, nk'oku yaabaire akora buri mwaka. Omugabe wa Asiriya nikwo kumukwata, akamuta omu kihome." 
2Kings17:5 Bwanyima ogwo mugabe wa Asiriya yaateera egyo nsi, yaahika Samariya, yaagigotera emyaka eshatu." 
2Kings17:6 Omu mwaka gwa mwenda ogw'omu busingye bwa Hoshea nibwo omugabe wa Asiriya yaakwata Samariya, akatwara Abaisiraeli Asiriya bari enkwatwa, akabata omuri Haala, n'aha Mugyera Habori ogw'omuri Gozani, n'omu ndembo z'Abameedi." 
2Kings17:7 Ekyo kikabaho, ahabw'okuba Abaisiraeli bakacumura ahari Mukama Ruhanga waabo owaabaihire Misiri omu mikono ya Faraaho omugabe waayo, baaramya baaruhanga abandi," 
2Kings17:8 baatooreza emicwe y'Abanyamahanga, abu Nyakubaho yaabingire kubahigiza, kandi baakuratira emitwarize ei abagabe ba Isiraeli baabareetsiremu." 
2Kings17:9 Abaisiraeli baaguma nibakorera omu mubonano ebitarikusiimwa Mukama Ruhanga waabo. Baayeyombekyera obutungutungu omu birorero byabo byona, okwiha aha minaara y'abarinzi, okuhika aha ndembo ezeehinguririziibwe ebigo bigumire." 
2Kings17:10 Baayekorera enyomyo z'amabaare n'ebishushani bya Ashera ahari buri katungutungu, n'ahansi ya buri murinzi." 
2Kings17:11 Baaguma nibootererayo obubaani nk'abanyamahanga bu Nyakubaho yaabingire kubahigiza baakozire. Baakora ebintu bibi ebyaitsize Nyakubaho ekiniga. 
2Kings17:12 Baaramya ebishushani ebi Nyakubaho yaabazibiire naagira ati: Mutaribiramya. 
2Kings17:13 Haza Nyakubaho yaaguma naateisa Abaisiraeli n'Abaayuda, naabatumaho abarangi n'abahanuuzi, naabagira ati: Muhindukye, murekye emicwe yaanyu emibi, mworobere ebiragiro byangye, n'ebi naataireho, nk'oku ebiragiro byangye biri, ebi naaragiire baashwenkuriimwe, nkabatumaho abaheereza bangye abarangi." 
2Kings17:14 Kwonka bo tibaahurira, baagangaara nka baishenkurubo abataraikiriize Mukama Ruhanga waabo." 
2Kings17:15 Baagaya ebi yaataireho, n'endagaano ei yaaragaine na baishebo, n'okuteisa oku yaabaire abateisa. Baakuratira ebitaine mugasho, nabo baaba abataine mugasho. Baatooreza emicwe y'amahanga agaabaire gabeehinguririize, agu Nyakubaho yaabeehanangiriize kutatwaza nkago." 
2Kings17:16 Baareka kworobera ebiragiro bya Mukama Ruhanga waabo; baayekorera ebishushani by'enyana ibiri ebiheesirwe, n'ebya Ashera. Baaramya ebirikwaka eby'omu iguru, baataho n'okuramya Baali." 
2Kings17:17 Baatamba batabani baabo na bahara baabo kuba ebitambo bicwekize. Baaraguza, baaroga, kandi baayeheerayo kimwe kukora ebirikugwisa kubi Nyakubaho bikamwitsa ekiniga." 
2Kings17:18 Nikyo Nyakubaho yaagiriire Abaisiraeli ekiniga kingi, akababinga omu maisho ge, hatagire waatsigaraho; kureka ab'oruganda rwa Yuda bonka." 
2Kings17:19 Abaayuda nabo tibaroorobeire biragiro bya Mukama Ruhanga waabo, kureka bakatooreza emicwe ei Abaisiraeli baareetsire." 
2Kings17:20 N'ahabw'ekyo Nyakubaho yaacwa baijukuru b'Abaisiraeli boona, yaababonabonesa, yaabashunikira abanyagi, okuhitsya obu yaababingiire kimwe omu maisho ge." 
2Kings17:21 Nyakubaho ku yaataaniise Abaisiraeli n'ab'omuryango gwa Daudi, Abaisiraeli baayeteeraho Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, kuba omugabe waabo. Haza Yeroboamu ogwo yaareetera Abaisiraeli okutakuratira Nyakubaho, yaabakoresa ekibi kihango." 
2Kings17:22 Abaisiraeli baaguma nibakora ebibi bi Yeroboamu yaakozire; tibaabireka," 
2Kings17:23 okuhitsya obu Nyakubaho yaababingire omu maisho ge, nk'oku yaakigambiise abaheereza be abarangi. Okwo nikwo Abaisiraeli baabingirwe omu nsi yaabo bakatwarwa Asiriya, bakagumayo n'okuhitsya hati." 
2Kings17:24 Mbwenu omugabe wa Asiriya akaiha abantu Babulooni, Kuuta, Ava, Hamati na Shefaruvaimu, yaabata omu ndembo za Samariya omu mwanya gw'Abaisiraeli. Baakubuura Samariya, baatuura omu ndembo zaabo." 
2Kings17:25 Ku baabaire bakitandikire kutuurayo, tibaatiina Nyakubaho. Nawe nikwo kubooherereza entare, zikabaitamu abantu." 
2Kings17:26 Abantu bateekyerereza omugabe bati: Abanyamahanga bu waafurwire, okabata omu ndembo za Samariya tibarikumanya iteeka rya mukama w'omuri egyo nsi. Nikyo abooherereize entare. Mbwenu reeba nizibarya, ahabw'okuba tibarikumanya iteeka rya ruhanga w'egyo nsi." 
2Kings17:27 Omugabe wa Asiriya nawe aragiira ati: Mugarureyo omuhongyerezi omwe aha bu mwaihireyo, agyende atuureyo, abeegyese iteeka rya ruhanga w'egyo nsi." 
2Kings17:28 Mpaho omwe omu bahongyerezi abu baihire Samariya yaija, yaatuura Beteli, yaabeegyesa oku baraaramye Nyakubaho." 
2Kings17:29 Kwonka buri bantu b'eihanga baayekorera ebishushani bya baaruhanga baabo, baabita omu ndaaro z'aha butungutungu ezi Abanyasamariya baabaire bombekire, buri bantu b'eihanga omu ndembo zi batwiremu." 
2Kings17:30 Abaababulooni baakora ebishushani bya ruhanga Sukotibenoti; Abaakuti baakora ebya Neregaali; Abaahamati ebya Ashima. 
2Kings17:31 N'aba Aavi baakora ebya Nibuhazi na Tarutaki. Reero Abashefaruvi baatambira baaruhanga baabo Adurameleki abaana baabo kuba ebitambo bicwekize. 
2Kings17:32 Kwonka kandi baaguma nibaramya Nyakubaho. Baayetooranamu abantu b'okuba abahongyerezi b'obutungutungu, abaagumire nibabatambirira ebitambo omu ndaaro zaabo." 
2Kings17:33 Batyo baaguma nibaramya Nyakubaho, kandi nibaramya baaruhanga baabo, nibakuratira emitwarize y'amahanga gu baarugiremu." 
2Kings17:34 N'eri izooba nibakitwaza nk'okwabo kwa ira. Tibarikuramya Nyakubaho, nobu kwakuba okukuratira ebi yaataireho, n'amateeka nari emigyenzo n'ebiragiro ebi Nyakubaho yaaragiire baijukuru ba Yakobo, ou yaayetsire Isiraeli." 
2Kings17:35 Nyakubaho akakora nabo endagaano, yaabaragiira ati: Mutaritiina baaruhanga abandi, nobu kwakuba okubaramya nainga okubaheereza, nari okubatambira ebitambo." 
2Kings17:36 Kureka mugume muntiine, Nyowe Nyakubaho owaabaihire Misiri n'amaani maingi n'omukono gubangire. Mube niinye mwaguma nimuramya, kandi nimuntambira ebitambo." 
2Kings17:37 Ebi naataireho, n'emigyenzo nari amateeka ebi naabahandiikiire, mube nibyo mwaguma nimutaho omutima, nimubihitsya. Mutariramya baaruhanga abandi." 
2Kings17:38 Kandi mutaryebwa endagaano i naaragaine naimwe. Mutariha baaruhanga abandi ekitiinwa," 
2Kings17:39 kureka mugume mutiine Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, nawe aryabajuna abazigu baanyu boona." 
2Kings17:40 Kwonka shi bo tibarakyetaireho, baatwaza nk'okwabo kwa ira." 
2Kings17:41 Batyo abo banyamahanga baaguma nibaramya Nyakubaho kandi nibaramya ebishushani byabo ebishariirwe. Abaana baabo na baijukuruza baabo baaguma nibakora nk'oku baishebo baakozire okuhitsya n'eri izooba. 
2Kings18:1 Omu mwaka gwa kashatu ogw'omu busingye bwa Hoshea mwene Eela omugabe wa Isiraeli, nibwo Hezekiya mwene Ahazi omugabe wa Yuda yaaza aha ngoma." 
2Kings18:2 Akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano y'obukuru, yaategyekyera emyaka makumi abiri na mwenda omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Abi, muhara wa Zekariya." 
2Kings18:3 Akakora ebirikusiimwa Nyakubaho nk'ebi Daudi ishenkuru yaakozire. 
2Kings18:4 Yaihaho emyanya y'obutungutungu, yaasheenya enyomyo z'amabaare, yaatema enyomyo za Ashera. Yaacwagacwagura enjoka y'omuringa ei Musa yaaheesire; ahabw'okuba okuhitsya omu biro ebyo, Abaisiraeli bakaba nibakigyoterera obubaani; nibagyeeta Nehushitaani." 
2Kings18:5 Akeesiga Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli; tihaagira n'omwe ori nkawe omu bagabe ba Yuda boona abaamukuratiire, nobu baakuba abaamubandiize." 
2Kings18:6 Ahabw'okuba akahamira ahari Nyakubaho, tiyaagira bu amurugireho, yaaguma naakuratira ebiragiro ebi Mukama yaaragiire Musa." 
2Kings18:7 Nyakubaho yaaguma nawe. Ebi yaabaire akora byona biba gye. Akagomera omugabe wa Asiriya, yaayanga ku amutegyeka." 
2Kings18:8 Akasingura Abafilisiti, yaabahitsya Gaaza n'aha myatano yaayo, okwiha aha munaara gw'abarinzi okuhitsya aha ndembo z'ebigo bigumire." 
2Kings18:9 Omu mwaka gwa kana ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Hezekiya, nigwo mwaka gwa mushanju ogw'omu busingye bwa Hoshea mwene Eela omugabe wa Isiraeli, Shalumaneseeri omugabe wa Siriya akahurura, yaateera Samariya, yaagigota." 
2Kings18:10 Aha muheru gw'omwaka gwa kashatu agigotsire, yaagikwata. Samariya egyo akagikwata omu mwaka gwa mukaaga ogw'omu busingye bwa Hezekiya, nigwo gwa mwenda ogw'omu busingye bwa Hoshea omugabe wa Isiraeli." 
2Kings18:11 Omugabe wa Asiriya yaatwara Abaisiraeli Asiriya bari enkwatwa, yaabata Haala n'omu myegyeego y'omugyera Hazori ogw'omuri Gozani, n'omu ndembo z'Abameedi." 
2Kings18:12 Ekyo kikababaho ahabw'okuba tibaroorobeire ebi Mukama Ruhanga waabo yaabaragiire, baita endagaano ye. Baataho n'okuteeta ha bi Musa omugaragwa wa Nyakubaho yaabaragiire, nobu kwakuba okubyorobera." 
2Kings18:13 Reero omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'eshatu ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Hezekiya, Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiriya akahurura, yaateera ebigo bya Buyuda byona ebigumire, yaabikwata." 
2Kings18:14 Hezekiya omugabe wa Yuda yaatuma aha mugabe wa Asiriya ari Lakishi, naamugira ati: Nshobize! Mbwenu ndeka. Kyona eki orancwere ninkyeemera. Omugabe wa Asiriya nikwo kucwera Hezekiya omugabe wa Yuda empiiha z'efeeza akakaikuru kamwe n'obusiriira munaana, n'ez'ezaabu akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi munaana." 
2Kings18:15 Hezekiya yaamuha efeeza zoona ezaashangirwe omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho n'omu mabiikiro g'ekikaari ky'omugabe. 
2Kings18:16 Kandi Hezekiya omugabe wa Yuda, ezaabu ei yaabaire ahundiise enyigi za Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'enti z'emiryango, yaagibambuuraho, yaagiha omugabe wa Asiriya." 
2Kings18:17 Omugabe wa Asiriya akeema Lakishi, yaatuma omukuru w'amahe, n'omukuru w'abashaahu n'omukungu omukuru n'eihe rihango kuteera omugabe Hezekiya omuri Yerusalemu. Baahurura, baija Yerusalemu. Ku baahikireyo, baayemerera aha mukura gw'ekiyanja kya ruguru eky'aha muhanda rugyendwa ogurikuza aha ryogyezo ry'emyenda." 
2Kings18:18 Ku baatumire aha mugabe, haija Eliyakimu mwene Hilukiya, owaabaire ari omukuru w'ekikaari, Shebuna omuhandiiki, na Yoa mwene Asafu omurangi w'amakuru." 
2Kings18:19 Omukuru w'Abakungu yaabagira ati: Mugambire Hezekiya muti: Rubambansi omugabe wa Asiriya naakugira ati: Mbwenu nooyesiga ki? 
2Kings18:20 Noogira ngu ebigambo kusha nibyo biha omuntu oburyo n'amaani g'okurwana orugamba? Mbwenu nooyesiga oha, waaza kungomera?" 
2Kings18:21 Reeba, hati nooyesiga Misiri, orubango rw'ekibingo kihendekire ekicumita ekiganja ky'omuntu okyehimbagiriza. Na Faraaho omugabe wa Misiri nikwo aba aha bamwesiga." 
2Kings18:22 Kandi ku murangire muti: Nitwesiga Mukama Ruhanga waitu; mbwenu shi tiwe ogwo, ou Hezekiya yaihireho obutungutungu bwe, n'amaramizo ge, naagira Abaayuda n'ab'omuri Yerusalemu ati: Mugume muramize omu maisho g'eitambiro eri ery'omuri Yerusalemu?" 
2Kings18:23 Mbwenu nimuhayane na mukama wangye omugabe wa Asiriya. Nyowe mbahe embaraasi enkumi ibiri; haza ndeebe ku muraabe nimubaasa kutunga ab'okuzitemba. 
2Kings18:24 Noobaasa ota kubinga omwe aha bakuru b'engabo orikuhereerukayo omu bagaragwa ba mukama wangye, waaba nooyesiga Misiri ahabw'ebigaari byabo n'abatembi baabyo b'embaarasi?" 
2Kings18:25 Ekindi, noogira ngu mpurwire kuteera ogu mwanya n'okugucwekyereza, ntaragiirwe Nyakubaho? Manya Nyakubaho niwe angizire ati: Hurura, oteere egyo nsi, ogicwekyereze." 
2Kings18:26 Omukuru w'abakungu ku yaaherize kugamba ebyo, Eliyakimu mwene Hilikiya, na Shebuna, na Yoa baamugira bati: Nitukweshengyereza, itwe abairu baawe, otugambire omu Ruramaika; ahabw'okuba niturumanya. Otatugambira omu Ruyudaaya aba bantu b'aha mutwe gw'ekigo babihuriire." 
2Kings18:27 Kwonka omukuru w'abakungu abagarukamu ati: Nimugira ngu mukama wangye antumire kugambira mukama waanyu naimwe ebyo bigambo, batari aba bantu abashutami aha mutwe gw'ekigo, ab'okurya amazi gaabo bakanywa enkari yaabo nkaimwe?" 
2Kings18:28 Bwanyima ogwo mukuru w'abakungu ayemerera, ayamuza omu Ruyudaaya ati: nimuhurire eki Rubambansi omugabe wa Asiriya arikugamba!" 
2Kings18:29 Ogwo mugabe naagira ati: Mutaikiriza Hezekiya kubabeiha; ahabw'okuba tarikwija kubaasa kubajuna. 
2Kings18:30 Mutaikiriza Hezekiya kubeesigisa Mukama, naabagira ati: Buzimazima Nyakubaho niwe araatujune; kandi ngu oru rurembo tirurikwija kurekurirwa omugabe wa Asiriya." 
2Kings18:31 Mutahurira ebya Hezekiya. Ahabw'okuba omugabe wa Asiriya naabagira ati: Mugarukane naanye, muunyehongyere, nibwo buri omwe omuriimwe araarye ebijuma by'emizaabibu ye, n'eby'emitiini ye, akanywa n'amaizi g'omu iziba rye," 
2Kings18:32 okuhitsya obu ndiija, nkabatwara omu nsi erikushushana n'eyaanyu, ensi y'engano na viino, ensi y'emigaati n'emisiri y'emizaabibu, ensi y'emioliva n'obwoki, mubone kugumaho mutafiire. N'ahabw'ekyo mutaikiriza Hezekiya kubahabisa, naabagira ati: Nyakubaho niwe araatujune." 
2Kings18:33 Hariho ruhanga w'abanyamahanga, orajunire ensi ye omugabe wa Asiriya?" 
2Kings18:34 Mbwenu baaruhanga b'Abahamati n'ab'Abaarupaadi barahi? Baaruhanga b'Abasefariva n'ab'Abaheena n'ab'Abaiva barahi? Baraihire Samariya omu mikono yangye? 
2Kings18:35 Omuri baaruhanga boona ab'omuri ezo nsi, nibaahi abaraihire ensi zaabo omu mikono yangye; haza ngu Nyakubaho abone kwiha Yerusalemu omu mikono yangye?" 
2Kings18:36 Kwonka abo bantu baamwetsiza, tibaagira ki baamugarukamu; ahabw'okuba omugabe akaba abaragiire ati: Mutagira eki mwamugarukamu." 
2Kings18:37 Bwanyima Eliyakimu mwene Helikiya omukuru w'ekikaari, na Shebuna omuhandiiki w'ebirikubaho, na Yoa mwene Asafu baija, baayegaranjurira Hezekiya bataagwire ebi bajwaire, baamuteekyerereza ebi omukuru w'abakungu yaagamba." 
2Kings19:1 Omugabe Hezekiya ku yaabihuriire, yaataagura ebi ajwaire, yaajwara ekiguniya; yaaza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Kings19:2 Yaatuma aha murangi Isaaya mwene Amozi, Eliyakimu omukuru w'ekikaari, na Shebuna omuhandiiki, n'abahongyerezi abakuru, bajwaire ebiguniya." 
2Kings19:3 Baamugira bati: Hezekiya yaakutumaho ati: Eri izooba n'ery'obusaasi n'okufubirwa, n'okuhemurwa. Abaana baahitsya obunaku bw'okuzaarwa, kwonka amaani g'okubazaara tigariho." 
2Kings19:4 Ningira ngu Mukama Ruhanga waawe ahuriire byona ebigambirwe omukuru w'abakungu, ou mukama we omugabe wa Asiriya atumire kujuma Ruhanga ohuriire. Shana Mukama Ruhanga waawe akaamuhana ahabw'ebi ahuriire. N'ahabw'ekyo yeshengyereze Ruhanga nooshabira abahonokire abakiriho." 
2Kings19:5 Abagaragwa b'omugabe Hezekiya ku baahikire Isaaya," 
2Kings19:6 yaabagira ati: Mugambire mukama waanyu muti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Otatiina ebigambo bi ohuriire, ebi abagaragwa b'omugabe wa Asiriya banjumire." 
2Kings19:7 Reeba, naaza kumutamu ogundi mutima, ahurire orukuru, agarukyeyo omu nsi ye, haza mmwitireyo." 
2Kings19:8 Bwanyima omukuru w'abakungu agarukayo, ashanga omugabe wa Asiriya naarwanisa ab'omu rurembo Libuna, ahabw'okuba akaba ahuriire ku arugire Lakishi." 
2Kings19:9 Omugabe Senakeribu ku yaahuriire abarikugira ngu: Reeba, Tiruhaaka omugabe wa Etiopiya ahurwire kukuteera, yaagaruka yaatuma entumwa ahari Hezekiya ati:" 
2Kings19:10 Nimwirooko mugire Hezekiya omugabe wa Yuda, muti: Otaikiriza Ruhanga waawe ou orikwesiga kukubeiha naakuraganisa ati: Yerusalemu terikwija kurekurirwa omugabe wa Asiriya kugisingura." 
2Kings19:11 Manya okahurira oku abagabe ba Asiriya baagizire ensi zoona, bakazicwekyerereza kimwe. Noogira ngu niiwe oraakire?" 
2Kings19:12 Mbwenu baaruhanga barajunire amahanga gu baatatenkuru baacwekyereize? Amahanga Gozani, Harani, Rezefi, n'Abanyaedeni, abaabaire batwire Telasa;" 
2Kings19:13 omugabe wa Hamati, n'owa Arupaadi, n'omugabe w'orurembo rw'Abasefaava, n'owa Hena, nari owa Iiva, barahi?" 
2Kings19:14 Hezekiya ku yaatungire ebaruha ei entumwa zaamureeteire, yaagishoma. Atyo yaaza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, yaagishashaanurira omu maisho ga Mukama." 
2Kings19:15 Yaashabira omu maisho ge ati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli; Iwe otuura osingami ahari baakerubi! Niiwe Ruhanga wenka otegyeka obugabe bwona obw'omu nsi. Niiwe waahangire eiguru n'ensi. 
2Kings19:16 Mbwenu, ai Nyakubaho, tega okutu ohurire. Obuuruure amaisho, oreebe. Haza ohurire ebigambo bya Senakeribu ebi atumire naakujuma, iwe Ruhanga ohuriire!" 
2Kings19:17 Omu mazima, ai Nyakubaho, abagabe ba Asiriya bakacwekyereza amahanga n'ensi zaago," 
2Kings19:18 baanaga baaruhanga baago omu muriro, ahabw'okuba bakaba batari baaruhanga; kureka bari ebintu ebikozirwe engaro z'abantu omu biti n'omu mabaare. Nikyo baacwekyerereziibwe." 
2Kings19:19 Mbwenu, ai Mukama Ruhanga waitu, naakweshengyereza, otujune ogwo muntu w'amaani; abagabe boona ab'omu nsi babone kumanya, ai Nyakubaho, ku niiwe oba Ruhanga wenka." 
2Kings19:20 Bwanyima Isaaya mwene Amozi akatuma ahari Hezekiya ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli yaagira ati: Mpuriire ebi onshabire, ebikwatiraine na Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiriya." 
2Kings19:21 Ebi nibyo Nyakubaho amugambireho ati: Siyooni neekugaya, kandi neekushekyeerera. Na Yerusalemu neekuha mutinzi." 
2Kings19:22 N'oha ou okuneeteire, okajuma? N'oha ou okabukiire, okateera ekitsyori? Ti Nyowe Orikwera owa Isiraeli?" 
2Kings19:23 Oyohereize entumwa zaawe kuunyeraatira, Nyowe Nyakubaho, noogira ngu iwe n'ebigaari byawe oinamukire, waasingura enshozi ndaingwa munonga, waahika n'aha mutwe gwa Lebanooni. Waatema zaakaarwenda zaayo n'emisisa yaayo emirungi munonga. Waahika omu bweshereko bwayo obw'ahare munonga, omu kibira kyayo ekikwataniire kimwe. Waayeraata oti:" 
2Kings19:24 Nkafukura amaziba, naanywa amaizi g'omu mahanga. Naaribatiirira emigyera ya Misiri yoona, naagyomya." 
2Kings19:25 Torahuriire ku naamaririire ira kukikora? Omu biro bya ira nkacuma enaama y'okukora ebi hati ndikuhikiiriza, ngu obone kucwekyereza endembo zigumire, ozihindure amatongo." 
2Kings19:26 Obwo abazitwiremu bataine maani bahahaire omutima, kandi bashobangiriirwe: bari nk'ebimezire omu ishwa, nari obunyaatsi bw'omuroba: bari nk'ebinyaatsi ebimezire aha mutwe gw'enju ebyoma bitakakuzire." 
2Kings19:27 Kwonka nimmanya emishutamire yaawe, n'emihururire yaawe n'emitabaarukire yaawe, n'oku onkabukiire." 
2Kings19:28 Mbwenu okwiha obu onkabukiire, nkahurira amaryo gaawe; niinyija kukushoka eirobo omu nyindo, nkute ekyoma omu kanwa, nkugarure omuhanda gukureetsire." 
2Kings19:29 Mbwenu, iwe Hezekiya, eki nikyo oraamanyireho: Omu mwaka ogu nimwija kurya ebyemerize. Omu gwa kabiri murye eby'emiragarikira yaabyo. Reero omu gwa kashatu mubibe, mugyeshe, mubyare emizaabibu, kandi murye ebijuma." 
2Kings19:30 Haza ab'omuryango gwa Yuda, abariba batsigaireho, baganagane nk'emiti etsimbire emizi okuzimu, ekaana ebijuma eruguru." 
2Kings19:31 Ahabw'okuba ekicweka ky'abaritsigaraho kiryaruga omuri Yerusalemu, n'omutwe gw'abarihonokaho gurugye omu Rushozi Siyooni. Haza ekyo Nyakubaho akikorese eihato." 
2Kings19:32 N'ahabw'ekyo Nyakubaho naagamba aha bikwatiraine n'omugabe wa Asiriya ati: Tarikwija kutaaha omuri oru rurembo; nobu kwakuba okurashamu omwambi; nari okuruza omu kaso akwaitse engabo; nainga okurugotesa omutuumo gw'eitaka. 
2Kings19:33 Omuhanda gwamureetsire nigwo gurimugarurayo. Tarigira bu ataahire omuri oru rurembo. Nikwo Nyakubaho arikugira. 
2Kings19:34 Ahabw'okuba nyowe ahabwangye n'ahabw'omwiru wangye Daudi, ndyarwana ahari oru rurembo, ndujune." 
2Kings19:35 Haza ekyo kiro maraika wa Nyakubaho akatimbirayo, yaita abantu akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi munaana n'enkumi itaano omu b'omu rusiisira rw'Abasiriya. Mbwenu abantu ku baimukire kare omu kasheeshe, baashanga abo bantu boona bari emitumbi." 
2Kings19:36 Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiriya atyo arugayo, agaruka owe, aguma Nineeve." 
2Kings19:37 Eizooba rimwe ku yaabaire naaramiza Nisirooki ruhanga we omu ndaaro, abatabani Adurameleki na Sharezeeri baamwita, baahungira omu nsi ya Araraati. Omutabani Esarihadoni yaamuhungurira." 
2Kings20:1 Omu biro ebyo, Hezekiya akarwara; ku yaabaire abuzire kakye kufa, omurangi Isaaya mwene Amozi yaija kumureeba, yaamugira ati: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Tebeekanisa eby'eka yaawe, ahabw'okuba noija kufa, torikukira." 
2Kings20:2 Hezekiya nikwo kuhinduka akagarura amaisho ow'ekisiika, akashaba Nyakubaho ati:" 
2Kings20:3 Ai Nyakubaho, mbwenu ninkweshengyereza, ijuka oku ntuura ndi omwesigwa omu maisho gaawe, ninkworobera n'omutima gwangye gwona, kandi ninkora ebi osiima. Hezekiya atyo arira munonga." 
2Kings20:4 Kwonka Isaaya ku yaabaire atakarugire omu rurembo, Nyakubaho yaamugira ati:" 
2Kings20:5 Garukayo ogambire Hezekiya omukuru w'abantu bangye oti: Mukama Ruhanga wa Daudi sho yaagira ati: Naahurira okushaba kwawe, naareeba amarira gaawe. Mbwenu niinyija kukukiza; aha kiro kya kashatu oze omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Kings20:6 Kandi nkwongyereho endiijo myaka ikumi n'etaano. Niinyija kukujuna n'orurembo oru, mbaihe omu mikono y'omugabe wa Asiriya. Ndwanirire oru rurembo, ahabwangye, n'ahabw'omwiru wangye Daudi." 
2Kings20:7 Bwanyima Isaaya agira ati: Nimureete embumburi y'ebijuma by'omutiini. Haza bagitware, bagibatikye ahari ekyo kizimba, akire." 
2Kings20:8 Hezekiya abuuza Isaaya ati: Nimmanyira hi ku Nyakubaho arikwija kunkiza, nkaza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, aha izooba rya kashatu?" 
2Kings20:9 Isaaya amugarukamu ati: Eki nikyo Nyakubaho araakumanyisizeho, ku arikwija kukora eki yaakuraganisa. Mbwenu nooyenda ekicuucu kigyende omu maisho entambwe ikumi, nari kigarukye enyima entambwe ikumi?" 
2Kings20:10 Hezekiya amugarukamu ati: Nikirahukira ekicuucu okugyenda omu maisho entambwe ikumi; haakiri okireka, kigaruka enyima entambwe ikumi." 
2Kings20:11 Isaaya atyo atakira Nyakubaho. Nawe agarura enyima ekicuucu entambwe ikumi ezi kyabaire kitentebukire aha kintu kya Ahazi ekirikugyera eshaaha. 
2Kings20:12 Omu biro ebyo Merodaki-baladaani, mwene Baladaani, omugabe wa Babulooni, akatuma entumwa, yaazikwatsa ebaruha n'ekiconco kubitwarira Hezekiya; ahabw'okuba akahurira ku arwaire." 
2Kings20:13 Hezekiya yaazaakiira ashemereirwe, yaazooreka byona ebiri omu nju ye ey'eibiikiro: efeeza, ezaabu, emigaju, amajuta g'obuguzi bwingi n'ahu abiika eby'okurwanisa, n'ebindi byona ebi baashangire omu mabiikiro ge. Tiyaagira kintu na kimwe eki ataraboorekire mu nju ye, nari omu bugabe bwe bwona." 
2Kings20:14 Bwanyima omurangi Isaaya akaija aha mugabe Hezekiya, yaamubuuza ati: Abo bantu bagambire ki? Kandi bakuzindukiire nibaruga hi? Hezekiya amugarukamu ati: Barugire omu nsi ya hare Babulooni." 
2Kings20:15 Onu ati: Bareebire ki omu nju yaawe? Hezekiya amugarukamu ati: Bareebire eby'omu nju yangye byona. Tihariho kintu na kimwe eky'omu ibiikiro ryangye eki ntaboorekire. 
2Kings20:16 Atyo Isaaya agira Hezekiya ati: Hurira eki Nyakubaho arikugamba. 
2Kings20:17 Reeba, obunaku nibwija kuhika, obu byona ebiri omu nju yaawe, n'ebi baashwenkuru baabiikire okuhitsya eri izooba, biritwarwa Babulooni hataine kitsigaireho. Nikwo Nyakubaho arikugira." 
2Kings20:18 Kandi bamwe omuri batabani baawe abu oyezaariire, abarikukomookaho, baryatwarwa bari enkwatwa, babe abashaahu b'omu kikaari ky'omugabe wa Babulooni." 
2Kings20:19 Na Hezekiya agira Isaaya ati: Ekigambo kya Nyakubaho eki waagamba ni kirungi. Ahabw'okuba akateekateeka ati: Niho harikwija kubaho obusingye n'obugogyeere omu biro byangye nkiriho. 
2Kings20:20 Ebindi ebi Hezekiya yaakozire, n'eby'obumanzi bwe, n'oku yaatimbiise ekiyanja, akateeza omukura, akareeta amaizi omu rurembo, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda." 
2Kings20:21 Bwanyima Hezekiya akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru; omutabani Manaase yaayema omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings21:1 Manaase obu yaaza aha ngoma, akaba aine emyaka ikumi n'ebiri y'obukuru, yaategyekyera emyaka makumi ataano n'etaano ari Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Hefuziba." 
2Kings21:2 Manaase ogwo akakora ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho. Yaatooreza emitwarize erikunugwa, ey'abanyamahanga bu Nyakubaho yaabingire kuhigiza Abaisiraeli." 
2Kings21:3 Ahabw'okuba akagaruka yaayombeka obutungutungu bu Hezekiya ishe yaabaire asheenyire. Yaateeraho Baali amatambiro, yaakora ebishushani bya Ashera, nk'oku Ahabu omugabe wa Isiraeli yaakozire. Yaaramya ebirikwakira omu iguru byona, yaabigaragira." 
2Kings21:4 Kandi yaayombekyera baaruhanga amatambiro omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, ei Nyakubaho yaagizire ati: Omuri Yerusalemu nimwo abantu bariguma nibandamiza." 
2Kings21:5 Yaataho n'okwombekyera ebirikwakira omu iguru amatambiro omu bibuga byombi ebya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. 
2Kings21:6 Yaatamba omutabani kuba ekitambo kicwekize. Yaaraguza, yaakora emiguriko, yaaraguza aha barikugambisa emizimu, n'aha bafumu. Akakora bingi ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho, yaamugwisa kubi munonga." 
2Kings21:7 Reero ekishushani kya Ashera ekisharwire, eki yaakozire yaakita omuri Nyaruju ei Nyakubaho yaagambiire Daudi n'omutabani Solomooni ati: Omuri egi nju, n'omuri Yerusalemu ei naatooraine omu nganda za Isiraeli zoona, nimwo bariguma nibandamiza." 
2Kings21:8 Kandi Abaisiraeli ku baritaho omutima, baakora ebi naabaragiire byona, kandi baakuratira eby'omu biragiro byona ebi omugaragwa wangye Musa yaabaragiire, tindibazengyereza bundi kubaiha omu nsi ei naahaire baishebo." 
2Kings21:9 Kwonka bo tibarakyetaireho; na Manaase yaababeihabeiha; baakora ebibi ebirikukira ebi amahanga gu Nyakubaho yaacwekyereize kuhigiza Abaisiraeli gaakozire. 
2Kings21:10 Bwanyima Nyakubaho yaagambisa abaheereza be abarangi ati: 
2Kings21:11 Ahabw'okuba Manaase omugabe wa Yuda akozire ebi bihagaro, yaakora ebibi ebirikukira ebi Abaamoni abaamubandiize baakozire, yaacumuzisa Abaayuda, baaramya ebishushani bi yaataireho." 
2Kings21:12 N'ahabw'ekyo Nyakubaho Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Reeba, naaza kugwisiza Yerusalemu na Buyuda akagwe, weena oraakahurire, amatu ge gateere enduuru." 
2Kings21:13 Ndyagyeresa Yerusalemu akagoye, nk'oku naagyereise Samariya, na kariishoriisho ei naagyereise ab'omuryango gw'Ahabu; ndyamara omuri Yerusalemu abantu nk'oku omuntu aragaza orwabya, akarujuumika." 
2Kings21:14 Kandi ndyanagaijura abantu bangye abaatsigaireho, mbashunikire abazigu baabo boona, babasingure, babakwate, kandi babanyagye." 
2Kings21:15 Ahabw'okuba bakozire ebi ntarikusiima, bangwisa kubi munonga, okwiha baishebo baaba kuruga Misiri, n'okuhitsya eri izooba." 
2Kings21:16 Ekindi, Manaase akaitira busha abantu baingi, eshagama yaabo yaashandaara omuri Yerusalemu oku n'oku; yaataho n'okucumuzisa Abaayuda, baakora ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho." 
2Kings21:17 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Manaase n'ebindi ebi yaakozire byona, n'ebibi bi yaakozire bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda." 
2Kings21:18 Bwanyima Manaase akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru. Yaaziikwa omu musiri gw'aha nju ye, ogwa Uuza. Omutabani Amoni yaamuhungurira." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni akaba aine emyaka makumi abiri n'ebiri y'obukuru obu yaaza aha ngoma; yaategyekyera emyaka ebiri omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Meshulemeti muhara wa Haruzi owa Yotiba. 
2Kings21:20 Amoni nawe akakora ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho, nk'oku Manaase ishe yaakozire." 
2Kings21:21 Akakuratira emitwarize ya ishe yoona, yaaheereza ebishushani ebirikuramibwa ebi ishe yaaheereize, kandi yaabiramya." 
2Kings21:22 Akatsigaho Mukama Ruhanga wa baishenkuru, tiyaakuratira mitwarize ye." 
2Kings21:23 Reero abagaragwa ba Amoni ogwo, baamugirira enaama mbi, baamwitira omu nju ye." 
2Kings21:24 Kwonka abantu b'omuri egyo nsi baita abantu boona abaagiriire omugabe Amoni enaama mbi, baayemeka omutabani Yosiya, kuba omugabe omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings21:25 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Amoni, ei yaakozire, ehandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda." 
2Kings21:26 Amoni ogwo akaziikwa omu kituuro kye, omu musiri gwa Uuza; omutabani Yosiya yaayema omu mwanya gwe." 
2Kings22:1 Yosiya akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka munaana y'obukuru, yaategyekyera emyaka makumi ashatu na gumwe omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Yedida, ari muhara wa Adaaya owa Bozikati." 
2Kings22:2 Yosiya ogwo akakora ebirikusiimwa Nyakubaho, yaakuratira emitwarize yoona eya Daudi ishenkuru; tiyaateishuka kugira obu atoire ogwa buryo nari ogwa bumosho." 
2Kings22:3 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi na munaana ogw'omu busingye bwe, nibwo ogwo mugabe Yosiya yaatuma omuhandiiki we Shafani, mwene Azaliya, mwijukuru wa Meshulaamu, kuza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho naamugira ati:" 
2Kings22:4 Irooko ogyende, ohikye Hilikiya omuhongyerezi omukuru, omugambire abare empiiha zoona ezi abantu bareetsire omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, ezi abarinzi b'Eirembo babaihireho." 
2Kings22:5 Bazihe abakozi abarikureeberera Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, nabo bazihe abarikugihunduuza." 
2Kings22:6 Ababaizi, abombeki, n'abarikwombekyesa amabaare. Kandi ezindi zibe ez'okugura embaaho n'amabaare gacweregyereire, eby'okuhunduuza Nyaruju." 
2Kings22:7 Kwonka empiiha zi baabakwatsize, mutababuuza oku baazitwarize, ahabw'okuba nibazikoresa n'obwesigwa." 
2Kings22:8 Hilikiya omuhongyerezi omukuru akagambira Shafani omuhandiiki ati: Nzoire ekitabo ky'eiteeka omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Hilikiya atyo akiha Shafani, n'onu akishoma." 
2Kings22:9 Bwanyima Shafani omuhandiiki agaruka ow'omugabe amugambira ati: Abairu baawe baihire empiiha zoona ezi bashangire omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho baazikwatsa abakozi abarikugireeberera. 
2Kings22:10 Reero Shafani omuhandiiki agambira omugabe ati: Hilikiya omuhongyerezi ampaire ekitabo. Shafani atyo akishomera omugabe. 
2Kings22:11 Omugabe ku yaahuriire ebigambo by'omu kitabo ky'ebiragiro, yaataagura ebi ajwaire." 
2Kings22:12 Ogwo mugabe yaaragiira Hilikiya omuhongyerezi, na Ahikaamu mutabani wa Shefani, na Akiboora mutabani wa Mikaaya, na Shafani omuhandiiki, na Asaaya omugaragwa w'omugabe, naabagira ati:" 
2Kings22:13 Mugyende muunyehanuurize ahari Nyakubaho kandi muhanuurize n'abantu na Yuda yoona aha by'omuri eki kitabo ekizoirwe. Manya Nyakubaho atwiniire ekiniga, ahabw'okuba baatatenkuriitwe tibaroorobeire ebiri omuri eki kitabo kukora byona ebihandiikirwemu, ebikwatiraine naitwe." 
2Kings22:14 Hilikiya omuhongyerezi, na Ahikaamu, na Akiboora, na Shafani, na Asaaya, baaza owa Huluda omurangikazi, muka Shalumu, mutabani wa Tikiva, mwene Harahaasi, omurinzi w'eibiikiro ry'ebijwaro, (obwo Huluda atwire Yerusalemu omu kirorero kyayo kya kabiri), baamuteekyerereza ekibareetsire." 
2Kings22:15 Yaabagambira ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Mugambire ogwo muntu waabantumaho muti: 
2Kings22:16 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kugwisiza akagwe ogu mwanya n'abagutwiremu; nk'ebigambo byona eby'omu kitabo ebi omugabe wa Yuda ashomire oku biri." 
2Kings22:17 Nk'oku baanyimwire, bakooterera baaruhanga abandi obubaani ngu bangwise kubi, ahabw'ebi baakoreise emikono yaabo, naanye nikyo ndikwija kugirira ogu mwanya ekiniga kingi ekitarikwija kwikaikanisibwa." 
2Kings22:18 Kwonka omugabe wa Yuda owaabatuma kwehanuuza ahari Nyakubaho, mumugambire muti: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Ahabw'ebigambo bi ohuriire," 
2Kings22:19 nk'oku oyeteisize, okeebundika omu maisho ga Nyakubaho obu ohuriire ebi ngambire ahari ogu mwanya n'abagutwiremu, ngu guryaba amatongo, kandi gwetwe ogukyeenirwe; mbwenu iwe okaririra omu maisho gangye; naanye nkuhuriire. Nikwo Mukama arikugira." 
2Kings22:20 N'ahabw'ekyo niinyija kukushangisa baashwenkuru, oziikwe omu kituuro kyawe n'obusingye, amaisho gaawe garekye kureeba akagwe ku ndigwisiza ogu mwanya. Batyo baagarukayo, baabiteekyerereza omugabe." 
2Kings23:1 Bwanyima omugabe Yosiya akeeta abakuru b'omuri Buyuda boona, n'ab'omuri Yerusalemu, baateeranira ahu ari." 
2Kings23:2 Reero omugabe yainamuka, yaaza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, hamwe n'abantu boona ab'omuri Yuda, n'abatuuzi ba Yerusalemu boona, n'abahongyerezi, n'abarangi: abantu boona abakuru n'abato. Yaabashomera byona ebiri omu kitabo ky'endagaano, ekyazoirwe omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, bamutegire okutu." 
2Kings23:3 Bwanyima omugabe yaayemerera aha rubaju rw'enyomyo, yaaragaanira endagaano omu maisho ga Nyakubaho: kworobera Mukama n'okukuratira ebiragiro bye, n'ebi yaahamize, n'ebi yaataireho n'omutima gwe gwona, n'amagara ge goona; n'okuhitsya ebiri omuri egyo ndagaano, ebihandiikirwe omuri ekyo kitabo. N'abantu boona baakwatanisa nawe omuri egyo ndagaano." 
2Kings23:4 Omugabe Yosiya akaragiira Hilikiya omuhongyerezi omukuru, n'abahongyerezi boona abarikukurataho, n'abarinzi b'eirembo, kwiha omuri Nyaruju ya Nyajkubaho ebintu byona ebyakoreirwe Baali, na ruhangakazi Ashera, n'ebirikwakira omu iguru byona. Yaabyokyeza aheeru ya Yerusalemu, omu ruhanga rwa Kidirooni, eiju ryabyo yaaritwara Beteli." 
2Kings23:5 Kandi yaihiraho kimwe abahongyerezi b'ebishushani ebirikuramibwa, abu abagabe ba Yuda baabaire bataireho kwoterera obubaani omu butungutungu bw'omu ndembo za Yuda, n'obwehinguririize Yerusalemu, yaabinga n'abarikwoterera obubaani Baali, n'eizooba, n'okwezi, n'enyonyoozi, n'ebindi byona ebirikwakira omu iguru." 
2Kings23:6 Yaahigura omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho enyomyo eyaabaire ehongyeirwe Ashera, yaagiiha omuri Yerusalemu, yaagitwara aha kagyera Kidirooni yaagyokyezayo, yaagihondahonda yaagicwa obusaasingo, yaabumaamagiza omu mwanya gu baziikamu abantu." 
2Kings23:7 Reero yaasheenya amaju g'omugyenzo gw'ediini ag'omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho agu abashaija baabaire bashambaniramu, ahu abakazi baabaire barukiramu enyegamo y'okukingira Ashera." 
2Kings23:8 Abo bahongyerezi boona yaabacwa omu ndembo za Yuda. Yaashiisha obutungutungu obu abahongyerezi baabaire bootereraho obubaani, okwiha Geeba okuta Beerisheba. Kandi yaasheenyagura obutungutungu bw'aha marembo, aharikutaahirwa owa Yeshua omukuru w'orurembo, obwabaire buri aha rubaju rwa bumosho rw'eirembo, omuntu yaaba naataaha omu rurembo." 
2Kings23:9 Abahongyerezi b'omu butungutungu tibaikirizibwa kuza aha itambiro rya Nyakubaho omuri Yerusalemu; kureka baaguma nibarya n'abahongyerezi bagyenzi baabo Emigaati Etatumbisiibwe. 
2Kings23:10 Kandi yaashiishagura Tofeti ey'omu ruhanga rw'Abahinomu ngu hatakaagira owaatambiririrayo Moleki omwana we w'omwojo nari omwishiki kuba ekitambo kicwekize. 
2Kings23:11 Akaihaho embaraasi ezi abagabe ba Yuda baahongyeire eizooba, aharikutaahirwa omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, haihi n'ekishengye kya Natanimeleki omurinzi w'ekikaari ekihereraine nayo, ezaabaire nizirindirwa omu kibuga kyayo. Yaayotsya n'ebigaari by'eizooba;" 
2Kings23:12 n'amatambiro g'aha mutwe gwa kaanyinaabiri ya Ahazi agu abagabe ba Yuda baakozire; n'agu Manaase yaakozire omu bibuga bya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho byombi; yaagahigura, yaagatuura aha nsi, yaagasheenyagura, yaagacwa obusaasingo, eiju ryago yaarinaga omu kagyera Kidirooni." 
2Kings23:13 Kandi ogwo mugabe akashiishagura emyanya etunguukire ey'okuramizamu ey'aha burugwa-izooba bwa Yerusalemu, okuhika aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo bw'orushozi rw'eicwekyererezo, obu Solomooni omugabe wa Isiraeli yaayombekyeire Ashitareeti ekihagaro ky'Abanyasidoni, na Kemoshi ekihagaro ky'Abaamoabu, na Milikomu ekihagaro ky'Abaamoni." 
2Kings23:14 Yasheenyagura enyomyo z'amabaare, yaatemagura enyomyo za Ashera; ahi zaabaire ziri yaahaijuza amagufa g'abantu." 
2Kings23:15 Omugabe Yosiya kandi akasheenyagura eitambiro rya Beteli, omwanya gw'akatungutungu, ogwatairweho Yeroboamu mwene Nebati owaareteire Isiraeli kucumura. Yaasheenyagura eryo itambiro hamwe n'akatungutungu kaaryo. Amabaare gaaryo yaagaatagura, yaagacwa obusaasingo; yaayotsya n'enyomyo ya Ashera." 
2Kings23:16 Reero Yosiya ku yaamagamagire, yaareeba ebituuro aha rushozi. Yaayohereza abantu, baiha amagufa omuri ebyo bituuro, yaagookyeza ahari eryo itambiro, yaarihagaza, nk'oku ekigambo kya Nyakubaho eki omuntu wa Ruhanga yaarangire naaragura eby'ekyo kintu kyabaire kiri." 
2Kings23:17 Bwanyima yaabuuza ati: Ekyo kiijutsyo ki ndikureeba obuseeri n'eky'oha? Abantu b'omuri orwo rurembo baamugarukamu bati: N'ekituuro ky'omuntu wa Ruhanga, owaarugire Buyuda, akaranga ebi bintu bi waakora eitambiro rya Beteli." 
2Kings23:18 Nawe agira ati: Mumurekye agumeyo, hatagira owaakora aha magufa ge. Nabo amagufa ge bareka kugakoraho, hamwe n'ag'omurangi ori owaarugire Samariya." 
2Kings23:19 Kandi Yosiya, endaaro z'aha myanya etunguukire ezaabaire ziri omu ndembo za Samariya, ezi abagabe ba Isiraeli baayombekire kugwisa kubi Nyakubaho, aziihaho. Azigira nk'oku yaagizire ey'omuri Beteli." 
2Kings23:20 Ataho n'okwitira aha matambiro abahongyerezi boona ab'omuri obwo butungutungu, kandi yaagookyezaho amagufa g'abantu. Ebyo ku byahwaire, yaagaruka Yerusalemu." 
2Kings23:21 Omugabe Yosiya akaragiira abantu boona ati: Mugume mukorere Mukama Ruhanga waanyu omugyenzo gw'obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho, nk'oku kihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'Endagaano." 
2Kings23:22 Manya tihakabahoga bugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho nk'obwo, okwiha omu biro by'abaramuzi abaategyekire Isiraeli, nobu bwakuba omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Isiraeli bwona, nari omu bw'aba Yuda." 
2Kings23:23 Kureka omu mwaka gwa ikumi na munaana ogw'omu busingye bwa Yosiya omugabe, bakakorera Nyakubaho omuri Yerusalemu omugyenzo gw'obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho." 
2Kings23:24 Kandi Yosiya akaihaho abarikugambisa emizimu, n'abarogi, na baaruhanga b'omu maka, n'ebishushani ebirikuramibwa, n'ebirikuzira byona ebyabaire biri omu nsi ya Yuda, n'omuri Yerusalemu, ngu abone kuhikiiriza eby'omu biragiro ebyahandiikirwe omu kitabo eki Hilikiya omuhongyerezi yaazoire omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Kings23:25 Yosiya ogwo, omu bagabe boona abaamubandiize tihariho n'omwe owaashushaine nawe kuheereza Nyakubaho n'omutima gwe gwona, n'amagara ge goona, n'amaani ge goona, naakuratira ebiri omu biragiro bya Musa byona. Kandi n'omu baamukuratiire, tihariho n'omwe owaashushaine nawe." 
2Kings23:26 Kwonka shi Mukama tararekire kugirira Abaayuda ekiniga kingi, naabatura ebi Manaase yaakozire akamugwisa kubi." 
2Kings23:27 Ekyarugiremu Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Ndyabinga Abaayuda omu maisho gangye, nk'oku naabingire Abaisiraeli, ncwe oru rurembo Yerusalemu, oru naatooraine, na Nyaruju ei naagizire nti: Nimwo bariguma nibandamiza." 
2Kings23:28 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Yosiya n'ebi yaakozire byona bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda. 
2Kings23:29 Omu busingye bwa Yosiya nibwo Faraaho Neeko omugabe wa Misiri yaahurura kuza aha Mugyera Eufuraati kuha emikono omugabe wa Asiriya. Yosiya omugabe akazayo kumugungira; omugabe Neeko akamwitira Megido aha rugamba; 
2Kings23:30 abagaragwa be bakaiha omutumbi gwe Megido, bakaguta omu kigaari, bakagutwara Yerusalemu; bakamuziika omu kituuro kye; abantu b'egyo nsi bakaihayo Yehoahazi mutabani wa Yosiya, bakamusiiga amajuta, bakamwemeka; akaba omugabe omu mwanya gwa ishe." 
2Kings23:31 Yehoahazi akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka abiri n'eshatu y'obukuru, yaategyekyera ameezi ashatu omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Hamutaali, muhara wa Yeremiya owa Libuna." 
2Kings23:32 Nawe akakora ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho, nk'oku baishenkuru boona baakozire." 
2Kings23:33 Faraaho Neeko akamubohera Ribula omu nsi ya Hamuti, ngu atakaaguma Yerusalemu aha ngoma. Abantu b'omuri egyo nsi yaabacwera omutoijo gw'empiiha z'efeeza akakaikuru kamwe n'obusiriira munaana, n'ez'ezaabu enkumi mukaaga." 
2Kings23:34 Faraaho Neeko yaatoorana Eliyakimu mwene Yosiya kuba omugabe omu mwanya gwa Yosiya ishe; kandi yaahindura eiziina rye, yaamweta Yehoyakimu. Bwanyima yaatwara Yehoahazi Misiri, yaagwayo." 
2Kings23:35 Yehoyakimu yaatoijera Faraaho efeeza n'ezaabu, kandi yaacwera ab'ensi egyo empiiha, ngu bashore, nk'oku Faraaho yaaragiire. Yaashorooza efeeza n'ezaabu aha bantu b'omuri egyo nsi, nka buri muntu oku yaacwereirwe, kuziha Faraaho Neeko." 
2Kings23:36 Yehoyakimu akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano y'obukuru, yaategyekyera emyaka ikumi na gumwe omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Zebiida muhara wa Pedaaya owa Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Nawe akakora ebitarikusiimwa Mukama, nk'oku baishenkuru boona baakozire." 
2Kings24:1 Omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu, Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni akahurura, yaateera Buyuda. Yehoyakimu yaaba omwiru we okumara emyaka eshatu. Bwanyima yaamuhindukana, yaamugomera." 
2Kings24:2 Haza Nyakubaho yaayoherereza Yehoyakimu emigogo y'Abakaludaaya n'ey'Abasiriya, n'ey'Abamoabu n'ey'Abaamoni, kuteera Buyuda kugicwekyereza, nk'oku Mukama yaakigambiise abaheereza be abarangi." 
2Kings24:3 Buzimazima ekyo kikaba aha Baayuda, Nyakubaho akiragiire, ngu abone kubabinga omu maisho ge, naabatura ebibi bya Manaase byona ebi yaakozire," 
2Kings24:4 n'eshagama y'abari mwere, ei yaaseesire. Ahabw'okuba akaijuza Yerusalemu eshagama y'abataine rubanja, Nyakubaho tiyaamusaasira." 
2Kings24:5 Mbwenu endiijo mirimo ya Yehoyakimu, n'ebi yaakozire byona, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Yuda." 
2Kings24:6 Bwanyima Yehoyakimu akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru; omutabani Yehoyakini yaamuhungurira." 
2Kings24:7 Kandi omugabe wa Misiri taragizire bu ahurura kuruga omu nsi ye, ahabw'okuba omugabe wa Babulooni akaba yaakubwire ebyanga byona eby'omugabe wa Misiri, okwiha aha Kagyera ka Misiri okuta aha Mugyera Eufuraati." 
2Kings24:8 Yehoyakini akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka ikumi na munaana, yaategyekyera ameezi ashatu omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Nehushita, muhara wa Elunatani, owa Yerusalemu." 
2Kings24:9 Yehoyakini nawe akakora ebitarikusiimwa Mukama, nka baishenkuru boona oku baakozire." 
2Kings24:10 Omu biro ebyo engabo za Nebukadenezari omugabe wa Babulooni zikahurura, zaateera Yerusalemu zaagigota." 
2Kings24:11 Bwanyima Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni yaija omuri orwo rurembo, engabo ze zirugotsire." 
2Kings24:12 Omugabe Yehoyakini owa Yuda yaayeha omugabe wa Babulooni, we na nyina, n'abagaragwa be, n'abategyeki, n'abakungu b'omu kikaari kye. Omugabe wa Babulooni yaamutwara ari enkwatwa omu mwaka gwa munaana ogw'omu busingye bwe." 
2Kings24:13 Yaanyaga eby'omu mabiikiro goona ag'omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'eby'omu kikaari ky'omugabe. Yaatematema ebintu byona eby'ezaabu eby'omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ebi Solomooni omugabe wa Isiraeli yaakozire, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaakigambire bwabiso." 
2Kings24:14 Akatwara ab'omuri Yerusalemu boona, n'abategyeki boona, n'amamanzi goona. Boona hamwe, enkwatwa baahika kakumi. Yaatwara n'abanyamyoga boona n'abaheesi. Tihaagira waatsigarayo, kureka abooro rukunu ab'omuri egyo nsi." 
2Kings24:15 Mpaho atwara Yehoyakini Babulooni na nyina n'abakazi be, n'abakungu be n'abantu bakuru b'omuri egyo nsi. Abaiha Yerusalemu abatwara Babulooni bari enkwatwa." 
2Kings24:16 Atyo omugabe wa Babulooni ahitsya ezo nkwatwa Babulooni, abashaija boona amamanzi enkumi mushanju, abanyamyoga n'abaheesi rukumi. Boona bari ab'amaani kandi abarwani bahikire." 
2Kings24:17 Reero ogwo mugabe wa Babulooni yaayemeka Mataniya ishento Yehoyakini kuba omugabe omu mwanya gwa Yehoyakini. Kandi yaahindura eiziina rye, yaamweta Zedekiya." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekiya akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka makumi abiri na gumwe y'obukuru, yaategyekyera emyaka ikumi na gumwe omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Hamutaali, muhara ha Yeremiya owa Libuna." 
2Kings24:19 Zedekiya ogwo nawe akakora ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho, nk'ebi Yehoyakimu yaakozire." 
2Kings24:20 Nikyo Nyakubaho yaagiriire ekiniga kingi ab'omuri Yerusalemu n'ab'omuri Buyuda, akarugaho akababinga omu maisho ge; na Zedekiya akagomera omugabe wa Babulooni." 
2Kings25:1 Omu mwaka gwa mwenda ogw'omu busingye bwa Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni, omu kwezi kwa ikumi aha kiro kya ikumi ky'okwo kwezi, Nebukadenezaari ogwo omugabe wa Babulooni akahurura n'eihe rye ryona, yaateera Yerusalemu, yaagigota, baagyombekaho eby'okugigotesa okugyehinguririza." 
2Kings25:2 Baagota orwo rurembo okuhitsya omu mwaka gwa ikumi na gumwe ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Zedekiya. 
2Kings25:3 Aha kiro kya mwenda eky'okwezi kwa kana, enjara yaaba nyingi omuri orwo rurembo, abantu baabura ekyokurya." 
2Kings25:4 Haabaho abaafumura orugo rw'orurembo. Omugabe Zedekiya n'engabo ze baacwa ekyo kiro, baaraba omu irembo eriri haihi n'omusiri gw'omugabe, ahagati y'engo zombi. Baatoora ogurikuza Araba; Abakaludaaya nobu baraabe baabaire beehinguririize orwo rurembo." 
2Kings25:5 Kwonka eihe ry'Abakaludaaya ryagyenda ribingire ogwo mugabe, ryamuhambiza omu mpita za Yeriko, engabo ze zoona zaamuhungaho, zaataataana." 
2Kings25:6 Ekyarugiremu baakwata ogwo mugabe, baamutwarira omugabe wa Babulooni omu rurembo Ribuna, yaamucwera orubanja rw'okuba omugomi." 
2Kings25:7 Baita batabani ba Zedekiya ogwo naabareeba. Bwanyima nawe baamwihamu amaisho, baamubohesa emihama, baamutwara Babulooni." 
2Kings25:8 Omu kwezi kwa kataano, aha kiro kya mushanju ky'okwo kwezi, omu mwaka gwa ikumi na mwenda ogw'omu busingye bwa Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni, Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abaserukare abarinzi kandi omuhi w'obwengye w'omugabe wa Babulooni, akaija Yerusalemu." 
2Kings25:9 Yaayotsya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'ekikaari ky'omugabe, n'amaju goona ag'omuri Yerusalemu, na ibara nju mpango yaagyotsya." 
2Kings25:10 Eihe ry'Abakaludaaya ryona eryahurwire n'omukuru w'Abaserukare abarinzi ryasheenya ebigo ebyehinguririize Yerusalemu. 
2Kings25:11 Reero abandi bantu abu baabaire batsigire omu rurembo, n'abaacwire bakeehongyera omugabe wa Babulooni, hamwe n'abandi boona, Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abaserukare abarinzi yaabatwara Babulooni bari enkwatwa." 
2Kings25:12 Kwonka ogwo mukuru w'abaserukare abarinzi, egyo nsi yaagitsigamu abantu abooro munonga, kuguma nibasharira emisiri y'emizaabibu, n'okuhingisa ente." 
2Kings25:13 Ekindi, Abakaludaaya bakasheenyagura enyomyo z'emiringa n'ebitebe by'ebinaabiro, n'ekitanka ky'omuringa, eby'omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'emiringa yaabyo baagitwara Babulooni." 
2Kings25:14 Kandi baatwara enyungu, n'ebitiiho, na zaamakansi, n'entaatika z'okwotereraho obubaani, n'ebintu byona eby'omuringa ebirikukoresibwa omuri Nyaruju;" 
2Kings25:15 otaireho n'eby'okuguhisa omuriro n'enyabya, ebyabaire bikozirwe omu zaabu, n'ebyabaire bikozirwe omu feeza, omukuru w'abaserukare abarinzi nabyo yaabitwara, nk'oku biri." 
2Kings25:16 Enyomyo zombi, n'ekitanka, n'ebitebe by'ebinaabiro, ebi Solomooni yaakoreire Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'emiringa yaabyo byona bikaba birengyesereize oburemeezi." 
2Kings25:17 Oburaingwa bw'enyomyo emwe bukaba buri mikono ikumi na munaana, kandi etungikirweho ekintu ky'omuringa obwemi bwakyo mikono eshatu. Omutwe gwakyo gwehinguririziibwe akatimba k'amashobane n'ebiri nk'ebijuma by'amakomamahanga, byona biri eby'omuringa." 
2Kings25:18 Bwanyima omukuru w'abaserukare abarinzi akatwara Seraaya omuhongyerezi omukuru, na Zefaniya omuhongyerezi orikukurataho, n'abakumiirizi b'aha irembo rya Nyaruju bonshatu." 
2Kings25:19 Kandi omu rurembo yaihamu omukungu, owaabaire naategyeka engabo, n'abashaija bataano abaha omugabe obwengye abaashangirwe omu rurembo, n'omuhandiiki w'omukuru w'eihe owaabaire ahuruza engabo z'omuri egyo nsi, n'abashaija makumi mukaaga baamwo abu yaashangire omuri orwo rurembo." 
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abaserukare abarinzi, yaabakukumba yaabatwarira omugabe wa Babulooni omu rurembo Ribula."
