2Kings25:21 Ogwo mugabe yaabacoocoora, yaabaitira Ribula omu nsi y'Abahamati. Abaayuda okwo nikwo baihirwe omu ihanga ryabo, bakazaahibwa." 
2Kings25:22 Omugabe Nebukadenezaari owa Babulooni akataho Gedaliya, mwene Ahikaamu, mwijukuru wa Shefani, kuba omutegyeki mukuru w'abantu abu yaatsigire omuri Buyuda." 
2Kings25:23 Mbwenu abakuru b'amahe ab'Abaayuda, hamwe n'engabo zaabo, ku baahuriire omugabe wa Babulooni ngu ataireho Gedaliya kuba omutegyeki mukuru; baija n'abashaija baabo, baashanga Gedaliya Mizipa. Abaizire ni Ishimaeli mwene Netaniya, Yohanani mwene Karea, Seraaya mwene Tanihumeti Omunetofa, na Yazaniya Omumaakati." 
2Kings25:24 Gedaliya yaabarahira n'engabo zaabo, naabagumya ati: Mutatiina abakungu b'Abakaludaaya. Mugume omuri egi nsi, nimuheereza omugabe wa Babuloni. Haza nimwija kuba gye." 
2Kings25:25 Kwonka omu kwezi kwa mushanju, Ishimaeli mwene Netaniya, mwijukuru wa Elishaama, ow'omu baana b'engoma, yaija n'abashaija ikumi baataahirira Gedaliya, baamwita hamwe n'Abayudaaya n'Abakaludaaya bu yaabaire aine Mizipa." 
2Kings25:26 Ekyo kyareetera abantu boona, abakuru n'abato, n'abakuru b'amahe kwimuka, bakahungira Misiri, ahabw'okutiina Abakaludaaya." 
2Kings25:27 Yehoyakini omugabe wa Yuda ku yaabaire amazire emyaka makumi ashatu na mushanju azaahiibwe, omu kwezi kwa ikumi n'ebiri aha kiro kya makumi abiri na mushanju ky'okwo kwezi, Evilimerodaaki omugabe wa Babulooni omuri ogwo mwaka gu yaagiiriireho aha ngoma, ahabw'embabazi ze yaiha Yehoyakini omugabe wa Yuda omu kihome." 
2Kings25:28 Yaagamba nawe naamutwaza gye, yaamushutamya omu mwanya gurikukira ogw'abandi bagabe bu yaabaire aine Babulooni." 
2Kings25:29 Yehoyakini atyo yaajuura ebijwaro by'ekihome, yaamara ebiro by'amagara ge buri izooba naariira aha meeza y'omugabe atarikwosha." 
2Kings25:30 Kandi omugabe buri izooba yaaguma naamuha omugabo gw'eby'okumutunga ebiro by'amagara ge byona. 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu, Seeti, Enoshi." 
1Chronicles1:2 Kanani, Mahalaleeli, Yaredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 Enoka, Metuusela, Lameki," 
1Chronicles1:4 Noa, Sheemu, Haamu na Yafeeti." 
1Chronicles1:5 Beene Yafeeti ni Gomeri, Magoti, Madi, Yavani, Tubali, Mesheki na Tirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Beene Gomeri ni Ashekenaazi, Diifati na Togarima," 
1Chronicles1:7 Beene Yavoni ni Elisha, Tarushishi, Kitimu na Rodanimu." 
1Chronicles1:8 Beene Haamu ni Kuushi, Misiri, Puuti na Kanaani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Beene Kuushi ni Sheeba, Havila, Sabuta, Raama, na Sabuteeka. Beene Raama ni Sheeba na Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kuushi akazaara Nimuroodi owaabandize kuba omushaija kiri-maani omu nsi. 
1Chronicles1:11 Misiri akazaara Ludimu, Anamimu, Lehabimu, Nafutuhimu," 
1Chronicles1:12 Paturusimu, Kasuluhimu (owaakomookirweho Abafilisiti), na Kaputorimu." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaani akazaara Sidoni omujigaijo gwe, na Heeti," 
1Chronicles1:14 n'Abayebusi n'Abaamoni n'Abagirigaashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 n'Abahiivi n'Abaaruki n'Abasiini," 
1Chronicles1:16 n'Abaaruvaadi n'Abazemari n'Abahamati. 
1Chronicles1:17 Beene Sheemu ni Elamu, Ashuri, Arifakisaadi, Ruudi, Aramu, Uuzi, Huuli, Geteri, na Mesheki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arifakisaadi akazaara Sheela, na Sheela yaazaara Eberi." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eberi akazaara abatabani babiri. Omwe yaayetwa Pelegi (ahabw'okuba omu biro bye nibwo ab'omu nsi baayebaganisamu). Reero omurumuna yaayetwa Yokitaani. 
1Chronicles1:20 Yokitaani yaazaara Alumodadi Shelefu Hazarimaaveti, Yeera," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoraamu, Uzali, Diikula," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebali, Abimaeli, Sheeba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiri, Havila na Yobabu. Abo boona bakaba bari beene Yokitaani" 
1Chronicles1:24 Ni Sheemu, Arifakisaadi, Sheela," 
1Chronicles1:25 Eberi, Pelegi, Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugi, Nahori, Teera," 
1Chronicles1:27 na Aburahamu niwe Aburahamu. 
1Chronicles1:28 Batabani ba Aburahamu ni Isaaka na Ishimaeli. 
1Chronicles1:29 Mbwenu aba nibo ruzaaro rwabo. Beene Ishimaeli ni Nebayooti omujigaijo gwe, yaakuratwa Kedari, Adibeeli, Mibusamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishima Duuma, Maasa, Hadadi, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yeturi, Nafishi na Keedema. Abo nibo beene Ishimaeli." 
1Chronicles1:32 Batabani ba Ketura ekinyanshunju kya Aburahamu ni Zimuraani, Yokishani, Medani, Midiyani, Ishibaki na Shua. Beene Yokishani ni Sheeba na Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Beene Midiyani ni Eefa, Eferi, Hanoki, Abiida na Eludaaha. Abo boona bakaba bari ab'oruzaaro rwa Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Aburahamu akazaara Isaaka, Isaaka yaazaara Esau na Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles1:35 Beene Esau nibo aba: Elifaazi, Reueli, Yeushi, Yalamu na Koora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Beene Elifaazi ni Temani, Omari, Zefi, Gatamu, Kenazi, Timuna na Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Beene Reueli ni Nahati, Zeera, Shama na Miiza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Beene Seiri ni Lotani, Shebali, Zibeoni, Ana, Diishoni, Ezari na Dishani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Beene Lotani ni Hoori na Hoamamu, kandi munyaanya wa Lotani akaba ari Timuna." 
1Chronicles1:40 Beene Shobali ni Alivani Manahati, Ebali, Shefi na Onamu." 
1Chronicles1:41 Beene Zibeoni ni Aaya na Anna. 
1Chronicles1:42 Aana akazaara Dishoni, Dishoni, yaazaara Hamurani, Eshiboni, Etirana na Kerani. Beene Ezeri ni Bilihaani, Zaavani na Yaakani. Beene Diishoni ni Uuzi na Arani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Aba nibo bagabe abaategyekire Edomu, hatakabaireho mugabe weena omuri Isiraeli. Beela mwene Beori, ou orurembo rwe rwabaire nirwetwa Dinahaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Beela ku yaafiire, Yobabu mwene Zeera owa Hozira yaayema omu mwanya gwe." 
1Chronicles1:45 Yobabu ku yaafiire, Hushamu ow'omu kyanga ky'Abatemani yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
1Chronicles1:46 Hushamu ku yaafiire, Hadadi mwene Bedadi, owaasingwire Midiyani omu nsi y'Abamoabu, yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe. N'orurembo rwe rukaba nirwetwa Aviti." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadidi ku yaafiire, Samula owa Masireka yaahungura engoma ye." 
1Chronicles1:48 Na Samula ku yaafiire, Shauli owa Rehoboti ey'ahari Eufuraati, yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe." 
1Chronicles1:49 Shauli ku yaafiire, Baalihanami, mutabani wa Akiboora, yaahungura engoma ye;" 
1Chronicles1:50 Baalihanani ku yaafiire, Hadadi yaategyeka omu mwanya gwe; orurembo rwe rukaba nirwetwa Pai, n'omukazi we naayetwa Mehetabeli, muhara wa Metireedi, mwijukuru wa Meezahabu." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadadi ku yaafiire, ensi ya Edomu yaategyekwa abatware aba: Timuna, Aliva, Yeeteti." 
1Chronicles1:52 Oholibama, Eela, Pinoni." 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenazi, Temani, Mibuzaari." 
1Chronicles1:54 Magadieli, Iramu. Abo nibo baabaire bari abatware ba Edomu." 
1Chronicles2:1 Aba nibo batabani ba Isiraeli: Reubeeni, Simeoni, Leevi, Yuda, Isakaari, Zebuluuni," 
1Chronicles2:2 Daani, Yosefu, Benyamiini, Nafutaali, Gaadi na Asheri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Ab'oruzaaro rwa Yuda ni Eri, Onani na Sheela. Abo bonshatu akabazaara ahari Batishua Omunyakanaanikazi. Mbwenu Eri omujigaijo gwa Yuda akakora ebirikugwisa kubi Mukama, yaamwita." 
1Chronicles2:4 Kandi Yuda akazaara ahari Tamari omukaamwana Pereezi na Zeera. Batabani ba Yuda boona baaba bataano. 
1Chronicles2:5 Batabani ba Pereezi ni Hezirooni na Hamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Batabani ba Zeera ni Zimuri, Etani, Hemani, Kalukooli na Dara. Boona bataano." 
1Chronicles2:7 Ab'oruzaaro rwa Karimi ni Akani. 
1Chronicles2:8 Kandi mutabani wa Etani akaba ari Azariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Batabani ba Hezirooni ni Yerameeli, Raamu na Kelubai." 
1Chronicles2:10 Raamu akazaara Aminadabu; na Aminadabu yaazaara Nahashooni, omukuru omuri beene Yuda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nahashooni akazaara Saluma, Saluma yaazaara Boazi," 
1Chronicles2:12 Boazi yaazaara Obedi; Obedi yaazaara Yese. 
1Chronicles2:13 Yese yaazaara Eliyaabu omujigaijo gwe, na Abinadabu omushubiro, na Shimea omugati;" 
1Chronicles2:14 yaakuratsaho Netaneeli owa kana, Radi owa kataano," 
1Chronicles2:15 Ozemu owa mukaaga, Daudi owa mushanju," 
1Chronicles2:16 na banyaanyabo Zeruuya na Abigaili. Beene Zeruuya ni bashatu: Abishaayi, Yoabu na Asaheeli." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaili akazaara Amaasa, kandi ishe wa Amaasa akaba ari Yateeri Omuishimaeli." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu mwene Hezirooni akazaara omuhara Yeriyooti aha mukazi we Azuuba, kandi yaamuzaaraho abatabani aba: Yesheri, Shobabu na Arudooni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azuuba ku yaafiire Kalebu yaashwera Efurata, yaamuzaaraho Huuri." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huuri yaazaara Uri, na Uri yaazaara Bezaleeli." 
1Chronicles2:21 Bwanyima Hezirooni ku yaabaire ahikize emyaka makumi mukaaga y'obukuru, yaashwera muhara wa Makiri ishe Gileadi, yaamuzaaraho Segubu." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubu nawe yaazaara Yairi owaabaire aine endembo makumi abiri na ishatu omuri Gileadi. 
1Chronicles2:23 Kwonka Geshuri na Aramu baabanyaga Haavoti-Yairi na Kenati n'ebyaro byayo, ebirorero makumi mukaaga. Abo boona bakaba bari baijukuru ba Makiri ishe wa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Hezirooni ku yaafiire, Kalebu yaabyama na Efurata muka Hezirooni ishe, yaamuzaaraho Ashuhuuri, owaatembwire Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Batabani ba Yerameeli omujigaijo gwa Hezirooni, ni Raamu omujigaijo gwe, haakurataho Buna, Oreni, Ozemu na Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Kandi Yerameeli akashwera ondiijo mukazi orikwetwa Atara, nyina wa Onamu." 
1Chronicles2:27 Batabani ba Raamu omujigaijo gwa Yerameeli ni Maazi, Yamini na Ekeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Batabani ba Onamu ni Shaamai na Yaada. Batabani ba Shaamai ni Nadabu na Abishuri. 
1Chronicles2:29 Muka Abishuri akaba naayetwa Abihaili; yaamuzaaraho Ahibani na Molidi. 
1Chronicles2:30 Batabani ba Nadabu ni Seledi na Apaimu. Kwonka Seledi akafa bucwekye. 
1Chronicles2:31 Apaimu akazaara Ishi, Ishi yaazaara Sheshani, Sheshani yaazaara Ahilai." 
1Chronicles2:32 Batabani ba Yaada murumuna wa Shamai ni Yeteri na Yonataani. Kwonka Yeteri akafa bucwekye. 
1Chronicles2:33 Batabani ba Yonataani ni Peleti na Zaza. Abo nibo baabaire bari baijukuru ba Yerameeli. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshani we tarazaire boojo, kureka abaishiki. Kandi akaba aine omuhuuku Omunyamisiri orikwetwa Yaruha," 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshani ogwo nikwo kuhingira Yeruha omuhuuku we muhara we akamuzaaraho Atai. 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai akazaara Natani na Natani akazaara Zabadi. 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabadi akazaara Efula na Efula akazaara Obedi. 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi akazaara Yehu na Yehu yaazaara Azariya. 
1Chronicles2:39 Azariya akazaara Helezi, Helezi yaazaara Eleasa." 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasa akazaara Sisimai, Sisimai yaazaara Shalumu." 
1Chronicles2:41 Shalumu akazaara Yekamiya, na Yekamiya yaazaara Elishaama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Kalebu murumuna wa Yerameeli akazaara Mareesha omujigaijo gwe, owaazaire Ziifu. Kandi Mareesha yaazaara Heburooni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Heburooni akazaara abatabani aba: Koora, Tapua, Rekemu na Shema;" 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema yaazaara Rahamu ishe wa Yorikeamu, kandi Rekemu yaazaara Shaamai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Mutabani wa Shaamai ni Maoni, owaazaire Betizuuri." 
1Chronicles2:46 Kandi Kalebu akazaara ahari Eefa ekinyanshunju kye, Harani, Mooza na Gazezi kandi Harani yaazaara Gazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Batabani ba Yahadai ni Regemu, Yotamu, Gehani, Peleti, Eefa na Shaafa." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka ekinyanshunju kya Kalebu akazaara Sheberi na Ririhana. 
1Chronicles2:49 Kandi yaazaara Shaafa omutembuuzi wa Madimaana, na Sheeva owaatembwire Makibeena na Gibea. Muhara wa Kalebu akaba naayetwa Akisa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Abo nibo baabaire bari baijukuru ba Kalebu. Batabani ba Huuri, omujigaijo gwa Efurata, ni Shobali omutembuuzi wa Kiriyatiyearimu," 
1Chronicles2:51 Saluma omutembuuzi wa Beetelehemu, na Harefu omutembuuzi wa Betigarideri." 
1Chronicles2:52 Shobali omutembuuzi wa Kiriyatiyearimu akazaara abandi batabani ab'omuri Haroe, n'ekicweka ky'abatuuzi ba Menuhoti." 
1Chronicles2:53 Kandi ab'enganda za Kiriyatiyearimu aba: Abaitiri, Abapuuti, Abashumati n'Abamishirai, bakakomookwamu Abazorati, n'Abaeshitaoli." 
1Chronicles2:54 Batabani ba Saluma ni Beetelehemu, Abanetopati, Abatirotibesi-yoabu, n'ekicweka ky'Abamaanabati n'Abazoori." 
1Chronicles2:55 Kandi n'ab'emiryango y'abahandiiki abaabaire batwire Yabezi: Abatiraati Abashimeati n'Abasukaati nibo Bakeeni abaakomookire ahari Hamati, ishenkuru w'ab'omuryango gwa Rekabu." 
1Chronicles3:1 Aba nibo batabani ba Daudi abu yaazaariire Heburooni. Ow'omujigaijo ni Amunooni, ou yaazaire ahari Ahinoamu Omunyayezireeli. Owa kabiri ni Daniyeli, ou yaazaire ahari Abigaili Omunyakarumeeli." 
1Chronicles3:2 Owa kashatu ni Abusolomu, ou nyina yaabaire ari Maaka, muhara wa Talumai, omugabe wa Geshuri. Owa kana ni Adoniya, ou nyina yaabaire ari Hagiti." 
1Chronicles3:3 Owa kataano ni Shefatiya, ou yaazaire ahari Abitaali. Owa mukaaga ni Itereamu, ou yaazaire aha mukazi we Egula." 
1Chronicles3:4 Abo omukaaga akabazaarira Heburooni, ei yaamazire emyaka mushanju n'ameezi mukaaga ari aha ngoma. Bwanyima akategyekyera emyaka makumi ashatu n'eshatu omuri Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles3:5 Aba abaana nibo yaazaire ahari Batishua, muhara wa Amieli, ari Yerusalemu: Shimea, Shobabu, Natani na Solomooni." 
1Chronicles3:6 Bwanyima yaazaara aba mwenda: Ibuhaari, Elishaama, Elifeeleti," 
1Chronicles3:7 Nooga, Nefegi, Yafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elishaama, Eliyaada na Elifeeleti." 
1Chronicles3:9 Abo boona ni batabani ba Daudi, otabariiremu abu yaazaire aha binyanshunju. Munyaanyabo akaba ari Tamari." 
1Chronicles3:10 Aba nibo b'oruzaaro rwa Solomooni: Rehoboamu akazaara Abiiya, Abiiya yaazaara Asa, Asa yaazaara Yehoshafati," 
1Chronicles3:11 Yehoshafati yaazaara Yoramu, Yoramu yaazaara Ahaziya, Ahaziya yaazaara Yoashi." 
1Chronicles3:12 Yoashi akazaara Amaziya, Amaziya yaazaara Azariya, Azariya yaazaara Yotamu." 
1Chronicles3:13 Yotamu akazaara Ahazi, Ahazi yaazaara Hezekiya, Hezekiya yaazaara Manaase." 
1Chronicles3:14 Manaase akazaara Amoni, na Amoni yaazaara Yosiya." 
1Chronicles3:15 Batabani ba Yosiya ni Yohaanani omujigaijo, Yehoyakimu omushubiro, owa kashatu Zedekiya n'owa kana Shaalumu." 
1Chronicles3:16 Ab'enda ya Yehoyakimu ni Yekoniya na Zedekiya. 
1Chronicles3:17 Yekoniya ku yaabaire ari enkwatwa omuri Babuloni, yaazaarirayo abatabani aba: Shealiteeli," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malikiramu, Pedaaya, Shenazaari, Yekamiya, Hoshama na Nedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Reero Pedaaya yaazaara Zerubabeeli na Shimeeyi; na Zerubabeeli yaazaara Meshulamu na Hananiya. Munyaanyabo akaba naayetwa Shelomiti. 
1Chronicles3:20 Bwanyima Zerubabeeli yaazaara aba bataano: Hashuba, Oheli, Berekiya, Hasadiya na Yushabuhesedi." 
1Chronicles3:21 Batabani ba Hananiya ni Pelatiya na Yeshaaya. Yeshaaya akazaara Refaaya, Refaaya yaazaara Arunani, Arunani yaazaara Obadiya, Obadiya yaazaara Shekaniiya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Reero Shekaniiya akazaara Shemaaya, Shemaaya yaazaara abatabani aba mukaaga: Hatushi, Igali, Bariya, Neariya na Shefati." 
1Chronicles3:23 Beene Neariya ni bashatu: Elioenai, Hizikiya na Azarikaamu." 
1Chronicles3:24 Beene Elioneai omushanju nibo aba: Hadoviya, Eliyashibu, Pelaaya, Akubu, Yohaanani, Delaaya na Anani." 
1Chronicles4:1 Batabani ba Yuda nibo aba: Pereezi, Hezirooni, Karumi, Huuri na Shobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaya mwene Shobali akazaara Yohati, Yohati yaazaara Ahumai na Lahadi. Abo nibo b'emiryango y'Abazorati." 
1Chronicles4:3 Aba nibo beene Etamu: Yezereeli, Ishima na Idibashi. Munyaanyabo akaba naayetwa Hazeleliponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Reero Penueli akazaara Gedori, kandi Ezeri yaazaara Huusha. Batabani ba Huuri, owaatembwire Beetelehemu, omujigaijo gwa Efurata, nibo aba." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashuhuuri owaatembwire Tekoa akaba aine abakazi babiri: Heela na Naara. 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara yaamuzaarira Ahuzamu, Heferi, Temeni na Hashitari. Abo ni batabani ba Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Batabani ba Heela ni Zereti, Isihaari na Etinaani." 
1Chronicles4:8 Koozi akazaara Amubu, Zobeeba n'ab'emiryango ya Ahariheeli mwene Harumu." 
1Chronicles4:9 Yabezi akaba ari omunyaiziina okukira beene ishe. Nyina akamweta Yabezi naagira ati: Ahabw'okuba nkamuzaarira omu busaasi. 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabezi ogwo akatakira Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ati: Nkaabaasibwa ki ompa omugisha, ohangusya ensi yangye, ongumyaho omukono gwawe ondinda akabi kareka kumpikaho! Haza Ruhanga yaamuha eki yaashabire." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kalebu murumuna wa Shuuha akazaara Mehiri, n'onu yaazaara Eshitoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshitoni akazaara Betiraafa, Pasea na Tehiina ishe wa Irunaahashi. Abo n'abantu abaabaire batwire Reeka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Batabani ba Kenazi ni Otinieli na Seraaya. Kandi batabani ba Otinieli ni Hatati na Meonotai 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai akazaara Ofura kandi Seraaya yaazara Yoabu ishe w'Abageharashi, abaayetsirwe batyo ahabw'okuba abanyamyoga." 
1Chronicles4:15 Beene Kalebu mutabani wa Yefuune ni Irua, Eela na Naamu; kandi Eela yaazaara Kenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Beene Yehaleleeli ni Ziifu, Ziifa, Tiriza na Asaleeli." 
1Chronicles4:17 Beene Ezira ni Yeteri, Meredi, Eferi na Yaloni. Reero aba ni batabani ba Bitiya muhara wa Faraaho, owaashweirwe Meredi, akabaka enda, akamuzaarira Miriyamu na Shaamai na Ishuba ishenkuru w'Abanyaeshitemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Kandi omukazi we Omuyudaaya akamuzaarira Yeredi ishe Gedori; Heberi ishe wa Sooko na Yekutieli ishe wa Zanoa. 
1Chronicles4:19 Batabani ba muka Hodiiya, munyaanya Nahamu, nibo baazaire Keila owa Gerumi na Eshitemoa owa Maakati." 
1Chronicles4:20 Beene Shimoni ni Amunooni, Riina, Benihanari na Tiloni. Beene Ishi ni Zoheti na Benizooha." 
1Chronicles4:21 Beene Sheela mutabani wa Yuda ni Eeri ishe wa Leeka, Laada ishe wa Mereesha, n'ab'emiryango y'oruganda rw'abakozi b'emyenda ya kitaani aba Betashibea;" 
1Chronicles4:22 na Yokimu n'abantu abatwire Kozeeba; na Yoashi na Sarafu, owaabaire ari omutegyeki wa Moabu atakagarukire Beetelehemu. Ebyo bikabaho ira munonga." 
1Chronicles4:23 Kandi abo bakaba bari abanogoozi, abatwire Netaimu na Gedeera, bari abanyamyoga b'omugabe." 
1Chronicles4:24 Batabani ba Simeoni ni Nemueli, Yamini, Yaribu, Zeera, na Shauli." 
1Chronicles4:25 Shauli akazaara Shalumu, Shalumu yaazaara Mibusamu, Mibusamu yaazaara Mishima." 
1Chronicles4:26 Beene Mishima nibo aba: Mishima akazaara Hamueli, Hamueli yaazaara Zaakuri, Zaakuri yaazaara Shimei." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei akazaara abatabani ikumi na mukaaga n'abahara mukaaga, kwonka beene ishe tibarazaire baana baingi, n'oruganda rwabo tirurakanyire nk'orw'aba Yuda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Bakaba batwire Beerisheba, Molaada, Hazarishuali," 
1Chronicles4:29 Biliha, Ezemi, Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 Betueli Horuma, Zikulaagi," 
1Chronicles4:31 Betimarakaboti, Hazarususimu, Betibiri na Shaaraimu. Ezo nizo zaabaire ziri endembo zaabo okuhitsya obu Daudi yaagiire aha ngoma." 
1Chronicles4:32 Kandi bakaba batwire omu byanga ebi: Etamu, Aini, Rimoni, Tokeni na Ashani, birimu endembo itaano," 
1Chronicles4:33 n'omu byaro ebyehinguririize ezo ndembo, okuhikira kimwe aha kirorero Baalati. Ebyo nibyo byanga bi baabaire batwiremu, kandi baine ekitabo ki barikuhandiikamu enzaaro zaabo nk'oku zaabaire nizikuratana." 
1Chronicles4:34 Meshobabu, Yamuleki, Yoosha mwene Amaziya," 
1Chronicles4:35 Yoeli, Yehu mwene Yoshibiya, Yoshibiya ya Seraaya, Seraaya ya Asieli," 
1Chronicles4:36 Elioenai, Yaakoba, Yeshohaaya, Asaaya, Adieli Yesimieli Benaaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 Ziza mwene Shiifi, Shiifi ya Alini, Aloni ya Yedaaya, Yedaaya mwene Shimuri, Shimuri mwene Shemaaya." 
1Chronicles4:38 Abo boona abu amaziina gaabo gaagambwaho bakaba bari abategyeki omu nganda zaabo, kandi emiryango ya baishenkurubo ekakanya munonga." 
1Chronicles4:39 Bakagyenda baahika aha kamizyo ka Gedori, aha bukiizi bw'oruhanga obwa burugwa-izooba, nibasherura ah'okuriisiza amasyo gaabo." 
1Chronicles4:40 Haza baashangayo amariisizo marungi g'obunyaatsi, kandi egyo nsi eri mpango munonga, eine obucureera n'obusingye; ahabw'okuba abatuuzi baamwo aba ira bakaba bari baijukuru ba Haamu." 
1Chronicles4:41 Abo abu amaziina gaabo gaagambwaho bakazayo omu busingye bwa Hezekiya omugabe wa Yuda, baacwekyereza amahema g'abaabaire batwireyo, n'ag'Abameuni abu baashangireyo; baabamariraho kimwe okuhitsya n'eri izooba. Batyo baatuura omu kyanga kyabo, ahabw'okushangayo ah'okuriisiza amasyo gaabo." 
1Chronicles4:42 Kandi bamwe ahari beene Simeoni, abashaija magana ataano, bakaza omu Rushozi Seiri, beebembeirwe Pelatiya, Neariya, Refaaya na Uzieli beene Ishi;" 
1Chronicles4:43 baacwekyereza Abaamaleki abaabaire bahonokireho bakahungirayo; batyo baatuurayo okuhitsya n'eri izooba. 
1Chronicles5:1 Beene Reubeeni omujigaijo gwa Isiraeli. Manya we akaba ari omujigaijo, kwonka ahabw'okuhagaza ekitabo kya ishe, obukuru bwe bukaheebwa batabani ba Yosefu, mwene Isiraeli; nikyo atarabariirwe kuba mukuru omu ruganda nk'obukuru bw'okuzaarwa oku buba." 
1Chronicles5:2 Nobu Yuda yaabaire ari ow'amaani omuri beene ishe, kandi yaakomookirwemu omutegyeki mukuru, kwonka obukuru bw'okuzaarwa bukaguma buri obwa Yosefu." 
1Chronicles5:3 Mbwenu aba nibo beene Reubeeni omujigaijo gwa Isiraeli: Hanoki, Paalu, Hezirooni na Karumi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Yoeli we akazaara Shemaaya, Shemaaya yaazaara Googi, Googi, yaazaara Shimei." 
1Chronicles5:5 Shimei akazaara Miika, Miika yaazaara Reaya, Reaya yaazaara Baali." 
1Chronicles5:6 Baali akazaara Beera, ou Tilugati-pilineseeri omugabe wa Asiriya yaazaahize. Beera ogwo akaba ari mukuru omu Bareubeeni." 
1Chronicles5:7 Omuri beene waabo omu miryango yaabo, nk'oku okukuratana kw'enzaaro zaabo kwahandiikirwe, abakuru bakaba bari Yeieli na Zekariya," 
1Chronicles5:8 na Beela mutabani wa Azazi; Azazi mwene Shema, Shema ya Yoeli, owaabaire atwire Aroeri, okuhikira kimwe Neebo na Baalimeoni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Kandi akaba atwire aha bukiizi-bwa-burugwa-izooba okuhika aharikutaahirwa omu ihamba, seenu ya Eufuraati; ahabw'okuba amasyo gaabo gakaba gakanyiire omu nsi ya Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Omu busingye bwa Saulo, Abaareubeeni bakarwanisa Abahagari, baabaita, baatuura omu mahema gaabo omu kyanga ky'aha bukiizi-bwa-burugwa-izooba bwa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Beene Gaadi baatuura obuseeri bwa beene Reubeeni omu nsi ya Bashani, okuhika Saleka." 
1Chronicles5:12 Yoeli niwe yaabaire ari mukuru waabo, naakuratwa Shafamu; hataho Yanai na Shafati ab'omuri Bashani." 
1Chronicles5:13 Kandi beene waabo, nk'oku emiryango ya baishenkurubo eri, ni Mikaeli, Meshulamu, Sheeba, Yoari, Yakamu Ziya na Eberi; abantu mushanju." 
1Chronicles5:14 Aba nibo batabani ba Abihaili mwene Huuri, mwijukuru wa Yaroa mwene Gileadi, Gileadi ya Mikaeli, Mikaeli ya Yeshishai, Yeshishai mwene Yahido, Yahido mwene Buuzi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi mwene Abudieli mwijukuru wa Guuni niwe yaabaire ari mukuru w'emiryango ya baishenkurubo. 
1Chronicles5:16 Bakaba batwire Gileadi omuri Bashani, n'omu birorero byayo, n'omu byanga bya Sharooni eby'amariisizo, okuhika ahi garikugarukira." 
1Chronicles5:17 Abo boona bakahandiikwa omu busingye bwa Yotamu omugabe wa Yuda, n'omu bwa Yeroboamu omugabe wa Isiraeli, nk'oku enzaaro zaabo zirikukuratana." 
1Chronicles5:18 Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi n'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Abaamanaase bakaba baine abashaija emanzi abahagatiire engabo na zaarurara, kandi abamanyiriire kurwanisa amata, bari abarwani rugambwa; abashaija obukumi buna n'enkumi ina, na magana mushanju, na makumi mukaaga, abeeteekateekire kurwana." 
1Chronicles5:19 Bakahurura baateera Abahagari, Abayeturi, Abanafishi n'Abanodabu." 
1Chronicles5:20 Kandi ku baatungire ab'okubaha emikono, baasingura Abahagari n'abaabaire bakwataniise nabo, ahabw'okuba omuri orwo rugamba bakatakira Ruhanga, nawe yaabaha eki baamushabire, ahabw'okuba bakamwesiga." 
1Chronicles5:21 Baanyaga amasyo gaabo: engamira obukumi butaano, entaama obusiriira bubiri n'obukumi butaano, endogoya enkumi ibiri, n'abantu akasiriira kamwe." 
1Chronicles5:22 Baita abazigu baingi, ahabw'okuba orwo rugamba Ruhanga akaba arurimu. Ebyo ku byahwaire, baatuura omu kyanga kyabo okuhitsya obu baazaahiibwe." 
1Chronicles5:23 Ab'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase nabo bakatuura omuri egyo nsi bari baingi munonga, okwiha Bashani okuhitsya Baaliherumooni, Seniri n'Orushozi Herumooni." 
1Chronicles5:24 Aba nibo baabaire bari bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo: Eferi, Ishi, Elieli, Ezirieli, Yeremiya, Hodaviya na Yahadieli, abarwani b'amaani, abashaija rugambwa, kandi abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo." 
1Chronicles5:25 Kwonka bakacumura ahari Ruhanga wa baishebo, baahampukira ahari baaruhanga b'ensi egyo abu Ruhanga yaacwekyereize kubahigiza." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ruhanga wa Isiraeli nikwo kuta omutima gw'obuzigu omuri Puulo omugabe wa Asiriya, (niwe Tilugati-Pilineseeri owa Asiriya), akatwara Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi n'ab'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase akabata Hala, Habori, Haara n'aha myegyeego y'omugyera gw'omuri Gozani, okuhitsya n'eri izooba." 
1Chronicles6:1 Batabani ba Leevi ni Gereshomu, Kohati na Meraari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Batabani ba Kohati ni Amuraamu, Izihaari, Heburooni na Uzieli." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amuraamu akazaara Arooni na Musa na Miriyamu. Batabani ba Arooni ni Nadabu, Abiihu, Eleazaari na Itimaari." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleazaari akazaara Finehaasi, Finehaasi yaazaara Abishua;" 
1Chronicles6:5 Abishua yaazaara Buuki, Buuki yaazaara Uuzi." 
1Chronicles6:6 Uuzi akazaara Zerahiya, Zerahiya yaazaara Merayooti," 
1Chronicles6:7 Merayooti yaazaara Amariya, Amariya yaazaara Ahitubu." 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitubu akazaara Zadoki, Zadoki yaazaara Ahimaazi" 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaazi yaazaara Azariya, Azariya yaazaara Yohanaani." 
1Chronicles6:10 Yohanaani ogwo akazaara Azariya owaakozire omurimo gw'obuhongyerezi omuri Nyaruju ei Solomooni yaayombekire Yerusalemu. 
1Chronicles6:11 Azariya akazaara Amariya, Amariya yaazaara Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitubu yaazaara Zadoki, Zadoki yaazaara Shalumu." 
1Chronicles6:13 Shalumu akazaara Hilikiya, Hilikiya yaazaara Azariya;" 
1Chronicles6:14 Azariya yaazaara Seraaya, Seraaya yaazaara Yehozadaki." 
1Chronicles6:15 Yehozadaki ogwo niwe yaazaahiibwe obu Nyakubaho yaakoresa Nebukadenezaari kuzaasya Abaayuda n'ab'omuri Yerusalemu. 
1Chronicles6:16 Batabani ba Leevi ni Gereshomu, Kohati na Meraari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Kandi aga nigo maziina ga batabani ba Gereshomu: Libuni na Shimei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Batabani ba Kohati ni Amuraamu, Izihaari, Heburooni na Uzieli." 
1Chronicles6:19 Batabani ba Meraari ni Mahili na Mushi. Egi niyo miryango y'Abaleevi nk'oku baishebo barikukuratana. 
1Chronicles6:20 Gereshomu akazaara Libuni, Libuni yaazaara Yahati, Yahati yaazaara Ziima." 
1Chronicles6:21 Ziima akazaara Yoa, Yoa yaazaara Iido, Iido yaazaara Zera, na Zera yaazaara Yeaterai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Beene Kohati nibo aba: omutabani ni Aminadabu, mutabani wa Aminadabu ni Koora; mutabani wa Koora ni Asiri." 
1Chronicles6:23 Mutabani wa Asiri ni Elukaana mutabani wa Elukaana ni Ebiyasaafu, mutabani wa Ebiyasaafu ni Asiri," 
1Chronicles6:24 mutabani wa Asiri ni Tahati, mutabani wa Tahati ni Urieli, mutabani wa Urieli ni Uziya, na mutabani wa Uziya ni Shauli." 
1Chronicles6:25 Beene Elukaana nibo aba: Elukaana akazaara Amasai na Ahimooti. 
1Chronicles6:26 Ahimooti akazaara Zofai, Zofai yaazaara Nahati." 
1Chronicles6:27 Nahati akazaara Eliyaabu, Eliyaabu yaazaara Yerohamu, Yerohamu yaazaara Elukaana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Beene Samueli. Yoeli niwe mutabani omujigaijo na Abiiya omushubiro. 
1Chronicles6:29 Beene Merari, omutabani ni Mahili, Mahili akazaara Libuni, Libuni yaazaara Shimei, Shimei yaazaara Uuza." 
1Chronicles6:30 Uuza akazaara Shimea, Shimea yaazaara Hagiya, na Hagiya yaazaara Asaaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Aba nibo Daudi yaahaire omurimo gw'okwebembera ebyeshongoro omu nju y'okuramizamu Nyakubaho, eshanduukye y'endagaano eherize kuteebwamu." 
1Chronicles6:32 Bakaguma nibeeshongorera omu maisho g'Eihema ry'Okubugabuganiramu, okuhitsya obu Solomooni yaayombekire Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho omuri Yerusalemu, kandi nibakora omurimo gwabo nibaihaihana." 
1Chronicles6:33 Mbwenu aba na batabani baabo nibo baabaire bakora ogwo murimo. Omuri beene Kohati ni Hemani omweshongozi mutabani wa Yoeli, Yoeli ya Samueli," 
1Chronicles6:34 Samueli ya Elukaana, Elukaana ya Yerohamu, Yerohamu ya Elieli, Elieli ya Toa," 
1Chronicles6:35 Toa ya Zuufi, Zuufi ga Elukaana, Elukaana ya Mahati, Mahati ga Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 Amasai ga Elukaana, Elukaana ya Yoeli, Yoeli ya Azariya, Azariya ya Zefaniya," 
1Chronicles6:37 Zefaniya mutabani wa Tahati, Tahati mutabani wa Asiri, Asiri mutabani wa Abiyasaafu, Abiyasaafu mutabani wa Koora," 
1Chronicles6:38 Koora ya Izihaari, Izihaari ya Kohati, Kohati mwene Leevi, Leevi mutabani wa Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles6:39 Na Asafu mwene ishe owaabaire amwemerera aha mukono gwa buryo; niwe Asafu mutabani wa Berekiya mwene Shimea," 
1Chronicles6:40 Shimea mutabani wa Mikaeli, Mikaeli ga Baaseeya, Baaseeya ya Malikiya." 
1Chronicles6:41 Malikiya ya Etini, Etini ya Zera, Zera mwene Adaaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 Adaaya mwene Etani, Etani mutabani wa Ziima, Ziima mutabani wa Shimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 Shimei mwene Yahati, Yahati ya Gereshomu mutabani wa Leevi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Aha rubaju rwabo rwa bumosho hakaba hariho beene waabo ab'enda ya Merari: Etani mwene Kiishi, Kiishi mwene Abudi, Abudi mwene Maluki" 
1Chronicles6:45 Maluki ga Hashabiya, Hashabiya ya Amaziya, Amaziya ya Hilikiya," 
1Chronicles6:46 Hilikiya mutabani wa Amuzi, Amuzi mutabani wa Bani, Bani mutabani wa Shemeri," 
1Chronicles6:47 Shemeri mwene Mahili, Mahili mwene Muushi, Muushi mwene Merari, Merari mwene Leevi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Kandi Abaleevi beene waabo bakateebwaho kukora emirimo yoona ey'omu butaaho bw'omu nju ya Ruhanga. 
1Chronicles6:49 Kwonka Arooni n'abatabani bakaba batambira ebitambo aha Itambiro ry'ebicwekize, n'aha ry'okwotereraho obubaani, n'okukora emirimo y'omu Mwanya Ogurikwera munonga; n'okukarabira Abaisiraeli nibakuratira ebi Musa omuheereza wa Ruhanga yaaragiire." 
1Chronicles6:50 Mbwenu aba nibo beene Arooni: Arooni akazaara Eleazaari, Eleazaari yaazaara Finehaasi, Finehaasi yaazaara Abishua." 
1Chronicles6:51 Abishua akazaara Buuki, Buuki yaazaara Uuzi, Uuzi yaazaara Zerahiya." 
1Chronicles6:52 Zerahiya akazaara Merayooti, Merayooti yaazaara Amariya, Amariya yaazaara Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:53 Ahitubu yaazaara Zadoki, na Zadoki yaazaara Ahimaazi." 
1Chronicles6:54 Egi niyo myanya ei baabaire batwiremu omu byanga byabo. Beene Arooni ab'emiryango y'Abakoohati bakatunga omugabo gwabo; 
1Chronicles6:55 baabaha Heburooni ey'omu nsi ya Yuda n'amariisizo agagyehinguririize; 
1Chronicles6:56 kwonka emisiri n'ebyaro by'orurembo baabiha Kalebu mwene Yefuune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Baaha beene Arooni endembo ezi ez'okuhungiramu: Heburooni, Libuna n'amariisizo gaayo, Yatiri, Eshitemoa n'amariisizo gaayo," 
1Chronicles6:58 Hileni n'amariisizo gaayo, Debiri n'amariisizo gaayo," 
1Chronicles6:59 Ashani n'amariisizo gaayo, na Betishemeeshi n'amariisizo gaayo." 
1Chronicles6:60 Kandi aha z'ab'oruganda rwa Benyamiini, baabaha Geebe n'amariisizo gaayo, Alemeti n'amariisizo gaayo, na Anatooti n'amariisizo gaayo. Endembo z'ab'emiryango yaabo zoona zaahika ikumi na ishatu." 
1Chronicles6:61 Abaakoohati abaatsigaireho bakaheebwa omugabo gw'endembo ikumi, nibaziiha omu z'ab'emiryango y'ab'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase," 
1Chronicles6:62 Abaagereshoni, nk'emiryango yaabo oku erikukuratana, baahebwa endembo ikumi na ishatu, ezaacwirwe aha z'ab'oruganda rwa Isakaari, Asheri, Nafutaali na Manaase omuri Bashani." 
1Chronicles6:63 Abaameraari, nk'emiryango yaabo oku erikukuratana, baaheebwa endembo ikumi na ibiri, nibaziiha aha z'ab'enganda z'Abareubeeni, Gaadi na Zebuluuni." 
1Chronicles6:64 Abaisiraeli baaha batyo Abaleevi endembo n'amariisizo gaazo. 
1Chronicles6:65 Kandi baabaha endembo ezirikugambwaho amaziina, nibaziiha omu z'ab'enganda z'Abayuda, Abasimeoni n'Ababenyamiini, nibaziteerera enteenyu." 
1Chronicles6:66 Reero ab'endi miryango ya beene Koohasi bakatunga endembo z'ekyanga kyabo ziihirwe aha z'ab'oruganda rwa Efuraimu. 
1Chronicles6:67 Baaheebwa n'endembo ezi ez'okuhungiramu: Shekemu n'amariisizo gaayo omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, Gezeri n'amariisizo gaayo," 
1Chronicles6:68 Yokimeamu n'amariisizo gaayo 
1Chronicles6:69 Aiyalooni n'amariisizo gaayo, Gatirimooni n'amariisizo gaayo." 
1Chronicles6:70 Kandi aha z'ekicweka ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase: Aneri n'amariisizo gaayo na Bileamu n'amariisizo gaayo, baabiha ab'emiryango y'Abaakoohati abaatsigaireho." 
1Chronicles6:71 Abaagereshooni bakaheebwa endembo ezi aha z'ekicweka ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase: Golani omuri Bashani n'amariisizo gaayo. 
1Chronicles6:72 Aha z'ab'oruganda rwa Isakaari baabaha Kedeshi n'amariisizo gaayo, Daberati n'amariisizo gaayo," 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramoti n'amariisizo gaayo, na Anemu n'amariisizo gaayo." 
1Chronicles6:74 Aha z'ab'oruganda rwa Asheri: Mashali n'amariisizo gaayo, Abudooni n'amariisizo gaayo." 
1Chronicles6:75 Hukoki n'amariisizo gaayo, na Rehobu n'amariisizo gaayo." 
1Chronicles6:76 Reero aha z'ab'oruganda rwa Nafutaali baabaha Kedeshi ey'omuri Galilaaya n'amariisizo gaayo, Hamoni n'amariisizo gaayo na Kiriyataimu n'amariisizo gaayo." 
1Chronicles6:77 Abaameraari abaatsigaireho baabaha endembo ezi, nibazicwa aha z'ab'oruganda rwa Zebuluuni: Rimono n'amariisizo gaayo, Tabora n'amariisizo gaayo." 
1Chronicles6:78 Kandi seeri ya Yorudaani ahari Yeriko, aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba orwa Yorudaani, baiha aha b'oruganda rwa Reubeeni endembo ezi: Bezeri ey'omu ihamba n'amariisizo gaayo, Yahuza n'amariisizo gaayo," 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedemooti n'amariisizo gaayo, na Mefaata n'amariisizo gaayo." 
1Chronicles6:80 N'aha z'ab'oruganda rwa Gaadi, baabaha Ramoti ey'omuri Gileadi n'amariisizo gaayo, Mahanaimu n'amariisizo gaayo," 
1Chronicles6:81 Heshibooni n'amariisizo gaayo, na Yazeri n'amariisizo gaayo." 
1Chronicles7:1 Isakaari akazaara abatabani bana: Tola, Pua, Yashubu na Shimurooni." 
1Chronicles7:2 Tola yaazaara Uuzi, Refaaya, Yerieli, Yahimai, Ibusamu na Shemueli, bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, ab'enda ya Tola. Baijukuru baabo abarwani emanzi, omu busingye bwa Daudi, bakaba nibahika obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri na magana mukaaga." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uuzi akazaara Izirahiya, Izirahiya yaazaara Mikaeli, Obadiya, Yoeli na Ishiya; bataano, kandi boona bari abantu bakuru." 
1Chronicles7:4 Haza omuribo, nk'oku enzaaro zaabo zirikukuratana, n'oku emiryango ya baishenkurubo eri, hakaba harimu emitwe y'engabo z'okurwana orugamba obukumi bushatu n'enkumi mukaaga; ahabw'okuba bakaba bashweire abakazi baingi kandi bazaire abaana baingi." 
1Chronicles7:5 Beene waabo ab'emiryango ya Isakaari boona bakaba bari abarwani emanzi obukumi munaana n'enkumi mushanju, nk'oku baahandiikirwe nibakuratira enzaaro zaabo." 
1Chronicles7:6 Batabani ba Benyamiini ni bashatu: Beela, Bekeri na Yediaeli," 
1Chronicles7:7 Beene Beela ni Ezibooni, Uuzi, Uzieli, Yerimooti, na Iri; bontaano bari bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, kandi abarwani emanzi. Ku baahandiikirwe nibakuratira enzaaro zaabo, baahika obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri na makumi ashatu na bana." 
1Chronicles7:8 Beene Bekeri ni Zemira, Yoashi, Eliezeeri, Elioenai, Omuri, Yeremooti, Abiiya, Anatooti na Alemeti. Abo boona bakaba bari batabani ba Bekeri." 
1Chronicles7:9 Ku baahandiikirwe nibakuratira enzaaro zaabo nk'oku zirikukuratana, nk'emiryango ya baishenkurubo oku eri, baahika abarwani emanzi obukumi bubiri na magana abiri." 
1Chronicles7:10 Yediaeli akazaara Bilihaani, Bilihaani yaazaara abatabani aba: Yeushi, Benyamiini, Ehudi, Kenaana, Zeetani, Tarushiishi na Ahishahaari." 
1Chronicles7:11 Abo boona bakaba bari batabani ba Yediaeli, bari emitwe y'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, kandi abarwani emanzi akakumi kamwe n'enkumi mushanju na magana abiri, abeeteekateekire kurwana orugamba." 
1Chronicles7:12 Reero Abashuupi n'Abahuupi bakaba bari beene Iri, kandi Abahuushi bari beene Aheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Beene Nafutaali bo, ni Yahizieli, Guni, Yezeri na Shalumu, baijukuru ba Biliha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Batabani ba Manaase ni Asirieli, ou yaazaire aha Muaramu ekinyanshunju kye, akagaruka akamuzaaraho Makiri ishe wa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles7:15 Reero Makiri akashwererera Hupimu na Shupimu. Munyaanya akaba naayetwa Maaka. Mutabani wa Makiri owa kabiri akaba naayetwa Zelofehaadi. Kwonka Zelofehadi akazaara abaishiki bonka. 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka muka Makiri akazaara omutabani yaamweta Pereshi, kandi omurumuna yaamweta Shereshi. Shereshi yaazaara abatabani Ulamu na Rakemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulamu akazaara Bedani. Abo nibo batabani ba Gileadi mwene Makiri, mwijukuru wa Manaase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Hamoleketi munyaanya wa Gileadi akazaara Ishihoodi, Abiezeri na Mahala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Beene Shimiida ni Ahiyani, Shekemu, Lihiki na Aniyani." 
1Chronicles7:20 Beene Efuraimu: Shuteela akazaara Beredi, Beredi yaazaara Tahati, Tahati yaazaara Eleada, Eleada yaazaara Tahati." 
1Chronicles7:21 Tahati akazaara Zabadi, Zabadi yaazaara Shuteela, Shuteela yaazaara Ezeri na Eleadi, abu Abagaati abazaarwa b'omuri egyo nsi baitsire baizire kunyaga ente zaabo." 
1Chronicles7:22 Efuraimu ishebo akamara ebiro bingi naabacurira, abarumuna baija kumuyaagira." 
1Chronicles7:23 Bwanyima Efuraimu akabyama n'omukazi we, yaatwara, yaamuzaarira omutabani, ou yaayetsire Beriya, ngu ahabw'okuba eka ye ekaba egwereirwe akagwe." 
1Chronicles7:24 Muhara we akaba naayetwa Sheera, owaatembwire endembo za Betihorooni zombi; orwa ifo n'orwa ruguru, na Uzenisheera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Reefa omutabani akazaara Reshefu, Reshefu yaazaara Teela, Teela yaazaara Tahani." 
1Chronicles7:26 Tahani akazaara Ladani, Ladani yaazaara Amihuudi, Amihuudi yaazaara Elishaama." 
1Chronicles7:27 Elishaama akazaara Nuuni, na Nuuni yaazaara Yoshua." 
1Chronicles7:28 Amatungo gaabo n'ebibanja byabo bikaba biri Beteli, n'omu birorero byayo, n'aha bukiizi bwa burugwa-izooba bwa Naarani, n'aha bwa burengyerwa-izooba bwa Gezeri n'ebirorero byayo, Shekemu n'ebirorero byayo;" 
1Chronicles7:29 kandi n'aha myatano y'Abaamanaase, Betisheani n'ebirorero byayo, Taanaka n'ebirorero byayo, Megido n'ebirorero byayo na Doori n'ebirorero byayo. Omuri ebyo birorero nimwo beene Yosefu mutabani wa Isiraeli baabaire batuura." 
1Chronicles7:30 Aba nibo batabani ba Asheri: Imuna, Ishiva, Ishivi, Beriya na Seera munyaanyabo." 
1Chronicles7:31 Beriya akazaara abatabani Heberi na Milikieli, Melikieli yaazaara Birizaiti." 
1Chronicles7:32 Heberi akazaara Yafuleeti, Shomeri, Hotamu na Shua munyaanyabo." 
1Chronicles7:33 Beene Yafuleeti ni Pasaki, Bimuhaali na Ashuvaati. Abo nibo beene Yafuleeti." 
1Chronicles7:34 Omurumuna Shemeri akazaara Rohuga, Yehuuba na Aramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Batabani ba Helemu omurumuna, ni Zoofa, Imuna, Sheleshi na Amali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Batabani ba Zoofa ni Sua, Harunefeeri, Shauli, Beri, Imura," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bezeri, Hoodi, Shama, Shilusha, Itirani na Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Batabani ba Yeteeri ni Yefuune, Pisipa na Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Batabani ba Uula ni Araha, Hanieli na Riziya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Abo boona bakaba bari beene Asheri bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, abashaija emanzi kandi abategyeki rugambwa. Ku baababazire nibakuratira enzaaro zaabo, omubaro gw'abarikubaasa kuza aha rugamba gwahika obukumi bubiri n'enkumi mukaaga." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benyamiini akazaara Beela omujigaijo gwe, yaakuratsaho Ashibeeli, Ahara yaaba owa kashatu," 
1Chronicles8:2 Nooha owa kana, na Raafa owa kataano." 
1Chronicles8:3 Beela akazaara abatabani aba: Adaari, Geera, Abihuudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abishua, Naamani, Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Geera, Shefuufani na Haraamu." 
1Chronicles8:6 Aba ni beene Ehudi, abakuru b'enganda z'abaabaire batwire Geeba, bwanyima bakatwarwa Manahati bari enkwatwa:" 
1Chronicles8:7 Naamani, Ahiya, na Geera, niwe Hegulaamu ishe Uuza na Ahihudi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Reero Shaharaimu ku yaaherize kushenda abakazi be Hushimu na Baara, yaazaarira abatabani omu nsi ya Moabu." 
1Chronicles8:9 Yaabazaara aha mukazi we Hodeshi, Nibo aba: Yobabu, Zibiya, Mesha, Malukaamu," 
1Chronicles8:10 Yeuzi, Sakiya na Miruma. Abo nibo batabani abaabaire bari bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo." 
1Chronicles8:11 Kandi akaba azaire ahari Hushimu abatabani aba: Abitubu na Elupaali. 
1Chronicles8:12 Batabani ba Elupaali ni Eberi, Mishamu na Shemedi, owaayombekire endembo Ono na Lodi n'ebirorero byayo." 
1Chronicles8:13 Beriya na Shema bakaba bari abakuru b'enganda Z'abatwire Ayalooni, abaabingire abatuuzi ba Gaati." 
1Chronicles8:14 Baijukuru ba Beriya ni Ahio, Shashaki na Yeremooti." 
1Chronicles8:15 Zebadiya, Aradi, Ederi," 
1Chronicles8:16 Mikaeli, Ishupa na Yooha nabo bakaba bari beene Beriya." 
1Chronicles8:17 Reero beene Elupaali ni Zebadiya, Meshulaamu, Hiziki, Heberi," 
1Chronicles8:18 Ishimerai, Iziliya na Yobabu." 
1Chronicles8:19 Beene Shimei ni Yakimu, Zikuri Zabudi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienai, Ziiletai, Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adayiiya Beraaya na Shimurati. 
1Chronicles8:22 Shashaki akazaara abatabani aba: Ishupani, Eberi, Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abudooni, Zikuri, Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hananiya, Elamu, Antotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 Efudeeya na Penueli; 
1Chronicles8:26 Yerohaamu yaazaara Shamusherai Shehariya, Ataliya," 
1Chronicles8:27 Yaareshiya, Eliya na Zikuri." 
1Chronicles8:28 Abo bakaba bari abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo nk'oku enzaaro zaabo ziri; haza bari abantu bakuru, abatwire Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles8:29 Yeieli ishe wa Gibeoni akaba atwire Gibeoni, kandi omukazi we akaba naayetwa Maaka." 
1Chronicles8:30 Akazaara Abudooni omutabani omujigaijo, yaakuratsaho Zuuri, Kiishi, Baali, Nadabu," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedori, Ahio, Zekeri" 
1Chronicles8:32 na Mikulooti ishe wa Shimea. Abo nabo bakaba batwire Yerusalemu na beene waabo, bashungaine nabo." 
1Chronicles8:33 Neeri akazaara Kiishi, Kiishi yaazaara Saulo, Saulo yaazaara Yonataani, Malikishua, Abinadabu na Eshibaali." 
1Chronicles8:34 Kandi mutabani wa Yonataani akaba ari Meeribaali; Meeribaali yaazaara Miika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Beene Miika nibo aba: Pitoni, Meleki, Tarea na Ahazi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahazi akazaara Yehoada, Yehoada yaazaara Elemeeti, Azimaveeti na Zimuri; Zimuri yaazaara Mooza." 
1Chronicles8:37 Mooza akazaara Binea, Binea yaazaara Raafa, Raafa yaazaara Eleasha, na Eleasha yaazaara Azeli." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azeli akazaara abatabani mukaaga. Nibo aba. Azikaamu Bookeru, Ishemaeli, Sheriya, Obadiya na Hanani. Abo boona bakaba bari beene Azeli." 
1Chronicles8:39 Esheki murumuna wa Azeli akazaara Ulaamu, omutabani omujigaijo, Yeushi omushubiro, na Elifeeleti owa kashatu." 
1Chronicles8:40 Beene Ulaamu bakaba bari abashaija abarwani rugambwa, enkwata mata, bazaire abatabani n'abaijukuru baingi, abarikuhika igana na makumi ataano. Abo boona bakaba bari Abaabenyamiini." 
1Chronicles9:1 Abaisiraeli boona nikwo baabazirwe batyo, nibakuratira enzaaro zaabo, bakahandiikwa omu kitabo ky'abagabe ba Isiraeli. Bwanyima Abaayuda, ahabw'ebicumuro byabo bakabazaahiza Babulooni." 
1Chronicles9:2 Mbwenu abaabandize kugaruka kutuura omu butaka bwabo, omu ndembo zaabo, n'Abaisiraeli, abahongyerezi, Abaleevi, n'abaheereza b'omuri Nyaruju." 
1Chronicles9:3 Bamwe aha Baayuda, n'Abaamanaase nabo bakaba batwire Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles9:4 Nibo aba: Utai mwene Amihuudi, Amihuudi mwene Omuri, Omuri mwene Imuri, Imuri ya Bani, mwijukuru wa Pereezi, mutabani wa Yuda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Kandi beene Shiilo ni Asaaya omujigaijo, n'abatabani." 
1Chronicles9:6 Aba beene Zeera ni Yeueli na beene waabo magana mukaaga na makumi mwenda. 
1Chronicles9:7 Ab'omuri beene Benyamiini ni Shaalu mutabani wa Meshulaamu, Meshulaamu mwene Hodaviya, Hodaviya ya Hasenua." 
1Chronicles9:8 Na Ibunea mwene Yerohaamu, na Eela mwene Uuzi ya Makiri; na Meshulaamu mwene Shefatiya, Shefatiya ya Reueli mwene Ibuniya," 
1Chronicles9:9 na beene waabo, nk'oku enzaaro zaabo ziri; abantu magana mwenda na makumi ataano na mukaaga. Abo boona bakaba bari bakuru b'enganda za baishenkurubo, nk'oku emiryango yaabo erikukuratana." 
1Chronicles9:10 Omu bahongyerezi ni Yedaaya, Yehoyaribu, Yakini," 
1Chronicles9:11 na Azariya mwene Hilikiya; Hilikiya mwene Meshulaamu, Meshulaamu ya Zadoki, Zadoki ya Merayooti, mwene Ahitubu, omukuru w'aba Nyaruju ya Ruhanga;" 
1Chronicles9:12 na Adayiiya mutabani wa Yerohaamu, mwene Pashuuri ya Melikiya, na Maasai mutabani wa Adieli mwene Yahuzeera, Yahuzeera ya Meshulaamu, mwene Meshilemiti, mutabani wa Imeri;" 
1Chronicles9:13 otabariiremu beene waabo; aba bakaba bari bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo nibahika abashaija rukumi na magana mushanju na makumi mukaaga abarikubaasiza kimwe kukora omurimo gw'omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga. 
1Chronicles9:14 Omu Baleevi ni Shemaaya mwene Hashubu, Hashubu ya Azirikaamu, mwene Hashabiya, ab'omuri beene Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 Bakubakaari, Hereshi, Galali; na Mataniya, mwene Miika mutabani wa Zikuri, mwne Asafu;" 
1Chronicles9:16 na Obadiya mwene Shemaaya, mutabani wa Galali, Galali ya Yedutuuni; na Berekiya mwene Asa, mutabani wa Elukaana, abaabaire batwire omu byaro by'Abanetofaati" 
1Chronicles9:17 Abarinzi b'amarembo bakaba bari aba: Shalumu, Akubu, Talumooni, Ahimani na beene waabo (Shalumu ari mukuru waabo)." 
1Chronicles9:18 Abo bakaba batairweho kurinda eirembo ry'omugabe ery'aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba, n'okuhitsya hati. Abo bakaba bari abarinzi b'aha marembo g'amacumbi g'Abaleevi." 
1Chronicles9:19 Shaalumu mwene Koore, mutabani wa Ebiyasaafu, mwne Koora, na beene waabo ab'omuryango gwa ishenkurubo Abaakoora, bakaba bakwatsiibwe omurimo gw'okureeberera eby'okuramya, bari abarinzi b'ebibuga by'Eihema, nka baishebo oku baabaire bareeberera orusiisira rwa Mukama, bari abarinzi b'eirembo." 
1Chronicles9:20 Kandi hariho obundi obu Finehaasi mwene Eleazaari yaabategyeka, Mukama ari hamwe nawe." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekariya mwene Meshelemiya akaba naarinda eirembo ry'Eihema ry'okubagabuganiramu. 
1Chronicles9:22 Abo boona, abaatoraniirwe okuba abarinzi b'amarembo g'ebibuga, bakaba bari magana abiri na ikumi na babiri. Bakaba babazirwe nk'enzaaro zaabo oku ziri omu byaro byabo. Abo nibo Daudi na Samueli omurangi baakwatsize omurimo gwabo gw'obwesigwa." 
1Chronicles9:23 Batyo bo na batabani baabo baaba abareeberezi b'amarembo ga Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, niyo nju y'eihema, bari abarinzi." 
1Chronicles9:24 Abo barinzi bakaba bari aha mbaju ina: Orwa burugwa-izooba, n'orwa burengyerwa-izooba, n'orw'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, n'orw'aha bwa buryo." 
1Chronicles9:25 Kandi obundi n'obundi, beene waabo abaabaire batwire omu byaro byabo, bakaba baragiirwa kwija buri biro mushanju kubahwera;" 
1Chronicles9:26 ahabw'okuba Abaleevi bana abakuru abarinzi b'amarembo bakaba baareeberera ebishengye n'amabiikiro ga Nyaruju ya Ruhanga; 
1Chronicles9:27 bataho n'okuraara beehinguririize egyo nju ya Ruhanga; omurimo gwabo guri okugirinda, kandi nibaragiirwa okugiigura buri kasheeshe." 
1Chronicles9:28 Abandi Baleevi bakaba bareeba ebirikukoresibwa omu kuramya nibaragiirwa kubibara baabireeta, kandi baabitwara." 
1Chronicles9:29 Abandi bakaba bakwatsiibwe ogw'okureeberera eby'omuri egyo nju n'ebirikukoresibwa byona ebirikwera, otaireho n'okureeberera esaano y'obunono, na viino n'amajuta g'emioliva n'obubaani n'emigaju." 
1Chronicles9:30 Abandi omuri batabani b'abahongyerezi bakaba batebeekanisa eby'okujwanzya emigaju. 
1Chronicles9:31 Kandi Matitiya ow'omu Baleevi, omujigaijo gwa Shalumu ow'Abaakoora, akaba areeberera otugaati tw'otubari tw'okukarangwa." 
1Chronicles9:32 Kandi bamwe omuri beene waabo Abaakohati bakaba bareeberera emigaati y'okumurikwa, okugitebeekanisa buri Sabato." 
1Chronicles9:33 Mbwenu aba nibo beeshongozi bakuru ab'emiryango ya baishenkuru Abaleevi abaabaire bataaha omu bishengye bya Nyaruju bataine gundi murimo ahabw'okugira ogwabo nyomushana na nyekiro. 
1Chronicles9:34 Abo bakaba bari bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkuru b'Abaleevi nk'enzaaro zaabo oku ziri, bari abeebembezi b'abatwire Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles9:35 Yeyeeli owaatembwire Gibeoni akaba agitwiremu. Omukazi we akaba naayetwa Maaka. 
1Chronicles9:36 Akazaara omutabani omujigaijo Abudooni, yaakuratsaho Zuuri, Kiishi, Baali, Neeri, Nadabu," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedori, Ahio, Zekariya na Mikulooti;" 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikulooti yaazaara Shimeamu. Abo nabo bakaba batwire Yerusalemu, bashungaine na beene waabo." 
1Chronicles9:39 Neeri akazaara Kiishi, Kiishi yaazaara Saulo, Saulo yaazaara Yonatani, Malikishua, Abinadabu na Eshibaali." 
1Chronicles9:40 Mutabani wa Yonataani akaba ari Meribaali, ishe wa Miika." 
1Chronicles9:41 Beene Miika nibo aba: Pitoni, Meleki, Tahurea na Ahazi." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahazi akazaara Yaara, Yaara yaazaara Alemesi, Azimaveeti na Zimuri. Reero Zimuri yaazaara Mooza." 
1Chronicles9:43 Mooza akazaara Binea, Binea yaazaara Refaaya, Refaaya yaazaara Eleasa na Eleasa yaazaara Azeli." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azeli akazaara abatabani mukaaga. Aga nigo maziina gaabo: Azirikaamu, Bokeru, Ishimaeli, Sheariya, Obadiya na Hanani. Abo nibo beene Azeli." 
1Chronicles10:1 Abafilisiti bakarwana orugamba n'Abaisiraeli; Abaisiraeli baabahunga; banu baabaitira aha rushozi Giliboa. 
1Chronicles10:2 Abafilisiti baahambya Saulo n'abatabani, baita Yonatani na Abinadabu na Melikishua, beene Saulo." 
1Chronicles10:3 Ab'aha rugamba ku baafundiriize Saulo, ab'amata baamugwaho, baamurasha, yaahutaara." 
1Chronicles10:4 Saulo nikwo kugira omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye ati: Syorayo rurara yaawe ogintimbuze, aba batashazirwe batakaija bakanshungisa. Kwonka omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa tiyaakikora, ahabw'okuba akatiina munonga. Saulo nikwo kwihayo rurara ye ahabwe, akagyetungaho." 
1Chronicles10:5 Omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bye ku yaareebire Saulo yaafa, nawe yaayetunga ahari rurara eye, yaafa," 
1Chronicles10:6 Okwo nikwo Saulo yaafiire, we n'abatabani bonshatu, n'ab'eka ye boona." 
1Chronicles10:7 Abaisiraeli abaabaire batwire omu ruhanga Yezereeli ku baareebire eihe ryahunga, na Saulo n'abatabani baafa, baatsigaho endembo zaabo, baahunga; Abafilisiti baija, baazituuramu." 
1Chronicles10:8 Omu kasheeshe Abafilisiti ku baizire kucwijura emitumbi, baashanga Saulo n'abatabani bagwire omu Rushozi Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Baamucwijura, kandi baamutemaho omutwe, baagutwara n'eby'okurwanisa bye. Reero baatuma entumwa omu nsi y'Abafilisiti yoona, kurangiririra ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa, n'abantu enkuru nungi." 
1Chronicles10:10 Baata eby'okurwanisa bye omu ndaaro ya baaruhanga baabo, kandi omutwe gwe baaguhanika omu ndaaro ya Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Kwonka Abayabeshi-Gileadi ku baahuriire ebi Abafilisiti bagiriire Saulo," 
1Chronicles10:12 abashaija amamanzi boona baimuka, baihayo omutumbi gwe n'ey'abatabani baagireeta Yabeshi. Amagufa gaabo baagaziika ahansi y'omuvule gwa Yabeshi, kandi baamara ebiro mushanju nibeesiibyakwo." 
1Chronicles10:13 Saulo yaafa atyo, ahabw'okutaba mwesigwa ahari Nyakubaho; ahabw'okuba tarakozire eki Nyakubaho yaamuragiire, yaataho n'okwehanuuza aha muntu orikugambisa abazimu kumuha obwengye," 
1Chronicles10:14 tiyaayehanuuza hari Nyakubaho. Nikyo Mukama yaamwitiire, obugabe bwe akabuha Daudi mwene Yese." 
1Chronicles11:1 Bwanyima Abaisiraeli boona bakaija baashanga Daudi Heburooni, baamugira bati: Reeba, turi abaawe b'aha mara." 
1Chronicles11:2 Omu biro byahingwire, obu Saulo yaabaire ari omugabe waitu, itwe Abaisiraeli niiwe waabaire otwebembera nituhurura kandi nitutabaaruka; na Mukama Ruhanga waawe akakugira ati: Niiwe oriba omuriisa w'abantu bangye Abaisiraeli, kandi omutegyeki waabo." 
1Chronicles11:3 Batyo abakuru b'Abaisiraeli boona baija, baashanga omugabe Heburooni, Daudi yaakorerayo nabo endagaano omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, baamusiiga amajuta kuba omugabe wa Isiraeli, nk'oku Mukama yaakigambiise Samueli." 
1Chronicles11:4 Bwanyima Daudi n'Abaisiraeli baaza Yerusalemu niyo Yebusi, ei Abayebusi baabaire batwire bari enzaarwa z'omuri egyo nsi." 
1Chronicles11:5 Haza abo Bayebusi baagira Daudi bati: Otaija egi. Kwonka Daudi yaakwata ekigo kyabo Siyooni, nirwo rurembo rwa Daudi." 
1Chronicles11:6 Reero Daudi yaahiga ati: Oraabanze kwita Abayebusi, niwe araabe omutegyeki kandi omukuru w'eihe. Yoabu mwene Zeruuya yaaba niwe yaabanza kuhurura; atyo yaaba omukuru w'eihe." 
1Chronicles11:7 Daudi yaatuura omuri ekyo kigo. Nikyo baakyeeteire orurembo rwa Daudi. 
1Chronicles11:8 Yaarwombekaho amaju okwiha Miilo okurwehinguririza kimwe, kandi Yoabu yaahunduuza ekicweka kyarwo ekyatsigaireho." 
1Chronicles11:9 Daudi yaaguma naayeyongyera kugira ekitiinwa, ahabw'okuba Mukama ow'amahe akaba ari hamwe nawe." 
1Chronicles11:10 Mbwenu aba nibo bakungu ba Daudi, abashaija emanzi abaamuhaire munonga emikono omu bugabe bwe, bakwataniise n'Abaisiraeli boona kumuhindura omugabe, nk'oku Mukama yaakigambire ahari Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles11:11 Ebi nibyo birikugambwa aha mamanzi ga Daudi: Yashobeamu Omuhakimooni akaba ari mukuru w'abashatu. Akakwata eicumu rye, yaariitsa abantu magana ashatu omu rugamba rumwe." 
1Chronicles11:12 Orikumukurata omuri ago mamanzi ashatu ni Eleazaari, mwene Dodo Omuahohi." 
1Chronicles11:13 Akaba ari hamwe na Daudi Pasidamimu, obu Abafilisiti bahurura kubarwanisizayo orugamba. Okwo hakaba hariyo omusiri gw'oburo bwingi bw'enaku; abantu baahunga Abafilisiti." 
1Chronicles11:14 Kwonka we n'abashaija be baayemerera omuri ogwo musiri, baagurwanaho, yaita Abafilisiti. Nyakubaho yaabajuna kandi, yaabaha obusinguzi bwingi." 
1Chronicles11:15 Bashatu omu bakuru makumi ashatu ab'amahe bakashuuma, baashanga Daudi aha rukiri omu nyanga ya Adulaamu, eihe ry'Abafilisiti risiisiire omu ruhanga rw'Abareefa." 
1Chronicles11:16 Mbwenu Daudi ku yaabaire ari omu kigo ky'okwerindiramu, omutwe gw'engabo z'Abafilisiti guri Beetelehemu," 
1Chronicles11:17 yaatenga naagira ati: Nkaabaasibwa ki hagira owampa otwizi tw'eiziba ry'aha irembo rya Beetelehemu, ntunywa!" 
1Chronicles11:18 Batyo abo bashaija bashatu emanzi baayataguza orusiisira rw'Abafilisiti, baataha amaizi omuri eryo iziba rya Beetelehemu, eryabaire riri aha irembo ryayo, baagamutwarira. Kwonka Daudi tiyaaganywa, yaagashuka aha nsi kuba empongano ya Nyakubaho." 
1Chronicles11:19 Yaagira ati: Nikikabure nyowe okukora eki omu maisho ga Ruhanga wangye! Mbwenu shi nnywe eshagama y'aba bantu? Manya baayoga amagara kundeetera aga maizi. Nikyo yaayangiire kuganywa. Ebyo nibyo abo bashaija bashatu emanzi baakozire. 
1Chronicles11:20 Obwo Abishaayi murumuna wa Yoabu niwe yaabaire ari mukuru w'abo amakumi ashatu. Ogu akakwata eicumu rye, yaarwana n'abashaija magana ashatu, yaabaita, yaarangaanwa nk'abo abashatu." 
1Chronicles11:21 Omu mamanzi makumi ashatu niwe yaakizire kurangaanwa, akaba mukuru waabo, kwonka tiyaahika hari bari bonshatu." 
1Chronicles11:22 Kandi Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada akaba ari emanzi ya Kabuzeeli. Akakora ebintu bikuru, yaita amamanzi abiri g'Abaamoabu. Kandi obundi akashuuma yaitira entare omu kiina aha izooba ry'ebirika byagwa." 
1Chronicles11:23 Kandi yaita Omumisiri ekikaaka owaabaire naahitsya mikono etaano oburaingwa. Ogwo Munyamisiri akaba aine eicumu ry'omutaari, orubango rwaryo nirwingana n'empimbi ei barukiraho emyenda. Kwonka Benaaya akamwegyemera akwaitse enkoni, yaamusikura eryo icumu omu ngaro, yaarimwitsa." 
1Chronicles11:24 Ebyo nibyo Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada yaakozire, akeetungira eiziina omuri ezo manzi ishatu;" 
1Chronicles11:25 akarangaanwa omuri abo amakumi ashatu, kwonka atarikwerenga abo abashatu. Daudi yaamuha obukuru bw'okureeberera abarinzi be." 
1Chronicles11:26 Mbwenu aba nibo mamanzi rugambwa ab'amahe. Asaheeli murumuna wa Yoabu, Elihanaana mwene Dodo owa Beetelehemu," 
1Chronicles11:27 Shamoti Omuharori, Helezi Omupeloni." 
1Chronicles11:28 Iira mwene Ikeshi owa Tekoa, Abiezeri owa Anatooti," 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibekai Omuhuushati, Ilai Omuahohi," 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharai owa Netofa, Heledi mwene Baana owa Netofa." 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai mwene Ribai owa Gibea ey'Abaabenyamiini, Benaaya owa Piratooni," 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurai ow'omu mpanga za Gaashi, Abieli Omuaribati," 
1Chronicles11:33 Azimaveti owa Baharumu. Eliyahabu owa Shaalubooni," 
1Chronicles11:34 Heshemu Omugiizoni, Yonatani mwene Shagi Omuharari," 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiyaamu mwene Sakari Omuharari, Elifaali mwene Uuri." 
1Chronicles11:36 Heferi Omumekeraati, Ahiya Omupeloni," 
1Chronicles11:37 Hezira owa Karumeeli, Naarai mwene Ezibai," 
1Chronicles11:38 Yoeli murumuna wa Natani, Mibuhaari mwene Haguri;" 
1Chronicles11:39 Zeleki Omuamoni, Naharai owa Beerooti, omukwatsi w'eby'okurwanisa bya Yoabu mwene Zeruuya;" 
1Chronicles11:40 Iira Omuituri na Gerebu Omuituri," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uriya Omuhiiti, Zabadi mwene Ahulai," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina mwene Shiza Omureubeeni, omwebembezi w'Abareubeeni, omukuru w'omutwe gw'engabo makumi ashatu," 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanani mwene Maaka, na Yosafaati Omumituni;" 
1Chronicles11:44 Uziya Omuashiteraati, Shama na Yeyeeli beene Hotamu Omuaroeri;" 
1Chronicles11:45 Yediaeli mwene Shimuri, n'omurumuna Yooha owa Tiizi," 
1Chronicles11:46 Elieli Omumaahavi, na Yeribai, na Yoshaviya, beene Elunaamu, na Itima Omumoabu;" 
1Chronicles11:47 Elieli na Obedi na Yaasieli owa Mezooba. 
1Chronicles12:1 Mbwenu aba nibo bashaija abaagiire Zikulaagi, bakakwatanisa na Daudi obu Saulo mwene Kiishi yaabaire atarikwenda kumucwa maisho. Abo bakaba bari ab'omu mamanzi agaamuhaire emikono omu bweme," 
1Chronicles12:2 bari abashaija enkwata buta, abarikumanya kurasisa emyambi, n'okurekyera enjungu z'amabaare na buryo nari na bumosho. Abo bakaba bari beene Benyamiini, abaine obuzaare na Saulo;" 
1Chronicles12:3 mukuru waabo ari Ahiyezeeri, orikukurataho ari Yoashi, bombi bari beene Shemaaha owa Gibea. Taho Yezieli na Peleti beene Azimaveeti; Beeraka, Yehu owa Anatooti;" 
1Chronicles12:4 Ishimaaya owa Gibeoni omushaija rugambwa omu mamanzi makumi ashatu, kandi omwebembezi waabo; na Yeremiya, Yahazieli, Yohaanani, Yozabadi owa Gedeera," 
1Chronicles12:5 Eluzai, Yerimooti, Bealiya, Shemariya Shefatiya Omuhaarupi," 
1Chronicles12:6 Elukaana, Ishiya, Azareeli, Yoezeeri na Yoshebeamu ow'omuri beene Koora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 na Yoela na Zebadiya beene Yerooha owa Gedori. 
1Chronicles12:8 Omu Bagaadi haarugamu abarwani rugambwe enkwata-ngabo abamanyiriire kurwanisa amacumu; abu ahamaisho gaabo haabaire nihashusha ah'entare kandi nibairuka nk'esirabo z'omu nshozi, baashanga Daudi omu kigo ky'omu ihamba." 
1Chronicles12:9 Mukuru waabo akaba ari Ezeri, owa kabiri Obadiya, owa kashatu Eliyaabu," 
1Chronicles12:10 owa kana Mishimaana, owa kataano Yeremiya," 
1Chronicles12:11 owa mukaaga Atai, owa mushanju Elieli;" 
1Chronicles12:12 owa munaana Yohaanani, owa mwenda Elizabadi;" 
1Chronicles12:13 owa ikumi Yeremiya, n'owa ikumi n'omwe Maakabanai." 
1Chronicles12:14 Abaagaadi abo bakaba bari bakuru omu ihe, omuto omuribo naategyeka engabo igana, n'omukuru engabo rukumi." 
1Chronicles12:15 Abo nibo baayambukire Yorudaani omu kwezi kw'okubanza, obu yaabaire eijwire, eshandaire enkungu zaayo zoona, bakabinga boona abatwire omu mpanga za burugwa-izooba n'eza burengyerwa-izooba." 
1Chronicles12:16 Mpaho bamwe omu Baabenyamiini n'omu Baayuda baija, baashanga Daudi omu kigo." 
1Chronicles12:17 Daudi yaashohora kubabugana, yaabagira ati: Ku muraabe mwaija muri banywani bangye kumpa emikono, naanye niinyikiriza kukwatanisa naimwe. Kwonka ku muraabe mwaija kundeebya kundekurira abazigu bangye, haza ntaine ki nshobize, Ruhanga wa baatatenkuriitwe akireebe, haza akibature." 
1Chronicles12:18 Ahonaaho Mutima wa Ruhanga yaaza omuri Amasai, omukuru wa bari amakumi ashatu, yaagira ati: Nyaabura 'we Daudi, mwene Yese, itwe turi abaawe, kandi tukwataniise naiwe. Kagire obusingye! Kagire obusingye! N'abarikukuha emikono nibakagire obusingye! Manya Ruhanga waawe niwe arikukuhwera. Daudi atyo abaakiira, abahindura bakuru omu ihe rye." 
1Chronicles12:19 Abandi ab'omu Baamanaase bakaimuura, baayehongyera Daudi obu yaahurura n'Abafilisiti kurwana orugamba na Saulo. Kwonka Daudi abo Bafilisiti taine ki yaabahwereire, ahabw'okuba bakuru baabo bakamubinga, ahabw'okumutiina ngu naija kubareebya, agarukire mukama we Saulo, kibareetere okutemwaho emitwe." 
1Chronicles12:20 Daudi obu yaabaire naaza Zikulaagi, Abaamanaase abaamwehongyeire nibo aba: Adina, Yozabadi, Yediaeli, Mikaeli, Yozabadi, Elihu na Ziiletai, bakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi z'Abaamanaase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Bakaha Daudi emikono kurwanisa abazigu abaizire kumuteera, ahabw'okuba boona bakaba bari amamanzi rugambwa, kandi bari abakuru b'amahe." 
1Chronicles12:22 Mpaho buri izooba abantu baaguma nibaija kuha Daudi emikono, okuhitsya obu yaagizire eihe rihango ritakareebwaga." 
1Chronicles12:23 Ogu nigwo mubaro gw'emitwe y'engabo ezaashangire Daudi Heburooni, ziine eby'okurwanisa, kumukubuurira obugabe bwa Saulo; nk'oku Nyakubaho yaakigambire." 
1Chronicles12:24 Abaayuda, abaizire bakwaitse engabo n'amacumu bakaba bari enkumi mukaaga na magana munaana;" 
1Chronicles12:25 Abaasimeoni, abashaija emanzi rugambwa abeeteekateekire kurwana, bari enkumi mushanju na igana rimwe;" 
1Chronicles12:26 Abaleevi enkumi ina na magana mukaaga. 
1Chronicles12:27 Yehoyaada mukuru w'ab'omuryango gwa Arooni akaija n'abashaija enkumi ishatu na magana mushanju. 
1Chronicles12:28 Zadoki, omutsigazi emanzi rugambwa, akaija n'abakuru b'engabo makumi abiri na babiri ab'omuryango gwa baishenkuru." 
1Chronicles12:29 Abaabenyamiini abaine obuzaare na Saulo enkumi ishatu; ahabw'okuba abaingi omuribo okuhitsya ago magingo bakaba bakihamiire aha b'enda ya Saulo. 
1Chronicles12:30 Abaefuraimu obukumi bubiri na magana munaana, abashaija emanzi rugambwa abarikurangaanwa omu miryango ya baishenkurubo;" 
1Chronicles12:31 ab'ekicweka ky'oruganda rwa Manaase akakumi kamwe n'enkumi munaana, abaagambirwe amaziina kuza kuhindura Daudi omugabe;" 
1Chronicles12:32 Abaisakaari, abaabaire nibeetegyereza obunaku obu Isiraeli eshemereire kugira eki yaakora, abakuru magana abiri, hamwe na beene waabo boona abu baabaire nibategyeka;" 
1Chronicles12:33 Abaazebuluuni, engabo entoore, obukumi butaano, abaine eby'okurwanisa byona eby'orugamba, abaizire n'omutima gumwe kuha Daudi emikono." 
1Chronicles12:34 Abaanafutaali abakuru orukumi rumwe, abaizire n'abashaija obukumi bushatu n'enkumi mushanju, abahagatiire engabo n'amacumu;" 
1Chronicles12:35 Abaadaani obukumi bubiri n'enkumi munaana na magana mukaaga, abeeteekateekire kurwana." 
1Chronicles12:36 Abaasheri abarwani entoore, obukumi buna abeeteekateekyeire orugamba;" 
1Chronicles12:37 Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi n'ekicweka ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase aba seeri ya Yorudaani, akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi bubiri, abaine ebintu byona eby'okurwanisa orugamba." 
1Chronicles12:38 Abo barwani boona abaizire batengire orugamba, bakahika Heburooni bamaririire kuhindura Daudi omugabe wa Isiraeli yoona, nk'oku Abaisiraeli abandi boona baabaire baine omutima gumwe kuhindura Daudi omugabe." 
1Chronicles12:39 Baaguma nawe okumara ebiro bishatu nibarya, nibanywa ebi beene waabo baabaire babateekateekyeire." 
1Chronicles12:40 Kandi na bataahi baabo abaarugire omu byanga bya hare, nk'eby'ab'enganda eza Isakaari, na Zebuluuni, na Nafutaali, bakaija bagyemwire ebyokurya aha ndogoya, aha ngamira, aha nyumbu, n'aha nte; ebyokurya bingi munonga: embumburi z'emitiini, emigimba y'emizaabibu eyomire, na viino, n'amajuta g'emioliva, n'ente n'entaama; ahabw'okuba hakaba hariho okushemererwa omuri Isiraeli yoona." 
1Chronicles13:1 Daudi akahanuura n'abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi n'aba igana-igana, na buri mwebembezi." 
1Chronicles13:2 Mpaho yaagambira Abaisiraeli boona abateeraniire aho ati: Ku muraabe nimukisiima, kandi kiri eki Mukama Ruhanga waitu arikwenda, ka tutume ahari beene waitu abatsigaire omu byanga bya Isiraeli byona, n'aha bahongyerezi n'aha Baleevi ab'omu ndembo eziine amariisizo, baije bateeranire ahi turi." 
1Chronicles13:3 Haza tugarure eshanduukye ya Ruhanga; ahabw'okuba omu busingye bwa Saulo tituragyetaireho. 
1Chronicles13:4 Abaabaire bateeraniire aho boona baakisiima, ahabw'okuba bakareeba ku kihikire." 
1Chronicles13:5 Daudi atyo yaahuruza Abaisiraeli boona, okwiha Sihoori aha kagyera ka Misiri, okuhika ahu orikuraba nooza Hamati, kwiha Kiriyatiyearimu eshanduukye ya Ruhanga." 
1Chronicles13:6 Daudi n'Abaisiraeli boona baaza Baala, niyo Kiriyatiyearimu, orurembo ry'Abaayuda, kwihayo eshanduukye ya Ruhanga erikwetererwa eiziina rya Nyakubaho, osingama ahari baakerubi." 
1Chronicles13:7 Baatwarira eshanduukye ya Ruhanga aha kigaari kisya, nibagiiha omwa Abinadabu; kandi Uuza na Ahio nibagyendesa ekyo kigaari." 
1Chronicles13:8 Daudi n'Abaisiraeli baagyenda nibeemurikira omu maisho ga Nyakubaho n'amaani gaabo goona; nibeeshongora, nibateera amagobore n'ebidongo, n'engoma empuuro, n'enshandaazo, n'amakondere." 
1Chronicles13:9 Kwonka ku baahikire omu mbuga ya Kidoni, ente ku zaateire entsibo, Uuza yaagorora omukono gwe kuramira eshanduukye." 
1Chronicles13:10 Haza Nyakubaho yaagirira Uuza ekiniga kingi, yaamwita; ahabw'okuba akaihayo omukono gwe, yaakora aha shanduukye, yaafeera aho omu maisho ga Ruhanga." 
1Chronicles13:11 Reero ekyo kyagwisa kubi Daudi, kureeba Ruhanga naagurukira Uuza kitaraariire. Nikyo omwanya ogwo baagweteire Perezi-Uuza" 
1Chronicles13:12 Eryo izooba Daudi akatiina Ruhanga, yaagira ati: Nimbaasa nta kutwara eshanduukye ya Ruhanga omwangye?" 
1Chronicles13:13 Daudi nikwo kutatwara shanduukye owe omu rurembo rwe, akagikiikamya, akagita omwa Obededomu Omugiiti." 
1Chronicles13:14 Egyo shanduukye ya Ruhanga ekaguma omwa Obededomu okumara ameezi ashatu; na Nyakubaho yaaha omugisha ab'eka ya Obededomu n'ebi atungire byona. 
1Chronicles14:1 Omugabe Hiramu owa Tuuro akatuma entumwa ahari Daudi, yaamutwekyera emiti ya kaarwenda, n'abarikwombekyesa amabaare, n'ababaizi, kumwombekyera enju." 
1Chronicles14:2 Daudi yaamanyira aho ku Mukama amuhamize kuba omugabe wa Isiraeli, kandi obugabe bwe ku abantu be Abaisiraeli babuhaisize ekitiinwa." 
1Chronicles14:3 Reero okwo Yerusalemu Daudi yaashwererayo abandi bakazi, yaazaarirayo abandi baana b'aboojo n'ababaishiki." 
1Chronicles14:4 Aga nigo maziina g'abaana abu yaazaariire Yerusalemu: Shamua, Shobabu, Natani, Solomooni," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibuhaari, Elishua, Elipeleti," 
1Chronicles14:6 Nooga, Nefegi, Yafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elishaama, Beeliyaada na Elifeeleti." 
1Chronicles14:8 Abafilisiti ku baahuriire ngu Daudi asiigirwe amajuta kuba omugabe wa Isiraeli yoona, boona baahurura kumusherura. Daudi nawe ku yaakihuriire, yaaza kubarwanisa." 
1Chronicles14:9 Obwo Abafilisiti bakaba baizire, bateire ab'omu ruhita rw'Abareefa." 
1Chronicles14:10 Daudi yaayehanuuza ahari Ruhanga ati: Mpurure, nze kurwanisa Abafilisiti? Noija kubandekurira mbasingure? Mukama yaamugarukamu ati: Hurura ozeyo. Niinyija kubakurekurira obasingure." 
1Chronicles14:11 Daudi atyo ahurura, aza Baali-perazimu, abasingurirayo. Reero agira ati: Ruhanga ambaasiise kwataguza omu bazigu bangye nk'omwegyemure gurikwohoka. Omwanya ogwo nikwo kwetwa Baali-perazimu; amakuru ngu Ruhanga w'abarikwataguza." 
1Chronicles14:12 Abafilisiti baatsigayo baaruhanga baabo, Daudi yaaragiira, baabootsya." 
1Chronicles14:13 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, Abafilisiti kandi baahurura, baateera ab'omuri orwo ruhita." 
1Chronicles14:14 Daudi ku yaayebuurize ahari Ruhanga obundi, Ruhanga yaamugira ati: Otazayo kubakurata, kureka oyekiikuure, obashangye ahashungaine n'emiti y'emirama." 
1Chronicles14:15 Reero ku oraahurire ekirikukaabuuza aha mitwe y'egyo mirama, obwo ogyende obateere, ahabw'okuba nimba nkwebembeire kwita ab'omu ihe ry'Abafilisiti." 
1Chronicles14:16 Daudi atyo atwaza nk'oku Ruhanga yaamuragiira, haza baita ab'omu ihe ry'Abafilisiti, okwiha Gibeoni okuhika Gezeri." 
1Chronicles14:17 Okurangaanwa kwa Daudi kubuga ensi yoona, Mukama areetera amahanga goona kumutiina." 
1Chronicles15:1 Daudi akeeyombekyera amaju omu rurembo rwe, yaatebeekanisiza eshanduukye ya Ruhanga omwanya, yaagiteerera eihema." 
1Chronicles15:2 Bwanyima Daudi yaagira ati: Tihariho ondi, kureka Abaleevi nibo baraaheekye eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho nibo yaatooraine kuheeka eshanduukye ye n'okuguma nibamuheereza ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles15:3 Reero Daudi yaateeranira Yerusalemu Abaisiraeli boona kureeta eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho omu mwanya gwayo, ogu yaabaire agitebeekanisiize." 
1Chronicles15:4 Kandi yaateerana hamwe beene Arooni n'Abaleevi. 
1Chronicles15:5 Beene Koora nibo aba: Urieli mukuru waabo, hamwe na beene ishe igana na makumi abiri." 
1Chronicles15:6 Omuri beene Meraari, Asaaya mukuru waabo, na beeneishe magana abiri na makumi abiri." 
1Chronicles15:7 Omuri beene Gereshomu, Yoeli mukuru waabo na beene ishe igana na makumi ashatu." 
1Chronicles15:8 Omuri beene Elizafani, Shemaaya mukuru waabo, hamwe na beeneishe magana abiri." 
1Chronicles15:9 Omuri beene Heburooni, Elieli mukuru waabo, hamwe na beeneishe makumi munaana." 
1Chronicles15:10 Omuri beene Uuzieli, Aminadabu mukuru waabo, na beeneishe igana na ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles15:11 Bwanyima akeeta abahongyerezi Zadoki na Abiiya n'Abaleevi Urieli, Asaaya, Yoeli, Shemaaya, Elieli na Abinadabu." 
1Chronicles15:12 Yaabagira ati: Niimwe bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkuriimwe Abaleevi; mweyeze, imwe na beene waanyu, mubone kureeta eshanduukye ya Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli omu mwanya gu ngitebeekanisiize." 
1Chronicles15:13 Manya bwabiso ku mutaragiheekire, Nyakubaho akatujumbutukira kitaraariire, ahabw'okuba tituragyetaireho kugitwaza nk'oku kyaragiirwe." 
1Chronicles15:14 Batyo abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi beeyeza kureeta eshanduukye ya Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli. 
1Chronicles15:15 Abaleevi baaheeka egyo shanduukye ya Ruhanga aha mabega gaabo, bagitairemu emigamba, nk'oku Musa yaaragiire naakuratira eki Nyakubaho yaagambire." 
1Chronicles15:16 Daudi kandi yaaragiira bakuru b'Abaleevi kutaho abeeshongozi beene waabo kuteera ebirikujumeeza amaraka: ebidongo, n'amagobore n'enshandaazo, kuranguuza amaraka g'okushemererwa." 
1Chronicles15:17 Batyo Abaleevi batoorana Hemani mutabani wa Yoeli kandi omuri beene ishe batoorana Asafu mutabani wa Berekiya. Reero omuri beene Meraari, beene waabo, Etani mutabani wa Kushaaya." 
1Chronicles15:18 Babataho beene waabo abarikukurataho; Zekariya, Yaazieli, Shemiramooti, Yehieli, Uuni, Eliyaabu, Benaaya, Maaseya, Matitiya Elifelehu na Mikineeya; kandi abakumiirizi batoorana Obededomu na Yeieli." 
1Chronicles15:19 Abeeshongozi aba, Hemani, Asafu na Etani bari ab'okuteera enshandaazo z'emiringa;" 
1Chronicles15:20 reero Zekariya, Azieli, Shemiramooti, Yehieli, Uuni, Eliyaabu, Maaseeya na Benaaya bari ab'okuteera ebidongo eby'amaraka garikwaniira;" 
1Chronicles15:21 kandi Matitiya, Elifeelehu, Mikineeya, Obededomu, Yeieli na Azaziya kwebembera abateezi b'amagobore g'amaraka garikujumeera." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenaniya omukuru w'Abaleevi omu by'okweshongora we yaaba ow'okuboorekyerera, ahabw'okuba akaba ari omuhangu waabyo." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekiya na Elukaana baaba ab'okurinda eshanduukye. 
1Chronicles15:24 Kandi abahongyerezi Shebaniiya, Yoshafaati, Netaneeli, Amasai, Zekariya, Benaaya na Eliezeeri baaba ab'okuteera amakondere beebembeire eshanduukye ya Ruhanga; Obededomu na Yehiya nabo baaba abarinzi b'eshanduukye." 
1Chronicles15:25 Mpaho Daudi n'abakuru b'omuri Isiraeli n'abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi, baaza kureeta eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho, baagiiha omwa Obededomu nibeesiima munonga." 
1Chronicles15:26 Kandi ahabwa Ruhanga kuramira Abaleevi, abaheekire eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho, baatamba enimi mushanju n'engondoore z'entaama mushanju." 
1Chronicles15:27 Daudi yaajwara bushuuti ya kitaani enungi munonga; n'Abaleevi boona abaabaire baheekire eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho, n'abeeshongozi, na Kenaniya orikuboorekyerera oku baraatwaze ebyeshongoro, nabo baaba nikwo baajwara." 
1Chronicles15:28 Abaisiraeli boona baareeta eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho nibateera akaari, nibagyendera aha maraka g'enzamba, n'ag'amakondere, n'ag'enshandaazo; kandi baateera munonga ebidongo n'amagobore." 
1Chronicles15:29 Reero eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho ku yaabaire neetaaha eti omu rurembo rwa Daudi, Mikaali muhara wa Saulo yaaringuririza omu dirisa. Ku yaareebire omugabe Daudi naataagurira kandi naayemurika ashemereirwe, yaamugaya aihire aha mutima." 
1Chronicles16:1 Batyo baataasya eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, baagita omu ihema, eri Daudi yaabaire agiteereire. Baatamba ebitambo bicwekize, n'eby'okurya kumwe omu maisho ga Ruhanga." 
1Chronicles16:2 Daudi ku yaaherize kutamba ebitambo bicwekize, n'ebyokurya kumwe, yaashabira abantu omugisha omu iziina rya Nyakubaho." 
1Chronicles16:3 Yaagaburira Abaisiraeli boona, abashaija n'abakazi, buri omwe omugaati n'entongo y'enyama, n'obubanda bw'emizaabibu eyomire." 
1Chronicles16:4 Kandi yaataho Abaleevi bamwe kukora omurimo gw'obuheereza omu maisho g'eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho, kuguma nibasiima kandi nibahimbisa Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafu yaaba mukuru waabo, yaakuratwa Zekariya, Yeieli, Shemiramooti, Yehieli, Matitiya, Eliyaabu, Beenaaya, Obededomu na Yeieli, baaba ab'okuteera ebidongo n'amagobore. Asafu yaaba ow'okuteera enshandaazo." 
1Chronicles16:6 Reero Benaaya na Yahizieli abahongyerezi baaba ab'okuguma nibateerera amakondere omu maisho g'eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Ruhanga. 
1Chronicles16:7 Eryo izooba Daudi akataho Asafu na beene ishe kuba ab'okuguma nibeeshongora eby'okuhimbisa Ruhanga. 
1Chronicles16:8 Musiime Nyakubaho, murangaane eiziina rye. Mumanyise ebi yaakozire omu mahanga." 
1Chronicles16:9 Mumweshongorere nimweshongora eby'okumuhimbisa. Mutebye eby'okutangaaza ebi yaakozire. 
1Chronicles16:10 Mwesingirize omu iziina rye eririkwera. Emitima y'abarikusherura Nyakubaho eshemererwe. 
1Chronicles16:11 Musherure Nyakubaho maani gaanyu. Mwetengye okuguma omu maisho ge obutoosha. 
1Chronicles16:12 Mwijukye eby'okutangaaza n'eby'amaani ebi yaakozire, n'emanja zi yaacwire." 
1Chronicles16:13 Imwe baijukuru ba Aburahamu omuheereza we, imwe beene Yakobo entoore ze." 
1Chronicles16:14 Niwe Mukama Ruhanga waitu; ebi ashoboorora bihika omu nsi yoona. 
1Chronicles16:15 Aijuka endagaano ye ebiro byona, n'eki yaaragiire ab'enzaaro n'enzaaro." 
1Chronicles16:16 Endagaano ei yaaragaine na Aburahamu, n'eki yaarahiire naaraganisa Isaaka." 
1Chronicles16:17 Ekyatairweho eki yaahamiize Yakobo, kuba endagaano etarihwaho ahari Isiraeli," 
1Chronicles16:18 Naagira ati: Ndyakuha ensi ya Kanaani, ebe obutaka bwawe." 
1Chronicles16:19 Obu baabaire bakiri bakye kandi bari abashuuhuuki omuri egyo nsi; 
1Chronicles16:20 nibazengyerera omu mahanga; nibaruga omu bugabe nibaza omu bundi; 
1Chronicles16:21 taraikiriize muntu n'omwe kubahata; Kureka ahabwabo akakabukira abagabe; 
1Chronicles16:22 naagira ati: Mutakora aha bu naasiigire amajuta; nobu kwakuba okukora kubi abarangi bangye. 
1Chronicles16:23 Imwe mwena ab'omu nsi; mweshongorere Nyakubaho, buri izooba murangirire eby'okujuna kwe." 
1Chronicles16:24 Murangaane ekitiinwa kye omu mahanga, n'eby'okutangaaza ebi akora omu mahanga goona!" 
1Chronicles16:25 Manya Nyakubaho ni mukuru, n'ow'okuhimbisibwa munonga, kandi ashemereire kutiinwa okukira baaruhanga boona." 
1Chronicles16:26 Ahabw'okuba baaruhanga boona ab'amahanga baba ebishushani ebirikuramibwa, kwonka Nyakubaho niwe yaahangire eiguru." 
1Chronicles16:27 Ekitiinwa n'obukuru bimushagatiire; Amaani n'okushemererwa biri omuri Nyaruju ye. 
1Chronicles16:28 Imwe ab'enganda z'omu mahanga, muhimbise Nyakubaho. Mumuhaise ahabw'ekitiinwa kye n'amaani ge." 
1Chronicles16:29 Muhe Nyakubaho ekitiinwa ekishemereire eiziina rye. Mumureetere emitoijo, mugimumurikire. Muramize Nyakubaho omu mwanya gwe ogurikwera." 
1Chronicles16:30 Naimwe ab'omu nsi mwena, mutetemere omu maisho ge; ahabw'okuba akahamya ensi; tebaasa kukuuka." 
1Chronicles16:31 Ka eiguru rishemererwe, n'ensi eyesiime, abantu b'omu mahanga bagambe ku Mukama ari aha ngoma." 
1Chronicles16:32 Enyanja ehoorere, na byona ebigirimu; N'eishwa ry'esingize, n'ebiririmu byona." 
1Chronicles16:33 Nibwo emiti y'omu kibira eriteerera akaari k'okushemererwa omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, yaija kucwera ensi orubanja." 
1Chronicles16:34 Musiime Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba rukundo ye etahararuka eba ey'ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles16:35 Kandi mugire muti: Ai Ruhanga omujuni waitu, otujune! Otutaaruure, otwihe omu mikono y'abanyamahanga, Tubone kusiima eiziina ryawe eririkwera, tukusingize nitwekiita." 
1Chronicles16:36 Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ahimbisibwe, okwiha ryari n'okuhitsya ryari na ryari. Bwanyima abantu boona baahendera nibagira bati: Kibe kwo; baahimbisa Nyakubaho." 
1Chronicles16:37 Bwanyima Daudi akatsiga Asafu na beene ishe omu maisho g'eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho, kuguma nibakora omurimo gw'obuheereza omu maisho gaayo, nk'oku kirikwetengwa buri izooba." 
1Chronicles16:38 Kandi yaatsigayo Obedebomu na beene ishe makumi mukaaga na munaana, obwo Obededomu mwene Yedutuuni, na Hoosa bari abakumiirizi b'aha irembo." 
1Chronicles16:39 Reero yaatsiga Zadoki omuhongyerezi n'abahongyerezi beeneishe omu maisho g'Obutaaho bwa Nyakubaho obwabaire buri Gibeoni aha katungutungu 
1Chronicles16:40 kuguma nibatambira Nyakubaho ebitambo bicwekize aha itambiro ryabyo, omu kasheeshe n'omu mwabazyo, nibakuratira ebihandiikirwe omu biragiro bya Mukama, ebi yaaragiire Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles16:41 Kandi yaabataho Hemani na Yedutuuni n'abandi abaatoorainwe abaagambirwe amaziina, kuguma nibasiima Nyakubaho ahabwa rukundo ye etahararuka." 
1Chronicles16:42 Hemani na Yedutuuni baaba ab'okuteera amakondere n'enshandaazo, n'ebindi ebiteerwa nibeeshongora ebyeshongoro ebirikwera. Batabani ba Yedutuuni yaabaha ogw'okurinda eirembo." 
1Chronicles16:43 Ebyo ku byahwaire abantu boona baayaabuuka, buri omwe yaagaruka owe, na Daudi yaaza owe kushabira ab'eka ye omugisha." 
1Chronicles17:1 Mbwenu Daudi ku yaabaire abukaire omuri nyaruju ye, yaagira Natani omurangi ati: Reeba, nyowe ntaaha omu nju ya kaarwenda; kwonka eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho etuura omu ihema." 
1Chronicles17:2 Natani yaamugarukamu ati: Kora kyona ekikuri aha mutima; ahabw'okuba Ruhanga ari hamwe naiwe. 
1Chronicles17:3 Kwonka ekyo kiro Nyakubaho yaagambira Natani ati: 
1Chronicles17:4 Irooko ogambire Daudi omuheereza wangye oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Tiiwe orikwija kuunyombekyera Nyaruju y'okutuuramu. 
1Chronicles17:5 Ahabw'okuba naaba kwiha Abaisiraeli Misiri, tinkagiraga Nyaruju i ntuuramu; kureka ntuura ninduga omu ihema ninza omu rindi; ninduga ahi ntwire ninza ahandi." 
1Chronicles17:6 Omu myanya yoona ei naagiiremu n'Abaisiraeli, ndagizire eki ndagambiire omwe aha baramuzi ba Isiraeli abu naataireho kuba abeebembezi b'abantu bangye nti: Ahabw'enki mutakaanyombekyeraga Nyaruju ya kaarwenda?" 
1Chronicles17:7 Mbwenu nu, ogambire omuheereza wangye Daudi oti: Nyakubaho w'amahe naagira ati: Nkakwiha omu iriisizo, naakutsigisaho okuriisa entaama, ngu nkuhindure omutegyeki w'abantu bangye Abaisiraeli," 
1Chronicles17:8 naaguma naiwe ahi waahurwire hoona, naacwekyereza abazigu baawe boona, baakuhigiza; kandi ndyakuhindura omunyaiziina, orangaanwe nk'abandi bantu rugambwa omu nsi." 
1Chronicles17:9 Ndyatungira abantu bangye Abaisiraeli omwanya, ngubagumyemu; babone kutuura aha butaka bwabo batakirabanisibwamu; nobu kwakuba okwitwa kubi ababisha baabo nk'obunyakare;" 
1Chronicles17:10 okwiha obu naabaha abaramuzi kubategyeka. Kandi niinyija kucwa abazigu baawe boona eishaija. Ekindi, ninkumanyisa ku Nyowe Nyakubaho ndigumyaho oruzaaro rwawe." 
1Chronicles17:11 Obunaku bwawe bw'okushanga baashwenkuru ku burihika, ndyaimutsya omu b'oruzaaro rwawe abarikukurata, omwe ahari batabani baawe, mpamye obugabe bwe." 
1Chronicles17:12 Niwe ariinyombekyera Nyaruju, kandi naanye ndyahamya ab'enda ye aha kitebe kye ky'obugabe ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles17:13 Ndyaba ishe, nawe ambeere omwana, kandi tindireka kumugirira rukundo yangye etahararuka, nk'oku naarekire kugigirira owaakubandiize;" 
1Chronicles17:14 kureka ndyamuha omwanya guhamire omu nju yangye, n'omu bugabe bwangye, ekitebe kye ky'obugabe kigume kihamire ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles17:15 Natani atyo agambira Daudi ebyo byona, nk'oku yaabigambiirwe n'oku yaabishuururiirwe." 
1Chronicles17:16 Bwanyima Omugabe Daudi akataaha omu ihema eririkwera, yaashutama omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, yaagira ati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga, mbwenu niinye oha, n'ab'eka yangye nibo baahi, kureeba nompitsya aha?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Ai Ruhanga, Iwe ekyo oku orikukireeba, n'ekintu kikye. Kureeba kandi waagamba n'aha b'eka yangye, nyowe omuheereza waawe, oku bariba omu biro bingi ebiriija. Kandi, ai Mukama Ruhanga, waanyinganisa n'omuntu w'ekitiinwa kingi." 
1Chronicles17:18 Mbwenu nyowe Daudi, ekindi nkugambire ki, kureeba nyowe omwiru waawe nompaisa ekitiinwa, ahabw'okuba nommanya." 
1Chronicles17:19 Manya, ai Nyakubaho, ebikuru ebyo byona obikozire ahabwangye omwiru waawe, okyeihiire aha mutima, kworeka ebyo bintu bikuru byona."
