1Chronicles17:20 Ai Nyakubaho, tihariho ori nkaiwe kandi tihariho Ruhanga ondi kureka Iwe, nka byona ebi twayehuririire oku biri." 
1Chronicles17:21 Mbwenu ni ihanga ki omu nsi eriri nk'eihanga ry'abantu baawe Abaisiraeli abu Iwe Ruhanga waacungwire kuba abaawe ahabwawe? Otyo okeetungira eiziina nookora ebintu bikuru kandi ebirikutiinisa, obu obinga abanyamahanga, bakahigiza abantu abawe abu waacungwire, okabaiha Misiri." 
1Chronicles17:22 Abo bantu baawe Abaisiraeli okabahindura abaawe ab'ebiro byona. Kandi naiwe, ai Mukama, waaba Ruhanga waabo." 
1Chronicles17:23 Mbwenu, ai Mukama, ikiriza eki waagamba ahariinye omwiru waawe n'aha b'eka yangye, kihame ebiro byona, haza okore nk'oku waagamba." 
1Chronicles17:24 Eiziina ryawe ribone kuhama n'okuhaisibwa ebiro byona, nibagira bati: Mukama Ruhanga w'amahe, niwe Ruhanga wa Isiraeli. Kandi n'ab'eka yangye, nyowe omwiru waawe Daudi, babe abahamire omu maisho gaawe." 
1Chronicles17:25 Manya Iwe Ruhanga wangye, onyorekire ku oriinyombekyera eka. Nikyo nyowe omwiru waawe ntaatiinira kukushaba," 
1Chronicles17:26 Mbwenu, ai Mukama, niiwe Ruhanga, kandi niiwe oraganiise nyowe omwiru waawe ekyo kintu kirungi." 
1Chronicles17:27 N'ahabw'ekyo ikiriza kuha omugisha ab'eka yangye omwiru waawe, ebone kuguma omu maisho gaawe ebiro byona; ahabw'okuba, ai Mukama, Iwe eki oha omugisha kigugira ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles18:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Daudi yaasingura Abafilisiti, yaabacwa eishaija yaakwata orurembo Gaati n'ebirorero byarwo, yaabinyaga Abafilisiti." 
1Chronicles18:2 Reero yaasingura Abamoabu, baaba abairu be; baaguma nibamuha omushoro." 
1Chronicles18:3 Kandi Daudi akasingurira Hadadezeri omugabe wa Zooba haihi na Hamati. Obu Hadadezeri yaabaire naaza kwebyarira ekiijutsyo aha mugyera Eufuraati. 
1Chronicles18:4 Daudi yaamunyaga ebigaari rukumi, n'ab'ahambaraasi enkumi mushanju, n'abarwani obukumi bubiri abarikugyendesa ebigyere. Daudi embaraasi zoona, ezirikukurura ebigaari, yaazitema ebiteega; kureka yaatsigaho ezirikubaasa kukurura ebigaari igana." 
1Chronicles18:5 Abasiriya ba Damasiko ku baizire kuha emikono Hadadezeri omugabe wa Zooba, Daudi yaabaitamu abantu obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri." 
1Chronicles18:6 Bwanyima Daudi yaata ebigo by'abarinzi omuri Aramu eya Damasiko; Abasiriya baaba abairu be, baaguma nibamuha omushoro. Nyakubaho yaaha Daudi obusinguzi ahi yaabaire aza hoona." 
1Chronicles18:7 Daudi akanyaga engabo z'ezaabu, ezi abairu ba Hadadezeri baabaire bakwaitse, yaazireeta Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles18:8 Kandi Daudi yaanyaga emiringa mingi munonga, yaagiiha Tibuhaati na Kuuni, endembo za Hadadezeri. Egyo miringa niyo Solomooni yaaheesiremu ekiyanja ky'omuringa, n'enyomyo, n'ebintu by'omuringa eby'okukoresa omuri Nyaruju." 
1Chronicles18:9 Tou omugabe wa Hamati ku yaahuriire Daudi asingwire eihe rya Hadadezeri omugabe wa Zooba," 
1Chronicles18:10 yaamutumaho omutabani Hadoraamu kumuramutsya n'okumutabaarutsya okurwanisa Hadadezeri, akamusingura, ahabw'okuba Hadadezeri ogwo akaba atoosha kurwana na Tou orugamba. Haza yaamutwekyera ebintu by'emiringo mingi; eby'ezaabu, eby'efeeza, n'eby'emiringa." 
1Chronicles18:11 Ebyo bintu omugabe Daudi nabyo yaabihongyera Nyakubaho, hamwe n'efeeza n'ezaabu ebi yaanyagire omu mahanga goona; ery'Abaedomu, ery'Abamoabu, ery'Abaamoni, ery'Abafilisiti, n'ery'Abaamaleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Reero Abishaayi mwene Zeruuya yaitira omu ruhanga rw'Omwonyo Abanyaedomu akakumi kamwe n'enkumi munaana. 
1Chronicles18:13 Yaata ebigo by'abarinzi omu Edomu, Abanyaedomu boona baaba abairu ba Daudi, Nyakubaho yaaha Daudi obusinguzi ahi yaabaire aza hoona." 
1Chronicles18:14 Daudi nikwo yaategyekire atyo Isiraeli, akacwera abantu be emanja z'oburyo omu bwinganisa." 
1Chronicles18:15 Obwo Yoabu mwene Zeruuya niwe yaabaire ari omukuru w'eihe, Yehoshafaati mwene Ahiludi ari omuhandiiki w'ebirikubaho;" 
1Chronicles18:16 Zadoki mwene Ahitubu na Ahimeleki mwene Abiyataari bari abahongyerezi; kandi Shavusha ari omuhandiiki mukuru; 
1Chronicles18:17 na Benaaya mwene Yehoyaada ari omukuru w'Abakereti n'Abapeleti; Reero batabani ba Daudi bari abakungu bakuru b'omugabe. 
1Chronicles19:1 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, Nahashi omugabe w'Abaamoni yaafa, omutabani yaamuhungurira aha ngoma." 
1Chronicles19:2 Daudi yaagira ati: Niinyija kutwaza gye Hanuni mwene Nahashi, nk'oku ishe yantwarize gye. Daudi atyo amutumaho entumwa kumuyaagira ahabwa ishe kufa. Abagaragwa ba Daudi batyo baza owa Hanuni omu nsi y'Abaamoni kumuyaagira." 
1Chronicles19:3 Kwonka abategyeki b'Abaamoni bagira Hanuni bati: Ebyo Daudi okukutumaho ab'okukuyaagira, noogira ngu biri naaha shoimwe ekitiinwa? Ebyo aba bagaragwa be tibaizire kwetegyereza n'okutata ensi, ngu abone kugicwekyereza?" 
1Chronicles19:4 Hanuni nikwo kukwata abagaragwa ba Daudi, akabamwa ebireju, ebijwaro byabo akabikyegyetera rwagati omu manyaanya, atyo akaboohereza," 
1Chronicles19:5 bakagyenda. Ku baagambiire Daudi ebibaire ahari abo bashaija, yaatuma ab'okubabugana, ahabw'okuba bakaba baitsirwe munonga enshoni. Omugabe nikwo kubatumaho ati: Mugume Yeriko okuhitsya obu ebireju byanyu biraamere, mukabona kugaruka." 
1Chronicles19:6 Abaamoni ku baareebire ngu beeyangiise Daudi, Hanuni n'abo Baamoni baayohereza empiiha z'efeeza obukaikuru mukaaga kuguriirira ab'ahabigaari, n'ab'ahambaraasi aba Mesopotamiya, na Aramaaka, na Zooba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Baapangisa ebigaari obukumi bushatu n'enkumi ibiri; kandi omugabe wa Maaka n'eihe rye baija, baateera ensiisira aharikureebana na Medeeba. Abaamoni baahurura nibaruga omu ndembo zaabo, baatenga orugamba." 
1Chronicles19:8 Daudi ku yaakihuriire, yaayohereza Yoabu n'eihe ryona ery'abashaija emanzi." 
1Chronicles19:9 Abaamoni baashohora, baatengyera orugamba aha irembo ry'orurembo; kandi abagabe abaizire kuhurura, baaza aha kwabo omu bwerere." 
1Chronicles19:10 Yoabu ku yaareebire baamutengyera orugamba omu maisho n'enyima, yaatoorana omu Baisiraeli abashaija entoore, yaabatengyeneka kurwanisa Abasiriya." 
1Chronicles19:11 Engabo ze ezindi yaazikwatsa Abishaayi omurumuna, baatengyera Abaamoni orugamba." 
1Chronicles19:12 Reero Yoabu yaagira ati: Abasiriya ku barankize amaani, ompe emikono; naiwe Abaamoni ku baraakukize amaani, naanye niinyija kugikuha." 
1Chronicles19:13 Guma, turwane mashaija ahabw'abantu baitu n'ahabw'endembo za Ruhanga waitu. Kandi Nyakubaho akore eki arikusiima." 
1Chronicles19:14 Yoabu n'abu yaabaire aine bairirira Abasiriya kurwana nabo, Abasiriya baamuhunga." 
1Chronicles19:15 Abaamoni ku bareeba Abasiriya baahunga, nabo bahunga Abishaayi murumuna wa Yoabu, bataaha omu rurembo." 
1Chronicles19:16 Kwonka Abasiriya ku baareebire baasingurwa Abaisiraeli, baatuma entumwa, zaahuruza Abasiriya aba seeri ya Eufuraati. Baija beebembeirwe Shofaki omukuru w'eihe rya Hadadezeri." 
1Chronicles19:17 Ku baakigambiire Daudi, yaahuruza Abaisiraeli boona, baayambuka Yorudaani, baabahika, yaatengyeneka engabo ze kurwanisa Abasiriya. Daudi ku yaatengyeire Abasiriya orugamba, nabo baamurwanisa." 
1Chronicles19:18 Abasiriya baahunga Abaisiraeli. Daudi yaita omu Basiriya abashaija enkumi mushanju ab'omu bigaari, n'abarwani obukumi buna abarikugyendesa ebigyere. Yaita na Shofaki omukuru w'eihe ryabo." 
1Chronicles19:19 Abakama abaabaire nibategyekwa Hadadezeri ku baareebire baasingurwa Abaisiraeli, baashaba Daudi okugira nabo obusingye; baaba abairu be. Ekyo kyareetera Abasiriya okutagaruka kuha Abaamoni emikono obundi." 
1Chronicles20:1 Omuri katumba, obunaku obu abagabe bahururiramu kuza aha rugamba, Yoabu akaimuka n'eihe rye, yaacwekyereza ensi y'Abaamoni, yaija yaagota orurembo Raba. Kwonka Daudi yaaguma Yerusalemu. Yoabu yaateera Raba yaagihwerekyereza." 
1Chronicles20:2 Daudi yaiha omugabe waabo ekirunga aha mutwe; yaashanga kiine oburemeezi kwa kiloguraamu makumi abiri na munaana z'ezaabu, kandi kirimu eibaare ry'obuguzi bwingi; baakita Daudi aha mutwe. Yaiha n'omuri orwo rurembo eminyago mingi." 
1Chronicles20:3 Kandi yaarwihamu abantu, yaabakoresa emirimo y'amaani ey'emishumeeno n'eshuuruuru n'empango. Daudi yaaba nikwo yaatwaza endembo z'Abaamoni zoona. Bwanyima Daudi n'abantu boona baagaruka Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles20:4 Ebyo ku byahwaire, haabaho orugamba n'Abafilisiti omuri Gezeri, Sebakai Omuhuushi yaita Sipai mwijukuru w'ebikaaka; Abafilisiti baagomooka." 
1Chronicles20:5 Haagaruka haabaho orundi rugamba n'Abafilisiti, Elihanani mwene Yairo yaita Lahimi murumuna wa Goliyaati Omugiiti, ou orubango rw'eicumu rye rwabaire ruri nk'empimbi i barukiraho emyenda." 
1Chronicles20:6 Reero kandi haabaho orundi rugamba n'Abafilisiti omuri Gaati. Okwo hakaba hariyo omushaija ekikaaka owaabaire aine enkumu mukaaga ahari buri kiganja, n'ebikumu mukaaga ahari buri kigyere; byona hamwe makumi abiri na bina. Nawe akaba ari mwijukuru w'ebikaaka." 
1Chronicles20:7 Mbwenu ku yaahayire Abaisiraeli, Yonatani mwene Shimea, murumuna wa Daudi, yaamwita." 
1Chronicles20:8 Abo nibo baabaire bari baijukuru b'ebikaaka bya Gaati, abaitsirwe Daudi n'engabo ze." 
1Chronicles21:1 Sitaane akaimuka kurabanisamu Abaisiraeli, yaayosya Daudi kubabara." 
1Chronicles21:2 Daudi nikwo kuragiira Yoabu n'abakuru b'eihe ati: Nimwirooko mubare Abaisiraeli, okwiha Beerisheba okuhika Daani. Haza mwije mungambire, mbone kumanya omubaro gwabo." 
1Chronicles21:3 Yoabu yaamugarukamu ati: Nyakubaho naakakanyise abantu baawe emirundi igana, okukira oku bari. Nyakusinga omugabe, boona oku baingana t'abairu baawe, mukama wangye? Mbwenu ekyo, mukama wangye, nookyendera ki? Nooyendera ki kureetera Abaisiraeli kuteebwaho orubanja?" 
1Chronicles21:4 Kwonka eki omugabe yaagambire kyakiza ekya Yoabu amaani. Yoabu nikwo kwimuka, akaraba omu Baisiraeli boona; bwanyima akagaruka Yerusalemu," 
1Chronicles21:5 akaha Daudi omubaro gw'abantu bu yaabazire. Omuri Isiraeli hakaba harimu abashaija enkwata-rurara akakaikuru kamwe n'akasiriira kamwe, kandi omuri Yuda harimu abashaija enkwata-rurara obusiriira buna n'obukumi mushanju." 
1Chronicles21:6 Kwonka omuri abo, Yoabu tarabariiremu Baleevi n'Abaabenyamiini; ahabw'okuba eki omugabe yaaragiire kikaba kimutamire." 
1Chronicles21:7 Ekyo kintu kikagwisa kubi Ruhanga, yaafubira Abaisiraeli." 
1Chronicles21:8 Daudi nikwo kweshengyereza Ruhanga ati: Ncumwire munonga kukora ekyo kintu. Kwonka mbwenu ninkweshengyereza, nyowe omwiru waawe onsaasire ekyo kibi, ahabw'okuba nkikozire nfiire omutima." 
1Chronicles21:9 Mpaho Ruhanga yaagambira Gaadi omuhanuuzi wa Daudi ati: 
1Chronicles21:10 Irooko ogambire Daudi oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Naakuha ebintu bishatu, otooraneho kimwe, mbe nikyo naakukora." 
1Chronicles21:11 Gaadi atyo aija ahika Daudi, amugambira ati: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ihaho eki oraasiime:" 
1Chronicles21:12 yaaba emyaka eshatu y'enjara, nari okumara ameezi ashatu abazigu baawe bakuhambize nibakwitsa rurara, nainga okumara ebiro bishatu bya rurara ya Nyakubaho, nirwo rufu kujuumikira ensi, maraika wa Nyakubaho naacwekyereza Isiraeli yoona. Mbwenu cwamu eki ndaagarukyemu owantuma." 
1Chronicles21:13 Daudi agira Gaadi ati: Naashobererwa kimwe. N'embu y'obwo, ka ngwe omu mikono ya Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba embabazi ze ni nyingi munonga; okukira okugwa omu mikono y'abantu." 
1Chronicles21:14 Mukama nikwo kwohereza rufu, ekajuumikira Abaisiraeli, hakafamu abantu obukumi mushanju." 
1Chronicles21:15 Kandi Ruhanga akoohereza maraika Yerusalemu kugicwekyereza. Kwonka ku yaabaire arangariire kugicwekyereza, Nyakubaho yaakireeba, yaayegarukamu ahabw'ako kabi; yaaragiira maraika orikucwekyereza ati: Ekyo nikimara! Banguura omukono gwawe. Obwo maraika wa Nyakubaho akaba ayemereire aha mbuga ya Orunani Omuyebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Daudi ku yaimukize amaisho, yaareeba maraika wa Nyakubaho ayemereire ahagati y'ensi n'eiguru, akwaitse rurara agibangiire Yerusalemu. Daudi n'abakuru omu ihanga, bajwaire ebiguniya, nikwo kwinama bakajuumara aha nsi." 
1Chronicles21:17 Daudi akeetongyeza ahari Ruhanga ati: Tiinye oragiire kubara aba bantu? Niinye ncumwire, nkakora ekibi kihango kityo. Mbwenu ezi ntaama zikozire ki? Ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, naakweshengyereza, k'omukono gwawe gube niinye gwahingamira n'ab'eka ya tata; orekye kujuumikiza abantu baawe rufu." 
1Chronicles21:18 Ebyo ku byahwaire, maraika wa Nyakubaho yaaragiira Gaadi kugambira Daudi kuza kwombekyera Nyakubaho eitambiro omu mbuga ya Orunani Omuyebusi." 
1Chronicles21:19 Daudi atyo agyenda, nk'oku Gaadi amugambiire omu iziina rya Mukama." 
1Chronicles21:20 Mbwenu Orunani ku yaabaire naahuura engano, yaahinduka yaareeba maraika. Haza batabani be bana abu yaabaire aine baayeshereka." 
1Chronicles21:21 Reero Daudi ku yaabaire naizira Orunani, onu yaanagayo amaisho, yaamureeba, yaaruga omu ihuuriro, yaagyenda yaamutangirira ajuumaire aha nsi." 
1Chronicles21:22 Daudi yaagira Orunani ati: Mpa eki kibanja kirimu eihuuriro, mbone kwombekyeramu Nyakubaho eitambiro. Kimpe nkigure, nk'oku obuguzi bwakyo bwona burikwingana, orufu rubone kuruga aha bantu." 
1Chronicles21:23 Orunani amugarukamu ati: Nyakusinga omugabe, kitware, okikore nk'oku orikwenda. Reeba, naakuha ente kuba ekitambo kicwekize, n'ebihuuzo kuba enku, n'engano kuba ekitambo ky'esaano. Kyona naakikuha." 
1Chronicles21:24 Daudi agira Orunani ati: Ngaaha! Kureka niinyija kukigura nk'obuguzi bwakyo oku buri. Tindikwija kutoijera Nyakubaho ebyawe, nobu kwakuba okumutambira ebitambo bicwekize, ebi ntaine ki mbihuuriire." 
1Chronicles21:25 Daudi atyo arenga empiiha z'ezaabu magana mukaaga, aziihura Orunani ahabw'ekyo kibanja." 
1Chronicles21:26 Ayombekyeraho Nyakubaho eitambiro, aritambiraho ebitambo bicwekize, n'ebyokurya kumwe; kandi atakira Nyakubaho. N'onu amugarukamu naayohereza omuriro gurikuruga omu iguru, gugwa ahari eryo itambiro, gwotsya ebitambo." 
1Chronicles21:27 Bwanyima Nyakubaho aragiira maraika, n'onu agarura rurara ye omu kyobati." 
1Chronicles21:28 Ago magingo Daudi ku areeba Nyakubaho yaamugarukiramu aha ihuuriro rya Orunani Omuyebusi, atambiraho ebitambo bye." 
1Chronicles21:29 Ahabw'okuba omu biro ebyo Obutaaho bwa Nyakubaho obu Musa yaakoreire omu ihamba, n'eitambiro ry'ebitambo bicwekize, bikaba biri Gibeoni aha katungutungu." 
1Chronicles21:30 Kwonka Daudi tarabaasize kuzayo kwehanuuza ahari Ruhanga; ahabw'okuba akatiina rurara ya maraika wa Nyakubaho. 
1Chronicles22:1 Bwanyima Daudi akagira ati: Aha niho Nyaruju ya Mukama Ruhanga n'eitambiro ry'ebitambo bicwekize ahabw'Abaisiraeli biraabe. 
1Chronicles22:2 Atyo Daudi aragiira abanyamahanga b'omuri Isiraeli kuteeranira hamwe, abatooranamu ababaizi b'amabaare kutebeekanisa amabaare gacweregyereire g'okwombekyesa Nyaruju ya Ruhanga." 
1Chronicles22:3 Daudi kandi arundaana ebyoma bingi by'okuheeshamu emishumaari y'okukoresa enyigi z'amarembo, n'eby'okukwatanisa eby'okwombekyesa; ataho n'okurundaana ebyoma bingi by'emiringa ebitarikubaasa na kurengwa," 
1Chronicles22:4 n'emiti ya kaarwenda etarikubarwa; ahabw'okuba Abaasidoni n'Abaatuuro bakamureetera zaakarwenda nyingi munonga. 
1Chronicles22:5 Ahabw'okuba Daudi akagira ati: Mutabani wangye Solomooni akiri muto, takahamire. Haza Nyaruju erikwija kwombekyerwa Nyakubaho, eshemereire kuba nungi munonga, kurangaanwa kandi ekaba ey'ekitiinwa omu mahanga goona. Nikyo nshemerereire kugitebeekanisiza eby'okugyombeka. Daudi atyo agitungira ebintu by'okugyombekyesa atakafiire." 
1Chronicles22:6 Bwanyima Daudi akeeta omutabani Solomooni, yaamwehanaagiriza kwombekyera Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli Nyaruju." 
1Chronicles22:7 Yaamugira ati: Mwana wangye, kituura kindi aha mutima kwombekyera Mukama Ruhanga wangye enju erikumwetererwa." 
1Chronicles22:8 Kwonka Nyakubaho akangira ati: Okarwana engamba nyingi, waita abantu baingi munonga. Nikyo otashemerereire kuunyombekyera enju erikuunyetererwa; ahabw'okuba okasheesha eshagama nyingi munonga omu nsi ninkireeba." 
1Chronicles22:9 Mbwenu noija kuzaara omwana omwojo, abe omuntu w'obusingye. Ndyamuha okugira obusingye n'abazigu be boona abamwehinguririize; nikyo aryeterwa eiziina Solomooni. Kandi omu biro bye ndyaha Isiraeli obusingye n'obucureera." 
1Chronicles22:10 Niwe ariinyombekyera Nyaruju y'okuunyetererwa. Aryambeera omwana, naanye mmubeere ishe, kandi ndyagumyaho ekitebe ky'obugabe bwe omuri Isiraeli ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles22:11 Mbwenu mwana wangye, Nyakubaho agume naiwe, akubaasise nooyombekyera Mukama Ruhanga waawe Nyaruju, nk'oku yaakugambireho." 
1Chronicles22:12 Kimwe kyonka, Nyakubaho akuhe obwengye n'okwetegyereza. Ku araakuhe obukuru bw'okutegyeka Isiraeli, okuratire amateeka ga Mukama Ruhanga waawe." 
1Chronicles22:13 Biryakugyendera gye, waaba otaireho omutima kukuratira ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe ebi Nyakubaho yaaragiire Musa ahabw'Abaisiraeli. Ba ow'amaani, ogume. Otatiina, kandi otahahaara." 
1Chronicles22:14 Nyowe nyehenengire munonga kutungira Nyaruju ya Ruhanga empiiha obukaikuru magana mukaaga z'ezaabu, ez'efeeza obukaikuru enkumi mukaaga, n'emiringa n'ebyoma ebitarikubaasa kurengwa ahabw'obwingi bwabyo. Kandi ngitungiire emiti n'amabaare. Naiwe ebyo oryayongyeraho ebindi." 
1Chronicles22:15 Oine abakozi baingi munonga; abacweregyerezi b'amabaare, abombeki baago, ababaizi, n'abanyamyoga b'emiringo yoona abatarikubaasa kubarwa;" 
1Chronicles22:16 abarikumanyira kimwe kukora eby'ezaabu, efeeza, emiringa n'eby'ebyoma. Imuka, okore! Nyakubaho agume naiwe!" 
1Chronicles22:17 Daudi kandi akaragiira abakuru b'omuri Isiraeli boona kuhwera omutabani Solomooni. Yaabagira ati: 
1Chronicles22:18 Timurikumanya ku Mukama Ruhanga waanyu atuura ari hamwe naimwe? Kandi tabahaire obusingye aha mbaju zoona? Manya akandekurira abatuuzi b'omuri egi nsi, naabasingura. Mbwenu ab'omuri egyo nsi bagomookiire Mukama, naimwe abantu be" 
1Chronicles22:19 mweheereyo kimwe n'emitima yaanyu n'amagara gaanyu kusherura Mukama Ruhanga waanyu. Nimwimukye, mwombekye Nyaruju ya Mukama Ruhanga, eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Mukama, n'ebintu bya Ruhanga ebirikwera, mubone kubitaasya omuri egyo nju erikwetererwa eiziina rye." 
1Chronicles23:1 Daudi ku yaakuzire, yaahika omu ngingo za bukuru, yaayemeka omutabani Solomooni kuba omugabe wa Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles23:2 Bwanyima Daudi yaateeranira hamwe abakuru ba Isiraeli n'Abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi. 
1Chronicles23:3 Abaleevi, okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi ashatu y'obukuru n'okweyongyerayo baabarwa, boona baahika abashaija obukumi bushatu n'enkumi munaana." 
1Chronicles23:4 Ahari abo obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina, Daudi yaagira ati: Babe ab'okukora omurimo gw'omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Enkumi mukaaga babe abategyeki n'abaramuzi." 
1Chronicles23:5 Enkumi ina babe abarinzi b'amarembo; n'abandi enkumi ina babe ab'okuhimbisa Nyakubaho, nibateera ebirikugamba ebi naakozire kumuhimbisisa." 
1Chronicles23:6 Daudi yaababaganisa omu bicweka, nk'oku batabani ba Leevi aba bari: Gereshomu, Kohati na Meraari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Batabani ba Gereshomu bakaba bari Ladani na Shimei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Batabani ba Ladani ni bashatu: Yahieli mukuru waabo, na Zetamu, na Yoeli." 
1Chronicles23:9 Batabani ba Shimei bonshatu ni Shelomooti, Hazieli na Harani. Abo bakaba bari bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkuru ba Ladani." 
1Chronicles23:10 Reero batabani ba Shimei ni Yahati, Ziina, Yeushi na Beriya. Abo bana bakaba bari batabani ba Shimei." 
1Chronicles23:11 Yahati niwe yaabaire ari mukuru omuribo, nihakurataho Ziiza. Kwonka Yeushi na Beriya tibarazaire batabani baingi. Nikyo omu kubara okwo baayetereirwe omuryango gwa baishenkurubo." 
1Chronicles23:12 Batabani ba Kohati ni bana: Amuraamu, Izihaari, Heburooni na Uzieli." 
1Chronicles23:13 Batabani ba Amuraamu ni Arooni na Musa. Arooni akashoroorwa kuguma ari ow'okuhaasirira ebintu ebirikwera, ngu we n'abaijukuru bagume booterere Nyakubaho obubaani, n'okumuheereza n'okushabira abantu emigisha omu iziina rye ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles23:14 Kwonka batabani ba Musa omuntu wa Ruhanga bakaba nibabarirwa omu b'oruganda rwa Leevi. 
1Chronicles23:15 Batabani ba Musa ni Gereshomu na Eliezeeri. 
1Chronicles23:16 Omuri beene Gereshomu, omukuru ni Shebueli." 
1Chronicles23:17 Beene Eliezeeri, omukuru ni Rehabiya. Eliezeeri tarazaire bandi batabani, kureka owaazaire abatabani baingi ni Rehabiya." 
1Chronicles23:18 Omuri beene Izihaari, Shelomiti niwe yaabaire ari mukuru omu ruganda." 
1Chronicles23:19 Beene Heburooni ni Yeriya mukuru waabo, na Amariya orikumukurata, owa kashatu Yahazieli, n'owa kana Yekameamu." 
1Chronicles23:20 Beene Uzieli ni Miika mukuru waabo, na Isihiya orikumukurata." 
1Chronicles23:21 Meraari akazaara Mahili na Muushi, Mahili yaazaara Eleazaari na Kiishi." 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleazaari akafa atazaire batabani, kureka abahara. Beene waabo batabani ba Kiishi baabashwera." 
1Chronicles23:23 Muushi akazaara abatabani bashatu: Mahili, Ederi na Yeremooti." 
1Chronicles23:24 Abo nibo beene Leevi, nk'oku emiryango ya baishenkurubo eri, kandi bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, nibo baahandiikirwe, nk'oku amaziina gaabo, buri omwe ow'emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho, gaabaire gari. Bakaba bari ab'okukora omurimo gw'obuheereza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
1Chronicles23:25 Manya Daudi akagira ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ahaire abantu be obusingye, kandi aryaguma omuri Yerusalemu ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles23:26 N'ahabw'ekyo Abaleevi tibaakyetengwa kuheeka butaaho nari ebintu ebirikukoresibwa aha bw'omurimo gwabwo ogw'okuramya. 
1Chronicles23:27 Mbwenu ahabw'eki Daudi yaahereerukire kuragiira, Abaleevi boona abahikize emyaka makumi abiri y'obukuru n'okukiraho bakahandiikwa kukora omurimo gw'obuheereza." 
1Chronicles23:28 Kwonka omurimo gwabo gube ogw'okuhwera beene Arooni, nibakora emirimo y'obuheereza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho nibareeberera ebibuga, ebishengye, n'okucuma ebintu byona ebirikwera eby'omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga;" 
1Chronicles23:29 kandi n'okubakwatsa omu by'emigaati y'okumurikwa, n'omu by'ebitambo by'esaano, n'obubanda bw'emigaati etatumbisiibwe, ebitambo ebyokize, n'ebijwangiibwemu amajuta g'omuoliva; n'ebintu byona eby'okurengyesa obwingi n'obuhango;" 
1Chronicles23:30 na buri kasheeshe kuguma nibeemerera kusiima n'okuhimbisa Nyakubaho, n'omu mwabazyo batyo;" 
1Chronicles23:31 na baaba nibatambira Mukama ebitambo bicwekize ahari zaasabato, nari ahari buri kuboneka kw'okwezi, n'aha biro by'amagyenyi kuguma bari omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, nk'omubaro gwabo ogurikwetengwa oku gurikwingana." 
1Chronicles23:32 Bagume batyo nibareeberera Eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, n'Omwanya Ogurikwera; nibakwatsa batabani ba Arooni, beene waabo, omurimo gw'obuheereza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
1Chronicles24:1 Beene Arooni bakaba nibabaganisibwamu bati: Beene Arooni nibo aba: Nadabu, Abiihu, Eleazaari, na Itimaari." 
1Chronicles24:2 Kwonka Nadabu na Abiihu bakatanga ishebo kufa, kandi bakaba bari encwekye; Eleazaari na Itimaari nikwo kuba abahongyerezi." 
1Chronicles24:3 Daudi naahwerwa Zadoki ow'omuri beene Eleazaari, na Ahimeleki ow'omuri beene Itimaari, akabatebeekanisa nk'oku emirimo yaabo y'obuheereza ei baakwatsiibwe yaabaire eri." 
1Chronicles24:4 Nk'oku abantu bakuru baashangirwe omuri beene Eleazaari, okukira omuri beene Itimaari, bakababaganisamu emitwe ikumi na mukaaga y'ab'emiryango ya baishenkuru ba beene Eleazaari, na munaana eya beene Itimaari." 
1Chronicles24:5 Bakababaganisamu nibabateerera enteenyu, boona omu muringo gumwe; ahabw'okuba omuri beene Eleazaari n'omuri beene Itimaari hakabamu abakuru b'Omwanya Ogurikwera, n'abakuru b'ebya Ruhanga." 
1Chronicles24:6 Reero omuhandiiki Shemaaya, mwene Netaneeli Omuleevi, yaabahandiikira omu maisho g'omugabe, n'ag'abategyeki, n'aga Zadoki omuhongyerezi, na Abimeleki mwene Abiyataari, n'ag'abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkuru b'abahongyerezi n'ab'Abaleevi. Omuryango gumwe gwatooranirwa Eleazaari; n'ogundi Itimaari." 
1Chronicles24:7 Enteenyu y'orubu rw'okubanza ekakwata Yehoyaribu, eya kabiri yaakwata Yedaaya;" 
1Chronicles24:8 eya kashatu Harimu, eya kana Serorimu;" 
1Chronicles24:9 eya kataano Malikiya, eya mukaaga Miiyamiini;" 
1Chronicles24:10 eya mushanju Haakozi, eya munaana Abiya;" 
1Chronicles24:11 eya mwenda Yeshwa, eya ikumi Shekaniiya;" 
1Chronicles24:12 eya ikumi n'emwe Eliyashibu, eya ikumi na ibiri Yakimu;" 
1Chronicles24:13 eya ikumi na ishatu Huupa, eya ikumi na ina Yeshebeabu;" 
1Chronicles24:14 eya ikumi na itaano Biluga, eya ikumi na mukaaga Imeri;" 
1Chronicles24:15 eya ikumi na mushanju Heziri; eya ikumi na munaana Hapizezi; 
1Chronicles24:16 eya ikumi na mwenda Petahiiya; ey'amakumi abiri Yehezekeeli; 
1Chronicles24:17 ey'amakumi abiri n'emwe Yahini; ey'amakumi abiri na ibiri Gamuli; 
1Chronicles24:18 eya makumi abiri na ishatu Delaaya; eya makumi abiri na ina Maaziya. 
1Chronicles24:19 Abo nikwo baahairwe omurimo gw'obuheereza, ogw'okuza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, nibakuratira embu zaabo ezi baateereirweho Arooni ishenkurubo, nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli yaamuragiire." 
1Chronicles24:20 Reero omuri beene Leevi abandi, abakuru nibo aba: Omuri beene Amuraamu, omukuru ni Shubaeli, omuri beene Shubaeli, Yehedeeya." 
1Chronicles24:21 Abaarehabiya: Omuri beene Rehabiya, omukuru ni Ishiiya;" 
1Chronicles24:22 omu ba Izuhaari, Shelomooti; omuri beene Shelomooti, Yahati." 
1Chronicles24:23 Beene Heburooni, omukuru ni Yeriya; owa kabiri Amariya, owa kashatu Yahazieli, owa kana Yekameamu." 
1Chronicles24:24 Beene Uzieli ni Miika. Omuri beene Miika ni Shamiri. 
1Chronicles24:25 Murumuna wa Miika akaba ari Ishiya. Omuri beene Ishiya, omukuru ni Zekariya." 
1Chronicles24:26 Beene Meraari ni Mahili na Muushi. Beene Yaaziya, omukuru ni Beno." 
1Chronicles24:27 Baijukuru ba Meraari, batabani ba Yaaziya, ni Beno, Shohamu, Zaakuri na Iburi." 
1Chronicles24:28 Aba Mahiri ni Eleazaari, otarazaire batabani." 
1Chronicles24:29 Abaakiishi: Beene Kiishi, omukuru ni Yerameeli." 
1Chronicles24:30 Beene Muushi ni Mahili, Ederi, na Yerimooti. Abo bakaba bari baijukuru b'Abaleevi, nk'emiryango ya baishenkurubo oku yaabaire eri." 
1Chronicles24:31 Abo nabo, buri mukuru w'omuryango gwa baishenkurubo n'omurumuna, bakateerera enteenyu omu maisho g'omugabe Daudi, na Zadoki na Ahimeleki, n'ag'abakuru b'emiryuango ya baishenkuru b'abahongyerezi n'ab'Abaleevi, nka baakareebi." 
1Chronicles25:1 Daudi n'abakuru b'emigyenzo y'okuramya bakatoorana omuri beene Asafu, na beene Hemani, na beene Hedutuuni, ab'okuguma nibaranga eki Ruhanga abatumire, nibateera amagobore n'ebidongo n'enshandaazo. Amaziina g'abaatoorainwe kwebembera omugyenzo gw'okuramya, n'emirimo i baraakore, nigo aga:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Omuri beene Asafu ni Zaakuri, Yesefu, Netamiya na Ashareela beene Asafu, nibeebemberwa Asafu, owabaire aranga nk'oku omugabe amuragiire." 
1Chronicles25:3 Ab'omuri beene Yedutuuni, beene Yedutuuni: Gedaliya, Zeri, Yeshaaya, Shimei, Hashabiya na Matitiya; mukaaga abaabaire nibeebemberwa ishebo Yedutuuni, owaabaire aranga naateera eigobore kusiima n'okuhimbisa Nyakubaho." 
1Chronicles25:4 Omuri beene Hemani: beene Hemani ni Bukiya, Mataniya, Uzieli, Shebueli na Yerimooti, taho Hananiya, Hanaani, Eliyaata, Gidaliti, Romamutiezeeri, Yoshebekaasha, Malooti, Hotiri, na Mahazioti." 
1Chronicles25:5 Abo boona bakaba bari beene Hemani, omuhanuuzi w'omugabe, abu Ruhanga yaabaire amuraganiise kumuhaisa ekitiinwa. Manya Hemani akaba azaire abatabani mushanju n'abahara bashatu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Boona ishebo niwe yaabaire abeebembera nibateerera enanga omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, enshandaazo, ebidongo, n'amagobore, ahabw'omugyenzo gw'okuramiza omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga. Asafu ogwo na Yedutuuni na Hemani bakaba bakora eki omugabe yaabaragiira." 
1Chronicles25:7 Omubaro gwabo, hamwe na beene waabo abaabaire batendekirwe kweshongorera Nyakubaho, boona abaabaire nibakumanya gye, gukaba niguhika abantu magana abiri na makumi munaana na munaana." 
1Chronicles25:8 Batyo baateerera emirimo yaabo enteenyu, abakuru n'abato, abeegyesa n'abeegi, boona hamwe." 
1Chronicles25:9 Enteenyu y'okubanza ekakwata Yosefu ow'Abaasafu. Eya kabiri yaakwata Gedaliya na beeneishe n'abatabani, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:10 eya kashatu, Zaakuri n'abatabani, na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:11 eya kana, Izuri n'abatabani na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:12 eya kataano Netaniya n'abatabani na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:13 eya mukaaga, Bukiya n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:14 eya mushanju, Yeshareela n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:15 eya munaana Yeshaaya n'abatabani na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:16 eya mwenda, Mataniya n'abatabani, na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:17 eya ikumi, Shimei n'abatabani, na beeneishe boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:18 eya ikumi n'emwe, Azareeli n'abatabani na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:19 eya ikumi na ibiri, Hashabiya n'abatabani na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:20 eya ikumi na ishatu, Shubaeli n'abatabani na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:21 Eya ikumi na ina ekakwata Matitiya n'abatabani na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:22 eya ikumi na itaano yaakwata Yeremooti n'abatabani na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:23 eya ikumi na mukaaga, Hananiya n'abatabani na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:24 eya ikumi na mushanju, Yoshebekasha n'abatabani na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:25 eya ikumi na munaana, Hanaani n'abatabani na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:26 eya ikumi na mwenda ekakwata Malooti n'abatabani na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:27 Eya makumi abiri yaakwata Eliyata n'abatabani na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:28 eya makumi abiri n'emwe, Hotiri n'abatabani na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:29 eya makumi abiri na ibiri, Gidaliti n'abatabani na beene ishe, boona ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:30 Eya makumi abiri na ishatu yaakwata Mahazioti n'abatabani na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles25:31 Reero ey'amakumi abiri na ina yaakwata Romamutiezeeri n'abatabani na beeneishe, boona ikumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles26:1 Eby'embu z'abakumiirizi b'aha marembo: Omuri beene Koora ni Meshelemiya, mutabani wa Koora, ow'omuri beene Asafu." 
1Chronicles26:2 Meshelemiya akazaara abatabani aba: Zekariya omujigaijo, Yediaeli omushubiro, owa kashatu Zebadiya, owa kana Yatinieli," 
1Chronicles26:3 owa kataano Elamu, owa mukaaga Yehohaanani, owa mushanju Eliehoenai." 
1Chronicles26:4 Kandi Obededomu akazaara abatabani aba: Shemaaya omujigaijo, Yehozabadi omushubiro, Yoa omugati, owa kana Shakari, owa kataano Netaneeli," 
1Chronicles26:5 owa mukaaga Emieli, owa mushanju Isakaari, owa munaana Peuletai. Ahabw'okuba Ruhanga akaba amuhaire omugisha." 
1Chronicles26:6 Reero omutabani Shemaaya akazaara abatabani abaabaire abategyeki b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo; ahabw'okuba bakaba bari abashaija amamanzi. 
1Chronicles26:7 Beene Shemaaya nibo aba: Otini, Refaeli, Obedi na Elizabadi abu beene waabo Elihu na Semakiya nabo baabaire bari emanzi." 
1Chronicles26:8 Abo boona bakaba bari aba beene Obededomu, na batabani baabo, na beene waabo bari abashaija emanzi, abashemereire ogwo murimo. Aba Obededomu bakaba bari makumi mukaaga na babiri." 
1Chronicles26:9 Meshelemiya we akaba aine abatabani na beene waabo, abashaija emanzi ikumi na munaana." 
1Chronicles26:10 Na Hoosa, ow'omuri beene Meraari, akazaara abatabani; omukuru ari Shimuri. Ahabw'okuba ogu, nobu yaabaire atari mujigaijo, kwonka ishe niwe yaahindwire mukuru." 
1Chronicles26:11 Owa kabiri akaba ari Hilikiya, owa kashatu Tebaliya, n'owa kana Zekariya. Batabani ba Hoosa boona, na beene waabo, bakaba bari ikumi na munaana." 
1Chronicles26:12 Abo bakumiirizi b'aha marembo bakaba baine embu; na bakuru baabo baine emirimo y'okuheereza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, nk'oku beene waabo Abaleevi baabaire bagiine." 
1Chronicles26:13 Kandi bakateerera enteenyu emiryango ya baishenkurubo, emito n'emikuru, kumanya amarembo gu baraarinde." 
1Chronicles26:14 Enteenyu y'eirembo rya burugwa-izooba yaakwata Shelemiya. Ku baateereire omutabani Zekariya, omuhanuuzi omunyabwengye, enteenyu yaamukwata kurinda eirembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
1Chronicles26:15 Reero eya Obededomu yaija eri ey'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo; kandi abatabani baakwatwa ey'okurinda eibiikiro. 
1Chronicles26:16 Shupimu na Hoosa bakakwatwa eya burengyerwa-izooba, aha irembo rya Shaleketi, ah'omuhanda gurikwinamukira; buri omwe naarinda okwe." 
1Chronicles26:17 Ahari burugwa-izooba hakaba hazaho mukaaga buri izooba; aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho bana buri izooba; aha bwa buryo bana buri izooba; kandi aha ibiikiro babiri-babiri. 
1Chronicles26:18 Reero aha kibambaaza ahari burengyerwa-izooba aha muhanda, hakaba hariho bana, na babiri ahari ekyo kibambaaza." 
1Chronicles26:19 Ezo nizo zaabaire ziri embu z'abakumiirizi b'aha marembo omu Baakoora na beene Meraari. 
1Chronicles26:20 Reero omu Baleevi, Ahiya niwe yaabaire areeberera amabiikiro g'omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, n'ag'ebintu ebihongirwe." 
1Chronicles26:21 Batabani ba Ladani baijukuru ba Gereshooni, abarikukomooka ahari Ladani, bakuru b'emiryango ab'omu Baaladani Omugereshooni omukuru akaba ari Yehieli." 
1Chronicles26:22 Beene Yehieli: Zetamu na Yoeli omurumuna bakaba bareeberera amabiikiro ga Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. 
1Chronicles26:23 Omu ba Amuraamu: Abahizuhaari, n'Abaheburooni n'Abauzieli;" 
1Chronicles26:24 kandi Shebueli, mwene Gereshomu, mwijukuru wa Musa, niwe yaabaire ari mukuru, naareeberera amabiikiro." 
1Chronicles26:25 Beene ishe abaakomookire ahari Eliezeeri, nibo aba: Eliezeeri akazaara Rehabiya, Rehabiya yaazaara Yeshaaya, Yeshaaya yaazaara Yoramu, Yoramu yaazaara Zikuri, na Zikuri yaazaara Shelomooti." 
1Chronicles26:26 Shelomooti ogu, na beeneishe nibo baabaire bareeberera amabiikiro goona, ag'ebintu ebi omugabe Daudi, n'abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, n'abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi, na igana-igana, n'abakuru b'eihe baahongyeire Nyakubaho." 
1Chronicles26:27 Omu bi baanyagire omu ngamba, bakagira ebi baakozireho, baabihonga kuguma nibikoresibwa ahabwa Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho;" 
1Chronicles26:28 kandi n'ebintu byona, ebi omurangi Samueli, na Saulo mwene Kiishi, na Abuneeri mwene Neeri, na Yoabu mwene Zeruuya baahongire. Ebyo byona ebyahongirwe, bikaba nibireebererwa Shelomooti na beene ishe." 
1Chronicles26:29 Omu Baizuhaari, Kenaniya n'abatabani bakakwatsibwa emirimo y'abategyeki, kuba abakungu n'abaramuzi b'Abaisiraeli." 
1Chronicles26:30 Omu Baheburooni, Hashabiya na beeneishe, abashaija emanzi rukumi na magana mushanju, bakaba bareeberera Isiraeli y'oburengyerwa-izooba bwa Yorudaani, ahabw'emirimo ya Mukama yoona n'ey'omugabe." 
1Chronicles26:31 Omu Baheburooni, Yeriya niwe yaabaire ari mukuru w'Abaheburooni, nk'oku enzaaro zaabo n'emiryango ya baishenkurubo byabaire nibikuratana. Omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'ena ogw'omu busingye bwa Daudi, bakacondooza, baashanga abashaija emanzi omu Baheburooni abatwire Yezeri omuri Gileadi." 
1Chronicles26:32 Omugabe Daudi yaatoorana Yeriya na beeneishe, abashaija emanzi enkumi ibiri na magana mushanju, bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, kureeberera Abaareubeeni n'Abaagaadi n'ekicweka ky'ab'oruganda rw'Abaamanaase, ahabw'ebintu byona ebikwatiraine na Ruhanga, n'ebikwatiraine n'omugabe." 
1Chronicles27:1 Aga nigo maziina g'Abaisiraeli, bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi na igana-igana, n'abatware baabo, abaabaire nibagaragira omugabe, nibareeberera ebintu byona ebikwatiraine n'okwihaihana kw'engabo, buri kwezi, okumara omwaka; buri rubu rurimu abantu obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:2 Yashobeamu mwene Zebudieli, akaba ari mukuru w'ab'orubu rw'okubanza, omu kwezi kw'okubanza. Ab'omu rubu rwe bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:3 Akaba ari mwijukuru wa Pereezi, kandi ari omutegyeki w'abakuru b'eihe boona ab'omu kwezi kw'okubanza." 
1Chronicles27:4 Dodai Omwahoohi akaba naareeberera ab'orubu rw'okwezi kwa kabiri, ab'orubu rwe bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:5 Omutegyeki wa kashatu ahabw'okwezi kwa kashatu akaba ari Benaaya, mwene Yehoyaada omuhongyerezi, ari omutware; ab'omu rubu rwe nibahika obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:6 Niwe Benaaya, owaabaire ari omushaija emanzi, ow'omuri bariya amakumi ashatu, kandi ari mukuru waabo. Omutabani Amiizabadi akaba ari omu b'oru rwe." 
1Chronicles27:7 Asaheeli murumuna wa Yoabu, niwe yaabaire ari owa kana, ahabw'okwezi kwa kana, naakuratwa omutabani Zebadiya; ab'omu rubu rwe bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:8 Omutegyeki wa kataano, ahabw'okwezi kwa kataano, ni Shamuhuti Omwizirahi. Ab'omu rubu rwe nabo bakaba bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:9 Owa mukaaga ahabw'okwezi kwa mukaaga ni Ira, mwene Ikeshi Omutekoa; ab'omu rubu rwe bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:10 Owa mushanju, ahabw'okwezi kwa mushanju, akaba ari Helezi Omupeloni ow'omuri beene Efuraimu; ab'omu rubu rwe nibahika obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:11 Owa munaana, ahabw'okwezi kwa munaana, ni Sibikai Omuhuushi, ow'ab'omu Baazeera, omu rubu rwe bakaba nibahika obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:12 Owa mwenda, ahabw'okwezi kwa mwenda, akaba ari Abiezeri owa Anatooti, Omubenyamiini; ab'omu rubu rwe bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:13 Owa ikumi, ahabw'okwezi kwa ikumi, ari Maharai owa Netoofa, ow'omu Baazeera; ab'omu rubu rwe nibahika obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:14 Owa ikumi n'omwe, ahabw'okwezi kwa ikumi na kumwe, akaba ari Benaaya owa Piratooni, ow'omuri beene Efuraimu; ab'omu rubu rwe nibahika obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:15 Owa ikumi na babiri, ahabw'okwezi kwa ikumi n'abiri, ni Heledai Omunetofa, owa Otinieli; ab'omu rubu rwe bari obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ina." 
1Chronicles27:16 Omu bategyeki b'enganda za Isiraeli; omu Baareubeeni, Eliezeeri mwene Zikuri, niwe yaabaire ari omutegyeki mukuru; n'Abaasimeoni nibategyekwa Shefatiya mwene Maaka;" 
1Chronicles27:17 Abaaleevi bari aba Hashabiya mwne Kemueli; Abaarooni, Zadoki;" 
1Chronicles27:18 Abaayuda, Elihu, ow'omuri beene ishe daudi; Abaisakaari, Omuri mwene Mikaeli;" 
1Chronicles27:19 Abaazebuluuni, Ishimaaya mwene Obadiya; Abaanafutaali, Yeremooti mwene Azirieli;" 
1Chronicles27:20 Abaefuraimu, Hoshea mwene Azaziya; ab'ekicweka ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase, Yoeli mwene Pedaaya;" 
1Chronicles27:21 ab'ekicweka ky'ab'oruganda rwa Manaase ab'omuri Gileadi, Iido mwene Zekariya; Abaabenyamiini, Yaasieli mwene Abuneeri;" 
1Chronicles27:22 Abaadaani, Azareeli mwene Yerohaamu. Abo nibo baabaire bari bakuru b'enganda za Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles27:23 Daudi tarabazire abatakahikize myaka y'obukuru makumi abiri, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akaba araganiise kukanyisa Abaisiraeli, bakaba baingi nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru." 
1Chronicles27:24 Yoabu mwene Zeruuya akatandika kubara, kwonka tiyaaheza. Hoona ekyo kyareetera Ruhanga kugirira Abaisiraeli ekiniga kingi. N'omubaro gwabo boona tigwahandiikwa mu bitabo by'eby'omu busingye bw'omugabe Daudi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Owaabaire naareeberera amabiikiro g'omugabe ni Azimaveeti, mwene Adieli; kandi orikureeberera amabiikiro g'omuri egyo nsi, omu ndembo, n'omu byaro n'omu minaara, ari Yonatani mwne Uziya." 
1Chronicles27:26 Ow'abarikuhinga omu misiri akaba ari Eziri mwene Kelubi; 
1Chronicles27:27 kandi orikureeberera emisiri y'emizaabibu ari Shimei Omunyaraama. Reero omureeberezi w'ebirikushoromwa omu misiri y'emizaabibu, bikarindirwa omu mabiikiro ga viino, akaba ari Zabudi Omushiifa." 
1Chronicles27:28 Omureeberezi w'emioliva n'emikunyu y'omuri Shefeela akaba ari Baalihanani Omugedera; kandi ow'amabiikiro g'amajuta g'emioliva ari Yoashi; 
1Chronicles27:29 omureeberezi w'amasyo gu barikuriisiza omu ruhita rwa Sharooni ari Shiturai owa Sharooni, kandi ow'amasyo g'omu mpanga, ari Shafati mwene Adulai." 
1Chronicles27:30 Omureeberezi w'engamira akaba ari Obili Omuishimaeli, reero ow'endogoya enkazi ari Yehedeeya Omumeeroni; omureeberezi w'amataama n'amabuzi ari Yaziizi Omuhaguri." 
1Chronicles27:31 Abo boona bakaba bari abareeberezi b'ebintu by'Omugabe Daudi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Yonataani ishento wa Daudi, niwe yaabaire ari omuhabuzi we orikwetegyereza kandi orikumanya gye eby'amateeka. We na Yehieli, mwene Hakimooni, nibo baabaire nibarera batabani b'omugabe." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofeli akaba ari omuhabuzi w'omugabe, kandi Hushaayi Omuaruuki ari munywani w'ogwo mugabe," 
1Chronicles27:34 Ahitofeli akakuratwa Yehoyaada mwene Benaaya, na Abiyataari. Yoabu akaba ari omukuru w'eihe ry'omugabe." 
1Chronicles28:1 Daudi akateeranira Yerusalemu abakungu ba Isiraeli, abakuru b'enganda, abategyeki b'engabo, abaabaire nibagaragira omugabe nibaihaihana, taho abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi na igana-igana, n'abareeberezi b'ebintu by'omugabe byona, n'amatungo ge, na batabani be, hamwe n'abakuru b'ekikaari, n'amamanzi, n'abarwani boona ab'amaani." 
1Chronicles28:2 Reero Omugabe Daudi yaimuka, yaabagira ati: Imwe banyaruganda, naimwe bantu bangye 'mwe, kikaba kintuura aha mutima kwombekyera eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho enju y'okuhuumuriramu, kandi eri endibatiro ya Ruhanga waitu. Ntyo naatebeekanisa eby'okugyombeka." 
1Chronicles28:3 Kwonka Ruhanga yangira ati; Torikwija kwombeka nju y'okuunyetererwa, ahabw'okuba oba omurwani, kandi okasheesha eshagama y'abantu baingi." 
1Chronicles28:4 Kwonka shi Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli akantoorana, yaanyiha omu b'omuryango gwa tata, kuba omugabe wa Isiraeli ebiro byona. Manya akatoorana Yuda kuba omwebembezi, kandi omu b'omuryango gwa Yuda yaatooranamu eka ya tata. Reero omuri beene tata, yaaba niinye yaasiima kuhindura omugabe wa Isiraeli yoona." 
1Chronicles28:5 N'omuri batabani bangye boona, ahabw'okuba Mukama akampa baingi, yaatooranamu Solomooni mutabani wangye kusingama aha kitebe ky'obugabe ekya Nyakubaho kutegyeka Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles28:6 Akangira ati: Mutabani waawe Solomooni niwe araanyombekyere Nyaruju n'ebikaari byangye, ahabw'okuba mmutooraine kuba omwana wangye, naanye nkamubeera ishe." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ku arigumizamu n'omutima gwe gwona kukuratira ebiragiro byangye n'ebi naaragiire, nk'oku arikutwaza hati, ndyagumyaho obugabe bwe ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles28:8 Mbwenu nu, omu maisho g'Abaisiraeli mwena, omutwe gw'abantu ba Nyakubaho, n'omu maisho ga Ruhanga waitu otuhuriire, mugume murinde, kandi mute omutima aha biragiro byona ebya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, mubone kutunga egi nsi nungi, n'okugitsigira abaana baanyu abaribaza omu bigyere, ekaba eyaabo y'obuhunguzi ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles28:9 Naiwe mwana wangye Solomooni, guma omanye Ruhanga wa sho, omuheereze n'omutima gwawe gwona oyekundiire. Manya Nyakubaho acaaka emitima, kandi amanya enaama z'abantu n'ebi bateekateeka. Ku orimusherura, oryamubona; kwonka ku orimwimuura aryakucwera kimwe." 
1Chronicles28:10 Mbwenu guma okimanye, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho niiwe atooraine kumwombekyera Nyaruju ye erikwera. Ba ow'amaani, ogikore." 
1Chronicles28:11 Bwanyima Daudi akaha omutabani Solomooni eky'okureeberaho ky'ekisaasi kya Nyaruju, n'eky'amaju gaayo, amabiikiro gaayo, zaakaanyinaabiri zaayo, ebishengye byayo eby'omunda, n'eky'ekishengye ky'ekitebe ky'okusaasira." 
1Chronicles28:12 Yaamushoboororera n'eky'okureeberaho eky'ebi arikuteekateeka aha bikaari bya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'ebishengye byona ebigyehinguririize, amabiikiro ga Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, n'ag'ebintu ebihongirwe." 
1Chronicles28:13 Yaamumanyisa eby'embu z'abahongyerezi n'ez'Abaaleevi, n'emirimo yoona eraakorerwe omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
1Chronicles28:14 Oburemeezi bw'ezaabu, y'okukoresa ebintu byona eby'ezaabu, ebya buri murimo. Oburemeezi bw'ebintu by'efeeza, ebya buri murimo." 
1Chronicles28:15 Oburemeezi bw'ebikondo by'ezaabu eby'amatabaaza, n'amatabaaza gaabyo. Oburemeezi bw'ezaabu obwa buri kikondo ky'etabaaza, n'amatabaaza gaakyo. Oburemeezi bw'efeeza obw'ekikondo ky'etabaaza, n'amatabaaza gaakyo; nk'oku buri kikondo ky'etabaaza kiraakoresibwe omuri ogwo murimo." 
1Chronicles28:16 Oburemeezi bw'ezaabu eraakorwemu buri meeza y'emigaati y'okumurikwa; n'efeeza y'okukoramu emeeza z'efeeza. 
1Chronicles28:17 Taho ezaabu empuuhe, ey'okuheeshamu entoozo, ebeeseni, n'ebikopo. Ezaabu y'enyabya z'ezaabu, n'oburemeezi bwa buri rumwe; n'efeeza y'enyabya z'efeeza, n'oburemeezi bwa buri rumwe;" 
1Chronicles28:18 n'eky'okureeberaho ky'eitambiro ry'okwotererwaho obubaani, erikozirwe omu zaabu empuuhe, n'oburemeezi bwaryo; kandi n'eky'okureeberaho kye, eky'ekigaari ky'ezaabu, ekya baakerubi abashashanwire amapapa, gakashweka eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Nyakubaho." 
1Chronicles28:19 Daudi yaagira ati: Ebyo byona Nyakubaho akabyehandiikira n'omukono gwe. Nyowe ekyangye kikaba kiri okwetegyereza n'okukora byona ebiri omuri ekyo ky'okureeberaho. 
1Chronicles28:20 Bwanyima Daudi yaagambira omutabani Solomooni ati: Ba ow'amaani, ohame, okore ogwo murimo. Otatiina, otahahaara; ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga, Ruhanga wangye, ari hamwe naiwe. Tarikwija kukuhemukaho, nobu kwakuba okukunagiirira; okuhitsya obu omurimo gwona ogw'ebirikukorwa omuri Nyaruju ye gurihwa." 
1Chronicles28:21 Reeba, abahongyerezi, n'Abaleevi baine embu zaabo, beeteekateekire kukora emirimo yoona ey'okuheereza omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga. Kandi omuri egyo mirimo yoona, oryaba oine abantu abeekundiire, abaine obwengye bw'okukora omurimo gwa ibara muringo. Abategyeki nabo, n'abantu boona, oryaba oine obushoboorozi bw'okubakoresa kyona eki oribaragiira." 
1Chronicles29:1 Daudi Omugabe akagambira abaabaire bateeraniire aho ati: Mutabani wangye Solomooni, ou Ruhanga wenka ayetooraniire, akiri muto, takahamire; kandi omurimo ni muhango; ahabw'okuba ekyo kikaari tikirikwija kuba eky'omuntu, kureka ekya Mukama Ruhanga." 
1Chronicles29:2 Nikyo nyeheereireyo, nk'oku ndikubaasa, kutungira Nyaruju ya Ruhanga wangye eby'okugyombekyesa: Ezaabu, ahabw'ebiraakorwe omu zaabu; efeeza ahabw'eby'efeeza; emiringa, ahabw'eby'emiringa; ebyoma, ahabw'ebiraakorwe omu byoma; emiti ahabw'ebiraakorwe omu miti; otabariiremu mabaare maingi g'amakangabuye, n'ag'okuhundisa, n'ag'emyengyengye n'ag'amabara, n'agandi g'obuguzi bwingi ag'emiringo yoona n'ag'emisoomore egumire." 
1Chronicles29:3 Okwongyera ahari ebyo byona, ebi naatungiire Nyaruju egyo erikwera, nyine bingi ebi ntungire ahabwangye, eby'ezaabu n'eby'efeeza. Ahabw'okugirira Nyaruju ya Ruhanga wangye rukundo mpango, mbwenu naabigiha:" 
1Chronicles29:4 nibyo ebi: kiloguraamu z'ezaabu obukumi munaana n'enkumi ina, kandi ezaabu ya Ofiri; ez'efeeza akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi mwenda n'enkumi mukaaga, z'efeeza empuuhe, by'okushwekyesa ebisiika bya Nyaruju," 
1Chronicles29:5 n'ahabw'emirimo yoona eraakorwe abanyamyoga; ezaabu, ahabw'ebintu by'ezaabu; n'efeeza ahabw'eby'efeeza. Mbwenu omuriimwe n'oha eri izooba oraaheyo ebye ayekundiire naayehongyera Nyakubaho?" 
1Chronicles29:6 Mpaho abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, n'abeebembezi b'enganda, n'abategyeki b'engabo rukumi-rukumi na igana-igana, n'abakungu abareeberera omurimo gw'omugabe, baahayo emitoijo yaabo beekundiire." 
1Chronicles29:7 Ahabw'omurimo gwa Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, bakahayo ezaabu erikuhitsya kiloguraamu obukumi mushanju na rukumi na magana munaana na makumi mushanju na itaano; efeeza kiloguraamu obusiriira mukaaga n'obukumi mukaaga n'enkumi mushanju na magana ataano, emiringa ya kiloguraamu obusiriira mushanju, n'obukumi butaano, n'enkumi itaano, na magana ataano; n'ebyoma by'oburemeezi bwa kiloguraamu obukaikuru buna, n'obusiriira bubiri." 
1Chronicles29:8 Kandi omuntu weena owaabaire aine amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi akagahayo, baagata omu ibiikiro rya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, eryabaire nirireebererwa Yehieli Omugereshooni." 
1Chronicles29:9 Bwanyima abo bantu baashemererwa munonga, ahabw'okuhayo ebyabo beekundiire, bakabitoijera Nyakubaho baihire aha mutima. Omugabe Daudi nawe yaashemererwa munonga." 
1Chronicles29:10 Nikyo Daudi yaasingiriize Nyakubaho omu maisho g'abateeraniire aho boona, naagira ati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli tatenkuriitwe, osingizibwe ebiro byona." 
1Chronicles29:11 Ai Nyakubaho, niiwe ogira obukuru, n'obushoboorozi n'ekitiinwa, n'obusinguzi, n'obugabe; ahabw'okuba byona eby'omu iguru n'eby'omu nsi biba ebyawe. Ai Nyakubaho, niiwe oba Omugabe Rukiraboona." 
1Chronicles29:12 Obutungi n'ekitiinwa niiwe bikomookaho; ahabw'okuba niiwe otegyeka ebintu byona. Omukono gwawe gugira obushoboorozi n'amaani, kandi niiwe obaasisa abantu boona kugira obukuru n'amaani." 
1Chronicles29:13 Mbwenu, ai Ruhanga waitu, nitukusiima, kandi nitusingiza eiziina ryawe ery'ekitiinwa." 
1Chronicles29:14 Mbwenu nkaanye niinye oha, n'aba bantu bangye nibo baahi, kubaasa kutoija tutyo twekundiire? Manya byona niiwe birugaho. N'ebi twakuha, twakora aha byawe." 
1Chronicles29:15 Ahabw'okuba itwe omu maisho gaawe tituri ba kunu, turi abashuuhuuki; nk'oku baatatenkuriitwe boona baabaire bari. Ebiro bi tumara omu nsi ni nk'ekicuucu, tihariho matsiko g'okumereera." 
1Chronicles29:16 Ai Mukama Ruhanga waitu, ebi bintu bingi ebi twareeta kukwombekyera Nyaruju y'okwetererwa eiziina ryawe eririkwera, nibiruga omu ngaro zaawe, kandi byona n'ebyawe ahabwawe." 
1Chronicles29:17 Ai Ruhanga wangye, nimmanya ku oreeba ebiri omunda y'omuntu, kandi ku oshemerererwa amazima. Mbwenu nyowe omu mazima g'omutima gwangye, naakutoijera ebi bintu byona nyekundiire. N'ekindi, hati naareeba abantu bangye abari aha nibakutoijera batagyemirwe, haza bashemereirwe." 
1Chronicles29:18 Ai Mukama, Ruhanga wa baatatenkuriitwe, Aburahamu, Isaaka na Isiraeli, gumya ebiro byona rukundo n'ebiteekateeko nk'ebyo omu mitima y'abantu baawe; emitima yaabo ogihuguurire ahariiwe." 
1Chronicles29:19 Ha mutabani wangye Solomooni okuguma n'omutima gwe gwona naakuratira ebiragiro byawe ebi waahamize n'ebi waataireho, naabihitsya byona; haza abone kwombeka Nyaruju ei ntungiire eby'okugyombeka." 
1Chronicles29:20 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Daudi yaagambira abateeraniire aho boona ati: Nimusiime Mukama Ruhanga waanyu. Mpaho boona abaabaire bateeraniire aho baasiima Mukama Ruhanga wa baishebo, bainika emitwe, baaramya Nyakubaho; kandi baaha omugabe ekitiinwa nibamutangirira." 
1Chronicles29:21 Reero baatambira Nyakubaho ebitambo. Aha izooba ryakuratsireho baamutambira ebitambo bicwekize, enimi rukumi, empaya z'entaama rukumi, n'abaana b'entaama rukumi, bataireho emitoijo y'ebyokunywa n'ebindi bitambo bingi munonga ahabwa Isiraeli yoona." 
1Chronicles29:22 Ahari eryo izooba baariira kandi baanywera omu maisho ga Nyakubaho bashemereirwe munonga. Ebyo ku bwahwaire baayemeka Solomooni mutabani wa Daudi omugabe obwa kabiri. Baamusiiga amajuta kubategyeka omu iziina rya Nyakubaho; na Zadoki baagamusiiga kuba omuhongyerezi. 
1Chronicles29:23 Bwanyima Solomooni yaasingama aha kitebe ky'obugabe bwa Nyakubaho, yaaba omugabe omu mwanya gwa Daudi ishe; yaagogyeera, n'Abaisiraeli boona baamworobera." 
1Chronicles29:24 Abakuru boona n'amamanzi, na batabani ba Daudi boona, baahiga kuhamira ahari ogwo mugabe Solomooni." 
1Chronicles29:25 Na Nyakubaho yaarangaanisa Solomooni omu Baisiraeli boona, kandi yaamuha ekitiinwa kingi ky'obugabe ekitakagirwaga mugabe weena omu baamubandiize omuri Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles29:26 Daudi mwene Yese nikwo yaabaire atyo omugabe, akategyeka Isiraeli yoona." 
1Chronicles29:27 Akamara emyaka makumi ana ari omugabe wa Isiraeli; emyaka mushanju yaagitegyekyera omuri Heburooni, na makumi ashatu n'eshatu omuri Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles29:28 Bwanyima yaafa, yaahikire omu ngingo za bukuru, ahangaire, atungire, kandi aine ekitiinwa. Reero Solomooni omutabani yaaza aha ngoma omu mwanya gwe." 
1Chronicles29:29 Mbwenu ebi Omugabe Daudi yaakozire, okwiha aha by'okubanza okuhitsya aha by'aha muheru, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe eby'omu biro bya Samueli omuhanuuzi na Natani omurangi na Gaadi omuhanuuzi;" 
1Chronicles29:30 hamwe n'eby'obutegyeki bwe byona, n'eby'amaani ge, n'ebyamubaireho, n'ebyabaire ahari Isiraeli, n'ebyabaire aha bugabe obundi bwona obw'amahanga gamwehinguririize." 
2Chronicles1:1 Solomooni mwene Daudi akahama aha bugabe, Mukama Ruhanga yaaguma nawe, kandi yaamuhindura omuntu mukuru munonga." 
2Chronicles1:2 Solomooni ogwo akagamba n'Abaisiraeli boona n'abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi, na igana-igana, n'abaramuzi, n'abeebembezi b'Abaisiraeli boona, bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo." 
2Chronicles1:3 Mpaho Solomooni hamwe n'abateeraniire aho boona baaza omu mwanya gw'akatungutungu oguri Gibeoni; ahabw'okuba okwo niyo haabaire hari eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu na Ruhanga eri Musa omugaragwa wa Nyakubaho yaakoreire omu ihamba. 
2Chronicles1:4 Kwonka Daudi akaba aihire Kiriyatiyearimu eshanduukye ya Ruhanga, agireetsire omu mwanya gu yaagitebeekanisiize, ahabw'okuba akaba agiteereire eihema omuri Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles1:5 Kandi n'eitambiro ry'omuringa eri Bezaleeli mwene Uuri mwijukuru wa Huuri yaakozire, niyo ryabaire riri, omu maisho g'Obutaaho bwa Nyakubaho. Solomooni n'abateeraniire aho baaramizayo Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles1:6 Reero okwo Solomooni yaaza omu maisho ga Nyakubaho aha itambiro ry'omuringa eryabaire riri aha ihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, yaaritambiraho ebitambo rukumi ebicwekize." 
2Chronicles1:7 Ekyo kiro Ruhanga yaabonekyera Solomooni yaamugira ati: Gira eki wanshaba, haza nkikuhe." 
2Chronicles1:8 Solomooni yaagira Ruhanga ati: Okagirira Daudi tata rukundo mpango kandi etahararuka, haza wampindura omugabe, naaza omu mwanya gwe." 
2Chronicles1:9 Ai Mukama Ruhanga, ninkweshengyereza, ohikiirize eki waaraganiise Daudi tata; ahabw'okuba ompindwire omugabe w'abantu baingi abarikwingana omucuucu gw'aha nsi." 
2Chronicles1:10 N'ahabw'ekyo ninkushaba ompe obwengye n'okwetegyereza, ninza aheeru kandi ningaruka omuka, nyebembeire aba bantu. Mbwenu n'oha owaakubaasa kutegyeka aba bantu baawe baingi bati?" 
2Chronicles1:11 Ruhanga yaagarukamu Solomooni ati: Ahabw'ekyo okushangwa kikuri aha mutima, nikyo otanshabira bintu nari eitungo, ekitiinwa, nari ngu abazigu baawe bafe; kandi nangwa tiwaashaba kuhangaara, kureka wayeshabira obwengye n'okwetegyereza, ngu obone kutegyeka abantu bangye abu nkuhindwire omugabe waabo." 
2Chronicles1:12 Mbwenu obwengye n'okwetegyereza naabikuha. Kandi niinyija kukuha eby'obutungi n'eby'amatungo n'ekitiinwa ebitakatungwaga mugabe n'omwe omu baakubandiize, kandi ebitaritungwa n'omwe omu barikukurata." 
2Chronicles1:13 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Solomooni yaaruga omu mwanya gw'akatungutungu ka Gibeoni, omu maisho g'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu, yaaza Yerusalemu yaategyeka Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles1:14 Solomooni akataho eihe ry'ab'ebigaari n'ab'ahambaraasi. Akaba aine ebigaari rukumi na magana ana, n'ab'ahambaarasi akakumi kamwe n'enkumi ibiri, abu yaataire omu ndembo ezirimu ebigaari, n'omuri Yerusalemu, omu ogwo mugabe yaabaire ari." 
2Chronicles1:15 Omu busingye bwa Solomooni efeeza n'ezaabu bikakanya omuri Yerusalemu, byashangwa hoona nk'amabaare; kandi emiti ya kaarwenda yaaba mingi munonga nk'emikunyu y'omu ruhita Shefeela." 
2Chronicles1:16 Embaraasi zi Solomooni yaabaire atungire bakaba baziiha Misiri na Kilikiya, abashuubuzi b'omugabe bazigura Kilikiya, nk'obuguzi bwazo oku buri." 
2Chronicles1:17 Kandi baiha Misiri ebigaari, buri kimwe bakiguzire rupiiha magana mukaaga z'efeeza, embaraasi bagigura rupiiha igana na makumi ataano. Haza abo bashuubuzi nikwo baabaire bazireeta, bakaziguza abagabe b'Abahiiti n'ab'Abasiriya." 
2Chronicles2:1 Omu biro ebyo Solomooni akamariirira kwombeka Nyaruju erikwetererwa Nyakubaho, n'okweyombekyera ekikaari ky'obugabe." 
2Chronicles2:2 Atyo yaataho abashaija obukumi mushanju b'okwekorera ebirikuremeera, n'obukumi munaana b'okuhigura amabaare omu bibungo; kandi n'abantu enkumi ishatu na magana mukaaga b'okubareeberera." 
2Chronicles2:3 Bwanyima yaatuma ahari Huraamu omugabe wa Tuuro ati: Nk'oku waagiriire Daudi tata, okamutwekyera zaakaarwenda kweyombekyera enju y'okutaahamu, naanye obe nikwo wangirira." 
2Chronicles2:4 Reeba, ndi haihi kwombekyera Mukama Ruhanga wangye Nyaruju y'okumwetererwa, n'okugimuhongyera ekaba ey'okwotererwamu obubaani omu maisho ge oburikutaamirana omugaju, n'okuguma nitumutoijereramu emigaati y'okumurikwa; n'okumutambira ebitambo bicwekize, omu kasheeshe n'omu mwabazyo, ahari Zaasabato, n'ahari buri kuboneka kw'okwezi, n'aha biro by'amagyenyi ga Mukama Ruhanga waitu ebyatairweho, nk'oku byaragiirwe Abaisiraeli, kuguma nibakora omugyenzo gwabyo ebiro byona." 
2Chronicles2:5 Nyaruju ei ndaayombekye neija kuba ey'ekitiinwa, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga waitu naakiza baaruhanga boona ekitiinwa." 
2Chronicles2:6 Kwonka mbwenu n'oha owaakubaasa kumwombekyera enju, ku araabe ashaaga omu iguru ryona ahu rigarukira. Nari niinye oha orikumwombekyera enju, kureka ah'okumwoterera obubaani." 
2Chronicles2:7 Mbwenu nu, ntwekyera omuntu orikumanya munonga kukora eby'ezaabu, eby'efeeza, eby'omuringa, eby'ebyoma, ebya bujwa ebya karari n'ebya bururu; kandi otendekirwe gye kusharura amabaare; agume n'abanyamyoga abu Daudi tata yaataireho omuri Yuda n'omuri Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles2:8 Kandi nyoherereza embaaho za kaarwenda, n'ez'emiryohe, n'ez'emiziko eza Lebanooni; ahabw'okuba nimmanya ku abairu abangye nibaija kuba bari hamwe n'abaawe," 
2Chronicles2:9 kungirira embaaho nyingi munonga. Manya enju ei ndikwija kwombeka neija kuba ey'ekitiinwa kandi erikutangaaza. 
2Chronicles2:10 Niinyija kutungira abairu baawe abarikutema emiti encuro obukumi bubiri bw'engano y'omujuma, n'ezindi ncuro obukumi bubiri z'oburo bw'enaku; enteerero obukumi bubiri za viino, n'enteerero obukumi bubiri z'amajuta g'emioliva." 
2Chronicles2:11 Mpaho Huraamu omugabe wa Tuuro yaahandiikira Solomooni ebaruha y'okumugarukamu naamugira ati: Nyakubaho naakunda abantu be; nikyo akuhinduriire omugabe waabo. 
2Chronicles2:12 Kandi agira ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ahimbisibwe. Mukama owaahangire eiguru n'ensi, akaha Omugabe Daudi omwana w'obwengye, oine okumanya bukuru, n'okwetegyereza kwingi, kandi orikwija kwombekyera Mukama Nyaruju, akeeyombekyera n'ekikaari ky'obugabe." 
2Chronicles2:13 Mbwenu naakwoherereza omushaija oine obwengye bwingi n'okwetegyereza. Niwe Huraami-abi," 
2Chronicles2:14 mutabani w'omukazi w'omu Baadaani; kandi ishe n'Omunyatuuro. Akatendekwa kuheesha ebintu omu zaabu, omu feeza, omu miringa, n'omu byoma n'okubikora omu mabaare n'omu biti kandi n'okukora emyenda ya bujwa, n'eya bururu, n'eya karari, na kitaani enungi; ataireho n'okusharura eby'emiringo yoona n'okukora ekintu kyona naareebera aha rugyero ru bamuhaire. Agume naakora n'abanyamyoga baawe, aba Daudi sho mukama wangye." 
2Chronicles2:15 Mbwenu eby'engano na baare n'amajuta na viino, ebi iwe Nyakusinga ogambire, bitwekyere abairu baawe;" 
2Chronicles2:16 tubone kutema Lebanooni emiti yoona ei orikwenda; tugikomerane nk'ebibaya nitugirabya ogw'enyanja, ehikye Yopa. Naiwe obone kugitwara Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles2:17 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Solomooni yaabara abanyamahanga boona abatwire omuri Isiraeli, nk'oku Daudi ishe yaabaire ababazire, baaba akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi butaano n'enkumi ishatu na magana mukaaga." 
2Chronicles2:18 Omuribo yaihamu abantu obukumi mushanju kuba abeekorezi, obukumi munaana kuba ab'okuhigura amabaare omu bibungo, kandi enkumi ishatu na magana mukaaga kuba ab'okubareeberera nibakora." 
2Chronicles3:1 Bwanyima Solomooni akatandika kwombeka Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho omuri Yerusalemu aha Rushozi Moriya, oru Nyakubaho yaabonekyeireho Daudi ishe. Yaayombeka omu mwanya gu Daudi yaabaire atooraine, omu mbuga ya Orunani Omuyebusi." 
2Chronicles3:2 Akatandika kugyombeka omu kwezi kwa kabiri okw'omu mwaka gwe gwa kana ari aha ngoma," 
2Chronicles3:3 Mbwenu ebi nibyo bigyero bya Nyaruju ya Ruhanga ebi Solomooni yaareebeireho kugyombeka. Oburaingwa bwayo, omu kigyero ekya ira, bukaba buri mikono makumi mukaaga kandi obukiika eri mikono makumi abiri;" 
2Chronicles3:4 ekisasi ky'omu maisho g'egyo nju kiri ekya mikono makumi abiri oburaingwa, nikingana n'obukiika bwayo, kandi obwemi bwakyo buri mikono igana na makumi abiri. Omu nda yaakyo yoona kishwekirwe ezaabu empuuhe." 
2Chronicles3:5 Ebisiika by'ekishengye kya Nyaruju eky'ahagati akabikiikiza embaaho za kaarwenda, yaazisiiga ezaabu nungi, yaazisharuraho ebishushani by'emikindo n'eby'enjegyere." 
2Chronicles3:6 Egyo nju yaagihundisa amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi, n'ezaabu eyaihirwe omu nsi y'Abaparaavi." 
2Chronicles3:7 Atyo yaashweka Nyaruju ezaabu: emitambiko yaayo, ebibuga byayo, ebisiika byayo, n'enyigi zaayo, kandi ebisiika yaabisharuraho ebishushani bya baakerubi." 
2Chronicles3:8 Reero yaayombeka omwanya ogurikwerera kimwe, oburaingwa bwagwo bwaingana n'obukiika bwa Nyaruju, mikono makumi abiri, n'obukiika bwagwo mikono makumi abiri. Atyo yaagushweka ezaabu y'obureemezi bwa kiloguraamu obukumi bubiri n'enkumi munaana." 
2Chronicles3:9 Oburemeezi bw'emishumaari y'ezaabu bukaba nibuhitsya kimwe kya kabiri kya kiloguraamu, buri gumwe. Kandi ebishengye by'omuri kaanyinaabiri yaabihumbika ezaabu." 
2Chronicles3:10 Ogwo mwanya gurikwerera kimwe akagutamu baakerubi babiri babaizirwe; yaabasiiga ezaabu. 
2Chronicles3:11 Amapapa ga baakerubi abo bombi, goona hamwe gashashaanukire, gakaba nigahitsya mikono makumi abiri: eipapa ry'omwe erya mikono etaano, nirikora aha kisiika kya Nyaruju, kandi erindi naryo rya mikono etaano nirikora aha ipapa rya kerubi mugyenzi we." 
2Chronicles3:12 Reero kerubi ondi eipapa rye rya mikono etaano nirikora aha kisiika kya Nyaruju, kandi erindi naryo rya mikono etaano rikwataine n'erya kerubi ow'okubanza." 
2Chronicles3:13 Amapapa ga baakerubi bombi agashashaanukire gakaba nigahitsya mikono makumi abiri. Baakerubi abo beemereire nibareeba omwanya gwa Nyaruju ogwagati. 
2Chronicles3:14 Kandi yaakora omukingo gw'emyenda ya bururu, bujwa, karari na kitaani enungi, yaagutarizamu ebishushani bya baakerubi." 
2Chronicles3:15 Omu maisho ga Nyaruju akakoraho enyomyo ibiri z'oburaingwa bwa mikono makumi ashatu n'etaano, yaata eitungu aha mutwe gwa buri emwe." 
2Chronicles3:16 Yaakora enjegyere zirikushusha enkwanzi z'omu maraka, yaazita aha mutwe gw'ezo nyomyo, kandi yaaheesha ebijuma igana birikushusha eby'amakomamahanga, yaabikomerana ahari ezo njegyere." 
2Chronicles3:17 Atyo yaayemereza enyomyo omu maisho ga Nyaruju, emwe aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, n'endi aha bwa bumosho. Ey'aha mukono gwa buryo yaagyeeta Yakini, n'ey'aha gwa bumosho yaagyeeta Boazi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Solomooni akakoresa eitambiro ry'omuringa, ry'oburaingwa bwa mikono makumi abiri, n'obukiizi bwa mikono makumi abiri, n'obwemi bwa mikono ikumi." 
2Chronicles4:2 Bwanyima yaaheesesa ekitanka kyekuringiriire kya mikono ikumi okukicwekanisa, okwiha aha mugoma okuta aha gundi; kandi ky'obwemi bwa mikono etaano; omwezigooro gwakyo guri mikono makumi ashatu." 
2Chronicles4:3 Ahansi yaakyo yaakiikizaho ebyemi nk'ebisisi birkuhitsya omwezigooro gwa mikono makumi ashatu. Ebisisi ebyo bikaba biri omu mishorongo ebiri, biheesheraniirwe ahari ekyo kitanka." 
2Chronicles4:4 Kandi ekyo kitanka, kiteekirwe aha nimi ikumi na ibiri z'omuringa, ishatu nizireeba aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, ishatu aha burengyerwa-izooba, ishatu aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, na ishatu aha burugwa-izooba. Ekitanka kiziteekirweho, kandi ziteeraine ebibunu." 
2Chronicles4:5 Omuzimbwe gwakyo gukaba niguhitsya ekita kimwe; omugoma gwakyo gukozirwe nk'ogw'ekikopo, nari ogw'ekirabyo ky'omwangangye, nikiijuzibwa enteerero enkumi ishatu." 
2Chronicles4:6 Akakora n'ebinaabiro ikumi by'okunaabiramu. Bitaano yaabita aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, na bitaano aha rwa bumosho. Obwo biri eby'okumunyungurizamu ebintu byakoresibwa aha bitambo bicwekize, kandi ekitanka kiri eky'okunaabirwamu abahongyerezi." 
2Chronicles4:7 Akaheesha ebikondo ikumi by'amatabaaza eby'ezaabu, nk'oku eky'okureeberaho kyabyo kyabaire kiri, yaabita omuri Nyaruju: bitaano aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, na bitaano aha rwa bumosho." 
2Chronicles4:8 Kandi yaakora emeeza ikumi, yaazita omuri Nyaruju: itaano aha rubaju, rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, na itaano aha rwa bumosho. Yaataho n'okukora ebeeseni igana z'ezaabu." 
2Chronicles4:9 Yaakora ekibuga ky'abahongyerezi, na Nyaruju; n'enyigi zaakyo yaazihumbika omuringa." 
2Chronicles4:10 Reero ekitanka yaakita omu keehogo k'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo obw'aha burugwa-izooba bwa Nyaruju. 
2Chronicles4:11 Huraamu kandi akakora enyungu, n'eby'okuyooza eiju, n'ebeeseni. Atyo yaaheza omurimo gu yaakoreire Omugabe Solomooni ahari Nyaruju ya Ruhanga. Nigwo ogu:" 
2Chronicles4:12 enyomyo abiri, enyabya, amatungu abiri g'aha mitwe y'enyomyo, n'obutimba bw'okushweka enyabya z'aha matungu gaazo." 
2Chronicles4:13 Ebishushani magana ana by'ebijuma by'amakomamahanga by'okuhunda aha butimba bwombi. Buri ikomamahanga riteekateekirwe kushweka aha mitwe y'enyomyo. 
2Chronicles4:14 Kandi yaakora ebikondo, n'ebinaabiro ebibiriho." 
2Chronicles4:15 Yaataho ekitanka kimwe n'enimi ikumi na ibiri ezikishitamiho. 
2Chronicles4:16 Enyungu, eby'okuyooza eiju, n'eby'okwihuza enyama, n'ebindi byona, Hiraamu akabikorera omugabe omu muringa gukuubire, kukoresibwa omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles4:17 Omugabe akabiyagiza omu ruhita rwa Yorudaani, omu nsi y'eibumba, ey'ahagati ya Sukooti na Zeereda." 
2Chronicles4:18 Ebyo bintu Solomooni yaabiheesesa bingi munonga, oburemeezi bw'omuringa gwabyo gwarema kumanywa." 
2Chronicles4:19 Solomooni nikwo yaaheeseise atyo ebintu byona eby'omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga. Eitambiro ry'ezaabu, emeeza y'okumurikiraho emigaati;" 
2Chronicles4:20 ebikondo by'amatabaaza, n'amatabaaza gaabyo g'ezaabu empuuhe, ag'okwakira omu maisho g'omwanya gw'endugu ogurikwera, nk'oku eky'okureeberaho kyago kyabaire kiri." 
2Chronicles4:21 Yaataho ebirabyo, amatabaaza n'entoozo, eby'ezaabu empuuhe buzima." 
2Chronicles4:22 Taho eby'okukongyeresa omuriro n'okuguraaza, n'ebeeseni, n'enyabya z'okwotereraho obubaani, n'eby'okuguhisa omuriro, eby'ezaabu empuuhe; hamwe n'epata z'enyigi za Nyaruju ez'endugu, ogurikuza omu mwanya ogurikwerera kimwe, n'ez'enyigi z'omwanya gwagati ogwa Nyaruju, biri eby'ezaabu." 
2Chronicles5:1 Okwo nikwo omurimo gwona ogu Solomooni yaakozire ahari Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho gwahwaire. Bwanyima Solomooni akataasya omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga ebintu ebi Daudi ishe yaabaire ahongire; yaata omu mabiikiro efeeza n'ezaabu n'ebintu byona. 
2Chronicles5:2 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Solomooni yaateeranira Yerusalemu abakuru b'enganda, n'abeebembezi b'emiryango ya baishenkuru b'Abaisiraeli, kwiha eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Mukama omu rurembo rwa Daudi orwa Siyooni." 
2Chronicles5:3 Abaisiraeli boona baateeranira omu maisho g'omugabe aha bugyenyi bw'omu kwezi kwa mushanju. 
2Chronicles5:4 Abakuru b'omuri Isiraeli boona ku baizire, baakiriza eshanduukye." 
2Chronicles5:5 Baagiheeka hamwe n'eihema ry'okubugabuganiramu; n'ebintu byona ebirikwera ebyabaire biririmu abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi baabitwara. 
2Chronicles5:6 Omugabe Solomooni n'Abaisiraeli boona abaabaire bariho baateeranira omu maisho g'eshanduukye y'endagaano, baatamba entaama nyingi munonga, n'ente, ebitarikubaasa kubarwa." 
2Chronicles5:7 Batyo abahongyerezi baareeta eshanduukye y'endagaano ya Mukama omu mwanya gwayo ogurikwerera kimwe, omunda y'amapapa ga baakerubi." 
2Chronicles5:8 Ahabw'okuba baakerubi bakaba bashashaanuriire amapapa gaabo ahaiguru y'omwanya gw'eshanduukye, basangiire egyo shanduukye n'emigamba yaayo." 
2Chronicles5:9 Egyo migamba ekaba eri miraingwa munonga, emitwe yaayo neereeberwa omu mwanya ogurikwera, omu maisho g'omwanya gw'endugu, kwonka etarikureeberwa heeru; kandi na hati ekiriyo." 
2Chronicles5:10 Omu shanduukye hakaba hatarimu kindi kintu, kureka ebishate bibiri by'amabaare ebi Musa yaatairemu bari Horebu, ahu Nyakubaho yaaraganiire n'Abaisiraeli endagaano nibaruga Misiri." 
2Chronicles5:11 Abahongyerezi ku baarugire omu mwanya ogurikwera; (ahabw'okuba abahongyerezi boona abaabaire bariho bakaba beeyerize batarikweta ha mbu zaabo. 
2Chronicles5:12 Abeeshongozi Abaleevi boona Asafu, Hemani na Yedutuuni, na batabani baabo, na beene waabo, bajwaire kitaani nungi munonga, bakwaitse enshandaazo n'amagobore n'ebidongo, baayemerera aha rubaju rw'aha burugwa-izooba bw'eitambiro, baine abahongyerezi igana na makumi abiri, abateezi b'amakondere." 
2Chronicles5:13 Reero gukaba guri omurimo gw'abakondere n'abeeshongozi kuhurirwa nibaimukiza hamwe iraka rimwe nibahimbisa kandi nibasiima Nyakubaho). Mbwenu ku baareegire ekyeshongoro, nibateera amakondere n'eshandaazo n'ebindi ebirikujumeeza amaraka, kuhimbisa Nyakubaho bati: Ahabw'okuba ni murungi kandi rukundo ye etahararuka egumaho ebiro byona; egyo nju Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho yaijura ekicu." 
2Chronicles5:14 Ahabw'ekyo kicu abahongyerezi tibaabaasa kugumizamu kukora omurimo gwabo gw'obuheereza, ahabw'okuba ekitiinwa kya Nyakubaho kikaijura Nyaruju ya Ruhanga." 
2Chronicles6:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Solomooni yaagira ati: Ai Nyakubaho, okasiima kutuura omu kicu kitimbire omwirima." 
2Chronicles6:2 Kwonka nyowe nkwombekyeire Nyaruju y'ekitiinwa kuba omwanya gwawe gw'okutuuramu ebiro byona. 
2Chronicles6:3 Omugabe ku yaaherize kugamba ebyo, yaahindukira oku n'oku naashabira omugisha Abaisiraeli abateeraniire aho beemereire." 
2Chronicles6:4 Yaagira ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ahimbisibwe; ahabw'okuba omukono gwe guhikiriize eki yaaraganiise Daudi tata, naamugira ati:" 
2Chronicles6:5 Naaba kwiha abantu bangye omuri Misiri, tinkatooranaga rurembo mu nganda za Isiraeli zoona orw'okwombekamu Nyaruju y'okundamizamu. Kandi tinkatooranaga muntu w'okutegyeka abantu bangye Abaisiraeli." 
2Chronicles6:6 Kwonka mbwenu naatoorana Yerusalemu kuba omwanya gw'okundamizamu; kandi naatoorana Daudi kutegyeka abantu bangye Abaisiraeli. 
2Chronicles6:7 Manya Daudi tata kikaba kimuri aha mutima kwombekyera Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli Nyaruju y'okumuramizamu 
2Chronicles6:8 Kwonka Nyakubaho yaamugira ati: Nobu kyabaire kikutuura aha mutima kuunyombekyera Nyaruju y'okundamizamu. Eego, kikaba kiri kirungi kwenda kukikora." 
2Chronicles6:9 Kwonka tiiwe oryombeka egyo nju; kureka mutabani waawe ou orizaara, niwe aryombeka enju y'okundamizamu." 
2Chronicles6:10 Hati Nyakubaho yaahikiiriza eki yaaraganiise, ahabw'okuba nyowe naaza omu bigyere bya tata Daudi, naashutama aha kitebe ky'obugabe bwa Isiraeli, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaraganiise, kandi nyombekyeire Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli Nyaruju y'okumuramizamu." 
2Chronicles6:11 Mbwenu naagitamu eshanduukye erimu endagaano, ei Nyakubaho yaaragaine n'abantu ba Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles6:12 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Solomooni yaayemerera omu maisho g'eitambiro rya Nyakubaho, Abaisiraeli boona bateeraniire aho, yaagorora emikono ye." 
2Chronicles6:13 Haza Solomooni ogwo akaba akozire orutuutsi rw'omuringa rwa mikono etaano oburaingwa, mikono etaano obukiika, na mikono eshatu obwemi, arutaire omu kikaari kye. Mpaho yaarwemereraho. Reero yaatsimba amaju, Abaisiraeli boona bateeraniire aho, yaagorora emikono, agyorekyeize omu iguru." 
2Chronicles6:14 Yaashaba ati: Ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, omu nsi n'omu iguru tihariho Ruhanga ori nkaiwe. Ahabw'okuba iwe orinda endagaano, kandi ogirira rukundo etahararuka abairu baawe abakworobera n'omutima gwabo gwona." 
2Chronicles6:15 Iwe owaarinzire eki waaraganiise omwiru waawe Daudi tata. Eego, okakyegambira n'akanwa kaawe, mbwenu eri izooba waakihikiiriza n'omukono gwawe." 
2Chronicles6:16 N'ahabw'ekyo, ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, gumya eki waaraganiise omwiru waawe Daudi tata, noomugira oti: Toribura muntu ou ntaireho kusingama aha kitebe ky'obugabe bwa Isiraeli; batabani baawe baaba bataireho omutima kugira emitwarize mirungi, bakakuratira eby'omu biragiro byangye, nk'oku iwe obaire nootwaza." 
2Chronicles6:17 Mbwenu nu, ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, hikiiriza eki waaraganiise omwiru waawe Daudi." 
2Chronicles6:18 Kwonka buzima, Ruhanga aryatuura n'abantu omu nsi? Reeba, eiguru n'okwo omu iguru owa herebe, nooshaagayo! Kaashwa egi nju ei nyombekire!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Kwonka, ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, hurira okushaba kwangye n'okweshengyereza kwangye, nyowe omwiru waawe. Tega okutu ebi ndikukutakira n'ebi ndikukushaba;" 
2Chronicles6:20 obone kuguma ohangire Nyaruju egi amaisho, nyomushana na nyekiro ogu mwanya gu waaraganiise kuguma nibakuramizamu. Otegye okutu ebi nyowe omwiru waawe ndaagume ninkushaba nyorekyeire ogu mwanya." 
2Chronicles6:21 Kandi ogume otegye okutu ebi nyowe omwiru waawe ndikukweshengyereza; n'ebi abantu baawe barikukweshengyereza, baaba nibakushaba boorekyeire ogu mwanya. Buzimazima, guma ohurire nooyema omu iguru, ei otuura. Haza ku oraahurire, osaasire." 
2Chronicles6:22 Omuntu ku arishaagiza mutaahi we, baamurahiza, yaija yaarahirira omu maisho g'eitambiro ryawe omuri egi nju;" 
2Chronicles6:23 ohurire nooyema omu iguru, ogire eki waakora, ocwere abairu baawe orubanja, ofubire okozire kubi noomutura ekibi kye, kandi ori mwere omwiheho orubanja, omuzimuurire, nk'okutagira rubanja kwe oku kuri." 
2Chronicles6:24 Abantu baawe Abaisiraeli ku barisingurwa abazigu ahabw'okukucumuraho; kwonka bwanyima baakukubuukira, baayatura eiziina ryawe, baakushaba kandi baakweshengyerereza omuri egi nju," 
2Chronicles6:25 ohurire nooyema omu iguru; osaasire abantu baawe Abaisiraeli ekibi kyabo, obagarure omu nsi ei waabahaire na baishebo." 
2Chronicles6:26 Ku orizibira enjura kugwa ahabw'abo bantu kukucumuraho, kwonka bwanyima baashaba boorekyeire ogu mwanya, baayatura eiziina ryawe, baayeteisa ebibi byabo obabonaboneise," 
2Chronicles6:27 ohurire nooyema omu iguru, osaasire abairu baawe Abaisiraeli ekibi kyabo, noobahabura emitwarize mirungi ei bashemereire kukuratira; kandi egi nsi yaawe ei waahaire abantu baawe kuba eyaabo y'obutaka, ogigwisize enjura." 
2Chronicles6:28 Ensi ku eriteerwa enjara nari orufu, nainga ebihingirwe byatuta byasya-nyamwenga, nainga byariibwa enzigye nari kanyaananga, nainga abazigu baabo baabagotera omuri ibara rurembo rwabo, nari haabaho kahumpuri, nari endiijo ndwara yoona," 
2Chronicles6:29 omuntu weena, nari abantu baawe boona Abaisiraeli, okubarikushaba kwona, n'oku barikweshengyereza kwona, buri omwe naamanya enaku ze n'obusaasi bwe, yaagorora emikono ye agyorekyeize egi nju," 
2Chronicles6:30 ohurire nooyema omu iguru ei otuura; osaasire. Kandi buri omwe omugirire nk'oku emitwarize ye eri. Ahabw'okuba niiwe wenka omanya emitima y'abantu. 
2Chronicles6:31 Haza babone kukutiina n'okukuratira emitwarize yaawe ebiro byona ebi barimara batwire omuri egi nsi ei waahaire baatatenkuriitwe. 
2Chronicles6:32 Nikyo kimwe, omunyamahanga otari w'omu bantu baawe Abaisiraeli, ku ariija naaruga eihanga, ahabw'okuhurira ku ori mukuru kandi Ow'obushoboorozi, otuura abangire omukono, yaashaba ayorekyeire egi nju," 
2Chronicles6:33 ohurire nooyema omu iguru ei otuura, omukorere byona ebi arikukushaba. Abantu boona ab'omu nsi babone kukumanya, kandi bakutiine, nk'oku abantu baawe Abaisiraeli batwaza. Haza bamanye ku Nyaruju egi ei nkwombekyeire eri ey'okukuramizamu." 
2Chronicles6:34 Abantu baawe ku barihurura kurwanisa abazigu baabo, baaraba omu muhanda gwona ogu oribatooza, baakushaba boorekyeire oru rurembo oru waatooraine, n'egi nju ei nkwombekyeire kukuramizamu," 
2Chronicles6:35 ohurire okushaba kwabo n'okweshengyereza kwabo, nooyema omu iguru, obahe eki barikufa." 
2Chronicles6:36 Ku barikucumuraho, nk'oku omuntu weena atabura kukora kibi, waabagwerwa kubi, waabarekurira abazigu, baabatwara omu nsi ya hare nari y'ahaihi bari enkwatwa," 
2Chronicles6:37 kwonka baakigumya aha mutima omuri egyo nsi ei batwairwemu bari enkwatwa, baayeteisa kandi baakweshengyerereza omuri egyo nsi ei barimu bari enkwatwa, nibagira bati: Tukacumura, twakora ebitahikire kandi eby'obugomi." 
2Chronicles6:38 Ku baryeteisa omu mazima baihire aha mutima, bazaahiire omu nsi ei baatwairwemu bari enkwatwa, baashaba boorekyeire ensi yaabo ei waahaire baishebo boorekyeire n'oru rurembo ru waatooraine, na Nyaruju ei nkwombekyeire kukuramizamu," 
2Chronicles6:39 ohurire okushaba kwabo n'okweshengyereza kwabo nooyema omu iguru ei otuura. Haza abo bantu baawe abaakucumwireho obagirire embabazi, kandi obasaasire." 
2Chronicles6:40 Ai Ruhanga wangye, hanga amaisho, kandi otegye okutu okushaba kwona okuraagume nikushabirwa omuri ogu mwanya." 
2Chronicles6:41 Mbwenu, ai Mukama Ruhanga, imuka, oze omu mwanya gwawe ogw'otuuramu, Iwe n'eshanduukye eba akamanyiso k'amaani gaawe. Ai Mukama Ruhanga, guma ojunire abahongyerezi baawe; n'abarikwera baawe, bashemerererwe oburungi bwawe." 
2Chronicles6:42 Ai Mukama Ruhanga, otabinga owaawe ou waasiigire amajuta. Oijukye rukundo yaawe etahararuka ei waagiriire Daudi omwiru waawe." 
2Chronicles7:1 Solomooni ku yaaherize kushaba, omuriro gwashuuma niguruga omu iguru gwayokyeza kimwe ebitambo bicwekize n'ebindi bitambo; ekitiinwa kya Nyakubaho kyaijura Nyaruju." 
2Chronicles7:2 Abahongyerezi tibaabaasa kutaaha omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba ekitiinisa kya Nyakubaho kikagiijura." 
2Chronicles7:3 Abaisiraeli boona ku baareebire omuriro nigushuuma, n'ekitiinisa kya Nyakubaho kiri aha mutwe gwa Nyaruju, baajumara aha nsi aha mwariro, baaramya Nyakubaho, kandi baamusingiza bati: Ahabw'okuba ni murungi kandi rukundo ye etahararuka egumaho ebiro byona." 
2Chronicles7:4 Bwanyima omugabe n'abantu boona baatambira Nyakubaho ebitambo. 
2Chronicles7:5 Omugabe Solomooni yaatamba ekitambo ky'ente obukumi bubiri n'enkumi ibiri; n'entaama akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi bubiri. Omugabe n'abantu boona baahonga batyo Nyaruju ya Ruhanga. 
2Chronicles7:6 Abahongyerezi baayemerera omu myanya yaabo, n'Abaleevi nabo baayemerera nibasingiza Nyakubaho, nibateera ebirikujumeeza amaraka ebi Omugabe Daudi yaakozire kusiimisa Nyakubaho, nibeeshongora bati: Ahabw'okuba rukundo ye etahararuka egumaho ebiro byona. Manya Daudi ku yaabaire aba naasingiza Nyakubaho, Abaleevi nibamukwatsa, abahongyerezi abashungaine nabo bateera amakondere, Abaisiraeli boona beemereire." 
2Chronicles7:7 Reero Solomooni yaahaasirira ekibuga kya rwagati eky'omu maisho ga Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba aho niho yaatambiire ebitambo bicwekize, n'empongano z'ebishaju ez'okurya kumwe. Manya eitambiro ry'omuringa, eri Solomooni yaakozire, tirirabaasize kuhikwaho ebyo bitambo bicwekize, n'eby'esaano, n'eby'ebishaju." 
2Chronicles7:8 Omuri obwo bunaku Solomooni akagira obugyenyi bw'ebiro mushanju hamwe n'Abaisiraeli boona, ekimbuuro kihango munonga, abaarugire hare okwiha aharikutaahirwa omuri Hamati, okuhika aha Kagyera ka Misiri." 
2Chronicles7:9 Aha izooba rya munaana baagira oruteerane rukuru, ahabw'okuba bakaba bamazire ebiro mushanju nibahonga eitambiro, n'ebindi mushanju baine obugyenyi." 
2Chronicles7:10 Aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bishatu by'okwo kwezi kwa mushanju yaaragiira abantu kugaruka omu maka gaabo. Baagarukayo bashemereirwe, kandi bananukire, ahabwa Nyakubaho kubeera Daudi na Solomooni n'abantu be Abaisiraeli murungi." 
2Chronicles7:11 Solomooni yaaheza atyo Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, na nyaruju y'omugabe. Byona ebi Solomooni yaabaire ateekateekire kukora omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'omuri nyaruju ye ahabwe, yaabiheza gye." 
2Chronicles7:12 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akabonekyera Solomooni nyekiro, yaamugira ati: Mpuriire okushaba kwawe, kandi naayetooranira omwanya ogu kuba enju y'okutambiriramu ebitambo." 
2Chronicles7:13 Ku ndizibira enjura kugwa, nari ku ndyohereza enzigye kurya ensi zikagikunduura, nainga naayoherereza abantu bangye orufu," 
2Chronicles7:14 abo bantu bangye abaanyetererwa baayebundika, baashaba bansherura, kandi baareka emitwarize yaabo mibi, obwo ndyabahurira niinyema omu iguru, mbasaasire ebibi byabo, nkize ensi yaabo." 
2Chronicles7:15 Mbwenu niinyija kuguma mpangire amaisho kandi ntegire okutu okushaba okuraagume nikushabirwa omu mwanya ogu. 
2Chronicles7:16 Manya hati naatoorana, kandi naahaasirira egi nju kuguma nibandamizamu ebiro byona. Ndyaguma ngitaireho eriisho n'omutima obutwire bwona." 
2Chronicles7:17 Kandi iwe ku orintwariza gye, waakora byona ebi nkuragiire, waakuratira ebi naataireho n'ebi naaragiire," 
2Chronicles7:18 naanye ndyahamya baijukuru baawe aha kitebe kyawe ky'obugabe, nk'oku naaraganiise Daudi sho, nimmugira nti: Toribura muntu w'okutegyeka Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles7:19 Kwonka ku muriteishuka, mwareka kukuratira ebi naataireho n'ebi naaragiire, ebi naabahaire, mwagyenda mwaheereza baaruhanga abandi, mwabaramya," 
2Chronicles7:20 naanye ndyarandura Abaisiraeli omu nsi i naabahaire. Egi nju i naahaasirira kuguma nibandamizamu ngyecweho, ngihindure ey'okucuubwaho enfumu n'ekigaaniizo omu banyamahanga boona"
