2Chronicles7:21 Reero orihika ahari egi nju hati erikurangaanwa, weena oriba naarabaho aryatangaara, ayebuuze ati; Beitu shi Nyakubaho egi nsi n'egi nju akabitura ki?" 
2Chronicles7:22 Haza bamugarukyemu bati: Manya bakaimuura Mukama Ruhanga wa baishebo, owaabaihire omu nsi ya Misiri, baayehongyera baaruhanga abandi, baabaramya kandi baabaheereza. Nikyo yaabagwisiize ako kagwe koona." 
2Chronicles8:1 Ku haahwaireho emyaka makumi abiri ei Solomooni yaayombekyeiremu Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho n'eye ahabwe," 
2Chronicles8:2 Solomooni yaayombeka busya endembo ezi Hiraamu yaabaire amuhaire, yaazitamu Abaisiraeli kuzituuramu." 
2Chronicles8:3 Bwanyima Solomooni akaza Hamati-zooba, yaagikwata." 
2Chronicles8:4 Yaayombeka orurembo Tadimoori omu ihamba, n'endembo zoona ez'amabiikiro ezi yaayombekire omuri Hamati." 
2Chronicles8:5 Kandi akombeka Betihorooni eya ruguru, na Betihorooni eya ifo, endembo zeehinguririziibwe ebigo bigumire, eziine amarembo garikukingisibwa empimbi." 
2Chronicles8:6 Yaayombeka orurembo Baalati n'endembo zoona ezi yaabaire abiikamu ebintu, n'endembo zoona ez'ebigaari bye, n'ez'engabo ze ezirikugyendera aha mbaraasi, n'ebindi byona ebi yaayenzire kwombeka omuri Yerusalemu, na Lebanooni, n'omu nsi zoona ezaabaire ziri omu bugabe bwe." 
2Chronicles8:7 Abantu boona abaahonokire aha Bahiiti, Abaamori, Abapeerizi, Abahiivi, n'aha Bayebusi, abaabaire batari Baisiraeli," 
2Chronicles8:8 baijukuru baabo abaahonokireho omuri egyo nsi abu Abaisiraeli bataraitsire, Solomooni akabahindura ab'okukora emirimo y'amaani. Na hati nikwo bakiri." 
2Chronicles8:9 Kwonka Abaisiraeli bo Solomooni tarabahindwire bahuuku b'okumukorera emirimo; kureka bakaba abaserukare be, n'abakungu be, n'abakuru b'ab'ebigaari bye, n'engabo ze ezirikugyendera aha mbaraasi." 
2Chronicles8:10 Abo nibo baabaire bari abakungu bakuru b'Omugabe Solomooni, barimu abashaija magana abiri na makumi ataano abu yaataireho kureeberera abarikukoresibwa emirimo y'amaani." 
2Chronicles8:11 Solomooni kandi akaiha muhara wa Faraaho omu rurembo rwa Daudi, yaamureeta omu nju i yaamwombekyeire. Manya akagira ati: Omukazi wangye tashemereire kuguma omu nju ya Daudi omugabe wa Isiraeli, ahabw'okuba omwanya gu eshanduukye ya Nyakubaho eiziremu n'ogurikwera." 
2Chronicles8:12 Bwanyima Solomooni akatambira Nyaruju ebitambo bicwekize. Yaabitambira aha itambiro rya Nyakubaho eri yaayombekire omu maisho g'ekisasi kya Nyaruju; 
2Chronicles8:13 nk'oku kyabaire nikyetengwa kukorwa buri izooba, kubitamba nibakuratira ekiragiro kya Musa ahari zaasabato, n'aha kuboneka kwa buri kwezi, n'aha magyenyi ashatu aga buri mwaka: Obugyenyi bw'Emigaati Etatumbisiibwe, Obugyenyi bw'Amashaaruura n'Obugyenyi bw'Ensiisira." 
2Chronicles8:14 Kandi nk'oku Daudi ishe yaabaire aragiire, Solomooni akataho embu z'abahongyerezi ahabw'omurimo gwabo. Yaataho n'ez'Abaleevi ahabw'emirimo yaabo y'okuhimbisa Ruhanga n'okumuheereza, nibakwatsa abahongyerezi, nk'oku kirikwetengwa buri izooba. Yaataho n'abakumiirizi b'aha marembo omu mbu zaabo ahari buri irembo; ahabw'okuba Daudi omuntu wa Ruhanga nikwo yaabaire aragiire." 
2Chronicles8:15 Kandi ebi Omugabe Daudi yaaragiire abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi, ebikwatiraine n'amabiikiro, n'ebindi bintu, tibaine ki batarakozire." 
2Chronicles8:16 Solomooni nikwo yaaherize atyo omurimo gwona, okwiha aha izooba ri baatandikiireho omusingi gwa Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, okuhitsya ahu yaahweraire. Mpaho yaahwa etyo." 
2Chronicles8:17 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Solomooni yaaza Ezionigeberi na Eloti, aha mwegyeego gw'enyanja, omu nsi ya Edomu." 
2Chronicles8:18 Hiraamu yaamutwekyera emeeri n'abakuru baazo, hamwe n'abarimbi abamanyiriire enyanja. Baaza Ofiri, hamwe n'abakungu ba Solomooni, baihayo kiloguraamu z'ezaabu akakumi kamwe n'enkumi mushanju na magana mwenda na makumi abiri, baazireetera Omugabe Solomooni." 
2Chronicles9:1 Omugabekazi wa Sheeba, ku yaahuriire oku Solomooni arikurangaanwa, yaija Yerusalemu kumugyeza, naamubuuza ebibuuzo bigumire. Yaija ashendekyereziibwe abantu baingi munonga, n'engamira zeekoreire eby'emigaju, n'ezaabu nyingi buzima, n'amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi." 
2Chronicles9:2 Solomooni yaagarukamu byona ebi onu yaamubuurize; tihaagira kintu na kimwe ekyamurema kumushoboorora. 
2Chronicles9:3 Omugabekazi wa Sheeba ku yaareebire oku Solomooni aine obwengye, n'ekikaari ki yaayombekire," 
2Chronicles9:4 n'ebyokurya by'aha meeza ye, n'emishutamire y'abakungu be, n'emiheerereze y'abagaragwa be, n'ebi bajwaire, n'abagabuzi b'eby'okunywa n'oku bajwaire, n'ebitambo bye ebicwekize ebi yaabaire atambira ahari Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, omutima gwamuhwa omunda." 
2Chronicles9:5 Yaagambira omugabe ati: Ebi naahuriire nkiri omu nsi yangye nibakugambaho nk'oku ori ow'obwengye, n'eby'amazima." 
2Chronicles9:6 Kwonka tindabiikiriize, okuhitsya obu nyizire nkabyereebera. Mbwenu reeba, nangwa na kimwe kya kabiri ky'obwengye bwawe bwingi tibarakingambiire. Nookirira kimwe ebi naahuriire." 
2Chronicles9:7 Ebishi n'abahiirwa abakazi baawe, kwemerera omu maisho gaawe bakahurira eby'obwengye bwawe!" 
2Chronicles9:8 Mukama Ruhanga waawe owaakusiimire akakuta aha kitabe ky'obugabe bwe, okaba omugabe, naakasingye! Manya Ruhanga waawe ku yaakunzire Abaisiraeli, n'okwenda ngu abagumyeho ebiro byona, yaakuhindura omugabe waabo, ngu obone kubacwera emanja z'oburyo kandi ezihikire." 
2Chronicles9:9 Bwanyima ogwo mugabekazi yaaha Omugabe Solomooni kiloguraamu z'ezaabu enkumi itaano na magana mukaaga, n'eby'emigaju bingi munonga, n'amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi. Hakaba hatakabahoga eby'omugaju ebiri nk'ebi omugabekazi wa Sheeba yaahaire Omugabe Solomooni." 
2Chronicles9:10 Ekindi, abairu ba Hiraamu n'abagaragwa ba Solomooni abaihire ezaabu Ofiri bakareeta embaaho z'emiyovu, n'amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi." 
2Chronicles9:11 Ezo mbaaho z'emiyovu omugabe yaazikoramu amatembero ga Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'aga nyaruju y'omubage, n'amagobore n'ebidongo by'abeeshongozi. Haza omu nsi ya Yuda hakaba hatakabamuga ebirikushushana nabyo." 
2Chronicles9:12 Reero Omugabe Solomooni yaaha omugabekazi wa Sheeba ebi yaayenzire byona, ebi yaamushabire, otabariiremu ebi yaamurongoire ahabw'ebi yaamuzinduriire. Bwanyima ogwo mugabekazi yaakuba, yaagaruka omu nsi ye n'abagaragwa be." 
2Chronicles9:13 Mbwenu ezaabu, ei baabaire bareetera Solomooni omu mwaka, ekaba ehitsya oburemeezi bwa kiloguraamu enkumi ishatu na magana ashatu na makumi ataano," 
2Chronicles9:14 otabariiremu ei abashuubuzi n'abatembeya baabaire bareeta. Kandi abagabe ba Buharabu boona, n'abategyeki bakuru b'omuri egyo nsi, bakaba batoijera Solomooni ezaabu n'efeeza." 
2Chronicles9:15 Omugabe Solomooni akaheesesa engabo mpango magana abiri z'ezaabu eshemeziibwe, buri emwe esiigirwe ezaabu y'oburemeezi bwa kiloguraamu ina." 
2Chronicles9:16 Omugabe yaazita omuri Nyaruju y'ekibira kya Lebanooni. 
2Chronicles9:17 Ogwo mugabe akeekorera ekitebe ky'obugabe ky'emiino, yaakisiiga ezaabu empuuhe." 
2Chronicles9:18 Ekyo kitebe kikaba kiine amatembero mukaaga, n'endibatiro y'ezaabu, bikwataine nakyo. Ahari buri rubaju ry'ekyo kitebe hariho ahu arikuhuumuza emikono. Kandi ahari buri rubaju ru arikuhuumuzaho emikono, hariho ekishushani ky'entare eyemereire," 
2Chronicles9:19 n'ezindi ntare ikumi na ibiri zeemereire, buri emwe aha muheru gwa buri itembero; orubaju n'orubaju rw'ago matembero mukaaga. Haza omu bugabe obundi bwona hakaba hatakabahoga kitebe ky'obugabe ekirakozirwe nk'ekyo." 
2Chronicles9:20 Ebikopo by'okunyweramu eby'Omugabe Solomooni byona bikaba biri eby'ezaabu, n'ebikopo byona eby'omuri Nyaruju y'ekibira kya Lebanooni biri eby'ezaabu empuuhe. Omu busingye bwa Solomooni, efeeza ekaba etarikwetwa kintu." 
2Chronicles9:21 Manya emeeri z'ogwo mugabe zikaba ziza Tarushiishi n'abairu ba Hiraamu, omurundi gumwe buri myaka eshatu, emeeri za Tarushiishi zireeta ezaabu, efeeza, emiino, enkobe na zaanyamunyonyi." 
2Chronicles9:22 Omugabe Solomooni nikwo yaakirize atyo abagabe b'omu nsi boona obutungi n'obwengye. 
2Chronicles9:23 Reero abagabe b'omu nsi boona baija kureeba Solomooni, kuhurira eby'obwengye bu Ruhanga yaamuhaire." 
2Chronicles9:24 Buri omwe omuribo amureetera ebiconco, ebintu by'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu, ebijwaro, entsinda, emigaju embaraasi n'enyumbu, bingi munonga buri mwaka." 
2Chronicles9:25 Solomooni akaba aine amaka enkumi ina g'embaraasi n'ebigaari byazo, n'ab'aha mbaraasi akakumi kamwe n'enkumi ibiri abu yaataire omu ndembo zirimu ebigaari, n'abandi omuri Yerusalemu kuguma n'omugabe." 
2Chronicles9:26 Akategyeka abagabe boona, okwiha aha mugyera Eufuraati, okuhika omu nsi y'Abafilisiti, n'aha mwatano gwa Misiri." 
2Chronicles9:27 Ogwo mugabe yaareetera Yerusalemu kushaagaanwamu efeeza nk'amabaare, n'emiti ya kaarwenda kuba mingi munonga nk'emikunyu y'omu ruhita rwa Shefeela." 
2Chronicles9:28 Bakaba bareetera Solomooni embaraasi nibaziiha Misiri 
2Chronicles9:29 Ebindi byona ebi Solomooni yaakozire, okwiha aha kutandika okuhitsya aha muheru, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'ebyabaireho omu biro bya Natani omurangi, n'omu byarangirwe Ahiya Omushiilo, n'omu bi omuhanuuzi Ido yaayorekirwe, ebikwatiraine na Yeroboamu mwene Nebati." 
2Chronicles9:30 Solomooni akamara emyaka makumi ana omuri Yerusalemu naategyeka Abaisiraeli boona. 
2Chronicles9:31 Bwanyima Solomooni akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa omu rurembo rwa Daudi ishe; omutabani Rehoboamu yaamuhungurira." 
2Chronicles10:1 Rehoboamu akaza Shekemu ahabw'okuba Abaisiraeli boona bakaba bagiireyo kumwemeka kuba omugabe. 
2Chronicles10:2 Yeroboamu mwene Nebati ku yaakihuriire ari Misiri ei yaabaire ahungiire Solomooni, yaarugayo yaagaruka omuka." 
2Chronicles10:3 Baamutumaho ab'okumweta. Yeroboamu ku yaizire n'Abaisiraeli boona, baagambira Rehoboamu bati:" 
2Chronicles10:4 Sho akatwekoreza emigamba eremeire. Mbwenu nu, tuyugize emirimo erikurusya ei sho abaire naatukoresa, n'emigamba eremeire ei abaire naatwekoreza; haza tukuheereze." 
2Chronicles10:5 Nawe abagira ati: Mwije mugarukye, mundeebe, haahinguraho ebiro bishatu. Batyo abo bantu bagyenda." 
2Chronicles10:6 Bwanyima Omugabe Rehoboamu aza omu naama n'abantu bakuru abaabaire batabaarira Solomooni ishe akiriho. Ababuuza ati: Nimumpa bwengye ki, oku ndaagarukyemu abo bantu?" 
2Chronicles10:7 Bamugira bati: Abo bantu ku oraabatwarize gye, waabagwisa gye, waagamba gye nabo, nibwo baraabe abairu baawe bakakugwa aha mukono." 
2Chronicles10:8 Kwonka yaatsigisibwa eki abagurusi baamuhabwire, yaaza omu naama n'abatsigazi bu yaanyetsire nabo, abaabaire nibamutabaarira." 
2Chronicles10:9 Yaababuuza ati: Nimumpa bwengye ki oku ndaagarukyemu abo bantu, abangira bati: Tuyugize omugamba gu sho abaire naatwekoreza." 
2Chronicles10:10 Abatsigazi bu yaanyetsire nabo baamugira bati: Abo bantu abaakugira bati: Sho akatwekoreza omugamba guremeire, kwonka iwe ogutuyugize, obagarukyemu oti: Akakumu kangye akahera nikakiza enyugunyu ya tata obuhango." 
2Chronicles10:11 Mbwenu tata ku araabe yaabeekoreize omugamba guremeire, nyowe niinyija kukizaho. Tata akabateeza eminyaafu, kwonka nyowe niinyija kubaasha n'enkoba." 
2Chronicles10:12 Aha kiro kya kashatu Yeroboamu n'abantu boona baija, nk'oku omugabe abaragiire, ati: Mwije mundeebe haahinguraho ebiro bishatu." 
2Chronicles10:13 Omugabe Rehoboamu yaabagarukisamu ekikabuko, atarikweta ha ki abagurusi bamuhabwire;" 
2Chronicles10:14 yaabagambira naakuratira obwengye bu abatsigazi bamuhaire. Yaabagira ati: Tata akabeekoreza omugamba guremeire, kwonka nyowe niinyija kugwongyeraho. Tata akabateeza eminyaafu, nyowe niinyija kubaasha n'enkoba." 
2Chronicles10:15 Ogwo mugabe tiyaayeta hari abo bantu; ahabw'okuba ekyo kikaba kirugire ahari Ruhanga, ngu Mukama abone kuhikiiriza eki yaagambiire Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, naakigambisa Ahiya Omushiilo." 
2Chronicles10:16 Abaisiraeli boona ku baareebire omugabe ataabeetaho, baamugarukamu bati: Twine kakwate ki na Daudi? Titwine ki turaahungure aha bya mwene Yese. Imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, nimugarukye omu maka gaanyu! Naimwe aba Daudi, okwiha hati mugume mwemarire eby'omuryango gwanyu. Batyo Abaisiraeli boona baagaruka omu maka gaabo." 
2Chronicles10:17 Rehoboamu yaaguma naategyeka Abaisiraeli abatwire omu ndembo za Yuda. 
2Chronicles10:18 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, Omugabe Rehoboamu yaatuma aha Baisiraeli Hadoraamu, owaabaire ari omukuru w'abarikukora emirimo y'okugyemwa; abo Baisiraeli baamuteera amabaare, yaafa. Omugabe Rehoboamu ku yaakihuriire, tiyaahwama, yaatemba ekigaari kye, yaahungira Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles10:19 Okwo nikwo Abaisiraeli baagomeire ab'enda ya Daudi okuhitsya n'eri izooba. 
2Chronicles11:1 Rehoboamu ku yaahikire Yerusalemu, yaahuruza ab'oruganda rwa Yuda n'ab'orwa Benyamiini, abashaija akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi munaana, enkwata ngabo, kurwanisa Abaisiraeli, kugarurira Rehoboamu obugabe." 
2Chronicles11:2 Kwonka Nyakubaho yaagambira Shemaaya omuntu wa Ruhanga ati: 
2Chronicles11:3 Gambira Rehoboamu mwene Solomooni omugabe wa Yuda, ogambire n'Abaisiraeli boona ab'oruganda rwa Yuda n'orwa Benyamiini" 
2Chronicles11:4 oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mutahurura kurwanisa beene waanyu. Buri muntu agarukye omu ka ye, ahabw'okuba ekyo niinye kirugireho. Nabo baahurira eki Nyakubaho yaabagambira, baagarukayo, tibaaza kurwanisa Yeroboamu." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rehoboamu akaguma Yerusalemu, yaayombeka ebigo by'okwerindiramu omu ndembo za Yuda ezi:" 
2Chronicles11:6 Beetelehemu, Etamu, Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 Betizuuri, Soko, Adulaamu," 
2Chronicles11:8 Gaati, Mareesha, Ziifu," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adoraimu, Lakishi, Azeeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 Zoora, Aiyalooni na Heburooni; byaba ebigo bigumire by'omu ndembo za Yuda n'eza Benyamiini." 
2Chronicles11:11 Yaagumya ebyo bigo, yaabitamu abakuru b'engabo, n'amabiikiro g'ebyokurya, amajuta g'emioliva, na viino." 
2Chronicles11:12 Kandi yaata engabo n'amacumu omuri ezo ndembo zoona, yaazigumya munonga. Yaagumya Abaayuda n'Abaabenyamiini bari abe." 
2Chronicles11:13 Reero abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi ab'omuri Isiraeli yoona bakaruga hoona ahu baabaire batwire, baija ahu ari." 
2Chronicles11:14 Manya Abaleevi bakatsigaho amariisizo gaabo n'enshambu zaabo, baija Buyuda na Yerusalemu; ahabw'okuba Yeroboamu n'abatabani bakababinga aha murimo gwabo gw'okuheereza bari abahongyerezi ba Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles11:15 Yaayeteeraho abahongyerezi abe ab'obutungutungu kuramya emandwa z'ebibira, n'ebishushani by'enyana zi yaakozire." 
2Chronicles11:16 Bwanyima abandi bantu b'enganda za Isiraeli zoona abaabaire nibendera kimwe kuramya Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli baija Yerusalemu babakuratiire, kutambira Mukama Ruhanga wa baishebo ebitambo." 
2Chronicles11:17 Baahamya obugabe bwa Yuda, kandi baamara emyaka eshatu nibakwatsa Rehoboamu mwene Solomooni, ahabw'okuba omuri egyo myaka eshatu bakaguma nibatwaza nk'obu baabaire nibategyekwa Daudi na Solomooni." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehoboamu akashwera Mahalati, muhara wa Yerimooti mwene Daudi. Na nyina akaba naayetwa Abihaili, muhara wa Eliyaabu mwene Yese." 
2Chronicles11:19 Yaamuzaarira abatabani aba: Yeushi, Shemariya na Zahamu." 
2Chronicles11:20 Ku yaaherize kumushwera, yaashwera na Maaka muhara wa Abusolomu, yaamuzaaraho Abiiya, Atai, Ziiza na Shelomoto." 
2Chronicles11:21 Rehoboamu akakunda munonga Maaka, muhara wa Abusolomu, okukira abandi bakazi be boona n'ebinyanshunju. Manya akashwera abakazi ikumi na munaana, n'ebinyanshunju makumi mukaaga. Yaazaara abatabani makumi abiri na munaana, n'abahara makumi mukaaga." 
2Chronicles11:22 Bwanyima Rehoboamu akatoorana Abiiya mwene Maaka kuba omwinginya mukuru omuri beene ishe; ahabw'okuba niwe yaabaire naayenda ngu amuhungurire aha bugabe. 
2Chronicles11:23 Reero Rehoboamu yaakoresa obwengye. Yaata abatabani omu byanga byona ebya Yuda n'ebya Benyamiini, kubireebererera omu bigo by'endembo byona ebigumire. Yaabaha ebyokurya bingi, yaataho n'okubashwererera abakazi." 
2Chronicles12:1 Rehoboamu ku yaaherize kuba ohamire kandi ow'amaani omu bugabe bwe, we n'Abaisiraeli boona baareka kukuratira eby'omu biragiro bya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles12:2 Ahabw'okutaba beesigwa ahari Nyakubaho omu mwaka gwa kataano ogw'omu busingye bw'Omugabe Rehoboamu, Shishaki omugabe wa Misiri akahurura, yaateera Yerusalemu," 
2Chronicles12:3 aine ebigaari rukumi na magana abiri, n'ab'ahambaraasi obukumi mukaaga. N'abantu bu yaizire nabo naaruga Misiri bakaba batarikubarwa; barimu aba Libiya n'Abasukimu n'Abaetiopiya." 
2Chronicles12:4 Yaakwata ebigo bigumire by'omu ndembo za Yuda, yaija, yaahika na Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles12:5 Bwanyima omurangi Shemaaya akaija ahari Rehoboamu n'abategyeki ba Buyuda abaabaire bateeraniire Yerusalemu, bahungire Shishaki. Yaabagira ati: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mukaanyimuura, naanye nikwo kubarekurira Shishaki." 
2Chronicles12:6 Batyo abategyeki ba Isiraeli hamwe n'omugabe baayebundika, baagira bati: Nyakubaho ahikiriire." 
2Chronicles12:7 Nyakubaho ku yaareebire baayebundika, yaagambira Shemaaya ati: Okwiha obu baayebundika, naanye tinkibacwekyereza, kureka niinyija kubajuna. Na Yerusalemu tindikwija kugigirira kiniga kingi, Shishaki yaagiteera." 
2Chronicles12:8 Kwonka nibaija kuba abairu be babone kumanya omutaano gw'okumpeereza n'okuheereza abagabe b'omu nsi ezindi. 
2Chronicles12:9 Shishaki omugabe wa Misiri atyo aija, ateera Yerusalemu, anyaga eby'omu mabiikiro ga Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'eby'omu g'omu kikaari ky'omugabe; byona abitwara. Atwara n'engabo z'ezaabu ezi Solomooni yaakozire." 
2Chronicles12:10 Omu mwanya gwazo, Omugabe Rehoboamu akora ez'emiringa, azikwatsa abakuru b'abarinzi abaabaire nibarinda eirembo ry'ekikaari ky'omugabe." 
2Chronicles12:11 Mbwenu omugabe ku yaabaire aza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, baija nazo bazikwaitse; bwanyima bazigarura omu kishengye ky'abarinzi." 
2Chronicles12:12 Rehoboamu ku yaayebundikire, Nyakubaho yaarekyera aho kumugirira ekiniga kingi, kumucwekyereza; n'ebintu byaba gye omuri Buyuda." 
2Chronicles12:13 Omugabe Rehoboamu nikwo yaayeyongyeire atyo kugira obushoboorozi omuri Yerusalemu, akategyeka. Rehoboamu akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka makumi ana na gumwe y'obukuru; yaategyekyera emyaka ikumi na mushanju omuri Yerusalemu, orurembo ru Nyakubaho yaatooraine omu nsi ya Isiraeli yoona kumuramizamu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Naama Omuamonikazi." 
2Chronicles12:14 Rehoboamu akakora kubi, ahabw'okuba tareetaire ha kukora ebi Nyakubaho arikwenda." 
2Chronicles12:15 Ebindi ebi Rehoboamu yaakozire, okwiha aha kutandika okuhitsya aha muheru, bihandiikirwe omu byabaireho omu busingye bwa Shemaaya omurangi, na Ido omuhanuuzi. Kandi Rehoboamu na Yeroboamu bakaba batoosha kurwana engamba." 
2Chronicles12:16 Bwanyima Rehoboamu akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa omu rurembo rwa Daudi; omutabani Abiiya yaamuhungurira." 
2Chronicles13:1 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi na munaana ogw'omu busingye bwa Yeroboamu Omugabe, nibwo Abiiya yaatandika kuba omugabe wa Buyuda." 
2Chronicles13:2 Akategyekyera emyaka eshatu omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Mikaaya, muhara wa Urieli owa Gibea. Omuri ebyo biro, Abiiya na Yeroboamu bakarwana orugamba." 
2Chronicles13:3 Abiiya yaahurura aine abashaija emanzi obusiriira buna abamanyiriire orugamba, na Yeroboamu yaatenga orugamba kumurwanisa aine abantu abarwani obusiriira munaana, enkwata ngabo." 
2Chronicles13:4 Bwanyima Abiiya akeemerera aha Rushozi Zemaraimu orw'omu nsi y'enshozi eya Efuraimu, yaagira ati: Iwe Yeroboamu n'Abaisiraeli mwena, nimuhurire!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Timurikumanya ku Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli yaaraganiise endagaano etarikuhinduka kuha Daudi n'abaijukuru obugabe, kutegyeka Isiraeli ebiro byona?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Kwonka Yeroboamu mwene Nebati, omugaragwa wa Solomooni mwene Daudi, akaimuka yaagomera mukama we." 
2Chronicles13:7 Reero abashaija ebifiire baayebumba nawe, baayangira Rehoboamu mwene Solomooni kubategyeka, obwo Rehoboamu akiri munto atakahamire kubaasa kubagungira." 
2Chronicles13:8 Mbwenu reeba, nimwenda kurwanisa obugabe obu Nyakubaho yaahaire beene Daudi kubutegyeka; ngu niho muri emigogo, kandi ngu niho mwine enyana z'ezaabu ezi Yeroboamu yaabaheesheire kuba baaruhanga baanyu." 
2Chronicles13:9 Mbwenu shi, timurabingire abahongyerezi ba Nyakubaho beene Arooni n'Abaleevi, mukeeteeraho abahongyerezi abaanyu nk'oku abantu b'agandi mahanga bagira? Manya weena oija kweyeza areetsire ekimasha, nari empaya mushanju z'entaama, aba omuhongyerezi w'abu mweta baaruhanga baanyu." 
2Chronicles13:10 Kwonka itwe, Nyakubaho niwe Ruhanga waitu, kandi titukamwimuuraga. Abahongyerezi bu twine abaheereza Nyakubaho ni beene Arooni; kandi twine Abaleevi abarikubakwatsa." 
2Chronicles13:11 Buri kasheeshe na buri mwabazyo batambira Nyakubaho ebitambo bicwekize, bamwoterera obubaani burikutaamirana emigaju, bata aha meeza y'ezaabu empuuhe emigaati y'okumurikwa, kandi bareeberera ekikondo ky'amatabaaza eky'ezaabu, kureeba ngu amatabaaza gaakyo nigaaka buri mwabazyo. Manya itwe tukuratira ebi Mukama Ruhanga waitu yaaturagiire. Kwonka imwe mukamwimuura." 
2Chronicles13:12 Reeba, Ruhanga ari hamwe naitwe atwebembeire; kandi abahongyerezi be bari aha, bakwaitse enzamba z'okuhuruza ab'okubarwanisa. Mbwenu imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, mutarwanisa Mukama Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe; ahabw'okuba timurikwija kusingura." 
2Chronicles13:13 Obwo Yeroboamu akaba ayohereize ab'okubagwera, ngu babateere nibabareetwa enyima, haza engabo ze ziteere Abaayuda nizibareetwa omu maisho, ababagwereire babari enyima." 
2Chronicles13:14 Abaayuda ku baanagireyo amaisho, baashanga orugamba rubaturukire omu maisho n'enyima; baatakira Nyakubaho, abahongyerezi baateera enzamba." 
2Chronicles13:15 Bwanyima Abaayuda baayogoora munonga. Ku baayogoire, Ruhanga yaasingura Yeroboamu n'Abaisiraeli boona, baahunga Abiiya n'Abaayuda." 
2Chronicles13:16 Abaisiraeli baahunga Abaayuda, Ruhanga yaababarekurira." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abiiya n'engabo ze baabaitamu abantu baingi munonga; Abaisiraeli baafamu abashaija obusiriira butaano, enkwata ngabo." 
2Chronicles13:18 Okwo nikwo Abaisiraeli baacwirwe eishaija omuri ebyo biro, Abaayuda bakabasingura ahabw'okwesiga Mukama Ruhanga wa baishebo." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abiiya akagyenda abingire Yeroboamu, yaamunyaga endembo ezi: Beteli n'ebirorero byayo, Yeshaana n'ebirorero byayo, na Efurooni n'ebirorero byayo." 
2Chronicles13:20 Omu busingye bwa Abiiya Yeroboamu taragizire bu agarukire kugira amaani. Bwanyima Nyakubaho yaamurwaza, yaafa." 
2Chronicles13:21 Abiiya we akeeyongyera kugira obushoboorozi. Yaashwera abakazi ikumi na bana, yaazaara abatabani makumi abiri na babiri, n'abahara ikumi na mukaaga." 
2Chronicles13:22 Ebindi ebi Abiiya yaakozire, n'emitwarize ye, n'ebi yaagambire bihandiikirwe omu byabaireho omu biro by'omurangi Ido." 
2Chronicles14:1 Bwanyima Abiiya akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru; yaaziikwa omu rurembo rwa Daudi; omutabani Asa yaamuhungurira aha ngoma. Omu biro bya Asa, ensi ekagira obusingye okumara emyaka ikumi." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa akakaora ebirungi kandi ebihikire ebi Mukama Ruhanga we arikusiima. 
2Chronicles14:3 Akaihaho amatambiro g'enduga-mahanga, n'obutungutungu; yaasheenya enyomyo, yaatemagura ebishushani bya Ashera." 
2Chronicles14:4 Yaaragiira Abaayuda kukora ebi Mukama Ruhanga wa baishebo arikwenda, n'okukuratira eby'omu iteeka, n'ebyatairweho." 
2Chronicles14:5 Kandi akaiha omu ndembo za Yuda zoona obutungutungu, n'amatambiro g'okwotereraho obubaani. Obugabe bwagira obuhuumure omu busingye bwe." 
2Chronicles14:6 Haza yaayombeka omuri Buyuda ebigo bigumire. Omu biro bye taragizire ngamba, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akamuha obusingye." 
2Chronicles14:7 Yaagambira Abaayuda ati: Ka twombekye ezi ndembo, tuziziguurutsye engo n'eminaara, tuziteho amarembo garikukingisibwa empimbi. Manya ensi ekiri eyaitu, ahabw'okuba tukozire ebi Mukama Ruhanga waitu arikusiima. Tumusherwire, nawe yaatuha obusingye embaju zoona. Batyo baazombeka, kandi baagira obugogyeere." 
2Chronicles14:8 Reero Asa akaba aine eihe ry'abashaija obusiriira bushatu bw'Abaayuda, abahagatiire engabo n'amacumu. Kandi aine abashaija obusiriira bubiri n'obukumi munaana bw'Abaabenyamiini, abakwaitse engabo n'amata; haza boona bari abashaija emanzi." 
2Chronicles14:9 Zeera Omunyaetiopiya akahurura kuteera Buyuda n'eihe ry'abantu akakaikuru kamwe, n'ebigaari magana ashatu; yaija yaahika Mareesha." 
2Chronicles14:10 Na Asa yaahurura kubugabugana nawe, baatengyera orugamba Mareesha omu ruhanga Zeefata." 
2Chronicles14:11 Asa yaatakira Mukama Ruhanga we ati: Ai Mukama, tihariho ori nkaiwe, oha emikono abataine maani baaba nibarwana n'abagaine. Mbwenu, ai Mukama Ruhanga waitu, otuhe emikono ahabw'okuba niiwe turikwesiga, kandi omu iziina ryawe twaija kurwanisa egi migogo. Ai Mukama, niiwe Ruhanga waitu, hati otaikiriza omuntu kukukiza emikono." 
2Chronicles14:12 Nyakubaho atyo asinguza Asa n'Abaayuda; Abaetiopiya bahunga. 
2Chronicles14:13 Asa n'engabo ze bababinga, babahitsya Geerari. Abaetiopiya bafa baingi munonga, tibabaasa kugaruka kwerundaana; ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho n'eihe rye bakababuza obutooro. Abaayuda baatwara eminyago mingi." 
2Chronicles14:14 Baacwekyereza endembo zoona ezeehinguririize Geerari, ahabw'okuba abo bantu Mukama akaba abaitsize obwoba. Baanyaga endembo zoona, ahabw'okuba zikaba zirimu ebintu bingi by'okunyagwa." 
2Chronicles14:15 Kandi baacwekyereza amaka g'abaine amatungo, baanyaga entaama nyingi munonga n'engamira. Bwanyima baagaruka Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles15:1 Mutima wa Ruhanga akaijura Azariya, mwene Odedi." 
2Chronicles15:2 Yaagyenda, yaabugana Asa, yaamugira ati: Iwe Asa n'Abaayuda mwena, n'Abaabenyamiini nimumpurire! Nyakubaho ari hamwe naimwe, mwaba muri hamwe nawe. Ku muraamusherure, nimumubona. Kwonka ku muraamwimuure, nawe naabatsigaho." 
2Chronicles15:3 Manya Isiraeli ekamara omwanya muraingwa etaine Ruhanga ow'amazima, etaine muhongyerezi orikwegyesa, n'obu ryakuba eiteeka." 
2Chronicles15:4 Kwonka ku baabaire baba bari omu kabi, baakubuukira Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, kandi baamusherura, bamubona." 
2Chronicles15:5 Omu biro ebyo hakaba hatariho busingye aha muntu weena orikushohora nari orikutaaha, ahabw'okuba abatuuzi b'omuri ezo nsi bakaba nibarabanisibwamu munonga." 
2Chronicles15:6 Bakeebaganisamu, eihanga ryarwanisa erindi, n'orurembo rwarwanisa orundi, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga akabarabanisamu, naabatuntuza n'obusaasi bw'emiringo yoona." 
2Chronicles15:7 Kwonka imwe mugume! Mutacweka entegye! Manya ebi murikukora muryabizimuurirwa. 
2Chronicles15:8 Asa ku yaahuriire ebi Azariya mwene Odedi yaarangire; yaaguma, yaiha omu nsi ya Yuda n'eya Benyamiini ebishushani birikuzira. Yaabiiha n'omu nsi ya Efuraimu ey'ebibungo, ei yaabaire akubwire. Yaahunduuza eitambiro rya Nyakubaho, eryabaire riri omu maisho g'ekisaasi kya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles15:9 Reero yaateeranira hamwe Abaayuda n'Abaabenyamiini boona, n'abaarugire omu kyanga kya Efuraimu n'ekya Manaase n'ekya Simeoni, abaabashuuhuukiiremu. Manya baingi munonga bakaba bacwire omuri Isiraeli, bamwehongyeire, ahabw'okureeba Mukama Ruhanga we ari hamwe nawe." 
2Chronicles15:10 Bakateeranira Yerusalemu omu kwezi kwa kashatu kw'omwaka gwa ikumi n'etaano gw'omu busingye bwa Asa. 
2Chronicles15:11 Eryo izooba baatambira Nyakubaho ebitambo bi baihire omu minyago ei baabaire bareetsire: ente magana mushanju, n'entaama enkumi mushanju." 
2Chronicles15:12 Baakora endagaano y'okuguma nibaramya Mukama Ruhanga wa baishebo, n'omutima gwabo gwona, n'amagara gaabo goona." 
2Chronicles15:13 Kandi ngu weena otarikora eki Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli arikwenda, aitwe; nobu yaakuba ari muto nari mukuru, nainga ari omushaija nari omukazi." 
2Chronicles15:14 Batyo baahiga omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, nibarahira n'eiraka rihango, kandi nibateera akaari, n'amakondere n'enzamba." 
2Chronicles15:15 Abaayuda boona baashemerererwa egyo ndahiro; ahabw'okuba bakarahira baihire aha mutima, kandi baasherura Nyakubaho bamwiniire ekihika, haza baamubona. Nawe yaabaha obuhuumure embaju zoona." 
2Chronicles15:16 Kandi Omugabe Asa akataho n'okubinga Maaka nyina omu bwanyina-omugabe, naamutura okukora ekishushani kya Ashera ekirikuzira. Asa ekyo kishushani yaakitemagura, yaakicwa obusaasingo, yaakyokyeza aha kagyera Kidirooni." 
2Chronicles15:17 Asa nobu araabe ataraihire butungutungu omuri Isiraeli, kwonka omutima gwe gukaguma guri mwere, ataine kirikumuhaahuuzibwa ebiro bye byona." 
2Chronicles15:18 Akata omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga ebiconco by'okwekundira, n'ebindi bintu ebi ishe yaatoizire, n'ebi we wenka yaatoizire." 
2Chronicles15:19 Okwiha obwo tihaabaho zindi ngamba, okuhitsya omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu n'etaano ogw'omu busingye bwe." 
2Chronicles16:1 Omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu na mukaaga ogw'omu busingye bwa Asa, Omugabe Baasha owa Isiraeli akahurura kuteera Buyuda, yaayombeka Raama ekigo kigumire kuzibira omuntu weena kuruga omuri Buyuda, nari kuzayo akahika Asa." 
2Chronicles16:2 Asa nikwo kwiha omu mabiikiro ga Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'aga nyaruju y'omugabe, efeeza n'ezaabu, akabitwekyera Benihadadi omugabe wa Siriya, owaabaire atwire Damasiko." 
2Chronicles16:3 Akamutumaho ati: Ka nkore naiwe endagaano y'okukwatansa, nka tata na sho oku bagiikozire. Reeba, naakutwekyera efeeza n'ezaabu. Mbwenu irooko, oite endagaano yaawe y'okukwatanisa na Baasha omugabe wa Isiraeli, abone kundugaho." 
2Chronicles16:4 Benihadadi yaikiriza eki Omugabe Asa yaamutumaho; yaayohereza abakuru b'amahe ge kuteera endembo za Isiraeli, baasingura Iyoni, Daani, Abelimaimu, n'endembo za Nafutaali zoona, ezirimu amabiikiro." 
2Chronicles16:5 Baasha ku yaakihuriire, yaarekyera aho kwombeka Raama, yaayemereza omurimo." 
2Chronicles16:6 Bwanyima Omugabe Asa yaatwara Abaayuda boona, baiha Raama amabaare n'embaaho ebi Baasha yaabaire naayombekyesa, Asa yaabyombekyesa Geba na Mizipa." 
2Chronicles16:7 Omu bunaku obwo Hanani omuhanuuzi akaija, yaahika Asa omugabe wa Buyuda, yaamugira ati: Ahabw'okuba oyesigire omugabe wa Siriya, tiwayesiga Mukama Ruhanga waawe, nikyo eihe ry'omugabe wa Siriya rikwogyeire omu mikono." 
2Chronicles16:8 Mbwenu Abaetiopiya n'Abalibiya bakaba batari eihe rihango munonga eriine ebigaari bingi munonga n'ab'ahambaraasi? Kwonka ahabw'okuba okeesiga Nyakubaho, nikyo yaabakurekuririire." 
2Chronicles16:9 Ahabw'okuba eriisho rya Nyakubaho rireeba oku n'oku omu nsi yoona kworeka ku aine amaani kuhwera abaine emitima erikumwesigira kimwe. Mbwenu eki okozire n'eky'obushema. Okwiha hati nikyo oraagumire otahwaire ngamba. 
2Chronicles16:10 Asa atyo agirira ogwo murangi ekiniga, amuta omu nkomo, amwigatira omu kihome amwiniire ekiniga ahabw'eki yaamugambira. Kandi ago magingo Asa ataho okubonabonesa bamwe omu bantu be." 
2Chronicles16:11 Ebindi ebi Asa yaakozire, okwiha aha kutandika okuhitsya aha muheru, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'Abagabe ba Yuda n'aba Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles16:12 Asa ku yaabaire ahikize emyaka makumi ashatu na mwenda ari aha ngoma, yaakwatwa endwara y'ebigyere, yaaba ey'amaani munonga. Haza omuri egyo ndwara ye, tiyaasherura buhwezi ahari Nyakubaho, kureka yaaraguza aha bafumu." 
2Chronicles16:13 Bwanyima Asa akafa ahikize emyaka makumi ana na gumwe ari aha ngoma, yaashanga baishenkuru." 
2Chronicles16:14 Bakamuziika omu kituuro ki yaayeshorogotororeire, omu rurembo rwa Daudi. Baarambika omutumbi gwe aha katanda kaijwire emigaju mingi ei abootezi baajwangize. Bwanyima baahemba omuriro mwingi kumuhaisa ekitiinwa." 
2Chronicles17:1 Yehoshafaati mutabani wa Asa akaza aha ngoma ahunguriire ishe, yaayehamya kwerinda Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles17:2 Akata amahe omu bigo bigumire byona ebya Buyuda, yaagitamu n'ebigo by'okwerindiramu, yaabita n'omu ndembo za Efuraimu ezi Asa ishe yaabaire akwatsire." 
2Chronicles17:3 Nyakubaho akaguma na Yehoshafaati, ahabw'okuba akagira emitwarize nk'ei ishe yaagizire omu kubanza, tiyaaramya Baabaali." 
2Chronicles17:4 Kureka yaaguma naakora ebi Ruhanga wa ishe arikusiima, yaakuratira ebiragiro bye; tiyaatoreza mitwarize y'Abaisiraeli." 
2Chronicles17:5 Nikyo Nyakubaho yaahamiize obugabe bwa Yehoshafaati ogwo, Abaayuda boona bakamutoijera, akatunga munonga kandi akagira ekitiinwa kingi." 
2Chronicles17:6 Akaba atatiina kukora ebi Mukama arikwenda. Yaataho n'okwiha omuri Buyuda obutungutungu n'ebishushani n'enyomyo za Ashera. 
2Chronicles17:7 Omu mwaka gwe gwa kashatu ari aha ngoma, akoohereza abategyeki be aba: Benihaili, Obadiya, Zekariya, Netaneeli na Mikaaya kwegyesa ab'omu ndembo za Buyuda." 
2Chronicles17:8 Yaabataho Abaleevi aba: Shemaaya, Netaniya, Zebadiya Asaheeli, Shemiramooti, Yehonatani, Adoniya, Toobiya na Tobadoniya. Kandi abo Balevi yaabataho abahongyerezi aba: Elishaama na Yehoraamu." 
2Chronicles17:9 Baayegyesa ab'omuri Buyuda, baine ekitabo ky'ebiragiro bya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles17:10 Reero Nyakubaho yaitsa obwoba abagabe boona ab'ensi ezeehinguririize Buyuda, tibaarwana ngamba na Yehoshafaati." 
2Chronicles17:11 Bamwe omu Bafilisiti bakareetera Yehoshafaati ebiconco, kandi baamushorera empiiha z'efeeza. Abaharabu nabo baamutoijera empaya z'entaama enkumi mushanju na magana mushanju, n'empaya z'embuzi enkumi mushanju na magana mushanju." 
2Chronicles17:12 Yehoshafati yaaguma naayeyongyera kugira obushoboorozi. Yaayombeka omuri Buyuda ebigo bigumire, n'endembo zirimu amabiikiro." 
2Chronicles17:13 Yaagira amabiikiro maingi omu ndembo za Yuda. Yaagira abaisherukare n'abashaija emanzi rugambwa omuri Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles17:14 Oku nikwo baahandiikirwe, nk'oku emiryango ya baishenkurubo eri. Omu Baayuda, abakuru b'engabo rukumi rukumi bakaba bari aba: omukuru waabo ari Aduna, aine abashaija emanzi rugambwa obusiriira bushatu." 
2Chronicles17:15 Owa kabiri ahariwe ari Yehohaanani, n'abashaija obusiriira bubiri n'enkumi munaana." 
2Chronicles17:16 Owa kashatu, ni Amasiya mwene Zikuri, owaayehaireyo kukora omurimo gwa Nyakubaho, aine abashaija amamanzi rugambwa obusiriira bubiri." 
2Chronicles17:17 Omu Baabenyamiini ni Eliyaada, omushaija emanzi rugambwa, aine abashaija obusiriira bubiri ab'amata n'engabo." 
2Chronicles17:18 Kandi orikukurataho ari Yehozabasi, n'abashaija akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi munaana, abeeteekateekyeire orugamba." 
2Chronicles17:19 Abo nibo baabaire nibaheereza omugabe, otabariiremu abu omugabe yaataire omu ndembo z'omuri Buyuda yoona ezirimu ebigo bigumire." 
2Chronicles18:1 Yehoshafaati akaba atungire munonga kandi aine ekitiinwa kingi. Yaaragaana na Ahabu okuguma nibashwererana. 
2Chronicles18:2 Ku haahingwireho emyaka, yaaza Samariya owa Ahabu. Ahabu yaamubaagira n'abu yaabaire aine entaama n'ente nyingi munonga, yaamwotereza kuhurura nawe kuteera Ramoti-Gileadi." 
2Chronicles18:3 Ahabu omugabe wa Isiraeli yaabuuza Yehoshafaati ati: Noija kuhurura naanye kuteera Ramoti-Gileadi? Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Nyowe naiwe turi bamwe, n'abantu bangye nibo baawe. Nitwija kukwatanisa naiwe omu rugamba." 
2Chronicles18:4 Yehoshafaati akagambira omugabe wa Isiraeli ati: Banza oyehanuuze ahari Nyakubaho, oreebe eki arikugamba." 
2Chronicles18:5 Omugabe wa Isiraeli atyo ateeranira hamwe abarangi magana ana, ababuuza ati: Tuhurure tuteere Ramoti-Gileadi, nari ndereere? Bamugarukamu bati: Nyakusinga, hurura! Ruhanga naija kugikurekurira ogisingure." 
2Chronicles18:6 Kwonka Yehoshafaati amubuuza ati: Beitu aha tihariho ondi murangi wa Mukama ou twakwehanuuzaho? 
2Chronicles18:7 Omugabe wa Isiraeli agira Yehoshafaati ati: Hakiriyo omuntu omwe ou twakwehanuuzisa ahari Nyakubaho: niwe Mikaaya mwene Imula. Kwonka timmwenda, ahabw'okuba tandagurira birungi, kureka obutoosha andagurira ebibi. Yehoshafaati amugarukamu ati: Nyakusinga, ekyo tokukigambire." 
2Chronicles18:8 Mpaho omugabe wa Isiraeli ayeta omukungu we, amugira ati: Ndeetera ahonaaho Mikaaya mwene Imula." 
2Chronicles18:9 Obwo omugabe wa Isiraeli na Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda bakaba basingami aha bitebe byabo by'obugabe bajwaire bushuuti zaabo. Bakaba bashutami omu mbuga, aha irembo rya Samariya; abarangi boona nibaragurira omu maisho gaabo." 
2Chronicles18:10 Reero Zedekiya mwene Kenaana yaayeheeshera amahembe g'ekyoma. Haza yaagira ati: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Aga mahembe nigo oraabingise Abasiriya okuhitsya obu oraabacwekyereze. 
2Chronicles18:11 N'abandi barangi boona baahanuura batyo. Baagira bati: Nyakusinga, irooko oteere Ramoti-Gileadi; haza osingure. Nyakubaho naija kugikurekurira ogisingure." 
2Chronicles18:12 Ou baatumire kweta Mikaaya ku yaamuhikire, yaamugira ati: Reeba, ebi abarangi baagamba byona byaragurira gye omugabe. Naiwe eki oraagambe kibe nk'ekyabo, ogambe ebirungi." 
2Chronicles18:13 Kwonka Mikaaya agira ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho, eki Ruhanga wangye arangambire, nikyo ndaagambe." 
2Chronicles18:14 Reero ku yaahikire omugabe, onu yaamubuuza ati: Mikaaya, tuhurure, tuteere Ramoti-Gileadi, nari ndereere? N'onu amugarukamu ati: Irooko ohurure, osingure! Nyakubaho naija kubakurekurira obasingure." 
2Chronicles18:15 Kwonka omugabe amugira ati: Niinyija kuherera hi kuguma ninkurahiza nti: Waaba nongambira omu iziina rya Nyakubaho, otagamba ekindi kureka amazima?" 
2Chronicles18:16 Onu amugira ati: Ndeebire Abaisiraeli boona bataataaniire omu nshozi, bari nk'entaama zitaine muriisa. Haza Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Aba tibaine mukama waabo. Buri omwe k'agarukye omu ka ye n'obusingye." 
2Chronicles18:17 Omugabe wa Isiraeli agira Yehoshafaati ati: Tinaakugira nti tarikwija kundagurira birungi, kureka ebibi?" 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikaaya amugira ati: Mbwenu hurira ekigambo kya Nyakubaho. Ndeebire Nyakubaho asingami aha kitebe kye ky'obugabe, amahe g'omu iguru goona geemereire aha rubaju rwe rwa buryo n'orwa bumosho." 
2Chronicles18:19 Nyakubaho abuuza ati: N'oha oraabeihabeihe Ahabu akahurura, haza akagwa Ramoti-Gileadi? Omwe agamba ekindi, n'ondiijo agamba ekindi." 
2Chronicles18:20 Bwanyima haahuruutukayo omutima, gwayemerera omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, gwagira guti: Niinye ndaamubeihabeihe. Mukama yaagugira ati: Noomubeihabeihesa ki?" 
2Chronicles18:21 Gwagarukamu guti: Niinyija kuzayo ngambise abarangi be boona ebishuba. N'onu agugira ati: Eego. Niiwe oraamubeihabeihe, okakibaasa. Mbwenu irooko, obe nikwo waagira." 
2Chronicles18:22 N'ahabw'ekyo Nyakubaho ataire omutima gw'ebishuba omu kanwa k'abarangi baawe aba. Nyakubaho akugambireho enkuru mbi. 
2Chronicles18:23 Mpaho Zedekiya mwene Kenaana yairira haihi, yaateera Mikaaya oruhi rw'omushaya, yaamugira ati: Mutima wa Nyakubaho andugireho ata kuza kugamba naiwe?" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaaya amugarukamu ati: Ekyo noija kukireeba aha izooba ri oraayesherekyereho omu kishengye ky'endugu. 
2Chronicles18:25 Omugabe wa Isiraeli nikwo kuragiira ati: Mukwate Mikaaya, mumugarure owa Amoni omutegyeki mukuru w'orurembo, n'omwinginya Yoashi," 
2Chronicles18:26 haza mubagambire muti: Omugabe yaagira ati: Mute eki kishaija omu kihome, mukihe ak'okurya kakye n'otwizi, okuhitsya obu ndaagarukye buhooro." 
2Chronicles18:27 Mikaaya amugira ati: Ku oraagarukye n'obusingye, biri Nyakubaho tiyangambisa. Agumizamu ati: Naimwe mwena ekyo mukihurire!" 
2Chronicles18:28 Omugabe wa Isiraeli na Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda baaza Ramoti-Gileadi. 
2Chronicles18:29 Omugabe wa Isiraeli agira Yehoshafaati ati: Nyowe naaza kwehindura okundi, nze aha rugamba. Kwonka iwe ogume ojwaire eby'obugabe. Omugabe wa Isiraeli atyo ayehindura okundi baza aha rugamba." 
2Chronicles18:30 Obwo omugabe wa Siriya ashangwa yaaragiire abakuru b'ebigaari bye ati: Mutarwanisa omuntu weena, nobu yaakuba omuto nari omukuru; kureka murwanise omugabe wa Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles18:31 Abakuru b'ebigaari ku baareebire Yehoshafaati, baateekateeka ngu niwe mugabe wa Isiraeli. Baaba niwe bahindukira kurwanisa. Yehoshafaati aborooga, na Mukama Ruhanga amujuna, abamwihaho." 
2Chronicles18:32 Mbwenu abakuru b'ebigaari ku baareebire ngu tiwe mugabe wa Isiraeli, baarereera kumubinga." 
2Chronicles18:33 Kwonka omushaija omwe yaafa okurasha omwambi, yaaguteera omugabe wa Isiraeli ahu ebijwaro bye by'okurwanisa n'eky'aha kufuba birikuteeranira. Omugabe nikwo kugira orikugyendesa ekigaari kye ati: Hinduka, onyihe omu rugamba, ahabw'okuba naahutaara." 
2Chronicles18:34 Eryo izooba orugamba rushaarira, omugabe wa Isiraeli aguma ayehigikire omu kigaari kye, naareeba ei Abasiriya bari okuhitsya omu mwabazyo. Reero eizooba ku ryabaire nirirengarenga, yaafa." 
2Chronicles19:1 Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda agaruka buhooro Yerusalemu omu kikaari kye. 
2Chronicles19:2 Omurangi Yehu mwene Hanani ku yaagiire kumubugana, yaamugira ati: Oshemereire kuha enyabibi emikono okakunda abarikwanga Nyakubaho? N'ahabw'ekyo Nyakubaho akwiniire ekiniga kingi." 
2Chronicles19:3 Kwonka nobu oraabe ori otyo, tobuzirwemu karungi. Manya okaiha omu nsi enyomyo z'okuramizaho Ashera, kandi waata omutima aha kukora ebi Ruhanga arikwenda." 
2Chronicles19:4 Yehoshafaati akatuura Yerusalemu, kandi yaagyendagyenda omu bantu okuruga Beerisheba okuhika omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu; yaabagarura ahari Mukama Ruhanga wa baishebo." 
2Chronicles19:5 Akata abaramuzi omuri egyo nsi, omu ndembo za Yuda zoona ezeehinguririziibwe ebigo bigumire; ataine rurembo ru atsigireyo." 
2Chronicles19:6 Yaagambira abaramuzi ati: Mwetegyereze eki murikukora. Manya ou murikuramurira ti muntu, kureka ni Nyakubaho; kandi ku muba nimucwa emanja, aba abaine." 
2Chronicles19:7 Mbwenu nu mugume mutiine Nyakubaho, mute omutima aha bi murikukora; ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waitu taita manja, tagwera rubaju, kandi tarya nguzi." 
2Chronicles19:8 Reero omuri Yerusalemu Yehoshafaati akatamu Abaleevi, n'abahongyerezi, n'abakuru b'emiryango y'Abaisiraeli, kuguma nibaramurira Mukama, n'okushoboorora abarikutongana. Bakaba batuura Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles19:9 Yaabeehanangiriza ati: Mutiine Nyakubaho muri abeesigwa, kandi mwihire aha mutima." 
2Chronicles19:10 Beene waanyu abatwire omu ndembo ku baribareetera emanja z'okwitana, z'okuhenda ebiragiro n'ebyatairweho, nari ebyaragiirwe, mubahabure, batakaayereetera orubanja omu maisho ga Nyakubaho. Haza imwe nabo akabagirira ekiniga kingi. Mugume mukore mutyo, murekye kwereetera orubanja." 
2Chronicles19:11 Mbwenu reeba, Amariya omuhongyerezi omukuru niwe araagume naabareeberera omuri byona ebikwatiraine na Nyakubaho. Reero Zebadiya, mwene Ishimaeli, omutegyeki mukuru w'ab'omuryango gwa Daudi, abareeberere omuri byona ebikwatiraine n'omugabe. Abaleevi babaheereze bari abantu bakuru. Mukore n'obumanzi, kandi Nyakubaho agume n'abarikukora ebihikire." 
2Chronicles20:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Abamoabu, n'Abaamoni n'ab'omu Bameuni, baahurura kurwanisa Yehoshafaati." 
2Chronicles20:2 Abantu baija baagambira Yehoshafaati bati: Eihe rihango ryaija kukuteera, niriruga Edomu seeri y'enyanja. Hati bari Hazazonitamari (niyo Engedi)." 
2Chronicles20:3 Yehoshafaati yaatiina munonga, yaayehayo kushaba Mukama, kandi yaarangirira ku ab'omuri Buyuda yoona beesiibyakwo." 
2Chronicles20:4 Abaayuda nabo baateeranira hamwe kushaba Nyakubaho kubaha emikono. Baaruga omu ndembo za Buyuda zoona, baija kweshengyereza Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles20:5 Reero Yehoshafaati yaayemerera ahu Abaayuda n'Abaayerusalemu bateeraniire, omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, omu maisho g'ekibuga ekisya." 
2Chronicles20:6 Yaashaba ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa baatatenkuriitwe, tiiwe oba Ruhanga ow'omu iguru? Tiiwe otegyeka abagabe b'omu mahanga goona? Manya niiwe ogira amaani n'obushoboorozi, hatagire n'omwe owaakugungira." 
2Chronicles20:7 Ai Ruhanga waitu, tiiwe waabingire abatuuzi b'omuri egi nsi, bakahigiza abantu baawe Abaisiraeli; kandi okagiha baijukuru ba Aburahamu munywani waawe kuba eyaabo ebiro byona?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Nabo bakagituuramu, bakakwombekyeramu Nyaruju kukuramizamu, nibagira bati:" 
2Chronicles20:9 Ku turiizirwa akabi twahikwaho ekifubiro, nari orufu, nainga enjara, turyayemerera omu maisho ga Nyaruju egi omu maisho gaawe, ahabw'okuba nimwo oramizibwa; tukutakire turi omu naku. Haza otuhurire, otujune." 
2Chronicles20:10 Mbwenu reeba, Abaamoni n'Abamoabu n'ab'omu Rushozi rwa Seiri, abu otaraikiriize Baisiraeli kubateera obu baaruga omu nsi ya Misiri, nabo bakabeetantara, bakareka kubacwekyereza." 
2Chronicles20:11 Mbwenu hati eki barikutuzimuurira n'okwija kutubinga omu butaka bwaitu obu waatuhaire kuba obwaitu bw'empungurano. 
2Chronicles20:12 Ai Ruhanga waitu, tobafubira? Manya itwe titwine maani kurwanisa egi migogo yaija kututeera. Titurikumanya n'eki turaakore; kureka niiwe tuhangire amaisho." 
2Chronicles20:13 Ago magingo Abaayuda boona ku baabaire beemereire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, n'abeereere baabo, n'abakazi baabo, n'abaana baabo," 
2Chronicles20:14 Mutima wa Nyakubaho yaijura Yahazieli, mwene Zekariya, mwijukuru wa Benaaya, Benaaya ya Yeieli, Yeieli ya Mataniya, Omuleevi w'Abaasafu, ahagati y'abateeraniire aho." 
2Chronicles20:15 Yaagira ati: Yaimwe mwena Abaayuda, n'abatwire omuri Yerusalemu, naiwe Omugabe Yehoshafaati, nimuhurire! Nyakubaho naabagira ati: Mutatiina, kandi egi migogo etabahahaaza omutima; ahabw'okuba oru rugamba ti rwanyu, n'orwa Ruhanga." 
2Chronicles20:16 Nyencakare mushuume, mubarwanise. Reeba, nibaija kwinamukira aharikutembera Ziizi, mubashangye aha muheru gw'oruhanga rwa burugwa-izooba bw'eihamba rya Yerueli." 
2Chronicles20:17 Timurikwija kwetenga kurwana omuri orwo rugamba. Ekyanyu n'okuza omu myanya yaanyu mukaguma mwemereire, haza mukaareeba oku Nyakubaho yaabasingurira orugamba. Imwe Baayuda 'mwe, n'Abaayerusalemu, mutatiina, kandi mutahahaara. Nyencakare muhurure, mubateere. Nyakubaho naija kuba hamwe naimwe." 
2Chronicles20:18 Ebyo ku byahwaire Yehoshafaati yaajuumara aha nsi; Abaayuda boona n'abatuuzi b'omuri Yerusalemu nabo baajumara aha nsi omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, baamuramya." 
2Chronicles20:19 Abaleevi ab'omu Baakoohati n'ab'omu Baakora, baayemerera kuhimbisa Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, nibateera akaari." 
2Chronicles20:20 Abaayuda bakaimuka kare omu kasheeshe, baaza omu ihamba rya Tekoa. Ku baabaire nibakiimutsya orugyendo, Yehoshafaati yaayemerera, yaabagira ati: Imwe Baayuda 'mwe, n'abatuuzi b'omuri Yerusalemu, nimumpurire! Mwesigye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, nibwo muraahame. Mwikirize eby'abarangi be, nibwo muraasingure." 
2Chronicles20:21 Reero ku yaaherize kuhanuura n'abantu, yaataho ab'okweshongorera Nyakubaho, nibamuhimbisa, bajwaire ebijwaro by'aha biro birikwera, beebembeire eihe nibeeshongora bati: Musiime Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba rukundo ye etahararuka eba ey'ebiro byona." 
2Chronicles20:22 Haza ku baatandikire bati kweshongora n'okuhimbisa Nyakubaho, yaataho ab'okugwera Abaamoni, n'Abamoabu n'ab'omu Rushozi Seiri, abaizire kurwanisa Abaayuda, yaabarabanisamu." 
2Chronicles20:23 Ahabw'okuba Abaamoni n'Abaamoabu bakagurukira abatuuzi b'omu Rushozi Seiri, baabaita, baabahezaho. Reero ku baaherize kucwekyereza abatwire Seiri, boona oku batura, baacenjana." 
2Chronicles20:24 Abaayuda ku baahikire omu ihamba aha munaara ogurangizibwaho abazigu, baanaga amaisho ei eihe riri, baareeba emitumbi erambiriraine aha nsi, hataine ohonokireho." 
2Chronicles20:25 Yehoshafaati n'abe ku baizire kubaaya, baashangayo amatungo maingi munonga, n'ebintu, n'eby'okujwara, n'eby'obuguzi bwingi ebi baayeeyayiire bikabaremeraho. Ahabw'okuba bingi munonga, baamara ebiro bishatu nibabyaya." 
2Chronicles20:26 Aha kiro kya kana bakateeranira omu ruhanga rwa Beraaka, baahimbisizayo Nyakubaho. Okwiha obwo omwanya ogwo gwaguma nigwetwa Oruhanga rwa Beraaka, okuhitsya n'eri izooba." 
2Chronicles20:27 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Abaayuda boona, n'Abaayerusalemu, na Yehoshafaati abeebembeire, baagaruka Yerusalemu bashemereirwe, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akabaha okweraatira abazigu baabo." 
2Chronicles20:28 Baahika Yerusalemu omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho nibateera amagobore n'ebidongo n'amakondere. 
2Chronicles20:29 Abagabe b'omu nsi zoona ku baahuriire ngu Nyakubaho arwaniise abazigu b'Abaisiraeli, baatiina Ruhanga." 
2Chronicles20:30 Obugabe bwa Yehoshafaati bwaguma bwine eihoreere, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga we akamuha obuhuumure embaju zoona." 
2Chronicles20:31 Oku nikwo Yehoshafaati yaategyekire Buyuda. Akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka ashatu n'etaano y'obukuru, yaategyekyera emyaka abiri n'etaano omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Azuuba, ari muhara wa Shiluhi." 
2Chronicles20:32 Akatwaza nka Asa ishe, tiyaagira bu ateishukire. Yaaguma naakora ebirikusiimwa Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles20:33 Kwonka shi, taraihireho butungutungu, ahabw'okuba abantu bakaba batakataire mutima aha kuramya Ruhanga wa baishebo." 
2Chronicles20:34 Ebindi ebi Yehoshafaati yaakozire, okwiha aha kutandika okuhitsya aha muheru, bihandiikirwe omu by'omu busingye bwa Yehu mwene Hanani, ebyahandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'Abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles20:35 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Omugabe Yehoshafaati owa Yuda akakwatanisa na Ahaziya omugabe wa Isiraeli, owaakozire ebibi bingi." 
2Chronicles20:36 Yaakwatanisa nawe kukora emeeri z'okuza Tarushiishi, baazikorera omuri Ezionigeberi." 
2Chronicles20:37 Eliezeri mwene Dodavahu owa Mareesha, nikwo kuragurira kubi Yehoshafaati, akamugira ati: Ahabw'okweteerana na Ahaziya, Nyakubaho naija kucwekyereza eki mukozire. Ezo meeri zityo zicwekyera aha nyanja, ziremwa kuza Tarushiishi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Yehoshafaati akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru, yaaziikwa ahi baaziikire baishenkuru omu rurembo rwa Daudi, omutabani Yehoraamu yaamuhungurira aha ngoma." 
2Chronicles21:2 Yehoraamu akaba aine abarumuna Azariya, Yehieli, Zekariya, Azariya, Mikaeli na Shefatiya; boona bari batabani ba Yehoshafaati omugabe wa Yuda." 
2Chronicles21:3 Ishebo akabaha ebintu bingi: efeeza, ezaabu n'ebindi bintu by'obuguzi bwingi. Yaabaha n'endembo z'omuri Buyuda z'ebigo bigumire. Kwonka obugabe yaabuha Yehoraamu, ahabw'okuba omujigaijo." 
2Chronicles21:4 Yehoraamu ku yaaherize kuhungurira ishe aha ngoma, yaahama, yaitsa abarumuna boona rurara, n'abandi bategyeki b'omuri Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles21:5 Yehoraamu obu yaaza aha ngoma akaba aine emyaka makumi ashatu n'ebiri y'obukuru, yaategyekyera emyaka munaana omuri Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles21:6 Yaakuratira emitwarize y'abagabe ba Isiraeli, nk'oku ab'omuryango gwa Ahabu baakozire. Ahabw'okuba akaba ashweire muhara wa Ahabu, kandi akozire ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles21:7 Kwonka shi Mukama, ahabw'eki yaaraganiise Daudi, tiyaacwekyereza b'omuryango gwe, ahabw'okuba akaba amuraganiise ku we n'abaijukuru obugabe bwabo butarihwaho." 
2Chronicles21:8 Omu busingye bwa Yehoraamu, Abaedomu bakagomera Abaayuda, baayeteeraho omugabe waabo." 
2Chronicles21:9 Yehoraamu nikwo kwambuka aine abakuru b'engabo n'ebigaari bye byona, akaimuka nyekiro aine abakuru b'ebigaari bye, akateera Abanyaedomu abaabaire bamwehinguririize." 
2Chronicles21:10 Abanyaedomu nikwo baagomeire batyo Abaayuda, okuhitsya n'eri izooba. Omuri obwo bunaku Libuna nayo yaamugomera, ahabw'okuba akaba atsigireho Mukama Ruhanga wa baishenkuru." 
2Chronicles21:11 Ekindi, akaba ataire obutungutungu omu nsi ya Yuda ey'ebibungo, areeteire abatuuzi b'omuri Yerusalemu kuramya ebishushani, kandi ahabiise Abaayuda." 
2Chronicles21:12 Omurangi Eliya nikwo kumuhandiikira ebaruha erikugira eti: Mukama Ruhanga wa Daudi shoimwe naakugira ati: Nk'oku otakuratiire mitwarize ya Yehoshafaati shoimwe, nobu yaakuba eya Asa omugabe wa Buyuda," 
2Chronicles21:13 kureka otooreize emicwe y'abagabe ba Isiraeli, waareetera Abaayuda n'abatuuzi b'omuri Yerusalemu okutaba beesigwa, nk'ab'omuryango gwa Ahabu oku baareeteire Abaisiraeli okutaba beesigwa; waataho n'okwita barumuna baawe ab'enda ya sho, abaabaire nibakuhita;" 
2Chronicles21:14 nikyo Nyakubaho arikwija kwitsiza abantu baawe, n'abaana baawe, n'abakazi baawe, n'amatungo gaawe orufu." 
2Chronicles21:15 Naiwe noija kukwatwa endwara mbi y'omu mara, okuhitsya obu oraareete omwoyo." 
2Chronicles21:16 Mpaho Nyakubaho yaimukiiriza Abafilisiti n'Abaharabu, abahereraine n'Abaetiopiya, kugirira Yehoraamu ekiniga." 
2Chronicles21:17 Baahurura kurwanisa Buyuda, baagiteera, baanyaga amatungo goona n'ebi baashangire omu kikaari ky'omugabe, n'abaana be, n'abakazi be; tiyaatsigaza mutabani n'omwe, kureka Yehoahazi bucuranda." 
2Chronicles21:18 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Nyakubaho yaamurwaza omu mara endwara etarikukira." 
2Chronicles21:19 Obunaku ku bwahikire, hahingwireho emyaka ebiri, egyo ndwara yaamureetesa omwoyo, yaafa aine obusaasi bwingi. Abantu be tibaamuhembera muriro gw'okumuhaisa ekitiinwa, nk'oku baaguhembeire baishenkuru." 
2Chronicles21:20 Yehoraamu ogwo obu yaaza aha ngoma akaba aine emyaka makumi ashatu n'ebiri y'obukuru; yaategyekyera omuri Yerusalemu emyaka munaana; yaafa ataine orikumusaasibwa. Baamuziika omu rurembo rwa Daudi, kwonka ti mu bituuro by'abagabe." 
2Chronicles22:1 Abatuuzi b'omuri Yerusalemu bakeemeka Ahaziya, mutabani wa Yehoraamu bucuranda, yaamuhungurira aha ngoma. Manya omutwe gw'abantu abaizire hamwe n'Abaharabu omu rusiisira gukaba gwitsire abatabani boona abakuru. Ahaziya mutabani wa Yehoraamu nikwo kuba omugabe." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahaziya akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka makumi ana n'ebiri y'obukuru; yaamara omwaka gumwe omuri Yerusalemu naategyeka. Nyina akaba naayetwa Ataliya, mwijukuru wa Omuri." 
2Chronicles22:3 Ahaziya nawe akakuratira emitwarize y'ab'omuryango gwa Ahabu, ahabw'okuba nyina niwe yaabaire naamuha obwengye bubi." 
2Chronicles22:4 Akakora ebi Nyakubaho atarikusiima, nk'oku ab'omuryango gwa Ahabu baabikozire. Manya ishe ku yaaherize kufa, baaba nibo baamuha obwengye bw'okumushiisha." 
2Chronicles22:5 Okumanya ku yaakuratiire obwengye bwabo, akahurura na Yoramu mutabani wa Ahabu omugabe wa Isiraeli kurwanisiza Hazaeli omugabe wa Siriya Ramoti-Giledai; Abasiriya baahutaaza Yoramu." 
2Chronicles22:6 Yaagaruka Yezereeli kutambirirwayo obuhuta obu yaahutaariire Raama naarwana orugamba na Hazaeli omugabe wa Siriya. Reero Ahaziya mwene Yehoraamu omugabe wa Yuda yaaza Yezereeli kureeba Yoramu mwene Ahabu, arwaire." 
2Chronicles22:7 Kwonka Ruhanga yaashangwa akitebeekaniise ngu Ahaziya ku araaze kutaayaayira Yoramu agweyo. Manya ku yaagiireyo, yaashohora na Yoramu kubugana Yehu mwene Nimushi ou Nyakubaho yaabaire asiigire amajuta kucwekyerereza ab'omuryango gwa Ahabu." 
2Chronicles22:8 Mbwenu Yehu ku yaabaire ari aha murimo gw'okufubira ab'omuryango gwa Ahabu, yaabugana abategyeki ba Buyuda na batabani ba bakuru ba Ahaziya batabaariire Ahaziya, yaabaita." 
2Chronicles22:9 Abashaija ba Yehu baaza kusherura Ahaziya, baamushanga Samariya ayesherekire, baamukwata, baamureetera Yehu, yaamwita. Baamuziika, ahabw'okuba bakagira bati: Ni mwijukuru wa Yehoshafaati owaabaire akundira kimwe kukora ebi Nyakubaho arikwenda. Reero omu b'omurayango gwa Ahaziya haaburamu orikubaasa kutwara engoma." 
2Chronicles22:10 Ataliya nyina wa Ahaziya, ku yaareebire omutabani yaafa, yaimuka, yaacwekyereza ab'enda y'omugabe wa Buyuda boona." 
2Chronicles22:11 Kwonka Yehoshaabeati, muhara w'omugabe, yaacwisa Yoashi mwene Ahaziya naamwiha omuri batabani b'omugabe abaabaire barangariire kwitwa, we n'omurezi we yaabashereka omu kishengye ky'omuri Nyaruju ekiraarwamu. Yehoshabeati, muhara w'omugabe Yehoraamu, kandi muka Yehoyaada omuhongyerezi, ahabw'okushangwa ari munyaanya wa Ahaziya, yaamushereka Ataliya, onu tiyaamwita." 
2Chronicles22:12 Yoashi ogwo yaaguma nabo okumara emyaka mukaaga bamusherekire omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, Ataliya ari omugabekazi w'egyo nsi." 
2Chronicles23:1 Omu mwaka gwa mushanju Yehoyaada akeerugamu, yaaragaana n'abakuru b'engabo igana-igana aba: Azariya mwene Yerohaamu, Ishimaeli mwene Yehohaanani, Azariya mwene Obedi, Maaseya mwene Adayiiya, na Elifati mwene Zikuri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Baagyenda oku n'oku omuri Buyuda, baateeranira hamwe Abaleevi nibabaiha omu ndembo za Yuda zoona, hamwe n'abakuru b'emiryango y'Abaisiraeli, baija Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles23:3 Abaateeraniire aho boona baakora endagaano n'omugabe bari omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga. Yehoyaada yaabagira ati: Mutabani w'omugabe ngugu! K'abe niwe yaaza aha ngoma, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaraganiise kukikorera beene Daudi." 
2Chronicles23:4 Mbwenu eki nikyo muraakore: omuriimwe abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi abarikwija aha murimo ahari Sabato, kimwe kya kashatu babe abakumiirizi b'aha marembo," 
2Chronicles23:5 kimwe kya kashatu barinde ekikaari ky'omugabe, kandi kimwe kya kashatu barinde aha Irembo ry'obuhamizo. Reero abandi boona baze omu bibuga bya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles23:6 Hatagira owaataaha omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, kureka abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi abarikuheereza. Bo nibaikirizibwa kutaahamu, ahabw'okuba n'abarikwera. Kwonka abandi bantu boona batakora eki Nyakubaho yaazibiire." 
2Chronicles23:7 Abaleevi barinde omugabe bamwehinguririize, buri omwe akwaitse eby'okurwanisa bye. Reero weena oraataahe omuri Nyaruju, aitwe. Mugume n'omugabe, yaaba naataaha nari naashohora." 
2Chronicles23:8 Abaleevi n'Abaayuda boona baakora nk'oku Yehoyaada omuhongyerezi yaabaragiira. Buri omwe yaija n'abantu be abarikuruga aha murimo ahari Sabato n'abarikuguzaho; ahabw'okuba Yehoyaada omuhongyerezi taraihireho mbu zaabo. 
2Chronicles23:9 Reero Yehoyaada omuhongyerezi yaakwatsa abakuru b'amahe amacumu n'engabo empango n'enkye eby'Omugabe Daudi ebirikurindirwa omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga. 
2Chronicles23:10 Yaataho abantu boona kurinda omugabe, buri omwe akwaitse eby'okurwanisa bye, okwiha aha rubaju rwa buryo orwa Nyaruju, okuta aha rwa bumosho, beehinguririize eitambiro na Nyaruju." 
2Chronicles23:11 Bwanyima yaashohoza mutabani w'omugabe, yaamujweka ekirunga, yaamukwatsa eby'obuhamya, baarangirira ku yaaba omugabe; kandi Yehoyaada n'abatabani baamusiiga amajuta. Boona baateera akaari bati: Karamaare Nyakusinga!" 
2Chronicles23:12 Ataliya ku yaahuriire endigito y'abantu abarikwiruka nibahaisa omugabe, yaaza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ahu abantu bateeraniire." 
2Chronicles23:13 Ku yaanagireyo ati amaisho, yaareeba omugabe ayemereire aha nyomyo y'abagabe ey'orugambiro aha muryango, abakuru b'amahe n'abakondere bamwehinguririize, n'abantu b'omuri egyo nsi boona nibeesiima, nibateera amakondere, n'abeeshongozi bakwaitse ebirikujumeeza amaraka, nibeebembera ab'omuri ogwo mukoro; Ataliya atyo ataagura ebi ajwaire, aborooga ati: Mwandeebya! Mwandeebya!" 
2Chronicles23:14 Reero Yehoyaada omuhongyerezi areeta abakuru b'eihe, abagira ati: Mumushohoze, nimumurabya ahagati y'emishorongo y'abarinzi; weena oraamukuratire, mumwite. Manya ogwo muhongyerezi akabeehanangiriza ati: Mutaitira Ataliya omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles23:15 Nabo baamukwata, baamurabya aharikutaahirwa omu Irembo ry'embaraasi, omu Kikaari ky'omugabe, baamwitiraho." 
2Chronicles23:16 Reero Yehoyaada akakora endagaano n'abantu boona, n'omugabe, kuba abantu ba Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles23:17 Bwanyima abantu boona baaza aha ndaaro ya Baali, baagisheenya, baashenyagura n'amatambiro ge n'ebishushani bye. Kandi baitira Mataani omuhongyerezi wa Baali omu maisho g'amatambiro." 
2Chronicles23:18 Yehoyaada yaataho ab'okurinda Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, nibareebererwa abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi abu Daudi yaatebeekaniise kuguma nibareeberera Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, kutambira Mukama ebitambo bicwekize, nk'oku kihandiikirwe omu biragiro bya Musa, nibeesiima kandi nibeeshongora, nk'oku Daudi yaaragiire." 
2Chronicles23:19 Akata abakumiirizi aha marembo ga Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho kuzibira omuntu weena otashemeire omu muringo gwona kutaahamu. 
2Chronicles23:20 Bwanyima akeeta abakuru b'amahe n'abakungu n'abategyeki bakuru, n'abantu boona ab'omuri egyo nsi, baiha omugabe omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, baamurabya omu Irembo rya ruguru, baamuta omu kikaari ky'omugabe, baamusingamya aha kitebe ky'obugabe." 
2Chronicles23:21 Abantu b'omu nsi egyo boona baashemererwa; orurembo rwagira eihoreere, Ataliya baharize kumwita." 
2Chronicles24:1 Yoashi akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka mushanju y'obukuru; yaategyekyera emyaka makumi ana omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Zibiya owa Beerisheba. 
2Chronicles24:2 Yoashi ogwo akakora ebirikusiimwa Nyakubaho ebiro byona ebi yaamazire ari hamwe na Yehoyaada, omuhongyerezi." 
2Chronicles24:3 Yehoyaada akamushwererera abakazi babiri, yaabazaaraho abatabani n'abahara." 
2Chronicles24:4 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Yoashi yaamariirira kuhunduuza Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles24:5 Yaateeranira hamwe abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi, yaabagira ati: Nimwirooko muze omu ndembo za Yuda, murundaane empiiha nimuziiha aha Baisiraeli boona, kuhunduuza Nyaruju ya Ruhanga waanyu, buri mwaka, kandi mureebe ngu ekyo kintu mwakirahutsya. Kwonka Abaleevi baakyegandaho." 
2Chronicles24:6 Omugabe nikwo kweta Yehoyaada omukuru waabo, akamugira ati: Ahabw'enki otateire Abaleevi omuhimbo kwiha omu Baayuda n'ab'omuri Yerusalemu emitoijo ei Musa omugaragwa wa Mukama yaaragiire eihanga ry'Abaisiraeli kureeta ahabw'Eihema ry'eby'Obuhamya?" 
2Chronicles24:7 Manya batabani ba Ataliya, ogwo mukazi enyabibi, bakafumura Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, ebyamwo byona ebyahongyeirwe Nyakubaho baabikoresa nibaramya Baabaali." 
2Chronicles24:8 Omugabe atyo aragiira abantu, bakora eshanduukye, bagita aheeru, aha irembo rya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles24:9 Barangirira omuri Buyuda n'omuri Yerusalemu ku abantu boona bareetera Nyakubaho emitoijo ei Musa omugaragwa wa Ruhanga yaaragiire Abaisiraeli bari omu ihamba. 
2Chronicles24:10 Abategyeki n'abantu boona baashemererwa, baaguma nibareeta emitoijo yaabo nibaginaga omu shanduukye, okuhitsya obu baagiherizeyo." 
2Chronicles24:11 Abaleevi ku baabaire bareetera abakungu b'omugabe egyo shanduukye, baashanga erimu empiiha nyingi, omuhandiiki w'omugabe n'omujwekyerwa w'omuhongyerezi omukuru baija baziihamu zoona; bagitwara bagigarura omu mwanya gwayo. Baaguma nibakora batyo buri izooba. Haza baarundaana empiiha nyingi munonga." 
2Chronicles24:12 Omugabe na Yehoyaada baazikwatsa abarikureeberera omurimo gw'okuhunduuza Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Nabo baaragaana n'abombeki n'ababaizi, n'abarikuheesha eby'ebyoma n'eby'emiringa, kuhunduuza Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles24:13 Batyo abaakwatsiibwe ogwo murimo baagukora n'amaani, baagumizamu nibahunduuza okuhitsya obu Nyaruju ya Ruhanga baagigarwire aha buteeka, bakagihamya." 
2Chronicles24:14 Ku baagiherize baaretera omugabe na Yehoyaada empiiha ezaatsigaireho. Nabo baazikoresa ebintu by'omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ebikoresibwa nibaramya nari nibatamba ebitambo bicwekize; n'ebyokwotereraho obubaani, n'ebindi bintu eby'ezaabu n'eby'efeeza. Mpaho baaguma nibatambira ebitambo bicwekize omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, Yehoyaada akiriho." 
2Chronicles24:15 Kwonka Yehoyaada akakura, yaahika omu ngingo za bukuru, yaarugaho yaafa ahikize emyaka igana na makumi ashatu y'obukuru." 
2Chronicles24:16 Baamuziika omu rurembo rwa Daudi ei baziika abagabe, ahabw'okuba akaba akoreire Ruhanga na Nyaruju ye ebirungi omu Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles24:17 Yehoyaada ku yaafiire, abategyeki ba Buyuda baija, baatangirira omugabe; nawe yaabatega okutu kuhurira ebi barikumugambira." 
2Chronicles24:18 Baatsigisibwa okuramiza omuri Nyaruju ya Mukama Ruhanga wa baishebo, baaramya ebishushani bya Ashera n'ebindi bishushani ebirikuramibwa. Ahabw'ekicumuro kyabo ekyo, Nyakubaho yaagirira Abaayuda n'aba Yerusalemu ekiniga kingi." 
2Chronicles24:19 Kwonka yaabatumaho abarangi kubagarura ahari Nyakubaho, haza bo tibaakyeetaho." 
2Chronicles24:20 Bwanyima Mutima wa Ruhanga akaijura Zekariya, mutabani wa Yehoyaada omuhongyerezi, yaayemerera eruguru y'abantu, yaabagambira ati: Ruhanga naagira ati: Ahabw'enki nimuhenda ebiragiro bya Nyakubaho, mukeebuza okuba gye? Mbwenu ahabw'okuba mwimwire Nyakubaho, nawe nikyo yaabatsigiraho." 
2Chronicles24:21 Kwonka bo baamugirira enaama mbi. Omugabe yaabaragiira, baamuteerera amabaare omu kibuga kya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles24:22 Omugabe Yoashi tiyaijuka mbabazi ezi Yehoyaada ishe wa Zekariya yaamugiriire, kureka yaita omutabani. Zekariya ku yaabaire naafa, yaagira ati: Eki, Nyakubaho abura kukireeba, akabahoora!" 
2Chronicles24:23 Aha muheru gw'ogwo mwaka eihe ry'Abasiriya rikahurura, ryateera Yoashi. Baija Buyuda na Yerusalemu, baita abategyeki b'omuri abo bantu, kandi ebi baabanyagire byona baabitwekyera omugabe wa Damasiko." 
2Chronicles24:24 Eihe ry'Abasiriya, nobu ryahurwire riine engabo nkye, kwonka Nyakubaho akaribaasisa kusingura eihe rihango munonga; ahabw'okuba Abaayuda bakaba baimwire Mukama Ruhanga wa baishebo. Okwo nikwo Yoashi yaahairwe ekiheneso." 
2Chronicles24:25 Abasiriya ku baamurugireho, baatsiga ahutaire munonga, abagaragwa be baamugiira omu naama, baamwitira aha kitanda kye, nibamutura okwita mwene Yehoyaada omuhongyerezi. Atyo yaafa; baamuziika omu rurembo rwa Daudi; kwonka tibaamuziika mu bituuro by'abagabe." 
2Chronicles24:26 Abaamugiiriire omu naama mbi ni Zabadi mwene Shimeati Omuamonikazi, na Yehozabadi mutabani wa Shimuriti Omumoabukazi." 
2Chronicles24:27 Eby'abatabani n'ebi abarangi baamurangiire, n'eby'okwombeka busya Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ekirikushoboorora eby'Abagabe. Bwanyima omutabani Amaziya akamuhungurira." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amaziya akaba omugabe aine emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano y'obukuru; yaategyekyera emyaka makumi abiri na mwenda omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Yehoadini owa Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles25:2 Amaziya akakora ebi Nyakubaho arikusiima, kwonka atabiteeraireho kimwe omutima." 
2Chronicles25:3 Ku yaaherize kuhama aha ngoma, yaita abagaragwa be abaitsire ishe." 
2Chronicles25:4 Kwonka tiyaita baana baabo, ahabw'okushangwa naakuratira ekihandiikirwe omu biragiro by'omu kitabo kya Musa, ebi Nyakubaho yaaragiriiremu ati: Baishe b'abaana batariitwa ahabw'abaana baabo; n'abaana batariitwa ahabwa baishebo. Kureka omuntu weena aitwe naaturwa ekibi kye." 
2Chronicles25:5 Bwanyima Amaziya akateeranira hamwe Abaayuda, yaabatebeekanisa nk'oku emiryango ya baishenkurubo eri, nibategyekwa abakuru b'engabo rukumi-rukumi n'aba igana-igana; ahabw'Abaayuda n'Ababenyamiini boona. Yaabatooranamu abahikize emyaka makumi abiri n'okukiraho, yaashanga nibahika abashaija entoore obusiriira bushatu, abahikire kurwana orugamba, kandi abarikubaasa kurwanisa amacumu n'engabo." 
2Chronicles25:6 Yaataho n'okuguriirira abashaija b'omu Baisiraeli akasiriira kamwe, emanzi rugambwa, kiloguraamu enkumi ina na magana ana na makumi munaana z'efeeza." 
2Chronicles25:7 Kwonka omuntu wa Ruhanga akaija yaamugira ati: Nyakusinga, otaikiriza eihe ry'Abaisiraeli kuhurura naiwe, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho tari hamwe nabo, nk'oku atari hamwe na Baefuraimu boona." 
2Chronicles25:8 Ku oraateekateekye ngu nibwo oraagire amaani g'okurwana orugamba, Ruhanga naija kukurekurira abazigu baawe bakusingure; ahabw'okuba Ruhanga niwe aine obushoboorozi bw'okusinguza omuntu, n'obw'okumureka akasingurwa." 
2Chronicles25:9 Amaziya yaabuuza ogwo muntu wa Ruhanga ati: Mbwenu shi, ngire nta kiloguramu enkumi ina na magana ana na makumi mukaaga ezimpaire ab'eihe ry'Abaisiraeli? Omuntu wa Ruhanga yaamugarukamu ati: Nyakubaho naabaasa kukuha ezirikukira ezo." 
2Chronicles25:10 Amaziya nawe ab'eihe ryamwizireho niriruga omu nsi ya Efuraimu abaragiira kugaruka owaabo. Haza bagwerwa kubi munonga Abaayuda, bagarukayo owaabo ekiniga nikyenda kubaita." 
2Chronicles25:11 Kwonka Amaziya aguma, ahuruza abantu be, aza omu ruhanga rw'omwonyo, aitirayo Abanyaseiri akakumi kamwe." 
2Chronicles25:12 Abaayuda nabo bakwata abandi bashaija kakumi, babatwara aha mutwe gw'ekikondokondo babooha, boona beetuura aha nsi, bacwagurika." 
2Chronicles25:13 Kwonka abashaija b'eihe riri, abu Amaziya yaagarwireyo akanga kuhurura nabo, bakateera endembo za Yuda, okwiha Samariya okuhika Betihorooni, baita abantu baamwo enkumi ishatu, kandi baanyaga eminyago mingi." 
2Chronicles25:14 Amaziya ku yaarugire kwita Abanyaedomu, yaareeta baaruhanga b'Abanyaseiri, yaabeemereza aharikureebwa kuba baaruhanga be. Yaabaramya, yaataho n'okubatambira ebitambo bicwekize." 
2Chronicles25:15 Nyakubaho nikwo kugirira Amaziya ekiniga kingi, akamutumaho omurangi owaamugizire ati: Ahabw'enki oyehongyeire baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga, abaaremirwe kujuna abantu baabo, kubaiha omu mikono yaawe?" 
2Chronicles25:16 Kwonka ku yaabaire naakigamba, omugabe yaamugira ati: Turakutaireho kuba omuhabuzi w'omugabe? Hunama! Mbwenu oitirwe ki? Ogwo murangi ahunama. Kwonka agira ati: Mbwenu naamanya ku Ruhanga amaririire kukucwekyereza, ahabw'okuba okozire ekyo kintu kandi waayanga kwikiriza eki naakuhabura." 
2Chronicles25:17 Bwanyima Amaziya omugabe wa Buyuda ku yaaherize kuza omu naama n'abahabuzi be, yaatuma ahari Yehoashi mwene Yehoahazi, mwijukuru wa Yehu, omugabe wa Isiraeli, naamuhaya ati: Rugayo twereebanire akaso omu kandi." 
2Chronicles25:18 Yehoashi omugabe wa Isiraeli nawe yaatuma ahari Amaziya omugabe wa Yuda ati: Omutojo gwa Lebanooni gukatuma ahari kaarwenda yaayo guti: Ha mutabani wangye muhara waawe, amushwere. Haza enyamaishwa y'omuri Lebanooni ku yaabaire neerabaho, yaaribatiirira ogwo mutojo." 
2Chronicles25:19 Reeba, hati noogira oti: Nsingwire Abanyaedomu. Haza ekyo kikakureetera amaryo okeehimbisa. Kwonka mbwenu guma omuka, orekye kutaara akabi, ngu iwe na Buyuda mucwekyerere!" 
2Chronicles25:20 Amaziya ekyo tarkyetaireho. Manya kikaba kirugire ahari Ruhanga, ngu abarekurire abazigu babasingure, ahabw'okuba bakaramya baaruhanga b'Abanyaedomu." 
2Chronicles25:21 Yehoashi omugabe wa Isiraeli nikwo kuhurura, we na Amaziya omugabe wa Buyuda bakareebanira akaso omu kandi omu rugamba rwa Betishemeshi eya Buyuda." 
2Chronicles25:22 Abaisiraeli bakasingura Abaayuda, buri muntu yaahunga naatoora ogurikuza omu ka ye;" 
2Chronicles25:23 Yehoashi omugabe wa Isiraeli akakwatira Betishemeshi Amaziya omugabe wa Yuda, mwene Yoashi, mwijukuru wa Ahaziya, yaamureeta Yerusalemu. Akasheenya ekigo kya Yerusalemu ekirikuhitsya mikono magana ana, okwiha aha Irembo rya Efuraimu, okuta aha Irembo ry'Akeekubo." 
2Chronicles25:24 Akanyaga ezaabu yoona n'efeeza n'ebindi ebi yaashangire omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga birinzirwe Obededomu; akanyaga n'eby'omu mabiikiro g'omu kikaari ky'omugabe, n'abantu b'okuba omukwato. Atyo yaagaruka Samariya." 
2Chronicles25:25 Amaziya mwene Yoashi, omugabe wa Yuda, akamara emyaka ikumi n'etaano, Yehoashi mwene Yehoahazi omugabe wa Isiraeli aherize kufa." 
2Chronicles25:26 Ebindi ebi Amaziya yaakozire, okwiha aha kutandika, okuhitsya aha muheru, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'Abagabe ba Yuda n'aba Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles25:27 Okwiha obu yaatsigaho Mukama, abantu b'omuri Yerusalemu bakamugiira omu naama, yaahungira Lakishi. Kwonka baayohereza ab'okumukurata Lakishi, baamwitirayo." 
2Chronicles25:28 Omutumbi gwe baaguta aha mbaraasi, baagureeta Yerusalemu; baamuziika omu rurembo rwa Daudi; baamushangisa baishenkuru." 
2Chronicles26:1 Abaayuda boona bakatoorana Uziya, owaabaire aine emyaka ikumi na mukaaga y'obukuru, baamuhindura omugabe omu mwanya gwa Amaziya ishe." 
2Chronicles26:2 Akombeka busya Eloti, yaagigarurira Abaayuda, Omugabe Amaziya aherize kufa kushanga baishenkuru." 
2Chronicles26:3 Uziya, obu yaaza aha ngoma, akaba aine emyaka ikumi na mukaaga y'obukuru, yaategyekyera emyaka makumi ataano n'ebiri omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Yekoliya owa Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles26:4 Uziya akakora ebi Nyakubaho arikusiima, nk'ebi Amaziya ishe yaakozire." 
2Chronicles26:5 Akeehayo kuheereza Ruhanga omu biro bya Zekariya owaamwegyeise okutiina Ruhanga. Haza omwanya gwona ogu yaamazire naaheereza Nyakubaho, Ruhanga yaamuha obuhiire." 
2Chronicles26:6 Akahurura, yaarwana orugamba n'Abafilisiti, yaasheenya ekigo kya Gaati, n'ekya Yabune, n'ekya Ashidoodi. Yaayombeka endembo omu kyanga kya Ashidoodi, n'ahandi omu nsi y'Abafilisiti." 
2Chronicles26:7 Ruhanga akamuha emikono naarwana n'Abafilisiti, n'Abaharabu abaabaire batwire Gurubaali, kandi n'Abameuni." 
2Chronicles26:8 Abaamoni baaguma nibatoijera Uziya; okurangaanwa kwe kwabuga, kwahika n'aha mwatano gwa Misiri; ahabw'okuba akaba ow'amaani munonga." 
2Chronicles26:9 Ekindi, Uziya akombeka eminaara omuri Yerusalemu aha Irembo ry'Akeekubo, n'aha Irembo ry'Oruhanga, n'aha keehogo, yaagitaho ebigo bigumire." 
2Chronicles26:10 Reero yaayombeka eminaara omu ihamba, yaatimba amaziba maingi. Ahabw'okuba akaba aine amasyo maingi omu bibungo n'omu mpita; kandi aine abahingi n'abasharuzi b'emizaabibu, omu nsi z'ebibungo, n'omu byanga ebirikweza; ahabw'okuba akaba akunda munonga okuhinga." 
2Chronicles26:11 Ekindi, Uziya akaba aine eihe ry'abarwani abahikire kuza aha rugamba, babaganisiibwe omu mitwe y'engabo nk'oku baabazirwe, bakahandiikwa Yeeyeli omuhandiiki mukuru, na Maaseya omukungu, nibareebererwa Hananiya omwe aha batware b'omugabe." 
2Chronicles26:12 Omubaro gwona ogwa bakuru b'amamanzi rugambwa ab'omu miryango ya baishenkurubo gukaba enkumi ibiri na magana mukaaga. 
2Chronicles26:13 Bakaba nibategyeka eihe ry'abarwani obusiriira bushatu n'enkumi mushanju na magana ataano, abarikubaasa kurwanira kimwe orugamba, bakaha omugabe emikono kurwanisa abazigu." 
2Chronicles26:14 Kandi Uziya akatebeekanisiza eihe ryona engabo, amacumu, enkofiira, ebijwaro by'orugamba, amata, n'amabaare g'enjungu." 
2Chronicles26:15 Omuri Yerusalemu yaakoreramu ebyoma ebigunzirwe abanyamyoga, kubita aha munaara n'omu bwehogo, bikarasha emyambi n'okurekyera amabaare mahango. Okurangaanwa kwe kwabuga hoona; ahabw'okuba akatunga amaani maingi agu yaihire omu kuhwerwa okutakareebwaga." 
2Chronicles26:16 Uziya ku yaayongyeire kugira amaani, yaayetunguura, kyamurugiramu okusiisikara. Manya akacumura ahari Ruhanga we, yaaza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho kwoterera obubaani aha itambiro ryabwo." 
2Chronicles26:17 Kwonka Azariya omuhongyerezi yaataahamu amukuratiire, aine abahongyerezi ba Nyakubaho makumi munaana amamanzi rugambwa." 
2Chronicles26:18 Baazibira Omugabe Uziya, nibamugira bati: Uziya, ti murimo gwawe kwoterera Nyakubaho obubaani, kureka n'ogw'abahongyerezi, beene Arooni, abaahaasiririirwe okubwotera. Ruga omu mwanya ogurikwera. Manya waacumura, kandi ekyo kyakwihisaho ekitiinwa ki Mukama Ruhanga yaakuhaire." 
2Chronicles26:19 Uziya atyo agira ekiniga. Obwo akaba akwaitse eky'okwotereraho obubaani. Mbwenu ku yaagiriire abahongyerezi ekiniga, yaasheesha ebibembe aha buso omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho aha rubaju rw'eitambiro eryotererwaho obubaani abahongyerezi bari aho nibamureeba." 
2Chronicles26:20 Azariya omuhongyerezi omukuru, n'abahongyerezi boona, ku baamwetegyereize, baashanga abembire ahamaisho. Baamubinga omuri Nyaruju, nawe yaarahuka kushohora; ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akamufubira." 
2Chronicles26:21 Omugabe Uziya akaguma abembire, okuhitsya obu yaafiire. Kandi ahabw'okuba omubembe, yaaguma ari omu ngoonyo, atarikwikirizibwa kutaaha omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Omutabani Yotamu yaaguma naareeberera eby'omu kikaari ky'omugabe, kandi naategyeka abantu b'omuri egyo nsi." 
2Chronicles26:22 Ebindi ebi Uziya yaakozire, okwiha aha kutandika okuhitsya aha muheru, bikahandiikwa omurangi Isaaya, mutabani wa Amozi." 
2Chronicles26:23 Bwanyima Uziya akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru; baamuziika ahi baabaziikire, beitu hatari mu bituuro by'abagabe; ahabw'okuba bakagira bati: N'omubembe. Mpaho omutabani Yotamu yaaza aha ngoma omu mwanya gwe." 
2Chronicles27:1 Yotamu akaba omugabe aine emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano y'obukuru; yaategyekyera emyaka ikumi na mukaaga omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Yerusha, muhara wa Zadoki." 
2Chronicles27:2 Yotamu akakora ebirikusiimwa Nyakubaho, nk'ebi Uziya ishe yaakozire, okwihaho ekicumuro ky'okutaahisa amaani omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Kwonka abantu bakagumizamu nibakora ebibi." 
2Chronicles27:3 Akombeka eirembo rya ruguru erya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, kandi yaayombeka ebyombeko bingi aha kigo kya Ofeli." 
2Chronicles27:4 Ekindi, akombeka endembo omu nsi ya Buyuda ey'ebibungo, yaayombeka n'ebigo n'eminaara omu bibungo ebirimu ebibira." 
2Chronicles27:5 Akarwana orugamba n'omugabe w'Abaamoni, yaamusingura. Omuri ogwo mwaka Abaamoni baamuha omushoro gwa kiloguraamu enkumi ina na magana ana na makumi munaana z'efeeza, n'ebitenga obukumi butaano by'engano, n'ebindi obukumi butaano by'oburo bw'enaku; kandi Abaamoni baamuha omushoro gurikwingana n'ogw'omu mwaka gwa kabiri n'omu gwa kashatu." 
2Chronicles27:6 Yotamu atyo yaaba ow'amaani ahabw'okugirira Mukama Ruhanga we emitwarize mirungi. 
2Chronicles27:7 Ebindi ebi Yotamu yaakozire, n'engamba zi yaarwaine, n'emitwarize ye, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'Abagabe ba Isiraeli n'aba Yuda." 
2Chronicles27:8 Akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano y'obukuru, yaategyekyera emyaka ikumi na mukaaga omuri Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles27:9 Bwanyima Yotamu akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru; baamuziika omu rurembo rwa Daudi; omutabani Ahazi yaamuhungurira." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahazi akaba omugabe aine emyaka makumi abiri y'obukuru; yaategyekyera emyaka ikumi na mukaaga omuri Yerusalemu. Haza tiyaakora bi Nyakubaho arikusiima, nka Daudi ishenkuru; kureka yaakuratira emitwarize y'abagabe ba Isiraeli. Yaataho n'okuheesha ebishushani bya Baabaali." 
2Chronicles28:2 Ekindi, akooterera obubaani omu ruhanga rwa mwene Hinomu." 
2Chronicles28:3 Yaatamba abatabani naabootsya kuba ebitambo bicwekize, naakuratira emicwe y'ekihagaro ey'abanyamahanga abu Mukama yaabingire kuhigiza Abaisiraeli." 
2Chronicles28:4 Kandi yaatambira ebitambo n'okwoterera obubaani aha butungutungu, n'omu bibungo, n'omu mirinzi." 
2Chronicles28:5 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga we yaamurekuririire omugabe wa Siriya akamusingura; akakwata abantu be baingi munonga, akabatwara Damasiko bari enkwatwa. Ekindi, Ruhanga akamurekurira omugabe wa Isiraeli, yaamusingura aitsire abantu be baingi munonga." 
2Chronicles28:6 Manya omu izooba rimwe Peeka, mutabani wa Remaliya, akaita omuri Buyuda abantu akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi bubiri, boona bari amamanzi rugambwa; ahabw'okuba bakaba batsigireho Mukama Ruhanga wa baishebo." 
2Chronicles28:7 Reero Zikuri emanzi rugambwa ow'Abaefuraimu yaita Maaseya mutabani w'omugabe, na Azirikaamu omukuru w'ekikaari ky'omugabe, na Elukaana enganzi y'omugabe." 
2Chronicles28:8 Abaisiraeli nabo baakwata Abaayuda beene waabo obusiriira bubiri, obariiremu abakazi, na batabani baabo, na bahara baabo; baataho n'okubasikuraho eminyago mingi, baagitwara Samariya." 
2Chronicles28:9 Kwonka omurangi wa Nyakubaho orikwetwa Odedi akashohora kubugana eihe ry'abaabaire nibatabaaruka, nibagaruka Samariya. Yaabagira ati: Nimumanya ku Mukama Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe yaagwereirwe kubi Abaayuda, akababarekurira mukabasingura, kwonka mukabaita mwine ekiniga kirengyesereize ekyatuumire kikahika omu iguru." 
2Chronicles28:10 Reeba, hati nimwenda kutegyeka Abaayuda n'Abaayerusalemu, abashaija n'abakazi, kubahindura abahuuku baanyu. Ebyo imwe timwine bibi bi mwakozire, mukacumura ahari Mukama Ruhanga waanyu?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Mbwenu nimumpurire, mugarureyo enkwatwa ezi mwihire omuri beene waanyu mukaireeta, ahabw'okuba kashanga ya Nyakubaho ebahingamiire." 
2Chronicles28:12 Bamwe omu bakungu b'Abaefuraimu: Azariya mwene Yohaanani, Berekiya mwene Meshilemooti, Yehizekiya mwene Shalumu, na Amaasa mwene Hadulai, baakumiirira abaabaire nibaruga aha rugamba." 
2Chronicles28:13 Baabagira bati: Mutareeta aha ezi nkwatwa. Ahabw'okuba nimwenda kutucumuza ahari Nyakubaho, tukongyerera aha rubanja rwaitu n'aha bibi byaitu. Haza orubanja ru twine ruri ruhango kureetera Ruhanga kutugirira itwe Abaisiraeli ekiniga kingi akatufubira." 
2Chronicles28:14 Ezo ngabo nikwo kutsiga enkwatwa n'eminyago omu maisho g'abategyeki n'abantu abateeraniire aho. 
2Chronicles28:15 Reero abashaija abaagambwa amaziina, baimuka baayakiira ezo nkwatwa, baakora aha minyago eby'okujweka boona abajwaire busha omuribo batyo baabajweka, baabaha enkaito, baabatungira ebyokurya n'ebyokunywa, baabasiiga amajuta, kandi abataine maani omuribo baabaheeka aha ndogoya, baabatwara baabahitsya beene waabo omuri Yeriko, orurembo rw'emikindo. Bwanyima Abaisiraeli baagaruka Samariya." 
2Chronicles28:16 Omu biro ebyo, Omugabe Ahazi akatuma aha mugabe wa Asiriya kumuha emikono." 
2Chronicles28:17 Ahabw'okuba Abaedomu bakaba bateire Abaayuda babasingwire, kandi babatwairemu enkwatwa." 
2Chronicles28:18 Ekindi, Abafilisiti bakaba batabaire endembo z'omuri Shefeela, ne Negebu, eza Buyuda, bakwatsire Betishemeshi, Aiyalooni, Gederooti, Soko n'ebirorero byayo, Timuna n'ebirorero byayo, na Gimuzo n'ebirorero byayo; kandi bazitwiremu." 
2Chronicles28:19 Manya Nyakubaho akaba acwire Buyuda eishaija, ahabw'okuba Ahazi omugabe waayo akaba akoreire omuri Buyuda ebirikuhemura, kandi acumwire munonga ahari Mukama." 
2Chronicles28:20 Ekyarugiremu Tigulati-pilineseeri, omugabe wa Asiriya, yaija yaamuteera, yaamubonabonesa munonga, omu mwanya gw'okumuha emikono." 
2Chronicles28:21 Ahazi atyo aiha ebintu omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'omu kikaari ky'omugabe, n'omu maju g'abategyeki, abitoijera omugabe wa Asiriya kumuguriirira, kwonka ekyo tikigira ki kyamugasira."
