2Chronicles28:22 Ogwo mugabe, omu biro by'okubonabona kwe, akongyera kucumura ahari Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles28:23 Manya baaruhanga ba Damasiko, abaabaire bamusingwire, akabatambira ebitambo. Yaagira ati: Nk'oku baaruhanga b'abagabe ba Siriya babahwereire, naanye niinyija kubatambira ebitambo, bampwere. Haza ekyo kyamureetera okuhwerekyerera, hamwe n'eihanga rye." 
2Chronicles28:24 Reero Ahazi ogwo akarundaana ebintu by'omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga yaabisheenyagura, yaakinga enyigi za Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, yaayekorera amatambiro omu bwehogo bwa Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles28:25 Endembo za Buyuda zoona yaazitamu obutungutungu bw'okwotereramu baaruhanga obubaani. Yaagwisa atyo kubi Mukama Ruhanga wa baishenkuru. 
2Chronicles28:26 Mbwenu ebindi ebi Ahazi yaakozire n'emitwarize ye yoona, okwiha aha kutandika okuhitsya aha muheru, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'ebyabaireho omu busingye bw'Abagabe ba Yuda n'aba Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles28:27 Bwanyima Ahazi akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru. Baamuziika omu rurembo rwa Yerusalemu, kwonka tibaamuziika mu bituuro by'abagabe ba Buyuda. Omutabani Hezekiya yaamuhungurira." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekiya akaba omugabe aine emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano y'obukuru; yaategyekyera emyaka abiri na mwenda omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Abiiya, muhara wa Zekariya." 
2Chronicles29:2 Hezekiya akakora ebirikusiimwa Nyakubaho, nk'oku Daudi ishenkuru yaakozire." 
2Chronicles29:3 Omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'omu busingye bwe, omu kwezi kw'okubanza, akaigura enyigi za Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, yaazihunduuza." 
2Chronicles29:4 Akataasyamu abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi, yaabateeranira omu kibuga ky'aha burugwa-izooba." 
2Chronicles29:5 Yaabagira ati: Imwe Baleevi 'mwe, nimumpurire! Hati nimweyeze, mweze na Nyaruju ya Mukama Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe, kandi mwihe eby'oburofa byona omu Mwanya Ogurikwera." 
2Chronicles29:6 Ahabw'okuba baatatenkuriitwe bakacumura, baakora ebirikugwisa kubi Mukama Ruhanga waitu. Baamutsigaho, baiha amaisho aha butaaho bwe baamuteera amabega." 
2Chronicles29:7 Ekindi, bakakinga enyigi z'ekisasi kya Nyaruju, baaraaza amatabaaza, tibaayoterera Ruhanga wa Isiraeli obubaani, nobu kwakuba okumutambira ebitambo bicwekize omu Mwanya Ogurikwera." 
2Chronicles29:8 Nikyo Nyakubaho yaagiririire Abaayuda n'ab'omuri Yerusalemu ekiniga kingi, akabahindura ekintu ekirikureetera abantu kwesikura, kutangaara n'okweshaanya, nk'oku murikukyereebera." 
2Chronicles29:9 Ekyo nikyo kyareeteire baatataitwe kwitwa rurara; na batabani baitu, na bahara baitu, n'abakazi baitu kuba enkwatwa." 
2Chronicles29:10 Mbwenu nyowe ekindi aha mutima n'okuragaana endagaano na Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, ekiniga kye kikaabona kuturugaho." 
2Chronicles29:11 Baana bangye, murekye kweganda, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho abatooraine kwemerera omu maisho ge, kumugaragira muri abaheereza be, n'okumwoterera obubaani." 
2Chronicles29:12 Ebyo ku byahwaire Abaleevi aba: Mahati mwene Amasai ya Yoeli mwene Azariya ab'omuri beene Kohati; na Kiishi mwene Abudi na Azariya mwene Yehaleleeli ab'omuri beene Meraari; na Yoa mwene Ziima na Edeni mwene Yoa ab'omuri beene Gereshooni; 
2Chronicles29:13 kandi ab'omuri beene Elizafani: Shimuri na Yeueli n'ab'omuri beene Asafu; Zekariya na Mataniya; 
2Chronicles29:14 reero omu b'omuri beene Hemani; Yehueli na Shimei kandi ab'omuri beene Yedutuuni; Shemaaya na Uzieli baimuka," 
2Chronicles29:15 baateeranira hamwe beene waabo, baayeyeza. Bwanyima baataaha omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho kugyeeza, nk'oku omugabe yaabaragiire naakuratira bya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles29:16 Abahongyerezi baataaha omu kishengye kya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho eky'endugu kukicuma; baashohoza eby'oburofa byona, ebi baashangiremu, baabita omu kibuga kyayo. Reero Abaleevi baabiihaho, baabinaga omu kagyera ka Kidirooni." 
2Chronicles29:17 Bakatandika kugyeeza aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwezi kw'okubanza. Aha kiro kya munaana ky'okwo kwezi, baahika aha kisasi kya Nyakubaho. Reero baamara ebiro munaana nibeeza Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho; aha kiro kya ikumi na mukaaga ky'okwo kwezi, baaheza." 
2Chronicles29:18 Bwanyima baaza ow'Omugabe Hezekiya, baamugira bati: Twaheza kucuma Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho yoona, eitambiro ry'ebitambo ebicwekize, n'ebirikurikoresibwaho byona, n'emeeza y'okumurikiraho emigaati, n'ebirikugikoresibwaho byona." 
2Chronicles29:19 Ebirikukoresibwamu byona, ebi Omugabe Ahazi yaanagire akiri aha ngoma, obu acumura, twabitebeekanisa, kandi twabyeza. Mbwenu biri omu maisho g'eitambiro rya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles29:20 Bwanyima Omugabe Hezekiya akaimuka kare, yaateeranira hamwe abakungu b'omu rurembo, bainamuka, baaza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles29:21 Baareeta enimi mushanju, n'empaya z'entaama mushanju, n'abaana b'entaama mushanju, n'empaya z'embuzi mushanju, kuhongyerera ekibi ky'obugabe n'eky'omwanya ogurikwera, n'ekya Buyuda. Yaaragiira abahongyerezi beene Arooni kubitambira aha itambiro rya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles29:22 Nabo baita ezo nimi, baazitangiriza eshagama, baagimiisiira eitambiro. Baita n'empaya z'entaama, eshagama yaazo baagimiisiira eitambiro. Kandi baita abaana b'entaama, eshagama yaabo baagimiisiira eitambiro." 
2Chronicles29:23 Bwanyima baareetera omugabe n'abateeraniire aho empaya z'embuzi kuhongyerera ekibi. Baazitaho emikono. 
2Chronicles29:24 Abahongyerezi baaziita, baashuka eshagama yaazo aha itambiro, kuba empongano y'ekibi, kukarabira Abaisiraeli boona. Manya omugabe akaragiira ngu batambe ebitambo bicwekize, n'eby'okuhongyerera ekibi, ahabw'Abaisiraeli boona." 
2Chronicles29:25 Reero yaata Abaleevi omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, baine enshandaazo, n'ebidongo, n'amagobore; nk'oku Omugabe Daudi, na Gaadi omuhanuuzi w'omugabe, na Natani omurangi baaragiire. Manya ekyo kiragiro kikaba kirugire ahari Nyakubaho, akigambiise abarangi be." 
2Chronicles29:26 Abaleevi baayemerera baine ebintu bya Daudi eby'okweshongoza, n'abahongyerezi baine amakondere." 
2Chronicles29:27 Hezekiya yaaragiira ku batambira ebitambo bicwekize aha itambiro. Reero ku baatandikire kutamba ebitambo bicwekize, baatandika n'okweshongorera Mukama, n'okuteera amakondere, nigagyendera hamwe n'ebirikujumeeza amaraka ebya Daudi omugabe wa Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles29:28 Abateeraniire aho boona baaramya, abeeshongozi baayeshongora, n'abateezi b'amakondere baagateera. Byona byagumizamu okuhitsya obu okutamba ekitambo kicwekize kwahwaire." 
2Chronicles29:29 Okwo kutamba ekitambo ku kwahwaire, omugabe n'abari aho boona baajuumara aha nsi, baaramya." 
2Chronicles29:30 Omugabe Hezekiya n'abategyeki baaragiira Abaleevi kweshongora eby'okuhimbisa Nyakubaho n'ebigambo bi Daudi na Asafu omuhanuuzi baagunzire. Baabyeshongora bashemereirwe, kandi baajuumara aha nsi, baaramya." 
2Chronicles29:31 Bwanyima Hezekiya akagambira abantu ati: Mbwenu mwaherize kweyereza Nyakubaho, nimurugyeyo muhikye aha, mureete ebitambo n'emitoijo y'okusiima omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Abateeraniire aho boona baareeta ebitambo n'emitoijo y'okusiima. Kandi abaayekundiire baareeta ebitambo by'okucwetsya." 
2Chronicles29:32 Ebitambo by'okucwetsya, ebi abateeraniire aho bareetsire, bikahika enimi makumi mushanju, empaya z'entaama igana, n'abana b'entaama magana abiri. Byona byaba eby'okutambira Nyakubayo ebitambo bicwekize." 
2Chronicles29:33 Ebindi ebi baahongire n'enimi magana mukaaga n'entaama enkumi ishatu. 
2Chronicles29:34 Kwonka abahongyerezi bakaba bari bakye, batarikubaasa kubaaga bitambo byona eby'okucwetsya. Beene waabo Abaleevi baabakwatsa, okuhitsya obu abandi bahongyerezi baayeyerize, omurimo gukabona kuhwa. Manya Abaleevi bakaba nibataho munonga omutima kweyeza, okukira abahongyerezi." 
2Chronicles29:35 Okwongyerera ahari ebyo bitambo bingi ebicwekize, hakaba hariho enyama z'ebishaju, ez'ebitambo by'okurya kumwe, n'ebyokunywa ebyabaire bihongwa hamwe n'ebitambo bicwekize. Okwo nikwo baagarwireho omugyenzo gw'okuramiza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles29:36 Hezekiya n'abantu boona baashemerererwa munonga eki Ruhanga yaabakoreire, kureeba ebyo bintu nibikorwa ahonaaho." 
2Chronicles30:1 Hezekiya akatuma aha Baisiraeli n'aha Baayuda boona, kandi yaahandiikira Abaefuraimu n'Abaamanaase amabaruha, ngu baije Yerusalemu omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, kukorera Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho." 
2Chronicles30:2 Manya omugabe n'abategyeki be n'abateeraniire omuri Yerusalemu boona bakahanuura kugira obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho omu kwezi kwa kabiri. 
2Chronicles30:3 Manya tibarabaasize kubugira omu bunaku bwabwo, ahabw'okuba omubaro gw'abahongyerezi abeeyerize gukaba gutakahikire, kandi n'abantu bakaba batakateeraniire omuri Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles30:4 Eki baahanwire, omugabe n'abateeraniire aho boona baakisiima." 
2Chronicles30:5 Baaragiira kurangirira omuri Isiraeli yoona, okwiha Beerisheba okuhika Daani, ku abantu baija Yerusalemu, bakakorerayo Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho, ahabw'okuba bakaba batakabukoraga baingi nk'oku kirikuragiirwa." 
2Chronicles30:6 Baamatarisi nikwo kuza omuri Isiraeli yoona na Buyuda, baine amabaruha agu baatwekirwe omugabe n'abategyeki be, agu omugabe yaaragiriiremu naagira ati: Imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, nimugarukire Mukama Ruhanga wa Aburahamu na Isaaka na Isiraeli, nawe abone kubagarukira, imwe abaatsigaireho, abaahonokire okugwa omu mikono y'abagabe ba Asiriya." 
2Chronicles30:7 Mutaba nka baashwenkuriimwe na beene waanyu abaacumwire ahari Mukama Ruhanga waabo, akabacwekyereza, nk'oku murikureeba." 
2Chronicles30:8 Mbwenu nu, mutagangaara nka baashwenkuriimwe; kureka mworobere Nyakubaho, mwije omu Mwanya gwe Ogurikwera, muramye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu; kashanga ye ebone kubarugaho." 
2Chronicles30:9 Manya ku muraagarukire Mukama, beene waanyu n'abaana baanyu abaabakwatsire nibaija kubagirira esaasi, bagarukye omuri egi nsi. Manya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu agira esaasi n'embabazi, tarikwija kubateera mugongo, mwaba mumugarukiire." 
2Chronicles30:10 Batyo baamatarisi baagyenda nibaraba omu ndembo z'omu nsi y'Abaefuraimu n'ey'Abaamanaase, baahika n'omu y'Abaazebuluuni; kwonka abantu baabashekyeerera, baataho n'okubagaaniiza." 
2Chronicles30:11 Kureka abantu bakye ab'omu Baasheri n'Abaamanaase n'Abaazebuluuni baaba nibo baayoroba, baija Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles30:12 Haza Ruhanga yaakwatsa Abaayuda, baagira omutima gumwe kukora eki omugabe n'abategyeki be baaragiire, batumirwe Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles30:13 Abantu baingi bakaija omu kwezi kwa kabiri, baateeranira Yerusalemu kugira Obugyenyi bw'Emigaati Etatumbisiibwe; buzima bakaba abantu baingi munonga." 
2Chronicles30:14 Baatandika omurimo, baiha omuri Yerusalemu amatambiro agaabaire garimu n'amatambiro goona ag'okwotereraho obubaani, baagatwara, baaganaga omu kagyera ka Kidirooni." 
2Chronicles30:15 Aha kiro kya ikumi na bina eky'okwezi kwa kabiri baita omwana gw'entaama ogw'Okuhingurwaho. Haza ekyo kyaitsa abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi enshoni, baayeyeza, baabona kutambira omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ebitambo bicwekize." 
2Chronicles30:16 Baaza omu myanya yaabo y'obutoosha, nk'oku ekiragiro kya Musa omuntu wa Ruhanga kiri. Abahongyerezi baamiisiira eitambiro eshagama ei baahairwe Abaleevi." 
2Chronicles30:17 Manya omu baabaire bateeraniire aho, hakaba harimu baingi abateeyerize. Ekyo kyareetera Abaleevi kwita omwana gw'entaama ogw'Okuhingurwaho ahabwa buri muntu oteezire, ngu gubone kuba Ogurikwera ahari Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles30:18 Ekindi, omuri ekyo kimbuuro ky'abantu, abaingi omu Baefuraimu, n'omu Baamanaase, n'omu Baisakaari, n'omu Baazebuluuni, bakaba batakeeyerize. Kwonka shi baarya obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho, kitari nk'oku kyaragiirwe. Nikyo Hezekiya yaabashabiriire naagira ati: Ai Nyakubaho omurungi, Ruhanga wa baatatenkuriitwe, saasira abantu boona" 
2Chronicles30:19 abarikukusherura bataireho omutima, nobu baraabe bateeyerize nk'ebiragiro by'Omwanya Ogurikwera oku biri." 
2Chronicles30:20 Nyakubaho yaahurira eki Hezekiya yaamushaba, yaasaasira abantu, tiyaabakora kubi." 
2Chronicles30:21 Abaisiraeli abaabaire bari Yerusalemu baamara ebiro mushanju bari omu Bugyenyi bw'Emigaati Etatumbisiibwe, bashemereirwe munonga, Abaleevi n'abahongyerezi nibahimbisa Nyakubaho buri izooba, nibamweshongorera n'amaani gaabo goona." 
2Chronicles30:22 Na Hezekiya yaagamba naasingiza Abaleevi boona abaayeyorekire ku barikumanya gye eby'okuheereza Nyakubaho. Abantu baamara ebiro mushanju nibarya ebyokurya by'obwo bugyenyi, nibatamba ebitambo by'okurya kumwe, kandi nibasiima Mukama Ruhanga wa baishebo." 
2Chronicles30:23 Bwanyima abateeraniire aho boona baikirizana kumara ebiro ebindi mushanju omuri obwo bugyenyi. Batyo baabugumamu ebindi biro mushanju nibeesiima. 
2Chronicles30:24 Manya Hezekiya omugabe wa Buyuda akaha abateeraniire aho enimi rukumi, n'entaama enkumi mushanju kuzitamba. Abategyeki nabo baabaha enimi rukumi n'entaama kakumi. Reero abahongyerezi baayeyeza baingi munonga." 
2Chronicles30:25 Abaayuda boona abaabaire bateeraniire aho, n'abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi, n'abantu boona abaarugire Isiraeli, n'abashuuhuuki abatwire Buyuda, baashemererwa munonga." 
2Chronicles30:26 Ab'omuri Yerusalemu baashemererwa okutakareebwaga, ahabw'okuba okwiha omu busingye bwa Solomooni, mwene Daudi omugabe wa Isiraeli, hakaba hatakabamuga okushemererwa nk'okwo." 
2Chronicles30:27 Bwanyima abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi baimuka, baashabira abantu omugisha; Nyakubaho yaahurira okutaka kwabo, okushaba kwabo kwahika omu iguru, omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, ei Ruhanga atuura." 
2Chronicles31:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Abaisiraeli boona abaabaire bari aho baimuka, baaza omu ndembo za Buyuda, baasheenyagura enyomyo, baatemagura ebishushani by'emandwa Ashera, baasheenya obutungutungu n'amatambiro g'omu nsi ya Yuda yoona, n'eya Benyamiini, n'ag'omu ya Efuraimu n'eya Manaase; okuhitsya obu baabicwekyereize byona. Bwanyima Abaisiraeli bakagaruka omu ndembo zaabo, buri omwe aha butaka bwe." 
2Chronicles31:2 Reero Hezekiya akagaruka yaata abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi omu mbu zaabo omu buri kicweka, buri omwe nk'oku omurimo gwe guri: abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi ab'okutamba ebitambo bicwekize, n'ebitambo by'okurya kumwe: okuheereza, n'okusiima, n'okuhimbisiza aha marembo g'omu bikaari bya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles31:3 Ebi omugabe yaatoizire naabiiha omu bi atungire, bikaba eby'okutambwa ebitambo bicwekize, eby'akasheeshe n'eby'omwabazyo, n'eby'ahari zaasabato, n'eby'aha kuboneka kw'ameezi, n'eby'aha magyenyi agaatairweho, nk'oku kihandiikirwe omu biragiro bya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles31:4 Kandi akaragiira ab'omuri Yerusalemu kuha abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi emigabo ei barikuragiirwa kutunga; ngu babone kweheerayo kimwe, nk'oku barikuragiirwa omu biragiro bya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles31:5 Ekiragiro ku kyaherize kubuga hoona, Abaisiraeli baaha emiganuro mingi munonga y'ebyokurya by'omujuma, eya viino, ey'amajuta g'emioliva, ey'obwoki, n'ey'ebi baihire omu misiri. Batyo baareeta bingi munonga ebya kimwe kya ikumi ekya buri kintu." 
2Chronicles31:6 Kandi Abaisiraeli n'Abaayuda abatwire omu ndembo za Buyuda nabo baareeta kimwe kya ikumi ky'ente n'entaama, na kimwe kya ikumi ky'ebintu ebirikwera ebihongyeirwe Mukama Ruhanga waabo. Haza baabirunda emituumo." 
2Chronicles31:7 Bakatandika kubirunda emituumo omu kwezi kwa kashatu, baabiheza omu kwa mushanju." 
2Chronicles31:8 Hezekiya n'abategyeki ku baizire, baareeba egyo mituumo, baahimbisa Nyakubaho, kandi baasingiza abantu be Abaisiraeli." 
2Chronicles31:9 Hezekiya yaabuuza abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi eby'egyo mituumo. 
2Chronicles31:10 Azariya omuhongyerezi omukuru, ow'ab'omu muryango gwa Zadoki, yaamugarukamu ati: Okwiha obu baatandika kureeta emitoijo omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, turiire twahaaga, byashaaga bingi. Manya Mukama ahaire abantu be omugisha, nikyo twiniire ebintu bingi ebishaagire." 
2Chronicles31:11 Bwanyima Hezekiya akabaragiira kutebeekanisa ebishengye by'omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Nabo baabitebeekanisa. 
2Chronicles31:12 Babitamu n'obwesigwa, ebintu eby'emitoijo, n'ebya kimwe kya ikumi, n'ebihongirwe. Omukuru orikubireeberera akaba ari Konaniya Omuleevi, n'omurumuna Shimei naakurataho." 
2Chronicles31:13 Kandi Yehieli, Azaziya, Nahati, Asaheeli, Yerimooti, Yozabadi, Elieli, Isimakiya, Mahati na Benaaya bari abareeberezi, abarikuhwera Konaniya na Shimei omurumuna, batairweho Hezekiya omugabe, na Azariya omukungu mukuru wa Nyaruju ya Ruhanga." 
2Chronicles31:14 Kandi Koore mwene Imuna Omuleevi, omurinzi w'eirembo ry'ahari burugwa-izooba, niwe yaabaire naareeberera emitoijo ei abantu batoijera Ruhanga beekundiire, kutaanisa emitoijo eshorororeirwe Nyakubaho, n'ebitoizirwe ebirikukirira kimwe kuba ebirikwera." 
2Chronicles31:15 Edeni, Miniyamiini, Yeshua, Shemaaya, Amariya na Shekaniiya nibo baabaire nibamuhwera n'obwesigwa, omu ndembo z'abahongyerezi, kubaganisiza beene waabo abakuru n'abato ebyokurya omu bwinganisa, nk'oku embu zaabo zirikukuratana" 
2Chronicles31:16 otabariiremu abaahandiikirwe, nk'oku enzaaro zaabo ziri, abashaija, okwiha aha b'emyaka eshatu y'obukuru n'okweyongyerayo, boona abataahire omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho kukoramu omurimo gwabo gwa buri izooba, baine abakuru baabo, nk'oku embu zaabo zirikukuratana." 
2Chronicles31:17 Abahongyerezi bakahandiikwa nibakuratira emiryango ya baishenkurubo. Kandi Abaleevi, okwiha aha b'emyaka makumi abiri y'obukuru n'okukiraho, baahandiikwa nibakuratira emirimo yaabo n'embu zaabo." 
2Chronicles31:18 Abahongyerezi bakahandiikwa hamwe n'abaana baabo abato, n'abakazi baabo, na batabani baabo, na bahara baabo, ekimbuuro kyona. Ahabw'okuba, nk'oku baabaire bari abeesigwa, bakaba nibeerinda kuguma bari abantu abeeyereize kimwe." 
2Chronicles31:19 Reero ahabwa beene Arooni, abahongyerezi abatwire omu byanga by'aheeru y'endembo zaabo, omu ndembo ezo hakaba harimu abantu nanka na nanka abatoorainwe kugaburira ebyokurya omushaija weena oyetwa ow'omu bahongyerezi; na buri muntu ow'omu Baleevi owaahandiikirwe." 
2Chronicles31:20 Hezekiya nikwo yaakozire atyo omuri Buyuda yoona. Yaakora kyona ekirungi, ekihikire, kandi eky'obwesigwa omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga we." 
2Chronicles31:21 Emirimo yoona ei yaakozire ahabw'obuheereza bw'omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga naakuratira eiteeka n'ebiragiro, ainiire Ruhanga ekihika, akagikora n'omutima gwe gwona. Haza yaamuhiira." 
2Chronicles32:1 Ebi Hezekiya yaakozire n'obwesigwa ku byahwaire, Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiriya yaateera Buyuda, yaasiisira aharikureebana n'endembo z'ebigo bigumire, naateekateeka kuzisingura akazikubuura." 
2Chronicles32:2 Hezekiya ku yaareebire Senakeribu yaahurura amaririire kuteera Yerusalemu," 
2Chronicles32:3 yaaza omu naama n'abakungu be n'amamanzi ge rugambwa, kwigaza enshuro z'amaizi ez'aheeru y'orurembo. Nabo baamuha emikono." 
2Chronicles32:4 Abantu baingi munonga baayerundaana, baigaza enshuro zoona ez'akagyera akarikuraba omuri egyo nsi; nibagira bati: Ebyo nikwo kwona, abagabe ba Asiriya baije, bashangye egi aga maizi maingi?" 
2Chronicles32:5 Nawe yaayehayo kukora. Yaayombeka busya ekisiika ekyabaire kisheenyukire, yaakitaho eminaara. Kandi aheeru yaakyo yaayombekayo ekindi kisiika. Yaahamya emyanya y'okwerindiramu ey'ahi baarunzire eitaka omu rurembo rwa Daudi kandi yaaheesesa eby'okurwanisa bingi munonga, n'engabo nyingi." 
2Chronicles32:6 Reero yaataho abakuru b'engabo kureeberera abantu. Yaabateeranira ahu ari omu kibuga ky'aha irembo ry'orurembo, yaabagambira eby'okubagumya, ati:" 
2Chronicles32:7 Mube ab'amaani kandi mugume. Mutatiina, kandi mutahahaara mwareeba omugabe wa Asiriya n'emigogo yoona ei aine. Manya ou twine ni mukuru okukira ou we aine." 
2Chronicles32:8 We abarikumuha emikono n'abantu, kwonka itwe twine Mukama Ruhanga waitu kutuha emikono, akaturwanira engamba zaitu. Abantu nabo baayesiga ebi Hezekiya omugabe wa Buyuda yaabagambira." 
2Chronicles32:9 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiriya, owaabaire agotsire Lakishi n'engabo ze zoona, yaatuma abagaragwa be Yerusalemu ahari Hezekiya omugabe wa Yuda n'aha Baayuda boona ab'omuri Yerusalemu, naabagira ati:" 
2Chronicles32:10 Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiriya naababuuza ati: Mbwenu nimwesiga ki okwemera okugoterwa omuri Yerusalemu? 
2Chronicles32:11 Ebyo Hezekiya orikubagira ati: Mukama Ruhanga waitu niwe araatujune omugabe wa Asiriya, tarikubabeiha ngu abaitse enjara n'eiriho?" 
2Chronicles32:12 Hezekiya ogwo tiwe yaihireho emyanya ye ey'okuramizamu etunguukire, n'amatambiro ge, akaragiira ab'omuri Buyuda na Yerusalemu ati: Mugume muramize omu maisho g'eitambiro rimwe ryonka kandi mube niryo mwayotereraho obubaani?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Timurikumanya nyowe na baatatenkuru eki twakozire abantu b'agandi mahanga? Mbwenu baaruhanga b'amahanga g'ezo nsi bakaba barabaasize kwiha ensi zaabo omu mikono yangye? 
2Chronicles32:14 N'oha omuri baaruhanga boona ab'ago mahanga, agu baatatenkuru baacwekyerereize kimwe, owaabaasize kwiha abantu be omu mikono yangye, ngu imwe Ruhanga waanyu abone kugibaihamu?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Mbwenu nu, murekye kwikiriza Hezekiya kubabeiha, nari kubahabisa omu muringo ogwo. Mutamwikiriza, ahabw'okuba tihariho ruhanga ow'erindi ihanga nari ow'obundi bugabe orabaasize kwiha abantu be omu mikono yangye, nari omu ya baatatenkuru. Reero kaashwa Ruhanga waanyu!" 
2Chronicles32:16 Abagaragwa be nabo baayongyereraho ebyabo by'okujuma Mukama Ruhanga, n'omwiru we Hezekiya." 
2Chronicles32:17 Kandi Senakeribu yaahandiika ebaruha y'okugaya Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, n'okumucumuraho naagira ati: Nk'oku baaruhanga b'amahanga g'ezindi nsi bataraihire bantu baabo mu mikono yangye, na Ruhanga wa Hezekiya nikwo atarikwija kwiha bantu be mu mikono yangye." 
2Chronicles32:18 Haza ebyo baabigamba n'eiraka rihango omu rurimi rw'Abaayuda, nibabigambira ab'omuri Yerusalemu, abaabaire bari aha kisiika, kubatiinisa n'okubahahaaza omutima, ngu babone kukwata orwo rurembo." 
2Chronicles32:19 Baagamba ahari Ruhanga wa Isiraeli nk'oku bagamba ahari baaruhanga b'agandi mahanga g'omu nsi, abakorwa emikono y'abantu." 
2Chronicles32:20 Ekyabaireho ekyo kikareetera Omugabe Hezekiya na Isaaya omurangi, mwene Amozi, kushaba Ruhanga ow'omu iguru, nibamutakira." 
2Chronicles32:21 Nyakubaho nikwo kwohereza maraika akaita abarwani boona emanzi, n'abakuru b'engabo, n'abakungu ab'omu rusiisira rw'omugabe wa Asiriya. Senakeribu akagaruka omu nsi ye naabwerabwera. Reero ku yaahikire omu ndaaro ya ruhanga we, bamwe aha batabani baamwitsizamu rurara." 
2Chronicles32:22 Nyakubaho yaajuna atyo Hezekiya n'abatwire omuri Yerusalemu, yaabaiha omu mikono ya Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiriya, n'omu y'abazigu baabo boona. Yaabaha obuhuumure aha mbaju zoona." 
2Chronicles32:23 Abantu baingi baija Yerusalemu, baareetera Nyakubaho emitoijo; kandi baatoijera Hezekiya omugabe wa Yuda ebintu by'obuguzi bwingi. Okwiha obwo Hezekiya yaarangaanwa munonga omu mahanga." 
2Chronicles32:24 Omu biro ebyo, Hezekiya akarwara, yaahika aha ncwamba za rufu. Reero ku yaashabire Nyakubaho, yaamuhurira, yaamworeka akamanyiso ku arikwija kukira." 
2Chronicles32:25 Kwonka Hezekiya ahabw'okwetunguura, tiyaasiima Nyakubaho ahabw'ebirungi bi yaamukoreire. Nyakubaho nikwo kumugirira ekiniga kingi, we n'Abaayuda n'ab'omuri Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles32:26 Bwanyima Hezekiya yaayebundika, yaacwa amaryo, we n'abatuuzi b'omuri Yerusalemu; kashanga ya Nyakubaho tiyaabajuumikira omu biro bye." 
2Chronicles32:27 Reero Hezekiya akatunga, yaaganagana, yaagira ekitiinwa. Yaayeyombekyera amaju g'okubiikamu efeeza, n'ag'ezaabu, n'ag'amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi, n'ag'eby'emigaju, n'ag'engabo, n'ag'ebintu by'obuguzi bwingi eby'emiringo yoona." 
2Chronicles32:28 Yaataho n'amabiikiro g'ebyokurya by'enjuma, na viino, n'amajuta g'emioliva n'amaka g'ente za buri muringo, n'ag'entaama." 
2Chronicles32:29 Ekindi, akeeyombekyera endembo, yaayetungira amasyo maingi munonga g'embuzi n'entaama, n'ag'ente; ahabw'okuba Ruhanga akamuha eitungo ringi munonga." 
2Chronicles32:30 Hezekiya ogu niwe yaacungiire amaizi garikureeterwa eruguru ya Gihooni, akagahaburira naagatooza orubaju rwa burengyerwa-izooba bw'orurembo rwa Daudi. Hezekiya akagira obuhiire omu bi arikukora byona." 
2Chronicles32:31 Nangwa n'eby'entumwa zi abategyeki ba Babulooni baamutumireho kumubuuza ebikwatiraine n'eky'okutangaaza ekyakozirwe omu nsi ye, Ruhanga akakimurekyera kumugyeza, kumanya ekimuri aha mutima." 
2Chronicles32:32 Ebindi ebyabaireho omu busingye bwa Hezekiya, n'ebi yaakozire ahabw'okukunda Nyakubaho, reeba bihandiikirwe omu by'okubonekyerwa kwa Isaaya omurangi, mwene Amozi, omu Kitabo ky'Abagabe ba Yuda n'aba Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles32:33 Bwanyima Hezekiya akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru, baamuziika omu rukiizi, ahu orikwinamukira nooza aha bituuro bya beene Daudi. Abaayuda boona n'ab'omuri Yerusalemu, ku yaafiire, baamuha ekitiinwa kingi. Omutabani Manaase yaamuhungurira." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manaase akaba omugabe aine emyaka ikumi n'ebiri y'obukuru; yaategyekyera emyaka makumi ataano n'etaano omuri Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles33:2 Akakora ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho, naakuratira emitwarize mibi munonga ey'abanyamahanga abu Nyakubaho yaabingire kuhigiza Abaisiraeli." 
2Chronicles33:3 Ahabw'okuba akagaruka yaayombeka obutungutungu obu Hezekiya ishe yaasheenyire. Yaayombekyera Baabaali amatambiro, yaakora ebishushani bya Ashera, kandi yaaramya ebirikwakira omu iguru, yaabiheereza." 
2Chronicles33:4 Reero yaayombeka amatambiro omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, ei Mukama yaagambire ati: omuri Yerusalemu nimwo bariguma nibandamiza ebiro byona." 
2Chronicles33:5 Kandi yaayombekyera ebirikwakira omu iguru byona amatambiro omu bibuga bya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho byombi. 
2Chronicles33:6 Yaataho n'okutambira omu ruhanga rwa mwene Hinomu abatabani kuba ebitambo bicwekize. Yaaguma naaraguza aha bafumu n'aha bahanuuzi kumugambira ebiribaho; naarogyesa, naayehanuuza aha barikugambisa abazimu, naakwatanisa n'abarikuteera ebyatsi. Yaakorera kimwe ebirikwangwa Nyakubaho, yaamugwisa kubi munonga." 
2Chronicles33:7 Kandi ekishushani ky'emandwa erikuramibwa eki yaakozire, yaakita omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ei Ruhanga yaagambiire Daudi n'omutabani Solomooni ati: Omuri egi nju, n'omuri Yerusalemu orurembo ru naatooraine omu z'enganda za Isiraeli zoona, nimwo bariguma nibandamiza." 
2Chronicles33:8 Ati: Naanye tindiiha bundi Baisiraeli omu nsi ei naahaire baishenkurubo, ku baritaho omutima kukora byona ebi naabaragiire, byona eby'omu biragiro, n'ebyatairweho, n'ebyaragiirwe, ebi naabahaire nimbirabya ahari Musa." 
2Chronicles33:9 Manaase akahabisa Abaayuda, n'ab'omuri Yerusalemu; baakora ebibi bingi ebirikukira eby'abanyamahanga abu Nyakubaho yaacwekyereize kuhigiza Abaisiraeli." 
2Chronicles33:10 Nyakubaho akateisa Manaase n'abantu be, kwonka bo tibaakyeetaho." 
2Chronicles33:11 Nikyo Nyakubaho yaabashunikiriire abakuru b'eihe ry'omugabe wa Asiriya kubateera; bakakwata Manaase n'ebyoma bigondekire, bakamukomesa emihama y'emiringa, bakamutwara Babulooni." 
2Chronicles33:12 Mbwenu ku yaabaire aine enaku nyingi, yaayeshengyereza Mukama Ruhanga we kumugirira embabazi; yaayebundika munonga omu maisho ga Ruhanga wa baishenkuru." 
2Chronicles33:13 Yaamushaba. Na Ruhanga yaikiriza eki yaamushaba; yaahurira okweshengyereza kwe; yaamugarura Yerusalemu aha bugabe bwe. Manaase yaamanyira aho ku Mukama ari Ruhanga. 
2Chronicles33:14 Bwanyima yaayombeka orugo rw'amabaare; yaarwezigooza orurembo rwa Daudi aha burengyerwa-izooba bwa Gihooni omu ruhanga, yaaruhitsya aharikutaahirwa omu irembo ry'ebyenyanja, yaaruziguurutsya Ofeli. Yaarutunguura, rwahika ahaiguru munonga. Kandi yaata abakuru b'engabo omu ndembo za Buyuda zoona eziine ebigo bigumire." 
2Chronicles33:15 Yaiha omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga, n'ekishushani ekirikuramibwa. Yaihaho n'amatambiro goona agu yaayombekire aha kashozi ka Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho n'omuri Yerusalemu; yaabinaga aheeru y'orurembo." 
2Chronicles33:16 Reero yaagaruraho eitambiro rya Nyakubaho, yaaritambiraho ebitambo by'okurya kumwe n'obusingye n'eby'okusiima; kandi yaaragiira Abaayuda kuramya Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles33:17 Nobu abantu baagumire nibatambira ebitambo aha butungutungu, kwonka bakaba babitambira Mukama Ruhanga waabo wenka." 
2Chronicles33:18 Mbwenu ebindi ebi Manaase yaakozire, n'oku yaashabire Ruhanga we, n'ebi abahanuuzi baamugambiire omu iziina rya Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, reeba biri omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'Abagabe ba Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles33:19 Kandi okushaba kwe, n'oku Ruhanga yaikiriize eki yaamushabire, n'ebibi bye byona, n'okucumura kwe, n'obutungutungu bu yaayombekireho egashani, akazitamu ebishushani by'emandwakazi Ashera atakeebundikire, reeba bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'ebyabaireho omu biro by'Abahanuuzi." 
2Chronicles33:20 Bwanyima Manaase akafa, yaashanga baishenkuru; baamuziika omu kikaari kye; omutabani Amoni yaamuhungurira." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni akaba omugabe aine myaka makumi abiri n'ebiri y'obukuru; yaategyekyera emyaka ebiri omuri Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles33:22 Akakora ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho, nk'oku Manaase ishe yaakozire. Ebishushani ebi Manaase ishe yaakozire, Amoni akabitambira ebitambo, yaabiramya." 
2Chronicles33:23 Ekindi, tareebundikire omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, nk'oku Manaase ishe yaayebundikire. Kureka Amoni ogu akaguma naayongyerera ebibi aha bindi." 
2Chronicles33:24 Bwanyima abagaragwa be bakamugiira omu naama, baamwitira omu kikaari kye." 
2Chronicles33:25 Kwonka ab'omuri egyo nsi nabo baita abantu boona abaagiiriire Omugabe Amoni omu naama y'okumwita; baayemeka omutabani Yosiya kumuhungurira. 
2Chronicles34:1 Yosiya akaba omugabe aine emyaka munaana y'obukuru; yaategyekyera emyaka makumi ashatu na gumwe omuri Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles34:2 Akakora ebi Nyakubaho arikusiima, yaatwaza nka Daudi ishenkuru, tiyaateishuka muhanda kutoora oku n'oku." 
2Chronicles34:3 Ahabw'okuba omu mwaka gwe gwa munaana ari aha ngoma, akiri omutsigazi, akatandika kuramya Ruhanga wa Daudi ishenkuru. Kandi omu mwaka gwe gwa ikumi n'ebiri, yaiha omuri Buyuda n'omuri Yerusalemu emyanya etunguukire ey'okuramizamu, n'enyomyo z'emirinzi eza ruhangakazi Ashera, n'ebishushani ebisharwirwe n'ebiheesirwe." 
2Chronicles34:4 Yaayemererera abarikusheenyagura amatambiro ga Baabaali, yaatemagura amatambiro agu barikwotereraho obubaani agagatungamiire. Yaasheenyagura ebishushani bya Ashera ebisharwirwe n'ebiheesirwe, yaabicwa obusaasingo, yaabwata aha bituuro by'abaabaire babitambira ebitambo." 
2Chronicles34:5 Yaataho n'okwokyeza amagufa g'abahongyerezi aha matambiro gaabyo, yaashemeza Buyuda na Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles34:6 Yaakora atyo n'omu ndembo za Manaase, n'eza Efuraimu, n'eza Simeoni, okuhikira kimwe omu za Nafutaali, n'omu byanga ebyacwekire amatongo, ebizeehinguririize." 
2Chronicles34:7 Yaasheenyagura amatambiro, yaacwa obusaasingo enyomyo z'emirinzi, n'ebishushani bya Ashera; kandi yaatemagura amatambiro g'okwotereraho obubaani omuri Isiraeli yoona. Bwanyima yaagaruka Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles34:8 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi na munaana ogw'omu busingye bwa Yosiya, aherize kwiha omu ihanga n'omuri Nyaruju eby'obukaafiiri, akoohereza Shafani mwene Azaliya, na Maseya omutegyeki mukuru w'orurembo, na Yoa mwene Yoahazi omuhandiiki w'ebirikubaho, kuhunduuza Nyaruju ya Mukama Ruhanga we." 
2Chronicles34:9 Baija, baahika Hilikiya omuhongyerezi omukuru, baamukwatsa empiiha ezareetsirwe omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga ezi Abaleevi abakumiirizi b'aha marembo baashoroorize aha Baamanaase, n'Abaefuraimu, n'abandi boona abaatsigaire omuri Isiraeli, n'ab'omuri Buyuda boona, n'aha Baabenyamiini, n'aha batwire omuri Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles34:10 Nabo baazitwarira abakozi abarikureeberera Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Abo bakozi b'omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho baazihayo kuzihunduuzisa Nyaruju n'okugigira nsya. 
2Chronicles34:11 Baaziha ababaizi n'abombeki kuziguramu amabaare gabaizire, n'embaaho z'okuteerana, n'emitambiko, eby'okukoresa aha byombeko ebi abagabe ba Buyuda baarekire bikasiisikara." 
2Chronicles34:12 Haza abo bashaija baakora omurimo n'obwesigwa. Baabataho Yohati na Obadiya Abaleevi b'omuri beene Meraari, na Zekariya na Meshuula ab'omuri beene Kohati, kubareeberera. Abaleevi boona abaabaire nibamanya gye eby'okujumeeza amaraka," 
2Chronicles34:13 bakaba nibareeberera abeekorezi, hamwe n'okuhabura abarikukora emirimo y'okuheereza ey'emiringo yoona. Abandi Baleevi baaba abahandiiki na baakaraani, n'abakumiirizi." 
2Chronicles34:14 Reero ku baabaire nibaiha omu mabiikiro ga Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho empiiha ezaareetsirwemu, Hilikiya omuhongyerezi yaazoora ekitabo ky'eiteeka rya Nyakubaho eri yaahaire abantu naarirabya ahari Musa." 
2Chronicles34:15 Hilikiya agira Shefani omuhandiiki ati: Naazoora omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ekitabo ky'eiteeka. Atyo Hilikiya akiha Shefani. 
2Chronicles34:16 Shefani nawe akireetera omugabe, amugambira n'eby'omurimo, ati: Byona ebi waaragiire abairu baawe, bariyo nibabikora." 
2Chronicles34:17 Baihireyo empiiha zoona ezi bashangire omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, baazikwatsa abareeberezi b'omurimo n'abakozi baagwo." 
2Chronicles34:18 Bwanyima Shefani omuhandiiki agambira omugabe ati: Hilikiya omuhongyerezi ampaire ekitabo. Shefani akishomera omugabe. 
2Chronicles34:19 Omugabe ku yaahuriire eby'omu iteeka, yaataagura ebi ajwaire." 
2Chronicles34:20 Mpaho omugabe aragiira Hilikiya, na Ahikaamu mwene Shafani, na Abudooni mwene Miika, na Shafani omuhandiiki, na Asaaya omugaragwa we ati:" 
2Chronicles34:21 Nimwirooko, nyowe n'abaatsigaire omuri Isiraeli n'omuri Yuda, mutubuurize Nyakubaho ebikwatiraine n'ebigambo by'omuri eki kitabo ekizoirwe. Manya kashanga ya Nyakubaho empango etuhingamiire, ahabw'okuba baatatenkuriitwe tibarakuratiire ki Nyakubaho yaabagambiire, kuguma nibakora byona ebihandiikirwe omuri eki kitabo." 
2Chronicles34:22 Hilikiya n'abu omugabe yaatumire bakagyenda, baahika Huluda omurangikazi, muka Shalumu, mwene Tokuhaati, mwijukuru wa Hasira, omurinzi w'eibiikiro ry'ebijwaro; (obwo ogwo mukazi atwire omuri Yerusalemu omu kirorero kyayo kya kabiri), baabimuteekyerereza." 
2Chronicles34:23 Nawe yaabagambira ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Mugambire omuntu obantumireho, muti:" 
2Chronicles34:24 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kugwisiza akagwe ogu mwanya n'abagutwiremu, gwitwe emikyeeno ehandiikirwe omu kitabo eki bashomeire omugabe wa Buyuda." 
2Chronicles34:25 Ahabw'okuba bakaanyimuura, baatambira baaruhanga abandi ebitambo. Haza bangwisa kubi ahabw'ebi baakozire byona. Nikyo kashanga yangye erikwija kujuumikirira ogu mwanya, kandi terikwija kwikaikanisibwa." 
2Chronicles34:26 Kwonka omugabe wa Buyuda obatumire kwehanuuza ahari Mukama, mumugire muti: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Aha bikwatiraine n'ebi ohuriire;" 
2Chronicles34:27 nk'oku oyeteisize oihire aha mutima, okeebundika omu maisho ga Ruhanga, waahurira ebi agambire aha mwanya ogu n'abagutwiremu, okeebundika omu maisho gangye, okataagura ebi ojwaire, okandirira omu maisho, naanye nkuhuriire. Nikwo Nyakubaho arikugira." 
2Chronicles34:28 Reeba, ndyakushangisa baashwenkuru, oziikwe omu kituuro kyawe n'obusingye, oteereebeire n'amaisho gaawe ako kagwe karigwera ogu mwanya n'abagutwiremu. Nabo baagyenda, baabiteekyerereza omugabe." 
2Chronicles34:29 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Omugabe Yosiya yaatuma aha bakuru b'omuri Buyuda n'omuri Yerusalemu kuteeranira hamwe boona." 
2Chronicles34:30 Omugabe yaaza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho hamwe n'Abaayuda boona, n'abatuuzi b'omuri Yerusalemu, n'abahongyerezi, n'Abaleevi, n'abantu boona abakuru n'abato. Baamutega okutu, yaabashomera eby'omu kitabo ky'endagaano ekyazoirwe omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles34:31 Bwanyima yaayemerera omu mwanya gwe, yaaragaanira endagaano omu maisho ga Nyakubaho kuguma naamworobera, naakuratira ebiragiro bye, n'ebi yaahamize, n'ebi yaataireho, n'omutima gwe gwona, n'amagara ge goona, kandi n'okuhikiiriza eby'egyo ndagaano ebihandiikirwe omuri ekyo kitabo." 
2Chronicles34:32 Bwanyima yaaragiira abaabaire bateeraniire Yerusalemu boona, n'ab'omu kyanga kya Benyamiini, kugyeemera; n'abatwire Yerusalemu baaba nikwo baatwaza egyo ndagaano ya Ruhanga wa baishebo." 
2Chronicles34:33 Kandi Yosiya yaiha ebihagaro byona omu byanga byona eby'Abaisiraeli; yaareetera boona abatwire omuri Isiraeli kuramya Mukama Ruhanga waabo. Omu busingye bwe bwona tibaagira bu barekire kukuratira Mukama Ruhanga wa baishebo. 
2Chronicles35:1 Yosiya akakorera Nyakubaho omuri Yerusalemu omugyenzo gw'Okuhingurwaho. Baita abaana b'entaama b'Okuhingurwaho aha kiro kya ikumi na bina eky'okwezi kw'okubanza. 
2Chronicles35:2 Yaagarura abahongyerezi aha myoga yaabo, yaabateera omuhimbo kukora emirimo y'obuheereza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
2Chronicles35:3 Reero yaagambira Abaleevi abeegyesa b'Abaisiraeli, kandi abeeheereire kimwe Nyakubaho, ati: Mute eshanduukye erikwera omuri Nyaruju ei Solomooni mwene Daudi omugabe wa Isiraeli yaayombekire. Timwakyetenga kugiheeka aha mabega bundi. Hati muheereze Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, n'abantu be Abaisiraeli." 
2Chronicles35:4 Mwetebeekanise omu mbu zaanyu, nk'emiryango ya baashwenkuriimwe oku eri, nimukuratira ebi Daudi omugabe wa Isiraeli na Solomooni omutabani baaragiire." 
2Chronicles35:5 Haza mwemerere omu Mwanya Ogurikwera nk'emitwe y'emiryango ya baishenkuru ba beene waanyu abatari Baleevi oku eri. Buri mutwe gugire ekicweka ky'ab'omuryango gwa baishenkuru b'Abaleevi. 
2Chronicles35:6 Mpaho mwite abaana b'entaama b'Okuhingurwaho, naimwe mweyeze, mutebeekanisize beene waanyu, bakore nk'oku Nyakubaho yaaragiire, naakigambisa Musa." 
2Chronicles35:7 Bwanyima Yosiya yaaha abantu abatari Baleevi abaana b'entaama n'ab'embuzi; boona hamwe obukumi bushatu, naabaiha omu masyo; n'enimi enkumi ishatu, kuba ebitambo by'Okuhingurwaho ahabw'abateeraniire aho boona. Haza ebyo byona akabiiha omu matungo ge." 
2Chronicles35:8 Abategyeki be nabo beekundiire baagira ebi baaha abantu n'abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi. Hilikiya, Zekariya na Yehieli, abakungu bakuru aba Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, baaha abahongyerezi abaana b'entaama n'ab'embuzi enkumi ibiri na magana mukaaga, n'enimi magana ashatu kuba ebitambo by'Okuhingurwaho." 
2Chronicles35:9 Konaniya na Shemaaya na Netaneeli abarumuna, na Hashabiya na Yeieli na Yozabadi abakuru b'Abaleevi, nabo baaha Abaleevi abaana b'entaama n'ab'embuzi enkumi itaano, n'enimi magana ataano, kuba ebitambo by'Okuhingurwaho." 
2Chronicles35:10 Emirimo y'okwetebeekanisa ku yaahwaire, abahongyerezi baayemerera omu myanya yaabo, n'Abaleevi baaza omu bichweka byabo, nk'oku omugabe yaaragiire." 
2Chronicles35:11 Baita abaana b'entaama b'Okuhingurwaho. Abahongyerezi baamiisiira eshagama ei baabaire nibaheebwa Abaleevi abarikubaaga ebitambo. 
2Chronicles35:12 Baihaho ebitungirwe by'okuba ebitambo bicwekize, baabibaganisa nk'emitwe y'ab'emiryango ya baishenkuru abatari Baleevi oku eri, kubitambira Nyakubaho, nk'oku kihandiikirwe omu kitabo kya Musa. N'enimi baaba nikwo baitwaza." 
2Chronicles35:13 Baayotsya abaana b'entaama b'Okuhingurwaho, nk'oku kirikuragiirwa; kandi baateeka ebitambo ebirikwera omu nyabya, n'omu nyungu, n'omu sefuriya; baabitwarira abantu boona abatari Baleevi ahonaaho." 
2Chronicles35:14 Bwanyima baayebonereza ebyabo n'eby'abahongyerezi; ahabw'okuba abahongyerezi beene Arooni bakaba nibeehenenga, nibatamba ebitambo bicwekize n'enyama z'ebishaju, okuhitsya obu bwaizire. Abaleevi batyo baayetebeekanisiza ebyabo n'eby'abahongyerezi beene Arooni." 
2Chronicles35:15 Abeeshongozi beene Asafu baaza omu mwanya gwabo, nk'oku Daudi na Asafu na Hemani na Yedutuuni omuhanuuzi w'omugabe baaragiire. Reero abakumiirizi baaguma aha marembo, kitarikubeetengyesa kuruga aha murimo gwabo, ahabw'okuba beene waabo Abaleevi bakabatebeekanisiza ebyabo." 
2Chronicles35:16 Okwo nikwo omurimo gwona ogw'okuramya Nyakubaho gwatebeekanisiibwe eryo izooba kukora omugyenzo gw'Okuhingurwaho, n'okutambira aha itambiro rya Nyakubaho ebitambo bicwekize, nk'oku omugabe Yosiya yaaragiire." 
2Chronicles35:17 Abaisiraeli boona abaabaire bari aho ago magingo baagira obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho, n'obw'Emigaati Etatumbisiibwe, okumara ebiro mushanju." 
2Chronicles35:18 Omuri Isiraeli, okwiha omu biro bya Samueli omurangi, hakaba hatakabahoga obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho oburi nk'obwo. Kandi hakaba hatakabahoga bagabe ba Isiraeli abaragizire obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho nk'obwagizirwe Yosiya, n'abahongyerezi, n'Abaleevi, n'Abaayuda boona, n'Abaisiraeli abaabaire bariho, n'abatwire omuri Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles35:19 Omugyenzo gw'Okuhingurwaho ogwo gukakorwa omu mwaka gwa ikumi na munaana ogw'omu busingye bwa Yosiya. 
2Chronicles35:20 Yosiya ku yaabaire yaaherize kutebeekanisa ebya Nyaruju byona, Neeko omugabe wa Misiri yaahurura kurwanira orugamba Karikemishi, ahari Eufuraati. Yosiya nawe yaahurura kumurwanisa." 
2Chronicles35:21 Kwonka Neeko yaamutumaho entumwa naamugira ati: Iwe mugabe wa Buyuda 'we, nyowe naiwe nitufa ki? Aha murundi ogu tiiwe nyizire kurwanisa, kureka ab'ogundi muryango gw'obugabe nibo ndikwenda kurwana nabo orugamba. Kandi Ruhanga andagiire kukikoresa obwira. Ruga Ruhanga omu kaso, ahabw'okuba ari hamwe naanye; atakaakucwekyereza." 
2Chronicles35:22 Kwonka Yosiya yaayanga kumurugaho, yaayehindura okundi, ngu arwane nawe. Tiyaikiriza bya Neeko ebi yaagambisiibwe Ruhanga; kureka yaaza omu rugamba omu ruhita rwa Megido." 
2Chronicles35:23 Ab'amata baarasha omugabe Yosiya, nawe nikwo kugambira abagaragwa be ati: Nimuunyiheho, ahabw'okuba naahutaara munonga." 
2Chronicles35:24 Abagaragwa be batyo bamwiha omu kigaari kye, bamuta omu kya kabiri, bamutwara Yerusalemu, agwayo; bamuziika omu bituuro bya baishenkuru. Abaayuda boona n'ab'omuri Yerusalemu bamucurira." 
2Chronicles35:25 Yeremiya yaahimba ekyeshongoro ky'okutongyeza Yosiya; abashaija n'abakazi boona abeeshongozi baaguma nibakyeshongora nibamutongyeza, okuhitsya n'eri izooba. Ekyo kyeshongoro bakihindura omugyenzo omuri Isiraeli; na mbwenu kihandiikirwe omu by'Okutonzya." 
2Chronicles35:26 Endiijo mirimo ya Yosiya, n'ebirungi bi yaakozire naakuratira ebihandiikirwe omu iteeka rya Nyakubaho," 
2Chronicles35:27 n'ebi yaakozire okwiha aha kutandika okuhitsya aha muheru, reeba, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'Abagabe ba Isiraeli n'aba Yuda." 
2Chronicles36:1 Abantu b'omuri Buyuda bakaihayo Yehoahazi, mutabani wa Yosiya, baamuhindura omugabe, yaahungurira ishe omuri Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:2 Yehoahazi ogwo akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka makumi abiri n'eshatu y'obukuru; yaategyekyera ameezi ashatu omuri Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles36:3 Bwanyima Neeko omugabe wa Misiri yaamwiha aha bugabe omuri Yerusalemu, kandi yaacwera ab'omuri egyo nsi omushoro gw'empiiha z'efeeza obusiriira mukaaga, n'ez'ezaabu enkumi mukaaga." 
2Chronicles36:4 Ogwo mugabe wa Misiri yaayemeka Eliyakimu, murumuna wa Yehoahazi, kuba omugabe wa Buyuda na Yerusalemu; kandi yaahindura eiziina rye, yaamweta Yehoyakimu. Reero Neeko yaakwata Yehoahazi, mukuru wa Yehoyakimu, yaamutwara Misiri." 
2Chronicles36:5 Yehoyakimu akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka y'obukuru makumi abiri n'etaano; yaategyekyera emyaka ikumi na gumwe omuri Yerusalemu. Haza yaakora ebitarikusiimwa Mukama Ruhanga. 
2Chronicles36:6 Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni akaija yaamurwanisa, yaamukomesa emihama, yaamutwara Babulooni." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadenezaari yaataho n'okunyaga ebintu bimwe eby'omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, yaabitwara Babulooni, yaabita omu kikaari kye." 
2Chronicles36:8 Mbwenu ebindi bikoro bya Yehoyakimu n'ebihagaro bi yaakozire, n'ebi yaacumwire, reeba, bihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'Abagabe ba Isiraeli n'aba Yuda. Bwanyima Yehoyakini yaamuhungurira." 
2Chronicles36:9 Yehoyakini akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka munaana y'obukuru; yaategyekyera ameezi ashatu n'ebiro ikumi omuri Yerusalemu; yaakora ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho. 
2Chronicles36:10 Omuri katumba, Omugabe Nebukadenezaari yaayohereza abantu baamutwara Babulooni ari embohe, n'ebintu by'obuguzi bwingi ebya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Reero yaataho mukuru we Zedekiya kuba omugabe wa Buyuda na Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekiya akaza aha ngoma aine emyaka makumi abiri na gumwe y'obukuru; yaategyekyera emyaka ikumi na gumwe omuri Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles36:12 Akakora ebitarikusiimwa Mukama Ruhanga we. Tiyaayebundika mu maisho ga Yeremiya omurangi, owaabaire amugambira ebi Nyakubaho amutumire." 
2Chronicles36:13 Yaataho n'okugomera omugabe Nebukadenezaari owaabaire amurahiize Ruhanga ku arikwija kuguma naamuhurira. Kureka yaaba entahurira, yaagangaaza omutima, yaayanga kukubuukira Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles36:14 Abahongyerezi abakuru n'abantu boona nabo baarengyesereza okutaba beesigwa, baatooreza ebihangaro by'abanyamahanga, baahagaza Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ei yaayereize omuri Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:15 Mukama Ruhanga wa baishebo yaaguma naabatumaho entumwa ze kubateisa; ahabw'okuba akaba ainiire abantu be n'obutaaho bwe esaasi. 
2Chronicles36:16 Kwonka bo baaguma nibashungisa ezo ntumwa za Ruhanga, nibagaya ebi arikubagambira; kandi nibagaaniiza abarangi be, okuhitsya obu kashanga ya Nyakubaho yaajuumikiire abo bantu be, bakabura oku baraagikire." 
2Chronicles36:17 Nyakubaho nikyo yaabateereize omugabe w'Abakaludaaya, akaitira abatsigazi baabo omuri Nyaruju y'Obutaaho bwabo oburikwera. Akanga kugirira esaasi ekyeetwa omutsigazi n'empangare, omugurusi n'omukaikuru owaahikire omu ngingo za bukuru. Boona yaabamurekurira." 
2Chronicles36:18 Ebintu byona eby'omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, ebihango n'ebikye, eby'obutungi by'omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'eby'omugabe, n'eby'abategyeki be, ebyo byona ogwo mugabe yaabitwara Babulooni." 
2Chronicles36:19 Baayotsya Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, baasheenya orugo rwa Yerusalemu, baayotsya ebikaari byayo byona, kandi baacwekyereza ebintu byayo byona eby'obuguzi bwingi." 
2Chronicles36:20 Abaahonokireho boona yaabatwara Babulooni kubazaahizayo; baaba abahuuku be n'ab'abatabani, okuhitsya obu obugabe bw'Abaperisi bwategyekire." 
2Chronicles36:21 Ekyo kyahikiiriza eki Nyakubaho yaagambiise Yeremiya ati: Okuhitsya obu egi nsi erinanurwa obuhuumure bwa Sabato zaayo. Manya ebiro byona ebi yaamazire eri omushaka ekaguma neerinda Zaasabato okumara emyaka makumi mushanju. 
2Chronicles36:22 Omu mwaka gw'okubanza, ogw'omu busingye bwa Kuuro omugabe wa Perisiya, Nyakubaho akahikiiriza eki yaagambiise Yeremiya, yaimutsya Kuuro omugabe wa Perisiya; yaarangirira omu bugabe bwe bwona; kandi eki yaaragiire yaakihandiika ati:" 
2Chronicles36:23 Nyowe Kuuro omugabe wa Perisiya nindangirira nti: Nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga ow'omu iguru yampaire obushoboorozi kutegyeka abagabe b'omu nsi yoona, kandi akandagiira kumwombekyera Nyaruju omuri Yerusalemu ey'omuri Buyuda, mbwenu omuntu weena omuriimwe ori omuntu wa Ruhanga, azeyo. Mukama Ruhanga we naakagume nawe." 
Ezra1:1 Omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'omu busingye bwa Kuuro omugabe wa Perisiya, Nyakubaho akakora aha mutima gwa Kuuro omugabe wa Perisiya, ngu ekigambo kya Nyakubaho ogwo eki yaagambiise Yeremiya kibone kuhikiirizibwa. Mpaho Kuuro ogwo yaataho ekirangiriro omu bugabe bwe bwona kandi yaakihandiikisa ati:" 
Ezra1:2 Oku nikwo Kuuro omugabe wa Buperisiya arikugira: Mukama Ruhanga, Mukama w'eiguru ampaire obugabe bwona obw'omu nsi, kandi andagiire kumwombekyera enju omuri Yerusalemu ey'omuri Yuda." 
Ezra1:3 Mbwenu omuntu weena omuriimwe ow'omu bantu be, Ruhanga we naakagume nawe, kandi ainamukye Yerusalemu ey'omu Yuda, ayombekye busya enju ya Nyakubaho, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli niwe Ruhanga otuura omuri Yerusalemu." 
Ezra1:4 Omuntu weena owaahonokireho, ori ei ashuuhuukiire, abantu bu atwire nabo bamukwatse nibamuha eby'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu n'ebindi bintu n'amatungo, otabariiremu emitoijo ei abantu barikuha beekundiire, ahabw'enju ya Ruhanga ey'omuri Yerusalemu." 
Ezra1:5 Mpaho haimuka abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo ogwa Yuda n'ogwa Benyamiini n'abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi na ibara muntu ou Ruhanga yaakozire aha mutima, kwinamuka kwombeka busya enju ya Nyakubaho ey'omuri Yerusalemu;" 
Ezra1:6 haza boona abaabaire batwire nabo baabatwera ebintu eby'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu n'ebindi bintu, n'amatungo n'ebindi eby'obuguzi bwingi, otabariiremu byona ebi baatoizire beekundiire." 
Ezra1:7 Omugabe Kuuro nawe yaihayo ebintu by'enju ya Nyakubaho ebi Nebukadenezaari yaabaire anyagire Yerusalemu, akabita omu nju ya baaruhanga be." 
Ezra1:8 Kuuro ogwo mugabe wa Buperisiya yaabiihayo, yaabikwatsa Miiteredaati omubiiki, n'onu yaabibarira Sheshabazaari omwinginya wa Yuda." 
Ezra1:9 Kandi ogu nigwo mubaro gwabyo, eshuhaani makumi ashatu z'ezaabu, eshohaani rukumi z'efeeza, n'ebyoterero makumi abiri na mwenda;" 
Ezra1:10 enyabya z'ezaabu makumi ashatu, enyabya ez'efeeza enkumi ibiri na magana ana na ikumi; n'ebindi bintu rukumi;" 
Ezra1:11 byona ebintu eby'ezaabu n'eby'efeeza bikahika enkumi itaano na magana ana na makumi mukaaga na mwenda. Ebyo byona Sheshabazaari akabiinamukana obu abaazaahiibwe baihwa Babulooni, bakagarurwa Yerusalemu." 
Ezra2:1 Mbwenu aba nibo bantu b'eihanga abaarugire omu baazaahiibwe abu Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni yaabaire atwaire Babulooni bari enkwatwa, bakagaruka Yerusalemu na Buyudaaya, buri omwe omu kirorero ky'owaabo." 
Ezra2:2 Bakaija na Zerubabeeli, Yoshwa, Nehemiya, Seraaya, Reelayiya, Morodekai, Bilishani, Miisipari, Bigivayi, Rehumu na Baanahi. Ogu nigwo mubaro gw'abashaija b'omu Baisiraeli:" 
Ezra2:3 beene Paroshi, enkumi ibiri na igana na makumi mushanju na babiri." 
Ezra2:4 Beene Shelapatiya, magana ashatu na makumi mushanju na babiri." 
Ezra2:5 Beene Aara, magana mushanju na makumi mushanju na bataano." 
Ezra2:6 Beene Pahatimoabu, nibo beene Yeshwa na Yoabu, enkumi ibiri na magana munaana na ikumi na babiri." 
Ezra2:7 Beene Elamu, rukumi na magana abiri na makumi ataano na bana." 
Ezra2:8 Beene Zaatu, magana mwenda na makumi ana na bataano." 
Ezra2:9 Beene Zaakayi, magana mushanju na makumi mukaaga." 
Ezra2:10 Beene Bani, magana mukaaga na makumi ana na babiri." 
Ezra2:11 Beene Beebai, magana mukaaga na makumi abiri na bashatu." 
Ezra2:12 Beene Azigaadi, rukumi na magana abiri na makumi abiri na babiri." 
Ezra2:13 Beene Adoniikamu, magana mukaaga na makumi mukaaga na mukaaga." 
Ezra2:14 Beene Biigivai, enkumi ibiri na makumi ataano na mukaaga." 
Ezra2:15 Beene Adini, magana ana na makumi ataano na bana." 
Ezra2:16 Beene Ateeri nibo ba Hezekiya, makumi mwenda na munaana." 
Ezra2:17 Beene Beezai, magana ashatu na makumi abiri na bashatu." 
Ezra2:18 Beene Yora, igana na ikumi na babiri." 
Ezra2:19 Beene Hashumi, magana abiri na makumi abiri na bashatu." 
Ezra2:20 Beene Giibari, makumi mwenda na bataano." 
Ezra2:21 Beene Beetelehemu, igana na makumi abiri na bashatu." 
Ezra2:22 Abashaija ba Netoofa, makumi ataano na mukaaga." 
Ezra2:23 Abashaija ba Anatooti, igana na makumi abari na munaana." 
Ezra2:24 Beene Azimareeti, makumi ana na babiri." 
Ezra2:25 Beene Kiiriyatyearimu, Keefiira na Beerooti, magana mushanju na makumi ana na bashatu." 
Ezra2:26 Beene Raama na Geba, magana mukaaga na makumi abiri n'omwe." 
Ezra2:27 Abashaija ba Miikimaasi, igana na makumi abiri na babiri." 
Ezra2:28 Abashaija ba Beteli na Aayi, magana abiri na makumi abiri na bashatu." 
Ezra2:29 Beene Neebo, makumi ataano na babiri." 
Ezra2:30 Beene Magibishu, igana na makumi ataano na mukaaga." 
Ezra2:31 Beene Elamu ondi, rukumi na magana abiri na makumi ataano na bana." 
Ezra2:32 Beene Harimu, magana ashatu na makumi abiri." 
Ezra2:33 Beene Loodi, Hadidi na Ono, magana mushanju na makumi abiri na bataano." 
Ezra2:34 Beene Yeriko, magana ashatu na makumi ana na bataano." 
Ezra2:35 Beene Senaahi, enkumi ishatu na magana mukaaga na makumi ashatu." 
Ezra2:36 Reero abahongyerezi nibo aba: Beene Yedaaya, ab'omuryango gwa Yeshwa, magana mwenda na makumi mushanju na bashatu." 
Ezra2:37 Beene Imeri, rukumi na makumi ataano na babiri." 
Ezra2:38 Beene Pashishuri, rukumi na magana abiri na makumi ana na mushanju." 
Ezra2:39 Beene Harimu, rukumi na ikumi na mushanju." 
Ezra2:40 Kandi Abaleevi nibo aba: Beene Yeshwa na Kaadimieli, aba beene Hodariya, makumi mushanju na bana." 
Ezra2:41 Abeeshongozi, beene Asafu, igana na makumi abiri na munaana." 
Ezra2:42 Batabani b'abakumiirizi: Beene Shaluumi, beene Ateri, bene Talumooni, beene Akubu, beene Hatiita na beene Shobai; boona hamwe igana na makumi ashatu na mwenda." 
Ezra2:43 Reero abaheereza b'omuri Nyaruju nibo aba: Beene Ziha, beene Hasuufa, beene tabaahoti," 
Ezra2:44 beene Kerosi, beene Siiyaha, beene Padoni," 
Ezra2:45 beene Lebaana, beene Haagaba, beene Akubu," 
Ezra2:46 beene Hagabu, beene Shamulai, beene Hanani," 
Ezra2:47 beene Giideli, beene Gahari, beene Reyiiha," 
Ezra2:48 beene Rezini, beene Nekooda, beene Gaazamu," 
Ezra2:49 beene Uuza, beene Peseeya, beene Besai," 
Ezra2:50 beene Asina, beene Meunimu, beene Nefiisimu," 
Ezra2:51 beene Bakubuku, beene Hakuufa, beene Harihuri," 
Ezra2:52 beene Paziluuti, beene Nehiida, beene Harisha," 
Ezra2:53 beene Barikozi, beene Siisera, beene Tema," 
Ezra2:54 beene Neziiya na beene Hatiipa. 
Ezra2:55 Batabani b'abagaragwa ba Solomooni nibo aba. Beene Sotai, beene Hasoofereti, beene Peruda," 
Ezra2:56 bene Yaa-Ala, beene Darikooni, beene Giideli," 
Ezra2:57 beene Shefatiya, beene Hatili, beene Pokereti-hazebaimu, na beene Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Beene abaheereza b'omuri Nyaruju na batabani b'abagaragwa ba Solomooni bakaba bari magana ashatu na makumi mwenda na babiri. 
Ezra2:59 Reero aba nibo baarugire Telimeela, Telihaarisha, Keerubi, Adani na Imeri, nobu baraabe batarabaasize kuhamya emiryango ya baishenkurubo nari obukomooko bwabo; yaaba baabaire bari ab'omu Baisiraeli;" 
Ezra2:60 beene Delayiiya, beene Toobiya na beene Nekooda, amagana mukaaga na makumi ataano na babiri." 
Ezra2:61 Kandi aba batabani b'abahongyerezi: beene Habayiiya; beene Haakozi, na beene Barizilaayi owaashweire omukazi omuri bahara ba Barizilaayi Omugileadi, akabeetererwa." 
Ezra2:62 Abo bakashaba amaziina gaabo kusherurwa omu gahandiikirwe omu kukuratana kwa baishenkurubo, kwonka ku gaabuziremu tibaabarirwa mu bahongyerezi, baayetwa abatashemeire." 
Ezra2:63 Omutegyeki omukuru yaabagira ngu tibokubagana n'abandi ebyokurya ebirikwerera kimwe, okuhitsya obu baraazoore omuhongyerezi oraayehanuuze ahari Urimu na Tumimu." 
Ezra2:64 Mpaho boona abaateeraine hamwe baahika obukumi buna n'enkumi ibiri na magana ashatu na makumi mukaaga," 
Ezra2:65 otabariiremu abahuuku n'abazaana abaabaire nibahika enkumi mushanju na magana ashatu na makumi ashatu na mushanju; kandi baine abeeshongozi magana abiri, abashaija n'abakazi." 
Ezra2:66 Embaraasi zaabo zikaba ziri magana mushanju na makumi ashatu na mukaaga, enyumbu zaabo ziri magana abiri na makumi ana na itaano;" 
Ezra2:67 engamira zaabo magana ana na makumi ashatu na itaano, n'endogoya zaabo enkumi mukaaga na magana mushanju na makumi abiri." 
Ezra2:68 Ku baahikire ahari Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho omuri Yerusalemu, bamwe omu bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, baahayo emitoijo y'okwombeka busya enju ya Ruhanga omu mwanya gwayo, beekundiire." 
Ezra2:69 Baahayo nk'oku barikubaasa, ebyarundaaniirwe ogwo murimo, ebirikuhitsya ebicweka by'ezaabu omu ibiikiro ry'empiiha, obusiriira bushatu emitwaro eshatu enkumi itaano na magana ashatu na kinaana na munaana, n'ebicweka by'efeeza emitwaro mushanju enkumi itaano na magana ataano, n'ebijwaro igana eby'abahongyerezi." 
Ezra2:70 Batyo abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi n'abantu bamwe baatuura omuri Yerusalemu n'omu myanya ehereeraine nayo, kandi abeeshongozi n'abakumiirizi n'abaheereza b'omuri Nyaruju baatuura omu birorero ebyabo; reero Abaisiraeli boona nabo baatuura omu birorero ebyabo." 
Ezra3:1 Okwezi kwa mushanju ku kwahikire, Abaisiraeli bari omu birorero byabo, abantu baateeranira Yerusalemu bari nk'omuntu omwe." 
Ezra3:2 Mpaho haimuka Yeshwa mwene Yoozadaki, hamwe n'abahongyerezi bagyenzi be, na Zerubabeeli mwene Shealitieli, na beene waabo, baayombekyera Ruhanga wa Isiraeli eitambiro, kurihongyeraho ebihongwa ebicwekize, nk'oku kyahandiikirwe omu iteeka rya Musa omuntu wa Ruhanga." 
Ezra3:3 Eryo itambiro baarigarura omu mwanya gwaryo, n'obu baraabe baabaire nibatiina abantu b'omuri ebyo byanga. Batyo baarihongyeraho Nyakubaho ebihongwa bicwekize, omu kasheeshe n'omu mwabazyo," 
Ezra3:4 kandi baagira obugyenyi bw'okwijuka ensiisira, nk'oku kyahandiikirwe. Buri izooba baahonga ebihongwa bicwekize, nk'omubaro gwabyo ogwa buri izooba oku gwabaire niguragiirwa." 
Ezra3:5 Bwanyima baaguma nibahonga ebihongwa bicwekize, n'ebihongwa by'aha kuboneka kw'okwezi n'eby'aha magyenyi ga Nyakubaho agaatairweho, n'ebihongwa bya buri omwe ebi yaabaire ahongyera Nyakubaho ayekundiire." 
Ezra3:6 Okwiha aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwo kwezi kwa mushanju, baatandika kuhongyera Nyakubaho ebihongwa bicwekize; kwonka obwo omusingi gwa Nyaruju ye gutakombekirwe." 
Ezra3:7 Batyo baaha abombeki n'ababaizi empiiha, kandi baaha Abasidoni n'Abaatuuro ebyokurya n'ebyokunywa n'amajuta, kureeta emiti y'emisisa, kugiiha Lebanooni kugireeta aha Nyanja, bakagihitsya Yopa, nk'oku Kuuro omugabe wa Buperisiya yaabaire abaikiriize." 
Ezra3:8 Mbwenu omu mwaka gwa kabiri baherize kuhika ahari Nyaruju ya Ruhanga omuri Yerusalemu, omu kwezi kwa kabiri, Zerubabeeli mwene Shealitieli na Yoshwa mwene Yoozadaki baatandika omurimo, hamwe na beene waabo abandi n'abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi, na boona abaabaire baizire Yerusalemu, barugire omu bukwatwa. Baataho Abaleevi, abahikize emyaka y'obukuru makumi abiri n'okukiraho, kureeberera omurimo gw'okwombeka Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
Ezra3:9 Mpaho Yeshwa n'abatabani ba beene waabo na Kaadimieli n'abatabani beene Yuda, boona hamwe baatwara omurimo gw'okureeberera abakozi ba Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, bakwataniise na beene Heenadadii n'Abaleevi na batabani baabo na beene waabo." 
Ezra3:10 Reero abombeki ku baataireho omusingi gwa Nyaruju, abahongyerezi baija bajwaire ebijwaro byabo, nibateera amakondere, n'Abaleevi beene Asafu nibateera enshandaazo, kuhimbisa Nyakubaho, nk'oku Daudi omugabe wa Isiraeli yaabaire aragiire." 
Ezra3:11 Baayeshongora nibaakiirana eby'okuhimbisa n'eby'okusiima Nyakubaho, nibagira bati: Ahabw'okuba ni murungi, na rukundo ye etahararuka ei agirira Isiraeli egumaho ebiro byona. Mpaho abantu boona baateera akaari kaingi munonga, nibahimbisa Nyakubaho ahabw'omusingi gwa Nyaruju ye kwombekwa." 
Ezra3:12 Kwonka baingi omu bahongyerezi n'omu Baleevi, n'omu bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, abagurusi abaareebire Nyaruju y'okubanza, ku baarebire omusingi gwa Nyaruju egi nigwombekwa, baarira nibaborooga, nobu abaingi baateire akaari k'okushemererwa;" 
Ezra3:13 haza ekyo kyareetera abantu kuremwa kutaanisa amaraka g'abarikuteera akaari k'okushemerererwa n'ag'abarikucura; ahabw'okuba abo bantu bakaba nibaamuza munonga, n'orwari rwabo niruhika hare." 
Ezra4:1 Mbwenu abangizi b'aba Yuda n'aba Benyamiini ku baahuriire ngu abazaahuuki abagarukire nibombekyera Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli Nyaruju," 
Ezra4:2 baija ahari Zerubabeeli n'aha bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, baabagira bati: Murekye twombekye kumwe; ahabw'okuba naitwe nituramya Ruhanga waanyu nkaimwe, kandi okwiha omu biro bya Esarihaadoni omugabe wa Asiriya owaatureetsire kunu, tutuura nitutambira Ruhanga ogwo ebitambo." 
Ezra4:3 Kwonka Zerubabeeli na Yeshwa, n'abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo omuri Isiraeli, baabagira bati: Timwine kakwate naitwe kwombekyera Ruhanga waitu Nyaruju; kureka itwe twenka niitwe turaayombekyere Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, nk'oku Nyakusinga Kuuro omugabe wa Buperisiya yaaturagiire." 
Ezra4:4 Bwanyima abantu b'egyo nsi baacwa Abayudaaya entegye, baabatiinisa ngu batagumizamu kwombeka," 
Ezra4:5 baaguriirira ab'okubazibira kukora eki baabaire nibenda. Byaguma bityo okumara ebiro byona ebya Kuuro omugabe wa Buperisiya; nangwa byahitsya n'omu busingye bwa Dariyo omugabe wa Buperisiya. 
Ezra4:6 Omu busingye bwa Ahaswero, akitandikire kuza aha ngoma, abangizi bakahandiika ebaruha y'okurega abatwire Buyudaaya n'omuri Yerusalemu." 
Ezra4:7 Kandi omu biro bya Arutazaakiseesi, Bishilaamu na Miitiredati na Taabeeli n'abandi abakwataniise nabo baahandiikira Arutazaakiseesi omugabe wa Buperisiya ebaruha eri omu Ruramaika nk'oku rugambwa kwonka eihirwe omu Rusiriya." 
Ezra4:8 Rehumu omutegyeki omukuru, na Shimushai omuhandiiki, bakahandiikira Omugabe Arutazaakiseesi ebaruha egi, nibatabaariza ab'omuri Yerusalemu" 
Ezra4:9 bwanyima Rehumu, ogwo omutegyeki omukuru, na Shimushai omuhandiiki, n'abandi abakwataniise nabo, abaramuzi n'abategyeki abakuru n'abakungu n'Abaperisiya, n'abantu b'omuri Ereki, n'Abanyababulooni, n'aba Suusa nibo Baelamu," 
Ezra4:10 n'abandi ab'omu mahanga, abu Osinaapa omukuru rugambwa yaazaahize akabata omu ndembo za Samariya kutuuramu, n'omu zindi ndembo z'ekyanga kya seeri y'Omugyera, baahandiika egyo baruha." 
Ezra4:11 Mbwenu eki nikyo kihanduukururo ky'egyo baruha ei baamwoherereize Nyakusinga Arutazaakiseesi: Itwe abaheereza baawe ab'omu kyanga kya seeri y'Omugyera, nitukuramutsya. Mbwenu iwe Nyakusinga," 
Ezra4:12 omanye ku Abayudaaya abaarugire okwo, bakaija kunu, bagiire Yerusalemu. Hati nibombeka busya orurembo orugomi kandi orubi; bari haihi kuheza ebigo n'okuhunduuza emisingi." 
Ezra4:13 Mbwenu itwe, Nyakusinga, okimanye ngu ku orwo rurembo ruraayombekwe busya, ebigo byarwo byahwa, tibarikwija kuha mushoro n'empooza n'obushuuru; haza ekyo kituubye empiiha z'obugabe ezirikutaaha." 
Ezra4:14 Itwe, ahabw'okuba tutungwa omwonyo gw'omu kikaari, kandi tutashemereire kureeba omugabe naagaywa, nikyo Nyakusinga twakutumiraho kukumanyisa," 
Ezra4:15 ngu oragiire, bashwijume ebihandiiko by'omu kitabo kya baashwenkuru. Noija kureeba ebihandiikirwe omuri ekyo kitabo, haza omanye ku orwo rurembo ruba orugomi, orunyangaraza abagabe n'ab'omu byanga byabo, kandi obugomi bwarwo ku bwaihire ira. Haza ekyo nikyo kyareeteire orwo rurembo kucwekyerezibwa." 
Ezra4:16 Mbwenu Nyakusinga, nitukumanyisa ngu, ku orwo rurembo ruraagarukye kwombekwa, ebigo byarwo byahwa, nooba otakiine ki orikutunga omu kyanga kya seeri y'Omugyera." 
Ezra4:17 Mpaho omugabe abagarukamu ati: Iwe Rehumu, omutegyeki omukuru, na Shimushai omuhandiiki, n'abandi oku mukwataniise, abatwire Samariya n'omu kyanga kya seeri y'Omugyera, nimbaramutsya." 
Ezra4:18 Mbwenu ebaruha ei mwantwekyeire, baginshomeire gye." 
Ezra4:19 Naaragiira, baacondooza, baashanga ku orwo rurembo rwaihire ira nirugomera abagabe; haza okwo kugoma n'okugomesa abandi ku birarubairemu." 
Ezra4:20 Kandi ku harabaireho omuri Yerusalemu abagabe b'amaani, abaategyekire ekyo kyanga kyona ekya seeri y'Omugyera, bakakiihamu omushoro n'empooza n'obushuuru." 
Ezra4:21 Mbwenu muragiire abo bantu barekyere aho ogwo murimo, n'orwo rurembo rutombekwa obundi, okuhitsya obu ndishohoza ekindi kiragiro;" 
Ezra4:22 haza mwerinde, ekyo kintu mutakyegandaho, kitabarugiramu akabi karikukiraho, kakareetera omugabe omunyangararo." 
Ezra4:23 Bwanyima ekihanduukururo ky'egyo baruha y'Omugabe Arutazaakiseesi ku kyashomeirwe Rehumu na Shimushai omuhandiiki n'abu bakwataniise nabo, tibaahwama, baaza Yerusalemu ei Abayudaaya baabaire bari, baabagyemesereza n'amaani kurekyera aho ogwo murimo." 
Ezra4:24 Gutyo omurimo gw'okwombeka Nyaruju ya Ruhanga omuri Yerusalemu gwemerezibwa. Tigugumizamu, okuhitsya omu mwaka gwa kabiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Dariyo omugabe wa Perisiya." 
Ezra5:1 Bwanyima abarangi Hagaayi na Zekariya mwene Ido, bakateera omuhimbo Abaisiraeli b'omuri Buyudaaya na Yerusalemu, nibabahanuurira omu iziina rya Ruhanga wa Isiraeli owaabaire ari hamwe nabo." 
Ezra5:2 Batyo Zerubabeeli mwene Shealitieli, na Yeshwa mwene Yoozadaki, baimuka, batandika kwombeka busya Nyaruju ya Ruhanga ey'omuri Yerusalemu; kandi abo barangi ba Ruhanga baaguma nabo nibabahwera." 
Ezra5:3 Hoona ago magingo, Taatenai omutegyeki omukuru ow'ekyanga kya seeri y'Omugyera, na Sheetariboozenai n'abakwataniise nabo, baija ahi bari, baababuuza bati: N'oha owaabahaire obushoboorozi bw'okubaikiriza kwombeka egi nju, n'okumariiriza ebisiika byayo?" 
Ezra5:4 Bongyera bababuuza bati: Beitu bo, abarikwombekyesa egi nju ni baahi?" 
Ezra5:5 Kwonka Ruhanga w'Abaisiraeli yaaguma ataire eriisho aha bakuru baabo; banu tibaabeemereza, okuhitsya obu Dariyo araamanyisibwe ekyo kintu, akakibagarukamu omu baruha." 
Ezra5:6 Eki nikyo kihandukururo ky'ebaruha ei Taatenai omutegyeki omukuru ow'ekyanga kya seeri y'Omugyera, na Sheetariboozenai n'abategyeki abakuru abakwataniise nawe, abaabaire bari omuri ekyo kyanga kya seeri y'Omugyera, baatwekyeire Dariyo omugabe," 
Ezra5:7 bakamutumaho nibamuhandiikira bati: Nyakusinga Dariyo, nitukwendeza obusingye bwijwire." 
Ezra5:8 Mbwenu, Nyakusinga, nitukumanyisa ku tugiire omu kyanga kya Buyudaaya, tukahika ahari Nyaruju ya Ruhanga Rukiraboona. Hati nibagyombekyesa amabaare mahango, kandi nibata embaaho z'emitambiko omu bisiika. Ogwo murimo bagwezirikiire munonga, kandi bagukwaitse gye." 
Ezra5:9 Mbwenu ku tubuurize abakuru omuribo, twabagira tuti: N'oha owaabahaire obushoboorozi bw'okubaikiriza kwombeka egi nju, n'okumariiriza ebisiika byayo?" 
Ezra5:10 Kandi ku tubabuurize amaziina gaabo, ahabw'okwenda kukumanyisa, ngu tubone kukuhandiikira amaziina g'abeebembezi baabo," 
Ezra5:11 nabo baatugarukamu bati: Itwe turi abaheereza ba Ruhanga Mukama w'eiguru n'ensi. Mbwenu nitwombeka busya Nyaruju, eyaabaire yaayombekirwe emyaka mingi ehingwire, ei omugabe rugambwa owa Isiraeli yaayombekire, akaheza." 
Ezra5:12 Kwonka baatatenkuriitwe ku baagwisize kubi Ruhanga ogwo ow'omu iguru, yaabarekurira Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni Omukaludaaya, owaacwekyereize egi nju akatwara abantu Babulooni bari enkwatwa." 
Ezra5:13 Kwonka shi, omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogwa Kuuro omugabe wa Babulooni, Kuuro ogwo omugabe akashohoza ekiragiro naikiriza ku egi nju ya Ruhanga eyombekwa busya," 
Ezra5:14 kandi ebintu by'ezaabu n'efeeza eby'omuri egyo nju ya Ruhanga, ebi Nebukadenezaari yaabaire aihire omuri Nyaruju y'omuri Yerusalemu, akabita omuri Nyaruju ya Babulooni, ebyo bintu Omugabe Kuuro akabiiha omuri Nyaruju eya Babulooni, yaabikwatsa omuntu orikwetwa Sheeshabazaari ou yaabaire ahindwire omutegyeki mukuru;" 
Ezra5:15 haza yaamugira ati: Twara ebi bintu, obite omuri Nyaruju y'omuri Yerusalemu, kandi oreebe ngu Nyaruju ya Ruhanga yaayombekwa busya omu kibanja kyayo." 
Ezra5:16 Bwanyima Sheeshabazaari yaija, yaayombeka egi misingi ya Nyaruju ya Ruhanga; okwiha obwo n'okuhitsya hati etuura neeyombekwa, kandi tekahwaire." 
Ezra5:17 N'ahabw'ekyo, Nyakusinga, ku oraabe nookisiima, ragiira bashwijume ebitabo by'obugabe, ebiri okwo Babulooni, kureeba yaaba ekyo kiragiro kyashohoziibwe Omugabe Kuuro, kwikiriza kwombeka busya egi enju ya Ruhanga ey'omuri Yerusalemu. Kandi Nyakusinga, nitukushaba oikirize kutugarukamu ekyo kintu." 
Ezra6:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Omugabe Dariyo yaaragiira ku bacondooza omuri Babulooni, omu nju y'ebitabo, omu bihandiiko ebyabaire bibiikirwe." 
Ezra6:2 Mpaho baashanga omuri Ekibatana, orurembo rukuru rw'ekyanga kya Mediya, omuzingo oguhandiikirweho guti: Eki n'eky'okuguma nikiijukwa." 
Ezra6:3 Omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'omu busingye bw'Omugabe Kuuro, ogwo mugabe akaha ekiragiro naagira ati: Aha bikwatiraine na Nyaruju ya Ruhanga ey'omuri Yerusalemu, nindagiira ku Nyaruju egyo eyombekwa busya, kuba omwanya gw'okutambiramu ebitambo, n'okuhongyeramu ebihongwa ebicwekize. Obwemi bwayo bube mikono makumi mukaaga, n'obukiika bwayo mikono makumi mukaaga." 
Ezra6:4 Egire embu ishatu z'amabaare mahango, n'orubu rumwe rw'embaaho z'emitambiko; haza empiiha ziraagiihurire ziihwe omu ibiikiro ry'ez'obugabe." 
Ezra6:5 Reero ebintu by'ezaabu n'eby'efeeza by'egyo nju ya Ruhanga ebi Nebukanedezaari yaihire omuri Nyaruju y'omuri Yerusalemu, akabireeta Babulooni, bigarurweho, kandi bitwarwe omuri Nyaruju y'omuri Yerusalemu, buri kimwe omu mwanya gwakyo; mubite omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga." 
Ezra6:6 N'ahabw'ekyo iwe Taatenai, omutegyeki omukuru ow'ekyanga kya seeri y'Omugyera, na Sheetariboozenai n'abategyeki abakuru abakwataniise naiwe, abari omu kyanga ekiri seeri y'Omugyera, ebyo mubize hangahari." 
Ezra6:7 Ogwo murimo gw'aha nju ya Ruhanga mugurugyeho. Omutegyeki w'Abayudaaya omukuru, n'abakuru omu ihanga ryabo, babe nibo baayombeka busya Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, omu kibanja kyayo." 
Ezra6:8 Kandi nindagiira ebi muraakorere abakuru b'omu Bayudaaya ahabw'okwombeka busya Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, eby'okwihurira ogwo murimo, mubikore aha mpiiha z'omu ibiikiro ry'obugabe, ez'omushoro gw'ekyanga kya seeri y'Omugyera; mpaho abo bantu mubahe ebihembo bihikiire kimwe, haza mutasiibyayo." 
Ezra6:9 Kandi byona ebirikwetengwa nk'ebimasha, entaama empaya nari ebuguma, kuhongyera Ruhanga w'omu iguru ebihongwa ebicwekize, taho engano, omwonyo, viino nari amajuta, nk'oku abahongyerezi b'omuri Yerusalemu baraabyende mubibahe buri izooba, mutoosire," 
Ezra6:10 babone kutambira Ruhanga w'omu iguru ebitambo ebi arikusiima, kandi banshabire omugisha n'abaana bangye." 
Ezra6:11 Mbwenu naataho ekiragiro, ku haraagire owaahindura ekyarangirirwa eki, bahigure enyomyo ye ey'orugambiro, haza bagimukomereho, enju ye ehindurwe orubungo." 
Ezra6:12 Ruhanga owaagumiiseyo eiziina rye, naakahwerekyereze omugabe weena, nari abantu, abaakwehanga kuhindura ekyo kiragiro, nari kucwekyereza egyo nju ya Ruhanga ey'omuri Yerusalemu. Nyowe Dariyo, niinye naataho eki kiragiro; kandi kihikiiririzibwe kimwe." 
Ezra6:13 Mpaho Taatenai omutegyeki omukuru ow'ekyanga kya seeri y'Omugyera, na Sheetariboozenai n'abakwataniise nabo, baateeraho kimwe omutima kukora eki omugabe Dariyo yaaragiire, nibakuratira ebi ogwo mugabe Dariyo yaabatumireho." 
Ezra6:14 Abakuru omu Bayudaaya baayombeka, kandi byabagyendera gye, ahabw'okuhwerwa ebi omurangi Hagaayi na Zekariya mwene Ido baabahanuriire. Baaheza ekyombeko kyabo, nk'oku Ruhanga wa Isiraeli yaabaire aragiire, n'oku ekiragiro kya Kuuro na Dariyo na Arutazaakiseesi omugabe wa Beperisiya kyabaire kiri." 
Ezra6:15 Egyo nju yaahwa aha kiro kya kashatu eky'okwezi Adaari, omu mwaka gwa mukaaga ogw'omu busingye bwa Dariyo omugabe." 
Ezra6:16 Reero Abaisiraeli n'abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi n'abazaahuuki abaagarukire baakora omugyenzo gw'okuhongyera Ruhanga egyo nju bashemereirwe. 
Ezra6:17 Omuri okwo kuhongyera Ruhanga egyo nju, baatoija enimi igana, empaya z'entaama magana abiri, abaana b'entaama magana ana, n'empaya z'embuzi ikumi na ibiri, nk'omubaro gw'enganda z'Abaisiraeli oku gwabaire guri, kuhongyerera ebibi by'Abaisiraeli boona." 
Ezra6:18 Batyo baata abahongyerezi omu mbu zaabo, n'Abaleevi omu myanya yaabo, kuguma nibaheereza Ruhanga omuri Yerusalemu, nk'oku kyahandiikirwe omu kitabo kya Musa." 
Ezra6:19 Aha kiro kya ikumi na bina eky'okwezi kw'okubanza, abo bazaahuuki abaagarukire baagira obugyenyi bw'okwijuka Okuhingurwaho." 
Ezra6:20 Ahabw'okuba abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi bakaba baaherize kweyereza hamwe, boona beezire. Batyo baita omwana gw'entaama ogw'Okuhingurwaho, ahabw'abazaahuukire, boona abaagarukire, n'ahabw'abahongyerezi bagyenzi baabo n'ahabwabo bonka." 
Ezra6:21 Ogwo mwana gw'entaama gwariibwa Abaisiraeli abaabaire bazaahuukire, kandi gwariibwaho weena owaabaire akwataniise nabo, ayetaaniise n'ebihagaro by'abantu b'omuri egyo nsi, kuramya Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
Ezra6:22 Baamara ebiro mushanju bashemereirwe, nibarya Obugyenyi bw'Emigaati Etatumbisiibwe; ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akaba abahaire okushemererwa, kandi ataire omu mugabe wa Asiriya omutima gw'okubakunda, ngu abone kubahwera omu murimo gw'okwombeka Nyaruju ya Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
Ezra7:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, omu busingye bwa Arutazaakiseesi omugabe wa Buperisiya, haabaho omushaija orikwetwa Ezera mwene Seraaya, Seraaya mwene Azariya, Azariya mwene Hilikiya." 
Ezra7:2 Hilikiya mwene Shalumu, Shalumu mwene Zadoki, Zadoki mwene Ahiitubu," 
Ezra7:3 Ahiitubu mwene Amariiya, Amariiya mwene Aziriya, Azariya mwene Meraiyooti," 
Ezra7:4 Meraiyooti mwene Zerahiiya, Zerahiya mwene Uuzi, Uuzi mwene Buuki," 
Ezra7:5 Buuki ya Abiishusha, Abiishusha ya Finehaasi, Finehaasi ya Eleazaari, Eleazaari ya Arooni omuhongyerezi omukuru." 
Ezra7:6 Ezera ogwo yainamuka Yerusalemu naaruga Babulooni. Akaba ari omuhangu orikumamya munonga eby'omu biragiro bya Musa, ebi Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli yaabaire abahaire; kandi omugabe yaamuha byona ebi yaamushabire, ahabw'okuba omukono gwa Mukama Ruhanga we gukaba gumuriho." 
Ezra7:7 Kandi hoona omu mwaka gwa mushanju ogw'omu busingye bwa Arutazaakiseesi omugabe, bamwe omu Baisiraeli n'abahongyerezi abamwe n'Abaleevi n'abeshongozi n'abakumiirizi n'abaheereza b'omuri Nyaruju, bainamuka Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:8 Mpaho Ezera yaahika Yerusalemu omu kwezi kwa kataano, okw'omu mwaka gwa mushanju gw'omu busingye bw'ogwo mugabe." 
Ezra7:9 Manya aha kiro ky'okubanza ky'okwezi kw'okubanza nibwo yaatandika kwinamuka naaruga Babulooni, akahika Yerusalemu aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwezi kwa kataano, ahabw'omukono murungi gwa Ruhanga we kushangwa gumuriho." 
Ezra7:10 Reero Ezera ogwo akaba ataire munonga omutima aha kwega eiteeka rya Nyakubaho n'okurikuratira, kandi n'okwegyesa omuri Isiraeli ebi Nyakubaho yaataireho n'ebi yaaragiire." 
Ezra7:11 Eki nikyo kihandukururo ky'ebaruha ei omugabe Arutazaakiseesi yaahaire Ezera omuhongyerezi kandi omuhangu, oyegire munonga eby'ebiragiro bya Nyakubaho, n'ebi yaateeraireho Isiraeli." 
Ezra7:12 Nyowe Arutazaakiseesi, omugabe w'abagabe, naakuhandiikira iwe Ezera omuhongyerezi kandi omuhangu w'eiteeka rya Nyakubaho ow'omu iguru." 
Ezra7:13 Mbwenu hati naataho ekiragiro eki: Omuntu weena ow'omu Baisiraeli, nari ow'omu bahongyerezi baabo, nainga ow'omu Baleevi ow'omu bugabe bwangye orikwenda kuza Yerusalemu, naikirizibwa kugyenda naiwe." 
Ezra7:14 Mbwenu waayoherezibwa omugabe n'abahabuzi be mushanju, kubuuririza eby'omuri Buyudaaya na Yerusalemu, nk'eiteeka rya Ruhanga waawe eri oine, oku riri;" 
Ezra7:15 kandi n'okutwara efeeza n'ezaabu ebi omugabe n'abahabuzi be basiimire kutoijera Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, ou obutaaho bwe buba omuri Yerusalemu," 
Ezra7:16 noobitwara hamwe n'efeeza yoona n'ezaabu yoona, ezi oraashangye omu ishaza rya Babulooni ryona, hamwe n'emitoijo y'abantu n'abahongyerezi, ei baahigire kuha beekundiire, ahabwa Nyaruju ya Ruhanga waabo ey'omuri Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:17 Empiiha ezo, oyezirikye kuziguramu amanimi, empaya z'entaama n'abaana b'entaama, n'emitoijo yaabo ey'esaano n'ey'ebyokunywa; haza obihongyere aha itambiro ry'omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga waanyu ey'omuri Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:18 Reero efeeza n'ezaabu eziraashaagyeho, iwe na beene waanyu mubitwaze nk'oku muraayende, nimukuratira eki Ruhanga waanyu arikusiima." 
Ezra7:19 Ebintu ebi baabahaire kukoresa omu by'obuheereza bw'omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga waanyu, mubimurikye omu maisho ga Ruhanga wa Yerusalemu;" 
Ezra7:20 na kyona eki muryetenga ahabwa Nyaruju ya Ruhanga waanyu, eki murireeba ngu mushemereire kuha, nimwikirizibwa kukihayo nimukiiha omu ibiikiro ry'omugabe." 
Ezra7:21 Kandi nyowe Arutazaakiseesi omugabe, naaragiira ababiiki mwena ab'omu ishaza rya seeri y'Omugyera, nti kyona eki Ezera Omuhongyerezi kandi omuhangu w'eiteeka rya Ruhanga ow'omu iguru araabashabe, mukimukorere mutarikweganda;" 
Ezra7:22 mutarikurenzya aha mpiiha z'efeeza obusiriira mukaaga, encuro z'engano igana, enteerero za viino igana, enteerero z'amajuta igana, n'omwonyo mwingi ogutarikubariirirwa." 
Ezra7:23 Kyona eki Ruhanga ow'omu iguru araaragiire, kikorerwe kimwe ahabwa Nyaruju ya Ruhanga ow'omu iguru; atakaagirira engoma y'omugabe n'abatabani kashanga." 
Ezra7:24 Kandi nitubamanyisa ku kitarikwija kwikirizibwa kushoza omuhongyerezi weena, Abaleevi, abeeshongozi, abakumiirizi, abaheereza b'omuri Nyaruju, nari abandi baheereza b'omuri egyo nju ya Ruhanga, omushoro, empooza nari obushuuru." 
Ezra7:25 Naiwe Ezera, omu kukuratira obwengye obu Ruhanga waawe yaakuhaire, oteho abaramuzi n'abategyeki b'okucwa emanja z'abantu boona, ab'omu ishaza rya seeri y'Omugyera, boona abarikumanya amateeka ga Ruhanga waanyu; kandi boona abatarikugamanya mugabeegyese." 
Ezra7:26 Weena oraayangye kukuratira eiteeka rya Ruhanga waanyu n'eiteeka ry'omugabe, aheebwe ekifubiro ky'amaani; yaaba eky'okumwita nari eky'okumuzaasya, nainga eky'okunyaga ebye, nari eky'okumukoma." 
Ezra7:27 Bwanyima Ezera akagira ati: Mukama, Ruhanga wa baatatenkuriitwe, naakasingye! We otaire ekintu nk'eki omu mutima gw'ogwo mugabe, kushemeza Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ey'omuri Yerusalemu;" 
Ezra7:28 kandi oyorekire rukundo ye etahararuka omu maisho g'omugabe n'abahabuzi be, n'omu maisho g'abakungu b'obushoboorozi boona ab'omugabe. nikyo mpamiire, ahabw'okuba omukono gwa Mukama Ruhanga wangye gubaire gundiho; kandi nikyo nteeraniire abeebembezi b'omuri Isiraeli kugyenda naanye." 
Ezra8:1 Mbwenu aba nibo bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, kandi nibo b'enganda z'abu naizire nabo kuruga Babulooni omu busingye bw'Omugabe Arutazaakiseesi." 
Ezra8:2 Omuri beene Finehaasi, ni Gereshomu, omuri beene Itamari, Daniyeli; omuri beene Daudi, Hatushi;" 
Ezra8:3 ow'omuri beene Shekaniiya; omuri beene Paroshi, Zekariya owaahandiikirwe hamwe n'abashaija igana na makumi ataano;" 
Ezra8:4 omuri beene Paahatimoabu, Eliehoinai mutabani wa Zerahiya, hamwe n'abashaija magana abiri;" 
Ezra8:5 omuri beene Zatu, Shekariya mutabani wa Yohazieli, hamwe n'abashaija magana ashatu;" 
Ezra8:6 omuri beene Adini, Ebedi mutabani wa Yonatani, hamwe n'abashaija makumi ataano;" 
Ezra8:7 omuri beene Elamu, Yeshayiiya mutabani wa Ataliya, hamwe n'abashaija makumi mushanju;" 
Ezra8:8 omuri beene Shefatiya; Zebadiiya mutabani wa Mikaeli, hamwe n'abashaija makumi munaana;" 
Ezra8:9 omuri beene Yoabu, Obadiiya mutabani wa Yehieli, hamwe n'abashaija magana abiri na ikumi na munaana;" 
Ezra8:10 omuri beene Bani, Sheloomiti mutabani wa Yosifiiya, hamwe n'abashaija igana na makumi mukaaga;" 
Ezra8:11 omuri beene Beebai, Zekariya mutabani wa Beebai, hamwe n'abashaija makumi abiri na munaana;" 
Ezra8:12 omuri beene Azigaadi, Yohaanani mutabani wa Haakatani, hamwe n'abashaija igana na ikumi;" 
Ezra8:13 omuri beene Adoniikamu abaizire bwanyima, ni Elifeleti na Yeueli na Shemayiija, hamwe n'abashaija makumi mukaaga." 
Ezra8:14 Reero omuri beene Biigivai, ni Utai na Zakuri, hamwe n'abashaija makumi mushanju." 
Ezra8:15 Ntyo mbateeranira aha mugyera ogurikuhimintika, niguza Ahaara. Aho nibo twagombekire, tukahateera ebiro bishatu. Ku naarabize amaisho omuri abo bantu, n'omu bahongyerezi, naashanga hatarimu muntu weena ow'omuri beene Leevi." 
Ezra8:16 Nikwo kutuma kweta Eliezeeri, Alieri, Shemeyiiya, Elinatani, Zekariya na Meshulaamu, abantu bakuru, n'okweta Yoiaribu na Elinatani, abashaija barikwetegyereza." 
Ezra8:17 Ntyo mbatuma ahari Ido, owaabaire atwire Kasifiiya, obwo nimbamanyisa ebi baraagambire Ido ogwo na beeneishe, abaheereza b'omuri Nyaruju, ab'omu kyanga kya Kasifiiya, ngu batutwekyere ab'okuheereza omuri egyo nju ya Ruhanga waitu." 
Ezra8:18 Reero ahabw'okuhwerwa omukono murungi gwa Ruhanga waitu ogutaturugaho, baatureetera omushaija ohwerize, ow'omuri beene Mahili, mutabani wa Leevi, mwene Isiraeli, orikwetwa Sheebiiya, hamwe n'abatabani n'abanyaruganda ikumi na munaana." 
Ezra8:19 Kandi baatureetera Hashabiya hamwe na Yeshayiiya ow'omuri beene Meraari, na beene waabo n'abatabani, boona abantu makumi abiri," 
Ezra8:20 otabariiremu baheereza b'omuri Nyaruju magana abiri na makumi abiri, abu Daudi n'abakungu be baabaire batooraine kuheereza Abaleevi. Abo boona amaziina gaabo gakahandiikwa." 
Ezra8:21 Bwanyima ntyo ndagiririrayo okwesiibyakwo ahari ogwo mugyera Ahaava, ngu twebundikye omu maisho ga Ruhanga waitu, nitumushaba kuturinda gye omu rugyendo, n'abaana baitu n'ebintu byaitu byona." 
Ezra8:22 Manya kikaba nikiinyitsa enshoni kushaba omugabe kutuha omutwe gw'abaserukare, n'ab'ahambaraasi kuturinda abazigu omu rugyendo rwaitu, ahabw'okuba tukaba twagambiire ogwo mugabe ku omukono gwa Ruhanga waitu gutuura ahari boona abamusherura, kubaha emigisha, kandi ku agirira abamwimuura kashanga y'amaani." 
Ezra8:23 Ekyo nikyo twayesiibiizekwo, tukeeshengyereza Ruhanga waitu, kandi nawe akahurira okweshengyereza kwaitu." 
Ezra8:24 Bwanyima omu bahongyerezi abakuru nkatooranamu ikumi na babiri aba: Sherebiiya na Hashabiya hamwe na beene waabo ikumi. 
Ezra8:25 Naabarengyera efeeza n'ezaabu n'ebintu eby'okutoija ahabwa Nyaruju ya Ruhanga waitu ebi omugabe n'abahabuzi be n'abakungu be n'Abaisiraeli boona abariyo baatoizire. 
Ezra8:26 Nkabarengyera, naabakwatsa omu ngaro empiiha obukaikuru bushatu n'obusiriira mwenda z'efeeza, n'ebintu by'efeeza ebirikuhitsya empiiha obusiriira mukaaga, n'obundi busiriira mukaaga bw'ezaabu," 
Ezra8:27 ebakuri makumi abiri z'ezaabu, ezirikuhitsya empiiha obukumi bubiri na rukumi, n'ebindi bintu bibiri by'emiringa mirungi ekuubirwe, eby'obuguzi bwingi nk'eby'ezaabu."
