Ezra8:28 Ntyo mbagira nti: Mwayerezibwa Nyakubaho, n'ebyo bintu n'ebirikwera; kandi efeeza n'ezaabu n'emitoijo y'okwekundira etoijeirwe Mukama Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe." 
Ezra8:29 Mubibiikye kandi mubirinde, okuhitsya obu muribirengyera omu bishengye bya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho omu maisho g'abahongyerezi abakuru n'Abaleevi n'abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkuru b'Abaisiraeli abari Yerusalemu." 
Ezra8:30 Batyo abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi baayakiira egyo feeza n'ezaabu n'ebindi bintu, nk'oku oburemeezi bwabyo bwabaire buri, kubitwara Yerusalemu omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga waitu." 
Ezra8:31 Ebyo ku byahwaire, aha kiro kya ikumi na bibiri ky'okwezi kw'okubanza, twaruga aha mugyera Ahaava, kuza Yerusalemu. Haza omukono gwa Ruhanga waitu gwatugumaho, yaatujuna abazigu n'abatugweraire omu muhanda." 
Ezra8:32 Twahika Yerusalemu, twagumayo okumara ebiro bishatu." 
Ezra8:33 Aha kiro kya kana, ezo feeza n'ezaabu n'ebyo bintu baabirengyera omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga waitu, baabikwatsa Meeremooti omuhongyerezi mwene Uriya, hariho Eleazaari mwene Finehaasi n'Abaleevi, Yoozabadi mwene Yeshwa na Noadiiya mwene Fiinue." 
Ezra8:34 Byona byabarwa kandi byarengwa; n'oburemeezi bwa buri kimwe bwahandiikwa kuguma nibiijukwa. 
Ezra8:35 Ago magingo abarugire omu bukwatwa bazaahuukire, baahongyera Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ebihongwa bicwekize ebi: enimi ikumi na ibiri, ahabw'Abaisiraeli boona, empaya z'entaama makumi mwenda na mukaaga, abaana b'entaama makumi mushanju na mushanju, n'empaya z'embuzi ikumi na ibiri, z'okuhongyerera ebibi. Ebyo byona bikaba ebitambo ebicwekize by'okuhongyera Nyakubaho." 
Ezra8:36 Kandi baamanyisa ab'amashaza b'omugabe n'abategyeki bakuru b'ekyanga kya seeri y'Omugyera ebi ogwo mugabe yaaragiire; nabo bahwera abo bantu na Nyaruju ya Ruhanga. 
Ezra9:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, abatware bampika, bangira bati: Abaisiraeli n'abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi tibeetaaniise na bantu b'ezi nsi, n'ebihagaro byabo, kutaana n'Abanyakanaani, Abahiiti, Abapeerizi, Abayebusi, Abaamoni, Abamoabu, Abanyamisiri n'Abaamori;" 
Ezra9:2 ahabw'okuba batwaire bamwe omuri bahara baabo, baabashwera, baabashwererera na batabani baabo; eihanga eririkwera ryayejwanzya rityo n'Abanyamahanga b'ezo nsi; haza omuri okwo kutaba beesigwa, abatware n'abantu bakuru nibo bakizire kukikora." 
Ezra9:3 Ekyo ku naakihuriire naataagura ebijwaro byangye, n'omunagiro gwangye, naayemaanyura eishokye aha mutwe, n'ekireju; naashutama aha nsi nshobeirwe." 
Ezra9:4 Bwanyima boona abaatetemesiibwe okuhurira ebigambo bya Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, ahabw'abaazaahuukire okutaba beesigwa, baanyehinguririza nshutami aha nsi nshobeirwe, okuhitsya aha bunaku bw'okutambiramu ekitambo ky'omu mwabazyo." 
Ezra9:5 Omu bunaku bw'okutamba ekitambo ky'omu mwabazyo, ntyo naimuka ahi naabaire ndi nyesiibizekwo, n'ebyo bijwaro byangye n'omunagiro ebi ntaagwire; naatsimba amaju naatega Mukama Ruhanga wangye emikono, ningira nti:" 
Ezra9:6 Ai Ruhanga wangye, nyine enshoni kandi nimbwerabwera kwimutsya amaisho kukureeba, Ruhanga wangye; ahabw'okuba ebibi byaitu biimukire byatukira aha mutwe, n'orubanja rwaitu rwatuuma, rwahika omu iguru." 
Ezra9:7 Okwiha omu biro bya baatatenkuriitwe n'okuhitsya eri izooba, tutuura twine orubanja ruhango, kandi ahabw'ebicumuro byaitu ebyo, nikyo itwe n'abagabe baitu, n'abahongyerezi baitu twarekuriirwe abagabe b'agandi mahanga kututegyeka, kutwitsa rurara, kutukwata, kutunyaga n'okutuhemura, nk'oku kiri hati." 
Ezra9:8 Kwonka omu biro ebi ebikye, Mukama Ruhanga waitu atugiriire embabazi, yaatutsigiraho emponoka, yaatuha obuhungiro buhamire omu mwanya gwe ogurikwera, ngu Ruhanga waitu abone kutushemuura aha maisho, n'okutugaruramu otugara omu buhuuku bwaitu." 
Ezra9:9 Manya n'obu turaabe turi abahuuku, kwonka Ruhanga waitu tatunagiriire omu buhuuku bwaitu, kureka atworekyeire rukundo ye etahararuka omu maisho g'abagabe ba Buperisiya, kutugaruramu amaani, kwombeka busya Nyaruju ya Ruhanga waitu, kuhunduuza ebyayo ebyasheenyukire, n'okututeeraho orugo rw'okuturinda omuri Buyudaaya n'omuri Yerusalemu." 
Ezra9:10 Mbwenu, ai Ruhanga waitu, ku oraabe otugiriire embabazi zirikwingana zityo, ekindi tugambe ki? Reeba, tutsigireho ebiragiro byawe" 
Ezra9:11 ebi waaragiriire omu baheereza baawe abarangi, noogira oti: Ensi ei murikuza kutaahamu kukubuura n'ensi esiisikaire, ahabw'ebihagaro by'abantu b'omuri ezo nsi, n'ebirikunugwa byabo ebigiijwire oku n'oku, hamwe n'oburofa bwabo." 
Ezra9:12 Oti: N'ahabw'ekyo mutarihingira bahara baanyu batabani baabo, nobu kwakuba okushwererera batabani baanyu bahara baabo. Kandi oti: Mutaryenda kugira nabo obusingye nari obugogyeere, mubone kuba ab'amaani, n'okurya ebirungi by'egyo nsi; n'okugitsigira batabani baanyu, bakagihungura ebiro byona." 
Ezra9:13 Mbwenu shi, nk'oku ebyo byona byatubaireho ahabw'ebibi bi twakozire, n'ahabw'orubanja ruhango ru twagizire, haza tukareeba, iwe Ruhanga waitu, nootuha ekifubiro kitakuuraine na bicumuro byaitu, kandi okatutsigiraho emponoka zirikwingana ziti," 
Ezra9:14 mbwenu kandi tugaruka tuhenda ebiragiro byawe, tushwererana n'Abanyamahanga, abarikukora ebirikunugwa birikwingana biti? Torikwija kutugirira ekiniga, okatumaraho, hakabura owaatsigaraho nari owaahonokaho?" 
Ezra9:15 Ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, niiwe oba ow'amazima; ahabw'okuba itwe turi abaatsigaireho turi emponoka, nk'oku turi n'eri izooba. Mbwenu reeba, turi aha omu maisho gaawe tusingirwe orubanja, kandi tihaine orikubaasa kwemerera omu maisho gaawe ahabw'orwo rubanja." 
Ezra10:1 Ezera ku yaabaire naashaba Ruhanga, naayatura ebibi, naarira, kandi naayetuura aha nsi omu maisho ga Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, abashaija baingi munonga n'abakazi n'abaana baateeranira ahu ari nibaruga omuri Isiraeli; ahabw'okuba abo bantu nabo bakarira munonga." 
Ezra10:2 Reero Shekaniiya, mutabani wa Yehieli ow'omuri beene Elamu, yaimutsya eiraka, yaagambira Ezera ati: Tuhemukire ahari Ruhanga waitu, twashwera Abanyamahangakazi omu bantu b'ezo nsi; kwonka n'obu kiraabe kiri kityo, tukiiniire Isiraeli amatsiko." 
Ezra10:3 Mbwenu nu, ka tukore endagaano na Ruhanga waitu, tubingye abo bakazi boona n'abaana baabo, nk'oku iwe mukama wangye, n'abarikutiina ekiragiro kya Ruhanga waitu, muraatuhabure; kandi ekyo kikorwe, nk'oku eiteeka riri." 
Ezra10:4 Mbwenu imuka, ahabw'okuba n'omurimo gwawe, naitwe tukwine, yehangaane ogukore." 
Ezra10:5 Atyo Ezera aimuka, arahiza abahongyerezi bakuru n'Abaleevi n'Abaisiraeli boona kukora nk'oku kyagambwa. Nabo bahiga batyo nibarahira." 
Ezra10:6 Bwanyima Ezera aruga omu maisho ga Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, aza omu kishengye kya Yehohaanani, mutabani wa Eliiyashibu, aba nimwo yaaraara, atariire kokurya, nobu kwakuba okunywa otwizi, naacurira abo bazaahuuki okutaba beesigwa." 
Ezra10:7 Kandi baarangirira omuri Buyudaaya n'omuri Yerusalemu; 
Ezra10:8 kandi ngu, ku haakugira otaija omu biro bishatu, abatware n'abakuru omu ihanga nibaija kuragiira ebintu bye byona binyagwe, nawe wenka acuubwe omu kigombe ky'abaazaahuukire." 
Ezra10:9 Mpaho abashaija b'omu ruganda rwa Yuda n'orwa Benyamiini baateeranira Yerusalemu omu biro bishatu; obwo kukaba kuri okwezi kwa mwenda, aha kiro kya makumi abiri ky'okwo kwezi. Abantu boona baashutama omu kibuga ky'omu maisho ga Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, nibatetema ahabw'ekyo kintu n'ahabw'enjura nyingi." 
Ezra10:10 Ezera omuhongyerezi yaayemerera, yaabagira ati: Mushobize, okushwera abakazi abanyamahanga, mwakanyisiza Isiraeli orubanja." 
Ezra10:11 Mbwenu mwaturire Mukama Ruhanga wa baashwenkuriimwe ekibi kyanyu, mukore eki arikwenda; mwetaanise n'abantu b'omuri egyo nsi, n'abakazi Abanyamahanga." 
Ezra10:12 Bwanyima abaabaire bateeraniire aho boona, baagarukamu n'eiraka rihango bati: Nikwo kiri; tushemereire kukora nk'oku waagamba." 
Ezra10:13 Kwonka abantu ni baingi, kandi n'obunaku bw'enjura nyingi; titurikubaasa kuguma twemereire aheeru omu kangarateete. Kandi ogu ti murimo gw'eizooba rimwe nari abiri; ahabw'okuba tucumwire munonga omuri ekyo kintu." 
Ezra10:14 Mbwenu abatware baitu ka beemerere omu iziina ry'eihanga ryona, haza ab'omu ndembo zaitu boona abashweire abanyamahangakazi baije omu bunaku obutairweho, baine abakuru omu ihanga n'abaramuzi aba buri rurembo, okuhitsya obu kashanga ei Ruhanga waitu atwiniire ahabw'ekyo kintu eraaturugyeho." 
Ezra10:15 Yonatani mwene Asaheeli na Yahezeiya mwene Tikiva bonka nibo baakihakaniise, kandi Meshulaamu na Shabetai Omuleevi baikirizana nabo." 
Ezra10:16 Kwonka abazaahuuki abaagarukire baatwaza nk'oku baahaire ekiteekateeko. Ezera omuhongyerezi yaatoorana abashaija abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, nk'oku emiryango ya baishenkurubo eri, buri omwe omuribo naajwekyera, nk'oku amaziina gaabo gaabaire gari. Aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwezi kwa ikumi, baashutama kwetegyereza ekyo kintu." 
Ezra10:17 Reero, aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwezi kw'okubanza, baashangwa baaherize ebigambo by'abashaija boona abaabaire bashweire abanyamahangakazi." 
Ezra10:18 Omu batabani b'abahongyerezi abaashangirwe bashweire abanyamahangakazi ni Maaseiya, Eliezeeri, Yaribu, na Gedaliya ab'omuri beene Yeshwa, mutabani wa Yoozadaki, na beene ishe." 
Ezra10:19 Bakarahira nibahiga kubinga abakazi baabo, kandi empongano y'okukarabira ekicumuro kyabo ekaba eri empaya y'entaama." 
Ezra10:20 Omuri beene Imeri, ni Hanaani na Zebadiya." 
Ezra10:21 Omuri beene Harimu, ni Maaseiya, Eliiya, Shemaiya, Yehieli, na Uziya." 
Ezra10:22 Omuri beene Paashuri, ni Elionai, Maaseiya, Ishimaeli, Nataneeli, Yoozabadi na Elaasa." 
Ezra10:23 Omu Baleevi, ni Yoozabadi, Shimei, Kelaiya niwe Kelita Petahiiya, Yuda na Eliezeri." 
Ezra10:24 Omu beeshongozi, ni Eliiyaahibu. Omu bakumiirizi, ni Shaadumi na Telemu, na Uuri." 
Ezra10:25 Omu Baisiraeli ab'omuri beene Paroshi, baashangamu Ramiiya, Iziiya, Malikiya, Niinyamini, Eleazaari, Hashabiya, na Beenaaya." 
Ezra10:26 Omuri beene Elamu, ni Mataniya, Zekariya, Yehieli, Abudi, Yeeremoti na Eliya." 
Ezra10:27 Omu beene Zaatu, ni Elioenai, Eliiyashibu, Mataniya, Yeeremoti, Zabadi na Aziiza." 
Ezra10:28 Omuri beene Beebai hakashangwamu Yehohanani, Hananiya, Zaabai na Atalai." 
Ezra10:29 Omu beene Bani haabamu Meshulaamu, Maluki, Adayiiya, Yashubu, Sheali na Yeeremoti." 
Ezra10:30 Omuri beene Paahatimoabu, ni Adina, Kelali, Benaaya, Maaseiya, Mataniya, Bezaleeli, Binui na Manaase." 
Ezra10:31 Omu beene Harimu, ni Eliezeri, Ishiiya, Malikiya, Shemayiiya," 
Ezra10:32 Shiimeoni, Benyamiini, Maluki na Shemariiya." 
Ezra10:33 Omuri beene Hashumu, ni Mateenai, Maatataahi, Zabadi, Eliifeleti, Yeremai, Manaase na Shimei." 
Ezra10:34 Omuri beene Bani, ni Maadai, Amuraamu, Ueli," 
Ezra10:35 Benaaya, Bedeyiiya, Keeluhi," 
Ezra10:36 Vaniiya, Meelemoti, Eliiyashibu," 
Ezra10:37 Mataniya, Mateenai na Yaasu." 
Ezra10:38 Omuri beene Piinui, ni Shimei," 
Ezra10:39 Shelemiiya, Natani, Adayiiya," 
Ezra10:40 Makanaadebai, Shashai, Shaarai," 
Ezra10:41 Azareeli, Shelemiiya, Shemariiya," 
Ezra10:42 Shaalumu, Amariiya na Yosefu." 
Ezra10:43 Omuri beene Neebo, ni Yeieli, Matitiya, Zabadi, Zebiina, Yaadai, Yoeli na Benaaya" 
Ezra10:44 Boona abo bakaba bashweire abanyamahangakazi; haza baababinga hamwe n'abaana baabo. 
Nehemiah1:1 Ebi n'ebi Nehemiya mwene Hakaliiya yaatebize. Mbwenu omu kwezi kwa Kisileevi, omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri, ogw'omu busingye bw'Omugabe Arutazaakiseesi, ku naabaire ndi omuri Susa orurembo rukuru," 
Nehemiah1:2 naayecura Hanaani, omwe ahari beene waitu; yaija n'abandi bantu nibaruga Buyudaaya. Naababuuza eby'Abayudaaya abaahonokireho bakakira okuzaahibwa, n'ebya Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah1:3 Bangira bati: Abaahonokireho bakakira okuzaahibwa, abatwire omuri ekyo kyanga baine enaku nyingi, n'enshoni z'okuhemuka, ahabw'okuba ekigo kya Yerusalemu kisheenyukire, n'amarembo gaayo gacwekyereziibwe omuriro." 
Nehemiah1:4 Ku naahuriire ebyo bigambo, ekibunu naakiteera ahansi, naarira, naamara ebiro nincura; naaguma niinyesiibyakwo, kandi ninshaba Ruhanga ow'omu iguru." 
Nehemiah1:5 Reero naagira nti: Ai Mukama, Ruhanga ow'omu iguru, Ruhanga omukuru kandi orikutiinisa, iwe orinda endagaano, okagira rukundo etahararuka aha bakukunda, bakoorobera ebiragiro byawe," 
Nehemiah1:6 tega okutu, kandi oreebe, ohurire okushaba kw'omuheereza waawe, oku nyowe hati ndikushabira omu maisho gaawe nyomushana na nyekiro, ahabw'Abaisiraeli abaheereza baawe, niinyatura ebibi byabo ebi twakucumwireho. Eego, nyowe n'ab'enju ya tata tukacumura." 
Nehemiah1:7 Tukakukorera ebitahikire, titwakuratira biragiro bi waaragiire omugaragwa waawe Musa." 
Nehemiah1:8 Ijuka ekigambo ki waaragiire omugaragwa waawe Musa, noogira oti: Ku muriba mutabaire beesigwa, ndyabataataanira omu mahanga;" 
Nehemiah1:9 kwonka ku muringarukira mwakuratira ebiragiro byangye, mwabihitsya, abaanyu n'obu bariba bataataaniire ei eiguru riherera, ndyabataarurayo, mbareete omu mwanya gu naatooraine kugumyamu eiziina ryangye." 
Nehemiah1:10 Nibo bairu baawe, kandi n'abantu baawe abu waacungwize obushoboorozi bwawe obwingi n'omukono gwawe ogw'amaani." 
Nehemiah1:11 Ai Nyakubaho, tega okutu ohurire okushaba kw'omuheereza waawe, n'okw'abaheereza baawe abashemerererwa okutiina eiziina ryawe; haza nyowe omuheereza waawe ompe okugyenderwa gye eri izooba, kandi ompe okugirirwa embabazi ogu muntu. Mbwenu obwo, nyowe nkaba ndi orikubonetsya omugabe ekikopo kya viino." 
Nehemiah2:1 Omu kwezi kwa Nisani, omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri gw'omu busingye bw'Omugabe Arutazaakiseesi, viino ku yaabaire eri omu maisho ge, naagiihaho, naagimubonetsya. Reero obundi bwona nkaba ntakagiraga ntyo busaasi omu maisho ge." 
Nehemiah2:2 Ogwo mugabe nikwo kumbuuza ati: Ahabw'enki ohinduriize aha maisho, haza noorebeka nk'orwaire? Ekyo ti kindi, kureka n'obusaasi bw'omu mutima. Ntyo ntiina munonga." 
Nehemiah2:3 Ngambira omugabe nti: Karamaare, Nyakusinga! Hari ekyakunzibiire kucuncubara ni ki? Haza kunu orurembo orurimu ebituuro bya baatatenkuru ruri amatongo, n'amarembo gaarwo gacwekyereziibwe omuriro?" 
Nehemiah2:4 Omugabe nikwo kungarukamu ati: Mbwenu nooshaba ki? Ntyo mbanza nyeshengyereza Ruhanga ow'omu iguru. 
Nehemiah2:5 Reero ngira omugabe nti: Nyakusinga, ku oraabe nookisiima, kandi ndi omushongore ahariiwe, naakweshengyereza, onyohereze, nze Buyudaaya omu rurembo rw'ebituuro bya baatatenkuru, mbone kurwombeka busya." 
Nehemiah2:6 Omugabe nawe ambuuza, omugabekazi amushutami aha rubaju, ati: Noija kugiteera ebiro bingahi kandi oryagaruka ryari? Omugabe atyo aikiriza kuunyohereza, naanye ndagaana nawe obunaku." 
Nehemiah2:7 Ngira ogwo mugabe ati: Nyakusinga, ku oraabe nookisiima, mpa ebaruha y'okutwarira abategyeki abakuru by'ekyanga kya seeri y'Omugyera; babone kundeka kurabamu, okuhitsya obu ndaahikye Buyudaaya." 
Nehemiah2:8 Kandi ompe n'ebaruha y'okutwarira Asafu, omurinzi w'ekibira ky'omugabe, abone kumpa emiti y'okwihamu enkingi z'amarembo g'ekigo kya Nyaruju, n'ey'orugo rw'orurembo, n'ey'enju ei ndaaraaremu. Omugabe anyikiriza ebi naamushabire, ahabw'okuba omukono murungi gwa Ruhanga wangye gukaba gundiho." 
Nehemiah2:9 Bwanyima ntyo mpika abategyeki abakuru ab'ekyanga kya seeri y'Omugyera, mbakwatsa ebaruha z'omugabe. Kandi obwo, omugabe akaba anyohereize hamwe n'abakuru b'engabo n'ab'ahambaraasi kunshagara," 
Nehemiah2:10 kwonka Sanibalati Omuhooroni na Toobiya omuheereza we, Omuamoni, ku baakihuriire, kyabagwisa kubi munonga kureeba ngu hariho oizire kukora eby'okutunguura Abaisiraeli." 
Nehemiah2:11 Mpaho naija Yerusalemu, naamarayo ebiro bishatu." 
Nehemiah2:12 Bwanyima naimuka nyekiro, nyine abashaija bakye, haza tinaagira u naagambira eki Ruhanga antaire aha mutima kukorera Yerusalemu, kandi obwo nkaba ntaine nyamaishwa yoona etungwa, kureka ei naabaire ntembire." 
Nehemiah2:13 Ntyo nshohora nyekiro, ndaba omu Irembo ry'Oruhanga, mpika aha Iziba ry'Ekijoka, n'aha Mugyende, nyetegyereza ebigo bya Yerusalemu ebyabaire bisheenyukire, ndeeba n'amarembo gaayo agaabaire gacwekyereziibwe omuriro." 
Nehemiah2:14 Bwanyima nza aha Irembo ry'Enshuro n'aha Kiyanja ky'Omugabe, kwonka mbura ah'okurabya enyamaishwa ei naabaire ntembire." 
Nehemiah2:15 Ndugaho, nyinamuka omuri ekyo kiro nindaba omu ruhanga, nyetegyereza ekyo kigo; bwanyima nkuba, ndaba omu Irembo ery'Oruhanga, ntyo ngarukayo." 
Nehemiah2:16 Haza abategyeki tibaramanyire ei naabaire ngiire, nari eki naabaire ninkora; kandi nkaba ntaine ki naagambiire Abayudaaya n'abahongyerezi n'abakungu n'abatware n'abandi, abaabaire bari ab'okukora ogwo murimo." 
Nehemiah2:17 Bwanyima naabagira nti: Nimureeba akabi ku turimu, oku Yerusalemu ebaire amatongo, n'oku amarembo gaayo gahiire. Mbwenu nimwije twombekye ekigo kya Yerusalemu, turekye kuguma nituhemuka." 
Nehemiah2:18 Kandi mbateekyerereza oku omukono gwa Ruhanga wangye gwangiriire akaso karungi, n'ebi omugabe yangambiire. Bangarukamu bati: Ka twimukye, twombekye. Batyo baayeteera ebinyomyo kukora ogwo murimo murungi," 
Nehemiah2:19 kwonka Sanibalati Omuhooroni, na Toobiya omuheereza we, Omuamoni, na Geshemu Omuharabu, ku baakihuriire, baatushekyeerera, baatugaya nibagira bati: Ekyo nimukora ki? Mbwenu nimwenda kugomera omugabe?" 
Nehemiah2:20 Naanye mbagarukamu nti: Ruhanga ow'omu iguru naija kutuha okubaasikirwa, itwe abairu be twimukye, twombekye. Kwonka imwe omuri Yerusalemu timwinemu mugabo nari obushoboorozi, n'obu kyakuba ekiijutsyo." 
Nehemiah3:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, haimuka Eliyashibu omuhongyerezi omukuru, hamwe n'abahongyerezi beene ishe, baayombeka Eirembo ry'Entaama. Baarihaasirira, baaritamu ebiti by'eirembo n'enyigi. Baarihaasirira baarihitsya aha Munaara gwa Mea n'aha gwa Hananeeli." 
Nehemiah3:2 Haakurataho aba Yeriko; nabo omu kwombeka baakuratwa Zaakuri mwene Imuri. 
Nehemiah3:3 Reero beene Hasena baayombeka Eirembo ry'Ebyenyanja; baaribyaramu ebiti by'eirembo, baaritamu enyigi, n'ebyoma by'okurikingisa, n'empimbi zaaryo." 
Nehemiah3:4 Baakuratwa Meeremooti mwene Uriya, mwijukuru wa Hakozi, yaahunduuza. Yaakuratwa Meshulamu, mwene Berekiya, mwijukuru wa Meshezabeli, nawe yaahunduuza. Kandi yaakuratwa Zadoki, mutabani wa Baana, yaahunduuza." 
Nehemiah3:5 Reero we yaakuratwa Abatekoa, nabo baahunduuza. Kwonka abakungu baabo baayanga kwecwendekyera bakama baabo ahari ogwo murimo." 
Nehemiah3:6 Mbwenu Yoiyada mwene Paseeya, na Meshulaamu mwene Besodeiya, baahunduuza Eirembo Erikuru; baabyara ebiti byarwo by'eirembo, baatamu n'enyigi zaaryo n'ebyoma by'okurikingisa n'empimbi." 
Nehemiah3:7 Haataho Melatiiya Omugibeoni, yaahunduuza na Yadoni Omumerooniti, abashaija ba Gibeoni na Mizipa, abaabaire nibategyekwa omutegyeki mukuru w'ekyanga kya seeri y'Omugyera." 
Nehemiah3:8 Abo baakuratwa Uzieli mwene Harihayiya, ow'omu baheesi b'ezaabu, yaahunuuza. Nawe yaakuratwa Hananiya ow'omu bakozi b'eby'emigaju, yaahunduuza, batyo baagaruraho Yerusalemu, baagihitsya aha Kigo Ekihango." 
Nehemiah3:9 Baakuratwa Refayiya mwene Huuri, omutegyeki w'ekicweka ky'ekyanga kya Yerusalemu, yaahunduuza." 
Nehemiah3:10 Haakurataho Yelayiiya mwene Harumafa, owaahunduurize ahashungaine n'enju ye. Yaakuratwa Hatushi mwene Hashabineyiya, yaahunduuza." 
Nehemiah3:11 Reero Malikiya mwene Harimu, na Hashubu mwene Paahatimoabu, baahunduuza ekindi kibanga n'Omunaara gw'Amateekyero." 
Nehemiah3:12 Owaabakuratiire ni Shalumu mwene Haloohesha, omutegyeki w'ekicweka ky'ekyanga kya Yerusalemu, yaahunduuza, we n'abahara." 
Nehemiah3:13 Kandi Hanuni n'abatwire Zanoa baahunduuza eirembo ry'Oruhanga. Baaryombeka busya, baaritamu enyigi n'ebyoma by'okurikingisa, n'empimbi zaaryo, baahunduuza n'ekigo ekirikuhitsya mikono rukumi, okugarukira aha Mugyende." 
Nehemiah3:14 Malikiya mwene Rekabu, omutegyeki w'ekyanga kya Betihakeeremu, yaahunduuza Omugyende; yaagwombeka busya yaagutamu enyigi n'ebyoma by'okugukingisa, n'empimbi zaagwo." 
Nehemiah3:15 Shalumu mwene Kolihooze, omutegyeki w'ekyanga kya Mizipa, akahunduuza Eirembo ry'Enshuro; yaaryombeka busya, yaarishakaara, yaaritamu enyigi zaaryo n'ebyoma by'okurikingisa, n'empimbi zaaryo, kandi yaayombeka n'ekigo ky'aha Kiyanja kya Shela, eky'omu musiri gw'omugabe, okuhika aha bitembezo birikushuuma nibiruga omu Rurembo rwa Daudi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Owamukuratiire ni Nehemiya mwene Acibuki, omutegyeki w'ekicweka ky'ekyanga kya Beetizuuri, yaahunduuza okuhika aharikureebana n'ebituuro bya Daudi, aha kiyanja eki baafukwire, n'aha nju y'amamanzi." 
Nehemiah3:17 Yaakuratwa Abaleevi, nabo baahunduuza. Haataho Rehumu mwene Bani; yaakuratwa Hashabiya, omutegyeki w'ekicweka ky'ekyanga kya Keliya, yahunduuza ahabw'ekyanga kye." 
Nehemiah3:18 Haataho beene waabo, baahunduuza: Baavai mwene Heenadadi, omutegyeki w'ekicweka ky'ekyanga kya Keila;" 
Nehemiah3:19 yaakuratwa Ezeri mwene Yeshwa, omutegyeki wa Mizipa, yaahunduuza ekindi kibanga, ekirikureebana n'aharikwinamukirwa nooza omu ibiikiro ry'eby'okurwanisa aha Keehogo." 
Nehemiah3:20 Nawe yaakuratwa Baruuki mwene Zaabai, yaahunduuza ekindi kicweka, okwiha aha Keehogo okuhitsya aha muryango gw'enju ya Eliyashibu omuhongyerezi omukuru." 
Nehemiah3:21 Haataho Meeremooti mwene Uriya, mwijukuru wa Hakozi, yaahunduuza ekindi kibanga ekirikwiha aha muryango gw'enju ya Eliyashibu, okuta aha muheru gw'egyo nju." 
Nehemiah3:22 Yaakuratwa abahongyerezi b'omu ruhita, nabo baahunduuza." 
Nehemiah3:23 Baakuratwa Benyamiini na Hashubu, abaahunduurize ahashungaine n'enju yaabo. Haataho Azariya mwene Maseiya, mwijukuru wa Ananiya, yaahunduuza aha rubaju rw'enju ye." 
Nehemiah3:24 Yaakuratwa Binui, mwene Heenadaki, yaahunduuza ekindi kibanga, okwiha aha nju ya Azariya, okuta aha keekubo," 
Nehemiah3:25 n'okuhitsya aha Keehogo. Reero Palali mwene Uzai, yaahunduuza ahashungaine n'Akeehogo, n'aha munaara ogurikwiha ahari kaanyinaabiri y'omugabe, oguhereire ekibuga ky'abarinzi. Reero we yaakuratwa Pedayiiha mwene Paroshi," 
Nehemiah3:26 n'abaheereza b'omuri Nyaruju abatwire Ofeli, baahunduuza okuhitsya ahashungaine n'Eirembo ry'Amaizi, aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba, ah'omunaara gurikwiha." 
Nehemiah3:27 Ogwo yaakuratwa Abatekoa, baahunduuza ekindi kibanga ekirikureebana n'ah'omunaara omuhango gurikwiha, okuhitsya aha kigo kya Ofeli." 
Nehemiah3:28 Abahongyerezi bo bakahunduuza aharuguru y'Eirembo ry'Embaraasi, buri omwe aharikureebana n'enju ye." 
Nehemiah3:29 Baakuratwa Zadoki mwene Imeri, nawe yaahunduuza ahashungaine n'enju ye. Haakurataho Shemayiiya mwene Shekaniiya, omukumiirizi w'aha Irembo ry'ahari Burugwa-izooba, nawe yaahunduuza." 
Nehemiah3:30 Haataho Hananiya mwene Shelemiiya, na Hanuni mutabani wa Zelafu owa mukaaga baahunduuza ekindi kibanga. Haakurataho Meshulaamu mutabani wa Berekiya, yaahunduuza ahashungaine n'ekishengye kye." 
Nehemiah3:31 Yaakuratwa Malikiya, ow'omu baheesi b'ezaabu, yaahunduuza, yaahitsya aha nju y'abaheereza ba Nyaruju, n'aha y'abashuubuzi, abarikureebana n'eirembo eriteeranirwaho abarinzi n'okuhika aha kishengye kya ruguru eky'aha Keekubo." 
Nehemiah3:32 Kandi abaheesi b'ezaabu n'abashuubuzi baahunduuza rwagati y'ekyo kishengye kya ruguru n'Eirembo ry'Entaama. 
Nehemiah4:1 Mbwenu Sanibalati ku yaahuriire ngu nitwombeka ekigo, yaaguubwa kubi, yaagira ekiniga kingi, kandi yaateerera Abayudaaya enaku." 
Nehemiah4:2 Yaagambira omu maisho ga beene waabo, n'ag'ab'eihe rya Samariya, ati: Abo Bayudaaya entakimazire nibakora ki? Ebyo nibaija kugaruraho ebyo bintu? Nibaija kutamba ebitambo? Nibaija kuheza omu kiro kimwe? Ebyo nibaija kutabuura ago mabaare omu mituumiro y'ebyasheenyukire, haza gaahiire gatyo?" 
Nehemiah4:3 Reero Toobiya Omuamoni, owaabaire amuri aha rubaju, nawe yaagira ati: Eego, orwo rugo rwabo rw'amabaare oru barikwombeka muha ku yaakurutembaho ekaarubandika!" 
Nehemiah4:4 Ntyo nshaba nti: Ai Ruhanga waitu, hurira, ahabw'okuba nitugaywa. Ebyo bijumo bi baatujuma, ba nibo waabigarurira; kandi obaheyo, banyagirwe omu nsi ei baraatwarwemu bari enkwatwa." 
Nehemiah4:5 Otashwekyerera orubanja rwabo, n'obu kwakuba okwiha ekibi kyabo omu maisho gaawe; ahabw'okuba bakwitsiize ekiniga omu maisho g'abo bombeki." 
Nehemiah4:6 Tutyo twayombeka ekyo kigo; twakiteerana kyona, twakihitsya rwagati. Ahabw'okuba abantu bakaba baine omuhimbo gw'okukora." 
Nehemiah4:7 Kwonka Sanibalati na Toobiya n'Abaharabu n'Abaamoni n'Abaashidoodi ku baahuriire ngu okuhunduuza ebigo bya Yerusalemu nikugyenda omu maisho, kandi ngu ahaasheenyukire hatandikire kuteeranwa, baagira ekiniga kingi." 
Nehemiah4:8 Boona hamwe baacuma enaama y'okwija kuteera Yerusalemu n'okugirabanisamu. 
Nehemiah4:9 Naitwe twashaba Ruhanga waitu, kandi twataho abarinzi b'okubarinda nyomushana na nyekiro." 
Nehemiah4:10 Kwonka aba Yuda baagira bati: Abeekorezi batandikire kuhwa amaani, haza hakiriho bingi ebyasheenyukire, titurikubaasa kwombeka orwo rugo tukaruheza;" 
Nehemiah4:11 kandi abazigu baitu bagizire bati: Tibarikwija kukimanya, n'obu kwakuba okutureeba, okuhitsya obu turaabagwe ahagati tukabaita, tukeemereza ogwo murimo." 
Nehemiah4:12 Abayudaaya abaabaire batwire nabo ku baizire, baatugambira kaingi bati: Nibaija kuruga hoonahoona ahi batwire, bahurure, batuteere." 
Nehemiah4:13 Ntyo nta abantu omu mpanga z'enyima y'ekigo, omu myanya erikurangizibwamu, nk'oku emiryango yaabo yaabaire eri, baine zaarurara zaabo n'amacumu n'amata gaabo." 
Nehemiah4:14 Ku naaherize kwetegyereza oku bari, naimuka, naagambira abakungu n'abatware, n'abandi bantu, nti: Mutabatiina. Mwijukye Nyakubaho omukuru kandi orikutiinisa! Murwanirire beene waanyu na batabani baanyu na bahara baanyu n'abakazi baanyu n'amaka gaanyu." 
Nehemiah4:15 Abazigu baitu ku baahuriire ngu tukimanyire, kandi ngu Ruhanga acwire busha enaama yaabo, twena twagaruka aha kigo, buri muntu aha murimo gwe." 
Nehemiah4:16 Okwiha ekyo kiro, ekicweka kimwe ky'abantu bangye kyakora ogw'okwombeka, n'ekindi kyahagatira amacumu n'engabo n'amata, kijwaire ebyoma by'orugamba; kandi abakuru omuribo baaguma beemereire enyima y'ab'omuryango gw'aba Yuda," 
Nehemiah4:17 abaabaire nibombeka ekigo. Reero abaabaire nibeekorera ebintu bakaba beekorera, buri muntu naakoresa omukono gumwe, n'ogundi gukwaitse eby'okuraanisa." 
Nehemiah4:18 Kandi buri mwombeki akaba ayombeka ayekobekire rurara aha rubaju. N'ow'okuteera enzamba anguma aha rubaju. 
Nehemiah4:19 Ntyo ngambira abakungu n'abatware n'abandi bantu, nti: Omurimo ni muhango, kandi gwenaganagire; haza naitwe tituri hamwe omu kwombeka orwo rugo; buri muntu ari hare mugyenzi we." 
Nehemiah4:20 Ei muraahurire eiraka ry'enzamba, mube niyo mwirukira nimwija ahi turi; haza Ruhanga waitu naija kuturwanirira." 
Nehemiah4:21 Tutyo twayehenengyera ogwo murimo; ekicweka kyabo ekimwe kikwaitse amacumu, okwiha omushekye nigujuguta, okuhitsya ah'enyonyoozi zibonekyera." 
Nehemiah4:22 Kandi hoona ngambira abantu nti: Buri mushaija n'omuhuuku we bagume baraare omuri Yerusalemu, tubone kutunga ab'okuturinda nyekiro, n'ab'okukora nyomushana." 
Nehemiah4:23 N'ahabw'ekyo n'obu yaakuba nyowe, nari beene waitu, nainga abahuuku bangye, n'obu baakuba abarinzi abaabaire bankuratira, tihariho n'omwe omuriitwe owaajwire ebijwaro bye, kureka buri omwe akaguma akwaitse omu ngaro eby'okurwanisa." 
Nehemiah5:1 Bwanyima bamwe omu Bayudaaya n'abakazi baabo bakeetomboitera munonga Abayudaaya beene waabo. 
Nehemiah5:2 Ahabw'okuba hariho abaayetomboitsire, ngu bakaba nibakwatiriza batabani baabo na bahara baabo, ngu babone kutunga ebyokurya by'okubahaisa amagara." 
Nehemiah5:3 Kandi haabaho abaagizire bati: Ahabw'enjara, ku turikuza kutunga ebyokurya, tukwatiriza emisiri yaitu, n'ey'emizaabibu n'amaka gaitu." 
Nehemiah5:4 Reero abandi baagira bati: Twegurize empiiha, twakwatiriza emisiri yaitu, n'ey'emizaabibu, ahabw'okuha omushoro gw'omugabe." 
Nehemiah5:5 Mbwenu n'obu turaabe turi ab'omubiri gumwe na beene waitu, n'abaana baitu bari nk'abaabo, kwonka nitugyema batabani baitu na bahara baitu kuba abahuuku, kandi bamwe omuri bahara baitu baahindwirwe abazaana. Kwonka titwine oku turaakigire, ahabw'okuba abandi bantu baine emisiri yaitu hamwe n'ey'emizaabibu." 
Nehemiah5:6 Ku naahuriire ebi baayetomboita n'ebi baagamba, naaguubwa kubi munonga." 
Nehemiah5:7 Naayehanuuza omu mutima, bwanyima naatonganisa abakungu n'abatware, naabagira nti: Nimushaba ekiteebwamu, buri muntu akiiha ahari mwene ishe. Ntyo nteerana abantu baingi kubeemeza;" 
Nehemiah5:8 haza mbagira nti: Itwe tukakora eki turikubaasa, twacungura beene waitu Abayudaaya abu baabaire bagurize Abanyamahanga; mbwenu imwe nimutunda beene waanyu, ngu itwe tubacungure! Batyo bahunama, babura eky'okugamba." 
Nehemiah5:9 Naanye mbagira nti: Eki murikukora, ti kirungi. Timushemereire kuguma nimutiina Ruhanga waitu, mukareka kutujumisa Abanyamahanga abazigu baitu?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Nangwa naanye na beene waitu n'abaheereza bangye, nitubaguza empiiha n'ebyokurya. Mbwenu ka turekye ekyo kiteebwamu." 
Nehemiah5:11 Eri izooba mutoosha, mubagarurire emisiri yaabo n'ey'emizaabibu n'ey'emioliva n'amaju gaabo na kimwe kya igana ky'empiiha n'eky'engano n'ekya viino n'eky'amajuta, ebi mubaire nimubacwera." 
Nehemiah5:12 Nabo baagira bati: Ebyo nitwija kubigaruraho, kandi titwine ki turaabenze. Twaza kukora nk'oku waagamba. Kandi naayeta abahongyerezi, naabarahiza kukora nk'oku baaraganiise." 
Nehemiah5:13 Ntyo nkunkumura omunagiro gwangye, ngira nti: Omuntu oraabe atahikiriize ki yaaraganisa, Ruhanga naakamukunkumure atyo, akamwiha omu nju ye n'aha murimo gwe. Kandi naakakunkumurwe atyo, akaba omurangara. Reero boona abateeraniire aho baagira bati: Kibe kwo; kandi baahimbisa Nyakubaho. Haza abo bantu baatwaza nk'oku baaraganiise." 
Nehemiah5:14 Mbwenu okwiha omu bunaku bu naateereirweho kuba omutegyeki waabo mukuru, omu nsi ya Buyudaaya, okwiha omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri, okuhitsya omu gwa makumi ashatu n'ebiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Arutazaakiseesi omugabe, niyo myaka ikumi n'ebiri, n'obu yaakuba nyowe, nari beene waitu, tihariho owaariire ebyokurya ebitoijerwa omutegyeki omukuru." 
Nehemiah5:15 Abategyeki abakuru abambandiize bakaba baremeerera abantu, nibabacwera ebyokurya na viino, otabariiremu shilingi makumi ana z'efeeza. Nangwa n'abagaragwa baabo bakaba bategyekyesa abantu eikama; kwonka nyowe tindatwarize ntyo, ahabw'okuba nkaba nintiina Ruhanga." 
Nehemiah5:16 Naahamira aha murimo gw'okukora ekyo kigo, tinaayetungira itaka, n'abagaragwa bangye boona baaguma nibateeranirayo kukora omurimo." 
Nehemiah5:17 Kandi aha meeza yangye hakaba hariiraho abantu igana na makumi ataano; Abayudaaya n'abatware, otabariiremu abaabaire batwijamu, nibaruga omu mahanga agatwehinguririize." 
Nehemiah5:18 Reero egabo ya buri izooba ekaba eba enimi emwe n'entaama mukaaga enungi, kandi hoona naanye bambonereza enkoko; na buri biro ikumi batuteeraho endyanga ikumi za viino nyingi. Kwonka omuri ebyo byona, nkaba ntakenzaga bantu byokurya ebitoijerwa omutegyeki omukuru, ahabw'okuba abo bantu bakaba baruhiibwe obuhuuku." 
Nehemiah5:19 Ai Ruhanga wangye, ijuka byona ebi naakoreire abo bantu, onzimuurire ebirungi." 
Nehemiah6:1 Mbwenu ku baagambiire Sanibalati na Toobiya na Geshemu Omuharabu n'abandi bazigu baitu, ngu nyombekire ekigo, kandi ngu tihariho ahaasheenyukire ahakitsigaireho-nobu ndaabe ago magingo naabaire ntakataire nyingi ha marembo." 
Nehemiah6:2 Sanibalati ogwo na Geshemu bantumaho nibagira bati: Ija, tubugabuganire omu kirorero kimwe eky'omu ruhita rwa Ono. Kwonka shi, bakaba nibenda kunkora kubi." 
Nehemiah6:3 Naanye nikwo kubatumaho entumwa, nimbagarukamu nti: Ninkora omurimo muhango, nikyo ntarikubaasiza kushuuma okwo. Mbwenu ntsigyeho omurimo, gwemerere, ahabw'okushuuma okwo ei muri?" 
Nehemiah6:4 Bantumaho batyo emirundi ena, naanye nimbagarukamu ntyo." 
Nehemiah6:5 Kandi hoona aha murundi gwa kataano, Sanibalati yantumaho omugaragwa we, aine ebaruha eshashaanwire omu ngaro ze," 
Nehemiah6:6 ehandiikirwemu eti: Ni kigambwa omu mahanga, kandi na Geshemu nikwo akigambire, ngu iwe n'Abayudaaya nimwenda kugoma; ngu nikyo murikwombekyera ekigo, kandi ngu nooyenda kuba omugabe waabo, nk'oku kirikugambwa." 
Nehemiah6:7 Kandi ngu, otaireho abarangi b'okurangirira ebyawe omuri Yerusalemu, ku Buyudaaya eine omugabe. Mbwenu ebyo nikwo baraabigambire omugabe. N'ahabw'ekyo ija, tubihanuure kumwe." 
Nehemiah6:8 Naanye mmutumaho nimmugira nti: Ebyo byona ebi waagamba tibikakorwaga, kureka niiwe orikubyegunzira omu mutima gwawe." 
Nehemiah6:9 Manya boona bakaba nibenda kututiinisa, nibateekateeka ngu nitwija kwiha engaro aha murimo, gurekye kukorwa. Kwonka mbwenu, ai Ruhanga, naakweshengyereza, hamya emikono yangye." 
Nehemiah6:10 Mbwenu ku naataahire omwa Shemayiiya mwene Delayiiya, mwijukuru wa Mehetabeli, owaabaire akomeirwe omwe, yangira ati: Ka tubugabuganire omu nju ya Ruhanga, omuri Nyaruju, haza tukingye enyigi za Nyaruju, ahabw'okuba ni baija kukwita; eki kiro nibaija kukwita." 
Nehemiah6:11 Kwonka mmugarukamu nti: Omushaija nkaanye nimpunga nta? Kandi omushaija nkaanye nimbaasa nta kuza omuri Nyaruju, haza nkatsigaza amagara? Nyowe tindikuzamu." 
Nehemiah6:12 Ntyo mmanya, kandi ndeeba ku Ruhanga atamutumire, kureka ku yaayegambiise eby'oburangi ebitakwatiraine naanye; ahabw'okuba Toobiya na Sanabalati bakaba bamuguririire." 
Nehemiah6:13 Manya eki baamuguririire, n'okwenda ngu antiinise, ntwaze ntyo, nkore ekibi, nabo babone kungambaho kubi n'okunshekyeerera." 
Nehemiah6:14 Ai Ruhanga wangye, ijuka Toobiya na Sanabalati, ahabw'ebi baakozire, oijukye na Noadiiya omurangikazi, n'abandi barangi, abaayenzire kuntiinisa." 
Nehemiah6:15 Kityo ekigo kihwa aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bitaano, eky'okwezi Elulu, omu biro makumi ataano na bibiri." 
Nehemiah6:16 Reero abazigu baitu ku baakihuriire, n'abamahanga goona agatwehinguririize ku baakireebire, baatiina, baahwera kimwe eishaija, ahabw'okuba, bakamanya ku ogwo murimo gukozirwe, gukahwa ahabw'okuhwerwa Ruhanga waitu." 
Nehemiah6:17 Omu biro ebyo, abakungu b'omuri Buyudaaya bakatwekyera Toobiya ebaruha nyingi, n'eza Toobiya zaabahika." 
Nehemiah6:18 Manya baingi omuri Buyudaaya bakaba bahigire kuguma nibakwatanisa nawe, ahabw'okuba akaba ari mukwe wa Shekaniiya mwene Ara: na Yehohaana omutabani akaba ashweire muhara wa Meshulaamu mwene Berekiya." 
Nehemiah6:19 Bakaba bagambira omu maisho gangye ebirungi bi yaakozire, kandi bamuteekyerereza ebi ngamba. Toobiya nikwo kuguma nantwekyera ebaruha z'okuntiinisa." 
Nehemiah7:1 Reero ekigo ku kyayombekirwe, naanye, ku naaherize kubyara enyigi n'okutaho abakumiirizi n'abeeshongozi n'Abaleevi," 
Nehemiah7:2 naaha murumuna wangye Hanaani, na Hananiya omutegyeki omukuru ow'ekigo ekirindirwamu, obushoboorozi bw'okutegyeka Yerusalemu, ahabw'okuba akaba ari omwesigwa kandi naatiina Ruhanga okukira abandi baingi." 
Nehemiah7:3 Ntyo mbagira nti: Amarembo ga Yerusalemu garekye kwigurwa akashana katakatagatsire, kandi gagume gakingwe n'empimbi eizooba ritakarengire. Kandi mugume muteho abarinzi b'omu batuuzi ba Yerusalemu, buri muntu mumute omu mwanya gwe, aharikureebana n'enju ye." 
Nehemiah7:4 Reero obwo orurembo rukaba ruri ruhango kandi rugarami, kwonka abantu baamwo bari bakye, n'amaju gatakombekirwe." 
Nehemiah7:5 Bwanyima Ruhanga akantamu ekiteekateeko ky'okuteerana abakungu n'abatware n'abandi bantu, okuhandiikwa nk'oku enzaaro zaabo zirikukuratana; haza naagwa aha kitabo ky'enzaaro z'abaabandize kwija, kandi naashanga kihandiikirwemu kiti:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Aba nibo bantu b'omu kyanga abaazaahuukire nibaruga omu kukwatwa, abu Nabukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni yaabaire atwaire akazaasya; bwanyima bakagaruka Yerusalemu na Buyudaaya, buri omwe omu kirorero kye." 
Nehemiah7:7 Bakaija na Zerubabeeli, Yeshwa, Nehemiya, Azariya, Raamiiya, Nahaamani, Morodekai, Biilishani, Miisipereti, Biigivai, Nehumu na Baana. Mbwenu ogu nigwo mubaro gw'abashaija b'Abaisiraeli," 
Nehemiah7:8 beene Paroshi, enkumi ibiri na igana rimwe na makumi mushanju na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:9 Beene Shefatiya, magana ashatu na makumi mushanju na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:10 Beene Ara, magana mukaaga na makumi ataano na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:11 Beene Paatimoabu, nibo beene Yeshwa na Yoabu, enkumi ibiri na magana munaana na ikumi na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:12 Beene Elamu, rukumi na magana abiri na makumi ataano na bana." 
Nehemiah7:13 Beene Zaatu, magana munaana na makumi ana na bataano." 
Nehemiah7:14 Beene Zaakayi, magana mushanju na makumi mukaaga." 
Nehemiah7:15 Beene Binui, magana mukaaga na makumi ana munaana." 
Nehemiah7:16 Beene Beebai, magana mukaaga na makumi abiri na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:17 Beene Azigaadi, enkumi ibiri na magana ashatu na makumi abiri na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:18 Beene Adonikamu, magana mukaaga na makumi mukaaga na mushanju." 
Nehemiah7:19 Beene Biigivai, enkumi ibiri na makumi mukaaga na mushanju." 
Nehemiah7:20 Beene Adini, magana mukaaga na makumi ataano na bataano." 
Nehemiah7:21 Beene Ateri, nibo beene Hezekiya, makumi mwenda na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:22 Beene Beezai, magana ashatu na makumi abiri na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:23 Beene Beezai, magana ashatu na makumi abiri na bana." 
Nehemiah7:24 Beene Harifu, igana na ikumi na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:25 Beene Gibeoni, makumi mwenda na bataano." 
Nehemiah7:26 Abashaija ba Beetelehemu n'aba Netoofa, igana na makumi munaana na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:27 Abashaija ba Anatoti, igana na makumi abiri na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:28 Abashaija ba Betaazimaveeti, makumi ana na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:29 Abashaija ba Kiiriyatiyearimu, Kefiira na Beerooti, magana mushanju na makumi ana na bashatu." 
Nehemiah7:30 Abashaija ba Raama na Geba, magana mukaaga na makumi abiri n'omwe." 
Nehemiah7:31 Abashaija ba Mikimasi, igana na makumi abiri na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:32 Abashaija ba Beteli na Aayi, igana na makumi abiri na bashatu." 
Nehemiah7:33 Abashaija ba Neebo ondi, makumi ataano na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:34 Beene Elamu ondi, rukumi na magana abiri na makumi ataano na bana." 
Nehemiah7:35 Beene Harimu, magana ashatu na makumi abiri." 
Nehemiah7:36 Beene Yeriko, magana ashatu na makumi ana na bataano." 
Nehemiah7:37 Beene Lodi, Hadidi na Ono, magana mushanju na makumi abiri n'omwe." 
Nehemiah7:38 Beene Senaaha, enkumi ishatu na magana mwenda na makumi ashatu." 
Nehemiah7:39 Abahongyerezi nibo aba: beene Yedaaya, ab'omuryango gwa Yeshwa, magana mwenda na makumi mushanju na bashatu." 
Nehemiah7:40 Beene Imeri, rukumi na makumi ataano na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:41 Beene Pashuru, rukumi na magana abiri na makumi ana na mushanju." 
Nehemiah7:42 Beene Harimu, rukumi na ikumi na mushanju." 
Nehemiah7:43 Abaleevi ni beene Yeshwa, nibo ba Kaadimieli aba batabani ba Hoodeva, makumi mushanju na bana." 
Nehemiah7:44 Abeeshongozi ni beene Asafu, igana na makumi ana na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:45 Abakumiirizi ni beene Shaalumu, beene Ateri, beene Talumooni, beene Akubu, beene Hatiita, baijukuru ba Shobai, igana na makumi ashatu na munaana." 
Nehemiah7:46 Abaheereza b'omuri Nyaruju, ni beene Ziha, beene Hasuufa, beene Taboti," 
Nehemiah7:47 beene Kerosi, beene Siiya, beene Padoni," 
Nehemiah7:48 beene Lebaana, beene Haagaba, beene Shalimai," 
Nehemiah7:49 beene Hanani, beene Giideli, beene Gahari," 
Nehemiah7:50 beene Reayiiya, beene Rezini, beene Nekooda," 
Nehemiah7:51 beene Gazari, beene Uuza, beene Paseeya," 
Nehemiah7:52 beene Besai, beene Meunimu, beene Nefuusheimu," 
Nehemiah7:53 beene Bakubuku, beene Hakuufa, beene Harihuri," 
Nehemiah7:54 beene Baziliti, beene Mehiida, beene Harisha," 
Nehemiah7:55 beene Barikoozi, beene Siisera, beene Tema," 
Nehemiah7:56 beene Neziiya na beene Hatiifa. 
Nehemiah7:57 Reero batabani b'abaheereza ba Solomooni, ni beene Sootai, beene Soofereti, beene Periida," 
Nehemiah7:58 beene Yaala, beene Darakooni, beene Giideli," 
Nehemiah7:59 beene Shefatiiya, beene Hatili, beene Pooteretihazebaimu, na beene Amoni." 
Nehemiah7:60 Abaheereza ba Nyaruju boona na batabani b'abaheereza ba Solomooni bakaba magana ashatu na makumi mwenda na babiri. 
Nehemiah7:61 Reero aba n'abainamukire nibaruga Telimeela, Telahaarisha, Keerubi Adoni na Imeri, abatarabaasize kuhamya miryango ya baishenkurubo, nari obukomooko bwabo, yaaba baabaire bari ab'Abaisiraeli:" 
Nehemiah7:62 nibo beene Delayiiya, beene Toobiya, beene Nekooda, magana mukaaga na makumi ana na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:63 Kandi hoona n'omu bahongyerezi ni beene Barizilaayi, owaashweire omukazi w'omuri bahara ba Barizilaayi Omugileadi, reero akabeetererwa." 
Nehemiah7:64 Mbwenu abo bakasherura amaziina gaabo omu baahandiikirwe, nk'enzaaro za baishenkurubo oku zaabaire niikuratana, kwonka tigaashangwamu. N'ahabw'ekyo baabarwa kuba abatashemeire kukora omurimo gw'obuhongyerezi." 
Nehemiah7:65 Omutegyeki omukuru yaabagira ngu tibashemereire kurya aha byokurya ebirikwerera kimwe, okuhitsya obu haribaho omuhongyerezi orikubaasa kwehanuuza ahari Urimu na Tumimu." 
Nehemiah7:66 Abo bantu boona okubateerana, bakahika obukumi buna n'enkumi ibiri na magana ashatu na makumi mukaaga," 
Nehemiah7:67 otabariiremu bahuuku baabo n'abaazana baabo, abaahikire enkumi mushanju na magana ashatu na makumi ashatu na mushanju. Kandi bakaba baine abeeshongozi magana abiri na makumi ana na bataano, abashaija n'abakazi;" 
Nehemiah7:68 embaraasi zaabo zikaba ziri magana mushanju na makumi ashatu na mukaaga, enyumbu magana abiri na makumi ana na itaano," 
Nehemiah7:69 engamira magana ana na makumi ashatu na itaano, n'endogoya zaabo enkumi mukaaga na magana mushanju na makumi abiri." 
Nehemiah7:70 Mpaho bamwe omu bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo baahayo eby'okukora omurimo. Omutegyeki omukuru yaaha empiiha rukumi z'ezaabu, ebeeseni makumi ataano, ebijwaro by'abahongyerezi magana ataano na makumi ashatu, byaza omu ibiikiro." 
Nehemiah7:71 N'abakuru bamwe ab'emiryango ya baishenkurubo baaha empiiha z'ezaabu obukumi bubiri n'ez'efeeza enkumi ibiri na magana abiri, kuzibiikira ogwo murimo." 
Nehemiah7:72 Reero abandi bantu ebi baahaire bikaba empiiha z'ezaabu obukumi bubiri, n'ez'efeeza enkumi ibiri, n'ebijwaro makumi mukaaga na mushanju by'abahongyerezi." 
Nehemiah7:73 Batyo abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi n'abakumiirizi n'abeeshongozi n'abandi bantu n'abaheereza ba Nyaruju n'Abaisiraeli boona baatuura omu ndembo zaabo. Kandi okwezi kwa mushanju ku kwataahire, Abaisiraeli baashangwa baahikire omu ndembo zaabo." 
Nehemiah8:1 Bwanyima abantu boona, nk'omuntu omwe, bakateeranira omu kibuga ky'omu maisho g'Eirembo ry'Amaizi, baagambira Ezera omuhangu w'eiteeka kureeta ekitabo ky'eiteeka rya Musa, eri Nyakubaho yaateereireho Abaisiraeli." 
Nehemiah8:2 Mpaho aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwezi kwa mushanju, Ezera omuhongyerezi yaareeta ekyo kitabo ky'Eiteeka omu maisho g'omutwe gw'abashaija n'abakazi, n'abandi boona abarikubaasa kuhurira ebyaryo n'okubyetegyereza." 
Nehemiah8:3 Yaashoma ebyamwo, naareebana n'ekibuga ky'omu maisho g'Eirembo ry'Amaizi, okwiha kare omu kasheeshe okuhitsya omu ihangwe ahu abashaija n'abakazi boona abaabaire nibabaasa kubyetegyereza, baabaire bateeraniire, haza boona baatega okutu eby'omuri ekyo kitabo ky'Eiteeka." 
Nehemiah8:4 Atyo Ezera omuhangu w'eiteeka ayemerera aha kituuti ky'embaaho eki baabaire bakozire ahabw'ogwo murimo, reero aha rubaju rwe rwa buryo heemereraho Maatitiiya, Shema, Anayiiya, Uriya, Hilikiya na Maaseiya, kandi aha rubaju rwe rwa bumosho heemereraho Pedayiiya, Miishaeli, Malikiya, Hashumu, Hashabaadana, Zekariya na Meshulaamu." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ezera ashuuruura ekyo kitabo boona bamuhangire amaisho, ahabw'okuba akaba ari ahatunguukire okukira abandi boona, haza ku yaakishuurwire, abantu boona baayemerera." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezera yaasingiza Mukama Ruhanga omukuru, abantu boona baagarukamu baimukize emikono bati: Amiina, Amiina; kandi bainika emitwe yaabo, baaramya Nyakubaho bajuumaire aha nsi." 
Nehemiah8:7 Reero Yeshwa, Bani, Sherebiya, Yamini, Akubu, Shaabetai, Hodiiya, Maaseiya, Kelita, Azariya, Yoozabadi, Hanani, Pelayiiya n'Abaleevi, baahwera abantu kwetegyereza eby'omuri eryo iteeka, obwo abantu boona bari omu myanya yaabo." 
Nehemiah8:8 Batyo baashoma ebiri omu kitabo ky'eiteeka rya Ruhanga omu iraka ririkuhurirwa gye, baashoboorora amakuru gaabyo, abantu baayetegyereza ebyashomwa." 
Nehemiah8:9 Reero Nehemiya owaabaire ari omutegyeki omukuru, na Ezera omuhongyerezi kandi omuhangu w'eiteeka, n'Abaleevi abaabaire beegyesa abantu, baagambira abantu boona bati: Eizooba eri n'eririkwera ahari Mukama Ruhanga waitu; n'ahabw'ekyo mutaganya, n'obu kwakuba okurira. Manya abantu boona ku baahuriire ebigambo by'omu iteeka baarira." 
Nehemiah8:10 Bwanyima yaabagira ati: Nimwirooko mugyende, murye ez'ebishaju, munywe viino enuzire, kandi otaine omubisiire mumutwekyere egabo, ahabw'okuba eri izooba n'eririkwera ahari Nyakubaho waitu; n'ahabw'ekyo mutaganya, ahabw'okuba okushemererwa kwa Nyakubaho nigo maani gaitu." 
Nehemiah8:11 Mpaho Abaleevi baaretsya abantu boona, nibabagira bati: Mwikaikane! Manya eri izooba n'eririkwera, mutaganya." 
Nehemiah8:12 Batyo abantu boona baaza kurya n'okunywa, n'okutwekyera bagyenzi baabo egabo, n'okushemererwa munonga, ahabw'okuba bakashoboorokyerwa ebi baabagambiire." 
Nehemiah8:13 Aha izooba eryakuratsireho, abakuru b'abantu boona ab'emiryango ya baishenkurubo bakaija n'abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi, baateeranira ahari Ezera kwega eby'omu iteeka." 
Nehemiah8:14 Baashanga kihandiikirwe omuri eryo iteeka eri Nyakubaho yaaragiriire omuri Musa, ku Abaisiraeli bashemeire kuraara omu nsiisira omu biro by'obugyenyi bw'okwezi kwa mushanju." 
Nehemiah8:15 Kandi ku bashemereire kubibuzya, n'okubirangirira omu ndembo zaabo zoona, n'omuri Yerusalemu, bati: Nimwirooko, muze omu bibungo, mureete amataagi g'emioliva n'ag'emikindo n'ag'endi miti y'amababi kugombekyesa ensiisira, nk'oku kyahandiikirwe." 
Nehemiah8:16 Batyo abantu baagyenda, baareeta ago mataagi, baayeyombekyera ensiisira; buri omwe aha mutwe gw'enju ye, n'omu bibuga byabo, n'omu bibuga bya Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, kandi n'omu kibuga ky'aha Irembo ry'Amaizi, n'omu kibuga ky'aha Irembo rya Efuraimu." 
Nehemiah8:17 Mpaho abaabaire bateeraniire aho boona, ab'omu baazaahuukire nibaruga omu bukwatwa, baayombeka ensiisira, kandi baaziraaramu. Manya okwiha omu biro bya Yoshwa mwene Nuuni, okuhitsya eryo izooba, Abaisiraeli bakaba batakakikoraga batyo; mpaho haabaho okushemererwa kwingi munonga." 
Nehemiah8:18 Kandi buri izooba, okwiha aha ry'okubanza okuhitsya aha ry'aha muheru, Ezera yaaguma naabashomera eby'omu kitabo ky'eiteeka rya Ruhanga. Obwo bugyenyi baabumaramu ebiro mushanju; aha kya munaana haabaho omugyenzo mukuru gw'okumariiriza obugyenyi nk'oku ekiragiro kiri." 
Nehemiah9:1 Mbwenu aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bina eky'okwo kwezi, Abaisiraeli bakeeteerana, baayesiibyakwo bajwaire ebiguniya, beeshukyeire eiju omu mutwe." 
Nehemiah9:2 Kandi abo Baisiraeli baayecwa aha Banyamahanga boona; baayemerera, baayatura ebibi byabo n'ebicumuro bya baishebo." 
Nehemiah9:3 Baayemerera omu mwanya gwabo, baashoma eby'omu kitabo ky'eiteeka bya Mukama Ruhanga waabo okumara eshaha ishatu, kandi ezindi shaaha ishatu baazimara nibaatura ebibi, kandi baaramya Mukama Ruhanga waabo okumara eshaha ishatu, kandi ezindi shaaha ishatu baazimara nibaatura ebibi, kandi baaramya Mukama Ruhanga waabo." 
Nehemiah9:4 Aha matembero g'Abaleevi haayemereraho Yeshwa, Bani, Kaadimieli, Shebaniiya, Buni, Sherebiiya, Bani na Kenaani; baahoogyera Mukama Ruhanga waabo n'eiraka rihango." 
Nehemiah9:5 Bwanyima Abaleevi aba: Yeshwa, Kadimieli, Bani, Hashabuneyiiya, Sherebiiya, Hodiiya, Shebaniiya, na Petahiiya, baagira bati: Nimwemerere, musingize Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, nimugira muti: Okwiha ryari n'okuhitsya ryari, eiziina ryawe ery'ekitiinwa, eririkukira goona okusiimwa n'okusingizibwa, rihimbisibwe!" 
Nehemiah9:6 Reero Ezera yaagira ati: Niiwe Nyakubaho, niiwe wenka owaahangire eiguru, eiguru ery'owa Herebe, n'amahe gaaryo goona; ensi na byona ebigirimu, amayanja na byona ebigarimu. Haza byona niiwe obirinda, n'amahe g'omu iguru niiwe garamya." 
Nehemiah9:7 Niiwe Mukama Ruhanga owaatooraine Aburahamu, okamwiha Uuri ey'Abakaludaaya, okamweta Aburahamu." 
Nehemiah9:8 Kandi okashanga aine omutima gurikukwesiga, okakora nawe endagaano y'okuha abaijukuru ensi y'Abanyakanaani, n'ey'Abahiiti n'ey'Abaamori n'ey'Abayeebusi n'ey'Abagiirigaashi; haza waahikiiriza eki waaraganiise, ahabw'okuba ori ohikiriire." 
Nehemiah9:9 Kandi okareeba okubonabona kwa baatatenkuriitwe omuri Misiri, waahurira okutaka kwabo aha Nyanja erikutukura;" 
Nehemiah9:10 waakora obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza kuhakanisa Faraaho n'abagaragwa be boona, n'abantu b'omu nsi ye boona; ahabw'okuba okamanya ku batwarize kubi baatatenkuriitwe n'eigundu, waayetungira otyo eiziina, nk'oku kiri n'eri izooba." 
Nehemiah9:11 Okacwa kabiri enyanja y'omu maisho gaabo, baaraba ahagati yaayo hoomire; haza abaabaire bababingire waabaroha okuzimu, nk'oku eibaare ritobera omu maizi maingi." 
Nehemiah9:12 Nyomushana okaba obeebembeza enyomyo y'ekicu, kandi nyekiro obeebembeza enyomyo y'omuriro kubamurikira omuhanda gu baraatoore." 
Nehemiah9:13 Okashuuma aha Rushozi Sinai, waagamba nabo nooyema omu iguru, kandi waabaha ebiragiro bihikire, n'amateeka g'amazima, ebyatairweho ebirungi, hamwe n'ebiragiro." 
Nehemiah9:14 Waabamanyisa Sabato yaawe erikwera, kandi waabaha ebiragiro n'ebyatairweho noobirabya omuri Musa omuheereza waawe." 
Nehemiah9:15 Okabaha ekyokurya ekirikuruga omu iguru kubatambira enjara, waabaihira amaizi omu rukiri kubakiza eiriho, kandi waabaragiira kuza kukubuura ensi ei waabaire orahiire kubaha." 
Nehemiah9:16 Kwonka bo na baatatenkuriitwe bakagira amaryo, baagangaaza ebitsya byabo, tibaayorobera biragiro byawe;" 
Nehemiah9:17 baayanga kworoba, tibaijuka by'okutangaaza ebi waabakoreire, kureka baagangaaza ebitsya byabo, baayeteeraho omwebembezi kugaruka omu buhuuku bwabo obw'omuri Misiri. Mbwenu iwe, oba Ruhanga otuura ayeteekateekire kusaasira; ogira embabazi n'esaasi. Iwe otarahuka kuguubwa kubi, kandi oijwire rukundo otahararuka, torabatsigireho." 
Nehemiah9:18 Nangwa nobu baayeheesheire ekimasha, bakagira bati: Ogu ni Ruhanga waanyu owabaihire Misiri, bakarogota munonga," 
Nehemiah9:19 iwe ahabw'embabazi zaawe enyingi, torabatsigireho bari omu ihamba; enyomyo y'ekicu eyaabaire ebeebembera nyomushana kubooreka omuhanda, teragizire bu ebarugaho, nobu yaakuba ey'omuriro eyaabaire ebamurikira nyekiro omuhanda gu baratoore." 
Nehemiah9:20 Okabaha Mutima waawe omurungi kubahabura, tiwaabaima maanu yaawe kugirya, kandi waabaha amaizi g'okubatambira eiriho." 
Nehemiah9:21 Okabatungira omu ihamba okumara emyaka makumi ana bataine ki bakyenire; ebijwaro byabo tibyakura, n'ebigyere byabo tibyatumba." 
Nehemiah9:22 Otyo waabaha ensi z'abagabe n'amahanga, waabibaha kuba emigabo yaabo. Batyo baakubuura ensi y'Omugabe Sihooni owa Heshibooni n'eya Ogi owa Bashani." 
Nehemiah9:23 Okakanyisa baijukuru baabo, baaba nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru; waabahitsya omu nsi ei waagambiire baishebo kugizamu n'okugikubuura." 
Nehemiah9:24 Abo baijukuru baabo baaza omuri egyo nsi, baagikubuura; haza waabagomoorera abatunzi baamwo Abanyakanaani. Waababarekurira hamwe n'abagabe baabo n'amahanga g'omuri egyo nsi, ngu babagire nk'oku barikwenda." 
Nehemiah9:25 Mpaho baakwata endembo zeehinguririziibwe ebigo bigumire, n'ensi ezirikweza munonga; baakubuura amaju agaijwire ebintu byona ebirungi, amaziba gafukwire, emisiri y'emizaabibu n'ey'emioliva n'ey'emiti mingi munonga erikwana ebijuma; baarya baahaaga, baagomoka, baashwemerererwa oburungi bwawe obwingi." 
Nehemiah9:26 Kwonka shi baayanga kukuhurira, baakugomera, eiteeka ryawe baariteera omugongo, baita abarangi baawe abaabaire babateisa ngu bakugarukire, kandi baakurogotaho munonga." 
Nehemiah9:27 Nikyo waabarekuririire abazigu baabo bakababonabonesa; haza omu bunaku bw'okubonabonesibwa kwabo bakakutakira, naiwe okabahurira nooyema omu iguru; kandi ahabw'embabazi zaawe enyingi, okabaha ab'okubajuna, baabaiha omu mikono y'abazigu baabo." 
Nehemiah9:28 Kwonka ku baabaire baatungaho bati obuhuumure, baagaruka baakucumuraho; naiwe waabarekurira abazigu baabo, baabategyeka. Mbwenu ku baakukubuukiire, baakutakira, waabahurira nooyema omu iguru, kandi kaingi waabajuna, nk'oku embabazi zaawe ziri." 
Nehemiah9:29 Okabahana ngu obone kubagarura aha iteeka ryawe; kwonka bo baagira amaryo, tibaayorobera biragiro byawe, kureka baabihenda, haza biri ebihaisa omuntu amagara, yaaba abikuratiire; baatezya amabega, baagangaaza ebitsya, baayanga kuhurira." 
Nehemiah9:30 Okamara emyaka mingi obagumisiriize, waabahanisa Mutima waawe noogambisa abarangi baawe, kwonka shi baayanga kutega okutu. Naiwe nikwo kubarekurira ab'amahanga g'omuri ezo nsi." 
Nehemiah9:31 Mbwenu ahabw'emababazi zaawe enyingi, torabamariireho kimwe, nobu kwakuba okubatsigaho; ahabw'okuba oba Ruhanga ow'embabazi kandi ow'esaasi." 
Nehemiah9:32 Ai Ruhanga waitu, Ruhanga omukuru ow'obushoboorozi kandi orikutiinisa, iwe orinda endagaano kandi ogira rukundo etahararuka, enaku ezi zoona ezaatwitsire n'abagabe baitu n'abategyeki baitu, abahongyerezi baitu, abarangi baitu baatatenkuriitwe n'abantu baawe boona, okwiha omu busingye bw'abagabe ba Asiriya n'okuhitsya eri izooba, zitakushusira akantu kakye." 
Nehemiah9:33 Manya omuri ebyo byona ebyatugweraire, okaguma ori ow'amazima, waakora eby'obwesigwa, haza itwe twakora bibi." 
Nehemiah9:34 Abagabe baitu n'abategyeki baitu, abahongyerezi baitu na baatatenkuriitwe, tibarakuratiire iteeka ryawe, nari okweta aha bi waabaragiire, nainga ebi waabateisize." 
Nehemiah9:35 Tibarakuheerereize mu bugabe bwabo n'omu birungi byawe bingi ebi waabahaire, n'omuri egyo nsi mpango kandi ey'obutungi ei waaboorekire; baayanga kweteisa ebikoro byabo ebibi." 
Nehemiah9:36 Mbwenu reeba, eri izooba turi abahuuku omuri egi nsi ei waahaire baatatenkuriitwe kunanurwa ebijuma byayo n'ebiconco byayo ebirungi; reeba, turi abahuuku." 
Nehemiah9:37 Emyeru yaayo neetoijerwa abagabe abu waataireho kututegyeka nootutura ebibi byaitu; kandi baine obushoboorozi aha mibiri yaitu n'aha matungo gaitu, nk'oku barikwenda; n'ahabw'ekyo twine obujune bwingi." 
Nehemiah9:38 Ahabw'ebyo byona nikyo turikukorera endagaano ehamire, tukagihandiika, abategyeki baitu n'Abaleevi baitu n'Abahongyerezi bakagitaho akamanyiso kaabo." 
Nehemiah10:1 Aba nibo baataireho akamanyiso kaabo: Nehemiya omutegyeki omukuru mwene Hakaliiya, Zedekiya," 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraaya, Azariya, Yeremiya," 
Nehemiah10:3 Pashuhuri, Amariiya, Malikiya," 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatushi, Shebaniiya, Muluki," 
Nehemiah10:5 Harimu, Meeremooti, Obadiya," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniyeli, Giinetoni, Baruuku," 
Nehemiah10:7 Meshulaamu Abiiya, Miiyamiini," 
Nehemiah10:8 Maaziya, Biiligai, Shemayiiya; haza abo n'abahongyerezi." 
Nehemiah10:9 Reero Abaleevi, ni Yeshwa mwene Azariya, Binu ow'omuri beene Heenadaani, Kadimieli," 
Nehemiah10:10 na beene waabo aba: Shebaniiya, Hodiiya, Kelita, Pelayiiya, Hanani," 
Nehemiah10:11 Miika, Rehobu, Hashabiya," 
Nehemiah10:12 Zaakuri, Sherebiiya Shebaniiya," 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodiiya, Bani, Beniinu;" 
Nehemiah10:14 Abakuru omu ihanga, ni Paroshi, Paahatimoabu, Elamu, Zaatu, Bani," 
Nehemiah10:15 Buuni, Azigaadi, Beebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 Adoniya, Biigivai, Adini." 
Nehemiah10:17 Ateri, Hezekiya, Azuuri," 
Nehemiah10:18 Hodiiya, Hashu, mu Beezai," 
Nehemiah10:19 Harifu, Anatooti, Neebai," 
Nehemiah10:20 Maagipiya, Meeshulaamu, Heziri," 
Nehemiah10:21 Mesheezabeli, Zadoki, Yaadua," 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelatiiya, Hanani, Anayiiya," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hoshea, Hananiya, Hashubu," 
Nehemiah10:24 Haloohesha, Piihiha, Shobeki," 
Nehemiah10:25 Rehumu, Hashaabuna, Maaseiya," 
Nehemiah10:26 Ahiiya, Hanani, Anani," 
Nehemiah10:27 Maluki, Harimu na Baanahi." 
Nehemiah10:28 Abandi bantu boona, nibo abahongyerezi, Abaleevi, abakumiirizi, abeeshongozi, abaheereza b'omuri Nyaruju, na boona abaayetaaniise n'ab'amahanga g'omuri ezo nsi, kukuratira eiteeka rya Ruhanga, hamwe n'abakazi baabo na batabani baabo na bahara baabo na boona abaabaire baine obwengye n'okwetegyereza," 
Nehemiah10:29 bakakwatanisa na beene waabo n'abakungu baabo, baayemera omukyeeno nibarahira kukuratira eiteeka rya Ruhanga eri Musa omugaragwa we yaabahaire, kandi n'okworobera n'okukora byona ebiri omu biragiro bya Mukama Ruhanga waitu, ebi yaaragiire n'ebi yaataireho, bati:" 
Nehemiah10:30 Titurihingira bahara baitu ab'amahanga g'omuri egi nsi, n'obu kwakuba okushwererera batabani baitu bahara baabo." 
Nehemiah10:31 Ab'amahanga g'omuri egyo nsi ku barireeta ebintu nari ebyokurya byomire kubiguza aha kiro kya Sabato, tituribibaguraho ahari Sabato nari aha kindi kiro ekirikwera. Buri mwaka gwa mushanju turyaraaza emisiri, kandi turekye kwihuza omuntu weena eibanja." 
Nehemiah10:32 Twayeteeraho ekiragiro ky'okuguma nituha kimwe kya kashatu ky'eshilingi, buri mwaka ahabw'omurimo gw'omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga waitu;" 
Nehemiah10:33 ogw'emigaati y'okumurikwa ogw'esaano y'okuguma neetoijwa, ogw'ekitambo ky'okucwetsya eky'obutoosha, ogwa Zaasabato, ogw'okuboneka kw'ameezi, ogw'amagyenyi agaatairweho, ogw'ebintu ebirikwera n'ogw'empongano z'ebibi ez'okukarabira Isiraeli, n'ogw'emirimo yoona ekorerwa omu nju ya Ruhanga waitu." 
Nehemiah10:34 Hoona twateera enteenyu z'okumanya oku abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi n'abandi bantu baraagume nibareeta enku z'okutoija omu nju ya Ruhanga waitu, buri mwaka, omu bunaku obwatairweho, nk'oku emiryango ya baatatenkuriitrwe eri, kuguma nibazihembera aha itambiro rya Mukama Ruhanga waitu nk'oku kihandiikirwe omu iteeka." 
Nehemiah10:35 Twayeteeraho n'ekiragiro ky'okuguma nitureeta emiganuro y'ebi tutogyeire omu misiri yaitu, n'emiganuro y'ebijuma byona ebya ibara muti, buri mwaka omu nju ya Nyakubaho;" 
Nehemiah10:36 kandi n'okureeta omu nju ya Ruhanga waitu, emijigaijo ya batabani baitu, n'ey'amatungo gaitu, nk'oku kihandiikirwe omu iteeka, kandi n'emijigaijo y'amasyo gaitu g'ente n'ag'entaama, tukabireetera abahongyerezi, abaheereza omu nju ya Ruhanga waitu;" 
Nehemiah10:37 kandi n'okureeta emiganuro y'ebiihuro by'ebyokurya byaitu, n'ebindi ebi turikuhayo twekundiire, taho ebijuma bya ibara muti, viino, amajuta, kubireetera abahongyerezi, bikaza omu mabiikiro ga Nyaruju ya Ruhanga waitu; n'okureetera Abaleevi emitoijo ya kimwe kya ikumi ky'emisiri yaitu, ahabw'okuba Abaleevi nibo baiha aha bantu egyo mitoijo omu birorero byaitu byona." 
Nehemiah10:38 Haza omuhongyerezi mwene Arooni agume hamwe n'abo Baleevi, baaba nibaakiira emitoijo. Reero Abaleevi bareete omu nju ya Ruhanga waitu kimwe kya ikumi ky'emitoijo ei baatunga, babite omu bishengye by'enju y'eibiikiro." 
Nehemiah10:39 Ahabw'okuba Abaisiraeli na beene Leevi baryaguma bareete emitoijo y'ebyokurya by'enjuma, viino n'amajuta, omu bishengye ebirimu ebintu by'Omwanya Ogurikwera, bibe eby'abahongyerezi abarikuheerezamu, n'abakumiirizi n'abeeshongozi, titurigira bu tuteetaire ahari Nyaruju ya Ruhanga waitu." 
Nehemiah11:1 Omu biro ebyo abeebembezi b'abantu omu ihanga bakaguma batwire Yerusalemu. Reero abandi bantu baateera enteenyu z'oku baraihe omuntu omwe omwe ahari buri ikumi, okutuura omuri Yerusalemu, orurembo orurikwera; abandi mwenda ahari buri ikumi baatsigara omu zindi ndembo." 
Nehemiah11:2 Kandi eihanga ryasiima abantu boona abaayehaireyo kutuura omuri Yerusalemu. 
Nehemiah11:3 Mbwenu aba nibo bakuru by'ebyanga abaatwire omuri Yerusalemu; kwonka omu ndembo ez'omuri Buyudaaya, abandi Baisiraeli n'abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi n'abaheereza b'omuri Nyaruju, na baijukuru b'abagaragwa ba Solomooni, bakatuura omu bibanja byabo eby'omu ndembo zaabo." 
Nehemiah11:4 Reero omuri Yerusalemu haatuuramu bamwe omuri beene Yuda n'omuri beene Benyamiini. Omuri beene Yuda, ni Aatayiiya mwene Uziya, mwijukuru wa Zekariya, Zekariya ya Amariya, Amariya ya Shefatiya, Shefatiya ya Mehaalaleeli, ow'omuri beene Pereezi," 
Nehemiah11:5 na Maaseiya mwene Baruuki mwijukuru wa Kolihooze, mwene Hazayiiya, Hazayiiya ya Adayiiya, Adayiiya ya Yoyaribu, Yoyaribu ya Zekariya ow'ab'omuryango gwa Shela." 
Nehemiah11:6 Beene Pereezi boona abaatwire omuri Yerusalemu, bakaba bari magana ana na makumi munaana, abashaija enkwata ngabo." 
Nehemiah11:7 Kandi aba nibo beene Benyamiini: Saalu mwene Meshulaamu, mwijukuru wa Yoedi, Yoedi ya Pedayiiya, Pendayiiya ya Kolayiiya, Kolayiiya ya Maaseiya, Maaseiya ya Itieli, Itieli ya Yeshayiiya." 
Nehemiah11:8 Reero ogwo yaakuratwa Gaabai, na Saalai; boona hamwe abashaija magana mwenda na makumi abiri na munaana." 
Nehemiah11:9 Yoeli mwene Zikiri niwe yaabaire naabareeberera, kandi Yuda mwene Haseemuha ari owa kabiri omu barikutegyeka orurembo." 
Nehemiah11:10 Omu bahongyerezi ni Yedaaya mwene Yoyaribu, Yakini," 
Nehemiah11:11 Seraaya mwene Hilikiya, Hilikiya ya Meshuula, Meshulaamu ya Zadoki, Zadoki ya Merayooti, Merayooti ya Ahiitubu, omutegyeki wa Nyaruju ya Ruhanga," 
Nehemiah11:12 na beene waabo, abaabaire nibakora omurimo omuri egyo nju; boona hamwe magana munaana na makumi abiri na babiri; taho Adayiiya mwene Yerohaamu, Yerohaamu ya Pelaliiya, Pelaliiya ya Amuzi, Amuzi ya Zekariya, Zekariya ya Pashuri, Pashiru ya Malikiya;" 
Nehemiah11:13 na beene ishe, bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, magana abiri na makumi ana na babiri; na Amashisai mwene Azareeli, mwijukuru wa Ahazai, Ahazai ya Meshilemooti," 
Nehemiah11:14 mwene Imeri na beene waabo abashaija igana na makumi abiri na munaana, enkwata ngabo. Omureeberezi waabo akaba ari Zaabudieli mwene Haagedoolimu." 
Nehemiah11:15 Kandi omu Baleevi, ni Shemayiiya mwene Hashubu, mwijukuru wa Azirikaamu, mutabani wa Hashabiya, Hashabiya ya Buni;" 
Nehemiah11:16 taho Shaabetai na Yozabadi ab'omu bakuru b'Abaleevi, abaabaire nibareeberera omurimo gw'aheeru ogwa Nyaruju ya Ruhanga;" 
Nehemiah11:17 na Mataniiya mwene Miika, mwijukuru wa Zabudi, mutabani wa Asafu, owaabaire ari omweshongozi orikwebembera abandi omu kushaba kw'okusiima, na Bakubukiiya owa kabiri omuri beene ishe, na Abuda mwene Shaamua, mwijukuru wa Galali, mutabani wa Yedutuuni." 
Nehemiah11:18 Abaleevi boona ab'omu rurembo orurikwera bakaba bari magana abiri na makumi munaana na bana. 
Nehemiah11:19 Abakumiirizi, ni Akubu, Talumooni na beene waabo, abaabaire barinda amarembo; bakaba bari igana na makumi mushanju na babiri." 
Nehemiah11:20 Reero Abaisiraeli abaatsigaireho, n'abandi bahongyerezi n'Abaleevi, bakaguma bari omu ndembo zoona ez'omuri Buyudaaya, buri omwe omu kibanja kye eki yaahungwire." 
Nehemiah11:21 Kwonka abaheereza b'omuri Nyaruju bakaba batwire Ofeli, nibareebererwa Ziha na Gishipa." 
Nehemiah11:22 Omureeberezi w'Abaleevi b'omuri Yerusalemu akaba ari Uuzi mwene Bani mwijukuru wa Hashabiya, Hashabiiya ya Mataniiya, Mataniiya ya Miika, ow'omuri beene Asafu, abeeshongozi abaabaire nibareeberera ebirikukorwa omu nju ya Ruhanga." 
Nehemiah11:23 Manya omugabe akaba aine ebi aragiire, ebikwatiraine nabo; omuribyo harimu ekirikuragiira abo beeshongozi kubaho buri izooba." 
Nehemiah11:24 Kandi Petahiiya mwene Mesheezabeli, ow'omuri beene Zeera mutabani wa Yuda, niwe yaabaire akwatsa omugabe omuri byona ebikwatiraine n'abo bantu." 
Nehemiah11:25 Reero aha bikwatiraine n'ebyaro n'enshambu zaabyo, Abayudaaya abamwe bakaba batwire Kiiryataariba n'omu byaro byayo, na Diboni n'omu byaro byayo, na Yekabuzeeli n'omu byaro byayo," 
Nehemiah11:26 n'omuri Yeshwa, n'omuri Molaada na Betipeleti;" 
Nehemiah11:27 omuri Haazarishuali, omuri Beerisheba n'omu byaro byayo;" 
Nehemiah11:28 omuri Ziikulaagi, omuri Mekoona n'omu byaro byayo;" 
Nehemiah11:29 omuri Eniriimoni, omuri Zoora omuri Yarimuuti," 
Nehemiah11:30 Zaanooha, Aduulaamu n'omu byaro byazo, Laakishi n'enshambu zaayo, na Azeeka n'ebyaro byayo. Batyo baasiisira okwiha Beerisheba, okuta omu ruhanga rwa Hiinoni." 
Nehemiah11:31 Aba Benyamiini nabo baatuura okwiha Geba n'okweyongyerayo omuri Miikimaasi, Ayiiya, Beteli n'ebyaro byayo;" 
Nehemiah11:32 Anatooti, Nobu, Ananiya," 
Nehemiah11:33 Hazori, Raama, Giitaimu," 
Nehemiah11:34 Hadidi, Zeboimu, Nabaalati," 
Nehemiah11:35 Loodi na Ono n'omu ruhanga rw'abanyamyoga. 
Nehemiah11:36 Reero ebicweka eby'Abaleevi ebimwe byatuura omu kyanga ky'Abaayuda n'eky'Ababenyamiini. 
Nehemiah12:1 Aba nibo bahongyerezi n'Abaleevi abaizire na Zerubabeeli mwene Shealitieli, na Yeshwa; Seraaya, Yeremiya, Ezera," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amariiya, Maaluki, Hatuushi," 
Nehemiah12:3 Shekaniiya, Rehumu, Meeremooti," 
Nehemiah12:4 Ida, Giinetoi, Abiiya," 
Nehemiah12:5 Miiyamiini, Maadiiya, Biligahi," 
Nehemiah12:6 Shemayiiya, Yoyaribu, Yedaaya," 
Nehemiah12:7 Saalu, Amoki, Hilikiiya na Yedaaya. Abo bakaba bari abakuru b'abahongyerezi n'aba beene waabo omu biro bya Yeshwa." 
Nehemiah12:8 Kandi Abaleevi ni Yeshwa, Binui, Kadimieli, Sherebiiya, Yuda na Mataniiya, owaabaire hamwe na beene ishe naareeberera ebyeshongoro by'okusiima." 
Nehemiah12:9 Taho Bakubukiiya na Uuno beene waabo, abaabaire beemerera nibareebana nabo omu kushaba." 
Nehemiah12:10 Kandi Yeshwa ogwo akaba ari ishe wa Yoyakimu, Yoyakimu yaazaara Eliyashibu, Eliyashibu yaazaara Yoyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 Yoyada yaazaara Yonatani, kandi Yonatani yaazaara Yaaduka." 
Nehemiah12:12 Kandi omu biro bya Yoyakimu, aba nibo bahongyerezi, abaabaire bari bakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo: Ow'omuryango gwa Seraaya akaba ari Merayiiya, ow'ogwa Yeremiya ari Hananiya;" 
Nehemiah12:13 ow'ogwa Ezera, Meshulaamu; ow'ogwa Amariya, Yehohaanani;" 
Nehemiah12:14 ow'ogwa Maaluki, Yonatani; ow'ogwa Shebaniiya, Yosefu;" 
Nehemiah12:15 ow'ogwa Harimu, Adina; ow'ogwa Merayooti, Helikai;" 
Nehemiah12:16 ow'ogwa Ido, Zekariya; ow'ogwa Giinetoni, Meshulaamu," 
Nehemiah12:17 ow'ogwa Abiiya, Zikiri; ow'ogwa Miniyamiini, ow'omu gwa Moadiiya ni Pilitai;" 
Nehemiah12:18 ow'ogwa Biligahi, Shaamua; ow'ogwa Shemayiiya, Yohonatani;" 
Nehemiah12:19 ow'ogwa Yoyaribu, Mateenai; ow'ogwa Yedaaya Uuzi;" 
Nehemiah12:20 ow'ogwa Saalai, Kaalai; ow'ogwa Amoki, Eberi." 
Nehemiah12:21 Reero ow'ogwa Hilikiya ni Hashabiya; n'ow'ogwa Yedaaya ni Netaneeli. 
Nehemiah12:22 Mbwenu Abaleevi, omu biro bya Eliyashibu, Yoyada, Yohaanani, na Yaadua, bakahandiikwa omu kitabo ky'abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, n'abahongyerezi baahandiikwa batyo, okuhitsya omu busingye bwa Dariyo Omuperisiya." 
Nehemiah12:23 Beene Leevi, abakuru b'emiryango ya baishenkurubo, bakaba bahandiikwa omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'Abagabe, okuhitsya omu biro bya Yohaanani mwene Eliyashibu." 
Nehemiah12:24 Kandi abakuru omu Baleevi bakaba bari aba: Hashabiiya, Sherebiiya na Yeshwa mwene Kaadimieli, hamwe na beene waabo, abaabaire beemerera nibareebana nabo kweshongora eby'okuhimbisa n'eby'okusiima, nibaihaihana, nk'oku ekiragiro kwa Daudi omuntu wa Ruhanga kyabaire kiri." 
Nehemiah12:25 Reero Mataniiya, Bakubukiiya, Obadiya, Meshulaamu, Talumooni na Akubu bakaba bari abakumiirizi abaabaire beemerera aha mabiikiro g'aha marembo kurinda." 
Nehemiah12:26 Abo bakaba bariho omu biro bya Yoyakimu mwene Yeshwa mutabani wa Yoozadaki, n'omu biro bya Nehemiya omutegyeki omukuru, n'omu bya Ezera omuhongyerezi kandi omuhangu w'eiteeka." 
Nehemiah12:27 Ku baabaire bari haihi kweza orugo rwa Yerusalemu, baasherura Abaleevi ahi bari hoona kubareeta Yerusalemu, kutaasya obugyenyi bw'okweza orwo rugo bashemereirwe, nibeeshongora eby'okusiima Ruhanga, nibateera enshandaazo n'enanga n'amagobore." 
Nehemiah12:28 Reero batabani b'abeeshongozi baateeranira hamwe nibaruga omu myanya eyehinguririize Yerusalemu n'omu byaro by'Abanetofaati," 
Nehemiah12:29 na Betigiligali n'omu kyanga kya Geba na Azamaveeti; ahabw'okuba abo beeshongozi bakaba beeyombekyeire ebirorero okwehinguririza Yerusalemu. 
Nehemiah12:30 Mpaho abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi baayeyeza, kandi baayeza abantu n'amarembo n'orugo." 
Nehemiah12:31 Bwanyima naabatembya, naareeta abategyeki b'omu Baayuda aha mutwe gw'orugo, naababaganisamu ebimbuuro bibiri, ebyagyenzire nibisiima Ruhanga biteire emishorongo. Ekimwe ky'aha ogwa buryo kitembire orwo rugo, kuza kuhika aha Mugyende." 
Nehemiah12:32 Abo baakuratwa Hoshaaya na kimwe kya kabiri ky'abatgegyeki b'omu Baayuda 
Nehemiah12:33 na Azariya, Ezera, Meshulaamu," 
Nehemiah12:34 Yuda, Benyamiini, Shemayiiya na Yeremiya." 
Nehemiah12:35 Kandi bamwe omu batabani b'abahongyerezi, abaagyenzire nibateera amakondere, nibo aba: Zekariya mwene Yonatani, mwijukuru wa Shemayiiya, Shemayiiya mwene Mataniiya, Mataniiya ya Mikayiiya, Mikayiiya ya Zakuri, Zakuri ya Asafu" 
Nehemiah12:36 na beene waabo, Shemayiiya, Azareeli, Miilalai, Giilalai, Maai, Netaaneli, Yuda na Hanaani, baine eby'okweshongoza ebya Daudi omuntu wa Ruhanga; kandi Ezera omuhangu w'eiteeka abeebembeire." 
Nehemiah12:37 Ku baahikire aha Irembo ry'Enshuro, bainamuka bagyemire omu maisho gaabo, baatembera aha matembero agarikuza omu rurembo rwa Daudi, ah'orugo rwabaire nirwinamukira aharuguru y'enju ya Daudi, baahika aha Irembo ry'Amaizi embari y'oburugwa-izooba." 
Nehemiah12:38 Ekindi kimbuuro ky'abaasiimire kikatoora ogwa bumosho, naanye naabakurata na kimwe kya kabiri ky'abakuru omuri abo bantu, turi aha mutwe gw'orugo, eruguru y'Omunaara gw'ebikoomi, twahika aha rugo Oruhango." 
Nehemiah12:39 Twaraba eruguru y'Eirembo rya Efuraimu n'aha Irembo Erikuru n'aha ry'Ebyenyanja n'aha Munaara gwa Hananeeli n'aha gw'Eigana, tutyo twahika aha Irembo ry'Entaama; bwanyima baayemerera aha Irembo ry'Abarinzi." 
Nehemiah12:40 Ebyo bimbuuro byombi eby'abaasiimire byayemerera omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, naanye hamwe n'abatware abu naabaire nyine;" 
Nehemiah12:41 kandi n'abahongyerezi Eliakimu, Maaseiya, Miniyamiini, Mikayiiya, Elioenai, Zekariya na Hanaiya, baine amakondere;" 
Nehemiah12:42 kandi na Maaseiya, Shemayiiya, Eleazaari, Uuzi, Yehohaanani, Malikia, Elamu na Ezeri. Reero abeeshongozi baayeshongora, na Yezirahiiya naabeebembera." 
Nehemiah12:43 Eryo izooba baatamba ebitambo bingi, kandi baashemererwa, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga akabaha okushemererwa kwingi munonga. Abakazi n'abaana nabo baashemererwa. Akaari k'okushemererwa kw'ab'omuri Yerusalemu kaahuririrwa hare." 
Nehemiah12:44 Eryo izooba bakataho abantu b'okureeberera ebishengye by'amabiikiro ebi abantu barikuhayo emiganuro na kimwe kya ikumi kubirundaaniramu, n'emigabo eyaabaire eri omu iteeka neeragiirwa kuba ey'abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi, nk'emisiri y'omu ndembo zaabo oku yaabaire eri. Manya Abayuda bakashemerererwa munonga abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi abaabaire nibaheereza," 
Nehemiah12:45 ahabw'okuba bakeebembera omugyenzo gw'okushaba Ruhanga waabo n'ogw'okweza, nk'oku abeeshongozi n'abakumiirizi baagizire, nibakuratira ekiragiro kya Daudi na Solomooni omutabani." 
Nehemiah12:46 Ahabw'okuba okwiha ira omu busingye bwa Daudi na Asafu, hakaba habaho omukuru w'abeeshongozi, kandi habaho ebyeshongoro by'okuhimbisa n'okusiima Ruhanga." 
Nehemiah12:47 Kandi Abaisiraeli boona omu biro bya Zerubabeeli n'ebya Nehemiya, buri izooba bakaba baha ebicwero ahabw'abeeshongozi n'abakumiirizi, kandi baihaho eby'omugabo gw'Abaleevi; Abaleevi nabo baihaho eby'okubiikira beene Arooni." 
Nehemiah13:1 Eryo izooba bakashomera abantu eby'omu kitabo kya Musa, baashanga hahandiikirwemu ekirikugira kiti: Tihariho Omuamoni nari Omumoabu oriikirizibwa kuza ahu abantu ba Ruhanga bateeraniire." 
Nehemiah13:2 Ahabw'okuba tibarabuganiise Baisiraeli byokurya na maizi, kureka bakaguriirira Balaamu kubakyeena kwonka Ruhanga waitu, ogwo mukyeeno yaaguhindura omugisha." 
Nehemiah13:3 Abantu ku baahuriire eryo iteeka, baiha omu Baisiraeli ebizaarwa byona ebirikukomooka omu banyamahanga." 
Nehemiah13:4 Mbwenu ebyo bitakabaireho, Eliyashibu omuhongyerezi owaatairweho kureeberera ebishengye by'omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga waitu ahabw'okugira obuzaare na Toobiya," 
Nehemiah13:5 akamuteguurira ekishengye kihango, eki ira baabaire batamu emitoijo y'ebyokurya by'esaano, obubaani, ebirikukoresibwa omuri Nyaruju, kimwe kya ikumi ky'eby'okurya by'omujuma, viino n'amajuta, ebyabaire biragiirwe kuheebwa Abaleevi n'abeeshongozi n'abakumiirizi, hamwe n'ebyabaire bitoijwa kuheebwa abahongyerezi." 
Nehemiah13:6 Haza obu ebyo byakorwa, nyowe nkaba ntari omuri Yerusalemu, ahabw'okuba omu mwaka gw'ashatu n'ebiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Arutazaakiseesi omugabe wa Babulooni, nkaba ngiire ow'ogwo mugabe. Reero ku haahingwireho ebiro, naashaba omugabe kuunyikiriza kugyenda." 
Nehemiah13:7 Ntyo ngaruka Yerusalemu. Bwanyima mmanya ekibi ki Eliyashibu yaakozire, ahabw'okuteguurira Toobiya ekishengye omu bikaari by'enju ya Ruhanga." 
Nehemiah13:8 Naanye ekyo kingwisa kubi munonga, mpuruutura ebintu bya Toobiya byona omuri ekyo kishengye, mbinaga aheeru." 
Nehemiah13:9 Reero ndagiira, beeza ebyo bishengye, mbona kubigaruramu ebintu ebyabaire nibikoresibwa omu nju ya Ruhanga, hamwe n'emitoijo y'esaano n'obubaani." 
Nehemiah13:10 Kandi nkeetegyereza ku Abaleevi batarahairwe migabo yaabo. Ekyo kyareetera Abaleevi n'abeeshongozi, abaabaire nibakora ogwo murimo, kuhunga buri omwe akagaruka omu kibanja kye." 
Nehemiah13:11 Njuukirira abatware nti: Ahabw'enki Nyaruju ya Ruhanga etsigirweho? Mpaho ntaaruura abo bantu, mbagarura omu myanya yaabo." 
Nehemiah13:12 Bwanyima Abaayuda boona bakareeta omu mabiikiro kimwe kya ikumi ky'ebyokurya by'omujuma, na viino n'amajuta." 
Nehemiah13:13 Naanye naataho aba kuba ababiiki b'okureeberera ago mabiikiro: Shelamiya omuhongyerezi na Zadoki omuhangu w'eiteeka, na Pedayiiya ow'omu Baleevi, nibahwerwa Hanani Zaakuri, mwijukuru wa Mataniiya; ahabw'okuba bakaba nibamanywa ku bari abeesigwa, kandi omurimo gwabo gukaba guri ogw'okuha beene waabo egabo yaabo." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ai Ruhanga wangye, onyijukye ahabw'ekyo, kandi oteebwa ebirungi bi naakozire ahabwa Nyaruju ya Ruhanga wangye, n'ahabw'emirimo yaamwo ey'okumuheereza." 
Nehemiah13:15 Omu biro ebyo, nkareeba abantu omu nsi ya Yuda nibanyuuka viino ahari Sabato, kandi nibareeta ebiba by'ebyokurya by'omujuma nibabyekoreza endogoya. Kandi hoona bakaba nibareeta omuri Yerusalemu aha izooba rya Sabato, viino, ebijuma by'emizaabibu n'eby'emitiini, n'emitwaro y'emiringo yoona. Naanye nikwo kubateisa aha izooba ri baabaire nibatundiraho ebyokurya." 
Nehemiah13:16 Kandi n'abantu ba Tuuro, abaabaire batwire omu rurembo, bakaba bareetamu ebyenyanja n'ebindi bintu by'okuguza, babiguza abantu b'omu nsi ya Yuda n'ab'omuri Yerusalemu ahari Sabato." 
Nehemiah13:17 Ntyo njuukirira abakungu b'omu nsi ya Yuda, mbagira nti: Ahabw'enki nimukora ekibi kirikushusha kiti, kushiisha ekiro kya Sabato?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Ekyo tikyo baashwenkuriimwe baakozire, na Ruhanga waitu akatureetaho aka kabi koona akakareeta n'ahari oru rurembo? Mbwenu reeba, ahabw'okushiisha Sabato mwaza kureeta ahari Isiraeli ekiniga ekirikukiraho." 
Nehemiah13:19 Ku bwabaire nibutandika kwira, ndi aha marembo ga Yerusalemu, Sabato eri haihi kuhika, naaragiira ku bakinga enyigi, haza naagira nti: Zitaigurwa okuhitsya obu Sabato eraahwe. Kandi naataho bamwe aha baheereza bangye kurinda ago marembo, ngu hatakaagira owaataasyamu omutwaro aha izooba rya Sabato." 
Nehemiah13:20 Ekyo kyareetera abashuubuzi n'abarikutunda ebintu by'emiringo yoona kuraara aheeru ya Yerusalemu, rimwe nari kabiri." 
Nehemiah13:21 Naanye naabateisa nimbagira nti: Ahabw'enki nimuraara enyima y'orugo? Ku muraakigarukire, nimbakwata. Okwiha obwo tibaagira bu baizire ahari Sabato." 
Nehemiah13:22 Mpaho naaragiira Abaleevi kweyeza, bakaija, bakarinda amarembo; Sabato ekaguma eri erikwera. Ai Ruhanga wangye, ekyo nakyo okiinyijukire kandi onsaasire, nk'embabazi zaawe nyingi oku ziri." 
Nehemiah13:23 Kandi omu biro ebyo, nkareeba Abayudaaya abaabaire bashweire abakazi omu Baashidoodi n'omu Baamoni n'omu Bamoabu." 
Nehemiah13:24 Kimwe kya kabiri ky'abaana baabo bakaba nibagamba Oruashidoodi, nibaremwa kugamba Oruyudaaya, kureka nibagamba orurimi rumwe aha z'ago mahanga." 
Nehemiah13:25 Ntyo mbatonganisa, mbakyeena, na bamwe omuribo mbateera, mbamaanyura eishokye. Mbarahiza Ruhanga; bagira bati: Titurihingira bahara baitu batabani baabo, nobu kwakuba okushwererera batabani baitu bahara baabo, nari itwe okubeeshwererera." 
Nehemiah13:26 Mbagira nti: Timurikumanya ku Solomooni omugabe wa Isiraeli, abakazi nk'abo baamureeteire kukora ekibi? Omu mahanga goona hakaba hatariho mugabe ori nkawe, kandi akaba naakundwa Ruhanga we. Ruhanga ogwo yaamuhindura omugabe wa Isiraeli yoona. Kwonka shi, abakazi abanyamahanga baarugaho baamukoresa ekibi." 
Nehemiah13:27 Mbwenu twikirize ebyanyu, tukore ekibi kihango ekirikwingana kityo, tureebye Ruhanga waitu, tushwere abanyamahangakazi?" 
Nehemiah13:28 Haza obwo, omwe ahari batabani ba Yehoyaada, mwene Eliyashibu omuhongyerezi omukuru, akaba ari mukwe wa Sanibalati Omuhooroni. Ntyo mmubinga omu maisho gangye." 
Nehemiah13:29 Ai Ruhanga wangye, guma obaijukye ahabw'okuba bahagaize obuhongyerezi, n'endagaano y'abahongyerezi n'ey'Abaleevi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Nikwo naabeerize ntyo, nkabamaramu kyona ekyetwa eky'abanyamahanga, nkagaruraho emirimo y'abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi, buri omwe omu murimo gwe;" 
Nehemiah13:31 nkataho ebiragiro by'okureeta enku omu bunaku bwazo obwatairweho, kandi n'eby'emiganuro. Ai Ruhanga wangye, guma onyijukye, onzimuurire ebirungi." 
Esther1:1 Omu busingye bwa Ahaswero, obugabe bwe bukaba nibwiha Buhindi buhitsya Etiopiya, burimu amashaza igana na makumi abiri na mushanju." 
Esther1:2 Omu biro ebyo, omugabe Ahaswero ekitebe kye ky'obugabe kikaba kiri omu rurembo rukuru Susa." 
Esther1:3 Omu mwaka gwe gwa kashatu ari aha ngoma, akateeka obugyenyi; yaabwetaho abanyiginya be boona, n'abagaragwa n'abakuru b'amahe ga Perisiya na Mediya n'abakungu n'abategyeki bakuru b'ago mashaza, baateeranira omu maisho ge;" 
Esther1:4 obwo naabooreka obutungi bw'obugabe bwe n'oburungi n'ekitiinwa eky'obukuru bwe obutakareebwaga, okumara ebiro igana na makumi munaana." 
Esther1:5 Ebyo biro ku byahwaire, omugabe yaateeka obundi bugyenyi, abuteekyeire abantu be boona ab'omuri Susa, orurembo orukuru, ab'ekitiinwa n'abatakiine; bwamara ebiro mushanju omu kacwamba k'omu kikaari kye." 
Esther1:6 Ahi baaburiiriire hakaba hahunzirwe emikingo y'emyenda erikwera n'eya bururu, ehanikirwe kandi ereegyesiibwe obugoye burungi bwa kitaani n'obwa bujwa, obukomesiibwe empeta z'efeeza ez'aha nyomyo z'amabaare ga buusiino. Haza bataire ebitanda by'ezaabu n'efeeza aha mwariro oguhunzirwe amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi agatarikushushana." 
Esther1:7 Reero ebyokunywa byaterekyerwa omu bikopo by'ezaabu eby'emiringo mingi. Kandi omugabe yaabatereka viino nyingi, nk'oku obufura bwe buri." 
Esther1:8 N'okunywa kwatwazibwa nk'oku ekiragiro kiri, hatariho muntu kugyemwa, ahabw'okuba omugabe akaba ahabwire abatware b'omu kikaari kye kukunira buri mugyenyi nk'oku arikwenda." 
Esther1:9 Omwigarire Vashiti nawe yaateekyera abakazi obugyenyi omu kikaari ky'Omugabe Ahaswero. 
Esther1:10 Aha izooba rya mushanju, omugabe Ahaswero ku yaagizire ebyera, yaaragiira Mehumaani, Bizita, Haruboona, Bigita na Abagita, Zetari na Karikasi, abashaahu mushanju abarikumugaragira," 
Esther1:11 kumureetera Omwigarire Vashiti ajwaire ekirunga ky'obugabekazi, ngu abone kworeka abantu n'abategyeki oburungi bwe; ahabw'okuba akaba ari murungi munonga." 
Esther1:12 Kwonka Omwigarire Vashiti yaayanga kwija, omugabe yaaherize kumutumaho abashaahu. Ekyo kyagwisa kubi omugabe, ekiniga kyayenda kumucwa amaraka." 
Esther1:13 Atyo abuuza abanyabwengye abarikumanya oku bitwazibwa, ahabw'okuba gukaba guri omucwe gwe kwebuuza aha barikumanya munonga eby'amateeka n'eby'okucwa emanja." 
Esther1:14 Obwo abarikumukurata omu kitiinwa bari Karishena na Shetari na Adimata, Tarushiishi, Meresi, Marisena na Memukaani, abategyeki mushanju ba Perisiya na Mediya abaabaire bari empika-mugabe, nibashutama omu myanya y'okubanza omu bugabe." 
Esther1:15 Mpaho ababuuza ati: Omu iteeka, Omwigarire Vashiti akaagirwa ata ahabw'okutakora eki nyowe omugabe Ahaswero naamuragiira nimmutumaho abashaahu?" 
Esther1:16 Memukaani nikwo kugambira omu maisho g'omugabe n'abategyeki, ati: Omwigarire Vashiti tiyacumura ha mugabe wenka; yaashobya n'aha bategyeki boona, n'aha b'amahanga goona, abatwire omu mashaza gaawe, Nyakusinga, Ahaswero." 
Esther1:17 Manya eki ogwo mwigarire yaakora, nikiija kumanywa abakazi boona, kibareetere kugaya baibabo, nibagira bati; Omugabe Ahaswero ku aragiire Omwigarire Vashiti, ku bamureeta omu maisho ge, onu k'ayangire kuzayo." 
Esther1:18 Eri izooba, abakazi b'omuri Perisiya na Mediya abaahurira eki ogu Mwigarire yaakora, nibaija kukitsyorera abategyeki b'omugabe boona, habeho okugayana n'okugirirana ebiniga." 
Esther1:19 Nyakusinga, ku oraabe nookisiima, shohoza ekiragiro, kihandiikwe omu mateeka g'Abaperisiya n'Abameedi, ku Vashiti atakigaruka bundi mu maisho g'Omugabe Ahaswero; kandi omugabe obwigarire bwe abuheereze ondiijo mukazi orikumuhitsa emicwe; haza ekyo kiragiro hatarigira owaakihindura." 
Esther1:20 Reero ku kiraarangwe omu bugabe bwawe bwona nk'oku burikwingana, abakazi nibaija kutiina baibabo, abaine ekitiinwa n'abatakiine." 
Esther1:21 Obwo bwengye bukasiimwa omugabe n'abategyeki be, yaakora nk'oku Memukaani yaamuhabwire."
