Esther1:22 Yaayohereza ebaruha omu mashaza g'obugabe bwe bwona, buri ishaza omu mihandiikire yaaryo, na buri ihanga omu rurimi rwaryo, ku omushaija weena amanywa omu ka ye ku niwe mukuru." 
Esther2:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire ekiniga ky'Omugabe Ahaswero kyaheza kwikaikana, yaijuka Vashiti eki yaakozire, n'oku yaacwereirwe orubanja rukamusinga." 
Esther2:2 Abagaragwa b'omugabe abaabaire nibamuheereza nikwo kugira bati; K'abaishiki barungi bashugaine batooranirwe omugabe. 
Esther2:3 Mbwenu omugabe ateho abatware omu mashaza g'obugabe bwe bwona, bateeranire hamwe abaishiki barungi kandi abashugaine omu nju y'abakazi ey'omuri Susa, orurembo orukuru, barindwe Hegayi omushaahu w'omugabe, orikureeberera abakazi, kandi baheebwe byona eby'okweboneza." 
Esther2:4 Haza omwishiki ou omugabe araasiimwe abe omwigarire omu mwanya gwa Vashiti. Ekyo kikagwisa gye omugabe, yaaba nikwo yaatwaza." 
Esther2:5 Mbwenu omu rurembo Susa, hakaba harimu Omuyudaaya orikwetwa Morodekai mwene Yairi, Yairi mwene Shimeeyi, Shimeeyi mwene Kishi ow'omu ruganda rwa Benyamiini." 
Esther2:6 Morodekai ogwo akaba anyagirwe, aihirwe Yerusalemu n'ezindi nkwatwa ezaatwairwe, hamwe na Yekoniya omugabe wa Buyudaaya, ou Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni yaabaire atwaire." 
Esther2:7 Morodekai akaba ayoroire Hadaasa, niwe Esiteeri muhara wa ishento; ahabw'okuba akaba ataine ishe na nyina. Ogwo mwishiki akaba ari murungi kandi anyeetsire gye. Ishe na nyina ku baafiire, Morodekai yaamworora nka muhara we ou ayezaariire." 
Esther2:8 Ekiragiro ky'omugabe ku kyarangiriirwe n'abaishiki baateeranirwa omuri Susa, orurembo rukuru, kurindwa Hegayi, Esiteeri nawe yaatwarwa omu kikaari ky'omugabe, yaarindwa Hegayi omureeberezi w'abakazi." 
Esther2:9 Ogwo mwishiki akasiimwa munonga Hegayi, kandi yaamutetsa, yaamuha eby'okweboneza n'egabo ye n'abazaana mushanju abaatoorainwe omu kikaari ky'omugabe; we n'abazaana be yaabata omu mwanya ogurikukira oburungi omu nju y'abakazi." 
Esther2:10 Esiteeri akaba atakeetonzire kugamba ihanga rye n'oruganda rwe, ahabw'okuba Morodekai akaba amuzibiire kukigamba." 
Esther2:11 Kandi buri izooba Morodekai akaba agyendagyenda omu maisho g'ekibuga ky'enju y'abakazi, kumanya oku Esiteeri arikuraara n'oku arikutwazibwa." 
Esther2:12 Mbwenu orubu rwa buri mwishiki, orw'okuza ow'Omugabe Ahaswero, rukaba ruhika hahingwireho ameezi ikumi n'abiri agaabaire nigaragiirwa abakazi. Manya obwo nibwo bwabaire buba obunaku bwabo bw'okweboneza, nibamara ameezi mukaaga nibeesiiga amajuta g'emioliva, n'agandi mukaaga nibeesiiga eby'emigaju n'agandi amajuta ageesigwa abakazi" 
Esther2:13 omwishiki ku yaabaire aza kutaaha omw'omugabe, aheebwa eki arikwenda kyona, bakiiha omu nju y'abakazi; atyo agyenda nakyo omu kikaari ky'omugabe." 
Esther2:14 Akaba azayo omu mwabazyo, agaruka omu kasheeshe omu nju y'abakazi eya kabiri kurindwa Shashigazi omushaahu w'omugabe, owaabaire naareeberera ebinyanshunju; kandi ogwo mwishiki akaba atagarukayo, omugabe yaaba atamukunzire, akamweta naamugamba eiziina." 
Esther2:15 Mbwenu orubu rwa Esiteeri, muhara w'Abihayili ishento Morodekai, owaamworoire nk'omuhara, ku rwahikire kuza omw'omugabe, taine kindi ki yaashabire, kureka ebi Hegayi, omushaahu w'omugabe, owaabaire naareeberera abakazi, yaamuhabwire. Esiteeri yaasiimwa boona abaamureebire." 
Esther2:16 Mpaho baamutwarira Omugabe Ahaswero omu kikaari kye, omu kwezi kwa ikumi, nikwo kwezi kwa Tebeti, omu mwaka gwe gwa mushanju agiire aha ngoma;" 
Esther2:17 omugabe yaamukunda okukira abakazi boona. Yaamusiima munonga kandi yaamutetsa okukira abo baishiki; atyo yaamujweka ekirunga ky'obugabe omu mutwe, yaamuhindura Omwigarire omu mwanya gwa Vashiti." 
Esther2:18 Ebyo ku byahwaire, omugabe yaateekyera abategyeki be n'abaheereza be obugyenyi, ahabw'okushwera Esiteeri. Yaaragiira amashaza ge kusaasirwa omushoro, yaagaba ebintu bingi, nk'oku omugabe weena agira." 
Esther2:19 Abo baishiki ku baateerainwe obwa kabiri, Morodekai yaashangwa ashutami aha irembo ry'omugabe." 
Esther2:20 Obwo Esiteeri akaba atakeetonzire kugamba abaabo n'eihanga rye, nk'oku Morodekai yamwehanangiriize. Manya Esiteeri akoorobera Morodekai, nk'oku yaabaire amworobera naamworora." 
Esther2:21 Omu biro ebyo, Morodekai ku yaabaire ashutami aha irembo ry'omugabe, Bigitaana na Tereshi, abashaahu babiri b'omugabe abakumiirizi b'aha irembo, baagira ekiniga ahabw'okukuzibwa kwa Morodekai, baaza omu naama y'okwita Omugabe Ahaswero." 
Esther2:22 Ekyo Morodekai ku akimanya, akigambira Omwigarire Esiteeri, na Esiteeri akigambira omugabe." 
Esther2:23 Ku baabibuuririize, baashanga biri kwo. Abo bashaija bombi baateebwa aha kabaaho, kandi ekyo kyahandiikirwa omu maisho g'omugabe omu kitabo ky'ebyabaireho." 
Esther3:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Omugabe Ahaswero akakuza Hamani Omuagagi mwene Hamedaata, yaamutunguura, yaamukiza abategyeki be boona." 
Esther3:2 Abaheereza b'omugabe, abaabaire batuura aha irembo rye, bakaba bainama batangirira Hamani, nk'oku omugabe yaabaire aragiire. Kwonka Morodekai we tarainamire kumutangirira." 
Esther3:3 Abaheereza b'omugabe abaabaire bari aha irembo nikwo kugira Morodekai bati: Ahabw'enki noohenda ekiragiro ky'omugabe? 
Esther3:4 Ku baamuteisize buri izooba yaayanga kubahurira, baabigambira Hamani, kureeba yaaba ebi Morodekai yaagambire nibiija kugumizamu. Manya akaba yaabagambiire ku ari Omuyudaaya." 
Esther3:5 Hamani ku yaareebire Morodekai atainama kumutangirira, ekiniga kyamucwa amaraka." 
Esther3:6 Kwonka eky'okwita Morodekai wenka yaakigaya; ahabw'okuba bakaba baamugambiire eihanga eri Morodekai arikukomookamu. Hamani nikwo kucwamu kumaraho Abayudaaya boona ab'eihanga rya Morodekai omu bugabe bwa Ahaswero bwona. 
Esther3:7 Omu kwezi kw'Okubanza, okwa Nisani, omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'ebiri ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Ahaswero, bakaragurisa Puri, nikwo kuteera enteenyu. Baaguma nibagiteerera omu maisho ga Hamani, kumanya ekiro n'okwezi ahi baricwekyerereza ab'eihanga rya Morodekai boona. Enteenyu yaakwata ekiro kya ikumi na bishatu eky'okwezi kwa ikumi n'abiri, nikwo kwa Adaari." 
Esther3:8 Hamani agambira Omugabe Ahaswero ati: Hariho eihanga eryataataine, rikajanjaara omu bantu b'omu mashaza goona ag'omu bugabe bwawe. Amateeka gaabo nigataana n'ag'abandi bantu, kandi tibarikwororbera mateeka g'omugabe; nikyo kitainiire mugabe mugasho kubagumisiririza." 
Esther3:9 Mbwenu Nyakusinga, ku oraabe nookisiima, ragiira bacwekyerezibwe. Naanye niinyija kuha empiiha z'efeeza kakumi, zaakiirwe abarikureeberera omurimo gw'omugabe, bazite omu mabiikiro ge." 
Esther3:10 Atyo omugabe ajuura empeta eriho akamanyiso ke, agiha Hamani Omuagagi mwene Hemedaata, omuzigu w'Abayudaaya." 
Esther3:11 Haza agira Hamani ati: Empiiha zaawe yegumire nazo, n'abantu naabakuha, obakore nk'oku orikwenda." 
Esther3:12 Mpaho aha kiro kya ikumi na bishatu eky'okwezi kw'okubanza abahandiiki b'omugabe baayetwa. Haza ekiragiro ekiri nk'oku byona ebi Hamani yaaragiire, kyahandiikirwa ab'amashaza n'abakungu by'ebyanga byona, n'abategyeki b'amahanga goona, buri kyanga omu mihandiikire yaakyo, na buri ihanga omu rurimi rwaryo. Kyahandiikwa omu iziina ry'Omugabe Ahaswero, kandi kyateebwaho akamanyiso k'empeta ye." 
Esther3:13 Ebaruha zaatwarwa baamatarisi omu byanga by'omugabe byona, kucwekyereza, kwita n'okumaraho Abayudaaya boona, abato n'abakuru, abakazi n'abaana, eizooba rimwe, aha kiro kya ikumi na bishatu eky'okwezi kwa ikumi n'abiri, nikwo kwa Adaari, n'okunyaga ebintu byabo." 
Esther3:14 Ekihandukururo ky'ekyo kihandiiko kikooherezibwa omu buri kyanga, kiri ekiragiro ky'okumanyisa abantu boona ngu beeteekateekyere eryo izooba." 
Esther3:15 Baamatarisi, ahabw'okuragiirwa omugabe, baayehuuta, ekiragiro baakibuzya omuri Susa orurembo orukuru. Omugabe na Hamani baashutama kwenywera, kwonka orurembo Susa rwashobangirirwa." 
Esther4:1 Morodekai ku yaamanyire byona ebibaireho, yaataagura ebijwaro bye, yaajwara ekiguniya, yaayeshukyeera eiju, yaashohora, yaaza omu rurembo ahagati, naacura kandi naaborooga munonga." 
Esther4:2 Yainamuka, yaahika aha irembo ry'omugabe, kwonka tiyaataahamu, ahabw'okuba tihariho owaabaire aikirizibwa kutaahamu ajwaire ekiguniya." 
Esther4:3 Kandi omu buri kyanga ei ekihandiiko ky'ekiragiro ky'omugabe kyahikire, Abayudaaya baagira amaganya maingi, baayesiibyakwo, bataireho okurira n'okucura, kandi abaingi omuribo baabyama omu iju beeshwekire ebiguniya." 
Esther4:4 Abaranga ba Esiteeri n'abashaahu be ku baizire, baabimugambira. Omwigarire yaagira obusaasi bwingi, yaatwekyera Morodekai emyenda y'okujwara, kwonka we yaagyanga." 
Esther4:5 Bwanyima Esiteeri yaatuma ku bamwetera Hataki, omwe aha bashaahu b'omugabe, owaabaire atairweho kumuheereza. Yaamuragiira kugyenda akahika Morodekai, akamubuuza ebibaireho n'ekibireetsire." 
Esther4:6 Hataki atyo agyenda, ahika Morodekai, amushanga ahu abantu bateeranira omu rurembo, omu maisho g'eirembo ry'omugabe." 
Esther4:7 Morodekai nawe amugambira byona ebimubaireho, n'omubaro gw'empiiha zi Hamani araganiise kuta omu mabiikiro g'omugabe ahabw'okucwekyereza Abayudaaya." 
Esther4:8 Kandi Morodekai amuha ekihanduukururo ky'ekiragiro ekyabugiibwe omuri Susa, kubacwekyereza, ngu akyorekye Esiteeri, kandi akimushoboororere, ateho n'okumwehanangiriza kuza ow'omugabe, akamushaba naamweshengyereza kukiza eihanga rye. Ati: Kandi ongirire Esiteeri oti: Ijuka obunaku obu waabaire otakabaire w'ekitiinwa, obu naabaire ninkikworora. Mbwenu reeba, Hamani agizire ngu naija kutucwekyereza. Yeshengyereze Nyakubaho, kandi ogambire omugabe ebyaitu, otukize okufa." 
Esther4:9 Hataki agyenda ateekyerereza Esiteeri ebi Morodekai yaagamba. 
Esther4:10 Kwonka Esiteeri agambira Hataki naamutuma ahari Morodekai, ati:" 
Esther4:11 Abagaragwa b'omugabe boona n'abantu b'omu byanga bye nibamanya ku omushaija weena nari omukazi, oza ow'omugabe omunda omu kikaari ateetsirwe, hariho eiteeka rimwe ryonka eritarikushoroora muntu n'omwe, nikwo kwitwa; kureka ou omugabe agororera enkoni ye ey'ezaabu ngu atafa, niwe ataitwa. Kandi nyowe mmazire ebiro makumi ashatu ntakeetsirwe kutaaha omw'omugabe." 
Esther4:12 Bagambira Morodekai ebi Esiteeri yaagamba. 
Esther4:13 Morodekai nawe abagambira kugarukamu Esiteeri ati: Otateekateeka ngu omu Bayudaaya boona niiwe oraahonokye, ngu ahabw'okuba ori omu kikaari ky'omugabe." 
Esther4:14 Manya ku oraahuname omu bunaku nk'obu, eky'okuhuumuriza n'okujuna Abayudaaya nikiija kuruga ahandi, kwonka iwe n'enju ya sho nimwija kuhwerekyerera. Mbwenu n'oha orikumanya ku ekyakureetsire aha ngoma, kitari ky'obunaku nk'obu?" 
Esther4:15 Esiteeri nikwo kubagambira kugarukamu Morodekai, bati:" 
Esther4:16 Irooko orundaane Abayudaaya boona abari omuri Susa, mwesiibyekwo ahabwangye, mumare ebiro bishatu mutarikurya, nobu kwakuba okunywa nyekiro nari nyomushana, kandi nyowe n'abaranga bangye naitwe nitwija kwesiibyakwo nkaimwe. Reero nze ow'omugabe, nobu kiraabe nikihenda eiteeka; ku ndaabe ninfa, nfe." 
Esther4:17 Atyo Morodekai agyenda akora byona ebi Esiteeri yaamuragiira. 
Esther5:1 Aha kiro kya kashatu, Esiteeri akajwara ebijwaro bye by'obwigarire, yaaza omu kibuga ky'omunda eky'ekikaari ky'omugabe ekirikureebana n'ekishengye ekihango eky'omugabe. Obwo omugabe akaba ashutami aha kitebe kye omunda y'ekikaari, aharikureebana n'eirembo eri bataahiramu omu kikaari." 
Esther5:2 Omugabe ku yaareebire Omwigarire Esiteeri ayemereire omu kibuga, yaamushemerererwa, yaamugororera enkoni ye eya zaabu ei yaabaire aine omu ngaro. Na Esiteeri yairira haihi, yaakora aha ifundo ry'egyo nkoni." 
Esther5:3 Mpaho omugabe agira Esiteeri ati: Omwigarire Esiteeri, n'enki? Nooyenda ki? Haza nkikuhe, nangwa nobu kyakuba ekicweka ky'obugabe bwangye." 
Esther5:4 Esiteeri amugira ati: Nyakusinga, ku oraabe nookisiima, ikiriza kwija eri izooba na Hamani, aha bugyenyi bu nkuteekyeire." 
Esther5:5 Omugabe nawe agira ati: Nimureete Hamani ahonaaho, tubone kukora eki Esiteeri arikwenda. Omugabe na Hamani batyo baija aha bugyenyi obu Esiteeri ateekire." 
Esther5:6 Ku baabaire nibanywa viino, omugabe yaabuuza Esiteeri ati: Nooshaba ki? Haza nkikuhe! Mbwenu nooyenda ki? Nangwa n'obu kyakuba ekicweka ky'obugabe bwangye niinyija kukikuha." 
Esther5:7 Esiteeri amugarukamu ati: Eki ndikushaba kandi eki ndikwenda n'eki: 
Esther5:8 Ku ndaabe naagirirwa embabazi omu maisho gaawe, Nyakusinga, kandi iwe omugabe, ku oraabe nookisiima kumpa eki ndaashabe, n'okuhikiiriza eki ndikwenda, ikiriza iwe na Hamani kwija nyencakare aha bugyenyi obu ndaabateekyere, haza nibwo ndaakore eki iwe, Nyakusinga, waagamba." 
Esther5:9 Eryo izooba, Hamani akashohora ashemereirwe kandi ananukire. Mbwenu ku yaareebire Morodekai aha irembo ry'omugabe ataamwimukira, nobu kwakuba okutetemera omu maisho ge, yaamugirira ekiniga kingi." 
Esther5:10 Kwonka yaayegumya, yaataaha omuka; yaatuma ahari banywani be n'omukazi we Zereshi, baija." 
Esther5:11 Yaabagambira ekitiinwa eki aine ahabw'obutungi bwe n'omubaro gw'abaana be, na byona ebi omugabe amukurizemu, n'oku yaamutungwire, akamweshumbya abandi bategyeki n'abagaragwa be." 
Esther5:12 Kandi ayongyera agira ati: Nangwa n'Omugabekazi Esiteeri tiyaayeta ondi weena kwija n'omugabe aha bugyenyi obu ateekire, kureka nyowe nyenka. Kandi nyencakare nabwo yaanyeta hamwe n'omugabe." 
Esther5:13 Kwonka ebyo byona tibiine ki bingasiire, naaba ninkireeba Morodekai Omuyudaaya ashutami aha irembo ry'omugabe." 
Esther5:14 Ku agwisa, omukazi we Zereshi na banywani be boona bamugira bati: Ragiira babyare ekiti ky'oburaingwa bwa mikono makumi ataano, haza omu kasheeshe oshabe omugabe bakihanikyeho Morodekai, obone kuba aha bugyenyi n'omugabe oshemereirwe. Egyo naama yaagwisa gye Hamani, yaaragiira ku babyara ekyo kiti." 
Esther6:1 Ekyo kiro, omugabe akaburwa oturo, yaaragiira kureeta ekitabo ekirikwijutsya ebyabaireho; baabimushomera." 
Esther6:2 Baashanga hahandiikirwemu oku Morodekai yaaregire Bigitaana na Tereshi abashaahu babiri b'omugabe, abaabaire nibarinda eirembo bakenda kwita Omugabe Ahaswero." 
Esther6:3 Omugabe nikwo kubuuza ati: Mbwenu ni kitiinwa ki nari obukuru ebirahairwe Morodekai kumusiima ahabw'eki yaakozire? Abagaragwa bamugarukamu bati: Tihariho ekiramukoreirwe. 
Esther6:4 Omugabe nawe abuuza ati: Beitu n'oha ori omu kibuga? Ago magingo Hamani agabwa yaahika omu kibuga ky'aheeru eky'omu kikaari ky'omugabe aizire kumugambira eby'okuhanika Morodekai aha kiti ki yaabaire amubyariire. 
Esther6:5 Abagaragwa b'omugabe nabo bamugarukamu bati: Hamani niwe ari aha, ayemereire omu kibuga. Omugabe abagira ati: Nimumurekye aije." 
Esther6:6 Hamani atyo aija. Omugabe amugira ati: Ni kintu ki ekyakukorerwa omuntu ou omugabe arikusiima kuha ekitiinwa? Hamani aza omu mitima ati: Mbwenu ondi ou omugabe yaakuha ekitiinwa n'oha otari nyowe? 
Esther6:7 Mpaho agira omugabe ati: Omuntu ou omugabe arikusiima kuha ekitiinwa," 
Esther6:8 ka bareete bushuuti y'obugabe erajwairwe omugabe, n'embaraasi ei omugabe aratembire, kandi bamute ekirunga by'obugabe aha mutwe." 
Esther6:9 Ebyo bijwaro n'embaraasi babikwatse omwe aha bategyeki b'omugabe, abarikukiza abandi boona ekitiinwa; abijwekye ogwo muntu ou omugabe arikusiima kuha ekitiinwa: amutembye embaraasi, kandi amurabye omuri nyarubuga y'orurembo, naarangirira amwebembeire ati: Oku nikwo kiraatwazibwe aha muntu ou omugabe arikusiima kuha ekitiinwa." 
Esther6:10 Omugabe atyo agira Hamani ati: Rahuka otware bushuuti n'embaraasi. Haza nk'oku waagamba obe nikwo waabitwaza ahari Morodekai Omuyudaaya, oshutama aha irembo ry'omugabe. Kandi ebi waagamba byona otagira eki waatsiga." 
Esther6:11 Hamani atwara bushuuti n'embaraasi, ajweka Morodekai, amutembesa embaraasi, amurabya omuri nyarubuga y'orurembo naarangirira ati: Oku nikwo kiraatwazibwe aha muntu ou omugabe arikusiima kuha ekitiinwa." 
Esther6:12 Ebyo ku bihwa, Morodekai agarukayo aha irembo ry'omugabe. Hamani nawe ayehuuta, naataaha owe omuka naarira ayetwekyereire." 
Esther6:13 Ku ahikayo, ateekyerereza omukazi we Zereshi na banywani be boona akagwe kaamugwera. Mpaho abahabuzi be n'omukazi we Zereshi bamugira bati: Morodekai ou waaruga kujuumara omu maisho, ku araabe ari ow'eihanga ry'Abayudaaya, torikwija kumubaasa kandi torigira bu oimukize omutwe." 
Esther6:14 Ku baabaire nibakigamba nawe, abashaahu b'omugabe baija nibeehuuta, kwakiira Hamani kuza aha bugyenyi bu Esiteeri yaabaire ateekire." 
Esther7:1 Omugabe na Hamani bakataaha omu nju kurya obugyenyi n'Omwigarire Esiteeri. 
Esther7:2 Aha izooba rya kabiri ku baabaire nibanywa viino, omugabe yaagaruka yaabuuza Esiteeri ati: Omwigarire Esiteeri, nooshaba ki? Haza nkikuhe! Kandi nooyenda ki? Nobu kyakuba ekicweka ky'obugabe bwangye, niinyija kukikuha." 
Esther7:3 Mpaho Omwigarire Esiteeri agarukamu ati: Nyakusinga, ku ndaabe naagirirwa embabazi omu maisho gaawe; kandi waaba nookisiima, ninshaba amagara gangye, kandi ninshaba n'ag'ab'eihanga ryangye." 
Esther7:4 Manya nyowe n'ab'eihanga ryangye tuguzirwe, ngu tucwekyerezibwe, twitwe kandi tumarweho. Kuri tuguzirwe kuba abahuuku n'abazaana kusha, nkaahunamire; ahabw'okuba okubonabonesibwa kwaitu tikwakwingaine n'ebi omugabe yaakufeerwa." 
Esther7:5 Omugabe Ahaswero nikwo kubuuza Omwigarire Esiteeri ati: Ogwo orikwehangamura kukora ekyo n'oha? Kandi ari nkahi? 
Esther7:6 Esiteeri amugarukamu ati: Omuzigu kandi omubisha! N'ogu mwinazi Hamani! Hamani atetemera aho omu maisho g'omugabe, n'ag'Omwigarire." 
Esther7:7 Omugabe aimuka, aruga aha bugyenyi, ekiniga nikyenda kumubarura, aza omu musiri gw'omu kikaari; kwonka Hamani aguma aho, kweshengyereza Omwigarire Esiteeri kukiza amagara ge; ahabw'okuba akareeba ku omugabe amaririire kumukora kubi." 
Esther7:8 Bwanyima omugabe ku yaagarukire naaruga omu musiri gw'omu kikaari, yaataaha omu kishengye eki baabaire nibanyweramu viino, yaashanga Hamani ajuumaire aha kitanda eki Esiteeri yaabaire abyamiho; omugabe nikwo kugira ati: Kandi yaataho n'okwenda kuhambira Omwigarire omu maisho gangye, omu nju yangye? Ebyo bigambo ku byarugire biti omu kanwa k'omugabe, baakoma Hamani ahamaisho." 
Esther7:9 Reero omwe aha bashaahu barikuheereza omugabe orikwetwa Haruboona, yaagira ati: Manya n'ekiti ky'oburaingwa bwa mikono makumi ataano, eki Hamani abyariire Morodekai, ou ekigambo kye kyakirize omugabe, kitsimbire omwa Hamani." 
Esther7:10 Omugabe nawe nikwo kuragiira ati: Mube nikyo mwamuhanikaho. Batyo baahanika Hamani ahari ekyo kiti ki yaabaire abyariire Morodekai. Ekiniga ky'omugabe kyaikaikana. 
Esther8:1 Eryo izooba, omugabe Ahaswero akaha Omwigarire Esiteeri enju ya Hamani omuzigu w'Abayudaaya; na Morodekai yaija omu maisho g'omugabe, ahabw'okuba Esiteeri akaba yaamugambiire oku aine obuzaare nawe." 
Esther8:2 Omugabe yaajuura empeta eriho akamanyiso ke, ei yaabaire ayakire Hamani, yaagiha Morodekai. Na Esiteeri yaakwatsa Morodekai enju ya Hamani kugitegyeka." 
Esther8:3 Bwanyima Esiteeri yaagaruka yaagambira omugabe, yaamukwata amaguru naamweshengyereza naarira, ngu azibire enaama mbi eya Hamani Omuagagi n'obwengye ebi yaabaire acumire, kucwekyereza Abayudaaya." 
Esther8:4 Omugabe atyo agororera Esiteeri enkoni ye eya zaabu; 
Esther8:5 Esiteeri nawe aimuka, ayemerera omu maisho g'omugabe, amugira ati: Nyakusinga omugabe, ku oraabe nookisiima, kandi nonshemerererwa, n'eki ndikukushaba ku oraabe nooreeba ngu kihikire, naanye ku ndaabe ninkugwisa gye, ragiira bahandiikye ekiragiro ekirikuzibira amabaruha agu Hamani Omuagagi mwene Hamedaata yaahandiikiise kucwekyereza Abayudaaya abari omu mashaza g'omugabe goona." 
Esther8:6 Mbwenu nimbaasa nta kugumisiriza nindeeba akabi akarikwija kugwera eihanga ryangye? Nari shi nimbaasa nta kugumisiriza nindeeba ab'oruganda rwangye nibacwekyerezibwa? 
Esther8:7 Omugabe Ahaswero agira Omwigarire Esiteeri na Morodekai Omuyudaaya, ati: Reeba, mpaire Esiteeri enju ya Hamani, kandi Hamani ogwo bamuhanikire aha kiti, ahabw'okwenda kucwekyereza Abayudaaya." 
Esther8:8 Mbwenu aha bikwatiraine n'Abayudaaya nimwirooko muhandiikye omu iziina ry'omugabe nk'oku murikwenda. Ekihandiiko mukiteho akamayiso k'empeta y'omugabe, ahabw'okuba ekiragiro ekihandiikirwe omu iziina ry'omugabe kikateebwaho akamanyiso k'empeta ye, tikibaasa kwihwaho." 
Esther8:9 Ago magingo batuma kweta ahonaaho abahandiiki b'omugabe. Omu kwezi kwa kashatu, nikwo kwa Sivaani, aha kiro kya abiri na bishatu, baahandiika ekiragiro ekiri nk'oku ebi Morodekai yaaragiire aha Bayudaaya byabaire biri, baakyoherereza ab'amashaza n'abategyeki bakuru, n'abainginya b'ebyanga, okwiha Buhindi okuhitsya Etiopiya; ebyanga igana na makumi abiri na mushanju, buri kyanga omu mihandiikire yaakyo, na buri ihanga omu rurimi rwaryo; kandi baakihandiikira n'Abayudaaya omu mihandiikire yaabo n'omu rurimi rwabo." 
Esther8:10 Ekyo kihandiiko kyahandiikwa omu iziina ry'omugabe, kyateebwaho akamanyiso k'empeta ye; amabaruha gaatwarwa baamatarisi abatembire embaraasi zirikwiruka munonga, ezaabaire nizikoresibwa omu mirimo y'omugabe, kandi ezaazaaziibwe aha ze." 
Esther8:11 Omuri ezo baruha, omugabe akaikiriza Abayudaaya b'omu buri kirorero kweteerana bakeerwanaho, bakacwekyereza, bakaita n'okumaraho eihe ry'eihanga ryona, nari ry'ekyanga eriribateera, baite n'abaana baabo n'abakazi, n'okunyaga ebintu byabo;" 
Esther8:12 kandi ngu ebyo byona bikorwe ahari eryo izooba omu byanga byona eby'Omugabe Ahaswero, aha kiro kya ikumi na bishatu eky'okwezi kwa ikumi n'abiri, nikwo kwezi kwa Adaari." 
Esther8:13 Ekihandukururo ky'ekyo kihandiiko kikaba kiri eky'okushohozibwa, kiri ekiragiro omu buri kyanga, kandi eky'okurangirirwa abantu boona, n'Abayudaaya kweteekateeka kuhoora enzigu abazigu baabo." 
Esther8:14 Mpaho baamatarisi baatemba embaraasi zaabo ezirikwiruka munonga, ezaabaire nizikoresibwa emirimo y'omugabe, baashohora bazitembire nibeehuuta, baragiirwe omugabe; baabuzya ekyo kiragiro omu rurembo orukuru, Susa." 
Esther8:15 Bwanyima Morodekai yaashohora naaruga omu maisho g'omugabe ajwaire bushuuti y'ekitiinwa eya bururu kandi erikwera, n'ekirunga kihango eky'ezaabu, n'omunagiro gwa kitaani enungi eya bujwa; orurembo Susa rwayogoora niruteera akaari rushemereirwe." 
Esther8:16 Abayudaaya baashemuuka, baashemererwa, baayesiima kandi baatunga ekitiinisa." 
Esther8:17 Reero omuri buri ishaza n'omu buri kirorero, ahu ekiragiro n'ekihandiiko ky'omugabe byahikire, Abayudaaya baashemererwa, baayesiima, baagira obugyenyi n'ekiro ky'okuhuumuriraho. Abantu baingi abanyamahanga ab'omuri egyo nsi, baayehindura Abayudaaya ahabw'okutiina." 
Esther9:1 Mbwenu omu kwezi kwa ikumi n'abiri, nikwo kwa Adaari, aha kiro kya ikumi na bishatu eky'okwo kwezi, ekiragiro ky'omugabe n'ekihandiiko kye bikaba biri haihi kuhikiirizibwa. Haza ekyo kiro abazigu b'Abayudaaya bakaba baine amatsiko g'okubasingura, kwonka kyaba okundi, Abayudaaya baaba nibo baasingura abo bazigu." 
Esther9:2 Abayudaaya baateeranira omu birorero byabo omu mashaza goona ag'Omugabe Ahaswero, kurwanisa abaabaire nibenda kubakora kubi. Haza tihaabaho n'omwe owaabaasize kubaza omu kaso, ahabw'okuba amahanga goona gakaba nigabatiina." 
Esther9:3 Abainginya b'omu byanga boona n'ab'amashaza n'abategyeki abakuru n'abakungu b'omugabe, nabo baaha Abayudaaya emikono, ahabw'okutiina Morodekai." 
Esther9:4 Manya Morodekai akaba ari omuntu mukuru omu kikaari ky'omugabe, okurangaanwa kwe kubugire omu mashaza goona, ahabw'okuba Morodekai ogwo akaguma naayeyongyera kugira obushoboorozi." 
Esther9:5 Batyo Abayudaaya baitsa abazigu baabo boona rurara, baabaita, baabacwekyereza, n'abaabaire nibabanga baabagira nk'oku barikwenda." 
Esther9:6 Omu rurembo rukuru Susa rwonka, Abayudaaya baitamu abantu magana ataano, baabacwekyereza," 
Esther9:7 kandi baita Parishanidaata na Dalifoni na Asipaata 
Esther9:8 na Porata na Adaliya na Aridaata 
Esther9:9 na Paramashita na Arisaayi na Aridaayi na Vayizaata," 
Esther9:10 batabani ba Hamani ikumi, mwene Hamedaata omuzigu w'Abayudaaya; kwonka tibaagira ki baataho engaro kukinyaga." 
Esther9:11 Eryo izooba abantu baagambira omugabe omubaro gw'abaitiirwe omuri Susa orurembo orukuru. 
Esther9:12 Omugabe yaagira Omwigarire Esiteeri ati: Omuri Susa orurembo orukuru, Abayudaaya baita abantu magana ataano, hamwe na batabani ba Hamani ikumi. Mbwenu shi omu gandi mashaza g'omugabe baagira bata? Mbwenu kandi nooshaba ki? Haza nkikuhe. Kandi ekindi nooyenda ki, nkakikukorera?" 
Esther9:13 Esiteeri amugarukamu ati: Nyakusinga, ku oraabe nookisiima, ikiriza Abayudaaya abari omuri Susa, nyencakare nabwo bakore nk'oku ekihandiiko ky'eri izooba kiri. Kandi oikirize batabani ba Hamani ikumi, emitumbi yaabo ehanikwe aha biti." 
Esther9:14 Omugabe nawe aragiira ku kiba nikwo kyaba; ekiragiro kibugibwa omuri Susa, batabani ba Hamani ikumi bahanikwa." 
Esther9:15 Abayudaaya b'omuri Susa nabwo beeteerana aha kiro kya ikumi na bina ky'okwezi Adaari, baita abantu magana ashatu omuri Susa; kwonka tibagira ki baakozaho engaro kukinyaga." 
Esther9:16 Abandi Bayudaaya abaabaire bari omu byanga by'omugabe nabo baayeteerana kwerwanaho, baayekiza abazigu baabo, baabaitamu abantu obukumi mushanju n'enkumi itaano abaabaire nibabanga; kwonka tibaagira ki baakozaho engaro kukinyaga." 
Esther9:17 Ebyo bikabaho aha kiro kya ikumi na bishatu eky'okwezi Adaari; reero aha kya ikumi na bina baahuumura. Ekyo kiro baakigira eky'okuriiraho obugyenyi n'okushemererwa. 
Esther9:18 Kwonka Abayudaaya ababaire bari omuri Susa, bakeeteerana aha kiro kya ikumi na bishatu n'aha kya ikumi na bina, haza baahuumura aha kya ikumi na bitaano, baaba nikyo baahindura eky'okuhuumuriraho n'okushemererwa." 
Esther9:19 Nikyo Abayudaaya b'omu byaro, abatwire omu birorero ebitazitiriirwe, barindira ekiro kya ikumi na bina eky'okwezi kwa Adaari, kuba eky'okushemerererwaho n'okuriiraho obugyenyi n'okuhuumuriraho, kandi n'okuba ekiro ky'okutwekyeraniraho ebyokurya birungi." 
Esther9:20 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Morodekai yaahandiika ebyo byona omu kitabo, kandi Abayudaaya boona abaabaire bari omu byanga by'Omugabe Ahaswero, aba haihi n'aba hare, yaabatwekyera ebaruha" 
Esther9:21 naabeehanangiriza kuguma nibarinda ekiro kya ikumi na bina eky'okwezi kwa Adaari, kandi n'ekya ikumi na bitaano eky'okwo kwezi, buri mwaka," 
Esther9:22 kuba ebiro ebi Abayudaaya baakiriireho abazigu baabo, kandi kuba okwezi okwabahindukiire okw'okushemererwa omu mwanya gw'okuba okw'obusaasi, n'okuba okw'okuruhuuka omu mwanya gw'okucura; ngu babihindure ebiro by'amagyenyi n'okushemererwa, kandi eby'okutwekyeraniraho ebyokurya birungi, n'okuha abooro ebiconco." 
Esther9:23 Abayudaaya baayehayo kuguma nibakora nk'oku baatandika, nk'oku Morodekai yaabahandiikiire." 
Esther9:24 Manya Hamani Omuagagi mwene Hamedaata, omuzigu w'Abayudaaya boona, akaba abacumiire enaama y'okubacwekyereza, kandi ateerize enteenyu kumanya eizooba ri aribacwekyererezaho." 
Esther9:25 Kwonka Esiteeri ku yaizire omu maisho g'omugabe, omugabe yaahandiika naaragiira ku we n'abatabani bahanikwa aha biti:" 
Esther9:26 Ebyo biro nikyo byayeteirwe Purimu, ekirikumanyisa omu Ruyudaaya enteenyu. Reero ahabw'ebyahandiikirwe omuri egyo baruha, n'ebi baabugabugaine nabyo, na byona ebyabagweraire," 
Esther9:27 Abayudaaya bakeeteeraho ekiragiro nibaragaanisa ku bo, na baijukuru baabo n'abaabaire bakwataniise nabo, bataribura kurinda ebyo biro byombi, nk'oku kyahandiikirwe, n'oku obunaku obwatairweho buri mwaka buri." 
Esther9:28 Kandi ngu ebyo biro bigume nibiijukwa, nibikorerwaho emikoro obusingye bwona omu buri ka, omu buri ishaza, n'omu buri rurembo, ngu ebyo biro bya Purimu Abayudaaya bataribifiisa busha, n'obu baakuba baijukuru baabo okureka kubiijuka." 
Esther9:29 Bwanyima Omwigarire Esiteeri, muhara wa Baihayili, na Morodekai Omuyudaaya, baahandiika n'obushoboorozi bwona, nibahamya egyo baruha ya kabiri aha bya Purimu." 
Esther9:30 Ebaruha zaatwekyerwa Abayudaaya boona omu mashaza igana na makumi abiri na mushanju ag'omu bugabe bwa Ahaswero, zirimu ebigambo by'obusingye n'eby'amazima," 
Esther9:31 niziragiira ku ebiro bya Purimu biguma nibikorerwaho emigyenzo omu bunaku bwabyo obwatairweho, nk'oku Omuyudaaya Morodekai n'Omwigarire Esiteeri baayehanangiriize Abayudaaya, n'oku Abayudaaya baayeteereireho ekiragiro ahabwabo n'ahabwa baijukuru baabo, ekikwatiraine n'okwesiibyakwo n'okuganya kwabo." 
Esther9:32 Ekiragiro ky'Omwigarire Esiteeri kyahamya emigyenzo ya Purimu, kandi kyahandiikwa omu kitabo." 
Esther10:1 Omugabe Ahaswero akaragiira kushoza ensi n'ebyanga by'aha myegyeego y'enyanja. 
Esther10:2 Mbwenu shi, eby'obushoboorozi bwe, n'eby'amaani ge, byona ebi yaakozire n'ebirikutebya ekitiinwa kingi kya Morodekai eki omugabe yaamuhaire, akamukuza, tibihandiikirwe omu Kitabo ky'eby'omu Busingye bw'abagabe ba Bumeedi na Buperisiya?" 
Esther10:3 Manya ogwo Muyudaaya Morodekai, omu kitiinwa akaba ari owa kabiri aha Mugabe Ahaswero, ari rugambwa omu Bayudaaya, kandi naasiimwa beene waabo baingi munonga, ahabw'okuba akaba ayendeza eihanga rye ebirungi, agambira abantu be boona eby'obusingye." 
Job1:1 Omu nsi ya Uuzi, hakaba hariyo omushaija orikwetwa Yobu. Ogwo mushaija akaba ari omuntu ataine kamogo ahikiriire, naatiina Ruhanga kandi naayetantara ekibi." 
Job1:2 Akazaara abatabani mushanju n'abahara bashatu. 
Job1:3 Akaba aine entaama enkumi mushanju, engamira enkumi ishatu, enimi rukumi z'okuhingisa, n'endogoya ebuguma magana ataano, n'abahuuku baingi munonga. Ogwo muntu akaba ari rugambwa omu baaburugwa-izooba boona." 
Job1:4 Abatabani bakaba bamanyiriire kuza omu nju y'omwe aharibo, kuriiramu obugyenyi aha izooba rye; kandi batuma ahari banyaanyabo bonshatu nibabeeta kurya n'okunywa hamwe nabo." 
Job1:5 Reero ebiro by'obugyenyi ku byabaire bihwa, Yobu abatumaho, baija, abeeza. Aguruka kare omu kasheeshe, atamba ebitambo by'okucwetsya, ebirikwingana n'omubaro gwabo boona. Ahabw'okuba Yobu akaba agira ati: Obundi abaana bangye bakaaba bakozire ebibi, barogotsire ahari Ruhanga omu mitima yaabo." 
Job1:6 Eizooba rimwe, baamaraika bakaija omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, na Sitaane yaabaiziramu." 
Job1:7 Nyakubaho yaabuza Sitaane ati: Nooruga hi? Sitaane yaagarukamu Nyakubaho ati: Ninduga kukora oku n'oku mu nsi, kugizengyereramu." 
Job1:8 Nyakubaho abuuza Sitaane ati: Ebyo waayetegyereza omwiru wangye Yobu; ku hatariho muntu ori nkawe omu nsi? Ku ataine kamogo, ku ari ohikiriire, arikutiina Ruhanga kandi orikwetantara ekibi?" 
Job1:9 Sitaane agarukamu Nyakubaho ati: Yobu shi naatiinira Ruhanga busha? 
Job1:10 Tiiwe otuura omurinzire embaju zoona, n'eka ye, n'ebi aine byona? Manya okaha omugisha ebi yaakoreise emikono ye, ebi atungire byakanya omu nsi." 
Job1:11 Kwonka mbwenu gorora omukono gwawe, okore aha bi atungire byona. Haza oreebe ku ataija kukucumuraho." 
Job1:12 Nyakubaho agira Sitaane ati: Reeba, ebi atungire byona biri omu bushoboorozi bwawe; kwonka we otamukoraho. Sitaane atyo aruga omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Job1:13 Eizooba rimwe, batabani ba Yobu n'abahara ku baabaire nibarya ebyokurya, nibanywa viino omwa mukuru waabo;" 
Job1:14 omuntu yaija ahari Yobu, yaamubikira ati: Enimi ku zaaba nizihinga, n'endogoya niziziriira aha rubaju," 
Job1:15 Abasabeya baazeeshukamu, baazinyaga, baita n'abahuuku baawe. Niinye naahonokaho, nkaija kukubikira." 
Job1:16 Ku yaabaire naakigamba ebyo, haija ondiijo yaamugira ati: Omuriro gwa Ruhanga gwatimbira omu iguru, gwayotsya entaama zaawe n'abahuuku baawe, gwabicwekyereza. Niinye naahonokaho, nkaija kukubikira." 
Job1:17 Nawe ku yaabaire naakigamba ebyo, haija ondiijo yaagira ati: Abakaludaaya omu bimbuuro bishatu baayeshuka omu ngamira zaawe, baazinyaga baita n'abahuuku baawe. Kureka niinye naahonokaho, nkaija kukubikira." 
Job1:18 Ku yaabaire naakigamba ebyo, haija ondiijo yaagira ati: Batabani baawe na bahara baawe ku baaba nibarya ebyokurya nibanywa viino omu nju ya mukuru waabo," 
Job1:19 ahonaaho omuyaga gw'amaani gwareetwa omu ihamba, gwateera egyo nju embaju zaayo ina, yaagwera abo batsigazi n'empangare, baafa. Kureka niinye naahonokaho, nkaija kukubikira." 
Job1:20 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Yobu yaimuka, yaataagura ebi ajwaire, yaamwa eishokye, yaajuumara aha nsi, yaaramya Ruhanga." 
Job1:21 Yaagira ati: Nkaruga omu nda ya maawe ntaine ki njwaire, kandi nikwo ndigarukayo. Nyakubaho niwe yampaire, kandi niwe yaanyaka. Eiziina rye rihimbisibwe." 
Job1:22 Omuri ebyo byona Yobu taine kibi ki yaakozire, nobu kwakuba okugira ngu Ruhanga ashobize." 
Job2:1 Kandi aha rindi izooba, baamaraika ba Ruhanga baija kutabaarira Nyakubaho; na Sitaane yaabaiziramu kumweyoreka." 
Job2:2 Nyakubaho yaabuuza Sitaane ati: Nooruga hi? N'onu yaamugarukamu ati: Ninduga kukora oku n'oku omu nsi, kugizengyereramu." 
Job2:3 Nyakubaho abuuza Sitaane ati: Ebyo waayetegyereza omwiru wangye Yobu; ku hatariho muntu ori nkawe omu nsi ku ataine kamogo, ku ari ohikiriire, orikutiina Ruhanga kandi orikwetantara ekibi? Nobu wandeeteire kumukora kubi, kumuhwerekyerereza busha; kwonka akihamire n'omwesigwa." 
Job2:4 Na Sitaane agarukamu Nyakubaho ati: Manya oruhu rwihurwa orundi! Amagara gakira amagana. 
Job2:5 Mbwenu gorora omukono gwawe, okore aha magufa ge, n'aha mubiri gwe; haza oreebe ku ataakucumuraho." 
Job2:6 Nyakubaho nikwo kugira Sitaane ati: Reeba, ari omu bushoboorozi bwawe, kwonka otamwita." 
Job2:7 Sitaane atyo aruga omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, arwaza Yobu ebironda bibi munonga, okwiha aha mara g'ebigyere, okuhika aha kazingiro k'eishokye," 
Job2:8 Yobu aihayo orugusyo rw'okweyaguza, ashutama omu iju." 
Job2:9 Bwanyima omukazi we amugira ati: Ebyo na hati okihamiire omu bwesigwa bwawe? Beitu ku orogota ahari Ruhanga, okafa!" 
Job2:10 Kwonka we yaamugarukamu ati: Iwe noogamba nk'abakazi ebifamutima, abagambira eryo. Turyaguma twakiire ebirungi omu ngaro za Ruhanga, tutaine bu twakiire ebibi? Omuri ebyo byona, Yobu tiyaagira bu acumwire ahari Ruhanga." 
Job2:11 Mbwenu banywani ba Yobu bashatu aba: Elifaazi Omuteemani, Bilidaadi Omushuuhi na Zofari Omunaamati, ku baahuriire akagwe akaamugwereire, baija, buri omwe naaruga owe. Baaragaana kuza owe kumuyaagira n'okumugumya." 
Job2:12 Reero ku baamureebeire hare, tibaamumanya; baayeha ekiboroogo, baarira, baataagura ebi bajwaire, baayeshuka eiju omu mutwe, nibarimiisha ahaiguru." 
Job2:13 Baamara ebiro mushanju nyomushana na nyekiro bashutami nawe aha nsi, hataine n'omwe owaagira eki yaamugambira; ahabw'okuba bakareeba ku okubonabona kwe kurengyesereize." 
Job3:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Yobu yaakyeena eizooba ri yaazaariirweho." 
Job3:2 Yaagira ati: 
Job3:3 Nkaahenwa ki, eizooba ri naazaariirweho, n'ekiro ki naabakiirweho bicwekyerezibwa!" 
Job3:4 Nkaahenwa ki, eryo izooba rihinduka omwirima, Ruhanga ow'ahaiguru areka kuryetaho, ribura kujwerwa omushana;" 
Job3:5 okwiririmba n'ekibunda kya rufu birihindura eryabyo; ebicu birikondahirira; obwira-kabiri bwa nyomushana buritiinisa; 
Job3:6 ekyo kiro kishwekwa omwirima ndindindi, kireka kushemerererwaho omu biro by'omwaka; n'okubarirwa omu biro by'okwezi;" 
Job3:7 buzimazima ekyo kiro kiba nk'ekitarabairweho kintu kyona, kireka kuhuririrwaho akaari k'okushemererwa!" 
Job3:8 Nkaahenwa ki, abakyeena amazooba, abahangu abahinza orukooko bakikyeena;" 
Job3:9 enyonyoozi z'omu ruturuturu zibura kwaka, kitegyereza obwire kuyangayanga, n'omushekye kujuguta bibura;" 
Job3:10 Ahabw'okuba tikiraigaize mura gw'enda ya maawe, n'obu kwakuba okuzibira amaisho gangye kureeba enaku." 
Job3:11 Ahabw'enki ntarafiire ninzaarwa, nkiruga nti omu nda ya maawe nkakaba?" 
Job3:12 Ahabw'enki maawe yankiikiire aha bibero, akaanyontsya?" 
Job3:13 Manya kuri naafiire, nkaabyamire ncecekire, ngwejegyera, nyehuumurira," 
Job3:14 nk'abagabe n'abategyeki b'omu nsi abaayeyombekyeire busya ebikaari omu matongo; 
Job3:15 nari nk'abategyeki abaabaire baine ezaabu, baijwize amaka gaabo efeeza;" 
Job3:16 nainga ahabw'enki enda yangye etararugiremu; nkaba nk'abeereere abazaarwa bafiire, batareebe mushana;" 
Job3:17 nkaza okwo ei enkozi z'ebibi ziba zitakigangiza bantu, kandi ei abaruhire baruhuukira;" 
Job3:18 ei embohe zigaramisiririza hamwe, zitakihurira iraka ry'orikuzikoresa;" 
Job3:19 n'ei abato n'abakuru batuura, omuhuuku atakitegyekwa mukama we?" 
Job3:20 Mbwenu omuntu ori omu naku ajwererwa ki omushana; n'abaine obujune bagumiraho ki? 
Job3:21 Abeetenga rufu kwonka etaije, bakagisherura okukira oku basherura eby'eitungo okuzimu;" 
Job3:22 abashemererwa munonga, bakeesiima, baareeba ekituuro?" 
Job3:23 Ahabw'enki omuntu otaine butooro, ou Ruhanga akumakumiire hamwe, ajwerwa omushana?" 
Job3:24 Manya ekyokurya kyangye ti kindi, kureka okutsinda; n'okuborooga kwangye nikwohoka nk'amaizi." 
Job3:25 Ahabw'okuba eki ndikutiina nikyo kirikumpikaho; n'ekirikuunyitsa obwoba nikyo kirikungwera. 
Job3:26 Tiinyine busingye, nobu kwakuba okutuuza. Enaku zimburize obuhuumure." 
Job4:1 Bwanyima Elifaazi Omuteemani akagarukamu Yobu ati: 
Job4:2 Omuntu ku yaakwehanga kugira eki yaakugambira okaaguubwa kubi? Nainga shi n'oha orikubaasa kwezibira kugamba? 
Job4:3 Reeba, okaba ohabura baingi, ohangaana ab'emikono etaine maani." 
Job4:4 Ebigambo byawe bikaba biramira orikwenda kugwa, kandi ohamya ab'entegye zibonzire." 
Job4:5 Mbwenu ku ohikiriirwe, waabura kugumisiriza! Ku ohikirweho, waahahaaza omutima!" 
Job4:6 Mbwenu shi okutiina Ruhanga kwawe tikukureetera okugira obwesigye? N'emitwarize yaawe ehikire tekureetera okugira amatsiko? 
Job4:7 Mbwenu teekateeka; harabaireho omuntu otaine rubanja, ngu yaahwerekyerera? Nari oine ahu orareebire abahikiriire nibacwekyerezibwa?" 
Job4:8 Nyowe eki naareebire n'eki: Abahinga ebibi, bakabiba enaku, nibyo bagyesha." 
Job4:9 Baitwa omwitsyo gwa Ruhanga, bamarwaho akasooroora k'ekiniga kye." 
Job4:10 Okutsinda kw'entare n'okutontoma kw'entare enshaarizi bihunama; kandi amaino g'ebibwana byazo gacweka. 
Job4:11 Entare y'amaani ku ebura eki yaita, efa; ebibwana by'entare enkazi bitaataana." 
Job4:12 Mbwenu hariho eki naagambiirwe bwesherekye, okutu kukakihurira omuntu naakihwihwitsa." 
Job4:13 Ku naabaire ndi omu biteekateeko by'ebi naayorekirwe nyekiro, ahu abantu bahirirwayo;" 
Job4:14 nkaitwa obwoba naatetema, kyareetera amagufa gangye kutengyeza." 
Job4:15 Omuzimu gwandaba omu maisho, ekikoba kyampwa aha mutwe." 
Job4:16 Gwayemerera aho; kwonka tinaayetegyereza oku gurikushusha. Waringa yandumbaara omu maisho, haabaho akaceceko. Bwanyima naahurira eiraka ririkugira riti:" 
Job4:17 Omuntu ofa naabaasa kuba ohikiriire omu maisho ga Ruhanga? Omuntu naabaasa kubura akamogo omu maisho g'Owaamuhangire? 
Job4:18 Nangwa n'abagaragwa be tabeesiga, na baamaraika be abeemeza ebishobyo." 
Job4:19 Mbwenu shi kaashwa abatuura omu maju g'eibumba, agu omusingi gwago guba omu mucuucu; abaribatwa bakatanga ekiyenje kubaruka?" 
Job4:20 Abafa bwaira bwasheesha, kandi abahwerekyerera hataine okyetaireho?" 
Job4:21 Mbwenu shi emigoye y'eihema ryabo ku ebanyukurwamu, tibafa bataine bwengye?" 
Job5:1 Mbwenu taka! Ebyo haine oraakugarukyemu? Omu barikwera n'oha ou waakwagira? 
Job5:2 Buzimazima ofiire-omutima niwe aitwa ekiniga; n'eihari riita otaine bwengye. 
Job5:3 Nkareeba omushema orikushusha oti ahamire; omu mwanya mukye nyowe naakyeena ahu arikuraara; 
Job5:4 abaana be batari buhooro, nibaribatiiririrwa omu irembo, bataine kijuna." 
Job5:5 Ebi ashaarwire nibiriibwa abaine enjara; batwara n'eby'omu mahwa. Reero abaine eiriho baruruuhira ebi atungire. 
Job5:6 Manya okubonabona tikuruga mu mucuucu, n'enaku tizitooka mu itaka;" 
Job5:7 Kureka omuntu azaarirwa okureeba enaku, nk'oku esasi zituumuuka aha iguru." 
Job5:8 Nyowe ahabwangye nkaayetaire omu mikono ya Ruhanga; mba niwe naayegyekyerera enaku zangye. 
Job5:9 Niwe akora ebintu bikuru ebitarikwetegyerezibwa, n'eby'okutangaaza ebitarikubarwa." 
Job5:10 Agwisiza ensi enjura, ashukyeerera emisiri amaizi." 
Job5:11 Atunguura ababundikirwe, ainamura abarikucura, bashemerererwa." 
Job5:12 Ahindura busha enaama z'engobya, ziremwa kuhitsya eki zirikukora." 
Job5:13 Akwatira abanyabwengye omu bugobya bwabo, n'enaama z'engobya zimarwaho juba." 
Job5:14 Babugabugana n'omwirima nyomushana, babandagira omu ihangwe nka nyekiro." 
Job5:15 Kwonka abataine baishebo abaiha omu maino gaabo, n'abakyene abaiha omu mikono y'ab'amaani." 
Job5:16 Enshoberwa zibona kugira amatsiko; n'enkozi z'ebibi ziigarwa akanwa. 
Job5:17 Manya omuntu, ou Ruhanga ahana, aba ahiiriirwe. N'ahabw'ekyo otagaya okuhana kw'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona." 
Job5:18 Manya Ruhanga ahutaaza, kwonka ashemba obuhuta; ateera, kwonka engaro ze zikiza." 
Job5:19 Aryakujuna obugwe mukaaga, nangwa n'omu bugwe mushanju." 
Job5:20 Enjara ku eriteera, aryakukiza orekye kufa. N'omu biro by'orugamba akukize okwitwa." 
Job5:21 Aryakurinda okubeihererwa n'okugambuurwa; reero hakibaho okucwekyerera okareka kutiina. 
Job5:22 Okucwekyerera n'enjara ku biriija, obishekyeerere, orekye kutiina enyamaishwa z'omu nsi." 
Job5:23 Manya oryaragaana endagaano n'amabaare g'omu musiri; enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa zigire naiwe obusingye. 
Job5:24 Oryamanya ku eka yaawe eri buhooro, n'omu matungo gaawe ku hataine kibuziremu." 
Job5:25 Kandi oryamanya ku baijukuru baawe bariba baingi, n'oruzaaro rwawe rukakanya nk'obunyaatsi bw'omu nsi." 
Job5:26 Oryaza omu kituuro waakuriire kimwe, nk'oku barunda ekitunda ky'oburo aha mbuga omu bunaku bwabwo." 
Job5:27 Reeba, ebyo nibyo tucondoorize, tukashanga biri eby'amazima. Mbwenu obihurire, kandi omanye ku birikukugasira." 
Job6:1 Bwanyima Yobu akagarukamu ati: 
Job6:2 Ai bambe! Nkaabaasibwa ki enaku zangye zirengwa, n'ebihikiirizi byangye byona biteebwa ahari minzaani!" 
Job6:3 Bikaaremeera okukira omusheenyi gw'omu nyanja. Nikyo kyandeetera kurahuka kugamba. 
Job6:4 Ahabw'okuba emyambi y'omushoboorozi w'ebintu byona encumitsire, yantaaha. Amagara gangye gabugirwe obushegu bwayo. Eby'okutiinisa bya Ruhanga bitengire orugamba kundwanisa." 
Job6:5 Hari enturegye ekunga yaahika obunyaatsi bw'omuroba, nari ente ejuga neerya obunyaatsi?" 
Job6:6 Ekitaine nsha kiriibwa kitarimu mwonyo, nari amaizi g'eihuri gabamu akanuzi?" 
Job6:7 Omutima gwangye tigurikwenda kubirozaho; nibinsusira nk'ebyokurya birikunugwa. 
Job6:8 Nkaabaasibwa ki, ntunga eki ndikushaba, Ruhanga ampa eki ndikwetenga;" 
Job6:9 Ruhanga aikiriza kunsingyeera; atayo omukono gwe ampuhura! 
Job6:10 Ekyo nikyo kyakumpuumuza, nkeesiima ndi omuri obu busaasi butarikutuuza. Ahabw'okuba tiinyangire ebi Ruhanga orikwera aragiire." 
Job6:11 Mbwenu nkiine maani ki g'okumbaasisa kutegyereza? Nari nimperera hi n'okugumisiriza? 
Job6:12 Mbwenu shi ngumire nk'eibaare, nainga omubiri gwangye ni nk'omuringa?" 
Job6:13 Buzimazima tinkiine geeyamba, kandi tiinyine w'okwagira, kumpwera." 
Job6:14 Otagirira mugyenzi we embabazi, aba atarikutiina Ruhanga." 
Job6:15 Beene waitu bambeereire endeebya nk'omugyera; baaba nk'omukura ogurabwamu amaizi, bwanyima gukooma." 
Job6:16 Ogwiraguzibwa amaizi gakwatsire, gukeesherekwamu orubaare," 
Job6:17 Hakibaho ekibiga bikahwerera, omushana gukijwa bikabura." 
Job6:18 Abagyenzi abaguraba aha rubaju, bakaguteishuka, bakaza omu ihamba, bakagwayo." 
Job6:19 Abagyenzi ba Tema bakaguma bagutegyereize, n'abatembeya ba Sheeba bagwineho amatsiko." 
Job6:20 Kwonka nobu baagwesigire bata, bakarugaho baatamwa; ahabw'okuba ku baabaire baguhikaho bashoberwa." 
Job6:21 Mbwenu naimwe nikwo mubaire ahariinye; ahabw'okuba ku mureebire naagwerwa akagwe, mwatiina." 
Job6:22 Ndabagizire nti: Mugire eki mwampa? Nari nti: Mugire ou mwaha enguzi ahabwangye? 
Job6:23 Nainga nti: Munjune ababisha? Nari shi nti: Nimuncungure, munkize abarikumbonabonesa?" 
Job6:24 Nimumpabure, haza mpuname. Nimummanyise oku naashobize." 
Job6:25 Ebishi ebi abahikiriire bagamba bihika aha njoka! Kwonka shi empaka zaanyu nizimpana ki? 
Job6:26 Nimwenda kumpana ahabw'ebi naagamba, haza ebi naagamba nyehwaire amatsiko biri omuyaga?" 
Job6:27 Ka muri nk'abarikuteerera efuuzi enteenyu kugihindura omuhuuku, nari abarikuramuza munywani waabo, ngu babone kwetungisa." 
Job6:28 Kwonka hati naabeeshengyereza, nimumpangye amaisho. Mbwenu nimbaasa kubabeiha nimundeeba?" 
Job6:29 Naabeeshengyereza, nimuhindukye. Murekye kukora ebitahikire, mukansingisiriza, ahabw'okuba mpikire." 
Job6:30 Mbwenu nyine eki naagamba ekishobire? Ebi ndeebire tibiinyetegyerezeise akagwe kangwereire? 
Job7:1 Omuntu okiri omu nsi, taba w'okukora emirimo erikurusya, ebiro bye bikaba nk'eby'omupakasi?" 
Job7:2 Nk'oku omuhuuku ayetenga ekicuucu, n'oku omupakasi ategyereza ebihembo bye;" 
Job7:3 naanye nikwo naahairwe ameezi g'okunshungisa, nkagabirwa ebiro by'okundeebesa enaku." 
Job7:4 Ku ndikuta ahansi orubaju, ngira nti: Nibusheesha ryari nkaimuka, Kwonka ekiro kigyenda eira. Ndaara niinyehindaguturana, burugaho butaagurikana." 
Job7:5 Omubiri gwangye gushwekirwe enyogori n'ebikoko, oruhu rwagwo rugangaire kandi rushatukire." 
Job7:6 Ebiro byangye nibyehuuta okukira ekyoma ky'okurukisa emyenda; bihwaho hatakiriho matsiko. 
Job7:7 Ijuka ku amagara gangye gari nk'omuyaga gurikuhuuha; amaisho gangye tigarigira bu gareebire ebirungi obundi. 
Job7:8 Omuntu hati orikundeeba tarindeeba bundi. 
Job7:9 Nk'oku ekicu kiyaayuuka kikabura, n'oshuuma okuzimu owa Nyamuteza nikwo atagaruka ruguru." 
Job7:10 Tagaruka mu ka ye bundi, n'abatwire nawe baba batakimumanya." 
Job7:11 Nikyo ntarikwezibirira kwashamya kanwa kangye, nkagamba obusaasi bwangye bw'aha mutima; nkeetongyeza nyine entimba aha mutima." 
Job7:12 Mbwenu nyowe ndi enyanja nari omugoye, waaza kuntaho ow'okundinda?" 
Job7:13 Ku ndikugira nti ekitanda kyangye ka kimpuumuze, n'ekitabo kyangye kintuubize obusaasi," 
Job7:14 Onkangisa n'ebirooto, ontiinisa n'eby'okworekwa;" 
Job7:15 ngu mbone kwihamu eky'okunigwa, nkafa, okukira okuguma mpwaire aha magufa." 
Job7:16 Ntamirwe amagara, tinkiri w'okugumaho. Ondekye; ahabw'okuba ebiro by'amagara gangye ni nk'orwanyaanya." 
Job7:17 Mbwenu omuntu ni ki, Iwe okumutunguura, okamwetaho." 
Job7:18 Tiiwe omushwijuma buri kasheeshe, okamugyeza buri kaanya?" 
Job7:19 Noohitsya hi okutaanyihaho eriisho, okandeka nkamira otucwante?" 
Job7:20 Ku ndaabe ncumwire, nkwitsize ki, Iwe otaruha kuguma otaire eriisho aha mitima y'abantu? Mbwenu ahabw'enki ompindwire ekimaasho kyawe, nkeeremeera nk'oyekoreire omutwaro?" 
Job7:21 Ekikuzibiire kunsaasira ekicumuro kyangye n'okuunyihaho ekibi ni ki? Reeba, naaza kubyama omu itaka. Haza onsherure; kwonka mbe ntakiriho." 
Job8:1 Bwanyima Bilidaadi Omushuuhi, akagarukamu ati:" 
Job8:2 Nooherera hi kugumizamu noogamba ebyo bintu; ebigambo byawe bikarigita nk'omuyaga mwingi? 
Job8:3 Noogira ngu Ruhanga asingisiriza? Nari Ow'obushoboorozi bwona aita emanja z'oburyo? 
Job8:4 Abaana baawe ku baraabe baamucumwireho, nikyo abarekyeire, bakagwa omu bibi byabo." 
Job8:5 Mbwenu iwe ku oraasherure Ruhanga, waayeshengyereza ow'Obushoboorozi bwona;" 
Job8:6 kandi ku oraabe otaine rubanja, ori ohikiriire; buzimazima nawe naija kwimuka, akujune, akugarurire eka yaawe eyaabaire ehikire." 
Job8:7 Ebi waatandikire nabyo, nobu biraabe byabaire biri bikye, kwonka eby'omu biro byawe ebya bwanyima biryaba bingi munonga." 
Job8:8 Na mbwenu ninkweshengyereza, oyebuuze ab'ebiro bya ira, oyetegyereze ebi baishebo baareebire." 
Job8:9 Manya itwe turi aba nyomwabazyo, titwine ki turikumanya ahabw'okuba ebiro ebi tumara omu nsi ni nk'ekicuucu." 
Job8:10 Mbwenu shi tibarikwija kukwegyesa, bakakutebeza, bakakugambira ebi baareebire?" 
Job8:11 Hari ebifunjo bikaamera ahataine kisharara, n'ebibingo bikurira ahataine maizi?" 
Job8:12 Manya ku biba nibikibengyeya, bitakahikire kutemwa, bibandiza ebindi bishaka kwoma." 
Job8:13 Omuheru gw'abeebwa Ruhanga nikwo guba gutyo; n'amatsiko g'otamutiina nikwo gahwaho. 
Job8:14 Eki arikwesiga kicuubwa busha nk'ehuuzi; n'eki agirira amatsiko ni nk'orububi rw'orutangura. 
Job8:15 Ku ayegamira enju ye, tehama, ku agikwatirira, tegumaho." 
Job8:16 Naabengyeya omu mushana nk'ekihambo; omurubo gwe gubuga omusiri gwe. 
Job8:17 Emizi ye erandira aha mutuumo gw'amabaare, ahamira aha nkiri." 
Job8:18 Ku aihwa omu mwanya gwe, gumwehakana nigugira guti: Tinkakureebaga." 
Job8:19 Okwo nikwo amagara ge gahwaho; omu itaka hakameramu abandi. 
Job8:20 Reeba, Ruhanga taryangira muntu otaine kamogo; kandi tariraamira nkozi z'ebibi." 
Job8:21 Kwonka obunaku butari obu, aryaijuza akanwa kaawe esheko; eminwa yaawe eteere akaari." 
Job8:22 Abarikukwanga baryaitwa enshoni; obutaaho bw'enyabibi bubure. 
Job9:1 Bwanyima Yobu akagarukamu ati: 
Job9:2 N'amazima! Nimmanya ku nikwo kiri. Kwonka omuntu naabaasa ata kuhakanisa Ruhanga, akasinga?" 
Job9:3 Manya ku haakugira owaayenda kumuhakanisa, takaabaasa kumugarukamu omurundi gumwe omuri rukumi." 
Job9:4 Agira omutima gw'obwengye n'amaani maingi; mbwenu n'oha oramugangaariire, akasingura?" 
Job9:5 Ogwo ohigura enshozi zitakimanyire, ku aba naazijuumika aine ekiniga." 
Job9:6 Otengyeetsa ensi, akagiiha omu mwanya gwayo, enyomyo zaayo zikatengyeeta." 
Job9:7 Oragiira eizooba, ritaturukye; okingira enyonyoozi zitaakye." 
Job9:8 Uwe wenka owaabambire eiguru, akaribatiirira ebingonzi by'enyanja." 
Job9:9 Owaahangire enyonyoozi zirikwetwa Dubu, ngabo ya Orioni, Kakaaga n'ebimbuuro by'ez'omu bukiizi-bwa-buryo." 
Job9:10 Okora ebintu bikuru ebitarikwetegyerezibwa n'eby'okutangaaza ebitarikubarwa. 
Job9:11 Reeba, andabaho, kwonka timmureeba; agumizamu, kwonka timmwetegyereza." 
Job9:12 Reeba, anyaga; kwonka n'oha owaakubaasa kumuzibira? Kandi n'oha owaakumugira ati: Ekyo nookora ki?" 
Job9:13 Ruhanga tarikwija kurekyera aho kugira ekiniga. Reeba, akasingyeera abakwatanisa na Rahabu." 
Job9:14 Mbwenu shi niinye naakugarukamu Ruhanga, nkeecwera ebigambo by'okumuhakanisa?" 
Job9:15 Nobu ndaabe ndi mwere, tindikubaasa kumugarukamu. Kureka eki nshemereire kukora, n'okumushaba, we orikunshinja; ansaasire." 
Job9:16 Nobu nkumweta, yaanyetaba, tinkaikiriza ngu yaahurira eiraka ryangye." 
Job9:17 Ahabw'okuba nansingyeeza eihunga, akanyisa obuhuta bwangye nantura busha." 
Job9:18 Tarikwija kundeka nkaitsya; kureka naanyijuza obushaarirwa. 
Job9:19 Mbwenu ku naakwenda kuhigana nawe, ka nankiza amaani! Ku naakwenda kumutabaariza, n'oha owaakumweta?" 
Job9:20 Nobu ndaabe ntaine rubanja, kwonka akanwa kangye kakaarunsingisa. Nobu naakuba ntaine ky'okuhaahuuzibwa, nabwo akaanyomesereza ku mpabire." 
Job9:21 Ahabwangye ndi mwere, tindikweyetaho, kureka amagara nigo gantamire." 
Job9:22 Byona nikyo kimwe. Nikyo ndikugirira nti: Acwekyereza abataine rubanja n'enkozi z'ebibi. 
Job9:23 Akagwe ku kagwa, abantu baafa kitaraariire, akuneetera owaaguubwaho ekihikiirizi otaine rubanja." 
Job9:24 Ensi yoona erekuriirwe enyabibi; haza uwe akwata abaramuzi aha maisho. Mbwenu ku araabe ataba we, ondiijo n'oha?" 
Job9:25 Ebiro byangye nibikiza omwiruki obwira; nibisyoka bitaine karungi ku bireebire. 
Job9:26 Nibihingura nk'amaato g'ebibaya aganguhi; nari nk'empungu erikuteera eki ehiigire. 
Job9:27 Ku naakugira nti: Ka nyebwe obusaasi bwangye, nshemuukye aha maisho, nshemererwe;" 
Job9:28 biri nimba ntiinire okureeba enaku; ahabw'okuba nimmanya ku otarikwija kuunyeta mwere. 
Job9:29 Nimba ndi ow'okusingwa orubanja. Mbwenu niinyeruhiza ki? 
Job9:30 Nobu naakwoga amaizi g'orubaare, engaro zangye nkazinaabisa na saabuuni," 
Job9:31 nabwo noonaga omu kiina ebijwaro byangye, nibinnuga." 
Job9:32 Manya Ruhanga ti muntu nkaanye, ngu naamugarukamu; ngu twaza kumwe omu iramuriro, twatongana." 
Job9:33 Ahabw'okuba tihariho w'okuturamura akatuteera aha mutwe; 
Job9:34 Ruhanga akarekyera aho kunteeza enkoni ye; ebye ebirikuunyitsa obwoba bikareka kuntiinisa. 
Job9:35 Haza nkabona kugamba ntarikumutiina. Manya tinkiri nk'okwangye. 
Job10:1 Ntamirwe amagara. Niinyija kugamba n'obusingye ekirikunsaasa; ngambisibwe obusaasi bw'aha mutima. 
Job10:2 Niinyija kugambira Ruhanga nti: Otansingisiriza; kureka onyorekye eki orikuntura. 
Job10:3 Mbwenu shi noogira ngu nikikubeera kirungi kumbonabonesa, okagaya eki waakoreise emikono yaawe; haza okasiima ebi enkozi z'ebibi zirikucuma kukora?" 
Job10:4 Iwe ogira amaisho g'omubiri; oreeba nk'oku abantu bareeba? 
Job10:5 Ebiro byawe ni nk'eby'omuntu ofa, nari emyaka y'amagara gaawe ni nk'ey'abantu," 
Job10:6 ngu obone kucondooza ebicumuro byangye, n'okucaaka ebibi byangye;" 
Job10:7 haza kunu noomanya ku ntaine rubanja, kandi ku hatariho orikukunjuna?" 
Job10:8 Engaro zaawe nizo zambumburukire, zikankora; mbwenu noonyehindukiriza kuncwekyereza." 
Job10:9 Ijuka ku wampangiise eibumba, mbwenu kandi nooyenda kungarura omu mucuucu?" 
Job10:10 Tiiwe wanshukire nk'amate, okankamya nk'amajuta;" 
Job10:11 okanshweka enyama n'oruhu, okanteeranisa amagufa n'emitsi;" 
Job10:12 okampa amagara, okankunda otampararukire, okandinda, nkagumaho?" 
Job10:13 Ebintu ebyo okabigumya aha mutima, kandi nimmanya ku nikyo waagyendereire." 
Job10:14 Ahabw'okuba ku ncumura, ommanya, kandi toonyihaho rubanja." 
Job10:15 Ku mba enyabibi, ndeeba enaku. Ku mba ohikiriire, nabwo tiinyimutsya mutwe: ahabw'okuba mba nyitsirwe enshoni, nindeeba oku ndikubonabona." 
Job10:16 Reero ku nyimutsya omutwe, ompiiga nk'entare, onkoraho eby'amahano;" 
Job10:17 onyimukiza busya baamushinja baawe kuunyomesereza; oyongyera kungirira ekiniga kingi, n'okumpururuza busya emigogo y'okunteera." 
Job10:18 Mbwenu okaanyihira ki omu nda ya maawe? Nangwa kuri naafiire hatakagizire riisho ryandeeba; 
Job10:19 nkaba nk'otakabahoga; nkaziikwa ninkiruga omu nda. 
Job10:20 Beitu shi ebiro by'amagara gangye ti bikye? Mbwenu ndeka, nshemererweho kakye;" 
Job10:21 ntakagiire ei ndiza ntagarukye omu nsi y'okurimbagirirwa n'omwirima ndindindi; 
Job10:22 ensi y'okurimbagirirwa n'okubura obuteeka, ei omushana guba nk'omwirima gw'omu itumbi." 
Job11:1 Bwanyima Zofari Omunaamati akagarukamu ati: 
Job11:2 Ebigambo by'orwanju bityo tibishemereire kugira owaabigarukamu? Kandi engambi ya maingi eti eshemereire kwihwaho orubanja? 
Job11:3 Egyo migambire yaawe eshemereire kuhunamisa abantu? Kandi ku oraagambe busha, habure owaakuteisa?" 
Job11:4 Reeba, noogira oti: Ebi ndikugamba bihikire, kandi oti: Ndi mwere omu maisho ga Ruhanga." 
Job11:5 Kwonka nkaabaasibwa ki Ruhanga agamba, akwomesereza;" 
Job11:6 akugambira emibonano ye ey'obwengye! Manya ebye tibyetegyerezibwa ngu byahwayo. Aho niho waakumanyiire ku Ruhanga akuhaire ekifubiro kikye ekitarikwingana n'ebicumuro byawe. 
Job11:7 Noogira ngu okabaasa kwetegyereza eby'amabanga ga Ruhanga n'okushoboorokyerwa okuhikiirira kw'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona okuhezayo? 
Job11:8 Ka kutumbeire okukira eiguru! Mbwenu okaagira ota? Ka kushuumire okuzimu okukira owa Nyamuteza! Mbwenu noobaasa ota kukimanya? 
Job11:9 Oburaingwa bwakwo nibukira ensi, n'obukiika bwakwo nibukira enyanja." 
Job11:10 Mbwenu ku yaakurabaho, yaata abantu omu kihome, yaabeeta kubacwera orubanja, n'oha owaakumuzibira?" 
Job11:11 Manya naamanya abantu abari entakimazire. Mbwenu ku akureeba ebitahikire, akaabyehuzya?" 
Job11:12 Kwonka enturegye ku yaakuzaara omuntu, omuntu otaine bwengye, nibwo yaakwetegyereza." 
Job11:13 Ku oraashemeze omutima gwawe, oryamutega emikono." 
Job11:14 Ku oraabe oine ebitahikire ebi okora, obyetantare, orekye kwikiriza ebibi kuguma omu maka gaawe." 
Job11:15 Buzimazima obwo nibwo orainamure amaisho gaawe, otaine ki orikuhaahuuzibwa, okahama, otarikutiina." 
Job11:16 Nibwo oryebwa enaku zaawe, okaziijuka nk'omutunga gwaheza kurabaho." 
Job11:17 Amagara gaawe garyamwamwatikana okukira omushana gw'omu ihangwe, eshaaha zaago z'omwirima zikaaka nk'ezomushekye." 
Job11:18 Kandi ahabw'okugira amatsiko, oryagira obwesigye; oryarindwa gye, ohuumure buhooro." 
Job11:19 Oryabyama, hatagire owaakutiinisa; baingi bakushabe okukuhakwaho." 
Job11:20 Haza amaisho g'enkozi z'ebibi gabwerabwere, babure obutooro, amatsiko gaabo gabe omwitsyo gw'aha muheru." 
Job12:1 Bwanyima Yobu akagarukamu ati: 
Job12:2 Buzimazima nimugamba nk'abantu; kandi ku murifa, obwengye bwanyu muryafa nabwo." 
Job12:3 Kwonka naanye niinyetegyereza nkaimwe; timurikunkira. 
Job12:4 Hati ndi orikushekyeererwa bagyenzi bangye. Nyowe owaabaire ashaba Ruhanga akangarukamu, ndi omuntu ohikire kandi otaine kamogo, mbwenu ninshekyeererwa." 
Job12:5 Omuntu ogogyeire tabura kugayira aha mutima abahikirweho ebihikiirizi. Haza byo biba byeteekateekire kugwera ab'entegye zitahamire. 
Job12:6 Reeba, amaka g'abanyagi gaine obusingye. N'abagwisa kubi Ruhanga, n'ebi basikura bikaba ruhanga waabo, bari buhooro." 
Job12:7 Kwonka buuza enyamaishwa, niziija kukwegyesa; n'enyonyi z'omu mwanya zikugambire." 
Job12:8 Nari buuza ebihangwa by'omu nsi, nibiija kukushoboororera, n'ebyenyanja by'omu mayanja bikumanyise." 
Job12:9 Omuri ebyo byona, ni kiiha ekitarikumanya ku Mukama ekyo niwe yaakikozire?" 
Job12:10 Niwe ategyeka amagara g'ebintu byona ebihuriire, n'omwitsyo gw'abantu boona." 
Job12:11 Mbwenu okutu tikumanya mutaano gw'ebigambo, n'akanwa tikataanisa bunuzi bw'ebyokurya?" 
Job12:12 Abagurusi nikwo bagira obwengye, n'abahikize emyaka mingi nikwo beetegyereza." 
Job12:13 Obwengye n'obushoboorozi bigirwa Ruhanga, kandi niwe ahabura, okeetegyereza." 
Job12:14 Ku asheenya, tihaine ogaruka kwombeka. Ku akingirana omuntu, tihariho obaasa kumwigurira." 
Job12:15 Ku acungira amaizi, gooma; ku agaigurira, ensi etabaarwa." 
Job12:16 Niwe agira amaani n'obwengye; kandi abagobezibwa n'abarikugobya baba abe. 
Job12:17 Abahi b'obwengye abubaaka, n'abaramuzi abahindura abashema." 
Job12:18 Akomoorora ebi abagabe beekomeise, abazirika obutanda omu manyaanya." 
Job12:19 Abahongyerezi abatwara bacwijwirwe, ab'amaani abacwa eishaija" 
Job12:20 Abarikwesigwa ababuza ebigambo, n'abakuru omu ihanga abaihaho okwetegyereza." 
Job12:21 Agayisa abategyeki, ayuzya orukoba rw'ab'amaani." 
Job12:22 Ashuuruura eby'okuzimu bikira omwirima, omwirima ndindindi agwakiza omushana." 
Job12:23 Atunguura amahanga, kandi agacwekyereza. Ahangusya amahanga, kandi agazaasya." 
Job12:24 Abategyeki b'amahanga g'omu nsi ababuza okwetegyereza, abazengyereza omu ihamba ritarimu muhanda." 
Job12:25 Babandagira omu mwirima batarikuhweza; abataruzisa nk'omusinzi. 
Job13:1 Manya eriisho ryangye ebyo byona rirabireebire; n'okutu kwangye kurabihuriire; naanye nkabyetegyereza. 
Job13:2 Ebi murikumanya naanye nimbimanya. Timwine ki murikunkiza. 
Job13:3 Kwonka nkaayenzire kugamba n'Omushoboorozi wa byona, nyetonganire ahari Ruhanga." 
Job13:4 Imwe nimwegambisa ebishuba kushwekyerera amazima. Mwena muri abafumu bataine mugasho. 
Job13:5 Mbwenu ku mwakuhunama mukaaba muri ab'obwengye! 
Job13:6 Hati nimuhurire ebi ndikufa, mutegye okutu ebi ndikwetonganira." 
Job13:7 Nimwenda kutonganira Ruhanga nimubeiha, kandi nimuryarya ahabwe?" 
Job13:8 Nimwija kugwera orubaju rwa Ruhanga, mumutonganire?" 
Job13:9 Mbwenu shi ku yaakubacaaka, bikaabagyendera gye? Ebyo nimubaasa kumubeiha nk'oku omuntu abeiha ondi?" 
Job13:10 Buzimazima ku muraagwere orubaju bwesherekye, naija kubakabukira." 
Job13:11 Ekitiinwa kye tikirikwija kubatiinisa akabaitsa obwoba? 
Job13:12 Ebigambo byanyu ebi murikuhamizaho bihwairwemu ensha nk'eiju; n'ebi murikwetonganira nibyatwa busha nk'eibumba. 
Job13:13 Nimuhuname, ngambe ekindi aha mutima. Haza ekiraabe nikimbaho, kimbeho." 
Job13:14 Nnene amaino, nyogye amagara." 
Job13:15 Reeba, nobu araanyite, tiinyine gandi matsiko, kureka niinyenda kwetonganira omu maisho ge mmugambire emitwarize yangye." 
Job13:16 Haza okwehangaana kwangye okwo nikwo kurantambire; ahabw'okuba nikimanywa ku otatiina Ruhanga atarihika mu maisho ge. 
Job13:17 Mbwenu nimutegye okutu ebi ndikugamba, muhurire ebi ndikubashoboororera." 
Job13:18 Reeba, naaherize kutebeekanisa ebi ndaayetonganire; kandi nimmanya ku ndikwija kusinga orubanja." 
Job13:19 Beitu n'oha owaakwemera kutongana naanye? Manya ku yaakwija, nyowe nkaahunama, nfa." 
Job13:20 Ninkushaba ompe ebintu bibiri byonka; obwo nibwo ntarikwija kukweshereka. 
Job13:21 Onyiheho omukono gwawe ogumpingamiire, orekye kuntiinisa, okaanyitsa obwoba." 
Job13:22 Reero onyete, naanye nkwetabe; nari onyikirize ngambe, haza naiwe ongarukyemu." 
Job13:23 Mbwenu ebicumuro byangye n'ebibi byangye ni bingahi? Mmanyisa ebicumuro byangye n'ebibi byangye. 
Job13:24 Ahabw'enki noonyima amaisho, okantwaza nk'omuzigu waawe?" 
Job13:25 Nooyenda kutiinisa eibabi ririkutwarwa omuyaga, n'okubinga ebishushunga?" 
Job13:26 Manya nontaho emanja zitaine Saasi, oguma nombarira ebicumuro by'omu butsigazi bwangye." 
Job13:27 Amaguru gangye ogataire omu nkomo, waata eriisho ahi ndikuraba hoona; waatooza ahi ndikukuura ekigyere." 
Job13:28 Haza omuntu acwanyagurika nk'ekintu kijunzire, aba nk'ekijwaro kiriirwe ebiyenje." 
Job14:1 Omuntu ozaarwa omukazi, amara ebiro bikye, kandi atuura aine enaku nyingi." 
Job14:2 Arabya nk'ekirabyo, haza ayoma; ahingura nk'ekicuucu, kandi tagumaho." 
Job14:3 Mbwenu omuntu ori otyo, okaabuuruura amaisho kumureeba? Nari nkaanye okandeeta omu maisho gaawe kuncwera orubanja?" 
Job14:4 N'oha owaakubaasa kwiha ekintu kirungi omu kintu kibi? Tihariho n'omwe. 
Job14:5 Nk'oku ebiro bye byamugyereirwe, n'omubaro gw'ameezi ge niiwe ogumanya, kandi waamuteereireho obugarukiro bu atarikubaasa kurenga," 
Job14:6 omwiheho amaisho, abone kuhuumuraho kakye, okuhitsya obu araaheze ebiro bye nk'orikukorera ebihembo." 
Job14:7 Manya ku otema omuti, oba oine amatsiko, ngu nigwija kutooka; kandi ngu tigurikwija kubura kugina." 
Job14:8 Nobu emizi yaagwo yaakukurira omu itaka, ekitsintsi kyagwo kikajundiramu;" 
Job14:9 kwonka ku kihikwaho amaizi kishebuka, kimera amataagi nk'omuti muto." 
Job14:10 Haza omuntu ku afa, ahwerwamu kimwe amagara, mbwenu ku ahwamu omwitsyo, aba akiri nkahi?" 
Job14:11 Nk'oku amaizi g'omu nyanja gaijururuka, n'ag'omu mugyera gakatuuba, gakooma;" 
Job14:12 nikwo omuntu arambira aha nsi ataimukyeho, okuhitsya obu eiguru ririhwaho, atasisiimukire, nobu kwakuba okugira owaamusisiimura." 
Job14:13 Nkaabaasibwa ki, onshereka okuzimu owa Nyamuteza; onshereka okuhitsya obu ekiniga kyawe kirihwa, onteeraho obunaku onyijuka!" 
Job14:14 Mbwenu omuntu ku afa, agira obu agarukire eruguru? Nyowe ebiro byona ebi ndaamare niinyehenenga, niinyija kuguma nyine amatsiko; okuhitsya obu obunaku bwangye bw'okurekurwa buraahikye." 
Job14:15 Obwo nibwo oraanyete, nkakwetaba, okenda kureeba eki waakoreise emikono yaawe." 
Job14:16 Mbwenu hati noobara entambwe zangye, kwonka obwo torigumya riisho ha bibi byangye." 
Job14:17 Ebicumuro byangye oryabikomera omu nshaho, n'okutahikiirira kwangye okushwekyeho." 
Job14:18 Nk'oku enshozi zihiguka, zikacweka obusaasingo; n'enkiri zikaihwa omu mwanya gwazo;" 
Job14:19 amaizi gakahwereza amabaare, emitunga ekatwara eitaka ry'aha nsi; naiwe nikwo omara omuntu amatsiko." 
Job14:20 Ebiro byona omukiza amaani, afa; omuhindura okundi aha maisho, omwohereza bwamperayo." 
Job14:21 Abatabani batunga ekitiinwa, atakikimanya. Ku bagarurwa ahansi, nabwo takimanya." 
Job14:22 Kureka obusaasi obu ahurira n'obw'omubiri gwe; n'amaganya gu agira, gaba ag'okwecurira wenka." 
Job15:1 Bwanyima Elifaazi Omuteemani akagarukamu ati: 
Job15:2 Omuntu w'obwengye ashemereire kugarukisamu ebigambo bitaine mujamo, akaijuza enda ye omuyaga gwa burugwa-izooba?" 
Job15:3 Ashemereire kuhakana naagamba ebitaine mugasho, nari naagamba ebitarikugasira bandi?" 
Job15:4 Iwe noozibira abantu kutiina Ruhanga n'okugira ebiteekateeko by'ahare omu maisho ge. 
Job15:5 Manya okutahikiirira kwawe nikwo kurikukugambisa, okakoresa orurimi rw'oburyarya." 
Job15:6 Akanwa kaawe niko karikukusingisa orubanja, atari nyowe. Eminwa yaawe neekushinja." 
Job15:7 Mbwenu niiwe waabandiize abandi kuzaarwa? Nari okazaarwa enshozi zitakabaireho? 
Job15:8 Orashitamire omu rukiiko rwa Ruhanga orw'omubonano, okabona kugira ngu niiwe oine obwengye wenka?" 
Job15:9 Noomanya ki itwe eki tutarikumanya? Nooyetegyereza ki, itwe eki tutarikushoboorekyerwa?" 
Job15:10 Reeba, omuriitwe harimu ab'enju n'abagurusi abarikukira sho." 
Job15:11 Mbwenu ebi Ruhanga arikukukorera naakuhuumuriza, noobyeta bikye, nari ebi abandi barikukugambira gye ahabwe noobigaya?" 
Job15:12 Ahabw'enki omutima gwawe nigukubambaaza, amaisho gakakutukura;" 
Job15:13 kikakureetera okugomera Ruhanga, n'okugamba ebintu nk'ebyo?" 
Job15:14 Ni muntu ki obaasa kuba oshemeire, n'owaazairwe omukazi, kuba ohikiriire?" 
Job15:15 Reeba, Ruhanga n'abarikwera tabeesiga, Nangwa n'eiguru omu maisho ge tirishemeire." 
Job15:16 Kaashwa omuntu ekihagaro owaasiisikaire, ogotomera ebibi nk'amaizi!" 
Job15:17 Mbwenu mpurira nkugambire, nkushoboororere ebi naareebire;" 
Job15:18 ebi abanyabwengye baagambire; 
Job15:19 ebi baishebo, abaahairwe ensi egi bonka, batagiibwemu munyamahanga weena, batarashekire." 
Job15:20 Omuntu enyabibi atuura naanyongororwa, aine obusaasi ebiro byona, emyaka yoona ei amara naabonabonesa abandi." 
Job15:21 Ebirikutiinisa biteerera enduuru omu matu ge. Nobu ariba agogyeire, omuhwerekyerezi aryamwizira kitaraariire." 
Job15:22 Tagira matsiko g'okuruga omu mwirima, kandi akateerwaho okwitwa." 
Job15:23 Azengyerera oku n'oku naasherura ebyokurya naabuuza ati: Biri nkahi? Obwo naamanya ku ekiro kye ky'okurimbagirirwa kiri haihi kumuhikaho. 
Job15:24 Enaku n'obujune bimutiinisa; bimusingura nk'omugabe oyeteekateekire kurwana orugamba. 
Job15:25 Ahabw'okuba aba abangiire Ruhanga omukono, naahaya Ow'obushoboorozi bwona." 
Job15:26 Naamwegyemera agangaire, akingire engabo y'eiromba rihango." 
Job15:27 Ngu ahabw'okuba omugomoko gumushwekire aha maisho, n'ebigojo bihingamiraine aha nyugunyu ze." 
Job15:28 Kandi atwire omu ndembo z'omushaka, omu maju agatakitaahwamu bantu; agaacumiirwe kuba emungo z'omu matongo." 
Job15:29 Taritunga; n'ebi atungire tibirigumaho, kandi taritsimba mizi mu itaka." 
Job15:30 Tarikira mwirima. Aryaba nk'omuti ogu amataagi gaagwo gookibwa omuriro, orurabyo rwagwo rukatuntumurwa omuyaga." 
Job15:31 Akaarekire kwesiga ebitaine mugasho naayebeiha; ahabw'okuba ebitaine mugasho nibyo biriba ebihembo bye. 
Job15:32 Aryazimuurirwa ebintu byona obunaku bwe butakahikire; ayome nk'amataagi agatagaruka kuba kijubwe. 
Job15:33 Aryaba nk'omuzaabibu ogu ebijuma byagwo biragarika bitakahiisize; abe nk'omuoliva ogukunkumura orurabyo. 
Job15:34 Ahabw'okuba oruzaaro rw'abatatiina Ruhanga ruba engumba; kandi omuriro gucwekyereza amaka g'abarya enguzi. 
Job15:35 Babaka eitima, bazaara obubi; n'emitima yaabo ecuma obugobya." 
Job16:1 Bwanyima Yobu yaagarukamu ati: 
Job16:2 Manya ndahuriire ebintu bingi nk'ebyo. Mwena muri abayaagi abarikureetera omuntu obusaasi. 
Job16:3 Ebi mwagamba ebitaine muhoho nibiherera hi? Nari ekyakureetera kungarukamu otyo ni ki? 
Job16:4 Naanye nkaagambire nkaimwe, mwaba muri nk'oku ndi. Nkaarundarunzire ebigambo by'okubahakanisa; mbazongoreza omutwe." 
Job16:5 Kwonka nkaabagumize n'ebigambo by'omu kanwa kangye, ngamba eby'okubahuumuriza, n'okubatuubiza aha busaasi." 
Job16:6 Ku naakugamba, obusaasi bwangye tibukaatuuza. Nari shi bwo, ku naakwegumya, nkaikaikanaho oburi kwingana ki?" 
Job16:7 Mbwenu ho Ruhanga andembize, yammaraho abangye boona." 
Job16:8 Oku ankwatsire nikwo kurikunshinja; n'okuhwa aha magufa kwangye okuunyimukiriire nikwo kurikuunyomesereza. 
Job16:9 Antaanyagwize anyiniire ekiniga kingi, yannenera amaino; omubisha wangye anzooreire amaisho." 
Job16:10 Abantu bansinikiire amaino banshugwitura nibanjuma, banteeraniraho kunteera." 
Job16:11 Ruhanga anshunikiire abatamutiina, yannaga omu mikono y'enkozi z'ebibi." 
Job16:12 Nkaba ndi aho ngaramisiriize, yampendagura, Yankwata ebitsya, yanjuguta, naacweka obusaasingo; yampindura ekimaasho kye;" 
Job16:13 abarasi be baanyehinguririza. Anshatwire entsigo tiyansaasira, yaasheesha endurwe yangye aha nsi." 
Job16:14 Anfumagwire; yaanyegyemera nk'omurwani emanzi. 
Job16:15 Omubiri gwangye ngubaziriire ebiguniya, naayeziringa omu mucuucu." 
Job16:16 Naarira, amaisho gantukura; ebitsigye byairirimba;" 
Job16:17 nobu engaro zangye zitakora by'obwinazi, n'okushaba kwangye kuba kurungi." 
Job16:18 Iwe nsi 'we, otatabika eshagama yangye, okutaka kwangye kurekye kutuuza." 
Job16:19 Na mbwenu reeba, omujurizi wangye ari omu iguru, n'omwema wangye ari okwo ahaiguru." 
Job16:20 Banywani bangye nibangaya, amaisho gangye gafukunkurira Ruhanga amarira;" 
Job16:21 ngu aikirize omuntu kumwetonganiraho, nk'omuntu na mutaahi we." 
Job16:22 Ahabw'okuba emyaka mikye ku erihwa, ndyatoora omuhanda gu ntarigaruka kureetwa." 
Job17:1 Omutima gwangye gugwire enshazi, ebiro byangye bihwaire, ekituuro kintegyereize." 
Job17:2 Buzimazima nyehinguririziibwe abarikunteerera enaku. Omwanya gu ndikumara nindeeba, omutima mba ngutaire aha bi barikunjuma." 
Job17:3 Hati ba niiwe waaba omukwato gwangye. Mbwenu n'oha owaakuunyemererera? 
Job17:4 Nk'oku obaitsire omutima, bakabura kwetegyereza, nikwo otarikwija kubaikiriza kusingura." 
Job17:5 Manya oreebya bagyenzi be ngu atungye ebyabo, abaana be baryabwerabwera." 
Job17:6 Ruhanga ampindwire ekigaaniiro ky'abantu, naaba ou barikucwera embutika." 
Job17:7 Ahabw'obusaasi amaisho gangye gashwekirwe oruho, engingo zangye zoona nizihwerera nk'ekicuucu." 
Job17:8 Abantu abahikire ekyo nibakitangaarira; otaine rubanja ayeteera ebinyomyo kurwanisa otarikutiina Ruhanga. 
Job17:9 Kwonka ohikiriire ahamira aha mitwarize ye, n'oine engaro zishemeire aguma naagira amaani." 
Job17:10 Mbwenu imwe mwena, nimugarukye mwije; kwonka tindikwija kubashangamu muntu w'obwengye." 
Job17:11 Ebiro byangye bihwaire, ebi mbaire ninteekateeka kukora, ebi omutima gwangye gwetenga, bifiire." 
Job17:12 Kwonka bagyenzi bangye ekiro nibakihindura nyomushana. Bagira bati: Buri haihi kuyangayanga, omwirima gukahwaho." 
Job17:13 Mbwenu ku naakwenda ngu okuzimu owa Nyamuteza ebe enju yangye, naayara ekitabo kyangye omu mwirima," 
Job17:14 naagira ekiina nti: Niiwe tata; n'enyogori nti: Niiwe maawe; nari nti: Niiwe munyaanyazi; 
Job17:15 obwo amatsiko gaangye gakaaba garahi? Kandi n'oha owaakugareeba? 
Job17:16 Tigarishuuma naanye, gakahika ei abaafiire batuura, nkaguma nago omu mucuucu?" 
Job18:1 Bwanyima Bilidaadi Omushuuhi yaagarukamu ati: 
Job18:2 Nimuherera hi n'okukyenguuza ebi murikugamba? Nimuteekateekye, haza tubone kugamba." 
Job18:3 Ahabw'enki nootutwaza nk'enyamaishwa, nootuteekateekaho nk'abataine bwengye?" 
Job18:4 Iwe orikwetaagura ahabw'ekiniga, noogira ngu ensi neija kuhwamu abantu ahabwawe, n'enkiri ziihwe omu myanya yaazo?" 
Job18:5 Manya etabaaza y'enkozi y'ebibi eraara, n'endimi z'omuriro gwe tizaaka." 
Job18:6 Okuhweza kw'omu nju ye kuba omwirima, n'etabaaza erikumwakiraho eraazibwa." 
Job18:7 Entambwe ze ndaingwa zicuubwa ngufu, n'amengye ge gamugwisa." 
Job18:8 Ahabw'okuba ebigyere bye nibyo bimugwisa omu kigoye, akagyendera aha busya." 
Job18:9 Omuriiti gumukwata ekitsintsiino, n'omwiniko gumuhamya." 
Job18:10 Bamutega ekifuruma omu itaka, bamuteera omutego ahu arikuraba." 
Job18:11 Ebirikutiinisa bimwitsa obwoba embaju zoona, bimubinga buguru ntegye." 
Job18:12 Enjara etuubya amaani ge, akagwe kaguma kategyereize kumugwera, yaateera entsibo." 
Job18:13 Endwara emumara oruhu aha mubiri, omujigaijo gwa rufu gushonshomera engingo ze." 
Job18:14 Bamuhuruutura omu ihema rye eri arikwesiga; bamukurura, bamutwarira omugabe w'ebirikutiinisa." 
Job18:15 Abatari be baguma omu ihema rye, obuganga bubuga ahu atwire." 
Job18:16 Emizi ye eyomera okuzimu, n'amataagi ge goomera eruguru." 
Job18:17 Ayebera kimwe omu nsi, habura owaamugambaho omu muhanda." 
Job18:18 Abingwa aharikuhweza, anagwa omu mwirima; kandi acwerwa kimwe omu nsi." 
Job18:19 Tagira mwana nari omwijukuru, nobu yaakuba emponoka yaatsigara ahi yaabaire atwire." 
Job18:20 Ebimugwera bitangaaza ab'oburengyerwa-izooba, biitsa obwoba ab'oburugwa-izooba." 
Job18:21 Buzimazima ebyo nibyo bigwera amaka g'enkozi z'ebibi, n'obutaaho bw'abateeta hari Ruhanga." 
Job19:1 Bwanyima Yobu akagarukamu ati: 
Job19:2 Nimuherera hi kuunyita kubi ni mumpendagura n'ebigambo? 
Job19:3 Mwahitsya emirundi ikumi nimunjuma. Hoona shi tikibaitsa nshoni okunkora kubi mutyo? 
Job19:4 Nangwa buzima nobu naakuba nyine eki nshobize, ekyo kishobyo niinye kyakugumireho." 
Job19:5 Nobu mwakuunyehimbisizaho, mwayema aha naku zangye kuunyomesereza," 
Job19:6 mumanye ku Ruhanga niwe akintaireho, akankubakubira omu kigoye kye." 
Job19:7 Reeba, ku ndikuborooga nti: Baanyita, habura owampuumuriza. Nkigira ou naatakira, habura owankorera eky'oburyo." 
Job19:8 Anyitiire omuhanda, tiinyine burabo. Emihanda yangye yaagishweka omwirima." 
Job19:9 Anyihireho ekitiinwa, yanjuura ekirunga aha mutwe." 
Job19:10 Ansheenyagwire embaju zoona, naahwaho, yaarandura amatsiko gangye nk'omuti." 
Job19:11 Kashanga ye embugumiireho, yantwaza nk'omubisha we." 
Job19:12 Engabo ze zihururiire hamwe, zaazitira eby'okungotesa zaateera ensiisira, zaayehinguririza eihema ryangye." 
Job19:13 Ruhanga antaaniise na beene tata, abarikummanya bambeera abanyamahanga." 
Job19:14 Beene waitu na banywani bangye b'aha mara bannagiriire. 
Job19:15 Abaabaire nibaija omwangye banzindukiire, baanyebirwe; abazaana bangye nibantwaza nk'ou batarikumanya; bandeeba nk'omunyamahanga." 
Job19:16 Nkyeeta omuheereza wangye, ayanga kuunyetaba, ngyemeserezibwa kumweshengyereza." 
Job19:17 Ntamirwe omukazi wangye, na beene maawe nibannuga." 
Job19:18 Nangwa n'abaana bato nibangaya; ku barikundeeba bangaaniiza. 
Job19:19 Banywani bangye boona ab'aha mara baanyangiire kimwe, n'abu naabaire nkunda baanyehindukiriize." 
Job19:20 Amagufa gangye garamataine n'oruhu n'enyama, ntsigaize amaino gonka." 
Job19:21 Imwe banywani bangye, nimungirire esaasi, nimungirire esaasi, ahabw'okuba omukono gwa Ruhanga gumpikireho!" 
Job19:22 Nimumpiigira ki, nk'oku Ruhanga ampiiganiise. Mbwenu oku ndikushusha tikurikubamara?" 
Job19:23 Nkaabaasibwa ki ebi ndikugamba bihandiikwa! Nkaabaasibwa ki biteebwa omu kitabo! 
Job19:24 Nkaabaasibwa ki bisharurwa aha rukiri n'akacumu k'ekyoma na risasi, bigumaho ebiro byona!" 
Job19:25 kwonka nimmanya ku Omucunguzi abaho, kandi ku aha muheru aryemerera aha itaka kuntonganira." 
Job19:26 Reero omubiri gwangye ku guriba gwahwerekyereziibwe, ndyareeba Ruhanga ntakigwine," 
Job19:27 mmwereebere; amaisho gangye gonka gatari g'ondi gamwetegyereze. Na mbwenu omutima gwangye nigugwa enshazi! 
Job19:28 Ku muraagire muti: Ebi shi nitwija kumuhiiga! Kandi muti: Ezi naku ze niwe zirikukomookaho; 
Job19:29 mwerinde rurara, ahabw'okuba ekiniga kireeta ekifubiro kya rurara. Reero mumanye ku haribaho okucwerwa orubanja." 
Job20:1 Bwanyima Zofari Omunaamati yaagarukamu Yobu ati: 
Job20:2 Mbwenu ebiteekateeko byangyemesereza kukugarukamu; nikyo naarahukira kugamba. 
Job20:3 Naahurira ebyagambwa bitangwisa gye; nikyo omutima gwangye gwampaburira kugira eki naagarukamu. 
Job20:4 Torikumanya okwiha ira omuntu yaaba kuteebwa omu nsi 
Job20:5 ku okwesiima kw'enyabibi kuhwaho juba, n'okushemererwa kw'abatatiina Ruhanga kuba okw'akaanya kakye?" 
Job20:6 Manya nobu atunguuka akahika omu iguru, omutwe gwe gukakora omu bicu;" 
Job20:7 kwonka aryahweraho kimwe nk'amazi ge; abaamureebire babuuze bati: Ari nkahi? 
Job20:8 Aryahuuyuuka nk'ekirooto abure kureebwa; abe nk'eki omuntu areeba nyekiro naaroota, kikamuguruka." 
Job20:9 Eriisho ryamureebire ritamureebe bundi, n'omwanya gu yaabaire arimu gutamubone bundi." 
Job20:10 Abaana be baryasheega abooro, engaro ze zigarureyo ebi atungire." 
Job20:11 Amagufa ge gaijwire amaani g'obutsigazi; kwonka garyarambira nawe omu mucuucu. 
Job20:12 Nobu araabe anurirwa ebibi, akabishereka ahansi y'orurimi rwe;" 
Job20:13 akeeganda kubireka, akabihunika omu kanwa," 
Job20:14 kwonka ebi ariire bimuhindukana omunda, bimushaarira nk'obushegu bw'encwera." 
Job20:15 Amira eby'obutungi, agaruka abitanaka, Ruhanga abiiha omu nda ye." 
Job20:16 Anyuunyuuta obushegu bw'encwera, aitwa orurimi rw'empiri." 
Job20:17 Tarigira bu areebire emigyera, nobu twakuba otugyera turikwitururuka obwoki n'amakamo." 
Job20:18 Ebyarugire omu bi yaahendekyeire aryabigarurayo, taribimira bikamuhika omunda. N'amagoba g'ebi yaashuubwire tigarimunanura." 
Job20:19 Ahabw'okuba akaita kubi abooro yaabatsiga baburaburiirwe, yaanyaga amaju agu atarombekire." 
Job20:20 Ahabw'omururu gwe ogutaine bugarukiro, tarirokora kintu kyona omu bi akunda." 
Job20:21 Ku yaariire, taine ki yaatsigire; nikyo okugogyeera kwe kutarigumiraho." 
Job20:22 Ku ariba aine ebintu bingi ebirikumunanura, aryakyena; enaku nyingi munonga zimuteeranireho." 
Job20:23 Okwigutsiza kimwe enda ye, Ruhanga aryamwoherereza kashanga ye, agimuteeze nk'enju, ebe niyo yaaba ebyokurya bye." 
Job20:24 Ku arihunga eky'okurwanisa ky'ekyoma, omwambi gw'omuringa gumucumite, gumwogyemu." 
Job20:25 Ku barigumukuura, gwamurugamu, obunwa bwagwo oburikumurinkana burugyeyo nibutoonya endurwe ye, aitwe obwoba." 
Job20:26 Eitungo rye rituura ribiikiirwe omwirima ndindindi; omuriro ogutaakibwa muntu guryamwokyeza kimwe, n'ebiritsigara omu nju ye gubimareho." 
Job20:27 Eiguru riryayerura ebicumuro bye, n'ensi emwimukirire." 
Job20:28 Eby'omu nju ye biryanyagwa, bihiminturwe aha izooba rya kashanga ya Ruhanga." 
Job20:29 Ogwo nigwo mugabo gu Ruhanga ariha enkozi y'ebibi; kandi nibwo buhunguzi bu yaamuteekateekyeire. 
Job21:1 Bwanyima Yobu yaagarukamu ati: 
Job21:2 Nimutegye okutu, muhurire ebi ndikugamba. Haza obwo nimuba muunyaagiire." 
Job21:3 Nimungumisirize, ngambe; reero ku ndaaheze, mugumizemu nimweshekyera." 
Job21:4 Ebyo nimugira ngu nyowe niinyetomboitera omuntu? Ekyakunzibira kugumisiriza niki? 
Job21:5 Nimundeebe, mushoberwe, engaro muzite aha munwa!" 
Job21:6 Naanye ku ndikwijuka ebyambaireho, ngira obwoba, engingo zitetema." 
Job21:7 Ahanki enkozi z'ebibi zigumaho, zihika omu ngingo za bukuru zikiine amaani?" 
Job21:8 Abaana baazo bahama zikiriho, n'oruzaaro rwazo rugumaho nizirureeba." 
Job21:9 Amaka gaazo tigaine ki gatiina, na Ruhanga tagira bu abateerize enkoni ye." 
Job21:10 Enimi yaabo eyemya, tehembya, ente zaabo zizaara, tizitorooga." 
Job21:11 Abeereere baabo babaseetura nk'obusyo bw'entaama; n'abaana baabo batirima. 
Job21:12 Beeshongorera aha ngoma empuuro n'amagobore, baashemerererwa okugamba kw'emikuri." 
Job21:13 Ebiro byabo babimara bagogyeire, barugaho baza okuzimu owa Nyamuteza bagwirwe gye." 
Job21:14 Bagambira Ruhanga bati: Turugyeho! Titurikwenda kumanya emitwarize yaawe. 
Job21:15 Ow'obushoboorozi bwona niwe oha, ngu tubone kumuheereza? Kandi ku turikumushaba, nitugasirwa ki?" 
Job21:16 Obwo shi enkozi z'ebibi okugogyeera kwazo tikuziri mu ngaro? Kwonka nyowe enaama z'enkozi z'ebibi tiinyine kakwate nazo. 
Job21:17 Mbwenu shi etabaaza y'enkozi z'ebibi eraaziibwe kangahi, ngu bagwerwe akagwe, na Ruhanga abareetere obusaasi aine ekiniga?" 
Job21:18 Ngu babe nk'ebinyaatsi birikutwarwa omuyaga, nari nk'ebishushunga birikutuntumurwa akasooroora?" 
Job21:19 Nimugira ngu Ruhanga aryafubira abaana b'enkozi z'ebibi, naabatura ebicumuro byazo. Ngaaha; k'abe nizo yaafubira, zibone kumanya ebibi byazo." 
Job21:20 Zibe nizo zaayereebera okucwekyerezibwa kwazo, zimanye kashanga y'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona." 
Job21:21 Mbwenu baryaba nibakyeeta aha b'emiryango yaabo abaribakurata bo batakiriho? 
Job21:22 Hariho oryegyesa Ruhanga obwengye, haza kunu niwe acwera ab'ekitiinwa emanja?" 
Job21:23 Manya hariho ofa akiine amaani ge goona, ari buhooro agaramisiriize;" 
Job21:24 omubiri gwe gugomokire, n'omushokooro gw'omu magufa ge niguyagayaga." 
Job21:25 Haza ondiijo afa aine obusaasi aha mutima, atakarozaga ha karungi." 
Job21:26 Kwonka bombi barambira omu mucuucu, bashwekwa enyogori." 
Job21:27 Reeba, nimmanya ebi murikuteekateeka, n'enaama ei muunyiniire kunkora kubi." 
Job21:28 Ahabw'okuba nimugira muti: Mbwenu enju y'omuntu rugambwa erahi? Eihema ri enkozi z'ebibi zaabaire ziraaramu, rirahi?" 
Job21:29 Kwonka timukabuuzaga bagyenzi, mukaikiriza ebi barikuhamya." 
Job21:30 Ngu enkozi y'ebibi ekira aha izooba ry'okugwerwa akagwe; kandi ngu erokoka aha izooba ry'okugirirwaho ekiniga kingi? 
Job21:31 Mbwenu n'oha owaakumuza omu kaso akamwomesereza emitwarize ye, nainga n'oha owaakumuhoora ahabw'ebi akozire?" 
Job21:32 Manya ku baba nibamutwara aha kituuro kumuziika abantu batarikubarwa bamushendekyereza bamuri omu maisho n'enyima; 
Job21:33 bamunagaho mpora-mpora akataka, kandi bataho ab'okurinda ekituuro kye." 
Job21:34 Mbwenu imwe nimubaasa muta kungumagumya n'ebitaine muhoho? Timukiine kindi ky'okungarukamu, kureka ebishuba." 
Job22:1 Bwanyima Elifaazi Omuteemani agarukamu ati: 
Job22:2 Omuntu naabaasa kugira eki yaagasira Ruhanga? N'ekya buzima omunyabwengye, obwengye bwe niwe bugasira." 
Job22:3 Noogira ngu iwe okuba ohikiriire kiine eki kirikunanura Ruhanga, nari emitwarize yaawe okutagira kamogo kiine eki kirikumugasira?" 
Job22:4 Ebyo okumutiina kwawe nikwo kumureeteire kukufubira n'okuza omu rubanja nawe? 
Job22:5 Mbwenu shi ebibi byawe ti bingi? Ebicumuro byawe ka birengyesereize. 
Job22:6 Reeba, okashabira busha beene waanyu emikwato; waacwijura abantu, waabatsiga bataine ki bajwaire."
