Job22:7 Abarikukooza tiwaabaha twizi, n'abaine enjara waabaima ak'okurya." 
Job22:8 Manya ab'amaani bakakubuura ensi, kwonka yaatuurwamu abarikukundwa." 
Job22:9 Okabinga abafaakazi baagyenda bataine ki baine, waahendagura emikono y'efuuzi." 
Job22:10 Nikyo emitego ekwehinguririize, ebihikiirizi birikutiinisa bikakutuntuza." 
Job22:11 Hati orimbagiriirwe, torikuhweza, omwegyemure gw'amaizi gukushwekire." 
Job22:12 Ruhanga tari okwo hare omu iguru? Reeba, n'enyonyoozi z'ahaiguru munonga ziba hare okwo owa herebe!" 
Job22:13 Haza ogira oti: Ruhanga naamanya ki? Oti: Naabaasa kwozya amaisho omu mwirima ndindindi, acwe orubanja?" 
Job22:14 Oti: Ebicu ebikwaitse bimukingiire, tarikubaasa kureeba; kandi oti naagyendera aha rukanga rw'eiguru." 
Job22:15 Nooyenda kugumizamu omuhanda gwa ira, ogu enkozi z'ebibi zaatoire?" 
Job22:16 Reeba, bakabakurwa, baatwarwa obunaku bwabo butakahikire; obuhamizo bwabo bwahiminturwa omutunga." 
Job22:17 Ahabw'okuba bakagira Ruhanga bati: Turugyeho! Mbwenu Ow'obushoboorozi bwona naabaasa kutugira ata? 
Job22:18 Haza we yaijuza amaju gaabo ebirungi. Kwonka nyowe enaama z'enkozi z'ebibi tiinyine kakwate nazo. 
Job22:19 Ekyo abahikiriire bakireeba, bashemererwa, n'abataine rubanja babashekyeerera nibabagaya." 
Job22:20 Nibagira bati: Buzimazima ababisha baitu bacwekyereziibwe, n'ebi batsigireho omuriro gubimazireho." 
Job22:21 Garukana na Ruhanga, obone kugira obusingye." 
Job22:22 Ikiriza ebi arikukuhabura, obigumye aha mutima." 
Job22:23 Ku oraagarukire Ow'obushoboorozi bwona oyebundikire, noija kuhama, kandi ku oraihe eby'okutahikiirira omu mahema gaawe," 
Job22:24 ezaabu waagyeta omucuucu, n'ezaabu ya Ofiri waagyeeta amabaare g'omu kagyera;" 
Job22:25 Ow'obushoboorozi yaaba ezaabu yaawe n'efeeza yaawe y'obuguzi bwingi; 
Job22:26 nibwo oraayesiimire omu W'obushoboorozi bwona, okajuumuura amaisho gaawe ahari Ruhanga." 
Job22:27 Okamushaba, nawe akakuhurira, reero okahikiiriza ebi waahigire." 
Job22:28 Nibwo oricwamu eki orikwenda kukora, kikakugyendera gye; omushana gukajwera emihanda yaawe." 
Job22:29 Manya Ruhanga abundika abeetunguura, kandi ajuna abataine ikuru." 
Job22:30 Arokora abataine rubanja. Naiwe naija kukurokora waaba oine engaro zitakoire. 
Job23:1 Bwanyima Yobu agarukamu ati: 
Job23:2 Na hati omutima gwangye gukiinyangiire; ahabw'okuba oku Ruhanga arikuunyasha, nikukira amaganya gangye." 
Job23:3 Nkaabaasibwa ki, mmanya ahu naakumushanga, mpika ahu asingami;" 
Job23:4 nta orubanja rwangye omu maisho ge, mmugambira ebi ndikwetonganira;" 
Job23:5 haza mmanya eki arangarukyemu, kandi nyetegyereza eki arikwenda kungambira!" 
Job23:6 Mbwenu ebyo akantonganisa naakoresa obushoboorozi bwe obwingi? Ngaaha, akaanyetaho." 
Job23:7 Manya okwo niyo omuntu ohikire yaakutonganira nawe; omuramuzi wangye akarucwa nkeetabaarukira. 
Job23:8 Reeba, ku ndikuza omu maisho, nshanga atariyo; nkigaruka enyima amburira;" 
Job23:9 nkimurondera aha rubaju rwa bumosho, ndemwa kumubona, nkihindukira aha rwa buryo, mbura kumureeba." 
Job23:10 Kwonka Ruhanga naamanya omuhanda gu ntoora. Ku ariheza kungyeza, ndyarugamu nshemeire nk'ezaabu." 
Job23:11 Ekigyere kyangye kihamiire omu kirari kye. Ngumire omu muhanda gwe tinkaguteishukire. 
Job23:12 Tinkarekire biragiro bi yaagambire, ntuura mbigumize aha mutima." 
Job23:13 Kwonka we tahinduka. Mbwenu owaakumuhindura n'oha? Manya eki ayenda, nikyo akora." 
Job23:14 N'ahabw'ekyo naija kuhikiiriza eki anteekateekyeire, kandi ebintu nk'ebyo bimuri aha mutima." 
Job23:15 Nikyo ndikutiinira kuza omu maisho ge. Ku ndikwongyera kukiteekateekaho, nyeyongyera kumutiina." 
Job23:16 Ruhanga agwisize omutima gwangye enshazi; Ow'obushoboorozi bwona antiiniise. 
Job23:17 Ahabw'okuba nyehinguririziibwe omwirima ndindindi, gwanshweka aha maisho. Kwonka tindikuhunamisibwa mwirima ndindindi ogunshwekire aha maisho, gukamunkingira." 
Job24:1 Ahabw'enki Ow'obushoboorozi bwona atarataireho bunaku bw'okucweramu orubanja; kandi ahanki abamwesiga batakamanyaga obwo bunaku? 
Job24:2 Reeba, abantu bakuura ebibyairwe ebirikubaatanisa, banyaga amasyo bagariisa." 
Job24:3 Bafunya endogoya y'otaine ishe, bakwatiriza ente y'omufaakazi." 
Job24:4 Babinga abakyene omu muhanda; abooro b'omu nsi boona beeshereka. 
Job24:5 Reeba, bashohora kwehenenga nk'enturegye z'omu ishwa; nibasherura eki baraitire omu ihamba kuba eky'okurya ky'abaana baabo." 
Job24:6 Barundaana omu ishwa obunyaatsi bw'amatungo gaabo, kandi bahumba omu musiri gw'emizaabibu y'enkozi y'ebibi." 
Job24:7 Baraara entangaare, bataine ki beeshwekire, kandi tibagira ky'okwefubika omu mbeho." 
Job24:8 Bajubibwa enjura y'omu nshozi, beekinga omu mabaare babuzire obwegamo." 
Job24:9 Hariho abashahura omwana otaine ishe naakyonka; bakakwatiriza omwereere w'omuntu omworo. 
Job24:10 Bagyendagyenda bari entangaare, bataine ki bajwaire, beekorera ebiba baine enjara." 
Job24:11 Bakamuurira amajuta g'emioliva omu misiri yaayo ey'enkozi z'ebibi; kandi banyuukira viino omu manyuukiro gaabo baine eiriho. 
Job24:12 Omu rurembo abarikufa batsinda, n'abahutaaziibwe baborooga, ngu babahe emikono; kwonka Ruhanga tayeta ha kutaka kwabo." 
Job24:13 Hariho abanga omushana, abatamanya mitwarize yaagwo; abeetantara emihanda yaagwo." 
Job24:14 Omwitsi aimuka omu kairima kwita omworo n'omukyene; kandi nyekiro aba omushuma. 
Job24:15 Eriisho ry'omushambani ritegyeereza orwita-waabo. Naagira ati: Tihariho orandeebe; kandi ayehindura okundi aha maisho. 
Job24:16 Nyekiro bafumura amaju, nyomushana beekingirana, tibamanya ei omushana gutaaha." 
Job24:17 Manya boona oku batura, omwirima ndindindi gubabeera nk'akasheeshe, ahabw'okuba baba bamanyiriire ebyagwo ebirikutiinisa." 
Job24:18 Imwe nimugira ngu bahiminturwa juba omwegyemure, ngu omugabo gwabo omu nsi n'omukyeeno, ngu tihariho munyuuki wa viino oza omu misiri yaabo y'emizaabibu." 
Job24:19 Ekyanda n'ekibiga ky'omushana nk'oku bihwereza orubaare, n'okuzimu owa Nyamuteza nikwo ehwerekyereza abasiisi." 
Job24:20 Ab'omu rurembo na baanyinabo babeebwa, amaziina gaabo gaba gatakiijukwa; bariibwa enyogori, bahwerekyererera kimwe. Kutyo okutahikiirira nikwo kurihendagurwa nk'ekiti." 
Job24:21 Barya eby'engumba etakazaarahoga, kandi tibagira ki bagasira omufaakazi." 
Job24:22 Kwonka Ruhanga ahabw'amaani ge abagumyaho; ku baba baayehwaire amatsiko, baimuka." 
Job24:23 Ruhanga abarinda, baba buhooro, kwonka aguma ataire eriisho aha mitwarize yaabo." 
Job24:24 Bamara akaanya abantu nibabateera eigundu, bwanyima bahanguura. Bagarurwa aha nsi, baihwa omu muhanda nk'abandi boona, bagyeshwa nk'obushiisha bw'engano." 
Job24:25 Ku kiraabe kitari kityo, n'oha oraanyomesereze ngu nimbeiha, akagira ngu ebi ngamba ni busha?" 
Job25:1 Bwanyima Bilidaadi Omushuuhi agarukamu ati: 
Job25:2 Obutegyeki n'ekitiinisa n'ebya Ruhanga. Niwe areetera ab'omu bukama bwe obw'omu iguru kugira obusingye. 
Job25:3 Ebyo amahe ge gakaabarwa? N'oha otajwerwa mushana gwe? 
Job25:4 Mbwenu obwo omuntu naabaasa ata kuba ohikiriire omu maisho ga Ruhanga? Owaazairwe omukazi naabaasa ata kuba oyezire? 
Job25:5 Reeba, nangwa n'okwezi tikurikumurinkana, n'enyonyoozi tizirikwera omu maisho ge." 
Job25:6 Reero kaashwa omuntu enyogori n'omwana w'omuntu omunyongororwa! 
Job26:1 Bwanyima Yobu agarukamu Bilidaadi ati: 
Job26:2 Ebishi waamanya kuhwera otarikweyamba! Ebishi waamanya kubangira omukono gutaine maani! 
Job26:3 Ebishi waamanya kuhabura omuntu otaine bwengye, kandi waagamba bingi munonga ebihikire!" 
Job26:4 N'oha owaakuhwera kugamba ebyo bigambo, kandi omutima gu waabigambisa n'ogw'oha?" 
Job26:5 Reeba, abaafiire nibatetemera okuzimu, amaizi n'ebigatuuramu nabyo nibitengyeza." 
Job26:6 Okuzimu owa Nyamuteza n'entangaare omu maisho ga Ruhanga, n'omu Ihwero teine kigimukingiire kugireeba." 
Job26:7 Akabamba eiguru ry'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho omu kangarateete, ensi yaagihanika ahari busha." 
Job26:8 Amaizi agakomera omu bicu bikwaitse, haza tigabibaganura." 
Job26:9 Ashweka okwezi kuri ekizooro, akushashaanuriraho ekicu kye." 
Job26:10 Amaizi akagateeraho obugarukiro, ahu okuhweza n'omwirima byatanira." 
Job26:11 Enyomyo zihangiriire eiguru zitengyeeta, zitangaarira okukabuka kwe." 
Job26:12 Akacureezesa enyanja obushoboorozi bwe, orukooko rwamwo yaarucumitisa obwengye bwe." 
Job26:13 Omwitsyo gwe gukareetera eiguru kuhweza, omukono gwe yaagucumitisa ekijoka kirikuhunga;" 
Job26:14 kwonka ebyo n'okugambaho bikye aha mitwarize ye kandi n'ebi tumuhuriraho ni bikye nk'okuhwihwitsa! Mbwenu okuhinda kw'obushoboorozi bwe n'oha orikubaasa kukwetegyereza? 
Job27:1 Bwanyima Yobu agumizamu ekiganiiro agira ati: 
Job27:2 Nindahira Ruhanga owaanyakire ebinshemereire, Ow'obushoboorozi bwona owandeeteire kugira obujune; nti:" 
Job27:3 Nk'oku nkirikwitsya, na Mutima wa Ruhanga naakiikiza omu nyindo zangye;" 
Job27:4 eminwa yangye teribeiha, n'orurimi rwangye tiruriryarya." 
Job27:5 Nikikabure, nyowe okugira nti muhikire. Okuhitsya obu ndifa, tindireka kuguma ndi otaine ki ashobize." 
Job27:6 Ndyaguma mpamize okuhikiirira kwangye, kandi tindikurekura. Ahu naahika, omutima gwangye tigwine ki gurikunshinja." 
Job27:7 Nkaahenwa ki, omuzigu wangye agwerwa ebigwera enkozi z'ebibi, n'orikuunyimukiirira aheebwa ekifubiro ky'abatahikiriire!" 
Job27:8 Mbwenu otatiina Ruhanga aba akiine matsiko ki, Ruhanga ku araamwiheho, yaamwaka amagara ge?" 
Job27:9 Ebyo ku arigwerwa akagwe, Ruhanga aryahurira okutaka kwe?" 
Job27:10 Aryashemerererwa Ow'obushoboorozi bwona, agume naatakira Ruhanga obunaku bwona?" 
Job27:11 Ka mbahabure ebi Ruhanga akora, kandi tindikwija kubashereka naama z'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona." 
Job27:12 Imwe mwena ku muraabe murabyereebeire, mbwenu ahabw'enki mubaire abataine mugasho?" 
Job27:13 Ogu nigwo mugabo ogu Ruhanga aha enyabibi, n'obuhunguzi obu orikuhata abandi aheebwa Ow'obushoboorozi bwona." 
Job27:14 Abaana be ku barikanya, baryagwa aha rugamba, n'abaijukuru tibaritunga byokurya by'okubamara enjara." 
Job27:15 Abarihonokaho we yaarugireho baryaitwa orufu, abafaakazi baabo bangye kubacurira." 
Job27:16 Nobu arirunda efeeza nyingi nk'omucuucu, akeerundira emyenda erikwingana ekirundo ky'eibumba." 
Job27:17 Eego, naabaasa kugirunda, kwonka ohikiriire niwe arigijwara; n'efeeza ze abataine rubanja nibo barizibagana." 
Job27:18 Enju ei arikwombeka ni nk'orububi rw'orutangura, nari nk'akaju aku omurinzi w'omusiri asharabaga." 
Job27:19 Abyama ari omutungi, kwonka tariba atyo bundi. Ku aza kubuuruura ati amaisho, ashanga ebi atungire biragyenzire." 
Job27:20 Ebirikwitsa obwoba bimuhimintukira nk'omutunga, nyekiro akasooroora kamutuntumura." 
Job27:21 Omuyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba gumwereeza, agyenda, gumukukumbira kimwe ahi yaaba ari." 
Job27:22 Ruhanga amujugutira ataine saasi, nobu onu yaakwenda kumwoga omu mikono kuhunga." 
Job27:23 Abantu beesiima nibateera omu kwahwa yaakumbagara, bamweshaanya ngu abarugyeho." 
Job28:1 Buzimazima efeeza egira ekinombe ki etimbwamu, n'ezaabu egira omwanya gu eshemezibwamu." 
Job28:2 Ebyoma bitimbwa omu itaka, n'omuringa guyagibwa omu butare." 
Job28:3 Abantu tibeeta ha mwirima, bagwogamu, bahika aha muheru gwagwo, nibasherurira obutare omu mwirima ndindindi." 
Job28:4 Batimba ebiina omu mpanga hare, n'ahu abantu bari beebwa abagyenzi, baza hare ei abantu batari, beecunda nibakora oku n'oku." 
Job28:5 Eitaka ryo rirugwamu ebyokurya, kwonka okuzimu yaaryo oshusha oti niritabuurwa omuriro." 
Job28:6 Enkiri zaayo zirimu amabaare g'emyengyengye ya bururu, n'ezaabu y'orusheregyenyu." 
Job28:7 Ogwo muhanda tigumanywa mpungu, n'eishamba tirikagureebaga." 
Job28:8 Enyamaishwa z'eigundu tizikaguribatamuga, n'entare tekagurabamuga." 
Job28:9 Omuntu akununkirira eibaare ry'enkangabuye, arimiirira enshozi, azijuumika." 
Job28:10 Afumura emihanda omu nkiri, eriisho rye rireeba ibara kintu eky'obuguzi bwingi." 
Job28:11 Aigaza enshuro z'emigyera ngu zirekye kujwa, ebyesherekiremu bibona kureebwa." 
Job28:12 Mbwenu obwengye bukaazoorwa hi? N'ei okwetegyereza kutuura ni nkahi? 
Job28:13 Omuntu tamanya buguzi bwabwo, kandi tibushangwa mu nsi y'abahuriire." 
Job28:14 Okuzimu egira eti: Tiburi muriinye; n'enyanja eti: Tiinye mbwine. 
Job28:15 Tibuhingisibwa zaabu, n'efeeza tekaarengwa ekahitsya obuguzi bwabwo." 
Job28:16 Tibwinganisibwa n'ezaabu ya Ofiri omu buguzi, nari n'amabaare marungi g'ebisooni, nobu gaakuba ag'emyengyengye ya bururu." 
Job28:17 Ezaabu n'ebirahuri tibibaasa kwingana nabwo, kandi tibukaahingisibwa amahunde g'ezaabu nungi munonga." 
Job28:18 Korali na keristalo tibikaagambwa, obuguzi bw'obwengye nibukira obw'eruuru." 
Job28:19 Topaazi ya Etiopiya terikwinganisibwa nabwo, nobu kwakuba okubwinganisa n'ezaabu empuuhe omu buguzi." 
Job28:20 Mbwenu shi obwengye buruga hi? N'okwetegyereza kutuura hi? 
Job28:21 Butuura busherekirwe abantu boona abahuriire, kandi butarikumanywa enyonyi z'omu mwanya." 
Job28:22 Eihwero na rufu nibigira biti: Turabuhuriireho n'amatu gaitu nibabugambaho. 
Job28:23 Ruhanga niwe amanya omuhanda oguza ei buri, kandi niwe amanya ahi buri." 
Job28:24 Ahabw'okuba we anaga amaisho aha mperu z'ensi, areeba byona ebiri ahansi y'eiguru." 
Job28:25 Manya obu yaaha omuyaga oburemeezi bwagwo, akarengyesa amaizi endengo," 
Job28:26 obu yaateeraho enjura ekiragiro, akateeraho omurabyo gw'enkuba omuhanda." 
Job28:27 Obwo nibwo yaabureeba akamanyisa omugasho gwabwo akabucondooza, akabuhamya." 
Job28:28 Akagambira abantu ati: Okutiina Mukama nibwo bwengye; n'okutaana n'ekibi nikwo kwetegyereza. 
Job29:1 Bwanyima Yobu akagumizamu ekiganiiro kye, yaagira ati:" 
Job29:2 Nkaabaasibwa ki, mba nk'oku naabaire ndi omu meezi agaahingwire, nk'omu biro ebi Ruhanga yaabaire nandiindiramu!" 
Job29:3 Obu etabaaza ye yaabaire neenyakira aha mutwe, ekandabya omu mwirima nimpweza." 
Job29:4 Obu naabaire nkigogyeire; Ruhanga akiine omukago n'eka yangye. 
Job29:5 Obu Ow'obushoboorozi bwona yaabaire akiri hamwe naanye, abaana bangye baanyehinguririize." 
Job29:6 Ahi naaribata, ndibata omu mate, n'enkiri ziinyitururukira amajuta g'emioliva." 
Job29:7 Obu naabaire nshohora nkaza omu irembo ry'orurembo, nkata ekitebe kyangye ahu abantu bateeranira." 
Job29:8 Abatsigazi bakindeeba bakampigiza, n'abagurusi bakaimuka, bakeemerera." 
Job29:9 Abantu abategyeki omu ihanga bakaceceka, bakata engaro aha munwa." 
Job29:10 Abakungu bakahunama, endimi zikabaramata aha nkanka." 
Job29:11 Obu abaabaire bampurira, baabaire baanyeta omuhiirwa, abarikundeeba, bakakihamya." 
Job29:12 Ahabw'okuba nkaba njuna abooro barikutaka, n'efuuzi zitaine kihwera." 
Job29:13 Orikwenda kufa nanshabira omugisha; naanye ninteera abafaakazi omuhimbo kweshongora bashemereirwe. 
Job29:14 Obu naabaire njwara okuhikiirira, kukampika, obwinganisa bwangye bukampumbika nka bushuuti n'ekikwemba ky'omu mutwe." 
Job29:15 Niinye naabaire ndeebesa empumi, nkagyendesa ebirema." 
Job29:16 Nkaba ishe w'abooro n'abu ntarikumanya, nkababuuza ekirikubasaasa." 
Job29:17 Nkaba mpigura emba z'abantu enkozi z'ebibi, mbanagisa ebi baine omu maino." 
Job29:18 Nibwo naabaire nteekateeka nti: Ndyagwa omu kyashuri kyangye, nkanyise ebiro byangye nk'omusheenyi." 
Job29:19 Emizi yangye erandire omu maizi, n'amataagi gangye garaare nigatondwaho orume." 
Job29:20 Ekitiinwa kyangye kigume kihundiriire, n'obuta bwangye busya bungume omu ngaro." 
Job29:21 Obwo abantu bakaba bantega okutu bategyereize, baguma bacecekire, ngu mbahe obwengye." 
Job29:22 Nkiheza kugamba, habura owaagaruka kuteeza. Ebi naagamba bibashenenekyeraho gye." 
Job29:23 Bakaba bantegyereza nk'abarikutegyereza enjura, baine ekihika nk'eky'abahingi bategyereize enjura ya katumba." 
Job29:24 Nkaba mbashekyera beehweire amatsiko, okushemererwa kwangye kubagaruramu amaani." 
Job29:25 Mbaihiramu eki baraakore, mbashutamamu ndi omukuru waabo, ntuura nabo nk'omugabe ori omu ngabo ze, mba nk'orikugumagumya abarikucura." 
Job30:1 Kwonka mbwenu abu ndikukiza obukuru, abu naakugayire baishebo ngu batahikaana n'embwa ezirinda obusyo bwangye, nibangaaniiza." 
Job30:2 Mbwenu abo bantu bahwairwemu amaani, emikono yaabo ekangasira ki?" 
Job30:3 Ahabw'obukyene n'enjara bakuuhwire, baaguga eitaka ryomire ry'omu ihamba." 
Job30:4 Baashoroma emifura n'amababi g'ebishaka, baarya n'enkonya z'ebinyagashani." 
Job30:5 Nibabingwa omu bantu, enduuru ebajuga enyima nk'abashuma." 
Job30:6 Baba ab'okuraara omu nsa z'emitunga, omu maaya g'omu itaka n'omu nyanga z'omu nkiri." 
Job30:7 Nibakungira omu bishaka nk'endogoya, bamiganira omu bicuragyenyi." 
Job30:8 N'abaana b'ebifamutima, b'abantu bataine ku bari, abaabingirwe omu nsi n'omunyaafu." 
Job30:9 Hati niinye mbaire ekyeshongoro kyabo, n'ekintu ky'okucuubwaho enfumu." 
Job30:10 Nibannuga, baanyetantara, batarikutiina kuncwera embutika." 
Job30:11 Manya Ruhanga areegwire obuta bwangye, yancwa eishaija, tibaakingirira kashoni." 
Job30:12 Aha rubaju rwangye rwa buryo nyimukiriirwe ebyo bizahambuki, bambinga bamburabuza." 
Job30:13 Baanyitira emihanda, baayongyerera enaku zangye, haabura orikubazibira." 
Job30:14 Baija nk'abarikureetwa ahasheenyukire munonga, baayekumbagaza, bangwera." 
Job30:15 Ebirikutiinisa biinyehindukiririize, ekitiinwa kyangye kihwaireho nk'ekituntumwirwe omuyaga; obugogyeere bwangye bwahuuyuuka nk'ekicu." 
Job30:16 Mbwenu omutima gumpwaire omunda, ninsiiba nyitsirwe enaku." 
Job30:17 Nyekiro ndaara amagufa gaanyogiremu, obusaasi oburikumpurura butarikutuuza." 
Job30:18 Ku burikuunyimukiirira n'amaani, ebijwaro byangye bisiisikara; bunniga nk'ekitogi ky'ekanzu yangye." 
Job30:19 Ai Ruhanga onnagire omu byondo, naaba nk'omucuucu n'eiju." 
Job30:20 Ku ndikukutakira oyanga kungarukamu, nkyemerera, oyanga kuunyetaho." 
Job30:21 Ompindukiire enshaarizi, wampiiganisa n'omukono gwawe gw'amaani." 
Job30:22 Noonyimutsya nza eruguru y'omuyaga, ogutembesa; onnaga oku n'oku n'eihunga ry'amaaani." 
Job30:23 Eego, nimmanya ku orimpitsya aha kufa, nkaza omu mwanya ogu waateekateekyeire abahuriire boona." 
Job30:24 Kwonka shi omuntu ku aba abandamiirwe enju, ari omu kabi, taimutsya mukono, akaborooga ngu bamujune?" 
Job30:25 Tindacuzire hamwe n'abari omu naku, nari tindasaasiibwe booro?" 
Job30:26 Kwonka ku naabaire nyenda ebirungi, haija ebibi, nkitegyeereza omushana, haija omwirima." 
Job30:27 Omutima gwangye tigutebeekaine, kandi tigutuurize; ahabw'okuba ebiro by'okubonabona bimpikireho." 
Job30:28 Ningyenda ncuncubaire, ntaine w'okumpuumuriza; nkihika ahu abantu bateeraniire, mbashaba obuhwezi." 
Job30:29 Mbwenu zaamuha nizo beene waitu, na zaamaaya nizo bagyenzi bangye." 
Job30:30 Omubiri gwangye gwiragwire gwayonoka; n'amagufa gangye gacumikirwemu omuriro. 
Job30:31 Nikyo eigobore ryangye rihindukiire ery'okucura; omukuri gwangye gukaba ogw'okuteerera abarikurira. 
Job31:1 Nkahiga ngu amaisho gangye tindigahanga mwishiki. Mbwenu nimbaasa nta kumwetenga. 
Job31:2 Hari obwo nkaatunga mugabo ki kuruga ahari Ruhanga ow'omu iguru; kandi obuhunguzi bwangye oburikuruga aha w'Obushoboorozi bwona ahaiguru bukaaba buuha? 
Job31:3 Ebihikiirizi tibyo bigirwa abatahikiriire, n'akagwe kakagwera enkozi z'ebibi?" 
Job31:4 Ruhanga tiwe areeba emigyendere yangye, akabara entambwe zangye zoona?" 
Job31:5 Ku ndaabe ndagyenzire nimbeiha, nkeehuuta ninza kuryarya," 
Job31:6 k'andengye omu rurengo ruhikire, areebe amazima gangye." 
Job31:7 Ku ndaabe ndateishukire omuhanda, omutima gwangye gukaruruuhira ebi naareeba, nainga engaro zangye ku ziraabe zirakoire," 
Job31:8 ninkabibe, ondiijo akarya; n'ebi naahingire nibikakuurwe." 
Job31:9 Omutima gwangye ku guraabe gurahugiire aha mukazi, kandi ndagwereire aha rwigi rwa mutaahi wangye;" 
Job31:10 omukazi wangye naakaseere ondiijo mushaija, n'abandi bakamujuumarira." 
Job31:11 Ahabw'okuba ekyo kikaabaire ekicumuro kihango munonga; ekibi ky'okureetera omuntu kufubirwa abaramuzi. 
Job31:12 Kikaabaire omuriro ogwokyeza kimwe, gukahika n'omu Ihwero; kiba omuriro ogurikurandura byona ebi nyerize." 
Job31:13 Ku ndaabe ndangire kuhurira orubanja rw'omuhuuku wangye, nari rw'omuzaana wangye, baanyizireho nibantonganisa," 
Job31:14 ndyagira nta, Ruhanga ku ariimuka; nari ku arikimbuuza, ndyamugarukamu ki?" 
Job31:15 Owampangire omu nda ya maawe tiwe yaahangire n'ogwo? Kandi tiwe omwe owaatubumburikire omu nda? 
Job31:16 Mbwenu shi hariho obu ndaimire omworo eki arikwenda; nari obu ndamazire amatsiko omufaakazi? 
Job31:17 Nainga hariho obu ndariire akokurya akangye nyenka, efuuzi etakariireho?" 
Job31:18 Kureka okwiha omu buto bwangye omworo nkamworora nka ishe, n'omufaakazi naamureeberera okwiha obu naaruga omu nda ya maawe." 
Job31:19 Ku ndaabe ndareebire omuntu naafa ahabw'okuburwa ekijwaro, nari omworo abuzire eky'okweshweka," 
Job31:20 ntamuhe ky'okwezirika, akansiima, akatagatsibwa ekijwaro ky'ebyoya by'entaama zangye;" 
Job31:21 ndaimukiize efuuzi omukono omu iramuriro ngu niho naareeba abarikugwera orubaju rwangye; 
Job31:22 ku kyakuba kityo, eibega ryangye nirikataane n'orwano; n'omukono gwangye gukanyukukamu." 
Job31:23 Manya nkaba ntiina munonga Ruhanga kunfubire, ntarikubaasa kwemera kumureeba aine ekitiinisa." 
Job31:24 Ku ndaabe ndataire amatsiko omu zaabu, nkeeta ezaabu empuuhe obwesigye bwangye;" 
Job31:25 ku ndabe ndeesiimire ahabw'eitungo ryangye kuba ringi, nari ngu omukono gwangye guntungiise bingi;" 
Job31:26 ku ndaabe ndahangire amaisho eizooba ririkwaka, nari okwezi kurikugyenda nikumurinkana;" 
Job31:27 haza bikantwara omutima nkanywegyera engaro zangye kubiramya; 
Job31:28 nakyo kikaabaire ekibi ekireetera omuntu kufubirwa abaramuzi; ahabw'okuba nkaabaire ntari mwesigwa ahari Ruhanga ow'omu iguru. 
Job31:29 Ku ndaabe ndeesiimire ngu ahabw'okuba orikuunyanga yaafa, nari okwekiita, yaguubwaho akabi," 
Job31:30 nyowe tinkacumuraga kumukyeena nimwendeza okufa. 
Job31:31 Hariho obu ab'omu ka yangye batakabuuzaga bati: Okwo hariyo otakaigutsire nyama? 
Job31:32 Reeba, tihariho muhinguzi oraraire omu kihandagazi. Nyowe ntuura niinyigurira abagyenzi." 
Job31:33 Kuri naabaire ndi nk'abandi bantu, nkaasherekire ebishobyo byangye," 
Job31:34 mbimirira enda, ahabw'okutiina munonga ekimbuuro ky'abantu, n'okutiina kugaywa ab'emiryango yaitu; mpunama, kandi ndeka kushohora." 
Job31:35 Nkaabaasibwa ki hagira owampurira! Reeba, ebi naagamba byona n'eby'amazima. Ruhanga Omushoboorozi wa byona nangarukyemu! Nangwa kuri nyine orubanja oruhandiikirwe omwangizi wangye," 
Job31:36 buzimazima nkaaruheekire aha mabega; ndujwara nk'ekisingo. 
Job31:37 Nkaashoboororeire Ruhanga emitwarize yangye yoona, mmuhika ntaine bwoba, nk'omunyiginya." 
Job31:38 Enshambu yangye ku eraabe erandurumiire, n'ebihabura byamwo birarizire kumwe;" 
Job31:39 ku ndaabe ndariire ebyeziremu ntabiihuriire; nari naareeteire bakama baayo kufa," 
Job31:40 amatojo nigakameremu omu mwanya gw'engano, n'orumbugu rukameramu omu mwanya gwa baale." 
Job32:1 Mpaho abo bashaija bonshatu baarereerera aho kugarukamu Yobu, ahabw'okuba uwe akaba naayemanya ku ari omuntu ohikiriire." 
Job32:2 Elihu mwene Barakeeli Omubuuzi ow'ab'omu muryango gwa Raamu, nikwo kuguubwa kubi. Akagwerwa kubi Yobu, ahabw'okuba akeeyeta ohikire okukira Ruhanga." 
Job32:3 Kandi yaagirira ekiniga banywani ba Yobu bonshatu, ahabw'okubura eky'okumugarukamu. Ekyo kyamususira oti baikiriza ku Ruhanga niwe ashobize." 
Job32:4 Elihu uwe akaba ategyereize kugira eki yaagambira Yobu; ahabw'okuba bo bakaba bari bakuru, nibamukira." 
Job32:5 Mbwenu Elihu ku yaareebire abo bashaija bonshatu baabura eky'okugarukamu, yaagira ekiniga." 
Job32:6 Elihu mwene Barakeeli Omubuuzi nikwo kubagira ati: Nyowe ndi muto, imwe muri abagurusi. Nikyo ntiiniire; obwoba bukanzibira kubagambira eki ndikuteekateeka." 
Job32:7 Nkagira nti: Ab'emyaka yairiireyo ka babe nibo baagamba; abagurusi babe nibo baahanuura eby'obwengye. 
Job32:8 Kwonka ekyetegyerezesa omuntu, n'omutima ogumurimu omwitsyo gw'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona." 
Job32:9 Kitari kugira ngu abahikize engingo za bukuru nibo banyabwengye nari ngu abagurusi nibo bamanya ekihikire. 
Job32:10 Nikyo ndikubagirira nti: Nimuntegye okutu, naanye, mbagambire eki ndikuteekateeka." 
Job32:11 Reeba, obu mwaba nimusherura ebi muraagambe, naaguma ntegyereize nimukigamba, ntegire okutu ebigaaniiro byanyu by'obwengye." 
Job32:12 Naataho omutima kubahurira; kwonka tihaabaho n'omwe omuriimwe owaahakanisa Yobu, nari okumugarukamu." 
Job32:13 Mwerinde mutakaagira muti: Niitwe tuzoire obwengye. Ruhanga wenka niwe arikubaasa kumusinga, kwonka atari muntu." 
Job32:14 Ebi yaaba naagamba tiinye yaaba naahakanisa. Naanye nikyo ntarikwija kumugarukiramu ninkoresa ebi mwagamba. 
Job32:15 Iwe Yobu, reeba, aba baashoberwa baabura eky'okukugarukamu; tibaakiine ky'okugamba." 
Job32:16 Mbwenu kandi ntegyereze ngu ahabw'okuba bahunami, beemereire aha batakiine ky'okugarukamu?" 
Job32:17 Naanye ka ngire eki naagarukamu, ngambe ekindi aha mutima." 
Job32:18 Manya nyine bingi by'okugamba, nimpurira ningyemeserezibwa." 
Job32:19 Reeba, omutima gwangye guri haihi kubaruka nka viino etaine bwikizo, nari nk'endyanga za viino y'omutahe." 
Job32:20 Ka ngambe nkaitsya, nyashame, haza ngire eki naagarukamu." 
Job32:21 Tindikwija kugwera rubaju rw'omuntu n'omwe, nobu kwakuba okugira ou naashunga." 
Job32:22 Manya nyowe timmanya kushunga. Ahabw'okuba ku naakukikora Omuhangi wangye akaanyita ahonaaho. 
Job33:1 Mbwenu Yobu, nyaabura 'we hurira ebi naaza kugamba; otegye okutu ebi ndaagambe byona." 
Job33:2 Reeba, naaza kugamba ekindi aha mutima." 
Job33:3 Ebigambo byangye nibyoreka ku omutima gwangye gugororokire; n'ebi ndaagambe ku biri eby'amazima. 
Job33:4 Mutima wa Ruhanga niwe yampangire, kandi omwitsyo gw'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona nigwo gumpa amagara." 
Job33:5 Mbwenu ku oraabe noobaasa, ngarukamu. Tebeekanisa gye ebigambo byawe, haza ompakanise." 
Job33:6 Reeba, nyowe omu maisho ga Ruhanga ndi nkaiwe; Naanye nkabumbwa omu itaka." 
Job33:7 Omuriinye tiharimu kirikutiinisa, ekyakukwitsa obwoba, kandi tindikwija kukurusya." 
Job33:8 Buzimazima ebi obaire noogamba mbihuriire, byangwa omu kutu." 
Job33:9 Noogira oti: Ndi mwere, tiinyine ki ndashobize; Ndi oshemeire, omuriinye tiharimu kibi." 
Job33:10 Oti, Ruhanga niwe ayerondeire obwiho bw'okuunyeihaho, akantwaza nk'omuzigu we." 
Job33:11 Nikyo ateeraire ebigyere byangye omu nkomo, akaguma ataire eriisho aha mitwarize yangye yoona." 
Job33:12 Reeba, omuri ebyo tohikire. Ka nkugarukyemu: Ruhanga naakira abantu." 
Job33:13 Mbwenu ahabw'enki noomwomesereza noogira oti: Ebi naagamba taine ki araagarukyemu? 
Job33:14 Manya Ruhanga agambira omu muringo gumwe nari ogundi; omuntu nobu araabe atarikukyetegyereza. 
Job33:15 Omu kirooto n'omu kworekwa kwa nyekiro, abantu baahirwayo, bagwejegyereire omu bitanda byabo;" 
Job33:16 nibwo aigura abantu amatu, akabateisa naabatiinisa;" 
Job33:17 ngu abone kuteishura omuntu ebibi bi arikwenda kukora, amuzibire kwetunguura." 
Job33:18 Amurinda okugwa omu Kiina, n'amagara ge okutahwerekyerezibwa rurara." 
Job33:19 Omuntu kandi ahanwa obusaasi, ari aha kitanda kye, naahururwa omu magufa obutaitsya." 
Job33:20 Atyo atamwa ebyokurya, nobu kwakuba okwoya ebirikunura munonga." 
Job33:21 Ahururuka, enyama zimuhwaho, amagufa ge agaabaire gatarikureebwa, gatunama." 
Job33:22 Ahika haihi n'Ekiina, n'amagara ge gairirira abahwerekyerezi." 
Job33:23 Mbwenu ku haakubaho maraika w'okumutonganira, nangwa omwe omuri rukumi, ow'okwija kumanyisa ogwo muntu ebimushemereire," 
Job33:24 yaamugirira embabazi, yaagambira Ruhanga ati: Mujune, atagwa omu Kiina, naabona eky'okumucungura." 
Job33:25 K'omubiri gwe gugarukye kuba muto nk'ogw'orikunyeeta, agire amaani nk'agu yaabaire aine akiri omutsigazi." 
Job33:26 Obwo nibwo omuntu yaakushaba Ruhanga, akamwikiriza, akaija omu maisho ge ashemereirwe, Akamanyisa abantu eby'okujunwa kwe." 
Job33:27 Akagambira butunu omu maisho gaabo ati: Nkacumura, naashobya ebyabaire bihikire; kwonka Ruhanga tiyaakintura." 
Job33:28 Antambiire tinaagwa mu Kiina; amagara gangye garyareeba omushana. 
Job33:29 Reeba, ebyo byona Ruhanga abikorera omuntu kabiri nari kashatu," 
Job33:30 kumwiha omu Kiina, ngu abone kumwakiza omushana gw'amagara." 
Job33:31 Mbwenu Yobu, taho omutima, otegye okutu, haza ohuname, ngambe." 
Job33:32 Ku oraabe oine eky'okugamba, ngarukamu. Gamba, ahabw'okuba niinyenda kukwihaho orubanja." 
Job33:33 Ku oraabe otakiine, ntega okutu ohuname, haza nkuhabure obwengye." 
Job34:1 Bwanyima Elihu yaagira ati: 
Job34:2 Imwe banyabwengye 'mwe, abaine eki murikumanya, nimuntegye okutu, muhurire ebi ndikugamba." 
Job34:3 Manya okutu kwetegyereza ebigambo, nk'oku enkanka emanya obunuzi bw'ebyokurya" 
Job34:4 Ka twetooranire ekihikire, tweihiremu ekirungi." 
Job34:5 Yobu agizire ati; Tiinyine rubanja, kureka Ruhanga niwe anyakire ebinshemereire." 
Job34:6 Nobu ndaabe mpikire, niinyetwa omunyakishuba. Nobu ndaabe ntaine ki ncumwire, obuhuta bwangye ti bw'okukira." 
Job34:7 Mbwenu ni muntu ki ori nka Yobu orikugotomera okugaya nk'amaizi? 
Job34:8 Orikukwatanisa n'enkozi z'ebibi, akagyenda hamwe n'abantu enyabibi." 
Job34:9 Manya agizire ati: Okushemerererwa Ruhanga tikwine ki kurikugasira muntu. 
Job34:10 N'ahabw'ekyo, imwe bantu barikwetegyereza 'mwe, nimumpurire. Nikikabure Ruhanga okukora ekintu kibi; Ow'obushoboorozi bwona okukora ekitahikire." 
Job34:11 Manya atura omuntu ebi akozire, kandi amureetera okuhikwaho ebishemereire emitwarize ye." 
Job34:12 Buzimazima Ruhanga tarikora kubi, Ow'obushoboorozi bwona tarikora bitari by'oburyo." 
Job34:13 Mbwenu n'oha owaamuhaire ensi kugirinda, nari n'oha owaamwekoreize ensi yoona?" 
Job34:14 Manya ku akwegarurira Mutima we n'omwitsyo gwe," 
Job34:15 ebiine omubiri byona bikaacwekyererera kimwe, omuntu agaruka omu mucuucu." 
Job34:16 Ku oraabe nooyetegyereza, tega okutu eki ndikugamba, okihurire." 
Job34:17 Noogira ngu orikwanga obwinganisa aryategyeka? Mbwenu noija kusingisa orubanja Ohikiriire kandi Ow'obushoboorozi? 
Job34:18 N'oha orikubaasa kugambira omugabe ati: Toine mugasho, nari abakungu ati: Muri babi." 
Job34:19 Otarikugwera rubaju rw'abategyeki, otarikweta ha bantungi okukira abooro, ahabw'okuba boona niwe yaabahangire?" 
Job34:20 Bafa omu kaanya kakye; omu itumbi abantu batetema, bagyenderayo, ab'amaani baihwaho bataitsirwe mukono gw'omuntu." 
Job34:21 Manya atuura ataire eriisho aha mitwarize y'omuntu, kandi areeba emigyendere ye." 
Job34:22 Tihariho kibunda nari omwirima ndindindi ahu enkozi z'ebibi zirikubaasa kweshereka. 
Job34:23 Manya Ruhanga tagira kyetengo ky'okuteeraho omuntu obunaku bw'okwija omu maisho ge kumucwera orubanja. 
Job34:24 Ahendagura ab'amaani atabuuririize, haza omu mwanya gwabo atamu abandi." 
Job34:25 Ahabw'okumanya ebi barikukora, abajuumika nyekiro, bacwekyerera." 
Job34:26 Abateerera omu maisho g'abantu naabatura ebibi byabo," 
Job34:27 ahabw'okuba bakareka kumukuratira, tibaayeta ha mihanda ye yoona." 
Job34:28 Batyo baareetera abooro kumuhitsyaho okuhooga kwabo, kandi yaahurira okutaka kw'abarikubonabonesibwa." 
Job34:29 Mbwenu ku yaakuguma ayehunamiire, n'oha owaakugira ngu ashobize; kandi ku yaakwesangira ahamaisho n'oha owaakumureeba, yaaba ihanga nari omuntu?" 
Job34:30 Ngu omuntu otarikutiina Ruhanga atakaategyeka, akanaga abantu omu mutego." 
Job34:31 Mbwenu hariho oragizire Ruhanga ati: Mpanirwe, tindigaruka kucumura?" 
Job34:32 Mpabura ebi ntarikwetegyereza; ku ndaabe naacumwire, tindikigarukira bundi?" 
Job34:33 Noogira ngu Ruhanga, iwe ahabw'okumwangira, naija kukuzimuurira nk'oku orikwenda? Ekyo niiwe oshemereire kukyetooranira, atari nyowe. Mbwenu gamba eki orikumanya." 
Job34:34 Abantu abarikwetegyereza n'omuntu ow'obwengye orikumpurira, nibaija kungira bati:" 
Job34:35 Yobu naagamba ebi atarikumanya, ebigambo bye ti by'obwengye." 
Job34:36 Nkaahenwa ki Yobu agyezibwa okuhika aha muheru! ahabw'okuba naagarukamu nk'abantu enyabibi. 
Job34:37 Manya aha bibi bye naayongyeraho obugomi, atuteerera omu ngaro naatweraatira, akanyisa ebi arikugamba naahakanisa Ruhanga." 
Job35:1 Elihu akagaruka yaagira ati: 
Job35:2 Nooteekateeka ngu kihikire okugira oti: Omu maisho ga Ruhanga ndi ohikire? 
Job35:3 N'okubuuza Ruhanga oti: Ebibi byangye nibikwitsa ki? Kandi okutakora bibi kwangye kungasiire ki? 
Job35:4 Mbwenu naaza kukugarukamu hamwe na bagyenzi baawe. 
Job35:5 Naga amaisho oreebe eiguru, oyetegyereze ebicu ebitumbeire okukukira." 
Job35:6 Kuri waasiisire okaabaire omwitsize ki? N'ebicumuro byawe ku byakukanya, biine oku byakumugira?" 
Job35:7 Ku oraabe ori ohikiriire, nooba omuhaire ki? Nari nooba omutambiire ki?" 
Job35:8 Ebibi byawe nibisaasa omuntu nyabuntu nkaiwe; n'okuhikiirira kwawe niwe kurikugirira omugasho. 
Job35:9 Abantu baingi munonga ku baitwa kubi, batakira ab'okubaha emikono kubajuna ab'amaani abarikubahata." 
Job35:10 Kwonka tihariho ogira ati: Ruhanga owampangire arahi, oreetera abantu kweshongora barimbagiriirwe." 
Job35:11 Otwegyesa bingi, tukakira enyamaishwa z'omu nsi; tukakiza enyonyi z'omu mwanya obwengye." 
Job35:12 Nobu bataka, Ruhanga tabahurira ahabw'okushangwa bari enkozi z'ebibi nibeetunguura." 
Job35:13 N'ekya buzima Ruhanga tahurira barikurizibwa busha, kandi Ow'obushoboorozi bwona tabeetaho." 
Job35:14 Kaashwa iwe orikugira ngu tomureeba; orubanja rwawe ruri omu maisho ge, kandi ngu omutegyereize!" 
Job35:15 Mbwenu ahabwa Ruhanga kutafubira aine ekiniga, n'ahabw'okuteeta munonga ha bicumuro;" 
Job35:16 nikyo Yobu arikwashamira akagamba busha, akafukunkura ebigambo bitarimu bwengye." 
Job36:1 Elihu akagumizamu, yaagira ati:" 
Job36:2 Ngumisiririzaho kakye, nkworekye, ahabw'okuba nkiine ebi ndikwenda kugamba ningwera orubaju rwa Ruhanga." 
Job36:3 Niinyija kwiha hare ebi ndikumanya, nimpamya ku Omuhangi wangye ahikiriire." 
Job36:4 Ahabw'okuba buzimazima ebi ndikugamba ti bishuba, ogwo, oine okumanya kuhikire, ari hamwe naiwe." 
Job36:5 Reeba, Ruhanga aba Ow'obushoboorozi, kandi tagira ou agaya; ayetegyerereza kimwe ebintu byona." 
Job36:6 Taikiriza nyabibi kugumaho, kwonka abarikubonabonesibwa abaha ebibashemereire." 
Job36:7 Taiha maisho aha bahikiriire, kureka abashutamya n'abagabe aha bitebe ebiro byona, batunguuka." 
Job36:8 Ku baba babataire omu mihama, bababoheise emirunga y'okubabonabonesa," 
Job36:9 abagambira butunu ebi barikukora n'ebi bacumwire ku babikoreise amaryo. 
Job36:10 Abaigura amatu kuhurira ebi arikubahabura, kandi abaragiira kureka kukora ebibi." 
Job36:11 Ku bamuheereza, bamara ebiro byabo bagogyeire, n'emyaka yaabo bagimara bagwirwe gye." 
Job36:12 Kwonka ku banga kumuhurira, baitwa rurara, bafa bataine ki barikumanya." 
Job36:13 Abatatiina Ruhanga bagumya ekiniga aha mutima; ku ababoha, tibamutakira ngu abajune." 
Job36:14 Bahenderwa omunyeeto, muheru y'amagara gaabo eba okuhemuka." 
Job36:15 Kwonka abarikubonabona, Ruhanga abajunira omu kubonabonesibwa kwabo, abaigura amatu ahabw'okureeba enaku." 
Job36:16 Ruhanga akakwiha omu naku, waagaramisiriza otafundiriziibwe, ebyabaire biteebwa aha meeza yaawe bikaba biba biijwire ebishaju." 
Job36:17 Kwonka hati reeba, noocwera enyabibi orubanja. Mbwenu naiwe okucwerwa orubanja rw'oburyo n'obwinganisa kwakukwata." 
Job36:18 Yerinde, kashanga etakaakureetera omugayano; kandi otaikiriza eby'obutungi bwawe kukuteishura omuhanda." 
Job36:19 Mbwenu noogira ngu okucura kwawe nikwija kukutambira enaku, nari shi, amaani gaawe goona nigo garaazikukize?" 
Job36:20 Oteetenga ekiro kiri eki amahanga gariihirwaho kimwe. 
Job36:21 Oyerinde otakaagaruka kukora ebibi, ahabw'okuba nibyo osiimire okukira okubonabona." 
Job36:22 Manya Ruhanga aine obushoboorozi bwingi. Mbwenu ni mwegyesa ki owaakumwerenga? 
Job36:23 N'oha oramuhabwire oku araatwaze; nari n'oha owaakumugira ati: Waashobya? 
Job36:24 Ijuka okusingiza ebi yaakozire, ebi abantu beeshongora." 
Job36:25 Abantu boona bakabireeba, baabirangiza hare." 
Job36:26 Manya Ruhanga aba mukuru, kwonka itwe titumumanya. Emyaka ye terikubaasa kubarwa." 
Job36:27 Niwe ainamura amatondo g'amaizi, gakaba orwanyaanya oru aihamu enjura" 
Job36:28 ekagwa neeruga ahaiguru, ekasheeshekyera abantu." 
Job36:29 Mbwenu hariho orikubaasa kumanya oku ebicu bibuga hoona, n'oku enkuba ehindira omu kisanga kye?" 
Job36:30 Reeba ataataanisa omurabyo gumwehinguririza, kandi ashweka okuzimu y'enyanja." 
Job36:31 Ahabw'okuba ebyo nibyo akoresa naacwera amahanga orubanja, kandi nibyo ahaisa abantu ebyokurya bingi." 
Job36:32 Engaro ze azishwekyesa enkuba, agiragiira kuteera ahi yaagyoreka." 
Job36:33 Okuhinda kwayo kworeka oku aba ow'eihato, akagirira ebibi ekiniga." 
Job37:1 Kandi ebi nabyo nibireetera omutima gwangye kutetema n'okwesikura. 
Job37:2 Nimuhurire okuhinda kw'eiraka rya Ruhanga n'okurigita kw'omu kanwa ke. 
Job37:3 Akwohereza, kubuga eiguru ryona; n'okutyankana kw'emirabyo ye kuhika aha mbaju zoona z'ensi." 
Job37:4 Ku kuhwa, eiraka rye rigamba, arigitsa eiraka rye ry'ekitiinisa. Kandi ku rihurirwa, tazibira murabyo kutyankana." 
Job37:5 Ruhanga ahindisa eiraka rye omu buryo burikutangaaza; akora ebintu bikuru, ebi tutarikubaasa kwetegyereza." 
Job37:6 Agira orubaare ati: Gwa aha nsi! Agira orutoonyerera n'enjura ati: Mugwise amaani! 
Job37:7 Azibira abantu kuba barekire emirimo yaabo; ngu boona bamanye ebi arikukora. 
Job37:8 Enyamaishwa ziza omu bweshereko bwazo, ziguma omu maaya gaazo." 
Job37:9 Omuyaga gw'akasooroora guruga obukiizi-bwa-buryo; n'embeho enyababa ereeterwa obwa bumosho. 
Job37:10 Omwitsyo gwa Ruhanga gureetera amaizi kukwata, n'amaizi gakwatana aha ruguru yaago." 
Job37:11 Ekicu kikwatsire akiijuza omurombe, ebicu bibuzya hoona emirabyo ye." 
Job37:12 Ekora oku n'oku, nk'oku arikugihabura; ngu ebone kuhikiiriza byona ebi yaagiragiira omu nsi etuurwamu abantu." 
Job37:13 Ebyo abiikiriza kubaho ahabw'okuhana abantu; nari ahabw'okwitirira ensi ye, nainga ahabw'embabazi ze." 
Job37:14 Iwe Yobu, hurira eki, ba orekire, obanze oteekateekye aha by'okutangaaza ebi Ruhanga akora." 
Job37:15 Ebyo noomanya oku Ruhanga abiteeraho ekiragiro, akaragiira omurabyo gw'omu kicu kye kutyankana?" 
Job37:16 Noomanya okuzeereera kw'ebicu ku kuri omurimo ogu Ruhanga akoresa obwengye burikutangaaza? 
Job37:17 Iwe, ou ebijwaro biitsa empiita, ensi yaagira obucureera ahabw'omuyaga gw'omu bukiizi-bwa-buryo," 
Job37:18 noobaasa kubamba eiguru nkawe, rikaguma nk'endeeberwamu eheesirwe?" 
Job37:19 Otwegyese eki turaamugambire, ahabw'okuba turimbagiriirwe, titurikubaasa kutebeekanisa ebi turaagambe." 
Job37:20 Ebyo bakaamugambira ku ndikwenda kugamba nawe? Mbwenu shi iwe, omuntu areetengire kumarirwaho kimwe?" 
Job37:21 Reeba, na hati abantu tibarikubaasa kureeba omushana gurikujwera ahaiguru, omuyaga gwaheza kuhingura, gwakinguura ebicu." 
Job37:22 Aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho niharugayo ekirikwengyengyeta nk'ezaabu; Ruhanga ajwaire obukuru burikwitsa obwoba. 
Job37:23 Ow'obushoboorozi bwona titurikubaasa kumuhika. Ni mukuru, aine obushoboorozi n'obwinganisa, kandi ahabw'okuba ahikiriire kimwe, tarikubaasa kutura muntu busha." 
Job37:24 Nikyo abantu bamutiinira; ahabw'okuba tayeta ha bantu abeemanya ku bari abanyabwengye. 
Job38:1 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagarukamu Yobu naayema omu muyaga gw'akasooroora yaamubuuza ati: 
Job38:2 N'oha ogwo orikuzibira enaama zangye kwetegyerezibwa, naagambisibwa ebitarimu?" 
Job38:3 Yezirikye mashaija, nkubuuze, haza ongarukyemu." 
Job38:4 Okaba orahi, obu naataho obuhamizo bw'ensi? Ku oraabe nooyetegyereza, kingambire." 
Job38:5 N'oha owaataireho orugyero rw'obuhango bwayo, ningira ngu noomumanya! Nari shi n'oha owaagigyereise omugoye?" 
Job38:6 Omusingi gwayo gukahamira hi, nari n'oha owaataireho eibaare ryayo ry'obuhamizo?" 
Job38:7 Obu enyonyoozi z'omu busheeshe zaayeshongorera hamwe, abaana ba Ruhanga boona bakateera akaari k'okushemererwa?" 
Job38:8 Nainga n'oha owaacungiize enyanja enyigi; obu yaayohoka neeruga omu nda y'ensi. 
Job38:9 Obu naagijweka ebicu, nkagihumbika omwirima ndindindi." 
Job38:10 Nkagiteeraho obugarukiro, nkagikingisa enyigi n'empimbi;" 
Job38:11 Nkagiragiira nti: garukira aha otariharenga, n'ebingonzi byawe birikutuumeera bigarukire aho?" 
Job38:12 Mbwenu shi waaba kuzaarwa, oraragiire obusheeshe, okamanyisa omushekye omwanya gwagwo," 
Job38:13 gukabona kukwata ahu ensi yoona egarukira; haza enkozi z'ebibi zikakunkumurwamu? 
Job38:14 Manya ensi ehindurwa nk'eibumba ritairweho akamanyiso, kandi ezigwa, nk'oku omwenda guteebwamu erangi." 
Job38:15 Enkozi z'ebibi zizibirwa kuhweza, n'omukono gwazo ogubangirwe guhendeka." 
Job38:16 Orahikire okuzimu aha nshuro z'enyanja; nari oragyendeire okuzimu yaayo? 
Job38:17 Oroorekirwe amarembo ga rufu; nainga orareebire amarembo g'omwirima ndindindi? 
Job38:18 Oreetegyereize oku ensi erikwingana obuhango? Mbwenu ku oraabe noomanya ebyo byona, ngambira." 
Job38:19 Omuhanda gurikuza ei omushana gutuura gurahi; n'omwanya gw'omwirima guri nkahi? 
Job38:20 Ngu obone kugutwara omu kyanga kyagwo, kandi oyetegyereze otuhanda turikuza omu ka yaagwo?" 
Job38:21 Ekyo nookimanya, ahabw'okuba okaba waazairwe, kandi ohikize emyaka mingi!" 
Job38:22 Ekindi, orataahire omu mabiikiro g'ebirika; nari orareebire ahu orubaare rubiikwa," 
Job38:23 oru naabiikiire ebiro by'enaku n'eizooba ry'obweme n'orugamba? 
Job38:24 Omuhanda guza ei omushana gugaba ebirari, gurahi? Nainga omuyaga gwa burugwa-izooba gutaataanira hi omu nsi?" 
Job38:25 N'oha orateereire emikura enjura erikuhimintuka, akaha omurabyo gw'enkuba omuhanda;" 
Job38:26 kugwisa enjura omu nsi etarimu bantu, n'omu ihamba ritarimu bantu," 
Job38:27 Kwitirira eitaka ryomire, eritaine kimeziremu?" 
Job38:28 Noogira ngu enjura egira isheyo, nainga n'oha owaazaire amatondo g'orume?" 
Job38:29 Orubaare ruruga omu nda y'oha, n'omurombe gw'omu iguru ogw'enyababa guzaarwa oha?" 
Job38:30 Ebyo bireetera amaizi kuguma nk'eibaare, n'aha mutwe gw'amayanja hakakwata." 
Job38:31 Okaakomerana enyonyoozi Kakaaga n'enjegyere nari oyuzya emigoye y'engabo ya Orioni? 
Job38:32 Okaahabura Kyabahembezi na Nyamutsiga-ebyaganika omu bunaku bwazo, nari okaabaasa kuhabura Dubu n'obwana bwayo?" 
Job38:33 Ebyo noomanya ebiragiro ebitegyeka eiguru, kandi noobaasa kubitegyekyesa ensi?" 
Job38:34 Okaimutsya eiraka ryawe, rihika omu bicu obiragiira kukushukyeera emitunga y'amaizi?" 
Job38:35 Noobaasa kwohereza emirabyo, ngu egyende, ekakugira etakagyenzire eti: Turi aha?" 
Job38:36 N'oha owaataire obwengye omu bicu, akaha orwanyaanya okwetegyereza?" 
Job38:37 N'oha owaakubaasa kubara ebicu n'obwengye bwe? Nari owaakufukunkura endyanga z'amaizi g'omu iguru; 
Job38:38 omucuucu gukahinduka ebyondo, n'ebikoote bikakwatana?" 
Job38:39 Okaatungira entare-enkazi eky'okwita nari okaahaazya ebyana by'entare 
Job38:40 zaaba zibyami omu maaya gaazo, nari zigweraire omu bibyamiro byazo?" 
Job38:41 N'oha otungira ekikoona ekyokurya, ebyana byakyo byaba nibiririra Ruhanga, nibikora oku n'oku, bibuzirwe ekyokurya?" 
Job39:1 Noomanya obunaku bu enzaza z'omu bibungo zizaariiramu? Oreetegyereize enuuma neezaara? 
Job39:2 Okaabaasa kubara ameezi agu zimara zihakire, nari noomanya obunaku obu zizaariramu?" 
Job39:3 Obu zihenda enkokora, zikazaara abaana baazo, zikakira obusaasi?" 
Job39:4 Abaana baazo bagira amaani, bakurira omu bwerere; ku bagyenda tibagaruka." 
Job39:5 N'oha owaarekire enturegye kugyenda nk'oku zirikwenda? Kandi owaazitsibwire n'oha; 
Job39:6 ezi naahaire eihamba kutuuramu, n'ensi y'engugo kuba obutaaho bwazo?" 
Job39:7 Tizenda kajagararo k'omu ndembo, kandi tizeeta ha rwari rw'orikuzibinga." 
Job39:8 Zitarangira omu nshozi ei ziriira, nizisherura ekintu kyona ekibisi." 
Job39:9 Mbwenu embogo ekaikiriza kukukorera? Ebyo ekaaraara omu kihongore kyawe? 
Job39:10 Okaagikomesa omuguha, ekuhingira ebihabura?" 
Job39:11 Okaagyesiga, ngu ahabw'okuba eine amaani maingi, ogitsigira omurimo gwawe?" 
Job39:12 Okaagyesiga ngu neija kugaruka ekureetere oburo bwawe aha mbuga? 
Job39:13 Maaya amapapa gaayo egateeza eigundu. Kwonka ago mapapa gaayo n'amooya gaayo gagira embabazi? 
Job39:14 Ahabw'okuba amahuri gaayo egatsiga aha itaka, gatagatsibwa ekibiga ky'omu itaka." 
Job39:15 Eyebwa ku ekigyere kyakugaata nari enyamaishwa zikagaribatiirira. 
Job39:16 Etwaza kubi abaana baayo, nk'abatari baayo. Nobu eraabe ehendekyera busha, kwonka tetiina." 
Job39:17 Ahabw'okuba Ruhanga akagiima obwengye, tiyaagiha kwetegyereza." 
Job39:18 Ku eimuka kuhunga, eyeraatira embaraasi n'ogitembire." 
Job39:19 Niiwe oha embaraasi amaani, okagireetera omuhimbo kujangaraza omugaara aha bitsya?" 
Job39:20 Niiwe ogigurukisa nk'enzigye? Manya okufuna kwayo kw'ekitiinisa kwitsa obwoba. 
Job39:21 Erahuza omu ruhanga neesyama, etyo erugayo kubugabugana n'abaine eby'okurwanisa." 
Job39:22 Tegira ki etiina, nobu kwakuba okwitwa obwoba. Tehinduka kuhunga rurara." 
Job39:23 Emitana n'amacumu garikutyankana n'emihunda bigibomborekanira aha mugongo. 
Job39:24 Ahabw'obushaarizi n'ekiniga emaraho ensi neiruka, kandi tebaasa kwemerera yaahurira eiraka ry'enzamba." 
Job39:25 Ku ehurira enzamba neegamba egira ati: Otyo! Ekagira hare orugamba, n'endigito n'orwari rw'abakuru b'engabo." 
Job39:26 Mbwenu obwengye bwawe nibwo bushungyeeza akaca, kakajanjamura amapapa gaako, kagyemire obukiizi-bwa-buryo?" 
Job39:27 Niiwe oragiira eishamba kutumbeera rikata ekyaashuri kyaryo ahaiguru? 
Job39:28 Manya riza aha rukiri riruhindura eka yaaryo; ritaaha omu bicokoromi by'eibaare, ribihindura obutaaho bwaryo." 
Job39:29 Okwo niyo rirangiza eki riraateere, amaisho gaaryo nigakireebera hare;" 
Job39:30 obwana bwaryo bukanywa eshagama; ahu omutumbi guri, rikaba niho ryaza." 
Job40:1 Nyakubaho agaruka agambira Yobu ati: 
Job40:2 Omuhakani n'ow'okugumizamu naahakanisa Ow'obushoboorozi bwona? Ogwo orikuhakanisa Ruhanga, naakigarukyemu!" 
Job40:3 Mpaho Yobu agarukamu Nyakubaho ati: 
Job40:4 Reeba, nyowe tiinyine oku ndi! Mbwenu nkugarukyemu ki?" 
Job40:5 Ngambire rimwe, tindikwija kugarukamu. Nangwa ni kabiri, kwonka tinkyeyongyera." 
Job40:6 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Nyakubaho yaagarukamu Yobu, naayema omu muyaga gw'akasooroora, ati:" 
Job40:7 Yezirikye mashaija, nkubuuze; haza ongarukyemu." 
Job40:8 Ebyo nooyenda kumpindura otahikire, okansingisa orubanja ngu obone kurweihaho?" 
Job40:9 Noinganisa na Ruhanga emikono, kandi noobaasa kuhindisa eiraka nkawe?" 
Job40:10 Yehunde obwanyakusinga n'obukuru. Yehumbikye ekitiinisa n'okumurinkana. 
Job40:11 Reka ekiniga kyawe kyohokye, oreebe orikwetunguura weena, omucwe amaryo." 
Job40:12 Reeba weena orikwetunguura omubundikye, kandi oribatiiririre enyabibi ahi zeemereire." 
Job40:13 Haza abo boona obaziikye omu itaka, obakome aha maisho, bari omu mwanya gwekiikire." 
Job40:14 Obwo nibwo ndaakumanyise ku omukono gwawe gwa buryo gurikubaasa kukusinguza. 
Job40:15 Reeba, Behemooti, ei naahangire nk'oku naakuhangire, erya obunyaatsi nk'ente." 
Job40:16 Amaani gaayo gagituura omu manyaanya n'omu mikambara y'enda. 
Job40:17 Eyemereza omukira, gubangarara nka kaarwenda; emitsi y'omu bibero byayo eriitiraine." 
Job40:18 Amagufa gaayo ni nk'enshekye z'emiringa, n'engingo zaayo ni nk'empimbi z'ebyoma." 
Job40:19 Omu bi nyowe Ruhanga naahangire n'ey'okutangaaza munonga. Owaagihangire niwe arikubaasa kugiirira haihi na rurara. 
Job40:20 Manya enshozi, ezi enyamaishwa zikiniramu, bigyeereza ebyokurya." 
Job40:21 Eyebyamira ahansi y'amarebe, eyeshereka omu mibimbiri n'omu migano." 
Job40:22 Ahabw'okuba amarebe nigo gagishweka kugitungira ekicuucu; emikinga y'aha mugyera ekagyehinguririza. 
Job40:23 Reeba, omugyera ku guba niguhimintika n'amaani, tetiina. Nobu Yorudaani yaakugyohoka omu kanwa, tegira ki eyetaho." 
Job40:24 N'oha owaakugikwatsa omutego neereeba, nari okugugifumuza enyindo?" 
Job41:1 Mbwenu okaabaasa kukwatsa Leviataani eirobo ry'eby'enyanja, ogituuhuura omu maizi, nari okukomesa orurimi rwayo omurunga?" 
Job41:2 Okaabaasa kurabya omuguha omu nyindo yaayo, nari okufumuza oruba rwayo eirobo?" 
Job41:3 Noogira ngu ekaakweshengyereza kugigirira embabazi, nari kukugambira gye ngu ogirekure ekire?" 
Job41:4 Ebyo ekaakora naiwe endagaano, ngu ekaaba omuhuuku waawe ebiro byona?" 
Job41:5 Okaazaana nayo nk'orikuzaanisa enyonyi, nari okaagitsibika ngu ebe eky'okushetsya abazaana baawe?" 
Job41:6 Ebyo abajubi bakaacwererana obuguzi bwayo, bagibaganisiza abashuubuzi?" 
Job41:7 Okaagicumitisa eicumu rifumura oruhu rwayo; nari omutwe gwayo ogucumitisa ebicumu by'okujubisa? 
Job41:8 Gikozeho orukumu; kwonka torikigarukira; kandi orwo rugamba tirurikweba. 
Job41:9 Reeba, omuntu okugira amatsiko g'okugihandaho n'okweruhiza busha; nangwa n'obu yaakugicwa ati amaisho, akaahwerera." 
Job41:10 Tihariho muntu eshaarizi owaakwehanga kugirahura. Mbwenu nu, n'oha owaakubaasa kuunyemerera omu maisho?" 
Job41:11 N'oha oragizire eki yampa, ngu mbone kumugarurira? Manya kyona ekiri ahansi y'eiguru n'ekyangye." 
Job41:12 Tindikwija kureka kugamba aha ngingo za Leviyataani, nari aha maani gaayo amaingi, nainga aha kyemerero kyayo ekirungi." 
Job41:13 Mbwenu n'oha owaakugijuura ekijwaro kyayo eky'eruguru? Omu kooti zaayo zombi z'ekyoma, n'oha owaakuzoogamu?" 
Job41:14 N'oha owaakubaasa kugyashamura? Manya amaino gaayo agakiikiize nigatiinisa. 
Job41:15 Engamba zaayo, ezitembekyeraine zikaramatana, nizo zigiteera eigundu." 
Job41:16 Buri emwe ehereraine na ngyenzi yaayo, zitarikurabwamu na mabeho." 
Job41:17 Zikwataine, zifumbataine zitarikubaasa kutaanisibwa." 
Job41:18 Omwetsyamuro gwayo gurugwamu omurabyo, n'amaisho gaayo gamurinkana nk'omushekye gurikujuguta." 
Job41:19 Omu kanwa kaayo harugamu emuri zirikwaka; ensasi z'omuriro zitaraaka. 
Job41:20 Omu nyindo zaayo hacumbuukamu omwika nk'ogw'enyungu erikutogota, nari nk'ogw'ekibingo kirikusya." 
Job41:21 Omwitsyo gwayo gwatsya amakara: omu kanwa kaayo harugamu omuriro gurikunaga enkobe. 
Job41:22 Amaani gagituura omu bitsya, okutiinisa kwayo kugyenda kugyebembeire." 
Job41:23 Ebigojo by'omubiri gwayo bihingamiraine, bigihamiireho, bitarikubaasa kugirugaho." 
Job41:24 Omutima gwayo gugumire nk'eibaare; buzimazima gugumire nk'orubengo. 
Job41:25 Ku eimuka eti, amamanzi gatiina; gahahaara omutima ahabw'okukangarana." 
Job41:26 Nobu baakugiteera rurara, nari eicumu, nainga endiga, nari omuhunda; tibiine ki byakugiitsa." 
Job41:27 Ekyoma ekireeba nk'ekumbwe, n'omuringa egweta ekiti kijunzire." 
Job41:28 tehunga myambi; n'amabaare g'enjungu, ahariyo ni nk'ebishushunga." 
Job41:29 Ahariyo, ebihuuzo ni nk'embuba, eshekyeerera okukomangana kw'emihunda." 
Job41:30 Aha nda yaayo ni nk'engusyo z'obwogi, ku erambira omu byondo, eba nk'ekihuuzo ky'ekyoma." 
Job41:31 Ereetera amaizi g'okuzimu kutogota nk'ag'omu nyungu. Eteera enyanja nk'orikuteerateera amajuta kugata omu ntsimbo. Ku eziha etsiga enyima ekirari 
Job41:32 kirikwengyengyeta. Ku eibira, eimutsya eifuro ririkubira." 
Job41:33 Omu nsi tiharimu nyamaishwa erikugishusha, kuba ekihangwa kitaine bwoba." 
Job41:34 Egaya enyamaishwa zoona ezirikukiza ezindi eigundu, kandi eba omugabe w'enyamaishwa zoona." 
Job42:1 Bwanyima Yobu akagarukamu Nyakubaho ati: 
Job42:2 Nimmanya ku orikubaasa ebintu byona kandi eki omaririire kukora, ku kitabaasa kuzibirwa." 
Job42:3 Obuurize oti: N'oha ogwo orikuzibira enaama zangye kwetegyerezibwa, naagambisibwa ebitarimu? N'ahabw'ekyo ngambire ebi mbaire nteetegyereize. Ebintangaarize munonga, ebi mbaire ntarikumanya." 
Job42:4 Ongizire oti: Hurira ngambe, nkubuuze; haza ongarukyemu." 
Job42:5 Nkaba nkuhuriza amatu; kwonka hati amaisho gangye gaakwereebera. 
Job42:6 Nikyo ndikwegayira nkeeteisiza omu mucuucu n'omu iju. 
Job42:7 Nyakubaho ku yaaherize kugambira Yobu ebyo bigambo, yaagira Elifaazi Omuteemani ati; Nkugiriire ekiniga kingi, iwe na bagyenzi baawe bombi: ahabw'okuba timungambireho bihikire nk'oku omwiru wangye Yobu agizire." 
Job42:8 Mbwenu nu, nimutware enimi mushanju n'empaya z'entaama mushanju, muze ow'omwiru wangye Yobu, mwetambirireyo ebitambo bicwekize, haza omwiru wangye Yobu abashabire. Nibwo ndaikirize okushaba kwe, nkareka kubatwaza nk'obushema bwanyu oku buri. Manya timungambireho bihikire, nk'oku omwiru wangye Yobu agizire." 
Job42:9 Elifaazi Omuteemani, na Bilidaadi Omushuuhi, na Zofari Omunaamati, nikwo kugyenda, bakakora eki Nyakubaho yaabaragiira; nawe akaikiriza okushaba kwa Yobu." 
Job42:10 Yobu ku yaaherize kushabira banywani be, Nyakubaho yaamushumbuusha ebi yaabaire afeereirwe. Yaamuha ebirikwingana emirundi ebiri n'ebi yaabaire atungire bwabiso." 
Job42:11 Bwanyima beene ishe boona, na banyaanya, n'abandi boona abaabaire nibamumanya, baija ahu ari, baarya nawe obugyenyi omu nju ye. Baamugirira esaasi, baamugumya ahabw'ebihikiirizi byona ebi Nyakubaho yaamureeteire. Buri omwe omuribo yaamuha ekicweka ky'efeeza n'empeta y'ezaabu." 
Job42:12 Na Nyakubaho yaaha omugisha ebiro bya Yobu ebya bwanyima, okukira ebyabandize. Yaatunga entaama akakumi kamwe n'enkumi ina, engamira enkumi mukaaga, enimi enkumi ibiri z'okuhingisa, n'endogoya rukumi." 
Job42:13 Kandi yaazaara abatabani mushanju, n'abahara bashatu." 
Job42:14 Ow'okubanza yaamweta Yemima, owa kabiri Keziya, owa kashatu Keerenihapuki." 
Job42:15 Kandi omuri egyo nsi yoona, hakaba hatarimu bakazi barungi nka bahara ba Yobu. Reero ishebo yaabaha hamwe na banyaanyabo eby'okuhungura." 
Job42:16 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Yobu yaamara emyaka igana na makumi ana, yaareeba abaijukuru n'abaijukuruza, okuhika aha b'oruzaaro rwa kana." 
Job42:17 Bwanyima Yobu yaafa, ari omugurusi boote." 
Psalms1:1 Omuntu oine omugisha n'otaza mu naama z'ababi, nari okutooreza abasiisi, nobu kwakuba okushutama n'abashungi." 
Psalms1:2 Kureka ekimunanura n'eiteeka rya Nyakubaho, kandi eryo iteeka ariteekateekaho nyomushana na nyekiro." 
Psalms1:3 Ari nk'omuti ogubyairwe haihi n'omugyera, ogwana ebijuma omu nshumi zaagwo, ogu amababi gaagwo gatahonga. Ebi akora byona bimugyendera gye." 
Psalms1:4 Ababi bo tikwo baba, kureka bari nk'omweziga ogutuntumurwa omuyaga." 
Psalms1:5 Aha kiro ky'okucwererwaho orubanja, nikyo bataribaasiza kurwemera, nobu kwakuba okwemerera ahu abahikiriire bateeraniire." 
Psalms1:6 Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho amanya emitwarize y'abahikiriire, kwonka ababi bo baryabura obutooro." 
Psalms2:1 Beitu n'enki ekireeteire amahanga kwimukiirira, n'abantu kuza omu naama zitaine muhoho?" 
Psalms2:2 Abagabe b'ensi nibatenga orugamba, n'abategyeki nibacuma enaama y'okurwanisa Nyakubaho n'omusiigwa we, bagumize bati:" 
Psalms2:3 Mbwenu ka tweiheho empingu zaabo, tunagye hare n'enjegyere zaabo." 
Psalms2:4 Haza Nyakubaho osingami omu iguru abashekyeerera naabagaya. 
Psalms2:5 Reero abakabukire agwirwe kubi, abaitse obwoba aine ekiniga ati:" 
Psalms2:6 Ogwo niwe mugabe ou naayemekyeire Siyooni aha rushozi rwangye orurikwera. 
Psalms2:7 Ka ndangye ekiragiro kya Nyakubaho owangira ati: Ori Omwana wangye, eri izooba naakuzaara." 
Psalms2:8 Nshaba, nkuhe amahanga, gabe agaawe ahabwawe, n'ensi yoona ebe obukama bwawe." 
Psalms2:9 Oryababotsa n'enkoni y'obugabe y'ekyoma, obaatagure nk'omusinga gw'omunogoozi." 
Psalms2:10 Na mbwenu, bagabe 'mwe, nimwekyengyere; naimwe abategyeki b'ensi, nimwikirize kuhaburwa." 
Psalms2:11 Muheereze Nyakubaho n'okutiina," 
Psalms2:12 mumukwate amaguru nimutetema, atakaabagirira ekiniga, mukahwerekyerera, ahabw'okuba arahuka kubakirwa. Ebishi boona abamuhungiraho baine omugisha!" 
Psalms3:1 Ai Nyakubaho, abarikumpindukira abazigu ka ni baingi, n'abarikuunyimukirira ka nibakanya," 
Psalms3:2 kandi baingi nibangambaho ngu: Ruhanga we taine ki arikumuhwera! 
Psalms3:3 Kwonka, Nyakubaho, niiwe ngabo yangye enkingira, ou nyehimbisizamu, ontambira okweinamirira." 
Psalms3:4 Ntakira Nyakubaho n'eiraka rihango, nawe angarukamu ayemi aha rushozi rwe orurikwera." 
Psalms3:5 Haza mbyama, ngwejegyera, ndugaho nsisiimuka, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho niwe andamira." 
Psalms3:6 Tinditiina mahe g'abazigu abankubire kundwanisa embaju zoona. 
Psalms3:7 Ai Nyakubaho, imuka! Ai Ruhanga wangye, njuna! Abazigu bangye niiwe obateera empi z'omushaya, n'enkozi z'ebibi niiwe ozicwa amaino." 
Psalms3:8 Kandi Nyakubaho niiwe ojuna, okaha abantu baawe omugisha." 
Psalms4:1 Ai Ruhanga, niiwe ondwanaho! Ku nkweta, onyetaba, ku mba ndi omu naku, oziinyihamu. Mbwenu hati ongirire embabazi, ohurire okushaba kwangye." 
Psalms4:2 Imwe bantu 'mwe, muryahitsya hi okumpemura? Muryahitsya hi okunurirwa ebitaine nsha n'okukunda ebishuba?" 
Psalms4:3 Mumanye ku Nyakubaho abamukunda abatoorana kuba abe; haza ku mmutakira, ampurira." 
Psalms4:4 Mutiine, murekye kushiisha, muraare nimuteekateeka munonga, mutarikuteeza." 
Psalms4:5 Muheyo ebitambo n'omutima murungi, kandi mwesigye Nyakubaho." 
Psalms4:6 Baingi bagira ngu: N'oha oritworeka ebirungi? Otushemwize amaisho gaawe, ai Nyakubaho!" 
Psalms4:7 Ompaire okushemererwa, okutakagirwaga bandi omu biro by'omweru n'eby'emihiiso." 
Psalms4:8 Mbyama n'obusingye, ndahuka kugwejegyera. Manya, Nyakubaho, niiwe wenka ondinda nkagogyeera." 
Psalms5:1 Ai Nyakubaho, hurira ebi ndikugamba, ote omutima aha kutaka kwangye." 
Psalms5:2 Hurira okutonzya kwangye, iwe mugabe wangye kandi Ruhanga wangye!" 
Psalms5:3 Ai Nyakubaho, niiwe ndikushaba, ahabw'okuba ku bwaba, otegyereza eiraka ryangye; kandi ku butaagurikana, nkubonereza ekitambo, ntegyereza okwija kwawe." 
Psalms5:4 Ahabw'okuba toba Ruhanga oshemerererwa okukora kubi, toikiriza kibi kukuguma haihi;" 
Psalms5:5 abeehimbisa, bacwa amaryo, baareeba obataireho eriisho. Oyanga abakora ebibi." 
Psalms5:6 Ababeihi obacwekyereza; abaitsi b'abantu n'engobya, Nyakubaho, obatamwa." 
Psalms5:7 Kwonka nyowe, ahabwa rukundo yaawe empango onyikiriza kutaaha omu nju yaawe; nyinama nyorekyeire Nyaruju yaawe erikwera ninkuha ekitiinwa." 
Psalms5:8 Ai Nyakubaho, onyebemberere omu kuhikiirira, ahabw'okuba hariho abangwereire; haza onyoreke gye omuhanda gwawe, ngutoore." 
Psalms5:9 Tihariho kibaruga omu kanwa ekyesigwa, ekibari aha njoka n'okukora eby'obwinazi; emimiro yaabo ni nk'ebituuro byashami, beegambisa karimi karungi." 
Psalms5:10 Ai Ruhanga, obasingise orubanja; emitego yaabo babe nibo baagigwamu! Obatuntumure ahabw'ebicumuro byabo ebitarikubarwa, ahabw'okuba bakugomeire." 
Psalms5:11 Kwonka boona abakuhungiraho bashemererwe, bagume nibateera akaari nibeesiima, abakukunda bananukye ahabw'okuba niiwe obarinda." 
Psalms5:12 Ai Nyakubaho, niiwe oha omugisha ohikiriire, okamukingiza embabazi zaawe nk'engabo." 
Psalms6:1 Ai Nyakubaho, otanjuukirira ongwereirwe kubi; otankabukira oine ekishinjo." 
Psalms6:2 Ai Nyakubaho, ongirire esaasi, ahabw'okuba mpwairwemu amaani. Ai Nyakubaho, ontambire, ahabw'okuba amagufa gangye nigajegajega;" 
Psalms6:3 omutima gwangye gwijwire obujune. Ai Nyakubaho, oryahitsya hi okutampa mikono?" 
Psalms6:4 Ai Nyakubaho, garuka, okize amagara gangye; onjune ahabwa rukundo yaawe." 
Psalms6:5 Manya ofiire aba atakikwijuka. Mbwenu obaasa kukuhimbisiza okuzimu n'oha? 
Psalms6:6 Amaganya gankabize; buri kiro njubya omushego gwangye, ekitanda kyangye kicweka amaizi ahabw'amarira." 
Psalms6:7 Amaisho gangye gahwereire ahabw'amaganya, gakambire ahabw'abazigu abankubire!" 
Psalms6:8 Imwe mwena enkozi z'ebibi, nimundugyeho! Manya Nyakubaho ahuriire okuborooga kwangye;" 
Psalms6:9 yaatega okutu okweshengyereza kwangye. Kandi aikiriza kumpa eki mmushaba. 
Psalms6:10 Abazigu bangye baryahemuka, babonabone; bagarukye enyima baburaburiirwe." 
Psalms7:1 Ai Nyakubaho, Ruhanga wangye, niiwe mpungiraho. Njuna abarikumpiiga boona kandi obankize," 
Psalms7:2 batakambakura nk'entare, nkagaashuurwa ntaine kijuna." 
Psalms7:3 Ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, engaro zangye ku ziraabe zirakoire ahabw'obugobya," 
Psalms7:4 munywani wangye nkamuzimuurira ebibi, nkatura busha omuzigu wangye," 
Psalms7:5 obwo orekye ampiigye, ankwate, anyite, andekye ngangarami omu mucuucu." 
Psalms7:6 Ai Nyakubaho, imuka n'ekiniga, oyemerere, okumiirire abazigu bangye! Ruhanga wangye, sisiimuka, iwe oragiira ngu habeho okucwa emanja omu buryo." 
Psalms7:7 Amahanga ka gateerane, gakwehinguririze, haza ogategyekye ori ahaiguru." 
Psalms7:8 Ai Nyakubaho, ocwere amahanga emanja, oncwere orubanja, nk'okuhikirira kwangye n'obwesigwa bwangye biri." 
Psalms7:9 Iwe Ruhanga ohikiriire, ocaaka ebiteekateeko n'emitima, maraho eitima ry'ababi, ohamye omuntu ohikiriire." 
Psalms7:10 Ruhanga niwe ngabo enkingira, orinda ab'emitima y'amazima." 
Psalms7:11 Ruhanga omucwi w'emanja ohikiriire, agwerwa kubi ababi obutoosha. Omuntu ku ayanga kweteisa," 
Psalms7:12 Ruhanga atyaza rurara ye. Omuzigu nobu araatyaze rurara ye, akareega obuta bwe kurasha," 
Psalms7:13 hoona ebyo bikwato ebi arikuteekateeka, niwe biriita, n'emyambi ye ehindukye ensiriira." 
Psalms7:14 Nimumureebe, naateekateeka kubi, aine eitima kandi n'omunyabishuba." 
Psalms7:15 Akatimba obusya, yaabushuruguturura, haza kunu niwe araabugwemu!" 
Psalms7:16 Eitima rye niwe ririgarukira, obushaarizi bwe niwe buritukurira." 
Psalms7:17 Nsiima Nyakubaho ahabw'okuhikiirira kwe, nyeshongora ninsingiza Mukama Rukiraboona." 
Psalms8:1 Ai Mukama Ruhanga waitu, eiziina ryawe ka ni rikuru omu nsi yoona! Ahaiguru y'eiguru, ekitiinwa kyawe" 
Psalms8:2 nikyeshongorwa abaana bato n'abeereere abakiikiirwe. Okazitira orugo rwawe ruhamire omu maisho g'ababisha, ngu obone kugomoora abazigu n'abagomi." 
Psalms8:3 Ku ndeeba eiguru ryawe eryakozirwe emikono yaawe, okwezi hamwe n'enyonyoozi ebi waatairemu, ngira nti:" 
Psalms8:4 Omuntu ni kintu ki, iwe kumwijuka, n'omwana w'omuntu kumwetaho?" 
Psalms8:5 Manya okamuhanga, yaaburaho kakye kwingana naiwe, waamujweka ekiruga ky'ekitiinwa n'okuhaisibwa;" 
Psalms8:6 okamutegyekyesa ebi waakozire n'emikono yaawe. Waata ebintu byona ahansi y'ebigyere bye: 
Psalms8:7 ente n'entaama zoona, nangwa n'enyamaishwa nazo," 
Psalms8:8 n'enyonyi z'omu mwanya, n'ebyenyanja by'omu nyanja n'ebigyendera omu mayanja byona." 
Psalms8:9 Ai Mukama Ruhanga waitu, eiziina ryawe ka ni rikuru omu nsi yoona!" 
Psalms9:1 Ai Nyakubaho, ninkusiima n'omutima gwangye gwona, kandi ngamba eby'okutangaaza byawe byona." 
Psalms9:2 Nshemererwa niinyesiima ahabwawe, nyeshongora eby'okukuhimbisa, iwe Rukiraboona." 
Psalms9:3 Ku oba osingami aha kitebe kyawe ky'obugabe, ocwa emanja z'oburyo, waahurira amazima g'ebi ndikutongana." 
Psalms9:4 Abazigu bangye bagaruka enyima, bagwa aha nsi, bahwerekyererera omu maisho gaawe." 
Psalms9:5 Okabotsa amahanga, waacwekyereza ababi, waamariraho kimwe amaziina gaabo ebiro n'ebiro." 
Psalms9:6 Abazigu baitu bahwaireho, baacwekyererezibwa kimwe, n'endembo zaabo zisheenyirwe, tizaakiijukwa." 
Psalms9:7 Manya, Nyakubaho aba omugabe ebiro byona;" 
Psalms9:8 aryacwera ensi emanja z'oburyo, n'amahanga goona agacwere orubanja omu mazima." 
Psalms9:9 Nyakubaho k'abeere abarikuburabuzibwa orugo rugumire, orugo rugumire omu bunaku bw'okushoberwa!" 
Psalms9:10 Ai Nyakubaho, abakumanya bakwesiga, kandi abakusherura tokabanagiiriraga!" 
Psalms9:11 Mweshongore eby'okuhimbisa Nyakubaho otuura omuri Siyooni, mugambire amahanga ebikuru ebi akora." 
Psalms9:12 Ruhanga aijuka abarikubonabona, ahoora abarikubakora kubi." 
Psalms9:13 Ai Nyakubaho, iwe onyiha omu maino ga rufu, reeba obusaasi bwangye, ongirire embabazi!" 
Psalms9:14 Haza mbone kugamba nintondoora eby'okukuhimbisiza aha marembo ga Siyooni, nyine okunanuka, ahabw'okuba okanjuna." 
Psalms9:15 Amahanga gatsindamire omu busya bu gaayetimbiire; n'ebigyere byago bikwatsirwe ekigoye eki gaategire. 
Psalms9:16 Nyakubaho akeemanyisa, yaacwa emanja, yaakwatsa ababi emitego ei bategire n'engaro zaabo." 
Psalms9:17 Ababi ka bagarukye okuzimu owa Nyamuteza, ago mahanga goona ageebwa Ruhanga." 
Psalms9:18 Obutoosha tagira bu anagiriire abakyene, n'amatsiko g'abooro tigarifa busha." 
Psalms9:19 Ai Nyakubaho, imuka, otaikiriza abantu kukusingura! K'amahanga geemerere omu maisho gaawe, gacwerwe orubanja!" 
Psalms9:20 Ai Nyakubaho, batiinise; haza amahanga gamanye ku bari abantu nyabuntu!" 
Psalms10:1 Ai Nyakubaho, ahabw'enki onyemereire hare? Ahabw'enki hati nootweshereka omu bunaku bw'okushoberwa?" 
Psalms10:2 Enshoberwa neehwerera ahabw'okwetunguura kw'ababi, ekwatirwa omu mitego ei bategire." 
Psalms10:3 Enyabibi eyeraata ahabw'ebyetengo bibi by'omu mutima gwayo; omunyamururu arogota, n'omubi agaya Nyakubaho;" 
Psalms10:4 omubi, ahabw'amaryo tayeta hari Ruhanga, kandi agira ati: Ruhanga tabaho!" 
Psalms10:5 Buri kaanya ahiirwa omu mitwarize ye; okucwa emanja kwawe kumuri hare, takwetaho, boona abahiigana nawe abagaya." 
Psalms10:6 Ayegumya naagira ati: tihariho kirikubaasa kuntetemya. We akyeena abandi nk'otakahikwahoga kabi. 
Psalms10:7 Obugobya n'okuhata bituura bimwijwire akanwa, eitima n'obubi bimuri aha rurimi." 
Psalms10:8 Ngugwo, arambiire omu rubingo, agwereire kwita bwesherekye abataine kabi. Naaringuriza kandi naahwerereza omuntu otaine kijuna," 
Psalms10:9 amugwereire omu kyetindo nk'entare. Agwereire embura-butooro kugijakura. Haza ku aheza kugikwata, agikuruza ekigoye kye." 
Psalms10:10 Agwera, abandama, agyendesa enda, egyo nshoberwa emugwa omu ngaro," 
Psalms10:11 kandi ateekateeka ati: Ruhanga ayebirwe, ayehugize, taine ki arikureeba!" 
Psalms10:12 Ai Mukama Ruhanga, imutsya omukono gwawe, ohwere embura-butooro!" 
Psalms10:13 Ahabw'enki omubi naagaya Ruhanga agumize ati: Tarikintura? 
Psalms10:14 Iwe wenka ku oyereebera obujune n'amaganya, obyetegyereza kandi obishoboorora. Omuntu enshoberwa akweyegamiza, kandi niiwe oba omuhwezi w'efuuzi." 
Psalms10:15 Maraho amaani g'abantu babi enkozi z'ebibi, ocaakye ebibi byabo okuhitsya obu bitarireebwa." 
Psalms10:16 Nyakubaho aba omugabe ebiro byona; abanyamahanga n'ab'okuhweraho kimwe omu nsi ye. 
Psalms10:17 Ai Nyakubaho, niiwe ohurira ebyetengo by'abacuureezi, okamanya emitima yaabo; kandi obatega okutu." 
Psalms10:18 Kandi niiwe ocwera efuuzi n'abarikuburabuzibwa orubanja rw'oburyo, ngu omuntu nyabuntu arekye kubatiinisa obundi." 
Psalms11:1 Nyakubaho niiwe mpungiraho. Noobaasa ota kungira oti: Hungira aha bibungo nk'enyonyi. 
Psalms11:2 Reeba oku ababi barikureega amata gaabo, n'oku barikugatamika emyambi; beeteekateekire bari omu mwirima kurasha abarungi." 
Psalms11:3 Emisingi ku yaakucwekyerezibwa, abahikiriire bakaakora ki?" 
Psalms11:4 Nyakubaho ari omuri Nyaruju ye erikwera; ekitebe kye ky'obugabe kiri omu iguru. Amaisho ge atuura agahangire ensi, naacaaka abantu boona kubeetegyereza." 
Psalms11:5 Nyakubaho acaaka abahikiriire n'ababi, kandi ayanga omuntu kukora eby'obwinazi." 
Psalms11:6 Ababi abaragarikiza amakara g'omuriro n'obuganga, abahuutiriza omuyaga gurikubabura, ngu bagushome." 
Psalms11:7 Nyakubaho ohikiriire akunda abakora ebihikire; ab'amazima baryamuhanga amaisho nibamutangaarira. 
Psalms12:1 Ai Nyakubaho otujune! Abeesigwa tibaakiriho, amazima gahwaire omu bantu." 
Psalms12:2 Kyona eki bakora n'okubeihabeihana; eminwa yaabo emamarika, bagamba endimi ibiri." 
Psalms12:3 Nyakubaho naakacweho omunwa gwona oguteera ekimama, n'orurimi rwona orwehimbisa," 
Psalms12:4 n'abagira bati: Orurimi ka nigo maani gaitu, eminwa ka n'eyaitu. Mbwenu owaakututegyeka n'oha?" 
Psalms12:5 Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Ahabw'omworo owaanyagirwe n'omukyene orikutsinda, mbwenu naaza kweimukira, mbahe obusingye obu beetenga." 
Psalms12:6 Ebigambo bya Nyakubaho tibiba bugobya; ni nk'efeeza empuuhe eruga omu itaka eshemeziibwe emirundi mushanju 
Psalms12:7 Mbwenu, ai Nyakubaho, guma nooturinda, otujune ababi b'obusingye obu." 
Psalms12:8 Enkozi z'ebibi nizishooba aha mbaju zoona, obubi nibwesiimiranwa omu bantu." 
Psalms13:1 Ai Nyakubaho, oryahitsya hi okuunyebwa? N'obutwire bwona? Oryahitsya hi okuunyima amaisho?" 
Psalms13:2 Ndyahitsya hi okwemera obusaasi omu mutima gwangye, n'amagara gangye okubonabona nyomushana na nyekiro? Omuzigu wangye aryaherera hi okunkiza emikono?" 
Psalms13:3 Ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, ondeebe kandi ongarukyemu! Hwezesa amaisho gangye, ntakaagwejegyera nkaherayo." 
Psalms13:4 Omuzigu wangye akeesiima ati: Mmusingwire; n'ababisha bangye bakanshekyeerera baareeba ninterebuza. 
Psalms13:5 Nyakubaho, ahabwangye nyesiga rukundo yaawe etahararuka; ka nyesiime ahabw'okuba niiwe ojuna." 
Psalms13:6 Haza nkweshongorere ahabw'oburungi obu onyorekire. 
Psalms14:1 Omushema agira omu mutima gwe ati: Ruhanga tabaho! Ebi abantu bakora ni bibi, n'ebihagaro, tihaakiriho murungi." 
Psalms14:2 Nyakubaho ayemi omu iguru, naareeba abantu, ngu ayetegyereze ku haraabe hariho oine obwengye, nangwa omwe orikusherura Ruhanga." 
Psalms14:3 Boona bahabire, boona hamwe basiisikaire: Tihaakiriho murungi, nobu yaakuba omwe." 
Psalms14:4 Abantu enkozi z'ebibi nikwo babaire abashema, bakamira abantu bangye nk'abarikurya ebyokurya, kandi tibaatakira Nyakubaho." 
Psalms14:5 Baryaitwa obwoba, obwoba obutaine burugo, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga ari hamwe n'abahikiriire." 
Psalms14:6 Nobu muraashekyeerere amatsiko g'omukyene bwingana ki, kwonka Nyakubaho n'obuhungiro bwe." 
Psalms14:7 Nkaabasibwa ki, okujuna kwa Isiraeli kuruga omuri Siyooni? Nyakubaho ku arizaahuura abantu be enkwatwa, beene Yakobo ka baryesiima, Abaisiraeli bakananuka!" 
Psalms15:1 Ai Nyakubaho, n'oha oritaaha omuri Nyaruju yaawe? Nari shi, n'oha orituura aha rushozi rwawe orurikwera?" 
Psalms15:2 N'omuntu otaine ki arikuhaahuuzibwa, okora ebihikire obutoosha, ogamba eby'amazima aihire aha mutima." 
Psalms15:3 Niwe ou orurimi rwe rutagambuura, otashaagiza mugyenzi we, otahaaha mutaahi we." 
Psalms15:4 Niwe oreebesa enyabibi omugayo, kwonka oha ekitiinwa abatiina Nyakubaho. Niwe ogwo obutoosha orahira, atahindure, nobu haakubaho ki." 
Psalms15:5 Niwe otaguza mpiiha ze ngu atungye enshaagi erengyesereize, kandi otarya nguzi y'okusingisiriza ori mwere. Okora ebyo byona, tihariho kirimutengyeetsa ebiro byona." 
Psalms16:1 Ai Ruhanga, guma ondinde, ahabw'okuba niiwe mpungiraho." 
Psalms16:2 Imwe mugira Nyakubaho muti: Mukama waitu, niiwe bugwagye bwaitu; tihariho ondi kureka iwe." 
Psalms16:3 Nshemerererwa abantu ba Ruhanga abarungi, kandi nibo nkunda kutuura nabo. Emandwa zaabo ziijuriraine nibaziyookyera!" 
Psalms16:4 Hoona nyowe nzisiguurire eshagama y'ebitambo byazo? Ngabusha! N'okukirabya omu kanwa nindahira amaziina gaazo-Nikikabure! 
Psalms16:5 Ai Nyakubaho, nyakuntunga kandi egabo yangye, niiwe wenka oba omurinzi w'omugabo gwangye." 
Psalms16:6 Eshi ebi wampaire ni birungi kandi nibitangaaza! 
Psalms16:7 Ninsiima Nyakubaho omuhabuzi wangye, nangwa nyekiro omutima gwangye gumpuguura." 
Psalms16:8 Nyakubaho niwe mpanga amaisho obutoosha, tihariho kibaasa kuntengyeetsa yaaba anyine." 
Psalms16:9 Nikyo omutima gwangye gwesingiriza, n'amagara gakeemurika, n'omubiri gwangye gukabukaara;" 
Psalms16:10 ahabw'okuba torintsiga wa Nyamuteza, nari okureka nkunzi yaawe kuza okuzimu." 
Psalms16:11 Oryanyoreka omuhanda gw'amagara; ompe okunanuka kwingi ahu ori, nshemererwe ebiro byona nkuri aha mbaju." 
Psalms17:1 Ai Nyakubaho, hurira ebi ndikwetonganira omu mazima, ote omutima aha kweshengyereza kwangye, ohurire okushaba kwangye, okurikuruga omu kanwa akatarimu bugobya." 
Psalms17:2 K'obe niiwe wantonganira, ahabw'okuba omanya ebihikire." 
Psalms17:3 Oshwijuma omutima gwangye obutoosha. Nobu waakuntaayaayira nyekiro okangyeza, tokanshangamu kibi, nobu kwakuba okwetomboita, ahabw'okuba tihariho kicumuro kyona ekirandugire omu kanwa," 
Psalms17:4 nk'oku abaingi bakora. Ebi wangambiire nkabigumya aha mutima; 
Psalms17:5 naagumira omu mihanda ei waanyorekire, naagyendera omu kirari kyawe ngu ntahaba." 
Psalms17:6 Ruhanga wangye, ku nkweta, ongarukamu; mbwenu ntega okutu, ohurire ebi ndikugamba." 
Psalms17:7 Iwe ojune empungi, yoreka rukundo yaawe etahararuka, erikutangaaza!" 
Psalms17:8 Ondinde abakugomera, nk'oku omuntu arinda emboni y'eriisho rye. Ombumbatire omu mapapa gaawe," 
Psalms17:9 Enkozi z'ebibi zirekye kuunyita. Abazigu bangye bankubire, nibatuumeezibwa ekiniga." 
Psalms17:10 Nibanga ekyeetwa esaasi, kandi bagambisa amaryo." 
Psalms17:11 Reeba, hati bantangire oku n'oku, tibarikundeebera kindi, kureka okuntuura aha nsi." 
Psalms17:12 Nibashusha nk'entare erangariire kuntaanyagura, nari nk'ekyana kyayo ekigweraire aheekiikire." 
Psalms17:13 Ai Nyakubaho, imuka, mukwatane, omwikarire, onkize egyo nyabibi, okwaitse rurara." 
Psalms17:14 Ai Nyakubaho, njuna abantu abu omugabo gwabo guri ogw'ensi egi. Obahaazye ebi waababiikiire, obahe abaana abu barikwenda, batungye ebishaagaine ebi baritsigira abaana baabo!" 
Psalms17:15 Kwonka nyowe ekihembo ekinshemereire n'okukureeba; reero nkisisiimuka, nkakuhungiraho." 
Psalms18:1 Ai Nyakubaho, maani gangye, nkukunda! Niiwe mujuni wangye onkiza ababisha." 
Psalms18:2 Ai Nyakubaho, niiwe rukiri rwangye kandi orugo rwangye; niiwe Ruhanga wangye onjuna. Niiwe nyesherekamu, ahabw'okuba oba rukiri rwangye, engabo yangye, amaani gampaisa obusinguzi, ekigo kigumire eki mpungiramu, kandi niiwe onkiza ababisha." 
Psalms18:3 Nyakubaho ou ntakira akanjuna abazigu, ahimbisibwe!" 
Psalms18:4 Ebingonzi bya Rufu bikanturuka oku n'oku; emyegyemure erikuhwerekyereza yampimintikiraho," 
Psalms18:5 emigoye y'owa Nyamuteza yanzingazinga; emitego ya Rufu yantanga omu maisho. 
Psalms18:6 Omu busaasi bwangye nkeeta Nyakubaho, naatakira Ruhanga wangye; yampuririra omuri Nyaruju ye, okutaka kwangye kwamuhika omu kutu." 
Psalms18:7 Bwanyima ensi ekatetema, yaatengyeeta, n'emizi y'enshozi yaanyiganyiga, yaatengyeetsibwa ekiniga kye." 
Psalms18:8 Omwika gwamucumbuuka omu nyindo, omu kanwa haatimbiramu omuriro ogurikurya busha, amakara garikwotsya gaakongyeera." 
Psalms18:9 Akainika eiguru, yaashuuma, omwirima ndindindi guri ahansi y'ebigyere bye;" 
Psalms18:10 yaaguruka aheekirwe kerubi, naazeereezibwa amapapa g'omuyaga." 
Psalms18:11 Akahindura omwirima obweshereko bwe, yaayesangiza ebicu biijwire amaizi." 
Psalms18:12 Omuri ebyo bicu burituuza haarugamu emirabyo erikutyankana, n'orubaare n'esasi z'omuriro." 
Psalms18:13 Nyakubaho yaahindira omu iguru, eiraka rya Rukiraboona ryahurirwa," 
Psalms18:14 yaarasha emyambi ye, yaabataataanisa, mpaho yaabatsindikira emirabyo, yaababinga." 
Psalms18:15 Obwo nibwo ahansi y'enyanja haareebwa, n'obuhamizo bw'ensi bukashuuruuka, ahabw'okuhoorera kwawe, ai Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuhirira kw'omwitsyo gw'omu nyindo zaawe." 
Psalms18:16 Yankununkirira naayema omu iguru, yankwata, yanjabura omu maizi maraingwa;" 
Psalms18:17 yanjuna abazigu abarikunkiza amaani. 
Psalms18:18 Bakantaahirira aha izooba ry'okuhikirirwa kwangye, kwonka Nyakubaho yambangira;" 
Psalms18:19 yanjuna, naayegyendera; yaanyiha omu kabi ahabw'okuba ankunda." 
Psalms18:20 Nyakubaho ampa ebihembo, ahabw'okuba nkora ebihikire; kandi ampa omugisha, ahabw'okuba ndi mwere." 
Psalms18:21 Manya nkuratira emitwarize ya Nyakubaho, tinaataana na Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms18:22 Encwa ye y'emanja ngyetegyeereza, kandi ebi yaataireho tinkabirekaga." 
Psalms18:23 Omu maisho ge ndi mwere, ahabw'okuba nyetantara ekibi." 
Psalms18:24 Nyakubaho ampa ebihembo, ahabw'okuba nkora ebihikire, ahabw'okuba areeba ku ndi mwere." 
Psalms18:25 Ai Nyakubaho, oba omwesigwa aha mwesigwa, kandi tobarirwa kibi ahari ogwo otakibarirwa." 
Psalms18:26 Oba mwere aha muntu ori mwere, kwonka enkyengi aha ngobya." 
Psalms18:27 Ojuna abeebundika, kwonka obundika abeetunguura." 
Psalms18:28 Ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, niiwe rumuri rwangye oruunyihamu omwirima." 
Psalms18:29 Waaba onyine, nimbaasa kuguruka ekigo nkacwekyereza engabo, ahabw'obuhwezi bwawe." 
Psalms18:30 Ruhanga ogwo emitwarize ye ehikire; ekigambo kya Nyakubaho ni nk'ekyoma ekitarimu nkamba. We wenka aba engabo ya boona abamuhungiraho. 
Psalms18:31 N'oha oba Ruhanga otari Nyakubaho? N'oha oba rukiri otari Ruhanga waitu? 
Psalms18:32 Niwe Ruhanga onzirika amaani, akampabura omuhanda ogutarimu kabi." 
Psalms18:33 Ampa amaguru nk'ag'empara; anyemereza aha nengo mpamire. 
Psalms18:34 Amanyiiza engaro zangye kurwana, n'emikono yangye kureega obuta bw'omuringa." 
Psalms18:35 Ai Nyakubaho, ondinda kandi onjuna; omukono gwawe gwa buryo gumbangira, obuhwezi bwawe buntunguura." 
Psalms18:36 Ompanguhiza oburabo, n'ebigyere byangye tibikeehinyaga." 
Psalms18:37 Mbinga abazigu bangye, mbahambya, tintabaaruka ntakabamazireho." 
Psalms18:38 Mbateera aha nsi obutaimuka, bagwa, mbaribatira." 
Psalms18:39 Okanzirika amaani g'okurwana, waabandika abarikundwanisa." 
Psalms18:40 Waareetera abazigu bangye kumpunga, haza abaanyanga naabahwerekyereza." 
Psalms18:41 Baataka, baabura kijuna, baahoogyera Nyakubaho, kwonka tiyaabagarukamu." 
Psalms18:42 Nkabateera, naabatuntumura nk'oku omuyaga gugira omucuucu; naabakaatagirira nk'ebyondo by'omu bihandagazi." 
Psalms18:43 Wankiza abagomi, wampindura omutegyeki w'amahanga. Abantu abu naabaire ntarikumanya, hati nibo baheereza bangye." 
Psalms18:44 Abanyamahanga baija kumpakwaho; tibaahwama, bantega amatu, bampurira." 
Psalms18:45 Baija bahahaire, baahwa endugu omu bigo byabo nibatetema." 
Psalms18:46 Nyakubaho naakaramaare! Rukiri rwangye ahimbisibwe! Ruhanga omujuni wangye asingizibwe! 
Psalms18:47 Niwe Ruhanga ompoorera, akangomoorera amahanga." 
Psalms18:48 Akankiza abazigu, yanjuna ababisha, yantunguura naakira abanteire." 
Psalms18:49 N'ahabw'ekyo, Nyakubaho, niinyija kukurangaana omu mahanga, nyeshongore eby'okukuhimbisa." 
Psalms18:50 Ruhanga atuura naaha obusinguzi omugabe ou yaayemekire; akamworeka rukundo etahararuka, niwe Daudi n'abaijukuru ebiro byona." 
Psalms19:1 Eiguru rimanyisa ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga, n'ahaiguru owa Herebe hooreka ebi yaahangire." 
Psalms19:2 Eizooba riteekyerereza erindi, n'ekiro kitebeza ekindi ekyo kitiinwa." 
Psalms19:3 Tihaine kateezo koona, tihaine kagambo, nari eiraka eribaasa kuhurirwa;" 
Psalms19:4 kwonka obutumwa bwabyo bubuga ensi yoona, n'amakuru gaabwo gahika aha muheru gwayo. Eizooba akariteerera eihema ahaiguru;" 
Psalms19:5 rishohora nka kishwera naaruga omu kishengye kye, ryemaaringa nk'emanzi erikuza kwiruka omu mpaka." 
Psalms19:6 Rituruka aha muheru gw'eiguru, ricwekanisa, rirengyera aha gundi muheru, hatariho kantu akabaasa kweshereka ekibabo kyaryo." 
Psalms19:7 Eiteeka rya Nyakubaho rihikire, rigarura omutima omunda; Ebi Nyakubaho yaaragiire byesigwa, biha obwengye abacureezi." 
Psalms19:8 Enyegyesa ya Nyakubaho ehikire, egwisa gye omutima. Ekiragiro kya Nyakubaho nikyetegyerezibwa, kihwezesa amaisho." 
Psalms19:9 Okutiina Nyakubaho ni kurungi, kugumaho ebiro byona. Encwa ya Nyakubaho y'emanja n'ey'amazima, buri emwe ehikiriire." 
Psalms19:10 Ebyo byetengwa okukira ezaabu, nangwa n'okukira ezaabu empuuhe. Ebigambo bye binuzire okukira obwoki, nangwa n'okukira engabo y'obwoki erikutoonya." 
Psalms19:11 Kandi kwo, omuheereza waawe nibyo bimutendeka, n'okubyorobera kumuzimuurira munonga." 
Psalms19:12 Beitu n'oha obaasa kumanya ebishobyo bye? Onyozyeho ebibi byangye ebiinyesherekire. 
Psalms19:13 Ondinde, nyowe omuheereza waawe, ndekye kwetunguura; otarindeka kukantegyeka. Obwo nibwo ndiba ntaine ky'okuhaahuuzibwa, ntaine kihango kinsiisire." 
Psalms19:14 Ai Nyakubaho, rukiri rwangye kandi omucunguzi wangye, ebi ngamba n'ebi nteekateeka, ninkushaba, obisiime." 
Psalms20:1 Nyakubaho akugarukyemu omu biro by'enaku! Ruhanga wa Yakobo akurinde! 
Psalms20:2 Akuhe obuhwezi oburikuruga omu mwanya gwe ogurikwera; akubangire naayema Siyooni! 
Psalms20:3 Aijukye empongano zaawe zoona, ayaakiire ebitambo byawe ebicwekize." 
Psalms20:4 Akuhe ebi omutima gwawe gurikwenda, ahikiirize enaama zaawe zoona." 
Psalms20:5 Reero ahabw'okusingura kwawe, tukuteerere akaari k'okushemererwa. Twimutsye ebendera omu iziina rya Ruhanga waitu! Nyakubaho akuhe byona ebi oshaba!" 
Psalms20:6 Mbwenu, naamanya Nyakubaho ku ajuna ou yaayemekire. Kandi ku amugarukamu naayema omu iguru rye eririkwera, akamuhaisa obusinguzi bw'amaani n'omukono gwe gwa buryo." 
Psalms20:7 Abamwe beesiga ebigaari, abandi embaraasi; kwonka itwe twesiga Mukama Ruhanga waitu!" 
Psalms20:8 Ekyabo n'okuhwamu amaani bakagwa, kwonka ekyaitu n'okwemerera tukaguma tuhamire!" 
Psalms20:9 Ai Nyakubaho, juna omugabe, haza ku turaakwete, otugarukyemu." 
Psalms21:1 Ai Nyakubaho, omugabe naayesiimira obushoboorozi bwawe. Ebishi, okujuna kwawe kumunanura munonga!" 
Psalms21:2 Okamuha eki omutima gwe gwenda; tiwaamwima ki yaashabire. 
Psalms21:3 Okamubuganisa emigisha mirungi, waamujweka aha mutwe ekirunga ky'ezaabu empuuhe." 
Psalms21:4 Akashaba okumereera, waakumuha; nikwo kuramaara ebiro byona." 
Psalms21:5 Okamuhwera, yaagira ekitiinwa kingi; waamuhunda okurangaanwa n'obukuru." 
Psalms21:6 Eego, waamuha emigisha ehamire ey'ebiro byona; okuguma omu maisho gaawe kwamureetera okushemererwa kwingi." 
Psalms21:7 Buzima omugabe oyesiga Nyakubaho, ahabw'embabazi za Rukiraboona, ategyeka ahamire." 
Psalms21:8 Omukono gwawe guryakyaka abazigu baawe boona, omukono gwawe gwa buryo gukyakye abakwanga." 
Psalms21:9 Ku oriboneka, oryabootsya babugume nk'omuriro gw'ekikoomi, Nyakubaho aryabamira aine ekiniga kingi, omuriro gubamareho." 
Psalms21:10 Abaana baabo oryabeeyerera omu nsi, na baijukuru baabo bahwe omu bantu."
