Psalms21:11 Nobu barikugiira omu naama y'okukora kubi, bakahanuura nk'oku barikwenda, tibarisinga." 
Psalms21:12 Ahabw'okuba oryababinga bakuhungye, oryayorekyeza emyambi yaawe ahamaisho gaabo." 
Psalms21:13 Ai Nyakubaho, ohimbisibwe ahabw'amaani gaawe. Haza tweshongore, tusingize obushoboorozi bwawe." 
Psalms22:1 Ruhanga wangye, Ruhanga wangye, ahabw'enki ontsigireho? Ebigambo by'okuganya kwangye ka bifiire busha!" 
Psalms22:2 Ruhanga wangye, nkweta eizooba ryona, toonyetaba, ndaara nimpooga, timpuumura." 
Psalms22:3 Haza kunu ori Orikwera, osingami ahagati y'Abaisiraeli nibakusingiza." 
Psalms22:4 Niiwe baatataitwe baayesigire; bakakwesiga, waabajuna." 
Psalms22:5 Bakakutakira, waabakiza; tibakakwesigiraga busha." 
Psalms22:6 Kwonka nyowe hati ndi omunyongororwa, tinkiri muntu! Omu bantu ndi ekihemu ekirikugaywa boona." 
Psalms22:7 Abarikundeeba boona bampema, bampa mutinzi nibanshekyeerera, bati:" 
Psalms22:8 Akeesiga Nyakubaho, k'abe niwe yaamucungura! Ku araabe ari munywani we, naamujune!" 
Psalms22:9 Manya niiwe waanyihire omu nda ya maawe, kandi okandinda nkiri aha mabeere ge." 
Psalms22:10 Okwiha obu naazaarwa niiwe oba Ruhanga wangye. 
Psalms22:11 Otanza hare, ahabw'okuba akabi kari haihi, tiinyine kihwera!" 
Psalms22:12 Abazigu baingi baanyehinguririize nk'enimi, bantangatangire nk'enimi z'amaani eza Bashani." 
Psalms22:13 Baanyashamiire, basheegire nibatsinda nk'entare." 
Psalms22:14 Nsheeshekire nk'amaizi, amagufa gangye goona gataine. Omutima gwangye guri nk'enzibuuro erikuyaga, niguyagira omu nda yangye." 
Psalms22:15 Enkanka enyomire nk'orugusyo, orurimi rwangye ruramataine n'enshaya." 
Psalms22:16 Omuna gw'embwa guunyehinguririize; enkozi z'ebibi zintangatangire; bankomire emikono n'amaguru, bantsiga ngarami omu mucuucu, ndi ow'okufa." 
Psalms22:17 Nimbaasa kubara amagufa gangye goona. Abazigu bangye bampangire amaisho nibashunga; 
Psalms22:18 nibabagana ebijwaro byangye, n'emyenda yangye nibagiteerera enteenyu." 
Psalms22:19 Ai Nyakubaho, otanza hare! Iwe maani gangye, rahuka kunjuna!" 
Psalms22:20 Onjune rurara, n'amagara gangye ogakize embwa zibambaire." 
Psalms22:21 Onyihe omu maino g'entare, ndekye kwitwa kubi amahembe g'embogo." 
Psalms22:22 Ndyarangaana eiziina ryawe omuri beene waitu, nkuhimbisize omu ruteerane ruhango, nti: Imwe abatiina Nyakubaho, mumusingize!" 
Psalms22:23 Naimwe oruzaaro rwona orwa Yakobo, mumuhe ekitiinwa! kandi naimwe orwa Isiraeli, mumutiine." 
Psalms22:24 Manya taragayire mworo aitsirwe enaku, nobu kwakuba okumunuga; kandi taramwimire maisho, kureka ku yaamutakiire, yaamwetaba." 
Psalms22:25 Niiwe mpimbisa omu ruteerane rukuru. Ndyahikiiriza okuhiga kwangye omu maisho g'abamutiina. 
Psalms22:26 Abooro baryatunga ebi barikwenda, barye bahaagye. Abasherura Nyakubaho baryamuhimbisa. Emitima yaabo neekamereere!" 
Psalms22:27 Ab'ensi yoona baryaijuka Nyakubaho, bamugarukire, n'enganda zoona ez'omu mahanga zimuramye." 
Psalms22:28 Manya Nyakubaho aba omugabe, otegyeka amahanga goona!" 
Psalms22:29 Abanyamaryo b'omu nsi yoona baryamuramya, n'ab'okugaruka omu mucuucu boona bamutangirire; naanye niwe arimbaisaho," 
Psalms22:30 n'abaana bangye bakamuheereza. 
Psalms22:31 Abantu baryarangirira ab'obusingye oburiija ebya Mukama, bamanyise abatakazairwe eby'okuhikiirira kwe. Ebyo byona niwe yaabikozire." 
Psalms23:1 Nyakubaho niwe muriisa wangye, tindikyena kintu kyona." 
Psalms23:2 Anzaagiza omu ruhiira rw'omutaasyo, antsyora aha maizi agarikuruhuura," 
Psalms23:3 angaruramu amagara. Ahabw'eiziina rye, anyebembera nandabya omu mihanda ehikire." 
Psalms23:4 Nobu naakuraba omu ruhanga rurimu omwirima ndindindi, tinkaatiina kabi kona, ahabw'okuba onyine. Enkoni yaawe n'eshando yaawe bingarura omutima omunda." 
Psalms23:5 Onteekateekyera ebyokurya omu maisho g'abazigu bangye; onshuka amajuta aha mutwe; ekikopo kyangye nikisheesheka. 
Psalms23:6 Buzima oburungi n'embabazi bituura binshagatiire ebiro by'amagara gangye byona! Omwa Nyakubaho nimwo ndiguma nintaaha. 
Psalms24:1 Ensi n'eya Nyakubaho, n'ebigirimu byona, ensi yoona hamwe n'abagitwiremu;" 
Psalms24:2 ahabw'okuba niwe yaagitaire aha mayanja, akagihamiza kimwe aha nyanja." 
Psalms24:3 N'oha oriikirizibwa kutemba orushozi rwa Nyakubaho, nari okwemerera omu mwanya gwe ogurikwera?" 
Psalms24:4 Kureka ogwo oine engaro zitaine kabi, n'omutima gushemeire; otata mutima ha bitaine muhoho, kandi otarahira bishuba." 
Psalms24:5 Nyakubaho amuha omugisha, kandi Ruhanga omujuni we amwihaho orubanja." 
Psalms24:6 Abari nk'abo, nibo benda kukureeba, abasherura amaisho gaawe, iwe Ruhanga wa Yakobo!" 
Psalms24:7 Imwe marembo 'mwe, nimwimutsye ebisasi byanyu, naimwe nyigi za ira 'mwe, nimwigukye, omugabe w'ekitiinwa abone kutaahamu!" 
Psalms24:8 Ogwo mugabe w'ekitiinwa n'oha? Ni Nyakubaho w'amaani, emanzi; Nyakubaho, emanzi omu rugamba!" 
Psalms24:9 Imwe marembo 'mwe, nimwimutsye ebisasi byanyu, naimwe nyigi za ira, nimwigukye, omugabe w'ekitiinisa abone kutaahamu!" 
Psalms24:10 Ogwo Mugabe w'ekitiinwa n'oha? Ni Nyakubaho, Mukama w'amahe, Omugabe w'ekitiinwa!" 
Psalms25:1 Ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye niiwe ngambira ekindi aha mutima. 
Psalms25:2 Niiwe nyesiga, otandeka nkahemuka, otaikiriza abazigu bangye kuunyehimbisizaho." 
Psalms25:3 Manya abakwesiga tibahemuka, abareebeza abandi busha baitwa enshoni." 
Psalms25:4 Ai Nyakubaho, ompabure emihanda yaawe, kandi onyegyese emitwarize yaawe." 
Psalms25:5 Ontooze omuhanda gwawe ogw'amazima kandi onyegyese, ahabw'okuba niiwe Ruhanga onjuna. Ai Nyakubaho, ahabw'oburungi bwawe, niiwe nyesiga eizooba ryona." 
Psalms25:6 Nyakubaho, ijuka embabazi zaawe na rukundo yaawe etahararuka, ebi otuura nooyoreka okwiha ira." 
Psalms25:7 Ai Nyakubaho, otaijuka ebibi ebi naakozire ninkinyeeta; kureka onyijukye ahabwa rukundo yaawe etahararuka, n'ahabwa oburungi bwawe." 
Psalms25:8 Nyakubaho aba murungi kandi ow'amazima; abasiisi abahabura omuhanda," 
Psalms25:9 omucureezi amwegyesa ebihikire, n'omunaku amuhabura oku araatwaze." 
Psalms25:10 Emitwarize ya Nyakubaho yoona eba rukundo etahararuka n'amazima, aha bahikiiriza endagaano ye n'ebi yaaragiire." 
Psalms25:11 Ai Nyakubaho, ahabw'eiziina ryawe, onsaasire orubanja rwangye, ahabw'okuba ni ruhango." 
Psalms25:12 Weena otiina Nyakubaho, aryahaburwa omuhanda ogu ashemereire kutoora;" 
Psalms25:13 omutima gwe guryaguubwa gye, n'abaana be ensi eryaba eyaabo." 
Psalms25:14 Enaama za Nyakubaho zimanywa abamutiina n'endagaano ye ebaha obwengye. 
Psalms25:15 Amaisho gangye obutoosha ngahanga Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba aiha ebigyere byangye omu mutego." 
Psalms25:16 Ai Nyakubaho, ompindukire, ongirire embabazi, nyowe emboijana kandi omunaku!" 
Psalms25:17 Ntambira amaganya g'omu mutima, onyihe omu busaasi." 
Psalms25:18 Oyetegyereze obujune bwangye n'okubonabona kwangye, onsaasire ebibi byangye byona." 
Psalms25:19 Reeba abazigu bangye nibakanya, na rwango yaabo neeyeyongyera." 
Psalms25:20 Ndinda kandi onjune, otandeka nkahemuka; niiwe mpungiraho." 
Psalms25:21 Okuba mwere n'okuba ohikiriire bindinde, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho, niiwe nyesiga." 
Psalms25:22 Ai Ruhanga, cungura Isiraeli, ogiihe omu naku zaayo zoona." 
Psalms26:1 Ai Nyakubaho, ba niiwe wantonganira! Ahabw'okuba ngyenda ndi mwere, okwesiga Nyakubaho kwangye tikutengatenga." 
Psalms26:2 Ai Nyakubaho, ongyeze kandi onshwijume, oyetegyereze omutima gwangye n'obwengye bwangye," 
Psalms26:3 ahabw'okuba rukundo yaawe etahararuka niyo enyebembera, naanye nkagyenda ntarikukuhemukaho." 
Psalms26:4 Tinshutama na bataine mugasho, tinkwatanisa na ndyarya." 
Psalms26:5 Nnuga ekigombe ky'ababi, kandi nyanga kushutama n'abasiisi." 
Psalms26:6 Nnaaba engaro kworeka ku ndi mwere, nyeteerana n'abarikweziguuruka eitambiro ryawe, ai Nyakubaho," 
Psalms26:7 nindangaana eby'okutangaaza byawe byona. 
Psalms26:8 Ai Nyakubaho, nkunda enju yaawe ei otuuramu, ahu ekitiinwa kyawe kitaaha." 
Psalms26:9 Otandeka kufubirwa hamwe n'abasiisi, n'amagara gangye kuhwerekyerera n'ag'abaitsi," 
Psalms26:10 ab'engaro zihagaziibwe ebicumuro, n'emikono eijwire enguzi." 
Psalms26:11 Kwonka nyowe ngyenda ndi mwere; ai Nyakubaho, oncungure, ongirire embabazi." 
Psalms26:12 Ndyakuhimbisa ndi omu ruteerane rukuru; ekigyere kyangye kyemereire omu muhanda guhikire. 
Psalms27:1 Nyakubaho n'orumuri rwangye kandi omujuni wangye, mbwenu n'oha ou nditiina? Nyakubaho aba ekigo eki nyesherekamu, n'oha obaasa kuntiinisa!" 
Psalms27:2 Abantu babi ku bampururira kugaashuura omubiri gwangye, abazigu bangye abandwanisa n'abaanyanga, nibo bateera entsibo bakagwa." 
Psalms27:3 Nobu engabo zaakuteeka enteeko kundwanisa, tinkaatiina; nobu baakuntengyera orugamba, nkaaguma n'obwesigye." 
Psalms27:4 Eki ndikushaba Nyakubaho, kandi eki ndikuronda, ni kimwe kyonka: Okutuura omu nju ye ebiro byona, nkashemerererwa oburungi bwe, kandi nkamwehanuuzaho omuri Nyaruju ye." 
Psalms27:5 Ahabw'okuba omu biro by'enaku anyigamya omu sanga ye, ansherekyera kimwe endugu omuri Nyaruju, antungika aha rukiri." 
Psalms27:6 Kandi hati omutwe gwangye ngubangaraize, niinyesiimirana abazigu abaanyehinguririize. Omuri Nyaruju ye ndyamutambira ebitambo nimmusiima ahabw'okuntabaarura. Nyakubaho ndyamweshongorera, mmuzaanire!" 
Psalms27:7 Ai Nyakubaho, hurira okutaka kwangye! Ongirire esaasi! Ongarukyemu!" 
Psalms27:8 Omutima gwangye gwangira ngu mbe niiwe naasherura. Mbwenu Nyakubaho, niiwe ndikusherura," 
Psalms27:9 otaanyima amaisho. Nyowe omuhereeza waawe, otambinga onyiniire ekiniga, ahabw'okuba niiwe muhwezi wangye. Ai Ruhanga omujuni wangye, otantsigaho, otannagiirira!" 
Psalms27:10 Tata na maawe ku barimpwaho, hoona Nyakubaho aryanyanduura." 
Psalms27:11 Ai Nyakubaho, ahabw'abazigu bangye, onyebembere omu muhanda gwawe ogushorongire;" 
Psalms27:12 otandekurira abo bazigu, ahabw'okuba abarikumbeiherera baanyimukiriire nibasheemeeka, banneneire amaino." 
Psalms27:13 Eki ndikuhamya nikyo eki; ndyareeba oburungi bwa Nyakubaho omu nsi y'abahuriire. 
Psalms27:14 Mbwenu mwesigye Nyakubaho! Mugire amaani, mugume omutima. Eego, mwesigye Nyakubaho!" 
Psalms28:1 Ai Nyakubaho, rukiri rwangye, niiwe ndikutakira, otaanyefiisiza amatu; ahabw'okuba waaba otaanyetabire, ndyashuuma okuzimu nk'abandi." 
Psalms28:2 Ai Nyakubaho, hurira okweshengyereza kwangye, ninkutakira ngu onjune, niinyimutsya emikono, ngyorekyeize owaawe aharikwerera kimwe." 
Psalms28:3 Otampinyirana n'ababi, okantwara n'enkozi z'ebibi abarikugambira bataahi baabo karimi karungi, kunu eitima ribari omu mutima." 
Psalms28:4 Ai Nyakubaho, obazimuurire ebi bakora n'ebi bacumura; obaihure ebibashemereire, ebi baakozire n'engaro zaabo!" 
Psalms28:5 Ka n'empumi eziteeta ha mirimo ya Nyakubaho, ei we wenka akora! Aryabafubira abacwekyerereze kimwe." 
Psalms28:6 Nyakubaho ahimbisibwe; ahabw'okuba ahurira okushaba kwangye. 
Psalms28:7 Nyakubaho niwe maani gangye kandi engabo yangye, kandi niwe nyesiga; akampwera, n'ahabw'ekyo nyijwire amashemererwa, nimmusingiza n'amagara gangye goona." 
Psalms28:8 Nyakubaho aba amaani g'abantu be, kandi ekigo kigumire, eki omusiigwa we ahungiramu." 
Psalms28:9 Juna abantu baawe abu waayetungiire, obahe omugisha, Obe omuriisa waabo, obaramire ebiro byona!" 
Psalms29:1 Imwe ab'omu iguru, muhe Nyakubaho ekitiinwa, Muhimbise Nyakubaho ow'ekitiinisa n'obushoboorozi." 
Psalms29:2 Mumuhe ekitiinwa ekimushemereire, mumuramize omu mwanya gwe ogurikwera." 
Psalms29:3 Ruhanga ow'ekitiinisa ahinda. Eiraka rya Nyakubaho rihindira ahaiguru y'amaizi! Nyakubaho ahindira ahaiguru y'amaizi maingi! 
Psalms29:4 Eiraka rya Nyakubaho n'ery'amaani! Eiraka rya Nyakubaho n'ery'ekitiinisa kingi! 
Psalms29:5 Eiraka rya Nyakubaho rishatagura emisisa. Nyakubaho ashatagura emisisa ya Lebanooni," 
Psalms29:6 Lebanooni agikinisa nk'omutavu, kandi Sirooni yo, agikinisa nk'ekimasha ky'embogo." 
Psalms29:7 Eiraka rya Nyakubaho rinaga endimi z'omuriro. 
Psalms29:8 Eiraka rya Nyakubaho ritengyeetsa eihamba; Nyakubaho atengyeetsa eihamba rya Kadeshi. 
Psalms29:9 Eiraka rya Nyakubaho ritoroozya empara, rikonkobora ebibira. Boona ab'omu kikaari kye bamusingiza nibagira bati: Ori ow'ekitiinisa!" 
Psalms29:10 Obu Nyakubaho yaahimintura omwegyemure, akashutama naategyeka; ari omugabe ebiro byona." 
Psalms29:11 Nyakubaho aha abantu be amaani, abaha omugisha, bagira obusingye." 
Psalms30:1 Ai Nyakubaho ninkusingiza, ahabw'okuba ombangiire, tiwaareka bazigu bangye kunteerera enaku." 
Psalms30:2 Ai Nyakubaho, Ruhanga wangye, nkakutakira ngu onjune, wantambira." 
Psalms30:3 Ai Nyakubaho okaanyiha okuzimu owa Nyamuteza, omu bashuumireyo, wangaruramu amagara." 
Psalms30:4 Imwe beesigwa ba Nyakubaho, mweshongore eby'okumuhimbisa kandi musiime eiziina rye." 
Psalms30:5 Ekiniga kye n'eky'akaanya, embabazi ze zituuraho. Omwabazyo n'amarira, akasheeshe n'okushemererwa." 
Psalms30:6 Obu naabaire ndi gye, nkaba ngira nti: Tihariho kirintegyeetsa ebiro byona!" 
Psalms30:7 Ai Nyakubaho, embabazi zaawe zikampamya nk'orushozi; kwonka ku waanyimire amaisho, naaburaburirwa." 
Psalms30:8 Ai Nyakubaho, ninkutakira, naakweshengyereza ngirira esaasi." 
Psalms30:9 Mbwenu ku naakufa, okaagasirwa ki? Ku ndikushuuma okuzimu, noogasirwa ki? Ebyo, omucuucu gukaakuhimbisa? Nari gukaarangaana amazima gaawe?" 
Psalms30:10 Ai Nyakubaho, mpurira, ongirire embabazi! Ai Nyakubaho, mpwera!" 
Psalms30:11 Okucura kwangye okakuhindura okuzina, okanzirikuurura ekijwaro ky'okuganya, wanzirika ekijwaro ky'okushemererwa." 
Psalms30:12 Nikyo ndigumira ninkweshongorera ntarikutuuza. Ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, ndyakuhimbisa ebiro byona." 
Psalms31:1 Ai Nyakubaho, niiwe mpungiraho, otarindeka nkahemuka. Ahabw'okuhikiirira kwawe onjune, ontambire!" 
Psalms31:2 Ontegye okutu, orahukye kunjuna! Ombeere orukiri rw'okuhungiramu, kandi orugo rugumire orw'okunjuna!" 
Psalms31:3 Manya niiwe rukiri rwangye kandi orugo rwangye; ahabw'eiziina ryawe, onyebembere nompabura." 
Psalms31:4 Ondinde, ntagwa omu mutego ogu bantegire, ahabw'okuba niiwe buhungiro bwangye." 
Psalms31:5 Ai Nyakubaho, niinyeta omu mikono yaawe, ahabw'okuba oncungwire." 
Psalms31:6 Ai Ruhanga ow'amazima, oyanga abaramya emandwa ezitaine mutambo; kwonka nyowe, Nyakubaho, nkwesiga." 
Psalms31:7 Ndyayesingiza kandi nnanukire omuri rukundo yaawe etahararuka. Iwe, owaareebire obukyene bwangye, okamanya n'obujune bw'omutima gwangye," 
Psalms31:8 torandekuriire bazigu bangye, kureka okata ebigyere byangye aheeshanzire." 
Psalms31:9 Ai Nyakubaho, ongirire embabazi, ndi omu maganya. Obujune bumpwereize amaisho, bwanzindaaza amaraka, naahwa aha magufa." 
Psalms31:10 Ahabw'okuba nzaahiibwe obusaasi, emyaka yangye ngimazire nintsindagana. Amaganya gammaziremu amaani, n'amagufa gangye gaahwamu omushokooro." 
Psalms31:11 Abazigu bangye, buri omwe nangaya, bataahi bangye nibannuga, bagyenzi bangye nibantiina, n'abarikundeeba omu nguuto bandabisaho obwira." 
Psalms31:12 Nyebire nk'ofiire otakiijukwa, naaba nk'ekintu ekinagirwe." 
Psalms31:13 Nimpurira abazigu bangye nibahwihwitsa; obwoba bunturukire oku n'oku. Nibakwatanisa kucuma enaama y'okuunyita. 
Psalms31:14 Kwonka Nyakubaho, niiwe nyesiga ngumize nti: Niiwe Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms31:15 Iwe omanya ebiro by'amagara gangye, onjune, onyihe omu mikono y'abazigu n'abarikumpiiganisa." 
Psalms31:16 Ai Nyakubaho, onshemuukire, nyowe omuheereza waawe kandi ahabwa rukundo yaawe, etahararuka onkize." 
Psalms31:17 Ai Nyakubaho, ninkutakira otandeka nkahemuka. K'ekihemu kigwere ababi! Nibakashuume okuzimu owa Nyamuteza baigaire akanwa," 
Psalms31:18 endimi zaabo ezirikubeiha zigobirwe, ahabw'okwekunikira abahikiriire, n'ahabw'amaryo n'okugayana." 
Psalms31:19 Ai Nyakubaho, oburungi bwawe ka ni bwingi, obu waabiikiire abakutiina obu oha abakuhungiraho, ngu bureebwe abantu boona!" 
Psalms31:20 Obashereka ahu ori, baba buhooro, bakira enaama mbi z'abantu; obarindira omu mwanya gugumire, bakira abazigu barikubajuma." 
Psalms31:21 Nyakubaho ahimbisibwe, onyoreka rukundo erikutangaaza omu rurembo rw'amaani!" 
Psalms31:22 Omu kuborooga kwangye, nkaamuza nti: Ncwirwe omu maisho gaawe! Kwonka ku naakwetsire ngu ompwere, waahurira okweshengyereza kwangye." 
Psalms31:23 Imwe mwena abarikwera ba Nyakubaho, mumukunde! Nyakubaho arinda abeesigwa, kwonka abanyamaryo abafubira ataine saasi." 
Psalms31:24 Imwe mwena abagira amatsiko omuri Nyakubaho, nimuhame, mugume omutima!" 
Psalms32:1 Ka n'ow'omugisha omuntu osaasiirwe ebicumuro, akaihwaho ebibi!" 
Psalms32:2 Ka n'ow'omugisha, ou Nyakubaho atataho rubanja, ou omutima gwe gutaine bugobya!" 
Psalms32:3 Obu naabaire nkyangire kweteisa, nkahwa aha magufa, naarenzya eizooba nimpigima," 
Psalms32:4 ahabw'omukono gwawe kuguma gumpingamiire nyomushana na nyekiro. Naakarangatana, nk'ebikonko byomiibwe omushana gw'ekyanda." 
Psalms32:5 Naarugaho naayemera ku naakucumwireho; ntakishereka birikunshinja, naagira nti: Ka nyetuurire Nyakubaho, mmwaturire ebicumuro byangye. Naiwe nikwo kubinsaasira, okaanyihaho ebibi byangye." 
Psalms32:6 Nikyo buri muheereza waawe akweshengyerereza omu bunaku bw'omunyangararo; nobu emyegyemure yaakuhimintika eta, tekaamuhikaho." 
Psalms32:7 Niiwe bweshereko bwangye; ondinda ndi omu bunaku bw'akabi, okanshagatiza ebyeshongoro by'okujunwa." 
Psalms32:8 Nyakubaho nawe ati: Niinyija kukwegyesa, nkuhabure omuhanda ogu oraatoore; nkurinde kandi nkuhe obwengye." 
Psalms32:9 Otaba nk'embaraasi nari enyumbu ezitagira bwengye, ezenda kutegyekwa zitairwe ekyoma omu kanwa n'enkoba omu bitsya, ngu omuntu abone kuzihika haihi." 
Psalms32:10 Ebibonabono bingi bigwera ababi, kwonka oyesiga Nyakubaho, rukundo ye etahararuka emuhumbika." 
Psalms32:11 Imwe bahikiriire 'mwe, nimwemurikye nimwesiimira omuri Nyakubaho; naimwe mwena ab'emitima y'amazima, nimuteere akaari k'okushemererwa." 
Psalms33:1 Imwe abahikiriire mwena, munanukire omuri Nyakubaho, okuhimbisa kushemereire ab'emitima y'amazima." 
Psalms33:2 Musiime Nyakubaho n'enanga, mumuteerere enanga y'emirya ikumi;" 
Psalms33:3 mugiteere gye, mugijumeeze, nimumweshongorera ekyeshongoro kisya!" 
Psalms33:4 Ebi Nyakubaho agamba biba eby'amazima, n'ebi akora byona babyesiga;" 
Psalms33:5 akunda amazima n'obwinganisa; ensi eijwire rukundo ye etahararuka. 
Psalms33:6 Ekigambo kya Nyakubaho nikyo yaahangiise eiguru, n'omwitsyo gwe nigwo yaahangiise amahe gaamwo goona." 
Psalms33:7 Arundaana amaizi g'amayanja nk'orikugashuka omu nyungu; ag'amatimba agabiika omu mabiikiro ge. 
Psalms33:8 Ensi yoona k'etiine Nyakubaho, n'abagituuramu boona bamuhe ekitiinwa!" 
Psalms33:9 Ahabw'okuba ku yaagambire, ensi yaahangwa; ku yaaragiire, ensi yaagumaho." 
Psalms33:10 Nyakubaho ahindura busha enaama z'amahanga, n'ebi abantu bamaririire kukora abiyaayuura." 
Psalms33:11 Kwonka enaama za Nyakubaho zituura zihamire, ebi ayenda bigumaho obusingye bwona." 
Psalms33:12 Eihanga eri Nyakubaho aba Ruhanga waaryo n'ery'omugisha, nibo bantu abu yaayetooraniire kuba abe ahabwe." 
Psalms33:13 Nyakubaho anaga amaisho ayemi omu iguru, naareeba abantu boona." 
Psalms33:14 Asingama aha kitebe ky'obugabe, naayetegyereza boona abatuura omu nsi." 
Psalms33:15 Niwe ahanga emitima y'abantu boona, kandi amanya byona ebi bakora." 
Psalms33:16 Eihe rihango tiryo rijuna omugabe, n'emanzi tetambirwa maani gaayo amaingi." 
Psalms33:17 Omuntu okwesiga embaraasi kumurinda, n'okwebeiha; nobu yaakuba eine amaani gata, tekaabasa kumukiza." 
Psalms33:18 Nyakubaho arinda abarikumutiina, n'abeesiga rukundo ye etahararuka," 
Psalms33:19 ngu abakize okufa, kandi abarinde omu ifa, bagume bahuriire." 
Psalms33:20 Tutegyereza Nyakubaho, omuhwezi waitu kandi engabo yaitu." 
Psalms33:21 Emitima yaitu enanukira omuriwe, kandi twesiga eiziina rye eririkwera." 
Psalms33:22 Ai Nyakubaho, rukundo yaawe etahararuka k'etugumeho nk'oku turikukwesiga." 
Psalms34:1 Ndyaguma mpimbise Nyakubaho, okumusingiza tikurinduga ha rurimi." 
Psalms34:2 Ndyasingiza Nyakubaho; abarikubonabona bakuhurire beesiime! 
Psalms34:3 Mukwatanise naanye turangaane obukuru bwa Nyakubaho, twevugire hamwe eiziina rye." 
Psalms34:4 Nkeeshengyereza Nyakubaho, yangarukamu; yankiza ebyabaire nibintiinisa byona." 
Psalms34:5 Weena omuhanga amaisho, ashemuuka, kandi tabwerabwera." 
Psalms34:6 Enshoberwa ku etaka, Nyakubaho agihurira, kandi agiiha omu busaasi obu erimu bwona." 
Psalms34:7 Maraika wa Nyakubaho ateera orusiisira, aruzigooza abamutiina kubarinda." 
Psalms34:8 Nimuroze, mureeba Nyakubaho oku aba murungi; omuhungiraho aine omugisha!" 
Psalms34:9 Nimutiine Nyakubaho, imwe entoore ze: abamutiina tibagira ki bakyena." 
Psalms34:10 Ebishore by'entare obundi bigyenda n'enjara, kwonka abasherura Nyakubaho tibabura kirungi kyona." 
Psalms34:11 Baana bangye, nimwije muntegye okutu, mbeegyese okutiina Nyakubaho." 
Psalms34:12 N'oha omuriimwe otarikwenda kunanurwa eby'amagara aga, akaramaara agogyeire?" 
Psalms34:13 K'okugamba eby'eitima kucwekye, n'ebigaaniiro by'obugobya bikurugye aha minwa!" 
Psalms34:14 Oyetantare ebibi, okore ebirungi; oitanire obusingye kandi obusherure." 
Psalms34:15 Nyakubaho ata amaisho aha bahikiriire, kandi ahurira okutaka kwabo." 
Psalms34:16 Nyakubaho ateera ababi ekitsyori, ngu batariijukwa obundi omu nsi." 
Psalms34:17 Ku bateera enduuru, Nyakubaho abahurira, kandi abaiha omu naku zaabo zoona." 
Psalms34:18 Nyakubaho aba haihi ab'omutima guhendekire, kandi ajuna abeeteisiize kimwe." 
Psalms34:19 Ebibonabono birengyesereize bigwisa kubi ohikiriire, kwonka Nyakubaho abimutambira byona;" 
Psalms34:20 arinda amagufa ge goona, kandi tariikiriza igufa rye na rimwe kuhendwa." 
Psalms34:21 Ekibi kiryaita enkozi zaakyo, n'abanga abahikiriire baryafubirwa." 
Psalms34:22 Kwonka Nyakubaho acungura abamuheereza, n'abamuhungiraho taribafubira." 
Psalms35:1 Ai Nyakubaho, tonganisa abarikuntonganisa, orwanise abarikundwanisa." 
Psalms35:2 Kwata engabo n'akagabo, Oimukye, ompe emikono!" 
Psalms35:3 Abampiigire obatigitire eicumu n'omuhanda. Ompuumurize noogira oti; Niinye nkujuna. 
Psalms35:4 Enshoni n'obuhemu biite abarikwenda kuunyita! Abarikumpayira kummiza ensi, bagarurwe enyima bahemukye!" 
Psalms35:5 Maraika wa Nyakubaho k'ababingye, babe nk'ebishushunga birikutuntumurwa omuyaga." 
Psalms35:6 Omuhanda gwabo gugire omwirima n'obuterezi, maraika wa Nyakubaho ababingire!" 
Psalms35:7 Bakantega ekiguha, bantimbira obusya ntabarahwire;" 
Psalms35:8 kwonka okucwekyerera kuryabagwaho batakumanyire, n'ekiguha ki bategire kibe nibo kyakwata, bagwe omu busya obu baatimbire." 
Psalms35:9 Haza ndyayesiima, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akanjuna." 
Psalms35:10 Engingo zangye zoona ziryagira ziti: Ai Nyakubaho, n'oha owaakwingana naiwe? Iwe oiha ehuuru omu mikono y'ekikaaka, n'omukyene omu mikono y'orikumunyagisa eikama." 
Psalms35:11 Baamushinja b'ebishuba nibeemerera, bambuuza ebi ntarikumanya;" 
Psalms35:12 banzimuurira ebibi ahabw'ebirungi, omutima gwangye gucurama." 
Psalms35:13 Haza bo ku baabaire barwaire, naajwara eky'okuganya, naayebonabonesa niinyesiibyakwo, nintongyeza aha mutima," 
Psalms35:14 nk'orikusaasibwa munywani we, nari mwene ishe; naagyendagyenda ninsangana n'obusaasi nk'orikucurira nyina." 
Psalms35:15 Kwonka nyowe ku naagwire, baanyerundaho nibeesiima, baanyeshukyeera kunteerera enaku; nangwa n'abu ntarikumanya baaguma nibangambuura," 
Psalms35:16 nibanjuma obutaitsya, nibannenera amaino." 
Psalms35:17 Ai Mukama, oryahitsya hi okumpanga amaisho kwonka? Onjune abarikwenda kuunyita; onkize ezi ntare." 
Psalms35:18 Haza nkusiimire omu ruteerane rukuru, nkuhimbisize omu kimbuuro ky'abantu." 
Psalms35:19 Abarikumbeiherera otabaikiriza kuunyehimbisizaho, n'abarikuunyangira busha otabareka kuunyitiranira amaisho." 
Psalms35:20 Ahabw'okuba tibarikuhanuura by'obusingye hamwe n'abanyansi enkunzi z'obusingye, kureka nibacuma enaama z'ebishuba;" 
Psalms35:21 baanyashamiire kuntaisaho orubanja, nibagira bati: Otyo! Otyo! Mbwenu twakyereebera n'amaisho gaitu!" 
Psalms35:22 Ai Nyakubaho, naiwe waabireeba, mbwenu otahunama. Ai Mukama, otanza hangahari." 
Psalms35:23 Sisiimuka, oimukye, onjune; ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, ndwanaho!" 
Psalms35:24 Ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, nk'oku oba ow'amazima, onyiheho orubaja, kandi otabaikiriza kuunyehimbisizaho." 
Psalms35:25 Otabareka bakagira bati: Ebishi, eki twaba nitutenga nikyo kyaba! Otabareka bakagira bati: Mbwenu twamuheza!" 
Psalms35:26 Boona abarikuunyeraatira ngwirweho ebihikiirizi, ka bahemukye, babwerabwere, n'abarikuunyetunguuraho ka baitwe enshoni, banwaze!" 
Psalms35:27 Abarikwetenga ngu nkire orubanja, ka bateere akaari k'okushemerererwa beesiime bati: Nyakubaho onanurwa obugwagye bw'omuheereza we, aba mukuru!" 
Psalms35:28 Reero orurumi rwangye ruryarangaana okuhikiirira kwawe n'okuhimbisibwa kwawe, eizooba ryona." 
Psalms36:1 Ekibi ky'enkozi y'ebibi kigambira okwo omu mutima gwe kiti: Tihariho kutiina Ruhanga! 
Psalms36:2 Ku ayereebesa eriisho eririkumushunga, kimuzibira kumanya ekibi kye n'okukitamwa." 
Psalms36:3 Ebi agamba byona biba obugobya n'eitima, tayenda kuhaburwa." 
Psalms36:4 Nobu aba abyami, acuma enaama yoona ey'okukora kubi; agumizamu n'emitwarize ye mibi, tayanga kyona ekyetwa ekibi." 
Psalms36:5 Ai Nyakubaho, rukundo yaawe etahararuka ehika omu iguru, n'obwesigwa bwawe buhika omu bicu." 
Psalms36:6 Okuhikiirira kwawe kuraihire nk'enshozi, n'emicwere yaawe ehika hare okuzimu." 
Psalms36:7 Ai Nyakubaho, omurinzi w'abantu n'enyamaishwa, rukundo yaawe ka n'ey'obuguzi bwingi! Nikyo abantu beesherekyera omu mapapa gaawe." 
Psalms36:8 Beiguta ebiihuro by'omu nju yaawe, obanywaisa aha mugyera gwawe ogurikwesiimisa." 
Psalms36:9 Niiwe nshuro y'amagara. Kandi omushana gwawe nigwo gutuhwezesa. 
Psalms36:10 Otaiha rukundo yaawe etahararuka aha barikukumanya, n'okuhikiirira kwawe aha baine omutima gw'amazima." 
Psalms36:11 Otaikiriza abanyamaryo kundibatiirira, n'emikono y'ababi kuunyoha," 
Psalms36:12 Reeba, enkozi z'ebibi zigwire gangari, zitwirwe aha nsi obutaimuka." 
Psalms37:1 Reka kwemereza omutima ahabw'ababi, nobu kwakuba okugirira enkozi z'ebibi eihari." 
Psalms37:2 Barahuka kuhonga nk'obunyaatsi, bakabakaba nk'ejubwe y'omu bwerere." 
Psalms37:3 Yesigye Nyakubaho, okore ebirungi, otuure omu nsi ogogyeire." 
Psalms37:4 K'abe niwe yaaba obunanukye bwawe, haza akuhe ebi omutima gwawe gwetenga." 
Psalms37:5 Oyete omu mikono ya Nyakubaho, omwesigye abe niwe yaakuhwera," 
Psalms37:6 okuhikiirira kwawe kwakye nk'omushana, n'amazima gaawe gamurinkane nk'eihangwe." 
Psalms37:7 Cureera omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, omutegyereze n'okugumisiriza. Oteemereza omutima ahabw'abantu abarikutunga emigisha n'abarikucuma enaama mbi," 
Psalms37:8 Otagira ekiniga, rereera ekishinjo, oteemereza omutima, ekirugamu ti kindi kureka ekibi." 
Psalms37:9 Enkozi z'ebibi ziryatuntumurwa, kwonka abeesiga Nyakubaho ensi eryaba eyaabo." 
Psalms37:10 Handi hakye, enkozi y'ebibi neeba etakiriho, nobu oricaaka munonga ahu etwire, torigibona;" 
Psalms37:11 kwonka abacureezi ensi eryaba eyaabo, bagire obusingye obutaine kirikuburabanisamu." 
Psalms37:12 Omubi acumira ohikiriire enaama mbi, naanena amaino," 
Psalms37:13 kwonka Nyakubaho amushekyeerera, naamanya ku omuheru gwe guri haihi." 
Psalms37:14 Nobu enkozi z'ebibi zirisyorayo rurara kubandika abooro n'abakyene, zikareega obuta kwita ow'emitwarize ehikire," 
Psalms37:15 kwonka zaarurara ezo nibo zirirezya, n'amata gaabo gakahendagurika." 
Psalms37:16 Akakye aku ohikiriire aine, nikakira ebingi ebi enyabibi etungire." 
Psalms37:17 Manya emikono y'enyabibi n'ey'okuhendagurwa, kwonka abahikiriire Nyakubaho ababangira." 
Psalms37:18 Nyakubaho arinda abataine rubanja, n'ensi eryaba eyaabo ebiro byona." 
Psalms37:19 Omu biro by'enaku tibarihahaaza mutima, kandi omu biro by'enjara baryahaaga." 
Psalms37:20 Enkozi z'ebibi ezanga Nyakubaho ziryacwekyerera; zihweho nk'omubengyeyo gw'omuroba, zituntumukye nk'omwika." 
Psalms37:21 Enkozi y'ebibi eyeguza, neemanya ngu teriihura, kwonka enkora-birungi eba efura kandi egaba." 
Psalms37:22 Abu Nyakubaho aha omugisha, ensi eryaba eyaabo, kandi abu akyeena baryatuntumurwa." 
Psalms37:23 Nyakubaho ayebembera omuntu omu rugyendo rwe, kandi arinda abamugwisa gye." 
Psalms37:24 Nobu agwa, tagwera kimwe, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho aguma amukwaitse omukono." 
Psalms37:25 Obwa hati nkuzire, kwonka okwiha omu buto bwangye, tinkareebaga ohikiriire anagiriirwe, nainga abaana be nibashabiiriza akokurya." 
Psalms37:26 Obutoosha agira esaasi kandi aguza abandi, n'abaana be baryaheebwa omugisha." 
Psalms37:27 Reka ebibi, okore ebirungi, nibwo origira eka y'obutwire bwona." 
Psalms37:28 Manya Nyakubaho akunda ebihikiriire kandi tahemukira barikumwesiga, Enkozi z'ebibi ziryahwerekyererera kimwe, n'abaana b'ababi baryatuntumurwa." 
Psalms37:29 Abahikiriire bo, ensi eryaba eyaabo, bagituuremu ebiro byona." 
Psalms37:30 Akanwa k'ohikiriire karugwamu eby'obwengye, n'orurimi rwe rugamba ebihikire." 
Psalms37:31 Agumya ebiragiro bya Ruhanga we aha mutima, kandi tagarura bigyere nyima kubirugaho." 
Psalms37:32 Enkozi y'ebibi etata ohikiriire, neesherura oku eraamwite." 
Psalms37:33 Kwonka Nyakubaho tarimurekurira egyo ntatsi kumukwata, nobu kwakuba okumureka kusingwa orubanja naatonganisibwa." 
Psalms37:34 Yesigye Nyakubaho, ogume omu muhanda gwe, akutunguure, ensi ebe eyaawe, oreebe ababi nibahwerekyerezibwa." 
Psalms37:35 Nkareeba omubi naayesiima, naayeraisya nk'omusisa gwa Lebanooni;" 
Psalms37:36 kwonka ku naagarukire, akaba atakiriho, naamusherura, yaabuza amaisho." 
Psalms37:37 Oyetegyereze omuntu otaine rubanja, kandi omanye ow'amazima: omunyabusingye agira abaijukuru," 
Psalms37:38 kwonka abasiisi baryacwekyererezibwa kimwe, n'abaijukuru b'ababi batuntumurwe." 
Psalms37:39 Okujunwa kw'abahikiriire kuruga ahari Nyakubaho, kandi aba obuhungiro bwabo omu bunaku bw'akabi." 
Psalms37:40 Nyakubaho abahuumuza kandi abatambira, abaamuuraho ababi kandi abajuna, ahabw'okuba bamuhungiraho." 
Psalms38:1 Ai Nyakubaho, otanfubira oine ekiniga, nobu kwakuba okumpana ogwirwe kubi munonga." 
Psalms38:2 Manya, emyambi yaawe empwereiremu, n'omukono gwawe gumpingamiire." 
Psalms38:3 Omubiri gwangye gunoganogokire ahabw'okungirira ekiniga, n'amagufa gangye gajogajogokire ahabw'ekibi kyangye." 
Psalms38:4 Ebibi byangye birengyesereize, ni nk'omutwaro oguremeire munonga." 
Psalms38:5 Ahabw'obushema bwangye, obuhuta bwangye bujunzire, nibunuuka," 
Psalms38:6 Nyinami, ngondami munonga, eizooba ryona ninsiiba nincura." 
Psalms38:7 Amanyaanya nigampurura ahabw'omushwija, nnoganogokire" 
Psalms38:8 nkabakabire, mpendagurikire mpwaireyo; nintsinda ahabw'enaku eziinyijwire omu mutima." 
Psalms38:9 Ai Nyakubaho, ebi nyetenga byona obimanya, okutsinda kwangye tikukusherekirwe." 
Psalms38:10 Omutima gwangye niguteera enkuratima, amaani gampweiremu, n'amaisho gangye tigaakihweza." 
Psalms38:11 Bagyenzi bangye na bataahi bangye tibarikumpika, ahabw'okuba nyine obuhuta; nangwa n'abanyaruganda nibaanyetantara." 
Psalms38:12 Abarikwenda kuunyita nibantega emitego, abarikwenda kunkora kubi nibagamba eby'okumpwerekyereza, eizooba ryona nibacuma enaama y'okundeebya." 
Psalms38:13 Kwonka nyowe ndi nk'ekifamatu ekitarikuhurira, nk'ekiteta ekitarikugamba." 
Psalms38:14 Ndi nk'omuntu otarikugarukamu abandi, ahabw'okuba tarikuhurira." 
Psalms38:15 Ai Nyakubaho, niiwe nyesiga, Mukama Ruhanga wangye, niiwe orindwanaho." 
Psalms38:16 Naaba naagizire nti: Abarikuunyesiimirana otabaikiriza kuunyeraatira naaterera. 
Psalms38:17 Ndaariire kugwa, obusaasi bwangye tiburikwikaikana." 
Psalms38:18 Buzimazima niinyemera ekibi kyangye, niinyefuuza ahabw'okuba nkashiisha." 
Psalms38:19 Abantura busha nibeeyongyera kukanya, n'abaanyanga ntabashaagiize ni baingi;" 
Psalms38:20 nibanzimuurira ebibi ahabw'ebirungi, nibaanyangira okukuratira ebihikire." 
Psalms38:21 Ai Nyakubaho, otantsigaho, Ruhanga wangye, otanza hare!" 
Psalms38:22 Ai Mukama, omujuni wangye, rahuka ompwere!" 
Psalms39:1 Nkagira nti: Ndyaguma ndinde emitwarize yangye, orurimi rwangye rurekye kunkoresa ebibi; omubi ku ariba akindi haihi, ndyabumba akanwa." 
Psalms39:2 Nkacureera, naahunama ncecekire, kwonka byaba ebya busha, amaganya gangye gaayeyongyera." 
Psalms39:3 Ku naabiteekateekire, omutima gwangye gwabugumwamu omuriro, gwayaka gwanaga enkobe, naabaruka." 
Psalms39:4 Ai Nyakubaho, mmanyisa omuheru gwangye, n'ebiro byangye oku birikwingana, kandi ku ndi ow'okuhwaho." 
Psalms39:5 Ebishi ebiro byangye bikagyererwa aha kita, n'okuramaara kwangye ni busha ahariiwe. Buzimazima omuntu weena aba omwitsyo gwonka!" 
Psalms39:6 Kandi omuntu weena aba nk'ekinyimanyimi, ebintu ebi ashanguruza, tamanya oribitwara." 
Psalms39:7 Ai Mukama, ngambira! Mbwenu kandi ntegyereize ki? Niiwe nyineho amatsiko." 
Psalms39:8 Nyihaho ebibi byangye byona, otampindura esheko y'abashema;" 
Psalms39:9 mpunamire tinkigamba, ahabw'okuba niiwe waakikozire." 
Psalms39:10 Nkiza eminyaafu yaawe erikuunyasha, empi zaawe zindembize." 
Psalms39:11 Ku ofubira omuntu, oba noomutura ekibi kye, omumariraho kimwe ebi okunda nk'oku ebiyenje bigira. Buzimazima, omuntu weena nink'omwitsyo!" 
Psalms39:12 Ai Nyakubaho, hurira okushaba kwangye, ohurire n'okutaka kwangye, otaanyitira amatu nindira. Ndi omugyenyi waawe akaanya kakye, omugyenzi nka baatatenkuru boona." 
Psalms39:13 Otongyera kunteera eriisho, mbone kugarukwa omutima omunda; ntakagyenzire nkaburira kimwe." 
Psalms40:1 Nkategyereza Nyakubaho n'okugumisiriza, yantega okutu, yaahurira okutaka kwangye." 
Psalms40:2 Yaanyiha omu kiina kirikutiinisa, ekirikushaayisa, yaanyemereza aha rukiri, yaahamya entegye zangye." 
Psalms40:3 Yaanyeshongoza ekyeshongoro kisya eky'okuhimbisa Ruhanga waitu. Baingi baryareeba eki ankoreire, batiine, beesigye Nyakubaho." 
Psalms40:4 Omuntu ow'omugisha n'oyesiga Nyakubaho, otakwatanisa na bagomi, kandi otahabisibwa mandwa." 
Psalms40:5 Ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, eby'okutangaaza ebi waatukoreire ka ni bingi! Ebi waatuteekateekyeire nabyo ka ni bingi! Tihariho orikwingana naiwe! Nkaayenzire kuguma nimbirangaana, kwonka ni bingi nibindema eibara." 
Psalms40:6 Iwe, torenzire mpongano ecwekize, okaigura amatu gangye; tiwaashaba kitambo kicwekize nari eky'okuhongyerera ebibi." 
Psalms40:7 Naanye nikwo kugira nti: Reeba, naija, ndi aha. Niinyenda kukora ebi okunda;" 
Psalms40:8 nk'oku kyampandiikirweho omu muzingo gw'ekitabo. Ai Ruhanga wangye, eiteeka ryawe nkaguma nindikunda n'omutima gwangye gwona." 
Psalms40:9 Obutoosha ndangaana okuhikiirira kwa Nyakubaho omu ruteerane rukuru, haza tindirereera kukurangaana nk'oku orikumanya." 
Psalms40:10 Tinkangaga kugambira abandi eby'okuhikiirira kwawe; kureka nkamanyisa obwesigwa bwawe n'okujuna kwawe; kandi omu ruteerane rukuru, nkagamba butunu ebya rukundo yaawe etahararuka, n'amazima gaawe." 
Psalms40:11 Mbwenu, ai Nyakubaho, otanga kungirira embabazi! Rukundo yaawe n'amazima gaawe nibikagume nibindinda!" 
Psalms40:12 Enaku nyingi zincuramize omutima okutagambwa, ebibi byangye binshwekire, tinkibaasa na kuhweza. Ni bingi okukira eishokye ry'aha mutwe gwangye; obumanzi nibugyenda nibumpwamu." 
Psalms40:13 Ai Nyakubaho, ija onjune! Nyakubaho, rahuka ompwere!" 
Psalms40:14 Abarikwenda kuncwekyereza nibakahemukye bakaitwa enshoni! Abarikunteerera enaku nibakagarurwe enyima bakagaywa! 
Psalms40:15 Abarikungira ngu: Otyo! Otyo! Nibakaitwe enshoni batiinire! 
Psalms40:16 Kwonka abakusherura boona bashemererwa, kandi bananuka. Boona abeesiimira okujuna kwawe obahe okuguma nibagira bati: Eshi Mukama aba mukuru!" 
Psalms40:17 Ai Mukama, nyowe omworo kandi omukyene, rahuka kuunyizira! Iwe muhwezi wangye kandi omujuni wangye, Ruhanga wangye, ija, otaikarayo!" 
Psalms41:1 Omuntu w'omugisha n'osaasibwa abooro n'abanaku: ku arigwerwa akagwe, Nyakubaho aryamujuna." 
Psalms41:2 Nyakubaho aryamurinda, amuhe amagara n'okushemererwa omu nsi. Ai bambe, otarimureka abazigu bakamugira nk'oku barikwenda!" 
Psalms41:3 Ku ariba ari aha kitanda arwaire, Nyakubaho aryamuhuumuriza; omu ndwara ye, niiwe orimukiza obusaasi bwe bwona." 
Psalms41:4 Nyowe nkagira nti: Ai Nyakubaho, ongirire embabazi, ontambire, ahabw'okuba nkucumwireho!" 
Psalms41:5 Abazigu bangye nibangambaho n'eitima bati: Beitu afe ryari n'eiziina rye rikeeba? 
Psalms41:6 Ekibareeta kundeeba, n'okwegambisa ebitaine nsha; emitima yaabo eijwire eitima n'okwenda kuzonzya orukuru." 
Psalms41:7 Abaanyanga boona bangambaho nibahwihwitsana, nibagira ngu enaku zi ndimu zinshemereire," 
Psalms41:8 bagumize bati: Egi ndwara emukwatsire ti y'okukira; kandi bati: Ahu abyami tarihaimuka bundi. 
Psalms41:9 Nangwa na munywani wangye buzima kandi omwesigwa, ou twariire kumwe, nawe nandimiirira." 
Psalms41:10 Kwonka, iwe Nyakubaho, ngirira embabazi, onyimutsye, haza mbahoore!" 
Psalms41:11 Omuzigu wangye ku araaremwe kunsingura, aho niho ndaamanyire ku orikunkunda." 
Psalms41:12 Ompamye ahabw'obwesigwa bwangye, kandi ongumye omu maisho gaawe ebiro byona." 
Psalms41:13 Ai Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, ohimbisibwe obusingye n'obusingye. Amiina! Amiina!" 
Psalms42:1 Ai Ruhanga wangye, nk'empara oku eyetenga amaizi g'emigyera, n'omutima gwangye nikwo gukwetenga." 
Psalms42:2 Nyiniire Ruhanga ekihika, Ruhanga ohuriire. Mbwenu ndyareeba ryari Ruhanga ahamaisho?" 
Psalms42:3 Nyomushana na nyekiro tindya, kureka okurira. Eizooba ryona abantu bantsyorera nibagira bati: Ruhanga waawe arahi?" 
Psalms42:4 Ku nyijuka oku naabaire ngyenda n'ekimbuuro ky'abantu, tushorongire nituza omu nju ya Ruhanga, nituteera akaari k'okushemererwa nitumusingiza omu nyanja y'abantu abarikwemurika, nyeena nyaga." 
Psalms42:5 Nyebuuza nti: nyehwaire amatsiko? Ahabw'enki nyeinamiriire? Ka nyesigye Ruhanga, haza ngarukye mmuhimbise." 
Psalms42:6 Ku mba ndi omunsi ya Yorudaani na Herumooni, n'aha kashozi ka Mizaari, naahwa amatsiko, nkwijuka." 
Psalms42:7 Amatimba g'amaizi geetana n'agandi, ahabw'okuhoorera kw'obururuma bwawe. Ebingozi byawe n'emishumba yaawe, byona bindengyeireho." 
Psalms42:8 Nyomushana Nyakubaho anyoherereza rukundo ye etahararuka; kandi nyekiro ekyeshongoro kye kinguma aha rurimi, ninshaba Ruhanga, magara gangye." 
Psalms42:9 Ka nyetongyeze ahari Ruhanga rukiri rwangye, nti: Onyebeirwe ki? Ahabw'enki ningyenda ncuncubaire, abazigu bangye nibandeebesa enaku?" 
Psalms42:10 Ababisha bangye ni nka rurara omu magufa gangye; banteerera enaku obutoosha nibagira bati; Ruhanga waawe arahi? 
Psalms42:11 Nyebuuza nti, ahabw'enki nyehwaire amatsiko? Ahabw'enki nyeinamiriire? Ka nyesigye Ruhanga, haza ngarukye mmuhimbise, omujuni wangye kandi Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms43:1 Ai Ruhanga, ondwaneho, onshoboorore n'abantu abataine saasi; onkize engobya n'enkozi z'ebibi." 
Psalms43:2 Ai Ruhanga, niiwe buhungiro bwangye: Mbwenu nontsigiraho ki? Ahabw'enki ningyenda ncuncubaire abazigu bangye nibandeebesa enaku?" 
Psalms43:3 Yohereza omushana gwawe n'amazima gaawe; biinyebembere, bimpitsye aha rushozi rwawe orurikwera ahu otuura." 
Psalms43:4 Obwo ndyaza aha itambiro rya Ruhanga, obukomooko bw'okushemererwa kwangye Mukama Ruhanga wangye, ndyayesiima nkuhimbise n'enanga." 
Psalms43:5 Nyebuuza nti, ahabw'enki nyehwaire amatsiko Ahabw'enki nyeinamiriire? Ka nyesigye Ruhanga, haza ngarukye mmuhimbise, omujuni wangye kandi Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms44:1 Ai Ruhanga, tukeehuririra n'amatu gaitu, baatatenkuriitwe baatutondoorera ebikuru ebi waakozire omu bunaku bwabo, omu biro bya ira." 
Psalms44:2 Ahabw'okubataasya omu nsi, okabingamu abanyamahanga, abatwiremu waabatuntumura, bo waabaha obweshandizo." 
Psalms44:3 Egyo nsi tibaragikubwize zaarurara zaabo, n'emikono yaabo tiyo yaagibasingwize; kureka n'omukono gwawe gwa buryo ogw'enkubito, n'okumurinkana kw'ahamaisho gaawe ahabw'okuba okabakunda." 
Psalms44:4 Niiwe Mugabe wangye kandi Ruhanga wangye, owaahaire Yakobo okusingura." 
Psalms44:5 Ahabwawe tukakaatagirira abazigu baitu, n'ahabw'eiziina ryawe twacwa amaryo abarikuturahura." 
Psalms44:6 Tindataire matsiko ha buta bwangye, na rurara yangye tiyo yandeeteire kusingura;" 
Psalms44:7 kureka niiwe waatusingwize abazigu baitu, okabinga abarikutwanga boona;" 
Psalms44:8 tukaguma nitwesiimira omuriiwe Ruhanga, nituhimbisa eiziina ryawe obutaremuura." 
Psalms44:9 Kwonka mbwenu otutsigireho, waatuta omu g'abasheki, n'engabo zaitu tokihurura nazo." 
Psalms44:10 Abazigu obaikiriza kutubinga, kandi oreka abarikutwanga batunyaga nk'oku barikwenda." 
Psalms44:11 Nootureka tutwarwa omu ibaagiro nk'entaama, otutaataanisiza omu mahanga." 
Psalms44:12 Abantu baawe obatunzire akarikwingana busha, waabura eki waashaazyamu." 
Psalms44:13 Nootuhindura ekijumo omuri bataahi baitu, tuba ekigaaniizo n'ekisheko ky'abatwehinguririize." 
Psalms44:14 Nootuhindura eky'okucwerwaho enfumu omu bakaafiire, ekintu ekibareetera kutuha mutinzi." 
Psalms44:15 Eizooba ryona nsiiba ncuramiriirwe enshoni nizimbwerabweza," 
Psalms44:16 ebijumo n'ebirogoto binsheshekyeire, mpindukire ekishungiso ky'abarikuunyanga n'abarikumpoora." 
Psalms44:17 Nobu turaabe tutarakwebirwe, kwonka ebyo byona bikatubaho; nobu turaabe tutaraitsire ndagaano yaawe," 
Psalms44:18 n'emitima yaitu etarakuhugireho; nobu ebigyere byaitu bitarateishukire muhanda gwawe," 
Psalms44:19 hoona okatusiitagiririra ahu emishega etuura, waatusangiza ekibunda kya rufu." 
Psalms44:20 Kuri twayebirwe eiziina rya Ruhanga waitu, emikono yaitu tukagitega emandwa," 
Psalms44:21 Ruhanga oreeba ebisherekirwe omu mitima, takukimanyire?" 
Psalms44:22 Eego, tusiiba nitucwekyerezibwa ahabwawe, kandi nitubarwa nk'entaama embaagwa." 
Psalms44:23 Ai Mukama, sisiimuka! Ahabw'enki ogwejegyeire? Imuka, otatutsigiraho kimwe!" 
Psalms44:24 Ahabw'enki nootwehuzya; okeebwa enaku zaitu n'okubonabona kwaitu? 
Psalms44:25 Ahabw'okuba twandagaraine omu mucuucu, n'emibiri yaitu esiitaguriirwe aha nsi." 
Psalms44:26 Imuka, ija, otujune, kandi otucungure, ahabwa rukundo yaawe etahararuka!" 
Psalms45:1 Omutima gwangye gwijwire ebigambo birungi; niinyevugira omugabe ekihimbano kyangye; orurimi rwangye ni nk'ekaraamu y'omuhandiiki orikurahutsya. 
Psalms45:2 Omu bantu boona, niiwe nyamunyonyi, ori omugambi murungi, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga akakuha omugisha gw'ebiro byona." 
Psalms45:3 Iwe manzi 'we, hagatira rurara yaawe!" 
Psalms45:4 Otembe embaraasi, oine ekitiinisa, noomurinkana, ogyende, orwanirire amazima n'emicwe mirungi! Reegyera kimwe oruga rw'obuta, obureetera omukono gwawe gwa buryo kutiinwa!" 
Psalms45:5 Emyambi yaawe y'obwogi ecumita, ehahaaza emitima y'abazigu baawe; amahanga gakugwa aha bigyere." 
Psalms45:6 Ai Ruhanga, ekitebe kyawe ky'obugabe kiryagumaho ebiro n'ebiro! Obukama bwawe obutegyekyesa obwinganisa." 
Psalms45:7 Ei ogarukira kukunda oburungi, niyo ogarukira kwanga obubi. Ekyo nikyo Ruhanga, Ruhanga waawe, akusiigiire amajuta g'obunanukye okukirira kimwe abarikuharikana naiwe." 
Psalms45:8 Ebijwaro byawe nibitaamirana emigaju y'obunyaanunga n'ey'obutside n'ey'obutahe. Omu bikaari by'emiino, enanga nizikuteererwa, zikugwisa gye." 
Psalms45:9 Bahara b'abagabe bari omu nshagarizi zaawe z'ekitiinwa; aha rubaju rwawe rwa buryo, heemereireho omugabekazi ojwaire ezaabu ya Ofiri." 
Psalms45:10 Iwe mwishiki 'we, tega okutu, oteho omutima, oyebwe eihanga ryawe n'eka ya baashwenkuru;" 
Psalms45:11 obwo nibwo omugabe aririgira oburungi bwawe. Hati niwe mukama waawe, omutangirire!" 
Psalms45:12 Ab'omuri Tuuro baryakureetera ebiconco ngu bakushongokyeho, n'amahanga amatungi munonga" 
Psalms45:13 gakutoijere eby'obutungi bwago. 
Psalms45:14 Muhara w'omugabe, ajwaire ebirikumwamwatikana, naatwarwa ow'omugabe, enshagarizi zimushagatiire. Abaranga be baamukuratira," 
Psalms45:15 nibataaha omu kikaari ky'omugabe, ahu abantu barikubashemerererwa munonga." 
Psalms45:16 Omu mwanya gwa baashwenkuru, haryagarukamu batabani baawe. Abu oryemeka kutegyeka ensi yoona." 
Psalms45:17 Eiziina ryawe ndyaguma ndiijutsye ab'obusingye bwona, n'amahanga garyayeshongora eby'okuhimbisa ebiro n'ebiro." 
Psalms46:1 Ruhanga niwe buhungiro bwaitu kandi amaani gaitu, otuura ayeteekateekire kutuhwera tushobeirwe." 
Psalms46:2 N'ahabw'ekyo, nobu ensi erihinduka, enshozi zikatsindama ahagati y'enyanja," 
Psalms46:3 n'amaizi gaayo gakahoorera nigatabanguka, n'enshozi zikatengyeetsibwa okwehuura kwayo, tituritiina. (Mukama ow'amahe ari naitwe, Ruhanga wa Yakobo niwe rugo rwaitu!)" 
Psalms46:4 Hariho omugyera ogu okusheneneka kwagwo kuruhuura orurembo rwa Ruhanga, gukeeza obutuuro bwa Rukiraboona." 
Psalms46:5 Ruhanga ari ahagati yaarwo, tiruritengyeetsibwa, Ruhanga aruhwera omushekye nigujuguta." 
Psalms46:6 Amahanga ku gajagarara, n'obugabe bwazongorekana, agambisa amaani, ensi eyaga." 
Psalms46:7 Mukama ow'amahe ari naitwe, Ruhanga wa Yakobo niwe rugo rwaitu!" 
Psalms46:8 Nimwije, mureebe emirimo mikuru ya Mukama eby'okutangaaza ebi akora omu nsi!" 
Psalms46:9 Amaraho engamba omu nsi yoona, amata agahendagura, amacumu agatyabura, n'engabo azootsya." 
Psalms46:10 Mucureere, mumanye ku ndi Ruhanga, ohimbisibwa omu mahanga goona n'omu nsi yoona!" 
Psalms46:11 Mukama ow'amahe ari naitwe, Ruhanga wa Yakobo niwe rugo rwaitu!" 
Psalms47:1 Imwe mahanga mwena, nimuteere omu ngaro, musingize Ruhanga n'akaari k'okushemererwa;" 
Psalms47:2 ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho Rukiraboona n'ow'okutiinwa; manya aba Omugabe Rugambwa w'ensi yoona. 
Psalms47:3 Atukubuurira abantu kubategyeka, amahanga gatugwa aha mukono." 
Psalms47:4 Atutooranira ensi y'okutuuramu, nikyo kyeraato kya Yakobo ou yaakunzire." 
Psalms47:5 Ruhanga aimuka nibamuteerera akaari k'okumusingiza, Nyakubaho atumbeera amakondere nigaaniira." 
Psalms47:6 Amaraka ka gajumeerere Ruhanga waitu, ganihiire, amaraka ka gajumeerere Omugabe waitu, ganihiire!" 
Psalms47:7 Ruhanga aba Omugabe w'ensi yoona; ahabw'ekitiinwa kye mumuzaanire nk'oku murikubaasa! 
Psalms47:8 Ruhanga n'Omugabe w'amahanga, asingami aha kitebe kye ekirikwera." 
Psalms47:9 Abeebembezi b'amahanga beeteerana n'abantu ba Ruhanga wa Aburahamu. Ruhanga Omugabe w'ensi Ategyeka obuteerengwa! 
Psalms48:1 Nyakubaho ni mukuru kandi n'ow'okuhimbisibwa munonga omu rurembo rwa Ruhanga waitu," 
Psalms48:2 aha rushozi orurikwera, orurumbaire gye, oruhimbya ensi yoona. Orushozi Siyooni ruri aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, orurembo rw'Omugabe Rugambwa!" 
Psalms48:3 Omu bikaari byarwo, Ruhanga akeemanyisa ku niwe rugo rwarwo orugumire." 
Psalms48:4 Hariho obu abagabe baiziire hamwe, beeteeraine kuruteera," 
Psalms48:5 kwonka ku baarureebire, baatangaara, baakangarana kandi baahunga." 
Psalms48:6 Ei baahungiire baakwatirwayo ekitengo, baashegashega nk'omukazi orikurumwa." 
Psalms48:7 Baaba nk'emeeri za Tarushiishi, ezi Ruhanga yaasheenyagwize omuyaga gwa burugwa-izooba." 
Psalms48:8 Ebi twahuriire, itwe tukabyereebera omu rurembo rwa Ruhanga waitu, orurembo rwa Mukama Ruhanga w'amahe, oru we arinda ebiro byona." 
Psalms48:9 Ai Ruhanga, omuri nyaruju yaawe tuteekateeka ahari rukundo yaawe etahararuka." 
Psalms48:10 Ai Ruhanga, nk'oku eiziina ryawe riri, n'okuhimbisibwa kwawe nikwo kuri; kuhika aha muheru gw'ensi! Omukono gwawe gwa buryo gugira obusinguzi." 
Psalms48:11 Orushozi Siyooni rushemererwe, endembo za Yuda zeesiime ahabw'okutegyeka kwawe." 
Psalms48:12 Mugyende nimweziguuruka Siyooni, nimubara eminaara yaayo," 
Psalms48:13 mwetegyereze orugo rwayo, kandi mutangaarire ebikaari byayo; nibwo murigambira ab'obusingye oburiija" 
Psalms48:14 ku Ruhanga ogwo ari Ruhanga waitu, kandi ku niwe aritwebembera ebiro n'ebiro." 
Psalms49:1 Imwe ab'amahanga goona, nimutegye amatu, naimwe mwena abatuura omu nsi." 
Psalms49:2 Abanyamaziina n'abandi ab'obutoosha, abatungi n'abooro, nimuhurire eki!" 
Psalms49:3 Akanwa kangye nkagambisa eby'obwengye, omutima gwangye gumpabura eby'oburyo;" 
Psalms49:4 guhugira aha nfumu, haza ngishoboororera aha nanga." 
Psalms49:5 N'enki ekyakuntiinisa omu bunaku bw'akabi? Abanyaitima bangwire omu ntegye nibaanyeziguuruka; 
Psalms49:6 abeesiga obutungi bwabo bakeeraata ahabw'obwingi bw'eitungo ryabo. 
Psalms49:7 Tihariho muntu n'omwe obaasa kwecungura, nobu kwakuba okuha Ruhanga eky'okumucungura." 
Psalms49:8 Eky'okucungura amagara ge n'eky'obuguzi bwingi, kimurengire!" 
Psalms49:9 Mbwenu akaabaasa ata kuramaara ebiro byona atagiire kuzimu? 
Psalms49:10 Haza kunu naareeba abanyabwengye nibafa, abashema n'ebifamutima boona nibahwerekyerera, n'eitungo ryabo nibaritsigira abandi." 
Psalms49:11 Nobu baraabe bagira ebibanja ebirikubeetererwa, kwonka ebituuro nibwo butaaho bwabo kandi amaka gaabo ag'entuura." 
Psalms49:12 Omuntu ku atunga, yaajarama, abura obwengye; aba nk'enyamaishwa y'okwitwa." 
Psalms49:13 Ebyo nibyo biba ahu abeesiga busha baba, kandi egyo niyo eba muheru y'abeesiima ahabw'eitungo ryabo." 
Psalms49:14 Bari nk'entaama ezitsibikirwe okuzimu owa Nyamuteza. Rufu eryabaseetura ebaahukize, haza abahikiriire babahite. Bugingo eryahika, okweraata kwabo kuhweho, okuzimu owa Nyamuteza ebe eka yaabo!" 
Psalms49:15 Kwonka Ruhanga aryancungura, anyihe okuzimu, owa Nyamuteza, haza antungye." 
Psalms49:16 Omuntu ku araatungye, eitungo rye ryakanya, otarimutiina," 
Psalms49:17 ahabw'okuba ku afa, tagira ki atwara, kandi eryo itungo rye tirimukurata kuzimu." 
Psalms49:18 Nobu omuntu ayesiima akihuriire, n'abantu bakamuhaisa ahabw'obutungi bwe," 
Psalms49:19 tikirimuzibira kukurata baishenkuru, abatarireeba mushana bundi." 
Psalms49:20 Omuntu ku atunga, yaajarama, abura obwengye: aba nk'enyamaishwa y'okwitwa." 
Psalms50:1 Mukama, Ruhanga wa baaruhanga, naagamba, naayeta ensi yoona, okuruga burugwa-izooba okuhika burengyerwa-izooba." 
Psalms50:2 Naayaka ayemi Siyooni, ahu oburungi obwijwire buri." 
Psalms50:3 Ruhanga waitu k'aije atakihunama! Omuriro ogurikurya busha gumwebembeire, eihunga ry'amaani rimwehinguririize." 
Psalms50:4 Naayeta ab'omu iguru n'ab'omu nsi, bahikye ahu abantu be barikucwererwa orubanja, ati:" 
Psalms50:5 Muteeranire omu maisho gangye, abeesigwa bangye abaahikiriize endagaano yangye nibatamba ebitambo!" 
Psalms50:6 Eiguru ka rirangaane okuhikiirira kwa Ruhanga, ahabw'okuba we wenka niwe mucwi w'emanja!" 
Psalms50:7 Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, mumpurire ningamba; Isiraeli ninkuhamiza nti: Niinye Ruhanga, Ruhanga waawe." 
Psalms50:8 Tindikukutura bitambo byawe; manya empongano zaawe ezicwekize zintuura omu maisho. 
Psalms50:9 Omu mariisizo gaawe tindikushaba nimi y'enteera, nobu yaakuba empaya y'ekiteebwamu omu matsibikiro gaawe." 
Psalms50:10 Ahabw'okuba enyamaishwa ez'omu kibira zoona, n'enkumi z'amatungo ez'aha nshozi n'ezangye." 
Psalms50:11 Enyonyi zoona ez'omu mwanya nzimanya, tihariho kihuriire omu ishwa ekitari kyangye." 
Psalms50:12 Ku naakuba nyine enjara, tinkaakugambira, ahabw'okuba ensi n'ebigirimu byona n'ebyangye." 
Psalms50:13 Noogira ngu ndya enyama y'enimi, nari okushoma orwamba rw'empaya?" 
Psalms50:14 Okusiima kwawe ka kube ekitambo kyawe ahari Ruhanga, ohikiirize ebi ohigira Rukiraboona;" 
Psalms50:15 mpaho omu bunaku bw'akabi obone kuntakira, nkukize, naiwe ompimbise." 
Psalms50:16 Kwonka omuntu omubi Ruhanga naamugira ati: N oorangiririra ki ebiragiro byangye, okeegambisa endagaano yangye," 
Psalms50:17 haza kunu oyanga kuhanwa, n'ebigambo byangye obiteera omugongo?" 
Psalms50:18 Ku oreeba oti omushuma, onywana nawe, oba gye n'abashambani." 
Psalms50:19 Tozibira kanwa kaawe kucumura, n'orurimi rwawe kubeiha." 
Psalms50:20 Otuura noogambuura mwene sho, nooshiisha ekitiinwa kya mwene nyoko." 
Psalms50:21 Ebyo okabikora naakwetsiza, waateekateeka ngu ndi nkaiwe. Kwonka ndyakujuukirira nkusheeshuure." 
Psalms50:22 Imwe abateeta hari Ruhanga, mwerinde, kitari ekyo, ndyabataagataagurira ahi mutaine kijuna!" 
Psalms50:23 Weena onsiima, biri ampaire ekitambo kirimpaisa ekitiinwa, omuntu orikutwaza gye, ndyamworeka oku Ruhanga ajuna." 
Psalms51:1 Ai Ruhanga, ongirire embabazi ahabwa rukundo yaawe etahararuka," 
Psalms51:2 onyogyezeho kimwe ebicumuro byangye, ekibi kyangye kindugireho kimwe, nyere." 
Psalms51:3 Nimmanya ku naacumwire, ekibi kyangye tikinduga ha mutima." 
Psalms51:4 Niiwe naacumwireho, kandi niiwe buzima, ekyeetwa ekihagaro omu maisho gaawe nikyo naakozire. N'ahabw'ekyo ku oba noncwera orubanja, oba ohikire, kandi emicwere yaawe tihaine ogigaya." 
Psalms51:5 Maawe akambaka nyine ekibi, naazaarwa nyine orubanja." 
Psalms51:6 Kwonka iwe okunda omutima gw'amazima, onyegyese eby'obwengye okwo hare omu mutima gwangye." 
Psalms51:7 Onyeze n'enyaweera, nshemere; onyozye, nyere okukira orubaare." 
Psalms51:8 Ongaruremu okushemererwa n'okwesiima, haza amagufa agu waasheenyagwire gananukye." 
Psalms51:9 Oihe amaisho aha bibi byangye, onyiheho orubanja rwangye rwona." 
Psalms51:10 Ai Ruhanga, ompangyemu omutima gushemeire, ontemu omutima guhamire." 
Psalms51:11 Otambinga omu maisho gaawe, otaanyaka Mutima waawe Orikwera." 
Psalms51:12 Ongaruremu okushemererwa kw'okujuna kwawe, ompamyemu omutima gurikukworobera." 
Psalms51:13 Obwo nibwo ndaayegyese abasiisi emitwarize yaawe, n'enkozi z'ebibi zikakuhindukira." 
Psalms51:14 Ai Ruhanga, Mujuni wangye, njuna ntafa, haza orurimi rwangye rurangaane okuhikiirira kwawe." 
Psalms51:15 Ai Mukama, yashamya akanwa kangye, eminwa yangye erangaane eby'okukuhimbisa." 
Psalms51:16 Manya ebitambo tibikugwisa gye, nobu naakuhonga ekicwekize, tokaakisiima." 
Psalms51:17 Kureka, ai Ruhanga, ekitambo eki osiima n'omutima oguhendekire. Omutima oguhendekire kandi ogurikweteisa, togugaya." 
Psalms51:18 Ahabw'embabazi zaawe korera Siyooni ebirungi, oyombekye busya engo za Yerusalemu." 
Psalms51:19 Nibwo oraagwisibwe gye ebitambo bihikire, ebihongwa bicwekize, n'ebicwekyeize kimwe, okahongyerwa ebimasha aha itambiro ryawe." 
Psalms52:1 Iwe nyabibi 'we rurangaanwa, ahabw'enki nooyeesiimiranira ebibi byawe?" 
Psalms52:2 Iwe ndeebya 'we enyeringiriki, osiiba noocuma enaama z'okucwekyereza, n'orurimi rwawe rutyarize nk'orumweiso!" 
Psalms52:3 Okunda ebibi okukira ebirungi, n'okubeiha okukira okugamba amazima," 
Psalms52:4 okunda ebigambo by'okuhwerekyereza, Iwe ow'orurimi embeihi." 
Psalms52:5 Ekyo nikyo Ruhanga arikujakurira, akakuhuruutura omu ihema rwawe, akakusiitagura, akakurandura omu nsi y'abahuriire, okabuza amaisho." 
Psalms52:6 Ekyo, abahikiriire ku barikireeba baryaitwa obwoba, bashekye ahabw'ebyamubaho, bagumize bati:" 
Psalms52:7 Nimureebe ogu muntu owaayangire Ruhanga kuba obuhungiro bwe, kureka akeesiga eitungo rye ringi, kandi ekibi kikaba amaani ge!" 
Psalms52:8 Kwonka nyowe, nk'omuti omuoliva ogurikunyeetera omu nju ya Ruhanga, ebiro byona nyesiga rukundo ye etahararuka." 
Psalms52:9 Ai Ruhanga, ndyaguma ninkusiima ahabw'ebi waakozire; nkugireho amatsiko omu maisho g'abakukunda, ahabw'okuba ori ow'embabazi." 
Psalms53:1 Omushema agira omu mutima gwe ati: Ruhanga tabaho! Tihaakiriho murungi, boona n'embeihi, basiisikaire, tibaine mutambo." 
Psalms53:2 Ruhanga ayemi omu iguru, naanaga eriisho aha bantu, kureeba yaaba hariho oine obwengye, nangwa omwe ati, orikumusherura." 
Psalms53:3 Kwonka boona bateishukire, boona hamwe basiisikariire kimwe. Tihaakiriho murungi, nobu yaakuba omwe." 
Psalms53:4 Enkozi z'ebibi nikwo zifiire zityo omutima, zikamira abantu bangye nk'abarikurya ebyokurya, kandi zitende kutakira Ruhanga!" 
Psalms53:5 Baitsirwe obwoba ahi butakubaitiire. Manya Ruhanga anaganagire amagufa g'abazigu baawe; yaabahemura, ahabw'okuba abacwire." 
Psalms53:6 N'oha orireetera Isiraeli okujunwa okuruga Siyooni? Ruhanga ku arigarura abantu be omuka, ebishi, Yakobo aryayesiima, Isiraeli ananukye!" 
Psalms54:1 Ai Ruhanga, ahabw'obushoboorozi bwawe onyiheho orubanja." 
Psalms54:2 Ai Ruhanga, tega okutu ebi ndikugamba, ohurire okutaka kwangye!" 
Psalms54:3 Abanyamaryo nibaanyimukiirira, abo bainazi abarikumpiiga kuunyita, abantu abateeta hari Ruhanga." 
Psalms54:4 Kwonka hati Ruhanga wenka, Mukama, obuhamizo bw'amagara gangye, naija kunjuna." 
Psalms54:5 Ai Mukama, otuura ori omwesigwa, cwekyereza abazigu bangye, obubi bwabo bubagarukire!" 
Psalms54:6 Ai Nyakubaho, ndyakuhongyera ekitambo nyihire aha mutima; ninsingiza eiziina ryawe, ahabw'okuba ni rirungi!" 
Psalms54:7 Eego, waanyiha omu naku zangye zoona, kandi waanyikiriza kureeba abazigu bangye basingwirwe." 
Psalms55:1 Ai Ruhanga, hurira okushaba kwangye, kandi oteehuzya okweshengyereza kwangye." 
Psalms55:2 Ompurire, ongarukyemu, tindikubaasa kuhuumura ahabw'okutsindagana." 
Psalms55:3 Orwari rw'abazigu n'okuyogoora kw'enyabibi nibintetemesa. Nibanteerera enaku nibamburabuza, baanyiniire ekishinjo." 
Psalms55:4 Omutima gwangye gwijwire obujune, naahika aha ncwamba za rufu." 
Psalms55:5 Okutiina okufa n'okutetema byanyogamu, obwoba bwandembya." 
Psalms55:6 Naarugaho naagira nti: Kuri nyine amapapa nk'ag'enkombe nkaagurukire nyerondera obuhuumuriro; 
Psalms55:7 mpungira hare munonga, nyesherurira obutuuro omu ihamba!" 
Psalms55:8 Ai Mukama, haza okwo nkaarahukire kubonayo obwegamo, nkira omuyaga mwingi n'eihunga." 
Psalms55:9 Ai Nyakubaho, cwekyereza enaama zaabo, ohuurikanise ebigambo byabo." 
Psalms55:10 Nindeeba orurembo rwijwire obubisha n'oburyane, nibirwehinguririza nyomushana na nyekiro. Obusaasi n'amaganya birituura omunda," 
Psalms55:11 okucwekyerera nimwo kutaaha; okuhata n'obureebya tibikaburaga hagati yaarwo. 
Psalms55:12 Omuzigu kuri niwe yanjumire, nkaakyeemeire; orikumparika kuri niwe yaanyekunikireho, nkaamwesherekire." 
Psalms55:13 Kwonka mbwenu, orikungira atyo niiwe ow'ekingano kyangye, mugyenzi wangye kandi munywani wangye" 
Psalms55:14 ou twabaire tugaaniira gye kumwe turi omu nju ya Ruhanga! 
Psalms55:15 Abo bazigu bangye nibakakinukye, nibakahwerekyerere nibarabanamu! Nibakashuume okuzimu owa Nyamuteza bahuriire; ahabw'okuba emitima yaabo n'amaka gaabo biijwire ebibi." 
Psalms55:16 Kwonka nyowe ahabwangye, ntakira Ruhanga, haza Nyakubaho anjuna." 
Psalms55:17 Omu kasheeshe, omu ihangwe n'omu mwabazyo, ntonzya kandi ntsindagana; haza aryahurira okushaba kwangye." 
Psalms55:18 Obusingye bwe nibubaasa kundinda, nkire orugamba ru bantengyeire. Ebishi abaanyimukiriire ni baingi!" 
Psalms55:19 Kwonka Ruhanga aryampurira. Nyakusinga owa iranaira abacureeze, ahabw'okuba tibamutiina, n'emitima yaabo tehinduka." 
Psalms55:20 Munywani wangye abangiire bagyenzi be omukono, yaita omukago gwe." 
Psalms55:21 Nobu araabe ayegambisa karimi karungi, hoona rwango emuri aha mutima. Ebigambo bye nobu biraabe nibibobeeza okukira amajuta, kwonka biri nka zaarurara zisyoirweyo." 
Psalms55:22 Omutwaro gwawe ogutuurire Nyakubaho, akubangire; tariikiriza ohikiriire kukumbagara." 
Psalms55:23 Reero, abo baitsi n'ezo ngobya, iwe Ruhanga oryabooha okuzimu hare munonga, ebiro by'okuhotora kwabo bitakahikire. Kwonka nyowe ahabwangye, ninkwesiga." 
Psalms56:1 Ai Ruhanga, ongirire embabazi, manya nibaanyita kubi eizooba ryona." 
Psalms56:2 Abarikumpayira nibasiiba nibaanyangaraza, ebimbuuro nibiija kundwanisa." 
Psalms56:3 Ku ndaabe ngwire kihuumura, ai Rukiraboona, onyimutsye, ahabw'okuba ninkwesiga." 
Psalms56:4 Ruhanga ou nsiima ekigambo kye, niwe nyesiga, ntaine ki ndikutiina. Mbwenu, bakaabaasa kunkora ki?" 
Psalms56:5 Basiiba nibahindaguturana ebigambo byangye, eki barikuteekateeka kyona n'okunkora kubi;" 
Psalms56:6 beekwaitse hamwe, beesherekire nibareebereza ahi ndaarabe, bamaririire kuunyita." 
Psalms56:7 Ebyo bagyende batafubiirwe, ahabw'ekicumuro kirikwingana kityo? Ai Ruhanga, tuura aga mahanga ahansi ogainiire ekishinjo!" 
Psalms56:8 Waayetegyereza oku ndikwitwa kubi. Mbwenu amarira gangye ogatangiririze omu ngyemeko yaawe. 
Psalms56:9 Haza obwo, ku ndaakuhuruze, abazigu bangye bagarukye enyima. Nimmanya ku Ruhanga ari aha rubaju rwangye." 
Psalms56:10 Ruhanga ou nsiima ekigambo kye, Nyakubaho ou nsiima ekigambo kye," 
Psalms56:11 niwe Ruhanga ou nyesiga ntaine ki ndikutiina. Mbwenu, omuntu akaabaasa kunkora ki?" 
Psalms56:12 Ai Ruhanga, ekyangye n'okuhikiiriza ebi naakuhigiire. Mbwenu ka nkuzimuurire emitoijo y'okusiima," 
Psalms56:13 ahabw'okuba onkirize rufu, ngu mbone kugyendera omu maisho gaawe, omu mushana ogujwera abahuriire." 
Psalms57:1 Ongirire embabazi, ai Ruhanga, ongirire embabazi; omuriiwe nimwo ndikuhungira, omu mapapa gaawe nimwo ndikweshereka, okuhitsya obu ebirikucwekyereza biraahweho." 
Psalms57:2 Ntakira Ruhanga Rukiraboona, Ruhanga onkorera byona," 
Psalms57:3 ngu angarukyemu naayema omu iguru, anjune, ahemure abarikwenda kuunyita kubi. Nkaabaasibwa ki, Ruhanga ayohereza amazima ge na rukundo ye etahararuka!" 
Psalms57:4 Nyehinguririziibwe entare enshonshomezi z'abantu; amaino gaazo ni nk'amacumu n'emyambi, n'endimi zaazo ni nka zaarurara z'obwogi." 
Psalms57:5 Ai, Ruhanga, otunguukye okukira eiguru, haza ekitiinwa kyawe kisangire ensi yoona!" 
Psalms57:6 Ku naabaire ninkondooza ninganya, baatega ebigyere byangye omutego, baatimba obusya ahi ndikuraba, kwonka nibo baabugwiremu." 
Psalms57:7 Omutima gwangye guhamire, ai Ruhanga, omutima gwangye guhamire! Niinyenda kukweshongorera n'okukusingiza!" 
Psalms57:8 Sisiimuka, iwe magara gangye! Sisiimuka, iwe nanga yangye n'eigobore ryangye, mbone kujugutisa omushekye!" 
Psalms57:9 Ai Mukama, niinyenda kukusiima omu bantu, n'okweshongorera omu mahanga goona eby'okukuhimbisa." 
Psalms57:10 Manya rukundo yaawe etahararuka ehika omu iguru, n'amazima gaawe gahika omu bicu." 
Psalms57:11 Ai Ruhanga, otunguukye okukira eiguru, haza ekitiinwa kyawe kisangire ensi yoona!" 
Psalms58:1 Imwe bategyeki 'mwe, ebyo emanja zi mucwa, muzicwa nk'oku kishemereire? Kandi muzicwa mutarikushoroora mu bantu?" 
Psalms58:2 Ngaaha omu mutima nimuteekateeka eby'okuhata, n'omu nsi nimutwaza abantu eikama." 
Psalms58:3 Ezo nkozi z'ebibi zikaruga omunda ziri empabe, ezo ncwanzya zikazaarwa ziri embeihi." 
Psalms58:4 Obushegu bwazo ni nk'obw'enjoka, zifiire amatu nk'empiri erikugahenderamu ebiti," 
Psalms58:5 ngu zirekye kuhurira ekizino ky'omugomboozi ogyeterera, nangwa n'okuteerwa amahembe omurogi rugambwa." 
Psalms58:6 Ai Mukama Ruhanga, bacwe amaino. Ai Nyakubaho, higura amashongyezo g'ezo ntare enshaarizi!" 
Psalms58:7 Nibakoome nk'emitunga erikuhwererera omu itaka, nibakahotokye nk'ebinyaatsi biribatiriirwe," 
Psalms58:8 nibakagyende nibayaga nk'ekinyangondokyera, bakaba nk'ekitoroogo ekitarireeba mushana!" 
Psalms58:9 Ekiniga nikikabakukumbure batakashongoize mahwa, nk'akashebashebe kabisi nari koomire." 
Psalms58:10 Ohikiriire, ku arireeba okwo kuhoora, aryayesiima, ayogyese ebigyere bye eshagama y'enkozi z'ebibi." 
Psalms58:11 Abantu bagire bati: Buzimazima, hariho Ruhanga ocwa emanja omu nsi, abahikiriire bakaheebwa ebihembo byabo." 
Psalms59:1 Ai Ruhanga wangye, nkiza abazigu, ndinda abarikundwanisa;" 
Psalms59:2 nkiza enkozi z'ebibi, kandi onjune abo baitsi b'abantu!" 
Psalms59:3 Reeba oku bangwereire kumbakura; n'ab'amaani kandi beeteeraine kundwanisa," 
Psalms59:4 ntaine ki nshobize n'eki nsiisire, kandi ntabashaagiize. Ai Nyakubaho, ka nibahimintika kungiira omu kyetindo!" 
Psalms59:5 Sisiimuka, oreebe kandi ompe emikono! Ai Mukama Ruhanga w'amahe, kandi Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, mbwenu imuka, ofubire ago mahanga, ezo ndeebya n'ebyo bihaze otabagirira esaasi!" 
Psalms59:6 Bagaruka omu rwitawaabo, nibakankama nk'embwa, nibagyendagyenda hoona omu rurembo." 
Psalms59:7 Reeba, nibaitururuka orufuzi, basinikire amaino nibagira bati: Tihariho n'omwe orikutuhurira!" 
Psalms59:8 Ai Nyakubaho, ago mahanga goona noogashekyeerera, noogashungisa." 
Psalms59:9 Iwe maani gangye, niiwe mpangire amaisho. Ruhanga wenka niwe rugo rwangye." 
Psalms59:10 Ruhanga onkunda naija; Ruhanga aryandeebesa abazigu bangye basingwirwe. 
Psalms59:11 Ai Ruhanga, otabaita, abantu bakeebwa! Ai Mukama ngabo yaitu, obarigitse kandi obatuure ahansi n'amaani gaawe!" 
Psalms59:12 Ekibi tikibaruga mu kanwa, mbwenu, ka bakwatwe nibetunguura! Ahabw'emikyeeno n'ebishuba ebi bagamba," 
Psalms59:13 obacwekyereze n'ekiniga kyawe; bacwekyereze, obamareho. Haza abantu boona bamanye ku niiwe Ruhanga otegyeka Yakobo, n'amahanga goona ag'omu nsi." 
Psalms59:14 Bagaruka omu rwitawaabo, nibakankama nk'embwa, nibagyendagyenda hoona omu rurembo," 
Psalms59:15 nibakagiiriza ebyokurya, nibaruruma batakahaagire." 
Psalms59:16 Kwonka nyowe ndyayeshongora eby'amaani gaawe, buri kasheeshe nyeshongore ebya rukundo yaawe etahararuka. Otuura ori orugo rwangye, kandi obuhungiro bwangye omu biro by'okubonabona." 
Psalms59:17 Maani gangye, ndyayeshongora eby'okukuhimbisa. Ai Ruhanga, niiwe buhungiro bwangye, iwe Ruhanga onkunda." 
Psalms60:1 Ai Ruhanga, oyangire kuguma naitwe, waatuhenda emikono, waatugwerwa kubi; twakweshengyereza, otugarukire!" 
Psalms60:2 Otengyeetsize ensi, waagigangabura; mbwenu ita obwatika bwayo, ahabw'okuba neegogoma!" 
Psalms60:3 Itwe abantu baawe, oturekire twanyangarara, otunyweisize viino erikureeta okugwererana." 
Psalms60:4 Imutsya orurango, ruteerane hamwe abarikukutiina, bakire emyambi." 
Psalms60:5 Ahabw'okwenda kutujuna, itwe enkunzi zaawe, otugarukyemu nootujunisa omukono gwawe gwa buryo!" 
Psalms60:6 Ruhanga akeema omu mwanya gwe ogurikwera, yaagira ati: Nyowe Omusinguzi, ndyabaganisa Shekemu, ngabe ebicweka by'oruhanga rwa Sukooti." 
Psalms60:7 Gileadi n'eyangye; Manaase nayo n'eyangye; Efuraimu n'enkofiira y'okundinda; Yuda n'enkoni yangye ey'obugabe. 
Psalms60:8 Moabu n'ekinaabiro kyangye; Edomu niho naanagire akati kangye; Filisitiya niho nteerera akaari k'okusingura. 
Psalms60:9 N'oha orantaasye omu rurembo rugumire? Kandi orampitsye Edomu n'oha? 
Psalms60:10 Ai Ruhanga, toratunagiriire? Manya tokihurura na mahe gaitu." 
Psalms60:11 Otuhe emikono omuri obu bunaku bw'akabi, ahabw'okuba obuhwezi bw'abantu tibwine mugasho." 
Psalms60:12 Ruhanga ku ariba atwine, turyarwana kimanzi, ahabw'okuba niwe arisiitagura abazigu baitu." 
Psalms61:1 Ai Ruhanga, hurira okutaka kwangye, otegye okutu okweshengyereza kwangye!" 
Psalms61:2 Ninkweta ndi aha muheru gw'ensi, ngwire enshazi. Ompitsye aha mutwe gw'orukiri, ahi ntarikubaasa kwehitsya." 
Psalms61:3 Ahabw'okuba niiwe buhungiro bwangye, kandi omunaara gw'amaani ogw'okundinda abazigu." 
Psalms61:4 Ka mbukaare omu ihema ryawe ebiro byona, mpungiire omunda y'amapapa gaawe." 
Psalms61:5 Nyakusinga, ohuriire okuhiga kwangye, wampa ebyahairwe abakutiina." 
Psalms61:6 Omugabe naakaramaare, akamereera obusingye n'obusingye!" 
Psalms61:7 Naakagume aha ngoma ari omu maisho ga Ruhanga ebiro byona! Ragiira rukundo yaawe etahararuka n'amazima gaawe bimurinde! 
Psalms61:8 Mpaho ndyaguma nkweshongorere mpikiirize obutoosha ebi naahigire. 
Psalms62:1 Omuri Ruhanga wenka nimwo mpuumurira. Kandi omuriwe nimwo okujunwa kuruga. 
Psalms62:2 We wenka aba orukiri rwangye, omujuni wangye kandi orugo rwangye; nikyo ntarigwera." 
Psalms62:3 Imwe mwena, muryahitsya hi okujumbukana omuntu kumurwanisa ori nk'ekisiika kibogami, nari nk'orugo rurikugogoma?" 
Psalms62:4 Eki bagira ti kindi, kureka obugobya. Bashemerererwa okuhabisa abantu. Endimi zaabo nizibashabira omugisha, kwonka omu mitima nibabakyeena." 
Psalms62:5 Ai mutima gwangye, huumurira omuri Ruhanga wenka! Niwe bukomooko bw'amatsiko gangye." 
Psalms62:6 We wenka aba orukiri rwangye, omurinzi wangye kandi orugo rwangye; nikyo ntarigwera:" 
Psalms62:7 Huumurira omuri Ruhanga omujuni wangye, ekitiinwa kyangye, kandi obuhamizo bw'amaani gangye. Ruhanga n'obuhungiro bwangye." 
Psalms62:8 Imwe bantu 'mwe, mumwesigye buri kaanya; mumumarireyo ekibari aha mutima, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga niwe buhungiro bwaitu." 
Psalms62:9 Abantu abatarikumanywa baba omwitsyo gwonka, n'abarikumanywa baba busha; ku bateebwa aha minzaani, ebaimutsya, banguha okukira omwitsyo." 
Psalms62:10 Muteesiga okuhata, mutata amatsiko aha kunyaga, eitungo nobu ririkanya, mutaririhugiraho." 
Psalms62:11 Ruhanga akagamba rimwe, nyowe naahurira ebintu bibiri ebirikugira biti: Ruhanga aba ow'amaani." 
Psalms62:12 Ai Mukama, ogira rukundo etahararuka, kandi niiwe ozimuurira omuntu ebishemereire ebi yaakozire." 
Psalms63:1 Ai Ruhanga, niiwe Ruhanga wangye, ninkusherura n'ekihika. Omutima gwangye gukwiniire eiriho, omubiri gwangye nigukwetenga nk'ori omu nsi eyomire, erikurusya kandi etarimu maizi." 
Psalms63:2 Nyetenga kukuhangira amaisho omu mwanya ogurikwera, n'okureeba obushoboorozi bwawe hamwe n'ekitiinwa kyawe." 
Psalms63:3 Rukundo yaawe etahararuka ekira amagara; kandi ndyakuhimbisa. 
Psalms63:4 Omu magara gangye goona ndyaguma nkusiime, nyimutsye emikono yangye ninkutakira." 
Psalms63:5 Ndyahaaga nk'oriire ebyokurya birungi, nyeshongore nshemereirwe, ngambe eby'okukuhimbisa." 
Psalms63:6 Aha kitanda kyangye nkwijuka; ekiro kyona ndaara ninkuteekateeka," 
Psalms63:7 ahabw'okuba otuura nompwera. Nyeshongora nshemereirwe, ndi omu mapapa gaawe." 
Psalms63:8 Omutima gwangye gukuramata, omukono gwawe gwa buryo gumpamya." 
Psalms63:9 Kwonka abampiiga kumpwerekyereza, nibakashuume okuzimu," 
Psalms63:10 bakaitirwayo aba rurara, bakaba egabo ya zaamuha!" 
Psalms63:11 Ababeihi ku bariheza bati kwigarwa akanwa, omugabe aryashemererererwa omuri Ruhanga, na weena orikumurahira, ayesiime." 
Psalms64:1 Ai Ruhanga, hurira okutonzya kwangye, onkize ogu muzigu orikuntiinisa." 
Psalms64:2 Onsherekye ababi n'enaama zaabo, ekyo kimbuuro ky'enkozi z'ebibi." 
Psalms64:3 Abarikutyaza endimi zaabo nka rurara, bakatamika emyambi yaabo ebigambo ebirikushaarira," 
Psalms64:4 ngu babone kurasha ori mwere bamugwereire, barahukye kumurasha batamuraarikire." 
Psalms64:5 Bagumyana bari omu naama mbi, bahanuura ei baraategye emitego yaabo, bagumize bati: Oraatureebe n'oha?" 
Psalms64:6 N'oha oraabaase kucondooza enaama zaitu? Mbwenu n'oha? N'ogwo ocondooza ebiteekateeko ebiri hare omu mutima. 
Psalms64:7 Ruhanga aryabarasha n'omwambi gwe, abahutaaze atabaraarikire," 
Psalms64:8 abahwerekyereze naabatura orurimi rwabo; haza boona abaribareeba babahe mutinzi. 
Psalms64:9 Obwo nibwo abantu boona baritiina, bakabuzya eki Ruhanga akozire, bakeetegyereza n'ekikimukoreise." 
Psalms64:10 Weena ohikiriire aryashemerererwa omuri Nyakubaho, amugire obwegamo bwe; haza ab'emitima y'amazima beesiime." 
Psalms65:1 Ai Ruhanga, niiwe oshemereire kusingirizibwa omuri Siyooni. Niiwe abantu baha ebi baaraganiise nibahiga," 
Psalms65:2 ahabw'okuba ohurira okushaba kwabo. Omuntu weena n'ow'okukwetuurira 
Psalms65:3 n'ebibi bye byona; ebicumuro nobu biraabe bituremesa obitusaasira. 
Psalms65:4 Ow'omugisha, n'ou otoorana, okamutuuza omu bikaari byawe. Otwigutse ebirungi by'omu nju yaawe, eby'omuri Nyaruju yaawe erikwera." 
Psalms65:5 Ai Ruhanga omujuni waitu, ou ab'omu nsi yoona n'ab'omu birwa bya hare bagiraho amatsiko ahabw'okuhikiirira kwawe, ebi otuzimuurira bitutangaaza." 
Psalms65:6 Niiwe ohamya enshozi, okazizirika amaani gaawe;" 
Psalms65:7 kandi niiwe ocureeza enyanja n'okuhoorera kw'ebingonzi byayo. 
Psalms65:8 Ab'amahanga n'abatwire aha muheru gw'ensi nibajagarara baitsirwe obwoba; ahabw'okureeba eby'okutangaaza byawe, bateera akaari k'okushemererwa eizooba nirituruka kandi nirirenga." 
Psalms65:9 Ai Ruhanga, otaayaayira ensi, ogiitirira amaizi, eyeza ebirikukondakonda; emigyera yaawe eijwire amaizi neebooga, ngu emyaka ebone kwera." 
Psalms65:10 Ebi nibyo okora kugishemeza; ogiteeramu empazo z'amaizi, emigongo yaayo ogiringaaniza, ogibobeeza n'orutoonyerera, n'ebigimeramu obiha omugisha." 
Psalms65:11 Eshi oha omwaka omweru mwingi! Ahu oraba hoona, ebigaari byawe bisheesha omweru." 
Psalms65:12 Amariisizo g'omu ihamba gasheesha omweru; ebibungo biijura okushemererwa. 
Psalms65:13 Amariisizo gashwekwa amagana, n'empanga zishwekwa engano. Byona biteera akaari k'okushemererwa nibyeshongora!" 
Psalms66:1 Iwe ensi yoona, teerera Ruhanga akaari k'okushemererwa," 
Psalms66:2 oyeshongore eby'okumuhimbisa; omuhe ekitiinwa noomusingiza," 
Psalms66:3 kandi ogire Ruhanga oti: Ebishi, ori mukuru! Amaani gaawe gareeberwa aha bi okora. Abazigu baawe nibeecureereza omu maisho gaawe baine obwoba." 
Psalms66:4 Ensi yoona ekuramya, ekweshongorera, eyeshongora eby'okukuhimbisa." 
Psalms66:5 Nimwije mureebe eby'okutangaaza ebi Ruhanga akora, n'ow'okutiinwa omu bi akorera abantu." 
Psalms66:6 Akoomya enyanja, haakarangatana; baaraba omu mugyera n'ebigyere! Mbwenu ka twesiimire omuri ogwo," 
Psalms66:7 otegyekyesa obushoboorozi ebiro byona. Amaisho ge agatuuza aha mahanga, ngu abagomi batakaayentunguura." 
Psalms66:8 Imwe mahanga 'mwe, muhimbise Ruhanga waitu; amaraka agarikumusingiza gahurirwe." 
Psalms66:9 Manya niwe aturinda tukaguma turi abahuriire; kandi taikiriza bigyere byaitu kuterera. 
Psalms66:10 Ai Ruhanga, okatugyeza, nk'oku bagyereza efeeza omu iziiko." 
Psalms66:11 Okatutooza omutego, waatukorera omutwaro oguremeire." 
Psalms66:12 Waikiriza abantu kutusingura, twaraba omumuriro n'omu maizi, kwonka hati otuhikize aheeshanzire." 
Psalms66:13 Nindeeta omu nju yaawe ebihongwa bicwekize, kuhikiiriza ebi naahigire;" 
Psalms66:14 ebi naagambire n'akanwa kangye, obu naabaire ndi omu kabi." 
Psalms66:15 Ninkuhongyera ebitambo bicwekize ebya zaakaberera; ebitambo by'empaya y'embuzi, hamwe n'ekisooroora kyabyo." 
Psalms66:16 Imwe mwena abatiina Ruhanga, mwije muhurire, mbateekyerereze ebi yankoreire." 
Psalms66:17 Nkamutakira n'akanwa kangye, n'orurimi rwangye rwamuhimbisa." 
Psalms66:18 Omutima gwangye kuri gwahugiire aha bibi, Mukama takumpuriire." 
Psalms66:19 Kwonka buzima Ruhanga akampurira, yaahurira okushaba kwangye." 
Psalms66:20 Ruhanga otarangire kuhurira okushaba kwangye, kandi otaraanyihireho rukundo ye etahararuka, ahimbisibwe." 
Psalms67:1 Ruhanga atugirire embabazi, atuhe omugisha, kandi atushemuukize amaisho ge!" 
Psalms67:2 Nibwo ensi eraamanye emitwarize ye, n'amahanga goona gakamanya ku aine amaani g'okujuna." 
Psalms67:3 Ai Ruhanga, amahanga ka gakuhimbise, amahanga goona ka gakuhimbise!" 
Psalms67:4 Amahanga ka geesiime, geeshongore gashemereirwe, ahabw'okuba ocwera abantu emanja omu bwinganisa, ohabura amahanga g'omu nsi." 
Psalms67:5 Ai Ruhanga, amahanga ka gakuhimbise, amahanga goona ka gakuhimbise!" 
Psalms67:6 Ensi egizire omweru; Ruhanga, Ruhanga waitu, atuhaire omugisha." 
Psalms67:7 Ruhanga atuhaire omugisha; k'ab'omu nsi yoona bamutiine! 
Psalms68:1 Ruhanga k'aimukye, abazigu be bataataane, n'abarikumwanga bamuhungye!" 
Psalms68:2 Ruhanga ku airira haihi, ababi bataataana nk'omwika oku gutuntumuka, bahwerekyerera nk'oku entsinda eyagira aha muriro." 
Psalms68:3 Kwonka abahikiriire bo, bashemererwa, bananuka, bataagurira omu maisho ga Ruhanga." 
Psalms68:4 Mweshongorere Ruhanga, mumusingize ogwo ogyendera aha bicu, mumureegyere ekyeshongoro, mushemererererwe omuri Nyakubaho, munanukire omu maisho ge!" 
Psalms68:5 Ruhanga otuura omu butaaho bwe oburikwera aba ishe w'efuuzi, n'omutonganizi w'abafaakazi." 
Psalms68:6 Embura-butaaho Ruhanga agiha eka y'entuura, agwisa gye embohe naazibohoorora; kwonka abagomi batuura omu nsi ekarangataine." 
Psalms68:7 Ai Ruhanga, obu waayebembera abantu baawe, nooraba omu ihamba," 
Psalms68:8 ensi ekatengyeeta, eiguru ryafukunkura enjura omu maisho gaawe. Naiwe Sinaayi, okatengyeeta omu maisho ga Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
Psalms68:9 Ai Ruhanga, okafukunkura enjura nungi; abantu baawe abaagwire enshazi, waabagaruramu amaani." 
Psalms68:10 Ahabw'embabazi zaawe, ab'eka yaawe waababonera obutaaho, ahu oheera enshoberwa eky'okuzitunga." 
Psalms68:11 Mukama akaha ekiragiro, abantu baingi batwara amakuru ngu:" 
Psalms68:12 Abagabe n'amahe gaabo baahunga, abakazi abaatsigaire omuka baabagana eminyago;" 
Psalms68:13 ebishushani by'enkombe ebibumbirwe, ebihunzirwe efeeza aha mapapa, n'ebyoya byazo bishwekirwe ezaabu empuuhe; obwo imwe abandi mweshutamiire omu matsibikiro g'entaama!" 
Psalms68:14 Obu ow'obushoboorozi yaataataanisa abagabe, orubaare rukagwa ahari Zalimooni." 
Psalms68:15 Orushozi rwa Bashani n'orushozi rw'amaani! Orwo rushozi rugira emitwe mingi! 
Psalms68:16 Imwe nshozi ezireihire, ahabw'enki nimugaya orushozi oru Ruhanga yaatooraine kurutuuraho? Nyakubaho aryarutuuraho ebiro byona." 
Psalms68:17 Mukama akaija omu mwanya ogurikwera, naaruga Sinaayi n'ebigaari enkumi n'enkumi." 
Psalms68:18 Ai Ruhanga, okatemba orushozi ruraingwa, waanyaga embohe, waiha aha bantu emitoijo, n'abagomi, a i Nyakubaho, waabataasya omu butaaho bwawe." 
Psalms68:19 Mukama agume ahimbisibwe, Ruhanga otujuna akatwekorerera emitwaro." 
Psalms68:20 Ruhanga waitu ogwo ni Ruhanga ojuna; Mukama Ruhanga niwe agira eby'okutukiza okufa. 
Psalms68:21 Kwonka abazigu be abaremera omu bibi byabo, aryabaatagura emitwe." 
Psalms68:22 Mukama akagira ati: Ndyabagarura barugye Bashani, mbaihe okuzimu omu nyanja," 
Psalms68:23 mubone kujubya ebigyere byanyu omu shagama, embwa zaanyu zikombe nk'oku zirikwenda." 
Psalms68:24 Ai Ruhanga, emishororongo y'abantu baawe neereebwa, abantu ba Ruhanga wangye kandi Mukama wangye, nibainamuka bakurataine, nibaza omu mwanya ogurikwera." 
Psalms68:25 Abeeshongozi beebembeire, abateezi b'ebirikugamba bari enyima. N'ahagati yaabo hariho abaishiki nibateera empuuro." 
Psalms68:26 Muhimbise Ruhanga muri hamwe, muhimbise Mukama, imwe abaakomookire ahari Isiraeli!" 
Psalms68:27 Benyamiini bucuracuriro abeebembeire, abategyeki ba Yuda bajwaire eby'amahunde, n'abategyeki ba Zebuluuni, n'abategyeki ba Nafutaali." 
Psalms68:28 Ragiira, ai Ruhanga, ragiiza obushoboorozi bwawe, obushoboorozi obu waakoreise ahabwaitu" 
Psalms68:29 oyemi Yerusalemu omuri Nyaruju yaawe, ei abagabe bakureetera emitoijo." 
Psalms68:30 Kabukira egyo nyamaishwa y'omu kibingo, kabukira amahanga, obu busyo bw'enimi n'ebimasha, okuhitsya obu baraacwe amaryo, bakakutoijera efeeza. Otaataanise amahanga agakunda kurwana." 
Psalms68:31 Abantu rugambwa baryaruga Misiri, na Etiopiya eryatega Ruhanga emikono." 
Psalms68:32 Imwe bugabe bw'ensi 'mwe, mweshongorere Ruhanga," 
Psalms68:33 mweshongorere Mukama eby'okumuhimbisa! Musingize ogwo otemba eiguru, niryo iguru erya ira! Mumuhurire naagamba n'eiraka rihango kandi ery'amaani," 
Psalms68:34 haza mumwikirize ku ari ow'obushoboorozi! Ekitiinwa kye kishwekire Isiraeli, n'obushoboorozi bwe buri omu kaabunga." 
Psalms68:35 Ruhanga ka n'ow'ekitiinisa omu mwanya gwe ogurikwera! Ruhanga wa Isiraeli niwe aha abantu obushoboorozi n'amaani. Ruhanga ahimbisibwe! 
Psalms69:1 Ai Ruhanga, njuna, ahabw'okuba amaizi gampika omu maraka!" 
Psalms69:2 Ninshaaya omu byondo bingi, ahi ntarikubaasa kuhamya bigyere; naahika omu maizi maraingwa, ebingonzi nibyenda kundengyeraho." 
Psalms69:3 Okucura kwankabya, amaraka ganzindaire, amaisho gangwire omu nkiro, ahabw'okukutegyereza iwe Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms69:4 N'abarikwenda kuunyitira busha ni baingi okukira eishokye ry'aha mutwe gwangye. Nibanshaba kugarura ebi ntaratwaire. 
Psalms69:5 Ai Ruhanga, noomanya obufu bwangye. N'ebicumuro byangye tibikusherekirwe." 
Psalms69:6 Ai Mukama Ruhanga w'amahe, abarikukwesiga ka barekye kwitwa enshoni ahabwangye! Ai Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, n'abarikukusherura ka barekye kuhemuka ahabwangye!" 
Psalms69:7 Manya ahabwawe naayemera ebijumo, n'enshoni ezirikumbwerabweza," 
Psalms69:8 ezimpindwire omunyaihanga omuri beene tata, n'otarikumanywa mu baana ba maawe." 
Psalms69:9 Okugirira eihato enju yaawe kummazireho, kandi ebijumo ebi barikukujuma, niinye bigweraire." 
Psalms69:10 Ku ndikwebonabonesa niinyesiibyakwo, bakintsyorera." 
Psalms69:11 Ku ndikujwara ekijwaro ky'okuganya, banta omu g'abasheki;" 
Psalms69:12 ndi ekigaaniiro ky'abashutama aha irembo, kandi ekyeshongoro ky'abasinzi." 
Psalms69:13 Ai Nyakubaho, ninkutakira omu bunaku obu orikusiima; ahabwa rukundo yaawe empango etahararuka ongarukyemu, ahabw'okuba omu kujuna oba omwesigwa." 
Psalms69:14 Nshaayuura, ndekye kumirwa, nkire abarikuunyanga, ndugye omu maizi garikumiza!" 
Psalms69:15 Otandeka ebingonzi bikandengyeraho, nkakyengyera okuzimu, ekiina kikanshweka." 
Psalms69:16 Ai Nyakubaho, ahabwa rukundo yaawe etahararuka, ongarukyemu, kandi ahabw'embabazi zaawe nyingi, ohindukye, ondeebe." 
Psalms69:17 Otaanyima amaisho nyowe omwiru waawe, rahuka kungarukamu, ahabw'okuba ndi omu kabi." 
Psalms69:18 Onyirire haihi, oncungure; onyihe omu mikono y'abazigu bangye!" 
Psalms69:19 Noomanya okujumwa kwangye kwona, n'ababisha bangye boona noobamanya. Ebijumo bimpuruutwire omutima," 
Psalms69:20 enshoni zangye n'obuhemu tibyakitambwa. Nsherwire ow'okungirira esaasi, n'ab'okumpuumuriza, bamburira." 
Psalms69:21 Bampa obushegu kuburya, n'ahabw'eiriho bannyweisa encenku." 
Psalms69:22 Ekiihuro kyabo ka kibahindukire omutego, n'okuba gye kwabo kubahindukire orugogo!" 
Psalms69:23 Amaisho gaabo ka gagiibweho oruho, gahume, n'amanyaanya gaabo gajogajogokye!" 
Psalms69:24 Obafufunkureho ekiniga kyawe; ekishinjo kyawe kiboohokyeho! 
Psalms69:25 Amaka gaabo gahindukye amatongo, n'amahema gaabo gabe emishaka;" 
Psalms69:26 ahabw'okuba nibahiiga ou waateire, kandi ou waahutaarize nibongyera kumuhutaaza." 
Psalms69:27 Ogumizemu nooboomesereza, otabaikiriza kwihwaho orubanja." 
Psalms69:28 Obaihe omu kitabo ky'abahuriire, barekye kubarirwa omu bahikiriire." 
Psalms69:29 Kwonka nyowe ndi enshoberwa kandi ow'obusaasi; ai Ruhanga, onyimutsye kandi onjune!"
