Psalms69:30 Ndyahimbisa Ruhanga n'ekyeshongoro, kandi mmusingize nimmusiima." 
Psalms69:31 Manya ebyo bigwisa gye Nyakubaho okukira okumutoijera endaaho, nari enimi y'engundu." 
Psalms69:32 Abarikubonabonesibwa bakireebe, bashemererwe. Imwe abarikusherura Ruhanga, nimukaramaare!" 
Psalms69:33 Manya Nyakubaho ahurira abakyene, kandi tagaya bantu be abari omu nkomo." 
Psalms69:34 Eiguru n'ensi, enyanja n'ebirikugigyenderamu ka bimusingize!" 
Psalms69:35 Ahabw'okuba Ruhanga aryajuna Siyooni, agarukye ayombekye endembo za Yuda; abantu be bagituuremu ebe eyaabo," 
Psalms69:36 abaana b'abaheereza be bagihungure, n'abamukunda bagituuremu." 
Psalms70:1 Ai Ruhanga, ija onjune! Nyakubaho, rahuka ompwere!" 
Psalms70:2 Enshoni n'okuhemuka bibe aha barikwenda kuunyita! Abarikunteerera enaku nibakagarurwe enyima, bakahemuka!" 
Psalms70:3 Abarikungira ngu: Otyo! Otyo! Nibakaitwe enshoni, batiinire!" 
Psalms70:4 Kwonka abakusherura boona bashemererwe, bananukire omuriiwe! Boona abeesiimira okujuna kwawe, obahe okuguma nibagira bati: Ruhanga ka ni mukuru!" 
Psalms70:5 Ai Ruhanga, nyowe omworo kandi omukyene, rahuka ompwere! Niiwe muhwezi wangye kandi omujuni wangye, Ai Nyakubaho, otaikarayo!" 
Psalms71:1 Ai Nyakubaho, niiwe mpungiraho, otandeka nkahemuka!" 
Psalms71:2 Ahabw'okuhikiirira kwawe ompwere, onkize, ontegye okutu, onjune!" 
Psalms71:3 Ombeere orukiri rw'okuhungiramu, ekigo eki ndaakiriremu; ahabw'okuba niiwe rukiri rwangye kandi ekigo kyangye." 
Psalms71:4 Ai Ruhanga wangye, onjune omubi, onsikure omu mikono y'omuntu enshaarizi!" 
Psalms71:5 Ahabw'okuba, ai Mukama, niiwe matsiko gangye; ai Nyakubaho, okwiha omu buto bwangye nkwesiga." 
Psalms71:6 Niiwe nyegamira okwiha obu naazaarwa; oba egabo yangye okwiha obu naaruga omu nda ya maawe. Kandi ndyaguma nkuhimbise. 
Psalms71:7 Ndi nk'eihano eririkutangaaza baingi, kwonka iwe ori obuhungiro bwangye obuhamire." 
Psalms71:8 Ntuura ninkuhimbisa, nindangaana ekitiinwa kyawe." 
Psalms71:9 Nobu ndaabe nkuzire, otannaga; kandi nobu ndaahwemu amaani, otantsigaho!" 
Psalms71:10 Manya abazigu bangye nibampayira, kandi entatsi nizingiira omu kyetindo." 
Psalms71:11 Nibagira bati: Ruhanga amutsigireho, mumubingye, mumukwate, ahabw'okuba taine kijuna!" 
Psalms71:12 Ai Ruhanga, otanza hare; Ruhanga wangye, rahuka ompwere!" 
Psalms71:13 Abarikuntaahirira baitwe enshoni, bamarweho; kandi abarikwenda kunkora kubi bahindukye ekijumo, bagaywe!" 
Psalms71:14 Kwonka nyowe nkugiraho amatsiko, ndyakusingiza obutaremuura;" 
Psalms71:15 nsiibe nindangaana okuhikiirira n'okujuna kwawe, nobu ndaabe ntari mujengi murungi." 
Psalms71:16 Ai Nyakubaho, ndyaija nyine amaani gaawe, mpimbise okuhikiirira kwawe wenka." 
Psalms71:17 Ai Ruhanga, okaanyegyesa nkiri muto, na hati ninkirangaana eby'okutangaaza byawe." 
Psalms71:18 Nobu nkuzire nkamera enju, ai Ruhanga, otantsigaho! Ai Nyakusinga, ondamaaza okuhitsya obu ndaamayise ab'obusingye obu amaani gaawe," 
Psalms71:19 n'obushoboorozi n'okuhikiirira kwawe okutahwaho! Iwe Ruhanga okora ebikuru; n'oha orikushushana naiwe? 
Psalms71:20 Iwe owandekire nkareeba enaku nyingi, oryagaruka ompe amagara, onyihe okuzimu." 
Psalms71:21 Oryayongyera aha bukuru bwangye endiijo myaka, kandi ogarukye ompuumuze." 
Psalms71:22 Naanye ndyakusiima ninteera enanga, Ruhanga wangye omwesigwa, kandi nkusingize ninteera eigobore, iwe Orikwera wa Isiraeli." 
Psalms71:23 Ndyakweshongorera ninkuhimbisa, omutima gwangye ogu waacungwire n'eminwa yangye biteere akaari k'okushemererwa." 
Psalms71:24 Haza nsiibe ningamba eby'okuhikiirira kwawe. Nkaahenwa ki abarikwenda kunkora kubi baitwa enshoni, bahemuka!" 
Psalms72:1 Ai Ruhanga, ohe omugabe obwinganisa n'okuhikiirira," 
Psalms72:2 abone kutegyeka abantu baawe omu buringaaniza, n'abooro baawe omu buryo." 
Psalms72:3 Enshozi n'ebibungo biryareetera abantu obusingye n'okuhikiirira. 
Psalms72:4 Aryarwanirira abanaku omu mazima, ajune abaana b'abakyene, kandi asiitagure abarikubahata." 
Psalms72:5 Aryaramaara obusingye n'obusingye, nk'eizooba n'okwezi;" 
Psalms72:6 ayakiirwe n'ekihika nk'enjura erikugwa omu mariisizo, n'orutoonyerera rurikugwa aha itaka ryomire." 
Psalms72:7 Okuhikiirira kuryagogyeera omu biro by'obutegyeki bwe; habeho obusingye omu nsi yoona, okuhitsya obu okwezi kuriburira kimwe." 
Psalms72:8 Obugabe bwe buryaiha aha nyanja, bute aha ndiijo; burugye aha mugyera, buhikye aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Psalms72:9 Abazigu be baryainama omu maisho ge nibatetema, n'ababisha be barigatse omucuucu." 
Psalms72:10 Abagabe ba Tarushiishi n'ab'omu birwa baryamutoijera. Abagabe ba Sheeba na Seba bamureetere ebiconco; 
Psalms72:11 abagabe boona bamuramye, n'amahanga goona gamugwe aha mukono!" 
Psalms72:12 Ahabw'okuba aryajuna omunaku omutakira, n'omukyene oyetenga kuhwerwa." 
Psalms72:13 Agirire embabazi abakyene n'abanaku, ajune enshoberwa." 
Psalms72:14 Azicungure, aziihe omu kwitwa kubi; n'omu kuhemangurwa, ahabw'okuba amagara gaabo n'ag'obuguzi bwingi ahariwe." 
Psalms72:15 Naakaramaare nibamutoijera ezaabu ya Sheeba! Baryamushabira obutoosha, basiibe nibamwendeza emigisha!" 
Psalms72:16 Ensi eryagira omweru, guhikye n'aha mitwe y'enshozi, gube mwingi nk'obunyaatsi, nk'ogw'omu igyesha rya Lebanooni." 
Psalms72:17 Naakahimbisibwe ebiro byona, akagumaho nk'eizooba! Naakahaise abantu boona omugisha, amahanga gakamweta oine omugisha!" 
Psalms72:18 Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, okora eby'okutangaaza, ahimbisibwe!" 
Psalms72:19 N'eiziina rye rugambwa rihimbisibwe ebiro byona, kandi ensi yoona eijure ekitiinwa kye! Amiina! Amiina!" 
Psalms72:20 Eshaara za Daudi mwene Yese, zaagarukira aha." 
Psalms73:1 Buzimazima Ruhanga ni murungi aha Baisiraeli, n'aha baine emitima eshemeire." 
Psalms73:2 Kwonka ebigyere byangye bikaba byagiire kuteera entsibo; kuri naakwire ekigyere, nkaatereire ngwa." 
Psalms73:3 Ahabw'okuba nkareeba ababi nibagogyeera, naagirira abanyamaryo eihari." 
Psalms73:4 Manya bo tibagira kibasaasa, batuura bari gye, bagomokire;" 
Psalms73:5 tibareeba naku, kandi tibagwerwa kagwe nk'abandi bantu." 
Psalms73:6 N'ahabw'ekyo, bajwara amaryo nk'orukwanzi, obwinazi nibwo buba ekijwaro kyabo;" 
Psalms73:7 eitima ribagomora nk'ebishaju, n'emitima yaabo eijwire ebitaine buryo." 
Psalms73:8 Bakwatsiza abandi ekibi nibeeraata; beetunguura nibahanuura eby'okuhata. 
Psalms73:9 Barogota ahari Ruhanga w'omu iguru, n'orurimi rwabo ruragiiza ab'omu nsi eikama." 
Psalms73:10 Ekyo nikyo kireetera abantu bangye kubakumbira, nibasiima byona ebi bagamba, nibagira bati:" 
Psalms73:11 Ebyo, Ruhanga aryakimanya? Beitu shi, Rukiraboona amanya byona?" 
Psalms73:12 Mureebe abo babi abatuura omu busingye, n'eitungo ryabo nirikanya!" 
Psalms73:13 Ebishi, nkeeruhiza busha kugira omutima gushemeire, n'okuzibira engaro zangye kushiisha!" 
Psalms73:14 Haza kunu osiiba nombonabonesa, nompana buri kasheeshe." 
Psalms73:15 Kuri naagizire nti: Ka ngambe ntyo, nkaagobeize ab'omu busingye bw'abaana baawe." 
Psalms73:16 Nkateeraho kukyetegyereza, kyangumira!" 
Psalms73:17 Okuhitsya obu naashoboorokyeirwe enaama ya Ruhanga, nkamanya ebiribaho aha muheru." 
Psalms73:18 Buzimazima obata aharikuterera, bagwa, bahwerekyerera." 
Psalms73:19 Ka bacwekyerezibwe omu kaanya kakye, n'ebirikutiinisa bibamarireho kimwe!" 
Psalms73:20 Nk'oku omuntu agaya ekirooto kye yaasisiimuka, naiwe Mukama, nikwo obagaya." 
Psalms73:21 Obu naabaire ngwirwe kubi, nyine obusaasi omu mutima," 
Psalms73:22 nkaba omushema otarikwetegyereza, naatwaza nk'enyamaishwa omu maisho gaawe." 
Psalms73:23 Kwonka nobu kiraabe kiri kityo, tinkurugireho, onkwaitse omukono gwa buryo." 
Psalms73:24 Mbwenu onyebembere nompabura, haza ontaasye omu kitiinwa." 
Psalms73:25 Tihariho ondiijo ou nyine omu iguru kureka iwe, kandi omu nsi tiinyine ki nshemerererwa kureka iwe!" 
Psalms73:26 Omubiri gwangye n'omutima gwangye, nobu byakugwa enshazi, kwonka Ruhanga niwe maani gangye, kandi omugabo gwangye ebiro byona!" 
Psalms73:27 N'ekya buzima, abakutsigaho bahwerekyerera, omariraho kimwe abakureebya bakakutsigaho." 
Psalms73:28 Kwonka nyowe, ekirungi n'okuba haihi na Ruhanga! Mukama Ruhanga mmuhindwire obuhungiro bwangye, kurangaana byona ebi yaakozire." 
Psalms74:1 Ai Ruhanga, okatunagira ki ebiro byona? Ahabw'enki noogirira entaama z'omu iriisizo ryawe ekiniga kingi?" 
Psalms74:2 Ijuka abantu baawe abu waayetungiire ira, eihanga rwawe ahabwawe eri waacungwire, n'orushozi Siyooni oru waabaire otuuraho." 
Psalms74:3 Za omu mwanya ogutuura guri eitongo; ahi abazigu bahwerekyerereize byona eby'omu mwanya ogurikwera. 
Psalms74:4 Bakatontomerera ahi waabaire obugabuganira naitwe; bakahanika aha irembo endango zaabo," 
Psalms74:5 endango ezi tutakareebaga. 
Psalms74:6 Bakataahirira ebiti by'amarembo, bakabisheenyagura n'empango n'akateererezo." 
Psalms74:7 Ai Ruhanga, baakootsya omwanya gwawe ogurikwera, baahagariza kimwe ahi bakuramiza." 
Psalms74:8 Baagira omu mitima yaabo bati: Ka tubahwerekyereze! Baayotsya amaramizo gaawe goona ag'omuri egi nsi. 
Psalms74:9 Titwakireeba bumanyiso bwawe, tihaakiriho murangi n'omwe. N'oha omuriitwe orikumanya ahu ebi birigarukira?" 
Psalms74:10 Ai Ruhanga, omubisha aryahitsya hi okurogota? Omuzigu aryaguma ajume eiziina ryawe ebiro byona?" 
Psalms74:11 Ahabw'enki tokibanga mukono gwawe gwa buryo? Ahabw'enki ogubindiire aha kifuba? 
Psalms74:12 Kwonka Ruhanga, niiwe Mukama waitu okwiha ira ryona, otuura ori omujuni waitu omu nsi." 
Psalms74:13 Enyanja okagibaganisamu kabiri n'amaani gaawe, waasheenyagurira emitwe y'enkooko aha maizi." 
Psalms74:14 Niiwe waasheenyagwire emitwe y'orukooko rw'omu nyanja, okaruha enyamaishwa z'omu ihamba kururya." 
Psalms74:15 Okaigurira enshuro n'akagyera, waayomya emigyera etooma." 
Psalms74:16 Niiwe waahangire nyomushana na nyekiro, okata eizooba n'okwezi omu myanya yaabyo." 
Psalms74:17 Niiwe waataireho enyatano z'omu nsi yoona, okahanga ekyanda n'eitumba." 
Psalms74:18 Ai Nyakubaho, ijuka okurogota kw'abo bazigu baawe, n'oku ebifamutima bikujuma." 
Psalms74:19 Itwe abataine geehwera, otatushunikira abo bantu bataine saasi; oteebwa abantu baawe abarikubonabonesibwa ebiro byona!" 
Psalms74:20 Ijuka endagaano yaawe. Buri nyanga neekorerwamu eby'obubisha. 
Psalms74:21 Otareka abarikubonabonesibwa kuhemurwa. Abooro n'abakyene ka bakuhimbise! 
Psalms74:22 Ai Ruhanga, imuka orwanirire ebyawe; oijukye oku ebifamutima bisiiba nibirogota!" 
Psalms74:23 Oteebwa orwari rw'abazigu baawe, n'okuyogoora kw'ababisha baawe okutarikuremuura!" 
Psalms75:1 Ai Ruhanga, nitukusiima! Nitukusiima nitukutakira, kandi nitubaruura eby'okutangaaza byawe." 
Psalms75:2 Manya okagira oti: Omu bunaku obu nditaho, ndyacwa emanja omu bwinganisa." 
Psalms75:3 Nobu ensi n'abagitwiremu biritengyeeta, ndyahamya obuhamizo bwayo." 
Psalms75:4 Nkagambira abeeraatsi nti: Murekyere aho kweraata! N'ababi nti: Murekye kwetunguura! 
Psalms75:5 Naabagambira nti: Murekyere aho kwehimbisa n'okugambisa eigundu. 
Psalms75:6 Mumanye ngu okucwa emanja tikuruga burugwa-izooba nari burengyerwa-izooba, nainga omu ihamba nari omu nshozi," 
Psalms75:7 kureka kuruga ahari Ruhanga ogarura ahansi omwe, akatunguura ondi." 
Psalms75:8 Nyakubaho okwaitse ekikopo ekirimu viino etimbwire, erikubira; agishuka, ababi boona ab'omu nsi baginywa; bagicenca n'eibonde ryayo." 
Psalms75:9 Kwonka nyowe ndyaguma mmurangirire, kandi nsingize Ruhanga wa Yakobo." 
Psalms75:10 Ababi ndyabacwa amaryo, n'abahikiriire mbatunguure." 
Psalms76:1 Ruhanga naamanywa gye omuri Yuda, eiziina rye ni rikuru omuri Isiraeli." 
Psalms76:2 Obutaaho bwe buri omuri Saleemu, kandi atuura omuri Siyooni." 
Psalms76:3 Okwo niyo yaahendeire emyambi erikusyoka nk'emirabyo, akacwagacwagura engabo na rurara n'eby'okurwanisa." 
Psalms76:4 Ai Ruhanga, ebishi oba murungi kandi ow'ekitiinisa omu rugamba." 
Psalms76:5 Ahabw'okuba okubwire enshozi eziriho eminyago. Abarwani bagwejegyeire obutasisiimuka, tihariho n'omwe okwaitse eby'okurwanisa." 
Psalms76:6 Ai Ruhanga wa Yakobo, embaraasi n'abazitembire, ahabw'okukabuka kwawe, bigwire bifiire." 
Psalms76:7 Iwe orikutiinisa! N'oha owaakubaasa kukuza omu kaso waagira ekiniga? 
Psalms76:8 Ruhanga ku aimuka kucwa orubanja, n'okujuna boona abarikubonabonesibwa omu nsi," 
Psalms76:9 yaarucwa naayema omu iguru, ensi ececeka eitsirwe obwoba." 
Psalms76:10 Manya ekiniga ky'abantu kyongyera kukuhaisa ekitiinisa kandi abaahonokire aha rugamba baryakuramya nibeemurika. 
Psalms76:11 Muhikiirize ebi mwaraganiise Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, naimwe abeehinguririize orikutiinisa, mumutoijere;" 
Psalms76:12 niwe ahwerekyereza abategyeki, akatiinisa abagabe b'omu nsi." 
Psalms77:1 Ntakira Ruhanga n'eiraka rihango, ngu abone kumpurira." 
Psalms77:2 Ku naabaire ndi omu kabi, naasherura Mukama; naaseesa ekiro nyimukize emikono, omutima gwangye gutarikwenda kuhuumurizibwa." 
Psalms77:3 Naijuka Ruhanga kandi naatsinda; ku naamuteekateekire, omutima gwangye gwagwa enshazi." 
Psalms77:4 Naaraara ntahumbize riisho, ntakiine gagamba ahabw'okushoberwa." 
Psalms77:5 Nkateekateeka ebiro bya ira, naijuka emyaka eyaahingwire," 
Psalms77:6 naaseesa ekiro omutima gwangye nigutonzya, ninteekateeka kandi niinyebuuza nti:" 
Psalms77:7 Mukama ku anaga omuntu, biri niyo heza? Ku areka kumugirira embabazi, kiba eky'obutwire bwona?" 
Psalms77:8 Rukundo ye etahararuka eba ehwereire kyarimwe? N'ebi yaaraganiise kugumaho biba bitakiriho? 
Psalms77:9 Ruhanga ayebirwe kugira embabazi? Nainga ekiniga kye kimizire esaasi ye? 
Psalms77:10 Ndugaho ngira nti: Eki nikyo kindeeteire kushoberwa; amaani ga Rukiraboona tigaakiba nk'okwago. 
Psalms77:11 Ai Nyakubaho, ku nyijuka ebi waakozire n'eby'okutangaaza byawe bya ira," 
Psalms77:12 naabiteekateekaho munonga, mmanya ku biri bikuru." 
Psalms77:13 Ai Ruhanga, emitwarize yaawe k'ehikire! Ni ruhanga ki ori mukuru nkaiwe?" 
Psalms77:14 Niiwe Ruhanga owaakozire eby'okutangaaza, okareetera amahanga amaani gaawe," 
Psalms77:15 obu waacungura abantu baawe n'omukono gwawe: nibo baijukuru ba Yakobo na Yosefu. 
Psalms77:16 Ai Ruhanga, amaizi ku gaakureebire, gaakumanya, gaagaruka enyima okuhitsya obu gaatabangukiire okuzimu." 
Psalms77:17 Eiguru ryahinda, ebicu byafukunkura enjura, emyambi y'emirabyo yaawe yaatoora oku n'oku." 
Psalms77:18 Enkuba yaagamba, emirabyo yaawe yaamurika ensi yoona; ensi yaatetema, yaatengyeeta," 
Psalms77:19 waacwekanisa enyanja; waayambuka amayanja, kwonka ahi waarabire tihaareebwa." 
Psalms77:20 Abantu baawe waabafunya nk'obusyo, beebembeirwe Musa na Arooni." 
Psalms78:1 Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, nimuhurire ebi ndikubeegyesa, mutegye amatu ebi ndikugamba." 
Psalms78:2 Naaza kubagambira omu nfumu, nimbaatira enaama y'ebya ira." 
Psalms78:3 Ebi baatatenkuriitwe baatugambiire tukabyehuririra, twabimanya," 
Psalms78:4 tituri b'okubishereka baijukuru baabo, kandi turyabigambira ab'oruzaaro orurikurataho. Nibyo ebi: Okurangaanwa kwa Nyakubaho, obushoboorozi bwe n'eby'okutangaaza ebi yaakozire;" 
Psalms78:5 akaha aba Isiraeli ebiragiro nabaijukuru ba Yakobo yaabateekyera amateeka. Yaaragiira baatatenkuriitwe kubyegyesa abaana baabo," 
Psalms78:6 ngu ab'obusingye oburiija babimanye, babigambire abaana baabo," 
Psalms78:7 nabo babone kwesiga Ruhanga, barekye kwebwa ebi yaakozire, kureka bagume bakwate ebiragiro bye." 
Psalms78:8 Barekye kuba nka baishebo, abaagangaire bakagoma, abaabaire batarikwesigira kimwe Ruhanga kandi bakaguma batari beesigwa." 
Psalms78:9 Abeefuraimu abahagatira amata, bakahunga aha izooba ry'orugamba." 
Psalms78:10 Tibaarinda ndagaano ya Ruhanga; baayanga kukuratira eiteeka rye. 
Psalms78:11 Ahabw'okuba bakeebwa ebi yaakozire, n'eby'okutangaaza ebi yaaboorekire." 
Psalms78:12 Ebyo akabikora baishebo nibabireeba bakiri omuri Misiri, n'omu mpita za Zoani." 
Psalms78:13 Yaabaganisa enyanja, yaagibarabyamu, yaayemereza amaizi, gaaba nk'ekisiika." 
Psalms78:14 Nyomushana abeebembeza ekicu, na nyekiro abeebembeza omuriro gurikwaka." 
Psalms78:15 Akaata enkiri omu ihamba, yaabaha amaizi maingi garikuruga okuzimu." 
Psalms78:16 Akaigurira enshuro omu rukiri, amaizi gaahimintika nigashuuma nk'emigyera." 
Psalms78:17 Kwonka baayongyera kumucumuraho, nibagomera Rukiraboona bari omu ihamba." 
Psalms78:18 Baagyeza Ruhanga nkana nibamushaba ebyokurya ebi baayetengire. 
Psalms78:19 Baarogota ahari Ruhanga, bati: Ebyo Ruhanga naabaasa kutuheera ebyokurya omu ihamba?" 
Psalms78:20 N'ekya buzima, akateera orukiri, amaizi gaasheesheka, emigyera yaashandaara; kwonka shi, itwe eihanga rye naabaasa kutuha emigaati, n'enyama?" 
Psalms78:21 Mukama ku yaabahuriire, yaabagwerwa kubi; omuriro gwabuguma omu Baisiraeli yaagira ekiniga kingi," 
Psalms78:22 ahabw'okutaikiriza Ruhanga n'okuteesiga maani ge agajuna. 
Psalms78:23 Kwonka yaaragiira ebicu by'ahaiguru, enyigi z'eiguru zaiguka," 
Psalms78:24 yaabariisa ebyokurya by'omu iguru, niyo maanu." 
Psalms78:25 Abantu yaabagaburira ebyokurya bya baamaraika baarya, baahaaga." 
Psalms78:26 Yaimutsya omuyaga gwa burugwa-izooba kuruga omu iguru, omuyaga yaaguhuuhisa amaani ge," 
Psalms78:27 yaabagwisiza endahi nyingi zirikwingana nk'omusheenyi gw'aha nyanja; 
Psalms78:28 yaazigwisa ahagati y'ensiisira zaabo n'aha mbaju zoona ez'amahema gaabo. 
Psalms78:29 Batyo baarya, baahaagira kimwe, ahabw'okuba akabaha eki baayetengire." 
Psalms78:30 Kwonka ku baabaire batakahwaire njara, n'ebyokurya bikibari omu kanwa," 
Psalms78:31 Ruhanga yaabagirira ekiniga yaita abantu baabo b'amaani, yahwerekyereza abatsigazi ba Isiraeli." 
Psalms78:32 Ebyo nobu biraabe byabaire bityo, bakaguma nibashiisha, tibaamwikiriza ahabw'eby'okutangaaza ebi yaakozire." 
Psalms78:33 Nikyo, yaabamariireho juba nk'omwitsyo, emyaka yaabo bakagimara baitsirwe obwoba." 
Psalms78:34 Ku yaabaire abaitamu beezirika kumusherura, beeteisa, bongyera kumwirira haihi," 
Psalms78:35 baijuka Ruhanga ku aba omurinzi waabo, kandi Rukiraboona ku aba omucunguzi waabo." 
Psalms78:36 Nobu baraabe baabaire bamuteerera ekimama, kwonka ebi baabaire bagamba bikaba biba ebishuba;" 
Psalms78:37 bakaba batari beesigwa kandi batarikuhitsya ndagaano ye. 
Psalms78:38 Nobu kiraabe kyabaire kityo, kwonka Ruhanga ahabw'okubagirira esaasi akabasaasira ebicumuro byabo, tiyaabaita. Kaingi akaba atabagwerwa kubi, areka kubagirira ekiniga;" 
Psalms78:39 naijuka ku bari abantu nyabuntu, abari nk'akayaga akahingura katagarukye." 
Psalms78:40 Ka ni kaigi obu baamugomera omu ihamba, bakamugwisiza kubi omu irungu!" 
Psalms78:41 Bakaguma nibagyeza Ruhanga, Orikwera wa Isiraeli, bakamugwisa kubi." 
Psalms78:42 Bakeeberwa kimwe amaani ge, nobu yaabajuna abarikubahata;" 
Psalms78:43 obu yaakora obumanyiso omuri Misiri, n'eby'okutangaaza omu mpita za Zoani;" 
Psalms78:44 akahindura emigyera y'abarikubahata eshagama, ngu barekye kunywa amaizi gaayo." 
Psalms78:45 Yaabooherereza eshohera kubarya, n'ebikyere kubanyangaraza." 
Psalms78:46 Yaariisa emisiri yaabo kanyaananga, n'ebi baabaire beerize byamarwa enzigye." 
Psalms78:47 Yaateeza emizaabibu yaabo orubaare, emitiini yaabo yaagiitsa embeho y'enyababa." 
Psalms78:48 Ente zaabo yaaziitsa orubaare, n'amasyo gaabo yaagateeza enkuba." 
Psalms78:49 Yaabagwerwa kubi abainiire ekiniga n'ekishinjo, yaabareebesa enaku yaabooherereza baamaraika kubacwekyereza." 
Psalms78:50 Tiyaazibira kiniga kye, nobu kwakuba okukiza amagara gaabo, kureka yaabamazaho orufu." 
Psalms78:51 Yaita emijigaijo yoona omuri Misiri, niyo mijigaijo y'oruzaaro rwabo omu maka g'aba Hamu," 
Psalms78:52 Abantu be yaabeebembera nk'omuriisa w'entaama yaabarabya omu ihamba buhooro. 
Psalms78:53 Yaabatwara gye batarikutiina; haza abazigu baabo baamirwa enyanja. 
Psalms78:54 Yaabahitsya omu nsi ye erikwera ey'enshozi, ei yaakubwize omukono gwe ogwa buryo." 
Psalms78:55 Yaabingamu abanyamahanga, baahunga. Yaagibabaganisiza kuba eyaabo y'entuura, baayombekamu amaju gaabo." 
Psalms78:56 Kwonka baagyeza Ruhanga Rukiraboona, bamugomera. Tibaata mutima ha bi yaaragiire," 
Psalms78:57 kureka baagaruka enyima, baagobya nka baishebo; baategama nk'obuta obureebya nyinabwo." 
Psalms78:58 Baamugwisa kubi ahabw'emyanya yaabo emikuru ey'okuramizamu, kandi baamwitsa eihari n'ebishushani byabo." 
Psalms78:59 Ruhanga ku yaabahuriire, yaagira ekiniga, yaacwera kimwe Isiraeli." 
Psalms78:60 Yaatsigaho obutaaho bwe omuri Shilo, ei yaabaire atuuramu ari omu bantu." 
Psalms78:61 Yaareka eshanduukye y'endagaano ye kunyagwa, akamanyiso k'amaani ge n'ekitiinwa kye." 
Psalms78:62 Yaareka abantu be kwitwa, yaagirira ekiniga abu yaayetungiire." 
Psalms78:63 Omuriro gwayokyeza kimwe abatsigazi baabo, n'abaishiki baabo baabura eky'okweshongora aha magyenyi." 
Psalms78:64 Abahongyerezi baabo baitwa, n'abafaakazi baabo tibaabacurira." 
Psalms78:65 Bwanyima Mukama akasisiimuka nk'owaaba agwejegyeire; yaaba nk'emanzi eteirwe viino ebihagi. 
Psalms78:66 Yaarwaza abazigu be ebizimba, byababeera ekihemu ekitaribarugaho." 
Psalms78:67 Yaacwa ab'omuryango gwa Yosefu, tiyaatoorana b'oruganda rwa Efuraimu," 
Psalms78:68 kureka yaatoorana ab'orwa Yuda, n'orushozi Siyooni oru akunda." 
Psalms78:69 Yaarwombekaho obutaaho oburikwera, bwaba nk'obwe obw'omu iguru; kandi yaabuhamya, bwaba nk'ensi etuura ehamire." 
Psalms78:70 Yaatoorana Daudi kuba omugaragwa we, naamwiha omu mariisizo g'entaama." 
Psalms78:71 Yaamweta naariisa ebuguma ezirikwontsya, ngu areeberere aba Isiraeli abantu be ahabwe." 
Psalms78:72 Daudi ogwo, yaabareeberera n'omutima gumwe, yaabeebembera n'obwengye." 
Psalms79:1 Ai Ruhanga, abanyamahanga bataahiriire abantu baawe, baahagaza Nyaruju yaawe erikwera, baasheenya Yerusalemu, baagihindura eitongo." 
Psalms79:2 Emitumbi y'abairu baawe baagiha enyonyi z'omu mwanya kugirya, abaheereza baawe abeesigwa baagaburirwa enyamaishwa." 
Psalms79:3 Omuri Yerusalemu yoona baseesire eshagama yaabo nk'amaizi, tibaine kiziika!" 
Psalms79:4 Tuhindukire ekijumo ahari bataahi baitu, ekigaaniizo n'eky'okushekyererwa aha batwehinguririize." 
Psalms79:5 Ai Nyakubaho, oryahitsya hi okutugirira ekiniga? Eihato ryawe riryaguma ribugume nk'omuriro ebiro byona?" 
Psalms79:6 Yohora ekiniga kyawe aha mahanga agatarikukumanya, n'aha bugabe obutakutakira;" 
Psalms79:7 ahabw'okuba bamazire Yakobo, n'ahu atwire baahahindura eitongo." 
Psalms79:8 Otatutura ebicumuro bya baatatenkuriitwe, orahukye kutugirira esaasi, ahabw'okuba titwakiine maani." 
Psalms79:9 Ai Ruhanga omujuni waitu, otuhwere; ahabw'ekitiinwa ky'eiziina ryawe, otukize, kandi otusaasire ebibi byaitu, ahabw'eiziina ryawe." 
Psalms79:10 Ahanki abanyamahanga nibagira ngu, Ruhanga waabo arahi? Tukaahenwa ki, abanyamahanga bareeba oku orikuhoorera eshagama y'abaheereza baawe eyaaseesirwe naitwe turiho!" 
Psalms79:11 Tukaabaasibwa ki, okutsinda kw'embohe kukuhikaho! Ahabw'amaani gaawe amaingi, kiza abateekateekyeirwe okufa!" 
Psalms79:12 Ai Nyakubaho, ozimuurire bataahi baitu emirundi mushanju, ahabw'ebijumo bi baakujumire." 
Psalms79:13 Naitwe abantu baawe, entaama z'omu iriisizo ryawe, turyakusiima obutaremuura, turangaane eby'okukuhimbisa obusingye n'obusingye." 
Psalms80:1 Iwe muriisa wa Isiraeli, oyebembera Yosefu nk'obusyo, tega okutu: Iwe osingami eriguru ya baakerubi," 
Psalms80:2 murikira Efuraimu, Benyamiini na Manaase! Oimukye n'amaani gaawe, oije otujune!" 
Psalms80:3 Ai Mukama Ruhanga w'amahe, otugarure aha buteeka, otugirire embabazi tubone kujunwa!" 
Psalms80:4 Ai Mukama Ruhanga w'amahe, oryahitsya hi okugwerwa kubi okushaba kw'abantu baawe?" 
Psalms80:5 Obagaburiire ebyokurya by'amarira, waabanywaisa amarira gonka." 
Psalms80:6 Ensi yaitu ogihindwire eirwaniro rya bataahi baitu; twaba eky'okushekyeererwa abazigu baitu. 
Psalms80:7 Ai Mukama Ruhanga w'amahe, otugarure aha buteeka, otugirire embabazi tubone kujunwa!" 
Psalms80:8 Okakuura omuzaabibu omuri Misiri, waabinga amahanga, ngu obone kutunga ahu oraagubyare;" 
Psalms80:9 waaguhingirira, gwahitsya emizi okuzimu, gwabuga ensi." 
Psalms80:10 Ekicuucu kyagwo kyasangira enshozi, n'amataagi gaagwo gaashweka emisisa mihango;" 
Psalms80:11 gaahika aha nyanja, gaayana, gaahika ahari ogwo mugyera." 
Psalms80:12 Ahabw'enki osheenyire orugo rwagwo? Mbwenu omuhinguzi weena naabaasa kugucwaho ebijuma; 
Psalms80:13 empunu z'omu ishwa nizigushiishagura; n'enyamaishwa nizigwona. 
Psalms80:14 Ai Mukama Ruhanga w'amahe, twakweshengyereza, otwegarurire!" 
Psalms80:15 Yema omu iguru, oreebe omuzaabibu ogu waayebyariire; ogushuure kandi ogurinde." 
Psalms80:16 Bagwokize, kwonka iwe ku oribateera ekitsyori, baryacwekyerera." 
Psalms80:17 Orinde omuntu waawe empika, ou waahaire obushoboorozi!" 
Psalms80:18 Titurigaruka kukutsigaho; oturinde tugume twine amagara, haza tukuhoogyere obutoosha." 
Psalms80:19 Ai Ruhanga w'amahe, otugarure aha buteeka, otugirire embabazi, haza tujunwe!" 
Psalms81:1 Ruhanga amaani gaitu, mumuteerere akaari k'okushemererwa; Ruhanga wa Yakobo, mumuteerere akaari k'okumusingiza!" 
Psalms81:2 Mureegye ekyeshongoro, muteere empuuro n'eigobore rirungi n'enanga." 
Psalms81:3 Aha kiro ky'obugyenyi bwaitu, okwezi kuri ekizooro, muteere amakondere agateerwa okwezi kubonekire!" 
Psalms81:4 Ekyo kikateebwaho ahabw'Abaisiraeli, kyaragiirwa Ruhanga wa Yakobo." 
Psalms81:5 Akakitaho kuba ekiragiro omu ruganda rwa Yosefu obu yaateera Misiri. Nimpurira eiraka ry'ou ntarikumanya, nirigira riti:" 
Psalms81:6 Niinye naabaihire omutwaro aha mabega, mukanaga engata z'okugwekoreza." 
Psalms81:7 Omu busaasi mukataka, naabakiza. Naabagarukamu nyesherekire omu ihunga ry'enkuba naabagyereza aha maizi ga Meriba." 
Psalms81:8 Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, muhurire ebi ndikubahana! Iwe Isiraeli, nkaabaasibwa ki, ompurira!" 
Psalms81:9 Mutariramya ruhanga w'endugamahanga. 
Psalms81:10 Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, owaabaihire omu nsi ya Misiri. Ekyanyu n'okwashamya akanwa, nkakaijuza." 
Psalms81:11 Abantu bangye bakanga kuhurira eiraka ryangye; Isiraeli yangomera. 
Psalms81:12 Naanye nikwo kubareka n'emitima egangaire, bakakora kyona eki barikwenda." 
Psalms81:13 Nkaabaasibwa ki, abantu bangye bampurira, Abaisiraeli bakora ebi ndikubahabura!" 
Psalms81:14 Naanye ndahuka kubagomoorera abazigu baabo, ndwanisa ababisha baabo." 
Psalms81:15 Haza obwo abarikwanga Nyakubaho bamukwate amaguru, ahabw'okumanya ngu n'ab'okufubirwa ebiro byona." 
Psalms81:16 Kwonka imwe mbagaburira engano empuuhe, mbaigutsa obwoki bw'omu rukiri." 
Psalms82:1 Ruhanga naayema omu ishengyero rye omu iguru, kuhana abeeyeta baaruhanga, ati:" 
Psalms82:2 Mutarigaruka kucwa emanja zitahikire, n'okugwera orubaju rw'ababi!" 
Psalms82:3 Mucwere abataine kihwera n'efuuzi emanja z'oburyo; abarikuhatwa n'enshoberwa mubakorere eby'amazima. 
Psalms82:4 Mujune abataine kihwera n'abakyene; mubasikure omu maino g'ababisha. 
Psalms82:5 Kwonka muri empumi, timwine ki murikumanya n'eki murikwetegyereza, mwitsire obwinganisa omu ihanga." 
Psalms82:6 Ira nkabagira nti: Naimwe muri baaruhanga, imwe mwena muri abaana ba Rukiraboona." 
Psalms82:7 Kwonka mbwenu, muryafa nk'oku abantu bafa, muhweho nk'omunyiginya weena." 
Psalms82:8 Ai Ruhanga, imuka, ocwere ensi orubanja, ahabw'okuba tihariho ihanga ritari ryawe!" 
Psalms83:1 Ai Ruhanga, otaguma ocecekire, otaine saasi kandi otaine ki oyetaireho!" 
Psalms83:2 Reeba, abazigu baawe bajagaraire, abarikukwanga bararikire emitwe nibeekunika." 
Psalms83:3 Nibacumira abantu baawe enaama mbi," 
Psalms83:4 nibahanuura kukora kubi abu orinda, nibagira bati: Nimwije, tubamareho batagaruka kuba eihanga, eiziina rya Isiraeli rirekye kwijukwa obundi!" 
Psalms83:5 Abaagizire omutima gumwe nibacuma enaama y'okukurwanisa; 
Psalms83:6 nibo beene Edomu na beene Ishimaeli, na beene Moabu na beene Hagari;" 
Psalms83:7 Abagebali, beene Amoni na beene Amaleki. Abafilisitiya n'abatwire omuri Tuuro;" 
Psalms83:8 beene Asiriya bakwataniise nabo kuha baijukuru ba Loti emikono. 
Psalms83:9 Obagire nk'oku waagizire Abamidiyani na Sisera na Yabiini aha mugyera Kiishoni; 
Psalms83:10 abacwekyereziibwe omuri Endori, bakahinduka orwezo omu itaka nk'amasha." 
Psalms83:11 Abanyiginya baabo obagire nka Oreebu na Zeebu, n'abategyeki baabo boona nka Zeeba na Zaalumuuna," 
Psalms83:12 abaagizire bati: Ka twekubuurire ensi ya Ruhanga! 
Psalms83:13 Ai Ruhanga wangye, obatuntumure nk'omucuucu, nari nk'omweziga ogurikuzingazingwa akasoorora!" 
Psalms83:14 Nk'omuriro oku gwotsya ekibira, n'endimi zaagwo oku zibabura enshozi," 
Psalms83:15 obe nikwo waabakuratsa eihunga ryawe, obatiinise n'eshato yaawe!" 
Psalms83:16 Ai Nyakubaho, obabwerabweze okuhitsya obu barikusherura." 
Psalms83:17 Obuhemu n'obwoba n'enshoni na rufu bibagumeho! 
Psalms83:18 Haza bamanye ku niiwe wenka oyetwa Nyakubaho, Rukiraboona omu nsi yoona!" 
Psalms84:1 Ai Mukama w'amahe, ebishi, nkunda obutaaho bwawe!" 
Psalms84:2 Ai Nyakubaho, omutima gwangye gwine ekihika ky'okureeba ebikaari byawe! Amagara gangye goona nigateerera Ruhanga ohuriire akaari k'okushemererwa." 
Psalms84:3 Nangwa n'ekiteerankumba kigira obutaaho, n'entaratambi egira ekyashuri eki eyaturiramu obwana bwayo: nigo matambiro gaawe, ai Mukama w'amahe, Omugabe wangye kandi Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms84:4 Baine omugisha abataaha omu nju yaawe, bakasiiba nibakusingiza!" 
Psalms84:5 Baine omugisha abu oba obukomooko bw'amaani gaabo, abakunda kuza Siyooni!" 
Psalms84:6 Ku baba nibaraba omu ruhanga Baaka baruhindura orw'enshuro; enjura y'empangukano erwijuza ebiyanja. 
Psalms84:7 Bagumizamu nibeeyongyera amaani, okuhitsya obu bahika Siyooni bakareeba Ruhanga wa baaruhanga." 
Psalms84:8 Ai Mukama Ruhanga w'amahe, hurira okushaba kwangye! Ai Ruhanga wa Yakobo, tega okutu!" 
Psalms84:9 Ai Ruhanga ngabo yaitu, otureebe, n'omugabe ou waasiigire omuhe omugisha!" 
Psalms84:10 Okumara ekiro kimwe omu bikaari byawe nikunkirira okumara ebiro rukumi ahandi. Kandi okwemerera aha muryango gw'enju ya Ruhanga nikunkirira okutuura n'ababi. 
Psalms84:11 Ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga aba eizooba kandi engabo, aha emigisha n'ekitiinwa. Nyakubaho tagira kirungi eki aima abakora ebihikire." 
Psalms84:12 Ai Mukama w'amahe, ebishi omuntu orikukwesiga aine omugisha!" 
Psalms85:1 Ai Nyakubaho, iwe owaakunzire ensi yaawe, okazaahuura aba Yakobo abaanyagirwe," 
Psalms85:2 okaihaho ekicumuro aha ihanga ryawe, okasaasira ebibi byaryo byona," 
Psalms85:3 okareka kubagirira ekiniga n'ekishinjo kyawe ekingi. 
Psalms85:4 Mbwenu, ai Ruhanga Omujuni waitu, otugarure aha buteeka, orekye kutugirira ekiniga!" 
Psalms85:5 Oryatugwerwa kubi ebiro byona? Oryaguma obiihiirwe obusingye bwona? 
Psalms85:6 Toritugaruramu magara, abantu baawe bakashemerererwa omuriiwe?" 
Psalms85:7 Ai Nyakubaho, otumanyise rukundo yaawe etahararuka, kandi otukwatse tujunwe!" 
Psalms85:8 Ka mpurire ebi Ruhanga Nyakubaho araagambe, ahabw'okuba abantu be n'abarikwera be, n'abarikumwehongyera n'omutima gwabo, naija kubagambira eby'obusingye." 
Psalms85:9 Manya okujuna kwe kuba haihi n'abamutiina, ngu ekitiinwa kye kibone kuguma omu nsi yaitu." 
Psalms85:10 Rukundo etahararuka n'obwesigwa, hati nibigyendera hamwe." 
Psalms85:11 Obwesigwa bwamera omu nsi, n'okuhikiirira kwashuuma nikuruga omu iguru." 
Psalms85:12 Nyakubaho niwe atuha okushemererwa, nk'oku eitaka ritureetera omweru." 
Psalms85:13 Okuhikiirira kuryamwebembera, kumutebeekanisize omuhanda." 
Psalms86:1 Ai Nyakubaho, tega okutu, ongarukyemu, ahabw'okuba ndi omworo kandi omukyene." 
Psalms86:2 Ondinde ntafa, ahabw'okuba ndi omushongore ahariiwe; njuna ahabw'okuba ndi omuheereza waawe orikukwesiga." 
Psalms86:3 Ai Nyakubaho, niiwe Ruhanga wangye, ongirire embabazi, ahabw'okuba nkutakira eizooba ryona." 
Psalms86:4 Ai Nyakubaho, reetera omuheereza waawe okushemererwa, ahabw'okuba niiwe ngambira ekindi aha mutima." 
Psalms86:5 Ai Nyakubaho, oba murungi kandi osaasira, ogirira abakutakira rukundo etahararuka." 
Psalms86:6 Ai Nyakubaho, hurira okushaba kwangye; otegye okutu ninkutakira," 
Psalms86:7 Ku nkutakira ndi omu kabi, ogarukamu okushaba kwangye." 
Psalms86:8 Ai Nyakubaho, tihariho ruhanga ondiijo oingana naiwe, kandi tihariho bikorwa ebingana n'ebyawe." 
Psalms86:9 Ai Nyakubaho, abanyamahanga boona baryaija, bakuramye, bakuhimbise." 
Psalms86:10 Ahabw'okuba, iwe Ruhanga, iwe wenka oba mukuru kandi okora eby'okutangaaza." 
Psalms86:11 Ai Nyakubaho, onyegyese emitwarize yaawe mbone kugikuratira omu mazima; onkwatse, ngire omutima gumwe, mbone kukutiina." 
Psalms86:12 Ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, ninkusiima n'omutima gumwe, mbone kukutiina." 
Psalms86:13 Ahabw'okungirira rukundo yaawe mpango etahararuka, okaanyiha okuzimu owa Nyamuteza." 
Psalms86:14 Ai Ruhanaga, abanyamaryo baanyimukiriire; ekigombe ky'abainazi abatakwetaho nikimpiiga kuunyita." 
Psalms86:15 Kwonka, iwe Mukama Ruhanga, ogira okusaasira kwingi n'embabazi, torahuka kuguubwa kubi, kandi ogira rukundo etahararuka, n'obwesigwa." 
Psalms86:16 Ohindukye ondeebe, haza ongirire embabazi. Nyowe omuheereza waawe, omwana w'omuzaana waawe, ompe amaani gaawe n'okujuna kwawe." 
Psalms86:17 Kandi onyorekye akamanyiso k'oburungi bwawe, reero, ai Nyakubaho, obwerabweze abarikuunyanga; bamanye ku ori omuhwezi kandi omuhuumuza wangye." 
Psalms87:1 Nyakubaho akombeka orurembo rwe aha rushozi orurikwera; 
Psalms87:2 kandi akunda amarembo ga Siyooni okukira emyanya etuurwamu omuri Isiraeli. 
Psalms87:3 Iwe rurembo rwa Ruhanga 'we, ebishi, ogambwaho eby'ekitiinwa!" 
Psalms87:4 Omu mahanga agarikummanya, nimbariramu Misiri na Babulooni. Abantu nobu baraabe nibagira ngu nanka nari nanka akazaarirwa Filisitiya, Tuuro nari Etiopiya," 
Psalms87:5 kwonka boona beeta Siyooni: Maama; ahabw'okuba boona niyo yaabazaire. 
Psalms87:6 Nyakubaho niwe agigizire nk'oku eri. Ku aba naahandiika abantu, ahandiika ati: Aha niho nanka na nanka baazaariirwe." 
Psalms87:7 Abeeshongozi n'abazini nikyo bagirira bati: Obutaaho bwaitu bwona buri omuriiwe. 
Psalms88:1 Ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, nkutakira nyomushana na nyekiro." 
Psalms88:2 Nkaabaasibwa ki ohurira okushaba kwangye ontega okutu ninkutakira! 
Psalms88:3 Ahabw'okuba nyine enaku nyingi ndi haihi kuza owa Nyamuteza. 
Psalms88:4 Nimbarirwa omu barikushuuma okuzimu, ndi omuntu ohwairwemu amaani." 
Psalms88:5 Ntsigirwe omu bafiire nyenka, ndi nk'abaitsirwe abari omu bituuro abu otaakiijuka, kandi abu otakirinda." 
Psalms88:6 Onnagire okuzimu hare munonga, omu mwirima ndindindi." 
Psalms88:7 Ekiniga kyawe kimpingamiire, ebingonzi byawe binshwekyeire kimwe." 
Psalms88:8 Onnteeraine na bagyenzi bangye; naababeera ekihagaro. Ntabikirwe, tindikubaasa kurugayo," 
Psalms88:9 amaisho gangwire omunda ahabw'obusaasi. Ai Nyakubaho, nsiiba ninkutakira, nkutegire emikono." 
Psalms88:10 Eby'okutangaaza byawe biba eby'abafiire? Ebyo bakaabaasa kwimuka bakuhimbisa? 
Psalms88:11 N'oha owaakugamba ahari rukundo yaawe etahararuka ari omu kituuro? Nari aha bwesigwa bwawe ari omu ihwero? 
Psalms88:12 Eby'okutangaaza byawe baryabireeba omu mwirima? N'eby'okuhikiirira kwawe babihuririre omu nsi y'abaayebire? 
Psalms88:13 Kwonka nyowe, ai Nyakubaho, ninkutakira; buri kasheeshe ninkweshengyereza." 
Psalms88:14 Beitu shi, nonnagira ki, ai Nyakubaho? Ahabw'enki noonyehuzya?" 
Psalms88:15 Okwiha omu buto bwangye ntuura nimbonabona kandi ninkaba; niinyemera ebirikutiinisa byawe; mbwenu naagahwa. 
Psalms88:16 Ekiniga kyawe kimmazireho, oncwekyereize n'ebirikutiinisa byawe." 
Psalms88:17 Bisiiba nibiinyehinguririza; nibireetwa embaju zoona nk'omwegyemure. 
Psalms88:18 Oreeteire bagyenzi bangye na bataahi bangye kuunyetantara; omwirima nigwo mugyenzi wangye ou ntsigaire nawe. 
Psalms89:1 Ai Nyakubaho, ndyayeshongora ebya rukundo yaawe etahararuka, ndangaane obwesigwa bwawe obusingye n'obusingye." 
Psalms89:2 Ahabw'okuba nimmanya ku rukundo yaawe etahararuka egumaho obutwire bwona, n'obwesigwa bwawe ku buhamire nk'eiguru." 
Psalms89:3 Manya okagira oti: Ndagaine endagaano n'ou naatooraine, nimpamiza Daudi omuheereza wangye, nti:" 
Psalms89:4 Ab'oruzaaro rwawe ndyabagumyaho ebiro byona; mpamye obugabe bwawe obusingye bwona. 
Psalms89:5 Ai Mukama, ekimbuuro ky'abarikwera b'omu iguru kikuhimbisa, ahabw'obwesigwa bwawe oburikutangaaza." 
Psalms89:6 Ahabw'okuba n'oha omu kaabunga orikwingana na Nyakubaho, kandi omu b'omu iguru, n'oha owaakumwerenga?" 
Psalms89:7 Manya ori Ruhanga otiinisa, omu ishengyero ry'abarikwera, oba mukuru kandi oitsa obwoba abakwehinguririize boona." 
Psalms89:8 Ai Mukama, Ruhanga w'amahe kandi ow'amaani, ori nkaiwe n'oha oba omwesigwa omuri byona?" 
Psalms89:9 Niiwe otegyeka okuhinduriza kw'enyanja; okacureeza ebingonzi byayo byaimukiirira. 
Psalms89:10 Okacoocoora orukooko Rahabu waarwita, waataataanisa abazigu baawe n'amaani." 
Psalms89:11 Eiguru n'ensi n'ebyawe; kandi ebigirimu byona niiwe waabihangire. 
Psalms89:12 Obukizi-bwa-buryo n'obwa-bumosho nabyo niiwe waabihangire. Tabora na Herumooni zishemerererwa eiziina ryawe. 
Psalms89:13 Eshi oba ow'amaani! ogira obushoboorozi burikutangaaza. 
Psalms89:14 Obukama bwawe buhamira aha kuhikiirira n'amazima, n'ebi okora byona bibamu rukundo n'obwesigwa." 
Psalms89:15 Ai Nyakubaho, abakusingiza baine omugisha! Baryaguma nibagyendera omu mushana gw'embabazi zaawe," 
Psalms89:16 basiibe nibashemerererwa omuriiwe, kandi nibahimbisa okuhikiirira kwawe." 
Psalms89:17 Ahabw'okuba niiwe kitiinwa kyabo kandi amaani gaabo; ahabw'embabazi zaawe otusinguza. 
Psalms89:18 Manya, Nyakubaho Orikwera wa Isiraeli, niiwe oturinda kandi okatutegyeka." 
Psalms89:19 Obundi okabonekyera abeesigwa baawe, waabagira oti: Nkajweka emanzi ekirunga, naakuza owaatoorainwe omu bantu bangye." 
Psalms89:20 Nkatoorana Daudi omuheereza wangye naamusiiga amajuta gangye agarikwera. 
Psalms89:21 Ndyaguma nawe muhe amaani. 
Psalms89:22 Tihariho muzigu oribaasa kumubuza obwengye, nobu yaakuba omuntu mubi." 
Psalms89:23 Ndyacoocoora ababisha be, n'abarikumwanga mbateere, mbagwiseho." 
Psalms89:24 Obwesigwa bwangye na rukundo yangye etahararuka biryamugumaho, kandi ahabwangye aryasingura." 
Psalms89:25 Ndyamutegyekyesa enyanja, ategyekyere kimwe emigyera." 
Psalms89:26 Aryanyeta ati: Taata, niiwe Ruhanga wangye, kandi orukiri oru nkiriramu!" 
Psalms89:27 Ndyamugira omujigaijo gwangye, omugabe orikukira abandi boona ab'omu nsi." 
Psalms89:28 Ndyaguma mwiniire rukundo etahararuka obutwire bwona, n'endagaano yangye nawe egume ehamire." 
Psalms89:29 Nkataho oruzaaro rwe ngu rube orw'ebiro byona, n'obugabe bwe ngu bugumeho nk'eiguru." 
Psalms89:30 Abaana be ku barireka amateeka gangye, bataatwaza nk'oku naaragiire;" 
Psalms89:31 kandi ku barishiisha ebi naataireho, bataayorobera biragiro byangye," 
Psalms89:32 ndyabafubira mbateeze enkoni n'enkoba, nimbatura ebibi n'ebicumuro byabo;" 
Psalms89:33 ndyaguma niimukunda tindimuhararuka n'akakye, nobu kwakuba okumuhemukaho." 
Psalms89:34 Tindiita ndagaano yangye nawe, nkahindura eki naagambire." 
Psalms89:35 Ahabw'okuba ndi Orikwera, nkarahira rimwe naaheza; tindibeiha Daudi." 
Psalms89:36 Oruzaaro rwe ruryagumaho nengoma ye eryagumaho nk'eizooba; 
Psalms89:37 ebe nk'okwezi kw'ahaiguru, kareebi omwesigwa otabura kuboneka." 
Psalms89:38 Kwonka hati oyangire omugabe ou waatooraine waamwoga kandi waamugirira ekiniga. 
Psalms89:39 Oitsire endagaano ei waaragaine n'omuheereza waawe; waashiisha ekirunga kye, waakinaga omu mucuucu." 
Psalms89:40 Ofumagwire engo ze zoona, n'ebigo bye waabisheenyagura." 
Psalms89:41 Omuhinguzi weena naamunyaga, kandi bataahi be nibamugaya." 
Psalms89:42 Orekire abarikumurwanisa baamukiza amaani; waareetera abazigu be boona kwesiima. 
Psalms89:43 Rurara ye waagiita obwogi, tiwaamuha mikono mu rugamba." 
Psalms89:44 Waamwaka enkoni ye y'obugabe, watuura aha nsi ekitebe kye." 
Psalms89:45 Waamumara amaizi akiri muto, waamubwerabweza." 
Psalms89:46 Ai Nyakubaho, oryahitsya hi okweshereka ebiro byona? Ekiniga kyawe kiryahitsya hi okubuguma nk'omuriro?" 
Psalms89:47 Ai Nyakubaho, oijukye ku ntsigaize ebiro bikye, n'oku abantu boona omuheru gwabo guba okufa." 
Psalms89:48 Ni muntu ki origumaho atafiire? N'oha owaakweiha omu mikono ya Nyamuteza? 
Psalms89:49 Ai Mukama, rukundo yaawe eya ira etahararuka erahi? Ebi waaraganiise Daudi birahi?" 
Psalms89:50 Ai Mukama, oteebwa oku barikujuma omuheereza waawe, n'oku ndikusaasibwa ebijumo by'abanyamahanga." 
Psalms89:51 Ai Nyakubaho, abazigu baawe nibajuma ou waasiigire, kandi nibamujumira ahu arikuraba hoona." 
Psalms89:52 Nyakubaho ahimbisibwe ebiro byona! Amiina! Amiina! 
Psalms90:1 Ai Mukama, okwiha ira ryona otuura ori obuhungiro bwaitu." 
Psalms90:2 Enshozi zitakabaireho, otakahangire nsi n'ebirimu byona, oba Ruhanga okwiha ryari na ryari, okuhitsya obusingye bwona." 
Psalms90:3 Ogarura abantu omu mucuucu noogira oti; Imwe bantu 'mwe, mugarukye ei mwarugire!" 
Psalms90:4 Ahariiwe, emyaka rukumi ni nk'eizooba rimwe, nari nk'omwanya mukye ogu omurinzi wa nyekiro amara." 
Psalms90:5 Abantu abeebwa nk'ekirooto ky'owaasisiimuka; bari nk'obunyaatsi 
Psalms90:6 obumera omu kasheeshe, bukarabya, omu mwabazyo bukahonga, bukooma." 
Psalms90:7 Buzimazima, otumazireho n'ekiniga kyawe, ekishinjo kyawe kyatwitsa obwoba." 
Psalms90:8 Ebibi byaitu bisherekirwe obyerwire, waabimurika byareebwa." 
Psalms90:9 Ebiro byona bituubibwa ekiniga kyawe, emyaka yaitu ehwaho nk'omwitsyo." 
Psalms90:10 Emyaka y'amagara gaitu eba makumi mushanju, ku tuba twagizire amaani ehika makumi munaana; kwonka okugyogamu n'okureeba enaku n'okufa kubi, kandi ku ehwaho eti, twegyendera tukurata abaahwaire." 
Psalms90:11 N'oha oramanyire amaani g'ekiniga kyawe, n'oku ekishinjo kyawe kishemereire kutiinwa?" 
Psalms90:12 Otumanyise ku ebiro byaitu biri bikye, tubone kugira obwengye." 
Psalms90:13 Ai Nyakubaho, otatugwerwa kubi! Mbwenu tukitsigaizeyo ebiro bingahi? Girira embabazi abaheereza baawe!" 
Psalms90:14 Omu kasheeshe otwijuze rukundo yaawe etahararuka; reero ebiro byaitu byona tushemererwe, tweshongore." 
Psalms90:15 Otuhe okunanuka okurikwigana n'ebiro ebi waatubonaboneseizemu, niyo myaka ei twarebeiremu enaku." 
Psalms90:16 Yoreka abaheereza baawe ebi okora, n'abaana baitu oboorekye ekitiinwa kyawe." 
Psalms90:17 Mukama Ruhanga waitu, embabazi zaawe zitugumeho, emirimo ei tukora ebone kuhama; eego, ogihamye." 
Psalms91:1 Ku waakutuura omu buhungiro bwa Rukiraboona, owaawe yaaba omu kicuucu ky'ow'obushoboorozi bwona," 
Psalms91:2 okagira Nyakubaho oti: Niiwe buhungiro bwangye kandi omurinzi wangye, Ruhanga wangye ou nyesiga!" 
Psalms91:3 Akwiha omu mitego y'orikukusherura kukwita, akukiza orufu rurikwita." 
Psalms91:4 Aryakubumbatiza amapapa ge, gabe obuhungiro bwawe, ahabw'okuba obwesigwa bwe buba engabo yaawe n'akagabo kaawe." 
Psalms91:5 Toritiina kirikutiinisa kyona nyekiro, nari omwambi ogurashwa nyomushana," 
Psalms91:6 nobu rwakuba orufu orwita abantu nyekiro nainga ekibacwekyereza nyomushana. 
Psalms91:7 Abantu rukumi ku baakukugwa aha rubaju, na kakumi baakwehinguririza, kwonka iwe tokaahikwaho kabi." 
Psalms91:8 Iwe ogira oti: Nyakubaho niwe buhungiro bwangye, kandi Rukiraboona niwe murinzi wangye." 
Psalms91:9 Eki waakukora n'okureeba, okeetegyereza oku ababi bazimuurirwa." 
Psalms91:10 Akabi koona tikaribaasa kukuhikaho, n'orufu tiruriirira haihi ka yaawe;" 
Psalms91:11 ahabw'okuba akaragiira baamaraika be, ngu bakurinde ei oriza yoona." 
Psalms91:12 Baryakutega emikono, ngu orekye kuhikiza ekigyere kyawe aha ibaare." 
Psalms91:13 Oryaribata entare n'empiri, oribatiirire entare enshaarizi n'enjoka z'obushegu." 
Psalms91:14 Abarikunkunda boona ndyabajuna, ndinde weena omanya eiziina ryangye." 
Psalms91:15 Orikuntakira mmugarukyemu, abashobeirwe ngume nabo, mbahe ekitiinwa, babe buhooro." 
Psalms91:16 Mbaramaaze bamanye ku njuna. 
Psalms92:1 Ni kirungi okusiima Nyakubaho. Iwe Rukiraboona, ni kirungi okukweshongorera eby'okukuhimbisa;" 
Psalms92:2 okumanyisa rukundo yaawe etahararuka omu kasheeshe, n'obwesigwa bwawe nyekiro," 
Psalms92:3 nituteera enanga n'ekidongo, nitujumeeza amaraka g'eigobore." 
Psalms92:4 Ai Nyakubaho, ebi waakozire nibingwisa gye, niinyeshongora, niinyesiimira ebi waahikiriize." 
Psalms92:5 Ai Nyakubaho, ebi waakozire ka ni bikuru! Ebiteekateeko byawe ka biri hare!" 
Psalms92:6 Kwonka ebifamutima tibirikubimanya, n'abashema tibarikubyetegyereza." 
Psalms92:7 Ababi nobu bamera nk'obunyaatsi, n'enkozi z'ebibi zikagogyeera, hoona n'ab'okuhwerekyererera kimwe." 
Psalms92:8 Kwonka iwe, ai Nyakubaho, oba Nyakusinga ebiro byona." 
Psalms92:9 Ai Nyakubaho, reeba abazigu baawe oku barikuhwerekyerera, n'enkozi z'ebibi oku zirikutaataanisibwa." 
Psalms92:10 Ompaire amaani nk'ag'embogo, naashemererwa." 
Psalms92:11 Nkareeba abazigu bangye nibasingurwa, naahurira okuborooga kw'enyabibi." 
Psalms92:12 Abahikiriire bakura gye nk'omukindo; banyeeta nk'emisisa ya Lebanooni. 
Psalms92:13 Baryagogyeerera omu bikaari bya Ruhanga waitu, bari nk'emiti ebyeirwe omu nju ya Nyakubaho." 
Psalms92:14 Baryaguma nibaana baakuzire, baine amaizi nibabereshera;" 
Psalms92:15 barangaane ku Nyakubaho, omurinzi wangye, otabamu kutahikiirira, aba ow'amazima!" 
Psalms93:1 Nyakubaho aba omugabe w'ekitiinwa kandi ow'amaani. Eego, ensi ehamire." 
Psalms93:2 Ekitebe kyawe kituuraho okwiha ira ryona, okwiha obunyakare, obaho." 
Psalms93:3 Ai Nyakubaho, amayanja nigatuumeera, nigahoorera nigahinda." 
Psalms93:4 Nyakubaho otakirwa, naakira okuhoorera kw'amayanja, n'ebingonzi by'enyanja eby'amaani, kandi naabikiza obushoboorozi!" 
Psalms93:5 Ai Nyakubaho, ebi waaragiire tibirihinduka; oburikwera bureetera Nyaruju yaawe kuba nungi ebiro byona." 
Psalms94:1 Ai Nyakubaho, Ruhanga omuhoozi, iwe ohoora enzigu, boneka!" 
Psalms94:2 Iwe ocwera ensi orubanja, imuka; ozimuurire abanyamaryo ebibashemereire!" 
Psalms94:3 Ai Nyakubaho, ababi baryahitsya hi, baryahitsya hi okwehimbisa?" 
Psalms94:4 Ezo nkozi z'ebibi nibagambisa amaryo, kandi beehimbisa." 
Psalms94:5 Ai Nyakubaho, abo babi bahata abantu baawe; babonabonesa abu waayetooraniire." 
Psalms94:6 Bacwekyereza abafaakazi n'abagyenyi, kandi baita efuuzi." 
Psalms94:7 Bwanyima bagira bati: Nyakubaho taine ki arikureeba; Ruhanga wa Yakobo tarikubyetaho. 
Psalms94:8 Imwe bifamutima 'mwe, nimuteekateekye! Imwe bashema 'mwe, muryagira ryari obwengye?" 
Psalms94:9 Beitu owaatuhaire okutu naaremwa kuhurira? Owaahangire eriisho tarikureeba? 
Psalms94:10 Ohana amahanga tarikubaasa kuhana? Nyakubaho oyegyesa abantu ngu bagire obwengye," 
Psalms94:11 amanya ebi bateekateeka ku biri nk'omwitsyo. 
Psalms94:12 Ai Nyakubaho, aine omugisha omuntu ou ohana, okamwegyesa eiteeka ryawe;" 
Psalms94:13 aguma atebeekaine omu biro by'akabi, okuhitsya obu ababi baziikwa." 
Psalms94:14 Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho tahemuka ha bantu be, nobu kwakuba okutsigaho abantu be ahabwe." 
Psalms94:15 Emanja ziryagaruka zicuubwe abahikiriire, haza boona abaine emitima y'amazima bakihamye." 
Psalms94:16 Tihariho oraimukire kundwanisiza ababi, nari oreemereire kunjuna enkozi z'ebibi." 
Psalms94:17 Kuri Nyakubaho atarampaire mikono, nkaabaire naagiire etagira kateezo." 
Psalms94:18 Ai Nyakubaho, ku naakugira nti: Naaterera, ahonaaho rukundo yaawe etahararuka embangira." 
Psalms94:19 Ku mba nyine enaku nyingi, ompuumuriza, haza nshemererwa." 
Psalms94:20 Tokasiimaga rukiiko rw'abategyeki babi, abakoresa abantu ebitahikire nibeekwatsa ebiragiro," 
Psalms94:21 bakacuma enaama y'okwita abahikiriire, n'omuntu ori mwere bakamucwera orw'okufa." 
Psalms94:22 Kwonka Nyakubaho aba omurinzi wangye, kandi Ruhanga wangye n'orukiri oru mpungiramu." 
Psalms94:23 Mukama Ruhanga waitu afubira ababi naabatura ebibi byabo abacwa amaryo, baceceka." 
Psalms95:1 Nimwije tuhimbisa Nyakubaho, tweshongorere Rukiri omujuni waitu tushemereirwe." 
Psalms95:2 Twije omu maisho ge, tumusiime, tumweshongorere tushemereirwe nitumusingiza." 
Psalms95:3 Ahakuba Nyakubaho aba Ruhanga Nyakusinga, kandi Omugabe orikukira baaruhanga boona." 
Psalms95:4 Ensa z'ensi niwe azitegyeka, n'emitwe y'enshozi nayo eba eye." 
Psalms95:5 Enyanja n'eye ahabw'okuba niwe yaagihangire, n'ensi niwe yaagibumbire." 
Psalms95:6 Mwije, tumuramye nitwinama, tutsimbire amaju Nyakubaho Omuhangi waitu!" 
Psalms95:7 Ahakuba niwe Ruhanga waitu, naitwe turi abantu b'omu iriisizo rye, entaama ezi ariisa. Nkaabaasibwa ki, eri izooba muhurira eiraka rye, eririkugira riti:" 
Psalms95:8 Mureke kugangaaza emitima nk'obu baagigangariza Meriba, nka buri obwa Maasa bari omu ihamba," 
Psalms95:9 obu baashwenkuriimwe bangyeza, bakantega, nobu baraabe baareebire ebi naakozire!" 
Psalms95:10 Nkamara emyaka makumi ana ngwereirwe kubi ab'obusingye obwo, naarugaho naagira nti: Abo bantu, batarikweta ha mitwarize yangye, bahabire." 
Psalms95:11 Nikyo naarahiriire nyine ekiniga nti: Tibaritunga kihuumuro kyangye. 
Psalms96:1 Nimweshongorere Nyakubaho ekyeshongoro kisya! Imwe ab'omu nsi yoona, mweshongorere Nyakubaho!" 
Psalms96:2 Mweshongorere Nyakubaho muhimbise eiziina rye. Murangaane okujuna kwe buri izooba; 
Psalms96:3 mumanyise ekitiinwa kye omu banyamahanga; mugambire buri ihanga eby'okutangaaza bye! 
Psalms96:4 Nyakubaho ni mukuru, bamurangaane n'eiraka rihango, n'ow'okutiinwa okukira baaruhanga boona." 
Psalms96:5 Manya baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga baba ekyeterero. Kwonka Nyakubaho niwe yaahangire eiguru. 
Psalms96:6 Ekitiinwa n'obukuru bimushagatira, obushoboorozi n'oburungi biri owe aharikwera." 
Psalms96:7 Imwe nganda z'amahanga 'mwe, musingize Nyakubaho! Mumusingize ahabw'ekitiinwa kye n'obushoboorozi bwe," 
Psalms96:8 muhe Nyakubaho ekitiinwa ekishemereire eiziina rye, Mureete empongano omu bikaari bye;" 
Psalms96:9 mumuramize omu kikaari kye ekirikwera. Imwe ab'omu nsi yoona, mutetemere omu maisho ge!" 
Psalms96:10 Mugambire amahanga muti: Nyakubaho ari aha ngoma! Akahamiza kimwe ensi, teritengyeeta; aryacwera buri ihanga emanja omu buryo." 
Psalms96:11 Eiguru ka rishemererwe, n'ensi k'eyesiime; enyanja k'ehoorere n'ebigirimu byona;" 
Psalms96:12 emisiri n'ebirimu byona ka byesiime! Ebibira byona ka biteere akaari k'okushemererwa," 
Psalms96:13 bitangirire Nyakubaho orikwija. Aryacwera ensi orubanja omu bwinganisa aramure amahanga omu mazima. 
Psalms97:1 Nyakubaho ari aha ngoma! N'ahabw'ekyo ensi k'eyesiime, ebirwa bishemererwe!" 
Psalms97:2 Ebicu n'omwirima bimwehinguririize, okuhikiirira n'obwinganisa biba obuhamizo bw'ekitebe kye." 
Psalms97:3 Ku aba naagyenda, omuriro gumwebembera, nigwotsya abazigu be abamuri embaju zoona." 
Psalms97:4 Emirabyo ye emurikira ab'omu nsi; ensi ku ebireeba, etetema." 
Psalms97:5 Mukama w'ensi yoona ku aija, enshozi ziyaga nk'entsinda;" 
Psalms97:6 eiguru rimanyisa okuhikiirira kwe, n'amahanga goona gareeba ekitiinwa kye." 
Psalms97:7 Boona abaramya ebishushani, bikabeyehimbisisa, nibakabwerabwere! Imwe baaruhanga mwena, nimumuramye!" 
Psalms97:8 Ai Nyakubaho, ahabw'emicwere yaawe y'emanja, nikyo Abasiyooni bashemerererwa baagihurira, n'ab'omu ndembo za Yuda bakananuka." 
Psalms97:9 Ahabw'okuba, ai Nyakubaho, omu nsi yoona oba Mukama Rukiraboona; ohimbisibwa okukira baaruhanga boona." 
Psalms97:10 Nyakubaho akunda abanga ebibi, arinda abamwehongyera naabasikura omu mikono y'ababi." 
Psalms97:11 Omushana gujwera abahikiriire, n'okushemererwa kugirwa ab'amazima." 
Psalms97:12 Imwe bahikiriire 'mwe mushemerererwe omuri Nyakubaho, mumwijukye, kandi mumusingize!" 
Psalms98:1 Mweshongorere Nyakubaho ekyeshongoro kisya, ahabw'okuba akora eby'okutangaaza. Amaani ge n'obushoboorozi bwe bimuhaisize obusinguzi." 
Psalms98:2 Nyakubaho ayorekire amaani ge g'okujuna; yaashuuruurira amahanga okuhikiirira kwe," 
Psalms98:3 naijuka rukundo ye etahararuka n'obwesigwa bwe ebi yaagiriire enju ya Isiraeli. Ensi yoona ahu egarukira, yaareebire okujuna kwa Ruhanga waitu!" 
Psalms98:4 Imwe ab'omu nsi mwena, nimurangaane Nyakubaho, nimumuteerera akaari k'okushemererwa!" 
Psalms98:5 Mweshongorere Nyakubaho nimumusingiza n'eigobore eriine amaraka agarikujumeererana. 
Psalms98:6 Musingize Nyakubaho Omugabe n'amaraka g'amakondere n'ag'enzamba ebirikunihiira! 
Psalms98:7 Enyanja ehoorere na byona ebigirimu; ensi hamwe n'abagitwiremu," 
Psalms98:8 n'emigyera yoona biteere omu ngaro n'eshonzi zeemurikye nizishemererwa," 
Psalms98:9 biri omumaisho ga Nyakubaho! Ahabw'okuba yaija kucwera ensi orubanja omu bwinganisa, aramure amahanga omu mazima." 
Psalms99:1 Nyakubaho ari aha ngoma, amahanga nigatetema; asingami ahagati ya baakerubi: ensi neetengyeeta." 
Psalms99:2 Nyakubaho ni mukuru omuri Siyooni naakira ab'amahanga goona. 
Psalms99:3 Ka bahimbise eiziina ryawe erikuru kandi ery'ekitiinisa, nibagira bati: Ori orikwera kandi ow'obushoboorozi!" 
Psalms99:4 Oba Omugabe okunda obwinganisa; niiwe waareetsire amazima, okuhikiirira n'eby'oburyo, nk'oku waabireeteire Yakobo." 
Psalms99:5 Ka tuhimbise Mukama Ruhanga waitu; tumuramize omu maisho g'endibatiro ye nitugira tuti: Ori orikwera! 
Psalms99:6 Musa na Arooni bakaba omu bahongyerezi be, na Samueli ari omu barikumuhoogyera; boona bakahoogyera Nyakubaho yaabagarukamu." 
Psalms99:7 Akagamba nabo naayema omu nyomyo y'ekicu, baayorobera amateeka n'ebiragiro bi yaabahaire." 
Psalms99:8 Ai Mukama Ruhanga waitu, okaba obagarukamu obainiire esaasi, kwonka obafubira noobatura ebibi byabo." 
Psalms99:9 Muhimbise Nyakubaho Ruhanga waitu, kandi mumuramize aha rushozi rwe orurikwera, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho Ruhanga waitu ogwo aba Orikwera!" 
Psalms100:1 Imwe ab'omu nsi yoona muteerere Nyakubaho akaari k'okushemererwa," 
Psalms100:2 mumuheereze mushemereirwe, mwije omu maisho ge nimweshongora!" 
Psalms100:3 Mumanye Nyakubaho ku ari Ruhanga! Niwe yaatuhangire, turi abe; turi abantu be kandi entaama z'omu iriisizo rye." 
Psalms100:4 Murabe omu marembo ge nimumusiima, mutaahe omu bikaari bye nimumusingiza! Mumusiime kandi mumuhimbise!" 
Psalms100:5 Buzimazima, Nyakubaho aba murungi, rukundo ye etahararuka tehwaho, n'obwesigwa bwe bugumaho ebiro byona." 
Psalms101:1 Niinyeshongora eby'embabazi n'eby'obwinganisa; ai Nyakubaho, niiwe ndibyeshongorera." 
Psalms101:2 Ndyagira emitwarize etarikugaywa. Mbwenu iwe, oryaija ryari ahi ndi? Ndyagira emitwarize mirungi omu nju yangye." 
Psalms101:3 Kandi tindizaanisa kibi. Nyangira kimwe ebikorwa abakwimuura, kandi timbyetaho." 
Psalms101:4 Nyetantara abagomi, n'ababi timbataho mutima." 
Psalms101:5 Ogambuura mutaahi we, mucwekyereza. N'oyetunguura akareebesa abantu esheshemi, timmugumisiririza." 
Psalms101:6 Abarikwesigwa omu nsi nibo ndisiima bakatuura naanye, kandi ogira emitwarize y'abahikiriire niwe ariba omugaragwa wangye." 
Psalms101:7 Endyarya terintaahira mu nju; n'omunyakishuba tindimucwa maisho. 
Psalms101:8 Buri izooba ndyacwekyereza enyabibi omuri eri ihanga; marireho kimwe enkozi z'ebibi omu rurembo rwa Nyakubaho. 
Psalms102:1 Ai Nyakubaho, hurira okushaba kwangye, n'okutaka kwangye kukuhikyeho!" 
Psalms102:2 Otaanyehuzya ndi omu kabi! Inama ontegye okutu, kandi ku ndaakutakire, orahukye kunjuna!" 
Psalms102:3 Ahabw'okuba ebiro by'amagara gangye nibihwaho nk'omwika, n'amagufa gangye nigabugumwamu omuriro nk'ekikoomi." 
Psalms102:4 Omutima gwangye gukarangataine nk'obunyaatsi, n'agarya tinkigaine." 
Psalms102:5 Ku ndikutsinda, amagufa gangye genda kwoga omu ruhu." 
Psalms102:6 Ndi nk'ekihuhurabahuta ky'omu ihamba, nari nk'ekihihizi ekituura omu matongo." 
Psalms102:7 Ndaara nintonzya nk'enyonyi etundamire aha mutwe gw'enju. 
Psalms102:8 Abazigu bangye basiiba nibanjuma; abaabaire bampimbya, mbwenu nibanteera ebinyaatsi." 
Psalms102:9 Eiju nikyo kyokurya kyangye, amarira gangye nigahimintikira omu ki ndikunywa," 
Psalms102:10 ahabw'okungirira ekiniga kingi; mbwenu ombakwire, wanjuguta." 
Psalms102:11 Ebiro by'amagara gangye nibihwerera nk'ebicu, nyomire nk'obunyaatsi." 
Psalms102:12 Kwonka, iwe Nyakubaho, otuuraho ebiro byona; kandi oryaguma noijukwa ab'obusingye bwona." 
Psalms102:13 Mbwenu imuka, ogirire Siyooni esaasi! Ahabw'okuba obunaku bw'okugigirira embabazi bwahika, amagingo nigo aga." 
Psalms102:14 Abaheereza baawe bagikunda, kwonka okucwekyerera kwayo nikubasaasa." 
Psalms102:15 Haza obwo abanyamahanga baryatiina Nyakubaho, n'abagabe boona ab'ensi bamuhe ekitiinwa." 
Psalms102:16 Nyakubaho ku aryombeka Siyooni busya, aryayoreka ekitiinwa kye;" 
Psalms102:17 agarukyemu okushaba kw'enshoberwa, ahurire n'okweshengyereza kwabo." 
Psalms102:18 Eki ka kihandiikirwe ab'obusingye oburiija, ngu abantu abarizaarwa basingize Nyakubaho," 
Psalms102:19 bati: Nyakubaho akanaga amaisho aha nsi, ari omu mwanya gwe ogurikwera; yaareeba ensi naayema omu iguru," 
Psalms102:20 ngu ahurire okutsinda kw'embohe, kandi akomoorore abacwereirwe orubanja rw'okufa," 
Psalms102:21 abantu babone kurangaana Nyakubaho omuri Siyooni, n'okumuhimbisiza omuri Yerusalemu." 
Psalms102:22 Obwo nibwo amahanga againe abagabe n'agatabaine, gariteerana hamwe kuramya Nyakubaho." 
Psalms102:23 Atuubize amaani gangye nkiri muto, yaacwa aha biro by'amagara gangye." 
Psalms102:24 Ai Ruhanga otantwara ntakakuzire ahabw'okuba ogumaho ebiro byona. 
Psalms102:25 Iranaira okahanga ensi, n'eiguru waarikoresa engaro zaawe." 
Psalms102:26 Ebyo byona biryahwaho, kwonka iwe oryagumaho. Biryakura nk'emyenda, obinagye bibuze amaisho;" 
Psalms102:27 kwonka iwe tohinduka, n'emyaka yaawe tehwaho." 
Psalms102:28 Abaana baitu oryabarinda batuure buhooro; ab'oruzaaro rwabo bagaramisirize omu maisho gaawe. 
Psalms103:1 Iwe magara gangye, himbisa Nyakubaho! Byona ebiri omuriinye bihimbise eiziina rye eririkwera!" 
Psalms103:2 Iwe magara gangye, himbisa Nyakubaho, kandi oteebwa ebirungi byona ebi yaakukoreire." 
Psalms103:3 Niwe akusaasira ebicumuro byawe byona, akakukiza n'endwara zaawe," 
Psalms103:4 akacungura amagara gaawe naagaiha okuzimu, akakujweka rukundo ye etahararuka n'embabazi, nk'ekirunga," 
Psalms103:5 akakuhaazya ebirungi ngu ogume ori muto, kandi oine amaani nk'empungu." 
Psalms103:6 Nyakubaho aramura abarikubonabonesibwa omu bwinganisa kandi abakorera ebihikire. 
Psalms103:7 Akamanyisa Musa enaama ye, n'Abaisiraeli yaabooreka ebi yaakozire." 
Psalms103:8 Nyakubaho aba omunyambabazi kandi ow'esaasi, tarahuka kuguubwa kubi, aijwire rukundo etahararuka." 
Psalms103:9 Tariguma naahana obutoosha, nobu kwakuba okuguma aine ekiniga." 
Psalms103:10 Tatutwaza nk'ebibi byaitu oku biri, nari okutuzimuurira nk'oku ebicumuro byaitu biri." 
Psalms103:11 Nk'oku eiguru riri hare munonga n'ensi, na rukundo ye etahararuka ei agirira abamutiina nikwo eba mpango." 
Psalms103:12 Nk'oku burugwa-izooba eri hare na burengyerwa-izooba, n'ebibi byaitu nikwo abitwara hare atyo." 
Psalms103:13 Nk'oku ishe w'abaana asaasira abaana be, na Nyakubaho nikwo asaasira abamutiina;" 
Psalms103:14 ahabw'okuba naamanya obuhangwa bwaitu; naijuka ku turi omucuucu. 
Psalms103:15 Omuntu, ebiro by'amagara ge biba bikye nk'eby'obunyaatsi; amara omwanya mukye nk'ekirabyo ky'omu ishwa;" 
Psalms103:16 ahabw'okuba omuyaga ku gukihuuha, kihwaho, kiba kitakireebwa bundi." 
Psalms103:17 Kwonka okwiha ira ryona, rukundo ya Nyakubaho etahararuka eguma aha bamutiina, kandi teribarugaho ebiro byona; n'okuhikiirira kwe kuryahika aha baijukuru baabo" 
Psalms103:18 abaririnda endagaano ye, bakaijuka ebiragiro bye, bakabyorobera." 
Psalms103:19 Nyakubaho akata ekitebe kye omu iguru, kandi byona niwe abitegyeka." 
Psalms103:20 Imwe baamaraika ba Nyakubaho 'mwe, amamanzi g'amaani, abahurira ekigambo kye mukakora ebi aragiira, mumuhimbise!" 
Psalms103:21 Imwe mahe ga Nyakubaho 'mwe mwena, abaheereza be abakora ebi akunda, mumuhimbise!" 
Psalms103:22 Imwe bihangwa bya Nyakubaho 'mwe mwena, eby'omu myanya yoona ei ategyeka, mumuhimbise! Iwe magara gangye, himbisa Nyakubaho!" 
Psalms104:1 Iwe magara gangye himbisa Nyakubaho! Ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, ebishi oba mukuru! ojwaire obukuru n'ekitiinwa;" 
Psalms104:2 oyehumbikire ekijwaro ekirikumurinkana! Obamba eiguru nk'eihema," 
Psalms104:3 oyombeka ekikaari kyawe aha maizi g'ahaiguru. Ebicu biba ekigaari kyawe, noogyendera aha mapapa g'omuyaga." 
Psalms104:4 Emiyaga ogigira entumwa zaawe, n'endimi z'omuriro ziba abaheereza baawe." 
Psalms104:5 Okahamya ensi aha misingi yaayo, ngu erekye kutengyeetsibwa obusingye bwona." 
Psalms104:6 Waagijweka enyanja nk'ekijwaro, amaizi gaashweka enshozi." 
Psalms104:7 Ku waagakabukiire, gaahunga; ku waahinzire," 
Psalms104:8 gaatemba enshozi, gaashuuma omu mpanga, gaahika omu mwanya ogu waagaragiire kwerundaaniramu." 
Psalms104:9 Waagacungira ngu gatarirenga, gakagaruka kushweka ensi." 
Psalms104:10 Ku oragiira, enshuro zifumuka omu mpanga, zihimintika ahagati y'eshozi;" 
Psalms104:11 enyamaishwa zoona zinywa, enturegye nazo zihwa eiriho." 
Psalms104:12 Aha mbaju zaazo enyonyi z'omu mwanya niho zaarika, zikatyotyoreza omu mataagi g'emiti." 
Psalms104:13 Oshukyeera enshozi amaizi agaruga omu kikaari kyawe ky'ahaiguru, ensi eijura omweru." 
Psalms104:14 Omereza amatungo obunyaatsi, n'abantu obaha ebihingwa byona ebi baihamu ebyokurya;" 
Psalms104:15 viino y'okubagwisa gye, amajuta g'okubamwamwatikanisa ahamaisho, n'ebyokurya by'okubaha amaani." 
Psalms104:16 Emiti ya Nyakubaho ehaaga amaizi, niyo misisa y'ahari Lebanooni ei yaabyaire." 
Psalms104:17 Enyonyi nimwo zaarika; aha mutwe gwayo oruyongoyongo niho ruraara. 
Psalms104:18 Enshozi ndaingwa ziba obutaaho bw'enzaza, n'enkiri ziba obuhungiro bw'ebikubagani." 
Psalms104:19 Okataho okwezi okumanyisa obunaku, n'eizooba rimanya ei rirengyera." 
Psalms104:20 Ku oreeta omwirima, bwira; enyamaishwa z'omu bibira zoona zishohora." 
Psalms104:21 Entare zitsinda zihiigire eki ziraarye, eki Ruhanga araazihe." 
Psalms104:22 Eizooba ku rituruka, zigaruka omu maaya gaazo, zibyama." 
Psalms104:23 Omuntu we, ashohora, aza aha mirimo ye; aguma naakora okuhitsya omu rwitawaabo." 
Psalms104:24 Ai Nyakubaho, ebishi ebi waahangire n'eby'emiringo mingi! Byona okabitebeekanisa n'obwengye! Ensi eijwire ebi waahangire:" 
Psalms104:25 omuribyo, n'egyo nyanja ndaingwa kandi mpango, erimu ebihangirwe ebitarikubarwa, ebiine amagara, ebikye n'ebihango." 
Psalms104:26 Nimwo emeeri zigyendagyendera, n'orukooko oru waahangire ngu rugikuzaaniremu, nikyo kikooko rutaaba eki waahangire." 
Psalms104:27 Ebihangirwe byona bikuhanga amaisho, ngu obigaburire omu bunaku buhikire." 
Psalms104:28 Ebi obiha, nibyo birya; ku oshashaanura engaro zaawe, biiguta." 
Psalms104:29 Ku obyehuzya, bishoberwa; ku obiihamu omwitsyo, bifa, bigaruka omu mucuucu omu byarugire." 
Psalms104:30 Ku obitamu omwitsyo, bigira amagara; ensi oguma noogimeza busya." 
Psalms104:31 Nyakubaho oheebwe ekitiinwa ebiro byona! 
Psalms104:32 Nyakubaho oreeba ensi, ekatetema, okora aha nshozi, zikacumbuuka omwika, ashemerererwe ebi yaahangire!" 
Psalms104:33 Ndyayeshongorera Nyakubaho nkihuriire, ngume ninsingiza Ruhanga wangye okuhitsya obu ndifa." 
Psalms104:34 K'ebiteekateeko byangye bimugwise gye, ahabw'okuba nshemerererwa omuri Nyakubaho!" 
Psalms104:35 Abasiisi ka bahwe omu nsi, n'ababi babe batakirangwamu! Iwe magara gangye, himbisa Nyakubaho! Haleluya!" 
Psalms105:1 Musiime Nyakubaho, mumurangaane; mumanyise amahanga ebi yaakozire." 
Psalms105:2 Mumweshongorere, mumuteerere enanga; murangaane eby'okutaangaaza bye byona." 
Psalms105:3 Mwesiime ahabw'eiziina rye eririkwera; abasherura Nyakubaho bananukye. 
Psalms105:4 Musherure Nyakubaho n'amaani ge; mumushererure mutarikwosha. 
Psalms105:5 Mwijukye eby'okutangaaza ebi yaakozire, eby'amahano bye n'emicwere ye y'emanja." 
Psalms105:6 Haa, imwe ab'oruzaaro rw'omuheereza we Aburahamu, abaana ba Yakobo ou yaatooraine." 
Psalms105:7 Niwe Mukama Ruhanga waitu; ou obushoboorozi bwe bubuga ensi yoona. 
Psalms105:8 Mwijukye endagaano ye ebiro byona, ekigambo kye eki yaaragiire kumara enzaaro rukumi," 
Psalms105:9 niyo ndagaano ei yaaragaine na Aburahamu, N'eki yaaraganiise Isaaka naamuhamiza." 
Psalms105:10 Nyakubaho akaragaana na Yakobo endagaano etarihwaho; yaaragaana na Isiraeli endagaano y'obutwire bwona," 
Psalms105:11 obu yaagira ati: Niimwe ndiha ensi ya Kanaani kuba eyaanyu ahabwanyu. 
Psalms105:12 Haza obwo bakaba batakakanyire, bari bakye abataine ku bari, bari abaijaija omuri egyo nsi." 
Psalms105:13 Bakazengyerera omu mahanga nibaruga omu bugabe, nibaza omu bundi;" 
Psalms105:14 kwonka taraikiriize muntu n'omwe kubareebesa enaku; yaafubira abagabe ahabwabo, naagira ati:" 
Psalms105:15 Mutakora aha bu naatooraine, n'abarangi bangye mutabakora kubi!" 
Psalms105:16 Bwanyima egyo nsi Mukama akagiteeza enjara, yaabamaraho ebyokurya ebi baabaire nibeesiga." 
Psalms105:17 Akatuma Yosefu kubabandizayo, owaabaire aguzirwe kuba omuhuuku." 
Psalms105:18 Ebigyere bye baabikomesa enjegyere zirikusaasa; baamukomesa emihama omu maraka," 
Psalms105:19 okuhitsya obu ebi Yosefu yaarootoroire byabairekwo; n'ekigambo kya Nyakubaho kikamuhamya ku ataine rubanja. 
Psalms105:20 Omugabe wa Misiri yaaragiira ku bamubohoorora; ogwo mutegyeki w'amahanga yaamurekura. 
Psalms105:21 Yaamuhindura omukuru w'eka ye kandi omutegyeki w'ebintu bye byona," 
Psalms105:22 ngu abone kuhabura abategyeki be nk'oku arikwenda, n'okuha obwengye abahabuzi be." 
Psalms105:23 Bwanyima Yakobo akashuuhuukira Misiri, yaafurukira omu nsi ya Haamu," 
Psalms105:24 Nyakubaho yaakanyisa munonga abantu be, yaabaha amaani okukira abahatsi baabo." 
Psalms105:25 Ekyo kyareetera Abanyamisiri kubanga n'okucwera abaheereza be amengye kubakora kubi. 
Psalms105:26 Yaayohereza Musa omuheereza we, na Arooni ou yaayetooraniire." 
Psalms105:27 Baakora obumanyiso bwe omuribo, n'eby'okutangaaza omu nsi ya Haamu." 
Psalms105:28 Yaaragiira omwirima gwashweka ensi, kwonka baagumizamu bagomeire ekiragiro kye." 
Psalms105:29 Yaahindura amaizi gaabo goona eshagama, yaita atyo ebyenyanja byabo byona." 
Psalms105:30 Ensi yaabo yaijura ebikyere byaza n'omu bishengye by'omugabe. 
Psalms105:31 Yaaragiira emizinga y'eshohera n'ey'emibu, byateera ensi yaabo yoona." 
Psalms105:32 Omu mwanya gw'enjura, yaabagwisiza orubaare; emirabyo yaatyankana omu nsi." 
Psalms105:33 Emizaabibu n'emitiini yaabo yaagiteeza eihunga; yaahendagura emiti y'omu nsi yaabo yoona. 
Psalms105:34 Yaaragiira, enzigye zaateera ensi, ebitootera bingi bitarikubarwa" 
Psalms105:35 byagungunuza buri kanyaatsi koona, na buri kababi koona ak'omu misiri yaabo." 
Psalms105:36 Bwanyima yaita aboojo baabo b'emijigaijo, ab'omu maka ga Misiri yoona." 
Psalms105:37 Reero yaazaahuura Abaisiraeli, basangire efeeza n'ezaabu; haza tihaabaho muntu n'omwe omuribo ou byagwisize ahansi." 
Psalms105:38 Abanyamisiri bakashemererwa okureeba baabarugamu, ahabw'okuba bakaba babaitsize obwoba." 
Psalms105:39 Yaashashaanura ekicu ky'okubasangira, yaataho n'omuriro gw'okubamurikira nyekiro." 
Psalms105:40 Ku baashabire ebyokurya, yaabaha endahi; yaabahaazya omugaati ogurikuruga omu iguru." 
Psalms105:41 Yaashatura orukiri, amaizi gaayohoka, gaahimintikira omu ihamba, gaaba emigyera." 
Psalms105:42 Akaijuka ekigambo kye ekirikwera eki yaaraganiise omwiru we Aburahamu, akeebembera abantu be entoore," 
Psalms105:43 nibateera akaari bashemereirwe. 
Psalms105:44 Yaabaha ensi z'abanyamahanga; ezi abandi baahendekyeire, zaaba ezaabo," 
Psalms105:45 kwonka ngu bakuratire ebiragiro bye, kandi bagume barinde ebi yaataireho. Haleluya!" 
Psalms106:1 Haleluya! Musiime Nyakubaho ahabw'okuba ni murungi; kandi rukundo ye etahararuka eba ey'ebiro byona. 
Psalms106:2 N'oha owaakubaasa kubaruura eby'amaani byona ebi Nyakubaho yaakozire? Kandi n'oha owaakubaasa kumusingiza ekirikumara? 
Psalms106:3 Baine omugisha abakuratira eby'oburyo, bakakora ebihikire obutoosha!" 
Psalms106:4 Ai Nyakubaho, onyijukye ahabwa rukundo ei ogirira abantu baawe, ombarire omu bu oraajune." 
Psalms106:5 Mbone kureeba okugogyeera kw'abu waatooraine, nshemererwe ahabw'okwesiima kw'eihanga ryawe; n'ahabw'abantu baawe ahabwawe." 
Psalms106:6 Itwe tukashiisha munonga nka baatatenkuriitwe; twakora kubi, twine orubanja." 
Psalms106:7 Baatatenkuriitwe obu baabaire bari Misiri, tibareetegyereize by'okutangaaza ebi waakozire. Tibaraijukire rukundo mpango ya Rukiraboona etahararuka; ekyarugiremu, baamugomerera aha Nyanja erikutukura." 
Psalms106:8 Kwonka ahabw'eiziina rye, yaabajuna, ngu aboorekye obushoboorozi bwe." 
Psalms106:9 Yaakabukira egyo Nyanja erikutukura, yaayoma; yaabarabyamu nk'oku baraba ahoomire." 
Psalms106:10 Yaabasikura abaabaire nibabanga; yaabaiha omu mikono y'abazigu. 
Psalms106:11 Amaizi gaamira abaabaire nibabahata; tihaatsigaraho n'omwe. 
Psalms106:12 Bo ahabw'okwikiriza ebi yaabaraganiise, ahoonaho baayeshongora eby'okumusingiza." 
Psalms106:13 Kwonka bakarahuka kwebwa ebi yaakozire, tibaategyeereza kubanza kumwehabuzaho." 
Psalms106:14 Ku baahikire omu ihamba, baitwa omugombo, baagyeza Ruhanga." 
Psalms106:15 Yaabaha eki baamushabire, kwonka yaabarwaza omunywengyerero." 
Psalms106:16 Ab'omu nsiisira ku baagiriire Musa eihari na Arooni orikwera wa Nyakubaho," 
Psalms106:17 ensi yaayashama, yaamira Datani, kandi yaashweka abaayebumbire na Abiraamu;" 
Psalms106:18 omuriro gurikubuguma gwagwa aha beebumbire nabo, gwacwekyereza abo bantu babi." 
Psalms106:19 Baakora ekishushani ky'ekimasha bari Horebu, baakiramya." 
Psalms106:20 Omu mwanya gw'okuha Ruhanga ekitiinwa, baakiha ekishushani ky'enumi." 
Psalms106:21 Baayebwa Ruhanga owaabajunire naabakorera ebikuru omuri Misiri," 
Psalms106:22 eby'okutangaaza omu nsi ya Haamu, n'ebirikutiinisa aha Nyanja erikutukura." 
Psalms106:23 N'ahabw'ekyo Ruhanga akagira ngu naija kubacwekyereza, kandi akaakikozire, kuri Musa ou yaatooraine ataramwemereire omumaisho, kuhorahoza ekiniga kye." 
Psalms106:24 Batyo baagaya egyo nsi erikukundwa, tibaayesiga ki yaabaraganiise." 
Psalms106:25 Baayegumira omu mahema gaabo nibeetomboita, bangire kuhurira eki Nyakubaho arikubagambira." 
Psalms106:26 Nikyo yaarahiriire aimukize omukono, ku aribareka bakagwa omu ihamba," 
Psalms106:27 n'ab'oruzaaro rwabo akabataataanisiza omu mahanga. 
Psalms106:28 Bwanyima bakaihamu okwehongyera Baali y'omuri Peori, baarya ebitambiirwe emandwa." 
Psalms106:29 Batyo ahabw'emitwarize yaabo baakwatsa Nyakubaho ekiniga, orufu rwabajuumikira." 
Psalms106:30 Finehaasi nikwo kwimuka akabatonganira, orufu rukahongoza." 
Psalms106:31 Okwiha obwo, ekyo kyamureetera kubarwa kuba ohikiriire, nk'oku enzaaro zaagumire nizikuratana ebiro byona." 
Psalms106:32 Baagwisa kubi Nyakubaho aha maizi ga Meriba, ekyo kyareetera Musa ebintu kumugyendera kubi;" 
Psalms106:33 ahabw'okuba ku baamubiihiize munonga, yaagamba ebi atakugambire." 
Psalms106:34 Tibarahwerekyereize banyamahanga nk'oku Nyakubaho yaabaragiire; 
Psalms106:35 kureka ahabw'okushwererana nabo, baatooreza emicwe yaabo." 
Psalms106:36 Ku baaheereize ebishushani byabo, baayeshanga baagwire omu mutego" 
Psalms106:37 ogwabareeteire kutambira emizimu abaana baabo aboojo n'abaishiki. 
Psalms106:38 Baasheesha eshagama y'abataine rubanja, eya batabani baabo na bahara baabo abu baahongyeire emandwa za Kanaani; ensi yaahagazibwa eshagama." 
Psalms106:39 Nikwo baayesiisire batyo ahabw'ebi baakozire, bakaba endeebya ahari Ruhanga nka maraaya." 
Psalms106:40 Nyakubaho nikwo kubagirira ekiniga akabatamirwa kimwe," 
Psalms106:41 Akabarekurira abanyamahanga abaabaire nibabanga, bakaba bakama baabo." 
Psalms106:42 Ababisha baabo baabaita kubi, baabagomoora, baabategyeka." 
Psalms106:43 Kaingi akaba abajuna, bo bamugomera nkana; batyo bongyera kweroha omu bibi." 
Psalms106:44 Kwonka we ku yaabaire ahurira okutaka kwabo abagirira esaasi. 
Psalms106:45 Ahabwabo akaijuka endagaano ye, n'ahabwa rukundo ye mpango etahararuka ekiniga kye kyaikaikana;" 
Psalms106:46 yaareetera abaabaire babanyagire kutuubya omwaga gu baabaire nibabaitsa. 
Psalms106:47 Ai Mukama Ruhanga waitu, otujune, otutaaruure, otwihe omu banyamahanga, tubone kusiima eiziina ryawe eririkwera, tushemererwe nitukusingiza." 
Psalms106:48 Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ahimbisibwe, okwiha ryari n'okuhitsya ryari! Haza abantu boona bagire bati: Amiina! Haleluya!" 
Psalms107:1 Musiime Nyakubaho ahabw'okuba ni murungi, kandi rukundo ye etahararuka eba ey'ebiro byona." 
Psalms107:2 Mukwatanise naanye tusingize Nyakubaho, imwe mwena abu yaacungwire; akabaiha omu mikono y'abazigu," 
Psalms107:3 Akabataaruura omu mahanga, okuruga burugwa-izooba n'oburengyerwa-izooba, n'okuruga omu bukiizi-bwa-buryo n'obwa-bumosho." 
Psalms107:4 Abamwe bakahabira omu bishaka n'omu ihamba, batarikumanya oku baraahikye omu rurembo rw'okutuuramu." 
Psalms107:5 Bakagira enjara n'eiriho, baagwa enshazi." 
Psalms107:6 Obwo nibwo baatakira Nyakubaho nibabonabona akabaiha omu busaasi," 
Psalms107:7 akabahabura omuhanda ogugororokire, ngu babone kuhika omu rurembo rw'okutuuramu." 
Psalms107:8 Kuri abantu basiima Nyakubaho ahabwa rukundo ye etahararuka, n'ahabw'eby'okutangaaza ebi abakorera!" 
Psalms107:9 Ahabw'okuba ahaazya abaine enjara, n'abakuuhwire abaigutsa ebirungi bingi." 
Psalms107:10 Abamwe bakaba bari omu mwirima barimbagiriirwe, babohirwe enjegyere baine enaku," 
Psalms107:11 nibaturwa okugomera ebiragiro bya Ruhanga, n'okugaya ebi Rukiraboona yaabahabwire." 
Psalms107:12 Ahabw'emirimo erikurusya bakagwa enshazi; baagwa aha nsi bataine kihwera. 
Psalms107:13 Obwo nibwo baatakira Nyakubaho baine enaku, nawe akabakiza obusaasi." 
Psalms107:14 Akabaiha omu mwirima barimbagiriirwe. Akacwanyagura enjegyere zaabo. 
Psalms107:15 Kuri abantu basiima Nyakubaho ahabwa rukundo ye etahararuka, n'ahabw'eby'okutangaaza ebi abakorera!" 
Psalms107:16 Manya ahenda enyingi z'emiringa, ziiguka; asheenyagura empimbi z'ebyoma." 
Psalms107:17 Abamwe bakahononorwa ebibi byabo, baaburwa obusingye ahabw'okwomeserezibwa ebicumuro;" 
Psalms107:18 baatamwa ebyokurya byona, baagarukira aha munwa gw'ekiina kya rufu." 
Psalms107:19 Obwo nibwo baatakira Nyakubaho baine enaku, akabaiha omu busaasi." 
Psalms107:20 Akoohereza ekigambo kye, kikabakiza; akabatambira okuhwerekyerera." 
Psalms107:21 Kuri abantu basiima Nyakubaho ahabwa rukundo ye etahararuka, n'ahabw'eby'okutangaaza ebi abakorera!" 
Psalms107:22 Ka bahongye ebitambo by'okusiima, barangye ebi yaakozire nibateera akaari k'okushemererwa." 
Psalms107:23 Abandi bakaza aha nyanja omu meeri, baakorera emirimo yaabo omu mayanja;" 
Psalms107:24 nabo baareeba eby'okutangaaza ebi Nyakubaho akorera ahagati omu nyanja. 
Psalms107:25 Akaragiira, eihunga ryaimutsya ebingonzi." 
Psalms107:26 Byaibika emeeri kandi byagiibuura; baahahaara omutima," 
Psalms107:27 baagyenda nibataruza, nibagwererana nk'abasinzi, batakiine bwengye." 
Psalms107:28 Obwo nibwo baatakira Nyakubaho baine enaku, akabaiha omu busaasi." 
Psalms107:29 Ku yaaherize kucureeza eihunga, ebingonzi byatuuza." 
Psalms107:30 Baashemererwa ahabw'obucureera; yaabahitsya gye aha nyambukiro ei baabaire nibaza. 
Psalms107:31 Kuri abantu basiima Nyakubaho ahabwa rukundo ye etahararuka, n'ahabw'eby'okutangaaza ebi abakorera!" 
Psalms107:32 Ka bamuhimbise omu ruteerane, bamusingirize omu iteeraniro ry'abakuru b'enganda." 
Psalms107:33 Nyakubaho emigyera agyomeza kimwe, n'enshuro z'amaizi aziigara." 
Psalms107:34 Kandi ensi erikweza agihindura orwonyo ahabw'obubi bw'abagitwiremu. 
Psalms107:35 Obundi ensi empaama akagiijuza ebiyanja, ensi eyomire yaagifukuramu enshuro z'amaizi." 
Psalms107:36 Omwo nimwo yaataire abaine enjara kweyombekyeramu orurembo rw'okutuuramu. 
Psalms107:37 Okwo niyo baabibiire embibo, bakabyara emizaabibu, reero bakagira omweru mwingi." 
Psalms107:38 Abantu be abaha omugisha, bakanya munonga; arinda amagana gaabo gareka kutuuba." 
Psalms107:39 Bwabiso ku baatuubire, baahwa amaani ahabw'okuhatwa n'okubonabonesibwa." 
Psalms107:40 Yaareetera abategyeki kugaywa; yaabazengyereza omu ihamba ritarimu kirari. 
Psalms107:41 Kwonka mbwenu, abakyene abatambiire enaku, yaabazaarurukanisa, baakanya nk'obusyo bw'entaama." 
Psalms107:42 Abahikiriire bakireeba, bashemererwa; kwonka abanyabibi boona baigara akanwa." 
Psalms107:43 Oine obwengye weena ebyo abiteho omutima, kandi buri muntu amanye ku Nyakubaho agira rukundo etahararuka." 
Psalms108:1 Ai Ruhanga mpamire; niinyenda kukweshongorera kandi nkusingize. 
Psalms108:2 Sisiimuka, iwe magara gangye! Musisiimukye, imwe ekidongo n'eigobore, mbone kujugutisa omushekye!" 
Psalms108:3 Ai Nyakubaho, niinyenda kukusiimira omu bantu, n'okweshongorera omu mahanga eby'okukuhimbisa." 
Psalms108:4 Manya rukundo yaawe etahararuka eri hare okukira eiguru, n'amazima gaawe nigahika omu bicu." 
Psalms108:5 Ai Ruhanga, otunguukye okukira eiguru, haza ekitiinwa kyawe kishangire ensi yoona." 
Psalms108:6 Otujunise amaani gaawe; oikirize okushaba kwaitu, itwe abantu baawe abu okunda, tubone kwihwa omu kabi." 
Psalms108:7 Ruhanga akeema omu mwanya gwe ogurikwera, yaagira ati: Nyowe omusinguzi, ndyabaganisa Shekemu, ngabe ebicweka by'oruhanga rwa Sukooti." 
Psalms108:8 Gileadi n'eyangye, Manaase nayo n'eyangye; Efuraimu n'enkofiira y'okundinda; Yuda n'enkoni yangye ey'obugabe." 
Psalms108:9 Moabu n'ekinaabiro kyangye; Edomu niho naanagire akati kangye; Filisitiya niho nteerera akaari k'okusingura! 
Psalms108:10 N'oha orantaasye omu rurembo rugumire? Kandi orampitsye Edomu n'oha? 
Psalms108:11 Ai Ruhanga, toratunagiriire? Manya tokihurura na mahe gaitu." 
Psalms108:12 Otuhe emikono omuri obu bunaku bw'akabi, ahabw'okuba obuhwezi bw'abantu tibwine mugasho." 
Psalms108:13 Ruhanga ku ariba atwine, turyarwana mashaija, ahabw'okuba niwe arisiitagura abazigu baitu." 
Psalms109:1 Ai Ruhanga ou nsingiza, oteetsiza," 
Psalms109:2 ahabw'okuba ababi n'abanyabishuba nimbambeiherera," 
Psalms109:3 nibangambuura baanyiniire eitima, bandwanisiza busha." 
Psalms109:4 Nyowe nobu ndikubakunda, bo bandwanisa, kwonka ekyangye n'okubashabira." 
Psalms109:5 Nibanzimuurira ebibi ahabw'ebirungi, na rwango ahabw'okubakunda." 
Psalms109:6 Mushunikire omuramuzi mubi, omureetere ow'okumutabaariza." 
Psalms109:7 Ku araacwerwe orubanja rumusingye; okweshengyereza kwe kuhindukye ekicumuro. 
Psalms109:8 Ebiro by'amagara ge bicuubweho; omurimo gwe gutwarwe ondi. 
Psalms109:9 Abaana be babe efuuzi, n'omukazi we abe omufaakazi." 
Psalms109:10 Abaana be bazengyerere, babure obutaaho; babe abasheegi, babingwe n'omu mishaka yaabo." 
Psalms109:11 Omwihuza anyagye ebi atungire, n'enduga-mahanga zaaye ebi yaahendekyeire." 
Psalms109:12 Hatarigira owaamugirira embabazi; haza habure owaayorora efuuzi ze. 
Psalms109:13 Oruzaaro rwe rucwekyerere; eiziina ryarwo ryebe omu busingye oburiija. 
Psalms109:14 Ebicumuro bya baishenkuru Nyakubaho abimugumyeho, n'ekibi kya nyina kitaryeba." 
Psalms109:15 Nyakubaho agume naabiijuka; beebere kimwe omu nsi. 
Psalms109:16 Ogwo mwinazi takagiraga mbabazi, kureka ahiiga abakyene n'enshoberwa, kwenda kwita ab'emitima acwekire." 
Psalms109:17 Akakunda kukyeena; k'emikyeeno emugarukire; Tarendeize bandi migisha, nawe k'abure owaagimwendeza." 
Psalms109:18 Akaba ajwara omukyeeno nk'omunagiro; ka gumushensheremu nk'amaizi, nainga gumuyagire omu magufa nk'amajuta." 
Psalms109:19 Emikyeeno k'emuhumbikye nk'ekijwaro; k'egume emuzirikire nk'orukoba! 
Psalms109:20 Nyakubaho k'ahoore atyo abandega na boona abangambuura; 
Psalms109:21 Haza, iwe Mukama Ruhanga, ondwanirire ahabw'eiziina ryawe, onkize, ahabw'okuba rukundo yaawe etahararuka eba nungi." 
Psalms109:22 Manya mbaire omworo kandi omukyene; omutima gwangye guhutaire. 
Psalms109:23 Ningyenda nimpwerera nk'ekirengabazaana, nibaanyehungyeetsa nk'enzigye." 
Psalms109:24 Amaju ganjogonyokire ahabw'okubura ekyokurya, mpururukire ahabw'omubiri gwangye kutabamu bishaju." 
Psalms109:25 Mpindukire ekigaaniizo, abarikundeeba bampa mutinzi." 
Psalms109:26 Ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, mpwera; onjune ahabw'okuba onkunda," 
Psalms109:27 haza bamanye ku niiwe obikozire, ai Nyakubaho." 
Psalms109:28 Bo ka bankyeene, kwonka iwe ompe emigisha; hemura abarikundwanisa, haza onanure omuheereza waawe!" 
Psalms109:29 Abandega obajwekye ekihemu, obahumbikye enshoni nk'omunagiro." 
Psalms109:30 Ndyasiima Nyakubaho n'eiraka rihango; mmusingize omu ruteerane rw'abantu," 
Psalms109:31 ahabw'okuba atonganira oshobeirwe, kumukiza ab'okumucwera orw'okufa." 
Psalms110:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Mukama wangye ati: Shutama aha rubaju rwangye rwa buryo, okuhitsya obu ndihindura abazigu baawe endibatiro y'ebigyere byawe." 
Psalms110:2 Nyakubaho aryakwongyera obushoboorozi omuri Siyooni, Otegyekye abazigu baawe." 
Psalms110:3 Aha izooba eri orirwaniraho n'abazigu baawe, abantu baawe baryayehayo beekundiire, n'abatsigazi baawe baije ahu ori nk'ekime." 
Psalms110:4 Nyakubaho akarahira endahiro ei atariita, ati: Ori omuhongyerezi ow'omuringo gwa Melikizedeki, kandi nikwo origuma ebiro byona." 
Psalms110:5 Nyakubaho ari aha rubaju rwawe rwa buryo; Ku agira ekiniga, acwekyereza abagabe." 
Psalms110:6 Acwera ab'amahanga emanja naabataagura emitwe; ensi yoona agiijuza emitumbi. 
Psalms110:7 Ku aba naagyenda, anywa amaizi g'omugyera, agarukwamu amaani agyenda agunduukire." 
Psalms111:1 Haleluya! Nsiima Nyakubaho n'omutima gwangye gwona, ahu ekimbuuro ky'abahikiriire kiteeranira." 
Psalms111:2 Ebi Nyakubaho akora biba bikuru, ababishemerererwa nibo babyetegyereza."
