Psalms111:3 Kyona eki akora kiijwire ekitiinwa n'obukuru, n'okuhikiirira kwe tikuhinduka." 
Psalms111:4 Nyakubaho aba omunyambabazi kandi ow'esaasi; atureetera kwijuka eby'okutangaaza bye. 
Psalms111:5 Abamutiina abatungira ebyokurya; tayebwa ndagaano ye na kakye. 
Psalms111:6 Abantu be bakubuura ensi z'abanyamahanga abooreka ku ari ow'amaani. 
Psalms111:7 Kyona eki akora akikoresa obwesigwa n'amazima; ebiragiro bye byona byesigwa. 
Psalms111:8 Bikaragiirwa kugumaho ebiro byona; byateebwaho kuba eby'amazima kandi ebihikire. 
Psalms111:9 Arahuka kurokora abantu be, naabateeraho endagaano ye etahararuka. N'ahabw'ekyo, n'orikwera kandi orikutiinwa." 
Psalms111:10 Okutiina Nyakubaho kuba entandikiro y'obwengye; abagumizamu nibamutiina bagira okwetegyereza. Okumusingiza kugumaho ebiro byona. 
Psalms112:1 Haleluya! Omuntu otiina Nyakubaho, akunda kukuratira ebiragiro bye, aine omugisha!" 
Psalms112:2 Abaana be baryagira obushoboorozi omu nsi; n'abaijukuru baryaheebwa omugisha. 
Psalms112:3 Eka ye eryatunga, eganagane, kandi embabazi ze tizirigira bu zihindukire." 
Psalms112:4 Ow'amazima ku aba ari omu mwirima, ajwerwa omushana, aba omunyambabazi, ow'esaasi kandi ohikiriire." 
Psalms112:5 Omuntu oba efura akaguza abandi kandi akakora emirimo n'obwesigwa, aine omugisha." 
Psalms112:6 Ahabw'egyo micwe ye mirungi, nobu arifa, taryeba." 
Psalms112:7 Ahabw'okwesigira kimwe Nyakubaho, tatiinisibwa nkuru mbi." 
Psalms112:8 Ahabw'okuba ahamire ataine bwoba, aryareeba abazigu be nibasingurwa." 
Psalms112:9 Agabira abooro n'obufura, embabazi ze tizihinduka; abari nkawe baryaguma basiimwe obutoosha." 
Psalms112:10 Kwonka ebyo, ababi ku babireeba, baguubwa kubi; banena amaino, bahwa aha magufa; ebi enyabibi eyetenga biba busha." 
Psalms113:1 Haleluya! Imwe baheereza ba Nyakubaho 'mwe, muhimbise eiziina rye!" 
Psalms113:2 Nyakubaho ahimbisibwe okwiha hati okuhitsya ebiro byona 
Psalms113:3 Nyakubaho ahimbisibwe, okwiha oburugwa-izooba okuhitsya oburengyerwa-izooba!" 
Psalms113:4 Nyakubaho ategyeka amahanga goona, ekitiinwa kye nikikirira kimwe eiguru!" 
Psalms113:5 N'oha owaakwerenga Mukama Ruhanga waitu, ou ekitebe kye ky'obugabe kituura ahaiguru;" 
Psalms113:6 akiza kureeba eiguru n'ensi, akainama!" 
Psalms113:7 Atunguura abooro naabaiha omu mucuucu, n'abakyene abaiha omu rubungo," 
Psalms113:8 ngu abone kubainganisa n'abategyeki b'eihanga rye. 
Psalms113:9 Agumya omukazi engumba omuka ye, bwanyima amuha abaana, haza ashemererwa. Haleluya!" 
Psalms114:1 Abaisiraeli ku baarugire Misiri, baijukuru ba Yakobo baazaahuuka baaruga omu b'orurimi rutari rwabo," 
Psalms114:2 Yuda yaahinduka omwanya gwa Mukama Ogurikwera, na Isiraeli yaaba obukama bwe." 
Psalms114:3 Enyanja ku yaakireebire yaahunga, Yorudaani yaayecungira." 
Psalms114:4 Enshozi zaatara nk'empaya z'entaama, n'emigongo yaateera kyamubambaigwa nk'ebyana by'entaama n'emigongo yaateera kyamubambaigwa nk'ebyana by'entaama." 
Psalms114:5 Iwe nyanja 'we, ekyakuhunzya ni ki? Iwe Yorudaani, n'enki ekyakwemereza?" 
Psalms114:6 Imwe nshozi 'mwe, ekyabagurutsya nk'empaya z'entaama ni ki?" 
Psalms114:7 Iwe nsi 'we, tetema, Mukama waawe yaija, Ruhanga wa Yakobo ngugu yaija," 
Psalms114:8 ohindura enkiri ebiyanja, n'ebibaare akabihindura enshuro." 
Psalms115:1 Ai Nyakubaho, tiitwe tushemereire kuheebwa ekitiinwa, tiitwe buzima, kureka iwe wenka, niiwe oshemereire kukiheebwa ahabwa rukundo yaawe etahararuka n'obwesigwa bwawe." 
Psalms115:2 Abanyamahanga nibatubuuza bati, Ruhanga waabo arahi?" 
Psalms115:3 Ruhanga waitu ari omu iguru, akora kyona eki arikwenda." 
Psalms115:4 Emandwa zaabo n'efeeza n'ezaabu ezikozirwe abantu. 
Psalms115:5 Zigira akanwa, kwonka tizigamba, zigira amaisho, kwonka tizireeba," 
Psalms115:6 zigira amatu, kwonka tizihurira, zigira enyindo, kwonka tizikaga," 
Psalms115:7 zigira emikono, kwonka tizikwata, zigira ebigyere, kwonka tizigyenda, kandi tizigambisa maraka gaazo." 
Psalms115:8 Abazikora baryaba nkazo, kandi weena ozeesiga aryaba nkazo." 
Psalms115:9 Imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, muhamire ahari Nyakubaho, niwe muhwezi waanyu kandi omurinzi waanyu!" 
Psalms115:10 Iwe nju ya Arooni 'we, hamira ahari Nyakubaho, niwe muhwezi waawe kandi omurinzi waawe!" 
Psalms115:11 Naimwe mwena abatiina Nyakubaho, mumuhamireho, niwe muhwezi waanyu kandi omurinzi waanyu!" 
Psalms115:12 Nyakubaho atwijuka, aryatuha omugisha; aryaguha Abaisiraeli, atuhe n'enju ya Arooni;" 
Psalms115:13 kandi aguhe abamutiina, abato n'abakuru, atarikushoroora." 
Psalms115:14 Nyakubaho abakanyise, imwe n'abaana baanyu." 
Psalms115:15 Nyakubaho owaahangire eiguru n'ensi, abahe omugisha!" 
Psalms115:16 Eiguru n'erya Nyakubaho, kandi ensi akagiha abantu." 
Psalms115:17 Abafiire tibabaasa kuhimbisa Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba bakashuuma okuzimu etagira kateezo." 
Psalms115:18 Kwonka itwe abakihuriire, nituhimbisa Nyakubaho hati n'ebiro byona. Haleluya!" 
Psalms116:1 Nkunda Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba ahurira okweshengyereza kwangye." 
Psalms116:2 Ndyaguma nimmutakira, ahabw'okuba antega okutu." 
Psalms116:3 Emitego ya rufu ekanzingazinga; obusaasi bw'okuzimu bwansangira, naagira enaku n'amaganya." 
Psalms116:4 Ahonaaho naatakira Nyakubaho nti: Ai Nyakubaho, njuna!" 
Psalms116:5 Nyakubaho aba ow'embabazi kandi ohikiriire. Buzimazima Ruhanga waitu aba ow'esaasi. 
Psalms116:6 Nyakubaho arinda abataine kihwera; ku naabaire ndi omu kabi yanjuna. 
Psalms116:7 Iwe magara gangye, huumura, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho angiriire embabazi." 
Psalms116:8 Akankiza okufa, yantambira amarira, n'ebigyere byangye tibyateera ntsibo." 
Psalms116:9 N'ahabw'ekyo, ndyaguma ngyendere omu maisho ge nkiri omu nsi y'abahuriire." 
Psalms116:10 Nkahamya okwikiriza kwangye, nobu ndaabe naagizire nti: Nimbonabonesibwa munonga." 
Psalms116:11 Omu kukangarana kwangye nkagira, nti: Tihariho muntu n'omwe oyesigwa." 
Psalms116:12 Mbwenu Nyakubaho ndyamuzimuurira ki ahabw'ebirungi byona ebi ankorera? 
Psalms116:13 Ndyatambira Nyakubaho ekitambo, musiime ahabw'okunjuna, kandi mmutakire." 
Psalms116:14 Ndyahikiiriza ebi naahigiire Nyakubaho omu maisho g'abantu be boona. 
Psalms116:15 Nyakubaho asaasibwa munonga okufa kw'abantu be abamutiina. 
Psalms116:16 Ai Nyakubaho, ndi omuheereza waawe; ninkuheereza nk'oku maawe yaakuheereize. Manya niiwe wankomoroireho enjegyere." 
Psalms116:17 Niinyija kukureetera ekitambo ky'okusiima, mpoogyere eiziina rya Nyakubaho." 
Psalms116:18 Ndyahikiiriza ebi naahigiire Nyakubaho omu maisho g'abantu be boona," 
Psalms116:19 omu bikaari bya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'ahagati yaawe, iwe Yerusalemu. Haleluya!" 
Psalms117:1 Imwe amahanga goona, musingize Nyakubaho! Naimwe abantu mwena, mumuhimbise!" 
Psalms117:2 Manya rukundo ye etahararuka ahariitwe eba mpango, n'obwesigwa bwe n'obw'obutwire bwona. Haleluya!" 
Psalms118:1 Musiime Nyakubaho ahabw'okuba ni murungi, rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona!" 
Psalms118:2 Abaisiraeli k'abakigambe bati: Rukundo ye etahararuka eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms118:3 Enju ya Arooni ekigambe eti: Rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms118:4 Abatiina Nyakubaho bakigambe bati: Rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms118:5 Ku naabaire nshobeirwe, naatakira Nyakubaho; yampurira yantambira." 
Psalms118:6 Nyakubaho ku aba anyine, tingira ki ntiina. Omuntu naabaasa kuunyitsa ki?" 
Psalms118:7 Nyakubaho omuhwezi ku aba anyine, nsingura abazigu bangye." 
Psalms118:8 Okuhungira ahari Nyakubaho nikukira okwesiga abantu. 
Psalms118:9 Okuhungira ahari Nyakubaho nikukira okwesiga abategyeki. 
Psalms118:10 Abanyamahanga bakantangatanga; ahabw'amaani ga Nyakubaho naabamaraho. 
Psalms118:11 Baaguma nibankubiirira; ahabw'amaani ga Nyakubaho naabamaraho. 
Psalms118:12 Bakampumbata nk'enjoki; baayaka nk'omuriro gw'omu mahwa; ahabw'amaani ga Nyakubaho naabamaraho! 
Psalms118:13 Bakaanyoha, bantsindika kungwisa, kwonka Nyakubaho yampa emikono." 
Psalms118:14 Nyakubaho niwe ampa amaani, kandi niwe mpimbisa, ahabw'okuba akanjuna." 
Psalms118:15 Hurira ebyeshongoro by'okunanuka eby'obusinguzi omu mahema g'abahikiriire. Omukono gwa buryo gwa Nyakubaho gukora eby'obumanzi. 
Psalms118:16 Omukono gwa buryo gwa Nyakubaho gusingura! Omukono gwa buryo gwa Nyakubaho gukora eby'obumanzi. 
Psalms118:17 Tindifa, kureka ndyagumaho nintebya ebi Nyakubaho yaakozire." 
Psalms118:18 Nobu Nyakubaho araabe yanfubiire kaingi kwonka tarandekuriire rufu. 
Psalms118:19 Nimuunyigurire amarembo g'okuhikiirira, ntaahemu, nsiime Nyakubaho." 
Psalms118:20 Eri n'eirembo rya Nyakubaho, eri abahikiriire barabamu." 
Psalms118:21 Ai Nyakubaho, yebare kumpurira, okanjuna." 
Psalms118:22 Eibaare eri abombeki baayangire, niryo ryahindukire obuhamizo." 
Psalms118:23 Ekyo kikakorwa Nyakubaho, kandi nikitangaaza okukireeba." 
Psalms118:24 Eri n'eizooba eri Nyakubaho yaataireho; ka turishemerererweho kandi tunanukye. 
Psalms118:25 Ai Nyakubaho, twakweshengyereza, otujune. Ai Nyakubaho twakweshengyereza, otuhe okusingura." 
Psalms118:26 Orikwija omu iziina rya Nyakubaho aine omugisha! Nitukuhimbisa turi omu nju ya Nyakubaho. 
Psalms118:27 Mukama niwe Ruhanga otwakiza omushana. Mushorongye mukwaitse amataagi, muhikye omu burugo bw'eitambiro." 
Psalms118:28 Niiwe Ruhanga wangye, ninkusiima; iwe Ruhanga wangye, ninkusingiza." 
Psalms118:29 Musiime Nyakubaho ahabw'okuba aba murungi; rukundo ye etahararuka eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms119:1 Baine omugisha ab'emitwarize etaine kamogo, abakuratira eiteeka rya Nyakubaho." 
Psalms119:2 Baine omugisha abarinda ebi yaaragiire, bakamusherura n'omutima gwabo gwona;" 
Psalms119:3 kandi abatakora kubi, kureka abakuratira emitwarize ye." 
Psalms119:4 Okatuha ebiragiro byawe, ngu tubyorobere omu mazima." 
Psalms119:5 Nkaabaasibwa ki, ngira emitwarize etarikuhinduka, mpikiiriza ebi waataireho!" 
Psalms119:6 Ku naakuta omutima aha biragiro byawe byona, tinkaahemuka." 
Psalms119:7 Ninkusiima n'omutima gw'amazima, ahabw'okuunyegyesa ebiragiro byawe ebihikiriire." 
Psalms119:8 Niinyenda kurinda ebi waataireho; naiwe otannagiirira. 
Psalms119:9 Mbwenu omutsigazi akaashemeza ata emitwarize ye? Aryagishemeza nk'oku ekigambo kyawe kiri. 
Psalms119:10 Nkusherura n'omutima gwangye gwona; otandeka kuteishuka ebiragiro byawe. 
Psalms119:11 Ebigambo byawe bintuura aha mutima, ngu ntakaakucumuraho." 
Psalms119:12 Ai Nyakubaho, iwe ohimbisibwa, onyegyese ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:13 Ndyaguma ndangye ebiragiro byawe ebi waaragiire. 
Psalms119:14 Nyesiimira okukuratira ebi waaragiire, okukira okugira eitungo ringi." 
Psalms119:15 Nteekateeka munonga ahaby'enyegyesa yaawe, kandi nta omutima aha mitwarize yaawe." 
Psalms119:16 Nshemerererwa ebi waataireho. Kandi tiinyebwa kigambo kyawe. 
Psalms119:17 Nyowe omuheereza waawe ongirire embabazi, mbone kugira amagara, nyorobere ekigambo kyawe." 
Psalms119:18 Humuura amaisho gangye, ndeebe eby'okutangaaza ebiri omu iteeka ryawe." 
Psalms119:19 Nobu ndaabe omu nsi ndi omuhinguzi, otanshereka ebiragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:20 Omutima gwangye gwiniire ebi waaragiire ekihika. 
Psalms119:21 Ohana abanyamaryo, n'abanga kworobera ebiragiro byawe bakyeenwa." 
Psalms119:22 Onyiheho okujumwa n'okugaywa ahabw'okuba nsiima ebi waaragiire. 
Psalms119:23 Abategyeki nobu barangiire omu naama mbi, kwonka nyowe omuheereza waawe ninteekateeka munonga ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:24 Manya ebi waaragiire binnanura, n'ebi waataireho bimpabura." 
Psalms119:25 Nyowe ogangarami omu mucuucu, ompimbuure, nk'oku waakiraganiise." 
Psalms119:26 Ku naakugambiire emitwarize yangye, wangarukamu; mbwenu onyegyese ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:27 Onyegyese okukuratira ebiragiro byawe, mbone kuteekateeka aha by'okutangaaza byawe." 
Psalms119:28 Ndaara nindeeba ahabw'obusaasi, ompangaane, nk'oku waakiraganiise." 
Psalms119:29 Otandeka nkatoora omuhanda gurikuhabisa, kureka ahabw'embabazi zaawe onkundise eiteeka ryawe." 
Psalms119:30 Ntooraine omuhanda ogurikwesigwa; naata omutima aha biragiro byawe. 
Psalms119:31 Mpamira aha bi waaragiire; ai Nyakubaho, otandeka." 
Psalms119:32 Njwahukira okworobera ebiragiro byawe, ahabw'okuba okabiinyetegyerezesa gye." 
Psalms119:33 Ai Nyakubaho, onshoboororere amakuru g'ebi waataireho, mbone kuguma nimbikunda." 
Psalms119:34 Ompabure oku ndaarinde eiteeka ryawe, onkwatse n'oku ndaaryorobere n'omutima gwangye gwona." 
Psalms119:35 Nyorobere ebiragiro byawe, ahabw'okuba nibyo nshemerererwamu." 
Psalms119:36 Onkundise ebi waaragiire, onyihe aha kwitanira eby'ensi." 
Psalms119:37 Onyihe aha bitaine mugasho, haza ekigambo kyawe kimpaise amagara." 
Psalms119:38 Ohamye eki wandaganiise, nyowe omuheereza waawe, eki oraganisa abakutiina." 
Psalms119:39 Onkize ebijumo ebintiinisa, ebishi ebiragiro byawe nibitangaaza!" 
Psalms119:40 Nyiniire ebiragiro byawe ekihika; ahabw'okuhikiirira kwawe ompe amagara. 
Psalms119:41 Ai Nyakubaho, rukundo yaawe etahararuka n'okujuna kwawe bimpikyeho, nk'oku waaraganiise," 
Psalms119:42 mbone kutunga eky'okugarukamu abarikunjuma, ahabw'okuba nyesiga ekigambo kyawe." 
Psalms119:43 Otaiha ekigambo kyawe eky'amazima omu kanwa kangye, ahabw'okuba nyesiga ebiragiro byawe obutoosha." 
Psalms119:44 Ka ngume nyorobere eiteeka ryawe ebiro n'ebiro. 
Psalms119:45 Haza ku ndaakuratire ebi oyegyesa, ngume nyine obusingye." 
Psalms119:46 Ndyagambira abagabe ebi waaragiire, ntarikutiina kuhemuka." 
Psalms119:47 Ebiragiro byawe binnanura, kandi mbikunda munonga." 
Psalms119:48 Nsiima ebiragiro byawe ebi nkunda, kandi nteekateeka munoga aha bi waataireho." 
Psalms119:49 Ijuka eki wandaganiise, nyowe omuheereza waawe, ekyampaisize amatsiko." 
Psalms119:50 Nobu naabaire nimbonabona, kikampuumuriza, ahabw'okuba eki waaraganiise nikyo kimbaisaho." 
Psalms119:51 Ab'amaryo bakanshekyeerera obutaitsya, kwonka tinaatsigaho iteeka ryawe." 
Psalms119:52 Ku nyijuka amateeka gaawe aga ira, ai Nyakubaho, gangarura omutima omunda." 
Psalms119:53 Kwonka ku ndeeba ababi nibahenda eiteeka ryawe, ekiniga kincwa amaraka." 
Psalms119:54 Ei mba ncumbikire niyo nyeshongorera ebi waataireho. 
Psalms119:55 Ai Nyakubaho, ndaara ninkwijuka, kandi nyorobera eiteeka ryawe." 
Psalms119:56 Okurinda ebiragiro byawe, buzimazima, kuryampaisa okushemererwa." 
Psalms119:57 Ai Nyakubaho, tindagizire ngu ekyangye n'okuhitsya ebiragiro byawe?" 
Psalms119:58 Hati ninkweshengyereza n'omutima gwangye gwona; ongirire embabazi, nk'oku waaraganiise." 
Psalms119:59 Ku ngarura amaisho enyima, naareeba emitwarize yangye, nkuratira ebi waaragiire;" 
Psalms119:60 ndahuka kworobera ebiragiro byawe, ntarikweziringa." 
Psalms119:61 Nobu ababi bantega emigoye kunkwata, kwonka tinkeebwaga iteeka ryawe." 
Psalms119:62 Nyimuka omu itumbi kukusiima, ahabw'okuba amateeka gaawe gahikire." 
Psalms119:63 Ndi mugyenzi wa boona abakutiina, bakoorobera enyegyesa yaawe." 
Psalms119:64 Ai Nyakubaho, rukundo yaawe etahararuka eijwire ensi; onyegyese ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:65 Ai Nyakubaho, nk'oku waakigambire, nyowe omuheereza waawe ongiriire embabazi." 
Psalms119:66 Onyegyese obwengye n'okumanya, ahabw'okuba niinyesiga ebiragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:67 Obu naabaire ntakabonaboine, nkahaba naarara, kwonka hati niinyijuka eki waaraganiise." 
Psalms119:68 Iwe omurungi kandi ow'embabazi, onyegyese ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:69 Ab'amaryo nobu barambeiherere bakanshiisha, nimpamira aha nyegyesa yaawe." 
Psalms119:70 Emitima yaabo n'ebitsire, kwonka nyowe nnanurwa ebiragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:71 Kikangasira okubonabonesibwa, ngu mbone kwetegyereza gye ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:72 Ebiragiro byawe nibinkirira ezaabu n'efeeza zoona ez'omu nsi. 
Psalms119:73 Engaro zaawe nizo zankozire, kandi nizo zambumbire; ompe okwetegyereza, mbone kwega eiteeka ryawe." 
Psalms119:74 Haza abakutiina ku barandeebe, bashemererwe, ahabw'okuba niinyesiga ekigambo kyawe." 
Psalms119:75 Ai Nyakubaho, nimmanya emicwere yaawe ku ehikire, kandi nombonabonesa ahabw'okuba ori omwesigwa." 
Psalms119:76 Mbwenu naakweshengyereza, rukundo yaawe etahararuka empuumurize nk'oku wandaganiise, nyowe omuheereza waawe." 
Psalms119:77 Ontwaze gye, mbone kugira amagara, ahabw'okuba nshemerererwa eiteeka ryawe." 
Psalms119:78 Ab'amaryo abangambuura ka bahemukye, kwonka nyowe ninguma ninteekateeka aha bi oyegyesa." 
Psalms119:79 Abakutiina ka baanyijeho, babone kumanya ebi waaragiire." 
Psalms119:80 Omutima gwangye gube mwere aha bi waataireho, ndekye kuhemuka ntyo." 
Psalms119:81 Okukutegyereza ngu onjune, ai Nyakubaho, nobu kummaziremu amaani, kwonka ninkyesiga ekigambo kyawe." 
Psalms119:82 Amaisho gangwire omu nkiro ntegyereize eki waaraganiise, niinyebuuza nti: Beitu oryanduhuura ryari?" 
Psalms119:83 Nobu naakukarangatana nk'omusinga gwokize, tinkaayebwa bi waataireho." 
Psalms119:84 Mbwenu nyowe omuheereza waawe, mpitsye hi? Abarikumpiiganisa oryabafubira ryari?" 
Psalms119:85 Ab'amaryo abatarikweta ha biragiro byawe, bantimbiire obusya ngu mbugwemu." 
Psalms119:86 Nk'oku ebiragiro byawe byona biba eby'amazima, abanyabishuba ku barampiigye, onjune." 
Psalms119:87 Nobu abo babi barangariire kummaraho, kwonka nyowe tinkatsigahoga bi oyegyesa." 
Psalms119:88 Ahabwa rukundo yaawe etahararuka onjune mbone kworobera ebi waaragiire. 
Psalms119:89 Ai Nyakubaho, ekigambo kyawe kigumaho ebiro byona, kandi n'omu iguru kituura kihamire." 
Psalms119:90 Obwesigwa bwawe buba obw'obusingye n'obusingye; okahanga ensi yaagumaho. 
Psalms119:91 Ebintu byona bigumaho nk'oku waaragiire, ahabw'okuba bikuheereza." 
Psalms119:92 Kuri ntarashemerereirwe iteeka ryawe, nkaafiire nimbonabona." 
Psalms119:93 Tindyebwa bi oyegyesa, ahabw'okuba nibyo ompeeramu amagara." 
Psalms119:94 Ndi owaawe, onjune; ahabw'okuba nta omutima aha bi oyegyesa." 
Psalms119:95 Nobu ababi baraabe nibenda kuncwekyereza, kwonka nyowe ndyaguma ntaire omutima aha bi waaragiire." 
Psalms119:96 Ndeebire ngu ebihikire byona bigira obugarukiro, kwonka ebiragiro byawe byo tibigira hi bigarukira." 
Psalms119:97 Ebishi nkunda eiteeka ryawe! Nikyo nsiibira ninditeekateekaho. 
Psalms119:98 Ebiragiro byawe bimpika aha njoka, bimpaisa obwengye, mbukiza abazigu bangye." 
Psalms119:99 Nyetegyereza okukira abeegyesa bangye, ahabw'okuba nteekateeka aha bi waaragiire." 
Psalms119:100 Nshoboorokyerwa okukira abakuzire, ahabw'okuba nkunda ebi oyegyesa." 
Psalms119:101 Nyetantara emicwe yoona emibi, ngu mbone kukuratira ekigambo kyawe." 
Psalms119:102 Tiinyenda kuteishuka iteeka ryawe, ahabw'okuba niiwe oriinyegyesa." 
Psalms119:103 Ebigambo byawe binnurira okukira obwoki. 
Psalms119:104 Ebi oyegyesa bindeetera kwetegyereza, haza nyanga emitwarize yoona erikuhabisa." 
Psalms119:105 Ekigambo kyawe kiba orumuri oruumurikira omuhanda. 
Psalms119:106 Ndahiire ntarikwegiza, kuguma niinyorobera ebiragiro byawe ebihikiriire." 
Psalms119:107 Ai Nyakubaho, obusaasi nobu buraabe buunyogiremu. Ompimbuure, nk'oku waaraganiise." 
Psalms119:108 Ai Nyakubaho, ikiriza emitoijo ei naakutoijera kukusiima, haza onyegyese ebiragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:109 Buri kaanya nyeteekateekire kwoga amagara, kwonka nteebirwe iteeka ryawe." 
Psalms119:110 Nobu ababi baraabe bantegire omutego, kwonka tinkarekaga bi onyegyesa." 
Psalms119:111 Ebi waaragiire n'ebyangye by'entuura, kandi nibyo omutima gwangye gushemerererwa." 
Psalms119:112 Naayehayo kukora ebi waataireho, ekyo nikyo kihembo ekirammare okuhitsya obu ndifa." 
Psalms119:113 Nyanga ab'emitima erikubushukana, kwonka nkunda eiteeka ryawe." 
Psalms119:114 Niiwe buhungiro bwangye kandi omurinzi wangye, ekigambo kyawe nikyo ngiramu amatsiko." 
Psalms119:115 Imwe nkozi z'ebibi 'mwe, nimundugyeho, Mbone kukuratira ebiragiro bya Ruhanga wangye." 
Psalms119:116 Ai Mukama, mbangira, nk'oku waaraganiise, mbone kugira amagara; otandeebya, naakwesigire." 
Psalms119:117 Ompigikye, mbe gye, haza ebi waataireho birekye kunduga aha mutima." 
Psalms119:118 Ogaya boona abareka ebi waataireho, buzima ebiteekateeko byabo by'obugobya biba ebya busha." 
Psalms119:119 Otsinga ababi nk'omukyereenyo, kubaiha omu nsi; nikyo nkundira ebi waaragiire." 
Psalms119:120 Nintetema, ahabw'okutiina eiteeka ryawe." 
Psalms119:121 Nkozire ebihikire kandi eby'oburyo; mbwenu otandekurira ababisha. 
Psalms119:122 Hamiza omuheereza waawe ku orikwija kumuhwera, ab'amaryo barekye kuunyita kubi." 
Psalms119:123 Amaisho gaagwa omu nkiro nkutegyereize ku onjuna, n'okuhikiiriza ebi waaraganiise." 
Psalms119:124 Twaza gye omuheereza waawe omwiniire rukundo etahararuka, onyegyese ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:125 Ndi omuheereza waawe, onshoboororere, mbone kwetegyereza ebi waaragiire." 
Psalms119:126 Ai Nyakubaho, obunaku bwawe bw'okugira eki waakora bwahika, ahabw'okuba abantu bagomeire eiteeka ryawe." 
Psalms119:127 Buzimazima, ninkunda ebiragiro byawe okukira ezaabu; nobu ekuba ezaabu enungi munonga." 
Psalms119:128 Eego, nkuratira ebi oyegyesa byona, kandi nyanga emitwarize yoona erikuhabisa." 
Psalms119:129 Ebi waaragiire nibitangaaza, nikyo mbyoroberera." 
Psalms119:130 Ekigambo kyawe ku kishoboororwa kihwezesa, kandi kireetera aboorobi okwetegyereza." 
Psalms119:131 Niinyashama nyine ekyaka, ahabw'okugirira eiteeka ryawe ekihika." 
Psalms119:132 Naakweshengyereza, hinduka ongirire embabazi, nk'oku ozigirira abakukunda." 
Psalms119:133 Ondinde nk'oku waaraganiise, ndekye kugwa, otaikiriza ekibi kyona kuntegyeka." 
Psalms119:134 Onkize abarikuunyita kubi, mbone kworobera eiteeka ryawe." 
Psalms119:135 Ngirira embabazi, nyowe omuheereza waawe onyegyese ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:136 Amaisho gangye nigahimintika amarira, ahabw'okuba abandi nibagaya eiteeka ryawe." 
Psalms119:137 Ai Nyakubaho, buzimazima ori ohikiriire, n'emicwere yaawe yoona ehikire!" 
Psalms119:138 Ebiragiro ebi otaho bihikire, kandi biijwire amazima." 
Psalms119:139 Eihato rimmazireho, ahabw'okuba ababisha bangye beebirwe ekigambo kyawe." 
Psalms119:140 Eki waaraganiise kigyeziibwe, kyashangwa kihamire, kandi nyowe omuheereza waawe, ninkikunda." 
Psalms119:141 Nobu ndaabe ndi ejuuma kandi ningaywa, kwonka tiinyebwa bi oyegyesa." 
Psalms119:142 Okuhikiirira kwawe n'okw'obutwire bwona, eiteeka ryawe n'ery'amazima ebiro byona." 
Psalms119:143 Enaku n'obusaasi nobu biraanyite, kwonka ebiragiro byawe bindeetera okushemererwa." 
Psalms119:144 Ebi waaragiire biba ebihikiriire obutwire bwona; obinshoboororere, ngire amagara." 
Psalms119:145 Ai Nyakubaho, ninkutakira n'omutima gwangye gwona, ongarukyemu; haza ndyaguma ndinde ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:146 Ninkutakira, onjune, mbone kworobera ebi waaragiire." 
Psalms119:147 Nyimuka kare kukutakira, omushekye gutakajugutsire; niinyesiga ku eki waagambire kirihikiirira." 
Psalms119:148 Ndaara mpuriire, ninteekateeka aha bi waaraganiise." 
Psalms119:149 Ahabwa rukundo yaawe etahararuka, ai Nyakubaho, ontegye okutu; ongirire embabazi, ondinde." 
Psalms119:150 Abataine saasi abarikumpiiga banfundiriize, nibo bantu abatakuratira iteeka ryawe." 
Psalms119:151 Kwonka, iwe Nyakubaho, ondi haihi, n'eiteeka ryawe ryona riba ery'amazima." 
Psalms119:152 Mmazire omwanya muraingwa nimmanya ebi waaragiire, ku byatairweho kugumaho ebiro byona." 
Psalms119:153 Ai Nyakubaho, reeba obusaasi bwangye kandi onjune, ahabw'okuba tiinyebwa iteeka ryawe." 
Psalms119:154 Ontonganire, ondwaneho, ompe amagara, nk'oku waaraganiise." 
Psalms119:155 Ababi torigira bu obajunire, ahabw'okuba tibata mutima ha bi waataireho." 
Psalms119:156 Ai Nyakubaho, ogira embabazi nyingi, ompe amagara nk'ekiragiro kyawe oku kiri." 
Psalms119:157 Nobu ndaabe nyine abazigu bangye n'abarikumpiiga, kwonka nyowe tindeka ebi waaragiire." 
Psalms119:158 Nyowe okureeba ezo ndeebya kuntama, ahabw'okuba tizita mutima ha bi waaraganiise." 
Psalms119:159 Nyakubaho, reeba oku nkunda ebi oyegyesa; ongaruremu amagara, ahabw'okuba rukundo yaawe tehararuka." 
Psalms119:160 Entima y'eiteeka ryawe eba amazima; kandi ebi waaragiire bihikiriire, bigumaho ebiro byona." 
Psalms119:161 Abategyeki bampiigira busha, kwonka nyowe ntiina ekigambo kyawe." 
Psalms119:162 Nyesiimira eki waaraganiise, nk'owaagwa aha itungo rihango." 
Psalms119:163 Nyanga ekyeetwa ekishuba, kandi kintama, kwonka eiteeka ryawe niryo nkunda." 
Psalms119:164 Buri izooba nkusingiza emirundi mushanju ahabw'emicwere ehikiriire. 
Psalms119:165 Abakunda eiteeka ryawe nibakagire obusingye, hataine kirikubateeza ntsibo!" 
Psalms119:166 Ai Nyakubaho, nkutegyereize ku onjuna, kandi nimpikiiriza ebiragiro byawe." 
Psalms119:167 Nyorobera ebi waaragiire; kandi mbikundira kimwe. 
Psalms119:168 Ntuura ninkwata ebi oyegyesa n'ebi waaragiire, kandi emitwarize yangye yoona noogimanya." 
Psalms119:169 Ai Nyakubaho, okutaka kwangye kukuhikyeho; haza ekigambo kyawe kimpaise okwetegyereza." 
Psalms119:170 Okweshegyereza kwangye kukuhikyeho; onkize nk'oku waaraganiise. 
Psalms119:171 Ndangaane eby'okukusingiza, ahabw'okuba niiwe oyegyesa ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:172 Ndyayeshongora ebi waaraganiise, ahabw'okuba niiwe oyegyesa ebi waataireho." 
Psalms119:173 Ogume oyeteekateekire kumpwera, ahabw'okuba ntooraine ebi oyegyesa." 
Psalms119:174 Ai Nyakubaho, omujuni wangye, nkwiniire orushusho; kandi eiteeka ryawe niryo rindeetera okushemererwa." 
Psalms119:175 Ninkaramaare, haza nkaguma ninkusingiza, ebi waaragiire bikaguma nibimpwera!" 
Psalms119:176 Ninkora oku n'oku nk'entaama ebuzire; ija onsherure, nyowe omuheereza waawe. Manya tinkeebwaga biragiro byawe." 
Psalms120:1 Ku mba ndi omu busaasi, nyeta Nyakubaho, ayetaba." 
Psalms120:2 Ai Nyakubaho, onkize abanyabishuba, kandi engobya." 
Psalms120:3 Iwe karimi karungi, mbwenu Ruhanga aryakuzimuurira ki, ahabw'okurahira ebishuba?" 
Psalms120:4 Aryakuzimuurira emyambi y'obwogi n'amakara garikwaka. 
Psalms120:5 Ebishi, naareeba enaku okushuuhuukira omu Bamesheki, n'okutuura omu Bakedaari!" 
Psalms120:6 Ka ntwire omu bantu abanga obusingye, nkarengyesereza!" 
Psalms120:7 Ku nyenda obusingye, bo benda endwano." 
Psalms121:1 Mbwenu ku ndahangye enshozi amaisho; okuhwerwa kwangye kuryaruga hi? 
Psalms121:2 Okuhwerwa kwangye kuruga ahari Nyakubaho, owaahangire eiguru n'ensi." 
Psalms121:3 Tarikureka okaterera! Ogwo murinzi waawe tarihungira! 
Psalms121:4 Buzimazima, omurinzi wa Isiraeli tahungira, nobu kwakuba okugwejegyera." 
Psalms121:5 Nyakubaho niwe murinzi waawe; Nyakubaho niwe sanga yaawe aha rubaju rwawe rwa buryo. 
Psalms121:6 Eizooba tiririkwotsya nyomushana, nobu kwakuba okwezi nyekiro." 
Psalms121:7 Nyakubaho aryakurinda akabi koona, obe buhooro." 
Psalms121:8 Nyakubaho aryakurinda noogyenda, kandi noogaruka, hati n'ebiro byona." 
Psalms122:1 Nkashemererwa ku bangizire bati: Tuze omu nju ya Nyakubaho! 
Psalms122:2 Iwe Yerusalemu, hati twemereire omu marembo gaawe!" 
Psalms122:3 Iwe Yerusalemu, oyombekirwe nk'orurembo orukwataniire kimwe," 
Psalms122:4 ei enganda ziinamuka, enganda za Nyakubaho, ziizire kusingiza eiziina rye, nk'oku Isiraeli yaaragiirwe." 
Psalms122:5 Omuriiwe nimwo amaramuriro gari. Amaramuriro g'obugabe bwa Daudi. 
Psalms122:6 Mushabire Yerusalemu emigisha, muti: Obuhooro omu maju gaawe!" 
Psalms122:7 Obusingye omu ngo zaawe! Obugogyeere omu bikaari byawe! 
Psalms122:8 Ahabwa beene waitu na bagyenzi bangye boona, ninkutengyera obusingye!" 
Psalms122:9 Ahabw'enju ya Mukama Ruhanga waitu ninkwendeza okuba gye! 
Psalms123:1 Iwe osingami omu iguru, niiwe ndikwimukiza amaisho gangye," 
Psalms123:2 Reeba, nk'oku abahuuku bahanga mukama waabo amaisho, n'abazaana nk'oku bagahanga mugore waabo, naitwe nikwo tugahangire Mukama Ruhanga waitu, okuhitsya obu aritugirira embabazi." 
Psalms123:3 Otugirire embabazi, ai Nyakubaho, otugirire embabazi, ahabw'okuba batugayire baarengyesereza." 
Psalms123:4 Tugaaniiziibwe munonga abatungi; twagaywa abanyamaryo. 
Psalms124:1 Kuri Nyakubaho atarabaire ha rubaju rwaitu, Isiraeli neekigambe." 
Psalms124:2 Kuri Nyakubaho atarabaire ha rubaju rwaitu, obu abantu baatwimukiirira," 
Psalms124:3 bakaatumizire tuhuriire, batucwekyereza batwiniire ekiniga kingi," 
Psalms124:4 amaizi gakaatumizire, omwegyemure gututwara;" 
Psalms124:5 byombi biturengyeraho, n'ebingonzi byabyo ebirikutabanguka." 
Psalms124:6 Nyakubaho, otaraturekire bakatugaashuura, naakasigye!" 
Psalms124:7 Manya akatuteguura, twasyoka nk'enyonyi oku eruga omu mutego gw'omuhiigi. Yaacwa omutego, twayegyendera." 
Psalms124:8 Nyakubaho owaakozire eiguru n'ensi, niwe atuhwera." 
Psalms125:1 Abeesiga Nyakubaho ni nk'orushozi Siyooni, orutabaasa kutengyeetsibwa, orutuura ruhamire ebiro byona." 
Psalms125:2 Nk'oku Yerusalemu eyehinguririziibwe enshozi, na Nyakubaho nikwo ayehinguririize atyo abantu be, hati n'ebiro byona." 
Psalms125:3 Ababi tibaritegyeka nsi y'abahikiriire. Ku kyakuba kityo, abahikiriire nabo bakaakora kubi." 
Psalms125:4 Ai Nyakubaho, girira embabazi abarungi, abaine emitima y'amazima." 
Psalms125:5 Kwonka abatoora emihanda ekiikami, Nyakubaho aryabafubira n'enkozi z'ebibi. Abaisiraeli nibakagume n'obusingye!" 
Psalms126:1 Obu Nyakubaho yaatuzaahuura tukagaruka Siyooni, tukashusha nk'abarikuroota." 
Psalms126:2 Tukaijura esheko, twayeshongora tushemereirwe. Nibwo abanyamahanga baagira bati: Nyakubaho k'abakoreire eby'okutangaaza!" 
Psalms126:3 Buzimazima, Nyakubaho akatukorera eby'okutangaaza, nikyo twashemerereirwe!" 
Psalms126:4 Ai Nyakubaho, zaahuura abaitu abaanyagirwe, nk'oku enjura egarura amaizi omu mugyera gwomire." 
Psalms126:5 Abaabibire nibaganya, bakagyesha nibeeshongora." 
Psalms126:6 Bakagyenda nibarira batangatsi embibo; baagaruka nibeeshongora bashemereirwe, beekoreire ebi bashaarwire." 
Psalms127:1 Nyakubaho ku aba atombekire nju, abombeki beeruhiza busha. Nyakubaho ku aba atarinzire rurembo, omurinzi araarira busha aha kiro." 
Psalms127:2 Kwimuka kare kandi mukakyererwa kubyama, n'okurya ebi muhendekyeire; abu akunda beegwejegyereire, tikiine mugasho." 
Psalms127:3 Okuzaara abaana n'ekiconco kya Nyakubaho; buzimazima baba ekihembo kye eki aha. 
Psalms127:4 Abaana abu omuntu azaara akiri omutsigazi, ni nk'emyambi eri omu ngaro z'emanzi." 
Psalms127:5 Omuntu oine emyambi mingi nk'egyo, ahiiriirwe! Ku abugabugana abazigu be omu irembo, tasingurwa." 
Psalms128:1 Boona abatiina Nyakubaho bakakuratira emitwarize ye, abaha omugisha." 
Psalms128:2 Oryatungwa ebi ohendekyeire; oshemererwe kandi onanukye. 
Psalms128:3 Omukazi waawe aryaba nk'omuzaabibu, n'abaana baawe babe nk'emishebuko y'omuoliva, beehinguririize emeeza yaawe." 
Psalms128:4 Okwo nikwo omuntu otiina Nyakubaho ariheebwa omugisha. 
Psalms128:5 Nyakubaho akuhe omugisha naayema omuri Siyooni; oreebe Yerusalemu egogyeire, ebiro by'amagara gaawe byona." 
Psalms128:6 Oramaare, kandi oreebe abaijukuru baawe! Obusingye bube ahari Isiraeli!" 
Psalms129:1 Bakampiiganisa munonga okwiha omu buto bwangye; Isiraeli k'ekigambe. 
Psalms129:2 Bakampiiganisa munonga okwiha omu buto bwangye; kwonka tibarambaasize. 
Psalms129:3 Bakamputaaza munonga omu mugongo, baagugira nk'omusiri gutabiire;" 
Psalms129:4 kwonka hati Nyakubaho ohikiriire anyihire omu nkomo y'ababi. 
Psalms129:5 Nkaahenwa ki, abanga Siyooni bahemurwa babingwa!" 
Psalms129:6 Ka boomibwe omuyaga gwa Nyairirwe, nk'obunyaatsi bumezire aha mutwe gw'enju" 
Psalms129:7 obutaijura ngaro, nobu kwakuba okurugwamu omuganda;" 
Psalms129:8 kandi tihariho muhinguzi n'omwe origira ati: Nyakubaho abahe omugisha! Nitubendeza omugisha omu iziina rya Nyakubaho! 
Psalms130:1 Ai Nyakubaho, ninkutakira nyemi okuzimu." 
Psalms130:2 Ai Nyakubaho, hurira okutaka kwangye! Tega okutu, ohurire okweshengyereza kwangye!" 
Psalms130:3 Ai Nyakubaho, ku waakweta aha bicumuro byaitu, n'oha otakaasingwa rubanja?" 
Psalms130:4 Kwonka shi, iwe otusaasira, nikyo tushemerereire kukutiinira." 
Psalms130:5 Ntegyereza Nyakubaho n'amagara gangye goona, kandi nyesiga ekigambo kye." 
Psalms130:6 Amagara gangye gategyereza Nyakubaho, okukira omurinzi oku ategyereza omushekye kujuguta." 
Psalms130:7 Iwe Isiraeli, yesigye Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba rukundo ye tehararuka, kandi atuura ayeteekateekire kujuna." 
Psalms130:8 Nikyo arijunira Abaisiraeli, akabaihaho ebibi byabo byona." 
Psalms131:1 Ai Nyakubaho, tingira maryo, kandi tiinyetunguura. Ebintu bikuru tibintwara mutima, nobu byakuba eby'obwengye ebindema kwetegyereza." 
Psalms131:2 Ntuura ntuurize kandi nyine obusingye; ndi nk'omwana ocuukire, ori omu mikono ya nyina." 
Psalms131:3 Iwe Isiraeli, yesigye Nyakubaho, hati n'ebiro byona." 
Psalms132:1 Ai Nyakubaho, ijuka Daudi, n'eby'oburemeezi byona ebi yaarabiremu." 
Psalms132:2 Ijuka okurahira oku yaarahiire Nyakubaho, n'okuhiga oku yaahigiire Ruhanga wa Yakobo Ow'obushoboorozi, ati:" 
Psalms132:3 Tinditaaha mu nju yangye, tinditemba kitabo kyangye," 
Psalms132:4 tindibyama nkagwejegyera, nobu kwakuba okuhumbya eriisho," 
Psalms132:5 okuhitsya obu nditungira Nyakubaho omwanya, obutaaho bwa Ruhanga wa Yakobo Ow'obushoboorozi." 
Psalms132:6 Eshanduukye y'endagaano tukagihuriraho omuri Efuraati, twagishanga omu myegyeego y'ekibira." 
Psalms132:7 Ka tuze ahi Nyakubaho atuura, tujuumare aha bigyere bye tumuramye." 
Psalms132:8 Ai Nyakubaho, imuka oze omu buruhuukiro bwawe, iwe n'eshanduukye y'endagaano, akamanyiso k'obushoboorozi bwawe." 
Psalms132:9 Abahongyerezi baawe bajware okuhikiirira, n'abarikwera baawe bateere akaari k'okushemererwa." 
Psalms132:10 Ahabwa Daudi omuheereza waawe, otabinga ou waasiigire amajuta." 
Psalms132:11 Nyakubaho akarahira Daudi, kandi eki yaarahiire aryakigumya, naagira ati: Ninkuhamiza, omwana waawe aryakuhungurira, aze aha kitebe ky'obugabe." 
Psalms132:12 Abaana baawe ku baririnda endagaano yangye n'ebyaragiirwe ebi naabeegyeise, abaana baabo nabo baryakuhungurira, bagume aha kitebe ky'obugabe ebiro byona." 
Psalms132:13 Manya Nyakubaho akeetooranira Siyooni, kuba omwanya gwe gw'okutuuramu, ati:" 
Psalms132:14 Aha niho ndiguma ebiro byona, kuba obutaaho bwangye obu nyetooraniire." 
Psalms132:15 Ndyaha Siyooni byona ebi ekyenire: abooro baayo mbahaazye ebyokurya," 
Psalms132:16 abahongyerezi mbahumbikye okujunwa, abarikumukunda bateere akaari bashemereirwe." 
Psalms132:17 Aho niho ndiimukiza ow'okuhamya obugabe bwa Daudi. Nkahamya obutegyeki bw'omusiigwa wangye," 
Psalms132:18 Abazigu be nkabaitsa enshoni, kwonka we ekirunga kye kikamurinkana." 
Psalms133:1 Ka ni kirungi, kandi ka nikigwisa gye, abantu kutuurana bari eishe-emwe!" 
Psalms133:2 Ni nk'amajuta g'obuguzi bwingi, agaashukirwe aha mutwe gwa Arooni, gakaitururukira omu kireju kye, gakahika n'aha mukugiro gw'ebijwaro bye." 
Psalms133:3 Ni nk'orume rwa Herumooni oruragarika aha bibungo bya Siyooni, ei Nyakubaho aheera omugisha, nigo magara agatahwaho." 
Psalms134:1 Nimwije, muhimbise Nyakubaho, imwe mwena abaheereza ba Nyakubaho, abaraara nibagaraga omu nju ya Nyakubaho, omu bikaari by'enju ya Ruhanga waitu!" 
Psalms134:2 Mwimutsye emikono yaanyu mugyorekyeize omwanya ogurikwera, muhimbise Nyakubaho!" 
Psalms134:3 Nyakubaho owaahangire eiguru n'ensi, abahe omugisha naayema Siyooni!" 
Psalms135:1 Haleluya! Musingize Nyakubaho, mumusingize, imwe abairu be," 
Psalms135:2 abeemerera omu nju ye, omu bikaari by'enju ya Ruhanga waitu." 
Psalms135:3 Musingize Nyakubaho ahabw'okuba ni murungi. Mumweshongorere nimumusingiza ahabw'okuba n'omunyambabazi. 
Psalms135:4 Ahabw'okuba akeetooranira Yakobo, Isiraeli yaaba eye buzima." 
Psalms135:5 Nimmanya Nyakubaho ku aba mukuru, Nyakubaho waitu ogwo, ku akira abeeyeta baaruhanga boona." 
Psalms135:6 Omu iguru n'omu nsi, omu mayanja n'okuzimu, eki Nyakubaho ayenda akikora." 
Psalms135:7 Aimutsya ebicu aha mbaju zoona ez'ensi; areeta emirabyo kugwisa enjura; kandi aiha omuyaga omu ibiikiro rye. 
Psalms135:8 Akaita emijigaijo ya Misiri, ey'abantu n'ey'amatungo;" 
Psalms135:9 yaakorerayo obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza, kufubira Faraaho n'abakungu be." 
Psalms135:10 Akateera amahanga maingi, yaita abagabe b'amaani:" 
Psalms135:11 Sihooni ow'Abaamoori, na Ogi ow'Ababashani, n'abagabe boona ab'omuri Kanaani," 
Psalms135:12 Ensi zaabo yaazigabira abantu be Abaisiraeli, baazikubuura, zaaba ezaabo." 
Psalms135:13 Ai Nyakubaho, eiziina ryawe rigumaho ebiro byona, kandi baryaguma bakwijukye obusingye bwona." 
Psalms135:14 Nyakubaho aryaiha orubanja aha bantu be, kandi agirire embabazi abamuheereza." 
Psalms135:15 Emandwa z'abanyamahanga ez'efeeza n'ez'ezaabu, ezikozirwe abantu;" 
Psalms135:16 zigira akanwa, kwonka tizigamba; zigira amaisho, kwonka tizireeba;" 
Psalms135:17 zigira amatu, kwonka tizihurira; kandi tiziitsya; zigira enyindo, kwonka tizikaga." 
Psalms135:18 Abazikora baryaba nkazo, na weena ozeesiga nikwo ariba." 
Psalms135:19 Imwe ab'eka ya Isiraeli, muhimbise Nyakubaho! Imwe ab'eka ya Arooni, muhimbise Nyakubaho!" 
Psalms135:20 Imwe ab'eka ya Leevi, muhimbise Nyakubaho! Imwe abatiina Nyakubaho, mumuhimbise!" 
Psalms135:21 Nyakubaho ahimbisibwe omuri Siyooni, n'omuri Yerusalemu obutaaho bwe. Haleluya!" 
Psalms136:1 Musiime Nyakubaho ahabw'okuba ni murungi; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:2 Musiime Ruhanga wa baaruhanga: ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:3 Musiime Mukama w'abakama; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:4 We wenka niwe akora eby'okutangaaza bikuru; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:5 Akahangisa eiguru obwengye; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:6 Akaara ensi aha maizi; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:7 Akakora ebirikwaka bihango; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:8 Eizooba kutegyeka nyomushana; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:9 Okwezi n'enyonyoozi kutegyeka nyekiro; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:10 Akaita emijigaijo ya Misiri; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:11 Yaihayo Isiraeli; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:12 N'omukono gwe gw'amaani ogubangire; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:13 Akabaganisa Enyanja erikutukura, ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona!" 
Psalms136:14 Akarabya Abaisiraeli ahagati yaayo; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:15 Akamirizamu Faraaho n'eihe rye; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:16 Akarabya abantu be omu ihamba; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:17 Akateera abagabe b'amaani; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:18 Akaita abagabe rugambwa; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:19 Sihooni ow'Abaamoori; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:20 Na Ogi ow'Ababashani; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:21 Ensi yaabo akagiha abantu be; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:22 Yaagiha Isiraeli omuheereza we; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:23 Akatwijuka tweshobeire; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:24 Akatukiza abazigu; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms136:25 Niwe aha ebihangirwe byona ebyokurya, ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona!" 
Psalms136:26 Musiime Ruhanga ow'omu iguru; ahabw'okuba rukundo ye eba ey'ebiro byona! 
Psalms137:1 Tukashutama aha rubaju rw'emigyera ya Babulooni, twarira, ahabw'okwijuka Siyooni." 
Psalms137:2 Twahanika amagobore gaitu aha mikinga y'aha nkungu zaayo. 
Psalms137:3 Obwo abaatunyagire bakatushaba kubeeshongorera n'okubazaanira nibatugira bati: Nimutweshongorereho kimwe aha byeshongoro bya Siyooni. 
Psalms137:4 Naitwe tuti: Nitubaasa tuta kweshongora ekyeshongoro kya Nyakubaho, turi omu ihanga ritari ryaitu?" 
Psalms137:5 Iwe Yerusalemu, ku ndikwebwa, omukono gwangye gwa buryo nigukakookoote!" 
Psalms137:6 Ku ndikwebwa, ntaakukunda okukira ebi nkunda byona, orurimi nirukandamatire omu nkanka!" 
Psalms137:7 Ai Nyakubaho, ijuka eki Abanyaedomu baakozire aha izooba ri Yerusalemu yaakwatiirweho. Ijuka oku baagizire bati: Nimugisheenye; mugisheenyagurire kimwe!" 
Psalms137:8 Iwe Babulooni omucwekyereza, omuntu orikukutwaza nk'oku waatutwarize, naakahiirwe!" 
Psalms137:9 Orikukwata abeereere baawe, akabahondagura aha rukiri, naakahiirwe!" 
Psalms138:1 Ai Nyakubaho, ninkusiima n'omutima gwangye gwona, ndyakweshongorera ninkuhimbisa omu maisho ga baaruhanga." 
Psalms138:2 Ahabwa rukundo yaawe etahararuka n'ahabw'obwesigwa bwawe, ndyajuumara nyorekyeire Nyaruju yaawe erikwera, nkuhimbise, ahabw'okuba ori Rukiraboona, n'eki oraganisa nikikira byona." 
Psalms138:3 Obu naakutakira, okampurira, waanyongyera amaani, wangumya." 
Psalms138:4 Ai Nyakubaho, abagabe boona ab'omu nsi nibakusingiza, ahabw'okuba bahuriire ebi waaraganiise." 
Psalms138:5 Nibeeshongora ebi okora, nibagira bati: Ekitiinwa kya Nyakubaho ka ni kingi!" 
Psalms138:6 Nyakubaho nobu araabe ari hare omu iguru, ata omutima aha beebundika." 
Psalms138:7 Enaku ku ziba zinturukire oku n'oku, ondinda, orwanisa abazigu bangye abaanyiniire ekiniga, onjunisa amaani gaawe." 
Psalms138:8 Ai Nyakubaho, oryankorera ebi wanteekateekyeire, ahabw'okuba rukundo yaawe eba ey'ebiro byona. Mbwenu otatsigaho omurimo gw'emikono yaawe." 
Psalms139:1 Ai Nyakubaho, onshwijuma kandi ommanya." 
Psalms139:2 Ku mba nyemereire nari nshutami, nabwo ommanya. Omanyira hare ebiteekateeko byangye," 
Psalms139:3 ocaaka emigyendere yangye n'emibyamire yangye, kandi omanya emitwarize yangye yoona." 
Psalms139:4 Ekigambo ku kiba kitakandugire ha rurimi, iwe oba waakimanyire." 
Psalms139:5 Onyehinguririza embaju zoona nonkingiza omukono gwawe. 
Psalms139:6 Okummanya nk'okwo kundengire, tindikukwetegyereza; n'okw'orurengo oru ntarikubaasa kuhikaho." 
Psalms139:7 Mbwenu nkakwetantarira hi? Ndyahungira hi ahu otari? 
Psalms139:8 Nobu nkutemba omu iguru, oriyo; nobu nkuba ndi okuzimu owa Nyamuteza, nayo oriyo." 
Psalms139:9 Nobu nkuguruka nkahika aha buturuko bw'eizooba, nari naacwekanisa amayanja, naahika oburengyerwa-izooba," 
Psalms139:10 okwo nayo, okaaguma onyebembeire, omukono gwawe gwa buryo gukinkwaitse." 
Psalms139:11 Ku naakushaba omwirima kunshweka, n'omushana kumbeera ekiro," 
Psalms139:12 omwirima ogwo tigukaabaasa kukubeera ekizima, ahabw'okuba ahari iwe ekiro kiba nka nyomushana." 
Psalms139:13 Niiwe waahangire buri kacweka kangye koona okambumbabumbira omu nda ya maawe. 
Psalms139:14 Ninkusiima ahabw'okumpanga omu muringo gw'eihano ogurikutangaaza, kandi ebi okora byona nibitangaaza." 
Psalms139:15 Tihariho kacweka kangye ku otarikumanya. Obu naabaire nintonderwa omu mubonano, omu nda ya maawe, okamanya ku ndiyo." 
Psalms139:16 Okeetegyereza buri kagingo k'okutondwa kwangye, ebiro byangye byona ebi naateereirweho byahandiikwa omu kitabo kyawe, hatakabaireho kintu na kimwe." 
Psalms139:17 Ai Ruhanga, ka kigumire okumanya ebiteekateeko byawe! Ka ni bingi!" 
Psalms139:18 Ku naakubibara bikaakira omusheenyi: ku nsisiimuka oba okiri hamwe naanye. 
Psalms139:19 Ai Ruhanga, nkaahenwa ki, oita ababi, haza abakunda kusheesha eshagama bandugaho!" 
Psalms139:20 Abakugambaho kubi kandi bakakujuma. 
Psalms139:21 Ai Nyakubaho, noogira ngu tiinyanga bakwanga? Tintamwa abakurwanisa?" 
Psalms139:22 Nimbangira kimwe buzima; nimbeeta abazigu bangye. 
Psalms139:23 Ai Ruhanga, onshwijume, omanye omutima gwangye; ongyeze, omanye ebiteekateeko byangye." 
Psalms139:24 Oncaakye, oreebe omuriinye ku haraabe harimu oburyarya; onyebembere, ngume omu muhanda gwawe ebiro byona." 
Psalms140:1 Ai Nyakubaho, onkize abantu babi; ondinde abainazi," 
Psalms140:2 abacuma enaama mbi, bakeeteekateeka kwimutsya endwano." 
Psalms140:3 Endimi zaabo zishongoire nk'ez'enjoka, ebigambo byabo biine obushegu nk'obw'encwera." 
Psalms140:4 Ai Nyakubaho, ondinde abantu babi; onjune abainazi abarikungiira omu naama y'okungwisa." 
Psalms140:5 Abo banyamaryo bantegire omutego n'ekigoye, baatega obusya ahi ndikuraba." 
Psalms140:6 Ngira Nyakubaho nti: Niiwe Ruhanga wangye. Ai Nyakubaho, hurira okweshengyereza kwangye, onjune!" 
Psalms140:7 Iwe Nyakubaho, Mukama wangye, omujuni wangye ow'amaani, niiwe ondinzire ndi aha rugamba." 
Psalms140:8 Ai Nyakubaho, otaha ababi ebi barikwenda, kandi otaikiriza enaama zaabo kuhikiirizibwa." 
Psalms140:9 Abankubakubire batansingura; eby'obwinazi ebi barikumpayira bibagarukane. 
Psalms140:10 Amakara garikwaka gabafukunkukyeho; banagwe omu rusa bahereyo! 
Psalms140:11 Ababeiherera abandi babure obutooro, n'abakora ebibi n'eby'obwinazi bacwekyerezibwe." 
Psalms140:12 Nimmanya ku Nyakubaho arihoorera enshoberwa, kandi ku atarireka banaku kusingisirizibwa." 
Psalms140:13 Buzimazima abahikiriire baryakuhimbisa, batuure naiwe." 
Psalms141:1 Ai Nyakubaho, ninkutakira, ompurire! Naakweshengyereza ohurire okutaka kwangye." 
Psalms141:2 Okushaba kwangye kukucumbuukire nk'obubaani, n'okukutega emikono kube nk'ekitambo ky'omwabazyo!" 
Psalms141:3 Ai Nyakubaho, ta omurinzi aha kanwa kangye, arinde n'eminwa yangye" 
Psalms141:4 Otandeka nkoohibwa, nkakora kubi nkacumura hamwe n'enkozi z'ebibi, Nobu kwakuba okurya nabo ebyokurya byabo ebirungire." 
Psalms141:5 Omuntu murungi akanteera, ampana, kwonka tindiikiriza bantu babi kunshagika; ahabw'okuba ntuura ninshaba, nindwanisa ebibi bi barikukora." 
Psalms141:6 Ku baricwerwa orubanja rwabasinga, obwo nibwo barimanya ebigambo byangye ku biri eby'amazima." 
Psalms141:7 Nk'oku batema ekiti bakakishatagura, nikwo amagufa gaabo garinaganagwa aha munwa gw'ekiina." 
Psalms141:8 Ai Mukama Ruhanga, niiwe mpanga amaisho. Niiwe mpungiraho, otandeka ntaine kijuna." 
Psalms141:9 Ondinde, ndekye kugwa omu busya bw'enkozi z'ebibi, n'omu mitego ei bantegire." 
Psalms141:10 K'ababi bagwe omu kigoye kyabo, haza nyowe nyetaraakire." 
Psalms142:1 Ntakira Nyakubaho n'eiraka ryangye ryona; mmweshengyereza kungirira embabazi. 
Psalms142:2 Mmutuurira amaganya gangye; nimmumarirayo obusaasi bwangye bwona. 
Psalms142:3 Omutima gwangye ku gugwa enshazi, niiwe omanya ogu ndaatoore. Omu muhanda gu ndabamu nimwo abazigu bangye bantegire omutego." 
Psalms142:4 Ku nyereeba aha rubaju, nshanga hatariho onyetaireho; ntaine n'omwe ow'okuhungiraho; habuzire ow'okuntaho omutima." 
Psalms142:5 Ai Nyakubaho, nkutakira, nimpamya ku ori obuhungiro bwangye, kandi ku niiwe ontunga." 
Psalms142:6 Hurira okutaka kwangye; manya enaku zimbandikire munonga. Onkize abarikumpiiga, ahabw'okuba nibankiza emikono." 
Psalms142:7 Ongirire embabazi onyihe omu kihome mbone kukusiimira omu iteeraniro ry'abahikiriire. 
Psalms143:1 Ai Nyakubaho, hurira okushaba kwangye, n'okweshengyereza kwangye; ahabw'obwesigwa bwawe n'okuhikiirira kwawe ongarukyemu." 
Psalms143:2 Otancwera orubanja, nyowe omuheereza waawe, ahabw'okuba tihariho n'omwe ohikiriire omu maisho gaawe." 
Psalms143:3 Omuzigu wangye ampiiganiise, yankiriza kimwe amaani; yanta omu kamizyo k'omwirima, naaba nk'abaafiire abatakimanywa." 
Psalms143:4 N'ahabw'ekyo ngwire enshazi, naayehwera kimwe amatsiko." 
Psalms143:5 Niinyijuka ebiro bya ira; nteekateeka aha bi waakozire byona; n'eby'okutangaaza ebi waahangire binguma aha mutima. 
Psalms143:6 Nkutegire emikono; kandi nkwiniire ekihika, nk'eitaka rikarangataine." 
Psalms143:7 Ai Nyakubaho, rahuka kungarukamu, ntakagwire nshazi; Otaanyeshereka nkaza okuzimu nk'abandi." 
Psalms143:8 Ka ngume mpurire ebya rukundo yaawe etahararuka omu kasheeshe, ahabw'okuba ninkwesiga. Ompabure oku ndaatwaze, ahabw'okuba naakweheera kimwe." 
Psalms143:9 Ai Nyakubaho, nkiza abazigu, niiwe mpungiireho." 
Psalms143:10 Onyegyese okukora ebi okunda, ahabw'okuba niiwe Ruhanga wangye. Ahabw'embabazi zaawe, onyebembere omu muhanda gutarimu kabi." 
Psalms143:11 Ai Nyakubaho, onjune nk'oku waaraganiise; ahabw'oburungi bwawe ontambire enaku." 
Psalms143:12 Ahabw'okunkunda, oite abazigu bangye, ocwekyereze abarikumpata boona, ahabw'okuba ndi omuheereza waawe." 
Psalms144:1 Mukama, rukiri rwangye, omanyiiza emikono yangye kurwana, n'engaro zangye kukwata eby'okurwanisa, ahimbisibwe." 
Psalms144:2 Niwe murinzi wangye ondwanaho, obuhungiro bwangye kandi omujuni wangye ou nyesiga, ongomoorera amahanga." 
Psalms144:3 Ai Nyakubaho, omuntu ni kintu ki, iwe kumwetaho? Omuntu nyabuntu, iwe kumwijuka?" 
Psalms144:4 Omuntu aba omwitsyo gwonka, ebiro bye ni nk'ekinyimanyimi." 
Psalms144:5 Ai Nyakubaho, igura eiguru oshuume, Okore aha nshozi, zicumbe omwika!" 
Psalms144:6 Rabisa omurabyo, obataataane; rasha emyambi obaraze!" 
Psalms144:7 Onkununkirire nooyema omu iguru, onjune, onjabuure omu maizi garikumiza, onkize obutegyeki bw'abanyamahanga," 
Psalms144:8 Abatagamba kindi kureka okubeiha, abeeteekateekire kurahira ebishuba." 
Psalms144:9 Ai Ruhanga, ka nkweshongorere ekyeshongoro kisya. Nyeshongore eby'okukuhimbisa ninteera enanga y'emirya ikumi." 
Psalms144:10 Iwe ohaisa abagabe okusingura, okakiza Daudi omuheereza waawe." 
Psalms144:11 Njuna rurara, etaanyita; onkize obutegyeki bw'abanyamahanga, abatagamba kindi kureka okubeiha, abeeteekateekire kurahira ebishuba." 
Psalms144:12 Nkaabaasibwa ki, batabani baitu banyeeta nk'emiti, bakura gye okwiha omu buto bwabo; bahara baitu bagira ekyemerero kirungi, nk'eky'enyomyo z'omu rurembo, ezishariirweho ebishushani ebishemeza ebikaari;" 
Psalms144:13 ebitara byaitu biijurirana ebihingwa byona; entaama z'omu mariisizo gaitu zikanya, ziba enkumi n'obukumi;" 
Psalms144:14 amatungo gaitu gazaarirana, gareka kutorooga nari kufa; ka harekye kubaho enduuru omu nguuto zaitu!" 
Psalms144:15 Eihanga nk'eryo ka rihiiriirwe, eri Nyakubaho aba Ruhanga waaryo!" 
Psalms145:1 Ai Ruhanga wangye kandi Mugabe wangye, ndyakusingiza, ngume nkuhimbise," 
Psalms145:2 nkusiime ntarikuremuura ebiro byona. 
Psalms145:3 Nyakubaho ni mukuru, ashemereire kuhimbisibwa munonga, kandi obukuru bwe tibwetegyerezibwa." 
Psalms145:4 Ab'obusingye bumwe baryaguma bagambire ab'obundi eby'amaani ebi waakozire. 
Psalms145:5 Ebishi ekitiinwa kyawe n'okurangaanwa kwawe biba bikuru! Ndyaguma nteekateekye eby'okutangaaza ebi okora. 
Psalms145:6 Abantu baryatebya eby'amaani ebi okora, naanye ndangaane eby'obukuru bwawe." 
Psalms145:7 Baryamanyisa eby'oburungi bwawe, beeshongore eby'embabazi zaawe." 
Psalms145:8 Manya Nyakubaho aba ow'embabazi, kandi ow'esaasi; tarahuka kuguubwa kubi, kandi agira rukundo etahararuka." 
Psalms145:9 Nyakubaho aba murungi aha bantu boona, n'ebi yaahangire byona abigirira embabazi." 
Psalms145:10 Ai Nyakubaho, ebi waahangire byona bikusiima, n'abarikwera baawe bakuhimbisa." 
Psalms145:11 Bakurangaana ku ori omugabe w'ekitiinwa, bagamba aha by'obushoboorozi bwawe." 
Psalms145:12 Abantu ka bamanye eby'amaani ebi okora, n'ekitiinwa ky'obukuru bw'obugabe bwawe." 
Psalms145:13 Obukama bwawe buba obw'ebiro n'ebiro, obutegyeki bwawe bugumaho obusingye bwona." 
Psalms145:14 Nyakubaho aramira boona abarikugwa, kandi aimutsya boona abinamiriire." 
Psalms145:15 Ebintu byona bikuhanga amaisho, naiwe obiha egabo yaabyo omu bunaku buhikire." 
Psalms145:16 Byona orahuka kubiigutsa, kandi obimarira obukyene." 
Psalms145:17 Nyakubaho aba ohikiriire omu mitwarize ye yoona, kandi takoresa kindi, kureka rukundo." 
Psalms145:18 Nyakubaho aba haihi n'abantu boona abamuhoogyera, boona abamutakira omu mazima." 
Psalms145:19 Abamutiina, ekyabo n'okumushaba akabagarukamu, akahurira okutaka kwabo kandi akabajuna." 
Psalms145:20 Nyakubaho arinda boona abamukunda, kwonka ababi boona aryabahwerekyereza." 
Psalms145:21 Ndyaguma mpimbise Nyakubaho; k'ebihangirwe byona bihimbise eiziina rye eririkwera ebiro byona. 
Psalms146:1 Haleluya! Iwe magara gangye, singiza Nyakubaho!" 
Psalms146:2 Ndyasingiza Nyakubaho amagara gangye goona, Nyeshongorere Ruhanga wangye eby'okumuhimbisa okuhitsya obu ndifa." 
Psalms146:3 Mutaryesiga abategyeki, nobu yaakuba omuntu, otarikubaasa kujuna." 
Psalms146:4 Omwitsyo ku gumuhwamu, agaruka omu itaka eri yaarugiremu; n'eryo izooba ebi aba ateekateekire kukora bihwera aho." 
Psalms146:5 Aine omugisha ou Ruhanga wa Yakobo aba omuhwezi we, ou amatsiko ge gatuura ahari Mukama Ruhanga we" 
Psalms146:6 owaahangire eiguru n'ensi n'amayanja na byona ebirimu. Nyakubaho aba omwesigwa obutoosha," 
Psalms146:7 acwera gye emanja abarikusingisirizibwa; aha ebyokurya abarikwitwa enjara, arekura embohe." 
Psalms146:8 Nyakubaho ahumuura empumi aimutsya abeinamiriire, kandi akunda abahikiriire." 
Psalms146:9 Arinda abashuuhuuki, kandi areeberera efuuzi n'abafaakazi, kwonka abasiisi ababuza obutooro." 
Psalms146:10 Nyakubaho ategyeka ebiro byona. Iwe Siyooni, Ruhanga waawe aryategyeka obusingye bwona. Haleluya!" 
Psalms147:1 Haleluya! Musingize Nyakubaho! Ni kirungi okweshongorera Ruhanga waitu, ahabw'okuba aba ow'embabazi, kandi kihikire okumuhimbisa." 
Psalms147:2 Nyakubaho ayombeka busya Yerusalemu; akazaahuura Abaisiraeli abaanyagirwe; 
Psalms147:3 yaabakiza okweshobera, kandi yaabashemba obuhuta." 
Psalms147:4 Niwe amanya obwingi bw'enyonyoozi, buri emwe akagyeeta eiziina." 
Psalms147:5 Mukama waitu ni mukuru kandi ow'obushoboorozi bwona, okwetegyereza kwe tikugira bugarukiro." 
Psalms147:6 Nyakubaho aimutsya abeebundika, kwonka ababi ababandika." 
Psalms147:7 Mweshongorere Nyakubaho nimumusiima, munihiirize Ruhanga waitu eigobore!" 
Psalms147:8 Niwe ashweka eiguru ebicu, ngu bigwisize ensi enjura, emeze oruhiira aha mugongo n'ebimera ebitunga abantu." 
Psalms147:9 Niwe aha amatungo ebyokurya, akariisa abaana b'ekikoona abarikwaniira." 
Psalms147:10 Ahariwe amaani g'embaraasi ti kantu, n'eihe ry'abarikugyendesa amaguru taryetaho." 
Psalms147:11 Nyakubaho ashemerererwa abamutiina, abeesiga rukundo ye etahararuka." 
Psalms147:12 Iwe Yerusalemu, singiza Nyakubaho naiwe Siyooni, singiza Ruhanga waawe;" 
Psalms147:13 ahabw'okuba ahamya empimbi z'amarembo gaawe; aha omugisha abakutwiremu. 
Psalms147:14 Akureetera obusingye aha myatano yaawe kandi akwigutsa engano nungi munonga. 
Psalms147:15 Aragiira, ekigambo kye kishuuma omu nsi nk'omurabyo." 
Psalms147:16 Aragaritsya ebirika birikwera tiitiiti; amaamagiza omurombe nk'eiju. 
Psalms147:17 Atoonyereza orubaare nk'oburagarika. Ku habaho obutiti obutarikwemerwa," 
Psalms147:18 ayohereza ekigambo kye, ruyaga; ahuuhisa omuyaga gwe ogurikutagata, rugyera." 
Psalms147:19 Amanyisa Yakobo ekigambo kye, ebi yaataireho n'ebiragiro bye abimanyisa Isiraeli." 
Psalms147:20 Takatwazaga atyo gandi mahanga, kandi tigakamanyaga biragiro bye. Haleluya!" 
Psalms148:1 Haleluya! Imwe ab'omu iguru nimuhimbise Nyakubaho, mumusingize ahaiguru owa Rukorera!" 
Psalms148:2 Imwe baamaraika be mwena, nimumuhimbise! Imwe mwena amahe ge ag'omu iguru, mumusingize!" 
Psalms148:3 Eizooba n'okwezi, nimumusingize; enyonyoozi zirikwaka, mumusingize!" 
Psalms148:4 Eiguru ry'owa Herebe, nirimusingize, n'amaizi g'ahaiguru gamusingize." 
Psalms148:5 Byona ka bisingize eiziina rya Nyakubaho, owaaragiire, bikahangwa." 
Psalms148:6 Akabita omu mwanya gwabyo ogw'obutwire, yaaguhamisa ebiragiro bye ebitahinduka." 
Psalms148:7 Imwe ebiri omu nsi, muhimbise Mukama, emigoye y'omu mayanja n'okuzimu yoona," 
Psalms148:8 Omuriro n'orubaare, ebirika n'orume, emiyaga y'amaani ehuuha nk'oku yaaragiire!" 
Psalms148:9 Enshozi n'ebibungo byona, emiti eyana ebijuma hamwe n'ey'omu bibira," 
Psalms148:10 enyamaishwa ez'omu ishwa n'ezitungwa, ebirikugyendesa enda n'ebirikugurukisa amapapa, nimusingize Nyakubaho!" 
Psalms148:11 Abagabe b'omu nsi boona n'amahanga goona, abanyiginya n'abategyeki b'omu nsi boona;" 
Psalms148:12 abatsigazi n'empangare, abantu bakuru n'abato, nimusingize Nyakubaho!" 
Psalms148:13 Boona ka basingize Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba ni mukuru; ekitiinwa kye nikikira eiguru n'ensi." 
Psalms148:14 Eihanga rye akarihindura ery'amaani, nikyo abantu be boona bamuhimbisiza, nibo Baisiraeli enkundwa ze. Haleluya!" 
Psalms149:1 Haleluya! Mweshongorere Nyakubaho ekyeshongoro kisya; mumusingirize ahu abamwesiga bateeraniire! 
Psalms149:2 Isiraeli k'eshemerererwe owaagihangire, n'abantu ba Siyooni beesiimire omugabe waabo!" 
Psalms149:3 Ka basingize eiziina rye nibeemurika, bamuteerere empuuro n'enanga!" 
Psalms149:4 Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akagirira abantu be embabazi; yaatuha okusingura tutari b'amaani. 
Psalms149:5 K'abantu be abeesigwa beeraate, beeyare omu maisho ge nibamuhimbisa." 
Psalms149:6 Bamusingize n'amaraka gaabo goona bakwaitse zaarurara," 
Psalms149:7 kuhoora abanyamahanga, n'okuha abataikiriza ekifubiro," 
Psalms149:8 kukomesa abagabe baabo enjegyere, n'abakungu empingu," 
Psalms149:9 n'okubaha ekyabateereirweho. Ekyo nikyo kitiinwa ky'abantu be abeesigwa. Haleluya! 
Psalms150:1 Haleluya! Muhimbise Ruhanga omuri Nyaruju ye erikwera, mumuhimbise omu kikaari kye eky'omu iguru!" 
Psalms150:2 Mumuhimbise ahabw'eby'amaani ebi akora; mumuhimbise ahabw'obukuru bwe obutakareebwaga! 
Psalms150:3 Mumuhimbise n'amakondere; mumuhimbise n'enanga! 
Psalms150:4 Mumuhimbise n'empuuro nimuzina; mumuhimbise n'ebiine emirya kandi n'esheegu! 
Psalms150:5 Mumuhimbise n'eshandaazo zirikukwaya; mumuhimbise n'eshandaazo zirikugamba munonga! 
Psalms150:6 K'ebiine omwitsyo byona bihimbise Nyakubaho! Haleluya! 
Proverbs1:1 Enfumu za Solomooni mutabani wa Daudi, omugabe wa Isiraeli," 
Proverbs1:2 ezirikuhabura abantu obwengye n'emitwarize mirungi, n'amakuru g'ebigambo ebireeta okwetegyereza;" 
Proverbs1:3 kandi ezirikwegyesa obwengye bw'okukora eby'okuhikiirira, eby'oburyo, n'eby'obwinganisa;" 
Proverbs1:4 ngu omushema abone kwetegyereza, n'abarikunyeeta batungye obwengye n'okwekyengyera;" 
Proverbs1:5 n'omunyabwengye nawe ahurikize, kandi ayeyongyere kwega; haza orikwetegyereza agire engoga," 
Proverbs1:6 abone kushoborokyerwa enfumu, eby'okurengyeza, ebigambo by'abanyabwengye, n'ebishaakuzo byabo." 
Proverbs1:7 Okutiina Nyakubaho kuba ntandikiro y'obwengye; ebifamutima bigaya bwengye n'okwegyesibwa. 
Proverbs1:8 Mwana wangye, hurira ebi sho arikukuhabura, kandi otanga ebi nyoko arikukwegyesa;" 
Proverbs1:9 ahabw'okuba ebyo n'eihunde aha mutwe gwawe, kandi n'orukwanzi omu maraka gaawe." 
Proverbs1:10 Mwana wangye, abasiisi ku barikwosya, otariikiriza." 
Proverbs1:11 Ku barigira bati: Ija tugyende, tugwere ab'okwita, ija tugwere abataine rubanja," 
Proverbs1:12 tubamirire kimwe bahuriire, nk'oku owa Nyamuteza emira abashuuma okuzimu;" 
Proverbs1:13 turyagwa aha bintu by'obuguzi bwingi, twijuze amaka gaitu eminyago;" 
Proverbs1:14 ija okwatanise naitwe, twena tugire enshaho emwe." 
Proverbs1:15 Mwana wangye, otarigyenda nabo; garura ekigyere enyima, orugye omu muhanda gwabo;" 
Proverbs1:16 ahabw'okuba bataragaza kukora ebibi, kandi beehuuta kusheesha eshagama." 
Proverbs1:17 Ahabw'okuba okutega enyonyi ekigoye neekireeba n'okweruhiza busha. 
Proverbs1:18 Nibagwera amagara gaabo, kugacwekyereza." 
Proverbs1:19 Abatunga ebintu omu kwambura abandi nikwo baba. Ababitunga batyo bibaita. 
Proverbs1:20 Bwengye naayamuriza omu nguuto z'orurembo, naateerera akaari omu butare." 
Proverbs1:21 Naayeta ayemereire aha mutwe gw'ebisiika, naayetera aha nteeraniro z'emihanda, agambira aha marembo g'orurembo, ati:" 
Proverbs1:22 Imwe bashema 'mwe, muryaherera hi kukunda kuguma muri abashema? Abashungi baryahitsya hi kuguma nibashemerererwa okubashekyerera, kandi ebifamutima biryahitsya hi okwanga obwengye?" 
Proverbs1:23 Mute omutima aha bi ndikubahana, reeba, naaza kubashumururira ebi ndikuteekateeka, mbamanyise ebigambo byangye." 
Proverbs1:24 Manya mbeetsire, mwayanga kumpurikiza; kandi ngoroire omukono, mwahugaho." 
Proverbs1:25 Ebi mbahabwire byona mubigayire, ebi mbahanire byona timwabyetaho." 
Proverbs1:26 Ku muriitwa enaku ndyabashekyeerera, obwoba ku buribacwa enkizi, ndyabashunga." 
Proverbs1:27 Ku muriitwa obwoba nk'abaateerwa eihunga ry'empangukano, akagwe kakabagwera nk'abaizirwa akasooroora, naanye ndyabakuneetera." 
Proverbs1:28 Haza baryantakira, mbeetsize; baryayehenenga nibansherura, kwonka tibarimbona." 
Proverbs1:29 Ahabw'okuba bakanga obwengye, tibasiima kutiina Nyakubaho," 
Proverbs1:30 n'ebi naabahabwire baabyanga; kandi byona ebi naabateisize baabigaya. 
Proverbs1:31 N'ahabw'ekyo egabo yaabo eryaruga omu mitwarize yaabo, kandi banihe emize yaabo mibi." 
Proverbs1:32 Manya ekiita abashema n'okwehabya; kandi ekiita ebikaaka n'omurondogoro. 
Proverbs1:33 Kwonka omuntu orimpurikiza, aryabukaara, agogyeera, ataine kabi ku arikutiina." 
Proverbs2:1 Mwana wangye, ku oriikiriza ebigambo byangye, okata omutima aha biragiro byangye," 
Proverbs2:2 okahurikiza eby'obwengye, kandi okata omutima gwawe aha kwetegyereza;" 
Proverbs2:3 eego, ku orihoogyera okumanya, okateera akaari nooshaba ngu oyetegyereze;" 
Proverbs2:4 okakusherura nk'efeeza, okakuronda nk'eitungo ryesherekire;" 
Proverbs2:5 obwo oryayetegyereza okutiina Nyakubaho, kandi omanye Ruhanga." 
Proverbs2:6 Ahakuba Nyakubaho niwe aheereza obwengye; okumanya n'okwetegyereza biruga omu kanwa ke. 
Proverbs2:7 Abahikiriire ababiikira obwengye buhikire, abatwaza gye, ababeera engabo;" 
Proverbs2:8 areeberera emihanda y'obwinganisa, hamwe n'omuhanda gw'abahikiriire be." 
Proverbs2:9 Reero oryayetegyereza okuhikiirira, obwinganisa, n'oburingaaniza na buri kahanda karungi;" 
Proverbs2:10 ahabw'okuba obwengye buryaija omu mutima gwawe, kandi bukugwise gye n'amagara gaawe gashemerererwe okumanya;" 
Proverbs2:11 okwekyengyera kukureeberere, n'okwetegyereza kukurinde;" 
Proverbs2:12 bikwihe omu muhanda gw'obubi n'omu bantu abarikugamba ebirikuhabisa," 
Proverbs2:13 abatsigaho emihanda y'okuhikiirira, bakatoora ey'omwirima," 
Proverbs2:14 abeesiimirana okukora kubi, bakashemerererwa okugomera omu bibi;" 
Proverbs2:15 abatoora emihanda ekiikami, kandi ababa engobya omu migirire yaabo." 
Proverbs2:16 Oryakira omukazi enshambani, rwariire-enshoni, oyegambisa karimi karungi," 
Proverbs2:17 otsigaho iba ow'omunyeeto gwe, akeebwa endagaano ya Ruhanga we." 
Proverbs2:18 Ahakuba ow'ogwo mukazi hanaga okuzimu owa rufu, n'emihanda y'owe eza omu bafu;" 
Proverbs2:19 abaza owe tihariho n'omwe ogaruka, kandi tibagaruka kubona muhanda gw'amagara." 
Proverbs2:20 N'ahabw'ekyo ogume otoore omuhanda gw'abarungi, kandi ohamire omu mihanda y'abahikiriire." 
Proverbs2:21 Ahabw'okuba abahikiriire baryatuura omu nsi, n'abataine kamogo bagigumemu;" 
Proverbs2:22 kwonka ababi baryagicuubwamu, n'endeebya zimarwemu." 
Proverbs3:1 Mwana wangye, oteebwa ebi ndikukwegyesa, kureka omutima gwawe gugume gukwate ebiragiro byangye:" 
Proverbs3:2 ahabw'okuba biryakureetera okuramaara n'obugwagye. 
Proverbs3:3 Otariteishuka amazima n'obwesigwa; obijware omu maraka; 
Proverbs3:4 obihandiikye omu mutima. Nibwo orikundwa, okasiimwa Ruhanga n'abantu." 
Proverbs3:5 Yesigye Nyakubaho n'omutima gwawe gwona, otakaayesiga obwengye bwawe." 
Proverbs3:6 Omu bi orikukora byona omwijukye; nawe naija kuboneza emihanda yaawe. 
Proverbs3:7 Orekye kwegira omunyabwengye; otiine Nyakubaho, oyeshumbe ekibi." 
Proverbs3:8 Ekyo kiryatambira omubiri gwawe; kiruhuure amagufa gaawe. 
Proverbs3:9 Yejunise ebi oine n'emiganuro yaawe kuha Nyakubaho ekitiinwa. 
Proverbs3:10 Obwo, ebitara byawe biryaijurira kimwe, n'enteerero zaawe ziijure viino." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwana wangye, otarigaya ebi Nyakubaho arikukuhana, nari okatamwa ebi arikukuteisa." 
Proverbs3:12 Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho ahana ou akunda, nk'oku ishe mwana ahana omutabani omunanura." 
Proverbs3:13 Ozoora obwengye n'omuhiirwa, kandi otunga okwetegyereza nawe ahiiriirwe;" 
Proverbs3:14 ahabw'okuba omugasho ogurimu nigukira ogwa feeza, kandi amagoba agarimu nigakira aga zaabu." 
Proverbs3:15 Obwengye n'obw'obuguzi bwingi kukira eruuru, kandi tihariho eki oyetenga ekirikubwerenga." 
Proverbs3:16 Okumereera kuri omu mukono gwabwo gwa buryo, kandi obutungi n'ekitiinwa biburi omu gwa bumosho." 
Proverbs3:17 Emihanda yaabwo n'emihanda y'obugwagye, n'ebibari byabwo byona n'eby'obusingye." 
Proverbs3:18 Ababumbatiza obwengye bubabeera enyomyo y'amagara, ababuramataho beetwa abahiirwa." 
Proverbs3:19 Nyakubaho akahangisa ensi obwengye, n'eiguru yaarihamisa okwetegyereza." 
Proverbs3:20 Okumanya kwe kukareetera enyanja kutuuhuuka okuzimu, n'ebicu kutoonyerera." 
Proverbs3:21 Mwana wangye, guma n'obwengye buhikire, n'okwekyengyera; otaribireka bikakurugaho," 
Proverbs3:22 kandi biryakubeera amagara n'eihunde ry'amaraka gaawe. 
Proverbs3:23 Reero oryagyenda buhooro omuhanda gwawe, otateire ntsibo;" 
Proverbs3:24 ku orishutama, toritiina; ku oribyama, oryagwejegyera oturo tunuzire." 
Proverbs3:25 Otatiina okukangwa nari okucwekyerezibwa kw'abasiisi kwabaho; 
Proverbs3:26 ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho aryakugumya akurinde, ngu otakaagwa omu mutego." 
Proverbs3:27 Otariima omuntu ekimushemereire waaba n'okibaasa. 
Proverbs3:28 Otarigira mutaahi waawe oti: Irooko ogarukye nyencakare, nkikuhe, kunu okiine." 
Proverbs3:29 Otaricumira enaama mbi mugyenzi waawe okutwire haihi nimwesigana. 
Proverbs3:30 Otaritonganisiza busha omuntu ataine ki akushobeize. 
Proverbs3:31 Otarigirira eihari ekihaze, kandi otaritooreza emitwarize yaakyo;" 
Proverbs3:32 ahabw'okuba okora ebibi nkana, aba ekihagaro ahari Nyakubaho; kwonka abahikiriire, Nyakubaho abashuuruurira enaama ze." 
Proverbs3:33 Omukyeeno gwa Nyakubaho gugwera enju y'omubi; kwonka eka y'abahikiriire agiha omugisha. 
Proverbs3:34 Ashunga abashungi, kwonka abeecureeza abagirira embabazi;" 
Proverbs3:35 abanyabwengye baryahungura ekitiinwa, haza ebifamutima bihemukye." 
Proverbs4:1 Baana bangye, muhurire ebi shoimwe arikubahabura, mubiteho omutima, mubone kwetegyereza gye." 
Proverbs4:2 Ahabw'okuba ebi ndikubahabura ni birungi; mutanga ebi ndikubeegyesa. 
Proverbs4:3 Obu naabaire nkiri omwana, nyine tata, ndi muto, omwana omwe nyamunegyere omu maisho ga maawe," 
Proverbs4:4 tata akaanyegyesa, naagira ati: Ebigambo byangye obigumye aha mutima gwawe, orinde ebiragiro byangye, kandi otungye amagara;" 
Proverbs4:5 oteebwa, kandi otateishuka aha bi ndikugamba. Gira obwengye; oyetegyereze." 
Proverbs4:6 Otakaabwanga; nibwija kukugumyaho; obukunde, nibwija kukurinda." 
Proverbs4:7 Entandikiro y'obwengye n'egi: Gira obwengye; nobu waakugira ki, gira obwengye." 
Proverbs4:8 Obukundire kimwe, nibwija kukutunguura; waabufumbata nibwija kukureetera ekitiinwa." 
Proverbs4:9 Buryakuta eihunde rirungi aha mutwe, bukujwekye ekirunga nyamurungi." 
Proverbs4:10 Mwana wangye, hurira kandi oikirize ebi ndikugamba, obone kumara emyaka mingi." 
Proverbs4:11 Naakwegyesa oku oraatungye obwengye; naakurabya omu mihanda ehikire. 
Proverbs4:12 Omu kugyenda toritsibaaza; omu kwirukanga toriteera ntsibo. 
Proverbs4:13 Hamira aha bi naakuhabura, otaribireka; obirinde, ahabw'okuba nigo magara gaawe." 
Proverbs4:14 Otaritoora akahanda k'ababi, kandi otariraba omu muhanda gw'enkozi z'ebibi." 
Proverbs4:15 Gwetantare; otagutoora; guteishukye, haza ogumizemu." 
Proverbs4:16 Manya bo, tibagwejegyera batakakozire kibi; tibagira turo baaba batakategire muntu bakamugwisa." 
Proverbs4:17 Ahabw'okuba barya ebyokurya by'obubi, kandi banywa viino y'obuzigu." 
Proverbs4:18 Kwonka omuhanda gw'abahikiriire ni nk'omushana gw'akasheeshe, oguguma nigweyongyera kwaka gukahika omu ihangwe." 
Proverbs4:19 Omuhanda gw'enkozi z'ebibi ni nk'omwirima ndindindi; tibamanya n'eki baateeraho entsibo. 
Proverbs4:20 Mwana wangye, ta omutima aha bigambo byangye; otegye okutu ebi ndikugamba." 
Proverbs4:21 Otabihugaho bikeeba, bigumye aha mutima." 
Proverbs4:22 Ahabw'okuba obizoora bimuha amagara, kandi bitambira omubiri gwe gwona." 
Proverbs4:23 Rinda omutima gwawe n'amaani gaawe goona, ahabw'okuba enshuro z'amagara nimwo ziruga." 
Proverbs4:24 Yeshumbe emigambire etahikire kandi yetantare emigambire y'ebishuba. 
Proverbs4:25 Reebera kimwe omumaisho, kandi amaisho gaawe obe niyo waagagumya." 
Proverbs4:26 Yetegyereze omuhanda gw'ebigyere byawe, reero emihanda yaawe yoona neija kuhama." 
Proverbs4:27 Otagwera buryo nari bumosho; yetantare obubi. 
Proverbs5:1 Mwana wangye, ta omutima aha bwengye bwangye, otegye okutu eby'okwetegyereza byangye." 
Proverbs5:2 Obone kuguma nooyekyengyera, n'ebi orikugamba byorekye obwengye," 
Proverbs5:3 ahabw'okuba eminwa y'omukazi omushambani etoonya obwoki, n'ebigambo bye nibiterera okukira amajuta," 
Proverbs5:4 kwonka aha muheru ashaarira nk'omuravunga, atyarize nka rurara y'amoogi abiri." 
Proverbs5:5 Ebigyere bye bishuuma owa Rufu; entambwe ze zitoora akahanda k'owa Nyamuteza. 
Proverbs5:6 Tayeta ha kahanda k'amagara; ekye kiba okuzengyerera, kwonka tarikukimanya." 
Proverbs5:7 Mbwenu mwana wangye, mpuririza, haza otatsigisibwa ebi ndikugamba." 
Proverbs5:8 Omukazi nk'ogwo omwetantare kandi otarihika haihi n'omurayango gw'enju ye," 
Proverbs5:9 ekitiinwa kyawe okakiheereza abandi kandi emyaka yaawe okagiha abataine mbabazi; 
Proverbs5:10 abatarikumanywa batakaakumara amaani, n'ebi waahendekyeire bikatungwa abanyamahari;" 
Proverbs5:11 kandi aha muheru gw'amagara gaawe, okagaaya waahwaire aha magufa," 
Proverbs5:12 okeefuuza oti: Ekyanzibiire kuhanwa, nkanga kuteisibwa!" 
Proverbs5:13 Nkanga kuhurira abeegyesa bangye n'okutega okutu abarikumpabuura. 
Proverbs5:14 Nkaba ndi haihi kuhwerekyererera ahu abantu bateeraniire. 
Proverbs5:15 Nywa amaizi g'eiziba ryawe, amaizi agarikusheneneka nigaruga omu iziba eryawe ahabwawe eri oyefukuriire." 
Proverbs5:16 Mbwenu shi, enshuro zaawe zishemereire kutaataanira oku n'oku, zikaba emigyera y'amaizi omu nguuto?" 
Proverbs5:17 Ka gabe agaawe wenka, abanyamahanga batagabaganaho." 
Proverbs5:18 Enshuro yaawe k'eheebwe omugisha, kandi oshemerererwe omukazi w'omunyeeto gwawe," 
Proverbs5:19 ebuguma y'empara erikurigirwa, ey'esirabo erikukugwisa gye. Buri kaanya oburungi bwe ka bugume bukwijwize okushemererwa, rukundo ye egume ekufumbatiire." 
Proverbs5:20 Mwana wangye, ahanki n'ofumbatirwa omukazi enshambani kandi okafumbata rwariire enshoni?" 
Proverbs5:21 Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho amanya emihanda y'omuntu kandi ayetegyereza n'otuhanda twe twona. 
Proverbs5:22 Ebicumuro by'enkozi y'ebibi bimutega, kandi akwatirwa omu kigoye ky'ebibi bye." 
Proverbs5:23 Ekimwita n'okuteezibira; kandi ahabw'obufamutima bwe ahwerekyerera. 
Proverbs6:1 Mwana wangye, ku oryemererera mutaahi waawe, okeehayo nk'omusingo ahabw'ou otarikumanya;" 
Proverbs6:2 bwanyima okashanga ebi waagambire bikunagire omu mutego, okwatiirwe omu bigambo byawe." 
Proverbs6:3 Obwo, mwana wangye, twaza oti, oyejune; manya nooba oyetaire omu bushoboorozi bwa mutaahi waawe; gyenda nooyehuuta, oyeshengyereze mutaahi waawe;" 
Proverbs6:4 otakaikiriza kutwarwa oturo, nari ebitsigye byawe kukwatana." 
Proverbs6:5 Yejune nk'oku enzaza eyejuna omuhiigi, kandi nk'oku enyonyi esyoka omu ngaro z'ogitegire." 
Proverbs6:6 Mweremwa 'we, za ow'encebebe, oyetegyereze oku etwaza, kandi obe ow'obwengye." 
Proverbs6:7 Nobu etagira mwebembezi nari nyampara, nobu yaakuba omutegyeki," 
Proverbs6:8 eyehunikira ebyokurya omu kyanda, kandi omu ishaaruura eyeshangururiza eby'okugitunga." 
Proverbs6:9 Iwe mweremwa 'we oryabyama aho ohitsye hi? Oryasisiimuka ryari kuruga omu turo twawe? 
Proverbs6:10 Okugwejegyeraho kakye, okahungiraho kaingana busha, okahinyira kakye emikono aha kifuba kuhuumura," 
Proverbs6:11 nibwo obworo burikwizira nk'ekizengyerezi, n'obukyene bukutaahirire nk'omuntu ohagatiire ebikwato." 
Proverbs6:12 Omuntu otaine mugasho kandi ekibuzaburyo agyenda naabuzya orukuru," 
Proverbs6:13 aitira abandi eriisho, ashezya ebigyere, atunga abandi orukumu," 
Proverbs6:14 acuma enaama mbi n'omutima gw'obugobya, atuurira okubiba entongani." 
Proverbs6:15 N'ahabw'ekyo akagwe karyamugwera ekitaraariraine; aryagwa ahonaaho atakibaasa kutambirwa. 
Proverbs6:16 Hariho ebintu mukaaga ebi Nyakubaho anuga, mushanju ebi anugira kimwe; nibyo ebi:" 
Proverbs6:17 Amaisho g'amaryo, orurimi endyarya, engaro ezisheesha eshagama y'otaine rubanja," 
Proverbs6:18 omutima ogucuma enaama mbi, ebigyere ebyehuuta kukora ekibi," 
Proverbs6:19 mushinja otaine mazima, ofukunkura ebishuba, kandi kateerana nganda." 
Proverbs6:20 Mwana wangye, okwate ekiragiro kya sho, n'ebi nyoko arikukwegyesa otaribyehuzya." 
Proverbs6:21 Obutoosha obigumye aha mutima; obyekome omu maraka," 
Proverbs6:22 waaba noogyenda bikwebembere, bikurinde obyami; reero omu oraasisiimukye, bikugaaniirire." 
Proverbs6:23 Ahabw'okuba ekiragiro kiba etabaaza, kandi okwegyesa kuba omushana; n'amateeka g'emicwe guba omuhanda gw'amagara," 
Proverbs6:24 ogukurinda omukazi mubi, karimi karungi, rwariire enshoni." 
Proverbs6:25 Otaryetenga oburungi bwe bw'omubiri, kandi atarikutwara omutima ahabw'engohe z'amaisho ge." 
Proverbs6:26 Manya maraaya abaasa kugurwa akacweka k'omugaati, kwonka omukazi enshambani anaga amagara g'omushaija omu kabi." 
Proverbs6:27 Mbwenu omuntu akaatwarira omuriro aha kifuba, haza emyenda ye etasye?" 
Proverbs6:28 Nari shi akaagyendera aha makara garikwaka, ebigyere bye bitababukye?" 
Proverbs6:29 N'ahabw'ekyo, n'obyama na muka mutaahi we, nikwo aba; tihariho orimukoozaho otarifubirwa." 
Proverbs6:30 Mbwenu shi abantu tibagaya omushuma oiba kwemara omugombo n'enjara? 
Proverbs6:31 Kandi ku akwatwa, ariha emirundi mushanju, ahayo ebi aine omu ka ye byona." 
Proverbs6:32 Oshambana n'omukazi w'ondiijo aba ekifamutima; okikora ayecwekyereza. 
Proverbs6:33 Aihamu obuhuta n'okuhemuka, kandi ekihemu kye tikirimurugaho." 
Proverbs6:34 Ahabw'okuba obufuuhi bureetera omushaija ekishinjo, kandi ku aza kuhoora enzigu tasaasira." 
Proverbs6:35 Taikiriza mpongano; haza nobu waakumuha ebihembo bingi bita, ekyo tikikaamwikaikanisa." 
Proverbs7:1 Mwana wangye, rinda ebi ndikukugambira. Kandi okwate ebiragiro byangye." 
Proverbs7:2 Kwata ebiragiro byangye haza ogire amagara, ebi ndikukwegyesa obirinde nk'emboni y'eriisho ryawe;" 
Proverbs7:3 obikomere aha nkumu zaawe, obihandiikye aha mutima gwawe." 
Proverbs7:4 Gambira bwengye oti: Ori munyaanyazi; kandi okwetegyereza okwete munywani waawe w'aha mara," 
Proverbs7:5 bikurinde omukazi enshambani, karimi karungi, rwariire enshoni." 
Proverbs7:6 Manya ku naabaire ndi aha idirisa ry'enju yangye, naayozya amaisho omu bihengyere byaryo;" 
Proverbs7:7 naaranzya abatsigazi abashema; omuribo naareebamu omutsigazi ekifamutima," 
Proverbs7:8 ari omu muhanda naatoora ow'enju y'ogwo mukazi, haza ari haihi kuhikayo," 
Proverbs7:9 guri omwabazyo gw'orwitawaabo, nibuza kukwatana." 
Proverbs7:10 Haa! Omukazi ojwaire nka maraaya, oijwire n'oburyarya, atyo amubugabugana." 
Proverbs7:11 Akaba ari omukazi orikurogoijoka, ekyegyengye kandi ekizengyerezi;" 
Proverbs7:12 obundi ngugwo omu nguuto, obundi ngugwo omu butare, ategyerereize ahari ibara keekubo." 
Proverbs7:13 Atyo anywegyera ogwo mutsigazi, reero amugambira ataine nshoni, ati:" 
Proverbs7:14 Mbaire ndi ow'okutamba ebitambo; mbwenu eri izooba ebi naahigire naabihikiiriza; 
Proverbs7:15 mbwenu hati naija kukubugana ninkusherura nkwiniire orushusho rwingi, haza naakubona." 
Proverbs7:16 Ekitabo kyangye naakihunda ebyeshweko by'ebitambi by'amabara, eby'emyenda ya Misiri;" 
Proverbs7:17 ekitanda kyangye naakyotera n'obubaani, n'obunyaanunga, kandi n'emigaju." 
Proverbs7:18 Ija tufumbatane, turaare niturigirana busheeshe, tukundane twenanure, twemare akaturi aha mutima." 
Proverbs7:19 Manya ibanye tarimu, agiire hare;" 
Proverbs7:20 atwaire enshaho y'empiiha, aryagaruka okwezi kwaba ekizooro." 
Proverbs7:21 Amuringaringa atyo n'ebigambo bingi by'oburyarya, amubeihabeihesa karimi karungi naamwotereza." 
Proverbs7:22 Ahonaaho nyamutsigazi amurandaho, amukurata, nk'enumi erikuza omu ibaagiro, nari nk'ekishwaga ekyagwa omu mutego, gukakitunenga," 
Proverbs7:23 omwambi gukakifumura amara; nk'oku enyonyi esyokayo ekagwa omu mutego, nawe tarikumanya ku yaaza kuhwerekyerererayo." 
Proverbs7:24 Mbwenu nu, mwana wangye, mpurikiza, ote omutima aha bigambo byangye." 
Proverbs7:25 Omukazi nk'ogwo atarikutwara omutima, okahungutukira omu mihanda ye;" 
Proverbs7:26 ahabw'okuba akyengyeize baingi; haza abu aitsire boona, n'eihe rihango." 
Proverbs7:27 Enju ye n'omuhanda oguza owa Nyamuteza, gukashuuma omu butuuro bwa rufu." 
Proverbs8:1 Mbwenu shi Bwengye tayeta, na Kwetegyereza akaamuza?" 
Proverbs8:2 Bwengye ayemereire aha mitwe y'ebibungo, aha rubaju rw'omuhanda, n'omu nteeraniro y'emihanda;" 
Proverbs8:3 niho ayemereire, aheeru y'orurembo, n'ahu emihanda etaahira omu rubuga, niho ayema kuteerera orwari ati:" 
Proverbs8:4 Bantu 'mwe, nimbeeta, okuranguuza kwangye kuhikye ibara muntu." 
Proverbs8:5 Imwe bantu 'mwe, abatakeetegyereize, mwegye okwekyengyera. Imwe bifamutima 'mwe, muteho omutima." 
Proverbs8:6 Muhurire, ahabw'okuba ninza kugamba ebintu by'ekitiinwa, n'eminwa yangye egambe ebihikire;" 
Proverbs8:7 ahabw'okuba akanwa kangye nikaza kugamba amazima; ekibi n'omuziro aha minwa yangye. 
Proverbs8:8 Byona ebi ngamba bihikire; tibibamu kuryangatanisa, tibibamu kihugami." 
Proverbs8:9 Nibishoboorekyera weena orikwetegyereza, kandi, aha barikubimanya, bihikire." 
Proverbs8:10 Mwikirize ebi ndikubahabura okukira efeeza, n'obwengye bwangye okukira zaabu empuuhe;" 
Proverbs8:11 ahabw'okuba obwengye nibuhita amabaare g'eruuru; tihariho kyona eki oyetenga, ekirikubwerenga." 
Proverbs8:12 Nyowe Bwengye ntuura omu kwetegyereza, kandi nyine okumanya n'okwerinda." 
Proverbs8:13 Okutiina Nyakubaho kuba okwanga ekibi. Nyanga okwetunguura, n'amaryo, n'emitwarize mibi, kandi n'okugamba ebirikuhabisa." 
Proverbs8:14 Enaama z'oburyo n'okuhabura okuhikire n'ebyangye; niinyetegyereza kandi nyine amaani. 
Proverbs8:15 Ahabwangye, abagabe bategyeka, n'abategyeki baragiira eby'obwinganisa;" 
Proverbs8:16 ahabwangye, abanyiginya bategyeka, n'ab'ebitiinwa bategyeka ensi." 
Proverbs8:17 Abankunda naanye mbakunda; kandi abansherura n'omuhimbo, bambona." 
Proverbs8:18 Nyine obutungi n'ekitiinwa, n'okuganagana okutarihwaho, kandi n'obwinganisa." 
Proverbs8:19 Ebizaaruka omuriinye bihita zaabu, nangwa n'ezaabu empuuhe, n'ebi nshaaruura nibihita efeeza etoorainwe." 
Proverbs8:20 Ntoora omuhanda gw'okuhikiirira, n'omu burari bw'oburingaaniza," 
Proverbs8:21 ndikugaigahaza abankunda, kandi ndikwijuza amabiikiro gaabo." 
Proverbs8:22 Nyakubaho akampanga aha kutandika emirimo ye; naabandiza ebi yaakozire ira; 
Proverbs8:23 nyowe nkateebwaho ira na ira, omu kubanza ensi etakabaireho." 
Proverbs8:24 Nyowe nkazaarwa amayanja g'okuzimu gatakabaireho, n'enshuro zitakahimintikire maizi." 
Proverbs8:25 Nkazaarwa enshozi n'emigongo bitakahangirwe; 
Proverbs8:26 Nyakubaho atakahangire nsi n'emisiri yaamwo, nobu gwakuba omucuucu gw'ensi ogw'okubanza." 
Proverbs8:27 Obu yaakora orukanga rw'eiguru, nkaba ndiho; nobu yaataho emyegyeego y'amayanja." 
Proverbs8:28 Obu yaahamya eiguru omu kaabunga, nobu yaataho enshuro okuzimu," 
Proverbs8:29 nobu yaataho omwatano gw'enyanja, ngu amaizi gatarirenga ahi yaagaragiire, n'obu yaataho emisingi y'ensi," 
Proverbs8:30 obwo nkaba muri aha rubaju, nk'omufundi nyakabara; kandi buri izooba nkaba mugwisa gye, niinyesiimira omu maisho ge obutoosha," 
Proverbs8:31 niinyesiimira omu nsi ye etuurwamu, kandi ninshemerererwa ibara muntu." 
Proverbs8:32 Mbwenu nu, baana bangye, nimumpurire. Baine omugisha abaguma omu mihanda yangye." 
Proverbs8:33 Muhurire ebihaburo byangye, mube abanyabwengye, kandi mutaribyehuzya." 
Proverbs8:34 Omuntu ompurikiza, akaguma aha marembo gangye buri izooba naareeba, ategyerereize aha biti by'emiryango yangye, aine omugisha." 
Proverbs8:35 Ahakuba weena ombona biri aboine amagara, kandi atunga obushongore ahari Nyakubaho;" 
Proverbs8:36 kwonka ompemukaho, aita amagara ge; weena onyanga ayetooranira rufu." 
Proverbs9:1 Bwengye ayombekire enju ye, yaatamu enyomyo mushanju." 
Proverbs9:2 Abaagire amatungo ge, yaatebeekanisa viino ye, yaatebeekanisa emeeza ye." 
Proverbs9:3 Ayohereize abazaana be omu myanya mikuru y'omu rurembo kweta bati: 
Proverbs9:4 Weena ow'obwengye bukye aija aha! Kandi weena otaine bwengye naamugira ati: 
Proverbs9:5 Ija orye omugaati gwangye kandi onywe viino i ntebeekaniise. 
Proverbs9:6 Murekye obushema, mugire amagara, kandi mugyende nimutooza okwetegyereza." 
Proverbs9:7 Ohana omugayani, ayejumisa; kandi oteisa omuntu enyabibi ayereetera ekihemu." 
Proverbs9:8 Otariteisa omugayani, akagwanga; teisa omunyabwengye, naija kukukunda." 
Proverbs9:9 Habura omunyabwengye, naija kweyongyera kuba omunyabwengye. Yegyesa omuntu ohikiriire, naija kweyongyera kwetegyereza." 
Proverbs9:10 Okutiina Nyakubaho kuba entandikiro y'obwengye; kandi okumanya Orikwera kuba okwetegyereza. 
Proverbs9:11 Ahabw'okuba niinye ndikanyisa ebiro byawe, nkongyera emyaka y'amagara gaawe." 
Proverbs9:12 Waaba ori omunyabwengye, biri obwo nooyegasira, kwonka ku orikuba omukuneetsi noorwemarira." 
Proverbs9:13 Omukazi ekifamutima atokoorekana, aba omunyarwanju, kandi tagira nshoni." 
Proverbs9:14 Ashutama aha muryango gw'enju ye, arumbaara aha ntebe omu myanya mikuru y'orurembo," 
Proverbs9:15 naayeta abahinguzi abarikwegyendera emihanda yaabo, ati:" 
Proverbs9:16 Omushema weena aije aha! Kandi agambira otaine bwengye ati: 
Proverbs9:17 Amaizi g'enyibano ganuriirira, n'omugaati oguriibwa bwesherekye gunuzire." 
Proverbs9:18 Kwonka bo tibamanya ngu abafiire niyo bari, kandi ngu abagyenyi b'ogwo mukazi bari okuzimu owa Nyamuteza."
