Proverbs10:1 Omwana w'obwengye areetera ishe okushemererwa, kwonka otaine bwengye areetera nyina enaku." 
Proverbs10:2 Eitungo rirugire omu bibi tirigira mugasho, kwonka okuhikiirira kujuna omuntu rufu." 
Proverbs10:3 Nyakubaho tareka ohikiriire kwitwa enjara, kwonka omururu gw'ababi agubuza emihanda." 
Proverbs10:4 Emikono y'omweremwa emwitsa obworo, kwonka ey'omwecurengi emutungisa." 
Proverbs10:5 Omwana orundaana omu kyanda aba kakyengi, beitu ogwejegyera omu igyesha areeta ekihemu." 
Proverbs10:6 Omuntu ohikiriire agira emigisha, kwonka eminwa y'omubi eshwekyerera obuhaze." 
Proverbs10:7 Okwijuka ohikiriire kureeta emigisha, kwonka eiziina ry'omubi riryayeba." 
Proverbs10:8 Oine omutima gw'obwengye aikiriza ebiragiro, kwonka ekifamutima ekigambisibwa kiryahwerekyerera." 
Proverbs10:9 Okuratira amazima agyenda buhooro; kwonka okora ebihabire aryareebwa butunu. 
Proverbs10:10 Oitira abandi eriisho areeta omurabanamu, kwonka ohana ataine kutiina areeta obusingye." 
Proverbs10:11 Akanwa k'ohikiriire kaba enshuro y'amagara, kwonka akanwa k'enyabibi kahunika obwinazi." 
Proverbs10:12 Rwango eimukiriza endwano; rukundo eshwekyerera ebishobyo byona. 
Proverbs10:13 Akanwa k'orikwetegyereza kaitururuka obwengye; kwonka omugongo gw'omuntu otarikwetegyereza gutuurira enkoni. 
Proverbs10:14 Abanyabwengye beehunikira obwengye; kwonka ekifamutima ekirikuregyeta kyeshombera akagwe. 
Proverbs10:15 Eitungo ry'omutungi riba obwambizo bwe; kwonka abakyene baitwa obworo, bainara." 
Proverbs10:16 Enzimuurano y'ohikiriire eba amagara, kwonka ekihembo ky'omubi kiba okukora ebihagaro." 
Proverbs10:17 Ota omutima aha kuhaburwa aza omu muhanda gw'amagara, kwonka oyanga kuhanwa ayehabagiza." 
Proverbs10:18 Oshereka rwango aba omunyakishuba, kandi ogambuura abandi naababeiherera aba ekifamutima." 
Proverbs10:19 Engambi ya maingi tebura ki eshobize; kwonka orinda akanwa ke aba kakyengi. 
Proverbs10:20 Orurimi rw'ohikiriire ruba efeeza empuuhe; kwonka ebiteekateeko by'enyabibi tibigira muhoho. 
Proverbs10:21 Ebi ohikiriire agamba biba egabo ya baingi; kwonka abashema bafa ahabw'okuteetegyereza. 
Proverbs10:22 Omugisha gwa Nyakubaho gutungisa abantu, kwonka okwehenenga tikugwongyereraho kantu." 
Proverbs10:23 Ekifamutima kishemerererwa okukora ebibi, kwonka kakyengi emitwarize ye y'obwengye egwisa gye orikwetegyereza." 
Proverbs10:24 Eki enyabibi etiina kigigwera; kandi eki ohikiriire ayetenga akiheebwa. 
Proverbs10:25 Eihunga ku riteera riti, ritwara enyabibi, kwonka ohikiriire ahamire nk'omusingye ogutaritengyetsibwa ebiro byona." 
Proverbs10:26 Nk'oku viino encenku ereeta amangigina, kandi nk'oku omwika guhurura amaisho, n'abarikutuma omweremwa nikwo abagira atyo." 
Proverbs10:27 Okutiina Nyakubaho kuhangaaza amagara, kwonka emyaka y'omuntu mubi eryacuubwaho." 
Proverbs10:28 Amatsiko g'ohikiriire gahitsya aha kushemererwa; kwonka omusiisi ayesiga busha. 
Proverbs10:29 Nyakubaho niwe aba orugo rugumire aha muntu otwaza gye, kwonka enkozi z'ebibi azicwekyereza." 
Proverbs10:30 Ohikiriire taritengyetsibwa, kwonka ababi tibarimereera omu nsi." 
Proverbs10:31 Akanwa k'ohikiriire kagamba eby'obwengye, kwonka orurimi orugamba ebitahikire ruryacuubwaho." 
Proverbs10:32 Akanwa k'ohikiriire kaijwire obufura, kwonka akanwa k'enyabibi kagamba ebitaine buryo." 
Proverbs11:1 Nyakubaho ayanga eminzaani y'oburyangatanisa, kureka ashemerererwa endengo zihikire." 
Proverbs11:2 Okwetunguura kuzaara okuhemuka, kwonka obwengye bugirwa abeebundika." 
Proverbs11:3 Oburungi bw'abahikiriire bubooreka omuhanda; kwonka endeebya ziryacwekyerezibwa obugobya bwazo. 
Proverbs11:4 Aha izooba ry'ekiniga eitungo tirigira ki rigasha; kwonka okuhikiirira kutamba okufa. 
Proverbs11:5 Oburungi bw'ohikiriire bumushoronzya omu muhanda, kwonka obubi n'omutego mubi ogwita nyinagwo." 
Proverbs11:6 Abataine kamogo baryarokorwa okuhikiirira kwabo, kwonka enyabibi ziryaitwa okururuha kwazo." 
Proverbs11:7 Enyabibi ku efa, amatsiko gaayo gagarukira aho; kwonka amatsiko g'abatari bashongore ahari Ruhanga garugwamu busha." 
Proverbs11:8 Ohikiriire aihwa omu kabi, haza enyabibi eba niyo yaakagwamu." 
Proverbs11:9 Otatiina Ruhanga aitsa mutaahi we orurimi; kwonka abahikiriire batambirwa obwengye bwabo. 
Proverbs11:10 Abahikiriire ku baba gye, orurembo runanuka, kandi ababi ku bacwekyerera, habaho okwemurika." 
Proverbs11:11 Abahikiriire bareetera orurembo ekitiinwa, kwonka akanwa k'enyabibi karujuumika." 
Proverbs11:12 Ogaya mutaahi we tagira bwengye; kwonka orikwetegyereza aguma ahunami. 
Proverbs11:13 Obuzya orukuru ayata enaama; kwonka omwesigwa arinda ebi agambiirwe omu mubonano. 
Proverbs11:14 Eihanga ritaine mutegyeki rigwa, kwonka eriine abahabuzi baingi riba buhooro." 
Proverbs11:15 Okwatiriza ebye kwemererera ou atarikumanya aryayefuuza; kwonka oyanga kwemererera abandi, agira obusingye." 
Proverbs11:16 Omukazi w'emicwe mirungi aheebwa ekitiinwa, kandi abashaija abanyagisa amaani baryaba abatungi." 
Proverbs11:17 Omuntu efura ayegasira; kwonka omunyamwaga ayehutaaza. 
Proverbs11:18 Enkozi y'ebibi eheebwa ebihembo by'omuyaayuuko; kwonka okora eby'okuhikiirira aheebwa ebihembo by'amazima. 
Proverbs11:19 Osherura okuhikiirira aryagira amagara, kwonka okora bibi aryafa." 
Proverbs11:20 Abagira omutima gw'obutigi n'ekihagaro ahari Nyakubaho, kwonka abaine emitwarize etarikuhaahuuzibwa abashemerererwa." 
Proverbs11:21 Ohamize kimwe ngu enkozi y'ebibi teribura kufubirwa, kwonka abahikiriire bo baryarokoka." 
Proverbs11:22 Omukazi murungi omu kureebwa kwonka otarikwekyengyera, ni nk'empeta ya zaabu erikureereetera omu nyindo y'empunu." 
Proverbs11:23 Ebi ohikiriire ayetenga, omuheru gwabyo guba ebirungi bisha, kwonka amatsiko g'enyabibi gahereerukanwa kashanga." 
Proverbs11:24 Ogaba ebye n'obufura ayeyongyera kutunga; oima eki yaakugabire, aitwa obukyene." 
Proverbs11:25 Omuntu efura aryatunga; n'ofungurira abandi eky'okubaruhuura, nawe baryamuha eky'okumuruhuura." 
Proverbs11:26 Oima abandi ebyokurya by'omujuma, abantu bamukyeena, kwonka obibaguza aine emigisha." 
Proverbs11:27 Oyezirikira okusherura ebirungi, asherura okukundwa; kwonka osherura ekibi, ayeshombera akagwe." 
Proverbs11:28 Oyesiga eitungo rye aryahururuka; kwonka ohikiriire aryabereshera nk'amababi garikushebuka. 
Proverbs11:29 Oitsa ab'omu ka ye omwaga aryatsigaza bigahwa, kwonka ekifamutima kiryahakwa omunyabwengye." 
Proverbs11:30 Ebi ohikiriire akora biba enyomyo y'amagara, kwonka abakora eby'obwinazi bahwerekyerera." 
Proverbs11:31 Abahikiriire ku baraabe nibazimuurirwa bakiri omu nsi, enkozi y'ebibi n'omusiisi nibabura bata kufubirwa!" 
Proverbs12:1 Okunda kuhanwa biri akunzire obwengye. Oyanga kuteisibwa n'ekifamutima. 
Proverbs12:2 Omuntu murungi ashongoka ahari Nyakubaho, kwonka ocuma enaama mbi aba encuubwa ahari we." 
Proverbs12:3 Enkozi y'ebibi tegira buhamizo, kwonka abahikiriire batuura bahamire." 
Proverbs12:4 Omukazi w'omutima aba ekirunga kya iba; kwonka okora eby'okuhemura, n'obujunde omu magufa ga iba." 
Proverbs12:5 Ebiteekateeko by'abahikiriire biba eby'oburyo; kwonka okuconya kw'enyabibi kuba obureebya. 
Proverbs12:6 Ebigambo by'enyabibi biita, kwonka eby'abahikiriire bijuna abantu." 
Proverbs12:7 Enkozi z'ebibi ku zigwa, tiziimuka, kwonka ab'omuryango gw'abahikiriire bagumaho." 
Proverbs12:8 Omuntu asiimirwa okwetegyereza kwe; kwonka ebi ekifamutima kiteekyereza bigaywa. 
Proverbs12:9 Omunaku orikwetamika naakira omunyiginya otaine kyokurya. 
Proverbs12:10 Omuntu murungi ata omutima aha matungo ge, kwonka omubi tagagirira saasi." 
Proverbs12:11 Ohinga eshambu ye, atunga ebyokurya bingi; kwonka okuratira ebitaine muhoho aba ekifamutima." 
Proverbs12:12 Ebyetengo by'enkozi y'ebibi tibigira muhoho, kwonka emizi y'abahikiriire etuura ehamire." 
Proverbs12:13 Akanwa k'enkozi y'ebibi kaginaga omu kabi, kwonka ohikiriire akoogamu." 
Proverbs12:14 Ebi omuntu agamba bimuhaazya ebirungi, n'ebi akoresa emikono ye bimuzimuurirwa." 
Proverbs12:15 Ekifamutima obutoosha kiteekateeka ngu emitwarize yaakyo ehikire, kwonka omunyabwengye ahurira ebi barikumuhabura." 
Proverbs12:16 Ekiniga ky'ekifamutima kimanywa ahonaaho; kwonka orikwetegyereza takangwa bijumo ahonaaho. 
Proverbs12:17 Ogamba amazima aheereza obujurizi buhikire, kwonka omujurizi w'ebishuba agamba eby'obugobya." 
Proverbs12:18 Ogambira eryo, ebigambo bye bicumita nka rurara, kwonka orurimi rw'omunyabwengye rutamba." 
Proverbs12:19 Ogamba amazima aramaara, kwonka omunyabishuba amara akaanya kakye." 
Proverbs12:20 Obugobya butuura omu mitima y'abacuma enaama mbi, kwonka abaconya enaama nungi bashemererwa." 
Proverbs12:21 Ohikiriire tarihikwaho kabi; kwonka enyabibi ziryaitwa enaku nyingi. 
Proverbs12:22 Nyakubaho anuga ababeihi; kwonka abagamba amazima abakunda. 
Proverbs12:23 Orikwetegyereza tayeraatira bi arikumanya; kwonka ebifamutima birangaana obufamutima bwabyo. 
Proverbs12:24 Omukono gw'omweziriki guryategyeka, kwonka ogw'omweremwa guryakora eby'obuhuuku." 
Proverbs12:25 Obushoberwa butuntuza omuntu; kwonka akagambo karungi kamunanura. 
Proverbs12:26 Omuntu ohikiriire aruga omu bibi, kwonka omuhanda gw'enkozi z'ebibi guzihabisa." 
Proverbs12:27 Omweremwa taita ki ahiigire, kwonka omweziriki aryatunga eby'obuguzi bwingi." 
Proverbs12:28 Okuhikiirira kuba omuhanda gw'amagara, kwonka omuhanda ogutahikire gureeta okufa." 
Proverbs13:1 Omwana w'oburyo ahurira ishe, kwonka omugayani taikiriza kuhanwa." 
Proverbs13:2 Ebi omuntu murungi agamba bimubeera egabo; kwonka eki endeebya eyetenga n'okukora eby'obwinazi. 
Proverbs13:3 Orinda akanwa ke, arinda amagara ge; ogambira eryo ayeta omu kabi." 
Proverbs13:4 Omweremwa ayetenga munonga, haza atunga busha; kwonka omweziriki atunga bingi munonga." 
Proverbs13:5 Omuntu ohikiriire ayanga ebishuba; kwonka enyabibi ayetamisa, kandi ayehemura." 
Proverbs13:6 Okuhikiirira kurinda ow'emitwarize mirungi, kwonka ekibi kiita nyinakyo" 
Proverbs13:7 Hariho oyegira omutungi, kunu ari omworo; kandi hariho oyeeteera obworo, haza kunu atungire munonga." 
Proverbs13:8 Eitungo ry'omuntu niryo rimucungura. Kwonka omworo tagira ky'okumucungura 
Proverbs13:9 Orumuri rw'abahikiriire ruguma nirwaka, kwonka etabaaza y'ababi eryaraazibwa." 
Proverbs13:10 Amaryo gareetera abeekuniki kutuura nibarwana, kwonka abaikiriza kuhaburwa, bakora eby'obwengye." 
Proverbs13:11 Eitungo bugubugu rirahuka kutuuba, kwonka orirundaana mporampora arikanyisa." 
Proverbs13:12 Amatsiko gatahwaire garwaza omutima; kwonka ekirikwetengwa ku kiboneka, kihamya amagara." 
Proverbs13:13 Enyangakugambirwa eyecwekyereza; kwonka okuratira ekiragiro aheebwa ebihembo. 
Proverbs13:14 Ebi omunyabwengye ayegyesa biba enshuro y'amagara emureetera kwetantara emitego ya rufu. 
Proverbs13:15 Okwetegyereza gye kureetera omuntu kushongoka; kwonka emitwarize y'obugobya eyangisa nyinayo. 
Proverbs13:16 Byona ebi omunyabwengye akora abyetegyereza, kwonka ekifamutima kyoreka butunu obufamutima bwakyo." 
Proverbs13:17 Entumwa mbi enaga abantu omu kabi, kwonka entumwa erikwesigwa ebatambira." 
Proverbs13:18 Enyangakugambirwa eitwa obworo, kandi ehemuka, kwonka oikiriza kuhanwa atunga ekitiinwa." 
Proverbs13:19 Omuntu ku atunga eki arikwetenga ananuka; kwonka okureka ebibi kuba ekirikunugwa aha bifamutima. 
Proverbs13:20 Ogyenda n'abanyabwengye aba omunyabwengye, kwonka ogyenda n'ebigwagwa ayeta omu kabi." 
Proverbs13:21 Ebihikiirizi bigwera abasiisi; kwonka abahikiriire baryagogyeera. 
Proverbs13:22 Omuntu murungi atsigira abaijukuru n'abaijukuruza obuhunguzi; kwonka eitungo ry'omusiisi rihungurwa ohikiriire. 
Proverbs13:23 Amatsinde gu omworo ayerariize geeza ebyokurya bingi; kwonka bimarwaho okutagira buringaaniza. 
Proverbs13:24 Otateera mutabani biri amwanga, kwonka orikumukunda ayezirika kumuhana." 
Proverbs13:25 Ohikiriire agira eby'okumuhaazya, kwonka enda y'enyabibi tehaaga." 
Proverbs14:1 Omukazi w'obwengye ayombeka eka; kwonka ekifamutima kigyesheenyera n'emikono yaakyo. 
Proverbs14:2 Otwaza kurungi atiina Nyakubaho; kwonka endyarya emugaya. 
Proverbs14:3 Ebi ekifamutima kigamba biba enkoni ekiteera, kwonka akanwa k'abanyabwengye kabatambira." 
Proverbs14:4 Otaine ndaaho z'okuhingisa tahunika ngano, kwonka endaaho z'amaani zikanyisa omweru." 
Proverbs14:5 Omujurizi ohikire tabeiha, kwonka otari w'amazima ahurubura ebishuba." 
Proverbs14:6 Omugayani asherura obwengye, tabuzoora, kwonka orikwetegyereza arahuka kumanya." 
Proverbs14:7 Ruga aha kifamutima, ahabw'okuba tikikwiniire bigambo by'obwengye." 
Proverbs14:8 Omunyabwengye ayetegyereza emihanda ye; kwonka ebifamutima bihabagira. 
Proverbs14:9 Ruhanga agaya enkozi z'ebibi, kwonka abahikiriire baba abashongore ahri we." 
Proverbs14:10 Obusaasi bumanywa omutima, haza tihariho ondiijo omanya okushemererwa kwagwo." 
Proverbs14:11 Enju y'enkozi y'ebibi eryasheenyuka, kwonka enju y'ohikiriire eryagogyeera." 
Proverbs14:12 Obundi omuhanda ogu omuntu ateekateeka ngu ni murungi, nigwo gumwita." 
Proverbs14:13 N'omu kushemererwa harimu busaasi kandi omuheru gwakwo n'obujune. 
Proverbs14:14 Omuntu mubi aryaihurwa emitwarize ye, kandi omuntu murungi aryaihurwa ebi akozire." 
Proverbs14:15 Omushema aikiririza eryo, kwonka omunyabwengye agyenda naayetegyereza." 
Proverbs14:16 Omunyabwengye ayerinda, kandi ayetantara ekibi, kwonka ekifamutima kyo tikyerinda, kandi tikyefeerayo." 
Proverbs14:17 Orahuka kubakirwa akora eby'obushema, kwonka orikwekyengyera ayetwara." 
Proverbs14:18 Abashema baba ebifamutima, kwonka abarikwetegyereza bagira obwengye." 
Proverbs14:19 Enyabibi ziryainamira omu maisho g'abarungi, n'enkozi z'ebibi aha marembo g'abahikiriire." 
Proverbs14:20 Omworo na mutaahi we amwanga, kwonka omutungi agira emikago mingi." 
Proverbs14:21 Ogaya mutaahi we ashobya, kwonka ogirira abooro embabazi n'omuhiirwa." 
Proverbs14:22 Mbwenu shi abacuma enaama mbi tibashobya? Kwonka abacuma enaama nungi baryakorerwa eby'embabazi n'eby'obwesigwa. 
Proverbs14:23 Okwehenenga kugira omugasho, kwonka okuhugira omu bigaaniiro kuteera obworo." 
Proverbs14:24 Okwetegyereza kuba ekirunga ky'abanyabwengye, kwonka obufamutima buba eihunde ry'abataine bwengye." 
Proverbs14:25 Omujurizi omwesigwa ajuna amagara g'abantu, kwonka ogamba ebishuba aba endeebya." 
Proverbs14:26 Omu kutiina Nyakubaho omuntu aihamu obwesigye buhamire, kandi abaana be baryagira obuhungiro." 
Proverbs14:27 Okutiina Nyakubaho kuba enshuro y'amagara, kandi kureetera omuntu kwerinda emitego ya rufu." 
Proverbs14:28 Ekitiinwa ky'omugabe kiruga omu bwingi bw'abantu, kwonka omutegyeki otaine bantu acwekyerera." 
Proverbs14:29 Otarahuka kubakirwa ayetegyereza gye, kwonka orahuka kubakirwa ahimbisiriza obushema." 
Proverbs14:30 Omutima gutebeekaine gureetera omubiri amagara, kwonka eitima rijunza amagufa." 
Proverbs14:31 Ohata omunaku ajuma Nyakumuhanga, kwonka ogirira omukyene embabazi aha ekitiinwa owaamuhangire." 
Proverbs14:32 Enyabibi eitwa ebikorwa byayo bibi, kwonka ohikiriire afa aine amatsiko." 
Proverbs14:33 Obwengye butuura omu mutima gw'orikwetegyereza, kwonka tibushangwa mu bifamutima." 
Proverbs14:34 Okuhikiirira kureetera eihanga ekitiinwa, kwonka ekibi kirijumisa." 
Proverbs14:35 Omugaragwa w'obwengye ashongoka aha mugabe, kwonka otaine buryo akwatsa omugabe kashanga." 
Proverbs15:1 Okugarukamu n'obucureezi kwikaikanisa kashanga, kwonka okugambisa ekikabuko kwitsa ekiniga." 
Proverbs15:2 Orurimi rw'abanyabwengye rugamba eby'oburyo, kwonka akanwa k'ebifamutima koohoka." 
Proverbs15:3 Amaisho ga Nyakubaho gareeba hoona; ayetegyereza ababi n'abarungi. 
Proverbs15:4 Orurimi rurikugwisa gye ruba enshuro y'amagara, kwonka orurimi rurikucumita rwita amagara." 
Proverbs15:5 Ekifamutima kigaya okuhabura kwa ishe, kwonka oikiriza kuhanwa aba omwerinzi." 
Proverbs15:6 Eitungo ringi rishangwa omw'omuntu ohikiriire, kwonka ebi enyabibi eshaaruura tibigireetera busingye." 
Proverbs15:7 Akanwa k'omunyabwengye kabiba obwengye, kwonka ebiteekateeko by'ekifamutima tikwo biba." 
Proverbs15:8 Nyakubaho anuga ekitambo ky'enyabibi, kwonka ashemerererwa okushaba kw'abahikiriire." 
Proverbs15:9 Nyakubaho anuga emitwarize y'enyabibi, kwonka akunda orikukora ebihikire." 
Proverbs15:10 Otsigitsibwa omuhanda oguhikire, n'omureeba naku; kandi oyanga kuhanwa, aryafa." 
Proverbs15:11 Nyakubaho yaakamanya okuzimu owa Nyamuteza n'okuhwerekyerera, kaashwa emitima y'abantu!" 
Proverbs15:12 Omugayani tayenda kuhanwa, taryehitsya banyabwengye." 
Proverbs15:13 Omutima gushemereirwe gushemuura ahamaisho, kwonka obujune bw'omu mutima bureeta amaganya." 
Proverbs15:14 Omutima gw'orikwetegyereza gwenda kumanya; kwonka akanwa k'ebifamutima katungwa obushema," 
Proverbs15:15 Ebiro by'orikubonabona byona biba bibi, kwonka ow'omutima gushemereirwe aba nk'otuura omu bugyenyi." 
Proverbs15:16 Haakiri ogire kakye nootiina Nyakubaho, okukira okugira eitungo ringi eririkukutuntuza." 
Proverbs15:17 Haakiri orya emboga oine rukundo, okukira okurya enyama y'ebishaju oine rwango." 
Proverbs15:18 Omuntu orahuka kubakirwa aimukiiriza endwano, kwonka otarahuka kugira ekiniga acureeza entongane." 
Proverbs15:19 Omuhanda gw'abeeremwa gushwekwa amahwa, kwonka ogw'ohikiriire guba omuhanda rugyendwa." 
Proverbs15:20 Omwana w'obwengye ananura ishe, kwonka ekifamutima kigaya nyina." 
Proverbs15:21 Ekifamutima kishemerererwa obushema, kwonka omuntu orikwetegyereza atoora omuhanda guhikire." 
Proverbs15:22 Ebi omuntu akora ataine kuhaburwa bishoba, kwonka ebihanuurwa baingi bigyenda gye." 
Proverbs15:23 Okugarukamu ekihikire kugwisa gye omuntu, n'ekigambwa omu bunaku bwakyo, ebishi kiba kirungi!" 
Proverbs15:24 Omunyabwengye atoora omuhanda gw'amagara, reero akira okushuuma owa Nyamuteza." 
Proverbs15:25 Nyakubaho akambura enju y'enyetunguuzi, kwonka arinda emyatano y'omufaakazi." 
Proverbs15:26 Ebiteekateeko by'enyabibi biba ekihagaro ahari Nyakubaho, kwonka ebigambo birungi bimugwisa gye." 
Proverbs15:27 Oine omururu gw'okutunga amagoba gatahikire eka ye agishombera akabi, kwonka oyanga ebituga aramaara." 
Proverbs15:28 Omuntu ohikiriire ateekateeka nk'oku araagarukyemu, kwonka akanwa k'enyabibi kahimintikamu ebigambo bibi." 
Proverbs15:29 Enkozi z'ebibi Nyakubaho aziba hare, kwonka ahurira okushaba kw'abahikiriire." 
Proverbs15:30 Okushemuuka ahamaisho kugwisa gye omutima, n'enkuru nungi ehamya amagufa." 
Proverbs15:31 Oikiriza kuhanwa aryatuura n'abanyabwengye. 
Proverbs15:32 Oyanga kuhaburwa ayegayisa, kwonka okunda kuhanwa, ayetegyereza." 
Proverbs15:33 Okutiina Nyakubaho nikwo kutunga obwengye, kandi obucureezi bureeta ekitiinwa." 
Proverbs16:1 Omuntu ateekateeka ebi araakore, kwonka Nyakubaho niwe abishoboorora." 
Proverbs16:2 Omuntu asiima emitwarize ye yoona, kwonka Nyakubaho acaaka ebiri omu mutima." 
Proverbs16:3 Ebi orikukora obikwatse Nyakubaho, reero ebi orikuconya biryahama." 
Proverbs16:4 Buri kintu Nyakubaho akakihanga aine eki agyendereire, nangwa n'enyabibi akaziteeraho eizooba ry'okureeberaho enaku." 
Proverbs16:5 Nyakubaho anuga omunyamaryo weena; buzimazima aryamufubira. 
Proverbs16:6 Okugira amazima n'obwesigwa, n'ekarabo y'ekibi, kandi okutiina Nyakubaho kureetera omuntu kukyetantara." 
Proverbs16:7 Emitwarize y'omuntu ku egwisa gye Nyakubaho, nawe amugarukanisa n'abazigu be, batunga obusingye." 
Proverbs16:8 Haakiri otungye kakye omu mazima, okukira okutunga bingi omu buryo bubi." 
Proverbs16:9 Omuntu ayecwera emihanda, kwonka Nyakubaho niwe agimushoronzyamu." 
Proverbs16:10 Ruhanga niwe aheereza omugabe obwengye bw'okushoboorora, haza ku acwa emanja tashobya." 
Proverbs16:11 Eminzaani n'endengo zihikire biba ebya Nyakubaho, n'eby'okurengeyesa byona niwe yaabitaireho." 
Proverbs16:12 Okushiisha kuba ekihagaro aha mugabe, ahabw'okuba entebe y'obugabe ehamibwa okuhikiirira." 
Proverbs16:13 Omugabe ashemerererwa ogamba amazima, kandi akunda ogamba ebihikire." 
Proverbs16:14 Omugabe ku abiihirwa, biri rufu yaija; kwonka omuntu w'obwengye amwikaikanisa." 
Proverbs16:15 Omugabe ku ashemuuka ahamaisho, habaho okunanuka, kandi embabazi ze ni nk'ebicu by'enjura ya Katumba." 
Proverbs16:16 Okuba omunyabwengye nikikira okugira zaabu; okwetegyereza kwine omugasho okukira feeza. 
Proverbs16:17 Omuhanda rugyendwa ogw'abahikiriire guba okwetantara ekibi; n'oyerinda omu mitwarize ye arinda amagara ge. 
Proverbs16:18 Okucwekyerera kureetwa okwetunguura, n'entuure ereetwa amaryo." 
Proverbs16:19 Haakiri oyebundika, oba n'abooro, okukira okubagana eminyago n'abarikwetunguura." 
Proverbs16:20 Ota omutima aha kigambo kya Ruhanga aba gye, kandi oyesiga Nyakubaho n'omuhiirwa." 
Proverbs16:21 Omuntu w'obwengye baamweta omwetegyerezi; akarimi karungi kongyera kwikirizisa abantu. 
Proverbs16:22 Oine obwengye aine enshuro y'amagara, kwonka okuba ekifamutima kiba ekiheneso." 
Proverbs16:23 Omunyabwengye agamba eby'oburyo, kandi ebi agamba byongyera kwikirizisa abantu." 
Proverbs16:24 Ebigambo birungi biba engabo y'obwoki, binurira omutima, kandi bireetera omubiri amaani." 
Proverbs16:25 Omuhanda ogu omuntu ateekateeka ngu ni murungi nigwo gumwita. 
Proverbs16:26 Omugombo nigwo gureetera omuntu kukora, n'enjara emugyemesereza." 
Proverbs16:27 Ekifeera kicuma enaama mbi, kandi ebigambo byakyo biba ekibabo ky'omuriro." 
Proverbs16:28 Omutigi akanyisa obwangane, n'engambi ya maingi etaanisa abanyamukago b'aha mara." 
Proverbs16:29 Omunyaitima ayosyayosya mutaahi we, haza amuhabisa." 
Proverbs16:30 Oitaita amaisho aba naateekateeka eby'oburyarya; oruma omunwa azaara akagwe. 
Proverbs16:31 Omutwe gw'enju guba ekirunga ky'ekitiinwa ekitungwa omuntu w'emicwe mirungi. 
Proverbs16:32 Otarahuka kubakirwa ahita ekikaaka, kandi otegyeka ekiniga kye ahita okubwire orurembo." 
Proverbs16:33 Abantu baragurira endagu, kwonka Nyakubaho niwe azihikiiriza." 
Proverbs17:1 Akatongye aku omuntu anyaata aine obusingye, nikahita obugyenyi bw'omu nju erimu entongane." 
Proverbs17:2 Omuhuuku w'obwengye aryaba mukuru w'omwana empemuzi, kandi abagane aha buhunguzi nk'abandi baana." 
Proverbs17:3 Eiziiko rishemeza efeeza, ekikoomi kishemeza zaabu, kwonka Nyakubaho acaaka emitima." 
Proverbs17:4 Enkozi y'ebibi eikiriza orukuru, kandi omunyabishuba ahurikiza eby'eitima." 
Proverbs17:5 Oteerera omworo enaku ajuma Owaamuhangire, kandi ogwo oshekyeerera abagwereirwe akagwe taribura kufubirwa." 
Proverbs17:6 Ekirunga ky'omugurusi kiba abaijukuruza; kandi ekitiinwa ky'abana baba baishebo. 
Proverbs17:7 Emigambire mirungi tegwisa gye mushema, n'omutegyeki tashemerererwa bishuba." 
Proverbs17:8 Oha enguzi aba nk'orikukora omugyereko, ei aza yoona aba gye." 
Proverbs17:9 Osaasira omushobeize asherura omukago; kwonka oijukiriza ebishobyo, ataanisa abanyamukago." 
Proverbs17:10 Okuhana kugasira omunyabwengye, okukira okuteera ekifamutima eminyaafu igana." 
Proverbs17:11 Omuntu mubi akunda kugoma, nikyo baryoherereza entumwa enshaarizi kumukwata." 
Proverbs17:12 Embu y'okubugana ekifamutima kigwire eiraro, obugana edubu eyakirwe ebyana byayo." 
Proverbs17:13 Ozimuura ekibi ahabw'ekirungi, ebibi tibirihwa mu ka ye." 
Proverbs17:14 Okwimutsya entongane ni nk'okwigurira amaizi; n'ahabw'ekyo ohungye zitakatandikire. 
Proverbs17:15 Oiha orubanja aha muntu mubi, n'osingisiriza ohikiriire, bombi baba ekihagaro ahari Nyakubaho." 
Proverbs17:16 Mbwenu shi ekifamutima kikwatira ki empiiha omu ngaro kugura obwengye, kunu kitarikwetegyereza?" 
Proverbs17:17 Omunyamukago atuura aine rukundo; kandi omunyaruganda n'okukwatanisa na mwene ishe omu bihikiirizi. 
Proverbs17:18 Ekifamutima kikwatiriza, kandi kyehindura omukwato gwa mutaahi waakyo." 
Proverbs17:19 Okunda ekibi ataara entongane, n'oyetunguura asherura okucwekyerera." 
Proverbs17:20 Omuntu orikwehabagiza tatunga, kandi orikuryangatanisa agwerwa akagwe." 
Proverbs17:21 Omwana ekibura areetera ishe obusaasi; na ishe w'ekifamutima tashemererwa. 
Proverbs17:22 Omutima gushemereirwe guba omubazi murungi, kwonka omutima gucuramiriirwe gureetera omuntu kuhwa aha magufa." 
Proverbs17:23 Enyabibi eyakiira ebituga by'omu kikondooro, ngu etakurata amazima." 
Proverbs17:24 Omuntu orikwetegyereza akuratira obwengye, kwonka ekifamutima tikigira ki kyetaho." 
Proverbs17:25 Omwana ekifamutima agwisa kubi ishe, kandi areetera nyina kimuzaara obusaasi." 
Proverbs17:26 Ti kirungi kutangisa omuntu ataine rubanja; nainga kuteera omunyiginya. 
Proverbs17:27 Ogamba naayetwara, aine obwengye; kandi omucureezi aba omuntu orikwetegyereza." 
Proverbs17:28 Ekifamutima ku kiceceka, bagira ngu kiine obwengye, ku kihunama bagira ngu nikyetegyereza." 
Proverbs18:1 Oyetaanisa n'abandi aba naayeyendeza, kandi tayenda kuhaburwa." 
Proverbs18:2 Ekifamutima tikyenda kwetegyereza, kureka okugamba ebi kirikuteekateeka." 
Proverbs18:3 Ahu ekibi kiri, n'ekihemu niho kiba; kandi okugaywa kwitsa enshoni." 
Proverbs18:4 Ebigambo by'omuntu ni nk'amaizi maingi, kandi enshuro y'obwengye ni nk'omugyera gurikuhimintika." 
Proverbs18:5 Ti kirungi kukwatsiza omuntu mubi, nari okwima ohikiriire ebimushemereire." 
Proverbs18:6 Akanwa k'ekifamutima kareeta entongane, kandi kakiteeza ebyasha." 
Proverbs18:7 Akanwa k'ekifamutima kakicwekyereza, n'eminwa yaakyo ekibeera omutego." 
Proverbs18:8 Omunyarukuru ebi agamba ni nk'ebitongye binuzire, ebishuuma bikahika omunda." 
Proverbs18:9 Oyeganda aha murimo gwe ni murumuna w'orikucwekyereza. 
Proverbs18:10 Eiziina rya Nyakubaho riba omunaara gugumire, kandi obuhungiro bw'ohikiriire." 
Proverbs18:11 Eitungo ry'omutungi riba orurembo rwe oruhamire, riri nk'ekisiika kiraingwa ekirikumurinda." 
Proverbs18:12 Okwetunguura kw'omuntu kukuratwa okucwekyerera, kwonka okwebundika kureeta ekitiinwa." 
Proverbs18:13 Ogarukamu atabandize kuhurira, ayoreka obushema n'okuhemuka." 
Proverbs18:14 Omuntu agumisiriza obusaasi; kwonka n'oha obaasa kwemera obujune bw'omutima? 
Proverbs18:15 Orikwetegyereza atunga obwengye, n'okutu kw'omunyabwengye kusherura okumanya." 
Proverbs18:16 Omutoijo gw'omuntu gumwigurira omuhanda; kandi gumuhitsya omu maisho g'abantu b'ekitiinwa. 
Proverbs18:17 Obanza kutongana oshusha oti ni mwere, okuhitsya obu ondiijo aija akamwomesereza." 
Proverbs18:18 Enteenyu niyo emara empaka, ekaramura ebikaaka birikutongana." 
Proverbs18:19 Omunyaruganda ku ahwerwa mwene ishe aba nk'orurembo rugumire, kwonka ku atongana nawe tibateisibwa." 
Proverbs18:20 Omuntu atungwa ebi agamba; ebiraba omu kanwa ke nibyo bimuhaazya. 
Proverbs18:21 Orurimi rugira obushoboorozi bw'okwita n'okukiza; ebi rugamba nibyo biba ebijuma byarwo. 
Proverbs18:22 Obona omukazi w'okushwera, abona ekintu kirungi; kandi atunga omugisha gwa Nyakubaho." 
Proverbs18:23 Abooro bagamba nibeeshengyereza, kwonka abatungi bo bagambisa ekikabuko." 
Proverbs18:24 Hariho omunyamukago oyemamarika nk'omunyamukago, kwonka hariho omunyamukago okunda omuntu okukira mweneishe." 
Proverbs19:1 Omworo oine amazima naahita omutungi omushema orikugamba enkuru ibiri. 
Proverbs19:2 Ti kirungi omuntu kutuurira aho ataine ki arikumanya; n'otwaza bugubugu ahaba. 
Proverbs19:3 Obufamutima bw'omuntu ku bumwita kubi, agirira Nyakubaho ekiniga kingi." 
Proverbs19:4 Obutungi bureetera omuntu emikago mingi; kwonka omworo, na banywani be bamuhwaho." 
Proverbs19:5 Omujurizi w'ebishuba taribura kutunga kiheneso, n'obeiha tarikikira." 
Proverbs19:6 Baingi benda kuhakwa aha muntu efura; kandi ogaba munonga agira emikago mingi. 
Proverbs19:7 Omworo yaakangwa beene ishe, kaashwa banywani be okumwetantaara! Ku aza kubatuurira obusaasi bwe, bamuhugaho." 
Proverbs19:8 Orinda gye obwengye bwe ayekunda, kandi orikwetegyereza, aryaba gye." 
Proverbs19:9 Omujurizi w'ebishuba taribura kutunga kiheneso, n'obeiha aryahwerekyerera." 
Proverbs19:10 Ekifamutima tikishemereire kujarama, kandi omuhuuku kutegyeka abanyiginya ka kirengyesereize!" 
Proverbs19:11 Okwetegyereza kuzibira omuntu kurahuka kugira ekiniga; kandi okwehuzya eki baamushobeize, kumuhaisa ekitiinwa." 
Proverbs19:12 Ekiniga ky'omugabe ni nk'okutsinda kw'entare, kwonka embabazi ze ni nk'orume rw'aha bunyaatsi." 
Proverbs19:13 Omwana ekifamutima akyengyeza ishe, n'omukazi oherana ni nk'enju erikuguubwamu enjura." 
Proverbs19:14 Eka n'eitungo omuntu ariragwa abazaire; kwonka omukazi omwerinzi amuheebwa Nyakubaho. 
Proverbs19:15 Obweremwa bureetera omuntu kugwejegyera nk'ofiire, kandi omugara aryakuuhura." 
Proverbs19:16 Okwata ebiragiro arinda amagara ge; kwonka ogaya ekigambo kya Ruhanga aryafa. 
Proverbs19:17 Ogirira abooro embabazi aguza Nyakubaho, haza Nyakubaho aryamuzimuurira ebi yaakozire." 
Proverbs19:18 Hana omwana waawe okiine amatsiko; kwonka otarirengyesereza okenda kumwita. 
Proverbs19:19 Omuntu w'ekishinjo kingi aryakizira; ahabw'okuba nobu waakumujuna aryagumizamu nakyo. 
Proverbs19:20 Ikiriza kuhaburwa, oikirize kwegyesibwa, obone kugira obwengye." 
Proverbs19:21 Omuntu acuma enaama nyingi, kwonka eki Nyakubaho arikwenda nikyo kirihama." 
Proverbs19:22 Ekyendwa omu muntu n'obwesigwa, kandi omworo ahita omunyabishuba." 
Proverbs19:23 Okutiina Nyakubaho kutungisa amagara, n'okwine atuura amazirwe; kandi tarihikwaho kabi." 
Proverbs19:24 Omweremwa ku akoza omu rwabya, omukono gugumayo, abura kwetamika." 
Proverbs19:25 Teera omugayani, reero omucureezi ayegyereho okwerinda, hana orikwetegyereza, naija kwihamu obwengye." 
Proverbs19:26 Oteera ishe akabinga nyina aba omwana orikubahemura kandi orikubajumisa. 
Proverbs19:27 Mwana wangye, reka kuhuririra eryo ebi barikukuhabura, okatsigisibwa ebigambo by'obwengye." 
Proverbs19:28 Omujurizi w'ebishuba agaya obwinganisa, n'akanwa k'enyabibi koohora ebihagaro." 
Proverbs19:29 Abateera enaku baryacwerwa orubanja, n'ebifamutima biryateerwa enkoni z'omugongo." 
Proverbs20:1 Amaarwa gaba omuteezi w'enaku, kandi esindo etonganisa; obikunda tagira bwengye." 
Proverbs20:2 Kashanga y'omugabe ni nk'okutsinda kw'entare; omugwisa kubi arweshombera. 
Proverbs20:3 Okwetantara entongane kuhaisa omuntu ekitiinwa, kwonka ibara kifamutima atongana." 
Proverbs20:4 Omweremwa tahinga mu ishekyera; omu ishaaruura aryashabiiriza abure eki yaatunga. 
Proverbs20:5 Enaama z'omu mutima gw'omuntu ni nk'amaizi g'okuzimu, kwonka orikwetegyereza aryazitimburayo." 
Proverbs20:6 Abantu baingi beeyeta abeesigwa, mbwenu omuribo ow'amazima n'oha orimuzoora?" 
Proverbs20:7 Baine omugisha abaana abaritsigara omu bigyere by'omuzaire ohikiriire kandi omwesigwa. 
Proverbs20:8 Omugabe ku asingama omu kitebe ky'emanja, ebibi byona abireeba ahonaaho, abibinga." 
Proverbs20:9 N'oha owaakubaasa kugira ati: Nshemeize omutima gwangye, ndi mwere?" 
Proverbs20:10 Ebipimo bitahikire n'endengo zitahikire, byombi biba ekihagaro ahari Nyakubaho." 
Proverbs20:11 Nangwa n'omwana amanyirwa aha bi arikukora, yaaba biri birungi kandi bihikire." 
Proverbs20:12 Okutu okuhurira n'eriisho erireeba, byombi Nyakubaho niwe yaabihangire." 
Proverbs20:13 Otakunda kubyama okaba omworo; guma nooreeba, otungye ebyokurya bingi." 
Proverbs20:14 Omuguzi agira ati: Ni kibi, ni kibi; kwonka ku aheza kugyenda ayesiima." 
Proverbs20:15 Hariho ezaabu n'eruuru nyingi z'obuguzi bwingi, kwonka akanwa akagamba eby'obwengye kaba eihunde ry'obuguzi bwingi kukiraho." 
Proverbs20:16 Omuntu ku aryemererera otarikumanywa omwiheho ekijwaro; kwonka ku aryemererera abanyamahanga, we abe omukwato." 
Proverbs20:17 Ebyokurya ebirugire omu kuryangatanisa binurira omuntu; bwanyima bimuhindukira omusheenyi gurikurumira. 
Proverbs20:18 Enaama zihamibwa okuhanuura, kandi okuhaburwa okuhikire kusingura engamba." 
Proverbs20:19 Ozengyerera naazonzya orukuru ayata enaama; n'ahabw'ekyo otarikwatanisa n'orikugambira eryo. 
Proverbs20:20 Omuntu okyeena ishe nari nyina etabaaza ye eryazimira omu mwirima ndindindi. 
Proverbs20:21 Ebi omuntu ahungura ekitaraariraine, aha muheru tibigira mugisha." 
Proverbs20:22 Otarigira oti: Ndyayehoorera; reka Nyakubaho akuhwere. 
Proverbs20:23 Endengo zitahikire ziba ekihagaro ahari Nyakubaho, n'eminzaani etahikire eba mbi." 
Proverbs20:24 Nyakubaho niwe agyendesa omuntu; mbwenu omuntu akaayetegyereize ata omuhanda gu aratoore? 
Proverbs20:25 N'omutego omuntu kurahukwa aha rurimi, akagira ati: Eki n'ekirikwera! Haza akiheza kukihiga akeefuuza." 
Proverbs20:26 Omugabe w'obwengye atuntumura enyabibi, kandi abaribatiiriza ekigaari kye." 
Proverbs20:27 Omutima gw'omuntu guba etabaaza ya Nyakubaho erikumurika omunda y'omuntu. 
Proverbs20:28 Obwesigwa n'amazima birinda omugabe, kandi obugabe bwe buhamibwa okuhikiirira." 
Proverbs20:29 Ekitiinwa ky'abarikunyeeta n'okugira amaani, kwonka okushemera kw'abagurusi n'okumera enju." 
Proverbs20:30 Okuteera omuntu okurikuhutaaza kwihaho ebibi; eminyaafu emushenshera omunda ehaboneza. 
Proverbs21:1 Omutima gw'omugabe guba omugyera gw'amaizi omu mikono ya Nyakubaho, ogu atooza hoona ahu arikwenda." 
Proverbs21:2 Buri muntu agira ngu emitwarize ye ehikire, kwonka Nyakubaho niwe agyera emitima." 
Proverbs21:3 Nyakubaho asiima okukora ebihikire n'eby'obwinganisa okukira ebitambo. 
Proverbs21:4 Amaisho g'omunyamaryo n'omutima gw'oyetunguura byoreka enyabibi; haza biba ekibi. 
Proverbs21:5 Ebi omweziriki aconya bimuhitsya ahari bingi; kwonka ozahambuka aba omworo runuuka. 
Proverbs21:6 Eitungo eriruga omu kubeiha rintuntumuka nk'orwoya, kandi riba omutego gwa rufu." 
Proverbs21:7 Enyabibi ziryamarwaho obuhaze bwazo, ahabw'okuba zanga kukora eby'oburyo." 
Proverbs21:8 Emitwarize y'ababi etuura ekiikami, kwonka emicwe y'abataine kamogo eba ehikire." 
Proverbs21:9 Embu y'okutuura omu nju n'omukazi entongani otuura omu karugu k'akanono k'enju. 
Proverbs21:10 Enyabibi eyetenga ebibi; mutaahi waayo tagireeba mbabazi hamaisho. 
Proverbs21:11 Oteera enaku ku afubirwa, omushema agira obwengye; n'omunyabwengye ku ayegyesibwa ayeyongyera okumanya." 
Proverbs21:12 Ruhanga orikwera ayetegyereza eka y'enyabibi: haza enyabibi azihwerekyereza. 
Proverbs21:13 Oyanga kuhurira okwamuza kw'abanaku, ku aritaka tihariho orimwetaba." 
Proverbs21:14 Ekiconco ky'omu mubonano kiikaikanisa ekiniga; n'enguzi y'omu kikondooro eikaikanisa ekishinjo. 
Proverbs21:15 Ku habaho obwinganisa ohikiriire ananuka, kwonka enkozi z'ebibi zo zihahaara omutima." 
Proverbs21:16 Omuntu ohaba omuhanda gw'okwetegyereza, aryatuura omu bafiire." 
Proverbs21:17 Omuntu okunda kujarama aryaba omworo; n'okunda viino n'amajuta tariba mutungi. 
Proverbs21:18 Enyabibi eba ekicunguro ky'ohikiriire, kandi otaine mazima aba ekicunguro ky'omwesigwa." 
Proverbs21:19 Embu y'okutuura n'omukazi entongani kandi orikusambisirwa, otuura omu ihamba." 
Proverbs21:20 Eitungo ringi n'amajuta g'omuhendo bituura omu y'omunyabwengye, kwonka ekifamutima kibihuruutura." 
Proverbs21:21 Omuntu okuratira okuhikiirira n'embabazi aryagira amagara n'ekitiinwa. 
Proverbs21:22 Omunyabwengye atemba ekisiika ky'orurembo rw'ebikaaka, haza asheenya ekigo kigumire eki byesiga." 
Proverbs21:23 Orinda akanwa n'orurimi rwe aba ayerinzire akabi. 
Proverbs21:24 Omugayani riba eiziina ry'omwetunguuzi, oine amaryo kandi orikwehimbisa." 
Proverbs21:25 Omweremwa aitwa okwetenga kwe, ahabw'okuba emikono ye teyenda kukora." 
Proverbs21:26 Enyabibi esiiba n'ekyaka ky'okwetenga, kwonka ohikiriire taruha kugaba" 
Proverbs21:27 Ekitambo ky'enyabibi ku kiraabe kiba omuziro, kaashwa kyatambwa n'omutima mubi!" 
Proverbs21:28 Omujurizi w'ebishuba aryahwerekyerera; kwonka ekigambo ky'omuntu ohurikiriza kiryagumaho. 
Proverbs21:29 Enyabibi eyegangaaza aha maisho, kwonka omuntu w'oburyo acuma emitwarize ye." 
Proverbs21:30 Obwengye, okwetegyereza, n'ebihaburo, biba busha omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Proverbs21:31 Embaraasi etebeekanisizibwa orugamba, kwonka okusingura kuba okwa Nyakubaho." 
Proverbs22:1 Eiziina rirungi rihita eitungo ringi, n'okugambwa gye kuhita efeeza n'ezaabu." 
Proverbs22:2 Abatungi n'abooro batuura kumwe; boona Nyakubaho niwe yaabahangire. 
Proverbs22:3 Omwerinzi ku areeba akabi ayeshereka, kwonka omushema akeegyema, kamwita." 
Proverbs22:4 Ekihembo ky'okwecureeza n'okutiina Nyakubaho kiba obutungi, ekitiinwa n'amagara." 
Proverbs22:5 Amahwa n'emitego biba omu muhanda gw'entigi, kwonka omwerinzi abyetantara." 
Proverbs22:6 Yorekyerera omwana omuhanda gw'okutoora; nobu arikura tarigurugamu. 
Proverbs22:7 Omutungi ategyeka omworo, n'orikweguza aba omuhuuku w'orikumuguza." 
Proverbs22:8 Omuntu obiba obugobya ashaaruura enaku, kandi amaani ge garyafa busha." 
Proverbs22:9 Omuntu efura aryaheebwa omugisha, ahabw'okuba akokurya ke akabagana n'abooro." 
Proverbs22:10 Binga omuteezi w'enaku, reero entongane zihweho, okujumiirana n'obwiko bigarukire aho." 
Proverbs22:11 Okunda omutima gushemeire, kandi akagamba ebirikugwisa gye, niwe ariba munywani w'omugabe." 
Proverbs22:12 Amaisho ga Nyakubaho garinda obwengye, kwonka ebigambo by'otaine kwikiriza abibinga." 
Proverbs22:13 Omweremwa agira ati: Aheeru hariyo entare, neija kuunyitira omu muhanda." 
Proverbs22:14 Akanwa k'omukazi enshambani kaba orwina ruraingwa, ou Nyakubaho ainiire ekiniga aryarugwamu." 
Proverbs22:15 Omwana azaarwa n'obufamutima, kwonka enkoni emuhana ebumwihamu." 
Proverbs22:16 Omuntu ohata abooro ngu ay'ekanyisize eitungo, nari ogabira abatungi, aryakyena." 
Proverbs22:17 Tega okutu, ohurire ebigambo by'obwengye, kandi ote omutima aha bi ndikukwegyesa." 
Proverbs22:18 Ahabw'okuba ku oribigumya aha mutima n'aha minwa yaawe, oryashemererwa." 
Proverbs22:19 Nikyo naabikumanyisiza eri izooba, ngu naiwe oyesigye Nyakubaho." 
Proverbs22:20 Mbwenu tinkuhandiikiire kashatu ninkuteisa kandi ninkuha obwengye 
Proverbs22:21 kukworeka ebihikire n'eby'amazima, ngu abaakutumire obone kubagarukamu eby'amazima?" 
Proverbs22:22 Otaryambura omworo ngu niho ari omworo, nari oine obujune okamwitira kubi omu irembo;" 
Proverbs22:23 ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho aryabatonganira, kandi abarikubambura abaiheho amagara." 
Proverbs22:24 Otarinywana n'omuntu orikubakirwa, ninga okagyenda n'omunyakiniga," 
Proverbs22:25 otakaatooreza emitwarize ye, haza okeenaga omu mutego." 
Proverbs22:26 Otaba omwe ahari abo abakwatiriza, bakeemererera abaine amabanja." 
Proverbs22:27 Mbwenu shi ku oraabe otaine ky'okumwihurira, ahanki okukwiha aha kitanda kyawe, bakakitwara?" 
Proverbs22:28 Otariihaho akamanyiso k'emyatano akaatairweho ira baashoimwe. 
Proverbs22:29 Beitu nooreeba omuntu omunyabwengye aha mwoga gwe? Aryagaragira abagabe, tarigaragira abataine oku bari." 
Proverbs23:1 Ku orishutama kurya n'omutegyeki, oyetegyereze gye ebikuri omu maisho," 
Proverbs23:2 haza waaba ori omunyamururu oyete omusyo aha mumiro. 
Proverbs23:3 Ebi arungire bitakwitsa omururu, ahabw'okuba birimu oburyarya." 
Proverbs23:4 Otarigwa ahaiguru n'oitanira eitungo, kureka ba omunyabwengye oyezibire." 
Proverbs23:5 Manya ku oriteerera oti eriisho ribura; reero ahonaaho riguruka, rituuruura nk'empungu erikuzeereera omu mwanya." 
Proverbs23:6 Otarirya ebyokurya by'omunyarwango, kandi otaryetenga ebi arungire." 
Proverbs23:7 Ahabw'okuba ari nk'oyemereza omutima naagira ati: Rya, onywe; haza atakiihire ha mutima." 
Proverbs23:8 Oryatanaka ebitongye bi oriba waaheza kurya, haza ebigaaniiro byawe birungi bife busha." 
Proverbs23:9 Otarigamba ekifamutima kikuhuriire, ahabw'okuba kiryagaya ebi waagamba ngu tibirimu bwengye." 
Proverbs23:10 Otariihaho akamanyiso k'emyatano akaatairweho ira, nari okataaha omu kibanja ky'efuuzi;" 
Proverbs23:11 ahabw'okuba orikubarwanirira n'ow'amaani, kandi omu rubanja rwabo aryakushinja." 
Proverbs23:12 Ta omutima gwawe aha kuhaburwa, kandi otegye okutu ebigambo by'obwengye." 
Proverbs23:13 Otarireka kuhana omwana; nobu waakumuteeza omunyaafu, tarikufa." 
Proverbs23:14 Waamuteeza omunyaafu, biri obwo amagara ge waagatambira kushuuma owa Nyamuteza." 
Proverbs23:15 Mwana wangye, omutima gwawe ku gurigira obwengye, n'ogwangye guryashemererwa." 
Proverbs23:16 Ndyayesiima akanwa kaawe ku karigamba ebihikire. 
Proverbs23:17 Omutima gwawe gutarigirira abasiisi eihari, kureka otiine Nyakubaho eizooba ryona." 
Proverbs23:18 Buzimazima obwo oine amatsiko, kandi ago matsiko gaawe tigarifa busha." 
Proverbs23:19 Mwana wangye, hurira, kandi ogire obwengye, kandi oshoronzye gye omutima gwawe omu muhanda guhikire." 
Proverbs23:20 Otarikwatanisa n'abarikwetiiha viino, nari abariisa enyama omururu." 
Proverbs23:21 Ahabw'okuba abasinzi n'abanyamururu baryaitwa obworo, kandi okuhononoka kuryajwaza omuntu obucancabari." 
Proverbs23:22 Hurira sho owaakuzaire, kandi nyoko ku arikaikura otarimugaya." 
Proverbs23:23 Gura amazima, kwonka otagaguza; kandi ogure obwengye, okuhaburwa n'okwetegyereza." 
Proverbs23:24 Ishe w'ohikiriire aryayesiima munonga; n'ozaara omwana w'obwengye aryamunanura. 
Proverbs23:25 Sho na nyoko ka bananukye, na nyoko owaakuzaire ayesiime." 
Proverbs23:26 Mwana wangye, mpurira, kandi oyetegyereze emitwarize yangye." 
Proverbs23:27 Maraaya aba orwina ruraingwa, n'omukazi enshambani aba eiziba rifunzire." 
Proverbs23:28 Agwera nk'omwambuzi, kandi akanyisa abashaija baingi abateesigwa." 
Proverbs23:29 Enaku zigirwa oha? Obusaasi bugirwa oha? Entongane zigirwa oha? Oyetomboita n'oha? Obuhuta bwa busha bugirwa oha? Okutukura amaisho kugirwa oha? 
Proverbs23:30 Bigirwa abo abaraara enkyeera, n'abaroza viino y'enturire." 
Proverbs23:31 Otareebera viino okutukurinkana! Otagireebera okubiririra omu kikopo! Otagireebera okusheneneka aha mumiro! 
Proverbs23:32 Manya bwanyima eruma nk'enjoka, kandi eteme nk'empiri." 
Proverbs23:33 Reero amaisho gaawe gareeba ebintu okundi, omutima gwawe gugamba ebitaine nkwamo." 
Proverbs23:34 Oshusha nk'ogandaire ahagati y'enyanja, agwejegyereire aha mutwe gw'omurongooti gw'emeeri." 
Proverbs23:35 Noija kugira oti: Bampwire, tinaashaasha; banteire, tinaahurira kantu. Nsisiimukye ryari, nkaza kuvumba agandi?" 
Proverbs24:1 Otarigirira abanyabibi eihari, nari okwetenga kuguma nabo;" 
Proverbs24:2 ahabw'okuba emitima yaabo econya endwano, n'akanwa kaabo kagamba eby'eitima." 
Proverbs24:3 Obwengye nibwo bwombeka eka, kandi ehamibwa okwetegyereza;" 
Proverbs24:4 reero n'okumanya kwijuza ebishengye byayo eitungo ry'obuguzi bwingi, kandi eririkwesiimisa." 
Proverbs24:5 Omunyabwengye akira ekikaaka, kandi omuntu orikwetegyereza, oine obwengye, akira oine amaani." 
Proverbs24:6 Manya ku orikuhaburwa obwengye, noobaasa kutenga orugamba, kandi obusinguzi buruga omu kugira abahabuzi baingi." 
Proverbs24:7 Obwengye buri hare munonga y'ekifamutima; ku kihika aha irembo kiguma kiri ekituuriizi, n'omu ishengyero tikigamba." 
Proverbs24:8 Oconya enaama kukora kubi ayetwa omunyeitima. 
Proverbs24:9 Okuhanuura aha by'obufamutima kiba kibi, kandi orikugayana, abantu bamunuga." 
Proverbs24:10 Ku orikugira oburemeezi waagwa enshazi, biri oine amaani makye." 
Proverbs24:11 Juna abarikutwarwa kwitirwa busha, obakize bataitwa." 
Proverbs24:12 Ku oraagire oti: Eki titurakimanyire, ogwo ocaaka emitima tarikukireeba? Ogwo orinda amagara gaawe tarikimanya, haza akazimuurira omuntu ebi yaakozire?" 
Proverbs24:13 Mwana wangye, rya obwoki, ahabw'okuba ni burungi; kandi omushongi ogurikuruga omu ngabo nigunuriirira." 
Proverbs24:14 Mbwenu omanye ngu n'obwengye nikwo buri aha magara gaawe; ku orikubuzoora, biri waatunga obwesigye bw'ebiro ebiriija, n'amatsiko gaawe garyaba nk'omuzi gw'omurama." 
Proverbs24:15 Otarigwera aha nju y'ohikiriire nooyenda kumugwisiza akagwe, nk'oku enyabibi etwaza, kandi otarisheenya eka ye." 
Proverbs24:16 Manya ohikiriire agwa emirundi mushanju naimuka, kwonka enkozi z'ebibi ku zigwerwa akagwe zihwerekyerera." 
Proverbs24:17 Omuzigu waawe ku arigwa otarikishemerererwa, ku ariteera entsibo omutima gwawe gutaryesiima." 
Proverbs24:18 Nyakubaho atakaakireeba akaguubwa kubi, haza akareka kumugirira ekiniga." 
Proverbs24:19 Otaryemereza omutima ahabw'enkozi z'ebibi, nainga okazigirira eihari;" 
Proverbs24:20 ahabw'okuba enyabibi eyesigire busha, kandi etabaaza y'enyabibi eryaraazibwa." 
Proverbs24:21 Mwana wangye, tiina Nyakubaho, kandi otiine n'omugabe; haza otaribagomera;" 
Proverbs24:22 ahabw'okuba ebihikiirizi biryabazaarukamu kitaraariraine; mbwenu n'oha orikumanya enaku eziribazaarukamu? 
Proverbs24:23 Ebi nabyo n'ebigambo by'abanyabwengye. Omu kucwa emanja ti kirungi kugwera orubaju. 
Proverbs24:24 Orikugira enyabibi ati: Ori mwere, abantu baryamukyeena, n'amahanga gamutamwe," 
Proverbs24:25 kwonka abarikuhana enyabibi baryayesiima, kandi baryatunga omugisha murungi." 
Proverbs24:26 Ogarukamu ebihikire akanyisa omukago. 
Proverbs24:27 Tebeekanisa emirimo yaawe y'aheeru, ohingye kurungi enshambu yaawe, haza oyombekye enju yaawe." 
Proverbs24:28 Otarishinja mutaahi waawe noomutura busha; kandi akanwa kaawe kataribeiha. 
Proverbs24:29 Otarigira oti: Ndyamugirira nk'oku yangiriire! Ndyamuzimuurira ebi yankoreire! 
Proverbs24:30 Nkaraba aha musiri gw'omweremwa, aha musiri gw'emizaabibu ogw'omuntu otaine bwengye;" 
Proverbs24:31 haza gukaba gushakambire amahwa, gushwekirwe ebicuragyenyi, n'orugo rwagwo rw'amabaare rusheenyukire." 
Proverbs24:32 Ku naakireebire, naakiteekateekaho, naakireeba kyanyegyesa;" 
Proverbs24:33 Ka ngwejegyereho kakye, mpungireho kakye, nyefumbatize emikono, nduhuukyeho kakye;" 
Proverbs24:34 reero obworo buryakwizira nk'omwambuzi, n'obukyene bukwizire nk'omuntu ohagatiire ebikwato." 
Proverbs25:1 Ezi nazo n'enfumu za Solomooni, ezaahanduukurwirwe abashaija ba Hezekiya omugabe wa Yuda." 
Proverbs25:2 Ebi Ruhanga ashereka nibyo bimuhaisa ekitiinwa; kandi okubicondooza kiba ekitiinwa ky'abagabe. 
Proverbs25:3 Nk'oku eiguru riri hare munonga, kandi nk'oku ensi eri hare okuzimu, n'ebiteekateeko by'abagabe nikwo bitabaasa kucondoozibwa." 
Proverbs25:4 Iha enkamba aha feeza, reero omuheesi aheeshe ekyoma." 
Proverbs25:5 Iha enyabibi ahu omugabe ari, reero obugabe bwe buhamire omu kuhikiirira." 
Proverbs25:6 Otaryetunguurira omu maisho g'omugabe, nari okeemerera omu myanya y'ab'ekitiinwa;" 
Proverbs25:7 manya ni kirungi kukugira bati: Garuka aha, okukira okukugaruza enyima omu maisho g'omutegyeki." 
Proverbs25:8 Otarirahuka kutabaariza mutaahi waawe ebi waareeba; mbwenu shi ku arikwomesereza torihemuka? 
Proverbs25:9 Mara na mutaahi waawe eki murikufa, haza orekye kumwatira enaama;" 
Proverbs25:10 reero hatagira owaakuhurira akakugaya, n'ekihemu kikakugumaho." 
Proverbs25:11 Ekigambo ekigambirwe gye ni nk'ebijuma birikwengyengyeta nka zaabu ebiri aha shohaani ya feeza. 
Proverbs25:12 Omunyabwengye orikuhana omutegire okutu ni nk'empeta nari eihunde rya zaabu. 
Proverbs25:13 Entumwa erikwesigwa abagituma ni nk'embeho y'ebirika omu ishaaruura; ahabw'okuba eruhuura emitima ya bakama baayo. 
Proverbs25:14 Omuntu oyesiimirana ekiconco ki atarikwenda kuha ni nk'ebicu n'omuyaga ebitaine njura. 
Proverbs25:15 Okugumisiriza kworobya omutegyeki, n'orurimi rurungi rwata eigufa." 
Proverbs25:16 Ku origwa aha bwoki orye oburikukuhaazya, otakaabuniha okabutanaka." 
Proverbs25:17 Otakaitsa owa mutaahi waawe akaribatiiriro; atakaakuhararuka, akakwanga." 
Proverbs25:18 Omuntu oshinja mutaahi we naamubeiherera ni nk'akateererezo, nari rurara, ninga omwambi gw'obwogi." 
Proverbs25:19 Okwesiga omuntu otaine mazima omu bunaku bw'akabi ni nk'okugira eriino rijunzire, nari ekigyere kikonyokire." 
Proverbs25:20 Oyeshongorera oine obujune omu mutima, ari nk'ojuura eki ajwaire aha izooba ry'embeho, kandi ni nka viino encenku omu buhuta." 
Proverbs25:21 Omuzigu waawe ku arigira enjara omuhe ekyokurya, ku ariitwa eiriho omuhe ekyokunywa;" 
Proverbs25:22 haza obwo oryaba omurunzire aha mutwe amakara garikwaka, kandi Nyakubaho aryakuzimuurira." 
Proverbs25:23 Omuyaga gwa bukiizi-bwa-bumosho gureeta enjura, kandi orurimi rurikugambuura rureeta okwiririmba ahamaisho." 
Proverbs25:24 Embu y'okutuura omu nju n'omukazi entongani, otuura omu karugu k'akanono k'enju." 
Proverbs25:25 Amakuru marungi agaruga omu nsi ya hare ni nk'amaizi garikufuka agaruhuura oine ekyaaka. 
Proverbs25:26 Omuntu ohikiriire oyorobera enyabibi ni nk'omugyera gw'ebyondo, nari eiziba ry'omushaayo." 
Proverbs25:27 Ti kirungi kurya obwoki bwingi, n'ahabw'ekyo ebigambo by'okuhaisiriza ogambe bikye." 
Proverbs25:28 Omuntu otabaasa kwetegyeka ni nk'orurembo rusheenyirwe, rukatsigara rurangaire." 
Proverbs26:1 Nk'oku ebirika bitashemereire kubaho omu kyanda, n'enjura omu igyesha, n'ekifamutima nikwo kitashemereire kitiinwa." 
Proverbs26:2 Nk'oku ekiteerankumba kiguruka nikisyokasyoka, kandi nk'oku entaratambi eguruka, n'okukyeenera busha nikyo kutainariza." 
Proverbs26:3 Okwashwa kuba okw'embaraasi, ekyoma ky'omu kanwa kiba eky'endogoya, reero omunyaafu guba ogw'amabega g'ebifamutima." 
Proverbs26:4 Otarigarukamu ekifamutima nk'oku obufamutima bwakyo buri, haza otariba nkakyo." 
Proverbs26:5 Ekifamutima okigarukyemu nk'oku obufamutima bwakyo buri, kitakaayetwara nk'omunyabwengye." 
Proverbs26:6 Otuma ekifamutima ayeruhiza busha, kandi ayegwisiza akagwe." 
Proverbs26:7 Enfumu ezicuubwa ebifamutima ni nk'amaguru g'ekirema agarikureereeta, gataine mutambo." 
Proverbs26:8 Oha ekifamutima ekitiinwa ni nk'okomera eibaare omu njungu. 
Proverbs26:9 Enfumu ezicuubwa ebifamutima ni nk'eihwa ericumita engaro z'omusinzi rikahweramu. 
Proverbs26:10 Okoresa ekifamutima kirikwehingurira, nari omusinzi, ni nk'omurasi ohutaaza weena ou yaabanda." 
Proverbs26:11 Nk'oku embwa egarukira ebitanaki byayo, nikwo n'ekifamutima kigarukira obufamutima bwakyo." 
Proverbs26:12 Orareebire omuntu orikwemanya nk'omunyabwengye? Ekifamutima kiine amatsiko okumukira. 
Proverbs26:13 Omweremwa agira ati: Omu nguuto harimu entare! Omu mihanda harimu entare! 
Proverbs26:14 Omweremwa ayehindaguturira omu kitanda kye, nk'oku orwigi rwehindurira aha pata." 
Proverbs26:15 Omweremwa ku ata engaro omu rwabya, abura agazigarura omu kanwa." 
Proverbs26:16 Omweremwa ayeyeta omunyabwengye okukira abantu mushanju abagamba nibeekyengyera. 
Proverbs26:17 Oyetaasya omu ntongane zitari ze, ni nk'orikubakura amatu g'embwa erikuhingura." 
Proverbs26:18 Omuntu ogobeza mutaahi we akagira ati: Naaba ninteera obuyaga," 
Proverbs26:19 ni nk'omugwairaro orikurekyera enkanza zirikubuguma, n'emyambi, na rufu." 
Proverbs26:20 Enku ku zibura, omuriro guraara, n'ahu omunyarukuru atari entongane zihwaho." 
Proverbs26:21 Omuntu entongani oimukiiriza endwano ni nk'amakara agongyerwa aha gaacwetsya, nari nk'enku ezongyerwa aha muriro." 
Proverbs26:22 Omunyarukuru ebi agamba ni nk'ebitongye binuzire, ebishuuma bikahika omuntu omunda." 
Proverbs26:23 Oyegambisa karimi karungi, haza kunu aine omutima mubi, ni nk'enyungu esiigirwe enkamba y'efeeza." 
Proverbs26:24 Owa rwango abeihabeiha, kandi ashereka obugobya omu mutima gwe;" 
Proverbs26:25 ku arigamba gye otarimwesiga, ahabw'okuba aine ebihagaro mushanju aha mutima;" 
Proverbs26:26 nobu oburyarya bwa kushwekyerera rwango ye, hoona obubi bwe buryayeyerurira ahu abantu bateeraniire." 
Proverbs26:27 Otimba ekiina aryakigwamu, kandi n'okumbagaza eibaare riryamugarukira; rimuhingamire." 
Proverbs26:28 Orurimi rubeiha rwanga abu rubeiherera, n'aknwa kamamarika kareeta okucwekyerera." 
Proverbs27:1 Reka kweraatira nyencakare, ahabw'okuba torikumanya oku eryo izooba riraabe." 
Proverbs27:2 Reka ondiijo akuhimbise okukira iwe kwehimbisa; nangwa haakiri osiimwe omugyenyi, kwonka kitarugire mu kanwa kaawe." 
Proverbs27:3 Eibaare riremeera, n'omusheenyi gugira omutsindo; kwonka ekiniga ky'ekifamutima byombi nikibyeshumba." 
Proverbs27:4 Kashanga tegira saasi, ekiniga kiba rumira; mbwenu n'oha owaakubaasa kugumisiriza eihari?" 
Proverbs27:5 Okuhana butunu nikukira rukundo etarikweyoreka. 
Proverbs27:6 Omunyamukago ahutaaza n'omutima murungi; kwonka omuzigu anywegyera n'obugobya. 
Proverbs27:7 Ohaagire ayenugisa obwoki, kwonka omuntu oine enjara n'ebirikushaarira byona bimunurira." 
Proverbs27:8 Omuntu ekirare, otsigaho eka ye, ni nk'enyonyi etsigaho ekyashuri kyayo." 
Proverbs27:9 Amajuta n'omugaju binanura omutima; n'omuntu ananurwa okuhabura kwa munywani we okuruga aha mutima. 
Proverbs27:10 Otarihungira owa mwenesho waagwerwa ebihikiirizi; munywani waawe okuri haihi naakira mwenesho okuri hare. 
Proverbs27:11 Mwana wangye, gira obwengye, onanure omutima gwangye, mbone kugira eki naagarukamu omuntu orikunjuma." 
Proverbs27:12 Omunyabwengye ku areeba akabi ayeshereka; kwonka omushema akeegyema kamwita. 
Proverbs27:13 Omuntu ku aryemererera otarikumanywa omwiheho ekijwaro, kwonka ku aryemererera abanyamahanga we abe omukwato." 
Proverbs27:14 Oimuka kare munonga akaamuza naashabira mutaahi we omugisha, abarwa nk'orikumukyeena." 
Proverbs27:15 Enjura erikusiiba neetonyerera ni nk'omukazi entongani. 
Proverbs27:16 Okumuzibira ni nk'okutanga omuyaga, nainga nk'okwimata amajuta omu ngaro ya buryo." 
Proverbs27:17 Ekyoma kityaza ekindi, n'omuntu ahwezesa ondi." 
Proverbs27:18 Oreeberera gye omutiini gwe aryarya ebijuma byagwo, n'orinda mukama we aryaheebwa ekitiinwa." 
Proverbs27:19 Nk'oku omuntu ayereebera omu maizi, n'omutima gw'omuntu nikwo gumworeka." 
Proverbs27:20 Nk'oku okuzimu owa Nyamuteza n'okuhwerekyerera bitahaaga, n'amaisho g'omuntu nikwo gatahaaga kureeba." 
Proverbs27:21 Eiziiko rishemeza efeeza, omuriro gw'ekikoomi gushemeza ezaabu, n'omuntu amanyirwa aha bi barikumwevuga." 
Proverbs27:22 Nobu waakushekurirana ekifamutima n'engano omu shekuro, obufamutima bwakyo tibukaakirugamu." 
Proverbs27:23 Manya gye amasyo g'entaama zaawe oku gari, kandi ote omutima aha masyo g'ente zaawe;" 
Proverbs27:24 ahabw'okuba eitungo tirituura; mbwenu ekirunga kiryaguma nikihungurwa obusingye bwona? 
Proverbs27:25 Obunyaatsi ku bukunduuka, n'obundi bukamera, n'obw'aha bibungo bukarundaanwa," 
Proverbs27:26 nibwo abaana b'entaama barikuha eby'okujwara, n'omu mbuzi okaihamu eky'okugura ekibanja;" 
Proverbs27:27 kandi oryatunga amahenahene garikumara, gabe egabo yaawe n'ab'eka yaawe, kandi gatungye abazaana baawe." 
Proverbs28:1 Enyabibi zihunga hataine ozibingire, kwonka abahikiriire baba emanzi nk'entare." 
Proverbs28:2 Eihanga ku risiisikara rigira abategyeki baingi; kwonka abantu baaryo abarikwetegyereza kandi ab'obwengye baryarireetera kuguma rihamire. 
Proverbs28:3 Omworo ohata abandi booro ni nk'enjura y'eihunga etatsiga myaka. 
Proverbs28:4 Abateeta ha iteeka bahaisa enyabibi, kwonka abarikwata bo babarwanisa." 
Proverbs28:5 Enyabibi tizimanya by'oburyo, kwonka abasherura Nyakubaho babimariraho omutima." 
Proverbs28:6 Omworo w'emitwarize eshugaine naahita omutungi w'emicwe mibi. 
Proverbs28:7 Okuratira eiteeka, aba omwana w'obwengye; kwonka ogira ekimwe n'abanyamururu ahemura ishe." 
Proverbs28:8 Oyekanyisiza eitungo naazimbisiriza n'okushaba amagoba, aba naahendekyera ogirira abooro embabazi." 
Proverbs28:9 Oyeita amatu ngu atakaahurira eiteeka, okushaba kwe kuba ekihagaro." 
Proverbs28:10 Ohabisa abahikiriire akabatooza omuhanda mubi aryagwa omu kiina ki ayetimbiire; kwonka abataine ebi barikuhaahuuzibwa baryatunga obuhunguzi burungi. 
Proverbs28:11 Omuntungi ayegira omunyabwengye, kwonka omworo orikwetegyereza aryamukyenguruka." 
Proverbs28:12 Abahikiriire ku baza aha ngoma, habaho okwesiima kwingi; kwonka abantu enyabibi ku bategyeka, abantu beeshereka." 
Proverbs28:13 Oshereka ebibi bye tariba gye, kwonka obyemera kandi akabireka aryasaasirwa." 
Proverbs28:14 Omuntu w'omugisha n'otiina Nyakubaho obutoosha; kwonka oyegangaaza omutima aryagwerwa akagwe. 
Proverbs28:15 Omutegyeki mubi orikutegyeka abooro ni nk'entare erikutsinda nari nk'edubu erikusyokayo kurwana. 
Proverbs28:16 Omutegyeki otaine kwetegyereza aitsa abantu orubwa, kwonka oyanga amagoba gatahikire aryahangaara." 
Proverbs28:17 Omuntu otukuriirwe eshagama y'ondiijo mumurekye abe ekizengyerezi okuhitsya okufa; hatarigira owaamuhwera. 
Proverbs28:18 Oine emitwarize ehikire aryajunwa, kwonka ow'emitwarize y'obugobya aryagwa omu kiina." 
Proverbs28:19 Ohinga eshambu ye aryatunga ebyokurya bingi, kwonka orikukuratirira ebitaine muhoho aryaitwa obworo." 
Proverbs28:20 Omuntu omwesigwa aryagira emigisha mingi, kwonka otwaza bugubugu kutunga taribura kufubirwa." 
Proverbs28:21 Ti kirungi okugwera orubaju, kwonka omuntu akikora ahabw'okwetungira akokurya." 
Proverbs28:22 Omuntu omunyarwango agira obwira bw'okusherura eitungo; haza tamanya ngu enaku ziryamutaahirira. 
Proverbs28:23 Ohana omuntu aryarugaho abe omunyamukago okukira ow'orurimi rurikumamarika. 
Proverbs28:24 Oyambura ishe nari nyina, haza akagira ati: Tiinyine ki naashobya, aba mutaahi w'omwitsi." 
Proverbs28:25 Omunyamururu aimukiiriza entongane, kwonka oyesiga Nyakubaho aryatunga emigisha mingi." 
Proverbs28:26 Oyesiga ebiteekateeko bye aba ekifamutima, kwonka oine emitwarize y'obwengye aryaba buhooro." 
Proverbs28:27 Ogabira omworo tarikyena; kwonka omwehuzya aryaitwa emikyeeno. 
Proverbs28:28 Enyabibi ku zitegyeka, abantu beeshereka; kwonka ku zihwerekyerera abahikiriire bakanya." 
Proverbs29:1 Ohanwa kaingi akaguma agangaire aryahendeka ekitaraariraine, kandi taribaasa kutambirwa" 
Proverbs29:2 Abahikiriire ku bategyeka, abantu beesiima; kwonka ababi ku baza aha bukama, abantu bacura." 
Proverbs29:3 Omuntu okunda obwengye ananura ishe, kwonka okwatanisa na baamaraaya ashiishagura ebye." 
Proverbs29:4 Omugabe ku agira obwinganisa, ensi ye ehama, kwonka ogyema abantu kuha enguzi, agicwekyereza." 
Proverbs29:5 Omuntu omamarika mutaahi we, amutega ekigoye." 
Proverbs29:6 Omuntu mubi akwatirwa omu nshobi ze, kwonka ohikiriire ayeshongora, kandi ayesiima." 
Proverbs29:7 Omuntu ohikiriire amanya ebi omworo ashemereire kuheebwa; omubi we obwengye nk'obwo tabwetegyereza. 
Proverbs29:8 Abashungi bootsya orurembo, kwonka abanyabwengye bazibira kashanga." 
Proverbs29:9 Ow'obwengye ku ateera empaka n'ekifamutima, nobu kibiihirwa nari kisheka, tikigira buhuumure." 
Proverbs29:10 Abakunda kusheesha eshagama banga otaine rubanja; kwonka ab'emitwarize ehikire basherura oku baraajune amagara ge. 
Proverbs29:11 Ekifamutima kyorekyera kimwe ekiniga, kwonka ow'obwengye akiikaikanisa, akizibira." 
Proverbs29:12 Omutgegyeki ku ahurikiriza ebishuba, abakungu be boona baba babi." 
Proverbs29:13 Omunaku n'orikuhata baba hamwe; bombi Nyakubaho abajwisiza omushana ngu bahweze. 
Proverbs29:14 Omugabe ku acwera abanaku emanja omu bwinganisa, ekitebe kye kihama ebiro byona." 
Proverbs29:15 Omunyaafu n'okuhana bitungisa obwengye; kwonka omwana ku ahugwaho, ahemura nyina." 
Proverbs29:16 Abanyabibi ku bategyeka, ebishobyo bikanya; kwonka abahikiriire baryareeba enyabibi nizihwerekyerera." 
Proverbs29:17 Hana omwana waawe, naija kukugwisa gye, kandi akunanure omutima." 
Proverbs29:18 Ku haba hatariho burangi abantu banga kutegyekwa, kwonka okuratira eiteeka aine omugisha." 
Proverbs29:19 Ebigambo byonka tibihana muhuuku, ahabw'okuba nobu abyetegyereza, tabyetaho." 
Proverbs29:20 Noomanya omuntu orikugambisa obwira? Ekifamutima kiine amatsiko kumukira. 
Proverbs29:21 Otetsa omuhuuku we okuruga omu buto, aha muheru aryamuhungurira." 
Proverbs29:22 Omuntu w'ekiniga aimukiriza entongane, kandi orahuka kuguubwa kubi akanyisa ebicumuro." 
Proverbs29:23 Okwetunguura kw'omuntu kuryamubandika, kwonka omucureezi omu mutima aryatunga ekitiinwa." 
Proverbs29:24 Okwatanisa n'omushuma ayanga amagara ge; ku ahurira nibamukyeena tagamba kantu. 
Proverbs29:25 Okutiina abantu kuba okwetega omutego; kwonka oyesiga Nyakubaho aba buhooro. 
Proverbs29:26 Baingi basherura kushongoka aha mutegyeki, kwonka oburingaaniza omu muntu buruga ahari Nyakubaho." 
Proverbs29:27 Omuntu ohikiriire anuga enkozi y'ebibi, kandi enkozi y'ebibi enuga ow'emitwarize mirungi." 
Proverbs30:1 Ebi n'ebigambo bya Aguri mwene Yaake, owa Masa ebi yaagambiire Itiyeli na Ukali, ati: Ruhanga tari hamwe naanye; Ruhanga tari hamwe naanye; nyeshobeire." 
Proverbs30:2 Buzimazima ndi ekituuriizi, timpikire kuba omuntu. Tindikwetegyereza nk'omuntu." 
Proverbs30:3 Tindeegire bwengye, kandi tindikumanya Orikwera." 
Proverbs30:4 N'oha oratembire omu iguru kandi akashuuma? N'oha orabumbatiize omuyaga omu ntomi ze? N'oha orakomeire amaizi omu kijwaro? Eiziina rye n'oha, n'ery'omutabani ni riiha? Mbwenu noorimanya?" 
Proverbs30:5 Buri kigambo kya Ruhanga kihamibwa ku kiri eky'amazima. Niwe ngabo y'abamuhungiraho. 
Proverbs30:6 Otarigira eki waayongyera aha bigambo bye atakaakujuukirira okahinduka omunyabishuba. 
Proverbs30:7 Ninkushaba ebintu bibiri; otabiinyima ntakafiire: 
Proverbs30:8 Onyihireho kimwe ebitari by'amazima n'ebishuba; otampindura omworo nari omutungi; kureka ompe ebyokurya bi nkyenire byonka," 
Proverbs30:9 ntakaiguta nkarengyesereza, nkakwehakana, nkagira nti: Nyakubaho n'oha? Nainga shi ntakaaba omworo nkaiba, nkahemura eiziina rya Ruhanga wangye." 
Proverbs30:10 Otariregyesereza omuhuuku ahari mukama we, atakaakukyeena okakwatwa orubanja." 
Proverbs30:11 Hariho abakyeena baishebo, kandi bakanga kushabira baanyinabo emigisha." 
Proverbs30:12 Hariho abeeyeta abashemeire, haza kunu batakoogiibweho bihagaro byabo." 
Proverbs30:13 Reero hariho n'abandi, ebishi bagira amaisho g'amaryo! Ebishi bareebesa omugayano!" 
Proverbs30:14 Kandi hariho abu amaino gaabo gari nka zaarura, abu amaino gaabo gari nk'emisyo y'okucwekyereza abanaku kubaheza omu nsi, n'abakyene kubamara omu bantu." 
Proverbs30:15 Omushundo gwine bahara baagwo babiri, kandi bombi bahooga bati: Mpa! Mpa! Hariho ebintu bishatu ebitaiguta, kandi hariho n'ekya kana ekitabaasa kugira kiti: Naahaaga! Nibyo ebi:" 
Proverbs30:16 Okuzimu, enda y'engumba, ensi etahaaga maizi, kandi n'omuriro ogutagira guti: Naamarwa!" 
Proverbs30:17 Eriisho ry'ogwo oteerera ishe enaku, akeekunika akanga kuhurira nyina, riryanonkorwa ebikoona by'omu mpanga, ririibwe amahungu." 
Proverbs30:18 Hariho ebintu bishatu ebintangaaza munonga; nangwa ni bina ebi ntarikwetegyereza n'akakye; nibyo ebi: 
Proverbs30:19 emizeereerere y'empungu omu mwanya, emigyendere y'enjoka aha rukiri, emigyendere y'emeeri omu nyanja; kandi nk'oku omushaija atwazana n'empangare." 
Proverbs30:20 Egi niyo mitwarize y'omukazi enshambani: arya, ayeragaza eminwa, haza agira ati: Tiinyine ki naashobya." 
Proverbs30:21 Hariho ebintu bishatu ebitengyeetsa ensi, nangwa ni bina ebi etabaasa kugumisiririza; nibyo ebi:" 
Proverbs30:22 omuhuuku kurya obugabe, ekifamutima kwiguta ebyokurya," 
Proverbs30:23 omwishiki obengirwe kushwerwa, kandi n'omuzaana kucwa mugore we ahari iba." 
Proverbs30:24 Omu nsi harimu ebintu bina bikye munonga, kwonka bigira obwengye bwingi buzima; nibyo ebi:" 
Proverbs30:25 Obusiisibirizi n'oruganda rutaine maani, kwonka bwehunikira ebyokurya omu kyanda;" 
Proverbs30:26 endirira n'oruganda rutari rw'ebikaaka, kwonka zeeyombekyera amaju omu nkiri;" 
Proverbs30:27 enzigye tizigira mukama, kwonka zigyendera hamwe omu bimbuuro byazo;" 
Proverbs30:28 n'ekinya noobaasa kukitwara omu ngaro, kwonka shi kituura omu bikaari by'abagabe." 
Proverbs30:29 Hariho ebintu bishatu ebigyenda nibinyigimba; nangwa ni bina ebigyendesa eigundu; nibyo ebi: 
Proverbs30:30 Entare ekiza enyamaishwa ezindi zoona amaani, kandi tegira ki ehunga;" 
Proverbs30:31 enshaaki erikugyendesa eigundu, empaya y'embuzi, kandi omugabe orikunyimbanyimba omumaisho g'abantu be." 
Proverbs30:32 Ku oraabe obaire ori ekifamutima nooyehaisiriza, nari ku oraabe obaire nooconya enaama y'okukora ebibi, ote engaro aha munwa." 
Proverbs30:33 Okucunda amate kujwisa amajuta, okumiga enyindo kujwisa eshagama, kandi ekishinjo kiimukiriza entongane." 
Proverbs31:1 Ebi n'ebigambo bya Lemueli omugabe wa Masa ebi nyina yaamwegyeise: 
Proverbs31:2 N'enki, mwana wangye? N'enki, mwana 'we ou naayezaariire? N'enki, mwana wangye ou naashabire nimpigira Ruhanga?" 
Proverbs31:3 Otamarira amaani gaawe omu bakazi, n'omuri abo abacwekyereza abagabe." 
Proverbs31:4 Iwe Lemueli, tikishemereire bagabe, tikishemereire bagabe kunywa viino nari abategyeki okururuuhira amakuuta;" 
Proverbs31:5 batakaasinda bakeebwa ebiragiro, nainga bakaima abanaku ebibashemereire." 
Proverbs31:6 Amakuuta ogahe orikwenda kufa, na viino ogihe abaine obujune bwingi." 
Proverbs31:7 Ka banywe beebwe obworo bwabo, barekye kwijuka enaku zaabo." 
Proverbs31:8 Gambirira ekiteta, kandi otonganirire abataine kihwera." 
Proverbs31:9 Ogambe, ocwe emanja omu buryo, kandi abooro n'abakyene obahe ebibashemereire." 
Proverbs31:10 N'oha owaakubaasa kuzoora omukazi w'omutima? Omukazi otyo naakirira kimwe amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi. 
Proverbs31:11 Iba amwesiga n'omutima gwe gwona, kandi taribura kutunga." 
Proverbs31:12 Ananura iba, ataine ki amushaagiize ebiro by'amagara ge goona." 
Proverbs31:13 Asherura ebyoya by'entaama na fulakisi, kandi akoresa omuhimbo." 
Proverbs31:14 Ari nk'amaato g'abashuubuzi; ayeshakira ebyokurya hare. 
Proverbs31:15 Aimuka butakaseesire atebeekanisiza ab'eka ye ebyokurya, kandi abazaana be abaragiira eby'okukora." 
Proverbs31:16 Ayetegyereza enshambu, haza agigura; ebi aiha omu mikono ye abyejunisa kuhinga omusiri gw'emizaabibu." 
Proverbs31:17 Akoresa amaani n'emikono ye. 
Proverbs31:18 Areeba ebi arikukora bimwiniire omugasho. Etabaaza ye eraara neeyaka. 
Proverbs31:19 Akwata ekiti ky'okurukiraho, ayogosheraho ehuuzi, atyo ayerukira emyenda." 
Proverbs31:20 Ashashaanurira abooro engaro, kandi ahwera abakyene." 
Proverbs31:21 Ab'eka ye tabeemerereza mutima omu biro by'orubaare, ahabw'okuba ab'eka ye boona baba bajwaire ebirikutagata." 
Proverbs31:22 Ayebaziirira eby'okwefubika, kandi emyenda ye n'eya kitaani enungi na bujwa." 
Proverbs31:23 Iba amanywa gye omu marembo ashutami n'abakuru b'ensi. 
Proverbs31:24 Abaziira ebijwaro bya kitaani abitunda; n'abashuubuzi abatunza emyeko. 
Proverbs31:25 Ahunzirwe amaani n'ekitiinwa; taine ki arikuganya ahabw'ebiro by'omu maisho. 
Proverbs31:26 Agamba eby'obwengye kandi orurimi rwe rwegyesa eby'embabazi. 
Proverbs31:27 Areeberera gye emicwe y'ab'omu ka ye, kandi tarya ki atatuutukiire." 
Proverbs31:28 Abaana be baimuka, bamweta ow'omugisha, kandi iba nawe nikwo amusingiza naagira ati:" 
Proverbs31:29 Abakazi baingi batwaza gye, kwonka iwe noobakirira kimwe boona!" 
Proverbs31:30 Okubereshera kw'omubiri nikubeihabeiha, n'oburungi bw'aha maisho ni busha; kwonka omukazi otiina Nyakubaho n'ow'okuhaisibwa." 
Proverbs31:31 Mumusiimire ebi yaahendekyeire, haza ebi yaakozire bimurangaane omu marembo." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Ebigambo by'Omurangirizi mwene Daudi, omugabe w'omuri Yerusalemu." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Ogwo murangirizi naagira ati: Ebishi ebitaine muhoho ni busha! Ebitaine muhoho ni busha! Byona buzimazima ni busha! 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Mbwenu byona ebi omuntu ayehenengyera, ebi ayecurengyera omu nsi, bimugasira ki?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Obusingye burugaho n'obundi bwija; kwonka ensi egumaho ebiro byona. 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Eizooba rituruka kandi rirenga; bwanyima rirahuka kugaruka ei riturikira. 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Omuyaga guhuuha nigutoora obukiizi-bwa-buryo kandi guhuuha nigutoora obwa bumosho, gutyo guguma nigwehinguririza. Ku guheza kubuga gugaruka omu rugyendo rwagwo." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Emigyera yoona ehimintikira omu nyanja, kwonka enyanja teijura, ahabw'okuba ei emigyera eruga neehimintika niyo egaruka kuhimintikira." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Ebintu byona biijwire oburuhe, obu omuntu atarikubaasa kugamba. Manya eriisho tirihaaga kureeba, n'okutu tikuhaaga kuhurira." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Ekirabaireho nikyo kiribaho; n'ekirakozirwe nikyo kirikorwa. Kandi tihariho kintu kisya omu nsi. 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Mbwenu hariho eki baakugambaho ngu: Reeba, eki ni kisya? Manya kirabaireho omu biro ebyatubandiize." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Ebya ira tibiijukwa, n'ebitakabaireho ebiribaho nabyo tibiriijukwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Nyowe Omurangirizi nkaba omugabe wa Isiraeli omuri Yerusalemu. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Naata omutima aha kusherura n'okucondooza n'obwengye ebintu byona ebirikukorwa omu nsi. Buzimazima n'omurimo gw'okufa kubi ogu Ruhanga yaahaire abantu kwecurengyera. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Nkareeba ebintu byona ebikorwa omu nsi, naashanga bitaine muhoho, biri nk'okubinga omuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Manya ekikiikami tikirikubaasa kugororwa, n'ekitariho tikirikubaasa kubarwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Bwanyima naagira nti: Ntungire obwengye bwingi okukira boona abaategyekire Yerusalemu abambandiize; kandi mmazire omwanya muraingwa nyine obwengye n'okumanya. 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Haza naata omutima aha kumanya entaaniso y'obwengye n'obugwa-iraro n'obushema; naayetegyereza ku ebyo nabyo biri okubinga omuyaga. 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Manya ei omuntu agarukira kugira obwengye niyo agarukira kugira enaku. Ei agarukira kumanya niyo agarukira kugira obujune. 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Nkagira nti: Mbwenu ka nyerohe omu by'amashemererwa; nibwo ndaayemare ak'aha mutima. Kwonka shi ekyo nakyo kikabura omuhoho. 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Naagamba aha nsheko nti: N'obugwa-iraro! N'aha mashemererwa nti: Nigagasha ki? 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Nkateekateeka oku ndaayetungise amashemererwa na viino, obwo aha mutima niinyetenga kuguma nyine obwengye; naamariirira kukora eby'obushema ngu nkaareeba oku abantu bashemereire kutwaza omu biro bikye ebi bamara omu nsi." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Nkakora ebintu bikuru; naayeyombekyera ebikaari, naayehingira emisiri y'emizaabibu." 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Naayegirira emisiri, n'enshambu ezi naabyairemu emiti y'ebijuma bya ibara muringo." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Naayecungirira ebiyanja ebi ndaihemu amaizi g'okwitirira emiti yangye emezire. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Naagura abahuuku n'abazaana, n'abandi baazaarirwa omu kikaari kyangye. Naatunga amasyo maingi g'ente n'ag'entaama, naakiza abantu boona abambandiize omuri Yerusalemu." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Reero nkeerundaanira efeeza n'ezaabu nyingi munonga, nimbiiha omu mabiikiro g'abagabe, n'ag'ebyanga bi ndikutegyeka; naayetungira abeeshongozi abashaija n'abakazi, n'ebinyanshunju bingi, ebitwara abantu omutima." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ntyo naaba omuntu mukuru naakira boona abambandiize omuri Yerusalemu. Haza naaguma nyine obwengye. 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Kyona eki naayetengire nkakitunga, kandi tindeezibiire kushemererwa, ahabw'okuba nkaba nyesiima ahabw'ebi ndikwehenengyera. Haza okwo kwesiima kwaba nikwo kwaba ekihembo kyangye." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Bwanyima naayetegyereza ku byona ebi naakoreise emikono yangye, n'okuhendeka oku naabihendyekyeire, oku bitaragizire muhoho, ku byabaire okubinga omuyaga; kandi omu nsi ku hatariho kintu kyona ekiine omugasho." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ntyo ngaruka nyetegyereza obwengye n'obugwa-iraro, n'obushema; mbwenu owaahungurira omugabe naabaasa kukora ki? Manya onu naaba yaaherize kukikora." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Mpaho ndeeba ku obwengye bukira obushema, nk'oku omushana gukira omwirima." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Manya omunyabwengye ahweza, omushema abandagira; kwonka kandi naayetegyereza ku muheru yaabo boona eba emwe." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Naanye nikwo kugira nti: Ekigwera omushema, naanye kiryangwera. Nti, mbwenu nyowe nkabeera ki omunyabwengye nti? Nikwo kugira nti: Ekyo nakyo tikiine muhoho." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Manya omunyabwengye n'omushema tihariho origuma naabaijuka; ahabw'okuba omu biro ebiriija, boona baryaba baayebire. Mbwenu shi omunyabwengye ka naafa nk'oku omushema afa!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Ntyo ntamwa amagara, ahabw'okuba kyona ekikorwa omu nsi kikandeetera okugira enaku; byona tibigira muhoho, biba okubinga omuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Nkatamwa ebintu byona ebi naahendekyeire omu nsi, ahabw'okumanya ngu ndyabitsigira orimpungurira." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Mbwenu n'oha orikumanya ngu ogwo muntu aryaba omunyabwengye nari omushema? Kwonka niwe ariba mukama w'ebintu byona ebi naahendyekyeire ninkoresa obwengye bwangye omu nsi. Ekyo nakyo ni busha. 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ntyo nyefuuza, mpwa amatsiko ebintu byona ebi naahendekyeire niinyecurenga omu nsi." 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Ahabw'okuba obundi omuntu owaayehenengire naakoresa obwengye n'okumanya n'obuhangu, byona aba ari ow'okubitsigira otarabihendekyeire, abigaramisirizemu. Ekyo nakyo ni busha, kandi buzimazima tikihikire." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Mbwenu omuntu ebintu byona ebi ayehenengyera akafa kubi naayecurenga omu nsi, bimugasira ki?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Manya ebiro by'amagara ge byona biba eby'obusaasi, n'ebi akora bimureetera obujune; nangwa na nyekiro omutima gwe guguma gutahuumwire. Ekyo nakyo ni busha." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 N'ahabw'ekyo tihariho ekikirira omuntu okurya n'okunywa n'okunanurwa ebi ahendekyeire. Kwonka ekyo nakyo nkamanya ku kiruga ahari Ruhanga. 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Manya ahu We atari, n'oha orikubaasa kurya nainga orikubaasa kushemererwa?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Omuntu ogwisa gye Ruhanga, Ruhanga amuha obwengye n'okumanya n'okushemererwa. Kwonka omusiisi Ruhanga amuha omurimo gw'okushanguruza ebintu, akabirunda; haza akabitsigira orikugwisa gye Ruhanga. Ekyo nakyo ni busha, ni nk'okubinga omuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Buri kintu kiine obunaku bwakyo, kandi ekintu kyona ekikorwa omu nsi kiine amagingo gaakyo:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Obunaku bw'okuzaarwa, n'obunaku bw'okufa; obunaku bw'okubyara, n'obunaku bw'okukuura ebyabyairwe;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 obunaku bw'okwita, n'obunaku bw'okukiza; obunaku bw'okusheenya, n'obunaku bw'okwombeka;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 obunaku bw'okurira, n'obunaku bw'okusheka; obunaku bw'okucura, n'obunaku bw'okuzina;" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 obunaku bw'okunaganaga amabaare, n'obunaku bw'okugarunda; obunaku bw'okufumbatana, n'obunaku bw'okutafumbatana;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 obunaku bw'okusherura, n'obunaku bw'okubuza; obunaku bw'okubiika, n'obunaku bw'okunaga;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 obunaku bw'okutaagura, n'obunaku bw'okubaziira; obunaku bw'okuhunama, n'obunaku bw'okugamba;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 obunaku bw'okukundana, n'obunaku bw'okwangana; obunaku bw'orugamba, n'obunaku bw'obusingye;" 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Mbwenu omuntu ebi ahendekyera bimugasira ki? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Nkareeba emirimo ei Ruhanga yaahaire abantu kwehenengyera. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Buri kintu akakihanga kiri kirungi omu bunaku bwakyo; kandi akata omu mutima gw'omuntu ekyetengo ky'okumanya obunaku obwahingwire n'oburibaho; kwonka atabaase kumanya ebi Ruhanga yaakozire, okwiha aha kutandika okuhitsya aha muheru." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Nimmanya ku hatariho kirikukirira omuntu okushemererwa n'okunanuka akiriho. 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Kandi n'ekiconco ki Ruhanga aha, ngu buri muntu arye, anywe, kandi ananurwe byona ebi ahendekyeire." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Nimmanya ku ekintu kyona, eki Ruhanga akora, kigumaho ebiro byona, kitongyeirweho kandi kitacwirweho. Ruhanga akakikora atyo, ngu abantu babone kumutiina." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Kyona ekiriho kirabaireho. Na kyona ekiribaho kirabaireho. Kandi Ruhanga agaruka abaisaho ekintu nk'ekyo omu bunaku bwakyo. 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Kandi nkareeba omu nsi, ngu ahaakubaire okukora eby'oburyo habaho okukora ebitahikire; n'ahaakubaire okuhikiirira habaho okukora ebibi." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Naagira nti: Ruhanga aryacwera orubanja abahikiriire n'enyabibi; ahabw'okuba buri kintu na buri murimo akabiteeraho obunaku bwabyo. 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Kandi aha by'abantu, naagira nti: Ruhanga abagyeza kubooreka ku bataine ki barikukiza enyamaishwa." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Manya muheru y'abantu na muheru y'enyamaishwa eshushana; nk'oku omuntu afa, n'enyamaishwa nikwo efa. Byona biitsya; omuntu taine ki akiza enyamaishwa; ahabw'okuba byona ni busha." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Byona biza omu mwanya gumwe. Byona biruga omu mucuucu, kandi nimwo bigaruka." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 N'oha orikumanya ngu omutima gw'omuntu gwinamuka eruguru, kandi ogw'enyamaishwa gushuuma okuzimu omu itaka?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ntyo ndeeba ku hatariho kirikukirira omuntu kunanurwa ebi akozire; ahabw'okuba ogwo nigwo mugabo gwe. Mbwenu n'oha owaakumugarura kureeba ebirikurataho yaarugireho. 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Nkagaruka naareeba emigango ei abantu baine omu nsi. Naareeba oku abarikureebesibwa enaku barikurira, hatariho orikubahuumuriza; obushoboorozi bwinwe abarikubaita kubi, kandi hatariho orikubahuumuriza." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Naateekateeka nti: Abafu abaafiire bahiiriirwe okukira abahuriire abakiriho; 
Ecclesiastes4:3 kwonka orikubakira bombi ku ari otakabahoga, otakareebaga bibi birikukorwa omu nsi." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Ntyo ndeeba eby'okwehenenga byona ebikoresibwa oburyo bwona ku nibyo bireetera omuntu kugirirwa mutaahi we eihari; n'ekyo nakyo ku kitaine muhoho, kandi ku kiri okubinga omuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Omushema ohinya emikono ayeitsa enjara. 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Eigaro rimwe eriijwire obusingye nirikira amagaro abiri agaijwire emirabanamu, ekyo n'okubinga omuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Kandi nkareeba ebitaine muhoho omu nsi; 
Ecclesiastes4:8 omuntu otaine waabo, yaaba mutabani nari mweneishe, kwonka ebi ayehenengyera bitarikuhwa; n'amaisho ge gatakahaagaga itungo; haza atakeebuuzaga ati: Beitu ou mpendekyera nkeebuza okushemererwa n'oha? Ekyo nakyo ni busha, kandi n'omurimo gwijwire obujune." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Ababiri nibakira omwe, ahabw'okuba bazimuurirwa ebi bahendekyeire." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Manya ku bagwa, omwe aimutsya mugyenzi we. Kwonka bambe, ori omwe ku agwa, yaabura ow'okumwimutsya, areeba enaku." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Ekindi, ababiri ku babyama kumwe batagatirana. Kwonka ori wenka naabaasa ata kutagatirwa?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Kandi omuntu akaabaasa kusingura omuntu ori omwe; kwonka ababiri bakaamurema. Omurunga gw'enyabushatu tigurahuka kucweka. 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Omutsigazi omworo kwonka ow'obwengye naakira omugabe okuzire kandi omushema otakyenda kuhaburwa; 
Ecclesiastes4:14 ogwo mugabe, nobu yaakuba yaarugire omu kihome akaba omugabe, nari yaazairwe ari omworo omu ihanga rye." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Nkareeba abantu boona abarikugyendera omu nsi naareeba n'ogwo mwojo owaabaire ari ow'okuza omu bigyere bye. 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Abantu abu arikutegyeka bari baingi munonga. Kwonka abarikurataho tibarimujura. Buzimazima ekyo nakyo ni busha, kandi n'okubinga omuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Waaba nooza omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, yerinde emigyendere yaawe. Okuhika haihi okahurira nikuhita okutamba ebitambo nk'abashema abatamanya ku barikukora kubi." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Otarirahukirwa aha rurimi nari okwenda kugamba ekigambo omu maisho ga Ruhanga; ahabw'okuba we ari omu iguru, kandi iwe ori omu nsi. N'ahabw'ekyo ebigambo byawe bigume bibe bikye." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Manya omuntu ebi ayehenengamu nibyo aroota; n'omushema agamba maingi. 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Ku origira eki waahigira Ruhanga noomuraganisa, otarituuraho kukihikiiriza; ahabw'okuba tashemerererwa bashema. Kora eki waaraganisa." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Haakiri okutaraganisa, okukira okuraganisa okaremwa kuhikiiriza eki waaraganisa." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Akanwa kaawe katarikucumuzisa, bwanyima okagambira entumwa ya Ruhanga oti: Nshobize. Mbwenu nooyendera ki ku Ruhanga akugirira ekiniga ahabw'ebi waagamba, akakucwekyereza ahabw'ebi waakora?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Manya ebirooto oku bikanya, n'ebigambo bitaine muhoho niyo bigarukira kuba bingi; kwonka iwe guma otiine Ruhanga." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Omu nsi, ku orireeba abooro nibahatwa, batarikukorerwa by'obwinganisa, kandi nibaimwa ebibashemereire, kitarikutangaaza; ahabw'okuba omutegyeki mukuru atairweho eriisho orikumukiza obushoboorozi; n'abategyeki bakuru nabo baine abarikubatwara." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Kwonka omweru gw'ensi guba ogwa boona; n'omugabe atungwa ebi abantu bahingire. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Okunda empiiha tazihaaga, n'okunda obutungi tahaaga magoba. Ekyo nakyo tikiine muhoho." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Ebintu ku bikanya, n'ab'okubirya nabo bakanya. Mbwenu mukama waabyo aba agasiirwe ki, t'okubireeba kwonka?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Oturo tw'omukozi tumugwa gye, nobu arya bikye nari bingi; kwonka omwiguto gw'omutungi gumubuza oturo." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Hariho ekintu kibi munonga eki naareebire omu nsi, nibyo eby'obutungi ebi nyinabyo ayebiikira, bikamurugiramu akabi." 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Haza eby'obutungi bwe ebyo bikasiisikara ahabw'okuhikiirirwa; reero akizaara omutabani akashangwa ataine ki atsigaize. 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Nk'oku yaarugire omu nda ya nyina, nikwo arigyenda. Nk'oku yaizire ataine ki ajwaire, nikwo ataritwara kintu kyona eki yaahendekyeire, eki yaakugyenda nakyo omu ngaro." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Ekyo nakyo n'eky'akabi kahango; nk'oku yaizire nikwo arigyenda. Mbwenu nikimugasira ki okwitanira omuyaga," 
Ecclesiastes5:17 akamara ebiro bye byona arimbagiriirwe, aine enaku, ashobeirwe, arwaire, kandi naayetomboita?" 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Reeba, ekirungi kandi ekihikire eki ndebiire, n'omuntu kurya, akanywa, akananurwa byona ebi ahendekyeire omu nsi omu biro bikye eby'amagara ge agu Ruhanga amuhaire; ahabw'okuba ogwo nigwo mugabo gwe." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Kandi omuntu weena ou Ruhanga ahaire obutungi, n'ebitungwa, n'obushoboorozi kumunanura, akaikiriza omugabo gwe, akashemerererwa ebi ahendekyeire; ekyo n'ekiconco kya Ruhanga." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Manya taryemerereza mutima ebiro by'amagara ge, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga naaba amuhaire okushemererwa kw'okumuhuzya." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Hariho ekibi ki naareebire omu nsi kandi ekihingamira abantu,"
