Ecclesiastes6:2 nikyo ky'omuntu ou Ruhanga ahaire obutungi n'eby'okutunga n'ekitiinwa, atabuzirwe kintu kyona eki arikwenda, kwonka Ruhanga atabimwikirize kumunanura; kureka bikananura owa hangahari. Ekyo ni busha, kandi n'okubonabona kw'obusaasi." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Omuntu okuzaara abaana igana, akahangaara emyaka mingi, kwonka omu magara ge akaburwa kunanurwa ebintu birungi, akataho okubura kiziika; ningira ngu ogwo muntu naahitwa enda erugiremu." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Manya egyo nda erugiremu eburira omu mwirima, kandi omuri ogwo mwirima nimwo eburiza obutsibyo." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Nobu eba etakanyenyeerize nari okumanya ekintu kyona, kwonka etunga obuhuumure okukira ogwo muntu." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Nangwa nobu yaakuhangaara emyaka rukumi emirundi ebiri, atagizire bu ananukire, mbwenu byombi tibirikuza omu mwanya gumwe?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Byona ebi omuntu ayecurengyera aba naayehenengyera enda ye; kwonka tahaaga. 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Mbwenu obwo omunyabwengye naakiza ki omushema? Kandi omworo orikumanya kutwaza gye omu maisho g'abantu agasirwa ki? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Okugira eki waareeba nikukira okukora oku n'oku nooyetenga. Ekyo nakyo ni busha; n'okubinga omuyaga. 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Ekintu kyona ekirabaireho kikeetwa eiziina, n'oku omuntu ari nikumanywa; kandi ku atabaasa kuhakanisa orikumukiza amaani." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Ei ebigambo bigarukira kuba bingi, niyo bigarukira kubura omuhoho, kandi ekyo omuntu tikiine ki kimugasira." 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Mbwenu n'oha orikumanya ekirungi ekishemereire omuntu omu magara ge g'ebiro bikye, agataine muhoho, agahingura nk'ekicuucu? Kandi n'oha owaakugambira omuntu ebiribaho ahansi y'eizooba, yaaherize kufa?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Eiziina rirungi nirihita amajuta g'okwesiiga ag'obuguzi bwingi. Eizooba ry'okufeeraho nirihita eizooba ry'okuzaarirwaho. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Okuza omu nju erimu okucura nikuhita okuza omu nju erimu obugyenyi; ahabw'okuba egyo niyo eba muheru y'abantu, kandi abahuriire bakigumya aha mutima." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Enaku zihita ensheko, ahabw'okuba nobu zikwiririmbya aha maisho, kwonka zikureetera okumanya bukuru." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Omunyabwengye aguma naijuka okufa, kwonka omushema aijuka okushemererwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Omuntu okuhurira omunyabwengye orikumuhana, nikuhita okuhurira ebyeshongoro by'abashema." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Manya nk'oku amahwa gabarabarukira ahansi y'enyungu, n'ensheko y'abashema nikwo eshusha." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Buzimazima okuhata kuhindura omunyabwengye omushema, kandi enguzi eita omutima;" 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Omuheru gw'ekintu guhita okutandika kwakyo; n'oine omutima gurikugumisiriza ahita ow'omutima gw'amaryo. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Otarirahuka kugira ekiniga; ahabw'okuba ekiniga kituura omu mutima gw'abashema. 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Otarigira oti: Ahabw'enki ebiro bya ira bikaba nibihita ebi? Ahabw'okuba ekyo nooba otakibuuziise bwengye. 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Obwengye buba burungi nk'obuhunguzi, bugasira abantu abakihuriire." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Manya obwengye burinda omuntu, nk'oku arindwa empiiha. Kandi omugasho gw'okumanya guba obwengye kurinda amagara g'obwine." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Yetegyereze ebi Ruhanga yaakozire. Mbwenu n'oha orikubaasa kugorora ebi yaakiikamize? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Aha izooba ry'okugogyeera oshemererwe; kandi aha izooba ry'okugwerwa akagwe, oijukye ku byombi Ruhanga niwe yaabitaireho, ngu omuntu atakaamanya muheru ye." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Omu magara gangye agataine muhoho ndeebire bingi. Omuntu ohikiriire, nobu aba ari murungi ata, afa; kandi omuntu enyabibi, nobu aguma naakora ebibi, agumaho." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Otarirengyesereza kuba ohikiriire, kandi otaryehindura omunyabwengye orengyesereize. Mbwenu nooyendera ki kweita?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Otarirengyesereza kuba enkozi y'ebibi, nari okuba omushema. Mbwenu nooyendera ki kufa obunaku bwawe butakahikire?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Ni kirungi okuhamya eki, kandi na kiriya okutakirekura; ahabw'okuba orikutiina Ruhanga naabisingura byona." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Obwengye buha omunyabwengye amaani okukira abategyeki ikumi b'omu rurembo. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Buzimazima omuri egi nsi, tihariho ohikiriire okora ebirungi, otakakoraga kibi." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Otarita omutima aha bi abantu barikugamba, nyentsya okahurira omuheereza waawe naakukyeena." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Haza naiwe nooyemanya ku orakyeenire abandi emirundi mingi. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ebyo byona nkabihamya ninkoresa obwengye; naagira nti: Ndyaba omunyabwengye. Kwonka bwamba hare. 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Mbwenu ekiri hari okuzimu munonga n'oha owaakukizoora? 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ntyo nta omutima aha kumanya n'okucondooza n'okusherura obwengye n'eki birikumanyisa, n'okumanya oku obushema buri bubi, n'oku obufamutima buri obugwa-iraro." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Bwanyima naareeba ekirikukiza rufu obushaarizi. Niwe mukazi oba omutego, omutima gwe gukaba ekigoye, emikono ye ekaba enjegyere. Omuntu okora ebi Ruhanga arikusiima niwe amwoga omu mikono; kwonka omusiisi, ogwo mukazi amuhamba." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Mbwenu Omurangirizi naagira ati: Reeba, eki nikyo nzoire, ahabw'okuteerana ekintu n'ekindi, ngu ndeebe oku biraingane;" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 ekintu eki nsherwire kaingi, kwonka ntakibone. Omu bantu rukumi nkabonamu omushaija omwe; kwonka omuri abo boona tindaboinemu mukazi." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Reeba, eki kyonka nikyo nzoire; Ruhanga akahanga omuntu ahikire, bwanyima ebireetera abantu kweshobera nibo babyecwera." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Mbwenu n'oha ori nk'omunyabwengye? Kandi n'oha orikumanya kushoboorora amakuru g'ekintu? Obwengye bw'omuntu bumushemuura ahamaisho, bumumaraho emitaafu." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Guma okore eki omugabe aragiire; kandi ahabw'endahiro ei waarahiire ahari Ruhanga, orekye kuhahaaza omutima." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Rahuka kuruga omu maisho ge, oteeziringa, nobu ekyo kiraabe kitarikukushemereza, ahabw'okuba we akora eki arikwenda." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Manya eki omugabe agamba kiba kikuru. Mbwenu n'oha owaakumugira ati; Nookora ki? 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Oyorobera ekiragiro tagwerwa kabi; kandi omutima gw'omunyabwengye gumanya obunaku n'oburyo bu kikorwamu. 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Buri kintu kiine obunaku bwakyo n'oburyo bu kikorwamu omuntu, nobu aba aremereirwe enaku." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Manya aba atarikumanya kiraabeho. Mbwenu n'oha owaakumumanyisa oku kiraabe? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Tihariho muntu oine obushoboorozi kuzibira omutima gwe kucweka, nari okwosesa eizooba rye ry'okufa. Aha rugamba tihabaho kuragiira engabo kutaaha, n'abeehaireyo kukora ebibi tibibajuna." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ebyo byona nkabyetegyereza ntaire omutima aha birikukorwa omu nsi, nindeeba abantu barikutegyekyesa bagyenzi baabo eikama nibabasaasa." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Reero nkareeba abantu enyabibi nibaziikwa. Bakaba bataaha omu mwanya ogurikwera, kandi bagurugamu; haza baasiimwa ab'omu rurembo ru baakoreiremu ebintu nk'ebyo. Ekyo nakyo ni busha." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Ahabw'enkozi z'ebibi okutafubirwa juba, nikyo abantu beeheerayo kukora ebibi." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Abasiisi nobu bakora ebibi emirundi igana, bakahangaara, nimmanya ku abatuura omu maisho ga Ruhanga nibamutiina nibo bariba gye;" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 kwonka abantu enyabibi tibariba gye, n'ebiro by'amagara gaabo ebiri nk'ekicuucu, tibiryongyerwaho, ahabw'okuba tibatiina Ruhanga." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Hariho ekindi ekitaine muhoho ekibaho omu nsi; abahikiriire okuheebwa ebifubiro ebyakuhairwe enkozi z'ebibi; n'enkozi z'ebibi zikaheebwa ebihembo ebyakuhairwe abahikiriire. Ekyo nakyo ninkyeeta ekitaine muhoho. 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Nikyo ndikusiimira okwejaramya; manya omuntu taine kirungi kyona ahansi y'eizooba, kureka okurya, n'okunywa, n'okwenanura; ahabw'okuba ebyo nibyo ariguma nabyo omu kwehenenga kwe, omu biro by'amagara ge agu Ruhanga amuha omu nsi." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Ku naataire omutima aha kumanya obwengye n'okureeba emirabanamu egirwa abantu omu nsi, naareeba ku hatariho muntu n'omwe ohumbya amaisho kugwejegyera." 
Ecclesiastes8:17 Bwanyima naareeba byona ebi Ruhanga akora, omuntu ku atarikubaasa kushoboorokyerwa emirimo ekorwa ahansi y'eizooba. Omuntu nobu yaakwehenenga ata kwenda kugimanya, takaagishoboorokyerwa. Nangwa n'omunyabwengye nobu arikugira ngu naagimanya, tarikubaasa kugishoboorokyerwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ebyo byona nkamara omwanya muraingwa nimbiteekateekaho, nimbyetegyereza; oku abahikiriire n'abanyabwengye n'ebi bakora biba omu mikono ya Ruhanga. Yaaba biri ebya rukundo nari ebya rwango, tihariho orikukimanya. Byona tibibagirira muhoho." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Ahabw'okuba muheru yaabo eba emwe; abahikiriire n'enyabibi, abarungi n'ababi, abashemeire n'abatashemeire, n'ahari ogwo otamba ebitambo n'otabitamba. Oku omuntu murungi aba, n'omusiisi nikwo aba; n'ogwo orahira, ni nk'ogwo otenda kurahira." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ekyo nikyo kibi ky'ebintu byona ebikorwa ahansi y'eizooba, byona okugira muheru. Ekindi, abantu ku baba bakiri omu nsi, emitima yaabo eba eijwire ebibi n'eiraro. Haza bwanyima bafa." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Kwonka okwatanisa n'abahuriire agira amatsiko. Embwa ehuriire ekira entare efiire. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Abahuriire bamanya ku barifa, kwonka abaafiire tibagira ki bamanya, kandi tibaheebwa bindi bihembo, ahabw'okuba baba batakiijukwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Rukundo yaabo na rwango yaabo n'eihari ryabo biba bitakiriho, kandi baba batakikwatanisa na bandi omuri byona ebirikukorwa ahansi y'eizooba." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Irooko orye ebyokurya byawe oshemereirwe, onywe viino yaawe oshemuukire; ahabw'okuba Ruhanga yaaherize kusiima ebi orikukora." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Ebijwaro byawe ka bigume nibyera, omutwe gwawe gurekye kuburamu amajuta." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Yenanure n'omukazi ou orikukunda omu biro by'amagara gaawe goona, agataine muhoho, agu Ruhanga yaakuhaire omu nsi. Manya ogwo nigwo mugabo gwawe omu magara aga, n'omu mirimo yaawe ei oyehenengamu omu nsi." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Kyona eki oraahitsyeho engaro, okikore n'amaani; ahabw'okuba okuzimu owa Nyamuteza ei orikuza, tihariyo murimo, nobu kwakuba okuteekateeka nari okumanya nainga obwengye." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Nkagaruka naareeba ngu omu nsi abairukisa engoga tibo basinga omu mpaka z'okwiruka, n'ab'amaani tibo basingura orugamba, n'abanyabwengye tibo batunga ebyokurya, n'abarikwetegyereza tibo baba abatungi, n'abanyamengye tibo batetsibwa; kwonka boona nikwo bagwerwa bakahikiirirwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Manya omuntu tamanya bugingo ye. Nk'oku ebyenyanja bikwatirwa omu katimba kabi, n'oku enyonyi zikwatirwa omu mutego, nikwo abantu bagwa omu busya omu bunaku bubi, baagwerwa kitaraariire." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Kandi nkareeba eky'okureeberaho eki eky'obwengye omu nsi, kyansusira kikuru." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Hakaba hariho ekirorero kikye ekirimu abantu mbarwa. Omugabe w'amaani yaija kukirwanisa, yaakigota, yaakyombekaho eby'okukigota bihango." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Kwonka omuri ekyo kirorero haashangwa harimu omushaija omworo, oine obwengye. Haza ahabw'obwengye bwe yaakikiza. Kwonka ogwo mushaija omworo bugaywa, n'ebi yaayamba batabyeteho." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Nyowe ningira nti: Obwengye nibukira amaani, nobu obwengye bw'omworo bugaywa, n'ebi yaagamba batabyeteho." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Ebigambo by'omunyabwengye ebi abantu bahurira bacecekire, nibihita ebi omutegyeki agambira ahagati y'abashema naayamuza." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Obwengye nibukira eby'okurwanisa omu rugamba, kwonka omusiisi omwe ashiisha ebirungi bingi." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Eshohera zifiire zinuutsya amajuta g'omwotezi. N'obushema bukye bucwa busha obwengye n'ekitiinwa. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Omutima gw'omunyabwengye gumutooza ahari buryo, kwonka ogw'omushema gumutooza ahari bumosho." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Nangwa omushema nobu aba naagyenda omu muhanda, tayetegyereza, ou yaareeba weena amweta omushema." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Omutegyeki ku arikugirira ekiniga, otariruga omu mwanya gwawe; ahabw'okuba okutabakirwa kwawe kuryagwisiriza ebicumuro bihango." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Hariho ekibi ki naareebire omu nsi kiri ekishobyo ky'omutegyeki. 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Abashema kuteebwa omu myanya mikuru, abatungi bakateebwa omu myanya erikugaywa." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Nkareeba abahuuku batembire embaraasi; n'abategyeki nibagyendesa ebigyere nk'abahuuku. 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Otimba ekiina akigwamu, n'ofumura orugo arumwa enjoka." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Ohigura amabaare gamuhutaaza, n'oshatura empimbi aba ayogire amagara." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ekyoma ku kiba kitaine bwogi, omuntu ataakityaza, agyemeserezibwa kutemesa amaani; kwonka obwengye buhwera omuntu kuhitsya eki arikukora." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Enjoka ku eruma omuntu etakagomboirwe, omurumuuzi aba naayeruhiza busha." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Ebi omunyabwengye agamba bimureetera kusiimwa, kwonka ebi omushema agamba bimwita." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Ebi atandika kugamba biba obufamutima, n'ebi ahereeruka kugaaniira biba obushazi." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Omushema agamba maingi, kwonka omuntu tamanya ebiribaho n'ebiribikurata. Mbwenu n'oha orikubaasa kubimushoboororera yaarugireho?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Ebi omushema ayehenengyera bimurusya, abura kumanya omuhanda gurikuza omu rurembo." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Iwe nsi 'we, ebishi ori omugwerwa kagwe, omugabe waawe ku araabe ari muto n'abategyeki baawe nibaimukira aha magyenyi!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Iwe nsi 'we, ebishi oine mugisha, omugabe waawe ku araabe ari omwana w'abantu, n'abategyeki baawe nibarya amagyenyi omu bunaku bwago, kutunga amaani, kutari kusinda!" 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Obwegande bubonza orukanga, obweremwa bureetera enju kutura." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Obugyenyi buteebwaho ahabw'okusheka, viino enanura amagara; kwonka empiiha niyo ebimara omukyeno." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Otarijuma omugabe, nobu kwakuba okumujumira aha mutima, kandi otarijuma omutungi, nobu kwakuba okumujumira endugu; ahabw'okuba enyonyi y'omu kaabunga eryatwara egyo nkuru, entumwa y'amapapa ebuzye eki waagamba." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Tambika ebyokurya byawe aha maizi, haza oryabizimuurirwa hahingwireho ebiro." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Ha emigabo yaawe abantu mushanju, nobu baakuba munaana; ahabw'okuba torikumanya kabi akaakubaho omu nsi." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ebicu ku biijura, enjura egwa, n'omuti ku gugwera aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, nari aha bwa-bumosho, ei gugwera niyo guguma." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Oreebereza omuyaga tabiba, ohanga amaisho ebicu tagyesha." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Nk'oku otamanya muhanda gw'omuyaga, n'oku amagufa gakurira omu nda y'omukazi oine enda, nikwo otamanya byona ebi Ruhanga akora." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Omu kasheeshe biba embibo zaawe, n'omu mwabazyo otagwisa emikono; ahabw'okuba torikumanya ebiriba gye, yaaba eki nari kiriya, nainga byombi." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Omushana gunura, kandi okureeba eizooba kureetera amaisho kushemererwa." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Omuntu ku araaramaare emyaka mingi akihuriire, agishemerererwemu yoona; kwonka amanye ku ebiro by'omwirima biriba bingi. Ebyo byona ebiribaho tibiine muhoho." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Imwe minyeeto 'mwe, mushemerererwe omunyeeto gwanyu. Omutima gwanyu gugume nigwesiima omu biro by'okunyeeta kwanyu. Mutwaze nk'oku murikwenda, kandi nk'oku murikureeba. Kwonka mumanye ngu ahabw'ebyo byona, Ruhanga aryabacwera orubanja." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 N'ahabw'ekyo mwihe amaganya omu mitima yaanyu, n'obusaasi omu mibiri yaanyu; ahabw'okuba obutsigazi n'obuhangare ni busha." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Kandi guma oijukye Omuhangi waawe omu biro by'omunyeeto gwawe, ebiro bibi bitakaizire n'emyaka etakafundiriize, ei origiriramu oti: Yantama." 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Omwijukye eizooba n'okwezi n'enyonyoozi bitakashwekirwe mwirima, n'ebicu bitakagarukireho enjura yaatsya;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 omu biro ebi abarinzi b'enju baritetemeramu n'abashaija b'amaani bakabundabunda, abasi bakarereera ahabw'okuba bakye n'abarikuringuririza omu madirisa amaisho gakagiibwaho oruho;" 
Ecclesiastes12:4 enyigi ezirikureeba omu mihanda zikakingwa, n'amaraka g'emengo gakagamba mpora; omuntu akasisiimurwa eiraka ry'enyoyi, n'ebirikujumeeza amaraka g'ebyeshongoro bikateerwa mpora;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 bakatiina kuza omu bibungo; ebirikutiinisa biri omu muhanda; omuyembe gukarabya, eseenene zikeekurura ziitsirwe omwiguto; omuntu akahura eki akunda, ahabw'okuba omuntu aba naaza owaabo ey'entuura; obwo abarikucura nibazengyerera omu mihanda;" 
Ecclesiastes12:6 akahuuzi k'efeeza katakashazirwe nari orwabya rw'ezaabu rutakaatikire nainga enyungu etakaatikiire ha iziba nari enyamuziga etakacwekyeire ha kiziba; 
Ecclesiastes12:7 mpaho omucuucu gukagaruka omu itaka, nk'oku gwabaire guri; n'omutima gukagaruka owa Ruhanga owaaguhaire." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Omurangirizi naagira ati: Byona buzimazima ni busha; tibiine muhoho. 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Bwanyima ogwo murangirizi, otabariiremu ky'okuba omunyabwengye, akeegyesa abantu ebi arikumanya, yaagyeragyeranisa enfumu, yaazeega, kandi yaazitebeekanisa ataireho omutima." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Omurangirizi akateeraho kusherura ebigambo birikunurira abantu, yaabahandiikira eby'amazima abishorongize gye." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Ebigambo by'abanyabwengye ni nk'emihunda; kandi ebigambo by'Omuriisa omwe wa boona, ebiteerainwe hamwe, ni nk'emishumaari ehamire." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Mwana wangye, ka nkugambire ekindi ky'okwerinda; okuhandiika ebitabo bingi tikugira bugarukiro, n'okwega munonga kurusya." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Okuhendera byona ebi waahurira: Guma otiine Ruhanga, okuratire ebiragiro bye, ahabw'okuba ekyo nikyo omuntu yaateereirweho kukora." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Manya Ruhanga aryacwera orubanja ekintu kyona ekyakozirwe, n'ekintu kyona eky'omubonano, yaaba kibi nari kirungi." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Eki n'ekyeshongoro rukira-byona ekya Solomooni. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Nkaabaasibwa ki onnywegyeza eminwa yaawe, ahabw'okuba rukundo yaawe neehita viino;" 
SongOfSongs1:3 amajuta gaawe agu oyesiiga nigataamirana omugaju, eiziina ryawe ni nk'amajuta gu baashuka; nikyo empangare zikukundira." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Onyehitsye omu ntegye, twehuute, omugabe antaahize omu kishengye kye, nitwija kushemererwa, twesiimire omuriiwe; tuhaise rukundo yaawe okukira viino." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Imwe bahara ba Yerusalemu 'mwe, niinyiragura, kwonka ndi murungi, ndi nk'amahema ga Kedari; nari nk'emikingo y'omu kikaari kya Solomooni." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Murekye kunshamaarira, ngu niho ndikwiragura; manya eizooba niryo ryambabwire. Beene maawe bakangirira ekiniga, bampindura omurinzi w'emisiri y'emizaabibu, haza ogwangye tinaagurinda!" 
SongOfSongs1:7 Iwe, ou nkunda n'omutima gwangye gwona, ngambira ei oriisiza obusyo bwawe bw'entaama, n'ei obuzaagiriza omu ihangwe; ndekye kuba nk'ekizengyerezi omu masyo ga bagyenzi baawe." 
SongOfSongs1:8 Iwe mukazi orikuhita abandi 'we, ku oraabe otarikuhamanya, kuratira ekirari ky'obwo busyo; oriisize abaana b'entaama zaawe aha rubaju rw'amahema g'abariisa." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Iwe nkunzi yangye, ninkushushanisa ebuguma y'embaraasi z'ebigaari bya Faraaho." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Enshaya zaawe zihunzirwe emishagiko. N'amaraka gaawe gahunzirwe enkwanzi z'amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi. 
SongOfSongs1:11 Nitwija kukukorera amahunde g'ezaabu, n'amapeesha g'efeeza." 
SongOfSongs1:12 Omugabe ku yaabaire ahuumuriire aha kitanda kye, amajuta gangye gaataamirana omugaju." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Nkunzi yangye ahariinye ni nk'akashaho k'entsinda y'omugaju, akari ahagati y'amabeere gangye." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Nkunzi yangye ni nk'enganda y'ebirabyo eby'omu misiri y'emizaabibu ya Engedi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Nkunzi yangye, ebishi, ori murungi! Ebishi, ori murungi; amaisho gaawe ni nk'ag'amaiba." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Iwe nkunzi yangye, ebishi ori murungi! Buzimazima ori murungi, ekitanda kyaitu kyariirwe obunyaatsi bw'omuroba." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Emitambiko y'enju yaitu n'eya kaarwenda, n'emiraba yaayo n'emiryohe." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ndi nk'endungu ya Saharooni, nk'emyangangye y'omu mpanga." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Nk'oku omwangangye guba omu mahwa, na nkunzi yangye nikwo aba omu baishiki." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Nk'oku omuti gw'omucungwa guba omu kibira, na nkunzi yangye nikwo ari omu batsigazi, nkashutama omu kicuucu kye nshemereirwe munonga, ebijuma bye byannurira." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Yantaasya omu nju y'obugyenyi, yandeebesa amaisho ga rukundo." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Mpimbuuza otuzaabibu, onduhuuzise otucungwa; ahabw'okuba rukundo n'ey'okuunyita." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Nkaabaasibwa ki omukono gwe gwa bumosho gunshegura, n'ogwa buryo gunfumbata!" 
SongOfSongs2:7 Imwe bahara ba Yerusalemu 'mwe, nimurahire esirabo n'ebuguma z'empara, ku mutarikwija kusisiimura nkunzi yangye; n'obu kwakuba okumwimutsya atakeeyendeire." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Nimpurira eiraka rya nkunzi yangye, ngugwo naija naagurukyeerera aha nshozi, naarengyera aha bibungo." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Nkunzi yangye ni nk'esirabo nari omunyahara gw'empara, reeba, ayemereire enyima y'orugo rwaitu, naaringuriza omu madirisa, naayozya amaisho omu katimba." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Nkunzi yangye nangambira naagira ati: Nkunzi yangye imuka, iwe murungi wangye rugayo tugyendane." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Manya reeba, katumba ehwaire, obunaku bw'enjura buhingwire." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Ebirabyo omu nsi nibitandika kurabya, obunaku bw'okweshongora bwahika, n'eiraka ry'amaiba nirihurirwa omu nsi yaitu." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Omutiini nigwana ebijuma byagwo, n'emizaabibu neerabya, neetaamirana emigaju, nkunzi yangye imuka, iwe murungi wangye, ija tugyendane." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Iwe nkombe yangye, otuura oyesherekire omu bikondokondo by'enkiri, n'omu nyanga z'amabaare, ka nkureebe aha maisho, mpurire eiraka ryawe, manya eiraka ryawe nirishemeza, n'ahamaisho gaawe ni harungi." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Nimutukwatire zaamuha, bwamuha obwo oburikushiisha emisiri y'emizaabibu, ahabw'okuba emisiri yaitu y'emizaabibu neerabya." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Nkunzi yangye n'owangye, naanye ndi owe; ariisiza obusyo bwe bw'entaama omu myangangye." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Iwe nkunzi yangye 'we, garuka, obe nk'esirabo nainga nk'omunyahara gw'empara aha nshozi za Beteeri, okuhitsya obu buraasheeshe, omwirima gukakinguuka." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Ku naabaire mbyami aha kitanda kyangye nyekiro, naasherura ou omutima gwangye gukunda; ku naamusherwire, tinaamubona, ku naamwetsire, tiyaanyetaba." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Mbwenu niinyija kwimuka, ngyendagyende omu rurembo, omu nguuto, n'omu nteeraniro z'emihanda; nsherure ou nkunda n'omutima gwangye gwona; ahabw'okuba nkamusherura, tinaamubona." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Abarinzi ku baabaire nibagyendagyenda omu rurembo, bandeeba, naababuuza nti: Mwareeba ou omutima gwangye gukunda?" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Ku naabaire naabarabaho nti; naareeba ou omutima gwangye gukunda. Naamuhamya, tinaamureka akagyenda, okuhitsya obu naamureetsire omu nju ya maawe, omu kishengye ky'owanzaire." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Imwe bahara ba Yerusalemu 'mwe, nimurahire esirabo n'ebuguma z'empara, ku mutarikwija kusisiimura nkunzi yangye; n'obu kwakuba okumwimutsya, atakeeyendeire." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Mbwenu kiriya ekirikuruga omu ihamba ni ki? Ekiri nk'enyomyo y'omwika, ekyoteziibwe entsinda y'omugaju, n'obubaani, n'emigaju yoona eseire ey'abashuubuzi?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Reeba, n'engozi ya Solomooni! Eyehinguririziibwe abashaija b'amaani makumi mukaaga, ab'omu mamanzi ga Isiraeli." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Boona bahagatiire za rurara, kandi n'abarwani rugambwa. Buri omwe ayebeebire rurara aha kibero, ahabw'okwerinda akabi kaakubaho nyekiro." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Omugabe Solomooni akeekorera engozi y'embaaho y'emiti ya Lebanooni. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Yaagikorera emigamba y'efeeza, enyima yaaba ey'ezaabu, aharikushitamwa haayo baahashwekyesa ebya bujwa; omunda yaayo bahara ba Yerusalemu baahakoresa rukundo." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Imwe bahara ba Siyooni 'mwe, nimushohore, mureebe Omugabe Solomooni, ajwaire ekirunga eki nyina yaamujwekire aha izooba ri yaashwereireho; eizooba eri omutima gwe gwashemerereirweho." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Iwe nkunzi yangye, ebishi oba murungi, ebishi oba murungi, amaisho gaawe ni nk'ag'enkombe omu kyetwekyerero kyawe; eishokye ryawe ni nk'obusyo bw'embuzi zirikurundukira omu nkiizi za Gileadi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Amaino gaawe ni nk'obusyo bw'entaama zikyegyetsirwe ebyoya, ezirikwinamuka niziruga kwoga, zoona ezizaara empasha, kandi hatariho n'emwe omurizo efiisa." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Eminwa yaawe ni nk'omujwaro gwa karari, n'akanwa kaawe ni karungi. Enshaya zaawe ni nk'embari z'eikomamahanga, omu kyetwekyerero kyawe." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Ebitsya byawe ni nk'omunaara gwa Daudi ogw'ombekirwe nk'ekigo kigumire; oguhanikirwemu engabo rukumi, zoona ziri engabo z'abarwani." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Amabeere gaawe gombi ni nk'eminyahara ebiri y'empasha z'esirabo, eziriira omu myangangye." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Ku buraabe nibusheesha buti, nibuyangayanga, niinyija kwehuuta, nze omu rushozi rw'entsinda z'emigaju, n'omu kibungo ky'obubaani." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Nkunzi yangye, ori murungi weena, toine kamogo." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Iwe mugore wangye, ija turugye kumwe Lebanooni, ija turugye kumwe Lebanooni. Rahuka, orugye aha mutwe gw'Orushozi Amaara, aha mutwe gwa Seniri na Herumooni, omu maaya g'entare, omu bibungo bituurwamu engwe." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Ontwaire omutima, iwe munyaanyazi, mugore wangye, ontwaire omutima wannagira oti erisho, ojwaire orukwanzi rw'eihunde omu maraka." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Iwe munyaanyazi kandi mugore wangye, ebishi rukundo yaawe ni nungi! Ebishi rukundo yaawe neehitira kimwe viino! N'okutaamirana kw'amajuta gaawe nikukira okwemigaju yoona!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Mugore wangye, eminwa yaawe neetoonya omushongi, obwoki n'amate biri ahansi y'orurimi rwawe, omugaju gw'ebijwaro byawe ni nk'ogwa Lebanooni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Munyaanyazi, kandi mugore wangye, ori omusiri guzitiriire, akagyera kazitiriire, n'enshuro erinzirwe gye." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Ebimezire omu musiri gwawe n'amakomamahanga agarikwana ebijuma birungi munonga, gukarugwamu nyarwefoora z'emigaju n'emika;" 
SongOfSongs4:14 gukamerwamu endungu, n'ebisigaate n'emirama, n'emiti yoona ey'obubaani n'entsinda n'enkaka, n'eby'emigaju byona;" 
SongOfSongs4:15 ogurimu n'eiziba ry'amaizi marungi, emigyera erikuhimintika, neeruga omu nshozi za Lebanooni" 
SongOfSongs4:16 Iwe muyaga gw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho 'we, sisiimuka, naiwe muyaga gw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo 'we, rugayo! Ohuuhe omusiri gwangye; omugaju gwagwo gutaamirane hoona. Nkunzi yangye ka aije omu musiri gwe, arye ebijuma byagwo ebirungi munonga." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Munyaanyazi kandi omugore wangye! Naija omu musiri gwangye, ndundaane entsinda yangye n'eby'emigaju, ndye obwoki bwangye n'engabo yaabwo, nnywe viino yangye n'amate gangye. Imwe banywani bangye, nimurye kandi munywe! Imwe nkunzi zangye, nimunywere kimwe!" 
SongOfSongs5:2 Nkagwejegyera, kwonka omutima gwangye gwaguma nigureeba. Naahurira nkunzi yangye naiguza ati: Iwe munyaanyazi nkunzi yangye, nkombe yangye, omurungi munonga, nyigurira. Manya omutwe gwangye gwajubibwa omurombe, n'eishokye ryangye ryaitwa amatondo ga nyekiro." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Naaba naajwire ebijwaro, mbwenu mbijware nta? Naaba naanaabire ebigyere, mbwenu mbishiishe nta?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Nkunzi yangye yaayozya engaro omu kihengyere ky'orwigi, omutima gwangye gwaijura okushemererwa." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Naimuka kumwigurira, engaro zangye nizitoonya entsinda, entsinda neeyagayaga aha nkumu zangye, yaatoonya aha minyoro y'orwigi." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ntyo nyigurira nkunzi yangye; kwonka nshanga yaakubire, yaagyenzire. Ku yaagambire, omutima gwampwa omunda. Naamusherura, kwonka tinaamubona, naamweta, kwonka tiyaayetaba." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Abarinzi barikugyendagyenda omu rurembo bambugana, banteera, bamputaaza, abarinzi b'aha kigo baanyaka omunagiro gwangye." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Imwe bahara ba Yerusalemu 'mwe, nimbarahiza; ku muraareebe ahari nkunzi yangye, mumugambire ku rukundo erikwenda kuunyita." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Iwe mukazi ohita abandi 'we, beitu nkunzi yaawe naakiza ki abandi? Nkunzi yaawe naakiza ki abandi, waaza kuturahiza otyo?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Nkunzi yangye naayera, naamwamwatikana, taribura mu bantu kakumi." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Omutwe gwe ni nk'ezaabu nungi munonga, n'eishokye rye n'omushasha, niriiragura nk'ekikoona." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Amaisho ge nigashusha enkombe aha rubaju rw'emigyera, googiibwe amate, geemi gye." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Enshaya ze ni nk'otusiri tw'emigaju erikutaamirana. Eminwa ye ni nk'emyangangye erikutoonya entsinda. 
SongOfSongs5:14 Emikono ye ni nk'engoro y'ezaabu ehunzirwe amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi. Omubiri gwe ni nk'omwino gusoomoire, oguhunzirwe amabaare g'erangi ya bururu." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Amaguru ge ni nk'enyomyo z'amabaare g'ebisooni birikwera, ebibyairwe omu biina by'ezaabu, emishusire ye ni nka Lebanooni eriho emiti mirungi ya kaarwenda." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Emigambire ye ni mirungi munonga; weena naakundirwa kimwe. Imwe bahara ba Yerusalemu 'mwe, ogwo niwe nkunzi yangye, kandi niwe munywani wangye." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Iwe mukazi murungi 'we, ohita abandi, nkunzi yaawe yaaza hi, tubone kumukurondesa?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Nkunzi yangye yaashuuma eifo omu musiri gwe, omu tusiri tw'emizaabibu, kuriisizayo obusyo bwe bw'entaama, n'okucwa emyangangye." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ndi owa nkunzi yangye, na nkunzi yangye n'owangye; naariisiza obwo busyo omu myangangye." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Nkunzi yangye, ori murungi nka Tiriza, oshemeire nka Yerusalemu, nootiinisa nk'eihe riine endango." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Nyihaho amaisho, ahabw'okuba nigambuza obusingye; eishokye ryawe ni nk'obusyo bw'embuzi zirikurundukira omu nkiizi za Gileadi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Amaino gaawe ni nk'obusyo bw'ebuguma z'entaama ezaaruga kwoga. Zoona zizaara empasha, kandi tihariho n'emwe omurizo efiisa." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Enshaya zaawe oyetwekyereire ni nk'embari z'amakomamahanga. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Hariho abaigarire makumi mukaaga, n'ebinyanshunju makumi munaana, n'empangare nyingi ezitarikubarwa." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Kwonka nkombe yangye, omurungi munonga n'omwe wenka, ou nyina akundira kimwe, orikutetsibwa owaamuzaire, empangare zikamureeba, zaamweta ohiiriirwe, abaigarire n'ebinyanshanju nabo baamusingiza." 
SongOfSongs6:10 N'oha ogwo orikushusha nk'omushekye gurikujuguta, omurungi nk'okwezi, orikumurinkana nk'eizooba, orikutiinisa nk'eihe riine endango?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Nkashuuma, naaza omu musiri gw'emiti y'ebijuma kureeba ebirikutookyera omu ruhanga, kureeba yaaba emizaabibu eshebukire, nari amakomamahanga garabize." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Haza ku naabaire ntakeetegyereize, omutima gwangye gwanta omu kigaari aha rubaju rw'omwinginya wangye." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Garuka, garuka, iwe Mushulamukazi 'we; garuka, garuka, tukwetegyereze. Mbwenu nimumpangira ki amaisho, nk'omugore orikuraba ahagati y'abaroreezi?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Iwe mwishiki 'we, ori nka muhara w'omugabe, ebishi ebigyere byawe ni birungi biri omu nkaito; ebibero byawe by'embumbe ni nk'amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi, agakozirwe omunyamwoga!" 
SongOfSongs7:2 Ekishoroshoro kyawe ni nk'orushare rukuringiriire orutaburamu viino etimbwirwe. Enda yaawe ni nk'ekirundo ky'engano ekyehinguririziibwe emyangangye. 
SongOfSongs7:3 Amabeere gaawe ni nk'eminyahara y'esirabo ebiri ezairwe eri empasha. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Ebitsya byawe ni nk'omunaara gw'emiino, amaisho gaawe ni nk'ebiyanja by'omuri Heshibooni aha irembo rya Batirabimu. Enyindo yaawe ni nk'omunaara gwa Lebanooni ogurikureeba Damasiko." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Omutwe gwawe gutunguukire nka Karumeelo, n'eishokye ryawe ry'omushasha ni nk'omwenda gwa bujwa; obutsibo bwaryo nibutwara omugabe omutima." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Iwe nkunzi 'we, empangare erikurigirwa, ebishi ori murungi, kandi nooshemereza!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Ekyemerero kyawe ni nk'omukindo; amabeere gaawe ni nk'emigimba yaagwo. 
SongOfSongs7:8 Nimpamiza kimwe ku ndikwija kutemba ogwo mukindo nshorome ebijuma by'emigimba yaagwo. Nkaabaasibwa ki, amabeere gaawe gaba nk'emigimba y'emizaabibu, omugaju gw'omwitsyo gwawe guba nk'ogw'omucumgwa;" 
SongOfSongs7:9 akanwa kaawe kaba nka Viino nungi munonga, eshuuma mpora, neeraba omu minwa n'omu maino, ekasheneneka!" 
SongOfSongs7:10 Nyowe ndi owa nkunzi yangye, kandi niinye arikwenda." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Rugayo nkunzi yangye, tugyendane omu ishwa, tucumbikye omu byaro." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Tugurukye kare, tuze omu misiri y'emizaabibu; tureebe yaaba emizaabibu eshebukire, n'amakomamahanga garabize. Okwo niyo ndaakworekyere rukundo yangye." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Amashongonzya nigataamirana omugaju, n'aha miryango yaitu hariho ebijuma binuzire eby'emiringo yoona, ebisya n'ebikuru ebi nkubiikiire, iwe nkunzi yangye." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Nkaabaasibwa ki, oba nka munyaanyazi owaayonkire amabeere ga maawe! Haza nkikubugana nkunywegyera, hatagire owangaya." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Nkaakutwaire nkutaasya omu nju ya maawe, nkuhitsya omu kishengye ky'owanzaire, onyegyesezayo. Naanye nkuheerayo viino y'enturire n'eshande yangye y'amakomaamahanga, obinywa." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Nkaabaasiibwa ki, omukono gwa nkunzi yangye ogwa bumosho gunshegura, n'omukono gwe gwa buryo gunfumbata." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Imwe baishiki ba Yerusalemu 'mwe, nimbarahiza; ngu mutaimutsya nkunzi yangye, n'obu kwakuba okumusisiimura atakeeyendeire." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ogwo orikwinamuka naaruga omu ihamba ayegamiire nkunzi ye, n'oha? Nkusiimuriire ahansi y'omucungwa, ahi nyoko yaarumiirwe naayenda kukuzaara; eego; owaakuzaire niho yaarumiirwe." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Onkunde oihire aha mutima, onfumbatse omukono gwawe; manya rukundo eba ey'amaani nka rufu. Kandi okufuuha tikugira saasi; ni nk'ekituuro; endimi zaakwo zityankana nk'ez'omuriro gurikunaga enkobe." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Amaizi maingi tigabaasa kuraaza rukundo; nobu yaakuba emyegyemure kugimira. Omuntu ku akuhayo ebi atungire omu nju ye byona kugura rukundo, bikaagayirwa kimwe." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Twine murumuna waitu omuto otakashunire mabeere. Mbwenu turyamugira tuta aha izooba ri barimugambiraho obugyenyi? 
SongOfSongs8:9 Ku ariba ekigo, turyamwombekaho omunaara gw'efeeza ogw'okumurinda. Ku ariba omuryango, turyamukingisa embaaho za kaarwenda." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ndi ekigo, amabeere gangye nigo munaara gwakyo; omu maisho ga nkunzi yangye nindeebeka nyine obusingye." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomooni akaba aine Baalihamoni omusiri gw'emizaabibu, yaagutamu abarinzi, buri omwe kuguma naamwihura empiiha rukumi z'efeeza ahabw'ebijuma byagwo." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Mbwenu iwe Solomooni, omusiri gw'emizaabibu n'ogwangye ahabwangye, tunga rukumi; abarinzi b'ebijuma batungye amagana abiri." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Iwe otuura omu misiri, bagyenzi bangye bakutegire okutu kuhurira ebi orikugamba; naanye ka mbihurire." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Nkunzi yangye, rahuka nk'esirabo nari nk'omunyahara gw'empara aha nshozi z'eby'emigaju." 
Isaiah1:1 Ebi nibyo Isaaya mwene Amozi yaayorekirwe Ruhanga aha Baayuda n'aba Yerusalemu omu busingye bwa Uziya na Yotamu na Ahazi na Hezekiya, abagabe ba Buyuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Iwe iguru'we, hurira, naiwe nsi 'we, tega okutu; ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho agambire ati: Abaana bu naayoroire, nkanyeetsa, mbwenu bangomeire." 
Isaiah1:3 Ente emanya mukama waayo, n'endogoya emanya ekiju ki mukama waayo agiriisizamu; kwonka Isiraeli teine ki erikumanya, abantu bangye tibaine ki barikwetegyereza." 
Isaiah1:4 Ka n'eihanga ry'ebibi, abantu abaitsirwe okutahikiirira, oruzaaro rw'enkozi z'ebibi, abaana barikukora ebitahikire! Baimwire Nyakubaho, baagaya Nyakwera wa Isiraeli, baamuteerera kimwe omugongo." 
Isaiah1:5 Mbwenu nimwendera ki kuguma nimuteerwa, mwaba nimugumizamu kugoma? Omutwe gwanyu gwona gurwaire, omutima gugwire enshazi." 
Isaiah1:6 Okwiha aha mara g'ekigyere okuta aha mutwe, tihaine hahuriire, kureka ebihonoka n'ebironda n'amahuta garikujwa; ebitakamigirwe, ebitakashembirwe, nobu kwakuba okubobeezibwa n'amajuta." 
Isaiah1:7 Ensi yaanyu n'amatongo, endembo zaanyu zikoomeirwe omuriro. Ensi yaanyu abanyamahanga nibagirya nimubareeba. Ebaire amatongo, yaamarwaho abanyamahanga." 
Isaiah1:8 Siyooni etsigirweho nk'akaju k'omu musiri gw'emizaabibu; nk'ekiju ky'okurindiramu omusiri gw'emyongo, nari nk'orurembo rugotsirwe." 
Isaiah1:9 Kuri Nyakubaho ow'amahe ataratutsigiireho bakye abaahonokireho, tukaabaire nk'aba Sodoma, tuba nk'aba Gomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Imwe bategyeki ba Yerusalemu 'mwe, abari nk'aba Sodoma, nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikugamba! Imwe abari nk'aba Gomora 'mwe, nimutegye okutu eki Ruhanga waitu arikubeegyesa!" 
Isaiah1:11 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ebitambo byanyu ebingi munonga biinyiniire mugasho ki? Ntamirwe ebitambo bicwekize eby'empaya z'entaama, n'enyama z'ebishaju ez'amatungo gagomokire. Tindikushemerererwa shagama y'enimi, nobu yaakuba ey'abaana b'entaama, nari ey'empaya z'embuzi." 
Isaiah1:12 Ku mwija kweyoreka omu maisho gangye, n'oha obagira ngu mundibatiiririre ekibuga?" 
Isaiah1:13 Murekyere aho kundeetera ebitambo bitaine muhoho. Emigaju y'obubaani bu murikuunyoterera entamire. Emigyenzo y'okwezi kubonekire, n'eya Sabato, n'ey'okutaho enteerane. Tindikubaasa kugumisiriza bicumuro n'enteerane zaanyu z'ediini." 
Isaiah1:14 Amagyenyi gaanyu ag'okuboneka kw'okwezi, n'agandi agaatairweho, ningangira kimwe; gankabize, n'okugagumisiriza kunduhize." 
Isaiah1:15 Ku muritega emikono, ndyabaima amaisho; nangwa nobu murishaba muta, tindibatega kutu; ahabw'okuba engaro zaanyu zijubiibwe eshagama." 
Isaiah1:16 Nimwogye mwere. Muunyihe omu maisho ebibi bi murikukora; murekye kukora kubi. 
Isaiah1:17 Mwegye okukora ebirungi, mwitanire eby'oburyo, muhane abarikuhata abandi, murwanirire efuuzi, mutonganire abafaakazi." 
Isaiah1:18 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mbwenu nimwije tuhanuure kumwe. Ebibi byanyu nobu biraabe nibitukura nk'endibariba, nibiija kwera nk'orubaare. Nobu biraabe nibitukura tuku-tuku, nibiija kwera nk'ebyoya by'entaama." 
Isaiah1:19 Ku muraikirize mwayoroba, nimurya ebirungi by'ensi." 
Isaiah1:20 Kwonka ku muraayangye mwagoma, muryamarwaho rurara. Ekyo Nyakubaho niwe yaakyegambira." 
Isaiah1:21 Ebishi orurembo orurikwesigwa, orwabaire rwijwire eby'obwinganisa, rubaire maraaya! Rukaba rubamu eby'okuhikiirira, kwonka mbwenu abaitsi nibo barurimu." 
Isaiah1:22 Efeeza yaawe ehindukire enkamba, viino yaawe yaafungurwa." 
Isaiah1:23 Abategyeki baawe n'abagomi, kandi nibakwatanisa n'abashuma. Buri omwe naakunda enguzi n'okutoijerwa, tibarikurwanirira fuuzi; emanja z'abafaakazi tizaakibahika." 
Isaiah1:24 Nikyo Nyakubaho, Mukama ow'amahe, Ow'obushoboorozi owa Isiraeli arikugirira ati: Ndyamarira ekiniga aha bazigu bangye; nyehoorere ababisha bangye;" 
Isaiah1:25 Ndyakubangira omukono, nkweze nk'oku bayazya ekyoma, bakakiihamu enkamba; nkumariremu kimwe oburofa." 
Isaiah1:26 Reero ngarureho abaramuzi baawe, babe nka bwabiso, n'abahi baawe b'obwengye babe nk'obunyakare. Haza oyetwe orurembo orurimu abahikiriire n'abeesigwa." 
Isaiah1:27 Nyakubaho omwinganisa kandi ohikiriire aryacungura Yerusalemu, n'abaamwo boona abeeteisize." 
Isaiah1:28 Kwonka abagomi n'enyabibi baryacwekyerezibwa kumwe; n'abaimwire Nyakubaho bamarweho. 
Isaiah1:29 Manya muryaitwa enshoni ahabw'emivure y'emirinzi ei mwakunzire; mubwerabwere ahabw'emisiri ei mwayetoraniire. 
Isaiah1:30 Ahabw'okuba muryaba nk'omuvure ogwoma amababi, nari nk'omusiri ogutarimu maizi;" 
Isaiah1:31 ow'amaani abe nk'obunyaatsi bwomire, ebibi bi arikukora bibe esiriira; haza we nabyo bisye kumwe, habure ow'okubiraaza." 
Isaiah2:1 Ebi nibyo Isaaya mwene Amozi yaayorekirwe ahari Buyuda na Yerusalemu. 
Isaiah2:2 Obunaku buryahika omu biro bya bwanyima, orushozi oruriho Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho rube ruraingwa okukira ezindi zoona. Kandi rutunguukye, rukire enshozi zoona; amahanga goona garuhimintikireho." 
Isaiah2:3 Ab'amahanga maingi baryaija, bagire bati: Nimwije tuze aha rushozi rwa Nyakubaho, ahari Nyaruju ya Ruhanga wa Yakobo, atuhabure emitwarize ye, tubone kugikuratira. Ahabw'okuba omuri Siyooni nimwo iteeka ririruga; n'omuri Yerusalemu harugyemu ekigambo kya Nyakubaho." 
Isaiah2:4 Aryaramura amahanga ashoboorore enganda nyingi; zaarurara zaabo baziheeshemu amafuka, n'amacumu gaabo bagaheeshemu empabyo. Tiharigira ihanga ryabangira erindi rurara, nobu kwakuba okugaruka kwemanyiiza eby'orugamba." 
Isaiah2:5 Imwe ab'omuryango gwa Yakobo, nimwije tugyendere omu mushana gwa Nyakubaho." 
Isaiah2:6 Ai Ruhanga, okatsigaho abantu baawe ab'omuryango gwa Yakobo; waabatura okugira abafumu baingi b'oburugwa-izooba; n'abaraguzi baingi nk'Abafilisiti; kandi waabatura okukwatanisa n'abanyamahanga." 
Isaiah2:7 Ensi yaabo eijwire efeeza n'ezaabu, n'eby'obutungi bwabo tibiine bugarukiro. Ensi yaabo eijwire embaraasi, n'ebigaari byabo tibiine bugarukiro." 
Isaiah2:8 Ensi yaabo eijwire ebishushani birikuramibwa. Nibaramya ebi bakoreise emikono yaabo, ebi engaro zaabo zikozire." 
Isaiah2:9 Mpaho omuntu weena abundikwa, abantu boona bahemuka. Otabasaasira!" 
Isaiah2:10 Taaha omu nkiri oyesherekye omu mucuucu noohunga ekitiinisa kya Nyakubaho n'ekitiinwa ky'obukuru bwe. Baryayeshereka omu nyanga n'omu bibungo by'enkiri, beetimbire ebiina omu itaka kuhunga ekiniga kya Nyakubaho, n'okweshereka amaani ge n'ekitiinisa kye." 
Isaiah2:11 Emyekuniko y'omuntu eryabandikwa, okwetunguura kw'abantu kubundikwe. Eryo izooba Nyakubaho wenka abe niwe yaahimbisibwa." 
Isaiah2:12 Manya Mukama ow'amahe aine eizooba eri arirwanisizaho eby'amaryo, eby'eigundu, n'ebirikwetunguura bikeekuza;" 
Isaiah2:13 eri arirwanisizaho zaakarwenda za Lebanooni ezireihire kandi ezitunguukire," 
Isaiah2:14 eri arirwanisizaho enshozi zoona endaingwa, n'ebibungo byona ebitunguukire;" 
Isaiah2:15 eri arirwanisizaho buri munaara gwona omuraingwa, na buri kigo kyona ekigumire;" 
Isaiah2:16 eri arirwanisizaho emeeri za Tarushiishi zoona, n'ebirungi byona ebikozirwe abanyamyoga." 
Isaiah2:17 Reero okwekunika kw'omuntu kubundikwe n'okwetunguura kw'abantu kubandikwe. Eryo izooba Nyakubaho wenka abe niwe yaahimbisibwa. 
Isaiah2:18 Ebishushani ebirikuramibwa biryahweraho kimwe; 
Isaiah2:19 abantu bataahe omu nyanga z'amabaare, n'omu biina by'omu itaka nibahunga ekitiinisa kya Nyakubaho ku ariimuka kutengyeetsa ensi." 
Isaiah2:20 Aha izooba eryo abantu baryanagira efukuzi n'obuhundu ebishushani byabo by'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu ebi baayeheesheire kuramya; 
Isaiah2:21 bataahe omu nyanga z'amabaare n'omu biharamanga byago nibahunga ekitiinisa kya Nyakubaho n'ekitiinwa ky'obukuru bwe, ku ariimuka kutengyeetsa ensi." 
Isaiah2:22 Murugye aha muntu otagira kindi, kureka okwikiza omu nyindo. Mbwenu we niwe oha?" 
Isaiah3:1 Nimureebe Nyakubaho Mukama ow'amahe naija kwiha aha ba Yerusalemu n'aha Baayuda ekibaire kibatungire n'eki babaire beegamiire. Abaakye ebyokurya byona n'amaizi goona, ebibaire bibatungire." 
Isaiah3:2 Abaakye emanzi, n'omurwani, omuramuzi n'omurangi, omufumu n'omukuru omu ihanga;" 
Isaiah3:3 omukuru w'engabo makumi ataano, n'omuntu mukuru ow'ekitiinwa, omuhi w'obwengye, n'omufumu n'omuhaki w'engisha." 
Isaiah3:4 Reero aboojo mbahindure abategyeki baabo, n'abeereere babe nibo baabategyeka." 
Isaiah3:5 Abantu baryahatana: buri muntu na mugyenzi we, buri muntu na mutaahi we; orikunyeeta agaye orikumukira, n'otaine oku ari agaye ow'ekitiinwa." 
Isaiah3:6 Obwo omuntu aryakwata mwene ishe omu nju ya ishe, amugire ati: Nk'oku oine eki ojwaire, ba niiwe waaba omutegyeki waitu n'ow'aga matongo." 
Isaiah3:7 Eryo izooba onu aryayanga naayamuza ati: Tindikwija kugira eki naabatambira; ahabw'okuba omu ka tiinyinemu byokurya, nobu byakuba ebijwaro. Mutampindura omutegyeki w'abantu." 
Isaiah3:8 Manya Yerusalemu esheenyukire! Buyuda yaakumbagara; ahabw'okuba ebi bagamba n'ebi bakora nibigwisa kubi Nyakubaho, bigayisa ekitiinwa kye." 
Isaiah3:9 Okugwera orubaju kwabo nikubashinja; nibakora ebibi butunu, nk'aba Sodoma, batarikubishereka. Ebishi baryakareeba! Manya nibo beereeteire akabi." 
Isaiah3:10 Mugambire abahikiriire ku bo bariba gye; ahabw'okuba baryananurwa ebi baakozire. 
Isaiah3:11 Ebishi omuntu enyabibi aryakareeba! We biryamugyendera kubi, ahabw'okuba ebi yaakozire nibyo arizimuurirwa." 
Isaiah3:12 Abantu bangye nibahatwa abaana, bategyekwa abakazi. Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, abeebembezi baanyu nibabahabya, babuzabuza emihanda ei murikurabamu." 
Isaiah3:13 Nyakubaho agiire omu mwanya gwe kutonganisa abantu be, yaayemerera kubacwera orubanja." 
Isaiah3:14 Nyakubaho naacwera orubanja abakuru omu ihanga, n'abategyeki b'abantu be, ati: Niimwe mwacwekyereize omusiri gw'emizaabibu; ebi mwanyagire abooro biri omu maka gaanyu." 
Isaiah3:15 Mukasiitagurira ki abantu bangye, abooro mukabaitira aha kyara nk'enda? Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe nikwo arikugamba." 
Isaiah3:16 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Abakazi ba Siyooni baine emyekuniko. Nibagyenda babangaraize ebitsya, nibareebesana akatanta k'eriisho. Nibagyenda nibakimbagira, nibarangiza enjogyera aha maguru." 
Isaiah3:17 Nikyo Nyakubaho arirwariza abakazi ba Siyooni ebiguuna omu mutwe, akajweka busha ebicweka byabo eby'enshoni." 
Isaiah3:18 Eryo izooba Nyakubaho aryabacwijura enyerere zi barikukunisa, abajuure emishwaro n'ebirezi," 
Isaiah3:19 ebitaako, endaaba n'ebitambaara by'omu maraka;" 
Isaiah3:20 ebitambaara by'omu mutwe, engoro, emyeko, otushanduukye tw'emigaju n'engisha;" 
Isaiah3:21 empeta z'omu nkumu n'ez'omu nyindo," 
Isaiah3:22 bushuuti z'aha magyenyi, eminagiro, ekooti ndaingwa, n'enshaho z'omu ngaro," 
Isaiah3:23 emyenda y'obutimba n'eya kitaani, ebikwemba by'omu mutwe n'emyenda y'okwetwekyerera." 
Isaiah3:24 Omu mwanya gw'emigaju haryabamu ekinuuko, n'omu mwanya gw'omweko beezirikye omugoye. Omu mwanya gw'eishokye ry'omushasha, habe enkomborora; n'omu mwanya gw'okujwara emyenda mirungi beezirikye ebiguniya. Omu mwanya gw'okwemanya oburungi, baitwe enshoni." 
Isaiah3:25 Abashaija baawe baryaitwa rurara, n'amamanzi gaawe gagwe aha rugamba." 
Isaiah3:26 Amarembo ga Siyooni garyacura, gaboroogye, n'orwo rurembo rube nk'omukazi oshutami ahansi ayeshobeire." 
Isaiah4:1 Eryo izooba abakazi mushanju baryayekoma aha mushaija omwe, bamugire bati: Nitwija kweriisa, twejwekye; kwonka oturekye tukwetererwe, otwiheho ekihemu." 
Isaiah4:2 Obunaku buryahika, obu Nyakubaho arihindura eki yaabyaire akakikuza, kikareebeka kiri kirungi kandi eky'ekitiinwa; haza ebyezire omuri egyo nsi bikareetera Abaisiraeli abaahonokireho kwesiima n'okwehimbisa." 
Isaiah4:3 Kandi oriba atsigaire omuri Yerusalemu aryayetwa orikwera ow'omu batoorainwe Ruhanga kuguma bari abahuriire omuri Yerusalemu," 
Isaiah4:4 Mukama yaaherize kwozyaho ab'omuri Siyooni oburofa, n'ab'omuri Yerusalemu kubaihaho amabara g'eshagama eyaasheeshekyeiremu, aine omutima gw'okubacwera orubanja n'okubacwekyereza." 
Isaiah4:5 Bwanyima Nyakubaho aryareeta ekicu nyomushana, omwika n'orumuri nyekiro, bisangire Orushozi Siyooni n'abateeraniireyo boona. Manya ekitiinwa kyabo nikyo kiriba esanga, kikasangira orurembo rwona." 
Isaiah4:6 Kiryaba ekicuucu ky'okutambira abaamwo ekibiga nyomushana, kandi kibe obuhungiro n'obwegamo bw'okukiriramu eihunga n'enjura." 
Isaiah5:1 Ka nyeshongorere nkunzi yangye ekyeshongoro kirungi ky'omusiri gwe gw'emizaabibu. Nkunzi yangye akaba aine omusiri gw'emizaabibu omu kibungo kirikweza. 
Isaiah5:2 Akagutabira, yaagumaramu amabaare, yaagubyaramu emizaabibu mirungi, yaayombeka ahagati yaagwo omunaara gw'okugurinda; kandi yaagutimbamu einyuukiro, yaategyereza ku gwana emizaabibu, kwonka gwayana ey'omu ishwa." 
Isaiah5:3 Mbwenu imwe batuuzi b'omuri Yerusalemu 'mwe, naabeeshengyereza, nimunshoboorore n'ogwo musiri gwangye gw'emizaabibu." 
Isaiah5:4 Ekindi nkaakoreire ki ogwo musiri gwangye gw'emizaabibu eki ntaragukoreire? Ku naagutegyereize ngu gwane emizaabibu, ahanki gwayanire ey'omu ishwa?" 
Isaiah5:5 Mbwenu ka mbagambire eki ndaakorere ogwo musiri gwangye gw'emizaabibu. Niinyinja kugwihaho orugo, gwonerwe kimwe. Niinyija kusheenya orugo rwagwo guribatiirirwe." 
Isaiah5:6 Niinyinja kuguraza, gurekye kusharirwa n'okuhingirirwa; gumerwemu emikwatangwe n'amahwa. Kandi ndagiire ebicu birekye kugugwisamu enjura." 
Isaiah5:7 Manya omusiri gw'emizaabibu ogwa Mukama ow'amahe n'abantu ba Isiraeli n'aba Yuda. Nibo kintu kye ekirungi eki yaabyaire, akagira amatsiko ngu nibaija kukora eby'oburyo; kwonka bakasheesha eshagama; yaagira ngu nibaija kukora eby'okuhikiirira, kwonka baakora eby'okuboroozya abantu!" 
Isaiah5:8 Baryakareeba abeeyongyerera amaka aha gandi; bakatungika ebibanja aha bindi, okuhitsya obu haba hatakiriho gundi mwanya; naimwe mukatsigara omu nsi mwenka mutaine bwehigiro." 
Isaiah5:9 Mpuriire Mukama ow'amahe naarahira ati: Buzimazima amaka maingi amahango kandi amarungi garyaba omushaka gataine ogatwiremu. 
Isaiah5:10 Manya omusiri gw'emizaabibu ogwa hiika ikumi guryarugwamu enjoga ya viino emwe; n'ekitenga ky'embibo kirugwemu encuro. 
Isaiah5:11 Baryakareeba abaimuka kare omu kasheeshe kuza kusherura ekirikusinza, bakaguma nibanywa viino okuhitsya omu itumbi basinzire." 
Isaiah5:12 Bateera amagobore n'enanga z'emirya n'engoma empuuro n'emikuri, baine viino aha magyenyi gaabo; batarikweta ha bi Nyakubaho arikukora, nobu kwakuba okunaga eriisho aha mirimo y'emikono ye." 
Isaiah5:13 Nikyo abantu bangye barikuzaahira ahabw'obutamanya, abantu baabo b'ekitiinwa bakaitwa enjara, n'abandi boona bakaitwa omwoma." 
Isaiah5:14 Nikyo okuzimu owa Nyamuteza eruruuhiire, ekarangaaza akanwa, abakungu ba Yerusalemu n'abandi bantu baamwo baingi munonga bakarohamayo nibayogoora, hamwe n'orikugyehimbisizamu." 
Isaiah5:15 Omuntu ajuumikirwe, abantu baabundikwa, amaisho g'abanyamaryo gaacuubwa eishaija." 
Isaiah5:16 Kwonka Mukama ow'amahe naahimbisibwa ahabw'okukora eby'oburyo. Ruhanga Nyakwera naayeyoreka ku ari orikwera ahabw'okuhikiirira kwe. 
Isaiah5:17 Obwo nibwo abaana b'entaama baririira omu mariisizo gaabo, enyena zigomokire n'abaana b'embuzi bikariira omu matongo." 
Isaiah5:18 Baryakareeba abakuruza ebibi emirunga y'ebishuba, bakakurura ekibi, nk'oku bakuruza ekigaari emigoye." 
Isaiah5:19 Abagira bati: Naayehuute! Arahutsye emirimo ye, tugireebe, eki Nyakwera wa Isiraeli arikwenda kukora, ka kiije kihikye haihi, tukimanye!" 
Isaiah5:20 Baryakareeba abeeta ekibi ekirungi, n'ekirungi bakakyeeta ekibi; abata omwirima omu mwanya gw'omushana, n'omushana omu mwanya gw'omwirima; abata ekirikushaarira omu mwanya gw'ekirikunura, n'ekirikunura omu mwanya gw'ekirikushaarira!" 
Isaiah5:21 Baryakareeba abeemanya ku bari abanyabwengye, bakeeteekateekaho ku bari enkyengi." 
Isaiah5:22 Baryakareeba abari rurangaanwa omu kunywa viino, n'ababa emanzi omu kugaturira;" 
Isaiah5:23 n'abarekura oine orubanja ahabw'okubaha enguzi, bakaima otaine rubanja ebimushemereire." 
Isaiah5:24 N'ahabw'ekyo nk'oku orurimi rw'omuriro rumaraho embuba, n'oku obunyaatsi bwomire buguhwerereramu, emizi yaabo nikwo erijunda, n'ebirabyo byabo bikatuntumuka nk'omucuucu; ahabw'okuba bakanga eby'omu iteeka rya Mukama ow'amahe, baagaya ekigambo kya Nyakwera wa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah5:25 Nikyo Nyakubaho yaagiririire abantu be ekiniga kingi, akababangira omukono, akabateera; enshozi zikatengyeeta, emitumbi yaabo ekaba nk'ekumbwe y'omu bihandagazi. Hoona nabwo ekiniga kye tikikabarugireho, kandi akibabangiire omukono." 
Isaiah5:26 Aryaimukiza amahanga ga hare orurango, ageetese ekicuruzo kwija nigaruga aha miheru y'ensi; haza gaije juba nigeehuuta!" 
Isaiah5:27 Omu baago tiharigira oriruha, oriteera entsibo, orihungira nari origwejegyera. Enkoba zi beezirikiise tiziriyuga, n'obukoba bw'enkaito zaabo tiburicweka." 
Isaiah5:28 Emyambi yaabo eryaba eine obwogi, amata gaabo gareegire, ebyara by'embaraasi zaabo nibishusha amabaare g'enkangabuye; na nyamuziga z'ebigaari byabo nizeezigoora nk'akasooroora." 
Isaiah5:29 Okutsinda kwabo kuryaba nk'okwentare, batsinde nk'ebyana by'entare oku biriruma biine eki byakwata, bikakitwara hatagire owaakibyaka." 
Isaiah5:30 Eryo izooba baryabarurumira, nk'oku enyanja ehoorera. Omuntu ku arigira ati kureeba ensi, aryashanga eijwire omwirima n'obujune, n'ebicu bizibiire omushana kujwa." 
Isaiah6:1 Omu mwaka gu Omugabe Uziya yaafeereiremu, nkareeba Nyakubaho ashutami aha kitebe kye ky'obugabe kiraingwa kandi kitunguukire, ekijwaro kye ekiragaize kiijwire Nyaruju." 
Isaiah6:2 Eruguru hakaba heemereireho baaserafi; buri omwe aine amapapa mukaaga; abiri ageekingiize ahamaisho, abiri agashwekyeise ebigyere bye, n'abiri naagagurukisa." 
Isaiah6:3 Baayamuzana nibagira bati: Orikwera, Orikwera, Orikwera ni Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe, ensi yoona eijwire ekitiinwa kye." 
Isaiah6:4 Reero obuhamizo bw'enti z'emiryango ya Nyaruju bwatengyetsibwa amaraka g'abaabaire nibaamuza, na Nyaruju yaijura omwika." 
Isaiah6:5 Naanye naagira nti: Ai bambe! Mbwenuho naahitsya; ahabw'okuba ndi omuntu w'eminwa etashemeire, kandi ntuura omu bantu b'eminwa etashemeire; ahabw'okuba naayereebera Omugabe, Mukama ow'amahe." 
Isaiah6:6 Bwanyima omwe ahari baaserafi abo yaaguruka, yampika, akwaitse eikara ririkwotsya, eri yaihiise oruhana aha itambiro." 
Isaiah6:7 Atyo ankoza aha minwa eryo ikara ririkwotsya, angira ati: Reeba, eri ikara ryakukora aha minwa, waihwaho orubanja kandi waasaasirwa ebibi byawe." 
Isaiah6:8 Ebyo ku byahwaire naahurira eiraka rya Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ntume oha? N'oha oraabe entumwa yaitu? Naanye ngira nti: Ndi aha! Ba niinye waatuma. 
Isaiah6:9 Nawe angira ati: Irooko ongambirire abo bantu oti: Okuhurira muhurire, kwonka mutashoboorokyerwa; okureeba mureebe, kwonka muteetegyereza." 
Isaiah6:10 Hindura emitima y'abo bantu, ebe ebitsire, amatu gaabo gahurire kubi; obahumye amaisho, batakaareebesa amaisho gaabo; bakahuriza amatu gaabo, bakeetegyerezesa emitima yaabo, bakangarukira nkabakiza." 
Isaiah6:11 Bwanyima naamubuuza nti: Nyakubaho wangye, ebyo nibiguma bityo okuhitsya ryari? Nawe angarukamu ati: Okuhitsya obu endembo ziriba amatongo zitaine bazitwiremu; amaju gatarimu bantu, n'ensi ehindukiire kimwe eihamba." 
Isaiah6:12 Nyowe Nyakubaho ndyazaasya abo bantu, ensi yaabo yoona ngihindure amatongo." 
Isaiah6:13 Nobu eritsigarwamu ekicweka kimwe kya ikumi kyabo, nakyo kiryayokibwa nk'omunyinya nari omuvure ogutemwa gukatsigaza ekitsintsi. Ekitsintsi ky'ogwo muti nirwo ruzaaro orurikwera." 
Isaiah7:1 Omu busingye bwa Ahazi mwene Yotamu, mwijukuru wa Uziya, omugabe wa Buyuda, Rezini omugabe wa Siriya na Peeka mwene Remaliya omugabe wa Isiraeli, bakahurura kuteera Yerusalemu kugirwanisa. Kwonka tibarabaasize kugisingura." 
Isaiah7:2 Ab'omuryango gwa Daudi ku baahuriire ngu Abasiriya bakwataniise n'Abaefuraimu, omugabe n'abantu be emitima yaabo yaagira orutetema, nk'oku emiti y'omu kibira etengyeetsibwa omuyaga." 
Isaiah7:3 Reero Nyakubaho yaagira Isaaya ati: Irooko obugane Ahazi, iwe na Sheeriyashubu mutabani waawe aha muheru gw'omukura gw'ekiyanja kya ruguru, ekiri aha muhanda gurikuza aha Ryogyezo ry'emyende." 
Isaiah7:4 Omugambire oti: Oyerinde, otuuze, otatiina kandi otagwisibwa enshazi ekiniga kingi kya Rezini n'Abasiriya na mwene Remaliya, abari nk'ebicumurwa bibiri by'enkanza zirikucumbuuka." 
Isaiah7:5 Ahabw'okuba Abasiriya n'Abaefuraimu na mwene Remaliya bakugiiriire omu naama mbi, nibagira bati:" 
Isaiah7:6 Ka tuhurure, tuteere Buyuda, tugitiinise kandi tugyekubuurire, haza twemekye mwene Tabeeli, abe omugabe waayo." 
Isaiah7:7 Kwonka Nyakubaho naagira ati: Enaama yaabo terikwija kuhama, nobu kwakuba okuhikiirira." 
Isaiah7:8 Ahabw'okuba Damasiko nigwo mutwe gwa Siriya, kandi Rezini nigwo mutwe gwa Damasiko. Omu myaka makumi mukaaga n'etaano, Efuraimu eryacuubwa obusaasingo, ebe etakiri ihanga." 
Isaiah7:9 Reero Samariya niyo mutwe gwa Efuraimu, na Remaliya niwe mutwe gwa Samariya. Ku muraayangye kwikiriza, buzimazima timurihama." 
Isaiah7:10 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akatuma Isaaya ahari Ahazi ati: 
Isaiah7:11 Shaba Mukama Ruhanga waawe akamanyiso, akarikuhika okuzimu owa Nyamuteza, nari ahaiguru owa Herebe." 
Isaiah7:12 Kwonka Ahazi yaagira ati: Tindikwija kukashaba. Tindikwenda kugyeza Nyakubaho. 
Isaiah7:13 Isaaya nikwo kumugarukamu ati: Imwe ab'omuryango gwa Daudi, ni muhurire! Nimugira ngu n'ekintu kikye okurusya abantu, mukataho n'okurusya Ruhanga wangye?" 
Isaiah7:14 N'ahabw'ekyo Nyakubaho wenka niwe araabeheere akamanyiso. Reeba, omwishiki oshugaine aryabaka enda, azaare omwana w'omwojo, amwete Emanueli." 
Isaiah7:15 Aryanywa amate g'amakamo, arye n'obwoki, yaahitsya obunaku bw'okumanya kwanga ekibi akatoorana ekirungi." 
Isaiah7:16 Manya ogwo mwana ku ariba atakamanyire kwanga ekibi akatoorana ekirungi, ensi z'abo bagabe bombi abarikukwitsa obwoba ziryatsigarwamu busha." 
Isaiah7:17 Iwe n'abantu baawe n'ab'omuryango gwa sho, Nyakubaho aryabareetera ekihikiirizi ekitakabahoga, okwiha obu Abaefuraimu baataana n'aba Yuda, niwe mugabe wa Asiriya." 
Isaiah7:18 Omu bunaku obwo, Nyakubaho aryayetesa ekicuruzo eshohera z'omu byanga ebikomookwamu emigyera ya Misiri, n'enjoki z'omu nsi ya Asiriya." 
Isaiah7:19 Zoona ziije zituure omu nsa ndaingwa n'omu nyanga z'amabaare, n'omu nshaka z'amahwa, n'omu mariisizo goona." 
Isaiah7:20 Omuri obwo bunaku, Nyakubaho aryamwa ebireju byanyu, n'eishokye ryanyu, n'obwoya bw'aha mibiri yaanyu, abimweise orumweiso oruguririirwe kuruga seeri y'omugyera Eufuraati, niwe mugabe wa Asiriya." 
Isaiah7:21 Omuri obwo bunaku omuntu aryaba atsigaize ejigija nto emwe n'entaama ibiri," 
Isaiah7:22 kandi ahabw'amate maingi gu zirikamwa, aryanywa amakamo; ahabw'okuba omuntu weena oriba atsigaire omuri egyo nsi, aryanywa amakamo, arye n'obwoki." 
Isaiah7:23 Omuri obwo bunaku, buri mwanya ogwabaire gurimu emizaabibu rukumi, erikuhitsya empiiha rukumi z'efeeza, guryamerwamu emikwatangwe n'amahwa." 
Isaiah7:24 Oine obuta n'emyambi niwe arihikayo, ahabw'okuba egyo nsi eryaba erimu emikwatangwe n'amahwa." 
Isaiah7:25 Kandi ebibungo byona ebyabaire bihingwa, ahabw'okushakambwa emikwatangwe n'amahwa, tiharigira owaabizamu." 
Isaiah8:1 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Nyakubaho yangira ati: Kwata ekishate kihango ky'eibaare, okihandiikyeho omu nyuguta mpango Maheri-Shalali-hashi-baazi." 
Isaiah8:2 Kandi oreete Uriya omuhongyerezi na Zekariya mwene Yeberekiya, babe abajurizi bangye b'okukihamya." 
Isaiah8:3 Ntyo nza ow'omurangikazi, abaka enda, azaara omutabani. Bwanyima Nyakubaho angira ati: Mwete Maheri-shalali-hashi-baazi;" 
Isaiah8:4 ahabw'okuba ogu mwana ku araabe atakamanyire kurira ati: Taata nari Maama, eby'obutungi bwa Damasiko n'eminyago ya Samariya biryatwarwa, bimurikirwe omugabe wa Asiriya." 
Isaiah8:5 Nyakubaho akagaruka yangira ati: 
Isaiah8:6 Ahabw'aba bantu kwanga amaizi ga Shiloa agarikusheneneka, bakatiina Rezini na mwene Remaliya," 
Isaiah8:7 mbwenu nyowe Nyakubaho nikyo ndaabateereze amaizi g'omugyera Eufuraati, ag'amaani kandi amaingi, niwe mugabe w'Asiriya n'ekitiinisa kye kyona, gashwekye emikura yaagwo yoona, garengyere n'aha nkungu zaagwo zoona." 
Isaiah8:8 Reero gahimintikire omuri Buyuda gashandaare, gagumizemu gahikye n'omu bitsya, emikono yaago ebugire oku n'oku, eijure ensi yaawe yoona, Iwe Emanueli." 
Isaiah8:9 Imwe mahanga 'mwe, nimwetegyereze eki, mumanye ku muricuubwa obusaasingo! Naimwe nsi za hare, nimutegye okutu! Nimutengye orugamba; kwonka muryacuubwa obusaasingo." 
Isaiah8:10 Muhanuure kumwe, kwonka enaama zaanyu ziryafa busha. Mugire eki mwagamba, kwonka tikirihama; ahabw'okuba Ruhanga ari hamwe naitwe." 
Isaiah8:11 Mukama akantaho omukono gwe ogw'amaani, yaanyehanangiriza okutakuratira mitwarize y'ab'eri ihanga, naagira ati:" 
Isaiah8:12 Mutaryeturaaniza omu naama mbi y'abantu, kandi mutaritiina nobu kwakuba okwitsibwa obwoba eki bo barikutiina." 
Isaiah8:13 Kureka Mukama ow'amahe mube niwe mwaguma nimumanya ku ari Orikwera. Mube niwe mwaguma nimutiina kandi naabaitsa obwoba. 
Isaiah8:14 Aryababeera omwanya ogurikwera ogurikutiinisa; kwonka abeere ab'emiryango ya Isiraeli yombi eibaare ririkuteeza entsibo, n'orukiri rurikutereza; kandi abatwire omuri Yerusalemu ababeere omutego n'obusya." 
Isaiah8:15 Baingi babiteereho entsibo bagwe, bahendekye; bakwatirwe omu mutego, batwarwe bari enkwatwa." 
Isaiah8:16 Muhamye obujurizi kandi mugumye ebyayegyesiibwe omu batendekwa bangye. 
Isaiah8:17 Nyakubaho otarenzire ab'omuryango gwa Yakobo kumureeba, mmutegyereize mmwineho amatsiko." 
Isaiah8:18 Reeba, nyowe n'abaana bu Nyakubaho yampaire, turi obumanyiso n'eby'amani, ebyarugire ahari Nyakubaho ogwo Mukama ow'amahe, otuura aha Rushozi Siyooni." 
Isaiah8:19 Mbwenu ku baribagira bati: Muraguze aha bafumu abarikugambisa abazimu, nari abarikuroga, abaviigiira bakahuuma, timurikumanya ku abantu bashemereire kwebuuza ahari Ruhanga waabo? Abo bafumu bashemereire kwebuuza aha baafiire, ahabw'abahuriire?" 
Isaiah8:20 Muhamire aha byayegyesiibwe n'ebyahamiibwe. Buzimazima ekyo kigambo ki barikugamba tikibainiire mujamo. 
Isaiah8:21 Baryaraba omuri egi nsi baine obujune bwingi n'enjara. Reero ku barigira enjara, baryagira ekiniga kingi, bakyeene omugabe waabo na ruhanga waabo, amaisho bagahangye eiguru." 
Isaiah8:22 Kandi abarigahanga ensi babure eki baareeba kureka enaku n'omwirima n'okurimbagirirwa ahabw'obujune; bwanyima banagwe omu mwirima ndindindi. 
Isaiah9:1 Kwonka egyo nsi eyaabaire eri ey'enaku, teririmbagirirwa. Omu biro bya ira, akagayisa ensi ya Zebuluuni n'eya Nafutaali, kwonka omu biro ebiriija egyo nsi ya seeri ya Yorudaani, Galilaaya ey'abanyamahanga, ey'aha muhanda gurikuza aha Nyanja, aryagihindura ey'ekitiinwa." 
Isaiah9:2 Abantu abaabaire nibatuura omu mwirima baakiirwe omushana mwingi; n'abaabaire batwire omu nsi y'omwirima ndindindi omushana gubajweraire. 
Isaiah9:3 Okanyiise eihanga, waaryongyera okushemererwa. Abaaryo nibashemererwa omu maisho gaawe, nk'oku abantu bashemererwa omu igyesha; nari nk'oku bashemererwa nibabagana eminyago." 
Isaiah9:4 Manya omugamba ogwabaire nigubaremeerera, n'enkoni eyaabaire ebatuura aha mabega n'ekihuuzo ky'owaabaire naabahata, obihenzire nk'obwa Midiyani." 
Isaiah9:5 Ahabw'okuba eby'okurwanisa byona ebihagatirwa abarwani aha rugamba, n'ebijwaro byona ebikuringirwe omu shagama biryayokibwa nk'enku z'okuhembwa." 
Isaiah9:6 Manya omwana atuzaariirwe. Omwana w'omwojo atuhairwe; obutegyeki buryaba aha mabega ge, kandi aryayetwa Omuhabuzi orikutangaaza, Ruhanga Ow'obushoboorozi, Tataitwe Otahwaho, Nyakubaho w'Obusingye." 
Isaiah9:7 Okweyongyera kw'obutegyeki bwe n'obusingye bwe tibirigira bugarukiro aha kitebe ky'obugabe bwa Daudi, n'aha bukama bwe, kubuhamya n'okubuhigikiza eby'oburyo n'okuhikiirira, okwiha hati n'ebiro byona. Nyakubaho ow'eihato kandi ow'amahe, ekyo niwe arikikora." 
Isaiah9:8 Nyakubaho ashohoize ekigambo, ku arifubira aba Yakobo, kikagwera Isiraeli; abantu boona bakabona kukimanya." 
Isaiah9:9 Nibo Baefuraimu n'abatwire omuri Samariya, abagambisa amaryo n'emyekuniko bati:" 
Isaiah9:10 Amatafaari gagwire, kwonka itwe nitwija kwombekyesa amabaare gacweregyereire. Emikunyu etemirwe, kwonka itwe omu myanya yaayo nitwija kutamu eya kaarwenda." 
Isaiah9:11 Nikyo Nyakubaho abaimukiririize ababisha n'abazigu baabo kubarwanisa; 
Isaiah9:12 Abasiriya aha burugwa-izooba n'Abafilisiti aha burengyerwa-izooba kurangaaza akanwa bakamira Abaisiraeli. Hoona nabwo takarekire kubagirira kiniga, akibabangiire omukono." 
Isaiah9:13 Abantu tibaragarukiire Mukama ow'amahe owaabateire, nobu kwakuba okumusherura." 
Isaiah9:14 Nikyo Nyakubaho yaatemeireho Isiraeli omutwe n'omukira; itaagi ry'omukindo n'ery'ekibingo omu izooba rimwe. 
Isaiah9:15 Abantu bakuru omu ihanga n'abanyamaziina nigwo mutwe; kandi abarangi abeegyesa eby'ebishuba nigwo mukira. 
Isaiah9:16 Ahabw'okuba abeebembezi b'aba bantu nibabahabisa, reero abu baahabisa baburangirirwa." 
Isaiah9:17 Nikyo Nyakubaho atarikusiimira batsigazi baabo; kandi atarikugirira saasi efuuzi zaabo n'abafaakazi baabo, ahabw'okuba buri muntu tarikutiina Ruhanga, kandi n'enkozi y'ebibi; buri omwe naagambisa akanwa ke eby'obushema. Hoona nabwo takarekire kubagirira kiniga, kandi akibabangiire omukono." 
Isaiah9:18 Manya obunyabibi nibwotsya nk'omuriro ogwotsya emikwatangwe n'amahwa; gukootsya ebishaka bikwataine eby'omu kibira; bikatuumuura omwika mwingi. 
Isaiah9:19 Ahabwa kashanga ya Mukama ow'amahe ensi neesya; abantu bari nk'enku z'okuhembesa omuriro; tihariho orikusaasira mwene ishe. 
Isaiah9:20 Nibashahura eby'aha rubaju rwa buryo, kwonka baguma baine enjara; bashonshomera eby'aha rwa bumosho, kwonka baguma batahaagire; buri omwe arya enyama ya mutaahi we." 
Isaiah9:21 Abaamanaase nibarya Abaefuraimu n'Abaefuraimu barya Abaamanaase, reero bombi bakwatanisa, bateera aba Yuda. Hoona nabwo takarekire kubagirira kiniga, akibabangiire omukono." 
Isaiah10:1 Baryakareeba abataho ebiragiro bitahikire, n'abahandiiki abahandiika eby'okuhata abantu," 
Isaiah10:2 ngu babone kwitaita emanja z'enshoberwa, n'okwaka abooro b'omu bantu bangye ebibashemereire; ngu babone kunyaga eby'abafaakazi, n'okusikura eby'efuuzi." 
Isaiah10:3 Mbwenu shi muryakora ki aha izooba ri murifubirirwaho, eihunga ryaruga okwo hare? Muryahungira ahari oha kubaha emikono; kandi eby'obutungi bwanyu muryabishereka hi?" 
Isaiah10:4 Muryaba mutakiine ky'okukora, kureka okweinamiririra omu mbohe, nari okufa hamwe n'abarikwitwa. Hoona nabwo tarireka kubagirira kiniga, aryaguma akibabangiire omukono." 
Isaiah10:5 Ai bambe, Asiriya, enkoni y'ekiniga kyangye, ekihuuzo kya kashanga yangye!" 
Isaiah10:6 Omugabe waayo nkamwohereza kurwanisa eihanga eriteeta hariinye, Ruhanga, kandi naamuragiira kurwanisa abantu abu nyiniire ekiniga kingi, kubanyaga n'okutwara eminyago, n'okubaribatiirira nk'oku baribatiirira ebyondo by'omu bihandagazi." 
Isaiah10:7 Kwonka tikwo arikwenda kukora, n'omutima gwe tikwo gurikuteekateeka; kureka naayenda kucwekyereza n'okumariraho kimwe amahanga gatari makye." 
Isaiah10:8 Manya naagira ati: Abakuru b'amahe gangye boona t'abagabe? 
Isaiah10:9 Kalino teri nka Karikemishi? nari Samariya teri nka Damasiko? 
Isaiah10:10 Nk'oku naakununkiriize omukono gwangye, nkafubira amahanga g'abagabe agarikuramya ebishushani, agu ebishushani byago byabaire nibikiza ebya Yerusalemu na Samariya obuhango," 
Isaiah10:11 mbwenu tindikwija kugira Yerusalemu n'ebishushani byayo ebirikuramibwa nk'oku naagizire Samariya n'ebishushani byayo? 
Isaiah10:12 Nyakubaho ku ariheza kukora ebi arikwenda kukora byona aha Rushozi Siyooni n'ahari Yerusalemu, aryafubira omugabe wa Asiriya, naamutura amaryo ge n'okwehimbisa n'emyekuniko." 
Isaiah10:13 Manya naagira ati: Ebyo nkabikoresa amaani g'emikono yangye n'obwengye bwangye, ahabw'okuba niinyetegyereza. Nkaihaho emyatano y'amahanga, naanyaga eby'obutungi bwago. Nk'enimi naaribatiirira abaabaire bashutami aha bitebe by'obugabe." 
Isaiah10:14 Omukono gwangye gukagwa aha butungi bw'amahanga nk'owaagwa aha kyashuri ky'enyonyi. Kandi nk'oku abantu barundaana amahuri agu enyonyi etsigireho, naanye nikwo nkubwire ensi yoona, hakabura owaimutsya omutwe; nobu kwakuba okwashamya akanwa kuteeza nari kuhigima." 
Isaiah10:15 Nimugira ngu empango neebaasa kwehimbisiza aha muntu orikugitemesa? Nari omushumeeno kwekuza aha muntu orikugusharisa? okashusha oti enkoni niyo erikutegyeka omuntu orikugiteeza; nari ekihuuzo okwiha aha nsi omuntu otari kiti nkakyo! 
Isaiah10:16 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe arirwariza amamanzi ge omunywengyerero, omu mwanya gw'okugira ekitiinwa ayakwemu omuriro gurikubuguma ogwokyeza kimwe." 
Isaiah10:17 Ruhanga rumuri rwa Isiraeli aryaba omuriro, Nyakwera ogwo abe orurimi rwagwo; gwakye gumareho omu izooba rimwe amahwa ge n'emikwatangwe ye." 
Isaiah10:18 Kandi Nyakubaho aryacwekyereza ebibira bye ebirungi, n'emisiri ye erikweza; ahwerekyereze omutima n'omubiri gwe; abe nk'oku omuntu orwaire ahwe aha magufa;" 
Isaiah10:19 emiti eritsigara omu kibira kye ebe mikye, ei omwana arikubaasa kubara." 
Isaiah10:20 Eryo izooba Abaisiraeli abaritsigaraho, nibo b'omuryango gwa Yakobo abarihonokaho, baryaba batakyesiga owaabacwekyereize; kureka okwesigira kimwe Nyakubaho Nyakwera owa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah10:21 Aba Yakobo abaritsigaraho baryagarukira Ruhanga ow'obushoboorozi. 
Isaiah10:22 Iwe Isiraeli, abantu baawe nobu baraabe bari baingi nk'omusheenyi gw'ahanyanja; kwonka bakye abaritsigaraho nibo barigaruka; okucwekyerezibwa kuteereirweho abo bantu, kandi bakushemereire." 
Isaiah10:23 Manya Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe aryacwekyerereza kimwe ab'omu nsi yoona, nk'oku yaakiragiire." 
Isaiah10:24 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe arikugirira ati: Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, abatwire Siyooni, mutatiina Abaasiriya; nobu baraabateeze enkoni, bakababangira ekihuuzo, nk'oku Abanyamisiri baabagizire." 
Isaiah10:25 Manya hatsigaireyo akaanya kakye, imwe nkarekyera aho kubagwerwa kubi; nkaba nibo naagirira kashanga y'okubacwekyereza." 
Isaiah10:26 Mukama ow'amahe aryabaasha, nk'oku yaayasiire Abamidiyani aha rukiri rwa Orebu; kandi aryaimukiza enyanja enkoni ye, nk'oku yaagiimukize obu baaruga Misiri." 
Isaiah10:27 Eryo izooba omutwaro gu yaakwekoreize guryakuruga aha mabega, omugamba gwe gukwihwe aha bitsya." 
Isaiah10:28 Ngugwo yainamuka naaruga Rimoni, yaahika Ayati, arabire Migurooni; ebintu bye yaabibiika Mikimaashi," 
Isaiah10:29 Baarengyera omu kakiro, baaraara Geeba, Aba Raama baatetema, aba Gibea eya Saulo baahunga." 
Isaiah10:30 Imwe aba Galimu, nimuboroogye! Aba Laisha, mutegye okutu! Naimwe Abaanatooti, ebishi mwakareeba!" 
Isaiah10:31 Aba Madimeena nibacwa, n'abatwire Gebimu nibahunga kuronda obukiriro." 
Isaiah10:32 Eri izooba naaraara Noobu abangiire Orushozi Siyooni entomi, ekyo kibungo kya Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah10:33 Reeba, Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe aryatema amataagi n'amaani garikutiinisa; abarikukira abandi aha mutwe batemwe; n'abaraingwa babundikwe." 
Isaiah10:34 Aryatemesa empango ebishaka by'omu kibira; na Lebanooni egwe n'emiti yaayo ey'ekitiinwa. 
Isaiah11:1 Omu kitsintsi kya Yese haryatookamu omugina, n'omu mizi ye hashebukyemu eitaagi." 
Isaiah11:2 Mutima wa Nyakubaho amubemu; Mutima ow'obwengye n'okwetegyereza; Mutima w'okuhabura kandi ow'amaani, Mutima w'okumanya n'okutiina Ruhanga," 
Isaiah11:3 kandi ekirimunanura n'okutiina Nyakubaho. Taricwa rubanja naiha aha bi areebire nari ebi ahuriire; 
Isaiah11:4 kureka aryacwera abooro orubanja omu buryo, n'abacureezi b'omu nsi abashoboorore omu bwinganisa. Ensi aryagiteeza ekigambo kye nk'enkoni; abantu enyabibi abaitse omwitsyo gw'omu kanwa ke." 
Isaiah11:5 Aryayezirika okuhikiirira n'obwesigwa, bube orukoba rw'omu bwezirikiro bwe." 
Isaiah11:6 Omushega guryataaha n'omwana gw'entaama, engwe ebyame hamwe n'omwana gw'embuzi, enyana n'entare n'ente ebereire bibe hamwe, haza omwana muto abiriise." 
Isaiah11:7 Ente n'edubu biryariira hamwe, ebyana byazo bibyame kumwe; entare erye obunyaatsi nk'ente." 
Isaiah11:8 Omwana orikwonka aryazaanira aha mushoino gw'encwera; omwana ocuukire ate omukono omu mwina gw'empiri; 
Isaiah11:9 Ebyo byona tibirikora kabi nobu kwakuba okwitira aha rushozi rwangye rwona orurikwera, ahabw'okuba ensi eryamanyira kimwe Nyakubaho nk'oku amaizi gaijura enyanja." 
Isaiah11:10 Omu biro ebyo, Kitsintsi kya Yese aryabeera amahanga orurango; ab'omu mahanga bamwetuurire, obutaaho bwe bube obw'ekitiinwa." 
Isaiah11:11 Ebiro ebyo Nyakubaho aryagorora omukono gwe obwa kabiri kugarura abantu be abaahonokireho, naabaiha Asiriya, Misiri, Paaturo, Etiopiya, Elamu, Shinari, Hamati, n'omu nsi z'omu myegyeego y'enyanja." 
Isaiah11:12 Aryaimukiza amahanga orurango, arundaane Abaisiraeli abaabingirwe omu nsi yaabo; ateerane hamwe aba Yuda abaataataanisiibwe, naabaiha omu mbaju ina z'ensi." 
Isaiah11:13 Eihari ry'Abaefuraimu riryahwa, n'abarikuburabuza aba Yuda bamarweho. Abaefuraimu barekye kugirira aba Yuda eihari; n'aba Yuda barekye kuganzya Abaefuraimu." 
Isaiah11:14 Kureka baryashuuma bagwe Abafilisiti aha mabega omu burengyerwa-izooba; kandi banyagye kumwe eby'ab'omu burugwa-izooba. Baryabangira Abaedomu n'Abamoabu omukono, n'Abaamoni babagomookyere." 
Isaiah11:15 Reero Nyakubaho ayomeze kimwe omukono gw'enyanja ya Misiri, kandi ahuuhise omukono gwe omugyera Eufuraati omuyaga gurikubabura; agucwemu emikura mushanju, abantu babone kugwambuka enkaito zitajubire." 
Isaiah11:16 Kandi abantu be Abaisiraeli abaahonokireho baryabona omuhanda rugyendwa nibaruga Asiriya; nk'oku baishenkurubo baagutungire nibaruga omu nsi ya Misiri. 
Isaiah12:1 Eryo izooba oryagira oti: Ai Nyakubaho, ninkusiima ahabw'okuba okaba onyiniire ekiniga, kwonka hati kiikaikaine, wangarura omutima omunda." 
Isaiah12:2 Reeba, Ruhanga niwe mujuni wangye, ndyaguma nimmwesiga ntaritiina. Manya Mukama Ruhanga niwe maani ngangye, ou nyeshongora." 
Isaiah12:3 Muryataha amaizi omu iziba ry'okujunwa 
Isaiah12:4 Haza eryo izooba mugire muti: Nimusiime Nyakubaho, mumutakire nimurangaana ebi yaakozire omu mahanga, murangirire ku eiziina rye riri rikuru." 
Isaiah12:5 Mweshongorere Nyakubaho eby'okumuhimbisa, ahabw'okuba akozire bikuru. Haza ekyo kimwanywe omu nsi yoona." 
Isaiah12:6 Iwe mutuuzi wa Siyooni 'we, teera akaari, oyeshongore ahabw'okushemererwa, ahabw'okuba Nyakwera wa Isiraeli ari omuriiwe." 
Isaiah13:1 Eby'okuranga ahari Babulooni, ebi Isaaya mwene Amozi yaayorekirwe." 
Isaiah13:2 Nimwimutsye orurango aha kibungo kitamezirweho bishaka, muhuruze abarwani nimwamuza, mubeetese engaro bataahe omu marembo g'abakungu." 
Isaiah13:3 Nyowe niinye ndagiire abu nshoroire, nkahuruza amamanzi gangye agarikwemanya eishaija, kufubira abu nyiniire ekiniga." 
Isaiah13:4 Nimuhurire! Omu nshozi nihareetwamu orwari rw'ekimbuuro kihango ky'abantu! Nimuhurire oruyombo rw'amahanga g'abagabe agateeraniire hamwe! 
Isaiah13:5 Nigaruga omu nsi ya hare ahu eiguru riherera. Mukama yaija n'eby'okurwanisa bye kucwekyereza ensi yoona. 
Isaiah13:6 Nimucure, ahabw'okuba eizooba rya Nyakubaho riri haihi. Niriija riri ery'okucwekyereza okurikuruga aha w'obushoboorozi bwona!" 
Isaiah13:7 Nikyo emikono y'abantu erikwija kuburira amaani, omutima gukabahwa omunda, bakahahaara," 
Isaiah13:8 Bakagira obuhuruzi n'obusaasi bwingi, bakeenyogoora nk'omukazi orikurumwa. Baryareebana baitsirwe obwoba, bakookootsire aha maisho." 
Isaiah13:9 Reeba, eizooba riri haihi, eri Nyakubaho ariiziraho ataine saasi, aine ekiniga na kashanga kucwa ensi amatongo, n'okucwekyereza abasiisi baamwo." 
Isaiah13:10 Manya enyonyoozi z'omu iguru n'ebimbuuro byazo tiziryaka. Eizooba riryairagura nirituruka, n'okwezi tikuryaka." 
Isaiah13:11 Ndyafubira ensi yoona ahabw'ebibi byayo, nfubire n'enyabibi ninzitura ebicumuro byazo. Ndyamaraho emyehimbiso y'abanyamaryo, mbundikye emyekuniko y'abataine saasi." 
Isaiah13:12 Ndyareetera abashaija kuba ab'eicweka okukira ezaabu eshemeziibwe, n'abantu okuba mbarwa okukira ezaabu ya Ofiri." 
Isaiah13:13 Nikyo nditetemeseza eiguru, ensi ekatengyetsibwa, ekaruga omu mwanya gwayo, aha izooba eri nyowe Mukama ow'amahe ndigiriraho ekiniga kingi." 
Isaiah13:14 Reero abanyamahanga baryahunga kugaruka omu nsi y'owaabo, nk'oku esirabo ehunga abahiigi nari nk'entaama zitaine w'okuzitanga. Buri muntu agarukye omu baabo, buri muntu ahungye naagarura omu nsi y'owaabo." 
Isaiah13:15 Weena ou barigwaho baryamucumita bamwozyemu, kandi orikwatwa bamwitse rurara." 
Isaiah13:16 Abeereere baabo baryateerwa aha nsi bacwagurikye nibabareeba. Eby'omu maka gaabo biryanyagwa, abakazi baabo batandwe." 
Isaiah13:17 Reeba, niinyija kubaimukiza Abameedi abateeta ha feeza kandi abataruruuhira zaabu, babateere." 
Isaiah13:18 Abaabo abaine amata baryaita abatsigazi, tibarigirira beereere mbabazi, nobu kwakuba okureeba abaana bakabagirira esaasi." 
Isaiah13:19 Ruhanga ku aribacwekyereza, Babulooni ekitiinwa ky'ensi z'abagabe, enungi, kandi ereetera Abakaludaaya kwehimbisa, eryaba nka Sodoma na Gomora." 
Isaiah13:20 Terigira bu etwirwemu, nobu kwakuba okugumwamu ebiro byona. Tiharigira Muharabu waagiteeramu eihema; n'abariisa tibarigiriisizamu masyo gaabo g'entaama." 
Isaiah13:21 Kureka eryabyamwamu enyamaishwa; amaju gaamwo gaijure ebihangwa birikukunga; zaamaaya niyo ziritaaha, enkooko zikatirimirayo." 
Isaiah13:22 Empitsi ziryahuunira omu minaara yaarwo, zaamuha zimokyere omu bikaari byarwo ebirungi. Obunaku bwarwo bwafunzire, n'ebiro byarwo tibyakiine mwanya muraingwa." 
Isaiah14:1 Nyakubaho aryagirira aba Yakobo esaasi, agarukye atoorane Abaisiraeli, abate omu nsi yaabo, bagituuremu. Abanyamahanga baryaija beeteerane nabo, beekome aha b'omuryango gwa Yakobo." 
Isaiah14:2 Abanyamahanga baryabatwara babahitsye owaabo; reero aba Isiraeli babahakire omu nsi ya Nyakubaho bari abahuuku n'abazaana. Baryatwara omu bukwatwa abaabaire babakwatisire, bategyekye abaabaire nibabahata." 
Isaiah14:3 Nyakubaho ku ariheza kubatambira obusaasi n'enaku n'obuhuuku bu mwabaire mwitirwamu kubi nibabakoresa," 
Isaiah14:4 muryateerera omugabe wa Babulooni enaku, muti: Ogwo muhatsi yaarugaho yaahanguura, n'ekiniga kye ky'omugayano kyahwaho?" 
Isaiah14:5 Nyakubaho ahenzire ekihuuzo ky'enyabibi, enkoni y'abategyeki," 
Isaiah14:6 abaabaire bacoocoora amahanga baine kashanga, bakagateera batarikwosha; abaategyekyeise amahanga ekiniga, bakagahiiganisa batarekire." 
Isaiah14:7 Mbwenu ensi yoona ehuumwire, yaacureera, abantu nibateera akaari nibeeshongora." 
Isaiah14:8 Zaakaarwenda nizikwesiimirana, n'emiryohe ya Lebanooni neegira eti: Okwiha obu waabundikwa, tihariho mutemi oraije kututema." 
Isaiah14:9 Okuzimu owa Nyamuteza neimuka kukubugana noija, neimutsya abazimu b'abaabaire bari abategyeki b'ensi kukutangirira, neimutsya aha bitebe abaabaire bari abagabe b'amahanga." 
Isaiah14:10 Reero abo boona nibaija kukuseetera nibakugira bati: Ebyo naiwe okaahwa amaani nkaitwe! Naiwe waaba nkaitwe! 
Isaiah14:11 Ekitiinwa kyawe n'amaraka g'enanga zaawe birohirwe okuzimu owa Nyamuteza; waayeyarira enyogori, waayeshweka eminyongororwa." 
Isaiah14:12 Mbwenu iwe nyonyoozi y'omu ruturuturu, mutabani w'omushekye, kandi shi k'ohanantukire ahaiguru okagwa! Iwe owaabaire obundika amahanga naiwe k'otemirwe okagwa aha nsi!" 
Isaiah14:13 Okeetunguura noogira oti: Ndyatemba omu iguru, nze eruguru y'enyonyoozi za Ruhanga, nte ahaiguru ekitebe kyangye ky'obugabe. Ndyashutama aha rushozi ru bateeraniraho, okwo hare omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Isaiah14:14 Ndyatemba mpikye okwo eruguru y'ebicu, nyehindure Rukiraboona." 
Isaiah14:15 Kwonka shi ohanantwirwe, waanagwa owa Nyamuteza okuzimu y'ekiina." 
Isaiah14:16 Abarikukureeba nibakushamaarira, beebuuza bati: Ogu niwe muntu owaabaire atengyeetsa ensi, akatetemya abagabe?" 
Isaiah14:17 Owaahindwire ensi eihamba, akacwekyereza endembo zaamwo, akanga kurekura embohe kutaaha owaazo?" 
Isaiah14:18 Abagabe b'amahanga boona babyami n'ekitiinwa, buri omwe omu kituuro kye;" 
Isaiah14:19 Kwonka iwe onagirwe aheeru, hare n'ekituuro kyawe; waaba nk'eitaagi eri abantu batamirwe. Waashwekwa emitumbi y'abaitsirwe nibashogoitwa na rurara, abashuuma okuzimu bakahika aha mabaare g'omu kiina, waaba nk'omutumbi gurikuribatiirirwa." 
Isaiah14:20 Iwe toriziikwa nkabo, ahabw'okuba okacwekyereza ensi yaawe waita abantu baawe. Nkaahenwa ki oruzaaro rw'enkozi z'ebibi rureka kugambwa obundi!" 
Isaiah14:21 Nimweteekateekye kwita batabani be nimubatura ekibi kya baishenkuru; batakaimuka bakakubuura ensi, bakagiijuza endembo." 
Isaiah14:22 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati; Ndyaimuka ndwanise aba Babulooni, ebure eiziina, ngimaremu abaahonokireho, n'abaana baabo n'abaijukuru; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Isaiah14:23 Ndyagihindura ensi y'ebisharara etuurwemu ebisegyesi; ngyeyerere n'ekyeyerezo ekirikumariramu kimwe buri kintu. Nikwo Mukama ow'amahe arikugamba. 
Isaiah14:24 Mukama ow'amahe arahiire ati: Nk'oku naateekateekire, nikwo kiriba, kandi nk'oku naamaririire, nikwo kiriguma." 
Isaiah14:25 Ndyahendagura Abaasiriya abari omu nsi yangye, mbaribatiiririre omu nshozi zangye. Abantu bangye Abaisiraeli ndyabaihaho omugamba gw'Omuasiria, mbaihe aha mabega omutwaro gu yaabeekoreize." 
Isaiah14:26 Egyo niyo naama eyaagiriirwe ensi yoona, kandi nigwo mukono ogubangiirwe amahanga goona." 
Isaiah14:27 Mbwenu Mukama ow'amahe ku araabe niwe yaakiteekateekire, n'oha oraakizibire? Omukono gwe ku guraabe gubangire, n'oha oraagubanguure?" 
Isaiah14:28 Ebi bikarangwa omu mwaka ogu omugabe Ahazi yaafeereiremu. 
Isaiah14:29 Imwe Bafilisiti 'mwe mwena, muteesiima ngu ahabw'okuba enkoni eyaabateire ehendekire. Manya ahu enjoka yaakomookire, haryarugamu empiri, Kandi eki erizaara kiryaba enjoka erikuguruka." 
Isaiah14:30 Emijigaijo y'abooro eryatunga ekyokurya, n'abakyene babyame buhooro. Kwonka oruzaaro rwanyu ndyarwitsa enjara, nyite n'abaanyu abaritsigaraho." 
Isaiah14:31 Imwe ab'omu marembo nimucure! Imwe ab'omu ndembo nimuboroogye. Naimwe Bafilisiti 'mwe, mwena nimuhahaare mutiine, ahabw'okuba abazigu barikutuntumura omucuucu nibaija nibaruga omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho; kandi omu ngabo zaabo tihaine orikugarura ekibunu enyima." 
Isaiah14:32 Mbwenu entumwa z'eryo ihanga omuntu azigarukyemu ki? Azigarukyemu ati: Nyakubaho akataho Siyooni, kandi abantu be abarikubonabonesibwa niyo barihungiramu." 
Isaiah15:1 Ebi n'ebyarangirwe aha Baamoabu. Ekiro ki Aari yaacwekyerereziibweho, nibwo Moabu yaahwerekyerezibwa. Ekiro ki Kiiri yaacwekyerereziibweho, nibwo Moabu yaahwerekyerezibwa." 
Isaiah15:2 Aba Diboni bainamukire omu myanya etunguukire kuririrayo; Abaamoabu baacurira Neebo na Meedeba. Emitwe yaabo yoona n'enkomborora, kandi boona bamweire ebireju." 
Isaiah15:3 Nibagyenda omu mihanda bajwaire ebiguniya; aha mitwe y'amaju n'ahu abantu bateeranira, buri omwe naacura aborooga."
