Isaiah15:4 Aba Heshibooni n'aba Eleale nibaborooga, amaraka gaabo gahika Yahazi. Abarwani ba Moabu nikyo barikuboroogyera bakatetema." 
Isaiah15:5 N'ahabw'ekyo nincurira Abaamoabu, abu abakungu baabo bahungiire Zoari na Egulaati-Shelishiya. Manya abamwe nibainamukira aha kanyegyero ka Luhiti nibacura, n'abandi baboroogyera aha muhanda gurikuza Horonaimu, batakiine matsiko g'okukira." 
Isaiah15:6 Amaizi ga Nimuriimu goomire, obunyaatsi buhotokire, obusya bwangire kumera; tihaakiriho kintu kyona ekibisi." 
Isaiah15:7 Nikyo barikucwisiza byona ebi baatungire n'ebi baabiikire, bakabyambutsya akagyera k'emikinga." 
Isaiah15:8 Manya okucura kubugire ensi ya Moabu, okuborooga kwabo kwahika Egulaimu na Beerelimu." 
Isaiah15:9 Amaizi ga Diboni gaijwire eshagama; kwonka niinyija kureetera abaayo ekindi kihikiirizi; niyo ntare eraarye Abaamoabu abahonokireho, abatsigaire omuri egyo nsi." 
Isaiah16:1 Abaamoabu batwekyeire omutegyeki wa Yerusalemu abaana b'entaama nibabaiha Seela, nibabarabya ogw'eihamba, baabahitsya aha rushozi rwa Siyooni." 
Isaiah16:2 Nk'oku enyonyi zitaataana ekyashuri kyazo kisheenyirwe; n'abaishiki ba Moabu nikwo bari aha nyambukiro za Arunooni. 
Isaiah16:3 Nibamweshengyereza bati: Tucwere obwengye, otukorere eby'obwinganisa, oturinde nk'oku omuti gukingira abantu omushana omu ihangwe. Shereka encuubwa, kandi otareebya empungi." 
Isaiah16:4 Ikiriza encuubwa za Moabu zikushuuhuukireho ozibeere obuhungiro, zikire omuhwerekyerezi, orikuhata ku ariba atakiriho, okucwekyerezibwa kwahwaireho, n'orikuribatiirira abantu atakiri mu nsi;" 
Isaiah16:5 nibwo ekitebe ky'obugabe kirihamibwa omuri rukundo etahararuka, kikashitamwaho omu mazima ow'omu b'omuryango gwa Daudi, oritegyeka abantu akakuratira eby'obwinganisa, kandi akarahuka kukora ebihikire." 
Isaiah16:6 Tukahurira eby'okwetunguura kw'Abaamoabu, oku baine amaryo n'emyekuniko, n'okwetunguura n'orubwa. Kwonka nibeehimbisiza busha." 
Isaiah16:7 Nikyo Moabu eshemerereire kucurirwa; buri omwe akagicurira. Nimucurire obubanda bw'emizaabibu eyomire eya Kiri-hareseti mwine obusaasi. 
Isaiah16:8 Ahabw'okuba emisiri ya Heshibooni n'omuzaabibu gwa Sibuma bihotokire. Abakama b'amahanga bahenzire amataagi gaagwo agaabaire gahikire Yazeri, gakarengyera n'omu ihamba. Kandi gukataaguza agandi mataagi, gakabuga hoona, gakambuka enyanja." 
Isaiah16:9 Nikyo ndikucurira hamwe n'aba Yazeri ahabw'omuzaabibu gwa Sibuma. Iwe Heshibooni na Eleale, nimbatorongyezaho amarira, ahabw'okuba abaabaire bateera akaari k'okushemererwa nibashaaruura ebijuma byanyu by'omu kyanda, tibaakiriho." 
Isaiah16:10 Emisiri eyaabaire neeyeza munonga tekirimu kushemererwa n'okwesiima; n'omu y'emizaabibu tihaakirimu birikweshongorwa; nobu baakuba abarikuteera akaari, nari orikunyuukira viino omu ndeebo, n'akaari k'okushemererwa ak'abashoromi b'emizaabibu tikaakihurirwa." 
Isaiah16:11 Nikyo ndikutsindira nintengyeza nk'emirya y'enanga, ahabw'aba Moabu n'aba Kiri-heresi." 
Isaiah16:12 Aba Moabu ku bariija kweyoreka, nibeeruhiza busha kuza omu mwanya gutunguukire, baaza omu mwanya ogurikwera kushaba, tibaine ki barigasirwa." 
Isaiah16:13 Ebyo nibyo Nyakubaho yaagambire ira aha Baamoabu. 
Isaiah16:14 Kwonka hati Nyakubaho ogwo naagira ati: Omu myaka eshatu, nk'ei orikukorera ebihembo aragaana, ekitiinwa ky'aba Moabu, nobu baraabe baine eihe rihango munonga, kiryagaywa kandi abarihonokaho baryaba bakye munonga, abataine maani." 
Isaiah17:1 Ebi nibyo byarangirwe ahari Damasiko. Reeba, Damasiko eryaba etakiri rurembo bundi, kureka eryahinduka omutuumo gw'ebisheenyukire." 
Isaiah17:2 Endembo za Aroeri ziryaba ebifurukwa ebiro byona, zihindukye amariisizo g'amasyo g'ente n'ag'entaama, agu garibyamamu hataine kirikugakanga." 
Isaiah17:3 Abaefuraimu baryaba batakiine bigo bigumire, Damasiko etakiri rurembo rukuru rw'obugabe; n'Abasiriya abaritsigaraho, baryaba nk'Abaisiraeli batakiine kitiinwa. Nikwo Mukama ow'amahe arikugamba." 
Isaiah17:4 Eryo izooba ekitiinwa ky'aba Yakobo kiryatuuba, omugomoko gwabo guhindukye okuhoroota;" 
Isaiah17:5 Isiraeli ebe nk'oku omugyesi ashanguruza oburo bwezire, omukono gwe gwa buryo gukagyesha obushiisha, akabukoma enganda; nari nk'oku omuntu ahumba obushiisha bw'oburo omu ruhanga rw'Abareefa." 
Isaiah17:6 Kwonka eryatsigarwamu abarihonokaho; nk'oku omuoliva gutengyeetsibwa, gukatsigaza ebijuma bibiri nari bishatu aha itaagi ririkukira agandi aha mutwe, nainga nk'oku omuti gw'ebijuma gutsigaza bina nari bitaano aha mataagi g'omu mbaju zaagwo. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli arikugamba." 
Isaiah17:7 Eryo izooba abantu baryata omutima aha muhangi waabo, amaisho bagahangye Nyakwera wa Isiraeli," 
Isaiah17:8 tibaryeta ha matambiro gu baakoreise emikono yaabo, nobu kwakuba okuhanga amaisho ebi baakoreise engaro zaabo, nka Zaashera nari amatambiro g'okwotereraho obubaani." 
Isaiah17:9 Eryo izooba endembo zaabo ezigumire ziryaba nk'emyanya y'omushaka, ei Abahiivi n'Abaamori baafurukiremu nibahunga Abaisiraeli; zityo zibe amatongo." 
Isaiah17:10 Manya mwebirwe Ruhanga omujuni waanyu, timwaijuka Rukiri buhungiro bwanyu. Mbwenu nobu muribyara emisiri ehongyeirwe Adoni, mwagikomeraniraho otutaagi twa ruhanga w'abanyamahanga;" 
Isaiah17:11 nobu mwakugimeza aha izooba ri mwagibyariraho, mukagireetera kurabya omuri ako kasheeshe ku mwagibibiramu, kwonka timurigira ki mwashaaruuramu, kureka muryagira enaku n'obusaasi butarikutuuza." 
Isaiah17:12 Ai bambe! Nimuhurire okuhoorera kw'emigogo y'abantu. Nibahoorera nk'enyanja. Ai bambe! Nimuhurire endigito y'amahanga. Nibarigita nk'amaizi maingi garikuborogota. 
Isaiah17:13 Amahanga nigarigita nk'ebingonzi by'amaizi maingi; Kwonka Ruhanga aryagakabukira gahungye. Aryagabinga, gabe nk'ebishushunga birikutuntumurwa omuyaga aha nshozi, nari nk'omucuucu gurikutuntumurwa akasooroora." 
Isaiah17:14 Reeba, omu mwabazyo baryaitsa abantu obwoba, Kwonka shi butakaseesire baryaba batakiriho. Ogwo nigwo guriba omugabo gw'abarikutunyaga, n'akagwe akarigwera abarikutusikura ebyaitu." 
Isaiah18:1 Ai bambe! Ensi y'ebirikuhoorera eya seeri y'emigyera ya Etiopiya; 
Isaiah18:2 eyohereza abajwekyerwa baayo nibaraba omuri Nailo, bari omu maato g'ebibaya aha maizi! Imwe ntumwa z'obwira 'mwe, nimwirooko muze omu ihanga ry'abantu baraingwa, b'omubiri gurikuterera, eihanga eritiinwa aba haihi n'aba hare, ery'amaani kandi erisingura; eri ensi yaaryo ebaganisibwamu emigyera." 
Isaiah18:3 Imwe batuuzi b'omu nsi 'mwe, abatwire omu nsi yoona, orurango ku ruriimukibwa aha nshozi, munagyeyo eriisho! N'enzamba ku eriteerwa, mutegyeyo okutu!" 
Isaiah18:4 Manya Nyakubaho angizire ati: Ndyayema omu butaaho bwangye, ndanzyeyo ntuurize, ndi nk'akashana kaamara embeho aha nsi, kandi nk'orume rwingi omu kibiga ky'omu ishaaruura." 
Isaiah18:5 Ahabw'okuba eishaaruura ku ririba ritakahikire, orurabyo rutakaragaize, emizaabibu etakahiisize, Nyakubaho aryasharuza amataagi mato empabyo, n'amataagi gataagwize agatemeho." 
Isaiah18:6 Ago mahanga garyatsigarira kuteerwa amahungu g'omu nshozi, n'okuriibwa enyamaishwa z'omu nsi. Amahungu garyagatuuramu omu kyanda, enyamaishwa z'omu nsi zigatuuremu omu itumba." 
Isaiah18:7 Omu bunaku obwo, eryo ihanga ry'abantu baraingwa, ab'omubiri gurikuterera, eihanga eritiinwa aba haihi n'aba hare, eihanga ry'amaani kandi erisingura, riryareetera Mukama ow'amahe emitoijo aha Rushozi Siyooni, omwanya gu abantu bamuramizamu." 
Isaiah19:1 Ebi n'ebyarangirwe ahari Misiri. Reeba Nyakubaho atembire ekicu kirikwirukisa engoga, naija Misri. Ebishushani bya Misiri ebirikuramibwa biryatetemera omu maisho ge, Abanyamisiri bahahaare omutima hamwe nabyo." 
Isaiah19:2 Ndyareeta obweme omu Banyamisiri, barwane bonka na bonka; buri muntu arwane na mwene ishe, na buri muntu arwane na mutaahi we; orurembo rurwane n'orundi, n'obugabe burwane n'obundi." 
Isaiah19:3 Abanyamisiri baryahwa omutima omunda, nyite enaama zaabo, baraguze aha bishushani birikuramibwa, n'aha barogi, n'aha barikugambisa abazimu, n'aha bafumu." 
Isaiah19:4 Reero Abanyamisiri ndyabarekurira omukama w'omwaga, bategyekwe omugabe enshaarizi; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe arikugamba." 
Isaiah19:5 Amaizi ga Nailo garyayoma. Ogwo mugyera gwome, gukarangatane;" 
Isaiah19:6 emikura yaagwo enuukye, otugyera turikuruga omuri Nailo ey'omuri Misiri twijururukye twome; emigano n'emibimbiri bijunde." 
Isaiah19:7 Emyanya y'aha nkungu za Nailo, erimu amarebe n'ebibibirwe omu myegyeego yaayo biryayoma, bituntumurwe omuyaga bihweho." 
Isaiah19:8 Abajubi b'eby'enyanja n'abarikubitegyesa amarobo omuri Nailo, baryacura, baboroogye, kandi abarikutambika obutimba aha maizi gaayo baryacweka omuhimbo." 
Isaiah19:9 Abakozi b'omu fulakisi eshemeziibwe, hamwe n'abaruki b'emyenda ya pamba erikwera baryayehwa amatsiko." 
Isaiah19:10 Abari enyomyo z'egyo nsi baryacuubwa obusaasingo, boona abarikukorera ebihembo bashaashe." 
Isaiah19:11 Abategyeki ba Zoani babaire abashema; n'abahabuzi ba Faraaho nibamuha obwengye butaine ku buri. Mbwenu noobaasa ota kugira Faraaho oti: Ndi omwana w'abanyabwengye, mwijukuru w'abagabe ba ira?" 
Isaiah19:12 Iwe Faraaho 'we, abanyabwengye baawe barahi? Nibakugambire, bakumanyise eki Mukama ow'amahe ateekateekire kukora ahari Misiri." 
Isaiah19:13 Abategyeki ba Zoani babaire abashema, n'abategyeki ba Menfisi nibeebeiha. Abo ababa amabaare g'obuhamizo bw'enganda za Misiri; hati bagihabiize kimwe." 
Isaiah19:14 Mukama ataire omu ba Misiri omutima gw'okurabanamu, baagireetera kugwererana omuri byona ebi erikukora, nk'oku omusinzi agwererana naatanaka." 
Isaiah19:15 Reero Misiri terigira murimo gwona ogwagikorerwa ogurikorwa omutwe nari omukira nainga eitaagi ry'omukindo nari omugano. 
Isaiah19:16 Eryo izooba Abanyamisiri baryaba nk'abakazi, batetemesibwe obwoba obu Mukama ow'amahe aribaitsa ababangiire omukono." 
Isaiah19:17 Ensi ya Yuda eryaba erikutiinisa munonga Abanyamisiri. Boona abu barigigambira baryatiina ahabw'enaama ei Mukama ow'amahe acumire kubarwanisa. 
Isaiah19:18 Omuri ebyo biro, omu nsi ya Misiri haryabamu endembo itaano ezirikugamba Orunyakanaani; zikahiga kuguma ziri enyesigwa ahari Mukama ow'amahe. Rumwe ahari ezo ndembo ruryayetwa orwa Kazoona." 
Isaiah19:19 Eryo izooba, omuri Misiri ahagati, haryabamu eitambiro eryombekyeirwe Nyakubaho, n'enyomyo emubyariirwe aha mwatano gwayo." 
Isaiah19:20 Ebyo biryabeera Mukama ow'amahe akamanyiso n'obuhamya omu nsi ya Misiri; ngu ku baritakira Nyakubaho baitsirwe kubi abarikubahata, aryabatwekyera Omujuni, abarwaneho abarokore." 
Isaiah19:21 Reero Nyakubaho aryayemanyisa Abanyamisiri, bamumanye eryo izooba, bamuramye nibamutambira ebitambo bicwekize, n'okumureetera emitoijo, haza bahigye nibamuraganisa, kandi bahikiirize ebi bamuraganiise." 
Isaiah19:22 Nyakubaho aryateera Abanyamisiri. Kwonka nobu aribateera, aryabatambira. Kandi ku barimugarukira, aryatega okutu okweshengyereza kwabo, abatambire." 
Isaiah19:23 Omu biro ebyo haryabaho omuhanda rugyendwa ogurikuruga Misiri niguza Asiriya, Abaasiriya baryaija Misiri, n'Abanyamisiri baze Asiriya; kandi Abanyamisiri baramye kumwe n'Abaasiriya." 
Isaiah19:24 Omu bunaku obwo Isiraeli eryaba aha rurengo rumwe na Misiri na Asiriya; zonshatu zihaise ensi yoona omugisha. 
Isaiah19:25 Manya Mukama ow'amahe azihaire omugisha naagira ati: Misiri eihanga ryangye, na Asiriya ei naayehangiire, na Isiraeli eyangye aha bwangye, nizikagire omugisha!" 
Isaiah20:1 Omu mwaka ogu omukuru w'amahe yaatumiirwemu Sarugooni, omugabe wa Asiriya akaija Ashidoodi orurembo rw'Abafilisiti, yaaruteera, yaarukwata;" 
Isaiah20:2 nibwo Nyakubaho yaaragiira Isaaya mwene Amozi, ati: Irooko oyezirikuurure ekiguniya omu manyaanya, ojuure n'enkaito omu bigyere. Nawe yaakora atyo, yaagyenda ajwaire busha, ataine na nkaito omu bigyere." 
Isaiah20:3 Reero Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Nk'oku omwiru wangye Isaaya amazire emyaka eshatu naagyenda ajwaire busha, ataine na nkaito mu bigyere, ari akamanyiso n'eky'okutangaaza ahari Misiri na Etiopiya," 
Isaiah20:4 n'omugabe wa Asiriya nikwo aritwara Abanyamisiri bari enkwatwa, akazaasya Abanyaetiopiya; abato n'abakuru bakagyenda bajwaire busha, bataine nkaito mu bigyere, ebibunu byabo biri aheeru, kuhemura Misiri." 
Isaiah20:5 Obwo nibwo abagira obwesigye ahari Etiopiya, bakeekiita ahabwa Misiri, barihahaara omutima, bakashoberwa." 
Isaiah20:6 N'abatwire omu myegyeego y'enyanja eryo izooba nibwo barigira bati: Reeba, akagwe kaagwera abu tubaire twineho amatsiko, n'abu tubaire nituhungiraho kutuha emikono n'okutujuna omugabe wa Asiriya! Mbwenu itwe nitwija kukira tuta?" 
Isaiah21:1 Ebi nibyo byarangirwe ahari Babulooni. Nk'oku emiyaga y'akasooroora esingoorera neeraba omuri Negebu, nikwo akagwe kariruga omu ihamba, omu nsi erikutiinisa." 
Isaiah21:2 Nyorekirwe ekintu kitarimu saasi; naareeba omunyagi naanyaga, n'omucwekyerezi naacwekyereza. Imwe aba Elamu, nimuhurure! Naimwe aba Mediya, nimugote endembo! Enaku zoona ezi Babulooni yaareetsire niinyija kuzimaraho." 
Isaiah21:3 Nikyo nyiniire obusaasi bw'okuunyita, nkashaasha nk'omukazi orikurumwa. Nyeinamiriire tiinyine gahurira, omutima gumpahaire, tindikubaasa kureeba." 
Isaiah21:4 Obwengye bwampwamu, ebirikutiinisa byanyitsa obwoba; akairima ku ntengire kandugiramu okutetema." 
Isaiah21:5 Abantu nibatebeekanisa emeeza nibaara emikyeeka, nibarya kandi nibanywa. Mbwenu imwe bategyeki 'mwe, nimwimukye, musiigye engabo amajuta." 
Isaiah21:6 Manya Nyakubaho angizire ati: Irooko oteho omurinzi, agume arangye eki yaareeba." 
Isaiah21:7 Ku araareebe emigogo y'abatembire embaraasi nibazigyenderaho babiri-babiri, n'abarikugyendera aha ndogoya, n'aha ngamira, omurekye ategye okutu ataireho omutima, atarikwita riisho." 
Isaiah21:8 Bwanyima omurinzi yaayamuza ati: Nyakubaho wangye, nyomushana nsiiba nyemereire aha munaara gw'okurangizaho; na nyekiro ndaara nyemereire omu mwanya gu bantairemu." 
Isaiah21:9 Mbwenu reeba, abatembire embaraasi abarikuzigyenderaho babiri-babiri mbaba nibaija. Nawe agarukamu ati: Babulooni egwire! Babulooni egwire! N'ebishushani bya baaruhanga baayo byona byayetuura aha nsi byacwagurika." 
Isaiah21:10 Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, abu naahwire, nkaheheeza, eki mpuriire Mukama ow'amahe Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagamba, nikyo naabarangira." 
Isaiah21:11 Ebi nibyo byarangirwe ahari Duma. Haine orikuunyeta naayema Seiri, naagira ati: Iwe murinzi 'we, ekiro kyahika hi?" 
Isaiah21:12 Omurinzi agarukamu ati: Nibuza kusheesha kandi bwire. Ku muraabe nimwenda kwehanuuza, nimweehanuuze haza mugarukye." 
Isaiah21:13 Ebi nibyo byarangirwe ahari Buharabu. Imwe bimbuuro by'Abadedani ebirikuhingura, muryaraara omu bishaka bya Buharabu ebikwataine." 
Isaiah21:14 Imwe batuuzi ba Tema 'mwe, nimureetere abaine eiriho amaizi, abarikuhunga mubabuganise ebyokurya;" 
Isaiah21:15 ahabw'okuba bahungire zaarurara, zaarurara ezisyoirweyo, amata gaareegire, n'orugamba ruhamire." 
Isaiah21:16 Manya Nyakubaho angizire ati: Omwaka gutakahwaireho, oguri nk'emyaka y'orikukorera ebihembo, ekitiinwa kya Kedari kiryahwaho;" 
Isaiah21:17 abaritsigara aha barasi, abashaija emanzi b'Abakedari, babe mbarwa; ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli nikwo agambire." 
Isaiah22:1 Ebi nibyo byarangirwe aha ruhanga rw'Okubonekyererwamu. Ekirikukutembesa n'omutima gumwe aha mutwe gw'amaju ni ki? 
Isaiah22:2 Iwe rurembo rwijwire orwari 'we, orujagaraire kandi orurikwesiima. Abantu baawe abaitsirwe, tibaitsirwe rurara; nobu kwakuba okugwa omu rugamba." 
Isaiah22:3 Abategyeki baawe boona bahungire kumwe, baafa batakananwire mata gaabo. Abaawe boona bakwatiirwe hoona, ahi bashangirwe; nobu baraabe babaire bahungiire hare." 
Isaiah22:4 Nikyo ngiriire nti: Onyiheho amaisho, ondekye ndire munonga. Oteerusya kungwisiriza ahabw'orurembo rw'abantu bangye orucwekyereire." 
Isaiah22:5 Manya Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe ataire omu ruhanga rw'okubonekyererwamu, eizooba ry'akajagararo n'okuribatiirirwa n'okurimbagirirwa; ery'okusheenyaguriraho ebigo n'okutaka, nibatakira enshozi." 
Isaiah22:6 Aba Elamu baizire bahagatiire emitana, baine ebigaari n'ab'ahambaraasi; aba Kiiri baashembuura engabo." 
Isaiah22:7 Empanga zaawe ezirikukira oburungi ziijwire ebigaari, n'ab'aha mbaraasi babambiire amarembo." 
Isaiah22:8 Aihireho ekibaire kikingiire aba Yuda. Aha izooba eryo, amaisho mukagahanga eby'okurwanisa eby'omu Nju y'Ekibira," 
Isaiah22:9 mwareeba ku orurembo rwa Daudi rwine ebisheenyuka bingi, mwateeranira hamwe amaizi g'omu kiyanja kya ifo," 
Isaiah22:10 kandi mwabara amaju g'omuri Yerusalemu, mwagasheenya kugumya ekigo." 
Isaiah22:11 Bwanyima amaizi g'omu kiyanja ekya ira mwagatimbira ekiziba ahagati y'ebigo byombi. Kwonka timwahanga maisho owaabihangire, nari okweta aha waabiteekateekire ira ku bibaho." 
Isaiah22:12 Eryo izooba Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe akabeeta ngu murire, mucure; mumwe enkomborora kandi mwezirikye ebiguniya." 
Isaiah22:13 Mbwenu reeba, nimushemererwa nimunanuka; nimubaaga ente, nimwita entaama; nimurya enyama kandi nimunywa viino; nimugira muti: Ka tweriire twenywere, ahabw'okuba nyencakare turi ab'okufa." 
Isaiah22:14 Mukama ow'amahe anyeyorekire nangambira omu kutu ati: Buzimazima ekyo kicumuro timurikisaasirwa, okuhitsya obu murifa. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe arikugamba." 
Isaiah22:15 Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe angizire ati: Irooko oze ow'ogwo mubiiki Shebuna oreeberera eby'omuri Nyaruju, omugire oti:" 
Isaiah22:16 Aha nookoraho ki, kandi oineho oha; waaza kweshorogotera aha ekituuro omu ibaare, iwe oyetimbiire ekituuro ahatunguukire, okeesharurira obutuuro omu rukiri?" 
Isaiah22:17 Mbwenu iwe mushaija w'amaani 'we, reeba, Nyakubaho naija kukujuguta. Aryakukwata, akuhamye," 
Isaiah22:18 akuzongoze, akutambikye nk'omupiira, akunagye omu nsi egarami, ofeereyo, ebigaari byawe ebirikukuteera eigundu bigweyo, iwe orikuhemura eka ya mukama waawe." 
Isaiah22:19 Ndyakubinga aha murimo gwawe, nkuhananture omu mwanya gwawe." 
Isaiah22:20 Eryo izooba ndyayeta omwiru wangye Eliyakimu mwene Hilikiya," 
Isaiah22:21 mmujwekye bushuuti yaawe, mmuzirikye orukoba rwawe, mmuhe obushoboorozi bwawe, abe ishe w'abatwire Yerusalemu n'ab'omuryango gwa Yuda." 
Isaiah22:22 Ndyamuta aha ibega ekikomoorozo ky'enju ya Daudi. Ku ariigura tihaine orikinga; kandi ku arikinga tihaine oriigura. 
Isaiah22:23 Haza ndyamuhamiza kimwe omu mwanya guhamire, nk'oku bateererera enkondo; ahaise ab'omuryango gwa ishe ekitiinwa;" 
Isaiah22:24 bamwegyekyerere ebintu byona ebirikuremeera eby'ab'omuryango gwa ishe, ab'enda ye n'oruzaaro rwe, n'ebintu byona ebikye, okwiha aha bikopo okuta aha nywero." 
Isaiah22:25 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Eryo izooba egyo nkondo eyaabaire eteereirwe omu mwanya guhamire, eryakuuka etemwe, egwe; n'ebigihanikirweho bihweho. Ekyo Nyakubaho niwe akigambire." 
Isaiah23:1 Ebi n'ebyarangirwe ahari Tuuro. Imwe meeri za Tarushiishi 'mwe, nimucure, ahabw'okuba Tuuro ecwekyereire, tekiine maju nari enyambukiro! Ekyo nibakimanya baaba nibaruga omu nsi ya Kitimu." 
Isaiah23:2 Imwe abatwire omu myegyeego y'enyanja, naimwe bashuubuzi ba Sidoni 'mwe, abu entumwa zaanyu zaayambukire enyanja, niziraba omu maizi maingi, nimuhuname!" 
Isaiah23:3 Ebyokurya bya Shihoori eby'omujuma, n'ebyabaire bishaaruurwa ahari Nailo nibyo byabaire bibatungisa, mukashuuburana n'agandi mahanga." 
Isaiah23:4 Iwe Sidoni, itwa enshoni, ahabw'okuba enyanja egambire, ekigo kyayo ekigumire kyehakaine nikigira kiti: Tinkarumwaga, tinkazaaraga, tinkanyeetsaga batsigazi, kandi tinkoororaga baishiki." 
Isaiah23:5 Enkuru ku erihika Misiri, abaayo baryashaasha ahabw'ebirikugambwa ahari Tuuro." 
Isaiah23:6 Imwe abatwire aha myegyeego y'enyanja, nimwambukye muze Tarushiishi, mucurireyo!" 
Isaiah23:7 Oru nirwo rurembo rwanyu ruri, orwa ryari na ryari, orwabaire nirubeesiimisa, oru abatuuzi baamwo baabaire baza hare kutuurayo?" 
Isaiah23:8 Mbwenu n'oha owaacumire enaama y'okukora ebyo byona ahari Tuuro, orurembo orwabaire rwemeka abagabe, abashuubuzi baamwo bari abantu abategyeki, n'abatembeya baarwo bari ab'ekitiinwa omu nsi?" 
Isaiah23:9 Mukama ow'amahe niwe yaakicumire, ngu abone kucwa ab'ebitiinwa baayo boona amaryo, n'okugayisa ab'ebitiinwa boona ab'omu nsi." 
Isaiah23:10 Imwe Banyatarushiishi 'mwe, nimushandaare omu nsi yaanyu nka Nailo, ahabw'okuba timwakiine w'okubazibira." 
Isaiah23:11 Nyakubaho abangiire enyanja omukono, atengyetsize ensi z'abagabe, kandi aragiire ku ebigo bya Kanaani ebigumire bicwekyerezibwa." 
Isaiah23:12 Reero agizire ati: Iwe Sidoni 'we, tokyesiima! Abantu baawe nibahatwa. Kwonka nobu baraimukye, baayambuka, baaza Kupuro, nayo tibarigirirayo buhuumure." 
Isaiah23:13 Reeba ensi y'Abakaludaaya! Tekiri ihanga. Abaasiriya, Tuuro bakagihindura ey'enyamaishwa z'omu ihamba, baagyombekaho eminaara y'okugigoteraho, baasheenya ebikaari byayo, baagicwekyereza." 
Isaiah23:14 Imwe meeri za Tarushiishi 'mwe, nimucure, ahabw'okuba ekigo kyanyu ekigumire kisheenyirwe." 
Isaiah23:15 Aha izooba eryo Tuuro eryayeba okumara emyaka makumi mushanju, nk'ei omugabe amara ari aha ngoma. Egyo myaka makumi mushanju ku erihwa, ebiriba ahari Tuuro biryaba nk'eby'omu kyeshongoro kya maraaya, ebirikugira biti:" 
Isaiah23:16 Iwe maraaya 'we, owaayebire, kwata enanga, ogyendagyende omu rurembo! Ogiteere ogijumeeze, oyeshongore ebyeshongoro bingi, obone kwijukwa." 
Isaiah23:17 Aha muheru gw'emyaka makumi mushanju, Nyakubaho aryataayaayira Tuuro; egarukire okwetunda kwayo, ehampukye n'amahanga g'abagabe ag'omu nsi yoona." 
Isaiah23:18 Ebi erishuubuza n'ebi eritunga ehampukire biryahongyerwa Nyakubaho. Tibiribiikwa nobu kwakuba okutindikwa, kureka eby'obushuubuzi byayo biryatungisa abatuura omu maisho ga Nyakubaho ebyokurya bingi munonga n'ebijwaro birungi." 
Isaiah24:1 Reeba Nyakubaho aryahwerekyereza ensi, agihindure amatongo. Aryagijuumika, ataataanise abagitwiremu." 
Isaiah24:2 Haza ebe eti: Ekiriba aha bantu, nikyo kiriba n'aha muhongyerezi; Ekiriba aha muhuuku, nikyo kiriba ahari mukama we; Ekiriba aha muzaana, nikyo kiriba ahari mugore we: ekiriba aha muguzi, nikyo kiriba aha mutunzi; Ekiriba aha muntu orikuguza, nikyo kiriba ahari orikweguza; Ekiriba aha muntu orikwihuza, nikyo kiriba n'aha muntu orikwihuzibwa." 
Isaiah24:3 Ensi eryacwekyerezibwa, enyagirwe kimwe. Ekyo Nyakubaho niwe akigambire." 
Isaiah24:4 Ensi neeganya, neehotoka. Ensi yoona neehononoka, neehotoka. Eiguru n'ensi bihwaire aha magufa." 
Isaiah24:5 Ensi esiisirwe abagitwiremu, ahabw'okuba bakahenda amateeka, baayanga kukuratira ebyatairweho, baita endagaano etahwaho." 
Isaiah24:6 Nikyo ensi eriitirwa omukyeeno, abagitwiremu bakaguma barimbagiriirwe ahabw'orubanja; Nikyo abagitwiremu baryokibwa, bakatsigara mbarwa." 
Isaiah24:7 Viino n'ey'eifa, omuzaabibu niguhononoka; boona abaabaire bashemererwa hati nibatsinda." 
Isaiah24:8 Okushemererwa kw'abarikuteera enjogyera kucecekire, akaari k'abarikunanuka kahongoize," 
Isaiah24:9 n'okushemererwa kw'abarikuteera amagobore tikwakiteeza. Tibarinywa bundi viino nibeeshongora; amakuuta garyashaariirira abarikuganywa. 
Isaiah24:10 Orurembo orubaire rutaine buteeka rusheenyukire, Amaju goona gakingire, ngu hatakaagira owaataahamu." 
Isaiah24:11 Nibaboroogyera omu nguuto, ahabw'okuburwa viino; Okutokoorekana kw'abari aha tereko kurugirwemu okurimbagirirwa. Okwesiima kw'omu nsi kuhwaireho." 
Isaiah24:12 Orurembo tirubaire kindi, kureka amatongo, amarembo gaarwo gasheenyirwe, gaacwekyerezibwa." 
Isaiah24:13 N'ahabw'ekyo nikwo kiriba omu mahanga g'omu nsi, nk'oku bateera emiti y'emioliva, nari nk'oku bahumba emizaabibu, eishaaruura ryayo rihwaire." 
Isaiah24:14 Aba Yuda abarirokoka baryaimutsya amaraka, beeshongore ahabw'okushemererwa Abariba bari oburengyerwa-izooba baryateera akaari k'okusingiza Nyakubaho." 
Isaiah24:15 Reero nu, ab'omu burugwa-izooba ka bahimbise Nyakubaho, n'ab'aha myegyeego y'enyanja basingize Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah24:16 Turyahurira ebyeshongoro by'okuhimbisa Nyakuhikiriire ow'ekitiinwa, nibiruga aha muheru gw'ensi. Kwonka, nyowe ningira nti: Mpwaire aha magufa! Mpweire aha magufa! Ai bambe, ka naareeba! Ahabw'okuba abarikureebya nibareebya; abarikureebya nibareebeza kimwe." 
Isaiah24:17 Iwe mutuuzi w'omu nsi 'we, ebirikutiinisa n'obusya n'emitego bikutegyereize." 
Isaiah24:18 Orihunga enduuru y'ebirikutiinisa, aryagwa omu kiina, kandi orisharabamba naaruga omu kiina aryagwa omu mutego. Ahabw'okuba eiguru riryafukunkura enjura, obuhamizo bw'ensi butengyeete." 
Isaiah24:19 Ensi eyatikiire kimwe, ensi eyabiire kimwe, ensi etengyeetsiibwe n'amaani!" 
Isaiah24:20 Ensi neetaruza nk'omusinzi, neezonga nk'akaju, ebicumuro byayo bigihingamiire; Neija kugwa kandi teriimuka bundi." 
Isaiah24:21 Eryo izooba Nyakubaho aryafubira amahe g'ahaiguru omu iguru, n'abagabe b'aha nsi omu nsi." 
Isaiah24:22 Baryateeranirwa hamwe nk'oku embohe zirundaanirwa omu kiina; bakingiranwe omu kihome, bafubirwe, haahinguraho ebiro bingi." 
Isaiah24:23 Obwo nibwo okwezi kurishobangirirwa n'eizooba rikabwerabwera; ahabw'okuba Mukama ow'amahe niwe aritegyekyera aha Rushozi Siyooni omuri Yerusalemu; akooreka ekitiinwa kye abantu be abakuru. 
Isaiah25:1 Ai Mukama, niiwe Ruhanga wangye. Ndyakuhimbisa, nsingize eiziina ryawe; ahabw'okuba okozire eby'okutangaaza ebi waateekateekire ira, okabikora omu bwesigwa n'omu mazima." 
Isaiah25:2 Manya orurembo oruhindwire omutuumo; orwo rurembo rugumire waarucwa eitongo. Ekikaari ky'abanyamahanga tikyakiri rurembo, kandi tikirigaruka kwombekwa." 
Isaiah25:3 Nikyo amahanga g'amaani garikuheera ekitiinwa, endembo z'amahanga gataine saasi zikakutiina." 
Isaiah25:4 Ahabw'okuba abooro n'abakyene bakakuhungiraho waabajuna beeshobeire; waababeera ah'okwegama eihunga, n'ekicuucu ky'okubatambira ekibiga; Ahabw'okuba okuteera kw'abataine saasi ni nk'eihunga eriteera orugo; nari nk'omushana gw'amaani omu nsi eyomire." 
Isaiah25:5 Niiwe ocureeza enduuru z'abanyamahanga. Nk'oku ekibunda ky'ekicu kihoza ekibiga, nikwo ebyeshongoro by'abataine saasi byahunamiibwe." 
Isaiah25:6 Ahari oru rushozi, Mukama ow'amahe aryateekyera amahanga goona obugyenyi bw'eby'ebishaju, n'obwa viino egyegyeinwe gye; obw'ez'ebishaju, biijwire omushokooro na viino y'oruhoro, egyegyeinwe gye." 
Isaiah25:7 Kandi ahari orwo rushozi aryaihiraho kimwe obwiririmba bw'enaku obutuura bujuumikiire enganda zoona, n'ekyetwekyerero ky'okucura ekisangiire amahanga goona." 
Isaiah25:8 Mukama Ruhanga aryamariraho kimwe rufu, aragaze abantu boona amarira aha maisho, n'ekijumo ki bajuma abantu be akiihe omu nsi yoona. Nikwo Nyakubaho agambire." 
Isaiah25:9 Aha izooba eryo abantu baryagira bati: Reeba, ogu niwe Ruhanga waitu ou tutuura tutegyereize ngu atujune. Ogu ni Nyakubaho ou tutuura tutegyereize! Ka tushemererwe, twesiime, ahabw'okutujuna." 
Isaiah25:10 Manya omukono gwa Nyakubaho guryaguma gurinzire oru rushozi. Kwonka Abaamoabu aryabaribatiirira, nk'oku embuba ziribatiiririrwa omu kiina ky'amasha." 
Isaiah25:11 Abaamoabu baryanaga emikono, nk'oku omuntu agitambika naaziha. Kwonka Nyakubaho aryabacwa amaryo, emikono yaabo ebure ageeyamba." 
Isaiah25:12 Ebigo byabo ebiine ebisiika biraingwa, aryabisheenyagura, abihigure, abikumbagaze aha nsi, bihikire kimwe omu mucuucu." 
Isaiah26:1 Omuri obwo bunaku, eki kyeshongoro kiryayeshongorerwa omu nsi y'aba Yuda. Bati: Twine orurembo rugumire, oru Ruhanga yaataireho ebisiika n'ebigo kutujuna." 
Isaiah26:2 Nimwigure amarembo, ab'eihanga erihikiriire kandi eririkwesigwa bataahemu." 
Isaiah26:3 Abaine omutima guhamire kandi abarikukwesiga obarindira omu busingye buzima. 
Isaiah26:4 Mugume mwesigye Nyakubaho; ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga aba orukiri rw'ebiro byona. 
Isaiah26:5 Manya abundikire ab'amaryo, abatwire omu rurembo rurikwetunguura, Yaarugarura aha nsi, yaaruhitsya aha itaka, yaarunaga omu mucuucu;" 
Isaiah26:6 ebigyere by'abooro n'eby'abakyene byaruribatiirira. 
Isaiah26:7 Omuhanda gw'abahikiriire gugororokire, kandi niiwe ogubatebeekanisiza." 
Isaiah26:8 Ai Nyakubaho, ku tuba nitukuratira ebi oragiira, tuba tukwineho amatsiko, kandi okukwijuka nikwo emitima yaitu eyetenga." 
Isaiah26:9 Amagara gangye niiwe gagirira orushusho nyekiro; omutima gwangye gukusherura gwine ekihika. Manya ebi oragiira ku biba biri omu nsi, abagitwiremu bamanya ebihikire." 
Isaiah26:10 Omuntu enyabibi ku akorerwa eby'embabazi tayetegyereza ebihikire; Nangwa n'omu nsi y'abahikiriire akoreramu ebitahikire; abura kumanya obukuru bwawe Nyakubaho. 
Isaiah26:11 Ai Nyakubaho, omukono gwawe gutuura gubangire, kwonka tibagureeba. Mbwenu ka bareebe eihato eri oiniire abantu baawe, haza baitwe enshoni. K'omuriro gu oteekateekyeire ababisha baawe gubamareho." 
Isaiah26:12 Ai Nyakubaho, niiwe orituteeraho obusingye; ahabw'okuba ebi tukora niiwe oba obitukoreire." 
Isaiah26:13 Ai Mukama Ruhanga waitu, abandi bakama batari iwe babaire nibatutegyeka; kwonka iwe wenka niiwe turikumanya." 
Isaiah26:14 Bakafa, tibarigaruka kubaho. Hati n'emizimu, tibarigaruka ruguru. Nikyo waabafubiriire, okabacwekyereza; okatsibyatsibya okwijukwa kwabo kwona." 
Isaiah26:15 Kwonka, ai Nyakubaho, okanyiise eihanga ryaitu; Kwokwo orikanyiise, wairizayo emyatano y'ensi, haza ekyo kyakuhaisa ekitiinwa." 
Isaiah26:16 Ai Nyakubaho, ku baabaire bari omu naku, bakakusherura, baakweshengyereza obu waabaire noobafubira." 
Isaiah26:17 Nk'oku omukazi oine enda agira ebisha, akaborooga naarumwa, obunaku bwe bwahika; naitwe, ai Nyakubaho, nikwo twabaire ahabwawe." 
Isaiah26:18 Tukaba twine enda, twagira ebisha. Twaba nk'abarikuzaara omuyaga; titwajuna ihanga ryaitu, abatwire omuri egyo nsi tibaagwa." 
Isaiah26:19 Abantu baawe abaafiire baryaba abahuriire, emitumbi yaabo ezookye. Imwe abatuura omu mucuucu, nimusisiimukye, mweshongore mushemereirwe! Ahabw'okuba nk'oku orume rwawe orurikumurinkana rubobeeza ensi; naiwe nikwo orizoora abaafiire abari omu nsi y'emizimu." 
Isaiah26:20 Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, nimwije mutaahe omu bishengye byanyu, mwekingiraniremu. Mumare akaanya mwesherekire, okuhitsya ahi kashanga eraahwereho." 
Isaiah26:21 Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho naija kuruga ahu atuura, kufubira abatwire omu nsi naabatura ebicumuro byabo; ensi eyorekye eshagama eyaagiseesirweho, etakishereka bantu baayo abaitsirwe." 
Isaiah27:1 Omu bunaku obwo Nyakubaho aryakwata rurara ye empango ey'amaani kandi etaine saasi, afubire Leviyataani, ekijoka kirikuhunga nikyenyogoora; kandi aite orukooko rw'omu nyanja." 
Isaiah27:2 Eryo izooba Nyakubaho aryagira ati: Reeba, omusiri murungi gw'emizaabibu! Mugweshongore." 
Isaiah27:3 Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye murinzi waagwo, ngwitirira buri kaanya; kandi ngurinda nyekiro na nyomushana, ngu hatakaagira owaagushiisha." 
Isaiah27:4 Tinkiine kiniga. Nkaahenwa ki, haija amahwa n'emikwatangwe kundwanisa! Haza mpurura, mbirwanisa, mbyokyeza hamwe byona." 
Isaiah27:5 Nainga shi bankwate amaguru ngu mbarinde, bakore naanye endagaano y'obusingye, buzimazima bagikore naanye." 
Isaiah27:6 Omu biro ebiriija Abaisiraeli baijukuru ba Yakobo baryatsimba emizi nk'omuti, barabye batookye, baijuze ensi yoona ebijuma." 
Isaiah27:7 Mbwenu shi Nyakubaho tarabateire nk'oku yaateire abaabateire? Nainga shi tibaraitsirwe nk'oku abaabaitsire baitsirwe? 
Isaiah27:8 Manya Nyakubaho akabarwanisa naababarira, naabazaasya; yaabaihisamu omuyaga gwe ogutaine saasi, nk'oguruga oburugwa-izooba." 
Isaiah27:9 Mbwenu ebi nibyo birireetera aba Yakobo kwihwaho orubanja, bakasaasirirwa kimwe ebicumuro byabo! Ku barisingyeera amabaare g'aha matambiro goona gakacweka obusaasingo nk'ag'ebisooni, Zaashera n'amatambiro agootererwaho obubaani bikarugiraho kimwe." 
Isaiah27:10 Manya orurembo rw'ebigo bigumire ruhindukire omushaka, amaju gaarwo gaafurukwamu, rwatsigara rwonka nk'eihamba; niruriirwamu enyana, niziruzaagiriramu, kandi nizikonkobora amataagi gaamwo." 
Isaiah27:11 Amataagi g'emiti yaamwo goomire, gaakooboka; abakazi baija baagahemba. Manya abantu b'eihanga eri n'abatarikwetegyereza; nikyo owaabahangire akababumburika ataribagirira saasi na mbabazi." 
Isaiah27:12 Eryo izooba imwe Abaisiraeli Nyakubaho aryabataaruura, okwiha aha mugyera Eufuraati okuta aha kagyera ka Misiri, abagire nk'oku bahuura oburo, bakabutaanisa n'omweziga." 
Isaiah27:13 Kandi eryo izooba enzamba mpango eryateerwa, abaaburiire omu nsi ya Asiriya, n'abaabingirwe bakahungira Misiri, baryaija baramize Nyakubaho Yerusalemu aha rushozi rwe orurikwera." 
Isaiah28:1 Ebishi obugabe bw'amaryo obw'abasinzi ba Efuraimu buryakareeba! Ekitiinwa kyabwo kihongye nk'ebishaba by'ebirabyo, ebi abeebembezi baayo bajwara omu mutwe. Abeebembezi baabo abarikwetunguura nibataamirana emigaju; kwonka bagwire bugango baitsirwe viino!" 
Isaiah28:2 Reeba, Nyakubaho aine emanzi y'amaani eribatuura ahansi, nk'eihunga ririmu orubaare, ery'omuyaga gurikucwekyereza; nari nk'omwegyemure gw'amaani, ogw'amaizi garikushandaara." 
Isaiah28:3 Abeebembezi b'abasinzi ba Efuraimu baryaribatiirirwa," 
Isaiah28:4 ekirabyo kirikuhonga eky'oburungi bwayo obw'ekitiinwa, eky'aha mutwe gw'oruhanga rurikweza munonga, kibe nk'ekijuma ky'omutiini ekibanza kuhiisa ekyanda kitakahikire, omuntu akikireeba, akakirya ahonaaho kyamuhika omu ngaro." 
Isaiah28:5 Eryo izooba Mukama ow'amahe aryabeera abantu be abaatsigaireho ekirunga ky'ekitiinwa n'eihunde rirungi; 
Isaiah28:6 ahe abarikucwa emanja omutima gw'obwinganisa, n'abarikubinga abazigu aha marembo abahe amaani." 
Isaiah28:7 Abo nabo nibagwereranisibwa viino bataruzisibwa amakuuta. Abahongyerezi n'abarangi nibagwereranisibwa ebirikusinza, viino ebamaramu obwengye. Bataruzisibwa amakuuta, baremwa kushoboorokyerwa ebi boorekirwe, bagumirwa okucwa emanja." 
Isaiah28:8 Manya emeeza zoona ziijwire entanaki, tihariho mwanya gutarimu burofa." 
Isaiah28:9 Nibankuneetera bati: N'oha ou araayegyese? N'oha ou araashoboororere ebi atumirwe? Kureka encuukye ezirugire aha mabeere! 
Isaiah28:10 Manya ebi arikwegyesa naabitungikirirana; ekiragiro aha kiragiro, n'ekindi aha kindi; omushorongo aha mushorongo n'ogundi aha gundi; aha kakye, na hariya kakye." 
Isaiah28:11 Tikwo kiri! Kureka abantu abarikugamba eby'enduga-mahanga, ab'orurimi rutari rwaitu, nibo Nyakubaho arituma kugambira aba bantu;" 
Isaiah28:12 abu yaagizire ati: Eki nikyo kihuumuro, ka oruhire ahuumure, obu nibwo buruhuukiro; kwonka baayanga kuhurira." 
Isaiah28:13 Nikyo ekigambo kya Nyakubaho kiribabeera ekiragiro aha kiragiro, n'ekindi aha kindi; omushorongo aha mushorongo, n'ogundi aha gundi; aha kakye, na hariya kakye; babone kugyenda, bagwe bagarami, bahendekye, bagwe omu busya, bakwatwe." 
Isaiah28:14 N'ahabw'ekyo, imwe bagaaniizi 'mwe, abategyeka aba bantu b'omuri Yerusalemu, nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikugamba naagira ati:" 
Isaiah28:15 Nk'oku mugizire muti: Tukozire endagaano na rufu, twaragaana n'Okuzimu owa Nyamuteza, ekifubiro kirikuhwerekyereza ku kiriija tikirituhikaho; ahabw'okuba ebishuba bituura bitukingiire, n'okubeiha nikwo kututeekireho." 
Isaiah28:16 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Reeba, nimbyara omuri Siyooni eibaare ry'obuhamizo, eibaare ryetegyereziibwe, ery'obuguzi bwingi kandi ery'omusingi guhamire; Oriikiriza, tarirahukiiriza." 
Isaiah28:17 Obwinganisa nibwo ndihindura omugoye gw'okugyeresa; okuhikiirira kube kariisho; orubaare rumareho ekikingisirizo ky'ebishuba, n'amaizi gahiminture obwegamo bwabyo." 
Isaiah28:18 Nibwo endagaano yaanyu na Rufu erirugaho, n'ebi mwaikirizaine n'Okuzimu owa Nyamuteza bikahwaho; ekifubiro ky'okuhwerekyereza kukiba nikiraba omu nsi kikabasiitagura." 
Isaiah28:19 Buri murundi gu kirirabamu kiryabakukumba; kiryaguma nikirabamu buri kasheeshe, nyomushana na nyekiro abarikimanya kibaitse obwoba." 
Isaiah28:20 Manya ekitanda ni kigufu, tihaine orikubaasa kukirambikirizaho; n'ekyeshweko n'enkyeetero ei omuntu atarikubaasa kwefubika." 
Isaiah28:21 Nyakubaho aryaimuka nk'oku yaimukire aha Rushozi Perazimu, aine ekiniga kingi nk'eki yaagiriire omu ruhanga rwa Gibeoni; akore ekikoro. Ebishi kiryaba eky'okutangaaza! Kandi akore omurimo ogutakareebwaga!" 
Isaiah28:22 Mbwenu nu, murekyere aho okugayana, ebibakomire bitakaabariitira kimwe, ahabw'okuba mpuriire ku Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe amaririire kucwekyereza ensi egi yoona." 
Isaiah28:23 Mutegye okutu muhurire eiraka ryangye, nimuhuguukye muhurire eki ndikugamba!" 
Isaiah28:24 Ebyo ohinga ngu abibe, aguma naahinga? Atuura naabanjura kandi naateera amatsinde?" 
Isaiah28:25 Ku aheza kwanjara eitaka, tanaganaga embibo z'omuriri, akabiba eshogi, akabyara engano omu mishorongo, na baale omu mwanya gwayo, n'endiijo mbibo y'engano omu rubibi?" 
Isaiah28:26 Ruhanga we niwe amworekyerera gye akamwegyesa. 
Isaiah28:27 Omuriri tiguhuuzibwa kihuuzo kiremeire, n'enyamuziga z'ekigaari tizeehindurira ha shogi, kureka omuriri baguteeza akakoni, n'eshogi bagiteeza enkoni." 
Isaiah28:28 Mbwenu omuntu agumizamu naasa engano z'okwihamu emigaati? Ngaaha; taguma naazihuura. Ku azirabyamu ekigaari kye ekirikukururwa embaraasi, tazisiitagura." 
Isaiah28:29 Ekyo nakyo kiruga ahari Mukama ow'amahe, omuhabuzi orikutangaaza, kandi orikukiriza kimwe abandi boona obwengye." 
Isaiah29:1 Ai bambe, Arieli, Arieli, orurembo oru Daudi yaatairemu orusiisira! Nimwongyere omwaka aha gundi, n'amagyenyi gabeho nigakuratana." 
Isaiah29:2 Kwonka ndyakubonabonesa iwe Arieli, habeho okucura n'okutonzya; ombeere eitambiro." 
Isaiah29:3 Ndyakuteeraho ensiisira, zikwehinguririze, nkutuumeho eby'okukurwanisizaho." 
Isaiah29:4 Bwanyima oryagamba nooyema okuzimu omu itaka, ebigambo byawe birugye aha nsi omu mucuucu, eiraka ryawe rirugye okuzimu nk'ery'omuzimu; ebi origamba bihwihwitsize omu mucuucu." 
Isaiah29:5 Kwonka emigogo y'abazigu baawe eryatuntumurwa nk'omucuucu; n'ebimbuuro by'abataine saasi bituntumukye nk'ebishushunga; haza omu kaanya kakye kati. 
Isaiah29:6 Mukama ow'amahe aryakujunisa okuhinda kw'enkuba, n'omutsitsa n'endigito mpango, n'akasooroora, n'eihunga n'endimi z'omuriro gurikurya busha." 
Isaiah29:7 Emigogo y'amahanga goona agarikurwanisa Arieli, agarikugirwanisa n'ekigo kyayo ekigumire, gakagireebesa enaku, garyahwaho nk'ekirooto ekirootwa nyekiro." 
Isaiah29:8 Nk'oku omuntu oine enjara aroota naarya, akisisiimuka akashanga akiine egyo enjara; nari nk'oku omuntu oine eiriho aroota ngu naanywa, akasisiimuka n'ekyaka, akiine eryo iriho, n'emigogo y'amahanga goona erikurwanisa Orushozi Siyooni, nikwo eriba." 
Isaiah29:9 Nimwefiise omutima, haza mube kwo. Mwehumye, haza mube empumi! Nimusinde mutanywaire viino, mutaruze mutanywaire makuuta!" 
Isaiah29:10 Manya Nyakubaho abashukireho omutima gw'okugwejegyera munonga, Yaahumya amaisho gaanyu, nibo barangi; yaashweka emitwe yaanyu, nibo bahanuuzi." 
Isaiah29:11 Byona ebi mwayorekirwe byababeera nk'ebigambo by'omu muzingo gw'ekitabo, ogukomesiibwe akamanyiso: abantu bakiguha orikumanya kushoma, baamugira bati: Gushome, akabagarukamu ati: Tindikubaasa, ahabw'okuba gukomire." 
Isaiah29:12 Bakiguha otarikubaasa kushoma; baamugira bati: Gushome, akabagarukamu ati: Tindikumanya kushoma." 
Isaiah29:13 Nikyo Nyakubaho agiririire ati: Abantu aba nibeegamba ku barikuunyehitsya, bampaisisa ekitiinwa eminwa yaabo; haza kunu emitima yaabo endi hare, kandi okuntiina kwabo n'ekiragiro ekyatairweho abantu bakakikuratira batarikumanya makuru gaakyo." 
Isaiah29:14 Mbwenu nikyo ndaagarukire kukora eby'okutangaaza omuri aba bantu; buzimazima eby'okutangaaza kandi ebitakareebwaga; obwengye bw'abanyabwengye baabo buhweho, n'okwetegyereza kw'abantu baabo abarikwetegyereza kubure." 
Isaiah29:15 Baryakareeba abashereka Nyakubaho enaama zaabo, abakorera ebintu omu mwirima, bakagira ngu n'oha orikutureeba kandi n'oha oraatumanye?" 
Isaiah29:16 Mbwenu nimuhindaguturana ebintu! Omunogoozi akainganisibwa n'eibumba? Nari ekintu ekikozirwe kikaagamba aha waakikozire kiti: Tiwe yankozire? Nainga ekibumbirwe kugamba aha waakibumbire kiti: Tarikwetegyereza? 
Isaiah29:17 Mbwenu shi tihatsigaire akaanya kakye Lebanooni kuhinduka omusiri gurikweza munonga, reero omusiri ogurikweza munonga gukahinduka ekibira?" 
Isaiah29:18 Eryo izooba ebifamatu biryahurira ebigambo by'omu kitabo; n'empumi ziryahumuuka, zikire okurindagira n'okubandagira." 
Isaiah29:19 Abacureezi baryayeyongyera kushemerererwa omuri Nyakubaho, n'abooro b'omu bantu beehimbisize omuri Nyakwera wa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah29:20 Ahabw'okuba abataine saasi baryacweka busha, abagayani bahweho, n'abarikuronda obwiho bw'okukora ebibi," 
Isaiah29:21 bakoomesereza omuntu nibamubeiherera, bakatega obusya orikuhanira abantu aha irembo, kandi ohikire bakamwimisa ekimushereire, baryamarwaho." 
Isaiah29:22 Nikyo Nyakubaho owaacungwire Abrahamu arikugambira aha b'omuryango gwa Yakobo ati: aba Yakobo tibariitwa nshoni bundi nobu kwakuba okubwerabwera. 
Isaiah29:23 Ahabw'okuba ku barireeba abaana baabo abu naahangire, n'ebi naakozire omu ihanga ryabo, baryahaisa eiziina ryangye ekitiinwa, bamanye ku ndi Nyakwera wa Yakobo, kandi bantiine, nyowe Ruhanga wa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah29:24 Reero abacuramiriirwe baryayetegyereza; n'abatarikwenda kuhaburwa baryaikiriza kwegyesibwa. 
Isaiah30:1 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Baryakareeba abaana abagomi, abacuma enaama, bakakora ebi ntabatebeekanisiize; bakagira endagaano y'okukwatanisa n'abandi ntenzire, batyo bakongyera ekibi aha kindi;" 
Isaiah30:2 abaimutsya orugyendo kuza Misiri bataanyehanwizeho, kuhungira ahari Faraaho ngu abarinde, bakarondera obwegamo omu kicuucu kya Misiri!" 
Isaiah30:3 Nikyo okurindwa Faraaho kuribaitsiza enshoni, n'okwegama omu kicuucu kya Misiri kukabahemura." 
Isaiah30:4 Ahabw'okuba nobu abakungu baabo bagiire Zoani, n'entumwa zaabo zaahikire Hanesi;" 
Isaiah30:5 kwonka buri omwe aryaitwa enshoni ahabw'eryo ihanga ritaine ki ririkubagasira; eritarikubaasa kubaha mikono nari kubagirira omugasho; kureka okubaitsa enshoni n'okubahemura. 
Isaiah30:6 Eki n'ekyarangirwe aha nyamaishwa z'omuri Negebu. Reeba, abajwekyerwa baabo nibaraba omu nsi y'enaku n'obusaasi, erugwamu entare enkazi n'enshaija, erimu encwera n'enjoka zirikugurukira, beekoreize endogoya zaabo eby'obutungi, bataire eby'obuguzi bwingi aha mabango g'engamira zaabo, kubitoijera eihanga ritarikubaasa kubagasira." 
Isaiah30:7 Manya obuhwezi bwa Misiri tibwine mutambo, kandi ni busha. Nikyo ndikugyeetera Orukooko rushutami kwonka." 
Isaiah30:8 Mbwenu irooko obihandiikire omu maisho gaabo aha kishate ky'eibaare, kandi obihandiikye omu kitabo, bigume nibibashinja omu biro ebiriija." 
Isaiah30:9 Ahabw'okuba n'ab'eihanga erigomi, abaana barikubeiha, abatarikwenda kuhurira ebi Nyakubaho arikubahabura," 
Isaiah30:10 abagambira abahanuuzi bati: Mutareeba; bakagira abarangi bati: Mutaturangira ebihikire, kureka mutugambire ebyorobi, murangye ebitari by'amazima." 
Isaiah30:11 Nimutuhigize, murugye omu muhanda; titwakyenda kuhurira bundi ebya Nyakwera wa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah30:12 Nikyo Nyakwera wa Isiraeli arikugirira ati: Nk'oku mwagaya eki kigambo, mukeesiga okuhata n'okuhabagiza, mukaba nibyo mwayegamira," 
Isaiah30:13 ekyo kicumuro kiryababeera nk'obwatika bw'omu kisiika kiraingwa, ekirikugogoma kiri haihi kugwa; eki okwaba kwakyo kubaho kitaraariire omu kaanya kakye," 
Isaiah30:14 okubaganuka kwakyo kukaba nk'okw'enyungu y'omunogoozi, eyatika ekasheenyagurikira kimwe, etatsigaze rugusyo rw'okuguhisa omuriro omu mahega, nari rw'okutahisa amaizi omu iziba." 
Isaiah30:15 Manya Mukama Ruhanga, Nyakwera wa Isiraeli agizire ati: Ku murihinduka mwatuuza, nibwo murijunwa; kandi ku muricureera mwanyesiga, nibwo muritunga amaani." 
Isaiah30:16 Kwonka mwangire, mwagira muti: Ngaaha! Nitwija kuhunga turi aha mbaraasi. Kwokwo muryahunga. Kandi muti: Nitwija kutemba embaraasi zirikwiruka munonga. Eego, n'abaribabinga baryairukisa obwira." 
Isaiah30:17 Abantu rukumi baryahunga omuntu omwe owaabakangisa. Abantu bataano ku baribatiinisa, muryabahunga okuhitsya obu muritsigara muri nk'omuti gw'ebendera ogutsimbire aha mutwe gw'orushozi; nari nk'orurango oruri aha kibungo." 
Isaiah30:18 N'ahabw'ekyo imwe Nyakubaho abategyereize kubagirira embabazi; ayeteekateekire kubooreka ku abainiire esaasi. Manya Mukama aba Ruhanga okora ebihikiire kimwe kandi boona abamutegyereza baine omugisha. 
Isaiah30:19 Yaimwe bantu ba Siyooni 'mwe, abatwire Yerusalemu, timuririra bundi. Buzimazima Nyakubaho aryabagirira embabazi yaahurira okutaka kwanyu. Ku arikuhurira, aryabagarukamu." 
Isaiah30:20 Nobu Nyakubaho araabahe ebyokurya bw'obwagi n'amaizi g'omugango; kwonka ogwo oba omwegyesa waanyu taribeeshereka bundi, kureka muryamwereebera n'amaisho gaanyu." 
Isaiah30:21 Kandi ku muritoora ogwa buryo nari ogwa bumosho, amatu gaanyu garyahurira ekigambo kirikubareetwa enyima, nikigira kiti: Ogu nigwo muhanda, mube nigwo mwahamya." 
Isaiah30:22 Obwo nibwo murishiisha ebishushani byanyu ebisharwirwe, bikashwekwa efeeza, n'ebiheesirwe bikahumbikwa ezaabu, mukabinaga oku n'oku, nk'ebintu bihagaire, mukabigira muti: Nimurugyeho!" 
Isaiah30:23 Reero Nyakubaho, embibo zi muribiba, aryazigwisiza enjura; n'eby'omujuma ebi eitaka ryanyu riryeza biryaba birungi kandi bingi munonga. Omu biro ebyo amasyo gaanyu garyariira omu mariisizo mahango;" 
Isaiah30:24 ente n'endogoya ezihinga ziryarya ebyokurya birimu omwonyo, ebiheheeziibwe n'ebitiiho n'eforogo." 
Isaiah30:25 Aha izooba ri abazigu baanyu baingi bariitirwaho, eminaara y'ebigo byabo ekagwa, ahari buri rushozi ruraihire n'ahari buri kibungo kiraingwa, haryabaho otugyera turikuhimintikwamu amaizi." 
Isaiah30:26 Ekindi, aha kiro ki Nyakubaho arishemberaho obuhuta bw'abantu be, akabakiza ebihonoka by'enkoni zi yaabateire, omukyeera gw'okwezi guryajwa nk'omushana gw'eizooba; n'omushana gw'eizooba gube nk'ogwakire emirundi mushanju, nari ogujwire omu biro mushanju." 
Isaiah30:27 Reeba, ekitiinisa ky'eiziina rya Nyakubaho nikiruga hare; ekiniga kye nikibugumira omu mwika mwingi gurikucumbuuka; Eminwa ye eijwire okuguubwa kubi, n'orurimi rwe ni nk'omuriro gurikurya busha." 
Isaiah30:28 Omwitsyo gwe ni nk'omugyera gushandaire, oguhika omuntu omu maraka, kushunguza amahanga orugari rw'okugacwekyereza, n'okuta omu nshaya z'abanyamahanga ekintu ky'okubazibira kuhaba." 
Isaiah30:29 Muryayeshongora ekyeshongoro, nk'eki beeshongora nyekiro aha bugyenyi oburikwera; mugire omuhimbo nk'ogu omuntu agira yaahurira omukuri kuza aha rushozi rwa Nyakubaho Rukiri rwa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah30:30 Reero Nyakubaho aryahuriza eiraka rye ery'ekitiinisa, ayorekye omukono gwe ogurikuhanantuka kuteera, aine ekiniga kingi munonga, habeho endimi z'omuriro gurikurya busha, n'eshato n'eihunga n'orubaare." 
Isaiah30:31 Abaasiriya baryaitwa obwoba baahurira eiraka rya Nyakubaho naabateeza enkoni ye. 
Isaiah30:32 Haza ku ariba naabateeza enkoni ye kubafubira, okwo kubateera kuryagyendera aha maraka g'engoma empuuro n'amagobore, abarwanise naatigita omukono gwe." 
Isaiah30:33 Manya Tofeti ekatebeekanisibwa okwiha ira. Buzimazima ekatebeekanisibwa Rubambansi wa Asiriya. Ekiina kyayo ekirundwamu enku ni kiraingwa kandi kihango, kiijwire omuriro gw'enku nyingi, omwitsyo gwa Nyakubaho oguri nk'omugyera gw'obuganga nigwo gurigitweka." 
Isaiah31:1 Baryakareeba abarikushuuma bakaza Misiri kushabayo obuhwezi nibeesiga embaraasi; abata amatsiko aha bigaari ngu ahabw'okuba ni bingi; n'aha batembi b'embaraasi ngu niho baine amaani maingi; bakareka kuhanga amaisho Nyakwera wa Isiraeli, nari okwehanuuza ahari Nyakubaho!" 
Isaiah31:2 Haza kunu niwe munyabwengye oreeta akabi, kandi otahindura bi agambire. Kureka aryaimuka arwanise ab'omu muryango gw'enkozi z'ebibi, n'abarikuhwera abarikukora ebibi." 
Isaiah31:3 Abanyamisiri n'abantu ti Ruhanga. N'embaraasi zaabo ziine omubiri, tiziine mutima. Nyakubaho ku aribanga omukono gwe, orikuhwera aryateera entsibo, n'orikuhwerwa agwe." 
Isaiah31:4 Nyakubaho angambiire ati: Nk'oku entare nari entare nto etontomera aha ki yaita, abariisa bakihuruzibwa kugirwanisa etatiine rwari rwabo, nobu kwakuba okwehiga ahabw'okuyogoora kwabo; bombi bahwerekyerere kumwe, na Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arishuuma kurwanira aha Rushozi Siyooni n'aha kibungo kyayo." 
Isaiah31:5 Nk'oku amahungu gazeereera, nikwo Mukama ow'amahe aririnda Yerusalemu. Aryagirinda agijune; aryagisaasira agikize abazigu." 
Isaiah31:6 Imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, nimugarukire ou mwagomeire!" 
Isaiah31:7 Ahabw'okuba eryo izooba buri muntu aryanaga ebishushani bye ebirikuramibwa, eby'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu, ebi mwayeheesheire n'emikono yaanyu emibi." 
Isaiah31:8 Obwo nibwo Abaasiriya bariitwa rurara etari y'omuntu; rurara egyo etari y'omuntu ebamareho. Abaasiriya abarihunga rurara abatsigazi baabo baryaba abahuuku. 
Isaiah31:9 Buhamizo bwabo aryaitwa obwoba ahungye n'abakungu be baryahahaara omutima batsigyeho ebendera zaabo. Nyakubaho ou ekikoomi kye kiri Siyooni, n'ow'eiziiko rye riri Yerusalemu, nikwo arikugamba." 
Isaiah32:1 Reeba, haryayema omugabe oritegyeka omu mazima, abategyeki be bakategyeka omu bwinganisa." 
Isaiah32:2 Buri omwe aryaba nk'omwanya gw'okwekingaho omuyaga, n'obwegamo bw'eihunga; abe nk'emigyera y'amaizi omu nsi eyomire, n'ekicuucu ky'orukiri ruhango omu nsi y'emparamaata." 
Isaiah32:3 Obwo abaine amaisho garikuhweza tibariita riisho, n'abaine amatu garikuhurira baryaguma bagategire." 
Isaiah32:4 Omutima gw'omuntu embakuki guryayetegyereza; n'orurimi rw'abarikuhebebera ruryakomooroka, rugambe gye." 
Isaiah32:5 Omushema tarigaruka kwetwa ow'ekitiinwa; n'ekibura tikiryetwa fura. 
Isaiah32:6 Ahabw'okuba omushema agamba eby'obushema; omutima gwe gugira enaama z'okukora ebibi; nk'okwemanyiiza okutatiina Ruhanga, n'okurogota ahari Nyakubaho, n'abajara okubatsiga n'enjara yaabo, n'okwima abaine eiriho ekyokunywa." 
Isaiah32:7 Emitwarize y'omuntu ekibura eba mibi; acuma enaama mbi z'okucwekyereza abooro, naababeihabeiha; nobu ebi abakyene barikushaba biba bihikire." 
Isaiah32:8 Kwonka efura ecwa obwengye bw'okukora eby'obufura, kandi eby'obufura bwe nibyo bimubeisaho." 
Isaiah32:9 Imwe bakazi bajarami 'mwe, nimwimukye mumpurire, naimwe baishiki bataine ki beetaireho, nimutegye okutu eki ndikugamba." 
Isaiah32:10 Imwe bakazi bataine ki beetaireho, muryamara ebiro birikweshumba omwaka mutiinire nimutetema; ahabw'okuba emizaabibu eryaba ehunduukire etakishoromwa bundi." 
Isaiah32:11 Imwe bakazi bajarami 'mwe, nimuteteme! Imwe abataine ki beetaireho, nimutengyeze! Nimujuure ebi mujwaire, mujware busha; reero mwezirikye ebiguniya." 
Isaiah32:12 Nimwemaamaate, ahabw'okusaasibwa emisiri mirungi eyaabaire ebashemeza; n'emizaabibu eyaabaire eyera gye." 
Isaiah32:13 Mbwenu eitaka ry'abantu bangye rimezirwemu amahwa n'emikwatangwe! Nimucurire amaju agu abantu baabaire bashemerererwamu n'orurembo orwabaire rubareetera kushemererwa. 
Isaiah32:14 Ahabw'okuba ekikaari ky'omugabe kiryatsigwaho, orurembo orurimu abantu baingi rube omushaka, ekibungo n'omunaara gw'abarinzi guhindukye amaaya g'ebiro byona." 
Isaiah32:15 Kwonka obunaku buryahika, Ruhanga atushukyeho Mutima we kuruga omu iguru; eihamba rihindukye omusiri gurikweza munonga, haza ogwo musiri gurikweza munonga bagwete ekibira." 
Isaiah32:16 Obwo omu ihamba haryakorerwamu eby'oburyo, n'omu misiri erikweza munonga hakorerwemu ebihikire." 
Isaiah32:17 Okuhikiirira kuryareeta obusingye kandi kurugwemu obucureera n'obuhooro bw'ebiro n'ebiro. 
Isaiah32:18 Abantu bangye baryatuura omu nsi y'obusingye, bagume omu maju gaabo bari buhooro, n'omu myanya ecureire ey'okuhuumuriramu." 
Isaiah32:19 Kwonka bwanyima orubaare ruryateera ekyo kibira kihigukire kimwe, n'orurembo rukumbagarire kimwe." 
Isaiah32:20 Ebishi imwe muryahiirwa, ku muriba nimubiba aha mbaju z'emigyera, mukanagurirayo ente zaanyu n'endogoya zaanyu." 
Isaiah33:1 Oryakareeba iwe orikucwekyereza, haza otakacwekyerezibwaga; iwe endeebya, haza hatakagiraga n'omwe orakureebize! Ku oriheza kucwekyereza, naiwe oryacwekyerezibwa; kandi ku oriheza kureebya, naiwe baryakureebya." 
Isaiah33:2 Ai Mukama, otugirire embabazi, ahabw'okuba niiwe tutegyereize. Otuhe emikono buri kasheeshe, otujune omu bunaku bw'akabi." 
Isaiah33:3 Enganda z'abantu zihunga zaahurira okuhinda kw'eiraka ryawe; kandi ku obandaituka, amahanga gataataana." 
Isaiah33:4 Baryateerana eminyago nk'oku kanyananga eshanguruza; bagigurukire, nk'oku enzigye zigira." 
Isaiah33:5 Nyakubaho naahimbisibwa, ahabw'okuba atuura aha iguru. Aryaijuza Siyooni obwinganisa n'okuhikiirira," 
Isaiah33:6 abagumyeho omu biro byanyu, abajune munonga kandi abahe obwengye n'okwetegyereza. Okutiina Nyakubaho niryo itungo rya Siyooni." 
Isaiah33:7 Reeba, amamanzi nigaboroogyera aheeru, entumwa z'okushaba obusingye nizirira munonga." 
Isaiah33:8 Emihanda rugyendwa erimu busha, Omugyenzi takigirabamu. Endagaano zihenzirwe, baakareebi baagaywa; omuntu takyeetwaho." 
Isaiah33:9 Ensi neecura neehwerera, Lebanooni eshobeirwe, ebibira byayo bihotokire. Sharooni ni nk'eihamba, omuri Bashani n'ahari Karumeeli, amababi nigakunkumuka aha miti." 
Isaiah33:10 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mbwenu naimuka, hati naabandaituka, mpimbisibwe juba." 
Isaiah33:11 Muryatwara enda y'ebishushunga, muzaare omweziga; omwitsyo gwanyu gube omuriro oguribootsya." 
Isaiah33:12 Amahanga garyaba nk'agookiibwe, gakacweka einoni; gabe nk'amahwa gatemire gakookibwa omuriro." 
Isaiah33:13 Imwe abari hare, nimuhurire eki nkozire; naimwe abari haihi, mwikirize ku nyine amaani." 
Isaiah33:14 Abasiisi b'omuri Siyooni abatarikweta ahari Ruhanga nibatiina kandi nibatetema. Mbwenu omuriitwe n'oha owaakuguma omu muriro gurikurya busha? N'oha omuriitwe owaakubaasa kutuura omu muriro gutaraara? 
Isaiah33:15 Orikukuratira eby'okuhikiirira akagamba ebihikire, oyanga kutunga ebireetsirwe okuhata; okunkumura engaro ze ngu zitakaakwata enguzi, oyekwata aha matu ngu atakaahurira eby'okusheesha eshagama, akahumiza amaisho, ngu atakaareeba ekibi;" 
Isaiah33:16 niwe arituura ahatunguukire, omwanya gwe gw'okwerindiramu gukaba ekigo ky'omu rukiri; akaguma naatunga ebyokurya, n'amaizi g'okunywa gatamuburiire." 
Isaiah33:17 Amaisho gaawe garyayereebera omugabe akwirwe oburungi, gareebe ensi eyaririkire, ekahika hare oku n'oku." 
Isaiah33:18 Omutima gwawe guryaijuka ebirikutiinisa, oyebuuze oti: Owaabazire emitoijo arahi? Owaarengire omushoro ari nkahi? N'owaabazire eminaara ari nkahi?" 
Isaiah33:19 Oryaba otakireeba banyamahanga b'amaryo, ab'orurimi rutarikumanywa, oru otarikubaasa kwetegyereza; abarikuhebebera oteetegyereze ebi barikugamba." 
Isaiah33:20 Hanga amaisho Siyooni, orurembo oru twabaire tugiriramu amagyenyi gaitu agaatairweho! Amaisho gaawe garyayereebera Yerusalemu, omwanya gucureire, ogu eihema ryamwo ritafururwa; enkondo zaaryo zitakuurwe n'emirunga yaaryo etacwekyeho na gumwe." 
Isaiah33:21 Kureka okwo niyo Nyakubaho ow'ekitiinwa kingi aritubeera omwanya gurimu emigyera mihango n'emikye, etarirabwamu maato garikutwarwa engahi, nobu zaakuba emeeri z'ekitiinwa kurabamu." 
Isaiah33:22 Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho niwe muramuzi waitu, niwe mutegyeki waitu, niwe mugabe waitu oritujuna." 
Isaiah33:23 Emirunga yaawe eyugire, tekibaasa kuhamya murongooti omu mwanya gwagwo; nobu kwakuba okuguma eshashanwire amatanga. Nikyo ebi baashahwire aha minyago mingi munonga biribaganirwa; abarema nabo bakagira eki baabaganaho." 
Isaiah33:24 Kandi tiharibaho mutuuzi waayo origira ati: Ndwaire. Abantu boona abatwireyo baryasaasirwa ebibi byabo. 
Isaiah34:1 Imwe mahanga 'mwe, nimwirire haihi muhurire! Naimwe nganda 'mwe, nimutegye amatu! Ensi n'ebigirimu byona k'ehurire, ensi yoona n'ebintu ebigirugamu." 
Isaiah34:2 Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho agwereirwe kubi amahanga goona, yaagirira eihe ryago ryona ekiniga kingi. Agacwereire orubanja, yaagahayo kwitwa." 
Isaiah34:3 Abantu baago abaitsirwe baryanagwa aheeru, ekinuuko ky'emitumbi yaabo kiimukye; enshozi zihimintikye eshagama yaabo." 
Isaiah34:4 Ebihangwagashani by'omu iguru biryacweka obusaasingo, eiguru ryezingye nk'omuzingo gw'ekitabo; ebimbuuro byamwo byona bigwe, nk'oku amababi g'omuzaabibu, nari ag'omutiini gagwa." 
Isaiah34:5 Ahabw'okuba rurara yangye enywereire omu iguru yaiguta; mbwenu reeba, yaashuuma kufubira Abaedomu abu ncwereire orubanja kubasinga." 
Isaiah34:6 Nyakubaho aine rurara eigutsi eshagama yaabo, enihire ebishaju; ebiri nk'eshagama y'abaana b'entaama n'ey'abembuzi n'ebishaju by'aha ntsigo z'empaya z'entaama ezitambwa. Manya Nyakubaho ayeiniire ekitambo omuri Bozira, okwita abantu baingi omuri Edomu." 
Isaiah34:7 Enimi enshaarizi ziryagwa hamwe n'ago mahanga; endaaho nto zigwe n'enimi z'ebigundu. Ensi yaabo eryajubibwa eshagama, n'eitaka ryabo ebishaju birireetemu orwezo." 
Isaiah34:8 Ahabw'okuba eryo niryo izooba eri Nyakubaho arihooreraho enzigu, kandi nigwo mwaka ogu arizimuuriraho abo bazigu be, naabatura Siyooni." 
Isaiah34:9 Emigyera ya Edomu eryahinduka koroto, eitaka ryayo ribe nk'obuganga bw'ekibiriiti, ensi yaayo ehindukye koroto erikubuguma." 
Isaiah34:10 Nyekiro na nyomushana terigira bu eraire, omwika gwayo guryaguma nigucumbuuka. Okwiha aha busingye okuta aha bundi, eryaguma eri amatongo, etaine orikugirabamu okuhitsya ryari na ryari." 
Isaiah34:11 Kureka empungu n'ebisegyesi nibyo birigikubuura, ebihihizi n'ebikoona bikagituuramu. Nyakubaho aryagigyeresa omugoye gw'okujagarara, na kariisho y'okutsigarwamu busha." 
Isaiah34:12 Haryaba hatakiriyo w'okwemeka aha bugabe, n'abategyeki baayo baryaba baahwaireho." 
Isaiah34:13 Ebikaari byayo biryamerwamu amahwa, ebigo byayo bishakambwe ebicuragyenyi n'amtojo; ebe eikobezo rya zaamuha na zaamaaya." 
Isaiah34:14 Enyamaishwa eshaarizi ziryateeranirayo n'empitsi, emizimu y'omu kibira eyetane; orukooko rwa nyekiro ruteekameyo kwetungira ah'okuhuumurira." 
Isaiah34:15 Okwo kandi niyo ebihihizi biryarika, bikateera amahuri bikagaatura, bikabumbatira abaana baabyo. Buzimazima okwo niyo zaamareere ziriteeranira, buri emwe n'enkazi yaayo." 
Isaiah34:16 Musherure omu kitabo kya Nyakubaho, mushomemu; haza mureebe ku harimu ekirikugira kiti: Omuri ebyo tiharigira na kimwe ekiriburayo, kandi tiharigira na kimwe ekiriba kitaine kikazi kyakyo. Manya Nyakubaho niwe aragiire ngu kibe kityo, na Mutima we niwe abiteeraniireyo." 
Isaiah34:17 Abiteereire enteenyu y'okubagana ensi, omukono gwe gwagibibaganisiza n'omugoye; eryaba eyaabyo ebiro byona, bigituuremu obusingye bwona." 
Isaiah35:1 Eihamba n'ensi eyomire biryashemererwa, eihamba ry'omusheenyi ryesiime, kandi rirabye ebirabyo nk'eby'esheko y'ensi." 
Isaiah35:2 Riryarabya ebirabyo bingi munonga, ryesiime rishemereirwe kandi ryeshongore. Riryaheebwa ekitiinwa nk'ekya Lebanooni, n'oburungi nk'obwa Karumeeli na Sharooni. Abantu baryareeba ekitiinwa kya Nyakubaho n'obukuru bwa Ruhanga waitu." 
Isaiah35:3 Muhamye emikono etaine maani, mugumye amaju gatahamire." 
Isaiah35:4 Mugambire ab'emitima eitsirwe obwoba muti: Muhame, mutatiina! Reeba, Ruhanga waanyu naija kuhoora enzigu, abazimuurire; aryaija, abajune." 
Isaiah35:5 Obwo nibwo amaisho g'empumi garihumuurwa; amatu g'ebifamatu gakaigurwa; 
Isaiah35:6 Ebirema bikaguruka nk'empara, ebiteta bikeeshongora bishemereirwe. Ahabw'okuba amaizi garyafumuka omu ihamba ry'omusheenyi, n'emigyera ehimintikiremu." 
Isaiah35:7 Omusheenyi gurikwotsya guryahinduka ekiyanja, n'ensi ekarangataine egire enshuro z'amaizi. Eikobezo rya zaamuha riryahinduka ekisharara, obunyaatsi buhindukye ekibingo n'omubimbiri." 
Isaiah35:8 Reero haryabayo omuhanda rugyendwa, gwetwe omuhanda ogurikwera, abatashemeire tibarigurabamu, n'abashema tibariguhabiramu." 
Isaiah35:9 Tiguribamu ntare, n'enyamaishwa enshaarizi teriguzamu. Ezo nyamaishwa tizishangwayo; kureka abacungwirwe nibo barigurabamu." 
Isaiah35:10 Abu Nyakubaho acungwire baryagaruka, baije Siyooni nibeeshongora, baine aha maisho okushemerererwa okutarikuhwaho. Baryayesiima bananukye, enaku n'okutsinda bikwate akakiro." 
Isaiah36:1 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'ena ogw'omu busingye gw'Omugabe Hezekiya, Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiriya akahurura yaateera ebigo bya Buyuda byona ebigumire, yaabikwata." 
Isaiah36:2 Reero ogwo mugabe wa Asiriya, akeema Lakishi, yaatuma Rabushaakye n'eihe rihango aha mugabe Hezekiya ari Yerusalemu ngu amugomookyere. Rabushaakye ku yaahikireyo, yaayemerera aha mukura gw'ekiyanja kya ruguru, eky'aha muhanda rugyendwa ogurikuza aha ryogyezo ry'emyenda." 
Isaiah36:3 Mpaho Eliyakimu mwene Hilikiya omukuru w'ekikaari na Shebuna omuhandiiki mukuru na Yoa mwene Asafu karaani w'ebirikubaho baija baamushangayo. 
Isaiah36:4 Rabushaakye yaabagira ati: Mugambire Hezekiya muti: Oku nikwo omugabe rugambwa owa Asiriya akutumireho ati: Mbwenu nooyesiga ki? 
Isaiah36:5 Noogira ngu ebigambo kwonka nibwo bwengye n'amaani g'okurwana orugamba? Hati oyesigire oha waaza kungomera? 
Isaiah36:6 Reeba, nooyesiga Misiri orubingo ruhendekire rw'okwehimbagiriza, oruraacumite engaro y'orikurwehambagiriza. Na Faraaho omugabe wa Misiri nikwo ari aha barikumwesiga." 
Isaiah36:7 Ku orangire oti: Nitwesiga Mukama Ruhanga waitu, tiwe ogwo ou Hezekiya yaihireho emyanya ye y'okumuramizamu n'amatambiro ge, akagira aba Yuda n'aba Yerusalemu ati: Mugume muramize omu maisho g'eitambiro eri?" 
Isaiah36:8 Mbwenu ija okwatirizane na mukama wangye, omugabe wa Asiriya. Nyowe niinyija kukuha embaraasi enkumi ibiri, haza ndeebe ku oraabe noobaasa kutunga ab'okuzitemba." 
Isaiah36:9 Ku oraabe nooyesiga Misiri kukutungira ebigaari n'abatembi b'embaraasi, noobaasa ota kubinga omukuru w'engabo omwe ow'omu bairu ba mukama wangye abarikuhereerukayo?" 
Isaiah36:10 Ekindi, nyowe tiinyizire kuteera egi nsi n'okugicwekyereza ntatumirwe Nyakubaho. Nyakubaho niiwe angizire ati: Irooko oteere egyo nsi ogicwekyereze." 
Isaiah36:11 Eliyakimu na Shebuna na Yoa nikwo kugira Rabushaakye bati: Twakweshengyereza, itwe abairu baawe otugambire omu Ruramaika, ahabw'okuba niturwetegyereza. Otatugambire omu rurimi rw'aba Yuda, abaha kisiika bakutegire amatu." 
Isaiah36:12 Rabushaakye abagarukamu ati: Nimugira ngu mukama wangye antumire ahari mukama waanyu n'ahariimwe, kuba niimwe naagambira ebyo bigambo mwenka; kutari kubigambira n'aba bantu abashutami aha kisiika, abacwereirwe hamwe naimwe orubanja kurya amazi gaabo n'okunywa enkari yaabo nkaimwe?" 
Isaiah36:13 Bwanyima Rabushaakye akeemerera, yaagamba n'eiraka rihango omu Ruyudaaya ati: Nimuhurire ebi omugabe rugambwa owa Asiriya abatumireho!" 
Isaiah36:14 Ogwo mugabe naagira ati: Mutaikiriza Hezekiya kubabeihabeiha, ahabw'okuba tarikubaasa kubajuna." 
Isaiah36:15 Mutaikiriza Hezekiya kubeesigisa Nyakubaho, naabagira ati: Buzimazima Nyakubaho naija kutujuna; oru rurembo tirurikwija kukwatwa omugabe wa Asiriya." 
Isaiah36:16 Mutatega okutu ebi Hezekiya arikugamba, ahabw'okuba omugabe wa Asiriya naabagira ati: Nimugarukane naanye, mushohore, mungomookyere. Nibwo buri omwe omuriimwe araarye ebijuma by'omuzaabibu gwe n'eby'omutiini gwe; buri omwe omuriimwe akanywa amaizi g'aha iziba rye," 
Isaiah36:17 okuhitsya obu ndaije nkabatwara omu nsi eri nk'eyaanyu; ensi y'engano ezirugwamu emigaati, n'ey'emizaabibu erugwamu viino." 
Isaiah36:18 Mwerinde, Hezekiya atakaabahabisa naagira ati: Nyakubaho naija kutujuna. Mbwenu omu baaruhanga b'agandi mahanga hariho ruhanga orajunire ensi ye omugabe wa Asiriya?" 
Isaiah36:19 Baaruhanga ba Hamati n'aba Arupaadi barahi? Na baaruhanga b'Abasefarivaimu barahi? Baraihire Samariya omu mikono yangye? 
Isaiah36:20 Omu baaruhanga b'ago mahanga nibaahi abaraihire ensi zaabo omu mikono yangye, reero ngu Nyakubaho abone kuunyiha Yerusalemu omu mikono?" 
Isaiah36:21 Kwonka bo bakahunama, tibaagira ki baamugarukamu; ahabw'okuba omugabe akaba abaragiire ati: Mutagira eki mwamugarukamu." 
Isaiah36:22 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Eliyakimu mwene Hilikiya, omukuru w'ekikaari, na Shebuna omuhandiiki, na Yoa karaani w'ebirikubaho, baija ahari Hezekiya bataagwire ebi bajwaire, baamutekyerereza ebi Rabushaakye yaagamba." 
Isaiah37:1 Omugabe Hezekiya ku yaakihuriire, yaataagura ebi ajwaire, yaayehumbika ekiguniya, atyo yaaza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
Isaiah37:2 Bwanyima yaatuma aha murangi Isaaya mwene Amozi, Eliyakimu omukuru w'ekikaari, na Shebuna omuhandiiki, n'abahongyerezi abakuru, bajwaire ebiguniya." 
Isaiah37:3 Baamugira bati: Hezekiya yaakutumaho ati: Eri izooba n'eizooba ry'obusaasi n'okukabukirwa n'okuhemurwa; ahabw'okuba ni nk'obu abaana baba bahikize obunaku bw'okuzaarwa, kwonka amaani g'okubazaara gatariho." 
Isaiah37:4 Ningira ngu Mukama Ruhanga waawe ahuriire ebi Rabushaakye ou mukama we omugabe wa Asiriya amutumire kujuma Ruhanga ohuriire. Shana obundi Mukama Ruhanga waawe akaafubira ebi bagambire akabihurira. N'ahabw'ekyo imutsya eiraka, oshabire abatsigaireho, abakiriho." 
Isaiah37:5 Abagaragwa b'Omugabe Hezekiya ku baahikire Isaaya," 
Isaiah37:6 yaabagira ati: Mugambire mukama waanyu muti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Otatiina ahabw'ebigambo ebi ohuriire abagaragwa b'omugabe wa Asiriya nibanjuma. 
Isaiah37:7 Reeba, niinyija kumutamu ogundi mutima, ahurire orukuru, agarukye omu nsi ye; omuri egyo nsi ye haza mmwitsizeyo rurara." 
Isaiah37:8 Omukuru w'abagabuzi akagarukayo, yaashanga omugabe wa Asiriya naarwanisa ab'omuri Libuna, ahabw'okuba akaba ahuriire ku ogwo mugabe arugire Lakishi." 
Isaiah37:9 Obwo omugabe akahurira enkuru ya Tiruhaaka omugabe w'Abakuushi ku ari omu muhanda aizire kumuteera. Ku yaakihuriire, yaatuma entumwa ahari Hezekiya naazigira ati:" 
Isaiah37:10 Mugambire Hezekiya omugabe wa Buyuda muti: Otaikiriza Ruhanga ou oyesiga kukubeiha ku Yerusalemu etarikwija kurekurirwa omugabe wa Asiriya kugikwata. 
Isaiah37:11 Ohuriire oku abagabe ba Asiriya baagizire ensi zoona, bakazicwekyerereza kimwe. Mbwenu iwe nibwo oraakire?" 
Isaiah37:12 Amahanga aga: Gozani, Harani, Rezefi n'ab'omuri Edeni, abaabaire batwire Telasaari, agu baatatenkuru baacwekyereize, baaruhanga baago bakagajuna?" 
Isaiah37:13 Omugabe wa Hamati n'owa Arupaadi n'ow'orurembo rw'Abasefarivaimu, n'owa Heena, n'owa Iiva, hati barahi?" 
Isaiah37:14 Hezekiya ku yaatungire ebaruha ei entumwa zaamureeteire, yaagishoma. Bwanyima yaaza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho yaagishashaanurira omu maisho ge." 
Isaiah37:15 Haza yaashaba Nyakubaho ati: 
Isaiah37:16 Ai Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, iwe osingami eruguru ya baakerubi, iwe wenka niiwe oba Ruhanga w'ensi zoona ez'abagabe b'omu nsi, niiwe waahangire eiguru n'ensi." 
Isaiah37:17 Mbwenu, ai Nyakubaho, tega okutu otuhurire. Ai Nyakubaho, buuruura amaisho, oreebe akagwe kaatugwera kandi ohurire ebigambo byona ebi Senakeribu antumireho naakujuma, iwe Ruhanga ohuriire." 
Isaiah37:18 Ai Nyakubaho, n'ekya buzima abagabe ba Asiriya bakacwekyereza amahanga goona n'ensi zaago," 
Isaiah37:19 baanaga baaruhanga baago omu muriro; ahabw'okuba bakaba batari baaruhanga; kureka abakozirwe emikono y'abantu omu biti n'omu mabaare. Nikyo baacwekyerereziibwe. 
Isaiah37:20 Mbwenu, ai Mukama Ruhanga waitu, omutujune, ensi z'abagabe zoona ez'omu nsi zibone kumanya ku niiwe wenka oba Ruhanga Nyamuhanga." 
Isaiah37:21 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Isaaya mwene Amozi yaatuma ahari Hezekiya naamugira ati: Eki nikyo Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli arikugamba. Nk'oku onshabire nontumaho ebya Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiriya," 
Isaiah37:22 mbwenu eki nikyo Nyakubaho amugambireho ati: Siyooni ehundiriire neekugaya kandi neekushekyeerera; Yerusalemu neekuha mutinzi. 
Isaiah37:23 Mbwenu ou ojumire okarogotaho n'oha? Kandi ou okabukiire okateera ekitsyori n'oha? Ka ni Nyakwera wa Isiraeli! 
Isaiah37:24 Ojumiise Nyakubaho abagaragwa baawe, noogira oti: Nyinamukire n'ebigaari byangye bingi aha mitwe y'enshozi, naahika okwo hare omu nda ya Lebanooni, naatema zaakaarwenda zaayo endaingwa munonga, n'emiryohe yaayo emirungi munonga; ntyo naahika aha mutwe gwayo ogurikuhereerukayo, omu kibira kyayo ekikwataniire kimwe." 
Isaiah37:25 Oti: Nkatimba amaziba naanywa amaizi, Kandi naaribatiirira emigyera ya Misiri yoona naagyomya." 
Isaiah37:26 Mbwenu shi, tokahuriraga ku naamaririire ira kukora ebyo byona? Omu biro bya ira nkacuma enaama y'okukora ebi ndikuhikiiriza ebiro ebi; ngu ocwekyereze endembo z'ebigo bigumire ozihindure amatongo." 
Isaiah37:27 Abatuuzi baamwo ahabw'okucweka entegye, n'okuhahaara, n'okurimbagirirwa, bakaba nk'ebimera omu ishwa, nari nk'obunyaatsi by'aha mutwe gw'enju, ebyoma bitakakuzire." 
Isaiah37:28 Nimmanya emishutamire yaawe, emihuririre yaawe, n'emitabaarukire yaawe n'ekiniga ki ongiriire." 
Isaiah37:29 Nk'oku ongiriire ekiniga kingi, nkahurira eby'amaryo gaawe; niinyija kukuta eirobo omu nyindo, n'ekyoma omu kanwa; nkugarure omuhanda gwakureetsire." 
Isaiah37:30 Kandi aka niko karaakubeere akamanyiso: omu mwaka ogu nimwija kurya ebyemeza, omu gwa kabiri murye emiragarika y'ebyayemerize; reero omu mwaka gwa kashatu mubibe kandi mugyeshe; mubyare emizaabibu, murye ebijuma byayo." 
Isaiah37:31 Ab'omuryango gwa Yuda abaatsigaireho abariba bakiriho baryagogyeera, babe nk'ekibyairwe ekitsimba emizi okuzimu, eruguru kikaana." 
Isaiah37:32 Manya omuri Yerusalemu haryarugamu abaatsigaireho, n'aha Rushozi Siyooni harugyeho abaahonokireho. Haza ekyo Mukama ow'amahe ogira eihato aryakihikiiriza." 
Isaiah37:33 Nikyo Nyakubaho arikugambira aha mugabe wa Asiriya ati: Taritaaha muri oru rurembo, nobu kwakuba okururashamu omwambi, nari okuruturikirira akwaitse engabo, nainga okururundaho eitaka ry'okurugoteraho." 
Isaiah37:34 Omuhanda gwamureetsire nigwo gurimugarurayo; tarigira bu ataahire omuri oru rurembo. Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naakigamba. 
Isaiah37:35 Ndyarinda oru rurembo ndujune ahabwangye n'ahabw'omwiru wangye Daudi. 
Isaiah37:36 Ekyo kiro maraika wa Nyakubaho akaija, yaateera orusiisira rw'Abaasiriya, yaabaitamu engabo akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi munaana n'enkumi itaano. Abantu ku baimukire kare omu kasheeshe, baashanga ezo ngabo zoona ziri emitumbi." 
Isaiah37:37 Bwanyima Senakeribu omugabe wa Asiriya yaarugayo, yaagaruka omuka, yaaguma Nineeve." 
Isaiah37:38 Mbwenu ku yaabaire ari omu ndaaro ya ruhanga we Nisirooki naamuramya, abatabani Adulameki na Sharezeeri baamwita, baahungira omu nsi ya Araraati. Reero Esarahadoni omutabani yaamuhungurira, yaaba omugabe." 
Isaiah38:1 Omu biro ebyo Hezekiya akarwara, yaahika aha ncwamba za rufu. Reero omurangi Isaaya mwene Amozi yaija ahu ari, yaamugira ati: Nyakubaho yaakugira ati: Tebeekanisa eby'eka yaawe, ahabw'okuba noija kufa, tori w'okukira." 
Isaiah38:2 Hezekiya atyo ahinduka, amaisho agoorekyeize ekisiika, ashaba Nyakubaho ati:" 
Isaiah38:3 Ai Nyakubaho, ninkweshengyereza, ijuka oku naagizire emitwarize erikwesigwa omu maisho gaawe, n'omutima gwangye gwona ninkora ebi orikusiima. Atyo arira munonga." 
Isaiah38:4 Bwanyima Nyakubaho aragiira Isaaya ati: 
Isaiah38:5 Irooko ogambire Hezekiya oti: Mukama Ruhanga wa Daudi shoimwe naagira ati: Mpuriire okushaba kwawe, naareeba amarira gaawe. Mbwenu reeba, niinyija kukwongyeraho emyaka ikumi n'etaano." 
Isaiah38:6 Ndyakujuna, nyihe oru rurembo omu mikono y'omugabe wa Asiriya, kandi ndurinde." 
Isaiah38:7 Isaaya ayongyera amugira ati: Mbwenu aka niko kamanyiso aku Nyakubaho akuhaire kuhamya ku arikwija kuhikiiriza eki yaakuraganisa. 
Isaiah38:8 Reeba, ekicuucu ky'aha shaaha ya Ahazi, ekirikukuratana n'eizooba nk'oku ririkugyenda, naaza kukigarura enyima entambwe ikumi. Rityo eizooba ryaiha ahi ryaba ryahika aha ky'okugyeresa ekyo, ryagaruka enyima entambwe ikumi." 
Isaiah38:9 Eki n'ekyeshongoro eki Hezekiya omugabe wa Buyuda yaahandiikire, yaaheza kukira endwara ei yaabaire arwaire." 
Isaiah38:10 Mbaire ningira nti: Niinyija kufa nkiri rwagati y'emyaka yangye. Mbwenu emyaka yangye etsigaireyo ndi ow'okuza aha marembo g'okuzimu owa Nyamuteza. 
Isaiah38:11 Mbaire ningira nti: Tindireeba bundi Nyakubaho omu nsi y'abahuriire; kandi nti: Tindigaruka kucwa muntu riisho omu batwire omu nsi. 
Isaiah38:12 Obutaaho bwangye buhuruutwirwe bwanyihwaho nk'oku bakuura eihema ry'omuriisa w'entaama; Nzingire amagara gangye nk'oku omuruki w'emyenda agira, kwonka Ruhanga yancwa aha kyoma ky'okurukiraho. Okwiha nyomushana okuhitsya nyekiro ommariramu kimwe amaani." 
Isaiah38:13 Nindaara nintaka okuhitsya omu kasheeshe ngu nkaahwerwa; kwonka iwe ompendagura amagufa nk'entare; okwiha nyomushana okuhitsya nyekiro ommariramu kimwe amaani. 
Isaiah38:14 Nimborooga nk'entaratambi nari nk'enkombe. Amaisho gangye garuhire ahabw'okugahanga ahaiguru. Ai Nyakubaho, ninshaasha munonga, ondinde!" 
Isaiah38:15 Mbwenu shi ngambe ki? Obu niwe anyegambiriire, kandi obu niwe akikozire. Oturo tungurukiire kimwe ahabw'obusaasi bu nyine." 
Isaiah38:16 Ai Nyakubaho, ebyo nibyo bibaisaho abantu; kandi ebyo byona nibyo birikumpaisa amagara. Mbwenu ninkweshengyereza, ngaruramu amagara, ombaiseho!" 
Isaiah38:17 Reeba, obusaasi bwangye bwingi bubaire buri obw'okundugiramu obusingye. Kwonka waazibira amagara gangye kugwa omu kiina ky'okuhwerekyerera; ahabw'okuba ebibi byangye byona obyenagire enyima." 
Isaiah38:18 Manya okuzimu owa Nyamuteza tebaasa kukusiima, rufu tebaasa kukusingiza, n'abashuuma okuzimu omu kiina tibagira matsiko g'okukwesiga." 
Isaiah38:19 Kureka abahuriire, abahuriire nibo bakusiima, nk'oku ndikukusiima eri izooba; Ishe abaana niwe abahabura ku ori omwesigwa." 
Isaiah38:20 Nyakubaho naija kunjuna, haza tweshongorere omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, aha nanga zangye z'emirya ebiro by'amagara gaitu byona." 
Isaiah38:21 Mbwenu obwo Isaaya akaba agizire ati: Bareete ekibanda ky'emitiini bakibatikye aha kizimba akire; 
Isaiah38:22 Hezekiya nawe yaabuurize ati: Ni kamanyiso ki akarampamize ku ndikwija kuza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho? 
Isaiah39:1 Omu biro ebyo, Merodaaki-baladaani mwene Baladaani omugabe wa Babulooni, akatuma entumwa ahari Hezekiya kumutwarira ebaruha n'ekiconco; ahabw'okuba akahurira ku yaarwaire kandi ku akizire." 
Isaiah39:2 Hezekiya yaazaakiira n'okushemererwa, yaazooreka enju ei abiikamu ebintu bye eby'obuguzi bwingi; efeeza, ezaabu, emigaju, amajuta garikutaamirana n'eby'okurwanisa bye byona, n'ebindi byona ebyashangirwe omu mabiikiro ge. Tihaagira kintu na kimwe eky'omu kikaari kye, nainga eky'omu bugabe bwe, eki Hezekiya ogwo ataraboorekire." 
Isaiah39:3 Bwanyima omurangi Isaaya akaija aha Mugabe Hezekiya yaamubuuza ati; Abo bantu barugire hi kandi bakugambiire ki? Hezekiya amugarukamu ati: Baanyizireho nibaruga Babulooni ensi ya hare. 
Isaiah39:4 Ayongyera amubuuza ati: Bareebire ki omu kikaari kyawe? Hezekiya agarukamu ati: Byona eby'omu kikaari kyangye babireebire. Tihariho kintu na kimwe eky'omu mabiikiro gangye eki ntaboorekire. 
Isaiah39:5 Mpaho Isaaya agira Hezekiya ati: Mbwenu nu, hurira eki Mukama ow'amahe arikukugambira." 
Isaiah39:6 Reeba, obunaku nibwija kuhika, ebintu eby'omu kikaari kyawe, n'ebi baashwenkuru babiikire okuhitsya hati, bitwarwe Babulooni hataine kitsigaireho. Nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Isaiah39:7 Kandi bamwe ahari batabani baawe abu oyezaariire baryatwarwa, babe abashaahu b'omu kikaari ky'omugabe wa Babulooni." 
Isaiah39:8 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Hezekiya yaagira Isaaya ati: Ekigambo kya Nyakubaho eki wangambira ni kirungi. Ahabw'okuba akateekateeka ati: Niho harikwija kubaho obusingye n'obuhooro omu biro byangye." 
Isaiah40:1 Ruhanga waanyu naagira ati: Muhuumurize, muhuumurize abantu bangye." 
Isaiah40:2 Mugambire Yerusalemu n'embabazi, kandi mugirangire n'eiraka rihango ku engamba zaayo zihwaire n'ebicumuro byayo ku bisaasiirwe, kandi ku Nyakubaho aherize kugifubira kabiri ahabw'ebibi byayo byona." 
Isaiah40:3 Hariho orikwamuza ati: Mutebeekanisize Nyakubaho omuhanda omu ihamba, mugororere Ruhanga waitu omuhanda rugyendwa omu ihamba ry'omusheenyi." 
Isaiah40:4 Empanga zoona ziryaijuzibwa, n'enshozi zoona n'ebibungo biryabandikwa, emyanya etaringaniire eringaanizibwe," 
Isaiah40:5 ekitiinwa kya Nyakubaho kyorekwe, abantu boona bakireebere hamwe. Ekyo Nyakubaho w'enka niwe akigambire." 
Isaiah40:6 Eiraka nirigira riti: Rangirira! Nti: Ndangirire ki? Riti: Rangirira ku abantu boona bari nk'obunyaatsi, n'oburungi bwabo ku buri nk'ebw'ebirabyo by'omu ishwa." 
Isaiah40:7 Obunyaatsi buhotoka, n'ebirabyo bihonga Nyakubaho yaabihuuhisa omuyaga gwe. Buzimazima abantu ni nk'obunyaatsi." 
Isaiah40:8 Obunyaatsi buhotoka, ebirabyo bihonga; kwonka ekigambo kya Ruhanga waitu kiryagumaho ebiro byona." 
Isaiah40:9 Iwe orangirira Siyooni amakuru marungi, yamuza munonga, otatiina. Gambira ab'omu ndembo za Buyuda oti: Reeba, Ruhanga wanyu ari aha." 
Isaiah40:10 Mukama Ruhanga naija n'amaani kutegyekyesa omukono gwe; reeba, naija aine ekihembo n'enzimuurano ye emwebembeire." 
Isaiah40:11 Aryariisa obusyo bwe nk'omuriisa w'entaama; aryakiikira abaana b'entaama omu mikono ye; abatwarire omu kifuba kye, n'ezirikuhaka azishotoore." 
Isaiah40:12 N'oha orarengire amaizi g'omu nyanja aha ngaro ye, akateera eiguru ekita; akata omucuucu gw'ensi yoona omu ndengo, akapimisa enshozi minzaani, akagyerera ebibungo aha rurengo?" 
Isaiah40:13 Mbwenu n'oha orahabwire Mutima wa Nyakubaho, nari oramwegyeise nk'omuhi we w'obwengye?" 
Isaiah40:14 N'oha ou areebuurizeho kumushoboorerera, kandi n'oha oramuhabwire emitwarize y'okukora eby'oburyo; haza akamwegyesa okumanya, akamworekyerera oku araayetegyereze?" 
Isaiah40:15 Manya amahanga gari nk'eitondo ry'omu ndobo, kandi nigashushanisibwa nk'omucuucu gw'ahari minzaani. Reeba, akiriza ebirwa nk'orikukiriza omucuucu gutarikuremeera." 
Isaiah40:16 Lebanooni tekaarugwamu nku zirikumara, n'enyamaishwa zaamwo tizikaamara kuba ekitambo kicwekize." 
Isaiah40:17 Amahanga goona ni busha omu maisho ge, naagabara nk'agarikukirwa busha, kandi agarikukirwa ekintu ekiri omurangara." 
Isaiah40:18 Mbwenu n'oha ou mwakushushanisa na Ruhanga, nari mukaamugyeragyeranisa na ki?" 
Isaiah40:19 N'ekishushani ekiramibwa? Ahabw'okuba omukozi akiheesha, omuheesi w'eby'ezaabu akihumbika ezaabu, kandi akiheeshera emikuufu y'efeeza." 
Isaiah40:20 Reero otaine bwekoro atoorana ekiti kitarikujunda kuba nikyo yaahonga. Asherura omunyamwoga w'obwengye kukikoramu ekishushani kitarikubaasa kwehiga. 
Isaiah40:21 Timukamanyaga? timukahuriraga? timukagambirwaga okwiha omu kutandika? Nari timukeetegyerezaga okwiha ensi yaaba kuhangwa? 
Isaiah40:22 Niwe ogwo osingama eruguru y'orukanga rw'ensi, ei abagitwiremu bari nk'eseenene. Obamba eiguru nk'omukingo, akarishashaanura nk'eihema ry'okuraaramu." 
Isaiah40:23 Ocwa busha abanyiginya n'abategyeki b'ensi, akabahindura abataine ku bari." 
Isaiah40:24 Ku baba nibakibyarwa bati, nibakibibwa bati, ekitsintsi kyabo nikikitsimba kiti emizi omu itaka, abahuuha bahotoka; omuyaga gw'akasooroora gubatuntumura nk'enkumbwe." 
Isaiah40:25 Nyakwera naagira ati: N'oha ou mwakungyeragyeranisa nawe, akaingana naanye?" 
Isaiah40:26 Mwimutsye amaisho gaanyu aha iguru mureebe. Nooha owaahangire ezo nyonyoozi? Niwe ogwo oshohoza ebimbuuro byazo, naamanya omubaro gwazo; kandi zoona akazeeta amaziina. Ahabw'amaani ge maingi, n'ahabw'obushoboorozi bwe obukuru, tihabaho n'emwe eburaho." 
Isaiah40:27 Iwe Yakobo, ningira Iwe Isiraeli, ahabw'enki noogamba noogira oti: Nyakubaho tarikumanya naku zangye, ebyangye Ruhanga wangye tabyetaireho?" 
Isaiah40:28 Tokamanyaga? Tokahuriraga? Nyakubaho ni Ruhanga atahwaho; Omuhangi w'ensi yoona. Tagwa nshazi kandi taruha; obwengye bwe tibwetegyerezibwa. 
Isaiah40:29 Abagwire enshazi abahimbuura, abatarikwebaasa abongyera amaani." 
Isaiah40:30 Abarikunyeeta baryagwa enshazi baruhe, n'abatsigazi baryahweramu kimwe amaani bagwe;" 
Isaiah40:31 Kwonka abategyereza Nyakubaho baryagarukwamu amaani, batumbeere n'amapapa nk'amashamba, bairukye batarikuruha, kandi bagyende batarikugwa nshazi." 
Isaiah41:1 Imwe nsi z'omu myegyeego y'enyanja n'omu birwa, nimuhuname, muntegye okutu! K'amahanga gagarukwemu amaani, gairire haihi gagambe; tuteerane hamwe, haza tureebe ohikire." 
Isaiah41:2 Mbwenu n'oha owaimukize omuntu orikuruga oburugwa-izooba, akagyenda naasingura ahi yaaza hoona? Akamurekurira amahanga kugasingura, ngu abone kuribatiirira abagabe, abahindure omucuucu na rurara ye, kandi n'obuta bwe abahindure ebishushunga birikutuntumuka?" 
Isaiah41:3 Ababinga, agumizamu naagyenda n'obusingye omu mihanda ei atakarabamuga." 
Isaiah41:4 N'oha owaakozire ekyo akakihitsya, owaataireho enzaaro okwiha aha kutandika? Niinye Nyakubaho owaabaire ariho omu kutandika, kandi oriba ariho aha muheru. Ni nyowe ogwo." 
Isaiah41:5 Ensi z'omu myegyeego y'enyanja n'omu birwa zikakireeba zaatiina; ab'aha mperu z'ensi baatetema, baateerana baija." 
Isaiah41:6 Buri omwe naahwera mutaahi we, agira mwene ishe ati: Guma!" 
Isaiah41:7 Omunyamyoga naateera omuhimbo omuheesi w'ezaabu; n'orikuteeza ekyoma enyondo kukiringaaniza ahangaana orikuheeshera aha ruhiija. Bagambirana bati: Twakiteerana gye, batyo bakihamisa emishumaari ngu kitakaajegajega." 
Isaiah41:8 Kwonka iwe Isiraeli omwiru wangye, Iwe Yakobo, ou naatooraine, oruzaaro rwa Aburahamu munywani wangye;" 
Isaiah41:9 Iwe, ou naihire aha muheru gw'ensi, nkakweta ninkwiha omu bwehogo bwayo bwa hare ninkugira nti: Ori omwiru wangye, nkakutoorana kandi tindakucwire." 
Isaiah41:10 Mbwenu otatiina, ahabw'okuba ndi hamwe naiwe, otahahaara, ahabw'okuba ndi Ruhanga waawe. Ndyakuhangaana, ndyakuhwera, nkuramire n'omukono gwangye gwa buryo ogusingura."
