Isaiah41:11 Reeba, abakwiniire ekiniga baryaitwa enshoni, bashoberwe; n'abarikurwanisa baryacweka busha bahwerekyerere." 
Isaiah41:12 Oryasherura abarikuhigana naiwe, bakuburire; abarikukurwanisa, bacwekyere kimwe busha." 
Isaiah41:13 Manya nyowe Mukama Ruhanga waawe niinye nkukwaitse omukono gwa buryo. Niinye ndikukugira nti: Otatiina, niinyija kukuhwera." 
Isaiah41:14 Iwe munyongororwa 'we, Yakobo, otatiina! Imwe bantu ba Isiraeli 'mwe, ndyabahwera. Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nyowe Nyakwera wa Isiraeli, niinye Mucunguzi waawe." 
Isaiah41:15 Reeba, ndyakuhindura ekihuuzo kisya, ky'obwogi, ekiine amaino, ohuure enshozi ozaatagure, ebibungo obicwe ebishushunga." 
Isaiah41:16 Oryabiheheeza bitwarwe omuyaga; eihunga ribitaataane, haza oshemerererwe omuri Nyakubaho, oyeraatire omuri Nyakwera wa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah41:17 Abooro n'abakyene ku barisherura amaizi gaababurira, orurimi rwabakarangatana baitsirwe eiriho, Nyowe Nyakubaho ndyahurira okutaka kwabo. Nyowe Ruhanga wa Isiraeli tindibanagiirira." 
Isaiah41:18 Ndyaigurira emigyera aha bibungo by'emparamaata, nfukure amaziba ahagati y'empanga; eihamba ndihindure ebiyanja, n'ensi ekarangataine ngitemu enshuro z'amaizi." 
Isaiah41:19 Omu ihamba ndyamezamu zaakaarwenda n'eminyinya n'emyenyi n'emioliva. Kandi omu ihamba ry'omusheenyi ndyamezamu emiryohe, emiziko n'emigiigi," 
Isaiah41:20 abantu babone kureeba bamanye bateekateekye, kandi beetegyereze ku Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naabikozire, Nyowe Nyakwera wa Isiraeli ku niinye naabihangire." 
Isaiah41:21 Nyakubaho Omugabe wa Yakobo naagira ati: Nimwetonganire, mureete ebirikuhamya eki murikwetonganira." 
Isaiah41:22 Ka bareete baaruhanga baabo batuhanuurire ebiribaho, batugambire ebya ira ebyabaireho n'eki birikumanyisa; tubone kubiteekateekaho n'okumanya muheru yaabyo; nari batumanyise ebiribaho." 
Isaiah41:23 Nimutuhanuurire ebiribaho omu biro bya bwanyima, tubone kumanya ku muri baaruhanga. Nimukore ebirungi nari ebibi, emitima ebone kutuhwa omunda, tutiine." 
Isaiah41:24 Reeba, muri busha, n'ebi mukora tibirimu kantu; obaramya aba ekihagaro." 
Isaiah41:25 Nyimukize orikuruga omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, mbwenu ngugwo yaija, naaruga oburugwa-izooba naatakira eiziina ryangye. Aryaribatiirira abategyeki nk'ebyondo, nari nk'oku omunogoozi akaata eibumba." 
Isaiah41:26 N'oha owaakirangiriire okwiha omu kutandika ngu tukimanye, akakihanuura obunaku bwakyo butakahikire, tukabona kugira ngu ahikire? Tihariho n'omwe omuriimwe owaakigambire, tihariho owaakirangiriire, tihariho owaahuriire mwine eki murikugamba." 
Isaiah41:27 Niinye naabandize kukigambira Siyooni, kandi nkatuma entumwa aha ba Yerusalemu kubagambira enkuru nungi." 
Isaiah41:28 kwonka ku ndikunagayo eriisho, nshanga hataine oriyo. Omuri baaruhanga abo tiharimu muhi w'obwengye ou ndikubuuza akangarukamu." 
Isaiah41:29 Reeba, boona ni waringa, ebi bakora ni busha, ebishushani byabo ebiheesirwe n'omuyaga kusha." 
Isaiah42:1 Reeba omuheereza wangye ou ndamira, ou naatooraine, ou nshemerererwa. Mmwijwize Mutima wangye, aryareetera amahanga kukora eby'oburyo." 
Isaiah42:2 Tariyomba, nobu kwakuba okwamuza, eiraka rye rikahuririrwa omu mihanda." 
Isaiah42:3 Orubingo rushatukire tariruhenda, n'orumuri rurikwaka kubi tariruraaza; kureka omu mazima aryareetera abantu kukora eby'oburyo." 
Isaiah42:4 Tariremwa, nobu kwakuba okucweka omuhimbo, okuhitsya obu arihamiza kimwe eby'oburyo omu nsi; ab'omu myegyeego y'enyanja n'omu birwa bakategyereza n'ekihika ebi arikwegyesa." 
Isaiah42:5 Mukama Ruhanga owaahangire eiguru akaribamba, owaashashaanwire ensi akagibuzya ebigirimu, oha omwitsyo abagituuramu, abagigyendamu akabaha amagara, naagira ati:" 
Isaiah42:6 Nyowe Nyakubaho nkakweta kureetera abantu kukora eby'oburyo, naakukwata omukono, naakurinda. Nkakutaho ngu obe endagaano yangye n'abantu, kandi obe omushana gw'amahanga;" 
Isaiah42:7 kuhumuura amaisho g'empumi, kwiha embohe omu kihome, n'abashutami omu mwirima kubaiha omuri kabura-muriro." 
Isaiah42:8 Ndi Nyakubaho; eryo niryo iziina ryangye; kandi ekitiinwa kyangye tindikiha ondiijo, nobu kwakuba okureka ebishushani ebirikuramibwa, bikahimbisibwa nkaanye." 
Isaiah42:9 Reeba, ebi naarangire ira byabaireho. Hati nindangirira ebisya, nimbibagambira bitakabaireho." 
Isaiah42:10 Mweshongorere Nyakubaho ekyshongoro kisya! Naimwe ab'aha muheru gw'ensi mweshongore eby'okumuhimbisa1 K'abarikugyendera aha nyanja n'ebigirimu byona, n'ebirwa n'ababitwireho byeshogore eby'omukusingiza." 
Isaiah42:11 K'eihamba n'endembo zaamwo biimutsye amaraka hamwe n'ebyaro ebitwiremu Abakedari. Abatuuzi ba Seela ka beeshongore ahabw'okushemererwa, bateerere akaari aha mitwe y'enshozi." 
Isaiah42:12 Ka bahe Nyakubaho ekitiinwa, barangirire omu myegyeego y'enyanja n'omu birwa eby'okumuhimbisa." 
Isaiah42:13 Nyakubaho naahurura nk'emanzi; aine omujinya nk'omurwani orikuza aha rugamba. Naateera enduuru y'okuhuruza, naayamuza, naayeshaaringira abazigu be, ku ari emanzi." 
Isaiah42:14 Manya Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mmazire omwanya muraingwa mpunami ntarikuteeza, kandi nyegumize. Kwonka hati naaza kuborooga nk'omukazi orikurumwa, mpeere, kandi nsheemeekye." 
Isaiah42:15 Ndyacwekyereza enshozi n'ebibungo, nyomye ebibimezireho byona; emigyera ngihindure ebirwa, kandi nyomye ebiyanja." 
Isaiah42:16 Empumi ndyazikwatira ekihimbo, nzitooze omuhanda ogu zitarikumanya; nzirabye omu tuhanda otu zitakatooramuga. Omwirima oguriba guzirindagiize ndyaguhindura omushana; ndingaanize emyanya etaringaniire. Haza ebyo ndyabikora, tindibahemukaho." 
Isaiah42:17 Reero abeesiga ebishushani bisharwirwe, abagambira ebishushani biheesirwe bati: Niimwe baaruhanga baitu, baryacuubwa amaryo bahemurirwe kimwe." 
Isaiah42:18 Imwe bifamatu 'mwe, nimuhurire! Naimwe mpumi 'mwe, nimubuuruure amaisho mubone kureeba!" 
Isaiah42:19 Mbwenu ori empumi n'oha, kureka omuheereza wangye, Nainga ofiire amatu nk'entumwa yangye ei ntuma n'oha? N'oha ori empumi nk'owangye owaanyehongyeire nari ori empumi nk'omuheereza wangye, Nyowe Nyakubaho?" 
Isaiah42:20 Iwe Isiraeli 'we, nooreeba ebintu bingi, kwonka torikubyetegyereza. Nootega amatu, kwonka torikuhurira." 
Isaiah42:21 Mukama ahabw'okuhikiirira kwe akasiima kutunguura eiteeka rye, ngu abantu barihaise." 
Isaiah42:22 Kwonka eri n'eihanga erisikwirwe ebyaryo, kandi rikanyagwa. Abaaryo boona bakwatiirwe omu biina, basherekirwe omu bihome; baaba ab'okwitwa bataine kujuna, baaba ab'okunyagwa hataine orikugira ati: Mubagarureyo." 
Isaiah42:23 Mbwenu omuriimwe n'oha owaakutega eki okutu, akataho omutima kuhurira eby'omu biro ebiriija?" 
Isaiah42:24 N'oha owaarekire Yakobo akatwarwa omunyagi, akarekurira Isiraeli abasikuzi? Ti Nyakubaho, ou twacumwireho? Ou baayangire kukuratira emitwarize ye, bakanga kworobera eiteeka rye?" 
Isaiah42:25 Nikyo yaamugiririire ekiniga kirikwaka nk'omuriro, akamushunikira engamba z'amaani. Ekyo kiniga kikamwotsya embaju zoona, kwonka ateetegyereze; kikamubabura, kwonka atakiteho mutima." 
Isaiah43:1 Kwonka hati Nyakubaho owaakuhangire, iwe Yakobo, owaakubumburukire, iwe Isiraeli, naagira ati: Otatiina, ahabw'okuba nkakucungura, naakweta eiziina; mbwenu ori owangye." 
Isaiah43:2 Ku oriraba omu maizi, ndyaba nkwine; ku oriraba omu migyera, terikumira; ku oriraba omu muriro torisya; endimi zaagwo tizirikusiriiza." 
Isaiah43:3 Manya niinye Mukama Ruhanga waawe, Nyakwera wa Isiraeli, Omujuni waawe. Mpaireyo Misiri kuba eky'okukucungura, Etiopiya na Seba naazihayo omu mwanya gwawe." 
Isaiah43:4 Ahabw'okuba ori ow'omuhendo ahariinye, ori ow'ekitiinwa kandi ninkukunda. Nikyo ndiheerayo abantu ahabwawe, nkahayo amahanga ahabw'amagara gaawe." 
Isaiah43:5 Otatiina, ahabw'okuba ndi hamwe naiwe. Ndyaiha oburugwa-izooba ab'oruzaaro rwawe, nkutaaruure burengyerwa-izooba." 
Isaiah43:6 Ndyagambira obukiizi-bwa-bumosho nti: Barekye bagyenda; ngire obukiizi-bwa-buryo nti: Otabazibira! Reeta batabani bangye, barugye hare, na bahara bangye barugye aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Isaiah43:7 Buri muntu obyetererwa ou naahangire kumpaisa ekitiinwa, nkamubumburika, naamukora." 
Isaiah43:8 Shohoza abo bantu bahumire, kwonka baine amaisho; abafiire amatu, haza bagaine!" 
Isaiah43:9 K'amahanga goona gateeranire hamwe, enganda zoona zeerundaane. Mbwenu omuribo n'oha owaakukigamba, akatworeka ebyabaireho ira? Ka bareete baakareebi b'okubahamiza; bakihurire, kandi bagire bati: N'eky'amazima." 
Isaiah43:10 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, niimwe baakareebi bangye, abaahereza bangye abu naatooraine ngu mubone kummanya n'okuunyikiriza, mukeetegyereza ku ndi We. Tihariho ruhanga ondiijo, kureka nyowe. Tihakabahoga ruhanga ondiijo, kandi taribaho." 
Isaiah43:11 Nyowe niinye Nyakubaho! Tihariho ondiijo mujuni, kureka nyowe." 
Isaiah43:12 Niinye naagambire ebiribaho, nkajuna kandi nkarangirira, obwo hatariho ruhanga w'endugamahanga omuriimwe. Kandi niimwe baakareebi bangye; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Isaiah43:13 Niinye Ruhanga; okwiha hati nikwo ndaagume ndi. Tihariho orikubaasa kusikura ekintu kyona omu mikono yangye. Mbwenu eki nkora, hariho owaakubaasa kukizibira?" 
Isaiah43:14 Nyakubaho Omucunguzi waanyu, Nyakwera wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Ahabwanyu ndyayohereza eihe riteere Babulooni; mpende empimbi z'amarembo g'ebihome; akaari k'Abakaludaaya k'okushemererwa kahindukye okuborooga." 
Isaiah43:15 Niinye Nyakubaho, Orikwera waanyu, Omuhangi wa Isiraeli, Omugabe waanyu." 
Isaiah43:16 Ndi Nyakubaho owaacwire omuhanda omu nyanja, n'akahanda omu maizi g'amaani." 
Isaiah43:17 Owaacwekyereize ebigaari n'embaraasi n'eihe ry'abarwani, bikagwa gangari, bitaimukye bundi, bikahwerekyerera, bikabuza akatsibyo nk'orumuri naagira ati:" 
Isaiah43:18 Mutaijuka ebya ira nari okuteekateeka munonga aha byabaireho. 
Isaiah43:19 Reeba, niinyija kukora ekintu kisya, nangwa kyagiire kubaho, mbwenu shi timurikukireeba? Niinyija kurabya omuhanda omu irungu; nte emigyera omu ihamba ry'omusheenyi." 
Isaiah43:20 Enyamaishwa ziryampa ekitiinwa. Zaamuha na zaamaaya zimpimbise ahabw'okuta amaizi omu irungu, n'emigyera omu ihamba ry'omusheenyi, ngu mbone kuha ekyokunywa abantu bangye abu naatooraine;" 
Isaiah43:21 Abantu abu naayehangiire ngu bampimbisise. 
Isaiah43:22 Kwonka iwe Yakobo, torantakiire; Iwe Isiraeli, okantamwa!" 
Isaiah43:23 Torandeeteire ntaama z'ebitambo bicwekize, nari okumpaisa ekitiinwa n'ebitambo byawe. Nyowe tindakugangize na mitoijo, nari okukurusya n'obubaani bw'okuunyoterera." 
Isaiah43:24 Toraihireyo mpiiha zaawe kungurira ebikoijo, nobu kwakuba okumpaazya n'ebitambo byawe; kureka ongangize n'ebibi byawe, wandusya n'ebicumuro byawe." 
Isaiah43:25 Nyowe niinye nkweihiraho ebibi ahabwangye, kandi tindibiijuka." 
Isaiah43:26 Mbwenu nyijutsya, tuteekurane; tongana ebyawe, bahamye ku oraabe ohikire." 
Isaiah43:27 Shwenkuru akashiisha, n'abatonganizi baawe bancumuraho." 
Isaiah43:28 Nikyo naahinduriire abategyeki b'Omwanya Ogurikwera ekihagaro; nkahayo Yakobo kucwekyerera, na Isiraeli kuhereburwa." 
Isaiah44:1 Kwonka mbwenu, Iwe Yakobo omwiru wangye, Isiraeli ou naatooraine, hurira!" 
Isaiah44:2 Nyakubaho owaakuhangire akakubumburikira omu nda, kandi orikujuna, naagira ati: Iwe Yakobo omwiru wangye, Yeshuruuni ou naatooraine, otatiina." 
Isaiah44:3 Ahabw'okuba ndyashuka amaizi aha nsi ekarangataine, nte emigyera aha itaka ryomire. Ndyashuka Mutima wangye ahari baijukuru baawe, n'omugisha gwangye aha b'oruzaaro rwawe." 
Isaiah44:4 Baryakura gye nk'obunyaatsi bumezire omu maizi; nk'emikinga y'aha rubaju rw'emigyera erikuhimintika. 
Isaiah44:5 Omwe aryagira ati: Ndi owa Nyakubaho, ondiijo ayeyeterere Yakobo; reero ondi ayehandiikye aha mukono ati: Owa Nyakubaho, kandi ayekubye Isiraeli." 
Isaiah44:6 Nyakubaho Omugabe wa Isiraeli kandi omucunguzi we, Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Niinye w'okubanza kandi niinye w'aha muheru! Tihariho ruhanga ondi, kureka nyowe." 
Isaiah44:7 Mbwenu n'oha ori nkaanye? Naakirangirire, akigambe; akite omu maisho gangye. N'oha okwiha ira owaarangire ebiribaho? Nari batugambire ebirikwija kubaho!" 
Isaiah44:8 Mutatiina, kandi mutaitwa obwoba. Tiinye naabagambiire okwiha ira nkabibamanyisa? Haza niimwe baakareebi bangye! Ebyo hariho ruhanga ondiijo otari nyowe? Tihariho Rukiri ondiijo ou ndikumanya!" 
Isaiah44:9 Boona abakora ebishushani birikuramibwa baba busha, n'ebyo bintu bi beesiimisa tibigira mugasho. Ababiramya tibareeba kandi tibaine ki bamanya. Haza ekyo kibahemura." 
Isaiah44:10 N'oha orakozire ruhanga nari oraheesire ekishushani kye atahendekyere busha? 
Isaiah44:11 Manya bagyenzi be nibaija kwitwa enshoni, kandi abanyamyoga baabyo n'abantu-buntu. Mbwenu boona ka bateeranire hamwe beemerere; haza tureebe ku bataitwa bwoba, enshoni zikababumba." 
Isaiah44:12 Omuheesi ku aza kuheesha empango, agijugutirira omu makara, agiteeza enyondo, agiheesha n'omukono gwe gw'amaani; arugaho agira enjara, amaani gamuhwamu, agira eiriho, agwa enshazi." 
Isaiah44:13 Omubaizi areega omugoye aha kiti, akiharaatuzaho ekaraamu, akibaija n'eranda, akigyeresa kampasi; akikoramu ekishushani ky'omuntu, kiba kirungi nk'omuntu, kiguma omu ndaaro." 
Isaiah44:14 Nari atema kaarwenda nainga atooranamu omuziko nari omuvule, agureka gukurira omu miti y'omu kibira, kandi abyara omuryohe, enjura egwitirira." 
Isaiah44:15 Bwanyima gurugiramu omuntu enku, agwihaho omuganda agwota; ahemba omuriro, ateeka emigaati. Kandi agubaijamu ruhanga amuramya; agukoramu ekishushani kisharwire akijuumara omu maisho." 
Isaiah44:16 Empimbi zaagwo ezimwe azihemba, ezindi azookyesa enyama, agirya ahaaga; kandi ayota ogwo muriro, agira ati: Ebishi naabona akariro naatagatirwa!" 
Isaiah44:17 Reero empimbi eyaatsigaraho agibaijamu ruhanga, ekishushani kye ky'okuramya; akitsimbira amaju akiramya, akigira naagira ati: Njuna, ahabw'okuba niiwe ruhanga wangye!" 
Isaiah44:18 Abo bantu tibaine ki barikumanya, tibaine ki barikwetegyereza; ahabw'okuba bakwatsirwe aha maisho, tibarikubaasa kureeba; bafiire omutima, tibarikubaasa kushoboorokyerwa." 
Isaiah44:19 Tihariho orikuteekateeka, nobu yaakuba orikumanya, nainga orikwetegyereza akagira ati: Ekicweka kyagwo nkihembire, naateeka emigaati aha makara gaagwo, naayokyezaho enyama naagirya, mbwenu ekicweka kyagwo ekyatsigaraho nkikoremu ekintu kirikuzira? Nshemereire kujuumara omu maisho g'empimbi y'omuti nkagiramya?" 
Isaiah44:20 Ogwo muntu ni nk'orikurya eiju. Aba naayebeiha, kandi ahabire. Tarikubaasa kwejuna akagira ati: Eki kishushani ki nkwaitse omu mukono gwangye gwa buryo t'eky'ebishuba?" 
Isaiah44:21 Iwe Yakobo, kandi Isiraeli, ijuka ebyo bintu, ahabw'okuba oba omwiru wangye. Niinye naakuhangire, ori omwiru wangye. Buzimazima Iwe Isiraeli, tindikwebwa." 
Isaiah44:22 Nkwerwireho ebicumuro byawe nk'ekicu, n'ebibi byawe nk'oruho. Mbwenu nu, ngarukira, ahabw'okuba nkakucungura." 
Isaiah44:23 Iwe iguru 'we, yeshongore, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho aine eki akozire. Iwe Okuzimu, teera akaari, imwe nshozi 'mwe, nimwimutsye amaraka mweshongore; naimwe bibira 'mwe, n'emiti yoona erimu! Manya Nyakubaho acungwire Yakobo, kandi aryaheebwa ekitiinwa omuri Isiraeli." 
Isaiah44:24 Nyakubaho Omujuni waawe owaakubumburikiire omu nda naagira ati: Niinye Nyakubaho owaahangire ebintu byona, nkabamba eiguru nyenka, nkashashaanura ensi. Mbwenu obwo nkaba nyine oha?" 
Isaiah44:25 Niinye ncwa busha endagu z'abanyabishuba, abaraguzi nkabahindura abashema; nkagarura enyima abanyabwengye, okumanya kwabo nkakuhindura obufamutima." 
Isaiah44:26 Niinye mpamya eki omuheereza wangye yaagamba, nkahikiiriza enaama ezi entumwa zangye zaacuma. Niinye ngira nti: Yerusalemu eryatuurwamu; n'endembo za Buyuda zombekwe; nkagaruraho emyanya yaazo eyaabaire amatongo." 
Isaiah44:27 Niinye ndagiira enyanja nti: Yoma; kandi nti: Niinyija kwomya emigyera yaawe. 
Isaiah44:28 Niinye ngambira Kuuro nti: Ori omuriisa wangye orihikiiriza ebi ndikwenda byona; nkagamba ahari Yerusalemu nti: Eyombekwe busya, n'ahari Nyaruju yangye nti: k'emisingi yaayo eteebweho." 
Isaiah45:1 Ebi nibyo Nyakubaho yaagambiire Kuuro, ou yaasiigire amajuta, akamukwata omukono gwe gwa buryo, kumugomoorera amahanga, abagabe akabaihaho obushoboorozi, ngu abone kumwigurira enyigi; amarembo garekye kukingwa." 
Isaiah45:2 Nyakubaho naagira Kuuro ati: Ndyakwebembera, ndingaanize ahataringaniire. Ndyahendagura enyigi z'emiringa, mpirimbure empimbi z'ebyoma." 
Isaiah45:3 Ndyakuha eby'obutungi ebisherekirwe omu myanya erimu omwirima, n'ebitindikirwe omu myanya eyekiikire; ngu obone kumanya ku ndi Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, owaakwetsire ninkugamba eiziina." 
Isaiah45:4 Ahabw'omwiru wangye Yakobo, Isiraeli ou naatooraine, ninkweta ninkugamba eiziina, ninkukubya ekikubyo, nobu oraabe otarikummanya." 
Isaiah45:5 Niinye Nyakubaho, haza tihariho ondiijo. Tihariho Ruhanga ondi, kureka nyowe. Niinye nkuha amaani, nobu oraabe otarikummanya." 
Isaiah45:6 Abantu ba burugwa-izooba n'aba burengyerwa-izooba babone kumanya ku hatariho ondi, kureka nyowe. Manya Niinye Nyakubaho, haza tihariho ondi." 
Isaiah45:7 Niinye njwisa omushana nkataho omwirima, nkareeta obuhiire n'okugwerwa akagwe. Niinye Nyakubaho okora ebyo byona." 
Isaiah45:8 Iwe iguru 'we, toonyerera okuhikiirira, naimwe ebicu, mukugwise nk'enjura, ensi eyashame ekwakiire kubone kugirugiramu okujunwa n'obusingye." 
Isaiah45:9 Omuntu ohakanisa Omuhangi we, aryakareeba, ahabw'okuba aba ari nk'oku enyungu yaakuhakanisa oginogoire! Ebyo eibumba rikaabuuza orikuribumbukira riti: Noobumba ki? Nari eki arikukora nikibaasa kumugira kiti: Toine bwengye?" 
Isaiah45:10 Omuntu ogira ishe ati: Noozaara ki; akagaruka akaabuuza nyina, ati: Noorumwa ki, aryakareeba!" 
Isaiah45:11 Na Nyakubaho, Nyakwera wa Isiraeli kandi Omuhangi we, naagira ati: Muhikire kumbuuza ebikwatiraine n'abaana bangye? Nari okundagiira eki nshemereire kukoresa engaro zangye?" 
Isaiah45:12 Nkakora ensi naahanga omuntu kugituuramu. Omukono gwangye nigwo gwabambire eiguru, kandi niinye ntegyeka ebimbuuro byamwo byona." 
Isaiah45:13 Omu mazima niinye nyimukize Kuuro, kandi niinyija kumutebeekanisiza emihanda ye yoona. Aryayombeka orurembo rwangye, arekure abaazaahiibwe, ataguriirwe nari okuheebwa ebihembo. Nikwo Mukama ow'amahe arikugamba." 
Isaiah45:14 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Eby'obutungi bwa Misiri n'eby'obushubuuzi bwa Etiopiya biryaba ebyawe. Abaseeba, abantu baraingwa, baryakwehongyera, babe abaawe. Baryakukuratira bari omu njegyere, baije ahu ori, bakutsimbire amaju; bakweshengyereze nibagira bati: Ruhanga ari hamwe naiwe wenka; tihariho orikuharikana nawe, kandi tihariho ruhanga ondiijo kureka We." 
Isaiah45:15 Ai Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, Omujuni, buzimazima niiwe Ruhanga oyeshereka." 
Isaiah45:16 Boona oku baingana baryaitwa enshoni bashoberwe; abakora ebishushani birikuramibwa baryarimbagirirwa kimwe. 
Isaiah45:17 Kwonka Isiraeli Nyakubaho aryagijuna, etungye okujuna okutahwaho. Abantu baayo tibarihemuka, nobu kwakuba okucuubwa eishaija, okuhitsya ryari na ryari." 
Isaiah45:18 Manya Nyakubaho owaahangire eiguru (niwe Ruhanga), owaabumburikire ensi akagikora (akagihamya), taragihangire ngu egume erimu busha etaine buteeka; kureka akagibumburika, ngu etuurwemu. Nyakubaho ogwo naagira ati: Niinye Nyakubaho, kandi tihariho ondiijo." 
Isaiah45:19 Tinkagambiraga mu mubonano omu nsi y'omwirima. Tinkagiraga ab'oruzaaro rwa Yakobo nti: Munsherurire busha. Nyowe Nyakubaho ngamba amazima; ndanga ebihikire. 
Isaiah45:20 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Imwe ab'amahanga abaahonokireho, nimweteerane mwije mwirire haihi. Manya abagyenda n'ebishushani by'ebiti ebirikuramibwa, bakaguma nibashaba ruhanga otarikubaasa kubajuna, baba abashema." 
Isaiah45:21 Nimugambe ebyanyu mwetonganire, kandi muhanuure kumwe! Mbwenu ira n'oha owaarangire ekyo ku kiribaho? N'oha owaakirangire omu biro bya ira? Tiinye Nyakubaho? Kandi tihariho ruhanga ondiijo kureka nyowe. Tihariho Ruhanga ohikiriire kandi Omujuni, otari nyowe." 
Isaiah45:22 Imwe mwena ab'aha mperu z'ensi nimumpindukire, mujunwe! Manya niinye Ruhanga, tihariho ondiijo." 
Isaiah45:23 Niinyerahira! Eki ngambire nkigambire omu mazima, kandi tikirihinduka. Abantu boona baryantsimbira amaju; buri rurimi rumpigire." 
Isaiah45:24 Baryangambaho bati: Omuri Nyakubaho wenka nimwo obusinguzi n'amaani biri; abahigana nawe baryaija omu maisho ge baitsirwe enshoni. 
Isaiah45:25 Omuri Nyakubaho nimwo ab'oruzaaro rwa Isiraeli barisingurira bakeesiima. 
Isaiah46:1 Beli nainama, Neebo abandama. Ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa byekoreirwe enyamaishwa n'ente. Ebintu ebi mwekorera aha mutwe, hati n'emitwaro ei mwekoreize enyamaishwa ziruhire." 
Isaiah46:2 Ebyo bishushani nibibandama, nibiinamira hamwe, tibirikubaasa kujuna ababyekoreire; kureka nabyo nibitwarwa omu bukwatwa." 
Isaiah46:3 Mbwenu nimuntegye okutu, imwe ab'omuryango gwa Yakobo, imwe mwena abantu bangye aba Isiraeli abaatsigaireho, abu naaheekire okwiha obu mwazaarwa, nkabaheeka murugire omu nda." 
Isaiah46:4 Nangwa nobu murikura, hoona niinye obaheeka nobu murimera enju, ndyaguma mbaheekire. Niinye naabahangire, niinye mbareeberera; ndyabaheeka, mbajune." 
Isaiah46:5 Mbwenu mukanshushanisa n'oha, ou mwakuunyinganisa nawe, mukatugyeragyeranisa, tukashushana?" 
Isaiah46:6 Manya abashiishagura ezaabu bakazifukunkura omu nshaho, bakapima efeeza ahari minzaani, baguriirira omuheesi w'ezaabu, nawe azikoramu ruhanga. Bwanyima batsimbira ekyo kishushani amaju, bakiramya." 
Isaiah46:7 Bakikiriza bakita aha mabega, bakiheeka, bakita omu mwanya gwakyo kyemereramu; kwonka tikibaasa kugurugamu. Ku hagira owaakitakira, tikimugarukamu; nobu kwakuba okumujuna omu kabi." 
Isaiah46:8 Imwe bacumuzi 'mwe, mugume mwijukye eki, mukiteekateekyeho kandi mukigumye aha mutima." 
Isaiah46:9 Mwijukye ebyabaireho bwabiso, omu biro bya ira. Manya niinye Ruhanga, tihariho ondiijo. Ndi Ruhanga, kandi tihariho orikushushana naanye." 
Isaiah46:10 Okwiha omu kutandika nkaranga eby'emperu, naiha omu biro bya ira nindanga ebitakabaireho; ningira nti: Enaama yangye eryahama, mpikiirize ebi naamaririire kukora," 
Isaiah46:11 nyete empungu, erugye oburugwa izooba, omushaija orikuruga omu nsi ya hare ahikiirize ebi naacumire kukora. Ekyo naakigamba, kandi ndyakihikiiriza. Nkimaririire, kandi ndyakikora." 
Isaiah46:12 Nimuntegye okutu, imwe ngangaazi 'mwe, abarikugira ngu okubarokora kukiri hare." 
Isaiah46:13 Ndi haihi kubarokora, tikuri hare munonga; n'okubajuna kwangye tikurikusiibyayo. Ndyajuna Siyooni mpaise Isiraeli ekitiinwa." 
Isaiah47:1 Iwe Babulooni 'we, ohundiriire, temburuka, oshitame omu mucuucu! Iwe rurembo rw'Abakaludaaya 'we, shutama aha nsi otakiri ha kitebe ky'obugabe; ahabw'okuba noija kuba otakyeetwa mutetsi kandi ojarami." 
Isaiah47:2 Kwata eseiso ose, oyeshuuruure eki oyetwekyereire. Hinyiirira ekipumpuriya kyawe oyeshuuruure amaguru, oyambukye emigyera," 
Isaiah47:3 enjuuro yaawe ereebwe, n'ebyenshoni byawe byaname. Manya ndyahoora enzigu, kandi tindigirira muntu weena esaasi." 
Isaiah47:4 Omucunguzi waitu oyetwa Mukama ow'amahe Orikwera wa Isiraeli nikwo arikugira. 
Isaiah47:5 Iwe rurembo rw'Abakaludaaya 'we, shutama ohunami, oyeshobeire, ahabw'okuba oryaba otakyeetwa Mugabekazi w'ensi z'abagabe." 
Isaiah47:6 Nkagwerwa kubi abantu bangye naabahemura nk'abatakiri bangye, naabakurekurira, naiwe tiwaabagirira saasi; abagurusi waabeekoreza omutwaro guremeire munonga." 
Isaiah47:7 Waagira oti: Ndyaguma ndi omugabekazi ebiro byona. Haza ebyo tiwaabyetaho, nobu kwakuba okuteekateeka muheru yaabyo." 
Isaiah47:8 Iwe okunda eby'amashemererwa, okashutama otaine keekyengo, okagira oti: Niinye ndiho kandi tihariho ondiijo, kureka nyowe. Kandi oti: Tindiba mufaakazi, nobu kwakuba okufiisa. Kwonka mbwenu hurira." 
Isaiah47:9 Eizooba rimwe ebyo byombi biryakugwera kitaraariire; okufiisa n'obufaakazi bikujuumikire; nobu oburogi bwawe buraabe buri bwingi buta, n'emigyereko yaawe eri ey'amaani munonga." 
Isaiah47:10 Ku oba nookora ebibi, togira ki oyetaho. Ogira oti: Tihaine orikundeeba. Obwengye bwawe n'okumanya kwawe bikuhabisa. Ogira oti: Niinye ndiho, tihariho ondiijo, kureka nyowe." 
Isaiah47:11 Kwonka oryahikwaho akabi aku otarikubaasa kuzibira, ogwerwe akagwe aku otarikubaasa kwihaho, haza ocwekyerere kitaraariire, otabimanyire." 
Isaiah47:12 Gumizamu n'emigyereko yaawe n'amarogo gaawe maingi; ebi otuura nooyehenengyera waaba kunyeeta. Shana obundi bikaakuhwera oitsa abantu obwoba. 
Isaiah47:13 Baingi nobu baraabe bakuhaire obwengye, kwonka oruhire. Mbwenu abakyenga eby'omu iguru, abahanga enyonyoozi amaisho, okwezi kukiboneka bakaragura ebiraakubeho, ka baije bakujune." 
Isaiah47:14 Reeba, baryaba nk'embuba, omuriro gubootsye. Tibaryekiza kibabo ky'endimi zaagwo, ahabw'okuba tiguriba makara g'okwota, nari kuba ogw'okushutamwa aha rubaju." 
Isaiah47:15 Okwo nikwo abafumu, abu waayecurengire nabo noobaraguzaho waaba kunyeeta, barikubeera. Baryayegyendera buri omwe atoore ogwe, habure owaakujuna." 
Isaiah48:1 Imwe ab'omuryango gwa Yakobo, abeetererwa Isiraeli, abaakomookire ahari Yuda, abarahira Nyakubaho, abaatura ku baramya Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, kwonka mutarikukikora mu mazima nari omu buryo buhikire, nimuhurire!" 
Isaiah48:2 Imwe abeeyeta ab'orurembo orurikwera, mukeekiita nimugira ngu Ruhanga wa Isiraeli oyetwa Mukama ow'amahe, niwe mwegamiire." 
Isaiah48:3 Ebya ira nkabiranga obutakimanywa, byanduga omu kanwa, naabimanyisa ku biribaho; kandi aho n'aho naabiragiira, byabaho." 
Isaiah48:4 Ahabw'okuba nkamanya ku ori engangaazi, ebitsya byawe ku bigumire nk'empimbi y'ekyoma, n'obuso bwawe ku bugangaire nk'omuringa." 
Isaiah48:5 Ebyo nkabikumanyisa kare bitakabaireho, naabikurangira ngu otakaagira oti: Ekishushani kyangye ekirikuramibwa nikyo kyabibaisizeho, ekishushani kyangye ekisharwirwe ekiheesirwe nikyo kyabiragiire kubaho." 
Isaiah48:6 Ebyo byona okabihurira kandi waabireeba. Mbwenu shi torikubiikiriza? Okwiha hati niinyija kukugambira ebintu bisya ebisherekirwe, ebi otakamanyaga." 
Isaiah48:7 Nibwo naabibaisaho, ti bya ira, kandi okuhitsya eri izooba tokabihuriraga; ngu otakaagira oti: Ebyo byona nkabimanya kare." 
Isaiah48:8 Tokabihuriraga, tokabimanyaga, tibikakugwaga mu kutu; ahabw'okuba nkamanya ku orikwija kuba endeebya, kandi okwiha obu waazaarwa, otuura noomanywa ku ori omugomi." 
Isaiah48:9 Ahabw'eiziina ryangye nkeezibira kugira ekiniga, kandi ahabw'ekitiinwa kyangye nkakugumisiriza, naareka kukucwekyereza." 
Isaiah48:10 Reeba, nkugyerize, kwonka ti nk'oku baiha enkamba aha feeza; kureka nkugyereize omu iziiko ry'okubonabonesibwa." 
Isaiah48:11 Buzimazima ekyo ahabwangye nyenka niinye nkikozire; ngu eiziina ryangye ritakaahemurwa. Tindiikiriza ondiijo weena kuntwarira ekitiinwa. 
Isaiah48:12 Iwe Yakobo, Isiraeli ou naayetsire, ntega okutu! Nyowe niinye w'okubanza kandi niinye w'aha muheru." 
Isaiah48:13 Omukono gwangye nigwo gwataireho obuhamizo bw'ensi, kandi omukono gwangye gwa buryo nigwo gwabambire eiguru. Ku mbyeta biija byemerera hamwe." 
Isaiah48:14 Imwe mwena nimuteeranire hamwe muhurire. Mbwenu omu baaruhanga abandi n'oha orarangire eki; ngu Nyowe Nyakubaho, omuntu ou naatooraine aryakora eki ndikwenda ahari Babulooni, n'omukono gwe guryateera Abakaludaaya?" 
Isaiah48:15 Nyowe niinye nkigambire nkamweta. Niinye mmureetsire, kandi ahu araaze hoona naija kugyenderwa gye." 
Isaiah48:16 Nimumpikye haihi muhurire eki; okwiha aha kutandika tinkagambiraga mu mubonano, kandi okwiha byaba kubaho, nkaba ndiho. Mbwenu Mukama Ruhanga antumire na Mutima we." 
Isaiah48:17 Nyakubaho Omucunguzi waawe, Orikwera wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waawe orikukwegyesa eby'okukugasira, akakuhabura omuhanda ogu oraatoore." 
Isaiah48:18 Nangwa kuri waahuriire ebiragiro byangye! Nibwo obusingye bwawe bwakuhimintikire nk'omugyera; okuhikiirira kwawe kukeecunda nk'ebingonzi by'aha nyanja," 
Isaiah48:19 abaana baawe bakaba baingi nk'omusheenyi, na baijukuru baawe bakaingana n'omucuucu; eiziina ryabo rikareka kubura, nari kuhwerekyerera omu maisho gangye." 
Isaiah48:20 Nimushohore murugye Babulooni, Muhungye murugye Bukaludaaya! Mukirangye nimuteera akaari k'okushemererwa. Mukimanyise, mukibuzye kihikye aha muheru gw'ensi, nimugira muti: Nyakubaho acungwire omwiru we Yakobo!" 
Isaiah48:21 Ku yaabeebembeire naabarabya omu ihamba, tibaraitsirwe iriho. Akabaihira amaizi omu rukiri; yaarushatura, gaayohoka." 
Isaiah48:22 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Enyabibi tegira busingye. 
Isaiah49:1 Imwe birwa 'mwe, nimumpurire, naimwe mahanga ga hare, nimuntegye okutu. Nyakubaho akaanyeta ntakazairwe, yaanyeta eiziina nkiri omu nda ya maawe." 
Isaiah49:2 Akatyaza akanwa kangye, kaagira obwogi nk'obwa rurara, yanshereka omu kicuucu ky'omukono gwe. Akampindura omwambi guzigwire, yanshereka omu mutana gwe." 
Isaiah49:3 Reero yangira ati: Iwe Isiraeli 'we, ori omwiru wangye orimpimbisisa." 
Isaiah49:4 Kwonka naagira nti: Nkahendekyera busha, amaani gangye gaafa busha; kwonka buzimazima Nyakubaho niwe arikumanya ebyangye, Ruhanga wangye niwe arinzimuurira." 
Isaiah49:5 Kandi hati oku nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba, owambumburikire ntakazairwe kuba omuheereza we kumugarurira aba Yakobo, n'okumutaarurira Abaisiraeli; ahabw'okuba ndi ow'ekitiinwa omu maisho ge, kandi Ruhanga wangye niwe maani gangye." 
Isaiah49:6 Angizire ati: N'akantu kakye munonga, iwe okuba omuheereza wangye w'okwimutsya ab'enganda za Yakobo n'okugarura Abaisiraeli abaahonokireho. Mbwenu ndyakuhindura orumuri rw'okuhwezesa amahanga; ohitsye okujuna kwangye aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Isaiah49:7 Nyakubaho Omucunguzi wa Isiraeli kandi Orikwera we, naagira orikugayirwa kimwe, orikutamirwa kimwe amahanga, kandi omuheereza w'abategyeki ati: Abagabe baryakureeba baimukye, n'abainginya bakureebe bakuramye, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho omwesigwa, Nyakwera wa Isiraeli akakutoorana." 
Isaiah49:8 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Obunaku bw'okugirirwa embabazi ku burihika, ndyakugarukamu, aha izooba eri orijunirwaho, ndyakuhwera. Ndyakurinda nkuteho, obe endagaano yangye n'abantu, kuhamya ensi n'okubaganisa busya ebibanja ebyatsigirweho." 
Isaiah49:9 Haza ngambire embohe nti: Mushohore; n'abari omu mwirima nti: Nimwije aharikuhweza. Baryariira aha muhanda, babe nk'entaama zirikuriira aha nshozi z'emparamaata." 
Isaiah49:10 Tibarigira njara nari eiriho, nobu kwakuba okwokibwa ekibabo ky'omushana nari okwitwa ekibiga, ahabw'okuba Ogwo obagirira esaasi aryabeebembera, abahitsye aha nshuro z'amaizi." 
Isaiah49:11 Enshozi zangye ndyazirabyamu omuhanda, ntebeekanisize abantu bangye omuhanda rugyendwa." 
Isaiah49:12 Reeba, abamwe baryaruga hare, abandi barugye aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho n'aha burengyerwa-izooba, n'abandi barugye omu nsi ya Sinimu." 
Isaiah49:13 Iwe iguru 'we, yeshongore, iwe nsi we, yesiime, naimwe nshozi mwe, nimureegye ekyeshongoro, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho ahuumuriize abantu be, kandi aryagirira esaasi abantu be abarikubonabonesibwa." 
Isaiah49:14 Kwonka Siyooni neegira eti: Nyakubaho antsigireho, Nyakubaho wangye anyebirwe." 
Isaiah49:15 Mbwenu omukazi naabaasa kwebwa omwana we ou arikwontsya, n'okutagirira saasi omwana ou ayezaariire? Nangwa bo bakaabaasa kwebwa; kwonka nyowe tindikwebwa." 
Isaiah49:16 Reeba, nkusharwire aha biganja by'engaro zangye; ebigo byawe bintuura omu maisho." 
Isaiah49:17 Ab'okukwombeka busya nibaija juba; n'abaakucwekyereize bakakuhindura amatongo, batuntumukye." 
Isaiah49:18 Imutsya amaisho omagamagye, oreebe. Boona nibataaruuka, nibaija ahariiwe. Nyakubaho naagira ati: Niinyerahira, oryabajwara nk'eihunde, bakuhunde nk'omugore;" 
Isaiah49:19 ahabw'okuba emyanya yaawe y'amatongo eyaatsigirweho, n'ensi yaawe eyaacwekyereziibwe buzimazima, biryafundwamu abakutwiremu; kandi abaakuhindwire amatongo bakuze hare." 
Isaiah49:20 Abaana abaazairwe omu biro by'okufiisa kwawe baryakugambira omu kutu bati: Omwanya gutufundiire, otusherurire ogundi gw'okutuuramu." 
Isaiah49:21 Naiwe oryayebuuza oti: Owanzaariire aba baana n'oha? Nyowe ka naafiisize, nkabura okuzaara, nkaba encuubwa kandi ekizengyerezi, mbwenu owaayoroire aba n'oha? Nyowe ka naafiisize, nkabura okuzaara, nkaba encuubwa kandi ekizengyerezi, mbwenu owaayoroire aba n'oha? Ka naatsigaire nyeka, hati aba barugire hi?" 
Isaiah49:22 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Reeba, ndyaimukiza amahanga omukono gwangye, n'enganda nzeetese orurango rwangye, bareete batabani baawe, babatangatiire omu kifuba; na bahara baawe babaheekire aha mabega." 
Isaiah49:23 Abagabe baryaba baasho, bakworore, n'abaigarire baabo babe baanyoko, bakugaburire. Baryajuumara aha nsi barigatse omucuucu gw'aha bigyere byawe. Nibwo orimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho; kandi abaanyesiga kubaha emikono ku batarihemuka." 
Isaiah49:24 Mbwenu shi amamanzi nigabaasa kwakwa eminyago, nari abakwatsirwe omutegyeki enshaarizi kubamujuna?" 
Isaiah49:25 Buzimazima Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nangwa n'abakwatsirwe amamanzi baryaihwayo, n'abanyagirwe omutegyeki enshaarizi bamwakwe, ahabw'okuba ndyarwanisa abarikukurwanisa, njune abaana baawe." 
Isaiah49:26 Abarikukuhata ndyabariisa enyama y'omubiri gwabo, basinde eshagama yaabo nk'osinzire viino. Nibwo abantu boona barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho Omujuni waawe, kandi Omucunguzi waawe, Emanzi ya Yakobo." 
Isaiah50:1 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ebaruha ei naashendeise nyokoimwe eri nkahi? Nari shi n'oha omu barikuunyihuza, ou naabagurize? Manya mukatundwa ahabw'ebibi byanyu, nyokoimwe yaashendwa ahabw'ebicumuro byanyu." 
Isaiah50:2 Ahabw'enki obu naija kubajuna ntarashangireyo muntu? Nkyeeta hakabura owaayetaba! Nimugira ngu omukono gwangye ni mugufu, tigurikubaasa kubacungura? Nainga tiinyine maani g'okujuna? Reeba, ku nkabuka, nyomya enyanja, mpindura emigyera eihamba ry'omusheenyi; ebyenyanja byamwo ahabw'okuburwa amaizi biitwa eiriho, binuuka." 
Isaiah50:3 Nyiririmbya eiguru, riba nk'eryehumbikire ekiguniya." 
Isaiah50:4 Mukama Ruhanga ampabwire ebigambo by'abeegyesiibwe, ngu mbone kumanya oku ndaahangaane oruhire. Buri kasheeshe ansisiimura, kutega okutu kuhurira eki arikwija kumpabura." 
Isaiah50:5 Mukama Ruhanga anyigwire okutu, tinaagoma nkagaruka enyima." 
Isaiah50:6 Omugongo gwangye nkagutega abarikuunyasha, amatama naagatega abarikummaanyura ekireju. Tindaimire maisho abarikumpemura n'abarikuncwera amacwante." 
Isaiah50:7 Manya Mukama Ruhanga nampwera, nikyo ntarikushobererwa. Nikyo ngumiire aha maisho nk'eibaare ry'enkangabuye, kandi nimmanya ku ntariitwa nshoni." 
Isaiah50:8 Ahabw'okuba orikuntonganira ari haihi, Mbwenu n'oha oine eki arikuntonganisa? Naije tutongane. Orikuntabaariza ari nkahi? Naije ampikye haihi." 
Isaiah50:9 Reeba, Mukama Ruhanga nampwera. Mbwenu n'oha orikunsingisa orubanja? Reeba, boona baryacwanyagurika nk'ekijwaro kiriirwe ebiyenje." 
Isaiah50:10 Mbwenu n'oha omuriimwe orikutiina Nyakubaho, akoorobera ebi omuheereza we arikugamba, akagyendera omu mwirima atarikuhweza; kwonka akeesiga Nyakubaho, akeegamira Ruhanga we?" 
Isaiah50:11 Reeba, imwe abarikuhemba omuriro, mukaatsya ebicumurwa! Mugyende nimumurikirwa omuriro gwanyu, n'ogw'ebicumurwa bi mwakize! Okwo nikwo ndaabatwaze; mukabyama nimubonabona." 
Isaiah51:1 Imwe abarikwenda kujunwa, abarikusherura Nyakubaho, nimumpurire! Nimwijukye orukiri oru mwashorogotoirwemu, n'amabaare agu mwatemirweho." 
Isaiah51:2 Mureebe Aburahamu shoimwe na Saara owaabazaire. Manya obu naamweta, akaba ari encwekye; Haza naamuha omugisha, naamuzaarukanisa." 
Isaiah51:3 Mbwenu Nyakubaho aryahuumuriza Siyooni, n'emyanya yaayo yoona eyaabaire amatongo. Eihamba ryayo aryarigira nka Edeni, eihamba ryayo ry'omusheenyi arihindure omusiri gwa Nyakubaho; Haza Siyooni egyo ebemu okushemererwa n'okunanuka, n'ebyeshongoro by'okumpimbisa n'okunsiima." 
Isaiah51:4 Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, nimumpurire! Imwe ab'eihanga ryangye, nimuntegye okutu! Manya ndyashohoza eiteeka, njwisize amahanga omushana gw'obwinganisa bwangye." 
Isaiah51:5 Niinyija kwija juba mbazaahuure, kandi naashohoire kubajuna. Omukono gwangye guryategyeka amahanga. Ab'omu myegyeego y'enyanja n'ab'omu birwa bantegyereize n'ekihika kubajuna." 
Isaiah51:6 Nimwimutsye amaisho, mureebe eiguru, kandi mugainikye, mureebe ensi. Eiguru riryahwaho nk'omwika, n'ensi ekure nk'ekijwaro; abagitwiremu bafe nk'omukwikwi. Kwonka ndyaguma mbajune ebiro byona, ngumizemu nimbazaahuura." 
Isaiah51:7 Imwe abamanya ebihikire, bakagumya amateeka gangye aha mutima, nimumpurire! Mutatiina abarikubaherebura; kandi mutahahaazibwa abarikubajuma." 
Isaiah51:8 Manya bo ebiyenje biryabarya nk'ekijwaro, kooya ebarye nk'ebyoya by'entaama; kwonka imwe ndyaguma mbajune ebiro byona, ngumizemu nimbazaahuura." 
Isaiah51:9 Iwe mukono gwa Nyakubaho 'we, sisiimuka, sisiimuka, ogire enkubito! Sisiimuka nk'obwa ira, omu biro bya ira na ira! Tiiwe waatemagwire Rahabu, okacumita ekijoka kiri?" 
Isaiah51:10 Tiiwe waayomize enyanja, amaizi gaayo ag'engyezi gakeebaganisamu, okacwera abu waacungwire omuhanda gw'okurabamu?" 
Isaiah51:11 Mbwenu abu Nyakubaho yaacungwire baryagaruka, baije Siyooni nibeeshongora baine aha maisho okushemererwa okutahwaho. Baryashemererwa bananukye, enaku n'amaganya bikwate akakiro." 
Isaiah51:12 Ka niinye orikubahuumuriza, mbwenu ekirikukutiinisa omuntu ofa, ou muheru ye eri nk'ey'obunyaatsi ni ki?" 
Isaiah51:13 Haza okeebwa Nyakubaho Omuhangi waawe; owaabambire eiguru, akataho obuhamizo bw'ensi; reero okaguma noorenzya eizooba nootiina ekiniga ky'abarikukuhata, abeehayo kukucwekyereza?" 
Isaiah51:14 Hati oyeinamiriire ari enkwatwa, naija kurekurwa juba. Tarifa akaza okuzimu omu kiina kandi tariburwa kyokurya." 
Isaiah51:15 Manya niinye Mukama Ruhanga waawe, otabangura enyanja, ebingonzi byayo bikahoorera; kandi oyetwa Mukama ow'amahe." 
Isaiah51:16 Niinye naakusherekire omu kicuucu ky'omukono gwangye, nkabamba eiguru, nkataho obuhamizo bw'ensi; kandi nkagira aba Siyooni nti: Muri abantu bangye." 
Isaiah51:17 Iwe Yerusalemu, sisiimuka, oimukye oyemerere! Iwe ou Nyakubaho yaafubiire akakunyweisa ekikopo kya kashanga ye, okakinywa okakyekyenenkuriza, okagwererana." 
Isaiah51:18 Omu baana abu waazaire tiharimu w'okukwebembera, n'omu bu waayoroire tiharimu w'okukukwatira ekihimbo." 
Isaiah51:19 Ebi bihikiirizi byombi ebikuhikireho, mbwenu n'oha oraakuyaagire? Ensi yaawe ecwekyereire, yaaba eitongo, n'abantu baawe baitwa rurara n'enjara. Mbwenu n'oha oraakuhuumurize?" 
Isaiah51:20 Abaana baawe bagwire enshazi, barambiire omu nteeraniro z'emihanda nk'empara ekwatsirwe ekigoye. Bajuumikiirwe ekiniga kya Nyakubaho, ekikabuko kya Ruhanga waawe." 
Isaiah51:21 Mbwenu iwe orikubonabonesibwa, osinzire, kwonka otasinzire viino, hurira eki." 
Isaiah51:22 Nyakubaho Mukama Ruhanga waawe, orwana aha bantu be, naagira ati: Reeba, naakwiha omu ngaro ekikopo kirikugwereranisa, eki nkuhaire nkwiniire ekiniga. Tokikinywa bundi." 
Isaiah51:23 Naaza kukiha abaakubonaboneise, abaakugizire bati: Juumara, tukucwekanisizeho. Naiwe omugongo gwawe okagugira nk'ahansi, gukaba omuhanda gu barikurabamu." 
Isaiah52:1 Iwe Siyooni 'we, sisiimuka, siimuka oyeteere ebinyomyo. Iwe Yerusalemu, orurembo orurikwera, jwara ebijwaro byawe ebirungi, ahabw'okuba abatashazirwe n'abatashemeire tibarikwijamu bundi." 
Isaiah52:2 Iwe Yerusalemu enkwatwa, yekunkumure omucuucu! Iwe Siyooni enkwatwa, yeyuzye enkomo omu maraka!" 
Isaiah52:3 Manya Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mukagurwa busha, kandi muryacunguzibwa busha." 
Isaiah52:4 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Bwabiso abantu bangye bakaza Misiri kushuuhuukirayo; mbwenu Abaasiriya nibabaitira kubi busha. 
Isaiah52:5 Nyakubaho nikyo arikugirira ati: Mbwenu aha nteekirweho ki, kureeba abantu bangye nibanyagirwa busha? Nyakubaho naagira ati: Abarikubategyeka nibeeraata; barenzya eizooba nibangaya." 
Isaiah52:6 Nikyo abantu bangye barimmanyira eryo izooba, bakamanya ku niinye ndikugamba, Nyowe buzima." 
Isaiah52:7 Ebishi ni kirungi kureeba entumwa neereetana omu nshozi, ereetsire amakuru marungi g'okurangirira obusingye n'okuzaahuurwa! Neegambira Siyooni eti: Ruhanga waawe ari aha ngoma." 
Isaiah52:8 Hurira! Abarinzi baawe nibaimutsya amaraka, nibeeshongorera hamwe ahabw'okushemererwa; ahabw'okuba baryayereebera Nyakubaho naagaruka Siyooni." 
Isaiah52:9 Imwe matongo ga Yerusalemu 'mwe, nimureegye kumwe ekyeshongoro, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho ahuumuriize abantu be, yaacungura Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah52:10 Mukama Ruhanga waitu afungiize omukono gwe ogurikwera, kujuna abantu be, haza ab'aha muheru gw'ensi yoona baryakireeba." 
Isaiah52:11 Imwe abeekorera ebintu bya Nyakubaho, nimurugye Babulooni, nimurugyeyo mushohore. Mutakora aha kintu kyona ekitashemeire. Nimurugye ahagati yaarwo mweyeze." 
Isaiah52:12 Manya timurirugayo nimurahukiiriza, nobu kwakuba okugyenda nimuhunga; ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli niwe arikwija kuba abeebembeire, akabaza enyima naabarinda." 
Isaiah52:13 Reeba, omuheereza wangye aryagyenderwa gye, ahaisibwe, asingizibwe, kandi aheebwe ekitiinwa kingi." 
Isaiah52:14 Nk'oku baingi baamutangaariire ahabw'okureeba aha maisho ge hasiisikaire okukira ah'abantu boona, enshusha ye etakiri nk'ey'abantu," 
Isaiah52:15 nikwo aritangaaza amahanga maingi; abagabe bakeekwata aha munwa, bakareeba eki batakagambirwaga, kandi bakeetegyereza eki batakahuriraga." 
Isaiah53:1 N'oha oraikiriize eki tuhuriire, kandi n'oha ou Nyakubaho arashuuruuriire amaani ge?" 
Isaiah53:2 Manya ogwo muheereza akakurira omu maisho ga Nyakubaho nk'ekibyaire kito yaaba nk'omuzi oguri omu itaka ryomire. Akaba ataine oku arikushusha, nobu kwakuba okushemera aha maisho, ngu tumureebe; nari okugira oburungi bw'okureebwa, ngu tumwetengye." 
Isaiah53:3 Akagaywa, yaayangwa abantu, yaaba omuntu w'obujune, otuura naareeba enaku. Kandi nk'ou abantu baima amaisho akagaywa; naitwe titwamwetamu kaabuntu." 
Isaiah53:4 Buzimazima akeekorera enaku zaitu; yaayemera obusaasi bwaitu, Haza twateekateeka ngu Ruhanga niwe amuteire, akamwasha, akamubonabonesa." 
Isaiah53:5 Kwonka akahutaazibwa ahabw'ebicumuro byaitu, yaareebesibwa enaku ahabw'ebibi byaitu. Okuteerwa kwe nikwo kwatutambiire n'emihiririzi ye niyo yaatukirize." 
Isaiah53:6 Twena tukahaba nk'entaama, twateishuka; buri omwe yaatoora omuhanda gwe, Nyakubaho yaamutungikirira ebibi byaitu." 
Isaiah53:7 Akaitwa kubi, yaabonabonesibwa, kwonka tiyaateeza, yaaba nk'omwana gw'entaama ogurikutwarwa kwitwa; nari nk'oku entaama ehunama eri omu maisho g'abarikugishara ebyoya. Nawe nikwo ataraashamize kanwa ke." 
Isaiah53:8 Akaitwa kubi, yaacwerwa orubanja, baamutwara. Mbwenu omu b'obusingye bwe, n'oha owaateekateekire ngu akaihwa omu nsi y'abahuriire, yaitwa, yaitwa ahabw'ebicumuro by'abantu bangye?" 
Isaiah53:9 Bakamuteekateekyera okuziikwa hamwe n'enyabibi nobu araabe atarakozire by'obubisha, nobu kwakuba okugamba eby'obugobya; kwonka yaaziikwa omu kituuro ky'omutungi." 
Isaiah53:10 Manya Nyakubaho akasiima kumuhondagura, yaamusaasa, ngu ku araayeheyo kuba ekitambo ky'ebibi, areebe ab'oruzaaro rwe, airizeyo ebiro bye; kandi ebi Nyakubaho arikwenda bihikiiririzibwe omuriwe;" 
Isaiah53:11 haza areebe ebirugire omu kubonabona kwe, ananukye. Ogwo muheereza wangye ohikiriire, ahabw'okubonabonesibwa kwe aryahaisa baingi okuhikiirira, ayekorere ebibi byabo." 
Isaiah53:12 N'ahabw'ekyo ndyamuha omugabo hamwe n'abakuru, abagane eminyago hamwe n'amamanzi, ahabw'okuba akaheerayo kimwe amagara ge, yaafa; yaikiriza kutwazibwa nk'omusiisi. Yaayekorera ebibi by'abaingi, kandi yaatonganira abasiisi." 
Isaiah54:1 Iwe ngumba 'we, otakazaaraga, yeshongore! Iwe otakarumwaga, reega ekyeshongoro, oteere akaari! Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho naagira ati: Abaana b'omukazi otsigirweho ni baingi okukira ab'oine iba." 
Isaiah54:2 Hangusya eihema ryawe; oreegye emikingo y'oburaaro bwawe. Otatentebuka. Nyurura emiguha, ohamye enkondo zaawe." 
Isaiah54:3 Ahabw'okuba oryayeshandiza aha rubaju rwa buryo n'orwa bumosho; baijukuru baawe bakubuure amahanga; n'endembo eziri emishaka zituurwemu abantu. 
Isaiah54:4 Otatiina, ahabw'okuba torihemuka, kandi otashoberwa, ahabw'okuba toriitwa nshoni. Manya oryayebwa enshoni ezi waagizire ogabukire; orekye kwijuka ebijumo bi baakuherebwire ori omufaakazi." 
Isaiah54:5 Manya Omuhangi waawe, oyetwa Mukama ow'amahe, niwe baro. Kandi Nyakwera wa Isiraeli oyetwa Ruhanga w'ensi yoona niwe Mucunguzi waawe." 
Isaiah54:6 Nyakubaho akwetsire ori nk'omukazi otsigirweho, akagira obujune; nk'omukazi ogabukire ou bashenzire. Kwonka mbwenu Ruhanga waawe naagira ati:" 
Isaiah54:7 Mbaire nkutsigireho okumara akaanya kakye, kwonka shi niinyija kukugirira esaasi, nkutaaruure." 
Isaiah54:8 Ahabw'okukugirira ekiniga kingi, mmazire akaanya kakye nkwimire amaisho; kwonka mbwenu ahabwa rukundo yangye etahararuka, niinyija kukugirira esaasi; nikwo Nyakubaho Omucunguzi waawe arikugira." 
Isaiah54:9 Kandi ati: Manya ekyo ahariinye kiri nk'eky'obwa Noa; obu naarahira ku amaizi g'omu biro bye gatarigaruka kushandaara omu nsi. Na mbwenu ndahiire ku ntarikugirira kiniga bundi, kandi ku ntarikukabukira." 
Isaiah54:10 Enshozi nizibaasa kurugaho, n'ebibungo nibibaasa kuhiguka; kwonka rukundo yangye etahararuka terikurugaho; n'endagaano yangye y'obusingye teriihwaho; nikwo Nyakubaho okwiniire esaasi arikugamba." 
Isaiah54:11 Iwe rurembo rurikubonabonesibwa 'we, orurikuzongazongibwa omuyaga rutahuumuriziibwe, reeba, amabaare gaawe ndyagataho amabara marungi, emisingi yaawe ngyombekyese ag'amakangabuye." 
Isaiah54:12 Amatungu gaawe ndyagombekyesa amabaare g'ebyeshusha, amarembo gaawe ngombekyese ag'oburimbi, n'orugo rwawe rwona ndwombekyese ag'emyengyengye." 
Isaiah54:13 Abaana baawe boona, Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye ndibeegyesa, kandi baryagogyeera munonga," 
Isaiah54:14 okukora eby'obwinganisa nikwo kurikuhamya. Oryaba otakihatwa, otakiine ki orikutiina; otakiitwa bwoba, ebirikubukwitsa bikuri hare." 
Isaiah54:15 Ku harigira owaahurura kukurwanisa, tiinye kiriba kirugireho. Weena oriija kukurwanisa, aryakuzira." 
Isaiah54:16 Reeba, niinye naahangire omuheesi ojugutirira amakara omu iziiko, akaheesha eby'okurwanisa, buri kimwe kiine omurimo gwakyo. Kandi niinye naahangire omuhwerekyereza w'okucwekyereza." 
Isaiah54:17 Kwonka tiharibaho ky'okurwanisa ekiheesirwe kukurwanisa, ekirikubaasa; kandi boona abariimuka kutongana naiwe, oryabasinga. Ogwo nigwo guriba omugabo gw'abaheereza ba Nyakubaho. Ndyabarwanaho, mbahe obusinguzi; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Isaiah55:1 Imwe mwena abaine eiriho, nimwije munywe amaizi! Naimwe mwena abataine mpiiha, nimwije mugure, ebyokurya murye! Nimwije mugure viino n'amate mutarikwihura mpiiha, kandi mutarikuramuzana." 
Isaiah55:2 Ahabw'enki nimuhayo empiiha zaanyu kugura ebitari byokurya, kandi nimuhendekyera ebitarikubahaazya? Mbwenu nimumpurire mutaireho omutima, murye ebirungi; haza munanurwe eby'ebishaju." 
Isaiah55:3 Nimutegye okutu, mwije ahi ndi. Nimuhurire, mubone kugira amagara. Reero nkore naimwe endagaano etarihwaho, eya rukundo yangye etahararuka, ei naagiriire Daudi." 
Isaiah55:4 Reeba, mmutaireho kuba kareebi aha nganda zoona; omwebembezi kandi omutegyeki w'amahanga." 
Isaiah55:5 Mbwenu oryayeta amahanga agu otakamanyaga; haza ago agatakakumanyaga garyaija gakwehongyere; ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga waawe, Nyakwera wa Isiraeli, akuhaire ekitiinwa." 
Isaiah55:6 Musherure Nyakubaho naakiboneka, mumutakire akiri haihi." 
Isaiah55:7 Omuntu enyabibi arekye emitwarize ye; n'otahikiriire arekyere aho ebi abaire naateekateeka, Agarukire Mukama Ruhanga waitu, abone kumugirira embabazi n'okumusaasirira kimwe." 
Isaiah55:8 Manya ebiteekateeko byangye tikyo kimwe n'ebyanyu; n'emitwarize yaanyu tikyo kimwe n'eyangye, nikwo Nyakubaho arikugira." 
Isaiah55:9 Nk'oku eiguru riri aha iguru okukira ensi, nikwo emitwarize yangye n'ebiteekateeko byangye birikukirira kimwe ebyanyu." 
Isaiah55:10 Manya nk'oku enjura n'orubaare biruga omu iguru bikagwa, bitagarukyeyo, kureka bikaitirira ensi, bikareetera ebihingirwe kumera n'okutooka; bikaha omubibi embibo, n'omuri ebyokurya;" 
Isaiah55:11 nikwo ekigambo kyangye ekinduga omu kanwa kitarinfeera busha, kureka kiryahikiiriza eki naakiteekateekyeire, kigire obuhiire omu bi nkitumiire." 
Isaiah55:12 Manya muryarugayo mushemereirwe, mwebemberwe mwine obusingye. Enshozi n'ebibungo ebibari omu maisho biryareega ekyeshongoro; emiti yoona ey'omu ishwa eteere omu ngaro." 
Isaiah55:13 Omu mwanya gw'emiti y'amahwa hameremu kaarwenda, omu gw'emikwatangwe hameremu emishebeya. Haza ekyo kibe akamanyiso akatarihwaho, akarikwijutsya eki Nyowe Nyakubaho nkozire." 
Isaiah56:1 Mukama naagira ati: Mugume mukore eby'obwinganisa n'ebihikire, ahabw'okuba niinyija kubajuna juba, nyorekye oku ndi ohikiriire." 
Isaiah56:2 Omuntu orikukora ebyo akabihamya, akaguma naarinda Sabato atarikugishiisha, kandi naazibira omukono gwe kukora ekibi, aine omugisha." 
Isaiah56:3 Omunyaihanga oyehongyeire Nyakubaho atarigira ati: Buzimazima Nyakubaho aryanshoroora, ndekye kumuramya ndi hamwe n'abantu be. N'omushaahu atarigira ati: Reeba, nyowe ndi ekiti kyomire!" 
Isaiah56:4 Manya Nyakubaho naagira ati: Abashaahu abarinda Sabato zangye, abasiima kukora ebi ndikwenda, bakahamira aha ndagaano yangye," 
Isaiah56:5 ndyabaha ekirikukira okuzaara abaana b'aboojo n'ab'abaishiki; bagume nibaijukwa, kandi baine eiziina rirungi omuri Nyaruju yangye, n'omu bikaari byangye. Ndyabaha eiziina eririgumaho ritarugireho." 
Isaiah56:6 Kandi abanyamahanga abariinyehongyera, bakampeereza, bakankunda, bakaba abairu bangye, boona abarinda Sabato batagishiishe, bakahamira aha ndagaano yangye," 
Isaiah56:7 Nyowe Nyakubaho ndyabareeta aha rushozi rwangye orurikwera, mbahe okushemererwa bari omu nju yangye y'okushabiramu. Ndyaikiriza ebitambo byabo ebicwekize n'ebindi bitambo ebi barireeta aha itambiro ryangye. Ahabw'okuba enju yangye eryayetwa ey'okushabirwamu ab'amahanga goona." 
Isaiah56:8 Mukama Ruhanga orikutaaruura encuubwa za Isiraeli naagira ati: Nkiine abandi b'okumutaaruurira, mbongyere aha bantu be abaaherize kutaaruurwa." 
Isaiah56:9 Imwe nyamaishwa z'omu ishwa 'mwe, enyamaishwa zoona ez'omu kibira, nimwije mushonshomere." 
Isaiah56:10 Abarinzi be n'empumi. Boona tibaine ki barikumanya. Boona ni nk'embwa zikwatsirwe aha munwa, ezitarikubaasa kumoka; eziroota zikabyama, zikakunda kuhungira." 
Isaiah56:11 Eego, n'embwa z'omururu ezitahaaga, kandi n'abariisa batarikwetegyereza. Boona bateishukire omuhanda, baatoora eyaabo, buri omwe naitanira eby'okwegasira wenka." 
Isaiah56:12 Nibagira bati: Nimurugyeyo twenywere viino, twetiihiikye amakuuta! Na nyencakare tutwaze nk'eri izooba, tugakimbuure, turengyesereze." 
Isaiah57:1 Abahikiriire nibahwerekyerera, habura owaakyeetaho; abarikutiina Ruhanga bamarwaho, hataine orikukyetegyereza. Manya omuntu ohikiriire aba aihirwe omu kabi," 
Isaiah57:2 atungire obusingye. Abagira emitwarize ehikire bafa gye. 
Isaiah57:3 Kwonka imwe batabani b'omurogikazi, abaazairwe enshambani mukataho okwehindura baamaraaya, nimwije aha, mucwerwe orubanja." 
Isaiah57:4 Mbwenu ou murikugaaniiza n'oha? N'oha ou murikurangaariza akanwa, mukasheka nimushohoza orurimi? Tiimwe abaana b'ebibi oruzaaro rw'enyabishuba?" 
Isaiah57:5 Imwe ababugumwamu obushambani muri omu mivure ahansi y'emirinzi; kandi abaitira abaana baanyu omu mpanga, omu biharamanga by'enkiri?" 
Isaiah57:6 Mbwenu iwe Isiraeli, omugabo gwawe guri omu mabaare g'omu ruhanga agarikuterera. Ago buzima nigo mubagano gwawe! Nigo waashukiire emitoijo y'ebyokunywa, okagatoijera ebitambo by'esaano. Noogira ngu ebyo nibibaasa kuunyikaikanisa?" 
Isaiah57:7 Ekitanda kyawe okakiteera aha rushozi ruraingwa orutunguukire, kandi okwo niyo waagiire kutambira ebitambo." 
Isaiah57:8 Okata akamanyiso enyima y'orwigi n'aha nti z'emiryango, wantsigaho, waayaruura ekitanda kyawe, waakihanguhiza nkunzi zaawe, waakora endagaano kubyama nabo, waayemara ak'aha mutima." 
Isaiah57:9 Okagyenda oyesiigire amajuta nootaamirana emigaju, waaza kuramya Moleki. Okatuma entumwa zaawe hare, zaahika n'okuzimu owa Nyamuteza." 
Isaiah57:10 Okaruhibwa orugyendo ruraingwa, kwonka tiwaagira oti: Naayeruhiza busha! Kureka waagarukwamu amaani, tiwaagwa nshazi." 
Isaiah57:11 Mbwenu n'oha owaakwitsize obwoba okatiina, waaza kubeiha otaanyijukye, kandi otaanyeteho? Mbwenu shi tindamazire omwanya muhango mpunami, haza otantiine?" 
Isaiah57:12 Hati nu, ka nyije nkwerure nobu oraabe noogira ngu ohikiriire kandi oine emitwarize mirungi. Haza oreebe ebyo ku bitakwiniire mugasho." 
Isaiah57:13 Ku oraatakye, ndeebe ebyo bishushani bi waashangurwize, yaaba nibiija kukujuna! Manya omuyaga nigwija kubitwara, omwitsyo gubituntumure. Kwonka onyesiga aryakubuura ensi, ahungure orushozi rwangye orurikwera." 
Isaiah57:14 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Muteho omuhanda, muteho omuhanda, mugutebeekanise murimbure enkongi zoona omu muhanda gw'abantu bangye." 
Isaiah57:15 Manya Rukiraboona ow'aha iguru otuuraho ebiro byona, oyetwa Orikwera naagira ati: Nyowe ntuura omu mwanya gw'aha iguru ogurikwera, kandi ntuura hamwe n'omuntu oine omutima gucureire ogw'eteisize, ngu mbone kuhimbuura emitima y'abacureezi abeeteisize." 
Isaiah57:16 Manya tinditongana ebiro byona, kandi tindiguma nyine ekiniga, ahabw'okuba niinye mpanga emitima, nkagitamu omwitsyo gw'amagara. Ku naakutwaza ntyo, emitima ei naahangire ekancwekyererera omu maisho." 
Isaiah57:17 Nkagwisibwa kubi ekibi ky'okururuuha kwe, naamuteera, naamwima amaisho mmugwereirwe kubi, Haza yaagumizamu kugoma nk'oku arikwenda." 
Isaiah57:18 Emitwarize ye naagireebire, kwonka niinyija kumutambira. Ndyamwebembera kandi mmuhuumurize hamwe n'abarikucura nawe." 
Isaiah57:19 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ndyaha obusingye abantu boona aba hare n'aba haihi mbatambire. 
Isaiah57:20 Kwonka abantu enyabibi ni nk'enyanja erikwecunda etarikucureera, ei amaizi gaayo gaimukiiriza ebyondo n'omushaayo." 
Isaiah57:21 Abantu enyabibi tibagira busingye; nikwo Ruhanga wangye arikugamba. 
Isaiah58:1 Yamuza, otazinda eiraka, ranguuza nk'enzamba; ogambire butunu abantu bangye ab'omuryango gwa Yakobo ebicumuro byabo n'ebibi byabo." 
Isaiah58:2 Eego, buri izooba bansherura nibenda kumanya emitwarize yangye; okashusha oti n'eihanga erikora ebihikiriire, eritatsigisibwa kukuratira ebiragiro bya Ruhanga waabo. Baanyebuuzaho kubashoboorora ebihikiriire, kandi bakunda kwehitsya Ruhanga." 
Isaiah58:3 Nibambuuza bati: Ahabw'enki twesiibizekwo, otakyeeteho; kandi twebonaboneise, tiwaakitaho mutima? Manya aha izooba ri mwesiibyakwo, mwesherurira eby'okwejaramya, kandi muganzya abarikubakorera." 
Isaiah58:4 Reeba, okwesiibyakwo kwanyu kuba okutongana, okurwana n'okuteerana entomi z'akabi. Okwesiibyakwo kwanyu nk'okw'eri izooba, tikurikubaasa kureetera okushaba kwanyu kuhurirwa omu iguru." 
Isaiah58:5 Mbwenu okwo nikwo kwesiibyakwo oku nyenda? Oku omuntu arenzya eizooba naayebonabonesa? N'okw'omuntu kukondogoza nk'ekibingo, akeeyarira ekiguniya kimaamagiziibweho eiju? Okwo nikwo murikweta okwesiibyakwo aha izooba eri Nyakubaho asiima?" 
Isaiah58:6 Okwesiibyakwo oku Nyowe nsiima t'oku; okuyuzya emiguha y'abarikwitwa kubi, okukomoorora abatairwe omu nkomo, okurekura abarikuhatwa bakeegyendera; n'okuhenda emigamba yoona?" 
Isaiah58:7 T'okuha omunyanjara aha byokurya byawe, okataasya omu nju yaawe abanaku bataine buraaro, okureeba ojwaire busha okamujweka, kandi okareka kwehuzya abaanyu?" 
Isaiah58:8 Obwo nibwo oryaka nk'omushekye; obuhuta bwawe bukarahuka kukira; okuhikiirira kwawe kukakwebembera, n'ekitiinwa kya Nyakubaho kikakuza enyima kukurinda." 
Isaiah58:9 Haza obwo oryayeta Nyakubaho, akwetabe, omutakire, akugire ati: Ndi aha. Ku oryemaramu okuhata abantu, n'okubatunga orukumu, n'okugamba kubi," 
Isaiah58:10 ku oryetsigisaho ebyokurya byawe waabiha omujara, waamarira obukyene abarikubonabonesibwa, nibwo oriruga omu mwirima, okaakirwa omushana; ekizima kyawe kikaba eihangwe." 
Isaiah58:11 Kandi Nyakubaho aryaguma naakurinda, akuhaazye ebirungi, agumye amagufa gaawe; obe nk'omusiri ogurikwitirirwa, nari nk'enshuro ei amaizi gaayo gatooma." 
Isaiah58:12 N'amatongo gaawe aga ira oryagombekamu busya, nooyombekyera aha misingi ya baashwenkuru eya ira na ira. Otyo oyetwe omuhunduuzi w'ebyasheenyukire, ogarwireho amaju omu matongo." 
Isaiah58:13 Ku orireka kuribatiirira Sabato, otaakora byawe ahabwawe aha kiro kyangye ekirikwera; Sabato egyo waagyeeta ey'okushemerererwaho, kandi ekyo kiro kya Nyakubaho waakyeeta eky'ekitiinwa; ku orikigirira enshoni otaatwaza nk'oku orikwenda, otaayeyendeza byawe wenka nari okugaaniira ebitaine mujamo;" 
Isaiah58:14 nibwo oryesiimira omuriinye Nyakubaho, nkakuha okutoogoogyera aha mitwe y'ebibungo by'omu nsi yoona; nkakuhunguza obutaka bwa Yakobo shoimwe; okananuka. Ekyo Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naakigamba." 
Isaiah59:1 Murekye kugira ngu Nyakubaho aine omukono mugufu, tarikubaasa kujuna; nari ngu afiire amatu, tarikubaasa kuhurira;" 
Isaiah59:2 Kureka ebicumuro byanyu nibyo bibataaniise na Ruhanga waanyu; n'ebibi byanyu nibyo bimureeteire kubaima amaisho, akanga kubahurira." 
Isaiah59:3 Manya emikono yaanyu esiisirwe okwita abantu, engaro zaanyu zihagaziibwe ebicumuro. Eminwa yaanyu neegamba ebishuba, n'orurimi rwanyu niruhwihwitsa eby'obugobya." 
Isaiah59:4 Tihariho orikutabaaza eby'oburyo, tihariho orikutongana eby'amazima. Kureka nibeesiga okwetonganira ebitaine muhoho, babeiha. Batyo babaka enda z'eitima, bazaara enaku." 
Isaiah59:5 Nibaatira amahuri g'encwera, baruka orububi rw'orutangura, owaarya amahuri gaabo afa, eihuri rikyatwa, hatimbiramu encwera." 
Isaiah59:6 Embubi zaabo tiziribaasa kurugwamu ebijwaro, abantu bakabijwara. Ebi bakora n'ebitahikire, engaro zaabo bazikoresa eby'obwinazi." 
Isaiah59:7 Bairukisa ebigyere byabo kukora ebibi, beehuuta kusheesha eshagama y'abataine rubanja. Ebiteekateeko byabo biijwire ebibi! Ei baza yoona, batsiga baita, baahwerekyereza." 
Isaiah59:8 Tibamanya ekyeetwa obusingye, n'ebi bakora tibibamu mazima. Batoora emihanda ekiikami, owaagirabamu taba buhooro." 
Isaiah59:9 N'ahabw'ekyo eby'obwinganisa bituri hare, n'eby'okuhikiirira titurikujwana nabyo. Ku turikwenda omushana, tushanga turi omu mwirima, tukyenda kuhweza, tushanga turi omu kizima." 
Isaiah59:10 Tutyo tugyenda nitukorakoza aha kisiika nk'empumi, tubandagira nk'abafiire amaisho. Tuteera entsibo omu ihangwe nk'omu rwita waabo, tukiba turi omu b'amaani maingi, tuba nk'abafiire." 
Isaiah59:11 Twena nitutsinda nk'edubu, tuganya nituhuuma nk'enkombe. Tutegyereza okukorerwa eby'obwinganisa, kwonka bibura; Twine amatsiko g'okujunwa, kwonka kuturi hare." 
Isaiah59:12 Ahabw'okuba ebicumuro byaitu bikanyire munonga omu maisho gaawe, ebibi byaitu nibitushinja. Buzimazima ebicumuro byaitu bitwezingiriire, kandi nitwemanya ku tutahikiriire." 
Isaiah59:13 Nitucumura twehakana Mukama, twanga kukuratira Ruhanga waitu, Tugamba eby'okuhata abandi n'eby'okukugomera, Tugunja ebishuba, kandi tubigamba twihire aha mutima." 
Isaiah59:14 Eby'obwinganisa binagirwe enyima n'eby'okuhikiirira bituri hare; ahabw'okuba abantu tibaakigira mazima ahi bateeraniire; kandi tibaakyenda kukora ebihikire. 
Isaiah59:15 Amazima tigaakibaho. Orikureka ebibi, bamwoya. Okwo kutagira bwinganisa Nyakubaho akureebire, haza kwamugwisa kubi." 
Isaiah59:16 Nyakubaho akareeba hatariho muntu w'okubajuna, kandi yaatangaara kureeba hatariho ow'okubatonganira, yaaba niwe yaakoresa enkubito y'omukono gwe kumusinguza, n'okuhikiirira kwe kwamuhangaana." 
Isaiah59:17 Akajwara okuhikiirira nk'ekyooma ky'okwekingiza aha kifuba, yaajwara omu mutwe enkofiira y'okujuna, kandi yaajwara ekanzu y'okuhooza enzigu, reero yaayehumbika omunagiro gw'eihato rye." 
Isaiah59:18 Nk'oku baakozire, nawe nikwo aribazimuurira. Ababisha be aryabaitsa kashanga, abazigu be abahoore; nangwa n'abari omu nsi za hare." 
Isaiah59:19 Nibwo ab'oburengyerwa-izooba barimutiina; ab'oburugwa-izooba bakatiina obushoboorozi bwe. Manya aryaija nk'omugyera gurikuhimintika, naateerwa omuhimbo Mutima wa Nyakubaho," 
Isaiah59:20 Mpaho aije Siyooni ari Omucunguzi w'aba Yakobo abeegarukiremu, bakaruga omu bibi; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Isaiah59:21 Kandi Nyakubaho naagira ati: Egi niyo ndagaano ei ndikuragaana nabo, Mutima wangye ari ahariiwe, n'ebigambo byangye ebi naata omu kanwa kaawe tibirikuruga mu kanwa, nobu kwakuba okuruga omu k'abaana baawe, nari omu ka baijukuru baawe, okwiha hati n'okuhitsya ebiro byona, Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Isaiah60:1 Iwe Yerusalemu, imuka oyakaayakane, ahabw'okuba omushana gwawe gujwire, ekitiinwa kya Nyakubaho kyakwakira" 
Isaiah60:2 Manya omwirima guryashweka ensi, omwirima ndindindi gushwekye amahanga; kwonka Nyakubaho aryakwakiraho, ekitiinwa kye kikureebekyeho." 
Isaiah60:3 Amahanga garyaija omu mushana gwawe, n'abagabe baije omu kwakayakana kw'omushekye gwawe." 
Isaiah60:4 Imutsya amaisho, omagamagye, haza oreebe. Boona nibashanguruka ni baija ahu ori. Batabani baawe baryaruga hare, na bahara baawe baije bakiikiirwe," 
Isaiah60:5 obwo nibwo orireeba okashemuuka, omutima gwawe gukagurukyeera, okashemererwa; ahabw'okuba eby'obutungi bw'omu mayanja biryakugarukira; eby'obutungi ebirikuruga omu mahanga bikwizire." 
Isaiah60:6 Amasyo g'engamira garyakushweka, Ab'aha ngamira nto eza Midiyani n'eza Eefa n'ezirikuruga Sheeba baije ahu ori, bareetsire ezaabu n'obubaani, nibeeshongora eby'okusingiza Nyakubaho." 
Isaiah60:7 Amasyo g'entaama za Kedari goona baryagakuteeraniraho; empaya z'entaama eza Nebayooti bazikureetere, ozikore nk'oku orikwenda; ziryatambirwa aha itambiro ryangye, zibe ekitambo ekirikusiimwa; haza mpaise Nyaruju yangye ekitiinwa." 
Isaiah60:8 Ni baahi abo abarikusheneneka nk'ebicu, abari nk'enkombe zirikugaruka omu byashuri byazo?" 
Isaiah60:9 Manya ab'omu birwa baryantegyereza; emeeri za Tarushiishi zibe nizo zaabanza kureeta abantu baawe nizibaiha hare, baine efeeza n'ezaabu kuhaisa Mukama Ruhanga waawe, Nyakwera wa Isiraeli, ekitiinwa, ahabw'okuba akuhaisize ekitiinwa." 
Isaiah60:10 Abanyamahanga baryayombeka ebigo byawe, abagabe baabo bakuheereze. Ahabw'okuba nkakuteera nkwiniire ekiniga, mbwenu nkugiriire embabazi naakusaasira." 
Isaiah60:11 Amarembo gaawe garyaguma gaigwire, tigarigira bu gakingirwe nyomushana na nyekiro; abantu babone kukureetera eby'obutungi ebirikuruga omu mahanga, beebembeirwe abagabe omu mishorongo." 
Isaiah60:12 Ahabw'okuba amahanga n'ensi z'obugabe ebiryanga kukugaragira, biryahwerekyerera; buzimazima ago mahanga garyacwekyererezibwa kimwe." 
Isaiah60:13 Emiti mirungi ya Lebanooni, kaarwenda emiziko, n'emiryohe baryagireeta kugihundisa Nyaruju yangye Erikwera, mbone kuhaisa endibatiro yangye ekitiinwa." 
Isaiah60:14 Batabani b'abaakuhatsire baryaija bakutsimbire amaju, n'abaakugayire boona bajuumare aha bigyere byawe, Haza bakwete orurembo rwa Nyakubaho, Siyooni ya Nyakwera wa Isiraeli." 
Isaiah60:15 Nobu oraabe waatsigirweho okangwa, okabura orikukurabamu; ndyakuhindura ow'ekitiinwa ebiro byona, oshemererwe, okuhitsya ryari na ryari." 
Isaiah60:16 Oryanywa amate garikuruga omu mahanga, oyonkye abagabe; haza omanye ku Nyowe Nyakubaho ndi Omujuni waawe, kandi Omucunguzi waawe Ow'amaani, owa Yakobo." 
Isaiah60:17 Omu mwanya gw'emiringa ndyakureetera ezaabu, omu gw'ekyoma nkureetere efeeza. Omu mwanya gw'embaaho ndeete emiringa, n'omu mwanya gw'amabaare, ntemu ebyoma. Obusingye nibwo ndihindura omureeberezi waawe, okuhikiirira kukaba omutegyeki waawe." 
Isaiah60:18 Omu nsi yaawe tiharihurirwamu by'obwinazi, nobu kwakuba okucwekyereza, n'okuhwerekyereza omunda y'emyatano yaawe. Engo zaawe oryazeeta Kujuna; amarembo gaawe ogeete Kuhimbisa." 
Isaiah60:19 Eizooba riryaba ritakikujwisiza mushana gwaryo nyomushana, n'okwezi kutakikwakiza mukyeera gwakwo nyekiro; ahabw'okuba nyowe Mukama Ruhanga waawe niinye ndiguma ninkumurikira ebiro byona, ekitiinisa kyangye kikakwakira." 
Isaiah60:20 Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye ndikumurikira ebiro byona, nkaguma ninkuhwezesa okukira eizooba n'okwezi, ebiro by'okuganya kwawe bikahwaho." 
Isaiah60:21 Abantu baawe boona baryaba abahikiriire, bakubuure ensi ebe eyaabo obutwire bwona, babe omutookwa gu naayebyariire n'engaro zangye kumpaisa ekitiinwa." 
Isaiah60:22 Orikukira boona obuto aryarugwamu oruganda, n'orikukira boona kuba ehuuru arugwemu eihanga ry'amaani. Manya niinye Nyakubaho; ekyo ndyarahuka kukikora obunaku bwakyo bwahika." 
Isaiah61:1 Mutima wa Mukama Ruhanga ari ahariinye, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akansiiga amajuta, yantuma kugambira abooro amakuru marungi, kushemba abahuruutukire omutima, kwigurira embohe eziri omu kihome," 
Isaiah61:2 kurangirira omwaka gwa Nyakubaho ogw'embabazi, n'eizooba eri Ruhanga waitu arihooreraho enzigu; kuhuumuriza boona abarikuganya," 
Isaiah61:3 n'okuha abarikuganyira omuri Siyooni ebishaba by'ebiryabyo omu mwanya gw'eiju, amajuta g'okubareetera okushemererwa, omu mwanya gw'okucura; kubaha omuagiro gw'okwesiima, omu mwanya gw'okugira omutima gw'obujune; ngu babone kwetwa emiti ehikiriire, ei Nyakubaho yaabyaire kumuhaisa ekitiinwa." 
Isaiah61:4 Baryayombeka endembo za ira ezaasheenyukire, baimutsye amaju agaabaire gaacwekire amatongo; Baryahunduuza endembo ezaashenyirwe, ezimazire emyaka n'emyaka ziri amatongo." 
Isaiah61:5 Abanyamahanga baryabeehongyera, bariise amasyo g'entaama zaanyu; abantu enduga mahanga babahingire, kandi basharire emisiri yaanyu y'emizaabibu." 
Isaiah61:6 Haza imwe mwetwe abahongyerezi ba Nyakubaho, abantu babagambeho ku muri abaheereza ba Ruhanga waitu, munanurwe eby'obutungi ebirikuruga omu mahanga, mubyehimbisizemu." 
Isaiah61:7 Mbwenu ahabw'okuba mukahemurwa, mwaitwa enshoni emirundi ebiri, naanye ndyabaha omugabo gw'emirundi ebiri, mutuure omu nsi yaanyu nimushemererwa ebiro byona." 
Isaiah61:8 Manya Nyowe Nyakubaho nkunda eby'oburyo, kandi nyanga okunyaga n'okukora ebitahikire. N'ahabw'ekyo omu mazima ndyazimuurira abantu bangye, nkore nabo endagaano etarihwaho." 
Isaiah61:9 Baijukuru baabo baryarangaanwa omu mahanga, ab'oruzaaro rwabo bamanywe omu bantu b'enganda nyingi, abaribareeba boona babamanye ku bari eihanga eri Ruhanga yaahaire omugisha." 
Isaiah61:10 Mbwenu ka nshemerererwe omuri Mukama, nyesiimire omuri Ruhanga wangye; ahabw'okuba ampumbikire ebijwaro by'okujuna, yanjweka bushuuti y'okuhikiirira, nk'oku kishwera ayehunda ekishaba ky'ebirabyo, kishwerwa akajwara amahunde." 
Isaiah61:11 Nk'oku ensi emeza emitookwa, omusiri gukameza ebigubyairwemu, nikwo Mukama Ruhanga aribaisaho okuhikiirira n'okumuhimbisa, amahanga goona gakakireeba." 
Isaiah62:1 Tindihunama ahabwa Siyooni, kandi tindihuumura ahabwa Yerusalemu, okuhitsya obu eby'okuhikiirira byayo biryaka nk'omushekye, n'okujunwa kwayo kukaaka nk'orumuri." 
Isaiah62:2 Amahanga garyareeba obusinguzi bwawe; abagabe boona bareebe ekitiinwa kyawe, haza oyetwe eiziina risya eri Nyakubaho arikweta." 
Isaiah62:3 Oryaba ekirunga kirungi omu ngaro za Nyakubaho, n'eihunde ry'obugabe omu ngaro za Ruhanga waawe." 
Isaiah62:4 Oryaba otakyeetwa owaatsigirweho, n'ensi yaawe etakyeetwa mushaka; kureka oryayetwa enkundwakazi, n'ensi yaawe eyetwe oshweirwe; ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akushemerereirwe, yaaba nk'oshweire ensi yaawe." 
Isaiah62:5 Manya nk'oku omutsigazi ashwera omwishiki oshugaine, n'owaakwombekire nikwo arikushwera. Kandi nk'oku kishwera ashemerererwa kishwerwa, nikwo Ruhanga waawe arikushemerererwa." 
Isaiah62:6 Iwe Yerusalemu 'we, nkata abarinzi aha ngo zaawe, tibarihunama nyomushana na nyekiro. Imwe abaijutsya Nyakubaho ebi yaaraganiise, mutahuumura;" 
Isaiah62:7 kandi mutamureka akahuumura, okuhitsya obu arigaruraho Yerusalemu, akagireetera kuhimbisibwa omu nsi." 
Isaiah62:8 Nyakubaho arahiire naimutsya omukono gwe gwa buryo kandi ogw'amaani ati: Buzimazima tindigaruka kuha abazigu baawe engano zaawe kuzirya; kandi abanyamahanga tibarigaruka kunywa viino yaawe ei waahendekyeire; 
Isaiah62:9 Kureka abarizishaaruura nibo barizirya bakahimbisa Nyakubaho; kandi abarishoroma emizaabibu nibo barinywera viino yaayo omu bikaari by'omwanya gwangye ogurikwera. 
Isaiah62:10 Nimurabe, nimurabe omu marembo, mutebeekanisize abantu omuhanda! Mukore omuhanda rugyendwa, mugwihemu amabaare! Haza mwimukize amahanga orurango." 
Isaiah62:11 Reeba, Nyakubaho arangiriire okuhitsya aha muheru gw'ensi ati: Mugambire Siyooni muti: Reeba, omujuni waawe naija, aine ebihembo, kandi ayebembeize enzimuurano." 
Isaiah62:12 Haza baryayetwa abarikwera abu Nyakubaho acungwire. Naiwe Yerusalemu oryayetwa enkundwakazi, orurembo oru Nyakubaho ataratsigireho." 
Isaiah63:1 N'oha ogwo orikuruga Bozira ey'omuri Edomu ajwaire ebirikutukura eby'ekitiinwa, naagyendesa amaani n'engoga? Niinye Nyakubaho orikurangirira eby'obusinguzi kandi ow'amaani kujuna." 
Isaiah63:2 Ahabw'enki emyenda yaawe neetukura, ebijwaro byawe bikashusha eby'orikunyuukira omu inyuukiro rya viino?" 
Isaiah63:3 Nnyuukiire omu inyuukiro nyenka ntaine n'omwe omu b'amahanga ou nyine; naabaribatiirira ngwirwe kubi, naabakandagira nyine ekiniga kingi; eshagama yaabo yaataraakira ebijwaro byangye, emyenda yangye yoona yaagira amabara." 
Isaiah63:4 Manya nteekateekire obunaku bwangye bw'okuhoora enzigu, buhikire, kandi ku nigwo mwaka gwangye gw'okucunguriramu abantu bangye." 
Isaiah63:5 Mmagamagire naareeba hatariho w'okumpa emikono; Naatangaara kureeba hatariho w'okumpangaana. Nikyo omukono gwangye gwampeereire obusinguzi, ekiniga kyangye kikampangaana." 
Isaiah63:6 Nkaribatiirira amahanga ngwirwe kubi, nkagasinzisa ekiniga kyangye, eshagama yaabo nkagisheesha aha nsi." 
Isaiah63:7 Ndyaguma ntebye ebya rukundo ya Nyakubaho etahararuka, n'eby'okumuhimbisa nk'ebi yaatuhaire byona oku biri, n'ebirungi bingi ebi yaakoreire abantu be Isiraeli, akabibaha nk'oku embabazi ze na rukundo ye enyingi etahararuka biri." 
Isaiah63:8 Manya akagira ati: Buzimazima n'abantu bangye, abaana abataringobeza; atyo yaaba Omujuni waabo." 
Isaiah63:9 Nibabonabonesibwa, maraika we yaabajuna. Nyakubaho wenka yaabacungura abainiire rukundo n'esaasi. Yaabakiriza, yaabaheeka omu biro bya ira byona." 
Isaiah63:10 Kwonka shi baamugomera, baagwisa kubi Mutima we Orikwera. Nikyo yaahindukiire omuzigu waabo, akabarwanisa." 
Isaiah63:11 Bwanyima akaijuka ebiro bya ira eby'omugaragwa we Musa. Mbwenu Nyakubaho owaihire abantu be omu nyanja, hamwe n'omuriisa w'obusyo bwe, ari nkahi? Ari nkahi ogwo owaamuhaire Mutima we Orikwera," 
Isaiah63:12 Owaareeteire omukono gwe gw'ekitiinwa kukoresa omukono gwa buryo ogwa Musa, akabaganisa amaizi agaabaire gabatangire omu maisho, ngu abone kwetungira eiziina eritaryeba?" 
Isaiah63:13 Owaabambukize amaizi garikumiza, batateere ntsibo, nk'enturegye erikuraba omu ihamba ari nkahi?" 
Isaiah63:14 Nk'oku ente bazeebembera nizishuuma omu ruhanga rurimu obunyaatsi zitateire ntsibo, nikwo Mutima wa Nyakubaho yaabahaire obuhuumure. Naiwe nikwo waayebembeire abantu baawe kwetungira eiziina ry'ekitiinwa." 
Isaiah63:15 Naga amaisho aha nsi, oreebe nooyema omu iguru omu butaaho bwawe oburikwera, kandi obw'ekitiinwa. Mbwenu eihato ryawe, n'amaani gaawe birahi? K'otakitugirira kihika na saasi." 
Isaiah63:16 Manya niiwe oba Tataitwe. Aburahamu nobu araabe atarikutumanya, na Isiraeli atwogire, kwonka ai Nyakubaho, niiwe Tataitwe Omucunguzi waitu, okwiha ira nikwo oyetwa." 
Isaiah63:17 Ai Nyakubaho, ahabw'enki nootuhabya emihanda yaawe okatugangaaza emitima, tutakutiine? Garuka ahabw'abairu baawe ab'enganda zi waayetungiire." 
Isaiah63:18 Itwe eihanga ryawe eririkwera tukatunga omwanya gwawe ogurikwera okumara akaanya kakye, mbwenu ababisha baitu baguribatiriire." 
Isaiah63:19 Twaba nk'abu otakategyekahoga, abatakakwetererwaga." 
Isaiah64:1 Nkaabaasibwa ki, oshatura eiguru oshuuma, haza enshozi zikutengatengyera omu maisho!" 
Isaiah64:2 Nk'oku omuriro gwotsya obuyaayo, amaizi gakabira, nkaabaasibwa ki, eiziina ryawe rimanywa ababisha baawe, amahanga gakutetemera omu maisho!" 
Isaiah64:3 Ku waakozire ebirikwitsa obwoba, ebi twabaire tutarikuteekateeka, okashuuma, enshozi zaatengatengyera omu maisho gaawe." 
Isaiah64:4 Okwiha eira tihariho orahuriire nari ou kiragwire omu kutu, nainga orareebire ruhanga ondiijo oine eki arikukorera abarikumwesiga, kureka iwe." 
Isaiah64:5 Oyakiira abashemerererwa eby'okuhikiirira, bakabikora, bakaijuka emitwarize yaawe. Kwonka ekyakwitsize ekiniga, niitwe kukora eiibi, tukabimaramu omwanya muraingwa. Mbwenu ebyo turyajunwa?" 
Isaiah64:6 Twena tukaba nk'omuntu otashemeire, byona ebihikiriire ebi twakozire byaba nk'omwenda gusiisikaire. Twena tuhongire nk'amababi, ebicumuro byaitu bitutwara nk'ekintu kirikutuntumurwa omuyaga." 
Isaiah64:7 Tihariho n'omwe orikukutakira, nari orikwebatura kukukwata amaguru; ahabw'okuba otwimire amaisho, waatushunikira ebibi byatwita." 
Isaiah64:8 Kwonka, ai Nyakubaho, niiwe Tataitwe. Itwe turi eibumba, niiwe mubumbi waitu. Twena turi ebikozirwe engaro zaawe." 
Isaiah64:9 Ai Nyakubaho, otatugirira ekiniga kingi kandi otaguma noijuka ebicumuro byaitu. Guma omanye ku turi abantu baawe." 
Isaiah64:10 Endembo zaawe ezirikwera zihindukire eihamba; Siyooni yaaba eitongo, Yerusalemu yaaba omushaka." 
Isaiah64:11 Nyaruju yaitu erikwera kandi enungi munonga, ei baatatenkuriitwe baabaire bakuhimbisizamu ekacwekyerezibwa omuriro; emyanya yaitu yoona erikukushemereza yaaba amatongo." 
Isaiah64:12 Mbwenu, ai Nyakubaho, ebyo bintu noija kubyehuzya, oyetsize, otubonabonese munonga?" 
Isaiah65:1 Nkaba nyeteekateekire kusherurwa abatakambuuririzaga. Nkaba nyeteekateekire kubonwa abatakansheruraga. Naagira eihanga eritarantakiire nti: Ndi aha, ndi aha." 
Isaiah65:2 Nkaba nsiiba nshashaanuriire emikono eihanga erigomi, ery'abantu b'emitwarize etari mirungi, abakuratira obwengye bwabo bonka;" 
Isaiah65:3 Abatuura nibangwisa kubi nimbareeba, nibatambira ebitambo omu misiri, kandi nibooterera obubaani aha matafaari," 
Isaiah65:4 abashutama omu bituuro bakaseesa ekiro bari omu myanya eyekiikire; bakarya enyama y'empunu, enyabya zaabo bakazitamu omucuuzi gw'ebintu birikuzira," 
Isaiah65:5 abagira bati: Guma wenka otampika, ahabw'okuba ndi orikwera. Abo bantu n'omwika gw'omu nyindo zangye, omuriro ogusiiba nigwaka." 
Isaiah65:6 Reeba, kindi aha mutima: Nyowe tindihunama, kureka ndyabahoora; buzimazima ndyabahoorera kimwe," 
Isaiah65:7 mbature ebicumuro byabo n'ebya baishenkurubo; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba. Ahabw'okwoterera obubaani aha nshozi, bakanjumira omu bibungo, ndyabaha ekifubiro kibashemereire nindeebera aha bi baakozire." 
Isaiah65:8 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nk'oku omugimba gw'emizaabibu gubamu viino nsya, abantu bakagira bati: Mutagushiisha, ahabw'okuba gurimu omugisha; naanye ahabw'abaheereza bangye nikwo nditwaza, nkareka kubaita boona." 
Isaiah65:9 Yakobo ndyamuzaarukanisamu abaijukuru, na Yuda mmwihemu abarihungura enshozi zangye; abaheereza bangye bazituuremu." 
Isaiah65:10 Ahabw'abantu bangye abarikundamya, Sharooni eryaba eiriisizo ry'amasyo g'entaama, Oruhanga rwa Akori rube omwanya gw'amasyo g'ente kuhendamu enkokora." 
Isaiah65:11 Kwonka imwe abantsigaho Nyowe Nyakubaho, mukeebwa orushozi rwangye orurikwera, mukateekyera Gaadi obugyenyi, mukaijuriza Meeni ekikopo kya viino etimbwirwe," 
Isaiah65:12 ndyabateeraho muheru y'okwitwa rurara, mwena oku mutura mwinikye ebitsya, babaite. Manya ku naabeetsire, timwangarukamu, ku naagambire, timwantega kutu kureka mwakora ebi ndikwanga, mwasiima kukora ebi ntarikwenda." 
Isaiah65:13 Nikyo Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga ndikugirira nti: Abaheereza bangye baryarya, imwe mwitwe enjara; baryanywa, imwe mwitwe eiriho; baryayesiima, imwe mwitwe enshoni." 
Isaiah65:14 Abaheereza bangye baryayeshongora bananukire; haza imwe muboroogye mwine obusaasi aha mutima, mucure mwine obujune." 
Isaiah65:15 Eiziina ryanyu riryatsigara nirikyeenwa abu naatooraine; Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga mbaite, haza abaheereza bangye mbeete erindi iziina." 
Isaiah65:16 Atyo oriba ayeshabiire omugisha omu nsi, agweshabire ahari Ruhanga ow'amazima, n'oriba naarahira omuri egi nsi, arahire Ruhanga ow'amazima, ahabw'okuba enaku za ira ziryahwaho, zeebe, mbe ntakizireeba." 
Isaiah65:17 Reeba, hati nimpanga eiguru risya n'ensi nsya; ebya ira biryaba bitakiijukwa, nobu kwakuba okuteekwateekwaho." 
Isaiah65:18 Mbwenu mushemerererwe kandi munanukire eki ndikuhanga ebiro byona. Manya reeba, nimpanga Yerusalemu ey'okunanukiramu, abantu baayo bakashemererwa." 
Isaiah65:19 Ndyananukira omuri Yerusalemu, nshemerererwe abantu bangye. Eryaba etakihuririrwamu iraka ry'orikucura; nobu kwakuba okurira kw'abaine enaku." 
Isaiah65:20 Eryaba etakirimu mwereere owaafa amazire ebiro bikye azairwe, nari omugurusi otahikize ngingo za bukuru; ahabw'okuba omwana aryafa ahikize emyaka igana y'obukuru; kandi omusiisi orifa ahikize emyaka igana aryaba akyeenirwe." 
Isaiah65:21 Abantu baryayombeka amaju bagatuuremu; baryabyara emizaabibu, barye ebijuma byayo." 
Isaiah65:22 Tibaryombeka maju, abandi bakagataahamu; tibaribyara mizaabibu, abandi bakagirya. Manya nk'oku omuti gumara ebiro bingi, nikwo abantu bangye barihangaara. Kandi abatoorainwe bangye baryamara omwanya muraingwa nibashemerererwa ebi baakoreise emikono yaabo." 
Isaiah65:23 Tibarihendekyera busha, nobu kwakuba okuzaara abaana b'okugwerwa akagwe; Ahabw'okuba baryaba oruzaaro orw'abu Nyakubaho yaahaire omugisha hamwe na baijukuru baabo." 
Isaiah65:24 Ndyabeetaba batakaanyetsire, mbahurire nibakigamba." 
Isaiah65:25 Emishega n'abaana b'entaama biryarya kumwe; entare eryarya obunyaatsi nk'ente, n'omucuucu gube ebyokurya by'enjoka. Ahari orwo rushozi rwangye orurikwera tibirikoreraho kabi, nari okugira ebi byaitiraho; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Isaiah66:1 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Eiguru n'ekitebe kyangye ky'obugabe, kandi ensi n'endibatiro yangye. Mbwenu ni nju ki ei mwakuunyombekyera, kandi ni mwanya ki ogu naakuhuumuriramu?" 
Isaiah66:2 Ebyo byona niinye naabihangire, n'ahabw'ekyo byona n'ebyangye; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba. Kwonka omuntu ou ndikutaho omutima, n'orikwebundika, aine omutima gweteisize, orikutiina ebi ngamba." 
Isaiah66:3 Orikwita ente kugitamba ni nk'oitsire omuntu kumutamba. Orikutamba omwana gw'entaama ni nk'ohotoire embwa ebitsya. Orikutoija omutoijo gw'ebyokunywa, ni nk'orikutoija eshagama y'empunu. Orikwotera obubaani bw'okwijutsya ni nk'orikuramya ekishushani. Abo bantu bakunda kukora ebi barikwenda, bashemerererwa ebihagaro byabo." 
Isaiah66:4 Naanye nikyo ndisiimira okubabonabonesa, nkabareetera ebirikubatiinisa. Ahabw'okuba ku naayetsire, tibaayetaba; ku naagambire, tibaatega kutu; Kureka bakakora ebi ntarikusiima, baatoorana ebi ntarikwenda." 
Isaiah66:5 Imwe abatiina ekigambo kya Nyakubaho, nimuhurire eki arikugamba. Beene waanyu ababanga, ababacwa ahabwangye, nibabakiniika bati: Ka Nyakubaho ahimbisibwe, haza tureebe okwo kushemererwa kwanyu, nibo barihemuka." 
Isaiah66:6 Hurira orwari rurikwimuka omu rurembo, okwamuza kw'omuri Nyaruju! Eiraka rya Nyakubaho orikuhoora abazigu be! Naagira ati:" 
Isaiah66:7 Orurembo rwangye ni nk'omukazi owaabaire atakarumirwe, akazaara, akiba atakagizire bisha, akateeraho omutabani." 
Isaiah66:8 Mbwenu n'oha orareebire ekintu nk'ekyo? Nari shi ebyo birareebirwe oha? Ensi ekaazaarwa aha izooba rimwe? Nari eihanga rikaaruga omu nda omu kaanya kakye? Kwonka Siyooni ku yaarumirwe eti, yaazaara abatabani." 
Isaiah66:9 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ndyakuhitsya aha bunaku bw'okuzaara, ndemwe kukuzaaza? Ruhanga waawe naagira ati: Nyowe oha oruzaaro, niinye ndaigare enda?" 
Isaiah66:10 Imwe mwena abakunda Yerusalemu, munanukye hamwe nayo, mugishemerererwe; Naimwe mwena abagicurira, mwesiime hamwe nayo, mushemereirwe," 
Isaiah66:11 mubone kwonka n'okuhaaga amashereka gaayo agarikurembesereza, Mubone kunuriiriza eby'ekitiinwa kyayo ebingi mushemereirwe." 
Isaiah66:12 Manya Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, ndyagiha obugogyeere bwingi, ngikanyisize eby'obutungi bw'amahanga, bishaagaane nk'omugyera gushandaire; haza mwonkye, muheekyerwe omu rubaju, muguragurukizibwe ha bibero byayo." 
Isaiah66:13 Nk'oku omwana arembeserezibwa nyina, naimwe nikwo ndibarembesereza, mukahuumuririzibwa omuri Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah66:14 Ku murikireeba, muryayesiima, engingo zaanyu zigire amagara nk'obunyaatsi bw'omuroba; Haza kimanywe ku Nyakubaho arikuhwera abaheereza be, kandi ku ainiire abazigu be ekiniga kingi." 
Isaiah66:15 Reeba, aryaija ahonaaho n'omuriro, ebigaari bye biri nk'omuyaga gw'eihunga, kwemara kashanga aine ekiniga kingi; haza abafubize endimi z'omuriro." 
Isaiah66:16 Manya Nyakubaho abantu boona aryabafubiza omuriro na rurara; kandi abu ariita baryaba baingi. 
Isaiah66:17 Abarikweyeza bakeeshemeza kuza aheeru bakurataine, haza bakarya enyama y'empunu n'ebihagaro n'embeba, baryahwerekyerera kumwe; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Isaiah66:18 Nimmanya ebi bakora n'ebi bateekateeka. Mbwenu niinyija kuteeranira hamwe ab'amahanga goona n'ab'endimi zoona, baije bareebe ekitiinwa kyangye." 
Isaiah66:19 Haza ndyagira eki naabakoraho. Abarihonokaho ndyabatuma omu mahanga ga Tarushiishi, Puuti na Luudi omu barikumanya kurasha; mbatume Tubali na Yavani omu birwa bya hare ebitakahuriraga kurangaanwa kwangye nari okureeba ekitiinwa kyangye; batyo barangirire ekitiinisa kyangye omu mahanga."
