Isaiah66:20 Kandi baryataaruura beene waanyu omu mahanga goona, babantoijere. Baryabareetera aha mbaraasi n'omu bigaari n'omu ngozi, n'aha nyumbu n'aha ngamira, babahitsye aha rushozi rwangye Yerusalemu orurikwera; nk'oku Abaisiraeli bareeta omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho emitoijo yaabo y'esaano omu nyabya zicumire; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Isaiah66:21 Kandi bamwe omuribo ndyabahindura abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba. 
Isaiah66:22 Manya nk'oku eiguru risya n'ensi nsya ebi ndihanga ndibigumyaho, nikwo baijukuru baanyu n'eiziina ryanyu birigumaho; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Isaiah66:23 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ahari buri kuboneka kw'okwezi n'ahari buri Sabato, abantu boona baryaguma baije omu maisho gangye kundamya." 
Isaiah66:24 Haza ku bariba nibarugayo, baryareeba emitumbi y'abangomeire. Ahabw'okuba enyogori zaabo tizirifa, n'omuriro oguribootsya tiguriraara. Abantu boona abaribareeba, baryabanuga." 
Jeremiah1:1 Ebi n'ebigambo bya Yeremiya mwene Hilikiya ow'omu bahongyerezi abaabaire bari Anatooti, omu kyanga kya Benyamiini." 
Jeremiah1:2 Yeremiya ogu, Nyakubaho akabimugambira omu busingye bwa Yosiya mwene Amoni, omugabe wa Buyuda, omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'eshatu agiire aha ngoma." 
Jeremiah1:3 Kandi akabimugambira omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya, omugabe wa Buyuda, okuhitsya aha muheru gw'omwaka gwa ikumi na gumwe ogw'omu busingye bwa Zedekiya mwene Yosiya, omugabe wa Buyuda, obu Yerusalemu yaakwatwa, omu kwezi kwa kataano okw'ogwo mwaka." 
Jeremiah1:4 Mbwenu Nyakubaho akangambira ati: 
Jeremiah1:5 Ku naabaire ntakakuhangire mu nda ya nyoko, nkakutoorana, kandi ku waabaire otakazairwe, nkakweshoroorera, naakuhaasirira, naakutaho kuba omurangi w'okurangirira amahanga." 
Jeremiah1:6 Naanye naamugarukamu nti: Haa! Mukama Ruhanga! Mbwenu nyowe ka nkiri muto, ka ntarikumanya kugamba." 
Jeremiah1:7 Kwonka Nyakubaho yangira ati: Reka kugira oti: Ndi muto. Mbwenu irooko oze omu bantu boona abu ndaakutumeho, obagambire byona ebi ndaakuragiire." 
Jeremiah1:8 Otabatiina, ahabw'okuba niinyija kuba ndi hamwe naiwe kukujuna; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah1:9 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagorora omukono, yankora aha minwa, yangira ati: Reeba, naata ebigambo byangye omu kanwa kaawe." 
Jeremiah1:10 Omanye ku eri izooba naakutaho kugira obushoboorozi aha mahanga n'aha nsi z'abagabe, kurandura n'okusheenya, kucwekyereza n'okuhwerekyereza, kwombeka n'okubyara." 
Jeremiah1:11 Nyakubaho akambuuza ati; Yeremiya, nooreeba ki? Naamugarukamu nti: Nindeeba eitaagi ry'omutugunda, ririkutandika kurabya." 
Jeremiah1:12 Nawe yangira ati: Waareeba gye; ahabw'okuba ntaireho omutima kuhikiiriza eki naagambire. 
Jeremiah1:13 Nyakubaho akagaruka yambuuza obwa kabiri ati: Nooreeba ki? Naamugarukamu nti: Nindeeba enyungu eteeka erikubira, ehugami eteire ekibunu obukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Jeremiah1:14 Nyakubaho nawe angira ati: Akagwe karyaruga omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, kagwere abatuuzi b'omuri egi nsi boona." 
Jeremiah1:15 Manya Nyowe Nyakubaho ningira ati: Reeba, niinyeta enganda zoona ez'omu nsi z'abagabe b'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho. Abagabe baazo baije, buri omwe ate ekitebe kye ky'obugabe omu maisho g'amarembo ga Yerusalemu, n'aha ngo zaayo zoona ezigyehinguririize, n'aha ndembo za Buyuda zoona," 
Jeremiah1:16 haza mbacwere orubanja nimbatura ebibi byabo byona ebi baakozire bakantsigaho, bakooterera baaruhanga abandi obubaani, bakaramya ebishushani ebi bo bonka baakozire." 
Jeremiah1:17 Kwonka iwe, yezirikye oimukye, obagambire ebi ndaakuragiire byona. Otabatiina; haza naanye nkakuhahaaza omutima waabareeba." 
Jeremiah1:18 Kandi reeba, Nyowe eri izooba naakuha amaani, obe nk'orurembo rugumire, nk'enyomyo y'ekyoma, kandi nk'ebisiika by'omuringa, obone kurwanisa ab'omuri egi nsi yoona, abagabe ba Buyuda n'abategyeki baayo n'abahongyerezi, n'abantu b'omuri egyo nsi." 
Jeremiah1:19 Baryakurwanisa, kwonka tibarikusingura; ahabw'okuba ndi hamwe naiwe kukujuna; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah2:1 Nyakubaho akangambira ati: 
Jeremiah2:2 Irooko orangirire ab'omuri Yerusalemu oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Niinyijuka oku waayeheeraireyo kimwe nookinyeeta, okankunda okiri omugore, okankuratira omu ihamba, omu nsi etakahingwamuga." 
Jeremiah2:3 Isiraeli ekaba eri enjeru ya Nyakubaho, omuganuro gwe gw'okubanza. Abaaguriireho boona bakagira orubanja, baagwerwa akagwe; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah2:4 Imwe ab'omuryango gwa Yakobo, naimwe ab'enganda za Isiraeli mwena, nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah2:5 Naagira ati: Ni kibi ki eki naitsize baashwenkuriimwe, baaza kuunyimuura, bakakuratira ebitaine buryo, bakaba abataine mugasho?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Kwonka bateebuuze bati: Nyakubaho owaatwihire omu nsi ya Misiri ari nkahi, Owaatwebembeire akaturabya omu ihamba, Omu nsi y'eirungu n'ebiina, omu nsi eyomire, erikwiha omuntu ekikoba aha mutwe, etarabwamu bantu, kandi etagira ogituuramu?" 
Jeremiah2:7 Haza naabareetsire omu nsi erikweza, kunanurwa ebi eyerize, n'ebindi birungi byayo. Kwonka ku mwagihikiremu mwagishiisha; obutaka bwangye mwabuhindura ekihagaro." 
Jeremiah2:8 Abahongyerezi tibaagira bati: Nyakubaho ari nkahi? Abanyamateeka tibammanya, abategyeki bancumuraho, n'abarangi baaragura ebya Baali; baakuratira ebitaine muhoho." 
Jeremiah2:9 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nikyo ndikubatonganisiza, kandi na baijukuru baanyu ndyabatonganisa." 
Jeremiah2:10 Manya nimwambukye, muze omu birwa bya Kitimu, haza mureebe. Nari mutume Kedari omuntu, kandi mwetegyereze gye, mureebe yaaba ekintu nk'ekyo kirabaireho." 
Jeremiah2:11 Mbwenu hariho eihanga erirahingiise baaruhanga baaryo, nobu baraabe batari b'amazima? Kwonka abantu bangye bahingiise ekitiinwa kyabo n'ebintu ebitaine mugasho." 
Jeremiah2:12 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Iwe iguru 'we, ta engaro aha munwa, oyesikure, oshoberwe!" 
Jeremiah2:13 Manya abantu bangye bakozire ebibi bibiri: Baanyimwire, nyowe enshuro y'amaizi agareeta amagara, baayefukurira ebiziba bifumukire, ebirikwogwamu amaizi." 
Jeremiah2:14 Isiraeli ahindukire omuhuuku? yaaba omuhuuku ozairwe omu ka? Mbwenu shi abeereire ki omunyago? 
Jeremiah2:15 Abantu bamutontomeire munonga nk'entare zirikukankama; ensi ye baagishiishagura, endembo ze baazihindura amatongo; zaabura abazitwiremu." 
Jeremiah2:16 Kandi aba Noofe n'aba Tapaane baamwata eihahaara. 
Jeremiah2:17 Mbwenu shi tiiwe waayereeteire ebyo ahabw'okwimuura Mukama Ruhanga waawe, haza yaakwebembeire akakurabya omu muhanda?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Mbwenu okuza Misiri okanywa amaizi ga Nailo nikukugasira ki? Nari okuza Asiriya okanywa amaizi ga Eufuraati nikikugasira ki? 
Jeremiah2:19 Obubi bwawe buryakutukurira, okuunyimuura kukushinje. Okimanye kandi oyetegyereze ku kiri kibi kandi eky'akabi, iwe okwimuura Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga waawe, okareka kuntiina, Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah2:20 Iwe Isiraeli, okwiha ira otuura noohenda omugamba gwawe, noocwa enkomo zaawe, kandi noogira oti: Torindamya. Eego; okaramiza ahari buri kibungo kiraingwa, n'ahansi ya buri muti gw'omurinzi, nka maraaya." 
Jeremiah2:21 Haza naakubyaire ori omuzaabibu murungi gw'embibo nungi munonga. Mbwenu okaiha hi, waaza kusiisikara, okahinduka omuzaabibu gw'omu ishwa?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Nobu waakweyozya ota n'enju rya kashenda na saabuuni nyingi, kwonka eibara ry'ekicumuro kyawe rikindi omu maisho, Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah2:23 Noobaasa ota kugira oti: Tinsiisikaire, kandi oti: Tindamize Baabaali? Mbwenu reeba ekirari kyawe omu ruhanga; haza omanye eki okozire. Okaba nk'engamira nto erikukina neekora oku n'oku;" 
Jeremiah2:24 Nari nk'enturegye emanyiire eihamba, erikukagiiriza omuyaga erinzire! Mbwenu n'oha owaakubaasa kugizibira? Manya engundu zirikugisherura tiziruha, ahabw'okuba teziburira ekirinzire." 
Jeremiah2:25 Nkakugira nti: Oyerinde! Ebigyere byawe birekye kugyenda bitajwaire nkaito, n'omumiro gwawe kugira ekyaaka. Kwonka wangira oti: Nooyeruhiza busha; ahabw'okuba nyowe nkunzire baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga, kandi niinyija kubaramya." 
Jeremiah2:26 Nk'oku omushuma aitwa enshoni baamukwata, n'ab'omuryango gwa Isiraeli nikwo barihemuka, n'abagabe baabo n'abategyeki baabo, n'abahongyerezi baabo n'abarangi baabo." 
Jeremiah2:27 Manya buri omwe omuribo agira ekiti ati: Niiwe tata; n'eibaare ati: Niiwe wanzaire. Bantaire omugongo baayanga kumpindukira. Kwonka ku barireeba enaku, baryantakira bati: Imuka otujune!" 
Jeremiah2:28 Mbwenu shi baaruhanga abu waayekoreire bari nkahi? Nibaimukye bakujune omuri ezi naku zaawe, ku baraabe nibakibaasa; ahabw'okuba, iwe Buyuda, nk'oku endembo zaawe ziri nyingi, na baaruhanga baawe nikwo barikwingana." 
Jeremiah2:29 Ahabw'enki nimuntonganisa? Manya mwena mungomeire; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba. 
Jeremiah2:30 Nyeruhiize busha, naateera abaana baanyu, haza baayanga kuhanwa. Rurara yaanyu emazireho abarangi baanyu nk'entare esheegire." 
Jeremiah2:31 Imwe ab'obusingye obu, nimute omutima aha ki Nyakubaho arikugamba ati: Ndabeereire Isiraeli eihamba, nari ensi y'omwirima ndindindi? Mbwenu shi ahabw'enki abantu bangye nibagira bati: Nitwetegyeka, titurikwijaho bundi?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Ebyo empangare ekaayebwa eby'okwetiiba, omugore ayebwa okwetwekyerera? Kwonka abantu bangye baanyebirwe, okwiha ryari na ryari." 
Jeremiah2:33 Ebishi omanya kusherura nkunzi zaawe! Nangwa n'abakazi babi obeegyeise emize yaawe. 
Jeremiah2:34 N'aha kipumpuriya kyawe nihashangwaho eshagama y'abanaku abu waitsire bataine rubanja, kandi abu otarashangire nibafumura enju." 
Jeremiah2:35 Haza ebyo byona obyogaho, oyekiita oti: Tiinyine rubanja; buzimazima takiinyiniire kiniga. Kwonka ndyakucwera orubanja rukusingye, ahabw'okugira oti: Tiinyine kibi ki ndakozire." 
Jeremiah2:36 Ebishi orahuka kukwatsakwatsibwa, kuhindura emitwarize yaawe! Manya Misiri eryakuhemura, nk'oku Asiriya yaakuhemwire." 
Jeremiah2:37 Okwo nayo oryarugayo emikono ogitaire aha mutwe; ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho ayangire abu oyesiga, kandi tibarigira ki baakugasira." 
Jeremiah3:1 Hari omushaija ku ashenda omukazi we, ogwo mukazi yaamurugaho yaashwerwa ondiijo mushaija, iba omukuru aba naakimugarura? Obwo egyo nsi tekaasiisikara munonga? Mbwenu iwe oraayire na nkunzi zaawe nyingi, ebyo okangarukira? Nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah3:2 Naga amaisho aha bibungo by'emparamaata oreebe? Ni nkahi, ahu otakabyamire na muntu? Okaba oshutama aha rubaju rw'omuhanda otegyereize nkunzi zaawe, nk'oku Omuharabu aba aine eki ategyerereize omu ihamba. Otyo washiisha ensi n'emicwe yaawe mibi ey'obwamaraaya." 
Jeremiah3:3 Nikyo enjura yaarekyeire kusheesheka; n'eya Katumba etagwe; Haza waaguma oyomire ahamaisho nka maraaya, otaine na kashoni." 
Jeremiah3:4 Tokamazire mwanya muraingwa ontakiire oti: Taata, munywani wangye w'omu buhangare! Obwo nooteekateeka oti:" 
Jeremiah3:5 Ebyo aryaguma aine ekiniga? Aryaguma angwereirwe kubi ebiro byona? Eego; nikwo waagambire, kwonka waaguma nookora ebibi byona nk'oku orikwenda." 
Jeremiah3:6 Omu busingye bw'omugabe Yosiya, Nyakubaho akangira ati: Oreebire eki Isiraeli oteesigwa yaakozire; oku yaagiire ahari buri kibungo kiraingwa n'aha nsi ya buri muti gw'omurinzi akaraayirayo?" 
Jeremiah3:7 Haza nkateekateeka ngu ku ariheza kukora ebyo byona, aryangarukira. Kwonka shi taragarukire; n'omurumuna Yuda, otari w'amazima, akakireeba." 
Jeremiah3:8 Yuda ogwo akareeba ku naabingire Isiraeli otari mwesigwa, nimmutura obushambani bwe; nkamuha ebaruha y'okumushenda, kwonka omurumuna Yuda, otari w'amazima, taratiinire, kureka nawe akagyenda yaaraaya." 
Jeremiah3:9 Ahabw'obwamaraaya kumurahukira, yaashiisha ensi, yaashambana n'amabaare n'ebiti." 
Jeremiah3:10 Ebyo byona nobu biraabe byabaire bityo, omurumuna Yuda, otari w'amazima, tarangarukiire n'omutima gwe gwona, kureka akaryarya; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah3:11 Kandi Nyakubaho akangira ati: Isiraeli otari mwesigwa ayeyorekire ku aine orubanja rukye okukira orwa Yuda otari w'amazima. 
Jeremiah3:12 Mbwenu irooko orangirire ab'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho ebi bigambo oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Iwe Isiraeli otari mwesigwa, garuka! Tindikwija kukureebesa kiniga; ahabw'okuba ndi ow'embabazi. Nyakubaho naagira ati: Tindiguma nyine ekiniga ebiro byona." 
Jeremiah3:13 Kureka yemera orubanja rwawe, ku waagomeire Mukama Ruhanga waawe, okayaabaatikanira omu baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga; okanga kworobera ebiragiro byangye; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah3:14 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Imwe abagomi, nimugarukye. Manya niinye mukama waanyu. Ndyabatwara niinyiha omwe-omwe omu rurembo, na babiri-babiri omu ruganda, mbahitsye Siyooni." 
Jeremiah3:15 Kandi ndyabaha abariisa abaine omutima nk'ogwangye, babariise n'obwengye n'okwetegyereza." 
Jeremiah3:16 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reero omu biro ebyo, ku murikanya mwaba baingi omuri egyo nsi, abantu baryaba batakigamba ha by'eshanduukye yangye y'endagaano. Baryaba batakigiteekateekaho, batakigiijuka, batakigijura, nobu kwakuba okugaruka kugikora." 
Jeremiah3:17 Omu biro ebyo Yerusalemu eryayetwa ekitebe ky'obugabe ekya Nyakubaho, amahanga goona gakiteeranireho kuheera Nyakubaho ekitiinwa omuri Yerusalemu; batakikora n'obugangaazi bw'emitima yaabo mibi." 
Jeremiah3:18 Omu biro ebyo ab'omuryango gwa Yuda baryakwatanisa n'ab'omuryango gwa Isiraeli, barugye kumwe omu nsi y'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, baije omu nsi ei naahaire baashwenkuriimwe kuba obutaka bwabo." 
Jeremiah3:19 Nkagira nti: Ka nkubarire omu baana bangye, nkuhe ensi nungi y'obutaka, erikuhitira kimwe ez'omu mahanga goona. Kandi naateekateeka ngu oryanyeta sho, otakindugaho." 
Jeremiah3:20 Kwonka buzimazima, nk'oku omukazi otari mwesigwa atsigaho iba, naimwe ab'omurayango gwa Isiraeli nikwo mwambeereire abatari b'amazima; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah3:21 Okuborooga n'okurira n'okutaka eby'Abaisiraeli nibihuririrwa omu bibungo by'emparamaata, ahabw'okuba bakareka emitwarize yaabo, baayebwa Mukama Ruhanga waabo." 
Jeremiah3:22 Imwe baana 'mwe ebirare, nimugarukye mbatambire oburare. Naimwe mugire muti: Reeba, twakwetuurira, ahabw'okuba niiwe Mukama Ruhanga waitu." 
Jeremiah3:23 Buzimazima okuteerera emihira aha bibungo, n'okubandirwa aha nshozi n'ebya busha; Kureka Mukama Ruhanga waitu niwe mujuni wa Isiraeli." 
Jeremiah3:24 Kwonka okwiha omu buto bwaitu Baali ruhanga w'ebirikwitsa enshoni atumazireho byona ebi baatatenkuriitwe baahendekyeire; amasyo gaabo g'entaama n'ag'ente na batabani baabo na bahara baabo. 
Jeremiah3:25 Mbwenu ka tugume twitsirwe enshoni, ekihemu kitujwengize, ahabw'okuba okwiha omu buto n'okuhitsya eri izooba, itwe na baatatenkuriitwe tutuura nitucumura ahari Mukama Ruhanga waitu, twangire kworobera ebiragiro bye." 
Jeremiah4:1 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Iwe Isiraeli, ku origaruka, obe niinye waagarukira; Ku oriiha ebihagaro by'ebishushani omu maisho gangye otarikuguragurutsya," 
Jeremiah4:2 Nyowe Nyakubaho wandahira omu mazima n'omu buryo ohikire; nibwo orihaisa amahanga omugisha, gakakwesingirizamu." 
Jeremiah4:3 Manya Nyakubaho naagira aba Buyuda n'abatwire Yerusalemu ati: Mutabire endaara zaanyu, mutabiba omu mahwa." 
Jeremiah4:4 Imwe bashaija ba Buyuda 'mwe, n'abatwire Yerusalemu nimweshare, mube abangye, Nyowe Nyakubaho. Mweihe ekikoba aha mitima yaanyu, kashanga yangye etakaababugumaho nk'omuriro ahabw'ebibi bi mukora, ekabootsya; haza hakabura owaagiraaza." 
Jeremiah4:5 Mukigambire ab'omuri Buyuda, mukirangirire ab'omuri Yerusalemu muti: Muteere enzamba omu nsi yoona, mwamuze nimugira muti: Nimuteerane tuhungire omu ndembo z'ebigo bigumire." 
Jeremiah4:6 Nimwimutsye orurango murworekyeize Siyooni. Muhungye, mwerondere obukiriro. Haza muteeziringa: ahabw'okuba niinyija kubagwisiza akagwe, mbareetere okucwekyerera kuhango, birugye omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Jeremiah4:7 Nk'oku entare efurumuka omu kishaka kyayo, n'omuhwerekyerezi w'amahanga nikwo aizire naaruga owe kucwekyereza ensi yaawe; endembo zaawe zikaba amatongo, zikabura ab'okuzituuramu." 
Jeremiah4:8 N'ahabw'ekyo mwezirikye ebiguniya mucure, muboroogye, ahabw'okuba kashanga ya Nyakubaho tekaturugireho." 
Jeremiah4:9 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ahari eryo izooba omugabe n'abategyeki baryayehwa amatsiko, abahongyerezi bagwe omu kahuriko, n'abarangi bashoberwe." 
Jeremiah4:10 Naanye nikyo ngiriire nti: Ai bambe, Mukama Ruhanga! Buzimazima obeiheire kimwe eri ihanga na Yerusalemu, obu obigizire oti: Muryaba gye, haza kunu bihikiirweho kimwe rurara." 
Jeremiah4:11 Omu bunaku obwo abantu baryagambira ab'omuri eri ihanga n'ab'omuri Yerusalemu bati: Omuyaga gurikwotsya gurugire omu bibungo by'emparamaata omu ihamba, kuhuuha abantu bangye. Tigwizire kuheheeza nari kushemeza." 
Jeremiah4:12 Ogwo muyaga gurikutiinisa, niinye nguragiire. Mbwenu nyowe nyenka niinye ndaabacwere orubanja." 
Jeremiah4:13 Reeba, omuzigu naija naimukyeera nk'ebicu, ebigari bye nibiiruka nk'omuyaga gw'akasooroora, n'embaraasi ze nizikiza empungu obwira. Ai bambe! Ebishi twaza kucwekyerera!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Iwe Yerusalemu yeyozyeho ebibi, obone kujunwa, Nooherera hi kuguma oine ebiteekateeko bibi?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Manya hariho entumwa erugire omu rurembo rwa Daani, n'omu bibungo bya Efuraimu neeranga enkuru mbi." 
Jeremiah4:16 Egyo ntumwa eizire kugambira ab'omu mahanga bukiri kare, n'okurangira ab'omuri Yerusalemu ku ab'okubagota barugire omu nsi ya hare nibayogoorera endembo za Yuda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Nibaija kukubakuba Yerusalemu, nk'oku abarinzi baziguuruka omusiri; ahabw'okuba ekangomera; Mukama nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah4:18 Iwe Buyuda, emitwarize yaawe n'ebi orikukora nibyo bikureetereire. Ekyo nikyo kifubiro kyawe ekiraakusaase, kikakwogamu." 
Jeremiah4:19 Ai bambe, ai bambe! Ebishi nyine obusaasi! Nfundiriirwe omu mutima, Niguteera munonga enkuratima; tindikubaasa kutuuza; ahabw'okuba nimpurira enzamba erikuhuruza n'enduuru y'orugamba." 
Jeremiah4:20 Akagwe nikakuratana n'akandi, ensi yoona ebaire amatongo. Amahema gangye gacwekyereziibwe kitaraariire, emikingo yangye yatemuka omu kaanya kakye." 
Jeremiah4:21 Nimperera hi okuguma nindeeba orurango n'okuhurira eiraka ry'enzamba? 
Jeremiah4:22 Manya abantu bangye n'abashema, tibarikummanya. N'abaana bataine bwengye kandi abatarikwetegyereza. N'abanyabwengye omu kukora ebibi, kwonka omu kukora ebirungi tibaine ki barikumanya." 
Jeremiah4:23 Ku naayetegyereize ensi, naareeba eri amatongo, kandi erimu busha; nkyetegyereza eiguru, ndeeba riine ekizima." 
Jeremiah4:24 Ku naanagire amaisho aha nshozi, naareeba nizitengyeeta, n'ebibungo byona nibizonga." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ku naayetegyereize, naareeba hatariyo muntu n'omwe, n'enyonyi zoona zaahungire." 
Jeremiah4:26 Nkeetegyereza, naareeba egyo nsi erikweza yaabaire eihamba, n'endembo zaayo zoona zaacwekire amatongo omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuzigirira ekiniga kingi munonga." 
Jeremiah4:27 Manya Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ensi yoona eryahinduka eirungu, kwonka tindigicwekyerereza kimwe." 
Jeremiah4:28 Nikyo egi nsi ericurira, eiguru rikairirimba; ahabw'okuba ekyo nkigambire naakimariirira, kandi tindikyeefuuza, nobu kwakuba okukireka." 
Jeremiah4:29 Ab'omu buri rurembo baryahunga baahurira endigito y'ab'ahambaraasi n'ey'ab'amata bashenshere omu bishaka, basharabambe enkiri, endembo zoona zitsigweho, habure owaazituuramu." 
Jeremiah4:30 Mbwenu iwe nshoberwa 'we, ekirikukujwaza ebya karari, okeehunda eby'ezaabu, okahangusya amaisho noogasiiga erangi, ni ki? Nooyegirira gye busha! Nkunzi zaawe hati nizikugaya, nizenda kukwita." 
Jeremiah4:31 Manya mpuriire okuborooga nk'okw'omukazi orikurumwa, oine obusaasi nk'obw'omukazi orikujigaija. Okwo kuborooga n'okwa Siyooni erikusheemeeka, ekanaga emikono neecura, eti: Ai bambe! Ebishi naaza kukabira omu maisho g'abarikwenda kuunyita!" 
Jeremiah5:1 Imwe ab'omuri Yerusalemu, nimwirukye mukore oku n'oku omu nguuto zaayo, mureebe kandi mwetegyereze! Nimucaakye emyanya yaamwo ei abantu bateeraniramu, mureebe ku muraabe nimubaasa kubonayo omuntu orikukora eby'oburyo akakuratira eby'amazima; haza naanye mbone kugisaasira." 
Jeremiah5:2 Nobu baraabe nibagira bati: Niturahira Nyakubaho ohuriire; kwonka ebi barikurahira n'ebishuba. 
Jeremiah5:3 Ai Nyakubaho, tiiwe oyenda kureeba eby'amazima? Reeba, okabateera, kwonka tikyabasaasa; waabacoocoora, haza tibaakyetaho, Baagangaara aha maisho okukira orukiri, baayanga kweteisa." 
Jeremiah5:4 Naanye nikwo kugira nti: Ebishi aba n'abantu bataine ku bari tibarikwetegyereza; ahabw'okuba tibarikumanya mitwarize ya Mukama ei Ruhanga waabo yaabaragiire. 
Jeremiah5:5 Mbwenu nu ka nyegiire omu bakuru, mbe nibo naagamba nabo; ahabw'okuba bo nibamanya emitwarize ya Mukama, n'eiteeka rya Ruhanga waabo, ahabw'okuba bo nibamanya eki arikubaragiira kukora. Kwonka boona oku batura, naashanga bahenzire omugamba, bacwire enkomo." 
Jeremiah5:6 Nikyo bariitirwa entare y'omu kibira bakataagataagurwa omushega gurikuruga omu ihamba; engwe ekagwera ab'omu ndembo zaabo, owaarugamu weena ekamutaanyaguza. Manya ebicumuro byabo ni bingi, n'oburare bwabo burengyesereize!" 
Jeremiah5:7 Mbwenu nimbaasa nta kukusaasira, abantu baawe ku baraabe baanyimwire bakaramya abatari baaruhanga? Ku naabagaburiire naabahaazya, baashambana, baayerunda aha maju ga baamaraaya." 
Jeremiah5:8 Baaba nk'engundu z'embaraasi eziriisiibwe gye, ezirikushiija, buri omwe yaacundanisa muka mutaahi we." 
Jeremiah5:9 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mbwenu shi tindibafubira ahabw'ebyo, kandi tindihoora enzigu eihanga eriri nk'eri?" 
Jeremiah5:10 Nimwirooko murabe omu mizaabibu yaayo, mugitemagure, kwonka mutagimariraho kimwe. Mugikonkobore amataagi, ahabw'okuba ti ga Nyakubaho." 
Jeremiah5:11 Manya ab'omuryango gwa Isiraeli n'ab'ogwa Yuda bambeereire kimwe abatari beesigwa; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba. 
Jeremiah5:12 Bagambire ahari Nyakubaho ebitari by'amazima baagira bati: Taine ki araakore. Tihariho kabi karituhikaho, nobu kwakuba okwitwa rurara nari okuteerwa enjara." 
Jeremiah5:13 Bati: Abarangi ni busha nk'omuyaga. Tibaine by'amazima ebi barikuranga. Haza nikwo baritwazibwa! 
Jeremiah5:14 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe arikugirira ati: Ahabw'okugamba batyo, mbwenu naaza kukuta omu kanwa ebigambo byangye, mbihindure omuriro; n'aba bantu babe enku, omuriro gubootsye." 
Jeremiah5:15 Imwe ab'omuryango gwa Isiraeli, reeba, niinyija kubahururiza eihanga, rirugye hare, ribateere; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba. N'eihanga ry'amaani, kandi erya ira; eihanga eri otarikumanya rurimi rwaryo, nobu kwakuba okwetegyereza ebi abantu baaryo barikugamba." 
Jeremiah5:16 Emitana yaabo ni nk'ebituuro byashami, kandi boona n'amamanzi." 
Jeremiah5:17 Baryayaya ebi mushaarwire n'ebimurikuryaho. Baryaita batabani baanyu na bahara baanyu. Baryabaaga amasyo gaanyu g'ente n'ag'entaama. Baryacwekyereza emizaabibu yaanyu n'emitiini yaanyu. Endembo zaanyu z'ebigo bigumire ezi murikwesiga, amahe gaabo gazisheenyagure." 
Jeremiah5:18 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nangwa n'omu biro ebyo imwe tindibamariraho kimwe. 
Jeremiah5:19 Abantu ku baribuuza bati: Mukama Ruhanga waitu atutuzire ki, yaaza kutukoraho ebi byona? Obagarukyemu oti noogira ati: Nk'oku mwanyimwire, mukaramiza omu nsi yaanyu baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga; nikyo muribeera ab'okushumbira abanyamahanga omu nsi etari yaanyu." 
Jeremiah5:20 Mukigambire ab'omuryango gwa Yakobo, mukirangirire ab'ogwa Yuda muti:" 
Jeremiah5:21 Imwe bashema 'mwe, abatari kwetegyereza, abaine amaisho, kwonka mutarikureeba; abaine amatu kwonka mutarikuhurira, nimuhurire eki:" 
Jeremiah5:22 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ahabw'enki timuntiina? Ahabw'enki mutatetemera omu maisho gangye? Nkateeraho enyanja omusheenyi kuba omwatano gwayo, kuba omucungiro ogu etarikubaasa kurengyeraho. Ebingonzi nobu byakwecunda bita, tibikaagubaasa; kandi nobu byakuhoorera bita, tibikaagurengyeraho." 
Jeremiah5:23 Kwonka abantu b'eri ihanga n'engangaazi, kandi n'abagomi. Bataishukire, baayegyendera." 
Jeremiah5:24 Tibarikugira mu mitima yaabo bati: Ka tutiine Mukama Ruhanga waitu otuha enjura omu bunaku bwayo, enjura y'eibiba n'eya katumba, kandi otuteeraho obunaku bw'okugyesheramu." 
Jeremiah5:25 Ebicumuro byanyu nibyo byaihireho ebyo; ebibi byanyu byabaimisa ebirungi. 
Jeremiah5:26 Manya omu bantu bangye nihashangwamu abantu babi, abarikugwera nk'abategire enyonyi. Nibatega emitego, bakwata abantu." 
Jeremiah5:27 Amaju gaabo gaijwire obugobya, nk'ekitukuru kiijwire enyonyi. Nikyo babeereire abatungi kandi bahango;" 
Jeremiah5:28 bakagomoka bakasiigiriza. Omu kukora ebibi tibaine bugarukiro. Tibacwera fuuzi manja omu bwinganisa, kuzibaisa gye; kandi tibatonganira bakyene." 
Jeremiah5:29 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mbwenu shi tindibafubira ahabw'ebyo bintu? Kandi tindihoora nzigu eihanga nk'eri? 
Jeremiah5:30 Ekintu ekirikwitsa obwoba kandi ekirikutiinisa kibaireho omuri egi nsi. 
Jeremiah5:31 Abarangi nibagamba ebishuba, abahongyerezi bategyeka nibakuratira ebi abo barangi baabahabura; haza abantu bangye babisiima. Mbwenu muheru ku erihika, muryagira muta?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Imwe aba Benyamiini, nimuhungye murugye omuri Yerusalemu, musherure obukiriro. Nimuteerere enzamba omuri Tekoa, mwimutsye orurango ahari Betihakeremu; ahabw'okuba akabi kaareetana nikareeterwa aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, karimu okucwekyerera kuhango." 
Jeremiah6:2 Niinyija kucwekyereza Siyooni enungi eyaayoreirwe neetetsibwa. 
Jeremiah6:3 Abariisa b'entaama nibaija kugirwanisa baine amasyo gaabo; bateere amahema gaabo kugyehinguririza; haza buri omwe ariisize ahu arikwenda. 
Jeremiah6:4 Nimutengye orugamba tuze kugirwanisa! Nimwimukye tugiteere nyomushana! Ai bambe! tugire tuta? Ka bwaza kwira, reeba ekirengabazaana!" 
Jeremiah6:5 Nimwimukye nu tugiteere nyekiro, tusheenye ebikaari byayo!" 
Jeremiah6:6 Manya Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Muteme emiti ya Yerusalemu, murunde eby'okugigoteraho. Oru n'orurembo orushemereire kufubirwa, ahabw'okuba tirubamu kindi, kureka okuhata abantu." 
Jeremiah6:7 Nk'oku eiziba riguma nirijwa amaizi, n'oru rurembo nikwo rutuura nirukora ebibi. Tiinyosha kuruhuriramu eby'obwinazi n'eby'okucwekyereza, nindureebamu abarwaire n'abahutaaziibwe." 
Jeremiah6:8 Iwe Yerusalemu 'we, yerinde! Ntakaataana naiwe, nkakuhindura ensi y'amatongo etatuurwamu bantu." 
Jeremiah6:9 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Humbahumba omu Baisiraeli abatsigaireho, nk'oku omuntu ahumba aha muzaabibu. Garuka orabye omukono omu mataagi gaagwo, nk'oku orikushoroma ebijuma by'emizaabibu agira." 
Jeremiah6:10 Mbwenu ni baahi abu ndaagambire, nkeehanangiriza, bakabona kuhurira? Reeba, amatu bagahendeiremu ebiti tibarikwenda kuhurira. Reeba, eki Nyakubaho arikubagambira nibakigaya, tibarikukisiima." 
Jeremiah6:11 Nikyo ekiniga ki Nyakubaho abainiire kirikumbugumiramu, nkabura agakigumisiriza. Nawe nikwo kungira ati: Kigirire abaana b'omu bihandagazi, n'ahu abatsigazi beerundaaniire, abashaija n'abakazi baabo, abantu abakuzire munonga, nangwa n'abahwitsire batwarwe." 
Jeremiah6:12 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Amaju gaabo garyaba ag'abandi, otaireho emisiri yaabo n'abakazi baabo; ahabw'okuba abatwire omuri egyo nsi ndyababangira omukono." 
Jeremiah6:13 Manya buri muntu omuribo, okwiha aha muto okuta aha mukuru, naaruruuhira okwetungisa omu buryo butahikire. Kandi okwiha aha murangi okuta aha muhongyerezi, buri omwe n'engobya." 
Jeremiah6:14 Batambiire abantu bangye obuhuta aharuguru, baabagira bati: Muri gye, muri gye; haza kunu batari gye." 
Jeremiah6:15 Mbwenu shi ku baaherize kukora ebihagaro, bakaitwa enshoni? Ngaaha; tibaraitsirwe nshoni n'akakye; nangwa tibaragizire bu babwerabwera. Nikyo barigwera gangari, nk'oku abandi baagwire; aha izooba eri ndibafubiriraho, bakahwerekyerezibwa; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah6:16 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mwemerere ahu emihanda eteeranira. Mubuuririze otuhanda otwa ira, n'ahu omuhanda omurungi guri. Haza mube nigwo mwatoora; mubone kutunga obuhuumure. Kwonka bo baagira bati: titurikwija kugutoora." 
Jeremiah6:17 Nkabataho abarinzi, naagira nti: Ku muraahurire eiraka ry'enzamba, muteho omutima! Kwonka bo baagira bati: titurikwija kuritaho omutima." 
Jeremiah6:18 Mbwenu imwe mahanga 'mwe, nimuhurire, naimwe bantu 'mwe, mwena mumanye ebiraababeho." 
Jeremiah6:19 Iwe nsi 'we, hurira! Reeba, niinyija kugwisiza aba bantu akagwe, mbature okwehabagiza; ahabw'okuba tibataire mutima aha bi mbagambiire, baayanga kukuratira amateeka gangye." 
Jeremiah6:20 Mbwenu shi bantoijerera ki obubaani burikuruga Sheeba, n'emigaju ei baiha omu nsi ya hare? Emitoijo yaanyu tindikugyakiira; n'ebitambo byanyu ebicwekize tindikubisiima." 
Jeremiah6:21 Nikyo Nyakubaho arikugirira ati: Reeba, aba bantu ndyabatega enkongi, abaana na baishebo baziteereho entsibo; bataahi baabo na bagyenzi baabo bahwerekyerere." 
Jeremiah6:22 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba eihanga niriija niriruga omu nsi y'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho; eihanga rihango nirihurura, niriruga omu byanga by'aha muheru gw'ensi," 
Jeremiah6:23 Abantu baaryo bakwaitse amata n'amacumu, n'enshaarizi, tibaine saasi, Endigito yaabo ni nk'enyanja erikuhoorera. Batembire embaraasi, Batengire orugamba kukuteera iwe Siyooni." 
Jeremiah6:24 Tuhuriire enkuru yaabo, emikono yaitu yaatentebuka, twagira obujune bwingi, n'obusaasi, nk'obw'omukazi orikurumwa." 
Jeremiah6:25 Mutashohora kuza omu ishwa, nobu kwakuba okugyendagyenda omu mihanda; ahabw'okuba abazigu bahagatiire zaarurara; obwoba bututurukire oku n'oku." 
Jeremiah6:26 Iwe rurembo rw'abantu bangye 'we, yezirikye ebiguniya, oyekuringye omu iju; ocure nk'ofiisize omwana we omwe nyamunegyere, otonzye oine enaku nyingi; ahabw'okuba ow'okukuhwerekyereza naija kukuteera kitaraariire." 
Jeremiah6:27 Nkuhindwire ow'okugyeragyeranisa n'okugyeza abantu bangye, ngu obone kumanya n'okugyeragyeranisa emitwarize yaabo." 
Jeremiah6:28 Boona n'engangaazi kandi abagomi, abarikugyenda nibabeiherera abandi. Bagumire nk'omuringa nari nk'ekyoma; boona oku batura, nibakora ebitahikire." 
Jeremiah6:29 Emijuba neejugutirirwa n'amaani, risasi eyagibwa omuriro; kwonka beeruhiza busha kugumizamu nibayazya, ahabw'okuba enkamba eba etarugireho." 
Jeremiah6:30 Abantu nibabeeta efeeza y'ekikwangara, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho abacwire." 
Jeremiah7:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Yeremiya ati: 
Jeremiah7:2 Yemerera aha irembo rya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, orangirireyo ebi bigambo oti: Imwe abantu ba Yuda 'mwe mwena abaraba omuri aga marembo kuramya Nyakubaho, nimuhurire eki arikugamba." 
Jeremiah7:3 Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Mushemeze emitwarize yaanyu n'ebi murikukora; nibwo ndaabarekye mukaguma omuri ogu mwanya." 
Jeremiah7:4 Murekye kwekiita nimugamba ebigambo by'okwebeiha nimugira muti: Egi ni Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho! Ni Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho! Ni Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho! 
Jeremiah7:5 Manya ku muraashemereze kimwe emitwarize yaanyu n'ebi murikukora, mwakorerana eby'obwinganisa omu mazima," 
Jeremiah7:6 mwareka kuhata omunyaihanga, efuuzi n'omufaakazi nari okusheeshera eshagama y'abataine rubanja omuri ogu mwanya, kandi mwareka kuramya baaruhanga abandi kikabarugiramu akabi;" 
Jeremiah7:7 nibwo ndibareka mukatuura omuri ogu mwanya omu nsi ei eira naahaire baashwenkuriimwe kuba eyaabo ebiro byona. 
Jeremiah7:8 Reeba, nimwesigira busha ebigambo bi murikwebeihesa." 
Jeremiah7:9 Mbwenu shi nimwija kuguma nimwiba, nimwita, nimushambana, nimurahira ebishuba, nimwoterera Baali obubaani, nimuramya baaruhanga abandi abu mwabaire mutakamanyaga;" 
Jeremiah7:10 reero mwije muunyemerere omu maisho omuri Nyaruju egi erikuunyetererwa, mugire muti: Turi buhooro; haza kunu mugumiizemu nimukora ebyo bihagaro byona?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Nyaruju egi erikuunyetererwa mugihindwire eryaya ry'abasikuzi? Reeba, nyowe nkireebire; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah7:12 Nimwirooko muze omu mwanya gwangye ogwabaire guri omuri Shiilo ei naabandize kutuura, haza mureebe oku naagigizire ahabw'ebicumuro by'abantu bangye Abaisiraeli." 
Jeremiah7:13 Mbwenu Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nk'oku mukozire ebyo byona, nkibagambira mukaguma mwangire kuntega okutu, nkibeeta mukanga kuunyetaba," 
Jeremiah7:14 nikyo ndaagirire kubi Nyaruju egi erikuunyetererwa, kandi ei murikwesiga, n'omwanya ogu naabahaire na baashwenkuriimwe, nk'oku naagizire Shiilo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Reero mbacwe, mundugye omu maisho, nk'oku naacwire beene waanyu boona ab'oruzaaro rwa Efuraimu." 
Jeremiah7:16 Mbwenu iwe Yeremiya, otashabira aba bantu, nobu kwakuba okwimutsya eiraka kubatonganira. Kandi naanye otaanyeshengyereza, ahabw'okuba tindikwija kukuhurira." 
Jeremiah7:17 Torikureeba ebi barikukora omu ndembo za Buyuda n'omu muhanda ya Yerusalemu? 
Jeremiah7:18 Abaana nibasheenya enku, baishebo bahemba omuriro, abakazi bakanda eisyanga kuteekyera omugabekazi w'eiguru otugaati, kandi bashukira baaruhanga abandi emitoijo y'ebyokunywa, kuunyitsa ekiniga." 
Jeremiah7:19 Mukama naabuuza ati: Ebyo niinye baba basaasize? Ngaaha; nibo beesaasa bakeehemura. 
Jeremiah7:20 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Reeba, niinyija kugwerwa kubi n'okugirira ekiniga kingi ogu mwanya, abantu n'enyamaishwa, emiti y'omu ishwa, n'ebihingirwe omu itaka; haza kashanga yangye eyakye, ereme kuraaza." 
Jeremiah7:21 Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Mwongyere ebitambo bicwekize aha bindi bitambo byanyu ebi murikwikirizibwa kurya enyama zaabyo." 
Jeremiah7:22 Kwonka Nyowe obu naiha baashwenkuriimwe omu nsi ya Misiri, tindabagambiire, nobu kwakuba okubaragiira ebikwatiraine n'ebitambo bicwekize n'ebindi bitambo;" 
Jeremiah7:23 kureka nkabaragiira nti: Mugume muunyorobere, nibwo ndiba Ruhanga waanyu, naimwe mukaba abantu bangye, mukatwaza nk'oku ndikubaragiira, mukabona kuba gye." 
Jeremiah7:24 Kwonka tibaroorobire, nobu kwakuba okutega okutu, kureka baaguma nibatwaza nk'oku enaama zaabo n'obugangaazi bw'emitima yaabo emibi byabaire biri; baagaruka enyima, omu mwanya gw'okugyenda omu maisho." 
Jeremiah7:25 Okwiha aha izooba eri baashwenkuriimwe baarugiireho omu nsi ya Misiri, n'okuhitsya eri izooba, nkaguma nimbatumaho abaheereza bangye abarangi ntarikwosha;" 
Jeremiah7:26 kwonka bo tibampurira, nobu kwakuba okuntega okutu, kureka baagangaara; baakora kubi okukira baishebo." 
Jeremiah7:27 Mbwenu ebyo byona obibagambire, kwonka tibarikwija kukuhurira. Obeete, kwonka tibarikwija kukwetaba." 
Jeremiah7:28 Reero obagambire oti: Eri n'eihanga eritaroorobeire ebi Mukama Ruhanga waaryo yaariragiire, rikanga kutegyekwa. Amazima gafiire, tibaakigagamba." 
Jeremiah7:29 Imwe bantu ba Yerusalemu 'mwe, nimweshare amashokye muganagye, mucurire aha bibungo by'emparamaata; ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho atamirwe abantu b'oruzaaro oru abamwitsize ekiniga, yaabarugaho." 
Jeremiah7:30 Manya Nyakubaho naagira ati: Aba Yuda bancumwireho, baata ebihagaro omu nju erikuunyetererwa, baagishiisha," 
Jeremiah7:31 baayombeka Tofeti eitambiro omu ruhanga rwa mwene Hinomu kwokyezayo batabani baabo na bahara baabo nibabatamba; ekintu eki ntakaragiiraga, kandi ekitakaijaga mu biteekateeko byangye." 
Jeremiah7:32 Nikyo Nyakubaho ogwo arikugirira ati: Reeba, obunaku buryahika, obu ogwo mwanya gutaryetwa Tofeti, nari oruhanga rwa mwene Hinomu, kureka oruhanga rw'Eriitiro; ahabw'okuba Tofeti niyo bariguma nibaziika abantu, ahabw'okubura ahandi h'okuziika." 
Jeremiah7:33 Reero emitumbi y'abo bantu eryariibwa enyonyi n'enyamaishwa, hatariho orikuzikanga;" 
Jeremiah7:34 haza mbuze omu ndembo za Buyuda n'omu nguuto za Yerusalemu amaraka g'abarikushemererwa n'abarikwesiima n'aga baakishwera na baakishwerwa; ahabw'okuba ensi yoona eryaba amatongo. 
Jeremiah8:1 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Omu bunaku obwo amagufa g'abagabe ba Buyuda, n'ag'abategyeki baayo, n'ag'abahongyerezi, n'ag'abarangi, n'ag'abatuuzi ba Yerusalemu garyaziikuurwa omu bituuro byabo," 
Jeremiah8:2 gaanamire eizooba n'okwezi n'enyonyoozi ebi baabaire nibakunda, nibaheereza, nibaraguzaho nibagirira omweto, kandi nibaramya. Haza tigarishanguruzibwa nobu kwakuba okuziikwa; kureka garyaguma gaanami aha itaka nk'amasha." 
Jeremiah8:3 Boona ab'orwo ruganda rubi abarihonoka bakatsigara omu myanya yoona ei naabataataaniiremu okufa kuryabakirira okugumaho; Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugamba. 
Jeremiah8:4 Obagambire oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Hari abantu ku bagwa tibaimuka? Omuntu ku ahaba, tahabuuka?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Mbwenu shi ahabw'enki aba bantu baanyimwire, batangarukire n'akakye; bakahamira aha by'obugobya, bakanga kugaruka?" 
Jeremiah8:6 Ntaireho omutima, naatega okutu, kwonka tinaahurira orikugamba ebihikire. Tihariho orikweteisa ekibi kye akagira ati: Ai bambe! Mbwenu eki nkozire ki? Buri omwe naatoora omuhanda gwe, nk'embaraasi erikuturumbuza neeza aha rugamba." 
Jeremiah8:7 Nangwa n'enkongoro erikuzeereera emanya obunaku bu eraagarukiremu; enkombe, entaratambi n'entuuha, nazo zigira obunaku bwazo bw'okutaaruuka; beitu abantu bangye tibamanya ebi Nyowe Nyakubaho mbaragiira." 
Jeremiah8:8 Nimubaasa muta kugira muti: Turi abanyabwengye kandi niitwe twine amateeka ga Nyakubaho, haza kunu ekaraamu y'abahandiiki embeihi egahindwire ag'ebishuba?" 
Jeremiah8:9 Abanyabwengye baryahemuka, bamanywe, bashoberwe, ahabw'okwanga ebi abarangi ba Nyakubaho baagambire. Mbwenu obwo baine bwengye ki?" 
Jeremiah8:10 N'ahabw'ekyo abakazi baabo ndyabaha abandi bashaija, emisiri yaabo ngihe abaribasingura; ahabw'okuba okwiha aha muto okuta aha mukuru, buri muntu naaruruuhira okwetungisa omu buryo butahikire. Kandi okwiha aha murangi okuta aha muhongyerezi, buri omwe n'engobya." 
Jeremiah8:11 Batambiire abantu bangye obuhuta aharuguru, baabagira bati: Muri gye, muri gye; haza kunu batari gye." 
Jeremiah8:12 Mbwenu shi ku baaherize kukora ebihagaro bakaitwa enshoni? Ngaaha; tibaraitsirwe nshoni n'akakye. Nangwa tibaragizire bu babwerabwera. Nikyo barigwera gangari, nk'oku abandi baagwire; aha izooba eri ndibafubiriraho bakahwerekyerezibwa; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah8:13 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Buzimazima ndyabamariraho kimwe, babe nk'omuzaabibu nari omutiini guhwairweho ebijuma; n'amababi gaayo gakahotoka, n'ebi naabahaire bikabaihwaho." 
Jeremiah8:14 Nabo nikwo kwebuuza bati: Mbwenu nitugumibwa ki aha? Mwena nimwije tuze omu ndembo z'ebigo bigumire tube niyo twahwerekyererera. Manya Mukama Ruhanga waitu atucwereire orubanja rw'okufa, yaatuha amaizi garimu obushegu kuganywa, ahabw'okuba tumucumwireho." 
Jeremiah8:15 Tubaire nituteekateeka ngu nitwija kugira obusingye, twabura akarungi ku twatunga. Tubaire twine amatsiko g'okutambirwa, mbwenu reeba, haija ebirikwitsa obwoba!" 
Jeremiah8:16 Okufuureeka kw'embaraasi zaabo nikuhuririrwa omu kyanga kya Daani. Engundu zaazo ku zirikububura, ensi yoona etengyeeta. Baizire baacwekyereza ensi n'ebigirimu byona, baataho orurembo n'abarutwiremu." 
Jeremiah8:17 Manya reeba niinyija kubooherereza enjoka n'empiri zitarikurumuuzibwa, zibateme; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah8:18 Enaku n'ez'okuunyita, ngwire enshazi." 
Jeremiah8:19 Nimuhurire okuborooga kw'ab'eihanga ryangye okurikureetwa oku n'oku omu nsi yoona nibagira bati: Nyakubaho takiri muri Siyooni? Omugabe waayo takigirimu? Nyakubaho nawe ati: Ahabw'enki bangwisize kubi n'ebishushani byabo by'endugamahanga ebirikuramibwa? 
Jeremiah8:20 Eigyesha rihwaire, n'ekyanda kyahwa, kwonka titukajunirwe!" 
Jeremiah8:21 Manya ninsaasibwa obuhuta bw'ab'eihanga ryangye ninganya, omutima gumpwaire omunda!" 
Jeremiah8:22 Omuri Gileadi tihaakibamu mubazi gw'okwomoora? Tihaakibayo mufumu? Mbwenu ahabw'enki abantu b'eihanga ryangye batakatambiirwe? 
Jeremiah9:1 Nkaabaasibwa ki, omutwe gwangye guba eiziba riijwire amaizi, amaisho gangye gaba enshuro y'amarira, ncura nyomushana na nyekiro, ahabw'abantu b'eihanga ryangye abaitsirwe!" 
Jeremiah9:2 Nkaabaasibwa ki, ngira omu ihamba eicumbi nk'ery'abagyenzi, ntsigaho abantu bangye mbaza hare! Ahabw'okuba boona n'enshambani, n'ekigombe ky'endeebya." 
Jeremiah9:3 Bainika orurimi nk'obuta. Ebishuba gatari mazima nibyo birikutegyeka omu nsi. Manya ku baheza kukora ekibi, bakora ekindi, kandi tibarikuunyetaho; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah9:4 Buri muntu ayerinde mutaahi we, kandi ateesiga mweneishe ahabw'okuba buri munyaruganda n'engobya nka Yakobo kandi buri mutaahi w'omuntu naagyenda naamugambuura." 
Jeremiah9:5 Buri omwe naaryarya mutahi we; tihaine orikugamba amazima, kureka bamanyiirize endimi zaabo kugamba ebishuba. Nibakora ebibi, babura agabyeteisa." 
Jeremiah9:6 Nibatungika okuhata aha kundi, n'obugobya aha bundi; banga kuunyemera; Mukama nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah9:7 Nikyo Mukama ow'amahe arikugirira ati: Niinyija kubashemeza, mbagyeze. Mbwenu abo bantu bangye, ekindi nkaabakorera ki?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Orurimi rwabo ni nk'omwambi gurikugwisaho! Nirugamba eby'obugobya. Buri omwe naagamba gye na mutaahi we; haza kunu amwiniire enaama y'okumugwera. 
Jeremiah9:9 Mbwenu Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ebyo bintu tindibibatura nkabafubira? Kandi tindihoora nzigu eihanga nk'eri? 
Jeremiah9:10 Nindira kandi nincurira enshozi, nintongyeza amariisizo g'omu ihamba, ahabw'okuba bihindukire eirungu; tihaakiriho orikubirabamu; n'ente tizaakijugirayo." 
Jeremiah9:11 Nyakubaho nawe agira ati: Ndyahindura Yerusalemu omutuumo gw'amatongo, n'eikobezo rya zaamuha; Endembo za Yerusalemu nzihindure emishaka, habure owaazituuramu." 
Jeremiah9:12 Ni munyabwengye ki owaakwetegyereza ekyo? N'oha ou Nyakubaho akigambiire ngu akirangye? Ahabw'enki ensi esiisikaire ekaba nk'eihamba, hakabura owaagirabamu?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Nyakubaho nawe ati: N'ahabw'okuba barekire amateeka agu naabahaire, baayanga kugakuratira;" 
Jeremiah9:14 kureka baakuratira ebi emitima yaabo egangaire erikwenda; baaramya baabaali abu baishebo baabahabwire. 
Jeremiah9:15 Nikyo Mukama ow'amahe Ruhanga wa Isiraeli arikugirira ati: Reeba, aba bantu niinyija kubariisa omuravunga, mbanywaise amaizi garimu obushegu." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ndyabataataanira omu mahanga, agu bo, nobu baakuba baishebo, batakamanyaga; haza mbakuratse rurara okuhitsya obu ndibamaraho." 
Jeremiah9:17 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Nimuteekateekye aha biraabeho! Mwete abakazi b'okucura baije. Mutume aha bakazi abahangu baije. 
Jeremiah9:18 Nabo bati: Nibarahukye batucurire; amarira gatufukunkukye omu maisho, ebitsigye bihimintikye amaizi." 
Jeremiah9:19 Manya nituhurira ekiboroogo ky'ab'omuri Siyooni nibagira bati: Ai bambe, twafa! Twahemukira kimwe, twatsigaho ensi yaitu, amaka gaitu gaasheenywa." 
Jeremiah9:20 Naanye naabagira nti: Imwe bakazi 'mwe, nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikugamba; amatu gaanyu gaakiire ekigambo ekirikumuruga omu kanwa. Nimwegyese bahara baanyu okutonzya, buri omwe ayegyese mutaahi we ekyeshongoro ky'okucura." 
Jeremiah9:21 Manya rufu yaahikire omu madirisa gaitu, yaataahire omu bikaari byaitu kumara abaana omu nguuto, n'abatsigazi omu nteeraniro z'emihanda." 
Jeremiah9:22 Obagire oti: Oku nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba naagira ati: Emitumbi y'abantu eryayanamira omu ishwa nk'amasha; ebe nk'enganda z'oburo ezi omugyesi atsiga enyima, zikabura owaazishanguruza." 
Jeremiah9:23 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Omunyabwengye arekye kwehimbisa ahabw'obwengye bwe, ow'amaani arekye kwehimbisa ahabw'amaani ge; n'omutungi arekye kwehimbisa ahabw'eitungo rye;" 
Jeremiah9:24 kureka orikwehimbisa ayehimbise ahabw'okummanya n'okuunyetegyereza ku ndi Nyakubaho ogira rukundo etahararuka, akakora omu nsi eby'oburyo n'ebihikire ahabw'okuba ebyo Nyowe nibyo nshemerererwa; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah9:25 Reeba, obunaku buryahika nfubire abashazirwe boona, abatashazirwe mu mazima." 
Jeremiah9:26 Aba Misiri, aba Buyuda, aba Edomu, aba Amoni, aba Moabu n'abatwire omu ihamba boona, abatega ebyeyera; ahabw'okuba ab'amahanga ago goona tibashazirwe, kandi ab'omuryango gwa Isiraeli boona tibashazirwe mu mutima." 
Jeremiah10:1 Imwe ab'omuryango gwa Isiraeli, nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikubagambira." 
Jeremiah10:2 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mutaritooreza emicwe y'abanyamahanga, nobu kwakuba okuhahaazibwa ebihangwagashani by'omu iguru; ahabw'okuba ebyo abanyamahanga nibyo batiina." 
Jeremiah10:3 Manya emigyenzo y'abanyamahanga eba busha. Batema omuti omu kibira, omunyamwoga agubaija n'embaijo." 
Jeremiah10:4 Ekyo kiti abantu bakihunda efeeza n'ezaabu. Bakihamisa emishumaari nibagiteeza enyondo; ngu kitajegajega. 
Jeremiah10:5 Ebishushani byabo ebirikuramibwa ni nka waringa z'okurindisa enyonyi omu musiri gw'ekihambo. Tibigamba, biba eby'okuheekwa, ahabw'okuba tibibaasa kwegyendesa. Mutabitiina, ahabw'okuba tibiine ki birikubaasa kukora, yaaba kibi nari kirungi." 
Jeremiah10:6 Ai Nyakubaho, tihariho orikushushana naiwe. Oba mukuru, n'eiziina ryawe riba rikuru kandi ery'obushoboorozi." 
Jeremiah10:7 Mbwenu Iwe Mugabe w'amahanga goona, n'oha otakaakutiina? Manya ekyo nikyo oshemereire; ahabw'okuba omu banyabwengye b'omu mahanga n'omu b'omu nsi z'abagabe zoona, tihariho orikushushana naiwe." 
Jeremiah10:8 Boona oku baingana tibaine bwengye kandi n'ebifeera. Ebi beegyesibwa egyo mpimbi y'ekiti tibiine muhoho! 
Jeremiah10:9 Babihunda efeeza ei baihire Tarushiishi, n'ezaabu erugire Ufaazi, Bikorwa abanyamyoga n'abaheesi b'eby'ezaabu; ebijwaro byabyo ebya bujwa n'ebirikutukura byona bikorwa abahangu." 
Jeremiah10:10 Kwonka Nyakubaho niwe Ruhanga Nyamuhanga, Ruhanga ohuriire kandi Omugabe w'obutwire bwona. Ku agira ekiniga, ensi etetema, kandi amahanga tigabaasa kumwemera agwirwe kubi." 
Jeremiah10:11 Mbwenu mubagambire muti: Baaruhanga abatarahangire iguru n'ensi, baryahwerekyerera omu nsi ahansi y'eiguru" 
Jeremiah10:12 Niwe yaahangiise ensi obushoboorozi bwe, akagihamya n'obwengye bwe, n'eiguru akaribambisa okwetegyereza kwe." 
Jeremiah10:13 Ku agamba, amaizi g'omu iguru gahoorera, kandi aimutsya orwanyaanya ruruga aha mperu z'ensi. Arabisa emirabyo kugwisa enjura, kandi ahuuhisa omuyaga naagwiha omu mabiikiro ge." 
Jeremiah10:14 Ebyo omuntu ku abireeba, ayemanya ku ari omushema otarikwetegyereza. Omuheesi w'eby'ezaabu weena ahemurwa ebishushani ebiramibwa ebi aheesha; ahabw'okuba ebyo bishushani bye n'eby'ebishuba, kandi tibigira mwitsyo." 
Jeremiah10:15 Tibiine mugasho, okubikora n'okwebeiha! Obunaku bwabyo bw'okufubirwa ku burihika biryacwekyerera." 
Jeremiah10:16 Kwonka Ruhanga wa Yakobo tari nkabyo, ahabw'okuba niwe yaahangire ebintu byona, Kandi niwe yaatooraine aba Isiraeli kuba abantu be ahabwe; Eiziina rye ni Mukama ow'amahe." 
Jeremiah10:17 Iwe otuura ogotsirwe, koma ebyawe!" 
Jeremiah10:18 Manya Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba hati naaza kujuguta abatuuzi b'omuri egi nsi mbareebese enaku, haza bakimanye." 
Jeremiah10:19 Ai bambe, ebishi nyine obusaasi! Obuhuta n'obw'okuunyita. Reero naagira nti: Buzimazima oku n'okubonabona, kwonka nshemereire kukwemera." 
Jeremiah10:20 Owangye ecwekyereire, emiguha y'eihema ryangye bagicwire. Abaana bangye bantsigireho, tinkibaine. Tihariho w'okugaruka kunshashaanurira eihema, n'okunteerera emikingo." 
Jeremiah10:21 Manya abariisa baitu tibaine bwengye, tibarikwehanuuza ahari Nyakubaho. Nikyo kibazibiire kuba gye, obusyo bwabo bwona bukataataana." 
Jeremiah10:22 Nimuhurire! Reeba, enkuru neija! Hariho okujagarara kuhango, okurikuruga omu nsi y'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, kuhindura endembo za Yuda amatongo, n'eikoobaaniro rya zaamuha." 
Jeremiah10:23 Ai Nyakubaho, nimmanya ku hatariho muntu omanya muheru ye, kandi ku omuntu atabaasa kwehabura muhanda ahi yaahika hoona." 
Jeremiah10:24 Mbwenu, ai Nyakubaho, mpana, kwonka ompane nombariirira; otampanisa ekiniga okancwekyereza." 
Jeremiah10:25 Girira ekiniga amahanga agatarikukwikiriza, n'abantu abatarikukutakira; ahabw'okuba baitsire aba Yakobo, baabashekyera, baabamariraho kimwe, ensi yaabo baagihindura amatongo." 
Jeremiah11:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Yeremiya ati: 
Jeremiah11:2 Hurira eby'endagaano, haza obigambire aba Yuda n'abatwire Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah11:3 Obagambire oti: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Omuntu otarikuta mutima ha by'omu ndagaano egyo, akyeenwe;" 
Jeremiah11:4 egyo ndagaano ei naaragiire baashwenkuriimwe, obu naabaiha omu nsi ya Misiri, eyaabaire eri nk'eiziiko ry'ekyoma. Nkabagira nti: Mugume mumpurire, mukore byona ebi ndikubaragiira. Nibwo muriba abantu bangye, naanye nkaba Ruhanga wanyu," 
Jeremiah11:5 nkabone kuhitsya eki naarahiire baashwenkuriimwe kubaha ensi erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki, nk'oku kiri n'eri izooba. Naanye naamugarukamu nti: Nyakubaho, kibe nikwo kyaba." 
Jeremiah11:6 Nawe yangira ati: Rangirira ebi byona omu ndembo za Yuda, n'omu nguuto za Yerusalemu, oti: Nimuhurire ebigambo by'omuri egi ndagaano, haza mubihitsye." 
Jeremiah11:7 Oti: Manya obu naabaiha omu nsi ya Misiri, nkeehanangiriza munonga baashwenkuriimwe, kandi naaguma nimbeehanangiriza n'okuhitsya eri izooba, nimbagira nti: Nimumpurire!" 
Jeremiah11:8 Kwonka tibarampuriire, nobu kwakuba okuntega okutu; kureka buri muntu yaaguma ari engangaazi nk'omutima gwe omubi oku guri. Nikyo naabafubiriire nimbatura ebiri omuri egyo ndagaano byona ebi naabaragiire kukora bakanga." 
Jeremiah11:9 Kandi Nyakubaho akangira ati: Omu Baayuda n'omu batuuzi ba Yerusalemu harimu obugomi. 
Jeremiah11:10 Bagarukire enyima, baakora ebibi bya baishenkurubo, abaayangire kukora ebi naabagambiire, bakakuratira baaruhanga abandi, bakabaramya. Ab'omuryango gwa Isiraeli n'ab'ogwa Yuda baitsire endagaano yangye ei naaragaine na baishebo." 
Jeremiah11:11 Nikyo Nyakubaho arikubagirira ati: Reeba, niinyija kubagwisiza akagwe aku batarikubaasa kwetantara. Nobu barantakire, tindikwija kubatega kutu." 
Jeremiah11:12 Haza ab'omu ndembo za Buyuda n'abatwire Yerusalemu bagyende, batakire baaruhanga abu booterera obubaani, ndeebe ku bataaremwa kubajuna bari omu naku." 
Jeremiah11:13 Manya Iwe Buyuda baaruhanga baawe baabaire baingi, nk'oku endembo zaawe zirikwingana; n'amatambiro agu mwombekire kwotereraho ekihemu Baali obubaani, ni maingi nk'enguuto za Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah11:14 Mbwenu nu, iwe otashabira abo bantu, nobu kwakuba okubatonganira n'okubeshengyereza; ahabw'okuba ku barintakira bari omu naku, tindibatega kutu." 
Jeremiah11:15 Hati nkunzi yangye ekirikumureeta omuri Nyaruju yangye yaakozire ebihagaro ni ki? Noogira ngu ebisigo n'enyama z'ebitambo nibibaasa kukwihisaho orubanja? Noobaasa kwesiima? 
Jeremiah11:16 Obundi Mukama akakweta omuoliva murungi oguyumbize ogwine ebijuma birungi; kwonka mbwenu aryagwokyesa eihunga ringi eririkuhoorera, amataagi gaagwo gasiriire." 
Jeremiah11:17 Mukama ow'amahe owaakutaireho akucwereire orubanja rw'okuhikwaho akabi ahabw'ebibi by'ab'omuryango gwa Isiraeli n'ebi ab'ogwa Yuda bakozire, bakooterera Baali obubaani bakangwisa kubi." 
Jeremiah11:18 Nyakubaho akammanyisa, naanye naakimanya; yaanyoreka ku abazigu bangye baanyiniire enaama mbi." 
Jeremiah11:19 Kwonka naaba nk'omwana gw'entaama omucureezi ogurikutwarwa kwitwa. Kandi tindamanyire ku niinye bainiire enaama nibagira bati: Ka tuteme ogu muti nigukinyeeta, tumwihe omu nsi y'abahuriire, eiziina rye ritariijukwa obundi." 
Jeremiah11:20 Naanye naashaba nti: Ai Mukama ow'amahe, iwe ocwa emanja omu buryo, iwe ocaaka emitima n'ebiteekateeko by'abantu, bampoorere, nkireebe! Manya niiwe nyegyekyereire ebyangye." 
Jeremiah11:21 Nyakubaho nawe yangarukamu ati: Aba Anatooti abarikwenda kukwita nibakugira bati: Otaranga omu iziina rya Nyakubaho tukakwita. 
Jeremiah11:22 Nikyo Mukama ow'amahe arikugirira ati: Reeba, niinyija kubafubira, abatsigazi baabo baitirwe rurara aha rugamba; batabani baabo na bahara baabo baitwe enjara." 
Jeremiah11:23 Manya obunaku bwa Anatooti bw'okufubirwa ku burihika, ndyabagwisiza akagwe; habure owaahonokaho." 
Jeremiah12:1 Ai Nyakubaho, nobu ndikukwetomboitera, hoona nimpamya ku ori ohikiriire. Kwonka nkaayenzire kwetonganira omu maisho gaawe. Ahabw'enki enyabibi ziba gye, haza ziine emitwarize mibi? Ahabw'enki endeebya zoona zigogyeera?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Niiwe obabyara, bakatsimba emizi, bakakura, bakaana. Obatuura aha rurimi, haza omu mutima obari hare." 
Jeremiah12:3 Kwonka iwe, ai Nyakubaho, ommanya; kandi ondeeba omunda kuhamya yaaba ninkukunda. Bahuruutureyo nk'entaama zirikuza kubaagwa, obateereho eizooba ry'okwitirwaho." 
Jeremiah12:4 Mbwenu ensi neeherera hi n'okucura, obunyaatsi bw'omu ishwa bukaguma nibuhotoka? Ahabw'ebibi by'abagitwiremu, enyamaishwa n'enyonyi bifiire. Manya bagizire bati: Ruhanga tarireeba ahu turiherera;" 
Jeremiah12:5 Nyakubaho ati: Ku oraabe oirukire n'ab'amaguru bakakurusya, noobaasa ota kuhakana n'embaraasi? Kandi ku oraabe nooremwa ori omu nsi etaine kabi, oryagira ota waahika omu bishaka bya Yorudaani ebikwataine?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Manya nangwa, beene sho n'ab'omuryango gwa sho bakureebize, nibakuteerera enduuru enyima. Mbwenu otaribeesiga, nobu barikugambira karimi karungi." 
Jeremiah12:7 Ntsigireho ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli, naacwa abantu bangye ahabwangye; abantu bangye abu nkunda, naabarekurira abazigu baabo." 
Jeremiah12:8 Haza bampindukira entare y'omu kibira, bankankamira, Nikyo ndikubangira." 
Jeremiah12:9 Beitu shi abo bantu bangye bahindukire eishamba, eri ezindi mpungu ziturukire oku n'oku? Mbwenu nimwirooko mwete ezindi nyamaishwa ziije zibashonshomere." 
Jeremiah12:10 Abariisa baingi basiisire omusiri gwangye gw'emizaabibu; baaguribatiirira; ensi yangye enungi baagihindura eihamba eritaine ki ririmu. 
Jeremiah12:11 Bagihindwire eitongo ririmu busha yaaba ey'okucurirwa! Naanye nensaasa. Egyo nsi yoona bagihindwire amatongo. Haza tihaine orikukyeetaho. 
Jeremiah12:12 Abahwerekyerezi baizire aha bibungo by'emparamaata byona eby'omu ihamba. Manya okwiha aha muheru gw'ensi okuta aha gundi, rurara ya Nyakubaho neita kyona eki yaabugabugana nakyo. Tihariho oine obusingye." 
Jeremiah12:13 Babibire engano, baagyesha amahwa, baayeruhiza busha. Ahabw'ekiniga kingi eki Nyakubaho abainiire, ebi bagyesire nibabyefuuza." 
Jeremiah12:14 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Amahanga goona amabi agahereraireho, agarikukwata ensi ei naahaire abantu bangye Abaisiraeli kuba eyaabo, ndyagigaranduramu, ngarandure n'omu b'omuryango gwa Yuda." 
Jeremiah12:15 Reero ku ndiheza kugarandura, ngagirire esaasi, ngagarure, buri ihanga aha butaka bwaryo n'omu nsi yaaryo." 
Jeremiah12:16 Kandi obunaku ku burihika, baataho munonga omutima kukuratira emitwarize y'abantu bangye bandahira bati: Nindahira Nyakubaho ohuriire, nk'oku baayegyeise abantu bangye kurahira Baali, nibwo baribabarirwamu." 
Jeremiah12:17 Kwonka ku harigira eihanga eryayanga kuhurira, ndyarirandurira kimwe ndicwekyereze; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah13:1 Nyakubaho akangira ati: Irooko ogure omweko gwa kitaani, ogwezirikye omu manyaanya, otagujabika omu maizi." 
Jeremiah13:2 Ntyo naanye ngura ogwo mweko, nk'oku Nyakubaho yangambiire, ngwezirika omu manyaanya." 
Jeremiah13:3 Nyakubaho agaruka angambira obwa kabiri ati: 
Jeremiah13:4 Twara omweko ogu oguzire ogu oyezirikire omu manyaanya, oimukye oze aha mugyera Eufuraati, ogusherekye omu nonko y'orukiri." 
Jeremiah13:5 Naanye ngyenda ngushereka aha rubaju rwa Eufuraati, nk'oku Nyakubaho andagiire." 
Jeremiah13:6 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, Nyakubaho kandi yangira ati: Imuka oze ahari Eufuraati, oiheyo omweko ogu naakuragiire kusherekayo." 
Jeremiah13:7 Naanye ntyo ngyenda, mpika ahari Eufuraati, ntimba ahu naabaire nsherekire omweko, ngwihayo. Kwonka nshanga gusiisikaire, gutakiine mugasho." 
Jeremiah13:8 Reero Nyakubaho angira ati: 
Jeremiah13:9 Okwo nikwo ndaacwe aba Yuda amaryo n'aba Yerusalemu nkabacwa okwetunguura. 
Jeremiah13:10 Abo bantu babi abanga kuhurira ebi mbagambira, abatwaza nk'emitima yaabo egangaire oku eri, bakakuratira baaruhanga abandi, bakabaheereza, bakabaramya, baryaba nk'ogu mweko ogutakiine mugasho." 
Jeremiah13:11 Manya nk'oku omweko guhamira omu manyaanya g'omuntu, naanye nikwo naayehamizeho ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli boona n'aba Yuda boona, ngu babe abantu bangye, bareetere eiziina ryangye kurangaanwa, bampimbisise kandi bampaise ekitiinwa; kwonka baayanga kumpurira; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah13:12 Mbwenu obagambire oti: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Buri njoga eshemereire kwijuzibwa viino. Ku baraakugarukyemu bati: Noogira ngu itwe titurikumanya ku buri njoga eshemereire kwijuzibwa viino? 
Jeremiah13:13 Reero obagambire oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kusindiza kimwe abatwire omu nsi egi boona, abagabe abahungurirana ekitebe kya Daudi, abahongyerezi, abarangi, n'abatwire Yerusalemu boona." 
Jeremiah13:14 Haza mbahondanise buri muntu na mugyenzi we, aboojo na baishebo. Tindikwija kubasaasira nobu kwakuba okubareka nari okubagirira esaasi, ngu tinaabacwekyereza; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah13:15 Imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, Nyakubaho agizire ati: Nimuhurire, mutegye okutu kandi mucwe amaryo!" 
Jeremiah13:16 Muhe Mukama Ruhanga waanyu ekitiinwa, atakareetsire mwirima mukateera entsibo omu nshozi omu rwitawaabo; kandi mukiba nimuronda aharikuhweza, akahahindura ekizima, gukaba omwirima ndindindi." 
Jeremiah13:17 Kwonka ku muraayangye kuhurira ebi naabagambira, ahabw'amaryo gaanyu, niinyija kurira kitamanyirwe, amarira gampimintikye omu maisho ahabw'obusyo bwa Nyakubaho obunyagirwe." 
Jeremiah13:18 Kandi Nyakubaho akangira ati: Gambira omugabe na nyina oti: Nimushutame omu mwanya gw'ahansi, ahabw'okuba ebirunga byanyu eby'ekitiinwa bibarugire aha mutwe." 
Jeremiah13:19 Endembo za Negebu zigotsirwe, tihariho orikuziigura; aba Yuda boona batwairwe bari enkwatwa baazaahibwa." 
Jeremiah13:20 Iwe Yerusalemu, imutsya amaisho oreebe abaareeterwa aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, obusyo bwawe buri oburungi, obu waahairwe burahi?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Mbwenu oryagamba ki ku orireeba abantu abu waabaire ogira ngu ni banywani baawe baakusingura kandi baakutegyeka? Torigira obusaasi nk'obw'omukazi orikurumwa? 
Jeremiah13:22 Kandi ku oryebuuza oti: Ebi byona bindugiire hi? Manya n'ahabw'ebicumuro byawe bingi. Nikyo bakujuuriire ekipumpuriya, bakakuhenuura." 
Jeremiah13:23 Ebyo Omunyaetiopiya akaahindura omubiri gwe, nari engwe ehindura amabara gaayo? Kuri ekyo nikibaasika, naimwe abamanyiriire kukora bibi mukaabaasa kukora birungi." 
Jeremiah13:24 Mbwenu nu, niinyija kubataataana nk'oku ebishushunga bituntumurwa omuyaga gw'omu ihamba." 
Jeremiah13:25 Ogwo nigwo mugabo gwawe, enzimuurano ei naakurengyeire; ahabw'okuba okaanyebwa waayesiga baaruhanga b'ebishuba; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah13:26 Nyowe nyenka niinyija kukuhenuura ekipumpuriya, nkikuhitsye aha buso; eby'enshoni byawe bireebwe." 
Jeremiah13:27 Ndeebire ebihagaro byawe, obushambani bwawe, okukwengyeeza kwawe, n'obwamaraaya bwawe bw'obuhwa nshoni, ebi okorera omu ishwa aha bibungo. Ai bambe, Yerusalemu, na hati okisiisikaire! Mbwenu oryaherera hi okuguma ori otyo?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Ebi nibyo Nyakubaho yaagambiire Yeremiya aha by'ekyanda ky'akabi: 
Jeremiah14:2 Buyuda neecura, ab'omu ndembo zaayo nibahononoka, abantu baayo nibatongyeza aha nsi, n'ab'omuri Yerusalemu nibaborooga, baraakuuza." 
Jeremiah14:3 Abakungu baayo nibatuma abambari baabo kubatahira amaizi; banu bakihika aha maziba bashanga amaizi gatarimu; bagaruka enyungu zaabo zirimu busha; baitsirwe enshoni bashobeirwe; beesangiire aha maisho. 
Jeremiah14:4 Ahabw'enjura kubura, ensi ekagangabuka, abahingi baitsirwe enshoni baayesangira aha maisho." 
Jeremiah14:5 Ahabw'obunyaatsi kubura, empara neetsiga encwamutwe yaayo omu ishwa." 
Jeremiah14:6 Enturegye nizeemerera aha bibungo by'emparamaata, zihaahaagira nk'omushega; amaisho gazigwa omunda ahabw'okuburwa obunyaatsi." 
Jeremiah14:7 Ai Nyakubaho, ebibi byaitu nobu biraabe nibitushinja, kwonka ahabw'eiziina ryawe gira eki waatukorera. Manya tugarukire munonga enyima, twakucumuraho." 
Jeremiah14:8 Iwe matsiko ga Isiraeli, ogijuna eri omu kabi; ahabw'enki obaire nk'omunyaihanga omuri egi nsi; okaba nk'omugyenzi oiririirwe orikukiikama kuronda oburaaro?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Ahabw'enki ori nk'omuntu oshobeirwe, nari nk'emanzi etarikubaasa kujuna muntu? Kwonka, ai Nyakubaho, nk'oku ori omuriitwe, kandi nk'oku tukwetererwa, otatutsigaho." 
Jeremiah14:10 Nyakubaho nawe agamba ahari abo bantu ati: Nk'oku baakunzire okurara batahinye bigyere, Naanye Nyakubaho nikyo ntaribaikiririza! Ndyaguma nyijukye ebicumuro byabo, mbafubire ahabw'ebibi byabo." 
Jeremiah14:11 Reero Nyakubaho yangira ati: Otashabira abo bantu kuba gye. 
Jeremiah14:12 Nobu baraayesiibyekwo, tindikwija kuhurira okutaka kwabo. Kandi nobu barantambire ebitambo bicwekize, n'eby'esaano, tindikwija kubiikiriza. Kureka niinyija kubaitsa rurara n'enjara n'orufu, mbahezeho." 
Jeremiah14:13 Naanye mmugarukamu nti: Ai bambe, Mukama Ruhanga! Reeba, abarangi nibabagira bati: Timurikwija kwitwa rurara, nobu kwakuba okuteerwa enjara, ngu ahabw'okuba okabaraganisa oti: Ndyabaheera kimwe obusingye omuri egyo nsi." 
Jeremiah14:14 Nyakubaho nawe angira ati: Abo barangi nibaragura ebishuba omu iziina ryangye. Tindabatumire nobu kwakuba okubaragiira nari okugamba nabo. Nibabaragurira eby'ebishuba ebi boorekirwe; babarangira ebitaine mugasho kandi eby'obugobya ebi beeteekateekyeire. 
Jeremiah14:15 Nikyo Nyakubaho arikugirira ati: Abo barangi abaranga omu iziina ryangye ntabatumire, bakagira bati: Ab'omuri egi nsi tibariitwa rurara, nobu kwakuba okuteerwa enjara; abo barangi baryaitwa rurara bamarweho enjara;" 
Jeremiah14:16 kandi abantu abu bahanuurira baryanagwa omu nguuto za Yerusalemu baitsirwe enjara na rurara; babure ow'okubaziika; bo n'abakazi baabo na batabani baabo na bahara baabo, mbature ebibi byabo." 
Jeremiah14:17 Obagambire oti: K'amaisho gangye gahimintikye amarira nyomushana na nyekiro gatarikwoma; ahabw'okuba orurembo rw'abantu bangye rusheenyagwirwe, rwateerwa ahatari saasi." 
Jeremiah14:18 Ku ndikushohora naaza omu ishwa, nshangayo abaitsirwe rurara! Nkitaaha omu rurembo nshangayo abarembiibwe enjara! Manya abarangi n'ab'ahongyerezi nibazengyerera omu nsi, batarikumanya eki barikukora." 
Jeremiah14:19 Ai Nyakubaho, ebyo oyangiire kimwe Buyuda, waatamirwa kimwe Siyooni? Otuteereire ki otyo munonga, tutabaase kutambirwa? Tukategyereza okutunga obusingye, kwonka titwabona karungi; twagira amatsiko g'okutambirwa, kwonka twagwerwa ebirikututiinisa." 
Jeremiah14:20 Ai Nyakubaho, nitwemera ebibi byaitu n'ebicumuro bya baatatenkuriitwe, ahabw'okuba tukucumwireho!" 
Jeremiah14:21 Iwe ahabwawe otatutamirwa kimwe, okahemura Yerusalemu ekitebe kyawe eky'ekitiinwa. Ijuka endagaano ei waaragaine naitwe, orekye kugiita." 
Jeremiah14:22 Mbwenu omuri baaruhanga b'ebishuba ab'omu mahanga, harimu owaakubaasa kugwisa enjura? Nari eiguru ahabwaryo rikaagwisa orutoonyerera? Ai Mukama Ruhanga waitu, tiiwe? Niiwe twineho amatsiko, ahabw'okuba ebyo byona niiwe obikora." 
Jeremiah15:1 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akangira ati: Nobu Musa na Samueli baakuunyemerera omu maisho kuunyeshengyereza, tinkaagirira saasi aba bantu. Baanyihe omu maisho, bagyende!" 
Jeremiah15:2 Ku baraakubuuze bati: Tuzehi? Obagarukyemu oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ab'okwitwa orufu, baitwe orufu; ab'okwitwa rurara, baitwe rurara, ab'okwitwa enjara, baitwe enjara, n'ab'okutwarwa bari enkwatwa, batwarwe." 
Jeremiah15:3 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Niinyija kubateeraho eby'okubacwekyereza by'emiringo ena; rurara y'okubaitira aha rugamba, embwa z'okubataanyagura, amahungu g'okubateera n'enyamaishwa z'okubashonshomera;" 
Jeremiah15:4 mbahindure ekirikwitsa obwoba amahanga g'abagabe b'omu nsi yoona, nimbatura ebihagaro ebi Manaase mwene Hezekiya omugabe wa Buyuda yaakozire omuri Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah15:5 Mbwenu iwe Yerusalemu, n'oha oraakugirire esaasi? Nari n'oha oraakucurire? N'oha oraakiikame kubuuza oku oraire?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Onyangire waaguma noogaruka enyima; nikyo nkubangiriire omukono kukucwekyereza, ahabw'okuba nduhire n'okukugumisiriza." 
Jeremiah15:7 Nkabatuntumura omu ndembo z'ensi yaabo, nk'oku omuntu aheheeza omuragara; naabamaraho abaana, naita abantu bangye; kwonka tibaareka micwe yaabo mibi." 
Jeremiah15:8 Nkabakanyisamu abafaakazi, baaba baingi okukira omusheenyi gw'aha nyanja. Baanyina abatsigazi nkabareetera ababisha, baita batabani baabo nyomushana; naabaitsa obusaasi n'obwoba kitaraariire." 
Jeremiah15:9 Owaazaire mushanju yaagwa enshazi, yaabura agaitsya, obwire bwamwirira nyomushana, yaitwa enshoni yaabwerabwera. Kandi abarihonokaho ndyabarekurira abazigu baabo babatemagure; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah15:10 Ai bambe maawe! Mbwenu okanzaarira ki kuba omuntu w'okurwanisibwa ab'omu nsi yoona batarikuunyenda? Tinkaguzaga muntu, nobu kwakuba okweguza; kwonka boona nibankyeena." 
Jeremiah15:11 Ai Nyakubaho, emikyeeno yaabo neekaanyite, ku ndaabe ntakakweshengyerezaga kubakorera ebirungi, nari ku ndaabe ntakatonganiraga bazigu bangye ahariiwe, bari omu naku n'omu kabi!" 
Jeremiah15:12 Ebyo hariho owaakubaasa kuhenda ekyoma, munomuno ekyoma ky'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho ekiheesherainwe n'omuringa?" 
Jeremiah15:13 Ebintu byawe ebi otungire n'ebi obiikire, ndyabihayo binyagwe bitaguzirwe, babimare omu nsi yaawe, ninkutura ebibi byawe byona." 
Jeremiah15:14 Ndyakuhindura omuhuuku w'abazigu baawe, obashumbire omu nsi ei otarikumanya; ahabw'okuba ekiniga kyangye kiryayatsya omuriro, gubootsye ebiro byona." 
Jeremiah15:15 Ai Nyakubaho niiwe omanya, onyijukye, onshuure, ompoorere abarikumpiiganisa. Ongumisirize, otaanyihaho, Omanye ku ndikujumwa ahabwawe." 
Jeremiah15:16 Ebigambo byawe nkabihurira byampika aha njoka, byandeetera okushemererwa n'okwesiima." 
Jeremiah15:17 Tindashutamire mu kigombe ky'abarikujarama, nobu kwakuba okushemererwa. Nkashutama nyenka; ahabw'okuba okaba ompingamiize omukono gwawe ondeeteire kuguubwa kubi." 
Jeremiah15:18 Mbwenu ahabw'enki obusaasi bwangye butarikutuuza, obuhuta bwangye butarikutambwa, bwangire kukira? Nooyenda kumbeera nk'akagyera akahookyera abantu, bakashanga koomire omu kyanda?" 
Jeremiah15:19 Nyakubaho nawe angarukamu ati: Ku oraagarukye, niinyija kukugaruraho, obe omuheereza wangye. Ku orireka kugamba ebitaine muhoho, waagamba ebiine ensha, ebi nkutumire, oryagamba ebindugire omu kanwa. Nibwo abantu barikugarukira, kwonka iwe otabaagiire kubagarukira." 
Jeremiah15:20 Naanye ahabw'abo bantu ndyakuhindura obe nk'ekigo ky'omuringa ekigumire. Baryakurwanisa, kwonka tibarikubaasa, ahabw'okuba ndyaba ndi hamwe naiwe kukurinda n'okukujuna; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah15:21 Ndyakwiha omu mikono y'enyabibi, nkusikure omu maino g'abataine saasi." 
Jeremiah16:1 Nyakubaho akangambira ati: 
Jeremiah16:2 Otarishwera omukazi, nobu kwakuba okuzaarira batabani baawe na bahara baawe omuri ogu mwanya." 
Jeremiah16:3 Manya Nyowe Nyakubaho, oku nikwo ndikugamba aha boojo n'abaishiki abarikuzaarirwa omuri ogu mwanya, n'ahari baanyinabo abarikubazaara, n'ahari baishebo abarikubabazaaraho omuri egi nsi." 
Jeremiah16:4 Baryaitwa endwara mbi. Tibaricurirwa nobu kwakuba okuziikwa; babe nk'amasha ganaganagirwe aha itaka. Baryaitwa rurara n'enjara, emitumbi yaabo eriibwe amahungu n'enyamaishwa." 
Jeremiah16:5 Ekindi, Nyakubaho naagira ati: Otaritaaha omu nju y'abari omu kyosi, nobu kwakuba okucura nabo nari okuganya nabo; ahabw'okuba aba bantu mbaihireho obusingye, tinkibainiire rukundo yangye etahararuka, nari okubagirira embabazi; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah16:6 Abakuru n'abato boona baryagwa omuri egi nsi. Tibariziikwa, kandi tiharibaho oribacurira, nari oryekambura, nainga orimwa enkomborora." 
Jeremiah16:7 Tihariho oribegyera ori omu kyosi omugaati kumuyaagira; nobu kwakuba omuntu weena kuha ofeereirwe ishe nari nyina ekyokunywa kumugwisiriza. 
Jeremiah16:8 Otaritaaha omu nju y'abaine obugyenyi okashutama, okarya nabo kandi okanywa nabo." 
Jeremiah16:9 Ahabw'okuba Nyowe Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ningira nti: Ndyahunamya omu mwanya ogu amaraka g'abarikushemererwa n'ag'abarikwesiima, aga baakishwera n'aga baakishwerwa, mukiriho nimureeba." 
Jeremiah16:10 Reero aba bantu ku oribagambira ebyo byona, baakubuuza bati: Ahabw'enki Nyakubaho arangiriire ngu ebihikiirizi ebyo byona biryatuhikaho? Tucumwire ki? Ni kibi ki eki tukozire, kugwisa kubi Mukama Ruhanga waitu." 
Jeremiah16:11 Obagire oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Baashwenkuriimwe bakaanyimuura, baakuratira baaruhanga abandi, baabaheereza, baabaramya, bantsigaho kandi tibaakuratira mateeka gangye." 
Jeremiah16:12 Kandi naimwe mukirize baashwenkuriimwe okukora kubi. Reeba, buri omwe omuriimwe naakuratira ebi omutima gwe omubi kandi ogugangaire gurikwenda; ayanga kumpurira." 
Jeremiah16:13 Nikyo ndibabingira, nkabaiha omuri egi nsi, nkabata omu nsi ei imwe na baashwenkuriimwe mutakamanyaga. Okwo niyo muriheerereza baaruhanga abandi nyomushana na nyekiro, ahabw'okuba tindibagirira saasi." 
Jeremiah16:14 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Obunaku buryahika obu hataribaho orikugira ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho owaihire Abaisiraeli omu nsi ya Misiri; 
Jeremiah16:15 kureka okugira ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho owaihire Abaisiraeli omu nsi y'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho n'omu nsi zoona ezi yaabataataaniiremu, ahabw'okuba ndyabagarura omu nsi yaabo, ei naahaire baishebo." 
Jeremiah16:16 Kandi Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kutuma aha bajubi bangi baije babajube. Na bwanyima ntume aha bahiigi baingi, baije babahiigye ahari buri rushozi, n'ahari buri kibungo, babafurumure omu nyanga z'omu nkiri." 
Jeremiah16:17 Manya amaisho gangye ngataire aha mitwarize yaabo, teenyesherekire; n'ebibi byabo timbuzire kubireeba." 
Jeremiah16:18 Ndyabahoora kabiri ahabw'ebibi byabo n'ebicumuro byabo, ahabw'okuba bakahagazisa ensi yangye emitumbi y'ebishushani byabo ebirikunugwa, obutaka bwangye baabwijuzamu ebihagaro." 
Jeremiah16:19 Ai Nyakubaho, maani gangye, kandi ekigo kyangye ekigumire, buhungiro bwangye omu bunaku bw'akabi, amahanga garyaruga aha mperu z'ensi gakwetuurire nigagira gati: Ebi baatatenkuriitwe baahungwire n'ebishuba bisha, ebitaine muhoho na mugasho." 
Jeremiah16:20 Mbwenu omuntu akaayekorera baaruhanga? Baaruhanga nk'abo ti baaruhanga. 
Jeremiah16:21 N'ahabw'ekyo reeba, ndyabamanyisa. Aha murundi ogu ndyabamanyisa obushoboorozi bwangye n'amaani gangye, bamanye ku eiziina ryangye mba Nyakubaho." 
Jeremiah17:1 Ekibi ky'aba Yuda kihandiikisiibwe akacumu k'ekyoma, akaine akarimi kaarimaasi. Kisharwirwe aha kishate ky'omutima gwabo n'aha mahembe g'amatambiro gaabo." 
Jeremiah17:2 Abaana baabo nibakiijuka amatambiro gaabo n'enyomyo za ruhangakazi waabo Ashera, ebihereraine n'emirinzi aha mitwe y'ebibungo," 
Jeremiah17:3 n'aha nshozi omu bwerere. Obutungi bwawe n'ebintu byawe byona ebi oyebiikiire ahabw'ekyo kibi kyawe, ndyabihayo binyagwe omu nsi yaawe yoona." 
Jeremiah17:4 Oryafeerwa obutaka obu naakuhaire, nkuhindure omuhuuku w'abazigu baawe, obaheerereze omu nsi ei otarikumanya. Manya niiwe onyitsize ekiniga kikaba nk'omuriro ogurikwaka gutarikuraara." 
Jeremiah17:5 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Omuntu oyesiga ondiijo muntu, akata amatsiko omu mubiri kwonka, akaanyihaho omutima, akyeenwe." 
Jeremiah17:6 Ari nk'ekishaka ky'omu ihamba, kandi tarireeba karungi koona, kureka aryatuura omu myanya y'omu ihamba ekarangataine, omu nsi y'omwonyo etatuurwamu." 
Jeremiah17:7 Kwonka omuntu oyesiga Nyakubaho akaba amatsiko ge, aine omugisha." 
Jeremiah17:8 Ari nk'omuti ogubyairwe aha rubaju rw'amaizi; ogutantamura emizi yaagwo haihi n'omugyera; ogutatiina haabaho ekibiga, ahabw'okuba amababi gaagwo gaguma nigabengyeya; kandi oguteemereza mutima mu biro by'ekyanda, ahabw'okuba gwo guguma nigwana." 
Jeremiah17:9 Omutima gw'omuntu guba engobya okukira ebintu byona, kandi gukasiisikarira kimwe. Mbwenu n'oha owaakugwetegyereza?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Kureka nyowe Nyakubaho, niinye ncaaka ebiteekateeko by'abantu, nkagyeza emitima yaabo, nkazimuurira buri omwe nk'emitwarize ye oku eri, n'ebi akozire oku biri." 
Jeremiah17:11 Omuntu otunga eby'obutungi omu buryo butahikire, ni nk'endahi ebumbatira obwana bu etayatiire; ahabw'okuba biryamuhwaho atakakagatsire, aha muheru abeere kimwe omushema." 
Jeremiah17:12 Nyaruju yaitu erikwera n'ekitebe ky'obugabe eky'ekitiinwa, ekyatairweho okwiha omu kutandika." 
Jeremiah17:13 Ai Nyakubaho, matsiko ga Isiraeli, boona abakutsigaho baryahemuka; abakwimuura baryakyengyera, ahabw'okuba batsigireho Nyakubaho, enshuro y'amaizi agahaisa amagara." 
Jeremiah17:14 Ai Nyakubaho, ntambira, mbone kukira, njuna, mbone kuba buhooro; ahabw'okuba niiwe nsingiza." 
Jeremiah17:15 Reeba, nibangira bati: Ebi Nyakubaho yaagambire birahi? Mbwenu nibibeho!" 
Jeremiah17:16 Nyowe tinkakugyemaga kureeta akabi kandi tinkeetengaga ngu ogire eizooba eri waabagwisizaho akagwe. Naiwe noomanya ku ebi naagambire naabigambiire omu maisho gaawe. 
Jeremiah17:17 Mbwenu otantiinisa, ahabw'okuba niiwe buhungiro bwangye omu bunaku bw'akabi." 
Jeremiah17:18 Hemura abarikumpiiganisa, haza nyowe otampemura. Obe nibo waitsa obwoba, kwonka nyowe otabuunyitsa. Gira eizooba ri waabagwisizaho akagwe, obacwekyerereze kimwe." 
Jeremiah17:19 Nyakubaho angizire ati: Irooko oyemerere omu irembo ry'aba Benyamiini, ahu abagabe ba Buyuda bataahira kandi bakashohorera. Oyemerere n'omu marembo ga Yerusalemu;" 
Jeremiah17:20 haza ogire oti: Imwe bagabe ba Buyuda 'mwe, naimwe mwena aba Yuda, n'abatwire omuri Yerusalemu, abataahira omuri aga marembo, nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah17:21 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ku muraabe nimwenda amagara, mwerinde, mutakaayekorera omutwaro aha kiro kya Sabato, nari mukagutaasya omuri Yerusalemu nimugurabya omu marembo gaayo." 
Jeremiah17:22 Kandi mutarishohoza omutwaro mukagwiha omu maju gaanyu ahari Sabato, nobu kwakuba okukoreraho omurimo gwona; kureka mugume murinde ekyo kiro bya Sabato kiri ekirikwera, nk'oku naaragiire baashwenkuriimwe." 
Jeremiah17:23 Kwonka bo tibarampuriire, nobu kwakuba okuntega okutu; kureka bakaba engangaazi, baayanga kumpurira nobu kwakuba okwikiriza ebi ndikubahabura." 
Jeremiah17:24 Nyakubaho naagira ati: kwonka ku murimpurira, mutaataasya muri oru rurembo omutwaro gwona aha kiro kya Sabato, mukagurabya omu marembo gaarwo, kandi mutaakoreraho murimo;" 
Jeremiah17:25 obwo abagabe abarihungura engoma ya Daudi baryataaha omuri oru rurembo nibaraba omu marembo gaarwo, batembire ebigaari n'embaraasi, bo n'abategyeki baabo n'aba Yuda n'abatuuzi b'omuri Yerusalemu; haza oru rurembo rutuurwemu ebiro byona." 
Jeremiah17:26 Reero abantu baryaruga omu ndembo za Buyuda, n'omu myanya eyehinguririize Yerusalemu, n'omu kyanga kya Benyamiini, n'omu mpita n'omu bibungo na Negebu, bareete omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ebitambo by'okucwetsya, n'ebindi bitambo, n'emitoijo y'esaano n'obubaani, n'ebitambo by'okusiima." 
Jeremiah17:27 Kwonka ku muriba mutampuriire kurinda ekiro kya Sabato kiri ekirikwera, mwayekorera emitwaro mwagirabya omu marembo ga Yerusalemu nimutaahamu aha kiro kya Sabato, obwo ndyatweka amarembo ga Yerusalemu, omuriro gucwekyereze ebikaari byamwo, gureme kuraazibwa." 
Jeremiah18:1 Eki nikyo Nyakubaho yangambiire, nyowe Yeremiya, ati;" 
Jeremiah18:2 Irooko oshuume, oze ow'omunogoozi, haza okwo niyo oraahuririre eki ndaakugambire." 
Jeremiah18:3 Ntyo naanye nshuuma, nza ow'omunogoozi, nshanga naabumbisa enziga ye." 
Jeremiah18:4 Kwonka eki yaabaire naanogoora omu ibumba kimwabira omu ngaro. Agaruka arinogooramu ekindi, nk'oku yaabaire naayenda." 
Jeremiah18:5 Mpaho Nyakubaho angira ati: 
Jeremiah18:6 Imwe b'eihanga rya Isiraeli 'mwe, tiinyine bushoboorozi bw'okubagira nk'oku ogu munogoozi yaagira? Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nk'oku omunogoozi aine obushoboorozi aha ibumba, naanye nikwo mbwine ahariimwe ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli." 
Jeremiah18:7 Kiro mushana, ku naakugambira eihanga nari ensi y'obugabe ku ndikwija kurirandura, kurisheenyagura nkaricwekyereza;" 
Jeremiah18:8 kwonka eryo ihanga ri naagambaho ku ryakweteisa ryareka kukora ebibi, naanye nkaayegarukamu, ndeka kureeta akabi aku naaba niinyenda kurireetaho." 
Jeremiah18:9 Kandi kiro mushana, ku naakugambira eihanga nari ensi y'obugabe ku ndikwija kuritaho, nkarihamya;" 
Jeremiah18:10 kwonka ku ryakukora ebibi ryangwisa kubi, ryayanga kuhurira ebi ndikugamba, naanye nkaayegarukamu ndeka kukora ebirungi ebi mbaire niinyenda kurikorera." 
Jeremiah18:11 Mbwenu nu, gambira aba Yuda n'abatwire omuri Yerusalemu oti Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, ninteekateeka kubareetaho akabi, kandi ncumire enaama y'okubarwanisa. Mbwenu nimwegarukyemu, buri muntu arekye emicwe ye emibi, mushemeze emitwarize yaanyu n'ebi murikukora." 
Jeremiah18:12 Kwonka bo nibaija kukugarukamu bati: Ogahwe! Itwe nitwija kutwaza nk'oku tuteekateekire; buri muntu akore nk'oku omutima gwe engangaazi kandi omubi guri. 
Jeremiah18:13 Nyakubaho nikyo arikugambira ati: Mubuuririze omu mahanga, ku haraabe hariho orahuriire ekintu nk'eki? Abaisiraeli bakozire kubi munonga!" 
Jeremiah18:14 Mbwenu orubaare rwa Lebanooni rukaabura aha nengo za Sirioni? Nainga emigyera y'amaizi garikufuka, ehimintika neeruga omu nshozi, ekaayoma?" 
Jeremiah18:15 Kwonka abantu bangye baanyebirwe; baayoterera baaruhanga abatari b'amazima obubaani; baateishuka emihanda yaabo eya ira, baatoora otuhanda tw'aha rubaju, baareka omuhanda rugyendwa," 
Jeremiah18:16 ensi yaabo baagihindura erikutiinisa, yaaba ey'okutama abantu ebiro byona. Orikugirabamu weena agyenda aitsirwe obwoba, naayemaamaata." 
Jeremiah18:17 Ndyabataataanisa bahungye abazigu baabo, nk'oku omucuucu gutuntumurwa omuyaga gwa burugwa-izooba. Aha izooba eri barigwerwaho akagwe, ndyabateera omugongo, tindibahindukira." 
Jeremiah18:18 Bwanyima abantu bakagira bati: Ka tugiire Yeremiya omu naama. Manya abahongyerezi tibarikwija kubura kutwegyesa eby'omu iteeka, abanyabwengye kubitushoboororera n'abarangi kuturangira ebi Ruhanga abatumire. Nimwije tumubeiherere, kandi tuteeta aha bi arikugamba byona." 
Jeremiah18:19 Yeremiya nawe nikwo kushaba ati: Ai Nyakubaho, hurira ebi ndikwetonganira; kandi otegye okutu ebi ababisha bangye barikungambaho." 
Jeremiah18:20 Mbwenu ekirungi kizimuurirwa ekibi? Kwonka bo bantimbiire obusya. Ijuka oku mbaire ninkwemerera omu maisho kubatonganira ngu mbakize ekiniga kyawe. 
Jeremiah18:21 Mbwenu itsa abaana baabo enjara, kandi obaheyo bamarweho rurara, abakazi baabo babe encwekye, kandi babe abafaakazi, abashaija baabo baitwe orufu, n'abatsigazi baabo bagwe aha rugamba." 
Jeremiah18:22 Booherereze emigogo y'ababisha, ebateere kitaraariire, enduuru zihurirwe omu maka gaabo. Manya bantimbiire obusya bw'okugwamu, bantega ebifuruma by'okuntegura." 
Jeremiah18:23 Kwonka, ai Nyakubaho, noomanya enaama zi baanyiniire kuunyita. Otabasaasira ekicumuro kyabo; nobu kwakuba okwiha omu maisho gaawe ekibi kyabo! Bahwerekyerereze omu maisho gaawe, obakoreho okibainiire ekiniga." 
Jeremiah19:1 Nyakubaho akangira ati: Irooko ogure orunywero aha munogoozi. Haza ogyende na bamwe omu bakuru b'eihanga, n'ab'omu bahongyerezi abakuru," 
Jeremiah19:2 murabe omu irembo ry'engusyo, muze omu ruhanga rwa mwene Hinomu, orangirireyo ebi ndaakugambire." 
Jeremiah19:3 Ogire oti: Imwe bagabe ba Buyuda 'mwe, n'abatwire omuri Yerusalemu, nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikugamba. Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kugwisiza akagwe ogu mwanya, orikahurira weena amatu ge gateere enduuru." 
Jeremiah19:4 Ahabw'okuba abantu baanyimwire baahagaza ogu mwanya nibagwotereramu obubaani baaruhanga abandi abu bo nari baishebo nainga abagabe ba Buyuda batakamanyaga, kandi ahabw'okuba omwanya ogu bagwijwizemu eshagama y'abu baita bataine rubanja," 
Jeremiah19:5 baataho n'okwombekyera Baali emyanya etunguukire, kwokyezayo abaana baabo kumubeera ekitambo kicwekize, ekintu eki ntakaragiiraga, eki ntakatahoga, nobu kwakuba okuunyija omu biteekateeko;" 
Jeremiah19:6 nikyo Nyakubaho arikugirira ati: obunaku buryahika, obu omwanya ogu guriba gutakyeetwa Tofeti, nari oruhanga rwa mwene Hinomu; kureka Oruhanga rw'Eriitiro." 
Jeremiah19:7 Kandi omuri ogwo mwanya nimwo ndihindurira busha enaama z'aba Yuda n'aba Yerusalemu, nkareetera abantu baabo kwitwa rurara, bakagwa omu maisho g'abazigu baabo, n'okwitwa abarikubahiiga, emitumbi yaabo ngiteeze amahungu, eriibwe enyamaishwa;" 
Jeremiah19:8 reero oru rurembo nduhindure orurikutiinisa kandi orurikunugwa, orirurabaho weena, ashishwe, kandi rumutame, ahabw'akagwe karugwereire." 
Jeremiah19:9 Kandi ndyabareetera kurya batabani baabo na bahara baabo; omuri okwo kugotwa n'omuri ezo naku ezi abazigu baabo n'abarikubahiiga baribaitsa, buri omwe arye mutaahi we." 
Jeremiah19:10 Bwanyima oyatire orwo runywero omu maisho g'abu ogyenzire nabo, haza" 
Jeremiah19:11 obagire oti: Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Oku nikwo ndisheenyagura aba bantu n'oru rurembo, nk'oku omuntu ayata omusinga gw'omunogoozi gukarema kuhomeererwa. Abantu baryaziika abafu baabo Tofeti, ahabw'okuba baryaba bataine handi h'okubaziika." 
Jeremiah19:12 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Okwo nikwo ndigira ogu mwanya n'abagutwiremu, nkahindura oru rurembo, rukaba nka Tofeti." 
Jeremiah19:13 Amaju g'omuri Yerusalemu n'ag'abagabe ba Buyuda, amaju goona agu baabaire bootereraho amahe g'omu iguru obubaani, bakashukiraho baaruhanga abandi emitoijo y'ebyokunywa, garyahagazibwa, nk'ogu mwanya gwa Tofeti."
