Jeremiah19:14 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Yeremiya yaaruga Tofeti ei Nyakubaho yaabaire amutumire kurangirayo, yaayemerera omu kibuga kya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, yaagambira abantu boona ati:" 
Jeremiah19:15 Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kugwisiza oru rurembo n'ebirorero byarwo byona akagwe aku naaruhayiire; ahabw'okuba abaamwo babaire engangaazi, baayanga kuhurira ebi ndikubagambira." 
Jeremiah20:1 Mbwenu Pashuuri omuhongyerezi mwene Imeri, owaabaire ari omutegyeki mukuru omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, akahurira ebi Yeremiya yaaranga." 
Jeremiah20:2 Pashuuri ogwo yaateera Yeremiya omurangi, yaamuta omu nkomo ezaabaire ziri omu Irembo ry'aba Benyamiini erya ruguru, eririkutaahira omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
Jeremiah20:3 Ku bwaseesire, Pashuuri yaiha Yeremiya omu nkomo, n'onu yaamugira ati: Nyakubaho tarakwetsire Pashuuri kureka Orikutiinisa embaju zoona." 
Jeremiah20:4 Manya Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, ndyakuhindura orikwetiina, kandi otiinise na bagyenzi baawe boona. Abazigu baabo baryabaitsa rurara noobareeba! Kandi aba Yuda boona ndyabarekurira omugabe wa Babulooni abatware Babulooni bari enkwatwa, haza abaitse rurara." 
Jeremiah20:5 Ekindi, eby'obutungi byona eby'omuri oru rerembo, n'ebindi ebitungirwe, na byona ebyamwo eby'obuguzi bwingi, n'eby'omu mabiikiro g'abagabe ba Buyuda goona, ndyabirekurira abazigu baabo babinyagye, babikwate babitware Babulooni." 
Jeremiah20:6 Haza iwe Pashuuri n'abu otwire nabo omwawe, mutwarwe Babulooni muri enkwatwa, okwo obe niyo waagwa, kandi oziikweyo, iwe na bagyenzi baawe boona abu ohanuurira ebishuba." 
Jeremiah20:7 Ai Nyakubaho, okambeihabeiha; naanye naikiriza kubeihwabeihwa! Nonkiza amaani, kandi onsingwire! Mpindukire eky'okushekyeererwa eizooba ryona, buri muntu nanteerera enaku." 
Jeremiah20:8 Manya, buri murundi gwona ogu ngamba, ngyemeserezibwa kwamuza n'okuranga obubisha n'okucwekyerera. Mbwenu ekigambo kya Nyakubaho kimbeeraire eky'okunjumisa n'okungaaniizisa eizooba ryona." 
Jeremiah20:9 Ku ndikugira nti: Ka ndekye kumugambaho, nari okutagamba omu iziina rye obundi: mpurira omuriinye ekigambo kye kiri nk'omuriro gurikubuguma, oguri omu magufa gangye; haza okukigumisiriza kundusya kandi tindikukubaasa." 
Jeremiah20:10 Manya nimpurira baingi abarikuhwihwitsa! Obwoba bunturukire oku n'oku! Banywani bangye boona ab'aha mara, abategyereize kundeeba ningwa, nibagira bati: Nimumuregye! naitwe tumuregye; obundi akaabeihwabeihwa tumusingura, haza tumuhoora." 
Jeremiah20:11 Kwonka Nyakubaho ari hamwe naanye nk'omurwani orikutiinisa. N'ahabw'ekyo abarikumpiiganisa nibaija kuteera entsibo, baremwe kunsingura. Nibaija kuhemuka munonga, ahabw'okuba tibarikwija kumbaasa. Kandi ekihemu kyabo eky'ebiro n'ebiro tikiryeba." 
Jeremiah20:12 Ai Mukama ow'amahe, iwe ogyeza abahikiriire, kandi orikureeba ebiri omu mitima yaabo n'omu biteekateeko byabo, ka ndeebe oku waabahoora. Manya niiwe nyegyekyereire ebyangye." 
Jeremiah20:13 Nimweshongorere Nyakubaho, mumuhimbise, ahabw'okuba ajunire abakyene, yaabaiha omu mikono y'enkozi z'ebibi." 
Jeremiah20:14 Eizooba ri naazairweho nirikakyeenwe! Eizooba ri maawe yanzaariireho nirikainare! 
Jeremiah20:15 Omuntu owaizire kugambira tata enkuru nungi y'okumureetera okushemererwa ati: Waazaara omwojo, naakakyeenwe." 
Jeremiah20:16 Ogwo muntu naakabe nk'endembo zi Nyakubaho yaacwekyereize ataine saasi! Naakahurire ekiboroogo omu kasheeshe, n'enduuru omu ihangwe!" 
Jeremiah20:17 Ahabw'okuba taraanyitiire mu nda ya maawe, maawe akaba ekituuro kyangye; enda ye ekaguma eri nyarwegye," 
Jeremiah20:18 Mbwenu nkaba naarugira ki omu nda ya maawe kuguma niinyehenenga nindeeba enaku; n'okumara ebiro by'amagara gangye mpemukire? 
Jeremiah21:1 Oku nikwo Nyakubaho yaagambiire Yeremiya, obu omugabe Zedekiya yaamutumaho Pashuuri mwene Malikiya na Zefaniya omuhongyerezi mwene Maaseya, naamugira ati:" 
Jeremiah21:2 Otubuurize Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni aizire kututeera; obundi Nyakubaho akaatugirira nk'eby'okutangaaza bye ebi akora oku biri, amutwihaho." 
Jeremiah21:3 Yeremiya nawe abagarukamu ati: 
Jeremiah21:4 Mugambire Zedekiya muti: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kubahendera aha mutwe ebikwato bi mukwaitse kurwanisa omugabe wa Babulooni n'Abakaludaaya ababagoteire aheeru y'orugo, mbaigatire omuri oru rurembo." 
Jeremiah21:5 Nyowe nyenka niinyija kubarwanisa mbangire omukono gw'enkubito, nyine ekiniga n'ekishinjo na kashanga," 
Jeremiah21:6 nyite abatwire omuri oru rurembo, abantu n'enyamaishwa biitwe orufu rw'amaani." 
Jeremiah21:7 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Bwanyima Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda n'abagaragwa be n'abantu b'omuri oru rurembo abaraahonokye aha rufu na rurara n'enjara, mbarekurire Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni n'abazigu baabo abarikwenda kubaita, abaitse rurara y'obwogi atabasaasiire, atabarekire, nobu kwakuba okubagirira esaasi." 
Jeremiah21:8 Kandi abo bantu mubagire muti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, naabateeraho emihanda ebiri: Ogw'amagara n'ogw'okufa," 
Jeremiah21:9 origuma omuri oru rurembo aryaitwa rurara, n'enjara n'orufu. Kwonka orishohora, akeenaga omu mikono y'Abakaludaaya ababogotsire, aryakira; atimbuukye omu rugamba n'ekihembo, nigo magara ge." 
Jeremiah21:10 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Manya oru rurembo ndutaire omu kaso kurukorera kubi, kutari kurukorera gye. Nirwija kurekurirwa omugabe wa Babulooni arucumikyemu omuriro." 
Jeremiah21:11 Kandi ab'omuryango gw'omugabe wa Buyuda mubagire muti: Nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikugamba. 
Jeremiah21:12 Mukama naagira ati: Imwe ab'omuryango gwa Daudi, mugume mucwe emanja z'oburyo buri kasheeshe, mujune abanyagirwe, mubaihe omu mikono y'abarikubahata; kashanga yangye etakaayaka nk'omuriro, ekabootsya nimbatura ebi murikukora, ekarema omuntu weena kugiraaza." 
Jeremiah21:13 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Iwe Yerusalemu otuura omu ruhanga, iwe rukiri rw'omu ruhita 'we, imwe abagira muti: N'oha orishuuma kuturwanisa, nari muti: N'oha oritutaahirira? Reeba, niinyija kubarwanisa." 
Jeremiah21:14 Niinyija kubafubira ahabw'ebi murikukora, ntwekye omuriro omu kibira kyayo gucwekyereze ebintu byona ebigyehinguririize; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah22:1 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Irooko oze omu kikaari ky'omugabe wa Buyuda, omugambirireyo ebi bigambo," 
Jeremiah22:2 oti: Iwe mugabe wa Buyuda 'we, oshutama aha kitebe ky'obugabe ekya Daudi, hurira ebi Nyakubaho arikukugambira; iwe n'abagaragwa baawe, n'abantu baawe abaraba omuri aga marembo!" 
Jeremiah22:3 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mukore eby'oburyo n'ebihikire; abashaagiziibwe mubaihe omu mikono y'abarikubahata. Kandi mutarishaagiza nobu kwakuba okukorera eby'obwinazi omunyaihanga, efuuzi nari omufaakazi, nainga okusheeshera omuri ogu mwanya eshagama y'abataine rubanja." 
Jeremiah22:4 Manya buzimazima ku muraakore ebi naabaragiira, abagabe abashutama aha kitebe kya Daudi baryaguma nibaraba omu marembo g'eki kikaari batembire ebigaari n'embaraasi, bo n'abagaragwa baabo n'abambari baabo." 
Jeremiah22:5 Kwonka ebi bigambo ku muriba mutabitaireho mutima, Nyakubaho naagira ati: Niinyerahira nti: Nyaruju egi eryaba eitongo." 
Jeremiah22:6 Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho naagamba ati ahari Nyaruju y'omugabe wa Buyuda: Ahariinye nobu oraabe ori murungi nka Gileadi, nari nk'enshozi za Lebanooni, kwonka buzimazima ndyakuhindura eihamba ahatatuurwa bantu." 
Jeremiah22:7 Ndyakutebeekanisiza ab'okucwekyereza, baije, buri omwe akwaitse eby'okurwanisa, bateme zaakaarwenda zaawe enungi munonga, bazinagye omu muriro." 
Jeremiah22:8 Haza ab'amahanga maingi ku bariba nibaraba ahari oru rurembo, buri muntu abuuze mutaahi we ati: Ahabw'enki Nyakubaho agizire ati oru rurembo rukuru?" 
Jeremiah22:9 Bagarukanemu bati: Ahabw'okuba abaamwo bakatsigaho endagaano ya Mukama Ruhanga waabo, baaramya baaruhanga abandi, baabaheereza." 
Jeremiah22:10 Mutaricurira ogwo muntu ofiire, nobu kwakuba okumugiira omu kyosi, kureka muririre munonga Yehoahazi omutabani, ahabw'okuba baryamutwara kandi tarigaruka bundi, kureeba ensi ye y'obuzaarwa." 
Jeremiah22:11 Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho naagamba ahari Shalumu mwene Yosiya, omugabe wa Buyuda, owaahungwire engoma ya Yosiya ishe, akagyenda akaruga omuri eki kyanga, ati: Tarigaruka aha bundi;" 
Jeremiah22:12 kureka ei barimutwara ari enkwatwa, niyo arigwa, atareebe gi nsi bundi." 
Jeremiah22:13 Ogwo muntu oyombekyesa enju ye ebitahikire, na kaanyinaabiri ze akazombekyesa ebitari by'obwinganisa; ogwo okoreseza mutaahi we busha, atamuhe bihembo," 
Jeremiah22:14 kandi orikugira ati: Ndyayeyombekyera enju rutaaba y'ebishengye bihango by'ahaiguru; akagicwamu amadirisa, akagikiikizamu embaaho za kaarwenda, akagisiiga erangi erikutukura, aryakareeba!" 
Jeremiah22:15 Noogira ngu okwombekyesa zaakaarwenda otarikwenda kukirwa, nikwo kuraakuhindure omugabe? Shoimwe akaba atarya, akanywa, haza akakora eby'obwinganisa kandi ebihikire, atyo akaba gye?" 
Jeremiah22:16 Manya akaba acwera abooro n'abakyene emanja, haza biba gye. Mbwenu shi okwo tikwo kummanya? Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah22:17 Kwonka iwe amaisho gaawe n'omutima gwawe nibiruruuhira eby'okwetungisa nooryangatanisa, osheesha eshagama y'abataine rubanja; okorera abantu baawe eby'okubahata n'eby'obubisha." 
Jeremiah22:18 Nikyo Nyakubaho arikugambira ahari Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya omugabe wa Buyuda, ati: Batarimucurira nibagira bati: Ai bambe, mwne tata! Nari bati: Ai bambe, munyaanyazi! Batarimucurira nibagira bati: Ai bambe Nyakubaho wangye! Nari bati: Ai bambe, Nyakusinga!" 
Jeremiah22:19 Baryamuziika nk'oku baziika endogoya, bamukurure bamunagye aheeru y'amarembo ga Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah22:20 Inamuka oze Lebanooni, oboroogye, oyamurize omuri Bashani, ocure nooyema Abariimu; ahabw'okuba nkunzi zaawe zoona zicwekyereziibwe." 
Jeremiah22:21 Nkakugambira okigogyeire; kwonka waayanga oti: Tindikwenda kuhurira! Okutahurira bi nkugambira gutuura guri omuze gwawe okwiha omu butsigazi. 
Jeremiah22:22 Abeebembezi baawe baryatuntumurwa omuyaga, nkunzi zaawe zitwarwe ziri enkwatwa; haza ohemukye, obwerabwere ahabw'ebicumuro byawe byona." 
Jeremiah22:23 Iwe mutuuzi wa Lebanooni 'we, otuura ogaramisiririize omuri zaakaarwenda, ebishi oryatsinda ku orihikwaho obusaasi oburi nk'ebisha by'omukazi orikurumwa kuzaara!" 
Jeremiah22:24 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Niinyerahira nti: Iwe Koniya mwene Yehoyakimu, omugabe wa Buyuda, nobu waakuba empeta y'akamanyiso ey'aha rukumu rw'omukono gwangye gwa buryo, nkaakuhuruuturaho," 
Jeremiah22:25 nkushunukira abarikwenda kukwita, abu otiina; nangwa n'okukurekurira Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni n'Abakaludaaya." 
Jeremiah22:26 Iwe na nyoko kikuzaara ndyabajuguta, mbanagye omu ndiijo nsi ei mutarazaariirwemu, mugweyo." 
Jeremiah22:27 Kandi ensi ei baryetenga kugarukamu tibarigigarukamu. 
Jeremiah22:28 Beitu Koniya ogu t'omuntu otuura naagaywa nk'enyungu eyatikire, ei omuntu weena ateetaho? Mbwenu ahabw'enki we n'abaana be nibajugutwa, nibanagwa omu nsi ei batarikumanya?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Iwe nsi 'we, nsi 'we, nsi 'we, hurira eki Nyakubaho arikugamba!" 
Jeremiah22:30 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ogu muntu mumuhandiikye ku ari encwekye; ku atariba gye omu biro by'amagara ge; ahabw'okuba tihariho ow'omu b'oruzaaro rwe orihungura ekitebe ky'obugabe ekya Daudi, akakishutamaho, akagaruka kutegyeka omuri Buyuda." 
Jeremiah23:1 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ebishi abariisa abahwerekyereza entaama z'omu iriisizo ryangye bakazitaataanisa, baryakareeba!" 
Jeremiah23:2 Nikyo Nyowe Mukama, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, ndikugambira aha bariisa abareeberera abantu bangye nti: Mutaataaniise obusyo bw'entaama zangye, mwazibinga timwazeetaho. Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mbwenu niinyija kubafubira, mbature ebibi bi mukora," 
Jeremiah23:3 bwanyima ntaaruure ab'omu busyo bwangye abaatsigaireho, mbaihe omu nsi zi naabataataaniiremu, mbagarure omu ka yaabo, bazaare bakanye;" 
Jeremiah23:4 haza mbateereho abariisa abaribareeberera, babe batakitiina, nobu kwakuba okuhahaara, kandi hatakiriho n'omwe orikubura. Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah23:5 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, obunaku buryahika, nyimukize Daudi Itaagi ohikiire, abe omugabe, ategyekyese obwengye, akore omu nsi eby'oburyo kandi ebihikire." 
Jeremiah23:6 Omu busingye bwe aba Yuda baryajunwa n'aba Isiraeli batuure buhooro. Kandi eri niryo eiziina ri aryetwa: Nyakubaho-okuhikiirira-kwaitu. 
Jeremiah23:7 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Obunaku buryahika, obu abantu bariba batakigira bati: Nindahira Nyakubaho owaihire Abaisiraeli omu nsi ya Misiri," 
Jeremiah23:8 kureka bati: Nindahira Nyakubaho owaareetsire baijukuru b'ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli, akabeebembera naabaiha omu nsi y'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, n'omu nsi zoona ezi yaabaire abataataanisiizemu, reero bakatuura omu nsi yaabo ahabwabo." 
Jeremiah23:9 Reero aha by'abarangi: Omutima gumpwaire omunda, amagufa gangye goona gajogajogokire, Ndi nk'omusinzi orembiibwe viino ahabwa Nyakubaho, n'ahabw'ebigambo bye ebirikwera." 
Jeremiah23:10 Manya ensi eijwire abashambani. Kandi ahabw'omukyeeno, ensi neecura, amariisizo goomire. Emitwarize yaabo ni mibi; n'ebi barikukoresa amaani tibihikire." 
Jeremiah23:11 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Abarangi n'abahongyerezi tibarikutiina Ruhanga; nangwa n'omuri Nyaruju yangye nshangire nibakoreramu ebibi. 
Jeremiah23:12 N'ahabw'ekyo emitwarize yaabo eryababeera nk'otuhanda turikuterera hariho omwirima, otu barikubingirwamu bakagwa, ahabw'okuba obunaku bw'okubafubira ku burihika, ndyabagwisiza akagwe; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah23:13 Omu barangi ba Samariya ndeebiremu ekintu kitaine nsha. Reeba, barangire omu iziina rya Baali, baahabisa abantu bangye Abaisiraeli." 
Jeremiah23:14 Kandi omu barangi ba Yerusalemu ndeebiremu ekintu kirikureetera omuntu kushishwa. Nibashambana, bataho n'okubeiha; batyo bateera omuhimbo enkozi z'ebibi; habura owaayeteisa akareka ekibi kye. Boona oku batura, bambeereire nk'aba Sodoma; abatuuzi baayo bansusira aba Gomora." 
Jeremiah23:15 Nikyo Mukama ow'amahe arikuhayirira abo barangi, ati: Reeba, niinyija kubariisa omuravunga, mbanywaise amaizi garimu obushegu; ahabw'okuba abarangi ba Yerusalemu babugize ensi yoona okutatiina Ruhanga" 
Jeremiah23:16 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Mutatega okutu ebi abarangi barikubahanuurira nibabeesigisa ebitaine muhoho. Manya nibabagambira ebi beeteekateekyeire bitari ebi nyowe Nyakubaho ngambire. 
Jeremiah23:17 Batuura nibagambira abanga kuhurira ebi Nyakubaho agamba, bati: Nimwija kuba gye. Kandi bagambira buri muntu weena oyangisiriza akakora nkana ebi arikwenda bati: Tihariho kagwe karikugwera." 
Jeremiah23:18 Mbwenu omuri abo barangi n'oha oragiire omu ihanuuriro rya Nyakubaho kwetegyereza n'okuhurira ebi arikugamba? Nari n'oha orataire omutima aha bi arikugamba akabitega okutu? 
Jeremiah23:19 Reeba, omuyaga gwa Nyakubaho ogw'amaani niguhuuha! Kashanga ye eizire! Eihunga ryaza kuteera emitwe y'enyabibi." 
Jeremiah23:20 Ekiniga kya Nyakubaho tikirikwija kutuuza atakahikiriize ebi arikwenda kukora. 
Jeremiah23:21 Abarangi abo tindabatumire, nibo baayetumisiriize. Tiinyine ki naabagambiire, nibo baayerangiire ahabwabo." 
Jeremiah23:22 Kuri baabaire bariho omu ihanuuriro ryangye, bakaarangiriire abantu bangye ebi ngambire, babahindura, bareka emitwarize yaabo emibi, n'ebibi bi barikukora." 
Jeremiah23:23 Nyakubaho naabuuza ati: Nimugira ngu ndi Ruhanga otuura omu mwanya gumwe, otari mu myanya yoona?" 
Jeremiah23:24 Ebyo omuntu aine ahu yaakweshereka, ntamureebe? Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba. Kandi Nyakubaho naabuuza ati: Tiinye ndi hoonahoona omu iguru n'omu nsi?" 
Jeremiah23:25 Mpuriire ebi abarangi abahanuura eby'ebishuba barikugamba nibagira bati: Ndootsire! Ndootsire! 
Jeremiah23:26 Mbwenu ebyo bishuba biryahitsya hi okuguma omu mitima y'abo barangi abaragura eby'ebishuba n'eby'oburyarya babiihire aha mutima; 
Jeremiah23:27 abacuma enaama y'okureetera abantu bangye kuunyebwa ahabw'ebirooto byabo ebi bagambirana, nk'oku baishebo baanyebirwe bakaramya Baali?" 
Jeremiah23:28 Omurangi oine eki arootsire, k'akirootorore; n'ohuriire eki ngambire, akirangirire omu mazima. Nyakubaho naabuuza ati: Hari ebishushunga bijwana bita n'engano?" 
Jeremiah23:29 Mbwenu shi ekigambo kyangye tikiri nk'omuriro nari nk'enyondo, ebyatagura orukiri bikarusheenyagura?" 
Jeremiah23:30 Nikyo Nyakubaho arikugirira ati: Reeba, nindwanisa abarangi abaibana ebigambo byangye bakabihindura ebyabo." 
Jeremiah23:31 Reeba, nimpakanisa abarangi abagamba ebyabo ahabwabo, haza bakagira bati: Nyakubaho niwe arikugamba." 
Jeremiah23:32 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, nimpakanisa abaranga ebirooto by'ebishuba bakabirootorora, bakahabisa abantu bangye n'ebishuba byabo, n'okugambira eryo, haza ntabatumire kandi ntabaragiire; batyo bakaburira kimwe eki bagasiire aba bantu; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah23:33 Ku harigira omwe omuri aba bantu, yaaba murangi, yaaba omuhongyerezi, yaakubuuza ati: Ekiremeerera Nyakubaho ni ki? Obagarukyemu oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Niimwe mundemeerera, kandi ndyabacwa." 
Jeremiah23:34 Ekindi, omurangi nari omuhongyerezi nainga omwe omuri abo bantu, origira ati: Ekiremeerera Nyakubaho, ndyamufubira n'ab'eka ye." 
Jeremiah23:35 Obagire oti: Buri muntu ashemereire kubuuza mutaahi we nari mwene ishe ati: Nyakubaho agarukiremu ki? Nari ati: Nyakubaho agambire ki? 
Jeremiah23:36 Kwonka mutarigira obu mugambire ekiremeerera Mukama obundi; ahabw'okuba ekiremeera ekyo n'eki omuntu ayecwera. Mutyo muhindaguturana ebigambo bya Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe, Ruhanga waitu." 
Jeremiah23:37 Oku nikwo oraagume noobuuza omurangi oti: Nyakubaho akugarukiremu ki? 
Jeremiah23:38 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Kwonka ku murigira muti: Ekiremereire Nyakubaho, ahabw'okugamba ebi bigambo; Ekiremereire Nyakubaho, haza naabatumireho ningira nti: Mutarigira muti: Ekiremereire Nyakubaho," 
Jeremiah23:39 nikyo ndibakiririza nkabanaga hare, imwe n'orurembo ru naabahaire na baashwenkuriimwe;" 
Jeremiah23:40 ntyo mbareetere okuguma nimujumwa n'okuhemuka kw'ebiro n'ebiro okutaryeba. 
Jeremiah24:1 Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni ku yaaherize kwiha Yerusalemu Yekoniya mwene Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Buyuda, hamwe n'abategyeki baayo n'abanyamyoga n'abaheesi akabazaahiza Babulooni, Nyakubaho yaanyoreka eki: Naareeba ebiibo bibiri by'emitiini bitairwe omu maisho ga Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
Jeremiah24:2 Ekiibo ekimwe kikaba kirimu ebijuma by'emitiini birungi munonga nk'ebibanza kwera; kandi ekindi kirimu ebijuma by'emitiini bibi munonga, ebitarikubaasa kuriibwa." 
Jeremiah24:3 Atyo Nyakubaho yambuuza ati: Yeremiya, nooreeba ki? Naanye ngira nti: Nindeeba ebijuma by'emitiini ebirungi biri birungi munonga, n'ebibi biri bibi munonga, ebitarikubaasa kuriibwa." 
Jeremiah24:4 Bwanyima Nyakubaho angambira ati: Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ningira nti: Nk'oku ebi bijuma by'emitiini biri birungi, n'abaazaahiibwe barugire Buyuda, abu naabingire omuri eki kyanga, nkabatwara omu nsi y'Abakaludaaya, nikwo ndiguma nimbeeta barungi." 
Jeremiah24:5 Ndyaguma mbataireho eriisho nimbakorera ebirungi, na bwanyima mbagarure omuri egi nsi." 
Jeremiah24:6 Ndyabombeka, tindibasheenya; ndyababyara, tindibakuura." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ndyabaha omutima gw'okummanya ku ndi Nyakubaho, babe abantu bangye, naanye mbe Ruhanga waabo; ahabw'okuba baryangarukira n'omutima gwabo gwona." 
Jeremiah24:8 Kwonka Nyowe Nyakubaho ningira nti: Nk'oku ebi bijuma by'emitiini ebibi biri bibi munonga, ebitarikubaasa kuriibwa, nikwo nditwaza Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda, n'abategyeki be, n'aba Yerusalemu abaahonokireho bakatsigara omuri egi nsi, n'abatwire omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Jeremiah24:9 Ndyabahindura ekirikunugwa ab'omu nsi z'obugabe zoona, babe abarikujumwa, abarikucwerwaho enfumu, abarikugaaniizibwa kandi abarikukyeenwa omu byanga byona ebi naababingiiremu;" 
Jeremiah24:10 reero mbooherereze rurara, enjara n'orufu, okuhitaya obu baricwekyererera kimwe, bakahwa omu nsi ei naabahaire na baishebo." 
Jeremiah25:1 Eki n'eki Nyakubaho yaagambiire Yeremiya aha ba Buyuda boona omu mwaka gwa kana ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya omugabe wa Buyuda (nigwo mwaka gw'okubanza ogwa Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni)," 
Jeremiah25:2 eki Yeremiya omurangi yaagambiire aba Yuda boona n'abatwire omuri Yerusalemu boona ati: 
Jeremiah25:3 Okwiha omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'eshatu ogw'omu busingye bwa Yosiya mwene Amoni omugabe wa Buyuda, n'okuhitsya eri izooba, Nyakubaho atuura nangambira kandi naanye tiinyosha kubagambira, kwonka mwanga kuhurira." 
Jeremiah25:4 Mukanga kuhurira nobu kwakuba okutega okutu, Nyakubaho nobu araabe yaagumire naabatumaho abagaragwa be boona abarangi, abaabaire babeehanangiriza bati:" 
Jeremiah25:5 Mbwenu nimuhindukye, buri muntu omuriimwe arekye emitwarize ye emibi n'ebibi bi abaire naakora; mubone kutuura omu nsi ei Nyakubaho yaabahaire na baashwenkuriimwe okwiha ira, kuba eyaanyu ebiro byona." 
Jeremiah25:6 Akabagira ati: Mutaryehongyera baaruhanga abandi, mukabaheereza kandi mukabaramya; nari okungwisa kubi nimuramya ebishushani ebi murikukoresa engaro zaanyu. Obwo nibwo ntaribakora kubi." 
Jeremiah25:7 Kwonka na hati timukaanyorobeire; kureka mutuura nimungwisa kubi, nimuramya ebishushani bi mukoresa engaro zaanyu, kwereetera akabi; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah25:8 Nikyo Mukama ow'amahe arikugirira ati: Imwe ahabw'okwanga kworobera ebi mbagambira," 
Jeremiah25:9 mbwenu niinyija kutuma aha b'enganda zoona ez'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, n'aha mwiru wangye Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni, mbahuruze bateere egi nsi n'abagitwiremu, bateere n'amahanga aga goona agabeehinguririize; haza ncwekyerereze kimwe eri ihanga n'agandi agahereraine naryo, ngahindure agarikunugwa, agarikweshaanywa, kandi agariguma gari amatongo." 
Jeremiah25:10 Ekindi, ndyahunamya amaraka gaabo g'okwesiima n'okushemererwa, aga baakishwera na baakishwerwa, n'ag'emengo zirikusa, ndaaze n'amatabaaza gaabo," 
Jeremiah25:11 egi nsi yoona ehindukye eitongo n'eihamba; ab'ago mahanga bamare emyaka makumi mushanju nibaheereza omugabe wa Babulooni. 
Jeremiah25:12 Haza egyo myaka makumi mushanju ku erihwa, nfubire omugabe wa Babulooni n'eihanga rye ery'Abakalundaaya, nimbatura ebicumuro byabo, egyo nsi ngihindurire kimwe eihamba." 
Jeremiah25:13 Ndyahikiiriza ahari egyo nsi byona ebi naagigambireho, ebihandiikirwe omuri eki kitabo, ebi Yeremiya yaarangire kuba aha mahanga goona." 
Jeremiah25:14 Ahabw'okuba amahanga maingi n'abagabe b'amaani baryahindura Abaababulooni abahuuku, mbazimuurire nk'ebi baakozire n'ebi baakoreise emikono yaabo oku biri." 
Jeremiah25:15 Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli akangambira ati: Yakiira eki kikopo kya viino ya kashanga yangye, okinywaise amahanga goona agu ndaakutumemu." 
Jeremiah25:16 Nigaija kukinywa gataruze, gagwe iraro nigaitwa rurara ei ndaagooherereze." 
Jeremiah25:17 Ntyo nyakiira ekyo kikopo, nkiiha Nyakubaho omu ngaro, nkinywaisa amahanga agu yantumireho:" 
Jeremiah25:18 Yerusalemu n'endembo za Buyuda, abagabe baayo n'abategyeki baayo kubihindura amatongo n'eihamba bikaba eby'okweshaanywa n'okukyeenwa, nk'oku kiri eri izooba;" 
Jeremiah25:19 kandi nkinywaisa Faraaho omugabe wa Misiri n'abagaragwa be n'abategyeki be n'abantu be boona," 
Jeremiah25:20 n'abanyamahanga boona ababatwiremu; abagabe b'omu nsi ya Uuzi boona, n'ab'omu nsi y'Abafilisiti (aba Ashikelooni, Gaaza, Ekurooni n'abaatsigaire omuri Ashidoodi);" 
Jeremiah25:21 aba Edomu, aba Moabu na beene Amoni;" 
Jeremiah25:22 abagabe boona aba Tuuro n'aba Sidoni n'ab'aha myegyeego y'Enyanja; 
Jeremiah25:23 nkinywaisa n'aba Dedani, Teema, Buuzi, na boona abatega ebyeyera," 
Jeremiah25:24 abagabe ba Buharabu boona n'ab'enganda z'ebijwangye abatwire omu ihamba; 
Jeremiah25:25 taho abagabe boona aba Zimuri n'aba Elamu n'aba Mediya; 
Jeremiah25:26 n'abagabe b'omu nsi z'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho aba hare n'aba haihi, nk'oku barikukuratana; n'ensi z'obugabe zoona ez'omu nsi. Abo ku bariheza kukinywaho, omugabe wa Babulooni abe niwe yaahereeruka kukinywa." 
Jeremiah25:27 Bwanyima obagambire oti: Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Munywe musinde, mutanakye, haza mugwe obutaimuka; ahabwa rurara ei ndikwija kubooherereza kubaita." 
Jeremiah25:28 Reero ku baraayangye kwakiira ekyo kikopo, kukikwiha omu ngaro kukinywa, obagambire oti: Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Nimuragiirwa kukinywa!" 
Jeremiah25:29 Mbwenu orurembo orurikuunyetererwa ku ndaabe nirwo naatandikiraho kukorera kubi, nimugira ngu niimwe muraatsigare mutafubiirwe? Timurikwija kugyenda mutafubiirwe; ahabw'okuba niinyija kuhuruza abakwaitse rurara, barwanise abatwire omu nsi boona; nikwo Mukama ow'amahe arikugamba." 
Jeremiah25:30 Mbwenu nu, obarangire ebi bigambo noobagira oti: Nyakubaho naija kutsinda naayema omu iguru, ahindire omu mwanya gwe ogurikwera. Naija kutsinda kuteera ab'omu ka y'obusyo bwe, ayamuze nk'abarikunyuuka emizaabibu; arwanise abatwire omu nsi boona." 
Jeremiah25:31 Obwaku bw'eiraka nibwija kuhika aha mperu z'ensi. Manya Nyakubaho aine eki arikufa n'amahanga, naatonganisa boona abaine omubiri; enyabibi aziitse rurara, Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah25:32 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Reeba, akabi nikagyenda, nikaruga omu ihanga rimwe nikaza omu rindi. Eihunga ry'amaani nirihiika niriruga omu byanga bya hare by'ensi!" 
Jeremiah25:33 Kandi abu Nyakubaho ariita eryo izooba, baryarambirirana, baihe aha muheru gw'ensi, bate aha gundi. Tibaricurirwa, kandi tibarishanguruzibwa, nobu kwakuba okubaziika; baryaguma bagangarami aha itaka nk'amasha." 
Jeremiah25:34 Imwe bariisa b'entaama 'mwe, nimucure muboroogye! Naimwe bakama b'amasyo nimwekuringye omu iju; ahabw'okuba obunaku bwanyu bw'okwitwa n'okutaataanisibwa bwahika. Nimwija kugwa nk'empaya nungi z'entaama ezibaagwa." 
Jeremiah25:35 Manya abariisa b'entaama baryabura obuhungiro, bakama baazo babure obukiriro." 
Jeremiah25:36 Nimuhurire okuborooga kw'abariisa b'entama, n'okucura kwa bakama b'obwo busyo! Nyakubaho acwekyereize amariisizo gaabo;" 
Jeremiah25:37 amaka gaabo ag'obusingye gaasheenyuka ahabw'okubagirira ekiniga kingi. 
Jeremiah25:38 Abantu ba Nyakubaho bahungire omu nsi yaabo, nk'oku entare etsigaho eryaya ryayo; ahabw'okuba egyo nsi rurara y'ababisha na kashanga ya Nyakubaho bigihindwire eihamba." 
Jeremiah26:1 Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya omugabe wa Buyuda ku yaabaire akitandikire kutegyeka, Nyakubaho yangambira ati:" 
Jeremiah26:2 Irooko oyemerere omu kibuga kya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, ogambire boona abarugire omu ndembo za Buyuda, abaizire kuramiza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, ebigambo ebi byona ebi ndikukuragiira kubagambira. Otagira eki waatsigayo." 
Jeremiah26:3 Obundi bakaatega okutu, buri omwe ahinduka, areka emitwarize ye mibi; naanye nyegarukamu, ndeka kubareetera akabi aku ndikwenda kubareetaho, nimbatura ebibi bi bakora." 
Jeremiah26:4 Obagambire oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ku muraabe mutampuriire, mukakuratira amateeka gangye agu naabateereireho," 
Jeremiah26:5 kandi mukata omutima aha bi abaheereza bangye abarangi abu ntuura nimbatumaho kubagambira, kwonka mutarikukyeetaho," 
Jeremiah26:6 obwo Nyaruju egi ndyagigira nk'oku naagizire Shiilo, n'oru rurembo nduhindure orw'okukyeenwa amahanga goona ag'omu nsi." 
Jeremiah26:7 Abahongyerezi n'abarangi n'abantu boona bakahurira Yeremiya naagambira omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ebyo bigambo. 
Jeremiah26:8 Reero Yeremiya ku yaaherize kugamba byona ebi Nyakubaho yaamuragiire kugambira abantu, abahongyerezi n'abarangi n'abantu boona baamukwata, baamugira bati: Ori ow'okufa!" 
Jeremiah26:9 Waarangiririra ki omu iziina rya Nyakubaho oti: Nyaruju egi eryaba nka Shiilo, n'oru rurembo ruryaba eitongo, rubure ow'okurutuuramu? Abantu boona batyo bateeranira ahari Yeremiya omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
Jeremiah26:10 Abategyeki ba Buyuda ku baakihuriire, baaruga omu kikaari ky'omugabe, baija omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, baashutama omu kisasi ky'Eirembo Risya ryayo." 
Jeremiah26:11 Reero abahongyerezi n'abarangi baagambira abategyeki n'abantu boona bati; Ogu muntu ashemereire kucwerwa orubanja rw'okwitwa, ahabw'okuba yaarangira kubi oru rurembo, nk'oku mwayehuririra n'amatu gaanyu." 
Jeremiah26:12 Yeremiya atyo agambira abategyeki n'abantu boona ati: Nyakubaho antumire kurangira kubi Nyaruju egi n'oru rurembo byona ebi mwahurira. 
Jeremiah26:13 Mbwenu nimushemeze emitwarize yaanyu n'ebi murikukora, kandi mworobere ebi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu arikubagambira; na Nyakubaho naija kwegarukamu, arekye akabi aku agambire kubareetera." 
Jeremiah26:14 Kwonka nyowe, reeba ndi omu mikono yaanyu. Munkore eki muraareebe ngu ni kirungi kandi kihikire!" 
Jeremiah26:15 Kwonka shi mukimanyire kimwe ngu ku muraanyite, nimwija kwereetera orubanja rw'okwita omuntu ori mwere, murureetere n'oru rurembo n'abarutwiremu; ahabw'okuba omu mazima Nyakubaho niwe antumire kubagambira ebyo byona ebi mwahurira." 
Jeremiah26:16 Bwanyima abategyeki n'abantu boona bakagambira abahongyerezi n'abarangi bati: Ogu muntu tashemereire kucwerwa orubanja rw'okwitwa, ahabw'okuba yaatugambira omu iziina rya Mukama Ruhanga waitu." 
Jeremiah26:17 Reero bamwe omu bakuru b'omuri egyo nsi baimuka baagambira abantu boona abateeraniire aho bati: 
Jeremiah26:18 Miika owa Moresheeti akaranga omu busingye bwa Hezekiya omugabe wa Buyuda, yaagambira abantu ba Buyuda boona ati: Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Siyooni eryatabirwa nk'omusiri, Yerusalemu ebe ekirundo ky'amatongo, orushozi rwa Nyaruju rushwekwe ebishaka." 
Jeremiah26:19 Mbwenu Hezekiya omugabe wa Buyuda n'aba Yuda boona bakamwita? Hezekiya taratiinire Nyakubaho, akamweshengyereza kumugirira embabazi? Na Nyakubaho tareegarukiremu akareka akabi aku yaabaire agambire kubareetera? Kwonka itwe nitwenda kwereetera akabi kahango!" 
Jeremiah26:20 Kandi hakaba hariho ondiijo muntu owaarangire omu iziina rya Nyakubaho. Niwe Uriya mwene Shemaaya owa Kiriyatiyearimu. Akaranga kubi ahari oru rurembo, n'ahari egi nsi, ebigambo ebirikushushana n'ebya Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah26:21 Haza omugabe Yehoyakimu n'amamanzi ge goona, n'abategyeki boona, ku baahuriire ebi yaagamba, omugabe yaayenda kumwita. Uriya ku yaakihuriire yaatiina, yaacwa, yaahungira Misiri." 
Jeremiah26:22 Bwanyima omugabe Yehoyakimu yaatuma abantu Misiri, Elinatani mwene Akiboora n'abandi bashaija abu yaabaire aine," 
Jeremiah26:23 baihayo Uriya baamureetera omugabe Yehoyakimu, yaamwita; kandi omutumbi gwe baagunaga omu iziikiro ry'abantu abatari banyamaziina." 
Jeremiah26:24 Kwonka Ahikaamu mwene Shafani yaarwana munonga ahari Yeremiya, tibaamurekurira bantu kumwita." 
Jeremiah27:1 Zedekiya mwene Yosiya, omugabe wa Buyuda, ku yaabaire nibwo atandikire kutegyeka, Nyakubaho yaagira eki yaagambira Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah27:2 Yeremiya ogwo akagira ati: Nyakubaho akangambira ati: Yekorere emiguha n'enkomo, obyete omu maraka." 
Jeremiah27:3 Reero otume aha mugabe wa Edomu, n'owa Moabu, n'owa Amoni, n'owa Tuuro, n'owa Sidoni, entumwa eziizire Yerusalemu ahari Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda." 
Jeremiah27:4 Ozitume ahari bakama baazo oti: Mukama ow'amahe Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Mugambire bakama baanyu muti: 
Jeremiah27:5 Niinye naahangire ensi n'abantu n'enyamaishwa ebigitwiremu, nkabihangisa obushoboorozi bwangye bwingi ngoroire omukono, kandi mbiha omuntu weena ou ndeeba ngu ahikire." 
Jeremiah27:6 Mbwenu ezi nsi zoona nzikwatsize omwiru wangye Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni, naamuha n'enyamaishwa kumuheereza." 
Jeremiah27:7 Amahanga goona garyamushumbira, n'omutabani n'omwijukuru okuhitsya obu obunaku bw'ensi ye burihika, ab'amahanga g'amaani n'abagabe b'ekitiinwa bakamuhindura omuhuuku waabo." 
Jeremiah27:8 Kwonka ku harigira eihanga nari ensi y'obugabe eyaayanga kutabaarira Nebukadenezaari ogu, ekanga ku agitegyeka, egyo nsi ndyagifubira ngiitse rurara, enjara, n'orufu, okuhitsya obu ndigimurekurira akagicwekyereza, Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah27:9 N'ahabw'ekyo mutahurira abarangi baanyu, n'abafumu, n'abarootorozi, n'abagomboozi n'abarogi baanyu abarikubagira bati: Mutatabaarira omugabe wa Babulooni;" 
Jeremiah27:10 ahabw'okuba ebi barikubahanuurira n'ebishuba ebiribarugiramu okucuubwa omu nsi yaanyu, mukatwarwa hare; naanye nkagibabingamu, mukahwerekyerera." 
Jeremiah27:11 Kwonka eihanga ryona eririikiriza kutegyekwa ogwo mugabe wa Babulooni, rikamutabaarira, ndyarireka omu nsi yaaryo, rigituuremu, rigihingye. Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah27:12 Ebyo ku byahwaire, naagambira Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda omu muringo nk'ogwo nti: Ikiriza kutegyekwa omugabe wa Babulooni, omutabaarire n'abantu be, obone kugira amagara." 
Jeremiah27:13 Mbwenu iwe n'abantu baawe ku mwakwitwa rurara, enjara n'orufu, nk'oku Nyakubaho agambire aha ihanga ryona eriraayangye kutabaarira omugabe wa Babulooni, mukaazira ki?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Mutahurira ebi abarangi barkubagambiira bati: Mutatabaarira omugabe wa Babulooni, ahabw'okuba ebi barikubahanuurira n'ebishuba." 
Jeremiah27:15 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Tiinye mbatumire, kureka nibo barikuranga eby'ebishuba omu iziina ryangye. Haza ekyo imwe n'abarangi abarikubahanuurira kikabarugiramu okucuubwa omu nsi yaanyu, mukahwerekyerera." 
Jeremiah27:16 Ebyo ku byahwaire, naagambira abahongyerezi n'abantu abo boona nti: Nyakubaho naagamba ati: Mutahurira ebi abarangi baanyu barikubagambira, nibabaragurira bati: Reeba, ebintu by'omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho hati nibiija kugarurwa juba, biihwe Babulooni. Manya ekyo eki barikubahanuurira n'ekishuba." 
Jeremiah27:17 Mutabahurira, kureka mutabaarire omugabe wa Babulooni, mubone kukiza amagara. Mbwenu oru rurembo nimwendera ki ku ruhinduka amatongo?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Ku baraabe bari abarangi, kandi baine eki Mukama ow'amahe abatumire, nibamweshengyereze, ebi bintu ebyatsigaire omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'omu kikaari ky'omugabe wa Buyuda, n'omuri Yerusalemu, birekye kuza Babulooni." 
Jeremiah27:19 Manya Mukama ow'amahe oku nikwo arikugamba aha bikwatiraine n'enyomyo n'ekitanka n'ebitebe by'ebinaabiro ebyatsigaire omuri oru rurembo," 
Jeremiah27:20 ebi Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni ataranyagire, obu yaazaasya Yekoniya mwene Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Buyuda, akamwiha Yerusalemu akamutwara Babulooni n'abakungu ba Buyuda boona n'aba Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah27:21 Mukama ogwo ow'amahe Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, ebyo bintu ebyatsigaire omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho n'omu kikaari ky'omugabe wa Buyuda n'omuri Yerusalemu, naabigambaho ati:" 
Jeremiah27:22 Biryatwarwa Babulooni bigumeyo, okuhitsya obu ndibiijuka, nkabiihayo, nkabigarura omuri ogu mwanya." 
Jeremiah28:1 Omu mwaka gwa kana, Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda atandikire kutegyeka, omuri ogwo mwaka omu kwezi kwa kataano, Hananiya mwene Azuuri omurangi, owaarugire Gibeoni akangambira omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho omu maisho g'abahongyerezi n'ag'abantu boona ati:" 
Jeremiah28:2 Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Mpenzire omugamba gw'omugabe wa Babulooni." 
Jeremiah28:3 Omu myaka ebiri niinyija kugarura omuri ogu mwanya ebintu byona ebya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, ebi Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni yaanyagire, akabiiha omuri ogu mwanya akabitwara Babulooni." 
Jeremiah28:4 Kandi niinyija kugarura omuri ogu mwanya Yekoniya mwene Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Buyuda, hamwe n'abaazaahiibwe boona abaarugire Buyuda bakaza Babulooni; ahabw'okuba niinyija kubaihaho omugamba gw'omugabe wa Babulooni." 
Jeremiah28:5 Bwanyima Yeremiya omurangi akagambirira Hananiya omurangi omu maisho g'abahongyerezi n'abantu boona abaabaire beemereire omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho; 
Jeremiah28:6 yaamugira ati: Ni kikabekwo! Nkaabaasibwa ki Nyakubaho akora atyo, ahikiiriza ebi bigambo bi waaranga, agarura omuri ogu mwanya ebintu bya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, abiiha Babulooni n'abaazaahiibwe boona!" 
Jeremiah28:7 Kwonka mbwenu hurira eki naaza kukugambira n'abantu boona mutegire amatu. 
Jeremiah28:8 Abarangi ba ira, abaatubandiize nyowe naiwe, bakahanuurira amahanga maingi n'ensi z'amaani ez'obugabe ku birihikwaho orugamba, enjara, n'orufu." 
Jeremiah28:9 Mbwenu omurangi oranga obusingye, ebi arangire ku bibakwo, niho tumanyira ku buzimazima Nyakubaho niwe amutumire." 
Jeremiah28:10 Bwanyima omurangi Hananiya atyo aiha enkomo omu bitsya bya Yeremiya omurangi, azihenda." 
Jeremiah28:11 Reero Hananiya ogwo agambira omu maisho g'abantu boona ati: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Naanye nikwo ndiiha omugamba gwa Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni omu bitsya by'ab'amahanga goona omu myaka ebiri. Kwonka omurangi Yeremiya ayegyendera. 
Jeremiah28:12 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, omurangi Hananiya aherize kucwa enkomo omu bitsya bya Yeremiya omurangi, Nyakubaho yaagambira Yeremiya ati:" 
Jeremiah28:13 Irooko ogambire Hananiya oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ohenzire enkomo z'ebiti, kwonka nyowe niinyija kukora ez'ebyoma, nzite omu mwanya gwazo." 
Jeremiah28:14 Manya Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Ntaire omu bitsya by'amahanga goona omugamba gw'ekyoma, ngu gabe abahuuku ba Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni, gamuheereze; ahabw'okuba mmuhaire nangwa n'enyamaishwa kumuheereza." 
Jeremiah28:15 Mpaho Yeremiya omurangi yaagira Hananiya omurangi ati: Hurira, iwe Hananiya! Nyakubaho takutumire, kandi waareetera aba bantu kwesiga ebishuba." 
Jeremiah28:16 Nikyo Nyakubaho arikukugirira ati: Niinyija kukwiha juba omu nsi, ofe omuri ogu mwaka; ahabw'okuba orangiriire abantu eby'okugomera Nyakubaho." 
Jeremiah28:17 Haza omuri ogwo mwaka, omu kwezi kwa mushanju, omurangi Hananiya yaafa." 
Jeremiah29:1 Ebi n'ebigambo by'ebaruha ei Yeremiya omurangi yaahandiikiire Yerusalemu, akagitwekyera abakuru omu bazaahiibwe, n'abahongyerezi n'abarangi n'abantu boona, abu Nebukadenezaari yaazaahize, akabaiha Yerusalemu akabatwara Babulooni." 
Jeremiah29:2 Ekyo kikabaho, omugabe Yekoniya na nyina-omugabe, n'abashaahu n'abategyeki ba Buyuda na Yerusalemu, n'abanyamyoga n'abaheesi, baarugire Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah29:3 Egyo baruha akagitweka Elaasa mwene Shafani na Gemariya mwene Hilikiya, abu Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda yaatumire Babulooni ahari Nebukadenezari omugabe waayo, neegira eti:" 
Jeremiah29:4 Nyowe Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, ningambira abaazaahiibwe boona, abu naazaahize, nkabaiha Yerusalemu, nkabatwara Babulooni, nti:" 
Jeremiah29:5 Mwombekye amaju, mugatuuremu. Muhingye emisiri, murye ebi eyerize." 
Jeremiah29:6 Mushwere abakazi, muzaare aboojo n'abaishiki; mushwererere batabani baanyu, kandi muhingire bahara baanyu, bazaare batabani baabo na bahara baabo; haza mukanyireyo mutarikutuuba." 
Jeremiah29:7 Reero orwo rurembo ru naabazaahiizemu murwendeze ebirungi kandi murushabire ahari Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba ku ruriba gye, naimwe muryaba gye." 
Jeremiah29:8 Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Mutaikiriza abarangi n'abafumu abari omuriimwe kubabeiha, kandi mutata omutima aha birooto ebi barikuroota," 
Jeremiah29:9 ahabw'okuba ebi barikubahanuurira omu iziina ryangye, n'ebishuba. Tindabatumire; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah29:10 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Emyaka makumi mushanju eyaateereirweho Babulooni ku erihika, ndyabaizira, mpikiirize eki naabaraganiise, mbagarure omuri ogu mwanya." 
Jeremiah29:11 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nyowe nimmanya enaama zi naabacumiire, ez'oburungi, zitari ez'obubi; obwo mbarindiire ebirungi ebi mutuura mwiniire amatsiko kutunga omu biro byanyu ebiriija." 
Jeremiah29:12 Obwo nibwo murintakira, mukaija mukanshaba, naanye nkabahurira." 
Jeremiah29:13 Haza muryansherura, mumbone, mwaba munsherwire n'omutima gwanyu gwona." 
Jeremiah29:14 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Muryanzoora, naanye mbagarure aha buteeka, mbataaruure omu mahanga n'omu byanga byona ebi naababingiiremu, mbagarure omu mwanya ogu naabaihiremu nkabazaasya." 
Jeremiah29:15 Ahabw'okuba mugizire muti: Nyakubaho atwimukiize abarangi omuri Babulooni; 
Jeremiah29:16 mbwenu Nyakubaho naagamba aha mugabe oshutami aha kitebe kya Daudi, n'aha bantu boona abatwire omuri oru rurembo; nibo beene waanyu abatarazaahiibwe naimwe." 
Jeremiah29:17 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Reeba niinyija kubaitsa rurara, mbateeze enjara n'orufu, mbagire nk'emitiini emibi, emibi munonga etarikubaasa kuriibwa." 
Jeremiah29:18 Ndyababinga, bagyende nibaitwa rurara, enjara n'orufu, mbahindure abarikunugwa ensi z'obugabe zoona ez'omu nsi, abarikukyeenwa, abarikutiinisa, abarikweshaanywa kandi abarikujumwa ab'amahanga goona agu naababingiiremu." 
Jeremiah29:19 Manya tibareetaire ha bi naabagambiire, ebi Nyowe Nyakubaho naabaire ntuura nintuma abaheereza bangye abarangi ahariimwe, kwonka mukanga kubihurira; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah29:20 Mbwenu imwe mwena abaazaahiibwe, abu naihire Yerusalemu nkabatwara Babulooni, nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikugamba naagira ati:" 
Jeremiah29:21 Nyowe Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, ningamba ahari Ahabu mwene Kilaaya, na Zedekiya mwene Maaseeya, abarikubahanuurira ebishuba omu iziina ryangye. Reeba, niinyija kubarekurira Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni, abaite nimubareeba." 
Jeremiah29:22 Abaazaahiibwe boona abarugire Buyuda abari Babulooni nibo bariguma nibaihaho eky'okukyeenesa abandi, bati: Nyakubaho naakakugire nka Zedekiya na Ahabu, abu omugabe wa Babulooni yaasiriiriize omu muriro." 
Jeremiah29:23 Ahabw'okuba bakozire eby'obushema omuri Isiraeli, baashambana na baakabataahi baabo, baagamba ebishuba omu iziina ryangye, ekintu eki ntarabaragiire. Niinye ndikubimanya kandi niinye mushinja; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah29:24 Ogambire Shemaaya owa Nehelaamu oti: 
Jeremiah29:25 Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Iwe ahabwawe otwekyeire ab'omuri Yerusalemu boona ebaruha, na Zefaniya mwene Maaseeya omuhongyerezi, n'abahongyerezi boona, noogira ngu" 
Jeremiah29:26 Nyakubaho akuhindwire omuhongyerezi omu mwanya gwa Yehoyaada, kugira obushoboorozi omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho aha mushazi weena orikuranga, kumuboha amaguru n'okumuta enkomo omu bitsya." 
Jeremiah29:27 Oti: Mbwenu ahabw'enki otajuukiriire Yeremiya owa Anatooti orikubahanuurira? 
Jeremiah29:28 Manya itwe ab'omuri Babulooni atutumireho naagira ati: Okuzaahibwa kwanyu n'okw'okutuuraho. Mbwenu nimwombekye amaju, mugataahemu, kandi muhingye emisiri, murye ebi eyerize." 
Jeremiah29:29 Mpaho Zefaniya omuhongyerezi ashoma egyo baruha, Yeremiya omurangi amutegire okutu." 
Jeremiah29:30 Bwanyima Nyakubaho agambira Yeremiya ati: 
Jeremiah29:31 Tuma aha baazaahiibwe noobagira oti: Nyakubaho naagamba ahari Shemaaya owa Nehelaamu ati: Ahabwa Shemaaya okubaragurira ntamutumire, akabaikirizisa ebishuba," 
Jeremiah29:32 nikyo Nyowe Nyakubaho ndikugirira nti: Ndyafubira Shemaaya owa Nehelaamu n'abaijukuru. Tarigira muntu n'omwe ow'abaabo origumaho omuri eri ihanga kureeba ebirungi ebi ndikorera abantu abangye, ahabw'okuba agambire eby'okungomera; Mukama nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah30:1 Oku nikwo Nyakubaho yaagambiire Yeremiya: 
Jeremiah30:2 Nyakubaho ogwo, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, akangira ati: Handiika omu kitabo byona ebi naakugambiire." 
Jeremiah30:3 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Manya reeba, obunaku buryahika, ngarure aha buteeka abantu bangye aba Isiraeli n'aba Yuda, mbagarure omu nsi ei naahaire baishebo, bagikubuure." 
Jeremiah30:4 Mbwenu ebi nibyo Nyakubaho yaagambire ahari Isiraeli n'ahari Yuda: 
Jeremiah30:5 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Tuhuriire eiraka ry'abarikukangarana baitsirwe obwoba bataine busingye. 
Jeremiah30:6 Mbwenu mubuuze, kandi mureebe; omushaija akaabaasa kuzaara? Mbwenu ahabw'enki nindeeba buri mushaija ayekwaitse omu manyaanya nk'omukazi orikurumwa? Ahabw'enki buri omwe ahinduriize aha maisho?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Ai bambe! Ebishi eri izooba rigumire! Tihaine rindi eririkushushana naryo. N'obunaku bw'aba Yakobo kureeba enaku: kwonka baryazoogamu. 
Jeremiah30:8 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: obunaku buryahika, mpende omugamba, ngubaihe aha bitsya, kandi mbacwe omu nkomo, abanyamahanga babe batakibahindura bahuuku;" 
Jeremiah30:9 kureka baryaheereza Mukama Ruhanga waabo na mwijukuru wa Daudi, ou ndyemeka kuba omugabe waabo." 
Jeremiah30:10 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mbwenu imwe aba Yakobo omwiru wangye, imwe aba Isiraeli, mutatiina nobu kwakuba okuhahaara ahabw'okuba ndyabajuna, mbaihe hare n'ab'oruzaaro rwanyu omu nsi ei baatwairwemu bari enkwatwa. Aba Yakobo baryagaruka bahitsye omutima omunda, bagaramisirize, hatariho orikubatiinisa." 
Jeremiah30:11 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Manya ndi hamwe naimwe kubajuna. Ndyamariraho kimwe ab'amahanga agu naabataataanisiizemu; kwonka imwe tindibamaraho. Ndyabahana nimbabariirira, kwonka hoona tindibareka ntabafubiire." 
Jeremiah30:12 Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho naagira ati: Obusaasi bwanyu tibw'okukira, obuhuta bwanyu nibuhurura munonga." 
Jeremiah30:13 Tihaine w'okubatonganira! Tihariho mubazi gw'okuboomoora; nobu kyakuba eky'okubatambira. 
Jeremiah30:14 Nkunzi zaanyu zoona zibeebirwe tizaakibeetaho; manya mbateire nk'abateirwe omuzigu, naabafubira nk'omubisha ntaine saasi, ahabw'okuba orubanja rwanyu ni ruhango n'ebicumuro byanyu birengyesereize." 
Jeremiah30:15 Ahabw'enki nimutonzya ahabw'obusaasi bu mwine? Obuhuruzi bwanyu ti bw'okukira, ahabw'okuba orubanja rwanyu ni ruhango, n'ebicumuro byanyu birengyesereize. Nikyo mbakoreire ebyo byona." 
Jeremiah30:16 Mbwenu boona abarikubahwerekyereza, naanye ndyabahwerekyereza. Abarikubahata boona oku baingana, baryatwarwa bari enkwatwa. Abarikubanyaga, ndyabahindura omunyago; na boona abarikubahiiga, ndyabahindura omuhiigo gwanyu." 
Jeremiah30:17 Manya imwe ndyabagaruramu amagara mbakize obuhuta; ahabw'okuba bakabeeta encuubwa nibagira ngu: Niimwe Siyooni etagira ogyetaho! Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba. 
Jeremiah30:18 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, ndyagarura amahema g'aba Yakobo aha buteeka, ngirire esaasi amaju gaabo; orwo rurembo rugarukye rwombekwe omu matongo gaarwo; n'ekikaari kigarukye omu kibanja kyakyo;" 
Jeremiah30:19 abaamwo beeshongore eby'okusingiza, nibateera akaari k'okushemererwa. Ndyabakanyisa, tibariba bakye! Ndyabahaisa ekitiinwa, barekye kugaywa." 
Jeremiah30:20 Abaana baabo baryaba nk'obunyakare, eihanga ryabo ribe erihamire omu maisho gangye, haza nfubire boona abarikubahata." 
Jeremiah30:21 Omugabe waabo aryaba ow'omu baabo, omutegyeki waabo abe nibo yaarugamu. Ndyamwiriza haihi ampikye. Mbwenu n'oha owaakwehanga kumpika? Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah30:22 Reero muryaba abantu bangye, naanye mbe Ruhanga waanyu." 
Jeremiah30:23 Reeba, eihunga rya Nyakubaho! Kashanga eshohoire! Omuyaga gw'akasooroora nigwija kuteera emitwe y'enyabibi." 
Jeremiah30:24 Ekiniga kya Nyakubaho kingi tikirituuza, okuhitsya obu ariheza kubafubira akeemara akamuri aha mutima. Haza ekyo muryakyetegyereza omu biro ebiriija." 
Jeremiah31:1 Nyakubaho naagira ati: omuri obwo bunaku, ndyaba Ruhanga w'ab'enganda za Isiraeli zoona, nabo babe abantu bangye." 
Jeremiah31:2 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Abantu abaahonokire rurara, nkabagirira embabazi omu ihamba, obu Abaisiraeli baasherura oburuhuukiro." 
Jeremiah31:3 Nyowe Nyakubaho nkababonekyera ndi hare, naabagira nti: Nkabakunda na rukundo etahararuka, nikyo ngumiire ndi omwesigwa ahariimwe." 
Jeremiah31:4 Iwe Isiraeli 'we oshugaine, ndyagaruka nkwombekye, oyombekwe busya; oyehunde okwate engoma empuuro, oshohore oze kuzina n'abarikushemererwa." 
Jeremiah31:5 Oryagaruka obyare emizaabibu omu bibungo bya Samariya; abarikugibyara bagibyare, kandi bananurwe ebi eyerize." 
Jeremiah31:6 Manya haryabaho obunaku obu abarinzi baryeta bari omu nsi y'ebibungo eya Efuraimu, bati: Nimwimukye tuze Siyooni owa Mukama Ruhanga waitu." 
Jeremiah31:7 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nimweshongore munonga mushemereirwe, ahabw'aba Yakobo, muteere akaari ahabw'eihanga eririkukira agandi mahanga. Murangirire kandi muhimbise nimugira muti: Nyakubaho ajunire abantu be Abaisiraeli abaahonokireho." 
Jeremiah31:8 Reeba, ndyabaiha omu nsi y'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, mbataaruure nimbaiha omu byanga by'aha muheru gw'ensi, barimu empumi, n'abarema, n'abakazi baine enda, n'abarikurumwa; haza boona bagarukye aha bari ekimbuuro kihango." 
Jeremiah31:9 Baryaija nibacura, kwonka nyowe mbeebembere, mbagarureyo nimbahuumuriza. Ndyabarabya aha tugyera tw'amaizi, omu muhanda gugororokire ogu batariteereramu ntsibo; ahabw'okuba ndi ishe wa Isiraeli; na Efuraimu n'omujigaijo gwangye." 
Jeremiah31:10 Imwe mahanga 'mwe, nimuhurire eki Mukama arikugamba, haza mukirangirire omu birwa bya hare, muti: Owaataataaniise Abaisiraeli niwe aribataaruura; abarinde, nk'oku omuriisa arinda obusyo bwe bw'entaama." 
Jeremiah31:11 Manya Nyakubaho acungwire aba Yakobo, yaabaiha omu mikono y'orikubakiza amaani." 
Jeremiah31:12 Baryaija beeshongorere munonga aha mutwe gwa Siyooni, kandi bashemerererwe ebirungi bya Nyakubaho eby'engano, ebya viino n'eby'ebyana by'amasyo g'ente n'ag'entaama. Baryaba nk'omusiri ogurikwitirirwa amaizi; tibarihononoka bundi." 
Jeremiah31:13 Obwo nibwo empangare zirizina zikashemererwa; abatsigazi n'abagurusi bakeesiima, okucura kwabo nkakuhindura okunanuka, nkabahuumuriza nkabaha okwesiima omu mwanya gw'okwitwa enaku." 
Jeremiah31:14 Abahongyerezi ndyabaigutsa eby'ebishaju, kandi abantu bangye mbahaazye ebirungi; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah31:15 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Eiraka ry'okuganya n'okucura munonga rikahurirwa omuri Raama, Rakeeli naacurira abaana be, atakyenda kuyaagirwa, ahabw'okuba boona bahwaireho." 
Jeremiah31:16 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Yezibire kucura n'okuhimintika amarira; ahabw'okuba ebi waakozire oryabizimuurirwa; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba. Kandi abo baana baawe baryagaruka, barugye omu nsi y'abazigu baabo." 
Jeremiah31:17 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ogire amatsiko; abaana baawe baryagaruka omu nsi yaabo y'obuzaarwa. 
Jeremiah31:18 Mpuriire Efuraimu naaborooga ati: Ompanire naikiriza kuhanwa, naaba nk'ekimasha ekitakamanyisiibwe mugamba. Mbwenu ongarure, mbone kugarurwa aha buteeka, ahabw'okuba niiwe Mukama Ruhanga wangye." 
Jeremiah31:19 Manya ku naakuteishukire, naayeteisa; Naiwe ku wanfubiire, naayemaamaata Nkaitwa enshoni naabwerabwera, ahabw'okuba nkahemura obutsigazi bwangye." 
Jeremiah31:20 Nyakubaho nawe ati: Iwe Efuraimu 'we, tori omwana wangye ou nkunda, omwana wangye ou ntetsa munonga? Manya obundi n'obundi nobu ndaabe nkugambira ninkuhana, kwonka hati ninkikwijuka. Nikyo nkwiniriire orushusho. Buzimazima niinyija kukugirira embabazi; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah31:21 Yeteereho obumanyiso bw'okukworeka omuhanda, n'ebyapa by'okukuhabura, oyetegyereze gye omuhanda rugyendwa ogu waatoire. Iwe Isiraeli oshugaine, garuka, garuka omu ndembo zaawe." 
Jeremiah31:22 Mbwenu oryahitsya hi n'okubushukana, iwe ihanga ry'ekirare 'we? Manya Nyakubaho ahangire ekitakareebwaga omu nsi nk'omukazi kurinda omushaija." 
Jeremiah31:23 Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Ku ndibagarura aha buteeka, baryagaruka bagambire omu nsi ya Buyuda n'omu ndembo zaayo bati: Nyakubaho naakakuhe omugisha, Iwe rushozi rurikwera 'we, obutaaho bw'ohikiriire!" 
Jeremiah31:24 Reero aba Buyuda n'ab'omu ndembo zaayo zoona baryatuurayo kumwe, n'abahingi n'abazengyerera n'amasyo gaabo g'entaama;" 
Jeremiah31:25 ahabw'okuba ndyaruhuura abaruhire; n'abahononokire mbagaruremu amaani. 
Jeremiah31:26 Mbwenu nyowe ku naasisiimukire nti, naashanga oturo nitukinnurira." 
Jeremiah31:27 Nyakubaho yaagira ati: Reeba, obunaku buryahika, embibo omu b'eihanga rya Isiraeli n'aba Yuda embibo y'abantu n'ey'enyamaishwa." 
Jeremiah31:28 Nk'oku naabataireho eriisho kubarandura, kubasheenya, kubakumbagaza, kubacwekyereza n'okubareetera akabi, nikwo ndibataho eriisho kubombeka, n'okubabyara; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah31:29 Omu biro ebyo baryaba batakigira bati: Baishe b'abaana bariire emizaabibu erikununguna, amaino g'abaana baabo gaaba nigo gaitwa amangigina." 
Jeremiah31:30 Kwonka obwo buri muntu aryafa azizire ekibi kye. Weena orirya emizaabibu erikununguna, niwe amaino ge garigira amangigina." 
Jeremiah31:31 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, obunaku buryahika, ndagaane endagaano nsya n'ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli n'aba Yuda;" 
Jeremiah31:32 endagaano etari nk'ei naaragaine na baishebo obu naabakwata aha mukono nkabaiha omu nsi ya Misiri; egyo ndagaano yangye ei baitsire, nobu ndaabe naabaire ndi ibabo; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah31:33 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mbwenu egi niyo ndagaano ei ndiragaana n'ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli ebyo biro byahwaho. Ndyabatamu eby'omu iteeka ryangye, mbihandiikye omu mitima yaabo; mbe Ruhanga waabo, nabo babe abantu bangye." 
Jeremiah31:34 Buri muntu aryaba atakyegyesa mutaahi we nari mwene waabo okumanya Nyakubaho; ahabw'okuba obwo boona okwiha aha muto okuta aha mukuru baryaba nibammanya, Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ahabw'okuba ndyabasaasira ebibi; mbe ntakiijuka bicumuro byabo." 
Jeremiah31:35 Nyowe Nyakubaho oreetera eizooba kwakira abantu nyomushana, nkaragiira okwezi n'enyonyoozi kubamurikira nyekiro, oreetera enyanja kwimukiirira, ebingonzi byayo bikahoorera, oyetwa Mukama ow'amahe," 
Jeremiah31:36 ningira nti: Ebyo bintu ebyatairwe omu buteeka bwabyo ku byakuba bitabairekwo omu maisho gangye, na baijukuru ba Isiraeli bakaarekyera aho kuba eihanga omu maisho gangye ebiro byona." 
Jeremiah31:37 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Eiguru ry'ahaiguru ku ryakubaasa kugyerwa; n'obuhamizo bw'ensi okuzimu bwabaasa kuzoorwa, naanye obwo nkaacwa baijukuru ba Isiraeli, mbatura ebi baakozire byona; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah31:38 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Obunaku buryahika, obu oru rurembo rurigaruka kwombekyerwa busya Nyakubaho, okwiha aha munaara gwa Hananeeli, okuta aha Irembo ry'Akeekubo." 
Jeremiah31:39 Kandi omugoye gw'okurugyeresa guryayeyongyera omu maisho, gugumizemu guhikye aha kibungo Garebu, gukube guhikye Goa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Oruhanga rwona oru baziikamu emitumbi, bakaatamu eiju ryakashenda, n'emisiri yoona okuhika aha kagyera Kidirooni, okuta aha keekubo k'Eirembo ry'Embaraasi, ogurikugarura oburugwa-izooba, biryaba ebihongyeirwe Nyakubaho. Orwo rurembo tirurisheenywa bundi, nobu kwakuba okucwekyerezibwa ebiro byona." 
Jeremiah32:1 Eki nikyo Nyakubaho yaagambiire Yeremiya, omu mwaka gwa ikumi ogw'omu busingye bwa Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda; nigwo gwa ikumi na munaana ogwa Nebukadenezaari." 
Jeremiah32:2 Omu bunaku obwo eihe ry'omugabe wa Babulooni rikaba rigotsire Yerusalemu, kandi obwo Yeremiya omurangi akaba akomeirwe omu kibuga ky'abarinzi ekyabaire kiri omu kikaari ky'omugabe wa Buyuda." 
Jeremiah32:3 Manya Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda akaba amutaire omu kihome, amugizire ati: Ahabw'enki nooranga okagira oti: Nyakubaho naagamba ati: Reeba, niinyija kurekurira omugabe wa Babulooni oru rurembo arukwate;" 
Jeremiah32:4 kandi oti: Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda tarikwija kukira Abakaludaaya kumukwata; kureka buzimazima nibaija kumukwatsa omugabe wa Babulooni, agambe nawe nibareebana akaisho omu kandi;" 
Jeremiah32:5 bwanyima atware Zedekiya Babulooni, agumeyo okuhitsya obu ndigira eki naamukorera; kandi oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nobu murirwanisa Abakaludaaya, timuribabaasa." 
Jeremiah32:6 Mbwenu obwo Yeremiya akagira ati: Nyakubaho angambiire ati: 
Jeremiah32:7 Reeba, Hanameeli mwene Shalumu shwento, naija kukwijaho, akugire ati: Gura ekibanja kyangye ekiri Anatooti, ahabw'okuba niiwe ohikire kukigura, okakicungura." 
Jeremiah32:8 Bwanyima Hanameeli mwene tatento akaija, yanshanga omu kibuga ky'abarinzi, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaagambire. Haza yangira ati: Gura ekibanja kyangye ekiri Anatooti omu kyanga kya Benyamiini, ahabw'okuba niiwe ohikire kukigura okakicungura. Mbwenu kyegurire. Naanye maanya ku ekyo Nyakubaho niwe yaakigamba." 
Jeremiah32:9 Ntyo ngura ekyo kibanja ekiri Anatooti, ahari Hanameeli mwene tatento; mmurengyera empiiha z'efeeza makumi ana na ibiri," 
Jeremiah32:10 nta omukono aha ndagaano, ngitaho n'akamanyiso, ntunga baakareebi, ndenga ezo mpiiha ahari minzaani." 
Jeremiah32:11 Bwanyima nkwata egyo ndagaano eriho akamanyiso karikuhamya obuguzi, erimu ebi twaragaine n'emitwarize yaabyo, hamwe n'ekihanduukuriro kyayo kitakubire;" 
Jeremiah32:12 egyo ndagaano y'obuguzi ngikwatsa Baruuki mwene Neriya, mwijukuru wa Maaseya, Hanameeli mwene tatento ariho, hamwe na baakareebi abaagitaireho emikono, kandi hariho n'Abayudaaya boona abaabaire bashutami omu kibuga ky'abarinzi." 
Jeremiah32:13 Ntyo nyehanangiririza Baruuki omu maisho gaabo nti: 
Jeremiah32:14 Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naakugira ati: Twara ezi ndagaano zombi; egi eriho akamanyiso k'obuguzi, n'endi etakubire; ozite omu nyungu y'eibumba, zibone kumara omwanya muraingwa zitasiisikaire." 
Jeremiah32:15 Ahabw'okuba Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Amaju n'ebibanja n'emisiri y'emizaabibu biryagaruka bigurwe omuri egi nsi." 
Jeremiah32:16 Ku naaherize kuha Baruuki mwene Neriya endagaano y'eki naagura, naashaba Nyakubaho ningira nti:" 
Jeremiah32:17 Ai bambe, Mukama Ruhanga! Niiwe waahangiise eiguru n'ensi obushoboorozi bwawe bwingi, ogoroire omukono! Tihariho kikurema;" 
Jeremiah32:18 iwe oyoreka abantu enkumi n'enkumi rukundo yaawe etahararuka; kwonka ohoora abaana noobatura ebibi bya baishebo. 
Jeremiah32:19 Ai Ruhanga omukuru, kandi ow'amaani, oyetwa Mukama ow'amahe, oba mukuru omu kucuma enaama, kandi okora eby'amaani, iwe oreeba emitwarize y'abantu, okazimuurira buri omwe nk'emitwarize ye n'ebi akozire oku biri." 
Jeremiah32:20 Iwe owaayorekire obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza omu nsi ya Misiri, n'okuhitsya eri izooba; okabyoreka omu Baisiraeli n'omu bantu boona, haza okeetungira eiziina, nk'oku kiri hati." 
Jeremiah32:21 Niiwe waihire abantu baawe Abaisiraeli omu nsi ya Misiri nookora obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza, n'omukono gw'enkubito kandi ogubangire, nootiinisa munonga." 
Jeremiah32:22 Otyo waabaha egi nsi ei waarahiire kuha baishebo, ensi erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki;" 
Jeremiah32:23 nabo bakagizamu bakagikubuura. Kwonka bakanga kwororbera ebi orikubaragiira n'okukuratira eiteeka ryawe; batakore kintu na kimwe omu bi waabaragiire byona. Nikyo waareeteire akagwe aka koona kubagwera. 
Jeremiah32:24 Reeba, eby'okugoteraho orurembo kurukwata byaherize kuruhikaho; kandi ahabwa rurara n'enjara n'orufu, orurembo rwaherize kurekurirwa Abakaludaaya abarikururwanisa. Kityo eki waagambire kyabaire kwo; naiwe nookireeba." 
Jeremiah32:25 Kwonka kandi, ai Mukama Ruhanga, ongizire oti: Gura ekibanja empiiha, kandi oyetungire abajurizi, nobu oru rurembo ruraabe rurekuriirwe Abakaludaaya." 
Jeremiah32:26 Mukama akagambira Yeremiya ati: 
Jeremiah32:27 Reeba, ndi Mukama Ruhanga w'ebiine emibiri byona. Mbwenu hariho ekirikundema?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Nikyo Nyowe Nyakubaho ndikugirira nti: Reeba, oru rurembo niinyija kururekurira Abakaludaaya; na Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni arukwate." 
Jeremiah32:29 Abakaludaaya abarikurwanisa oru rurembo nibaija kurukoomeera omuriro, barwotsye n'amaju agabaire nigootererwaho aha mitwe yaago Baali obubaani, kandi nibagashukiraho baaruhanga abandi emitoijo y'ebyokunywa, kungwisa kubi." 
Jeremiah32:30 Manya Abaisiraeli n'aba Yuda okwiha omu buto tibakakoraga kindi omu maisho gangye, kureka ebibi byonka. Abaisiraeli tibaine kindi eki barakozire, kureka okungwisa kubi ahabw'ebi barikukoresa engaro zaabo; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah32:31 Oru rurembo okwiha obu rwayombekwa n'okuhitsya eri izooba, rutuura nirungwisa kubi, niruunyitsa ekiniga. Nikyo ndikwija kurwihiraho, ndekye kurureeba;" 
Jeremiah32:32 obwo nindutura ebibi byona ebi Abaisiraeli n'aba Yuda baakozire, bakangwisa kubi, abagabe baabo, abategyeki baabo, abahongyerezi baabo n'abarangi baabo ab'omuri Buyuda n'abatwire Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah32:33 Bakanteera omugongo baayanga kureeba ei ndi. Kandi nobu ndaabe naagumire nimbeegyesa, bakanga kuntega okutu, kwikiriza ebi ndikubahabura." 
Jeremiah32:34 Bakata ebirikuzira omuri Nyaruju erikuunyetererwa, baagihagaza." 
Jeremiah32:35 Bakombekyera Baali emyanya etunguukire omu ruhanga rwa mwene Hinomu, baatambiriraho Moleki batabani baabo na bahara baabo, baakora ekintu ekintakabaragiiraga, ahabw'okuba kikaba kitakaanyijaga mu biteekateeko ngu baryakora ekyo kihagaro, bareetere aba Yuda kucumura." 
Jeremiah32:36 N'ahabw'ekyo Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagamba ati ahari oru rurembo ru murikugira muti: Rurekuriirwe omugabe wa Babulooni, kwitwa rurara, enjara n'orufu." 
Jeremiah32:37 Naagira ati: Reeba, ndyabataaruura omu nsi zoona ezi naababingiiremu ngwirwe kubi, nyine ekiniga n'ekishinjo. Ndyabagarura omuri ogu mwanya, ngubatuuzemu buhooro," 
Jeremiah32:38 haza babe abantu bangye, naanye mbe Ruhanga waabo." 
Jeremiah32:39 Ndyabaha okugira omutima gumwe n'emitwarize erikushushana, bagume nibantiina, babone kuba gye n'abaana baabo abaribaza omu bigyere." 
Jeremiah32:40 Ndyakora nabo endagaano etarihwaho, erinzibira kureka kubakorera ebirungi, kandi mbatemu omutima gw'okuntiina, barekye kundugaho." 
Jeremiah32:41 Ndyashemerererwa okubakorera gye, mbahamize kimwe omuri egi nsi n'omutima gwangye gwona n'amagara gangye goona." 
Jeremiah32:42 Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nk'oku aba bantu naabareeteire kuhikwaho akabi kahango katyo, nikwo ndibareetera kuhikwaho ebirungi byona ebi naabaraganiise." 
Jeremiah32:43 Egi nsi ei murikugira ngu n'amatongo, tekituurwamu bantu nari enyamaishwa; kandi ngu ehairwe Abakaludaaya kugikubuura, niyo erigurwamu ebibanja." 
Jeremiah32:44 Ebibanja biryagurwa empiiha, endagaano ziteebweho emikono n'akamanyiso k'okuzihamya, kandi zigire baakareebi; omu kyanga kya Benyamiini, omu myanya eyehinguririize Yerusalemu, n'omu ndembo za Buyuda, n'ez'omu nsi y'ebibungo, n'ez'omu mpita n'omu za Negebu; ahabw'okuba ndyabagarura aha buteeka; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah33:1 Yeremiya ku yaabaire akikingiraniirwe omu kibuga ky'abarinzi, Nyakubaho yaagaruka yaamugambira obwa kabiri ati:" 
Jeremiah33:2 Nyowe Nyakubaho owaahangire ensi, Nyakubaho owaagibumburikire nkagihamya, nyetwa Nyakubaho." 
Jeremiah33:3 Mbwenu guma onyete, naanye nkwetabe, nkugambire eby'omubonano ebi otakamanyaga." 
Jeremiah33:4 Manya nyowe Mukama, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, ningamba aha maju g'omuri oru rurembo, n'ahari zaanyaruju z'abagabe ba Buyuda, ebyasheenyirwe, ku biba eby'okukumiiririraho abarikutemba kubagota n'abarikurwanisa rurara." 
Jeremiah33:5 Nibaija baizire kurwanisa Abakaludaaya, kwonka baijuze oru rurembo emitumbi y'abu ndikwenda kwita mbainiire ekiniga n'ekishinjo. Ahabw'okuba oru rurembo ndwimire amaisho, nindutura ebibi by'abantu baamwo barikukora." 
Jeremiah33:6 Kwonka reeba, ndyarukiza ndutambire, n'abantu baamwo mbaraaze gye, mbahamize ku baine obusingye n'obuhooro." 
Jeremiah33:7 Aba Yuda n'aba Isiraeli ndyabagarura aha buteeka mbahamye, babe nk'oku baabaire bari obunyakare." 
Jeremiah33:8 Ndyabashemeza mbaiheho orubanja rw'ebibi bi bancumwireho, mbasaasire ebicumuro byabo n'okungomera." 
Jeremiah33:9 Kandi oru rurembo ruryandeetera okushemererwa n'ekitiinwa n'okwesingiza omu b'amahanga goona ag'omu nsi abarihurira ebirungi ebi ndikurukorera; batyo batiine bateteme ahabw'emigisha n'obugogyeere ebi ndikuruha. 
Jeremiah33:10 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Omuri ogu mwanya ogu murikugira muti: N'eirungu tigurimu bantu n'amatungo; muti: Omu ndembo za Buyuda n'omu nguuto za Yerusalemu ezihindukire amatongo tihaakirimu bantu nari enyamaishwa ebizitwiremu, obundi ziryahurirwamu" 
Jeremiah33:11 amaraka g'abarikushemererwa n'abarikwesiima, amaraka ga baakishwera n'aga baakishwerwa, n'ag'abarikweshongora bareetsire omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ebitambo by'okusiima, nibagira bati: Musiime Mukama ow'amahe, ahabw'okuba ni murungi kandi embabazi ze n'ez'ebiro byona! Manya egi nsi ndyagigarura aha buteeka, ebe nk'oku yaabaire eri obunyakare; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah33:12 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Omuri eki kyanga ky'eirungu, ekitarimu bantu na matungo; n'omu ndembo zaakyo zoona, haryagaruka hatuurwemu abariisa b'entaama, bazaagirizemu amasyo gaabo." 
Jeremiah33:13 Omu ndembo z'omu nsi y'ebibungo n'omu z'empita n'omu za Negebu, omu kyanga kya Benyamiini n'omu myanya eyehinguririize Yerusalemu, n'omu ndembo za Buyuda, amasyo g'entaama garyaraba ahansi y'omukono gw'orikugabara. Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah33:14 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, obunaku buryahika, mpikiirize eki naaraganiise ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli n'aba Yuda." 
Jeremiah33:15 Omuri ebyo biro n'omuri ago magingo, ndyaimukiza Daudi Itaagi ohikiriire, acwere omuri egi nsi emanja z'oburyo kandi ezihikire." 
Jeremiah33:16 Omuri ebyo biro aba Yuda baryarokorwa, n'aba Yerusalemu batuure buhooro. Kandi orwo rurembo ruryayetwa ruti: Nyakubaho Omujuni waitu." 
Jeremiah33:17 Manya Nyakubaho naagira ati: Daudi taribura muntu w'okushutama aha kitebe ky'obugabe bw'ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli. 
Jeremiah33:18 N'abahongyerezi Abaleevi tibaribura muntu w'okutambira ebitambo bicwekize, n'eby'esaano, n'ebindi bitambo obutwire bwona." 
Jeremiah33:19 Nyakubaho akagambira Yeremiya ati: 
Jeremiah33:20 Nyowe Nyakubaho ningira nti: Ku mwakubaasa kwita endagaano ei naaragaine na nyomushana na nyekiro; nyomushana na nyekiro byareka kubaho omu bunaku bwabyo obwatairweho; 
Jeremiah33:21 naanye obwo endagaano ei naaragaine na Daudi omwiru wangye ekaafa, abura omutabani w'okumuhungurira akashutama aha kitebe kye ky'obugabe; n'endagaano ei naaragaine n'abahongyerezi Abaleevi abampeereza ekaafa." 
Jeremiah33:22 Nk'oku enyonyoozi z'omu iguru zitarikubaasa kubarwa, n'oku omusheenyi gw'aha nyanja gutarikubaasa kurengwa, nikwo ndikanyisa abaijukuru ba Daudi omwiru wangye, n'abahongyerezi Abaleevi abampeereza." 
Jeremiah33:23 Nyakubaho akabuuza Yeremiya ati: 
Jeremiah33:24 Tiwaayetegyereza eki aba bantu barikugamba nibagira bati; Nyowe Nyakubaho ncwire ezo nganda zombi ezi naatooraine? Batyo bakagaya abantu bangye batakibeeta ihanga? 
Jeremiah33:25 Mbwenu Nyowe Nyakubaho ningira nti: Kuri ntarahamize ndagaano ei naaragaine na nyomushana na nyekiro, kandi n'ebiragiro ebi naateereireho eiguru n'ensi;" 
Jeremiah33:26 obwo nibwo naakucwire abaijukuru ba Yakobo n'aba Daudi omwiru wangye, nkareka kutoorana omwe omu baijukuru kutegyeka ab'oruzaaro rwa Aburahamu, Isaaka na Yakobo. Manya ndyabagirira embabazi, mbagarure aha buteeka." 
Jeremiah34:1 Ebi nibyo Nyakubaho yangambiire, nyowe Yeremiya, obu Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni n'eihe rye ryona, n'ensi z'abagabe zoona ez'omu nsi ezi yaabaire naategyeka, n'abantu boona, byabaire nibirwanisa Yerusalemu n'endembo zaayo zoona." 
Jeremiah34:2 Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli akangira ati: Irooko ogambire Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda, oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kurekurira omugabe wa Babulooni oru rurembo, arukoomeere omuriro." 
Jeremiah34:3 Torikwija kumuhonoka; kureka buzimazima baryakukwata bamukuhe; oyereebanire n'ogwo mugabe wa Babulooni, mugambe kumwe; bwanyima otwarwe Babulooni." 
Jeremiah34:4 Kwonka iwe Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda, hurira eki Nyakubaho arikugamba! Nyakubaho naakugambaho ati: Toriitwa rurara." 
Jeremiah34:5 Oryafa gye. Kandi nk'oku baashwenkuru abagabe abaakubandiize, abantu baabaire babooterera eby'emigaju, naiwe nikwo baribikwoterera, bakakucurira nibaborooga bati: Ai bambe, mukama waitu! Manya eki kigambo nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naakigamba." 
Jeremiah34:6 Bwanyima Yeremiya omurangi ebyo byona akabigambirira Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda omuri Yerusalemu," 
Jeremiah34:7 obu eihe ry'omugabe wa Babulooni ryabaire nirirwanisa Yerusalemu n'endembo za Buyuda Lakishi na Azeeka ezikitsigaireho. Manya ezo zonka nizo ndembo za Buyuda ez'ebigo bigumire ezaabaire zikitsigaireho. 
Jeremiah34:8 Eki nikyo Nyakubaho yaagambiire Yeremiya, Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda aherize kukora endagaano n'ab'omuri Yerusalemu boona n'okubarangira eby'okurekurwa, ati:" 
Jeremiah34:9 Buri muntu ashemereire kurekura abahuuku be Abaheburaayo, abashaija n'abakazi, harekye kugira owaahindura omuhuuku Omuyudaaya mwene ishe." 
Jeremiah34:10 Batyo abategyeki n'abantu boona abaabaire baragaine endagaano, ku buri omwe arekura omuhuuku we omushaija nari omukazi, ngu batakaabahindura abahuuku obundi, baayoroba, baikiriza, baabarekura." 
Jeremiah34:11 Kwonka bwanyima baayehindukiriza, baagarukana abahuuku n'abazaana abu baabaire barekwire, baagaruka kubategyeka." 
Jeremiah34:12 Nikwo Nyakubaho kugambira Yeremiya ati: 
Jeremiah34:13 Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, nkakora endagaano na baashwenkuriimwe obu naabaiha omu nsi ya Misiri omu buhuuku. Haza naabagira nti:" 
Jeremiah34:14 Aha muheru gwa buri myaka mukaaga, buri omwe omuriimwe agume arekure mwene waabo Omuheburaayo ou yaaguzire akamukorera emyaka mukaaga; amurekure arekye kumukorera. Kwonka baashwenkuriimwe tibarampuriire, nobu kwakuba okuntega okutu." 
Jeremiah34:15 Omu biro ebi mweteisize, mwakora ebi ndikusiima, mwarangirira eby'okurekurwa, buri omwe yaakigambira mutaahi we, kandi mwakorera endagaano omuri Nyaruju erikuunyetererwa." 
Jeremiah34:16 Kwonka bwanyima mwayehinduriza mwampemura, buri omwe yaagarukana abahuuku be n'abazaana be abu mubaire murekwire beekundiire; mwagaruka mwabategyeka kuba abahuuku n'abazaana baanyu." 
Jeremiah34:17 Nikyo nyowe Nyakubaho ndikugagirira nti: Timuunyorobeire kurangirira eby'okurekurwa; buri muntu kukigambira mwene ishe na mutaahi we. Mbwenu nyowe nimbarangirira ku mwaza kurekurirwa rurara n'orufu n'enjara; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba. Niinyija kubahindura ekirikunugwa n'okwitsa obwoba ab'ensi z'obugabe zoona ez'omu nsi. 
Jeremiah34:18 Kandi abantu abaitsire endagaano, bakanga kukuratira ebi egyo ndagaano ei baraganiire omu maisho gangye erikuragiira, ndyabagira nk'enyana ei baacwiremu ebicweka bibiri, bakabiraba ahagati;" 
Jeremiah34:19 nibo bategyeki ba Buyuda n'aba Yerusalemu, n'abashaahu n'abahongyerezi n'abantu boona ab'omuri egi nsi, abaarabire ahagati y'ebicweka by'enyana." 
Jeremiah34:20 Ndyabashunukira abazigu baabo, mbarekurire abarikwenda kubaita, emitumbi yaabo eteerwe amahungu kandi eriibwe enyamaishwa." 
Jeremiah34:21 Reero Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda n'abategyeki be nabo mbashunikire abazigu baabo, mbarekurire abarikwenda kubaita ab'eihe ry'omugabe wa Babulooni, eribaire ribarugireho rikagarukayo." 
Jeremiah34:22 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kubaragiira bagarukye ahari oru rurembo, baruteere, barukwate, barukoomeere omuriro, endembo za Buyuda nzihindure amatongo, zibure ab'okuzituuramu." 
Jeremiah35:1 Eki nikyo Nyakubaho yangambiire nyowe Yeremiya, omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya omugabe wa Buyuda." 
Jeremiah35:2 Akangira ati: Irooko oze omu b'omuryango gw'aba Rekabu, ogambe nabo, kandi obareete omuri Nyaruju yangye, omuri kimwe aha bishengye byayo, haza obahe viino y'okunywa." 
Jeremiah35:3 Ntyo ntwara Yaazaniya mwene Yeremiya, mwijukuru wa Habaziniya, na beene ishe, n'abatabani boona, n'ab'omuryango gw'aba Rekabu boona," 
Jeremiah35:4 mbareeta omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, mbata omu kishengye kya beene Hanani mutabani wa Igadaliya omuntu wa Ruhanga, ekyabaire kihereraine n'eky'abategyeki, eky'ahaiguru y'ekishengye kya Maaseeya mwene Shaalumu, omurinzi w'omuryango." 
Jeremiah35:5 Bwanyima naata aba Rekabu omu maisho enyungu ziijwire viino hamwe n'ebikopo, naabagira nti: Nimunywe viino." 
Jeremiah35:6 Kwonka bo bangarukamu bati: Titurikwija kuginywa, ahabw'okuba tataitwe Yonadabu mwene Rekabu akaturagiira ati: Mutarinywa viino, imwe na batabani baanyu ebiro byona." 
Jeremiah35:7 Kandi ati: Mutaryombeka amaju, mutaribiba embibo, mutaribyara emizaabibu nobu kwakuba okugira omusiri gwayo; kureka mugume mutaahe omu mahema ebiro by'amagara gaanyu goona; mubone kuhangaarira omu nsi ei murishuuhuukiramu." 
Jeremiah35:8 Naitwe tukoorobera eki tataitwe Yonadabu mwene Rekabu yaatugambiire, na byona ebi yaaturagiire; okutanywa viino amagara gaitu goona; itwe n'abakazi baitu, na batabani baitu, na bahara baitu," 
Jeremiah35:9 n'okutombeka maju g'okutaahamu. Titugira musiri gw'emizaabibu nari endi misiri nainga embibo; 
Jeremiah35:10 kureka tutaaha omu mahema, tutuura nitukuratira kandi nitukora byona ebi Yonadabu tataitwe yaaturagiire." 
Jeremiah35:11 Kwonka Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni ku yaahurwire kuteera egi nsi, twagira tuti: Nimwije tuze Yerusalemu tuhungye eihe ry'Abakaludaaya n'ery'Abasiriya. Nikyo turikutuurira omuri Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah35:12 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akangambira nyowe Yeremiya ati: 
Jeremiah35:13 Nyowe Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga owa Isiraeli ninkugira nti: Irooko ogambire aba Yuda n'abatwire omuri Yerusalemu oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ahabw'enki mwanga kwikiriza ebi mbahabura, mutategye kutu ebi mbagambira?" 
Jeremiah35:14 Reeba, eki Yonadabu mwene Rekabu yaaragiire abaijukuru, kutanywa viino, bakakihitsya, tibaaginywa n'okuhitsya eri izooba: ahabw'okuba bakoorobera eki ishenkurubo yaabaragiire; haza Nyowe ntuura nimbagambira, kwonka timumpurira." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ntuura nimbatumaho abaheereza bangye abarangi, ntarikwosha kubeehanangiriza nti: Nimwegarukyemu, buri omwe omuriimwe arekye emitwarize ye emibi, mushemeze ebi murikukora, murekye kukuratira baaruhanga abandi, kubaramya; nibwo murituura omu nsi ei naabahaire na baashwenkuriimwe; kwonka mukanga kutega okutu kumpurira!" 
Jeremiah35:16 Baijukuru ba Yonadabu mwene Rekabu bakakuratira eki ishenkurubo yaabaragiire, kwonka aba bantu bangire kuunyorobera." 
Jeremiah35:17 Nikyo nyowe Nyakubaho, Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, ndikugirira nti: Reeba, niinyija kureetera aba Yuda n'abatuuzi ba Yerusalemu boona akabi aku naabarangiriire; ahabw'okuba nkabagambira, baayanga kutega okutu, naabeeta tibaanyetaba." 
Jeremiah35:18 Kwonka ab'omuryango gw'aba Rekabu, Yeremiya akabagambira ati: Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Nk'oku mwayorobeire ebi Yonadabu shoimwe yaabaragiire, mukakuratira ebiragiro bye byona, mukabikora," 
Jeremiah35:19 nikyo nyowe Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, ndikugirira nti: Yonadabu mwene Rekabu taribura muntu w'okumpeereza." 
Jeremiah36:1 Omu mwaka gwa kana ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya omugabe wa Buyuda, Nyakubaho akagambira Yeremiya ati:" 
Jeremiah36:2 Kwata omuzingo gw'ekitabo, oguhandiikyemu byona ebi nkugambiire aha Baisiraeli n'aba Yuda n'aha mahanga goona, okwiha obu naabikugambira omu busingye bwa Yosiya, n'okuhitsya hati." 
Jeremiah36:3 Obundi ab'omuryango gwa Yuda bakaahurira eby'akagwe aku ndikwenda kubagwisiza, buri omwe ayegarukamu, areka emitwarize ye emibi, naanye mbona kubasaasira ebibi byabo n'ebicumuro byabo." 
Jeremiah36:4 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Yeremiya yaayeta Baruuku mwene Neriya. Baruuku atyo yaahandiika omu muzingo gw'ekitabo ebigambo byona ebi Yeremiya arikumugambira, nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamugambiire." 
Jeremiah36:5 Reero Yeremiya yaaragiira Baruuku naamugira ati: Nyowe banzibiire kuza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. 
Jeremiah36:6 Mbwenu obe niiwe waazayo. Haza aha kiro ky'okwesiibyakwo, ebi bigambo bya Nyakubaho ebi ohandiikire omu muzingo gw'ekitabo nimbikugambira, obishomere omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho abantu boona bakuhuriire. Kandi hoona obishomere aba Yuda boona abarugire omu ndembo z'owaabo, nabo babihurire;" 
Jeremiah36:7 shana Nyakubaho akaahurira okweshengyereza kwabo, buri omwe ayegarukamu, areka emitwarize ye emibi. Manya Nyakubaho arangiriire ku ainiire aba bantu ekiniga kingi n'ekishinjo." 
Jeremiah36:8 Baruuku mwene Neriya nawe akora byona ebi Yeremiya omurangi yaamuragiire, ebikwatiraine n'okushomera omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ebigambo bya Nyakubaho ebiri omuri ogwo muzingo gw'ekitabo." 
Jeremiah36:9 Bwanyima omu mwaka gwa kataano ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya, omugabe wa Buyuda, omu kwezi kwa mwenda, abantu b'omuri Yerusalemu, n'abaizireyo barugire omu ndembo za Buyuda, bakarangirira ku habaho okwesiibyakwo omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Jeremiah36:10 Mpaho Baruuku yaashoma ebigambo bya Yeremiya eby'omu muzingo gw'ekitabo, naabishomera omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, omu kishengye kya Gemariya mwene Shafani omuhandiiki eky'omu kibuga kya ruguru aharikutaahirwa omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho nooraba omu Irembo Erisya." 
Jeremiah36:11 Mikaaya mwene Gemariya, mwijukuru wa Shafani, ku yaahuriire ebigambo bya Nyakubaho, ebyashomwa omu muzingo gw'ekitabo," 
Jeremiah36:12 yaagyenda, yaaza omu kikaari ky'omugabe omu kishengye ky'omuhandiiki, eki abategyeki aba: Elishaama omuhandiiki, Delaaya mwene Shemaaya, Elinatani mwene Akiboora, Gemariya mwene Shafani, Zedekiya mwene Hananiya n'abategyeki boona baabaire bashutamimu." 
Jeremiah36:13 Mikaaya yaabatebeza byona ebi yaahuriire, obu Baruuku ashoma omuzingo gw'ekitabo, abantu bamuhuriire." 
Jeremiah36:14 Mpaho abategyeki boona boohereza Yehuudi mwene Netaniya, mwijukuru wa Shelamiya, mwijukuruza wa Kuushi kugambira Baruuku ati: Kwata omuzingo gw'ekitabo ogu waashoma abantu bakuhuriire, haza oije. Baruuku mwene Neriya nikwo kukwata ogwo muzingo, akaija ahu bari." 
Jeremiah36:15 Bakamugira bati: Shutama ogushome. Baruuku nawe agubashomera. 
Jeremiah36:16 Ku baahuriire ebigambo byona, baahindukirana baitsirwe obwoba. Reero baagambira Baruuku bati: Ebyo byona tushemereire kubigambira omugabe." 
Jeremiah36:17 Bwanyima baabuuza Baruuku bati: Tugambire! Ebi bigambo byona okabihandiika ota? Okabihandiika Yeremiya naabikugambira? Baruuku abagarukamu ati: 
Jeremiah36:18 Ebi bigambo byona akabingambira nimbihandiikisa bwino omuri ogu muzingo gw'ekitabo. 
Jeremiah36:19 Ebyo ku byahwaire, abategyeki baagira Baruuku bati: Irooko iwe na Yeremiya mwesherekye, hatagira owaamanya ahu muri." 
Jeremiah36:20 Abakungu ku baaherize kuta omuzingo gw'ekitabo omu kishengye kya Elishaama omuhandiiki, baaza omu kikaari, baahika omugabe, baamuteekyerereza byona." 
Jeremiah36:21 Bwanyima omugabe yaatuma Yehuudi kureeta ekitabo. N'onu yaakiiha omu kishengye kya Elishaama omuhandiiki. Yehuudi ogwo yaakishomera omugabe n'abategyeki boona abaabaire beemereire bamwehinguririize. 
Jeremiah36:22 Obwo kukaba kuri okwezi kwa mwenda, omugabe ashutami omu nju y'okuhungiramu embeho, omuriro nigwakira omu mahega omu maisho ge." 
Jeremiah36:23 Yehuudi ku yaabaire aheza ati kushoma ebicweka bishatu nari bina, omugabe abishaza akasyo, abinaga omu muriro gw'omuri ago mahega, okuhitsya obu omuzingo gw'ekyo kitabo gwona gwayokyeirwe kimwe omuriro gw'omu mahega." 
Jeremiah36:24 Kwonka nobu yaakuba omugabe nari omwe aha bakungu be abaahuriire ebyo bigambo byona, tihaagiraho owaatiinire, nobu kwa kuba okutaagura ebi bajwaire." 
Jeremiah36:25 Nangwa nobu Elinatani na Delaaya na Gemariya baayeshengyereize omugabe kutootsya ogwo muzingo, tarabakundiire;" 
Jeremiah36:26 kureka ogwo mugabe akaragiira Yerameeli omutabani, na Seraaya mwene Azarieli, na Sheremiya mwene Abudeeli kukwata Baruuku omuhandiiki na Yeremiya omurangi; kwonka Mukama yaabashereka." 
Jeremiah36:27 Mbwenu omugabe ku yaaherize kwotsya omuzingo gw'ekitabo ogurimu ebi Baaruuku yaahandiikire Yeremiya naabimugambira, Nyakubaho yaaragiira Yeremiya ati:" 
Jeremiah36:28 Kwata ogundi muzingo gw'ekitabo, oguhandiikyemu ebigambo byona ebyabaire biri omu gw'okubanza, ogu Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Buyuda ayokize." 
Jeremiah36:29 Kandi ogire Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Buyuda oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Oyokize ogwo muzingo, noogira oti: Ahabw'enki oguhandiikiremu oti: Omugabe wa Babulooni, buzimazima naija kwija acwekyereze egi nsi, agimaremu abantu n'enyamaishwa?" 
Jeremiah36:30 Nikyo Nyakubaho arikugambira ahari Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Buyuda ati: Tarigira n'omwe orishutama aha kitebe ky'obugabe ekya Daudi, kandi omutumbi gwe guryanagwa aheeru, gwaname omu kibiga nyomushana n'omu murombe nyekiro." 
Jeremiah36:31 Ndyamufubira n'ab'oruzaaro rwe, n'abagaragwa be, nimbatura ebicumuro byabo. Ndyabagwisiza akagwe aku naabarangiriire bo n'abatwire Yerusalemu n'aba Yuda; haza bakanga kumpurira." 
Jeremiah36:32 Bwanyima Yeremiya akakwata ogundi muzingo gw'ekitabo, yaaguha Baruuku omuhandiiki mwene Neriya. N'onu yaaguhandiikamu ebigambo byona ebyabaire biri omu muzingo ogu Yehoyakimu omugabe wa Buyuda yaayokize, obwo Yeremiya naabimugambira, kandi Yeremiya ogwo yaayongyeramu ebindi bigambo ebirikushushana nabyo." 
Jeremiah37:1 Zedekiya mwene Yosiya, ou Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni yaahindwire omugabe omuri Buyuda, akaza ha ngoma omu mwanya gwa Koniya mwene Yehoyakimu." 
Jeremiah37:2 Kwonka we, nobu baakuba abagaragwa be, nari abantu b'omuri egyo nsi, tibareetaire ha bi Nyakubaho yaabaire abagambira naabatumaho Yeremiya omurangi." 
Jeremiah37:3 Mbwenu omugabe Zedekiya akatuma Yehukaari mwene Shelemiya, na Zefaniya omuhongyerezi mwene Maaseya ahari Yeremiya omurangi naamugira ati; Otushabire ahari Mukama Ruhanga waitu." 
Jeremiah37:4 Obwo Yeremiya akaba akiine obusingye bw'okuza omu bantu n'okugaruka owe; ahabw'okuba akaba atakatairwe mu kihome. 
Jeremiah37:5 Eihe rya Faraaho rikaba rihurwire niriruga Misiri; Abakaludaaya abaabaire bagotsire Yerusalemu, ku baahuriire enkuru yaabo, baaruga Yerusalemu, bagyenda." 
Jeremiah37:6 Bwanyima Nyakubaho yagambira Yeremiya omurangi ati:
