Jeremiah37:7 Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ningira nti: Oku nikwo muraagambire omugabe wa Buyuda, obantumireho kuunyehanuuzaho, muti: Reeba, eihe rya Faraaho, eriizire kukuha emikono, riri haihi kugaruka Misiri omu nsi yaaryo." 
Jeremiah37:8 Haza Abakaludaaya bagarukye, bateere oru rurembo, barukwate, barwotsye." 
Jeremiah37:9 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Muteebeiha nimugira muti: Buzimazima Abakaludaaya nibaija kutuguma hare. Manya tibarikwija kugumayo. 
Jeremiah37:10 Nangwa nobu mwakusingura eihe ryona ery'Abakuludaaya abarikubarwanisa, aharibo haatsigaraho abahutaire bonka, buri omwe omu ihema rye, bakaimuka bootsya oru rurembo." 
Jeremiah37:11 Mbwenu eihe ry'Abakaludaaya ku ryarugire Yerusalemu ahabw'okutiina eihe rya Faraaho eryabaire riri haihi kuhikayo," 
Jeremiah37:12 Yeremiya yaaruga omuri Yerusalemu kuza omu kyanga kya Benyamiini kubaganira ekibanja kye ky'obutaka omu maisho g'abantu baayo. 
Jeremiah37:13 Ku yaabaire yaahika aha Irembo rya Benyamiini, omukuru w'abarinzi orikwetwa Iriya mwene Shelemiya, mwijukuru wa Hananiya, yaakwata Yeremiya omurangi, ati: Noocwa kuza omu Bakaludaaya." 
Jeremiah37:14 Yeremiya yaamugarukamu ati: Ekyo tikwo kiri. Nyowe tindikucwa kuza omu Bakaludaaya. Kwonka Iriya tiyaikiriza bi arikugamba, yaamukwata, yaamureetera abategyeki." 
Jeremiah37:15 Abo bategyeki baagwerwa kubi munonga Yeremiya, baamuteera, baamukomera omu nju ya Yonatani omuhandiiki, ahabw'okuba bakaba bagihindwire ekihome." 
Jeremiah37:16 Yeremiya ku yaabaire ari omu kashengye k'okuzimu, amaziremu ebiro bingi," 
Jeremiah37:17 Omugabe Zedekiya yaatuma ku bamumureetera, atyo yaamwakiira. Omugabe yaamubuuriza omu mubonano omu kikaari kye ati: Nyakubaho aine eki akugambiire? Yeremiya amugarukamu ati: Eego, kiriho! Bwanyima amugira ati: Noija kukwatwa omugabe wa Babulooni." 
Jeremiah37:18 Yeremiya kandi abuuza omugabe Zedekiya ati: Nkucumwireho ki? Kandi abagaragwa baawe n'eri ihanga mbiitsize ki, mwaza kunta omu kihome?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Mbwenu abarangi baanyu abaabaraguriire bati: Omugabe wa Babulooni tarikwija kubateera n'egi nsi, bari nkahi?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Nyakusinga omugabe, naakweshengyereza, mpurira, oikirize eki ndikwetonganira omu maisho gaawe; orekye kungarura omwa Yonatani omuhandiiki, ntakaagwamu!" 
Jeremiah37:21 Omugabe Zedekiya atyo aragiira, bakomera Yeremiya omu kibuga ky'abarinzi, baguma nibamuha buri izooba omugaati ogurikuruga omu nguuto y'abateeki b'Emigaati, okuhitsya obu emigaati yoona yaahwaire omu rurembo. Yeremiya atyo aguma omu mbuga y'abarinzi." 
Jeremiah38:1 Mbwenu Shefatiya mwene Matani, Gedaliya mwene Pashahuuri, Yukaali mwene Shelemiya na Pashuuri mwene Melikiya bakahurira ebi Yeremiya yaagambiire abantu boona; ati:" 
Jeremiah38:2 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Oraagume omuri oru rurembo naija kwitwa rurara, enjara n'orufu. Kwonka oraashohore akeehongyera Abakaludaaya naija kukiza amagara; atimbuukye omu rugamba aine engabirano y'amagara ge, agume ahuriire." 
Jeremiah38:3 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Oru rurembo nirwija kurekurirwa eihe ry'omugabe wa Babulooni, arukwate." 
Jeremiah38:4 Bwanyima abategyeki baagambira omugabe bati: Ogu kaitwe; ahabw'okuba naacwa entegye abaserukare abatsigaire omuri oru rurembo n'abantu boona, ahabw'okubagambira ebigambo nk'ebyo. Manya ogu mushaija tarikwendeza aba bantu ebirungi, kureka akabi." 
Jeremiah38:5 Omugabe Zedekiya yaabagira ati: Ngugwo naamubarekurira, ahabw'okuba omugabe tarikubaasa kukora eki mutarikusiima." 
Jeremiah38:6 Batyo baakwata Yeremiya, baamunaga omu iziba ry'eitimba rya Malikiya mutabani w'omugabe, eryabaire riri omu kibuga ky'abarinzi; baamushuumisayo emiguha. Kwonka omuri eryo iziba hakaba hatarimu maizi, kureka omushaayo. Yeremiya yaagushaayiramu." 
Jeremiah38:7 Ebedimeleki Omunyaetiopiya omushaahu, owaabaire ari omu kikaari ky'omugabe, ku yaahuriire ngu banagire Yeremiya omu iziba ry'eitimba- obwo omugabe akaba ashutami aha Irembo rya Benyamiini-" 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedimeleki ogwo yaaruga omu kikaari ky'omugabe, yaagyenda, yaagambira omugabe ati:" 
Jeremiah38:9 Nyakusinga omugabe, aba bantu bakozire kubi munonga kunaga Yeremiya omurangi omu iziba ry'eitimba, kandi naija kwitirwamu enjara, ahabw'okuba omu rurembo tihaakirimu migaati." 
Jeremiah38:10 Mpaho omugabe aragiira Ebedimeleki Omunyaetiopiya ati: Iha aha abantu makumi ashatu, obatware, oihe Yeremiya omurangi omu iziba, atakafiire." 
Jeremiah38:11 Ebedimeleki atyo atwara abo bantu, aza omu kikaari ky'omugabe, omu kishengye ky'emyenda, ekiri ahansi y'enju ebiikwamu, aihamu obucuju bw'emyenda abushuumisa emiguha omu iziba ry'eitimba abiha Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah38:12 Reero Ebedimeleki Omunyaetiopiya agambira Yeremiya ati: Yete omu maahwa obucuju obu n'emyenda n'emiguha. Yeremiya nawe akore atyo. 
Jeremiah38:13 Batyo baiha Yeremiya omu iziba n'emiguha, baamutuuhuurayo. Okwiha obwo aguma naarindirwa omu kibuga ky'abarinzi." 
Jeremiah38:14 Omugabe Zedekiya akatuma, baareeta Yeremiya omurangi, yaamwakiirira aha irembo rya kashatu erya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Omugabe yaagira Yeremiya ati: Naaza kukubuuza, haza otagira eki wanshereka." 
Jeremiah38:15 Yeremiya agarukamu Zedekiya ati: Mbwenu shi ku ndaakugambire, buzimazima torikuunyita? Kandi nobu ndaakuhe obwengye, torikwija kuunyikiriza." 
Jeremiah38:16 Bwanyima Omugabe Zedekiya arahira Yeremiya bari omu mubonano, naagira ati: Nindahira Nyakubaho owaatuhangire, tindikwija kukwita, nobu kwakuba okukurekurira aba bantu barikwenda kukwita." 
Jeremiah38:17 Yeremiya nikwo kugambira Zedekiya ati: Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Ku oraayehongyere abategyeki b'omugabe wa Babulooni, noija kukiza amagara; n'oru rurembo tibarikwija kurwotsya; kandi iwe n'ab'eka yaawe nimwija kugumaho." 
Jeremiah38:18 Kwonka ku oraabe oteehongyeire bategyeki b'omugabe wa Babulooni, obwo oru rurembo nirwija kurekurirwa Abakaludaaya, barwotsye kandi naiwe obure kubahonoka." 
Jeremiah38:19 Omugabe Zedekiya agambira Yeremiya ati: Manya nintiina Abayudaaya abaatorokire bakaza omu Bakaludaaya, ngu batakabandekurira, bakandeebesa enaku." 
Jeremiah38:20 Yeremiya amugarukamu ati: Tibarikwija kubakurekurira; kureka ikiriza eki Nyakubaho akuntumireho, eki ndikukugambira; haza obe gye, okize amagara." 
Jeremiah38:21 Kwonka ku oraayangye kwehayo, eki nikyo Nyakubaho anyorekire:" 
Jeremiah38:22 Ndeebire abakazi boona abatsigaire omu kikaari ky'omugabe wa Buyuda nibabashohoza nibabatwarira abategyeki b'omugabe wa Babulooni, nibagira bati: Banywani baawe abu oyesiga bakubeihire, baakusingura. Mbwenu ebigyere byawe ku biherize kushaaya, baakutsigaho." 
Jeremiah38:23 Abakazi baawe boona na batabani baawe nibaija kutwarirwa Abakaludaaya, naiwe torikwija kubahonoka; kureka omugabe wa Babulooni aryakukwata, n'oru rurembo rwokibwe." 
Jeremiah38:24 Bwanyima Zedekiya agambira Yeremiya ati: Ka harekye kugira owaamanya ebyo bigambo, otakaafa." 
Jeremiah38:25 Abategyeki ku baraahurire ngu ngaaniire naiwe, baakwijaho baakugira bati: Tugambire ebi ogambiire omugabe, n'omugabe ebi nawe akugambiire; haza otagira eki waatushereka, naitwe titurikwija kukwita;" 
Jeremiah38:26 obagire oti: Nyeshengyereize omugabe n'obucureezi, ngu atakangarura omu nju ya Yonataani, nkagwamu." 
Jeremiah38:27 Bwanyima abategyeki boona bakaija ahari Yeremiya, baamubuuza; nawe yaabagarukamu nk'oku omugabe yaamuhabwire. Baarekyera aho kugamba nawe; ahabw'okuba eki yaagaaniire n'omugabe tihaine owaakihuriire." 
Jeremiah38:28 Yeremiya yaaguma arindiirwe omu kibuga ky'abarinzi, okuhitsya obu Yerusalemu yaakwatsirwe." 
Jeremiah39:1 Omu mwaka gwa mwenda ogw'omu busingye bwa Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda, omu kwezi kwa ikumi, Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni n'eihe rye ryona bakahurura, baateerana Yerusalemu baagigota." 
Jeremiah39:2 Reero omu mwaka gwa ikumi na gumwe ogw'omu busingye bwa Zedekiya, omu kwezi kwa kana, aha kiro kya mwenda eky'okwo kwezi, baafumura ah'okutaahira omu rurembo." 
Jeremiah39:3 Yerusalemu ku yaaherize kukwatwa, abategyeki b'omugabe wa Babulooni boona baija, baashutama omu irembo rya rwagati. Nibo aba: Nerugaali-Sherezeeli, Samugaari-neebo, Sarusekimu, omukungu omukuru na Nerugaali-Sharezeeri omufumu omukuru, n'abandi bakungu b'omugabe wa Babulooni boona." 
Jeremiah39:4 Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda n'abaserukale boona ku baabareebire, baahunga, baaruga omu rurembo nyekiro, baatoora ogurikuza omu musiri gw'omugabe, nibaraba omu irembo ry'ahagati y'ebigo byombi; baaha ogurikugarura Araba." 
Jeremiah39:5 Kwonka eihe ry'Abakaludaaya ryagyenda ribabingire, ryahambiza Zedekiya omu mpita za Yeriko. Ku baaherize kumukwata, baamureetera Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni ari Ribula omu nsi ya Hamati, yaamucwera orubanja kumusinga." 
Jeremiah39:6 Ogwo mugabe wa Babulooni yaitira Ribula batabani ba Zedekiya omu maisho ga ishebo, kandi yaita abakungu ba Buyuda boona." 
Jeremiah39:7 Yaihamu Zedekiya amaisho, yaamukomesa emihama, yaamutwara Babulooni." 
Jeremiah39:8 Abakaludaaya baayotsya Nyaruju y'omugabe n'amaju g'abantu; baasheenya ebigo bya Yerusalemu. 
Jeremiah39:9 Bwanyima Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi, abantu boona abaabaire batsigaire omu rurembo, abaamuhungiireho, n'abandi abaatsigairemu, yaabatwara Babulooni bari enkwatwa." 
Jeremiah39:10 Reero Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi yaatsiga omuri egyo nsi ya Buyuda abooro abaabaire bataine ki batungire, yaabaha emisiri y'emizaabibu n'ebibanja omuri obwo bunaku." 
Jeremiah39:11 Aha bikwatiraine na Yeremiya, Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni akaragiira Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi ati:" 
Jeremiah39:12 Mutware omureeberere gye, otagira eki waamwitsa; kureka omutwaze nk'oku araakugambire." 
Jeremiah39:13 Mpaho Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi na Nebushazibaani omukungu omukuru na Nerugaali-Sharezeeri omufumu omukuru, n'abakungu bakuru boona ab'omugabe wa Babulooni," 
Jeremiah39:14 baatuma abantu baiha Yeremiya omu kibuga ky'abarinzi baamukwatsa Gedaliya mwene Ahikaamu mwijukuru wa Shafani, kumugarura omu ka ye; atyo yaatuura omu bantu baayo." 
Jeremiah39:15 Mbwenu Yeremiya ku yaabaire akikingiraniirwe omu kibuga ky'abarinzi, Nyakubaho yaamugambira ati:" 
Jeremiah39:16 Irooko ogambire Ebedimeleki Omunyaetiopiya oti: Mukama ow'amahe Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kuhikiiriza ebi naagambire ahari oru rurembo, kurukorera kubi, kutari kurukorera gye; kandi ekyo nikiija kuhikiirizibwa eryo izooba nookireeba." 
Jeremiah39:17 Kwonka iwe, eryo izooba ndyakurinda, orekye kurekurirwa abo bantu abu orikutiina." 
Jeremiah39:18 Manya buzimazima ndyakujuna, orekye kwitwa, okize amagara, gabe engabirano yaawe omuri orwo rugamba, ahabw'okuba onyesigire; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah40:1 Eki nikyo Nyakubaho yaagambiire Yeremiya, obu Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi yaabaire aherize kumurekura kuruga Raama, ei yaabaire amutwaire abohirwe n'enjegyere, n'ezindi nkwata ezaarugire Yerusalemu na Buyuda ezi baabaire nibatwara Babulooni kuzizaahizayo." 
Jeremiah40:2 Omukuru w'abarinzi akatwara Yeremiya, yaamugira ati: Mukama Ruhanga waawe akarangirira akagwe aka ku karigwera egi nsi." 
Jeremiah40:3 Mbwenu Nyakubaho akihikiriize, yaakora nk'oku yaagambire. Manya mukacumura ahari Nyakubaho, mwayanga kworobera ebi arikubangambira. Nikyo ebyo bibabeereireho." 
Jeremiah40:4 Mbwenu reeba, eri izooba naakwiha enjegyere aha mikono. Ku oraabe nooyenda kugyenda naanye Babulooni, ija. Niinyija kukureeberera gye. Kwonka ku oraabe otarikwenda kugyenda naanye Babulooni, orereere. Reeba, ensi egi yoona ekuri omu maisho, toora ahu orikuteekateeka ngu ni harungi, kandi hahikire." 
Jeremiah40:5 Ku oraatsigare kunu, ogarukye owa Gedaliya mwene Ahikaamu, mwijukuru wa Sahafani, ou omugabe wa Babulooni atooraine kuba omutegyeki mukuru w'endembo za Buyuda, otuure nawe n'abandi bantu; nari shi oze ahandi, ahu orikusiima ngu hahikire. Omukuru w'abarinzi atyo amuha entanda n'ekiconco, amureka, agyenda." 
Jeremiah40:6 Bwanyima Yeremiya aza Mizipa owa Gedaliya mwene Ahikaamu, atuura hamwe nawe n'abandi bantu abaatsigaire omuri egyo nsi." 
Jeremiah40:7 Abakuru b'engabo boona abaabaire bari omu nsi y'obwerere, n'abantu baabo, ku baahuriire ngu omugabe wa Babulooni atooraine Gedaliya mwene Ahikaamu kuba omutegyeki mukuru w'egyo nsi; kandi ku amukwatsize abashaija n'abakazi n'abaana, abooro buzima ab'omuri egyo nsi abataratwairwe Babulooni kuzaahirayo," 
Jeremiah40:8 baaza Mizipa owa Gedaliya. Nibo aba: Ishimaeli mwne Netaniya, Yohaanani mwene Kareya, Seraaya mwene Tanihumeti batabani ba Efai Omunetofa; Yezaniya mutabani w'Omunyamaaka; bo n'abantu baabo." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedaliya mwene Ahikaamu mwijukuru wa Sahafani yaabahamiza naarahira naabagira ati: Mutatiina kwehongyera Abakaludaaya. Mugume omuri egi nsi nimuheereza omugabe wa Babulooni; haza nimwija kuba gye. 
Jeremiah40:10 Nyowe niinyija kuguma Mizipa nimbatabaarira aha Bakaludaaya, abaraije kunu. Kwonka imwe mugume mushanguruze viino n'ebijuma by'omu kyanda n'amajuta g'emioliva, mubibiikye omu nyungu zaanyu, kandi mugume omu ndembo zaanyu ezi mukubwire." 
Jeremiah40:11 N'Abayudaaya boona abaabaire batwire Moabu n'omu Baamoni n'omuri Edomu n'omu zindi nsi, ku baahuriire ngu omugabe wa Babulooni aine abu atsigire omuri Buyuda, kandi ku atooraine Gedaliya mwene Ahikaamu mwijukuru wa Shafani kuba omutegyeki waabo mukuru," 
Jeremiah40:12 abo Bayudaaya boona baataaruuka omu byanga byona ebi baabaire baababingiiremu, baija Mizipa omuri Buyuda ahari Gedaliya, baashanguruza viino n'ebijuma by'omu kyanda bingi munonga." 
Jeremiah40:13 Mbwenu Yohaanani mwene Kareya n'abakuru b'engabo boona ab'omu nsi y'obwerere bakaija Mizipa ahari Gedaliya," 
Jeremiah40:14 baamugira bati: Ebyo noomanya ku Baalisi omugabe w'Abaamoni ayohereize Ishimaeli mwene Netaniya kukwita? Kwonka Gedaliya mwene Ahikaamu tiyaakiikiriza. 
Jeremiah40:15 Bwanyima Yohaanani mwene Kareya yaagambirira Gedaliya omu mubonano Mizipa ati; Ndeka ngyende, nyite Ishimaeli mwene Netaniya; haza habure owaakimanya. Mbwenu ebyo akwite, aba Bayudaaya boona abakuteeraniireho bataataane, n'abatsigaire omuri Buyuda bahwerekyerere?" 
Jeremiah40:16 Kwonka Gedaliya mwene Ahikaamu agira Yohaanani mwene Kareya ati; Otakora ekyo kintu ahabw'okuba noobeiherera Ishimaeli. 
Jeremiah41:1 Omu kwezi kwa mushanju Ishimaeli mwene Netaniya mwijukuru wa Elishaama, ow'omu baana b'engoma, kandi omwe aha bakungu bakuru b'omugabe, akaija n'abashaija ikumi owa Gedaliya, yaamushanga Mizipa. Mbwenu ku baabaire bari Mizipa nibarya kumwe ebyokurya," 
Jeremiah41:2 Ishimaeli mwene Netaniya n'abo bashaija be ikumi, baimuka baateera rurara Gedaliya mwene Ahikaamu, mwijukuru wa Shafani, ou omugabe wa Babulooni yaabaire atooraine kuba omutegyeki mukuru omuri egyo nsi, baamwita." 
Jeremiah41:3 Ishimaeli kandi yaita Abayudaaya boona abu Gedaliya yaabaire aine Mizipa, baita n'abaserukare Abakaludaaya abaabaire bariyo." 
Jeremiah41:4 Ku haahingwireho ekiro kimwe aherize kwita Gedaliya, kandi hatakagizire muntu n'omwe owaakimanyire," 
Jeremiah41:5 haija abashaija makumi munaana nibaruga Shekemu na Shiilo na Samariya, bamweire ebireju, bajwaire ebijwaro bitaagukire, kandi beesharashazire emibiri, bareetsire emitoijo y'esaano n'obubaani, kubitoijera omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
Jeremiah41:6 Ishimaeli mwene Netaniya atyo aruga Mizipa, aza kubabugana naayeriza amakarangira. Mbwenu ku yaabahikire, yaabagira ati: Nimwije muze kureeba Gedaliya mwene Ahikaamu." 
Jeremiah41:7 Ku baahikire omu rurembo, Ishimaeli mwene Netaniya n'abashaija abu yaabaire aine, baabaita, baabanaga omu kiziba." 
Jeremiah41:8 Kwonka omuribo abashaija ikumi baayeshengyereza Ishimaeli bati: Otatwita, ahabw'okuba twine engano na baale n'amajuta g'emioliva n'obwoki, ebi tusherekire omu ishwa. Atyo nawe areka kubaita hamwe na bagyenzi baabo." 
Jeremiah41:9 Mbwenu ekiziba eki Ishimaeli yaanagiremu emitumbi y'abo bantu boona abu yaitsire kikaba kiri kihango; ekyatimbisiibwe Omugabe Asa kwerinda Baasha omugabe wa Isiraeli. Ishimaeli mwene Netaniya yaakiijuza abu yaitsire. 
Jeremiah41:10 Bwanyima Ishimaeli ogwo, yaakwata abandi bantu boona ab'omuri Mizipa abaahonokireho, na bahara b'omugabe, n'abandi boona abaatsigaire Mizipa, abu Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi yaabaire akwatsize Gedaliya mwene Ahikaamu. Ishimaeli ogwo mwene Netaniya yaabatwara bari enkwatwa, yaimutsya orugyendo, yaatoora ogurikuza omu Baamoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Yohaanani mwene Kareya hamwe n'abakuru b'engabo boona abu yaabaire aine ku baahuriire akagwe aku Ishimaeli mwene Netaniya agwisize," 
Jeremiah41:12 baahurura n'engabo zaabo zoona, baaza kumurwanisa. Baamushanga aha kiyanja ekihango eky'omuri Gibeoni." 
Jeremiah41:13 Abantu boona abu Ishimaeli yaabaire aine ku baareebire Yohaanani mwene Kareya n'abakuru b'engabo boona abu yaabaire aine, baashemererwa." 
Jeremiah41:14 Batyo abantu boona abu Ishimaeli yaabaire atwaire bakwatsirwe abaihire Mizipa, baakuba baagaruka, baashanga Yohaanani mwene Kareya." 
Jeremiah41:15 Kwonka Ishimaeli mwene Netaniya yaahunga Yohaanani n'abashaija munaana, yaaza omu Baamoni." 
Jeremiah41:16 Bwanyima Yohaanani mwene Kareya n'abakuru b'engabo boona abu yaabaire aine, baatwara abantu boona abatsigaireho, abu Ishimaeli mwene Netaniya yaabaire aihire Mizipa akabatwara bari enkwatwa, yaaherize kwita Gedaliya mwene Ahikaamu, abaserukare, abakazi, abaana, n'abashaahu. Yohaanani ogwo yaabaiha Gibeoni yaabatwara." 
Jeremiah41:17 Baagyenda baaguma Geruti, Kimuhaamu haihi na Beetelehemu, nibenda kuhungira Misiri," 
Jeremiah41:18 ahabw'okutiina Abakaludaaya. Bakabatiina, ahabw'okuba Ishimaeli mwene Netaniya akaba aitsire Gedaliya mwene Ahikaamu, ou omugabe wa Babulooni yaabaire ahindwire omutegyeki mukuru w'egyo nsi." 
Jeremiah42:1 Bwanyima abakuru b'engabo boona, na Yohaanani mwene Kareya, na Azariya mwene Hoshaaya, n'abantu boona okwiha aha muto okuta aha mukuru, bakairira haihi," 
Jeremiah42:2 baagira Yeremiya omurangi bati: Nitukweshengyereza, otushabire ahari Mukama Ruhanga waawe, itwe twena abatsigaireho; ahabw'okuba tukaba turi baingi, mbwenu tutsigaire bakye nk'oku orikutureeba." 
Jeremiah42:3 Haza Mukama Ruhanga waawe abone kutuhabura omuhanda ogu turaatoore, n'eki turaakore." 
Jeremiah42:4 Yeremiya omurangi yaabagira ati: Naabahurira; mbwenu niinyija kushaba Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, nk'oku mwanshaba, kandi kyona eki araabagarukyemu niinyija kukibagambira. Tiinyine ki ndaabasherekye." 
Jeremiah42:5 Mpaho bagambira Yeremiya bati: Nyakubaho abe niwe yaaba mushinja waitu w'amazima kandi omwesigwa, ku turaabe tutatwarize nk'oku byona ebi Mukama Ruhanga waawe araakututumeho oku biri." 
Jeremiah42:6 Yaaba birungi, yaaba bibi, itwe nitwija kworobera eki Mukama Ruhanga waawe, ou twakutumaho, araagambe; tubone kuba gye, twakuratira eki Mukama Ruhanga waitu araaturagiire." 
Jeremiah42:7 Ku haahingwireho ebiro ikumi, Nyakubaho yaagarukamu Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah42:8 Nawe yaayeta Yohaanani mwene Kareya, n'abakuru b'engabo boona abu yaabaire aine, n'abantu boona okwiha aha muto okuta aha mukuru." 
Jeremiah42:9 Yaabagira ati: Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, ou muntumireho kumuhitsyaho okweshengyereza kwanyu, naagamba ati:" 
Jeremiah42:10 Ku muraagume omu nsi egi, niinyija kubombeka, tindikubasheenya; niinyija kubabyara, tindikubarandura; ahabw'okuba niinyefuuza akagwe aku naabagwisiize." 
Jeremiah42:11 Mutatiina omugabe wa Babulooni orikubaitsa obwoba. Mutamutiina; ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ndi hamwe naimwe kubajuna, nkabaiha omu mikono ye." 
Jeremiah42:12 Niinyija kubagirira embabazi, nawe abone kuzibagirira; abarekye mugume omu nsi yaanyu." 
Jeremiah42:13 Kwonka ku muraagire muti: Titurikwija kuguma omuri egi nsi, mwayanga kwororbera eki Mukama Ruhanga waanyu arikubaragiira," 
Jeremiah42:14 mwagira muti: Ngaaha! Itwe nitwija kwegiira Misiri, ei tutarireeba rugamba, nobu kwakuba okuhurira eiraka ry'enzamba, nari okwitwa enjara ahabw'okuburwa ebyokurya; haza okwo niyo turituura;" 
Jeremiah42:15 mbwenu imwe aba Yuda abatsigaireho, nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikugamba. Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Ku muraabe mumaririire kuza Misiri, kuba niyo mwatuura," 
Jeremiah42:16 okwo omuri Misiri rurara ei murikutiina niyo eribahambiza, n'enjara erikubaitsa obwoba eryagyenda ebeezingiriire, okuhitsya obu murihikayo mukagwayo." 
Jeremiah42:17 Abantu boona abamaririire kuza Misiri kugituura baryaitwa rurara, enjara n'orufu. Tiharigira n'omwe orihonokaho nari oritsigaraho, akakira akagwe aku ndibagwisiza." 
Jeremiah42:18 Ahabw'okuba Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Nk'oku naagiriire abatuuzi ba Yerusalemu ekiniga kingi n'ekishinjo, naimwe nikwo ndikibagirira, mwaza Misiri. Muryaba abarikwamaganwa, abarikunugwa, abarikukyeenwa, kandi abarikugaaniizibwa. Haza timurigira bundi obu mureebire ogu mwanya." 
Jeremiah42:19 Imwe aba Yuda abaatsigaireho, Mukama naabagira ati: Mutaza Misiri. Mumanyire kimwe ku eri izooba naabeehanangiriza," 
Jeremiah42:20 ku muhabire ngu mufe. Manya muntumire ahari Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, nimungira muti: Otweshengyerereze Mukama Ruhanga waitu. Muti kandi eki Mukama Ruhanga waitu araagambe, okitumanyise, naitwe nitwija kukikora." 
Jeremiah42:21 Naanye eri izooba naakibamanyisa; kwonka timwaikiriza kukora ebi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu abagambiire, byona ebi antumire kubagambira." 
Jeremiah42:22 N'ahabw'ekyo mukimanyire kimwe ku muriitirwa rurara, enjara n'orufu omu nsi ei murikwenda kuza kutuuramu." 
Jeremiah43:1 Yeremiya ku yaaherize kugambira abantu boona ebigambo byona ebi Mukama Ruhanga waabo yaamubatumireho," 
Jeremiah43:2 Azariya mwene Hoshaaya na Yohaanani mwene Kareya n'abashaija enyarubwa boona baagambira Yeremiya bati: Noobeiha! Mukama Ruhanga waitu takutumire kutugira oti: Mutaza Misiri kutuurayo; 
Jeremiah43:3 kureka Baruuku mwene Neriya niwe atuteeraine naiwe, kuturekurira Abakaludaaya, bakatwita, bakatuzaahiza Babulooni." 
Jeremiah43:4 Yohaanani mwene Kareya n'abakuru b'engabo boona, n'abantu boona, baayanga kworobera eki Nyakubaho yaabagambiire kuguma omu nsi ya Buyuda;" 
Jeremiah43:5 kureka Yohaanani mwene Kareya, n'abakuru b'engabo boona, baatwara aba Yuda boona abaabaire batsigaireho; bagarukire kutuura omu nsi ya Buyuda, barugire omu mahanga goona agu baabaire bataataanisiziibwemu," 
Jeremiah43:6 abashaija, abakazi, abaana, bahara b'omugabe n'abantu boona, abu Nabuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi yaabaire atsigiire Gedaliya mwene Ahikaamu, mwijukuru wa Shafani; baatwara na Yeremiya omurangi na Baruuku mwene Neriya." 
Jeremiah43:7 Batyo baaza Misiri, bangire kworobera eki Nyakubaho yaabagambiire; baahika Tahapaneheesi." 
Jeremiah43:8 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambirira Yeremiya omuri Tahapaneheesi ati: 
Jeremiah43:9 Twara omu ngaro amabaare mahango, ogasherekye omu budongo ahansi y'omwariro gw'aha irembo ry'ekikaari kya Faraaho omuri Tahapaneheesi, aba Yuda nibakureeba." 
Jeremiah43:10 Haza obagire oti: Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kwohereza omwiru wangye Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni, ate ekitebe kye ky'obugabe ahari aga mabaare agu naaziika, ateere eihema rye ry'obugabe eruguru yaago." 
Jeremiah43:11 Aryaija ateere ensi ya Misiri, aheyo ab'okwitwa orufu, rubaite, ab'okutwarwa bari enkwatwa, batwarwe, n'ab'okwitwa rurara, ebaite." 
Jeremiah43:12 Aryatweka amaramizo ga baaruhanga ba Misiri, abootsye nari abatware bari enkwatwa. Atyo ashemeze ensi ya Misiri, nk'oku omuriisa ashemeza ekijwaro kye akakimaramu enda; bwanyima arugyeyo agyende n'obusingye." 
Jeremiah43:13 Aryasheenyagura enyomyo z'amabaare eziri Heliopoli omu nsi ya Misiri, kandi ayotsye amaramizo ga baaruhanga baayo." 
Jeremiah44:1 Ebi nibyo byagambiirwe Yeremiya aha Bayudaaya boona abaabaire batwire omu nsi ya Misiri, Migidooli, Tahapaneheesi, Menfisi n'omu nsi ya Paturoosi, kiti:" 
Jeremiah44:2 Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Mukareeba akagwe aku naagwisiize aba Yerusalemu n'ab'omu ndembo za Buyuda zoona. Reeba, eri izooba n'amatongo; tiziine ozitwiremu." 
Jeremiah44:3 Obwo nimbatura ebibi ebi baakozire bakangwisa kubi, bakaza kwoterera obubaani n'okuheereza baaruhanga abandi, abu baabaire batakamanyaga, nobu baakuba bo nari imwe, nainga baashwenkuriimwe." 
Jeremiah44:4 Haza Nyowe naagumire nimbatumaho abagaragwa bangye abarangi, nimbeehanangiriza nti: Nyaabura 'mwe, mutakora ekyo kihagaro ki nyanga!" 
Jeremiah44:5 Kwonka tibarampuriire nobu kwakuba okuntega okutu, kweteisa ebibi bi barikukora, n'okutootera baaruhanga abandi obubaani." 
Jeremiah44:6 Nikyo naagiriire endembo za Buyuda n'enguuto za Yerusalemu ekiniga kingi n'ekishinjo, nkazootsya, zikaba eihamba n'amatongo okuhitsya eri izooba." 
Jeremiah44:7 Mbwenu Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naababuuza ati: Ahabw'enki nimwereetera akabi kahango kati, mukeemaraho omushaija n'omukazi, omwereere n'omwana, bakahwa omuri Buyuda, mutagire owaahonokaho?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Ahabw'enki nimungwisa kubi n'ebi murikukoresa emikono yaanyu, mukooterera baaruhanga abandi obubaani omu nsi ya Misiri ei mwaizire kutuuramu, ngu mubone kucuubwa, mukakyeenwa kandi mukagaaniiziibwa ab'omu mahanga goona ag'omu nsi?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Mbwenu shi mwebirwe ebibi bya baashwenkuriimwe, eby'abagabe ba Buyuda n'eby'abakazi baabo, ebyanyu ahabwanyu n'eby'abakazi baanyu, ebi baakoreire omu nsi ya Buyuda n'omu nguuto za Yerusalemu?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Nangwa tibakeebundikaga okuhitsya n'eri izooba, nobu kwakuba okuntiina, n'okukuratira amateeka gangye n'ebi naataireho, ebi naabahaire imwe na baashwenkuriimwe." 
Jeremiah44:11 N'ahabw'ekyo Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Reeba, imwe niinyija kubata omu kaso, mbakorere kubi, mmareho aba Yuda boona." 
Jeremiah44:12 Aba Yuda abaatsigaireho, abamaririire kuza omu nsi ya Misiri kutuuramu, ndyabaihamu, boona bacwekyerere, bagweyo, bamarweho rurara n'enjara, okwiha aha muto okuta aha mukuru, baitwe rurara n'enjara; kandi baryaba abarikunugwa, abarikwamaganwa, abarikukyeenwa kandi abarikugaaniizibwa." 
Jeremiah44:13 Ndyafubira abatwire omu nsi ya Misiri, nk'oku naafubiire ab'omuri Yerusalemu, mbaitse rurara, enjara, n'orufu." 
Jeremiah44:14 Omu Bayuda abaatsigaireho abaizire kutuura omu nsi ya Misiri, habure owaakira, nari owaahonokaho, nainga owaagaruka omu nsi ya Buyuda ei barikwetenga kugaruka kutuuramu. Manya tibarigigaruka, kureka abakye abarihunga." 
Jeremiah44:15 Bwanyima abashaija boona abaabaire nibamanya ku abakazi baabo barikwoterera baaruhanga abandi obubaani, n'abakazi boona abaabaire beemereire aho, ekimbuuro kihango, abantu boona abaabaire batwire Paturoosi omu nsi ya Misiri, bakagarukamu Yeremiya bati:" 
Jeremiah44:16 Ahabw'ebigambo ebi waatugambira omu iziina rya Nyakubaho, titurikwija kukuhurira;" 
Jeremiah44:17 kureka nitwija kuguma nitukora ekintu kyona eki twahigire; kwoterera omugabekazi w'omu iguru obubaani, n'okumushukira emitoijo y'ebyokunywa, nk'oku twabaire tukora, itwe na baatatenkuriitwe abagabe baitu, n'abategyeki baitu omu ndembo za Buyuda n'omu nguuto za Yerusalemu. Manya obwo tukaba tutunga ebyokurya bingi, tugogyeera, tutaine kabi ku tureebire." 
Jeremiah44:18 Kwonka okwiha obu twarereera kwoterera omugabekazi w'omu iguru obubaani n'okumushukira emitoijo y'ebyokunywa, tutuura tubuzirwe buri kintu, kandi tumazirweho rurara n'enjara." 
Jeremiah44:19 Abakazi nabo baamugira bati: Ku twabaire twoterera omugabekazi w'omu iguru obubaani, tukamushukira emitoijo y'ebyokunywa, noogira ngu baibanyaitwe bakaba batakisiima, ngu tumuteekyere obubanda buriho ekishushani kye, kandi tumushukire emitoijo y'ebyokunywa?" 
Jeremiah44:20 Bwanyima Yeremiya agambira abantu boona abashaija n'abakazi abaamugarukiremu batyo, ati:" 
Jeremiah44:21 Mbwenu ku mwayotereire obubaani omu ndembo za Buyuda n'omu nguuto za Yerusalemu, imwe na baashwenkuriimwe, abagabe baanyu n'abategyeki baanyu n'abantu b'omuri egyo nsi, Nyakubaho tarabiijukire, bikamuhika aha njoka?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Nyakubaho akaba atakibaasa kugumisiriza ebibi byanyu n'ebihagaro bi mwakozire; nikyo ensi yaanyu yaabeeraire eitongo n'eihamba, ekakyeenwa ekabura ogitwiremu n'eri izooba." 
Jeremiah44:23 Ekyareetsire ekyo n'ahabw'okuba mukootera obubaani, mwacumura ahari Nyakubaho, mwayanga kworobera ebi arikubagambira nari okukuratira amateeka ge n'ebi yaataireho n'ebi yaahamize. Nikyo ako kagwe kaabagweraire n'okuhitsya eri izooba." 
Jeremiah44:24 Yeremiya akagambira abantu boona, munomuno abakazi ati: Imwe mwena aba Yuda, abari omu nsi ya Misiri, nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah44:25 Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Imwe n'abakazi baanyu mwakyegambira n'akanwa kaanyu, kandi mwakihikiiriza n'emikono yaanyu; nimugira muti: Buzimazima nitwija kukora ebi twahigire; kwoterera omugabekazi w'omu iguru obubaani n'okumushukira emitoijo yaitu y'ebyokunywa. Mbwenu nimuhamye ebi mwahigire, kandi mubikore." 
Jeremiah44:26 Kwonka imwe aba Yuda mwena, abatwire omu nsi ya Misiri, nikyo Nyakubaho arikubagirira ati: Reeba, nindahira eiziina ryangye ery'ekitiinwa, ku hatarigira muntu n'omwe ow'omu ba Yuda, abatwire omu nsi ya Misiri yoona, owandahira obundi ati: Nindahira Mukama Ruhanga ohuriire! Mukama nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah44:27 Reeba mbataireho abiri kubakorera kubi, kutari kubakorera gye. Aba Yuda boona abari omu nsi ya Misiri, baryamarwaho rurara n'enjara okuhitsya obu barihwaho." 
Jeremiah44:28 Reero abakye abarihonoka rurara, baryaruga omu nsi ya Misiri, bagarukye omu nsi ya Buyuda. Mpaho aba Yuda boona abatsigaireho, abaizire omu nsi ya Misiri kutuuramu, baryamanya ou ekigambo kye kiribakwo; yaaba ekyangye nari ekyabo." 
Jeremiah44:29 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mbwenu eki nikyo murimanyiraho, ku ndibafubirira omuri ogu mwanya, mubone kumanya ku buzimazima ebi naagamba biribarugiramu akabi." 
Jeremiah44:30 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, Faraaho Hofura, omugabe wa Misiri, niinyija kumurekurira abazigu be abarikwenda kumwita, nk'oku naahaireyo Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda omu mikono ya Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni, omuzigu we owaabaire naayenda kumwita." 
Jeremiah45:1 Eki nikyo Yeremiya omurangi yaagambiire Baruuku mwene Neriya, obu yaahandiika ebi bigambo omu kitabo, Yeremiya naabimugambira; omu mwaka gwa kana ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya omugabe wa Buyuda. Akamugira ati:" 
Jeremiah45:2 Iwe Baruuku, oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli arikukugambira." 
Jeremiah45:3 Okagira oti: Ai bambe! Manya Nyakubaho ayongyeire enaku aha busaasi bwangye. Okutsinda kwankabya, tiinyine buhuumure!" 
Jeremiah45:4 Mbwenu omugire oti: Mukama naagira ati: Reeba, ninsheenya ebi naayombekire, nindandura ebi naabyaire. Nikwo kugira ngu, nikwo ndaatwaze ntyo ensi yoona." 
Jeremiah45:5 Haza iwe oyeyendeza ebintu bikuru? Otabisherura! Reeba, niinyija kugwisiza abantu boona akagwe. Kwonka iwe, omu myanya yoona ei orizamu, ndyakutimbuura omu rugamba oine amagara nk'engabirano yaawe." 
Jeremiah46:1 Eki nikyo Nyakubaho yaagambiire Yeremiya aha bikwatiraine n'amahanga. 
Jeremiah46:2 Ebya Misiri nibigamba aha ihe rya Faraaho Neeko omugabe wa Misiri eryabaire riri Karikemishi aha rubaju rw'Omugyera Eufuraati; eri Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni yaasingwire omu mwaka gwa kana ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya omugabe wa Buyuda. 
Jeremiah46:3 Nimutebeekanise engabo enkye n'empango, muze aha rugamba!" 
Jeremiah46:4 Imwe abagyendera aha mbaraasi nimuzitandiikye, muzitembe! Muze omu myanya yaanyu mujwaire enkofiira. Mweze amacumu gaanyu, mujware eby'okwekingiza!" 
Jeremiah46:5 Mbwenu ekyo naakireebera ki? Bahahaire, baagaruka enyima. Abarwani baabo basingwirwe, baahunga buguru-butakora-ha-nsi; batarikureeba nyima, obwoba bubaturikire oku n'oku; Mukama nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah46:6 Empayamaguru tizirikubaasa kuhunga, n'amamanzi ti g'okukira. Bateereire entsibo omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho bw'omugyera Eufuraati, baagwa." 
Jeremiah46:7 Ogwo n'oha oijwire nk'omugyera Nailo, ori nk'emigyera ei amaizi gaayo garikushandaara?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Manya ni Misiri erikwimukyeera nka Nailo, eri nk'emigyera ei amaizi gaayo garikushandaara. Ekagira eti: ndyaimuka, ntabaare ensi yoona, ncwekyereze endembo n'abazitwiremu." 
Jeremiah46:9 Imwe mbaraasi 'mwe nimuhurure! Naimwe bigaari 'mwe nimurigite! K'amamanzi gashohore; Abanyaetiopiya n'Abapuuti enkwata-ngabo, n'Abaluudi rugambwa enkwata-mata." 
Jeremiah46:10 Manya eryo izooba n'erya Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe, eizooba ry'okuhooreraho abazigu be enzigu. Rurara eryarya, ehaagye; enywe eshagama yaabo, eigute. Ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe naatambira ekitambo omu nsi y'omu bukiizi-bwa bumosho obw'omugyera Eufuraati." 
Jeremiah46:11 Iwe Misiri 'we omwishiki oshugaine, imuka oze Gileadi oiheyo omubazi gw'okwomoora. Kwonka emibazi mingi ei otuura nookoresa n'eya busha; tori w'okukira." 
Jeremiah46:12 Amahanga gahuriire ekihemu kyawe, n'ensi eijwire okuborooga kwawe, ahabw'okuba emanzi ebandaine n'endiijo, zombi zaagwa kumwe." 
Jeremiah46:13 Eki nikyo Nyakubaho yaagambiire Yeremiya omurangi aha by'okuhurura kwa Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni kuteera ensi ya Misiri. 
Jeremiah46:14 Murangye omuri Misiri, murangirire omuri Migidooli, murangirire omuri Menfisi na Tahapaneheesi. Mugire muti: Yemerera oyeteekateekye, ahabw'okuba rurara neija kumaraho boona abakwehinguririize," 
Jeremiah46:15 Ahabw'enki ruhanga waawe Apiisi ahungire? Ahabw'enki enimi yaawe tegumire eyemereire? Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho agiteire aha nsi. 
Jeremiah46:16 Eteerize baingi entsibo baagwa, haza baagambirana bati: Nimwimukye tugarukye omu baitu, omu nsi ei twazaariirwemu, tuhungye rurara y'omubisha." 
Jeremiah46:17 Nimukubye Faraaho omugabe wa Misiri eiziina Ruyomba, orikufiisa busha eshaaha." 
Jeremiah46:18 Nyakusinga oyetwa Mukama ow'amahe, naagira ati: Niinyerahira! Haryaija omuntu orumbaire nka Tabora omu nshozi, nari nka Karumeeli aha rubaju rw'enyanja." 
Jeremiah46:19 Imwe batuuzi ba Misiri 'mwe, nimukome esika, mweteekateekyere okuzaahibwa; ahabw'okuba Menfisi eryahinduka eihamba, ebe amatongo etaine ogitwiremu." 
Jeremiah46:20 Misiri n'enyana enyemibwa, kwonka enkuriikizi erugire omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho yaagiteekamaho." 
Jeremiah46:21 Nangwa n'abaserukare baayo abu eguririire, batsiitsibaniise nk'enyana zigomokire. Eego, bakubire boona baahunga, tihaagira waayemerera; ahabw'okuba eizooba ryabo ry'okugwerwa akagwe ribahikiire, nigo magingo gaabo g'okufubirwa." 
Jeremiah46:22 Misiri n'eshereburiza nk'enjoka erikuhunga; ahabw'okuba abazigu baayo nibagiizira n'endigito. Baizire kugiteera baine empango nk'abarikutema emiti. 
Jeremiah46:23 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nibaija kutema ekibira kyayo nobu kiraabe kitarikurabwamu, ahabw'okuba ni baingi okukira enzigye; tibarikubarwa." 
Jeremiah46:24 Ensi ya Misiri eryahemuka yaarekurirwa ab'eihanga ry'omu bukiizi-bwa bumosho. 
Jeremiah46:25 Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, agizire ati: Reeba, niinyija kufubira Amoni owa Tebesi, na Faraaho na Misiri, na baaruhanga baayo, n'abagabe baayo, nfubire Faraaho n'abarikumwesiga boona." 
Jeremiah46:26 Niinyija kubarekurira abarikwenda kubaita; mbarekurire Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Baabulooni n'abakungu be. Bwanyima Misiri etuurwemu nk'omu biro bya ira; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba. 
Jeremiah46:27 Kwonka iwe Yakobo, omwiru wangye, otatiina! Iwe Isiraeli, otahahaara. Manya reeba, ndyakujuna nkwihe hare, nyihe ab'oruzaaro rwawe omu nsi ei barimu bari enkwatwa. Aba Yakobo baryagaruka batuuze, bagaramisirize, kandi tiharigira owaabatiinisa." 
Jeremiah46:28 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Imwe aba Yakobo, mutatiina; ahabw'okuba ndi hamwe naimwe. Ndyamariraho kimwe amahanga goona agu naabataataaniiremu; kwonka imwe tindibamariraho kimwe. Ndyabateera nimbabariirira, kwonka tindireka kubafubira." 
Jeremiah47:1 Eki nikyo Nyakubaho yaagambiire Yeremiya omurangi aha Bafilisiti, Faraaho atakateire Gaaza." 
Jeremiah47:2 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, amaizi nigahimintika nigaruga omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, gaba omwegyemure, gushandaara, gushweka ensi n'ebigirimu, n'endembo n'abazitwiremu; abashaija bateera enduuru, n'abatwire omuri egyo nsi boona baborooga." 
Jeremiah47:3 Emitsindo y'ebyara by'embaraasi ze, n'endigito y'enziga z'ebigaari bye ebirikubomborekana, biryareetera baishe abaana okutareeba nyima kunaga eriisho aha baana baabo ahabw'okuba baryaba batentebukire emikono;" 
Jeremiah47:4 ahabw'eizooba eri Abafilisiti baricwekyererezibwaho; kumara omuri Tuuro na Sidoni omuntu weena orikubaha emikono, oriba atsigairemu; ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho aryacwekyereza Abafilisiti abariba batsigaire omu myegyeego ya Kafuta." 
Jeremiah47:5 Aba Gaaza bategire enkomborora; Ashikelooni ehwerekyereire. Mbwenu imwe aba Naaki, abatsigaireho, nimwija kuhitsya hi n'okwekambura?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Ai bambe! Iwe rurara ya Nyakubaho, oryatuuza ryari? Yegarure omu kyobati, ohuumure, ocureere!" 
Jeremiah47:7 Beitu neebaasa eta kutuuza, Nyakubaho ku araabe niwe agiragiire? Manya agitaireho kurwanisa aba Ashikelooni n'ab'aha myegyeego y'enyanja." 
Jeremiah48:1 Aha bya Moabu, Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Ebishi aba Neebo muryakareeba, ahabw'okuba eryacwekyerezibwa! Aba Kiriyataimu baryahemurwa ahabw'okuba eryakwatwa. Ab'omu kigo kyabo ekigumire baryaitwa enshoni; ahabw'okuba kiryasheenywa." 
Jeremiah48:2 Okurangaanwa kw'aba Moabu kuryaba kutakiriho. Abazigu bacumiire omuri Heshibooni enaama mbi y'okurwanisa Moabu, nibagira bati: Nimwije tugicwekyereze, erekye kuba eihanga obundi. Naimwe aba Madameena muryahunamibwa mubingwe abakwaitse rurara." 
Jeremiah48:3 Nimuhurire! Aba Horonaimu nibaborooga bati: twafa, twacwekyerera!" 
Jeremiah48:4 Moabu ecwekyereire! Okuborooga kw'abaayo kuhuriirwe n'aba Zoari. 
Jeremiah48:5 Manya aharikwinamuka Luhiiti nibanyegyera nibacura; kandi aharikushuumirwa nooza Horonaimu bahuriire okuborooga kw'abarikucwekyerezibwa. 
Jeremiah48:6 Nimuhungye! Mukize amagara! Mube nk'enturegye y'omu ihamba. 
Jeremiah48:7 Manya iwe Moabu, ahabw'okwesiga ebigo byawe ebigumire, hamwe n'eby'obutungi byawe, naiwe oryakwatwa; na ruhanga waawe Kenoshi azaahibwe hamwe n'abahongyerezi be n'abategyeki be." 
Jeremiah48:8 Omucwekyerezi aryajuumikira buri rurembo, hatagire orwahonokaho. Ab'omu ruhanga baryahwerekyerera, ab'omu ruhita bacwekyerezibwe, nk'oku Nyakubaho agambire." 
Jeremiah48:9 Nimuhe Moabu amapapa egurukye eze hare, ahabw'okuba endembo zaayo n'ez'okuhinduka amatongo, habure owaazituuramu." 
Jeremiah48:10 Orikukora omurimo gwa Nyakubaho naayeganda, naakakyeenwe! N'orikuzibira rurara ye kusheesha eshagama naakakyeenwe!" 
Jeremiah48:11 Moabu akaguma agogyeire okwiha omu buto bwe, yaateeka eruguru y'eibonde nka viino y'omurera. Takashukaanirwaga mu nyungu, kandi takazaahibwaga. N'ahabw'ekyo agumire n'obunuzi bwe; n'omugaju gwe tigukahindukaga." 
Jeremiah48:12 Nikyo Nyakubaho arikugirira ati: Reeba, obunaku buryahika, mmwoherereze ab'okumushuka, bamushukye. Enyungu ze bazimaremu viino ei abiikire; enywero ze bazaate, bazicwe obusaasingo." 
Jeremiah48:13 Reero Kemoshi eitse Moabu enshoni, nk'oku ab'omurayango gwa Isiraeli baahemwirwe ruhanga waabo Beteli ou baabaire nibeesiga." 
Jeremiah48:14 Nimubaasa muta kwetiita muti: Turi emanzi kandi abarwani rugambwa? 
Jeremiah48:15 Haza omucwekyerezi wa Moabu n'endembo ze yaizire, abatsigazi be entoore baashuumire kwitwa. Nyakusinga oyetwa Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah48:16 Moabu eri haihi kugwerwa akagwe; okubonabonesibwa kwe nikwiruka buguru-butakora-ha-nsi. 
Jeremiah48:17 Imwe mwena abamweshinguririize nimumucurire. Naimwe mwena abarikumanya ekitiinwa kye, mugire muti: Ebishi enkoni y'obugabe ey'amaani ehendekire; egyo nkoni y'ekitiinwa ehenzirwe." 
Jeremiah48:18 Iwe mutuuzi wa Diboni 'we, temburuka orugye omu mwanya gw'ekitiinwa, oshutame aha nsi omu mucuucu. Manya ow'okucwekyereza Moabu yaizire kukurwanisa, yaaherize kucwekyereza ebigo byawe ebigumire." 
Jeremiah48:19 Iwe mutuuzi wa Aroeri 'we, yemerera aha rubaju rw'omuhanda otegyereze! Obuuze omushaija orikuhunga, n'omukazi orikucwa; oti: Beitu haabaho ki?" 
Jeremiah48:20 Moabu ehemwirwe, ahabw'okuba esheenyirwe. Nimucure, muboroogye! Mukimanyisize ahari Arunooni muti: Moabu ehindwirwe amatongo!" 
Jeremiah48:21 Okucwerwa orubanja kuhikire aha ndembo z'aha migongo eyaririkire aha mutwe; kwahika Holoni, Yahaza, Mefaati;" 
Jeremiah48:22 Diboni na Neebo na Metidiburataimu; 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriyataimu Betigamuli na Betimeoni; 
Jeremiah48:24 Kerioti na Bozira n'endembo z'omu nsi ya Moabu zoona eza hare n'eza haihi. 
Jeremiah48:25 Moabu ecwirwe eishaija, amaryo gaagihwa; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Jeremiah48:26 Nimusinze Moabu ahabw'okuba eyetungwire ahari Nyakubaho, haza eyekuringye omu ntanaki yaayo, abantu bagishekyeerere." 
Jeremiah48:27 Mbwenu Iwe Moabu, okaba otashekyeerera Isiraeli? Mbwenu shi ekaba erashangirwe omu bashuma, okiba noogigambaho okagiha mutinzi?" 
Jeremiah48:28 Imwe abatwire Moabu, nimurugye omu ndembo, mutuure omu nonko z'amabaare, mube nk'enkombe eyarika omu mbaju z'omunwa gw'orusa." 
Jeremiah48:29 Tuhuriire oku Moabu eine amaryo, oku erikwetunguura, oku eine omwemanyo, emyehimbiso, n'emyekuniko n'oku eine eigundu." 
Jeremiah48:30 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nimmanya oku eine orubwa. Ebihagi bi egira n'ebya busha! N'ebi ekora ti by'amazima. 
Jeremiah48:31 Nikwo ndikuririra Moabu, nkaborooga ahabw'abaayo boona, nkacurira aba Kiriheresi." 
Jeremiah48:32 Iwe muzaabibu gwa Sibuma 'we, ninkucurira okukira oku naacuriire aba Yazeri! Amataagi gaawe gakambuka enyanja, gaahika Yazeri. Kwonka hati omuhwerekyerezi ayetwire omu bijuma byawe by'omu kyanda, n'omu misiri yaawe y'emizaabibu." 
Jeremiah48:33 Okushemererwa n'okwesiima biihirwe omu nsi ya Moabu erikweza! Mburize viino omu manyuukiro! Tihaakiriho orikuginyuuka naateera akaari k'okushemererwa. Akaari ku baraateere nikaba katari k'okushemererwa. 
Jeremiah48:34 Aba Heshibooni na Eleale nibaborooga, amaraka gaabo gahika Yahazi; googa omuri Zoari gahika Horonaimu na Egulaati-Shelishiya; ahabw'okuba ahu amaizi ga Nimuriimu gari, hahindukire eitongo." 
Jeremiah48:35 Mukama naagira ati: Moabu ndyagimaramu abantu abarikutambira ruhanga waayo ebitambo omu myanya etunguukire, bakamwotererayo obubaani." 
Jeremiah48:36 Nikyo ndikucuririra aba Moabu n'aba Kiriheresi, nk'orikuteera omukuri gw'omu rufu; ahabw'okuba ebi babaire batungire byona bihwerekyereire." 
Jeremiah48:37 Manya buri muntu ategire enkomborora, na buri omwe amweirwe ekireju, boona beesharashazire emikono, kandi beezirikire ebiguniya omu manyaanya." 
Jeremiah48:38 Aba Moabu boona tibaine kindi, kureka okucurira aha mitwe y'amaju gaabo n'omu nteeraniro z'emihanda; ahabw'okuba Moabu ngisheenyire, nk'oku omuntu ayata enyungu ei atarikwenda; Mukama nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah48:39 Ebishi Moabu esheenyukire! Ebishi bacuzire! Ebishi Moabu eteire abazigu omugongo yaahemuka! Yaaba etyo ey'okushekyeererwa n'okunugwa amahanga goona agagyehinguririize. 
Jeremiah48:40 Ahabw'okuba Mukama naagira ati: Reeba, haine origuruka n'engoga nk'eishamba, akashashaanura amapapa ge kurwanisa aba Moabu." 
Jeremiah48:41 Endembo zaayo ziryakwatwa, ebigo byayo ebigumire bikubuurwe. Eryo izooba emitima y'abarwani ba Moabu eryahahaara nk'ogw'omukazi orikurumwa." 
Jeremiah48:42 Moabu eryacwekyerezibwa, erekye kuba eihanga obundi; ahabw'okuba ekeetunguura ahari Nyakubaho." 
Jeremiah48:43 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Imwe abatwire Moabu, ebirikutiinisa n'ebiina n'emitego bibategyereize!" 
Jeremiah48:44 Orihunga ekyamukanga, aryagwa omu kiina, ku arituuhuuka omu kiina, akwatwe omutego; ahabw'okuba ebyo nibyo ndyasisa aba Moabu, omu mwaka ogu ndibafubiriramu; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah48:45 Manya abarihungira Heshibooni baryayeshobera; ahabw'okuba omuriro gurugire Heshibooni, gwanaga enkobe niguruga omu kikaari kya Sihooni; gwacwekyereza ensi y'aba Moabu, ey'abo abantu abarikujagarara." 
Jeremiah48:46 Ai bambe, imwe aba Moabu! Imwe abaramya Kemoshi, mweshobeire; ahabw'okuba batabani baanyu na bahara baanyu batwairwe bari enkwatwa." 
Jeremiah48:47 Kwonka aba Moabu abo ndyabagarura aha buteeka omu biro ebiriija; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba. Egi niyo eriba muheru y'orubanja oru Nyakubaho aricwera aba Moabu. 
Jeremiah49:1 Nyakubaho naagamba ati aha bikwatiraine n'Abaamoni: Biri Isiraeli tagira batabani? taine muhunguzi? Mbwenu shi ahabw'enki Milikomu abingire oruganda rwa Gaadi, abantu be bakatuura omu ndembo zaarwo?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Nikyo Nyakubaho arikugirira ati: Reeba, obunaku nibwija kuhika, ndeetere aba Raba ey'Abaamoni kuhurira enduuru y'ehururu y'okubateera! Haza ehindukye omutuumo gw'amatongo, n'ebyaro byayo bikoomeerwe omuriro; Isiraeli abone kugarukana ebi yaabaire anyagirwe; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah49:3 Iwe Heshibooni, cura; ahabw'okuba Aayi ehindwirwe amatongo! Imwe bakazi ba Raba 'mwe, nimuboroogye! Nimwezirikye ebiguniya! Mutonzye nimukora oku n'oku omu ngo, Ahabw'okuba Mikokoomu n'ow'okuzaahibwa, hamwe n'abahongyerezi be n'abategyeki be!" 
Jeremiah49:4 Imwe bantu 'mwe, abatari beesigwa, ahabw'enki nimwesiimirana empanga zaanyu? Mukeekiita ahabw'amatungo gaanyu nimugira muti: Mbwenu n'oha owaakwija kuturwanisa?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kubareetera eby'okubatiinisa, birugye omu bantu boona ababeehinguririize, Bababingye, buri muntu atoore ogwe kukiza amagara, kandi habure owaataaruura abaahunga." 
Jeremiah49:6 Kwonka bwanyima Abaamoni ndyabagarura aha buteeka; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba. 
Jeremiah49:7 Aha bikwatiraine na Edomu: Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Beitu omuri Temani tihaakirimu banyabwengye? Kandi abarikwetegyereza baamwo tibaakihabura bantu? Obwengye bwabo buhweraireho kimwe? 
Jeremiah49:8 Imwe batuuzi ba Dedani 'mwe, nimukubuukye, muhungye, mwesherekye omu bicokoromi; ahabw'okuba obunaku bw'okufubira Edomu ku buraahikye, niinyija kumugwisiza akagwe nk'aku naagwisiize Esau." 
Jeremiah49:9 Mbwenu abashoromi b'emizaabibu ku baakwija owaawe, tibakaakutsigira eby'okuhumba? Nari abashuma ku baakwija nyekiro, tibakaayaya ebi barikwenda byonka?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Kwonka Esau nyowe mmucwijwire; naayerura emyanya ye ey'okwesherekamu, takiine h'okweshereka. Abaana be na beene ishe, na bataahi be bacwekyereziibwe, kandi nawe takiriho." 
Jeremiah49:11 Tsigaho efuuzi zaawe, Nyowe niinyija kuzirinda, zirekye kufa, n'abafaakazi baawe baanyesigye." 
Jeremiah49:12 Manya Nyakubaho naagira ati: Abaabaire batashemereire kunywa ekikopo, ku baraabe nibaragiirwa kukinywa, iwe noija kukira okufubirwa? Torikwija kukira okufubirwa, kureka nooragiirwa kukinywa." 
Jeremiah49:13 Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nyerahiire; Bozira eryaba ekirikwitsa obwoba, ekirikugaaniizibwa, eihamba, kandi ekirikukyeenwa, n'endembo zaayo zoona ziryaba amatongo." 
Jeremiah49:14 Mpuriire enkuru erikuruga ahari Nyakubaho, kandi entumwa etumirwe omu mahanga neegira eti: Mweteerane, muze kumurwanisa, mwimukye, muze aha rugamba!" 
Jeremiah49:15 Manya reeba, ndyakuhindura mukye omu mahanga, obe orikugaywa omu bantu." 
Jeremiah49:16 Ebikangiso byawe n'amaryo gaawe, bikubeihire. Iwe otuura omu bicokoromi by'enkiri, aha mutwe gw'ebibungo. Nobu okweyombekyera ekyashuri ahaiguru nk'eishamba, ndyakuhananturayo; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah49:17 Edomu eryaba ey'okwitsa obwoba. Weena origirabaho aryayeshaanya ahabw'akagwe akariba kagigwereire. 
Jeremiah49:18 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Tihaine origituuramu, nobu yaakuba ow'okugishuuhuukiramu; nk'obu Sodoma na Gomora n'endembo eziziherereire zaacwekyerezibwa." 
Jeremiah49:19 Reeba, nk'oku entare etimbira omu bishaka bya Yorudaani, ekateera eka y'entaama egumire, naanye nikwo ndibareetera kuhunga omu nsi yaabo kitaraariire; nkagitamu ow'okugitegyeka ou ndyetooranira. Mbwenu n'oha ori nkaanye? N'oha owaakuunyetesa obushoboorozi?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Ni mutegyeki ki owaakunza omu kaso? Mbwenu nu, nimuhurire enaama ei Nyakubaho acumire kurwanisa Abanyaedomu; n'oku amaririire kurwanisa abatuuzi ba Temani. Nangwa n'abaana baabo baryabakurubana, babatware, ab'omu maka gaabo baitwe obwoba, baareeba akagwe kaabagwera." 
Jeremiah49:21 Ensi ku erihurira entuure y'okugwa kwabo, eryatetema; eiraka ry'okuborooga kwabo rihuririrwe aha Nyanja Erikutukura." 
Jeremiah49:22 Reeba, haryagira owaimuka, agurukye n'engoga nk'eishamba, ashashaanure amapapa ge kuteera Bozira; emitima y'abarwani ba Edomu eryo izooba ebe nk'ogw'omukazi orikurumwa." 
Jeremiah49:23 Aha bikwatiraine na Damasiko: Aba Hamati na Arupaadi bashobeirwe, ahabw'okuba bahuriire enkuru mbi. Emitima ebahwaire omunda, ahabw'okutiina baatabanguka, nk'enyanja etarikubaasa kucureera." 
Jeremiah49:24 Damasiko ehwaire amaani, ehindukire kuhunga, yaitwa obwoba, yaagira enaku n'obusaasi nk'eby'omukazi orikurumwa." 
Jeremiah49:25 Ebishi orwo rurembo rugambwa, orwabaire rundeetera okushemererwa rutsigirweho!" 
Jeremiah49:26 Nikyo abatsigazi baarwo barigwera gangari omu nteeraniro z'emihanda; n'abaserukare baarwo boona bakacwekyerera eryo izooba; Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugamba. 
Jeremiah49:27 Kandi ndyatweka ebisiika bya Damasiko, omuriro gucwekyereze ebikaari by'Omugabe Benihadadi." 
Jeremiah49:28 Aha bya Kedari, n'ensi z'obugabe bwa Hazori ezi Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni yaasingwire, Nyakubaho naabigambaho ati: Nimwimukye, muhurure, muteere Kedari! Mucwekyereze ab'omu burugwa-izooba!" 
Jeremiah49:29 Amahema gaabo n'amasyo gaabo g'entaama binyagwe, hamwe n'emikingo yaabo n'ebintu byabo byona! Banyagwe engamira zaabo; abantu babateerere enduuru bati; Mwafa, mwabura obutooro!" 
Jeremiah49:30 Yaimwe batuuzi ba Hazori 'mwe, nimuhungye, muze hare, mutuure omu bicokoromi, ahabw'okuba Nebukedenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni acumire enaama y'okubarwanisa, kandi amaririire kubateera; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah49:31 Agizire ati: Nimwimukye, muhurure, muteere eihanga erigaramisiriize erituura rigogyeire, eritagira marembo na mpimbi z'ebyoma, erituura ryonka; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah49:32 Engamira zaabo ziryatwarwa, n'amasyo gaabo g'ente ganyagwe, abo bantu batega ebyeyera ndyabataataanisiza oku n'oku, ei emiyaga ereetwa, mbagwisize akagwe, kabaturukye embaju zoona; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah49:33 Hezori eryahinduka eikobezo rya zaamuha, ebe eihamba ry'ebiro byona, habure owaatuurayo, kandi hataagira owaashuuhuukirayo." 
Jeremiah49:34 Eki nikyo Nyakubaho yaagambiire Yeremiya omurangi, omu kutandika kw'obusingye bwa Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda." 
Jeremiah49:35 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Reeba, ndyahenda obuta bw'aba Elamu obubateera eigundu." 
Jeremiah49:36 Aba Elamu abo mbaitse emiyaga ena, erugye omu mbaju ina z'eiguru, haza mbataataanisize ei egyo miyaga yoona etoora, harekye kubaho eihanga eri abaribingwa omuri Elamu batarizamu." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ndyatiinisa Abanyaelamu, bahungye abazigu baabo abarikwenda kubaita. Ndyabagwisiza akagwe, mbainiire ekiniga kingi munonga; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba. Ndyababinga nimbaitsa rurara, okuhitsya obu ndibamariraho kimwe," 
Jeremiah49:38 haza nte ekitebe kyangye ky'obugabe omuri Elamu, ncwekyereze abagabe baabo n'abategyeki baabo; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah49:39 Kwonka omu biro ebirikurataho, ndyagarura Abaelamu aha buteeka; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah50:1 Ebi n'ebi Nyakubaho yaagambiise Yeremiya omurangi ahari Babulooni n'ensi y'Abakaludaaya. 
Jeremiah50:2 Mugambire ab'omu mahanga enkuru, kandi mugirangirire! Mwimutsye orurango, haza murangirire. Mutakishereka, kureka mugire muti: Babulooni ekwatsirwe! Beli ehemukire, na Merodaaki ehahaarize omutima. Ebishushani bya Babulooni bihemwirwe; ebishushani byayo ebirikuramibwa bihahaire!" 
Jeremiah50:3 Manya eihanga rihurwire niriruga omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho kugiteera, rikahindura ensi yaayo amatongo, hakabura owaagituuramu; abantu n'enyamaishwa bikahunga." 
Jeremiah50:4 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Omu biro ebyo n'omu bunaku obwo, Abaisiraeli n'aba Yuda baryaija kumwe nibarira, bansherure, Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga waabo." 
Jeremiah50:5 Baryahabuza omuhanda gurikuza Siyooni bahangireyo amaisho, nibagira bati: Nimwije twehongyere Nyakubaho, turagaane nawe endagaano etarihwaho kandi etaryeba." 
Jeremiah50:6 Abantu bangye babaire nk'entaama zibuzire, abariisa baabo babahabiise, baabatooza okwo omu nshozi, baaruga omu rushozi baaza omu rundi, baayebwa eka yaabo." 
Jeremiah50:7 Boona abaababugaine baabashonshomera, abazigu baabo baagira bati: Titwine rubanja, ahabw'okuba bakacumura ahari Mukama, Nyakubaho obutaaho bwabo, kandi amatsiko ga baishebo." 
Jeremiah50:8 Nimuhungye, murugye omuri Babulooni; murugye omu nsi y'Abakaludaaya; mube nk'empaya z'embuzi ezeebembera obusyo." 
Jeremiah50:9 Ahabw'okuba niinyija kwimukiiriza ekimbuuro ky'amahanga g'amaani, nkireete kiteere Babulooni nikiruga omu nsi y'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, bagitengyere orugamba, haza bagikwate. Emyambi yaabo ni nk'omurwani rugambwa, otagaruka ngaro nsha." 
Jeremiah50:10 Bukaludaaya eryanyagwa, boona abariginyaga bahaagye; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah50:11 Imwe abaanyagire abantu bangye, nobu muraashemererwe, nobu muraayekiite, nobu muraarinde nk'enyana erikwenda kwema, kandi mukabubura nk'engundu y'embaraasi;" 
Jeremiah50:12 kwonka nyokoimwe aryaitirwa kimwe enshoni, owaabazaire ahemukye. Ahabw'okuba Babulooni niyo erihereeruka enyima y'agandi mahanga, ekaba eihamba rikarangataine kandi ery'omusheenyi." 
Jeremiah50:13 Ahabwa Nyakubaho kugigirira ekiniga kingi, terituurwamu bantu, kureka eryahindukira kimwe amatongo, omuntu weena oriba naaraba ahari Babulooni, ate engaro aha munwa, kandi ayeshaanye ahabw'akagwe kaagigwereire." 
Jeremiah50:14 Nimutengye orugamba, muteere Babulooni, mugyehinguririize! Mwena abarikwinika amata, nimugirashe, mutatsigaza omwambi na gumwe; ahabw'okuba ecumwire ahari Nyakubaho." 
Jeremiah50:15 Nimugiteerere akaari embaju zoona, ahabw'okuba yaagomooka. Ebigo byayo bigwire, n'ebisiika byayo bikumbagaziibwe. Manya oku n'okuhoora enzigu kwa Nyakubaho. Mbwenu nu nimugihoore, mugigire nk'oku yaakozire." 
Jeremiah50:16 Mumare omuri Babulooni omubibi weena, n'orikukwata omusyo gw'engyesho omu igyesha. Ahabwa rurara etaine saasi, buri muntu agarukye omu baabo, ahungire omu nsi y'owaabo." 
Jeremiah50:17 Isiraeli n'entaama ehiigirwe, ebingirwe entare. Omugabe wa Asiriya niwe yaabandize kugishonshomera; mbwenu aha muheru Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni niwe amemeine amagufa gaayo." 
Jeremiah50:18 Nikyo Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, arikugirira ati: Reeba, niinyija kufubira omugabe wa Babulooni n'ensi ye, nk'oku naafubiire rubambansi wa Asiriya." 
Jeremiah50:19 Abaisiraeli ndyabagarura omu mariisizo gaabo, barye eby'ahari Karumeeli n'eby'omuri Bashani; bahaagire omu bibungo bya Efuraimu n'omu bya Gileadi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Omu biro ebyo n'omu bunaku obwo, ebicumuro biryasherurwa omuri Isiraeli, haburemu na kimwe; n'ebibi bisherurwe omuri Buyuda, habure ekyashangwamu; ahabw'okuba ndyasaasira abu nditsigamu bari emponoka." 
Jeremiah50:21 Hurura, oteere ensi ya Merataimu n'ey'abatwire Pekodi. Obaite, obacwekyerereze kimwe; okore byona ebi nkuragiire. Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah50:22 Orwari rw'orugamba n'okucwekyereza kwingi biri omuri egyo nsi. 
Jeremiah50:23 Ebishi egyo nyondo y'ensi yoona etemirwe, yaacwagurika! Ebishi Babulooni ebaire ekirikunugwa omu mahanga!" 
Jeremiah50:24 Iwe Babulooni 'we, nkakutega omutego gwakukwata, haza tiwaakimanya. Mbwenu obonekire waakwatwa, ahabw'okuba okahakanisa Nyakubaho." 
Jeremiah50:25 Nyakubaho aigwire eibiikiro ry'eby'okurwanisa bye, yaihamu ebikwato bya kashanga ye, ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe aine eki arikuza kukora omu nsi y'Abakaludaaya." 
Jeremiah50:26 Nimwije mugirwanise, mugiturukire oku n'oku, mwigure ebitara byayo, mugirunde nk'ebitunda by'oburo. Haza mugicwekyerereze kimwe, hatagira ekyayo ekyatsigaraho!" 
Jeremiah50:27 Mwite enimi zaayo zoona, muzishuumye omu ibaagiro. Ebishi baagwerwa akagwe, ahabw'okuba eizooba ryabo ryahika ery'obunaku bwabo bw'okufubirwamu!" 
Jeremiah50:28 Nimuhurire! Abarikucwa nibahunga nibaruga omu nsi ya Babulooni kuza kurangirira omuri Siyooni oku Mukama Ruhanga waitu ahoire enzigu, naahoorera Nyaruju ye." 
Jeremiah50:29 Nimuhuruze abarasi, abananuuzi b'amata boona bateere Babulooni. Mugyehingurizise ensiisira, hatagira owaacwa. Mugihoore nk'ebi yaakozire oku biri, mugigire nk'oku yaagizire kwona, ahabw'okuba ekagira amaryo yaahakanisa Nyakubaho Orikwera wa Isiraeli." 
Jeremiah50:30 Nikyo abatsigazi baayo barigangaramira omu nguuto zaayo, abaserukare baayo boona bakacwekyerezibwa eryo izooba. Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah50:31 Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe naagira ati: Iwe munyamaryo 'we, reeba, nyine eki ndikufa naiwe. Manya eizooba ryawe ryahika ery'obunaku bw'okukufubira." 
Jeremiah50:32 Ogwo munyamaryo aryateera entsibo, agwe, habure ow'okumwimutsya. Kandi endembo ze ndyazitweka omuriro, gucwekyereze byona ebimwehinguririize." 
Jeremiah50:33 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Abaisiraeli nibahatwa hamwe n'aba Yuda. Abaabatwaire bari enkwatwa babahamize, baayanga kubarekura." 
Jeremiah50:34 Kwonka Omucunguzi waabo n'ow'amaani. Eiziina rye ni Mukama ow'amahe. Buzimazima naija kubarwanaho, abone kuha ensi obuhuumure, haza abatuuzi ba Babulooni abareetere omurabanamu." 
Jeremiah50:35 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Rurara yaaza kwita Abakaludaaya n'abatwire Babulooni, n'abategyeki baayo n'abanyabwengye baayo." 
Jeremiah50:36 Rurara yaaza kwita abafumu; nkaahenwa ki, baba ebifeera! Rurara yaaza kwita abarwani baayo; nkaahenwa ki, bacwekyerera!" 
Jeremiah50:37 Rurara yaaza kwita embaraasi zaayo hamwe n'ebigaari byayo! Eite n'amahe g'abanyamahanga abagitwiremu, nkaahenwa ki, baba abataine maani nk'abakazi! Rurara yaaza kucwekyereza eby'obutungi bwayo byona, nkaahenwa ki binyagwa!" 
Jeremiah50:38 Ekyanda kyaza kwomya amaizi gaayo; nkaahenwa ki, goomera kimwe! Ahabw'okuba n'ensi y'ebishushani, kandi ebishushani ebirikuramibwa bibahindwire abashazi." 
Jeremiah50:39 N'ahabw'ekyo enyamaishwa enshaarizi na zaamuha ziryatuura omuri Babulooni, na zaamaaya zigituuremu, ebe etakirimu bantu ebiro byona, nobu kwakuba okutuurwamu, obusingye bwona." 
Jeremiah50:40 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nk'obu Ruhanga yaacwekyereize Sodoma na Gomora n'endembo ezihereraine nazo, nikwo nayo etarituurwamu muntu, nobu yaakuba ow'okugishuuhuukiramu." 
Jeremiah50:41 Reeba, eihanga niriija niriruga omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, eihanga ry'amaani, kandi abagabe baingi nibahurura nibaruga omu bicweka by'ensi eby'aha muheru." 
Jeremiah50:42 Bakwaitse amata n'amacumu; n'enshaarizi kandi tibaine mbabazi. Endigito yaabo ni nk'ey'enyanja erikuhoorera. Batembire embaraasi, bajwaire nk'abantu barikuza aha rugamba kukurwanisa iwe Babulooni!" 
Jeremiah50:43 Omugabe wa Babulooni ahuriire enkuru yaabo, yaagwa emikono, yaagira obujune n'obusaasi, nk'obw'omukazi orikurumwa." 
Jeremiah50:44 Reeba, nk'oku entare etimbira omu kishaka kya Yorudaani kuteera eka y'entaama egumire, naanye nikwo ndaabareetere kuruhungamu ahonaaho, nkaruteeraho ou ndaasiime kurutegyeka. Mbwenu n'oha ori nkaanye? N'oha orikundagiira kwija? Ni mutegyeki ki owaakunza omu kaso?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Mbwenu nu, nimuhurire enaama ei Nyakubaho acumire kurwanisa Babulooni, n'oku amaririire kuteera ensi y'Abakaludaaya. Buzimazima abaana b'eka yaabo baryakurubanwa, haza ab'omuri egyo ka baitwe obwoba ahabw'ekyababaho." 
Jeremiah50:46 Ensi ku erihurira orwari rw'abarikukwata Babulooni eryatetema; okuborooga kw'abaamwo kuhurirwe ab'omu gandi mahanga. 
Jeremiah51:1 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kwimukiza Babulooni n'abatwire Bukaludaaya omuyaga gurikuhwerekyereza;" 
Jeremiah51:2 Nyoherereze Babulooni abaheheezi bagiheheeze, ebyanga byayo babitsigyemu busha; baija kugiteera bagiturukire oku n'oku aha izooba ry'okugireebesa enaku." 
Jeremiah51:3 Hatagira owainika obuta; mutamwikiriza kwemerera ajwaire eby'okurwanisa. Mutasaasira abatsigazi baayo, mucwekyerereze kimwe eihe ryayo ryona!" 
Jeremiah51:4 Abaitsirwe baryarambirirana omu nsi y'Abakaludaaya; n'abahutaaziibwe bagwe bugango omu nguuto zaayo. 
Jeremiah51:5 Manya Abaisiraeli n'aba Yuda tibakatsigwahoga Ruhanga waabo, Mukama ow'amahe. Nobu ensi yaabo eraabe eine orubanja ruhango, ecumwire ahari Nyakwera wa Isiraeli." 
Jeremiah51:6 Nimuhungye murugye omuri Babulooni, buri omwe akize amagara! Mutacwekyerezibwa neefubirwa, ahabw'okuba obu nibwo bunaku bwa Nyakubaho kuhoora enzigu naagizimuurira ebi yaakozire." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babulooni ekaba eri ekikopo ky'ezaabu omu ngaro za Nyakubaho, neesinza ensi yoona; amahanga gakanywa viino yaayo, gaashara." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babulooni egwire kitaraariire, yaahendeka. Nimugicurire! Nimugireetere omubazi gw'okugitambira obusaasi; obundi ekaakira." 
Jeremiah51:9 Tukaabaire twatambiire Babulooni, kwonka terakizire! Nimugitsigyeho, tugyende; buri omwe ensi aze omu y'owaabo; ahabw'okuba okucwerwa orubanja kwayo kuhikire omu iguru, kwatumbeera ahaiguru." 
Jeremiah51:10 Nyakubaho ayorekire ku tutaine rubanja; nimwije turangirire omuri Siyooni eki Mukama Ruhanga waitu akozire. 
Jeremiah51:11 Nimutyaze emyambi! Mukwate engabo! Nyakubaho ateire omuhimbo abagabe b'Abameedi; ahabw'okuba ainiire Babulooni enaama y'okugicwekyereza; kandi okwo nikwo araahoorere Nyaruju ye enzigu. 
Jeremiah51:12 Nimwimutsye orurango rw'okuteera ebigo bya Babulooni murindire kimwe, muteho abarinzi, mutebeekanise ab'okugwera; ahabw'okuba eki Nyakubaho yaagambire aha batuuzi ba Babulooni, akitebeekaniise kandi yaakikora." 
Jeremiah51:13 Imwe abatwire aha rubaju rw'amaizi maingi, kandi abaine eby'obutungi, muheru yaanyu yaahika, akagoye k'amagara gaayu kaacweka." 
Jeremiah51:14 Mukama ow'amahe ayerahiire ati: Buzimazima, iwe Babulooni, niinyija kukwijuzamu abantu baingi nk'enzigye, bakuteerere akaari baaheza kukusingura." 
Jeremiah51:15 Nyakubaho niwe yaahangiise ensi obushoboorozi bwe, akahamya ensi yoona n'obwengye bwe; n'okwetegyereza kwe akakubambisa eiguru." 
Jeremiah51:16 Ku agambisa eiraka rye, amaizi g'omu iguru gahoorera; kandi aimutsya omurombe, guruga aha muheru gw'ensi. Atyankanisa emirabyo kugwisa enjura, ayohereza omuyaga, guruga omu mabiikiro ge." 
Jeremiah51:17 Ebyo abantu ku babireeba, baba abashema nk'enyamaishwa, babura obwengye. Buri muheesi w'eby'ezaabu ahemurwa ebishushani bye ebirikuramibwa, ahabw'okuba biba eby'ebishuba, kandi tibiitsya." 
Jeremiah51:18 Tibiine mugasho, n'ebikozirwe kugaaniizibwa. Obunaku bwabyo bw'okufubirwa ku burihika, biryacwekyerezibwa." 
Jeremiah51:19 Kwonka ogwo oba omugabo gwa Yakobo tari nkabyo; ahabw'okuba niwe yaahangire ebintu byona; kandi ab'oruganda rwa Isiraeli nibo yaatooraine kuba abe ahabwe. Eiziina rye ni Mukama ow'amahe. 
Jeremiah51:20 Ori enyondo yangye ey'okurwanisa omu rugamba. Niiwe ncwagacwaguzisa amahanga, nkacwekyerezesa ensi z'abagabe." 
Jeremiah51:21 Niiwe ncwagacwaguzisa embaraasi n'abazitembire; nkacwagacwaguzisa ebigaari n'abarikubigyendesa," 
Jeremiah51:22 niiwe nsheenyaguza abashaija n'abakazi; nkasheenyaguza abakuzire n'abarikunyeeta; niiwe nsheenyaguza abatsigazi n'empangare. 
Jeremiah51:23 Niiwe nsheenyaguza omuriisa n'obusyo bwe; nkasheenyaguza omuhingi n'enyamaishwa ezi arikuhingisa; niiwe nsheenyaguza abategyeki n'abakuru b'engabo. 
Jeremiah51:24 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Niinyija kuhoora aba Babulooni n'abatwire Bukaludaaya boona, nimukyereebera; mbature ebibi ebi baakozire omu Siyooni." 
Jeremiah51:25 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Iwe rushozi rurikucwekyereza 'we, orucwekyereza ensi yoona, reeba, naaba omuzigu waawe! Niinyija kukugororera omukono, nkuhananture aha bibaare by'enengo, nkukumbagaze, nkutsigye ori orushozi rusiriire." 
Jeremiah51:26 Toriihwamu ibaare na rimwe ry'okwombekyesa enshonda, nobu gaakuba amabaare g'okuta omu misingi; kureka oryaguma ori amatongo ebiro byona; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah51:27 Nimwimutsye orurango omu nsi, muteerere enzamba omu mahanga. Mutebeekanise amahanga g'okugirwanisa, muhuruze ensi z'abagabe ba Araraati na Mini na Ashekenaazi kugiteera. Nimuteho omukuru w'amahe w'okugirwanisa, mureete embaraasi eziri nk'emizinga y'enzigye." 
Jeremiah51:28 Mugiteekateekyere abanyamahanga b'okugirwanisa orugamba, abagabe b'Abameedi, naabategyeki baabo bakuru n'abakungu baabo, n'ensi zoona ezi barikutegyeka." 
Jeremiah51:29 Ensi neetetema, neeshamba ahabw'obusaasi; ahabw'okuba eki Nyakubaho amaririire kuteera Babulooni, akahindura ensi ya Babulooni amatongo, ekabura ogitwiremu, kihamire." 
Jeremiah51:30 Abarwani ba Babulooni barereire kurwana, baaguma omu bigo byabo. Amaani gabahwaire, baaba nk'abakazi. Amaju gaayo nigasya, empimbi zaayo zihenzirwe!" 
Jeremiah51:31 Engiramaguru neiruka kukwata ngyenzi yaayo, n'entumwa eiruka kuhika ngyenzi yaayo kubikira omugabe wa Babulooni, ku orurembo rwe rukwatsirwe embaju zoona." 
Jeremiah51:32 Enyambukiro zikwatsirwe, ebigo bikoomeirwe omuriro, n'abaserukare emitima ebahwaire omunda!" 
Jeremiah51:33 Manya Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, naagira ati: Orurembo Babulooni ni nk'eihuuriro omu bunaku bw'okugihuura; kwonka hatsigaireyo omwanya mukye, obunaku bwayo obw'okugishaaruura buhikye." 
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni anshonshomeire yansiitagura, yampindura enyungu erimu busha, yammira nk'orukooko, enda ye yaagiijuza ebintu byangye ebinuzire, bwanyima yantanaka." 
Jeremiah51:35 K'omutuuzi wa Siyooni agire ati: Obubisha obu naagiriirwe hamwe na beene waitu, Babulooni neekabugirirwe! N'owa Yerusalemu ati: Nkaahenwa ki, eshagama yangye etukurira abatwire Bukaludaaya!" 
Jeremiah51:36 Nikyo Nyakubaho arikugirira aba Yerusalemu ati: Reeba, ndyabarwanaho, mbahoorere enzigu! Ndyayomya enyanja yaayo, nkarangatanise emigyera yaayo." 
Jeremiah51:37 Babulooni ehindukye emituumo y'amatongo n'eikoobezo rya zaamuha, etiinise, enugwe, eyeshaanywe, ebure ogitwiremu." 
Jeremiah51:38 Abanyababulooni batsinde kumwe nk'entare, barurume nk'ebishore byazo." 
Jeremiah51:39 Ku baraabe bakiine ekiniga, niinyija kubateekyera obugyenyi, mbasinze, bashemererwe okuhitsya obu baraahungire, bakagwejegyera obutasisiimuka. Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah51:40 Niinyija kubashuumya omu ibaagiro, babaagwe nk'abaana b'entaama, nari nk'empaya z'entaama nainga z'embuzi." 
Jeremiah51:41 Ebishi Babulooni ekwatsirwe! Egyo eyaarangainwe omu nsi yoona esingwirwe! Ebishi Babulooni ebaire erikureetera amahanga kwesikura! 
Jeremiah51:42 Enyanja emizire Babulooni ebingonzi byayo ebirikwecunda byagishweka. 
Jeremiah51:43 Endembo zaayo niziiha omuntu ekikoba aha mutwe. Ehindukire ensi y'omushana mwingi n'eihamba, ensi etarikutuurwamu muntu n'omwe, kandi etarikurabwamu muntu weena." 
Jeremiah51:44 Reero ndyafubira Beli ey'omuri Babulooni, ngitanatsye ebi yaamizire, amahanga gabe gatakigihimintikaho kugiramya. Ebigo bya Babulooni bikumbagaire!" 
Jeremiah51:45 Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, nimugirugyemu; Buri omwe akize amagara, ahungye kashanga ya Nyakubaho." 
Jeremiah51:46 Emitima yaanyu erekye kugwa enshazi; kandi mutatiina, ahabw'amakuru agu murikuhurira omu nsi. Manya omu mwaka ku haija enkuru, omu gundi hakurataho endiijo. Mbwenu ensi erimu obubisha; omutegyeki naarwana n'ondiijo." 
Jeremiah51:47 N'ahabw'ekyo reeba, obunaku buryahika nfubire ebishushani bya Babulooni, ensi yaayo yoona eitwe enshoni; abaayo boona abaitsirwe bagirambiriranemu." 
Jeremiah51:48 Reero eiguru n'ensi, n'ebibirimu byona byeshongore nibyesiimirana Babulooni; ahabw'okuba ab'okugicwekyereza baryaija kugiteera nibaruga omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babulooni eshemereire kukumbagara, ahabw'Abaisiraeli abu yaitsire; n'ahabw'abantu b'omu nsi yoona abu yaitiise." 
Jeremiah51:50 Imwe abahonokire rurara, nimugyende, muteemerera! Mugume mwijukye Nyakubaho muri okwo hare; kandi mugume muteekateekye ahari Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Twitsirwe enshoni ahabw'okuhurira ebi barikutujuma, twahemuka, twabwerabwera, ahabw'okuba abanyamahanga baizire baataaha omu myanya erikwera ey'omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
Jeremiah51:52 Nikyo Nyakubaho arikugirira ati: Reeba, obunaku buryahika, nfubire ebishushani byayo ebirikuramibwa; ab'omu nsi yaayo boona abahutaire batsinde." 
Jeremiah51:53 Babulooni nobu eritunguuka, ekahika omu iguru, kandi nobu eryombeka ebigo by'amaani ebigumire, hoona ndyayohereza ab'okugicwekyereza, bagiteere; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Jeremiah51:54 Nimuhurire! Ekiboroogo ky'aba Babulooni! Orwari rw'abarikucwekyereza, abarikuruga omu nsi y'Abakaludaaya!" 
Jeremiah51:55 Manya Nyakubaho naahindura Babulooni amatongo; naahunamya eiraka ryayo ery'amaani. Ebimbuuro byabo nibihoorera nk'amaizi maingi; orwari rw'amaraka gaabo ruri ahaiguru; 
Jeremiah51:56 ahabw'okuba ab'okucwekyereza Babulooni bagiiziire; abarwani baayo bakwatsirwe, amata gaabo gaahendagurwa, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho ni Ruhanga ozimuura. Buzimazima naija kuhoora enzigu." 
Jeremiah51:57 Ndyasinza abakungu baayo, n'abanyabwengye baayo, abategyeki baayo, abakuru baayo b'engabo n'abarwani baayo; bagwejegyere bwamperayo, babure kusisiimuka. Nikwo Nyakusinga oyetwa Mukama ow'amahe arikugamba." 
Jeremiah51:58 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Ebigo bihango ebya Babulooni biryasheenyerwa kimwe, bibe obusaasingo, amarembo gaayo amaraingwa gookibwe. Ebi ago mahanga gaahendekyeire bigafeere busha; n'ebyagaruhize, muheru yaabyo ebe omuriro." 
Jeremiah51:59 Eki nikyo Yeremiya omurangi yaaragiire Seraaya, mwene Neriya mwijukuru wa Mahaseya, obu yaaza Babulooni hamwe na Zedekiya omugabe wa Buyuda, omu mwaka gwa kana ogw'omu busingye bwa Zedekiya ogwo. Seraaya akaba ari omugaragwa mukuru orikureeberera eby'omu kikaari ky'omugabe." 
Jeremiah51:60 Yeremiya akahandiika omu kitabo akagwe akaraagwere Babulooni, n'ebindi byona ebihandiikirwe ahari Babulooni." 
Jeremiah51:61 Yeremiya yaagira Seraaya ati: Ku orihika Babulooni, oshomere abaayo ebi bigambo byona." 
Jeremiah51:62 Kandi ogire oti: Ai Nyakubaho, okagamba ahari ogu mwanya, ngu oryagucwekyereza, gubure ekigutwiremu; yaaba muntu, yaaba nyamaishwa; gubeere kimwe eihamba ebiro byona." 
Jeremiah51:63 Reero ku oriheza kubashomera eki kitabo, okikomeho eibaare, okinagye omuri Eufuraati;" 
Jeremiah51:64 haza ogire oti: Oku nikwo Babulooni erimirwa, etagarukye kutuuhuuka bundi, ahabw'akagwe aku ndaagigwisize! Aha niho ebigambo bya Yeremiya byagarukira." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiya akaba omugabe aine emyaka makumi abiri na gumwe y'obukuru; yaategyekyera emyaka ikumi na gumwe omuri Yerusalemu. Nyina akaba naayetwa Hamutaali, muhara wa Yeremiya owa Libuna." 
Jeremiah52:2 Zedekiya ogwo akakora ebitarikusiimwa Nyakubaho, nk'ebi Yehoyakimu yaakozire." 
Jeremiah52:3 Buzimazima ahabw'ebintu kuba bityo omuri Yerusalemu n'omuri Buyuda, Nyakubaho abaayo akabagirira ekiniga, yaabeecweraho kimwe. Mbwenu Zedekiya akagomera omugabe wa Babulooni" 
Jeremiah52:4 omu mwaka gwa mwenda ogw'omu busingye bwe, omu kwezi kwa ikumi aha kiro kya ikumi eky'okwo kwezi, Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni yaija n'eihe rye ryona kuteera Yerusalemu. Baagigota, baagyombekaho eby'okugigoteraho okugyehinguririza." 
Jeremiah52:5 Rutyo orwo rurembo rwaguma rugotsirwe, okuhitsya omu mwaka gwa ikumi na gumwe ogw'omugabe Zedekiya." 
Jeremiah52:6 Aha kiro kya mwenda eky'okwezi kwa kana, enjara yaaba nyingi omu rurembo, yaahebesereza, abantu b'omuri egyo nsi baaburwa ekyokurya." 
Jeremiah52:7 Bwanyima baafumura ah'okuraba, omuri orwo rurembo. Abarwani boona baacwa, baaruga omu rurembo nyekiro, baaraba omu irembo ry'ahagati y'ebigo byombi, eby'aha musiri gw'omugabe; obwo Abakaludaaya beehinguririize orwo rurembo. Abo bantu baahunga, nibatoora ogurikuza Araba." 
Jeremiah52:8 Kwonka ab'eihe ry'Abakaludaaya baaza Omugabe Zedekiya omu kirari, baamuhambiza omu mpita za Yeriko; engabo ze zoona zaamuhungaho, zaataataana." 
Jeremiah52:9 Batyo baakwata ogwo mugabe, baamureetera omugabe wa Babulooni, baamushanga Ribula omu nsi ya Hamati; yaamucwera orubanja." 
Jeremiah52:10 Omugabe wa Babulooni yaita batabani ba Zedekiya, onu naabareeba; kandi okwo Ribula yaitirayo abategyeki ba Buyuda boona." 
Jeremiah52:11 Yaihamu Zedekiya amaisho, yaamukomesa emihama, yaamutwara Babulooni, yaamuta omu kihome; yaakigumamu okuhitsya obu yaafiire." 
Jeremiah52:12 Omu kwezi kwa kataano, aha kiro kya ikumi eky'okwo kwezi, omu mwaka gwa ikumi na mwenda ogwa Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni, Nebuzaaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi b'omugabe akataaha omuri Yerusalemu," 
Jeremiah52:13 yaayotsya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, na nyaruju y'omugabe, n'amaju ga Yerusalemu goona ageetwa amaju g'abantu bakuru goona yaagootsya." 
Jeremiah52:14 Eihe ry'Abakaludaaya, eri ogwo mukuru w'abarinzi yaabaire aine, ryasheenya ebigo byona ebyehinguririize Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah52:15 Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi, abantu abaabaire nibakiza abandi boona obworo yaabatwara bari enkwatwa, yaatwara n'abandi abaatsigaire omu rurembo, n'abaacwire bakeehongyera omugabe wa Babulooni, hamwe n'abanyamyoga abaabaire batsigaireyo." 
Jeremiah52:16 Kwonka Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi yaatsigayo bamwe omu baabaire nibakiza abandi obworo, kuguma nibakora omu misiri y'emizaabibu n'okuhinga endiijo misiri." 
Jeremiah52:17 Reero enyomyo z'emiringa ezaabaire ziri omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'ebitebe by'ebinaabiro, n'ekitanka ky'omuringa, Abakaludaaya baabisheenyagura, byona eby'emiringa baabitwara Babulooni." 
Jeremiah52:18 Kandi baatwara enyungu n'ebitiiho by'okuyooza eiju, n'eby'okuhembesa omuriro n'okuguraaza, n'ebinaabiro, n'enyabya z'obubaani, n'ebintu byona eby'emiringa ebirikukoresibwa omuri Nyaruju nibaramya." 
Jeremiah52:19 Kandi baatwara obwabya, n'eby'okuguhisa omuriro, n'enyabya z'ebitambo by'okushukwa n'enyungu, n'ebikondo by'amatabaaza, n'eby'okwotereraho obubaani n'enyabya z'emitoijo y'ebyokunywa. Ebintu byona ebyabaire biri eby'ezaabu, na byona ebyabaire biri eby'efeeza, ogwo mukuru w'abarinzi yaabitwara." 
Jeremiah52:20 Enyomyo ziri zombi, n'ekitanka, n'enimi ikumi na ibiri z'emiringa ezirikushutamwaho ekyo kitanka, n'ebitebe by'ebinaabiro ebi Omugabe Solomooni yaakoreire Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, emiringa y'ebyo byona ekaba erengyesereize oburemeezi." 
Jeremiah52:21 Oburaingwa bwa buri nyomyo bukaba buri mikono ikumi na munaana; eri mikono ikumi n'ebiri okugyehinguririza, kandi omuzimbwe gwayo niguhitsya enkumu ina; reero omunda eri omurangara." 
Jeremiah52:22 Aha mutwe gwayo hakaba hariho entwe y'omuringa, oburaingwa bwayo buri mikono etaano, harabainemu ebiri nk'akatimba n'amakomamahanga, byona biri eby'emiringa, kandi biri ahari egyo ntwe okugyehinguririza. Enyomyo ya kabiri nayo nikwo yaabaire eri, eriho amakomamahanga." 
Jeremiah52:23 Omu mbaju hakaba hakiikiizemu amakomamahanga makumi mwenda na mukaaga. Amakomamahanga goona agaabaire gari aha kirabainemu nk'akatimba gakyehinguririize, gakaba nigahika igana." 
Jeremiah52:24 Omukuru w'abarinzi akatwara Seraaya omuhongyerezi mukuru, na Zefaniya omuhongyerezi wa kabiri omu bukuru, n'abarinzi bashatu b'ekibuga kya Nyaruju." 
Jeremiah52:25 Kandi omuri orwo rurembo yaihamu omukuru w'abarwani, n'abashaija mushanju b'omu Ishengyero ry'omugabe, abu yaashangire omu rurembo. Yaatwara n'omuhandiiki w'omukuru w'eihe, owaabaire naategyeka abantu b'omuri egyo nsi. Yaataho abashaija makumi mukaaga b'omuri egyo nsi abu yaashangire omuri orwo rurembo." 
Jeremiah52:26 Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi yaabakwata, yaabatwarira omugabe wa Babulooni, yaabamushangisa Ribula." 
Jeremiah52:27 Omugabe wa Babulooni yaabateera yaabaitira Ribula omu nsi ya Hamati. Aba Yuda nikwo baihirwe batyo omu nsi yaabo, bakatwarwa bari enkwatwa." 
Jeremiah52:28 Mbwenu ogu nigwo mubaro gw'abu Nebukadenezaari yaatwaire bari enkwatwa. Omu mwaka gwa mushanju, akatwara Abayudaaya enkumi ishatu na makumi abiri na bashatu." 
Jeremiah52:29 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi na munaana ogw'omu busingye bwe, yaiha omuri Yerusalemu abantu magana munaana na makumi ashatu na babiri, yaabatwara bari enkwatwa." 
Jeremiah52:30 Kandi omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri n'eshatu ogw'omu busingye bwa Nebukadenezaari, Nebuzaradaani omukuru w'abarinzi akatwara Abayudaaya magana mushanju na makumi ana na bataano bari enkwatwa. Abantu boona baahika enkumi ina na magana mukaaga." 
Jeremiah52:31 Reero omu mwaka gwa makumi ashatu na mushanju, Yehoyakini omugabe wa Buyuda ari enkwatwa, omu kwezi kwa ikumi n'ebiri, aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bitaano eky'okwo kwezi, Evilimerodaaki omugabe wa Babulooni, omu mwaka ogu yaabeerairemu omugabe, akasaasira Yehoyakini omugabe wa Buyuda, yaamwiha omu kihome." 
Jeremiah52:32 Yaaguma naagamba gye nawe, yaamuha omwanya mukuru ogurikukira ey'abandi bagabe abu yaabaire aine Babulooni." 
Jeremiah52:33 Yehoyakini atyo yaajuura ebijwaro ebi yaabaire ajwariire omu kihome, yaaguma buri izooba naariira aha meeza y'omugabe, okumara ebiro by'amagara ge byona." 
Jeremiah52:34 Kandi ahabw'eby'okumutunga, omugabe yaaguma naamuha omugabo gwe ogutarikwosha, nk'oku buri izooba yaabaire naayetenga. Yaaguma naamutwaza atyo, okuhitsya obu Yehoyakini yaafiire." 
Lamentations1:1 Ka n'eihano, orurembo orwabaire rwijwire abantu kugira eirungu! Ka neihano orwabaire ruri rukuru omu mahanga, kuba nk'omufaakazi! Orwabaire ruri omugabekazi w'ezindi ndembo, rubaire orw'okutoija." 
Lamentations1:2 Nyekiro nirurira munonga, amarira garwitururukira aha matama. Omu barikurukunda boona haburamu ow'okuruhuumuriza. Banywani baarwo boona barureebize; baaba abazigu baarwo," 
Lamentations1:3 Abaayuda bazaahiibwe, ngu bareebesibwe enaku, bahindurwe abahuuku. Hati batwire omu mahanga, tibaine h'okuhuumurira; abaababingire babahambize boona, enaku zibakondahiriire." 
Lamentations1:4 Emihanda erikuza Siyooni neecura, ahabw'okuba tihariho orikuza aha magyenyi agaatairweho. Amarembo gaayo goona n'eirungu. Abahongyerezi baayo nibatsinda; abaishiki baayo bareebesiibwe enaku. Kandi nayo neebonabona munonga!" 
Lamentations1:5 Ababisha baayo nibo bahindukire abakama, abazigu baayo bagogyeire. Nyakubaho agireebeise enaku, ahabw'ebicumuro byayo bingi. Abaana baayo bagyenzire bari enkwatwa, bafunyirwe abazigu baabo." 
Lamentations1:6 Siyooni nyamurungi ekitiinwa kigihwaireho. Abategyeki baayo babaire nk'empara zibuzire ah'okuriira; baahunga abaababingire nibakooza. 
Lamentations1:7 Yerusalemu, omu biro byayo by'okubonabona n'okuzengyerera, neijuka ebintu byona eby'obuguzi bwingi ebyabaire biri ebyayo omu biro bya ira. Abantu baayo ku baagwire omu mikono y'abazigu, haabura ow'okugiha emikono, abazigu baagireebesa ekiziizi, baagishekyeerera, ahabw'okugwa kwayo." 
Lamentations1:8 Yerusalemu ekacumura munonga, nikyo yaahindukiire ekihagaro. Abaabaire nibagiha ekitiinwa bakagigaya, ahabw'okuba eri entangaare; eego nayo neetsinda ehungikire omushaya." 
Lamentations1:9 Oburofa bwayo bukaba buri omu ki eyezirikire. Tereetaire ha birigibaho aha muheru; Nikyo okugwa kwayo kurikutiinisiza, kandi teine w'okugihuumuriza. Ai Nyakubaho, reeba oku mbonaboine, ahabw'okuba omuzigu asingwire." 
Lamentations1:10 Omuzigu akununkiriize omukono gwe ebintu byayo byona eby'obuguzi bwingi. Eego, ereebire abanyamahanga nibahurura kutaaha omu Mwanya gwayo ogurikwera abu waazibiire kutaaha ahu abantu baawe bateeraniire." 
Lamentations1:11 Abantu baayo boona nibatsinda nibaza kushaka ebyokurya. Nibahayo ebi batungire kugura ebyokurya by'okubagaruramu amaani. 
Lamentations1:12 Imwe mwena abarikuhingura, ekyo timukyetaireho? Mureebe kandi mwetegyereze, ku haraabe hariho oine obusaasi, oburi nk'obwangye obumpikireho, obu Mukama ambonaboneseise, aha kiro ki agiriireho ekiniga kingi." 
Lamentations1:13 Ayemire ahaiguru, yaayohereza omuriro gwashenshera omu magufa gangye. Yaatega ebigyere byangye ekigoye, yangarura enyima. Yantsiga nyeshobeire, naarenzya eizooba ngwire enshazi." 
Lamentations1:14 Akakomerana ebibi byangye, byarugwamu omugamba. Omukono gwe gwaba nigwo gwabikomerana. Yaabinta omu bitsya, yaammaramu amaani. Nyakubaho akandekurira abu ntarikubaasa kugungira." 
Lamentations1:15 Nyakubaho agayiise abarwani bangye boona amamanzi, ababaire bari omuriinye, yaahuruza emigogo kundwanisa, kusingyeera abtsigazi bangye. Nyakubaho aribatiriire omwishiki wa Yuda oshugaine, nk'oku baribatiirira emizaabibu omu inyuukiro rya viino." 
Lamentations1:16 Ebyo nibyo birikundiza, amaisho gakahimintika amarira; ahabw'okuba omuhuumuza owaakungumize ari hare. Abaana bangye n'emburaburirwa, ahabw'okuba omuzigu asingwire." 
Lamentations1:17 Siyooni neetega emikono, kwonka tihariho n'omwe orikugihuumuriza. Mukama aragiire bataahi ba Yakobo kuba abazigu be, bakamurwanisa. Yerusalemu omuribo ehindukire ekihagaro." 
Lamentations1:18 Nyakubaho niwe ahikire, ahabw'okuba nkagomera ebiragiro bye. Kwonka mbwenu, imwe bantu 'mwe mwena, nimuhurire kandi mureebe oku ndikubonabona. Empangare zangye n'abatsigazi bangye bagiire omu bukwatwa."
