Lamentations1:19 Nkatakira nkunzi zangye kumpa emikono, kwonka zandeebya. Abahongyerezi bangye n'abakuru omu ihanga baacwekyererera omu rurembo nibasherura ebyokurya by'okubagaruramu amaani." 
Lamentations1:20 Ai Nyakubaho, ndeeba, ahabw'okuba enaku n'ez'okuunyita. Nyemereize omutima, omunda ninkaanyuurwa, ahabw'okuba mbaire omugomi orengyesereize. Omu nguuto rurara nencwa amabeere, omu nju ni nk'abamazirweho rufu." 
Lamentations1:21 Hurira oku ndikutsinda, ntaine orikumpuumuriza. Abazigu bangye boona bahuriire oku ngwereirwe akagwe. Nibeesiima ngu ahabw'okuba niiwe okikozire, mbwenu hikiiriza juba ekiro ki waaraganiise; nabo babe nkaanye." 
Lamentations1:22 K'ebibi byabo byona bireebwe omu maisho gaawe; obagire nk'oku ongizire nontura ebicumuro byangye byona! Manya amaganya gangye ni maingi, n'omutima gwangye gugwire enshazi." 
Lamentations2:1 Ebishi Nyakubaho areeteire Siyooni kushwekwa omwirima, agiiniire ekiniga! Ekitiinwa kya Isiraeli akitimbiize omu iguru yaakinaga ahansi; ahabw'ekiniga tiyaijuka ndibatiro ye." 
Lamentations2:2 Nyakubaho acwekyereize amaka ga Yakobo, ataine saasi. Ahabw'ekiniga kye ekingi yaasheenyagura ebigo bya muhara wa Yuda. Abundikire obugabe n'abategyeki baabwo, yaabihemura." 
Lamentations2:3 Amazireho amaani ga Isiraeli goona, againiire ekiniga kingi, yaahinya omukono gwe gwa buryo, abazigu baizire kuteera. Yaayatsya omuriro omuri Yakobo, gwanaga enkobe gwacwekyereza byona ebiguhereire." 
Lamentations2:4 Ananwire obuta bwe nk'omuzigu, yaabanga omukono gwe gwa buryo, nk'omubisha, yaita boona ababaire nibatwesiimisa, yaamarira aha ihema rya Siyooni erirungi ekiniga kye ekiri nk'omuriro." 
Lamentations2:5 Nyakubaho abaire nk'omuzigu yaacwekyereza Isiraeli. Yaacwekyereza emyanya yaayo yoona, ebigo byayo yaabihindura amatongo, yaakanyisa okucura n'okutonzya omuri muhara wa Yuda." 
Lamentations2:6 Yaasheenya akasiisira ke, nk'oku basheenya ak'aha musiri. Omwanya gw'amagyenyi ge agaataireho yaagucwa amatongo. Nyakubaho amariireho kimwe omuri Siyooni obugyenyi na Sabato ebyatairweho, yaabinga omugabe n'omuhongyerezi abainiire ekiniga kingi." 
Lamentations2:7 Nyakubaho agayire eitambiro rye, yaatamirwa kimwe omwanya gwe ogurikwera. Ebigo by'ebikaari bye yaabirekurira omuzigu. Akaari kaateererwa omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, nk'aku bateera aha kiro ky'obugyenyi obwatairweho." 
Lamentations2:8 Nyakubaho amaririire kusheenyera kimwe ekigo kya muhara wa Siyooni, yaakigyeresa omugoye; tiyaahinya mukono gwe kureka kukicwekyereza. Yaareetera ab'omu minaara n'ab'omu bisiika kucura; amaani gaabahwamu kumwe." 
Lamentations2:9 Amarembo gaayo gakyengyereire okuzimu Ahendagwire empimbi zaayo, yaazimaraho. Omugabe waayo n'abategyeki baazaahira omu mahanga. Eiteeka tiryakiriho; n'abarangi baayo tibakitunga bi Nyakubaho arikubooreka." 
Lamentations2:10 Abakuru omu ihanga, aba muhara wa Siyooni, bashutami ahansi bacecekire. Beeshukire eiju omu mutwe, bajwaire ebiguniya. N'abaishiki ba Yerusalemu bajuumaire ahansi." 
Lamentations2:11 Ndizire, amaisho gamponoka. Nyemereize omutima, mpwairemu amaani, enaku n'ez'okuunyita ahabw'okucwekyerezibwa kw'abantu bangye. Manya abaana n'abeereere nibagwera enshazi omu bihandagazi by'orurembo." 
Lamentations2:12 Nibatakira baanyinabo bati: Omugaati na viino birahi? Nibagwera enshazi omu bihandagazi by'orurembo nk'abahutaire. Nibahononokyera omu bifuba bya baanyinabo. 
Lamentations2:13 Iwe Yerusalemu 'we, mbwenu nkugambeho ki, kandi nkugyeranise na ki? Nkushushanise na ki, mbone kukuhuumuriza, iwe Siyooni oshugaine? Manya okucwekyerera kwawe, ku kuraabe kuri kuhango nk'enyanja, n'oha oraakugarureho?" 
Lamentations2:14 Abarangi baawe bakureebeire okworekwa kw'ebishuba, kandi okurikuhabisa. Tibaakworeka butunu bicumuro byawe, kukutambira okuzaahibwa, kureka bakuraguriire eby'ebishuba, kandi ebirikuhabisa." 
Lamentations2:15 Abahinguzi boona nibakuteerera entomi ahansi. Nibakweshaanya, iwe Yerusalemu, bakuzongoreza omutwe. Nibagira bati: Beitu oru nirwo rurembo orwabaire nirwetwa nyamurungi, oru ensi yoona eshemerererwa?" 
Lamentations2:16 Abazigu baawe boona nibakujuma, nibeeshaanya, nibanena amaino, nibagira, bati: Otyo! Manya eri niryo izooba ri twabaire nitwenda. Mbwenu twaritunga twarireeba!" 
Lamentations2:17 Nyakubaho akozire eki yaacumire, Yaahikiiriza eki yaahayire; nk'oku yaakigiriire enaama kare. Yaashenyagura ataine saasi, yaareetera omuzigu kukweraatira, kandi yaatunguura abazigu baawe, baakukiza amaani." 
Lamentations2:18 Mbwenu iwe Siyooni 'we, takira munonga Nyakubaho! Nyomushana na nyekiro amarira gaawe gahimintikye nk'omutunga. Otatuuza, n'amarira gaawe gatooma." 
Lamentations2:19 Imuka otakye nyekiro, ahu abarinzi batandikira. Osheeshuurire Nyakubaho ebikuri aha mutima, nk'orikushuka amaizi. Omutegye emikono ahabw'amagara g'abaana baawe, abu enjara erikugwisiza enshazi omu nteeraniro z'emihanda." 
Lamentations2:20 Ai Nyakubaho, reeba, oyetegyereze! Ni baahi abu orareebeise enaku otyo? Mbwenu abakazi bashemereire kurya abaana bu baazaire, abu baayeyororoire? Abahongyerezi n'abarangi bashemereire kwitirwa omu mwanya gwa Nyakubaho ogurikwera?" 
Lamentations2:21 Reeba, abato n'abakuru barambiriraine omu mucuucu gw'omu bihandagazi. Empangare zangye n'abatsigazi bangye baitsirwe rurara; waabaita aha izooba ri waagiriireho ekiniga, haza waabaita otaine saasi." 
Lamentations2:22 Oyetsire abarikuunyitsa obwoba, abaanyehinguririize, nk'oku beeta abantu aha izooba, ri waagiriireho ekiniga, tihaagira waakira, nari owaahonokaho. Abo bantu bu naakiikiire nkoorora, omuzigu abacwekyereize." 
Lamentations3:1 Niinye muntu oreebesiibwe enaku enkoni, ei Nyakubaho anteerize anyiniire ekiniga." 
Lamentations3:2 Ambingire, yampitsya omu mwirima, ahataine kuhweza kwona." 
Lamentations3:3 Buzimazima agumire ambangiire omukono buri kaanya, yaarugaho yaarenzya eizooba." 
Lamentations3:4 Engingo zangye n'omubiri gwangye abihwereize; amagufa gangye yaagahendagura. 
Lamentations3:5 Angoteise, yankubakubisa obushaarirwa n'omugango." 
Lamentations3:6 Yangumya omu mwirima nk'abaafiire ira. 
Lamentations3:7 Anyezigurize orugo ngu ntakaacwa; yankomesa enjegyere ziremeire. 
Lamentations3:8 Nobu nyeta, nkataka ngu ampe emikono, okushaba kwangye ayanga kukuhurira." 
Lamentations3:9 Emihanda yangye agiitiise amabaare gashongoire; yaakiikamya otuhanda twangye. 
Lamentations3:10 Ambeereire nk'edubu egwereire, nari nk'entare eyesherekire." 
Lamentations3:11 Anteishwize omuhanda gwangye; yantaanyagura, yampindura emburaburirwa." 
Lamentations3:12 Ananwire obuta, yampindura ekimaasho ky'omwambi gwe;" 
Lamentations3:13 emyambi y'omu mutana gwe yaagimarira omu mutima gwangye. 
Lamentations3:14 Naahinduka eky'okushekyeererwa ab'omu mahanga goona; eky'okugaaniizibwa eizooba ryona, nibaanyeshongora." 
Lamentations3:15 Anyigutsize ebirikushaarira; yaanywaisa ekibombo. 
Lamentations3:16 Amaino gangye aganeneise amabaare, yandiisa eiju rya kashenda." 
Lamentations3:17 Mbuzirwe obusingye, nyebirwe oku okushemererwa kushusha." 
Lamentations3:18 Nikyo ndikugirira nti: Amaani gampweiremu; tinkiiniire Nyakubaho matsiko. 
Lamentations3:19 Ijuka okubonabona kwangye n'obusaasi bwangye ebiri nk'endurwe n'ekibombo. 
Lamentations3:20 Obutoosha ku mbiteekateeka nyeinamirira. 
Lamentations3:21 Kwonka ku mbiijuka, ngarukwamu amatsiko." 
Lamentations3:22 Rukundo ya Nyakubaho etahararuka tehwaho; n'embabazi ze tizigira bugarukiro. 
Lamentations3:23 Ziba nsya buri kasheeshe, kandi n'obwesigwa bwe ni bwingi." 
Lamentations3:24 Nikyo ndikugirira nti: Nyakubaho niwe mugabo gwangye, ndyaguma mmwineho amatsiko." 
Lamentations3:25 Nyakubaho ni murungi aha bamutegyereza; aha muntu omusherura. 
Lamentations3:26 Ni kirungi omuntu kugumisiriza, akategyereza Nyakubaho kumujuna." 
Lamentations3:27 Ni kirungi omuntu kuheeka omugamba naakinyeeta; 
Lamentations3:28 akashutama wenka acecekire, Nyakubaho yaaheza kugumuheekyesa." 
Lamentations3:29 Ate eminwa ye omu mucuucu, obundi hakaabaho amatsiko." 
Lamentations3:30 Ategye omushaya orikwenda kumuteera, ayemere ebijumo." 
Lamentations3:31 Manya Nyakubaho taricwera kimwe omuntu ebiro byona. 
Lamentations3:32 Nobu yaakusaasa omuntu; hoona aryamugirira esaasi, nk'oku rukundo ye etahararuka eba nyingi munonga." 
Lamentations3:33 Ahabw'okuba tabonabonesa bantu nkana, n'obu kwakuba okubagwisa kubi." 
Lamentations3:34 Okusingyeera embohe z'omu nsi zoona," 
Lamentations3:35 okuzibira omuntu kutunga ekimushemereire omu maisho ga Rukiraboona," 
Lamentations3:36 n'okwitira omuntu orubanja; ebyo byona Nyakubaho tabisiima. 
Lamentations3:37 N'oha orarahiire kikabaho, Nyakubaho atakitebeekaniise?" 
Lamentations3:38 Mbwenu ebirungi n'ebibi tibiruga omu kuragiira kwa Rukiraboona? 
Lamentations3:39 Omuntu ohuriire akaayetombooteire ki afubiirwe ahabw'ebibi bye? 
Lamentations3:40 Ka tureebe, twetegyereze emitwarize yaitu. Haza tugarukire Nyakubaho." 
Lamentations3:41 Ka twimukize Ruhanga ow'omu iguru emitima yaitu 
Lamentations3:42 Tucumwire twagoma; naiwe tiwaatusaasira. 
Lamentations3:43 Oyehumbikire ekiniga, waatubinga, waatwita otaine saasi." 
Lamentations3:44 Oyehumbikire ekicu, okushaba kwaitu kwaremwa kukyogamu." 
Lamentations3:45 Otuhindwire ekumbwe n'esingo omu mahanga. 
Lamentations3:46 Abazigu baitu boona nibatujuma, batuherebura." 
Lamentations3:47 Twitsirwe obwoba, twagwa omu busya, twacwekyerera, twahwaho." 
Lamentations3:48 Amaisho gangye nigahimintika emitunga y'amarira ahabw'okuhwerekyerera kw'abantu bangye. 
Lamentations3:49 Amaisho gangye nigatorongyeza obutaitsya, gatarikurereera," 
Lamentations3:50 okuhitsya obu Nyakubaho araayeme omu iguru akanaga eriisho aha nsi, akareeba." 
Lamentations3:51 Ngizire obujune bwingi, naareeba ab'omu rurembo rwangye boona bagwereirwe akagwe." 
Lamentations3:52 Abazigu bangye abaanyangiire busha, bampiigire nk'enyonyi." 
Lamentations3:53 Bannagire omu kiina mpuriire, banteereramu amabaare;" 
Lamentations3:54 amaizi gandengyera aha mutwe, naagira nti: Mbwenu ho naafeera kimwe." 
Lamentations3:55 Ai Nyakubaho, nkeema okuzimu omu kiina naakutakira." 
Lamentations3:56 Naiwe waahurira okweshengyereza kwangye ningira nti: Otanga kuntega okutu ninkutakira kunjuna. 
Lamentations3:57 Ku naakutakiire, wairira haihi, wampuumuriza oti: Otatiina." 
Lamentations3:58 Ai Nyakubaho, okandwanaho, waacungura amagara gangye." 
Lamentations3:59 Ai Nyakubaho, oku banshaagiize okureebire; Mbwenu nu, ondwaneho." 
Lamentations3:60 Oreebire oku boona barikumpoora, n'oku barikungiira omu naama y'okundwanisa." 
Lamentations3:61 Ai Nyakubaho, ohuriire oku barikunjuma, n'oku barikungiira omu naama kundwanisa." 
Lamentations3:62 Abaanyimukiriire nibarenzya eizooba nibateekateeka kandi nibagamba eby'okundwanisa. 
Lamentations3:63 Reeba oku barikushutama n'oku barikwimuka, obwo ndi ekigaaniizo kyabo." 
Lamentations3:64 Ai Nyakubaho, obazimuurire nk'ebi bakozire oku biri." 
Lamentations3:65 Emitima yaabo ogihindure ekitsire, omukyeeno gwawe gubagumeho." 
Lamentations3:66 Ai Nyakubaho, obabingye obainiire ekiniga, obacwekyereze obamarire kimwe ahansi y'eiguru ryawe." 
Lamentations4:1 Ebishi ezaabu eiragwire! Ebishi ezaabu empuuhe ehindukire okundi! Amabaare g'omwanya ogurikwera ganaganagirwe ahu emihanda erikutaanira. 
Lamentations4:2 Abaana ba Yerusalemu abarungi munonga nk'ezaabu eshemeziibwe, ka bainganisiibwe n'enyungu z'eibumba, ezi omubumbi anogooza engaro!" 
Lamentations4:3 Nangwa na zaamuha ziha ebyana byazo amabwabwa, zibyontsya, kwonka muhara w'abantu bangye abaire enshaarizi, nka zaamaaya z'omu ihamba." 
Lamentations4:4 Endimi z'abarikwonka ziramatiire omu nkanka; abaana nibashaba ebyokurya, habura owaabibaha." 
Lamentations4:5 Abaabaire barya ebirungire, hati nibahwerekyererera omu bihandagazi. Abaayoroirwe bajwaire ebya bujwa, hati nibarambira ahi baata eiju." 
Lamentations4:6 Manya ebicumuro bya muhara w'abantu bangye, nibikira ebibi bya Sodoma eyaacwekyereziibwe ahonaaho, hataine ogikorizeho orukumu." 
Lamentations4:7 Abainginya baayo bakaba nibengyengyeta okukira orubaare, nibeera okukira amate; emibiri yaabo neemwamwatikana okukira amabaare garikutukurikana; oburungi bwabo buri nk'obw'amabaare g'emyengyengye." 
Lamentations4:8 Mbwenu aha maisho gaabo nihakiza enziro okwiragura. Tibaakimanywa owaababugana omu muhanda. Omubiri gwabo guramataine n'amagufa, gwomire gwaba nk'oruku." 
Lamentations4:9 Abaitsirwe rurara bakahita abaitsirwe enjara; bahwaire aha magufa, ahabw'okuburwa ebyezire omu misiri." 
Lamentations4:10 Abakazi b'embabazi bakeecwa amabeere, baateeka abaana baabo baabarya, muhara w'abantu bangye naahwerekyerera." 
Lamentations4:11 Nyakubaho arekuriire kimwe ekiniga kye ekingi, yaayohora kashanga ye erikubuguma, yaayatsya omuriro omuri Siyooni" 
Lamentations4:12 Abagabe b'omu nsi, n'obu baakuba abantu abatwire omu nsi yoona, bakaba batarikwikiriza ngu omubisha nari omuzigu naabaasa kutaaha omuri Yerusalemu areetsirwe eirembo." 
Lamentations4:13 Ekyareetsire ebyo, n'ebibi by'abarangi baayo hamwe n'ebicumuro by'abahongyerezi baayo abaashesheire ahagati yaayo eshagama y'abahikiriire." 
Lamentations4:14 Bakabandagira omu nguuto nk'empumi, bahagaziibwe eshagama; hataine orikubaasa kukora aha bi bajwaire." 
Lamentations4:15 Abantu babagira bati: Nimurugyeho, imwe bahagaire 'mwe, nimurugyeho, nimurugyeho! Mutagira eki mwakoraho. Baaba batyo empungi n'ebizengyerezi. Abantu b'omu mahanga baagira bati: Bataguma naitwe obundi!" 
Lamentations4:16 Nyakubaho wenka abataataaniise, takyenda kubareeba. Abahongyerezi tibaagira w'okubaha ekitiinwa, n'abakuru omu ihanga baabura ow'okubeetaho." 
Lamentations4:17 Amaisho gaatugwa omu nkiro, tweruhiize busha, nitutegyereza okuhwerwa. Omuri okwo kuhanga amaisho, twategyereza eihanga ritarikubaasa kujuna." 
Lamentations4:18 Abantu baaguma baturi omu ntegye, twabura obutooro. Muheru yaitu yairira haihi, ebiro byaba mbarwa; twahitsya." 
Lamentations4:19 Abatubingire baakiza amahungu g'omu kaabunga obwira. Baatuza omu kirari, twahika omu nshozi, baatuhambiza omu ihamba." 
Lamentations4:20 Ou Nyakubaho yaasiigire amajuta, otubaisaho, baamukwatira omu busya bwabo. Niwe ogwo ou twabaire nitwesiga ngu ku turiba turi omu mahanga, turyamuhungiraho, aturinde." 
Lamentations4:21 Imwe Banyaedomu 'mwe, n'abatwire omu nsi ya Uuzi, mushemererwe, mwesiime! Kwonka naimwe muryagwerwa akagwe, mutaruze mujwaire busha, muhemukye." 
Lamentations4:22 Iwe muhara wa Siyooni 'we, ekifubiro ky'ebicumuro byawe kyahwaire. Takikuzaasya bundi. Kwonka iwe muhara wa Edomu 'we, aryakufubira ahabw'ebicumuro byawe, ayerure ebibi byawe." 
Lamentations5:1 Ai Nyakubaho, ijuka akagwe kaatugweraire; oreebe kandi oyetegyereze oku tuhemukire!" 
Lamentations5:2 Obutaka bwaitu buhungwirwe abu tutarikumanyana nabo; amaka gaitu gaatwarwa abanyamahanga. 
Lamentations5:3 Tubaire efuuzi ezitaine baishezo; baamaaweitwe baaba abafaakazi. 
Lamentations5:4 Nitwihurira amaizi gu turikunywa, tutaho n'okugura enku zi turikutunga." 
Lamentations5:5 Nibatufunya batuheekyeise emigamba, batukoresa obutaitsya, batarikutuha kahuumuro." 
Lamentations5:6 Nitutega Abanyamisiri n'Abasiriya engaro, ngu takaabona ebyokurya by'okututunga." 
Lamentations5:7 Baatatenkuriitwe bakacumura, kwonka tibaakiriho. Mbwenu ebibi byabo niitwe bihingamiire." 
Lamentations5:8 Abahuuku nibo barikututegyeka, kandi titwine w'okubatujuna." 
Lamentations5:9 Ebyokurya byaitu nitubitunga twogire amagara, ahabw'abatugwereire na rurara omu ihamba." 
Lamentations5:10 Emibiri yaitu ehembire omuriro nk'ogw'omu iziiko, ahabw'enjara mpango etuteire." 
Lamentations5:11 Abakazi nibahambirwa omuri Siyooni, n'abaishiki baitu batandirwa omu ndembo za Yuda." 
Lamentations5:12 Abategyeki baitu nibahanikwa emikono ekomeirwe ahaiguru; abakuru baitu omu ihanga tibarikugirirwa ibanga. 
Lamentations5:13 Abatsigazi baitu nibahatwa kwekorera emengo z'okusa. Aboojo bataruza beekoreire emba z'enku. 
Lamentations5:14 Abagurusi tibaakishutama mu irembo, n'abatsigazi tibaakiteera nanga." 
Lamentations5:15 Titwakiine kushemererwa, n'okuzina kwaitu kuhindukire okucura." 
Lamentations5:16 Ekirunga kiturugire aha mutwe kyagwa. Ai bambe, twagwerwa akagwe! Manya tukacumura." 
Lamentations5:17 Nikyo emitima yaitu egwereire enshazi, amaisho gaitu gakagiibwaho oruho." 
Lamentations5:18 Ahabw'okuba Orushozi Siyooni ku rubaire omushaka, zaamuha zaaruhindura eikobezo ryazo." 
Lamentations5:19 Kwonka, ai Mukama, niiwe otegyeka ebiro byona. Ekitebe kyawe ky'obugabe kigumaho obusingye bwona." 
Lamentations5:20 Ahabw'enki ogumire otwebirwe? Ahabw'enki omazire omwanya muraingwa gutyo otutsigireho? 
Lamentations5:21 Ai Nyakubaho, otwegarurire, tubone kugarukaho. Garura busya ebiro byaitu, bibe nka kare." 
Lamentations5:22 Mbwenu shi otunagiire kimwe? Nainga shi otwiniire ekiniga kitaine bugarukiro? 
Ezekiel1:1 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'eshatu, omu kwezi kwa kana, aha kiro kya kataano eby'okwo kwezi, ku naabaire ndi omu baazaahiire aha mugyera Kebari, eiguru ryakinguuka, Ruhanga yaambonekyera." 
Ezekiel1:2 Aha kiro kya kataano eky'okwo kwezi (obwo guri omwaka gwa kataano, omugabe Yehoyakini azaahiibwe)," 
Ezekiel1:3 nyowe Ezekieli omuhongyerezi mwene Buuzi, Nyakubaho aine eki yangambiire ndi omu nsi y'Abakaludaaya, aha mugyera Kebari. Okwo niyo amaani ga Mukama gaanyiziireho." 
Ezekiel1:4 Ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba omuyaga gw'eihunga, gwaruga omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho; kandi gwehinguririziibwe ekicu kihango kirikumurinkana, n'omuriro ogwabaire nigurugwamu omurabyo gutarikuremuura; n'ahagati y'ogwo muriro harimu ekiri nk'omuringa gurikwengyengyeta." 
Ezekiel1:5 Reero omuri ekyo kintu haarugamu ebirikushushana n'enyamaishwa ina, kandi ezirikushusha abantu;" 
Ezekiel1:6 kwonka buri emwe eine obuso buna n'amapapa ana. 
Ezekiel1:7 Amaguru gaazo gakaba gagororokire, n'ebigyere byazo nibishusha eby'enyana; kandi nibimurinkana nk'omuringa guzigwire." 
Ezekiel1:8 Omunda y'amapapa gaazo, aha mbaju zaazo ina, zikaba ziine engaro nk'ez'abantu. Kandi ezo nyamaishwa ina zikaba ziine obuso n'amapapa ebyemi biti." 
Ezekiel1:9 Amapapa gaazo gakaba nigakoranaho. Buri emwe ekagumizamu neegyenda etarikuhinduka. 
Ezekiel1:10 Emisusire yaazo; buri emwe ekaba eine aha maisho hana, hatarikushushana; ahamwe haine obuso nk'obw'omuntu omumaisho, ahandi nk'obw'entare aha rubaju rwa buryo, n'ahandi nk'obw'enimi aha rwa bumosho, kandi nk'obw'eishamba enyima." 
Ezekiel1:11 Okwo nikwo zaabaire nizishusha ahamaisho. Reero amapapa gaazo gakaba gashashaanwire ahaiguru; buri nyamaishwa eine amapapa abiri, buri rimwe nirikora aha rya ngyenzi yaayo, kandi abiri zigagwisiize aha mibiri yaazo." 
Ezekiel1:12 Buri emwe ekagumizamu neetoora ei omuyaga gurikugarura; zaaguma nizigyenda zitarikuhinduka. 
Ezekiel1:13 Ahagati y'ebyo bihangwa biine amagara, hakaba hariho ekintu ekirikushushana n'amakara g'omuriro agarikwaka; gari nk'emuri ezirikukora oku n'oku ahagati yaabyo. Kandi ogwo muriro gukaba nigwaka nigurugwamu omurabyo." 
Ezekiel1:14 Haza ebyo bihangwa biine amagara byaguma nibikora oku n'oku n'engoga nk'omurabyo gurikutyankana. 
Ezekiel1:15 Mbwenu ku naabaire nkihangire amaisho ebyo bihangwa biine amagara, naareeba aha rubaju rwabyo enyamuziga ina ezirikukora ahansi; buri kihangwa ahari ezo nyamuziga ina kiineho eyaakyo." 
Ezekiel1:16 Emisusire y'ezo nziga n'oku zaabaire zikozirwe, zikaba nizengyengyeta nk'eibaare ry'omwengyengye. Kandi ezo nziga ina zikaba nizishushana, zikozirwe nka nyamuziga erabainemu n'endiijo." 
Ezekiel1:17 Ku zaabaire ziba nizigyenda, zitoora oku n'oku omu mbaju zaazo ina, zigumiizemu zitarikuhinduka." 
Ezekiel1:18 Ezo nziga ina zikaba ziine empanka n'enyomyo; empanka zaazo ziijwire amaisho okuzeehinguririza. 
Ezekiel1:19 Ebyo bihangwa biine amagara ku byabaire bigyenda, zaanyamuziga zibigyendera aha rubaju; kandi ku byabaire biimuka ahansi, nazo ziimuka." 
Ezekiel1:20 Ei omuyaga gwabaire gugarura nabyo bizayo, n'enyamuziga ziimuka nabyo; ahabw'okuba omutima gw'ebyo bihangwa biine amagara gukaba guri omuri zaanyamuziga." 
Ezekiel1:21 Ei byabaire biza nazo zizayo; bikyemerera, nazo zeemerera, kandi bikiimuka ahansi n'ezo nziga ziimuka nabyo; ahabw'okuba omutima gw'ebyo bihangwa ebiine amagara, gukaba guri omuri ezo nyamuziga." 
Ezekiel1:22 Aha mitwe y'ebyo bihangwa biine amagara hakaba hariho ekirikushusha eiguru, nikimurinkana nk'eibaare ry'omwengyengye, kibambarami eruguru y'emitwe yaabyo." 
Ezekiel1:23 Ahansi y'ekyo kintu kirikushusha eiguru, amapapa gaabyo gakaba gashashaanwire, buri rimwe nirireebana na rigyenzi ryaryo, kandi buri kihangwa kiine amapapa abiri agashwekire omubiri gwakyo." 
Ezekiel1:24 Ku byagyenzire, naahurira endigito y'amapapa gaabyo eri nk'ey'amaizi garikuborogota, nk'okuhinda kw'Ow'obushoboorozi bwona; obwaku bw'egyo ndigito buri nk'orwari rw'eihe ry'engabo. Reero ku byayemereire, byagwisa amapapa gaabyo," 
Ezekiel1:25 haareetana eiraka niriruga eruguru y'ekirikushusha eiguru, ahaiguru y'emitwe yaabyo." 
Ezekiel1:26 Kandi eruguru y'ekirikushusha eiguru, ahaiguru y'emitwe yaabyo, hakaba hariho ekirikushushana n'ekitebe ky'obugabe, kyemi nk'eibaare rirungi rya bururu. Ekyabaire kishutami eruguru y'ekirikushusha ekitebe ky'obugabe kikaba nikishusha omuntu." 
Ezekiel1:27 Okwiha aha kirikushusha amanyaanya ge okugarura eruguru nkareeba ekirikushusha omuringa gurikumurinkana, oguri nk'omuriro gw'ehinguririizeho embaju zoona. Okwiha aha kirikushusha amanyaanya ge, okugarura eifo, naareeba ekiri nk'omuriro, kandi ogwo muntu ayehinguririziibwe ekimurinkano." 
Ezekiel1:28 Ekyo kimurinkano ekyabaire kyehinguririizeho, kikaba kyemi nk'omuhanganzima ogureebeka omu bicu enjura neeza kugwa. Okwo nikwo ekirikushusha ekitiinwa kya Nyakubaho kyareebekire. Ku naakireebire, naagwa ahansi njuumaire, kandi naahurira eiraka ry'orikugamba." 
Ezekiel2:1 Ogwo orikugamba akangira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, imuka oyemerere, ngambe naiwe." 
Ezekiel2:2 Ku yangambiire atyo, Mutima yanzamu, yaanyemereza; naahurira ori nangambira," 
Ezekiel2:3 ati: Iwe muntu 'we, ninkutuma aha Baisiraeli eihanga ry'abagomi abangomeire. Bo na baishebo bakancumuraho okuhitsya eri izooba." 
Ezekiel2:4 Abo bantu n'enyarubwa kandi n'ebitsire; nimbakutumaho, obagire oti: Mukama Ruhanga aine eki arikubagambira." 
Ezekiel2:5 Yaaba bahurira nari banga, manya n'abagomi, hoona nibaija kumanya ku omuribo habaire harimu omurangi." 
Ezekiel2:6 Kandi iwe muntu 'we, otabatiina, n'obu kwakuba okutiinisibwa ebi barigamba. Nobu oraabe ori omu mikwatangwe n'omu mahwa, oshutamiire ebinyabushegu, otatiinisibwa ebi barikugamba, n'obu kwakuba okuhahaazibwa ebitsigye byabo, manya n'abagomi!" 
Ezekiel2:7 Iwe obagambire ebi ndaakugambire, yaaba bahurira nari banga kuhurira, ahabw'okuba n'abagomi!" 
Ezekiel2:8 Kwonka iwe muntu 'we, hurira eki ndikugambira. Otaba omugomi nk'abo. Yashama, orye eki ndikukuha." 
Ezekiel2:9 Ku naagiire kugira nti: naareeba omukono gungororoirwe gukwaitse omuzingo gw'ekitabo, ogwine ebihandiikirweho." 
Ezekiel2:10 Atyo agunshashaanurira omu maisho; nshanga guhandiikirweho embaju zombi ebigambo by'okutonzya n'eby'okuganya n'eby'okucura. 
Ezekiel3:1 Mpaho Ruhanga angira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, rya ogu muzingo, ogyende, ogambire ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel3:2 Ntyo nyashama, ampa ogwo muzingo kugurya." 
Ezekiel3:3 Kandi angira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, rya ogu muzingo ogu naakuha ogwigute. Ntyo naanye ngurya, gunnurira nk'obwoki." 
Ezekiel3:4 Reero angira ati: Muntu 'we, irooko oze omu b'eihanga rya Isiraeli, obagambire ebi ndikwenda kubagambira." 
Ezekiel3:5 Manya tiwaatumwa ha bantu b'orurimi rw'endunga-mahanga kandi orugumire; kureka aha b'eihanga rya Isiraeli. 
Ezekiel3:6 Ti ha b'amahanga maingi ag'endimi zitarikumanywa kandi ezigumire, ezi otarikubaasa kwetegyereza ebigambo byazo. Buzimazima kuri naaba nkutumire aha bantu nk'abo, bakaakuhuriire." 
Ezekiel3:7 Kwonka ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli tibarikwija kukuhurira ahabw'okuba tibarikwenda kumpurira. Manya ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli boona n'entahurira kandi n'engangaazi. 
Ezekiel3:8 Reeba, naiwe naakuhindura ogangaire obone kubabaasa." 
Ezekiel3:9 Kandi naakuhindura ogumire nk'eibaare ry'enkangabuye. Otatiina abo bagomi n'obu kwakuba okuhahaaza omutima. 
Ezekiel3:10 Kandi yaagaruka yangira ati: Muntu 'we, ebigambo byona ebi naaza kukugambira obihurire kandi obiteho omutima." 
Ezekiel3:11 Reero ogyende, oze omu b'eihanga ryawe abaazaahiibwe, obagambire eki Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga ndikwenda kubagambira, yaaba bahurira nari banga." 
Ezekiel3:12 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Mutima yankiriza, reero Nyakubaho ow'ekitiinwa ku yaimukire ahu yaabaire ari, naahurira orwari rw'abarikugira bati: Nyakubaho aheebwe ekitiinwa omu butaaho bwe." 
Ezekiel3:13 Okwo kukaba kuri okuhoorera kw'amapapa g'ezo nyamaishwa nigakoranaho, kandi n'endigito ya nyamuziga eziziri aha rubaju, ezaabaire nizirigita nk'omutsitsa." 
Ezekiel3:14 Mutima ku yankiriize yantwara hare, naagyenda ngwirwe kubi munonga ninganya, amaani ga Mukama gaanyiziraho kimwe." 
Ezekiel3:15 Ntyo naahika Telabiibu omu baazaahiibwe, abaabaire batwaire aha rubaju rw'omugyera Kebari, naamarayo ebiro mushanju mbarimu nyeshobeire." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ebiro mushanju ku byahwaire, Nyakubaho yangira ati:" 
Ezekiel3:17 Iwe muntu 'we, nkuhindwire omurinzi w'eihanga rya Isiraeli. Ku oraagume waahurira eki naagamba obanteisize." 
Ezekiel3:18 Ku ndigambira omuntu enyabibi nti: Buzimazima ori ow'okufa, haza iwe otamuhane kureka emitwarize ye emibi, ngu abone kujuna amagara ge; haza ogwo muntu enyabibi yaafeera omu bibi bye, niiwe ndimubuuza." 
Ezekiel3:19 Kwonka ku oriteisa omuntu enyabibi, yaayanga kureka ebibi bye, nari emitwarize ye emibi, aryafeera omu bibi bye, haza iwe oryaba ojunire amagara gaawe." 
Ezekiel3:20 Ekindi, omuntu ohikiriire ku arireka okuhikiriira kwe, yaakora ebibi, naanye naamureka kyamurugiramu okugwa, aryafa. Ahabwawe okutamuteisa, aryafa azizire ebibi bye, n'ebirungi ebi yaakozire tibiriijukwa, haza niiwe ndimubuuza." 
Ezekiel3:21 Kwonka ku oryehanangiriza omuntu ohikiriire okutakora kibi, nawe atakikore, buzimazima aryaba ohuriire kandi naiwe oryaba okirize amagara gaawe." 
Ezekiel3:22 Mbwenu okwo niyo amaani ga Mukama gaanyiziireho kimwe, akangira ati: Imuka oze omu ruhita, mbe niyo naagambira naiwe." 
Ezekiel3:23 Naanye ntyo nyimuka, nza omu ruhita. Ku nza kugira nti, ndeebayo ekitiinwa kya Nyakubaho, ekiri nk'eki naareebire aha rubaju rw'omugyera Kebari. Ntyo ngwa njuumaire." 
Ezekiel3:24 Kwonka Mutima wa Ruhanga anzamu, anyemereza, agamba naanye, nangira ati: Irooko oyekingirane omu nju yaawe." 
Ezekiel3:25 Mbwenu iwe muntu 'we, reeba niinyija kukutaho emiguha, ngikubohese, oremwe kushohora kuza omu bantu." 
Ezekiel3:26 Kandi niinyija kukuramatiza orurimi aha nkanka, obe ekiteta, obure agateisa abo bagomi." 
Ezekiel3:27 Kwonka ku ndaabe nyine eky'okukugambira, niinyija kukubaasisa kugamba, obagambire eki Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga ndikwenda kubagambira. Mpaho orikwenda kuhurira, ahurire, n'otarikwenda kuhurira, arereere; ahabw'okuba n'abagomi." 
Ezekiel4:1 Mbwenu iwe muntu 'we, kwata eitafaari, orite omu maisho gaawe oriteereho ekishushani ky'orurembo Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel4:2 Kandi oruteho eby'okurugotesa, orwombekyeho ekigo, orurundeho eby'okutemberaho. Reero oruteereho ensiisira z'ab'okuruteera, oruteho ebyoma by'okuruhiguza birwehinguririize." 
Ezekiel4:3 Kandi ogire ekishate ky'ekyoma, okyemereze ahagati yaawe n'orwo rurembo kiri ekisiika ky'ekyoma. Haza orugumyeho amaisho, rube nk'orugotsirwe kandi orugoteirwe kimwe. Ekyo n'eky'okworeka oku ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli bariba." 
Ezekiel4:4 Bwanyima obyamire orubaju rwawe rwa bumosho, nkuteho ekifubiro ky'ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli; ebiro ebi oraamare orubyamiise, oyemere ekifubiro kyabo." 
Ezekiel4:5 Manya ninkuteeraho omubaro gw'ebiro magana ashatu na makumi mwenda ogurikwingana n'ogw'emyaka ei baraamare nibafubirwa. Okwo nikwo oraamare ebyo biro oyemeire ekifubiro ky'ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli. 
Ezekiel4:6 Ku oraaheze ebyo biro, ogarukye obyame; kwonka obwo obyamiire orubaju rwawe rwa buryo, oyemere ekifubiro ky'ab'omuryango gwa Yuda. Naakuteeraho ebiro makumi ana, buri kiro nikingana omwaka gumwe gw'ekifubiro kyabo." 
Ezekiel4:7 Reero ohangye amaisho Yerusalemu erikugotwa, ogibangire omukono guhinyiriire, haza orangye eby'okuruteera." 
Ezekiel4:8 Kandi reeba, niinyija kukubohesa emiguha, obure agahindukira orundi rubaju okuhitsya obu oraahezeyo ebiro ebi oraamare okumakumirwe." 
Ezekiel4:9 Mbwenu twara engano na baale n'ebihimba n'enkoore, n'oburo obigoyemu oburo. Nibwo oraarye omu biro magana ashatu na makumi mwenda, ebi oraamare obyamiise orubaju rwawe." 
Ezekiel4:10 Ebyokurya ebi oraarye bigume birengwe, bibe kimwe kya kana kya kiko buri izooba; obirye omurundi gumwe buri izooba." 
Ezekiel4:11 N'amaizi agu oraanywe gagume garengwe, gabe ebikopo bibiri buri izooba, kandi oganywe rimwe buri izooba." 
Ezekiel4:12 Ebyo byokurya ogume obirye biri nk'ekibanda kya baale, kandi obiteekyese ebishanku by'amazi g'abantu, abantu nibakureeba." 
Ezekiel4:13 Mukama ayongyera agira ati: Okwo nikwo Abaisiraeli barirya ebyokurya byabo bihagaire bari omu mahanga agu ndibataataaniramu. 
Ezekiel4:14 Naanye mmugarukamu nti: Ai bambe, Mukama Ruhanga! Reeba nyowe tinkeehagazaga. Okwiha omu buto bwangye n'okuhitsya hati tinkaryaga kintu kyefeereire nari ekitaafura, kandi enyama erikuzira tekanzaga mu kanwa." 
Ezekiel4:15 Nawe angira ati: Mbwenu niinyija kukwikiriza amasha g'ente, omu mwanya gw'amazi g'abantu, obe nigo waateekyesa ebyokurya byawe." 
Ezekiel4:16 Ayongyera angira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, reeba, niinyija kubaima emigaati y'omuri Yerusalemu, barye erengirwe beemereize omutima, kandi banywe amaizi garengirwe bahahaire omutima." 
Ezekiel4:17 Ekyo niinyija kukikora, babure ebyokurya n'amaizi, bareebane bashobeirwe, bahwe aha magufa ahabw'ebibi byabo." 
Ezekiel5:1 Kandi Nyakubaho akangira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, kwata rurara y'obwogi, ogikorese nk'orumweiso rw'omumwi, ogimweisise eishokye ryawe n'ebireju byawe. Bwanyima eryo ishokye origyerese eminzaani kandi oribaganise." 
Ezekiel5:2 Kimwe kya kashatu kyaryo okyokyeze ahagati y'orurembo ebiro by'okugotwa byahwa. Ekindi kimwe kya kashatu kyaryo okitware, oyehinguririze orurembo nookishaza rurara. Reero kimwe kya kashatu kyaryo ekindi okimamaagize omu mwanya, kitwarwe omuyaga, haza naanye nsyoreyo rurara, ebikurate." 
Ezekiel5:3 Ahari eryo ishokye oiheho rikye, orishembere omu mukugiro gw'omunagiro gwawe." 
Ezekiel5:4 Kandi oiheho eishokye rimwe, orinagye omu muriro, risye, rirugyemu omuriro, gwotsye ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli boona." 
Ezekiel5:5 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Egi ni Yerusalemu ei naataire ahagati y'amahanga n'ensi ezigyehinguririize. 
Ezekiel5:6 Mbwenu egomeire ebiragiro byangye okukira ago mahanga, tiyaayorobera ebi naataireho okukira amahanga agagyehinguririize; yaayanga kukora ebi naagiragiire n'okukuratira ebi naataireho." 
Ezekiel5:7 Nikyo Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga ndikugirira nti: Nk'oku muri abanyarubwa okukira amahanga agabeehinguririize, mukanga kukuratira ebi naataireho n'okworobera ebi naaragiire, kureka mukatooreza emigyenzo y'abanyamahanga ababeehinguririize;" 
Ezekiel5:8 n'ahabw'ekyo iwe Yerusalemu, Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga ninkugambira nti: Reeba, Nyowe buzima naaba omuzigu waawe. Niinyija kukufubira amahanga nigakireeba." 
Ezekiel5:9 Ahabw'ebihagaro byawe byona, niinyija kukukora eki ntakakoraga, kandi ekiri nk'ekyo tindikikora bundi." 
Ezekiel5:10 Nikyo omuriiwe abazaire baririira abaana baabo, n'abaana bakarya abazaire baabo. Ndyakufubira, kandi abaawe abarihonokaho ndyabataataanisiza ei emiyaga etoora." 
Ezekiel5:11 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Niinyerahira! Nk'oku ebintu byawe ebirikunugwa n'ebihagaro byawe ebi ohagasiise Omwanya gwangye ogurikwera biri, buzimazima naanye niinyija kukucwekyereza ntakusaasiire;" 
Ezekiel5:12 kimwe kya kashatu ky'abantu baawe kiitwe omuze, kimarweho enjara; na kimwe kya kashatu ekindi kiitwe rurara omu byanga ebikwehinguriize; reero kimwe kya kashatu kyabo ekindi nkitaataanisize ei emiyaga etoora, kandi nsyoreyo rurara, ebakurate." 
Ezekiel5:13 Obwo nibwo ndihwa ekiniga, nkabamariraho ekishinjo; nkeemara ak'aha mutima. Ku ndibamariraho kashanga yangye, nibwo barimanya ku Nyowe Nyakubaho ngambire nyine eihato." 
Ezekiel5:14 Ekindi, ndyakuhindura eitongo obe ekintu ekirikujumwa amahanga agakwehinguririize n'abahinguzi boona abarikireeba." 
Ezekiel5:15 Ku ndikufubira nyine ekiniga n'ekishinjo, naakuhana nkugwereirwe kubi munonga, oryaba ekirikujumwa, ekirikugaaniizibwa, eky'okuteisizaho abandi, kandi ekirikunugwa amahanga goona agakwehinguririize. Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naakigamba." 
Ezekiel5:16 Abaawe ku ndibooherereza enjara, eryabacwekyereza. Kandi ndyabateeza enjara rwaranda, mbaime ebyokurya." 
Ezekiel5:17 Ndyabateeza enjara, mbashunikire enyamaishwa zibashahure abaana, orufu n'endwara biboogyemu kandi baitirwe aha rugamba. Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naakigamba." 
Ezekiel6:1 Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel6:2 Iwe muntu 'we, naga amaisho aha nshozi za Isiraeli ozihanuurire," 
Ezekiel6:3 noogira oti: Imwe nshozi za Isiraeli 'mwe, nimuhurire eki Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba! Mukama Ruhanga naagambira ab'omu nshozi n'omu bibungo, ab'omu nsa n'omu mpanga ati: Reeba, Nyowe buzima ndyabooherereza rurara, ncwekyereze emyanya yaanyu ey'okuramizamu emandwa." 
Ezekiel6:4 Amatambiro gaanyu garyahinduka amatongo, amooterero gaanyu gasheenyagurwe, abaanyu abariitwa mbatambikye omu maisho g'ebishushani byanyu ebirikuramibwa," 
Ezekiel6:5 emitumbi y'Abaisiraeli ngigangarikye omu maisho g'ebishushani bi baramya; amagufa gaanyu nganaganagye omu mbaju z'amatambiro gaanyu gazeehinguririze. 
Ezekiel6:6 Ei muriza yoona, endembo zaanyu ziryaba amatongo, emyanya yaanyu etunguukire ey'okuramizamu ecwekyerezibwe, amatambiro gaanyu gasheenyagurwe, gabe amatongo; ebishushani byanyu ebirikuramibwa byatagurwe, bicwekye obusaasingo, amatambiro agu mwotereraho obubaani gahigurwe, n'ebi mukora byona bihwerekyerezibwa." 
Ezekiel6:7 Kandi abariitwa baryabagwa ahagati, mubone kumanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel6:8 Kwonka shi ndyarokoraho bamwe omuriimwe. Ku muriba mwine omu mahanga abarikira rurara, mwataataaniire omu mahanga," 
Ezekiel6:9 obwo omuriimwe abariba bahonokireho baryanyijukira omu mahanga agu bariba batwairwemu bari enkwatwa; bamanye ku mpenzire emitima yaabo erikururuuha, eyaanyimwire; kandi ku naahumize amaisho gaabo agarikururuuhira okushamaarira emandwa ezi baramya; batyo beetamwe ahabw'ebibi bi baakozire, n'ebihagaro byabo byona." 
Ezekiel6:10 Haza bamanye ku ndi Nyakubaho, ku eki naagizire nti: Ndyabagwisiza akagwe, ntarakigambiire busha." 
Ezekiel6:11 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Yemaamaate, oshezye emigyere, oboroogye oti: Ai bambe! Ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli baaza kwitirwa aha rugamba, baitwe enjara n'orufu, bazire ebihagaro byabo ebi baakozire," 
Ezekiel6:12 abariba bari hare baitwe orufu; abariba bari haihi baitirwe aha rugamba, n'abariba batsigaireho baitwe enjara! Okwo nikwo ndibamariraho ekishinjo kyangye!" 
Ezekiel6:13 Abaabo abaitsirwe ku barirambirirana ahagati y'emandwa zaabo beehinguririize amatambiro gaabo ahari buri kabungo karaingwa n'aha mitwe y'enshozi zoona, ahansi ya buri murinzi n'ahansi ya buri muvure oguyumbize, n'ahantu hoona ahu baabaire booterera emandwa eby'emigaju erikutaamirana, aho niho murimanyira ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel6:14 Haza ndyababangira omukono, ensi ei batwiremu yoona ngihindure amatongo ahatarikutuurwa okwiha aha ihamba okuhitsya Ribula. Obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel7:1 Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel7:2 Iwe muntu 'we, oku nikwo Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga ndikugambira ab'omu nsi ya Isiraeli nti: Muheru ehikire aha mbaju ina z'ensi." 
Ezekiel7:3 Mbwenu naimwe yaabahikaho. Niinyija kuboohoraho ekiniga kyangye, mbacwere orubanja nk'oku emitwarize yaanyu eri; kandi mbafubire ahabw'ebihagaro byanyu byona." 
Ezekiel7:4 Tindikwija kubasaasira, kureka niinyija kubafubira ahabw'emitwarize yaanyu, n'ah'abw'ebihagaro bi murikukora. Nibwo muraamanye ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel7:5 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Akagwe kaaza kukuratana n'akandi! Reeba kaija. 
Ezekiel7:6 Muheru yaahika kandi niiwe yaizira! Mbwenu yaija! 
Ezekiel7:7 Iwe mutuuzi w'omu nsi 'we, egi niyo buhitsya yaawe! Obunaku bwahika, ekiro kiri haihi, eizooba ry'akajagararo, ritari ry'okuteerera aha nshozi akaari k'okushemererwa." 
Ezekiel7:8 Mbwenu niinyija kukwohoraho juba ekishinjo kyangye, nkumarireho ekiniga kyangye, nkucwere orubanja nk'emitwarize yaawe oku eri; kandi nkufubire ahabw'ebihagaro byawe byona." 
Ezekiel7:9 Tindikwija kukusaasira; kureka niinyija kukufubira, nkuture emitwarize yaawe n'ebihagaro bi orikukora. Nibwo oraamanye ku ndi Nyakubaho oyasha." 
Ezekiel7:10 Reeba, eizooba ryahika! Egi niyo buhitsya yaawe! Okutagira bwinganisa kukanyire, n'amaryo gaawe garengyesereize." 
Ezekiel7:11 Orubwa rukuzire rwarugwamu okukora ebibi. Omuribo tihaine oritsigaraho; n'obu kwakuba ebintu byabo ebingi, nari obutungi bwabo, nangwa n'omuribo tiharitsigaramu omurungi nari ow'ekitiinwa!" 
Ezekiel7:12 Obunaku bwahika, ekiro kiri haihi. Omuguzi atashemererwa, n'omutunzi ataganya, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga ainiire abantu baayo boona ekiniga." 
Ezekiel7:13 Manya omutunzi tarigarukana eki agurize omuguzi bombi bakiriho, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga ainiire abantu baayo boona ekiniga. Tikiriikaikana. Manya ahabw'ebicumuro byabo, tihariho oritsigaza amagara." 
Ezekiel7:14 Bateire enzamba, boona baayeteekateeka, kwonka haabura owaahurura; ahabw'okuba nyiniire abantu baabo boona ekiniga." 
Ezekiel7:15 Aheeru hariho okurwana, orufu n'enjara biri omunda. Abari omu ishwa nibaitirwayo rurara, abari omu rurembo, enjara n'orufu bibamaraho." 
Ezekiel7:16 Ku harikugira abaahonokaho bakahunga, baza omu nshozi, baba nk'enkombe z'omu mpanga; boona baganya, buri omwe naayefuuza ahabw'ebibi bye." 
Ezekiel7:17 Emikono yaabo etentebukire, entegye zaabo zaatengyeza." 
Ezekiel7:18 Beezirikire ebiguniya, baitwa obwoba, baabwerabwera, emitwe yaabo yoona yaaba enkomborora." 
Ezekiel7:19 Baryanaga efeeza zaabo omu nguuto, n'ezaabu zaabo zibe ekihagaro; ahabw'okuba tiziribaasa kubajuna aha izooba eri Nyakubaho aribagiriraho ekiniga. Tiziribatambira njara kandi tiziribaigutsa, ahabw'okuba nizo zaabareeteire kukora ebibi." 
Ezekiel7:20 Amahunde gaabo bakaba bagakoresa kwetungira ekitiinwa kitaine mugasho, beekorera ebishushani birikuzira, n'ebintu byabyo ebirikunugwa, naanye nikyo ndibihindurira ebihagaro aharibo." 
Ezekiel7:21 Ndyabirekurira abanyamahanaga babishahure, n'abantu b'omu nsi enkozi z'ebibi babinyagye kandi babihagaze." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ndyabareka bahagaze omwanya gwangye ogubiikwamu eby'obutungi, abanyagi bagutaahemu, bagushiishe," 
Ezekiel7:23 baguhindure eitongo. Manya egi ensi eijwire emanja z'okwita abantu, n'orurembo rwijwire obubisha." 
Ezekiel7:24 Ndyareeta amahanga mabi munonga gakubuure amaka gaabo; amamanzi gaabo agarikubeehimbisisa ngacwe eishaija, n'emyanya yaabo erikwera ngihagaze." 
Ezekiel7:25 Ku barireeba enaku, baryayetenga okugira obusingye, kwonka tibaribubona." 
Ezekiel7:26 Akagwe karyakuratana n'akandi, n'orukuru rukuratwe orundi. Baryayeshengyereza omurangi kubagambira eki Ruhanga amumanyiise, kwonka obwo omuhongyerezi aryaba atakiine mateeka g'okuha abantu, n'abakuru omu ihanga batakiine by'okubahabura." 
Ezekiel7:27 Omugabe aryacura, omunyiginya ayehwe amatsiko, emikono y'ab'omuri egyo nsi esharazibwe obwoba. Ndyabagira nk'oku emitwarize yaabo eri, mbacwere emanja nk'oku baazicwereire abandi, babone kumanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel8:1 Omu mwaka gwa mukaaga, omu kwezi kwa mukaaga, aha kiro kya kataano eky'okwo kwezi; ku naabaire nshutami omu nju yangye, n'abakuru b'omuri Buyuda banshutami omu maisho, amaani ga Mukama Ruhanga gaanyijaho." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba ekirikushusha omuntu; okwiha omu manyaanya ge okugarura eifo, naashusha omuriro; kandi okwiha omu manyaanya ge okugarura eruguru, naayengyengyeta nk'omuringa guzingwire." 
Ezekiel8:3 Atyo agorora ekirikushusha omukono, ankwata obutsibo bw'eishokye. Reero omuri okwo kubonekyerwa, Mutima wa Ruhanga ankiriza, antwarira omu kaabunga, ampitsya Yerusalemu aharikutaahirwa omu irembo ry'ekikaari kya Nyaruju eky'omunda, eky'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, ahu ekishushani kirikugwisa kubi Ruhanga kyabaire kiri." 
Ezekiel8:4 Okwo ndeeberayo ekitiinwa kya Ruhanga wa Isiraeli, ekiri nk'eki naayorekyeirwe omu ruhita." 
Ezekiel8:5 Bwanyima angira ati: Muntu 'we, mbwenu imutsya amaisho, oreebe omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho. Ntyo ngaimutsya, ndeebayo, nshanga omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho aharikutaahirwa omu irembo ry'eitambiro hariho ekishushani kirikugwisa kubi Ruhanga." 
Ezekiel8:6 Mpaho angira ati: Muntu 'we, nooreeba ebihagaro bitakareebwaga, ebi ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli barikukorera aha, kumbinga omu mwanya gwangye Ogurikwera? Kwonka shi noija kureeba ebindi bihagaro birikukiraho." 
Ezekiel8:7 Atyo antwara, ampitsya aha irembo ry'ekikaari. Ku nza kugira nti: ndeeba ekisiika kirimu ekihengyere." 
Ezekiel8:8 Nawe angira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, fumurira aha eki kisiika. Ku naakifumwire, haaba eirembo." 
Ezekiel8:9 Reero angira ati: Taahamu, oreebe ebihagaro eihano bi barikukoreramu." 
Ezekiel8:10 Naanye ntyo ntaahamu, ndeeba ebintu by'emiringo yoona ebirikugyendesa enda, n'enyamaishwa zirikunugwa, n'ebishushani byona ebi ab'omuryango gwa Isiraeli barikuramya, bitairwe aha kisiika oku n'oku;" 
Ezekiel8:11 kandi omu maisho gaabyo heemereiremu abashaija makumi mushanju ab'omu bakuru b'ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli, barimu Yazaniya mwene Shafani, abeemereire ahagati, buri omwe akwaitse ekyoterero ky'obubaani, omwika gwabwo nigucumbuuka." 
Ezekiel8:12 Bwanyima Ruhanga ambuuza ati: Iwe muntu 'we, waareeba eki abakuru b'omuryango gwa Isiraeli barikukorera omu mwirima, buri omwe omu ndaaro y'ebishushani bi arikuramya? Manya nibagira bati: Nyakubaho tarikutureeba; atsigireho egi nsi!" 
Ezekiel8:13 Kandi angira ati: noija kureeba ebindi bihagaro bi barikukora, ebirikukiraho." 
Ezekiel8:14 Bwanyima antwara, ampitsya aharikutaahirwa omu irembo ry'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho obwa Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho; ndeebayo abakazi bashutami nibacurira Tammuzi" 
Ezekiel8:15 Ambuuza ati: Iwe muntu 'we, ekyo waakireeba? Noija kureeba ebindi bihagaro ebirikukira ebi." 
Ezekiel8:16 Ebyo ku byahwaire yantwara, yantaasya omu kikaari ky'omunda ya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Naareeba aha muryango gwayo, ahagati y'ekisasi n'eitambiro, hariho abashaija nka makumi abiri na bataano, bateire Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho omugongo, amaisho bagataire burugwa-izooba, nibaramya eizooba." 
Ezekiel8:17 Bwanyima angira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, ekyo waakireeba? Noogira ngu n'ekintu kikye ab'omuryango gwa Yuda kukorera aha ebihagaro, ensi bakagiijuza obubisha, bakongyera kungwisa kubi? Reeba, nibeeta eitaagi omu nyindo." 
Ezekiel8:18 N'ahabw'ekyo ndyakoresa ekiniga, tindibasaasira, kandi n'obu barintakira bata, tindibatega kutu." 
Ezekiel9:1 Bwanyima nkahurira orikwamuza naagira ati: Imwe ab'okufubira orurembo, nimwirire haihi, buri omwe akwaitse ekikwato ky'okurucwekyereza." 
Ezekiel9:2 Ntyo ndeeba abashaija mukaaga baareetwa omu muhanda gw'eirembo rya ruguru ery'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, buri omwe akwaitse ekikwato kye ky'okwitsa, kandi baine omushaija ojwaire ebya kitaani, ayekindikire akashaho k'abahandiiki aha rubaju rwe. Batyo bataahamu, beemerera aha rubaju rw'eitambiro ry'omuringa." 
Ezekiel9:3 Ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga wa Isiraeli ndeeba kyainamuka, kyaruga ahari baakerubi ahu kyabaire kituura, kyaza omu kibuga kya Nyaruju. Atyo ayeta ogwo mushaija ojwaire ebya kitaani, ayekindikire akashaho k'abahandiiki aha rubaju rwe." 
Ezekiel9:4 Nyakubaho amugira ati: Irooko orabe omu rurembo rwa Yerusalemu, ote akamanyiso aha buso bw'abarikutsinda nibaganya ahabw'ebihagaro birikurukorerwamu." 
Ezekiel9:5 Kandi agambira abandi mpuriire, ati: Nimurabe omuri orwo rurembo, mumukuratiire, mwite abaamwo, kandi mutagira abu mwasaasira." 
Ezekiel9:6 Mwitire kimwe abashaija bakuru n'abatsigazi n'empangare; abaana bato n'abakazi. Kwonka mutakora aha muntu weena oriho akamanyiso. Haza mutandikire aha Mwanya gwangye Ogurikwera. Nabo baatandikira aha bakuru b'omu ihanga abaabaire bari omu maisho ga Nyaruju. 
Ezekiel9:7 Bwanyima yaabagira ati: Nimuhagaze Nyaruju, mwijuze ebikaari byayo emitumbi. Mbwenu nimwirooko! Batyo bagyenda, baita ab'omu rurembo." 
Ezekiel9:8 Ku baabaire nibakibaita, ntsigaire nyenka, naajuumara naaborooga nti: Ai bambe, Mukama Ruhanga! Ebyo ahabw'ekiniga kingi eki oiniire aba Yerusalemu, waaza kwita Abaisiraeli abatsigaireho obamareho?" 
Ezekiel9:9 Nawe angarukamu ati: Ebicumuro by'ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli n'ab'erya Yuda birengyesereize munonga. Ensi eijwire eshagama y'abarikwitwa; n'orurembo rwijwire okukora ebitahikire. Manya nibagira bati: Nyakubaho atsigireho egi nsi, takitureeba." 
Ezekiel9:10 Mbwenu naanye tindikwija kubasaasira; kureka niinyija kubahoora mbature ebi baakozire. 
Ezekiel9:11 Ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba omushaija ori ojwaire ebya kitaani, ayekindikire akashaho k'abahandiiki omu rubaju rwe ka bwino y'okuhandiikisa, yaija, yaagambira omutumire ati: Nkozire nk'oku ondagiire." 
Ezekiel10:1 Ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba omu mwanya gw'ahaiguru y'emitwe ya baakerubi ekintu ekirikushusha eibaare ry'omwengyengye, ekiri nk'ekitebe ky'obugabe." 
Ezekiel10:2 Ruhanga yaagambira omuntu ojwaire ebya kitaani ati: Irooko oze ahagati ei zaanyamuziga zirikwehindaguturanira ahansi ya baakerubi, oiheyo eigaro ry'amakara garikwotsya, ogamaamagize orurembo. Atyo agyenda nimmureeba. Obu ogwo mushaija yaataahamu," 
Ezekiel10:3 baakerubi bakaba beemereire aha rubaju rwa Nyaruju orw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo; reero ekicu kyaijura ekibuga kyayo eky'omunda. 
Ezekiel10:4 Kandi ekitiinisa kya Nyakubaho kyainamuka nikiruga ahari baakerubi, kyaza omu kibuga kya Nyaruju, Nyaruju egyo yaijura ekicu, n'ekibuga kyaijura okumurinkana kw'ekitiniisa kya Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel10:5 Haza okuhoorera kw'amapapa ga baakerubi kwahurirrirwa hare, kwahika n'omu kibuga ky'aheeru, kuri nk'eiraka rya Ruhanga Ow'obushoboorozi bwona, yaaba naagamba." 
Ezekiel10:6 Mbwenu ku yaaragiire ojwaire ebya kitaani ati: Iha omuriro ahagati ya zaanyamuziga ezirikwehindaguturana, ahagati ya baakerubi, n'onu yaataahamu, yaayemerera aha rubaju rw'enyamuziga." 
Ezekiel10:7 Reero kerubi yaagorora omukono gwe ari ahagati ya baakerubi, yaaguha omuriro oguri ahagati yaabo, yaaguta omu ngaro z'omuntu ojwaire ebya kitaani, n'onu yaagutwara, yaashohora." 
Ezekiel10:8 Baakerubi abo bakaba nibashusha nk'abaine omu mapapa gaabo ekiri nk'omukono gw'omuntu. 
Ezekiel10:9 Ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba nyamuziga ina aha rubaju rwa baakerubi, rwa buri emwe aha rubaju rwa mugyenzi we. Kandi ezo nyamuziga zikaba nizishusha amabaare garikumurinkana;" 
Ezekiel10:10 zoona ina nizishushana; buri nyamuziga eri nk'eyogainemu n'endiijo. 
Ezekiel10:11 Ku zaabaire ziba nizigyenda, buri emwe etoora ogwayo, zitarikuhinduka. Haza ei nyamuziga y'omu maisho yaabaire ereeba ezindi zigikurata nizigyenda zitarikuhinduka." 
Ezekiel10:12 Reero enyamuziga ezi baakerubi abana baabaire baine empanka zaazo n'enyomyo zaazo, n'ezo nyamuziga, zikaba ziijwire amaisho okuzeehinguririza." 
Ezekiel10:13 Ezo nyamuziga, oku naahuriire, zikaba nizeetwa enyamuziga zirikwehindaguturana." 
Ezekiel10:14 Kandi buri kerubi akaba aine ahamaisho hana. Ah'okubanza hari aha kerubi, aha kabiri hari ah'omuntu, aha kashatu hari ah'entare, n'aha kana hari ah'eishamba." 
Ezekiel10:15 Mpaho baakerubi abo baaguruka baaza ahaiguru. Baakerubi abo nibyo bihangwa ebihuriire ebi naareebeire aha mugyera Kebari. 
Ezekiel10:16 Baakerubi ku baabaire bagyenda, ezo nyamuziga zibagyenda aha rubaju. Kandi ku baabaire baimutsya amapapa gaabo kuguruka nibaruga ahansi, nazo ziguma zitabarugire ha rubaju." 
Ezekiel10:17 Ku baabaire beemerera, nazo zeemerera; bakiguruka kuza ahaiguru, nazo ziguruka nabo; ahabw'okuba omutima gw'ezo nyamaishwa gukaba guzirimu." 
Ezekiel10:18 Bwanyima ekitiinwa kya Nyakubaho kikaruga aha kibuga kya Nyaruju, kyayemerera ahaiguru ya baakerubi." 
Ezekiel10:19 Baakerubi abo baimutsya amapapa gaabo, baaguruka, baaruga ahansi, baagyenda nimbareeba, ezo nyamuziga zibari aha rubaju. Baayemerera aha muryango gw'eirembo ry'aha burugwa-izooba bwa Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga wa Isiraeli kibari eruguru." 
Ezekiel10:20 Ebyo nibyo bihangwa ebi naareebire ahansi ya Ruhanga wa Isiraeli aha mugyera Kebari, kandi naamanya ku baabaire bari baakerubi." 
Ezekiel10:21 Buri omwe akaba aine aha maisho hana n'amapapa ana. Omu mapapa gaabo hakaba harimu ekirikushusha emikono y'abantu. 
Ezekiel10:22 Enshusha yaazo ahamaisho, buzimazima ekaba eri nk'ei naareebeire aha mugyera Kebari. Buri omwe akagumizamu naagyenda ashorongire." 
Ezekiel11:1 Mutima akankiriza, yantwara aha irembo ry'oburugwa-izooba erya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, eririkureebana na burugwa-izooba. Ntyo ndeeba aha muryango gw'eryo irembo hariho abashaija makumi abiri na bataano, barimu Yazaniya mwene Azuuri, na Pelatiya mwene Benaaya, abategyeki b'abantu." 
Ezekiel11:2 Nyakubaho angira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, aba nibo bantu abacuma enaama zitahikire, bakaha ab'omuri oru rurembo obwengye bubi," 
Ezekiel11:3 nibabagira bati: obunaku bw'okwombeka amaju tibukahikire. Oru rurembo n'enyungu eteeka, kandi itwe turi enyama." 
Ezekiel11:4 N'ahabw'ekyo, iwe muntu we, obarangirire akabi akaribabaho." 
Ezekiel11:5 Mutima wa Nyakubaho atyo anyijaho, angira ati: Obagambire oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Imwe ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli, okwo nikwo murikuteekateeka. Manya nimmanya ebibari aha mutima." 
Ezekiel11:6 Murengyesereize okwitira abantu omuri oru rurembo, enguuto zaarwo mwaziijuza emitumbi." 
Ezekiel11:7 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikubagirira ati: Abantu abu murikwita mukabagangarika ahagati y'orurembo, niyo nyama, kandi rwo niyo nyungu eteekwamu. Kwonka muryarubingwamu." 
Ezekiel11:8 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Nimutiina rurara, kwonka ndyagireeta ebaite," 
Ezekiel11:9 mbacwe omuri oru rurembo, mbarekurire abanyamahanga, haza mbafubire." 
Ezekiel11:10 Ndyabafubira, mugwe aha rugamba aha mwatano gwa Isiraeli, reero mumanye ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel11:11 Oru rurembo tiruriba nyungu yaanyu eteeka, naimwe timuriba nyama omurirwo; kureka ndyabafubirira aha mwatano gwa Isiraeli;" 
Ezekiel11:12 nibwo murimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho. Manya timurakuratiire ebi naataireho, n'obu kwakuba okukora ebi naaragiire; kureka mukatooreza emitwarize y'abanyamahanga ababeehinguririize." 
Ezekiel11:13 Mbwenu ku naabaire ninkiranga ebyo, Pelatiya mwene Benaaya yaafa. Naanye naagwa njuumaire, naataka nimborooga nti: Ai bambe Mukama Ruhanga! Ebyo waaza kumariraho kimwe Abaisiraeli abatsigaireho?" 
Ezekiel11:14 Bwanyima Nyakubaho angira ati: 
Ezekiel11:15 Iwe muntu 'we, beene waanyu, bagyenzi baawe abaazaahiibwe, ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli, boona oku batura, abatwire omuri Yerusalemu nibabagambaho bati: Barugire ahari Nyakubaho, baaza hare. Mbwenu egi nsi niitwe agihaire kuba eyaitu." 
Ezekiel11:16 N'ahabw'ekyo obagambire oti: Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: N'obu ndaabe naabatwaire hare okwo omu mahanga, nkabataataanira omu nsi nyingi; kwonka omu nsi ezi baagiiremu okumara akaanya, mbaire mbaine." 
Ezekiel11:17 N'ahabw'ekyo obagambire oti: Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Imwe ndyabarundaana, mbaihe omu mahanga mbataaruure omu nsi ezi mwataataaniiremu, mbahe ensi ya Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel11:18 Reero ku barihikayo, baryagiihamu ebintu byayo byona ebirikunugwa, n'ebihagaro byayo byona;" 
Ezekiel11:19 mbahe omutima gumwe, n'ebiteekateeko bisya, mbaihemu omutima gugumire nk'eibaare mbahe ogworobi," 
Ezekiel11:20 babone kworobera ebi naataireho, n'okukora ebi naaragiire, babe abantu bangye, naanye mbe Ruhanga waabo;" 
Ezekiel11:21 kwonka abo abaruruuhira ebintu byabo ebirikunugwa, n'ebihagaro byabo, mbibature bibatukurire. Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugamba." 
Ezekiel11:22 Ebyo ku byahwaire, baakerubi baimutsya amapapa gaabo, na nyamuziga zibari aha rubaju; ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga wa Isiraeli kibari eruguru." 
Ezekiel11:23 Ekyo kitiinisa kya Nyakubaho kyaimuka, kyaruga omu rurembo; kyaza aha rushozi oruri aha burugwa-izooba bw'orwo rurembo." 
Ezekiel11:24 Omuri okwo kubonekyerwa, Mutima wa Ruhanga ogwo yankiriza, yantwara Bukaludaaya, yampitsya omu baazaahiibwe. Mpaho okwo kworekwa oku naareebire kwandugaho." 
Ezekiel11:25 Naanye naateekyerereza abaazaahiibwe byona ebi Mukama yaanyorekire. 
Ezekiel12:1 Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel12:2 Iwe muntu 'we, otuura omu bagomi, abaine amaisho kwonka batarikureeba, abaine amatu kwonka batarikuhurira;" 
Ezekiel12:3 ahabw'okuba n'abagomi. N'ahabw'ekyo muntu we, koma ebintu byawe ky'okufuruka, ofurukye nyomushana nibakureeba. Ogyende nk'omufuruki, nooruga ahu ori nooza ahandi nibakureeba. Obundi bakaayetegyereza, n'obu baraabe bari abagomi." 
Ezekiel12:4 Oshohoze ebintu byawe nyomushana nk'eby'omufuruki nibaakureeba, kandi ogyende omu mwabazyo nibakureeba, nk'oku abafuruki bagira." 
Ezekiel12:5 Ofumure ekishenshero omu rugo nibakureeba, haza obirabyemu." 
Ezekiel12:6 Ebyo bintu obite aha ibega nibakureeba, kandi obishohoze haagira omwirima. Oyeshwekye aha maisho, otakaareeba ahu orikuraba. Manya niiwe mpindwire eky'okworeka oku ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli bariba." 
Ezekiel12:7 Naanye naakore nk'oku naaragiirwe. Naashohoza ebintu byangye nyomushana, nk'oku omufuruki akoma esika ye, kandi omu mwabazyo naacwa ekishenshero omu rugo n'engaro zangye, naashohora hariho omwirima, ntaire ebintu byangye aha ibega nibandeeba." 
Ezekiel12:8 Ku bwaseesire Nyakubaho yangira ati: 
Ezekiel12:9 Iwe muntu 'we, Abaisiraeli abagomi tibakubuurize bati: Nookora ki?" 
Ezekiel12:10 Mbwenu obagambire oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Okuragura oku nikumanyisa eby'omutegyeki w'omuri Yerusalemu, n'ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli boona abaririmu." 
Ezekiel12:11 Obagire oti: Nyowe ndi akamanyiso ahariimwe. Nk'oku nkozire, nabo nikwo barigirirwa. Baryazaahibwa," 
Ezekiel12:12 kandi omutegyeki obarimu aryata esika ye aha ibega hariho omwirima, ashohore, acwe ekishenshero omu rugo akirabemu. Aryayeshweka aha maisho, arekye kureeba ahu arikuraba." 
Ezekiel12:13 Kandi naanye ndyamurengyezaho ekigoye, akwatwe omutego gwangye, mmutware Babulooni omu nsi y'Abakaludaaya; kwonka tarigireeba, haza aryafeerayo." 
Ezekiel12:14 Boona abamushagatiire abamuha emikono, n'engabo ze zoona, ndyabataataanira ei emiyaga etoora, reero nsyoreyo rurara, ngibakuratse." 
Ezekiel12:15 Ku ndibataataanisiza omu mahanga, naabanaganaga omu nsi, nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel12:16 Kwonka shi, bakye omuribo ndyabarokora, barekye kwitwa rurara, n'enjara n'orufu; babone kweteisiza ebihagaro byabo byona omu mahanga agu barizamu, kandi bamanye ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel12:17 Kandi Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel12:18 Iwe muntu 'we, rya ebyokurya byawe nootengyeza, onywe amaizi nootetema kandi oyemereize omutima." 
Ezekiel12:19 Reero ogambire abantu b'omuri egi nsi oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba aha batuuzi ba Yerusalemu ab'omu nsi ya Isiraeli: Baryarya ebyokurya byabo beemereize omutima, banywe amaizi bahahaire, ahabw'okuba ensi yaabo eryamarwamu byona ebigirimu; neeturwa obwinazi bw'abagitwiremu." 
Ezekiel12:20 Endembo ezitwirwemu zibe amatongo, n'ensi ebe eirungu; babone kumanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel12:21 Kandi Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel12:22 Iwe muntu 'we, egi nfumu ei murikucwa aha nsi ya Isiraeli muti: Ebiro bitwireho okworekwa n'okwa busha, nikimanyisa ki?" 
Ezekiel12:23 N'ahabw'ekyo obagambire oti: Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Egyo nfumu niinyija kugiihaho, babe batakigicwa omuri Isiraeli. Kandi obagire oti: Obunaku buri haihi kuhika, byona ebyayorekirwe bibeho." 
Ezekiel12:24 Manya omuri Isiraeli tiharigaruka kubamu kworekwa kw'ebishuba obundi, n'obu kwakuba okuragura kw'okumamarika," 
Ezekiel12:25 kureka Nyowe Nyakubaho eki ndigamba nikyo ndigamba, kandi kiryakorwa. Tikirikyerererwa, kureka, imwe bagomi 'mwe, omu biro byanyu ndyagamba ekigambo, haza nkihikiirize. Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugamba." 
Ezekiel12:26 Nyakubaho akagaruka yangira ati: 
Ezekiel12:27 Iwe muntu 'we, reeba ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli nibagira bati: Ebi ayorekirwe bikitsigaizeyo ebiro bingi kubaho, n'ebi arikuranga, obunaku bwabyo bukiri hare." 
Ezekiel12:28 N'ahabw'ekyo obagambire oti: Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Tihariho na kimwe omu bi naagambire ekirikyerererwa, kureka eki ndigamba kiryakorwa. Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugamba." 
Ezekiel13:1 Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel13:2 Iwe muntu 'we, ranga nooyemeza abarangi ba Isiraeli. Orangye kandi ogambire abarikuranga ebi beecwereire; oti: Nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikugamba!" 
Ezekiel13:3 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Abarangi b'ebifamutima, abakuratira ebi beegunjiire bataine ki bareebire, baryakareeba!" 
Ezekiel13:4 Imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, abarangi baanyu ni nka zaamuha z'omu matongo." 
Ezekiel13:5 Naimwe timukahikaga ahu ebisiika by'orugo byasheenyukire, n'obu kwakuba okubyombeka busya, kurinda ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli, ngu mubone kwemerera omu rugamba muhamire aha izooba rya Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel13:6 Nibagamba ebishuba, kandi baragura ebitari by'amazima; obwo nibagira bati: Nyakubaho niwe yaagamba; haza Nyakubaho atabatumire; kandi bateekateeka ngu naija kuhikiiriza eki baagamba." 
Ezekiel13:7 Mbwenu shi eki mureebire t'okubonekyerwa kw'okwebeiha, kandi ebi muragura t'eby'ebishuba, obu muba nimugira ngu Nyakubaho niwe yaagamba, haza ntaine ki ngambire?" 
Ezekiel13:8 Mukama Ruhanga nikyo arikugirira ati: Ahabw'okugamba eby'okwebeiha n'okubonekyerwa kw'ebishuba, nikyo ndikubatura. Mukama Ruhanga nikyo arikugamba." 
Ezekiel13:9 Niinyija kufubira abo barangi, aboorekwa eby'okubeihwabeihwa bakaragura eby'ebishuba. Tibarihanuura na bantu bangye, n'obu kwakuba okuhandiikwa omu kitabo ky'ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli, nari okutaaha omu nsi yaabo eya Isiraeli, mubone kumanya ku ndi Mukama Ruhanga." 
Ezekiel13:10 Manya buzimazima bahabiise abantu bangye nibabagira bati: Hariho obusingye, haza kunu butariho. Kandi abantu ku bombeka busya ekigo, abo barangi bakiteera obudongo butanogire." 
Ezekiel13:11 Mbwenu gambira abo bantu barikukiteera obudongo butanogire, ku ekyo kigo kirikwija kugwa. Haryabaho enjura nyingi, hagwe orubaare rutakareebwaga, ekyo kigo kiteerwe eihunga." 
Ezekiel13:12 Mbwenu ku kirigwa, tibaribabuuza bati: Nya budongo bu mwakiteire burahi?" 
Ezekiel13:13 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati Ndyareeta eihunga nyine ekishinjo, nfukunkure enjura nyine ekiniga, ngwise orubaare ngwirwe kubi, bikicwekyereze." 
Ezekiel13:14 Reero nsheenye ekyo kigo ki mwateire obudongo butanogire, nkikumbagaze, omusingi gwakyo gwaname; haza ku kirikumbagara, mucwekyerereremu, mubone kumanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel13:15 Okwo nikwo ndimarira ekiniga ahari ekyo kigo, n'aha baakiteire obudongo butanogire. Haza imwe mbagambire nti: Ekyo kigo tikyakiriho, n'abaakiteire obudongo tibaakiriho," 
Ezekiel13:16 nibo barangi ba Isiraeli abaragwire ebya Yerusalemu, bakoorekwa ku baine obusingye, kunu obusingye butariho; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba." 
Ezekiel13:17 Mbwenu iwe muntu 'we, teera ekitsyori abo bakazi abaranga ebi beecwereire. Orangye noobeemeza" 
Ezekiel13:18 oti: Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Imwe bakazi 'mwe, ababaziirira abantu engisha z'okujwara aha mikono, mukabakorera eby'okwetwekyerera ebya buri muringo, ngu mubone kugira obushoboorozi aha magara gaabo, muryakareeba! Mbwenu shi nimwija kweheereza obushoboorozi bw'okwita abantu bangye, n'okukiza abaanyu, ngu mubone kwetungira amagoba?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Reeba mumpemwire omu bantu bangye; ahabw'amagara ga baale n'otugaati, nimwita abantu abatakufiire, kandi nimukiza abatakukizire, nimubakizisa ebi mubeihesa abantu bangye ababatega okutu nimugamba ebishuba." 
Ezekiel13:20 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Reeba niinyanga engisha zaanyu ezi murikutegyesa amagara g'abantu. Niinyija kuzibahuruutura aha mikono, ndekye abantu abu murikuhiiga bagyende n'obusingye nk'enyonyi." 
Ezekiel13:21 N'ebyetwekyerero byanyu niinyija kubitaagura mbaakye abantu bangye, mube mutakibaita kubi, mubone kumanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel13:22 Abahikiriire mubacwire entegye n'ebishuba byanyu, nyowe ezi ntakubacwire; mwateera omuhimbo abantu enyabibi ngu batakaahinduka, bakareka emitwarize yaabo emibi, bakakiza amagara." 
Ezekiel13:23 Nikyo mutarigarukira kubonekyererwa eby'ebishuba n'obu kwakuba okuragura. Niinyija kujuna abantu bangye, mbabaakye. Nibwo muraamanye ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel14:1 Mbwenu bamwe omu bakuru b'Abaisiraeli bakaija ahi ndi, banshutama omu maisho." 
Ezekiel14:2 Reero Nyakubaho yangira ati: 
Ezekiel14:3 Iwe muntu 'we, aba bantu emandwa zibatwaire omutima, baaguma bazihangire amaisho. Noogira ngu nshemereire kubaikiriza kugira eki baanyehanuuzaho?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Mbwenu iwe obagambire noobagira oti: Mukama naagira ati: Omuntu weena ow'omu b'eihanga rya Isiraeli ou emandwa zirikutwara omutima, akaguma ahangire amaisho ebyo bintu bibi bikamugwisa, haza akaija kwehanuuza aha murangi, Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye ndimugarukamu nimmutura ebishushani bye bingi ebi arikuramya;" 
Ezekiel14:5 haza mbone kwegarururira ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli boona abampararukire ahabw'ebishushani byabo ebi barikuramya. 
Ezekiel14:6 N'ahabw'ekyo gambira ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli oti: Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Mweteise, mutaane n'emandwa zaanyu, murekye kuhanga amaisho ebyo bihagaro byanyu." 
Ezekiel14:7 Manya omuntu weena ow'omu ihanga rya Isiraeli, nari ow'omu banyamahanga abaashuuhuukiire omuri Isiraeli, onyimuura, emandwa zikamutwara omutima akaguma ahangire amaisho ebyo bintu bibi, bikamugwisa; haza akaija aha murangi kumuunyehanuuzaho, Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye ndimwegarukiramu." 
Ezekiel14:8 Ogwo muntu ndyamuta omu kaso, mmuhindure akamanyiso k'okureeberaho, n'eky'okucuubwaho enfumu; kandi mmucwe omu bantu bangye. Haza mubone kumanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel14:9 Reero omurangi ku aribeihwabeihwa, yaagira eki yaagamba, biri Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye mmubeihabeihire; haza ndyagorora omukono mmurwanise, mmucwere kimwe omu bantu bangye Abaisiraeli." 
Ezekiel14:10 Kandi baryafubirwa, ekifubiro ky'ogwo murangi kingane n'eki owaamwehanuuzaho," 
Ezekiel14:11 mpaho ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli barekye kugaruka kundugaho n'okwesiisisa ebicumuro byabo; kureka babe abantu bangye, naanye mbe Ruhanga waabo. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba." 
Ezekiel14:12 Nyakubaho kandi akangira ati: 
Ezekiel14:13 Iwe muntu 'we, ensi ku erincumuraho, yaakora ebitari by'obwesigwa; naagirwanisa, naagiima ebyokurya bi eyesiga, naagiteeza enjara, kandi naagimaramu abantu n'enyamaishwa;" 
Ezekiel14:14 nobu aba bantu bashatu Noa na Daniyeli na Yobu baakuba bagirimu, bo ahabw'okuba abahikiriire bakaakiza amagara gaabo gonka. Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugamba." 
Ezekiel14:15 Egi nsi ku nkugyoherereza enyamaishwa enshaarizi kugirabamu, zaagishiisha, yaaba eihamba eritarikurabwamu bantu ahabw'ezo nyamaishwa;" 
Ezekiel14:16 abo bantu bashatu nobu baakuba bagirimu; Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga niinyerahira, tibakaajuna batabani baabo na bahara baabo. Bo bonka bakaakira, kwonka egyo nsi eba eihamba." 
Ezekiel14:17 Nari egyo nsi ku nkugireetera orugamba, naagira nti: K'abakwaitse rurara bagirabemu, naagimaramu abantu n'enyamaishwa;" 
Ezekiel14:18 abo bantu bashatu n'obu baakuba bagirimu, Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga niinyerahira, tibakaajuna batabani baabo nari bahara baabo, kureka bo bonka nibo baakukira." 
Ezekiel14:19 Nainga egyo nsi ku naakugyoherereza orufu, naagyohoraho kashanga yangye kwita ebigirimu, naagimaramu abantu n'enyamaishwa;" 
Ezekiel14:20 nangwa nobu Noa na Daniyeli na Yobu baakuba bagirimu, Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga niinyerahira, tibakaajuna batabani baabo nari bahara baabo; kureka bo bonka, ahabw'okuba abahikiriire, bakaakira." 
Ezekiel14:21 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Mbwenu shi, ka niinyija kukizaho, ku ndaayoherereze Yerusalemu ebintu byangye bina eby'okugifubira bikagisaasa: nibyo rurara, enjara, enyamaishwa mbi, n'orufu, eby'okugimaramu abantu n'enyamaishwa!" 
Ezekiel14:22 Kwonka ku harigira abaahonokaho, baagiihamu batabani baabo na bahara baabo, ku baribahika mwareeba emitwarize yaabo mibi n'ebi barikukora, muryamanya ku akagwe aku ngwisiize Yerusalemu, n'enaku ezi ngiitsize, bihikire." 
Ezekiel14:23 Ku murireeba emitwarize yaabo n'ebi barikukora muryahwa akangonongono; kandi muryamanya ku ebi nkozire omu Yerusalemu, mbikozire ntagituzire busha. Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugamba." 
Ezekiel15:1 Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel15:2 Iwe muntu 'we, mbwenu ekiti ky'omuzaabibu nikikiza ki ebindi biti? Eitaagi ryakyo nirikiza ki eitaagi rikoobokire aha muti gw'omu kibira?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Empimbi ei baakukiihaho, bakaagibaijamu ekintu? Mbwenu abantu bakaakiihaho enkondo y'okuhanikaho ebintu?" 
Ezekiel15:4 Manya bakihindura enku z'okuhemba. Mbwenu omuriro ku guheza kwotsya omutwe gwakyo n'ekibunu kyakyo kyasiriira, kiba kikiine omugasho?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Reeba, ku kiba kihundiriire, tikigira mugasho. Mbwenu ku baakukyotsya kyasiriira, nibwo kyakugira omugasho?" 
Ezekiel15:6 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Nk'oku mpaireyo ekiti ky'omuzaabibu gw'omu miti y'omu kibira kuba enku z'okuhemba, nikwo ndihayo abatuuzi ba Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel15:7 Ndyabata omu kaso. N'obu barihunga omuriro, kwonka guryabamaraho! Kandi ku ndibata omu kaso, nibwo murimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel15:8 Reero egyo nsi, ahabw'abaamwo kutakora eby'obwesigwa, ndyagihindura eihamba. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba." 
Ezekiel16:1 Nyakubaho akagaruka yangira ati: 
Ezekiel16:2 Iwe muntu 'we, manyisa Yerusalemu ebihagaro byayo." 
Ezekiel16:3 Ogigire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikukugambira iwe Yerusalemu. Okakomooka kandi waazaarwa omu nsi y'Abanyakanaani. Shoimwe akaba ari Omuamori, na nyoko ari Omuhiitikazi." 
Ezekiel16:4 Ku waazairwe; aha izooba ri waazaariirweho tibarakushazire rurera, n'obu kwakuba okukwozya n'amaizi ngu oshemere; nari okukusiiga omwonyo, nainga shi okukuhumbika otwenda." 
Ezekiel16:5 Aha izooba ri waazaariirweho, tihariho owaakugiriire embabazi kubikukorera; kureka bakakunaga omu ishwa, ahabw'okuba bakaba nibakunuga." 
Ezekiel16:6 Nyowe ku naakurabireho, naareeba nooyekuringa omu shagama yaawe, naakugambira okigirimu nti: Kagire amagara," 
Ezekiel16:7 okakura nk'ekimera omu ishwa! Naiwe waakura, waanyeeta, waaba empangare, waagira amabeere marungi, n'eishokye ryawe ryakura; kwonka waaguma ojwaire busha, ori entangaare." 
Ezekiel16:8 Ku naakurabireho obundi, naakureeba, naashanga waabaire ow'okurigirwa, naakushashaanuriraho omunagiro gwangye, naakujweka ojwaire busha. Nkakurahira amazima, naaragaana naiwe endagaano y'okukushwera, naiwe waaba owangye. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba." 
Ezekiel16:9 Ntyo naihayo amaizi naakwozyaho eshagama, naakusiiga amajuta g'emioliva." 
Ezekiel16:10 Naakujweka emyenda ebaziirwemu amabara g'ebicwererane n'enkaito z'oruhu rurungi munonga, naakuzirika emyenda ya kitaani enungi, naakuhumbika eya riiri," 
Ezekiel16:11 naakujweka amahunde, naakuta engoro aha mikono, n'enkwanzi omu maraka." 
Ezekiel16:12 Reero naakuta empeta aha nyindo, n'ezindi aha matu, n'ekirunga kirungi aha mutwe." 
Ezekiel16:13 Nikwo waahunzirwe ezaabu, efeeza, n'ebijwaro byawe bikaba ebya kitaani enungi, n'eriiri n'emyenda y'amabara g'ebicwererane, okarya oburo bugoyirwe omu saano y'obunono, n'obwoki n'amajuta g'emioliva. Waakura ori murungi okutakareebwaga, waarugaho waaba omwigarire;" 
Ezekiel16:14 waarangaanwa omu mahanga ahabw'oburungi bwawe obwareetsirwe eby'amahunde ebi naakujwekire. Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugamba. 
Ezekiel16:15 Kwonka ahabw'okwo kurangaanwa kwawe, okeemanya eirungi, waaraaya; waayehayo, waaba owa ibara muhinguzi." 
Ezekiel16:16 Ebijwaro byawe waagira ebi waihamu, waabihundisa endaaro, waaziraayiramu; ekintu ekitakabahoga, kandi ekitaribaho." 
Ezekiel16:17 Ekindi, okatwara amahunde gangye ag'ezaabu n'ag'efeeza waageeheesheramu ebishushani by'abashaija, haza waaraaya nabyo;" 
Ezekiel16:18 waihayo ebijwaro byawe by'ebicwererane waabibijweka; kandi waabitoijera amajuta gangye g'emioliva n'obubaani bwangye. 
Ezekiel16:19 Ebyokurya ebi naakuhaire, eby'esaano y'obunono n'amajuta g'emioliva n'obwoki, ebi naabaire nkugaburira, waabibitoijera, kubibeera ekisooroora kirungi; Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugamba." 
Ezekiel16:20 Reero waakwata batabani baawe na bahara baawe abu wanzaariire, waabatoijera ebyo bishushani ngu bibarye. Mbwenu noogira ngu okuraaya kwawe kukaba kuri ekintu kikye ahariinye?" 
Ezekiel16:21 Haza otaho n'okwita abaana bangye noobatambira ebyo bishushani kuba ekitambo kicwekize? 
Ezekiel16:22 Kandi omu kukora ebyo bihagaro byawe byona, n'obwamaraaya bwawe, toraijukire buri obu waabaire nookinyeeta ojwaire busha, ori entangaare, nooyekuringa omu shagama yaawe." 
Ezekiel16:23 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Ahabw'ebibi byawe ebyo byona, oryakareeba!" 
Ezekiel16:24 Okeeyombekyera enju etunguukire, waayekorera emyanya mikuru omu buri nteeraniro z'emihanda." 
Ezekiel16:25 Ahari buri iteeraniro ry'emihanda okombekaho omwanya mukuru gw'okuramizamu ebishushani. Otyo waaraayisa oburungi bwawe, nooyeheereza buri muhinguzi, waakanyisa obwamaraaya bwawe." 
Ezekiel16:26 Ekindi, okaraaya n'Abanyamisiri, bataahi baawe enduruuhi, waakanyisa obwamaraaya bwawe, haza wangwisa kubi." 
Ezekiel16:27 Naanye nikyo ndikufubirira, nkatuubya egabo yaawe, nkakurekurira abazigu baawe abarikukururuuhira, bahara b'Abafilisiti baitsirwe enshoni ahabw'emitwarize yaawe mibi." 
Ezekiel16:28 Ekindi, ahabw'okutahaaga kwawe, okaraaya n'Abaasiriya. Buzimazima okaraaya nabo, nabwo tiwaamarwa." 
Ezekiel16:29 Kandi okakanyisa obwamaraaya bwawe n'abashuubuzi ba Bukaludaaya, hoona nabwo tiwaamarwa." 
Ezekiel16:30 Mukama Ruhanga naakugira ati: Ebishi orahuka kuhampuka! Reeba okakora ebyo byona ebikorwa maraaya rwariire-enshoni; 
Ezekiel16:31 waayeyombekyera enju etunguukire ahari buri nteeraniro z'emihanda; waayekorera emyanya y'okuramizamu ebishushani hoona ahu abantu bateeranira, kwonka tiwaaba nka baamaraaya abandi abenda kuguriirirwa." 
Ezekiel16:32 Ebishi ori nk'omukazi enshambani, otaasya abu atarikumanya, omu mwanya gw'okutaasya iba!" 
Ezekiel16:33 Abashaija nibo baha baamaraaya ebiconco, kwonka iwe niiwe obiha nkuzi zaawe; noobagurira ngu bakwijeho nibaruga buri hantu ahabw'obwamaraaya bwawe." 
Ezekiel16:34 Nikyo omu kuraaya kwawe obeereire ow'omutaano aha bandi bakazi; ahabw'okuba tihariho owaakwohize kuba maraaya; kureka niiwe ogurira abantu; haza bo batarikukugurira. Nikyo obeereire ow'omutaano. 
Ezekiel16:35 Iwe maraaya 'we, hurira eki Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Ezekiel16:36 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Ahabw'okuba obu waabaire nooraaya na nkunzi zaawe, okeejuura, eby'enshoni byawe byayanama, baakureeba ojwaire busha, kandi ahabw'ebishushani byawe ebirikuramibwa, n'ahabw'abaana baawe abu waitsire kubibatambira," 
Ezekiel16:37 naanye nikyo nditeeranira hamwe nkunzi zaawe ezi waabaire oshemererwa nazo, boona abu waakunzire n'abu waatamirwe, nkabahuruza bakaruga oku n'oku, bakakurwanisa; nkakujweka busha omu maisho gaabo, bakakureeba ori entangaare." 
Ezekiel16:38 Ndyakucwera orubanja nk'orw'abakazi abasiisire obushwere, bakaita abantu, nkuhe ekifubiro ky'okwitwa, nkwiniire ekiniga." 
Ezekiel16:39 Ndyakurekurira nkunzi zaawe, bakumbagaze egyo nju yaawe etunguukire, basheenye emyanya yaawe mikuru, bakujuure ebi ojwaire, banyangye amahunde gaawe, bakutsigye ojwaire busha, ori entangaare." 
Ezekiel16:40 Baryakuhururiza eihe ry'okukurwanisa, bakuteere amabaare, bakutemagure na zaarurara zaabo." 
Ezekiel16:41 Baryayotsya amaju gaawe, bakufubirire omu maisho g'abakazi baingi; ntyo nkuzibire kugaruka kuraaya, obe otakiguriirira bantu bundi." 
Ezekiel16:42 Okwo nikwo ndikumariraho ekiniga, nkarekyera aho kukugirira eihato, ndyatuuza, ndekye kukugirira ekiniga obundi." 
Ezekiel16:43 Ahabw'okutaijuka biro byawe, obu waabaire nookinyeeta, kureka okaanyitsa ekiniga ahabw'ebi orikukora, nikyo ndikuzimuuririra ebi waakozire bikakutukurira; Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugamba. Mbwenu ebihagaro ebyo byona torabikozire okataho n'obwamaraaya?" 
Ezekiel16:44 Reeba, omuntu weena ocwa enfumu aryakucwaho n'egi ati: Naasinga, n'owa nyina!" 
Ezekiel16:45 Ori owa nyoko, owaatamirwe iba n'abaana be; kandi ori owa mukuru waawe na murumuna waawe, abaatamirwe baibabo n'abaana baabo! Nyoko akaba ari Omuhiitikazi, na shoimwe ari Omuamori!" 
Ezekiel16:46 Mukuru waawe ni Samariya eyaabaire eri n'ebyanga byayo aha bukiizi bwawe bwa-bumosho; kandi murumuna waawe owaabaire atuura aha bukiizi bwawe bwa-buryo, ni Sodoma n'ebyanga byayo." 
Ezekiel16:47 Kwonka toramazirwe kukuratira emitwarize yaabo; n'obu kwakuba okukora ebihagaro nk'ebyabo; kureka omu kaanya kakye kati, omu bi waabaire nookora, okasiisikara okubakira." 
Ezekiel16:48 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Niinyerahira! Murumuna waawe Sodoma n'ebyanga byayo tibarakozire nk'oku iwe n'ebyanga byawe mwakozire. 
Ezekiel16:49 Reeba, eki nikyo murumuna waawe Sodoma yaacumwire: Uwe n'ab'omu byanga bye bakeetunguura, ahabw'okuba ku baagizire ebyokurya bingi, baagogyera, tibaahwera booro n'abakyene." 
Ezekiel16:50 Baagira emyekuniko bankorera ebihagaro omu maisho; naanye ku naakireebire, naabacwekyereza." 
Ezekiel16:51 Aba Samariya tibarakozire nangwa na kimwe kya kabiri ky'ebicumuro byawe. Iwe okozire ebihagaro bingi okubakira. Kandi ahabw'ebihagaro byona ebi okozire, waareetera ab'omu byanga byawe kureebeka nk'abahikiriire." 
Ezekiel16:52 Yemera ekihemu kyawe! Manya niiwe waihiise orubanja aha b'omu byanga byawe ahabw'okuba iwe akakora ebibi bingi okubakira; nikyo barikukukirira kuba abahikiriire. N'ahabw'ekyo itwa enshoni, oyemere ekihemu kyawe, ahabw'okuba niiwe oreeteire ab'omu byanga byawe kureebeka bari abahikiriire." 
Ezekiel16:53 Ndyabagarura aha buteeka. Ndyagarura aha buteeka aba Sodoma n'ab'omu byanga byayo, ngarure aha buteeka aba Samariya n'ab'omu byanga byayo; kandi naiwe Yerusalemu abawe mbagarure aha buteeka hamwe nabo;" 
Ezekiel16:54 obone kwemera ekihemu kyawe n'okwitwa enshoni ahabw'ebi waakozire byona; haza ekyo kibahuumurize. 
Ezekiel16:55 Nk'oku aba mukuru waawe, n'aba murumuna waawe: aba Sodoma n'ab'omu byanga byayo n'aba Samariya n'ab'omu byanga byayo barigaruka aha buteeka bwabo bwa ira; naiwe n'ab'omu byanga byawe nikwo murigaruka aha buteeka bwanyu bwa ira." 
Ezekiel16:56 Mbwenu shi murumuna waawe Sodoma okaba otamucwa enfumu, obu waabaire nooyetunguura," 
Ezekiel16:57 ebibi byawe bitakeerukire? Reeba, hati naiwe noojumwa nkawe ab'omu byanga bya Edomu na bataahi baabo, n'ab'omu byanga by'Abafilisiti abakwehinguririize nibakugaya." 
Ezekiel16:58 Oshemereire nu kwemera ekifubiro ky'obuhwa-nshoni bwawe n'ebihagaro byawe. Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba. 
Ezekiel16:59 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Buzimazima, iwe owaagayire endahiro, okaita endagaano, niinyija kukutwaza nk'oku waakozire!" 
Ezekiel16:60 Kwonka shi ndyaijuka endagaano ei naaragaine naiwe nookinyeeta; mpamye naiwe endagaano etarihwaho. 
Ezekiel16:61 Nibwo oriijuka emitwarize yaawe, okaitwa enshoni waareeba nindeeta mukuru waawe na murumuna waawe, nimbakuha kuba bahara baawe; kitari habw'endagaano ei naaragaine naiwe." 
Ezekiel16:62 Ndyahamya endagaano yangye naiwe, omanye ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel16:63 Reero ku ndikusaasira ebicumuro ebi waakozire, nibwo oriijuka, okashoberwa, okabura eky'okugamba ahabw'okwitwa enshoni. Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugamba." 
Ezekiel17:1 Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel17:2 Iwe muntu 'we, gambira ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli ekishaakuzo noobacwera enfumu," 
Ezekiel17:3 noobagira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba. Eishamba ry'amapapa mahango n'ebyoya biraingwa by'amabara maingi rikaija Lebanooni, ryatwara akati akashebukire aha mutwe gw'omuryohe," 
Ezekiel17:4 ryacwaho akataagi akarikuguhereeruka aha mutwe, ryakatwara omu nsi enshuubuzi, ryakata omu rurembo rw'abashuubuzi." 
Ezekiel17:5 Bwanyima ryatwara akati k'omutookwa gw'omuzaabibu gw'omu nsi eri, ryakabyara omu itaka rirungi, aha rubaju rw'omugyera muhango, ryakataho nk'akataagi k'omukinga." 
Ezekiel17:6 Kaagina kaarugwamu omuzaabibu mugufu ogujanjamwire, amataagi gaagwo gaakura nigagarura ei eryo ishamba riri; kwonka emizi yaagwo yaaguma ahi gumezire. Gutyo gwaba omuzaabibu, gwajanjamura amataagi, gwashebukwaho amababi." 
Ezekiel17:7 Mbwenu hakaba hariho erindi ishamba ry'amapapa mahango n'ebyoya bingi. Ogwo muzaabibu gwagondeka emizi yaagwo gwagitooza ei riri, kandi gwajanjamura amataagi gaagwo nigagarura ei riri, ngu ribone kuguma nirigwitirira. Eryo ishamba ryagwiha ahi gwabaire gubyairwe," 
Ezekiel17:8 ryagutwara ryagubyara omu itaka rirungi, aha rubaju rw'omugyera muhango; ngu gubone kugina amataagi, n'okwana n'okuba omuzaabibu murungi." 
Ezekiel17:9 Obagambire oti: Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Ebyo ogwo muzaabibu nigwija kuba gye? Riri ishamba tiririkwija kukuura emizi yaagwo, rikashara amataagi gaagwo; amababi gaagwo goona agarikubengyeya gakahotoka? Nangwa n'okuguhigura tikirikwetengyesa maani, nari abantu baingi." 
Ezekiel17:10 Mbwenu shi ku guraatwarwe gwabyarwa ahandi, nigwija kuba gye? Omuyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba ku guraaguteere, tigurikwija kuhotokyera kimwe, gukoomera ahi gumezire?" 
Ezekiel17:11 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel17:12 Hati gambira abo bantu bangye abagomi oti: Timurikumanya eki ebyo birikumanyisa? Obagambire oti: Reeba, omugabe wa Babulooni akaija Yerusalemu, yaakwata omugabe waayo, n'abategyeki baayo, yaabatwara owe Babulooni." 
Ezekiel17:13 Kandi akatwara omwe aha banyiginya baayo, yaakora nawe endagaano naamurahiza. Yaatwara n'abantu bakuru b'omuri egyo nsi, abu yaakwatsire," 
Ezekiel17:14 ngu obwo bugabe bubone kubundikwa, burekye kutunguuka, kureka ngu ku baraarinde endagaano ye, nibwo buraagumeho." 
Ezekiel17:15 Kwonka ogwo mugabe akamugomera, yaayohereza abajwekyerwa Misiri, ngu bamuhe embaraasi n'eihe rihango. Mbwenu ebyo aryaba gye? Omuntu orikukora ebintu nk'ebyo naabaasa kukira? Naabaasa kwita endagaano, haza akire?" 
Ezekiel17:16 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Niinyerahira nti: Buzimazima omuri ogwo mwanya gw'omuri Babulooni ogu omugabe owaamwemekire atwiremu, ou agayire endahiro ye, akaita endagaano ye, nimwo arigwa." 
Ezekiel17:17 Abanyababulooni ku barirunda eby'okutemberaho, baayombeka ebigo by'okugoteraho kucwekyereza abantu baingi, Faraaho n'eihe rye ery'amaani n'engabo ze nyingi taribaasa kumuha emikono omuri orwo rugamba." 
Ezekiel17:18 Tarikira, ahabw'okuba akagaya endahiro, yaita endagaano, kunu yaikiriize kutegyekwa, haza yaakora ebyo bintu byona." 
Ezekiel17:19 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Niinyerahira nti: Nk'oku agayire endahiro yangye, akaita endagaano yangye, naanye ndyabimutura, bimutukurire." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ndyamurengyezaho ekigoye kyangye, akwatwe omutego gwangye mmureete Babulooni, mmucwerereyo orubanja rw'okundeebya." 
Ezekiel17:21 Engabo ze zoona entoore ziitirwe aha rugamba, emponoka zitaataanisizibwe ei emiyaga egarura. Reero nibwo murimanya ku Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naakigamba." 
Ezekiel17:22 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Nyowe nyenka ndyaiha akati kashebukire eruguru, aha mutwe gw'omuryohe, nkabyare. Ndyacwa akataagi koorobi ak'aha mutwe gw'obutaagi bwagwo obuto, nkeebyarire aha rushozi ruraingwa orutunguukire." 
Ezekiel17:23 Ndyakabyara aha rushozi ruraingwa orwa Isiraeli, kagine amataagi, kaane, kandi karugwemu omuryohe murungi; enyamaishwa z'emiringo yoona zitaahe ahansi yaagwo, n'enyonyi za ibara muringo zaarikye omu mataagi gaagwo." 
Ezekiel17:24 Emiti yoona ey'omu ishwa nibwo erimanya ku Nyowe Nyakubaho mbandika emiti miraingwa, nkareisya emigufu; nkoomya emiti emibisi, nkareetera eyomire kubengyeya. Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naakigamba, kandi ndyakikora." 
Ezekiel18:1 Nyakubaho akagaruka yangira ati: 
Ezekiel18:2 N'enki ekibacwisa enfumu aha b'omu nsi ya Isiraeli, mukagira muti: Baishe b'abaana bariire emizaabibu erikununguna, amaino g'abaana baabo gaaba nigo gaagira amangigina?" 
Ezekiel18:3 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Niinyerahira, egyo nfumu timurigicwa bundi omuri Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel18:4 Reeba, amagara g'abantu boona n'agangye, aga ishe w'omwana n'ag'omwana we n'agangye. Omuntu okora ekibi niwe arifa." 
Ezekiel18:5 Omuntu yaaba ari ohikiriire, yaakora eki ebiragiro birikuragiira kandi ekihikire;" 
Ezekiel18:6 yaaba atarikuriira ha nshozi nari okuhanga amaisho emandwa ezi ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli barikuramya, atarikuhampura muka mutaahi we, nobu kwakuba okuhika omukazi ori omu kwezi," 
Ezekiel18:7 atarikutwaza kubi omuntu weena, kureka orikugarurira omwineho eibanja eki yaamukwatiriize, atarikwambura by'abantu, kureka orikuha ebyokurya abaine enjara; akaha eky'okujwara abajwaire busha," 
Ezekiel18:8 otaguza ngu bamuhe ekiteebwamu, nari ngu atungyemu enshaagi, otakora kibi kandi oramura omu buryo omuntu na mugyenzi we,"
