Ezekiel18:9 okuratira ebi naataireho, akata omutima aha kukora ebi naaragiire; niwe ahikiriire, kandi buzimazima aryagumaho. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba." 
Ezekiel18:10 Ku arizaara omutabani yaaba omusikuzi, omwambuzi omwitsi w'abantu," 
Ezekiel18:11 otarikukora kintu na kimwe omu bi arikuragiirwa, kureka akariira aha nshozi, akahampura muka mutaahi we," 
Ezekiel18:12 akatwaza kubi abooro n'abakyene, akasikura eby'abandi, akanga kugarura ebi akwatiriziibwe, kureka akahanga amaisho emandwa, akakora ebihagaro," 
Ezekiel18:13 akaguza ngu bamuhe ekiteebwamu, kandi akatwara eby'enshaagi; mbwenu ogwo aryagumaho? Ngaaha, tarigumaho. Ahabw'ebihagaro bi yaakozire, buzimazima aryafa, eshagama ye emutukurire." 
Ezekiel18:14 Kwonka ogwo mushaija ku akuzaara omutabani, onu yaareeba ebibi ebi ishe arikukora, haza yaatiina, ataakora nk'ebyo," 
Ezekiel18:15 ataariira ha nshozi nobu kwakuba okuhanga amaisho emandwa ezi ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli barikuramya; ataahampura muka mutaahi we; 
Ezekiel18:16 ataakora kubi omuntu weena, ataashaba mukwato, ataasikura by'abandi; kureka akaha ebyokurya abaine enjara kandi akajweka abajwaire busha," 
Ezekiel18:17 akazibira engaro ze kukora ekibi, atatware kiteebwamu nari enshaagi, akakora kandi akakuratira ebi naataireho, ogwo mwana tarifa ahabw'okutahikiirira kwa ishe; buzimazima aryagumaho." 
Ezekiel18:18 Kwonka ishe, ahabw'okwita kubi n'okunyaga beene waabo ataine saasi, kandi akataho n'okukora ebintu bitari birungi omu bantu, buzimazima ogwo aryafa ahabw'okutahikiirira kwe." 
Ezekiel18:19 Nobu muraabe nimugira muti: Ahabw'enki omwana atarikuturwa okutahikiirira kwa ishe? Omwana oryorobera ebiragiro byangye kandi yaabihikiiriza byona, buzimazima ogwo aryagumaho." 
Ezekiel18:20 Omuntu okora ekibi niwe arifa. Omwana tariturwa kibi kya ishe; na ishe w'omwana tariturwa kibi ky'omwana we. Ohikiriire, aryabarirwa okuhikiirira kwe, n'enyabibi ebarirwe ebibi byayo." 
Ezekiel18:21 Kwonka omuntu enyabibi ku arikuhinduka, yaareka ebibi bye byona ebi yaakozire, yaayerinda byona ebi naataireho, yaakora eby'ebiragiro kandi ebihikire, buzimazima aryagumaho; tarifa." 
Ezekiel18:22 Ebicumuro byona ebi yaakozire tihariho na kimwe ekiriijukwa kumuturwa; kureka aryagumaho ahabw'eby'okuhikiirira ebi akozire. 
Ezekiel18:23 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Ebyo Nyowe nshemerererwa okufa kw'omusiisi, tiinye nyenda ngu ahindukye arekye emitwarize ye, haza agumeho?" 
Ezekiel18:24 Kwonka shi omuntu ohikiriire ku yaakuhinduka yaareka eby'okuhikiirira kwe yaacumura, yaakora ebihagaro nk'ebi enyabibi ekora, akaagumaho? Ebirungi bi yaakozire byona tihariho na kimwe ekiriijukwa. Ahabw'okugira orubanja rw'okutaba mwesigwa n'ahabw'okukora ebibi, aryafa." 
Ezekiel18:25 Nabwo hoona mugira muti: Emitwarize ya Nyakubaho tehikire. Mbwenu imwe ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli nimuhurire. 
Ezekiel18:26 Omuntu ohikiriire ku arikuhinduka, yaareka eby'okuhikiirira kwe yaakora ebibi aryafa abizire. Ahabw'ebibi bi akozire aryafa." 
Ezekiel18:27 Kwonka omuntu enyabibi ku yaakuhinduka, yaareka ebibi ebi abaire naakora, yaakora eby'ebiragiro kandi ebihikire, aryakiza amagara ge." 
Ezekiel18:28 Buzimazima aryagumaho, tarifa, ahabw'okuba akateekateeka munonga, yaahinduka, yaareka ebibi byona ebi yaabaire naakora." 
Ezekiel18:29 Nabwo hoona ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli nibagira bati: Emitwarize ya Nyakubaho tehikire. Imwe ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli 'mwe, nimugira ngu emitwarize yangye tehikire? Eyaanyu tiyo etahikire?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: N'ahabw'ekyo imwe ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli 'mwe, ndyabacwera orubanja, buri omwe nk'oku emitwarize ye eri. Mbwenu nu, nimweteise muhindukye, murekye ebibi byanyu byona, ebicumuro bitakaabareetera kucwekyerera." 
Ezekiel18:31 Mweihireho kimwe ebibi byona ebi mwakozire mukancumuraho; mwetungire omutima musya n'ebiteekateeko bisya. Imwe b'eihanga rya Isiraeli 'mwe, mbwenu nimwendera ki kufa?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Manya Nyowe tiinyendeza muntu weena kufa; Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugamba. Mbwenu, nimuhindukye, haza mugire amagara." 
Ezekiel19:1 Mbwenu iwe tongyeza abategyeki ba Isiraeli 
Ezekiel19:2 noogira oti: Ebishi nyoko akaba ari entarekazi omu zindi ntare! Ekabyama ahagati y'ebishore byayo neebyontsya. 
Ezekiel19:3 Ekoororaho kimwe, kyaba ekitsigazi; kikeega okwehiigira, kyarya abantu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Amahanga gakakiteerera enduuru, gaakiitira omu busya bwago, gaakitwaza amarobo omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Ezekiel19:5 Egyo ntarekazi ku yaakitegyereize, yaahwa amatsiko, yaihayo ekindi kishore, nakyo yaakihindura ekitsigazi." 
Ezekiel19:6 Kyaguma nikikora oku n'oku n'ezindi ntare, kyaba ekitsigazi, kyayega okwehiigira, kyarya abantu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Kyasheenya ebigo byabo, endembo zaabo kyazihindura amatongo; ku kyabaire kitsinda, ensi n'abagirimu baitwa obwoba." 
Ezekiel19:8 Amahanga nikwo kuruga omu byanga bihereraineho gakahurura kukirwanisa gakakirengyezaho ekigoye kikakwatirwa omu busya bwabo. 
Ezekiel19:9 Bakakikwatisa amarobo, baakita omu kiju baakitwarira omugabe wa Babulooni. Baakita ah'okurindirwa ngu okutsinda kwakyo kutarihuririrwa obundi aha nshozi za Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel19:10 Nyoko akaba ari nk'omuzaabibu ogubyairwe omu musiri oguri aha rubaju rw'omugyera, ogurikwera gye kandi ogwine amataagi maingi ahabw'okugira amaizi maingi." 
Ezekiel19:11 Empimbi yaagwo egumire yaahinduka enkoni y'omutegyeki. Yaayoga omu gandi mataagi amahango yaareebekyera ahaiguru y'agandi mataagi gaagwo agashakambire. 
Ezekiel19:12 Kwonka ogwo muzaabibu gukarandurwa n'ekiniga, gwanagwa ahansi; omuyaga gwa burugwa-izooba gwagwomya, ebijuma byagwo byakonkoboka, n'empimbi yaagwo egumire yaayoma; omuriro gwagwotsya." 
Ezekiel19:13 Mbwenu gutwairwe, gwabyarwa omu ihamba, omu nsi eyomire kandi ekarangataine." 
Ezekiel19:14 Omuriro gwaruga aha mpimbi yaagwo, gwayokyeza kimwe amataagi gaagwo n'ebijuma. Mbwenu tigwakiine mpimbi egumire ey'okurugwamu enkoni y'omugabe! Ekyo nikyo kyeshongoro ky'okutonzya, eki baabaire beeshongora." 
Ezekiel20:1 Omu mwaka gwa mushanju, omu kwezi kwa kataano, aha kiro kya ikumi eky'okwo kwezi, bamwe omu bakuru b'Abaisiraeli bakaija kwehanuuza ahari Nyakubaho, baashutama omu maisho gangye." 
Ezekiel20:2 Haza Nyakubaho yangira ati: 
Ezekiel20:3 Iwe muntu 'we, gambira abakuru ba Baisiraeli, obagire oti: Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Mwizire kuunyehanuuzaho? Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga niinyerahira nti: Tindikwija kwikiriza ku muunyehanuuzaho!" 
Ezekiel20:4 Mbwenu ebyo iwe muntu 'we, noija kubacwera orubanja? Reero nu, obamanyise ebihagaro ebi baishebo baakozire." 
Ezekiel20:5 Obagire oti: Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Obu naatoorana Isiraeli, nkarahira aha b'oruzaaro rw'omuryango gwa Yakobo, naabeemanyisiza omu nsi ya Misiri, naabarahiraho ningira nti: Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Ezekiel20:6 Eryo izooba nkabarahiraho ku ndibaiha omu nsi ya Misiri, nkabata omu nsi ei naabatooraniire, ensi erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki, erikukiza ezindi nsi zoona ekitiinwa." 
Ezekiel20:7 Nkabagambira nti: Munagire kimwe ebintu birikunugwa, ebi mutuura muhangire amaisho. Buri omwe omuriimwe abangye, murekye kweshiisha n'ebishushani bya Misiri ebirikuramibwa. Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waanyu." 
Ezekiel20:8 Kwonka bakangomera baayanga kumpurira, buri muntu tiyaanaga bintu birikunugwa ebi baabaire bahanga amaisho; kandi tibaareka bishushani bya Misiri ebirikuramibwa. Naanye naateekateeka kuboohoraho kashanga yangye, n'okubamariraho ekiniga kyangye omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:9 Kwonka tinaatwaza ntyo, ahabw'okutenda kujumisa eiziina ryangye omu mahanga gu batwiremu, agu naabemanyisiizemu obu naabaiha omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:10 Ntyo naabaiha omu nsi ya Misiri, naabatwara omu ihamba," 
Ezekiel20:11 naabaha ebi naataireho, naabamanyisa ebi naaragiire, ebibaisaho omuntu yaabyorobera." 
Ezekiel20:12 Ekindi, nkabateeraho zaasabato kuba akamanyiso k'endagaano yangye nabo, ngu babone kumanya ku Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye mbeeza." 
Ezekiel20:13 Kwonka ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli bakangomera bari omu ihamba, tibaakuratira bi naataireho; kandi baayanga kukora ebi naaragiire ebireetera omuntu weena obyorobera amagara, baashiisha munonga zaasabato zangye; naanye naateekateeka okuboohoraho kashanga yangye omu ihamba, kubamariraho kimwe." 
Ezekiel20:14 Kwonka tinaatwaza ntyo, ahabw'okutenda kujumisa eiziina ryangye omu mahanga agu naabaihiremu." 
Ezekiel20:15 Ekindi, nkabarahirira omu ihamba ku ntaribahitsya omu nsi ei naabahaire, ensi erikuhita ezindi, erikuhimintika amate n'obwoki," 
Ezekiel20:16 ahabw'okuba bakanga kukora ebi naaragiire, tibaakuratira ebi naataireho, baashiisha zaasabato zangye. Manya emandwa zaabo zibatwara omutima." 
Ezekiel20:17 Kwonka hoona nkabagirira esaasi tinaabacwekyerereza mu ihamba kubamariraho kimwe. 
Ezekiel20:18 Reero nkeehanangiririza abaana baabo omu ihamba nti: Mutakuratira ebi baashwenkuriimwe baataireho nobu kwakuba okukora ebi baaragiire, nari okwehagaza nimuramya emandwa." 
Ezekiel20:19 Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye Ruhanga waanyu, mukuratire ebi naataireho, mute omutima aha kukora ebi naaragiire." 
Ezekiel20:20 Kandi Sabato zangye zigume ziri ezirikwera, zibe akamanyiso k'endagaano yangye naimwe, mubone kumanya ku Nyowe Nyakubaho ndi Ruhanga waanyu." 
Ezekiel20:21 Kwonka abo baana bakangomera, baayanga kukuratira ebi naataireho, kandi tibaata mutima ha kukora ebi naaragiriire, ebireetera omuntu weena obyorobera amagara; baashiisha zaasabato zangye. Naanye naateekateeka kuboohoraho kashanga yangye, n'okubamariraho ekiniga kyangye omu ihamba." 
Ezekiel20:22 Kwonka tinaatwaza ntyo ahabw'okutenda kijumisa eiziina ryangye omu mahanga gu naabaihiremu. 
Ezekiel20:23 Ekindi, nkabarahiririra omu ihamba ku ndibataataanisiza omu mahanga, nkabanaganaga omu nsi z'okwo;" 
Ezekiel20:24 ahabw'okuba tibarakozire ebi naaragiire; kureka bakanga kukora ebi naataireho baashiisha zaasabato zangye, baaguma bahangire amaisho emandwa ezi baishebo baaramize." 
Ezekiel20:25 Nikyo naabateereireho amateeka gatari marungi, n'ebiragiro ebitakubaasize kubareetera amagara." 
Ezekiel20:26 Kandi naabareka, baayehagaza nibatamba abaana baabo b'emijigaijo, nibabootsya; ngu nkaabatiinisa, bamanya ku Niinye Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel20:27 N'ahabw'ekyo, iwe muntu 'we, gambira ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli, noobagira oti: Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Omuri eki, nabwo baashoimwe bakandogotaho, bandeebya." 
Ezekiel20:28 Manya ku naabahikize omu nsi ei naarahiire kubaha, mbwenu ahi baabaire bareeba ekibungo kiraingwa nari omuti guyumbize, batambiraho ebitambo, batoijeraho emitoijo erikungwisa kubi. Kandi okwo niyo baabaire booterera emigaju yaabo, bakashukirayo emitoijo yaabo y'ebyokunywa." 
Ezekiel20:29 Nkababuuza nti: Ogwo mwanya gw'okuramizaho emandwa ogu murikuzaho ni ki? Nikyo bagwetera Baama okuhitsya n'eri izooba. 
Ezekiel20:30 Mbwenu gambira ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli oti: Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Ebyo naimwe nimwenda kweshiisha kutooreza emicwe ya baashoimwe nimuhaba muhampwirwe ebihagaro byabo? 
Ezekiel20:31 Manya ku mutoija emitoijo yaanyu, mwatamba batabani baanyu nimubootsya, muba nimwehagazisa emandwa zi muramya okuhitsya n'eri izooba. Mbwenu imwe b'eihanga rya Isiraeli 'mwe, obwo niinyija kubaikiriza kuunyebuuzaho? Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Niinyerahira, tindikwija kwikiriza ku muunyebuuzaho!" 
Ezekiel20:32 Eki murikuteekateeka nimugira muti: Ka tube nk'agandi mahanga, tube nk'enganda z'omu zindi nsi, turamye ebiti n'amabaare, tikiriba kwo." 
Ezekiel20:33 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Buzimazima niinyerahira, n'omukono gw'amaani ogubangire kandi nyine ekiniga kingi, ndyaba mukama waanyu, mbategyekye." 
Ezekiel20:34 Ndyabaiha omu mahanga, mbataaruure omu nsi ezi mwataataaniiremu, n'omukono gw'amaani ogubangire, nyine ekiniga kingi," 
Ezekiel20:35 mbate omu ihamba ry'okwo omu mahanga, mbe niyo naabatonganisiza nitureebana." 
Ezekiel20:36 Nk'oku naatonganisiize baashwenkuriimwe omu ihamba ry'omuri Misiri, nikwo naimwe ndibatonganisa. Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugamba." 
Ezekiel20:37 Ndyabashorooresa enkoni yangye, mutaahemu mbareetere kuhitsya endagaano yangye." 
Ezekiel20:38 Ndyaiha omuriimwe abagomi n'abancumuraho, mbaihe omu nsi ei bashuuhuukiiremu. Kwonka tibaritaaha mu nsi ya Isiraeli. Nibwo murimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel20:39 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Imwe ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli, nimwirooko, buri omwe omuriimwe aramye emandwa ze, haza ndeebe nyentsya ku mutarimpurira, mukarekyera aho kuhemura eiziina ryangye eririkwera n'emitoijo yaanyu n'emandwa zaanyu." 
Ezekiel20:40 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Manya aha rushozi rwangye orurikwera, oruraingwa omuri Isiraeli, Abaisiraeli boona oku baingana niho barindamiza omuri egyo nsi. Okwo niyo ndibaikiririza, nkaakiira ebi mureetsire, n'ebiconco byanyu ebirungi, hamwe n'emitoijo yaanyu erikwera." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ku ndibaiha omu mahanga, naabataaruura omu nsi ezi mwataataaniiremu, nibwo ndiikiriza emitoijo n'ebitambo byanyu ebicwekize eby'ekisooroora kirungi, nkabeeyorekyera omuri ago mahanga ku ndi Orikwera." 
Ezekiel20:42 Reero ku ndibahitsya omu nsi ya Isiraeli, ei naarahiire kuha baashoimwe, nibwo murimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel20:43 Kandi okwo niyo muriijukira emitwarize yaanyu, n'ebi mwakozire byona mukeeshiisha; reero muryayetamwa ahabw'ebibi bi mwakozire." 
Ezekiel20:44 Kandi ku ndibatwaza ntyo ahabw'okutenda kuhemura eiziina ryangye, kitari habw'emitwarize yaanyu emibi nari aha bw'ebihagaro bi murikukora, imwe b'eihanga rya Isiraeli 'mwe, nibwo murimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho. Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugamba." 
Ezekiel20:45 Kandi Nyakubaho akangambira ati: 
Ezekiel20:46 Iwe muntu 'we, reeba aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, oharangirire ebirihagwera; kandi orangye ebiriba aha nsi y'ekibira ky'omuri Negebu." 
Ezekiel20:47 Ogambire ekibira kya Negebu oti: Hurira eki Nyakubaho arikugamba. Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Reeba ndyakutweka, omuriro gwokyeze kimwe buri kiti kyawe kyona ekibisi n'ekyomire. Endimi zaagwo ezirikubuguma tiziriraazibwa, kureka guryababura buri muntu, okwiha aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo okuta aha bwa bumosho." 
Ezekiel20:48 Abantu boona baryareeba ku Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye ngutwekire; kandi tihariho oribaasa kuguraaza. 
Ezekiel20:49 Naanye naamugira nti: Ai bambe, Mukama Ruhanga! Abantu ka nibangambaho ngu ndi omucooboozi!" 
Ezekiel21:1 Nyakubaho akangira ati: Iwe muntu 'we," 
Ezekiel21:2 naga amaisho Yerusalemu, orangirire ebirigwera emyanya erikwera, orangye ebiriba aha nsi ya Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel21:3 Haza ogambire egyo nsi ya Isiraeli oti: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Reeba, naaba omuzigu waawe. Niinyija kusyora rurara yangye omu kyobati kyayo, nkumaremu abahikiriire n'abasiisi." 
Ezekiel21:4 Mbwenu ahabw'okwenda kukumaramu abahikiriire n'abasiisi, rurara yangye neija kuruga omu kyobati kyayo, erwanise abantu boona, okwiha omu bukiizi-bwa-buryo okuta aha bwa-bumosho." 
Ezekiel21:5 Haza abantu boona bamanye ku Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye nsyoireyo rurara yangye omu kyobati kyayo. Kandi terikwija kukigarukamu. 
Ezekiel21:6 N'ahabw'ekyo iwe muntu 'we, tsinda! Tsindira omu maisho gaabo, obusaasi bukucwire omugongo, oine obujune bwingi." 
Ezekiel21:7 Reero ku baraakubuuze bati: Ahanki nootsindagana? Obagire oti: Nintsindagana ahabw'ebi mpuriire. Ku biraabeho, buri muntu naija kuhahaara omutima, atentebukye emikono, agwe enshazi, amaju ge gajogajogokye, gabe nk'amaizi. Reeba, ebyo nibiija kubaho, kandi nibiija kuhikiirira. Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugamba." 
Ezekiel21:8 Nyakubaho akagaruka yangira ati: 
Ezekiel21:9 Iwe muntu 'we, ranga ogire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama arikugira: Reeba rurara etyaziibwe kandi ezigwirwe." 
Ezekiel21:10 Etyarize kwita, ezigwirwe ngu etyankane nk'omurabyo! Mbwenu aho nitwija kushemererwa? Mwana wangye, oyangire kuhanwa." 
Ezekiel21:11 Nikyo rurara eheereirweyo kuzigurwa, ngu ebone kukwatwa. Kandi etyaziibwe yaazigurwa ngu ekwatsibwe omwitsi." 
Ezekiel21:12 Mbwenu iwe muntu 'we, cura oboroogye ahabw'okuba n'ey'okurwanisa abantu bangye, n'abategyeki ba Isiraeli boona. Bo, hamwe n'abantu bangye, n'ab'okwitwa rurara. N'ahabw'ekyo yemaamaate." 
Ezekiel21:13 Manya Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Ekyo ti ky'okugyeza? Hati ku muraabe mwangire kuhanwa, ekindi babagire bata?" 
Ezekiel21:14 Mbwenu nu, iwe muntu 'we, ranga oteere omu ngaro, orekye rurara eite abu eraite, eteme kabiri nari kashatu. Ni rurara y'okwita kuhango, okubaturukire embaju zoona," 
Ezekiel21:15 ngu babone kuhahaara omutima, baingi bagwe aha marembo gaabo. Rurara erikutiinisa kandi erikutyankana nk'omurabyo esyoirweyo, kandi eteirwe aha marembo gaabo kwita." 
Ezekiel21:16 Temera kimwe aha rubaju rwa buryo n'orwa bumosho ei ogyemire obwogi; 
Ezekiel21:17 naanye nteere omu ngaro, nyemare ekiniga. Ekyo Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naakigamba." 
Ezekiel21:18 Nyakubaho akagaruka yangira ati: 
Ezekiel21:19 Iwe muntu 'we, yoreka emihanda ebiri, ei omugabe wa Babulooni araarabemu akwaitse rurara. Haza yombi ebe neeruga omu nsi emwe. Reero okore ekyapa, okite ahu omuhanda gurikuza omu rurembo gurikutandikira." 
Ezekiel21:20 Oyorekye omuhanda ogu rurara eraatoore neeza Raba ey'Abaamoni, na Bayuda na Yerusalemu, ey'ebigo bigumire." 
Ezekiel21:21 Manya omugabe wa Babulooni ayemereire ahu emihanda erikutaanira, ahu yombi erikutandikira, ngu araguze. Reeba naazunguza emyambi, naaraguza aha mandwa, kandi naayetegyereza ekine ky'enyamaishwa eyaatambwa." 
Ezekiel21:22 Omu mukono gwe gwa buryo endagu neekwata Yerusalemu kugiteera nibaamuza, nibahiga, kugibyaraho ebyoma by'okuhiguza amarembo, kugirundaho eby'okutemberaho, n'okugiteeraho empazo z'okugigotesa." 
Ezekiel21:23 Ab'omuri Yerusalemu nibaija kuteekateeka ngu egyo ndagu n'ey'ebishuba, ahabw'endagaano zi baakozire. Kwonka egyo ndagu n'ey'okubaijutsya ebibi byabo, n'okubarengyeza ku bari ab'okukwatwa." 
Ezekiel21:24 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Ahabw'okuguma nimuunyijutsya orubanja rwanyu, nimwerura ebicumuro byanyu, ekyo kikareetera ebibi byanyu kureebwa butunu omu bi murikukora byona, ahabw'okuguma nimubiinyijutsya, nimwija kubigwamu." 
Ezekiel21:25 Reero iwe munyiginya wa Isiraeli 'we, omubi, ou obunaku bwe bw'okufubirirwa kimwe buhikire," 
Ezekiel21:26 Mukama Ruhanga naakugira ati: Iha ekitambaara omu mutwe, ojuure ekirunga; ahabw'okuba ebintu tibirikwija kuguma nk'oku biri. Abarikugaywa nibo baraatunguurwe, ab'ekitiinwa bakagarurwa ahansi." 
Ezekiel21:27 Orwo rurembo niinyija kurujuumika, rube amatongo. Tirurigarukaho, okuhitsya obu orwineho obushoboorozi ariija nkarumuha." 
Ezekiel21:28 Kandi iwe muntu 'we, orangye noogira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba aha Baamoni, n'aha bi barikujuma Abaisiraeli. Obagire oti: Reeba, rurara esyoirweyo kwita, ezigwirwe neemurinkana, kandi neetyankana nk'omurabyo;" 
Ezekiel21:29 manya nibagira ngu ebi orikworekwa ti by'amazima, n'ebi orikuragura n'ebishuba. Eby'okuteebwa aha bitsya by'abantu enyabibi abu ekiro kyabo ky'okufubirwa kihikire, okufubirwa kwabo okw'aha muheru." 
Ezekiel21:30 Mbwenu garura rurara omu kyobati kyayo. Omu mwanya ogu waahangiirwemu, omu nsi ei waazaariirwemu, nimwo ndikucwerera orubanja." 
Ezekiel21:31 Haza ndyakugwerwa kubi munonga, nkwakizeho omuriro gw'ekiniga kyangye, nkurekurire abantu ebihaze, abarikumanyira kimwe okucwekyereza." 
Ezekiel21:32 Oryaba enku z'okuhemba, eshagama yaawe esheesherwe omuri egyo nsi; obure okwijukwa obundi: Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naakigamba." 
Ezekiel22:1 Kandi Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel22:2 Mbwenu iwe muntu 'we, ebyo noikiriza kucwera orubanja orwo rurembo rurikwitira busha abantu? Mbwenu rurangirire ebihagaro byarwo byona ebi rukora." 
Ezekiel22:3 Orugire oti: Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati; Oru n'orurembo orusheeshera eshagama omunda yaarwo, ngu obunaku bwarwo bukaahika; kandi orwekorera emandwa ngu rwehagaze!" 
Ezekiel22:4 Oyereeteire orubanja ahabw'eshagama ei oseesire okeehagaza n'emandwa zaawe, okacwa aha biro by'amagara gaawe; nikyo nkuhinduriire ow'okujumwa abanyamahanga, n'okugaaniizibwa ab'omu nsi zoona." 
Ezekiel22:5 Abakuri haihi n'abakuri hare baryakugaaniiza, iwe rurangaanwa, oijwire okujagarara." 
Ezekiel22:6 Reeba, abategyeki ba Isiraeli buri omwe amaririire kusheesha eshagama." 
Ezekiel22:7 Abazaire baamwo tibarikweteebwaho, nibagaywa; abashuuhuuki nibaitirwamu kubi bahatwa; efuuzi n'abafaakazi nibashaagizibwa." 
Ezekiel22:8 Okagaya ebintu byangye ebirikwera, waashiisha zaasabato zangye!" 
Ezekiel22:9 Omuriiwe harimu abarikubeiherera abandi ngu baitwe, n'abarikuriira aha nshozi omu ndaaro. Abantu nibakorera omuriiwe eby'obushambani." 
Ezekiel22:10 Omuriiwe nimwo abantu barikushambanira na bakaishebo, bakahambiramu n'abakazi bari omu kwezi." 
Ezekiel22:11 Omwe naakora ebihagaro na muka mutaahi we, ondi ashambana n'omukaamwana, ondiijo ashiisha munyaanya owa muka ishe." 
Ezekiel22:12 Omuriiwe harimu abarikurya enguzi kusheesha eshagama. Nootwara ekiteebwamu n'enshaagi, otunga amagoba ahari bataahi baawe ahabw'okubagyemesereza, reero nyowe onyebwa. Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugamba." 
Ezekiel22:13 Reeba, nikyo ndikuteerera omu ngaro niinyemaamaata, ahabw'amagoba g'obugobya agu oyetungiise, n'ahabw'abantu abaitiirwe omuriiwe." 
Ezekiel22:14 Mbwenu ebyo oryayehangaana, ogire amaani g'okwimutsya emikono, aha izooba ri ndikutonganisizaho? Ekyo Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naakigamba, kandi ndyakikora." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ndyakutaataanisiza omu mahanga, nkunaganagye omu nsi zitari zimwe; nkumaremu oburofa;" 
Ezekiel22:16 haza ago mahanga gakujume, omanye ku ndi Mukama." 
Ezekiel22:17 Kandi Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel22:18 Iwe muntu 'we, ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli bampindukiire enkamba. Boona oku batura ni nk'enkamba z'efeeza, n'emiringa n'etiini n'ekyoma na risasi omu iziiko." 
Ezekiel22:19 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Nk'oku mwena muhindukire enkamba, nikyo ndibateeranirira omuri Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel22:20 Nk'oku abantu bateeranira omu iziiko efeeza, emiringa, ebyoma, risasi na tiini bakabijugutiriraho omuriro ngu biyagye; naanye nikwo ndibateerana hamwe nyine ekiniga n'ekishinjo nkabatamu, nkabayazya." 
Ezekiel22:21 Ndyabateeranira hamwe mbajugutireho omuriro gw'ekishinjo kyangye, muguyagiremu." 
Ezekiel22:22 Nk'oku efeeza eyagira omu iziiko, naimwe nikwo muriyagira omuri Yerusalemu, mukabona kumanya ku Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye mboohoireho ekiniga kyangye." 
Ezekiel22:23 Kandi Mukama akangira ati: 
Ezekiel22:24 Iwe muntu 'we, gambira Isiraeli oti: Ori ensi etashemeire, etakagwirwemu njura aha izooba ri ndikugiriraho ekiniga." 
Ezekiel22:25 Abategyeki baamwo ni nk'entare erikutsinda, erikutaanyaguza eki eitsire. Bashonshomeire abantu, baanyaga eby'obutungi n'ebindi bintu by'obuguzi bwingi, baahinduriramu abakazi baingi abafaakazi." 
Ezekiel22:26 Abahongyerezi baamwo basiisire nkana eby'omu iteeka ryangye, baahagaza ebintu byangye ebirikwera, tibaataanisa ebirikwera n'ebitarikwera; kandi tibaahabura bantu ntaaniso y'ebishemeire n'ebitashemeire; baayehuzya zaasabato zangye, kyangayisa omuribo." 
Ezekiel22:27 Abategyeki baamwo ni nk'emishega erikutaanyaguza eki eitsire, nibasheesha eshagama, nibacwekyereza amagara g'abantu, ngu babone kusikura ebintu byabo." 
Ezekiel22:28 Kandi abarangi baamwo ebyo bibi babisiigiriize einoni, nibabonekyerwa ebitari by'amazima; kandi nibabaragurira ebishuba. Obwo nibabagira bati: Okwo nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba, haza kunu ataine ki agambire." 
Ezekiel22:29 Abantu b'omuri egyo nsi baitsire kubi abantu nibanyaga ebyabo, nibahata abooro n'abakyene kandi nibaita kubi abashuuhuuki nibabatura busha." 
Ezekiel22:30 Nsherwire omuribo omuntu owaakwombeka ekisiika, akeemerera ahasheenyukire omu maisho gangye kutonganira egyo nsi, ngu ntakaagicwekyereza; kwonka yamburira." 
Ezekiel22:31 Nikyo mboohoreireho ekiniga kyangye kingi nkabamaraho n'omuriro gw'ekishinjo kyangye; nkabatura ebi baakozire bikabatukurira. Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugamba. 
Ezekiel23:1 Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel23:2 Iwe muntu 'we, hakaba hariho abakazi babiri enyina-emwe," 
Ezekiel23:3 abaahampukiire Misiri, bakaraayirayo bakiri bato. Okwo niyo baabaire babakwatira aha mabeere." 
Ezekiel23:4 Amaziina gaabo, omukuru akaba naayetwa Ohola, omurumuna naayetwa Oholiba. Nkabashwera banzaarira aboojo n'abaishiki. Nk'oku amaziina gaabo gari, Ohola niyo Samariya kandi Oholiba niyo Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel23:5 Ohola ku naabaire nkimutaire aha mukono, yaarya obwamaraaya, yaarigirana na nkunzi ze Abaasiriya," 
Ezekiel23:6 abaserukare bajwaire ebya bujwa, n'abategyeki baabo, n'abakuru b'engabo; boona abatsigazi barikurigirwa abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi." 
Ezekiel23:7 Atyo yaaraaya n'abashaija boona entoore za Asiriya, yaayehagaza n'emandwa zoona eza buri muntu ou yaabaire arigira." 
Ezekiel23:8 Tararekire bwamaraaya bwe obu yaabaire akora akiri Misiri. Manya obu yaabaire ari empangare, abashaija bakaba babyama nawe, bamukora aha mabeere, bamumariramu akarigiijo kaabo." 
Ezekiel23:9 Nikyo naamurekuririire nkunzi ze Abaasiriya abu yaarigiire akarengyesereza. 
Ezekiel23:10 Abo bantu bakamujweka busha, baakwata batabani be na bahara be, kandi we baamwitsa rurara. Haza ku baaherize kumufubira, yaahinduka eki abakazi bacwaho enfumu." 
Ezekiel23:11 Omurumuna Oholiba ekyo akakireeba, kwonka yaakizaho okusiisikara; okurigirana kwe n'obwamaraaya bwe byaba bibi okukira aha bya mukuru we." 
Ezekiel23:12 Yaarigira Abaasiriya, abategyeki n'abakuru b'engabo, n'abaserukare abajwariire kimwe aby'aha rugamba n'abatsigazi barungi boona abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi." 
Ezekiel23:13 Ntyo naareeba nawe ku asiisirwe. Bombi baashushanisa emicwe mibi. 
Ezekiel23:14 Kwonka we yaakizaho obwamaraaya bwe. Manya akareeba abashaija abateirwe ebishushani aha kisiika; nibyo bishushani by'Abakaludaaya ebitairwe n'erangi erikutukura," 
Ezekiel23:15 abeezirikire emyeko omu manyaanya, bajwaire omu mutwe ebitambaara by'oburingaringo. Boona oku batura bari nk'abakungu b'Ababulooni abaakomookire omu nsi ya Bukaludaaya." 
Ezekiel23:16 Ku yaabireebire, yaabarigira, yaabatumaho entumwa owaabo Bukaludaaya." 
Ezekiel23:17 Reero Abaababulooni baija baamushanga aha kitanda kye ky'obwamaraaya, baamushambanisizaho, baamuhagaza. Haza ku baaherize kumushiisha, yaabatama." 
Ezekiel23:18 Ku yaagumiizemu naashambana butunu, naayejweka busha ataine nshoni, naanye yantama, nk'oku mukuru we yantamire." 
Ezekiel23:19 Kwonka we yaagumizamu n'obwamaraaya, naijuka ebiro by'obuhangare bwe ebi yaabaire araayiramu omu nsi ya Misiri," 
Ezekiel23:20 naarigira bashambane be abaabaire bahiniise nk'endogoya, n'obunya burikubarugamu buri nk'obw'embaraasi." 
Ezekiel23:21 Mbwenu iwe Oholiba, okwo nikwo waijukiriize obwamaraaya bw'omu buhangare bwawe, obu Abanyamisiri baabaire bakukora aha mabeere okiri empangare." 
Ezekiel23:22 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Mbwenu iwe Oholiba, reeba niinyija kwimutsya nkunzi zaawe ezi waatamirwe okahararuka, zikurwanise. Niinyija kuzihuruza zikurwanise zikuturukire oku n'oku." 
Ezekiel23:23 Nibo Abaababulooni n'Abakaludaaya, Abapekodi n'Abaashoa hamwe n'Abaakoa n'Abaasiriya; boona abatsigazi barikurigirwa, n'abategyeki n'abakuru b'engabo boona oku batura, taho abakungu n'abarwani abarikugyendera aha mbaraasi." 
Ezekiel23:24 Baryakuteera nibaruga obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, baine ebigaari by'okukurwanisizaho n'eby'okwekorera esika, n'eihe rihango eri baihire omu mahanga, bakutengyere orugamba bakuturukire oku n'oku bakwaitse engabo enkye n'empango, bajwaire enkofiira; haza mbahe obushoboorozi bw'okukucwera orubanja, barukucwere nk'oku emicwere yaabo eri." 
Ezekiel23:25 Kandi okukworeka ku nkugwereirwe kubi nibaija kukurwanisa bakwiniire ekiniga kingi. Baryakucwaho enyindo n'amatu, abaawe abarihonokaho babaitse rurara. Baryakwata batabani baawe na bahara baawe, abarihonokaho bamarweho omuriro." 
Ezekiel23:26 Kandi baryakucwijura ebijwaro byawe, batware n'amahunde gaawe amarungi." 
Ezekiel23:27 Okwo nikwo ndaamareho obushambani bwawe, n'obwamaraaya bwawe, ebi waihire omu nsi ya Misiri, obure agahanga amaisho Abanyamisiri n'obu kwakuba okubaijuka obundi." 
Ezekiel23:28 Manya Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Reeba, niinyinja kukurekurira abu orikwanga, abu waatamirwe okahararuka!" 
Ezekiel23:29 Baryakurwanisa bakwiniire rwango, bakunyagye byona ebi waahendekyeire, bakutsigye ojwaire busha, ori entangaare; enjuuro y'obwamaraaya bwawe ereebwe butunu. Obushambani bwawe n'obwamaraaya bwawe" 
Ezekiel23:30 nibwo bwakureeteire ebyo byona; ahabw'okuba okaraaya n'amahanga, waayehagazisa emandwa." 
Ezekiel23:31 Otooreize mukuru waawe, nikyo ndaakuheere ekifubiro." 
Ezekiel23:32 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: oryaheebwa ekifubiro kihango nk'ekya mukuru waawe; haza bakushekyeerere, bakuteerere n'enaku, ahabw'okuba ni kihango." 
Ezekiel23:33 Oryaijura esindo n'obujune; ekifubiro kya mukuru waawe Samariya n'eky'okutiinisa kandi eky'okweshobera. 
Ezekiel23:34 Oryakinywa okyeranguuze; oyemaanyure eishokye, kandi oyetaagataagure amabeere. Ekyo Niinye naakigamba, Mukama Ruhanga nikwo arikugira." 
Ezekiel23:35 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Ahabw'okuunyebwa okaanaga enyima, irooko oyemere ebirugire omu bushambani bwawe n'omu bwamaraaya bwawe." 
Ezekiel23:36 Nyakubaho akagaruka yaagira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, oryacwera Ohola na Oholiba orubanja? Mbwenu bamanyise ebihagaro bi bakozire," 
Ezekiel23:37 ahabw'okuba bakashambana kandi baita. Bakashambana n'emandwa, abaana baabo b'aboojo baabarabya omu muriro ngu babe ebyokurya by'ezo mandwa zaabo." 
Ezekiel23:38 Kandi baine n'ebindi ebi baanyitsiizemu ekiniga aha izooba eryo. Basiisire Omwanya gwangye ogurikwera, baashiisha na Sabato zangye." 
Ezekiel23:39 Ahari eryo izooba ri baitiireho abaana baabo bakabatambira emandwa, nibwo baataaha omu mwanya gwangye Ogurikwera bakagushiisha. Ebyo nibyo baakoreire omu nju yangye." 
Ezekiel23:40 Kandi bakatuma ow'okweta abashaija kuruga hare; batyo baija. Ku baizire, waayoga, waaziga amaisho, waajwara amahunde." 
Ezekiel23:41 Waashutama aha kitebe ky'ekitiinwa, emeeza ei waabaire otaireho obubaani bwangye n'amajuta gangye etebeekanisiibwe omu maisho gaakyo." 
Ezekiel23:42 Amaraka g'ekimbuuro ky'abantu ababaire bamwine bataine ki beetaireho, gakaba nigahurirwa, n'abantu abatuura bari abasinzi, abaarugire omu ihamba, baajweka abo bakazi ebirunga birungi aha mitwe n'enyerere aha mikono." 
Ezekiel23:43 Bwanyima naagira nti: Abashaija ku baba nibaraaya nawe tibashambana nawe? 
Ezekiel23:44 Ahabw'okuba bakamuzaaho nk'oku baza ahari maraaya. Kandi nikwo baagiire ahari Ohola na Oholiba kushambana nabo. 
Ezekiel23:45 Kwonka abahikiriire baryabacwera orubanja ku bari abakazi enshambani kandi abaitsi; ahakuba eshagama ei baaseesire ebari aha ngaro. 
Ezekiel23:46 Ahakuba oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Ndyabateeza eihe ribabingye, batoore oku n'oku, ribanyagye." 
Ezekiel23:47 Eryo ihe riryabateera amabaare, ribaite, riite batabani baabo na bahara baabo, kandi ryotsye n'amaka gaabo." 
Ezekiel23:48 Okwo nikwo ndimariraho kimwe obushambani omu nsi, abakazi boona bakakireeberaho bakareka kushambana nkaimwe." 
Ezekiel23:49 Imwe baishiki 'mwe enyina-emwe, ndyabafubira mbature obushambani bwanyu, n'ekibi kyanyu ky'okuramya emandwa; haza mumanye ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel24:1 Omu mwaka gwa mwenda omu kwezi kwa ikumi, aha kiro kya ikumi ky'okwo kwezi, Nyakubaho akangambira ati:" 
Ezekiel24:2 Iwe muntu 'we, handiika eiziina ry'eri izooba, manya eri izooba omugabe wa Babulooni yaagota Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel24:3 Cwera abantu bangye abagomi enfumu noogira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Ta enyungu aha mahega ogishukyemu amaizi. 
Ezekiel24:4 Ogitemu entongo z'enyama, entongo nungi ez'ekivune ky'okuguru n'eky'omukono; ogiijuze n'amagufa marungi." 
Ezekiel24:5 Otoorane omu busyo otooranemu erikukirira kimwe oburungi oteekyerane enku ahansi, ogiteekye, ebire, amagufa gabone kusya." 
Ezekiel24:6 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Orurembo orusheesha eshagama, oruri nk'enyungu erimu omukyereenyo ei gutakahwairemu, ruryakareeba! Iha omuri egyo nyungu entongo emwe emwe, otarikutongana;" 
Ezekiel24:7 ahabw'okuba eshagama ei rwaseesire teraseesirwe handi ekashwekwa eitaka kureka ekasheeshwa aha rukiri. 
Ezekiel24:8 Ahabw'okwenda kwimukiriza ekiniga kyangye ngu mpoore enzigu, nkaata eshagama ei rwasheesire aha rukiri ruriho busha, ngu erekye kushwekwa eitaka." 
Ezekiel24:9 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Orurembo orusheesha eshagama ruryakareeba! Ndyateekyerana enku, ekikoomi kibe kihango." 
Ezekiel24:10 Yongyeraho enku ohembemu omuriro, oteekye enyama ogimaremu amaizi, amagufa gasiriire." 
Ezekiel24:11 Bwanyima egyo nyungu erimu busha ogite aha makara, oyosye omuringa gwayo gusiriire, oburofa oburimu buyagye, omukyereenyo guhwemu." 
Ezekiel24:12 N'obu ndaabe ntaireho kukushemezaho omukyereenyo gwawe, tigurikumarwamu muriro." 
Ezekiel24:13 Ogwo mukyereenyo nikwo kwetenga kwawe okubi. Nkaabaire naakushemeize, kwonka ahabw'emicwe yaawe mibi okanga kushemezibwa; n'ahabw'ekyo torigira bu oshemeziibwe obundi okuhitsya obu ndikumariraho ekiniga." 
Ezekiel24:14 Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naakigamba; kiryaba kwo, kandi niinye ndikikora. Tindikireka, tindikusaasira nobu kwakuba okukugirira embabazi. Ndyakufubira nk'emitwarize yaawe n'ebi orikukora oku biri; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba." 
Ezekiel24:15 Nyakubaho akagaruka yangira ati: 
Ezekiel24:16 Iwe muntu 'we, reeba, ninza kukwihaho nkunzi yaawe ahonaaho; kwonka otacura nobu kwakuba okurira, kandi amarira gatakufukunkuka omu maisho." 
Ezekiel24:17 Tsinda, kwonka otahurirwa; otacurira ofiire; yekome ekitambaara, ojware enkaito, oteesangira aha mutwe nobu kwakuba okurya ebyokurya nk'eby'abari omu rufu." 
Ezekiel24:18 Mpaho omu kasheeshe naagambira abantu; omu mwabazyo, omukazi wangye yaafa. Ku bwaseesire naatwaza nk'oku ndagiirwe." 
Ezekiel24:19 Bwanyima abantu bambuuza bati: N'enki ekyakureetera kutwaza otyo? 
Ezekiel24:20 Naanye nikwo kubagira nti: Nyakubaho angizire ati: 
Ezekiel24:21 Gambira ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli oti: Oku nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ndyashiisha Omwanya gwangye Ogurikwera, ogurikubareetera kwemanya ku mwine amaani, ogu mukunda kureeba haza gukabatwara omutima. Kandi batabani baanyu na bahara baanyu abu mwatsigireho baryaitirwa aha rugamba na rurara." 
Ezekiel24:22 Naimwe muryatwaza nk'oku ntwarize; mutarisangira aha mutwe, nobu kwakuba okurya ebyokurya by'abari omu rufu." 
Ezekiel24:23 Ebitambaara biryabaguma aha mitwe, n'enkaito zibagume omu bigyere; timuricura nobu kwakuba okurira, kureka muryahwa aha magufa ahabw'ebibi byanyu, buri muntu atonzye na mugyenzi we." 
Ezekiel24:24 Okwo nikwo Ezekieli aribabeera eky'okureeberaho, mukatwaza nkawe oku yaatwarize. Ebyo ku biriba byabaireho, muryamanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel24:25 Mbwenu muntu 'we, ahari eryo izooba ndyaihaho orugo rwabo orugumire, orubareetera okushemererwa rukabahaisa ekitiinwa, orushemeza amaisho gaabo, rukabatwara n'omutima. Kandi ndyagaruka mbaiheho batabani baabo na bahara baabo." 
Ezekiel24:26 Eryo izooba nibwo emponoka eriija ahariimwe kubamanyisa amakuru ago. 
Ezekiel24:27 Kandi ahari eryo izooba oryagamba n'abaahonokireho, orekye kugaruka kuba ekiteta. Okwo nikwo oribabeera eky'okureeberaho, kandi nabo baryamanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel25:1 Nyakubaho akangambira naagira ati: 
Ezekiel25:2 Iwe muntu 'we, hanuurira Abaamoni ebiribabaho," 
Ezekiel25:3 noobagira oti: Nimuhurire eki Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'okugira oti: Otyo! nooyesiima ahabw'omwanya gwangye gurikwera kushiishwa, n'ensi ya Isiraeli kuhinduka amatongo, n'ab'omuryango gwa Yuda kutwarwa bari enkwatwa;" 
Ezekiel25:4 nikyo ndibarekurira ab'oburugwa-izooba, bakabakubuura; bakabateeramu ensiisira, bakabombekamu amaju, bakarya ebijuma byanyu kandi bakanywa n'amate gaanyu." 
Ezekiel25:5 Raba ndyagihindura amariisizo g'engamira, n'endembo z'Abaamoni nzihindure eizaagiriro ry'amasyo, haza obwo nibwo murimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel25:6 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugambira naagira ati: Ahabw'okuteera omu ngaro nimwesiima, nimwemurika mushemereirwe, n'ahabw'eitima ri mwiniire aba Isiraeli," 
Ezekiel25:7 ndyakubangira omukono nkurekurire abanyamahanga bakukwate bakunyagye, bwanyima nkucwekyerereze kimwe nkumare omu nsi; haza obwo nibwo orimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel25:8 Oku nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'aba Moabu n'aba Seiri kugira bati: Reeba, ab'omuryango gwa Yuda bari nk'agandi mahanga," 
Ezekiel25:9 nikyo ndiihiraho omwatano gw'ensi ya Moabu okwiha aha ndembo zaayo okuhitsya Beetiyeeshimooni, Balimeoni na Kiriyataimu ezigihaisa ekitiinwa." 
Ezekiel25:10 Moabu egyo hamwe n'Abaamoni ndyagiha ab'oburugwa-izooba ebe eyaabo," 
Ezekiel25:11 erekye kwijukwa obundi, kandi ngihe ekifubiro. Haza obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel25:12 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabwa Edomu kuhoora enzigu ab'omuryango gwa Yuda etaine saasi ekacumura munonga," 
Ezekiel25:13 nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati; Ndyabangira Edomu omukono, ngimariremu kimwe abantu n'amatungo, kandi mbaitse rurara, okuruga Temani okuhika Dedani." 
Ezekiel25:14 Ndyahooresa Edomu abantu bangye Abaisiraeli, bakore Edomu nk'oku ndikwenda, mbamare ekiniga n'ekishinjo. Haza bamanye eki ndikuhoorera enzigu; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel25:15 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'okuba Abafilisiti bahoire enzigu, baagihoora baine eitima, baacwekyereza abantu baine rwango;" 
Ezekiel25:16 nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Ndyabangira Abafilisiti omukono, mmareho Abakeresi, ncwekyereze n'abatwire aha nkungu z'enyanja abaatsigaireho." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ndyabafubira munonga, mbahoorere kimwe. Haza ku ndibahoora ntyo, nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel26:1 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi na gumwe, aha kiro ky'okubanza ky'okwezi, Nyakubaho akangambira ati:" 
Ezekiel26:2 Iwe muntu 'we, ahabwa Tuuro kugamba ahari Yerusalemu neegira eti: Otyo, mbwenu obu Yerusalemu esheenyirwe ekahindurwa amatongo, niinyija kutunga bingi," 
Ezekiel26:3 nikyo Mukama arikugirira ati: Iwe Tuuro, reeba naaba omuzigu waawe, kandi nk'oku enyanja eimutsya ebingonzi byayo, naanye ndyaimutsya amahanga gakuteere." 
Ezekiel26:4 Garyasheenya engo zaawe z'amabaare, gakumbagaze eminaara yaawe; ngiharagateho eitaka, etsigare eri orukiri kusha." 
Ezekiel26:5 Eryahinduka embuga y'okwanikaho obutimba ahagati y'enyanja. Kandi eryaba omunyago gw'amahanga; ahabw'okuba Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga niinye naakigamba. 
Ezekiel26:6 N'abahara baayo abari aha nkungu baryaitwa rurara. 
Ezekiel26:7 Manya oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Iwe Tuuro, ndyakuteeza Nebukadenezari omugabe wa Babulooni, omugabe w'abagabe, arugye aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, aine embaraasi n'ebigaari, n'ab'aha mbaraasi, n'eihe ry'engabo nyingi." 
Ezekiel26:8 Abantu baawe ab'omu birorero by'aheeru aryabaita; akwombekyeho orugo rw'okukugota, akurundeho eby'okutemberaho, akukingire n'engabo ezigumire nk'ekisiika." 
Ezekiel26:9 Engo zaawe z'amabaare aryazihiguza emiteehimbwa, n'eminaara yaawe agisheenyese empango." 
Ezekiel26:10 Ahabw'embaraasi ze kuba nyingi, ziryaimutsya omucuucu gukushwekye. Endigito y'embaraasi zirikukurura ebigaari, n'ey'ebigaari, eryatengyeetsa engo zaawe z'amabaare, ku ariba naaraba omu marembo gaawe, nk'oku baraba omu rurembo rw'engo zaarwo zisheenyukire." 
Ezekiel26:11 Enguuto zaawe aryaziribatiiriza embaraasi; abantu baawe abaitse rurara, n'enyomyo zaawe z'amaani zikumbagare." 
Ezekiel26:12 Eby'obutungi bwawe n'eby'obushuubuzi bwawe biryanyagwa. Baryakumbagaza engo zaawe z'amabaare, bacwekyereze n'amaju gaawe marungi. Amabaare gaawe, embaaho zaawe, n'ebisheenyagurika byawe, baryabinaga omu nyanja." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ndyahunamya amaraka g'ebyeshongoro byawe, n'enanga zaawe tizirihurirwa bundi." 
Ezekiel26:14 Ndyakuhindura orukiri ruriho busha, obe embuga y'okwanikaho obutimba, kandi torigaruka kwombekwa bundi; ahabw'okuba Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naakigamba; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel26:15 Oku nikwo Nyakubaho arikugambira Tuuro naagira ati: Noogira ngu ensi eziri aha myegyeego y'enyanja ku zirihurira okugwa kwawe, abahutaire nibatsinda nibaitwa, tiziritengyeeta?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Obwo nibwo abategyeki boona ab'aha nyanja bariruga aha bitebe byabo, bakajuura bushuuti zaabo n'ebijwaro byabo eby'amabara gacwereraine. Baryaitwa orutetema, bashutame ahansi nibatetema buri kaanya nibakutangaarira." 
Ezekiel26:17 Baryakucurira nibagira bati: Ai bambe! Iwe rurembo orwarangainwe, orwabaire ruri rukuru aha nyanja, n'abaabaire bakutwiremu, abaabaire batiinisa ab'omu nsi yoona, k'ocwekyereire, emeeri zaawe zikahwa omu nyanja!" 
Ezekiel26:18 Mbwenu ebirwa nibitetema aha izooba ry'okugwa kwawe. Eego, ebirwa by'omu nyanja bihahaire omutima ahabw'okuhwaho kwawe." 
Ezekiel26:19 Manya oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Ndyakugira nk'orurembo rusheenyirwe orutakituurwamu bantu, nkurengyezeho amaizi g'enyanja, gakushwekye." 
Ezekiel26:20 Haza okwo niyo ndikurohera okuzimu n'abarikushuumayo okashangayo abaira, nkakutuuza omu nsi yaayo, ngu nyentsya etarituurwamu, nobu kwakuba okugira omwanya omu nsi y'abahuriire." 
Ezekiel26:21 Ndyakwita kubi, nkumareho; orekye kugaruka kubaho. Kandi n'obu barikusherura bata, toriboneka bundi. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba." 
Ezekiel27:1 Nyakubaho akagaruka yangira ati: 
Ezekiel27:2 Iwe muntu 'we, mbwenu curira Tuuro," 
Ezekiel27:3 haza ogambire Tuuro etuura aha nyambukiro y'enyanja, erikushuubura n'amahanga g'aha myegyeego y'enyanja, noogira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Iwe Tuuro, ogizire oti: Ndi murungi, tiinyine kabara." 
Ezekiel27:4 Emyatano yaawe eri ahagati y'enyanja; abombeki baawe bakahitsya oburungi bwawe; 
Ezekiel27:5 baashara embaaho zaawe zoona omuri za akaarwenda z'omuri Seniri; baiha omuvure omuri Lebanooni, baakubaiziramu omurongooti." 
Ezekiel27:6 Emyela y'omuri Bashani niyo baakubaiziiremu engahi; embaaho ezaariire omu meeri bakazibaija omu miziko erikuruga omu birwa bya Kupuro baazicwereranamu emiino y'enjojo. 
Ezekiel27:7 Amatanga gaawe gakakorwa omuri bafuta y'ebicwererane, eyaarugire Misiri, ngu gabe orurango rwawe. Emyenda ya bururu n'eya bujwa eyaarugire aha myegyeego y'enyanja ya Elisha, niyo baakukoreiremu ekisanga." 
Ezekiel27:8 Abatuuzi ba Sidoni na Aruvaada nibo baabaire bari abarimbi b'amaato gaawe; kandi n'abahangu baayo bakaba bari abahabuzi b'emeeri zaawe. 
Ezekiel27:9 Abakuru ba Gebali n'abahangu baayo bakaba bari abahomeerezi b'emeeri zaawe. Emeeri z'omu nyanja zoona n'abarimbi baazo bakaba nibahingisa eby'obushuubuzi bwawe. 
Ezekiel27:10 Abaperesi n'Abaaluudi n'Abaapuuti bakaba bari omu ihe ryawe, kandi bari engabo zaawe. Bakakuhanikaho engabo zaabo n'enkofiira zaabo z'ebyoma baakuha ekitiinwa." 
Ezekiel27:11 Abaserukare b'Aruvaada n'Abaahereki baarinda engo zaawe ezikwehinguririize, n'abashaija ba Gamedi abaabaire bari omu minaara, bakaba bahanika engabo zaabo aha bisiika byawe bahitsya oburungi bwawe." 
Ezekiel27:12 Ahabw'obutungi bwawe bw'emiringo mingi Abaatarushiishi bakaba bashuubura naiwe, kandi bahinganisa naiwe efeeza, ebyoma, amabaati na rusasi." 
Ezekiel27:13 Abaayavani, Abaatubali n'Abaamesheki bakaba bashuubura naiwe, bakaba bareeta abantu n'ebintu by'emiringa, babihingisa eby'obushuubuzi bwawe." 
Ezekiel27:14 Abaatitogaruma bareeta embaraasi, n'embaraasi z'engamba hamwe n'enyumbu bazihingisa eby'obushuubuzi bwawe." 
Ezekiel27:15 Abaadedani bakaba bashuubura naiwe; n'obushuubuzi bw'omu birwa niiwe waabaire obutegyeka, kandi bakaba bakureetera emiino y'enjojo n'embaaho z'emifunjo kubihinganisa." 
Ezekiel27:16 Abaasiriya bakaba bashuubura naiwe ahabw'ebintu byawe kuba bingi munonga. Eby'obushuubuzi bwawe bakaba babihingisana Simiragido, erangi ya bujwa, emyenda y'amabara gacwereraine, kitaani, kalari na kalukedoni." 
Ezekiel27:17 Abaayuda n'ab'omu nsi ya Isiraeli bakaba bashuubura naiwe; eby'obushuubuzi bwawe babihingisa engano, omuzaituuni, emitiini, obwoki, amajuta n'emibazi y'okutamba obuhuta." 
Ezekiel27:18 Ahabw'ebintu kuba bingi munonga, n'obutungi bwawe kuba bwingi kandi obw'emiringo yoona, Abaadamasiko bakaba bashuubura naiwe. Eby'obushuubuzi bwawe bakaba babihingisa viino ya Helebooni, ebyoya by'entaama ebirikwera," 
Ezekiel27:19 viino ya Uzaali, ebyoma, kaasiya hamwe na kaane." 
Ezekiel27:20 Abaadedani bakaba bahingisa naiwe emyenda y'amatandiiko g'aha mbaraasi. 
Ezekiel27:21 Abaharabu n'abategyeki ba Kedari nibo waabaire okunda kuguraho abaana b'entaama n'empaya z'entaama n'ez'embuzi, ezi waabaire ohinganisa nabo." 
Ezekiel27:22 Abashuubuzi ba Sheeba na Raama bakaba bashuubura naiwe. Eby'obushuubuzi bwawe bakaba babihingisa obubaani n'emigaju y'emiringo yoona n'ezaabu. 
Ezekiel27:23 Abaaharani, Abaakaana, Abaedeni, Abaashuri n'Abakirumaadi, bakaba bashuubura naiwe." 
Ezekiel27:24 Abo boona bakaba bakureetera emyenda mirungi munonga, eya bururu, ey'amabara gacwereraine, n'ebirago by'amabara ebizingirwe bikakomwa n'emigoye eyogosire, ebi baabaire bakuguza." 
Ezekiel27:25 Emeeri za Tarushiishi zikaba zibunzya ebintu byawe by'obushuubuzi, reero otunga ebintu bingi." 
Ezekiel27:26 Abavugi b'emeeri zaawe bakutwaire omu nyanja ahu amaizi maingi gari, omuyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba gwakusheenyagura ahagati yaago." 
Ezekiel27:27 Obutungi bwawe, eby'obushuubuzi bwawe, abarimbi baawe, abahabuzi b'emeeri zaawe, n'abahomeerezi baazo, abashuubuzi b'ebintu byawe, engabo zaawe zoona eziri omuriiwe, n'abarwani baawe boona abu oine, byona birohamire ahagati y'enyanja aha izooba ri ocwekyerereireho." 
Ezekiel27:28 Ensi yaawe eryatetemesibwa obwaku bw'okutaka kw'abahabuzi b'emeeri zaawe. 
Ezekiel27:29 Abarimbi baawe abakwata engahi boona barugye omu meeri zaabo, batemburikye. Baryayemerera aha nkungu," 
Ezekiel27:30 bakucurire nibaborooga munonga, beeshukye omucuucu omu mutwe beekuringye omu iju rya kashenda," 
Ezekiel27:31 bakumwere enkomborora, beezirikye ebiguniya, bakucurire nibaborooga baine amaganya." 
Ezekiel27:32 Ku bariba nibacura, baryatonzya munonga, bakucurire nibagira bati: N'oha oracwekyerereire ahagati y'enyanja nka Tuuro?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Eby'obushuubuzi bwawe ku byabaire biza obuseeri bw'amayanja, okaba okyenuura amahanga maingi, otungisa abagabe b'omu nsi obutungi bwawe bwingi n'eby'obushuubuzi bwawe." 
Ezekiel27:34 Mbwenu oshenyagwirwe ebingonzi ahagati y'enyanja, ebintu byawe by'obushuubuzi n'abarimbi baawe boona baarohama naiwe." 
Ezekiel27:35 Abatwire omu birwa boona nibakushamaarira, n'abagabe baabo baine obwoba bwingi, kandi bahinduriize aha maisho." 
Ezekiel27:36 Abashuubuzi b'omu mahanga nibakweshaanya; ofiire kubi; toribaho bundi ebiro byona. 
Ezekiel28:1 Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel28:2 Iwe muntu 'we, gambira omugabe wa Tuuro oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'okugira amaryo okagira oti: Ndi Ruhanga, nshutama aha kitebe kya Ruhanga Nyamuhanga, ahagati n'enyanja; kwonka ori omuntu, tori Ruhanga n'obu oraabe noogira ngu oine obwengye nka Ruhanga." 
Ezekiel28:3 Nooteekateeka ngu nookiza Daniyeli obwengye, kandi ngu tihariho mubonano gu otarikumanya." 
Ezekiel28:4 Obwengye bwawe n'okumanya kwawe bikakutungisa, waashanguriza efeeza n'ezaabu waabita omu mabiikiro gaawe." 
Ezekiel28:5 Ahabw'okugira obwengye bwingi bw'okushuubura, okanyiise obutungi bwawe, haza waabwehimbisizamu." 
Ezekiel28:6 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Ahabw'okugira ngu oine obwengye nka Ruhanga," 
Ezekiel28:7 reeba, ndyakuteeza abanyamahanga abataine saasi, bacwekyereze ebintu byawe birungi, bashiishe ekitiinwa kyawe." 
Ezekiel28:8 Baryakuroha omu kiina, ofe orufu orw'abaitiirwe ahagati y'enyanja." 
Ezekiel28:9 Mbwenu obwo oryaba nookigambira omu maisho g'abarikukwita oti: Ndi Ruhanga; haza kunu omu maisho g'abarikukuhutaaza ori omuntu nyabuntu, otari Ruhanga." 
Ezekiel28:10 Oryaitwa abanyamahanga ofe orufu rw'abatashazirwe; ahabw'okuba niinye naakigamba. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira. 
Ezekiel28:11 Kandi Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel28:12 Iwe muntu 'we, curira omugabe wa Tuuro, noogira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Okaba ori eky'okureeberaho ky'omuntu ohikire, oine obwengye kandi ori murungi buzima." 
Ezekiel28:13 Okaba otuura omuri Edeni, ekibanja kya Ruhanga; ohunzirwe buri kabaare koona ak'obuguzi bwingi, saradio, topazi, arimaasi, berulo, shahamu, yasipi, sofiro, seramagido, kabunkuro n'ezaabu. Ebyakozirwe omu zaabu, n'ebisharwirwe byawe, bikatebeekanisibwa aha izooba eri waazaariirweho." 
Ezekiel28:14 Nkakuta omuri ogwo mwanya hamwe na kerubi omurinzi; okaba otuura aha rushozi rwa Ruhanga orurikwera noogyendagyenda ahagati y'amabaare g'omuriro. 
Ezekiel28:15 Okwiha obu waahangwa, okaba otagira kamogo omu mitwarize yaawe, okuhitsya obu waareebirwe nookora ebitahikire." 
Ezekiel28:16 Obushuubuzi bwawe okabugiriramu eitima, waacumura. Nikyo naakunagiire nk'ekihagaro, nkakwiha aha rushozi rwa Ruhanga; reero kerubi omurinzi waawe akakubinga omuri ago mabaare g'omuriro." 
Ezekiel28:17 Okeehimbisa ahabw'oburungi bwawe; kandi waashiisha obwengye bwawe ahabw'ekitiinwa kyawe. Ntyo naakunaga ahansi, naakwanika omu maisho g'abagabe ngu abandi bakureebereho." 
Ezekiel28:18 Ahabw'ebibi byawe bingi, n'okutaba mwesigwa omu bushuubuzi bwawe, okajumisa emyanya yaawe erikwera; naanye nikyo naihiire omuriro omuriiwe, gukakwotsya, okagwa ahansi okacweka eiju omu maisho g'abaakureebire boona." 
Ezekiel28:19 Ab'omu mahanga boona abarikukumanya, nibakutangaarira; ofiire kubi kandi torigaruka kubaho bundi ebiro byona." 
Ezekiel28:20 Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel28:21 Iwe muntu 'we, hanuurira Sidoni ebirigibaho noogira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Iwe Sidoni, reeba, naaba omuzigu waawe; haza niinyija kukworekyeramu ekitiinisa kyangye." 
Ezekiel28:22 Kandi ku ndiheza kufubira abatwire omuriiwe, naabooreka ku ndi orikwera, nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel28:23 Manya ndyagyohoramu omuze, nsheeshe eshagama omu nguuto zaayo; reero abaitsirwe bagikumbagare ahagati barikuhirikwa rurara egiturukire oku n'oku; haza obwo nibwo barimanya kundi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel28:24 Ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli tibarigira bundi mahanga garikubagaya gari nk'amahwa garikucumita nari ag'emikwatangwe agarikutaagura. Haza obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho. 
Ezekiel28:25 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba, naagira ati: Ku ndiheza kutaaruura ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli, naabaiha omu mahanga ei baataataaniire, ago mahanga garyamanya ku ndi Orikwera. Obwo nibwo barituura omu nsi yaabo ey'obuzaarwa, ei naahaire omwiru wangye Yakobo." 
Ezekiel28:26 Baryagituuramu buhooro, bagyombekyemu amaju, bahingyemu n'emisiri y'emizaabibu. Ku ndifubira amahanga g'ababehinguririize agarikubagaya, bo baryatuura buhooro. Haza obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi Mukama Ruhanga waabo." 
Ezekiel29:1 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi, omu kwezi kwa ikumi, aha kiro kyakwo kya ikumi na bibiri, Nyakubaho akangira ati:" 
Ezekiel29:2 Iwe muntu 'we, teera Faraaho omugabe wa Misiri eriisho omuhanuurire ebirimubaho na Misiri yoona," 
Ezekiel29:3 noomugira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba, naagira ati: Reeba naaba omuzigu waawe, iwe Faraaho omugabe wa Misiri, ekijoka ekituura omu migyera yaayo, nikigira kiti: Omugyera Nailo n'ogwangye, kandi niinye naaguhangire." 
Ezekiel29:4 Niinyija kukukwatsa amarobo omu itama, ndeetere ebyenyanja by'omu migyera kuramatira aha ngamba zaawe, nkukurure omu migyera yaawe, hamwe n'ebyenyanja byamwo byona ebiriba biramitiire aha ngamba zaawe." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ndyakunaga omu ihamba, iwe n'ebyenyanja by'omu migyera yaawe byona, ogwe omu bwerere, obure ow'okukurundarunda, nobu yaakuba ow'okukuziika; ahabw'okuba nkakuhayo kuba ebyokurya by'enyamaishwa n'amahungu g'omu mwanya." 
Ezekiel29:6 Haza obwo nibwo abatuuzi ba Misiri boona barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho. Misiri okabeera eihanga rya Isiraeli nk'orubango rw'ekibingo. 
Ezekiel29:7 Ku baakukwatsire waashatuka, waabataagura amabega; kandi ku baakwegamiire waahendeka, waareetera enyugunyu zaabo kutetema." 
Ezekiel29:8 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikukugirira ati: Reeba, ndyakuteeza abantu baine rurara, nkumaremu abantu n'amatungo;" 
Ezekiel29:9 ensi ya Misiri ebe amatongo n'eihamba. Haza obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho. Ahabw'okugira oti: Omugyera Nailo n'ogwangye, niinye naaguhangire," 
Ezekiel29:10 n'ahabw'ekyo naaba omuzigu waawe kandi ow'emigyera yaawe. Ensi ya Misiri ndyagihindurira kimwe amatongo, ngicwe eihamba okwiha Migidooli okuhitsya Syene, n'okuhika aha mwatano gwa Etiopiya." 
Ezekiel29:11 Terirabwamu muntu, n'obu ekuba enyamaishwa; eryamara emyaka makumi ana etatwirwemu." 
Ezekiel29:12 Egyo nsi ya Misiri ndyagigira amatongo ahagati y'ezindi nsi ezaahindwirwe amatongo; n'endembo zaayo zimare emyaka makumi ana ziri amatongo omu zaacwekyerereziibwe. Kandi ndyataataanisiza Abanyamisiri omu mahanga, mbanaganagye omu nsi zaago." 
Ezekiel29:13 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Egyo myaka makumi ana ku erihwaho, ndyataaruura Abanyamisiri, mbaihe omu mahanga ei bataataaniire." 
Ezekiel29:14 Ndyagarura Abanyamisiri abaatwairwe bari enkwatwa, mbareete Pirotoosi, ensi ei baakomookiremu, bahindukireyo abagabe bataine kitiinwa." 
Ezekiel29:15 Baryaba obugabe obutainiire kimwe maani, obutarikubaasa kutegyeka gandi mahanga; mbacwe busha, abatakiine bushoboorozi aha gandi mahanga." 
Ezekiel29:16 Ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli baryaba batakyesiga Abanyamisiri, kandi ebibi bi Abanyamisiri baakozire biryabaijutsya ku baakozire kubi, kubashaba kubaha emikono. Kandi abantu baryamanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel29:17 Omu mwaka gwa makumi abiri na mushanju, omu kwezi kw'okubanza, aha kiro kyakwo ky'okubanza, Nyakubaho akangira ati:" 
Ezekiel29:18 Iwe muntu 'we, Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni akahindura eihe rye ery'amaani kurwanisa Tuuro, emitwe y'abaiserukare yaagira oruhara, n'amabega gaabo gaahonoka; kwonka n'obu araabe yaakoreise amaani atyo hamwe n'eihe rye, taine ki yaihireyo." 
Ezekiel29:19 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Reeba, ensi ya Misiri ndyagiha Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni, anyagye obutungi n'abantu baayo, kandi ebi arinyaga bibe ebihembo by'engabo ze;" 
Ezekiel29:20 mmuhe ensi ya Misiri kuba ebihembo by'ebi yaahendekyeire; manya niinye baakoreire. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira. 
Ezekiel29:21 Ekyo ku kiribaho, ndyaha aba Isiraeli amaani, reero iwe Ezekieli obone kubagambira, boona bakuhurire. Haza obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel30:1 Kandi Nyakubaho akagaruka yaagira ati: 
Ezekiel30:2 Iwe muntu 'we, hanuura noogira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba, naagira ati: Muboroogye nimugira muti: Eshi eryo izooba riryagwerwa akagwe!" 
Ezekiel30:3 Manya eryo izooba riri haihi; eizooba rya Nyakubaho riri haihi; riryaba eizooba ry'ekibunda, obunaku obu amahanga gariheebwa ekifubiro." 
Ezekiel30:4 Abantu baitwa, obutungi bwayo bwanyagwa, n'emisingi yaayo yaasheenyagurika. Abanyaetiopiya baryaitwa obusaasi." 
Ezekiel30:5 Etiopiya, Puuti, Luudi, Buharabu yoona, Libiya n'abantu b'omuri egyo nsi abariba baragaine endagaano y'okukwatanisa, baryaitwa nabo." 
Ezekiel30:6 Oku nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba naagira ati: Abantu abarikuha Misiri emikono baryagwa, amaani agarikugireetera kwehimbisa garyaikaikana, n'abantu baayo baitwe rurara okwiha Migidooli okuhitsya Syene. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel30:7 Eryahindurwa amatongo ahagati y'ezindi nsi ezaahindwirwe, n'endembo zaayo ziryaba ahagati y'ezaacwekyereziibwa." 
Ezekiel30:8 Ku nditweka omuriro omuri Misiri abarikugirwanaho baafa, obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel30:9 Eryo izooba entumwa z'amaguru ziryandugaho, zize kutiinisa Abanyaetiopiya abataine ki beetaireho, bagire obusaasi aha izooba eri Misiri eritungiraho ekifubiro; kandi reeba, eryo izooba ryaza kwija." 
Ezekiel30:10 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Ndyamaraho obutungi bwa Misiri, ninkoresa Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Batubooni." 
Ezekiel30:11 We aryahurura n'engabo ze zitaine saasi okukira agandi mahanga, ncwekyereze ensi zikwaitse zaarurara, ziteere Misiri, zigiijuze emitumbi." 
Ezekiel30:12 Ndyayomya omugyera Nailo, reero Misiri ngirekurire abantu babi, ndeete abanyamahanga bagihindure amatongo n'ebigirimu byona. Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naakigamba." 
Ezekiel30:13 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Ndyacwekyereza emandwa, mmareho baaruhanga b'ebishuba n'omuri Menfisi; omuri Misiri tiharigaruka kubayo mutegyeki; abantu baayo ndyabaitsa obwoba." 
Ezekiel30:14 Patiroosi ndyagihindura amatongo, Zoani ngitwekyemu omuriro, na Tebesi ngihe ekifubiro." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ndyagirira Siini ekiniga kingi, ekigo kya Misiri ekigumire, n'enyanja y'abantu b'omuri Tebesi mbamareho." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ndyatweka omuriro omuri Misiri, Siini egire obusaasi bwingi, Tebesi bagifumure, engo zaayo zikumbagare." 
Ezekiel30:17 Abatsigazi b'omuri Aveni na Pibeseeti baryagwa aha rugamba, n'abakazi baamwo batwarwe bari enkwatwa." 
Ezekiel30:18 Ku ndimara omuri Tehapaneheesi obutegyeki bwa Misiri, n'okweraata amaani kwabo kwahweraho kimwe, omushana guryahinduka omwirima, eshwekwe ebicu, n'abaishiki baayo batwarwe bari enkwatwa." 
Ezekiel30:19 Haza ku ndifubira ntyo Misiri, nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel30:20 Bwanyima omu mwaka gwa ikumi na gumwe, omu kwezi kw'okubanza, aha kiro kyakwo kya mushanju, Nyakubaho akangira ati:" 
Ezekiel30:21 Iwe muntu 'we, mpenzire omukono gwa Faraaho omugabe wa Misiri; kandi tigukabungirwe nobu kwakuba okugushemba kugutambira, ngu gubone kugira amaani g'okukwata rurara." 
Ezekiel30:22 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Reeba, naaba omuzigu wa Faraaho, omugabe wa Misiri, kandi niinyija kumuhenda emikono yombi, oguhuriire n'oguhendekire, mmunagise rurara ei akwaitse." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ndyataataanisiza Abanyamisiri omu mahanga, mbanagye omu nsi zaago." 
Ezekiel30:24 Ndyaha emikono y'omugabe wa Babulooni amaani, mmute rurara omu ngaro; kwonka Faraaho we ndyamuhenda emikono atsindire ou maisho ge nk'ohutaire obuhuta bw'okumwita." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ndyaha amaani emikono y'omugabe wa Babulooni, kwonka eya Faraaho eryagwa. Aho niho barimanyira ku ndi Nyakubaho. Ku ndikwatsa omugabe wa Babulooni rurara yangye, aryabangira ensi ya Misiri omukono kugirwanisa;" 
Ezekiel30:26 ndyataataanisiza Abanyamisiri omu mahanga, mbanaganagye omu nsi zaago. Haza obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel31:1 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi na gumwe, omu kwezi kwa kashatu, aha kiro kyakwo ky'okubanza, Nyakubaho akangira ati:" 
Ezekiel31:2 Iwe muntu 'we, gambira Faraaho n'ekimbuuro kye ky'abantu oti: Obukuru bwawe nkaabushushanisa na ki?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Reero ninkushushanisa kaarwenda y'omuri Lebanooni, eine amataagi marungi, n'ekicuucu kihango, endaingwa munonga, kandi ehikize omutwe omu bicu." 
Ezekiel31:4 Gukanywa amaizi, gaagukuza gye gwanyeeta, Emigyera yaagwo yaaguma neeguhimintikira aha mbaju zoona ahu gwabaire gubyairwe, kwitirira emiti yoona ey'omu kibira." 
Ezekiel31:5 Ahabw'okunywa amaizi maingi gwanyeeta, gwakira endiijo yoona ey'omu kibira; amataagi gaagwo gaahanguha, gaaraiha, n'amakye gaagaara," 
Ezekiel31:6 enyonyi zaagwarika omu mataagi, Enyamaishwa zaazaarira aha nsi yaagwo, n'amahanga g'amaani gaahumurira omu kicuucu kyagwo." 
Ezekiel31:7 Ahabw'ogwo muti kutsimba emizi okuzimu omu maizi maingi, gukahanguha, gwaba murungi, n'amataagi gaagwo gaaraiha." 
Ezekiel31:8 Emiti ya kaarwenda ey'omu kibanja kya Ruhanga ekaba etarikugwerenga. Emivure, nobu yaakuba emiziko, ekaba etarikwingana n'amataagi gaagwo; kandi omu kibanja kya Ruhanga hakaba hatarimu muti murungi nkagwo." 
Ezekiel31:9 Nkagugira murungi, amataagi gaagwo gaagaara; haza emiti y'omu Edeni, ekibanja kya Ruhanga, yaagugirira eihari." 
Ezekiel31:10 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Ahabw'ogwo muti kunyeeta gukaza aha iguru, omutwe gwagwo gukahika omu bicu, haza gukeehimbisa ahabw'oburaingwa bwagwo," 
Ezekiel31:11 nikyo ndigurekurira eihanga ry'amaani, rikagutwaza nk'oku ebibi byagwo biri, nkagucwekyereza." 
Ezekiel31:12 Abanyamahanga abataine saasi baryagutema, bagutsigyeho, amataagi gaagwo amakye n'amahango gagwe omu mikura y'amaizi y'omuri egyo nsi; n'amahanga goona ag'omu nsi garugye omu kicuucu kyagwo, gagutsigyeho." 
Ezekiel31:13 Enyonyi ziryaguteekamaho, n'enyamaishwa zoona ez'omu ishwa zize aha mataagi gaagwo." 
Ezekiel31:14 Ebyo byona biryabaho ngu hatarigira emiti eri aha rubaju rw'amaizi, eyaanyeeta ekaza aha iguru, emitwe yaayo ekahika omu bicu. Kandi tiharigira muti gwona ogunywa amaizi oguriba muraingwa nkayo; manya yoona n'ey'okufa, ekashuuma omu kiina okuzimu owa Nyamuteza, ei abafa batuura." 
Ezekiel31:15 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Aha izooba eri gwashuumiireho okuzimu owa Nyamuteza, nkareetera amaizi kugucurira, naacungira emigyera, naazibira amaizi maingi kugyenda, haza naareetera na Lebanooni kugucurira, n'emiti yoona ey'omu ishwa kuhwa amaani." 
Ezekiel31:16 Ku naagurohire okuzimu gwagwa, gwatetemya amahanga. Ogwo muti ku gwagwire, emiti yoona emirungi ey'omuri Edeni n'emirungi munonga ey'omuri Lebanooni erikubengyeya eyaashuumire okuzimu, yaayesiima." 
Ezekiel31:17 Nayo yaagyenda nagwo okuzimu, yaashangayo abaitsirwe; n'abaabaire batwire omu kicuucu kyagwo baahwerekyerera." 
Ezekiel31:18 Omu miti yoona ey'omuri Edeni, ni guuha ogu orikwinganisa nagwo ekitiinwa n'amaani? Kwonka oryabundikwa hamwe n'emiti y'omuri Edeni, ohikye okuzimu owa Nyamuteza, obyame n'abatashazirwe kandi n'abaagwire aha rugamba. Ogwo muti ni Faraaho n'enyanja ye y'abantu; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel32:1 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'ebiri, omu kwezi kwa ikumi n'ebiri, aha kiro kyakwo ky'okubanza, Nyakubaho akangira ati:" 
Ezekiel32:2 Iwe muntu 'we, curira Faraaho omugabe wa Misiri, oboroogye noogira oti: Nooyeteekateekaho kuba entare omu mahanga, kwonka ori ekijoka ky'omu nyanja, otabangwire amaizi, waagahagaza." 
Ezekiel32:3 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Ndyakukwatsa akatimba kangye, amahanga gakukurure gakute aha nkungu." 
Ezekiel32:4 Ndyakunaga ahansi omu bwerere, amahungu n'enyamaishwa bikushonshomere." 
Ezekiel32:5 Ndyaijuza enshozi n'empanga omutumbi gwawe. 
Ezekiel32:6 Ndyasheesha eshagama yaawe omu nsi eshwekye enshozi, kandi eijure n'omu migyera." 
Ezekiel32:7 Ku ndikuzibira kwaka, ndyashweka eiguru, ndaaze enyonyoozi, eizooba ndishwekye ekicu, n'okwezi kurekye kwaka." 
Ezekiel32:8 Ndyaraaza eby'omu iguru ebirikukwakira ahaiguru yaanyu, n'ensi yaawe ngishwekye omwirima; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba." 
Ezekiel32:9 Ku ndikutwara omu mahanga ori enkwatwa, naakuhitsya omu nsi ezi otakamanyaga, ndyahahaaza emitima y'amahanga maingi." 
Ezekiel32:10 Ku nditigitira rurara yangye omu maisho gaabo, amahanga maingi garyakangarana; n'abagabe baingi baryatetema." 
Ezekiel32:11 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Rurara y'omugabe wa Babulooni eryakuhikaho. 
Ezekiel32:12 Ndyareetera enyanja yaawe y'abantu kwitwa rurara z'amamanzi agarikukira agandi mahanga kutiinisa. Misiri baryagicwa amaryo, abantu baayo babacwekyereze." 
Ezekiel32:13 Ndyamarayo amatungo gaayo goona agari aha rubaju rw'amaizi maingi; ekigyere ky'omuntu weena, n'obu kyakuba ekyara ky'enyamaishwa, tibirigaruka kugatabangura." 
Ezekiel32:14 Haza obwo nibwo ndishemeza amaizi gaayo, nkareetera emigyera yaayo kusheneneka nk'amajuta; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel32:15 Ku ndihindura Misiri amatongo, naamaramu ebyamwo, n'abagitwiremu boona naabacwekyereza, obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel32:16 Okwo nikwo kutonzya oku baritonzya; abaishiki b'amahanga nibacura nibatongyeza Misiri n'enyanja y'abantu baayo boona; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira. 
Ezekiel32:17 Omu mwaka gwa ikumi n'ebiri, aha kiro kyakwo kya ikumi na bitaano, Nyakubaho akangira ati:" 
Ezekiel32:18 Iwe muntu 'we, curira enyanja y'abantu ba Misiri. Banagye okuzimu owa Nyamuteza hamwe n'amahanga g'amaani ei abafa batuura noogira oti:" 
Ezekiel32:19 N'oha ou orikuhita? Shuuma okuzimu, obyame n'abatashazirwe." 
Ezekiel32:20 Abantu ba Misiri baryagwa ahagati y'abaitiirwe aha rugamba, abantu be nyamwingi barambirirane." 
Ezekiel32:21 Abategyeki amamanzi baryabagambuurira okuzimu n'abahwezi baabo, nibagira bati: Abatashazirwe abaagwire aha rugamba bashuumire okuzimu, niyo bagangami batarikuteeza." 
Ezekiel32:22 Asiriya niyo eri, eyehinguririziibwe ebituuro by'engabo zaayo." 
Ezekiel32:23 Boona bakaitwa aba rurara, n'ebituuro byabo biri okuzimu owa Nyamuteza. Engabo zaayo zikagwa aha rugamba, n'ebituuro byazo byehinguririize ekyayo; nobu eraabe yaabaire etiinisa ensi." 
Ezekiel32:24 Elamu nayo eriyo eyehinguririziibwe ebituuro by'engabo zaayo. Boona bakashuuma batashazirwe baaza ei abafa batuura. Bakatiinisa ensi, kwonka shi baahemuka n'abaza okuzimu owa Nyamuteza." 
Ezekiel32:25 Elamu bamwariire ekitanda, eyehinguririziibwe ebituuro by'engabo zaayo. Boona n'abatashazirwe, abaitsirwe aba rurara. Bakatiinisa ensi, kwonka shi baahemuka n'abaza okuzimu owa Nyamuteza, baabarirwa omu baitsirwe." 
Ezekiel32:26 Okwo niyo Mesheki na Tubali ziri, zeehinguririziibwe ebituuro by'engabo zaayo. Boona n'abatashazirwe, baitsirwe rurara; ahabw'okuba bakabuzya okutiinisa omu nsi y'abahuriire." 
Ezekiel32:27 Tibaraziikirwe na kitiinwa nk'amamanzi aga ira, agaashuumire okuzimu n'ebyokurwanisa byago bakeeshegura zaarurara zaabo, n'engabo zaabo zikabatungamira. Ago mamanzi gakaba gari ag'amaani nigatiinisa abantu." 
Ezekiel32:28 Nikwo naiwe orisingyeerwa n'abatashazirwe abaagwire aha rugamba. 
Ezekiel32:29 Okwo niyo na Edomu eri, n'abagabe baayo n'abategyeki baayo. Nobu baraabe baabaire bari engabo z'amaani, bagangami n'abaitsirwe rurara batashazirwe, hamwe n'abo abashuuma okuzimu owa Nyamuteza." 
Ezekiel32:30 Okwo niyo abategyeki b'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho bari n'Abaasidoni boona. Manya bakaba batiinisa, kwonka mbwenu nibashuuma okuzimu baitsirwe enshoni, hamwe n'abaitiirwe aha rugamba, kandi babyami batashazirwe; batyo baahemuka nk'abaza okuzimu owa Nyamuteza." 
Ezekiel32:31 Faraaho ku aribareeba, aryayebwa enaku z'abantu be abaafiire; n'eihe rye ryona eryaitsirwe rurara; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel32:32 Faraaho n'eihe rye ryona n'obu baraabe baatiiniise ensi baryaitwa baziikwe hamwe n'abatashazirwe. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba. 
Ezekiel33:1 Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel33:2 Iwe muntu 'we, gambira abantu baawe noobagira oti: Ku ndireeta orugamba omu nsi, abantu b'egyo nsi baayeihamu omuntu, baamugira omurinzi waabo;" 
Ezekiel33:3 ku arireeba haabaho orugamba omu nsi akateera enzamba, akagambira abantu;" 
Ezekiel33:4 obwo omuntu ku arihurira egyo nzamba ateete hari okwo kuhabura, owa rurara akaija akamwita, eshagama ye niwe eritukurira." 
Ezekiel33:5 Eshagama ye eryamutukurira ahabw'okuba akahurira enzamba, tiyaagyetaho. Manya kuri yaagyeteireho akaakirize amagara ge." 
Ezekiel33:6 Kwonka omurinzi ku arireeba owa rurara naija, atateere nzamba kugambira abantu, owa rurara akaija akabaitamu omuntu, ogwo muntu akafeera omu bibi bye; eshagama ye ndyagitura ogwo murinzi." 
Ezekiel33:7 Mbwenu muntu 'we, naakuhindura omurinzi w'eihanga rya Isiraeli, n'ahabw'ekyo hurira eki ndikukugambira, ogume obampanire." 
Ezekiel33:8 Ku ndigira omuntu mubi nti: Iwe muntu mubi 'we, buzimazima oryafa, haza naiwe otamuhane ngu arekye emitwarize ye mibi, ogwo muntu mubi akafeera omu bibi bye, eshagama ye niiwe ndigitura." 
Ezekiel33:9 Kwonka ku orihana ogwo muntu ngu arekye emitwarize ye mibi, akanga kugireka, aryafeera omu bibi bye, kwonka iwe oryaba okirize amagara gaawe." 
Ezekiel33:10 Iwe muntu 'we, garuka ogambire ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli oti: Imwe nimugira muti: Turemereirwe ebibi n'ebicumuro byaitu, byatureetera kuhwa aha magufa. Mbwenu nitubaasa tuta kugumaho?" 
Ezekiel33:11 Bagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Nyowe Nyakubaho tinshemerererwa kufa kw'omubi, kureka nyenda ngu arekye emitwarize ye mibi abe ohurire. Muhindukye murekye emitwarize yaanyu mibi. Imwe b'eihanga rya Isiraeli 'mwe, nimwendera ki kufa?" 
Ezekiel33:12 Mbwenu Iwe muntu 'we, gambira abantu b'eihanga rya Isiraeli oti: Omuntu ohikiriire ku arishiisha, okuhikiirira kwe tikurimukiza. Kwonka omuntu mubi ku aryegarukamu, yaareka ebibi bye, ebyo bibi bye biryaba bitakimwita; kandi omuntu ohikiriire ku arishiisha, okuhikirira kwe tikurimukiza." 
Ezekiel33:13 N'obu naakugambira ohikiriire nti: Buzimazima oryaba ohikiriire, kwonka ku aryesiga okuhikiirira kwe yaashiisha, tihariho na kimwe omu birungi ebi yaakozire ekiriijukwa, kureka aryafeera omu bibi bye ebi yaakozire." 
Ezekiel33:14 Kwonka ku naakugambira omuntu mubi nti: Buzimazima oryafa, haza akeegarukamu, akareka ebibi bye, akakora ebihikire kandi ebirungi;" 
Ezekiel33:15 akagaruraho eki yaagurize, akariha eki yaibire, akakuratira ebiragiro ebihaisa amagara, atashiishe, buzimazima aryagumaho, tarifa." 
Ezekiel33:16 Ahabw'okukora ebihikire kandi birungi, tihariho kibi na kimwe omu bi yaakozire ekiriijukwa, buzimazima aryagumaho." 
Ezekiel33:17 Abantu baawe nibagira bati: Emitwarize ya Mukama tehikire; haza kunu eyaabo niyo etahikire. 
Ezekiel33:18 Ohikiriire ku arireka okukora ebirungi, yaakora ebibi aryabizira." 
Ezekiel33:19 Kandi omuntu mubi ku aryegarukamu, akareka ebibi bye, akakora ebihikire kandi ebirungi, biryamukiza." 
Ezekiel33:20 Kwonka imwe nimugira muti: Emitwarize ya Mukama tehikire. Imwe b'eihanga rya Isiraeli 'mwe, ndyabacwera orubanja nk'emitwarize ya buri muntu oku eri." 
Ezekiel33:21 Ku twabaire tumazire emyaka ikumi n'ebiri tuzaahire, omu kwezi kwa ikumi, aha kiro kya kataano, haija omushaija owaacwire naaruga Yerusalemu, yangira ati orurembo rukwatsirwe." 
Ezekiel33:22 Omu mwabazyo, ogwo mushaija atakaizire, nkaba naayehuriiremu amaani ga Nyakubaho. Ogwo mushaija obu yampikaho, omu kasheeshe Nyakubaho akaba yambohoroire orurimi, naagambire ntakiri kiteta." 
Ezekiel33:23 Nyakubaho yangira ati: 
Ezekiel33:24 Iwe muntu 'we, abatwire omu ndembo ezaahindwirwe amatongo ez'omu Isiraeli batuura nibagira bati: Aburahamu akaba ari omuntu omwe wenka, yaakubuura ensi. Mbwenu itwe obu turi baingi, buzimazima egi nsi n'eyaitu." 
Ezekiel33:25 N'ahabw'ekyo obagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Murya enyama erimu eshagama, muramya emandwa, kandi mwita. Haza mugira ngu muryakubuura egyo nsi?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Nimwesiga rurara, mukora ebihagaro, kandi buri muntu naashambana na muka mutaahi we, mbwenu ebyo muryakubuura egyo nsi?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Obagire oti: Okwo nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Niinyerahira, buzimazima abatwire omu ndembo ezaahindwirwe amatongo baryaitwa. Abariba bari omu ishwa baryariibwa enyamaishwa, n'abariba bari omu bigo n'omu maaya baryaitwa orufu." 
Ezekiel33:28 Kandi egyo nsi ndyagihindura amatongo ebe eihamba, n'okweraata amaani kwayo kuhweho; n'enshozi za Isiraeli zibe eihamba, bibure owaabirabamu." 
Ezekiel33:29 Ku ndihindura egyo nsi amatongo, yaaba eihamba nimbatura ebihagaro bi bakozire, nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel33:30 Iwe muntu 'we, abantu baawe nibakugambaho bari aha rubaju rw'engo n'aha miryango y'amaju nibagambirana, buri muntu na mweneishe. Nibagira bati: Nimwije tuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Ezekiel33:31 Batyo bakwijaho nk'oku abantu baija, bakushutama omu maisho nk'abantu bangye, bahurira ebi orikugamba, haza batarikwija kubikora. Booreka rukundo n'akarimi karungi, kwonka emitima yaabo eraramiire eby'okwejaramya." 
Ezekiel33:32 Kandi iwe aharibo ori nk'orikweshongora ekyeshongoro kirungi nooteera enanga; ahabw'okuba bahurira ebi orikugamba, kwonka tibabikora." 
Ezekiel33:33 Ebyo ku biribaho, kandi kwo biryabaho, obwo nibwo barimanya ku omurangi yaabaire abaine." 
Ezekiel34:1 Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel34:2 Iwe muntu 'we, ranga ebiriba aha bariisa ba Isiraeli; obahanuurire noobagira oti: Mukama Ruhanga naagambira abariisa ba Isiraeli ati: Imwe bariisa 'mwe, abarikweriisa mwenka, omuriisa tashemereire kuriisa entaama?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Nimunywa amate, mujwara emyenda y'ebyoya, mubaaga ezigomokire, haza kunu mutarikuziriisa." 
Ezekiel34:4 Ezitaine maani timurikuzigagaruramu, ezirwaire timuzitambira, ezihendekire timuzibunga, ezirazire timuzitaaruura; ezibuzire timuzisherura, kureka muzitegyekyesa amaani n'omwaga." 
Ezekiel34:5 Nikyo zaataataaniire, zikariibwa enyamaishwa, ahabw'okubura omuriisa." 
Ezekiel34:6 Entaama zangye zikataataana, zaazengyerera omu nshozi n'omu bibungo; zaataataanira omu nsi yoona, zaabura ow'okuzisherura n'obu yaakuba ow'okuzibuuririza." 
Ezekiel34:7 N'ahabw'ekyo bariisa 'mwe, nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Ezekiel34:8 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Niinyerahira, nk'oku entaama zangye zibaire ez'okwitwa kandi zikaba ez'okuriibwa enyamaishwa ahabw'okutagira muriisa, n'abariisa kwanga kuzisherura, kureka bakeeriisa bonka batariise ntaama zangye;" 
Ezekiel34:9 n'ahabw'ekyo imwe bariisa mwe, nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Ezekiel34:10 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, naaba omuzigu w'abariisa. Ndyababuuza entaama zangye mbazibire kuziriisa; kandi abo bariisa tibarigaruka kweriisa. Ndyazibaaka barekye kugaruka kuzirya." 
Ezekiel34:11 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, nyowe nyenka naaza kwesherurira entaama zangye, nzibuuririze." 
Ezekiel34:12 Nk'oku omuriisa asherura entaama z'omu busyo bwe ezitaataine, naanye nikwo ndisherura entaama zangye, nkaziiha ei zaarariire yoona, aha izooba ry'okurimbagirirwa n'okugwerwa akagwe." 
Ezekiel34:13 Ndyazireeta, nziihe omu mahanga, nzitaaruure omu nsi yoona nzigarure omu nsi yaazo. Kandi ndyaziriisiza aha nshozi za Isiraeli, aha mbaju z'emigyera n'omu myanya yoona ey'omu nsi etwirwemu abantu." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ndyaziriisiza omu mariisizo marungi, aha nshozi ndaingwa za Isiraeli; omuri ago mariisizo marungi niyo ziribyama, zikariira omu mariisizo ga Isiraeli ag'obunyaatsi bwingi." 
Ezekiel34:15 Nyowe nyenka, niinye ndiba omuriisa w'entaama zangye, nkazihenza enkokora. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel34:16 Ndyasherura ezibuzire, ntaaruure ezirazire, mbungye ezihendekire, ezitaine maani nzigagaruremu, ezigomokire n'ez'amaani nzirinde; kandi zoona ndyaziriisa omu bwinganisa." 
Ezekiel34:17 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Imwe busyo bwangye 'mwe, reeba, nincwera entaama orubanja na ngyenzi zaazo, orw'empaya z'entaama n'ez'embuzi." 
Ezekiel34:18 Nimugira ngu n'ekintu kikye, imwe kuheza kurya obunyaatsi omu iriisizo, haza mukaribatiirira obwatsigaraho, n'okunywa amaizi marungi, mukatabangura n'ebigyere agaatsigaraho?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Entaama zaangye zishemereire kurya obunyaatsi bu muribatiriire, n'okunywa amaizi gu mutabangwire?" 
Ezekiel34:20 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikubagirira ati: Reeba, nyowe, nyowe nyenka, ndyacwa orubanja rw'entaama ezigomokire n'ezihururukire." 
Ezekiel34:21 Ahabw'okuba muzitsindikisa orubaju n'amabega, ezitaine maani muzicumitisa amahembe, muziraza." 
Ezekiel34:22 Ndyajuna obusyo bwangye, burekye kugaruka kwitwa kubi, ncwere entaama orubanja na ngyenzi zaazo." 
Ezekiel34:23 Entaama zangye ndyaziteeraho omwiru wangye Daudi abe omuriisa waazo. 
Ezekiel34:24 Kandi nyowe Nyakubaho ndyaba Ruhanga waazo, n'omwiru wangye Daudi abe omugabe waazo. Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naakigamba." 
Ezekiel34:25 Ndyaragaana nazo endagaano y'obusingye, mmare enyamaishwa mbi omu nsi, zibone kuguma omu ishwa ziri buhooro, niziraara omu kibira." 
Ezekiel34:26 Ndyabaha omugisha, batuure beehinguririize orushozi rwangye orurikwera, mbagwisize enjura omu bunaku bwayo, ebe enjura y'omugisha." 
Ezekiel34:27 Emiti eryayera ebijuma, n'eitaka ryeze emyaka yaaryo; zigume omu nsi yaazo ziri buhooro. Reero ku ndicwa enjegyere zaabo, naabaiha omu mikono y'ababahindwire abahuuku, obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel34:28 Tizirigaruka kunyagwa mahanga nari kuriibwa enyamaishwa, ziryaba buhooro, kandi tihariho orizitiinisa." 
Ezekiel34:29 Ndyazimereza obunyaatsi bw'omuroba, zirekye kugaruka kwitwa enjara, nobu kwakuba okujumwa abanyamahanga." 
Ezekiel34:30 Haza ziryamanya ku nyowe Mukama Ruhanga waazo ndi hamwe nazo, kandi zo ku nibo b'eihanga rya Isiraeli, abantu bangye; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel34:31 Naimwe muri entaama zangye, entaama z'omu iriisizo ryangye, naanye ndi Ruhanga waanyu. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel35:1 Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel35:2 Iwe muntu 'we, gambira Orushozi Seiri, oruhanuurire ebirirubaho," 
Ezekiel35:3 noogira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Iwe rushozi 'we Seiri, reeba, naahinduka omuzigu waawe, naaza kukubangira omukono, nkuhindure amatongo, obe eihamba," 
Ezekiel35:4 endembo zaawe nazo nzihindure amatongo, zibe eihamba." 
Ezekiel35:5 Ahabw'okutuura oine enzigu, okahayo Abaisiraeli kwitwa rurara obu baagwerwa akagwe omu bunaku bwabo bw'okuheebwa ekifubiro;" 
Ezekiel35:6 n'ahabw'ekyo nyowe Nyakubaho nindahira, nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira. Ori ow'okufa kandi rufu torikwija kugikira. Manya okasheesha eshagama, egyo shagama eryakutukurira." 
Ezekiel35:7 Ndyahindura Seiri eitongo, ebe eihamba, ngimaremu abarikugiijamu n'abarikugirugamu." 
Ezekiel35:8 Orushozi rwawe ndyarwijuza emitumbi y'abaitsirwe, baijurirane omu bibungo byawe, omu mpanga zaawe n'omu binonko byawe byona." 
Ezekiel35:9 Ndyakuhindura amatongo ebiro byona, n'endembo zaawe tizirituurwamu bundi. Haza obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel35:10 Ahabw'okugira oti: Amahanga ago gombi n'ensi ezo zombi biryaba ebyangye, tubikubuure (n'obu Nyakubaho araabe yaabaire atwireyo)," 
Ezekiel35:11 nikyo nyowe Nyakubaho ndikugirira nti: Ndyakutwaza nk'ekiniga n'eihari ebi waagizire oku biri, nkuture rwango ei waabagiriire. Kandi ku ndibacwera orubanja, nibwo murimanya." 
Ezekiel35:12 Haza oryamanya ku nyowe Nyakubaho naakuhuriire noojuma enshozi za Isiraeli noogira oti: Zihindwirwe amatongo, baazituha kuzimaraho." 
Ezekiel35:13 Mukaanyekuzaho, mwangambuura, kandi naabihurira." 
Ezekiel35:14 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba, naagira ati: Ndyakuhindura amatongo, ensi yoona eyesiime." 
Ezekiel35:15 Ahabw'okwesiima obu abantu bangye ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli bacwekyerezibwa, naiwe nikwo ndikucwekyereza. Iwe Seiri na Edomu yoona, muryaba amatongo. Haza obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel36:1 Mbwenu Nyakubaho akangira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, hanuurira enshozi za Isiraeli noozigira oti; Imwe nshozi za Isiraeli 'mwe, nimuhurire ekigambo kya Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel36:2 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'omuzigu kukwesiimirana ati: Otyo, nikyo kihena! Kandi ati: Enshozi zaabo tuzikubwire." 
Ezekiel36:3 N'ahabw'ekyo hanuura noogira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'okubasingyeera bakabahindura amatongo babaturukire embaju zoona, mukahinduka ensi ekubwirwe agandi mahanga, mukaba ekiganiiro ky'abarikubagambuura," 
Ezekiel36:4 n'ahabw'ekyo imwe nshozi za Isiraeli 'mwe, nimuhurire ekigambo kya Mukama Ruhanga. Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugambira enshozi, ebibungo, ebinonko n'empanga, amatongo, n'endembo ebyanyagirwe bikahinduka eky'okushekyeererwa amahanga agabyehinguririize, naagira ati:" 
Ezekiel36:5 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Ngambire ekiniga nikyenda kumbarura, nimpana amahanga agabeehinguririize, n'okukira munonga, Edomu. Abaanyagire ensi yangye nibeesiima, kandi nibagayana ngu bagikubwire." 
Ezekiel36:6 N'ahabw'ekyo ohanuure ebiriba ahari Isiraeli noogambira enshozi, ebibungo, ebinonko n'empanga oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba ningambisa ekiniga n'eihato, ningira nti: Ahabwa Isiraeli kwemera kuhemurwa amahanga," 
Ezekiel36:7 nikyo ndikurahirira ningira nti: Buzimazima ago mahanga gakwehinguririize nago garyahemurwa. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira. 
Ezekiel36:8 Kwonka nshozi za Isiraeli 'mwe, muryashebuka amataagi, mwanire Abaisiraeli, abantu bangye, ebijuma; manya bari haihi kugaruka owaabo." 
Ezekiel36:9 Haza ndiho aha bwanyu, niinyija kubagarukira ngu mubone kuhingwamu n'okubibwamu." 
Ezekiel36:10 Ndyakanyisa abantu ababatwiremu ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli yoona; endembo zituurwemu, n'amatongo gombekwemu." 
Ezekiel36:11 Ndyabakanyisamu abantu n'amatungo, bizaare bikanye; mbareetere kutuurwamu nk'omu biro byanyu ebya ira, mbakore gye okukira oku naabagizire bwabiso. Haza obwo nibwo murimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel36:12 Ndyareka abantu bangye Abaisiraeli babatuuremu, mubeere kimwe abaabo, kandi timurigaruka kubaitira baana obundi." 
Ezekiel36:13 Okwo nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Ahabw'abantu kubagira ngu muri ebibungo birikwita abantu, bikamara abaana omu ihanga ryanyu," 
Ezekiel36:14 nikyo mutarigarukira kwita bantu bundi; n'obu kwakuba okumara abaana omu ihanga ryanyu. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira.
