Ezekiel36:15 Tindibareka kugaruka kuhurira ebijumo byabo, n'obu kwakuba okwemera okuhemura kwabo; n'eihanga ryanyu timurigaruka kuriteeza ntsibo. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel36:16 Nyakubaho akagaruka yangira ati: 
Ezekiel36:17 Iwe muntu 'we, obu ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli baabaire batwire omu nsi yaabo bakagisiisisa emitwarize yaabo n'ebi barikukora; emitwarize yaabo ekansusira nk'omukazi ari omu kwezi." 
Ezekiel36:18 Nkabagirira ekiniga kingi nimbatura abantu bu baitsire n'emandwa zi bagisiisiise. 
Ezekiel36:19 Nkabacwera orubanja ahabw'emitwarize yaabo n'ebi baabaire bakora, naabataataanisiza omu mahanga." 
Ezekiel36:20 Kandi ku baahikire omuri ago mahanga, ei baabaire baza yoona, bakaba bajumisa eiziina ryangye eririkwera; ahabw'okuba abantu bakaba babagambaho bati: Aba n'abantu ba Nyakubaho abaazaahiibwe, bakaruga omu nsi ye." 
Ezekiel36:21 Kwonka naasaasibwa eiziina ryangye eririkwera eri ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli baajumiise omu mahanga agu baagiiremu. 
Ezekiel36:22 Mbwenu gambira ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Imwe b'eihanga rya Isiraeli 'mwe, niinyija kugira eki naakora, kwonka ti habwanyu, kureka ninkikora ahabw'okumpemurira omu mahanga agu mwagiiremu." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ndyahaisa eiziina ryangye erikuru ekitiinwa, erimwahemwire omu mahanga, haza gaikirize ku riri eririkwera. Reero ku ndibeeyorekyeramu ku ndi Orikwera, amahanga garyamanya ku ndi Nyakubaho; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel36:24 Ndyabaiha omu mahanga, mbataaruure omu nsi zoona, mbagarure omu nsi yaanyu ey'obuzaarwa." 
Ezekiel36:25 Ndyabashukaho amaizi marungi, mboozyeho oburofa bwona, mbamaremu emandwa mushemere." 
Ezekiel36:26 Kandi ndyabaha omutima musya; mbatemu ebiteekateeko bisya, mbaihemu omutima ogugumire nk'eibaare mbatemu ogworobi." 
Ezekiel36:27 Ndyabatamu Mutima wangye, mbareetere kworobera ebiragiro byangye, mubone kurinda ebi naataireho n'okubikora." 
Ezekiel36:28 Muryatuura omu nsi ei naahaire baashoimwe mube abantu bangye, naanye mbe Ruhanga waanyu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Ndyabaihaho ebihagaro, mbeereze engano nyingi kandi timurigaruka kuteerwa njara." 
Ezekiel36:30 Ndyabeereza ebijuma, ndeetere n'emisiri yaanyu kwera, murekye kugarukwaho ekihemu ky'enjara omu mahanga obundi." 
Ezekiel36:31 Haza obwo nibwo muriijuka emitwarize yaanyu mibi, n'ebibi bi mwabaire mukora, mukeetamwa ahabw'ebibi byanyu n'ebicumuro byanyu." 
Ezekiel36:32 Ekyo mukimanye ku ntarikikora habwanyu, nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira. Imwe b'eihanga rya Isiraeli 'mwe, mugire enshoni, mubwerabwere ahabw'emitwarize yaanyu mibi." 
Ezekiel36:33 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Aha izooba eri ndiboogyezaho ebibi byanyu byona, ndyabaikiriza mugarukye mutuure omu ndembo zaanyu, mwombekye ebyasheenyukire." 
Ezekiel36:34 Ensi eyaabaire eri eihamba eryahingwa, erekye kuba amatongo aha bahinguzi." 
Ezekiel36:35 Bwanyima baryagira bati: Ensi eyaabaire eri amatongo mbwenu ebaire nk'Ekibanja kya Edeni; n'endembo ezaabaire zisheenyirwe zitsigirweho, zihindukire amatongo, mbwenu reeba zitwirwemu abantu, kandi zeehinguririziibwe engo z'amabaare." 
Ezekiel36:36 Haza amahanga agariba gabeehinguririize garyamanya ku nyowe Nyakubaho niinye nyombekire emyanya eyaabaire esheenyirwe, nkahinga ahaabaire hari endaara. Nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naakigamba, kandi ndyakikora." 
Ezekiel36:37 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Kandi eki nakyo ndyaikiriza ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli kukinshaba ngu nkibakorere, nikwo kubakanyisa nk'obusyo bw'entaama." 
Ezekiel36:38 Endembo ezaabaire zisheenyirwe ziryaijuramu abantu, zibe nk'obusyo bw'entaama obureetsirwe omuri Yerusalemu kutambirwa aha magyenyi gaayo agaatairweho. Haza obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel37:1 Nyakubaho akantaho omukono gwe yanshohoza, Mutima we yanshuumya omu ruhanga rwijwire amagufa goomire." 
Ezekiel37:2 Yaanyehinguririza oruhanga orwabaire rurimu amagufa maingi munonga goomire. 
Ezekiel37:3 Bwanyima yangira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, ebyo aga magufa gakaabaasa kugira amagara? Naanye naamugarukamu nti: Mukama Ruhanga, niiwe orikukimanya." 
Ezekiel37:4 Kandi agaruka, angira ati: Hanuurira aga magufa, ogagire oti: Imwe magufa goomire 'mwe, nimuhurire ekigambo kya Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel37:5 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugambira amagufa naagira ati: Reeba, naaza kubatamu omwitsyo mugire amagara." 
Ezekiel37:6 Naaza kubataho emitsi, mbagarureho enyama, mbashwekyeho oruhu, mbatemu omwitsyo, mugire amagara, haza mumanye ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel37:7 Ntyo naahanuura nk'oku yandagiire; kandi ku naabaire ninkihanuura, naahurira okukomangana kw'ago magufa: gaateerana, eigufa na rigyenzi ryaryo." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ku naagiire kugira nti: naareeba gaagiibwaho emitsi n'enyama, byashwekwa oruhu, kwonka bitaabamu mwitsyo." 
Ezekiel37:9 Bwanyima yangira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, hanuurira omwitsyo, ogugire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Iwe mwitsyo 'we, ruga embaju ina ei emiyaga ereetwa, ohuuhe egi mitumbi egire amagara." 
Ezekiel37:10 Ntyo naahanuura nk'oku yandagiire, omwitsyo gwagizamu yaagira amagara; yaayemerera eri ekimbuuro kihango munonga." 
Ezekiel37:11 Bwanyima yangira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, aga magufa n'ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli. Reeba, nibagira bati: Twomire titukiine matsiko; tubeereire kimwe encuubwa." 
Ezekiel37:12 N'ahabw'ekyo obahanuurire noobagira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, reeba ndyaigura ebituuro byanyu, mbaihemu, mbagarure omu nsi ya Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel37:13 Bantu bangye 'mwe, ku ndiheza kwigura ebituuro byanyu naabaihamu, muryamanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel37:14 Kandi ndyabatamu Mutima wangye, mube abahuriire, mbate omu nsi yaanyu y'obuzaarwa, haza obwo nibwo murimanya ku nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naakigambire, kandi nkakikora; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugira." 
Ezekiel37:15 Kandi Nyakubaho akagaruka yangira ati: 
Ezekiel37:16 Iwe muntu 'we, kwata enkoni ogihandiikyeho oti: Yuda n'Abaisiraeli bagyenzi be; bwanyima okwate endiijo nkoni, ogihandiikyeho oti: Yosefu (enkoni ya Efuraimu), n'Abaisiraeli bagyenzi be." 
Ezekiel37:17 Bwanyima oziteerane, zibe enkoni emwe zikuri omu ngaro." 
Ezekiel37:18 Kandi abantu ku baraakubuuze amakuru gaabyo," 
Ezekiel37:19 obagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, naaza kutwara enkoni ya Yosefu (eri omu ngaro za Efuraimu) n'enganda z'Abaisiraeli bagyenzi be, ngiteerane n'eya Yuda, mbahindure enkoni emwe, babe bamwe bandi omu ngaro." 
Ezekiel37:20 Ezo nkoni zi orikuhandiikaho, ku ziraabe zikuri omu ngaro nibakureeba," 
Ezekiel37:21 obagire oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Reeba, ndyaiha Abaisiraeli omu mahanga agu baagiiremu, mbataaruure nimbaiha embaju zoona, mbareete omu nsi yaabo y'obuzaarwa." 
Ezekiel37:22 Ndyabahindura eihanga rimwe omu nsi y'enshozi za Isiraeli; bategyekwe omugabe omwe, barekye kuba amahanga, nobu kwakuba okucuubwamu obugabe bubiri." 
Ezekiel37:23 Tibarigaruka kwehagaza n'emandwa zaabo, nobu kwakuba okukora ebihagaro nari okucumura. Ndyabajuna, barekye kugaruka kugwa omu bibi ebi baabaire bakozire, mbashemeze, reero babe abantu bangye, naanye mbe Ruhanga waabo." 
Ezekiel37:24 Omwiru wangye Daudi aryaba omugabe waabo, boona bagire omuriisa omwe, bakuratire ebiragiro byangye, bate omutima aha bi naataireho, kandi babikore." 
Ezekiel37:25 Baryatuura omu nsi ei naahaire omwiru wangye Yakobo, ei baishebo baabaire batwiremu; okwo niyo bariguma ebiro byona bo n'abaana baabo na baijukuru baabo. Kandi omwiru wangye Daudi niwe ariba omugabe waabo ebiro byona." 
Ezekiel37:26 Ndyaragaana nabo endagaano y'obusingye, ebe endagaano y'ebiro byona. Ndyabaha omugisha, mbakanyise, nte omwanya gwangye Ogurikwera ahagati yaabo, gube ogw'obutwire bwona," 
Ezekiel37:27 babe abantu bangye, naanye mbe Ruhanga waabo." 
Ezekiel37:28 Reero ku ndita Nyaruju yangye ahagati yaabo, yaagumayo ebiro byona, amahanga nibwo garimanya ku nyowe Nyakubaho niinye naatoraine Abaisiraeli kuba abantu bangye ahabwangye." 
Ezekiel38:1 Nyakubaho akangira ati: 
Ezekiel38:2 Iwe muntu 'we, hanuurira Googi omugabe wa Rooshi, Mesheki na Tubali, omu nsi ya Magoogi, orangye ebirimubaho," 
Ezekiel38:3 noogira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Iwe Googi omugabe wa Rooshi, Mesheki na Tubali, reeba naaba omuzigu waawe." 
Ezekiel38:4 Ndyakuhindura, nkute amarobo omu matama, nkukurure n'eihe ryawe ryona. Embaraasi n'abarikuzigyenderaho ekimbuuro kihango munonga, bajwaire eby'okurwanisa, boona baine engabo enkye n'empango bakwaitse zaarurara," 
Ezekiel38:5 aba Peresi, aba Kuushi n'Abapuuti bari hamwe baine engabo n'enkofiira z'ebyoma;" 
Ezekiel38:6 abarwani ba Gomeri na Beti-Togaruma, abaarugire hare omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho kandi n'abarugire omu gandi mahanga, bakaba bari hamwe nawe." 
Ezekiel38:7 Yetebeekanise, kandi ogume oyeteekateekire iwe n'amahe gaawe agakwehinguririize." 
Ezekiel38:8 Ku hariba hahingwireho emyaka mingi oryaragiirwa kuteera ensi eyaabaire yaacwekyereziibwe, kwonka hati eri omu buteeka, etwirwemu abantu abaataarwirwe omu mahanga maingi, bakaza omu nshozi za Isiraeli ezaabaire ziri amatongo. Abo bantu boona bakaihwa omu mahanga, mbwenu boona batwire buhooro." 
Ezekiel38:9 Oryainamuka n'eihe ryawe n'amahanga maingi, muteere ensi nk'eihunga, mugishwekye nk'ekicu." 
Ezekiel38:10 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Eryo izooba oryaizirwa ebiteekateeko, ocume enaama mbi," 
Ezekiel38:11 noogira oti: Ndyainamuka nteere ensi y'ebirorero ebitaine ngo, ngwe aha bantu abagaramisiriize, batwire buhooro, abataine ngo z'amabaare, nobu gaakuba amarembo garikukingisibwa empimbi;" 
Ezekiel38:12 nze kunyaga ebintu n'okubitwara kuteera emyanya eyaabaire eri amatongo, hati etwirwemu, n'okuteera abantu abaataarwirwe omu mahanga, bakatunga ente n'ebintu, bakatuura ahagati y'ensi." 
Ezekiel38:13 Abaasheeba n'Abaadedani n'Abashuubuzi ba Tarushiishi n'ebirorero byayo byona baryakubuuza bati: Beitu shi oizire kunyaga? Ohurwize engabo zaawe kwija kunyaga, n'okutwara efeeza n'ezaabu, amatungo n'ebintu, kwetungira eminyago mingi?" 
Ezekiel38:14 N'ahabw'ekyo, iwe muntu 'we, hanuurira Googi, noomugira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Eryo izooba abantu bangye Abaisiraeli ku bariba batwire buhooro, oryahurira," 
Ezekiel38:15 orugye omu mwanya gw'aha muheru omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, iwe n'amahanga maingi, ag'ahambaraasi, eihe rihango kandi ry'amaani," 
Ezekiel38:16 oteere abantu bangye ori nk'ekicu ekishwekire ensi. Kandi obunaku ku burihika, ndyakuteeza ensi yangye; iwe Googi, amahanga gabone kumanya ku naakweyorekyeiremu; ku ndi Orikwera." 
Ezekiel38:17 Niiwe naagambireho nindaba omu barangi bangye ba Isiraeli, abaamazire emyaka mingi nibahanuura omu biro ebyo, ku niiwe ndyohereza kubateera?" 
Ezekiel38:18 Kwonka eryo izooba eri Googi ariteereraho ensi ya Isiraeli, ndyagira ekiniga; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel38:19 Ahabw'okugambisa eihato n'ekiniga kingi, ningira nti: Buzimazima eryo izooba haryabaho okutengatenga kw'amaani omu nsi ya Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel38:20 Ebyenyanja, amahungu, n'enyamaishwa n'ebirikwekurura, n'abantu b'omu nsi boona, biryatetemera omu maisho ge. Enshozi n'ebibaare biryahiguka, n'engo z'amabaare zikumbagare." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ndyareetera Googi ebihikiirizi bya ibara muringo, bimwitse obwoba, buri muntu aitse mugyenzi we rurara; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel38:22 Ndyamuha ekifubiro ky'orufu n'okwitwa abazigu. Kandi we n'amahe ge, n'amahanga maingi agu ariba aine, ndyabateeza omutsindansi gw'enjura, n'emengo z'orubaare, n'omuriro n'obuganga bw'ekibiriiti." 
Ezekiel38:23 Okwo nikwo ndyoreka amahanga maingi ku ndi Nyakubaho, kandi orikwera. Haza obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel39:1 Kandi muntu 'we, hanuurira Googi ebirimubaho noogira oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Iwe Googi omugabe wa Rooshi, Mesheki na Tubali, reeba, naaba omuzigu waawe." 
Ezekiel39:2 Ndyakuhindura, nkwebembeze nkwihe hare omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, nkwinamure, nkuhitsye omu nshozi za Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel39:3 Ndyakunagisa obuta oburi omu ngaro yaawe ya bumosho, n'emyambi eri omu ngaro yaawe ya buryo." 
Ezekiel39:4 Iwe Googi n'amahe gaawe, n'amahanga agakuha emikono, muryagwa aha nshozi za Isiraeli; mbashunikire amahungu g'emiringo yoona n'enyamaishwa mbi." 
Ezekiel39:5 Muryagwa omu bwerere; ahabw'okuba niinye naakigamba; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira. 
Ezekiel39:6 Kandi ndyayohereza omuriro gwotsye Magoogi, n'abatwire omu birwa bagaramisiriize, haza bamanye ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel39:7 Ndyamanyisa abantu bangye Isiraeli ku ndi Orikwera; tibarigaruka kumpemura, kandi amahanga garyamanya ku ndi Nyakubaho Orikwera wa Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel39:8 Reeba eizooba eri naagambireho niriija kubaho; kandi buzimazima riryabaho; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira. 
Ezekiel39:9 Abariba batwire omu ndembo za Isiraeli baryashohora, bahindure eby'okurwanisa enku, engabo enkye n'empango, amata n'emyambi, ebikoni n'amacumu, babihembe, bamare emyaka mushanju nibabihemba." 
Ezekiel39:10 Tibaryetenga kusheenya mu ishwa n'obu kwakuba okukonda ebiti omu kibira; ahabw'okuba baryahemba eby'okurwanisa byabo. Baryatwara ebintu by'abaatwaire ebyabo, banyagye abaabanyagire. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel39:11 Eryo izooba ndyaha Googi omwanya gw'okuziikwamu omuri Isiraeli, omu ruhanga rw'abahinguzi, aha bukiizi bw'enyanja bwa burugwa-izooba. Okwo Googi n'eihe rye ry'abantu niyo bariziikwa, bakaita omuhanda gw'abagyenzi, kandi ogwo mwanya guryayetwa Hamoni-googi." 
Ezekiel39:12 Ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli baryamara ameezi mushanju nibabaziika, ngu babone kushemeza ensi." 
Ezekiel39:13 Abantu boona baryabaziika, baheebwe ekitiinwa, aha izooba eri ndihimbisizibwaho; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel39:14 Bwanyima baryatoorana abantu b'okuguma nibaraba omu nsi, nibaziika emitumbi eriba etsigairemu, ngu ensi ebone kushemera; kandi ameezi mushanju ku garihwaho bongyere kusherura." 
Ezekiel39:15 Abo bantu ku bariba nibaraba omuri egyo nsi, haagira owaagwa aha igufa ry'omuntu, aryarita akamanyiso aha rubaju, okuhitsya obu abaziiki baririziika omu ruhanga rwa Hamoni-googi." 
Ezekiel39:16 (Kandi aho niho hariba orurembo orurikwetwa Hamona). Okwo nikwo barishemeza batyo egyo nsi. 
Ezekiel39:17 Mbwenu iwe muntu 'we, oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Gambira amahungu g'emiringo yoona n'enyamaishwa zoona noogira oti: Muteerane, murugye embaju zoona, mwije aha bugyenyi bw'ebitambo obu mbatebeekanisiize. Obwo bugyenyi bw'aha nshozi za Isiraeli ni bukuru, nimwija kurya enyama, munywe n'eshagama." 
Ezekiel39:18 Nimwija kurya enyama z'amamanzi, munywe eshagama y'abategyeki b'omu nsi; murye enyama z'empaya z'entaama, ez'abaana b'entaama, ez'embuzi, n'ez'enimi zoona eza Bashani ez'ebishaju." 
Ezekiel39:19 Aha bugyenyi obu mbatebeekanisiize muryarya ez'ebishaju, okuhitsya obu muraigute, munywe eshagama okuhitsya obu muraasinde." 
Ezekiel39:20 Nimwija kuriira aha meeza yangye embaraasi n'abarikuzigyenderaho, n'amamanzi muteho n'abarwani b'emiringo yoona; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel39:21 Ndyayoreka amahanga ekitiinisa kyangye, gareebe ku nyine obushoboorozi bw'okucwa emanja zihikire." 
Ezekiel39:22 Okwiha obwo n'okuhitsya ebiro byona, Abaisiraeli baryamanya ku ndi Mukama Ruhanga waabo." 
Ezekiel39:23 Amahanga garyamanya ku ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli baatwairwe omu bukwatwa ahabw'ebibi ebi baakozire, bakancumuraho; nkabeehuzya, abazigu baabo bakabasingura, bakabaitira aha rugamba." 
Ezekiel39:24 Nkabatwaza nk'okutahikiirira kwabo n'ebicumuro byabo oku byabaire biri, naabeehuzya." 
Ezekiel39:25 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Mbwenu niinyija kugarura abaatwairwe bari enkwatwa, ngirire embabazi ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli, ahabw'okusaasibwa eiziina ryangye eririkwera." 
Ezekiel39:26 Ku bariba baagaramisiriize, batakiine orikubatiinisa, baryayebwa ekihemu kyabo, n'oku bandeebize." 
Ezekiel39:27 Ku ndiheza kubaiha omu mahanga, naabagarura nimbataaruura omu nsi z'abazigu baabo, naabeeyorekyeramu ku ndi Orikwera, amahanga gaakireeba;" 
Ezekiel39:28 obwo nibwo barimanya ku ndi Mukama Ruhanga waabo owaabazaire, bwanyima nkabataaruura nk'abagarura omu nsi yaabo y'obuzaarwa. Tindigira n'omwe ou naatsiga omu mahanga obundi." 
Ezekiel39:29 Kandi ku ndishuka Mutima wangye aha b'eihanga rya Isiraeli, tindigaruka kubeehuzya bundi; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel40:1 Ku twabaire tumazire emyaka makumi abiri n'etaano omu bukwatwa, omwaka nigutandika, aha kiro kya ikumi ky'okwezi kw'okubanza, obwo orurembo rukaba rumazire emyaka ikumi n'ena rukwatsirwe; eryo izooba Nyakubaho akaba ari hamwe naanye," 
Ezekiel40:2 yantwara omu nsi ya Isiraeli, ndi omu kworekwa, yanta aha rushozi ruraingwa munonga. Orwo rushozi rukaba ruriho ekintu kirikushusha orurembo kishungaine naanye." 
Ezekiel40:3 Ku yaampikizeyo naareeba omuntu orikushusha omuringa, ayemereire omu irembo, aine omurunga gwa furakisi omu ngaro, n'ekibingo ky'okugyeresa." 
Ezekiel40:4 Ogwo mushaija yangira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, yetegyereze ebi naaza kukworeka, obitegye amatu, kandi obiteho omutima. Manya ekikureetsire aha n'okubikworeka; ngu ebi oraareebe, obigambire ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel40:5 Hakaba hariho orugo rwehinguririize ekibuga kya Nyaruju, kandi oburaingwa bw'ekibingo ky'okugyeresa eki omushaija yaabaire akwaitse, bukaba buri mikono mukaaga, buri gumwe gwine oburaingwa bwa mukono gumwe n'ekita. Atyo yaagyera omuzimba gw'orugo, gwaingana ekibingo kimwe, n'obwemi bwarwo bwaba ekibingo kimwe." 
Ezekiel40:6 Bwanyima yaahika aha irembo eririkureeba oburugwa-izooba; ku yainamukire aha matembero gaaryo, yaagyera ekisasi kyaryo eky'aheeru, kyaba ekibingo kimwe omu bucuzi." 
Ezekiel40:7 Ebishengye by'aha rubaju, ekibingo kimwe oburaingwa kandi n'ekibingo kimwe obukiika. Ahagati y'ebyo bishengye haabaho omwanya gwa mikono etaano, ekisasi ky'eirembo eky'omunda haihi n'eirembo aharikureebana na Nyaruju, naho haaba ekibingo kimwe." 
Ezekiel40:8 Bwanyima yaagyera ekisasi eky'omunda kyaba mikono munaana," 
Ezekiel40:9 kandi yaagyera ebiti by'eirembo, byaba mikono ebiri; ekyo kisasi ky'eirembo kikaba kishungaine na Nyaruju." 
Ezekiel40:10 Aha rubaju rw'eirembo rya burugwa-izooba hakaba hariho ebishengye bishatu ahari buri rubaju, byona birikwingana, n'ebiti by'eirembo ahari buri rubaju nabyo birikwingana." 
Ezekiel40:11 Ekyakuratsireho, yaagyera obuhango bw'eirembo bwaba mikono ikumi, n'obukiika bwaryo bwa mikono ikumi n'eshatu." 
Ezekiel40:12 Omu maisho g'ebishengye by'aha mbaju zombi, haabamu omwanya gwa mukono gumwe, ahari buri rubaju, kandi ebyo bishengye by'ahari buri rubaju bikaba biri mikono mukaaga." 
Ezekiel40:13 Bwanyima yaagyera eirembo, naiha enyima y'ekishengye kimwe okuhitsya enyima y'ekindi, obukiika bwaho bwaba mikono makumi abiri n'etaano, okuruga aha rwigi okuhika aha rundi." 
Ezekiel40:14 Okucwekanisa ekyo kisasi yaagyera mikono makumi abiri. Kandi okwehinguririza ekyo kisasi ky'eirembo kyaba ekibuga. 
Ezekiel40:15 Okwiha omu maisho g'eirembo okuta ahu orikutaahira nooza omu kisasi ky'omunda aha muheru gwakyo, haaba mikono makumi ataano." 
Ezekiel40:16 Kandi ebishengye by'eirembo bikaba biine amadirisa okubyehinguririza, gafunzire omunda aharikureeba ebiti byago omu bishengye by'omunda; kandi n'ekisasi kikaba kiine amadirisa okukyehinguririza; n'ebiti by'ago madirisa bihunzirwe emikindo." 
Ezekiel40:17 Bwanyima yantwara omu kibuga ky'enyima ekyabaire kyehinguririziibwe ebishengye n'omwariro gw'amabaare. Omu maisho g'ogwo mwariro gw'amabaare hakaba harimu ebishengye makumi ashatu. 
Ezekiel40:18 Ogwo mwariro gukaba gwekiikwire aha mbaju z'ago marembo, nigwingana nago omu buraingwa; ekyo nikyo kyabaire kiri ekicweka kyariire ekya ifo." 
Ezekiel40:19 Yaagaruka yaagyera naiha omu kicweka ky'omunda eky'omu maisho g'eirembo rya ifo, okuhika aha rubaju rw'aheeru orw'ekibuga ky'omunda, kyaba mikono igana." 
Ezekiel40:20 Kandi yaanyebembera naatoora aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, ei eirembo ry'ekibuga ky'enyima ryabaire nirireeba, yaagyera oburaingwa bwakyo n'obukiika bwakyo." 
Ezekiel40:21 Ebishengye bishatu by'aha rubaju rw'eryo irembo, na bishatu aha rundi rubaju, ebiti byaryo n'ekisasi kyaryo, byona bikaba nibingana n'eby'eirembo ry'okubanza. Oburaingwa bwaryo bukaba mikono makumi abiri n'etaano." 
Ezekiel40:22 Amadirisa gaaryo, ekisasi kyago, n'amahunde gaaryo g'emikindo bikaba nibingana n'eby'eirembo eririkureeba burugwa-izooba. Kandi amatembero agaabaire nigatemberwaho kurihikaho gakaba gari mushanju, n'ekisasi kyaryo kiri omunda." 
Ezekiel40:23 Ahashungaine n'eirembo ery'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho hakaba hariho eirembo eririkutaaha omu kibuga ky'omunda, nk'oku kiri aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba. Atyo yaagyera okwiha aha irembo okuta aha rindi, haaba mikono igana." 
Ezekiel40:24 Kandi akaanyebembera nantooza aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo; ahari orwo rubaju hakaba hariho eirembo; yaagyera ebiti byaryo n'ekisasi kyaryo byaingana n'ebindi. 
Ezekiel40:25 Omunda yaaryo n'omu kisasi kyaryo hakaba heehinguririziibwe amadirisa agarikwingana n'ag'omu gandi marembo. Oburaingwa bwaryo bukaba buri mikono makumi ataano, n'obukiika bwaryo buri mikono makumi abiri n'etaano." 
Ezekiel40:26 Kandi amatembero agaabaire nigatemberwaho kurihikaho gakaba gari mushanju; ekisasi kyaryo ky'omunda, n'ebiti byaryo bikaba bihunzirweho emikindo, gumwe aha rubaju rumwe n'ogundi aha rundi." 
Ezekiel40:27 Aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa buryo obw'ekibuga eky'omunda hakaba hariho eirembo; yaagyera okuruga aha irembo okuhika aha rindi ery'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, haaba mikono igana." 
Ezekiel40:28 Bwanyima yandabya omu irembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, yantaasya omu kibuga ky'omunda, yaagyera eirembo, ryaingana n'agandi." 
Ezekiel40:29 Ebishengye by'aha mbaju zaaryo, ebiti n'ekisasi kyaryo, bikaba nibingana n'ebindi; kandi omuri eryo irembo n'omu kisasi kyaryo hakaba harimu amadirisa agarikwingana n'agandi okwehinguririza. Oburaingwa bwaryo bukaba mikono makumi ataano, n'obukiika bwaryo bwaba mikono makumi abiri n'etaano." 
Ezekiel40:30 Kandi hakaba hariho ebisasi okwehinguririza, oburaingwa bwabyo bukaba buri mikono makumi abiri n'etaano, n'obukiika bwabyo buri mikono etaano." 
Ezekiel40:31 Ekisasi kikaba nikireeba ekibuga ky'aheeru, ebiti byaryo bihunzirweho emikindo, n'amatembero garikutemberwaho kurihikaho gari munaana." 
Ezekiel40:32 Yaagaruka yantaasya omu kibuga ky'omunda aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba, yaagyera eirembo ryaho, ryaba ery'orugyero rumwe n'agandi." 
Ezekiel40:33 Ebishengye byakyo by'aha rubaju, ebiti byaryo, n'ekisasi kyaryo byona bikaba nibingana n'ebindi; kandi omuri eryo irembo n'omu kisasi kyaryo hakaba hakiikiizemu amadirisa. Oburaingwa bwaryo bukaba buri mikono makumi ataano, n'obukiika bwaryo buri mikono makumi abiri n'etaano." 
Ezekiel40:34 Ekisasi kikaba nikireeba ekibuga ky'aheeru, ebiti byaryo bihunzirweho emikindo, n'amatembero garikutemberwaho kurihikaho gari munaana." 
Ezekiel40:35 Bwanyima yantwara aha irembo ery'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, yaarigyera, ryaingana n'agandi." 
Ezekiel40:36 Ebishengye byaryo eby'omu mbaju, ebiti byaryo, n'ekisasi kyaryo, byaingana n'ebindi, haza ryona rikaba rikiikiiziibwemu amadirisa. Oburaingwa bwaryo bukaba mikono ataano, n'obukiika bwaryo bwaba mikono makumi abiri n'etaano." 
Ezekiel40:37 Ekisasi kikaba nikireeba ekibuga ky'aheeru, ebiti byaryo bihunzirweho emikindo, n'amatembero garikutemberwaho kurihikaho gari munaana." 
Ezekiel40:38 Hakaba hariho ekishengye, eki omuryango gwakyo gwabaire nigureeba omu kisasi ky'eirembo, omu baabaire boogyeza ekitambo ky'okucwetsya." 
Ezekiel40:39 Omuri ekyo kisasi hakaba harimu emeeza ina, ibiri aha rubaju rumwe n'ezindi ibiri aha rundi. Ezo meeza nizo baabaire baitiraho enyamaishwa z'ebitambo eby'okucwetsya, eky'empongano n'eky'ekarabo." 
Ezekiel40:40 Kandi aheeru y'ekisasi ahu orikutaahira nooza omu irembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, hakaba hariho emeeza ibiri, n'aha rundi rubaju ezindi ibiri." 
Ezekiel40:41 Aha rubaju rw'omunda orw'eryo irembo hakaba hariho emeeza ina, zoona munaana ziri ez'okwitiraho enyamaishwa z'ebitambo." 
Ezekiel40:42 Hakaba hariho n'ezindi meeza ezibaizirwe omu mabaare, ez'okutaho ebitambo by'okucwetsya; oburaingwa bwazo bukaba buri mukono gumwe n'ekicweka, obukiika bwazo mukono gumwe n'ekicweka, n'obwemi bwazo buri mukono gumwe. Ezo meeza zikaba ziteebwaho ebintu by'okwitsa enyamaishwa z'ebitambo." 
Ezekiel40:43 Kandi omuri ekyo kisasi hakaba hateereiremu ebyoma by'okuhanikaho by'oburaingwa bw'ekita kimwe, bikiikiize omunda. Ezo meeza nizo baabaire bataho enyama z'okutoija." 
Ezekiel40:44 Bwanyima yaanyiha aheeru, yantaasya omu kibuga ky'omunda ekyabaire kirimu ebishengye, kimwe aha rubaju rw'eirembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho nikireeba aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, n'ekindi aha rubaju rw'eirembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, nikireeba aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Ezekiel40:45 Yangira ati: Eki kishengye ekirikureeba aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, n'eky'abahongyerezi abaheereza omuri Nyaruju." 
Ezekiel40:46 Kandi ekishengye ekirikureeba aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho n'eky'abahongyerezi abaheereza aha itambiro; abo nibo beene Zadoki ab'oruganda rwa Leevi, abarikwikirizibwa bonka kuhika haihi Nyakubaho kumuheereza." 
Ezekiel40:47 Atyo yaagyera ekyo kibuga, kyaba mikono igana oburaingwa na mikono igana obukiika, embaju zaakyo zoona ina zaingana; kandi eitambiro rikaba riri omu maisho ga Nyaruju." 
Ezekiel40:48 Bwanyima yantwara aha kisasi kya Nyaruju, yaagyera enyomyo zaakyo zombi, ey'aha rubaju rumwe yaaba mikono etaano, n'ey'aha rundi rubaju nayo yaaba mikono etaano. Obuhango bw'eirembo bwaba mikono ikumi n'ena, n'ebisiika by'omu rubaju rw'eirembo byaba mikono ashatu buri rubaju." 
Ezekiel40:49 Oburaingwa bw'ekyo kisasi bukaba mikono makumi abiri, n'obukiika bwakyo bwaba mikono ikumi n'ebiri, n'amatembero agarikutemberwaho kukihikaho gari ikumi. Kandi aha rubaju rw'ebiti by'eirembo hakaba hariho enyomyo emwe, n'endiijo aha rundi rubaju." 
Ezekiel41:1 Bwanyima akantwara omuri Nyaruju, yaagyera ebiti byayo by'emiryango; obukiika bwabyo buri rubaju bwaba mikono mukaaga." 
Ezekiel41:2 Obuhango bw'omuryango gwayo bwaba mikono ikumi; ebisiika by'omuryango buri rubaju byaba mikono etaano. Yaagaruka yaagyera oburaingwa bwayo, bwaba mikono makumi ana, n'obukiika bwayo bwaba mikono makumi abiri." 
Ezekiel41:3 Atyo yaataaha omu kishengye ky'omunda, yaagyera ebiti by'omuryango gwakyo, byaba mikono ebiri; obuhango bw'omuryango bwaba mikono mukaaga, n'ebisiika byagwo orubaju n'orubaju byaba mikono mushanju." 
Ezekiel41:4 Yaagyera oburaingwa bw'ekyo kishengye, bwaba mikono makumi abiri omu maisho g'ekishengye kya rwagati. Atyo yangira ati: Ogu n'Omwanya Ogurikwera munonga." 
Ezekiel41:5 Bwanyima yaagyera ekisiika kya Nyaruju, omuzimba gwaba mikono mukaaga, n'obukiika bw'ebishengye ebikiikiize omu mbaju za Nyaruju bwaba mikono ena." 
Ezekiel41:6 Ebyo bishengye by'omu mbaju za Nyaruju bikaba biri kaanyina-ishatu bitungamiraine; buri mushorongo harimu ebishengye makumi ashatu. Okwehinguririza ekisiika kya Nyaruju hakaba hariho ah'okushensherereza ebishengye omuri ekyo kisiika ngu bihamiremu. 
Ezekiel41:7 Ebyo bishengye by'omu rubaju bikaba bihango nk'oku byagyenzire nibitembekyerana okuza aha iguru nk'obuhango bwabyo bw'okushenshera omu kisiika okwa buri mushorongo oku bwabaire buri; kandi n'aha rubaju rwa Nyaruju hakaba hariho amatembero g'okutemberaho. Omuntu ku yaabaire aruga omu kishengye ky'ahansi naaza omu kya kaanyina ashatu, araba omu kya kaanyina abiri." 
Ezekiel41:8 Kandi nkareeba Nyaruju eine ekicweka ky'ahansi ekitunguukire kigyehinguririize; emisingi y'ebishengye by'omu mbaju oburaingwa bwayo bukaba nibwingana n'obw'ekibingo kya mikono mukaaga. 
Ezekiel41:9 Omuzimba gw'ebisiika by'aheeru ogw'ebishengye ebikiikiize Nyaruju gukaba guri mikono etaano, kandi ekicweka ky'omusingi ekyatsigariire aho nakyo kiri mikono etaano." 
Ezekiel41:10 Okwiha aha muheru gw'ekyo kicweka ky'omusingi okuhitsya aha bishengye by'omu kibuga, ekaba eri mikono makumi abiri okwehinguririza Nyaruju embaju zoona." 
Ezekiel41:11 Emiryango y'ebyo bishengye ebyabaire bikiikiize Nyaruju ekaba neereeba ahari ekyo kicweka ky'omusingi ekyatsigariire aho ogumwe nigureeba aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, n'ogundi aha bwa-buryo. Kandi obukiika bw'ekyo kisiika ekyatsigariire aho, bukaba buri mikono etaano embaju zoona." 
Ezekiel41:12 Ekyombeko ekyabaire nikireeba omu kibuga kya Nyaruju aha rubaju rwa burengyerwa-izooba kikaba kiri mikono makumi mushanju obukiika, kandi omuzimba gw'ekyo kyombeko gukaba guri mikono etaano embaju zoona, na mikono makumi mwenda oburaingwa." 
Ezekiel41:13 Mpaho yaagyera Nyaruju, yaaba mikono igana oburaingwa; ekibuga kyayo, ekyombeko kyayo hamwe n'ebisiika byayo byona, nabyo byaba mikono igana." 
Ezekiel41:14 Kandi obukiika bw'omu maisho ga Nyaruju aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba, hamwe n'ekibuga kyaho, nabyo byaba mikono igana." 
Ezekiel41:15 Yaagaruka yaagyera oburaingwa by'ekyombeko ekirikureeba omu kibuga ky'aha rubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba, hamwe n'ebisiika byakyo orubaju n'orubaju, bwaba mikono igana." 
Ezekiel41:16 Ebisiika by'ekishengye kya Nyaruju ekya rwagati, n'eby'eky'omunda, n'eby'ekisasi ky'aheeru bikaba bishwekirwe embaaho; byonshatu bikaba biine amadirisa agataahire omu kisiika embaju zoona. Ekyo kisiika kya Nyaruju nakyo kikaba kishwekirwe embaaho, okuruga ahansi okuhika aha madirisa, ahashungaine n'ekisasi; (kandi ago madirisa gakaba gashwekire)," 
Ezekiel41:17 okuhika ahaiguru y'omuryango aha kishengye ky'omunda n'aheeru. 
Ezekiel41:18 Kandi ebisiika byona eby'ekishengye ky'omunda n'eby'ekya rwagati bikaba bisharwirweho ebishushani bya baakerubi n'eby'emikindo, eky'omukindo kiri ahagati ya kerubi na mugyenzi we." 
Ezekiel41:19 Buri kerubi akaba aine ahamaisho habiri, ahamaisho h'omuntu nihareeba omukindo aha rubaju rumwe, n'ahamaisho h'entare nihareeba ogundi mukindo aha rundi rubaju." 
Ezekiel41:20 Okwo nikwo byabaire bisharwirwe ahari Nyaruju embaju zoona; kandi okuruga ahansi okuhika ahaiguru y'omuryango hakaba hasharwirweho baakerubi n'emikindo. 
Ezekiel41:21 Ebiti by'omuryango by'ekishengye kya rwagati bikaba biine embaju ina zirikwingana. 
Ezekiel41:22 Kandi omu maisho g'Omwanya Ogurikwera hakaba harimu ekirikushusha eitambiro ry'embaaho, obwemi bwakyo mikono eshatu, oburaingwa mikono ebiri, n'obukiika bwakyo mikono ebiri. Enshonda zaakyo, ekitebe kyakyo, n'embaju zaakyo bikaba biri eby'embaaho. Yaagira ati: Egi n'emeeza etairwe omu maisho ga Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel41:23 Kandi ekishengye kya rwagati n'Omwanya Ogurikwera bikaba biine enyigi z'embari ibiri buri kimwe. 
Ezekiel41:24 Ezo nyigi zikaba ziine ebishate bibiri ebirikweigura. 
Ezekiel41:25 Aha nyingi z'ekishengye kya rwagati hakaba hasharwirweho ebishushani bya baakerubi n'eby'emikindo, nk'ebyabaire bisharwirwe aha bisiika. Kandi omu maisho g'ekisasi ky'aheeru hakaba hariho ekisanga ky'embaaho." 
Ezekiel41:26 Kandi aha bisiika by'aha rubaju rw'ekisasi hakaba hariho amadirisa agataahire omu kisiika hamwe n'emikindo orubaju n'orubaju. 
Ezekiel42:1 Bwanyima akantwara omu kibuga ky'omunda aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, yampitsya aha bishengye ebirikureebana n'ekibuga kya Nyaruju, ekishungaine n'ekyombeko ky'aha rubaju rwa bumosho." 
Ezekiel42:2 Oburaingwa bw'ekyo kyombeko ky'aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, bukaba buri mikono igana, na mikono makumi ataano obukiika." 
Ezekiel42:3 Hakaba hariho amabaraza ga kaanyina ashatu gatungamiraine, gahereraine n'omwanya gwa mikono makumi abiri ogw'ekibuga ky'omunda ogurikureebana n'ekicweka kyariirwe amabaare." 
Ezekiel42:4 Ahagati omu maisho g'ebyo bishengye hakaba hariho omwanya gw'okurabamu gwa mikono ikumi obukiika, na mikono igana oburaingwa. Emiryango y'ebyo bishengye ekaba neereeba aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Ezekiel42:5 Ebishengye by'aha iguru bikaba bifunzire okukira eby'ahagati n'eby'ahansi, ahabw'okuba ago mabaraza gakaba gabifundize." 
Ezekiel42:6 Ahabw'ebyo bishengye by'ahaiguru kuba kaanyina ashatu bitaine nyomyo, bikaba biri bikye kukira ebya rwagati n'eby'ahansi." 
Ezekiel42:7 Enyima y'ebyo bishengye hakaba hariyo ekisiika ky'oburaingwa bwa mikono ataano, kiringaniire nabyo kandi kishungaine nabyo aha rubaju rw'ekibuga ky'aheeru." 
Ezekiel42:8 Ebishengye ebyabaire bihereraine n'ekibuga ky'aheeru bikaba biri mikono ataano oburaingwa, kandi ebyabaire bishungaine na Nyaruju biri mikono igana." 
Ezekiel42:9 Aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba ahansi y'ebyo bishengye hakaba hariho omuryango ogwabaire gutaahirwamu abarikuruga omu kibuga ky'aheeru. 
Ezekiel42:10 Aho niho orugo rw'aheeru rwabaire nirutandikira. Kandi aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, ahashungaine n'ekibuga kandi n'ekyombeko, hakaba hariho ebishengye biine omuhanda gurikubiraba omu maisho." 
Ezekiel42:11 Ebyo bishengye bikaba nibishushana n'eby'aha rubaju rwa bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, biri eby'orugyero rumwe oburaingwa n'obukiika, kandi emyombekyere yaabyo y'emiryango n'aharikushohorerwa neeshushana." 
Ezekiel42:12 Ahansi y'ebyo bishengye by'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba, hakaba hariho omuryango ogurikutaahira omu muhanda gw'ahagati ahashungaine n'ekisiika ekirikubitaanisa." 
Ezekiel42:13 Bwanyima yangira ati: Ebyo bishengye by'aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, n'orwa buryo, n'ebishungaine n'ekibuga, n'ebishengye ebirikwera omu abahongyerezi abahika haihi Nyakubaho bariira emitoijo erikwera. Okwo niyo bariguma nibata emitoijo erikwera; omutoijo gw'esaano empongano y'ekibi, n'ekarabo y'ekibi, ahabw'okuba ogwo mwanya n'Ogurikwera." 
Ezekiel42:14 Abahongyerezi ku baritaaha omu Mwanya Ogurikwera, batarishohora, batabandize kujuura n'okubiika ebijwaro ebi bajwara nibaheereza, ahabw'okuba n'ebirikwera. Baryajwara ebindi bijwaro batakahikire ahu abantu bateeraniire." 
Ezekiel42:15 Ku yaaherize kugyera ekibuga ky'omunda, yanshohoza, yandabya omu irembo, yaagyera omwanya gwa Nyaruju embaju zoona." 
Ezekiel42:16 Yaagyeresa ekyo kibingo orubaju rwa burugwa-izooba, byaba ebibingo magana ataano." 
Ezekiel42:17 Yaahinduka yaakigyeresa orubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, byaba ebibingo magana ataano." 
Ezekiel42:18 Yaagaruka yaakigyeresa orubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, byaba ebibingo magana ataano." 
Ezekiel42:19 Kandi yaahindukira orubaju rwa burengyerwa-izooba, yaarukigyeresa, rwaba ebibingo magana ataano." 
Ezekiel42:20 Yaagyera embaju zaakyo ina, kutaanisa aharikwera n'ahatarikwera, yaashanga kyehinguririziibwe orugo rwa mikono magana ataano oburaingwa, na magana ataano obukiika." 
Ezekiel43:1 Bwanyima akantwara aha irembo eririkureeba burugwa-izooba. 
Ezekiel43:2 Ntyo naareeba ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga wa Isiraeli nikiruga burugwa-izooba, okuhoorera kwakyo kwaba nk'okw'enyanja, n'ensi yaayakwamu ekyo kitiinisa kye." 
Ezekiel43:3 Okworekwa oku naareebire kwaba nk'oku naareebire obu yaija kucwekyereza orurembo, kandi kwaba nk'oku naareebire aha mugyera Kebari, nkagwa aha nsi njuumaire." 
Ezekiel43:4 Ekitiinisa kya Nyakubaho ku kyataahire kiti omuri Nyaruju nikireetwa omu irembo ry'oburugwa-izooba," 
Ezekiel43:5 Mutima yankiriza, yantaasya omu kibuga ky'omunda, haza ekyo kitiinisa kya Nyakubaho kyaijura Nyaruju." 
Ezekiel43:6 Ogwo mushaija ku yaabaire akiinyemereire aha rubaju, naahurira orikugamba naanye naayema omuri Nyaruju;" 
Ezekiel43:7 naagira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, ogu nigwo mwanya gw'ekitebe kyangye ky'obukama ahu nta ebigyere byangye, kandi ahu ndituura n'abantu bangye ebiro byona. Ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli n'abagabe baabo, tibarigaruka kuhagazisa eiziina ryangye eririkwera obwamaraaya bwabo, n'emitumbi y'abagabe baabo;" 
Ezekiel43:8 nobu kwakuba okuhikaanisa ekisasi kyabo n'ekyangye nari ebiti by'emiryango yaabo n'eby'eyangye, reero ahagati yangye nabo hakabaho ekisiika kyonka." 
Ezekiel43:9 Mbwenu nu, baanyihe omu maisho okuramya emandwa n'emitumbi y'abagabe baabo, babite hare, reero mbone kuguma nabo ebiro byona." 
Ezekiel43:10 Iwe muntu 'we, shoboororera ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli oku Nyaruju erikushusha n'oku egyezirwe, haza baitwe enshoni ahabw'ebihagaro ebi barikukora." 
Ezekiel43:11 Ebi baakozire byona ku birabaitse enshoni, oboorekye emyombekyere ya Nyaruju, obushohorero bwayo, n'obutaahiro bwayo n'oku eyemi kwona. Obamanyise emigyenzo yaayo yoona n'ebiragiro byayo byona; kandi obihandiikye nibakureeba, reero babone kurinda ebiragiro byayo n'okubihitsya." 
Ezekiel43:12 Eri niryo iteeka rya Nyaruju. Omwanya gwona ogugyehinguririize aha mutwe gw'orushozi guryaba ogurikwera munonga. Reeba, eri niryo iteeka rya Nyaruju." 
Ezekiel43:13 Ebi nibyo bigyero b'eitambiro nk'oku mikono yaaryo eri, (buri mukono gurimu mukono gumwe n'ekita). Ekitebe kyaryo, obwemi bwakyo buryaba mukono gumwe, n'omuguno gwakyo gube ekita kimwe okwehinguririza." 
Ezekiel43:14 Obu nibwo buriba obwemi bw'eitambiro, okuruga ahansi aha kitabe kyaryo mukono gumwe; kandi okwiha aha mukugiro omukye okuhitsya aha muhango ribe mikono ena, n'obukiika mukono ogumwe; amahega gaaryo gabe mikono ena." 
Ezekiel43:15 Okwiha aha mahega gaaryo rigire amahembe ana ageemereire burunga, oburaingwa bwa buri ihembe bube mukono gumwe." 
Ezekiel43:16 Amahega g'eryo itambiro gagire embaju ina zirikwingana, oburaingwa mikono ikumi n'ebiri, n'obukiika mikono ikumi n'ebiri." 
Ezekiel43:17 Omukugiro gwaryo nagwo gugire embaju ina zirikwingana, oburaingwa bwagwo mikono ikumi n'ena, n'obukiika mikono ikumi n'ena, n'obukiika mikono ikumi n'ena. Kandi gwehinguririziibwe omuguno gw'obukiika bw'ekicweka kya mukono gumwe, n'ekitebe kyaryo kibe mukono gumwe okwehinguririza amatembero g'eryo itambiro gareebe oburugwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel43:18 Kandi yangira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Oku nikwo muritwaza eitambiro nimuritambiraho ebitambo by'okucwetsya n'okurimiisiiraho eshagama, ryaheza kwombekwa." 
Ezekiel43:19 Reero abaahongyerezi b'Abaleevi ab'omu ruzaaro rwa Zadoki, abaanyirira haihi kumpeereza, oryabaha enimi kuba empongano; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel43:20 Kandi oryatwara aha shagama yaayo, ogite ahari ago mahembe ana g'eitambiro n'aha nshonda ina z'omukugiro, n'aha muguno oguryehinguririize; okwo nikwo oririshemeza, okarishoroora." 
Ezekiel43:21 Bwanyima otware egyo nimi y'empongano ogyokyeze omu mwanya gwa Nyaruju ogwaragiirwe, enyima y'orugo rw'ekibuga ekirikwera." 
Ezekiel43:22 Aha kiro kya kabiri ohongye empaya y'embuzi etaine kamogo, mpaho eitambiro ryezibwe nk'oku baryeza n'egyo nimi." 
Ezekiel43:23 Ku oriheza kweza eryo itambiro, otoije enimi n'empaya y'entaama y'omu busyo ezitaine kamogo." 
Ezekiel43:24 Bwanyima ozimurikire Nyakubaho abahongyerezi bazimemeerereho omwonyo, bazitambire Mukama, zibe ekitambo ky'okucwetsya." 
Ezekiel43:25 Oryamara ebiro mushanju noohonga embuzi, enimi nto, n'empaya z'entaama ez'omu busyo ezitaine kamogo." 
Ezekiel43:26 Baryamara ebiro mushanju nibakarabira eitambiro n'okuryeza, reero barishoroore." 
Ezekiel43:27 Kandi ku bariheza ebyo biro, okwiha aha kiro kya munaana n'okweyongyerayo, abahongyerezi bagume nibatambira aha itambiro ebitambo byanyu by'okucwetsya n'ekitambo ky'obusingye; naanye imwe ndyabaikiriza; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel44:1 Bwanyima akangarura aha irembo ry'Omwanya Ogurikwera ery'aheeru, kandi rikaba rikingire." 
Ezekiel44:2 Yangira ati: Eirembo eri riryaguma rikingire; tiririigurwa, kandi tihaine oririrabamu, ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli arirabiremu; nikyo ririgumira rikingire." 
Ezekiel44:3 Omutegyeki wenka niwe arikwikirizibwa kurishitamamu, kuriiramu ebyokurya omu maisho ga Nyakubaho; aryaguma ataahire omu kisasi ky'eryo irembo; kandi nimwo ariguma naashohorera." 
Ezekiel44:4 Bwanyima yandabya omu irembo ry'aha bukiizi bwa bumosho, yampitsya omu maisho ga Nyaruju. Ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba ekitiinisa kya Nyakubaho kiijwire Nyaruju ye, naagwa aha nsi njuumaire." 
Ezekiel44:5 Nyakubaho yangira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, yetegyereze gye, oreebe n'amaisho gaawe ebi naaza kukugambira byona eby'emigyenzo ya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, n'ebiragiro byayo byona. Kandi oyetegyereze gye abarikwikiribwa kutaaha omuri Nyaruju, n'abatarikwikirizibwa kutaaha omu Mwanya Ogurikwera." 
Ezekiel44:6 Ogambire ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli abagomi oti: Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Imwe b'eihanga rya Isiraeli 'mwe, nyaabura 'mwe, nyaabura 'mwe nimurekyere kimwe ebihagaro bi murikukora;" 
Ezekiel44:7 okwikiriza abanyamahanga abatashazirwe abatarikumpurira kuguma nibahagaza Omwanya gwangye Ogurikwera, mwaba muntoijeire ebyokurya n'enyama z'ebishaju n'eshagama. Timukozire bihagaro ebyo byonka, kureka mutaireho n'okwita endagaano yangye naimwe." 
Ezekiel44:8 Timurinzire bintu byangye ebirikwera; kureka mubirindiise abanyamahanga. 
Ezekiel44:9 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Tihariho munyaihanga otashazirwe kandi otarikumpurira ow'omu banyamahanga boona ab'omu ihanga rya Isiraeli oriikirizibwa kutaaha omu Mwanya gwangye Ogurikwera. 
Ezekiel44:10 Kwonka Abaleevi abaanyimwire bakaramya emandwa obu Abaisiraeli baanyimuura, baryaheebwa ekifubiro ky'ebibi bi baakozire." 
Ezekiel44:11 Kandi baryaba abaheereza omu Mwanya gwangye Ogurikwera bari abakumiirizi aha marembo ga Nyaruju. Baryaguma nibakoramu omurimo gw'okwita enyamaishwa z'ebitambo by'okucwetsya, n'ebindi bitambo by'abantu b'obutoosha n'okuguma nibeemerera omu maisho g'abantu nibabaheereza." 
Ezekiel44:12 Abo Baleevi, ahabw'okwebembera abantu bangye bakaramya emandwa bakabateeza entsibo, bakacumura, nikyo ndikurahirira nti: Baryaheebwa ekifubiro; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel44:13 Tibarimpika haihi kunkorera omurimo gw'obuhongyerezi nari okwirira haihi ekintu kyona ekirikwera, n'ebindi ebirikwera munonga; kureka baryaitwa enshoni ahabw'ebihagaro byabo bi baakozire." 
Ezekiel44:14 Kwonka n'obu biraabe biri bityo, ndyabahindura abarinzi ba Nyaruju, kukora ebyamwo byona." 
Ezekiel44:15 Abahongyerezi n'Abaleevi beene Zadoki, abaabaire bakora emirimo omu Mwanya gwangye Ogurikwera, nibo barimpika bakaguma nibampongyera enyama z'ebishaju n'eshagama; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel44:16 Baryaguma bataahe omu Mwanya gwangye Ogurikwera, bairire haihi emeeza yangye kumpeereza, kandi bakore ebi ndikubaragiira." 
Ezekiel44:17 Ku bariguma bataaha omu marembo g'ekibuga ky'omunda, bataahemu bajwaire ebijwaro bya kitaani. Batarijwara ekintu kyona ekirimu ebyoya by'entaama baaba nibaheereza omu marembo g'ekyo kibuga n'omunda yaakyo." 
Ezekiel44:18 Baryaguma bajware ebikwemba bya kitaani omu mutwe, bajware n'empare za kitaani omunda; kandi bataryezirika ekintu kyona ekirikubareetera kutuutuka." 
Ezekiel44:19 Kandi ku bariba batakashohoire kushanga abantu omu kibuga ky'aheeru, bajuure ebijwaro ebi baaba nibaheererezamu, babite omu bishengye ebirikwera, bajware ebindi, batakaareetera abantu kweteekateekaho ngu n'abarikwera." 
Ezekiel44:20 Batarimwa ishokye n'obu kwakuba okurikuza, kureka baryaguma barituubye." 
Ezekiel44:21 Omuhongyerezi weena atarikunywa viino, yaaba naataaha omu kibuga ky'omunda." 
Ezekiel44:22 Batarishwera omufaakazi nari oshenzirwe, kureka bashwere omwishiki oshugaine w'ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli, nari omufaakazi owaabaire ari muka omuhongyerezi." 
Ezekiel44:23 Baryaguma beegyese abantu bangye omutaano gw'ebirikwera n'ebitari birikwera kandi babahabure kutaanisa ebishemeire n'ebitashemeire. 
Ezekiel44:24 Ku haribaho empaka, bakore nk'abaramuzi, baramure abantu nk'oku ebiragiro byangye biri. Baryayorobera ebiragiro byangye, n'ebi naataireho omu magyenyi gangye agu naaragiire, beeze na zaasabato zangye." 
Ezekiel44:25 Batarihika haihi omutumbi bakeeshiisha, kwonka omuhongyerezi naikirizibwa kweshiisha, yaahika omutumbi gwa ishe, ogwa nyina, ogw'omutabani, ogw'omuhara, ogwa mwene ishe nari ogwa munyaanya otakashweirwe." 
Ezekiel44:26 Kandi ku ariheza kusiisikara amare ebiro mushanju, bwanyima abone kwezibwa abe oshemeire." 
Ezekiel44:27 Kwonka aha izooba eri aritaahiraho omu Mwanya Ogurikwera omu kibuga ky'omunda kuheereza, ahongye empongano y'okweshiisha. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel44:28 Tibarigira buhunguzi; niinye buhunguzi bwabo; mutaribaha omugabo omuri Isiraeli; niinye mugabo gwabo. 
Ezekiel44:29 Baryaguma barye aha mutoijo gw'esaano n'aha mpongano, n'aha karabo; kandi ekintu kyona ekyabiikiirwe Ruhanga omuri Isiraeli kiryaguma kiri ekyabo." 
Ezekiel44:30 Emiganuro y'ebiribanza kwera byona eby'emiringo yoona, na buri mutoijo gwona ogw'omumitoijo yaanyu ey'emiringo yoona, eryaguma ebe ey'abahongyerezi. Kandi muryaguma muhe abahongyerezi ebiihuro byanyu, amaka gaanyu gabone kugumwamu emigisha." 
Ezekiel44:31 Kandi abahongyerezi batarirya enyonyi erikuguruka nari enyamaishwa eyefeereire, nainga eitsirwe endiijo nyamaishwa." 
Ezekiel45:1 Ku muribagana ensi kuba obutaka bwanyu, muryaihiraho Mukama ekicweka, kibe ekyangye ekirikwera, oburaingwa bwakyo mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano, n'obukiika bwakyo mikono obukumi bubiri. Ekyo kyanga kyona oku kingana, kiryaba ekirikwera." 
Ezekiel45:2 Omuri ekyo kyanga ekibanja kya mikono magana ataano oburaingwa, n'obukiika mikono magana ataano, kiryaba obutaaho oburikwera bwehinguririziibwe akataajuure k'obukiika bwa mikono makumi ataano." 
Ezekiel45:3 Kandi omuri ekyo kyanga ekirikwera ogyeremu ekicweka kya mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano oburaingwa, n'obukiika mikono kakumi, ahu obutaaho oburikwera buriba, nigwo Omwanya ogurikukirira kimwe kuba Ogurikwera." 
Ezekiel45:4 Ogwo mwanya gube ekicweka ky'abahongyerezi abahika Nyakubaho bakamuheerereza omu Butaaho oburikwera. Ogwo mwanya guryaba ogw'okwombekwamu amaju gaabo kandi gube obutaaho, Omwanya ogurikukirira kimwe kuba Ogurikwera." 
Ezekiel45:5 Ekindi kicweka kya mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano oburaignwa, na mikono kakumi obukiika, kiryaba eky'Abaleevi, abaheereza omuri Nyaruju kibe ekyabo ky'okwombekamu endembo z'okutuuramu." 
Ezekiel45:6 Aha rubaju rw'ekyo kicweka kyaihirweho kuba ekyanga ekirikwera, muryaihiraho ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli yoona orurembo rw'omwanya gwa mikono enkumi itaano obukiika, na mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano oburaingwa." 
Ezekiel45:7 Kandi omutegyeki aryaheebwa ekicweka ky'ensi eky'aha mbaju zombi ez'ekyanga ekirikwera, n'eky'omwanya gw'orurembo, omu mbaju z'ekyo kyanga ekirikwera. Ezo mbaju z'omwanya gw'orurembo, aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba, na burengyerwa-izooba nizinganisa oburaingwa, n'ekicweka ky'omugabo gw'oruganda rumwe, okuruga aha mwatano gw'ensi ogwa buregyerwa-izooba okuhika aha gwa burugwa-izoba;" 
Ezekiel45:8 kiryaba omugabo gwe omuri Isiraeli. Kandi abategyeki bangye tibarigaruka kwita kubi abantu bangye, kureka baryareka ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli batungye ensi nk'enganda zaabo oku ziri." 
Ezekiel45:9 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Imwe bategyeki ba Isiraeli 'mwe, murekyere aho omwaga n'okuhata, mukore eby'oburyo n'ebihikire kandi murekyere aho kubinga abantu bangye omu bibanja byabo, nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel45:10 Mugire minzaani ehikire, n'endengo zihikire, n'encuro ehikire." 
Ezekiel45:11 Encuro n'enjoga bibe eby'orugyero rumwe; enjoga egiibwemu ekicweka kya ikumi ky'ekitenga, encuro ebemu ekicweka kya ikumi ky'ekitenga, ekitenga kibe nikyo kyaguma kiri eky'okugyeresa." 
Ezekiel45:12 Shilingi eryabamu geera makumi abiri, shilingi itaano zibe shilingi itaano buzima, shilingi ikumi zibe shilingi ikumi buzima; kandi mina yaanyu eingane shilingi makumi ataano." 
Ezekiel45:13 Ezi nizo mpongano ezi muriguma nimutoija, ekicweka kimwe kya mukaaga ky'encuro y'engano ekiihirwe omuri buri kitenga na kimwe kya mukaaga ky'encuro ya baale omuri buri kitenga." 
Ezekiel45:14 Entsimbo y'amajuta eyaatairweho, kimwe kya ikumi ky'enjoga omuri buri nteerero emwe erimu enjoga ikumi, nk'oku kiri omu nteerero emwe." 
Ezekiel45:15 Kandi mugume mutoije entaama emwe omuri buri busyo bw'entaama magana abiri. Ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli boona nikwo baritoija batyo; emitoijo y'esaano, ebitambo by'okucwetsya, n'ekitambo ky'obusingye; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel45:16 Abantu b'omuri egyo nsi baryareetera omutegyeki wa Isiraeli egyo mitoijo. 
Ezekiel45:17 Kandi omutegyeki niwe arireeta ebitambo by'okucwetsya, emitoijo y'esaano, n'ey'ebyokunywa, aha magyenyi n'aha kuboneka kw'okwezi n'ahari Sabato. Aha magyenyi goona ag'abeihanga rya Isiraeli baaragiirwe, niwe aritebeekanisa empongano, omutoijo gw'esaano, ebitambo by'okucwetsya n'ebitambo by'okurya kumwe kukarabira ab'eihanga rya Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel45:18 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Omu kwezi kw'okubanza, aha kiro kyakwo ky'okubanza, oryatwara enimi nto etaine kamogo, oyeze Omwanya Ogurikwera." 
Ezekiel45:19 Omuhongyerezi atware aha shagama y'empongano agite aha biti by'emiryango ya Nyaruju, aha nshonda ina z'omukugiro gw'eitambiro, n'aha biti by'eirembo ry'ekibuga ky'omunda." 
Ezekiel45:20 Kandi ku haribaho omuntu weena okozire ekibi, atakikozire nkana nari ahabw'obushema, oryatwaza otyo aha kiro kya mushanju, okarabire Nyaruju." 
Ezekiel45:21 Aha kiro kya ikumi na bina, omu kwezi kw'okubanza, muryaguma mugire Obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho, mumare ebiro mushanju nimurya emigaati etatumbisiibwe." 
Ezekiel45:22 Ahari ekyo kiro omutegyeki aryareeta enimi nto ahabwe n'ahabw'abantu boona ab'omuri egyo nsi, kuba empongano." 
Ezekiel45:23 Kandi buri izooba omu biro mushanju by'obugyenyi aryahongyera Nyakubaho enimi mushanju n'empaya z'entaama mushanju ezitaine kamogo z'okuba ekitambo ky'okucwetsya. Kandi buri izooba atoije empaya y'embuzi kuba empongano. 
Ezekiel45:24 Aryatebeekanisa omutoijo gw'esaano, endengo emwe ahabwa buri nimi, endengo endiijo ahabw'empaya y'entaama, n'entsimbo emwe y'amajuta ahabwa buri ndengo." 
Ezekiel45:25 Omu kwezi kwa mushanju aha kiro kyakwo kya ikumi na bitaano, na buri izooba omu biro mushanju by'obwo bugyenyi, aryatwaza atyo, ahongye, atambe ebitambo by'okucwetsya kandi areete emitoijo y'esaano n'amajuta." 
Ezekiel46:1 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Eirembo ry'ekibuga ky'omunda eririkureeba burugwa-izooba omu biro mukaaga ebikorerwamu emirimo, riryaguma rikingirwe, kwonka riigurwe aha izooba rya Sabato n'aha izooba ry'okuboneka kw'okwezi." 
Ezekiel46:2 Omutegyeki aryaguma ataahire omu kisasi ky'eirembo eky'aheeru, ayemerere aha rubaju rw'ekiti ky'eryo irembo. Reero abahongyerezi batambe ekitambo ky'okucwetsya n'eky'okurya kumwe, ogwo mutegyeki aramize omu kisasi ky'eirembo; bwanyima ashohore, kwonka eirembo rirekye kukingwa, okuhitsya omu mwabazyo." 
Ezekiel46:3 Ahari buri Sabato n'ahari buri kuboneka kw'okwezi, abantu b'omuri egyo nsi baryaguma baramize omu maisho ga Nyakubaho aha muryango gw'eryo irembo." 
Ezekiel46:4 Ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, eki omutegyeki ariguma naahongyerera Nyakubaho ahari Sabato, kiryaba abaana b'entaama mukaaga n'empaya y'entaama, ezitaine kamogo." 
Ezekiel46:5 Kandi empongano y'esaano erikuhongwa n'egyo mpaya y'entaama eryaba endengo emwe, kandi esaano y'okuhongwa hamwe n'abaana b'entaama ebe nyingi nk'oku arikubaasa, hamwe na n'entsimbo y'amajuta, ahabwa buri ndengo." 
Ezekiel46:6 Okwezi ku kuriboneka, omutegyeki atoije enimi nto, abaana b'entaama mukaaga, n'empaya y'entaama, ezitaine kamogo." 
Ezekiel46:7 Kandi ahongye encuro y'esaano emwe ahabwa buri nimi, n'encuro emwe y'esaano ahabwa buri mpaya y'entaama, n'esaano nyingi ei ariba naabaasa ahabw'abaana b'entaama, hamwe n'entsimbo y'amajuta, ahabwa buri ncuro y'esaano." 
Ezekiel46:8 Omutegyeki ku ariba naataaha omuri Nyaruju, aryaguma arabe omu kisasi ky'eirembo; kandi n'omu kushohora, abe nimwo yaaraba." 
Ezekiel46:9 Kwonka abantu b'omuri egyo nsi ku bariija aha magyenyi agaatairweho kuramya Nyakubaho, oritaahira omu irembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho aizire kuramya, aryashohorera omu irembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo. Kandi oritaahira omu irembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, aryashohorera omu ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho. Tihariho muntu oriikirizibwa kugaruka omu irembo eri yaataahiramu, kureka aryagumizamu ashohore." 
Ezekiel46:10 Ku bariba nibataahamu, omutegyeki aryataahamu nabo; kandi ku bariba nibashohora, nawe ashohore." 
Ezekiel46:11 Aha biro by'amagyenyi n'aha biro bikuru ebyatairweho, empongano eryaguma ebe encuro emwe, ahabwa buri nimi nto, n'encuro emwe ahabwa buri mpaya y'entaama. Kandi ahabw'abaana b'entaama, omuntu ahe esaano nyingi nk'oku arikubaasa, hamwe n'entsimbo y'amajuta, ahabwa buri ncuro y'esaano." 
Ezekiel46:12 Omutegyeki ku aryenda kugira eki yaayenda kuhongyera Nyakubaho ayekundiire, yaaba kitambo ky'okucwetsya nari ekitambo ky'okugarukana, aryaigurirwa eirembo eririkureeba burugwa-izooba, atambe ekitambo ky'okucwetsya, n'ekitambo ky'okurya kumwe, nk'oku atwaza aha izooba rya Sabato. Bwanyima ashohore; kandi ku ariheza kushohora, eirembo rikingwe." 
Ezekiel46:13 Buri izooba omutegyeki aryaguma ahongyere Nyakubaho omwana gw'entaama oguhikize omwaka gumwe, kandi ogutaine kamogo, kuba ekitambo ky'okucwetsya; kandi aryaguma aguhongye buri kasheeshe." 
Ezekiel46:14 Aryagureeta n'empongano y'esaano buri kasheeshe na kimwe kya mukaaga ky'encuro y'esaano, na kimwe kya kashatu ky'entsimbo y'amajuta g'okw'orobya egyo saano, kuba empongano y'esaano ehongyeirwe Nyakubaho. Ekyo nikyo kiragiro ky'ekitambo y'okucwetsya ekiriguma nikitambwa." 
Ezekiel46:15 Omwana g'entaama n'empongano y'esaano n'amajuta g'omuoliva biryaguma bihongyerwe Nyakubaho buri kasheeshe ebiro byona. 
Ezekiel46:16 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Omugabe ku ariha omwe aha batabani omutoijo omu bi atungire, omu biragiro by'obuhunguzi kiryaba ekye na beeneishe." 
Ezekiel46:17 Kwonka ku ariha omwe aha bahuuku be omutoijo omu bi atungire, kiryaguma kiri ekye okuhitsya omu mwaka gw'okurekurwa kwe, bwanyima kigarukire omutegyeki; abatabani bonka nibo bariikirizibwa kuguma nakyo." 
Ezekiel46:18 Omutegyeki ataritwara ebintu by'abantu bangye. Eitaka eri ariha abatabani, aryariiha aha rye eri yaahairwe, arekye kutwara eitaka ry'abantu bangye, akabahata." 
Ezekiel46:19 Bwanyima yandabya aharikutaahirwa aha muryango gw'eirembo, yampitsya aha mushorongo gw'ebishengye ebirikwera eby'abahongyerezi, aby'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, naareeba omwanya aha muheru gwabyo aha rubaju rwa burengyerwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel46:20 Yangira ati: Hariya niho abahongyerezi bariguma nibateekyera ekitambo ky'ekarabo, empongano y'esaano, barekye kubishohoza omu kibuga ky'aheeru, bikareetera abantu kuteekateeka ngu n'abarikwera." 
Ezekiel46:21 Bwanyima yantwara omu kibuga ky'aheeru, yampitsya aha nshonda ina zaakyo, kandi ahari buri nshonda hakaba hariho ekibuga." 
Ezekiel46:22 Omuri ezo nshonda ina z'ekibuga hakaba harimu obubuga bukye, buri kamwe mikono makumi ana oburaingwa, na mikono makumi ashatu obukiika, bwona buna nibwingana." 
Ezekiel46:23 Omunda y'obwo bubuga bwona hakaba hombekirwemu omushorongo gw'ekisiika okwehinguririza, gwombekirwemu amahega g'okuteekyeraho embaju zoona." 
Ezekiel46:24 Yangira ati: Ago nigo mahega agu abaheereza b'omuri Nyaruju bariguma nibateekyeraho ebitambo ebireetsirwe abantu. 
Ezekiel47:1 Bwanyima yangarura aha muryango gwa Nyaruju, naareeba amaizi nigaruga aha nsi y'ekisasi kyayo, nigatoora oburugwa-izooba (ahabw'okuba Nyaruju niyo yaabaire neereeba); kandi ago maizi gakaba nigaruga okuzimu, nigashuumira aha rubaju rwa buryo rwa Nyaruju, nigaraba aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo bw'eitambiro." 
Ezekiel47:2 Atyo yanshohoreza aha irembo ry'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, yanziguurutsya yampitsya aha irembo ry'aheeru eririkureeba burugwa-izooba, naashanga ago maizi nigashohorera aha rubaju rwaryo rwa buryo." 
Ezekiel47:3 Ogwo muntu yaatoora aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba, aine omu ngaro omugoye gw'okugyeresa. Yaagyera ago maizi gaaba mikono rukumi, yaagaanyambutsya, naashanga nigahika aha bugombamburi." 
Ezekiel47:4 Yaagaruka yaagagyera, gaaba mikono rukumi, yaanyambutsya, naashanga nigahika omu maju. Kandi yaagyera mikono rukumi, aho naashanga nigakwata omunda." 
Ezekiel47:5 Yaagaruka yaagyera mikono rukumi, aho gwaba omugyera ogu ntarikubaasa kwambuka; ahabw'okuba amaizi gakaba gaijwire gahikire hare okuzimu gari ag'okuziha, gatarikubaasa kwambukwa n'amaguru." 
Ezekiel47:6 Kandi yangira ati: Iwe muntu 'we, ekyo waakireeba? Bwanyima yangarurayo, yandabya aha nkungu y'omugyera." 
Ezekiel47:7 Ku naabaire ningarukayo, naareeba emiti mingi aha mbaju zombi z'ogwo mugyera." 
Ezekiel47:8 Yangira ati: Amaizi aga nigahimintika nigatoora burugwa-izooba, gashuuma omuri Araba; ku garaahikye omu g'enyanja agasyaraire, ago maizi g'enyanja nigaija kuba marungi." 
Ezekiel47:9 Ei ogwo mugyera gurihika yoona, ebihuriire byona biryagira amagara; kandi haryabamu ebyenyanja bingi munonga, ahabw'okuba ago maizi nigaza omu nyanja ngu amaizi g'enyanja gabe marungi. N'ahabw'ekyo ei ogwo mugyera gurihika yoona, buri kintu kiryagira amagara." 
Ezekiel47:10 Okuruga Engedi okuhika Enegulaimu aha rubaju rw'enyanja, abajubi baryatega obutimba. Okwo haryaba hariyo ebyenyanja by'emiringo yoona, nk'eby'omu nyanja empango." 
Ezekiel47:11 Kwonka amaizi g'omu bisharara byayo n'ag'omu myanya yaayo y'orutenga tigariba marungi, kureka garyaba ag'okwihwamu omwonyo." 
Ezekiel47:12 Kandi aha mbaju zombi z'ogwo mugyera haryameraho emiti y'ebijuma birikuriibwa ey'emiringo yoona. Amababi gaayo tigarihotoka, n'ebijuma byayo tibirihunduura, kureka egyo miti eryaguma neeyana buri kwezi; ahabw'okuba amaizi gaayo nigaruga omu Mwanya Ogurikwera. Ebijuma byayo biryaba ebyokurya, n'amababi gaayo gabe omubazi gw'okutamba endwara." 
Ezekiel47:13 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba naagira ati: Egi niyo eriba emyatano nk'oku enganda ikumi na ibiri za Isiraeli ziribaganisizibwa ensi kuba obutaka bwabo. Yosefu aryagira emigabo ebiri. 
Ezekiel47:14 Muryagibagana omu bwinganisa, ahabw'okuba nkarahira kugiha baashoimwe; kandi eryaba obutaka bwanyu." 
Ezekiel47:15 Ogu nigwo guriba omwatano gw'ensi: Aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho guryaiha aha Nyanja empango, gurabe Heselooni, guhikye ahu orikutaahira nooza Hamasi na Zedadi;" 
Ezekiel47:16 kandi guhikye aha ndembo Berota, na Siburaimu eziri ahagati ya Damasiko na Hamasi, n'orurembo Hazarihatikooni oruri aha mwatano gwa Hauraani." 
Ezekiel47:17 Ogwo mwatano guryaruga aha nyanja, guhikye Hazarenooni erikwatana na Damasiko aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, n'ogwa Hamasi aha bukiizi nibwo bumwe. Ogwo nigwo guriba omwatano gw'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Ezekiel47:18 Aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba omwatano guryaruga Hazarenooni eri ahagati ya Hauraani na Damasiko, gugyende aha rubaju rwa Yorudaani ahagati ya Gileadi n'ensi ya Isiraeli, guhikye aha nyanja y'oburugwa-izooba, gugumizemu guhikye Tamari. Ogwo nigwo guriba omwatano gwa burugwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel47:19 Aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo guryaruga Tamari, guhikye aha maizi ga Meribati-kadeshi, gurugyeyo gurabe aha rubaju rw'akagyera ka Misiri, guhikye aha Nyanja empango. Ogwo nigwo mwatano gw'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo." 
Ezekiel47:20 Aha rubaju rwa burengyerwa-izooba Enyanja empango niyo eriba omwatano, okuhika ahashungaine n'ahu orikutaahira nooza Hamasi. Orwo nirwo ruriba orubaju rwa burengyerwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel47:21 Okwo nikwo muribagana egyo nsi, nk'oku enganda zaanyu ziri, ekaba obutaka bwanyu." 
Ezekiel47:22 Abanyamahanga abatwire naimwe, bakabazaariramu abaana, nabo baryatunga omugabo gwabo omuriimwe mwagibagana. Baryatwazibwa nk'enzaarwa, bagume babagane obutaka hamwe naimwe ab'enganda za Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel47:23 Buri munyaihanga weena aryaheebwa obutaka omu bantu b'oruganda ru ariba atwiremu; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira. 
Ezekiel48:1 Aga nigo maziina g'enganda. Daani aryabagana ekicweka ky'obutaka ekirikutandikira aha mwatano gw'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, okwiha aha Nyanja empango, okuraba Heselooni okuhitsya ahu orikutaahira nooza Hamasi. Agumizemu ahikye Hazarenooni aha mwatano gwa Damasiko ahashungaine na Hamasi, okuruga aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba okuhika burengyerwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel48:2 Asheri aryabagana ekicweka ekihereraine n'ekyanga kya Daani, okwiha burugwa-izooba okuhitsya burengyerwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel48:3 Nafutaali omugabo gwe guryaba ahahereraine n'ekyanga kya Asheri okuruga burugwa-izooba okuhika burengyerwa-izooba. 
Ezekiel48:4 Manaase abagane ekicweka ekihereraine n'ekyanga kya Nafutaali okuruga burugwa-izooba okuhika burengyerwa-izooba. 
Ezekiel48:5 Efuraimu omugabo gwe guryaba ahahereraine n'ekyanga kya Manaase, okwiha burugwa-izooba okuhitsya burengyerwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel48:6 Reubeeni nawe aryabagana ekicweka ky'obutaka ekihereraine n'ekyanga kya Efuraimu, okwiha burugwa-izooba, okuhitsya burengyerwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel48:7 Kandi Yuda omugabo gwe guryaba ahahereraine n'ekyanga kya Reubeeni, okuruga burugwa-izooba, okuhika burengyerwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel48:8 Ekicweka eki murishoroora ekirimu Omwanya Ogurikwera ahagati, ekihereraine n'ekyanga kya Yuda, okwiha burugwa-izooba okuhitsya burengyerwa-izooba, kiryaba mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano obukiika kandi oburaingwa bwakyo buryaigana n'ekicweka ky'oruganda okuruga burugwa-izooba okuhika burengyerwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel48:9 Ekicweka eki murishoroorera Nyakubaho kibe mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano oburaingwa, na mikono obukumi bubiri obukiika." 
Ezekiel48:10 Ekicweka ekyo ekishoroirwe, ekiine Omwanya gwa Nyakubaho ahagati kiryabaganwa kiti: Abahongyerezi baryatunga omugabo gw'ekicweka kya mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, mikono kakumi aha rubaju rwa burengyerwa-izooba, mikono kakumi aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba, na mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa buryo." 
Ezekiel48:11 Ekyo kicweka kiryaba eky'abahongyerezi beene Zadoki, abashoroirwe bakakora ebi naabaragiire, kandi abatarahabire hamwe n'Abaisiraeli, nk'oku Abaleevi baahabire." 
Ezekiel48:12 Ekyo kicweka ki abahongyerezi baacumiirwe ekihereraine n'eky'Abaleevi kiryaba ekirikwera munonga. 
Ezekiel48:13 Abaleevi baryaheebwa ekicweka ekihereeraine n'eky'abahongyerezi kya mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano oburaingwa, na mikono kakumi obukiika, oburaingwa bw'ekyo kicweka buryaba mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano, n'obukiika bwakyo bube mikono obukumi bubiri." 
Ezekiel48:14 Ekyo kicweka kyashorooreirwe Nyakubaho ekirikuhita ebindi, byona eby'omu nsi, tibarikitunda, nobu kwakuba okukihingisa ekindi; kandi tikiriheebwa bandi bantu; ahabw'okuba n'ekishorooreirwe Nyakubaho." 
Ezekiel48:15 Ekicweka ekiritsigaraho kya mikono enkumi itaano obukiika, na mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano oburaingwa, kiryaguma nikikoresibwa abandi ahabw'orwo rurembo kutuuramu n'okuriisizamu." 
Ezekiel48:16 Ahagati yaakyo haryabaho orurembo rurikwingana ruti: Aha rubaju rw'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho ruryaba mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano; orw'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano; orwa burugwa-izooba mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano; n'orwa burengyerwa-izooba narwo mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano; n'orwa burengyerwa-izooba narwo mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano. 
Ezekiel48:17 Kandi orwo rurembo ruryagira omwanya gw'akataajuure ka mikono magana abiri na makumi ataano aha rubaju rwa bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, mikono magana abiri na makumi ataano aha rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, mikono magana abiri na makumi ataano aha rwa burugwa-izooba, mikono magana abiri na makumi ataano aha rwa burengyerwa-izooba," 
Ezekiel48:18 Ekicweka ekiritsigaraho, ekihereeraine n'ekicweka ekirikwera, kiryaba mikono kakumi aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba na mikono kakumi aha rubaju rwa burengyerwa-izooba; kyona kihereraine n'ekyo kicweka kirikwera. Ebirishaaruurwamu biryaguma bibe ebyokurya by'abakozi b'omuri orwo rurembo." 
Ezekiel48:19 Kandi abakozi b'omuri orwo rurembo, ab'oruganda rwa Isiraeli, nibo bariguma nibakihinga." 
Ezekiel48:20 N'ahabw'ekyo ekicweka kyona eki muriihaho, kiryaba mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano embaju zaakyo ina, nikyo kicweka ekirikwera, hamwe n'omwanya gw'orurembo." 
Ezekiel48:21 Reero ekicweka ekiritsigara aha mbaju zombi ez'ekicweka ekirikwera, n'omwanya gw'orurembo, kiryaba eky'omutegyeki. N'ekindi kicweka ekiriba eky'omutegyeki, n'okwiha ahari ekyo kicweka kirikwera kya mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano, okuhitsya aha mwatano gwa burugwa-izooba, kandi n'okutoora burengyerwa-izooba okwiha ahari ekyo kicweka kirikwera kya mikono obukumi bubiri n'enkumi itaano, okuhitsya aha mwatano gwa burengyerwa-izooba, ahahereeraine n'ebyanga by'enganda. Ekyo kicweka kirikwera ekirimu Omwanya ogurikwera ahagati ya Nyaruju," 
Ezekiel48:22 hamwe n'ekyanga ky'Abaleevi n'eky'orurembo, biryaba ahagati y'eky'omutegyeki. Ekyo kyanga ky'omutegyeki kiryaba ahagati y'ekya Yuda na Benyamiini." 
Ezekiel48:23 Ezindi nganda ezitsigaireho, Benyamiini aryaheebwa ekyanga ekirikwiha burengyerwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel48:24 Ekyanga kya Simeoni kiryaiha burugwa-izooba ahahereeraine n'ekyanga kya Benyamiini, kihikye burengyerwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel48:25 Ekyanga ekya Isakaari kiryaruga burugwa-izooba, ahahereeraine n'ekyanga kya Simeoni, kihikye burengyerwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel48:26 Ekya Zebuluuni kiryaiha burugwa-izooba, ahahereeraine n'ekyanga kya Isakaari, kihikye burengyerwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel48:27 Reero ekya Gaadi kiryaiha burugwa-izooba, ahahereeraine n'ekyanga kya Zebuluuni, kihikye burengyerwa-izooba." 
Ezekiel48:28 Omwatano oguhereraine n'ekyanga kya Gaadi, aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, guryaruga Tamari, guhikye aha maizi ga Meribati-Kadeshi, gugumizemu gurabe aha rubaju rw'akagyera ka Misiri, guhikye aha Nyanja empango." 
Ezekiel48:29 Egyo niyo nsi ei muribagana, imwe ab'enganda za Isiraeli, ekaba obutaka bwanyu; kandi ebyo nibyo byanga byazo, buri ruganda; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira." 
Ezekiel48:30 Aga nigo gariba amarembo g'orwo rurembo; aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, orwa mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano," 
Ezekiel48:31 haryabaho amarembo ashatu. Eirembo rya Reubeeni, erya Yuda, n'erya Leevi garyayetererwa amaziina g'enganda za Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel48:32 Aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba, orwa mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano, n'amarembo ashatu, erya Yosefu, erya Benyamiini n'erya Daani." 
Ezekiel48:33 Aha rubaju rw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, orwa mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano, n'amarembo ashatu, erya Simeoni, erya Isakaari, n'erya Zebuluuni." 
Ezekiel48:34 Aha rubaju rwa burengyerwa-izooba, orwa mikono enkumi ina na magana ataano, nago gabe amarembo ashatu, erya Gaadi, erya Asheri n'erya Nafutaali." 
Ezekiel48:35 Orurembo rwona okurwehinguririza ruryaba mikono kakumi n'enkumi munaana. Kandi orwo rurembo okwiha obwo ruryayetwa, Nyakubaho ariyo." 
Daniel1:1 Omu mwaka gwa kashatu ogw'omu busingye bwa Yehoyakimu omugabe w'Abayuda, Nebukadenezaari omugabe wa Babulooni akaija Yerusalemu, yaagigota." 
Daniel1:2 Na Nyakubaho yaamurekurira Yehoyakimu omugabe w'Abayuda, hamwe n'ebintu bimwe eby'omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga, yaabitwara omu nsi ya Shinaari, yaabita omu ibiikiro ry'omu ndaaro ya baaruhanga be." 
Daniel1:3 Bwanyima ogwo mugabe yaragiira omushaahu we omukuru Ashipenaazi, kureeta bamwe aha bantu ba Isiraeli ab'omu ruganda rw'omugabe n'ab'orw'abakungu," 
Daniel1:4 abatsigazi abataaine kamogo, abarungi kandi abanyabwengye omu myoga yoona, abaine okumanya n'okwetegyereza, abeegire kandi abaine oburyo bw'okuheereza omu kikaari ky'omugabe, kubeegyesa okushoma n'okuhandiika orurimi rw'Abakaludaaya." 
Daniel1:5 Omugabe yaaragiira ku egabo yaabo eya buri izooba eguma neeruga aha byokurya birungi ebi yaabaire arya, n'aha viino ei yaabaire anywa, kumara emyaka eshatu nibeegyesibwa, ngu ku eraahweho babone kugaragira omugabe." 
Daniel1:6 Omuri abo hakaba harimu Daniyeli, Hananiya, Mishaeli na Azariya ab'omu ruganda rwa Yuda." 
Daniel1:7 Haza omukuru w'abashaahu yaabakubya amaziina aga: Daniyeli yaamweta Beliteshazaari, Hananiya yaamweta Shaduraaki, Mishaeli yaamweta Meshaki; na Azariya yaamweta Abedineego." 
Daniel1:8 Kwonka Daniyeli yaahamiza kimwe okuteehagazisa byokurya birungi by'omugabe, nari viino ei yaabaire anywa; n'ahabw'ekyo yaashaba omukuru w'abashaahu ngu amwikirize arekye kwehagaza." 
Daniel1:9 Haza Ruhanga yaamuha okutetsibwa n'okugirirwa esaasi omukuru w'abashaahu. 
Daniel1:10 Kwonka omukuru w'abashaahu yaagira Daniyeli ati: Nintiina mukama wangye omugabe, owaabateeraireho ebyokurya n'ebyokunywa, atakaareeba muhundami okukira abatsigazi b'ekingano kyanyu, akantemaho omutwe ahabwanyu." 
Daniel1:11 Bwanyima Daniyeli yaagira omugabuzi, ou omukuru w'abashaahu yaabaire ataireho kureeberera Hananiya, Mishaeli, Daniyeli na Azariya, ati:" 
Daniel1:12 Ninkweshengyereza, omare ebiro ikumi noogyeza abaheereza baawe. Itwe otuhe emboga, tube nizo twarya, n'amaizi kuba nigo twanywa." 
Daniel1:13 Bwanyima otureebe, otushushanise n'abatsigazi abarikurya ebyokurya by'omugabe ebirungi; reero oku oratushangye, obe nikwo waatutwaza itwe abairu baawe." 
Daniel1:14 Nawe yaahurira eki baamushaba, yaamara ebiro ikumi naabagyeza." 
Daniel1:15 Aha muhero gw'ebiro ikumi baareebwa bari barungi kandi bagomokire okukira abatsigazi boona ababaire nibarya ebyokurya birungi by'omugabe. 
Daniel1:16 Omugabuzi nikwo kubaihaho ebyokurya ebirungi na viino ei baabaire bari ab'okunywa, akaguma naabaha emboga." 
Daniel1:17 Haza abo batsigazi bana Ruhanga yaabaha okumanya n'okwetegyereza byona eby'omu bihandiiko, hamwe n'eby'obwengye, na Daniyeli yaamuha okwetegyereza eby'okworekwa hamwe n'ebirooto." 
Daniel1:18 Obunaku obu omugabe yaaragiire kubareeteramu ku bwahikire, omukuru w'abashaahu yaabareeta omu maisho ga Nebukadenezaari." 
Daniel1:19 Omugabe yaagaaniira nabo, kandi omuribo tihaashangwamu n'omwe ori nka Daniyeli, Hananiya, Mishaeli na Azariya; n'ahabw'ekyo baaba nibo baagaragira omugabe." 
Daniel1:20 Kandi omu buri kintu kyona eky'obwengye n'eky'okwetegyereza eki omugabe yaabaire ababuuza, akashanga nibakira oburungi emirundi ikumi abafumu n'abaraguzi abaabaire bari omu bugabe bwe bwona." 
Daniel1:21 Daniyeli yaagumizamu atyo, okuhitsya omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'Omugabe Kuuro." 
Daniel2:1 Omu mwaka gwa kabiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Nebukadenezaari, Nebukadenezaari ogwo akaroota ekirooto, omutima gwe tigwagira busingye, yaaburwa oturo." 
Daniel2:2 Nikwo kuragiira ku beeta abafumu n'abateezi b'ebyatsi n'abarogi n'Abakaludaaya, kumurootororera ebirooto bye. Nabo baija, baayemerera omu maisho ge." 
Daniel2:3 Omugabe yaabagira ati: Ndootsire ekirooto, omutima gwangye gwaburwa obusingye ahabw'okwenda kukimanya." 
Daniel2:4 Abakaludaaya baamugira bati: Nyakusinga omugabe, karamaare! Itwe abairu baawe tugambire ekyo kirooto, haza tukumanyise amakuru gaakyo." 
Daniel2:5 Omugabe nawe agarukamu abo Bakaludaaya ati: Eki naaza kubagambira kihamire; ku muraabe mutammanyise ekyo kirooto n'amakuru gaakyo, niinyija kubataanyaguza, amaju gaanyu ngahindure amatongo." 
Daniel2:6 Kwonka ku murakiimmanyise n'amakuru gaakyo, niinyija kubaha ebiconco n'ebihembo n'ekitiinwa kingi. Mbwenu nu, nimmumanyise ekyo kirooto n'amakuru gaakyo." 
Daniel2:7 Baamugarukamu obwa kabiri bati: Nyakusinga, itwe abagaragwa baawe, otugambire ekyo kirooto, haza tukikurootororere." 
Daniel2:8 Omugabe yaabagarukamu ati: Nimmanyira kimwe ku murikwenda kumara omwanya gwa busha, ahabw'okuba nimumanya ku eki naagamba kihamire." 
Daniel2:9 Ku muraabe mutandootororeire ekyo kirooto, ekifubiro kyanyu ni kimwe kyonka. Mwaija mwine enaama y'okumbeiha n'okugambira ebitahikire omu maisho gangye, okuhitsya obu obunaku buraahingure. N'ahabw'ekyo nimungambire ekyo kirooto, niho ndaamanyire ku murikubaasa kukindootororera." 
Daniel2:10 Abakaludaaya baagarukamu ogwo mugabe bati: Tihariho muntu omuri egi nsi, owaakubaasa kumarira Nyakusinga eki arikwenda, ahabw'okuba tihariho mugabe mukuru kandi ow'obushoboorozi orabuurize ekintu nk'ekyo omufumu weena nari omuraguzi, nainga Omukaludaaya." 
Daniel2:11 Eki Nyakusinga arikubuuza kigumire, tihariho orikubaasa kukimumanyisa, kureka baaruhanga abatatuura mu bantu." 
Daniel2:12 Ekyo kyareetera omugabe kuguubwa kubi n'okugira ekiniga kingi; yaaragiira ku abanyabwengye b'omuri Babulooni boona bacwekyerezibwa. 
Daniel2:13 Ekiragiro kyashohozibwa ekirikugira ngu abanyabwengye baitwe, kandi baasherura Daniyeli na bagyenzi be kubaita." 
Daniel2:14 Bwanyima Daniyeli yaagarukamu n'obwengye naayerinda Ariyoki, omukuru w'abarinzi b'omugabe, owaagiire kwita abanyabwengye b'omuri Babulooni." 
Daniel2:15 Yaagira Ariyoki, omukuru w'engabo z'omugabe ati: Ahabw'enki omugabe ashohoize ekiragiro kitaine saasi kityo? Ariyoki nikwo kukishoboororera Daniyeli." 
Daniel2:16 Daniyeli nikwo kuza omu maisho g'omugabe, akamushaba kumuha obunaku bu araizireho kumushoboororera amakuru g'ekyo kirooto." 
Daniel2:17 Ebyo ku bihwa, Daniyeli aza omuka, abiteekyerereza bagyenzi be Hananiya, Mishaeli na Azariya," 
Daniel2:18 abagambira kweshegyereza Ruhanga ow'omu iguru kubagirira embabazi, akabashuuruurira ekyo kintu kiremire eimanya, ngu we Daniyeli na bagyenzi be barekye kwitirwa hamwe n'abandi banyabwengye b'omuri Babulooni." 
Daniel2:19 Bwanyima ekyo kintu kitarikumanywa kishuuruurirwa Daniyeli omu kworekwa kwa nyekiro. Nawe nikwo kusiima Ruhanga ow'omu iguru," 
Daniel2:20 naagira ati: Eiziina rya Ruhanga rihimbisibwe ebiro byona, ahabw'okuba niwe agira obwengye n'obushoboorozi." 
Daniel2:21 Niwe ahindura obunaku n'emyaka, akaihaho abagabe, akataho abandi. Niwe aha obwesigye abanyabwengye n'abarikwetegyereza, akabaha okumanya." 
Daniel2:22 Ashuuruura eby'okuzimu n'ebitarikumanywa, amanya eby'omu mwirima, n'omushana gutuura ahu ari." 
Daniel2:23 Ai Ruhanga wa baatatenkuru, ninkusiima kandi ninkuhimbisa, ahabw'okuba wampa obwengye n'amaani. Mbwenu wanshoboororera eki twakushaba, ahabw'okuba waatumanyisa eki Omugabe arikwenda." 
Daniel2:24 Bwanyima Daniyeli aza owa Ariyoki, ou omugabe yaabaire aragiire kucwekyereza abanyabwengye b'omuri Babulooni, amugira ati: Otacwekyereza abanyabwengye b'omuri Babulooni, kureka ontware omu maisho g'omugabe, mmushoboororere amakuru g'ekyo kirooto." 
Daniel2:25 Ariyoki nawe arahuka kutwara Daniyeli omu maisho g'omugabe, amugira ati: Naareeba omushaija w'omu Bayuda abaanyagirwe, orikubaasa kukushoboororera amakuru g'ekirooto kyawe, Nyakusinga." 
Daniel2:26 Omugabe abuuza Daniyeli, owaabaire naayetwa Beliteshazaari, ati: Noobaasa kummanyisa ekirooto ki ndootsire n'okunshoboororera amakuru gaakyo?" 
Daniel2:27 Daniyeli amugarukamu ati: Tihariho banyabwengye, n'obu baakuba abarogi nari abafumu, nainga abaraguzi b'eby'enyonyoozi, abarikubaasa kukumanyisa ekitarikumanywa eki iwe, Nyakusinga, orikubuuza," 
Daniel2:28 kureka Ruhanga ow'omu iguru oshuuruura ebitabaasa kumanywa, niwe akumanyiise, iwe Omugabe Nebukadenezaari, ebiribaho omu biro ebiriija. Ekirooto kyawe n'ebi oyorekirwe obyami aha kitanda, nibyo ebi:" 
Daniel2:29 Nyakusinga, ku obaire obyami aha kitanda, waizirwa ebiteekateeko by'ebiribaho omu biro ebiriija, kandi ogwo oshuuruura ebitabaasa kumanywa, niwe akumanyiise ebiribaho." 
Daniel2:30 Kandi nyowe ekitabaasa kumanywa ekyo, tinkishuuruuriirwe ngu ahabw'okuba nyine obwengye oburikukira obw'abandi boona, kureka ngu iwe omugabe omanyisibwe amakuru gaakyo, kandi omanye ebikuri omu mutima." 
Daniel2:31 Eego, Nyakusinga, oyorekirwe! Mbwenu eki oreebire n'ekishushani rutaaba ekirikumurinkana munonga kirumbaire omu maisho gaawe, kandi ekibaire nikitiinisa." 
Daniel2:32 Omutwe gwakyo gubaire guri ogw'ezaabu enungi, ekifuba kyakyo n'emikono yaakyo biri eby'efeeza, enda yaakyo n'ebibero biri eby'omuringa," 
Daniel2:33 amaguru gaakyo gari ag'ekyoma, kandi ebigyere byakyo biri eby'ekyoma n'eibumba." 
Daniel2:34 Ku obaire okihangireyo amaisho, haatimbirayo eibaare ritaine orihigwire, ryateera ekyo kishushani aha bigyere byakyo eby'ekyoma n'eibumba, ryabisheenyagura." 
Daniel2:35 Bwanyima ekyo kyoma n'eibumba n'omuringa n'efeeza n'ezaabu, byona hamwe byasheenyagurika, byaba nk'omweziga gw'omu mahuuriro g'omu kyanda, omuyaga gwabituntumura, byabuza ekirari. Kwonka eibaare eriteire ekyo kishushani, ryahinduka orushozi ruhango, rwaijura ensi yoona." 
Daniel2:36 Ekyo nikyo kirooto ki orootsire. Mbwenu, Nyakusinga, twaza kukugambira amakuru gaakyo." 
Daniel2:37 Nyakusinga, omugabe w'abagabe, manya niiwe Ruhanga ow'omu iguru yaahaire obugabe n'amaani n'obushoboorozi n'ekitiinwa," 
Daniel2:38 kandi niiwe yaakwatsize abantu n'enyamaishwa n'enyonyi, akakuhindura omutegyeki waabyo byona ahi bituura; mbwenu niiwe mutwe gw'ezaabu." 
Daniel2:39 Ku orirugaho, haryaimuka obundi bugabe oburikukirwa obwawe, bwanyima hakurateho obugabe bwa kashatu obw'omuringa, oburitegyeka ensi yoona." 
Daniel2:40 Kandi haryabaho obugabe bwa kana, obugumire nk'ekyoma, ahabw'okuba ekyoma kisheenyagura ebintu byona, kibicwa obusaasingo; kandi nk'oku ekyoma kisheenyagura, nikwo obwo bugabe burisheenyagura obundi bwona, bukabucwa obusaasingo." 
Daniel2:41 Mbwenu nk'oku oreebire ebigyere n'ebikumu biri eby'eibumba n'ekyoma, nikwo obwo bugabe buryebaganisamu; kwonka omuribwo haryabamu obugumi bw'ekyoma, nk'oku oreebire ekyoma kijwangire n'eibumba ryorobi." 
Daniel2:42 Kandi nk'oku ebikumu by'ebigyere bibaire biri eby'ekyoma n'eibumba, nikwo obwo bugabe ekicweka kyabwo kiriba eky'amaani, n'ekindi kiriba ekitaine maani." 
Daniel2:43 Nk'oku oreebire ekyoma kijwangire n'eibumba ryorobi, nikwo barishwerana; kwonka batabe bamwe, nk'oku ekyoma kitajwanga na ibumba." 
Daniel2:44 Omu biro by'abo bagabe, Ruhanga ow'omu iguru aryataho obundi bugabe obutaricwekyerezibwa ebiro byona, kandi obutarihungurwa rindi ihanga. Buryasheenyagura obugabe obwo bwona, bubumareho; haza bwo bugumeho ebiro byona," 
Daniel2:45 nk'oku oreebire, buzimazima, eibaare rihanantukire omu rushozi ritahigwirwe muntu, ryashenyagura ekyoma n'omuringa n'eibumba n'efeeza n'ezaabu. Ruhanga Omukuru niwe akumanyiise, iwe Nyakusinga omugabe, ebiribaho omu biro ebiriija. Ekyo kirooto n'eky'amazima, n'amakuru gaakyo tigarikubanganisibwa." 
Daniel2:46 Mpaho Omugabe Nebukadenezaari ajuumara omu maisho ga Daniyeli, amuha ekitiinwa, aragiira ku bamutambira ekitambo n'okumwoterera obubaani." 
Daniel2:47 Ogwo mugabe agira Daniyeli ati: Buzimazima Ruhanga waawe ni Ruhanga wa baaruhanga, Nyakubaho w'abagabe, kandi oshuuruura ebitabaasa kumanywa, ahabw'okuba waashoboorora ekiremire abantu kumanya." 
Daniel2:48 Bwanyima omugabe yaaha Daniyeli ebitiinwa bikuru n'ebiconco bingi bihango, yaamuhindura omutegyeki w'eishaza rya Babulooni kandi omureeberezi mukuru w'abanyabwengye baayo." 
Daniel2:49 Daniyeli ku yaashabire omugabe ab'okumuhwera, onu yaataho Shaduraaki na Meshaki na Abedineego kureeberera eby'omu ishaza rya Babulooni; reero Daniyeli we yaaguma omu kikaari ky'omugabe." 
Daniel3:1 Omugabe Nebukadenezaari akakora ekishushani ky'ezaabu ky'obwemi bwa mikono makumi mukaaga, n'obukiizi bwa mikono mukaaga. Yaakita omu ruhita rwa Duura omu ishaza rya Babulooni." 
Daniel3:2 Yaaragiira ab'amashaza, abareeberezi, abategyeki bakuru, abahanuuzi, ababiiki, abahi b'ebiragiro, abaramuzi n'abakungu boona ab'omu mashaza, kuteeranira hamwe kuhaasirira ekishushani ki yaataireho." 
Daniel3:3 Mpaho ab'amashaza n'abareeberezi n'abategyeki bakuru n'abahanuuzi n'ababiiki n'abahi b'ebiragiro n'abaramuzi n'abakungu boona ab'omu byanga, baateeranira hamwe kuhaasirira ekishushani ki Omugabe Nebukadenezaari ataireho, baayemerera omu maisho gaakyo." 
Daniel3:4 Omurangirizi yaarangirira n'eiraka rihango ati: Imwe abantu b'amahanga n'ab'enganda n'aba ibara rurimi nimuragiirwa," 
Daniel3:5 ngu ku muraahurire amaraka g'enzamba, esheegu, endingiri, amakondere, enanga, obunyamurera n'emiringo yoona ey'ebirikujumeeza amaraka, mujuumare ahansi, muramye ekishushani ky'ezaabu eki Omugabe Nebukadenezaari ataireho." 
Daniel3:6 Kandi weena oraabe atajuumaire ahansi akakiramya, naija kunagwa ahonaaho omu kikoomi ky'omuriro ogurikubuguma." 
Daniel3:7 Ahonaaho abantu boona ku baahuriire amaraka g'enzamba n'esheegu n'endingiri n'amakondere n'enanga n'obunyamurera na byona ebirikujumeeza amaraka, ab'amahanga goona n'enganda n'endimi baajumara ahansi, baaramya ekishushani ky'ezaabu eki Omugabe Nebukadenezaari yaataireho." 
Daniel3:8 Omuri ago magingo Abakaludaaya abamwe bakaija baarega Abayudaaya. 
Daniel3:9 Baagira Omugabe Nebukadenezaari bati: Nyakusinga, karamaare!" 
Daniel3:10 Nyakusinga, otaireho ekiragiro ngu omuntu weena oraahurire amaraka g'enzamba, esheegu, endingiri, eikondere, enanga, obunyamurera, na kyona ekirikujumeeza amaraka, ajuumare ahansi aramye ekishushani ky'ezaabu;" 
Daniel3:11 kandi ngu weena oraayangye kujuumara ahansi, akakiramya, anagwe omu kikoomi ky'omuriro gurikubuguma." 
Daniel3:12 Mbwenu hariho Abayudaaya bamwe, abu waataireho kureeberera eishaza rya Babulooni, nibo aba: Shaduraaki, Meshaki na Abedineego. Nyakusinga, abo bantu tibarikukwetaho, tibarikuheereza baaruhanga baawe, nari okuramya ekishushani ky'ezaabu eki otaireho."
