Daniel3:13 Nebukadenezaari nikwo kuragiira, n'ekiniga kingi, ku bareeta Shaduraaki, Meshaki na Abedineego. Batyo bareeta abo bashaija omu maisho g'omugabe." 
Daniel3:14 Nebukadenezaari abagira ati: Imwe Shaduraaki na Meshaki na Abedineego, n'eky'amazima mwangire kuheereza baaruhanga bangye, nari okuramya ekishushani ky'ezaabu eki ntaireho?" 
Daniel3:15 Mbwenu ku muraahurire amaraka g'enzamba, esheegu, endingiri, amakondere, enanga, obunyamurera, na byona ebirikujumeeza amaraka, mwaikiriza kujuumara ahansi kuramya ekishushani ki naakozire, biri obwo ni gye; kwonka ku muraayangye kukiramya, ahonaaho nimwija kunagwa omu kikoomi ky'omuriro gurikubuguma. Mbwenu ni Ruhanga ki oraabaanyihe omu mikono?" 
Daniel3:16 Shaduraaki na Meshaki na Abedineego bagarukamu omugabe bati: Nyakusinga Nebukadenezaari, tikirikutwetengyesa kukugarukamu eki waatugambira." 
Daniel3:17 Ku kiraabe kwo, Ruhanga waitu ou tuheereza naabaasa kutwiha omuri ekyo kikoomi ky'omuriro ogurikubuguma, kandi atwihe omu mikono yaawe, Nyakusinga Omugabe." 
Daniel3:18 Kwonka n'obu kiraabe kitabaire kityo, Nyakusinga Omugabe, okimanye ku tutarikwija kuheereza baaruhanga baawe, n'obu kwakuba okuramya ekishushani ky'ezaabu eki otaireho." 
Daniel3:19 Nebukadenezaari ekiniga kyayenda kumubarura, yaahinduriza ahamaisho ateire Shaduraaki na Meshaki na Abedineego ekitsyori. Yaaragiira ku beenegyeza omuriro omu kikoomi emirundi mushanju okukira oku batakagwenegyezaga." 
Daniel3:20 Kandi yaaragiira abashaija b'amaani ab'omu ngabo ze kuboha Shaduraaki, Meshaki na Abedineego, bakabanaga omu kikoomi ky'omuriro ogurikubuguma." 
Daniel3:21 Abo bashaija baababoha bajwaire eminagiro yaabo n'ekanzu n'enkofiira n'ebindi bijwaro, baabanaga omu kikoomi ky'omuriro gurikubuguma." 
Daniel3:22 Kandi ahabw'ekiragiro ky'omugabe kuba ekihamire, n'ekikoomi kwotsya munonga, endimi z'omuriro zaita abashaija abaanagiremu Shaduraaki na Meshaki na Abedineego." 
Daniel3:23 Reero aba bashaija bonshatu, Shaduraaki, Meshaki na Abedineego, baagwa gangari omu kikoomi ky'omuriro gurikubuguma babohirwe." 
Daniel3:24 Bwayima Omugabe Nebukadenezaari akatangaara, yaimuka n'obwira, yaabuuza abahanuuzi be ati: Beitu omu muriro titwanagamu abashaija bashatu? Nabo baamugarukamu bati: N'eky'amazima, Nyakusinga Omugabe!" 
Daniel3:25 Nawe yaabagarukamu ati: Kwonka shi, ka nindeeba abashaija bana batabohirwe, nibagyendagyenda ahagati y'omuriro, kandi batabaireho kabi; haza enshusha y'owa kana ni nk'ey'omwana wa baaruhanga!" 
Daniel3:26 Mpaho Nebukadenezaari airira aha munwa gw'ekikoomi ky'omuriro gurikubuguma, agira ati: Imwe Shaduraaki na Meshaki na Abedineego, abaheereza ba Ruhanga Rukiraboona, nimurugyeyo mwije aha! Batyo Shaduraaki na Meshaki na Abedineego baruga omuri ogwo muriro." 
Daniel3:27 Ab'amashaza n'abareeberezi n'abategyeki bakuru n'abahanuuzi b'omugabe baateeranira hamwe, baashanga ogwo muriro gutaine ki gwitsize emibiri y'abo bashaija, eishokye ry'aha mitwe yaabo ritababukire, eminagiro yaabo etabaireho kabi, kandi batarikunuuka kibabo ky'omuriro." 
Daniel3:28 Nebukadenezaari nikwo kugira ati: Ruhanga wa Shaduraaki na Meshaki na Abedineego, asiimwe, Ogwo owaayohereza maraika we, akajuna abaheereza be abaamwesiga, bakahindura busha ekiragiro kyangye omugabe, bakahayo emibiri yaabo okukira okuheereza n'okuramya ruhanga ondi otari Ruhanga waabo." 
Daniel3:29 N'ahabw'ekyo naataho ekiragiro nti: Ab'amahanga goona n'ab'enganda n'ab'endimi abarirogota ahari Ruhanga wa Shaduraaki na Meshaki na Abedineego, baryataanyaguzibwa, amaka gaabo gahindurwe amatongo; ahabw'okuba tihariho Ruhanga ondi weena orikubaasa kujuna omu muringo nk'ogu." 
Daniel3:30 Bwanyima ogwo mugabe yaakuza Shaduraaki, Meshaki na Abedineego omu ishaza rya Babulooni." 
Daniel4:1 Nyowe Omugabe Nebukadenezaari, imwe mwena ab'omu mahanga goona n'enganda n'endimi zitari zimwe, abatwire omu nsi yoona, naabahandiikira nimbendeza obusingye ku bukanya omuriimwe." 
Daniel4:2 Naareeba kiri kirungi kubooreka obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza ebi Ruhanga Rukiraboona ankoreire. 
Daniel4:3 Obumanyiso bwe ka ni bukuru! Eby'okutangaaza bye ka n'eby'amaani! Obukama bwe n'obukama obutahwaho, n'obutegyeki bwe n'obw'obusingye n'obusingye!" 
Daniel4:4 Nyowe Nebukadenezaari, nkaba nyagaramisiriirize omu nju yangye, ngogyereire omu kikaari yangye," 
Daniel4:5 naaroota ekirooto kyantiiniise. Manya ku naabaire mbyami aha kitanda, ebiteekateeko bya waringa n'ebi naayorekirwe omu mutwe gwangye byanyitsa obwoba." 
Daniel4:6 Nikyo naaragiriire ku bandeetera abanyabwengye b'omuri Babulooni boona, bakammanyisa amakuru g'ekyo kirooto." 
Daniel4:7 Reero abafumu n'abaraguzi n'Abakalidaaya n'ab'eby'enyonyoozi baija; naanye naabagambira ekyo kirooto, kwonka baaremwa kunshoboorororera amakuru gaakyo." 
Daniel4:8 Bwanyima Daniyeli yaija omu maisho gangye, niwe ogwo owaayetsirwe Beliteshazaari, naayetererwa ruhanga wangye, kandi owaabaire arimu mutima wa baaruhanga abarikwera ntyo mmugambira ekyo kirooto nti:" 
Daniel4:9 Iwe Beliteshazaari, mukuru w'abafumu, nimmanya ku mutima wa baaruhanga abarikwera ari omuriiwe, kandi ku hatariho ekirema abandi kumanya, ekikushobera! Mbwenu eki nikyo kirooto ki ndootsire; kindootororere." 
Daniel4:10 Ebi nyorekirwe omu mutwe mbyami aha kitanda, nibyo ebi: Ku ngiire kugira nti, naareeba omuti muraingwa munonga gurumbaire ahagati y'ensi." 
Daniel4:11 Ogwo muti gwakura, gwakagata, omutwe gwagwo gwahika omu iguru, gwareebwa ab'aha muheru gw'ensi yoona," 
Daniel4:12 amababi gaagwo gaabengyeya, n'ebijuma byagwo byashaagaana; gwagira ebyokurya birikuriisa ebintu byona, enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa zaagwegamamu, enyonyi z'omu kaabunga zaayarika omu mataagi gaagwo, n'ebiine omubiri byona byaba nigwo byaryaho." 
Daniel4:13 Omuri okwo kworekwa kw'omu mutwe gwangye, mbyami aha kitanda, ku ngiire kugira nti, naareeba omurinzi orikwera yaashuuma naaruga omu iguru." 
Daniel4:14 Yaayamuza n'eiraka rihango naagira ati: Tema ogwo muti, ogutemeho n'amataagi, ogukonkobore amababi, ebijuma byagwo obinaganagye; enyamaishwa z'ahansi yaagwo n'enyonyi z'omu mataagi gaagwo zihungye." 
Daniel4:15 Kwonka ekitsintsi n'emizi yaagwo okirekye omu itaka omu bunyaatsi bw'omuroba obw'omu ishwa, okikomese ekigazi ky'ekyoma n'omuringa; haza ogurekye gujubibwe orume rw'omu iguru, gugume gurye obunyaatsi hamwe n'enyamaishwa." 
Daniel4:16 Omutima gwagwo gurekyere aho kuba ogw'omuntu, ogw'enyamaishwa gube nigwo gwaguzamu; gugume gutyo okumara emyaka nka mushanju." 
Daniel4:17 Ekyo kifubiro kitairweho abarinzi, kyahamibwa ekigambo ky'abarikwera, ngu ekiine amagara kyona kimanye ku Rukiraboona niwe ategyeka obugabe bw'abantu, akabuha ou arikwenda, akabutegyekyesa abarikukira kwekyehesa omu bantu." 
Daniel4:18 Ekyo nikyo kirooto eki nyowe Omugabe Nebukadenezaari ndootsire. Mbwenu iwe, Beliteshazaari, ba niiwe wangambira amakuru gaakyo, ahabw'okuba abanyabwengye b'omu bugabe bwangye baremirwe kummanyisa amakuru gaakyo; kwonka iwe noobaasa, ahabw'okuba mutima wa baaruhanga abarikwera ari omuriiwe." 
Daniel4:19 Bwanyima Daniyeli, owaabaire naayetwa Beliteshazaari, akamara akaanya ashobeirwe, kandi ayemereize omutima ahabw'ebiteekateeko. Omugabe yaamugira ati: Beliteshazaari, ekyo kirooto n'amakuru gaakyo nibikwemerezesa omutima? Beliteshazaari yaamugarukamu ati: Mukama wangye, ekyo kirooto nikikabe aha barikukwanga, n'amakuru gaakyo nigakabe aha bazigu baawe!" 
Daniel4:20 Omuti ogu oreebire, ogukuzire gukakagata, omutwe gwagwo gukahika ahaiguru, gukareebwa ab'aha muheru gw'ensi yoona," 
Daniel4:21 ogu amababi gaagwo gaabaire nigabengyeya, ebijuma byagwo bishaagaine, ogurimu ebyokurya birikuriisa ebintu byona, ogurikwegamwamu enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa, kandi ogu amataagi gaagwo garikwarikwamu enyonyi z'omu kaabunga" 
Daniel4:22 Nyakusinga, ogwo muti niiwe, owaakuzire okakagata; obukuru bwawe bukeeyongyera bukahika omu iguru, n'obutegyeki bwawe bukahika aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Daniel4:23 Mbwenu nk'oku iwe Nyakusinga, oreebire omurinzi orikwera naashuuma naaruga omu iguru, naagira ati: Tema ogwo muti, ogumareho, kwonka ekitsintsi n'emizi yaagwo obirekye aha binyaatsi bikomesiibwe ekigazi ky'ekyoma n'omuringa omu muroba gw'omu ishwa, haza ogurekye gujubibwe orume rw'omu iguru, gugume gurye obunyaatsi hamwe n'enyamaishwa z'omu ishwa okumara emyaka nka mushanju;" 
Daniel4:24 Nyakusinga, amakuru gaakyo nigo aga: Ekyo n'ekiragiro ekitairweho Rukiraboona, ekyahika ahariiwe mukama wangye omugabe." 
Daniel4:25 Noija kubingwa omu bantu, otuure n'enyamaishwa omu ishwa, orye obunyaatsi nk'ente, ojubibwe orume rurikuruga omu iguru, omare otyo emyaka nka mushanju, okuhitsya obu orimanya ku Rukiraboona niwe ategyeka obugabe bw'abantu, kandi ku abuha ou arikwenda." 
Daniel4:26 Reero nk'oku kyaragiirwe kutsigaho ekitsintsi n'emizi by'ogwo muti, obugabe bwawe nibwija kukugumiraho, okuhitsya obu orimanya ku Ow'omu iguru niwe ategyeka." 
Daniel4:27 N'ahabw'ekyo Nyakusinga, ikiriza eki ndikukuhabura. Kora eby'okuhikiirira, bikutsigiseho okukora ebibi; ogirire embabazi abarikuhatwa, kikurekyese kucumura obundi, obusingye bwawe bukaabaasa kwongyerwaho." 
Daniel4:28 Ebyo byona bikahika aha Mugabe Nebukadenezaari. 
Daniel4:29 Ku haahingwireho ameezi ikumi n'abiri, ku yaabaire naagyendagyenda aha mutwe gwa Nyaruju y'obugabe omuri Babulooni," 
Daniel4:30 ogwo mugabe yaagira ati: Egi ti Babulooni rugambwa, ei nyowe naayeyombekyeire n'amaani g'obushoboorozi bwangye, kuba ekikaari ky'obugabe n'okuhaisa obugabe bwangye ekitiinwa?" 
Daniel4:31 Ebyo bigambo ku byabaire bitakamurugire mu kanwa, eiraka ryayema omu iguru, ryagira riti: Iwe Mugabe we Nebukadenezaari, niiwe ndikugambira! Obugabe bwakurugaho." 
Daniel4:32 Noija kubingwa omu bantu, otuure n'enyamaishwa omu ishwa, orye obunyaatsi nk'ente, omare otyo emyaka nka mushanju, okuhiitsya obu orimanya ku Rukiraboona niwe ategyeka obugabe bw'abantu kandi ku abuha ou arikwenda." 
Daniel4:33 Ahonaaho ekyo kigambo kyahikiirira ahari Nebukadenezaari. Yaabingwa omu bantu, yaarya obunyaatsi nk'ente, omubiri gwe gwajubibwa orume rurikuruga omu iguru, okuhitsya obu eishokye rye ryashokoize nk'ebyoya by'empungu, ebyara bye bikaba nk'amaara g'enyonyi." 
Daniel4:34 Ebyo biro ku byahwaire, nyowe Nebukadenezaari, naimutsya amaisho gangye omu iguru, naagarukwamu obwengye, naasiima Rukiraboona otuuraho ebiro byona, naamuhimbisa kandi naamuha ekitiinwa; ahabw'okuba obutegyeki bwe n'obw'ebiro byona, n'obugabe bwe bugumaho obusingye n'obusingye;" 
Daniel4:35 abatwire omu nsi boona babarwa nk'abatari kintu, kandi akora nk'oku arikwenda omu mahe g'omu iguru n'omu batwire omu nsi. Tihariho orikubaasa kumuteera aha mukono, nari okumugira ati: Ekyo nookora ki?" 
Daniel4:36 Ago magingo naagarukwamu obwengye; kandi obukuru bwangye n'okwizihirwa kwangye byangarukaho kureetera obugabe bwangye ekitiinwa. Abahanuuzi bangye n'abakungu bangye bankubuukira, naahamibwa omu bugabe bwangye n'obukuru bwangye bwayongyerwaho." 
Daniel4:37 Mbwenu, nyowe Nebukadenezaari, nikyo ndikuhimbisiza omugabe w'omu iguru, nkamusingiza, kandi nkamuha ekitiinwa, ahabw'okuba byona ebi akora bihikire, n'emitwarize ye eba ey'oburyo; kandi abagira emitwarize y'okwetunguura tabura kubabundika." 
Daniel5:1 Omugabe Belishazaari akateekyera abakungu be rukumi obugyenyi bwingi, yaanywera viino omu maisho gaabo." 
Daniel5:2 Belishazaari ku yaarorize ati ahari egyo viino, yaaragiira ku bareeta ebikopo by'ezaabu n'eby'efeeza ebi Nebukadenezaari ishe yaabaire anyagire omuri Nyaruju y'omuri Yerusalemu, ngu we omugabe n'abakungu be n'abakazi be n'ebinyanshunju bye babinywereho." 
Daniel5:3 Batyo baareeta ebyo bikopo by'ezaabu n'eby'efeeza ebyabaire biihirwe omuri Nyaruju, enju ya Ruhanga ey'omuri Yerusalemu, Omugabe n'abakungu be n'abakazi be n'ebinyanshunju bye baabinyweraho." 
Daniel5:4 Baanywa viino kandi baahimbisa baaruhanga baabo ab'ezaabu n'efeeza n'emiringa n'ebyoma n'ebiti n'amabaare. 
Daniel5:5 Ahonaaho enkumu z'omukono gw'omuntu zaareebwa nizihandiika aha buhome bw'ekisiika ky'ekikaari ky'omugabe, ekirikureebana n'ekikondo ky'amatabaaza; n'omugabe yaareeba ogwo mukono niguhandiika." 
Daniel5:6 Reero omugabe yaashusha okundi, ebiteekateeko byamureetera kwemereza omutima, engingo zaajogajogoka n'amaju ge gaahondana." 
Daniel5:7 Yaaborooga naayeta ku bamureetera abaraguzi n'Abakalidaaya n'ab'eby'enyonyoozi. Ogwo mugabe yaagira abanyabwengye b'omuri Babulooni ati: Weena oraashome eki kihandiiko, akanshoboororera amakuru gaakyo, naija kujwekwa omwenda gwa bujwa n'omukuufu gw'ezaabu omu maraka, kandi abe omutegyeki wa kashatu omuri obu bugabe." 
Daniel5:8 Abanyabwengye b'omugabe boona baija, kwonka tibaabaasa kushoma ekyo kihandiiko, n'obu kwakuba okushoboororera omugabe amakuru gaakyo." 
Daniel5:9 Omugabe Belishazaari nikwo kushoberwa munonga, akahinduriza, n'abakungu be bakarimbagirirwa." 
Daniel5:10 Omugabekazi, ahabw'okuhurira ebi omugabe n'abakungu be baagambire, yaataaha omuri ekyo kishengye ky'obugyenyi, yaamutangirira ati: Nyakusinga, karamaare! Reka kwemereza omutima ahabw'ebiteekateeko, n'obu kwakuba okuhinduriza." 
Daniel5:11 Manya omu bugabe bwawe harimu omushaija oine omutima gwa baaruhanga abarikwera. Omu busingye bwa shoimwe okuhweza n'okwetegyereza n'obwengye, ebiri nk'ebya baaruhanga bikashangwa omuriwe, n'Omugabe Nebukadenezaari shoimwe yaamuhindura omukuru w'abafumu n'abaraguzi n'Abakalidaaya n'ab'eby'enyonyoozi;" 
Daniel5:12 ahabw'okuba omutima murungi n'okumanya n'okwetegyereza eby'okurootorora ebirooto n'okwita ebishaakuzo n'okushoboorora ebitarikubaasa kumanywa, bikashangwa omuri Daniyeli. Mbwenu Daniyeli ogwo ka bamukwetere, akushoboororere amakuru g'eki kintu." 
Daniel5:13 Batyo baareeta Daniyeli omu maisho g'omugabe. Omugabe yaamubuuza ati: Niiwe Daniyeli ow'omu Bayudaaya abaanyagirwe, abu tata omugabe yaihiire omu nsi ya Yuda?" 
Daniel5:14 Mpuriire ku mutima wa baaruhanga abarikwera ari omuriiwe, kandi okuhweza n'okwetegyereza n'obwengye butakareebwaga ku birikushangwa omuriiwe." 
Daniel5:15 Mbwenu bareetsire omu maisho gangye abanyabwengye n'abaraguzi kushoma eki kihandiiko n'okunshoboororera amakuru gaakyo, kwonka baremirwe." 
Daniel5:16 Haza mpuriire ngu iwe noobaasa kumanyisa amakuru g'ekintu n'okushoboorora ebiremire abandi kumanya. Ku oraabaase kushoma eki kihandiiko n'okunshoboororera amakuru gaakyo, noija kujweka omwenda gwa bujwa n'omukuufu gw'ezaabu omu maraka, kandi obe omutegyeki wa kashatu omuri obu bugabe." 
Daniel5:17 Daniyeli agambira omu maisho g'omugabe ati; Ebiconco byawe guma nabyo n'ebihembo byawe obihe ondiijo; kwonka nyowe, iwe Nyakusinga, naaza kukushomera eki kihandiiko n'okukushoboororera amakuru gaakyo." 
Daniel5:18 Nyakusinga, Ruhanga Rukiraboona akaha Nebukadenezaari shoimwe obugabe n'obukuru n'ekitiinwa n'obwarubambansi." 
Daniel5:19 Ahabw'obukuru obu yaamuhaire, ab'amahanga goona n'enganda n'endimi bakaba batetema, batiinira omu maisho ge. Akaba aita ou arikwenda kwita, akiza ou arikwenda kukiza, atunguura ou arikwenda kutunguura, kandi abundika ou arikwenda kugarura ahansi." 
Daniel5:20 Kwonka ku yaayetungwire, yaagangaaza omutima, yaakoresa amaryo, yaacuubwa aha kitebe kye ky'obugabe, ekitiinwa kye kyamwihwaho;" 
Daniel5:21 yaabingwa omu bantu, omutima gwe gwahinduka nk'ogw'enyamaishwa, yaatuura n'enturegye, yaarya obunyaatsi nk'ente, omubiri gwe gwajubibwa orume rurikuruga omu iguru, okuhitsya obu yaamanyire ku Ruhanga Rukiraboona niwe ategyeka obugabe bw'abantu, akabwemekaho ou arikwenda." 
Daniel5:22 Mbwenu naiwe Belishazaari omutabani, toyecureerize mu mutima, n'obu oraabe obaire noomanya ebyo byona," 
Daniel5:23 kureka oyetungwire ahari Nyakubaho w'eiguru, ebikopo by'enju ye baabireeta omu maisho gaawe, iwe n'abakungu baawe n'abakazi baawe n'ebinyanshunju byawe, mwabinywaisa viino; kandi mwahimbisa baaruhanga b'efeeza n'ab'ezaabu n'ab'emiringa n'ab'ebyoma n'ab'ebiti n'ab'amabaare, abatarikureeba, abatarikuhurira, nobu kwakuba okumanya; haza Ruhanga ou omwitsyo gwawe gutuura omu mikono ye, kandi orikutegyeka ebiro by'amagara gaawe, tiwaamuha kitiinwa." 
Daniel5:24 Nikyo ayoherereize omukono gukahandiika ekyo kihandiiko. 
Daniel5:25 Mbwenu ekihandiikirwe nikyo eki: Meene; Meene, Tekeli na Parasiini." 
Daniel5:26 Amakuru g'ebyo bigambo nigo aga: Meene; Ruhanga abazire ebiro by'obugabe bwawe, yaabugarukiza aho." 
Daniel5:27 Tekeli; opimirwe ahari minzaani, waashangwa otahikire." 
Daniel5:28 Parisiini; obugabe bwawe bubaganisiibwemu, bwaheebwa Abameedi n'Abaperisiya." 
Daniel5:29 Mpaho Belishazaari aragiira abantu, baajweka Daniyeli omwenda gwa bujwa n'omukuufu gw'ezaabu omu maraka, baamurangirira ku niwe yaaba omutegyeki wa kashatu omuri obwo bugabe." 
Daniel5:30 Ekyo kiro Belishazaari omugabe w'Abakaludaaya yaitwa. 
Daniel5:31 Dariyo Omumeedi yaarya obwo bugabe, ahikize emyaka makumi mukaaga n'ebiri." 
Daniel6:1 Dariyo akasiima kuta omu bugabe bwe ab'amashaza igana na makumi abiri, kubuga obugabe bwona;" 
Daniel6:2 yaabataho abakuru bashatu kubareeberera; omwe aharibo ari Daniyeli. Abakuru abo nibo abu ab'amashaza baabaire bahikizaho eby'obugabe, ngu omugabe atakaagira eki yaafeerwa." 
Daniel6:3 Bwanyima Daniyeli ahabw'obwengye bwe, yaayoga aha bandi bakuru boona n'ab'amashaza; nangwa n'omugabe yaayenda kumukwatsa obugabe bwona." 
Daniel6:4 Abo bakuru n'ab'amashaza nikwo kusherura eki baraiheho kutabaariza Daniyeli aha bikwatiraine n'obugabe, kwonka kibaburira, ahabw'okuba akaba ari omwesigwa, ataine ki ashobize nari eki asiisire." 
Daniel6:5 Bwanyima abo bashaija baagira bati: Titwine ki turaayemeho kukwatsa Daniyeli orubanja, twaba tutamuturukire mu bikwatiraine n'eiteeka rya Ruhanga we." 
Daniel6:6 Abo bakuru hamwe n'ab'amashaza nikwo kwija aha mugabe bakwataniise, bakamugira bati:" 
Daniel6:7 Abakuru b'obu bugabe boona n'abareeberezi n'ab'amashaza n'abahanuuzi n'abategyeki baikirizaine ngu iwe omugabe oteho ekiragiro ekirikugira kiti: Omu biro makumi ashatu, omuntu oraashabe ruhanga weena nari ondi muntu otariiwe, Nyakusinga, anagwe omu ryaya ry'entare." 
Daniel6:8 Mbwenu, Nyakusinga Omugabe, hamya ekyo kiragiro, ote omukono aha kihandiiko kyakyo, kirekye kuhindurwa, ahabw'okuba eiteeka ry'Abameedi n'Abaperisiya tirihinduka." 
Daniel6:9 Mpaho Dariyo ata omukono aha kihandiiko ky'ekyo kiragiro. 
Daniel6:10 Daniyeli ku yaamanyire ngu ekihandiiko kyateebwaho omukono, yaaza omu nju ye, ei amadirisa gaayo g'omu kishengye eky'eruguru gaabaire gaigwire nigareeba Yerusalemu, yaaguma naatsimba amaju kashatu buri izooba omu maisho ga Ruhanga we, naamushaba kandi naamusiima, nk'oku yaabaire atwaza." 
Daniel6:11 Bwanyima abo bantu baija baragaine, baashanga Daniyeli naashaba kandi naayeshengyereza Ruhanga we." 
Daniel6:12 Batyo baaza omu maisho g'omugabe, baamugambira eby'ekyo kiragiro bati: Nyakusinga, torataireho ekiragiro ekirikuzibira ngu omu biro makumi ashatu, omuntu weena oraashabe ruhanga weena nari omuntu otariiwe, Nyakusinga, anagwe omu kiina ky'entare? Omugabe yaabagarukamu ati: Ekyo kiragiro kihamire, ahabw'okuba eiteeka ry'Abameedi n'Abaperisiya tirihinduka." 
Daniel6:13 Nabo baamugira bati: Nyakusinga, manya ogwo mushaija Daniyeli ow'omu Baayuda abaanyagirwe, tarikukwetaho, nari okweta aha kiragiro eki otaireho omukono, kureka naashaba Ruhanga we kashatu buri izooba." 
Daniel6:14 Omugabe ku ahurira ebyo bigambo, ashaasha munonga, ayenda kukiza Daniyeli, kandi arabanamu okuhitsya obu eizooba ryarengire, naasherura oburyo bw'okumukiza." 
Daniel6:15 Kwonka abo bashaija baija aha mugabe n'omutima gumwe, baamugira bati: Nyakusinga, omanye ku hariho eiteeka ry'Abameedi n'Abaperisiya eririkugira ngu, tihariho kiragiro nari eiteeka ebitairweho omugabe ebihindurwa." 
Daniel6:16 Reero omugabe atyo aragiira, bareeta Daniyeli, bamunaga omu kiina ky'entare. Ogwo mugabe agira Daniyeli ati: Nkaabaasibwa ki, Ruhanga waawe ou oheereza obutoosha, akujuna!" 
Daniel6:17 Batyo bareeta eibaare, barita aha munwa gw'ekiina, omugabe aritaho akamanyiso ke n'ak'abakungu be, kumanya ngu hatakaagira ekyahinduka aha bya Daniyeli." 
Daniel6:18 Ebyo ku byahwaire, omugabe yaagaruka omu kikaari kye, yaamara ekiro kyona ayeraarize kwo, ataine mukazi ou araariire, kandi n'oturo tumugurukire." 
Daniel6:19 Ku bwabaire nibutaagurikana, omugabe yaimuka, yaagyenda n'obwira aha ryaya ry'entare." 
Daniel6:20 Ku yaahikire haihi eryaya eri Daniyeli yaabaire arimu, yaayeta Daniyeli n'eiraka ry'obusaasi, ati: Yaiwe Daniyeli, omuheereza wa Ruhanga ohuriire, Ruhanga waawe ou oheereza obutoosha akujunire entare?" 
Daniel6:21 Daniyeli amugarukamu ati: Nyakusinga, karamaare!" 
Daniel6:22 Ruhanga wangye atumire maraika we, yaigara akanwa k'entare, tizankoraho kabi, ahabw'okuba mbaire ntaine kamogo omu maisho ge, kandi n'omu maisho gaawe, Nyakusinga, mbaire ntaine ki nshobize." 
Daniel6:23 Mpaho omugabe ashemererwa munonga, aragiira ku baiha Daniyeli omu ryaya. Batyo barimwihamu, bashanga ataine kabi koona akamukozirweho, ahabw'okuba akeesiga Ruhanga we." 
Daniel6:24 Reero omugabe aragiira, bareeta abo bashaija baaregire Daniyeli, babanaga omu kiina ky'entare, hamwe n'abaana baabo n'abakazi baabo. Haza ku baabaire batakahikire hansi y'ekiina, entare zaababakura, zaabahendagura amagufa gaabo goona." 
Daniel6:25 Bwanyima Omugabe Dariyo yaahandiikira ab'amahanga goona n'ab'enganda aba ibara rurimi abatwire omu nsi ye ati: Obusingye nibukakanye omuriimwe. 
Daniel6:26 Mbwenu naataho ekiragiro, ngu omu bugabe bwangye bwona abantu bagume bateteme kandi batiine bari omu maisho ga Ruhanga wa Daniyeli, ahabw'okuba niwe Ruhanga ohuriire ogumaho ebiro byona. Obukama bwe tiburihwerekyerezibwa, n'obutegyeki bwe tiburihwaho." 
Daniel6:27 Niwe ajuna, kandi akakiza, niwe akora obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza omu iguru n'omu nsi; kandi niwe ajunire Daniyeli, akareka kwitwa entare." 
Daniel6:28 Atyo Daniyeli yaaguma agogyeire omu busingye bwa Dariyo n'omu bwa Kuuro Omuperisiya. 
Daniel7:1 Omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'omu busingye bwa Belishazaari omugabe wa Babulooni, Daniyeli akaroota, aine ebi arikworekwa omu biteekateeko, abyami aha kitanda. Ekirooto ki yaarootsire, yaakihandiika, yaashoboorora ebikirimu." 
Daniel7:2 Daniyeli ogwo akagira ati: Omu kworekwa kwangye nyekiro, nkareeba emiyaga ena y'omu iguru neetabangura enyanja mpango," 
Daniel7:3 kandi enyamaishwa ina mpango zitarikushushana zaatuuhuuka omuri egyo nyanja. 
Daniel7:4 Ey'okubanza ekaba neeshusha entare, eine amapapa g'empungu. Ku naabaire nkihangireyo amaisho, amapapa gaayo gaakuuka, yaimuka ahansi, yaayemerera n'ebigyere byayo nk'omuntu, yaaheebwa obwengye bw'abantu." 
Daniel7:5 Kandi naayecura enyamaishwa ya kabiri erikushusha edubu, etunguukire orubaju rumwe, eine embaju ishatu omu kanwa, ezirumiise amaino; baagigira bati: Imuka, oshonshomere enyama nyingi." 
Daniel7:6 Ekyo ku kyahwaire, ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba endiijo nyamaishwa erikushusha engwe, eine amapapa ana g'enyonyi aha mugongo gwayo, yaaheebwa obutegyeki." 
Daniel7:7 Ekyo nakyo ku kyahwaire, omu kworekwa kwa nyekiro, ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba enyamaishwa ya kana erikutiinisa, erikwitsa obwoba kandi ey'amaani garengyesereize, eine ebiino by'ekyoma, yaagira ebi yaashonshomera, ekabicwagacwagura, n'ebyatsigaraho ekabiribatiirira. Ekaba etarikushusha n'enyamaishwa ezaagibandiize, kandi eine amahembe ikumi." 
Daniel7:8 Ku naabaire ninkyetegyereza ago mahembe, ndeeba gaamerwamu erindi ihembe, erikye, eri amahembe ashatu g'okubanza gaakuukire n'emizi, kurihigiza. Kandi omuri eryo ihembe hakaba harimu amaisho garikushusha ag'omuntu, n'akanwa karikugamba ebintu bikuru." 
Daniel7:9 Ku naabaire nkihangireyo amaisho, ndeeba ebitebe by'obukama byateebwaho, Owa iranaira yaashutama; ebijwaro bye nibyera tiitiiti, n'eishokye ry'aha mutwe gwe niryera nk'ebyoya by'entaama, ekitebe kye ky'obukama kiri endimi z'omuriro, n'enyamuziga zaakyo ziri omuriro gurikwaka." 
Daniel7:10 Omugyera gw'omuriro gwahimintika niguruga omu maisho ge, enkumi n'enkumi baamuheereza, kandi kakumi emirundi kakumi haabaho okucwa emanja, n'ebitabo byashuuruurwa." 
Daniel7:11 Naahangayo amaisho, ahabw'eiraka ry'ebigambo bikuru ebi eihembe ryabaire nirigamba. Ku naabaire nkihangireyo amaisho, egyo nyamaishwa yaitwa, omutumbi gwayo gwacwekyerezibwa, gwaheebwayo kwokibwa n'omuriro." 
Daniel7:12 Ezindi ezaatsigaireho zaayakwa obutegyeki, kwonka amagara gaazo gaayongyerwaho omwanya n'obunaku kugumizamu." 
Daniel7:13 Omu bi naayorekirwe nyekiro, ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba orikushusha Omwana w'omuntu, naizira omu bicu by'omu iguru; yaija yaahika Owa iranaira kandi baamumumurikira," 
Daniel7:14 Yaaheebwa obutegyeki n'ekitiinwa n'obugabe, ngu ab'amahanga goona n'enganda na ibara rurimi bamuheereze; obutegyeki bwe n'obutegyeki oburigumaho ebiro byona, obutarihwaho, n'obugabe bwe tiburicwekyerezibwa." 
Daniel7:15 Kwonka nyowe Daniyeli, nkeemereza omutima, n'ebi naayorekirwe omu biteekateeko byantiinisa." 
Daniel7:16 Nairira omwe aha baabaire beemereire aho, naamubuuza kummanyisa eby'amazima ebikwatiraine n'ebyo bintu byona. Nawe angambira nammanyisa amakuru gaabyo, ati:" 
Daniel7:17 Enyamaishwa mpango ina nibo bagabe bana abariimuka omu nsi. 
Daniel7:18 Kwonka abarikwera ba Rukiraboona nibo bariheebwa obukama, bukaba obwabo okuhitsya ryari na ryari." 
Daniel7:19 Bwanyima naayenda kumanya eby'amazima ebikwatiraine n'enyamaishwa ya kana, eyaabaire etarikushushana na zindi, erikutiinisa munonga, eine amaino g'ekyoma n'ebyara by'omuringa; eyaabaire neerya neecwanyagura, kandi neeribatiirira ebyatsigaraho;" 
Daniel7:20 kandi n'ebikwatiraine n'amahembe ikumi, agaabaire gagiri aha mutwe, n'erindi ihembe eryamezire, ashatu omurigo gaakuukire: eihembe eryabaire riine amaisho n'akanwa akaagambire ebintu bikuru, kandi eryabaire nirishusha oti nirikira agandi magyenzi gaaryo." 
Daniel7:21 Ku naabaire nkihangireyo amaisho, eryo ihembe ryarwanisa abarikwera, ryabasingura," 
Daniel7:22 okuhitsya obu Owa iranaira yaizire, akacwa orubanja, abarikwera ba Rukiraboona bakarusinga, obunaku bukahika, abo barikwera bakaheebwa obukama." 
Daniel7:23 Mpaho yaagira ati: Eby'enyamaishwa ya kana nibyo ebi: Haryabaho obugabe bwa kana omu nsi, obutarishushana na bugabe bwona, haza bushonshomere ensi yoona, bugiribatiirire, bugicwanyagure." 
Daniel7:24 Reero eby'amahembe ikumi, omuri obwo bugabe haryaimuka abagabe ikumi, kandi bwanyima haimukye ondiijo mugabe otarikushushana n'abaamubandiize, abundikye bariya abashatu." 
Daniel7:25 Aryagamba eby'okugomera Rukiraboona, anyangaraze abarikwera be, ateekateekye aha by'okuhindura obunaku n'eiteeka, abarikwera abo baheebweyo omu mikono ye okumara nk'emyaka eshatu n'ekicweka." 
Daniel7:26 Kwonka haryabaho okucwa orubanja, obutegyeki bwe bumwakwe, bumarweho, kandi bucwekyererezibwe kimwe." 
Daniel7:27 Obukama n'obutegyeki n'obukuru bw'obugabe bwona oburi ahansi y'eiguru, buryaheebwa eihanga ry'abarikwera ba Rukiraboona; obukama bwabo bube obw'ebiro byona, ab'obushoboorozi boona babaheereze, kandi baboorobere." 
Daniel7:28 Ebyo aha niho byagarukira. Nyowe Daniyeli, ebiteekateeko byangye bikantiinisa, naahinduriza; kwonka ebyo bintu naabigumya aha mutima." 
Daniel8:1 Omu mwaka gwa kashatu ogw'omu busingye bw'Omugabe Belishazaari, nyowe Daniyeli nkareeba okworekwa okwakuratsire okw'okubanza." 
Daniel8:2 Omuri okwo kworekwa nkareeba, kandi obwo nkaba ndi omuri Susa, orurembo rukuru orw'omu ishaza Elamu; haza omuri okwo kworekwa, naareeba ndi aha mugyera Ulaayi." 
Daniel8:3 Nkaimutsya amaisho, ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba empaya y'entaama eyemereire aha nkungu y'omugyera. Ekaba eine amahembe abiri maraingwa, kwonka erimwe nirikira erindi aha mutwe, kandi eriraigwa niryo ryamezire bwanyima." 
Daniel8:4 Reero naareba egyo mpaya y'entaama neeshengura busha aha rubaju rwa burugwa-izooba, n'aha rwa bukiizi-bwa-bumosho n'obwa buryo; hatariho nyamaishwa erikubaasa kugiza omu kaso, kandi hatariho n'omwe orikubaasa kugyaka eki erikwenda kwita. Yaaguma neeyegirira nk'oku erikwenda, neeyegunduura." 
Daniel8:5 Ku naagiire kugira nti, ninkyetegyereza, haija empaya y'embuzi neeruga buregyerwa-izooba, neecwekanisa ensi yoona buguru butakora hansi; egyo mpaya eine eihembe rutaaba ahagati y'amaisho gaayo." 
Daniel8:6 Yaija yaahika empaya y'entaama ey'amahembe abiri, ei naareebire eyemereire aha nkungu y'omugyera, yaagisyokyera n'amaani eine ekiniga kingi." 
Daniel8:7 Naareeba neiririra egyo mpaya y'entaama, egiiniire ekiniga kingi, yaagishengura, yaagicwaho amahembe gombi, egyo mpaya y'entaama yaabura agagiza omu kaso, enu yaagituura ahansi, yaagiribatiirira, haabura ow'okugigijuna." 
Daniel8:8 Egyo empaya ey'embuzi yaayegunduura munonga; kwonka ku yaagizire amaani maingi, eihembe ryayo erihango ryacweka, omu mwanya gwaryo haameramu amahembe ana rutaaba, nigareeba ei emiyaga ena ey'omu iguru ereetwa." 
Daniel8:9 Rimwe aharigo ryatookwamu akahembe akaakuzire kakaba eihembe rihango munonga, rikareeba aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo n'aha burugwa-izooba, kandi ryatangaaza nirigarura omu nsi enungi munonga." 
Daniel8:10 Rikakura, ryareiha, ryahika amahe g'omu iguru, ryanaga ahansi enyonyoozi zimwe ez'omuri eryo ihe, ryaziribatiirira." 
Daniel8:11 Rityo ryayetunguura, ryayeinganisa n'Omukuru w'eryo ihe, ryamwaka ekitambo kyokize eky'obutoosha, ryacwekyereza n'Omwanya Ogurikwera." 
Daniel8:12 Ryarekurirwa eryo ihe hamwe n'ekitambo kyokize eky'obutoosha ahabw'okushiisha kwaryo, ediini y'amazima ryagikumbagaza, haza ryaba gye omu bi ryakozire." 
Daniel8:13 Bwanyima naahurira orikwera omwe naagamba n'orikwera ondi. Onu yaabuuza owaagamba ati: Ebyo ebyayorekwa eby'ekitambo kyokize eky'obutoosha n'eby'ekicumuro ekihindura ensi amatongo n'eby'okuhayo Omwanya Ogurikwera n'eihe kuribatiirirwa, biryamara mwanya ki?" 
Daniel8:14 Onu yaamugarukamu ati: Biryamara ebiro enkumi ibiri na magana ashatu, nibwira nibusheesha, bwanyima Omwanya Ogurikwera gugarukye aha buteeka bwagwo." 
Daniel8:15 Nyowe Daniyeli ku naareebire okwo kworekwa, naayenda kukwetegyereza. Ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba ekirikushusha omuntu kindumbaire omu maisho." 
Daniel8:16 Naahurira eiraka ry'omuntu ahagati y'enkungu z'omugyera Ulaayi, niryeta riti: Gaaburieli, manyisa ogwo muntu amakuru g'ebi yaayorekwa." 
Daniel8:17 Gaaburieli atyo airira ahi naabaire nyemereire. Ku aija, ntiina, ngwa njuumaire. Kwonka angira ati: Iwe mwana w'omuntu 'we, yetegyereze ku ebi waayorekwa biri eby'obunaku bw'aha mperu." 
Daniel8:18 Ku yaabaire nangambira, naagwa njuumaire, ntakimanya byaruguru." 
Daniel8:19 Yangira ati: Reeba, naaza kukumanyisa ebiribaho ekiniga kyahwaireho; ahabw'okuba ebyo n'eby'obunaku bw'aha muheru obwatairweho." 
Daniel8:20 Empaya y'entaama ey'amahembe abiri ei waareeba, nibo bagabe ba Mediya na Perisiya." 
Daniel8:21 Kandi empaya y'embuzi niwe mugabe wa Buguriiki. Eihembe erihango ahagati y'amaisho gaayo niwe mugabe waayo ow'okubanza. 
Daniel8:22 Reero eihembe eryacweka, omu mwanya gwaryo hakameramu agandi mahembe ana, nibwo bugabe buna oburiimuka omu ihanga rye, kwonka butaine bushoboorozi nk'obwe." 
Daniel8:23 Mpaho aha muheru gw'okutegyeka kwabwo, abasiisi baaherize kukora ebibi byona oku bingana, omugabe oine ahamaisho harikutiinisa, orikumanya kwita ebiito, aryaimuka." 
Daniel8:24 Obushoboorozi bwe buryaba bwingi, areetere abantu okucwekyerera okurikutiinisa, ebi arikukora bimugyendera gye, kandi acwekyereze abashaija b'amaani hamwe n'eihanga ry'abarikwera." 
Daniel8:25 Ahabw'amengye ge, obugobya bwe buryamubaasisa kukora ebi arikwenda, n'omu biteekateeko bye ayetunguure. Aryacwekyereza baingi batakyetegire: kwonka ku ariimuka kurwanisa Nyakubaho w'abakama, aryahendeka hataine muntu omukozireho." 
Daniel8:26 Eby'okworekwa eby'omu mwabazyo n'omu kasheeshe ebigambirwe n'eby'amazima; kwonka obirinde, bitamanywa, ahabw'okuba n'eby'ebiro ebiriizira ira." 
Daniel8:27 Haza nyowe Daniyeli, ku naahuriire ebyo, naahwera kimwe amaani, naamara ebiro ndwaire. Bwanyima naimuka, naaza kukora emirimo y'omugabe, kwonka nkatangaazibwa okwo kworekwa, tinaakushoboorekyerwa." 
Daniel9:1 Omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogwa Dariyo mwene Ahaswero, Omumeedi omu buzaarwa, owaabaire omugabe, akategyeka eihanga ry'Abakaludaaya," 
Daniel9:2 omuri ogwo mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'omu busingye bwe, nyowe Daniyeli, nkeetegyereza omu bitabo omubaro gw'emyaka ogu Yerusalemu erimara eri amatongo. Niyo myaka makumi mushanju, nk'oku ekigambo kya Nyakubaho eki yaagambiire Yeremiya omurangi kiri." 
Daniel9:3 Bwanyima nkahindukira Mukama Ruhanga, naamushaba munonga nimmweshengyereza, niinyesibyakwo, njwaire ekiguniya kandi nyesiigire eiju." 
Daniel9:4 Nkashaba Mukama Ruhanga wangye, naayatura ningira nti: Ai Mukama Ruhanga, omukuru kandi otiinwa, iwe orinda endagaano, okagirira embabazi abakukunda bakakuratira ebiragiro byawe;" 
Daniel9:5 tukacumura, twashobya, twakora ebitahikire, twagoma nituteishuka ebi waataireho;" 
Daniel9:6 titwahurira baheereza baawe abarangi abu waatumire kugambira abagabe baitu n'abategyeki baitu, na baatatenkuriitwe n'abantu boona ab'omuri egi nsi omu iziina ryawe." 
Daniel9:7 Ai Nyakubaho, niiwe oba ohikiriire, kwonka ekyaitu obutoosha n'okwitwa enshoni, itwe abantu ba Yuda n'abatwire Yerusalemu, n'Abaisiraeli boona, abari haihi n'abari hare omu nsi zoona ezi waabataataanisiizemu ahabw'okukureebya." 
Daniel9:8 Ekyaitu, ai Nyakubaho, n'okubwerabwera, itwe n'abagabe baitu n'abategyeki baitu na baatatenkuriitwe, ahabw'okuba tukakucumuraho." 
Daniel9:9 Kwonka, iwe Mukama Ruhanga waitu, ogira embabazi n'okusaasira. Manya tukakugomera," 
Daniel9:10 titwayorobera iraka ryawe, iwe Mukama Ruhanga waitu, kukuratira amateeka gaawe, agu waatuteeraire nootutumaho abaheereza baawe abarangi." 
Daniel9:11 Isiraeli yoona ekahenda ebiragiro byawe, yaateishuka, yaayanga kukora ebi waagigambiire. Nikyo omukyeeno n'endahiro ebihandiikirwe omu iteeka rya Musa, omuheereza wa Ruhanga, bitweshukiireho." 
Daniel9:12 Mbwenu ohamize ebi waagambire nootuhana hamwe n'abategyeki baitu abaabaire nibatutegyeka, waatureetaho akabi kahango. Manya ekiri nk'ekyo ekikozirwe ahari Yerusalemu, tikikakorwaga ahansi y'eiguru ryona." 
Daniel9:13 Nk'oku kihandiikirwe omu iteeka rya Musa, akabi ako koona katugwereire, kwonka kandi titukweshengyereize Mukama Ruhanga waitu, kutugirira embabazi, tukareka ebibi byaitu, tukata omutima aha mazima gaawe." 
Daniel9:14 Nikyo, iwe Nyakubaho, oteekateekyeire ako kabi, okakatugwisiza; ahabw'okuba, iwe Mukama Ruhanga waitu, oba ohikiriire omuri byona ebi orakozire, kwonka itwe titworobeire iraka ryawe." 
Daniel9:15 Ai Mukama Ruhanga waitu, owaihire abantu baawe omu nsi ya Misiri, n'omukono gw'amaani okeetungira eiziina, nk'oku kiri hati, tucumwire, twakora ebitahikire." 
Daniel9:16 Ai Nyakubaho, nk'eby'okuhikiriira byawe byona ebi okora oku biri, naakweshengyereza, reka kugwerwa kubi n'okugirira ekiniga orurembo rwawe Yerusalemu, orushozi rwawe orurikwera. Manya ahabw'ebibi byaitu n'ahabw'ebya baatatenkuriitwe, Yerusalemu n'abantu baawe bihindukire eby'okucuubwa enfumu omu batwehinguririize boona." 
Daniel9:17 Mbwenu, ai Ruhanga, waitu tega okutu okushaba n'okweshengyereza kwangye, omuheereza waawe, kandi ahabwawe wenka, ai Nyakubaho, oshemuukize amaisho Omwanya gwawe Ogurikwera, hati oguri omushaka." 
Daniel9:18 Ai Ruhanga wangye, tega okutu ohurire, buuruura amaisho oreebe okweshobera kwaitu, hamwe n'orwo rurembo rurikwetererwa eiziina ryawe. Manya titurikukweshengyereza ahabw'okuhikiirira kwaitu, kureka ahabw'embabazi zaawe enyingi." 
Daniel9:19 Ai Nyakubaho, saasira! Ai Nyakubaho, hurira! Ai Nyakubaho, taho omutima, okore! Ai Ruhanga wangye, ahabwawe otakyerererwa, ahabw'okuba orurembo rwawe n'abantu baawe nibyetererwa eiziina ryawe." 
Daniel9:20 Ku naabaire ninkigamba ninkishaba, niinyatura ebibi byangye n'eby'abantu bangye Abaisiraeli, kandi nindeeta okweshengyereza kwangye omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga wangye, ahabw'orushozi rwa Ruhanga wangye orurikwera;" 
Daniel9:21 ku naabaire ninkigamba ninshaba, omushaija Gaaburieli, ou naareebire omu kworekwa kw'okubanza, yaija ahi ndi naayehuuta munonga omu bunaku obutambirwamu ekitambo ky'omu mwabazyo." 
Daniel9:22 Yangira ati: Iwe Daniyeli, hati naija kukuha obwengye n'okwetegyereza." 
Daniel9:23 Obu waaba nootandika kweshengyereza; hariho ekyagambwa, mbwenu naija kukikumanyisa, ahabw'okuba nookundwa munonga. Hati teekateeka ahari ekyo kigambo, oyetegyereze okwo kworekwa." 
Daniel9:24 Wiiki makumi mushanju z'omu myaka ziteereirweho abantu baawe n'orurembo rwawe orurikwera kuherezamu okucumura, kumaraho ebibi, kukarabira eby'okutahikiirira, kureeta okuhikiirira okutarihwaho, kuta akamanyiso aha byayorekirwe n'ebyarangirwe, n'okusiiga amajuta Orikwerera kimwe." 
Daniel9:25 N'ahabw'ekyo omanye, kandi oyetegyereze, ngu okwiha aha kyagambirwe eky'okugaruraho Yerusalemu ekombekwa busya, okuhitsya obu omunyiginya owaasiigirwe amajuta ariija, haryabaho wiiki mushanju. Bwanyima emare wiiki makumi mukaaga na ibiri neeyombekwa busya, egire enguuto n'enteeraniro zaazo, kwonka omu bunaku bw'emirabanamu." 
Daniel9:26 Reero wiiki makumi mukaaga na ibiri ku zirihwaho, owaasiigirwe aryahwaho ataine u atsigire omu bigyere bye, abantu b'omutegyeki oriija bacwekyereze orurembo n'Omwanya Ogurikwera. Omuheru gwe guryaba okukukumbwa omutunga, habeho orugamba okuhitsya aha muheru; habeho n'eby'okuhwerekyereza okwaragiirwe." 
Daniel9:27 Ogwo mutegyeki aryaragaana na baingi endagaano ehamire eya wiiki emwe. Omu kicweka kya wiiki egyo, azibire ebitambo kutambwa n'empongano kuhongwa. Ogwo muhwerekyerezi aryaizira hamwe n'ebirikuzira, okuhitsya obu muheru ye ei yaaragiirwe erimuhikaho." 
Daniel10:1 Omu mwaka gwa kashatu ogw'omu busingye bwa Kuuro omugabe wa Perisiya ekigambo kikashuuruurirwa Daniyeli, owaayetsirwe eiziina Beliteshazaari. Ekyo kigambo kikaba kiri eky'amazima, nikimanyisa orugamba ruhango. Akakyetegyereza, yaashoboorokyerwa n'amakuru g'ebi yaayorekirwe." 
Daniel10:2 Omuri ebyo biro, nyowe Daniyeli nkamara wiiki ishatu ninganya." 
Daniel10:3 Omuri ezo wiiki ishatu ziijwire, tindariire ekyetwa ekinuzire, n'obu yaakuba enyama nari viino kuza omu kanwa kangye, n'obu kwakuba okwerabyaho akajuta." 
Daniel10:4 Aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bina eky'okwezi kw'okubanza, nkaba nyemereire aha nkungu y'omugyera muhango ogurikwetwa Tiguriisi." 
Daniel10:5 Ku naimukize nti amaisho, naareeba omuntu ojwaire kitaani, ayezirikire omunda orukoba rw'ezaabu ya Ufaazi." 
Daniel10:6 Omubiri gwe nigushusha berilo, aha maisho ge nihashusha omurabyo, amaisho ge nigashusha n'emuri zirikwaka, emikono ye n'amaguru ge nibyengyengyeta nk'omuringa guzigwire; n'eiraka ry'ebigambo bye riri nk'ery'abantu baingi." 
Daniel10:7 Kwonka nyowe nyenka Daniyeli, niinye naareebire okwo kworekwa, ahabw'okuba abantu bu naabaire nyine tibarakureebire, kureka bakakwatwa orutetema rwingi, baahunga, baaza kweshereka." 
Daniel10:8 Ntyo naatsigara nyenka, naareeba okwo kworekwa kuhango, kandi amaani gampweramu kimwe, oburungi bwangye bwahinduka bwaba bubi munonga, tinaatsigaza maani n'akakye." 
Daniel10:9 Bwanyima naahurira ogwo muntu naagamba. Ku naamuhuriire, naagwa njuumaire, ntakimanya bya ruguru, obuso buhikire aha itaka." 
Daniel10:10 Ku naagiire kugira nti, omukono gwankoraho, gwanyemereza, naatsimba ahansi ebiganja n'amaju nintetema." 
Daniel10:11 Reero yangira ati: Iwe Daniyeli, omuntu orikukundwa munonga, ta omutima aha bi ndikukugambira, kandi oyemerere burunga, ahabw'okuba hati baakuntumaho. Ku yaabaire naakingambira ebyo, naayemerera nintetema." 
Daniel10:12 Bwanyima yangira ati: Daniyeli, otatiina, ahabw'okuba okwiha aha kiro ky'okubanza, eki waateeraireho omutima kwetegyereza n'okwekyehesa omu maisho ga Ruhanga waawe, ebigambo byawe bikahurirwa, kandi nibyo byadeeta." 
Daniel10:13 Maraika omukuru w'obugabe bwa Perisiya amazire ebiro makumi abiri na kimwe angungiire; kwonka Mikaeli, omwe ahari baamaraika abategyeki abakuru, aizire kumpa emikono. Mbwenu naamutsiga okwo na maraika omutegyeki w'obugabe bwa Perisiya," 
Daniel10:14 kandi naija kukumanyisa ebiriba aha bantu baawe omu biro bya bwanyima. Manya okworekwa oku n'okw'ebiro ebirikwenda kwija. 
Daniel10:15 Ku yaaherize kungambira ebyo bigambo, naajuumara ahansi, naagobwa orurimi." 
Daniel10:16 Ku naagiire kugira nti, orikushusha abaana b'abantu yankora aha minwa, naanye naayashamya akanwa, naagamba. Naagira owaabaire anyemereire omu maisho nti: mukama wangye, okwo kworekwa kwandeetera obusaasi, tinaatsigaza maani n'akakye." 
Daniel10:17 Mbwenu nyowe omwiru waawe, nimbaasa nta kugamba naiwe, mukama wangye? Reeba, tinkiine maani goona n'omwitsyo gwampwamu." 
Daniel10:18 Mpaho owaabaire naashusha omuntu yaagaruka yankoraho, yangaruramu amaani." 
Daniel10:19 Kandi yangira ati: Iwe muntu 'we orikukundwa munonga, otatiina! Gira obusingye, garukwamu amaani, ogume omutima! Ku yangambiire atyo, naagarukwamu amaani, naagira nti: Gamba, mukama wangye, ahabw'okuba wangaruramu amaani." 
Daniel10:20 Nawe yangira ati: Noomanya eki naizira ahu ori? Mbwenu naaza kugarukayo kurwanisa maraika omutegyeki owa Perisiya; ku ndaaheze nti kumusingura, maraika omutegyeki owa Buguriiki naija;" 
Daniel10:21 haza nkugambire ebihandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'amazima, kwonka tihariho ondi orikukwatanisa naanye omu kubarwanisa, kureka Mikaeli omutegyeki waanyu." 
Daniel11:1 Kandi nyowe, omu mwaka gw'okubanza ogw'omu busingye bwa Dariyo Omumeedi, nkeemerera kumugumya n'okumugaruramu amaani." 
Daniel11:2 Mbwenu naaza kukugambira eby'amazima. Reeba, omuri Perisiya haryaimukamu abandi bagabe bashatu, kandi owa kana aryakiriza kimwe abo boona obutungi. Reero ku ariheza kugira amaani ahabw'obutungi bwe, aryahuruza engabo ze zoona kurwanisa obugabe bwa Buguriiki." 
Daniel11:3 Bwanyima haryaimuka omugabe w'amaani, ategyekye obugabe buhango, kandi atwaze nk'oku arikwenda." 
Daniel11:4 Kwonka ku ariheza kuza aha ngoma, obugabe bwe buryayecwamu ebicweka, byebaganise nibigarura ei emiyaga ena y'eiguru ereetwa, kwonka tiburihungurwa baana be, n'obu kwakuba okugaruka aha buteeka, nk'oku yaabaire naakibutegyeka; ahabw'okuba obugabe bwe buryarandurwa, butwarwe abandi abatari abo." 
Daniel11:5 Bwanyima omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo aryagira amaani, kwonka omwe aha bategyeki be b'engabo aryamukiza amaani, obugabe bwe bube buhango." 
Daniel11:6 Ku harihinguraho emyaka baryakwatanisa. Okwenda kuhamya endagaano y'obusingye, muhara w'omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo aryahingirwa omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho; kwonka ogwo mwishiki tariguma na maani ge g'obushoboorozi nk'okwe; omushaija we hamwe n'oruzaaro rwe tibirigumaho; kureka ogwo mwishiki n'abagaragwa be n'omwana we na kimushwera baryaheebwayo." 
Daniel11:7 Kwonka omuri ebyo biro, omwe aha barikukomooka ahari ogwo mwishiki aryaimuka, ahungurire ishenkuru, ateere eihe ryabo, ataahe omu kigo ky'omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, abarwanise, haza abasingure." 
Daniel11:8 Aryanyaga baaruhanga baabo n'ebishushani byabo ebiheesirwe, hamwe n'ebintu byabo eby'obuguzi bwingi, eby'efeeza n'eby'ezaabu, abitware Misiri, kandi amare emyaka arereire kuteera omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho." 
Daniel11:9 Kwonka onu aryateera obugabe bw'omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, bwanyima agarukyeyo omu nsi ye." 
Daniel11:10 Abatabani baryahuruza abantu, bateerane engabo nyingi munonga, ziteere ensi, zigijanjaare, zigyoogyemu, zirwane orugamba, zihikye n'aha kigo ky'ogwo mugabe." 
Daniel11:11 Reero omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo aryahurura aine ekiniga kingi, arwanise omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, orihuruza eihe rihango, kwonka onu arikwate." 
Daniel11:12 Eryo ihe ku bariheza kurikwata, omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo aryayetunguura, ariitemu obukumi n'obukumi bw'abantu, kwonka taribasingurira kimwe." 
Daniel11:13 Ahabw'okuba omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho aryagaruka ahuruze emigogo mingi y'abantu erikukira eyaabandize; kandi ku harihinguraho emyaka, aryahurura n'eihe rihango n'ebintu bingi munonga." 
Daniel11:14 Omu biro ebyo baingi baryaimuka kurwanisa omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo, n'ababisha b'omu ihanga ryawe baryahuruutukayo kuhikiiriza ebi waayorekwa, kwonka baremwe." 
Daniel11:15 Bwanyima omugabe w'aha bukiizi-bwa-bumosho aryaija, agote orwo rurembo rwehinguririziibwe ekigo ky'amabaare, arutambikyeho eby'okutemberaho, arukwate. Engabo z'aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo tiziribaasa kumutengyera rugamba, n'obu zaakuba engabo zaabo entoore, ahabw'okuba ziryaba zitaine gamugungira;" 
Daniel11:16 kureka oriija kumurwanisa aryakora nk'oku onu arikwenda. Tihariho oribaasa kumuza omu kaso, kureka aryahamira omu nsi nungi, yoona agigireho obushoboorozi." 
Daniel11:17 Aryamaramaza kwija n'engabo z'omu bugabe bwe bwona, areete eby'okugaruraho obusingye, kandi abihikiirize. Ahabw'okwenda kucwekyereza obwo bugabe, aryamuhingira muhara we, kwonka ekyo tikirigumaho kandi tikirigira ki kyamugasira." 
Daniel11:18 Kandi aryahinduka, ateere ebirwa, akubuure bingi; kwonka omukuru w'eihe aryamucwa amaryo, agamumariremu kimwe." 
Daniel11:19 Mpaho ahindukire ebigo by'omu nsi ye, haza ateere entsibo, abure kureebwa obundi." 
Daniel11:20 Bwanyima omu mwanya gwe haryaimukamu ondiijo, oryohereza orikushozesa omushoro eihato omu bugabe bwe obw'ekitiinwa. Kwonka omu biro bikye, nawe aryacwekyerezibwa, ataitsirwe nibakireeba nari okugwa omu rugamba." 
Daniel11:21 Omu mwanya gwe haryazamu omuntu orikugaywa, otarahairwe kitiinwa ky'obugabe, abuzemu atamanyirwe, arye obwo bugabe, abwesiigiriire." 
Daniel11:22 Aryamariraho kimwe amahe agamuri omu kaso, agacwe obusaasingo, aite n'omukuru w'endagaano." 
Daniel11:23 Kandi ku bariheza kweteerana nawe, aryakoresa obugobya, abe ow'amaani, haza kunu aine abantu bakye." 
Daniel11:24 Bwanyima aryateera ebyanga by'omu mashaza ebirikukiza ebindi obutungi atabimanyiise, akore eki baishe na baishenkuru batakakoraga, agabire abantu be eminyago n'emicwijuro n'ebindi bintu. Aryacuma enaama y'okuteera ebigo byayo ebigumire, kwonka okumara akaanya kakye." 
Daniel11:25 Bwanyima aryayeteera ebinyomyo, agire obumanzi bw'okurwanisa omugabe w'obukiizi-bwa-buryo n'eihe ringi. Omugabe w'obukiizi-bwa-buryo nawe aryahurura n'eihe rihango munonga kandi ery'amaani, kwonka taribaasa kumugungira, ahabw'okuba baryaba bamwiniire enaama y'okumugobeza." 
Daniel11:26 Nangwa n'abarya nawe aha meeza ye nabo baryamucwekyereza, eihe rye riryamarwaho, baingi omuriryo baitwe, bagwe gangari." 
Daniel11:27 Reero abo bagabe bombi, emitima yaabo eryajuumarira okukora eby'obwinazi, babeihane bari aha meeza emwe, kwonka babure eki baihamu, ahabw'okuba obunaku bwabo obw'aha muheru obwatairweho buryaba butakahikire." 
Daniel11:28 Bwanyima aryagaruka omu nsi ye n'ebintu bingi, kwonka omutima gwe guryaba nigukyanga endagaano erikwera. Atyo akore eki arikwenda, agarukye omu nsi ye." 
Daniel11:29 Omu bunaku obwatairweho, aryagaruka, aze omu nsi y'obukiizi-bwa-buryo, kwonka obwo tikiriba nk'oku kyabaire bwabiso." 
Daniel11:30 Ahabw'okuba emeeri za Kiitimu ziryaija kumurwanisa, atiine, aiheyo engabo ze, agarukyeyo aine ekiniga kingi, arwanise ab'endagaano erikwera. Kandi omu kugaruka, aryata munonga omutima aha batsigireho endagaano erikwera." 
Daniel11:31 Aryayohereza amahe ge, gahagaze Nyaruju ya Ruhanga n'ekigo, gaiheho ekitambo ky'okucwetsya ekituura nikitambwa gateho ekirikuzira ekirikucwekyereza." 
Daniel11:32 Abarikushiisha egyo ndagaano aryababeihabeihesa karimi karungi; kwonka abarikumanya Ruhanga waabo baryahama, beerwaneho." 
Daniel11:33 Kandi ab'obwengye omuri abo bantu, n'obu barimara ebiro nibaitwa rurara n'omuriro, bakakwatwa bakanyagwa, baryayetegyerezesa baingi." 
Daniel11:34 Ku bariikarirwa, baryahwerwa bakye, kwonka abaingi beeteerane nabo nibabamamarika." 
Daniel11:35 Haza bamwe omuri abo banyabwengye baryaitwa, bamarwemu enkamba, bashemezibwe, beezibwe, okuhitsya omu bunaku bw'aha muheru. Manya obunaku obwatairweho buryaba butakahikire." 
Daniel11:36 Reero ogwo mugabe aryakora nk'oku arikwenda, ayetunguure, ayekuze okukira baaruhanga boona, kandi agambe ebitagambwa ebirikurogota ahari Ruhanga wa baaruhanga. Aryaguma agogyeire okuhitsya obu kashanga erihikiiriza ekyagireetsire, ahabw'okuba ekyatairweho kiryakorwa." 
Daniel11:37 Taryeta hari baaruhanga ba baishenkuru, n'obu yaakuba ogwo orikukundwa abakazi, kandi taryeta hari ruhanga ondi weena, ahabw'okuba aryayekuza okukira abo boona." 
Daniel11:38 Omu mwanya gw'okuha baaruhanga abo ekitiinwa, we aryakiha ruhanga w'ebigo, ou baishenkuru bataramanyire, niwe ariha ekitiinwa naamutoijera ezaabu n'efeeza n'amabaare g'obuguzi bwingi n'ebiconco birungi munonga." 
Daniel11:39 Ebigo ebigumiire kimwe aryabirwanisa naahwerwa ruhanga w'abanyamahanga. Reero abarimwemera kuba abe, aryabakuza, abahe ekitiinwa, abahindure abategyeki b'abaingi, kandi ababaganisize ensi naagibaguza." 
Daniel11:40 Omugabe w'obukiizi-bwa-buryo obunaku bw'aha muheru ku burihika, aryamuteera, kwonka omugabe w'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho aryamusyokyera nk'omuyaga gw'akasooroora, aine ebigaari n'ab'ahambaraasi n'emeeri nyingi, ateere ezo nsi, azihimintukyemu nk'omwegyemure, azoogyemu." 
Daniel11:41 Atyo ahikye omu nsi enungi, obukumi n'obukumi baitwe, kwonka Abaedomu n'Abamoabu n'ekicweka kihango ky'Abaamoni bamuhonokye." 
Daniel11:42 Aryabangira amahanga maingi omukono, n'eihanga rya Misiri tiririmuhonoka." 
Daniel11:43 Aryagira obushoboorozi aha matungo g'ezaabu n'ag'efeeza n'ag'ebintu byona eby'obuguzi bwingi ebya Misiri, kandi Abanyalibiya n'Abaetiyopiya baryamugyenda omu ntegye." 
Daniel11:44 Kwonka amakuru agariruga oburugwa-izooba n'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho garyamuhahaaza omutima, ahurure n'ekiniga kingi kumaraho baingi n'okubacwekyerereza kimwe." 
Daniel11:45 Kandi aryateera amahema g'omu kikaari ky'obugabe, ahagati y'enyanja n'orushozi orurikwera orw'ekitiinwa; kwonka muheru ye eryahika ataine w'okumuha emikono." 
Daniel12:1 Omu bunaku obwo haryaimuka Mikaeli omukuru rugambwa, oreeberera abantu baawe, habeho obunaku bw'obusaasi obutakabahoga eihanga ryaba kubaho. Obunaku obwo ku burihika, abantu baawe boona abu amaziina gaabo garishangwa gahandiikirwe omu kitabo, baryajunwa." 
Daniel12:2 Kandi baingi omu bariba bagwejegyereire omu mucuucu gw'ensi, baryasisiimuka; abamwe basisiimukire amagara agatahwaho, abandi basisiimukire okuhemuka n'okugaywa kw'obutwire n'obutwire." 
Daniel12:3 Abaine obwengye baryayaka nk'omushana gurikujwera ahaiguru omu kaabunga; n'abarikuhindura baingi bakabahitsya aha kuhikiirira, baryayaka nk'enyonyoozi ebiro n'ebiro." 
Daniel12:4 Kwonka iwe Daniyeli, ebyo bigambo obimirire enda, ekitabo kyabyo okikomese akamanyiso, okuhitsya omu bunaku bw'aha mperu. Baingi baryairuka nibakora oku n'oku, n'okumanya kuryakanya." 
Daniel12:5 Bwanyima nyowe Daniyeli, ku naagiire kugira nti, naareeba abandi babiri beemereire, omwe aha nkungu ya seeri y'omugyera, n'ondi aha nkungu ya seenu yaagwo." 
Daniel12:6 Ntyo ngambira omushaija ojwaire kitaani, owaabaire ari ahaiguru y'amaizi g'omugyera nti: Ebyo by'okutangaaza nibiija kumara mwanya ki bitakahwaireho?" 
Daniel12:7 Ogwo mushaija ojwaire kitaani, ari ahaiguru y'amaizi g'omugyera, yaimutsya omukono gwe gwa buryo n'ogwa bumosho naagyorekyeza ahaiguru; ntyo mpurira naarahira Ogwo obaho ebiro byona, ngu biryamara emyaka eshatu n'ekicweka. Kandi ngu, ku bariheza kusheenyagura amaani g'eihanga eririkwera, ebyo byona nibwo birihikiirizibwa." 
Daniel12:8 Ebyo nkabihurira, kwonka tindabyetegyereize; nikwo, kugira nti: Mukama wangye, ebyo bintu biryazaarukwamu ki?" 
Daniel12:9 Yangira ati: Daniyeli, yegyendere, ahabw'okuba ebyo bigambo n'eby'omubonano, kandi bikomesiibwe akamanyiso, okuhitsya omu bunaku bw'aha mperu." 
Daniel12:10 Baingi baryayemaraho oburofa, beeyeze, bashemere; kwonka ababi baryagumizamu nibakora ebibi, kandi tihariho n'omwe omuribo oryetegyereza; kureka abaine obwengye nibo baryetegyereza." 
Daniel12:11 Okwiha aha bunaku obu ekitambo kicwekize, ekituura nikitambwa, kiriihwaho, n'ekirikuzira, ekirikucwekyereza kikateebwaho, haryahinguraho ebiro rukumi na magana abiri na makumi mwenda." 
Daniel12:12 Oritegyereza akaguma ahamire okuhitsya aha kiro kya rukumi na magana ashatu na makumi ashatu na bitaano, aryaba ahiiriirwe." 
Daniel12:13 Kwonka iwe, oyegyendere, okuhitsya obu ogwo muheru gurihika, okeemerera omu mwanya ogwakuteekateekyeirwe, muheru y'obunaku yaahika." 
Hosea1:1 Eki n'ekigambo ki Nyakubaho yaagambiire Hosea mwene Beeri, omu busingye bwa Uziya, n'obwa Yotamu, n'obwa Ahazi, n'obwa Hezekiya, abagabe ba Yuda; n'omu busingye bwa Yeroboamu mwene Yoashi, omugabe wa Isiraeli." 
Hosea1:2 Mukama ku yaatandikire kugambira Hosea ebi yaamutumire, yaamugira ati: Irooko oyeshwerere omukazi maraaya, omuzaareho abaana maraaya, ahabw'okuba egi nsi erengyesereize yaanyimuura." 
Hosea1:3 Nawe nikwo kugyenda akashwera Gomeri muhara wa Dibulaimu, akabaka enda, akamuzaarira omutabani." 
Hosea1:4 Reero Mukama yaamugira ati: Mwete eiziina Yezereeli, ahabw'okuba hatsigaire akaanya kakye nkafubira ab'eka ya Yehu, nimbatura abantu bu yaitiire Yezereeli; ntyo mmareho obugabe bw'enju ya Isiraeli;" 
Hosea1:5 kandi eryo izooba mpendere Abaisiraeli obuta omu ruhanga rwa Yezereeli. 
Hosea1:6 Bwanyima ogwo mukazi yaatwara endiijo nda, yaazaara omuhara. Mukama yaamugira ati: Mwete eiziina Lo-ruhama, amakuru ngu, Nyakwangwa; ahabw'okuba tindigaruka kugirira ab'Enju ya Isiraeli esaasi, nobu kwakuba okubasaasira." 
Hosea1:7 Kwonka ndyagirira ab'enju ya Yuda esaasi, Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga waabo mbajune, ntabajuniise buta, rurara, rugamba, mbaraasi, nobu baakuba abazigyenderaho." 
Hosea1:8 Ogwo mukazi ku yaacuukize Nyakwangwa, yaabaka endiijo nda, yaazaara omutabani." 
Hosea1:9 Mukama yaagira ati: Omwete eiziina Lo-ami, amakuru ngu, Ti-bantu-bangye; ahabw'okuba timuri bantu bangye; naanye tindi Ruhanga waanyu." 
Hosea1:10 Kwonka omubaro gw'Abaisiraeli guryaingana n'omusheenyi gw'aha nyanja, ogutarikubaasa kurengwa nobu kwakuba okubarwa. Kandi omu mwanya gu baagambiriirwemu ngu “Timuri bantu bangye”, nigwo barigambirirwamu ku bari Abaana ba Ruhanga Ohuriire." 
Hosea1:11 Reero Abaayuda n'Abaisiraeli baryateeranirwa hamwe, beeteereho omutegyeki omwe; bwanyima bainamukye, barugye omuri egyo nsi, ahabw'okuba eizooba eryo riryaba rikuru Yezereeli." 
Hosea2:1 Gambira Abaisiraeli beene sho oti: Muri abantu bangye, na banyaanyoko oti: Nimukundwa." 
Hosea2:2 Yehanangirize nyoko, omwehanangirize, nobu araabe atakiri mukazi wangye, naanye ntakiri iba; arereere obwamaraaya, n'obushambani bwe;" 
Hosea2:3 ntakaamujweka busha, nkamutsiga ari entangaare nk'obu yaazaarwa, nkamuhindura eihamba, nkamugira nk'ensi ekarangataine, nkamwitsa eiriho." 
Hosea2:4 N'abaana be tindibagirira saasi, ahabw'okuba n'aba maraaya." 
Hosea2:5 Manya nyinabo akaraaya; yaababaka akozire ebirikwitsa enshoni. Ahabw'okuba akagira ati: Niinyija kukurata nkunzi zangye ezimpa ebyokurya n'ebyokunywa; ebyoya by'entaama na fulakisi, n'amajuta na viino." 
Hosea2:6 Nikyo omuhanda gwe ndikwija kugwitsiza amahwa, nkazitira orugo rw'okumukumiirira akabura oburabo." 
Hosea2:7 Akakurata nkunzi ze, kwonka atazihikye; akazisherura, kwonka atazibone. Reero nibwo araagire ati: Ka ngyende, ngarukire ibanye w'okubanza; ahabw'okuba buri nkaba ndi gye, okukira okundi hati." 
Hosea2:8 Ogwo mukazi taramanyire ku niinye naabaire mmuha ebyokurya by'omujuma, na viino, n'amajuta; kandi ku niinye naamutungiise munonga efeeza n'ezaabu ezi baakoziremu Baali." 
Hosea2:9 Nikyo ndikwija kugarukanira ebyokurya byangye by'omujuma omu igyesha, na viino yangye omu mweru gwayo; mmwakye ebyoya byangye by'entaama na fulakisi yangye, ebyakushwekire enjuuro ye." 
Hosea2:10 Mbwenu niinyija kumujweka busha omu maisho ga nkunzi ze habure owaamuunyaka. 
Hosea2:11 Kandi niinyija kumumaraho okushemerererwa, amagyenyi ge g'omwaka, n'ag'okwezi kubonekire, n'aga Zaasabato ze; n'ag'amagyenyi ge goona agaatairweho." 
Hosea2:12 Reero ncwekyereze emizaabibu ye n'emitiini ye ebi yaayesiimiraine ati; Ebi n'ebihembo ebi nkunzi zangye zampaire. Haza ngihindure ekibira; enyamaishwa zigirye. 
Hosea2:13 Mmufubire ahabw'ebiro by'amagyenyi ga Baabaali abu ayoterera obubaani, akeehunda empeta n'amahunde, akakurata nkunzi ze, Haza nyowe akaanyebwa; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugira." 
Hosea2:14 Reeba, nikyo ndikwizira kumwetereza, nkamureeta omu ihamba, nkagamba gye nawe," 
Hosea2:15 nkamuheerayo emisiri ye y'emizaabibu; oruhanga rwa Akori nkaruhindura Eirembo ry'amatsiko. Haza okwo niyo araayetabire, nk'obu yaabaire akiri empangare, obu yaaruga Misiri." 
Hosea2:16 Reero Nyakubaho naagira ati: Eryo izooba nibwo orintsinda okaanyeta “Ogu”, otakiinyeta “Nyakubaho wangye”." 
Hosea2:17 Manya ndyamuzibira kugamba amaziina ga Baabaali, garekye kugambwaho obundi." 
Hosea2:18 Kandi eryo izooba ndyakukorera endagaano n'enyamaishwa, n'enyonyi, n'ebirikugyendesa enda aha itaka, mmare omu nsi amata, na zaarurara, n'engamba; nkureetere kubyama otaine keekyengo;" 
Hosea2:19 nkwegambire obugyenyi, obe owangye ebiro byona; mbukwegambire omu mazima n'omu bwesigwa, nkwiniire embabazi na rukundo etahararuka." 
Hosea2:20 Ndyakwegambira obugyenyi omu bwesigwa, ompamye ku ndi Nyakubaho." 
Hosea2:21 Kandi Mukama naagira ati: Eryo izooba ndyayetaba eiguru, ryetabe ensi," 
Hosea2:22 n'ensi eyetabe ebyokurya by'omujuma na viino n'amajuta g'emioliva; reero nabyo byetabe Yezereeli. 
Hosea2:23 Nyebibire Isiraeli omu nsi, ngirire Nyakwangwa esaasi; ngambire abatari bantu bangye nti: Muri abantu bangye, nabo bangarukyemu bati: Ori Ruhanga waitu." 
Hosea3:1 Nyakubaho akangira ati: Irooko ogarukye okunde ogwo mukazi enshambani orikukundwa ondiijo mushaija; nk'oku nyowe Nyakubaho nkunda Abaisiraeli nobu baraabe baayehongyeire baaruhanga abandi, bakakunda ebiihuro by'emizaabibu eyomire." 
Hosea3:2 Naanye nikwo kumucunguza empiiha ikumi na itaano z'efeeza, n'encuro emwe n'ekicweka bya baale." 
Hosea3:3 Mmugira nti: Ori ow'okuguma ori owangye okumara ebiro bingi, okareka kuraaya nari okuba ow'ondiijo mushaija. Naanye nikwo ndaabe naiwe." 
Hosea3:4 Manya Abaisiraeli n'ab'okumara ebiro bingi bataine mugabe nobu yaakuba omutegyeki; bataine bitambo, nobu yaakuba enyomyo, bataine ekijwarirwa aha kifuba ekirikwetwa efodi nari ebishushani." 
Hosea3:5 Bwanyima Abaisiraeli baryagarukira Mukama Ruhanga waabo n'omugabe waabo Daudi; baije ahari Nyakubaho nibatetema, nibenda ngu abakorere eby'embabazi omu biro ebiriija." 
Hosea4:1 Imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, nimuhurire ekigambo kya Mukama, ahabw'okuba aine eki arikufa n'abatuuzi b'omu nsi egi. Omuri egi nsi tiharimu bwesigwa nari embabazi, nobu kwakuba okumanya Ruhanga;" 
Hosea4:2 kureka harimu okurya endahiro, okubeiha, okwita, okwiba n'okushambana. Barengyesereize kukora ebibi, okwita abantu nikukuratwa okundi." 
Hosea4:3 N'ahabw'ekyo ensi neecura. Abagitwiremu boona n'enyamaishwa, n'enyonyi z'omu kaabunga binyangaraire; nangwa n'ebyenyanja by'omu nyanja bihwerekyereire." 
Hosea4:4 Kwonka imwe bahongyerezi 'mwe, hatagira owaatongana, nainga owaatabaaza, ahabw'okuba niimwe ndikutonganisa." 
Hosea4:5 Muryateera entsibo nyomushana, n'abarangi bagiteere naimwe nyekiro; naanye ncwekyereze baanyokoimwe." 
Hosea4:6 Manya abantu bangye nibacwekyerera ahabw'okutammanya; ahabw'okuba mukanga kuunyikiriza. Mbwenu naanye naayanga ku muba abahongyerezi bangye. Kandi nk'oku mwayebirwe eby'omu iteeka ryangye, naanye niinyija kwebwa abaana baanyu." 
Hosea4:7 Nk'oku ei baagarukiire kukanya niyo baagarukiire kuncumuraho, naanye ekitiinwa kyabo ndyakihindura ekihemu." 
Hosea4:8 Manya nibatungwa ebibi by'abantu bangye; baruruuhira ebicumuro byabo. 
Hosea4:9 Nikyo naanye ndinganisiza abantu n'abahongyerezi; nkabafubira ahabw'emitwarize yaabo, nkabatura ebi baakozire." 
Hosea4:10 Baryarya, kwonka tibarikanya; ahabw'okuba nyowe Nyakubaho bakantsigaho, baahampuka." 
Hosea4:11 Viino y'omutahe ebuza abantu okwetegyereza. 
Hosea4:12 Abantu bangye baraguza aha biti, enkoni zaabo nizo zibaragurira. Manya omutima gw'okuhampuka gukabahabisa, baatsigaho Ruhanga waabo, baaraaya." 
Hosea4:13 Batambira ebitambo aha mitwe y'enshozi, booterera obubaani omu bibungo; ahansi y'omuvule n'omu mishebeya n'omu misisa, ngu ahabw'okugira ekicuucu kirungi. Nikyo bahara baanyu barikuhampukira, abagore baanyu bakashambana." 
Hosea4:14 Tindikwija kufubira bahara baanyu baahampuka, nari abagore baanyu baashambana; ahabw'okuba abashaija nabo beekiika aha rubaju na baamaraaya; batamba ebitambo na baamaraaya b'emigyenzo y'ediini. Nikyo eihanga eritarikwetegyereza ririhwerekyererera," 
Hosea4:15 Iwe Isiraeli nobu oraahampukye, reka Yuda erekye kugira orubanja. Otariza Giligaali, nobu kwakuba okwinamuka Betaaveni; kandi otarirahira oti: Nindahira Nyakubaho!" 
Hosea4:16 Nk'enyana etarikutsimbuka, na Isiraeli nikwo eri empiga. Mbwenu shi Nyakubaho naabaasa kubariisa nk'abaana b'entaama omu iriisizo ryeshanzire?" 
Hosea4:17 Efuraimu eyehongyeire ebishushani birikuramibwa, nimugirugyeho." 
Hosea4:18 Bo n'ekigombe ky'abasinzi abeehaireyo kuraaya. Bakunda okuhemuka okukira okuheebwa ekitiinwa. 
Hosea4:19 Omuyaga guryabatwarira omu mapapa gaagwo, bahemukye ahabw'ebitambo byabo." 
Hosea5:1 Imwe bahongyerezi 'mwe, nimuhurire eki! Imwe bantu ba Isiraeli 'mwe, muteho omutima! Naimwe ab'enju y'omugabe, mutegye okutu. Manya niimwe muri ab'okucwerwa orubanja; ahabw'okuba ahari Mizipa mubaire omutego, n'ahari Tabora mwaba ekigoye kitegire." 
Hosea5:2 Batimbire Shitimu obusya buraingwa, kwonka boona ndyabafubira." 
Hosea5:3 Efuraimu ninkumanya, naiwe Isiraeli tonyesherekire. Mbwenu iwe Efuraimu oraayire, Isiraeli yaasiisikara." 
Hosea5:4 Ebi barikukora tibirikubareka kugarukira Ruhanga waabo, ahabw'okuba omutima gw'okuraaya gubarimu, tibarikumanya Nyakubaho." 
Hosea5:5 Amaryo ga Isiraeli nigamushinja, Efuraimu ekibi kye kiryamuteeza entsibo, agwe, na Yuda aryateera nabo entsibo." 
Hosea5:6 Baryagyenda n'ebitambo by'amasyo g'ente n'ag'entaama kusherura Nyakubaho; kwonka tibarimubona, ahabw'okuba abeecwireho." 
Hosea5:7 Bareebize Nyakubaho, baazaara abaana abanyamahanga. Nikyo baraacwekyererezibwe n'emisiri yaabo okwezi kwaboneka." 
Hosea5:8 Muteerere enzamba omuri Gibea, n'eikondere omuri Raama. Muteerere enduuru Betaaveni; muhuruze Benyamiini." 
Hosea5:9 Efuraimu n'ey'okuhinduka eitongo aha izooba ry'okufubirwa. Nindangira enganda za Isiraeli ekifubiro ekitaribura kuzihikaho. 
Hosea5:10 Abategyeki ba Yuda babaire nk'abantu abarikukuura obumanyiso bw'omwatano. Nikyo ndaaboohororeho kashanga yangye nk'amaizi. 
Hosea5:11 Efuraimu neehata, esingyeera eby'oburyo neekuratiririra eryo ebitaine mugasho." 
Hosea5:12 Nikyo mbeereire Efuraimu nk'ekiyenje, nkabeera ab'omuryango gwa Yuda nk'emungu." 
Hosea5:13 Efuraimu ku yaareebire arwaire, na Yuda yaareeba ahutaire, Efuraimu yaaza Asiriya, yaatuma aha mugabe Yarebu. Kwonka tarikubaasa kubatambira nari kubakiza obuhuta bwanyu." 
Hosea5:14 Manya Nyowe Efuraimu niinyija kugibeera nk'entare; ab'omuryango gwa Yuda mbabeere entare nto. Nyowe nyenka niinyija kubataagataagura, reero nyegyendere. Mbatware, habure owaabajuna." 
Hosea5:15 Bwanyima nyegarukire omu butaaho bwangye, okuhitsya obu baryemera ekicumuro kyabo, bakandonda. Haza omuri ezo naku zaabo bansherure." 
Hosea6:1 Abantu nibagira bati: Nimwije tugarukire Mukama, ahabw'okuba niwe atuhutaize, kandi niwe araatutambire; niwe atuteire kandi niwe araatushembe." 
Hosea6:2 Ku haraahingureho ebiro bibiri naija kutuhimbuura, aha kiro kya kashatu atuzoore; tubone kuguma turi abahuriire omu maisho ge." 
Hosea6:3 Ka tumanye Mukama, tugumizemu kumumanya; ahabw'okuba okwija kwe ni nk'omushekye, tikuribura. Aryatwijaho nk'orutoonyerera nari nk'enjura ya Katumba eitirira ensi." 
Hosea6:4 Iwe Efuraimu 'we, mbwenu nkugire nta? Iwe Yuda, nkugire nta? Rukundo yaawe ni nk'ekicu ky'omu kasheeshe; ni nk'orume orutsya bukiri kare." 
Hosea6:5 Nikyo mbooherereize abarangi kubataagataagura, nkabacwekyerezesa ebigambo by'akanwa kangye; kandi emicwere yangye y'emanja eryaija nk'omushana." 
Hosea6:6 Manya eki nyenda ni rukundo etahararuka, bitari bitambo; kandi okumanya Ruhanga nikukira ebitambo bicwekize." 
Hosea6:7 Kwonka bakaita endagaano nka Adamu, bandeebya." 
Hosea6:8 Gileadi n'orurembo rw'enkozi z'ebibi, orwijwire ebirari by'eshagama." 
Hosea6:9 Nk'oku abasikuzi bagwera omuntu n'abahongyerezi nikwo beeteerana, bakaitira busha abantu aha muhanda gurikuza Shekemu. Eego, buzimazima ekyo kibi ky'obwinazi nibakikora." 
Hosea6:10 Ndeebire ekihagaro omu bantu bangye aba Isiraeli ahabw'okuba okwo niyo obwamaraaya bwa Efuraimu buri; Isiraeli esiisikaire munonga. 
Hosea6:11 Naiwe Yuda nkuteereireho obunaku bw'okukugyesha, ku ndiba ningarura abantu bangye aha buteeka." 
Hosea7:1 Ku mba niinyenda kutambira Isiraeli, ebibi by'Abaefuraimu n'ebihagaro ebi Abasamariya barikukora byeruuka; ahabw'okuba bagobya, abashuma bafumura amaju, n'ebigombe by'abasikuzi bitaahirira abantu aheeru." 
Hosea7:2 Haza tibarikuteekateeka ku ndikwijuka ebibi ebi bakora. Mbwenu ebi barikukora bibaturikire oku n'oku, timbuzire kubireeba." 
Hosea7:3 Ebibi byabo nibyo barikukoresa kugwisa gye omugabe, n'obugobya bwabo nibwo barikwejunisa kwekundisa abategyeki." 
Hosea7:4 Boona n'enshambani, Bari nk'ekyoma kirikwotsya, ekiteekwamu emigaati: eki omuteeki waayo ateenegyezemu muriro, atakakanzire isyanga n'akaritumbisa." 
Hosea7:5 Aha kiro ky'omugabe, ogwo mugabe n'abategyeki be bakabatiiha amaarwa, baasinda, reero omugabe yaatezya emikono n'abagaaniiza." 
Hosea7:6 Manya emitima yaabo neebugumwamu enaama mbi, nk'ekyoma kirikuteeka emigaati. Ekiniga kyabo kiraara nikyaka mpora-mpora, omu kasheeshe kyaka nk'omuriro gurikubuguma." 
Hosea7:7 Boona oku baingana nibootsya nk'enyungu eteeka, kandi nibashonshomera abategyeki baabo. Abagabe baabo boona bagwire, tihariho n'omwe omuribo orikuntakira." 
Hosea7:8 Abaefuraimu nibeejwanzya n'abanyamahanga. Abaefuraimu ni nk'omugaati ogutahindwirwe. 
Hosea7:9 Abanyamahanga nibabamaramu amaani, kwonka tibarikukimanya. Enju zibabarangaine omu mutwe, kwonka tibarikukimanya." 
Hosea7:10 Okwetunguura kw'Abaisiraeli nikubashinja. Ahabw'ebyo byona ebibabaireho tibangarukiire nyowe Mukama Ruhanga waabo, nobu kwakuba okunsherura." 
Hosea7:11 Abaefuraimu ni nk'enkombe efiire omutima etaine bwengye. Nibeeta Abanyamisiri kubaha emikono, bairukangira Asiriya." 
Hosea7:12 Ku bariba nibagyenda, ndyabarengyezaho ekigoye kyangye, mbahanure nk'enyonyi z'omu mwanya, mbafubire ahabw'ebibi bi barikukora." 
Hosea7:13 Baryakareeba ahabw'okuba barazire, bantsigaho! N'ab'okucwekyerera ahabw'okuba bangomeire! Nkaabacungwire, kwonka nibangambaho ebitari by'amazima." 
Hosea7:14 Tibarikuntakira baihire aha mutima baaba nibaboroogyera aha bitanda byabo. Nibeebonabonesa ahabw'ebyokurya by'omujuma na viino; haza bantsigaho. 
Hosea7:15 Nobu ndaabe naabatendekire, nkaha emikono yaabo amaani, kwonka baanyiniire enaama mbi." 
Hosea7:16 Beehongyera Baali, baba nk'obuta burikureebya. Abategyeki baabo baryaitwa rurara ahabw'okugambisa amaryo. Haza ekyo kibareetere okushekyeererwa omu nsi ya Misiri." 
Hosea8:1 Teera enzamba! Ahabw'okuba abazigu nibazeereera ahari Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho nk'eishamba; manya Abaisiraeli baitsire endagaano yangye, baagomera eiteeka ryangye." 
Hosea8:2 Bantakira nibagira bati: Ruhanga waitu, itwe Abaisiraeli nitukumanya." 
Hosea8:3 Abaisiraeli bangire ebirungi, nikyo omuzigu waabo arikwizira kubahiiga." 
Hosea8:4 Bakeemeka abagabe ntabaikiriize, baayeteeraho abategyeki, ntakimanyire. Baaheesha omu feeza zaabo n'ezaabu ebishushani birikuramibwa kwecwekyereza." 
Hosea8:5 Iwe Samariya 'we, nyangire enyana ei abantu baawe barikuramya. Mbainiire ekiniga kingi. Mbwenu baryaherera hi batakeihireho ekyo kintu omuri Isiraeli." 
Hosea8:6 Manya egyo nyana ti Ruhanga, ekaheeshwa omuntu. Enyena ya Samariya eryacwegacwagurwa, ebe obusasingo." 
Hosea8:7 Nibabiba omuyaga, baryagyesha akasooroora. Engano zaabo ezimezire tiziine bushiisha, kandi tiziryera byokurya. Nangwa nobu zaakwera, abanyamahanga bakaazirya." 
Hosea8:8 Abaisiraeli bamizirwekwo. Na mbwenu baahikire omu mahanga. Bari nk'ekintu kitaine mugasho; 
Hosea8:9 ahabw'okuba bainamukire, baaza Asiriya, baaba nk'enturegye erikuzengyerera yonka. Mbwenu Efuraimu eguririire nkunzi zaayo," 
Hosea8:10 nobu baraabe baguririire abanyamahanga b'okubaha emikono, kwonka Nyowe ndyabateerana juba, bamare akaanya batarikwemeka mugabe." 
Hosea8:11 Manya Abaefuraimu ei bagarukiire kukanyisa amatambiro g'okwekiza ebibi, niyo bagarukiire kugira emyanya y'okukoreramu ebibi." 
Hosea8:12 Kuri naabahandiikiire ebiragiro kakumi eby'omu iteeka ryangye, nabwo bakaabyetsire ekintu ky'enduga mahanga." 
Hosea8:13 Nibakunda kutamba ebitambo. Nibatamba enyama, kandi bagirya. Kwonka Nyakubaho tarikubasiima. Hati naija kwijuka ebicumuro byabo, abafubire naabatura ebibi byabo; bagarukye Misiri." 
Hosea8:14 Kandi, ahabw'okuba Abaisiraeli bakeebwa omuhangi waabo, baayombeka ebikaari, n'Abaayuda baakanyisa endembo ziriho ebigo bigumire. Kwonka niinyija kutweka endembo zaabo omuriro, gumareho ebyo bigo byabo ebigumire." 
Hosea9:1 Iwe Isiraeli 'we, otashemererwa! Oteekiita nk'agandi mahanga ahabw'okuba oraayire, waatsigaho Ruhanga waawe. Waakunda ebi bagurira aha mbuga zi bahuuriraho." 
Hosea9:2 Kwonka eby'aha mbuga n'eby'omu manyuukiro ga viino tibiribatunga, na viino y'omutahe eryababurira." 
Hosea9:3 Tibariguma mu nsi ya Nyakubaho, kureka Abaefuraimu baryagaruka Misiri, kandi bariire omuri Asiriya ebyokurya bihagaire." 
Hosea9:4 Tibaritambira Nyakubaho viino eshukwa aha nsi, kandi tibarimugwisa gye na bitambo byabo. Ebyokurya byabo biryaba nk'eby'abarikucura, abaribiryaho boona bibahagaze; ahabw'okuba ebi barirya biryaba eby'okubatambira enjara kwonka, bitari by'okuza omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
Hosea9:5 Mbwenu muryagira muta aha izooba ry'obugyenyi obwatairweho, n'aha izooba ry'obugyenyi bwa Nyakubaho?" 
Hosea9:6 Reeba, nibaza Asiriya, Misiri ebarundaane, Memfisi ebaziikye, ebicuragyenyi bishwekye ebintu byabo by'efeeza eby'obuguzi bwingi, amahwa gashakambe omu mahema gaabo." 
Hosea9:7 Obunaku bw'okufubirwa buhikire, obunaku bw'okuhoorwa buhikire, Isiraeli ekimanye. Imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, ahabw'ebibi byanyu bingi, n'ahabwa rwango yaanyu mpango, nimugira ngu omurangi n'omushema, n'orikuhaburwa Mutima n'omushazi." 
Hosea9:8 Nyowe omurangi mba omurizi waanyu, imwe Abaefuraimu, abantu ba Ruhanga wangye, kwonka ahi ndikuza hoona nshanga muntegire nk'abarikutega enyonyi; kandi ni mungwera n'omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga wangye." 
Hosea9:9 Mwesiisire mwarengyesereza nk'obwa Gibea. Ruhanga naija kwijuka ebicumuro byanyu, abafubire ahabw'ebibi byanyu." 
Hosea9:10 Nkashanga Isiraeli eri nk'emizaabibu y'omu ihamba. Nkareeba baashwenkuriimwe bari nk'ebijuma bitogyeire aha mutiini omu mwaka gwagwo gw'okubanza. Kwonka bakaija Baali-Peori baayehongyera Baali baahinduka abarikunugwa nk'ekyo kintu ki baakunzire. 
Hosea9:11 Ekitiinwa kya Efuraimu kiryaguruka nk'enyonyi kibure. Ebure okuzaara, nobu kwakuba okugira enda." 
Hosea9:12 Nobu baryorora abaana, ndyababaaka, habure n'omwe owaatsigara, ahuriire. Ebishi ku ndibatsigaho baryakareeba!" 
Hosea9:13 Nk'oku ndeebire abaana ba Efuraimu n'ab'okuhiigwa. Efuraimu n'ey'okutwara abaana baayo kwitwa. 
Hosea9:14 Ai Nyakubaho obahe; mbwenu noija kubaha ki? Obahe okuguma nibarugwamu enda n'amabeere gatarikwontsya. 
Hosea9:15 Ekibi kyabo kyona nikishangwa omuri Giligaali. Okwo niyo naabandiize kubanga. Ndyababinga omu nju yangye nimbatura ebibi bi barikukora, Tindibakunda bundi, abategyeki baabo boona n'abagomi." 
Hosea9:16 Abaefuraimu bateirwe, bari nk'emiti eyomire emizi, etarikwana bijuma. Tibarigira obu bazaire abaana. Nobu baribazaara ndyaita abaana baabo, abu barikukunda munonga." 
Hosea9:17 Ruhanga wangye aryabacwa ahabw'okutamuhurira, babe ebizengyerezi omu mahanga." 
Hosea10:1 Abaisiraeli ni nk'omuzaabibu guyumbize, ogurikwana ebijuma. Kwonka ei bagarukira kugogyeera, niyo bagarukira kwombeka amatambiro n'ensi yaabo ei egarukira kuba gye, niyo bagarukira kushemeza enyomyo z'okuramya." 
Hosea10:2 Omutima gwabo ti gw'amazima, nikyo bashemerereire kugira orubanja. Nyakubaho aryashenyagura amatambiro gaabo, acwekyereze enyomyo zaabo ezirikuramibwa." 
Hosea10:3 Manya hati nibaija kugira bati: Titwine mugabe, ahabw'okuba titutiinire Nyakubaho. Mbwenu bwo omugabe akaatukoreire ki?" 
Hosea10:4 Bagamba ebigambo kusha; baragaana endagaano nibarahira ebitaine muhoho. Nikyo okucwa kubi emanja kwabo kubeera nk'omwata mubi ogumera omu musiri guhingire. 
Hosea10:5 Abatwire Samariya nibatetema ahabw'enyana ya Betaaveni. Abantu baayo baryagicurira, abahongyerezi baayo abarikugiramya bagiboroogyere, nibarizibwa ekitiinwa kyayo ekigirugireho." 
Hosea10:6 Eego, ekyo kintu baryakitwara Asiriya kukitoijera omugabe Yarebu. Efuraimu eryaitwa enshoni, na Isiraeli ehemukye, ahabw'ekishushani kyayo eki eraguzaho." 
Hosea10:7 Omugabe wa Samariya aryahwerekyerera nk'ekishate kirikuzeerera aha maizi. 
Hosea10:8 Emyanya ya Aveni ey'obutungutungu, ekicumuro kya Isiraeli, eryacwekyerezibwa. Amahwa n'amatojo bimere aha matambiro gaabo, batakire enshozi bati: Nimutushwekye, n'ebibungo bati: Nimutugwere." 
Hosea10:9 Iwe Isiraeli, okacumura okwiha obwa Gibea. Okwo niyo baagumiriizemu. Mbwenu shi orugamba tiruribahambiza omuri Gibea?" 
Hosea10:10 Ndyaija ndwanise abo bantu ebyegyengye, mbafubire. Amahanga gabakombeere, baaba nibafubirwa ahabw'ebibi byabo bombi." 
Hosea10:11 Efuraimu ekatendekwa nk'enyana ekunda kujunga, naanye naasaasira ebitsya byayo birungi. Kwonka niinyija kuta Efuraimu omu migamba, Yuda ehingye, Yakobo ayetabirire." 
Hosea10:12 Mwebibire okuhikiirira, mugyeshe ebijuma bya rukundo etahararuka. Mutabire endaara zaanyu, ahabw'okuba obu nibwo bunaku bw'okugarukira Nyakubaho abone kwija, abasheeshere emigisha y'okujunwa." 
Hosea10:13 Muhingire ebibi, mwagyesha okutahikiirira, mwarya ebijuma by'ebishuba; ahabw'okuba mukeesiga ebigaari byanyu, n'obwingi bw'abarwani baanyu." 
Hosea10:14 Nikyo omurabanamu gw'obweme guriimukira omu bantu baanyu, ebigo byanyu byona bikacwekyerezibwa; nk'obu Shalumaani yaacwekyereza Betaribeeli aha izooba ry'orugamba, abazaire bakasingyeerwa n'abaana baabo." 
Hosea10:15 Naimwe Isiraeli, nikwo murigirwa; ahabw'ekibi kyanyu kirengyesereize. Omugabe wa Isiraeli aryacwekyererezibwa kimwe omushekye nigujuguta." 
Hosea11:1 Isiraeli ku yaabaire akiri omwana, nkamukunda; naamweta mutabani wangye, obu aruga Misiri." 
Hosea11:2 Kwonka ei naagarukiire kubeeta, niyo baagarukiire kundugaho. Baaguma nibatambira Baabaali ebitambo, nibooterera obubaani ebishushani birikuramibwa." 
Hosea11:3 Haza niinye naayegyeise Abaefuraimu okugyenda, nkabakiikira omu mikono; kwonka tibaramanyire ku niinye naabatambiire." 
Hosea11:4 Nkabeebembera mbakomeise emigoye y'esaasi n'emirunga ya rukundo; naababeera nk'orikuyuzya omugamba aha ibega. Nainama, naabagaburira." 
Hosea11:5 Kwonka n'ab'okugaruka omu nsi ya Misiri, Omuasiriya abe omugabe waabo; ahabw'okuba bangire kungarukira." 
Hosea11:6 Endembo zaabo ziryacurikirwa rurara, ecwekyereze empimbi z'amarembo gaabo, ebamare omu bigo byabo." 
Hosea11:7 Abantu bangye bahigire akabaju kundugaho. Nikyo babeereire ab'okuteebwaho omugamba, kandi tihaine origubaihaho." 
Hosea11:8 Iwe Efuraimu 'we, nimbaasa nta kukureka? Iwe Isiraeli, nimbaasa nta kukuhayo? Nimbaasa nta kukuhindura nka Aduma! Nimbaasa nta kukugira nk'oku naagizire Zeboimu? Omutima ka niguunyangira, esaasi yangye ekeeyongyera kuba nyingi!" 
Hosea11:9 Tindikwija kukora nk'ekiniga kyangye kingi oku kiri. Tindikugaruka kucwekyereza Efuraimu, ahabw'okuba ndi Ruhanga, tindi muntu. Ndi Orikwera omuriimwe, kandi tindiija kucwekyereza." 
Hosea11:10 Baryakuratira Nyakubaho, ku aritsinda nk'entare. Buzimazima aryatsinda, abaana be baije nibatetema nibaruga oburengyerwa-izooba." 
Hosea11:11 Baryaija nibatetema nk'enyonyi nibaruga Misiri, bari nk'enkombe nibaruga omu nsi ya Asiriya. Haza mbagarure omu maka gaabo, nikwo Nyakubaho arikugira." 
Hosea11:12 Efuraimu anyehinguririziise ebishuba, abantu bangye, Isiraeli baanyehinguririzisa obugobya; kwonka Yuda naakimanywa Ruhanga, kandi n'omwesigwa ahari Nyakwera." 
Hosea12:1 Abaefuraimu nibariisa omuyaga, barenzya eizooba bakuratiire omuyaga gw'oburugwa-izooba. Bakanyisa ebishuba n'obwinazi, bakora endagaano na Asiriya, batwara emitoijo y'amajuta Misiri." 
Hosea12:2 Nyakubaho naata orubanja ahari Yuda, kandi aryafubira Yakobo nk'emitwarize ye oku eri, amuhoore naamutura ebi yaakozire." 
Hosea12:3 Akakwata ekitsintsiino kya mukuru we akiri omu nda; kandi ku yaabaire omushaija waahamya, yaanyururana na Ruhanga." 
Hosea12:4 Akafukaana na maraika, yaasingura; yaarira, kandi yaamweshengyereza. Akabugabugana na Ruhanga Beteli, Ruhanga yaagambirayo nawe." 
Hosea12:5 Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe, oyetwa Nyakubaho." 
Hosea12:6 Naiwe, ahabw'okuhwerwa Ruhanga waawe, garuka, ohamize kimwe rukundo n'amazima, kandi ogume otegyereize Ruhanga waawe." 
Hosea12:7 Omushuubuzi aguma aine omu ngaro minzaani y'okuryangatanisa, akunda kuzimba abantu." 
Hosea12:8 Efuraimu ayeraata ati: Ebishi ndi omutungi. Nyetungiire eitungo ringi! Kwonka eitungo rye ryona tiriribaasa kumwihisaho orubanja ru yaayereeteire. 
Hosea12:9 Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga waawe owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misiri, ndyagaruka nkutuuze omu mahema nk'omu biro by'obugyenyi obwatairweho." 
Hosea12:10 Nkagamba n'abarangi kandi niinye naakanyiise okworekwa, nkagambisa abarangi enfumu." 
Hosea12:11 Omuri Gileadi ku haraabe harimu ebicumuro, buzimazima abaabikozire baryahinduka busha. Omuri Giligaali ku baraabe nibatambiramu amanimi; amatambiro gaabo garyaba nk'ebirundo by'amabaare omu bihabura by'omusiri." 
Hosea12:12 Yakobo akahungira omu nsi ya Aramu. Okwo niyo Isiraeli yaakorereire omukazi, akariisizayo entaama, ngu abone kumushwera." 
Hosea12:13 Nyakubaho akakoresa omurangi kwiha Abaisiraeli Misiri, kandi baarindwa ogwo murangi." 
Hosea12:14 Abaefuraimu bagwisize kubi Nyakubaho. Nikyo araabarekyere, eshagama ei baaseesire ekabatukurira, akabazimuurira ebijumo bi baajumire." 
Hosea13:1 Efuraimu ku yaabaire agamba, abantu batetema; ahabw'okuba akaba ari omuntu mukuru munonga omuri Isiraeli. Kwonka ku yaayereeteire orubanja ahabwa Baali, yaafa." 
Hosea13:2 Kandi na hati nibakyeyongyera kukora ebibi, beeheeshera ebishushani biyagiibwe, ebirikuramibwa ebikozirwe n'obwengye omu feeza zaabo, byona nibikorwa abanyamyoga. Haza bagira bati: Nimubitambire ebitambo! Ka n'eihano abantu kunywegyera enyana!" 
Hosea13:3 Nikyo baribeera nk'oruho rw'omu kasheeshe, nari nk'orume orutsya bukiri kare. Babe nk'ebishushunga ebituntumurwa omuyaga aha mbuga, nari nk'omwika gurikuraba ahaiguru omu kihengyere ky'enju." 
Hosea13:4 Niinye Mukama Ruhanga waawe owaakwihire omu nsi ya Misiri. Toine Ruhanga ondi ou orikumanya, kureka nyowe, kandi ahatari nyowe, tihariho ondiijo mujuni." 
Hosea13:5 Niinye naakureebereire ori omu ihamba, omu nsi y'omushana mwingi." 
Hosea13:6 Kwonka abantu baawe ku baariire baiguta, baahaaga, emitima yaabo yaayetunguura; baanyebwa." 
Hosea13:7 Nikyo ndibabeerera nk'entare, nkabagwera aha muhanda nk'engwe." 
Hosea13:8 Ndyabagurukira nk'edubu ei baayaka ebyana byayo, mbataagure ebifuba; kandi mbashonshomere nk'entare, nk'oku enyamaishwa enshaarizi yaakubataagura." 
Hosea13:9 Iwe Isiraeli 'we, ku ndikucwekyereza, n'oha orikujuna?" 
Hosea13:10 Mbwenu omugabe waawe ow'okukujuna ari nkahi? Abategyeki baawe boona ab'okukurwanaho bari nkahi, abu waagizire oti: Mpa omugabe n'abategyeki?" 
Hosea13:11 Nkakuha abagabe ngwirwe kubi, mbwenu naabatwara nyine ekiniga kingi." 
Hosea13:12 Ebicumuro bya Efuraimu bikomeirwe hamwe, n'ebibi bye bibiikirwe." 
Hosea13:13 Omwana ku aza kuzaarwa, nyina agira ebisha. Kwonka aba atakagizire bwengye, ahabw'okuba aba atakashuuriize kuruga omunda." 
Hosea13:14 Mbwenu niinye ndibaiha okuzimu owa Nyamuteza? Nari niinye ndibajuna Rufu? Iwe Rufu, enfu zaawe zirahi? Iwe Kuzimu 'we, okucwekyereza kwawe kurahi? Nyowe tinkiine ku ndaabagirire esaasi." 
Hosea13:15 Nobu yaakukurira gye omuri beene ishe, omuyaga gwa Nyakubaho ogw'oburugwa-izooba guryaija niguruga omu ihamba, gwomye enshuro ze zoona, emigyera ye ekarangatane; gumare omu mabiikiro ge ebintu bye byona eby'obuguzi bwingi." 
Hosea13:16 Samariya eryafubirwa, eturwe okugomera Ruhanga waayo. Abantu baayo baryaitwa rurara; abeereere baabo bateerwe ahansi bacwagurikye; n'abakazi baabo abaine enda bashaturwe." 
Hosea14:1 Iwe Isiraeli 'we, garukira Mukama Ruhanga waawe, manya ebicumuro byawe nibyo byakugwisize." 
Hosea14:2 Mugyende n'ebi bigambo, mugarukye ahari Nyakubaho, mumugire muti: Otusaasire ebibi byaitu, oikirize ebirungi bi turikukushaba. Naitwe nitwija kuhikiiriza ebi twakuragaanisa." 
Hosea14:3 Asiriya teritujuna; titurigyendera ha mbaraasi, kandi ebi tukoreise emikono yaitu tituribyeta bundi Ruhanga waitu. Manya omuriiwe nimwo efuuzi zishanga embabazi."
