Hosea14:4 Ndyabakiza okutaba beesigwa, mbeekundire nyihire aha mutima; ahabw'okuba tinkibainiire kiniga." 
Hosea14:5 Isiraeli ndyagibeera nk'orume, erabye nk'omwangangye, etsimbe emizi nk'emirama ya Lebanooni." 
Hosea14:6 Amataagi gaayo garyajanjamura, oburungi bwayo bube nk'obw'emioliva, n'omugaju gwayo gutaamirane nk'ogwa kaarwenda ya Lebanooni." 
Hosea14:7 Ndyaguma mbarinzire; bahingye ebyokurya bingi by'enjuma, barabye nk'omuzaabibu, bataamirane omugaju nka viino ya Lebanooni." 
Hosea14:8 Efuraimu eryaba etakiine kakwate n'ebishushani birikuramibwa. Manya niinye mpurira okushaba kwayo, nkagirinda. Ndi nka kaarwenda eyumbize. Niinye nkomookwaho emigisha yaayo yoona." 
Hosea14:9 Oine obwengye weena ebyo abyetegyereze; n'orikwetegyereza weena ebyo abimanye. Manya emitwarize ya Mukama ehikire, kandi abahikiriire bagikuratira. Kwonka abasiisi bagigwamu." 
Joel1:1 Eki n'ekigambo kya Nyakubaho eki yaatumire Yoeli mwene Petueli, ati:" 
Joel1:2 Imwe bagurusi 'mwe, nimuhurire eki, naimwe mwena abatwire omuri egi nsi, mukitegye amatu. Mbwenu ekintu nk'eki kirabaireho omu biro byanyu, nari omu biro bya baashoimwe?" 
Joel1:3 Nimukiteekyerereze abaana baanyu, abaana baanyu nabo bakiteekyerereze abaana baabo; n'abaabo bakiteekyerereze ab'orundi ruzaaro." 
Joel1:4 Ebi rushanda etsigireho, biriirwe kahembwe. Ebi kahembwe etsigireho, byariibwa ebitootera. N'ebi ebitootera bitsigireho, biriirwe ikuura." 
Joel1:5 Imwe basinzi 'mwe, nimusisiimukye, mucure! Naimwe mwena abanywi ba viino nimuboroogye ahabwa viino enungi, ahabw'okuba ecwekire, tiyaakigaruka mu kanwa kaanyu." 
Joel1:6 Manya emigogo y'amaani etarikubarwa eteire ensi yangye. Amaino gaayo ni nk'ag'entare, kandi eine amashongyezo nk'ag'entare enkazi." 
Joel1:7 Emazireho emizaabibu yangye, yaashatagura emitiini yangye, yaagigungunuza. Egishuubwireho ebishushu, yaabinaga ahansi; amataagi gaayo gaatsigara nigeera." 
Joel1:8 Tonzya nk'empangare eyezirikire ekiguniya, erikucurira omutsigazi obaire naayenda kugishwera." 
Joel1:9 Ebitambo by'esaano n'eby'ebyokunywa bibuzire omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Abahongyerezi abaheereza ba Nyakubaho nibacura. 
Joel1:10 Emisiri ehwaireho, ensi erimbagiriirwe ahabw'engano kucwekyerera, emizaabibu ekooma, n'emioliva kukarangatana." 
Joel1:11 Imwe bahingi 'mwe, nimushoberwe, naimwe basharizi b'emizaabibu 'mwe, nimuboroogyere engano n'oburo bw'enaku; ahabw'okuba eby'okushaaruura bifiire." 
Joel1:12 Emizaabibu ehotokire, emitiini neekabakaba. Emikomamahanga, emikindo n'emipeera, emiti yoona ey'omu misiri eyomire. Abantu tibaakiine kushemererwa." 
Joel1:13 Yaimwe bahongyerezi 'mwe nimwezirikye ebiguniya mucure. Imwe baheereza b'aha itambiro 'mwe, nimuboroogye. Imwe baheereza ba Ruhanga wangye, nimutaahe omuri Nyaruju, muraare mujwaire ebiguniya; ahabw'okuba ebitambo by'esaano n'eby'ebyokunywa tibyakitambirwa Ruhanga wanyu." 
Joel1:14 Nimurangirire okwesiibyakwo, mwete abantu, bagire ekiteerane kikuru, muteeranire hamwe abakuru omu ihanga, hamwe n'abatuuzi b'omu nsi egi boona; baije omuri Nyaruju ya Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, bamutakire." 
Joel1:15 Ai bambe, eryo izooba! Manya eizooba rya Nyakubaho riri haihi kuhika. Eizooba ri Ow'obushoboorozi bwona araacwekyererezeho." 
Joel1:16 Mbwenu ebyokurya tibituburiire nitukireeba? Kandi okushemererwa n'okwesiima tibibuzire omuri Nyaruju ya Ruhanga waitu? 
Joel1:17 Embibo zoomeire omu itaka, amabiikiro n'omurangara, ebitara bisheenyukire; ahabw'okuba bibuzire eby'okuhunikwamu." 
Joel1:18 Ebishi enyamaishwa niigongyeera! Amasyo g'ente gashobeirwe ahabw'okubura ah'okugariisiza. Nangwa n'amasyo g'entaama gakuuhwire. 
Joel1:19 Ai Nyakubaho, niiwe ndikutakira. Ahabw'okuba omuriro gumazireho amariisizo g'omu ihamba, endimi zaagwo zaayotsya emiti yoona ey'omu misiri." 
Joel1:20 Nangwa n'enyamaishwa nizikugongyeerera, ahabw'okuba emigyera eyomire; omuriro gwanyuunyaho amariisizo g'omu ihamba." 
Joel2:1 Muteerere enzamba omuri Siyooni, muteerere enduuru aha rushozi rwangye orurikwera! Abatwire omu nsi boona bateteme, ahabw'okuba ekiro kya Nyakubaho kiri haihi kuhika." 
Joel2:2 Ekiro ky'omwirima n'okwiririmba, ekiro ky'ebicu n'omwirima ndindindi! Eihe ry'enzigye rihango kandi ery'amaani rishwekire enshozi nk'omushekye. Enzigye nk'ezo tizikabahoga, kandi n'omu biro ebirikurataho tizirigaruka kubaho, omu busingye bw'enzaaro eziriija." 
Joel2:3 Omu maisho gaazo omuriro nigurya busha; n'enyima yaazo endimi z'omuriro nizibuguma. Omu maisho gaazo ensi neeshusha nk'omusiri gwa Edeni; kwonka enyima yaazo n'eihamba ririmu busha; kandi tihariho kintu kirikuzihonoka. 
Joel2:4 Nizishusha embaraasi, ziiruka nk'embaraasi z'orugamba." 
Joel2:5 Nizigurukira aha mitwe y'ebibungo nk'ebigaari by'orugamba ebirikubomborekana, nk'okubarabaruka kw'endimi z'omuriro gurikwotsya embuba, nk'eihe ry'amaani eritengire orugamba." 
Joel2:6 Abantu ku bazireeba, banyangarara, bahinduriza aha maisho." 
Joel2:7 Zityo ziteera nk'abarwani, zisharabamba ebigo nk'engabo. Buri rumwe rugyenda ruturumbwize; kwonka zitarikuteishuka mishorongo yaazo." 
Joel2:8 Tizibandama, buri rumwe rugumizamu omuhanda gwarwo. Zaataguza, zooga omu macumu, zitarikwemerezibwa." 
Joel2:9 Ziguruka, zigwa aha rurembo, ziirukira aha bisiika, zitemba, zitaaha omu maju; niziraba omu madirisa nk'abashuma." 
Joel2:10 Ku zirikureetana ziti, ensi etengyeeta, eiguru ritetema. Eizooba n'okwezi bishwekwa omwirima, enyonyoozi zirereera kwaka." 
Joel2:11 Reero Nyakubaho ahindisa eiraka omu maisho g'eryo ihe rye, ahabw'okuba ni rihango munonga, kandi orikuhikiiriza ebi aragiire n'ow'obushoboorozi bwingi. Manya eizooba rya Mukama ni rikuru, kandi niritiinisa munonga. Mbwenu n'oha orikubaasa kuryemera?" 
Joel2:12 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nangwa na hati nimungarukire n'omutima gwanyu gwona, nimwesiibyakwo, nimurira, kandi nimucura." 
Joel2:13 Mugire omutima gw'eteisize, kutari kutaagura ebi mujwaire. Mugarukire Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, ahabw'okuba aba ow'embabazi, kandi ow'esaasi. Tarahuka kuguubwa kubi, agira rukundo etahararuka, kandi tayenda kukora kabi." 
Joel2:14 Mbwenu n'oha orikumanya ngu Mukama Ruhanga waanyu takaahindura biteekateeko, akeegarukamu, akabatsigira emigisha, mukamutambira ebitambo by'esaano n'eby'ebyokunywa?" 
Joel2:15 Nimuteerere enzamba omuri Siyooni, muragiire okwesiibyakwo, murangirire ekiteerane kikuru!" 
Joel2:16 Muteeranire hamwe abantu. Mubagambire, beeyereze ekiteerane kikuru. Mwete abakuru omu ihanga, murundaane abaana, nangwa n'abeereere barikwonka. Kishwera arugye omu kishengye kye, na kishwerwa arugye omu rusiika." 
Joel2:17 Abahongyerezi, abaheereza ba Nyakubaho, baririre ahagati y'ekisasi n'eitambiro. Nibagira bati: Ai Nyakubaho, saasira abantu baawe, orekye kijumisa abantu baawe ahabwawe, bakaba eky'okurengyezana omu banyamahanga. Mbwenu abanyamahanga bagirire ki bati: Ruhanga waabo arahi?" 
Joel2:18 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagirira ensi ye eihato, yaagirira abantu be esaasi." 
Joel2:19 Nyakubaho yaagarukamu abantu be, naabagira ati: Reeba, naaza kubatwekyera engano, na viino n'amajuta g'emioliva, muhaagye. Kandi tindibahindura bundi ekijumo omu banyamahanga." 
Joel2:20 Ndyabajuna eihe ry'enzigye ezirugire omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho, ndibingire omu nsi ekarangataine kandi ey'eihamba. Ekicweka kyaryo eky'omu maisho kigwe omu nyanja ya burugwa-izooba, n'eky'enyima kigwe omu ya burengyerwa-izooba, ekinuuko ky'ekijunde kyaryo kiimukye, ahabw'okuba zikozire ekintu kirengyesereize." 
Joel2:21 Iwe nsi 'we, otatiina! Shemererwa onanukye, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akozire ebintu bikuru." 
Joel2:22 Imwe nyamaishwa 'mwe, mutatiina, ahabw'okuba amariisizo g'omu ihamba gamezire, emiti neeyana ebijuma, emitiini n'emizaabibu eyereire kimwe." 
Joel2:23 Imwe bantu ba Siyooni 'mwe, mushemererwe kandi munanukire omuri Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, ahabw'okuba abahaire enjura y'eibiba ey'orugyero ruhikire, yaagibagwisiza nyingi munonga; ey'eibiba n'ey'Eitumba nka bwabiso." 
Joel2:24 Embuga ziijure engano, amanyuukiro gashandaare viino n'amajuta g'emioliva." 
Joel2:25 Ndyabagaruriraho emyaka eyaariirwe emizinga y'enzigye, ebitootera na zaakahembwe na zaarushanda, eihe ryangye rihango eri naabooherereize." 
Joel2:26 Murye bingi muhaagye, musingize Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, owaabakoreire eby'okutangaaza, n'abantu bangye barekye kuhemurwa obundi." 
Joel2:27 Mumanye ku ndi omu Baisiraeli, kandi ku Nyowe Nyakubaho ndi Ruhanga waanyu, hatariho ondiijo, n'abantu bangye ku batarihemurwa bundi." 
Joel2:28 Kandi bwanyima obunaku buryahika, nshukye Mutima wangye aha bantu boona. Batabani baanyu na bahara baanyu barangye ebiribaho; abagurusi baanyu baroote ebirooto, n'abatsigazi baanyu bagire ebi baayorekwa." 
Joel2:29 Nangwa n'omu biro ebyo, ndyashuka Mutima wangye aha bahuuku n'aha bazaana." 
Joel2:30 Kandi ndyakora eby'amaani omu iguru n'omu nsi; eshagama n'omuriro n'okucumbuuka kw'omwika. 
Joel2:31 Eizooba riiririmbe, okwezi kutukure nk'eshagama, ekiro kya Nyakubaho ekikuru kandi ekirikutiinisa kitakahikire." 
Joel2:32 Kandi obunaku buryahika, boona abatakira Nyakubaho bajunwe. Ahabw'okuba aha Rushozi Siyooni n'omuri Yerusalemu haryabaho abarihonokaho, q2 nk'oku Nyakubaho yaakigambire. Kandi omu baritsigaraho, habemu abu Nyakubaho arikweta." 
Joel3:1 Manya reeba, omuri ebyo biro n'omuri obwo bunaku obu ndigaruriraho Abaayuda n'aba Yerusalemu nimbaiha omu bukwatwa," 
Joel3:2 ndyateeranira hamwe amahanga goona, ngashuumye omu ruhanga rw'okugacwereramu orubanja. Haza ngacwere orubanja ningatura Abaisiraeli abantu bangye ahabwangye, ahabw'okuba gakabataataanisiza omu mahanga, gaabaganisamu ensi yangye." 
Joel3:3 Kandi gaateerera abantu bangye enteenyu, omwojo gaamuhingisa maraaya, n'omwishiki gaamushengyera viino, gaaginywa." 
Joel3:4 Mbwenu iwe Tuuro na Sidoni n'ebyanga bya Filisitiya byona, mwine kakwate ki naanye? Mwine eki murikumpoora? Ku muraabe mwine eki murikumpoora, naanye niinyija kurahuka kubahoora ahabw'ebi mwakozire, bibatukurire." 
Joel3:5 Manya mukatwara efeeza zangye n'ezaabu zaangye, mwanyaga eby'obutungi byangye bingi, mwabita omu maramizo gaanyu." 
Joel3:6 Mwaguza Abaguriiki abantu ba Yuda n'aba Yerusalemu, mwabatwara hare n'omwatano gw'ensi yaabo." 
Joel3:7 Kwonka mbwenu nyowe niinyija kubaimutsya, mbaihe ei mwabagurize; naimwe mbahoore nimbatura ebi mwakozire." 
Joel3:8 Batabani baanyu na bahara baanyu mbarekurire Abaayuda; nabo babaguze Abasabiya, eihanga ry'okwo hare, ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho niwe akigambire." 
Joel3:9 Eki mukirangirire omu mahanga muti: Mweteekateekyere orugamba, mwimutsye amamanzi. Abarwani boona nibairire haihi, bahurure." 
Joel3:10 Amafuka gaanyu nimugaheeshemu amacumu. Otaine maani ahigye ati: Ndi omurwani. 
Joel3:11 Imwe mahanga 'mwe mwena ageehinguririizeho, nimurahukye, mwije mweteeranireyo. Ai Mukama, okwo obe niyo waashuumya abarwani baawe." 
Joel3:12 Amahanga goona geimutsye, gaije omu ruhanga orucwerwamu emanja. Haza okwo niyo ndaashutame kucwera orubanja amahanga goona ageehinguririizeho." 
Joel3:13 Nimutemu omusyo gw'engyesho, ahabw'okuba eigyesha rihikire. Nimutaahemu, munyuukye, ahabw'okuba einyuukiro rya viino riijwire; amaato nigasheesheka. Manya obubi bwabo burengyesereize." 
Joel3:14 Ebimbuuro, ebimbuuro by'abantu omu ruhanga rw'okucweramu orubanja! Manya ekiro kya Nyakubaho ky'okurucweramu kiri haihi." 
Joel3:15 Eizooba n'okwezi biiririmbire, enyonyoozi tizaakyaka." 
Joel3:16 Nyakubaho naayema Siyooni, atsinda nk'entare; ayema Yerusalemu, aranguuza n'eiraka rye, eiguru n'ensi bitengyeeta! Kwonka Nyakubaho niwe buhungiro bw'abantu be, ekigo kigumire ky'Abaisiraeli." 
Joel3:17 Aho niho muraamanyire ku ndi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu, otuura Siyooni, orushozi rwangye orurikwera. Na Yerusalemu ebe erikwera. Abanyamahanga barekye kugirabamu obundi." 
Joel3:18 Reero ahari eryo izooba, enshozi ziryatoonya viino enuzire, ebibungo bihimintikye amate; emikura ya Yuda yoona efukunkukye amaizi; kandi enshuro y'amaizi erugye omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, eitirire oruhanga rw'eminyinya." 
Joel3:19 Misiri ehindukye eitongo, na Edomu ebe eihamba ririmu busha, niziturwa eby'obwinazi ebi zaakoreire Abaayuda; ahabw'okuba zikasheeshera omu nsi zaayo eshagama y'abataine rubanja." 
Joel3:20 Kwonka Yuda eryatuurwamu abantu ebiro byona, na Yerusalemu etuurwemu ab'enzaaro zoona." 
Joel3:21 Nyowe ndyahoorera eshagama y'abaitsirwe, kandi tiharigira n'omwe ou ndiihaho orubanja. Manya Nyakubaho atuura omuri Siyooni." 
Amos1:1 Ebi n'ebigambo bya Amosi, ow'omu bariisa ba Tekoa, ebi yaayorekirwe ahari Isiraeli, omu busingye bwa Uziya omugabe wa Yuda, n'omu bwa Yeroboamu mwene Yoashi omugabe wa Isiraeli; hatsigaireyo emyaka ebiri omutsitsa kwija." 
Amos1:2 Akagira ati: Nyakubaho naatsinda naayema Siyooni, eiraka rye nirihindira Yerusalemu; amariisizo g'abariisa nigacura, n'obunyaatsi bw'aha mutwe gwa Karumeelo nibuhotoka." 
Amos1:3 Mukama naagira ati: Ahabw'ebicumuro bishatu by'aba Damasiko n'aha bwa bina tindibaihaho kifubiro; ahabw'okuba bakahuura Abagileadi n'ebihuuzo by'ebyoma. 
Amos1:4 Nikyo ndyoherereza omuriro aha nju ya Hazaeli, gukookyeza kimwe ebigo bya Benihadadi." 
Amos1:5 Ndyahenda empimbi z'amarembo ga Damasiko mmareho abatwire omu ruhita rwa Aveni, n'okwaitse enkoni y'obugabe omuri Betedeni; n'Abasiriya batwarwe Kiiri bari enkwatwa. Nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Amos1:6 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ahabw'ebicumuro bishatu by'Abaagaaza n'ahabwa bina, tindibaihaho kifubiro; ahabw'okuba bakatwara ab'eihanga ryona bari enkwatwa baabarekurira Abanyaedomu." 
Amos1:7 Nikyo ndyoherereza omuriro aha kigo kya Gaaza, gukookyeza kimwe ebigo byarwo." 
Amos1:8 Ndyamaraho abatwire omuri Ashidoodi, n'okwaitse enkoni y'obugabe omuri Ashikelooni, mbangire Ekurooni omukono, n'Abafilisiti abaatsigaireho bacwekyerere. Nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugamba." 
Amos1:9 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ahabw'ebicumuro bishatu by'Abanyatuuro, n'ahabwa bina, tindibaihaho kifubiro; ahabw'okuba bakarekurira Abanyaedomu eihanga ryona, tibaijuka ku baine naryo endagaano y'okuba abanyaruganda." 
Amos1:10 Nikyo ndyoherereza omuriro aha kigo kya Tuuro, gukookyeza kimwe ebigo byayo." 
Amos1:11 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ahabw'ebicumuro bishatu by'Abanyaedomu n'ahabwa bina, tindibaihaho kifubiro; ahabw'okuba bakabinga beene waabo babacurikiire rurara, batabainiire saasi n'akakye, ekiniga kyaguma nikyenda kubabarura, baine enziika ebiro byona." 
Amos1:12 Nikyo ndyoherereza omuriro ahari Temani, gukookyeza kimwe ebigo bya Bozira." 
Amos1:13 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ahabw'ebicumuro bishatu by'Abaamoni, n'ahabwa bina, tindibaihaho kifubiro; ahabw'okuba bakafumurana abakazi ba Gileadi abaine enda, ngu babone kwirizayo omwatano gw'ensi yaabo." 
Amos1:14 Nikyo nditwekyera ekigo kya Raba omuriro, gukookyeza kimwe ebigo byayo; hakabayo orwari aha izooba ry'orugamba, n'eihunga aha izooba ry'akasooroora;" 
Amos1:15 omugabe waabo hamwe n'abategyeki be bakatwarwa bari enkwatwa. 
Amos2:1 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ahabw'ebicumuro bishatu by'Abaamoabu n'ahabwa bina, tindibaihaho kifubiro; ahabw'okuba bakootsya amagufa g'omugabe wa Edomu, baagacwa eiju." 
Amos2:2 Nikyo ndyoherereza omuriro ahari Moabu, gukookyeza kimwe ebigo bya Keeriyoti; Abaamoabu bakafeera omu ruyogooro n'orwari n'amaraka g'enzamba." 
Amos2:3 Ndyabaihamu omutegyeki waabo, mmwite hamwe n'abategyeki baabo boona. Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Amos2:4 Nyakubaho naagira ati; Ahabw'ebicumuro bishatu by'Abaayuda, n'ahabwa bina, tindibaihaho kifubiro; ahabw'okuba bangire eby'omu iteeka ryangye, tibaakuratira bi naataireho; kureka baahabisibwa baaruhanga baabo b'ebishuba, abu baishebo baakuratiire." 
Amos2:5 Nikyo ndyohererereza Yuda omuriro, gukookyeza kimwe Yerusalemu." 
Amos2:6 Mukama naagira ati: Ahabw'ebicumuro bishatu by'Abaisiraeli, n'ahabwa bina, tindibaihaho kifubiro; ahabw'okuba batunda abahikiriire efeeza, n'abakyene enkaito." 
Amos2:7 Basingyeererera emitwe y'abooro omu mucuucu, bacwa omu muhanda abanaku. Omushaija na ishe baza aha mwishiki omwe, batyo bahemura eiziina ryangye eririkwera." 
Amos2:8 Babyama aha rubaju rw'amatambiro beeyariire ebijwaro bi baakwatiriziibwe abooro kandi banywera omuri Nyaruju yangye Ruhanga waabo viino ei banyagire abu barikwihuza. 
Amos2:9 Haza naacwekyereize Abaamori kubahigiza, abaabaire bari baraingwa nka zaakaarwenda, kandi abagumire nk'emivure. Nkakonkobora ebijuma byabo, naarandura emizi yaabo." 
Amos2:10 Kandi niinye naabaihire omu nsi ya Misiri nkamara naimwe emyaka makumi ana omu ihamba mbeebembeire, ngu mubone kukubuura ensi y'Abaamori." 
Amos2:11 Reero omuri batabani baanyu nkaimutsyamu Abanaziri Imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, buzimazima ekyo tikwo kiri? Nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Amos2:12 Kwonka mukanywaisa Abanaziri viino, mwaragiira abarangi muti: Mutariranga." 
Amos2:13 Mbwenu naanye ndyabahingamiririra ahi muri, nk'oku ekigaari kiijwire entende z'oburo kibandamirira eitaka." 
Amos2:14 Empaya maguru eryabura agahunga, ow'amaani tariguma nago, n'emanzi terikiza magara gaayo." 
Amos2:15 Kikwata-buta taryemerera, n'empaya-maguru teryejuna; nobu yaakuba otembire embaraasi kukiza amagara." 
Amos2:16 Kandi na rutatiina-mu-mamanzi eryo izooba aryahunga ajwaire busha; Nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba. 
Amos3:1 Imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, nimuhurire ekigambo eki Nyakubaho agambire naabahana ati: Imwe mwena ab'oruganda ru naihire omu nsi ya Misiri:" 
Amos3:2 Omu nganda zoona ez'omu nsi niimwe mwenka abu naamanyire. Nikyo ndibafubirira ahabw'ebicumuro byanyu byona. 
Amos3:3 Mbwenu shi abantu babiri bagyenda kumwe bataragaine? 
Amos3:4 Entare etsindira omu kibira etaine ki eitsire? Nari entare nto erurumire omu ryaya etaine ki ekwatsire? 
Amos3:5 Enyonyi egwa ahansi omu mutego batagugitegire? Omutego gubarashuka gutaine ki gukwatsire? 
Amos3:6 Enzamba ekaateererwa omu rurembo abantu batatiine? Akabi kakaagwera orurembo, Nyakubaho atakoohereize?" 
Amos3:7 Buzimazima Mukama Ruhanga takora kintu kyona ataatiire naama ye abaheereza be kintu kyona. 
Amos3:8 Entare etsinzire, mbwenu n'oha otarikwija kutiina? Mukama Ruhanga agambire, mbwenu n'oha otarikwija kuranga?" 
Amos3:9 Murangirire ab'omu bikaari bya Ashidoodi n'ab'omu za Misiri muti: Muteeranire omu nshozi za Samariya, mureebe obujagararo buhango oburiyo, n'eby'okuhata abantu ebirimu." 
Amos3:10 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Tibarikumanya kukora ebihikire; ahabw'okuba batindika omu bikaari byabo obwinazi n'obusikuzi. 
Amos3:11 Nikyo Mukama Ruhanga arikugirira ati: Omubisha aryayehinguririza egyo nsi, asheenye ebigo byabo ebirikubarinda, n'ebikaari byabo binyagwe." 
Amos3:12 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nk'oku omuriisa w'entaama asikura amaguru abiri nari ekicweka ky'okutu omu kanwa k'entare; n'abakye omu Baisiraeli abatwire Samariya bagaramisiriize omu bwehogo bw'ebitabo, n'aha mishego y'ebitanda byabo, nikwo barijunwa." 
Amos3:13 Mukama Ruhanga, Ruhanga w'amahe naagira ati: Nimuhurire kandi mwemeze ab'omuryango gwa Yakobo," 
Amos3:14 ku eizooba ri ndifubiriraho Isiraeli ahabw'ebicumuro byayo, niryo ndifubiriraho amatambiro ga Beteli; ntemeho amahembe g'eitambiro, gagwe ahansi." 
Amos3:15 Ndyacwekyereza amaju g'omu biro by'embeho, n'ag'omu biro by'ekyanda; n'amaju ag'ahunzirwe n'emiino y'enjojo garyahwerekyerera na zaanyaruju zihweho; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Amos4:1 Nimuhurire ekigambo eki, Imwe bakazi 'mwe ab'omu nshozi za Samariya, abari nk'ente za Bashani, abahata abooro, bakasingyeera abakyene; abagira baibabo bati: Nimureete ebyokunywa tuywe!" 
Amos4:2 Mukama Ruhanga arahiire naagira ati: Nk'oku ndi orikwera, obunaku bwanyu buryahika babatware nibabakuruza amarobo. Nangwa n'abarihereeruka omuriimwe baryabatwaza amarobo g'ebyenyanja." 
Amos4:3 Mutyo mushohorere ahasheenyukire, buri mukazi agyeme ahu araatoore; kandi munagwe omuri Herumooni. Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Amos4:4 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, nimwije Beteli mucumure, mwije Giligaali mukanyise ebicumuro. Mureete ebitambo byanyu buri kasheeshe, na kimwe kya ikumi buri biro bishatu." 
Amos4:5 Mutambe ekitambo ky'okusiima ekirimu ekitumbisa; kandi murangirire emitoijo y'okuhayo mwekundiire, mugibuzye hoona; ahabw'okuba ebyo nibyo mukunda kukora." 
Amos4:6 Nkababuza eky'okutamira omu ndembo zaanyu; mwabura ekyokurya omu byanga byanyu. Kwonka timwangarukira. Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba. 
Amos4:7 Nkabaima enjura hatsigaireyo ameezi ashatu eigyesha kuhika; obundi nkaba ngwisiza orurembo rumwe enjura, orundi ngirwima; Omusiri gumwe obundi guguubwamu enjura, haza ogundi etagwemu gwoma." 
Amos4:8 Batyo ab'omu ndembo ibiri nari ishatu bazengyerera omu rurembo rumwe kunywa amaizi, kwonka babura kuhwa eiriho, haza nabwo timwangarukira; nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba." 
Amos4:9 Nkabateeza ekibabo n'okusya nyamwenga, naacwekyereza emisiri yaanyu y'ebyokurya n'ey'emizaabibu; emiti yaanyu y'emitiini n'ey'emioliva enzigye zaagirya; Kwonka timwangarukira, Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Amos4:10 Nkabooherereza orufu nk'oru naayoherereize Abaamisiri, naitsa abatsigazi baanyu rurara, naanyaga embaraasi zaanyu. Enyindo zaanyu naaziitsa ekinuuko ky'omu nsiisira zaanyu; Kwonka timwangarukira; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Amos4:11 Nyowe Ruhanga nkacwekyereza bamwe omuriimwe, nk'oku naacwekyereize Sodoma na Gomora; mwaba nk'ekicumurwa kyaihwa omu muriro gurikwaka, kwonka nabwo timwangarukira; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Amos4:12 N'ahabw'ekyo, Iwe Isiraeli 'we, naanye nikwo ndikugira! Iwe Isiraeli, ahabw'okuba niinyija kukugira ntyo! Mbwenu yeteekateekye kubugabugana na Ruhanga waawe." 
Amos4:13 Manya reeba, ogwo obumburika enshozi akahanga omuyaga, akagambira omuntu ekimuri aha mutima; ogwo ohindura nyomushana nyekiro; akagyendagyendera eruguru y'ensi. Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe niryo iziina rye." 
Amos5:1 Imwe ab'omuryango gwa Isiraeli, nimuhurire eki kigambo eki ndikubagambaho nintonzya nti:" 
Amos5:2 Isiraeli omwishiki oshugaine agwire kandi tarigaruka kwimuka. 
Amos5:3 Manya Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Orurembo orurihuruza abantu rukumi ruryatsigaza igana abaritabaaruka, n'orurihuruza abantu igana, haryatabaarukaho ikumi ab'omuryango gwa Isiraeli." 
Amos5:4 Nyakubaho naagira ab'omuryango gwa Isiraeli ati: Munsherure, mubone kugira amagara." 
Amos5:5 Kwonka mutansherurira Beteli, mutataaha Giligaali, n'obu kwakuba okwambuka Beerisheba. Ahabw'okuba buzimazima Abaagiligaali baryazaahibwa, na Beteli ehindukye busha." 
Amos5:6 Musherure Nyakubaho mubone kugira amagara, atakaayakira omu b'omuryango gwa Yosefu nk'omuriro, gukootsya Beteli, hakabura owaaguraaza." 
Amos5:7 Imwe abahindaguturana eby'oburyo, mukamiisha eby'okuhikiirira," 
Amos5:8 Ogwo owaahangire enyonyoozi Kakaaga n'engabo ya Orioni, ohindura omwirima ndindindi obusheeshe, nyomushana akagihindura nyekiro; ogwo otuma amaizi g'enyanja, akagashandaaza aha nsi; Nyakubaho niryo iziina rye." 
Amos5:9 Niwe areetera ab'amaani kukinuka, ebigo bigumire bikabona kucwekyerera." 
Amos5:10 Manya orikubahanira omu irembo bamwanga, kandi ogamba amazima abatama." 
Amos5:11 Mbwenu nk'oku muribatiriire abooro, mukabagyema kutoija engano zaabo; amaju gu mwombekyeise amabaare gacweregyereire, timurigatuuramu, n'emisiri mirungi y'emizaabibu ei muhingire timurinywa viino yaayo." 
Amos5:12 Manya nimmanya ebicumuro byanyu ku biri bingi, n'ebibi byanyu ku birengyesereize, imwe ababonabonesa abahikiriire, mukarya enguzi, kandi abakyene mukabateereza enkokora omu irembo." 
Amos5:13 Nikyo orikwerinda aricecekyera omu bunaku obwo, ahabw'okuba buryaba buri obunaku bubi." 
Amos5:14 Mwitanire ebirungi, bitari ebibi, mubone kugira amagara; na Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe nibwo ariguma naimwe, nk'oku mukigamba." 
Amos5:15 Mwangye ebibi, mukunde ebirungi. Muhamye eby'obwinganisa muri omu irembo. Obundi Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe akaagirira embabazi aba Yosefu abaatsigaireho." 
Amos5:16 N'ahabw'ekyo oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe arikugamba. Nyakubaho ogwo naagira ati: Ahu abantu bateeranira haryabaho okuborooga, n'omu nguuto zoona abantu baryagira bati: Ai bambe! Ai bambe! Beete abahingi kwija kucura, n'abarikumanya kutonzya kwija kuborooga." 
Amos5:17 Kandi omu misiri y'emizaabibu yoona haryabamu okuborooga ahabw'okuba ndyabarabamu nyizire kubafubira. Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba. 
Amos5:18 Ebishi imwe abarikwetenga eizooba rya Nyakubaho muryakareeba! Mbwenu eryo izooba rya Nyakubaho nimuryendera ki? Ka n'ery'omwirima, ritari ry'omushana." 
Amos5:19 Riri nk'oku omuntu yaakuhunga entare, akabugana edubu; nari nk'oku yaakutaaha omu nju, akeegamiza omukono gwe ekisiika, haza enjoka ekamutema." 
Amos5:20 Mbwenu eizooba rya Nyakubaho t'eizooba ry'omwirima, ritari ry'omushana? T'ery'ekizima ekitarimu okuhweza kwona?" 
Amos5:21 Nyanga, kandi ngaya amagyenyi gaanyu, ntaireho n'okutashemerererwa ebiteerane byanyu ebikuru." 
Amos5:22 N'obu mwakuntambira ebitambo bicwekize, n'eby'esaano, tinkaabiikiriza, Kandi tinkaayeta ha bitambo byanyu byokurya kumwe, eby'amatungo gaanyu g'ebishaju." 
Amos5:23 Nimuunyiheho orwari rw'ebyeshongoro byanyu. Tindikwija kutega okutu ebijumeero by'enanga zaanyu. 
Amos5:24 Kureka murekye eby'obwinganisa bihimintikye nk'amaizi, n'eby'okuhikiirira bibe nk'omugyera gutarikwoma." 
Amos5:25 Imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, emyaka makumi ana ei naamazire naimwe omu ihamba, mukantambira ebitambo n'okundeetera emitoijo?" 
Amos5:26 Mbwenu nimwija kuheeka ebishushani bi mwayeheesheire: ekya Sakuuti omugabe waanyu, n'ekya Kaiwaani ruhanga waanyu enyonyoozi." 
Amos5:27 Nikyo ndaabazaahize, nkabatwara seeri ya Damasiko. Nikwo Nyakubaho arikugira, ou eiziina rye aba Ruhanga ow'amahe." 
Amos6:1 Ebishi baryakareeba abatuura bagaramisiririize omuri Siyooni, n'abatwire omu nshozi za Samariya bataine ki beetaireho; abakungu b'amahanga makuru agarikukira agandi, ei aba Isiraeli beetuurira." 
Amos6:2 Nimwambukye, muze Kalune, mureebe. Ku muraarugyeyo, muze Hamati enkuru; bwanyima mushuume Gaati ey'Abafilisiti, mbwenu ezo ndembo nizihita ezi nsi z'obugabe? Nainga shi, ekyanga kyazo nikikiza ekyanyu obuhango?" 
Amos6:3 Imwe nimuta hare eizooba ribi, haza mwiriza haihi obutuuro bw'obwinazi?" 
Amos6:4 Baryakareeba abagaramisiriza aha bitanda by'emiino y'enjojo, bakeenanuurira aha bitabo byabo; bakarya ebyana by'entaama bi baihire omu busyo, n'encwamutwe zi baihire omu bihongore." 
Amos6:5 Abeeshongorera aha bidongo ebyeshongoro bitaine muhoho: bakeegunzira ebirikujumeeza amaraka nka Daudi," 
Amos6:6 abanywera viino aha bishare, bakeesiiga amajuta marungi munonga g'emioliva; kwonka batarikusaasibwa kucwekyerera kw'Aba Yosefu!" 
Amos6:7 Nikyo baribeera abaribandiza abandi kuzaahibwa; ebirigime by'abarikwejaramya bikahwaho. 
Amos6:8 Mukama Ruhanga naarahira ati: Nk'oku ndi Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe, ntamirwe okwetunguura kw'Aba Yakobo kandi niinyanga ebigo byabo. Nikyo ndiheerayo orwo rurembo n'ebyamwo byona." 
Amos6:9 Abantu ikumi ku baritsigara omu nju emwe, baryafa." 
Amos6:10 Kureka haryahonokaho bakye ab'okwiha amagufa omu nju. Rreero omunyabuzaare oriba aizire kukara ofiire, aryabuuza otundami omu karugu k'enju, ati: Okiinemu ondi otsigaire naiwe? Onu amugarukyemu ati: Ngaaha. Nawe amugire ati: Hunama! Titushemereire kugamba aha iziina rya Nyakubaho." 
Amos6:11 Manya reeba, Nyakubaho ku ariragiira, amaju amahango garyasheenywa, n'amakye gasheenyagurwe goona, gabe obusaasingo." 
Amos6:12 Mbwenu embaraasi ziirukira aha nkiri? Nari omuntu ahingisa ente enyanja? Kwonka imwe obwinganisa mubuhindwire obushegu, n'ebiruga omu kuhikiirira mwabihindura omuravunga." 
Amos6:13 Imwe abeesiima ahabw'okukwata Lodebaari, mukagira muti; Titureekwatiire Karinaimu ahabw'amaani gaitu?" 
Amos6:14 Mbwenu imwe Abaisiraeli, ndyabaimukiza eihanga, ribateere; ribabonabonese, okwiha aharikutaahirwa Hamati, okuhika aha Kagyera ka Araba." 
Amos7:1 Mbwenu oku nikwo Nyakubaho yaanyorekire. Reeba, akareeta omuzinga gw'enzigye, obunyaatsi bw'embaraasi z'omugabe bwaherize kutemwa, obusya butandikire kumera!" 
Amos7:2 Ku zaaherize kurya obunyaatsi bw'egyo nsi, naagira nti: Ai Mukama Ruhanga, ninkweshengyereza, osaasire abantu abaawe! Aba Yakobo nibabaasa bata kugumaho, haza bari bakye?" 
Amos7:3 Nyakubaho ekyo yaakyegarukamu, yaagira ati: Ekyo tikirikwija kubaho." 
Amos7:4 Kandi Mukama Ruhanga oku nikwo yaanyorekire; reeba, Mukama Ruhanga akaba naayeta omuriro kufubira abantu be, kukomberaho kimwe enyanja rutankanda ey'okuzimu, n'okumaraho ensi." 
Amos7:5 Ntyo ngira nti: Ai Mukama Ruhanga, ninkweshengyereza, reka! Aba Yakobo nibabaasa bata kugumaho, haza bari bakye?" 
Amos7:6 Mukama Ruhanga ekyo yaakyegarukamu ati: Ekyo nakyo tikirikwija kubaho. 
Amos7:7 Ekindi akaanyoreka eki: Reeba Mukama akaba ayemereire aha rubaju rw'ekigo kyombekirwe na kariisho, haza agikwaitse omu ngaro." 
Amos7:8 Nyakubaho yangira ati: Amosi, nooreeba ki? Nti nindeeba kariisho. Reero Nyakubaho agira ati: Reeba ninta kariisho omu bantu bangye Abaisiraeli, kandi tindirenzya maisho bicumuro byabo obundi." 
Amos7:9 Emyanya y'obutungutungu eya Isaaka eryaba omushaka, n'emyanya ya Isiraeli erikwera ecwekyerezibwe; nyimukye nkwaitse rurara, ndwanise ab'omuryango gwa Yeroboamu." 
Amos7:10 Bwanyima Amaziya omuhongyerezi wa Beteli akatuma ahari Yeroboamu omugabe wa Isiraeli naamugira ati: Amosi akugiiriire omu naama mbi omu ba Isiraeli. Ebi arikugamba ensi terikubaasa kubigumisiriza! 
Amos7:11 Ahabw'okuba agizire ati: Yeroboamu n'ow'okwitwa. Abaisiraeli n'ab'okwihwa omu nsi yaabo, bakazaahibwa." 
Amos7:12 Bwanyima Amaziya agira Amosi ati: Iwe muhanuuzi 'we, irooko ohungire omu nsi ya Yuda, obe niyo waahwera omushumi, orangireyo;" 
Amos7:13 kwonka otagaruka kurangira Beteli, ahabw'okuba n'omwanya gw'omugabe wenka; kandi nigwo Iramizo ry'obugabe." 
Amos7:14 Amosi agarukamu Amaziya ati: Nkaba ntari murangi, kandi ntari mwana w'omurangi; kureka ndi omuriisa n'omusharizi w'emikunyu." 
Amos7:15 Nyakubaho yaanyiha aha murimo gw'okuriisa amatungo; yangira ati: Irooko orangire abantu bangye Abaisiraeli. 
Amos7:16 Mbwenu nu hurira eki Nyakubaho arikugamba. Noogira oti: Otarangira kubi Isiraeli kandi otaragurira kubi ab'omuryango gwa Isaaka. 
Amos7:17 Nikyo Nyakubaho arikukugira ati: Omukazi waawe aryaba maraaya omuri oru rurembo, batabani baawe na bahara baawe baitwe rurara, ensi yaawe eryabaganisibwa n'omugoye, naiwe ofeere omu nsi y'abatarikummanya Nyowe Ruhanga; buzimazima Abaisiraeli baihwe omu nsi yaabo bazaahibwe." 
Amos8:1 Oku nikwo Mukama Ruhanga yaanyorekire: Nkareeba ekiibo kirimu ebijuma by'ekyanda. 
Amos8:2 Nyakubaho yambuuza ati: Amosi nooreeba ki? Naamugarukamu nti: Nindeeba ekiibo kirimu ebijuma by'ekyanda. Bwanyima Nyakubaho yangira ati: Mbwenu muheru y'abantu bangye Abaisiraeli yaahika. Tindirenzya maisho bicumuro byabo obundi. 
Amos8:3 Eryo izooba ebyeshongoro by'omuri Nyaruju biryaba okuborooga. Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Emitumbi y'abantu eryaba mingi, baginagye buri hantu bacecekire." 
Amos8:4 Nimuhurire eki, imwe abarikuribatiirira abakyene, mukamara abooro omu nsi." 
Amos8:5 Obwo nimugira muti: Oku kwezi kubonekire, nikurenga ryari tukatunda ebyokurya by'omujuma? Na Sabato ehweho ryari, tukahununura engano z'okutunda; ekitenga tukakihindura kikye, n'encuro tukagihindura mpango; haza tukaryangatanisa nitukoresa endengo z'ebishuba;" 
Amos8:6 abooro tukabagura efeeza, n'abakyene tukabagura enkaito, tukatunda entiti z'engano?" 
Amos8:7 Nyakubaho ohimbya Yakobo naarahira ati: Buzimazima tindyebwa kintu kyona eky'ebi baakozire. 
Amos8:8 Mbwenu shi ekyo tikirireetera nsi kutetema, n'abagitwiremu boona bakacura? Egyo nsi yoona ekaijura n'eijururuka nka Nailo Omugyera gwa Misiri?" 
Amos8:9 Kandi Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Ahari ekyo kiro ndyarenzya eizooba omu ihangwe, ntimbye ensi omwirima nyomushana," 
Amos8:10 amagyenyi gaanyu ngahindure okucura, n'ebyeshongoro byanyu byona bibe okutonzya, abantu boona mbeezirikise ebiguniya, n'emitwe yaabo yoona ebe enkomborora, eryo izooba ndigire nk'eri omuntu acuriiriraho mutabani we omwe nyamunegyere, omuheru gwaryo gube nk'ogw'eizooba ry'obusaasi." 
Amos8:11 Mukama Ruhanga naagira ati: Obunaku buryahika nteeze ensi enjara etari njara y'ebyokurya nari eiriho ry'ebyokunywa; kureka ey'okuhurira ekigambo kyangye. 
Amos8:12 Baryazengyerera okuruga aha nyanja okuhika aha ndiijo; bairukye nibakora oku n'oku kusherura ekigambo kya Mukama; kwonka tibarikibona. 
Amos8:13 Eryo izooba empangare nungi n'abatsigazi baryagwa enshazi ahabw'eiriho. 
Amos8:14 Reero abarahira Ashima ruhangakazi wa Samariya, bakagira bati: Iwe Daani nindahira ruhanga waawe! Kandi bati: Nindahira omuhanda gurikuza Beerisheba; baryagwa kandi tibarigira bu baimukire." 
Amos9:1 Nkareeba Nyakubaho ayemereire aha rubaju rw'eitambiro; reero yaaragiira ati: Teera munonga emitwe y'enyomyo za Nyaruju, okuhitsya obu orukanga ruraatengyeete, kandi ozishenyagurire aha mitwe y'abantu boona; haza abaraatsigareho baitwe, hatagira owaahunga, kandi hatagira owaakira." 
Amos9:2 Nobu baakutimba, bakahika okuzimu, omukono gwangye guryabaihayo; nobu baakutemba bakahika omu iguru, nayo ndyabahananturayo." 
Amos9:3 Nobu baakweshereka aha mutwe gwa Karumeelo, ndyabacoocooza, mbaiheyo. Kandi n'obu baakuunyeshereka okuzimu ahansi y'enyanja, okwo nayo nkaaragiira ekijoka kibarumirayo." 
Amos9:4 Nangwa n'obu baritwarwa omu bukwatwa bafunyirwe abazigu baabo, ndyaragiira rurara ebaitireyo, kandi ngume mbataireho eriisho kubakora kubi, kutari kubakora gye." 
Amos9:5 Mukama Ruhanga ow'amahe, okora aha nsi, ekayaga, abagitwiremu boona bakacura, kandi yoona ekaijura nka Nailo, ekaijururuka nk'ogwo Mugyera gwa Misiri," 
Amos9:6 ogwo oyombeka kaanyinaabiri ze omu iguru, akahamiza orukanga rwe eruguru y'ensi; oyeta amaizi g'enyanja kwija, akagashandaaza ensi, Nyakubaho niryo iziina rye." 
Amos9:7 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Imwe Baisiraeli 'mwe, ahariinye timuri nk'Abanyaetiopiya? Tindaihire Baisiraeli omu nsi ya Misiri, n'Abafilisiti Kafutoori, n'Abasiriya Kiiri?" 
Amos9:8 Reeba, Nyowe Mukama Ruhanga amaisho ngataire ahari obu bugabe enyabibi, kandi ndyabucwekyereza, mbumare omu nsi; kureka abu ntaricwekyerereza kimwe n'ab'omuryango gwa Yakobo. Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Amos9:9 Manya reeba, ndyaragiira, kandi nshungurire ab'omuryango gwa Yakobo omu mahanga goona, nk'oku omuntu ashungurira oburo aha rugari, kwonka hatagire rujuma rwaragara ahansi." 
Amos9:10 Abasiisi boona ab'omu bantu bangye, abagira bati; Tihaine kabi karitugwera, nobu kwakuba okutuhikaho, baryaitwa rurara." 
Amos9:11 Aha izooba eryo ndyaimutsya enju ya Daudi eyaagwire, mpunduuze ebyayo ebyasheenyukire, nyimutsye ebisheenyuka byayo, ngyombekye busya, ebe nk'oku yaabaire eri omu biro bya ira;" 
Amos9:12 babone kukubuura ekicweka kya Edomu ekyatsigaireho n'amahanga goona agarikuunyetererwa. Nyakubaho orikora ekyo, nikwo arikugamba." 
Amos9:13 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ebiro biri haihi kuhika, obu eigyesha ririkuratana riti n'eibiba, n'okunyuuka emizaabibu kukakuratana kuti n'okugibyara, obu enshozi ziritoonya viino enuzire; enshozi zoona zikahimintika nayo." 
Amos9:14 Ndyagarura abantu bangye Abaisiraeli aha buteeka, bombekye busya endembo zaabo ezaashenyagurikire, bazituuremu, babyare emizaabibu, banywe viino yaayo; bahingye emisiri, barye ebi eyerize." 
Amos9:15 Ndyababyara omu nsi yaabo, barekye kurandurwa obundi omuri egyo nsi ei mbahaire. Mukama Ruhanga waanyu nikwo arikugamba." 
Obadiah1:1 Oku nikwo Obadiya yaayorekirwe Mukama Ruhanga, naagamba ahari Edomu ati: Tuhuriire enkuru erikuruga ahari Nyakubaho, ku entumwa eyohereziibwe omu mahanga goona, neegira eti: Nimwimukye, tuhurure, tuteere Edomu!" 
Obadiah1:2 Nyakubaho naagigira ati: Reeba, niinyija kukuhindura mukye omu mahanga, ogayirwe kimwe." 
Obadiah1:3 Amaryo g'omu mutima gwawe gakubeihabeihire, iwe otuura omu bicokoromi by'enkiri, okaraara omu myanya y'ahaiguru; okagira omu mutima gwawe oti: N'oha owaakumpanurayo, akanta ahansi?" 
Obadiah1:4 Nobu oraatumbikye eiguru nk'eishamba, okata ekyashuri kyawe ahagati y'enyonyoozi, nayo ndyakuhanurayo. Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Obadiah1:5 Abashuma nari abanyagi ku baakukutaahirira nyekiro, nobu waakufeerwa ebintu bingi munonga, kwonka tibakaiba ebi barikwenda byonka? Abashoromi b'emizaabibu ku baakwija ahu ori, tibakaakutsigira eby'okuhumba?" 
Obadiah1:6 Ebishi Esau anyagirwe! Ebi atungire bishahwirwe! 
Obadiah1:7 Boona abakwatanisa naiwe omu rugamba, bakubeihabeihire, baakubinga, baakuhitsya aha mwatano. Abu ogira nabo obusingye, bakuhabiise, baakusingura. Banywani baawe abu oyesiga bakutegire omutego, kwonka tiwaakimanya." 
Obadiah1:8 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Eryo izooba tindicwekyereza abanyabwengye nkabamara omuri Edomu? N'abarikwetegyereza nkabamara aha Rushozi Esau? 
Obadiah1:9 Naiwe Temani, amamanzi gaawe garyaitwa obwoba, buri muntu ow'aha Rushozi Esau aitwe." 
Obadiah1:10 Obubisha bu waagiriire murumuna waawe Yakobo buryakureetera kwitwa enshoni, omarirweho kimwe ebiro byona." 
Obadiah1:11 Aha izooba ri waayemerereireho hangahari, obu abu atarikumanyana nabo baanyaga ebi atungire, abanyamahanga bakaraba omu marembo ge, bakateerera Yerusalemu enteenyu obwo ori nkabo." 
Obadiah1:12 Kwonka okaba otari w'okweraata aha izooba eri murumuna waawe yaahikiirweho ekihikiirizi. Okaba otari w'okwesiimirana Abaayuda aha izooba ri baacwekyerereziibweho. Okaba otari w'okwekiita aha izooba ri baareebeireho enaku. 
Obadiah1:13 Okaba otari w'okutaaha omu irembo ry'abantu bangye aha izooba ri baagwereirweho akagwe, okaba otahikire kubateerera omu kwahwa, okaaya n'ebintu byabo, obu baagwerwa akagwe." 
Obadiah1:14 Tokwemereire mu nteeraniro z'emihanda kumaraho abantu be abarikuhunga, kandi tokuhaireyo bantu be abahonokireho, aha izooba ri baareebeireho enaku." 
Obadiah1:15 Manya eizooba rya Nyakubaho ery'okufubira amahanga goona riri haihi kuhika. Nk'oku waagizire abandi, naiwe nikwo origirwa. Ebi waakozire biryakuhindukana." 
Obadiah1:16 Nk'oku mwanywereire aha rushozi rwangye orurikwera, n'amahanga goona agabeehinguririize nikwo garinywa. Buzimazima garyanywa, gataruze, haza gabe nk'agatakabahoga." 
Obadiah1:17 Kwonka aha Rushozi Siyooni haryabaho abarihonokaho, rube orurikwera; n'ab'omuryango gwa Yakobo bagarukane ebi baabaire banyagirwe." 
Obadiah1:18 Ab'omuryango gwa Yakobo baryaba omuriro, ab'ogwa Yosefu babe endimi zaagwo; reero ab'omuryango gwa Esau babe embuba. Haza babootsye, babamareho; habure owaahonokaho omu b'omuryango gwa Esau." 
Obadiah1:19 Abaanegebu baryakubuura Orushozi Esau, ab'omu ruhita rwa Shefeela bakubuure ensi y'Abafilisiti, bakubuure ensi ya Efuraimu n'eya Samariya, n'Abaabenyamiini bakubuure Gileadi." 
Obadiah1:20 Ab'omu ihe ry'Abaisiraeli, abaazaahiire Haala, baryakubuura Foinikiya, bahikye Zarefaati. N'aba Yerusalemu abaazaahiibwe abari omuri Sefaaradi, bakubuure endembo za Negebu." 
Obadiah1:21 Abajuni baryatemba Orushozi Siyooni kutegyeka Orushozi Esau, obugabe bube obwa Nyakubaho." 
Jonah1:1 Nyakubaho akagambira Yona mwene Amitaayi ati: 
Jonah1:2 Imuka oze Nineeve, orwo rurembo ruhango, orurangire ebirirubaho, ahabw'okuba ebibi by'abantu baarwo mbimanyire." 
Jonah1:3 Kwonka Yona akaimuka kuza Tarushiishi kuhungirayo Nyakubaho. Yaashuuma, yaahika Yopa, yaashangayo emeeri erikuza Tarushiishi, yaaha empiiha z'okumutwara omu meeri kugyenda nabo Tarushiishi, kuhungirayo Nyakubaho." 
Jonah1:4 Kwonka Nyakubaho egyo nyanja yaagyoherereza omuyaga mwingi, yaagiteeza eihunga ry'amaani, emeeri yaayenda kusheenyagurika." 
Jonah1:5 Ekyo kyareetera abarimbi kutiina, buri omwe yaatakira ruhanga we; n'ebyabaire biri omu meeri baabinaga omu nyanja, ngu ekaayanguhirwa. Yona we obwo akaba yaagiire omu kicweka ky'endugu y'egyo meeri, abyami, ayegwejegyereire." 
Jonah1:6 Omukuru w'emeeri nikwo kwija, akamugira ati: Iwe mugwejegyezi we, obaire ota? Imuka otakire ruhanga waawe! Shana akaatwijuka." 
Jonah1:7 Reero baagambirana bati: Nimwije tuteere enteenyu, tubone kumanya owaatureetera kuguubwaho aka kabi. Batyo bateera enteenyu, ekwata Yona." 
Jonah1:8 Bwanyima bamubuuza bati: Tugambire owaatureetera kuguubwaho aka kabi. Okora murimo ki? Kandi noorugahi? Owaanyu ni nkahi? Kandi ori owa ihanga ki? 
Jonah1:9 Nawe abagarukamu ati: Ndi Omuheburaayo, ndamya Mukama Ruhanga ow'omu iguru owaahangire enyanja n'ensi." 
Jonah1:10 Abantu nikwo kwongyera kutiina munonga, bakamugira bati: Mbwenu ekyo okozire ki? Manya bakamanya ku arikuhunga Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba akaba yaakibagambiire." 
Jonah1:11 Bwanyima abarimbi bakabuuza Yona bati: Mbwenu tukugire tuta, enyanja ekabona kutuuza, tukakira? Manya enyanja ekaba neeyeyongyera kutabanguka." 
Jonah1:12 Nawe abagarukamu ati: Nimunkirize, munnagye omu nyanja, ebone kutuuza, mukire, ahabw'okuba nimmanya ku niinye naabareetera kuteerwa eri ihunga ringi." 
Jonah1:13 Hoona abo bashaija baavuga munonga emeeri kugihitsya aha nkungu, kwonka baaremwa, ahabw'okuba enyanja ekaguma neeyeyongyera kubatabangukira." 
Jonah1:14 Ekyarugiremu, baatakira Nyakubaho bati: Ai Nyakubaho, nitukweshengyereza, otatureka tukahwerekyerera ahabw'ogu mushaija, kandi otatutura okwita omuntu otaine rubanja; ahabw'okuba, ai Nyakubaho, niiwe waakora eki orikusiima." 
Jonah1:15 Batyo bakiriza Yona bamunaga omu nyanja; nayo erekyera aho okuhinduriza. 
Jonah1:16 Abo bantu baatiinira kimwe Nyakubaho, baamutambira ekitambo kandi baahiga kuguma nibamuheereza." 
Jonah1:17 Reero Nyakubaho yaaragiira ekyenyanja rutaaba kumira Yona. Yona yaamara omu nda yaakyo ebiro bishatu nyomushana na nyekiro. 
Jonah2:1 Bwanyima Yona ari omu nda y'ekyo kyenyanja, ashaba Mukama Ruhanga we ati:" 
Jonah2:2 Ai Nyakubaho nkakutakira nyine enaku, wangarukamu, nkataka ndi omu nda y'Okuzimu owa Nyamuteza, wampurira." 
Jonah2:3 Manya okannaga omu maizi g'engyezi, ahagati y'enyanja, omwegyemure gwanyehinguririza, ebingonzi byawe by'amaani byona byandengyeraho." 
Jonah2:4 Naagira nti: Mbwenu reero naacuubwa omu maisho gaawe. Nyaruju yaawe erikwera ndyagireeba nta obundi? 
Jonah2:5 Amaizi ganshwekire, engyezi enyehinguririize, Amarebe gaanyezingiriire omu mutwe; omu mizi y'enshozi." 
Jonah2:6 Nshuumire naaza omu nsi ei empimbi zaayo zinkingiraniire kimwe; kwonka, ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye, amagara gangye ogatuuhwire okuzimu omu kiina." 
Jonah2:7 Ku naagwire enshazi, naakwijuka Iwe Nyakubaho, okushaba kwangye kwakuhikaho omuri Nyaruju yaawe erikwera." 
Jonah2:8 Abaramya ebishushani bitaine muhoho, baba batakiri beesigwa hariiwe." 
Jonah2:9 Kwonka nyowe ndyakutambira ekitambo ky'okukusiima. Eki naakuragaanisa nkihikiiriza; ahabw'okuba, ai Nyakubaho, niiwe ojuna." 
Jonah2:10 Nyakubaho atyo aragiira ekyenyanja, kitanaka Yona aha nkungu." 
Jonah3:1 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akagambira Yona obwa kabiri ati: 
Jonah3:2 Imuka oze Nineeve orurembo orwo oruhango orurangirire ebi ndikukutuma. 
Jonah3:3 Yona atyo aimuka, aza Nineeve nk'oku Nyakubaho yaamugambira. Reero Nineeve ekaba eri orurembo ruhango, orurikugyenderwa ebiro bishatu kurucwekanisa." 
Jonah3:4 Yona atandika kugyendagyenda omuri orwo rurembo, arenzya eizooba naayamuza ati: Hatsigaire ebiro makumi ana, Nineeve ecwekyerezibwe!" 
Jonah3:5 Aba Nineeve baikiriza eki Ruhanga yaabagambira, baarangirira okwesiibyakwo, baajwara ebiguniya, okwiha aha mukuru okuta aha muto." 
Jonah3:6 Bwanyima enkuru yaahika omugabe wa Nineeve. Nawe yaimuka aha kitebe kye ky'obugabe, yaajuura bushuuti, yaajwara ebiguniya, yaashutama omu iju." 
Jonah3:7 Yaakora ekirangiriro, yaakibuzya omuri Nineeve ati: Ahabw'ekiragiro ky'omugabe n'abakungu be hatagira omuntu nari amatungo g'obusyo bw'ente nari obw'entaama, ebyaroza aha kintu. Bitagira eki byarya, nobu kwakuba okunywa amaizi;" 
Jonah3:8 kureka abantu boona n'ebitungaanwa byona bijwekwe ebiguniya, biboroogyere Ruhanga. Kandi buzimazima buri muntu arekye emitwarize ye emibi, n'eby'obwinazi ebi arikukora." 
Jonah3:9 Mbwenu n'oha orikumanya ngu Ruhanga takaayegarukamu, akarekyera aho ekiniga kye ekingi, tukareka kufa." 
Jonah3:10 Ruhanga ku yaareebire ebi bakozire, n'oku barekire emitwarize yaabo emibi, nawe yaayegarukamu, yaareka ekifubiro ky'akabi eki yaabaire amaramaize kubaha, tiyaakibaha." 
Jonah4:1 Ekyo kikagwisa kubi Yona munonga, yaagira ekiniga." 
Jonah4:2 Yaashaba Nyakubaho ati: Ai Nyakubaho, eki tikyo naagambire, obu naabaire nkiri owaitu? Tikyo kyandahukiise kuhungira Tarushiishi? Ahabw'okuba nkamanya ku ori Ruhanga ow'embabazi, orikusaasira, otarahuka kuguubwa kubi, oshaagaine rukundo etahararuka, kandi oyegarukamu okutakora kabi." 
Jonah4:3 Mbwenu nu, ai Nyakubaho, ninkweshengyereza, onyite. Haakiri nfe, okukira okugumaho." 
Jonah4:4 Nyakubaho amugarukamu ati: Ebyo ohikire okugira ekiniga? 
Jonah4:5 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Yona yaaruga omuri orwo rurembo, yaashutama aha rubaju rwarwo orw'oburugwa-izooba, yaayeyombekyerayo akasanga, yaakashutamamu okuhitsya ahu araareebere oku orurembo ruraabe." 
Jonah4:6 Reero Mukama Ruhanga yaamezaho ekishogashoga, yaakiragiira kutaaguruza amataagi eruguru ya Yona, ngu kibone kumusangira aha mutwe, kumutambira okutaba gye. Yona yaashemererwa munonga ahabw'ekyo kishaka." 
Jonah4:7 Kwonka eizooba ryakuratsireho, omushekye ku gwajugutsire, Ruhanga yaaragiira akakooko, kaarya ekyo kishaka, kyayoma." 
Jonah4:8 Eizooba ku ryaturukire, Ruhanga yaaragiira omuyaga gwa burugwa-izooba ogurikubabura, omushana gwateera Yona omu mutwe, yaabura kakye kugwa enshazi. Yaayetenga okufa. Yaagira ati: Haakiri nfe, okukira okugumaho." 
Jonah4:9 Kwonka Ruhanga yaamugira ati: Ebyo ohikire kugira ekiniga ahabw'ekishaka? Onu amugarukamu ati: Ninkora gye okugira ekiniga, nangwa n'eky'okuunyita." 
Jonah4:10 Reero Nyakubaho amugira ati: Ku oraabe waagirira esaasi ekishaka eki otahendyekyeire, eki otamerize, ekimezire nyekiro, kikooma omu kindi kiro;" 
Jonah4:11 mbwenu nyowe tinkugiriire saasi Nineeve orurembo ruhango, orurimu abantu akasiriira kamwe n'obukumi bubiri, abatarikumanya kutaanisa endyo n'emosho, kandi orurimu amatungo maingi?" 
Micah1:1 Eki n'ekigambo kya Nyakubaho eki yaagambiire Miika owa Moresheeti, omu busingye bwa Yotamu, Ahazi na Hezekiya abagabe ba Yuda, eki Nyakubaho yaamushuururiire aha bikwatiraine na Samariya na Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:2 Imwe bantu 'mwe mwena, nimuhurire; naiwe nsi na byona ebigirimu, nimutegye okutu; haza Mukama Ruhanga abe niwe yaabashinja, naayema omuri Nyaruju ye erikwera." 
Micah1:3 Manya reeba, Nyakubaho naija kuruga omu mwanya gwe, ahuume, aribatiirire emyanya y'omu nsi etunguukire." 
Micah1:4 Ahu ariraba, enshozi ziryayaga, nk'oku entsinda eyagira aha muriro; n'empanga ziryagangabuka, zikukumbukye nk'amaizi garikuhimintikira aheecurikire." 
Micah1:5 Ebyo byona biryareetwa ekicumuro kya Yakobo, n'ebibi by'ab'omuryango gwa Isiraeli. Beitu ekicumuro kya Yakobo ni kiiha? Ti Samariya? Kandi ekibi ky'ab'omuryango gwa Yuda ni kiiha? Ti Yerusalemu?" 
Micah1:6 Nikyo Samariya ndigihindurira eitongo ry'omu bwerere, ebe omwanya gw'okubyaramu emizaabibu; amabaare gaayo ngaate omu ruhanga, nyeruure emisingi yaayo;" 
Micah1:7 mpondagure ebishushani byayo byona, nyotsye ebi baguriirira baamaraaya baayo byona; kandi ncwekyereze ebishushani byayo ebirikuramibwa. Manya ekabiiha omu bi baguriirira baamaraaya baayo, kandi biryagaruka bibe eby'okubaguriirira." 
Micah1:8 Ekyo nikyo kirindeetera kutonzya, nkacura, nkagyenda ntaine nkaito mu bigyere, njwaire busha, nkakunga nka zaamuha kandi nkagongyeera nka zaamaaya." 
Micah1:9 Ahabw'okuba obuhuta bwa Samariya tibw'okukira. Buhutaize na Yuda, bwahika ahari buri rurembo rw'abantu bangye n'ahari Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:10 Mutakigamba omuri Gaati. Mutarira n'akakye; kureka mwekuringye omu mucuucu omuri Beteleafura. 
Micah1:11 Imwe batuuzi ba Shafiri 'mwe, nimurabeho mujwaire busha, mwitsirwe enshoni. Abatuuzi ba Zaanani tibakaayehanga kushohora. N'aba Betezeeli abarikuborooga, tibaakibaasa kubaha mikono." 
Micah1:12 Manya abatuuzi ba Marooti bategyereize n'ekihika okutambirwa; ahabw'okuba Mukama ayohereize akabi, kaahikira kimwe aha irembo rya Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:13 Imwe batuuzi ba Lakishi 'mwe, nimukomere ebigaari aha mbaraasi. Manya niimwe mwabandiize Siyooni kucumura; ahabw'okuba niimwe mwashangirwemu ebicumuro bya Isiraeli." 
Micah1:14 Nikyo oriheera aba Moreshetigaati ebiconco by'okutaana; ab'omuryango gwa Akizibu bakaba ab'okugobeza abagabe ba Isiraeli. 
Micah1:15 Naimwe abatuuzi ba Mereesha, ndyagaruka mbareetere ow'okubasingura; ekitiinwa kya Isiraeli kihikye Adulaamu." 
Micah1:16 Mushare amashokye gaanyu, mwemwe enkomborora, ahabw'abaana baanyu abu murikukunda. Mwemwe enkomborora nk'ey'ebihuhurabahuta, ahabw'okuba n'ab'okubarugaho, bakazaahibwa." 
Micah2:1 Ebishi baryakareeba abacuma enaama mbi, bakabyama aha bitanda byabo nibateekateeka oku baraakore eby'obwinazi! Haza omushekye gukijuguta, bakabikora; ngu ahabw'okuba baine obushoboorozi bw'okubikora." 
Micah2:2 Beetenga ebibanja by'abandi, babihamba, bataho n'okunyaga amaju. Bahata omuntu n'ab'eka ye, batwara omuntu n'ebi atungire." 
Micah2:3 Nikyo Nyakubaho arikugirira ati: Reeba, nincumira oru ruganda enaama y'okurureetaho akabi, aku mutaribaasa kwihamu ebitsya byanyu. Kandi timurigyenda nimwekunika, ahabw'okuba buryaba buri obunaku bw'akabi." 
Micah2:4 Obunaku ku burihika, baryabagambaho oku mwahikiriirwe, beeshongore ekyeshongoro ky'obwehwa mantsiko bwanyu bati: Twakiirwe kimwe ebyaitu byona. Ensi y'abantu baitu bagicwiremu ebicweka, baagibagana. Tihariho oraagibagarurire, ahabw'okuba ebibanja byaitu Nyakubaho abigabiire abaatukwatsire." 
Micah2:5 Nikyo omu bantu ba Nyakubaho muriburira ow'okubabaganisiza eitaka n'omugoye, naabateerera enteenyu." 
Micah2:6 Abantu bagambisibwa nibagira bati: Otagambira eryo, omuntu tashemereire kurangirira ebintu nk'ebyo; ahabw'okuba titurikwija kuhemuka." 
Micah2:7 Imwe ab'omuryango gwa Yakobo, ekyo kikaagambirwe? Mutima wa Nyakubaho takiine kugumisiriza? Mbwenu ebyo niwe arikubikora? Ebigambo byangye tibirikugasira oine emitwarize ehikire?" 
Micah2:8 Kwonka nimwimuka kurwanisa abantu bangye nk'abazigu. Abaine obusingye, abarikuhingura n'obwesigye, bataine kiteekateeko ky'okurwana, mubaaka eminagiro yaabo." 
Micah2:9 Abakazi b'abantu bangye mubabinga omu maju gaabo agu barikukunda; abaana baabo abato mubaihiraho kimwe ekitiinwa ki naabahaire. 
Micah2:10 Nimwimukye mugyende! Manya ogu ti mwanya gw'okuhuumuriramu; ahabw'okuba ebihagaro bi murikukora nibigureetera okucwekyerera. 
Micah2:11 Omuntu ku yaakugyendagyenda naagamba ebitaine muhoho n'ebishuba ati: Ka mbarangire ebya viino n'eby'amakuuta, niwe yaakuba omurangi w'aba bantu!" 
Micah2:12 Imwe aba Yakobo, buzimazima mwena ndyabarundaana. Ndyarundaana aba Isiraeli abaatsigaireho; babe nk'entaama eziri omu ruhimbi rwazo; nari nk'obusyo oburi omu iriisizo ryabwo, bateere akaari ahabw'obwingi bw'abantu." 
Micah2:13 Orikusheenya ah'okuraba aryabeebembera. Baataguze, barabe omu irembo nibashohora. Omugabe waabo arabeho, abaze omu maisho, Nyakubaho abeebembeire." 
Micah3:1 Mbwenu nkagira nti: Imwe bakuru b'aba Yakobo, n'abategyeki ba Isiraeli, nimuhurire! T'ekyanyu okumanya obwinganisa?" 
Micah3:2 Imwe abanga ebirungi, mukakunda ebibi, abaiha aha bantu bangye oruhu, mukoonoora enyama aha magufa gaabo!" 
Micah3:3 Abarya enyama y'omubiri gw'abantu bangye, mukababaagaho oruhu, mukabacwagacwagura amagufa, mukabatematema nk'enyama y'okuta omu rwabya, nari nk'enyama y'okuta omu nyungu eteeka." 
Micah3:4 Bwanyima baryatakira Nyakubaho, kwonka taribagarukamu. Omuri obwo bunaku aryabeehuzya, ahabw'okuba ebi bakozire ni bibi." 
Micah3:5 Oku nikwo Nyakubaho arikugamba ahariimwe abarangi, abarangirira obusingye mwaba muhairwe ekyokurya. Kwonka mukarangirira orugamba omuntu otaine ki yaabaha kutamira." 
Micah3:6 Nikyo kiribabeerera ekiro mukabura kworekwa; gukababeera omwirima, mukabura kuragura. Eizooba riryarengyera ahari abo barangi, na nyomushana ebairirimbire." 
Micah3:7 Abahanuuzi baryahemuka, n'abaraguzi babwerabwere. Boona bakwate aha munwa, ahabwa Ruhanga okutabagarukamu." 
Micah3:8 Kwonka nyowe nyijwire obushoboorozi na Mutima wa Nyakubaho n'obwinganisa n'amaani, kurangirira aba Yakobo ebicumuro byabo, n'aba Isiraeli ebibi byabo." 
Micah3:9 Nimuhurire imwe abakuru b'omuryango gwa Yakobo; naimwe abategyeki b'omuryango gwa Isiraeli, abangira kimwe eby'oburyo, mukakiikamya eby'obwinganisa." 
Micah3:10 Abombekyesa Siyooni eshagama y'abantu, na Yerusalemu ebitahikire." 
Micah3:11 Abakuru baayo bacwa emanja ahabw'enguzi, abahongyerezi baayo beegyesa ahabw'okuguriirirwa, n'abarangi baayo baragura ahabw'empiiha. Haza beegamira Nyakubaho nibagira bati: Nyakubaho tari muriitwe? Tihariho kabi karituhikaho." 
Micah3:12 Mbwenu ahabwanyu, nikyo Siyooni eritabirirwa nk'omusiri, Yerusalemu ekaba ekirundo ky'amatongo, orushozi rwa Nyaruju rukashwekwa ebishaka." 
Micah4:1 Kwonka omu biro ebiriija, obunaku buryahika, orushozi rwa Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ruhamibwe, rube orurikukira ezindi zoona aha mutwe; kandi rutunguurwe, rukire ebibungo byona, amahanga garuhimintikire." 
Micah4:2 Amahanga maingi garyaija, gagire gati: Nimwije twinamukye aha rushozi rwa Mukama, ahari Nyaruju ya Ruhanga wa Yakobo, atwegyese emitwarize ye tugikuratire. Manya omuri Siyooni nimwo eby'omu iteeka biriruga; n'omuri Yerusalemu hakarugamu ekigambo kya Mukama." 
Micah4:3 Aryaramura amahanga maingi; ashoboorore amahanga g'amaani aga haihi n'aga hare. Zaarurara zaabo baziheeshemu amafuka; n'amacumu gaabo baganaguremu empabyo. Eihanga rirekye kubangira rigyenzi ryaryo rurara, nobu kwakuba okugaruka kutendekwa eby'orugamba." 
Micah4:4 Kureka baryashutama buri muntu omu muzaabibu gwe n'omu mutiini gwe. Kandi tiharibaho n'omwe oribatiinisa, ahabw'okuba ekyo Mukama ow'amahe niwe yaakigamba." 
Micah4:5 Manya agandi mahanga goona gahurura nigeesiga ruhanga waago; kwonka itwe ebiro byona turyahurura nitwesiga Mukama Ruhanga waitu. 
Micah4:6 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Eryo izooba ndyateeranira hamwe abarema, ntaaruure abaabingirwe, n'abu naabonaboneise." 
Micah4:7 Omu barema nimwo ndiiha abaritsigaraho, n'omu bazaahiibwe nimwo ndiiha eihanga ry'amaani. Nyakubaho abategyekyere aha rushozi Siyooni, okwiha obwo okuhitsya ryari na ryari." 
Micah4:8 Naiwe munaara gw'obusyo we, ekibungo kya muhara wa Siyooni niiwe kirihikaho; obutegyeki bwa ira, obugabe bwa muhara wa Yerusalemu bugarukyeho." 
Micah4:9 Mbwenu nu, nooboroogibwa ki? Omuriiwe tiharimu mugabe? Omuhanuuzi waawe afiire, ngu obone kugira ebisha nk'omukazi orikurumwa?" 
Micah4:10 Iwe muhara wa Siyooni 'we, yenyogoore, otsinde nk'omukazi orikurumwa, ahabw'okuba hati ori ow'okuruga omu rurembo, okatuura omu nsi y'obwerere; okaza Babulooni. Okwo niyo orirokorerwa Nyakubaho akakucungura omu bazigu baawe abaakukwatsire." 
Micah4:11 Hati amahanga maingi gakuteeraniireho kukurwanisa nigagira gati: Ka tuhagaze Siyooni, haza tugishamaarire." 
Micah4:12 Kwonka tigarikumanya ebi Nyakubaho arikuteekateeka, nobu kwakuba okwetegyereza enaama ye; ku agarundaine nk'ebiba by'engano ebirunzirwe aha mbuga." 
Micah4:13 Mbwenu iwe muhara wa Siyooni, imuka ogahuure ahabw'okuba amahembe gaawe ndyagahindura ekyoma, ebinono byawe mbihindure omuringa; osheenyagure amahanga maingi, eminyago y'ebi gatungire ogimpongyere, nyowe Nyakubaho w'ensi yoona." 
Micah5:1 Mbwenu oyehinguririziibwe orugo, iwe kigo ky'amabaare 'we! Batugotsire. Omutegyeki wa Isiraeli nibamuteeza enkoni aha itama." 
Micah5:2 Kwonka iwe, Beetelehemu eya Efurata, orikuhereerukayo omu nganda za Yuda, omuriiwe nimwo hariruga orimbeera omutegyeki wa Isiraeli, ou obukomooko bwe buri obwa ira na ira, omu biro bya kare na kare." 
Micah5:3 Nikyo Nyakubaho aribaheerayo okuhitsya obu omukazi orikurumwa arizaara; ab'omuri beene ishe abariba batsigaireho bakabona kugaruka omu Baisiraeli. 
Micah5:4 Nawe aryahama, ariise obusyo bwe, aine amaani ga Nyakubaho, n'ekitiinwa kya Mukama Ruhanga we. Nabo baryatuura buhooro, ahabw'okuba aryaba mukuru okuhitsya aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Micah5:5 Kandi niwe ariba obusingye. Omuasiriya ku ariteera ensi yaitu, yaaribatiirira ebikaari byaitu, turyahuruza abariisa mushanju n'abategyeki munaana kumurwanisa." 
Micah5:6 Bategyekyese ensi ya Asiriya rurara; n'eya Nimuroodi bagitegyekyese na rurara esyoirweyo, kandi baryatujuna Omuasiriya ku ariteera ensi yaitu, yaarenga omwatano gwaitu." 
Micah5:7 Bwanyima aba Yakobo abariba batsigaireho, baryaba omu mahanga maingi nk'orume orurugire ahari Nyakubaho, nari nk'orutoonyerera rurikugwa aha bunyaatsi, batarikuta matsiko mu bantu, nari okugirira ekihika ebi abantu baraabakorere." 
Micah5:8 Kandi aba Yakobo abaritsigaraho baryaba omu mahanga ahagati y'amahanga maingi, nk'entare omu nyamaishwa z'omu kibira, nari nk'entare nto omu masyo g'entaama oku eba neegarabamu, ekagaribatiirira, ekagataagataagura, hakabura owaagajuna." 
Micah5:9 Oryabangira ababisha baawe omukono; omareho abazigu baawe boona. 
Micah5:10 Kandi eryo izooba ndyakumaraho embaraasi zaawe, ncwekyereze ebigaari byawe." 
Micah5:11 Ndyacwekyereza endembo z'omu nsi yaawe, n'ebigo byawe mbisheenyagure." 
Micah5:12 Ndyakumaraho eby'oburogo ebi okoresa, obure kugira abaraguzi obundi." 
Micah5:13 Ndyakumaraho ebishushani n'enyomyo ebi otuura oine, orekyere aho kuramya obundi ebi okoreise emikono yaawe." 
Micah5:14 Kandi ndyakuranduramu za Ashera zaawe, ncwekyereze endembo zaawe." 
Micah5:15 Reero nyine ekiniga na kashanga mpoore enzigu amahanga agataraanyorobeire. 
Micah6:1 Mbwenu nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikugamba; Mwimukye mwetonganire omu maisho g'enshozi, ebibungo bihurire ebi murikugamba." 
Micah6:2 Imwe nshozi 'mwe, naimwe emisingi y'ensi y'entuura, nimuhurire eki Nyakubaho arikutongana. Manya Nyakubaho naatonganisa abantu be, naahaahuuza Isiraeli ati:" 
Micah6:3 Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, mbwenu ndabaitsize ki? Ndabaruhize na ki? Nimungarukyemu!" 
Micah6:4 Manya nkabaiha omu nsi ya Misiri, naabacungura omu buhuuku, naabaha Musa na Arooni na Miriyamu kubeebembera." 
Micah6:5 Imwe bantu bangye 'mwe nimwijukye enaama ei Balaki omugabe wa Moabu yaagizire, n'eki Balaamu mwene Beori yaamugarukiremu, n'ebyabaireho okuruga Shitimu okuhika Giligaali, mubone kumanya ebi Nyakubaho yaakozire kubajuna." 
Micah6:6 Mbwenu ndeete ki omu maisho ga Mukama Ruhanga w'eiguru, nyizire kumuramya? Nyije omu maisho ge n'ebitambo bicwekize eby'enyana zihikize omwaka gumwe?" 
Micah6:7 Ebyo Nyakubaho naija kusiima empaya z'entaama enkumi n'enkumi, nari emigyera y'amajuta g'emioliva obukumi n'obukumi? Mpeyo omwana wangye w'omujigaijo ou naayezaariire, kukarabira ebicumuro byangye n'ebibi byangye?" 
Micah6:8 Iwe muntu 'we, manya Nyakubaho akworekire ekirungi. Mbwenu eki arikukwenza ni ki? T'okukora eby'obwinganisa, n'okugira rukundo etahararuka, n'okuguma oyebundikire omu maisho ga Ruhanga waawe?" 
Micah6:9 Eki n'eki Nyakubaho arikugambira orurembo n'eiraka rihango. Haza okumutiina n'eky'obwengye buhikire. Naarweta naagira ati: Iwe ruganda rwa Yuda we, n'abateeraniire omu rurembo, nimuhurire!" 
Micah6:10 Nimugira ngu nimbaasa kwebwa eitungo ribi eriri omu maju g'enyabibi n'endengo z'okuryangatanisa ezi nnyangira kimwe? 
Micah6:11 Ebyo ndyaiha orubanja aha muntu wa minzaani z'okuryangatanisa, n'oine enshaho z'amabaare g'okugobezesa?" 
Micah6:12 Abatungi baawe baijwire obubisha, n'abakutwiremu n'embeihi, endimi z'omu kanwa kaabo niziryarya." 
Micah6:13 Nikyo ntandikiire kukuteera, nkakuhindura enshoberwa, ninkutura ebibi byawe." 
Micah6:14 Oryarya, kwonka torihaaga, oryaguma oine enjara. Oryabiika, kwonka ebi oribiika tibirigumaho. N'ebi oriba oyetsigariize ndyabiitsa rurara." 
Micah6:15 Oryabiba, kwonka torigyesha. Oryanyuuka emioliva, kwonka toryesiiga majuta gaayo. Oryanyuuka emizaabibu, kwonka torinywa viino." 
Micah6:16 Manya okakuratira ebiragiro bya Omuri, n'emitwarize y'ab'omuryango gwa Ahabu; waaguma nookora ebi barikukuhabura. Nikyo ndikwija kukucwekyerereza, abakutwiremu bakaba ekigaaniizo, okaguma noogaywa amahanga." 
Micah7:1 Ai bambe! Naaba nk'omu kyanda, obu ebijuma biba bishoromirwe, n'emizaabibu ehumbirwe, hakabura omugimba gw'okurya, nobu kyakuba ekijuma ky'omutiini ekibandize kuhiisa, eki omutima gwangye gurikwetenga." 
Micah7:2 Manya omu nsi tihaakirimu muntu orikutiina Ruhanga, n'omu bantu tihaakirimu ohikire. Boona nibagwera ab'okwita, buri omwe naatega mwene ishe ekigoye." 
Micah7:3 Emikono yaabo n'enyabwangu y'okukora ekyetwa ekibi, kandi bakikora bakyezirikiire; omutegyeki n'omuramuzi bashaba enguzi, n'omuntu mukuru agamba butunu ekibi ki omutima gwe gurikwetenga. Nikwo bacwa batyo obwengye." 
Micah7:4 Omurungi omuribo ni nk'omukwatangwe, n'ohikire omuribo ni nk'orugo rw'amahwa. Mbwenu eizooba ry'okubafubira, eryarangirwe abarinzi baabo ryahika." 
Micah7:5 Muteesiga omutaahi, mutagira obwesigye ahari munywani waanyu. Kandi okwate akanwa, nangwa n'aha mukazi waawe ou ofumbata." 
Micah7:6 Ahabw'okuba omwojo naagaya ishe, omwishiki agomera nyina, omukazi muto ahakanisa nyinazaara. Manya abazigu b'omuntu baba ab'omu ka ye." 
Micah7:7 Kwonka nyowe amaisho ndyagahanga Nyakubaho. Ngume ntegyereize Ruhanga omujuni wangye; kandi Ruhanga wangye aryampurira. 
Micah7:8 Iwe muzigu wangye 'we, reka kuunyesiimirana. Manya nobu ndigwa, ndyaimuka. Ku ndishutama omu mwirima, Nyakubaho aryampwezesa." 
Micah7:9 Ndyayemera ekiniga kya Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba mucumwireho; okuhitsya obu arintonganira, akaanyihaho orubanja. Aryanshohoza, ampitsye aharikuhweza, ndeebe oku ajuna." 
Micah7:10 Obwo omuzigu wangye aryakireeba; n'owangizire ati: Mukama Ruhanga waawe arahi, aitwe enshoni. Ndyamureebesa ekiziizi, aribatiirirwe nk'ebyondo by'omu muhanda." 
Micah7:11 Eizooba ry'okugarurayo ebigo byawe riri haihi kuhika. Ahari eryo izooba emyatano y'ensi yaawe eryairizibwayo. 
Micah7:12 Eryo izooba abantu baawe baryakugarukira, nibaruga Asiriya n'omu ndembo za Misiri; okwiha Misiri okuta aha mugyera Eufuraati; okwiha aha nyanja okuta aha ndiijo, n'okwiha aha rushozi okuta aha rundi." 
Micah7:13 Kwonka ensi eryahinduka eihamba, ahabw'ebibi by'abagitwiremu." 
Micah7:14 Riisa abantu baawe n'enkoni yaawe; obusyo bwawe ahabwawe, abatuura bonka omu kibira, ahagati y'ensi erikweza. Obariisize omuri Bashani na Gileadi nk'omu biro bya ira." 
Micah7:15 Nk'omu biro bi waarugiiremu Misiri niinyija kubooreka eby'okutangaaza. 
Micah7:16 Amahanga gakireebe, haza gaitwe enshoni ahabw'amaani gaago. Engaro gazite aha munwa, amatu gagahenderemu ebiti." 
Micah7:17 Garigatse omucuucu nk'enjoka, n'eby'omu nsi ebigyendesa enda. Garyaija nigatetema, nigaruga omu bigo byago ebigumire, gakubuukire Mukama Ruhanga waitu, gaitsirwe obwoba, kandi gatiine ahabwawe." 
Micah7:18 Mbwenu ni Ruhanga ki oshushana naiwe, osaasira ebibi, ekeehuzya ebicumuro by'abantu be abaatsigaireho? Manya ebiro byona tagumya kiniga aha mutima, ahabw'okuba akunda kutworeka rukundo ye etahararuka." 
Micah7:19 Aryagaruka atugirire esaasi aribatiirire ebicumuro byaitu, abisiitagure. Ebibi byaitu byona aryabinaga okuzimu omu nyanja." 
Micah7:20 Oyorekye Yakobo ku ori omwesigwa, na Aburahamu ku omwiniire rukundo etahararuka; nk'oku waarahiire nookiraganisa baatatenkuriitwe okwiha omu biro bya ira." 
Nahum1:1 Eki n'ekitabo ky'ebi Nahumu owa Elukooshi yaayorekirwe, akabihanuura ahari Nineeve." 
Nahum1:2 Nyakubaho ni Ruhanga w'eihato, ahoora enzigu. Nyakubaho ahoora kandi agira ekiniga kingi. Nyakubaho ahoora ababisha be, n'abazigu be aguma abainiire ekiniga kingi." 
Nahum1:3 Nyakubaho tarahuka kuguubwa kubi, agira obushoboorozi bwingi, kandi taiha rubanja aha muntu orwine. Agyendera omu muyaga gw'akasooroora n'eihunga; ebicu biba omucuucu ogwimukibwa ebigyere bye." 
Nahum1:4 Ku akabukira enyanja, eyoma; kandi ayomya emigyera yoona, Bashani na Karumeeli bihotoka, ebirabyo bya Lebanooni bihonga." 
Nahum1:5 Enshozi zitengyeetera omu maisho ge, n'ebibungo biyaga. Nyakubaho ku aboneka, ensi ehinduka busha; ensi yoona n'abagitwiremu bitetema." 
Nahum1:6 Mbwenu n'oha owaakwemera ekiniga kye? N'oha owaakugumira kashanga ye? Ekiniga kye kibuguma nk'omuriro, enkiri zishatagurikira omu maisho ge." 
Nahum1:7 Nyakubaho ni murungi. Aba ekigo kigumire aha izooba ry'akabi, kandi amanya abamuhungiraho." 
Nahum1:8 Kwonka ababisha be aryabamariraho kimwe n'omwegyemure gurikuhimintika n'amaani; abazigu be ababingye abahitsye omu mwirima. 
Nahum1:9 Ni naama ki embi ei murikugirira Nyakubaho? Aryamariraho kimwe abazigu be, atagarukire kubahoora kabiri." 
Nahum1:10 Baryayokibwa nk'amahwa gakwataine, nari nk'ebikonko byomire." 
Nahum1:11 Mbwenu shi, owaagiiriire Nyakubaho omu naama mbi, akahabura abantu okukora ekibi tararugire omuriiwe Nineeve?" 
Nahum1:12 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Abaasiriya nobu baraabe bari ab'amaani kandi baingi, baryacwekyerezibwa, bahweho. Kwonka imwe bantu bangye, nobu ndaabe naababonaboneise, tindibabonabonesa bundi." 
Nahum1:13 Mbwenu niinyija kuhenda omugamba gu Omuasiriya akuhingamiize, ncwe enjegyere z'akuboheise." 
Nahum1:14 Eki nikyo Nyakubaho aragiire ahariiwe naagira ati: Eiziina ryawe tiririguma nirihungurwa, kandi omu ndaaro ya baaruhanga baawe ndyamaramu ebishushani bisharwirwe n'ebiheesirwe, ebirikuramibwa. Ndyakurimira ekituuro, ahabw'okuba toine mujamo." 
Nahum1:15 Reeba, entumwa neereetana omu nshozi, neerangirira amakuru marungi eti: Obusingye! Mbwenu imwe aba Yuda, mugume mugire amagyenyi gaanyu, muhikiirize ebi mwahigiire Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba enyabibi tiziribarwanisa bundi, zicwekyerereziibwe kimwe." 
Nahum2:1 Omucwekyerezi yaahurura kukurwanisa. Ta abarinzi aha bigo, orinde emihanda. Yezirikye, oyeteere ebinyomyo." 
Nahum2:2 Manya Nyakubaho naagaruraho ekitiinwa ky'aba Yakobo; nikyo kitiinwa ky'Abaisiraeli. Ahabw'okuba abanyagi bakaaya emizaabibu yaabo, baakonkobora amataagi gaayo." 
Nahum2:3 Engabo z'amamanzi ge nizitukurikana, abarwani be bajwaire ebya karari. Ebigaari ebitengire orugamba nibimurinkana nk'endimi z'omuriro, ab'ahambaraasi nibakangaza." 
Nahum2:4 Ebigaari by'orugamba nibirigitira omu nguuto. Nibisyoka nibikora oku n'oku omu nteeraniro z'emihanda. Nibimurinkana nk'emuri, bisyoka nk'omurabyo." 
Nahum2:5 Abakungu nibahuruzibwa, bagyenda nibateera entsibo. Nibeehuuta kuza aha kigo, bataho eby'okwekingiza." 
Nahum2:6 Amarembo g'aha mugyera nigaigurwa, ab'omu kikaari ky'omugabe nibahahaara omutima." 
Nahum2:7 Mugore waakyo bamucwijwire, baamunyaga; abaranga be nibacura nibatonzya, nibahuuma nk'enkombe, nibemaamaata." 
Nahum2:8 Aba Nineeve nibarigita nk'amaizi garikuruga omu mucungiro gwahiguka. Nibeeta nibaamuza bati: Mwemerere, mwemerere; kwonka habura owaareeba enyima." 
Nahum2:9 Nimunyagye efeeza, nimunyagye ezaabu; ahabw'okuba eby'obuguzi bwingi ebi oru rurembo rutungire ti by'okuhwaho." 
Nahum2:10 Ebishi yaayeshobera! Ebishi yaashenyuka, yaaba amatongo! Emitima ebahwaire omunda, nibatetema amaju. Boona obusaasi bubacwire omugongo. Boona baine akeera aha maisho." 
Nahum2:11 Enyanga y'entare erahi? Eryaya ry'entare nto rirahi, ahu entare ereetera ebishore byayo eki yaita, hataine orikubiteeza?" 
Nahum2:12 Entare etaanyaguririza ebishore byayo eby'okubihaazya Eniganigira enkazi zaayo eki yaakwata. Eijuza enyanga zaayo ebi eitsire; n'amaaya gaayo egaijuza enyama zi etaanyagwize. 
Nahum2:13 Mukama w'amahe naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kukurwanisa. Niinyija kwotsya ebigaari bwawe bicumbuukye omwika, rurara emareho entare zaawe ento; eminyago yaawe ngimare omu nsi, n'eiraka ry'entumwa zaawe rirekye kuhurirwa obundi." 
Nahum3:1 Ebishi oru rurembo rurikusheesha eshagama y'abantu, rwona rwijwire ebishuba n'eminyago, oru okunyaga kwarwo kutaine bugarukiro, ruryakareeba!" 
Nahum3:2 Okukwaya kw'eminyaafu n'endigito y'enyamuziga, emitsindo y'embaraasi n'okubomborekana kw'ebigaari by'orugamba!" 
Nahum3:3 Ab'aha mbaraasi nibasyoka kurwana, zaarurara nizityankana, amacumu nigamurinkana. Enyanja y'abantu eitsirwe, emitumbi etarikubaasa kubarwa etungamiraine!" 
Nahum3:4 Ebyo byona bireetsirwe obwamaraaya obwo oburengyesereize, obw'okurigirwa kandi oine oburogo burikwita. Oreebya amahanga n'obwamaraaya bwe, akarogyesa enganda amarogo ge." 
Nahum3:5 Nyakubaho ow'amahe naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kukurwanisa, mpenuure ekipumpuriya kyawe, kihikye aha maisho; haza ndekye amahanga gakureebe ojwaire busha, n'ensi z'obugabe zireebe enshoni zaawe." 
Nahum3:6 Nkuteere ebihagaro, nkugayise, nkuhindure eky'okushamaarirwa." 
Nahum3:7 Reero boona abarikunagaho eriisho bakuhungye, nibagira bati: Nineeve k'ecwekire amatongo. Mbwenu n'oha oraagicurire? Nyihe hi ab'okugiyaagira?" 
Nahum3:8 Noogira ngu noohita Tebesi, eyaabaire eri aha rubaju rwa Nailo eyehinguririziibwe amaizi, ekigo kyayo kiri enyanja, n'ekisiika kyayo kiri amaizi?" 
Nahum3:9 Etiopiya na Misiri zikaba ziri amaani gaarwo agataine bugarukiro, Abapuuti n'Abalibiya nibaruha emikono." 
Nahum3:10 Kwonka abaamwo bakatwarwa, baaba enkwatwa; abaana baarwo baateerwa aha nsi baacwagacwagurikira omu nteeraniro z'emihanda, abantu baarwo ab'ekitiinwa abaabakwatsire baabateerera enteenyu; n'abakuru baarwo boona baababohesa enjegyere." 
Nahum3:11 Naiwe nu, oryasinda, oshoberwe, osherure ah'okuhungira abazigu." 
Nahum3:12 Ebigo byawe byona ni nk'emiti y'emitiini eriho ebijuma bibandize kuhiisa, ei omuntu atengyeetsa bikamugwa omu kanwa." 
Nahum3:13 Reeba engabo zaawe ezi oine ni nk'abakazi. Amarembo g'ensi yaawe abazigu nibagarabamu nk'oku barikwenda. Omuriro gwokize empimbi z'amarembo gaawe. 
Nahum3:14 Yetahire amaizi agaraakutambire ogotsirwe, gumya ebigo byawe, ragara omu ibumba, okaate obudongo, okwate eby'okubumbisa amatafaari." 
Nahum3:15 Okwo niyo omuriro guraakwokyeze, okaitwa rurara, ekakuhwerekyereza nk'enzigye. Yekanyise nk'enzigye. Yekanyise nk'eseenene." 
Nahum3:16 Okakanyisa abashuubuzi baawe, baakira enyonyoozi z'omu iguru. Mbwenu baagyenda nk'enzigye oku zishashaanura amapapa gaazo, zikaguruka zikagyenda." 
Nahum3:17 Abategyeki baawe ni nk'eseenene. Abakuru b'amahe gaawe ni nk'omuzinga gw'enzigye eziteekama aha rugo aha izooba ry'embeho, omushana gukijwa zikaguruka, zikagyenda, omuntu atamanye ei zaaza." 
Nahum3:18 Iwe mugabe wa Asiriya 'we, abariisa baawe bagwejegyeire, abakungu baawe nibahungira. Abantu baawe bataataaniire omu nshozi tihaine w'okubataaruura." 
Nahum3:19 Obusaasi bwawe ti bw'okutuuba, obuhuta bwawe n'obw'okukwita. Boona abarikuhurira ebyawe bateera omu ngaro nibakwesiimirana. Mbwenu n'oha otakahikirweho obushaarizi bwawe obutahwa?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Ebi n'eby'okuragura ebi omurangi Habakuuku yaayorekirwe Ruhanga. 
Habakkuk1:2 Ai Nyakubaho, ndyahitsya hi okukutakira ngu ompwere, okanga kumpurira? Nari okukutakira ahabw'okwitwa kubi, otanjune?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Ahabw'enki nondeebesa ebitahikire, nkareeba enaku? Okucwekyerera n'obubisha bindi omu maisho, entongane n'empaka ziri aha iguru." 
Habakkuk1:4 Nikyo eiteeka ririkwegandirwaho, emanja zikareka kucuubwa omu buryo. Manya enyabibi zeehinguririize abahikiriire, nikyo emanja z'oburyo zirikwitirwa." 
Habakkuk1:5 Nimunagye amaisho omu mahanga, mureebe, mutangaare, kandi mute engaro aha munwa. Manya omu biro byanyu ninkora omurimo ogu mutarikwikiriza, nobu baakugubagambira." 
Habakkuk1:6 Reeba, niinyimutsya Abakaludaaya, eihanga enshaarizi kandi eririkubakuka, abarikuhurura bakabuga ensi yoona kukubuura amaka gatari gaabo." 
Habakkuk1:7 Nibatiinisa, kandi nibaitsa obwoba. Nibo barikweshoboororera eby'oburyo, bakeeha n'obukuru." 
Habakkuk1:8 Embaraasi zaabo nizikiza engwe amaguru, kandi nizishaarira okukira emishega y'omu mwabazyo. Abazitembire nibazikinisa n'eigundu. Buzimazima abazitembire nibaruga hare, kandi nibaguruka nk'eishamba ririkusyoka kuteera eki riraashonshomere." 
Habakkuk1:9 Boona nibareetwa okukora eby'obubisha. Nibatiinisa abantu batakabahikire. Nibarunda enkwatwa nk'omusheenyi. 
Habakkuk1:10 Nibateerera abagabe enaku, bagaaniiza abategyeki. Buri kigo nibakishekyeerera, ahabw'okuba nibakirundaho eitaka, bakikwata." 
Habakkuk1:11 Bwanyima barabaho nk'omuyaga, bagyenda, abo bantu babi, abu amaani gaabo gari ruhanga waabo." 
Habakkuk1:12 Ai Mukama Ruhanga wangye Orikwera, tiiwe oba otahwaho ebiro byona? Titurikwija kufa. Ai Nyakubaho, obataireho kworeka eby'oburyo, kandi iwe Rukiri, waabahamya ku baba nibo baatufubira." 
Habakkuk1:13 Iwe ow'amaisho gashemeire, agatenda kureeba kibi; kandi agateemera kureeba ebitahikire, mbwenu ahabw'enki nooreeba abantu endeebya? Kandi omuntu enyabibi akiba naamira kwo orikumukiza okuhikiirira okeetsiza?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Manya abantu noobatwaza nk'ebyenyanja nari nk'ebirikugyendesa enda, ebitagira mutegyeki." 
Habakkuk1:15 Ogwo muntu abatuuhuuzisamu eirobo, abaihisamu akatimba ke, abarundaanira omu ntukuru ye; atyo ashemererwa, kandi ayesiima," 
Habakkuk1:16 Nikyo atambirira akatimba ke ebitambo, akooterera entukuru ye obubaani; ahabw'okuba nibyo bimwiniire omugasho." 
Habakkuk1:17 Mbwenu naija kuguma naafukunkura entukuru ye, naita amahanga ebiro byona ataine saasi?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Niinyija kwemerera kureeba, ngume aha munaara. Nnagye amaisho, ndeebe eki arangambire, n'eki ndaagarukyemu ahabw'ebi ndikutongyeza." 
Habakkuk2:2 Nyakubaho yangarukamu ati: Handiika ebi waayorekwa, obite gye aha bishate by'amabaare, birahukire orikubishoma." 
Habakkuk2:3 Manya ebi waayorekwa bikiine obunaku bwabyo. Kwonka n'eby'okubaho juba, kandi tibiribura kubaho. Nobu byakutuuraho, obitegyereze. Buzimazima biryaija, tibirikyerererwa." 
Habakkuk2:4 Reeba, abatahikiriire tibarigumaho; kwonka abahikiriire baryagira amagara ahabw'okwikiriza kwabo." 
Habakkuk2:5 Ekindi, viino eba bareebyana; omuntu w'amaryo tarigumaho. Omururu gwe ni muhango nk'Okuzimu owa Nyamuteza, ninka rufu etakahaagaga. Ayeteeraniraho amahanga goona. Ayeshangururiza enganda zoona nk'eze." 
Habakkuk2:6 Mbwenu abo boona tibarimugaya, bakamugaaniiza nibagira bati: Ebishi ogu muntu orundaana ebitari bye, aryakareeba! Mbwenu aryaherera hi? Ogwo oyerundaho emikwato!" 
Habakkuk2:7 Abu orikwihuza tibariimuka ekitaraariire, n'abarikutetemesa bakasisiimuka? Haza naiwe okaba omunyago gwabo!" 
Habakkuk2:8 Manya nk'oku waanyagire amahanga maingi, agandi goona agaatsigaireho naiwe garyakunyaga, gakuture eshagama y'abantu n'eby'obubisha ebi waakoreire ensi n'endembo n'abantu boona abazituuramu." 
Habakkuk2:9 Ebishi otungira eka ye amagoba mabi ngu akaatunguura ekyashuri kye kireka kuhikwaho akabi, aryakareeba!" 
Habakkuk2:10 Enaama ei waagizire kucwekyereza amahanga maingi, ehemwire ab'eka yaawe, waareebya amagara gaawe." 
Habakkuk2:11 Manya eibaare ry'omu kisiika riryakuteerera enduuru, omutambiko gw'omu rukanga gurigarukyemu." 
Habakkuk2:12 Omuntu oyombekyesa ekirorero eshagama, akatembuuza orurembo ebicumuro, aryakareeba!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Mbwenu eki tikirikuruga ahari Mukama ow'amahe abantu okuhendekyera omuriro, amahanga gakeeruhiza busha?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Manya ensi eryabugwa okumanya ekitiinwa kya Nyakubaho, nk'oku amaizi gabuga enyanja." 
Habakkuk2:15 Ogwo orikunywaisa bataahi be ekikopo ky'ekiniga kye, akabasinza ngu abone kureeba oku bajwaire busha, aryakareeba!" 
Habakkuk2:16 Omu mwanya gw'okuheebwa ekitiinwa, oryagaywa. Mbwenu iwe nywa, otaruze! Kwonka ekikopo kya Nyakubaho eky'omu mukono gwe gwa buryo kiryakuhikaho; ekitiinwa kyawe kihindukye enshoni." 
Habakkuk2:17 Eby'obubisha ebi waakoreire Lebanooni, biryakuhwerekyereza. Okucwekyereza enyamaishwa kwawe kuryakutiinisa, oturwe eshagama y'abantu, n'eby'obubisha ebi waakoreire ensi, n'endembo n'abantu boona abazitwiremu." 
Habakkuk2:18 Mbwenu ekishushani kirikuramibwa nikigasha ki, omukozi waakyo yaaheza kukibumburika? Ekyo kishushani ky'ekyoma ekyegyesa ebishuba! Mbwenu omunyamwoga orikukikora, aba naayesigira ki ekyo kishushani kitarikubaasa nangwa n'okugamba?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Ogwo orikugira ekiti ati: Sisiimuka; nari orikugira eibaare ritarikugamba ati: Imuka, aryakareeba! Mbwenu ebyo nibibaasa kugira eki byaragura? Reeba, bihumbikirwe ezaabu n'efeeza, kandi tibigira mwitsyo n'akakye." 
Habakkuk2:20 Kwonka Nyakubaho ari omuri Nyaruju ye erikwera. K'ab'omu nsi yoona bahuname omu maisho ge. 
Habakkuk3:1 Okushaba kw'omurangi Habakuuku omu iraka ry'orikucura. 
Habakkuk3:2 Ai Nyakubaho, mpuriire ebi barikukugambaho n'ebi okora, byantiinisa. Mbwenu omuri egi myaka garuka obikore; omuri egi myaka obyorekye. Kwonka nobu oraagire ekiniga kiniga, ijuka okugira embabazi." 
Habakkuk3:3 Ruhanga akaruga Temani, Orikwera ogwo yaaruga omu Rushozi Pirani. Ekitiinwa kye kikashweka eiguru, ensi yaijura eby'okumuhimbisa." 
Habakkuk3:4 Okumurinkana kwe kukaba nk'omushana, amaranzi gatyankana nigaruga omu ngaro ze. Okwo niyo yaasherekire amaani ge." 
Habakkuk3:5 Omuze gukamwebembera, kahumpuri yaamuza omu ntegye." 
Habakkuk3:6 Akeemerera, yaagyera ensi; yaanaga amaisho, yaatengyeetsa amahanga; enshozi ezituuraho zaataataana, ebibungo by'ebiro byona byabandama. Emitwarize ye yaaba nk'eya ira." 
Habakkuk3:7 Nkareeba amahema ga Kushani gaine obwoba, emikingo ya Midiyani neetetema." 
Habakkuk3:8 Ai Nyakubaho, obu waatemba embaraasi zaawe, okaza aha kigaari kyawe ky'obusinguzi, okaba oiniire emigyera kashanga, oiniire egyo migyera ekiniga? Nari okaba ogwereirwe kubi enyana?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Okashembuura obuta bwawe, waatamika emyambi. Ensi waagitamu emikura y'okurabwamu emitunga." 
Habakkuk3:10 Enshozi zikakureeba, zaayehinya, emyegyemure y'amaizi yaahimintika; okuzimu y'enyanja yaaranguuza eiraka, ebingonzi byayo byanaga emikono." 
Habakkuk3:11 Eizooba n'okwezi bikeemerera, byaguma omu myanya yaabyo, ahabw'okumurinkana kw'emyambi yaawe erikusyoka, n'ahabw'okurabya kw'eicumu ryawe eririkutyankana." 
Habakkuk3:12 Okagyenda nooraba omu nsi oine ekiniga kingi, waaribatiirira amahanga ogagwereirwe kubi." 
Habakkuk3:13 Okahurura kujuna abantu baawe, kujuna ou waasiigire amajuta. Waasingyeera omutwe gw'omuntu enyabibi, waamujweka busha okwiha aha bibero okuhitsya omu maraka." 
Habakkuk3:14 Okacumitsa emango zaawe emitwe y'abarwani be, abaizire nk'omuyaga gw'akasooroora kuntuntumura, obwo nibeesiima nk'abarikwenda kumariraho kimwe abooro bwesherekye." 
Habakkuk3:15 Okaribatiiriza enyanja embaraasi zaawe, amaizi gaayo maingi gaimukyeera," 
Habakkuk3:16 Ku mpuriire ebyo, omubiri gwangye gwona gwatetema, eminwa yaatengyeza ahabw'eryo iraka; obujunde bwantaaha omu magufa, amaguru gaajogajogoka. Mbwenu ntegyereize n'obucureezi obunaku kuhika, obu abarikuhurura kututeera baraareebereho enaku." 
Habakkuk3:17 Nobu emitiini eraabe etarikurabya, emizaabibu etariho bijuma, emioliva etarikwana, emisiri etarikwera byokurya, obusyo bw'entaama buhwaire omu itsibikiro, n'obw'ente buhwaire omu kibuga," 
Habakkuk3:18 kwonka niinyija kwesiimira omuri Nyakubaho, nshemerererwe omuri Ruhanga Omujuni wangye." 
Habakkuk3:19 Mukama Ruhanga niwe maani gangye. Ebigyere byangye abigira nk'eby'empara, angyendesa omu myanya yangye etunguukire. Eki n'eky'omukuru w'ebyeshongoro ebyeshongorerwa aha nanga z'emirya." 
Zephaniah1:1 Eki n'ekigambo kya Nyakubaho eki yaagambiire Zefaniya mwene Kuushi, mwijukuru wa Gedaliya, mwene Amariya ya Hezekiya, omu busingye bwa Yosiya mwene Amoni, omugabe wa Buyuda." 
Zephaniah1:2 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ndyamariraho kimwe omu nsi ekintu kyona. 
Zephaniah1:3 Ndyamariraho kimwe abantu n'enyamaishwa; mmarireho kimwe enyonyi z'omu mwanya, n'ebyenyanja by'omu mayanja. Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ndyacwekyereza ababi abarikuteeza entsibo, mmareho abantu boona omu nsi." 
Zephaniah1:4 Ndyabangira Yuda omukono n'abatwire omuri Yerusalemu boona. Mmare omuri ogu mwanya aba Baali abaatsigaireho. Mmareho abahongyerezi abarikuramya ebishushani," 
Zephaniah1:5 abaramiza amahe g'omu iguru aha mitwe y'amaju; abaramya Nyakubaho bakamurahira, kandi bakarahira Milikoomu." 
Zephaniah1:6 Kandi n'abaagarukire enyima bakareka kukuratira Nyakubaho, abatasherura Nyakubaho, nobu kwakuba okumwebuuzaho." 
Zephaniah1:7 Ceceka omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba eizooba rye riri haihi. Nyakubaho atebeekaniise ekitambo, yaayeza abagyenyi be." 
Zephaniah1:8 Reero aha izooba ry'ekitambo kyangye, Nyowe Nyakubaho ndyafubira abakungu, na batabani b'omugabe n'abantu boona abarikutooreza emicwe y'abanyamahanga." 
Zephaniah1:9 Kandi eryo izooba ndyafubira boona abarikwemurikira aha bitembezo bya Nyaruju, n'abaijuza ekikaari kya mukama waabo obubisha n'oburyangatanisa." 
Zephaniah1:10 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Eryo izooba enduuru eryahurirwa neeteererwa aha Irembo ry'Ebyenyanja, okuborooga nikureeterwa omu kirorero kisya ky'Orurembo, n'okubaruka kuhango nikuruga omu bibungo." 
Zephaniah1:11 Yaimwe batuuzi b'omu Kirorero kya Ifo, nimucure! Manya abashuubuzi boona tibaakiriho. Abarikurenga efeeza boona bahwerekyereziibwe." 
Zephaniah1:12 Omuri obwo bunaku ndyacaakisa Yerusalemu amatabaaza, nfubire abatarikuruga ha ibonde ry'eviino; abagira omu mitima yaabo bati: Nyakubaho taine ki araakore, yaaba kirungi nari kibi." 
Zephaniah1:13 Ebintu byabo biryanyagwa, amaju gaabo gacwekyerezibwe. Nobu barikwombeka amaju, tibarigataahamu. Nobu barikubyara emizaabibu, tibarinywa viino yaayo." 
Zephaniah1:14 Eizooba rya Nyakubaho erikuru riri haihi. Riri haihi, kandi nirirahuka munonga. Nimuhurire! Eizooba rya Nyakubaho n'ery'akabi. N'emanzi rugambwa eriboroogyeraho."
