Zephaniah1:15 Eryo izooba n'eizooba rya kashanga, eizooba ry'enaku n'obusaasi, ery'okucwekyereza n'okumariraho kimwe, ery'omwirima ndindindi." 
Zephaniah1:16 N'eizooba ry'okuteeraho enzamba y'akasirikiriro, n'enduuru y'orugamba kuteera endembo z'ebigo bigumire, n'eminaara miraingwa y'okwerindiramu." 
Zephaniah1:17 Ndyareetera abantu okweshobera, babandagire nk'empumi, ahabw'okuba bakancumuraho, Nyowe Nyakubaho. Eshagama yaabo eryayatwa nk'omucuucu, emibiri yaabo enagwe nk'amasha." 
Zephaniah1:18 Ahari eryo izooba rya kashanga ya Nyakubaho, efeeza zaabo nobu zaakuba ezaabu zaabo tiziribajuna; kureka ensi yoona eryamarwaho omuriro gwa kashanga ye ey'eihato. Buzimazima aryamariraho kimwe kitaraariire abatwire omu nsi boona." 
Zephaniah2:1 Imwe ab'eihanga ritaine nshoni 'mwe, nimwije muteeranire hamwe," 
Zephaniah2:2 mutakatuntumwirwe nk'ebishushunga, mutakahikirweho ekiniga kingi kya Nyakubaho n'eizooba rya kashanga ye ritakabahikireho." 
Zephaniah2:3 Imwe mwena ab'omu nsi abarikwebundika, abakora ebi Nyakubaho aragiira, nimumusherure, Mwitanire okuhikiirira, mwitanire okwebundika; obundi mukaasherekwa aha izooba ry'ekiniga kya Nyakubaho." 
Zephaniah2:4 Manya Gaaza eryatsigwaho, Ashikeloni ehindukye amatongo, aba Ashidoodi babingwe omu ihangwe, n'Aba Ekurooni barandurwe." 
Zephaniah2:5 Ebishi imwe abatwire aha mwegyeego gw'enyanja, ab'eihanga by'Abakereti, muryakareeba! Nyakubaho naabahayira naagira ati: Iwe Kanaani, ensi y'Abafilisiti, ndyakucwekyereza, okuhitsya obu hatarigira muntu weena otwire omuriiwe oritsigaraho." 
Zephaniah2:6 Naiwe mwegyeego gw'enyanja, oryacweka amariisizo agarimu amaka g'abariisa n'amatsibikiro g'entaama." 
Zephaniah2:7 Ogwo mwegyeego gw'enyanja guryakubuurwa ab'omuryango gwa Yuda abaritsigaraho, baguriisizemu, kandi omu mwabazyo babyame omu maju g'aba Ashikeloni. Manya Mukama Ruhanga waabo aryabataho omutima, abagarure aha buteeka." 
Zephaniah2:8 Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Mpuriire ebigaaniizo by'Abamoabu n'ebijumo by'aba Amoni, oku bagaaniirize abantu bangye, bakeehimbisa ku barikwija kukubuura ensi yaabo." 
Zephaniah2:9 N'ahabw'ekyo Moabu aryaba Sodoma, aba Amoni babe nka Gomora, ensi emazirweho ebicuragyenyi n'ebiihiro by'omwonyo, ebeere kimwe eihamba ebiro byona. Abantu bangye abaritsigaraho baryabanyaga; n'ab'eihanga ryangye abarihonokaho babakubuure." 
Zephaniah2:10 Ogwo nigwo guriba omugabo gu barizimuurirwa ahabw'amaryo gaabo; ahabw'okuba bakateerera enaku abantu ba Mukama ow'amahe, baabeesiimirana." 
Zephaniah2:11 Nikyo Nyakubaho aribatiinisiza munonga; akamaraho baaruhanga boona ab'omu nsi, ensi zoona ez'omu mahanga zikamuramya, buri emwe ekamuramiza owaayo." 
Zephaniah2:12 Naimwe aba Etiopiya 'mwe, ndyabaitsa rurara." 
Zephaniah2:13 Reero aryabangira ab'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho omukono, acwekyereze Asiriya, Nineeve agihindure eitongo, ekarangatane nk'eirungu." 
Zephaniah2:14 Amasyo g'ente garyagihendamu enkokora, enyamaishwa zoona n'ebihuhurabahuta n'ebinyogote biraare omu bisheenyuka by'enyomyo zaayo. Ebihihizi bitsindire omu madirisa gaayo, ebikoona bigambire omu marembo; ahabw'okuba embaaho zaayo za kaarwenda ziryayeruuka." 
Zephaniah2:15 Orwo nirwo rurembo ruri, orwabaire rwehimbisa ruri buhooro; nirwegira ruti: Niinye ndiho, tihariho ondiijo. Ebishi ruhindukire eitongo, rwaba oburaaro bw'enyamaishwa. Orikururabaho weena ayeshaanya, aruha mutinzi." 
Zephaniah3:1 Oru rurembo orurikuhata abantu, orugomi, kandi orusiisikaire, ruryakareeba." 
Zephaniah3:2 Tirugira ou rihurira, tirwenda kuhanwa. Tirwesiga Nyakubaho, tirwehitsya Ruhanga." 
Zephaniah3:3 Abakungu baarwo abarurimu n'entare ezitsinda; abaramuzi baarwo n'emishega y'omu mwabazyo, etatsigaho kantu okuhitsya obu busheesha." 
Zephaniah3:4 Abarangi baarwo n'abantu batyo abatarikwesigwa, abahongyerezi baamwo nibahagaza ebirikwera, baashisha nkana eby'omu iteeka." 
Zephaniah3:5 Nyakubaho orurimu n'ohikiriire, takora kubi. Buri kasheeshe ayoreka eby'oburyo ebi akora. Kwonka abatahikiriire tibagira kashoni." 
Zephaniah3:6 Ncwekyereize amahanga, eminaara yaago y'okwerindiramu yaaba ebisheenyuka. Nyitiire kimwe emihanda yaago, ngu hatagira owaagirabamu. Endembo zaago zicwekire amatongo, zaabura ab'okuzituuramu." 
Zephaniah3:7 Naagira nti: Buzimazima ruryantiina, rwikirize kuhanwa, rurekye kwehuzya ebi naaruhabwire. Kwonka abaamwo boona baayeyongyera kwezirika kukora ebibi." 
Zephaniah3:8 Nyakubaho naagira ati: N'ahabw'ekyo nimutegyereze, okuhitsya aha izooba eri ndiimukiraho ndi mushinja. Ahabw'okuba mmaririire kuteeranira hamwe amahanga n'ensi z'obugabe, mbone kumariraho abo bantu ekiniga kyangye." 
Zephaniah3:9 Eego, omuri obwo bunaku ndyahindura emigambire y'ab'omu mahanga, ebe mirungi; boona babone kuntakira, nyowe Nyakubaho, n'okundamya n'omutima gumwe." 
Zephaniah3:10 Abariinyeshengyereza, abaana b'abantu bangye abaataataine, baryaruga seeri y'emigyera ya Etiopiya, bantoijere emitoijo." 
Zephaniah3:11 Ahari eryo izooba toriitwa nshoni ahabw'ebi waakozire ongomeire; ahabw'okuba obwo ndyakwihamu abanyamaryo abarikwehimbisa, orekye kugaruka kwekunikira aha rushozi rwangye orurikwera." 
Zephaniah3:12 Manya ndyakutsigamu abantu abacureezi kandi abatarikwetunguura; abarimpungiraho, Nyowe Nyakubaho." 
Zephaniah3:13 Abaritsigara omuri Isiraeli tibarikora bitahikire, kandi tibarigamba bishuba; nobu kwakuba okugobya." 
Zephaniah3:14 Iwe Siyooni, yeshongore munonga. Iwe Isiraeli, teera akaari! Naiwe Yerusalemu, shemererwa, kandi oyesiime n'omutima gwawe gwona!" 
Zephaniah3:15 Nyakubaho akwihireho ekifubiro, yaabinga abazigu baawe. Iwe mugabe wa Isiraeli 'we, Nyakubaho akwine; toritiina kabi bundi." 
Zephaniah3:16 Ahari eryo izooba baryagira Yerusalemu bati: Iwe Siyooni, otatiina; kandi otatentebuka emikono." 
Zephaniah3:17 Mukama Ruhanga waawe emanzi ekusinguza ari ahagati yaawe. Aryakushemerererwa aine obunanukye; aryakugarura aha buteeka akwiniire rukundo; kandi aryayesiima ahabwawe naayeshongora munonga, nk'aha kiro ky'obugyenyi." 
Zephaniah3:18 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ndyakwihaho akabi, karekye kukureetera ekihemu." 
Zephaniah3:19 Reeba, omuri obwo bunaku, ndyaitana n'abarikukuhata boona; nkize abarema, ntaaruure encuubwa; abaabaire bahemukire mbahe okugambwa gye n'okugira eiziina rirungi omu nsi yoona." 
Zephaniah3:20 Omuri ebyo biro ndyabagarura owaanyu, omu bunaku bu ndibataaruuriramu. Manya ndyabareetera okurangaanwa n'okusiimwa ab'omu mahanga goona ag'omu nsi, omu bunaku bu ndibagaruriramu aha buteeka nimwereebera. Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Haggai1:1 Omu mwaka gwa kabiri ogw'omu busingye bw'omugabe Dariyo, omu kwezi kwa mukaaga, aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'okwo kwezi, Nyakubaho akatuma Hagaayi omurangi kugambira Zerubabeeli mwene Shealitieli, omutegyeki mukuru owa Buyuda; na Yoshwa mwene Yohozadaki omuhongyerezi omukuru ati:" 
Haggai1:2 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Aba bantu nibagira ngu obunaku bw'okwombeka busya Nyaruju yangye tibukahikire. 
Haggai1:3 Reero Nyakubaho nikwo kugambisa Hagaayi omurangi ati: 
Haggai1:4 Nimugira ngu obu nibwo bunaku bu mushemereire kuraara omu maju gahunzirwe embaaho, haza Nyaruju egi eri ebisheenyuka?" 
Haggai1:5 Nikyo Mukama ow'amahe arikugirira ati: Nimuteekateekye aha bibabaireho. 
Haggai1:6 Mubibire bingi, kwonka mwagyesha bikye. Murya, kwonka timuhaaga; munywa, kwonka timuhwa iriho; mujwara, kwonka timutagatirwa. N'otunga ebihembo bi akoreire, abitungira okubita omu nshaho efumukire." 
Haggai1:7 Mukama ow'amahe nikyo arikugirira ati: Muteekateekye aha bibabaireho. Naagira ati: 
Haggai1:8 Muze omu bibungo, mureete embaaho, mwombekye egyo nju, mbone kugishemerererwamu n'okugihimbisizibwamu." 
Haggai1:9 Mwesheruriire bingi, kwonka mwatunga bikye. Kandi ku mubireetsire omuka, naabihuuha, byatuntumuka. Mukama ow'amahe naabuuza ati: Mbwenu ekyo nkikoreire ki? N'ahabwa Nyaruju yangye kuba ebisheenyuka, haza buri omwe omuriimwe ahugiire aha kwombeka enju ye ahabwe." 
Haggai1:10 Nikyo eiguru ryangiire kugwisa enjura; n'ensi ekabura kweza. 
Haggai1:11 Kandi nikyo nteereize ensi ekyanda herebe, n'ebibungo, n'embibo n'emizaabibu n'emioliva, ebi ensi emeza n'abantu, n'amatungo n'ebi beehenengyera byona." 
Haggai1:12 Ebyo ku byahwaire Zerubabeeli mwene Shealitieli na Yoshwa mwene Yohozadaki omuhongyerezi omukuru, n'abantu boona abaatsigaireyo, baikiriza kukora eki Mukama abaragiire, n'ebi Hagaayi omurangi abagambiire; nk'oku Mukama Ruhanga waabo amutumire, kandi abantu boona baatiina Nyakubaho." 
Haggai1:13 Bwanyima Hagaayi entumwa ya Nyakubaho akagambira abantu ebi Nyakubaho amutumire ati: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ndi hamwe naimwe. 
Haggai1:14 Atyo Nyakubaho yaateera omuhimbo Zerubabeeli mwene Shealitieli omutegyeki mukuru wa Buyuda, na Yoshwa mwene Yehozadaki omuhongyerezi omukuru, n'abantu boona abaatsigaireyo; baija, baatandika kwombeka Nyaruju ya Mukama ow'amahe, Ruhanga waabo," 
Haggai1:15 aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bina eky'okwezi kwa mukaaga. 
Haggai2:1 Omu mwaka gwa kabiri, ogw'omu busingye bw'Omugabe Dariyo, omu kwezi kwa mushanju, aha kiro kya makumi abiri na kimwe eky'okwo kwezi, Nyakubaho akatuma Hagaayi omurangi ati:" 
Haggai2:2 Mbwenu gambira Zerubabeeli mwene Shealitieli omutegyeki mukuru wa Buyuda, na Yoshwa mwene Yohazadaki omuhongyerezi omukuru, oti:" 
Haggai2:3 Omuriimwe n'oha okitsigaireho owaareebire Nyaruju egi ekiine ekitiinwa kyayo ky'obunyakare? Mbwenu nimugireeba muta? Terikubashushira busha? 
Haggai2:4 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Iwe Zerubabeeli, hati guma! Naiwe Yoshwa mwene Yohazadaki omuhongyerezi omukuru, guma! Naimwe mwena abantu b'omuri egi nsi, Mukama ow'amahe naabagira ati: Mugume, kandi mukore, ahabw'okuba ndi hamwe naimwe," 
Haggai2:5 nk'oku naabaraganiise obu mwaruga Misiri. Mutatiina, ahabw'okuba Mutima wangye ari omuriimwe." 
Haggai2:6 Manya Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Omu kaanya kakye niinyija kugaruka kutengyeetsa eiguru n'ensi n'enyanja n'obutaka; 
Haggai2:7 kandi ntegyeetse amahanga goona, eby'obutungi byago byona biije omu, na Nyaruju egi ngiijuze ekitiinisa; Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugamba." 
Haggai2:8 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Efeeza n'eyangye, n'ezaabu n'eyangye." 
Haggai2:9 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Ekitiinwa kya Nyaruju egi ekya bwanyima kiryakira eky'eyaabandize, kandi Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Omuri ogu mwanya nimwo ndiheera abantu bangye obusingye n'obugogyeere." 
Haggai2:10 Aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bina, eky'okwezi kwa mwenda, omu mwaka gwa kabiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Dariyo, Nyakubaho akatuma Hagaayi omurangi kugamba ati:" 
Haggai2:11 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Buuza abahongyerezi, bagire eki baashoboorora ahari eki kibuuzo:" 
Haggai2:12 Omuntu ku yaakutwarira enyama eyeziibwe omu kicweka kya ifo eky'ekijwaro kye, ekyo kicweka ky'ekijwaro kye kya ifo yaakikoza aha mugaati, nari aha mboga z'omurujurugye, nainga aha viino nari aha majuta g'emioliva, nainga aha kindi ky'okurya, kikaareetera ebyo byokurya kuba ebirikwera? Abahongyerezi baagarukamu bati: Ngaaha." 
Haggai2:13 Bwanyima Hagaayi yaababuuza ati: Omuntu ohagaziibwe okukora aha mutumbi, ku yaakukora aha kintu kimwe ahari ebyo, kikaaba ekihagaire? Abahongyerezi baagarukamu bati: Eego! Kikaaba ekihagaire." 
Haggai2:14 Mpaho Hagaayi agira ati: Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nikwo kiri omu maisho gangye, ahari aba bantu, n'ahari eri ihanga, n'ahari buri murimo ogu barikukoresa emikono yaabo; kandi eki barikutambirayo kyona n'ekihagaire." 
Haggai2:15 Mbwenu nimbeeshengyereza muteekateekye aha biribaho okwiha eri izooba n'okweyongyerayo. Obu eibaare ryabaire ritakatungikirwe ha rindi omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho," 
Haggai2:16 bikaba bibagyendera bita? Omuntu ku yaabaire ahika aha kirundo ky'encuro makumi abiri, ashangaho ikumi zonka, akihika aha nteerero ya viino kutahamu enjoga makumi ataano, ashangamu makumi abiri gonka." 
Haggai2:17 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Imwe hamwe n'ebi mwahendekyeire nkabateeza ekibabo n'okusya-nyamwenga n'orubaare, kwonka timwangarukira." 
Haggai2:18 Muteekateekye okwiha eri izooba n'okweyongyerayo okwiha aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bina eky'okwezi kwa mwenda okwiha aha izooba eri omusingi gwa Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho gwateereirweho, nimuteekateekye." 
Haggai2:19 Mbwenu embibo zikiri omu bitara? Emizaabibu n'emitiini n'amakomamahanga n'emioliva nibikyana busha? Okwiha eri izooba ndyabaha omugisha. 
Haggai2:20 Nyakubaho akatuma Hagaayi omurundi gwa kabiri, aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bina, eky'okwo kwezi ati:" 
Haggai2:21 Gambira Zerubabeeli omutegyeki mukuru wa Buyuda, oti: Ndi haihi kutengyeetsa eiguru n'ensi;" 
Haggai2:22 njuumikye ebitebe by'obugabe. Ndangariire kumaraho amaani g'abagabe b'amahanga, mpwerekyereze ebigaari by'orugamba n'ababitembire. Embaraasi n'abazitembire byetuure ahansi, buri omwe aitwe rurara ya mugyenzi we." 
Haggai2:23 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Ahari eryo izooba, Iwe Zerubabeeli, omugaragwa wangye, mwene Shealitieli, ndyakutwara Nyowe Nyakubaho, nkugire nk'empeta y'akamanyiso; ahabw'okuba niiwe ntooraine, nikwo Mukama ow'amahe arikugira." 
Zechariah1:1 Omu kwezi kwa munaana, okw'omu mwaka gwa kabiri, ogw'omu busingye bwa Dariyo, Nyakubaho akagambira Zekariya, mwene Berekiya, mwijukuru wa Ido omurangi ati:" 
Zechariah1:2 Nyowe Nyakubaho nkagwerwa kubi munonga baashwenkuriimwe. 
Zechariah1:3 N'ahabw'ekyo obagambire oti: Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Nimungarukire, naanye mbagarukire. Nikwo Mukama ow'amahe arikugira." 
Zechariah1:4 Mutaba nka baashwenkuriimwe abu abarangi ba ira baabaire beehanangiriza nibaamuza bati: Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Murekye emitwarize yaanyu emibi, n'ebibi bi murikukora; kwonka tibarahuriire, nobu kwakuba okuunyetaho. Nyakubaho nikwo arikugira." 
Zechariah1:5 Mbwenu baashwenkuriimwe barahi? Kandi abarangi bagumaho ebiro byona? 
Zechariah1:6 Kwonka shi ebi naagambire n'ebi naataireho; ebi naaragiire abagaragwa bangye abarangi tibirahikire hari baashwenkuriimwe? Batyo bakeeteisa nibagira bati: Nk'oku Mukama ow'amahe ayenzire kututwaza nk'emitwarize yaitu n'ebi turikukora oku biri, nikwo atutwarize." 
Zechariah1:7 Aha kiro kya makumi abiri na bina eky'okwezi kwa ikumi na kumwe, nikwo kwezi kwa Shebati, omu mwaka gwa kabiri ogw'omu busingye bwa Dariyo, Nyakubaho akagambira Zekariya, mwene Berekiya, mwijukuru wa Ido, nawe yaagira ati:" 
Zechariah1:8 Nyekiro ku ngiire kugira nti, naareeba omushaija atembire embaraasi erikutukura. Abaire ayemereire ahagati y'emiti y'emirama omu ruhanga; kandi enyima ye hariyo embaraasi zirikutukura, n'ez'obugondo n'ezirikwera." 
Zechariah1:9 Ntyo mbuuza nti: Nyakubaho wangye, ebyo ni ki? Maraika, owaabaire naagamba naanye angira ati: Ka nkugambire eki birikumanyisa." 
Zechariah1:10 Omushaija owaabaire ayemereire ahagati y'emirama, nikwo kungarukamu ati: Abo nibo Nyakubaho atumire kugyendagyenda omu nsi." 
Zechariah1:11 Nabo baagarukamu maraika wa Nyakubaho owaabaire ayemereire ahagati y'emirama, bati: Tugyendagyenzire omu nsi, twashanga yoona ecureire, etuurize." 
Zechariah1:12 Bwanyima maraika wa Nyakubaho agira ati: Ai Mukama ow'amahe, oryahitsya hi okutagirira mbabazi Yerusalemu n'endembo za Buyuda, ebi omazire emyaka makumi mushanju oiniire ekiniga kingi?" 
Zechariah1:13 Mpaho Mukama n'ebigambo by'embabazi kandi ebirikuhuumuriza, agarukamu maraika owaabaire naagamba naanye." 
Zechariah1:14 Reero maraika owaabaire naagamba naanye angira ati: Yamuza noogira oti: Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Nyiniire Yerusalemu na Siyooni eihato ringi munonga. 
Zechariah1:15 Kandi nyiniire amahanga agajarami ekiniga kingi munonga; ahabw'okuba ku naabaire nkigwereirwe kubi abantu bangye, ago mahanga gaababonabonesa ekirengyesereize." 
Zechariah1:16 N'ahabw'ekyo Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ngarukiire Yerusalemu ngiiniire esaasi, Nyaruju yangye ebe nimwo yaayombekwa. Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: kandi omugoye gw'okugyeresa guryagyeresibwa Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah1:17 Garuka oyamuze oti: Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Endembo zangye ziryagaruka kugira obugogyeere bushaagaine, kandi Nyakubaho aryagaruka ahuumurize Siyooni, atoorane Yerusalemu busya." 
Zechariah1:18 Reero ku naimukize nti amaisho, naareeba amahembe ana." 
Zechariah1:19 Ntyo mbuuza maraika owaabaire naagamba naanye, nti: Ebi ni ki? Nawe angarukamu ati: Aga mahembe nigamanyisa amahanga g'amaani agaataataaniise aba Yuda n'Abaisiraeli n'aba Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah1:20 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Nyakubaho yaanyoreka abaheesi bana," 
Zechariah1:21 Naagira nti: Aba nibaija kukora ki? Yangarukamu ati: Ago n'amahembe agarikumanyisa amahanga g'amaani agaataataaniise aba Yuda, hakabura owaimutsya omutwe. Kandi aba baheesi baizire kutiinisa ago mahanga n'okugahwerekyereza, ahabw'okuba gakaimutsya amahembe gaago kurwanisa ensi ya Yuda n'okutaataanisa abantu baayo." 
Zechariah2:1 Reero ku naimukize nti amaisho, ahonaaho naareeba omushaija aine omu ngaro omugoye gw'okugyeresa." 
Zechariah2:2 Naamubuuza nti: Nooza hi? Nawe angarukamu ati: Ninza kugyera Yerusalemu, kureeba obukiika bwayo n'oburaingwa bwayo." 
Zechariah2:3 Kandi ahonaaho maraika owaabaire naagamba naanye, ku yaabaire yaatsimbura ati ekigyere kugyenda, maraika ondiijo yaija kumubugana." 
Zechariah2:4 Yaamugira ati: Iruka ogambire ogwo mutsigazi oti: Yerusalemu n'ey'okutuurwamu nk'ebirorero ebitaine ngo, ahabw'okuba abantu baamwo n'amatungo gaamwo biryaba bingi." 
Zechariah2:5 Manya Nyakubaho naagira ati: Niinye ndiba orugo rwayo rw'omuriro orugyehinguririize; kandi niinye ndiba ekitiinwa kyayo ngirimu. 
Zechariah2:6 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Yaimwe! Yaimwe! Nimuhungye, murugye omu nsi y'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho. Manya niinye naabataataanisiize okwo hare, ei emiyaga ena y'eiguru egarura, Nyakubaho nikwo arikugira." 
Zechariah2:7 Yaimwe abatwire Babulooni, nimuhungire Siyooni." 
Zechariah2:8 Ahabw'okuba Mukama ow'amahe ahabw'ekitiinwa kye, ku yantumire omu mahanga agaabanyagire; manya obakoraho aba eyekozire omu mbone y'eriisho, yangira ati:" 
Zechariah2:9 Reeba ago mahanga ndyagatigitira omukono, gabe omunyago gw'abaabaire bari abahuuku baago. Nibwo murimanya ku Mukama ow'amahe niwe antumire." 
Zechariah2:10 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Iwe Siyooni, yeshongore, kandi onanukye; ahabw'okuba niinyija juba kukutuuramu." 
Zechariah2:11 Eryo izooba amahanga maingi garyayehongyera Nyakubaho babe abantu be. Kandi aryatuura omuriimwe; mubone kumanya ku Mukama ow'amahe niwe abantumireho. 
Zechariah2:12 Reero Nyakubaho aryatunga Buyuda, ebe eye ahabwe, omu nsi ye erikwera; kandi agarukye ahindure Yerusalemu orurembo rwe oru ayetooraniire." 
Zechariah2:13 Imwe bantu 'mwe mwena, nimucecekye omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, ahabw'okuba ayebandatwire omu butaaho bwe oburikwera." 
Zechariah3:1 Bwanyima Nyakubaho akaanyoreka Yoshwa, omuhongyerezi mukuru, ayemereire omu maisho ga maraika wa Nyakubaho, na Sitaane amwemereire aha rubaju rwa buryo kumutabaariza." 
Zechariah3:2 Maraika wa Nyakubaho yaagira Sitaane ati: Iwe Sitaane 'we, Nyakubaho akukabukire! Nyakubaho owaatooraine Yerusalemu naakakukabukire! Torikumanya ogu ku ari ekicumurwa ekiihirwe omu muriro?" 
Zechariah3:3 Obwo Yoshwa akaba ayemereire omu maisho ga maraika, ajwaire ebijwaro bisiisikaire." 
Zechariah3:4 Maraika ogwo yaagambira abaabaire bamwemereire omu maisho ati: Nimumujuure ebyo bijwaro bisiisikaire. Kandi yaagira Yoshwa ati: Reeba, naakwihaho ekibi kyawe, nkujwekye ekijwaro ekirungi munonga." 
Zechariah3:5 Naanye ngira nti: Ka bamujwekye omu mutwe ekikwemba kishemeire. Batyo bamujweka omu mutwe ekikwemba kishemeire, bamujweka n'ebijwaro, maraika wa Nyakubaho ayemereire aho." 
Zechariah3:6 Reero maraika wa Nyakubaho ayehanangiriza Yoshwa ati: 
Zechariah3:7 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Ku orikuratira emitwarize yangye, waakora ebi naakuragiire, oryareeberera Nyaruju yangye, otegyekye ebikaari byangye, naanye nkwikirize kuunyehikira hamwe n'aba abeemereire aha." 
Zechariah3:8 Mbwenu Iwe Yoshwa omuhongyerezi mukuru, hurira; iwe na bagyenzi baawe abashutama omu maisho gaawe, ku muri ab'akaso karungi. Reeba ndyaimutsya omuheereza wangye, Itaagi." 
Zechariah3:9 Ahabw'okuba Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Aha ibaare ri ntaire omu maisho ga Yoshwa, eibaare ry'embaju mushanju, ndyasharuraho ebihandiiko; kandi egi nsi ngiiheho ebibi omu izooba rimwe." 
Zechariah3:10 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Ahari eryo izooba, buri omwe omuriimwe aryayeta mutaahi we, bashutame buhooro ahansi y'omuzaabibu gwe n'omutiini gwe." 
Zechariah4:1 Maraika owaagambire naanye, akaija obwa kabiri yansisiimura nk'oku omuntu asisiimurwa omu turo." 
Zechariah4:2 Yangira ati: Nooreeba ki? Naamugira nti: Nindeeba ekikondo ky'eitabaaza ekikozirwe omu zaabu kyona, kandi ekiteekirweho orwabya, n'amatabaaza mushanju, againe entambi mushanju buri rimwe." 
Zechariah4:3 Kandi aha rubaju rwakyo hariho emiti y'emioliva ebiri, gumwe aha rubaju rwa buryo orw'orwabya n'ogundi aha rwa bumosho." 
Zechariah4:4 Mpaho mbuuza maraika orikugamba naanye nti: Mukama wangye, mbwenu ebyo nibimanyisa ki?" 
Zechariah4:5 Maraika ogwo owaabaire naagamba naanye, angarukamu ati: Torikumanya eki ebyo birikumanyisa? Ngira nti: Ngaaha, mukama wangye." 
Zechariah4:6 Nawe nikwo kungira ati: Eki nikyo Nyakubaho arikugambira Zerubabeeli ati: Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Ti habw'amaani, kandi ti habw'obushoboorozi; kureka n'ahabwa Mutima wangye." 
Zechariah4:7 Mbwenu iwe rushozi 'we oruhango, niiwe oha? Omu maisho ga Zerubabeeli oryaba oruhita, areete eibaare ry'aha mutwe eririkuhamirwaho, obwo nibateera akaari bati: Nirikagire emigisha! Nirikagire emigisha!" 
Zechariah4:8 Reero ekindi, Nyakubaho akangambira ati:" 
Zechariah4:9 Emikono ya Zerubabeeli etaireho omusingi gwa Nyaruju egi, niyo erigiheza. Aho niho murimanyira ku Mukama ow'amahe niwe abantumireho." 
Zechariah4:10 Manya boona, abaagayire omurimo nigutandika, baryashemererwa baareeba Zerubabeeli aine kariisho omu ngaro, agumiizemu kwombeka. Mbwenu amatabaaza ago mushanju nigo maisho ga Nyakubaho agarikubuga omu nsi yoona." 
Zechariah4:11 Bwanyima nkamubuuza nti: Emiti y'emioliva egi ebiri, ei ogumwe guri aha rubaju rwa buryo n'ogundi aha rwa bumosho orw'ekikondo ky'eitabaaza neemanyisa ki?" 
Zechariah4:12 Kandi naamubuuza omurundi gwa kabiri nti: Gariya mataagi abiri g'emioliva agari aha mbaju zombi ez'enshekye ibiri z'ezaabu ezi amajuta g'emioliva garikushohoreramu nigamanyisa ki? 
Zechariah4:13 Nawe ambuuza ati: Torikumanya eki garikumanyisa? Ngira nti: Ngaaha, mukama wangye." 
Zechariah4:14 Mpaho angarukamu ati: Ago n'ababiri abaasiigirwe amajuta, abeemerera omu maisho ga Nyakubaho w'ensi yoona nibamugaragira." 
Zechariah5:1 Reero ku naimukize nti amaisho naareeba omuzingo gw'ekitabo ogurikugurukira aha iguru. 
Zechariah5:2 Maraika yambuuza ati: Nooreeba ki? Naamugarukamu nti: Nindeeba omuzingo gw'ekitabo ogurikugurukira aha iguru, oburaingwa bwagwo mikono makumi abiri, n'obukiika bwagwo mikono ikumi." 
Zechariah5:3 Nawe nikwo kungira ati: Ogwo n'omukyeeno ogurikushohora kubuga ensi yoona. Nigugira guti: Omuntu weena orikwiba aryahwerekyerezibwa; kandi guti: Omuntu weena orikurahira naabeiha aryahwerekyerezibwa. 
Zechariah5:4 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Ndyagwohereza, gutaahe omu nju y'omushuma, n'omu y'orikurahirira busha eiziina ryangye, gugume omu maju gaabo, gugamarireho kimwe embaaho n'amabaare n'ebyamwo byona." 
Zechariah5:5 Ebyo ku byahwaire, maraika owaagambire naanye yangira ati: Imutsya amaisho oreebe ekyo kintu kirikugyenda." 
Zechariah5:6 Naanye nti: Ni kintu ki? Angarukamu ati: N'ekigyega kirikugyenda. Kandi agira ati: Nikimanyisa ebibi by'ab'omu nsi yoona. 
Zechariah5:7 Reero ndeeba ekifundikizo kyakyo ekya risasi kyafunduurwa, kandi omukazi ashutami omuri ekyo kigyega." 
Zechariah5:8 Maraika agira ati: ogu ni Bibi. Atyo aigatira ogwo mukazi omu kigyega agarura aha munwa gwakyo ekifundikizo kya risasi ekirikuremeera. 
Zechariah5:9 Bwanyima ku naimukize nti amaisho, naareeba abakazi babiri nibaija. Bakaba baine omuyaga omu mapapa gaabo, agari nk'ag'enkongoro. Batyo baakiriza ekyo kigyega baakitwarira ahagati y'ensi n'eiguru." 
Zechariah5:10 Bwanyima naabuuza maraika owaagambire naanye, nti: Ekyo kigyega nibakitwara hi?" 
Zechariah5:11 Yangarukamu ati: Nibakitwara omu nsi ya Shinari kukyombekyerayo enju; egyo nju ku erihwa, ekyo kigyega bakite omu mwanya gwakyo." 
Zechariah6:1 Kandi ku naagarukire kwimutsya amaisho, ahonaaho naareeba ebigaari bina by'orugamba nibiruga ahagati y'enshozi ibiri. Haza ezo nshozi zikaba ziri ez'omuringa." 
Zechariah6:2 Ekigaari ky'okubanza kikaba nikikururwa embaraasi zirikutukura, ekya kabiri ezirikwiragura," 
Zechariah6:3 ekya kashatu ezirikwera; kandi ekya kana nikikururwa embaraasi z'ebihuura by'obugondo. 
Zechariah6:4 Ntyo mbuuza Maraika owaagambire naanye, nti: Mukama wangye, ebigaari ebyo nibimanyisa ki?" 
Zechariah6:5 Maraika ogwo angarukamu ati: Nibiza ei emiyaga ena y'omu iguru eri, byaherize kweyoreka omu maisho ga Nyakubaho ow'ensi yoona." 
Zechariah6:6 Ekigaari ekirikukururwa embaraasi zirikwiragura nikiza omu nsi y'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho; eky'ezirikwera nikiza omu nsi y'oburengyerwa-izooba, kandi ekirikukururwa embaraasi z'ebihuura by'obugondo nikiza omu nsi y'omu bukiizi-bwa-buryo." 
Zechariah6:7 Ezo mbaraasi ezirikwiruka munonga ku zaarugireyo, zaija n'obwira bw'okwenda kugyenda kwetegyereza ensi. Maraika ogwo yaazigira ati: Nimwirooko mwetegyereze ensi. Nazo zaagyenda, zaagyetegyereza." 
Zechariah6:8 Bwanyima Nyakubaho yangambira n'eiraka rihango ati: Ezo ezirikutoora omu nsi y'omu bukiizi-bwa-bumosho zaikaikanisa ekiniga kyangye eki naaba nyiniire ab'omuri egyo nsi. 
Zechariah6:9 Kandi Nyakubaho akangambira ati: 
Zechariah6:10 Twara ebiconco ebitoizirwe Helidai, Toobiya na Yedaaya, abarugire omu bukwatwa, abaizire nibaruga Babulooni; kandi eryo izooba oze omwa Yosiya mwene Zefaniya." 
Zechariah6:11 Abo bantu obaiheho efeeza n'ezaabu, obiheeshemu ekirunga, okite aha mutwe gwa Yoshwa omuhongyerezi omukuru, mwene Yehozadaki." 
Zechariah6:12 Haza omugire oti: Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Reeba, omuntu orikwetwa Itaagi aryakurira gye omu mwanya gwe, kandi aryayombeka Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
Zechariah6:13 Niwe aryombeka Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho, akagira ekitiinwa ky'obugabe, akashutama aha kitebe kye ky'obugabe, akakitegyekyeraho. Aha rubaju rw'ekitebe kye hariho omuhongyerezi, kandi bombi bakeetegyerezana baine obusingye." 
Zechariah6:14 Ekyo kirunga kiryaguma omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho kiri eky'okwijukiraho Helidai, Tobiya, Yedaaya na Yoshwa mwene Zefaniya." 
Zechariah6:15 Reero abari hare munonga baryaija bahe emikono abarikwombeka Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho. Aho niho murimanyira ku Mukama ow'amahe niwe abantumireho. Kandi ekyo kiryabaho, mwaba mutaire omutima aha kworobera ebi Mukama Ruhanga waanyu arikubaragiira." 
Zechariah7:1 Omu mwaka gwa kana, ogw'omu busingye bw'Omugabe Dariyo, Nyakubaho akagira eki yaagambiire Zekariya aha kiro kya kana eky'okwezi kwa mwenda, okurikwetwa Kisileevi." 
Zechariah7:2 Mbwenu obwo Abaabeteli bakaba batumire Sharezeeri na Regyemeleki n'abashaija baabo kweshengyereza Mukama kubagirira embabazi," 
Zechariah7:3 n'okubuuza abahongyerezi b'omuri Nyaruju ya Mukama ow'amahe n'abarangi bati: Tushemereire kuguma nituganya kandi nitwesiibyakwo omu kwezi kwa kataano, nk'oku tubaire nitutwaza omu myaka ehingwire?" 
Zechariah7:4 Mukama ow'amahe nikwo kuntuma ati: 
Zechariah7:5 Gambira abantu b'omuri egi nsi boona, n'abahongyerezi oti: Ku mwabaire mwesiibyakwo kandi mukaganya omu kwezi wa kataano n'okwa mushanju, niinye mwabaire mwesiibizakwo?" 
Zechariah7:6 Ekindi, ku murya, mwanywa, timweriira kandi mukeenywera?" 
Zechariah7:7 Obu Yerusalemu yaabaire ekitwirwemu abantu kandi egogyeire, hamwe n'endembo zaayo ezigyehinguririize, ekyanga ky'omu bukiizi-bwa-buryo n'eky'empita bikitwirwemu abantu, ebyo tibyo bigambo bi Mukama yaarangiise abarangi ba ira?" 
Zechariah7:8 Nyakubaho akagambira Zekariya ati: 
Zechariah7:9 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Mucwe emanja z'oburyo, kandi buri muntu agirire mwene ishe embabazi n'esaasi." 
Zechariah7:10 Mutarihata abafaakazi, efuuzi abashuuhuuki nari abooro; kandi hatarigira omuriimwe owaacumira mwene waabo enaama mbi." 
Zechariah7:11 Kwonka baakanga kubyetaho, baatunika amabega, amatu baagahenderamu ebiti, ngu batakaabihurira." 
Zechariah7:12 Baagangaaza emitima yaabo nk'amabaare, ngu batakaahurira eby'omu iteeka n'ebigambo ebi Mukama ow'amahe yaabatumireho Mutima we, naabigambisa abarangi ba ira. Ekyo kyareetera Mukama ow'amahe kubagirira ekiniga kingi." 
Zechariah7:13 Mukama ow'amahe ogwo yaagira ati: Nk'oku naabeetsire, bakanga kuntega okutu, nikwo bantakiire, naanye nkanga kubagarukamu;" 
Zechariah7:14 nkabataataanisisa omuyaga gw'akasooroora omu mahanga gu batarikumanya. Ensi ei baatsigireho ekahinduka amatongo, hatariho orikugirabamu naagyenda nari naagaruka. Egyo nsi yaabo nungi ekacweka etyo eihamba." 
Zechariah8:1 Mbwenu Mukama ow'amahe akangambira ati: 
Zechariah8:2 Nyowe Mukama ow'amahe nyiniire Siyooni eihato ringi munonga, kandi ngiiniire kashanga mpango." 
Zechariah8:3 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Ndyagaruka Siyooni, ntuure omuri Yerusalemu, Yerusalemu egyo eyetwe orurembo rurikwesigwa, orushozi rwa Mukama ow'amahe orurikwera." 
Zechariah8:4 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Abagurusi n'abakaikuru baryagaruka bashutame omu nguuto za Yerusalemu, buri omwe ayehimbagiriize ekibango, ahabw'okuba mukuru munonga." 
Zechariah8:5 Enguuto z'orwo rurembo ziryaijura aboojo n'abaishiki abarikuzizaaniramu. 
Zechariah8:6 Mukama ow'amahe naabuuza ati: Abaatsigaireho ahari abo bantu, ku baraabe nibagira ngu omu biro ebi ekyo nikitangaaza, mbwenu ahariinye ekyo n'eky'okutangaaza? Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugira." 
Zechariah8:7 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Reeba, niinyija kujuna abantu bangye, mbaihe omu nsi y'oburugwa-izooba n'ey'oburengyerwa-izooba;" 
Zechariah8:8 mbareete, batuure omuri Yerusalemu, babe abantu bangye, naanye mbe Ruhanga waabo omwesigwa kandi ohikiriire." 
Zechariah8:9 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Nimuhame! Imwe omu biro ebi ababaire nibahurira ebirikugambwa abarangi, okwiha obu omusingi gwa Nyaruju ya Mukama w'amahe gwateebwaho, ngu Nyaruju eyombekwe, murekye kugwa emikono." 
Zechariah8:10 Manya obu obunaku bwabaire butakahikire, omuntu akaba ataheebwa bihembo, n'enyamaishwa ekaba etabitunga. Kandi ahabw'ababisha, omuntu weena owaabaire aija nari agyenda, akaba ataba buhooro, ahabw'okuba buri muntu nkaba mmuteeraine na mugyenzi we." 
Zechariah8:11 Kwonka hati abatsigaireho ahari abo bantu tindikwija kubatwaza nk'omu biro bya bwabiso; Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugira. 
Zechariah8:12 Ahabw'okuba abantu baryabiba baine obusingye, emizaabibu eyane ebijuma, ensi eyeze emyaka yaayo, n'eiguru riragaritsye orume; haza abo bantu baatsigaireho mbatungise ebyo bintu byona." 
Zechariah8:13 Mbwenu imwe ab'omuryango gw'Abaayuda n'ogw'Abaisireli, nk'oku mwabaire eky'okucuubwaho enfumu n'eky'okukyeenwa omu banyamahanga, nikwo ndibajuna, mukaba eky'okuhaisa abandi emigisha. Mbwenu mutatiina, muhamye emikono!" 
Zechariah8:14 Manya Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Nk'oku naamaririire kubakora kubi, obu baashwenkuriimwe bangwisa kubi, ntahinye mukono;" 
Zechariah8:15 nikwo mmaririire omu biro ebi kukora gye Yerusalemu n'ab'omuryango gwa Yuda. N'ahabw'ekyo mutatiina; Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugira. 
Zechariah8:16 Mbwenu ebi nibyo muraagume nimukora. Mugume mugambirane eby'amazima, mucwere omu marembo gaanyu emanja z'oburyo, ezirikureetera abantu obusingye." 
Zechariah8:17 Mutarigirirana enaama mbi, kandi mutarikunda kurahira ebishuba, ahabw'okuba ebyo byona mbyanga; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugira." 
Zechariah8:18 Kandi Mukama ow'amahe akangambira ati: 
Zechariah8:19 Nyowe Mukama ow'amahe ningira nti: Okwesiibyakwo okw'omu kwezi kwa kana n'okw'omu kwa kataano n'okw'omu kwa mushanju n'okw'omu kwa ikumi kuryabeera ab'omurayango gwa Yuda obunaku bw'okwesiima n'okunanuka, n'obw'amagyenyi g'okushemerererwamu. N'ahabwe'ekyo mugume mukunde amazima n'obusingye." 
Zechariah8:20 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Obunaku buryahika ab'omu mahanga n'ab'omu ndembo mpango baije. 
Zechariah8:21 Abatwire omu rurembo baze omu rundi: bagire abaamwo bati: Nimwije tuze kweshengyereza Nyakubaho, atugirire embabazi, turamye Mukama ow'amahe! Naanye niinyija kuzayo." 
Zechariah8:22 Ab'enganda nyingi n'ab'omu mahanga g'amaani baryaija kuramiza Mukama ow'amahe omuri Yerusalemu, n'okweshengyereza Nyakubaho kubagirira embabazi." 
Zechariah8:23 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Omu biro ebyo, abantu ikumi abarikuruga omu mahanga ga buri rurimi, baryakwata Omuyudaaya aha mukono gw'ekanzu ye, bamugire bati: Ka tugyende naiwe; ahabw'okuba tuhuriire ku Ruhanga ari hamwe naimwe." 
Zechariah9:1 Okuragura: Nyakubaho aragiire ku ensi ya Haduraaka na Damasiko bifubirwa. Manya endembo za Aramu n'eza Nyakubaho, nk'oku enganda za Isiraeli zoona ziri eze." 
Zechariah9:2 Hamati eyatana na Haduraaka, hamwe na Tuuro na Sidoni nabyo n'ebye; nobu biraabe biine obwengye bwingi." 
Zechariah9:3 Tuuro eyeyombekyeire ekigo kigumire, yaarunda efeeza nk'omucuucu, n'ezaabu nk'ebyondo by'omu nguuto." 
Zechariah9:4 Kwonka reeba, Nyakubaho aryagyaaka ebi etungire, eitungo ryayo arinagye omu nyanja, emarweho omuriro." 
Zechariah9:5 Ashikelooni eryakireeba etiina, Gaaza eryabura omugabe n'Ashikelooni ebure ab'okugituuramu." 
Zechariah9:6 Eihanga ry'ebizaarwa riryatuura Ashidoodi; ntyo ncwe Filisitiya amaryo. 
Zechariah9:7 Ndyagiiha ebitambo by'eshagama omu kanwa, ngisikure omu maino ebirikuzira. Nayo ebe ekicweka ky'abaatsigaireho ahabwa Ruhanga waitu; n'aba Ekurooni babe nk'Abayebusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Reero nte abarinzi omu nsi yangye, harekye kugira ababisha baagirabamu nibakora oku n'oku. Tiharigira ihanga ririkunyangaraza eririgaruka kubataahirira, ahabw'okuba ebyo hati nimbyereebera." 
Zechariah9:9 Iwe Siyooni, Shemererwa munonga! Naiwe Yerusalemu teera akaari! Reeba, omugabe waawe naija ah'ori; ahikiriire kandi n'omusinguzi; kwonka n'omucureezi, atembire omwana gw'endogoya muto." 
Zechariah9:10 Efuraimu ndyagimaramu ebigaari, na Yerusalemu ngimaremu embaraasi z'orugamba, n'amata g'orugamba ngamareho. Aragiire amahanga kugira obusingye. Obutegyeki bwe buryaruga aha nyanja, buhikye aha ndiijo; bwihe aha Mugyera, bute aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Zechariah9:11 Kandi iwe, ahabw'eshagama y'endagaano yangye naiwe, ndyarekura enkwatwa zaawe, nziihe omu kiina kitarimu maizi." 
Zechariah9:12 Imwe mbohe ziine amatsiko 'mwe, nimugarukye omu kigo kyanyu. Eri izooba nimbahamiza ku ndibashumbuusha ebirimu emirundi ebiri." 
Zechariah9:13 Manya nyinikire Yuda kuba obuta bwangye, naahindura Efuraimu omwambi gwabwo. Iwe Siyooni, ndyaimutsya abantu baawe, barwanise abaawe iwe, Buguriiki; nkugire nka rurara y'emanzi." 
Zechariah9:14 Reero Nyakubaho aryabonekyera aha iguru yaabo, omwambi gwe gusyokye nk'omurabyo, Mukama Ruhanga ateere enzamba, kandi ahururire omu miyaga y'akasooroora, ey'omu bukiizi-bwa-buryo." 
Zechariah9:15 Mukama ow'amahe aryabarinda, bamareho abarekyezi b'enjungu, babaribatiirire. Baryanywa eshagama yaabo nka viino, baijure nk'orwabya, bajube nk'amahembe g'eitambiro." 
Zechariah9:16 Ahari eryo izooba Mukama Ruhanga waabo aryabajuna, ahabw'okuba bo n'obusyo bw'abantu be. Baryayengyengyetera omu nsi ye nk'amahunde g'aha kirunga." 
Zechariah9:17 Ebishi ebyabo biryashemera, kandi bibe birungi! Ebyokurya by'omujuma biryareetera abatsigazi kuba gye; viino nto ereetere abaishiki kubengyeya." 
Zechariah10:1 Mushabe Nyakubaho abagwisize enjura omu biro bya katumba; Nyakubaho oreeta ebicu birimu eihunga, akagwisiza abantu enjura y'orutoonyerera, Buri muntu akamumereza obunyaatsi omu ishwa rye." 
Zechariah10:2 Manya ebishushani birikuramibwa nibigamba ebitaine muhoho, abafumu bagamba ebishuba; n'abarootorozi barootorora ebishuba; bahuumuriza abantu n'ebitaine mugasho. Nikyo abantu barikuzengyererera nk'entaama, bakabonabona ahabw'okubura omuriisa." 
Zechariah10:3 Nyiniire abariisa ekiniga kingi, kandi ndyafubira abeebembezi. Ahabw'okuba Mukama ow'amahe ata omutima aha busyo bwe, nibo b'omuryango gwa Yuda; kandi aryabagira nk'embaraasi ye erikugunduukira aha rugamba." 
Zechariah10:4 Omuribo haryarugamu eibaare ry'obuhamizo, omuribo harugyemu enkondo y'eihema, omuribo harugyemu obuta bw'orugamba, omuribo harugyemu buri mutegyeki." 
Zechariah10:5 Boona hamwe baryaba amamanzi omu rugamba, baribatiiririre ababisha baabo omu byondo by'omu nguuto. Baryarwana ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho ari hamwe nabo; kandi baryarimbagiriza ab'ahambaraasi," 
Zechariah10:6 Ndyaha amaani ab'omuryango gwa Yuda, njune ab'omuryango gwa Yosefu. Ndyabagarura, ahabw'okuba mbainiire esaasi, babe nk'abu ntakacwaga. Ahabw'okuba niinye Mukama Ruhanga waabo, kandi ndyabagarukamu." 
Zechariah10:7 Abaefuraimu baryaba abarwani emanzi, bashemererwe nk'abaanywa viino. Abaana baabo bakireebe, beesiime, emitima yaabo eyesingiririze omuri Nyakubaho." 
Zechariah10:8 Ndyabeetesa akamanyiso, mbataaruure; ahabw'okuba mbacungwire; kandi baryaba baingi nk'obunyakare." 
Zechariah10:9 Nobu ndaabe naabataataanisiize omu mahanga, kwonka baryanyijukira omu nsi za hare. Kandi bo n'abaana baabo baryagumaho, barugyeho bagarukye." 
Zechariah10:10 Ndyabareeta omuka mbaihire Misiri, mbataaruure nimbaiha Asiriya; mbareete omu nsi ya Gileadi n'eya Lebanooni;" 
Zechariah10:11 okuhitsya obu barifundamu. Baryaraba omu Nyanja ya Misiri; ateere ebingonzi byayo, Omugyera gwa Nailo gwome; Asiriya ecuubwe amaryo, n'enkoni y'obugabe bwa Misiri erugireho kimwe." 
Zechariah10:12 Ndyabahindura ab'amaani omuri Mukama, beehimbisize omu iziina rye; Nyakubaho nikwo arikugamba." 
Zechariah11:1 Iwe Lebanooni, igura amarembo gaawe, omuriro gubone kumaraho kaarwenda zaawe!" 
Zechariah11:2 Imwe miti y'emiryohe 'mwe, nimucure, ahabw'okuba zaakaarwenda zigwire, emiti y'amaani ehwerekyereziibwe! Imwe mivule ya Bashani, nimuboroogye, ahabw'okuba ekibira kikwataine kitemirwe!" 
Zechariah11:3 Nimuhurire okuborooga kw'abariisa, ahabw'okuba amariisizo gaabo marungi gasiisirwe! Nimuhurire entare nizitsinda, ahabw'okuba ebishaka byazo ebya Yorudaani bicwekyereziibwe." 
Zechariah11:4 Mukama Ruhanga wangye agizire ati: Ba omuriisa w'obusyo bw'entaama zangye ez'okubaagwa. 
Zechariah11:5 Abarikuzigura nibaziita, haza bagyenda batafubiirwe! N'abarikuzitunda bagira bati: Nyakubaho naakasingye, ahabw'okuba twaba abatungi; kandi abariisa baazo tibaziiniire saasi." 
Zechariah11:6 Manya Nyakubaho naagira ati: Tinkigaruka kugirira saasi abatwire omuri egi nsi. Reeba, niinyija kuhayo abo bantu, buri omwe mutaahi we nari omugabe we amugireho obushoboorozi, basingyeere ensi. Haza tindigira ou ndiiha omu mikono yaabo." 
Zechariah11:7 Ntyo mba omuriisa w'obusyo bw'entaama z'okubaagwa, ezaabaire ziri enshoberwa. Nkwata enkoni ibiri. Emwe ngyeeta Mbabazi, endiijo ngyeeta Bumwe. Nguma nindiisa ezo ntaama." 
Zechariah11:8 Omu kwezi kumwe nyita abariisa bashatu. Kwonka shi zindusya, kandi ziinyanga." 
Zechariah11:9 Naanye nikwo kuzigira nti: Tinkiba muriisa waanyu. Erikufa efe, n'erikucwekyerera ecwekyerera, n'eziraatsigareho ziryane." 
Zechariah11:10 Ntyo nkwata enkoni yangye Mbabazi ngihenda, nyita endagaano ei naabaire ndagaine n'amahanga goona." 
Zechariah11:11 Egyo ndagaano efa eryo izooba, n'abashuubuzi b'entaama abaabaire bampangire amaisho bamanya ku eki naakora Mukama niwe akigambire." 
Zechariah11:12 Reero mbagira nti: Ku muraabe nimureeba ngu kuhikire, mumpe ebihembo byangye; ku kiraabe kitari kwo, mugume nabyo. Nabo bandengyera ebicweka makumi ashatu by'efeeza kuba ebihembo byangye." 
Zechariah11:13 Bwanyima Nyakubaho angira ati: Bite omu ibiikiro, ebyo bihembo by'ekitiinwa ebi bansiimiire. Ntyo nkwata ebicweka makumi ashatu eby'efeeza, mbita omu Ibiikiro rya Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho." 
Zechariah11:14 Bwanyima mpenda enkoni yangye eya kabiri erikwetwa Bumwe niinyita obuzaare obu Abaayuda baine n'Abaisiraeli. 
Zechariah11:15 Ebyo ku byahwaire, Nyakubaho yangira ati: Garuka oyetwarire ebintu by'omuriisa otaine mugasho." 
Zechariah11:16 Manya reeba, ndi haihi kuta omu nsi omuriisa otarikweta ha ntaama ezibuzire, nobu kwakuba okusherura ezirazire nari okubunga ezihendekire nainga okuriisa ezihuriire; kureka orikushonshomera enyama y'ezigomokire, akaguguna n'ebyara byazo." 
Zechariah11:17 Ebishi ogwo muriisa wangye otaine mugasho, orikutsigaho obusyo bw'entaama, aryakareeba! Rurara neekamuteme omukono n'eriisho rye rya buryo! Omukono gwe gwa buryo nigukakookoote gwona, n'eriisho rye rya buryo rikahumira kimwe!" 
Zechariah12:1 Eki n'ekigambo kya Nyakubaho eki yaagambire ahari Isiraeli. Nyakubaho owaabambire eiguru, akataho obuhamizo bw'ensi, akata entima y'amagara omu muntu, naagira ati:" 
Zechariah12:2 Reeba, niinyija kuhindura Yerusalemu ekikopo ky'okugwereranisa amahanga goona agagyehinguririize, na Buyuda ekwatwe bagotsire Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah12:3 Eryo izooba Yerusalemu ndyagihundura eibaare eririkuremeerera amahanga goona, boona abaririkiriza bashaashe munonga. Kandi amahanga goona ag'omu nsi garyayeteerana kugirwanisa." 
Zechariah12:4 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Eryo izooba ndyaitsa buri mbaraasi yoona obwoba, n'ogitembire mugwise eiraro. Kwonka ku ndiba nimpumya embaraasi z'abanyamahanga, ndyaguma ntaire eriisho aha b'omuryango gwa Yuda;" 
Zechariah12:5 enganda za Yuda zibone kugira ziti: Abatwire omuri Yerusalemu baine amaani agu bahairwe Mukama ow'amahe Ruhanga waabo. 
Zechariah12:6 Eryo izooba ab'oruganda rwa Yuda ndyabagira nk'omusinga gurikubugumira ahagati y'enku, nari nk'enkanza erikwakira omu biba by'engano; bamareho amahanga goona agabeehinguririize aha rubaju rwa buryo n'orwa bumosho, obwo Yerusalemu ekitwirwemu abantu nk'okwayo." 
Zechariah12:7 Reero Nyakubaho aryabanza kuha obusinguzi ab'omu birorero bya Yuda, ngu ekitiinwa ky'ab'omuryango gwa Daudi n'eky'abatuuzi ba Yerusalemu kitakaakira eky'aba Yuda." 
Zechariah12:8 Eryo izooba Mukama aryarinda abatwire omuri Yerusalemu, abataine maani omuribo babe nka Daudi, n'ab'omuryango gwa Daudi babe nka Ruhanga nari nka Maraika wa Nyakubaho babeebembeire." 
Zechariah12:9 Kandi eryo izooba ndyayehayo kucwekyereza amahanga goona agarihurura kuteera Yerusalemu. 
Zechariah12:10 Ndyata omu b'omuryango gwa Daudi n'omu batwire Yerusalemu omutima gw'esaasi n'okweshengyereza. Ku barireeba ou baacumitsire, bamucurire nk'oku omuntu acurira omwana we omwe nyamunegyere; kandi bamuririre nk'oku omuntu arizibwa omwana we w'omujigaijo." 
Zechariah12:11 Eryo izooba omuri Yerusalemu haryabamu okucura kwingi, nk'oku baacuriire Hadadirimoni omu ruhita rwa Megido." 
Zechariah12:12 Ensi eryacura, buri ruganda rucure okwarwo; oruganda rw'ab'omuryango gwa Daudi okwarwo, n'abakazi baabo okwabo; oruganda rw'ab'omuryango gwa Natani okwarwo, n'abakazi baabo okwabo;" 
Zechariah12:13 oruganda rw'ab'omuryango gwa Leevi okwarwo, n'abakazi baabo okwabo; oruganda rw'ab'omuryango gw'aba Shimei okwarwo n'abakazi baabo okwabo." 
Zechariah12:14 N'enganda zoona ezaatsigarayo, buri ruganda okwarwo n'abakazi baabo okwabo." 
Zechariah13:1 Eryo izooba ab'omuryango gwa Daudi n'abatwire Yerusalemu baryaigurirwa enshuro y'okuboozyabo ebibi n'oburofa. 
Zechariah13:2 Kandi Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Eryo izooba ndyamariraho kimwe omu nsi ekyeetwa ebishushani birikuramibwa, birekye kwijukwa obundi. Kandi ndyaiha omu nsi abarangi n'omutima gw'okuramya ebishushani ogutashemeire." 
Zechariah13:3 Reero ku harigira owaagaruka kuba omurangi, ishe na nyina abaamuzaire baryamugira bati: Tori w'okugumaho, ahabw'okuba noogamba ebishuba omu iziina rya Nyakubaho. Kandi ishe na nyina abaamuzaire ku ariba naaranga, baryamucumita, bamwozyemu." 
Zechariah13:4 Eryo izooba buri murangi ku ariba naaranga, aryaitwa enshoni ahabw'ebi ayorekirwe; tarijwara munagiro gw'ebyoya kugobeza abantu." 
Zechariah13:5 Kureka aryagira ati: Tindi murangi, ndi omuhingi, okwiha omu butsigazi bwangye, eitaka niryo riba eitungo ryangye." 
Zechariah13:6 Reero ku harigira owaamubuuza ati: Obu buhuta bu oine aha ngaro zaawe, nibumanyisa ki? Aryagarukamu ati: Obu buhuta nkabuhutaarira omu nju ya banywani bangye." 
Zechariah13:7 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Iwe rurara 'we, sisiimuka orwanise omuriisa wangye, orwanise ogwo muntu onyemereire aha rubaju. Teera omuriisa, entaama zitaataane, n'abaana baazo mbateeze omukono gwangye." 
Zechariah13:8 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Omuri egyo nsi yoona, ebicweka bibiri bya kashatu by'abantu biryacwekyerezibwa, bihwerekyerere, kimwe kya kashatu kyabo kitsigareho kihuriire." 
Zechariah13:9 Reero kimwe kye kashatu ekyo nkite omu muriro, mbashemeze, nk'oku omuntu ashemeza efeeza; kandi mbagyeze, nk'oku ezaabu egyezibwa. Batyo bantakire, naanye mbagarukyemu. Mbagire nti: Muri abantu bangye. Nabo bagire bati: Nyakubaho niwe Ruhanga waitu." 
Zechariah14:1 Reeba, ekiro kya Nyakubaho kiri haihi, obu eminyago ei barikunyaga eribaganirwa omuriiwe." 
Zechariah14:2 Manya ndyahuruza amahanga goona, garwane na Yerusalemu orugamba, orwo rurembo rukwatwe, amaju ganyagwe, n'abakazi batandwe. Kimwe kya kabiri ky'ab'omu rurembo bazaahibwe; kwonka abarihonoka ahari abo bantu tibarimarirwa kimwe omuri orwo rurembo." 
Zechariah14:3 Bwanyima Nyakubaho aryahurura, arwanise ago mahanga, nk'oku arwana aha izooba ry'orugamba." 
Zechariah14:4 Ahari eryo izooba aryayemerera aha Rushozi rw'Emioliva, orushungaine na Yerusalemu, aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba. Haza orwo Rushozi rw'Emioliva rubaganukyemu ebicweka bibiri, okwiha oburugwa-izooba okuta oburengyerwa-izooba. Hagire oruhanga ruhango munonga, ekicweka kimwe eky'orwo Rushozi kigwere obukiizi-bwa-bumosho, n'ekindi obwa buryo." 
Zechariah14:5 Bwanyima oruhanga rw'enshozi zangye ruryaigara, ahabw'okuba oruhanga rw'ezo nshozi ruryakwatana n'orundi rubaju. Mutyo muhungye, nk'obu mwahunga omutsitsa omu busingye bwa Uziya, omugabe wa Buyuda. Bwanyima Mukama Ruhanga wangye aryaija hamwe n'abarikwera be boona." 
Zechariah14:6 Ahari eryo izooba omushana tigurijwa, kandi tiharibaho mbeho nari omurombe, nobu gwakuba omwirima;" 
Zechariah14:7 kureka haryaguma nihahweza (ekintu ekirikumanywa Nyakubaho wenka), hatariho nyomushana na nyekiro; ahabw'okuba n'omu mwabazyo haryaguma nihahweza." 
Zechariah14:8 Eryo izooba amaizi agarikutungisa amagara garyahimintika nigaruga omuri Yerusalemu; ekicweka kyago kize omu Nyanja y'oburugwa-izooba, n'ekindi omu y'oburengyerwa-izooba; kandi gagumizemu gatyo omu kyanda n'omuri katumba." 
Zechariah14:9 Reero Nyakubaho abe omugabe w'ensi yoona. Eryo izooba Nyakubaho aryaba omwe, n'eiziina rye ribe erye wenka." 
Zechariah14:10 Ensi yoona eryaba oruhita, okwiha Geeba okuta Rimoni ey'omu bukiizi-bwa-buryo obwa Yerusalemu. Kwonka Yerusalemu yo eryaguma omu mwanya gwayo etunguukire, okwiha aha Irembo rya Benyamiini, okuta aha Irembo ry'Akeehogo, ahu eirembo erya ira ryabaire riri; n'okwiha aha Munaara gwa Hananeeli, okuta aha manyuukiro ga viino y'omugabe;" 
Zechariah14:11 reero Yerusalemu egyo abaamwo bagigumemu buhooro. 
Zechariah14:12 Mbwenu oru nirwo rufu, oru Nyakubaho ariteeza ab'amahanga goona, abarihurura kurwanisa Yerusalemu. Emibiri yaabo eryajunda bakyemereire, amaisho gaabo gajundire omu binonko byago, endimi zibajundire omu kanwa." 
Zechariah14:13 Kandi eryo izooba Nyakubaho aryabaitsa obwoba butakareebwaga, buri omwe akwate omukono gwa mugyenzi we, kandi bombi babangirane emikono kurwana." 
Zechariah14:14 Nangwa na Buyuda eryarwanisa Yerusalemu. Kandi eby'obutungi bw'amahanga goona ageehinguririizeho, eby'ezaabu, efeeza n'ebijwaro bingi munonga, biryateeranirwa hamwe;" 
Zechariah14:15 reero orufu nk'orwo rujuumikire embaraasi, enyumbu, engamira, endogoya, na kyona ekyeetwa enyamaishwa ekiriba kiri omuri ezo nsiisira." 
Zechariah14:16 Ebyo ku birihwa, omuntu weena orihonoka aha b'amahanga goona agaizire kurwanisa Yerusalemu, aryaguma ainamukye buri mwaka kuramya Omugabe, Mukama ow'amahe, n'okukora omugyenzo gw'obugyenyi bw'ensiisira." 
Zechariah14:17 Reero ku harigira enganda z'omu nsi eziriba zitainamukire Yerusalemu kuramya Omugabe Mukama ow'amahe, owaazo teriguubwa njura." 
Zechariah14:18 Kandi ab'enganda za Misiri, ku bariba batainamukireyo kweyoreka, baryahikwaho orufu oru Nyakubaho ateeza amahanga aganga kuza kukora omugyenzo gw'obugyenyi bw'ensiisira." 
Zechariah14:19 Ekyo nikyo kiriba ekifubiro kya Misiri n'eky'agandi mahanga agataza kukora omugyenzo gw'obugyenyi bw'ensiisira. 
Zechariah14:20 Ahari eryo izooba aha mirebe y'embaraasi haryahandiikwaho ebigambo ebi: Ekihongyeirwe Nyakubaho. N'enyungu z'omuri Nyaruju ya Nyakubaho ziryaba nk'enyabya z'omu maisho g'eitambiro. 
Zechariah14:21 Reero buri nyungu eteeka ey'omuri Yerusalemu na Buyuda ziryahongyerwa Mukama ow'amahe, boona abarikutamba ebitambo babone kwija kutwaraho zimwe kuziteekamu. Eryo izooba, omuri Nyaruju ya Mukama ow'amahe, tiharibamu mushuubuzi bundi." 
Malachi1:1 Eki nikyo Nyakubaho yaatumire Malaki kugambira Abaisiraeli. 
Malachi1:2 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Nkabakunda. Kwonka imwe nimugira muti: Okatukunda ota? Nyakubaho naagarukamu ati: Esau akaba atari mukuru wa Yakobo? Kwonka shi nkakunda Yakobo," 
Malachi1:3 naayanga Esau; ensi ye ey'ebibungo naagihindura amatongo, obutaka bwe bwahungurwa zaamuha z'omu ihamba." 
Malachi1:4 Abanyaedomu nobu baakugira bati: Endembo zaitu zisheenyagwirwe, kwonka nitwija kugaruka kuzombeka. Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Nibombekye, kwonka niinyija kubisheenya, okuhitsya obu baryetwa ensi y'ebibi, abantu abu Nyakubaho atuura ainiire ekiniga." 
Malachi1:5 Ekyo muryakyereebera, mugire muti: Nyakubaho ni mukuru. Naamanywa n'aheeru ya Isiraeli." 
Malachi1:6 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Omwana aha ishe ekitiinwa, n'omwiru ekiha mukama we. Mbwenu ku ndaabe ndi shoimwe, ka mutarikumpa kitiinwa? Kandi ku ndaabe ndi mukama waanyu, ka mutarikuntiina, Imwe bahongyerezi 'mwe, abarikungaya? Nimugira muti: Tukugayire tuta?" 
Malachi1:7 Ahabw'okuba nimureeta aha itambiro ryangye ebyokurya bisiisikaire. Kandi mugira muti: Turemirwe tuta kukuha ekitiinwa? Ahabw'okugira ngu eitambiro ryangye Nyowe Nyakubaho n'ery'okugaywa. 
Malachi1:8 Ku mureeta enyamaishwa zihumire kuzitamba, ekyo kiba kitari kibi? Kandi ku mureeta eziremaire nari ezirwaire, ekyo kiba kitari kibi? Gitoijere omutegyeki waawe omukuru. Ebyo naija kukusiima, agire ekirungi ki yaakukorera? Nikwo Mukama ow'amahe arikugira." 
Malachi1:9 Mbwenu mweshengyereze Ruhanga, atugirire embabazi. Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Ku mwakutoija ekirikushusha kityo, Nyowe Nyakubaho nkaagirira buri omwe omuriimwe embabazi?" 
Malachi1:10 Nkaabaasibwa ki omwe omuriimwe akinga enyigi, mureka kuhembera busha omuriro aha itambiro ryangye! Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Tindikubasiima, kandi tindikwija kwikiriza eki murantoijere." 
Malachi1:11 Manya okwiha oburugwa-izooba okuhitsya oburengyerwa-izooba eiziina ryangye ni rikuru omu mahanga. Omu buri mwanya abaanyoterera obubaani, kandi bantambira ebitambo birikusiimwa, ahabw'okuba eiziina ryangye omu mahanga ni rikuru. Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugira." 
Malachi1:12 Kwonka imwe nimungaya, mwaba nimugira ngu eitambiro ryangye rihagaire, n'ebyokurya ebitambirwaho bishemereire kugaywa." 
Malachi1:13 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Nimugira muti: Ka byaturusya! Haza muunyeshaanya. Nimureeta enyamaishwa eziibirwe, eziremaire nari ezirwaire, muba nizo mwatoija! Nyakubaho naagira ati: Mbwenu ezo ku murikuzireeta, ninzisiima?" 
Malachi1:14 Omuntu engobya naakakyeenwe; ogwo oine empaya omu busyo bwe bw'entaama, akahiga kugitamba; kwonka Nyowe Nyakubaho akantambira eine akamogo; haza ndi Omugabe mukuru kandi eiziina ryangye niritiinwa ab'omu mahanga! Nikwo Mukama ow'amahe arikugira." 
Malachi2:1 Mbwenu imwe bahongyerezi 'mwe, ekiragiro eki n'ekyanyu." 
Malachi2:2 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Ku muraabe mutategire kutu eki ndikubagambira, ku muraabe mutataireho mutima kumpa ekitiinwa, niinyija kubooherereza omukyeeno, n'emigisha yaanyu ngihindure omukyeeno. Nangwa n'obu naagikyeenire, ahabw'okuba timurikukitaho mutima." 
Malachi2:3 Reeba, ndyafubira ab'oruzaaro rwanyu, naimwe mbasiigye aha maisho amasha g'enyamaishwa zi mutamba, mbacwe ahi ndi." 
Malachi2:4 Mubone kumanya ku ekyo niinye nkibaragiire, ngu mpamye endagaano yangye na Leevi, Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugira." 
Malachi2:5 Endagaano ei naaragaine nawe, ekaba eri ey'okumutungisa amagara n'obusingye. Kandi nkabimuha ngu abone kuntiina. Haza nawe kwo yantiina, yaaguma nampa ekitiinwa." 
Malachi2:6 Okwegyesa eby'amazima kukaba kutamuruga mu kanwa, kandi akaba atagamba ebitahikire. Akagira naanye emitwarize y'obusingye kandi ehikire, yaiha baingi omu bibi." 
Malachi2:7 Manya abantu beesiga ebi omuhongyerezi agamba, kandi niwe beebuuzaho okubaha obwengye n'okubahabura; ahabw'okuba n'entumwa ya Mukama ow'amahe." 
Malachi2:8 Kwonka mukateishuka omuhanda, mwateeza baingi entsibo ahabw'ebi murikubahabura; mwaita mutyo endagaano ei naaragaine na Leevi; Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugamba." 
Malachi2:9 Nikyo ndikubagayisiza, nkabahindura abataine ku muri omu maisho g'abantu boona, ahabw'okuba mukanga kukuratira emitwarize yangye, mwagwera orubaju omu bi murikwegyesa." 
Malachi2:10 Twena titwine tataitwe omwe? Ruhanga owaatuhangire t'omwe? Mbwenu ahanki omuntu atari mwesigwa ahari mugyenzi we; haza tukashiisha endagaano ya baatatenkuriitwe? 
Malachi2:11 Aba Yuda tibabaire beesigwa, bakorera omuri Isiraeli n'omuri Yerusalemu ebirikuzira, ahabw'okuba bahagaize Omwanya gwa Nyakubaho Ogurikwera, baashwera abakazi barikuramya baaruhanga b'abanyamahanga." 
Malachi2:12 Nkaahenwa ki Nyakubaho amariraho kimwe omu ba Yakobo omuntu weena orikukora ekyo, n'orikukihamya, nari orikukigarukamu, nainga orikureetera Mukama ow'amahe ekitambo." 
Malachi2:13 Eki nakyo nimukikora. Nimujubya eitambiro rya Nyakubaho n'amarira, nimurira kandi nimutsinda; ahabw'okuba takyeeta ha mitoijo ei mumureetera, nobu kwakuba okugiikiriza ashemereirwe." 
Malachi2:14 Nimubuuza muti: Ahanki atarikugiikiriza? Ahabw'okuba Nyakubaho akaba kareebi w'endagaano ei waaragaine n'omukazi waawe ou waashweire okiri omutsigazi, bwanyima okamureebya, haza ari mugyenzi waawe, omukazi ou waaragaine nawe endagaano." 
Malachi2:15 Ruhanga ogwo omwe tarahangire omuntu aine omubiri n'omwitsyo gw'amagara? Mbwenu akaba naayenda ki? N'okumuzaarira abaana barikumutiina. N'ahabw'ekyo mwerinde hatagira omuntu otari mwesigwa aha mukazi we, ou yaashweire ari omutsigazi." 
Malachi2:16 Manya Mukama Ruhanga wa Isiraeli naagira ati: Nyanga okushendana, n'omuntu orikweshwekyerera ari omubisha; Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugamba. N'ahabw'ekyo mwerinde, murekye kuba endeebya." 
Malachi2:17 Nyakubaho mumuruhize n'ebigambo byanyu. Haza mugira muti: Tumuruhize tuta? Mumuruhize ahabw'okugira muti: Abantu boona abakora ekibi, baba barungi omu maisho ga Nyakubaho, kandi abashemerererwa. Nari obu mwebuuraguza muti: Ruhanga okora eby'obwinganisa arahi?" 
Malachi3:1 Reeba, nintuma entumwa yangye kumbandizayo, akantebeekanisiza omuhanda. Kandi Nyakubaho ou musherura aryaija kitaraariire omuri Nyaruju ye. Entumwa y'endagaano ou mutuura mwiniire ekihika, reeba neija, Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugamba." 
Malachi3:2 Kwonka n'oha oribaasa kwemera eizooba ri ariiziraho, kandi ku ariboneka n'oha origumaho ayemereire? Manya we ni nk'omuriro gw'omuheesi ogushemeza ebyoma, nari ni nk'esabundi y'omwozya w'emyenda." 
Malachi3:3 Aryashutama nk'omuheesi orikushemeza efeeza, akagimaramu enkamba. Nikwo arishemeza Abaleevi, akabeeza nk'ezaabu n'efeeza, okuhitsya obu baritoijera Nyakubaho emitoijo ehikire." 
Malachi3:4 Nibwo emitoijo y'aba Yuda n'aba Yerusalemu erigwisa gye Nyakubaho, nk'omu biro bya ira, n'omu myaka eya bwabiso." 
Malachi3:5 Obwo nibwo imwe ndibairira haihi kubacwera orubanja. Ndyaba mushinja w'obwira, w'okwemeza abarogi, abashambani, abarikurahira ebishuba, abarikuryangatanisa abakozi bakabaima ebihembo byabo; abarikunyaga eby'abafaakazi n'eby'efuuzi; n'okushinja abarikuteeza enkokora abashuuhuuki, n'abatarikuntiina; Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugamba." 
Malachi3:6 Manya Nyowe Nyakubaho timpinduka, nikyo imwe beene Yakobo mutarikumarirwaho." 
Malachi3:7 Okwiha omu biro bya baashwenkuriimwe, mutuura nimuteishuka ebi naataireho, mutarikubikuratira. Nimungarukire, naanye mbagarukire; nikwo Mukama ow'amahe arikugamba. Kwonka nimugira muti: Tugarukye tuta?" 
Malachi3:8 Mbwenu omuntu akaaryangatanisa Ruhanga? Manya nimundyangatanisa. Kwonka nimugira muti: Nitukuryangatanisa tuta? Nimundyangatanisiza omuri byakimwe kya ikumi kyanyu, n'omu mitoijo yaanyu." 
Malachi3:9 Mwena ab'eihanga ryona mukyeenirwe, ahabw'okuba nimundyangatanisa." 
Malachi3:10 Mureete kimwe kya ikumi omu ibiikiro, Nyaruju yangye ebone kubamu ebyokurya, reero mubingyerezeho; Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugamba; haza mureebe ku ndaabe ntarikwija kubaigurira amadirisa g'eiguru, nkabashukyeera emigisha ekasheesheka." 
Malachi3:11 Ahabwanyu ndyakabukira enzigye zirikugungunura zirekye kucwekyereza emyaka yaanyu, n'emizaabibu y'omu misiri yaanyu erekye kubura kwana; Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugamba." 
Malachi3:12 Obwo amahanga goona nibwo garibeeta abaine omugisha, ahabw'okuba muryaba mutwire omu nsi y'okushemerererwamu; Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugamba." 
Malachi3:13 Nyakubaho naagira ati: Ebi mungambireho ti birungi. Haza mugira muti: Tukugambireho kubi tuta? 
Malachi3:14 Mugizire muti: Tikiine muhoho okuheereza Ruhanga. Mbwenu nikitugasira ki, okukora ebi arikuturagiira, tukaguma turi nk'abarikuganya omu maisho ga Mukama ow'amahe?" 
Malachi3:15 Muti: Nikyo turikuteekateekyera ngu ab'amaryo baine omugisha; n'enkozi z'ebibi tizigogyeera kwonka, kureka nobu zigyeza Ruhanga, zikira." 
Malachi3:16 Bwanyima abaatiinire Nyakubaho bakagambirana; Nyakubaho yaatega okutu, yaabahurira. Abo abaabaire batiina Nyakubaho bakamuha ekitiinwa, ekitabo ky'okubaijukiraho kikahandiikirwa omu maisho ge." 
Malachi3:17 Mukama ow'amahe yaagira ati: Baryaguma bari abangye ahabwangye, aha izooba ri nditaho. Haza mbagirire embabazi, nk'oku omuntu azigirira omutabani orikumuheereza." 
Malachi3:18 Bwanyima muryagaruka mumanye omutaano gw'abahikiriire n'enyabibi, ogw'oheereza Ruhanga n'ogw'otamuheereza." 
Malachi4:1 Mukama ow'amahe naagira ati: Reeba, ekyo kiro kiryaija nikyotsya nk'eiziiko; obu abanyamaryo boona baryokibwa nk'embuba. Ahari ekyo kiro baryahiira kimwe, harekye kutsigaraho ekyeetwa omuzi gwabo, nari eitaagi ryabo." 
Malachi4:2 Kwonka imwe abantiina, amaani gangye agajuna garyabaturukiraho nk'eizooba, gabaakize nk'amaranzi gaaryo; mugyende nimukina nk'enyana zirikuruga omu kihongore;" 
Malachi4:3 muribatiirire abanyabibi, babe eiju ahansi y'amara g'ebigyere byanyu, aha izooba eri nditaho; Mukama ow'amahe nikwo arikugamba." 
Malachi4:4 Mwijukye eby'omu iteeka ry'omugaragwa wangye Musa; ebyatairweho n'ebyaragiirwe, ebi naamuragiriire ahari Horebu, ngu Abaisiraeli boona babyorobere." 
Malachi4:5 Reeba, ndyabatumaho Eliya omurangi, ekyo kiro kya Nyakubaho ekikuru kandi ekirikutiinisa kitakahikire," 
Malachi4:6 ahindure emitima ya baishe abaana, bagarukane n'abaana baabo; n'ey'abaana, bagarukane na baishebo; ntakaija nkaitsa ensi omukyeeno." 
Matthew1:10 Hezekiya yaazaara Manaase, Manaase yaazaara Amosi," 
Matthew1:11 Amosi yaazaara Yosiya, kandi Yosiya yaazaara Yekoniya n'abarumuna omu biro by'okutwarwa Babulooni bari enkwatwa." 
Luke3:25 Yosefu mwene Matatiya, Matatiya mwene Amosi, Amosi mwene Nahumu, Nahumu mwene Esili, Esili mwene Nagayi," 
Luke3:25 Yosefu mwene Matatiya, Matatiya mwene Amosi, Amosi mwene Nahumu, Nahumu mwene Esili, Esili mwene Nagayi,"
